Genesis1:1 aadi men parameshvar ne akash aur prathvee kee srashtti kee. 
Genesis1:2 aur prathvee bedaul aur sunasan padee thee aur gahare jal ke upar aandhiayara tha: tatha parameshvar ka atma jal ke upar mandlata tha. 
Genesis1:3 tab parameshvar ne kaha, ujiyala ho: to ujiyala ho gaya." 
Genesis1:4 aur parameshvar ne ujiyale ko dekha ki achchha haai aur parameshvar ne ujiyale ko andhiayare se alag kiya. 
Genesis1:5 aur parameshvar ne ujiyale ko din aur andhiayare ko rat kaha. tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar pahila din ho gaya.. 
Genesis1:6 fir parameshvar ne kaha, jal ke beech aek aeesa antar ho ki jal do bhag ho jaae." 
Genesis1:7 tab parameshvar ne aek antar karake usake neeche ke jal aur usake upar ke jal ko alag alag kiya aur vaaisa hee ho gaya. 
Genesis1:8 aur parameshvar ne us antar ko akash kaha. tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar doosara din ho gaya.. 
Genesis1:9 fir parameshvar ne kaha, akash ke neeche ka jal aek sthan men ikattha ho jaae aur sookhee boomi dikhai de aur vaaisa hee ho gaya." 
Genesis1:10 aur parameshvar ne sookhee boomi ko prathvee kaha tatha jo jal ikattha hua usako us ne samudr kaha: aur parameshvar ne dekha ki achchha haai. 
Genesis1:11 fir parameshvar ne kaha, prathvee se haree ghaas, tatha beejavale chhotte chhotte ped, aur faladai vraksha bhee jinake beej unhee men aek aek kee jati ke anusar hote haain prathvee par ugen aur vaaisa hee ho gaya." 
Genesis1:12 to prathvee se haree ghaas, aur chhotte chhotte ped jin men apanee apanee jati ke anusar beej hota haai, aur faladai vraksha jinake beej aek aek kee jati ke anusar unhee men hote haain uge aur parameshvar ne dekha ki achchha haai." 
Genesis1:13 tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar teesara din ho gaya.. 
Genesis1:14 fir parameshvar ne kaha, din ko rat se alag karane ke liye akash ke antar men jyotiyan hon aur ve chinho, aur niyat samayo, aur dino, aur vasharen ke karan hon." 
Genesis1:15 aur ve jyotiyan akash ke antar men prathvee par prakash denevalee bhee ttharen aur vaaisa hee ho gaya. 
Genesis1:16 tab parameshvar ne do badee jyotiyan banain un men se badee jyoti ko din par prabhuta karane ke liye, aur chhottee jyoti ko rat par prabhuta karane ke liye banaya: aur taragan ko bhee banaya." 
Genesis1:17 parameshvar ne unako akash ke antar men isaliye rakha ki ve prathvee par prakash de," 
Genesis1:18 tatha din aur rat par prabhuta karen aur ujiyale ko andhiayare se alag karen: aur parameshvar ne dekha ki achchha haai. 
Genesis1:19 tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar chautha din ho gaya.. 
Genesis1:20 fir parameshvar ne kaha, jal jeeavit praaanaiyon se bahut hee bhr jaa, aur pakshaee prathvee ke upar akash ken antar men uden." 
Genesis1:21 isaliye parameshvar ne jaati jati ke bade bade jala-jantuon kee, aur un sab jeevit praaanaiyon kee bhee sraashtti kee jo chalate firate haain jin se jal bahut hee bhr gaya aur aek aek jati ke udnevale paakshiayon kee bhee srashtti kee: aur parameshvar ne dekha ki achchha haai." 
Genesis1:22 aur parameshvar ne yah kahake unako ashaeesh dee, ki foolo-falo, aur samudr ke jal men bhr jao, aur pakshaee prathvee par baddhen." 
Genesis1:23 tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar panchavan din ho gaya. 
Genesis1:24 fir parameshvar ne kaha, prathvee se aek aek jaati ke jeevit praanee, arthata ghareloo pashu, aur renganevale jantu, aur prathvee ke vanapashu, jati jati ke anusar utpann hon aur vaaisa hee ho gaya." 
Genesis1:25 so parameshvar ne prathvee ke jaati jati ke vanapashuuon ko, aur jaati jati ke ghareloo pashuuon ko, aur jaati jati ke boomi par sab renganevale jantuon ko banaya: aur parameshvar ne dekha ki achchha haai." 
Genesis1:26 fir parameshvar ne kaha, ham manushy ko apane svaroop ke anusar apanee samanata men banaaen aur ve samudr kee machhliyo, aur akash ke pakshiayo, aur ghareloo pashuuo, aur saree prathvee par, aur sab renganevale jantuon par jo prathvee par rengate haai, adhaikar rakhen." 
Genesis1:27 tab parameshvar ne manushy ko apane svaroop ke anusar utpann kiya, apane hee svaroop ke anusar parameshvar ne usako utpann kiya, nar aur naree karake us ne manushyon kee sraashtti kee." 
Genesis1:28 aur parameshvar ne unako ashaeesh dee: aur un se kaha, foolo-falo, aur prathvee men bhr jao, aur usako apane vash men kar lo aur samudr kee machhaliyo, tatha akash ke paakshiayo, aur prathvee par renganevale sab jantuo par adhaikar rakho." 
Genesis1:29 fir parameshvar ne un se kaha, suno, jitane beejavale chhotte chhotte ped saree prathvee ke upar haain aur jitane vrakshaen men beejavale fal hote haai, ve sab maain ne tum ko diae haain ve tumhare bhojan ke liye haain:" 
Genesis1:30 aur jitane prathvee ke pashu, aur akash ke pakshae, aur prathvee par renganevale jantu haai, jin men jeevan ke praan haai, un sab ke khane ke liye maain ne sab hare hare chhotte ped diae haain aur vaaisa hee ho gaya." 
Genesis1:31 tab parameshvar ne jo kuchh banaya tha, sab ko dekha, to kya dekha, ki vah bahut hee achchha haai. tatha sanjh hui fir bhor hua. is prakar chhttvan din ho gaya.." 
Genesis2:1 yon akash aur prathvee aur unakee saree sena ka banana samapt ho gaya. 
Genesis2:2 aur parameshvar ne apana kam jise vah karata tha sataven din samapt kiya. aur us ne apane kiae huae sare kam se sataven din vishraam kiya. 
Genesis2:3 aur parameshvar ne sataven din ko ashaeesh dee aur paavitra ttharaya kyonki us men us ne apanee srashtti kee rachana ke sare kam se vishraam liya. 
Genesis2:4 akash aur prathvee kee utpaati ka vrattant yah haai ki jab ve utpann huae arthata jis din yahova parameshvar ne prathvee aur akash ko banaya: 
Genesis2:5 tab maaidan ka koi paudha boomi par n tha, aur n maaidan ka koi chhotta ped uga tha, kyonki yahova parameshvar ne prathvee par jal naheen barasaya tha, aur boomi par khetee karane ke liye manushy bhee naheen tha" 
Genesis2:6 taubhee kuhara prathvee se uttta tha jis se saree boomi sinch jatee thee 
Genesis2:7 aur yahova parameshvar ne adam ko boomi kee mittee se racha aur usake nathno men jeevan ka shvas foonk diya aur adam jeevata praanee ban gaya. 
Genesis2:8 aur yahova parameshvar ne poorva kee or adan desh men aek baattkai lagai aur vahan adam ko jise us ne racha tha, rakh diya." 
Genesis2:9 aur yahova parameshvar ne boomi se sab bhanati ke vraksha, jo dekhne men manohar aur jinake fal khane men achchhe haain ugaa, aur baattkai ke beech men jeevan ke vraksha ko aur bhle ya bure ke gyaan ke vraksha ko bhee lagaya." 
Genesis2:10 aur us baattkai ko seenchane ke liye aek mahanadee adan se nikalee aur vahan se age bahakar char dhaara men ho gai. 
Genesis2:11 paahilee dhaara ka nam peeshaena haai, yah vahee haai jo haveela nam ke sare desh ko jahan sona milata haai ghore huae haai." 
Genesis2:12 us desh ka sona chokha hota haai, vahan motee aur sulaaimanee patthr bhee milate haain." 
Genesis2:13 aur doosaree nadee ka nam geehona haai, yah vahee haai jo koosh ke sare desh ko ghore huae haai." 
Genesis2:14 aur teesaree nadee ka nam hiekela haai, yah vahee haai jo ashshoora ke poorva kee or bahatee haai. aur chauthee nadee ka nam farat haai." 
Genesis2:15 jab yahova parameshvar ne adam ko lekar adan kee battkai men rakh diya, ki vah us men kam kare aur usakee raksha kare," 
Genesis2:16 tab yahova parameshvar ne adam ko yah agyaa dee, ki too battkai ke sab vrakshaen ka fal bina khttke kha sakata haai:" 
Genesis2:17 par bhle ya bure ke gyaan ka jo vraksha haai, usaka fal too kabhee n khana: kyonaki jis din too usaka fal khaae usee din avashy mar jaaega.." 
Genesis2:18 fir yahova parameshvar ne kaha, adam ka akela rahana achchha naheen maai usake liye aek aeesa sahayak banaunga jo us se mel khaae." 
Genesis2:19 aur yahova parameshvar boomi men se sab jati ke banaaile pashuuo, aur akash ke sab bhaati ke pakshiayon ko rachakar adam ke pas le aya ki dekhe, ki vah unaka kya kya nam rakhta haai aur jis jis jeevit praanee ka jo jo nam adam ne rakha vahee usaka nam ho gaya." 
Genesis2:20 so adam ne sab jati ke ghareloo pashuuo, aur akash ke pakshiayo, aur sab jati ke banaaile pashuuon ke nam rakhe parantu adam ke liye koi aeesa sahayak n mila jo us se mel kha sake." 
Genesis2:21 tab yahova parameshvar ne adam ko bharee neend men dal diya, aur jab vah so gaya tab us ne usakee aek pasulee nikalakar usakee santee mans bhr diya." 
Genesis2:22 aur yahova parameshvar ne us pasulee ko jo us ne adam men se nikalee thee, sree bana diya aur usako adam ke pas le aya." 
Genesis2:23 aur adam ne kaha ab yah meree haddiyon men kee haddee aur mere mans men ka mans haai: so isaka nam naree hoga, kyonki yah nar men se nikalee gai haai." 
Genesis2:24 is karan puroosh apane mata pita ko chhodkar apanee patnee se mila rahega aur ve aek tan banen rahenge. 
Genesis2:25 aur adam aur usakee patnee donon nange the, par lajate n the.." 
Genesis3:1 yahova parameshvar ne jitane banaaile pashu banaae the, un sab men sarpa dhoorta tha, aur us ne sree se kaha, kya sach haai, ki parameshvar ne kaha, ki tum is battkai ke kisee vraksha ka fal n khana?" 
Genesis3:2 sree ne sarpa se kaha, is baattkai ke vrakshaen ke fal ham kha sakate haain." 
Genesis3:3 par jo vraksha battkai ke beech men haai, usake fal ke vishay men parameshvar ne kaha haai ki n to tum usako khana aur n usako choona, naheen to mar jaoge." 
Genesis3:4 tab sarpa ne sree se kaha, tum nishchay n maroge," 
Genesis3:5 varan parameshvar ap janata haai, ki jis din tum usaka fal khaoge usee din tumharee ankhe khul jaaengee, aur tum bhle bure ka gyaan pakar parameshvar ke tuly ho jaoge." 
Genesis3:6 so jab sree ne dekha ki us vraksha ka fal khane men achchha, aur dekhne men manabha, aur buddh idene ke liye chahane yogy bhee haai, tab us ne us men se todkar khaya aur apane pati ko bhee diya, aur us ne bhee khaya." 
Genesis3:7 tab un donon kee ankhe khul gai, aur unako maloom hua ki ve nange haai so unhon ne anjeer ke patte jod jod kar langott bana liye." 
Genesis3:8 tab yahova parameshvar jo din ke ttnde samay baattkai men firata tha usaka shabd unako sunai diya. tab adam aur usakee patnee battkai ke vrakshaen ke beech yahova parameshvar se chhpai gaae. 
Genesis3:9 tab yahova parameshvar ne pukarakar adam se poochha, too kahan haai?" 
Genesis3:10 us ne kaha, maain tera shabd baree men sunakar dr gaya kyonaki maain nanga tha isaliye chhpai gaya." 
Genesis3:11 us ne kaha, kis ne tujhe chitaya ki too nanga haai? jis vraksha ka fal khane ko maai ne tujhe barja tha, kya too ne usaka fal khaya haai?" 
Genesis3:12 adam ne kaha jis sree ko too ne mere sang rahane ko diya haai usee ne us vraksha ka fal mujhe diya, aur maai ne khaya." 
Genesis3:13 tab yahova parameshvar ne sree se kaha, too ne yah kya kiya haai? sree ne kaha, sarpa ne mujhe bahaka diya tab maai ne khaya." 
Genesis3:14 tab yahova parameshvar ne sarpa se kaha, too ne jo yah kiya haai isaliye too sab ghareloo pashuuo, aur sab banaaile pashuuon se adhaik shaaapit haai too pett ke bal chala karega, aur jeevan bhr mittee chattta rahega:" 
Genesis3:15 aur maai tere aur is sree ke beech me, aur tere vansh aur isake vansh ke beech men baair utpann karunga, vah tere sir ko kuchal dalega, aur too usakee aedee ko dsega." 
Genesis3:16 fir sree se us ne kaha, maai teree peeda aur tere garbhvatee hone ke du:kh ko bahut baddhaunga too peedit hokar balak utpann karegee aur teree lalasa tere paati kee or hogee, aur vah tujh par prabhuta karega." 
Genesis3:17 aur adam se us ne kaha, too ne jo apanee patnee kee bat sunee, aur jis vraksha ke fal ke vishay maai ne tujhe agyaa dee thee ki too use n khana usako too ne khaya haai, isaliye boomi tere karan shaaapit haai: too usakee upaj jeevan bhr du:kh ke sath khaya karega:" 
Genesis3:18 aur vah tere liye kantte aur unttkattare ugaaegee, aur too khet kee upaj khaaega" 
Genesis3:19 aur apane mathe ke paseene kee rottee khaya karega, aur ant men mittee men mil jaaega kyonaki too usee men se nikala gaya haai, too mittee to haai aur mittee hee men fir mil jaaega." 
Genesis3:20 aur adam ne apanee patnee ka nam havva rakha kyonaki jitane manushy jeevit haain un sab kee aadimata vahee hui. 
Genesis3:21 aur yahova parameshvar ne adam aur usakee patnee ke liye chamade ke angarakhe banakar unako pahina diae. 
Genesis3:22 fir yahova parameshvar ne kaha, manushy bhle bure ka gyaan pakar ham men se aek ke saman ho gaya haai: isaliye ab aeesa n ho, ki vah hath baddhakar jeevan ke vraksha ka fal bhee tod ke kha le aur sada jeeavit rahe." 
Genesis3:23 tab yahova parameshvar ne usako adan kee battkai men se nikal diya ki vah us boomi par khetee kare jis me se vah banaya gaya tha. 
Genesis3:24 isaliye adam ko us ne nikal diya aur jeevan ke vraksha ke marga ka pahara dene ke liye adan kee battkai ke poorva kee or karubon ko, aur charon or ghoomanevalee jvalamay talavar ko bhee niyukt kar diya.." 
Genesis4:1 jab adam apanee patnee havva ke pas gaya tab us ne garbhvatee hokar kaain ko janm diya aur kaha, maai ne yahova kee sahayata se aek puroosh paya haai." 
Genesis4:2 fir vah usake bhai haabil ko bhee janmee, aur habil to bhed-bakaariyon ka charavaha ban gaya, parantu kaain boomi kee khetee karane vala kisan bana." 
Genesis4:3 kuchh dinon ke pashchata kaain yahova ke pas boomi kee upaj men se kuchh bhentt le aya. 
Genesis4:4 aur haabil bhee apanee bhed-bakaariyon ke kai aek pahilautte bachche bhentt chaddhane le aya aur unakee charbee bhentt chaddhai tab yahova ne habil aur usakee bhentt ko to grahan kiya," 
Genesis4:5 parantu kaain aur usakee bhentt ko us ne grahan n kiya. tab kaain ati krodhait hua, aur usake munh par udasee chha gai." 
Genesis4:6 tab yahova ne kaain se kaha, too kyon krodhait hua? aur tere munh par udasee kyon chha gai haai?" 
Genesis4:7 yaadi too bhla kare, to kya teree bhentt grahan n kee jaaegee? aur yaadi too bhla n kare, to pap dar par chhpai rahata haai, aur usakee lalasa teree aur hogee, aur too us par prabhuta karega." 
Genesis4:8 tab kaain ne apane bhai haabil se kuchh kaha: aur jab ve maaidan men the, tab kaain ne apane bhai habil par chaddhkar use ghaat kiya." 
Genesis4:9 tab yahova ne kaain se poochha, tera bhai habil kahan haai? us ne kaha maloom naheen: kya maai apane bhai ka rakhvala hoon?" 
Genesis4:10 us ne kaha, too ne kya kiya haai? tere bhai ka lohoo boomi men se meree or chillakar meree dohai de raha haai!" 
Genesis4:11 isaliye ab boomi jis ne tere bhai ka lohoo tere hath se peene ke liye apana munh khola haai, usakee or se too shaaapit haai." 
Genesis4:12 chahe too boomi par khetee kare, taubhee usakee pooree upaj fir tujhe n milegee, aur too prathvee par bahetoo aur bhgoda hoga." 
Genesis4:13 tab kaain ne yahova se kaha, mera dand sahane se bahar haai." 
Genesis4:14 dek, too ne aj ke din mujhe boomi par se nikala haai aur maai teree draashtti kee ad me rahoonga aur prathvee par bahetoo aur bhgoda rahoonga aur jo koi mujhe paaega, mujhe ghaat karega." 
Genesis4:15 is karan yahova ne us se kaha, jo koi kaain ko ghaat karega us se sat guna palatta liya jaaega. aur yahova ne kaain ke liye aek chinh ttharaya aeesa ne ho ki koi use pakar mar dale.." 
Genesis4:16 tab kaain yahova ke sammukh se nikal gaya, aur noda nam desh me, jo adan ke poorva kee or haai, rahane laga." 
Genesis4:17 jab kaain apanee patnee ke pas gaya jab vah garbhvatee hui aur hanok ko janmee, fir kaain ne aek nagar basaya aur us nagar ka nam apane putra ke nam par hanok rakha." 
Genesis4:18 aur hanok se irad utpann hua, aur irad ne mahooyaael ko janm diya, aur mahooyaael ne matooshaaael ko, aur matooshaaael ne lemek ko janm diya." 
Genesis4:19 aur lemek ne do striayan byah lee: jin men se aek ka nam ada, aur doosaree ko silla haai." 
Genesis4:20 aur ada ne yabal ko janm diya. vah tambuon men rahana aur janavaron ka palan in dono reeatiyon ka utpadak hua. 
Genesis4:21 aur usake bhai ka nam yoobal haai: vah veena aur bansuree aadi bajon ke bajane kee saree reeti ka utpadak hua. 
Genesis4:22 aur silla ne bhee toobalkaain nam aek putra ko janm diya: vah peetal aur lohe ke sab dhaaravale hathaiyaron ka gaddhnevala hua: aur toobalkaain kee baahin nama thee. 
Genesis4:23 aur lemek ne apanee patnaiyon se kaha, he ada aur he silla meree suno he lemek kee patnaiyo, meree bat par kan lagao: maainne aek puroosh ko jo mere chott lagata tha, arthata aek javan ko jo mujhe ghaayal karata tha, ghaat kiya haai." 
Genesis4:24 jab kaain ka palatta sataguna liya jaaega. to lemek ka sataharaguna liya jaaega. 
Genesis4:25 aur adam apanee patnee ke pas fir gaya aur us ne aek putra ko janm diya aur usaka nam yah kah ke shot rakha, ki parameshvar ne mere liye haabil kee santee, jisako kaain ne ghaat kiya, aek aur vansh tthara diya haai." 
Genesis4:26 aur shot ke bhee aek putra utpann hua aur us ne usaka nam aenosh rakha, usee samay se log yahova se praarthna karane lage.." 
Genesis5:1 adam kee vanshaavalee yah haai. jab parameshvar ne manushy kee srashtti kee tab apane hee svaroop men usako banaya 
Genesis5:2 us ne nar aur naree karake manushyon kee sraashtti kee aur unhen ashaeesh dee, aur unakee sraashtti ke din unaka nam adam rakha." 
Genesis5:3 jab adam aek sau tees varsha ka hua, tab usake dara usakee samanata men us hee ke svaroop ke anusar aek putra utpann hua usaka nam shot rakha." 
Genesis5:4 aur shot ke janm ke pashchata adam att sau varsha jeeavit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann huin." 
Genesis5:5 aur adam kee kul avastha nau sau tees varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.. 
Genesis5:6 jab shot aek sau panch varsha ka hua, tab us ne aenosh ko janm diya." 
Genesis5:7 aur aenosh ke janm ke pashchata shot att sau sat varsha jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann huin." 
Genesis5:8 aur shot kee kul avastha nau sau barah varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.. 
Genesis5:9 jab aenosh nabbe varsha ka hua, tab us ne kenan ko janm diya." 
Genesis5:10 aur kenan ke janm ke pashchata aenosh att sau pandrah varsha jeeavit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian hui." 
Genesis5:11 aur aenosh kee kul avastha nau sau panch varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.. 
Genesis5:12 jab kenan sattr varsha ka hua, tab us ne mahalalel ko janm diya." 
Genesis5:13 aur mahalalel ke janm ke pashchata kenan att sau chalees varsha jeeavit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui." 
Genesis5:14 aur kenan kee kul avastha nau sau das varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.. 
Genesis5:15 jab mahalalel paainsatt varsha ka hua, tab us ne yered ko janm diya." 
Genesis5:16 aur yered ke janm ke pashchata mahalalel att sau tees varsha jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui." 
Genesis5:17 aur mahalalel kee kul avastha att sau panchanave varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.. 
Genesis5:18 jab yered aek sau basatt varsha ka hua, jab us ne hanok ko janm diya." 
Genesis5:19 aur hanok ke janm ke pashchata yered att sau varsha jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui." 
Genesis5:20 aur yered kee kul avastha nau sau basatt varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya. 
Genesis5:21 jab hanok paainsatt varsha ka hua, tab us ne matoosholah ko janm diya." 
Genesis5:22 aur matoosholah ke janm ke pashchata hanok teen sau varsha tak parameshvar ke sath sath chalata raha, aur usake aur bhee bette beattyaian utpann hui." 
Genesis5:23 aur hanok kee kul avastha teen sau paainsatt varsha kee hui. 
Genesis5:24 aur hanok parameshvar ke sath sath chalata tha fir vah lop ho gaya kyonaki parameshvar ne use utta liya. 
Genesis5:25 jab matoosholah aek sau sattasee varsha ka hua, tab us ne lemek ko janm diya." 
Genesis5:26 aur lemek ke janm ke pashchata matoosholah sat sau bayasee varsha jeeavit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui." 
Genesis5:27 aur matoosholah kee kul avastha nau sau unahattr varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.. 
Genesis5:28 jab lemek aek sau bayasee varsha ka hua, tab us ne aek putra janm diya." 
Genesis5:29 aur yah kahakar usaka nam nooh rakha, ki yahova ne jo prathvee ko shaap diya haai, usake vishay yah ladka hamare kam me, aur us kattnai parishram men jo ham karate haai, ham ko shaaantai dega." 
Genesis5:30 aur nooh ke janm ke pashchata lemek panch sau panchanave varsha jeeavit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui." 
Genesis5:31 aur lemek kee kul avastha sat sau satahattr varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya.. 
Genesis5:32 aur nooh panch sau varsha ka hua aur nooh ne shom, aur ham aur yepet ko janm diya.." 
Genesis6:1 fir jab manushy boomi ke upar bahut baddhne lage, aur unake bettyaian utpann hui," 
Genesis6:2 tab parameshvar ke putraen ne manushy kee puatraiyon ko dekha, ki ve sundar haain so unhon ne jis jisako chaha un se byah kar liya." 
Genesis6:3 aur yahova ne kaha, mera atma manushy se sada lon vivad karata n rahega, kyonki manushy bhee shareer hee haai: usakee ayu aek sau bees varsha kee hogee." 
Genesis6:4 un dinon men prathvee par danav rahate the aur isake pashchata jab parameshvar ke putra manushy kee putraiyon ke pas gaae tab unake dara jo santan utpann hua, ve putra shooraveer hote the, jinakee keetira praacheenakal se prachalit haai." 
Genesis6:5 aur yahova ne dekha, ki manushyon kee burai prathvee par baddh gai haai, aur unake man ke vichar men jo kuchh utpann hota haai so nirantar bura hee hota haai." 
Genesis6:6 aur yahova prathvee par manushy ko banane se pachhtaya, aur vah man men ati khedit hua." 
Genesis6:7 tab yahova ne socha, ki maai manushy ko jisakee maai ne srashtti kee haai prathvee ke upar se mitta doonga kyonki maain unake banane se pachhtata hoon." 
Genesis6:8 parantu yahova ke anugrah kee drashtti nooh par banee rahee.. 
Genesis6:9 nooh kee vanshaavalee yah haai. nooh dharmee puroosh aur apane samay ke logon men khra tha, aur nooh parameshvar hee ke sath sath chalata raha." 
Genesis6:10 aur nooh se, shom, aur ham, aur yepet nam, teen putra utpann hue." 
Genesis6:11 us samay prathvee parameshvar kee drashtti men bigad gai thee, aur upadrav se bhr gai thee." 
Genesis6:12 aur parameshvar ne prathvee par jo draashtti kee to kya dekha, ki vah bigadee hui haai kyonaki sab praaanaiyon ne prathvee par apanee apanee chal chalan bigad lee thee." 
Genesis6:13 tab parameshvar ne nooh se kaha, sab praanaiyon ke ant karane ka prashn mere samhane a gaya haai kyonaki unake karan prathvee upadrav se bhr gai haai, isaliye maai unako prathvee samet nash kar daloonga." 
Genesis6:14 isaliye too goper vraksha kee lakadee ka aek jahaj bana le, us men kottariyan banana, aur bheetar bahar us par ral lagana." 
Genesis6:15 aur is ddhng se usako banana: jahaj kee lambai teen sau hat, chaudai pachas hat, aur unchai tees hath kee ho." 
Genesis6:16 jahaj men aek khaidkee banana, aur isake aek hath upar se usakee chht banana, aur jahaj kee aek alang men aek dar rakhna, aur jahaj men pahila, doosara, teesara khnd banana." 
Genesis6:17 aur sun, maain ap prathvee par jalapralay karake sab praaanaiyon ko, jin men jeevan kee atma haai, akash ke neeche se nash karane par hoon: aur sab jo prathvee par haai mar jaaenge." 
Genesis6:18 parantu tere sang maai vacha bandhata hoon: isaaliye too apane putrae, sre, aur bahuon samet jahaj men pravesh karana." 
Genesis6:19 aur sab jeeavit praaanaiyon men se, too aek aek jaati ke do do, arthata aek nar aur aek mada jahaj men le jakar, apane sath jeevit rakhna." 
Genesis6:20 aek aek jaati ke pakshae, aur aek aek jati ke pashu, aur aek aek jati ke boomi par renganevale, sab men se do do tere pas aaenge, ki too unako jeevit rakhe." 
Genesis6:21 aur bhanti bhanati ka bhojy padarth jo khaya jata haai, unako too lekar apane pas ikattha kar rakhna so tere aur unake bhojan ke liye hoga." 
Genesis6:22 parameshvar kee is agyaa ke anusar nooh ne kiya. 
Genesis7:1 aur yahova ne nooh se kaha, too apane sare gharane samet jahaj men ja kyonki maai ne is samay ke logon men se keval tujhee ko apanee drashtti men dharmee dekha haai." 
Genesis7:2 sab jaati ke shuuddh pashuuon men se to too sat sat, arthata nar aur mada lena: par jo pashu shuuddh naheen haai, un men se do do lena, arthata nar aur mada:" 
Genesis7:3 aur akash ke paakshiayon men se bhee, sat sat, arthata nar aur mada lena: ki unaka vansh bachakar saree prathvee ke upar bana rahe." 
Genesis7:4 kyonaki ab sat din aur beetane par maain prathvee par chalees din aur chalees rat tak jal barasata rahoonga jitanee vastuen maain ne banain haai sab ko boomi ke upar se mitta doonga. 
Genesis7:5 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar nooh ne kiya. 
Genesis7:6 nooh kee avastha chh: sau varsha kee thee, jab jalapralay prathvee par aya." 
Genesis7:7 nooh apane putrae, patnee aur bahuon samet, jalapralay se bachane ke liye jahaj men gaya." 
Genesis7:8 aur shuudd, aur ashuuddh dono prakar ke pashuuon men se, pakshiayo," 
Genesis7:9 aur boomi par renganevalon men se bhee, do do, arthata nar aur mada, jahaj men nooh ke pas gaa, jis prakar parameshvar ne nooh ko agyaa dee thee." 
Genesis7:10 sat din ke uparant pralay ka jal prathvee par ane laga. 
Genesis7:11 jab nooh kee avastha ke chh: sauven varsha ke doosare maheene ka sattrahavan din aya usee din bade gahire samudr ke sab sote foott nikale aur akash ke jhrokhe khul gaae. 
Genesis7:12 aur vashara chalees din aur chalees rat nirantar prathvee par hotee rahee. 
Genesis7:13 tteek usee din nooh apane putra shom, ham, aur yepet, aur apanee patnee, aur teenon bahuon samet," 
Genesis7:14 aur unake sang aek aek jati ke sab banaaile pashu, aur aek aek jati ke sab ghareloo pashu, aur aek aek jati ke sab prathvee par renganevale, aur aek aek jaati ke sab udnevale pakshae, jahaj men gaae." 
Genesis7:15 jitane praaanaiyon men jeevan kee atma thee unakee sab jatiyon men se do do nooh ke pas jahaj men gaae. 
Genesis7:16 aur jo gaa, vah parameshvar kee agyaa ke anusar sab jaati ke praaanaiyon men se nar aur mada gaae. tab yahova ne usaka dar band kar diya." 
Genesis7:17 aur prathvee par chalees din tak pralay hota raha aur panee bahut baddhta hee gaya jis se jahaj upar ko uttne laga, aur vah prathvee par se uncha utt gaya." 
Genesis7:18 aur jal baddhte baddhte prathvee par bahut hee baddh gaya, aur jahaj jal ke upar upar taairata raha." 
Genesis7:19 aur jal prathvee par atyant baddh gaya, yahan tak ki saree dharatee par jitane bade bade pahad the, sab oob gaae." 
Genesis7:20 jal to pandrah hath upar baddh gaya, aur pahad bhee oob gaae" 
Genesis7:21 aur kya pakshae, kya ghareloo pashu, kya banaaile pashu, aur prathvee par sab chalanevale praanee, aur jitane jantu prathvee me bahutayat se bhr gaae the, ve sab, aur sab manushy mar gaae." 
Genesis7:22 jo jo sthl par the un men se jitanon ke nathnon men jeevan ka shvas tha, sab mar mitte." 
Genesis7:23 aur kya manushy, kya pashu, kya renganevale jantu, kya akash ke pakshae, jo jo boomi par the, so sab prathvee par se mitt gaae keval nooh, aur jitane usake sang jahaj men the, ve hee bach gaae." 
Genesis7:24 aur jal prathvee par aek sau pachas din tak prabal raha.. 
Genesis8:1 aur parameshvar ne nooh kee, aur jitane banaaile pashu, aur ghareloo pashu usake sang jahaj men the, un sabhon kee sudhai lee: aur parameshvar ne prathvee par pavan bahai, aur jal ghattne laga." 
Genesis8:2 aur gaahire samudr ke sote aur akash ke jhrokhe band ho gaae aur us se jo vashara hotee thee so bhee thm gai. 
Genesis8:3 aur aek sau pachas din ke pashachata jal prathvee par se lagatar ghattne laga. 
Genesis8:4 sataven maheene ke sattrahaven din ko, jahaj ararat nam pahad par ttkai gaya." 
Genesis8:5 aur jal dasaven maheene tak ghattta chala gaya, aur dasaven maheene ke paahile din ko, pahadon kee chottyaia dikhlai deen." 
Genesis8:6 fir aeesa hua ki chalees din ke pashchata nooh ne apane banaae huae jahaj kee khaidkee ko kholakar, aek kaua uda diya:" 
Genesis8:7 jab tak jal prathvee par se sookh n gaya, tab tak kaua idhar udhar firata raha." 
Genesis8:8 fir us ne apane pas se aek kabootaree ko uda diya, ki dekhen ki jal boomi se ghatt gaya ki naheen." 
Genesis8:9 us kabootaree ko apane paair ke tale ttekane ke liye koi adhaar ne mila, so vah usake pas jahaj men lautt ai: kyonki saree prathvee ke upar jal hee jal chhaya tha tab us ne hath baddhakar use apane pas jahaja men le liya." 
Genesis8:10 tab aur sat din tak ttharakar, us ne usee kabootaree ko jahaja men se fir uda diya." 
Genesis8:11 aur kabootaree sanjh ke samay usake pas a gai, to kya dekha ki usakee chonch men jalapai ka aek naya patta haai is se nooh ne jan liya, ki jal prathvee par ghatt gaya haai." 
Genesis8:12 fir us ne sat din aur ttharakar usee kabootaree ko uda diya aur vah usake pas fir kabhee lauttkar n ai. 
Genesis8:13 fir aeesa hua ki chh: sau aek varsha ke paahile maheene ke paahile din jal prathvee par se sookh gaya. tab nooh ne jahaja kee chht kholakar kya dekha ki dharatee sookh gai haai. 
Genesis8:14 aur doosare maheene ke sataisaven din ko prathvee pooree reeti se sookh gai.. 
Genesis8:15 tab parameshvar ne, nooh se kaha," 
Genesis8:16 too apane putrae, patnee, aur bahuon samet jahaja men se nikal a." 
Genesis8:17 kya pakshae, kya pashu, kya sab bhanti ke renganevale jantu jo prathvee par rengate haai, jitane shareeradhaaree jeevajantu tere sang haai, us sab ko apane sath nikal le a, ki prathvee par un se bahut bachche utpann hon aur ve foolen-fale, aur prathvee par faail jaaen." 
Genesis8:18 tab nooh, aur usake putra, aur patnee, aur bahuae, nikal ain:" 
Genesis8:19 aur sab chaupaa, renganevale jantu, aur pakshae, aur jitane jeevajantu prathvee par chalate firate haai, so sab jati jati karake jahaja men se nikal aae." 
Genesis8:20 tab nooh ne yahova ke liye aek vedee banai aur sab shuuddh pashuuo, aur sab shuuddh paakshiayon men se, kuchh kuchh lekar vedee par homabali chaddhaya." 
Genesis8:21 is par yahova ne sukhdayak sugandha pakar socha, ki manushy ke karan maain fir kabhee boomi ko shaap n doonga, yadhypi manushy ke man men bachapan se jo kuchh utpann hota haai so bura hee hota haai taubhee jaaisa maain ne sab jeevon ko ab mara haai, vaaisa unako fir kabhee n maroonga." 
Genesis8:22 ab se jab tak prathvee banee rahegee, tab tak bone aur kattne ke samay, ttnd aur tapan, dhoopakal aur shaeetakal, din aur rat, nirantar hote chale jaaenge.." 
Genesis9:1 fir parameshvar ne nooh aur usake putraen ko ashaeesh dee aur un se kaha ki foolo-falo, aur baddho, aur prathvee men bhr jao." 
Genesis9:2 aur tumhara dr aur bhy prathvee ke sab pashuuo, aur akash ke sab pakshiayo, aur boomi par ke sab renganevale jantuo, aur samudr kee sab machhliyon par bana rahega: ve sab tumhare vash men kar diae jate haain." 
Genesis9:3 sab chalanevale jantu tumhara ahar honge jaaisa tum ko hare hare chhotte ped diae the, vaaisa hee ab sab kuchh deta hoon." 
Genesis9:4 par mans ko praan samet arthata lohoo samet tum n khana. 
Genesis9:5 aur nishchay maain tumhara lohoo arthata praan ka palatta loonga: sab pashuuo, aur manushyo, donon se maain use loonga: manushy ke praan ka palatta maai aek aek ke bhai bandha se loonga." 
Genesis9:6 jo koi manushy ka lohoo bahaaega usaka lohoo manushy hee se bahaya jaaega kyonaki parameshvar ne manushy ko apane hee svaroop ke anusar banaya haai. 
Genesis9:7 aur tum to foolo-falo, aur baddho, aur prathvee men bahut bachche janma ke us men bhr jao.." 
Genesis9:8 fir parameshvar ne nooh aur usake putraen se kaha," 
Genesis9:9 suno, maain tumhare sath aur tumhare pashchata jo tumhara vansh hoga, usake sath bhee vacha bandhata hoon." 
Genesis9:10 aur sab jeeavit praaanaiyon se bhee jo tumhare sang haai kya pakshaee kya ghareloo pashu, kya prathvee ke sab banaaile pashu, prathvee ke jitane jeevajantu jahaj se nikale haain sab ke sath bhee meree yah vacha bandhatee haai:" 
Genesis9:11 aur maai tumhare sath apanee is vacha ko poora karoonga ki sab praanee fir jalapralay se nash n honge: aur prathvee ke nash karane ke liye fir jalapralay n hoga. 
Genesis9:12 fir parameshvar ne kaha, jo vacha maai tumhare sat, aur jitane jeevit praanee tumhare sang haain un sab ke sath bhee yug yug kee peeaddhiyon ke liye bandhata hoon usaka yah chinh haai:" 
Genesis9:13 ki maain ne badal me apana dhanush rakha haai vah mere aur prathvee ke beech men vacha ka chinh hoga. 
Genesis9:14 aur jab maain prathvee par badal faailaun jab badal men dhanush dekh padega. 
Genesis9:15 tab meree jo vacha tumhare aur sab jeevit shareeradhaaree praanaiyon ke sath bandhaee haai usako maain smaran karoonga, tab aeesa jalapralay fir n hoga jis se sab praaanaiyon ka vinash ho." 
Genesis9:16 badal men jo dhanush hoga maain use dekh ke yah sada kee vacha smaran karoonga jo parameshvar ke aur prathvee par ke sab jeevit shareeradhaaree praanaiyon ke beech bandhaee haai. 
Genesis9:17 fir parameshvar ne nooh se kaha jo vacha maain ne prathvee bhr ke sab praaanaiyon ke sath bandhaee haai, usaka chinh yahee haai.." 
Genesis9:18 nooh ke jo putra jahaja men se nikale, ve shom, ham, aur yepet the: aur ham to kanan ka pita hua." 
Genesis9:19 nooh ke teen putra ye hee haai, aur inaka vansh saree prathvee par faail gaya." 
Genesis9:20 aur nooh kisanee karane laga, aur us ne dakh kee baree lagai." 
Genesis9:21 aur vah dakhmadha peekar matavala hua aur apane tamboo ke bheetar nanga ho gaya. 
Genesis9:22 tab kanan ke pita ham ne, apane pita ko nanga dekha, aur bahar akar apane donon bhaiyon ko batala diya." 
Genesis9:23 tab shom aur yepet donon ne kapada lekar apane kandhaen par rakha, aur peechhe kee or ulatta chalakar apane pita ke nange tan ko ddhap diya, aur ve apana mukh peechhe kiae huae the isaliye unhon ne apane pita ko nanga n dekha." 
Genesis9:24 jab nooh ka nasha utar gaya, tab us ne jan liya ki usake chhotte putra ne us se kya kiya haai." 
Genesis9:25 isaliye us ne kaha, kanan shaapit ho: vah apane bhai bandhauon ke dason ka das ho." 
Genesis9:26 fir us ne kaha, shom ka parameshvar yahova dhany haai, aur kanan shom ka das hove." 
Genesis9:27 parameshvar yepet ke vansh ko faailaae aur vah shom ke tambuon me base, aur kanan usaka das hove." 
Genesis9:28 jalapralay ke pashchata nooh saddhe teen sau varsha jeeavit raha. 
Genesis9:29 aur nooh kee kul avastha saddhe nau sau varsha kee hui: tatpashchata vah mar gaya. 
Genesis10:1 nooh ke putra jo shom, ham aur yepet the unake putra jalapralay ke pashchata utpann huae: unakee vanshaavalee yah haai.." 
Genesis10:2 yepet ke putra: gomer, magog, madaai, yavan, toobal, meshok, aur teeras hue." 
Genesis10:3 aur gomer ke putra: ashakanaj, reepat, aur togarma hue." 
Genesis10:4 aur yavan ke vansh men aeleesha, aur tashareesha, aur kittee, aur dodanee log huae." 
Genesis10:5 inake vansh anyajatiyon ke deepon ke deshaen men aeese bantt gaa, ki ve bhainn bhainn bhashaao, kulo, aur jatiyon ke anusar alag alag ho gaae.." 
Genesis10:6 fir ham ke putra: koosha, aur misr, aur foot aur kanan huae." 
Genesis10:7 aur koosh ke putra saba, haveela, sabata, rama, aur sabootaka huae: aur rama ke putra shaba aur dadan hue." 
Genesis10:8 aur koosh ke vansh men nimraed bhee hua prathvee par paahila veer vahee hua haai. 
Genesis10:9 vahee yahova kee drashtti men parakramee shaikar khelanevala tthara, is se yah kahavat chalee haai ki nimraed ke saman yahova kee draashtti men parakramee shaikar khelanevala." 
Genesis10:10 aur usake rajy ka arambh shainar desh men babul, akkad, aur kalane hua." 
Genesis10:11 us desh se vah nikalakar ashshoora ko gaya, aur neenave, rahoboteer, aur kalah ko," 
Genesis10:12 aur neenave aur kalah ke beech resen haai, use bhee basaya, bada nagar yahee haai." 
Genesis10:13 aur misr ke vansh men loodee, anamee, lahabee, naptoohee," 
Genesis10:14 aur patrausee, kasaloohee, aur kaptoree log hua, kasaloohiyon me se to paalishtee log nikale.." 
Genesis10:15 fir kanan ke vansh men usaka jyeshtt seedon, tab hit," 
Genesis10:16 aur yaboosee, aemoree, girgashae," 
Genesis10:17 hivvee, arkee, seenee," 
Genesis10:18 arvadee, samaree, aur hamatee log bhee huae: fir kanaaniyon ke kul bhee faail gaae." 
Genesis10:19 aur kananiyon ka sivana seedon se lekar garar ke marga se hokar ajja tak aur fir sadom aur amora aur adama aur saboyeem ke marga se hokar lasha tak hua. 
Genesis10:20 ham ke vansh men ye hee huae aur ye bhainn bhainn kulo, bhashaao, deshae, aur jatiyon ke anusar alag alag ho gaae.." 
Genesis10:21 fir shom, jo sab aeberavanashaiyon ka moolapuroosh hua, aur jo yepet ka jyeshtt bhai tha, usake bhee putra utpann huae." 
Genesis10:22 shom ke putra: aelam, ashshoora, arpakshada, lood aur aram hue." 
Genesis10:23 aur aram ke putra: us, hool, geter aur mash huae." 
Genesis10:24 aur arpakshada ne sholah ko, aur sholah ne aeber ko janm diya." 
Genesis10:25 aur aeber ke do putra utpann hua, aek ka nam peleg is karan rakha gaya ki usake dinon men prathvee bantt gai, aur usake bhai ka nam yoktan haai." 
Genesis10:26 aur yoktan ne almodad, sholep, hasarmavet, yerah," 
Genesis10:27 yadoravam, ujal, dikla," 
Genesis10:28 obal, abeemaael, shaba," 
Genesis10:29 opeer, haveela, aur yobab ko janm diya: ye hee sab yoktan ke putra huae." 
Genesis10:30 inake rahane ka sthan mesha se lekar sapara jo poorva men aek pahad haai, usake marga tak hua." 
Genesis10:31 shom ke putra ye hee hue aur ye bhainn bhainn kulo, bhashaao, deshaen aur jatiyon ke anusar alag alag ho gaae.." 
Genesis10:32 nooh ke putraen ke gharane ye hee haain: aur unakee jatiyon ke anusar unakee vanshaavaaliyan ye hee haain aur jalapralay ke pashchata prathvee bhr kee jaatiyan inheen men se hokar bantt gai.. 
Genesis11:1 saree prathvee par aek hee bhasha, aur aek hee bolee thee." 
Genesis11:2 us samay log poorva kee aur chalate chalate shainar desh men ek maaidan pakar us men bas gae. 
Genesis11:3 tab ve apas men kahane lage, ki ao ham intten bana bana ke bhlee bhnaati ag men pakaae, aur unhon ne patthr ke sthan men intt se, aur choone ke sthan men mittee ke gare se kam liya." 
Genesis11:4 fir unhon ne kaha, ao, ham aek nagar aur aek gummatt bana le, jisakee chottee akash se bat kare, is prakar se ham apana nam karen aeesa n ho ki ham ko saree prathvee par faailana pade." 
Genesis11:5 jab log nagar aur gummatt banane lage tab inhen dekhne ke liye yahova utar aya. 
Genesis11:6 aur yahova ne kaha, maain kya dekhta hoo, ki sab aek hee dal ke haain aur bhasha bhee un sab kee aek hee haai, aur unhon ne aeesa hee kam bhee arambh kiya aur ab jitana ve karane ka yatn karenge, us men se kuchh unake liye anahona n hoga." 
Genesis11:7 isaliye ao, ham utar ke unakee bhasha men badee gadbadee dale, ki ve aek doosare kee bolee ko n samajh saken." 
Genesis11:8 is prakar yahova ne unako, vahan se saree prathvee ke upar faaila diya aur unhon ne us nagar ka banana chhod diya." 
Genesis11:9 is karan us nagar ko nam babul pada kyonki saree prathvee kee bhasha men jo gadbadee haai, so yahova ne vaheen dalee, aur vaheen se yahova ne manushyon ko saree prathvee ke upar faaila diya.." 
Genesis11:10 shom kee vanshaavalee yah haai. jal pralay ke do varsha pashchata jab shom aek sau varsha ka hua, tab us ne arpakshada ko janm diya." 
Genesis11:11 aur arpakshada ne janm ke pashchata shom panch sau varsha jeevit raha aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.. 
Genesis11:12 jab arpakshada paaintees varsha ka hua, tab us ne sholah ko janm diya." 
Genesis11:13 aur sholah ke janm ke pashchata arpakshada char sau teen varsha aur jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.." 
Genesis11:14 jab sholah tees varsha ka hua, tab usake dara aeber ko janm hua." 
Genesis11:15 aur aeber ke janm ke pashchata sholah char sau teen varsha aur jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.." 
Genesis11:16 jab aeber chauntees varsha ka hua, tab usake dara peleg ka janm hua." 
Genesis11:17 aur peleg ke janm ke pashchata aeber char sau tees varsha aur jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.." 
Genesis11:18 jab peleg tees varsha ko hua, tab usake dara roo ka janm hua." 
Genesis11:19 aur roo ke janm ke pashchata peleg do sau nau varsha aur jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.." 
Genesis11:20 jab roo battees varsha ka hua, tab usake dara saroog ka janm hua." 
Genesis11:21 aur saroog ke janm ke pashchata roo do sau sat varsha aur jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.." 
Genesis11:22 jab saroog tees varsha ka hua, tab usake dara nahor ka janm hua." 
Genesis11:23 aur nahor ke janm ke pashchata saroog do sau varsha aur jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.." 
Genesis11:24 jab nahor unatees varsha ka hua, tab usake dara terah ka janm hua." 
Genesis11:25 aur terah ke janm ke pashchata nahor aek sau unnees varsha aur jeevit raha, aur usake aur bhee bette bettyaian utpann hui.." 
Genesis11:26 jab tak terah sattr varsha ka hua, tab tak usake dara abraam, aur nahor, aur haran utpann huae.." 
Genesis11:27 terah kee yah vanshaavalee haai. terah ne abraam, aur nahor, aur haran ko janm diya aur haran ne loot ko janm diya." 
Genesis11:28 aur haran apane pita ke samhane hee, kasadiyon ke ur nam nagar me, jo usakee janmaboomi thee, mar gaya." 
Genesis11:29 abraam aur nahor ne striayan byah leen: abraam kee patnee ka nam to saraai, aur nahor kee patnee ka nam milka tha, yah us haran kee bettee thee, jo milka aur yiska donon ka pita tha." 
Genesis11:30 saraai to banjh thee usake santan n hui. 
Genesis11:31 aur terah apana putra abraam, aur apana pota loot jo haran ka putra tha, aur apanee bahoo saraai, jo usake putra abraam kee patnee thee in sabhon ko lekar kasadiyon ke ur nagar se nikal kanan desh jane ko chala par haran nam desh men pahuchakar vaheen rahane laga." 
Genesis11:32 jab terah do sau panch varsha ka hua, tab vah haran desh men mar gaya.." 
Genesis12:1 yahova ne abraam se kaha, apane desha, aur apanee janmaboomi, aur apane pita ke ghar ko chhodkar us desh men chala ja jo maain tujhe dikhaunga." 
Genesis12:2 aur maain tujh se aek badee jati banaunga, aur tujhe ashaeesh doonga, aur tera nam bada karoonga, aur too ashaeesh ka mool hoga." 
Genesis12:3 aur jo tujhe ashaeervad de, unhen maain ashaeesh doonga aur jo tujhe kose, use maain shaap doonga aur boomandl ke sare kul tere dara ashaeesh paaenge." 
Genesis12:4 yahova ke is vachan ke anusar abraam chala aur loot bhee usake sang chala aur jab abraam haran desh se nikala us samay vah pachahattr varsha ka tha. 
Genesis12:5 so abraam apanee patnee saraai, aur apane bhteeje loot ko, aur jo dhan unhon ne ikattha kiya tha, aur jo praanee unhon ne haran men praapt kiae the, sab ko lekar kanan desh men jane ko nikal chala aur ve kanan desh men a bhee gaae." 
Genesis12:6 us desh ke beech se jate huae abraam shakem me, jahan more ka banj vraksha haai, panhucha us samay us desh men kananee log rahate the." 
Genesis12:7 tab yahova ne abraam ko darshan dekar kaha, yah desh maain tere vansh ko doonga: aur us ne vahan yahova ke liye jis ne use darshan diya tha, aek vedee banai." 
Genesis12:8 fir vahan se kooch karake, vah us pahad par aya, jo betel ke poorva kee or haai aur apana tamboo us sthan men khda kiya jisakee pachchhim kee or to betel, aur poorva kee or aee haai aur vahan bhee us ne yahova ke liye aek vedee banai: aur yahova se praarthna kee" 
Genesis12:9 aur abraam kooch karake dakkhian desh kee or chala gaya.. 
Genesis12:10 aur us desh men akal pada: aur abraam misr desh ko chala gaya ki vahan paradeshaee hokar rahe , kyonki desh men bhyankar akal pada tha. 
Genesis12:11 fir aeesa hua ki misr ke nikatt pahunchakar, us ne apanee patnee saraai se kaha, sun, mujhe maloom haai, ki too aek sundar sree haai:" 
Genesis12:12 is karan jab misree tujhe dekhenge, tab kahenge, yah usakee patnee haai, so ve mujh ko to mar dalenge, par tujh ko jeetee rakh lenge." 
Genesis12:13 so yah kahana, ki maain usakee baahin hoon jis se tere karan mera kalyan ho aur mera praan tere karan bache." 
Genesis12:14 fir aeesa hua ki jab abraam misr men aya, tab misriyon ne usakee patnee ko dekha ki yah ati sundar haai." 
Genesis12:15 aur firaun ke haakimon ne usako dekhkar firaun ke samhane usakee prashansa kee: so vah sree firaun ke ghar men rakhee gai. 
Genesis12:16 aur us ne usake karan abraam kee bhlai kee so usako bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, dasa-dasiya, gadahe-gadaahiya, aur untt mile." 
Genesis12:17 tab yahova ne firaun aur usake gharane par, abraam kee patnee saraai ke karan badee badee vipaatiayan daleen." 
Genesis12:18 so firaun ne abraam ko bulavakar kaha, too ne mujh se kya kiya haai? too ne mujhe kyon naheen bataya ki vah teree patnee haai?" 
Genesis12:19 too ne kyon kaha, ki vah teree baahin haai? maain ne use apanee hee patnee banane ke liye liya parantu ab apanee patnee ko lekar yahan se chala ja." 
Genesis12:20 aur firaun ne apane adamiyon ko usake vishay men agyaa dee aur unhon ne usako aur usakee patnee ko, sab sampati samet jo usaka tha, vida kar diya.." 
Genesis13:1 tab abraam apanee patnee, aur apanee saree sampati lekar, loot ko bhee sang liye hua, misr ko chhodkar kanan ke dakkhian desh men aya." 
Genesis13:2 abraam bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, aur sone-roope ka bada dhanee tha." 
Genesis13:3 fir vah dakkhian desh se chalakar, betel ke pas usee sthan ko pahuncha, jahan usaka tamboo pahale pada tha, jo betel aur aee ke beech men haai." 
Genesis13:4 yah sthan us vedee ka haai, jise us ne pahale banai thee, aur vahan abraam ne fir yahova se praarthna kee." 
Genesis13:5 aur loot ke pas bhee, jo abraam ke sath chalata tha, bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, aur tamboo the." 
Genesis13:6 so us desh men un donon kee samai n ho sakee ki ve ikatthe rahen: kyonki unake pas bahut dhan tha isaliye ve ikatthe n rah sake. 
Genesis13:7 so abraam, aur loot kee bhed-bakaree, aur gaya-baail ke charavahon ke beech men jhgada hua: aur us samay kananee, aur paarijjee log, us desh men rahate the." 
Genesis13:8 tab abraam loot se kahane laga, mere aur tere beech, aur mere aur tere charavahon ke beech men jhgada n hone paae kyonki ham log bhai bandha haain." 
Genesis13:9 kya sara desh tere samhane naheen? so mujh se alag ho, yaadi too bain or jaae to maain daahinee or jaunga aur yadi too dahinee or jaae to maain bain or jaunga." 
Genesis13:10 tab loot ne ankh uttakar, yaradan nadee ke pas valee saree tarai ko dekha, ki vah sab sinchee hui haai." 
Genesis13:11 jab tak yahova ne sadom aur amora ko nash n kiya tha, tab tak soar ke marga tak vah tarai yahova kee baattkai, aur misr desh ke saman upaja thee." 
Genesis13:12 abraam to kanan desh men raha, par loot us tarai ke nagaron men rahane laga aur apana tamboo sadom ke nikatt khda kiya." 
Genesis13:13 sadom ke log yahova ke lekhe men bade dushtt aur papee the. 
Genesis13:14 jab loot abraam se alag ho gaya tab usake pashchata yahova ne abraam se kaha, ankh uttakar jis sthan par too haai vahan se uttra-dakkhian, poorva-pashchaim, charon or drashtti kara." 
Genesis13:15 kyonaki jitanee boomi tujhe dikhai detee haai, us sab ko maain tujhe aur tere vansh ko yug yug ke liye doonga." 
Genesis13:16 aur maain tere vansh ko prathvee kee dhool ke kinakon kee nai bahut karoonga, yahan tak ki jo koi prathvee kee dhool ke kinakon ko gin sakega vahee tera vansh bhee gin sakega." 
Genesis13:17 ut, is desh kee lambai aur chaudai men chal fira kyonaki maain use tujhee ko doonga." 
Genesis13:18 isake pashachata abraam apana tamboo ukhadkar, mamra ke banjon ke beech jo hebraen men the jakar rahane laga, aur vahan bhee yahova kee aek vedee banai.." 
Genesis14:1 shainar ke raja amraapel, aur aellasar ke raja aryok, aur aelam ke raja kadorlaomer, aur goyeem ke raja tidal ke dinon men aeesa hua," 
Genesis14:2 ki unhon ne sadom ke raja bera, aur amora ke raja bishara, aur adama ke raja shainab, aur saboyeem ke raja shomeber, aur bela jo soar bhee kahalata haai, in rajaon ke virooddh yuddh kiya." 
Genesis14:3 in panchon ne sieem nam tarai me, jo khare tal ke pas haai, aeka kiya." 
Genesis14:4 barah varsha tak to ye kadorlaomer ke adhaeen rahe par terahaven varsha men usake virooddh utte. 
Genesis14:5 so chaudahaven varsha men kadorlaomer, aur usake sangee raja aa, aur ashatarotkanam men rapaiyon ko, aur ham men joojiyon ko, aur shabekiryataaim men aemiyon ko," 
Genesis14:6 aur seir nam pahad men horiyon ko, marate marate us aelparan tak jo jangal ke pas haai pahunch gaae." 
Genesis14:7 vahan se ve lauttkar aenmaishapat ko aa, jo kadesh bhee kahalata haai, aur amalekiyon ke sare desh ko, aur un aemoriyon ko bhee jeet liya, jo hasasontamar men rahate the." 
Genesis14:8 tab sadom, amora, adama, saboyeem, aur bela, jo soar bhee kahalata haai, inake raja nikale, aur sieem nam tarai. me, unake sath yuddh ke liye panti bandhaee." 
Genesis14:9 arthata aelam ke raja kadorlaomer, goyeem ke raja tidal, shainar ke raja amraapel, aur aellasar ke raja aryok, in charon ke virooddh un panchon ne panti bandhaee." 
Genesis14:10 sieem nam tarai men jahan lasar mittee ke gadhe hee gadhe the sadom aur amora ke raja bhagate bhagate un men gir pade, aur jo bache ve pahad par bhag gaae." 
Genesis14:11 tab ve sadom aur amora ke sare dhan aur bhojan vastuon ko loott latt kar chale gaae. 
Genesis14:12 aur abraam ka bhteeja loot, jo sadom men rahata tha usako bhee dhan samet ve lekar chale gaae." 
Genesis14:13 tab aek jan jo bhagakar bach nikala tha us ne jakar ibraee abraam ko samachar diya abraam to aemoree mamra, jo aeshkol aur aner ka bhai tha, usake banj vrakshaen ke beech men rahata tha aur ye log abraam ke sang vacha bandho huae the." 
Genesis14:14 yah sunakar ki usaka bhteeja bandhauai men gaya haai, abraam ne apane teen sau attarah shaikshiat, yuddh kaushal men nipun dason ko lekar jo usake kuttumb men utpann huae the, asr shasr dhaaran karake dan tak unaka peechha kiya." 
Genesis14:15 aur apane dason ke alag alag dal bandhakar rat ko un par chaddhai karake unako mar liya aur hoba tak, jo daamishk kee uttr or haai, unaka peechha kiya." 
Genesis14:16 aur sare dhan ko, aur apane bhteeje loot, aur usake dhan ko, aur striayon ko, aur sab bandhauon ko, lautta le aya." 
Genesis14:17 jab vah kadorlaomer aur usake sathee rajaon ko jeetakar lautta ata tha tab sadom ka raja shaave nam tarai me, jo raja kee bhee kahalatee haai, us se bhentt karane ke liye aya." 
Genesis14:18 jab shaalem ka raja melkeesedek, jo paramapradhaan ishvar ka yajak tha, rottee aur dakhmadha le aya." 
Genesis14:19 aur us ne abraam ko yah ashaeervad diya, ki paramapradhaan ishvar kee or se, jo akash aur prathvee ka aadhaikaree haai, too dhany ho." 
Genesis14:20 aur dhany haai paramapradhaan ishvar, jis ne tere drohiyon ko tere vash men kar diya haai. tab abraam ne usako sab ka dashamansh diya." 
Genesis14:21 jab sadom ke raja ne abraam se kaha, praaanaiyon ko to mujhe de, aur dhan ko apane pas rakh." 
Genesis14:22 abraam ne sadom ke raja ne kaha, paramapradhaan ishvar yahova, jo akash aur prathvee ka aadhaikaree haai," 
Genesis14:23 usakee maain yah shapath khata hoo, ki jo kuchh tera haai us men se n to maai ek soot, aur n jootee ka bandhan, n koi aur vastu loonga ki too aeesa n kahane paa, ki abraam mere hee karan dhanee hua." 
Genesis14:24 par jo kuchh in javanon ne kha liya haai aur unaka bhag jo mere sath gaae the arthata aner, aeshkol, aur mamra maain naheen lauttaunga ve to apana apana bhag rakh len.." 
Genesis15:1 in baton ke pashchata yahova ko yah vachan darshan men abraam ke pas pahuncha, ki he abraam, mat dra teree ddhal aur tera atyant bada fal maain hoon." 
Genesis15:2 abraam ne kaha, he prabhu yahova maain to nirvansh hoo, aur mere ghar ka vaaris yah damishkee aeleeaejer hoga, so too mujhe kya dega?" 
Genesis15:3 aur abraam ne kaha, mujhe to too ne vansh naheen diya, aur kya dekhta hoo, ki mere ghar men utpann hua aek jan mera varis hoga." 
Genesis15:4 tab yahova ka yah vachan usake pas pahuncha, ki yah tera vaaris n hoga, tera jo nij putra hoga, vahee tera varis hoga." 
Genesis15:5 aur us ne usako bahar le jake kaha, akash kee or drashtti karake taragan ko gin, kya too unako gin sakata haai? fir us ne us se kaha, tera vansh aeesa hee hoga." 
Genesis15:6 us ne yahova par vishvas kiya aur yahova ne is bat ko usake lekhe men dharma gina. 
Genesis15:7 aur us ne us se kaha maain vahee yahova hoon jo tujhe kasadiyon ke ur nagar se bahar le aya, ki tujh ko is desh ka aadhaikar doon." 
Genesis15:8 us ne kaha, he prabhu yahova maain kaaise janoon ki maain isaka aadhaikaree hoonga?" 
Genesis15:9 yahova ne us se kaha, mere liye teen varsha kee aek kalor, aur teen varsha kee aek bakaree, aur teen varsha ka aek menddha, aur aek pinduk aur kabootar ka aek bachcha le." 
Genesis15:10 aur in sabhon ko lekar, us ne beech men se do ttukade kar diya, aur ttukadon ko amhane-samhane rakha: par chidiyaon ko us ne ttukade n kiya." 
Genesis15:11 aur jab mansaharee pakshaee lothon par jhpatte, tab abraam ne unhen uda diya." 
Genesis15:12 jab soorya ast hone laga, tab abraam ko bharee neend ai aur dekho, atyant bhy aur andhakar ne use chha liya." 
Genesis15:13 tab yahova ne abraam se kaha, yah nishchay jan ki tere vansh paraae desh men paradeshaee hokar rahenge, aur usake desh ke logon ke das ho jaaenge aur ve unako char sau varsha lon du:kh denge" 
Genesis15:14 fir jis desh ke ve das honge usako maain dand doonga: aur usake pashchata ve bada dhan vahan se lekar nikal aaenge. 
Genesis15:15 too to apane pitaron men kushal ke sath mil jaaega tujhe poore buddhape men mittee dee jaaegee. 
Genesis15:16 par ve chauthee peeddhee men yahan fir aaenge: kyonaki ab tak aemoriyon ka adharma poora naheen hua. 
Genesis15:17 aur aeesa hua ki jab soorya ast ho gaya aur ghaer andhakar chha gaya, tab aek angettee jis men se dhauan uttta tha aur aek jalata hua paleeta dekh pada jo un ttukadon ke beech men se hokar nikal gaya." 
Genesis15:18 usee din yahova ne abraam ke sath yah vacha bandhae, ki misr ke mahanad se lekar parat nam bade nad tak jitana desh haai," 
Genesis15:19 arthata, keniyo, kanijjaiyo, kadamoniyo," 
Genesis15:20 hitiayo, pareeajjaiyo, rapaiyo," 
Genesis15:21 aemoriyo, kanaaniyo, girgaashaiyon aur yaboosiyon ka desh maain ne tere vansh ko diya haai.." 
Genesis16:1 abraam kee patnee saraai ke koi santan n thee: aur usake haajira nam kee aek misree laundee thee. 
Genesis16:2 so saraai ne abraam se kaha, dek, yahova ne to meree kokh band kar rakhee haai so maain tujh se binatee karatee hoon ki too meree laundee ke pas ja: sambhv haai ki mera ghar usake dara bas jaae." 
Genesis16:3 so saraai kee yah bat abraam ne man lee. so jab abraam ko kanan desh men rahate das varsha beet chuke tab usakee sree saraai ne apanee misree laundee haajira ko lekar apane pati abraam ko diya, ki vah usakee patnee ho." 
Genesis16:4 aur vah haajira ke pas gaya, aur vah garbhvatee hui aur jab us ne jana ki vah garbhvatee haai tab vah apanee svaminee ko apanee draashtti men tuchchh samajhne lagee." 
Genesis16:5 tab saraai ne abraam se kaha, jo mujh par upadrav hua so tere hee sir par ho: maain ne to apanee laundee ko teree patnee kar diya par jab us ne jana ki vah garbhvatee haai, tab vah mujhe tuchchh samajhne lagee, so yahova mere aur tere beech men nyay kare." 
Genesis16:6 abraam ne saraai se kaha, dekh teree laundee tere vash men haai: jaaisa tujhe bhla lage vaaisa hee usake sath kara. so saraai usako du:kh dene lagee aur vah usake samhane se bhag gai." 
Genesis16:7 tab yahova ke doot ne usake jangal men shoor ke marga par jal ke aek sote ke pas pakar kaha," 
Genesis16:8 he saraai kee laundee hajira, too kahan se atee aur kahan ko jatee haai? us ne kaha, maain apanee svaaminee saraai ke samhane se bhg ai hoon." 
Genesis16:9 yahova ke doot ne us se kaha, apanee svaminee ke pas lautt ja aur usake vash men raha." 
Genesis16:10 aur yahova ke doot ne us se kaha, maain tere vansh ko bahut baddhaunga, yahan tak ki bahutayat ke karan usakee ganna n ho sakegee." 
Genesis16:11 aur yahova ke doot ne us se kaha, dekh too garbhvatee haai, aur putra janegee, so usaka nam ishmaael rakhna kyonki yahova ne tere du:kh ka hal sun liya haai." 
Genesis16:12 aur vah manushy banaaile gadahe ke saman hoga usaka hath sabake virooddh uttega, aur sab ke hath usake virooddh uttenge aur vah apane sab bhai bandhauon ke madhy men basa rahega." 
Genesis16:13 tab us ne yahova ka nam jis ne us se baten kee thee, attaaelaroi rakhkar kaha ki, kaya maain yahan bhee usako jate huae dekhne pai jo mera dekhnehara haai?" 
Genesis16:14 is karan us kuen ka nam lahaairoi kuan pada vah to kadesh aur bered ke beech men haai. 
Genesis16:15 so haajira abraam ke dara aek putra janee: aur abraam ne apane putra ka nam, jise haajira janee, ishmaael rakha." 
Genesis16:16 jab haajira ne abraam ke dara ishmaael ko janm diya us samay abraam chhyaiasee varsha ka tha. 
Genesis17:1 jab abraam ninnanave varsha ka ho gaya, tab yahova ne usako darshan dekar kaha maain sarvashaktaiman ishvar hoon meree upaasthiaati men chal aur siddh hota ja." 
Genesis17:2 aur maain tere sath vacha bandhoonga, aur tere vansh ko atyant hee baddhaunga, aur tere vansh ko atyant hee baddhaunga." 
Genesis17:3 tab abraam munh ke bal gira: aur parameshvar us se yon baten kahata gaya," 
Genesis17:4 dek, meree vacha tere sath bandhaee rahegee, isaliye too jaatiyon ke samooh ka moolaapita ho jaaega." 
Genesis17:5 so ab se tera nam abraam n rahega parantu tera nam ibraaheem hoga kyonaki maain ne tujhe jatiyon ke samooh ka moolaapita tthara diya haai. 
Genesis17:6 aur maain tujhe atyant hee faulaun falaunga, aur tujh ko jati jati ka mool bana doonga, aur tere vansh men raja utpann honge." 
Genesis17:7 aur maain tere sat, aur tere pashchata peeddhee peeddhee tak tere vansh ke sath bhee is ashay kee yug yug kee vacha bandhata hoo, ki maain tera aur tere pashchata tere vansh ka bhee parameshvar rahoonga." 
Genesis17:8 aur maain tujh ko, aur tere pashchata tere vansh ko bhee, yah sara kanan desha, jis men too paradeshaee hokar rahata haai, is reeati doonga ki vah yug yug unakee nij boomi rahegee, aur maain unaka parameshvar rahoonga." 
Genesis17:9 fir parameshvar ne ibraaheem se kaha, too bhee mere sath bandhaee hui vacha ka palan karana too aur tere pashchata tera vansh bhee apanee apanee peeddhee men usaka palan kare." 
Genesis17:10 mere sath bandhaee hui vacha, jo tujhe aur tere pashchata tere vansh ko palanee padegee, so yah haai, ki tum men se aek aek puroosh ka khtana ho." 
Genesis17:11 tum apanee apanee khladee ka khtana kara lena jo vacha mere aur tumhare beech men haai, usaka yahee chinh hoga." 
Genesis17:12 peeddhee peeddhee men keval tere vansh hee ke log naheen par jo tere ghar men utpann ho, va paradeshaiyon ko roopa dekar mol liye jaae, aeese sab puroosh bhee jab att din ke hon jaae, tab unaka khtana kiya jaae." 
Genesis17:13 jo tere ghar men utpann ho, athva tere roope se mol liya jaa, usaka khtana avashy hee kiya jaae so meree vacha jisaka chinh tumharee deh men hoga vah yug yug rahegee." 
Genesis17:14 jo puroosh khtanarahit rahe, arthata jisakee khladee ka khtana n ho, vah praanee apane logon me se nash kiya jaa, kyonaki us ne mere sath bandhaee hui vacha ko tod diya.." 
Genesis17:15 fir parameshvar ne ibraaheem se kaha, teree jo patnee saraai haai, usako too ab saraai n kahana, usaka nam sara hoga." 
Genesis17:16 aur maain usako ashaeesh doonga, aur tujh ko usake dara aek putra doonga aur maain usako aeesee ashaeesh doonga, ki vah jati jati kee moolamata ho jaaegee aur usake vansh men rajy rajy ke raja utpann honge." 
Genesis17:17 tab ibraaheem munh ke bal gir pada aur hansa, aur apane man hee man kahane laga, kya sau varsha ke puroosh ke bhee santan hoga aur kya sara jo nabbe varsha kee haai putra janegee?" 
Genesis17:18 aur ibraaheem ne parameshvar se kaha, ishmaael teree drashtti men bana rahe! yahee bahut haai." 
Genesis17:19 tab parameshvar ne kaha, nishchay teree patnee sara ke tujh se aek putra utpann hoga aur too usaka nam isahak rakhna: aur maain usake sath aeesee vacha bandhoonga jo usake pashchata usake vansh ke liye yug yug kee vacha hogee." 
Genesis17:20 aur ishmaael ke vishay men bhee maai ne teree sunee haai: maain usako bhee ashaeesh doonga, aur use faulaun falaunga aur atyant hee baddha doonga us se barah pradhaan utpann honge, aur maain us se aek badee jaati banaunga." 
Genesis17:21 parantu maain apanee vacha isahak hee ke sath bandhoonga jo sara se agale varsha ke isee niyukt samay men utpann hoga. 
Genesis17:22 tab parameshvar ne ibraaheem se baten karanee band keen aur usake pas se upar chaddh gaya. 
Genesis17:23 tab ibraaheem ne apane putra ishmaael ko, usake ghar men jitane utpann huae the, aur jitane usake roopaye se mol liye gaae the, nidan usake ghar men jitane puroosh the, un sabhon ko leke usee din parameshvar ke vachan ke anusar unakee khladee ka khtana kiya." 
Genesis17:24 jab ibraaheem kee khladee ka khtana hua tab vah ninnanave varsha ka tha. 
Genesis17:25 aur jab usake putra ishmaael kee khladee ka khtana hua tab vah terah varsha ka tha. 
Genesis17:26 ibraaheem aur usake putra ishmaael donon ka khtana aek hee din hua. 
Genesis17:27 aur usake ghar men jitane puroosh the jo ghar men utpann hua, tatha jo paradeshaiyon ke hath se mol liye gaae the, sab ka khtana usake sath hee hua.." 
Genesis18:1 ibraaheem mamra ke banjo ke beech kadee dhoop ke samay tamboo ke dar par baaitta hua tha, tab yahova ne use darshan diya:" 
Genesis18:2 aur us ne ankh uttakar drashtti kee to kya dekha, ki teen puroosh usake samhane khde haain: jab us ne unhe dekha tab vah un se bhentt karane ke liye tamboo ke dar se dauda, aur boomi par girakar dandvata kee aur kahane laga," 
Genesis18:3 he prabhu, yadi mujh par teree anugrah kee draashtti haai to maain binatee karata hoo, ki apane das ke pas se chale n jana." 
Genesis18:4 maain thoda sa jal lata hoon aur ap apane panv dhaekar is vraksha ke tale vishraam karen. 
Genesis18:5 fir maain aek ttukada rottee le aun aur us se ap apane jeev ko trapt karen tab usake pashchata age baddhen: kyonaki ap apane das ke pas isee liye padhaare haain. unhon ne kaha, jaaisa too kahata haai vaaisa hee kara." 
Genesis18:6 so ibraaheem ne tamboo men sara ke pas faurtee se jakar kaha, teen saa maaida faurtee se goondha, aur faulake bana." 
Genesis18:7 fir ibraaheem gay baail ke jhund men dauda, aur aek komal aur achchha bachhda lekar apane sevak ko diya, aur usane faurtee se usako pakaya." 
Genesis18:8 tab us ne makkhn, aur doodha, aur vah bachhda, jo us ne pakavaya tha, lekar unake age paros diya aur ap vraksha ke tale unake pas khda raha, aur ve khane lage." 
Genesis18:9 unhon ne us se poochha, teree patnee sara kahan haai? us ne kaha, vah to tamboo men haai." 
Genesis18:10 us ne kaha maain vasant retu men nishchay tere pas fir aunga aur tab teree patnee sara ke ek putra utpann hoga. aur sara tamboo ke dar par jo ibraaheem ke peechhe tha sun rahee thee. 
Genesis18:11 ibraaheem aur sara dono bahut booddhe the aur sara ka sreedharma band ho gaya tha 
Genesis18:12 so sara man men hans kar kahane lagee, maain to booddhee hoo, aur mera paati bhee booddha haai, to kya mujhe yah sukh hoga?" 
Genesis18:13 tab yahova ne ibraaheem se kaha, sara yah kahakar kayon hansee, ki kya mere, jo aeesee buaddhiya ho gai hoo, sachamuch aek putra utpann hoga?" 
Genesis18:14 kya yahova ke liye koi kam kattnai haai? niyat samay me, arthata vasant retu me, maain tere pas fir aunga, aur sara ke putra utpann hoga." 
Genesis18:15 tab sara dr ke mare yah kahakar mukar gai, ki maain naheen hansee. us ne kaha, naheen too hansee to thee.." 
Genesis18:16 fir ve puroosh vahan se chalakar, sadom kee or takane lage: aur ibraaheem unhen vida karane ke liye unake sang sang chala." 
Genesis18:17 tab yahova ne kaha, yah jo maain karata hoon so kya ibraaheem se chhpai rakoon?" 
Genesis18:18 ibraaheem se to nishchay aek badee aur samarthee jati upajegee, aur prathvee kee saree jatiyan usake dara ashaeesh paaengee." 
Genesis18:19 kyonaki maain janata hoo, ki vah apane putraen aur parivar ko jo usake peechhe rah jaaenge agyaa dega ki ve yahova ke marga men attl bane rahe, aur dharma aur nyay karate rahe, isaaliye ki jo kuchh yahova ne ibraaheem ke vishay men kaha haai use poora kare." 
Genesis18:20 kyonaki maain janata hoo, ki vah apane putraen aur parivar ko jo usake peechhe rah jaaenge agyaa dega ki ve yahova ke marga men attl bane rahe, aur dharma aur nyay karate rahe, isaaliye ki jo kuchh yahova ne ibraaheem ke vishay men kaha haai use poora kare." 
Genesis18:21 isaliye maain utarakar dekoonga, ki usakee jaaisee chillahatt mere kan tak pahunchee haai, unhon ne tteek vaaisa hee kam kiya haai ki naheen: aur n kiya ho to maain use jan loonga." 
Genesis18:22 so ve puroosh vahan se mud ke sadom kee or jane lage: par ibraaheem yahova ke age khda rah gaya. 
Genesis18:23 tab ibraaheem usake sameep jakar kahane laga, kya sachamuch dushtt ke sang dharmee ko bhee nash karega?" 
Genesis18:24 kadachita us nagar men pachas dharmee hon: to kya too sachamuch us sthan ko nash karega aur un pachas dhaarmiyon ke karan jo us men ho n chhodega? 
Genesis18:25 is prakar ka kam karana tujh se door rahe ki dushtt ke sang dharmee ko bhee mar dale aur dharmee aur dushtt donon kee aek hee dasha ho. 
Genesis18:26 yahova ne kaha yadi mujhe sadom men pachas dharmee mile, to unake karan us sare sthan ko chhooonga." 
Genesis18:27 fir ibraaheem ne kaha, he prabhu, sun maain to mittee aur rakh hoon taubhee maain ne itanee ddhttiai kee ki tujh se baten karoon." 
Genesis18:28 kadachita un pachas dharmiyon me panch ghatt jaae: to kya too panch hee ke ghattne ke karan us sare nagar ka nash karega? us ne kaha, yadi mujhe us men paaintalees bhee mile, taubhee usaka nash n karoonga." 
Genesis18:29 fir us ne us se yah bhee kaha, kadachita vahan chalees milen. us ne kaha, to maain chalees ke karan bhee aeesa ne karoonga." 
Genesis18:30 fir us ne kaha, he prabhu, krodha n kar, to maain kuchh aur kahoon: kadachita vahan tees milen. us ne kaha yaadi mujhe vahan tees bhee mile, taubhee aeesa n karoonga." 
Genesis18:31 fir us ne kaha, he prabhu, sun, maain ne itanee ddhttiai to kee haai ki tujh se baten karoon: kadachita us men bees milen. us ne kaha, maain bees ke karan bhee usaka nash n karoonga." 
Genesis18:32 fir us ne kaha, he prabhu, krodha n kar, maain aek hee bar aur kahoonga: kadachita us men das milen. us ne kaha, to maain das ke karan bhee usaka nash n karoonga." 
Genesis18:33 jab yahova ibraaheem se baten kar chuka, tab chala gaya: aur ibraaheem apane ghar ko lautt gaya.." 
Genesis19:1 sanjh ko ve do doot sadom ke pas aae: aur loot sadom ke faattk ke pas baaitta tha: so unako dekhkar vah un se bhentt karane ke liye utta aur munh ke bal jhukakar dandvata kar kaha 
Genesis19:2 he mere prabhuo, apane das ke ghar men padhaaria, aur rat bhr vishraam keeajia, aur apane panv dhaeiye, fir bhor ko uttkar apane marga par jaiae. unhon ne kaha, naheen ham chauk hee men rat bitaaenge." 
Genesis19:3 aur us ne un se bahut binatee karake unhen manaya so ve usake sath chalakar usake ghar men aae aur us ne unake liye jevanar taaiyar kee, aur bina khmeer kee rottyaian banakar unako khailai." 
Genesis19:4 unake so jane ke pahile, us sadom nagar ke purooshaen ne, javanon se lekar booddhon tak, varan charon or ke sab logon ne akar us ghar ko ghor liya" 
Genesis19:5 aur loot ko pukarakar kahane lage, ki jo puroosh aj rat ko tere pas aae haain ve kahan haain? unako hamare pas bahar le a, ki ham un se bhog karen." 
Genesis19:6 tab loot unake pas dar bahar gaya, aur kivad ko apane peechhe band karake kaha," 
Genesis19:7 he mere bhaiyo, aeesee burai n karo." 
Genesis19:8 suno, meree do beattyaian haain jinhon ne ab tak puroosh ka munh naheen dekha, ichchha ho to maain unhen tumhare pas bahar le au, aur tum ko jaaisa achchha lage vaaisa vyavahar un se karo: par in purooshaen se kuchh n karo kyonaki ye meree chht ke tale aae haain." 
Genesis19:9 unahon ne kaha, hatt ja. fir ve kahane lage, too ek paradeshaee hokar yahan rahane ke liye aya par ab nyayee bhee ban baaitta haai: so ab ham un se bhee aadhaik tere sath burai karenge. aur ve puroosh loot ko bahut dabane lage, aur kivad todne ke liye nikatt ae." 
Genesis19:10 tab un pahunon ne hath baddhakar, loot ko apane pas ghar men kheench liya, aur kivad ko band kar diya." 
Genesis19:11 aur unhon ne kya chhotte, kya bade, sab purooshaen ko jo ghar ke dar par the andha kar diya, so ve dar ko ttttolate ttttolate thk gaae." 
Genesis19:12 fir un pahunon ne loot se poochha, yahan tere aur kaun kaun haain? damad, bette, bettyaia, va nagar men tera jo koi ho, un sabhon ko lekar is sthan se nikal ja." 
Genesis19:13 kyonaki ham yah sthan nash karane par haai, isaaliye ki usakee chillahatt yahova ke sammukh baddh gai haai aur yahova ne hamen isaka satyanash karane ke liye bhej diya haai." 
Genesis19:14 tab loot ne nikalakar apane damadon ko, jinake sath usakee bettyaien kee sagai ho gai thee, samajha ke kaha, utto, is sthan se nikal chalo: kyonaki yahova is nagar ko nash kiya chahata haai. par vah apane damadon kee drashtti men ttttha karanehara sa jan pada." 
Genesis19:15 jab pah fattne lagee, tab dooton ne loot se faurtee karai aur kaha, ki ut, apanee patnee aur dono bettyaien ko jo yahan haain le ja: naheen to too bhee is nagar ke adharma men bhsm ho jaaega." 
Genesis19:16 par vah vilamb karata raha, is se un purooshaen ne usaka aur usakee patnee, aur donon beattyaien ko hath pakad liya kyonaki yahova kee daya us par thee: aur usako nikalakar nagar ke bahar kar diya." 
Genesis19:17 aur aeesa hua ki jab unhon ne unako bahar nikala, tab us ne kaha apana praan lekar bhag ja peechhe kee aur n takana, aur tarai bhr men n ttharana us pahad par bhag jana, naheen to too bhee bhsm ho jaaega." 
Genesis19:18 loot ne un se kaha, he prabhu, aeesa n kar:" 
Genesis19:19 dek, tere das par teree anugrah kee drashtti hui haai, aur too ne is men badee krapa dikhai, ki mere praan ko bachaya haai par maain pahad par bhag naheen sakata, kaheen aeesa n ho, ki koi vipaati mujh par a pade, aur maain mar jaun:" 
Genesis19:20 dek, vah nagar aeesa nikatt haai ki maain vahan bhag sakata hoo, aur vah chhotta bhee haai: mujhe vaheen bhag jane de, kya vah chhotta naheen haain? aur mera praan bach jaaega." 
Genesis19:21 us ne us se kaha, dek, maain ne is vishay men bhee teree binatee angeekar kee haai, ki jis nagar kee charcha too ne kee haai, usako maain nash n karoonga." 
Genesis19:22 faurtee se vahan bhag ja kyonaki jab tak too vahan n pahuche tab tak maain kuchh n kar sakoonga. isee karan us nagar ka nam soar pada. 
Genesis19:23 loot ke soar ke nikatt pahuchate hee soorya prathvee par uday hua. 
Genesis19:24 tab yahova ne apanee or se sadom aur amora par akash se gandhak aur ag barasai 
Genesis19:25 aur un nagaron ko aur sampoorn tarai ko, aur nagaron ko aur us sampoorn tarai ko, aur nagaron ke sab nivaasiyon ko, boomi kee saree upaj samet nash kar diya." 
Genesis19:26 loot kee patnee ne jo usake peechhe thee draashtti faer ke peechhe kee or dekha, aur vah namak ka khmbha ban gai." 
Genesis19:27 bhor ko ibraaheem uttkar us sthan ko gaya, jahan vah yahova ke sammukh khda tha" 
Genesis19:28 aur sadom, aur amora, aur us tarai ke sare desh kee or ankh uttakar kya dekha, ki us desh men se dhadhakatee hui bhttee ka sa dhauan utt raha haai." 
Genesis19:29 aur aeesa hua, ki jab parameshvar ne us tarai ke nagaron ko, jin men loot rahata tha, ulatt pulatt kar nash kiya, tab us ne ibraaheem ko yad karake loot ko us ghattna se bacha liya." 
Genesis19:30 aur loot ne soar ko chhod diya, aur pahad par apanee donon bettyaien samet rahane laga kyonaki vah soar men rahane se drata tha: isaaliye vah aur usakee donon bettyaian vahan aek gufaa men rahane lage." 
Genesis19:31 tab badee bettee ne chhottee se kaha, hamara pita booddha haai, aur prathvee bhr men koi aeesa puroosh naheen jo sansar kee reeti ke anusar hamare pas aae:" 
Genesis19:32 so a, ham apane pita ko dakhmadha pilakar, usake sath soae, jis se ki ham apane pita ke vansh ko bachaae rakhen." 
Genesis19:33 so unhon ne usee din rat ke samay apane pita ko dakhmadha pilaya, tab badee bettee jakar apane pita ke pas lett gai par us ne n jana, ki vah kab lettee, aur kab utt gai." 
Genesis19:34 aur aeesa hua ki doosare din badee ne chhottee se kaha, dek, kal rat ko maain apane pita ke sath soi: so aj bhee rat ko ham usako dakhmadha pilaaen tab too jakar usake sath sona ki ham apane pita ke dara vansh utpann karen." 
Genesis19:35 so unhon ne us din bhee rat ke samay apane pita ko dakhmadha pilaya: aur chhottee bettee jakar usake pas lautt gai: par usako usake bhee sone aur uttne ke samay ka gyaan n tha. 
Genesis19:36 is prakar se loot kee dono bettyaian apane pita se garbhvatee hui. 
Genesis19:37 aur badee aek putra janee, aur usaka nam moab rakha: vah moab nam jaati ka jo aj tak haai moolapita hua." 
Genesis19:38 aur chhottee bhee aek putra janee, aur usaka nam benammee rakha vah ammona vanshaiyon ka jo aj tak haain moolapita hua.." 
Genesis20:1 fir ibraaheem vahan se kooch kar daakkhian desh men akar kadesh aur shoor ke beech men tthara, aur garar men rahane laga." 
Genesis20:2 aur ibraaheem apanee patnee sara ke vishay men kahane laga, ki vah meree baahin haai: so garar ke raja abeemelek ne doot bhejakar sara ko bulava liya." 
Genesis20:3 rat ko parameshvar ne svapn men abeemelek ke pas akar kaha, sun, jis sree ko too ne rakh liya haai, usake karan too mar jaaega, kyonki vah suhaagin haai." 
Genesis20:4 parantu abeemelek usake pas n gaya tha: so us ne kaha, he prabhu, kya too nirdosh jaati ka bhee ghaat karega?" 
Genesis20:5 kya usee ne svayan mujh se naheen kaha, ki vah meree baahin haai? aur us sree ne bhee ap kaha, ki vah mera bhai haai: maain ne to apane man kee khrai aur apane vyavahar kee sachchai se yah kam kiya." 
Genesis20:6 parameshvar ne us se svapn men kaha, ha, maain bhee janata hoon ki apane man kee khrai se too ne yah kam kiya haai aur maain ne tujhe rok bhee rakha ki too mere virooddh pap n kare: isee karan maain ne tujh ko use choone naheen diya." 
Genesis20:7 so ab us puroosh kee patnee ko use faer de kyonki vah nabee haai, aur tere liye praarthna karega, aur too jeeta rahega: par yadi too usako n faer de to jan rak, ki to, aur tere jitane log haai, sab nishchay mar jaaenge." 
Genesis20:8 bihan ko abeemelek ne tadke uttkar apane sab karmachaariyon ko bulavakar ye sab baten sunai: aur ve log bahut dr gaae. 
Genesis20:9 tab abeemelek ne ibraaheem ko bulavakar kaha, too ne ham se yah kya kiya haai? aur maain ne tera kya bigada tha, ki too ne mere aur mere rajy ke upar aeesa bada pap dal diya haai? too ne mujh se vah kam kiya haai jo uchit n tha." 
Genesis20:10 fir abeemelek ne ibraaheem se poochha, too ne kya samajhkar aeesa kam kiya?" 
Genesis20:11 ibraaheem ne kaha, maain ne yah socha tha, ki is sthan men parameshvar ka kuchh bhee bhy n hoga so ye log meree patnee ke karan mera ghaat karenge." 
Genesis20:12 aur fir bhee sachamuch vah meree baahin haai, vah mere pita kee bettee to haai par meree mata kee bettee naheen fir vah meree patnee ho gai." 
Genesis20:13 aur aeesa hua ki jab parameshvar ne mujhe apane pita ka ghar chhodkar nikalane kee agyaa dee, tab maain ne us se kaha, itanee krapa tujhe mujh par karanee hogee: ki ham donon jahan jahan jaaen vahan vahan too mere vishay men kahana, ki yah mera bhai haai." 
Genesis20:14 tab abeemelek ne bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, aur dasa-dasiyan lekar ibraaheem ko dee, aur usakee patnee sara ko bhee use faer diya." 
Genesis20:15 aur abeemelek ne kaha, dek, mera desh tere samhane haai jahan tujhe bhave vahan raha." 
Genesis20:16 aur sara se us ne kaha, dek, maain ne tere bhai ko roope ke aek hajar ttukade diae haain: dek, tere sare sangiyon ke samhane vahee teree ankhon ka parda banega, aur sabhon ke samhane too tteek hogee." 
Genesis20:17 tab ibraaheem ne yahova se praarthna kee, aur yahova ne abeemelek, aur usakee patnee, aur daasiyon ko changa kiya aur ve janane lageen." 
Genesis20:18 kyonaki yahova ne ibraaheem kee patnee sara ke karan abeemelek ke ghar kee sab striayon kee kokhon ko pooree reeati se band kar diya tha.. 
Genesis21:1 so yahova ne jaaisa kaha tha vaaisa hee sara kee suadhai leke usake sath apane vachan ke anusar kiya. 
Genesis21:2 so sara ko ibraaheem se garbhvatee hokar usake buddhape men usee niyukt samay par jo parameshvar ne us se ttharaya tha aek putra utpann hua. 
Genesis21:3 aur ibraaheem ne apane putra ka nam jo sara se utpann hua tha isahak rakha. 
Genesis21:4 aur jab usaka putra isahak att din ka hua, tab us ne parameshvar kee agyaa ke anusar usak khtana kiya." 
Genesis21:5 aur jab ibraaheem ka putra isahak utpann hua tab vah aek sau varsha ka tha. 
Genesis21:6 aur sara ne kaha, parameshvar ne mujhe prafauallait kar diya haai isaaliye sab sunanevale bhee mere sath prafauallait honge." 
Genesis21:7 fir us ne yah bhee kaha, ki kya koi kabhee ibraaheem se kah sakata tha, ki sara ladkon ko doodha pilaaegee? par dekho, mujh se usake buddhape men aek putra utpann hua." 
Genesis21:8 aur vah ladka baddha aur usaka doodha chhudaya gaya: aur isahak ke doodha chhudane ke din ibraaheem ne badee jevanar kee. 
Genesis21:9 tab sara ko misree haajira ka putra, jo ibraaheem se utpann hua tha, hansee karata hua dekh pada." 
Genesis21:10 so is karan us ne ibraaheem se kaha, is dasee ko putra sahit barabas nikal de: kyonki is dasee ka putra mere putra isahak ke sath bhagee n hoga." 
Genesis21:11 yah bat ibraaheem ko apane putra ke karan buree lagee. 
Genesis21:12 tab parameshvar ne ibraaheem se kaha, us ladke aur apanee dasee ke karan tujhe bura n lage jo bat sara tujh se kahe, use man, kyonaki jo tera vansh kahalaaega so isahak hee se chalega." 
Genesis21:13 dasee ke putra se bhee maain aek jati utpann karoonga isaaliye ki vah tera vansh haai. 
Genesis21:14 so ibraaheem ne bihan ko tadke uttkar rottee aur panee se bhree chamade kee thailee bhee haajira ko dee, aur usake kandho par rakhee, aur usake ladke ko bhee use dekar usako vida kiya: so vah chalee gai, aur bershoba ke jangal men bhraman karane lagee." 
Genesis21:15 jab thailee ka jal chuk gaya, tab us ne ladke ko aek jhadee ke neeche chhod diya." 
Genesis21:16 aur ap us se teer bhr ke ttppe par door jakar usake samhane yah sochakar baaitt gai, ki mujh ko ladke kee mratyu dekhnee n pade. tab vah usake samhane baaittee hui chilla chilla ke rone lagee." 
Genesis21:17 aur parameshvar ne us ladke kee sunee aur usake doot ne svarga se haajira ko pukar ke kaha, he haajira tujhe kya hua? mat dra kyonki jahan tera ladka haai vahan se usakee avaj parameshvar ko sun padee haai." 
Genesis21:18 ut, apane ladke ko utta aur apane hath se sambhal kyonki maain usake dara ek badee jati banaunga." 
Genesis21:19 parameshvar ne usakee ankhe khol dee, aur usako aek kuna dikhai pada so us ne jakar thailee ko jal se bhrakar ladke ko pilaya." 
Genesis21:20 aur parameshvar us ladke ke sath raha aur jab vah bada hua, tab jangal men rahate rahate dhanudhararee ban gaya." 
Genesis21:21 vah to paran nam jangal men raha karata tha: aur usakee mata ne usake liye misr desh se aek sree mangavai.. 
Genesis21:22 un dinon men aeesa hua ki abeemelek apane senapaati peekol ko sang lekar ibraaheem se kahane laga, jo kuchh too karata haai us men parameshvar tere sang rahata haai:" 
Genesis21:23 so ab mujh se yahan is vishay men parameshvar kee kiriya kha, ki too n to mujh se chhl karega, aur n kabhee mere vansh se karega, parantu jaaisee karoona maain ne tujh par kee haai, vaaisee hee too mujh par aur is desh par bhee jis men too rahata haai karega" 
Genesis21:24 ibraaheem ne kaha, maain kiriya khaunga." 
Genesis21:25 aur ibraaheem ne abeemelek ko aek kuaen ke vishay me, jo abeemelek ke dason ne bareeyai se le liya tha, ulahana diya." 
Genesis21:26 tab abeemelek ne kaha, maai naheen janata ki kis ne yah kam kiya: aur too ne bhee mujhe naheen bataya, aur n maai ne aj se paahile isake vishay men kuchh suna." 
Genesis21:27 tak ibraaheem ne bhed-bakaree, aur gaya-baail lekar abeemelek ko diae aur un donon ne apas men vacha bandhaee." 
Genesis21:28 aur ibraaheem ne bhed kee sat bachchee alag kar rakheen. 
Genesis21:29 tab abeemelek ne ibraaheem se poochha, in sat baachchaiyon ka, jo too ne alag kar rakhee haai, kya prayojan haai?" 
Genesis21:30 us ne kaha, too in sat bachchaiyon ko is bat kee sakshaee janakar mere hath se le, ki maai ne kuna khoda haai." 
Genesis21:31 un donon ne jo us sthan men apas men kiriya khai, isee karan usaka nam bershoba pada." 
Genesis21:32 jab unhon ne beshorba men paraspar vacha bandhae, tab abeemelek, aur usaka senapati peekol uttkar paalishtaiyon ke desh men lautt gaae." 
Genesis21:33 aur ibraaheem ne bershoba men jha ka aek vraksha lagaya, aur vahan yahova, jo sanatan ishvar haai, us se praarthna kee." 
Genesis21:34 aur ibraaheem palishtaiyon ke desh men bahut dinon tak paradeshaee hokar raha.. 
Genesis22:1 in baton ke pashchata aeesa hua ki parameshvar ne, ibraaheem se yah kahakar usakee pareeksha kee, ki he ibraaheem: us ne kaha, dek, maain yahan hoon."
