Genesis22:2 us ne kaha, apane putra ko arthata apane ekalaute putra isahak ko, jis se too praem rakhta haai, sang lekar moriyyah desh men chala ja, aur vahan usako ek pahad ke upar jo maain tujhe bataunga homabali karake chaddha." 
Genesis22:3 so ibraaheem bihan ko tadke utta aur apane gadahe par kattee kasakar apane do sevak, aur apane putra isahak ko sang liya, aur homabaali ke liye lakadee cheer lee tab kooch karake us sthan kee or chala, jisakee charcha parameshvar ne us se kee thee." 
Genesis22:4 teesare din ibraaheem ne ankhen uttakar us sthan ko door se dekha. 
Genesis22:5 aur us ne apane sevakon se kaha gadahe ke pas yaheen tthare raho yah ladka aur maain vahan tak jakar, aur dandvata karake, fir tumhare pas lautt aunga." 
Genesis22:6 so ibraaheem ne homabali kee lakadee le apane putra isahak par ladee, aur ag aur chhuree ko apane hath men liya aur ve donon aek sath chal pade." 
Genesis22:7 isahak ne apane pita ibraaheem se kaha, he mere pita us ne kaha, he mere putra, kya bat haai us ne kaha, dek, ag aur lakadee to haain par homabali ke liye bhed kahan haai?" 
Genesis22:8 ibraaheem ne kaha, he mere putra, parameshvar homabaali kee bhed ka upay ap hee karega." 
Genesis22:9 so ve donon sang sang age chalate gaae. aur ve us sthan ko jise parameshvar ne usako bataya tha pahunche tab ibraaheem ne vahan vedee banakar lakadee ko chun chunakar rakha, aur apane putra isahak ko bandha ke vedee par kee lakadee ke upar rakh diya." 
Genesis22:10 aur ibraaheem ne hath baddhakar chhuree ko le liya ki apane putra ko baali kare. 
Genesis22:11 tab yahova ke doot ne svarga se usako pukar ke kaha, he ibraaheem, he ibraaheema us ne kaha, dek, maain yahan hoon." 
Genesis22:12 us ne kaha, us ladke par hath mat baddha, aur n us se kuchh kar: kyonaki too ne jo mujh se apane putra, varan apane ekalaute putra ko bhee, naheen rakh chhoda is se maai ab jan gaya ki too parameshvar ka bhy manata haai." 
Genesis22:13 tab ibraaheem ne ankhe uttai, aur kya dekha, ki usake peechhe aek meddha apane seengo se aek jhadee men bajha hua haai: so ibraaheem ne jake us menddhe ko liya, aur apane putra kee santee homabali karake chaddhaya." 
Genesis22:14 aur ibraaheem ne us sthan ka nam yahova yire rakha: isake anusar aj tak bhee kaha jata haai, ki yahova ke pahad par upay kiya jaaega." 
Genesis22:15 fir yahova ke doot ne doosaree bar svarga se ibraaheem ko pukar ke kaha," 
Genesis22:16 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki maain apanee hee yah shapath khata hoo, ki too ne jo yah kam kiya haai ki apane putra, varan apane aekalaute putra ko bhee, naheen rakh chhoda" 
Genesis22:17 is karan maain nishchay tujhe ashaeesh doonga aur nishchay tere vansh ko akash ke taraga, aur samudr ke teer kee baloo ke kinakon ke saman anaginit karoonga, aur tera vansh apane shatrauon ke nagaron ka aadhaikaree hoga:" 
Genesis22:18 aur prathvee kee saree jatiyan apane ko tere vansh ke karan dhany manengee: kyonki too ne meree bat manee haai. 
Genesis22:19 tab ibraaheem apane sevakon ke pas lautt aya, aur ve sab beshorba ko sang sang gaae aur ibraaheem beshorba men rahata raha.." 
Genesis22:20 in baton ke pashchata aeesa hua ki ibraaheem ko yah sandesh mila, ki milka ke tere bhai nahor se santan utpann huae haain." 
Genesis22:21 milka ke putra to ye hua, arthata usaka jetta us, aur us ka bhai booj, aur kamooael, jo aram ka pita hua." 
Genesis22:22 fir kesed, hajao, pildasha, yidalap, aur batooaela." 
Genesis22:23 in atton ko milka ibraaheem ke bhai nahor ke janmaae janee. aur batooael ne ribaka ko utpann kiya. 
Genesis22:24 fir nahor ke rooma nam aek rakhelee bhee thee jis se tebah, gaham, tahasha, aur maka, utpann hue.." 
Genesis23:1 sara to aek sau sattais baras kee avastha ko pahunchee aur jab sara kee itanee avastha hui 
Genesis23:2 tab vah kiryatarba men mar gai. yah to kanan desh men haai, aur hebraen bhee kahalata haai: so ibraaheem sara ke liye rone peettne ko vanha gaya." 
Genesis23:3 tab ibraaheem apane murde ke pas se uttkar hitiayon se kahane laga," 
Genesis23:4 maain tumhare beech pahun aur paradeshaee hoon: mujhe apane madhy men kaabirstan ke liye aeesee boomi do jo meree nij kee ho jaa, ki maain apane murde ko gadke apane ankh kee ott karoon." 
Genesis23:5 hitiayon ne ibraaheem se kaha," 
Genesis23:6 he hamare prabhu, hamaree sun: too to hamare beech men bada pradhaan haai: so hamaree kabraen men se jisako too chahe us men apane murde ko gad ham men se koi tujhe apanee kabra ke lene se n rokega, ki too apane murde ko us men gadne n paae." 
Genesis23:7 tab ibraaheem uttkar khda hua, aur hitiayon ke sammuk, jo us desh ke nivasee the, dandvat karake kahane laga," 
Genesis23:8 yaadi tumharee yah ichchha ho ki maain apane murde ko gadke apanee ankh kee ott karoo, to meree praarthna haai, ki sohar ke putra aepraen se mere liye binatee karo," 
Genesis23:9 ki vah apanee makapelavalee gufaa, jo usakee boomi kee seema par haai usaka poora dam lekar mujhe de de, ki vah tumhare beech kaabirstan ke liye meree nij boomi ho jaae." 
Genesis23:10 aur aepraen to hitiayon ke beech vahan baaitta hua tha. so jitane hittee usake nagar ke faattk se hokar bheetar jate the, un sabhon ke samhane us ne ibraaheem ko uttr diya," 
Genesis23:11 ki he mere prabhu, aeesa nahee, meree suna vah boomi maain tujhe deta hoo, aur us men jo gufaa haai, vah bhee maain tujhe deta hoon apane jaatibhaiyon ke sammukh maain use tujh ko diae deta hoon: so apane murde ko kabra men rakh." 
Genesis23:12 tab ibraaheem ne us desh ke nivaasiyon ke samhane dandvat kee. 
Genesis23:13 aur unake sunate huae aepraen se kaha, yaadi too aeesa chahe, to meree sun: us boomi ka jo dam ho, vah maain dena chahata hoon use mujh se le le, tab maain apane murde ko vahan gaoonga." 
Genesis23:14 aepraen ne ibraaheem ko yah uttr diya," 
Genesis23:15 ki, he mere prabhu, meree bat suna aek boomi ka dam to char sau shokel roopa haai par mere aur tere beech men yah kya haai? apane murde ko kabra me rakh." 
Genesis23:16 ibraaheem n aepraen kee manakar usako utana roopa taul diya, jitana us ne hitiayon ke sunate huae kaha tha, arthata char sau aeese shokel jo vyapariyon men chalate the." 
Genesis23:17 so aepraen kee boomi, jo mamra ke sammukh kee makapela men thee, vah gufaa samet, aur un sab vrakshaen samet bhee jo us men aur usake charon aur seema par the," 
Genesis23:18 jitane hittee usake nagar ke faattk se hokar bheetar jate the, un sabhon ke samhane ibraaheem ke aadhaikar men pakkee reeati se a gai." 
Genesis23:19 isake pashchata ibraaheem ne apanee patnee sara ko, us makapela valee boomi kee gufaa men jo mamra ke arthata hebraen ke samhane kanan desh men haai, mittee dee." 
Genesis23:20 aur vah boomi gufaa samet, jo us men thee, hitiayon kee or se kabirstan ke liye ibraaheem ke adhaikar men pakkee reeati se a gai." 
Genesis24:1 ibraaheem vraddh tha aur usakee ayu bahut bhee aur yahova ne sab baton men usako ashaeesh dee thee. 
Genesis24:2 so ibraaheem ne apane us das se, jo usake ghar men puraaniya aur usakee saree sampati par adhaikaree tha, kaha, apana hath meree jangha ke neeche rakh:" 
Genesis24:3 aur mujh se akash aur prathvee ke parameshvar yahova kee is vishay men shapath kha, ki too mere putra ke liye kananiyon kee ladkiyon meen se jinake beech maain rahata hoo, kisee ko n le aaega." 
Genesis24:4 parantu too mere desh men mere hee kuttumbaiyon ke pas jakar mere putra isahak ke liye aek patnee le aaega. 
Genesis24:5 das ne us se kaha, kadaachita vah sree is desh men mere sath ana n chahe to kya mujhe tere putra ko us desh men jahan se too aya haai le jana padega?" 
Genesis24:6 ibraaheem ne us se kaha, chaukas rah, mere putra ko vahan kabhee n le jana." 
Genesis24:7 svarga ka parameshvar yahova, jis ne mujhe mere pita ke ghar se aur meree janmaboomi se le akar mujh se shapath khakar kaha, ki maain yah desh tere vansh ko doonga vahee apana doot tere age age bhejega, ki too mere putra ke liye vahan se aek sree le aae." 
Genesis24:8 aur yaadi vah sree tere sath ana n chahe tab to too meree is shapath se choott jaaega: par mere putra ko vahan n le jana. 
Genesis24:9 tab us das ne apane svamee ibraaheem kee jangha ke neeche apana hath rakhkar us se isee vishay kee shapath khai. 
Genesis24:10 tab vah das apane svamee ke untto men se das untt chhnattkar usake sab uttm uttm padarthon men se kuchh kuchh lekar chala: aur masopottamiya men nahor ke nagar ke pas pahuncha. 
Genesis24:11 aur us ne untton ko nagar ke bahar aek kuaen ke pas baaittaya, vah sandhya ka samay tha, jis samay striayan jal bhrane ke liye nikalatee haai." 
Genesis24:12 so vah kahane laga, he mere svamee ibraaheem ke parameshvar, yahova, aj mere karya ko siddh kar, aur mere svamee ibraaheem par karoona kara." 
Genesis24:13 dekh maain jal ke is sote ke pas khda hoon aur nagaravasiyon kee beattyaien jal bhrane ke liye nikalee atee haain: 
Genesis24:14 so aeesa hone de, ki jis kanya se maain kahoo, ki apana ghada meree or jhuka, ki maain peeun aur vah kahe, ki le, pee le, peechhe maain tere untto ko bhee peelaungee: so vahee ho jise too ne apane das isahak ke liye ttharaya ho isee reeati maain jan loonga ki too ne mere svamee par karoona kee haai." 
Genesis24:15 aur aeesa hua ki jab vah kah hee raha tha ki ribaka, jo ibraaheem ke bhai nahor ke janmaye milka ke putra, batooael kee bettee thee, vah kandho par ghada liye huae ai." 
Genesis24:16 vah aati sundar, aur kumaree thee, aur kisee puroosh ka munh n dekha tha: vah kuaen men sote ke pas utar gai, aur apana ghada bhr ke fir upar ai." 
Genesis24:17 tab vah das us se bhentt karane ko dauda, aur kaha, apane ghade me se thoda panee mujhe pila de." 
Genesis24:18 us ne kaha, he mere prabhu, le, pee le: aur us ne faurtee se ghada utarakar hath men liye liye usako pila diya." 
Genesis24:19 jab vah usako pila chukee, tak kaha, maain tere untton ke liye bhee tab tak panee bhr bhr laungee, jab tak ve pee n chuken." 
Genesis24:20 tab vah faurtee se apane ghade ka jal haude men undelakar fir kuen par bhrane ko daud gai aur usake sab untton ke liye panee bhr diya. 
Genesis24:21 aur vah puroosh usakee or chupachap achambhe ke sath takata hua yah sochata tha, ki yahova ne meree yatra ko sufal kiya haai ki naheen." 
Genesis24:22 jab untt pee chuke, tab us puroosh ne adha tole sone ka aek natth nikalakar usako diya, aur das tole sone ke kangan usake hathon men pahina diae" 
Genesis24:23 aur poochha, too kis kee bettee haai? yah mujh ko bata de. kya tere pita ke ghar men hamare ttkaine ke liye sthan haai?" 
Genesis24:24 us ne uttr diya, maain to nahor ke janmaae milka ke putra batooel kee bettee hoon." 
Genesis24:25 fir us ne us se kaha, hamare vahan pual aur chara bahut haai, aur ttkaine ke liye sthan bhee haai." 
Genesis24:26 tab us puroosh ne sir jhukakar yahova ko dandvata karake kaha," 
Genesis24:27 dhany haai mere svamee ibraaheem ka parameshvar yahova, ki us ne apanee karoona aur sachchai ko mere svamee par se hatta naheen liya: yahova ne mujh ko tteek marga par chalakar mere svamee ke bhai bandhauon ke ghar par pahucha diya haai." 
Genesis24:28 aur us knya ne daudkar apanee mata ke ghar men yah sara vrattant kah sunaya. 
Genesis24:29 tab laban jo ribaka ka bhai tha, so bahar kuen ke nikatt us puroosh ke pas dauda gaya." 
Genesis24:30 aur aeesa hua ki jab us ne vah natth aur apanee baahin ribaka ke hathon men ve kangan bhee dekhe, aur usakee yah bat bhee sunee, ki us puroosh ne mujh se aeesee baten kaheen tab vah us puroosh ke pas gaya aur kya dekha, ki vah sote ke nikatt untton ke pas khda haai." 
Genesis24:31 us ne kaha, he yahova kee or se dhany puroosh bheetar a: too kyon bahar khda haai? maain ne ghar ko, aur untto ke liye bhee sthan taaiyar kiya haai." 
Genesis24:32 aur vah puroosh ghar men gaya aur laban ne untton kee kaattyaian kholakar pual aur chara diya aur usake, aur usake sangee jano ke panv dhaene ko jal diya." 
Genesis24:33 tab ibraaheem ke das ke age jalapan ke liye kuchh rakha gaya: par us ne kaha maain jab tak apana prayojan n kah doo, tab tak kuchh n khaunga. laban ne kaha, kah de." 
Genesis24:34 tak us ne kaha, maain to ibraaheem ka das hoon." 
Genesis24:35 aur yahova ne mere svamee ko badee ashaeesh dee haai so vah mahan puroosh ho gaya haai aur us ne usako bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, sona-roopa, dasa-dasiya, untt aur gadahe diae haai." 
Genesis24:36 aur mere svamee kee patnee sara ke buddhape men us se aek putra utpann hua haai. aur us putra ko ibraaheem ne apana sab kuchh de diya haai. 
Genesis24:37 aur mere svamee ne mujhe yah shapath khailai, ki maain usake putra ke liye kananiyon kee ladkiyon men se jin ke desh men vah rahata haai, koi sree n le aunga." 
Genesis24:38 maain usake pita ke ghar, aur kul ke logon ke pas jakar usake putra ke liye aek sree le aunga." 
Genesis24:39 tab maain ne apane svamee se kaha, kadachita vah sree mere peechhe n aae." 
Genesis24:40 tab us ne mujh se kaha, yahova, jisake samhane maain chalata aya hoo, vah tere sang apane doot ko bhejakar teree yatra ko sufal karega so too mere kul, aur mere pita ke gharane men se mere putra ke liye aek sree le a sakega." 
Genesis24:41 too tab hee meree is shapath se choottega, jab too mere kul ke logon ke pas pahunchega arthata yadi ve mujhe koi sree n de, to too meree shpath se choottega." 
Genesis24:42 so maain aj us kuen ke nikatt akar kahane laga, he mere svamee ibraaheem ke parameshvar yahova, yaadi too meree is yatra ko sufal karata ho:" 
Genesis24:43 to dekh maain jal ke is kuen ke nikatt khda hoon so aeesa ho, ki jo kumaree jal bhrane ke liye nikal aa, aur maain us se kahoo, apane ghade men se mujhe thoda panee pila" 
Genesis24:44 aur vah mujh se kahe, pee le aur maai tere untto ke peene ke liye bhee panee bhr doongee: vah vahee sree ho jisako too ne mere svamee ke putra ke liye ttharaya ho." 
Genesis24:45 maain man hee man yah kah hee raha tha, ki dekh ribaka kandho par ghada liye huae nikal ai fir vah sote ke pas utarake bhrane lagee: aur maai ne us se kaha, mujhe pila de." 
Genesis24:46 aur us ne faurtee se apane ghade ko kandho par se utarake kaha, le, pee le, peechhe maain tere untton ko bhee pilaungee: so maain ne pee liya, aur us ne untton ko bhee pila diya." 
Genesis24:47 tab maain ne us se poochha, ki too kis kee bettee haai? aur us ne kaha, maain to nahor ke janmaae milka ke putra batooael kee bettee hoon: tab maain ne usakee nak men vah natt, aur usake hathon men ve kangan paahina diae." 
Genesis24:48 fir maain ne sir jhukakar yahova ko dandvata kiya, aur apane svamee ibraaheem ke parameshvar yahova ko dhany kaha, kyonki us ne mujhe tteek marga se pahunchaya ki maai apane svamee ke putra ke liye usakee bhteejee ko le jaun." 
Genesis24:49 so ab, yadi too mere svamee ke sath krapa aur sachchai ka vyavahar karana chahate ho, to mujh se kaho: aur yadi naheen chahate ho, taubhee mujh se kah do taki maain daahinee or, va bain or fir jaun." 
Genesis24:50 tab laban aur batooael ne uttr diya, yah bat yahova kee or se hui haai: so ham log tujh se n to bhla kah sakate haain n bura." 
Genesis24:51 dek, ribaka tere samhane haai, usako le ja, aur vah yahova ke vachan ke anusar, tere svamee ke putra kee patnee ho jaae." 
Genesis24:52 unaka yah vachan sunakar, ibraaheem ke das ne boomi par girake yahova ko dandvata kiya." 
Genesis24:53 fir us das ne sone aur roope ke gahane, aur vasr nikalakar ribaka ko diae: aur usake bhai aur mata ko bhee us ne anamol anamol vastuaen dee." 
Genesis24:54 tab us ne apane sangee janon samet bhojan kiya, aur rat vaheen bitai: aur tadke uttkar kaha, mujh ko apane svamee ke pas jane ke liye vida karo." 
Genesis24:55 ribaka ke bhai aur mata ne kaha, kanya ko hamare pas kuchh din, arthata kam se kam das din rahane de fir usake pashchata vah chalee jaaegee." 
Genesis24:56 us ne un se kaha, yahova ne jo meree yatra ko sufal kiya haai so tum mujhe mat roko ab mujhe vida kar do, ki maain apane svamee ke pas jaun." 
Genesis24:57 unhon ne kaha, ham kanya ko bulakar poochhte haai, aur dekhenge, ki vah kya kahatee haai." 
Genesis24:58 so unhon ne ribaka ko bulakar us se poochha, kya too is manushy ke sang jaaegee? us ne kaha, han maain jaungee." 
Genesis24:59 tab unhon ne apanee baahin ribaka, aur usakee dhaay aur ibraaheem ke das, aur usake sathee sabhon ko vida kiya." 
Genesis24:60 aur unhon ne ribaka ko ashaeervad deke kaha, he hamaree baahin, too hajaron lakhon kee adimata ho, aur tera vansh apane baairiyon ke nagaron ka aadhaikaree ho." 
Genesis24:61 is par ribaka apanee sahealiyon samet chalee aur untt par chaddhke us puroosh ke peechhe ho lee: so vah das ribaka ko sath lekar chal diya. 
Genesis24:62 isahak jo daakkhian desh men rahata tha, so lahaairoi nam kuen se hokar chala ata tha." 
Genesis24:63 aur sanjh ke samay vah maaidan men dhyan karane ke liye nikala tha: aur us ne ankhe uttakar kya dekha, ki untt chale a rahe haain." 
Genesis24:64 aur ribaka ne bhee ankh uttakar isahak ko dekha, aur dekhte hee untt par se utar padee" 
Genesis24:65 tab us ne das se poochha, jo puroosh maaidan par ham se milane ko chala ata haai, so kaun haai? das ne kaha, vah to mera svamee haai. tab ribaka ne ghoonghatt lekar apane munh ko ddhap liya." 
Genesis24:66 aur das ne isahak se apana sara vrattant varnn kiya. 
Genesis24:67 tab isahak ribaka ko apanee mata sara ke tamboo men le aya, aur usako byahakar us se praem kiya: aur isahak ko mata kee mratyu ke pashchata shaaantai hui.." 
Genesis25:1 tab ibraaheem ne aek aur patnee byah lee jisaka nam katoora tha. 
Genesis25:2 aur us se jimraan, yokshaan, madana, midhan, yishabak, aur shooh utpann hue." 
Genesis25:3 aur yokshaan se shaba aur dadan utpann hue. aur dadan ke vansh men ashshooree, latooshae, aur lummee log hue." 
Genesis25:4 aur midhan ke putra aepa, aeper, hanok, abeeda, aur aelda hua, se sab katoora ke santan hue." 
Genesis25:5 isahak ko to ibraaheem ne apana sab kuchh diya. 
Genesis25:6 par apanee rakheliyon ke putraen ko, kuchh kuchh dekar apane jeete jee apane putra isahak ke pas se poorab desh men bhej diya." 
Genesis25:7 ibraaheem kee saree avastha aek sau pachahattr varsha kee hui. 
Genesis25:8 aur ibraaheem ka deegharayu hone ke karan arthata poore buddhape kee avastha men praan choott gaya. 
Genesis25:9 aur usake putra isahak aur ishmaael ne, hittee sohar ke putra aepraen kee mamra ke sammukhvalee boomi me, jo makapela kee gufaa thee, us men usako mittee dee gai." 
Genesis25:10 arthata jo boomi ibraaheem ne hitiayon se mol lee thee: usee men ibraaheem, aur us kee patnee sara, donon ko mittee dee gai." 
Genesis25:11 ibraaheem ke marane ke pashchata parameshvar ne usake putra isahak ko jo lahaairoi nam kuen ke pas rahata tha ashaeesh dee.. 
Genesis25:12 ibraaheem ka putra ishmaael jo sara kee laundee hajira misree se utpann hua tha, usakee yah vanshaavalee haai." 
Genesis25:13 ishmaael ke putraen ke nam aur vanshaavalee yah haai: arthata ishmaael ka jetta putra nabayot, fir kedar, adabel, mibasam," 
Genesis25:14 mishma, dooma, massa," 
Genesis25:15 hadar, tema, yatoor, napeesha, aur kedama." 
Genesis25:16 ishmaael ke putra ye hee hua, aur inheen ke namon ke anusar inake ganvo, aur chhavaaniyon ke nam bhee pade aur ye hee barah apane apane kul ke pradhaan hue." 
Genesis25:17 ishmaael kee saree avastha aek sau saaintees varsha kee hui: tab usake praan choott gaa, aur vah apane logon men ja mila." 
Genesis25:18 aur usake vansh haveela se shoor tak, jo misr ke sammukh ashshoora ke marga men haai, bas gaae. aur unaka bhag unake sab bhaibandhauon ke sammukh pada.." 
Genesis25:19 ibraaheem ke putra isahak kee vanshaavalee yah haai: ibraaheem se isahak utpann hua. 
Genesis25:20 aur isahak ne chalees varsha ka hokar ribaka ko, jo panaram ke vasee, aramee batooael kee bettee, aur aramee laban kee bahin bhee, byah liya." 
Genesis25:21 isahak kee patnee to banjh thee, so us ne usake nimitt yahova se binatee kee: aur yahova ne usakee binatee sunee, so usakee patnee ribaka garbhvatee hui." 
Genesis25:22 aur ladke usake garbh men apas men lipattke aek doosare ko marane lage: tab us ne kaha, meree jo aeesee hee dasha rahegee to maain kyonkar jeevit rahoongee? aur vah yahova kee ichchha poochhne ko gai." 
Genesis25:23 tab yahova ne us se kaha tere garbh men do jatiyan haai, aur teree kokh se nikalate hee do rajy ke log alag alag honge, aur aek rajy ke log doosare se aadhaik samarthee honge aur bada betta chhotte ke adhaeen hoga." 
Genesis25:24 jab usake putra utpann hone ka samay aya, tab kya pragatt hua, ki usake garbh men judve balak haai." 
Genesis25:25 aur paahila jo utpann hua so lal nikala, aur usaka sara shareer kambal ke saman romamay tha so usaka nam aesav rakha gaya." 
Genesis25:26 peechhe usaka bhai apane hath se aesav kee aedee pakade huae utpann hua aur usaka nam yakoob rakha gaya. aur jab ribaka ne unako janm diya tab isahak satt varsha ka tha. 
Genesis25:27 fir ve ladke baddhne lage aur aesav to vanavasee hokar chatur shaikar khelanevala ho gaya, par yakoob seedha manushy tha, aur tambuon men raha karata tha." 
Genesis25:28 aur isahak to aesav ke aher ka mans khaya karata tha, isaliye vah us se praeeti rakhta tha: par ribaka yakoob se praeeati rakhtee thee.." 
Genesis25:29 yakoob bhojan ke liye kuchh dal paka raha tha: aur aesav maaidan se thka hua aya. 
Genesis25:30 tab aesav ne yakoob se kaha, vah jo lal vastu haai, usee lal vastu men se mujhe kuchh khaila, kyonaki maain thka hoon. isee karan usaka nam aedom bhee pada." 
Genesis25:31 yakoob ne kaha, apana pahilautte ka adhaikar aj mere hath bech de." 
Genesis25:32 aesav ne kaha, dek, maai to abhee marane par hoon: so paahilautte ke adhaikar se mera kya labh hoga?" 
Genesis25:33 yakoob ne kaha, mujh se abhee shapath kha: so us ne us se shapath khai: aur apana pahilautte ka adhaikar yakoob ke hath bech dala." 
Genesis25:34 is par yakoob ne aesav ko rottee aur pakai hui masoor kee dal dee aur us ne khaya piya, tab uttkar chala gaya. yon aesav ne apana pahilautte ka adhaikar tuchchh jana.." 
Genesis26:1 aur us desh men akal pada, vah us paahile akal se alag tha jo ibraaheem ke dinon men pada tha. so isahak garar ko palishtaiyon ke raja abeemelek ke pas gaya." 
Genesis26:2 vahan yahova ne usako darshan dekar kaha, misr men mat ja jo desh maain tujhe bataun usee men raha." 
Genesis26:3 too isee desh men rah, aur maain tere sang rahoonga, aur tujhe ashaeesh doonga aur ye sab desh maain tujh ko, aur tere vansh ko doonga aur jo shapath maain ne tere pita ibraaheem se khai thee, use maain pooree karoonga." 
Genesis26:4 aur maain tere vansh ko akash ke taragan ke saman karoonga. aur maain tere vansh ko ye sab desh doonga, aur prathvee kee saree jatiyan tere vansh ke karan apane ko dhany manengee." 
Genesis26:5 kyonaki ibraaheem ne meree manee, aur jo maain ne use saunpa tha usako aur meree agyaaon vidhaiyo, aur vyavastha ka palan kiya." 
Genesis26:6 so isahak garar men rah gaya. 
Genesis26:7 jab us sthan ke logon ne usakee patnee ke vishay men poochha, tab us ne yah sochakar ki yadi maain usako apanee patnee kahoo, to yahan ke log ribaka ke karan jo param sundaree haai mujh ko mar dalenge, uttr diya, vah to meree bahin haai." 
Genesis26:8 jab usako vahan rahate bahut din beet gaa, tab aek din palishtaiyon ke raja abeemelek ne khaidkee men se jhankake kya dekha, ki isahak apanee patnee ribaka ke sath kreeda kar raha haai." 
Genesis26:9 tab abeemelek ne isahak ko bulavakar kaha, vah to nishchay teree patnee haai fir too ne kyonkar usako apanee baahin kaha? isahak ne uttr diya, maain ne socha tha, ki aeesa n ho ki usake karan meree mratyu ho." 
Genesis26:10 abeemelek ne kaha, too ne ham se yah kya kiya? aeese to praja men se koi teree patnee ke sath sahaj se kukarma kar sakata, aur too ham ko pap men fansata." 
Genesis26:11 aur abeemelek ne apanee saree praja ko agyaa dee, ki jo koi us puroosh ko va us sree ko chooaega, so nishchay mar dala jaaega." 
Genesis26:12 fir isahak ne us desh men jota boya, aur usee varsha men sau guna fal paya: aur yahova ne usako ashaeesh dee." 
Genesis26:13 aur vah baddha aur usakee unnaati hotee chalee gai, yahan tak ki vah ati mahan puroosh ho gaya." 
Genesis26:14 jab usake bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, aur bahut se dasa-daasiyan hui, tab palishtee us se dah karane lage." 
Genesis26:15 so jitane kuon ko usake pita ibraaheem ke dason ne ibraaheem ke jeete jee khoda tha, unako palishtaiyon ne mittee se bhr diya." 
Genesis26:16 tab abeemelek ne isahak se kaha, hamare pas se chala ja kyonki too ham se bahut samarthee ho gaya haai." 
Genesis26:17 so isahak vahan se chala gaya, aur garar ke nale men tamboo khda karake vahan rahane laga." 
Genesis26:18 tab jo kuaen usake pita ibraaheem ke dinon men khode gaae the, aur ibraaheem ke marane ke peechhe palishtaiyon ne bhr diae the, unako isahak ne fir se khudavaya aur unake ve hee nam rakhe, jo usake pita ne rakhe the." 
Genesis26:19 fir isahak ke dason ko nale men khodate khodate bahate jal ka aek sota mila. 
Genesis26:20 tab gararee charavahon ne isahak ke charavahon se jhgada kiya, aur kaha, ki yah jal hamara haai. so us ne us kuaen ka nam aesek rakha isaliye ki ve us se jhgade the." 
Genesis26:21 fir unhon ne doosara kuan khoda aur unhon ne usake liye bhee jhgada kiya, so us ne usaka nam sitra rakha." 
Genesis26:22 tab us ne vahan se kooch karake aek aur kuan khudavaya aur usake liye unhon ne jhgada n kiya so us ne usaka nam yah kahakar rahobot rakha, ki ab to yahova ne hamare liye bahut sthan diya haai, aur ham is desh men foolen-falenge." 
Genesis26:23 vahan se vah bershoba ko gaya. 
Genesis26:24 aur usee din yahova ne rat ko use darshan dekar kaha, maain tere pita ibraaheem ka parameshvar hoon mat dr, kyonaki maain tere sath hoo, aur apane das ibraaheem ke karan tujhe ashaeesh doonga, aur tera vansh baddhaunga" 
Genesis26:25 tab us ne vahan aek vedee banai, aur yahova se praarthna kee, aur apana tamboo vaheen khda kiya aur vahan isahak ke dason ne aek kuan khoda." 
Genesis26:26 tab abeemelek apane mitra ahujjat, aur apane senapaati peekol ko sang lekar, garar se usake pas gaya." 
Genesis26:27 isahak ne un se kaha, tum ne mujh se baair karake apane beech se nikal diya tha so ab mere pas kyon aae ho?" 
Genesis26:28 unhon ne kaha, ham ne to pratyaksha dekha haai, ki yahova tere sath rahata haai: so ham ne socha, ki too to yahova kee or se dhany haai, so hamare tere beech men shapath khai jaa, aur ham tujh se is vishay kee vacha bandhaaen" 
Genesis26:29 ki jaaise ham ne tujhe naheen chooa, varan tere sath niree bhlai kee haai, aur tujh ko kushal kshom se vida kiya, usake anusar too bhee ham se koi burai n karega." 
Genesis26:30 tab us ne unakee jevanar kee, aur unhon ne khaya piya." 
Genesis26:31 bihan ko un sabhon ne tadke uttkar apas men shapath khai tab isahak ne unako vida kiya, aur ve kushal kshom se usake pas se chale gaae." 
Genesis26:32 usee din isahak ke dason ne akar apane us khode huae kuen ka vrattant suna ke kaha, ki ham ko jal ka ek sota mila haai." 
Genesis26:33 tab us ne usaka nam shaiba rakha: isee karan us nagar ka nam aj tak bershoba pada haai.. 
Genesis26:34 jab aesav chalees varsha ka hua, tab us ne hittee beree kee bettee yahoodeet, aur hittee aelon kee bettee bashamat ko byah liya." 
Genesis26:35 aur in striayon ke karan isahak aur ribaka ke man ko khed hua.. 
Genesis27:1 jab isahak booddha ho gaya, aur usakee ankhen aeesee dhaundhalee pad gai, ki usako soojhta n tha, tab us ne apane jette putra aesav ko bulakar kaha, he mere putra us ne kaha, kya agyaa." 
Genesis27:2 us ne kaha, sun, maain to booddha ho gaya hoo, aur naheen janata ki meree mratyu ka din kab hoga:" 
Genesis27:3 so ab too apana tarakash aur dhanush adi hathaiyar lekar maaidan men ja, aur mere liye hiran ka aher kar le a." 
Genesis27:4 tab meree roochi ke anusar svaadishtt bhojan banakar mere pas le ana, ki maai use khakar marane se pahale tujhe jee bhr ke ashaeervad doon." 
Genesis27:5 tab aesav aher karane ko maaidan men gaya. jab isahak aesav se yah bat kah raha tha, tab ribaka sun rahee thee." 
Genesis27:6 so us ne apane putra yakoob se kaha sun, maain ne tere pita ko tere bhai aesav se yah kahate suna," 
Genesis27:7 ki too mere liye aher karake usaka svaadishtt bhojan bana, ki maain use khakar tujhe yahova ke age marane se paahile ashaeervad doon" 
Genesis27:8 so ab, he mere putra, meree sun, aur yah agyaa man," 
Genesis27:9 ki bakaariyon ke pas jakar bakaariyon ke do achchhe achchhe bachche le a aur maain tere pita ke liye usakee roochi ke anusar un ke mans ka svadishtt bhojan banaungee. 
Genesis27:10 tab too usako apane pita ke pas le jana, ki vah use khakar marane se pahile tujh ko ashaeervad de." 
Genesis27:11 yakoob ne apanee mata ribaka se kaha, sun, mera bhai aesav to ronar puroosh haai, aur maain romaheen puroosh hoon." 
Genesis27:12 kadachita mera pita mujhe ttttolane lage, to maain usakee draashtti men ttg ttharoonga aur ashaeesh ke badale shaap hee kamaunga." 
Genesis27:13 usakee mata ne us se kaha, he mere, putra, shaap tujh par naheen mujhee par pade, too keval meree sun, aur jakar ve bachche mere pas le a." 
Genesis27:14 tab yakoob jakar unako apanee mata ke pas le aya, aur mata ne usake pita kee roochi ke anusar svaadishtt bhojan bana diya." 
Genesis27:15 tab ribaka ne apane pahilautte putra aesav ke sundar vasr, jo usake pas ghar men the, lekar apane lahure putra yakoob ko paahina diae." 
Genesis27:16 aur bakariyon ke bachchon kee khalon ko usake hathon men aur usake chikane gale men lapett diya. 
Genesis27:17 aur vah svadishtt bhojan aur apanee banai hui rottee bhee apane putra yakoob ke hath men de dee. 
Genesis27:18 so vah apane pita ke pas gaya, aur kaha, he mere pita: us ne kaha kya bat haai? he mere putra, too kaun haai?" 
Genesis27:19 yakoob ne apane pita se kaha, maain tera jetta putra aesav hoon. maain ne teree agyaa me anusar kiya haai so utt aur baaittkar mere aher ke mans men se kha, ki too jee se mujhe ashaeervad de." 
Genesis27:20 isahak ne apane putra se kaha, he mere putra, kya karan haai ki vah tujhe itanee jaldee mil gaya? us ne yah uttr diya, ki tere parameshvar yahova ne usako mere samhane kar diya." 
Genesis27:21 fir isahak ne yakoob se kaha, he mere putra, nikatt a, maain tujhe ttttolakar janoo, ki too sachamuch mera putra aesav haai va naheen." 
Genesis27:22 tab yakoob apane pita isahak ke nikatt gaya, aur us ne usako ttttolakar kaha, bol to yakoob ka sa haai, par hath aesav hee ke se jan padte haain." 
Genesis27:23 aur us ne usako naheen cheenha, kyonki usake hath usake bhai ke se ronar the." 
Genesis27:24 aur us ne poochha, kya too sachamuch mera putra aesav haai? us ne kaha maain hoon." 
Genesis27:25 tab us ne kaha, bhojan ko mere nikatt le a, ki maai, apane putra ke aher ke mans men se khakar, tujhe jee se ashaeervad doon. tab vah usako usake nikatt le aya, aur us ne khaya aur vah usake pas dakhmadha bhee laya, aur us ne piya." 
Genesis27:26 tab usake pita isahak ne us se kaha, he mere putra nikatt akar mujhe chooma." 
Genesis27:27 us ne nikatt jakar usako chooma. aur us ne usake vasren ko sugandha pakar usako vah ashaeervad diya, ki dek, mere putra ka sugandha jo aeese khet ka sa haai jis par yahova ne ashaeesh dee ho:" 
Genesis27:28 so parameshvar tujhe akash se os, aur boomi kee uttm se uttm upaj, aur bahut sa anaj aur naya dakhmadha de:" 
Genesis27:29 rajy rajy ke log tere adhaeen ho, aur desh desh ke log tujhe dandvata karen: too apane bhaiyon ka svamee ho, aur teree mata ke putra tujhe dandvata karen: jo tujhe shaap den so ap hee sraapit ho, aur jo tujhe ashaeervad den so ashaeesh paaen.." 
Genesis27:30 yah ashaeervad isahak yakoob ko de hee chuka, aur yakoob apane pita isahak ke samhane se nikala hee tha, ki aesav aher lekar a pahuncha." 
Genesis27:31 tab vah bhee svadishtt bhojan banakar apane pita ke pas le aya, aur us ne kaha, he mere pita, uttkar apane putra ke aher ka mans kha, taki mujhe jee se ashaeervad de." 
Genesis27:32 usake pita isahak ne poochha, too kaun haai? us ne kaha, maain tera jetta putra esav hoon." 
Genesis27:33 tab isahak ne atyant thrathr kanpate huae kaha, fir vah kaun tha jo aher karake mere pas le aya tha, aur maain ne tere ane se pahile sab men se kuchh kuchh kha liya aur usako ashaeervad diya? varan usako ashaeesh lagee bhee rahegee." 
Genesis27:34 apane pita kee yah bat sunate hee aesav ne atyant unche aur du:kh bhre svar se chillakar apane pita se kaha, he mere pita, mujh ko bhee ashaeervad de." 
Genesis27:35 us ne kaha, tera bhai dhoortata se aya, aur tere ashaeervad ko leke chala gaya." 
Genesis27:36 us ne kaha, kya usaka nam yakoob yatharth naheen rakha gaya? us ne mujhe do bar adnga mara, mera pahilautte ka adhaikar to us ne le hee liya tha: aur ab dek, us ne mera ashaeervad bhee le liya haai: fir us ne kaha, kya too ne mere liye bhee koi ashaeervad naheen soch rakha haai?" 
Genesis27:37 isahak ne aesav ko uttr dekar kaha, sun, maain ne usako tera svamee ttharaya, aur usake sab bhaiyon ko usake adhaeen kar diya, aur anaj aur naya dakhmadha dekar usako pushtt kiya haai: so ab, he mere putra, maain tere liye kya karoon?" 
Genesis27:38 aesav ne apane pita se kaha he mere pita, kya tere man men aek hee ashaeervad haai? he mere pita, mujh ko bhee ashaeervad de: yon kahakar aesav foott foottke roya." 
Genesis27:39 usake pita isahak ne us se kaha, sun, tera nivas upaja boomi par ho, aur upar se akash kee os us par pade.." 
Genesis27:40 aur too apanee talavar ke bal se jeeavit rahe, aur apane bhai ke adhaeen to hoa, par jab too svadhaeen ho jaaega, tab usake jooae ko apane kandho par se tod faenke." 
Genesis27:41 aesav ne to yakoob se apane pita ke diae huae ashaeervad ke karan baair rakha so us ne socha, ki mere pita ke antakal ka din nikatt haai, fir maain apane bhai yakoob ko ghaat karoonga." 
Genesis27:42 jab ribaka ko apane pahilautte putra aesav kee ye baten batai gai, tab us ne apane lahure putra yakoob ko bulakar kaha, sun, tera bhai aesav tujhe ghaat karane ke liye apane man ko dhaeeraj de raha haai." 
Genesis27:43 so ab, he mere putra, meree sun, aur haran ko mere bhai laban ke pas bhag ja" 
Genesis27:44 aur thode din tak, arthata jab tak tere bhai ka krodha n utare tab tak usee ke pas rahana." 
Genesis27:45 fir jab tere bhai ka krodha ne utare, aur jo kam too ne us se kiya haai usako vah bool jaae tab maain tujhe vahan se bulava bhejoongee: aeesa kyon ho ki aek hee din men mujhe tum donon se rahit hona pade?" 
Genesis27:46 fir ribaka ne isahak se kaha, hittee ladkiyon ke karan maain apane praan se ghain karatee hoon so yadi aeesee hittee ladkiyon men se, jaaisee is desh kee ladkiyan haai, yakoob bhee aek ko kaheen byah le, to mere jeevan men kya labh hoga?" 
Genesis28:1 tab isahak ne yakoob ko bulakar ashaeervad diya, aur agyaa dee, ki too kisee kananee ladkee ko n byah lena." 
Genesis28:2 panaram men apane nana batooael ke ghar jakar vahan apane mama laban kee aek bettee ko byah lena. 
Genesis28:3 aur sarvashaaktaiman ishvar tujhe ashaeesh de, aur faula-falakar baddhaa, aur too rajy rajy kee mandlee ka mool ho." 
Genesis28:4 aur vah tujhe aur tere vansh ko bhee ibraaheem kee see ashaeesh de, ki too yah desh jis men too paradeshaee hokar rahata haai, aur jise parameshvar ne ibraaheem ko diya tha, usaka aadhaikaree ho jaae." 
Genesis28:5 aur isahak ne yakoob ko vida kiya, aur vah panaram ko aramee batooael ke us putra laban ke pas chala, jo yakoob aur aesav kee mata ribaka ka bhai tha." 
Genesis28:6 jab isahak ne yakoob ko ashaeervad dekar panaram bhej diya, ki vah vaheen se patnee byah laa, aur usako ashaeervad dene ke samay yah agyaa bhee dee, ki too kisee kananee ladkee ko byah n lena" 
Genesis28:7 aur yakoob mata pita kee manakar panaram ko chal diya 
Genesis28:8 tab aesav yah sab dekh ke aur yah bhee sochakar, ki kananee ladkiyan mere pita isahak ko buree lagatee haai," 
Genesis28:9 ibraaheem ke putra ishmaael ke pas gaya, aur ishmaael kee bettee mahalat ko, jo nabayot kee baahin bhee, byahakar apanee paatnaiyon me mila liya.." 
Genesis28:10 so yakoob beshorba se nikalakar haran kee or chala. 
Genesis28:11 aur us ne kisee sthan men pahunchakar rat vaheen bitane ka vichar kiya, kyonaki soorya ast ho gaya tha so us ne us sthan ke patthron men se aek patthr le apana takiya banakar rakha, aur usee sthan men so gaya." 
Genesis28:12 tab us ne svapn men kya dekha, ki aek seeddhee prathvee par khdee haai, aur usaka sira svarga tak pahuncha haai: aur parameshvar ke doot us par se chaddhte utarate haain." 
Genesis28:13 aur yahova usake upar khda hokar kahata haai, ki maain yahova, tere dada ibraaheem ka parameshvar, aur isahak ka bhee parameshvar hoon: jis boomi par too pada haai, use maain tujh ko aur tere vansh ko doonga." 
Genesis28:14 aur tera vansh boomi kee dhool ke kinakon ke saman bahut hoga, aur paachchhim, poorab, uttr, dakkhian, charon or faailata jaaega: aur tere aur tere vansh ke dara prathvee ke sare kul ashaeesh paaenge." 
Genesis28:15 aur sun, maain tere sang rahoonga, aur jahan kaheen too jaae vahan teree raksha karoonga, aur tujhe is desh men lautta le aunga: maain apane kahe huae ko jab tak poora n kar loon tab tak tujh ko n chhooonga." 
Genesis28:16 tab yakoob jag utta, aur kahane laga nishchay is sthan men yahova haai aur maain is bat ko n janata tha." 
Genesis28:17 aur bhy khakar us ne kaha, yah sthan kya hee bhyanak haai! yah to parameshvar ke bhvan ko chhod aur kuchh naheen ho sakata varan yah svarga ka faattk hee hoga." 
Genesis28:18 bhor ko yakoob tadke utta, aur apane takiae ka patthr lekar usaka khmbha khda kiya, aur usake sire par tel dal diya." 
Genesis28:19 aur us ne us sthan ka nam betel rakha par us nagar ka nam paahile looj tha. 
Genesis28:20 aur yakoob ne yah mannat manee, ki yadi parameshvar mere sang rahakar is yatra men meree raksha kare, aur mujhe khane ke liye rottee, aur pahinane ke liye kapada de," 
Genesis28:21 aur maain apane pita ke ghar men kushal kshom se lautt aun: to yahova mera parameshvar ttharega. 
Genesis28:22 aur yah patthr, jisaka maain ne khmbha khda kiya haai, parameshvar ka bhvan ttharega: aur jo kuchh too mujhe de usaka dashamansh maain avashy hee tujhe diya karoonga.." 
Genesis29:1 fir yakoob ne apana marga liya, aur poovvairyon ke desh men aya." 
Genesis29:2 aur us ne draashtti karake kya dekha, ki maaidan men aek kuna haai, aur usake pas bhed-bakaariyon ke teen jhund baaitte huae haain kyonaki jo patthr us kuen ke munh par dhara rahata tha, jis men se jhundon ko jal pilaya jata tha, vah bharee tha." 
Genesis29:3 aur jab sab jhund vahan ikatthe ho jate tab charavahe us patthr ko kuaen ke munh par se luddhkakar bhed-bakaariyon ko panee pilate, aur fir patthr ko kuen ke munh par jyon ka tyon rakh dete the." 
Genesis29:4 so yakoob ne charavahon se poochha, he mere bhaiyo, tum kahan ke ho? unhon ne kaha, ham haran ke haain." 
Genesis29:5 tab us ne un se poochha, kya tum nahor ke pote laban ko janate ho? unhon ne kaha, ha, ham use janate haain." 
Genesis29:6 fir us ne un se poochha, kya vah kushal se haai? unhon ne kaha, ha, kushal se to haai aur vah dek, usakee bettee rahel bhed-bakaariyon ko liye huae chalee atee haai." 
Genesis29:7 us ne kaha, dekho, abhee to din bahut haai, pashuuon ke ikatthe hone ka samay naheen: so bhed-bakaariyon ko jal pilakar fir le jakar charao." 
Genesis29:8 unhon ne kaha, ham abhee aeesa naheen kar sakate, jab sab jhund ikatthe hote haain tab patthr kuen ke munh se luddhkaya jata haai, aur tab ham bhed-bakaariyon ko panee pilate haain." 
Genesis29:9 unakee yah batacheet ho rahee thee, ki rahel jo pashu charaya karatee thee, so apane pita kee bhed-bakaariyon ko liye huae a gai." 
Genesis29:10 apane mama laban kee bettee rahel ko, aur usakee bhed-bakaariyon ko bhee dekhkar yakoob ne nikatt jakar kuen ke munh par se patthr ko luddhkakar apane mama laban kee bhed-bakaariyon ko panee pilaya." 
Genesis29:11 tab yakoob ne rahel ko chooma, aur unche svar se roya." 
Genesis29:12 aur yakoob ne rahel ko bata diya, ki maain tera faufaera bhai hoo, arthata ribaka ka putra hoon: tab us ne daud ke apane pita se kah diya." 
Genesis29:13 apane bhanaje yakoob ko samachar pate hee laban us se bhentt karane ko dauda, aur usako gale lagakar chooma, fir apane ghar le aya. aur yakoob ne laban se apana sab vrattant varnn kiya." 
Genesis29:14 tab laban ne yakoob se kaha, too to sachamuch meree haddee aur mans haai. so yakoob aek maheena bhr usake sath raha." 
Genesis29:15 tab laban ne yakoob se kaha, bhaibandha hone ke karan tujh se sentament seva karana mujhe uchit naheen haai, so kah maain tujhe seva ke badale kya doon?" 
Genesis29:16 laban ke do bettyaian thee, jin men se badee ka nam lia: aur chhottee ka rahel tha." 
Genesis29:17 lia: ke to dhaundhalee ankhe thee, par rahel roopavatee aur sundar thee." 
Genesis29:18 so yakoob ne, jo rahel se praeeati rakhta tha, kaha, maain teree chhottee bettee rahel ke liye sat baras teree seva karoonga." 
Genesis29:19 laban ne kaha, use paraae puroosh ko dene se tujh ko dena uttm hoga so mere pas raha." 
Genesis29:20 so yakoob ne rahel ke liye sat baras seva kee aur ve usako rahel kee praeeati ke karan thode hee dinon ke barabar jan pade. 
Genesis29:21 tab yakoob ne laban se kaha, meree patnee mujhe de, aur maain usake pas jaunga, kyonaki mera samay poora ho gaya haai." 
Genesis29:22 so laban ne us sthan ke sab manushyon ko bulakar ikattha kiya, aur unakee jevanar kee." 
Genesis29:23 sanjh ke samay vah apanee bettee lia: ko yakoob ke pas le gaya, aur vah usake pas gaya." 
Genesis29:24 aur laban ne apanee bettee lia: ko usakee laundee hone ke liye apanee laundee jilpa dee. 
Genesis29:25 bhor ko maloom hua ki yah to lia haai, so us ne laban se kaha yah too ne mujh se kya kiya haai? maain ne tere sath rahakar jo teree seva kee, so kya rahel ke liye naheen kee? fir too ne mujh se kyon aeesa chhl kiya haai?" 
Genesis29:26 laban ne kaha, hamare yahan aeesee reeati nahee, ki jettee se paahile doosaree ka vivah kar den." 
Genesis29:27 isaka saptah to poora kara fir doosaree bhee tujhe us seva ke liye milegee jo too mere sath rahakar aur sat varsha tak karega. 
Genesis29:28 so yakoob ne aeesa hee kiya, aur lia: ke saptah ko poora kiya tab laban ne use apanee bettee rahel ko bhee diya, ki vah usakee patnee ho." 
Genesis29:29 aur laban ne apanee bettee rahel kee laundee hone ke liye apanee laundee bilha ko diya. 
Genesis29:30 tab yakoob rahel ke pas bhee gaya, aur usakee praeeti lia: se aadhaik usee par hui, aur us ne laban ke sath rahakar sat varsha aur usakee seva kee.." 
Genesis29:31 jab yahova ne dekha, ki lia: aapiry hui, tab us ne usakee kokh kholee, par rahel banjh rahee." 
Genesis29:32 so lia: garbhvatee hui, aur usake aek putra utpann hua, aur us ne yah kahakar usaka nam rooben rakha, ki yahova ne mere du:kh par drashtti kee haai: so ab mera pati mujh se praeeati rakhega." 
Genesis29:33 fir vah garbhvatee hui aur usake aek putra utpann hua aur us ne yah kaha ki yah sunake, ki maai apiry hoon yahova ne mujhe yah bhee putra diya: isaaliye us ne usaka nam shaimon rakha." 
Genesis29:34 fir vah garbhvatee hui aur usake aek putra utpann hua aur us ne kaha, ab kee bar to mera paati mujh se mil jaaega, kyonaki us se mere teen putra utpann huae: isaliye usaka nam levee rakha gaya." 
Genesis29:35 aur fir vah garbhvatee hui aur usake aek aur putra utpann hua aur us ne kaha, ab kee bar to maain yahova ka dhanyavad karoongee, isaliye us ne usaka nam yahooda rakha tab usakee kokh band ko gai.." 
Genesis30:1 jab rahel ne dekha, ki yakoob ke liye mujh se koi santan naheen hota, tab vah apanee bahin se dah karane lagee: aur yakoob se kaha, mujhe bhee santan de, naheen to mar jaungee." 
Genesis30:2 tab yakoob ne rahel se krodhait hokar kaha, kya maain parameshvar hoon? teree kokh to usee ne band kar rakhee haai." 
Genesis30:3 rahel ne kaha, achchha, meree laundee bilha hajir haai: usee ke pas ja, vah mere ghauttnon par janegee, aur usake dara mera bhee ghar basega." 
Genesis30:4 to us ne use apanee laundee bilha ko diya, ki vah usakee patnee ho aur yakoob usake pas gaya." 
Genesis30:5 aur bilha garbhvatee hui aur yakoob se usake aek putra utpann hua. 
Genesis30:6 aur rahel ne kaha, parameshvar ne mera nyay chukaya aur meree sunakar mujhe aek putra diya: isaaliye us ne usaka nam dan rakha." 
Genesis30:7 aur rahel kee laundee bilha fir garbhvatee hui aur yakoob se aek putra aur utpann hua. 
Genesis30:8 tab rahel ne kaha, maain ne apanee bahin ke sath bade bal se lipattkar mallayuddh kiya aur ab jeet gai: so us ne usaka nam naptalee rakha." 
Genesis30:9 jab lia: ne dekha ki maain janane se raahit ho gai hoo, tab us ne apanee laundee jilpa ko lekar yakoob kee patnee hone ke liye de diya." 
Genesis30:10 aur lia: kee laundee jilpa ke bhee yakoob se aek putra utpann hua. 
Genesis30:11 tab lia: ne kaha, aho bhagya! so us ne usaka nam gad rakha." 
Genesis30:12 fir lia: kee laundee jilpa ke yakoob se aek aur putra utpann hua. 
Genesis30:13 tab lia: ne kaha, maai dhany hoon nishchay striayan mujhe dhany kahengee: so us ne usaka nam ashor rakha." 
Genesis30:14 gehoon kee kattnee ke dinon men rooben ko maaidan men doodafal mile, aur vah unako apanee mata lia: ke pas le gaya, tab rahel ne lia: se kaha, apane putra ke doodafalon men se kuchh mujhe de." 
Genesis30:15 us ne us se kaha, too ne jo mere paati ko le liya haai so kya chhottee bat haai? ab kya too mere putra ke doodafal bhee lene chahatee haai? rahel ne kaha, achchha, tere putra ke doodafalon ke badale vah aj rat ko tere sang soega." 
Genesis30:16 so sanjh ko jab yakoob maaidan se a raha tha, tab lia: us se bhentt karane ko nikalee, aur kaha, tujhe mere hee pas ana hoga, kyonaki maai ne apane putra ke doodafal dekar tujhe sachamuch mol liya. tab vah us rat ko usee ke sang soya." 
Genesis30:17 tab parameshvar ne lia: kee sunee, so vah garbhvatee hui aur yakoob se usake panchavan putra utpann hua." 
Genesis30:18 tab lia: ne kaha, men ne jo apane pati ko apanee laundee dee, isaaliye parameshvar ne mujhe meree manjooree dee haai: so us ne usaka nam issakar rakha." 
Genesis30:19 aur lia: fir garbhvatee hui aur yakoob se usake chhttvan putra utpann hua. 
Genesis30:20 tab lia: ne kaha, parameshvar ne mujhe achchha dan diya haai ab kee bar mera paati mere sang bana rahega, kyonaki mere us se chh: putra utpann chuke haain: se us ne usaka nam jabooloon rakha." 
Genesis30:21 tatpashchata usake aek bettee bhee hui, aur us ne usaka nam deena rakha." 
Genesis30:22 aur parameshvar ne rahel kee bhee sudhai lee, aur usakee sunakar usakee kokh kholee." 
Genesis30:23 so vah garbhvatee hui aur usake aek putra utpann hua so us ne kaha, parameshvar ne meree namadharai ko door kar diya haai." 
Genesis30:24 so us ne yah kahakar usaka nam yoosufa rakha, ki parameshvar mujhe aek putra aur bhee dega." 
Genesis30:25 jab rahel se yoosufa utpann hua, tab yakoob ne laban se kaha, mujhe vida kar, ki maain apane desh aur sthan ko jaun." 
Genesis30:26 meree striayan aur mere ladke-bale, jinake liye maain ne teree seva kee haai, unhen mujhe de, ki maain chala jaun too to janata haai ki maain ne teree kaaisee seva kee haai." 
Genesis30:27 laban ne us se kaha, yaadi teree draashtti men maain ne anugrah paya haai, to rah ja: kyonki maain ne anubhv se jan liya haai, ki yahova ne tere karan se mujhe ashaeesh dee haai." 
Genesis30:28 fir us ne kaha, too tteek bata ki maain tujh ko kya doo, aur maain use doonga." 
Genesis30:29 us ne us se kaha too janata haai ki maain ne teree kaaisee seva kee, aur tere pashu mere pas kis prakar se rahe." 
Genesis30:30 mere apane se pahile ve kitane the, aur ab kitane ho gaae haain aur yahova ne mere ane par tujhe to ashaeesh dee haai: par maain apane ghar ka kam kab karane paunga?" 
Genesis30:31 us ne fir kaha, maain tujhe kya doon? yakoob ne kaha, too mujhe kuchh n de yaadi too mere liye ek kam kare, to maai fir teree bhed-bakaariyon ko charaunga, aur unakee raksha karoonga." 
Genesis30:32 maain aj teree sab bhed-bakaariyon ke beech hokar nikaloonga, aur jo bhed va bakaree chitteevalee va chitkabaree ho, aur jo bhed kalee ho, aur jo bakaree chitkabaree va chitteevalee ho, unhen maain alag kar rakoonga: aur meree majadooree men ve hee ttharengee." 
Genesis30:33 aur jab age ko meree majadooree kee charcha tere samhane chale, tab dharma kee yahee sakshaee hogee arthata bakariyon men se jo koi n chitteevalee n chitkabaree ho, aur bhedon men se jo koi kalee n ho, so yaadi mere pas nikale, to choree kee ttharengee." 
Genesis30:34 tab laban ne kaha, tere kahane ke anusar ho." 
Genesis30:35 so us ne usee din sab dhaareevale aur chitkabare bakaro, aur sab chitteevalee aur chitkabaree bakaariyon ko, arthata jin men kuchh ujalapan tha, unako aur sab kalee bhedon ko bhee alag karake apane putraen ke hath saup diya." 
Genesis30:36 aur us ne apane aur yakoob ke beech men teen din ke marga ka antar ttharaya: so yakoob laban kee bhed-bakaariyon ko charane laga. 
Genesis30:37 aur yakoob ne chanar, aur badam, aur amorn vrakshaen kee haree haree chhdiyan lekar, unake chhlaike kaheen kaheen chheelake, unhen dhaareedar bana diya, aeesee ki un chhdiyon kee safaedee dikhai dene lagee." 
Genesis30:38 aur tab chheelee hui chhadiyon ko bhed-bakaariyon ke samhane unake panee peene ke kattauton men khda kiya aur jab ve panee peene ke liye ai tab gabhain ho gai. 
Genesis30:39 aur chhadiyon ke samhane gabhain hokar, bhed-bakaariyan dhaareevale, chitteevale aur chitkabare bachche janeen." 
Genesis30:40 tab yakoob ne bhedon ke bachchon ko alag alag kiya, aur laban kee bhed-bakaariyon ke munh ko chitteevale aur sab kale bachchon kee or kar diya aur apane jhundon ko un se alag rakha, aur laban kee bhed-bakaariyon se milane n diya." 
Genesis30:41 aur jab jab balavant bhed-bakaariyan gaabhain hotee thee, tab tab yakoob un chhadiyon ko kattauton me unake samhane rakh deta tha jis se ve chhdiyon ko dekhtee hui gabhain ho jaaen." 
Genesis30:42 par jab nirbal bhed-bakaariyan gaabhain hotee thee, tab vah unhen unake age naheen rakhta tha. is se nirbal nirbal laban kee rahee, aur balavant balavant yakoob kee ho gai." 
Genesis30:43 so vah puroosh atyant dhanaddhy ho gaya, aur usake bahut see bhed-bakaariya, aur launadyaian aur das aur untt aur gadahe ho gaae.." 
Genesis31:1 fir laban ke putraen kee ye baten yakoob ke sunane men ai, ki yakoob ne hamare pita ka sab kuchh chheen liya haai, aur hamare pita ke dhan ke karan usakee yah pratishtta haai." 
Genesis31:2 aur yakoob ne laban ke mukhde par draashtti kee aur tad liya, ki vah usake prati pahale ke saman naheen haai." 
Genesis31:3 tab yahova ne yakoob se kaha, apane pitaron ke desh aur apanee janmaboomi ko lautt ja, aur maain tere sang rahoonga." 
Genesis31:4 tab yakoob ne rahel aur lia: ko, maaidan men apanee bhed-bakaariyon ke pas, bulavakar kaha," 
Genesis31:5 tumhare pita ke mukhde se mujhe samajh padta haai, ki vah to mujhe paahile kee nai ab naheen dekhta par mere pita ka parameshvar mere sang haai." 
Genesis31:6 aur tum bhee janatee ho, ki maain ne tumhare pita kee seva shaktai bhr kee haai." 
Genesis31:7 aur tumhare pita ne mujh se chhl karake meree majadooree ko das bar badal diya parantu parameshvar ne usako meree haani karane naheen diya. 
Genesis31:8 jab us ne kaha, ki chitteevale bachche teree majadooree ttharenge, tab sab bhed-bakaariyan chitteevale hee janane lagee, aur jab us ne kaha, ki dhaareevale bachche teree majadooree ttharenge, tab sab bhed-bakaariyan dhaareevale janane lageen." 
Genesis31:9 is reeati se parameshvar ne tumhare pita ke pashu lekar mujh ko de diae. 
Genesis31:10 bhed-bakaariyon ke gaabhain hone ke samay maain ne svapn men kya dekha, ki jo bakare bakaariyon par chaddh rahe haai, so dhaareevale, chitteevale, aur dhabbevale haai." 
Genesis31:11 aur parameshvar ke doot ne svapn men mujh se kaha, he yakoob: maain ne kaha, kya agyaa." 
Genesis31:12 us ne kaha, ankhe uttakar un sab bakaron ko, jo bakaariyon par chaddh rahe haai, dek, ki ve dhaareevale, chitteevale, aur dhabbevale haain kyonaki jo kuchh laban tujh se karata haai, so maain ne dekha haai." 
Genesis31:13 maain us betel ka ishvar hoo, jahan too ne aek khmbhe par tel dal diya, aur meree mannat manee thee: ab chal, is desh se nikalakar apanee janmaboomi ko lautt ja." 
Genesis31:14 tab rahel aur lia: ne us se kaha, kya hamare pita ke ghar men ab bhee hamara kuchh bhag va ansh bacha haai?" 
Genesis31:15 kya ham usakee drashtti men paraye n tthareen? dek, us ne ham ko to bech dala, aur hamare roope ko kha baaitta haai." 
Genesis31:16 so parameshvar ne hamare pita ka jitana dhan le liya haai, so hamara, aur hamare ladkebalon ko haai: ab jo kuchh parameshvar ne tujh se kaha so kara." 
Genesis31:17 tab yakoob ne apane ladkebalon aur striayon ko untton par chaddhaya 
Genesis31:18 aur jitane pashuuon ko vah panaram men ikattha karake dhanaddhy ho gaya tha, sab ko kanan men apane pita isahak ke pas jane kee manasa se, sath le gaya." 
Genesis31:19 laban to apanee bhedon ka un katarane ke liye chala gaya tha. aur rahel apane pita ke grahadevataon ko chura le gai. 
Genesis31:20 so yakoob laban aramee ke pas se choree se chala gaya, usako n bataya ki maain bhaga jata hoon." 
Genesis31:21 vah apana sab kuchh lekar bhaga: aur mahanad ke par utarakar apana munh gilad ke pahadee desh kee or kiya.. 
Genesis31:22 teesare din laban ko samachar mila, ki yakoob bhag gaya haai." 
Genesis31:23 so us ne apane bhaiyon ko sath lekar usaka sat din tak peechha kiya, aur gilad ke pahadee desh men usako ja pakada." 
Genesis31:24 tab parameshvar ne rat ke svapn men aramee laban ke pas akar kaha, savadhaan rah, too yakoob se n to bhla kahana aur n bura." 
Genesis31:25 aur laban yakoob ke pas pahunch gaya, yakoob to apana tamboo gilad nam pahadee desh men khda kiae pada tha: aur laban ne bhee apane bhaiyon ke sath apana tamboo usee pahadee desh men khda kiya." 
Genesis31:26 tab laban yakoob se kahane laga, too ne yah kya kiya, ki mere pas se choree se chala aya, aur meree beattyaien ko aeesa le aya, jaaisa koi talavar ke bal se bandee banaae gaae?" 
Genesis31:27 too kyon chupake se bhag aya, aur mujh se bina kuchh kahe mere pas se choree se chala aya naheen to maain tujhe anand ke sath mradang aur veena bajavate, aur geet gavate vida karata?" 
Genesis31:28 too ne to mujhe apane bette beattyaien ko choomane tak n diya? too ne moorkhta kee haai. 
Genesis31:29 tum logon kee hani karane kee shaktai mere hath men to haai par tumhare pita ke parameshvar ne mujh se beetee hui rat men kaha, savadhaan rah, yakoob se n to bhla kahana aur n bura." 
Genesis31:30 bhla ab too apane pita ke ghar ka bada aabhailashaee hokar chala aya to chala aya, par mere devataon ko too kyon chura le aya haai?" 
Genesis31:31 yakoob ne laban ko uttr diya, maain yah sochakar dr gaya tha: ki kaheen too apanee beattyaien ko mujh se chheen n le." 
Genesis31:32 jis kisee ke pas too apane devataon ko paa, so jeeta n bachega. mere pas tera jo kuchh nikale, so bhai-bandhauon ke samhane pahichanakar le le. kyonaki yakoob n janata tha ki rahel grahadevataon ko chura le ai haai." 
Genesis31:33 yah sunakar laban, yakoob aur lia: aur donon daasiyon ke tambuon me gaya aur kuchh n mila. tab lia: ke tamboo men se nikalakar rahel ke tamboo men gaya." 
Genesis31:34 rahel to grahadevataon ko untt kee kattee men rakhke un par baaittee thee. so laban ne usake sare tamboo men ttttolane par bhee unhen n paya. 
Genesis31:35 rahel ne apane pita se kaha, he mere prabhu is se aprasann n ho, ki maain tere samhane naheen uttee kyonaki maain sreedharma se hoon. so usake ddoonddh ddhanddh karane par bhee grahadevata usako n mile." 
Genesis31:36 tab yakoob krodhait hokar laban se jhgadne laga, aur kaha, mera kya aparadha haai? mera kya pap haai, ki too ne itana krodhait hokar mera peechha kiya haai?" 
Genesis31:37 too ne jo meree saree samagraee ko ttttolakar dekha, so tujh ko saree samagraee men se kya mila? kuchh mila ho to usako yahan apane aur mere bhaiyon ke samahane rakh de, aur ve ham donon ke beech nyay karen." 
Genesis31:38 in bees vasharen se maai tere pas raha un men n to teree bhed-bakaariyon ke garbh gire, aur n tere meddhon ka mans maai ne kabhee khaya." 
Genesis31:39 jise banaaile jantuon ne faad dala usako maain tere pas n lata tha, usakee haani maain hee uttata tha chahe din ko choree jata chahe rat ko, too mujh hee se usako le leta tha." 
Genesis31:40 meree to yah dasha thee, ki din ko to ghaam aur rat ko pala mujhe kha gaya aur neend meree ankhon se bhag jatee thee." 
Genesis31:41 bees varsha tak maain tere ghar men raho chaudah varsha to maai ne teree dono beattyaien ke liye, aur chh: varsha teree bhed-bakaariyon ke liye seva kee: aur too ne meree majadooree ko das bar badal dala." 
Genesis31:42 mere pita ka parameshvar arthata ibraaheem ka parameshvar, jisaka bhy isahak bhee manata haai, yaadi meree or n hota, to nishchay too ab mujhe choochhe hath jane deta. mere du:kh aur mere hathon ke paarishram ko dekhkar parameshvar ne beetee hui rat men tujhe dapatta." 
Genesis31:43 laban le yakoob se kaha, ye beattyaien to meree hee haai, aur ye putra bhee mere hee haai, aur ye bhed-bakaariyon bhee meree hee haai, aur jo kuchh tujhe dekh padta haai so sab mera hee haai: aur ab maain apanee in bettyaien va inake santan se kya kar sakata hoon?" 
Genesis31:44 ab a maain aur too donon apas men vacha bandho, aur vah mere aur tere beech sakshaee ttharee rahe." 
Genesis31:45 tab yakoob ne aek patthr lekar usaka khmbha khda kiya. 
Genesis31:46 tab yakoob ne apane bhai-bandhauon se kaha, patthr ikattha karo yah sunakar unhon ne patthr ikattha karake aek ddher lagaya aur vaheen ddher ke pas unhon ne bhojan kiya." 
Genesis31:47 us ddher ka nam laban ne to yajra sahadutha, par yakoob ne jiliyad rakha." 
Genesis31:48 laban ne kaha, ki yah ddher aj se mere aur tere beech sakshaee rahega. is karan usaka nam jiliyad rakha gaya," 
Genesis31:49 aur mijapa bhee kyonki us ne kaha, ki jab ham us doosare se door rahen tab yahova meree aur teree dekhbhal karata rahe." 
Genesis31:50 yaadi too meree beattyaien ko du:kh de, va unake sivay aur striayan byah le, to hamare sath koi manushy to n rahega par dekh mere tere beech men parameshvar sakshaee rahega." 
Genesis31:51 fir laban ne yakoob se kaha, is ddher ko dekh aur is khmbhe ko bhee dek, jinako maain ne apane aur tere beech men khda kiya haai." 
Genesis31:52 yah ddher aur yah khmbha donon is bat ke sakshaee rahe, ki hani karane kee manasa se n to maain is ddher ko langhakar tere pas jaunga, n too is ddher aur is khmbhe ko langhakar mere pas aaega." 
Genesis31:53 ibraaheem aur nahor aur unake pita teenon ka jo parameshvar haai, so ham dono ke beech nyay kare. tab yakoob ne usakee shapath khai jisaka bhy usaka pita isahak manata tha." 
Genesis31:54 aur yakoob ne us pahad par melabaali chaddhaya, aur apane bhai-bandhauon ko bhojan karane ke liye bulaya, so unhon ne bhojan karake pahad par rat bitai." 
Genesis31:55 bihan ko laban tadke utta, aur apane bette beattyaien ko choomakar aur ashaeervad dekar chal diya, aur apane sthan ko lautt gaya." 
Genesis32:1 aur yakoob ne bhee apana marga liya aur parameshvar ke doot use a mile. 
Genesis32:2 unako dekhte hee yakoob ne kaha, yah to parameshvar ka dal haai so us ne us sthan ka nam mahanaaim rakha.." 
Genesis32:3 tab yakoob ne seir desh me, arthata aedom desh me, apane bhai aesav ke pas apane age doot bhej diae." 
Genesis32:4 aur us ne unhen yah agyaa dee, ki mere prabhu aesav se yon kahana ki tera das yakoob tujh se yon kahata haai, ki maain laban ke yahan paradeshaee hokar ab tak raha" 
Genesis32:5 aur mere pas gaya-baail, gadahe, bhed-bakaariya, aur dasa-daasiyan haai: so maain ne apane prabhu ke pas isaaliye sandesha bheja haai, ki teree anugrah kee draashtti mujh par ho." 
Genesis32:6 ve doot yakoob ke pas lauttke kahane lage, ham tere bhai aesav ke pas gaae the, aur vah bhee tujh se bhentt karane ko char sau puroosh sang liye huae chala ata haai." 
Genesis32:7 tab yakoob nipatt dr gaya, aur sankatt men pada: aur yah sochakar, apane sangavalon ke, aur bhed-bakaariyo, aur gaya-baailo, aur untto ke bhee alag alag do dal kar liye," 
Genesis32:8 ki yadi aesav akar pahile dal ko marane lage, to doosara dal bhagakar bach jaaega." 
Genesis32:9 fir yakoob ne kaha, he yahova, he mere dada ibraaheem ke parameshvar, too ne to mujh se kaha, ki apane desh aur janmaboomi men lautt ja, aur maain teree bhlai karoonga:" 
Genesis32:10 too ne jo jo kam apanee karoona aur sachchai se apane das ke sath kiae haai, ki maain jo apanee chhdee hee lekar is yaradan nadee ke par utar aya, so ab mere do dal ho gaae haai, tere aeese aeese kamon men se maain aek ke bhee yogy to naheen hoon." 
Genesis32:11 meree binatee sunakar mujhe mere bhai aesav ke hath se bacha: maain to us se drata hoo, kaheen aeesa ne ho ki vah akar mujhe aur man samet ladkon ko bhee mar dale." 
Genesis32:12 too ne to kaha haai, ki maain nishchay teree bhlai karoonga, aur tere vansh ko samudr kee baloo ke kinakon ke saman bahut karoonga, jo bahutayat ke mare gine naheen jo sakate." 
Genesis32:13 aur us ne us din kee rat vaheen bitai aur jo kuchh usake pas tha us men se apane bhai aesav kee bhentt ke liye chhantt chhanttkar nikala 
Genesis32:14 arthata do sau bakariya, aur bees bakare, aur do sau bhede, aur bees meddhe," 
Genesis32:15 aur bachchon samet doodha denevalee tees unttaniya, aur chalees gaye, aur das baail, aur bees gadaahiyan aur unake das bachche." 
Genesis32:16 inako us ne jhund jhund karake, apane dason ko saunpakar un se kaha, mere age baddh jao aur jhundon ke beech beech men antar rakho." 
Genesis32:17 fir us ne agale jhund ke rakhvale ko yah agyaa dee, ki jab mera bhai aesav tujhe mile, aur poochhne lage, ki too kis ka das haai, aur kahan jata haai, aur ye jo tere age age haai, so kis ke haain?" 
Genesis32:18 tab kahana, ki yah tere das yakoob ke haain. he mere prabhu aesav, ye bhentt ke liye tere pas bheje gaae haai, aur vah ap bhee hamare peechhe peechhe a raha haai." 
Genesis32:19 aur us ne doosare aur teesare rakhvalon ko bhee, varan us sabhon ko jo jhundon ke peechhe peechhe the aeesee hee agyaa dee, ki jab aesav tum ko mile tab isee prakar us se kahana." 
Genesis32:20 aur yah bhee kahana, ki tera das yakoob hamare peechhe peechhe a raha haai. kyonaki us ne yah socha, ki yah bhentt jo mere age age jatee haai, isake dara maain usake krodha ko shaant karake tab usaka darshan karoonga ho sakata haai vah mujh se prasann ho jaae." 
Genesis32:21 so vah bhentt yakoob se pahile par utar gai, aur vah ap us rat ko chhavanee men raha.." 
Genesis32:22 usee rat ko vah utta aur apanee donon striayo, aur donon laundyaie, aur gyarahon ladkon ko sang lekar ghaatt se yabbok nadee ke par utar gaya." 
Genesis32:23 aur us ne unhen us nadee ke par utar diya varan apana sab kuchh par utar diya. 
Genesis32:24 aur yakoob ap akela rah gaya tab koi puroosh akar pah fattne tak us se mallayuddh karata raha. 
Genesis32:25 jab us ne dekha, ki maain yakoob par prabal naheen hota, tab usakee jangha kee nas ko chooa so yakoob kee jangha kee nas us se mallayuddh karate hee karate chaddh gai." 
Genesis32:26 tab us ne kaha, mujhe jane de, kyonki bhor hua chahata haai yakoob ne kaha jab tak too mujhe ashaeervad n de, tab tak maain tujhe jane n doonga." 
Genesis32:27 aur us ne yakoob se poochha, tera nam kya haai? us ne kaha yakooba." 
Genesis32:28 us ne kaha tera nam ab yakoob nahee, parantu israel hoga, kyonaki too parameshvar se aur manushyon se bhee yuddh karake prabal hua haai." 
Genesis32:29 yakoob ne kaha, maain binatee karata hoo, mujhe apana nam bata. us ne kaha, too mera nam kyon poochhta haai? tab us ne usako vaheen ashaeervad diya." 
Genesis32:30 tab yakoob ne yah kahakar us sthan ka nam paneeael rakha: ki parameshvar ko amhane samhane dekhne par bhee mera praan bach gaya haai. 
Genesis32:31 panooael ke pas se chalate chalate soorya uday ho gaya, aur vah jangha se langadata tha." 
Genesis32:32 israaelee jo pashuuon kee jangha kee jodvale janghaanas ko aj ke din tak naheen khate, isaka karan yahee haai, ki us puroosh ne yakoob kee jangha kee jod men janghaanas ko chooa tha.." 
Genesis33:1 aur yakoob ne ankhen uttakar yah dekha, ki aesav char sau puroosh sang liye huae chala jata haai. tab us ne ladkebalon ko alag alag banttkar lia, aur rahel, aur donon launadyaien ko saup diya." 
Genesis33:2 aur us ne sab ke age ladkon samet launadyaien ko usake peechhe ladkon samet lia: ko, aur sab ke peechhe rahel aur yoosufa ko rakha," 
Genesis33:3 aur ap un sab ke age baddha, aur sat bar boomi par girake dandvata kee, aur apane bhai ke pas pahuncha." 
Genesis33:4 tab aesav us se bhentt karane ko dauda, aur usako day se lagakar, gale se lipattkar chooma: fir ve donon ro pade." 
Genesis33:5 tab us ne ankhe uttakar striayon aur ladke balon ko dekha aur poochha, ye jo tere sath haain so kaun haain? us ne kaha, ye tere das ke ladke haai, jinhen parameshvar ne anugrah karake mujh ko diya haai." 
Genesis33:6 tab ladkon samet launadyaien ne nikatt akar dandvata kee. 
Genesis33:7 fir ladkon samet lia: nikatt ai, aur unhon ne bhee dandvata kee: peechhe yoosufa aur rahel ne bhee nikatt akar dandvata kee." 
Genesis33:8 tab us ne poochha, tera yah bada dal jo mujh ko mila, usaka kya prayojan haai? us ne kaha, yah ki mere prabhu kee anugrah kee drashtti mujh par ho." 
Genesis33:9 aesav ne kaha, he mere bhai, mere pas to bahut haai jo kuchh tera haai so tera hee rahe." 
Genesis33:10 yakoob ne kaha, naheen nahee, yadi tera anugrah mujh par ho, to meree bhentt grahan kar: kyonaki maain ne tera darshan pakar, mano parameshvar ka darshan paya haai, aur too mujh se prasann hua haai." 
Genesis33:11 so yah bhent, jo tujhe bhejee gai haai, grahan kar: kyonaki parameshvar ne mujh par anugrah kiya haai, aur mere pas bahut haai." 
Genesis33:12 fir aesav ne kaha, a, ham baddh chalen: aur maai tere age age chaloonga." 
Genesis33:13 yakoob ne kaha, he mere prabhu, too janata hee haai ki mere sath sukumar ladke, aur doodha deneharee bhed-bakaariyan aur gayen haai yaadi aeese pashu aek din bhee adhaik hanke jaae, to sab ke sab mar jaaenge." 
Genesis33:14 so mera prabhu apane das ke age baddh jaa, aur maain in pashuuon kee gaati ke anusar, jo mere age haai, aur ladkebalon kee gaati ke anusar dhaeere dhaeere chalakar seir men apane prabhu ke pas pahunchoonga." 
Genesis33:15 aesav ne kaha, to apane sangavalon men se maain kai aek tere sath chhod jaun. us ne kaha, yah kyon? itana hee bahut haai, ki mere prabhu kee anugrah kee drashtti mujh par banee rahe." 
Genesis33:16 tab aesav ne usee din seir jane ko apana marga liya. 
Genesis33:17 aur yakoob vahan se kooch karake sukkot ko gaya, aur vahan apane liye aek ghar, aur pashuuon ke liye jhonpade banaae: isee karan us sthan ka nam sukkot pada.." 
Genesis33:18 aur yakoob jo panaram se aya tha, so kanan desh ke shakem nagar ke pas kushal kshom se pahunchakar nagar ke samhane dere khde kiae." 
Genesis33:19 aur boomi ke jis khnd par us ne apana tamboo khda kiya, usako us ne shakem ke pita hamor ke putraen ke hath se aek sau kaseeton men mol liya." 
Genesis33:20 aur vahan us ne aek vedee banakar usaka nam aelelohe israael rakha.. 
Genesis34:1 aur lia: kee bettee deena, jo yakoob se utpann hui thee, us desh kee ladkiyon se bhentt karane ko nikalee." 
Genesis34:2 tab us desh ke pradhaan hittee hamor ke putra shakem ne use dekha, aur use le jakar usake sath kukarma karake usako bhrashtt kar dala." 
Genesis34:3 tab usaka man yakoob kee bettee deena se lag gaya, aur us ne us kanya se praem kee baten kee, aur us se praem karane laga." 
Genesis34:4 aur shakem ne apane pita hamor se kaha, mujhe is ladkee ko meree patnee hone ke liye dila de." 
Genesis34:5 aur yakoob ne suna, ki shakem ne meree bettee deena ko ashuuddh kar dala haai, par usake putra us samay pashuuon ke sang maaidan men the, so vah unake ane tak chup raha." 
Genesis34:6 aur shakem ka pita hamor nikalakar yakoob se batacheet karane ke liye usake pas gaya. 
Genesis34:7 aur yakoob ke putra sunate hee maaidan se bahut udas aur krodhait hokar aae: kyonki shakem ne yakoob kee bettee ke sath kukarma karake israael ke gharane se moorkhta ka aeesa kam kiya tha, jisaka karana anuachit tha." 
Genesis34:8 hamor ne un sab se kaha, mere putra shakem ka man tumharee bettee par bahut laga haai, so use usakee patnee hone ke liye usako de do." 
Genesis34:9 aur hamare sath byah kiya karo apanee bettyaian ham ko diya karo, aur hamaree bettyaien ko ap liya karo." 
Genesis34:10 aur hamare sang base raho: aur yah desh tumhare samane pada haai is men rahakar lenaden karo, aur isakee boomi ko apane liye le lo." 
Genesis34:11 aur shakem ne bhee deena ke pita aur bhaiyon se kaha, yadi mujh par tum logon kee anugrah kee draashtti ho, to jo kuchh tum mujh se kaha, so maain doonga." 
Genesis34:12 tum mujh se kitana hee mooly va badala kyon n mango, taubhee maain tumhare kahe ke anusar doonga: parantu us kanya ko patnee hone ke liye mujhe do." 
Genesis34:13 tab yah sochakar, ki shakem ne hamaree baahin deena ko ashuuddh kiya haai, yakoob ke putraen ne shakem aur usake pita hamor ko chhl ke sath yah uttr diya," 
Genesis34:14 ki ham aeesa kam naheen kar sakate, ki kisee khtanarahit puroosh ko apanee bahin den kyonaki is se hamaree namadharai hogee:" 
Genesis34:15 is bat par to ham tumharee man lenge, ki hamaree nai tum men se har aek puroosh ka khtana kiya jaae." 
Genesis34:16 tab ham apanee beattyaian tumhen byah denge, aur tumharee beattyaian byah lenge, aur tumhare sang base bhee rahenge, aur ham donon aek hee samuday ke manushy ho jaaenge." 
Genesis34:17 par yaadi tum hamaree bat n manakar apana khtana n karaoge, to ham apanee ladkee ko leke yahan se chale jaaenge." 
Genesis34:18 usakee is bat par hamor aur usaka putra shakem prasann hue. 
Genesis34:19 aur vah javan, jo yakoob kee bettee ko bahut chahata tha, is kam ko karane men us ne vilamb n kiya. vah to apane pita ke sare gharane men adhaik pratishttit tha." 
Genesis34:20 so hamor aur usaka putra shakem apane nagar ke faattk ke nikatt jakar nagaravaasiyon ko yon samajhane lage 
Genesis34:21 ki ve manushy to hamare sang mel se rahana chahate haain so unhen is desh men rahake lenaden karane do dekho, yah desh unake liye bhee bahut haai fir ham log unakee bettyaien ko byah le, aur apanee bettyaien ko unhen diya karen." 
Genesis34:22 ve log keval is bat par hamare sang rahane aur aek hee samuday ke manushy ho jane ko prasann haai, ki unakee nai hamare sab purooshaen ka bhee khtana kiya jaae." 
Genesis34:23 kya unakee bhed-bakaariya, aur gaya-baail varan unake sare pashu aur dhan sampaati hamaree n ho jaaegee? itana kee karen ki ham log unakee bat man le, to ve hamare sang rahenge." 
Genesis34:24 so jitane us nagar ke faattk se nikalate the, un sabhon ne hamor kee aur usake putra shakem kee bat manee aur har aek puroosh ka khtana kiya gaya, jitane us nagar ke faattk se nikalate the." 
Genesis34:25 teesare din, jab ve log peeadit pade the, tab aeesa hua ki shaimon aur levee nam yakoob ke do putraen ne, jo deena ke bhai the, apanee apanee talavar le us nagar men nidhadk ghausakar sab purooshaen ko ghaat kiya." 
Genesis34:26 aur hamor aur usake putra shakem ko unhon ne talavar se mar dala, aur deena ko shakem ke ghar se nikal le gaae." 
Genesis34:27 aur yakoob ke putraen ne ghaat kar dalane par bhee chaddhkar nagar ko isaaliye loott liya, ki us men unakee bahin ashuuddh kee gai thee." 
Genesis34:28 unhon ne bhed-bakaree, aur gaya-baail, aur gadahe, aur nagar aur maaidan men jitana dhan tha le liya." 
Genesis34:29 us sab ko, aur unake bala-bachcho, aur striayon ko bhee har le gaa, varan ghar ghar men jo kuchh tha, usako bhee unhon ne loott liya." 
Genesis34:30 tab yakoob ne shaimon aur levee se kaha, tum ne jo us desh ke nivasee kanaaniyon aur paarijjaiyon ke man men meree or gharana utpann karai haai, is se tum ne mujhe sankatt men dala haai, kyonaki mere sath to thode kee log haai, so ab ve ikatthe hokar mujh par chaddhenge, aur mujhe mar dalenge, so maain apane gharane samet satyanash ho jaunga." 
Genesis34:31 unhon ne kaha, kya vah hamaree baahin ke sath veshya kee nai bartav kare?" 
Genesis35:1 tab parameshvar ne yakoob se kaha, yahan se kooch karake betel ko ja, aur vaheen raha: aur vahan ishvar ke liye vedee bana, jis ne tujhe us samay darshan diya, jab too apane bhai aesav ke dr se bhaga jata tha." 
Genesis35:2 tab yakoob ne apane gharane se, aur un sab se bhee jo usake sang the, kaha, tumhare beech men jo paraae devata haai, unhen nikal faenko aur apane apane ko shuuddh karo, aur apane vasr badal dalo" 
Genesis35:3 aur ao, ham yahan se kooch karake betel ko jaaen vahan maain ishvar ke liye aek vedee banaunga, jis ne sankatt ke din meree sun lee, aur jis marga se maain chalata tha, us men mere sang raha." 
Genesis35:4 so jitane paraae devata unake pas the, aur jitane kundl unake kanon men the, un sabhon ko unhon ne yakoob ko diya aur us ne unako us sindoor vraksha ke neeche, jo shakem ke pas haai, gad diya." 
Genesis35:5 tab unhon ne kooch kiya: aur unake charon or ke nagar nivaasiyon ke man men parameshvar kee or se aeesa bhy sama gaya, ki unhon ne yakoob ke putraen ka peechha n kiya." 
Genesis35:6 so yakoob un sab samet, jo usake sang the, kanan desh ke looj nagar ko aya. vah nagar betel bhee kahalata haai." 
Genesis35:7 vahan us ne aek vedee banai, aur us sthan ka nam aelabetel rakha kyonki jab vah apane bhai ke dr se bhaga jata tha tab parameshvar us par vaheen pragatt hua tha." 
Genesis35:8 aur ribaka kee doodha pilaneharee dhaay dabora mar gai, aur betel ke neeche sindoor vraksha ke tale usako mittee dee gai, aur us sindoor vraksha ka nam allonabakkoot rakha gaya.." 
Genesis35:9 fir yakoob ke panaram se ane ke pashchata parameshvar ne doosaree bar usako darshan dekar ashaeesh dee. 
Genesis35:10 aur parameshvar ne us se kaha, ab tak to tera nam yakoob raha haai par age ko tera nam yakoob n rahega, too israael kahalaaega:" 
Genesis35:11 fir parameshvar ne us se kaha, maain sarvashaktaiman ishvar hoon: too foole-fale aur baddhe aur tujh se aek jati varan jaatiyon kee aek mandlee bhee utpann hogee, aur tere vansh men raja utpann honge." 
Genesis35:12 aur jo desh maain ne ibraaheem aur isahak ko diya haai, vahee desh tujhe deta hoo, aur tere peechhe tere vansh ko bhee doonga." 
Genesis35:13 tab parameshvar us sthan me, jahan us ne yakoob se baten kee, unake pas se upar chaddh gaya." 
Genesis35:14 aur jis sthan men parameshvar ne yakoob se baten kee, vahan yakoob ne patthr ka aek khmba khda kiya, aur us par argha dekar tel dal diya." 
Genesis35:15 aur jahan parameshvar ne yakoob se baten kee, us sthan ka nam us ne betel rakha." 
Genesis35:16 fir unhon ne betel se kooch kiya aur aepraata thodee hee door rah gaya tha, ki rahel ko bachcha janane kee badee peeda ane lagee." 
Genesis35:17 jab usako badee badee peeda utttee thee tab dhaay ne us se kaha, mat dra ab kee bhee tere betta hee hoga." 
Genesis35:18 tab aeesa hua, ki vah mar gai, aur praan nikalate nikalate us ne us bette ko nam benonee rakha: par usake pita ne usaka nam binyameen rakha." 
Genesis35:19 yon rahel mar gai, aur aepraata, arthata betalehem ke marga me, usako mittee dee gai." 
Genesis35:20 aur yakoob ne usakee kabra par aek khmbha khda kiya: rahel kee kabra ka vahee khmbha aj tak bana haai. 
Genesis35:21 fir israael ne kooch kiya, aur aeder nam gummatt ke age baddhkar apana tamboo khda kiya." 
Genesis35:22 jab israael us desh men basa tha, tab aek din aeesa hua, ki rooben ne jakar apane pita kee rakhelee bilha ke sath kukarma kiya: aur yah bat israael ko maloom ho gai.." 
Genesis35:23 yakoob ke barah putra huae. un men se lia: ke putra ye the arthata yakoob ka jetta, rooben, fir shaimon, levee, yahooda, issakar, aur jabooloona." 
Genesis35:24 aur rahel ke putra ye the arthata yoosuf, aur binyameena." 
Genesis35:25 aur rahel kee laundee bilha ke putra ye the arthata dan, aur naptalee." 
Genesis35:26 aur lia: kee laundee jilpa ke putra ye the: arthata gad, aur ashora yakoob ke ye hee putra hua, jo us se panaram men utpann huae.." 
Genesis35:27 aur yakoob mamra me, jo kariyataarba, arthata habraen haai, jahan ibraaheem aur isahak paradeshaee hokar rahe the, apane pita isahak ke pas aya." 
Genesis35:28 isahak kee avastha aek sau assee baras kee hui. 
Genesis35:29 aur isahak ka praan choott gaya, aur vah mar gaya, aur vah booddha aur pooree ayu ka hokar apane logon men ja mila: aur usake putra aesav aur yakoob ne usako mittee dee.." 
Genesis36:1 aesav jo aedom bhee kahalata haai, usakee yah vanshaavalee haai." 
Genesis36:2 aesav ne to kananee ladkiyan byah leen arthata hittee aelon kee bettee ada ko, aur aholeebama ko jo ana kee bettee, aur hivvee sibon kee naatinee thee." 
Genesis36:3 fir us ne ishmaael kee bettee basamat ko bhee, jo nabayot kee baahin thee, byah liya." 
Genesis36:4 ada ne to aesav ke janmaae aeleepaj ko, aur basamat ne rooael ko utpann kiya." 
Genesis36:5 aur oholeebama ne yoosha, aur yalam, aur korah ko utpann kiya, aesav ke ye hee putra kanan desh men utpann hue." 
Genesis36:6 aur aesav apanee patnaiyo, aur bette-beattyaie, aur ghar ke sab praaanaiyo, aur apanee bhed-bakaree, aur gaya-baail adi sab pashuuo, nidan apanee saree sampati ko, jo us ne kanan desh men sanchay kee thee, lekar apane bhai yakoob ke pas se doosare desh ko chala gaya." 
Genesis36:7 kyonaki unakee sampati itanee ho gai thee, ki ve ikatthe n rah sake aur pashuuon kee bahutayat ke mare us desh me, jahan ve paradeshaee hokar rahate the, unakee samai n rahee." 
Genesis36:8 aesav jo aedom bhee kahalata haai: so seir nam pahadee desh men rahane laga. 
Genesis36:9 seir nam pahadee desh men rahanehare aedomiyon ke mool puroosh aesav kee vanshaavalee yah haai: 
Genesis36:10 aesav ke putraen ke nam ye haain arthata aesav kee patnee ada ka putra aeleepaj, aur usee aesav kee patnee basamat ka putra rooaela." 
Genesis36:11 aur aeleepaj ke ye putra hue arthata teman, omar, sapo, gatam, aur kanaja." 
Genesis36:12 aur aesav ke putra aeleepaj ke timna nam aek suraaitin thee, jis ne aeleepaj ke janmaae amalek ko janm diya: aesav kee patnee ada ke vansh men ye hee hue." 
Genesis36:13 aur rooael ke ye putra huae arthata nahat, jerah, shamma, aur mijja: aesav kee patnee basamat ke vansh men ye hee hue." 
Genesis36:14 aur oholeebama jo aesav kee patnee, aur sibon kee naatinee aur ana kee bettee thee, usake ye putra huae: arthata us ne aesav ke janmaae yoosha, yalam aur korah ko janm diya." 
Genesis36:15 aesavavanashaiyon ke aadhaipaati ye huae: arthata aesav ke jette aeleepaj ke vansh men se to teman aadhaipaati, omar aadhaipaati, sapo aadhaipaati, kanaj aadhaipaati," 
Genesis36:16 korah adhaipaati, gatam aadhaipaati, amalekh adhaipaati: aeleepaj vanshaiyon me se, aedom desh men ye hee aadhaipaati huae: aur ye hee ada ke vansh men huae." 
Genesis36:17 aur aesav ke putra rooael ke vansh men ye hue arthata nahat aadhaipaati, jerah aadhaipaati, shamma adhaipaati, mijja adhaipaati: rooaelavanshaiyon men se, aedom desh men ye hee aadhaipaati hue aur ye hee aesav kee patnee basamat ke vansh men huae." 
Genesis36:18 aur aesav kee patnee oholeebama ke vansh men ye hue arthata yoosh adhaipaati, yalam aadhaipaati, korah aadhaipaati, ana kee bettee oholeebama jo aesav kee patnee thee usake vansh men ye hee huae." 
Genesis36:19 aesav jo aedom bhee kahalata haai, usake vansh ye hee haai, aur unake adhaipaati bhee ye hee hue.." 
Genesis36:20 seir jo horee nam jaati ka tha usake ye putra us desh men pahile se rahate the arthata lotan, shaebal, shaibon, ana," 
Genesis36:21 deeshaen, aeser, aur deeshaana aedom desh men seir ke ye hee horee jaativale adhaipaati hue." 
Genesis36:22 aur lotan ke putra, horee, aur hemam huae aur lotan kee bahin timna thee." 
Genesis36:23 aur shaebal ke ye putra hue arthata alvan, manahat, aebal, shapo, aur onama." 
Genesis36:24 aur sidon ke ye putra hue arthata ayya, aur ana yah vahee ana haai jis ko jangal men apane pita sibon ke gadahon ko charate charate garam panee ke jhrane mile." 
Genesis36:25 aur ana ke deeshaen nam putra hua, aur usee ana ke oholeebama nam bettee hui." 
Genesis36:26 aur deeshaen ke ye putra hue arthata hemadan, aeshban, yitraan, aur karana." 
Genesis36:27 aeser ke ye putra huae arthata bilhan, javan, aur akana." 
Genesis36:28 deeshaan ke ye putra hue arthata us, aur akana." 
Genesis36:29 horiyon ke aadhaipaati ye hue arthata lotan aadhaipaati, shaebal adhaipaati, shaibon aadhaipaati, ana aadhaipaati," 
Genesis36:30 deeshaen aadhaipaati, aeser aadhaipaati, deeshaan adhaipaati, seir desh men horee jaativale ye hee adhaipaati hue." 
Genesis36:31 fir jab israaeliyon par kisee raja ne rajy n kiya tha, tab bhee aedom ke desh men ye raja hue" 
Genesis36:32 arthata bor ke putra bela ne aedom men rajy kiya, aur usakee rajadhaanee ka nam dinhaba haai."
