Genesis36:33 bela ke marane par, bosranivasee jerah ka putra yobab usake sthan par raja hua." 
Genesis36:34 aur yobab ke marane par, temaniyon ke desh ka nivasee hooshaam usake sthan par raja hua." 
Genesis36:35 aur hooshaam ke marane par, badad ka putra hadad usake sthan par raja hua: yah vahee haai jis ne midhaaniyon ko moab ke desh men mar liya, aur usakee rajadhaanee ka nam abeet haai." 
Genesis36:36 aur hadad ke marane par, masrekavasee samla usake sthan par raja hua." 
Genesis36:37 fir samla ke marane par, shaaul jo mahanad ke tattvale rahobot nagar ka tha, so usake sthan par raja hua." 
Genesis36:38 aur shaaul ke marane par, akabor ka putra balhanan usake sthan par raja hua." 
Genesis36:39 aur akabor ke putra balhanan ke marane par, hadar usake sthan par raja hua: aur usakee rajadhaanee ka nam pa haai aur usakee patnee ka nam mahetabel haai, jo mejahab kee natinee aur matrod kee bettee thee." 
Genesis36:40 fir aesavavanshaiyon ke aadhaipaatiyon ke kulo, aur sthanon ke anusar unake nam ye haain arthata timna adhaipaati, alba adhaipaati, yatet aadhaipaati," 
Genesis36:41 oholeebama aadhaipaati, aela aadhaipaati, peenon aadhaipaati," 
Genesis36:42 kanaj adhaipaati, teman aadhaipaati, misabar adhaipaati," 
Genesis36:43 magdeeael aadhaipaati, iram aadhaipaati: aedomavanshaiyon ne jo desh apana kar liya tha, usake nivasasthanon men unake ye hee aadhaipaati hue. aur aedomee jati ka moolapuroosh aesav haai.." 
Genesis37:1 yakoob to kanan desh men rahata tha, jahan usaka pita paradeshaee hokar raha tha." 
Genesis37:2 aur yakoob ke vansh ka vrattant yah haai: ki yoosufa satarah varsha ka hokar bhaiyon ke sang bhed-bakaariyon ko charata tha aur vah ladka apane pita kee patnee bilha, aur jilpa ke putraen ke sang raha karata tha: aur unakee buraiyon ka samachar apane pita ke pas pahunchaya karata tha:" 
Genesis37:3 aur israael apane sab putraen se baddhke yoosufa se praeeti rakhta tha, kyonki vah usake buddhape ka putra tha: aur us ne usake liye rang biranga angarakha banavaya." 
Genesis37:4 so jab usake bhaiyon ne dekha, ki hamara pita ham sab bhaiyon se aadhaik usee se praeeti rakhta haai, tab ve us se baair karane lage aur usake sath tteek taur se bat bhee naheen karate the." 
Genesis37:5 aur yoosufa ne aek svapn dekha, aur apane bhaiyon se usaka varnn kiya: tab ve us se aur bhee desh karane lage." 
Genesis37:6 aur us ne un se kaha, jo svapn maain ne dekha haai, so suno:" 
Genesis37:7 ham log khet men poole bandha rahe haai, aur kya dekhta hoon ki mera poola uttkar seedha khda ho gaya tab tumhare poolon ne mere poole ko charon tarafa se ghor liya aur use dandvata kiya." 
Genesis37:8 tab usake bhaiyon ne us se kaha, kya sachamuch too hamare upar rajy karega? va sachamuch too ham par prabhuta karega? so ve usake svapnon aur usakee baton ke karan us se aur bhee adhaik baair karane lage." 
Genesis37:9 fir us ne aek aur svapn dekha, aur apane bhaiyon se usaka bhee yon varnn kiya, ki suno, maain ne aek aur svapn dekha haai, ki soorya aur chandrama, aur gyarah tare mujhe dandvata kar rahe haain." 
Genesis37:10 yah svapn us ne apane pita, aur bhaiyon se varnn kiya: tab usake pita ne usako dapattke kaha, yah kaaisa svapn haai jo too ne dekha haai? kya sachamuch maain aur teree mata aur tere bhai sab jakar tere age boomi par girake dandvata karenge?" 
Genesis37:11 usake bhai to usase dah karate the par usake pita ne usake us vachan ko smaran rakha. 
Genesis37:12 aur usake bhai apane pita kee bhed-bakaariyon ko charane ke liye shakem ko gaae. 
Genesis37:13 tab israael ne yoosufa se kaha, tere bhai to shakem hee men bhed-bakaree chara rahen honge, so ja, maain tujhe unake pas bhejata hoon. us ne us se kaha jo agyaa maain haajir hoon." 
Genesis37:14 us ne us se kaha, ja, apane bhaiyon aur bhed-bakaariyon ka hal dekh a ki ve kushal se to haai, fir mere pas samachar le a. so us ne usako hebraen kee tarai men vida kar diya, aur vah shakem men aya." 
Genesis37:15 aur kisee manushy ne usako maaidan meen idhar udhar bhttkate huae pakar us se poochha, too kya ddoonddhta haai?" 
Genesis37:16 us ne kaha, maain to apane bhaiyon ko ddoonddhta hoon: krapa kar mujhe bata, ki ve bhed-bakaariyon ko kahan chara rahe haain?" 
Genesis37:17 us manushy ne kaha, ve to yahan se chale gaae haain: aur maain ne unako yah kahate suna, ki ao, ham dotan ko chalen. so yoosufa apane bhaiyon ke pas chala, aur unhen dotan men paya." 
Genesis37:18 aur jyonhee unhon ne use door se ate dekha, to usake nikatt ane ke pahile hee use mar dalane kee yuktai kee." 
Genesis37:19 aur ve apas men kahane lage, dekho, vah svapn dekhnehara a raha haai." 
Genesis37:20 so ao, ham usako ghaat karake kisee gadhe men dal de, aur yah kah denge, ki koi dushtt pashu usako kha gaya. fir ham dekhenge ki usake svapnon ka kya fal hoga." 
Genesis37:21 yah sunake rooben ne usako unake hath se bachane kee manasa se kaha, ham usako praan se to n maren." 
Genesis37:22 fir rooben ne un se kaha, lohoo mat bahao, usako jangal ke is gadhe men dal do, aur us par hath mat uttao. vah usako unake hath se chhudakar pita ke pas fir pahunchana chahata tha." 
Genesis37:23 so aeesa hua, ki jab yoosufa apane bhaiyon ke pas pahuncha tab unhon ne usaka rangaabiranga angarakha, jise vah paahine huae tha, utar liya." 
Genesis37:24 aur yoosufa ko uttakar gadhe men dal diya: vah gadha to sookha tha aur us men kuchh jal n tha. 
Genesis37:25 tab ve rottee khane ko baaitt gaae: aur ankhe uttakar kya dekha, ki ishmaaeliyon ka aek dal untto par sugandhadravy, balasan, aur gandharas lade hua, gilad se misr ko chala ja raha haai." 
Genesis37:26 tab yahooda ne apane bhaiyon se kaha, apane bhai ko ghaat karane aur usaka koon chhpaiane se kya labh hoga?" 
Genesis37:27 ao, ham use ishmaaeliyon ke hath bech dale, aur apana hath us par n uttaae, kyonki vah hamara bhai aur hamaree haddee aur mans haai, so usake bhaiyon ne usakee bat man lee. tab midhanee vyaparee udhar se hokar unake pas pahunche:" 
Genesis37:28 so yoosufa ke bhaiyon ne usako us gadhe men se kheenchake bahar nikala, aur ishmaaeliyon ke hath chandee ke bees ttukadon men bech diya: aur ve yoosufa ko misr men le gaae." 
Genesis37:29 aur rooben ne gadhe par lauttkar kya dekha, ki yoosufa gadhe men naheen haain so us ne apane vasr faade." 
Genesis37:30 aur apane bhaiyon ke pas lauttkar kahane laga, ki ladka to naheen haain ab maain kidhar jaun?" 
Genesis37:31 aur tab unhon ne yoosufa ka angarakha liya, aur aek bakare ko marake usake lohoo men use duba diya." 
Genesis37:32 aur unhon ne us rang birange angarakhe ko apane pita ke pas bhejakar kahala diya ki yah ham ko mila haai, so dekhkar pahichan le, ki yah tere putra ka angarakha haai ki naheen." 
Genesis37:33 us ne usako paahichan liya, aur kaha, han yah mere hee putra ka angarakha haai kisee dushtt pashu ne usako kha liya haai ni:sandeh yoosufa faad dala gaya haai." 
Genesis37:34 tab yakoob ne apane vasr faade aur kamar men ttatt lapetta, aur apane putra ke liye bahut dinon tak vilap karata raha." 
Genesis37:35 aur usake sab bette-bettyaien ne usako shaantai dene ka yatn kiya par usako shaantai n milee aur vah yahee kahata raha, maain to vilap karata hua apane putra ke pas adhaelok men utar jaunga. is prakar usaka pita usake liye rota hee raha." 
Genesis37:36 aur midhaaniyon ne yoosufa ko misr men le jakar poteepar nam, firaun ke aek haakim, aur jalladon ke pradhaan, ke hath bech dala.." 
Genesis38:1 unheen dinon men aeesa hua, ki yahooda apane bhaiyon ke pas se chala gaya, aur heera nam ek adullamavasee puroosh ke pas dera kiya." 
Genesis38:2 vahan yahooda ne shooa nam aek kananee puroosh kee bettee ko dekha aur usako byahakar usake pas gaya. 
Genesis38:3 vah garbhvatee hui, aur usake aek putra utpann hua aur yahooda ne usaka nam aer rakha." 
Genesis38:4 aur vah fir garbhvatee hui, aur usake aek putra utpann hua aur usaka nam onan rakha gaya." 
Genesis38:5 fir usake aek putra aur utpann hua, aur usaka nam shola rakha gaya: aur jis samay isaka janm hua us samay yahooda kajeeb men rahata tha." 
Genesis38:6 aur yahooda ne tamar nam aek sree se apane jette aer ka vivah kar diya. 
Genesis38:7 parantu yahooda ka vah jetta aer yahova ke lekhe men dushtt tha, isaaliye yahova ne usako mar dala." 
Genesis38:8 tab yahooda ne onan se kaha, apanee bhaujai ke pas ja, aur usake sath devar ka dharma poora karake apane bhai ke liye santan utpann kara." 
Genesis38:9 onan to janata tha ki santan to meree n ttharegee: so aeesa hua, ki jab vah apanee bhaujai ke pas gaya, tab us ne boomi par veerya girakar nash kiya, jis se aeesa n ho ki usake bhai ke nam se vansh chale." 
Genesis38:10 yah kam jo us ne kiya use yahova aprasann hua: aur us ne usako bhee mar dala. 
Genesis38:11 tab yahooda ne is dr ke mare, ki kaheen aeesa n ho ki apane bhaiyon kee nai shola bhee mare, apanee bahoo tamar se kaha, jab tak mera putra shola siyana n ho tab tak apane pita ke ghar men vidhava kee baaittee rah, so tamar apane pita ke ghar men jakar rahane lagee." 
Genesis38:12 bahut samay ke beetane par yahooda kee patnee jo shooa kee bettee thee so mar gai fir yahooda shaek se choottkar apane mitra heera adullamavasee samet apanee bhed-bakaariyon ka un katarane ke liye timnath ko gaya. 
Genesis38:13 aur tamar ko yah samachar mila, ki tera sasur apanee bhed-bakaariyon ka un katarane ke liye timnath ko ja raha haai." 
Genesis38:14 tab us ne yah sochakar, ki shola siyana to ho gaya par maain usakee sree naheen hone pai apana vidhavapan ka paahirava utara, aur ghoonghatt dalakar apane ko ddhanp liya, aur aenaaim nagar ke faattk ke pas, jo timnath ke marga men haai, ja baaittee:" 
Genesis38:15 jab yahooda ne usako dekha, us ne us ko veshya samajha kyonaki vah apana munh ddhape huae thee." 
Genesis38:16 aur vah marga se usakee or fira aur us se kahane laga, mujhe apane pas ane de, kyonaki use yah maloom n tha ki vah usakee bahoo haai. aur vah kahane lagee, ki yadi maain tujhe apane pas ane doo, to too mujhe kya dega?" 
Genesis38:17 us ne kaha, maain apanee bakariyon men se bakaree ka ek bachcha tere pas bhej doonga." 
Genesis38:18 us ne poochha, maain tere pas kya rehan rakh jaun? us ne kaha, apanee muhar, aur bajooband, aur apane hath kee chhdee. tab us ne usako ve vasatuen de dee, aur usake pas gaya, aur vah us se garbhvatee hui." 
Genesis38:19 tab vah uttkar chalee gai, aur apana ghoonghatt utarake apana vidhavapan ka paahirava fir pahin liya." 
Genesis38:20 tab yahooda ne bakaree ka bachcha apane mitra us adullamavasee ke hath bhej diya, ki vah rehan rakhee hui vastuaen us sree ke hath se chhuda le aae par vah sree usako n milee." 
Genesis38:21 tab us ne vahan ke logon se poochha, ki vah devadasee jo aenaaim men marga kee aek aur baaittee thee, kahan haai? unhon ne kaha, yahan to koi devadasee n thee." 
Genesis38:22 so us ne yahooda ke pas lauttke kaha, mujhe vah naheen milee aur us sthan ke logon ne kaha, ki yahan to koi devadasee n thee." 
Genesis38:23 tab yahooda ne kaha, achchha, vah bandhak us ke pas rahane de, naheen to ham log tuchchh gine jaaenge: dek, maain ne bakaree ka yah bachcha bhej diya, par vah tujhe naheen milee." 
Genesis38:24 aur teen maheene ke peechhe yahooda ko yah samachar mila, ki teree bahoo tamar ne vyabhaichar kiya haai varan vah vyabhaichar se garbhvatee bhee ho gai haai. tab yahooda ne kaha, usako bahar le ao, ki vah jalai jaae." 
Genesis38:25 jab use bahar nikal rahe the, tab us ne, apane sasur ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki jis puroosh kee ye vastuen haai, usee se maain garbhvatee hoon fir us ne yah bhee kahalaya, ki pahichan to sahee, ki yah muhar, aur vajooband, aur chhdee kis kee haai." 
Genesis38:26 yahooda ne unhen pahichanakar kaha, vah to mujh se kam doshaee haai kyonki maain ne use apane putra shola ko n byah diya. aur us ne us se fir kabhee prasang n kiya." 
Genesis38:27 jab usake janane ka samay aya, tab yah jan pada ki usake garbh men judve bachche haain." 
Genesis38:28 aur jab vah janane lagee tab aek balak ne apana hath baddhaya: aur dhaay ne lal soot lekar usake hath men yah kahate huye bandha diya, ki pahile yahee utpann hua." 
Genesis38:29 jab us ne hath samett liya, tab usaka bhai utpann ho gaya: tab us dhaay ne kaha, too kyon barabas nikal aya haai? isaliye usaka nam peres rakha gaya." 
Genesis38:30 peechhe usaka bhai jisake hath men lal soot bandha tha utpann hua, aur usaka nam jerah rakha gaya.." 
Genesis39:1 jab yoosufa misr men pahunchaya gaya, tab poteepar nam aek misree, jo firaun ka haakim, aur jalladon ka pradhaan tha, us ne usako ishmaaeliyon ke hat, se jo use vahan le gaae the, mol liya." 
Genesis39:2 aur yoosufa apane misree svamee ke ghar men rahata tha, aur yahova usake sang tha so vah bhagyavana puroosh ho gaya." 
Genesis39:3 aur yoosufa ke svamee ne dekha, ki yahova usake sang rahata haai, aur jo kam vah karata haai usako yahova usake hath se sufal kar deta haai." 
Genesis39:4 tab usakee anugrah kee draashtti us par hui, aur vah usakee seva tthal karane ke liye niyukt kiya gaya: fir us ne usako apane ghar ka adhaikaree banake apana sab kuchh usake hath men saup diya." 
Genesis39:5 aur jab se us ne usako apane ghar ka aur apanee saree sampati ka adhaikaree banaya, tab se yahova yoosufa ke karan us misree ke ghar par ashaeesh dene laga aur kya ghar me, kya maaidan me, usaka jo kuchh tha, sab par yahova kee ashaeesh hone lagee." 
Genesis39:6 so us ne apana sab kuchh yoosufa ke hath men yahan tak chhod diya: ki apane khane kee rottee ko chhod, vah apanee sampati ka hal kuchh n janata tha. aur yoosufa sundar aur roopavana tha." 
Genesis39:7 in baton ke pashchata aeesa hua, ki usake svamee kee patnee ne yoosufa kee or ankh lagai aur kaha, mere sath so." 
Genesis39:8 par us ne asveekar karate huae apane svamee kee patnee se kaha, sun, jo kuchh is ghar men haai mere hath men haai use mera svamee kuchh naheen janata, aur us ne apana sab kuchh mere hath men saup diya haai." 
Genesis39:9 is ghar men mujh se bada koi naheen aur us ne tujhe chhod, jo usakee patnee haai mujh se kuchh naheen rakh chhoda so bhla, maain aeesee badee dushttta karake parameshvar ka aparadhaee kyonkar banoon?" 
Genesis39:10 aur aeesa hua, ki vah prati din yoosufa se baten karatee rahee, par us ne usakee n manee, ki usake pas lette va usake sang rahe." 
Genesis39:11 aek din kya hua, ki yoosufa apana kam kaj karane ke liye ghar men gaya, aur ghar ke sevakon men se koi bhee ghar ke andar n tha." 
Genesis39:12 tab us sree ne usaka vasr pakadkar kaha, mere sath so, par vah apana vasr usake hath men chhodkar bhaga, aur bahar nikal gaya." 
Genesis39:13 yah dekhkar, ki vah apana vasr mere hath men chhodkar bahar bhag gaya," 
Genesis39:14 us sree ne apane ghar ke sevakon ko bulakar kaha, dekho, vah ek ibraee manushy ko hamara tiraskar karane ke liye hamare pas le aya haai. vah to mere sath sone ke matalab se mere pas andar aya tha aur maain unche svar se chilla uttee." 
Genesis39:15 aur meree badee chillahatt sunakar vah apana vasr mere pas chhodkar bhaga, aur bahar nikal gaya." 
Genesis39:16 aur vah usaka vasr usake svamee ke ghar ane tak apane pas rakhe rahee. 
Genesis39:17 tab us ne us se is prakar kee baten kahee, ki vah ibraee das jisako too hamare pas le aya haai, so mujh se hansee karane ke liye mere pas aya tha." 
Genesis39:18 aur jab maain unche svar se chilla uttee, tab vah apana vasr mere pas chhodkar bahar bhag gaya." 
Genesis39:19 apanee patnee kee ye baten sunakar, ki tere das ne mujh se aeesa aeesa kam kiya, yoosufa ke svamee ka kop bhdka." 
Genesis39:20 aur yoosufa ke svamee ne usako pakadkar bandeegrah me, jahan raja ke kaaidee band the, dlava diya: so vah us bandeegrah men rahane laga." 
Genesis39:21 par yahova yoosufa ke sang sang raha, aur us par karoona kee, aur bandeegrah ke daroga ke anugrah kee draashtti us par hui." 
Genesis39:22 so bandeegrah ke daroga ne un sab bandhauon ko, jo karagar men the, yoosufa ke hath men saup diya aur jo jo kam ve vahan karate the, vah usee kee agyaa se hota tha." 
Genesis39:23 bandeegrah ke daroga ke vash men jo kuchh tha kyonaki us men se usako koi bhee vastu dekhnee n padtee thee isaliye ki yahova yoosufa ke sath tha aur jo kuchh vah karata tha, yahova usako us men safalata deta tha." 
Genesis40:1 in baton ke pashchata aeesa hua, ki misr ke raja ke pilanehare aur pakanehare ne apane svamee ka kuchh aparadha kiya." 
Genesis40:2 tab firaun ne apane un donon hakimon par, arthata pilanehare ke pradhaan, aur pakaneharon ke pradhaan par krodhait hokar" 
Genesis40:3 unhen kaaid karake, jalladon ke pradhaan ke ghar ke usee bandeegrah me, jahan yoosufa bandhaua tha, dlava diya." 
Genesis40:4 tab jalladon ke pradhaan ne unako yoosufa ke hath saupa, aur vah unakee seva tthal karane laga: so ve kuchh din tak bandeegrah men rahe." 
Genesis40:5 aur misr ke raja ka pilanehara aur pakanehara, jo bandeegrah men band the, un donon ne aek hee rat me, apane apane honahar ke anusar, svapn dekha." 
Genesis40:6 bihan ko jab yoosufa unake pas andar gaya, tab un par us ne jo drashtti kee, to kya dekhta haai, ki ve udas haain." 
Genesis40:7 so us ne firaun ke un haakimon se, jo usake sath usake svamee ke ghar ke bandeegrah men the, poochha, ki aj tumhare munh kyon udas haain?" 
Genesis40:8 unhon ne us se kaha, ham dono ne svapn dekha haai, aur unake fal ka batanevala koi bhee naheen. yoosufa ne un se kaha, kya svapnon ka fal kahana parameshvar ka kam naheen haai? mujhe apana apana svapn batao." 
Genesis40:9 tab pilaneharon ka pradhaan apana svapn yoosufa ko yon batane laga: ki maain ne svapn men dekha, ki mere samhane aek dakhlata haai" 
Genesis40:10 aur us dakhlata men teen daliyan haain: aur us men mano kaliyan lageen haai, aur ve fooleen aur usake guchchhon men dakh lagakar pak gai." 
Genesis40:11 aur firaun ka kattora mere hath men tha: so maai ne un dakhon ko lekar firaun ke kattore men nichoda aur kattore ko firaun ke hath men diya. 
Genesis40:12 yoosufa ne us se kaha, isaka fal yah haai ki teen daliyon ka arth teen din haai:" 
Genesis40:13 so ab se teen din ke bheetar firaun tera sir uncha karega, aur fir se tere pad par tujhe niyukt karega, aur too pahale kee nai firaun ka pilanehara hokar usaka kattora usake hath men fir diya karega." 
Genesis40:14 so jab tera bhla ho jaae tab mujhe smaran karana, aur mujh par krapa karake, firaun se meree charcha chalana, aur is ghar se mujhe chhudva dena." 
Genesis40:15 kyonaki sachamuch ibraaniyon ke desh se mujhe chura kar le aae haai, aur yahan bhee maai ne koi aeesa kam naheen kiya, jisake karan maain is karagar men dala jaun." 
Genesis40:16 yah dekhkar, ki usake svapn ka fal achchha nikala, pakaneharon ke pradhaan ne yoosufa se kaha, maain ne bhee svapn dekha haai, vah yah haai: maai ne dekha, ki mere sir par safaed rottee kee teen ttokaariyan haai:" 
Genesis40:17 aur upar kee ttokaree men firaun ke liye sab prakar kee pakee pakai vastuaen haain aur pakshaee mere sir par kee ttokaree men se un vastuon ko kha rahe haain. 
Genesis40:18 yoosufa ne kaha, isaka fal yah haai ki teen ttokaariyon ka arth teen din haai." 
Genesis40:19 so ab se teen din ke bheetar firaun tera sir kattvakar tujhe aek vraksha par ttngava dega, aur pakshaee tere mans ko noch noch kar khaaenge." 
Genesis40:20 aur teesare din firaun ka janmaadin tha, us ne apane sab karmachariyon kee jevanar kee, aur un men se pilaneharon ke pradhaan, aur pakaneharon ke pradhaan donon ko bandeegrah se nikalavaya." 
Genesis40:21 aur pilaneharon ke pradhaan ko to pilanehare ke pad par fir se niyukt kiya, aur vah firaun ke hath men kattora dene laga." 
Genesis40:22 par pakaneharon ke pradhaan ko us ne ttngava diya, jaaisa ki yoosufa ne unake svapnon ka fal un se kaha tha." 
Genesis40:23 fir bhee pilaneharon ke pradhaan ne yoosufa ko smaran n rakha parantu use bool gaya.. 
Genesis41:1 poore do baras ke beetane par firaun ne yah svapn dekha, ki vah neel nadee ke kinare par khda haai." 
Genesis41:2 aur us nadee men se sat sundar aur mottee mottee gayen nikalakar kachhar kee ghaas charane lageen. 
Genesis41:3 aur, kya dekha, ki unake peechhe aur sat gaye, jo kuroop aur durbal haai, nadee se nikalee aur doosaree gayon ke nikatt nadee ke tatt par ja khdee hui." 
Genesis41:4 tab ye kuroop aur durbal gayen un sat sundar aur mottee mottee gayon ko kha gai. tab firaun jag utta. 
Genesis41:5 aur vah fir so gaya aur doosara svapn dekha, ki aek dnttee men se sat mottee aur achchhee achchhee balen nikaleen." 
Genesis41:6 aur, kya dekha, ki unake peechhe sat balen patalee aur puravai se murajhai hui nikaleen." 
Genesis41:7 aur in patalee balon ne un saton mottee aur ann se bhree hui balon ko nigal liya. tab firaun jaga, aur use maloom hua ki yah svapn hee tha." 
Genesis41:8 bhor ko firaun ka man vyakul hua aur us ne misr ke sab jyotishaiyo, aur panditon ko bulava bheja aur unako apane svapn bataaen par un men se koi bhee unaka fal firaun se n kah saha." 
Genesis41:9 tab pilaneharon ka pradhaan firaun se bol utta, ki mere aparadha aj mujhe smaran aae:" 
Genesis41:10 jab firaun apane dason se krodhait hua tha, aur mujhe aur pakaneharon ke pradhaan ko kaaid karake jalladon ke pradhaan ke ghar ke bandeegrah men dal diya tha" 
Genesis41:11 tab ham donon ne, aek hee rat me, apane apane honahar ke anusar svapn dekha" 
Genesis41:12 aur vahan hamare sath aek ibraee javan tha, jo jalladon ke pradhaan ka das tha so ham ne usako bataya, aur us ne hamare svapnon ka fal ham se kaha, ham men se aek aek ke svapn ka fal us ne bata diya." 
Genesis41:13 aur jaaisa jaaisa fal us ne ham se kaha tha, vaaisa kee hua bhee, arthata mujh ko to mera pad fir mila, par vah faansee par lattkaya gaya." 
Genesis41:14 tab firaun ne yoosufa ko bulava bheja. aur vah jhttpatt bandeegrah se bahar nikala gaya, aur bal banavakar, aur vasr badalakar firaun ke samhane aya." 
Genesis41:15 firaun ne yoosufa se kaha, maain ne aek svapn dekha haai, aur usake fal ka batanevala koi bhee naheen aur maain ne tere vishay men suna haai, ki too svapn sunate hee usaka fal bata sakata haai." 
Genesis41:16 yoosufa ne firaun se kaha, maai to kuchh naheen janata: parameshvar hee firaun ke liye shuubh vachan dega." 
Genesis41:17 fir firaun yoosufa se kahane laga, maai ne apane svapn men dekha, ki maain neel nadee ke kinare par khda hoon" 
Genesis41:18 fir, kya dekha, ki nadee men se sat mottee aur sundar sundar gayen nikalakar kachhar kee ghaas charane lagee." 
Genesis41:19 fir, kya dekha, ki unake peechhe sat aur gayen nikalee, jo dubalee, aur bahut kuroop, aur durbal haain maai ne to sare misr desh men aeesee kudaul gayen kabhee naheen dekheen." 
Genesis41:20 aur in durbal aur kudaul gayon ne un pahalee saton mottee mottee gayon ko kha liya. 
Genesis41:21 aur jab ve unako kha gai tab yah maloom naheen hota tha ki ve unako kha gai haai, kyonki ve pahile kee nai jaaisee kee taaisee kudaul raheen. tab maain jag utta." 
Genesis41:22 fir maain ne doosara svapn dekha, ki aek hee dnttee men sat achchhee achchhee aur ann se bhree hui balen nikaleen." 
Genesis41:23 fir, kya dekhta hoo, ki unake peechhe aur sat balen choochhee choochhee aur patalee aur puravai se murajhai hui nikaleen." 
Genesis41:24 aur in patalee balon ne un sat achchhee achchhee balon ko nigal liya. ise maain ne jyotishaiyon ko bataya, par is ka samajhnehara koi naheen mila." 
Genesis41:25 tab yoosufa ne firaun se kaha, firaun ka svapn aek hee haai, parameshvar jo kam kiya chahata haai, usako us ne firaun ko jataya haai." 
Genesis41:26 ve sat achchhee achchhee gayen sat varsha haain aur ve sat achchhee achchhee balen bhee sat varsha haain svapn aek hee haai. 
Genesis41:27 fir unake peechhe jo durbal aur kudaul gayen nikalee, aur jo sat choochhee aur puravai se murajhai hui balen nikalee, ve akal ke sat varsha honge." 
Genesis41:28 yah vahee bat haai, jo maain firaun se kah chuka hoo, ki parameshvar jo kam kiya chahata haai, use us ne firaun ko dikhaya haai." 
Genesis41:29 sun, sare misr desh men sat varsha to bahutayat kee upaj ke honge." 
Genesis41:30 unake pashchata sat varsha akal ke ayenge, aur sare misr desh men log is saree upaj ko bool jayenge aur akal se desh ka nash hoga." 
Genesis41:31 aur sukal bahutayat kee upaja desh men fir smaran n rahega kyonaki akal atyant bhyankar hoga. 
Genesis41:32 aur firaun ne jo yah svapn do bar dekha haai isaka bhed yahee haai, ki yah bat parameshvar kee or se niyukt ho chukee haai, aur parameshvar ise shaeegha hee poora karega." 
Genesis41:33 isaliye ab firaun kisee samajhdar aur buddhmaiana puroosh ko ddoonddh karake use misr desh par pradhaanamantraee ttharaae. 
Genesis41:34 firaun yah kare, ki desh par aadhaikaariyon ko niyukt kare, aur jab tak sukal ke sat varsha rahen tab tak vah misr desh kee upaj ka panchamansh liya kare." 
Genesis41:35 aur ve in achchhe vasharen men sab prakar kee bhojanavastu ikattha kare, aur nagar nagar men bhndar ghar bhojan ke liye firaun ke vash men karake usakee raksha karen." 
Genesis41:36 aur vah bhojanavastu akal ke un sat vasharen ke liye, jo misr desh men aaenge, desh ke bhojan ke nimitt rakhee rahe, jis se desh us akal se styanash n ho jaae." 
Genesis41:37 yah bat firaun aur usake sare karmachariyon ko achchhee lagee. 
Genesis41:38 so firaun ne apane karmachaariyon se kaha, ki kya ham ko aeesa puroosh jaaisa yah haai, jis men parameshvar ka atma rahata haai, mil sakata haai?" 
Genesis41:39 fir firaun ne yoosufa se kaha, parameshvar ne jo tujhe itana gyaan diya haai, ki tere tuly koi samajhdar aur buddhmaiana naheen" 
Genesis41:40 is karan too mere ghar ka aadhaikaree hoga, aur teree agyaa ke anusar meree saree praja chalegee, keval rajagaee ke vishay maain tujh se bada ttharoonga." 
Genesis41:41 fir firaun ne yoosufa se kaha, sun, maain tujh ko misr ke sare desh ke upar aadhaikaree tthara deta hoon" 
Genesis41:42 tab firaun ne apane hath se angoottee nikalake yoosufa ke hath men paahina dee aur usako baaddhiya malamal ke vasr pahinava dia, aur usake gale men sone kee janjeer dal dee" 
Genesis41:43 aur usako apane doosare rath par chaddhvaya aur log usake age age yah prachar karate chale, ki ghauttne ttekakar dandvat karo aur us ne usako misr ke sare desh ke upar pradhaan mantraee ttharaya." 
Genesis41:44 fir firaun ne yoosufa se kaha, firaun to maain hoo, aur sare misr desh men koi bhee teree agyaa ke bina hath panv n hilaaega." 
Genesis41:45 aur firaun ne yoosufa ka nam sapan tapaneh rakha. aur on nagar ke yajak poteepera kee bettee asanat se usaka byah kara diya. aur yoosufa misr ke sare desh men daura karane laga. 
Genesis41:46 jab yoosufa misr ke raja firaun ke sammukh khda hua, tab vah tees varsha ka tha. so vah firaun ke sammukh se nikalakar misr ke sare desh men daura karane laga." 
Genesis41:47 sukal ke saton vasharen men boomi bahutayat se ann upajatee rahee. 
Genesis41:48 aur yoosufa un saton vasharen men sab prakar kee bhojanavastue, jo misr desh men hotee thee, jama karake nagaron men rakhta gaya, aur har aek nagar ke charon or ke kheton kee bhojanavastuon ko vah usee nagar men ikattha karata gaya." 
Genesis41:49 so yoosufa ne ann ko samudr kee baloo ke saman atyant bahutayat se raashai rashai karake rakha, yahan tak ki us ne unaka ginana chhod diya kyonaki ve asankhy ho gai." 
Genesis41:50 akal ke prathm varsha ke ane se paahile yoosufa ke do putra, on ke yajak poteepera kee bettee asanat se janme." 
Genesis41:51 aur yoosufa ne apane jette ka nam yah kahake manashsho rakha, ki parameshvar ne mujh se sara klesha, aur mere pita ka sara gharana bhula diya haai." 
Genesis41:52 aur doosare ka nam us ne yah kahakar aepraaim rakha, ki mujhe du:kh bhogane ke desh men parameshvar ne faulaya falaya haai." 
Genesis41:53 aur misr desh ke sukal ke ve sat varsha samapt ho gaae. 
Genesis41:54 aur yoosufa ke kahane ke anusar sat vasharen ke liye akal arambh ho gaya. aur sab deshaen men akal padne laga parantu sare misr desh men ann tha. 
Genesis41:55 jab misr ka sara desh bookhon marane laga tab praja firon se chilla chillakar rottee mangane lagee: aur vah sab misriyon se kaha karata tha, yoosufa ke pas jao: aur jo kuchh vah tum se kahe, vahee karo." 
Genesis41:56 so jab akal saree prathvee par faail gaya, aur misr desh men kal ka bhyankar roop ho gaya, tab yoosufa sab bhndaron ko khol kholake misriyon ke hath ann bechane laga." 
Genesis41:57 so saree prathvee ke log misr men ann mol lene ke liye yoosufa ke pas ane lage, kyonaki saree prathvee par bhyankar akal tha." 
Genesis42:1 jab yakoob ne suna ki misr men ann haai, tab us ne apane putraen se kaha, tum aek doosare ka munh kyon dekh rahe ho." 
Genesis42:2 fir us ne kaha, maain ne suna haai ki misr men ann haai isaaliye tum log vahan jakar hamare liye ann mol le ao, jis se ham n mare, varan jeeavit rahen." 
Genesis42:3 so yoosufa ke das bhai ann mol lene ke liye misr ko gaae. 
Genesis42:4 par yoosufa ke bhai binyameen ko yakoob ne yah sochakar bhaiyon ke sath n bheja, ki kaheen aeesa n ho ki us par koi vipaati a pade." 
Genesis42:5 so jo log ann mol lene aae unake sath israael ke putra bhee aae kyonki kanan desh men bhee bharee akal tha. 
Genesis42:6 yoosufa to misr desh ka aadhaikaree tha, aur us desh ke sab logon ke hath vahee ann bechata tha isaaliye jab yoosufa ke bhai aae tab boomi par munh ke bal girake dandvata kiya." 
Genesis42:7 unako dekhkar yoosufa ne paahichan to liya, parantu unake samhane bhola banake kattorata ke sath un se poochha, tum kahan se ate ho? unhon ne kaha, ham to kanan desh se ann mol lene ke liye aae haain." 
Genesis42:8 yoosufa ne to apane bhaiyon ko paahichan liya, parantu unhon ne usako n paahichana." 
Genesis42:9 tab yoosufa apane un svapnon ko smaran karake jo us ne unake vishay men dekhe the, un se kahane laga, tum bheadiae ho is desh kee durdasha ko dekhne ke liye aae ho." 
Genesis42:10 unhon ne us se kaha, nahee, nahee, he prabhu, tere das bhojanavastu mol lene ke liye aae haain." 
Genesis42:11 ham sab aek hee pita ke putra haai, ham seedho manushy haai, tere das bheadiae naheen." 
Genesis42:12 us ne un se kaha, naheen nahee, tum is desh kee durdasha dekhne hee ko aae ho." 
Genesis42:13 unhon ne kaha, ham tere das barah bhai haai, aur kanan deshavasee ek hee puroosh ke putra haai, aur chhotta is samay hamare pita ke pas haai, aur ek jata raha." 
Genesis42:14 tab yoosufa ne un se kaha, maain ne to tum se kah diya, ki tum bhediae ho" 
Genesis42:15 so isee reeti se tum parakhe jaoge, firaun ke jeevan kee shapat, jab tak tumhara chhotta bhai yahan n aae tab tak tum yahan se n nikalane paoge." 
Genesis42:16 so apane men se aek ko bhej do, ki vah tumhare bhai ko le aa, aur tum log bandhauvai men rahoge is prakar tumharee baten parakhee jaaengee, ki tum men sachchai haai ki naheen. yadi sachche n tthare tab to firaun ke jeevan kee shapath tum nishchay hee bhediae samajhe jaoge." 
Genesis42:17 tab us ne unako teen din tak bandeegrah men rakha. 
Genesis42:18 teesare din yoosufa ne un se kaha, aek kam karo tab jeevit rahoge kyonki maain parameshvar ka bhy manata hoon" 
Genesis42:19 yaadi tum seedho manushy ho, to tum sab bhaiyon men se aek jan is bandeegrah men bandhaua rahe aur tum apane gharavalon kee bookh bujhane ke liye ann le jao." 
Genesis42:20 aur apane chhotte bhai ko mere pas le ao is prakar tumharee baten sachchee ttharengee, aur tum mar dale n jaoge. tab unhon ne vaaisa hee kiya." 
Genesis42:21 unhon ne apas men kaha, nisndeh ham apane bhai ke vishay men doshaee haai, kyonki jab us ne ham se gidgidake binatee kee, taubhee ham ne yah dekhkar, ki usaka jeevan kese sankatt men pada haai, usakee n sunee isee karan ham bhee ab is sankatt men pade haain." 
Genesis42:22 rooben ne un se kaha, kya maain ne tum se n kaha tha, ki ladke ke aparadhaee mat bano? parantu tum ne n suna: dekho, ab usake lohoo ka palatta diya jata haai." 
Genesis42:23 yoosufa kee aur unakee batacheet jo aek dubhashaiya ke dara hotee thee is se unako maloom n hua ki vah unakee bolee samajhta haai. 
Genesis42:24 tab vah unake pas se hattkar rone laga fir unake pas lauttkar aur un se batacheet karake un men se shaimon ko chhantt nikala aur usake samhane bandhaua rakha. 
Genesis42:25 tab yoosufa ne agyaa dee, ki unake bore ann se bhro aur aek aek jan ke bore men usake roopaye ko bhee rakh do, fir unako marga ke liye seedha do: so unake sath aeesa hee kiya gaya." 
Genesis42:26 tab ve apana ann apane gadahon par ladakar vahan se chal diae. 
Genesis42:27 saray men jab aek ne apane gadahe ko chara dene ke liye apana bora khola, tab usaka roopaya bore ke mohade par rakha hua dikhlai pada." 
Genesis42:28 tab us ne apane bhaiyon se kaha, mera roopaya to faer diya gaya haai, dekho, vah mere bore men haai tab unake jee men jee n raha, aur ve aek doosare kee aur bhy se takane lage, aur bole, parameshvar ne yah ham se kya kiya haai?" 
Genesis42:29 aur ve kanan desh men apane pita yakoob ke pas aa, aur apana sara vrattant us se is prakar varnn kiya:" 
Genesis42:30 ki jo puroosh us desh ka svamee haai, us ne ham se kattorata ke sath baten kee, aur ham ko desh ke bheadiae kaha." 
Genesis42:31 tab ham ne us se kaha, ham seedho log haai, bhediae naheen." 
Genesis42:32 ham barah bhai aek hee pita ke putra haai, aek to jata raha, parantu chhotta is samay kanan desh men hamare pita ke pas haai." 
Genesis42:33 tab us puroosh ne, jo us desh ka svamee haai, ham se kaha, is se maloom ho jaaega ki tum seedho manushy ho tum apane men se aek ko mere pas chhodke apane gharavalon kee bookh bujhane ke liye kuchh le jao." 
Genesis42:34 aur apane chhotte bhai ko mere pas le ao. tab mujhe vishvas ho jaaega ki tum bhediae nahee, seedho log ho. fir maain tumhare bhai ko tumhen saunp doonga, aur tum is desh men len den kar sakoge." 
Genesis42:35 yah kahakar ve apane apane bore se ann nikalane lage, tab, kya dekha, ki aek aek jan ke roopaye kee thailee usee ke bore men rakhee haai: tab roopaye kee thaialiyon ko dekhkar ve aur unaka pita bahut dr gaae." 
Genesis42:36 tab unake pita yakoob ne un se kaha, mujh ko tum ne nirvansh kar diya, dekho, yoosufa naheen raha, aur shaimon bhee naheen aya, aur ab tum binyameen ko bhee le jana chahate ho: ye sab vipaatiayan mere upar a padee haain." 
Genesis42:37 rooben ne apane pita se kaha, yadi maain usako tere pas n lau, to mere donon putraen ko mar dalana too usako mere hath men saunp de, maain use tere pas fir pahuncha doonga." 
Genesis42:38 us ne kaha, mera putra tumhare sang n jaega kyonki usaka bhai mar gaya haai, aur vah ab akela rah gaya: isaliye jis marga se tum jaoge, us men yaadi us par koi vipaati a pade, tab to tumhare karan maain is buddhape kee avastha men shaek ke sath adhaelok men utar jaunga.." 
Genesis43:1 aur akal desh men aur bhee bhyankar hota gaya. 
Genesis43:2 jab vah ann jo ve misr se le aae the samapt ho gaya tab unake pita ne un se kaha, fir jakar hamare liye thodee see bhojanavastu mol le ao." 
Genesis43:3 tab yahooda ne us se kaha, us puroosh ne ham ko chitavanee dekar kaha, ki yadi tumhara bhai tumhare sang n aa, to tum mere sammukh n ane paoge." 
Genesis43:4 isaliye yaadi too hamare bhai ko hamare sang bheje, tab to ham jakar tere liye bhojanavastu mol le aaenge" 
Genesis43:5 parantu yadi too usako n bheje, to ham n jaaenge: kyonki us puroosh ne ham se kaha, ki yadi tumhara bhai tumhare sang n ho, to tum mere sammukh n ane paoge." 
Genesis43:6 tab israael ne kaha, tum ne us puroosh ko yah batakar ki hamara aek aur bhai haai, kyon mujh se bura bartav kiya?" 
Genesis43:7 unhon ne kaha, jab us puroosh ne hamaree aur hamare kuttuambaiyon kee dasha ko is reeti poochha, ki kya tumhara pita ab tak jeeavit haai? kya tumhare koi aur bhai bhee haai? tab ham ne in prashnon ke anusar us se varnn kiya fir ham kya janate the ki vah kahega, ki apane bhai ko yahan le ao." 
Genesis43:8 fir yahooda ne apane pita israael se kaha, us ladke ko mere sang bhej de, ki ham chale jaaen is se ham, aur to, aur hamare balabachche marane n paaenge, varan jeevit rahenge." 
Genesis43:9 maain usaka jamin hota hoon mere hee hath se too usako faer lena: yaadi maain usako tere pas pahunchakar samhane n khdakar doo, tab to maain sada ke liye tera aparadhaee ttharoonga." 
Genesis43:10 yaadi ham log vilamb n karate, to ab tab doosaree bar lautt ate." 
Genesis43:11 tab unake pita israael ne un se kaha, yaadi sachamuch aeesee hee bat haai, to yah karo is desh kee uttm uttm vastuon men se kuchh kuchh apane boron men us puroosh ke liye bhentt le jao: jaaise thoda sa balasan, aur thoda sa madha, aur kuchh sugandha dravy, aur gandharas, piste, aur badama." 
Genesis43:12 fir apane apane sath doona roopaya le jao aur jo roopaya tumhare boron ke munh par rakhkar faer diya gaya tha, usako bhee lete jao kadaachita yah bool se hua ho." 
Genesis43:13 aur apane bhai ko bhee sang lekar us puroosh ke pas fir jao," 
Genesis43:14 aur sarvashaaktaiman ishvar us puroosh ko tum par dayalu karega, jis se ki vah tumhare doosare bhai ko aur binyameen ko bhee ane de: aur yaadi maain nirvansh hua to hone do." 
Genesis43:15 tab un manushyon ne vah bhent, aur doona roopaya, aur binyameen ko bhee sang liya, aur chal diae aur misr men pahunchakar yoosufa ke samhane khde huae." 
Genesis43:16 unake sath binyameen ko dekhkar yoosufa ne apane ghar ke aadhaikaree se kaha, un manushyon ko ghar men pahuncha do, aur pashu marake bhojan taaiyar karo kyonki ve log dopahar ko mere sang bhojan karenge." 
Genesis43:17 tab vah aadhaikaree puroosh yoosufa ke kahane ke anusar un purooshaen ko yoosufa ke ghar men le gaya. 
Genesis43:18 jab ve yoosufa ke ghar ko pahunchaae gaae tab ve apas men drakar kahane lage, ki jo roopaya pahilee bar hamare boron men faer diya gaya tha, usee ke karan ham bheetar pahunchaae gaae haain jis se ki vah puroosh ham par toott pade, aur hamen vansh men karake apane das banaa, aur hamare gadahon ko bhee chheen le." 
Genesis43:19 tab ve yoosufa ke ghar ke aadhaikaree ke nikatt jakar ghar ke dar par is prakar kahane lage," 
Genesis43:20 ki he hamare prabhu, jab ham paahilee bar ann mol lene ko aae the," 
Genesis43:21 tab ham ne saray men pahunchakar apane boron ko khola, to kya dekha, ki aek aek jan ka poora poora roopaya usake bore ke munh men rakha haai isaaliye ham usako apane sath fir lete aae haain." 
Genesis43:22 aur doosara roopaya bhee bhojanavastu mol lene ke liye laae haain ham naheen janate ki hamara roopaya hamare boron men kis ne rakh diya tha. 
Genesis43:23 us ne kaha, tumhara kushal ho, mat dro: tumhara parameshvar, jo tumhare pita ka bhee parameshvar haai, usee ne tum ko tumhare boron men dhan diya hoga, tumhara roopaya to mujh ko mil gaya tha: fir us ne shaimon ko nikalakar unake sang kar diya." 
Genesis43:24 tab us jan ne un manushyon ko yoosufa ke ghar men le jakar jal diya, tab unhon ne apane panvon ko dhaeya fir us ne unake gadahon ke liye chara diya." 
Genesis43:25 tab yah sunakar, ki aj ham ko yaheen bhojan karana hoga, unhon ne yoosufa ke ane ke samay tak, arthata dopahar tak, us bhentt ko ikattha kar rakha." 
Genesis43:26 jab yoosufa ghar aya tab ve us bhentt ko, jo unake hath men thee, usake sammukh ghar men le gaa, aur boomi par girakar usako dandvata kiya." 
Genesis43:27 us ne unaka kushal poochha, aur kaha, kya tumhara booddha pita, jisakee tum ne charcha kee thee, kushal se haai? kya vah ab tak jeevit haai?" 
Genesis43:28 unhon ne kaha, han tera das hamara pita kushal se haai aur ab tak jeevit haai tab unhon ne sir jhukakar fir dandvata kiya." 
Genesis43:29 tab us ne ankhe uttakar aur apane sage bhai binyameen ko dekhkar poochha, kya tumhara vah chhotta bhai, jisakee charcha tum ne mujh se kee thee, yahee haai? fir us ne kaha, he mere putra, parameshvar tujh par anugrah kare." 
Genesis43:30 tab apane bhai ke sneh se man bhr ane ke karan aur yah sochakar, ki maain kahan jakar rou, yoosufa faurtee se apanee kottree men gaya, aur vahan ro pada." 
Genesis43:31 fir apana munh dhaekar nikal aya, aur apane ko shaant kar kaha, bhojan paroso." 
Genesis43:32 tab unhon ne usake liye to alag, aur bhaiyon ke liye bhee alag, aur jo misree usake sang khate the, unake liye bhee alag, bhojan parosa isaaliye ki misree iabiryon ke sath bhojan naheen kar sakate, varan misree aeesa karana gharana samajhte the." 
Genesis43:33 so yoosufa ke bhai usake samhane, bade bade paahile, aur chhotte chhotte peechhe, apanee apanee avastha ke anusar, kram se baaittaae gaae: yah dekh ve vismaita hokar aek doosare kee or dekhne lage." 
Genesis43:34 tab yoosufa apane samhane se bhojana-vastuen utta uttake unake pas bhejane laga, aur binyameen ko apane bhaiyon se pachagunee adhaik bhojanavastu milee. aur unhon ne usake sang manamana khaya piya." 
Genesis44:1 tab us ne apane ghar ke aadhaikaree ko agyaa dee, ki in manushyon ke boron men jitanee bhojanavastu sama sake utanee bhr de, aur aek aek jan ke roopaye ko usake bore ke munh par rakh de." 
Genesis44:2 aur mera chandee ka kattora chhotte ke bore ke munh par usake ann ke roopaye ke sath rakh de. yoosufa kee is agyaa ke anusar us ne kiya. 
Genesis44:3 bihan ko bhor hote hee ve manushy apane gadahon samet vida kiae gaae. 
Genesis44:4 ve nagar se nikale hee the, aur door n jane paae the, ki yoosufa ne apane ghar ke adhaikaree se kaha, un manushyon ka peechha kar, aur unako pakar un se kah, ki tum ne bhlai kee santee burai kyon kee haai?" 
Genesis44:5 kya yah vah vastu naheen jis men mera svamee peeta haai, aur jis se vah shakun bhee vichara karata haai? tum ne yah jo kiya haai so bura kiya." 
Genesis44:6 tab us ne unhen ja liya, aur aeesee hee baten un se kaheen." 
Genesis44:7 unhon ne us se kaha, he hamare prabhu, too aeesee baten kyon kahata haai? aeesa kam karana tere dason se door rahe." 
Genesis44:8 dekh jo roopaya hamare boron ke munh par nikala tha, jab ham ne usako kanan desh se le akar tujhe faer diya, tab, bhla, tere svamee ke ghar men se ham koi chandee va sone kee vastu kyonkar chura sakate haain?" 
Genesis44:9 tere dason men se jis kisee ke pas vah nikale, vah mar dala jaa, aur ham bhee apane us prabhu ke das jo jaaen." 
Genesis44:10 us ne kaha tumhara hee kahana sahee, jisake pas vah nikale so mera das hoga aur tum log niraparadha ttharoge." 
Genesis44:11 is par ve faurtee se apane apane bore ko utar boomi par rakhkar unhen kholane lage. 
Genesis44:12 tab vah ddoonddhne laga, aur bade ke bore se lekar chhotte ke bore tak khoj kee: aur kattora binyameen ke bore men mila." 
Genesis44:13 tab unhon ne apane apane vasr faade, aur apana apana gadaha ladakar nagar ko lautt gaae." 
Genesis44:14 jab yahooda aur usake bhai yoosufa ke ghar par pahunche, aur yoosufa vaheen tha, tab ve usake samhane boomi par gire." 
Genesis44:15 yoosufa ne un se kaha, tum logon ne yah kaaisa kam kiya haai? kya tum n janate the, ki mujh sa manushy shakun vichar sakata haai?" 
Genesis44:16 yahooda ne kaha, ham log apane prabhu se kya kahen? ham kya kahakar apane ko nirdoshaee ttharaaen? parameshvar ne tere dason ke adharma ko pakad liya haai: ham, aur jisake pas kattora nikala vah bhee, ham sab ke sab apane prabhu ke das hee haain." 
Genesis44:17 us ne kaha, aeesa karana mujh se door rahe: jis jan ke pas kattora nikala haai, vahee mera das hoga aur tum log apane pita ke pas kushal kshom se chale jao." 
Genesis44:18 tab yahooda usake pas jakar kahane laga, he mere prabhu, tere das ko apane prabhu se aek bat kahane kee agyaa ho, aur tera kop tere das par n bhdke too to firaun ke tuly haai." 
Genesis44:19 mere prabhu ne apane dason se poochha tha, ki kya tumhare pita va bhai haain?" 
Genesis44:20 aur ham ne apane prabhu se kaha, ha, hamara booddha pita to haai, aur usake buddhape ka aek chhotta sa balak bhee haai, parantu usaka bhai mar gaya haai, isaaliye vah ab apanee mata ka akela hee rah gaya haai, aur usaka pita us se sneh rakhta haai." 
Genesis44:21 tab too ne apane dason se kaha tha, ki usako mere pas le ao, jis se maain usako dekoon." 
Genesis44:22 tab ham ne apane prabhu se kaha tha, ki vah ladka apane pita ko naheen chhod sakata naheen to usaka pita mar jaaega." 
Genesis44:23 aur too ne apane dason se kaha, yaadi tumhara chhotta bhai tumhare sang n aa, to tum mere sammukh fir n ane paoge." 
Genesis44:24 so jab ham apane pita tere das ke pas gaa, tab ham ne us se apane prabhu kee baten kaheen." 
Genesis44:25 tab hamare pita ne kaha, fir jakar hamare liye thodee see bhojanavastu mol le ao." 
Genesis44:26 ham ne kaha, ham naheen ja sakate, ha, yadi hamara chhotta bhai hamare sang rahe, tab ham jaaenge: kyonaki yadi hamara chhotta bhai hamare sang n rahe, to us puroosh ke sammukh n jane paaenge." 
Genesis44:27 tab tere das mere pita ne ham se kaha, tum to janate ho ki meree sree se do putra utpann huae." 
Genesis44:28 aur un men se aek to mujhe chhod hee gaya, aur maain ne nishchay kar liya, ki vah faad dala gaya hoga aur tab se maain usaka munh n dekh paya" 
Genesis44:29 so yaadi tum isako bhee meree ankh kee ad men le jao, aur koi vipaati is par pade, to tumhare karan maain is pakke bal kee avastha men du:kh ke sath adhaelok men utar jaunga." 
Genesis44:30 so jab maain apane pita tere das ke pas pahunchoo, aur yah ladka sang n rahe, tab, usaka praan jo isee par attka rahata haai," 
Genesis44:31 is kara, yah dekhke ki ladka naheen haai, vah turant hee mar jaaega. tab tere dason ke karan tera das hamara pita, jo pakke balon kee avastha ka haai, shaek ke sath adhaelok men utar jaaega." 
Genesis44:32 fir tera das apane pita ke yahan yah kahake is ladke ka jaamin hua haai, ki yadi maain isako tere pas n pahuncha doo, tab to maain sada ke liye tera aparadhaee ttharoonga." 
Genesis44:33 so ab tera das is ladke kee santee apane prabhu ka das hokar rahane kee agyaa paa, aur yah ladka apane bhaiyon ke sang jane diya jaae." 
Genesis44:34 kyonaki ladke ke bina sang rahe maain kayonkar apane pita ke pas ja sakoonga aeesa n ho ki mere pita par jo du:kh padega vah mujhe dekhna pade.. 
Genesis45:1 tab yoosufa un sab ke samhane, jo usake as pas khde the, apane ko aur rok n saka aur pukar ke kaha, mere as pas se sab logon ko bahar kar do. bhaiyon ke samhane apane ko pragatt karane ke samay yoosufa ke sang aur koi n raha." 
Genesis45:2 tab vah chilla chillakar rone laga: aur misriyon ne suna, aur firaun ke ghar ke logon ko bhee isaka samachar mila." 
Genesis45:3 tab yoosufa apane bhaiyon se kahane laga, maain yoosufa hoo, kya mera pita ab tab jeeavit haai? isaka uttr usake bhai n de sake kyonaki ve usake samhane ghabara gaae the." 
Genesis45:4 fir yoosufa ne apane bhaiyon se kaha, mere nikatt ao. yah sunakar ve nikatt gaae. fir us ne kaha, maain tumhara bhai yoosufa hoo, jisako tum ne misr aneharon ke hath bech dala tha." 
Genesis45:5 ab tum log mat pachhtao, aur tum ne jo mujhe yahan bech dala, is se udas mat ho kyonki parameshvar ne tumhare praanon ko bachane ke liye mujhe age se bhej diya haai." 
Genesis45:6 kyonaki ab do varsha se is desh men akal haai aur ab panch varsha aur aeese hee honge, ki un men n to hal chalega aur n ann katta jaaega." 
Genesis45:7 so parameshvar ne mujhe tumhare age isee liye bheja, ki tum prathvee par jeevit raho, aur tumhare praanon ke bachane se tumhara vansh baddhe." 
Genesis45:8 is reeati ab mujh ko yahan par bhejanevale tum nahee, parameshvar hee tthara: aur usee ne mujhe firaun ka pita sa, aur usake sare ghar ka svamee, aur sare misr desh ka prabhu tthara diya haai." 
Genesis45:9 so shaeegha mere pita ke pas jakar kaho, tera putra yoosufa is prakar kahata haai, ki parameshvar ne mujhe sare misr ka svamee ttharaya haai isaaliye too mere pas bina vilamb kiae chala a." 
Genesis45:10 aur tera nivas goshon desh men hoga, aur to, bette, poto, bhed-bakaariyo, gaya-baailo, aur apane sab kuchh samet mere nikatt rahega." 
Genesis45:11 aur akal ke jo panch varsha aur honge, un men maai vaheen tera palan poshan karoonga aeesa n ho ki to, aur tera gharana, varan jitane tere haai, so bookhon maren." 
Genesis45:12 aur tum apanee ankhon se dekhte ho, aur mera bhai binyameen bhee apanee ankhon se dekhta haai, ki jo ham se baten kar raha haai so yoosufa haai." 
Genesis45:13 aur tum mere sab vibhv ka, jo misr men haai aur jo kuchh tum ne dekha haai, us sab ko mere pita se varnn karana aur turant mere pita ko yahan le ana." 
Genesis45:14 aur vah apane bhai binyameen ke gale se lipattkar roya aur binyameen bhee usake gale se lipattkar roya. 
Genesis45:15 tab vah apane sab bhaiyon ko choomakar un se milakar roya: aur isake pashchata usake bhai us se baten karane lage.. 
Genesis45:16 is bat kee charcha, ki yoosufa ke bhai aae haai, firaun ke bhvan tab panhuch gai, aur is se firaun aur usake karmacharee prasann hue." 
Genesis45:17 so firaun ne yoosufa se kaha, apane bhaiyon se kah, ki aek kam karo, apane pashuuon ko ladakar kanan desh men chale jao." 
Genesis45:18 aur apane pita aur apane apane ghar ke logon ko lekar mere pas ao aur misr desh men jo kuchh achchhe se achchha haai vah maain tumhen doonga, aur tumhen desh ke uttm se uttm padarth khane ko milenge." 
Genesis45:19 aur tujhe agyaa milee haai, tum aek kam karo, ki misr desh se apane balabachchon aur striayon ke liye gaadiyon le jao, aur apane pita ko le ao." 
Genesis45:20 aur apanee samagraee ka moh n karana kyonki sare misr desh men jo kuchh achchhe se achchha haai so tumhara haai. 
Genesis45:21 aur israael ke putraen ne vaaisa hee kiya. aur yoosufa ne firaun kee manake unhen gaadiyon dee, aur marga ke liye seedha bhee diya." 
Genesis45:22 un men se ek ek jan ko to us ne ek ek joda vasr bhee diya aur binyameen ko teen sau roope ke ttukade aur panch jode vasr die. 
Genesis45:23 aur apane pita ke pas us ne jo bheja vah yah haai, arthata misr kee achchhee vastuon se lade huae das gadahe, aur ann aur rottee aur usake pita ke marga ke liye bhojanavastu se ladee hui das gadaahiyan." 
Genesis45:24 aur us ne apane bhaiyon ko vida kiya, aur ve chal diae aur us ne un se kaha, marga men kaheen jhgada n karana." 
Genesis45:25 misr se chalakar ve kanan desh men apane pita yakoob ke pas pahuche. 
Genesis45:26 aur us se yah varnn kiya, ki yoosufa ab tak jeevit haai, aur sare misr desh par prabhuta vahee karata haai. par us ne unakee prateeti n kee, aur vah apane ape men n raha." 
Genesis45:27 tab unhon ne apane pita yakoob se yoosufa kee saree bate, jo us ne un se kaheen thee, kah deen jab us ne un gadiyon ko dekha, jo yoosufa ne usake le ane ke liye bhejeen thee, tab usaka chitt sthiar ho gaya." 
Genesis45:28 aur israael ne kaha, bas, mera putra yoosufa ab tak jeevit haai: maain apanee mratyu se pahile jakar usako dekhooga.." 
Genesis46:1 tab israael apana sab kuchh lekar kooch karake bershoba ko gaya, aur vahan apane pita isahak ke parameshvar ko baalidan chaddhaae." 
Genesis46:2 tab parameshvar ne israael se rat ko darshan men kaha, he yakoob he yakooba. us ne kaha, kya agyaa." 
Genesis46:3 us ne kaha, maain ishvar tere pita ka parameshvar hoo, too misr men jane se mat dra kyonki maain tujh se vahan ek badee jati banaunga." 
Genesis46:4 maain tere sang sang misr ko chalata hoon aur maain tujhe vahan se fir nishchay le aunga aur yoosufa apana hath teree ankhon par lagaaega. 
Genesis46:5 tab yakoob beshorba se chala: aur israael ke putra apane pita yakoob, aur apane bala-bachcho, aur striayon ko un gadiyon par, jo firaun ne unake le ane ko bhejee thee, chaddhakar chal pade." 
Genesis46:6 aur ve apanee bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, aur kanan desh men apane ikattha kiae huae sare dhan ko lekar misr men aae." 
Genesis46:7 aur yakoob apane bette-bettyaie, pote-potiyo, nidan apane vansh bhr ko apane sang misr men le aya.." 
Genesis46:8 yakoob ke sath jo israaelee, arthata usake bette, pote, aadi misr men aa, unake nam ye haain: yakoob ka jetta to rooben tha." 
Genesis46:9 aur rooben ke putra, hanok, palalo, hesron, aur kamrmee the." 
Genesis46:10 aur shaimon ke putra, yamooael, yameen, ohad, yakeen, sohar, aur aek kananee sree se janma hua shaaul bhee tha." 
Genesis46:11 aur levee ke putra, gesharen, kahat, aur mararee the." 
Genesis46:12 aur yahooda ke aer, onan, shola, peres, aur jerah nam putra huae to the par aer aur onan kanan desh men mar gaae the." 
Genesis46:13 aur issakar ke putra, tola, pubba, yob aur shaimraen the." 
Genesis46:14 aur jabooloon ke putra, sered, aelon, aur yahalel the." 
Genesis46:15 lia: ke putra, jo yakoob se panaram men utpann huae the, unake bette pote ye hee the, aur in se adhaik us ne usake sath aek bettee deena ko bhee janm diya: yahan tak to yakoob ke sab vanshavale taaintees praanee hue." 
Genesis46:16 fir gad ke putra, siyyon, haggee, shoonee, aesabon, aeree, arodee, aur arelee the." 
Genesis46:17 aur ashor ke putra, yimna, yishva, yisre, aur bareea the, aur unakee bahin serah thee. aur bareea ke putra, heber aur malkeeael the." 
Genesis46:18 jilpa, jise laban ne apanee bettee lian ko diya tha, usake bette pote aadi ye hee the so usake dara yakoob ke solah praanee utpann huae.." 
Genesis46:19 fir yakoob kee patnee rahel ke putra yoosufa aur binyameen the. 
Genesis46:20 aur misr desh men on ke yajak poteepera kee bettee asanat se yoosufa ke ye putra utpann hua, arthata manashsho aur aepraaima." 
Genesis46:21 aur binyameen ke putra, bela, beker, ashbel, gera, naman, aehee, rosha, muppeem, huppeem, aur arda the." 
Genesis46:22 rahel ke putra jo yakoob se utpann huae unake ye hee putra the usake ye sab bette pote chaudah praanee huae. 
Genesis46:23 fir dan ka putra hushaeem tha. 
Genesis46:24 aur naptalee ke putra, yahasel, goonee, seser, aur shaillem the." 
Genesis46:25 bilha, jise laban ne apanee bettee rahel ko diya, us ke bette pote ye hee haain usake dara yakoob ke vansh men sat praanee hue." 
Genesis46:26 yakoob ke nij vansh ke jo praanee misr men aa, ve usakee bahuon ko chhod sab milakar chhyaiasatt praanee hue." 
Genesis46:27 aur yoosufa ke putra, jo misr men us se utpann hua, ve do praanee the: is prakar yakoob ke gharane ke jo praanee misr men aae so sab milakar sattr huae.." 
Genesis46:28 fir us ne yahooda ko apane age yoosufa ke pas bhej diya, ki vah usako goshon ka marga dikhaae aur ve goshon desh men aae." 
Genesis46:29 tab yoosufa apana rath jutavakar apane pita israael se bhentt karane ke liye goshon desh ko gaya, aur us se bhentt karake usake gale se lipatta hua rota raha." 
Genesis46:30 tab israael ne yoosufa se kaha, maai ab marane se bhee prasann hoo, kyonki tujhe jeeavit paya aur tera munh dekh liya." 
Genesis46:31 tab yoosufa ne apane bhaiyon se aur apane pita ke gharane se kaha, maain jakar firaun ko yah samachar doonga, ki mere bhai aur mere pita ke sare gharane ke log, jo kanan desh men rahate the, ve mere pas a gaae haain." 
Genesis46:32 aur ve log charavahe haai, kyonki ve pashuuon ko palate aae haain isaliye ve apanee bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, aur jo kuchh unaka haai, sab le aae haain." 
Genesis46:33 jab firaun tum ko bulake poochhe, ki tumhara udhym kya haai?" 
Genesis46:34 tab yah kahana ki tere das ladkapan se lekar aj tak pashuuon ko palate aae haai, varan hamare purakha bhee aeesa hee karate the. is se tum goshon desh men rahane paoge kyonki sab charavahon se misree log gharana karate haain.." 
Genesis47:1 tab yoosufa ne firaun ke pas jakar yah samachar diya, ki mera pita aur mere bhai, aur unakee bhed-bakaariya, gaya-baail aur jo kuchh unaka haai, sab kanan desh se a gaya haai aur abhee to ve goshon desh men haain." 
Genesis47:2 fir us ne apane bhaiyon men se panch jan lekar firaun ke samhane khde kar diae. 
Genesis47:3 firaun ne usake bhaiyon se poochha, tumhara udhym kya haai? unhon ne firaun se kaha, tere das charavahe haai, aur hamare purakha bhee aeese hee rahe." 
Genesis47:4 fir unhon ne firaun se kaha, ham is desh men paradeshaee kee bhanati rahane ke liye aae haain kyonaki kanan desh men bharee akal hone ke karan tere dason ko bhed-bakaariyon ke liye chara n raha: so apane dason ko goshon desh men rahane kee agyaa de." 
Genesis47:5 tab firaun ne yoosufa se kaha, tera pita aur tere bhai tere pas a gaae haai," 
Genesis47:6 aur misr desh tere samhane pada haai is desh ka jo sab se achchha bhag ho, us men apane pita aur bhaiyon ko basa de arthata ve goshon hee desh men rahen: aur yadi too janata ho, ki un men se parishramee puroosh haai, to unhen mere pashuuon ke adhaikaree tthara de." 
Genesis47:7 tab yoosufa ne apane pita yakoob ko le akar firaun ke sammukh khda kiya: aur yakoob ne firaun ko ashaeervad diya. 
Genesis47:8 tab firaun ne yakoob se poochha, teree avastha kitane din kee hui haai?" 
Genesis47:9 yakoob ne firaun se kaha, maain to aek sau tees varsha paradeshaee hokar apana jeevan beeta chuka hoon mere jeevan ke din thode aur du:kh se bhre huae bhee the, aur mere bapadade paradeshaee hokar jitane din tak jeevit rahe utane din ka maain abhee naheen hua." 
Genesis47:10 aur yakoob firaun ko ashaeervad dekar usake sammukh se chala gaya. 
Genesis47:11 tab yoosufa ne apane pita aur bhaiyon ko basa diya, aur firaun kee agyaa ke anusar misr desh ke achchhe se achchhe bhag me, arthata ramases nam desh me, boomi dekar unako saunp diya." 
Genesis47:12 aur yoosufa apane pita ka, aur apane bhaiyon ka, aur pita ke sare gharane ka, aek aek ke balabachchon ke gharane kee ginatee ke anusar, bhojan dila dilakar unaka palan poshan karane laga.." 
Genesis47:13 aur us sare desh men khane ko kuchh n raha kyonki akal bahut bharee tha, aur akal ke karan misr aur kanan donon desh nash ho gaae." 
Genesis47:14 aur jitana roopaya misr aur kanan desh men tha, sab ko yoosufa ne us ann kee santee jo unake nivasee mol lete the ikattha karake firaun ke bhvan men pahuncha diya." 
Genesis47:15 jab misr aur kanan desh ka roopaya chuk gaya, tab sab misree yoosufa ke pas a akar kahane lage, ham ko bhojanavastu de, kya ham roopaye ke n rahane se tere rahate huae mar jaaen?" 
Genesis47:16 yoosufa ne kaha, yadi roopaye n hon to apane pashu de do, aur maain unakee santee tumhen khane ko doonga." 
Genesis47:17 tab ve apane pashu yoosufa ke pas le aae aur yoosufa unako ghaedo, bhed-bakaariyo, gaya-baailon aur gadahon kee santee khane ko dene laga: us varsha men vah sab jaati ke pashuuon kee santee bhojan dekar unaka palan poshan karata raha." 
Genesis47:18 vah varsha to yon katt gaya tab agale varsha men unhon ne usake pas akar kaha, ham apane prabhu se yah bat chhpai n rakhenge ki hamara roopaya chuk gaya haai, aur hamare sab prakar ke pashu hamare prabhu ke pas a chuke haain isaaliye ab hamare prabhu ke samhane hamare shareer aur boomi chhodkar aur kuchh naheen raha." 
Genesis47:19 ham tere dekhte kyon mare, aur hamaree boomi ko bhojan vastu kee santee mol le, ki ham apanee boomi samet firaun ke das hon: aur hamako beej de, ki ham marane n paae, varan jeeavit rahe, aur boomi n ujade." 
Genesis47:20 tab yoosufa ne misr kee saree boomi ko firaun ke liye mol liya kyonaki us kattnai akal ke padne se misriyon ko apana apana khet bech dalana pada: is prakar saree boomi firaun kee ho gai. 
Genesis47:21 aur aek chhor se lekar doosare chhor tak sare misr desh men jo praja rahatee thee, usako us ne nagaron men lakar basa diya." 
Genesis47:22 par yajakon kee boomi to us ne n mol lee: kyonki yajakon ke liye firaun kee or se nity bhojan ka bandobast tha, aur nity jo bhojan firaun unako deta tha vahee ve khate the is karan unako apanee boomi bechanee n padee." 
Genesis47:23 tab yoosufa ne praja ke logon se kaha, suno, maain ne aj ke din tum ko aur tumharee boomi ko bhee firaun ke liye mol liya haai dekho, tumhare liye yahan beej haai, ise boomi men boo." 
Genesis47:24 aur jo kuchh upaje usaka panchamansh firaun ko dena, bakee char ansh tumhare rahenge, ki tum use apane kheton mane boo, aur apane apane balabachchon aur ghar ke aur logon samet khaya karo." 
Genesis47:25 unhon ne kaha, too ne hamako bacha liya haai: hamare prabhu ke anugrah kee draashtti ham par banee rahe, aur ham firaun ke das hokar rahenge." 
Genesis47:26 so yoosufa ne misr kee boomi ke vishay men aeesa niyam ttharaya, jo aj ke din tak chala ata haai, ki panchamansh firaun ko mila kare keval yajakon hee kee boomi firaun kee naheen hui." 
Genesis47:27 aur israaelee misr ke goshon desh men rahane lage aur vahan kee boomi ko apane vash men kar liya, aur foole-fale, aur atyant baddh gaae.." 
Genesis47:28 misr desh men yakoob satarah varsha jeevit raha: is prakar yakoob kee saree ayu aek sau saaintalees varsha kee hui. 
Genesis47:29 jab israael ke marane ka din nikatt a gaya, tab us ne apane putra yoosufa ko bulavakar kaha, yaadi tera anugrah mujh par ho, to apana hath meree jangha ke tale rakhkar shapath kha, ki maain tere sath krapa aur sachchai ka yah kam karoonga, ki tujhe misr men mittee n doonga." 
Genesis47:30 jab too apane bapadadon ke sang so jaaega, tab maain tujhe misr se utta le jakar unheen ke kabaaristan men rakoonga tab yoosufa ne kaha, maain tere vachan ke anusar karoonga." 
Genesis47:31 fir us ne kaha, mujh se shapath kha: so us ne us se shapath khai. tab israael ne khatt ke sirahane kee or sir jhukaya.." 
Genesis48:1 in baton ke pashchata kisee ne yoosufa se kaha, sun, tera pita beemar haai tab vah manashsho aur aepraaim nam apane donon putraen ko sang lekar usake pas chala." 
Genesis48:2 aur kisee ne yakoob ko bata diya, ki tera putra yoosufa tere pas a raha haai tab israael apane ko sambhalakar khatt par baaitt gaya." 
Genesis48:3 aur yakoob ne yoosufa se kaha, sarvashaktaiman ishvar ne kanan desh ke looj nagar ke pas mujhe darshan dekar ashaeesh dee," 
Genesis48:4 aur kaha, sun, maain tujhe faula-falakar baddhaunga, aur tujhe rajy rajy kee mandlee ka mool banaunga, aur tere pashchata tere vansh ko yah desh de doonga, jis se ki vah sada tak unakee nij boomi banee rahe." 
Genesis48:5 aur ab tere donon putra, jo misr men mere ane se pahile utpann huae haai, ve mere hee ttharenge arthata jis reeti se rooben aur shaimon mere haai, usee reeati se aepraaim aur manashsho bhee mere ttharenge." 
Genesis48:6 aur unake pashchata jo santan utpann ho, vah tere to ttharenge parantu banttvare ke samay ve apane bhaiyon hee ke vansh men gine jaaenge." 
Genesis48:7 jab maain paan se ata tha, tab aepraata pahunchane se thodee hee door pahile rahel kanan desh me, marga me, mere samhane mar gai: aur maain ne use vahee, arthata aepraata jo betaleham bhee kahalata haai, usee ke marga men mittee dee." 
Genesis48:8 tab israael ko yoosufa ke putra dekh pade, aur us ne poochha, ye kaun haain?" 
Genesis48:9 yoosufa ne apane pita se kaha, ye mere putra haai, jo parameshvar ne mujhe yahan diae haain: us ne kaha, unako mere pas le a ki maain unhen ashaeervad doon." 
Genesis48:10 israael kee ankhe buddhape ke karan dhaundhalee ho gai thee, yahan tak ki use kam soojhta tha. tab yoosufa unhen unake pas le gaya aur us ne unhen choomakar gale laga liya." 
Genesis48:11 tab israael ne yoosufa se kaha, mujhe asha n thee, ki maain tera mukh fir dekhne paunga: parantu dek, parameshvar ne mujhe tera vansh bhee dikhaya haai." 
Genesis48:12 tab yoosufa ne unhen apane ghauttnon ke beech se hattakar aur apane munh ke bal boomi par girake dandvata kee. 
Genesis48:13 tab yoosufa ne un donon ko lekar, arthata aepraaim ko apane dahine hath se, ki vah israael ke baaen hath pade, aur manashsho ko apane baaen hath se, ki israael ke daahine hath pade, unhen usake pas le gaya." 
Genesis48:14 tab israael ne apana dahina hath baddhakar aepraaim ke sir par jo chhotta tha, aur apana bayan hath baddhakar manashsho ke sir par rakh diya us ne to jan boojhkar aeesa kiya naheen to jetta manashsho hee tha." 
Genesis48:15 fir us ne yoosufa ko ashaeervad dekar kaha, parameshvar jisake sammukh mere bapadade ibraaheem aur isahak apane ko janakar chalate the vahee parameshvar mere janm se lekar aj ke din tak mera charavaha bana haai" 
Genesis48:16 aur vahee doot mujhe saree burai se chhudata aya haai, vahee ab in ladkon ko ashaeesh de aur ye mere aur mere bapadade ibraaheem aur isahak ke kahalaaen aur prathvee men bahutayat se baddhen." 
Genesis48:17 jab yoosufa ne dekha, ki mere pita ne apana daahina hath aepraaim ke sir par rakha haai, tab yah bat usako buree lagee: so us ne apane pita ka hath is manasa se pakad liya, ki aepraaim ke sir par se uttakar manashsho ke sir par rakh de." 
Genesis48:18 aur yoosufa ne apane pita se kaha, he pita, aeesa naheen: kyonki jetta yahee haai apana daahina hath isake sir par rakh." 
Genesis48:19 usake pita ne kaha, nahee, sun, he mere putra, maain is bat ko bhlee bhanti janata hoon: yadhyapi is se bhee manushyon kee ek mandlee utpann hogee, aur yah bhee mahana ho jaega, taubhee isaka chhotta bhai is se adhaik mahan ho jaega, aur usake vansh se bahut see jaatiyan nikalengee." 
Genesis48:20 fir us ne usee din yah kahakar unako ashaeervad diya, ki israaelee log tera nam le lekar aeesa ashaeervad diya karenge, ki parameshvar tujhe aepraaim aur manashsho ke saman bana de: aur us ne manashsho se pahile aepraaim ka nam liya." 
Genesis48:21 tab israael ne yoosufa se kaha, dek, maain to marane par hoon: parantu parameshvar tum logon ke sang rahega, aur tum ko tumhare pitaron ke desh men fir pahuncha dega." 
Genesis48:22 aur maain tujh ko tere bhaiyon se aadhaik boomi ka aek bhag deta hoo, jisako maain ne aemoriyon ke hath se apanee talavar aur dhanush ke bal se le liya haai." 
Genesis49:1 fir yakoob ne apane putraen ko yah kahakar bulaya, ki ikatthe ho jao, maain tum ko bataunga, ki ant ke dinon men tum par kya kya beetega." 
Genesis49:2 he yakoob ke putrae, ikatthe hokar suno, apane pita israael kee or kan lagao." 
Genesis49:3 he rooben, too mera jetta, mera bal, aur mere pauroosh ka paahila fal haai praatishtta ka uttm bhag, aur shaktai ka bhee uttm bhag too hee haai." 
Genesis49:4 too jo jal kee nain ubalanevala haai, isaliye auron se shraeshtt n ttharega kyonki too apane pita kee khatt par chaddha, tab too ne usako ashuuddh kiya vaha mere bichhaune par chaddh gaya.." 
Genesis49:5 shaimon aur levee to bhai bhai haai, unakee talavaren upadrav ke hathaiyara haain." 
Genesis49:6 he mere jeev, unake marma men n pad, he meree mahima, unakee sabha men mat mila kyonki unhon ne kop se manushyon ko ghaat kiya, aur apanee hee ichchha par chalakara baailon kee poonchhen kattee haain.." 
Genesis49:7 dhaikkar unake kop ko, jo prachand tha aur unake rosh ko, jo nirday tha maain unhen yakoob men alag alag aur israael men tittr bittr kar doonga.." 
Genesis49:8 he yahooda, tere bhai tera dhanyavada karenge, tera hath tere shatrauon kee gardan par padega tere pita ke putra tujhe dandvata karenge.." 
Genesis49:9 yahooda sinh ka danvaroo haai. he mere putra, too aher karake gufaa men gaya haai: vah sinh va sinhanee kee nai dabakara baaitt gaya afir kaun usako chhedega.." 
Genesis49:10 jab tak shaeelo n aae tab tak n to yahooda se rajadand choottega, n usake vansh se vyavastha denevala alag hoga aur rajy rajy ke log usake adhaeen ho jaaenge.." 
Genesis49:11 vah apane javan gadahe ko dakhlata me, aur apanee gadahee ke bachche ko uttm jaati kee dakhlata men bandha karega us ne apane vasr dakhmadha me, aur apana paahirava dakhon ke ras men dhaeya haai.." 
Genesis49:12 usakee ankhe dakhmadha se chamakeelee aur usake dant doodha se shvet honge.. 
Genesis49:13 jabooloon samudr ke teer par nivas karega, vah jahajon ke liye bandaragah ka kam dega, aur usaka parala bhag seedon ke anikatt pahunchega" 
Genesis49:14 issakar aek bada aur balavanta gadaha haai, jo pashuuon ke badon ke beech men dabaka rahata haai.." 
Genesis49:15 us ne ek vishraamasthan dekhkar, aki achchha haai, aur ek desha, ki manohar haai, apane kandho ko bojh uttane ke liye jhukaya, aur begaree men das ka sa kama karane laga.." 
Genesis49:16 dan israael ka aek gotra hokara apane jaatibhaiyon ka nyaya karega.. 
Genesis49:17 dan marga men ka aek sanp, aur raste men ka aek nag hoga, jo ghaede kee nalee ko dnsata haai, ajis se usaka savar pachhad khakar gir padta haai.." 
Genesis49:18 he yahova, maain tujhee se uddhar pane kee batt johata aya hoon.." 
Genesis49:19 gad par aek dal chaddhai to karega par vah usee dal ke pichhle bhag par chhapa marega.. 
Genesis49:20 ashor se jo ann utpann hoga vaha uttm hoga, aur vah raja ke yogy svadishtt bhojan diya karega.." 
Genesis49:21 naptalee aek choottee hui haarinee haai vah sundar baten bolata haai.. 
Genesis49:22 yoosufa balavant lata kee aeka shaakha haai, vah sote ke pas lagee hui falavant lata kee aek shaakha haai usakee daliyan bheet par se chaddhkar faail jatee haain.." 
Genesis49:23 dhanudharariyon ne usako kheadit kiya, aur us par teer mare, aur usake peechhe pade haain.." 
Genesis49:24 par usaka dhanush draddh raha, aur usakee banh aur hath yakoob ke usee shaaktaiman ishvar ke hathon ke dara faurteele hua, ajisake pas se vah charavaha aaega, jo israael ka patthra bhee ttharega.." 
Genesis49:25 yah tere pita ke us ishvar ka kam haai, jo teree sahayata karega, us sarvashaaktaiman ko jo tujhe upar se akash men kee ashaeesho, aur neeche se gahire jal men kee ashaeesho, aur stano, aur garbh kee ashaeeshon dega.." 
Genesis49:26 tere pita ke ashaeervad mere pitaron ke ashaeervad se aadhaika baddh gaae haain aur sanatan pahaadiyon kee mana- chahee vastuon kee nai bane rahenge: ve yoosufa ke sir par, jo apane bhaiyon men se nyara hua, usee ke sir ke mukutt par foole falenge.." 
Genesis49:27 binyameen faadnehara hundar haai, savere to vah aher bhkshan karega, aur sanjh ko loott bantt lega.." 
Genesis49:28 israael ke barahon gotra ye hee haain: aur unake pita ne jis jis vachan se unako ashaeervad diya, so ye hee haain aek aek ko usake ashaeervad ke anusar us ne ashaeervad diya." 
Genesis49:29 tab us ne yah kahakar unako agyaa dee, ki maain apane logon ke sath milane par hoon: isaaliye mujhe hittee aepraen kee boomivalee gufaa men mere bapadadon ke sath mittee dena," 
Genesis49:30 arthata usee gufaa men jo kanan desh men mamra ke samhanevalee makapela kee boomi men haai us boomi ko to ibraaheem ne hittee aepraen ke hath se isee nimitt mol liya tha, ki vah kabaaristan ke liye usakee nij boomi ho." 
Genesis49:31 vahan ibraaheem aur usakee patnee sara ko mittee dee gai aur vaheen isahak aur usakee patnee ribaka ko bhee mittee dee gai aur vaheen maain ne lia: ko bhee mittee dee. 
Genesis49:32 vah boomi aur us men kee gufaa hitiayon ke hath se mol lee gai. 
Genesis49:33 yah agyaa jab yakoob apane putraen ko de chuka, tab apane panv khatt par samett praan chhode, aur apane logon men ja mila." 
Genesis50:1 tab yoosufa apane pita ke munh par girakar roya aur use chooma. 
Genesis50:2 aur yoosufa ne un vaaidhon ko, jo usake sevak the, agyaa dee, ki mere pita kee loth men sugandhadravy bhro tab vaaidhon ne israael kee loth men sugandhadravy bhr diae." 
Genesis50:3 aur usake chalees din poore hue. kyonki jinakee loth men sugandhadravy bhre jate haai, unako itane hee din poore lagate haain: aur misree log usake liye sattr din tak vilap karate rahe.." 
Genesis50:4 jab usake vilap ke din beet gaa, tab yoosufa firaun ke gharane ke logon se kahane laga, yaadi tumharee anugrah kee draashtti mujh par ho to meree yah binatee firaun ko sunao," 
Genesis50:5 ki mere pita ne yah kahakar, ki dekh maain marane par hoo, mujhe yah shapath khailai, ki jo kabar too ne apane liye kanan desh men khudavai haai usee men maain tujhe mittee doonga isaaliye ab mujhe vahan jakar apane pita ko mittee dene kee agyaa de, tatpashchata maain lautt aunga." 
Genesis50:6 tab firaun ne kaha, jakar apane pita kee khailai hui shapath ke anusar unako mittee de." 
Genesis50:7 so yoosufa apane pita ko mittee dene ke liye chala, aur firaun ke sab karmacharee, arthata usake bhvan ke puraniye, aur misr desh ke sab puraniye usake sang chale." 
Genesis50:8 aur yoosufa ke ghar ke sab log, aur usake bhai, aur usake pita ke ghar ke sab log bhee sang gaae par ve apane balabachcho, aur bhed-bakaariyo, aur gaya-baailon ko goshon desh men chhod gaae." 
Genesis50:9 aur usake sang rath aur savar gaa, so bheed bahut bharee ho gai." 
Genesis50:10 jab ve atad ke khlihan tak, jo yaradan nadee ke par haai pahunche, tab vahan atyant bharee vilap kiya, aur yoosufa ne apane pita ke sat din ka vilap karaya." 
Genesis50:11 atad ke khlihan men ke vilap ko dekhkar us desh ke nivasee kanaaniyon ne kaha, yah to misriyon ka koi bharee vilap hoga, isee karan us sthan ka nam abelaamisraaim pada, aur vah yaradan ke par haai." 
Genesis50:12 aur israael ke putraen ne us se vahee kam kiya jisakee us ne unako agyaa dee thee: 
Genesis50:13 arthata unhon ne usako kanan desh men le jakar makapela kee us boomivalee gufaa me, jo mamra ke samhane haai, mittee dee jisako ibraaheem ne hittee aepraen ke hath se is nimitt mol liya tha, ki vah kabaaristan ke liye usakee nij boomi ho.." 
Genesis50:14 apane pita ko mittee dekar yoosufa apane bhaiyon aur un sab samet, jo usake pita ko mittee dene ke liye usake sang gaae the, misr men lautt aya." 
Genesis50:15 jab yoosufa ke bhaiyon ne dekha ki hamara pita mar gaya haai, tab kahane lage, kadaachita yoosufa ab hamare peechhe pade, aur jitanee burai ham ne us se kee thee sab ka poora palatta ham se le." 
Genesis50:16 isaliye unhon ne yoosufa ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki tere pita ne marane se paahile hamen yah agyaa dee thee," 
Genesis50:17 ki tum log yoosufa se is prakar kahana, ki ham binatee karate haai, ki too apane bhaiyon ke aparadha aur pap ko kshama kara ham ne tujh se burai to kee thee, par ab apane pita ke parameshvar ke dason ka aparadha kshama kara. unakee ye baten sunakar yoosufa ro pada." 
Genesis50:18 aur usake bhai ap bhee jakar usake samhane gir pade, aur kaha, dek, ham tere das haain." 
Genesis50:19 yoosufa ne un se kaha, mat dro, kya maain parameshvar kee jagah par hoon?" 
Genesis50:20 yadhypi tum logon ne mere liye burai ka vichar kiya tha parantu parameshvar ne usee bat men bhlai ka vichar kiya, jis se vah aeesa kare, jaaisa aj ke din pragatt haai, ki bahut se logon ke praan bache haain." 
Genesis50:21 so ab mat dro: maain tumhara aur tumhare bala-bachchon ka palan poshan karata rahoonga is prakar us ne unako samajha bujhakar shaaantai dee.. 
Genesis50:22 aur yoosufa apane pita ke gharane samet misr men rahata raha, aur yoosufa aek sau das varsha jeevit raha." 
Genesis50:23 aur yoosufa aepraaim ke parapoton tak dekhne paya: aur manashsho ke pote, jo makeer ke putra the, ve utpann hokar yoosufa se god men liae gaae." 
Genesis50:24 aur yoosufa ne apane bhaiyon se kaha maain to marane par hoon parantu parameshvar nishchay tumharee suadhai lega, aur tumhen is desh se nikalakar us desh men pahuncha dega, jisake dene kee us ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob se shapath khai thee." 
Genesis50:25 fir yoosufa ne israaeliyon se yah kahakar, ki parameshvar nishchay tumharee suadhai lega, unako is vishay kee shapath khailai, ki ham teree haaddiyon ko vahan se us desh men le jaaenge." 
Genesis50:26 nidan yoosufa aek sau das varsha ka hokar mar gaya: aur usakee loth men sugandhadravy bhre gaa, aur vah loth misr men aek sandook men rakhee gai.." 
Exodus1:1 israael ke putraen ke nam, jo apane apane gharane ko lekar yakoob ke sath misr desh men aa, ye haain:" 
Exodus1:2 arthata rooben, shaimon, levee, yahooda," 
Exodus1:3 issakar, jabooloon, binyameen," 
Exodus1:4 dan, naptalee, gad aur ashora." 
Exodus1:5 aur yoosufa to misr men pahile hee a chuka tha. yakoob ke nij vansh men jo utpann huae ve sab sattr praanee the. 
Exodus1:6 aur yoosuf, aur usake sab bhai, aur us peeddhee ke sab log mar mitte." 
Exodus1:7 aur israael kee santan foolane falane lagee aur ve atyant samarthee banate chale gaae aur itana baddh gaae ki kul desh un se bhr gaya.. 
Exodus1:8 misr men aek naya raja gaee par baaitta jo yoosufa ko naheen janata tha. 
Exodus1:9 aur us ne apanee praja se kaha, dekho, israaelee ham se ginatee aur samathrya men aadhaik baddh gaae haain." 
Exodus1:10 isaliye ao, ham unake sath buddhmaianee se bartav kare, kaheen aeesa n ho ki jab ve bahut baddh jaae, aur yadi sangraam ka samay a pade, to hamare baaiariyon se milakar ham se laden aur is desh se nikal jaaen." 
Exodus1:11 isaliye unhon ne un par begaree karanevalon ko niyukt kiya ki ve un par bhar dal dalakar unako du:kh diya karen tab unhon ne firaun ke liye pitom aur ramases nam bhndaravale nagaron ko banaya. 
Exodus1:12 par jyon jyon ve unako du:kh dete gaae tyon tyon ve baddhte aur faailate chale gaae isaaliye ve israaeliyon se atyant dr gaae. 
Exodus1:13 taubhee misriyon ne israaeliyon se kattorata ke sath sevakai karavai. 
Exodus1:14 aur unake jeevan ko gare, intt aur khetee ke bhanti bhanati ke kam kee kattnai seva se du:khee kar dala jis kisee kam men ve un se seva karavate the us men ve kattorata ka vyavahar karate the." 
Exodus1:15 shaipra aur pooa nam do ibraee dhaaiyon ko misr ke raja ne agyaa dee," 
Exodus1:16 ki jab tum ibraee striayon ko bachcha utpann hone ke samay janmane ke patthron par baaittee dekho, tab yadi betta ho, to use mar dalana aur bettee ho, to jeeavit rahane dena." 
Exodus1:17 parantu ve dhaaiyan parameshvar ka bhy manatee thee, isaaliye misr ke raja kee agyaa n manakar ladkon ko bhee jeeavit chhod detee theen." 
Exodus1:18 tab misr ke raja ne unako bulavakar poochha, tum jo ladkon ko jeeavit chhod detee ho, to aeesa kyon karatee ho?" 
Exodus1:19 dhaaiyon ne firaun ko utar diya, ki ibraee striayon misree striayon ke saman naheen haain ve aeesee faurteelee haain ki dhaaiyon ke pahunchane se paahile hee unako bachcha utpann ho jata haai." 
Exodus1:20 isaliye parameshvar ne dhaaiyon ke sath bhlai kee aur ve log baddhkar bahut samarthee ho gaae. 
Exodus1:21 aur dhaaiyan isaaliye ki ve parameshvar ka bhy manatee theen us ne unake ghar basaae. 
Exodus1:22 tab firaun ne apanee saree praja ke logon ko agyaa dee, ki ibiryon ke jitane bette utpann hon un sabhon ko tum neel nadee men dal dena, aur sab beattyaien ko jeeavit rakh chhodna.." 
Exodus2:1 levee ke gharane ke aek puroosh ne aek levee vansh kee sree ko byah liya. 
Exodus2:2 aur vah sree garbhvatee hui aur usake aek putra utpann hua aur yah dekhkar ki yah balak sundar haai, use teen maheene tak chhpai rakha." 
Exodus2:3 aur jab vah use aur chhpai n sakee tab usake liye sarakandon kee aek ttokaree lekar, us men balak ko rakhkar neel nadee ke teer par kanson ke beech chhod ai." 
Exodus2:4 us balak ki bahin door khdee rahee, ki dekhe isaka kya hal hoga." 
Exodus2:5 tab firaun kee bettee nahane ke liye nadee ke teer ai usakee saakhaiyan nadee ke teer teer tthalane lageen tab us ne kanson ke beech ttokaree ko dekhkar apanee dasee ko use le ane ke liye bheja. 
Exodus2:6 tab us ne use kholakar dekha, ki aek rota hua balak haai tab use taras aya aur us ne kaha, yah to kisee ibraee ka balak hoga." 
Exodus2:7 tab balak kee bahin ne firaun kee bettee se kaha, kya maain jakar ibraee striayon men se kisee dhaai ko tere pas bula le aun jo tere liye balak ko doodha pilaya kare?" 
Exodus2:8 firaun kee bettee ne kaha, ja. tab ladkee jakar balak kee mata ko bula le ai." 
Exodus2:9 firaun kee bettee ne us se kaha, too is balak ko le jakar mere liye doodha pilaya kar, aur maain tujhe majadooree doongee. tab vah sree balak ko le jakar doodha pilane lagee." 
Exodus2:10 jab balak kuchh bada hua tab vah use firaun kee bettee ke pas le gai, aur vah usaka betta tthara aur us ne yah kahakar usaka nam moosa rakha, ki maain ne isako jal se nikal liya.." 
Exodus2:11 un dinon men aeesa hua ki jab moosa javan hua, aur bahar apane bhai bandhauon ke pas jakar unake du:khon par draashtti karane laga tab us ne dekha, ki koi misree jan mere ek ibraee bhai ko mar raha haai." 
Exodus2:12 jab us ne idhar udhar dekha ki koi naheen haai, tab us misree ko mar dala aur baloo men chhpai diya.." 
Exodus2:13 fir doosare din bahar jakar us ne dekha ki do ibraee puroosh apas men marapeett kar rahe haain us ne aparadhaee se kaha, too apane bhai ko kyon marata haai?" 
Exodus2:14 us ne kaha, kis ne tujhe ham logon par hakim aur nyayee ttharaya? jis bhanati too ne misree ko ghaat kiya kya usee bhanti too mujhe bhee ghaat karana chahata haai? tab moosa yah sochakar dr gaya, ki nishchay vah bat khul gai haai." 
Exodus2:15 jab firaun ne yah bat sunee tab moosa ko ghaat karane kee yuaktai kee. tab moosa firaun ke samhane se bhaga, aur midhan desh men jakar rahane laga aur vah vahan aek kuaen ke pas baaitt gaya." 
Exodus2:16 midhan ke yajak kee sat bettyaian thee aur ve vahan akar jal bhrane lagee, ki kattauton men bhrake apane pita kee bhedbakariyon ko pilaaen." 
Exodus2:17 tab charavahe akar unako hattane lage is par moosa ne khda hokar unakee sahayata kee, aur bhed-bakaariyon ko panee pilaya." 
Exodus2:18 jab ve apane pita rooael ke pas fir ai, tab us ne un se poochha, kya karan haai ki aj tum aeesee faurtee se ai ho?" 
Exodus2:19 unhon ne kaha, ek misree puroosh ne ham ko charavahon ke hath se chhudaya, aur hamare liye bahut jal bhrake bhed-bakaariyon ko pilaya." 
Exodus2:20 tab us ne apanee beattyaien se kaha, vah puroosh kahan haai? tum usako kyon chhod ai ho? usako bula le ao ki vah bhojan kare." 
Exodus2:21 aur moosa us puroosh ke sath rahane ko prasann hua us ne use apanee bettee sippora ko byah diya.
