Exodus2:22 aur usake aek putra utpann hua, tab moosa ne yah kahakar, ki maain any desh men paradeshaee hoo, usaka nam gesharem rakha.." 
Exodus2:23 bahut dinon ke beetane par misr ka raja mar gaya. aur israaelee kattnai seva ke karan lambee lambee sans lekar ahen bhrane lage, aur pukar utte, aur unakee dohai jo kattnai seva ke karan hui vah parameshvar tak pahunchee." 
Exodus2:24 aur parameshvar ne unaka karahana sunakar apanee vacha ko, jo us ne ibraaheem, aur isahak, aur yakoob ke sath bandhaee thee, smaran kiya." 
Exodus2:25 aur parameshvar ne israaeliyon par draashtti karake un par chitt lagaya.. 
Exodus3:1 moosa apane sasur yitrae nam midhan ke yajak kee bhed-bakaariyon ko charata tha aur vah unhen jangal kee paralee or horeb nam parameshvar ke parvat ke pas le gaya. 
Exodus3:2 aur parameshvar ke doot ne aek katteelee jhadee ke beech ag kee lau men usako darshan diya aur us ne draashtti uttakar dekha ki jhadee jal rahee haai, par bhsm naheen hotee." 
Exodus3:3 tab moosa ne socha, ki maain udhar firake is bade achambhe ko dekoonga, ki vah jhadee kyon naheen jal jatee." 
Exodus3:4 jab yahova ne dekha ki moosa dekhne ko muda chala ata haai, tab parameshvar ne jhadee ke beech se usako pukara, ki he moosa, he moosa. moosa ne kaha, kya agyaa." 
Exodus3:5 us ne kaha idhar pas mat a, aur apane panvon se jootiyon ko utar de, kyonki jis sthan par too khda haai vah paavitra boomi haai." 
Exodus3:6 fir us ne kaha, maain tere pita ka parameshvar, aur ibraaheem ka parameshvar, isahak ka parameshvar, aur yakoob ka parameshvar hoon. tab moosa ne jo parameshvar kee or niharane se drata tha apana munh ddhap liya." 
Exodus3:7 fir yahova ne kaha, maain ne apanee praja ke log jo misr men haain unake du:kh ko nishchay dekha haai, aur unakee jo chillahatt paarishram karanevalon ke karan hotee haai usako bhee maain ne suna haai, aur unakee peeda par maain ne chitt lagaya haai" 
Exodus3:8 isaliye ab maain utar aya hoon ki unhen misriyon ke vash se chhudau, aur us desh se nikalakar aek achchhe aur bade desh men jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaara bahatee haai, arthata kananee, hittee, aemoree, paarijjee, hivvee, aur yaboosee logon ke sthan men pahunchaun." 
Exodus3:9 so ab sun, israaeliyon kee chillahatt mujhe sunai padee haai, aur misriyon ka un par andhor karana bhee mujhe dikhai pada haai," 
Exodus3:10 isaliye a, maain tujhe firaun ke pas bhejata hoon ki too meree israaelee praja ko misr se nikal le aae." 
Exodus3:11 tab moosa ne parameshvar se kaha, maai kaun hoon jo firaun ke pas jau, aur israaeliyon ko misr se nikal le aun?" 
Exodus3:12 us ne kaha, nishchay maain tere sang rahoonga aur is bat ka ki tera bhejanevala maain hoo, tere liye yah chinh hoga ki jab too un logon ko misr se nikal chuke tab tum isee pahad par parameshvar kee upasana karoge." 
Exodus3:13 moosa ne parameshvar se kaha, jab maain israaeliyon ke pas jakar un se yah kahoo, ki tumhare pitaron ke parameshvar ne mujhe tumhare pas bheja haai, tab yadi ve mujh se poochhe, ki usaka kya nam haai? tab maain unako kya bataun?" 
Exodus3:14 parameshvar ne moosa se kaha, maain jo hoon so hoon. fir us ne kaha, too israaeliyon se yah kahana, ki jisaka nam maain hoon haai usee ne mujhe tumhare pas bheja haai." 
Exodus3:15 fir parameshvar ne moosa se yah bhee kaha, ki too israaeliyon se yah kahana, ki tumhare pitaron ka parameshvar, arthata ibraaheem ka parameshvar, isahak ka parameshvar aur yakoob ka parameshvar, yahova usee ne mujh ko tumhare pas bheja haai. dekh sada tak mera nam yahee rahega, aur peeddhee peeddhee men mera smaran isee se hua karega." 
Exodus3:16 isaliye ab jakar israaelee puraaniyon ko ikattha kar, aur un se kah, ki tumhare pitar ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob ke parameshvar, yahova ne mujhe darshan dekar yah kaha haai, ki maain ne tum par aur tum se jo bartav misr men kiya jata haai us par bhee chit lagaya haai" 
Exodus3:17 aur maain ne ttan liya haai ki tum ko misr ke dukhon men se nikalakar kananee, hittee, aemoree, paarijjee hibbee, aur yaboosee logon ke desh men le chaloonga, jo aeesa desh haai ki jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaara bahatee haai." 
Exodus3:18 tab ve teree manenge aur too israaelee puraniyon ko sang lekar misr ke raja ke pas jakar us se yon kahana, ki ibiryon ke parameshvar, yahova se ham logon kee bhentt hui haai isaliye ab ham ko teen din ke marga par jangal men jane de, ki apane parameshvar yahova ko balidan chaddhaaen." 
Exodus3:19 maain janata hoon ki misr ka raja tum ko jane n dega varan bade bal se dabaae jane par bhee jane n dega. 
Exodus3:20 isaliye maain hath baddhakar un sab ashcharyakamorn se jo misr ke beech karoonga us desh ko maroonga aur usake pashchata vah tum ko jane dega. 
Exodus3:21 tab maain misriyon se apanee is praja par anugrah karavaunga aur jab tum nikaloge tab choochhe hath n nikaloge. 
Exodus3:22 varan tumharee aek aek sree apanee apanee padosin, aur apane apane ghar kee pahunee se sone chandee ke gahane, aur vasr mang legee, aur tum unhen apane betton aur bettyaien ko paahirana is prakar tum misriyon ko loottoge.." 
Exodus4:1 tab moosa ne utar diya, ki ve meree prateeti n karenge aur n meree sunenge, varan kahenge, ki yahova ne tujh ko darshan naheen diya." 
Exodus4:2 yahova ne us se kaha, tere hath men vah kya haai? vah bola, lattee." 
Exodus4:3 us ne kaha, use boomi par dal de jab us ne use boomi par dala tab vah sarpa ban gai, aur moosa usake samhane se bhaga." 
Exodus4:4 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, hath baddhakar usakee poonchh pakad le ki ve log prateeati karen ki tumhare pitaron ke parameshvar arthata ibraaheem ke parameshvar, isahak ke parameshvar, aur yakoob ke parameshvar, yahova ne tujh ko darshan diya haai." 
Exodus4:5 tab us ne hath baddhakar usako pakada tab vah usake hath men fir lattee ban gai. 
Exodus4:6 fir yahova ne us se yah bhee kaha, ki apana hath chhatee par rakhkar ddhanpa. so us ne apana hath chhatee par rakhkar ddhanp liya fir jab use nikala tab kya dekha, ki usaka hath koddh ke karan him ke saman shvet ho gaya haai." 
Exodus4:7 tab us ne kaha, apana hath chhatee par fir rakhkar ddhanpa. aur us ne apana hath chhatee par rakhkar ddhanp liya aur jab us ne usako chhatee par se nikala tab kya dekhta haai, ki vah fir saree deh ke saman ho gaya." 
Exodus4:8 tab yahova ne kaha, yadi ve teree bat kee prateeti n kare, aur pahile chinh ko n mane, to doosare chinh kee prateeti karenge." 
Exodus4:9 aur yaadi ve in donon chinhon kee prateeati n karen aur teree bat ko n mane, tab too neel nadee se kuchh jal lekar sookhee boomi par dalana aur jo jal too nadee se nikalega vah sookhee boomi par lohoo ban jayega." 
Exodus4:10 moosa ne yahova se kaha, he mere prabhu, maain bolane men nipun nahee, n to paahile tha, aur n jab se too apane das se baten karane laga maain to munh aur jeebh ka bha hoon." 
Exodus4:11 yahova ne us se kaha, manushy ka munh kis ne banaya haai? aur manushy ko goonga, va bahira, va dekhnevala, va andha, mujh yahova ko chhod kaun banata haai?" 
Exodus4:12 ab ja, maain tere mukh ke sang hokar jo tujhe kahana hoga vah tujhe sikhlata jaunga." 
Exodus4:13 us ne kaha, he mere prabhu, jisako too chahe usee ke hath se bheja." 
Exodus4:14 tab yahova ka kop moosa par bhdka aur us ne kaha, kya tera bhai leveey haroon naheen haai? mujhe to nishchay haai ki vah bolane men nipun haai, aur vah teree bhentt ke liye nikala bhee ata haai, aur tujhe dekhkar man men anandait hoga." 
Exodus4:15 isaliye too use ye baten sikhana aur maain usake mukh ke sang aur tere mukh ke sang hokar jo kuchh tumhe karana hoga vah tum ko sikhlata jaunga. 
Exodus4:16 aur vah teree or se logon se baten kiya karega vah tere liye munh aur too usake liye parameshvar ttharega. 
Exodus4:17 aur too is lattee ko hath men liae ja, aur isee se in chinhon ko dikhana.." 
Exodus4:18 tab moosa apane sasur yitrae ke pas lautta aur us se kaha, mujhe vida kar, ki maain misr men rahanevale apane bhaiyon ke pas jakar dekoon ki ve ab tak jeevit haain va naheen. yitrae ne kaha, kushal se ja." 
Exodus4:19 aur yahova ne midhan desh men moosa se kaha, misr ko lautt ja kyonki jo manushy tere praan ke pyase the ve sab mar gaae haain" 
Exodus4:20 tab moosa apanee patnee aur betton ko gadahe par chaddhakar misr desh kee or parameshvar kee us lattee ko hath men liye huae lautta. 
Exodus4:21 aur yahova ne moosa se kaha, jab too misr men pahunche tab savadhaan ho jana, aur jo chamatkar maain ne tere vash men kiae haain un sabhon ko firaun ko dikhlana parantu maai usake man ko hatteela karoonga, aur vah meree praja ko jane n dega." 
Exodus4:22 aur too firaun se kahana, ki yahova yon kahata haai, ki israael mera putra varan mera jetta haai," 
Exodus4:23 aur maain jo tujh se kah chuka hoo, ki mere putra ko jane de ki vah meree seva kare aur too ne ab tak use jane naheen diya, is karan maain ab tere putra varan tere jette ko ghaat karoonga." 
Exodus4:24 aur aeesa hua ki marga par saray men yahova ne moosa se bhentt karake use mar dalana chaha. 
Exodus4:25 tab sippora ne aek tej chakamak patthr lekar apane bette kee khladee ko katt dala, aur moosa ke pavon par yah kahakar faenk diya, ki nishchay too lohoo bahanevala mera pati haai." 
Exodus4:26 tab us ne usako chhod diya. aur usee samay khtane ke karan vah bolee, too lohoo bahanevala pati haai." 
Exodus4:27 tab yahova ne haroon se kaha, moosa se bhentt karane ko jangal men ja. aur vah gaya, aur parameshvar ke parvat par us se mila aur usako chooma." 
Exodus4:28 tab moosa ne haroon ko yah batalaya ki yahova ne kya kya baten kahakar usako bheja haai, aur kaun kaun se chinh dikhlane kee agyaa use dee haai." 
Exodus4:29 tab moosa aur haroon ne jakar israaeliyon ke sab puraniyon ko ikattha kiya. 
Exodus4:30 aur jitanee baten yahova ne moosa se kahee thee vah sab haroon ne unhen sunai, aur logon ke samhane ve chinh bhee dikhlaae." 
Exodus4:31 aur logon ne unakee prateeati kee aur yah sunakar, ki yahova ne israaeliyon kee suadhai lee aur unake du:khon par drashtti kee haai, unhon ne sir jhukakar dandvat kee.." 
Exodus5:1 isake pashchata moosa aur haroon ne jakar firaun se kaha, israael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki meree praja ke logon ko jane de, ki ve jangal men mere liye pavrva karen." 
Exodus5:2 firaun ne kaha, yahova kaun haai, ki maain usaka vachan manakar israaeliyon ko jane doon? maain yahova ko naheen janata, aur maain israaeliyon ko naheen jane doonga." 
Exodus5:3 unhon ne kaha, ibiryon ke parameshvar ne ham se bhentt kee haai so hamen jangal men teen din ke marga par jane de, ki apane parameshvar yahova ke liye baalidan kare, aeesa n ho ki vah ham men maree faailaae va talavar chalavae." 
Exodus5:4 misr ke raja ne un se kaha, he moosa, he haroon, tum kyon logon se kam chhudvane chahate ho? tum jakar apane apane bojh ko uttao." 
Exodus5:5 aur firon ne kaha, suno, is desh men ve log bahut ho gaae haai, fir tum unako parishram se vishraam dilana chahate ho!" 
Exodus5:6 aur firaun ne usee din un parishram karavanevalon ko jo un logon ke upar the, aur unake saradaron ko yah agyaa dee," 
Exodus5:7 ki tum jo ab tak itten banane ke liye logon ko pual diya karate the so age ko n dena ve ap hee jakar apane liye pual ikattha karen. 
Exodus5:8 taubhee jitanee intten ab tak unhen bananee padtee theen utanee hee age ko bhee un se banavana, intton kee ginatee kuchh bhee n ghattana kyonaki ve alasee haain is karan yah kahakar chillate haai, ki ham jakar apane parameshvar ke liye baalidan karen." 
Exodus5:9 un manushyon se aur bhee kattnai seva karavai jaae ki ve us men parishram karate rahen aur joottee baton par dhyan n lagaen. 
Exodus5:10 tab logon ke parishram karanevalon ne aur saradaron ne bahar jakar un se kaha, firaun is prakar kahata haai, ki maain tumhen pual naheen doonga." 
Exodus5:11 tum hee jakar jahan kaheen pual mile vahan se usako battor kar le ao parantu tumhara kam kuchh bhee naheen ghattaya jaaega. 
Exodus5:12 so ve log sare misr desh men tittra-abittr huae ki pual kee santee koonttee battoren. 
Exodus5:13 aur paarishram karanevale yah kah kahakar un se jaldee karate rahe, ki jis prakar tum pual pakar kiya karate the usee prakar apana praatidin ka kam ab bhee poora karo." 
Exodus5:14 aur israaeliyon men se jin saradaron ko firaun ke paarishram karanevalon ne unaka aadhaikaree ttharaya tha, unhon ne mar khai, aur un se poochha gaya, ki kya karan haai ki tum ne apanee ttharai hui intton kee ginatee ke anusar pahile kee nai kal aur aj pooree naheen karai?" 
Exodus5:15 tab israaeliyon ke saradaron ne jakar firaun kee dohai yah kahakar dee, ki too apane dason se aeesa bartav kyon karata haai?" 
Exodus5:16 tere dason ko pual to diya hee naheen jata aur ve ham se kahate rahate haai, intte banao, intten banao, aur tere dason ne bhee mar khai haain parantu dosh tere hee logon ka haai." 
Exodus5:17 firaun ne kaha, tum alasee ho, alasee isee karan kahate ho ki hame yahova ke liye baalidan karane ko jane de." 
Exodus5:18 aur jab akar apana kam karo aur pual tum ko naheen diya jaaega, parantu itton kee ginatee pooree karanee padegee." 
Exodus5:19 jab israaeliyon ke saradaron ne yah bat sunee ki unakee intton kee ginatee n ghattegee, aur praatidin utana hee kam poora karana padega, tab ve jan gaae ki unake durbhagy ke din a gaae haain." 
Exodus5:20 jab ve firaun ke sammukh se bahar nikal aae tab moosa aur haroon, jo un se bhentt karane ke liye khde the, unhen mile." 
Exodus5:21 aur unhon ne moosa aur haroon se kaha, yahova tum par draashtti karake nyay kare, kyonki tum ne ham ko firaun aur usake karmachaariyon kee draashtti men gharaanait ttharavakar hamen ghaat karane ke liye unake hath men talavar de dee haai." 
Exodus5:22 tab moosa ne yahova ke pas lautt kar kaha, he prabhu, too ne is praja ke sath aeesee burai kyon kee? aur too ne mujhe yahan kyon bheja?" 
Exodus5:23 jab se maain tere nam se firaun ke pas baten karane ke liye gaya tab se usane is praja ke sath bura hee vyavahar kiya haai, aur too ne apanee praja ka kuchh bhee chhuttkara naheen kiya." 
Exodus6:1 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, ab too dekhega ki maain firaun ne kya karoonga jis se vah unako barabas nikalega, vah to unhen apane desh se barabas nikal dega.." 
Exodus6:2 aur parameshvar ne moosa se kaha, ki maain yahova hoon." 
Exodus6:3 maain sarvashaktaiman ishvar ke nam se ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob ko darshan deta tha, parantu yahova ke nam se maain un par pragatt n hua." 
Exodus6:4 aur maain ne unake sath apanee vacha draddh kee haai, arthata kanan desh jis men ve paradeshaee hokar rahate the, use unhen de doon." 
Exodus6:5 aur israaelee jinhen misree log dasatv men rakhte haain unaka karahana bhee sunakar maain ne apanee vacha ko smaran kiya haai. 
Exodus6:6 is karan too israaeliyon se kah, ki maain yahova hoo, aur tum ko misriyon ke bojhon ke neeche se nikaloonga, aur unake dasatv se tum ko chhudaunga, aur apanee bhuja baddhakar aur bharee dand dekar tumhen chhuda loonga," 
Exodus6:7 aur maain tum ko apanee praja banane ke liye apana loonga, aur maain tumhara parameshvar ttharoonga aur tum jan loge ki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon jo tumhen misriyon ke bojhon ke neeche se nikal le aya." 
Exodus6:8 aur jis desh ke dene kee shapath maain ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob se khai thee usee men maain tumhen pahunchakar use tumhara bhag kar doonga. maain to yahova hoon." 
Exodus6:9 aur ye baten moosa ne israaeliyon ko sunai parantu unhon ne man kee bechaainee aur dasatv kee kroorata ke karan usakee n sunee.. 
Exodus6:10 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus6:11 too jakar misr ke raja firaun se kah, ki israaeliyon ko apane desh men se nikal jane de." 
Exodus6:12 aur moosa ne yahova se kaha, dek, israaeliyon ne meree naheen sunee fir firaun mujh bhe bolanevale kee kyonkar sunega?" 
Exodus6:13 aur yahova ne moosa aur haroon ko israaeliyon aur misr ke raja firaun ke liye agyaa is abhaipraay se dee ki ve israaeliyon ko misr desh se nikal le jaaen. 
Exodus6:14 unake pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy puroosh ye haain: israel ke jetta rooben ke putra: hanok, pallo, hesron aur kamrmee the" 
Exodus6:15 aur shaimon ke putra: yamooael, yameen, ohad, yaakin, aur sohar the, aur aek kananee sree ka betta shaaul bhee tha inheen se shaimon ke kul nikale." 
Exodus6:16 aur levee ke putra jin se unakee vanshaavalee chalee haai, unake nam ye haain: arthata gesharen, kahat aur mararee, aur levee ko pooree avastha aek sau saaintees varsha kee hui." 
Exodus6:17 gesharen ke putra jin se unaka kul chala: libanee aur shaimee the. 
Exodus6:18 aur kahat ke putra: amraam, yisahar, hebraen aur ujjeeael the, aur kahat kee pooree avastha aek sau saaintees varsha kee hui." 
Exodus6:19 aur mararee ke putra: mahalee aur mooshaee the. leaviyon ke kul jin se unakee vanshaavalee chalee ye hee haain. 
Exodus6:20 amraam ne apanee foofaee yokebed ko byah liya aur us se haroon aur moosa utpann hua, aur amraam kee pooree avastha aek sau saaintees varsha kee hui." 
Exodus6:21 aur yisahar ke putra korah, nepeg aur jikree the." 
Exodus6:22 aur ujjeeael ke putra: meeshaaael, aelasapan aur sitraee the." 
Exodus6:23 aur haroon ne ammeenadab kee bettee, aur nahashaen kee bahin aeleeshoba ko byah liya aur us se nadab, abeeho, aeelajar aur itamar utpann huae." 
Exodus6:24 aur korah ke putra: asseer, aelakana aur abeeasap the aur inheen se korahiyon ke kul nikale." 
Exodus6:25 aur haroon ke putra aelajar ne pooteeael kee aek bettee ko byah liya aur us se peenahas utpann hua jin se unaka kul chala. leaviyon ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy puroosh ye hee haain. 
Exodus6:26 haroon aur moosa ve hee haain jinako yahova ne yah agyaa dee, ki israaeliyon ko dal dal karake unake jatthon ke anusar misr desh se nikal le ao." 
Exodus6:27 ye vahee moosa aur haroon haain jinhon ne misr ke raja firaun se kaha, ki ham israaeliyon ko misr se nikal le jaaenge.." 
Exodus6:28 jab yahova ne misr desh men moosa se yah bat kahee," 
Exodus6:29 ki maain to yahova hoon isaliye jo kuchh maain tum se kahoonga vah sab misr ke raja firaun se kahana. 
Exodus6:30 aur moosa ne yahova ko uttr diya, ki maain to bolane men bha hoon aur firon kyonkar meree sunega?" 
Exodus7:1 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, sun, maain tujhe firaun ke liye parameshvar sa ttharata hoon aur tera bhai haroon tera nabee ttharega." 
Exodus7:2 jo jo agyaa maain tujhe doon vahee too kahana, aur haroon use firaun se kahega jis se vah israaeliyon ko apane desh se nikal jane de." 
Exodus7:3 aur maain firaun ke man ko kattor kar doonga, aur apane chinh aur chamatkar misr desh men bahut se dikhlaunga." 
Exodus7:4 taubhee firaun tumharee n sunega aur maain misr desh par apana hath baddhakar misriyon ko bharee dand dekar apanee sena arthata apanee israaelee praja ko misr desh se nikal loonga. 
Exodus7:5 aur jab maain misr par hath baddha kar israaeliyon ko unake beech se nikaloonga tab misree jan lenge, ki maain yahova hoon." 
Exodus7:6 tab moosa aur haroon ne yahova kee agyaa ke anusar hee kiya. 
Exodus7:7 aur jab moosa aur haroon firaun se bat karane lage tab moosa to assee varsha ka tha, aur haroon tirasee varsha ka tha.." 
Exodus7:8 fir yahova ne, moosa aur haroon se is prakar kaha," 
Exodus7:9 ki jab firaun tum se kahe, ki apane praman ka koi chamatkar dikhao, tab too haroon se kahana, ki apanee lattee ko lekar firaun ke samhane dal de, ki vah ajagar ban jaae." 
Exodus7:10 tab moosa aur haroon ne firaun ke pas jakar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar kiya aur jab haroon ne apanee lattee ko firaun aur usake karmachaariyon ke samhane dal diya, tab vah ajagar ban gaya." 
Exodus7:11 tab firaun ne paanditon aur ttonaha karanevalon ko bulavaya aur misr ke jadoogaron ne akar apane apane tantra mantra se vaaisa hee kiya. 
Exodus7:12 unhon ne bhee apanee apanee lattee ko dal diya, aur ve bhee ajagar ban gae. par haroon kee lattee unakee lattyaien ko nigal gai." 
Exodus7:13 parantu firaun ka man aur hatteela ho gaya, aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar us ne moosa aur haroon kee baton ko naheen mana.." 
Exodus7:14 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, firon ka man kattor ho gaya haai aur vah is praja ko jane naheen deta." 
Exodus7:15 isaliye bihan ko firaun ke pas ja, vah to jal kee or bahar aaega aur jo lattee sarpa ban gai thee, usako hath men liae huae neel nadee ke tatt par us se bhentt karane ke liye khda rahana." 
Exodus7:16 aur us se is prakar kahana, ki ibiryon ke parameshvar yahova ne mujhe yah kahane ke liye tere pas bheja haai, ki meree praja ke logon ko jane de ki jis se ve jangal men meree upasana karen aur ab tak too ne mera kahana naheen mana." 
Exodus7:17 yahova yon kahata haai, is se too jan lega ki maain hee parameshvar hoon dek, maai apane hath kee lattee ko neel nadee ke jal par maroonga, aur jal lohoo ban jaaega," 
Exodus7:18 aur jo machhliyan neel nadee men haain ve mar jaaengee, aur neel nadee basane lagegee, aur nadee ka panee peene ke liye misriyon ka jee n chahega." 
Exodus7:19 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, haroon se kah, ki apanee lattee lekar misr desh men jitana jal haai, arthata usakee naadiya, nahare, jheele, aur pokhre, sab ke upar apana hath baddha ki unaka jal lohoo ban jaae aur sare misr desh men katt aur patthr donon bhanati ke jalapatraen men lohoo hee lohoo ho jaaega." 
Exodus7:20 tab moosa aur haroon ne yahova kee agyaa hee ke anusar kiya, arthata us ne lattee ko uttakar firaun aur usake karmachaariyon ke dekhte neel nadee ke jal par mara, aur nadee ka sab jal lohoo ban gaya." 
Exodus7:21 aur neel nadee men jo machhaliyan theen ve mar gai aur nadee se durgandha ane lagee, aur misree log nadee ka panee n pee sake aur sare misr desh men lohoo ho gaya." 
Exodus7:22 tab misr ke jadoogaron ne bhee apane tantra-mantrae se vaaisa hee kiya taubhee firaun ka man hatteela ho gaya, aur yahova ke kahane ke anusar us ne moosa aur haroon kee n manee." 
Exodus7:23 firaun ne is par bhee dhyan naheen diya, aur munh faer ke apane ghar men chala gaya." 
Exodus7:24 aur sab misree log peene ke jal ke liye neel nadee ke as pas khodane lage, kyonaki ve nadee ka jal naheen pee sakate the." 
Exodus7:25 aur jab yahova ne neel nadee ko mara tha tab se sat din ho chuke the.. 
Exodus8:1 aur tab yahova ne fir moosa se kaha, firaun ke pas jakar kah, yahova tujh se is prakar kahata haai, ki meree praja ke logon ko jane de jis se ve meree upasana karen." 
Exodus8:2 aur yaadi unhen jane n dega to sun, maain menddhk bhejakar tere sare desh ko haani pahunchanevala hoon." 
Exodus8:3 aur neel nadee menddhkon se bhr jaaegee, aur ve tere bhvan me, aur tere bichhaune par, aur tere karmachariyon ke gharon me, aur teree praja par, varan tere tandooron aur kattautiyon men bhee chaddh jaaenge." 
Exodus8:4 aur tujh par, aur teree praja, aur tere karmachaariyo, sabhon par menddhk chaddh jaaenge." 
Exodus8:5 fir yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee, ki haroon se kah de, ki nadiyo, naharo, aur jheelon ke upar lattee ke sath apana hath baddhakar menddhkon ko misr desh par chaddha le aae." 
Exodus8:6 tab haroon ne misr ke jalashayon ke upar apana hath baddhaya aur menddhkon ne misr desh par chaddhkar use chha liya. 
Exodus8:7 aur jadoogar bhee apane tantra-mantraen se usee prakar misr desh par menddhk chaddha le aae. 
Exodus8:8 tak firaun ne moosa aur haroon ko bulavakar kaha, yahova se binatee karo ki vah menddhkon ko mujh se aur meree praja se door kare aur maain israaelee logon ko jane doonga jis se ve yahova ke liye baalidan karen." 
Exodus8:9 tab moosa ne firaun se kaha, itanee bat par to mujh par tera ghamand rahe, ab maain tere, aur tere karmachaariyo, aur praja ke nimitt kab binatee karoo, ki yahova tere pas se aur tere gharon men se menddhkon ko door kare, aur ve keval neel nadee men paae jaaen?" 
Exodus8:10 us ne kaha, kala. us ne kaha, tere vachan ke anusar hoga, jis se tujhe yah gyaat ho jaae ki hamare parameshvar yahova ke tuly koi doosara naheen haai." 
Exodus8:11 aur menddhk tere pas se, aur tere gharon men se, aur tere karmachaariyon aur praja ke pas se door hokar keval neel nadee men rahenge." 
Exodus8:12 tab moosa aur haroon firaun ke pas se nikal gaae aur moosa ne un menddhkon ke vishay yahova kee dohai dee jo us ne firaun par bheje the. 
Exodus8:13 aur yahova ne moosa ke kahane ke anusar kiya aur menddhk gharo, angano, aur kheton men mar gaae." 
Exodus8:14 aur logon ne ikatthe karake unake ddher laga dia, aur sara desh durgandha se bhr gaya." 
Exodus8:15 parantu jab firon ne dekha ki ab aram mila haai tak yahova ke kahane ke anusar us ne fir apane man ko kattor kiya, aur unakee n sunee.." 
Exodus8:16 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, haroon ko agyaa de, ki too apanee lattee baddhakar boomi kee dhool par mar, jis se vah misr desh bhr men kuttkiyan ban jaaen." 
Exodus8:17 aur unhon ne vaaisa hee kiya arthata haroon ne lattee ko le hath baddhakar boomi kee dhool par mara, tab manushy aur pashu donon par kuttkiyan ho gai varan sare misr desh men boomi kee dhool kuttakiyan ban gai." 
Exodus8:18 tab jadoogaron ne chaha ki apane tantra mantraen ke bal se ham bhee kuttkiyan le aae, parantu yah un se n ho saka. aur manushyon aur pashuuon donon par kuttakiyan banee hee raheen." 
Exodus8:19 tab jadoogaron ne firaun se kaha, yah to parameshvar ke hath ka kam haai. taubhee yahova ke kahane ke anusar firaun ka man kattor hota gaya, aur us ne moosa aur haroon kee bat n manee.." 
Exodus8:20 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, bihan ko tadke uttkar firaun ke samhane khda hona, vah to jal kee or aaega, aur us se kahana, ki yahova tujh se yah kahata haai, ki meree praja ke logon ko jane de, ki ve meree upasana karen." 
Exodus8:21 yaadi too meree praja ko n jane dega to sun, maain tujh par, aur tere karmachaariyon aur teree praja par, aur tere gharon men jhund ke jhund dans bhejoonga aur misriyon ke ghar aur unake rahane kee boomi bhee danson se bhr jaaegee." 
Exodus8:22 us din maain goshon desh ko jis men meree praja rahatee haai alag karoonga, aur us men danson ke jhund n honge jis se too jan le ki prathvee ke beech maain hee yahova hoon." 
Exodus8:23 aur maain apanee praja aur teree praja men antar ttharaunga. yah chinh kal hoga. 
Exodus8:24 aur yahova ne vaaisa hee kiya, aur firaun ke bhvan, aur usake karmachaariyon ke gharon me, aur sare misr desh men danson ke jhund ke jhund bhr gaa, aur danson ke mare vah desh nash hua." 
Exodus8:25 tab firaun ne moosa aur haroon ko bulavakar kaha, tum jakar apane parameshvar ke liye isee desh men baalidan karo." 
Exodus8:26 moosa ne kaha, aeesa karana uchit naheen kyonki ham apane parameshvar yahova ke liye misriyon kee gharanait vastu balidan karengen aur yaadi ham misriyon ke dekhte unakee gharanait vastu balidan karen to kya ve ham ko patthravah n karenge?" 
Exodus8:27 ham jangal men teen din ke marga par jakar apane parameshvar yahova ke liye jaaisa vah ham se kahega vaaisa hee baalidan karenge. 
Exodus8:28 firaun ne kaha, maain tum ko jangal men jane doonga ki tum apane parameshvar yahova ke liye jangal men baalidan karo keval bahut door n jana, aur mere liye binatee karo." 
Exodus8:29 tab moosa ne kaha, sun, maain tere pas se bahar jakar yahova se binatee karoonga ki danson ke jhund tere, aur tere karmachaariyo, aur praja ke pas se kal hee door hon par firaun age ko kapatt karake hamen yahova ke liye baalidan karane ko jane dene ke liye naheen n kare." 
Exodus8:30 so moosa ne firaun ke pas se bahar jakar yahova se binatee kee. 
Exodus8:31 aur yahova ne moosa ke kahe ke anusar danson ke jhundon ko firaun, aur usake karmachariyo, aur usakee praja se door kiya yahan tak ki aek bhee n raha." 
Exodus8:32 tak firaun ne is bar bhee apane man ko sunn kiya, aur un logon ko jane n diya.." 
Exodus9:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, firon ke pas jakar kah, ki ibiryon ka parameshvar yahova tujh se is prakar kahata haai, ki meree praja ke logon ko jane de, ki meree upasana karen." 
Exodus9:2 aur yaadi too unhen jane n de aur ab bhee pakade rahe," 
Exodus9:3 to sun, tere jo ghaede, gadahe, unt, gaya-baail, bhed-bakaree adi pashu maaidan men haai, un par yahova ka hath aeesa padega ki bahut bharee maree hogee." 
Exodus9:4 aur yahova israaeliyon ke pashuuon men aur misriyon ke pashuuon men aeesa antar karega, ki jo israaeliyon ke haain un men se koi bhee n marega." 
Exodus9:5 fir yahova ne yah kahakar aek samay ttharaya, ki maain yah kam is desh men kal karoonga." 
Exodus9:6 doosare din yahova ne aeesa hee kiya aur misr ke to sab pashu mar gaa, parantu israaeliyon ka aek bhee pashu n mara." 
Exodus9:7 aur firaun ne logon ko bheja, par israaeliyon ke pashuuon men se aek bhee naheen mara tha. taubhee firaun ka man sunn ho gaya, aur us ne un logon ko jane n diya." 
Exodus9:8 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha, ki tum donon bhttee men se aek aek mutthee rakh le lo, aur moosa use firaun ke samhane akash kee or uda de." 
Exodus9:9 tab vah sooksham dhool hokar sare misr desh men manushyon aur pashuuon donon par fafaole aur faode ban jaaegee. 
Exodus9:10 so ve bhttee men kee rakh lekar firaun ke samhane khde hua, aur moosa ne use akash kee or uda diya, aur vah manushyon aur pashuuon donon par fafaole aur faode ban gai." 
Exodus9:11 aur un faodon ke karan jadoogar moosa ke samhane khde n rah sake, kyonki ve faode jaaise sab misriyon ke vaaise hee jadoogaron ke bhee nikale the." 
Exodus9:12 tab yahova ne firaun ke man ko kattor kar diya, aur jaaisa yahova ne moosa se kaha tha, us ne usakee n sunee.." 
Exodus9:13 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, bihan ko tadke uttkar firaun ke samhane khda ho, aur us se kah ibiryon ka parameshvar yahova is prakar kahata haai, ki meree praja ke logon ko jane de, ki ve meree upasana karen." 
Exodus9:14 naheen to ab kee bar maain tujh par, aur tere karmachaariyon aur teree praja par sab prakar kee vipaatiayan daloonga, jisase too jan le ki saree prathvee par mere tuly koi doosara naheen haai." 
Exodus9:15 maain ne to abhee hath baddhakar tujhe aur teree praja ko maree se mara hota, aur too prathvee par se satyanash ho gaya hota" 
Exodus9:16 parantu sachamuch maain ne isee karan tujhe banaae rakha haai, ki tujhe apana samathrya dikhau, aur apana nam saree prathvee par praasiddh karoon." 
Exodus9:17 kya too ab bhee meree praja ke samhane apane ap ko bada samajhta haai, aur unhen jane naheen deta?" 
Exodus9:18 sun, kal maain isee samay aeese bharee bharee ole barasaunga, ki jin ke tuly misr kee nev padne ke din se lekar ab tak kabhee naheen pade." 
Exodus9:19 so ab logon ko bhejakar apane pashuuon ko apane maaidan men jo kuchh tera haai sab ko faurtee se ad men chhpai le naheen to jitane manushy va pashu maaidan men rahen aur ghar men ikatthe n kiae jaaen un par ole girenge, aur ve mar jaaenge." 
Exodus9:20 isaliye firaun ke karmachaariyon men se jo log yahova ke vachan ka bhy manate the unhon ne to apane apane sevakon aur pashuuon ko ghar men hak diya. 
Exodus9:21 par jinhon ne yahova ke vachan par man n lagaya unhon ne apane sevakon aur pashuuon ko maaidan men rahane diya.. 
Exodus9:22 tak yahova ne moosa se kaha, apana hath akash kee or baddha, ki sare misr desh ke manushyon pashuuon aur kheton kee saree upaj par ole giren." 
Exodus9:23 tab moosa ne apanee lattee ko akash kee or uttaya aur yahova megha garajane aur ole barasane laga, aur ag prathvee tak atee rahee. is prakar yahova ne misr desh par ole barasaae." 
Exodus9:24 jo ole girate the unake sath ag bhee milee hui thee, aur ve ole itane bharee the ki jab se misr desh basa tha tab se misr bhr men aeese ole kabhee n gire the." 
Exodus9:25 isaliye misr bhr ke kheton men kya manushy, kya pashu, jitane the sab olon se mare gaa, aur olon se khet kee saree upaj nashtt ho gai, aur maaidan ke sab vraksha toott gaae." 
Exodus9:26 keval goshon desh men jahan israaelee basate the ole naheen gire. 
Exodus9:27 tab firaun ne moosa aur haroon ko bulava bheja aur un se kaha, ki is bar maain ne pap kiya haai yahova dharmee haai, aur maain aur meree praja adharmee haain." 
Exodus9:28 meghaen ka garajana aur olon ka barasana to bahut ho gaya ab bhvishy men yahova se binatee karo tab maain tum logon ko jane doonga, aur tum n roke jaoge." 
Exodus9:29 moosa ne us se kaha, nagar se nikalate hee maain yahova kee or hath faailaunga, tab badal ka garajana band ho jaaega, aur ole fir n girenge, is se too jan lega ki prathvee yahova hee kee haai." 
Exodus9:30 taubhee maain janata hoo, ki n to too aur n tere karmacharee yahova parameshvar ka bhy manenge." 
Exodus9:31 san aur jav to olon se mare gaa, kyonki jav kee balen nikal chukee theen aur san men fool lage huae the." 
Exodus9:32 par gehoon aur kaattyai gehoon jo baddhe n the, is karan ve mare n gaae." 
Exodus9:33 jab moosa ne firaun ke pas se nagar ke bahar nikalakar yahova kee or hath faailaa, tab badal ka garajana aur olon ka barasana band hua, aur fir bahut menh boomi par n pada." 
Exodus9:34 yah dekhkar ki menh aur olon aur badal ka garajana band ho gaya firaun ne apane karmachaariyon samet fir apane man ko kattor karake pap kiya. 
Exodus9:35 aur firaun ka man hatteela hota gaya, aur us ne israaeliyon ko jane n diya jaaisa ki yahova ne moosa ke dara kahalavaya tha.." 
Exodus10:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, firon ke pas ja kyonaki maain hee ne usake aur usake karmachaariyon ke man ko isaliye kattor kar diya haai, ki apane chinh unake beech men dikhlaun." 
Exodus10:2 aur tum log apane betton aur poton se isaka varnn karo ki yahova ne misriyon ko kaaise tttthon men udaya aur apane kya kya chinh unake beech pragatt kiae haain jis se tum yah jan loge ki maain yahova hoon. 
Exodus10:3 tab moosa aur haroon ne firaun ke pas jakar kaha, ki ibiryon ka parameshvar yahova tujh se is prakar kahata haai, ki too kab tak mere samhane deen hone se sankoch karata rahega? meree praja ke logon ko jane de, ki ve meree upasana karen." 
Exodus10:4 yaadi too meree praja ko jane n de to sun, kal maain tere desh men ttiiddayan le aunga." 
Exodus10:5 aur ve dharatee ko aeesa chha lengee, ki vah dekh n padegee aur tumhara jo kuchh olon se bach raha haai usako ve chatt kar jaaengee, aur tumhare jitane vraksha maaidan men lage haain unako bhee ve chatt kar jaaengee," 
Exodus10:6 aur ve tere aur tere sare karmachariyo, nidan sare misriyon ke gharon men bhr jaaengee itanee ttiiddayan tere bapadadon ne va unake purakhaon ne jab se prathvee par janme tab se aj tak kabhee n dekheen. aur vah munh faerakar firaun ke pas se bahar gaya." 
Exodus10:7 tab firaun ke karmacharee us se kahane lage, vah jan kab tak hamare liye fanda bana rahega? un manushyon ko jane de, ki ve apane parameshvar yahova kee upasana karen kya too ab tak naheen janata, ki sara misr nash ho gaya haai?" 
Exodus10:8 tab moosa aur haroon firaun ke pas fir bulavaae gaa, aur us ne un se kaha, chale jao, apane parameshvar yahova kee upasana karo parantu ve jo janevale haai, kaun kaun haain?" 
Exodus10:9 moosa ne kaha, ham to betton beattyaie, bhed-bakaariyo, gaya-baailon samet varan bachchon se booddhon tak sab ke sab jaaenge, kyonki hamen yahova ke liye pabrba karana haai." 
Exodus10:10 us ne is prakar un se kaha, yahova tumhare sang rahe jab ki maain tumhen bachchon samet jane deta hoon dekho, tumhare age ko burai haai." 
Exodus10:11 nahee, aeesa naheen hone paaega tum puroosh hee jakar yahova kee upasana karo, tum yahee to chahate the. aur ve firaun ke sammukh se nikal diae gaae.." 
Exodus10:12 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, misr desh ke upar apana hath baddha, ki ttiiddayan misr desh par chaddhke boomi ka jitana ann aadi olon se bacha haai sab ko chatt kar jaaen." 
Exodus10:13 aur moosa ne apanee latthee ko misr desh ke upar baddhaya, tab yahova ne din bhr aur rat bhr desh par puravai bahai aur jab bhor hua tab us puravai men ttiiddayan ain." 
Exodus10:14 aur ttiiddyon ne chaddhke misr desh ke sare sthanon me basera kiya, unaka dal bahut bharee tha, varan n to unase pahale aeesee ttiiddayan ai thee, aur n unake peechhe aeesee fir aaengee." 
Exodus10:15 ve to saree dharatee par chha gai, yahan tak ki desh andhora ho gaya, aur usaka sara ann aadi aur vrakshaen ke sab fal, nidan jo kuchh olon se bacha tha, sab ko unhon ne chatt kar liya yahan tak ki misr desh bhr men n to kisee vraksha par kuchh hariyalee rah gai aur n khet men anaj rah gaya." 
Exodus10:16 tab firaun ne faurtee se moosa aur haroon ko bulavake kaha, maain ne to tumhare parameshvar yahova ka aur tumhara bhee aparadha kiya haai." 
Exodus10:17 isaliye ab kee bar mera aparadha kshama karo, aur apane parameshvar yahova se binatee karo, ki vah keval mere upar se is mratyu ko door kare." 
Exodus10:18 tab moosa ne firon ke pas se nikal kar yahova se binatee kee. 
Exodus10:19 tab yahova ne bahut prachand pachhuva bahakar ttiiddayon ko udakar lal samundr men dal diya, aur misr ke kisee sthan men aek bhee ttddaiee n rah gai." 
Exodus10:20 taubhee yahova ne firaun ke man ko kattor kar diya, jis se us ne israaeliyon ko jane n diya." 
Exodus10:21 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, apana hath akash kee or baddha ki misr desh ke upar andhakar chha jaa, aeesa andhakar ki ttttola ja sake." 
Exodus10:22 tab moosa ne apana hath akash kee or baddhaya, aur sare misr desh men teen din tak ghaer andhakar chhaya raha." 
Exodus10:23 teen din tak n to kisee ne kisee ko dekha, aur n koi apane sthan se utta parantu sare israaeliyon ke gharon men ujiyala raha." 
Exodus10:24 tab firaun ne moosa ko bulavakar kaha, tum log jao, yahova kee upasana karo apane balakon ko bhee sang le jao keval apanee bhed-bakaree aur gaya-baail ko chhod jao." 
Exodus10:25 moosa ne kaha, tujh ko hamare hath melabali aur homabali ke pashu bhee dene padenge, jinhen ham apane parameshvar yahova ke liye chaddhaaen." 
Exodus10:26 isaliye hamare pashu bhee hamare sang jaaenge, unaka aek khur tak n rah jaaega, kyonaki unheen men se ham ko apane parameshvar yahova kee upasana ka saman lena hoga, aur ham jab tak vahan n pahunchen tab tak naheen janate ki kya kya lekar yahova kee upasana karanee hogee." 
Exodus10:27 par yahova ne firaun ka man hatteela kar diya, jis se us ne unhen jane n diya." 
Exodus10:28 tab firaun ne us se kaha, mere samhane se chala ja aur sachet raha mujhe apana mukh fir n dikhana kyonki jis din too mujhe munh dikhlaae usee din too mara jaaega." 
Exodus10:29 moosa ne kaha, ki too ne tteek kaha haai maain tere munh ko fir kabhee n dekoonga.." 
Exodus11:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, aek aur vipaati maain firaun aur misr desh par dalata hoo, usake pashchata vah tum logon ko vahan se jane dega aur jab vah jane dega tab tum sabhon ko nishchay nikal dega." 
Exodus11:2 meree praja ko meree yah agyaa suna, ki aek aek puroosh apane apane padosee, aur aek aek sree apanee apanee padosin se sone chandee ke gahane mang le." 
Exodus11:3 tab yahova ne misriyon ko apanee praja par dayalu kiya. aur isase aadhaik vah puroosh moosa misr desh men firaun ke karmachaariyon aur sadhaaran logon kee draashtti men ati mahan tha.. 
Exodus11:4 fir moosa ne kaha, yahova is prakar kahata haai, ki adhaee rat ke lagabhg maain misr desh ke beech men hokar chaloonga." 
Exodus11:5 tab misr men sinhasan par virajane vale firaun se lekar chakkee peesanevalee dasee tak ke paahilautte varan pashuuon tak ke sab pahilautte mar jaaenge. 
Exodus11:6 aur sare misr desh men bada hahakar machega, yahan tak ki usake saman n to kabhee hua aur n hoga." 
Exodus11:7 par israaeliyon ke viroodd, kya manushy kya pashu, kisee par koi kutta bhee n bhonkega jis se tum jan lo ki misriyon aur israaeliyon men maain yahova antar karata hoon." 
Exodus11:8 tab tere ye sab karmacharee mere pas a mujhe dandvata karake yah kahenge, ki apane sab anucharon samet nikal ja. aur usake pashchata maain nikal jaunga. yah kah kar moosa bade krodha men firaun ke pas se nikal gaya.." 
Exodus11:9 yahova ne moosa se kah diya tha, ki firaun tumharee n sunega kyonaki meree ichchha haai ki misr desh men bahut se chamatkar karoon." 
Exodus11:10 moosa aur haroon ne firaun ke samhane ye sab chamatkar kiae par yahova ne firaun ka man aur kattor kar diya, so usane israaeliyon ko apane desh se jane n diya.." 
Exodus12:1 fir yahova ne misr desh men moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Exodus12:2 ki yah maheena tum logon ke liye arambh ka tthare arthata varsha ka pahila maheena yahee tthare. 
Exodus12:3 israael kee saree mandlee se is prakar kaho, ki isee maheene ke dasaven din ko tum apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar, gharane peechhe aek aek memna le rakho." 
Exodus12:4 aur yaadi kisee ke gharane men aek memne ke khane ke liye manushy kam ho, to vah apane sab se nikatt rahanevale padosee ke sath praaanaiyon kee ginatee ke anusar aek memna le rakhe aur tum har aek ke khane ke anusar memne ka hisab karana." 
Exodus12:5 tumhara memna nirdaush aur paahile varsha ka nar ho, aur use chahe bhedon men se lena chahe bakaariyon men se." 
Exodus12:6 aur is maheene ke chaudahaven din tak use rakh chhodna, aur us din godhooli ke samay israael kee saree mandlee ke log use baali karen." 
Exodus12:7 tab ve usake lohoo men se kuchh lekar jin gharon men memne ko khaaenge unake dar ke donon alangon aur chaukhtt ke sire par lagaaen. 
Exodus12:8 aur ve usake mans ko usee rat ag men boonjakar akhmeeree rottee aur kadve sagapat ke sath khaaen. 
Exodus12:9 usako sir, paair, aur atadiyon samet ag men boonjakar khana, kachcha va jal men kuchh bhee pakakar n khana." 
Exodus12:10 aur us men se kuchh bihan tak n rahane dena, aur yaadi kuchh bihan tak rah bhee jaa, to use ag men jala dena." 
Exodus12:11 aur usake khane kee yah vidhai haai ki kamar bandho, panv men jootee pahine, aur hath men lattee liae huae use faurtee se khana vah to yahova ka pabrba hoga." 
Exodus12:12 kyonaki us rat ko maain misr desh ke beech men se hokar jaunga, aur misr desh ke kya manushy kya pashu, sab ke pahilautton ko maroonga aur misr ke sare devataon ko bhee maain dand doonga maain to yahova hoon." 
Exodus12:13 aur jin gharon men tum rahoge un par vah lohoo tumhare nimitt chinh ttharega arthata maain us lohoo ko dekhkar tum ko chhod jaunga, aur jab maain misr desh ke logon ko maroonga, tab vah vipaati tum par n padegee aur tum nash n hoge." 
Exodus12:14 aur vah din tum ko smaran dilanevala ttharega, aur tum usako yahova ke liye pabrba karake manana vah din tumharee peeaddhiyon men sada kee vidhai janakar pabrba mana jaae." 
Exodus12:15 sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khaya karana, un men se paahile hee din apane apane ghar men se khmeer utta dalana, varan jo paahile din se lekar sataven din tak koi khmeeree vastu khaa, vah praanee israaeliyon men se nash kiya jaae." 
Exodus12:16 aur paahile din aek pavitra sabha, aur sataven din bhee aek pavitra sabha karana un donon dinon me koi kam n kiya jaae keval jis praanee ka jo khana ho usake kam karane kee agyaa haai." 
Exodus12:17 isaliye tum bina khmeer kee rottee ka pabrba manana, kyonaki usee din mano maain ne tum ko dal dal karake misr desh se nikala haai is karan vah din tumharee peeaddhiyon men sada kee vidhai janakar mana jaae." 
Exodus12:18 paahile maheene ke chaudahaven din kee sanjh se lekar ikkeesaven din kee sanjh tak tum akhmeeree rottee khaya karana. 
Exodus12:19 sat din tak tumhare gharon men kuchh bhee khmeer n rahe, varan jo koi kisee khmeeree vastu ko khaa, chahe vah deshaee ho chahe paradeshae, vah praanee israaeliyon kee mandlee se nash kiya jaae." 
Exodus12:20 koi khmeeree vastu n khana apane sab gharon men bina khmeer kee rottee khaya karana.. 
Exodus12:21 tab moosa ne israael ke sab puraaniyon ko bulakar kaha, tum apane apane kul ke anusar aek aek memna alag kar rakho, aur fasah ka pashu bali karana." 
Exodus12:22 aur usaka lohoo jo tasale men hoga us men joofaa ka aek guchchha dubakar usee tasale men ke lohoo se dar ke chaukhtt ke sire aur donon alangon par kuchh lagana aur bhor tak tum men se koi ghar se bahar n nikale. 
Exodus12:23 kyonaki yahova desh ke beech hokar misriyon ko marata jaaega isaaliye jahan jahan vah chaukhtt ke sire, aur donon alangon par us lohoo ko dekhega, vahan vahan vah us dar ko chhod jaaega, aur nash karanevale ko tumhare gharon men marane ke liye n jane dega." 
Exodus12:24 fir tum is vidhai ko apane aur apane vansh ke liye sada kee vidhai janakar mana karo. 
Exodus12:25 jab tum us desh men jise yahova apane kahane ke anusar tum ko dega pravesh karo, tab vah kam kiya karana." 
Exodus12:26 aur jab tumhare ladkebale tum se poochhe, ki is kam se tumhara kya matalab haai?" 
Exodus12:27 tab tum unako yah uttr dena, ki yahova ne jo misriyon ke marane ke samay misr men rahane vale ham israaeliyon ke gharon ko chhodkar hamare gharon ko bachaya, isee karan usake fasah ka yah baalidan kiya jata haai. tab logon ne sir jhukakar dandvata kee." 
Exodus12:28 aur israaeliyon ne jakar, jo agyaa yahova ne moosa aur haroon ko dee thee, usee ke anusar kiya.." 
Exodus12:29 aur aeesa hua ki adhaee rat ko yahova ne misr desh men sinhasan par virajanevale firaun se lekar gadhe men pade huae bandhauae tak sab ke paahilautton ko, varan pashuuon tak ke sab pahilautton ko mar dala." 
Exodus12:30 aur firaun rat hee ko utt baaitta, aur usake sab karmacharee, varan sare misree utte aur misr men bada hahakar macha, kyonaki aek bhee aeesa ghar n tha jisamen koi mara n ho." 
Exodus12:31 tab firaun ne rat hee rat men moosa aur haroon ko bulavakar kaha, tum israaeliyon samet meree praja ke beech se nikal jao aur apane kahane ke anusar jakar yahova kee upasana karo." 
Exodus12:32 apane kahane ke anusar apanee bhed-bakaariyon aur gaya-baailon ko sath le jao aur mujhe ashaeervad de jao. 
Exodus12:33 aur misree jo kahate the, ki ham to sab mar mitte haai, unhon ne israaelee logon par dabav dalakar kaha, ki desh se jhttpatt nikal jao." 
Exodus12:34 tab unhon ne apane goondho gundhaaae atte ko bina khmeer diae hee kattauatiyon samet kapadon men bandhake apane apane kandho par dal liya. 
Exodus12:35 aur israaeliyon ne moosa ke kahane ke anusar misriyon se sone chandee ke gahane aur vasr mang liye. 
Exodus12:36 aur yahova ne misriyon ko apanee praja ke logon par aeesa dayalu kiya, ki unhon ne jo jo manga vah sab unako diya. is prakar israaeliyon ne misriyon ko loott liya.." 
Exodus12:37 tab israaelee ramases se kooch karake sukkot ko chale, aur balabachchon ko chhod ve koi chh: lakh puroosh pyade the." 
Exodus12:38 aur unake sath milee julee hui aek bheed gai, aur bhed-bakaree, gaya-baail, bahut se pashu bhee sath gaae." 
Exodus12:39 aur jo goondha atta ve misr se sath le gaae usakee unhon ne bina khmeer diae rottyaian banai kyonaki ve misr se aeese barabas nikale gaa, ki unhen avasar bhee n mila kee marga men khane ke liye kuchh paka sake, isee karan vah goondha hua atta bina khmeer ka tha." 
Exodus12:40 misr men base huae israaeliyon ko char sau tees varsha beet gaae the. 
Exodus12:41 aur un char sau tees vasharen ke beetane par, tteek usee din, yahova kee saree sena misr desh se nikal gai." 
Exodus12:42 yahova israaeliyon ko misr desh se nikal laya, is karan vah rat usake nimitt manane ke ati yogy haai yah yahova kee vahee rat haai jisaka peeddhee peeddhee men manana israaeliyon ke liye aati avashy haai.." 
Exodus12:43 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha, pabrba kee vidhai yah haai ki koi paradeshaee us men se n khaae" 
Exodus12:44 par jo kisee ka mol liya hua das ho, aur tum logon ne usaka khtana kiya ho, vah to us men se kha sakega." 
Exodus12:45 par paradeshaee aur majadoor us men se n khaaen. 
Exodus12:46 usaka khana ek hee ghar men ho arthata tum usake mans men se kuchh ghar se bahar n le jana aur balipashu kee koi haddee n todna. 
Exodus12:47 pabrba ko manana israael kee saree mandlee ka kartavy karma haai. 
Exodus12:48 aur yaadi koi paradeshaee tum logon ke sang rahakar yahova ke liye pabrba ko manana chahe, to vah apane yahan ke sab purooshaen ka khtana karaa, tab vah sameep akar usako mane aur vah deshaee manushy ke tuly ttharega. par koi khtanaraahit puroosh us men se n khane paae." 
Exodus12:49 usakee vyavastha deshaee aur tumhare beech men rahanevale paradeshaee donon ke liye ek hee ho. 
Exodus12:50 yah agyaa jo yahova ne moosa aur haroon ko dee usake anusar sare israaeliyon ne kiya. 
Exodus12:51 aur tteek usee din yahova israaeliyon ko misr desh se dal dal karake nikal le gaya.. 
Exodus13:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus13:2 ki kya manushy ke kya pashu ke, israaeliyon men jitane apanee apanee man ke jette ho, unhen mere liye paavitra manana vah to mera hee haai.." 
Exodus13:3 fir moosa ne logon se kaha, is din ko smaran rakho, jis men tum log dasatv ke ghar, arthata misr se nikal aae ho yahova to tum ko vahan se apane hath ke bal se nikal laya is men khmeeree rottee n khai jaae." 
Exodus13:4 abeeb ke maheene men aj ke din tum nikale ho. 
Exodus13:5 isaliye jab yahova tum ko kananee, hittee, aemoree, hibbee, aur yaboosee logon ke desh men pahuchaaega, jise dene kee us ne tumhare purakhaon se shapath khai thee, aur jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaara bahatee haai, tab tum isee maheene men pabrba karana." 
Exodus13:6 sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khaya karana, aur sataven din yahova ke liye pabrba manana." 
Exodus13:7 in saton dinon men akhmeeree rottee khai jaae varan tumhare desh bhr men n khmeeree rottee, n khmeer tumhare pas dekhne men aae." 
Exodus13:8 aur us din tum apane apane putraen ko yah kahake samajha dena, ki yah to ham usee kam ke karan karate haai, jo yahova ne hamare misr se nikal ane ke samay hamare liye kiya tha." 
Exodus13:9 fir yah tumhare liye tumhare hath men aek chinh hoga, aur tumharee ankhon ke samhane smaran karanevalee vastu tthare jis se yahova kee vyavastha tumhare munh par rahe: kyonki yahova ne tumhen apane balavant hathon se misr se nikala haai." 
Exodus13:10 is karan tum is vidhai ko prati varsha niyat samay par mana karana.. 
Exodus13:11 fir jab yahova us shapath ke anusar, jo us ne tumhare purakhaon se aur tum se bhee khai haai, tumhe kanaaniyon ke desh men pahunchakar usako tumhen de dega," 
Exodus13:12 tab tum men se jitane apanee apanee man ke jette hon unako, aur tumhare pashuuon men jo aeese hon unako bhee yahova ke liye arpan karana sab nar bachche to yahova ke haain." 
Exodus13:13 aur gadahee ke har aek paahilautte kee santee memna dekar usako chhuda lena, aur yadi tum use chhudana n chaho to usaka gala tod dena. par apane sab paahilautte putraen ko badala dekar chhuda lena." 
Exodus13:14 aur age ke dinon men jab tumhare putra tum se poochhe, ki yah kya haai? to un se kahana, ki yahova ham logon ko dasatv ke ghar se, arthata misr desh se apane hathon ke bal se nikal laya haai." 
Exodus13:15 us samay jab firaun ne kattor hokar ham ko jane dena n chaha, tab yahova ne misr desh men manushy se lekar pashu tak sab ke paahilautton ko mar dala. isee karan pashuuon men se to jitane apanee apanee man ke pahilautte nar haai, unhen ham yahova ke liye baali karate haain par apane sab jette putraen ko ham badala dekar chhuda lete haain." 
Exodus13:16 aur yah tumhare hathon par aek chinh sa aur tumharee bhauhon ke beech tteeka sa tthare kyonki yahova ham logon ko misr se apane hathon ke bal se nikal laya haai.. 
Exodus13:17 jab firaun ne logon ko jane kee agyaa de dee, tab yadhyapi palishtaiyon ke desh men hokar jo marga jata haai vah chhotta tha taubhee parameshvar yah soch kar unako us marga se naheen le gaya, ki kaheen aeesa n ho ki jab ye log ladai dekhen tab pachhtakar misr ko lautt aaen." 
Exodus13:18 isaliye parameshvar unako chakkar khailakar lal samudr ke jangal ke marga se le chala. aur israaelee panti bandho huae misr se nikal gaae. 
Exodus13:19 aur moosa yoosufa kee haaddiyon ko sath leta gaya kyonaki yoosufa ne israaeliyon se yah kahake, ki parameshvar nishchay tumharee suadhai lega, unako is vishay kee draddh shapath khailai thee, ki ve usakee haddiyon ko apane sath yahan se le jaaenge." 
Exodus13:20 fir unhon ne sukkot se kooch karake jangal kee chhor par aetam men dera kiya. 
Exodus13:21 aur yahova unhen din ko marga dikhane ke liye megha ke khmbhe me, aur rat ko ujiyala dene ke liye ag ke khmbhe men hokar unake age age chala karata tha, jisase ve rat aur din donon men chal saken." 
Exodus13:22 us ne n to badal ke khmbhe ko din men aur n ag ke khmbhe ko rat men logon ke age se hattaya.. 
Exodus14:1 yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus14:2 israaeliyon ko agyaa de, ki ve lauttkar migadol aur samudr ke beech peehaheerot ke sammuk, balasapon ke samhane apane dere khde kare, usee ke samhane samudr ke tatt par dere khde karen." 
Exodus14:3 tab firaun israaeliyon ke vishay men sochega, ki ve desh ke ulajhnon men bajhe haain aur jangal men ghair gaae haain." 
Exodus14:4 tab maain firaun ke man ko kattor kar doonga, aur vah unaka peechha karega, tab firaun aur usakee saree sena ke dara meree maahima hogee aur misree jan lenge ki maain yahova hoon. aur unhon ne vaaisa hee kiya." 
Exodus14:5 jab misr ke raja ko yah samachar mila ki ve log bhag gaa, tab firaun aur usake karmachaariyon ka man unake virooddh palatt gaya, aur ve kahane lage, ham ne yah kya kiya, ki israaeliyon ko apanee sevakai se chhuttkara dekar jane diya?" 
Exodus14:6 tab us ne apana rath jutavaya aur apanee sena ko sang liya. 
Exodus14:7 us ne chh: sau achde se achchhe rath varan misr ke sab rath liae aur un sabhon par saradar baaittae. 
Exodus14:8 aur yahova ne misr ke raja firaun ke man ko kattor kar diya. so us ne israaeliyon ka peechha kiya parantu israaelee to bekhttke nikale chale jate the. 
Exodus14:9 par firaun ke sab ghaedo, aur ratho, aur savaron samet misree sena ne unaka peechha karake unhe, jo peehaheerot ke pas, balasapon ke samhane, samudr ke teer par dere dale pade the, ja liya.." 
Exodus14:10 jab firaun nikatt aya, tab israaeliyon ne ankhe uttakar kya dekha, ki misree hamara peechha kiae chale a rahe haain aur israaelee atyant dr gaa, aur chillakar yahova kee dohai dee." 
Exodus14:11 aur ve moosa se kahane lage, kya misr men kabaren n theen jo too ham ko vahan se marane ke liye jangal men le aya haai? too ne ham se yah kya kiya, ki ham ko misr se nikal laya?" 
Exodus14:12 kya ham tujh se misr men yahee bat n kahate rahe, ki hamen rahane de ki ham misriyon kee seva karen? hamare liye jangal men marane se misriyon ki seva karanee achchhee thee." 
Exodus14:13 moosa ne logon se kaha, dro mat, khde khde vah uddhar ka kam dekho, jo yahova aj tumhare liye karega kyonaki jin misriyon ko tum aj dekhte ho, unako fir kabhee n dekhoge." 
Exodus14:14 yahova ap hee tumhare liye ladega, isaaliye tum chupachap raho.." 
Exodus14:15 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, too kyon meree dohai de raha haai? israaeliyon ko agyaa de ki yahan se kooch karen." 
Exodus14:16 aur too apanee lattee uttakar apana hath samudr ke upar baddha, aur vah do bhag ho jaaega tab israaelee samudr ke beech hokar sthl hee sthl par chale jaaenge." 
Exodus14:17 aur sun, maain ap misriyon ke man ko kattor karata hoo, aur ve unaka peechha karake samudr men ghaus padenge, tab firaun aur usakee sena, aur ratho, aur savaron ke dara meree mahima hogee, tab misree jan lenge ki maain yahova hoon." 
Exodus14:18 aur jab firaun, aur usake ratho, aur savaron ke dara meree mahima hogee, tab misree jan lenge ki maain yahova hoon." 
Exodus14:19 tab parameshvar ka doot jo israaelee sena ke age age chala karata tha jakar unake peechhe ho gaya aur badal ka khmbha unake age se hattkar unake peechhe ja tthara. 
Exodus14:20 is prakar vah misriyon kee sena aur israaeliyon kee sena ke beech men a gaya aur badal aur andhakar to hua, taubhee usase rat ko unhen prakash milata raha aur ve rat bhr aek doosare ke pas n aae." 
Exodus14:21 aur moosa ne apana hath samudr ke upar baddhaya aur yahova ne rat bhr prachand puravai chalai, aur samudr ko do bhag karake jal aeesa hatta diya, jisase ki usake beech sookhee boomi ho gai." 
Exodus14:22 tab israaelee samudr ke beech sthl hee sthl par hokar chale, aur jal unakee dahinee aur bain or deevar ka kam deta tha." 
Exodus14:23 tab misree, arthata firaun ke sab ghaede, rat, aur savar unaka peechha kiae huae samudr ke beech men chale gaae." 
Exodus14:24 aur rat ke pichhle pahar men yahova ne badal aur ag ke khmbhe men se misriyon kee sena par drashtti karake unhen ghabara diya. 
Exodus14:25 aur us ne unake rathon ke pahiyon ko nikal dala, jisase unaka chalana kattnai ho gaya tab misree apas men kahane lage, ao, ham israaeliyon ke samhane se bhagen kyonki yahova unakee or se misriyon ke virooddh yuddh kar raha haai.." 
Exodus14:26 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, apana hath samudr ke upar baddha, ki jal misriyo, aur unake ratho, aur savaron par fir bahane lage." 
Exodus14:27 tab moosa ne apana hath samudr ke upar baddhaya, aur bhor hote hote kya hua, ki samudr fir jyon ka tyon apane bal par a gaya aur misree ulatte bhagane lage, parantu yahova ne unako samudr ke beech hee men jhttk diya." 
Exodus14:28 aur jal ke palattne se, jitane rath aur savar israaeliyon ke peechhe samudr men aae the, so sab varan firaun kee saree sena us men oob gai, aur us men se aek bhee n bacha." 
Exodus14:29 parantu israaelee samudr ke beech sthl hee sthl par hokar chale gaa, aur jal unakee dahinee aur bain donon or deevar ka kam deta tha." 
Exodus14:30 aur yahova ne us din israaeliyon ko misriyon ke vash se is prakar chhudaya aur israaeliyon ne misriyon ko samudr ke tatt par mare pade huae dekha. 
Exodus14:31 aur yahova ne misriyon par jo apana parakram dikhlata tha, usako dekhkar israaeliyon ne yahova ka bhy mana aur yahova kee aur usake das moosa kee bhee prateeati kee.." 
Exodus15:1 tab moosa aur israaeliyon ne yahova ke liye yah geet gaya. unhon ne kaha, maain yahova ka geet gaunga, kyonaki vah mahapratapee tthara haai ghaedon samet savaron ko us ne samudr men dal diya haai.." 
Exodus15:2 yahova mera bal aur bhjan ka vishay haai, aur vahee mera uddhar bhee tthara haai mera ishvar vahee haai, maain usee kee stuti karoonga, maain usake liye nivasasthan banaunga, mere poorvajon ka parameshvar vahee haai, maain usako sarahoonga.." 
Exodus15:3 yahova yoddha haai usaka nam yahova haai.. 
Exodus15:4 firaun ke rathon aur sena ko us ne samudr men dal diya aur usake uttm se uttm rathee lal samudr men oob gaae.. 
Exodus15:5 gaahire jal ne unhen ddhanp liya ve patthr kee nain gaahire sthanon men oob gaae.. 
Exodus15:6 he yahova, tera dahina hath shaaktai men mahapratapee hua he yahova, tera dahina hath shatra ko chakanachoor kar deta haai.." 
Exodus15:7 aur too apane virodhaiyon ko apane mahapratap se gira deta haai too apana kop bhdkata, aur ve boose kee nain bhsm ho jate haain.." 
Exodus15:8 aur tere nathnon kee sans se jal aekatra ho gaya, dhaaraaen ddher kee nain thm gain samudr ke madhy men gahira jal jam gaya.." 
Exodus15:9 shatra ne kaha tha, maain peechha karoonga, maain ja pakaoonga, maain loott ke mal ko bantt loonga, un se mera jee bhr jaaega. maai apanee talavar kheenchate hee apane hath se unako nash kar daloonga.." 
Exodus15:10 too ne apane shvas ka pavan chalaya, tab samudr ne unako ddhanp liya ve mahajalarashai men seese kee nai oob gaae.." 
Exodus15:11 he yahova, devataon men tere tuly kaun haai? too to pavitrata ke karan mahapratapee, aur apanee stuti karane valon ke bhy ke yogy, aur ashcharya karma ka kartta haai.." 
Exodus15:12 too ne apana daahina hath baddhaya, aur prathvee ne unako nigal liya haai.." 
Exodus15:13 apanee karoona se too ne apanee chhudai hui praja kee aguvai kee haai, apane bal se too use apane pavitra nivasasthan ko le chala haai.." 
Exodus15:14 desh desh ke log sunakar kanp uttenge paalishtaiyon ke praan ke lale pad jaaenge.. 
Exodus15:15 aedom ke adhaipaati vyakul honge moab ke pahalavan thrathra uttenge sab kanan nivaasiyon ke man pighal jaaengen.. 
Exodus15:16 un men dr aur ghabarahatt sama jaega teree banh ke pratap se ve patthr kee nai abol honge, jab tak, he yahova, teree praja ke log nikal n jae, jab tak teree praja ke log jinako too ne mol liya haai par n nikal jaen.." 
Exodus15:17 too unhen pahuchakar apane nij bhagavale pahad par basaaega, yah vahee sthan haai, he yahova jise too ne apane nivas ke liye banaya, aur vahee paavitrasthan haai jise, he prabhu, too ne ap sthiar kiya haai.." 
Exodus15:18 yahova sada sarvada rajy karata rahega.. 
Exodus15:19 yah geet gane ka karan yah haai, ki firaun ke ghaede rathon aur savaron samet samudr ke beech men chale gaa, aur yahova unake upar samudr ka jal lautta le aya parantu israaelee samudr ke beech sthl hee sthl par hokar chale gaae." 
Exodus15:20 aur haroon kee bahin mariyam nam naabiya ne hath men dfa liya aur sab striayan dfa liae nachatee hui usake peechhe ho leen. 
Exodus15:21 aur maariyam unake sath yah ttek gatee gai ki:- yahova ka geet gao, kyonki vah mahapratapee tthara haai ghaedon samet savaron ko us ne samudr men dal diya haai.." 
Exodus15:22 tab moosa israaeliyon ko lal samudr se age le gaya, aur ve shoor nam jangal men aae aur jangal men jate huae teen din tak panee ka sota n mila." 
Exodus15:23 fir mara nam aek sthan par pahunche, vahan ka panee khara tha, use ve n pee sake is karan us sthan ka nam mara pada." 
Exodus15:24 tab ve yah kahakar moosa ke virooddh bakajhk karane lage, ki ham kya peeaen?" 
Exodus15:25 tab moosa ne yahova kee dohai dee, aur yahova ne use aek paudha batala diya, jise jab us ne panee men dala, tab vah panee meetta ho gaya. vaheen yahova ne unake liye aek vidhai aur niyam banaya, aur vaheen us ne yah kahakar unakee pareeksha kee," 
Exodus15:26 ki yadi too apane parameshvar yahova ka vachan tan man se sune, aur jo usakee drashtti men tteek haai vahee kare, aur usakee sab vidhaiyon ko mane, to jitane rog maain ne misriyon par bheja haai un men se aek bhee tujh par n bhejoonga kyonaki maain tumhara changa karanevala yahova hoon.." 
Exodus15:27 tab ve aeleem ko aa, jahan panee ke barah sote aur sattr khjoor ke ped the aur vahan unhon ne jal ke pas dere khde kiae.." 
Exodus16:1 fir aeleem se kooch karake israaeliyon kee saree mandlee, misr desh se nikalane ke maheene ke doosare maheene ke pandrahave din ko, seen nam jangal me, jo aeleem aur seenaai parvat ke beech men haai, a pahunchee." 
Exodus16:2 jangal men israaeliyon kee saree mandlee moosa aur haroon ke virooddh bakajhk karane lagee. 
Exodus16:3 aur israaelee un se kahane lage, ki jab ham misr desh men mans kee hanadyaien ke pas baaittkar manamana bhojan khate the, tab yaadi ham yahova ke hath se mar dale bhee jate to uttm vahee tha par tum ham ko is jangal men isaaliye nikal le aae ho ki is sare samaj ko bookhon mar dalo." 
Exodus16:4 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, dekho, maain tum logon ke liye akash se bhojan vastu barasaunga aur ye log praatidin bahar jakar pratidin ka bhojan ikattha karenge, is se maain unakee pareeksha karoonga, ki ye meree vyavastha par chalenge ki naheen." 
Exodus16:5 aur aeesa hoga ki chhttven din vah bhojan aur dinon se doona hoga, isaaliye jo kuchh ve us din battoren use taaiyar kar rakhen." 
Exodus16:6 tab moosa aur haroon ne sare israaeliyon se kaha, sanjh ko tum jan loge ki jo tum ko misr desh se nikal le aya haai vah yahova haai." 
Exodus16:7 aur bhor ko tumhen yahova ka tej dekh padega, kyonki tum jo yahova par budbudate ho use vah sunata haai. aur ham kya haai, ki tum ham par budbudate ho?" 
Exodus16:8 fir moosa ne kaha, yah tab hoga jab yahova sanjh ko tumhen khane ke liye mans aur bhor ko rottee manamane dega kyonaki tum jo us par budbudate ho use vah sunata haai. aur ham kya haain? tumhara budbudana ham par naheen yahova hee par hota haai." 
Exodus16:9 fir moosa ne haroon se kaha, israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ko agyaa de, ki yahova ke samhane varan usake sameep ave, kyonki us ne unaka budbudana suna haai." 
Exodus16:10 aur aeesa hua ki jab haroon israaeliyon kee saree mandlee se aeesee hee baten kar raha tha, ki unhon ne jangal kee or drashtti karake dekha, aur unako yahova ka tej badal men dikhlai diya." 
Exodus16:11 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus16:12 israaeliyon ka budbudana maain ne suna haai un se kah de, ki godhooli ke samay tum mans khaoge aur bhor ko tum rottee se trapt ho jaoge aur tum yah jan loge ki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Exodus16:13 aur aeesa hua ki sanjh ko batteren akar saree chhavanee par baaitt gain aur bhor ko chhavanee ke charon or os padee. 
Exodus16:14 aur jab os sookh gai to ve kya dekhte haai, ki jangal kee boomi par chhotte chhotte chhlaike chhottai men pale ke kinakon ke saman pade haain." 
Exodus16:15 yah dekhkar israaelee, jo n janate the ki yah kya vastu haai, so apas men kahane lage yah to manna haai. tab moosa ne un se kaha, yah to vahee bhojan vastu haai jise yahova tumhen khane ke liye deta haai." 
Exodus16:16 jo agyaa yahova ne dee haai vah yah haai, ki tum us men se apane apane khane ke yogy battora karana, arthata apane apane praaanaiyon kee ginatee ke anusar, praati manushy ke peechhe aek aek omer battorana jisake dere men jitane hon vah unheen bhr ke liye battora kare." 
Exodus16:17 aur israaeliyon ne vaaisa hee kiya aur kisee ne aadhaik, aur kisee ne thoda battor liya." 
Exodus16:18 aur jab unhon ne usako omer se napa, tab jisake pas adhaik tha usake kuchh adhaik n rah gaya, or jisake pas thoda tha usako kuchh ghattee n hui kyonaki aek aek manushy ne apane khane ke yogy hee battor liya tha." 
Exodus16:19 fir moosa ne un se kaha, koi is men se kuchh bihan tak n rakh chhode." 
Exodus16:20 taubhee unhon ne moosa kee bat n manee isaaliye jab kisee kisee manushy ne us men se kuchh bihan tak rakh chhoda, to us men keede pad gaae aur vah basane laga tab moosa un par krodhait hua." 
Exodus16:21 aur ve bhor ko praatidin apane apane khane ke yogy battor lete the, or jab dhoop kadee hotee thee, tab vah gal jata tha." 
Exodus16:22 aur aeesa hua ki chhttven din unhon ne doona, arthata prati manushy ke peechhe do do omer battor liya, aur mandlee ke sab pradhaanon ne akar moosa ko bata diya." 
Exodus16:23 us ne un se kaha, yah to vahee bat haai jo yahova ne kahee, kyaneki kal paramavishraam, arthata yahova ke liye paavitra vishraam hoga isaaliye tumhen jo tandoor men pakana ho use pakao, aur jo sijhana ho use sijhao, aur is men se jitana bache use bihan ke liye rakh chhodo." 
Exodus16:24 jab unhon ne usako moosa kee is agyaa ke anusar bihan tak rakh chhoda, tab n to vah basaya, aur n us men keede pade." 
Exodus16:25 tab moosa ne kaha, aj usee ko khao, kyonki aj yahova ka vishraamadin haai isaliye aj tum ko maaidan men n milega." 
Exodus16:26 chh: din to tum use battora karoge parantu satavan din to vishraam ka din haai, us men vah n milega." 
Exodus16:27 taubhee logon men se koi koi sataven din bhee battorane ke liye bahar gaa, parantu unako kuchh n mila." 
Exodus16:28 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, tum log meree agyaaon aur vyavastha ko kab tak naheen manoge?" 
Exodus16:29 dekho, yahova ne jo tum ko vishraam ka din diya haai, isee karan vah chhttven din ko do din ka bhojan tumhen deta haai isaliye tum apane apane yahan baaitte rahana, sataven din koi apane sthan se bahar n jana." 
Exodus16:30 logon ne sataven din vishraam kiya. 
Exodus16:31 aur israael ke gharanevalon ne us vastu ka nam manna rakha aur vah dhaaniya ke saman shvet tha, aur usaka svad madha ke bane huae puae ka sa tha." 
Exodus16:32 fir moosa ne kaha, yahova ne jo agyaa dee vah yah haai, ki is men se omer bhr apane vansh kee peeddhee peeddhee ke liye rakh chhodo, jisase ve janen ki yahova hamako misr desh se nikalakar jangal men kaaisee rottee khailata tha." 
Exodus16:33 tab moosa ne haroon se kaha, aek patra lekar us men omer bhr lekar use yahova ke age dhar de, ki vah tumharee peeaddhiyon ke liye rakha rahe." 
Exodus16:34 jaaisee agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee, usee ke anusar haroon ne usako sakshaee ke sandook ke age dhar diya, ki vah vaheen rakha rahe." 
Exodus16:35 israaelee jab tak base huae desh men n pahunche tab tak, arthata chalees varsha tak manna ko khate rahe ve jab tak kanan desh ke sivane par naheen pahunche tab tak manna ko khate rahe." 
Exodus16:36 aek omer to aepa ka dasavan bhag haai. 
Exodus17:1 fir israaeliyon kee saree mandlee seen nam jangal se nikal chalee, aur yahova ke agyaanusar kooch karake rapeedeem men apane dere khde kiae aur vahan un logon ko peene ka panee n mila." 
Exodus17:2 isaliye ve moosa se vadavivad karake kahane lage, ki hamen peene ka panee de. moosa ne un se kaha, tum mujh se kyon vadavivad karate ho? aur yahova kee pareeksha kyon karate ho?" 
Exodus17:3 fir vahan logon ko panee kee pyas lagee tab ve yah kahakar moosa par budbudane lage, ki too hamen ladkebalon aur pashuuon samet pyason mar dalane ke liye misr se kyon le aya haai?" 
Exodus17:4 tab moosa ne yahova kee dohai dee, aur kaha, in logon se maain kya karoon? ye sab mujhe patthravah karane ko taaiyar haain." 
Exodus17:5 yahova ne moosa se kaha, israael ke vraddh logon men se kuchh ko apane sath le le aur jis lattee se too ne neel nadee par mara tha, use apane hath men lekar logon ke age baddh chala." 
Exodus17:6 dekh maain tere age chalakar horeb pahad kee aek chattan par khda rahoonga aur too us chattan par marana, tab us men se panee nikalega jisase ye log peeaen. tab moosa ne israael ke vraddh logon ke dekhte vaaisa hee kiya." 
Exodus17:7 aur moosa ne us sthan ka nam massa aur mareeba rakha, kayonaki israaeliyon ne vahan vadaavivad kiya tha, aur yahova kee pareeksha yah kahakar kee, ki kya yahova hamare beech haai va naheen?" 
Exodus17:8 tab amalekee akar rapeedeem men israaeliyon se ladne lage. 
Exodus17:9 tab moosa ne yahoshoo se kaha, hamare liye kai aek purooshaen ko chunakar chhantt le, or bahar jakar amalekiyon se lad aur maain kal parameshvar kee lattee hath men liye huae pahadee kee chottee par khda rahoonga." 
Exodus17:10 moosa kee is agyaa ke anusar yahoshoo amalekiyon se ladne laga aur moosa, haroon, aur hoor pahadee kee chottee par chaddh gaae." 
Exodus17:11 aur jab tak moosa apana hath uttaae rahata tha tab tak to israael prabal hota tha parantu jab jab vah use neeche karata tab tab amalek prabal hota tha. 
Exodus17:12 aur jab moosa ke hath bhr gaa, tab unhon ne aek patthr lekar moosa ke neeche rakh diya, aur vah us par baaitt gaya, aur haroon aur hoor aek aek alang men usake hathon ko sambhale rahen aur usake hath sooryast tak sthiar rahe." 
Exodus17:13 aur yahoshoo ne anucharon samet amaleakiyon ko talavar ke bal se hara diya. 
Exodus17:14 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, smaranarth is bat ko pustak men likh le aur yahoshoo ko suna de, ki maain akash ke neeche se amalek ka smaran bhee pooree reeti se mitta daloonga." 
Exodus17:15 tab moosa ne aek vedee banakar usaka nam yahovanissee rakha 
Exodus17:16 aur kaha, yahova ne shapath khai haai, ki yahova amalekiyon se peeaddhiyon tak ladai karata rahega.." 
Exodus18:1 aur moosa ke sasur mian ke yajak yitrae ne yah suna, ki parameshvar ne moosa aur apanee praja israael ke liye kya kya kiya haai, arthata yah ki kis reeti se yahova israaeliyon ko misr se nikal le aya." 
Exodus18:2 tab moosa ke sasur yitrae moosa kee patnee sippora ko, jo paahile naaihar bhej dee gai thee," 
Exodus18:3 aur usake donon betton ko bhee le aya in men se aek ka nam moosa ne yah kahakar gesharem rakha tha, ki maai any desh men paradeshaee hua hoon." 
Exodus18:4 aur doosare ka nam us ne yah kahakar aeleeaejer rakha, ki mere pita ke parameshvar ne mera sahayak hokar mujhe firaun kee talavar se bachaya." 
Exodus18:5 moosa kee patnee aur putraen ko usaka sasur yitrae sang liae moosa ke pas jangal ke us sian men aya, jahan parameshvar ke parvat ke pas usaka dera pada tha." 
Exodus18:6 aur akar us ne moosa ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki maain tera sasur yitrae hoo, aur dono betton samet teree patnee ko tere pas le aya hoon." 
Exodus18:7 tab moosa apane sasur se bhentt karane ke liye nikala, aur usako dandvata karake chooma aur ve paraspar kushal kshom poochhte huae dere par a gaae." 
Exodus18:8 vahan moosa ne apane sasur se varnn kiya, ki yahova ne israaeliyon ke nimitt firaun aur misriyon se kya kya kiya, aur israaeliyon ne marga men kya kya kashtt uttaya, fir yahova unhen kaaise kaaise chhudata aya haai." 
Exodus18:9 tab yitrae ne us samast bhlai ke karan jo yahova ne israaeliyon ke sath kee thee, ki unhen misriyon ke vash se chhudaya tha, magn hokar kaha," 
Exodus18:10 dhany haai yahova, jis ne tum ko firaun aur misriyon ke vash se chhudaya, jis ne tum logon ko misriyon kee mutthee men se chhudaya haai." 
Exodus18:11 ab maain ne jan liya haai ki yahova sab devataon se bada haai varan us vishay men bhee jis men unhon ne israaeliyon se aabhaiman kiya tha. 
Exodus18:12 tab moosa ke sasur yitrae ne parameshvar ke liye homabaali aur melabali chaddhaa, aur haroon israaeliyon ke sab puraniyon samet moosa ke sasur yitrae ke sang parameshvar ke age bhojan karane ko aya." 
Exodus18:13 doosare din moosa logon ka nyay karane ko baaitta, aur bhor se sanjh tak log moosa ke asapas khde rahe." 
Exodus18:14 yah dekhkar ki moosa logon ke liye kya kya karata haai, usake sasur ne kaha, yah kya kam haai jo too logon ke liye karata haai? kya karan haai ki too akela baaitta rahata haai, aur log bhor se sanjh tak tere asapas khde rahate haain?" 
Exodus18:15 moosa ne apane sasur se kaha, isaka karan yah haai ki log mere pas parameshvar se poochhne ate haai." 
Exodus18:16 jab jab unaka koi mukama hota haai tab tab ve mere pas ate haain aur maain unake beech nyay karata, aur parameshvar kee vidhai aur vyavastha unhen jatata hoon." 
Exodus18:17 moosa ke sasur ne us se kaha, jo kam too karata haai vah achchha naheen." 
Exodus18:18 aur is se too kya, varan ye log bhee jo tere sang haain nishchay har jaaenge, kyonki yah kam tere liye bahut bharee haai too ise akela naheen kar sakata." 
Exodus18:19 isaliye ab meree sun le, maain tujh ko sammaati deta hoo, aur parameshvar tere sang rahe. too to in logon ke liye parameshvar ke sammukh jaya kar, aur inake mukamon ko parameshvar ke pas too pahuncha diya kara." 
Exodus18:20 inhen vidhai aur vyavastha pragatt kar karake, jis marga par inhen chalana, aur jo jo kam inhen karana ho, vah inako jata diya kara." 
Exodus18:21 fir too in sab logon men se aeese purooshaen ko chhantt le, jo gunee, aur parameshvar ka bhy manane vale, sachche, aur anyay ke labh se gharana karane vale hon aur unako hajara-hajar, sau-sau, pachasa-pachas, aur dasa-das manushyon par pradhaan niyukt kar de." 
Exodus18:22 aur ve sab samay in logon ka nyay kiya karen aur sab bade bade mukamon ko to tere pas le aya kare, aur chhotte chhotte mukamon ka nyay ap hee kiya karen tab tera bojh halaka hoga, kyonaki is bojh ko ve bhee tere sath uttaaenge." 
Exodus18:23 yaadi too yah upay kare, aur parameshvar tujh ko aeesee agyaa de, to too tthar sakega, aur ye sab log apane sthan ko kushal se pahunch sakengen." 
Exodus18:24 apane sasur kee yah bat man kar moosa ne usake sab vachanon ke anusar kiya. 
Exodus18:25 so us ne sab israaeliyon meen se gunee-gunee puroosh chunakar unhen hajara-hajar, sau-sau, pachasa-pachas, dasa-das, logon ke upar pradhaan ttharaya." 
Exodus18:26 aur ve sab logon ka nyay karane lage jo mukama kaattnai hota use to ve moosa ke pas le ate the, aur sab chhotte mukamon ka nyay ve ap hee kiya karate the." 
Exodus18:27 aur moosa ne apane sasur ko vida kiya, aur us ne apane desh ka marga liya.." 
Exodus19:1 israaeliyon ko misr desh se nikale huae jis din teen maheene beet chuke, usee din ve seenaai ke jangal men aae." 
Exodus19:2 aur jab ve rapeedeem se kooch karake seenaai ke jangal men aa, tab unhon ne jangal men dere khde kiae aur vaheen parvat ke age israaeliyon ne chhavanee dalee." 
Exodus19:3 tab moosa parvat par parameshvar ke pas chaddh gaya, aur yahova ne parvat par se usako pukarakar kaha, yakoob ke gharane se aeesa kah, aur israaeliyon ko mera yah vachan suna," 
Exodus19:4 ki tum ne dekha haai ki maai ne misriyon se kya kya kiya tum ko mano ukab pakshaee ke pankhon par chaddhakar apane pas le aya hoon. 
Exodus19:5 isaliye ab yaadi tum nishchay meree manoge, aur meree vacha ka palan karoge, to sab logon men se tum hee mera nij dhan ttharoge samast prathvee to meree haai." 
Exodus19:6 aur tum meree drashtti men yajakon ka rajy aur paavitra jaati ttharoge. jo baten tujhe israaeliyon se kahanee haain ve ye hee haai. 
Exodus19:7 tab moosa ne akar logon ke puraniyon ko bulavaya, aur ye sab bate, jinake kahane kee agyaa yahova ne use dee thee, unako samajha deen." 
Exodus19:8 aur sab log milakar bol utte, jo kuchh yahova ne kaha haai vah sab ham nit karenge. logon kee yah baten moosa ne yahova ko sunain." 
Exodus19:9 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, sun, maain badal ke andhaiyare men hokar tere pas ata hoo, isaaliye ki jab maain tujh se baten karoon tab ve log sune, aur sada teree prateeati karen. aur moosa ne yahova se logon kee baton ka varnn kiya." 
Exodus19:10 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, logon ke pas ja aur unhen aj aur kal paavitra karana, aur ve apane vasr dhae le," 
Exodus19:11 aur ve teesare din tak taaiyar ho rahen kyonki teesare din yahova sab logon ke dekhte seenaai parvat par utar aaega. 
Exodus19:12 aur too logon ke liye charon or bada bandha dena, aur un se kahana, ki tum sachet rahon ki parvat par n chaddho aur usake sivane ko bhee n chooo aur jo koi pahad ko chooae vah nishchay mar dala jaae." 
Exodus19:13 usako koi hath se to n chooa, parantu vah nishchay patthravah kiya jaa, va teer se chheda jae chahe pashu ho chahe manushy, vah jeevit n bache. jab mahashabd vale naraasinge ka shabd der tak sunai de, tab log parvat ke pas aen." 
Exodus19:14 tab moosa ne parvat par se utarakar logon ke pas akar unako paavitra karaya aur unhon ne apane vasr dhae liae. 
Exodus19:15 aur us ne logon se kaha, teesare din tak taaiyar ho raho sree ke pas n jana." 
Exodus19:16 jab teesara din aya tab bhor hote badal garajane aur bijalee chamakane lagee, aur parvat par kalee ghatta chha gai, fir naraasinge ka shabd bada bhree hua, aur chhavanee men jitane log the sab kanp utte." 
Exodus19:17 tab moosa logon ko parameshvar se bhentt karane ke liye chhavanee se nikal le gaya aur ve parvat ke neeche khde hue. 
Exodus19:18 aur yahova jo ag men hokar seenaai parvat par utara tha, is karan samast parvat dhauen se bhr gaya aur usaka dhauan bhtte ka sa utt raha tha, aur samast parvat bahut kanp raha tha" 
Exodus19:19 fir jab naraasinge ka shabd baddhta aur bahut bharee hota gaya, tab moosa bola, aur parameshvar ne vanee sunakar usako uttr diya." 
Exodus19:20 aur yahova seenaai parvat kee chottee par utara aur moosa ko parvat kee chottee par bulaya aur moosa upar chaddh gaya. 
Exodus19:21 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, neeche utarake logon ko chitavanee de, kaheen aeesa n ho ki ve bada todke yahova ke pas dekhne ko ghause, aur un men se bahut nash hon jaaen." 
Exodus19:22 aur yajak jo yahova ke sameep aya karate haain ve bhee apane ko paavitra kare, kaheen aeesa n ho ki yahova un par toott pade." 
Exodus19:23 moosa ne yahova se kaha, ve log seenaai parvat par naheen chaddh sakate too ne to ap ham ko yah kahakar chitaya, ki parvat ke charon aur bada bandhakar use pavitra rakho." 
Exodus19:24 yahova ne us se kaha, utar to ja, aur haroon samet upar a parantu yajak aur sadhaaran log kaheen yahova ke pas bada todke n chaddh aae, kaheen aeesa n ho ki vah un par toott pade." 
Exodus19:25 ye hee baten moosa ne logon ke pas utarake unako sunain.. 
Exodus20:1 tab parameshvar ne ye sab vachan kahe," 
Exodus20:2 ki maai tera parameshvar yahova hoo, jo tujhe dasatv ke ghar arthata misr desh se nikal laya haai.." 
Exodus20:3 too mujhe chhod doosaron ko ishvar karake n manana.. 
Exodus20:4 too apane liye koi moorti khodakar n banana, n kisee ki pratima banana, jo akash me, va prathvee par, va prathvee ke jal men haai." 
Exodus20:5 too unako dandvata n karana, aur n unakee upasana karana kyonki maai tera parameshvar yahova jalan rakhne vala ishvar hoo, aur jo mujh se baair rakhte haai, unake betto, poto, aur parapoton ko bhee pitaron ka dand diya karata hoo," 
Exodus20:6 aur jo mujh se praem rakhte aur meree agyaaon ko manate haai, un hajaron par karoona kiya karata hoon.." 
Exodus20:7 too apane parameshvar ka nam vyarth n lena kyonaki jo yahova ka nam vyarth le vah usako nirdosh n ttharaaega.. 
Exodus20:8 too vishraamadin ko pavitra manane ke liye smaran rakhna. 
Exodus20:9 chh: din to too parishram karake apana sab kam kaj karana 
Exodus20:10 parantu satavan din tere parameshvar yahova ke liye vishraamadin haai. us men n to too kisee bhanti ka kam kaj karana, aur n tera betta, n teree bettee, n tera das, n teree dasee, n tere pashu, n koi paradeshaee jo tere faattkon ke bheetar ho." 
Exodus20:11 kyonaki chh: din men yahova ne akasha, aur prathvee, aur samudra, aur jo kuchh un men haai, sab ko banaya, aur sataven din vishraam kiya is karan yahova ne vishraamadin ko ashaeesh dee aur usako paavitra ttharaya.." 
Exodus20:12 too apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana, jis se jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai us men too bahut din tak rahane paae.." 
Exodus20:13 too koon n karana.. 
Exodus20:14 too vyabhaichar n karana.. 
Exodus20:15 too choree n karana.. 
Exodus20:16 too kisee ke virooddh joottee sakshaee n dena..
