Exodus20:17 too kisee ke ghar ka lalach n karana n to kisee kee sree ka lalach karana, aur n kisee ke dasa-dasee, va baail gadahe ka, n kisee kee kisee vastu ka lalach karana.." 
Exodus20:18 aur sab log garajane aur bijalee aur naraasinge ke shabd sunate, aur dhauan uttte huae parvat ko dekhte rahe, aur dekhke, kanpakar door khde ho gaae" 
Exodus20:19 aur ve moosa se kahane lage, too hee ham se baten kar, tab to ham sun sakenge parantu parameshvar ham se baten n kare, aeesa n ho ki ham mar jaaen." 
Exodus20:20 moosa ne logon se kaha, dro mata kyonaki parameshvar is nimitt aya haai ki tumharee pareeksha kare, aur usaka bhy tumhare man men bana rahe, ki tum pap n karo." 
Exodus20:21 aur ve log to door hee khde rahe, parantu moosa us ghaer andhakar ke sameep gaya jahan parameshvar tha.." 
Exodus20:22 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, too israaeliyon ko mere ye vachan suna, ki tum logon ne to ap hee dekha haai ki maai ne tumhare sath akash se baten kee haain." 
Exodus20:23 tum mere sath kisee ko saammailit n karana, arthata apane liye chandee va sone se devataon ko n gaddh lena." 
Exodus20:24 mere liye mittee kee aek vedee banana, aur apanee bhed-bakaariyon aur gaya-baailon ke homabali aur melabali ko us par chaddhana jahan jahan maain apane nam ka smaran karaun vahan vahan maain akar tumhen ashaeesh doonga." 
Exodus20:25 aur yaadi tum mere liye patthron kee vedee banao, to tarasho huae patthron se n banana kyonki jahan tum ne us par apana haathaiyar lagaya vahan too use ashuuddh kar dega." 
Exodus20:26 aur meree vedee par seeddhee se kabhee n chaddhna, kaheen aeesa n ho ki tera tan us par nanga dekh pade.." 
Exodus21:1 fir jo niyam tujhe unako samajhane haain ve ye haain.. 
Exodus21:2 jab tum koi ibraee das mol lo, tab vah chh: varsha tak seva karata rahe, aur sataven varsha svatantra hokar sentament chala jaae." 
Exodus21:3 yaadi vah akela aya ho, to akela hee chala jaae aur yadi patnee sahit aya ho, to usake sath usakee patnee bhee chalee jaae." 
Exodus21:4 yaadi usake svamee ne usako patnee dee ho aur us se usake bette va beattyaian utpann hui ho, to usakee patnee aur balak usake svamee ke hee rahe, aur vah akela chala jaae." 
Exodus21:5 parantu yadi vah das draddhta se kahe, ki maain apane svamee, aur apanee patnee, aur balakon se praem rakhta hoon isaaliye maain svatantra hokar n chala jaunga" 
Exodus21:6 to usaka svamee usako parameshvar ke pas le chale fir usako dar ke kivad va bajoo ke pas le jakar usake kan men sutaree se chhed karen tab vah sada usakee seva karata rahe.. 
Exodus21:7 yaadi koi apanee bettee ko dasee hone ke liye bech dale, to vah dasee kee nai bahar n jaae." 
Exodus21:8 yaadi usaka svamee usako apanee patnee banaa, aur fir us se prasann n rahe, to vah use dam se chhudai jane de usaka vishvasaghaat karane ke bad use uparee logon ke hath bechane ka usako aadhaikar n hoga." 
Exodus21:9 aur yaadi us ne use apane bette ko byah diya ho, to us se bettee ka sa vyavahar kare." 
Exodus21:10 chahe vah doosaree patnee kar le, taubhee vah usaka bhojan, vasr, aur sangaati n ghattaae." 
Exodus21:11 aur yaadi vah in teen baton men ghattee kare, to vah sree sentament bina dam chukaae hee chalee jaae.." 
Exodus21:12 jo kisee manushy ko aeesa mare ki vah mar jaa, to vah bhee nishchay mar dala jaae." 
Exodus21:13 yaadi vah usakee ghaat men n baaitta ho, aur parameshvar kee ichchha hee se vah usake hath men pad gaya ho, to aeese maranevale ke bhagane ke nimitt maain aek sthan ttharaunga jahan vah bhag jaae." 
Exodus21:14 parantu yadi koi ddhttiai se kisee par chaddhai karake use chhl se ghaat kare, to usako mar ddhalane ke liye meree vedee ke pas se bhee alag le jana.." 
Exodus21:15 jo apane pita va mata ko mare-peette vah nishchay mar dala jaae.. 
Exodus21:16 jo kisee manushy ko churaa, chahe use le jakar bech dale, chahe vah usake pas paya jaa, to vah bhee nishchay mar dala jaae.." 
Exodus21:17 jo apane pita va mata ko shraap de vah bhee nishchay mar dala jaae.. 
Exodus21:18 yaadi manushy jhgadte ho, aur aek doosare ko patthr va mukke se aeesa mare ki vah mare naheen parantu bichhaune par pada rahe," 
Exodus21:19 to jab vah uttkar lattee ke sahare se bahar chalane firane lage, tab vah maranevala nirdosh tthare us dasha men vah usake pade rahane ke samay kee haani to bhr de, or usako bhla changa bhee kara de.." 
Exodus21:20 yaadi koi apane das va dasee ko sontte se aeesa mare ki vah usake marane se mar jaa, tab to usako nishchay dand diya jaae." 
Exodus21:21 parantu yadi vah do aek din jeevit rahe, to usake svamee ko dand n diya jaae kyonaki vah das usaka dhan haai.." 
Exodus21:22 yaadi manushy apas men marapeett karake kisee gaabhairnee sree ko aeesee chott pahuchaa, ki usaka garbh gir jaa, parantu aur kuchh haani n ho, to maranevale se utana dand liya jaae jitana us sree ka pati panch kee sammaati se ttharaae." 
Exodus21:23 parantu yadi usako aur kuchh hani pahunche, to praan kee santee praan ka," 
Exodus21:24 aur ankh kee santee ankh ka, aur dant kee santee dant ka, aur hath kee santee hath ka, aur panv kee santee panv ka," 
Exodus21:25 aur dag kee santee dag ka, aur ghaav kee santee ghaav ka, aur mar kee santee mar ka dand ho.." 
Exodus21:26 jab koi apane das va dasee kee ankh par aeesa mare ki foott jaa, to vah usakee ankh kee santee use svatantra karake jane de." 
Exodus21:27 aur yaadi vah apane das va dasee ko marake usaka dant tod dale, to vah usake dant kee santee use svatantra karake jane de.." 
Exodus21:28 yaadi baail kisee puroosh va sree ko aeesa seeng mare ki vah mar jaa, to vah baail to nishchay patthravah karake mar dala jaa, aur usaka mans khaya n jaae parantu baail ka svamee nirdosh tthare." 
Exodus21:29 parantu yadi us baail kee paahile se seeng marane kee ban padee ho, aur usake svamee ne jataae jane par bhee usako n bandha rakha ho, aur vah kisee puroosh va sree ko mar dale, tab to vah baail patthravah kiya jaa, aur usaka svamee bhee mar dala jaae." 
Exodus21:30 yaadi us par chhudautee ttharai jaa, to praan chhudane ko jo kuchh usake liye ttharaya jaae use utana hee dena padega." 
Exodus21:31 chahe baail ne kisee bette ko, chahe bettee ko mara ho, taubhee isee niyam ke anusar usake svamee ke sath vyavahar kiya jaae." 
Exodus21:32 yaadi baail ne kisee das va dasee ko seeng mara ho, to baail ka svamee us das ke svamee ko tees shokel roopa de, aur vah baail patthravah kiya jaae.." 
Exodus21:33 yaadi koi manushy gadha kholakar va khodakar usako n ddhanpe, aur us men kisee ka baail va gadaha gir pade" 
Exodus21:34 to jisaka vah gadha ho vah us haani ko bhr de vah pashu ke svamee ko usaka mol de, aur loth gadhevale kee tthare.." 
Exodus21:35 yaadi kisee ka baail kisee doosare ke baail ko aeesee chott lagaa, ki vah mar jaa, to ve dono manushy jeete baail ko bechakar usaka mol apas men adha adha bantt le aur loth ko bhee vaaisa hee bantten." 
Exodus21:36 yaadi yah pragatt ho ki us baail kee paahile se seeng marane kee ban padee thee, par usake svamee ne use bandha naheen rakha, to nishchay yah baail kee santee baail bhr de, par loth usee kee tthare.." 
Exodus22:1 yaadi koi manushy baail, va bhed, va bakaree churakar usaka ghaat kare va bech dale, to vah baail kee santee pach baail, aur bhed-bakaree kee santee char bhed-bakaree bhr de." 
Exodus22:2 yaadi chor sendha lagate huae pakada jaa, aur us par aeesee mar pade ki vah mar jaa, to usake koon ka dosh n lage" 
Exodus22:3 yaadi soorya nikal chuke, to usake koon ka dosh lage avashy haai ki vah hani ko bhr de, aur yadi usake pas kuchh n ho, to vah choree ke karan bech diya jaae." 
Exodus22:4 yaadi churaya hua baail, va gadaha, va bhed va bakaree usake hath men jeevit pai jaa, to vah usaka doona bhr de.." 
Exodus22:5 yaadi koi apane pashu se kisee ka khet va dakh kee baree charaa, arthata apane pashu ko aeesa chhod de ki vah paraae khet ko char le, to vah apane khet kee aur apanee dakh kee baree kee uttm se uttm upaj men se us hani ko bhr de.." 
Exodus22:6 yaadi koi ag jalaa, aur vah kantton men lag jaae aur foolon ke ddher va anaj va khda khet jal jaa, to jis ne ag jalai ho vah hani ko nishchay bhr de.." 
Exodus22:7 yaadi koi doosare ko roopaae va samagraee kee dharohar dhare, aur vah usake ghar se churai jaa, to yadi chor pakada jaa, to doona usee ko bhr dena padega." 
Exodus22:8 aur yaadi chor n pakada jaa, to ghar ka svamee parameshvar ke pas laya jaa, ki nishchay ho jay ki us ne apane bhai bandha kee sampaati par hath lagaya haai va naheen." 
Exodus22:9 chahe baail, chahe gadahe, chahe bhed va bakaree, chahe vasr, chahe kisee prakar kee aeesee khoi hui vastu ke vishay aparadha kyon n lagaya jay, jise do jan apanee apanee kahate ho, to donon ka mukama parameshvar ke pas aae aur jisako parameshvar doshaee ttharaae vah doosare ko doona bhr de.." 
Exodus22:10 yaadi koi doosare ko gadaha va baail va bhed-bakaree va koi aur pashu rakhne ke liye saupe, aur kisee ke bina dekhe vah mar jaa, va chott khaa, va hank diya jaa," 
Exodus22:11 to un dono ke beech yahova kee shapath khailai jaae ki maain ne isakee sampaati par hath naheen lagaya tab sampaati ka svamee isako sach mane, aur doosare ko use kuchh bhee bhr dena n hoga." 
Exodus22:12 yaadi vah sachamuch usake yahan se churaya gaya ho, to vah usake svamee ko use bhr de." 
Exodus22:13 aur yaadi vah faad dala gaya ho, to vah faade huae ko praman ke liye le aa, tab use usako bhee bhr dena n padega.." 
Exodus22:14 fir yadi koi doosare se pashu mang laa, aur usake svamee ke sang n rahate usako chott lage va vah mar jaa, to vah nishchay usakee hani bhr de." 
Exodus22:15 yaadi usaka svamee sang ho, to doosare ko usakee hani bhrana n pade aur yaadi vah bhade ka ho to usakee hani usake bhade men a gai.." 
Exodus22:16 yaadi koi puroosh kisee kanya ko jisake byah kee bat n lagee ho fausalakar usake sang kukarma kare, to vah nishchay usaka mol deke use byah le." 
Exodus22:17 parantu yadi usaka pita use dene ko bilkul inakar kare, to kukarma karanevala kanyaon ke mol kee reeti ke anusar roopaye taul de.." 
Exodus22:18 too dain ko jeevit rahane n dena.. 
Exodus22:19 jo koi pashuugaman kare vah nishchay mar dala jaae.. 
Exodus22:20 jo koi yahova ko chhod kisee aur devata ke liye baali kare vah satyanash kiya jaae. 
Exodus22:21 aur paradeshaee ko n satana aur n us par andhor karana kyonki misr desh men tum bhee paradeshaee the. 
Exodus22:22 kisee vidhava va anath balak ko du:kh n dena. 
Exodus22:23 yaadi tum aeeson ko kisee prakar ka du:kh do, aur ve kuchh bhee meree dohai de, to maain nishchay unakee dohai sunoonga" 
Exodus22:24 tab mera krodha bhdkega, aur maain tum ko talavar se maravaunga, aur tumharee paatnaiyan vidhava aur tumhare balak anath ho jaaenge.." 
Exodus22:25 yaadi too meree praja men se kisee deen ko jo tere pas rahata ho roopaae ka ren de, to us se mahajan kee nai byaj n lena." 
Exodus22:26 yaadi too kabhee apane bhaibandha ke vasr ko bandhak karake rakh bhee le, to soorya ke ast hone tak usako lautta dena" 
Exodus22:27 kyonaki vah usaka aek hee oddhna haai, usakee deh ka vahee akela vasr hoga fir vah kise oddhkar soaega? tobhee jab vah meree dohai dega tab maain usakee sunoonga, kyonaki maain to karoonamay hoon.." 
Exodus22:28 parameshvar ko shraap n dena, aur n apane logon ke pradhaan ko shraap dena." 
Exodus22:29 apane kheton kee upaj aur falon ke ras men se kuchh mujhe dene men vilamb n karana. apane betton men se pahilautte ko mujhe dena. 
Exodus22:30 vaaise hee apanee gayon aur bhed-bakaariyon ke paahilautte bhee dena sat din tak to bachcha apanee mata ke sang rahe, aur attven din too use mujhe de dena." 
Exodus22:31 aur tum mere liye paavitra manushy banana is karan jo pashu maaidan men faada hua pada mile usaka mans n khana, usako kuton ke age faenk dena.." 
Exodus23:1 joottee bat n faailana. anyayee sakshaee hokar dushtt ka sath n dena. 
Exodus23:2 burai karane ke liye n to bahuton ke peechhe ho lena aur n unake peechhe firake mukamen men nyay bigadne ko sakshaee dena 
Exodus23:3 aur kangal ke mukamen men usaka bhee paksha n karana.. 
Exodus23:4 yaadi tere shatra ka baail va gadaha bhttkata hua tujhe mile, to use usake pas avashy faer le ana." 
Exodus23:5 fir yadi too apane baairee ke gadahe ko bojh ke mare daba hua dekhe, to chahe usako usake svamee ke liye chhudane ke liye tera man n chahe, taubhee avashy svamee ka sath dekar use chhuda lena.." 
Exodus23:6 tere logon men se jo daaridra hon usake mukame men nyay n bigadna. 
Exodus23:7 jootte mukame se door rahana, aur nirdosh aur dharmee ko ghaat n karana, kyonki maain dushtt ko nirdosh n ttharaunga." 
Exodus23:8 ghoos n lena, kyonaki ghoos dekhne valon ko bhee andha kar deta, aur dharmiyon kee baten palatt deta haai." 
Exodus23:9 paradeshaee par andhor n karana tum to paradeshaee ke man kee baten janate ho, kyonaki tum bhee misr desh men paradeshaee the.." 
Exodus23:10 chh: varsha to apanee boomi men bona aur usakee upaj ikatthee karana 
Exodus23:11 parantu sataven varsha men usako padtee rahane dena aur vaaisa hee chhod dena, to tere bhai bandhauon men ke daridra log us se khane paae, aur jo kuchh un se bhee bache vah banaaile pashuuon ke khane ke kam men aae. aur apanee dakh aur jalapai kee baariyon ko bhee aeese hee karana." 
Exodus23:12 chh: din tak to apana kam kaj karana, aur sataven din vishraam karana ki tere baail aur gadahe sustaae, aur teree daasiyon ke bette aur paradeshaee bhee apana jee ttnda kar saken." 
Exodus23:13 aur jo kuchh maain ne tum se kaha haai us men savadhaan rahana aur doosare devataon ke nam kee charcha n karana, varan ve tumhare munh se sunai bhee n den." 
Exodus23:14 praati varsha teen bar mere liye pabrba manana. 
Exodus23:15 akhmeeree rottee ka pabrba manana us men meree agyaa ke anusar abeeb maheene ke niyat samay par sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khaya karana, kyonaki usee maheene men tum misr se nikal aae. aur mujh ko koi choochhe hath apana munh n dikhaae." 
Exodus23:16 aur jab teree boi hui khetee kee paahilee upaj taaiyar ho, tab kattnee ka pabrba manana. aur varsha ke ant men jab too parishram ke fal battor ke ddher lagaa, tab battoran ka pabrba manana." 
Exodus23:17 praati varsha teenon bar tere sab puroosh prabhu yahova ko apana munh dikhaaen.. 
Exodus23:18 mere balipashu ka lohoo khmeeree rottee ke sang n chaddhana, aur n mere pabrba ke uttm balidan men se kuchh bihan tak rahane dena." 
Exodus23:19 apanee boomi kee pahilee upaj ka pahila bhag apane parameshvar yahova ke bhvan men le ana. bakaree ka bachcha usakee mata ke doodha men n pakana.. 
Exodus23:20 sun, maain aek doot tere age age bhejata hoon jo marga men teree raksha karega, aur jis sthan ko maai ne taaiyar kiya haai us men tujhe pahunchaaega." 
Exodus23:21 usake samhane savadhaan rahana, aur usakee manana, usaka virodha n karana, kyonaki vah tumhara aparadha kshama n karega isaaliye ki us men mera nam rahata haai." 
Exodus23:22 aur yaadi too sachamuch usakee mane aur jo kuchh maain kahoon vah kare, to maai tere shatrauon ka shatra aur tere draehiyon ka draehee banoonga." 
Exodus23:23 is reeati mera doot tere age age chalakar tujhe aemoree, hittee, parajjee, kananee, hibbee, aur yaboosee logon ke yahan pahunchaaega, aur maain unako satyanash kar daloonga." 
Exodus23:24 unake devataon ko dandvata n karana, aur n unakee upasana karana, aur n unake se kam karana, varan un mooraton ko pooree reeti se satyanash kar dalana, aur un logon kee latton ke ttukade ttukade kar dena." 
Exodus23:25 aur tum apane parameshvar yahova kee upasana karana, tab vah tere ann jal par ashaeesh dega, aur tere beech men se rog door karega." 
Exodus23:26 tere desh men n to kisee ka garbh girega aur n koi banjh hogee aur teree ayu maain pooree karoonga. 
Exodus23:27 jitane logon ke beech too jayega un sabhon ke man men maai apana bhy pahile se aeesa samava doonga ki unako vyakul kar doonga, aur maain tujhe sab shatrauon kee peett dikhaunga." 
Exodus23:28 aur maain tujh se pahile barorn ko bhejoonga jo hibbee, kananee, aur hittee logon ko tere samhane se bhga ke door kar dengee." 
Exodus23:29 maain unako tere age se aek hee varsha men to n nikal doonga, aeesa n ho ki desh ujad ho jaa, aur banaaile pashu baddhkar tujhe du:kh dene lagen." 
Exodus23:30 jab tak too fool falakar desh ko apane aadhaikar men n kar le tab tak maain unhen tere age se thoda thoda karake nikalata rahoonga. 
Exodus23:31 maain lal samudra se lekar paalishtaiyon ke samudra tak aur jangal se lekar mahanad tak ke desh ko tere vash men kar doonga maain us desh ke nivaasiyon ko bhee tere vash men kar doonga, aur too unhen apane samhane se barabas nikalega." 
Exodus23:32 too n to un se vacha bandhana aur n unake devataon se. 
Exodus23:33 ve tere desh men rahane n paae, aeesa n ho ki ve tujh se mere virooddh pap karaaen kyonaki yadi too unake devataon kee upasana kare, to yah tere liye fanda banega.." 
Exodus24:1 fir us ne moosa se kaha, to, haroon, nadab, abeeho, aur israaeliyon ke sattr puraaniyon samet yahova ke pas upar akar door se dandvata karana." 
Exodus24:2 aur keval moosa yahova ke sameep aae parantu ve sameep n aae, aur doosare log usake sang upar n aaen." 
Exodus24:3 tab moosa ne logon ke pas jakar yahova kee sab baten aur sab niyam suna diae tab sab log aek svar se bol utte, ki jitanee baten yahova ne kahee haain un sab baton ko ham manenge." 
Exodus24:4 tab moosa ne yahova ke sab vachan likh diae. aur bihan ko savere uttkar parvat ke neeche aek vedee aur israael ke barahon gotraen ke anusar barah khmbhe bhee banavaae. 
Exodus24:5 tab us ne kai israaelee javanon ko bheja, jinhon ne yahova ke liye homabaali aur baailon ke melabali chaddhaae." 
Exodus24:6 aur moosa ne adha lohoo to lekar kattaron men rakha, aur adha vedee par chhdik diya." 
Exodus24:7 tab vacha kee pustak ko lekar logon ko paddh sunaya use sunakar unhon ne kaha, jo kuchh yahova ne kaha haai us sab ko ham karenge, aur usakee agyaa manenge." 
Exodus24:8 tab moosa ne lohoo ko lekar logon par chhdik diya, aur un se kaha, dekho, yah us vacha ka lohoo haai jise yahova ne in sab vachanon par tumhare sath bandhaee haai." 
Exodus24:9 tab moosa, haroon, nadab, abeehoo aur israaeliyon ke sattr puraaniae upar gaa," 
Exodus24:10 aur israael ke parameshvar ka darshan kiya aur usake charanon ke tale neelamanai ka chabootara sa kuchh tha, jo akash ke tuly hee svachchh tha." 
Exodus24:11 aur us ne israaeliyon ke pradhaanon par hath n baddhaya tab unhon ne parameshvar ka darshan kiya, aur khaya piya.." 
Exodus24:12 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, pahad par mere pas chaddh, aur vahan raha aur maai tujhe patthr kee paattyaiaae, aur apanee likhee hui vyavastha aur agyaa doonga, ki too unako sikhaae." 
Exodus24:13 tab moosa yahoshoo nam apane tthaluae samet parameshvar ke parvat par chaddh gaya. 
Exodus24:14 ki jab tak ham tumhare pas fir n aaen tab tak tum yaheen hamaree batt johate raho aur suno, haroon aur hoor tumhare sang haain to yaadi kisee ka mukama ho to unheen ke pas jaae." 
Exodus24:15 tab moosa parvat par chaddh gaya, aur badal ne parvat ko chha liya." 
Exodus24:16 tab yahova ke tej ne seenaai parvat par nivas kiya, aur vah badal us par chh: din tak chhaya raha aur sataven din us ne moosa ko badal ke beech men se pukara." 
Exodus24:17 aur israaeliyon kee draashtti men yahova ka tej parvat kee chottee par prachand ag sa dekh padta tha. 
Exodus24:18 tab moosa badal ke beech men pravesh karake parvat par chaddh gaya. aur moosa parvat par chalees din aur chalees rat raha.. 
Exodus25:1 yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus25:2 israaeliyon se yah kahana, ki mere liye bhentt laaen jitane apanee ichchha se dena chahen unheen sabhon se meree bhentt lena." 
Exodus25:3 aur jin vastuon kee bhentt un se lenee haain ve ye haain arthata sona, chandee, peetal," 
Exodus25:4 neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ka kapada, sooksham sanee ka kapada, bakaree ka bal," 
Exodus25:5 lal rang se rangee hui meddhon kee khale, suison kee khale, babool kee lakadee," 
Exodus25:6 ujiyale ke liye tel, abhaishok ke tel ke liye aur sugandhiat dhoop ke liye sugandha dravy," 
Exodus25:7 aepod aur chaparas ke liye sulaaimanee patthr, aur jadne ke liye maanai." 
Exodus25:8 aur ve mere liye aek paavitrasthan banaa, ki maain unake beech nivas karoon." 
Exodus25:9 jo kuchh maain tujhe dikhata hoo, arthata nivasasthan aur usake sab saman ka namoona, usee ke anusar tum log use banana.." 
Exodus25:10 babool kee lakadee ka aek sandook banaya jaae usakee lambai addhai hat, aur chaudai aur unchai deddh deddh hath kee hon." 
Exodus25:11 aur usako chokhe sone se bheetar aur bahar maddhvana, aur sandook ke upar charon or sone kee bad banavana." 
Exodus25:12 aur sone ke char kade ddhlavakar usake charon payon par, aek alang do kade aur doosaree alang bhee do kade lagavana." 
Exodus25:13 fir babool kee lakadee ke dnde banavana, aur unhe bhee sone se maddhvana." 
Exodus25:14 aur dndon ko sandook kee donon alangon ke kadon men dalana jis se unake bal sandook uttaya jaae. 
Exodus25:15 ve dnde sandook ke kadon men lage rahen aur us se alag n kiae jaaen. 
Exodus25:16 aur jo sakshaeepatra maain tujhe doonga use usee sandook men rakhna. 
Exodus25:17 fir chokhe sone ka aek praayashchaitt ka ddhkana banavana usakee lambai addhai hat, aur chaudai deddh hath kee ho." 
Exodus25:18 aur sona ddhalakar do karoob banavakar praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ke donon siron par lagavana. 
Exodus25:19 aek karoob to aek sire par aur doosara karoob doosare sire par lagavana aur karoobon ko aur praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ko usake hee ttukade se banakar usake dono siron par lagavana. 
Exodus25:20 aur un karoobon ke pankh upar se aeese faaile huae banen ki praayashchaitt ka ddhkana un se ddhnpa rahe, aur unake mukh amhane-samhane aur praayaashchaitt ke ddhkane kee or rahen." 
Exodus25:21 aur praayaashchaitt ke ddhkane ko sandook ke upar lagavana aur jo sakshaeepatra maain tujhe doonga use sandook ke bheetar rakhna. 
Exodus25:22 aur maain usake upar rahakar tujh se mila karoonga aur israaeliyon ke liye jitanee agyaaaen mujh ko tujhe denee hongee, un sabhon ke vishay maain praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ke upar se aur un karoobon ke beech men se, jo sakshaeepatra ke sandook par honge, tujh se vartalap kiya karoonga.." 
Exodus25:23 fir babool kee lakadee kee aek mej banavana usakee lambai do hat, chaudai aek hat, aur unchai deddh hath kee ho." 
Exodus25:24 use chokhe sone se maddhvana, aur usake charon or sone kee ek bad banavana." 
Exodus25:25 aur usake charon or char angul chaudee aek pattree banavana, aur is pattree ke charon or sone kee aek bad banavana." 
Exodus25:26 aur sone ke char kade banavakar mej ke un charon konon men lagavana jo usake charon payon men honge. 
Exodus25:27 ve kade pattree ke pas hee ho, aur dndon ke gharon ka kam den ki menja unheen ke bal uttai jaae." 
Exodus25:28 aur dndon ko babool kee lakadee ke banavakar sone se maddhvana, aur meja unheen se uttai jaae." 
Exodus25:29 aur usake parat aur dhoopadan, aur chamache aur undelane ke kattore, sab chokhe sone ke banavana." 
Exodus25:30 aur meja par mere age bhentt kee rottyaian nity rakha karana.. 
Exodus25:31 fir chokhe sone kee aek deevatt banavana. sona ddhlavakar vah deevat, paye aur dndee saahit banaya jaae usake pushpakosha, gantt aur fool, sab aek hee ttukade ke banen" 
Exodus25:32 aur usakee alangon se chh: daliyan nikale, teen daliyan to deevatt kee aek alang se aur teen daliyan usakee doosaree alang se nikalee hui hon" 
Exodus25:33 aek aek dalee men badam ke fool ke saman teen teen pushpakosha, aek aek gant, aur aek aek fool hon deevatt se nikalee hui chhhon daliyon ka yahee akar ya roop ho" 
Exodus25:34 aur deevatt kee dndee men badam ke fool ke saman char pushpakosh apanee apanee gantt aur fool samet hon 
Exodus25:35 aur deevatt se nikalee hui chhhon daliyon men se do do daaliyon ke neeche aek aek gantt ho, ve deevatt samet aek hee ttukade ke bane huae hon." 
Exodus25:36 unakee gantte aur daaliya, sab deevatt samet ek hee ttukade kee ho, chokha sona ddhlavakar poora deevatt ek hee ttukade ka banavana." 
Exodus25:37 aur sat deepak banavana aur deepak jalaae jaaen ki ve deevatt ke samhane prakash den. 
Exodus25:38 aur usake gulatarash aur guladan sab chokhe sone ke hon. 
Exodus25:39 vah sab in samast saman samet kikkar bhr chokhe sone ka bane. 
Exodus25:40 aur savadhaan rahakar in sab vastuon ko us namoone ke saman banavana, jo tujhe is parvat par dikhaya gaya haai.." 
Exodus26:1 fir nivasasthan ke liye das parade banavana inako battee hui saneevale aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ka kaddhai ke kam kiae huae karoobon ke sath banavana." 
Exodus26:2 aek aek parade kee lambai atthais hath aur chaudai char hath kee ho sab parade aek hee nap ke hon. 
Exodus26:3 panch parade aek doosare se jude huae hon aur fir jo panch parade rahenge ve bhee aek doosare se jude huae hon. 
Exodus26:4 aur jahan ye donon parade jode jaaen vahan kee donon chhoron par neelee neelee faliyan lagavana. 
Exodus26:5 donon chhoron men pachas pachas faaliyan aeese lagavana ki ve amhane samhane hon. 
Exodus26:6 aur sone ke pachas ankade banavana aur paradon ke pancho ko ankadon ke dara aek doosare se aeesa judvana ki nivasasthan milakar aek hee ho jaae. 
Exodus26:7 fir nivas ke upar tamboo ka kam dene ke liye bakaree ke bal ke gyarah parade banavana. 
Exodus26:8 aek aek parade kee lambai tees hath aur chaudai char hath kee ho gyarahon parade aek hee nap ke hon. 
Exodus26:9 aur panch parade alag aur fir chh: parade alag judvana, aur chhttven parade ko tamboo ke samhane mod kar duhara kar dena." 
Exodus26:10 aur too pachas ankaue us parade kee chhor men jo bahar se milaya jaaega aur pachas hee ankade doosaree or ke parade kee chhor men jo bahar se milaya jaaega banavana. 
Exodus26:11 aur peetal ke pachas ankade banana, aur ankadon ko faaliyon men lagakar tamboo ko aeesa judvana ki vah milakar aek hee ho jaae." 
Exodus26:12 aur tamboo ke paradon ka lattka hua bhag, arthata jo adha patt rahega, vah nivas kee pichhlee or lattka rahe." 
Exodus26:13 aur tamboo ke paradon kee lambai me se hath bhr idhar, aur hath bhr udhar nivas ke ddhankane ke liye usakee donon alangon par lattka hua rahe." 
Exodus26:14 fir tamboo ke liye lal rang se rangee hui meddhon kee khalon ka aek oddhna aur usake upar sooison kee khalon ka bhee aek oddhna banavana.. 
Exodus26:15 fir nivas ko khda karane ke liye babool kee lakadee ke takhte banavana. 
Exodus26:16 aek aek takhte kee lambai das hath aur chaudai deddh hath kee ho. 
Exodus26:17 aek aek takhte men aek doosare se jodee hui do do choolen hon nivas ke sab takhton ko isee bhanati se banavana. 
Exodus26:18 aur nivas ke liye jo takhte too banavaaega un men se bees takhte to dakkhian kee or ke liye hon 
Exodus26:19 aur beeson takhton ke neeche chandee kee chalees kursiyan banavana, arthata aek aek takhte ke neeche usake choolon ke liye do do kuarsiyan." 
Exodus26:20 aur nivas kee doosaree alang, arthata uttr kee or bees takhte banavana." 
Exodus26:21 aur unake liye chandee kee chalees kursiyan banavana, arthata aek aek takhte ke neeche do do kuarsiyan hon." 
Exodus26:22 aur nivas kee pichhlee alang, arthata aek aek takhte ke neeche do do kursiyan hon." 
Exodus26:23 aur pichhle alang men nivas ke konon ke liye do takhte banavana 
Exodus26:24 aur ye neeche se do do bhag ke hon aur donon bhag upar ke sire tak aek aek kade men milaye jaaen donon takhton ka yahee roop ho ye to donon konon ke liye hon. 
Exodus26:25 aur att takhten ho, aur unakee chandee kee solah kuarsiyan hon arthata aek aek takhte ke neeche do do kuarsiyan hon." 
Exodus26:26 fir babool kee lakadee ke bende banavana, arthata nivas kee aek alang ke takhton ke liye panch," 
Exodus26:27 aur nivas kee doosaree alang ke takhton ke liye panch bende, aur nivas kee jo alang paashchaim kee or pichhle bhag men hogee, usake liye panch bende banavana." 
Exodus26:28 aur beechavala benda jo takhton ke madhy men hoga vah tamboo ke aek sire se doosare sire tak pahunche. 
Exodus26:29 fir takhton ko sone se maddhvana, aur unake kade jo bendon ke gharon ka kam denge unhen bhee sone ke banavana aur bedon ko bhee sone se maddhvana." 
Exodus26:30 aur nivas ko is reeati khda karana jaaisa is parvat par tujhe dikhaya gaya haai.. 
Exodus26:31 fir neele, baaijanee aur lal rang ke aur battee hui sooksham saneevale kapade ka aek beechavala parda banavana vah kaddhai ke kam kiye huae karoobon ke sath bane." 
Exodus26:32 aur usako sone se maddhe huae babool ke char khmbhon par lattkana, inakee ankadiyan sone kee ho, aur ye chandee kee char kursiyon par khdee rahen." 
Exodus26:33 aur beechavale parde ko ankaadiyon ke neeche lattkakar, usakee ad men sakshaeepatra ka sandook bheetar liva le jana so vah beechavala parda tumhare liye paavitrasthan ko paramapavitrasthan se alag kiye rahe." 
Exodus26:34 fir paramapaavitra sthan men sakshaeepatra ke sandook ke upar praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ko rakhna. 
Exodus26:35 aur us parde ke bahar nivas kee uttr alag meja rakhna aur usakee dakkhian alang meja ke samhane deevatt ko rakhna. 
Exodus26:36 fir tamboo ke dar ke liye neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke aur battee hui sooksham saneevale kapade ka kaddhai ka kam kiya hua aek parda banavana." 
Exodus26:37 aur is parde ke liye babool ke panch khmbhe banavana, aur unako sone se maddhvana unakee kadyaian sone kee ho, aur unake liye peetal kee panch kuarsiyan ddhlava kar banavana.." 
Exodus27:1 fir vedee ko babool kee lakadee kee, panch hath lambee aur panch hath chaudee banavana vedee chaukor ho, aur usakee unchai teen hath kee ho." 
Exodus27:2 aur usake charon konon par char seeng banavana ve us samet aek hee ttukade ke ho, aur use peetal se maddhvana." 
Exodus27:3 aur usakee rakh uttane ke patra, aur faavaadiya, aur kattore, aur kantte, aur angeettyaian banavana usaka kul saman peetal ka banavana." 
Exodus27:4 aur usake peetal kee jalee aek jhnjhree banavana aur usake charon siron men peetal ke char kade lagavana. 
Exodus27:5 aur us jhnjhree ko vedee ke charon or kee kanganee ke neeche aeese lagavana, ki vah vedee kee unchai ke madhy tak pahunche." 
Exodus27:6 aur vedee ke liye babool kee lakadee ke dnde banavana, aur unhen peetal se maddhvana." 
Exodus27:7 aur dnde kadon men dale jaae, ki jab jab vedee uttai jaae tab ve usakee donon alangon par rahen." 
Exodus27:8 vedee ko takhton se khokhlee banavana jaaisee vah is parvat par tujhe dikhai gai haai vaaisee hee banai jaae.. 
Exodus27:9 fir nivas ke angan ko banavana. usakee dakkhian alang ke liye to battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ke sab padorn ko milaae ki usakee lambai sau hath kee ho aek alang par to itana hee ho. 
Exodus27:10 aur unake bees khmbhe bane, aur inake liye peetal kee bees kursiyan bane, aur khmbhon ke kunde aur unakee pattiyan chandee kee hon." 
Exodus27:11 aur usee bhanati angan kee uttr alang kee lambai men bhee sau hath lambe parde ho, aur unake bhee bees khmbhe aur inake liye bhee peetal ke bees khane hon aur un khmbhon ke kunde aur pattiyan chandee kee hon." 
Exodus27:12 fir angan kee chaudai men paachchhim kee or pachas hath ke parde ho, unake khmbhe das aur khane bhee das hon." 
Exodus27:13 aur poorab alang par angan kee chaudai pachas hath kee ho. 
Exodus27:14 aur angan ke dar kee aek or pandrah hath ke parde ho, aur unake khmbhe teen aur khane teen hon." 
Exodus27:15 aur doosaree or bhee pandrah hath ke parde ho, unake bhee khmbhe teen aur khane teen hon." 
Exodus27:16 aur angan ke dar ke liye aek parda banavana, jo neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade aur battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ka kamadar bana hua bees hath ka ho, usake khmbhe char aur khane bhee char hon." 
Exodus27:17 angan kee charon or ke sab khmbhe chandee kee pattiyon se jude huae ho, unake kunde chandee ke aur khane peetal ke hon." 
Exodus27:18 angan kee lambai sau hath kee, aur usakee chaudai barabar pachas hath kee aur usakee kanat kee unchai panch hath kee ho, usakee kanat battee hui suksham sanee ke kapade kee bane, aur khmbhon ke khane peetal ke hon." 
Exodus27:19 nivas ke bhanti bhanati ke bartan aur sab saman aur usake sab koontten aur angan ke bhee sab koontte peetal hee ke hon.. 
Exodus27:20 fir too israaeliyon ko agyaa dena, ki mere pas deevatt ke liye koott ke nikala hua jalapai ka nirmal tel le ana, jis se deepak nity jalata rahe." 
Exodus27:21 milap ke tamboo me, us beechavale parde se bahar jo sakshaeepatra ke age hoga, haroon aur usake putra deevatt sanjh se bhor tak yahova ke samhane saja kar rakhen. yah vidhai israaeliyon kee peeaddhiyon ke liye sadaaiv banee rahegee.." 
Exodus28:1 fir too israaeliyon men se apane bhai haroon, aur nadab, abeeho, aeliajaar aur itamar nam usake putraen ko apane sameep le ana ki ve mere liye yajak ka kam karen." 
Exodus28:2 aur too apane bhai haroon ke liye vibhv aur shaebha ke nimitt pavitra vasr banavana. 
Exodus28:3 aur jitanon ke day men buaddh ihaai, jinako maain ne buaddh idenevalee atma se paripoorn kiya haai, unako too haroon ke vasr banane kee agyaa de ki vah mere nimitt yajak ka kam karane ke liye paavitra banen." 
Exodus28:4 aur jo vasr unhen banane honge ve ye haai, arthata seenabanda aur aepod, aur jama, char khane ka angarakha, purohit ka ttop, aur kamarabanda ye hee pavitra vasr tere bhai haroon aur usake putraen ke liye banaae jaaen ki ve mere liye yajak ka kam karen." 
Exodus28:5 aur ve sone aur neele aur baainjanee aur lal rang ka aur sooksham sanee ka kapada len.. 
Exodus28:6 aur ve aepod ko sone, aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ka aur battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ka banaae, jo ki nipun kaddhai ke kam karanevale ke hath ka kam ho." 
Exodus28:7 aur vah is tarah se joda jaae ki usake dono kandhaen ke sire apas men mile rahen. 
Exodus28:8 aur aepod par jo kaddha hua pattuka hoga usakee banavatt usee ke saman ho, aur ve donon bina jod ke ho, aur sone aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rangavale aur battee hui sooksham saneevale kapade ke hon." 
Exodus28:9 fir do sulaaimanee manai lekar un par israael ke putraen ke nam khudavana," 
Exodus28:10 unake namon men se chh: to ek manai par, aur shosh chh: nam doosare maanai par, israel ke putraen kee utpati ke anusar khudavana." 
Exodus28:11 maanai khodanevale ke kam se jaaise chhapa khoda jata haai, vaaise hee un do manaiyon par israael ke putraen ke nam khudavana aur unako sone ke khanon men jadva dena." 
Exodus28:12 aur donon manaiyon ko aepod ke kandhaen par lagavana, ve israaeliyon ke nimitt smaran dilavane vale manai ttharenge arthata haroon unake nam yahova ke age apane donon kandhaen par smaran ke liye lagaae rahe.." 
Exodus28:13 fir sone ke khane banavana," 
Exodus28:14 aur doriyon kee nain goonthe huae do janjeer chokhe sone ke banavana aur goonthe huae janjeeron ko un khanon men jadvana. 
Exodus28:15 fir nyay kee chaparas ko bhee kaddhai ke kam ka banavana aepod kee nain sone, aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke aur battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade kee use banavana." 
Exodus28:16 vah chaukor aur doharee ho, aur usakee lambai aur chaudai aek aek bitte kee hon." 
Exodus28:17 aur us men char panti manai jadana. paahilee panti men to manaiky, padamarag aur laladee hon" 
Exodus28:18 doosaree panati men marakat, neelamaanai aur heera" 
Exodus28:19 teesaree panti men lasham, sooryakant aur neelama" 
Exodus28:20 aur chauthee panati men faeeroja, sulaaimanee manai aur yashab hon ye sab sone ke khanon men jade jaaen." 
Exodus28:21 aur israael ke putraen ke jitane nam haain utane maanai ho, arthata unake namon kee ginatee ke anusar barah nam khude, barahon gotraen men se aek aek ka nam aek aek manai par aeese khude jese chhapa khoda jata haai." 
Exodus28:22 fir chaparas par doriyon kee nai. goonthe huae chokhe sone kee janjeer lagavana 
Exodus28:23 aur chaparas men sone kee do kadiyan lagavana, aur donon kaadiyon ko chaparas ke dono siron par lagavana." 
Exodus28:24 aur sone ke donon goonthe janjeeron ko un donon kadiyon men jo chaparas ke siron par hongee lagavana 
Exodus28:25 aur goonthe huae dono janjeeron ke donon bakee siron ko donon khanon men jadva ke aepod ke donon kandhaen ke bandhanon par usake samhane lagavana. 
Exodus28:26 fir sone kee do aur kaadiyan banavakar chaparas ke donon siron par, usakee us kor par jo aepod kee bheetar kee or hogee lagavana." 
Exodus28:27 fir unake sivay sone kee do aur kadiyan banavakar aepod ke donon kandhaen ke bandhanon par, neeche se unake samhane aur usake jod ke pas aepod ke kaddhe huae pattuke ke upar lagavana." 
Exodus28:28 aur chaparas apanee kaadiyon ke dara aepod kee kaadiyon men neele faeete se bandhaee jaa, is reeati vah aepod ke kaddhe huae pattuke par banee rahe, aur chaparas aepod par se alag n hone paae." 
Exodus28:29 aur jab jab haroon pavitrasthan men pravesh kare, tab tab vah nyay kee chaparas par apane day ke upar israaeliyon ke namon ko lagaae rahe, jis se yahova ke samhane unaka smaran nity rahe." 
Exodus28:30 aur too nyay kee chaparas men ureem aur tummeem ko rakhna, aur jab jab haroon yahova ke samhane pravesh kare, tab tab ve usake day ke upar hon is prakar haroon israaeliyon ke nyay padarth ko apane day ke upar yahova ke samhane nity lagaae rahe.." 
Exodus28:31 fir aepod ke bage ko sampoorn neele rang ka banavana. 
Exodus28:32 aur usakee banavatt aeesee ho ki usake beech men sir dalane ke liye chhed ho, aur us chhed kee charon or bakhtar ke chhed kee see aek bunee hui kor ho, ki vah fattne n paae." 
Exodus28:33 aur usake neechevale ghore men charon or neeele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ke anar banavana, aur unake beech beech charon or sone kee ghantteeyan lagavana," 
Exodus28:34 arthata aek sone kee ghanttee aur aek anar, fir aek sone kee ghanttee aur aek anar, isee reeti bage ke neechevale ghore men charon or aeesa hee ho." 
Exodus28:35 aur haroon aek bage ko seva tthal karane ke samay pahina kare, ki jab jab vah pavitrasthan ke bheetar yahova ke samhane jaa, va bahar nikale, tab tab usaka shabd sunai de, naheen to vah mar jaaega." 
Exodus28:36 fir chokhe sone ka aek tteeka banavana, aur jaaise chhape men vaaise hee us men ye akshar khoden jaae, arthata yahova ke liye paavitra." 
Exodus28:37 aur use neele faeete se bandhana aur vah pagadee ke samhane ke hisse par rahe. 
Exodus28:38 aur haroon ke mathe par rahe, isaaliye ki israaelee jo kuchh pavitra ttharaae, arthata jitanee pavitra vastuaen bhentt men chaddhaven un paavitra vastuon ka dosh haroon uttaae rahe, aur vah nity usake mathe par rahe, jis se yahova un se prasann rahe.." 
Exodus28:39 aur angarakhe ko sooksham sanee ke kapade ka charakhana bunavana, aur aek pagadee bhee sooksham sanee ke kapade kee banavana, aur karachobee kam kiya hua aek kamaraband bhee banavana.." 
Exodus28:40 fir haroon ke putraen ke liye bhee angarakhe aur kamaraband aur ttopiyan banavana ye vasr bhee vibhv aur shaebha ke liye banen. 
Exodus28:41 apane bhai haroon aur usake putraen ko ye hee sab vasr pahinakar unaka abhaishok aur sanskar karana, aur unhen pavitra karana, ki ve mere liye yajak ka kam karen." 
Exodus28:42 aur unake liye sanee ke kapade kee janghaiya banavana jin se unaka tan ddhpa rahe ve kamar se jangha tak kee hon 
Exodus28:43 aur jab jab haroon va usake putra milapavale tamboo men pravesh kare, va pavitra sthan men seva tthal karane ko vedee ke pas jaaen tab tab ve un janghaiyon ko paahine rahe, n ho ki ve papee ttharen aur mar jaaen. yah haroon ke liye aur usake bad usake vansh ke liye bhee sada kee vidhai ttharen.." 
Exodus29:1 aur unhen paavitra karane ko jo kam tujhe un se karana haai, ki ve mere liye yajak ka kam karen vah yah haai. aek nirdosh bachhda aur do nirdosh menddhe lena," 
Exodus29:2 aur akhmeeree rottee, aur tel se sane huae maaide ke akhmeeree faulake, aur tel se chupadee hui akhmeeree papadiyan bhee lena. ye sab gehoon ke maaide ke banavana." 
Exodus29:3 inako aek ttokaree men rakhkar us ttokaree ko us bachhde aur un donon menddho samet sameep le ana. 
Exodus29:4 fir haroon aur usake putraen ko milapavale tamboo ke dar ke sameep le akar jal se nahalana. 
Exodus29:5 tab un vasren ko lekar haroon ko angarakha or aepod ka baga paahinana, aur aepod aur chaparas bandhana, aur aepod ka kaddha hua pattuka bhee bandhana" 
Exodus29:6 aur usake sir par pagadee ko rakhna, aur pagadee par pavitra mukutt ko rakhna." 
Exodus29:7 tab aabhaishok ka tel le usake sir par dalakar usaka abhaishok karana. 
Exodus29:8 fir usake putraen ko sameep le akar unako angarakhe pahinana," 
Exodus29:9 aur usake arthata haroon aur usake putraen ke kamar bandhana aur unake sir par ttopiyan rakhna jis se yajak ke pad par sada unaka hak rahe. isee prakar haroon aur usake putraen ka sanskar karana. 
Exodus29:10 aur bachhde ko milapavale tamboo ke samhane sameep le ana. aur haroon aur usake putra bachhde ke sir par apane apane hath rakhe," 
Exodus29:11 tab us bachhde ko yahova ke sammukh milapavale tamboo ke dar par balidan karana," 
Exodus29:12 aur bachhde ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar apanee ungalee se vedee ke seengon par lagana, aur shosh sab lohoo ko vedee ke paae par undel dena" 
Exodus29:13 aur jis charabee se antadiyan ddhpee rahatee haai, aur jo jhlilee kaleje ke upar hotee haai, unako aur dono gudorn ko unake upar kee charabee samet lekar sab ko vedee par jalana." 
Exodus29:14 aur bachhde ka mans, aur khal, aur gobar, chhavanee se bahar ag men jala dena kyonki yah papabali hoga." 
Exodus29:15 fir aek meddha lena, aur haroon aur usake putra usake sir par apane apane hath rakhe," 
Exodus29:16 tab us meddhen ko baali karana, aur usaka lohoo lekar vedee par charon or chhdikana." 
Exodus29:17 aur us meddhe ko ttukade ttukade kattna, aur usakee antaadiyon aur paairon ko dhaekar usake ttukadon aur sir ke upar rakhna," 
Exodus29:18 tab us poore meddhe ko vedee par jalana vah to yahova ke liye homabaali hoga vah sukhdayak sugandha aur yahova ke liye havan hoga. 
Exodus29:19 fir doosare meddhe ko lena aur haroon aur usake putra usake sir par apane apane hath rakhe," 
Exodus29:20 tab us mende ko bali karana, aur usake lohoo men se kuchh lekar haroon aur usake putraen ke daahine kan ke sire par, aur unake dahine hath aur daahine panv ke angootton par lagana, aur lohoo ko vedee par charon or chhdik dena." 
Exodus29:21 fir vedee par ke loho, aur aabhaishok ke tel, in dono men se kuchh kuchh lekar haroon aur usake vasren par, aur usake putraen aur unake vasren par bhee chhdik dena tab vah apane vasren samet aur usake putra bhee apane apane vasren samet pavitra ho jaaenge." 
Exodus29:22 tab meddhe ko sanskaravala janakar us men se charabee aur mottee poonchh ko, aur jis charabee se antadiyan ddhpee rahatee haain usako, aur kaleje par kee jhlilee ko, aur charabee samet donon gudorn ko, aur dahine putthe ko lena," 
Exodus29:23 aur akhmeeree rottee kee ttokaree jo yahova ke age dharee hogee us men se bhee aek rottee, aur tel se sane huae maaide ka aek faulaka, aur aek papadee lekar," 
Exodus29:24 in sab ko haroon aur usake putraen ke hathon men rakhkar hilaae jane kee bhentt ttharake yahova ke age hilaya jaae. 
Exodus29:25 tab un vastuon ko unake hathon se lekar homabali kee vedee par jala dena, jis se vah yahova ke samhane sukhdayak sugandha tthare vah to yahova ke liye havan hoga." 
Exodus29:26 fir haroon ke sanskar ko jo menddha hoga usakee chhatee ko lekar hilaae jane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke age hilana aur vah tera bhag ttharega. 
Exodus29:27 aur haroon aur usake putraen ke sanskar ka jo meddha hoga, us men se hilaae jane kee bhenttvalee chhatee jo hilai jaaegee, aur uttaae jane ka bhenttvala puttha jo uttaya jaaega, in donon ko pavitra ttharana." 
Exodus29:28 aur ye sada kee vidhai kee reeti par israaeliyon kee or se usaka aur usake putraen ka bhag tthare, kayonaki ye uttaae jane kee bhentten ttharee haain aur yah israaeliyon kee or se unake melabaaliyon men se yahova ke liye uttaaee jane kee bhentt hogee." 
Exodus29:29 aur haroon ke jo pavitra vasr honge vah usake bad usake bette pote adi ko milate rahe, jis se unheen ko pahine huae unaka abhaishok aur sanskar kiya jaae." 
Exodus29:30 usake putraen ke jo usake sthan par yajak hoga, vah jab pavitrasthan men seva tthal karane ko milap vale tamboo men pahile aa, tab un vasren ko sat din tak pahine rahen." 
Exodus29:31 fir yajak ke sanskar ka jo meddha hoga use lekar usaka mans kisee paavitra sthan men pakana 
Exodus29:32 tab haroon apane putraen samet us meddhe ka mans aur ttokaree kee rottee, donon ko milapavale tamboo ke dar par khaae." 
Exodus29:33 aur jin padathorn se unaka sanskar aur unhen paavitra karane ke liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaaega unako to ve khaae, parantu paraae kul ka koi unhen n khane paa, kyonki ve pavitra honge." 
Exodus29:34 aur yaadi sanskaravale mans va rottee men se kuchh bihan tak bacha rahe, to us bache huae ko ag men jalana, vah khaya n jaae kyonaki vah pavitra hoga." 
Exodus29:35 aur maain ne tujhe jo jo agyaa dee haai, un sabhon ke anusar too haroon aur usake putraen se karana aur sat din tak unaka sanskar karate rahana," 
Exodus29:36 arthata papabaali ka aek bachhda praayaashchaitt ke liye praatidin chaddhana. aur vedee ko bhee praayashchaitt karane ke samay shuuddh karana, aur use paavitra karane ke liye usaka aabhaishok karana." 
Exodus29:37 sat din tak vedee ke liye praayaashchaitt karake use paavitra karana, aur vedee param paavitra ttharegee aur jo kuchh us se choo jaaega vah bhee paavitra ho jaaega.." 
Exodus29:38 jo tujhe vedee par nity chaddhana hoga vah yah haai arthata pratidin aek aek varsha ke do bhedee ke bachche. 
Exodus29:39 aek bhed ke bachche ko to bhor ke samay, aur doosare bhed ke bachche ko godhooli ke samay chaddhana." 
Exodus29:40 aur aek bhed ke bachche ke sang heen kee chauthai koottke nikale huae tel se sana hua aepa ka dasavan bhag maaida, aur argha ke liye hee kee chauthai dakhmadha dena." 
Exodus29:41 aur doosare bhed ke bachche ko godhooli ke samay chaddhana, aur usake sath bhor kee reeti anusar annabaali aur argha donon dena, jis se vah sukhdayak sugandha aur yahova ke liye havan tthare." 
Exodus29:42 tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men yahova ke age milapavale tamboo ke dar par nity aeesa hee homabali hua kare yah vah sthan haai jis men maain tum logon se isaaliye mila karoonga, ki tujh se baten karoon." 
Exodus29:43 aur maain israaeliyon se vaheen mila karoonga, aur vah tamboo mere tej se paavitra kiya jaaega." 
Exodus29:44 aur maain milapavale tamboo aur vedee ko paavitra karoonga, aur haroon aur usake putraen ko bhee paavitra karoonga, ki ve mere liye yajak ka kam karen." 
Exodus29:45 aur maain israaeliyon ke madhy nivas karoonga, aur unaka parameshvar ttharoonga." 
Exodus29:46 tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova unaka parameshvar hoo, jo unako misr desh se isaliye nikal le aya, ki unake madhy nivas karoon maain hee unaka parameshvar yahova hoon.." 
Exodus30:1 fir dhoop jalane ke liye babool kee lakadee kee vedee banana. 
Exodus30:2 usakee lambai ek hath aur chaudai ek hath kee ho, vah chaukor ho, aur usakee unchai do hath kee ho, aur usake seeng usee ttukade se banaae jaen." 
Exodus30:3 aur vedee ke uparavale palle aur charon or kee alangon aur seengon ko chokhe sone se maddhna, aur isakee charon or sone kee aek bad banana." 
Exodus30:4 aur isakee bad ke neeche isake danon palle par sone ke do do kade banakar isake donon or lagana, ve isake uttane ke dndon ke khanon ka kam denge." 
Exodus30:5 aur dndon ko babool kee lakadee ke banakar unako sone se maddhna. 
Exodus30:6 aur too usako us parde ke age rakhna jo sakshaeepatra ke sandook ke samhane haai, arthata praayashchaitt vale ddhkane ke age jo sakshaeepatra ke upar haai, vaheen maain tujh se mila karoonga." 
Exodus30:7 aur usee vedee par haroon sugaandhiat dhoop jalaya kare pratidin bhor ko jab vah deepak ko tteek kare tab vah dhoop ko jalaa," 
Exodus30:8 tab godhooli ke samay jab haroon deepakon ko jalaae tab dhoop jalaya kare, yah dhoop yahova ke samhane tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men nity jalaya jaae." 
Exodus30:9 aur us vedee par tum aur prakar ka dhoop n jalana, aur n us par homabaali aur n annabali chaddhana aur n is par argha dena." 
Exodus30:10 aur haroon varsha men aek bar isake seengon par praayaashchaitt kare aur tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men varsha men aek bar praayaashchaitt liya jaae yah yahova ke liye paramapavitra haai.. 
Exodus30:11 aur tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus30:12 jab too israaeliyon ki ginatee lene lage, tab ve ginane ke samay jinakee ginatee hui ho apane apane praanon ke liye yahova ko praayaashchaitt de, jis se jab too unakee ginatee kar raha ho us samay koi vipaati un par n a pade." 
Exodus30:13 jitane log gine jaaen ve paavitrasthan ke shokel ke liye adha shokel de, yah shokel bees gera ka hota haai, yahova kee bhentt adha shokel ho." 
Exodus30:14 bees varsha ke va us se adhaik avastha ke jitane gine jaaen un men se aek aek jan yahova kee bhentt de. 
Exodus30:15 jab tumhare praanon ke praayashchaitt ke nimitt yahova kee bhentt dee jaa, tab n to dhanee log adho shokel se aadhaik de, aur n kangal log us se kam den." 
Exodus30:16 aur too israaeliyon se praayaashchaitt ka roopaya lekar milapavale tamboo ke kam men lagana jis se vah yahova ke sammukh israaeliyon ke smaranarth chinh tthare, aur unake praanon ka praayaashchaitt bhee ho.." 
Exodus30:17 aur yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus30:18 dhaene ke liye peetal kee aek haudee aur usaka paya peetal ka banana. aur usake milapavale tamboo aur vedee ke beech men rakhkar us men jal bhr dena 
Exodus30:19 aur us men haroon aur usake putra apane apane hath panv dhaeya karen. 
Exodus30:20 jab jab ve milapavale tamboo men pravesh karen tab tab ve hath panv jal se dhaeae, naheen to mar jaaenge aur jab jab ve vedee ke pas seva tthal karane, arthata yahova ke liye havy jalane ko aaen tab tab ve hath panv dhaeae, n ho ki mar jaaen." 
Exodus30:21 yah haroon aur usake peeddhee peeddhee ke vansh ke liye sada kee vidhai tthare.. 
Exodus30:22 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus30:23 too mukhy mukhy sugandha dravy, arthata pavitrasthan ke shokel ke anusar panch sau shokel apane ap nikala hua gandharas, aur usaka adha, arthata addhai sau shokel sugaandhiat agar," 
Exodus30:24 aur panch sau shokel taj, aur aek heen jalapai ka tel lekar" 
Exodus30:25 un se aabhaishok ka paavitra tel, arthata gandhaee kee reeti se taaiyar kiya hua sugaandhiat tel banavana yah abhaishok ka paavitra tel tthare." 
Exodus30:26 aur us se milapavale tamboo ka, aur sakshaeepatra ke sandook ka," 
Exodus30:27 aur sare saman samet meja ka, aur saman samet deevatt ka, aur dhoopavedee ka," 
Exodus30:28 aur sare saman samet homavedee ka, aur paae samet haudee ka abhaishok karana." 
Exodus30:29 aur unako paavitra karana, jis se ve paramapaavitra ttharen aur jo kuchh un se choo jaaega vah paavitra ho jaaega." 
Exodus30:30 fir haroon ka usake putraen ke sath aabhaishok karana, aur is prakar unhen mere liye yajak ka kam karane ke liye paavitra karana." 
Exodus30:31 aur israaeliyon ko meree yah agyaa sunana, ki vah tel tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men mere liye paavitra aabhaishok ka tel hoga." 
Exodus30:32 vah kisee manushy kee deh par n dala jaa, aur milavatt men usake saman aur kuchh n banana vah to pavitra hoga, vah tumhare liye paavitra hoga." 
Exodus30:33 jo koi usake saman kuchh banaa, va jo koi us men se kuchh paraae kulavale par lagaa, vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaae.." 
Exodus30:34 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, bol, nakhee aur kundaro, ye sugandha dravy nirmal loban samet le lena, ye sab aek taul ke ho," 
Exodus30:35 aur inaka dhoop arthata lon milakar gandhaee kee reeti ke anusar chokha aur paavitra sugandha dravy banavana 
Exodus30:36 fir us men se kuchh peesakar bukanee kar dalana, tab us men se kuchh milapavale tamboo men sakshaeepatra ke age, jahan par maain tujh se mila karoonga vahan rakhna vah tumhare liye paramapavitra hoga." 
Exodus30:37 aur jo dhoop too banavaaega, milavatt men usake saman tum log apane liye aur kuchh n banavana vah tumhare age yahova ke liye paavitra hoga." 
Exodus30:38 jo koi soonghane ke liye usake saman kuchh banaae vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaae.. 
Exodus31:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus31:2 sun, maain uree ke putra basalel ko, jo hoor ka pota aur yahooda ke gotra ka haai, nam lekar bulata hoon." 
Exodus31:3 aur maain usako parameshvar kee atma se jo buddh,i praveenta, gyaan, aur sab prakar ke kayorn kee samajh denevalee atma haai paripoorn karata hoo," 
Exodus31:4 jis se vah kareegaree ke karya buddh ise nikal nikalakar sab bhanti kee banavatt me, arthata sone, chandee, aur peetal me," 
Exodus31:5 aur jadne ke liye maanai kattne me, aur lakadee ke khodane men kam kare." 
Exodus31:6 aur sun, maain dan ke gotravale aheesamak ke putra oholeeab ko usake sang kar deta hoon varan jitane buddhmaian haai un sabhon ke day men maain buddh ideta hoo, jis se jitanee vastuon kee agyaa maain ne tujhe dee haai un sabhon ko ve banaaen" 
Exodus31:7 arthata milapavala tambo, aur sakshaeepatra ka sandook, aur us par ka praayaashchaittvala ddhkana, aur tamboo ka sara saman," 
Exodus31:8 aur saman sahit meja, aur sare saman samet chokhe sone kee deevat, aur dhoopavedee," 
Exodus31:9 aur sare saman saahit homavedee, aur paae samet haudee," 
Exodus31:10 aur kaddhe huae vasr, aur haroon yajak ke yajakavale kam ke paavitra vasr, aur usake putraen ke vasr," 
Exodus31:11 aur aabhaishok ka tel, aur pavitra sthan ke liye sugandhiat dhoop, in sabhon ko ve un sab agyaaon ke anusar banaaen jo maain ne tujhe dee haain.." 
Exodus31:12 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus31:13 too israaeliyon se yah bhee kahana, ki nishchay tum mere vishraamadinon ko manana, kyonaki tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men mere aur tum logon ke beech yah aek chinh tthara haai, jis se tum yah bat jan rakho ki yahova hamara pavitra karanehara haai." 
Exodus31:14 is karan tum vishraamadin ko manana, kyonki vah tumhare liye paavitra tthara haai jo usako apaavitra kare vah nishchay mar dala jaae jo koi us din men se kuchh kamakaj kare vah praanee apane logon ke beech se nash kiya jaae." 
Exodus31:15 chh: din to kam kaj kiya jaa, par satavan din paramavishraam ka din aur yahova ke liye paavitra haai isaaliye jo koi vishraam ke din men kuchh kam kaj kare vah nishchay mar dala jaae." 
Exodus31:16 so israaelee vishraamadin ko mana kare, varan peeddhee peeddhee men usako sada kee vacha ka vishay janakar mana karen." 
Exodus31:17 vah mere aur israaeliyon ke beech sada aek chinh rahega, kyonaki chh: din men yahova ne akash aur prathvee ko banaya, aur sataven din vishraam karake apana jee ttnda kiya.." 
Exodus31:18 jab parameshvar moosa se seenaai parvat par aeesee baten kar chuka, tab us ne usako apanee ungalee se likhee hui sakshaee denevalee patthr kee donon taakhtaiyan dee.." 
Exodus32:1 jab logon ne dekha ki moosa ko parvat se utarane men vilamb ho raha haai, tab ve haroon ke pas ikatthe hokar kahane lage, ab hamare liye devata bana, jo hamare age age chale kyonaki us puroosh moosa ko jo hamen misr desh se nikal le aya haai, ham naheen janate ki use kya hua?" 
Exodus32:2 haroon ne un se kaha, tumharee striayon aur bette beattyaien ke kanon men sone kee jo baaliyan haai unhen todkar utaro, aur mere pas le ao." 
Exodus32:3 tab sab logon ne unake kanon se sone kee baliyon ko todkar utara, aur haroon ke pas le aae." 
Exodus32:4 aur haroon ne unhen unake hath se liya, aur aek bachhda ddhalakar banaya, aur ttankee se gaddha tab ve kahane lage, ki he israael tera parameshvar jo tujhe misr desh se chhuda laya haai vah yahee haai." 
Exodus32:5 yah dekhke haroon ne usake age aek vedee banavai aur yah prachar kiya, ki kal yahova ke liye pabrba hoga." 
Exodus32:6 aur doosare din logon ne tadke uttkar homabaali chaddhaa, aur melabaali le aae fir baaittkar khaya piya, aur uttkar khelane lage.." 
Exodus32:7 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, neeche utar ja, kyonki teree praja ke log, jinhen too misr desh se nikal le aya haai, so bigad gaae haain" 
Exodus32:8 aur jis marga par chalane kee agyaa maain ne unako dee thee usako jhttpatt chhodkar unhon ne aek bachhda ddhalakar bana liya, fir usako dandvata kiya, aur usake liye baalidan bhee chaddhaya, aur yah kaha haai, ki he israaeliyon tumhara parameshvar jo tumhen misr desh se chhuda le aya haai vah yahee haai." 
Exodus32:9 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, maain ne in logon ko dekha, aur sun, ve hatteele haain." 
Exodus32:10 ab mujhe mat rok, mera kop un par bhdk utta haai jis se maain unhen bhsm karoon parantu tujh se aek badee jaati upajaunga." 
Exodus32:11 tab moosa apane parameshvar yahova ko yah kahake manane laga, ki he yahova, tera kop apanee praja par kyon bhdka haai, jise too bade samathrya aur balavant hath ke dara misr desh se nikal laya haai?" 
Exodus32:12 misree log yah kyon kahane paa, ki vah unako bure aabhaipraay se, arthata pahadon men ghaat karake dharatee par se mitta dalane kee manasa se nikal le gaya? too apane bhdke huae kop ko shaant kar, aur apanee praja ko aeesee haani pahuchane se fir ja." 
Exodus32:13 apane das ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob ko smaran kar, jin se too ne apanee hee kiriya khakar yah kaha tha, ki maai tumhare vansh ko akash ke taron ke tuly bahut karoonga, aur yah sara desh jisakee maain ne charcha kee haai tumhare vansh ko doonga, ki vah usake adhaikaree sadaaiv bane rahen." 
Exodus32:14 tab yahova apanee praja kee hani karane se jo un ne kaha tha pachhtaya.. 
Exodus32:15 tab moosa firakar sakshaee kee danon takhtaiyon ko hath men liye huae pahad se utar gaya, un takhtaiyon ke to idhar aur udhar donon alangon par kuchh likha hua tha." 
Exodus32:16 aur ve taakhtaiyan parameshvar kee banai hui thee, aur un par jo khodakar likha hua tha vah parameshvar ka likha hua tha.." 
Exodus32:17 jab yahoshoo ko logon ke kolahal ka shabd sunai pada, tab us ne moosa se kaha, chhavanee se ladai ka sa shabd sunai deta haai." 
Exodus32:18 us ne kaha, vah jo shabd haai vah n to jeetanevalon ka haai, aur n haranevalon ka, mujhe to gane ka shabd sun padta haai." 
Exodus32:19 chhavanee ke pas ate hee moosa ko vah bachhda aur nachana dekh pada, tab moosa ka kop bhdk utta, aur us ne taakhtaiyon ko apane hathon se parvat ke neeche pattkakar tod dala." 
Exodus32:20 tab us ne unake banaae huae bachhde ko lekar ag men dalake foonk diya. aur peesakar choor choor kar dala, aur jal ke upar faenk diya, aur israaeliyon ko use pilava diya." 
Exodus32:21 tab moosa haroon se kahane laga, un logon ne tujh se kya kiya ki too ne unako itane bade pap men fansaya?" 
Exodus32:22 haroon ne uttr diya, mere prabhu ka kop n bhdke too to un logon ko janata hee haai ki ve burai men man lagaae rahate haain." 
Exodus32:23 aur unhon ne mujh se kaha, ki hamare liye devata banava jo hamare age age chale kyonki us puroosh moosa ko, jo hamen misr desh se chhuda laya haai, ham naheen janate ki use kya hua?" 
Exodus32:24 tab maain ne un se kaha, jis jisake pas sone ke gahanen ho, ve unako todkar utar laaen aur jab unhon ne mujh ko diya, maain ne unhen ag men dal diya, tab yah bachhda nikal pada" 
Exodus32:25 haroon ne un logon ko aeesa nirankush kar diya tha ki ve apane virodhaiyon ke beech upahas ke yogy hua," 
Exodus32:26 unako nirankush dekhkar moosa ne chhavanee ke nikas par khde hokar kaha, jo koi yahova kee or ka ho vah mere pas ae tab sare leveey us ke pas ikatthe hue." 
Exodus32:27 us ne un se kaha, israel ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki apanee apanee jangha par talavar lattka kar chhavanee se ek nikas se doosare nikas tak ghoom ghoomakar apane apane bhaiyo, sanagiyo, aur padosiyon ko ghaat karo." 
Exodus32:28 moosa ke is vachan ke anusar leviyon ne kiya aur us din teen hajar ke attkal log mare gaae. 
Exodus32:29 fir moosa ne kaha, aj ke din yahova ke liye apana yajakapad ka sanskar karo, varan apane apane betton aur bhaiyon ke bhee virooddh hokar aeesa karo jis se vah aj tum ko ashaeesh de." 
Exodus32:30 doosare din moosa ne logon se kaha, tum ne bada hee pap kiya haai. ab maain yahova ke pas chaddh jaunga sambhv haai ki maain tumhare pap ka praayashchaitt kar sakoon." 
Exodus32:31 tab moosa yahova ke pas jakar kahane laga, ki hay, hay, un logon ne sone ka devata banavakar bada hee pap kiya haai." 
Exodus32:32 taubhee ab too unaka pap kshama kar naheen to apanee likhee hui pustak men se mere nam ko katt de. 
Exodus32:33 yahova ne moosa se kaha, jis ne mere virooddh pap kiya haai usee ka nam maain apanee pustak men se katt doonga." 
Exodus32:34 ab to too jakar un logon ko us sthan men le chal jisakee charcha maain ne tujh se kee thee dekh mera doot tere age age chalega. parantu jis din maain dand dene lagoonga us din unako is pap ka bhee dand doonga. 
Exodus32:35 aur yahova ne un logon par vipaati dalee, kyonaki haroon ke banaae huae bachhde ko unheen ne banavaya tha." 
Exodus33:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, too un logon ko jinhen misr desh se chhuda laya haai sang lekar us desh ko ja, jisake vishay maain ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob se shapath khakar kaha tha, ki maain use tumhare vansh ko doonga." 
Exodus33:2 aur maain tere age age aek doot ko bhejoonga, aur kananee, aemoree, hittee, paarijjee, hibbee, aur yaboosee logon ko barabas nikal doonga." 
Exodus33:3 tum log us desh ko jao jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaara bahatee haai parantu tum hatteele ho, is karan maain tumhare beech men hoke n chaloonga, aeesa n ho ki maain marga men tumhara ant kar daloon." 
Exodus33:4 yah bura samachar sunakar ve log vilap karane lage aur koi apane gahane paahine huae n raha. 
Exodus33:5 kyonaki yahova ne moosa se kah diya tha, ki israaeliyon ko mera yah vachan suna, ki tum log to hatteele ho jo maai pal bhr ke liye tumhare beech hokar chaloo, to tumhara ant kar daloonga. isaaliye ab apane apane gahane apane angon se utar do, ki maain janoon ki tumhare sath kya karana chahiae." 
Exodus33:6 tab israaelee horeb parvat se lekar age ko apane gahane utare rahe.. 
Exodus33:7 moosa tamboo ko chhavanee se bahar varan door khda karaya karata tha, aur usako milapavala tamboo kahata tha. aur jo koi yahova ko ddoonddhta vah us milapavale tamboo ke pas jo chhavanee ke bahar tha nikal jata tha." 
Exodus33:8 aur jab jab moosa tamboo ke pas jata, tab tab sab log uttkar apane apane dere ke dar par khde ho jate, aur jab tak moosa us tamboo men pravesh n karata tha tab tak usakee or takate rahate the." 
Exodus33:9 aur jab moosa us tamboo men pravesh karata tha, tab badal ka khmbha utar ke tamboo ke dar par tthar jata tha, aur yahova moosa se baten karane lagata tha." 
Exodus33:10 aur sab log jab badal ke khmbhe ko tamboo ke dar par tthara dekhte the, tab uttkar apane apane dere ke dar par se dandvata karate the." 
Exodus33:11 aur yahova moosa se is prakar amhane-samhane baten karata tha, jis prakar koi apane bhai se baten kare. aur moosa to chhavanee men fir ata tha, par yahoshoo nam aek javan, jo noon ka putra aur moosa ka tthalua tha, vah tamboo men se n nikalata tha.." 
Exodus33:12 aur moosa ne yahova se kaha, sun too mujh se kahata haai, ki in logon ko le chala parantu yah naheen bataya ki too mere sang kisako bhejega. taubhee too ne kaha haai, ki tera nam mere chitt men basa haai, aur tujh par mere anugrah kee draashtti haai." 
Exodus33:13 aur ab yaadi mujh par tere anugrah kee draashtti ho, to mujhe apanee gaati samajha de, jis se jab maain tera gyaan paun tab tere anugrah kee drashtti mujh par banee rahe. fir isakee bhee sudhai kar ki yah jati teree praja haai." 
Exodus33:14 yahova ne kaha, maain ap chaloonga aur tujhe vishraam doonga." 
Exodus33:15 us ne us se kaha, yadi too ap n chale, to hamen yahan se age n le ja." 
Exodus33:16 yah kaaise jana jaae ki tere anugrah kee draashtti mujh par aur apanee praja par haai? kya is se naheen ki too hamare sang sang chale, jis se maain aur teree praja ke log prathvee bhr ke sab logon se alag ttharen?" 
Exodus33:17 yahova ne moosa se kaha, maain yah kam bhee jisakee charcha too ne kee haai karoonga kayonki mere anugrah kee draashtti tujh par haai, aur tera nam mere chitt men basa haai." 
Exodus33:18 us ne kaha mujhe apana tej dikha de. 
Exodus33:19 us ne kaha, maain tere sammukh hokar chalate huae tujhe apanee saree bhlai dikhaunga, aur tere sammukh yahova nam ka prachar karoonga, aur jis par maain anugrah karana chahoon usee par anugrah karoonga, aur jis par daya karana chanhoo usee par daya karoonga." 
Exodus33:20 fir us ne kaha, too mere mukh ka darshan naheen kar sakata kyonki manushy mere mukh ka darshan karake jeevit naheen rah sakata." 
Exodus33:21 fir yahova ne kaha, sun, mere pas aek sthan haai, too us chattan par khda ho" 
Exodus33:22 aur jab tak mera tej tere samhane hoke chalata rahe tab tak maai tujhe chattan ke darar men rakoonga, aur jab tak maain tere samhane hokar n nikal jaun tab tak apane hath se tujhe ddhanpe rahoonga" 
Exodus33:23 fir maain apana hath utta loonga, tab too meree peett ka to darshan paaega, parantu mere mukh ka darshan naheen milega.." 
Exodus34:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, paahilee taakhtaiyon ke saman patthr kee do aur takhtaiyan gaddh le tab jo vachan un paahilee taakhtaiyon par likhe the, jinhen too ne tod dala, ve hee vachan maain un takhtaiyon par bhee likoonga." 
Exodus34:2 aur bihan ko taaiyar rahana, aur bhor ko seenaai parvat par chaddhkar usakee chottee par mere samhane khda hona." 
Exodus34:3 aur tere sang koi n chaddh paa, varan parvat bhr par koi manushy kaheen dikhai n de aur n bhed-bakaree aur gaya-baail bhee parvat ke age charate paaen." 
Exodus34:4 tab moosa ne paahilee taakhtaiyon ke saman do aur takhtaiyan gaddhee aur bihan ko savere uttkar apane hath men patthr kee ve donon takhtaiyan lekar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar parvat par chaddh gaya. 
Exodus34:5 tab yahova ne badal men utarake usake sang vahan khda hokar yahova nam ka prachar kiya. 
Exodus34:6 aur yahova usake samhane hokar yon prachar karata hua chala, ki yahova, yahova, ishvar dayalu aur anugrahakaree, kop karane men dhaeerajavant, aur aati karoonamay aur saty," 
Exodus34:7 hajaron peeaddhiyon tak nirantar karoona karanevala, adharma aur aparadha aur pap ka kshama karanevala haai, parantu doshaee ko vah kisee prakar nirdosh n ttharaaega, vah pitaron ke adharma ka dand unake betton varan poton aur parapoton ko bhee denevala haai." 
Exodus34:8 tab moosa ne faurtee kar prathvee kee or jhukakar dandvata kee. 
Exodus34:9 aur us ne kaha, he prabhu, yaadi tere anugrah kee draashtti mujh par ho to prabhu, ham logon ke beech men hokar chale, ye log hatteele to haai, taubhee hamare adharma aur pap ko kshama kar, aur hamen apana nij bhag manake grahan kara." 
Exodus34:10 us ne kaha, sun, maain ek vacha bandhata hoon. tere sab logon ke samhane maain aeese ashcharya karma karoonga jaaisa prathvee par aur sab jatiyon men kabhee naheen hue aur ve sare log jinake beech too rahata haai yahova ke karya ko dekhenge kyonki jo maain tum logon se karane par hoon vah bhy yogy kam haai." 
Exodus34:11 jo agyaa maain aj tumhen deta hoon use tum log manana. dekho, maain tumhare age se aemoree, kananee, hittee, paarijjee, hibbee, aur yaboosee logon ko nikalata hoon." 
Exodus34:12 isaliye savadhaan rahana ki jis desh men too janevala haai usake nivaasiyon se vacha n bandhana kaheen aeesa n ho ki vah tere liye fanda tthare. 
Exodus34:13 varan unakee vediyon ko gira dena, unakee latton ko tod dalana, aur unakee ashora nam moortiyon ko katt dalana" 
Exodus34:14 kyonaki tumhen kisee doosare ko ishvar karake dandvata karane kee agyaa nahee, kyonki yahova jisaka nam jalanashaeel haai, vah jal uttnevala ishvar haai hee," 
Exodus34:15 aeesa n ho ki too us desh ke nivaasiyon se vacha bandho, aur ve apane devataon ke peechhe hone ka vyabhaichar kare, aur unake liye baalidan bhee kare, aur koi tujhe nevata de aur too bhee usake balipashu ka prasad khaa," 
Exodus34:16 aur too unakee beattyaien ko apane betton ke liye lave, aur unakee bettyaian jo ap apane devataon ke peechhe hone ka vyaabhaichar karatee haai tere betton se bhee apane devataon ke peechhe hone ko vyaabhaichar karavaaen." 
Exodus34:17 tum devataon kee mootiayan ddhalakar n bana lena. 
Exodus34:18 akhmeeree rottee ka pabrba manana. us men meree agyaa ke anusar abeeb maheene ke niyat samay par sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khaya karana kyonaki too misr se abeeb maheene men nikal aya. 
Exodus34:19 har aek paahilautta mera haai aur kya bachhda, kya memna, tere pashuuon men se jo nar paahilautte hon ve sab mere hee haain." 
Exodus34:20 aur gadahee ke paahilautte kee santee memna dekar usako chhudana, yadi too use chhudana n chahe to usakee gardan tod dena. parantu apane sab pahilautte betton ko badala dekar chhudana. mujhe koi choochhe hath apana munh n dikhaae." 
Exodus34:21 chh: din to parishram karana, parantu sataven din vishraam karana varan hal jotane aur lavane ke samay men bhee vishraam karana." 
Exodus34:22 aur too attvaron ka pabrba manana jo pahile lave huae gehoon ka pabrba kahalata haai, aur varsha ke ant men battoran ka bhee pabrba manana." 
Exodus34:23 varsha men teen bar tere sab puroosh israael ke parameshvar prabhu yahova ko apane munh dikhaaen. 
Exodus34:24 maain to anyajaatiyon ko tere age se nikalakar tere sivanon ko baddhaunga aur jab too apane parameshvar yahova ko apana munh dikhane ke liye varsha men teen bar aya kare, tab koi teree boomi ka lalach n karega." 
Exodus34:25 mere balidan ke lohoo ko khmeer saahit n chaddhana, aur n fasah ke pabrba ke balidan men se kuchh bihan tak rahane dena." 
Exodus34:26 apanee boomi kee pahilee upaj ka pahila bhag apane parameshvar yahova ke bhvan men le ana. bakaree ke bachche ko usakee man ke doodha men ne sijhana. 
Exodus34:27 aur yahova ne moosa se kaha, ye vachan likh le kyonki inheen vachanon ke anusar maain tere aur israael ke sath vacha bandhata hoon." 
Exodus34:28 moosa to vahan yahova ke sang chalees din aur rat raha aur tab tak n to us ne rottee khai aur n panee piya. aur us ne un taakhtaiyon par vacha ke vachan arthata das agyaaaen likh deen.. 
Exodus34:29 jab moosa sakshaee kee donon taakhtaiyan hath men liye huae seenaai parvat se utara ata tha tab yahova ke sath baten karane ke karan usake chehare se kiranen nikal rahee thee, parantu vah yah naheen janata tha ki usake chehare se kiranen nikal rahee haain." 
Exodus34:30 jab haroon aur sab israaeliyon ne moosa ko dekha ki usake chehare se kiranen nikalatee haai, tab ve usake pas jane se dr gaae." 
Exodus34:31 tab moosa ne unako bulaya aur haroon mandlee ke sare pradhaanon samet usake pas aya, aur moosa un se baten karane laga." 
Exodus34:32 isake bad sab israaelee pas aa, aur jitanee agyaaaen yahova ne seenaai parvat par usake sath bat karane ke samay dee thee, ve sab us ne unhen batain." 
Exodus34:33 jab tak moosa un se bat n kar chuka tab tak apane munh par oddhna dale raha. 
Exodus34:34 aur jab jab moosa bheetar yahova se bat karane ko usake samhane jata tab tab vah us oddhnee ko nikalate samay tak utare huae rahata tha fir bahar akar jo jo agyaa use milatee unhen israaeliyon se kah deta tha. 
Exodus34:35 so israaelee moosa ka chehara dekhte the ki us se kiranen nikalatee haain aur jab tak vah yahova se bat karane ko bheetar n jata tab tak vah us oddhnee ko dale rahata tha.. 
Exodus35:1 moosa ne israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ikatthee karake un se kaha, jin kamon ke karane kee agyaa yahova ne dee haai ve ye haain." 
Exodus35:2 chh: din to kam kaj kiya jaa, parantu satavan din tumhare liye paavitra aur yahova ke liye paramaavishraam ka din tthare us men jo koi kam kaj kare vah mar dala jaae" 
Exodus35:3 varan vishraam ke din tum apane apane gharon men ag tak n jalana.. 
Exodus35:4 fir moosa ne israaeliyon kee saree mandlee se kaha, jis bat kee agyaa yahova ne dee haai vah yah haai." 
Exodus35:5 tumhare pas se yahova ke liye bhentt lee jaa, arthata jitane apanee ichchha se dena chahen ve yahova kee bhentt karake ye vastuaen le aaen arthata sona, roopa, peetala" 
Exodus35:6 neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ka kapada, sooksham sanee ka kapada bakaree ka bal," 
Exodus35:7 lal rang se rangee hui meddhon kee khale, suison kee khalen babool kee lakadee," 
Exodus35:8 ujiyala dene ke liye tel, abhaishok ka tel, aur dhoop ke liye sugandhadravy," 
Exodus35:9 fir aepod aur chaparas ke liye sulaaimanee maanai aur jadne ke liye maanai. 
Exodus35:10 aur tum men se jitanon ke day men buaddh ika prakash haai ve sab akar jis jis vastu kee agyaa yahova ne dee haai ve sab banaaen. 
Exodus35:11 arthata tambo, aur ohar samet nivas, aur usakee ghaundee, takhte, bende, khmbhe aur kursiyan" 
Exodus35:12 fir dndon samet sandook, aur praayaashchaitt ka ddhkana, aur beechavala parda" 
Exodus35:13 dndon aur sab saman samet meja, aur bhentt kee rottyaian" 
Exodus35:14 saman aur deepakon samet ujiyala denevala deevat, aur ujiyala dene ke liye tela" 
Exodus35:15 dndon samet dhoopavedee, aabhaishok ka tel, sugaandhiat dhoop, aur nivas ke dar ka parda" 
Exodus35:16 peetal kee jhnjhree, dndon aadi sare saman samet homavedee, paae samet hodee" 
Exodus35:17 khmbhon aur unakee kuarsiyon samet angan ke parde, aur angan ke dar ke parde" 
Exodus35:18 nivas aur angan donon ke koontte, aur doriyan" 
Exodus35:19 paavitrasthan men seva tthal karane ke liye kaddhe huae vasr, aur yajak ka kam karane ke liye haroon yajak ke paavitra vasr, aur usake putraen ke vasr bhee.." 
Exodus35:20 tab israaeliyon kee saree mandlee moosa ke samhane se lautt gai. 
Exodus35:21 aur jitanon ko utsah hua, aur jitanon ke man men aeesee ichchha utpann hui thee, ve milapavale tamboo ke kam karane aur usakee saree sevakai aur pavitra vasren ke banane ke liye yahova kee bhentt le ane lage." 
Exodus35:22 kya sre, kya puroosha, jitanon ke man men aeesee ichchha utpann hui bhee ve sab jugano, nathunee, mundaree, aur kangan aadi sone ke gahane le ane lage, is bhnati jitane manushy yahova ke liye sone kee bhentt ke denevale the ve sab unako le aae." 
Exodus35:23 aur jis jis puroosh ke pas neele, baainjanee va lal rang ka kapada va sooksham sanee ka kapada, va bakaree ka bal, va lal rang se rangee hui meddhon kee khale, va sooison kee khalen thee ve unhen le aae." 
Exodus35:24 fir jitane chandee, va peetal kee bhentt ke denevale the ve yahova ke liye vaaisee bhentt le aae aur jis jisake pas sevakai ke kisee kam ke liye babool kee lakadee thee ve use le aae." 
Exodus35:25 aur jitanee striayon ke day men buaddh ika prakash tha ve apane hathon se soot kat katakar neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke, aur sooksham sanee ke kate huae soot ko le ai." 
Exodus35:26 aur jitanee striayon ke man men aeesee buaddh ika prakash tha unho ne bakaree ke bal bhee kate. 
Exodus35:27 aur pradhaan log aepod aur chaparas ke liye sulaaimanee maanai, aur jadne ke liye maanai," 
Exodus35:28 aur ujiyala dene aur aabhaishok aur dhoop ke sugandhadravy aur tel le aye. 
Exodus35:29 jis jis vastu ke banane kee agyaa yahova ne moosa ke dara dee thee usake liye jo kuchh avashyak tha, use ve sab puroosh aur striayan le ai, jinake day men aeesee ichchha utpann hui thee. is prakar israaelee yahova ke liye apanee hee ichchha se bhentt le aae.." 
Exodus35:30 tab moosa ne israaeliyon se kaha suno, yahova ne yahooda ke gotravale basalel ko, jo uree ka putra aur hoor ka pota haai, nam lekar bulaya haai." 
Exodus35:31 aur us ne usako parameshvar ke atma se aeesa paripoorn kiya he ki sab prakar kee banavatt ke liye usako aeesee buddh,i samaj, aur gyaan mila haai," 
Exodus35:32 ki vah kareegaree kee yuaktaiyan nikalakar sone, chandee, aur peetal me," 
Exodus35:33 aur jadne ke liye maanai kattne men aur lakadee ke khodane me, varan buaddh ise sab bhanti kee nikalee hui banavatt men kam kar sake." 
Exodus35:34 fir yahova ne usake man men aur dan ke gotravale aheesamak ke putra oholeeab ke man men bhee shaiksha dene kee shaktai dee haai. 
Exodus35:35 in donon ke day ko yahova ne aeesee buddh ise paaripoorn kiya haai, ki ve khodane aur gaddhne aur neele, baaijanee aur lal rang ke kapade, aur sooksham sanee ke kapade men kaddhne aur bunane, varan sab prakar kee banavatt me, aur buddh ise kam nikalane men sab bhanti ke kam karen.." 
Exodus36:1 aur basalel aur oholeeab aur sab buddhmaian jinako yahova ne aeesee buaddh iddh aur samajh dee ho, ki ve yahova kee saree agyaaon ke anusar paavitrasthan kee sevakai ke liye sab prakar ka kam karana jane, ve sab yah kam karen.." 
Exodus36:2 tab moosa ne basalel aur oholeeab aur sab buddhmaianon ko jinake day men yahova ne buaddh ika prakash diya tha, arthata jis jisako pas akar kam karane ka utsah hua tha un sabhon ko bulavaya." 
Exodus36:3 aur israaelee jo jo bhentt pavitrasthan kee sevakai ke kam aur usake banane ke liye le aae the, unhen un purooshaen ne moosa ke hath se le liya. tab bhee log praati bhor ko usake pas bhentt apanee ichchha se late rahen" 
Exodus36:4 aur jitane buddhmaian paavitrasthan ka kam karate the ve sab apana apana kam chhodkar moosa ke pas aa," 
Exodus36:5 aur kahane lage, jis kam ke karane kee agyaa yahova ne dee haai usake liye jitana chahiye usase aadhaik ve le aae haain." 
Exodus36:6 tab moosa ne saree chhavanee men is agyaa ka prachar karavaya, ki kya puroosha, kya sre, koi pavitrasthan ke liye aur bhentt n laa, is prakar log aur bhentt lane se roke gaae." 
Exodus36:7 kyonaki sab kam banane ke liye jitana saman avashyak tha utana varan usase aadhaik banane valon ke pas a chuka tha.. 
Exodus36:8 aur kam karanevale jitane buddhmaian the unhon ne nivas ke liye battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ke, aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ke das patton ko kaddhe huae karoobon sahit banaya." 
Exodus36:9 aek aek patt kee lambai atthais hath aur chaudai char hath kee hui sab patt aek hee nap ke bane. 
Exodus36:10 us ne panch patt ek doosare se jod dia, aur fir doosare panch patt bhee ek doosare se jod die." 
Exodus36:11 aur jahan ye patt jode gaae vahan kee donon chhoron par us ne peelee neelee faaliyan lagain. 
Exodus36:12 us ne donon chhoron men pachas pachas faaliyan is prakar lagai ki ve amhane-samhane hui. 
Exodus36:13 aur us ne sone kee pachas ghaunadyaian banai, aur unake dara patton ko aek doosare se aeesa joda ki nivas milakar aek ho gaya." 
Exodus36:14 fir nivas ke upar ke tamboo ke liye us ne bakaree ke bal ke gyarah patt banaae. 
Exodus36:15 aek aek patt kee lambai tees hath aur chaudai char hath kee hui aur gyarahon patt aek hee nap ke the. 
Exodus36:16 in men se us ne panch patt alag aur chh: patt alag jod diae. 
Exodus36:17 aur jahan donon jode gaae vahan kee chhoron men us ne pachas pachas faaliyan lagain. 
Exodus36:18 aur us ne tamboo ke jodne ke liye peetal kee pachas ghaunadyaian bhee banai jis se vah aek ho jaae. 
Exodus36:19 aur us ne tamboo ke liye lal rang se rangee hui menddhon kee khalon ka aek oddhna aur usake upar ke liye sooison kee khalon ka bhee aek oddhna banaya. 
Exodus36:20 fir us ne nivas ke liye babool kee lakadee ke takhton ko khde rahane ke liye banaya. 
Exodus36:21 aek aek takhte kee lambai das hath aur chaudai deddh hath kee hui. 
Exodus36:22 aek aek takhte men aek doosaree se jodee hui do do choolen banee, nivas ke sab takhton ke liyen us ne isee bhnaati banain." 
Exodus36:23 aur us ne nivas ke liye takhton ko is reeati se banaya, ki dakkhian kee or bees takhte lage." 
Exodus36:24 aur in beeson takhton ke neeche chandee kee chalees kursiya, arthata aek aek takhte ke neeche usakee do choolon ke liye us ne do kuarsiyan banain." 
Exodus36:25 aur nivas kee doosaree alang, arthata uttr kee or ke liye bhee us ne bees takhte banaae." 
Exodus36:26 aur inake liye bhee us ne chandee kee chalees kursiya, arthata aek aek takhte ke neeche do do kuarsiyan banain." 
Exodus36:27 aur nivas kee pichhlee alang, arthata paashchaim or ke liye us ne chh: takhte banaae." 
Exodus36:28 aur pichhlee alang men nivas ke konon ke liye us ne do takhte banaae. 
Exodus36:29 aur ve neeche se do do bhag ke bane, aur donon bhag upar se sire tak un donon takhton ka ddhb aeesa hee banaya." 
Exodus36:30 is prakar att takhte hua, aur unakee chandee kee solah kuarsiyan hui, arthata aek aek takhte ke neeche do do kuarsiyan huin." 
Exodus36:31 fir us ne babool kee lakadee ke bende banaa, arthata nivas kee aek alang ke takhton ke liye panch bende," 
Exodus36:32 aur nivas kee doosaree alang ke takhton ke liye panch bende, aur nivas kee jo alang paashchaim or pichhle bhag men thee usake liye bhee panch bende, banaae." 
Exodus36:33 aur us ne beechavale bende ko takhton ke madhy men tamboo ke aek sire se doosare sire tak pahunchane ke liye banaya. 
Exodus36:34 aur takhton ko us ne sone se maddha, aur bendon ke ghar ko kam denevale kadon ko sone ke banaya, aur bendon ko bhee sone se maddha.." 
Exodus36:35 fir us ne neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ka, aur battee hui sooksham saneevale kapade ka beechavala parda banaya vah kaddhai ke kam kiye huae karoobon ke sath bana." 
Exodus36:36 aur us ne usake liye babool ke char khmbhe banaa, aur unako sone se maddha unakee ghaunadyaian sone kee banee, aur us ne unake liye chandee kee char kuarsiyan ddhaleen."
