Exodus36:37 aur us ne tamboo ke dar ke liye neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ka, aur battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ka kaddhai ka kam kiya hua parda banaya." 
Exodus36:38 aur us ne ghaunadyaien samet usake panch khmbhe bhee banaa, aur unake siron aur jodne kee chhdon ko sone se maddha, aur unakee panch kuarsiyan peetal kee banain.." 
Exodus37:1 fir basalel ne babool kee lakadee ka sandook banaya usakee lambai addhai hat, chaudai deddh hat, aur unchai deddh hath kee thee." 
Exodus37:2 aur us ne usako bheetar bahar chokhe sone se maddha, aur usake charon or sone kee bad banai." 
Exodus37:3 aur usake charon payon par lagane ko us ne sone ke char kade ddhale, do kade aek alang aur do kade doosaree alang par lage." 
Exodus37:4 fir us ne babool ke dnde banaa, aur unhen sone se maddha," 
Exodus37:5 aur unako sandook kee dono alangon ke kadon men dala ki unake bal sandook uttaya jaae. 
Exodus37:6 fir us ne chokhe sone ke praayashchaittvale ddhkane ko banaya usakee lambai addhai hath aur chaudai deddh hath kee thee. 
Exodus37:7 aur us ne sona gaddhkar do karoob praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ke danon siron par banaae 
Exodus37:8 aek karoob to aek sire par, aur doosara karoob doosare sire par bana us ne unako praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ke sath aek hee ttukade ke donon siron par banaya." 
Exodus37:9 aur karoobon ke pankh upar se faaile huae bane, aur un pankhon se praayaashchaitt ka ddhkana ddhpa hua bana, aur unake mukh amhane-samhane aur praayaashchaitt ke ddhkane kee or kiae huae bane.." 
Exodus37:10 fir us ne babool kee lakadee kee meja ko banaya usakee lambai do hat, chaudai aek hat, aur unchai deddh hath kee thee" 
Exodus37:11 aur us ne usako chokhe sone se maddha, aur us men charon or sone kee aek bad banai." 
Exodus37:12 aur us ne usake liye char angul chaudee aek pattree, aur is pattree ke liye charon or sone kee aek bad banai." 
Exodus37:13 aur us ne meja ke liye sone ke char kade ddhalakar un charon konon men lagaya, jo usake charon payon par the." 
Exodus37:14 ve kade pattree ke pas meja uttane ke dndon ke khanon ka kam dene ko bane. 
Exodus37:15 aur us ne menja uttane ke liye dndon ko babool kee lakadee ke banaya, aur sone se maddha." 
Exodus37:16 aur us ne meja par ka saman arthata parat, dhoopadan, kattore, aur undelane ke bartan sab chokhe sone ke banaae.." 
Exodus37:17 fir us ne chokha sona gaddhke paae aur dndee samet deevatt ko banaya usake pushpakosha, gant, aur fool sab aek hee ttukade ke bane." 
Exodus37:18 aur deevatt se nikalee hui chh: daaliyan baneen teen daaliyan to usakee aek alang se aur teen daaliyan usakee doosaree alang se nikalee hui baneen. 
Exodus37:19 aek aek dalee men badam ke fool ke sareekhe teen teen pushpakosha, aek aek gant, aur aek aek fool bana deevatt se nikalee hui, un chhhon daliyon ka yahee ddhb hua." 
Exodus37:20 aur deevatt kee dndee men badam ke fool ke saman apanee apanee gantt aur fool samet char pushpakosh bane. 
Exodus37:21 aur deevatt se nikalee hui chhhon daliyon men se do do daaliyon ke neeche aek aek gantt deevatt ke sath aek hee ttukade kee banee. 
Exodus37:22 gantte aur daaliyan sab deevatt ke sath aek hee ttukade kee baneen sara deevatt gaddhe huae chokhe sone ka aur aek hee ttukade ka bana. 
Exodus37:23 aur us ne deevatt ke saton deepak, aur gulatarasha, aur guladan, chokhe sone ke banaae." 
Exodus37:24 us ne sare saman samet deevatt ko kikkar bhr sone ka banaya.. 
Exodus37:25 fir us ne babool kee lakadee kee dhoopavedee bhee banai usakee lambai aek hath aur chaudai aek hath hee thee vah chaukor banee, aur usakee unchai aek hath kee thee vah chaukor banee, aur usakee unchai do hath kee thee aur usake seeng usake sath bina jod ke bane the" 
Exodus37:26 aur uparavale pallo, aur charon or kee alango, aur seengo samet us ne us vedee ko chokhe sone se maddha aur usakee charon or sone kee aek bad banai," 
Exodus37:27 aur us bad ke neeche usake donon pallon par us ne sone ke do kade banaa, jo usake uttane ke dndon ke khanon ka kam den." 
Exodus37:28 aur dndon ko us ne babool kee lakadee ka banaya, aur sone se maddha." 
Exodus37:29 aur us ne aabhaishok ka paavitra tel, aur sugandhadravy ka dhoop, gandhaee kee reeti ke anusar banaya.." 
Exodus38:1 fir us ne babool kee lakadee kee homabaali bhee banai usakee lambai panch hath aur chaudai panch hath kee thee is prakar se vah chaukor banee, aur unchai teen hath kee thee." 
Exodus38:2 aur us ne usake charon konon par usake char seeng banaa, ve usake sath bina jod ke bane aur us ne usako peetal se maddha." 
Exodus38:3 aur us ne vedee ka sara saman, arthata usakee handiyo, faavaadiyo, kattoro, kantto, aur karachhon ko banaya. usaka sara saman us ne peetal ka banaya." 
Exodus38:4 aur vedee ke liye usake charon or kee kanganee ke tale us ne peetal kee jalee kee aek jhnjhree banai, vah neeche se vedee kee unchai ke madhy tak pahunchee." 
Exodus38:5 aur us ne peetal kee jhnjhree ke charon konon ke liye char kade ddhale, jo dndon ke khanon ka kam den." 
Exodus38:6 fir us ne dndon ko babool kee lakadee ka banaya, aur peetal se maddha." 
Exodus38:7 tab us ne dndon ko vedee kee alangon ke kadon men vedee ke uttane ke liye dal diya. vedee ko us ne takhton se khokhlee banaya.. 
Exodus38:8 aur use ne haudee aur usaka paya donon peetal ke banaa, yah milapavale tamboo ke dar par seva karanevalee maahilaon ke darpanon ke liye peetal ke banaae gaae.." 
Exodus38:9 fir us ne angan banaya aur dakkhian alang ke liye angan ke parde battee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ke the, aur sab milakar sau hath lambe the" 
Exodus38:10 unake liye bees khmbhe, aur inakee peetal kee bees kursiyan banee aur khmbhon kee ghaundyaian aur jodne kee chhden chandee kee baneen." 
Exodus38:11 aur uttr alag ke liye bees khmbhe, aur inakee peetal kee bees hee kursiyan banee, aur khmbhon kee ghaundyaian aur jodne kee chhden chandee kee banee." 
Exodus38:12 aur paashchaim alang ke liye sab parde milakar pachas hath ke the unake liye das khmbhe, aur das hee unakee kuarsiyan thee, aur khmbhon kee ghanuadyaian aur jodne kee chhden chandee kee theen." 
Exodus38:13 aur poorab alang men bhee vah pachas hath ke the. 
Exodus38:14 angan ke dar ke aek or ke liye pandrah hath ke parde bane aur unake liye teen khmbhe aur teen kuarsiyan thee. 
Exodus38:15 aur angan ke dar kee doosaree or bhee vaaisa hee bana tha aur angan ke daravajae ke idhar aur udhar pandrah pandrah hath ke parde bane the aur unake liye teen hee khmbhe, aur teen hee teen inakee kuarsiyan bhee theen." 
Exodus38:16 angan kee charon or sab parde sooksham battee hui sanee ke kapade ke bane huae the. 
Exodus38:17 aur khmbhon kee kuarsiyan peetal kee, aur ghaundyaian aur chhde chandee kee banee, aur unake sire chandee se maddhe gaa, aur angan ke sab khmbhe chandee ke chhdon se jode gaae the." 
Exodus38:18 angan ke dar ke parde par bel bootte ka kam kiya hua tha, aur vah neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ka aur sooksham battee hui sanee ke kapade ke bane the aur usakee lambai bees hath kee thee, aur usakee unchai angan kee kanat kee chaudai ke saman panch hath kee banee." 
Exodus38:19 aur unake liye char khmbhe, aur khmbhon kee char hee kuarsiyan peetal kee banee, unakee ghaundyaian chandee kee banee, aur unake sire chandee se maddhe gaa, aur unakee chhden chandee kee baneen." 
Exodus38:20 aur nivas aur angan kee charon or ke sab koontte peetal ke bane the.. 
Exodus38:21 sakshaeepatra ke nivas ka saman jo leviyon kee sevakai ke liye bana aur jisakee ginatee haroon yajak ke putra itamar ke dara moosa ke kahane se hui thee, usaka varnn yah haai." 
Exodus38:22 jis jis vastu ke banane kee agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee usako yahooda ke gotravale basalel ne, jo hoor ka pota aur uree ka putra tha, bana diya." 
Exodus38:23 aur usake sang dan ke gotravale, aheesamak ke putra, oholeeab tha, jo khodane aur kaddhnevala aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke aur sooksham sanee ke kapade men karachob karanevala nipun kareegar tha.." 
Exodus38:24 paavitrasthan ke sare kam men jo bhentt ka sona laga vah unatees kikkar, aur paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se sat sau teen shokel tha." 
Exodus38:25 aur mandlee ke gine huae logon kee bhentt kee chandee sau kikkar, aur paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se sattrah sau pachahattr shokel thee." 
Exodus38:26 arthata jitane bees baras ke aur usase aadhaik avastha ke gine gaae the, ve chh: lakh teen hajaar saddhe panch sau puroosh the, aur aek aek jan kee or se pavitrasthan ke shokel ke anusar adha shokel, jo aek beka hota haai mila." 
Exodus38:27 aur vah sau kikkar chandee pavitrasthan aur beechavale parde donon kee kursiyon ke ddhalane men lag gai sau kikkar se sau kursiyan banee, aek aek kursee aek kikkar kee banee." 
Exodus38:28 aur sattrah sau pachahattr shokel jo bach gaae un se khmbhon kee chottyaian maddhee gai, aur unakee chhden bhee banai gai." 
Exodus38:29 aur bhentt ka peetal sattr kikkar aur do hajaar char sau shokel tha 
Exodus38:30 usase milapavale tamboo ke dar kee kursiya, aur peetal kee vedee, peetal kee jhnjhree, aur vedee ka sara samana" 
Exodus38:31 aur angan ke charon or kee kursiya, aur angan kee charon or ke koontte bhee banaae gaae.." 
Exodus39:1 fir unhon ne neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kaddhe huae kapade pavitra sthan kee sevakai ke liye, aur haroon ke liye bhee paavitra vasr banaae jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.." 
Exodus39:2 aur us ne aepod ko sone, aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ka aur sooksham battee hui sanee ke kapade ka banaya." 
Exodus39:3 aur unhon ne sona peett-peettkar usake pattr banaa, fir pattron ko katt-kattkar tar banaa, aur taron ko neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade me, aur sooksham sanee ke kapade men kaddhai kee banavatt se mila diya." 
Exodus39:4 aepod ke jodne ko unhon ne usake kandhaen par ke bandhan banaa, vah to apane donon siron se joda gaya." 
Exodus39:5 aur usake kasane ke liye jo kaddha hua pattuka us par bana, vah usake sath bina jod ka, aur usee kee banavatt ke anusar, arthata sone aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ka, aur sooksham battee hui sanee ke kapade ka bana jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.." 
Exodus39:6 aur unhon ne sulaaimanee maanai kattkar unamen israael ke putraen ke nam jaaisa chhapa khoda jata haai vaaise hee khode, aur sone ke khanon men jad diae." 
Exodus39:7 aur us ne unako aepod ke kandho ke bandhanon par lagaya, jis se israaeliyon ke liye smaran karane vale manai ttharen jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.." 
Exodus39:8 aur us ne chaparas ko aepod kee nai sone kee, aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade kee, aur sooksham battee hui sanee ke kapade men bel bootte ka kam kiya hua banaya." 
Exodus39:9 chaparas to chaukor banee aur unho ne usako dohara banaya, aur vah dohara hokar aek bitta lamba aur aek bitta chauda bana." 
Exodus39:10 aur unhon ne us men char panti manai jade. pahilee panti men to manaiky, padhymarag, aur laladee jade gaae" 
Exodus39:11 aur doosaree panati men marakat, neelamaanai, aur heera," 
Exodus39:12 aur teesaree panti men lasham, sooryakant, aur neelama" 
Exodus39:13 aur chauthee panati men faeeroja, sulaaimanee manai, aur yashab jade ye sab alag alag sone ke khanon men jade gaae." 
Exodus39:14 aur ye maanai israael ke putraen ke nam kee ginatee ke anusar barah the barahon gotraen men se aek aek ka nam jaaisa chhapa khoda jata haai vaaisa hee khoda gaya. 
Exodus39:15 aur unhon ne chaparas par doriyon kee nai goonthe huae chokhe sone kee janjeer banakar lagai 
Exodus39:16 fir unhon ne sone ke do khane, aur sone kee do kaadiyan banakar donon kadiyon ko chaparas ke donon siron par lagaya" 
Exodus39:17 tab unhon ne sone kee donon goonthee hui janjeero ko chaparas ke siron par kee donon kadiyon men lagaya. 
Exodus39:18 aur goonthee hui donon janjeeron ke donon bakee siron ko unhon ne donon khanon men jadke, aepod ke samhane donon kandhaen ke bandhanon par lagaya." 
Exodus39:19 aur unhon ne sone kee aur do kadiyan banakar chaparas ke donon siron par usakee us kor par, jo aepod kee bheetaree bhag men thee, lagain." 
Exodus39:20 aur unhon ne sone kee do aur kadiyan bhee banakar aepod ke donon kandhaen ke bandhanon par neeche se usake samhane, aur jod ke pas, aepod ke kaddhe huae pattuke ke upar lagain." 
Exodus39:21 tab unhon ne chaparas ko usakee kaadiyon ke dara aepod kee kaadiyon men neele faeete se aeesa bandha, ki vah aepod ke kaddhe huae pattuke ke upar rahe, aur chaparas aepod se alag n hone paae jaaise yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.." 
Exodus39:22 fir aepod ka baga sampoorn neele rang ka banaya gaya. 
Exodus39:23 aur usakee banavatt aeesee hui ki usake beech bakhtar ke chhed ke saman aek chhed bana, aur chhed ke charon or aek kor banee, ki vah fattne n paae." 
Exodus39:24 aur unhon ne usake neechevale ghore men neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke kapade ke anar banaae." 
Exodus39:25 aur unhon ne chokhe sone kee ghanttyaian bhee banakar bage ke neeche vale ghore ke charon or anaron ke beechon beech lagain 
Exodus39:26 arthata bage ke neechevale ghore kee charon or aek sone kee ghanttee, aur aek anar lagaya gaya ki unhen pahine huae seva tthal karen jaaise yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.." 
Exodus39:27 fir unhon ne haroon, aur usake putraen ke liye bunee hui sooksham sanee ke kapade ke angarakhe," 
Exodus39:28 aur sooksham sanee ke kapade kee pagadee, aur sooksham sanee ke kapade kee sundar ttopiya, aur sooksham battee hui sanee ke kapade kee janaghaiya," 
Exodus39:29 aur sooksham battee hui sanee ke kapade kee aur neele, baainjanee aur lal rang kee karachobee kam kee hui pagadee in sabhon ko jis tarah yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee vaaisa hee banaya.." 
Exodus39:30 fir unhon ne pavitra mukutt kee pattree chokhe sone kee banai aur jaaise chhape men vaaise hee us men ye akshar khode gaa, arthata yahova ke liye paavitra." 
Exodus39:31 aur unhon ne us men neela faeeta lagaya, jis se vah upar pagadee par rahe, jis tarah yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.." 
Exodus39:32 is prakar milapavale tamboo ke nivas ka sab kam samapt hua, aur jis jis kam kee agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee, israaeliyon ne usee ke anusar kiya.." 
Exodus39:33 tab ve nivas ko moosa ke pas le aa, arthata ghanuadyaia, takhte, bende, khmbhe, kuarsiyan aadi sare saman samet tamboo" 
Exodus39:34 aur lal rang se rangee hui meddhon kee khalon ka oddhna, aur sooison kee khalon ka oddhna, aur beech ka parda" 
Exodus39:35 dndon saahit sakshaeepatra ka sandook, aur praayashchaitt ka ddhkana" 
Exodus39:36 sare saman samet meja, aur bhentt kee rottee" 
Exodus39:37 sare saman saahit deevat, aur usakee sajavatt ke deepak aur ujiyala dene ke liye tela" 
Exodus39:38 sone kee vedee, aur aabhaishok ka tel, aur sugaandhiat dhoop, aur tamboo ke dar ka parda" 
Exodus39:39 peetal kee jhnjhree, dndo, aur sare saman samet peetal kee vedee aur paae samet haudee" 
Exodus39:40 khmbho, aur kursiyon samet angan ke parde, aur angan ke dar ka parda, aur doriya, aur koontte, aur milapavale tamboo ke nivas kee sevakai ka sara samana" 
Exodus39:41 paavitrasthan men seva tthal karane ke liye bel bootta kaddhe huae vasr, aur haroon yajak ke paavitra vasr, aur usake putraen ke vasr jinhen pahinakar unhen yajak ka kam karana tha." 
Exodus39:42 arthata jo jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee theen unheen ke anusar israaeliyon ne sab kam kiya. 
Exodus39:43 tab moosa ne sare kam ka nireekshan karake dekha, ki unhon ne yahova kee agyaa ke anusar sab kuchh kiya haai. aur moosa ne unako ashaeervad diya.." 
Exodus40:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Exodus40:2 paahile maheene ke paahile din ko too milapavale tamboo ke nivas ko khda kara dena. 
Exodus40:3 aur us men sakshaeepatra ke sandook ko rakhkar beechavale parde kee ott men kara dena. 
Exodus40:4 aur meja ko bheetar le jakar jo kuchh us par sajana haai use sajava dena 
Exodus40:5 aur sakshaeepatra ke sandook ke samhane sone kee vedee ko jo dhoop ke liye haai use rakhna, aur nivas ke dar ke parde ko laga dena." 
Exodus40:6 aur milapavale tamboo ke nivas ke dar ke samhane homavedee ko rakhna. 
Exodus40:7 aur milapavale tamboo aur vedee ke beech hodee ko rakhke us men jal bhrana. 
Exodus40:8 aur charon or ke angan kee kanat ko khda karana, aur us angan ke dar par parde ko lattka dena." 
Exodus40:9 aur aabhaishok ka tel lekar nivas ko aur jo kuchh us men hoga sab kuchh ka abhaishok karana, aur sare saman samet usako pavitra karana tab vah paavitra ttharega." 
Exodus40:10 aur sab saman samet homavedee ka abhaishok karake usako paavitra karana tab vah paramapavitra ttharegee. 
Exodus40:11 aur paae samet haudee ka bhee abhaishok karake use pavitra karana. 
Exodus40:12 aur haroon aur usake putraen ko milapavale tamboo ke dar par le jakar jal se nahalana," 
Exodus40:13 aur haroon ko pavitra vasr pahinana, aur usaka abhaishok karake usako paavitra karana, ki vah mere liye yajak ka kam kare." 
Exodus40:14 aur usake putraen ko le jakar angarakhe pahinana," 
Exodus40:15 aur jaaise too unake pita ka aabhaishok kare vaaise hee unaka bhee abhaishok karana, ki ve mere liye yajak ka kam karen aur unaka abhaishok unakee peeddhee peeddhee ke liye unake sada ke yajakapad ka chinh ttharega." 
Exodus40:16 aur moosa ne jo jo agyaa yahova ne usako dee thee usee ke anusar kiya.. 
Exodus40:17 aur doosare baras ke paahile maheene ke paahile din ko nivas khda kiya gaya. 
Exodus40:18 aur moosa ne nivas ko khda karavaya, aur usakee kursiyan dhar usake takhte lagake un men bende dale, aur usake khmbhon ko khda kiya" 
Exodus40:19 aur us ne nivas ke upar tamboo ko faailaya, aur tamboo ke upar us ne oddhne ko lagaya jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee." 
Exodus40:20 aur us ne sakshaeepatra ko lekar sandook meen rakha, aur sandook men dndon ko lagake usake upar praayaashchaitt ke ddhkane ko dhar diya" 
Exodus40:21 aur us ne sandook ko nivas men pahunchavaya, aur beechavale parde ko lattkavake sakshaeepatra ke sandook ko usake andar kiya jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee." 
Exodus40:22 aur us ne milapavale tamboo men nivas kee uttr alang par beech ke parde se bahar meja ko lagavaya," 
Exodus40:23 aur us par un ne yahova ke sammukh rottee sajakar rakhee jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee. 
Exodus40:24 aur us ne milapavale tamboo men meja ke samhane nivas kee daakkhian alang par deevatt ko rakha," 
Exodus40:25 aur us ne deepakon ko yahova ke sammukh jala diya jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee. 
Exodus40:26 aur us ne milapavale tamboo men beech ke parde ke samhane sone kee vedee ko rakha," 
Exodus40:27 aur us ne us par sugandhiat dhoop jalaya jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee. 
Exodus40:28 aur us ne nivas ke dar par parde ko lagaya. 
Exodus40:29 aur milapavale tamboo ke nivas ke dar par homabaali aur annabaali ko chaddhaya jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee. 
Exodus40:30 aur us ne milapavale tamboo aur vedee ke beech haudee ko rakhkar us men dhaene ke liye jal dala," 
Exodus40:31 aur moosa aur haroon aur usake putraen ne us men apane apane hath panv dhaeae 
Exodus40:32 aur jab jab ve milapavale tamboo men va vedee ke pas jate the tab tab ve hath panv dhaete the jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee. 
Exodus40:33 aur us ne nivas kee charon or aur vedee ke asapas angan kee kanat ko khda karavaya, aur angan ke dar ke parde ko lattka diya. is prakar moosa ne sab kam ko poora kar samapt kiya.." 
Exodus40:34 tab badal milapavale tamboo par chha gaya, aur yahova ka tej nivasasthan men bhr gaya." 
Exodus40:35 aur badal jo milapavale tamboo par tthar gaya, aur yahova ka tej jo nivasasthan men bhr gaya, is karan moosa us me pravesh n kar saka." 
Exodus40:36 aur israaeliyon kee saree yatra men aeesa hota tha, ki jab jab vah badal nivas ke upar utt jata tab tab ve kooch karate the." 
Exodus40:37 aur yaadi vah n uttta, to jis din tak vah n uttta tha us din tak ve kooch naheen karate the." 
Exodus40:38 israael ke gharane kee saree yatra men din ko to yahova ka badal nivas par, aur rat ko usee badal men ag un sabhon ko dikhai diya karatee thee.." 
Leviticus1:1 yahova ne milapavale tamboo men se moosa ko bulakar us se kaha," 
Leviticus1:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki tum men se yadi koi manushy yahova ke liye pashu ka chaddhava chaddhaa, to usaka balipashu gaya-baailon va bhed-bakaariyon men se aek ka ho." 
Leviticus1:3 yaadi vah gay baailon men se homabali kare, to nirdosh nar milapavale tamboo ke dar par chaddhaa, ki yahova use grahan kare." 
Leviticus1:4 aur vah apana hath homabaalipashu ke sir par rakhe, aur vah unake liye praayaashchaitt karane ko grahan kiya jaaega." 
Leviticus1:5 tab vah us bachhde ko yahova ke samhane baali kare aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haain ve lohoo ko sameep le jakar us vedee kee charon alangon par chhdike jo milapavale tamboo ke dar par haai. 
Leviticus1:6 fir vah homabalipashu kee khal nikalakar us pashu ko ttukade ttukade kare 
Leviticus1:7 tab haroon yajak ke putra vedee par ag rakhe, aur ag par lakadee sajakar dharen" 
Leviticus1:8 aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haain ve sir aur charabee samet pashu ke ttukadon ko us lakadee par jo vedee kee ag par hogee sajakar dharen 
Leviticus1:9 aur vah usakee antaadiyon aur paairon ko jal se dhaeae. tab yajak sab ko vedee par jalaa, ki vah homabali yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandhavala havan tthare.." 
Leviticus1:10 aur yaadi vah bhedon va bakaron ka homabali chaddhaa, to nirdosh nar ko chaddhaae." 
Leviticus1:11 aur vah usako yahova ke age vedee kee uttravalee alang par baali kare aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haain ve usake lohoo ko vedee kee charon alangon par chhdiken. 
Leviticus1:12 aur vah usako ttukade ttukade kare, aur sir aur charabee ko alag kare, aur yajak in sab ko us lakadee par sajakar dhare jo vedee kee ag par hogee" 
Leviticus1:13 aur vah usakee antaadiyon aur paairon ko jal se dhaeae. aur yajak sab ko sameep le jakar vedee par jalaa, ki vah homabali aur yahova ke liye sugandhadayak sugandhavala havan tthare.." 
Leviticus1:14 aur yaadi vah yahova ke liye paakshiayon ka homabali chaddhaa, to panduko va kabootaron ko chaddhava chaddhaae." 
Leviticus1:15 yajak usako vedee ke sameep le jakar usaka gala marod ke sir ko dhad se alag kare, aur vedee par jalaae aur usaka sara lohoo us vedee kee alang par giraya jaae" 
Leviticus1:16 aur vah usaka ojhr mal sahit nikalakar vedee kee poorab kee or se rakh dalane ke sthan par faenk de 
Leviticus1:17 aur vah usako pankhon ke beech se faade, par alag alag n kare. tab yajak usako vedee par us lakadee ke upar rakhkar jo ag par hogee jalaa, ki vah homabali aur yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandhavala havan tthare.." 
Leviticus2:1 aur jab koi yahova ke liye annabali ka chaddhava chaddhana chahe, to vah maaida chaddhaae aur us par tel dalakar usake upar loban rakhe" 
Leviticus2:2 aur vah usako haroon ke putraen ke pas jo yajak haain laae. aur annabaali ke tel mile huae maaide men se is tarah apanee mutthee bhrakar nikale ki sab loban us men a jaae aur yajak unhen smaran dilanevale bhag ke liye vedee par jalaa, ki yah yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugaandhiat havan tthare." 
Leviticus2:3 aur annabali men se jo bacha rahe so haroon aur usake putraen ka tthare yah yahova ke havanon men se paramapavitra vastu hogee.. 
Leviticus2:4 aur jab too annabali ke liye tandoor men pakaya hua chaddhava chaddhaa, to vah tel se sane huae akhmeeree maaide ke faulako, va tel se chupadee hui akhmeeree chapatiyon ka ho." 
Leviticus2:5 aur yaadi tera chaddhava tave par pakaya hua annabaali ho, to vah tel se sane huae akhmeeree maaide ka ho" 
Leviticus2:6 usako ttukade ttukade karake us par tel dalana, tab vah annabali ho jaega." 
Leviticus2:7 aur yaadi tera chaddhava kaddhahee men tala hua annabali ho, to vah maaide se tel men banaya jaae." 
Leviticus2:8 aur jo annabali in vastuon men se kisee ka bana ho use yahova ke sameep le jana aur jab vah yajak ke pas laya jaa, tab yajak use vedee ke sameep le jaae." 
Leviticus2:9 aur yajak annabaali men se smaran dilanevala bhag nikalakar vedee par jalaa, ki vah yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandhavala havan tthare" 
Leviticus2:10 aur annabali men se jo bacha rahe vah haroon aur usake putraen ka tthare vah yahova ke havanon men paramapavitra vastu hogee. 
Leviticus2:11 koi annabaali jise tum yahova ke liye chaddhao khmeer milakar banaya n jaae tum kabhee havan men yahova ke liye khmeer aur madha n jalana. 
Leviticus2:12 tum inako paahilee upaj ka chaddhava karake yahova ke liye chaddhana, par ve sukhdayak sugandha ke liye vedee par chaddhaae n jaaen." 
Leviticus2:13 fir apane sab annabaaliyon ko namakeen banana aur apana koi annabaali apane parameshvar ke sath bandhaee hui vacha ke namak se raahit hone n dena apane sab chaddhavon ke sath namak bhee chaddhana.. 
Leviticus2:14 aur yaadi too yahova ke liye paahilee upaj ka annabaali chaddhaa, to apanee paahilee upaj ke annabaali ke liye ag se jhulasai hui haree haree bale, arthata haree haree balon ko meenjake nikal lena, tab ann ko chaddhana." 
Leviticus2:15 aur us men tel dalana, aur usake upar loban rakhna tab vah annabali ho jaaega." 
Leviticus2:16 aur yajak seenjakar nikale huae ann ko, aur tel ko, aur sare loban ko smaran dilanevala bhag karake jala de vah yahova ke liye havan tthare.." 
Leviticus3:1 aur yaadi usaka chaddhava menlabali ka ho, aur yadi vah gaya-baailon me se kisee ko chaddhaa, to chahe vah pashu nar ho ya mada, par jo nirdosh ho usee ko vah yahova ke age chaddhaae." 
Leviticus3:2 aur vah apana hath apane chaddhave ke pashu ke sir par rakhe aur usako milapavale tamboo ke dar par bali kare aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haai ve usake lohoo ko vedee kee charon alangon par chhdiken. 
Leviticus3:3 aur vah melabaali men se yahova ke liye havan kare, arthata jis charabee se antadiyan ddhpee rahatee haai, aur jo charabee un men lipattee rahatee haai vah bhee," 
Leviticus3:4 aur donon gurde aur unake upar kee charabee jo kamar ke pas rahatee haai, aur gurdon samet kaleje ke upar kee jhlilee, in sabhon ko vah alag kare." 
Leviticus3:5 aur haroon ke putra inako vedee par us homabali ke upar jalaae, jo un lakaadiyon par hogee jo ag ke upar haai, ki yah yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandhavala havan tthare.." 
Leviticus3:6 aur yaadi yahova ke melabali ke liye usaka chaddhava bhed-bakaariyon men se ho, to chahe vah nar ho ya mada, par jo nirdosh ho usee ko vah chaddhaae." 
Leviticus3:7 yaadi vah bhed ka bachcha chaddhata ho, to usako yahova ke samhane chaddhaa," 
Leviticus3:8 aur vah apane chaddhave ke pashu ke sir par hath rakhe aur usako milapavale tamboo ke age baali kare aur haroon ke putra usake lohoo ko vedee kee charon alangon par chhdiken. 
Leviticus3:9 aur melabaali men se charabee ko yahova ke liye havan kare, arthata usakee charabee bhree mottee poonchh ko vah reeddh ke pas se alag kare, aur jo charabee un men lipattee rahatee haai," 
Leviticus3:10 aur donon gurde, aur jo charabee unake upar kamar ke pas rahatee haai, aur gurdon samet kaleje ke upar kee jhlilee, in sabhon ko vah alag kare." 
Leviticus3:11 aur yajak inhen vedee par jalaae yah yahova ke liye havan roopee bhojan tthare.. 
Leviticus3:12 aur yaadi vah bakara va bakaree chaddhaa, to use yahova ke samhane chaddhaae." 
Leviticus3:13 aur vah apana hath usake sir par rakhe, aur usako milapavale tamboo ke age baali kare aur haroon ke putra usake lohoo ko vedee kee charon alangon par chhdike." 
Leviticus3:14 aur vah us men se apana chaddhava yahova ke liye havan karake chaddhaa, arthata jis charabee se antadiyan ddhpee rahatee haai, aur jo charabee un men lipattee rahatee haai vah bhee," 
Leviticus3:15 aur donon gurde aur jo charabee unake upar kamar ke pas rahatee haai, aur gurdon samet kaleje ke upar kee jhlilee, in sabhon ko vah alag kare." 
Leviticus3:16 aur yajak inhen vedee par jalaae yah to havan roopee bhojan haai jo sukhdayak sugandha ke liye hota haai kyonaki saree charabee yahova kee haain. 
Leviticus3:17 yah tumhare nivason men tumharee peeddhee peeddhee ke liye sada kee vidhai ttharegee ki tum charabee aur lohoo kabhee n khao.. 
Leviticus4:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha 
Leviticus4:2 ki israaeliyon se yah kah, ki yadi koi manushy un kamon men se jinako yahova ne mana kiya haai kisee kam ko bool se karake papee ho jaae" 
Leviticus4:3 aur yaadi abhaishaikt yajak aeesa pap kare, jis se praja doshaee tthare, to apane pap ke karan vah aek nirdosh bachhda yahova ko papabali karake chaddhaae." 
Leviticus4:4 aur vah us bachhde ko milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke age le jakar usake sir par hath rakhe, aur us bachhde ko yahova ke samhane baali kare." 
Leviticus4:5 aur aabhaishaikt yajak bachhde ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar milapavale tamboo men le jaae 
Leviticus4:6 aur yajak apanee ungalee lohoo me dubo dubokar aur us men se kuchh lekar pavitrasthan ke beechavale parde ke age yahova ke samhane sat bar chhdike. 
Leviticus4:7 aur yajak us lohoo men se kuchh aur lekar sugaandhiat dhoop kee vedee ke seengo par jo milapavale tamboo men haai yahova ke samhane lagaae fir bachhde ke sab lohoo ko vedee ke paae par jo milapavale tamboo ke dar par haai undel de. 
Leviticus4:8 fir vah papabali ke bachhde kee sab charabee ko us se alag kare, arthata jis charabee se antadiyan ddhpee rahatee haai, aur jitanee charabee un men lipattee rahatee haai," 
Leviticus4:9 aur donon gurde aur unake upar kee charabee jo kamar ke pas rahatee haai, aur gurdon samet kaleje ke upar kee jhlilee, in sabhon ko vah aeese alag kare," 
Leviticus4:10 jaaise melabaalivale chaddhave ke bachhde se alag kiae jate haai, aur yajak inako homabaali kee vedee par jalaae." 
Leviticus4:11 aur us bachhde kee khal, panv, sir, antaadiya, gobar," 
Leviticus4:12 aur sara mans, nidan samoocha bachhda chhavanee se bahar shuuddh sthan me, jahan rakh dalee jaaegee, le jakar lakadee par rakhkar ag se jalaae jahan rakh dalee jatee haai vah vaheen jalaya jaae.." 
Leviticus4:13 aur in baton men se kisee bhee bat ke vishay men jo koi pap kare, yajak usaka praayashchaitt kare, aur tab vah pap kshama kiya jaaega. aur is papabali ka shosh annabali ke shosh kee nai yajak ka ttharega.." 
Leviticus4:14 to jab unaka kiya hua pap pragatt ho jaae tab mandlee aek bachhde ko papabali karake chaddhaae. vah use milapavale tamboo ke age le jaa," 
Leviticus4:15 aur mandlee ke vraddh log apane apane hathon ko yahova ke age bachhde ke sir par rakhe, aur vah bachhda yahova ke samhane bali kiya jaae." 
Leviticus4:16 aur aabhaishaikt yajak bachhde ke lohoo men se kuchh milapavale tamboo men le jaae 
Leviticus4:17 aur yajak apanee ungalee lohoo men dubo dubokar use beechavale parde ke age sat bar yahova ke samhane chhdike. 
Leviticus4:18 aur usee lohoo men se vedee ke seengon par jo yahova ke age milapavale tamboo men haai lagaae aur bacha hua sab lohoo homabali kee vedee ke paae par jo milapavale tamboo ke dar par haai undel de. 
Leviticus4:19 aur vah bachhde kee kul charabee nikalakar vedee par jalaae. 
Leviticus4:20 aur jaaise papabaali ke bachhde se kiya tha vaaise hee is se bhee kare is bhanati yajak israaeliyon ke liye praayaashchaitt kare, tab unaka pap kshama kiya jaaega." 
Leviticus4:21 aur vah bachhde ko chhavanee se bahar le jakar usee bhanti jalaae jaaise pahile bachhde ko jalaya tha yah to mandlee ke nimitt papabali ttharega.. 
Leviticus4:22 jab koi pradhaan puroosh pap karake, arthata apane parameshvar yahova ki kisee agyaa ke virooddh bool se kuchh karake doshaee ho jaa," 
Leviticus4:23 aur usaka pap us par pragatt ho jaa, to vah aek nirdosh bakara baalidan karane ke liye le aae" 
Leviticus4:24 aur bakare ke sir par apana hath dhare, aur bakare ko us sthan par bali kare jahan homabali pashu yahova ke age bali kiye jate haain yah to papabali ttharega." 
Leviticus4:25 aur yajak apanee ungalee se papabaali pashu ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar homabaali kee vedee ke seengon par lagaa, aur usaka lohoo homabaali kee vedee ke paae par undel de." 
Leviticus4:26 aur vah usakee kul charabee ko melabaali kee charabee kee nai vedee par jalaae aur yajak usake pap ke vishay men praayaashchaitt kare, tab vah kshama kiya jaaega.." 
Leviticus4:27 aur yaadi sadhaaran logon men se koi agyaanata se pap kare, arthata koi aeesa kam jise yahova ne mana kiya ho karake doshaee ho, aur usaka vah pap us par pragatt ho jaa," 
Leviticus4:28 to vah us pap ke karan aek nirdosh bakaree baalidan ke liye le aae 
Leviticus4:29 aur vah apana hath papabaali pashu ke sir par rakhe, aur homabaali ke sthan par papabaali pashu ka baalidan kare." 
Leviticus4:30 aur yajak usake lohoo men se apanee ungalee se kuchh lekar homabaali kee vedee ke seengon par lagaa, aur usake sab lohoo ko usee vedee ke paae par undel de." 
Leviticus4:31 aur vah usakee sab charabee ko melabaalipashu kee charabee kee nain alag kare, tab yajak usako vedee par yahova ke nimitt sukhdayak sugandha ke liye jalaae aur is prakar yajak usake liye praayaashchaitt kare, tab use kshama milegee.." 
Leviticus4:32 aur yaadi vah papabali ke liye aek bhedee ka bachcha le aa, to vah nirdosh mada ho," 
Leviticus4:33 aur vah apana hath papabaali pashu ke sir par rakhe, aur usako papabaali ke liye vaheen balidan kare jahan homabaalipashu bali kiya jata haai." 
Leviticus4:34 aur yajak apanee ungalee se papabaali ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar homabali kee vedee ke seengon par lagaa, aur usake sab lohoo ko vedee ke paae par undel de." 
Leviticus4:35 aur vah usakee sab charabee ko melabaalivale bhed ke bachche kee charabee kee nai alag kare, aur yajak use vedee par yahova ke havanon ke upar jalaae aur is prakar yajak usake pap ke liye praayaashchaitt kare, aur vah kshama kiya jaaega.." 
Leviticus5:1 aur yaadi koi sakshaee hokar aeesa pap kare ki shapath khailakar poochhne par bhee, ki kya too ne yah suna athva janata haai, aur vah bat pragatt n kare, to usako apane adharma ka bhar uttana padega." 
Leviticus5:2 aur yaadi koi kisee ashuuddh vastu ko agyaanata se choo le, to chahe vah ashuuddh banaaile pashu kee, chahe ashuuddh renganevale jeeva-jantu kee loth ho, to vah ashuuddh hokar doshaee ttharega." 
Leviticus5:3 aur yaadi koi manushy kisee ashuuddh vastu ko agyaanata se choo le, chahe vah ashuuddh vastu kisee bhee prakar kee kyon n ho jis se log ashuuddh ho jate haain to jab vah us bat ko jan lega tab vah doshaee ttharega." 
Leviticus5:4 aur yaadi koi bura va bhla karane ko bina soche samajhe shapath khaa, chahe kisee prakar kee bat vah bina soche vichare shapath khakar kahe, to aeesee bat men vah doshaee us samay ttharega jab use maloom ho jaaega." 
Leviticus5:5 aur jab vah in baton men se kisee bhee bat men doshaee ho, tab jis vishay men us ne pap kiya ho vah usako man le," 
Leviticus5:6 aur vah yahova ke samhane apana doshabali le aa, arthata us pap ke karan vah aek bhed va bakaree papabali karane ke liye le aae tab yajak us pap ke vishay usake liye praayaashchaitt kare." 
Leviticus5:7 aur yaadi use bhed va bakaree dene kee samathrya n ho, to apane pap ke karan do pandukee va kabootaree ke do bachche doshabaali chaddhane ke liye yahova ke pas le aa, un men se aek to papabali ke liye aur doosara homabali ke liye." 
Leviticus5:8 aur vah unako yajak ke pas le aa, aur yajak papabaalivale ko pahile chaddhaa, aur usaka sir gale se marod dale, par alag n kare," 
Leviticus5:9 aur vah papabaalipashu ke lohoo men se kuchh vedee kee alang par chhdike, aur jo lohoo shosh rahe vah vedee ke paae par giraya jaae vah to papabali ttharega." 
Leviticus5:10 aur doosare pakshaee ko vah vidhaee ke anusar homabaali kare, aur yajak usake pap ka praayashchaitt kare, aur tab vah kshama kiya jaaega.." 
Leviticus5:11 aur yaadi vah do pandukee va kabootaree ke do bachche bhee n de sake, to vah apane pap ke karan apana chaddhava aepa ka dasavan bhag maaida papabali karake le aae" 
Leviticus5:12 vah usako yajak ke pas le jaa, aur yajak us men se apanee mutthee bhr smaran dilanevala bhag janakar vedee par yahova ke havanon ke upar jalaae vah to papabaali ttharega." 
Leviticus5:13 aur in baton men se kisee bhee bat ke vishay men jo koi pap kare, yajak usaka praayashchaitt kare, aur tab vah pap kshama kiya jaaega. aur is papabali ka shosh annabali ke shosh kee nai yajak ka ttharega.." 
Leviticus5:14 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus5:15 yaadi koi yahova kee paavitra kee hui vastuon ke vishay men bool se vishvasaghaat kare aur papee tthare, to vah yahova ke pas aek nirdosh meddha doshabaali ke liye le aae usaka dam pavitrasthan ke shokel ke anusar utane hee shokel roopaye ka ho jitana yajak ttharaae." 
Leviticus5:16 aur jis pavitra vastu ke vishay us ne pap kiya ho, us men vah panchavan bhag aur baddhakar yajak ko de aur yajak doshabaali ka meddha chaddhakar usake liye praayaashchaitt kare, tab usaka pap kshama kiya jaaega.." 
Leviticus5:17 aur yaadi koi aeesa pap kare, ki un kamon men se jinhen yahova ne mana kiya haai kisee kam ko kare, to chahe vah usake anajane men hua ho, taubhee vah doshaee ttharega, aur usako apane adharma ka bhar uttana padega." 
Leviticus5:18 isaliye vah aek nirdosh meddha doshabaali karake yajak ke pas le aa, vah utane dam ka ho jitana yajak ttharaa, aur yajak usake liye usakee us bool ka jo us ne anajane men kee ho praayaashchaitt kare, aur vah kshama kiya jaaega." 
Leviticus5:19 yah doshabaali tthare kyonki vah manushy ni:sandeh yahova ke sammukh doshaee ttharega.. 
Leviticus6:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus6:2 yaadi koi yahova ka vishvasaghaat karake papee tthare, jaaisa ki dharohar, va lenaden, va loott ke vishay men apane bhai se chhl kare, va us par andhor kare," 
Leviticus6:3 va padee hui vastu ko pakar usake vishay joott bole aur joottee shapath bhee khaae aeesee koi bhee bat kyon n ho jise karake manushy papee ttharate haai," 
Leviticus6:4 to jab vah aeesa kam karake doshaee ho jaa, tab jo bhee vastu us ne loot, va andhor karake, va dharohar, va padee pai ho" 
Leviticus6:5 chahe koi vastu kyon n ho jisake vishay men us ne joottee shapath khai ho to vah usako poora poora lautta de, aur panchavan bhag bhee baddhakar bhr de, jis din yah maloom ho ki vah doshaee haai, usee din vah us vastu ko usake svamee ko lautta de." 
Leviticus6:6 aur vah yahova ke sammukh apana doshabaali bhee le aa, arthata aek nirdosh meddha doshabaali ke liye yajak ke pas le aa, vah utane hee dam ka ho jitana yajak ttharaae." 
Leviticus6:7 is prakar yajak usake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare, aur jis kam ko karake vah doshaee ho gaya haai usakee kshama use milegee.." 
Leviticus6:8 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus6:9 haroon aur usake putraen ko agyaa dekar yah kah, ki homabali kee vyavastha yah haai arthata homabaali idhan ke upar rat bhr bhor tab vedee par pada rahe, aur vedee kee aagnai vedee par jalatee rahe." 
Leviticus6:10 aur yajak apane sanee ke vasr aur apane tan par apanee sanee kee janghaiya paahinakar homabali kee rak, jo ag ke bhsm karane se vedee par rah jaa, use uttakar vedee ke pas rakhe." 
Leviticus6:11 tab vah apane vasr utarakar doosare vasr paahinakar rakh ko chhavanee se bahar kisee shuuddh sthan par le jaae. 
Leviticus6:12 aur vedee par agnai jalatee rahe, aur kabhee bujhne n paae aur yajak bhor bhor us par lakaadiyan jalakar homabaali ke ttukadon ko usake upar sajakar dhar de, aur usake upar melabaaliyon kee charabee ko jalaya kare." 
Leviticus6:13 vedee par ag lagatar jalatee rahe vah kabhee bujhne n paae.. 
Leviticus6:14 annabali kee vyavastha is prakar haai, ki haroon ke putra usako vedee ke age yahova ke sameep le aaen." 
Leviticus6:15 aur vah annabali ke tel mile huae maaide men se mutthee bhr aur us par ka sab loban uttakar annabaali ke smaranarth ke is bhag ko yahova ke sammukh sukhdayak sugandha ke liye vedee par jalaae. 
Leviticus6:16 aur us men se jo shosh rah jaae use haroon aur usake putra kha jaaen vah bina khmeer pavitra sthan men khaya jaa, arthata ve milapavale tamboo ke angan men use khaaen." 
Leviticus6:17 vah khmeer ke sath pakaya n jaae kyonaki maain ne apane havy men se usako unaka nij bhag hone ke liye unhen diya haai isaaliye jaaisa papabaali aur doshabali paramapaavitra haai vaaisa hee vah bhee haai. 
Leviticus6:18 haroon ke vansh ke sab puroosh us men se kha sakate haain tumharee peeddhee-peeddhee men yahova ke havanon men se yah unaka bhag sadaaiv bana rahega jo koi un havanon ko chooae vah paavitra ttharega.. 
Leviticus6:19 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus6:20 jis din haroon ka aabhaishok ho us din vah apane putraen ke sath yahova ko yah chaddhava chaddhaae arthata aepa ka dasavan bhag maaida nity annabali men chaddhaa, us men se adha bhor ko aur adha sandhya ke samay chaddhaae." 
Leviticus6:21 vah tave par tel ke sath pakaya jaae jab vah tel se tar ho jaae tab use le ana, is annabali ke pake huae ttukade yahova ke sukhdayak sugandha ke liye chaddhana." 
Leviticus6:22 aur usake putraen men se jo bhee us yajakapad par abhaishaikt hoga, vah bhee usee prakar ka chaddhava chaddhaya kare yah vidhaee sada ke liye haai, ki yahova ke sammukh vah sampoorn chaddhava jalaya jaye." 
Leviticus6:23 yajak ke sampoorn annabaali bhee sab jalaae jaaen vah kabhee n khaya jaae.. 
Leviticus6:24 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus6:25 haroon aur usake putraen se yah kah, ki papabali kee vyavastha yah haai arthata jis sthan men homabaalipashu vadha kiya jata haai usee men papabaalipashu bhee yahova ke sammukh bali kiya jaae vah paramapavitra haai." 
Leviticus6:26 aur jo yajak papabali chaddhave vah use khaae vah paavitra sthan me, arthata milapavale tamboo ke agan men khaya jaae." 
Leviticus6:27 jo kuchh usake mans se choo jaa, vah pavitra ttharega aur yadi usake lohoo ke chheentte kisee vasr par pad jaae, to use kisee paavitrasthan men dhae dena." 
Leviticus6:28 aur vah mittee ka patra jis men vah pakaya gaya ho tod diya jaae yaadi vah peetal ke patra men sijhaya gaya ho, to vah manja jaa, aur jal se dhae liya jaae." 
Leviticus6:29 aur yajakon men se sab puroosh use kha sakate haain 
Leviticus6:30 par jis papabalipashu ke lohoo men se kuchh bhee koon milapavale tamboo ke bheetar paavitrasthan men praayaashchaitt karane ko pahunchaya jaae tab to usaka mans kabhee n khaya jaae vah ag men jala diya jaae.. 
Leviticus7:1 fir doshabali kee vyavastha yah haai. vah paramapavitra haai 
Leviticus7:2 jis sthan par homabaalipashu ka vadha karate haain usee sthan par doshabalipashu ka bhee bali kare, aur usake lohoo ko yajak vedee par charon or chhdike." 
Leviticus7:3 aur vah us men kee sab charabee ko chaddhaa, arthata usakee mottee poonchh ko, aur jis charabee se antadiyan ddhpee rahatee haain vah bhee," 
Leviticus7:4 aur donon gurde aur jo charabee unake upar aur kamar ke pas rahatee haai, aur gurdon samet kaleje ke upar kee jhlilee in sabhon ko vah alag kare" 
Leviticus7:5 aur yajak inhen vedee par yahova ke liye havan kare tab vah doshabaali hoga. 
Leviticus7:6 yajakon men ke sab puroosh us men se kha sakate haain vah kisee paavitrasthan men khaya jaae kyonki vah paramapaavitra haai. 
Leviticus7:7 jaaisa papabaali haai vaaisa hee doshabali bhee haai, un donon kee aek hee vyavastha haai jo yajak un baliyon ko chaddha ke praayaashchaitt kare vahee un vastuon ko le le." 
Leviticus7:8 aur jo yajak kisee ke liye homabaali ko chaddhaae us homabalipashu kee khal ko vahee yajak le le. 
Leviticus7:9 aur tandoor me, va kaddhahee me, va tave par pake huae sab annabali usee yajak kee hongee jo unhen chaddhata haai." 
Leviticus7:10 aur sab annabali, jo chahe tel se sane huae hon chahe rookhe ho, ve haroon ke sab putraen ko aek saman mile.." 
Leviticus7:11 aur melabaali kee jise koi yahova ke liye chaddhaae vyavastha yah haai. 
Leviticus7:12 yaadi vah use dhanyavad ke liye chaddhaa, to dhanyavada-bali ke sath tel se sane huae akhmeeree faulake, aur tel se chupadee hui akhmeeree faulake, aur tel se chupadee hui akhmeeree rottyaia, aur tel se sane huae maaide ke faulake tel se tar chaddhaae." 
Leviticus7:13 aur vah apane dhanyavadavale melabaali ke sath akhmeeree rottyaia, aur tel se sane huae maaide ke faulake tel se tar chaddhaae." 
Leviticus7:14 aur aeese aek aek chaddhave men se vah aek aek rottee yahova ko uttane kee bhentt karake chaddhaae vah melabali ke lohoo ke chhdikanevale yajak kee hogee. 
Leviticus7:15 aur us dhanyavadavale melabaali ka mans baalidan chaddhane ke din hee khaya jaae us men se kuchh bhee bhor tak shosh n rah jaae. 
Leviticus7:16 par yaadi usake balidan ka chaddhava mannat ka va svechchha ka ho, to us baalidan ko jis din vah chaddhaya jaae usee din vah khaya jaa, aur us men se jo shosh rah jaae vah doosare din bhee khaya jaae." 
Leviticus7:17 parantu jo kuchh balidan ke mans men se teesare din tak rah jaae vah ag men jala diya jaae. 
Leviticus7:18 aur usake melabaali ke mans men se yaadi kuchh bhee teesare din khaya jaa, to vah grahan n kiya jaaega, aur n pun men gina jaaega vah gharaanait karma samajha jaaega, aur jo koi us men se khaae usaka adharma usee ke sir par padega." 
Leviticus7:19 fir jo mans kisee ashuuddh vastu se choo jaae vah n khaya jaae vah ag men jala diya jaae. fir melabali ka mans jitane shuuddh hon ve hee khaae," 
Leviticus7:20 parantu jo ashuuddh hokar yahova ke melabaali ke mans men se kuchh khaae vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaae. 
Leviticus7:21 aur yaadi koi kisee ashuuddh vastu ko chookar yahova ke melabaalipashu ke mans men se khaa, to vah bhee apane logon men se nash kiya jaa, chahe vah manushy kee koi ashuuddh vastu va ashuuddh pashu va koi bhee ashuuddh aur gharanait vastu ho.." 
Leviticus7:22 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus7:23 israaeliyon se is prakar kah, ki tum log n to baail kee kuchh charabee khana aur n bhed va bakaree kee." 
Leviticus7:24 aur jo pashu svayan mar jaa, aur jo doosare pashu se faada jaa, usakee charabee aur aur kam men lana, parantu use kisee prakar se khana naheen." 
Leviticus7:25 jo koi aeese pashu kee charabee khaaega jis men se log kuchh yahova ke liye havan karake chaddhaya karate haain vah khanevala apane logon men se nash kiya jaaega. 
Leviticus7:26 or tum apane ghar men kisee bhanti ka loho, chahe pakshaee ka chahe pashu ka ho, n khana." 
Leviticus7:27 har aek praanee jo kisee bhanti ka lohoo khaaega vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaaega.. 
Leviticus7:28 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus7:29 israaeliyon se is prakar kah, ki jo yahova ke liye melabaali chaddhaae vah usee melabaali men se yahova ke pas bhentt le aae" 
Leviticus7:30 vah apane hee hathon se yahova ke havy ko, arthata chhatee hilane kee bhentt karake yahova ke samhane hilai jaae." 
Leviticus7:31 aur yajak charabee ko to vedee par jalaa, parantu chhatee haroon aur usake putraen kee hogee." 
Leviticus7:32 fir tum apane melabaliyon men se daahinee jangha ko bhee uttane kee bhentt karake yajak ko dena 
Leviticus7:33 haroon ke putraen men se jo melabali ke lohoo aur charabee ko chaddhaae daahinee jangha usee ko bhag hoga. 
Leviticus7:34 kyonaki israaeliyon ke melabaaliyon men se hilane kee bhentt kee chhatee aur uttane kee bhentt kee jangha ko lekar maain ne yajak haroon aur usake putraen ko diya haai, ki yah sarvada israaeliyon kee or se unaka hak bana rahe.." 
Leviticus7:35 jis din haroon aur usake putra yahova ke sameep yajak pad ke liye aae gaae usee din yahova ke havyon men se unaka yahee aabhaishaikt bhag ttharaya gaya 
Leviticus7:36 arthata jis din yahova ne usaka abhaishok kiya usee din us ne agyaa dee ki unako israaeliyon kee or se ye hee bhag nit mila karen unakee peeddhee peeddhee ke liye unaka yahee hak ttharaya gaya. 
Leviticus7:37 homabaali, annabaali, papabali, doshabali, yajakon ke sanskar baali, aur melabali kee vyavastha yahee haai" 
Leviticus7:38 jab yahova ne seenaai parvat ke pas ke jangal men moosa ko agyaa dee ki israaelee mere liye kya kya chaddhave chaddhaae, tab us ne unako yahee vyavastha dee thee.." 
Leviticus8:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus8:2 too haroon aur usake putraen ke vasre, aur abhaishok ke tel, aur papabali ke bachhde, aur donon meddho, aur akhmeeree rottee kee ttokaree ko" 
Leviticus8:3 milapavale tamboo ke dar par le a, aur vaheen saree mandlee ko ikattha kara." 
Leviticus8:4 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne kiya aur mandlee milapavale tamboo ke dar par ikatthee hui. 
Leviticus8:5 tab moosa ne mandlee se kaha, jo kam karane kee agyaa yahova ne dee haai vah yah haai." 
Leviticus8:6 fir moosa ne haroon aur usake putraen ko sameep le jakar jal se nahalaya. 
Leviticus8:7 tab us ne unako angarakha paahinaya, aur kattbaind lapettkar baga paahina diya, aur aepod lagakar aepod ke kaddhe huae pattuke se aepod ko bandhakar kas diya." 
Leviticus8:8 aur us ne unake chaparas lagakar chamaras men ureem aur tummeem rakh diae. 
Leviticus8:9 tab us ne usake sir par pagadee bandhakar pagadee ke samhane par sone ke tteeke ko, arthata pavitra mukutt ko lagaya, jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee." 
Leviticus8:10 tab moosa ne aabhaishok ka tel lekar nivas ka aur jo kuchh us men tha un sab ko bhee aabhaishok karake unhen paavitra kiya. 
Leviticus8:11 aur us tel men se kuchh us ne vedee par sat bar chhdika, aur kul saman samet vedee ka aur paae samet haudee ka aabhaishok karake unhen paavitra kiya." 
Leviticus8:12 aur us ne aabhaishok ke tel men se kuchh haroon ke sir par dalakar usaka abhaishok karake use pavitra kiya. 
Leviticus8:13 fir moosa ne haroon ke putraen ko sameep le akar, angarakhe pahinakar, faette bandha ke unake sir par ttopee rakh dee, jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee." 
Leviticus8:14 tab vah papabaali ke bachhde ko sameep le gaya aur haroon aur usake putraen ne apane apane hath papabali ke bachhde ke sir par rakhen 
Leviticus8:15 tab vah baali kiya gaya, aur moosa ne lohoo ko lekar ungalee se vedee ke charon seengon par lagakar paavitra kiya, aur lohoo ko vedee ke paae par undel diya, aur usake liye praayaashchaitt karake usako pavitra kiya." 
Leviticus8:16 aur moosa ne antaadiyon par kee sab charabee, aur kaleje par kee jhlilee, aur charabee samet donon gudorn ko lekar vedee par jalaya." 
Leviticus8:17 or bachhde men se jo kuchh shosh rah gaya usako, arthata gobar samet usakee khal aur mans ko us ne chhavanee se bahar ag men jalaya, jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee." 
Leviticus8:18 fir vah homabali ke meddhe ko sameep le gaya, aur haroon aur usake putraen ne apane apane hath menddhe ke sir par rakhe." 
Leviticus8:19 tab vah baali kiya gaya, aur moosa ne usaka lohoo vedee par charon or chhdika." 
Leviticus8:20 kiya gaya, aur moosa ne sir or charabee samet ttukadon ko jalaya." 
Leviticus8:21 tab antaadiyan aur panv jal se dhaeye gaa, aur moosa ne poore meddhe ko vedee par jalaya, aur vah sukhdayak sugandha dene ke liye homabaali aur yahova ke liye havy ho gaya, jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee." 
Leviticus8:22 fir vah doosare meddhe ko jo sanskar ka meddha tha sameep le gaya, aur haroon aur usake putraen ne apane apane hath meddhe ke sir par rakhe." 
Leviticus8:23 tab vah baali kiya gaya, aur moosa ne usake lohoo men se kuchh lekar haroon ke daahine kan ke sire par aur usake daahine hath aur daahine panv ke angootton par lagaya." 
Leviticus8:24 aur vah haroon ke putraen ko sameep le gaya, aur lohoo men se kuchh aek aek ke daahine kan ke sire par aur daahine hath or daahine panv ke angootton par lagaya aur moosa ne lohoo ko vedee par charon or chhdika." 
Leviticus8:25 aur us ne charabee, aur mottee poonch, or antaadiyon par kee sab charabee, aur kaleje par kee jhlilee samet donon gurde, aur dahinee jangha, ye sab lekar alag rakhe" 
Leviticus8:26 or akhmeeree rottee kee ttokaree jo yahova ke age rakhee gai thee us men se aek rottee, aur tel se sane huae maaide ka aek faulaka, aur aek rottee lekar charabee aur daahinee jangha par rakh dee" 
Leviticus8:27 aur ye sab vastuaen haroon aur usake putraen ke hathon par dhar dee gai, aur hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke samhane hilai gai." 
Leviticus8:28 aur moosa ne unhen fir unake hathon par se lekar unhen vedee par homabaali ke upar jalaya, yah sukhdayak sugandha dene ke liye sanskar kee bhentt aur yahova ke liye havy tha." 
Leviticus8:29 tab moosa ne chhatee ko lekar hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke age hilaya aur sanskar ke meddhen men se moosa ka bhag yahee hua jaaisa yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee. 
Leviticus8:30 aur moosa ne aabhaishok ke tel or vedee par ke loho, donon men se kuchh lekar haroon aur usake vasren par, aur usake putraen aur unake vasren par bhee chhdika aur us ne vasren samet haroon ko or vasren samet usake putraen ko bhee pavitra kiya." 
Leviticus8:31 aur moosa ne haroon aur usake putraen se kaha, mans ko milapavale tamboo ke dar par pakao, aur us rottee ko jo sanskar kee ttokaree men haai vaheen khao, jaaisa maain ne agyaa dee haai, ki haroon aur usake putra use khaaen." 
Leviticus8:32 aur mans aur rottee men se jo shosh rah jaae use ag men jala dena. 
Leviticus8:33 aur jab tak tumhare sanskar ke din poore n hon tab tak, arthata sat din tak milapavale tamboo ke dar ke bahar n jana, kyonaki vah sat din tak tumhara sanskar karata rahega." 
Leviticus8:34 jis prakar aj kiya gaya haai vaaisa hee karane kee agyaa yahova ne dee haai, jis se tumhara praayaashchaitt kiya jaae." 
Leviticus8:35 isaliye tum milapavale tamboo ke dar par sat din tak din rat tthare rahana, aur yahova kee agyaa ko manana, taaki tum mar n jao kyonki aeesee kee agyaa mujhe dee gai haai." 
Leviticus8:36 tab yahova kee inheen sab agyaaon ke anusar jo us ne moosa ke dara dee theen haroon or usake putraen ne unaka palan kiya.. 
Leviticus9:1 attven din moosa ne haroon aur usake putraen ko aur israaelee puraniyon ko bulavakar haroon se kaha," 
Leviticus9:2 papabaali ke liye aek nirdosh bachhda, aur homabali ke liye aek nirdosh meddha lekar yahova ke samhane bhentt chaddha." 
Leviticus9:3 aur israaeliyon se yah kah, ki tum papabali ke liye aek bakara, aur homabaali ke liye aek bachhda aur aek bhed ko bachcha lo, jo aek varsha ke hon aur nirdosh ho," 
Leviticus9:4 aur melabaali ke liye yahova ke sammukh chaddhane ke liye aek baail aur aek meddha, aur tel se sane huae maaide ka aek annabaali bhee le lo kyonki aj yahova tum ko darshan dega." 
Leviticus9:5 aur jis jis vastu kee agyaa moosa ne dee un sab ko ve milapavale tamboo ke age le aae aur saree mandlee sameep jakar yahova ke samhane khdee hui. 
Leviticus9:6 tab moosa ne kaha, yah vah kam haai jisake karane ke liye yahova ne agyaa dee haai ki tum use karo aur yahova kee mahima ka tej tum ko dikhai padega." 
Leviticus9:7 aur moosa ne haroon se kaha, yahova kee agyaa ke anusar vedee ke sameep jakar apane papabaali aur homabali ko chaddhakar unake liye praayaashchaitt kara." 
Leviticus9:8 isaliye haroon ne vedee ke sameep jakar apane papabaali ke bachhde ko baalidan kiya. 
Leviticus9:9 aur haroon ke putra lohoo ko usake pas le gaa, tab us ne apanee ungalee ko lohoo men dubakar vedee ke seengon par lohoo ko lagaya, aur shosh lohoo ko vedee ke paae par undel diya" 
Leviticus9:10 aur papabaali men kee charabee aur gurdon n aur kaleje par kee jhlilee ko us ne vedee par jalaya, jaaisa yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee." 
Leviticus9:11 aur mans aur khal ko us ne chhavanee se bahar ag men jalaya. 
Leviticus9:12 tab homabaalipashu ko balidan kiya aur haroon ke putraen ne lohoo ko usake hath men diya, aur us ne usako vedee par charon or chhdik diya." 
Leviticus9:13 tab unhon ne homabaalipashu ka ttukada ttukada karake sir sahit usake hath men de diya aur us ne unako vedee par jala diya. 
Leviticus9:14 aur us ne antaadiyon aur panvon ko dhaekar vedee par homabali ke upar jalaya. 
Leviticus9:15 aur us ne logon ke chaddhave ko age lekar aur us papabaali ke bakare ko jo unake liye tha lekar usaka balidan kiya, aur paahile ke saman use bhee papabaali karake chaddhaya." 
Leviticus9:16 aur us ne homabaali ko bhee sameep le jakar vidhai ke anusar chaddhaya. 
Leviticus9:17 aur annabali ko bhee sameep le jakar us men se mutthee bhr vedee par jalaya, yah bhor ke homabali ke alava chaddhaya gaya." 
Leviticus9:18 aur baail aur meddha, arthata jo melabalipashu janata ke liye the ve bhee baali kiye gaae aur haroon ke putraen ne lohoo ko usake hath men diya, aur us ne usako vedee par charon or chhdik diya" 
Leviticus9:19 aur unhon ne baail kee charabee ko, aur meddhe men se mottee poonchh ko, aur jis charabee se ataadiyan ddhpee rahatee haain usako, or gudorn sahit kaleje par kee jhlilee ko bhee usake hath men diya" 
Leviticus9:20 aur unhon ne charabee ko chhaatiyon par rakha aur us ne vah charabee vedee par jalai," 
Leviticus9:21 parantu chhatiyon aur daahinee jangha ko haroon ne moosa kee agyaa ke anusar hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke samhane hilaya. 
Leviticus9:22 tab haroon ne logon kee or hath baddhakar unahen ashaeervad diya aur papabaali, homabali, aur melabaliyon ko chaddhakar vah neeche utar aya." 
Leviticus9:23 tab moosa aur haroon milapavale tamboo men gaa, aur nikalakar logon ko ashaeervad diya tab yahova ka tej saree janata ko dikhai diya." 
Leviticus9:24 aur yahova ke samhane se ag nikalakar charabee saahit homabali ko vedee par bhsm kar diya ise dekhkar janata ne jay jayakar ka nara mara, aur apane apane munh ke bal girakar dandvat kiya.." 
Leviticus10:1 tab nadab aur abeehoo namak haroon ke do putraen ne apana apana dhoopadan liya, aur un men ag bhree, aur us men dhoop dalakar us uparee ag kee jisakee agyaa yahova ne naheen dee thee yahova ke sammukh aratee dee." 
Leviticus10:2 tab yahova ke sammukh se ag nikalakar un donon ko bhsm kar diya, aur ve yahova ke samhane mar gaae." 
Leviticus10:3 tab moosa ne haroon se kaha, yah vahee bat haai jise yahova ne kaha tha, ki jo mere sameep aae avashy haai ki vah mujhe paavitra jane, aur saree janata ke samhane meree maahima kare. aur haroon chup raha." 
Leviticus10:4 tab moosa ne meeshaaael aur aelasafaan ko jo haroon ke chacha ujjeeael ke putra the bulakar kaha, nikatt ao, aur apane bhteejon ko pavitrasthan ke age se uttakar chhavanee ke bahar le jao." 
Leviticus10:5 moosa kee is agyaa ke anusar ve nikatt jakar unako angarakhon sahit uttakar chhavanee ke bahar le gaae. 
Leviticus10:6 tab moosa ne haroon se aur usake putra aeleeajar aur itamar se kaha, tum log apane siron ke bal mat bikhrao, aur n apane vasren ko faado, aeesa n ho ki tum bhee mar jao, aur saree mandlee par usaka krodha bhdk utte parantu vah israael ke kul gharane ke log jo tumhare bhaibandha haain yahova kee lagai hui ag par vilap karen." 
Leviticus10:7 aur tum log milapavale tamboo ke dar ke bahar n jana, aeesa n ho ki tum mar jao kyonaki yahova ke abhaishok ka tel tum par laga hua haai. moosa ke is vachan ke anusar unhon ne kiya.." 
Leviticus10:8 fir yahova ne haroon se kaha," 
Leviticus10:9 ki jab jab too va tere putra milapavale tamboo men aaen tab tab tum men se koi n to dakhmadha piae ho n aur kisee prakar ka madh, kaheen aeesa n ho ki tum mar jao tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men yah vidhai prachaalit rahe," 
Leviticus10:10 jis se tum pavitra aur apavitra me, aur shuuddh aur ashuuddh men antar kar sako" 
Leviticus10:11 aur israaeliyon ko un sab vidhaiyon ko sikha sako jise yahova ne moosa ke dara unako sunava dee haain.. 
Leviticus10:12 fir moosa ne haroon se aur usake bache huae donon putra itamar aur aeleeajar se bhee kaha, yahova ke havy men se jo annabaali bacha haai use lekar vedee ke pas bina khmeer khao, kyonaki vah paramapaavitra haai" 
Leviticus10:13 aur tum use kisee paavitrasthan men khao, vah to yahova ke havy men se tera aur tere putraen ka hak haai kyonki maai ne aeesee hee agyaa pai haai." 
Leviticus10:14 aur hilai hui bhentt kee chhatee aur uttai hui bhentt kee jangha ko tum log, arthata too aur bette-beattyaian sab kisee shuuddh sthan men khao kyonki ve israaeliyon ke melabaaliyon men se tujhe aur tere ladkebalon kee hak tthara dee gai haain." 
Leviticus10:15 charabee ke havyon samet jo uttai hui jangha aur hilai hui chhatee yahova ke samhane hilane ke liye aya karengee, ye bhag yahova kee agyaa ke anusar sarvada kee vidhaee kee vyavastha se tere aur tere ladkebalon ke liye haain.." 
Leviticus10:16 fir moosa ne papabali ke bakare kee jo ddoonddh-ddhanddh kee, to kya paya, ki vah jalaya gaya haai, so aeleeajar aur itamar jo haroon ke putra bache the un se vah krodha men akar karane laga," 
Leviticus10:17 ki papabali jo paramapaavitra haai aur jise yahova ne tumhe isaliye diya haai ki tum mandlee ke adharma ka bhar apane par uttakar unake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt karo, tum ne usaka mans pavitrasthan men kyon naheen khaya?" 
Leviticus10:18 dekho, usaka lohoo paavitrasthan ke bheetar to laya hee naheen gaya, ni:sandeh uchit tha ki tum meree agyaa ke anusar usake mans ko paavitrasthan men khate." 
Leviticus10:19 isaka uttr haroon ne moosa ko is prakar diya, ki dek, aj hee unhon ne apane papabaali aur homabali ko yahova ke samhane chaddhaya fir mujh par aeesee vipaatiayan a padee haain! isaaliye yaadi maain aj papabaali ka mans khata to kya yah bat yahova ke sammukh bhlee hotee?" 
Leviticus10:20 jab moosa ne yah suna tab use santosh hua.. 
Leviticus11:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Leviticus11:2 israaeliyon se kaho, ki jitane pashu prathvee par haain un sabhon men se tum in jeevadhaariyon ka mans kha sakate ho." 
Leviticus11:3 pashuuon men se jitane chire va fatte khur ke hote haain aur pagur karate haain unhen kha sakate ho. 
Leviticus11:4 parantu pagur karanevale va fatte khuravalon men se in pashuuon ko n khana, arthata unt, jo pagur to karata haai parantu chire khur ka naheen hota, isaliye vah tumhare liye ashuuddh tthara haai." 
Leviticus11:5 aur shaapan, jo pagur to karata haai parantu chire khur ka naheen hota, vah bhee tumhare liye ashuuddh haai." 
Leviticus11:6 aur khraha, jo pagur to karata haai parantu chire khur ka naheen hota, isaliye vah bhee tumhare liye ashuuddh haai." 
Leviticus11:7 aur sooar, jo chire arthata fatte khur ka hota to haai parantu pagur naheen karata, isaaliye vah tumhare liye ashuuddh haai." 
Leviticus11:8 inake mans men se kuchh n khana, aur inakee loth ko choona bhee naheen ye to tumhare liye ashuuddh haai.." 
Leviticus11:9 fir jitane jalajantu haain un men se tum inhen kha sakate ho, arthata samudra va nadiyon ke jalajantuon men se jitanon ke pankh aur chonyette hote haain unhen kha sakate ho." 
Leviticus11:10 aur jalacharee praaanaiyon men se jitane jeevadhaaree bina pankh aur chonyette ke samudra va naadiyon men rahate haain ve sab tumhare liye gharanait haain. 
Leviticus11:11 ve tumhare liye gharanait ttharen tum unake mans men se kuchh n khana, aur unakee lothon ko ashuuddh janana." 
Leviticus11:12 jal men jis kisee jantu ke pankh aur chonyette naheen hote vah tumhare liye ashuuddh haai.. 
Leviticus11:13 fir pakshiayon men se inako ashuuddh janana, ye ashuuddh hone ke karan khaae n jaae, arthata ukab, hadfaod, kurar," 
Leviticus11:14 shaahee, aur bhanti bhanati kee cheel," 
Leviticus11:15 aur bhanti bhanati ke sab kag," 
Leviticus11:16 shuuturmurga, takhmas, jalakukkut, aur bhanti bhanati ke baj," 
Leviticus11:17 havasil, hadgeel, ullo," 
Leviticus11:18 rajahas, dhanesha, gidd," 
Leviticus11:19 lagalag, bhanati bhanati ke bagule, ttttieeharee aur chamageedad.." 
Leviticus11:20 jitane pankhvale char panvon ke bal charate haain ve sab tumhare liye ashuuddh haain. 
Leviticus11:21 par renganevale aur pankhvale jo char panvon ke bal chalate haai, jinake boomi par koodane faandane ko ttange hotee haain unako to kha sakate ho." 
Leviticus11:22 ve ye haai, arthata bhanati bhanati kee ttddaie, bhanti bhanati ke fanage, bhanati bhanati ke hargol, aur bhanti bhanati ke hagaba." 
Leviticus11:23 parantu aur sab renganevale pankhvale jo char panvavale hote haain ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain.. 
Leviticus11:24 aur inake karan tum ashuuddh ttharoge jis kisee se inakee loth choo jaae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh tthare. 
Leviticus11:25 aur jo koi inakee loth men ka kuchh bhee uttaae vah apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe. 
Leviticus11:26 fir jitane pashu chire khur ke hote haai. parantu n to bilakul fatte khur aur pagur karanevale haain ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain jo koi unhen chooae vah ashuuddh haain jo koi unhen chooae vah ashuuddh ttharega. 
Leviticus11:27 aur char panv ke bal chalanevalon men se jitane panjon ke bal chalate haain ve sab tumhare liye ashuuddh haain jo koi unakee loth chooae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe. 
Leviticus11:28 aur jo koi unakee loth uttaae vah apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe kyonaki ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain.. 
Leviticus11:29 aur jo prathvee par rengate haain un men se ye renganevale tumhare liye ashuuddh haai, arthata nevala, chooha, aur bhanati bhanati ke goh," 
Leviticus11:30 aur chhpaikalee, magar, ttkaittkai, sanda, aur giraagittana." 
Leviticus11:31 sab renganevalon men se ye hee tumhare liye ashuuddh haain jo koi inakee loth chooae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe. 
Leviticus11:32 aur in men se kisee kee loth jis kisee vastu par pad jaae vah bhee ashuuddh tthare, chahe vah katt ka koi patra ho, chahe vasr, chahe khal, chahe bora, chahe kisee kam ka kaaisa hee patraaadi kyon n ho vah jal men dala jaa, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe, tab shuuddh samajha jaae." 
Leviticus11:33 aur yaadi mittee ka koi patra ho jis men in jantuon men se koi pade, to us patra men jo kuchh ho vah ashuuddh tthare, aur patra ko tum tod dalana." 
Leviticus11:34 us men jo khane ke yogy bhojan ho, jis men panee ka chhuav hon vah sab ashuuddh tthare fir yadi aeese patra men peene ke liye kuchh ho to vah bhee ashuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus11:35 aur yaadi inakee loth men ka kuchh tandoor va choolhe par pade to vah bhee ashuuddh tthare, aur tod dala jaae kyonki vah ashuuddh ho jaaega, vah tumhare liye bhee ashuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus11:36 parantu sota va talab jis men jal ikattha ho vah to shuuddh hee rahe parantu jo koi inakee loth ko chooae vah ashuuddh tthare. 
Leviticus11:37 aur yaadi inakee loth men ka kuchh kisee prakar ke beej par jo bone ke liye ho pade, to vah beej shuuddh rahe" 
Leviticus11:38 par yaadi beej par jal dala gaya ho aur peechhe loth men ka kuchh us par pad jaa, to vah tumhare liye ashuuddh tthare.." 
Leviticus11:39 fir jin pashuuon ke khane kee agyaa tum ko dee gai haai yadi un men se koi pashu mare, to jo koi usakee loth chooae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus11:40 aur usakee loth men se jo koi kuchh khaae vah apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe aur jo koi usakee loth uttaae vah bhee apane vasr dhaeae aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe. 
Leviticus11:41 aur sab prakar ke prathvee par renganevale jantu ghainaune haain ve khaae n jaaen. 
Leviticus11:42 prathvee par sab renganevalon men se jitane pett va char panvon ke bal chalate haai, va adhaik panvavale hote haai, unhen tum n khana kyonki ve ghainaune haain." 
Leviticus11:43 tum kisee prakar ke renganevale jantu ke dara apane ap ko ghainauna n karana aur n unake dara apane ko ashuuddh karake apavitra ttharana. 
Leviticus11:44 kyonaki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon is prakar ke renganevale jantu ke dara jo prathvee par chalata haai apane ap ko ashuuddh n karana. 
Leviticus11:45 kyonaki maain vah yahova hoon jo tumhen misr desh se isaliye nikal le aya hoon ki tumhara parameshvar ttharoon isaaliye tum paavitra bano, kyonki maain paavitra hoon.." 
Leviticus11:46 pashuuo, pakshiayo, aur sab jalacharee praanaiyo, aur prathvee par sab renganevale praanaiyon ke vishay men yahee vyavastha haai," 
Leviticus11:47 ki shuuddh ashuuddh aur bhkshay aur abhkshay jeevadhaaariyon men bhed kiya jaae.. 
Leviticus12:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus12:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki jo sree gabhairnee ho aur usake ladka ho, to vah sat din tak ashuuddh rahegee jis prakar vah retumatee hokar ashuuddh raha karatee." 
Leviticus12:3 aur attven din ladke ka khtana kiya jaae. 
Leviticus12:4 fir vah sree apane shuuddh karanevale roodhair men tentees din rahe aur jab tak usake shuuddh ho jane ke din poore n hon tab tak vah n to kisee paavitra vastu ko chhua, aur n paavitrasthan men pravesh kare." 
Leviticus12:5 aur yaadi usake ladkee paaida ho, to usako retumatee kee see ashuuddhta chaudah din kee lage aur fir chhyaiasatt din tak apane shuuddh karanevale roodhair men rahe." 
Leviticus12:6 aur jab usake shuuddh ho jane ke din poore ho, tab chahe usake betta hua ho chahe bettee, vah homabaali ke liye aek varsha ka bhedee ka bachcha, aur papabali ke liye kabootaree ka aek bachcha va pandukee milapavale tamboo ke dar par yajak ke pas laae." 
Leviticus12:7 tab yajak usako yahova ke samhane bhentt chaddhake usake liye praayaashchaitt kare aur vah apane roodhair ke bahane kee ashuuddhta se choottkar shuuddh ttharegee. jis sree ke ladka va ladkee utpann ho usake liye yahee vyavastha haai. 
Leviticus12:8 aur yaadi usake pas bhed va bakaree dene kee poonjee n ho, to do pandukee va kabootaree ke do bachche, aek to homabaali aur doosara papabaali ke liye de aur yajak usake liye praayaashchaitt kare, tab vah shuuddh ttharegee.." 
Leviticus13:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Leviticus13:2 jab kisee manushy ke shareer ke charma men soojan va papadee va fool ho, aur is se usake charma men koddh kee vyadhai sa kuchh dekh pade, to use haroon yajak ke pas ya usake putra jo yajak haain un men se kisee ke pas le jaaen." 
Leviticus13:3 jab yajak usake charma kee vyadhai ko dekhe, aur yaadi us vyaadhai ke sthan ke roaen ujale ho gaae hon aur vyaadhai charma se gaharee dekh pade, to vah jan le ki koddh kee vyadhai haai aur yajak us manushy ko dekhkar usako ashuuddh ttharaae." 
Leviticus13:4 aur yaadi vah fool usake charma men ujala to ho, parantu charma se gahara n dekh pade, aur n vahan ke roaen ujale ho gaae ho, to yajak unako sat din tak bandakar rakhe" 
Leviticus13:5 aur sataven din yajak usako dekhe, aur yadi vah vyaadhai jaaisee kee taaisee banee rahe aur usake charma men n faailee ho, to yajak usako aur bhee sat din tak bandakar rakhe" 
Leviticus13:6 aur sataven din yajak usako fir dekhe, aur yaadi dekh pade ki vyaadhai kee chamak kam haai aur vyadhai charma par faailee n ho, to yajak usako shuuddh ttharaae kyonki usake to charma men papadee haai aur vah apane vasr dhaekar shuuddh ho jaae." 
Leviticus13:7 aur yaadi yajak kee us janch ke pashchata jis men vah shuuddh ttharaya gaya tha, vah papadee usake charma par bahut faail jaa, to vah fir yajak ko dikhaya jaae" 
Leviticus13:8 aur yaadi yajak ko dekh pade ki papadee charma men faail gai haai, to vah usako ashuuddh ttharaae kyonaki vah koddh hee haai.." 
Leviticus13:9 yaadi koddh kee see vyadhai kisee manushy ke ho, to vah yajak ke pas pahuchaya jaae" 
Leviticus13:10 aur yajak usako dekhe, aur yaadi vah soojan usake charma men ujalee ho, aur usake karan roaen bhee ujale ho gaae ho, aur us soojan men bina charma ka mans ho," 
Leviticus13:11 to yajak jane ki usake charma men purana koddh haai, isaliye vah usako ashuuddh ttharaae aur band n rakhe, kyonki vah to ashuuddh haai." 
Leviticus13:12 aur yaadi koddh kisee ke charma men foottkar yahan tak faail jaa, ki jahan kaheen yajak dekhen vyaadhait ke sir se paair ke talave tak koddh ne sare charma ko chha liya ho," 
Leviticus13:13 jo yajak dhyan se dekhe, aur yadi koddh ne usake sare shareer ko chha liya ho, to vah us vyadhait ko shuuddh ttharaae aur usaka shareer jo bilakul ujala ho gaya haai vah shuuddh hee tthare." 
Leviticus13:14 par jab us men charmaheen mans dekh pade, tab to vah ashuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus13:15 aur yajak charmaheen mans ko dekhkar usako ashuuddh ttharaae kayonaki vaaisa charmaheen mans ashuuddh hee hota haai vah koddh haai. 
Leviticus13:16 par yaadi vah charmaheen mans fir ujala ho jaa, to vah manushy yajak ke pas jaa," 
Leviticus13:17 aur yajak usako dekhe, aur yaadi vah vyaadhai fir se ujalee ho gai ho, to yajak vyaadhait ko shuuddh jane vah shuuddh haai.." 
Leviticus13:18 fir yadi kisee ke charma men faoda hokar changa ho gaya ho," 
Leviticus13:19 aur faode ke sthan men ujalee see soojan va lalee liye huae ujala fool ho, to vah yajak ko dikhaya jaae." 
Leviticus13:20 aur yajak us soojan ko dekhe, aur yaadi vah charma se gaahira dekh pade, aur usake roaen bhee ujale ho gaae ho, to yajak yah janakar us manushy ko ashuuddh ttharaae kyonaki vah koddh kee vyadhai haai jo faode men se foottkar nikalee haai." 
Leviticus13:21 aur yaadi yajak dekhe ki us men ujale roaen naheen haai, aur vah charma se gaahiree nahee, aur usakee chamak kam hui haai, to yajak us manushy ko sat din tak band kar rakhe." 
Leviticus13:22 aur yaadi vah vyaadhai us samay tak charma men sachamuch faail jaa, to yajak us manushy ko ashuuddh ttharaae kyonki vah koddh kee vyadhai haai." 
Leviticus13:23 parantu yadi vah fool n faaile aur apane sthan hee par bana rahe, to vah faode ko dag haai yajak us manushy ko shuuddh ttharaae.." 
Leviticus13:24 fir yadi kisee ke charma men jalane ka ghaav ho, aur us jalane ke ghaav men charmaheen fool lalee liye huae ujala va ujala hee ho jaa," 
Leviticus13:25 to yajak usako dekhe, aur yaadi us fool men ke roaen ujale ho gaae hon aur vah charma se gaahira dekh pade, to vah koddh haai jo us jalane ke dag men se foott nikala haai yajak us manushy ko ashuuddh ttharaae kyonki us men koddh kee vyadhai haai." 
Leviticus13:26 aur yaadi yajak dekhe, ki fool men ujale roaen naheen aur n vah charma se kuchh gaahira haai, aur usakee chamak kam hui haai, to vah usako sat din tak band kar rakhe," 
Leviticus13:27 aur sataven din yajak usako dekhe, aur yadi vah charma men faail gai ho, to vah us manushy ko ashuuddh ttharaae kyonaki usako koddh kee vyadhai haai." 
Leviticus13:28 parantu yadi vah fool charma men naheen faaila aur apane sthan hee par jahan ka tahan hee bana ho, aur usakee chamak kam hui ho, to vah jal jane ke karan sooja hua haai, yajak us manushy ko shuuddh ttharaae kyonaki vah dag jal jane ke karan se haai.." 
Leviticus13:29 fir yadi kisee puroosh va sree ke sir par, va puroosh kee daddhee men vyadhai ho," 
Leviticus13:30 to yajak vyaadhai ko dekhe, aur yaadi vah charma se gaahiree dekh pade, aur us men boore boore patale bal ho, to yajak us manushy ko ashuuddh ttharaae vah vyadhai senhua, arthata sir va daddhee ka koddh haai." 
Leviticus13:31 aur yaadi yajak senhuaen kee vyadhai ko dekhe, ki vah charma se gaahiree naheen haai aur us men kale kale bal naheen haai, to vah senhuen ke vyaadhait ko sat din tak band kar rakhe," 
Leviticus13:32 aur sataven din yajak vyadhai ko dekhe, tab yaadi vah senhuan faaila n ho, aur us men boore boore bal n ho, aur senhuan charma se gahira n dekh pade," 
Leviticus13:33 to yah manushy moonda jaa, parantu jahan senhuan ho vahan n moonda jaae aur yajak us senhuaenvale ko aur bhee sat din tak band kare" 
Leviticus13:34 aur sataven din yajak sehuen ko dekhe, aur yaadi vah senhuan charma men faaila n ho aur charma se gahira n dekh pade, to yajak us manushy ko shuuddh ttharaae aur vah apane vasr dhaeke shuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus13:35 aur yaadi usake shuuddh ttharane ke pashchata senhuan charma men kuchh bhee faaile," 
Leviticus13:36 to yajak usako dekhe, aur yaadi vah charma men faaila ho, to yajak yah boore bal n ddoonddhe, kyonaki manushy ashuuddh haai." 
Leviticus13:37 parantu yadi usakee drashtti men vah senhuan jaaise ka taaisa bana ho, aur us men kale kale bal jame ho, to vah jane kee senhuan changa ho gaya haai, aur vah manushy shuuddh haai yajak usako shuuddh hee ttharaae.." 
Leviticus13:38 fir yadi kisee puroosh va sree ke charma men ujale fool ho," 
Leviticus13:39 to yajak dekhe, aur yaadi usake charma men ve fool kam ujale ho, to vah jane ki usako charma men nikalee hui chain hee haai vah manushy shuuddh tthare.." 
Leviticus13:40 fir jisake sir ke bal jhd gaae ho, to janana ki vah chandula to haai parantu shuuddh haai." 
Leviticus13:41 aur jisake sir ke age ke bal jhd gaae ho, to vah mathe ka chandula to haai parantu shuuddh haai." 
Leviticus13:42 parantu yadi chandule sir par va chandule mathe par lalee liye huae ujalee vyaadhai ho, to janana ki vah usake chandule sir par va chandule mathe par nikala hua koddh haai." 
Leviticus13:43 isaliye yajak usako dekhe, aur yaadi vyaadhai kee soojan usake chandule sir va chandule mathe par aeesee lalee liye huae ujalee ho jaaisa charma ke koddh men hota haai," 
Leviticus13:44 to vah manushy koddhee haai aur ashuuddh haai aur yajak usako avashy ashuuddh ttharaae kyonaki vah vyaadhai usake sir par haai.. 
Leviticus13:45 aur jis men vah vyaadhai ho us koddhee ke vasr fatte aur sir ke bal bikhre rahe, aur vah apane uparavale hontt ko ddhanpe huae ashuudd, ashuuddh pukara kare." 
Leviticus13:46 jitane din tak vah vyaadhai us men rahe utane din tak vah to ashuuddh rahega aur vah ashuuddh tthara rahe isaliye vah akela raha kare, usaka nivas sthan chhavanee ke bahar ho.." 
Leviticus13:47 fir jis vasr men koddh kee vyaadhai ho, chahe vah vasr un ka ho chahe sanee ka," 
Leviticus13:48 vah vyadhai chahe us sanee va un ke vasr ke tane men ho chahe bane me, va vah vyaadhai chamade men va chamade kee kisee vastu men ho," 
Leviticus13:49 yaadi vah vyaadhai kisee vasr ke chahe tane men chahe bane me, va chamade men va chamade kee kisee vastu men haree ho va lal see ho, to janana ki vah koddh kee vyadhai haai aur vah yajak ko dikhai jaae." 
Leviticus13:50 aur yajak vyaadhai ko dekhe, aur vyadhaivalee vastu ko sat din ke liye band kare" 
Leviticus13:51 aur sataven din vah us vyaadhai ko dekhe, aur yaadi vah vasr ke chahe tane men chahe bane me, va chamade men va chamade kee banee hui kisee vastu men faail gai ho, to janana ki vyaadhai galit koddh haai, isaaliye vah vastu, chahe kaaise hee kam men kyon n atee ho, taubhee ashuuddh ttharegee." 
Leviticus13:52 vah us vasr ko jisake tane va bane men vah vyaadhai ho, chahe vah un ka ho chahe sanee ka, va chamade kee vastu ho, usako jala de, vah vyadhai galit koddh kee haai vah vastu ag men jalai jaae." 
Leviticus13:53 aur yaadi yajak dekhe ki vah vyaadhai us vasr ke tane va bane me, va chamade kee us vastu men naheen faailee," 
Leviticus13:54 to jis vastu men vyaadhai ho usake dhaene kee agyaa de, tak use aur bhee sat din tak band kar rakhe" 
Leviticus13:55 aur usake dhaene ke bad yajak usako dekhe, aur yaadi vyaadhai ka n to rang badala ho, aur n vyadhai faailee ho, to janana ki vah ashuuddh haai use ag men jalana, kyonki chahe vah vyadhai bheetar chahe uparee ho taubhee vah kha jane valee vyadhai haai." 
Leviticus13:56 aur yaadi yajak dekhe, ki usake dhaene ke pashchata vyadhai kee chamak kam ho gai, to vah usako vasr ke chahe tane chahe bane men se, va chamade men se faadke nikale" 
Leviticus13:57 aur yaadi vah vyaadhai tab bhee us vasr ke tane va bane me, va chamade kee us vastu men dekh pade, to janana ki vah foott ke nikalee hui vyadhai haai aur jis men vah vyaadhai ho use ag men jalana." 
Leviticus13:58 aur yaadi us vasr se jisake tane va bane men vyaadhai ho, va chamade kee jo vastu ho us se jab dhaei jaae aur vyaadhai jatee rahee, to vah doosaree bar dhaul kar shuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus13:59 un va sanee ke vasr men ke tane va bane me, va chamade kee kisee vastu men jo koddh kee vyaadhai ho usake shuuddh aur ashuuddh ttharane kee yahee vyavastha haai.." 
Leviticus14:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus14:2 koddhee ke shuuddh ttharane kee vyavastha yah haai, ki vah yajak ke pas pahunchaya jaae." 
Leviticus14:3 aur yajak chhavanee ke bahar jaa, aur yajak us koddhee ko dekhe, aur yaadi usake koddh kee vyadhai changee hui ho," 
Leviticus14:4 to yajak agyaa de ki shuuddh ttharane vale ke liye do shuuddh aur jeevit pakshae, devadaroo kee lakadee, aur lal rang ka kapada aur joofaa ye sab liye jaaen" 
Leviticus14:5 aur yajak agyaa de ki aek pakshaee bahate huae jal ke upar mittee ke patra men bali kiya jaae. 
Leviticus14:6 tab vah jeeavit pakshaee ko devadaroo kee lakadee aur lal rang ke kapade aur joofaa in sabhon ko lekar aek sang us pakshaee ke lohoo men jo bahate huae jal ke upar baali kiya gaya haai duba de 
Leviticus14:7 aur koddh se shuuddh ttharanevale par sat bar chhdikakar usako shuuddh ttharaa, tab us jeeavit pakshaee ko maaidan men chhod de." 
Leviticus14:8 aur shuuddh ttharanevala apane vasren ko dhaea, aur sab bal mundvakar jal se snan kare, tab vah shuuddh ttharega aur usake bad vah chhavanee men ane paa, parantu sat din tak apane dere se bahar hee rahe." 
Leviticus14:9 aur sataven din vah sir, daddhee aur bhauhon ke sab bal mundaa, aur sab ang mundn karaa, aur apane vasren ko dhaea, aur jal se snan kare, tab vah shuuddh ttharega." 
Leviticus14:10 aur attven din vah do nirdosh bhed ke bachche, aur annabaali ke liye tel se sana hua aepa ka teen dahai ansh maaida, aur loj bhr tel laae." 
Leviticus14:11 aur shuuddh ttharanevala yajak in vastuon samet us shuuddh honevale manushy ko yahova ke sammukh milapavale tamboo ke dar par khda kare.
