Leviticus14:12 tab yajak aek bhed ka bachcha lekar doshabali ke liye use aur us loj bhr tel ko sameep laa, aur in dono ko hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke samhane hilaae" 
Leviticus14:13 tab yajak aek bhed ke bachche ko usee sthan men jahan vah papabali aur homabali pashuuon ka baalidan kiya karega, arthata paavitrasthan men baalidan kare kyonki jaaisa papabali yajak ka nij bhag hoga vaaisa hee doshabaali bhee usee ka nij bhag ttharega vah paramapavitra haai." 
Leviticus14:14 tab yajak doshabali ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar shuuddh ttharanevale ke dahine kan ke sire par, aur usake dahine hath aur daahine panv ke angootton par lagaae." 
Leviticus14:15 aur yajak us loj bhr tel men se kuchh lekar apane baaen hath kee hathelee par dale," 
Leviticus14:16 aur yajak apane dahine hath kee ungalee ko apane bain hathelee par ke tel men dubakar us tel men se kuchh apanee ungalee se yahova ke sammukh sat bar chhdike. 
Leviticus14:17 aur jo tel usakee hathelee par rah jaaega yajak us men se kuchh shuuddh honevale ke daahine kan ke sire par, aur usake dahine hath aur daahine panv ke angootton par doshabali ke lohoo ke upar lagaaen" 
Leviticus14:18 aur jo tel yajak kee hathelee par rah jaae usako vah shuuddh honevale ke sir par dal de. aur yajak usake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare. 
Leviticus14:19 aur yajak papabali ko bhee chaddhakar usake liye jo apanee ashuuddhta se shuuddh honevala ho praayaashchaitt kare aur usake bad homabaali pashu ka baalidan karake: 
Leviticus14:20 annabali samet vedee par chaddhaae: aur yajak usake liye praayaashchaitt kare, aur vah shuuddh ttharega.." 
Leviticus14:21 parantu yadi vah daridra ho aur itana lane ke liye usake pas poonjee n ho, to vah apana praayaashchaitt karavane ke nimit, hilane ke liye bhed ka bachcha doshabali ke liye, aur tel se sana hua aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida annabaali karake, aur loj bhr tel laae" 
Leviticus14:22 aur do panduk, va kabootaree ke do bachche laa, jo vah la sake aur in men se aek to papabaali ke liye aur doosara homabali ke liye ho." 
Leviticus14:23 aur attven din vah in sabhon ko apane shuuddh ttharane ke liye milapavale tamboo ke dar par, yahova ke sammuk, yajak ke pas le aae" 
Leviticus14:24 tab yajak us loj bhr tel aur dosh baalivale bhed ke bachche ko lekar hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ke samhane hilaae. 
Leviticus14:25 fir doshabali ke bhed ke bachche ka baalidan kiya jaae aur yajak usake lohoo men se kuchh lekar shuuddh ttharanevale ke dahine kan ke sire par, aur usake dahine hath aur daahine panv ke angootton par lagaae." 
Leviticus14:26 fir yajak us tel men se kuchh apane baaen hath kee hathelee par dalakar," 
Leviticus14:27 apane daahine hath kee ungalee se apanee bain hathelee par ke tel meen se kuchh yahova ke sammukh sat bar chhdike 
Leviticus14:28 fir yajak apanee hathelee par ke tel men se kuchh shuuddh ttharanevale ke daahine kan ke sire par, aur usake dahine hath aur daahine panv ke angootton par doshabali ke lohoo ke sthan par, lagaae." 
Leviticus14:29 aur jo tel yajak kee hathelee par rah jaae use vah shuuddh ttharanevale ke liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt karane ko usake sir par dal de. 
Leviticus14:30 tab vah pandukon va kabootaree ke bachchon men se jo vah la saka ho aek ko chaddhaa," 
Leviticus14:31 arthata jo pakshaee vah la saka ho, un men se vah aek ko papabaali ke liye aur annabali samet doosare ko homabali ke liye chaddhaae is reeti se yajak shuuddh ttharanevale ke liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare." 
Leviticus14:32 jise koddh kee vyaadhai hui ho, aur usake itanee poonjee n ho ki vah shuuddh ttharane kee samagraee ko la sake, to usake liye yahee vyavastha haai.." 
Leviticus14:33 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Leviticus14:34 jab tum log kanan desh men pahuncho, jise maain tumharee nij boomi hone ke liye tumhen deta hoo, us samay yaadi maain koddh kee vyaadhai tumhare aadhaikar ke kisee ghar men dikhau," 
Leviticus14:35 to jisaka vah ghar ho vah akar yajak ko bata de, ki mujhe aeesa dekh padta haai ki ghar men manon koi vyaadhai haai." 
Leviticus14:36 tab yajak agyaa de, ki us ghar men vyaadhai dekhne ke liye mere jane se paahile use khalee karo, kaheen aeesa n ho ki jo kuchh ghar men ho vah sab ashuuddh tthare aur peechhe yajak ghar dekhne ko bheetar jaae." 
Leviticus14:37 tab vah us vyadhai ko dekhe aur yaadi vah vyaadhai ghar kee deevaron par haree haree va lal lal manon khudee hui lakeeron ke roop men ho, aur ye lakeeren deevar men gahiree dekh padtee ho," 
Leviticus14:38 to yajak ghar se bahar dar par jakar ghar ko sat din tak band kar rakhe. 
Leviticus14:39 aur sataven din yajak akar dekhe aur yaadi vah vyaadhai ghar kee deevaron par faail gai ho," 
Leviticus14:40 to yajak agyaa de, ki jin patthron ko vyadhai haai unhen nikal kar nagar se bahar kisee ashuuddh sthan men faenk den" 
Leviticus14:41 aur vah ghar ke bheetar hee bheetar charon or khurachavaa, aur vah khurachan kee mittee nagar se bahar kisee ashuuddh sthan men dalee jaae" 
Leviticus14:42 aur un patthron ke sthan men aur doosare patthr lekar lagaaen aur yajak taja gara lekar ghar kee judai kare. 
Leviticus14:43 aur yaadi patthron ke nikale jane aur ghar ke khurache aur lese jane ke bad vah vyadhai fir ghar men foott nikale," 
Leviticus14:44 to yajak akar dekhe aur yadi vah vyaadhai ghar men faail gai ho, to vah jan le ki ghar men galit koddh haai vah ashuuddh haai." 
Leviticus14:45 aur vah sab gare samet patthr, lakadee aur ghar ko khudavakar gira de aur un sab vastuon ko uttvakar nagar se bahar kisee ashuuddh sthan par finkava de." 
Leviticus14:46 aur jab tak vah ghar band rahe tab tak yaadi koi us men jaae to vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe 
Leviticus14:47 aur jo koi us ghar men soae vah apane vasren ko dhaeae aur jo koi us ghar men khana khaae vah bhee apane vasren ko dhaeae. 
Leviticus14:48 aur yaadi yajak akar dekhe ki jab se ghar lesa gaya haai tab se us men vyaadhai naheen faailee haai, to yah janakar ki vah vyaadhai door ho gai haai, ghar ko shuuddh ttharaae." 
Leviticus14:49 aur us ghar ko paavitra karane ke liye do pakshae, devadaroo kee lakadee, lal rang ka kapada aur joofaa liva laa," 
Leviticus14:50 aur aek pakshaee bahate huae jal ke upar mittee ke patra men balidan kare," 
Leviticus14:51 tab vah devadaroo kee lakadee lal rang ke kapade aur joofaa aur jeevit pakshaee in sabhon ko lekar baalidan kiae huae pakshaee ke lohoo men aur bahate huae jal men ooba de, aur us ghar par sat bar chhdike." 
Leviticus14:52 aur vah pakshaee ke loho, aur bahate huae jal, aur joofaa aur lal rang ke kapade ke dara ghar ko paavitra kare" 
Leviticus14:53 tab vah jeeavit pakshaee ko nagar se bahar maaidan men chhod de isee reeati se vah ghar ke liye praayaashchaitt kare, tab vah shuuddh ttharega." 
Leviticus14:54 sab bhanti ke koddh kee vyadhai, aur sehuae," 
Leviticus14:55 aur vasr, aur ghar ke koddh," 
Leviticus14:56 aur soojan, aur papadee, aur fool ke vishay me," 
Leviticus14:57 shuuddh aur ashuuddh ttharane kee shaiksha kee vyavastha yahee haai. sab prakar ke koddh kee vyavastha yahee haai.. 
Leviticus15:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus15:2 ki israaeliyon se kaho, ki jis jis puroosh ke prameh ho, to vah prameh ke karan se ashuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus15:3 aur chahe bahata rahe, chahe bahana band bhee ho, taubhee usakee ashuuddhta banee rahegee." 
Leviticus15:4 jisake prameh ho vah jis jis bichhaune par lette vah ashuuddh tthare, aur jis jis vastu par vah baaitte vah bhee ashuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus15:5 aur jo koi usake bichhaune ko chooae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh tthara rahe." 
Leviticus15:6 aur jisake prameh ho aur vah jis vastu par baaitta ho, us par jo koi baaitte vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh tthara rahe." 
Leviticus15:7 aur jisake prameh ho us se jo koi choo jaae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe. 
Leviticus15:8 aur jisake prameh ho yaadi vah kisee shuuddh manushy par tooke, to vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:9 aur jisake prameh ho vah savaree kee jis vastu par baaitte vah ashuuddh tthare. 
Leviticus15:10 aur jo koi kisee vastu ko jo usake neeche rahee ho chooae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:11 aur jisake prameh ho vah jis kisee ko bina hath dhaeae chooae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:12 aur jisake prameh ho vah mittee ke jis kisee patra ko chooae vah tod dala jaa, aur katt ke sab prakar ke patra jal se dhaeae jaaen." 
Leviticus15:13 fir jisake prameh ho vah jab apane rog se changa ho jaa, tab se shuuddh ttharane ke sat din gin le, aur unake beetane par apane vasren ko dhaekar bahate huae jal se snan kare tab vah shuuddh ttharega." 
Leviticus15:14 aur attven din vah do panduk va kabootaree ke do bachche lekar milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke sammukh jakar unhen yajak ko de. 
Leviticus15:15 tab yajak un men se aek ko papabali aur doosare ko homabaali ke liye bhentt chaddhaae aur yajak usake liye usake prameh ke karan yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare.. 
Leviticus15:16 fir yadi kisee puroosh ka veeyrya skhlit ho jaa, to vah apane sare shareer ko jal se dhaea, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:17 aur jis kisee vasr va chamade par vah veeyrya pade vah jal se dhaeya jaa, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:18 aur jab koi puroosh sree se prasang kare, to ve dono jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahen.." 
Leviticus15:19 fir jab koi sree retumatee rahe, to vah sat din tak ashuuddh ttharee rahe, aur jo koi usako chooae vah sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:20 aur jab tak vah ashuuddh rahe tab tak jis jis vastu par vah lette, aur jis jis vastu par vah baaitte ve sab ashuuddh ttharen." 
Leviticus15:21 aur jo koi usake bichhaune ko chooae vah apane vasr dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:22 aur jo koi kisee vastu ko chooae jis par vah baaittee ho vah apane vasr dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:23 aur yaadi bichhaune va aur kisee vastu par jis par vah baaittee ho choone ke samay usaka roodhair laga ho, to choonehara sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:24 aur yaadi koi puroosh us se prasang kare, aur usaka roodhair usake lag jaa, to vah puroosh sat din tak ashuuddh rahe, aur jis jis bichhaune par vah lette ve sab ashuuddh ttharen.." 
Leviticus15:25 fir yadi kisee sree ke apane maasik dharma ke niyukt samay se aadhaik din tak roodhair bahata rahe, va us niyukt samay se aadhaik samay tak retumatee rahe, to jab tak vah aeesee dasha men rahe tab tak vah ashuuddh ttharee rahe." 
Leviticus15:26 usake retumatee rahane ke sab dinon men jis jis bichhaune par vah lette ve sab usake maasik dharma ke bichhaune ke saman ttharen aur jis jis vastu par vah baaitte ve bhee usake retumatee rahe ke dinon kee nai ashuuddh ttharen. 
Leviticus15:27 aur jo koi un vastuon ko chhuae vah ashuuddh tthare, isaliye vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Leviticus15:28 aur jab vah sree apane retumatee se shuuddh ho jaa, tab se vah sat din gin le, aur un dinon ke beetane par vah shuuddh tthare." 
Leviticus15:29 fir attven din vah do panduk ya kabootaree ke do bachche lekar milapavale tamboo ke dar par yajak ke pas jaae. 
Leviticus15:30 tab yajak aek ko papabali aur doosare ko homabaali ke liye chaddhaae aur yajak usake liye usake maasik dharma kee ashuuddhta ke karan yahova ke samhane praayaashchaitt kare.. 
Leviticus15:31 is prakar se tum israaeliyon ko unakee ashuuddhta se nyare rakha karo, kaheen aeesa n ho ki ve yahova ke nivas ko jo unake beech men haai ashuuddh karake apanee ashuuddhta men fanse huae mar jaaen.." 
Leviticus15:32 jisake prameh ho aur jo puroosh veeyrya skhlit hone se ashuuddh ho 
Leviticus15:33 aur jo sree retumatee ho aur kya puroosh kya sre, jis kisee ke dhaaturog ho, aur jo puroosh ashuuddh sree ke prasang kare, in sabhon ke liye yahee vyavastha haai.." 
Leviticus16:1 jab haroon ke do putra yahova ke samhane sameep jakar mar gaa, usake bad yahova ne moosa se baten kee" 
Leviticus16:2 aur yahova ne moosa se kaha, apane bhai haroon se kah, ki sandook ke upar ke praayashchaittvale ddhkane ke age, beechavale parde ke andar, pavitrasthan men har samay n pravesh kare, naheen to mar jaaega kyonki maain praayaashchaittvale ddhkane ke upar badal men dikhai doonga." 
Leviticus16:3 aur jab haroon pavitrasthan men pravesh kare tab is reeti se pravesh kare, arthata papabaali ke liye aek bachhde ko aur homabali ke liye aek meddhe ko lekar aae." 
Leviticus16:4 vah sanee ke kapade ka paavitra angarakha, aur apane tan par sanee ke kapade kee janghaiya paahine hua, aur sanee ke kapade ka kaattbaind, aur sanee ke kapade kee pagadee bandho huae pravesh kare ye paavitra sthan haai, aur vah jal se snan karake inhen paahine." 
Leviticus16:5 fir vah israaeliyon kee mandlee ke pas se papabali ke liye do bakare aur homabaali ke liye aek meddha le. 
Leviticus16:6 aur haroon us papabali ke bachhde ko jo usee ke liye hoga chaddhakar apane aur apane gharane ke liye praayaashchaitt kare. 
Leviticus16:7 aur un donon bakaron ko lekar milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke samhane khda kare 
Leviticus16:8 aur haroon donon bakaron par chitthiyan dale, aek chitthee yahova ke liye aur doosaree ajajel ke liye ho." 
Leviticus16:9 aur jis bakare par yahova ke nam kee chitthee nikale usako haroon papabaali ke liye chaddhaae 
Leviticus16:10 parantu jis bakare par ajajel ke liye chitthee nikale vah yahova ke samhane jeevata khda kiya jaae ki us se praayashchaitt kiya jaa, aur vah ajajel ke liye jangal men chhoda jaae." 
Leviticus16:11 aur haroon us papabali ke bachhde ko jo usee ke liye hoga sameep le aa, aur usako balidan karake apane aur apane gharane ke liye praayaashchaitt kare." 
Leviticus16:12 aur jo vedee yahova ke sammukh haai us par ke jalate huae koyalon se bhre huae dhoopadan ko lekar, aur apanee donon mutthiyon ko footte huae sugaandhiat dhoop se bhrakar, beechavale parde ke bheetar le akar" 
Leviticus16:13 us dhoop ko yahova ke sammukh ag men dale, jis se dhoop ka dhauan sakshaeepatra ke upar ke praayaashchaitt ke ddhkane ke upar chha jaa, naheen to vah mar jaega" 
Leviticus16:14 tab vah bachhde ke lohoo men se kuchh lekar poorab kee or praayashchaitt ke ddhkane ke upar apanee ungalee se chhdike, aur fir us lohoo men se kuchh ungalee ke dara us ddhkane ke samhane bhee sat bar chhdik de." 
Leviticus16:15 fir vah us papabali ke bakare ko jo sadhaaran janata ke liye hoga balidan karake usake lohoo ko beechavale parde ke bheetar le aa, aur jis prakar bachhde ke lohoo se us ne kiya tha tteek vaaisa hee vah bakare ke lohoo se bhee kare, arthata usako praayaashchaitt ke ddhkane ke upar aur usake samhane chhdike." 
Leviticus16:16 aur vah israaeliyon kee bhanti bhanati kee ashuuddhta, aur aparadhae, aur unake sab papon ke karan pavitrasthan ke liye praayaashchaitt kare aur milapavala tamboo jo unake sang unakee bhanti bhanati kee ashuuddhta ke beech rahata haai usake liye bhee vah vaaisa hee kare." 
Leviticus16:17 aur jab haroon praayashchaitt karane ke liye paavitrasthan men pravesh kare, tab se jab tak vah apane aur apane gharane aur israael kee saree mandlee ke liye praayaashchaitt karake bahar n nikale tab tak koi manushy milapavale tamboo men n rahe." 
Leviticus16:18 fir vah nikalakar us vedee ke pas jo yahova ke samhane haai jaae aur usake liye praayaashchaitt kare, arthata bachhde ke lohoo aur bakare ke lohoo donon men se kuchh lekar us vedee ke charon konon ke seengo par lagaae." 
Leviticus16:19 aur us lohoo men se kuchh apanee ungalee ke dara sat bar us par chhdikakar use israaeliyon kee bhanti bhanati kee ashuuddhta chhudakar shuuddh aur pavitra kare. 
Leviticus16:20 aur jab vah paavitrasthan aur milapavale tamboo aur vedee ke liye praayaashchaitt kar chuke, tab jeeavit bakare ko age le aae" 
Leviticus16:21 aur haroon apane donon hathon ko jeevit bakare par rakhkar israaeliyon ke sab adharma ke kamo, aur unake sab aparadhae, nidan unake sare papon ko angeekar kare, aur unako bakare ke sir par dharakar usako kisee manushy ke hath jo is kam ke liye taaiyar ho jangal men bhejake chhudva de." 
Leviticus16:22 aur vah bakara unake sab adharma ke kamon ko apane upar lade huae kisee nirale desh men utta le jaaega isaliye vah manushy us bakare ko jangal meen chhode de. 
Leviticus16:23 tab haroon milapavale tamboo men aa, aur jis sanee ke vasren ko paahine huae us ne pavitrasthan men pravesh kiya tha unhen utarakar vaheen par rakh de." 
Leviticus16:24 fir vah kisee paavitra sthan men jal se snan kar apane nij vasr paahin le, aur bahar jakar apane homabali aur sadhaaran janata ke homabaali ko chaddhakar apane aur janata ke liye praayaashchaitt kare." 
Leviticus16:25 aur papabaali kee charabee ko vah vedee par jalaae. 
Leviticus16:26 aur jo manushy bakare ko ajajel ke liye chhodkar aae vah bhee apane vasren ko dhaea, aur jal se snan kare, aur tab vah chhavanee men pravesh kare." 
Leviticus16:27 aur papabaali ka bachhda aur papabaali ka bakara bhee jinaka lohoo paavitrasthan men praayaashchaitt karane ke liye pahunchaya jaae ve donon chhavanee se bahar pahunchaae jaaen aur unaka chamada, mans, aur gobar ag men jala diya jaae." 
Leviticus16:28 aur jo unako jalaae vah apane vasren ko dhaea, aur jal se snan kare, aur isake bad vah chhavanee men pravesh karane paae.." 
Leviticus16:29 aur tum logon ke liye yah sada kee vidhai hogee ki sataven maheene ke dasaven din ko tum apane apane jeev ko du:kh dena, aur us din koi, chahe vah tumhare nij desh ko ho chahe tumhare beech rahane vala koi paradeshaee ho, koi bhee kisee prakar ka kam kaj n kare" 
Leviticus16:30 kyonaki us din tumhen shuuddh karane ke liye tumhare nimitt praayashchaitt kiya jaaega aur tum apane sab papon se yahova ke sammukh paavitra ttharoge. 
Leviticus16:31 yah tumhare liye paramaavishraam ka din tthare, aur tum us din apane apane jeev ko du:kh dena yah sada kee vidhai haai." 
Leviticus16:32 aur jisaka apane pita ke sthan par yajak pad ke liye aabhaishok aur sanskar kiya jaae vah yajak praayaashchaitt kiya kare, arthata vah sanee ke paavitra vasren ko paahinakar," 
Leviticus16:33 paavitrasthan, aur milapavale tambo, aur vedee ke liye praayaashchaitt kare aur yajakon ke aur mandlee ke sab logon ke liye bhee praayaashchaitt kare." 
Leviticus16:34 aur yah tumhare liye sada kee vidhai hogee, ki israaeliyon ke liye praativarsha aek bar tumhare sare papon ke liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaae. yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar jo us ne moosa ko dee thee haroon ne kiya.." 
Leviticus17:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus17:2 haroon aur usake putraen se aur kul israaeliyon se kah, ki yahova ne yah agyaa dee haai," 
Leviticus17:3 ki israael ke gharane men se koi manushy ho jo baail va bhed ke bachche, va bakaree ko, chahe chhavanee men chahe chhavanee se bahar ghaat karake" 
Leviticus17:4 milapavale tamboo ke dar par, yahova ke nivas ke samhane yahova ko chaddhane ke nimitt n le jaa, to us manushy ko lohoo bahane ka dosh lagega aur vah manushy jo lohoo bahane vala ttharega, vah apane logon ke beech se nash kiya jaae." 
Leviticus17:5 is vidhai ka yah karan haai ki israaelee apane balidan jinako vah khule maaidan men vadha karate haai, ve unhen milapavale tamboo ke dar par yajak ke pas, yahova ke liye le jakar usee ke liye melabaali karake balidan kiya karen" 
Leviticus17:6 aur yajak lohoo ko milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova kee vedee ke upar chhdike, aur charabee ko usake sukhdayak sugandha ke liye jalaae." 
Leviticus17:7 aur ve jo bakaron ke poojak hokar vyaabhaichar karate haai, ve fir apane balipashuuon ko unake liye baalidan n karen. tumharee peeaddhiyon ke liye yah sada kee vidhai hogee.." 
Leviticus17:8 aur too un se kah, ki israael ke gharane ke logon men se va unake beech rahanehare paradeshaiyon men se koi manushy kyon n ho jo homabali va melabali chaddhaa," 
Leviticus17:9 aur usako milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke liye chaddhane ko n le aae vah manushy apane logon men se nash kiya jaae.. 
Leviticus17:10 fir israael ke gharane ke logon men se va unake beech rahanevale paradeshaiyon men se koi manushy kyon n ho jo kisee prakar ka lohoo khaa, maain us lohoo khanevale ke vimukh hokar usako usake logon ke beech men se nash kar daloonga." 
Leviticus17:11 kyonaki shareer ka praan lohoo men rahata haai aur usako maain ne tum logon ko vedee par chaddhane ke liye diya haai, ki tumhare praanon ke liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaae kyonaki praan ke karan lohoo hee se praayaashchaitt hota haai." 
Leviticus17:12 is karan maain israaeliyon se kahata hoo, ki tum men se koi praanee lohoo n khaa, aur jo paradeshaee tumhare beech rahata ho vah bhee lohoo kabhee n khaae.." 
Leviticus17:13 aur israaeliyon men se va unake beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon men se koi manushy kyon n ho jo aher karake khane ke yogy pashu va pakshaee ko pakade, vah usake lohoo ko undelakar dhooli se ddhnap de." 
Leviticus17:14 kyonaki shareer ka praan jo haai vah usaka lohoo hee haai jo usake praan ke sath aek haai isee liye maain israaeliyon se kahata hoo, ki kisee prakar ke praanee ke lohoo ko tum n khana, kyonaki sab praaanaiyon ka praan unaka lohoo hee haai jo koi usako khaae vah nash kiya jaaega." 
Leviticus17:15 aur chahe vah deshaee ho va paradeshaee ho, jo koi kisee loth va faade huae pashu ka mans khaae vah apane vasren ko dhaekar jal se snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe tab vah shuuddh hoga." 
Leviticus17:16 aur yaadi vah unako n dhaeae aur n snan kare, to usako apane adharma ka bhar svayan uttana padega.." 
Leviticus18:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus18:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus18:3 tum misr desh ke kamon ke anusar jis men tum rahate the n karana aur kanan desh ke kamon ke anusar bhee jahan maain tumhen le chalata hoon n karana aur n un deshaen kee vidhaiyon par chalana. 
Leviticus18:4 mere hee niyamon ko manana, aur meree hee vidhaiyon ko manate huae un par chalana. maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus18:5 isaliye tum mere niyamon aur meree vidhaiyon ko nirantar manana jo manushy unako mane vah unake karan jeeavit rahega. maain yahova hoon. 
Leviticus18:6 tum men se koi apanee kisee nikatt kuttumbain ka tan ughaadne ko usake pas n jaae. maain yahova hoon. 
Leviticus18:7 apanee mata ka tan jo tumhare pita ka tan haai n ughaadna vah to tumharee mata haai, isaaliye tum usaka tan n ughaadna." 
Leviticus18:8 apanee sautelee mata ka bhee tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare pita hee ka tan haai. 
Leviticus18:9 apanee baahin chahe sagee ho chahe sautelee ho, chahe vah ghar men utpann hui ho chahe bahar, usaka tan n ughaadna." 
Leviticus18:10 apanee potee va apanee natinee ka tan n ughaadna, unakee deh to mano tumharee hee haai." 
Leviticus18:11 tumharee sotelee bahin jo tumhare pita se utpann hui, vah tumharee bahin haai, is karan usaka tan n ughaadna." 
Leviticus18:12 apanee foofaee ka tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare pita kee nikatt kuttumbain haai. 
Leviticus18:13 apanee mausee ka tan n ughaadna kyonaki vah tumharee mata kee nikatt kuttumbain haai. 
Leviticus18:14 apane chacha ka tan n ughaadna, arthata usakee sree ke pas n jana vah to tumharee chachee haai." 
Leviticus18:15 apanee bahoo ka tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare bette kee sree haai, is karan tum usaka tan n ughaadna." 
Leviticus18:16 apanee bhaujee ka tan n ughaadna vah to tumhare bhai hee ka tan haai. 
Leviticus18:17 kisee sree aur usakee bettee donon ka tan n ughaadna, aur usakee potee ko va usakee natinee ko apanee sree karake usaka tan n ughaadna ve to nikatt kuttumbain haai aeesa karana mahapap haai." 
Leviticus18:18 aur apanee sree kee baahin ko bhee apanee sree karake usakee saut n karana, ki pahalee ke jeevit rahate huae usaka tan bhee ughaade." 
Leviticus18:19 fir jab tak koi sree apane retu ke karan ashuuddh rahe tab tak usake pas usaka tan ughaadne ko n jana. 
Leviticus18:20 fir apane bhai bandha kee sree se kukarma karake ashuuddh n ho jana. 
Leviticus18:21 aur apane santan men se kisee ko molek ke liye hom karake n chaddhana, aur n apane parameshvar ke nam ko apaavitra ttharana maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus18:22 sreegaman kee reeti purooshagaman n karana vah to ghainauna kam haai. 
Leviticus18:23 kisee jaati ke pashu ke sath pashuugaman karake ashuuddh n ho jana, aur n koi sree pashu ke samhane isaliye khdee ho ki usake sang kukarma kare yah to ulttee bat haai.." 
Leviticus18:24 aeesa aeesa koi bhee kam karake ashuuddh n ho jana, kyonki jin jatiyon ko maain tumhare age se nikalane par hoon ve aeese aeese kam karake ashuuddh ho gai haai" 
Leviticus18:25 aur unaka desh bhee ashuuddh ho gaya haai, is karan maain us par usake adharma ka dand deta hoo, aur vah desh apane nivaasiyon ko ugal deta haai." 
Leviticus18:26 is karan tum log meree vidhaiyon aur niyamon ko nirantar manana, aur chahe deshaee chahe tumhare beech rahanevala paradeshaee ho tum men se koi bhee aeesa ghainauna kam n kare" 
Leviticus18:27 kyonaki aeese sab ghainaune kamon ko us desh ke manushy to tum se pahile us men rahate the ve karate aae haai, isee se vah desh ashuuddh ho gaya haai." 
Leviticus18:28 ab aeesa n ho ki jis reeti se jo jati tum se pahile us desh men rahatee thee usako us ne ugal diya, usee reeti jab tum usako ashuuddh karo, to vah tum ko bhee ugal de." 
Leviticus18:29 jitane aeesa koi ghainauna kam karen ve sab praanee apane logon men se nash kiae jaaen. 
Leviticus18:30 yah agyaa jo maain ne tumhare manane ko dee haai use tum manana, aur jo ghainaunee reetiyan tum se paahile prachalit haain un men se kisee par n chalana, aur n unake karan ashuuddh ho jana. maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon.." 
Leviticus19:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus19:2 israaeliyon kee saree mandlee se kah, ki tum pavitra bane raho kyonaki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova pavitra hoon." 
Leviticus19:3 tum apanee apanee mata aur apane apane pita ka bhy manana, aur mere vishraam dinon ko manana maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:4 tum mooraton kee or n firana, aur devataon kee praatimaaen ddhalakar n bana lena maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:5 jab tum yahova ke liye melabaali karo, tab aeesa balidan karana jisase maain tum se prasann ho jaun." 
Leviticus19:6 usaka mans balidan ke din aur doosare din khaya jaa, parantu teesare din tak jo rah jaae vah ag men jala diya jae." 
Leviticus19:7 aur yaadi us men se kuchh bhee teesare din khaya jaa, to yah gharanait ttharega, aur grahan n kiya jaaega." 
Leviticus19:8 aur usaka khanevala yahova ke pavitra padarth ko apavitra ttharata haai, isaliye usako apane adharma ka bhar svayan uttana padega aur vah praanee apane logon men se nash kiya jaaega.." 
Leviticus19:9 fir jab tum apane desh ke khet katto tab apane khet ke kone kone tak poora n kattna, aur katte huae khet kee giree padee balon ko n chunana." 
Leviticus19:10 aur apanee dakh kee baree ka dana dana n tod lena, aur apanee dakh kee baree ke jhnde huae angooron ko n battorana unhen deen aur paradeshaee logon ke liye chhod dena maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:11 tum choree n karana, aur aek doosare se n to kapatt karana, aur n joott bolana." 
Leviticus19:12 tum mere nam kee joottee shapath khake apane parameshvar ka nam apaavitra n ttharana maain yahova hoon. 
Leviticus19:13 aek doosare par andhor n karana, aur n aek doosare ko loott lena. aur majadoor kee majadooree tere pas saree rat bihan tak n rahane paaen." 
Leviticus19:14 baahire ko shaap n dena, aur n andho ke age ttokar rakhna aur apane parameshvar ka bhy manana maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:15 nyay men kuttlaita n karana aur n to kangal ka paksha karana aur n bade manushyon ka munh dekha vichar karana us doosare ka nyay dharma se karana. 
Leviticus19:16 lootara banake apane logon men n fira karana, aur aek doosare ke lohoo bahane kee yuaktaiyan n bandhana maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:17 apane man men aek doosare ke prati baair n rakhna apane padosee ko avashy danttna nahee, to usake pap ka bhar tujh ko uttana padega." 
Leviticus19:18 palatta n lena, aur n apane jati bhaiyon se baair rakhna, parantu aek doosare se apane saman praem rakhna maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:19 tum meree vidhaiyon ko nirantar manana. apane pashuuon ko bhainn jaati ke pashuuon se mel n khane dena apane khet men do prakar ke beej ikatthe n bona aur sanee aur un kee milavatt se bana hua vasr n pahinana. 
Leviticus19:20 fir koi sree dasee ho, aur usakee manganee kisee puroosh se hui ho, parantu vah n to das se aur n sentament svadhaeen kee gai ho us se yaadi koi kukarma kare, to un donon ko dand to mile, par us sree ke svadhaeen n hone ke karan ve donon mar n dale jaaen." 
Leviticus19:21 par vah puroosh milapavale tamboo ke dar par yahova ke pas aek meddha doshabali ke liye le aae. 
Leviticus19:22 aur yajak usake kiye huae pap ke karan doshabaali ke meddhe ke dara usake liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare tab usaka kiya hua pap kshama kiya jaaega. 
Leviticus19:23 fir jab tum kanan desh men panhuchakar kisee prakar ke fal ke vraksha lagao, to unake fal teen varsha tak tumhare liye manon khtanaraahit ttharen rahen isaaliye un men se kuchh n khaya jaae." 
Leviticus19:24 aur chauthe varsha men unake sab fal yahova kee stuti karane ke liye paavitra ttharen. 
Leviticus19:25 tab panchaven varsha men tum unake fal khana, isaaliye ki un se tum ko bahut fal milen maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:26 tum lohoo laga hua kuchh mans n khana. aur n ttona karana, aur n shuubh va ashuubh muhootorn ko manana." 
Leviticus19:27 apane sir men ghora rakhkar n mundana, aur n apane gal ke balon ko mundana." 
Leviticus19:28 mudorn ke karan apane shareer ko bilakul n cheerana, aur n us men chhap lagana maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:29 apanee beattyaien ko veshya banakar apavitra n karana, aeesa n ho ki desh veshyagaman ke karan mahapap se bhr jaae." 
Leviticus19:30 mere vishraamadin ko mana karana, aur mere pavitrasthan ka bhy nirantar manana maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:31 ojhaon aur boot sadhane valon kee or n firana, aur aeeson ko khoj karake unake karan ashuuddh n ho jana maai tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:32 pakke balavale ke samhane utt khde hona, aur booddhe ka adaraman karana, aur apane parameshvar ka bhy nirantar manana maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:33 aur yaadi koi paradeshaee tumhare desh men tumhare sang rahe, to usako du:kh n dena." 
Leviticus19:34 jo paradeshaee tumhare sang rahe vah tumhare liye deshaee ke saman ho, aur us se apane hee saman praem rakhna kyonaki tum bhee misr desh men paradeshaee the maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus19:35 tum nyay me, aur pariman me, aur taul me, aur nap men kuttlaita n karana." 
Leviticus19:36 sachcha tarajo, dharma ke battkhre, sachcha aepa, aur dharma ka heen tumhare pas rahen maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon jo tum ko misr desh se nikal le aya." 
Leviticus19:37 isaliye tum meree sab vidhaiyon aur sab niyamon ko manate huae nirantar palan karo maain yahova hoon.. 
Leviticus20:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus20:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki israaeliyon men se, va israaeliyon ke beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon men se, koi kyon n ho jo apanee koi santan molek ko balidan kare vah nishchay mar dala jaae aur janata usako patthravah kare." 
Leviticus20:3 aur maain bhee us manushy ke virooddh hokar usako usake logon men se is karan nash karoonga, ki us ne apanee santan molek ko dekar mere paavitrasthan ko ashuuddh kiya, aur mere pavitra nam ko apavitra ttharaya." 
Leviticus20:4 aur yaadi koi apanee santan molek ko balidan kare, aur janata usake vishay men anakanee kare, aur usako mar n dale," 
Leviticus20:5 tab to maain svayan us manushy aur usake gharane ke virooddh hokar usako aur jitane usake peechhe hokar molek ke sath vyabhaichar karen un sabhon ko bhee unake logon ke beech men se nash karoonga. 
Leviticus20:6 fir jo praanee ojhaon va bootasadhanevalon kee or firake, aur unake peechhe hokar vyaabhaicharee bane, tab maain us praanee ke virooddh hokar usako usake logon ke beech men se nash kar doonga." 
Leviticus20:7 isaliye tum apane ap ko paavitra karo aur pavitra bane raho kyonaki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon. 
Leviticus20:8 aur tum meree vidhaiyon ko manana, aur unaka palan bhee karana kyonki maain tumhara pavitra karanevala yahova hoon." 
Leviticus20:9 koi kyon n ho jo apane pita va mata ko shaap de vah nishchay mar dala jaae us ne apane pita va mata ko shaap diya haai, is karan usaka koon usee ke sir par padega." 
Leviticus20:10 fir yadi koi parai sree ke sath vyabhaichar kare, to jis ne kisee doosare kee sree ke sath vyaabhaichar kiya ho to vah vyabhaicharee aur vah vyaabhaichaarinee donon nishchay mar dale jaaen." 
Leviticus20:11 aur yaadi koi apanee sautelee mata ke sath soa, vah jo apane pita hee ka tan ughaadnevala ttharega so isaaliye ve donon nishchay mar dale jaae, unaka koon unheen ke sir par padega." 
Leviticus20:12 aur yaadi koi apanee patohoo ke sath soa, to ve donon nishchay mar dale jaaen kyonki ve ulatta kam karanevale ttharenge, aur unaka koon unheen ke sir par padega." 
Leviticus20:13 aur yaadi koi jis reeti sree se usee reeati puroosh se prasang kare, to ve donon ghainauna kam karanevale ttharenge is karan ve nishchay mar dale jaae, unaka koon unheen ke sir par padega." 
Leviticus20:14 aur yaadi koi apanee patnee aur apanee sans donon ko rakhe, to yah mahapap haai isaliye vah puroosh aur ve striayan teenon ke teenon ag men jalaae jaae, jis se tumhare beech mahapap n ho." 
Leviticus20:15 fir yadi koi puroosh pashuugamee ho, to puroosh aur pashu donon nishchay mar dale jaaen." 
Leviticus20:16 aur yaadi koi sree pashu ke pas jakar usake sang kukarma kare, to too us sree aur pashu donon ko ghaat karana ve nishchay mar dale jaae, unaka koon unheen ke sir par padega." 
Leviticus20:17 aur yaadi koi apanee baahin ka, chahe usakee sangee baahin ho chahe sautelee, usaka nagn tan dekhe, to vah nindait bat haai, ve donon apane jati bhaiyon kee ankhon ke samhane nash kiae jaaen kyonaki jo apanee bahin ka tan ughaadnevala ttharega use apane adharma ka bhar svayan uttana padega." 
Leviticus20:18 fir yadi koi puroosh kisee retumatee sree ke sang sokar usaka tan ughaade, to vah puroosh usake roodhair ke sote ka ughaadnevala ttharega, aur vah sree apane roodhair ke sote kee ughaadnevalee ttharegee is karan donon apane logon ke beech se nash kiae jaaen." 
Leviticus20:19 aur apanee mausee va foofaee ka tan n ughaadna, kyonaki jo use ughaade vah apanee nikatt kuttumbain ko nanga karata haai isaliye in donon ko apane adharma ka bhar uttana padega." 
Leviticus20:20 aur yaadi koi apanee chachee ke sang soa, to vah apane chacha ka tan ughaadne vala ttharega isaliye ve donon apane pap ka bhar ko uttaae huae nirvansh mar jaaenge." 
Leviticus20:21 aur yaadi koi bhaujee va bhyahoo ko apanee patnee banaa, to ise ghainauna kam janana aur vah apane bhai ka tan ughaadnevala ttharega, is karan ve donon nirvansh rahenge." 
Leviticus20:22 tum meree sab vidhaiyon aur mere sab niyamon ko samajh ke sath manana jisase yah n ho ki jis desh men maain tumhen liye ja raha hoon vah tum ko ugal deve. 
Leviticus20:23 aur jis jati ke logon ko maain tumhare age se nikalata hoon unakee reeti rasm par n chalana kyonki un logon ne jo ye sab kukarma kiae haai, isee karan mujhe un se gharana ho gai haai." 
Leviticus20:24 aur maain tum logon se kahata hoo, ki tum to unakee boomi ke adhaikaree hoge, aur maain is desh ko jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haain tumhare aadhaikar men kar doonga maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon jis ne tum ko deshaen ke logon se alag kiya haai." 
Leviticus20:25 is karan tum shuuddh aur ashuuddh pashuuon me, aur shuuddh aur ashuuddh paakshiayon men bhed karana aur koi pashu va pakshaee va kisee prakar ka boomi par renganevala jeevajantu kyon n ho, jisako maain ne tumhare liye ashuuddh ttharakar varjit kiya haai, us se apane ap ko ashuuddh n karana." 
Leviticus20:26 aur tum mere liye paavitra bane rahana kyonki maain yahova svayan paavitra hoo, aur maain ne tum ko aur deshaen ke logon se isaaliye alag kiya haai ki tum nirantar mere hee bane raho.." 
Leviticus20:27 yaadi koi puroosh va sree ojhai va boot kee sadhana kare, to vah nishchay mar dala jaae aeeson ka patthravah kiya jaa, unaka koon unheen ke sir par padega.." 
Leviticus21:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, haroon ke putra jo yajak haai un se kah, ki tumhare logon men se koi bhee mare, to usake karan tum men se koi apane ko ashuuddh n kare" 
Leviticus21:2 apane nikatt kuttumbaiyo, arthata apanee mata, va pita, va bette, va bettee, va bhai ke liye," 
Leviticus21:3 va apanee kunvaree bahin jisaka vivah n hua ho jinaka sameepee sambandha haai unake liye vah apane ko ashuuddh kar sakata haai. 
Leviticus21:4 par yajak hone ke nate se vah apane logon men pradhaan haai, isaaliye vah apane ko aeesa ashuuddh n kare ki apaavitra ho jaae." 
Leviticus21:5 ve n to apane sir mundaae, aur n apane gal ke balon ko mundaae, aur n apane shareer cheeren." 
Leviticus21:6 ve apane parameshvar ke liye paavitra bane rahe, aur apane parameshvar ka nam apaavitra n karen kyonki ve yahova ke havy ko jo unake parameshvar ka bhojan haai chaddhaya karate haain is karan ve pavitra bane rahen." 
Leviticus21:7 ve veshya va bhrashtta ko byah n len aur n tyagee hui ko byah len kyonki yajak apane parameshvar ke liye paavitra hota haai. 
Leviticus21:8 isaliye too yajak ko pavitra janana, kyonaki vah tumhare parameshvar ka bhojan chaddhaya karata haai isaaliye vah teree drashtti men pavitra tthare kyonaki maain yahova, jo tum ko paavitra karata hoo, pavitra hoon." 
Leviticus21:9 aur yaadi yajak kee bettee veshya banakar apane ap ko apaavitra kare, to vah apane pita ko apavitra ttharatee haai vah ag men jalai jaae.." 
Leviticus21:10 aur jo apane bhaiyon men mahayajak ho, jisake sir par abhaishok ka tel dala gaya ho, aur jisaka pavitra vasren ko paahinane ke liye sanskar hua ho, vah apane sir ke bal bikhrane n de, aur apane vasr faade" 
Leviticus21:11 aur n vah kisee loth ke pas jaa, aur n apane pita va mata ke karan apane ko ashuuddh kare" 
Leviticus21:12 aur vah paavitrasthan se bahar bhee n nikale, aur n apane parameshvar ke paavitrasthan ko apavitra ttharaae kyonaki vah apane parameshvar ke abhaishok ka telaroopee mukutt dhaaran kiae huae haai maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus21:13 aur vah kunvaree hee sree ko byahe. 
Leviticus21:14 jo vidhava, va tyagee hui, va bhrasht, va veshya ho, aeesee kisee ko vah n byahe, vah apane hee logon ke beech men kee kisee kunvaree kanya ko byahe" 
Leviticus21:15 aur vah apane veeyrya ko apane logon men apaavitra n kare kyonaki maain usaka paavitra karanevala yahova hoon. 
Leviticus21:16 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus21:17 haroon se kah, ki tere vansh kee peeddhee peeddhee men jis kisee ke koi bhee dosh hon vah apane parameshvar ka bhojan chaddhane ke liye sameep n aae." 
Leviticus21:18 koi kyon n ho jis men dosh ho vah sameep n aa, chahe vah andha ho, chahe langada, chahe nakachapatta ho, chahe usake kuchh adhaik ang ho," 
Leviticus21:19 va usaka panv, va hath tootta ho," 
Leviticus21:20 va vah kubada, va bauna ho, va usakee ankh men dosh ho, va us manushy ke chain va khjulee ho, va usake and pichake hon" 
Leviticus21:21 haroon yajak ke vansh men se jis kisee men koi bhee dosh ho vah yahova ke havy chaddhane ke liye sameep n aae vah jo doshayukt haai kabhee bhee apane parameshvar ka bhojan chaddhane ke liye sameep n aae. 
Leviticus21:22 vah apane parameshvar ke paavitra aur paramapavitra donon prakar ke bhojan ko khaa," 
Leviticus21:23 parantu usake dosh ke karan vah n to beechavale parde ke bheetar aae aur n vedee ke sameep, jis se aeesa n ho ki vah mere paavitrasthanon ko apaavitra kare kyonki maain unaka paavitra karanevala yahova hoon." 
Leviticus21:24 isaliye moosa ne haroon aur usake putraen ko tatha kul israaeliyon ko yah baten kah sunain.. 
Leviticus22:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus22:2 haroon aur usake putraen se kah, ki israaeliyon kee paavitra kee hui vastuon se jinako ve mere liye paavitra karate haain nyare rahe, aur mere paavitra nam ko apavitra n kare, maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus22:3 aur un se kah, ki tumharee peeddhee-peeddhee men tumhare sare vansh men se jo koi apanee ashuuddhta kee dasha men un paavitra kee hui vastuon ke pas jaa, jinhen israaelee yahova ke liye paavitra karate haai, vah praanee mere samhane se nash kiya jaaega maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus22:4 haroon ke vansh men se koi kyon n ho jo koddhee ho, va usake prameh ho, vah manushy jab tak shuuddh n ho jaae tab tak paavitra kee hui vastuon men se kuchh n khaae. aur jo loth ke karan ashuuddh hua ho, va veeyrya skhlit hua ho, aeese manushy ko jo koi chooa," 
Leviticus22:5 aur jo koi kisee aeese renganehare jantu ko chooae jis se log ashuuddh ho sakate haai, va kisee aeese manushy ko chooae jis men kisee prakar kee ashuuddhta ho jo usako bhee lag sakatee haai." 
Leviticus22:6 to vah praanee jo in men se kisee ko chooae sanjh tak ashuuddh tthara rahe, aur jab tak jal se snan n kar le tab tak pavitra vastuon men se kuchh n khaae." 
Leviticus22:7 tab soorya ast hone par vah shuuddh ttharega aur tab vah paavitra vastuon men se kha sakega, kyonki usaka bhojan vahee haai." 
Leviticus22:8 jo janavar ap se mara ho va pashu se faada gaya ho use khakar vah apane ap ko ashuuddh n kare maain yahova hoon. 
Leviticus22:9 isaliye yajak log meree saupee hui vastuon kee raksha kare, aeesa n ho ki ve unako apaavitra karake pap ka bhar uttaae, aur isake karan mar bhee jaaen maain unaka paavitra karanevala yahova hoon." 
Leviticus22:10 paraae kul ka jan kisee paavitra vastu ko n khane paa, chahe vah yajak ka pahun ho va majadoor ho, taubhee vah koi paavitra vastu n khaae." 
Leviticus22:11 yaadi yajak kisee praanee ko roopaya dekar mol le, to vah praanee us men se kha sakata haai aur jo yajak ke ghar men utpann huae hon ve bhee usake bhojan men se khaaen." 
Leviticus22:12 aur yaadi yajak kee bettee paraae kul ke kisee puroosh se byahee gai ho, to vah bhentt kee hui pavitra vastuon men se n khaae." 
Leviticus22:13 yaadi yajak kee bettee vidhava va tyagee hui ho, aur usakee santan n ho, aur vah apanee balyavastha kee reeati ke anusar apane pita ke ghar men rahatee ho, to vah apane pita ke bhojan men se khaae par paraae kul ka koi us men se n khane paae." 
Leviticus22:14 aur yaadi koi manushy kisee paavitra vastu men se kuchh bool se kha jaa, to vah usaka panchavan bhag baddhakar use yajak ko bhr de." 
Leviticus22:15 aur ve israaeliyon kee paavitra kee hui vastuon ko, jinhen ve yahova ke liye chaddhaae, apaavitra n karen." 
Leviticus22:16 ve unako apanee paavitra vastuon men se khailakar un se aparadha ka dosh n uttvaaen maain unaka paavitra karanevala yahova hoon.. 
Leviticus22:17 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus22:18 haroon aur usake putraen se aur israael ke gharane va israaeliyon men rahanevale paradeashaiyon men se koi kyon n ho jo mannat va svechchhabali karane ke liye yahova ko koi homabali chaddhaa," 
Leviticus22:19 to apane nimitt grahanyogy ttharane ke liye baailon va bhedon va bakariyon men se nirdosh nar chaddhaya jaae. 
Leviticus22:20 jis men koi bhee dosh ho use n chaddhana kyonaki vah tumhare nimitt grahanyogy n ttharega. 
Leviticus22:21 aur jo koi baailon va bhed-bakaariyon men se vishosh vastu sankalp karane ke liye va svechchhabaali ke liye yahova ko melabaali chaddhaa, to grahan hone ke liye avashy haai ki vah nirdosh ho, us men koi bhee dosh n ho." 
Leviticus22:22 jo andha va ang ka tootta va loola ho, va us men rasaulee va khaura va khujalee ho, aeeson ko yahova ke liye n chaddhana, unako vedee par yahova ke liye havy n chaddhana." 
Leviticus22:23 jis kisee baail va bhed va bakare ka koi ang aadhaik va kam ho usako svechchhabali ki liye chaddha sakate ho, parantu mannat pooree karane ke liye vah grahan n hoga." 
Leviticus22:24 jisake and dabe va kuchale va tootte va katt gaae hon usako yahova ke liye n chaddhana, aur apane desh men bhee aeesa kam n karana." 
Leviticus22:25 fir in men se kisee ko tum apane parameshvar ka bhojan janakar kisee paradeshaee se lekar n chaddhao kyonaki un men unaka bigad vartaman haai, un men dosh haai, isaliye ve tumhare nimitt grahan n honge.." 
Leviticus22:26 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus22:27 jab bachhda va bhed va bakaree ka bachcha utpann ho, to vah sat din tak apanee man ke sath rahe fir attven din se age ko vah yahova ke havyavah chaddhave ke liye grahanyogy ttharega." 
Leviticus22:28 chahe gay, chahe bhedee va bakaree ho, usako aur usake bachche ko aek hee din men bali n karana." 
Leviticus22:29 aur jab tum yahova ke liye dhanyavad ka melabali chaddhao, to use isee prakar se karana jis se vah grahanyogy tthare.." 
Leviticus22:30 vah usee din khaya jaa, us men se kuchh bhee bihan tak rahane n paae maain yahova hoon." 
Leviticus22:31 aur tum meree agyaaon ko manana aur unaka palan karana maain yahova hoon. 
Leviticus22:32 aur mere pavitra nam ko apavitra n ttharana, kyonaki maain israaeliyon ke beech avashy hee paavitra mana jaunga maain tumhara paavitra karanevala yahova hoon." 
Leviticus22:33 jo tum ko misr desh se nikal laya hoon jis se tumhara parameshvar bana rahoon maain yahova hoon.. 
Leviticus23:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus23:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki yahova ke pabrba jinaka tum ko pavitra sabha aekaatrait karane ke liye niyat samay par prachar karana hoga, mere ve pabrba ye haain." 
Leviticus23:3 chh: din kamakaj kiya jaa, par satavan din paramavishraam ka aur paavitra sabha ka din haai us men kisee prakar ka kamakaj n kiya jaae vah tumhare sab gharon men yahova ka vishraam din tthare.." 
Leviticus23:4 fir yahova ke pabrba jin men se aek aek ke ttharaye huae samay men tumhen paavitra sabha karane ke liye prachar karana hoga ve ye haain. 
Leviticus23:5 paahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko godhooli ke samay yahova ka fasah hua kare. 
Leviticus23:6 aur usee maheene ke pandrahaven din ko yahova ke liye akhmeeree rottee ka pabrba hua kare us men tum sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khaya karana. 
Leviticus23:7 un men se paahile din tumharee paavitra sabha ho aur us din parishram ka koi kam n karana. 
Leviticus23:8 aur saton din tum yahova ko havy chaddhaya karana aur sataven din pavitra sabha ho us din parishram ka koi kam n karana.. 
Leviticus23:9 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus23:10 israaeliyon se kah, ki jab tum us desh men pravesh karo jise yahova tumhen deta haai aur us men ke khet katto, tab apane apane pakke khet kee paahilee upaj ka poola yajak ke pas le aya karana" 
Leviticus23:11 aur vah us poole ko yahova ke samhane hilaa, ki vah tumhare nimitt grahan kiya jaae vah use vishraamadin ke doosare din hilaae." 
Leviticus23:12 aur jis din tum poole ko hilavao usee din aek varsha ka nirdosh bhed ka bachcha yahova ke liye homabaali chaddhana. 
Leviticus23:13 aur usake sath ka annabali aepa ke do dasaven ansh tel se sane huae maaide ka ho vah sukhdayak sugandha ke liye yahova ka havy ho aur usake sath ka ardha heen bhr kee chauthai dakhmadha ho. 
Leviticus23:14 aur jab tak tum is chaddhave ko apane parameshvar ke pas n le jao, us din tak naye khet men se n to rottee khana aur n bhuna hua ann aur n haree balen yah tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men tumhare sare gharanon men sada kee vidhai tthare.." 
Leviticus23:15 fir us vishraamadin ke doosare din se, arthata jis din tum hilai janevalee bhentt ke poole ko laoge, us din se poore sat vishraamadin gin lena" 
Leviticus23:16 sataven vishraamadin ke doosare din tak pachas din ginana, aur pachasaven din yahova ke liye naya annabaali chaddhana." 
Leviticus23:17 tum apane gharon men se aepa ke do dasaven ansh maaide kee do rottyaian hilane kee bhentt ke liye le ana ve khmeer ke sath pakai jaae, aur yahova ke liye paahilee upaj ttharen." 
Leviticus23:18 aur us rottee ke sang aek aek varsha ke sat nirdosh bhed ke bachche, aur aek bachhda, aur do meddhe chaddhana ve apane apane sath ke annabaali aur ardha samet yahova ke liye homabaali ke saman chaddhaae jaae, arthata ve yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandha denevala havy ttharen." 
Leviticus23:19 fir papabali ke liye aek bakara, aur melabaali ke liye aek aek varsha ke do bhed ke bachche chaddhana." 
Leviticus23:20 tab yajak unako pahilee upaj kee rottee samet yahova ke samhane hilane kee bhentt ke liye hilaa, aur in rottyaien ke sang ve do bhed ke bachche bhee hilaae jaaen ve yahova ke liye paavitra, aur yajak ka bhag ttharen." 
Leviticus23:21 aur tum us din yah prachar karana, ki aj hamaree aek pavitra sabha hogee aur paarishram ka koi kam n karana yah tumhare sare gharanon men tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men sada kee vidhai tthare.." 
Leviticus23:22 jab tum apane desh men ke khet katto, tab apane khet ke konon ko pooree reeti se n kattna, aur khet men giree hui balon ko n ikattha karana use deenaheen aur paradeshaee ke liye chhod dena maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon.." 
Leviticus23:23 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus23:24 israaeliyon se kah, ki sataven maheene ke pahile din ko tumhare liye paramaavishraam ho us men smaran dilane ke liye narasinge foonke jaae, aur aek pavitra sabha ikatthee ho." 
Leviticus23:25 us din tum parishram ka koi kam n karana, aur yahova ke liye ek havy chaddhana.." 
Leviticus23:26 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus23:27 usee sataven maheene ka dasavan din praayashchaitt ka din mana jae vah tumharee pavitra sabha ka din hoga, aur us men tum apane apane jeev ko du:kh dena aur yahova ka havy chaddhana." 
Leviticus23:28 us din tum kisee prakar ka kamakaj n karana kyonaki vah praayashchaitt ka din niyukt kiya gaya haai jis men tumhare parameshvar yahova ke samhane tumhare liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaega. 
Leviticus23:29 isaliye jo praanee us din du:kh n sahe vah apane logon men se nash kiya jaaega. 
Leviticus23:30 aur jo praanee us din kisee prakar ka kamakaj kare us praanee ko maain usake logon ke beech men se nash kar daloonga. 
Leviticus23:31 tum kisee prakar ka kamakaj n karana yah tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men tumhare gharane men sada kee vidhaee tthare. 
Leviticus23:32 vah din tumhare liye paramaavishraam ka ho, us men tum apane apane jeev ko du:kh dena aur us maheene ke naven din kee sanjh se lekar doosaree sanjh tak apana vishraamadin mana karana.." 
Leviticus23:33 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus23:34 israaeliyon se kah, ki usee sataven maheene ke pandrahaven din se sat din tak yahova ke liye jhonpaadiyon ka pabrba raha kare." 
Leviticus23:35 paahile din pavitra sabha ho us men parishram ka koi kam n karana. 
Leviticus23:36 saton din yahova ke liye havy chaddhaya karana, fir attven din tumharee paavitra sabha ho, aur yahova ke liye havy chaddhana vah mahasabha ka din haai, aur us men paarishram ka koi kam n karana.." 
Leviticus23:37 yahova ke niyat pabrba ye hee haai, in men tum yahova ko havy chaddhana, arthata homabali, annabaali, melabali, aur argha, pratyek apane apane niyat samay par chaddhaya jaae aur pavitra sabha ka prachar karana." 
Leviticus23:38 in sabhon se adhaik yahova ke vishraamadinon ko manana, aur apanee bhentto, aur sab mannato, aur svechchhabaliyon ko jo yahova ko arpan karoge chaddhaya karana.." 
Leviticus23:39 fir sataven maheene ke pandrahaven din ko, jab tum desh kee upaj ko ikattha kar chuko, tab sat din tak yahova ka pabrba manana pahile din paramavishraam ho, aur attven din paramavishraam ho." 
Leviticus23:40 aur paahile din tum achchhe achchhe vrakshaen kee upaj, aur khjoor ke patte, aur ghane vrakshaen kee daliya, aur nalon men ke majanoo ko lekar apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane sat din tak anand karana." 
Leviticus23:41 aur praativarsha sat din tak yahova ke liye pabrba mana karana yah tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men sada kee vidhai tthare, ki sataven maheene men yah pabrba mana jaae." 
Leviticus23:42 sat din tak tum jhonpadiyon men raha karana, arthata jitane janm ke israaelee haain ve sab ke sab jhonpadiyon men rahe," 
Leviticus23:43 isaliye ki tumharee peeddhee peeddhee ke log jan rakhe, ki jab yahova ham israaeliyon ko misr desh se nikal kar la raha tha tab us ne unako jhonpadiyon men ttkaiaya tha maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus23:44 aur moosa ne israaeliyon ko yahova ke pabrba ke niyat samay kah sunaae.. 
Leviticus24:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus24:2 israaeliyon ko yah agyaa de, ki mere pas ujiyala dene ke liye koott ke nikala hua jalapai ka nirmal tel le ana, ki deepak nity jalata rahe." 
Leviticus24:3 haroon usako, beechavale tamboo me, sakshaeepatra ke beechavale parde se bahar, yahova ke samhane nity sanjh se bhor tak sajakar rakhe yah tumharee peeddhee peeddhee ke liye sada kee vidhai tthare." 
Leviticus24:4 vah deepakon ke svachchh deevatt par yahova ke samhane nity sajaya kare.. 
Leviticus24:5 aur too maaida lekar barah rottyaian pakavana, pratyek rottee men aepa ka do dasavan ansh maaida ho." 
Leviticus24:6 tab unakee do panti karake, aek aek panati men chh: chh: rottyaia, svachchh mej par yahova ke samhane dharana." 
Leviticus24:7 aur aek aek panti par chokha loban rakhna, ki vah rottee par smaran dilanevala vastu aur yahova ke liye havy ho." 
Leviticus24:8 praati vishraamadin ko vah use nity yahova ke sammukh kram se rakha kare, yah sada kee vacha kee reeati israaeliyon kee or se hua kare." 
Leviticus24:9 aur vah haroon aur usake putraen kee hongee, aur ve usako kisee paavitra sthan men khaae, kyonki vah yahova ke havyon men se sada kee vidhai ke anusar haroon ke liye paramapavitra vastu ttharee haai.." 
Leviticus24:10 un dinon men kisee israelee sree ka betta, jisaka pita misree puroosh tha, israeliyon ke beech chala gaya aur vah israelee sree ka betta aur ek israelee puroosh chhavanee ke beech apas men marapeett karane lage," 
Leviticus24:11 aur vah israaelee sree ka betta yahova ke nam kee ninda karake shaap dene laga. yah sunakar log usako moosa ke pas le gaae. usakee mata ka nam shalomeet tha, jo dan ke gotra ke dibraee kee bettee thee." 
Leviticus24:12 unhon ne usako havalat men band kiya, jis se yahova kee agyaa se is bat par vichar kiya jae.." 
Leviticus24:13 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus24:14 tum log us shaap dene vale ko chhavanee se bahar liva le jao aur jitanon ne vah ninda sunee ho ve sab apane apane hath usake sir par tteke, tab saree mandlee ke log usako patthravah karen." 
Leviticus24:15 aur too israaeliyon se kah, ki koi kyon n ho jo apane parameshvar ko shaap de use apane pap ka bhar uttana padega." 
Leviticus24:16 yahova ke nam kee ninda karanevala nishchay mar dala jaae saree mandlee ke log nishchay usako patthravah karen chahe deshaee ho chahe paradeshae, yaadi koi us nam kee ninda karen to vah mar dala jaae." 
Leviticus24:17 fir jo koi kisee manushy ko praan se mare vah nishchay mar dala jaae. 
Leviticus24:18 aur jo koi kisee ghareloo pashu ko praan se mare vah use bhr de, arthata praanee kee santee praanee de." 
Leviticus24:19 fir yadi koi kisee doosare ko chott pahunchaa, to jaaisa us ne kiya ho vaaisa hee usake sath bhee kiya jaa," 
Leviticus24:20 arthata ang bhng karane kee santee ang bhng kiya jaa, ankh kee santee ank, dant kee santee dant, jaaisee chott jis ne kisee ko pahunchai ho vaaisee hee usako bhee pahunchai jaae." 
Leviticus24:21 aur pashu ka mar dalanevala usako bhr de, parantu manushy ka mar dalanevala mar dala jaae." 
Leviticus24:22 tumhara niyam aek hee ho, jaaisa deshaee ke liye vaaisa hee paradeshaee ke liye bhee ho maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus24:23 aur moosa ne israaeliyon ko yahee samajhaya tab unhon ne us shaap denevale ko chhavanee se bahar le jakar usako patthravah kiya. aur israaeliyon ne vaaisa hee kiya jaaisa yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee.. 
Leviticus25:1 fir yahova ne seenaai parvat ke pas moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus25:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki jab tum us desh men pravesh karo jo maain tumhen deta hoo, tab boomi ko yahova ke liye vishraam mila kare." 
Leviticus25:3 chh: varsha to apana apana khet boya karana, aur chhhon varsha apanee apanee dakh kee baree chhantt chhanttkar desh kee upaj ikatthee kiya karana" 
Leviticus25:4 parantu sataven varsha boomi ko yahova ke liye paramaavishraamakal mila kare us men n to apana khet bona aur n apanee dakh kee baree chhanttna. 
Leviticus25:5 jo kuchh katte huae khet men apane ap se uge use n kattna, aur apanee bin chhanttee hui dakhlata kee dakhon ko n todna kyonaki vah boomi ke liye paramaavishraam ka varsha hoga." 
Leviticus25:6 aur boomi ke vishraamakal hee kee upaj se tum ko, aur tumhare dasa-dasee ko, aur tumhare sath rahanevale majadooron aur paradeshaiyon ko bhee bhojan milega" 
Leviticus25:7 aur tumhare pashuuon ka aur desh men jitane jeevajantu hon unaka bhee bhojan boomi kee sab upaj se hoga.. 
Leviticus25:8 aur sat vishraamavarsha, arthata sataguna sat varsha gin lena, saton vishraamavasharen ka yah samay unachas varsha hoga." 
Leviticus25:9 tab sataven maheene ke dasaven din ko, arthata praayashchaitt ke din, jay jayakar ke mahashabd ka naraasinga apane sare desh men sab kaheen faunkavana." 
Leviticus25:10 aur us pachasaven varsha ko paavitra karake manana, aur desh ke sare nivaasiyon ke liye chhuttkare ka prachar karana vah varsha tumhare yahan jubalee kahalaae us men tum apanee apanee nij boomi aur apane apane gharane men lauttne paoge." 
Leviticus25:11 tumhare yahan vah pachasavan varsha jubalee ka varsha kahalaae us men tum n bona, aur jo apane ap uge use bhee n kattna, aur n bin chhanttee hui dakhlata kee dakhon ko todna." 
Leviticus25:12 kyonaki vah jo jubalee ka varsha hoga vah tumhare liye paavitra hoga tum usakee upaj khet hee men se le leke khana. 
Leviticus25:13 is jubalee ke varsha men tum apanee apanee nij boomi ko lauttne paoge. 
Leviticus25:14 aur yaadi tum apane bhaibandha ke hath kuchh becho va apane bhaibandha se kuchh mol lo, to tum aek doosare par andhor n karana." 
Leviticus25:15 jubalee ke peechhe jitane varsha beete hon unakee ginatee ke anusar dam ttharake aek doosare se mol lena, aur shosh vasharen kee upaj ke anusar vah tere hath beche." 
Leviticus25:16 jitane varsha aur rahen utana hee dam baddhana, aur jitane varsha kam rahen utana hee dam ghattana, kyonki varsha kee upaj jitanee hon utanee hee vah tere hath bechega." 
Leviticus25:17 aur tum apane apane bhaibandha par andhor n karana apane parameshvar ka bhy manana maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon. 
Leviticus25:18 isaliye tum meree vidhaiyon ko manana, aur mere niyamon par samajh boojhkar chalana kyonki aeesa karane se tum us desh men nidr base rahoge." 
Leviticus25:19 aur boomi apanee upaj upajaya karegee, aur tum pett bhr khaya karoge, aur us desh men nidr base rahoge." 
Leviticus25:20 aur yaadi tum kaho, ki sataven varsha men ham kya khaaenge, n to ham boaenge n apane khet kee upaj ikatthee karenge?" 
Leviticus25:21 to jano ki maain tum ko chhttven varsha men aeesee ashaeesh doonga, ki boomi kee upaj teen varsha tak kam aaegee." 
Leviticus25:22 tum attven varsha men booge, aur puranee upaj men se khate rahoge, aur naven varsha kee upaj men se khate rahoge." 
Leviticus25:23 boomi sada ke liye to bechee n jaa, kyonaki boomi meree haai aur us men tum paradeshaee aur baharee hoge." 
Leviticus25:24 leakin tum apane bhag ke sare desh men boomi ko chhuda lene dena.. 
Leviticus25:25 yaadi tera koi bhaibandha kangal hokar apanee nij boomi men se kuchh bech dale, to usake kuttumbaiyon men se jo sab se nikatt ho vah akar apane bhaibandha ke beche huae bhag ko chhuda le." 
Leviticus25:26 aur yaadi kisee manushy ke liye koi chhudanevala n ho, aur usake pas itana dhan ho ki ap hee apane bhag ko chhuda le sake," 
Leviticus25:27 to vah usake bikane ke samay se vasharen kee ginatee karake shosh vasharen kee upaj ka dam usako jis ne use mol liya ho faer de tab vah apanee nij boomi ka adhaikaree ho jaae. 
Leviticus25:28 parantu yadi usake itanee poonjee n ho ki use fir apanee kar sake, to usakee bechee hui boomi jubalee ke varsha tak mol lenevalon ke hath men rahe aur jubalee ke varsha men choott jaae tab vah manushy apanee nij boomi ka fir adhaikaree ho jaae.." 
Leviticus25:29 fir yadi koi manushy shaharapanah vale nagar men basane ka ghar beche, to vah bechane ke bad varsha bhr ke andar use chhuda sakega, arthata poore varsha bhr us manushy ko chhudane ka adhaikar rahega." 
Leviticus25:30 parantu yadi vah varsha bhr men n chhudaa, to vah ghar par shaharapanahavale nagar men ho mol lenevale ka bana rahe, aur peeddhee-peeddhee men usee me vansh ka bana rahe aur jubalee ke varsha men bhee n chootte." 
Leviticus25:31 parantu bina shaharapanah ke ganvon ke ghar to desh ke kheton ke saman gine jaaen unaka chhudana bhee ho sakega, aur ve jubalee ke varsha men choott jaaen." 
Leviticus25:32 aur leaviyon ke nij bhag ke nagaron ke jo ghar hon unako leveey jab chahen tab chhudaaen. 
Leviticus25:33 aur yaadi koi leveey apana bhag n chhudaa, to vah becha hua ghar jo usake bhag ke nagar men ho jubalee ke varsha men choott jaae kyonaki israaeliyon ke beech leaviyon ka bhag unake nagaron men ve ghar hee haain." 
Leviticus25:34 aur unake nagaron kee charon or kee charai kee boomi bechee n jaae kyonki vah unaka sada ka bhag hoga.. 
Leviticus25:35 fir yadi tera koi bhaibandha kangal ho jaa, aur usakee dasha tere samhane taras yogy ho jaa, to too usako sanbhalana vah paradeshaee va yatraee kee nai tere sang rahe." 
Leviticus25:36 us se byaj va baddhtee n lena apane parameshvar ka bhy manana jis se tera bhaibandha tere sang jeevan nirvah kar sake. 
Leviticus25:37 usako byaj par roopaya n dena, aur n usako bhojanavastu labh ke lalach se dena." 
Leviticus25:38 maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon maain tumhen kanan desh dene ke liye aur tumhara parameshvar ttharane kee manasa se tum ko misr desh se nikal laya hoon.. 
Leviticus25:39 fir yadi tera koi bhaibandha tere samhane kangal hokar apane ap ko tere hath bech dale, to us se das ke saman seva n karavana." 
Leviticus25:40 vah tere sang majadoor va yatraee kee nai rahe, aur jubalee ke varsha tak tere sang rahakar seva karata rahe" 
Leviticus25:41 tab vah balabachchon samet tere pas se nikal jaa, aur apane kuttumb men aur apane pitaron kee nij boomi men lautt jaae." 
Leviticus25:42 kyonaki ve mere hee das haai, jinako maain misr desh se nikal laya hoon isaaliye ve das kee reeati se n beche jaaen." 
Leviticus25:43 us par kattorata se adhaikar n karana apane parameshvar ka bhy manate rahana. 
Leviticus25:44 tere jo dasa-daasiyan hon ve tumharee charon or kee jaatiyon men se ho, aur das aur dasiyan unheen men se mol lena." 
Leviticus25:45 aur jo yatraee log tumhare beech men paradeshaee hokar rahenge, un men se aur unake gharanon men se bhee jo tumahare as pas ho, aur jo tumhare desh men utpann huae ho, un men se tum das aur dasee mol lo aur ve tumhara bhag ttharen." 
Leviticus25:46 aur tum apane putraen ko bhee jo tumhare bad honge unake adhaikaree kar sakoge, aur ve unaka bhag ttharen un men se tum sada apane liye das liya karana, parantu tumhare bhaibandha jo israaelee hon un par apana aadhaikar kattorata se n jatana.." 
Leviticus25:47 fir yadi tere samhane koi paradeshaee va yatraee dhanee ho jaa, aur usake samhane tera bhai kangal hokar apane ap ko tere samhane us paradeshaee va yatraee va usake vansh ke hath bech dale," 
Leviticus25:48 to usake bik jane ke bad vah fir chhudaya ja sakata haai usake bhaiyon men se koi usako chhuda sakata haai," 
Leviticus25:49 va usaka chacha, va chachera bhai, tatha usake kul ka koi bhee nikatt kuttumbee usako chhuda sakata haai va yaadi vah dhanee ho jaa, to vah ap hee apane ko chhuda sakata haai." 
Leviticus25:50 vah apane mol lenevale ke sath apane bikane ke varsha se jubalee ke varsha tak hisab kare, aur usake bikane ka dam vasharen kee ginatee ke anusar ho, arthata vah dam majadoor ke divason ke saman usake sath hoga." 
Leviticus25:51 yaadi jubalee ke bahut varsha rah jaae, to jitane roopayon se vah mol liya gaya ho un men se vah apane chhudane ka dam utane vasharen ke anusar faer de." 
Leviticus25:52 aur yaadi jubalee ke varsha ke thode varsha rah gaae ho, taubhee vah apane svamee ke sath hisab karake apane chhudane ka dam utane hee vashaern ke anusar faer de." 
Leviticus25:53 vah apane svamee ke sang us majadoor ke saman rahe jisakee vashairk majadooree ttharai jatee ho aur usaka svamee us par tere samhane kattorata se aadhaikar n jatane paae. 
Leviticus25:54 aur yaadi vah in reetiyon se chhudaya n jaa, to vah jubalee ke varsha men apane bala-bachchon samet choott jaae." 
Leviticus25:55 kyonaki israaelee mere hee das haain ve misr desh se mere hee nikale huae das haain maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon.. 
Leviticus26:1 tum apane liye mooraten n banana, aur n koi khudee hui moorti va latt apane liye khdee karana, aur n apane desh men dandvata karane ke liye nakkashaeedar patthr sthapan karana kyonki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon." 
Leviticus26:2 tum mere vishraamadinon ka palan karana aur mere paavitrasthan ka bhy manana maain yahova hoon.. 
Leviticus26:3 yaadi tum meree vidhaiyon par chalo aur meree agyaaon ko manakar unaka palan karo," 
Leviticus26:4 to maain tumhare liye samay samay par menh barasaunga, tatha boomi apanee upaj upajaaegee, aur maaidan ke vraksha apane apane fal diya karenge" 
Leviticus26:5 yahan tak ki tum dakh todne ke samay bhee davanee karate rahoge, aur bone ke samay bhee bhr pett dakh todte rahoge, aur tum manamanee rottee khaya karoge, aur apane desh men nishchaint base rahoge." 
Leviticus26:6 aur maain tumhare desh men sukh chaain doonga, aur tum sooge aur tumhara koi dranevala n ho aur maain us desh men dushtt jantuon ko n rahane doonga, aur talavar tumhare desh men n chalegee." 
Leviticus26:7 aur tum apane shatrauon ko mar bhga doge, aur ve tumharee talavar se mare jaaenge." 
Leviticus26:8 aur tum men se panch manushy sau ko aur sau manushy das hajar ko khdedenge aur tumhare shatra talavar se tumhare age age mare jaaenge 
Leviticus26:9 aur maain tumharee or krapa drashtti rakoonga aur tum ko falavant karoonga aur baddhaunga, aur tumhare sang apanee vacha ko poorn karoonga." 
Leviticus26:10 aur tum rakhe huae purane anaj ko khaoge, aur naye ke rahate bhee purane ko nikaloge." 
Leviticus26:11 aur maain tumhare beech apana nivasasthan banaae rakoonga, aur mera jee tum se gharana naheen karega." 
Leviticus26:12 aur maain tumhare madhy chala fira karoonga, aur tumhara parameshvar bana rahoonga, aur tum meree praja bane rahoge." 
Leviticus26:13 maain to tumhara vah parameshvar yahova hoo, jo tum ko misr desh se isaliye nikal le aya ki tum misriyon ke das n bane raho aur maain ne tumhare jooae ko tod dala haai, aur tum ko seedha khda karake chalaya haai.." 
Leviticus26:14 yaadi tum meree n sunoge, aur in sab agyaaon ko n manoge," 
Leviticus26:15 aur meree vidhaiyon ko nikamma janoge, aur tumharee atma mere nirnyon se gharana kare, aur tum meree sab agyaaon ka palan n karoge, varan meree vacha ko todoge," 
Leviticus26:16 to maain tum se yah karoonga arthata maain tum ko bechaain karoonga, aur kshayarog aur jvar se peedit karoonga, aur inake karan tumharee ankhe dhaundhalee ho jaaengee, aur tumhara man ati udas hoga. aur tumhara beech bona vyarth hoga, kyonaki tumhare shatra usakee upaj kha lenge" 
Leviticus26:17 aur maain bhee tumhare virooddh ho jaunga, aur tum apane shatrauon se har jaoge aur tumhare baairee tumhare upar adhaikar karenge, aur jab koi tum ko khdedta bhee n hoga tab bhee tum bhagoge." 
Leviticus26:18 aur yaadi tum in baton ke uparant bhee meree n suno, to maain tumhare papon ke karan tumhen satagunee tadna aur doonga," 
Leviticus26:19 aur maain tumhare bal ka ghamand tod daloonga, aur tumhare liye akash ko mano lohe ka aur boomi ko mano peetal kee bana doonga" 
Leviticus26:20 aur tumhara bal akarath ganvaya jaaega, kyonki tumharee boomi apanee upaj n upajaaegee, aur maaidan ke vraksha apane fal n denge." 
Leviticus26:21 aur yaadi tum mere virooddh chalate hee raho, aur mera kahana n mano, to maain tumhare papon ke anusar tumhare upar aur sataguna sankatt daloonga." 
Leviticus26:22 aur maain tumhare beech ban pashu bhejoonga, jo tum ko nirvansh karenge, aur tumhare ghareloo pashuuon ko nashakar dalenge, aur tumharee ginatee ghattaaenge, jis se tumharee sadke soonee pad jaaengee." 
Leviticus26:23 fir yadi tum in baton par bhee meree tadna se n sudharo, aur mere virooddh chalate hee raho," 
Leviticus26:24 to maain bhee tumhare virooddh chaloonga, aur tumhare papon ke karan maain ap hee tum ko sataguna maroonga." 
Leviticus26:25 to maain tum par aek aeesee talavar chalavaunga, jo vacha todne ka poora poora palatta legee aur jab tum apane nagaron men ja jakar ikatthe hoge tab maain tumhare beech maree faailaunga, aur tum apane shatrauon ke vash men saunp diae jaoge." 
Leviticus26:26 aur jab maain tumhare liye ann ke adhaar ko door kar daloonga, tab das striayan tumharee rottee aek hee tandoor men pakakar taul taulakar bantt dengee aur tum khakar bhee trapt n hoge.." 
Leviticus26:27 fir yadi tum isake uparant bhee meree n sunoge, aur mere virooddh chalate hee rahoge," 
Leviticus26:28 to maain apane nyay men tumhare virooddh chaloonga, aur tumhare papon ke karan tum ko satagunee tadna aur bhee doonga." 
Leviticus26:29 aur tum ko apane betton aur bettyaien ka mans khana padega. 
Leviticus26:30 aur maain tumhare pooja ke unche sthanon ko ddha doonga, aur tumhare soorya kee praatimaaen tod daloonga, aur tumharee lothon ko tumharee todee hui mooraton par foonk doonga aur meree atma ko tum se gharana ho jaaegee." 
Leviticus26:31 aur maain tumhare nagaron ko ujad doonga, aur tumhare paavitra sthanon ko ujad doonga, aur tumhara sukhdayak sugandha grahan n karoonga." 
Leviticus26:32 aur maain tumhare desh ko soona kar doonga, aur tumhare shatra jo us men rahate haain ve in baton ke karan chakit honge." 
Leviticus26:33 aur maain tum ko jati jati ke beech tittra-abittr karoonga, aur tumhare peechhe peechhe talavar kheechen rahoonga aur tumhara desh suna ho jaaega, aur tumhare nagar ujad ho jaaenge." 
Leviticus26:34 tab jitane din vah desh soona pada rahega aur tum apane shatrauon ke desh men rahoge utane din vah apane vishraamakalon ko manata rahega. 
Leviticus26:35 aur jitane din vah soona pada rahega utane din usako vishraam rahega, arthata jo vishraam usako tumhare vahan base rahane ke samay tumhare vishraamakalon men n mila hoga vah usako tab milega." 
Leviticus26:36 aur tum men se jo bach rahenge aur apane shatrauon ke desh men honge unake day men maai kayarata upajaunga aur ve patte ke khdkane se bhee bhag jaaenge, aur ve aeese bhagenge jaaise koi talavar se bhage, aur kisee ke bina peechha kiae bhee ve gir gir padenge." 
Leviticus26:37 aur jab koi peechha karanevala n ho tab bhee manon talavar ke bhy se ve aek doosare se ttokar khakar girate jaaenge, aur tum ko apane shatrauon ke samhane ttharane kee kuchh shaaktai n hogee." 
Leviticus26:38 tab tum jaati jati ke beech pahunchakar nash ho jaoge, aur tumhare shatrauon kee boomi tum ko kha jaaegee." 
Leviticus26:39 aur tum men se jo bache rahenge ve apane shatrauon ke deshaen men apane adharma ke karan gal jaaenge aur apane purakhaon ke adharma ke kamon ke karan bhee ve unheen kee nai gal jaaenge. 
Leviticus26:40 tab ve apane aur apane pitaron ke adharma ko man lenge, arthata us vishvasaghaat ko jo ve mera karenge, aur yah bhee man lenge, ki ham yahova ke virooddh chale the," 
Leviticus26:41 isee karan vah hamare virooddh hokar hamen shatrauon ke desh men le aya haai. yaadi us samay unaka khtanarahit day dab jaaega aur ve us samay apane adharma ke dand ko angeekar karegen 
Leviticus26:42 tab jo vacha maain ne yakoob ke sang bandhaee thee usako maain smaran karoonga, aur jo vacha maain ne isahak se aur jo vacha maain ne ibraaheem se bandhaee thee unako bhee smaran karoonga, aur is desh ko bhee maain smaran karoonga." 
Leviticus26:43 aur vah desh un se rahit hokar soona pada rahega, aur unake bina soona rahakar bhee apane vishraamakalon ko manata rahega aur ve log apane adharma ke dand ko angeekar karege, isee karan se ki unhon ne meree agyaaon ka ulanghan kiya tha, aur unakee atmaon ko meree vidhaiyon se gharana thee." 
Leviticus26:44 itane par bhee jab ve apane shatrauon ke desh men honge, tab maain unako is prakar naheen chhooonga, aur n un se aeesee gharana karoonga ki unaka sarvanash kar daloon aur apanee us vacha ko tod doon jo maain ne un se bandhaee haai kyonki maain unaka parameshvar yahova hoon" 
Leviticus26:45 parantu maain unake bhlai ke liye unake pitaron se bandhaee hui vacha ko smaran karoonga, jinhen maai anyajaatiyon kee ankhon ke samhane misr desh se nikalakar laya ki maain unaka parameshvar ttharoon maain yahova hoon.." 
Leviticus26:46 jo jo vidhaiyan aur niyam aur vyavastha yahova ne apanee or se israaeliyon ke liye seenaai parvat par moosa ke dara ttharai theen ve ye hee haain.. 
Leviticus27:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Leviticus27:2 israaeliyon se yah kah, ki jab koi vishosh sankalp mane, to sankalp kiae huae praanee tere ttharane ke anusar yahova ke honge" 
Leviticus27:3 isaliye yaadi vah bees varsha va us se aadhaik aur satt varsha se kam avastha ka puroosh ho, to usake liye paavitrasthan ke shokel ke anusar pachas shokel ka roopaya tthare." 
Leviticus27:4 aur yaadi vah sree ho, to tees shokel tthare." 
Leviticus27:5 fir yadi usakee avastha panch varsha va usase aadhaik aur bees varsha se kam kee ho, to ladke ke liye to bees shokel, aur ladkee ke liye das shokel tthare." 
Leviticus27:6 aur yaadi usakee avastha aek maheene va us se aadhaik aur panch varsha se kam kee ho, to ladke ke liye to panch, aur ladkee ke liye teen shokel ttharen." 
Leviticus27:7 fir yadi usakee avastha satt varsha kee va us se adhaik ho, aur vah puroosh ho to usake liye pandrah shokel, aur sree ho to das shokel tthare." 
Leviticus27:8 parantu yadi koi itana kangal ho ki yajak ka ttharaya hua dam n de sake, to vah yajak ke samhane khda kiya jaa, aur yajak usakee poonjee ttharaa, arthata jitana sankalp karanevale se ho sake, yajak usee ke anusar ttharaae.." 
Leviticus27:9 fir jin pashuuon men se log yahova ko chaddhava chaddhate haai, yadi aeeson men se koi sankalp kiya jaa, to jo pashu koi yahova ko de vah paavitra ttharega." 
Leviticus27:10 vah use kisee prakar se n badale, n to vah bure kee santee achchha, aur n achchhe kee santee bura de aur yaadi vah us pashu kee santee doosara pashu de, to vah aur usaka badala donon pavitra ttharenge." 
Leviticus27:11 aur jin pashuuon men se log yahova ke liye chaddhava naheen chaddhate aeeson men se yaadi vah ho, to vah usako yajak ke samhane khda kar de," 
Leviticus27:12 tak yajak pashu ke gun avagun donon vicharakar usaka mol ttharaae aur jitana yajak ttharaae usaka mol utana hee tthare. 
Leviticus27:13 aur yaadi sankalp karanevala use kisee prakar se chhudana chahe, to jo mol yajak ne ttharaya ho us men usaka panchavan bhag aur baddhakar de.." 
Leviticus27:14 fir yadi koi apana ghar yahova ke liye paavitra ttharakar sankalp kare, to yajak usake gun-avagun donon vicharakar usaka mol ttharaae aur jitana yajak ttharaae usaka mol utana hee tthare." 
Leviticus27:15 aur yaadi ghar ka pavitra karanevala use chhudana chahe, to jitana roopaya yajak ne usaka mol ttharaya ho us men vah panchavan bhag aur baddhakar de, tab vah ghar usee ka rahega.." 
Leviticus27:16 fir yadi koi apanee nij boomi ka koi bhag yahova ke liye paavitra ttharana chahe, to usaka mol isake anusar tthare, ki us men kitana beej padega jitana boomi men homer bhr jau pade utanee ka mol pachas shokel tthare." 
Leviticus27:17 yaadi vah apana khet jubalee ke varsha hee men paavitra ttharaa, to usaka dam tere ttharane ke anusar tthare" 
Leviticus27:18 aur yaadi vah apana khet jubalee ke varsha ke bad paavitra ttharaa, to jitane varsha doosare jubalee ke varsha ke bakee rahen unheen ke anusar yajak usake liye roopaye ka hisab kare, tab jitana hisab men aae utana yajak ke ttharane se kam ho." 
Leviticus27:19 aur yaadi khet ko pavitra ttharanevala use chhudana chahe, to jo dam yajak ne ttharaya ho us men vah panchavan bhag aur baddhakar de, tab khet usee ka rahega." 
Leviticus27:20 aur yaadi vah khet ko chhudana n chahe, va us ne usako doosare ke hath becha ho, to khet age ko kabhee n chhudaya jaae" 
Leviticus27:21 parantu jab vah khet jubalee ke varsha men chootte, tab pooree reeati se arpan kiae huae khet kee nai yahova ke liye paavitra tthare, arthata vah yajak hee kee nij boomi ho jaae." 
Leviticus27:22 fir yadi koi apana mol liya hua khet, jo usakee nij boomi ke kheton men ka n ho, yahova ke liye paavitra ttharaa," 
Leviticus27:23 to yajak jubalee ke varsha tak ka hisab karake us manushy ke liye jitana ttharaae utana hee vah yahova ke liye paavitra janakar usee din de de. 
Leviticus27:24 aur jubalee ke varsha men vah khet usee ke aadhaikar men jis se vah mol liya gaya ho fir a jaa, arthata jisakee vah nij boomi ho usee kee fir ho jaae." 
Leviticus27:25 aur jis jis vastu ka mol yajak ttharaae usaka mol pavitrasthan hee ke shokel ke hisab se tthare: shokel bees gera ka tthare.. 
Leviticus27:26 par ghareloo pashuuon ka pahilautta, jo yahova ka pahilautta tthara haai, usako to koi pavitra n ttharaae chahe vah bachhda ho, chahe bhed va bakaree ka bachcha, vah yahova hee ka haai." 
Leviticus27:27 parantu yadi vah ashuuddh pashu ka ho, to usaka paavitra ttharanevala usako yajak ke ttharaae huae mol ke anusar usaka panchavan bhag aur baddhakar chhuda sakata haai aur yadi vah n chhudaya jaa, to yajak ke ttharaae huae mol par bech diya jaae.." 
Leviticus27:28 parantu apanee saree vastuon men se jo kuchh koi yahova ke liye arpan kare, chahe manushy ho chahe pashu, chahe usakee nij boomi ka khet ho, aeesee koi arpan kee hui vastu n to bechee jaae aur n chhudai jaae jo kuchh arpan kiya jaae vah yahova ke liye paramapavitra tthare." 
Leviticus27:29 manushyon men se jo koi arpan kiya jaa, vah chhudaya n jaae nishchay vah mar dala jaae.." 
Leviticus27:30 fir boomi kee upaj ka sara dashamansha, chahe vah boomi ka beej ho chahe vraksha ka fal, vah yahova hee ka haai vah yahova ke liye paavitra tthare." 
Leviticus27:31 yaadi koi apane dashamansh men se kuchh chhudana chahe, to panchavan bhag baddhakar usako chhudaae." 
Leviticus27:32 aur gaya-baail aur bhed-bakaariya, nidan jo jo pashu ginane ke liye lattee ke tale nikal janevale haain unaka dashamansha, arthata das das peechhe aek aek pashu yahova ke liye paavitra tthare." 
Leviticus27:33 koi usake gun avagun n vichare, aur n usako badale aur yaadi koi usako badal bhee le, to vah aur usaka badala donon paavitra ttharen aur vah kabhee chhudaya n jaae.." 
Leviticus27:34 jo agyaaaen yahova ne israaeliyon ke liye seenaai parvat par moosa ko dee thee ve ye hee haain.. 
Numbers1:1 israaeliyon ke misr desh se nikal jane ke doosare varsha ke doosare maheene ke paahile din ko, yahova ne seenaai ke jangal men milapavale tamboo me, moosa se kaha," 
Numbers1:2 israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ke kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar, aek aek puroosh kee ginatee nam le lekar karana" 
Numbers1:3 jitane israaelee bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke ho, aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy ho, un sabhon ko unake dalon ke anusar too aur haroon gin le." 
Numbers1:4 aur tumhare sath aek aek gotra ka aek aek puroosh bhee ho jo apane pitaron ke gharane ka mukhy puroosh ho. 
Numbers1:5 tumhare un sathaiyon ke nam ye haai, arthata rooben ke gotra men se shadeur ka putra aeleesoora" 
Numbers1:6 shaimon ke gotra men se sooreeshaai ka putra shaloomeeaela 
Numbers1:7 yahooda ke gotra men se ammeenadab ka putra nahashaena 
Numbers1:8 issakar ke gotra men se sooa ka putra natanela 
Numbers1:9 jabooloon ke gotra men se helon ka putra aeleeaba 
Numbers1:10 yoosufavanshaiyon men se ye haai, arthata aerpaaim ke gotra men se ammeehood ka putra aeleeshaama, or manashsho ke gotra men se padasoor ka putra gamleeaela" 
Numbers1:11 binyameen ke gotra men se gidonee ka putra abeedana 
Numbers1:12 dan ke gotra men se ammeeshaai ka putra aheeaeejera 
Numbers1:13 ashor ke gotra men se okran ka putra pageeaela 
Numbers1:14 gad ke gotra men se dooael ka putra aelyasapa 
Numbers1:15 naptalee ke gotra men se aenam ka putra aheera. 
Numbers1:16 mandlee men se jo puroosh apane apane pitaron ke gotraen ke pradhaan hokar bulaae gaae ve ye hee haai, aur ye israaeliyon ke hajaron men mukhy puroosh the." 
Numbers1:17 aur jin purooshaen ke nam upar likhe haain unako sath lekar,"
