Numbers1:18 moosa aur haroon ne doosare maheene ke paahile din saree mandlee ikatthee kee, tab israaeliyon ne apane apane kul aur apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avasthavalon ke namon kee ginatee karava ke apanee apanee vanshaavalee likhvai" 
Numbers1:19 jis prakar yahova ne moosa ko jo agyaa dee thee usee ke anusar us ne seenaai ke jangal men unakee ganna kee.. 
Numbers1:20 aur israael ke pahilautte rooben ke vansh ne jitane puroosh apane kul aur apane pitaron ke gharane ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:21 aur rooben ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chhyaialees hajar the.. 
Numbers1:22 aur shaimon ke vansh ke log jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the, aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:23 aur shaimon ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh unasatt hajar teen sau the.. 
Numbers1:24 aur gad ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:25 aur gad ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh paaintalees hajar saddhe chh: sau the.. 
Numbers1:26 aur yahooda ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:27 aur yahooda ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh chauhattr hajar chh: sau the.. 
Numbers1:28 aur issakar ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:29 aur issakar ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh chauvan hajar char sau the.. 
Numbers1:30 aur jabooloon ve vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:31 aur jabooloon ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh sattavan hajar char sau the.. 
Numbers1:32 aur yoosufa ke vansh men se aepraaim ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:33 aur aepraaim gotra ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chalees hajar the.. 
Numbers1:34 aur manashsho ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:35 aur manashsho ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh battees hajar do sau the.. 
Numbers1:36 aur binyameen ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:37 aur binyameen ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh paaintees hajar char sau the.. 
Numbers1:38 aur dan ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:39 aur dan ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh basatt hajar sat sau the.. 
Numbers1:40 aur ashor ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va usase aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:41 aur ashor ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh saddhe aekatalees hajar the.. 
Numbers1:42 aur naptalee ke vansh ke jitane puroosh apane kulon aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur jo yuddh karane ke yogy the, ve sab apane apane nam se gine gaae:" 
Numbers1:43 aur naptalee ke gotra ke gine huae puroosh tirapan hajar char sau the.. 
Numbers1:44 is prakar moosa aur haroon aur israael ke barah pradhaanon ne, jo apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke pradhaan the, un sabhon ko gin liya aur unakee ginatee yahee thee." 
Numbers1:45 so jitane israaelee bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke hone ke karan yuddh karane ke yogy the ve apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gine gaa," 
Numbers1:46 aur ve sab gine huae puroosh milakar chh: lakh teen hajar saddhe panch sau the.. 
Numbers1:47 in men leveey apane pitaron ke gotra ke anusar naheen gine gaae. 
Numbers1:48 kyonaki yahova ne moosa se kaha tha," 
Numbers1:49 ki leveey gotra kee ginatee israaeliyon ke sang n karana 
Numbers1:50 parantu too leviyon ko sakshaee ke tamboo par, aur usake kul saman par, nidan jo kuchh us se sambandha rakhta haai us par aadhaikaree niyukt karana aur kul saman saahit nivas ko ve hee uttaya kare, aur ve hee us men seva tthal bhee kiya kare, aur tamboo ke asapas ve hee apane dere dala karen." 
Numbers1:51 aur jab jab nivas ka kooch ho tab tab leveey usako gira de, aur jab jab nivas ko khda karana ho tab tab leveey usako khda kiya karen aur yaadi koi doosara sameep aae to vah mar dala jaae." 
Numbers1:52 aur israaelee apana apana dera apanee apanee chhavanee men aur apane apane jhnde ke pas khda kiya karen 
Numbers1:53 par leveey apane dere sakshaee ke tamboo hee kee charon or khde kiya kare, kaheen aeesa n ho ki israaeliyon kee mandlee par kop bhdke aur leveey sakshaee ke tamboo kee raksha kiya karen." 
Numbers1:54 jo agyaaaen yahova ne moosa ko dee theen israaeliyon ne unheen ke anusar kiya.. 
Numbers2:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers2:2 israaelee milapavale tamboo kee charon or aur usake samhane apane apane jhnde aur apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke nishaan ke sameep apane dere khde karen. 
Numbers2:3 aur jo apane poorva disha kee or jahan sooyorday hota haai apane apane dalon ke anusar dere khde kiya karen ve hee yahooda kee chhavaneevale jhne ke log honge, aur unaka pradhaan ammeenadab ka putra nahashaen hoga," 
Numbers2:4 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh chauhattr hajar chh: sau haain. 
Numbers2:5 unake sameep jo dere khde kiya karen ve issakar ke gotra ke ho, aur unaka pradhaan sooar ka putra natanel hoga," 
Numbers2:6 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh chauvan hajar char sau haain. 
Numbers2:7 inake pas jabooloon ke gotravale rahenge, aur unaka pradhaan helon ka putra aeleeab hoga," 
Numbers2:8 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh sattavan hajar char sau haain. 
Numbers2:9 is reeati se yahooda kee chhavanee men jitane apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar aek lakh chhyaiasee hajar char sau haain. paahile ye hee kooch kiya karen.. 
Numbers2:10 daakkhian alang par rooben kee chhavanee ke jhnde ke log apane apane dalon ke anusar rahe, aur unaka pradhaan shadeur ka putra aeleesoor hoga," 
Numbers2:11 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chhyaialees hajar haain. 
Numbers2:12 unake pas jo dere khde kiya karen ve shaimon ke gotra ke honge, aur unaka pradhaan sooreeshaai ka putra shaloomeeel hoga," 
Numbers2:13 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh unasatt hajar teen sau haain. 
Numbers2:14 fir gad ke gotra ke rahe, aur unaka pradhaan rooael ka putra aelyasap hoga," 
Numbers2:15 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh paaintalees hajar saddhe chh: sau haain. 
Numbers2:16 rooben kee chhavanee men jitane apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar deddh lakh aek hajar saddhe char sau haain. doosara kooch inaka ho. 
Numbers2:17 unake peechhe aur sab chhavaaniyon ke beechonbeech leviyon kee chhavanee samet milapavale tamboo ka kooch hua kare jis kram se ve dere khde karen usee kram se ve apane apane sthan par apane apane jhnde ke pas pas chalen.. 
Numbers2:18 paachchhim alang par aepraaim kee chhavanee ke jhnde ke log apane apane dalon ke anusar rahe, aur unaka pradhaan ammeehood ka putra aeleeshaama hoga," 
Numbers2:19 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh saddhe chalees hajar haain. 
Numbers2:20 unake sameep manashsho ke gotra ke rahe, aur unaka pradhaan padasoor ka putra gamleeel hoga," 
Numbers2:21 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh battees hajar do sau haain. 
Numbers2:22 fir binyameen ke gotra men rahe, aur unaka pradhaan gidonee ka putra abeedan hoga," 
Numbers2:23 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh paaintees hajar char sau haain. 
Numbers2:24 aepraaim kee chhavanee men jitane apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar aek lakh att hajar aek sau puroosh haain. teesara kooch inaka ho. 
Numbers2:25 uttr alang par dan kee chhavanee ke jhnde ke log apane apane dalon ke anusar rahe, aur unaka pradhaan ammeeshaai ka putra aheeaeejer hoga," 
Numbers2:26 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh basatt hajar sat sau haain. 
Numbers2:27 aur unake pas jo dere khde karen ve ashor ke gotra ke rahe, aur unaka pradhaan okran ka putra pageeael hoga," 
Numbers2:28 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh saddhe ikatalees hajar haain. 
Numbers2:29 fir naptalee ke gotra ke rahe, aur unaka pradhaan aenan ka putra aheera hoga," 
Numbers2:30 aur unake dal ke gine huae puroosh tirapan hajar char sau haain. 
Numbers2:31 aur dan kee chhavanee men jitane gine gaae ve sab milakar deddh lakh sat hajar chh: sau haain. ye apane apane jhnde ke pas pas hokar sab se peechhe kooch karen. 
Numbers2:32 israaeliyon men se jo apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke anusar gine gaae ve ye hee haain aur sab chhavaniyon ke jitane puroosh apane apane dalon ke anusar gine gaae ve sab milakar chh: lakh teen hajar saddhe panch sau the. 
Numbers2:33 parantu yahova ne moosa ko jo agyaa dee bhee usake anusar leveey to israaeliyon men gine naheen gaae. 
Numbers2:34 aur jo jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee israaelee un agyaaon ke anusar apane apane kul aur apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar, apane apane jhnde ke pas dere khde karate aur kooch bhee karate the.." 
Numbers3:1 jis samay yahova ne seenaai parvat ke pas moosa se baten kee us samay haroon aur moosa kee yah vanshaavalee thee. 
Numbers3:2 haroon ke putraen ke nam ye haain: nadab jo usaka jetta tha, aur abeeho, aeleeajar aur itamara" 
Numbers3:3 haroon ke putra, jo aabhaishaikt yajak the, aur unaka sanskar yajak ka kam karane ke liye hua tha unake nam ye hee haain." 
Numbers3:4 nadab aur abeehoo jis samay seenaai ke jangal men yahova ke sammukh uparee ag le gaae usee samay yahova ke samhane mar gaae the aur ve putraheen bhee the. aeleeajar aur itamar apane pita haroon ke samhane yajak ka kam karate rahe.. 
Numbers3:5 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers3:6 levee gotravalon ko sameep le akar haroon yajak ke samhane khda kar, ki ve usakee seva tthal karen." 
Numbers3:7 aur jo kuchh usakee or se aur saree mandlee kee or se unhen saunpa jaae usakee raksha ve milapavale tamboo ke samahane kare, is prakar ve tamboo kee seva karen" 
Numbers3:8 ve milapavale tamboo ke kul saman kee aur israaeliyon kee saunpee hui vastuon kee bhee raksha kare, is prakar ve tamboo kee seva karen." 
Numbers3:9 aur too leaviyon ko haroon aur usake putraen ko saunp de aur ve israaeliyon kee or se haroon ko sampoorn reeti se arpan kiae huae hon. 
Numbers3:10 aur haroon aur usake putraen ko yajak ke pad par niyukt kar, aur ve apane yajakapad kee raksha kiya karen aur yaadi any manushy sameep aa, to vah mar dala jaae.." 
Numbers3:11 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers3:12 sun israaelee striayon ke sab pahilautton kee santee maain israaeliyon men se leaviyon ko le leta hoon so leveey mere hee hon. 
Numbers3:13 sab paahilautte mere haain kyonaki jis din maain ne misr desh men ke sab paahilautton ko mara, usee din maain ne kya manushy kya pashu israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton ko apane liye paavitra ttharaya isaaliye ve mere hee ttharenge maain yahova hoon.." 
Numbers3:14 fir yahova ne seenaai ke jangal men moosa se kaha," 
Numbers3:15 leaviyon men se jitane puroosh aek maheene va us se adhaik avastha ke hon unako unake pitaron ke gharanon aur unake kulon ke anusar gin le. 
Numbers3:16 yah agyaa pakar moosa ne yahova ke kahe ke anusar unako gin liya. 
Numbers3:17 levee ke putraen ke nam ye haai, arthata gesharen, kahat, aur mararee." 
Numbers3:18 aur gesharen ke putra jin se usake kul chale unake nam ye haai, arthata libnee aur shaimee." 
Numbers3:19 kahat ke putra jin se usake kul chale unake nam ye haai, arthata amraam, yisahar, hebraen, aur ujjeeaela." 
Numbers3:20 aur mararee ke putra jin se usake kul chale unake nam ye haai, arthata mahalee aur mooshaee. ye leaviyon ke kul apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar haain.." 
Numbers3:21 gesharen se libnaiyon aur shaimiyon ke kul chale gesharenavanashaiyon ke kul ye hee haain. 
Numbers3:22 in men se jitane purooshaen kee avastha aek maheene kee va us se adhaik thee, un sabhon kee ginatee saddhe sat hajar thee." 
Numbers3:23 gesharenavale kul nivas ke peechhe pachchhim kee or apane dere dala karen 
Numbers3:24 aur geshareaniyon ke moolapuroosh se gharane ka pradhaan laael ka putra aelyasap ho. 
Numbers3:25 aur milapavale tamboo kee jo vastuen gesharenavanashaiyon ko saunpee jaaen ve ye ho, arthata nivas aur tambo, aur usaka ohar, aur milapavale tamboo se dar ka parda," 
Numbers3:26 aur jo angan nivas aur vedee kee charon or haai usake parde, aur usake dar ka parda, aur sab doriyan jo us men kam atee haain.." 
Numbers3:27 fir kahat se amraaamiyo, yisahariyo, hebraeniyo, aur ujjeeaeliyon ke kul chale kahaatiyon ke kul ye hee haain." 
Numbers3:28 un men se jitane purooshaen kee avastha ek maheene kee va us se adhaik thee unakee ginatee att hajar chh: sau thee. ve paavitra sthan kee raksha ke uttradayee the. 
Numbers3:29 kahatiyon ke kul nivas kee us alang par apane dere dala karen jo dakkhian kee or haai 
Numbers3:30 aur kahatavale kulon se moolapuroosh ke gharane ka pradhaan ujjeeael ka putra aeleesapan ho. 
Numbers3:31 aur jo vastuaen unako saunpee jaaen ve sandook, meja, deevat, vediya, aur pavitrasthan ka vah saman jis se seva tthal hotee haai, aur parda nidan paavitrasthan men kam men anevala sara saman ho." 
Numbers3:32 aur leaviyon ke pradhaanon ka pradhaan haroon yajak ka putra aeleeajar ho, aur jo log pavitrasthan kee saunpee hui vastuon kee raksha karenge un par vahee mukhaiya tthare.." 
Numbers3:33 fir mararee se mahaaliyon aur mooshaiyon ke kul chale mararee ke kul ye hee haain. 
Numbers3:34 in men se jitane purooshaen kee avastha aek maheene kee va us se adhaik thee un sabhon kee ginatee chh: hajar do sau thee. 
Numbers3:35 aur mararee ke kulon ke moolapuroosh ke gharane ka pradhaan abeehaail ka putra sooreeael ho ye log nivas ke uttr kee or apane dere khde karen. 
Numbers3:36 aur jo vastuaen marareevanashaiyon ko saunpee jaaen ki ve unakee raksha kare, ve nivas ke takhte, bende, khmbhe, kursiya, aur sara samana nidan jo kuchh usake baratane men kam aae" 
Numbers3:37 aur charon or ke angan ke khmbhe, aur unakee kursiya, koontte aur doriyan hon." 
Numbers3:38 aur jo milapavale tamboo ke samhane, arthata nivas ke samhane, poorab kee or jahan se sooryoday hota haai, apane dere dala kare, ve moosa aur haroon aur usake putraen ke dere ho, aur pavitrasthan kee rakhvalee israaeliyon ke badale ve hee kiya kare, aur doosara jo koi usake sameep aae vah mar dala jaae." 
Numbers3:39 yahova kee is agyaa ko pakar aek maheene kee va us se aadhaik avasthavale jitane leveey purooshaen ko moosa aur haroon ne unake kulon ke anusar gin liya, ve sab ke sab bais hajar the.." 
Numbers3:40 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, israaeliyon ke jitane pahilautte purooshaen kee avastha aek maheene kee va us se adhaik haai, un sabhon ko nam le lekar gin le." 
Numbers3:41 aur mere liye israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton kee santee leviyon ko, aur israaeliyon ke pashuuon ke sab pahilautton kee santee leviyon ke pashuuon ko le maain yahova hoon." 
Numbers3:42 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton ko gin liya. 
Numbers3:43 aur sab paahilautte puroosh jinakee avastha aek maheene kee va us se aadhaik thee, unake namon kee ginatee bais hajar do sau tihattr thee.." 
Numbers3:44 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers3:45 israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton kee santee leviyon ko, aur unake pashuuon kee santee leviyon ke pashuuon ko le aur leveey mere hee hon maain yahova hoon." 
Numbers3:46 aur israaeliyon ke paahilautton me se jo do sau tihattr ginatee men leviyon se aadhaik haai, unake chhudane ke liye," 
Numbers3:47 puroosh peechhe panch shokel le ve pavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se ho, arthata bees gera ka shokel ho." 
Numbers3:48 aur jo roopaya un aadhaik pahilautton kee chhudautee ka hoga use haroon aur usake putraen ko de dena. 
Numbers3:49 aur jo israaelee paahilautte leviyon ke dara chhudaae huon se aadhaik the unake hath se moosa ne chhudautee ka roopaya liya. 
Numbers3:50 aur aek hajar teen sau paainsatt shaukel roopaya pavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se vasool hua. 
Numbers3:51 aur yahova kee agyaa ke anusar moosa ne chhudaae huon ka roopaya haroon aur usake putraen ko de diya.. 
Numbers4:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers4:2 leaviyon men se kahatiyon kee, unake kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar, ginatee karo," 
Numbers4:3 arthata tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avasthavalon kee sena me, jitane milapavale tamboo men kamakaj karane ko bhratee haain." 
Numbers4:4 aur milapavale tamboo men paramapaavitra vastuon ke vishay kahatiyon ka yah kam hoga," 
Numbers4:5 arthata jab jab chhavanee ka kooch ho tab tab haroon aur usake putra bheetar akar, beechavale parde ko utar ke us se sakshaeepatra ke sandook ko ddhnap den" 
Numbers4:6 tab ve us par sooison kee khalon ka ohar dale, aur usake upar sampoorn neele rang ka kapada dale, aur sandook men dndon ko lagaaen." 
Numbers4:7 fir bhenttvalee rottee kee meja par neela kapada bichhakar us par parato, dhoopadano, karavo, aur undelane ke kattoron ko rakhen aur nity kee rottee bhee us par ho" 
Numbers4:8 tab ve un par lal rang ka kapada bichhakar usako suison kee khalon ke ohar se ddhape, aur meja ke dndon ko laga den." 
Numbers4:9 fir ve neele rang ka kapada lekar deepako, galatarashae, aur guladanon samet ujiyala denevale deevatt ko, aur usake sab tel ke patraen ko jin se usakee seva tthal hotee haai ddhanpe" 
Numbers4:10 tab ve sare saman samet deevatt ko sooison kee khalon ke ohar ke bheetar rakhkar dnde par dhar den. 
Numbers4:11 fir ve sone kee vedee par aek neela kapada bichhakar usako sooison kee khalon ke ohar ke bheetar rakhkar dnde par dhar den. 
Numbers4:12 tab ve seva tthal ke sare saman ko lekar, jis se pavitrasthan men seva tthal holee haai, neele kapade ke bheetar rakhkar sooison kee khalon ke ohar se ddhanpe, aur dnde par dhar den." 
Numbers4:13 fir ve vedee par se sab rakh uttakar vedee par baainjanee rang ka kapada bichhaaen 
Numbers4:14 tab jis saman se vedee par kee seva tthal hotee haai vah sab, arthata usake karachhe, kantte, faavaadiya, aur kattore adi, vedee ka sara saman us par rakhen aur usake upar sooison kee khalon ka ohar bichhakar vedee men dndon ko lagaaen." 
Numbers4:15 aur jab haroon aur usake putra chhavanee ke kooch ke samay paavitrasthan aur usake sare saman ko ddhnap chuke, tab usake bad kahatee usake uttane ke liye aae, par kisee paavitra vastu ko n chhuae, kaheen aeesa n ho ki mar jaaen. kahatiyon ke uttane ke liye milapavale tamboo kee ye hee vastuen haain." 
Numbers4:16 aur jo vastuaen haroon yajak ke putra aeleejar ko raksha ke liye saunpee jaaen ve ye haai, arthata ujiyala dene ke liye tel, aur sugaandhiat dhoop, aur nity annabali, aur abhaishok ka tel, aur sare nivas, aur us men kee sab vastue, aur pavitrasthan aur usake kul samana.." 
Numbers4:17 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers4:18 kahatiyon ke kulon ke gotraiyon ko leaviyon men se nash n hone dena 
Numbers4:19 usake sath aeesa karo, ki jab ve paramapaavitra vastuon ke sameep aen tab n maren parantu jeeavit rahen arthata haroon aur usake putra bheetar akar ek ek ke liye usakee sevakai aur usaka bhar tthara de," 
Numbers4:20 aur ve paavitra vastuon ke dekhne ko kshan bhr ke liye bhee bheetar ane n paae, kaheen aeesa n ho ki mar jaaen.." 
Numbers4:21 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers4:22 geshareaniyon kee bhee ginatee unake pitaron ke gharanon aur kulon ke anusar kara 
Numbers4:23 tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avasthavale, jitane milapavale tamboo men seva karane ko sena men bhratee hon un sabhon ko gin le." 
Numbers4:24 seva karane aur bhar uttane men geshareniyon ke kulavalon kee yah sevakai ho 
Numbers4:25 arthata ve nivas ke patto, aur milapavale tamboo aur usake ohar, aur isake uparavale sooison kee khalon ke ohar, aur milapavale tamboo ke dar ke parde," 
Numbers4:26 aur nivas, aur vedee kee charon or ke angan ke pardo, aur angan ke dar ke parde, aur unakee doriyo, aur un men baratane ke sare saman, in sabhon ko ve uttaya karen aur in vastuon se jitana kam hota haai vah sab bhee unakee sevakai men aae." 
Numbers4:27 aur geshareaniyon ke vansh kee saree sevakai haroon aur usake putraen ke kahane se hua kare, arthata jo kuchh unako uttana, aur jo jo sevakai unako karanee ho, unaka sara bhar tum hee unhen saupa karo." 
Numbers4:28 milapavale tamboo men geshareniyon ke kulon kee yahee sevakai tthare aur un par haroon yajak ka putra itamar aadhaikar rakhe.. 
Numbers4:29 fir maraariyon ko bhee too unake kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gin len 
Numbers4:30 tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avasthavale, jitane milapavale tamboo kee seva karane ko sena men bhratee ho, un sabhon ko gin le." 
Numbers4:31 aur milapavale tamboo men kee jin vastuon ke uttane kee sevakai unako mile ve ye ho, arthata nivas ke takhte, bede, khmbhe, aur kuarsiya," 
Numbers4:32 aur charon or angan ke khmbhe, aur inakee kursiya, koontte, doriya, aur bhanati bhanati ke baratane ka sara samana aur jo jo saman ddhone ke liye unako saupa jaae us men se aek aek vastu ka nam lekar tum gin do." 
Numbers4:33 marariyon ke kulon kee saree sevakai jo unhen milapavale tamboo ke vishay karanee hogee vah yahee haai vah haroon yajak ke putra itamar ke aadhaikar men rahe.. 
Numbers4:34 tab moosa aur haroon aur mandlee ke pradhaanon ne kahaatiyon ke vansh ko, unake kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar," 
Numbers4:35 tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha kee avastha ke, jitane milapavale tamboo kee sevakai karane ko sena men bhratee huae the, un sabhon ko gin liya" 
Numbers4:36 aur jo apane apane kul ke anusar gine gaae ve do hajar saddhe sat sau the. 
Numbers4:37 kahatiyon ke kulon men se jitane milapavale tamboo men seva karane vale gine gaae ve itane hee the jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ke dara dee thee usee ke anusar moosa aur haroon ne inako gin liya.. 
Numbers4:38 aur geshareaniyon men se jo apane kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gine gaa," 
Numbers4:39 arthata tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avastha ke, jo milapavale tamboo kee sevakai karane ko sena men bhratee huae the," 
Numbers4:40 unakee ginatee unake kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar do hajar chh: sau tees thee. 
Numbers4:41 geshareaniyon ke kulon men se jitane milapavale tamboo men seva karanevale gine gaae ve itane hee the yahova kee agyaa ke anusar moosa aur haroon ne inako gin liya.. 
Numbers4:42 fir maraariyon ke kulon men se jo apane kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gine gaa," 
Numbers4:43 arthata tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avastha ke, jo milapavale tamboo kee sevakai karane ko sena men bhratee huae the," 
Numbers4:44 unakee ginatee unake kulon ke anusar teen hajar do sau thee. 
Numbers4:45 marariyon ke kulon men se jinako moosa aur haroon ne, yahova kee us agyaa ke anusar jo moosa ke dara milee thee, gin liya ve itane hee the.." 
Numbers4:46 leaviyon men se jinako moosa aur haroon aur israaelee pradhaanon ne unake kulon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar gin liya," 
Numbers4:47 arthata tees varsha se lekar pachas varsha tak kee avasthavale, jitane milapavale tamboo kee sevakai karane ka bojh uttane ka kam karane ko haajir hone vale the," 
Numbers4:48 un sabhon kee ginatee att hajar panch sau assee thee. 
Numbers4:49 ye apanee apanee seva aur bojh ddhone ke anusar yahova ke kahane par gaae. jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee usee ke anusar ve gine gaae.. 
Numbers5:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers5:2 israaeliyon ko agyaa de, ki ve sab koddhiyon ko, aur jitanon ke prameh ho, aur jitane loth ke karan ashuuddh ho, un sabhon ko chhavanee se nikal den" 
Numbers5:3 aeeson ko chahe puroosh hon chahe sree chhavanee se nikalakar bahar kar den kaheen aeesa n ho ki tumharee chhavanee, jisake beech maain nivas karata hoo, unake karan ashuuddh ho jaae." 
Numbers5:4 aur israaeliyon ne vaaisa hee kiya, arthata aeese logon ko chhavanee se nikalakar bahar kar diya jaaisa yahova ne moosa se kaha tha israaeliyon ne vaaisa hee kiya.." 
Numbers5:5 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers5:6 israaeliyon se kah, ki jab koi puroosh va sree aeesa koi pap karake jo log kiya karate haain yahova ko vishvasaghaat kare, aur vah praanee doshaee ho," 
Numbers5:7 tab vah apana kiya hua pap man le aur poore mool men panchavan ansh baddhakar apane dosh ke badale men usee ko de, jisake vishay doshaee hua ho." 
Numbers5:8 parantu yadi us manushy ka koi kuttumbee n ho jise dosh ka badala bhr diya jaa, to us dosh ka jo badala yahova ko bhr diya jaae vah yajak ka ho, aur vah us praayaashchaittvale meddhe se aadhaik ho jis se usake liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaae." 
Numbers5:9 aur jitanee pavitra kee hui vastuen israaelee uttai hui bhentt karake yajak ke pas laae, ve usee kee hon" 
Numbers5:10 sab manushyon kee pavitra kee hui vastuen usee kee ttharen koi jo kuchh yajak ko de vah usaka tthare.. 
Numbers5:11 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers5:12 israaeliyon se kah, ki yadi kisee manushy kee sree kuchal chalakar usaka vishvasaghaat kare," 
Numbers5:13 aur koi puroosh usake sath kukarma kare, parantu yah bat usake pati se chhpaiee ho aur khulee n ho, aur vah ashuuddh ho gai, parantu n to usake virooddh koi sakshaee ho, aur n kukarma karate pakadee gai ho" 
Numbers5:14 aur usake paati ke man men jalan utpann ho, arthata vah apane sree par jalane lage aur vah ashuuddh hui ho va usake man men jalan utpann ho, arthata vah apanee sree par jalane lage parantu vah ashuuddh n hui ho" 
Numbers5:15 to vah puroosh apanee sree ko yajak ke pas le jaa, aur usake liye aepa ka dasavan ansh jav ka maaida chaddhava karake le aae parantu us par tel n dale, n loban rakhe, kyonki vah jalanavala aur smaran dilanevala, arthata adharma ka smaran karanevala annabaali hoga." 
Numbers5:16 tab yajak us sree ko sameep le jakar yahova ke samhane khdee kare 
Numbers5:17 aur yajak mittee ke patra men pavitra jal le, aur nivasasthan kee boomi par kee dhooli men se kuchh lekar us jal men dal de." 
Numbers5:18 tab yajak us sree ko yahova ke samhane khdee karake usake sir ke bal bikhraa, aur smaran dilanevale annabaali ko jo jalanavala haai usake hathon par dhar de. aur apane hath men yajak kaduva jal liye rahe jo shaap lagane ka karan hoga." 
Numbers5:19 tab yajak sree ko shapath dharavakar kahe, ki yadi kisee puroosh ne tujh se kukarma n kiya ho, aur too paati ko chhod doosare kee or firake ashuuddh n ho gai ho, to too is kaduve jal ke gun se jo shaap ka karan hota haai bachee rahe." 
Numbers5:20 par yaadi too apane pati ko chhod doosare kee or firake ashuuddh hui ho, aur tere pati ko chhod kisee doosare puroosh ne tujh se prasang kiya ho," 
Numbers5:21 aur yajak use shaap denevalee shapath dharakar kahe, yahova teree jangha sadaae aur tera pett faulaa, aur log tera nam lekar shaap aur dhaikkar diya karen" 
Numbers5:22 arthata vah jal jo shaap ka karan hota haai teree antaadiyon men jakar tere pett ko faulaa, aur teree jangha ko sada de. tab vah sree kahe, ameen, ameena." 
Numbers5:23 tab yajak shaap ke ye shabd pustak men likhkar us kaduve jal se mittake," 
Numbers5:24 us sree ko vah kaduva jal pilaae jo shaap ka karan hoga us sree ke pett men jakar kaduva ho jaega. 
Numbers5:25 aur yajak sree ke hath men se jalanavale annabaali ko lekar yahova ke age hilakar vedee ke sameep pahunchaae 
Numbers5:26 aur yajak us annabaali men se usaka smaran dilanevala bhag, arthata mutthee bhr lekar vedee par jalaa, aur usake bad sree ko vah jal pilaae." 
Numbers5:27 aur jab vah use vah jal pila chuke, tab yadi vah ashuuddh hui ho aur apane paati ka vishvasaghaat kiya ho, to vah jal jo shaap ka karan hota haai us sree ke pett men jakar kaduva ho jaaega, aur usaka pett foolega, aur usakee jangha sad jaaegee, aur us sree ka nam usake logon ke beech srapit hoga." 
Numbers5:28 par yaadi vah sree ashuuddh n hui ho aur shuuddh hee ho, to vah nirdosh ttharegee aur gabhairnee ho sakegee." 
Numbers5:29 jalan kee vyavastha yahee haai, chahe koi sree apane pati ko chhod doosare kee or firake ashuuddh ho," 
Numbers5:30 chahe puroosh ke man men jalan utpann ho aur vah apanee sree par jalane lage to vah usako yahova ke sammukh khdee kar de, aur yajak us par yah saree vyavastha pooree kare." 
Numbers5:31 tab puroosh adharma se bacha rahega, aur sree apane adharma ka bojh ap uttaaegee.." 
Numbers6:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers6:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki jab koi puroosh va sree najaeer kee mannat, arthata apane ko yahova ke liye nyara karane kee vishosh mannat mane," 
Numbers6:3 tab vah dakhmadha adi madira se nyara rahe vah n dakhmadha ka, n aur maadira ka siraka peea, aur n dakh ka kuchh ras bhee peea, varan dakh n khaa, chahe haree ho chahe sookhee." 
Numbers6:4 jitane din yah nyara rahe utane din tak vah beej se le chhlaike tak, jo kuchh dakhlata se utpann hota haai, us men se kuchh n khaae." 
Numbers6:5 fir jitane din us ne nyare rahane kee mannat manee ho utane din tak vah apane sir par chhura n firaae aur jab tak ve din poore n hon jin men vah yahova ke liye nyara rahe tab tak vah pavitra ttharega, aur apane sir ke balon ko baddhaae rahe." 
Numbers6:6 jitane din vah yahova ke liye nyara rahe utane din tak kisee loth ke pas n jaae. 
Numbers6:7 chahe usaka pita, va mata, va bhai, va baahin bhee mare, taubhee vah unake karan ashuuddh n ho kyonki apane parameshvar ke liye nyara rahane ka chinh usake sir par hoga." 
Numbers6:8 apane nyare rahane ke sare dinon men vah yahova ke liye paavitra tthara rahe. 
Numbers6:9 aur yaadi koi usake pas achanak mar jaa, aur usake nyare rahane ka jo chinh usake sir par hoga vah ashuuddh ho jaa, to vah shuuddh hone ke din, arthata sataven din apane sir mundaae." 
Numbers6:10 aur attven din vah do panduk va kabootaree ke do bachche milapavale tamboo ke dar par yajak ke pas le jaa," 
Numbers6:11 aur yajak aek ko papabali, aur doosare ko homabaali karake usake liye praayaashchaitt kare, kyonaki vah loth ke karan papee tthara haai. aur yajak usee din usaka sir fir pavitra kare," 
Numbers6:12 aur vah apane nyare rahane ke dinon ko fir yahova ke liye nyare ttharaa, aur aek varsha ka aek bhed ka bachcha doshabaali karake le aae aur jo din is se pahile beet gaae hon ve vyarth gine jaa, kyonaki usake nyare rahane ka chinh ashuuddh ho gaya.." 
Numbers6:13 fir jab najaeer ke nyare rahane ke din poore ho, us samay ke liye usakee yah vyavastha haai arthata vah milapavale tamboo ke dar par pahunchaya jaa," 
Numbers6:14 aur vah yahova ke liye homabaali karake aek varsha ka aek nirdosh bhed ka bachcha papabali karake, aur aek varsha kee aek nirdosh bhed kee bachchee, aur melabali ke liye aek nirdosh meddha," 
Numbers6:15 aur akhmeeree rottyaien kee aek ttokaree, arthata tel se sane huae maaide ke faulake, aur tel se chupadee hui akhmeeree papaadiya, aur un baliyon ke annabali aur argha ye sab chaddhave sameep le jaae." 
Numbers6:16 in sab ko yajak yahova ke samhane pahunchakar usake papabaali aur homabali ko chaddhaa," 
Numbers6:17 aur akhmeeree rottee kee ttokaree samet meddhe ko yahova ke liye melabaali karake, aur us melabali ke annabaali aur argha ko bhee chaddhaae." 
Numbers6:18 tab najaeer apane nyare rahane ke chinhavale sir ko milapavale tamboo ke dar par mundakar apane balon ko us ag par dal de jo melabali ke neeche hogee. 
Numbers6:19 fir jab najaeer apane nyare rahane ke chinhavale sir ko munda chuke tab yajak meddhe ko pakaya hua kandha, aur ttokaree men se aek akhmeeree rottee, aur aek akhmeeree papadee lekar najaeer ke hathon par dhar de," 
Numbers6:20 aur yajak inako hilane kee bhentt karake yahova ke samhane hilaae hilai hui chhatee aur uttai hui jangha samet ye bhee yajak ke liye paavitra ttharen isake bad vah najaeer dakhmadha pee sakega. 
Numbers6:21 najaeer kee mannat kee, aur jo chaddhava usako apane nyare hone ke karan yahova ke liye chaddhana hoga usakee bhee yahee vyavastha haai. jo chaddhava vah apanee poonjee ke anusar chaddha sake, us se adhaik jaaisee mannat us ne manee ho, vaaise hee apane nyare rahane kee vyavastha ke anusar use karana hoga.." 
Numbers6:22 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers6:23 haroon aur usake putraen se kah, ki tum israaeliyon ko in vachanon se ashaeervad diya karana ki," 
Numbers6:24 yahova tujhe ashaeesh de aur teree raksha kare: 
Numbers6:25 yahova tujh par apane mukh ka prakash chamakaa, aur tujh par anugrah kare:" 
Numbers6:26 yahova apana mukh teree or kare, aur tujhe shaanti de." 
Numbers6:27 is reeati se mere nam ko israaeliyon par rakhe, aur maain unhen ashaeesh diya karoonga.." 
Numbers7:1 fir jab moosa ne nivas ko khda kiya, aur sare saman samet usaka abhaishok karake usako paavitra kiya, aur sare saman samet vedee ka bhee aabhaishok karake use pavitra kiya," 
Numbers7:2 tab israael ke pradhaan jo apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy puroosha, aur gotraen ke bhee pradhaan hokar ginatee lene ke kam par niyukt the," 
Numbers7:3 ve yahova ke samhane bhentt le aa, aur unakee bhentt chh: chhai hui gaadiyan aur barah baail the, arthata do do pradhaan kee or se aek aek gadee, aur aek aek pradhaan kee or se aek aek baaila inhen ve nivas ke samhane yahova ke sameep le gaae." 
Numbers7:4 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers7:5 un vastuon ko too un se le le, ki milapavale tamboo ke baratan men kam ae, so too unhen leviyon ke ek ek kul kee vishosh sevakai ke anusar unako bantt de." 
Numbers7:6 so moosa ne ve sab gaadiyan aur baail lekar leaviyon ko de diye. 
Numbers7:7 geshareaniyon ko unakee sevakai ke anusar us ne do gadiyan aur char baail diae 
Numbers7:8 aur marariyon ko unakee sevakai ke anusar us ne char gadiyan aur att baail diae ye sab haroon yajak ke putra itamar ke adhaikar men kiae gaae. 
Numbers7:9 aur kahatiyon ko us ne kuchh n diya, kyonaki unake liye paavitra vastuon kee yah sevakai thee ki vah use apane kandhaen par utta liya karen.." 
Numbers7:10 fir jab vedee ka aabhaishok hua tab pradhaan usake sanskar kee bhentt vedee ke age sameep le jane lage. 
Numbers7:11 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, vedee ke sanskar ke liye pradhaan log apanee apanee bhentt apane apane niyat din par chaddhaaen.." 
Numbers7:12 so jo puroosh paahile din apanee bhentt le gaya vah yahooda gotravale ammeenadab ka putra mahashaen tha 
Numbers7:13 usakee bhentt yah thee, arthata pavitrasthanavale shokel ke hisab se ek sau tees shokel chandee ka ek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka ek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:14 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:15 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:16 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:17 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. ammeenadab ke putra mahashaen kee yahee bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:18 aur doosare din issakar ka pradhaan sooar ka putra natanel bhentt le aya 
Numbers7:19 vah yah thee, arthata paavitrasthanavale shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:20 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:21 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:22 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:23 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. sooar ke putra natanel kee yaheen bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:24 aur teesare din jaboolooniyon ka pradhaan helon ka putra aeleeab yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:25 arthata paavitrasthanavale shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:26 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:27 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:28 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:29 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. helon ke putra aeleeab kee yaheen bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:30 aur chauthe din roobeaniyon ka pradhaan shadeur ka putra aeleesoor yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:31 arthata paavitrasthanavale shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:32 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:33 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:34 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:35 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. shadeur ke putra aeleesoor kee yaheen bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:36 aur panchaven din shaimoniyon ka pradhaan sooreeshaai ka putra shaloomeeael yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:37 arthata paavitrasthanavale shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:38 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:39 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:40 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:41 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panach bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. sooreeshaai ke putra shaloomeeael kee yahee bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:42 aur chhttven din gadiyon ka pradhaan dooael ka putra aelyasap yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:43 arthata paavitrasthanavale shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:44 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:45 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:46 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:47 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. dooael ke putra aelyasap kee yaheen bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:48 aur sataven din aepraaimiyon ka pradhaan ammeehood ka putra aeleeshaama yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:49 arthata paavitrasthanavale shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:50 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:51 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:52 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:53 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. ammeehood ke putra aeleeshaama kee yaheen bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:54 aur attven din manashshoiyon ka pradhaan padasoor ka putra gamleeael yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:55 arthata paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se aek so tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:56 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:57 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:58 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:59 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. padasoor ke putra gamleeael kee yaheen bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:60 aur naven din binyameeaniyon ka pradhaan gidonee ka putra abeedan yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:61 arthata paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:62 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:63 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:64 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:65 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. gidonee ke putra abeedan kee yahee bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:66 aur dasaven din daniyon ka pradhaan ammeeshaai ka putra akheeajar yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:67 arthata paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:68 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:69 homabaali ke liye bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:70 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:71 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. ammeeshaai ke putra akheeajar kee yahee bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:72 aur gyarahaven din ashoriyon ka pradhaan okran ka putra pajeeael yah bhentt le aya. 
Numbers7:73 arthata paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:74 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka dhoopadana 
Numbers7:75 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:76 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:77 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. okran ke putra pajeeael kee yaheen bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:78 aur barahaven din naptaliyon ka pradhaan aenan ka putra aheera yah bhentt le aya," 
Numbers7:79 arthata paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se aek sau tees shokel chandee ka aek parat, aur sattr shokel chandee ka aek kattora, ye donon annabali ke liye tel se sane huae aur maaide se bhre huae the" 
Numbers7:80 fir dhoop se bhra hua das shokel sone ka aek dhoopadana 
Numbers7:81 homabaali ke liye aek bachhda, aur aek meddha, aur aek varsha ka aek bhedee ka bachcha" 
Numbers7:82 papabaali ke liye aek bakara 
Numbers7:83 aur melabaali ke liye do baail, aur panch meddhe, aur panch bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke panch bhedee ke bachche. aenan ke putra aheera kee yahee bhentt thee.." 
Numbers7:84 vedee ke abhaishok ke samay israael ke pradhaanon kee or se usake sanskar kee bhentt yahee hui, arthata chandee ke barah parat, chandee ke barah kattore, aur sone ke barah dhoopadana." 
Numbers7:85 aek aek chandee ka parat aek sau tees shokel ka, aur aek aek chandee ka kattora sattr shokel ka tha aur paavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se ye sab chandee ke patra do hajar char sau shokel ke the." 
Numbers7:86 fir dhoop se bhre huae sone ke barah dhoopadan jo pavitrasthan ke shokel ke hisab se das das shokel ke the, ve sab dhoopadan aek sau bees shokel sone ke the." 
Numbers7:87 fir homabali ke liye sab milakar barah bachhde, barah meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke barah bhedee ke bachche, apane apane annabali sahit the fir papabali ke sab bakare barah the" 
Numbers7:88 aur melabaali ke liye sab mila kar chaubees baail, aur satt meddhe, aur satt bakare, aur aek aek varsha ke satt bhedee ke bachche the. vedee ke abhaishok hone ke bad usake sanskar kee bhentt yahee hui." 
Numbers7:89 aur jab moosa yahova se baten karane ko milapavale tamboo men gaya, tab us ne praayaashchaitt ke ddhkane par se, jo sakshaeepatra ke sandook ke upar tha, donon karoobon ke madhy men se usakee avaj sunee jo us se baten kar raha tha aur us ne yahova us se baten kee.." 
Numbers8:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers8:2 haroon ko samajhakar yah kah, ki jab jab too deepakon ko bare tab tab saton deepak ka prakash deevatt ke samhane ho." 
Numbers8:3 nidan haroon ne vaaisa hee kiya, arthata jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee usee ke anusar us ne deepakon ko bara, ki ve deevatt ke samhane ujiyala de." 
Numbers8:4 aur deevatt kee banavatt yah thee, arthata yah paae se lekar foolon tak gaddhe huae sone ka banaya gaya tha jo namoona yahova ne moosa ko dikhlaya tha usee ke anusar us ne deevatt ko banaya.." 
Numbers8:5 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers8:6 israaeliyon ke madhy men se leviyon ko alag lekar shuuddh kara. 
Numbers8:7 unhen shuuddh karane ke liye too aeesa kar, ki pavan karane vala jal un par chhdik de, fir ve sarvang mundn karae, aur vasr dhaee, aur ve apane ko svachachh karen." 
Numbers8:8 tab ve tel se sane huae maaide ke annabali samet aek bachhda le le, aur too papabali ke liye aek doosara bachhda lena." 
Numbers8:9 aur too leaviyon ko milapavale tamboo ke samhane sameep pahunchana, aur israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ko ikattha karana." 
Numbers8:10 tab too leaviyon ko yahova ke age sameep le ana, aur israaelee apane apane hath un par rakhe," 
Numbers8:11 tab haroon leviyon ko yahova ke samhane israaeliyon kee or se hilai hui bhentt karake arpan kare, ki ve yahova kee seva karanevale ttharen." 
Numbers8:12 aur leveey apane apane hath un bachhdon ke siron par rakhen tab too leaviyon ke liye praayaashchaitt karane ko aek bachhda papabaali aur doosara homabaali karake yahova ke liye chaddhana. 
Numbers8:13 aur leaviyon ko haroon aur usake putraen ke sammukh khda karana, aur unako hilane kee bhentt ke liye yahova ko aparn karana." 
Numbers8:14 aur unhen israaeliyon men se alag karana, so ve mere hee ttharenge." 
Numbers8:15 aur jab too leaviyon ko shuuddh karake hilai hui bhentt ke liye arpan kar chuke, usake bad ve milapavale tamboo sambandhaee seva tthal karane ke liye andar aya karen." 
Numbers8:16 kyonaki ve israaeliyon me se mujhe pooree reeti se arpan kiae huae haain maai ne unako sab israaeliyon men se aek aek sree ke paahilautte kee santee apana kar liya haai. 
Numbers8:17 israaeliyon ke paahilautte, chahe manushy ke hon chahe pashu ke, sab mere haain kyonki maain ne unhen us samay apane liye paavitra ttharaya jab maain ne misr desh ke sab paahilautton ko mar dala." 
Numbers8:18 aur maain ne israaeliyon ke sab paahilautton ke badale leviyon ko liya haai. 
Numbers8:19 unhe lekar maai ne haroon aur usake putraen ko israeliyon men se dan karake de diya haai, ki ve milapavale tamboo men israealiyon ke nimitt sevakai aur praayaashchaitt kiya kare, kaheen aeesa n ho ki jab israelee pavitrasthan ke sameep aen tab un par koi mahavipaati a pade." 
Numbers8:20 leaviyon ke vishay yahova kee yah agyaa pakar moosa aur haroon aur israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ne unake sath tteek vaaisa hee kiya. 
Numbers8:21 leaviyon ne to apane ko pap se pavan kiya, aur apane vasren ko dhae dala aur haroon ne unhen yahova ke samhane hilai hui bhentt ke nimitt arpan kiya, aur unhen shuuddh karane ko unake liye praayashchitt bhee kiya." 
Numbers8:22 aur usake bad leveey haroon aur usake putraen ke samhane milapavale tamboo men apanee apanee sevakai karane ko gaae aur jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko leaviyon ke vishay men dee thee usee ke anusar ve un se vyavahar karane lage.. 
Numbers8:23 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers8:24 jo leaviyon ko karana haai vah yah haai, ki pachchaees varsha kee avastha se lekar us se adhaik ayu men ve milapavale tamboo sambandhaee kam karane ke liye bheetar upaasthiat hua karen" 
Numbers8:25 aur jab pachas varsha ke hon to fir us seva ke liye n aae aur n kam karen 
Numbers8:26 parantu ve apane bhai bandhauon ke sath milapavale tamboo ke pas raksha ka kam kiya kare, aur kisee prakar kee sevakai n karen. leviyon ko jo jo kam saunpe jaaen unake vishay too un se aeesa hee karana.." 
Numbers9:1 israaeliyon ke misr desh se nikalane ke doosare varsha ke paahile maheene men yahova ne seenaai ke jangal men moosa se kaha," 
Numbers9:2 israaelee fasah nam pabrba ko usake niyat samay par mana karen. 
Numbers9:3 arthata isee maheene ke chaudahaven din ko godhooli ke samay tum log use sab vidhaiyon aur niyamon ke anusar manana. 
Numbers9:4 tab moosa ne israaeliyon se fasah manane ke liye kah diya. 
Numbers9:5 aur unhon ne pahale maheene ke chaudahaven din ko godhooli ke samay seenaai ke jangal men fasah ko mana aur jo jo agyaaaen yahova ne moosa ko dee theen unheen ke anusar israaeliyon ne kiya. 
Numbers9:6 parantu kitane log kisee manushy kee loth ke dara ashuuddh hone ke karan us din fasah ko n man sake ve usee din moosa aur haroon ke sameep jakar moosa se kahane lage," 
Numbers9:7 ham log aek manushy kee loth ke karan ashuuddh haain parantu ham kyon rooke rahe, aur israaeliyon ke sang yahova ka chaddhava niyat samay par kyon n chaddhaaen?" 
Numbers9:8 moosa ne un se kaha, tthare raho, maai sun loon ki yahova tumhare vishay men kya agyaa deta haai." 
Numbers9:9 yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers9:10 israaeliyon se kah, ki chahe tum log chahe tumhare vansh men se koi bhee kisee loth ke karan ashuuddh ho, va door kee yatra par ho, taubhee vah yahova ke liye fasah ko mane." 
Numbers9:11 ve use doosare maheene ke chaudahaven din ko godhooli ke samay manen aur fasah ke balipashu ke mans ko akhmeeree rottee aur kaduae sagapat ke sath khaaen. 
Numbers9:12 aur us men se kuchh bhee bihan tak n rakh chhode, aur n usakee koi haddee tode ve us pabrba ko fasah kee saree vidhaiyon ke anusar manen." 
Numbers9:13 parantu jo manushy shuuddh ho aur yatra par n ho, parantu fasah ke pabrba ko n mane, vah praanee apane logon men se nash kiya jaa, us manushy ko yahova ka chaddhava niyat samay par n le ane ke karan apane pap ka bojh uttana padega." 
Numbers9:14 aur yaadi koi paradeshaee tumhare sath rahakar chahe ki yahova ke liye fasah mane, to vah usee vidhai aur niyam ke anusar usako mane deshaee aur paradeshaee donon ke liye tumharee aek hee vidhai ho.." 
Numbers9:15 jis din nivas jo sakshaee ka tamboo bhee kahalata haai khda kiya gaya, us din badal us par chha gaya aur sandhya ko vah nivas par ag sa dikhai diya aur bhor tak dikhai deta raha." 
Numbers9:16 aur nity aeesa hee hua karata tha arthata din ko badal chhaya rahata, aur rat ko ag dikhai detee thee." 
Numbers9:17 aur jab jab vah badal tamboo par se utt jata tab israaelee prasthan karate the aur jis sthan par badal tthar jata vaheen israaelee apane dere khde karate the. 
Numbers9:18 yahova kee agyaa se israaelee kooch karate the, aur yahova hee kee agyaa se ve dere khde bhee karate the aur jitane din tak vah badal nivas par tthara rahata utane din tak ve dere dale pade rahate the." 
Numbers9:19 aur jab jab badal bahut din nivas par chhaya rahata tab israaelee yahova kee agyaa manate, aur prasthan naheen karate the." 
Numbers9:20 aur kabhee kabhee vah badal thode hee din tak nivas par rahata, aur tab bhee ve yahova kee agyaa se dere dale pade rahate the aur fir yahova kee agyaa hee se prasthan karate the." 
Numbers9:21 aur kabhee kabhee badal keval sandhya se bhor tak rahata aur jab vah bhor ko utt jata tha tab ve prasthan karate the, aur yaadi vah rat din barabar rahata to jab badal utt jata tab hee ve prasthan karate the." 
Numbers9:22 vah badal chahe do din, chahe aek maheena, chahe varsha bhr, jab tak nivas par tthara rahata tab tak israaelee apane deron men rahate aur prasthan naheen karate the parantu jab vah utt jata tab ve prasthan karate the." 
Numbers9:23 yahova kee agyaa se ve apane deren khde karate, aur yahova hee kee agyaa se ve prasthan karate the jo agyaa yahova moosa ke dara deta tha usako ve mana karate the.." 
Numbers10:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers10:2 chandee kee do turahiyan gaddhke banai jaaen too unako mandlee ke bulane, aur chhavaniyon ke prasthan karane men kam men lana." 
Numbers10:3 aur jab ve donon faookee jaae, tab saree mandlee milapavale tamboo ke dar par tere pas ikatthee ho jaae." 
Numbers10:4 aur yaadi aek hee turahee foonkee jaa, to pradhaan log jo israael ke hajaron ke mukhy puroosh haain tere pas ikatthe ho jaaen." 
Numbers10:5 jab tum log sans bandhakar foonko, to poorab disha kee chhavaniyon ka prasthan ho." 
Numbers10:6 aur jab tum doosaree ber sans bandhakar foonko, tab daakkhian disha kee chhavaniyon ka prasthan ho. unake prasthan karane ke liye ve sans bandhakar foonken." 
Numbers10:7 aur jab logon ko ikattha karake sabha karanee ho tab bhee foonkana parantu sans bandhakar naheen. 
Numbers10:8 aur haroon ke putra jo yajak haain ve un turahiyon ko foonka karen. yah bat tumharee peeddhee-peeddhee ke liye sarvada kee vidhai rahe. 
Numbers10:9 aur jab tum apane desh men kisee satanevale baairee se ladne ko nikalo, tab turaahiyon ko sans bandhakar foonkana, tab tumhare parameshvar yahova ko tumhara smaran aaega, aur tum apane shatrauon se bachaae jaoge." 
Numbers10:10 aur apane anand ke din me, aur apane niyat pabrbon me, aur maheenon ke adi me, apane homabaliyon aur melabaaliyon ke sath un turahiyon ko foonkana is se tumhare parameshvar ko tumhara smaran aaega maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon.." 
Numbers10:11 aur doosare varsha ke doosare maheene ke beesaven din ko badal sakshaee ke nivas par se utt gaya," 
Numbers10:12 tab israaelee seenaai ke jangal men se nikalakar prasthan karake nikale aur badal paran nam jangal men tthar gaya. 
Numbers10:13 unaka prasthan yahova kee us agyaa ke anusar jo us ne moosa ko dee thee arambh hua. 
Numbers10:14 aur sab se pahale to yahoodiyon kee chhavanee ke jhnde ka prasthan hua, aur ve dal bandhakar chale aur un ka senapati ammeenadab ka putra nahashaen tha." 
Numbers10:15 aur issakariyon ke gotra ka senapati sooar ka putra natanel tha. 
Numbers10:16 aur jaboolooniyon ke gotra ka senapati helon ka putra aeleeab tha. 
Numbers10:17 tab nivas utara gaya, aur geshareniyon aur marariyon ne jo nivas ko uttate the prasthan kiya." 
Numbers10:18 fir rooben kee chhavanee jhnde ka kooch hua, aur ve bhee dal banakar chale aur unaka senapati shadeur ka putra aeleeshoor tha." 
Numbers10:19 aur shaimoniyon ke gotra ka senapati sooreeshaai ka putra shaloomeeael tha. 
Numbers10:20 aur gaadiyon ke gotra ka senapati dooael ka putra aelyasap tha. 
Numbers10:21 tab kahatiyon ne paavitra vastuon ko uttaae huae prasthan kiya, aur unake pahunchane tak geshareaniyon aur marariyon ne nivas ko khda kar diya." 
Numbers10:22 fir aepraaimiyon kee chhavanee ke jhnde ka kooch hua, aur ve bhee dal banakar chale aur unaka senapati ammeehood ka putra aeleeshaama tha." 
Numbers10:23 aur manashshoiyon ke gotra ko senapaati padasoor ka putra gamleeael tha. 
Numbers10:24 aur binyameeaniyon ke gotra ka senapati gidonee ka putra abeedan tha. 
Numbers10:25 fir daniyon kee chhavanee jo sab chhavaniyon ke peechhe thee, usake jhnde ka prasthan hua, aur ve bhee dal bana kar chale aur unaka senapaati ammeeshaai ka putra akheeajar tha." 
Numbers10:26 aur ashoriyon ke gotra ka senapati okran ka putra pajeeael tha. 
Numbers10:27 aur naptaaliyon ke gotra ka senapati aenan ka putra aheera tha. 
Numbers10:28 israaelee isee prakar apane apane dalon ke anusar prasthan karate, aur age baddha karate the." 
Numbers10:29 aur moosa ne apane sasur rooael midhanee ke putra hobab se kaha, ham log us sthan kee yatra karate haain jisake vishay men yahova ne kaha haai, ki maain use tum ko doonga so too bhee hamare sang chal, aur ham teree bhlai karenge kyonaki yahova ne israael ke vishay men bhla hee kaha haai." 
Numbers10:30 hobab ne use uttr diya, ki maain naheen jaunga maain apane desh aur kuttumbaiyon men lautt jaunga." 
Numbers10:31 fir moosa ne kaha, ham ko n chhod, kyonki jangal men kahan kahan dera khda karana chaahiye, yah tujhe hee maloom haai, too hamare liye ankhon ka kam dena." 
Numbers10:32 aur yaadi too hamare sang chale, to nishchay jo bhlai yahova ham se karega usee ke anusar ham bhee tujh se vaaisa hee karenge.." 
Numbers10:33 fir israaeliyon ne yahova ke parvat se prasthan karake teen din kee yatra kee aur un teenon dinon ke marga men yahova kee vacha ka sandook unake liye vishraam ka sthan ddoonddhta hua unake age age chalata raha. 
Numbers10:34 aur jab ve chhavanee ke sthan se prasthan karate the tab din bhr yahova ka badal unake upar chhaya rahata tha. 
Numbers10:35 aur jab jab sandook ka prasthan hota tha tab tab moosa yah kaha karata tha, ki he yahova, ut, aur tere shatra tittr bittr ho jaae, aur tere baairee tere samhane se bhag jaaen." 
Numbers10:36 aur jab jab vah tthar jata tha tab tab moosa kaha karata tha, ki he yahova, hajaron-hajar israaeliyon men lauttkar a ja.." 
Numbers11:1 fir ve log budbudane aur yahova ke sunate bura kahane lage nidan yahova ne suna, aur usaka kop bhdk utta, aur yahova kee ag unake madhy jal uttee, aur chhavanee ke aek kinare se bhsm karane lagee." 
Numbers11:2 tab moosa ke pas akar chillaae aur moosa ne yahova se praarthna kee, tab vah ag bujh gai," 
Numbers11:3 aur us sthan ka nam tabera pada, kyonki yahova kee ag un men jal uttee thee.." 
Numbers11:4 fir jo milee-julee bheed unake sath thee vah kamukata karane lagee aur israaelee bhee fir rone aur kahane lage, ki hamen mans khane ko kaun dega." 
Numbers11:5 hamen ve machhaliyan smaran haain jo ham misr men sentament khaya karate the, aur ve kheere, aur khrabooje, aur gandane, aur pyaj, aur lahasun bhee" 
Numbers11:6 parantu ab hamara jee ghabara gaya haai, yahan par is manna ko chhod aur kuchh bhee dekh naheen padta." 
Numbers11:7 manna to dhaaniye ke saman tha, aur usaka rang roop motee ka sa tha." 
Numbers11:8 log idhar udhar jakar use battorate, aur chakkee men peesate va okhlee men koottte the, fir tasale men pakate, aur usake faulake banate the aur usaka svad tel men bane huae puae ka sa tha." 
Numbers11:9 aur rat ko chhavanee men os padtee thee tab usake sath manna bhee girata tha. 
Numbers11:10 aur moosa ne sab gharanon ke adamiyon ko apane apane dere ke dar par rote suna aur yahova ka kop atyant bhdka, aur moosa ko bhee bura maloom hua." 
Numbers11:11 tab moosa ne yahova se kaha, too apane das se yah bura vyavahar kyon karata haai? aur kya karan haai ki maain ne teree drashtti men anugrah naheen paya, ki too ne in sab logon ka bhar mujh par dala haai?" 
Numbers11:12 kya ye sab log mere hee kokh men pade the? kya maain hee ne unako utpann kiya, jo too mujh se kahata haai, ki jaaise pita doodha peete balak ko apanee god men uttaae uttaae firata haai, vaaise hee maain in logon ko apanee god men uttakar us desh men le jau, jisake dene kee shapath too ne unake poorvajon se khai haai?" 
Numbers11:13 mujhe itana mans kahan se mile ki in sab logon ko doon? ye to yah kah kahakar mere pas ro rahe haai, ki too hame mans khane ko de." 
Numbers11:14 maain akela in sab logon ka bhar naheen sambhal sakata, kayonki yah meree shaaktai ke bahar haai." 
Numbers11:15 aur jo tujhe mere sath yahee vyavahar karana haai, to mujh par tera itana anugrah ho, ki too mere praan aekadam le le, jis se maain apanee durdasha n dekhne paun.." 
Numbers11:16 yahova ne moosa se kaha, israaelee puraaniyon men se sattr aeese puroosh mere pas ikatthe kar, jinako too janata haai ki ve praja ke puraniye aur unake saradar haai ki ve praja ke puraniye aur unake saradar haain aur milapavale tamboo ke pas le a, ki ve tere sath yahan khde hon." 
Numbers11:17 tab maain utarakar tujh se vahan baten karoonga aur jo atma tujh men haai us men se kuchh lekar un men samavaunga aur ve in logon ka bhar tere sang uttaae rahenge, aur tujhe usako akele uttana n padega." 
Numbers11:18 aur logon se kah, kal ke liye apane ko paavitra karo, tab tumhen mans khane ko milega kyonki tum yahova ke sunate huae yah kah kahakar roae ho, ki hamen mans khane ko kaun dega? ham misr hee men bhle the. so yahova tum ko mans khane ko dega, aur tum khana." 
Numbers11:19 fir tum aek din, va do, va panch, va das, va bees din hee nahee," 
Numbers11:20 parantu maheene bhr use khate rahoge, jab tak vah tumhare nathnon se nikalane n lage aur tum ko us se gharana n ho jaa, kayonki tum logon ne yahova ko jo tumhare madhy men haai tuchchh jana haai, aur usake samhane yah kahakar roae ho, ki ham misr se kyon nikal aae?" 
Numbers11:21 fir moosa ne kaha, jin logon ke beech maain hoon un men se chh: lakh to pyade hee haain aur too ne kaha haai, ki maain unhen itana mans doonga, ki ve maheene bhr use khate hee rahenge." 
Numbers11:22 kya ve sab bhed-bakaree gaya-baail unake liye mare jaa, ki unako mans mile? va kya samudra kee sab machhaliyan unake liye ikatthee kee jaae, ki unako mans mile?" 
Numbers11:23 yahova ne moosa se kaha, kya yahova ka hath chhotta ho gaya haai? ab too dekhega, ki mera vachan jo maain ne tujh se kaha haai vah poora hota haai ki naheen." 
Numbers11:24 tab moosa ne bahar jakar praja ke logon ko yahova kee baten kah sunai aur unake puraaniyon men se sattr puroosh ikatthe karake tamboo ke charon or khde kiae. 
Numbers11:25 tab yahova badal men hokar utara aur us ne moosa se baten kee, aur jo atma us men thee us men se lekar un sattr puraaniyon men samava diya aur jab vah atma un men ai tab ve naboovat karane lage. parantu fir aur kabhee n kee." 
Numbers11:26 parantu do manushy chhavanee men rah gaae the, jis men se aek ka nam aeladad aur doosare ka medad tha, un men bhee atma ai ye bhee unheen men se the jinake nam likh liye gaye the, par tamboo ke pas n gaae the, aur ve chhavanee hee men naboovat karane lage." 
Numbers11:27 tab kisee javan ne daud kar moosa ko batalaya, ki aeladad aur medad chhavanee men naboovat kar rahe haain." 
Numbers11:28 tab noon ka putra yahoshoo, jo moosa ka tthalua aur usake chune huae veeron men se tha, us ne moosa se kaha, he mere svamee moosa, unako rok de." 
Numbers11:29 moosa ne un se kaha, kya too mere karan jalata haai? bhla hota ki yahova kee saree praja ke log nabee hote, aur yahova apana atma un sabhon men samava deta!" 
Numbers11:30 tab fir moosa israael ke puraniyon samet chhavanee men chala gaya. 
Numbers11:31 tab yahova kee or se aek badee andhaee ai, aur vah samudra se batteren udake chhavanee par aur usake charon or itanee le ai, ki ve idhar udhar aek din ke marga tak boomi par do hath ke lagabhg unche tak chha gaae." 
Numbers11:32 aur logon ne uttkar us din bhr aur rat bhr, aur doosare din bhee din bhr batteron ko battorate rahe jis ne kam se kam battora us ne das homer battora aur unhon ne unhen chhavanee ke charon or faaila diya." 
Numbers11:33 mans unake munh hee men tha, aur ve use khane n paae the, ki yahova ka kop un par bhdk utta, aur us ne unako bahut badee mar se mara." 
Numbers11:34 aur us sthan ka nam kibraethttava pada, kyonaki jin logon ne kamukata kee thee unako vahan mittee dee gai." 
Numbers11:35 fir israaelee kibraethttava se prasthan karake haserot men pahunche, aur vaheen rahe.." 
Numbers12:1 moosa ne to aek kooshaee sree ke sath byah kar liya tha. so maariyam aur haroon usakee us byaahita kooshaee sree ke karan usakee ninda karane lage 
Numbers12:2 unhon ne kaha, kya yahova ne keval moosa hee ke sath baten kee haain? kya us ne ham se bhee baten naheen keen? unakee yah bat yahova ne sunee." 
Numbers12:3 moosa to prathvee bhr ke rahane vale manushyon se bahut adhaik namra svabhav ka tha. 
Numbers12:4 so yahova ne aekaaek moosa aur haroon aur maariyam se kaha, tum teenon milapavale tamboo ke pas nikal ao. tab ve teenon nikal aae." 
Numbers12:5 tab yahova ne badal ke khmbhe men utarakar tamboo ke dar par khda hokar haroon aur maariyam ko bulaya so ve donon usake pas nikal aae. 
Numbers12:6 tab yahova ne kaha, meree baten suno: yaadi tum men koi nabee ho, to us par maain yahova darshan ke dara apane ap ko pragatt karoonga, va svapn men us se baten karoonga." 
Numbers12:7 parantu mera das moosa aeesa naheen haai vah to mere sab gharanon me vishvas yogy haai. 
Numbers12:8 us se maain gupt reeati se nahee, parantu amhane samhane aur pratyaksha hokar baten karata hoon aur vah yahova ka svaroop niharane pata haai. so tum mere das moosa kee ninda karate huae kyon naheen dre?" 
Numbers12:9 tab yahova ka kop un par bhdka, aur vah chala gaya" 
Numbers12:10 tab vah badal tamboo ke upar se utt gaya, aur mariyam koddh se him ke saman shvet ho gai. aur haroon ne mariyam kee or draashtti kee, aur dekha, ki vah koddhin ho gai haai." 
Numbers12:11 tab haroon moosa se kahane laga, he mere prabhu, ham donon ne jo moorkhta kee varan pap bhee kiya, yah pap ham par n lagane de." 
Numbers12:12 aur maariyam ko us mare huae ke saman n rahane de, jisakee deh apanee man ke pett se nikalate hee adhagalee ho." 
Numbers12:13 so moosa ne yah kahakar yahova kee dohai dee, he ishvar, krapa kar, aur usako changa kara." 
Numbers12:14 yahova ne moosa se kaha, yadi usaka pita usake munh par tooka hee hota, to kya sat din tak vah lajjait n rahatee? so vah sat din tak chhavanee se bahar band rahe, usake bad vah fir bheetar ane paae." 
Numbers12:15 so maariyam sat din tak chhavanee se bahar band rahee, aur jab tak maariyam fir ane n pai tab tak logon ne prasthan n kiya." 
Numbers12:16 usake bad unhon ne haserot se prasthan karake paran nam jangal men apane dere khde kie.. 
Numbers13:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers13:2 kanan desh jise maain israaeliyon ko deta hoon usaka bhed lene ke liye purooshaen ko bheja ve unake pitaron ke prati gotra ka aek pradhaan puroosh hon. 
Numbers13:3 yahova se yah agyaa pakar moosa ne aeese purooshaen ko paran jangal se bhej diya, jo sab ke sab israaeliyon ke pradhaan the." 
Numbers13:4 unake nam ye haai, arthata rooben ke gotra men se jakakoor ka putra shammoo" 
Numbers13:5 shaimon ke gotra men se horee ka putra shaapata 
Numbers13:6 yahooda ke gotra men se yapunne ka putra kaleba 
Numbers13:7 issakar ke gotra men se yosep ka putra yigala 
Numbers13:8 aepraaim ke gotra men se noon ka putra hosho 
Numbers13:9 binyameen ke gotra men se rapoo ka putra palatee 
Numbers13:10 jabooloon ke gotra men se sodee ka putra gaeeaela 
Numbers13:11 yoosufa vanshaiyon me, manashsho ke gotra men se soosee ka putra gaee" 
Numbers13:12 dan ke gotra men se gamallee ka putra ammeeaela 
Numbers13:13 ashor ke gotra men se meekaael ka putra satoora 
Numbers13:14 naptalee ke gotra men se vopsee ka putra nahoobee 
Numbers13:15 gad ke gotra men se makee ka putra gooaela. 
Numbers13:16 jin purooshaen ko moosa ne desh ka bhed lene ke liye bheja tha unake nam ye hee haain. aur noon ke putra hosho ka nam us ne yahoshoo rakha. 
Numbers13:17 un ko kanan desh ke bhed lene ko bhejate samay moosa ne kaha, idhar se, arthata daakshian desh hokar jao," 
Numbers13:18 aur pahadee desh men jakar us desh ko dekh lo ki kaaisa haai, aur us men base huae logon ko bhee dekho ki ve balavana haain va nirbal, thode haain va bahut," 
Numbers13:19 aur jis desh men ve base huae haain so kaaisa haai, achchha va bura, aur ve kaaisee kaaisee bastaiyon men base huae haai, aur tambuon men rahate haain va gaddh va kilon men rahate haai," 
Numbers13:20 aur vah desh kaaisa haai, upaja haai va banjar haai, aur us men vraksha haain va naheen. aur tum hiyav bandho chalo, aur us desh kee upaj men se kuchh lete bhee ana. vah samay pahalee pakkee dakhon ka tha." 
Numbers13:21 so ve chal dia, aur seen nam jangal se le rahob tak, jo hamat ke marga men haai, sare desh ko dekhbhalakar usaka bhed liya." 
Numbers13:22 so ve daakshian desh hokar chale, aur hebraen tak gaae vahan aheeman, shoshau, aur talmaai nam anakavanshaee rahate the. hebraen to misr ke soan se sat varsha pahile basaya gaya tha." 
Numbers13:23 tab ve aeshakol nam nale tak gaa, aur vahan se aek dalee dakhon ke guchchhe samet tod lee, aur do manushy us aek lattee par lattkaae huae utta le chale gaae aur ve anaron aur anjeeron men se bhee kuchh kuchh le aae." 
Numbers13:24 israaelee vahan se jo dakhon ka guchchha tod le aae the, is karan us sthan ka nam aeshakol nala rakha gaya." 
Numbers13:25 chalees din ke bad ve us desh ka bhed lekar lautt aae. 
Numbers13:26 aur paran jangal ke kadesh nam sthan men moosa aur haroon aur israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ke pas pahunche aur unako aur saree mandlee ko sandesha diya, aur us desh ke fal unako dikhaae." 
Numbers13:27 unhon ne moosa se yah kahakar varnn kiya, ki jis desh men too ne ham ko bheja tha us men ham gae us men sachamuch doodha aur madha kee dhaaraen bahatee haai, aur usakee upaj men se yahee haai." 
Numbers13:28 parantu us desh ke nivasee balavana haai, aur usake nagar gaddhvale haain aur bahut bade haain aur fir ham ne vahan anakavanashaiyon ko bhee dekha." 
Numbers13:29 daakshian desh men to amalekee base huae haain aur pahadee desh men hittee, yaboosee, aur aemoree rahate haain aur samudra ke kinare kinare aur yaradan nadee ke tatt par kananee base huae haain." 
Numbers13:30 par kaleb ne moosa ke samhane praja ke logon ko chup karane kee manasa se kaha, ham abhee chaddhke us desh ko apana kar len kyonaki ni:sandeh ham men aeesa karane kee shaaktai haai." 
Numbers13:31 par jo puroosh usake sang gaae the unhon ne kaha, un logon par chaddhne kee shaaktai ham men naheen haai kyonki ve ham se balavana haain." 
Numbers13:32 aur unhon ne israaeliyon ke samhane us desh kee jisaka bhed unhon ne liya tha yah kahakar ninda bhee kee, ki vah desh jisaka bhed lene ko ham gaye the aeesa haai, jo apane nivaasiyon ko nigal jata haai aur jitane puroosh ham ne us men dekhe ve sab ke sab bade deel daul ke haain." 
Numbers13:33 fir ham ne vahan napeelon ko, arthata napeelee jaativale anakavanshaiyon ko dekha aur ham apanee drashtti men to unake samhane ttddai ke saman dikhai padte the, aur aeese hee unakee drashtti men maloom padte the.." 
Numbers14:1 tab saree mandlee chilla uttee aur rat bhr ve log rote hee rahe. 
Numbers14:2 aur sab israaelee moosa aur haroon par budbudane lage aur saree mandlee us ne kahane lagee, ki bhla hota ki ham misr hee men mar jate! va is jangal hee men mar jate!" 
Numbers14:3 aur yahova ham ko us desh men le jakar kyon talavar se maravana chahata haai? hamaree striayan aur balabachche to loott men chalen jaaenge kya hamare liye achchha naheen ki ham misr desh ko lautt jaaen? 
Numbers14:4 fir ve apas men kahane lage, ao, ham kisee ko apana pradhaan bana le, aur misr ko lautt chalen." 
Numbers14:5 tab moosa aur haroon israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ke samhane munh ke bal gire. 
Numbers14:6 aur noon ka putra yahoshoo aur yapunne ka putra kaalib, jo desh ke bhed lenevalon men se the, apane apane vasr faadkar," 
Numbers14:7 israaeliyon kee saree mandlee se kahane lage, ki jis desh ka bhed lene ko ham idhar udhar ghoom kar aae haai, vah atyant uttm desh haai." 
Numbers14:8 yaadi yahova ham se prasann ho, to ham ko us desh me, jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai, pahunchakar use hame de dega." 
Numbers14:9 keval itana karo ki tum yahova ke virooddh balava n karo aur n to us desh ke logon se dro, kyonaki ve hamaree rottee ttharenge chhaya unake upar se hatt gai haai, aur yahova hamare sang haai un se n dro." 
Numbers14:10 tab saree mandlee chilla uttee, ki inako patthravah karo. tab yahova ka tej sab israaeliyon par prakashaman hua.." 
Numbers14:11 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, ve log kab tak mera tiraskar karate rahenge? aur mere sab ashcharyakarma dekhne par bhee kab tak mujh par vishvas n karenge?" 
Numbers14:12 maain unhen maree se maroonga, aur unake nij bhag se unhen nikal doonga, aur tujh se aek jati upajaunga jo un se badee aur balavant hogee." 
Numbers14:13 moosa ne yahova se kaha, tab to misree jinake madhy men se too apanee samathrya dikhakar un logon ko nikal le aya haai yah sunenge," 
Numbers14:14 aur is desh ke nivaasiyon se kahenge. unhon ne to yah suna haai, ki too jo yahova haai in logon ke madhy men rahata haai aur pratyaksha dikhai deta haai, aur tera badal unake upar tthara rahata haai, aur too din ko badal ke khmbhe me, aur rat ko agnai ke khmbhe men hokar inake age age chala karata haai." 
Numbers14:15 isaliye yaadi too in logon ko aek hee bar meen mar dale, to jin jatiyon ne teree keetira sunee haai ve kahengee," 
Numbers14:16 ki yahova un logon ko us desh men jise us ne unhen dene kee shapath khai thee pahuncha n saka, is karan us ne unhen jangal men ghaat kar dala haai." 
Numbers14:17 so ab prabhu kee samathrya kee maahima tere is kahane ke anusar ho," 
Numbers14:18 ki yahova kop karane men dhaeerajavant aur aati karoonamay haai, aur adharma aur aparadha ka kshama karanevala haai, parantu vah doshaee ko kisee prakar se nirdosh n ttharaaega, aur poorvajon ke adharma ka dand unake betto, aur poto, aur parapoton ko deta haai." 
Numbers14:19 ab in logon ke adharma ko apanee badee karoona ke anusar, aur jaaise too misr se lekar yahan tak kshama karata raha haai vaaise hee ab bhee kshama kar de." 
Numbers14:20 yahova ne kaha, teree binatee ke anusar maain kshama karata hoon" 
Numbers14:21 parantu mere jeevan kee shapath sachamuch saree prathvee yahova kee mahima se paaripoorn ho jaaegee 
Numbers14:22 un sab logon ne jinhon ne meree maahima misr desh men aur jangal men dekhee, aur mere kiae huae ashcharyakamorn ko dekhne par bhee das bar meree pareeksha kee, aur meree baten naheen manee," 
Numbers14:23 isaliye jis desh ke vishay maain ne unake poorvajon se shapath khai, usako ve kabhee dekhne n paaenge arthata jitanon ne mera apaman kiya haai un men se koi bhee use dekhne n paaega." 
Numbers14:24 parantu is karan se ki mere das kaalib ke sath aur hee atma haai, aur us ne pooree reeati se mera anukaran kiya haai, maain usako us desh men jis men vah ho aya haai pahunchaunga, aur usaka vansh us desh ka adhaikaree hoga." 
Numbers14:25 amalekee aur kananee log tarai men rahate haai, so kal tum ghoomakar prasthan karo, aur lal samudra ke marga se jangal men jao.." 
Numbers14:26 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers14:27 yah buree mandlee mujh par budbudatee rahatee haai, usako maain kab tak sahata rahoon? israaelee jo mujh par budbudate rahate haai, unaka yah budbudana maain ne to suna haai." 
Numbers14:28 so un se kah, ki yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki mere jeevan kee shapath jo baten tum ne mere sunate kahee haai, ni:sandeh maain usee ke anusar tumhare sath vyavahar karoonga." 
Numbers14:29 tumharee lothen isee jangal men padee rahengee aur tum sab men se bees varsha kee va us se adhaik avastha ke jitane gine gaae the, aur mujh par budbudate the," 
Numbers14:30 us men se yapunne ke putra kaalib aur noon ke putra yahoshoo ko chhod koi bhee us desh men n jane paega, jisake vishay maain ne shapath khai haai ki tum ko us men basaunga." 
Numbers14:31 parantu tumhare balabachche jinake vishay tum ne kaha haai, ki ye loott men chale jaaenge, unako maain us desh men pahuncha doonga aur ve us desh ko jan lenge jis ko tum ne tuchchh jana haai." 
Numbers14:32 parantu tum logon kee lothen isee jangal men padee rahengee. 
Numbers14:33 aur jab tak tumharee lothen jangal men n gal jaaen tak tak, arthata chalees varsha tak, tumhare balabachche jangal men tumhare vyaabhaichar ka fal bhogate huae charavahee karate rahenge." 
Numbers14:34 jitane din tum us desh ka bhed lete rahe, arthata chalees din unakee ginatee ke anusar, din peechhe us varsha, arthata chalees varsha tak tum apane adharma ka dand uttaae rahoge, tab tum jan loge ki mera virodha kya haai." 
Numbers14:35 maain yahova yah kah chuka hoo, ki is buree mandlee ke log jo mere virooddh ikatthe huae haain usee jangal men mar mittenge aur ni:sandeh aeesa hee karoonga bhee." 
Numbers14:36 tab jin purooshaen ko moosa ne us desh ke bhed lene ke liye bheja tha, aur unhon ne lauttkar us desh kee namadharai karake saree mandlee ko kudkudane ke liye ubhara tha," 
Numbers14:37 us desh kee ve namadharai karanevale puroosh yahova ke marane se usake samhane mar gaye. 
Numbers14:38 parantu desh ke bhed lenevale purooshaen men se noon ka putra yahoshoo aur yapunne ka putra kaalib donon jeeavit rahe. 
Numbers14:39 tab moosa ne ye baten sab israaeliyon ko kah sunai aur ve bahut vilap karane lage. 
Numbers14:40 aur ve bihan ko savere uttkar yah kahate huae pahad kee chottee par chaddhne lage, ki ham ne pap kiya haai parantu ab taaiyar haai, aur us sthan ko jaaenge jisake vishay yahova ne vachan diya tha." 
Numbers14:41 tab moosa ne kaha, tum yahova kee agyaa ka ullanghan kyon karate ho? yah sufal n hoga." 
Numbers14:42 yahova tumhare madhy men naheen haai, mat chaddho, naheen to shatrauon se har jaoge." 
Numbers14:43 vahan tumhare age amalekee aur kananee log haai, so tum talavar se mare jaoge tum yahova ko chhodkar fir gaae ho, isaaliye vah tumhare sang naheen rahega." 
Numbers14:44 parantu ve ddhttiai karake pahad kee chottee par chaddh gaa, parantu yahova kee vacha ka sandook, aur moosa, chhavanee se n hatte." 
Numbers14:45 ab amalekee aur kananee jo us pahad par rahate the un par chaddh aa, aur horma tak unako marate chale aae.." 
Numbers15:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers15:2 israaeliyon se kah, ki jab tum apane nivas ke desh men pahuncho, jo maain tumhe deta hoo," 
Numbers15:3 aur yahova ke liye kya homabali, kya melabaali, koi havy chaddhavo, chahe vah vishosh mannat pooree karane ka ho chahe svechchhabaali ka ho, chahe tumhare niyat samayon men ka ho, ya vah chahe gaya-baail chahe bhed-bakaariyon men ka ho, jis se yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandha ho" 
Numbers15:4 tab us homabaali va melabali ke sang bhed ke bachche peechhe yahova ke liye chauthai hin tel se sana hua aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida annabali karake chaddhana," 
Numbers15:5 aur chauthai hin dakhmadha argha karake dena. 
Numbers15:6 aur meddhe peechhe tihai hin tel se sana hua aepa ka do dasavan ansh maaida annabali karake chaddhana 
Numbers15:7 aur usaka argha yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha denevala tihai din dakhmadha dena. 
Numbers15:8 aur jab too yahova ko homabaali va kisee vishosh mannat pooree karane ke liye baali va melabali karake bachhda chaddhaa," 
Numbers15:9 tab bachhde ka chaddhanevala usake sang adha hin tel se sana hua aepa ka teen dasavan ansh maaida annabali karake chaddhaae. 
Numbers15:10 aur usaka argha adha hin dakhmadha chaddhaa, vah yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha denevala havy hoga." 
Numbers15:11 aek aek bachhde, va meddhe, va bhed ke bachche, va bakaree ke bachche ke sath isee reeti chaddhava chaddhaya jaae." 
Numbers15:12 tumhare balipashuuon kee jitanee ginatee ho, usee ginatee ke anusar aek aek ke sath aeesa hee kiya karana." 
Numbers15:13 jitane deshaee hon ve yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha denevala havy chaddhate samay ye kam isee reeti se kiya karen. 
Numbers15:14 aur yaadi koi paradeshaee tumhare sang rahata ho, va tumharee kisee peeddhee men tumhare beech koi rahanevala ho, aur vah yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha denevala havy chaddhana chahe, to jis prakar tum karoge usee prakar vah bhee kare." 
Numbers15:15 mandlee ke liye, arthata tumhare aur tumhare sang rahanevale paradeshaee donon ke liye aek hee vidhai ho tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men yah sada kee vidhai tthare, ki jaaise tum ho vaaise hee paradeshaee bhee yahova ke liye ttharata haai." 
Numbers15:16 tumhare aur tumhare sang rahanevale paradeshaiyon ke liye aek hee vyavastha aur aek hee niyam haai.. 
Numbers15:17 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers15:18 israaeliyon ko mera yah vachan suna, ki jab tum us desh men pahuncho jahan maain tum ko liye jata hoo," 
Numbers15:19 aur us desh kee upaj ka ann khao, tab yahova ke liye uttai hui bhentt chaddhaya karo." 
Numbers15:20 apane paahile goondho huae atte kee aek papadee uttai hui bhentt karake yahova ke liye chaddhana jaaise tum khlihan men se uttai hui bhentt chaddhaoge vaaise hee usako bhee uttaya karana. 
Numbers15:21 apanee peeddhee peeddhee men apane paahile goondho huae atte men se yahova ko uttai hui bhentt diya karana.. 
Numbers15:22 fir jab tum in sab agyaaon men se jinhen yahova ne moosa ko diya haai kisee ka ullanghan bool se karo,"
