Numbers15:23 arthata jis din se yahova agyaa dene laga, aur age kee tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men us din se us ne jitanee agyaaaen moosa ke dara dee haai," 
Numbers15:24 us men yaadi bool se kiya hua pap mandlee ke bina jane hua ho, to saree mandlee yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha denevala homabali karake ek bachhda, aur usake sang niyam ke anusar usaka annabali aur argha chaddhaa, aur papabali karake ek bakara chaddhae." 
Numbers15:25 jab yajak israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ke liye praayaashchaitt kare, aur unakee kshama kee jaaegee kyonaki unaka pap bool se hua, aur unhon ne apanee bool ke liye apana chaddhava, arthata yahova ke liye havy aur apana papabali usake samhane chaddhaya." 
Numbers15:26 so israaeliyon kee saree mandlee ka, aur usake beech rahanevale paradeshaee ka bhee, vah pap kshama kiya jaaega, kyonki vah sab logon ke anajan men hua." 
Numbers15:27 fir yadi koi praanee bool se pap kare, to vah aek varsha kee aek bakaree papabali karake chaddhaae." 
Numbers15:28 aur yajak bool se pap karanevale praanee ke liye yahova ke samhane praayashchaitt kare so is praayaashchaitt ke karan usaka vah pap kshama kiya jaaega. 
Numbers15:29 jo koi bool se kuchh kare, chahe vah paradeshaee hokar rahata ho, sab ke liye tumharee aek hee vyavastha ho." 
Numbers15:30 parantu kya deshaee kya paradeshae, jo praanee ddhttiai se kuchh kare, vah yahova ka anadar karanevala ttharega, aur vah praanee apane logon men se nash kiya jaae." 
Numbers15:31 vah jo yahova ka vachan tuchchh janata haai, aur usakee agyaa ka ttalanevala haai, isaaliye vah praanee nishchay nash kiya jaae usaka adharma usee ke sir padega.." 
Numbers15:32 jab israaelee jangal men rahate the, un dinon aek manushy vishraam ke din lakadee beenata hua mila." 
Numbers15:33 aur jinako vah lakadee beenata hua mila, ve usako moosa aur haroon, aur saree mandlee ke pas le gaae." 
Numbers15:34 unhon ne usako havalat men rakha, kyonki aeese manushy se kya karana chahiye vah prakatt naheen kiya gaya tha." 
Numbers15:35 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, vah manushy nishchay mar dala jaae saree mandlee ke log chhavanee ke bahar us par patthravah karen." 
Numbers15:36 so jaaisa yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee usee ke anusar saree mandlee ke logon ne usako chhavanee se bahar le jakar patthravah kiya, aur vah mar gaya." 
Numbers15:37 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers15:38 israaeliyon se kah, ki apanee peeddhee peeddhee men apane vasren ke kor par jhalar lagaya karana, aur aek aek kor kee jhalar par aek neela faeeta lagaya karana" 
Numbers15:39 aur vah tumhare liye aeesee jhalar tthare, jis se jab jab tum use dekho tab tab yahova kee saree agyaaaen tum ho smaran a jaaen aur tum unaka palan karo, aur tum apane apane man aur apanee apanee drashtti ke vash men hokar vyaabhaichar n karate firo jaaise karate aae ho." 
Numbers15:40 parantu tum yahova kee sab agyaaon ko smaran karake unaka palan karo, aur apane parameshvar ke liye paavitra bano." 
Numbers15:41 maain yahova tumhara parameshvar hoo, jo tumhe misr desh se nikal le aya ki tumhara parameshvar ttharoon maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon.." 
Numbers16:1 korah jo levee ka parapota, kahat ka pota, aur yisahar ka putra tha, vah aeleeab ke putra datan aur abeeram, aur pelet ke putra on," 
Numbers16:2 in teenon roobeaniyon se milakar mandlee ke addhai sau pradhaan, jo sabhasad aur namee the, unako sang liya" 
Numbers16:3 aur ve moosa aur haroon ke virooddh utt khde hua, aur un se kahane lage, tum ne bahut kiya, ab bas karo kyonki saree mandlee ka aek aek manushy pavitra haai, aur yahova unake madhy men rahata haai isaaliye tum yahova kee mandlee men unche padavale kyon ban baaitte ho?" 
Numbers16:4 yah sunakar moosa apane munh ke bal gira 
Numbers16:5 fir us ne korah aur usakee saree mandlee se kaha, ki bihan ko yahova dikhla dega ki usaka kaun haai, aur paavitra kaun haai, aur usako apane sameep bula lega jisako vah ap chun lega usee ko apane sameep bula bhee lega." 
Numbers16:6 isaliye, he korah, tum apanee saree mandlee samet yah karo, arthata apana apana dhoopadan tteek karo" 
Numbers16:7 aur kal un men ag rakhkar yahova ke samhane dhoop dena, tab jisako yahova chun le vahee paavitra ttharega. he leviyo, tum bhee badee badee baten karate ho, ab bas karo." 
Numbers16:8 fir moosa ne korah se kaha, he leviyo, suno," 
Numbers16:9 kya yah tumhen chhottee bat jan padtee haai, ki israael ke parameshvar ne tum ko israael kee mandlee se alag karake apane nivas kee sevakai karane, aur mandlee ke samhane khde hokar usakee bhee seva tthal karane ke liye apane sameep bula liya haai" 
Numbers16:10 aur tujhe aur tere sab levee bhaiyon ko bhee apane sameep bula liya haai? fir bhee tum yajak pad ke bhee khojee ho? 
Numbers16:11 aur isee karan too ne apanee saree mandlee ko yahova ke virooddh ikatthee kiya haai haroon kaun haai ki tum us par budbudate ho? 
Numbers16:12 fir moosa ne aeleeab ke putra datan aur abeeram ko bulava bheja aur unhon ne kaha, ham tere pas naheen aaenge." 
Numbers16:13 kya yah aek chhottee bat haai, ki too ham ko aeese desh se jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai isaliye nikal laya haai, ki hamen jangal men mar dale, fir kya too hamare upar pradhaan bhee banakar adhaikar jatata haai?" 
Numbers16:14 fir too hamen aeese desh men jahan doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haain naheen pahunchaya, aur n hamen kheton aur dakh kee bariyon ke aadhaikaree kiya. kya too in logon kee ankhon men dhooli dalega? ham to naheen aaenge." 
Numbers16:15 tab moosa ka kop bahut bhdk utta, aur us ne yahova se kaha, un logon kee bhentt kee or drashtti n kara. maain ne to un se aek gadaha bhee naheen liya, aur n un men se kisee kee haani kee haai." 
Numbers16:16 tab moosa ne korah se kaha, kal too apanee saree mandlee ko sath lekar haroon ke sath yahova ke samhane hajir hona" 
Numbers16:17 aur tum sab apana apana dhoopadan lekar un men dhoop dena, fir apana apana dhoopadan jo sab samet addhai sau honge yahova ke samhane le jana vishosh karake too aur haroon apana apana dhoopadan le jana." 
Numbers16:18 so unhon ne apana apana dhoopadan lekar aur un men ag rakhkar un par dhoop dala aur moosa aur haroon ke sath milapavale tamboo ke dar par khde hue. 
Numbers16:19 aur korah ne saree mandlee ko unake virooddh milapavale tamboo ke dar par ikattha kar liya. tab yahova ka tej saree mandlee ko dikhai diya.. 
Numbers16:20 tab yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers16:21 us mandlee ke beech men se alag ho jao. ki maain unhen pal bhr men bhsm kar daloon. 
Numbers16:22 tab ve munh ke bal girake kahane lage, he ishvar, he sab praaanaiyon ke atmaon ke parameshvar, kya aek puroosh ke pap ke karan tera krodha saree mandlee par hoga?" 
Numbers16:23 yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers16:24 mandlee ke logon se kah, ki korah, datan, aur abeeram ke tambuon ke asapas se hatt jao." 
Numbers16:25 tab moosa uttkar datan aur abeeram ke pas gaya aur israaeliyon ke vraddh log usake peechhe peechhe gaae. 
Numbers16:26 aur us ne mandlee ke logon se kaha, tum un dushtt manushyon ke deron ke pas se hatt jao, aur unakee koi vastu n chooo, kaheen aeesa n ho ki tum bhee unake sab papon men fansakar mitt jao." 
Numbers16:27 yah sun ve korah, datan, aur abeeram ke tambuon ke asapas se hatt gaae parantu datan aur abeeram nikalakar apanee paatnaiyo, bentto, aur balabachchon samet apane apane dere ke dar par khde hue." 
Numbers16:28 tab moosa ne kaha, is se tum jan loge ki yahova ne mujhe bheja haai ki yah sab kam karoo, kyonki maain ne apanee ichchha se kuchh naheen kiya." 
Numbers16:29 yaadi un manushyon kee mratyu aur sab manushyon ke saman ho, aur unaka dand sab manushyon ke saman ho, tab janon ki maain yahova ka bheja hua naheen hoon." 
Numbers16:30 parantu yadi yahova apanee anokhee shaktai prakatt kare, aur prathvee apana munh pasarakar unako, aur unaka sab kuchh nigal jaa, aur ve jeete jee adhaelok men ja pade, to tum samajh lo ki in manushyon ne yahova ka apaman kiya haai." 
Numbers16:31 vah ye sab baten kah hee chuka tha, ki boomi un logon ke panv ke neeche fatt gai" 
Numbers16:32 aur prathvee ne apana munh khol diya aur unaka aur unaka gharadar ka saman, aur korah ke sab manushyon aur unakee saree sampati ko bhee nigal liya." 
Numbers16:33 aur ve aur unaka sara gharabar jeevit hee adhaelok men ja pade aur prathvee ne unako ddhnap liya, aur ve mandlee ke beech men se nashtt ho gaae." 
Numbers16:34 aur jitane israaelee unake charon or the ve unaka chillana sun yah kahate huae bhage, ki kaheen prathvee ham ko bhee nigal n le!" 
Numbers16:35 tab yahova ke pas se ag nikalee, aur un addhai sau dhoop chaddhanevalon ko bhsm kar dala.." 
Numbers16:36 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers16:37 haroon yajak ke putra aeleeajar se kah, ki un dhoopadanon ko ag men se utta le aur ag ke angaron ko udhar hee chhtaira de, kyonaki ve pavitra haain." 
Numbers16:38 jinhon ne pap karake apane hee praanon kee hani kee haai, unake dhoopadanon ke pattr peett peettkar banaae jaaen jis se ki vah vedee ke maddhne ke kam ave kyonki unhon ne yahova ke samhane rakha tha is se ve pavitra haain. is prakar vah israaeliyon ke liye aek nishaan ttharega." 
Numbers16:39 so aeleeajar yajak ne un peetal ke dhoopadanon ko, jin men un jale huae manushyon ne dhoop chaddhaya tha, lekar unake pattr peettkar vedee ke maddhne ke liye banava dia," 
Numbers16:40 ki israaeliyon ko is bat ka smaran rahe ki koi doosara, jo haroon ke vansh ka n ho, yahova ke samhane dhoop chaddhane ko sameep n jaa, aeesa n ho ki vah bhee korah aur usakee mandlee ke saman nashtt ho jaa, jaaise ki yahova ne moosa ke dara usako agyaa dee thee.." 
Numbers16:41 doosare din israaeliyon kee saree mandlee yah kahakar moosa aur haroon par budbudane lagee, ki yahova kee praja ko tum ne mar dala haai." 
Numbers16:42 aur jab mandlee ke log moosa aur haroon ke virooddh ikatthe ho rahe the, tab unhon ne milapavale tamboo kee or drashtti kee aur dekha, ki badal ne use chha liya haai, aur yahova ka tej dikhai de raha haai." 
Numbers16:43 tab moosa aur haroon milapavale tamboo ke samhane aa," 
Numbers16:44 tab yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers16:45 tum us mandlee ke logon ke beech se hatt jao, ki maain unhen pal bhr men bhsm kar daloon. tab ve munh ke bal gire." 
Numbers16:46 aur moosa ne haroon se kaha, dhoopadan ko lekar us men vedee par se ag rakhkar us par dhoop dal, mandlee ke pas fauratee se jakar usake liye praayaashchaitt kara kyonaki yahova ka kop atyant bhdka haai, aur maree faailane lagee haai." 
Numbers16:47 moosa kee agyaa ke anusar haroon dhoopadan lekar mandlee ke beech men dauda gaya aur yah dekhkar ki logon men maree faailane lagee haai, us ne dhoop jalakar logon ke liye praayaashchaitt kiya." 
Numbers16:48 aur vah mudorn n aur jeevit ke madhy men khda hua tab maree thm gai. 
Numbers16:49 aur jo korah ke sang bhagee hokar mar gaae the, unhen chhod jo log is maree se mar gaae ve chaudah hajar sat sau the." 
Numbers16:50 tab haroon milapavale tamboo ke dar par moosa ke pas lautt gaya, aur maree thm gai.." 
Numbers17:1 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers17:2 israaeliyon se baten karake un ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke anusar, unake sab pradhaanon ke pas se aek aek chhdee le aur un barah chhdiyon men se aek aek par aek aek ke mool puroosh ka nam lik," 
Numbers17:3 aur leaviyon kee chhdee par haroon ka nam likh. kyonaki israaeliyon ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke aek aek mukhy puroosh kee aek aek chhdee hogee. 
Numbers17:4 aur un chhadiyon ko milapavale tamboo men sakshaeepatra ke age, jahan maain tum logon se mila karata hoo, rakh de." 
Numbers17:5 aur jis puroosh ko maain chunoonga usakee chhdee men kaaliyan foott nikalengee aur israaelee jo tum par budbudate rahate haai, vah budbudana maain apane upar se door karoonga." 
Numbers17:6 so moosa ne israaeliyon se yah bat kahee aur unake sab pradhaanon ne apane apane liye, apane apane poorvajon ke gharanon ke anusar, aek aek chhdee use dee, so barah chhadiyan hui aur un kee chhdiyon men haroon kee bhee chhdee thee." 
Numbers17:7 un chhadiyon ko moosa ne saakshaeepatra ke tamboo men yahova ke samhane rakh diya. 
Numbers17:8 doosare din moosa sakshaeepatra ke tamboo men gaya to kya dekha, ki haroon kee chhdee jo levee ke gharane ke liye thee us men kaaliyan foott nikalee, arthata us men kaliyan lagee, aur fool bhee foole, aur pake badam bhee lage haain." 
Numbers17:9 so moosa un sab chhadiyon ko yahova ke samhane se nikalakar sab israaeliyon ke pas le gaya aur unhon ne apanee apanee chhdee pahichanakar le lee. 
Numbers17:10 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, haroon kee chhdee ko sakshaeepatra ke samhane fir dhar de, ki yah un danga karanevalo ke liye aek nishaan banakar rakhee rahe, ki too unaka budbudana jo mere virooddh hota rahata haai bhvishy men rok rakhe, aeesa n ho ki ve mar jaaen." 
Numbers17:11 aur moosa ne yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar hee kiya.. 
Numbers17:12 tab israaelee moosa se kahane lage, dek, hamare praan nikala chahate haai, ham nashtt hua, ham sab ke sab nashtt huae jate haain." 
Numbers17:13 jo koi yahova ke nivas ke sameep jata haai vah mara jata haai. to kya ham sab ke sab mar hee jaaenge.. 
Numbers18:1 fir yahova ne haroon se kaha, ki pavitrasthan ke adharma ka bhar tujh par, aur tere putraen aur tere pita ke gharane par hoga aur tumhara yajak karma ke adharma ka bhar bhee tere putraen par hoga." 
Numbers18:2 aur levee ka gotra, arthata tere moolapuroosh ke gotravale jo tere bhai haai, unako bhee apane sath le aya kar, aur ve tujh se mil jaae, aur teree seva tthal kiya kare, parantu sakshaeepatra ke tamboo ke samhane too aur tere putra hee aya karen." 
Numbers18:3 jo tujhe saunpa gaya haai usakee aur sare tamboo kee bhee ve raksha kiya karen parantu pavitrasthan ke patraen ke aur vedee ke sameep n aae, aeesa n ho ki ve aur tum log bhee mar jao." 
Numbers18:4 so ve tujh se mil jaae, aur milapavale tamboo kee saree sevakai kee vastuon kee raksha kiya karen parantu jo tere kul ka n ho vah tum logon ke sameep n ane paae." 
Numbers18:5 aur paavitrasthan aur vedee kee rakhvalee tum hee kiya karo, jis se israaeliyon par fir kop n bhdke." 
Numbers18:6 parantu maain ne ap tumhare levee bhaiyon ko israaeliyon ke beech se alag kar liya haai, aur ve milapavale tamboo kee seva karane ke liye tum ko aur yahova ko saunp diye gaae haain." 
Numbers18:7 par vedee kee aur beechavale parde ke bheetar kee baton kee sevakai ke liye too aur tere putra apane yajakapad kee raksha karana, aur tum hee seva kiya karana kyonaki maain tumhen yajakapad kee sevakai dan karata hoon aur jo tere kul ka n ho vah yaadi sameep aae to mar dala jaae.." 
Numbers18:8 fir yahova ne haroon se kaha, sun, maai ap tujh ko uttai hui bhentt saunp deta hoo, arthata israaeliyon kee paavitra kee hui vastuen jitanee hon unhen maain tera abhaishok vala bhag ttharakar tujhe aur tere putraen ko sada ka hak karake de deta hoon." 
Numbers18:9 jo paramapavitra vastuaen ag men hom n hee jaaengee ve teree hee tthare, arthata israaeliyon ke sab chaddhavon men se unake sab annabaali, sab papabali, aur sab doshabali, jo ve mujh ko de, vah tere aur tere putraen ke liye paramapavitra ttharen." 
Numbers18:10 unako paramapavitra vastu janakar khaya karana unako har ek puroosh kha sakata haai ve tere liye paavitra haain. 
Numbers18:11 fir ye vastuen bhee teree tthare, arthata jitanee bhentt israaelee hilane ke liye de, unako maain tujhe aur tere bette-bettyaien ko sada ka hak karake de deta hoon tere gharane men jitane shuuddh hon vah unhen kha sakenge." 
Numbers18:12 fir uttm se uttm naya dakhmadha, aur gehoo, arthata inakee pahalee upaj jo ve yahova ko de, vah maain tujh ko deta hoon." 
Numbers18:13 unake desh ke sab prakar kee pahalee upaj, jo ve yahova ke liye le ae, vah teree hee tthare tere gharane men jitane shuuddh hon ve unhen kha sakengen." 
Numbers18:14 israaeliyon men jo kuchh arpan kiya jaae vah bhee tera hee tthare. 
Numbers18:15 sab praanaiyon men se jitane apanee apanee man ke pahilautte ho, jinhen log yahova ke liye chaddhaae, chahe manushy ke chahe pashu ke paahilautte ho, ve sab tere hee ttharen parantu manushyon aur ashuuddh pashuuon ke paahilautton ko dam lekar chhod dena." 
Numbers18:16 aur jinhen chhudana ho, jab ve maheene bhr ke hon tab unake liye apane ttharaae huae mol ke anusar, arthata pavitrasthan ke bees gera ke shokel ke hisab se panch shokel leke unhen chhodna." 
Numbers18:17 par gay, va bhedee, va bakaree ke pahilautte ko n chhodna ve to paavitra haain. unake lohoo ko vedee par chhdik dena, aur unakee charabee ko havy karake jalana, jis se yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandha ho" 
Numbers18:18 parantu unaka mans tera tthare, aur hilai hui chhatee, aur dahinee jangha bhee tera hee tthare." 
Numbers18:19 paavitra vastuon kee jitanee bhentten israaelee yahova ko de, un sabhon ko maain tujhe aur tere bette-beattyaien ko sada ka hak karake de deta hoon: yah to tere aur tere vansh ke liye yahova kee sada ke liye namak kee attl vacha haai." 
Numbers18:20 fir yahova ne haroon se kaha, israaeliyon ke desh men tera koi bhag n hoga, aur n unake beech tera koi ansh hoga unake beech tera bhag aur tera ansh maain hee hoon.." 
Numbers18:21 fir milapavale tamboo kee jo seva levee karate haain usake badale maain unako israaeliyon ka sab dashamansh unaka nij bhag kar deta hoon. 
Numbers18:22 aur bhavishy men israaelee milapavale tamboo ke sameep n aae, aeesa n ho ki unake sir par pap lage, aur ve mar jaaen." 
Numbers18:23 parantu levee milapavale tamboo kee seva kiya kare, aur unake adharma ka bhar ve hee uttaya karen yah tumharee peeddheeyon men sada kee vidhai tthare aur israaeliyon ke beech unaka koi nij bhag n hoga." 
Numbers18:24 kyonaki israaelee jo dashamansh yahova ko uttai hui bhentt karake denge, use maain leviyon ko nij bhag karake deta hoo, iseealiye maain ne unake vishay men kaha haai, ki israaeliyon ke beech koi bhag unako n mile." 
Numbers18:25 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers18:26 too leaviyon se kah, ki jab jab tum israaeliyon ke hath se vah dashamansh lo jise yahova tum ko tumhara nij bhag karake un se dilata haai, tab tab us men se yahova ke liye aek uttai hui bhentt karake dashamansh ka dashamansh dena." 
Numbers18:27 aur tumharee uttai hui bhentt tumhare hit ke liye aeesee ginee jaaegee jaaisa khlihan men ka ann, va rasakund men ka dakhras gina jata haai." 
Numbers18:28 is reeati tum bhee apane sab dashamanshaen men se, jo israaeliyon kee or se paoge, yahova ko aek uttai hui bhentt dena aur yahova kee yah uttai hui bhentt haroon yajak ko diya karana." 
Numbers18:29 jitane dan tum pao un men se har aek ka uttm se uttm bhag, jo pavitra tthara haai, so use yahova ke liye uttai hui bhentt karake pooree pooree dena." 
Numbers18:30 isaliye too leaviyon se kah, ki jab tum us men ka uttm se uttm bhag uttakar do, tab yah tumhare liye khalihan men ke ann, aur rasakund ke ras ke tuly gina jaaega" 
Numbers18:31 aur usako tum apane gharanon samet sab sthanon men kha sakate ho, kyonki milapavale tamboo kee jo seva tum karoge usaka badala yahee tthara haai." 
Numbers18:32 aur jab tum usaka uttm se uttm bhag uttakar do tab usake karan tum ko pap n lagega. parantu israaeliyon kee paavitra kee hui vastuon ko apavitra n karana, aeesa n ho ki tum mar jao.." 
Numbers19:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers19:2 vyavastha kee jis vidhai kee agyaa yahova deta haai vah yah haai ki too israaeliyon se kah, ki mere pas aek lal nirdosh baachhyai le ao, jis men koi bhee dosh n ho, aur jis par jooa kabhee n rakha gaya ho." 
Numbers19:3 tab aeleeajar yajak ko do, aur vah use chhavanee se bahar le jaa, aur koi usako usake samhane baalidan kare" 
Numbers19:4 tab aeleeajar yajak apanee ungalee se usaka kuchh lohoo lekar milapavale tamboo ke samhane kee or sat bar chhdik de. 
Numbers19:5 tab koi us bachhyai ko khal, mans, loho, aur gobar samet usake samhane jalaae" 
Numbers19:6 aur yajak devadaroo kee lakadee, joofaa, aur lal rang ka kapada lekar us ag men jis men bachhyai jalatee ho dal de." 
Numbers19:7 tab vah apane vasr dhaeae aur snan kare, isake bad chhavanee men to aa, parantu sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Numbers19:8 aur jo manushy usako jalaae vah bhee jal se apane vasr dhaeae aur snan kare, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Numbers19:9 fir koi shuuddh puroosh us bachhyai kee rakh battorakar chhavanee ke bahar kisee shuuddh sthan men rakh chhode aur vah rakh israaeliyon kee mandlee ke liye ashuuddhta se chhudanevale jal ke liye rakhee rahe vah to papabaali haai. 
Numbers19:10 aur jo manushy baachhyai kee rakh battore vah apane vasr dhaea, aur sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe. aur yah israaeliyon ke liye, aur unake beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon ke liye bhee sada kee vidhai tthare." 
Numbers19:11 jo kisee manushy kee loth chooae vah sat din tak ashuuddh rahe 
Numbers19:12 aeesa manushy teesare din us jal se pap chhudakar apane ko pavan kare, aur sataven din shuuddh tthare parantu yadi vah teesare din ap ko pap chhudakar pavan n kare, to sataven din shuuddh ttharega." 
Numbers19:13 jo koi kisee manushy kee loth chookar pap chhudakar apane ko pavan n kare, vah yahova ke nivasasthan ka ashuuddh karanevala ttharega, aur vah praanee israael men se nash kiya jaae ashuuddhta se chhudanevala jal us par n chhdika gaya, is karan vah ashuuddh ttharega, usakee ashuuddhta us men bachee rahegee." 
Numbers19:14 yaadi koi manushy dere men mar jaae to vyavastha yah yah haai, ki jitane us dere men rahe, va us men jaae, ve sab sat din tak ashuuddh rahen." 
Numbers19:15 aur har aek khula hua patra, jis par koi ddhkana laga n ho, vah ashuuddh tthare." 
Numbers19:16 aur jo koi maaidan men talavar se mare huae ko, va apanee mratyu se mare huae ko, va manushy kee haddee ko, va kisee kabra ko chooa, to sat din tak ashuuddh rahe." 
Numbers19:17 ashuuddh manushy ke liye jalaae huae papabali kee rakh men se kuchh lekar patra men dalakar us par sote ka jal dala jaae 
Numbers19:18 tab koi shuuddh manushy joofaa lekar us jal men dubakar jal ko us dere par, aur jitane patra aur manushy us men ho, un par chhdike, aur haddee ke, va mare huae ke, va apanee mratyu se mare huae ke, va kabra ke choonevale par chhdik de" 
Numbers19:19 vah shuuddh puroosh teesare din aur sataven din us ashuuddh manushy par chhdike aur sataven din vah usake pap chhudakar usako pavan kare, tab vah apane vasren ko dhaekar aur jal se snan karake sanjh ko shuuddh tthare." 
Numbers19:20 aur jo koi ashuuddh hokar apane pap chhudakar apane ko pavan n karaa, vah praanee yahova ke paavitra sthan ka ashuuddh karanevala ttharega, is karan vah mandlee ke beech men se nash kiya jaae ashuuddhta se chhudanevala jal us par n chhdika gaya, is karan se vah ashuuddh ttharega." 
Numbers19:21 aur yah unake liye sada kee vidhai tthare. jo ashuuddhta se chhudanevala jal chhdike vah apane vasren ko dhaeae aur jis jan se ashuuddhta se chhudanevala jal choo jaae vah bhee sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe. 
Numbers19:22 aur jo kuchh vah ashuuddh manushy chooae vah bhee ashuuddh tthare aur jo praanee us vastu ko chooae vah bhee sanjh tak ashuuddh rahe.. 
Numbers20:1 paahile maheene men saree israaelee mandlee ke log seenaai nam jangal men a gaa, aur kadesh men rahane lage aur vahan maariyam mar gai, aur vaheen usako mittee dee gai." 
Numbers20:2 vahan mandlee ke logon ke liye panee n mila so ve moosa aur haroon ke virooddh ikatthe huae. 
Numbers20:3 aur log yah kahakar moosa se jhgadne lage, ki bhla hota ki ham us samay hee mar gaae hote jab hamare bhai yahova ke samhane mar gaae!" 
Numbers20:4 aur tum yahova kee mandlee ko is jangal men kyon le aae ho, ki ham apane pashuuon samet yahan mar jaae?" 
Numbers20:5 aur tum ne ham ko misr se kyon nikalakar is bure sthan men pahunchaya haai? yahan to beech, va anjeer, va dakhlata, va anar, kuchh naheen haai, yahan tak ki peene ko kuchh panee bhee naheen haai." 
Numbers20:6 tab moosa aur haroon mandlee ke samhane se milapavale tamboo ke dar par jakar apane munh ke bal gire. aur yahova ka tej unako dikhai diya. 
Numbers20:7 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers20:8 us lattee ko le, aur too apane bhai haroon samet mandlee ko ikattha karake unake dekhte us chattan se baten kar, tab vah apana jal degee is prakar se too chattan men se unake liye jal nikal kar mandlee ke logon aur unake pashuuon ko pila." 
Numbers20:9 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne usake samhane se lattee ko le liya. 
Numbers20:10 aur moosa aur haroon ne mandlee ko us chattan ke samhane ikattha kiya, tab moosa ne us se kah, he danga karanevalo, suno kya ham ko is chattan men se tumhare liye jal nikalana hoga?" 
Numbers20:11 tab moosa ne hath uttakar lattee chattan par do bar maree aur us men se bahut panee foott nikala, aur mandlee ke log apane pashuuon samet peene lage." 
Numbers20:12 parantu moosa aur haroon se yahova ne kaha, tum ne jo mujh par vishvas naheen kiya, aur mujhe israaeliyon kee draashtti men pavitra naheen ttharaya, isaliye tum is mandlee ko us desh men pahunchane n paoge jise maain ne unhen diya haai." 
Numbers20:13 us sote ka nam mareeba pada, kyonki israealiyon ne yahova se jhgada kiya tha, aur vah unake beech paavitra ttharaya gaya.." 
Numbers20:14 fir moosa ne kadesh se aedom ke raja ke pas doot bheje, ki tera bhai israael yon kahata haai, ki ham par jo jo klesh pade haain vah too janata hoga" 
Numbers20:15 arthata yah ki hamare purakha misr men gaae the, aur ham misr men bahut din rahe aur mistriyon ne hamare purakhaon ke sath aur hamare sath bhee bura bartav kiya" 
Numbers20:16 parantu jab ham ne yahova kee dohai dee tab us ne hamaree sunee, aur aek doot ko bhejakar hamen misr se nikal le aya haai so ab ham kadesh nagar men haain jo tere sivane hee par haai." 
Numbers20:17 so hamen apane desh men se hokar jane de. ham kisee khet va dakh kee baree se hokar n chalenge, aur kooon ka panee n peeaenge sadka-sadk hokar chale jaaenge, aur jab tak tere desh se bahar n ho jaae, tab tak n daahine n baaen mudenge." 
Numbers20:18 parantu aedomiyon ne usake pas kahala bheja, ki too mere desh men se hokar mat ja, naheen to maain talavar liye huae tera samhana karane ko nikaloonga." 
Numbers20:19 israaeliyon ne usake pas fir kahala bheja, ki ham sadk hee sadk chalenge, aur yaadi ham aur hamare pashu tera panee peeae, to usaka dam denge, ham ko aur kuchh nahee, keval panv panv chalakar nikal jane de." 
Numbers20:20 parantu us ne kaha, too ane n paaega. aur aedom badee sena lekar bhujabal se usaka samhana karane ko nikal aya." 
Numbers20:21 is prakar aedom ne israael ko apane desh ke bheetar se hokar jane dene se inkar kiya isaliye israael usakee or se mud gaae.. 
Numbers20:22 tab israaeliyon kee saree mandlee kadesh se kooch karake hor nam pahad ke pas a gai. 
Numbers20:23 aur aedom desh ke sivane par hor pahad men yahova ne moosa aur haroon se kaha," 
Numbers20:24 haroon apane logon meen ja milega kyonki tum dono ne jo mareeba nam sote par mera kahana chhodkar mujh se balava kiya haai, is karan vah us desh men jane n paaega jise maain ne israaeliyon ko diya haai." 
Numbers20:25 so too haroon aur usake putra aeleeajar ko hor pahad par le chala 
Numbers20:26 aur haroon ke vasr utarake usake putra aeleeajar ko pahina tab haroon vaheen marakar apane logon me ja milega. 
Numbers20:27 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne kiya ve saree mandlee ke dekhte hor pahad par chaddh gaae. 
Numbers20:28 tab moosa ne haroon ke vasr utarake usake putra aeleeajar ko pahinaae aur haroon vaheen pahad kee chottee par mar gaya. tab moosa aur aeleeajar pahad par se utar aae. 
Numbers20:29 aur jab israael kee saree mandlee ne dekha ki haroon ka praan choott gaya haai, tab israael ke sab gharane ke log usake liye tees din tak rote rahe.." 
Numbers21:1 tab arad ka kananee raja, jo daakkhian desh men rahata tha, yah sunakar, ki jis marga se ve bheadiye aae the usee marga se ab israaelee a rahe haai, israael se lada, aur un men se kitanon ko bandhaua kar liya." 
Numbers21:2 tab israaeliyon ne yahova se yah kahakar mannat manee, ki yadi too sachamuch un logon ko hamare vash men kar de, to ham unake nagaron ko satyanash kar denge." 
Numbers21:3 israael kee yah bat sunakar yahova ne kanaaniyon ko unake vash men kar diya so unhon ne unake nagaron samet unako bhee satyanash kiya is se us sthan ka nam horma rakha gaya.. 
Numbers21:4 fir unhon ne hor pahad se kooch karake lal samudra ka marga liya, ki aedom desh se bahar bahar ghoomakar jaaen aur logon ka man marga ke karan bahut vyakul ho gaya." 
Numbers21:5 so ve parameshvar ke virooddh bat karane lage, aur moosa se kaha, tum log ham ko misr se jangal men marane ke liye kyon le aae ho? yahan n to rottee haai, aur n panee, aur hamare praan is nikammee rottee se dukhait haain." 
Numbers21:6 so yahova ne un logon men tej vishavale sanp bheje, jo unako dsane lage, aur bahut se israaelee mar gaae." 
Numbers21:7 tab log moosa ke pas jakar kahane lage, ham ne pap kiya haai, ki ham ne yahova ke aur tere virooddh baten kee haain yahova se praarthna kar, ki vah sanpon ko ham se door kare. tab moosa ne unake liye praarthna kee." 
Numbers21:8 yahova ne moosa se kaha aek tej vishavale sanp kee pratima banavakar khmbhe par lattka tab jo sanp se dsa hua usako dekh le vah jeeavit bachega. 
Numbers21:9 so moosa ne peetal ko aek sanp banavakar khmbhe par lattkaya tab sanp ke dse huon men se jis jis ne us peetal ke sanp ko dekha vah jeeavit bach gaya. 
Numbers21:10 fir israaeliyon ne kooch karake obot men dere dale. 
Numbers21:11 aur obot se kooch karake abareem nam deehon men dere dale, jo poorab kee or moab ke samhane ke jangal men haai." 
Numbers21:12 vanha se kooch karake unhon ne jered nam nale men dere dale. 
Numbers21:13 vahan se kooch karake unhon ne anorn nadee, jo jangal men bahatee aur aemoriyon ke desh se nikalatee haai, usakee paralee or dere khde kiae kyonaki arnon moaabiyon aur aemoriyon ke beech hokar moab desh ka sivana tthara haai." 
Numbers21:14 is karan yahova ke sangraam nam pustak men is prakar likha haai, ki soopa men baheb, aur anorn ke nale," 
Numbers21:15 aur un nalon kee ddhlana jo ar nam nagar kee or haai, aur jo moab ke sivane par haai." 
Numbers21:16 fir vahan se kooch karake ve baair tak gaae vahan vahee kooan haai jisake vishay men yahova ne moosa se kaha tha, ki un logon ko ikattha kar, aur maain unhe panee doonga.." 
Numbers21:17 us samay israel ne yah geet gaya, ki he kooe, ubal a, us kooen ke vishay men gao!" 
Numbers21:18 jisako hakimon ne khoda, aur israael ke raison ne apane sontton aur laattyaien se khod liya.." 
Numbers21:19 fir ve jangal se mattana ko, aur mattana se nahaleeael ko, aur nahaleeael se bamot ko," 
Numbers21:20 aur bamot se kooch karake us tarai tak jo moab ke maaidan men haai, aur pisaga ke us sire tak bhee jo yashaeemon kee or jhuka haai pahunch gaae.." 
Numbers21:21 tab israael ne aemoriyon ke raja seehon ke pas dooton se yah kahala bheja," 
Numbers21:22 ki hamen apane desh men hokar jane de ham mudkar kisee khet va dakh kee baree men to n jaaenge n kisee kooaen ka panee peeaenge aur jab tak tere desh se bahar n ho jaaen tab tak sadk hee se chale jaaenge. 
Numbers21:23 taubhee seehon ne israael ko apane desh se hokar jane n diya varan apanee saree sena ko ikattha karake israael ka samhana karane ko jangal men nikal aya, aur yahas ko akar un se lada." 
Numbers21:24 tab israaeliyon ne us ko talavar se mar liya, aur anorn se yabbok nadee tak, jo ammoniyon ka sivana tha, usake desh ke aadhaikaree ho gaae ammoniyon ka sivana to draddh tha." 
Numbers21:25 so israael ne aemoriyon ke sab nagaron ko le liya, aur un me, arthata heshabon aur usake as pas ke nagaron men rahane lage." 
Numbers21:26 heshabon aemoriyon ke raja seehon ka nagar tha us ne moab ke agale raja se ladke usaka sara desh anorn tak usake hath se chheen liya tha. 
Numbers21:27 is karan gooddh bat ke kahanevale kahate haai, ki heshabon men ao, seehon ka nagar base, aur draddh kiya jaae." 
Numbers21:28 kyonaki heshabon se ag, arthata seehon ke nagar se lau nikalee jis se moab desh ka ar nagar, aur anorn ke unche sthanon ke svamee bhsm huae." 
Numbers21:29 he moab, tujh par haya! kamosh devata kee praja nash hui, us ne apane betton ko bhgeo, aur apanee bettyaien ko aemoree raja seehon kee dasee kar diya." 
Numbers21:30 ham ne unhen gira diya haai, heshabona deebon tak nashtt ho gaya haai, aur ham ne nopah aur medaba tak bhee ujad diya haai.." 
Numbers21:31 so israael aemoriyon ke desh men rahane laga. 
Numbers21:32 tab moosa ne yajer nagar ka bhed lene ko bheja aur unhon ne usake ganvon ko liya, aur vahan ke aemoriyon ko us desh se nikal diya." 
Numbers21:33 tab ve mudke bashaan ke marga se jane lage aur bashaan ke raja og n unaka samhana kiya, arthata ladne ko apanee saree sena samet aedraei men nikal aya." 
Numbers21:34 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, us se mat dra kyonaki maain usako saree sena aur desh samet tere hath men kar deta hoon aur jaaisa too ne aemoriyon ke raja heshabonavasee seehon ke sath kiya haai, vaaisa hee usake sath bhee karana." 
Numbers21:35 tab unhon ne usako, aur usake putraen aur saree praja ko yahan tak mara ki usaka koi bhee n bacha aur ve usake desh ke adhaikaree ko gaae." 
Numbers22:1 tab israaeliyon ne kooch karake yareeho ke pas yaradan nadee ke is par moab ke araba men dere khde kiae.. 
Numbers22:2 aur sippor ke putra balak ne dekha ki israael ne aemoriyon se kya kya kiya haai. 
Numbers22:3 isaliye moab yah janakar, ki israaelee bahut haai, un logon se atyant dr gaya yahan tak ki moab israaeliyon ke karan atyant vyakul hua." 
Numbers22:4 tab moabiyon ne midhanee puraaniyon se kaha, ab vah dal hamare charon or ke sab logon ko chatt kar jaaega, jis tarah baail khet kee haree ghaas ko chatt kar jata haai. us samay sippor ka putra balak moab ka raja tha" 
Numbers22:5 aur is ne pator nagar ko, jo mahanad ke tatt par bor ke putra bilam ke jaatibhaiyon kee boomi thee, vahan bilam ke pas doot bheje, ki ve yah kahakar use bula laae, ki sun aek dal misr se nikal aya haai, aur boomi un se ddhk gai haai, aur ab ve mere samhane hee akar bas gaae haain." 
Numbers22:6 isaliye a, aur un logon ko mere nimitt shaap de, kyonaki ve mujh se adhaik balavant haai, tab sambhv haai ki ham un par jayavant ho, aur ham sab inako apane desh se marakar nikal den kyonki yah to maain janata hoon ki jisako too ashaeervad deta haai vah dhany hota haai, aur jisako too shaap deta haai vah srapit hota haai." 
Numbers22:7 tab moabee aur midhanee puraaniye bhavee kahane kee dakshiana lekar chale, aur bilam ke pas pahunchakar balak kee baten kah sunain." 
Numbers22:8 us ne un se kaha, aj rat ko yahan ttkaie, aur jo bat yahova mujh se kahega, usee ke anusar maain tum ko uttr doonga tab moab ke hakim bilam ke yahan tthar gae." 
Numbers22:9 tab parameshvar ne bilam ke pas akar poochha, ki tere yahan ye puroosh kaun haain?" 
Numbers22:10 bilam ne parameshvar se kaha sippor ke putra moab ke raja balak ne mere pas yah kahala bheja haai," 
Numbers22:11 ki sun, jo dal misr se nikal aya haai us se boomi ddhnp gai haai isaliye akar mere liye unhen shaap de sambhv haai ki maain unase ladkar unako barabas nikal sakoonga." 
Numbers22:12 parameshvar ne bilam se kaha, too inake sang mat ja un logon ko shaap mat de, kyonaki ve ashaeesh ke bhagee ho chuke haain." 
Numbers22:13 bhor ko bilam ne uttkar balak ke hakimon se kaha, tum apane desh ko chale jao kyonaki yahova mujhe tumhare sath jane kee agyaa naheen deta." 
Numbers22:14 tab moabee haakim chale gaae aur balak ke pas jakar kaha, ki bilam ne hamare sath ane se nah kiya haai." 
Numbers22:15 is par balak ne fir aur hakim bheje, jo paahilon se praatishttit aur ginatee men bhee adhaik the." 
Numbers22:16 unhon ne bilam ke pas akar kaha, ki sippor ka putra balak yon kahata haai, ki mere pas ane se kisee karan nah n kara" 
Numbers22:17 kyonaki maain nishchay teree badee praatishtta karoonga, aur jo kuchh too mujh se kahe vahee maain karoonga isaliye a, aur un logon ko mere nimitt shaap de." 
Numbers22:18 bilam ne balak ke karmachariyon ko uttr diya, ki chahe balak apane ghar ko sone chandee se bhrakar mujhe de de, taubhee maain apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ko palatt naheen sakata, ki use ghattakar va baddhakar manoon." 
Numbers22:19 isaliye ab tum log aj rat ko yaheen ttkai raho, taaki maain jan loo, ki yahova mujh se aur kya kahata haai." 
Numbers22:20 aur parameshvar ne rat ko bilam ke pas akar kaha, yaadi ve puroosh tujhe bulane aae haai, to too uttkar unake sang ja parantu jo bat maain tujh se kahoon usee ke anusar karana." 
Numbers22:21 tab bilam bhor ko utta, aur apanee gadahee par kattee bandhakar moabee hakimon ke sang chal pada." 
Numbers22:22 aur usake jane ke karan parameshvar ka kop bhdk utta, aur yahova ka doot usaka virodha karane ke liye marga rokakar khda ho gaya. vah to apanee gadahee par savar hokar ja raha tha, aur usake sang usake do sevak bhee the." 
Numbers22:23 aur us gadahee ko yahova ka doot hath men nangee talavar liye huae marga men khda dikhai pada tab gadahee marga chhodkar khet men chalee gai tab bilam ne gadahee ko mara, ki vah marga par fir a jaae." 
Numbers22:24 tab yahova ka doot dakh kee bariyon ke beech kee galee me, jisake donon or baree kee deevar thee, khda hua." 
Numbers22:25 yahova ke doot ko dekhkar gadahee deevar se aeesee satt gai, ki bilam ka panv deevar se dab gaya tab us ne usako fir mara." 
Numbers22:26 tab yahova ka doot age baddhkar aek saket sthan par khda hua, jahan n to dahinee or hattne kee jagah thee aur n bain ora." 
Numbers22:27 vahan yahova ke doot ko dekhkar gadahee bilam ko liye diye baaitt gai fir to bilam ka kop bhdk utta, aur us ne gadahee ko lattee se mara." 
Numbers22:28 tab yahova ne gadahee ka munh khol diya, aur vah bilam se kahane lagee, maain ne tera kya kiya haai, ki too ne mujhe teen bar mara?" 
Numbers22:29 bilam ne gadahee se kaha, yah ki too ne mujh se nattkhttee kee. yaadi mere hath men talavar hotee to maain tujhe abhee mar dalata." 
Numbers22:30 gadahee ne bilam se kaha kya maain teree vahee gadahee naheen jis par too janm se aj tak chaddhta aya haai? kya maain tujh se kabhee aeesa karatee thee? vah bola, naheen." 
Numbers22:31 tab yahova ne bilam kee ankhe kholee, aur usako yahova ka doot hath men nangee talavar liye huae marga men khda dikhai pada tab vah jhuk gaya, aur munh ke bal girake dandvat kee." 
Numbers22:32 yahova ke doot ne us se kaha, too ne apanee gadahee ko teen bar kyon mara? sun, tera virodha karane ko maain hee aya hoo, isaaliye ki too mere samhane ulattee chal chalata haai" 
Numbers22:33 aur yah gadahee mujhe dekhkar mere samhane se teen bar hatt gai. jo vah mere samhane se hatt n jatee, to ni:sandeh maain ab tak tujh ko mar hee dalata, parantu usako jeevit chhod deta." 
Numbers22:34 tab bilam ne yahova ke doot se kaha, maain ne pap kiya haai maain naheen janata tha ki too mera samhana karane ko marga men khda haai. isaaliye ab yaadi tujhe bura lagata haai, to maain lautt jata hoon." 
Numbers22:35 yahova ke doot ne bilam se kaha, in purooshaen ke sang too chala ja parantu keval vahee bat kahana jo maain tujh se kahoonga. tab bilam balak ke hakimon ke sang chala gaya." 
Numbers22:36 yah sunakar, ki bilam a raha haai, balak us se bhentt karane ke liye moab ke us nagar tak jo us desh ke arnonavale sivane par haai gaya." 
Numbers22:37 balak ne bilam se kaha, kya maain ne badee asha se tujhe naheen bulava bheja tha? fir too mere pas kyon naheen chala aya? kya maain is yogy naheen ki sachamuch teree uchit pratishtta kar sakata?" 
Numbers22:38 bilam ne balak se kaha, dekh maain tere pas aya to hoon! parantu ab kya maain kuchh kar sakata hoon? jo bat parameshvar mere munh men dalega vahee bat maain kahoonga." 
Numbers22:39 tab bilam balak ke sang sang chala, aur ve kiryatoosot tak aae." 
Numbers22:40 aur balak ne baail aur bhed-bakaariyon ko baali kiya, aur bilam aur usake sath ke haakimon ke pas bheja." 
Numbers22:41 bihan ko balak bilam ko baloo ke unche sthanon par chaddha le gaya, aur vahan se usako sab israaelee log dikhai pade.." 
Numbers23:1 tab bilam ne balak se kaha, yahan par mere liye sat veadiyan banava, aur isee sthan par sat bachhde aur sat meddhe taaiyar kara." 
Numbers23:2 tab balak ne bilam ke kahane ke anusar kiya aur balak aur bilam ne milakar pratyek vedee par aek bachhda aur aek meddha chaddhaya. 
Numbers23:3 fir bilam ne balak se kaha, too apane homabaali ke pas khda rah, aur maain jata hoon sambhv haai ki yahova mujh se bhentt karane ko aae aur jo kuchh vah mujh par prakash karega vahee maain tujh ko bataunga. tab vah aek munde pahad par gaya." 
Numbers23:4 aur parameshvar bilam se mila aur bilam ne us se kaha, maain ne sat veadiyan taaiyar kee haai, aur pratyek vedee par aek bachhda aur aek meddha chaddhaya haai." 
Numbers23:5 yahova ne bilam ke munh men aek bal dalee, aur kaha, balak ke pas lautt jo, aur yon kahana." 
Numbers23:6 aur vah usake pas lauttkar a gaya, aur kya dekhta haai, ki vah sare moabee haakimon samet apane homabali ke pas khda haai." 
Numbers23:7 tab bilam ne apanee gooddh bat arambh kee, aur kahane laga, balak ne mujhe aram se, arthata moab ke raja ne mujhe poorab ke pahadon se bulava bheja: a, mere liye yakoob ko shaap de, a, israael ko dhamakee de!" 
Numbers23:8 parantu jinhen ishvar ne naheen shaapa diya unhen maain kyon shaap doon? aura jinhen yahova ne dhamakee naheen dee unhen maain kaaise dhamakee doon? 
Numbers23:9 chattanon kee chottee par se ve mujhe dikhai padte haai, pahadiyon par se maain unako dekhta hoon vah aeesee jaati haai jo akelee basee rahegee, aur anyajaatiyon se alag ginee jaaegee!" 
Numbers23:10 yakoob ke dhooli ke kinake ko kaun gin sakata haai, va israael kee chauthai kee ginatee kaun le sakata haai? saubhagy yadi meree mratyu dhaarmiyon kee see, aur mera ant bhee unheen ke saman ho!" 
Numbers23:11 tab balak ne bilam se kaha, too ne mujh se kya kiya haai?" 
Numbers23:12 us ne kaha, jo bat yahova ne mujhe sikhlai kya mujhe usee ko savadhaanee se bolana n chaahiye?" 
Numbers23:13 balak ne us se kaha, mere sang doosare sthan par chal, jahan se ve tujhe dikhai denge too un sabhon ko to nahee, keval baharavalon ko dekh sakega vahan se unhen mere liye shaap de." 
Numbers23:14 tab vah usako sopeem nam maaidan men pisaga ke sire par le gaya, aur vahan sat veadiyan banavakar pratyek par aek bachhda aur aek meddha chaddhaya." 
Numbers23:15 tab bilam ne balak se kaha, apane homabaali ke pas yaheen khda rah, aur maain udhar jakar yahova se bhentt karoon." 
Numbers23:16 aur yahova ne bilam se bhentt kee, aur us ne usake munh men aek bat dalee, aur kaha, ki balak ke pas lautt ja, aur yon kahana." 
Numbers23:17 aur vah usake pas gaya, aur kya dekhta haai, ki vah moabee hakimon samet apane homabali ke pas khda haai. aur balak ne poochha, ki yahova ne kya kaha haai?" 
Numbers23:18 tab bilam ne apanee gooddh bat arambh kee, aur kahane laga, he balak, man lagakar sun, he sippor ke putra, meree bat par kan laga:" 
Numbers23:19 ishvar manushy nahee, ki joott bole, aur n vah adamee haai, ki apanee ichchha badale. kya jo kuchh us ne kaha use n kare? kya vah vachan dekar us poora n kare?" 
Numbers23:20 dek, ashaeervad hee dene kee agyaa maain ne pai haai: vah ashaeesh de chuka haai, aur maain use naheen palatt sakata." 
Numbers23:21 us ne yakoob men anarth naheen paya aur n israael men anyay dekha haai. usaka parameshvar yahova usake sang haai, aur un men raja kee see lalakar hotee haai." 
Numbers23:22 unako misr men se ishvar hee nikale liye a raha haai, vah to baainele sand ke saman bal rakhta haai." 
Numbers23:23 nishchay koi mantra yakoob par naheen chal sakata, aur israael par bhavee kahana koi arth naheen rakhta parantu yakoob aur israael ke vishay ab yah kaha jaaega, ki ishvar ne kya hee vichitra kam kiya haai!" 
Numbers23:24 sun, vah dal sinhanee kee nai uttega, aur sinh kee nai khda hoga vah jab tak aher ko n kha le, aur mare huon ke lohoo ko n pee le, tab tak n lettega.." 
Numbers23:25 tab balak ne bilam se kaha, unako n to shaap dena, aur n ashaeesh dena." 
Numbers23:26 bilam ne balak se kaha, kya maain ne tujh se naheen kaha, ki jo kuchh yahova mujh se kahega, vahee mujhe karana padega?" 
Numbers23:27 balak ne bilam se kaha chal, maain tujh ko aek aur sthan par le chalata hoon sambhv haai ki parameshvar kee ichchha ho ki too vahan se unhen mere liye shaap de." 
Numbers23:28 tab balak bilam ko por ke sire par, jahan se yashaeemon desh dikhai deta haai, le gaya." 
Numbers23:29 aur bilam ne balak se kaha, yahan par mere liye sat veadiyan banava, aur yahan sat bachhde aur sat meddhe taaiyar kara." 
Numbers23:30 bilam ke kahane ke anusar balak ne pratyek vedee par aek bachhda aur aek meddha chaddhaya.. 
Numbers24:1 yah dekhkar, ki yahova israael ko ashaeesh hee dilana chahata haai, bilam paahile kee nai shakun dekhne ko n gaya, parantu apana munh jangal kee or kar liya." 
Numbers24:2 aur bilam ne ankhe uttai, aur israaeliyon ko apane gotra gotra ke anusar base huae dekha. aur parameshvar ka atma us par utara." 
Numbers24:3 tab usane apanee gooddh bat arambh kee, aur kahane laga, ki bor ke putra bilam kee yah vanee haai, jis puroosh kee ankhen band theen usee kee yah vanee haai," 
Numbers24:4 ishvar ke vachanon ka sunanevala, jo dandvat men pada hua khulee hui ankhon se sarvashaktaiman ka darshan pata haai, usee kee yah vanee haai: ki" 
Numbers24:5 he yakoob, tere dere, aur he israael, tere nivasasthan kya hee manabhavane haain!" 
Numbers24:6 ve to nalon va ghaaattyaien kee nai, aur nadee ke tatt kee vaattkaiaon ke saman aeese faaile huae haai, jaaise ki yahova ke lagaae huae agar ke vraksha, aur jal ke nikatt ke devadaroo." 
Numbers24:7 aur usake dolon se jal umanda karega, aur usaka beech bahutere jalabhre kheton men padega, aur usaka raja agag se bhee mahan hoga, aur usaka rajy baddhta hee jaaega." 
Numbers24:8 usako misr men se ishvar kee nikale liye a raha haai vah to banaaile sand ke saman bala rakhta haai, jaati jati ke log jo usake draehee haai unako vah kha jayega, aur unakee haddiyon ko ttukade ttukade karega, aur apane teeron se unako bedhoga." 
Numbers24:9 vah dabaka baaitta haai, vah sinh va sinhanee kee nai lett gaya haai ab usako kaun chhede? jo koi tujhe ashaeervad de so ashaeesh paa, aur jo koi tujhe shaap de vah srapit ho.." 
Numbers24:10 tab balak ka kop bilam par bhdk utta aur us ne hath par hath pattkakar bilam se kaha, maain ne tujhe apane shatrauon ke shaap dene ke liye bulavaya, parantu too ne teen bar unhen ashaeervad hee ashaeervad diya haai." 
Numbers24:11 isaliye ab too apane sthan par bhag ja maain ne to socha tha ki teree badee praatishtta karoonga, parantu ab yahova ne tujhe praatishtta pane se rok rakha haai." 
Numbers24:12 bilam ne balak se kaha, jo doot too ne mere pas bheje the, kya maain ne un se bhee n kaha tha," 
Numbers24:13 ki chahe balak apane ghar ko sone chandee se bhrakar mujhe de, taubhee maain yahova kee agyaa todkar apane man se n to bhla kar sakata hoon aur n bura jo kuchh yahova kahega vahee maain kahoonga?" 
Numbers24:14 ab sun, maain apane logon ke pas lautt kar jata hoon parantu pahile maain tujhe chita deta hoon ki ant ke dinon men ve log teree praja se kya kya karenge." 
Numbers24:15 fir vah apanee gooddh bat arambh karake kahane laga, ki bor ke putra bilam kee yah vanee haai, jis puroosh kee ankhe band thee usee kee yah vanee haai," 
Numbers24:16 ishvar ke vachanon ka sunanevala, aur paramapradhaan ke gyaan ka jananevala, jo dandvata men pada hua khulee hui ankhon se sarvashaktaiman ka darshan pata haai, usee kee yah vanee haai: ki" 
Numbers24:17 maai usako dekoonga to sahee, parantu abhee naheen maain usako niharoonga to sahee, parantu sameep hoke naheen: yakoob men se aek tara uday hoga, aur israael men se aek raj dand uttega jo moab kee alangon ko choora kar dega, jo sab danga karanevalon ko gira dega." 
Numbers24:18 tab aedom aur seir bhee, jo usake shatra haai, donon usake vash men padenge, aur israael veerata dikhata jaaega." 
Numbers24:19 aur yakoob hee men se aek aadhaipaati avega jo prabhuta karega, aur nagar men se bache huon ko bhee satyanash karega.." 
Numbers24:20 fir us ne amalek par drashtti karake apanee gooddh bat arambh kee, aur kahane laga, amalek anyajatiyon men shraeshtt to tha, parantu usaka ant vinash hee haai.." 
Numbers24:21 fir us ne keniyon par draashtti karake apanee gooddh bat arambh kee, aur kahane laga, tera nivasasthan ati draddh to haai, aur tera basera chattan par to haai" 
Numbers24:22 taubhee ken ujad jaaega. aur ant men ashshoora tujhe bandhauai men le aaega.. 
Numbers24:23 fir us ne apanee gooddh bat arambh kee, aur kahane laga, hay jab ishvar yah karega taba kaun jeevit bachega?" 
Numbers24:24 taubhee kitiayon ke pas se jahajavale akar ashshoora ko aur aeber ko bhee du:kh denge aur ant men usaka bhee vinash ho jaaega.. 
Numbers24:25 tab bilam chal diya, aur apane sthan par lautt gaya aur balak ne bhee apana marga liya.." 
Numbers25:1 israaelee shaitteem men rahate the, aur log moabee ladkiyon ke sang kukarma karane lage." 
Numbers25:2 aur jab un sreeyon ne un logon ko apane devataon ke yagyaon men nevata diya, tab ve log khakar unake devataon ko dandvata karane lage." 
Numbers25:3 yon israaelee balapor devata ko poojane lage. tab yahova ka kop israael par bhdk utta 
Numbers25:4 aur yahova ne moosa se kaha, praja ke sab pradhaanon ko pakadkar yahova ke liye dhoop men lattka de, jis se mera bhdka hua kop israael ke upar se door ho jaae." 
Numbers25:5 tab moosa ne israaelee nyayiyon se kaha, tumhare jo jo adamee balapor ke sang mil gaae haain unhen ghaat karo.." 
Numbers25:6 aur jab israaeliyon kee saree mandlee milapavale tamboo ke dar par ro rahee thee, to aek israaelee puroosh moosa aur sab logon kee ankhon ke samane aek midhanee sree ko apane sath apane bhaiyon ke pas le aya." 
Numbers25:7 ise dekhkar aeleeajar ka putra peenahas, jo haroon yajak ka pota tha, us ne mandlee men se uttkar hath men aek barachhee lee," 
Numbers25:8 aur us israaelee puroosh ke dere men jane ke bad vah bhee bheetar gaya, aur us puroosh aur us sree donon ke pett men barachhee bedha dee. is par israaeliyon men jo maree faail gai thee vah thm gai." 
Numbers25:9 aur maree se chaubees hajar manushy mar gaae.. 
Numbers25:10 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers25:11 haroon yajak ka pota aeleeajar ka putra peenahas, jise israaeliyon ke beech meree see jalan uttee, us ne meree jalajalahatt ko un par se yahan tak door kiya haai, ki maain ne jalakar unaka ant naheen kar dala." 
Numbers25:12 isaliye too kah de, ki maain us se shaanati kee vacha bandhata hoon" 
Numbers25:13 aur vah usake liye, aur usake bad usake vansh ke liye, sada ke yajakapad kee vacha hogee, kyonaki use apane parameshvar ke liye jalan uttee, aur us ne israaeliyon ke liye praayaashchaitt kiya." 
Numbers25:14 jo israaelee puroosh midhanee sree ke sang mara gaya, usaka nam jimraee tha, vah sal ka putra aur shaimoniyon men se apane pitaron ke gharane ka pradhaan tha." 
Numbers25:15 aur jo midhanee sree maree gai usaka nam kojabee tha, vah soor kee bettee thee, jo midhanee pitaron ke aek gharane ke logon ka pradhaan tha.." 
Numbers25:16 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers25:17 midhaaniyon ko sata, aur unhen mara" 
Numbers25:18 kyonaki por ke vishay aur kojabee ke vishay ve tum ko chhl karake satate haain. kojabee to aek midhanee pradhaan kee bettee aur midhaaniyon kee jaati bahin thee, aur maree ke din men por ke mamale men maree gai.." 
Numbers26:1 fir yahova ne moosa aur aeleeajar nam haroon yajak ke putra se kaha," 
Numbers26:2 israaeliyon kee saree mandlee men jitane bees varsha ke, va us se aadhaik avastha ke hone se israaeliyon ke beech yuddh karane ke yogy haai, unake pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar un sabhon kee ginatee karo." 
Numbers26:3 so moosa aur aeleeajar yajak ne yareeho ke pas yaradan nadee ke teer par moab ke araba men un se samajhake kaha," 
Numbers26:4 bees varsha ke aur us se adhaik avastha ke logon kee ginatee lo, jaaise ki yahova ne moosa aur israaeliyon ko misr desh se nikale ane ke samay agyaa dee thee.." 
Numbers26:5 rooben jo israael ka jetta tha usake ye putra the arthata hanok, jis se hanokiyon ka kul chala aur pallo, jis se pallooiyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:6 hesron, jis se hesroniyon ka kul chala aur karmee, jis se karmiyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:7 roobenavale kul ye hee the aur in men se jo gine gaae ve taaitalees hajar sat sau tees puroosh the. 
Numbers26:8 aur palloo ka putra aeleeab tha. 
Numbers26:9 aur palloo ka putra namooael, datan, aur abeeram the. ye vahee datan aur abeeram haain jo sabhasad the aur jis samay korah kee mandlee ne yahova se jhgada kiya tha, us samay us mandlee men milakar ve bhee moosa aur haroon se jhgade the" 
Numbers26:10 aur jab un addhai sau manushyon ke ag men bhsm ho jane se vah mandlee mitt gai, usee samay prathvee ne munh kholakar korah samet inako bhee nigal liya aur ve aek drashttant tthare." 
Numbers26:11 parantu korah ke putra to naheen mare the. 
Numbers26:12 shaimon ke putra jin se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata namooael, jis se namooaeliyon ka kul chala aur yameen, jis se yameeaniyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:13 aur jerah, jis se jeraahiyon ka kul chala aur shaaul, jis se shaauliyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:14 shaimonavale kul ye hee the in men se bais hajar do sau puroosh gine gaae.. 
Numbers26:15 aur gad ke putra jis se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata sapon, jis se saponiyon ka kul chala aur haggee, jis se haggaiyon ka kul chala aur shoonee, jis se shooniyon ka kul chala aur ojanee, jis se ojaaniyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:16 aur aeree, jis se aeriyon ka kul chala aur arod, jis se arodiyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:17 aur arelee, jis se arealiyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:18 gad ke vansh ke kul ye hee the in men se saddhe chalees hajar puroosh gine gaae.. 
Numbers26:19 aur yahooda ke aek aur onan nam putra to hua, parantu ve kanan desh men mar gaae." 
Numbers26:20 aur yahooda ke jin putraen se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata shola, jis se sholiyon ka kul chala aur peres jis se pereasiyon ka kul chala aur jerah, jis se jeraahiyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:21 aur peres ke putra ye the arthata hesron, jis se hesroniyon ka kul chala aur hamool, jis se hamooliyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:22 yahoodiyon ke kul ye hee the in men se saddhe chhhaittr hajar puroosh gine gaae.. 
Numbers26:23 aur issakar ke putra jin se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata tola, jis se toliyon ka kul chala aur puvva, jis se puvvaiyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:24 aur yashoob, jis se yashoobiyon ka kul chala aur shaimraen, jis se shaimraeniyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:25 issakariyon ke kul ye hee the in men se chausatt hajar teen sau puroosh gine gaae.. 
Numbers26:26 aur jabooloon ke putra jin se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata sered jis se sereadiyon ka kul chala aur aelon, jis se aeloniyon ka kul chala aur yahalel, jis se yahaleliyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:27 jaboolooniyon ke kul ye hee the in men se saddhe satt hajar puroosh gine gaae.. 
Numbers26:28 aur yoosufa ke putra jis se unake kul nikale ve manashsho aur aepraaim the. 
Numbers26:29 manashsho ke putra ye the arthata makeer, jis se makeeariyon ka kul chala aur makeer se gilad utpann hua aur gilad se gilaadiyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:30 gilad ke to putra ye the arthata iaejer, jis se iaejeriyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:31 aur helek, jis se heleakiyon ka kul chala aur asreeael, jis se asreeaeliyon ka kul chala aur shokem, jis se shokeamiyon ka kul chala aur shameeda, jis se shameeadiyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:32 aur heper, jis se hepeariyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:33 aur heper ke putra salofaad ke bette nahee, keval beattyaian hui in bettyaien ke nam mahala, noa, hogla, milka, aur tirsa haain." 
Numbers26:34 manashshovale kul ye hee the aur in men se jo gine gaae ve bavan hajar sat sau puroosh the.. 
Numbers26:35 aur aepraaim ke putra jin se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata shootelah, jis se shootelahiyon ka kul chala aur beker, jis se bekeariyon ka kul chala aur tahan jis se tahaaniyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:36 aur shootelah ke yah putra hua arthata aeran, jis se aeraaniyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:37 aepraaiamiyon ke kul ye hee the in men se saddhe battees hajar puroosh gine gaae. apane kulon ke anusar yoosufa ke vansh ke log ye hee the.. 
Numbers26:38 aur binyameen ke putra jin se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata bela jis se leviyon ka kul chala aur ashabel, jis se ashabeliyon ka kul chala aur aheeram, jis se aheeramiyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:39 aur shapoopas, jis se shapoopaamiyon ka kul chala aur hoopam, jis se hoopamiyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:40 aur bela ke putra arda aur naman the aur arda se to ardiyon ko kul, aur naman se namaniyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:41 apane kulon ke anusar binyameenee ye hee the aur in men se jo gine gaae ve paaintalees hajar chh: sau puroosh the.. 
Numbers26:42 aur dan ka putra jis se unaka kul nikala yah tha arthata shooham, jis se shoohaamiyon ka kul chala. aur dan ka kul yahee tha." 
Numbers26:43 aur shoohamiyon men se jo gine gaae unake kul men chausatt hajar char sau puroosh the.. 
Numbers26:44 aur ashor ke putra jis se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata yimna, jis se yimnaiyon ka kul chala yishraee, jis se yishrayaien ka kul chala aur bareea, jis se bareeiyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:45 fir bareea ke ye putra huae arthata heber, jis se hebeariyon ka kul chala aur malkeeael, jis se malkeeaeliyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:46 aur ashor kee bettee ka nam serah haai. 
Numbers26:47 ashoriyon ke kul ye hee the in men se tirpan hajar char sau puroosh gine gaae.. 
Numbers26:48 aur naptalee ke putra jis se unake kul nikale ve ye the arthata yahasel, jis se yahaseliyon ka kul chala aur goonee, jis se gooniyon ka kul chala" 
Numbers26:49 yeser, jis se yeseariyon ka kul chala aur shaillem, jis se shaillemiyon ka kul chala." 
Numbers26:50 apane kulon ke anusar naptalee ke kul ye hee the aur in men se jo gine gaae ve paaintalees hajar char sau puroosh the.. 
Numbers26:51 sab israaeliyon men se jo gine gaae the ve ye hee the arthata chh: lakh aek hajar sat sau tees puroosh the.. 
Numbers26:52 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers26:53 inako, inakee ginatee ke anusar, vah boomi inaka bhag hone ke liye bantt dee jaae." 
Numbers26:54 arthata jis kul se adhaik hon unako adhaik bhag, aur jis men kam hon unako kam bhag dena pratyek gotra ko usaka bhag usake gine huae logon ke anusar diya jaae." 
Numbers26:55 taubhee desh chitthee dalakar bantta jaae israaeliyon ke pitaron ke aek aek gotra ka nam, jaaise jaaise nikale vaaise vaaise ve apana apana bhag paaen." 
Numbers26:56 chahe bahuton ka bhag ho chahe thodon ka ho, jo jo bhag bantte jaaen vah chitthee dalakar bantte jaae.." 
Numbers26:57 fir leviyon men se jo apane kulon ke anusar gine gaae ve ye haain arthata geshareaniyon se nikala hua geshareaniyon ka kula kahat se nikala hua kahatiyon ka kula aur mararee se nikala hua marariyon ka kula. 
Numbers26:58 leaviyon ke kul ye haain arthata libnaiyon ka, hebraaaniyon ka, mahaliyon ka, mooshaiyon ka, aur korahiyon ka kula. aur kahat se amraam utpann hua." 
Numbers26:59 aur amraam kee patnee ka nam yokebed haai, vah levee ke vansh kee thee jo levee ke vansh men misr desh men utpann hui thee aur vah amraam se haroon aur moosa aur unakee bahin mariyam ko bhee janee." 
Numbers26:60 aur haroon se nadab, abeeho, aeleeajar, aur itamar utpann hue." 
Numbers26:61 nadab aur abeehoo to us samay mar gaae the, jab ve yahova ke samhane uparee ag le gaae the." 
Numbers26:62 sab leaviyon men se jo gine gaye, arthata jitane puroosh aek maheene ke va us se adhaik avastha ke the, ve teis hajar the ve israaeliyon ke beech isaliye naheen gine gaa, kyonki unako desh ka koi bhag naheen diya gaya tha.." 
Numbers26:63 moosa aur aeleeajar yajak jinhon ne moab ke araba men yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee ke tatt par israaeliyon ko gin liya, unake gine huae log itane hee the." 
Numbers26:64 parantu jin israaeliyon ko moosa aur haroon yajak ne seenaai ke jangal men gina tha, un men se aek puroosh is samay ke gine huon men n tha." 
Numbers26:65 kyonaki yahova ne unake vishay kaha tha, ki ve nishchay jangal men mar jaaenge, isaaliye yapunne ke putra kaleb aur noon ke putra yahoshoo ko chhod, un men se aek bhee puroosh naheen bacha.." 
Numbers27:1 tab yoosufa ke putra manashsho ke vansh ke kulon men se salofaad, jo heper ka putra, aur gilad ka pota, aur manashsho ke putra makeer ka parapota tha, usakee bettyaian jinake nam mahala, nova, hogla, milaka, aur tirsa haain ve pas ain." 
Numbers27:2 aur ve moosa aur aeleeajar yajak aur pradhaanon aur saree mandlee ke samhane milapavale tamboo ke dar par khdee hokar kahane lagee," 
Numbers27:3 hamara pita jangal men mar gaya parantu vah us mandlee men ka n tha jo korah kee mandlee ke sang hokar yahova ke virooddh ikatthee hui thee, vah apane hee pap ke karan mara aur usake koi putra n tha." 
Numbers27:4 to hamare pita ka nam usake kul men se putra n hone ke karan kyon mitt jaae? hamare chachaon ke beech hamen bhee kuchh boomi nij bhag karake de. 
Numbers27:5 unakee yah binatee moosa ne yahova ko sunai. 
Numbers27:6 yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers27:7 salofaad kee beattyaian tteek kahatee haain isaliye too unake chachaon ke beech unako bhee avashy hee kuchh boomi nij bhag karake de, arthata unake pita ka bhag unake hath saunp de." 
Numbers27:8 aur israaeliyon se yah kah, ki yadi koi manushy niputra mar jaa, to usaka bhag usakee bettee ke hath saunpana." 
Numbers27:9 aur yaadi usake koi bettee bhee n ho, to usaka bhag usake bhaiyon ko dena." 
Numbers27:10 aur yaadi usake bhai bhee n ho, to usaka bhag chachaon ko dena." 
Numbers27:11 aur yaadi usake chacha bhee n ho, to usake kul men se usaka jo kuttumbee sab se sameep ho usako usaka bhag dena, ki vah usaka adhaikaree ho. israaeliyon ke liye yah nyay kee vidhai ttharegee, jaaise ki yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee.." 
Numbers27:12 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, is abareem nam parvat ke upar chaddhke us desh ko dekh le jise maain ne israaeliyon ko diya haai." 
Numbers27:13 aur jab too usako dekh lega, tab apane bhai haroon kee nai too bhee apane logon me ja milega," 
Numbers27:14 kyonaki seen nam jangal men tum donon ne mandlee ke jhgadne ke samay meree agyaa ko todkar mujh se balava kiya, aur mujhe sote ke pas unakee draashtti men pavitra naheen ttharaya. yah mareeba nam sota haai jo seen nam jangal ke kadesh men haai" 
Numbers27:15 moosa ne yahova se kaha," 
Numbers27:16 yahova, jo sare praaanaiyon kee atmaon ka parameshvar haai, vah is mandlee ke logon ke upar kisee puroosh ko niyukt kar de," 
Numbers27:17 jo usake samhane aya jaya kare, aur unaka nikalane aur paaittanevala ho jis se yahova kee mandlee bina charavahe kee bhed bakariyon ke saman n rahe." 
Numbers27:18 yahova ne moosa se kaha, too noon ke putra yahoshoo ko lekar us par hath rakh vah to aeesa puroosh haai jis men mera atma basa haai" 
Numbers27:19 aur usako aeleeajar yajak ke aur saree mandlee ke samhane khda karake unake samhane use agyaa de. 
Numbers27:20 aur apanee maahima men se kuchh use de, jis se israaeliyon kee saree mandlee usakee mana kare." 
Numbers27:21 aur vah aeleeajar yajak ke samhane khda hua kare, aur aeleeajar usake liye yahova se ureem kee agyaa poochha kare aur vah israaeliyon kee saree mandlee samet usake kahane se jaya kare, aur usee ke kahane se lautt bhee aya kare." 
Numbers27:22 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar moosa ne yahoshoo ko lekar, aeleeajar yajak aur saree mandlee ke samhane khda karake," 
Numbers27:23 us par hath rakhe, aur usako agyaa dee jaaise ki yahova ne moosa ke dara kaha tha.." 
Numbers28:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers28:2 israaeliyon ko yah agyaa suna ki mera chaddhava, arthata mujhe sukhdayak sugandha denevala mera havyaroopee bhojan, tum log mere liye unake niyat samayon par chaddhane ke liye smaran rakhna." 
Numbers28:3 aur too un se kah, ki jo jo tumhen yahova ke liye chaddhana hoga ve ye haain arthata nity homabaali ke liye aek aek varsha ke do nirdosh bhedee ke bachche praatidin chaddhaya kare." 
Numbers28:4 aek bachche ko bhor ko aur doosare ko godhooli ke samay chaddhana 
Numbers28:5 aur bhed ke bachche ke peechhe aek chauthai heen koottke nikale huae tel se sane huae aepa ke dasaven ansh maaide ka annabaali chaddhana. 
Numbers28:6 yah nity homabaali haai, jo seenaai parvat par yahova ka sukhdayak sugandhavala havy hone ke liye ttharaya gaya." 
Numbers28:7 aur usaka argha prati aek bhed ke bachche ke sang aek chauthai heen ho madira ka yah argha yahova ke liye paavitrasthan men dena. 
Numbers28:8 aur doosare bachche ko godhooli ke samay chaddhana annabaali aur argha samet bhor ke homabali kee nai use yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha denevala havy karake chaddhana.. 
Numbers28:9 fir vishraamadin ko do nirdosh bhed ke aek sal ke nar bachche, aur annabaali ke liye tel se sana hua aepa ka do dasavan ansh maaida argha samet chaddhana." 
Numbers28:10 nity homabaali aur usake argha ke alava pratyek vishraamadin ka yahee homabaali tthara haai.. 
Numbers28:11 fir apane maheenon ke arambh men pratimas yahova ke liye homabaali chaddhana arthata do bachhde, aek meddha, aur aek aek varsha ke nirdosh bhed ke sat bachche" 
Numbers28:12 aur bachhde peechhe tel se sana hua aepa ka teen dasavan ansh maaida, aur us aek meddhe ke sath tel se sana hua aepa ka do dasavan ansh maaida" 
Numbers28:13 aur pratyek bhed ke bachche ke peechhe tel se sana hua aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida, un sabhon ko annabali karake chaddhana vah sukhdayak sugandha dene ke liye homabaali aur yahova ke liye havy ttharega." 
Numbers28:14 aur unake sath ye argha hon arthata bachhde peechhe adha heen, meddhe ke sath tihai heen, aur bhed ke bachche peechhe chauthai heen dakhmadha diya jaae varsha ke sab maheenon men se prati aek maheene ka yahee homabaali tthare." 
Numbers28:15 aur aek bakara papabaali karake yahova ke liye chaddhaya jaae yah nity homabaali aur usake argha ke alava chaddhaya jaae.. 
Numbers28:16 fir pahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko yahova ka fasah hua kare. 
Numbers28:17 aur usee maheene ke pandrahaven din ko pabrba laga kare sat din tak akhmeeree rottee khai jaae. 
Numbers28:18 paahile din pavitra sabha ho aur us din parishram ka koi kam n kiya jaae 
Numbers28:19 us men tum yahova ke liye havy, arthata homabaali chaddhana so do bachhde, ek meddha, aur ek ek varsha ke sat bhed ke bachche hon ye sab nirdosh hon" 
Numbers28:20 aur unaka annabali tel se sane huae maaide ka ho bachhde peechhe aepa ka teen dasavan ansh aur meddhe ke sat aepa ka do dasavan ansh maaida ho. 
Numbers28:21 aur saton bhed ke bachchon men se praati aek bachche peechhe aepa ka dasavan ansh chaddhana. 
Numbers28:22 aur aek bakara bhee papabaali karake chaddhana, jis se tumhare liye praayaashchaitt ho." 
Numbers28:23 bhor ka homabaali jo nity homabaali tthara haai, usake alava inako chaddhana." 
Numbers28:24 is reeati se tum un saton dinon men bhee havy ka bhojan chaddhana, jo yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha dene ke liye ho yah nity homabaali aur usake argha ke alava chaddhaya jaae." 
Numbers28:25 aur sataven din bhee tumharee paavitra sabha ho aur us din parishram ka koi kam n karana.. 
Numbers28:26 fir pahilee upaj ke din me, jab tum apane attvare nam pabrba men yahova ke liye naya annabaali chaddhaoge, tab bhee tumharee paavitra sabha ho aur parishram ka koi kam n karana." 
Numbers28:27 aur aek homabaali chaddhana, jis se yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandha ho arthata do bachhde, aek meddha, aur aek aek varsha ke sat bhed ke bachche" 
Numbers28:28 aur unaka annabali tel se sane huae maaide ka ho arthata bachhde peechhe aepa ka teen dasavan ansha, aur meddhe ke sang aepa ka do dasavan ansha," 
Numbers28:29 aur saton bhed ke bachchon men se aek aek bachche ke peechhe aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida chaddhana. 
Numbers28:30 aur aek bakara bhee chaddhana, jis se tumhare liye praayaashchaitt ho." 
Numbers28:31 ye sab nirdosh hon aur nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava isako bhee chaddhana.. 
Numbers29:1 fir sataven maheene ke pahile din ko tumharee paavitra sabha ho us men parishram ka koi kam n karana. vah tumhare liye jayajayakar ka narasinga foonkane ka din tthara haai 
Numbers29:2 tum homabaali chaddhana, jis se yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandha ho arthata bachhda, aek meddha, aur aek aek varsha ke sat nirdosh bhed ke bachche" 
Numbers29:3 aur unaka annabali tel se sane huae maaide ka ho arthata bachhde ke sath aepa ka do dasavan ansha," 
Numbers29:4 aur saton bhed ke bachchon men se aek aek bachche peechhe aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida chaddhana. 
Numbers29:5 aur aek bakara bhee papabaali karake chaddhana, jis se tumhare liye praayaashchaitt ho." 
Numbers29:6 in sabhon se adhaik naae chand ka homabaali aur usaka annabaali, aur nity homabaali aur usaka annabaali, aur un sabhon ke argha bhee unake niyam ke anusar sukhdayak sugandha dene ke liye yahova ke havy karake chaddhana.." 
Numbers29:7 fir usee sataven maheene ke dasaven din ko tumharee paavitra sabha ho tum apane apane praan ko du:kh dena, aur kisee prakar ka kamakaj n karana" 
Numbers29:8 aur yahova ke liye sukhdayak sugandha dene ko homabali arthata aek bachhda, aek meddha, aur aek aek varsha ke sat bhed ke bachche chaddhana fir ye sab nirdosh hon" 
Numbers29:9 aur unaka annabali tel se sane huae maaide ka ho arthata bachhde ke sath aepa ka teen dasavan ansha, aur meddhe ke sath aepa ka do dasavan ansha," 
Numbers29:10 aur saton bhed ke bachchon men se aek aek bachche ke peechhe aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida chaddhana. 
Numbers29:11 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye sab praayashchaitt ke papabali aur nity homabaali aur usake annabaali ke, aur un sabhon ke adhare ke alava chaddhaya jaae.." 
Numbers29:12 fir sataven maheene ke pandrahaven din ko tumharee paavitra sabha ho aur us men parishram ka koi kam n karana, aur sat din tak yahova ke liye pabrba manana" 
Numbers29:13 tum homabaali yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha dene ke liye havy karake chaddhana arthata terah bachhde, aur do meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke chaudah bhed ke bachche ye sab nirdosh hon" 
Numbers29:14 aur unaka annabali tel se sane huae maaide ka ho arthata terahon bachhdon men se aek aek bachhde ke peechhe aepa ka teen dasavan ansha, aur donon meddhon men se aek aek meddhe ke peechhe aepa ka do dasavan ansha," 
Numbers29:15 aur chaudahon bhed ke bachchon men se aek aek bachche ke peechhe aepa ka dasavan ansh maaida chaddhana. 
Numbers29:16 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:17 fir doosare din barah bachhde, aur do meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke chaudah nirdosh bhed ke bachche chaddhana" 
Numbers29:18 aur bachhdo, aur meddho, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath unake annabali aur argha, unakee ginatee ke anusar, aur niyam ke anusar chaddhana.." 
Numbers29:19 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:20 fir teesare din gyarah bachhde, aur do meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke chaudah nirdosh bhed ke bachche chaddhana" 
Numbers29:21 aur bachhdo, aur meddho, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath unake annabali aur argha, unakee ginatee ke anusar, aur niyam ke anusar chaddhana." 
Numbers29:22 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:23 aur fir chauthe din das bachhde, aur do meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke chaudah nirdosh bhed ke bachche chaddhana" 
Numbers29:24 bachhdo, aur meddho, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath unake annabali aur argha, unakee ginatee ke anusar, aur niyam ke anusar chaddhana." 
Numbers29:25 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:26 fir panchaven din nau bachhde, do meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke chaudah nirdosh bhed ke bachche chaddhana" 
Numbers29:27 aur bachhdo, meddho, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath unake annabali aur argha, unakee ginatee ke anusar, aur niyam ke anusar chaddhana." 
Numbers29:28 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:29 fir chhttven din att bachhde, aur do meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke chaudah nirdosh bhed ke bachche chaddhana" 
Numbers29:30 aur bachhdo, aur meddho, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath unake annabali aur argha, unakee ginatee ke anusar chaddhana." 
Numbers29:31 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:32 fir sataven din sat bachhde, aur do meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke chaudah nirdosh bhed ke bachche chaddhana." 
Numbers29:33 aur bachhdon aur meddho, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath unake annabali aur argha, unakee ginatee ke anusar chaddhana." 
Numbers29:34 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:35 fir attven din tumharee aek mahasabha ho us men parishram ka koi kam n karana," 
Numbers29:36 aur us men homabaali yahova ko sukhdayak sugandha dene ke liye havy karake chaddhana vah aek bachhde, aur aek meddhe, aur aek aek varsha ke sat nirdonsh bhed ke bachchon ka ho" 
Numbers29:37 bachhde, aur meddhe, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath unake annabali aur argha, unakee ginatee ke anusar, aur niyam ke anusar chaddhana." 
Numbers29:38 aur papabaali ke liye aek bakara bhee chaddhana ye nity homabaali aur usake annabaali aur argha ke alava chaddhaae jaaen.. 
Numbers29:39 apanee mannaton aur svechchhabaliyon ke alava, apane apane niyat samayon me, ye hee homabali, annabaali, argha, aur melabaali, yahova ke liye chaddhana." 
Numbers29:40 yah saree agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee jo us ne israaeliyon ko sunai.. 
Numbers30:1 fir moosa ne israaelee gotraen ke mukhy mukhy purooshaen se kaha, yahova ne yah agyaa dee haai," 
Numbers30:2 ki jab koi puroosh yahova kee mannat mane, va apane ap ko vacha se bandhane ke liye shapath khaa, to vah apana vachan n ttale jo kuchh usake munh se nikala ho usake anusar vah kare." 
Numbers30:3 aur jab koi sree apanee kunvaree avastha me, apane pita ke ghar se rahate hua, yahova kee mannat mane, va apane ko vacha se bandho," 
Numbers30:4 to yaadi usaka pita usakee mannat va usaka vah vachan sunakar, jis se usane apane ap ko bandha ho, us se kuchh n kahe tab to usakee sab mannaten sthiar banee rahe, aur koi bandhan kyon n ho, jis se us ne apane ap ko bandha ho, vah bhee sthiar rahe." 
Numbers30:5 parantu yadi usaka pita usakee sunakar usee din usako baraje, to usakee mannaten va aur prakar ke bandhan, jin se us ne apane ap ko bandha ho, un men se aek bhee sthiar n rahe, aur yahova yah jan kar, ki us sree ke pita ne use mana kar diya haai, usaka yah pap kshama karega." 
Numbers30:6 fir yadi vah pati ke adhaeen ho aur mannat mane, va bina soch vichar kiae aeesa kuchh kahe jis se vah bandhan men pade," 
Numbers30:7 aur yaadi usaka pati sunakar us din usase kuchh n kahe tab to usakee mannaten sthiar rahe, aur jin bandhanon se us ne apane ap ko bandha ho vah bhee sthiar rahen." 
Numbers30:8 parantu yadi usaka pati sunakar usee din use mana kar de, to jo mannat us ne manee haai, aur jo bat bina soch vichar kiae kahane se us ne apane ap ko vacha se bandha ho, vah toott jaaegee aur yahova us sree ka pap kshama karega." 
Numbers30:9 fir vidhava va tyagee hui sree kee mannat, va kisee prakar kee vacha ka bandhan kyon n ho, jis se us ne apane ap ko bandha ho, to vah sthiar hee rahe." 
Numbers30:10 fir yadi koi sree apane paati ke ghar men rahate mannat mane, va shapath khakar apane ap ko bandho," 
Numbers30:11 aur usaka paati sunakar kuchh n kahe, aur n use mana kare tab to usakee sab mannaten sthiar banee rahe, aur har aek bandhan kyon n ho, jis se us ne apane ap ko bandha ho, vah sthiar rahe." 
Numbers30:12 parantu yadi usaka pati usakee mannat adi sunakar usee din pooree reeti se tod de, to usakee mannaten adi, jo kuchh usake munh se apane bandhan ke vishay nikala ho, us men se aek bat bhee sthiar n rahe usake paati ne sab tod diya haai isaaliye yahova us sree ka vah pap kshama karega." 
Numbers30:13 koi bhee mannat va shapath kyon n ho, jis se us sree ne apane jeev ko du:kh dene kee vacha bandhaee ho, usako usaka paati chahe to draddh kare, aur chahe to tode" 
Numbers30:14 arthata yaadi usaka pati din prati din us se kuchh bhee n kahe, to vah usako sab mannaten aadi bandhanon ko jis se vah bandhaee ho draddh kar deta haai us ne unako draddh kiya haai, kyonki sunane ke din us ne kuchh naheen kaha." 
Numbers30:15 aur yaadi vah unhen sunakar peechhe tod de, to apanee sree ke adharma ka bhar vahee uttaaega." 
Numbers30:16 paati patnee ke beech, aur pita aur usake ghar me rahatee hui kunvaree bettee ke beech, jin vidhaiyon kee agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee ve ye hee haain.." 
Numbers31:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers31:2 midhaaniyon se israaeliyon ka palatta le bad ko too apane logon men ja milega. 
Numbers31:3 tab moosa ne logon se kaha, apane men se purooshaen ko yuddh ke liye haathaiyar bandhaao, ki ve midhaaniyon par chaddhke un se yahova ka palatta le." 
Numbers31:4 israael ke sab gotraen men se pratyek gotra ke aek aek hajar purooshaen ko yuddh karane ke liye bhejo. 
Numbers31:5 tab israael ke sab gotraen men se pratyek gotra ke aek aek hajar puroosh chune gaye, arthata yuddh ke liye haathaiyara-band barah hajar puroosha." 
Numbers31:6 pratyek gotra men se un hajar hajar purooshaen ko, aur aeleeajar yajak ke putra peenahas ko, moosa ne yuddh karane ke liye bheja, aur usake hath men pavitrasthan ke patra aur ve turaahiyan theen jo sans bandha bandha kar foonkee jatee theen." 
Numbers31:7 aur jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee, usake anusar unhon ne midhaaniyon se yuddh karake sab purooshaen ko ghaat kiya." 
Numbers31:8 aur doosare joojhe huon ko chhod unhon ne aevee, rekem, soor, hoor, aur reba nam midhan ke panchon rajaon ko ghaat kiya aur bor ke putra bilam ko bhee unhon ne talavar se ghaat kiya." 
Numbers31:9 aur israaeliyon ne midhanee striayon ko balabachchon samet bandhauai men kar liya aur unake gaya-baail, bhed-bakaree, aur unakee saree sampaati ko loott liya." 
Numbers31:10 aur unake nivas ke sab nagaro, aur sab chhavaaniyon ko foonk diya" 
Numbers31:11 tab ve, kya manushy kya pashu, sab bandhauon aur saree loott-patt ko lekar" 
Numbers31:12 yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee ke teer par, moab ke araba me, chhavanee ke nikat, moosa aur aeleeajar yajak aur israaeliyon kee mandlee ke pas aae.." 
Numbers31:13 tab moosa aur aeleeajar yajak aur mandlee ke sab pradhaan chhavanee ke bahar unaka svagat karane ko nikale. 
Numbers31:14 aur moosa sahasrpati-shatapati adi, senapatiyon se, jo yuddh karake lautte ate the krodhait hokar kahane laga," 
Numbers31:15 kya tum ne sab striayon ko jeevit chhod diya? 
Numbers31:16 dekhe, bilam kee sammaati se, por ke vishay men israaeliyon se yahova ka vishvasaghaat inheen ne karaya, aur yahova kee mandlee men maree faailee." 
Numbers31:17 so ab balabachchon men se har aek ladke ko, aur jitanee striayon ne puroosh ka munh dekha ho un sabhon ko ghaat karo." 
Numbers31:18 parantu jitanee ladkiyon ne puroosh ka munh n dekha ho un sabhon ko tum apane liye jeeavit rakho. 
Numbers31:19 aur tum log sat din tak chhavanee ke bahar raho, aur tum men se jitanon ne kisee praanee ko ghaat kiya, aur jitanon ne kisee mare huae ko chooa ho, ve sab apane apane bandhauon samet teesare aur sataven dinon men apane apane ko pap chhudakar pavan karen." 
Numbers31:20 aur sab vasre, aur chamade kee banee hui sab vastuo, aur bakaree ke balon kee aur lakadee kee banee hui sab vastuon ko pavan kar lo." 
Numbers31:21 tab aeleeajar yajak ne sena ke un purooshaen se jo yuddh karane gaae the kaha, vyavastha kee jis vidhai kee agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee haai vah yah haai," 
Numbers31:22 ki sona, chandee, peetal, loha, ranga, aur seesa," 
Numbers31:23 jo kuchh ag men tthar sake usako ag men dalo, tab vah shuuddh ttharega taubhee vah ashuuddhta chhudanevale jal ke dara pavan kiya jaae parantu jo kuchh ag men n tthar sake use jal men dubao." 
Numbers31:24 aur sataven din apane vasren ko dhaena, tab tum shuuddh ttharoge aur tab chhavanee men ana.." 
Numbers31:25 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers31:26 aeleeajar yajak aur mandlee ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purooshaen ko sath lekar too loott ke manushyon aur pashuuon kee ginatee kara 
Numbers31:27 tab unako adha adha karake aek bhag un sipaahiyon ko jo yuddh karane ko gaae the, aur doosara bhag mandlee ko de."
