Numbers31:28 fir jo sipahee yuddh karane ko gaae the, unake adho men se yahova ke liye, kya manushy, kya gaya-baail, kya gadahe, kya bhed-bakaariyan" 
Numbers31:29 panch sau ke peechhe aek ko manakar le le aur yahova kee bhentt karake aeleeajar yajak ko de de. 
Numbers31:30 fir israaeliyon ke adho men se, kya manushy, kya gaya-baail, kya gadahe, kya bhed-bakaariya, kya kisee prakar ka pashu ho, pachas ke peechhe aek lekar yahova ke nivas kee rakhvalee karanevale leviyon ko de." 
Numbers31:31 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar jo us ne moosa ko dee moosa aur aeleeajar yajak ne kiya. 
Numbers31:32 aur jo vastuaen sena ke purooshaen ne apane apane liye loott lee theen un se adhaik kee loott yah thee arthata chh: lakh pachahattr hajar bhed-bakaariya," 
Numbers31:33 bahattr hajar gay baail," 
Numbers31:34 ikasatt hajar gadahe," 
Numbers31:35 aur manushyon men se jin striayon ne puroosh ka munh naheen dekha tha vah sab battees hajar theen. 
Numbers31:36 aur isaka adha, arthata unaka bhag jo yuddh karane ko gaae the, us men bhedbakariyan teen lakh saddhe saaintees hajar," 
Numbers31:37 jis men se paune sat sau bhed-bakaariyan yahova ka kar tthareen. 
Numbers31:38 aur gaya-baail chhttees hajar, jin men se bahattr yahova ka kar tthare." 
Numbers31:39 aur gadahe saddhe tees hajar, jin men se ikasatt yahova ka kar tthare." 
Numbers31:40 aur manushy solah hajar jin men se battees praanee yahova ka kar tthare. 
Numbers31:41 is kar ko jo yahova kee bhentt thee moosa ne yahova kee agyaa ke anusar aeleeajar yajak ko diya. 
Numbers31:42 aur israaeliyon kee mandlee ka adha 
Numbers31:43 teen lakh saddhe saainatis hajar bhed-bakaariyan 
Numbers31:44 chhttees hajar gaya-baail," 
Numbers31:45 saddhe tees hajar gadahe," 
Numbers31:46 aur solah hajar manushy huae. 
Numbers31:47 is adho men se, jise moosa ne yuddh karanevale purooshaen ke pas se alag kiya tha, yahova kee agyaa ke anusar moosa ne, kya manushy kya pashu, pachas peechhe aek lekar yahova ke nivas kee rakhvalee karanevale leviyon ko diya." 
Numbers31:48 tab sahasrpati-shatapati adi, jo saradar sena ke hajaron ke upar niyukt the, ve moosa ke pas akar kahane lage," 
Numbers31:49 jo sipahee hamare adhaeen the unakee tere dason ne ginatee lee, aur un men se aek bhee naheen ghatta." 
Numbers31:50 isaliye payajeb, kade, mundariya, baliya, bajooband, sone ke jo gahane, jis ne paya haai, unako ham yahova ke samhane apane praanon ke nimitt praayashchaitt karane ko yahova kee bhentt karake le aae haain." 
Numbers31:51 tab moosa aur aeleeajar yajak ne un se ve sab sone ke nakkashaeedar gahane le liae. 
Numbers31:52 aur sahasrpatiyon aur shatapaatiyon ne jo bhentt ka sona yahova kee bhentt karake diya vah sab ka sab solah hajar saddhe sat sau shokel ka tha. 
Numbers31:53 yoddhaon ne to apane apane liye loott le lee thee. 
Numbers31:54 yah sona moosa aur aeleeajar yajak ne sahasrpaatiyon aur shatapaatiyon se lekar milapavale tamboo men pahuncha diya, ki israaeliyon ke liye yahova ke samhane smran dilanevalee vastu tthare.." 
Numbers32:1 roobeniyon aur gaadiyon ke pas bahut janavar the. jab unhon ne yajer aur gilad deshaen ko dekhkar vichar kiya, ki vah ddhoron ke yogy desh haai," 
Numbers32:2 tab moosa aur aeleeajar yajak aur mandlee ke pradhaanon ke pas jakar kahane lage," 
Numbers32:3 atarot, deebon, yajer, nimra, heshabon, aelale, sabam, nabo, aur bon nagaron ka desha" 
Numbers32:4 jis par yahova ne israael kee mandlee ko vijay dilavai haai, vah ddhoron ke yogy haai aur tere dason ke pas ddhor haain." 
Numbers32:5 fir unhon ne kaha, yaadi tera anugrah tere dason par ho, to yah desh tere dason ko mile ki unakee nij boomi ho hamen yaradan par n le chala." 
Numbers32:6 moosa ne gaadiyon aur roobeniyon se kaha, jab tumhare bhai yuddh karane ko jaaenge tab kya tum yahan baaitte rahoge?" 
Numbers32:7 aur israaeliyon se bhee us par ke desh jane ke vishay jo yahova ne unhen diya haai tum kyon asveekar karavate ho? 
Numbers32:8 jab maain ne tumhare bapadadon ko kadeshabarne se kanan desh dekhne ke liye bheja, tab unhon ne bhee aeesa hee kiya tha." 
Numbers32:9 arthata jab unhon ne aeshakol nam nale tak pahunchakar desh ko dekha, tab israaeliyon se us desh ke vishay jo yahova ne unhen diya tha asveekar kara diya." 
Numbers32:10 isaliye us samay yahova ne kop karake yah shapath khai ki," 
Numbers32:11 ni:sandeh jo manushy misr se nikal aae haain un men se, jitane bees varsha ke va us se aadhaik avastha ke haai, ve us desh ko dekhne n paaenge, jisake dene kee shapath maain ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob se khai haai, kyonki ve mere peechhe pooree reeti se naheen ho liye" 
Numbers32:12 parantu yapunne kanajee ka putra kaleb, aur noon ka putra yahoshoo, ye donon jo mere peechhe pooree reeati se ho liye haain ye to use dekhne paaenge." 
Numbers32:13 so yahova ka kop israaeliyon par bhdka, aur jab tak us peeddhee ke sab logon ka ant n hua, jinhon ne yahova ke prati bura kiya tha, tab tak arthata chalees varsha tak vah jangal men mare mare firata raha." 
Numbers32:14 aur suno, tum log un papiyon ke bachche hokar isee liye apane bapa-dadon ke sthan par prakatt huae ho, ki israael ke virooddh yahova se bhdke huae kop ko aur bhdkao!" 
Numbers32:15 yaadi tum usake peechhe chalane se fir jao, to vah fir ham sabhon ko jangal men chhod dega is prakar tum in sare logon ka nash karaoge." 
Numbers32:16 tab unhon ne moosa ke aur nikatt akar kaha, ham apane ddhoron ke liye yaheen bhedshaale banaaenge, aur apane balabachchon ke liye yaheen nagar basaaenge," 
Numbers32:17 parantu ap israaeliyon ke age age haathaiyar band tab tak chalenge, jab tak unako unake sthan men n pahuncha de parantu hamare balabachche is desh ke nivaasiyon ke dr se gaddhvale nagaron men rahenge." 
Numbers32:18 parantu jab tak israaelee apane apane bhag ke adhaikaree n hon tab tak ham apane gharon ko n lauttenge. 
Numbers32:19 ham unake sath yaradan par va kaheen age apana bhag n lenge, kyonki hamara bhag yaradan ke isee par poorab kee or mila haai." 
Numbers32:20 tab moosa ne un se kaha, yadi tum aeesa karo, arthata yadi tum yahova ke age age yuddh karane ko hathaiyar bandhae." 
Numbers32:21 aur har aek haathaiyara-band yaradan ke par tab tak chale, jab tak yahova apane age se apane shatrauon ko n nikale" 
Numbers32:22 aur desh yahova ke vash men n aae to usake peechhe tum yahan lauttoge, aur yahova ke aur israael ke vishay nirdosh ttharoge aur yah desh yahova ke praati tumharee nij boomi ttharega." 
Numbers32:23 aur yaadi tum aeesa n karo, to yahova ke virooddh papee ttharoge aur jan rakho ki tum ko tumhara pap lagega." 
Numbers32:24 tum apane balabachchon ke liye nagar basao, aur apanee bhed-bakaariyon ke liye bhedshaale banao aur jo tumhare munh se nikala haai vahee karo." 
Numbers32:25 tab gaadiyon aur roobeniyon ne moosa se kaha, apane prabhu kee agyaa ke anusar tere das karenge." 
Numbers32:26 hamare balabachche, striaya, bhed-bakaree adi, sab pashu to yaheen gilad ke nagaron men rahenge" 
Numbers32:27 parantu apane prabhu ke kahe ke anusar tere das sab ke sab yuddh ke liye haathaiyara-band yahova ke age age ladne ko par jaaenge. 
Numbers32:28 tab moosa ne unake vishay men aeleeajar yajak, aur noon ke putra yahoshoo, aur israaeliyon ke gotraen ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purooshaen ko yah agyaa dee," 
Numbers32:29 ki yadi sab gadee aur roobenee puroosh yuddh ke liye haathaiyara-band tumhare sang yaradan par jaae, aur desh tumhare vash men a jaa, to gilad desh unakee nij boomi hone ko unhen dena." 
Numbers32:30 parantu yadi ve tumhare sang hathaiyara-band par n jaae, to unakee nij boomi tumhare beech kanan desh men tthare." 
Numbers32:31 tab gadee aur roobenee bol utte, yahova ne jaaisa tere dason se kahalaya haai vaaisa hee ham karenge." 
Numbers32:32 ham haathaiyara-band yahova ke age age us par kanan desh men jaaenge, parantu hamaree nij boomi yaradan ke isee par rahe.." 
Numbers32:33 tab moosa ne gaadiyon aur roobeniyon ko, aur yoosufa ke putra manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ko aemoriyon ke raja seehon aur bashaan ke raja og, donon ke rajyon ka desha, nagaro, aur unake asapas kee boomi samet de diya." 
Numbers32:34 tab gaadiyon ne deebon, atarot, aroaer," 
Numbers32:35 atraaait, shaepan, yajer, yogabaha," 
Numbers32:36 betanimra, aur betharan nam nagaron ko draddh kiya, aur un men bhed-bakaariyon ke liye bhedshaale banaae." 
Numbers32:37 aur roobeniyon ne heshabon, aelale, aur kiryataaim ko," 
Numbers32:38 fir nabo aur balamon ke nam badalakar unako, aur sibama ko draddh kiya aur unhon ne apane draddh kiae huae nagaron ke aur aur nam rakhe." 
Numbers32:39 aur manashsho ke putra makeer ke vanshavalon ne gilad desh men jakar use le liya, aur jo aemoree us men rahate the unako nikal diya." 
Numbers32:40 tab moosa ne manashsho ke putra makeer ke vansh ko gilad de diya, aur ve us men rahane lage." 
Numbers32:41 aur manashshoi yair ne jakar gilad kee kitanee bastaiyan le lee, aur unake nam havvotyair rakhe." 
Numbers32:42 aur nobah ne jakar ganvon samet kanat ko le liya, aur usaka nam apane nam par nobah rakha.." 
Numbers33:1 jab se israaelee moosa aur haroon kee aguvai se dal bandhakar misr desh se nikale, tab se unake ye padav hue." 
Numbers33:2 moosa ne yahova se agyaa pakar unake kooch unake padavon ke anusar likh diae aur ve ye haain. 
Numbers33:3 paahile maheene ke pandrahaven din ko unhon ne ramases se kooch kiya fasah ke doosare din israaelee sab misriyon ke dekhte bekhttke nikal gaa," 
Numbers33:4 jab ki misree apane sab paahilautton ko mittee de rahe the jinhen yahova ne mara tha aur us ne unake devataon ko bhee dand diya tha. 
Numbers33:5 israaeliyon ne ramases se kooch kare sukkot men dere dale. 
Numbers33:6 aur sukkot se kooch karake aetam me, jo jangal ke chhor par haai, dere dale." 
Numbers33:7 aur aetam se kooch karake ve peehaheerot ko mud gaa, jo balasapon ke samhane haai aur migadol ke samhane dere khde kiae." 
Numbers33:8 tab ve peehaheerot ke samhane se kooch kar samudra ke beech hokar jangal men gaa, aur aetam nam jangal men teen din ka marga chalakar mara men dere dale." 
Numbers33:9 fir mara se kooch karake ve aeleem ko gaa, aur aeleem men jal ke barah sote aur sattr khjoor ke vraksha mile, aur unhon ne vahan dere khde kiae." 
Numbers33:10 tab unhon ne aeleem se kooch kare lal samudra ke teer par dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:11 aur lal samudra se kooch karake seen nam jangal men dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:12 fir seen nam jangal se kooch karake unhon ne dopaka men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:13 aur dopaka se kooch karake aloosh men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:14 aur aloosh se kooch karake rapeedeem men dera kiya, aur vahan un logon ko peene ka panee n mila." 
Numbers33:15 fir unhon ne rapeedeem se kooch karake seenaai ke jangal men dere dale. 
Numbers33:16 aur seenaai ke jangal se kooch karake kibraethttava men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:17 aur kibraethttava se kooch kare haserot men dere dale. 
Numbers33:18 aur haserot se kooch karake ritma men dere dale. 
Numbers33:19 fir unhon ne ritma se kooch karake rimmonaperes men dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:20 aur rimmonaperes se kooch karake libna men dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:21 aur libna se kooch karake rissa men dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:22 aur rissa se kooch karake kahelata men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:23 aur kahelata se kooch karake shoper parvat ke pas dera kiya. 
Numbers33:24 fir unhon ne shoper parvat se kooch karake harada men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:25 aur harada se kooch karake makhelot men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:26 aur makhelot se kooch karake tahat men dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:27 aur tahat se kooch karake terah men dere dale. 
Numbers33:28 aur terah se kooch karake mitka men dere dale. 
Numbers33:29 fir mitka se kooch karake unhon ne hashamona men dere dale. 
Numbers33:30 aur hashamona se kooch karake moserot me dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:31 aur moserot se kooch karake yakaaniyon ke beech dera kiya. 
Numbers33:32 aur yakaniyon ke beech se kooch karake horhaaggaidagad men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:33 aur horhaggaidagad se kooch karake yotabata men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:34 aur yotabata se kooch karake abraena men dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:35 aur abraena se kooch karake aesyonageber men dere khde kiae. 
Numbers33:36 aur aesyonageber ke kooch karake unhon ne seen nam jangal ke kadesh men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:37 fir kadesh se kooch karake hor parvat ke pas, jo aedom desh ke sivane par haai, dere dale." 
Numbers33:38 vahan israaeliyon ke misr desh se nikalane ke chaleesaven varsha ke panchaven maheene ke pahile din ko haroon yajak yahova kee agyaa pakar hor parvat par chaddha, aur vahan mar gaya." 
Numbers33:39 aur jab haroon hor parvat par mar gaya tab vah aek sau teis varsha ka tha. 
Numbers33:40 aur arat ka kananee raja, jo kanan desh ke daakkhian bhag men rahata tha, us ne israaeliyon ke ane ka samachar paya." 
Numbers33:41 tab israaeliyon ne hor parvat se kooch karake salamona men dere dale. 
Numbers33:42 aur salamona se kooch karake poonon men dere dale. 
Numbers33:43 aur poonon se kooch karake obos men dere dale. 
Numbers33:44 aur obos se kooch karake abareem nam deehon men jo moab ke sivane par haai, dere dale." 
Numbers33:45 tab un deehon se kooch karake unhon ne deebonagad men dera kiya. 
Numbers33:46 aur deebonagad se kooch karake almonadibalataaim se kooch karake unhon ne abareem nam pahadon meen nabo ke samhane dera kiya. 
Numbers33:47 aur almonadibalataaim se kooch karake unhon ne abareem nam pahadon men nabo ke samhane dera kiya. 
Numbers33:48 fir abareem pahadon se kooch karake moab ke araba me, yareeho ke pas yaradan nadee ke tatt par dera kiya." 
Numbers33:49 aur ve moab ke araba men vetyashaeemot se lekar abelashaitteem tak yaradan ke teer teer dere dale.. 
Numbers33:50 fir moab ke araba me, yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee ke tatt par, yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers33:51 israaeliyon ko samajhakar kah, jab tum yaradan par hokar kanan desh men pahuncho" 
Numbers33:52 tab us desh ke nivaasiyon ko unake desh se nikal dena aur unake sab nakkasho patthron ko aur ddhlee hui moortiyon ko nash karana, aur unake sab pooja ke unche sthanon ko ddha dena." 
Numbers33:53 aur us desh ko apane adhaikar men lekar us men nivas karana, kyonaki maain ne vah desh tumheen ko diya haai ki tum usake adhaikaree ho." 
Numbers33:54 aur tum us desh ko chitthee dalakar apane kulon ke anusar bantt lena arthata jo kul adhaikavale haain unhen adhaik, aur jo thodevale haain unako thoda bhag dena jis kul kee chitthee jis sthan ke liye nikale vahee usaka bhag tthare apane pitaron ke gotraen ke anusar apana apana bhag lena." 
Numbers33:55 parantu yadi tum us desh ke nivaasiyon ko apane age se n nikaloge, to un men se jinako tum us men rahane doge ve mano tumharee ankhon men kantte aur tumhare panjaron men keelen ttharenge, aur ve us desh men jahan tum basoge tumhen sankatt men dalenge." 
Numbers33:56 aur un se jaaisa bartav karane kee manasa maain ne kee haai vaaisa hee tum se karoonga. 
Numbers34:1 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers34:2 israaeliyon ko yah agyaa de, ki jo desh tumhara bhag hoga vah to charon or se sivane tak ka kanan desh haai, isaliye jab tum kanan desh me pahuncho," 
Numbers34:3 tab tumhara dakkhianee praant seen nam jangal se le aedom desh ke kinare kinare hota hua chala jaa, aur tumhara dakkhianee sivana khare tal ke sire par arambh hokar pashchaim kee or chale" 
Numbers34:4 vahan se tumhara sivana akrabbeem nam chaddhai kee dakkhian kee or pahunchakar mude, aur seen tak aa, aur kadeshabarne kee dakkhian kee or nikale, aur hasaraar tak baddhke asmon tak pahunche" 
Numbers34:5 fir vah sivana asmon se ghoomakar misr ke nale tak pahunche, aur usaka ant samudra ka tatt tthare." 
Numbers34:6 fir pachchhimee sivana mahasamudra ho tumhara paachchhimee sivana yahee tthare. 
Numbers34:7 aur tumhara uttreey sivana yah ho, arthata tum mahasamudra se le hor parvat tak sivana bandhaana" 
Numbers34:8 aur hor parvat se hamat kee ghaattee tak sivana bandhana, aur vah sadad par nikale" 
Numbers34:9 fir vah sivana jipraen tak pahunche, aur hasarenan par nikale tumhara uttreey sivana yahee tthare." 
Numbers34:10 fir apana poorabee sivana hasarenan se shapam tak bandhana 
Numbers34:11 aur vah sivana shapam se ribala tak, jo aeen kee poorva kee or haai, neeche ko utarate utarate kinneret nam tal ke poorva se lag jaae" 
Numbers34:12 aur vah sivana yaradan tak utarake khare tal ke tatt par nikale. tumhare desh ke charon sivane ye hee ttharen. 
Numbers34:13 tab moosa ne israaeliyon se fir kaha, jis desh ke tum chitthee dalakar aadhaikaree hoge, aur yahova ne use saddhe nau gotra ke logon ko dene kee agyaa dee haai, vah yahee haai" 
Numbers34:14 parantu roobeaniyon aur gaadiyon ke gotra to apane apane pitaron ke kulon ke anusar apana apana bhag pa chuke haai, aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke log bhee apana bhag pa chuke haain" 
Numbers34:15 arthata un addhai gotraen ke log yareeho ke pas kee yaradan ke par poorva disha me, jahan sooryoday hota haai, apana apana bhag pa chuke haain.." 
Numbers34:16 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers34:17 ki jo puroosh tum logon ke liye us desh ko banttenge unake nam ye haain arthata aeleeajar yajak aur noon ka putra yahoshoo. 
Numbers34:18 aur desh ko banttne ke liye aek aek gotra ka aek aek pradhaan ttharana. 
Numbers34:19 aur in purooshaen ke nam ye haain arthata yahoodagotraee yapunne ka putra kaleb," 
Numbers34:20 shaimonagotraee ammeehood ka putra shamuel," 
Numbers34:21 binyameenagotraee kisalon ka putra aeleedad," 
Numbers34:22 daaniyon ke gotra ka pradhaan yoglee ka putra bukkee," 
Numbers34:23 yoosuafiyon men se manashshoiyon ke gotra ka pradhaan aepod ka putra hanneeael," 
Numbers34:24 aur aepraaiamiyon ke gotra ka pradhaan shaimtan ka putra kamooael," 
Numbers34:25 jaboolooniyon ke gotra ka pradhaan parnak ka putra aeleesapan," 
Numbers34:26 issakariyon ke gotra ka pradhaan ajjan ka putra palateeael," 
Numbers34:27 ashoriyon ke gotra ka pradhaan shalomee ka putra aheehood," 
Numbers34:28 aur naptaaliyon ke gotra ka pradhaan ammeehood ka putra padahela. 
Numbers34:29 jin purooshaen ko yahova ne kanan desh ko israaeliyon ke liye banttne kee agyaa dee ve ye hee haain.. 
Numbers35:1 fir yahova ne, moab ke araba me, yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee ke tatt par moosa se kaha," 
Numbers35:2 israaeliyon ko agyaa de, ki tum apane apane nij bhag kee boomi men se leviyon ko rahane ke liye nagar dena aur nagaron ke charon or kee charaiyan bhee unako dena." 
Numbers35:3 nagar to unake rahane ke liye, aur charaiyan unake gaya-baail aur bhed-bakaree adi, unake sab pashuuon ke liye hongee." 
Numbers35:4 aur nagaron kee charaiya, jinhen tum leviyon ko doge, vah aek aek nagar kee shaharapanah se bahar charon or aek aek hajar hath tak kee hon." 
Numbers35:5 aur nagar ke bahar poorva, daakkhian, pachchhim, aur uttr alang, do do hajar hath is reeti se napana ki nagar beechonbeech ho leviyon ke aek aek nagar kee charai itanee hee boomi kee ho." 
Numbers35:6 aur jo nagar tum leviyon ko doge un men se chh: sharannagar ho, jinhen tum ko koonee ke bhagane ke liye ttharana hoga, aur un se aadhaik bayalees nagar aur bhee dena." 
Numbers35:7 jitane nagar tum leaviyon ko doge ve sab adtalees ho, aur unake sath charaiyan dena." 
Numbers35:8 aur jo nagar tum israaeliyon kee nij boomi men se do, ve jinake bahut nagar hon un se thode lekar dena sab apane apane nagaron men se leviyon ko apane hee apane bhag ke anusar den.." 
Numbers35:9 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Numbers35:10 israaeliyon se kah, ki jab tum yaradan par hokar kanan desh men pahuncho," 
Numbers35:11 tak aeese nagar ttharana jo tumhare liye sharannagar ho, ki jo koi kisee ko bool se marake koonee tthara ho vah vahan bhag jaae." 
Numbers35:12 ve nagar tumhare nimitt palatta lenevale se sharan lene ke kam aaenge, ki jab tak koonee nyay ke liye mandlee ke samhane khda n ho tab tak vah n mar dala jaae." 
Numbers35:13 aur sharan ke jo nagar tum doge ve chh: hon. 
Numbers35:14 teen nagar to yaradan ke is par, aur teen kanan desh men dena sharannagar itane hee rahen." 
Numbers35:15 ye chhhon nagar israaeliyon ke aur unake beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon ke liye bhee sharansthan tthare, ki jo koi kisee ko bool se mar dale vah vaheen bhag jaae." 
Numbers35:16 parantu yadi koi kisee ko lohe ke kisee haathaiyar se aeesa mare ki vah mar jaa, to vah koonee ttharega aur vah koonee avashy mar dala jaae." 
Numbers35:17 aur yaadi koi aeesa patthr hath men lekar, jis se koi mar sakata haai, kisee ko mare, aur vah mar jaa, to vah bhee koonee ttharega aur vah koonee avashy mar dala jaae." 
Numbers35:18 va koi hath men aeesee lakadee lekar, jis se koi mar sakata haai, kisee ko mare, aur vah mar jaa, to vah bhee koonee ttharega aur vah koonee avashy mar dala jaae." 
Numbers35:19 lohoo ka palatta lenevala ap kee us koonee ko mar dale jab bhee vah mile tab hee vah use mar dale. 
Numbers35:20 aur yaadi koi kisee ko baair se ddhkel de, va ghaat lagakar kuchh us par aeese faenk de ki vah mar jaa," 
Numbers35:21 va shatrauta se usako apane hath se aeesa mare ki vah mar jaa, to jis ne mara ho vah avashy mar dala jaae vah koonee ttharega lohoo ka palatta lenevala jab bhee vah koonee use mil jaae tab hee usako mar dale." 
Numbers35:22 parantu yadi koi kisee ko bina soche, aur bina shatrauta rakhe ddhkel de, va bina ghaat lagaae us par kuchh faenk de," 
Numbers35:23 va aeesa koi patthr lekar, jis se koi mar sakata haai, doosare ko bina dekhe us par faenk de, aur vah mar jaa, parantu vah n usaka shatra ho, aur n usakee haani ka khojee raha ho" 
Numbers35:24 to mandlee maranevale aur lohoo ka palatta lenevale ke beech in niyamon ke anusar nyay kare 
Numbers35:25 aur mandlee us koonee ko lohoo ke palatta lenevale ke hath se bachakar us sharannagar men jahan vah paahile bhag gaya ho lautta de, aur jab tak paavitra tel se aabhaishok kiya hua mahayajak n mar jaae tab tak vah vaheen rahe." 
Numbers35:26 parantu yadi vah koonee us sharansthan ke sivane se jis men vah bhag gaya ho bahar nikalakar aur kaheen jaa," 
Numbers35:27 aur lohoo ka palatta lenevala usako sharansthan ke sivane ke bahar kaheen pakar mar dale, to vah lohoo bahane ka doshaee n tthare." 
Numbers35:28 kyonaki koonee ko mahayajak kee mratyu tak sharansthan men rahana chaahiye aur mahayajak ke marane ke pashchata vah apanee nij boomi ko lautt sakega. 
Numbers35:29 tumharee peeddhee peeddhee men tumhare sab rahane ke sthanon men nyay kee yah vidhai hogee. 
Numbers35:30 aur jo koi kisee manushy ko mar dale vah sakshiayon ke kahane par mar dala jaa, parantu aek hee sakshaee kee sakshaee se koi n mar dala jaae." 
Numbers35:31 aur jo koonee praandand ke yogy tthare us se praandand ke badale men juramana n lena vah avashy mar dala jaae. 
Numbers35:32 aur jo kisee sharansthan men bhaga ho usake liye bhee is matalab se juramana n lena, ki vah yajak ke marane se paahile fir apane desh me rahane ko lauttne paaen." 
Numbers35:33 isaliye jis desh men tum rahoge usako ashuuddh n karana koon se to desh ashuuddh ho jata haai, aur jis desh men jab koon kiya jaae tab keval koonee ke lohoo bahane hee se us desh ka praayaashchaitt ho sakata haai." 
Numbers35:34 jis desh men tum nivas karoge usake beech maai rahoonga, usako ashuuddh n karana maain yahova to israaeliyon ke beech rahata hoon.." 
Numbers36:1 fir yoosufiyon ke kulon men se gilad, jo makeer ka putra aur manashsho ka pota tha, usake vansh ke kul ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy puroosh moosa ke sameep jakar us pradhaanon ke samhane, jo israaeliyon ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy puroosh the, kahane lage," 
Numbers36:2 yahova ne hamare prabhu ko agyaa dee thee, ki israaeliyon ko chitthee dalakar desh bantt dena aur fir yahova kee yah bhee agyaa hamare prabhu ko milee, ki hamare sagotraee salofaad ka bhag usakee bettyaien ko dena." 
Numbers36:3 to yaadi ve israaeliyon ke aur kisee gotra ke purooshaen se byahee jaae, to unaka bhag hamare pitaron ke bhag se choott jaaega, aur jis gotra men se byahee jaaen usee gotra ke bhag men mil jaaega tab hamara bhag ghatt jaaega." 
Numbers36:4 aur jab israaeliyon kee jubalee hogee, tab jis gotra men ve byahee jaaen usake bhag men unaka bhag pakkee reeati se mil jaaega aur vah hamare pitaron ke gotra ke bhag se sada ke liye choott jaaega." 
Numbers36:5 tab yahova se agyaa pakar moosa ne israaeliyon se kaha, yoosufiyon ke gotraee tteek kahate haain." 
Numbers36:6 salofaad kee beattyaien ke vishay men yahova ne yah agyaa dee haai, ki jo var jisakee drashtti men achchha lage vah usee se byahee jaae parantu ve apane moolapuroosh hee ke gotra ke kul men byahee jaaen." 
Numbers36:7 aur israaeliyon ke kisee gotra ka bhag doosare ke gotra ke bhag men ne milane paae israaelee apane apane moolapuroosh ke gotra ke bhag par bane rahen. 
Numbers36:8 aur israaeliyon ke kisee gotra men kisee kee bettee ho jo bhag panevalee ho, vah apane hee moolapuroosh ke gotra ke kisee puroosh se byahee jaa, isaliye ki israaelee apane apane moolapuroosh ke bhag ke aadhaikaree rahen." 
Numbers36:9 kisee gotra ka bhag doosare gotra ke bhag men milane n paaen israaeliyon ke aek aek gotra ke log apane apane bhag par bane rahen. 
Numbers36:10 yahova kee agyaa ke anusar jo us ne moosa ko dee salofaad kee bettyaien ne kiya. 
Numbers36:11 arthata mahala, tirsa, hogla, milaka, aur noa, jo salofaad kee beattyaian thee, unhon ne apane chachere bhaiyon se byah kiya." 
Numbers36:12 ve yoosufa ke putra manashsho ke vansh ke kulon men byahee gai, aur unaka bhag unake moolapuroosh ke kul ke gotra ke aadhaikar men bana raha.." 
Numbers36:13 jo agyaaaen aur niyam yahova ne moab ke araba men yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee ke teer par moosa ke dara israaeliyon ko diae ve ye hee haain.. 
Deuteronomy1:1 jo baten moosa ne yaradan ke par jangal me, arthata soop ke samane ke araba me, aur paran aur topel ke beech, aur laban hasarot aur deejahab me, sare israaeliyon se kaheen ve ye haain." 
Deuteronomy1:2 horeb se kadeshabarne tak seir pahad ka marga gyarah din ka haain. 
Deuteronomy1:3 chaleesaven varsha ke gyarahaven maheene ke paahile din ko jo kuchh yahova ne moosa ko israaeliyon se kahane kee agyaa dee thee, usake anusar moosa un se ye baten kahane laga." 
Deuteronomy1:4 arthata jab moosa ne aeemoriyon ke raja heshabonavasee seehon aur bashaan ke raja ashatarotavasee og ko aedraei men mar dala," 
Deuteronomy1:5 usake bad yaradan ke par moab desh men vah vyavastha ka vivaran yon karane laga," 
Deuteronomy1:6 ki hamare parameshvar yahova ne horeb ke pas ham se kaha tha, ki tum logon ko is pahad ke pas rahate huae bahut din ho gaae haain" 
Deuteronomy1:7 isaliye ab yaha se kooch karo, aur aemoriyon ke pahadee desh ko, aur kya araba me, kya pahadon me, kya neeche ke desh me, kya daakkhian desh me, kya samudra ke teer par, jitane log aemoriyon ke pas rahate haain unake desh ko, arthata labanon parvat tak aur parat nam mahanad tak rahanevale kananiyon ke desh ko bhee chale jao." 
Deuteronomy1:8 suno, maain us desh ko tumhare samhane kiaee deta haoo jis desh ke vishay yahova ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob, tumhare pitaron se shapath khakar kaha tha, ki maain ise tum ko aur tumhare bad tumhare vansh ko doonga, usako ab jakar apane adhaikar men kar lo." 
Deuteronomy1:9 fir usee samay maain ne tum se kaha, ki maain tumhara bhar akela naheen sah sakata" 
Deuteronomy1:10 kyonaki tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tum ko yaha tak baddhaya haai, ki tum ginatee men aj akash ke taron ke saman ho gaye ho." 
Deuteronomy1:11 tumhare pitaron ka parameshvar tum ko hajaraguna aur bhee baddhaa, aur apane vachan ke anusar tum ko ashaeesh bhee deta rahe." 
Deuteronomy1:12 parantu tumhare janjal, aur bhar, aur jhgade ragade ko maain akela kaha tak sah sakata haoo." 
Deuteronomy1:13 so tum apane aek aek gotra men se buddhmaian aur samajhdar aur praasiddh puroosh chun lo, aur maain unhen tum par muakhaiya ttharauga." 
Deuteronomy1:14 isake uttr men tum ne mujh se kaha, jo kuchh too ham se kahata haai usaka karana achchha haai." 
Deuteronomy1:15 isaliye maain ne tumhare gotraen ke mukhy purooshaen ko jo buaddhmaian aur praasiddh puroosh the chunakar tum par mukhaiya niyukt kiya, arthata hajarahajar, sausau, pachasapachas, aur dasadas ke upar pradhaan aur tumhare gotraen ke saradar bhee niyukt kiae." 
Deuteronomy1:16 aur us samay maain ne tumhare nyaayiyon ko agyaa dee, ki tum apane bhaiyon ke mukame suna karo, aur unake beech aur unake padosiyon aur paradeashaiyon ke beech bhee dharma se nyay kiya karo." 
Deuteronomy1:17 nyay karate samay kisee ka paksha n karana jaaise bade kee vaaise hee chhotte manushy kee bhee sunana kisee ka muh dekhkar n drana, kyonaki nyay parameshvar ka kam haai aur jo mukama tumhare liye kaattnai ho, vah mere pas le ana, aur maain use sunoonga." 
Deuteronomy1:18 aur maain ne usee samay tumhare sare karttvy karma tum ko bata diae.. 
Deuteronomy1:19 aur ham horeb se kooch karake apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar us sare bade aur bhyanak jangal men hokar chale, jise tum ne aemoriyon ke pahadee desh ke marga men dekha, aur ham kadeshabarne tak aae." 
Deuteronomy1:20 vaha maain ne tum se kaha, tum aemoriyon ke pahadee desh tak a gaae ho jisako hamara parameshvar yahova hamen deta haai." 
Deuteronomy1:21 dekho, us desh ko tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare samhane kiae deta haai, isaaliaee apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ke vachan ke anusar us par chaddho, aur use apane adhaikar men le lo n to tum dro aur n tumhara man kachcha ho." 
Deuteronomy1:22 aur tum sab mere pas akar kahane lage, ham apane age purooshaen ko bhej denge, jo us desh ka pata lagakar ham ko yah sandesh de, ki kaun sa marga hokar chalana hoga aur kis kis nagar men pravesh karana padega?" 
Deuteronomy1:23 is bat se prasann hokar maain ne tum men se barah puroosha, arthata gotra peechhe aek puroosh chun liya" 
Deuteronomy1:24 aur ve pahad par chaddh gaa, aur aeshakol nam nale ko pahuchakar us desh ka bhed liya." 
Deuteronomy1:25 aur us desh ke falon men se kuchh hath men lekar hamare pas aa, aur ham ko yah sandesh diya, ki jo desh hamara parameshvar yahova hamen deta haai vah achchha haai." 
Deuteronomy1:26 taubhee tum ne vaha jane se nah kiya, kintu apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke virooddh hokar" 
Deuteronomy1:27 apane apane dere men yah kahakar kudkudane lage, ki yahova ham se baair rakhta haai, is karan ham ko misr desh se nikal le aya haai, ki ham ko aemoriyon ke vash men karake satyanash kar dale." 
Deuteronomy1:28 ham kidhar jaae? hamare bhaiyoen ne yah kahake hamare man ko kachcha kar diya haai, ki vaha ke log ham se bade aur lambe haain aur vaha ke nagar bade bade haai, aur unakee shaharapanah akash se baten karatee haain aur ham ne vaha anakavanshaiyon ko bhee dekha haai." 
Deuteronomy1:29 maain ne tum se kaha, unake karan traas mat khao aur n dro." 
Deuteronomy1:30 tumhara parameshvar yahova jo tumhare age age chalata haai vah ap tumharee or se ladega, jaaise ki us ne misra men tumhare dekhte tumhare liye kiya" 
Deuteronomy1:31 fir tum ne jangal men bhee dekha, ki jis reeti koi puroosh apane ladke ko uttaae chalata haai, usee reeti hamara parameshvar yahova ham ko is sthan par pahuchane tak, us sare marga men jis se ham aae haai, uttaye raha." 
Deuteronomy1:32 is bat par bhee tum ne apane us parameshvar yahova par vishvas naheen kiya," 
Deuteronomy1:33 jo tumhare age age isaaliye chalata raha, ki dere dalane ka sthan tumhare liye ddoonddhe, aur rat ko ag men aur din ko badal men pragatt hokar chala, taki tum ko vah marga dikhaae jis se tum chalo." 
Deuteronomy1:34 parantu tumharee ve baten sunakar yahova ka kop bhdk utta, aur us ne yah shapath khai," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ki nishchay is buree peeddhee ke manushyon men se aek bhee us achchhe desh ko dekhne n paaeega, jise maain ne unake pitaron ko dene kee shapath khai thee." 
Deuteronomy1:36 yapunno ka putra kaleb hee use dekhne paaeega, aur jis boomi par usake pav pade haain use maain usako aur usake vansh ko bhee doonga kyonki vah mere peechhe pooree reeti se ho liya haai." 
Deuteronomy1:37 aur mujh par bhee yahova tumhare karan krodhait hua, aur yah kaha, ki too bhee vaha jane n paaega" 
Deuteronomy1:38 noon ka putra yahoshoo jo tere samhane khda rahata haai, vah to vaha jane paaega so too usako hiyav de, kyonaki us desh ko israaaeliyon ke aadhaikar men vahee kar dega." 
Deuteronomy1:39 fir tumhare balabachche jinake vishay men tum kahate ho, ki ye loott men chale jaaenge, aur tumhare jo ladkebale abhee bhle bure ka bhed naheen janate, ve vaha pravesh karenge, aur unako maain vah desh dooga, aur ve usake aadhaikaree honge." 
Deuteronomy1:40 parantu tum log ghoomakar kooch karo, aur lal samudra ke marga se jangal kee or jao." 
Deuteronomy1:41 tab tum ne mujh se kaha, ham ne yahova ke virood pap kiya haain ab ham apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar chaddhai karenge aur ladenge. tab tum apane apane haathaiyar bandhakar pahad par bina soche samajhe chaddhne ko taaiyar ho gaae." 
Deuteronomy1:42 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, un se kah de, ki tum mat chaddho, aur n lado kyonaki maain tumhare madhy men naheen haoo kaheen aeesa n ho ki tum apane shatrauon se har jao." 
Deuteronomy1:43 yah bat maain ne tum se kah dee, parantu tum ne n manee kintu ddhittai se yahova kee agyaa ka ullanghan karake pahad par chaddh gaae." 
Deuteronomy1:44 tab us pahad ke nivasee aemoriyon ne tumhara samhana karane ko nikalakar madhaumakkhiayon kee nai tumhara peechha kiya, aur seir desh ke horma tak tumhen marate marate chale aae." 
Deuteronomy1:45 tab tum lauttkar yahova ke samhane rone lage parantu yahova ne tumharee n sunee, n tumharee baton par kan lagaya." 
Deuteronomy1:46 aur tum kadesh men bahut dinon tak pade rahe, yaha tak ki aek jug ho gaya.." 
Deuteronomy2:1 tab us agyaa ke anusar, jo yahova ne mujh ko dee thee, ham ne ghoomakar kooch kiya, aur lal samudra ke marga ke jangal kee or chale aur bahut din tak seir pahad ke bahar bahar chalate rahe." 
Deuteronomy2:2 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha," 
Deuteronomy2:3 tum logon ko is pahad ke bahar bahar chalate huae bahut din beet gaa, ab ghoomakar uttr kee or chalo." 
Deuteronomy2:4 aur too praja ke logon ko meree yah agyaa suna, ki tum seir ke nivasee apane bhai aesaviyon ke sivane ke pas hokar jane par ho aur ve tum se dr jaaege. isaliye tum bahut chaukas raho" 
Deuteronomy2:5 unhen n chhedna kyonaki unake desh men se maain tumhen pav dharane ka ttaur tak n dooga, is karan ki maain ne seir parvat esaviyon ke aadhaikar men kar diya haain." 
Deuteronomy2:6 tum un se bhojan roopaye se mol lekar kha sakoge, aur roopaya dekar kunon se panee bhrake pee sakoge." 
Deuteronomy2:7 kyonaki tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare hathon ke sab kamon ke vishay tumhen ashaeesh deta aya haai is bharee jangal men tumhara chalana firana vah janata haain in chalees vashare men tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare sang sang raha haai aur tum ko kuchh ghattee naheen hui. 
Deuteronomy2:8 yon ham seir nivasee aur apane bhai aesaviyon ke pas se hokar, araba ke marga, aur aelat aur aesyonageber ko peechhe chhodkar chalen.. fir ham mudkar moab ke jangal ke marga se hokar chale." 
Deuteronomy2:9 aur yahova ne mujh se kaha, moaabiyon ko n satana aur n ladai chhedna, kyonaki maain unake desh men se kuchh bhee tere aadhaikar men n kar dooga kyonaki maain ne ar ko lootiyon ke aadhaikar men kiya haai." 
Deuteronomy2:10 agale dinon men vaha aemee log base huae the, jo anakiyon ke saman balavant aur lambe lambe aur ginatee men bahut the" 
Deuteronomy2:11 aur anakiyon kee nai ve bhee rapai gine jate the, parantu moabee unhen aemee kahate haain." 
Deuteronomy2:12 aur agale dinon men seir men horee log base huae the, parantu aesaaviyon ne unako us desh se nikal diya, aur apane samhane se nash karake unake sthan par ap bas gaae jaaise ki israaaeliyon ne yahova ke diye huae apane adhaikar ke desh men kiya." 
Deuteronomy2:13 ab tum log kooch karake jered nadee ke par jao tab ham jered nadee ke par aae. 
Deuteronomy2:14 aur hamare kadeshabarne ko chhodne se lekar jered nadee par hone tak adtees varsha beet gaa, us beech men yahova kee shapath ke anusar us peeddhee ke sab yoddha chhavanee men se nash ho gaae." 
Deuteronomy2:15 aur jab tak ve nash n huae tab tak yahova ka hath unhen chhavanee men se mitta dalane ke liye unake virooddh baddha hee raha 
Deuteronomy2:16 jab sab yoddha marate marate logon ke beech men se nash ho gaa," 
Deuteronomy2:17 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ab moab ke sivane, arthat ar ko par kara" 
Deuteronomy2:19 aur jab too ammaeniyon ke samhane jakar unake nikatt pahuche, tab unako n satana aur n chhedna, kyonaki maain ammoniyon ke desh men se kuchh bhee tere aadhaikar men n karooga, kyonaki maain ne use loosiyon ke aadhaikar men kar diya haai." 
Deuteronomy2:20 vah desh bhee rapaiyon ka gina jata tha, kyonki agale dinon men rapai, jinhen ammonee jamajummee kahate the, ve vaha rahate the" 
Deuteronomy2:21 ve bhee anakiyon ke saman balavan aur lambe lambe aur ginatee men bahut the parantu yahova ne unako ammoniyon ke samhane se nash kar dala, aur unhon ne unako us desh se nikal diya, aur unake sthan par ap rahane lage" 
Deuteronomy2:22 jaaise ki us ne seir ke nivasee aesaaviyon ke samhane se horiyon ko nash kiya, aur unhon ne unako us desh se nikal diya, aur aj tak unake sthan par ve ap nivas karate haain." 
Deuteronomy2:23 vaaisa hee aavvaiyon ko, jo ajja nagar tak gavon men base huae the, unako kaptoriyon ne jo kaptor se nikale the nash kiya, aur unake sthan par ap rahane lage." 
Deuteronomy2:24 ab tum log uttkar kooch karo, aur anorn ke nale ke par chalo sun, maain desh samet heshabon ke raja aemoree seehon ko tere hath men kar deta hoo isaaliye us desh ko apane adhaikar men lena arambh karo, aur us raja se yuddh chhed do." 
Deuteronomy2:25 aur jitane log dharatee par rahate haain un sabhon ke man men maain aj hee ke din se tere karan dr aur thrathrahatt samavane lagoonga ve tera samachar pakar tere dr ke mare kanpenge aur peeadit honge.. 
Deuteronomy2:26 aur maain ne kademot nam jangal se heshabon ke raja seehon ke pas mel kee ye baten kahane ko doot bheje," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ki mujhe apane desh men se hokar jane de maain rajapath par chala jauga, aur daahine aur banae hath n mudooga." 
Deuteronomy2:28 too roopaya lekar mere hath bhojanavastu dena ki maain khau, aur panee bhee roopaya lekar mujh ko dena ki maain peeun keval mujhe panv panv chale jane de," 
Deuteronomy2:29 jaaisa seir ke nivasee aesaaviyon ne aur ar ke nivasee moaabiyon ne mujh se kiya, vaaisa hee too bhee mujh se kar, is reeti maain yaradan par hokar us desh men pahunchoonga jo hamara parameshvar yahova hamen deta haai." 
Deuteronomy2:30 parantu heshabon ke raja seehon ne ham ko apane desh men se hokar chalane n diya kyonaki tumhare parameshvar yahova ne usaka chitt kattor aur usaka man hatteela kar diya tha, isaliye ki usako tumhare hath men kar de, jaaisa ki aj prakatt haai." 
Deuteronomy2:31 aur yahova ne mujh se kaha, sun, maain desh samet seehon ko tere vash men kar dene par hoo us desh ko apane aadhaikar men lena arambh kara." 
Deuteronomy2:32 tab seehon apanee saree sena samet nikal aya, aur hamara samhana karake yuddh karane ko yahas tak chaddha aya." 
Deuteronomy2:33 aur hamare parameshvar yahova ne usako hamare dara hara diya, aur ham ne usako putraen aur saree sena samet mar dala." 
Deuteronomy2:34 aur usee samay ham ne usake sare nagar le lia, aur aek aek base huae nagar ka striayon aur balabachchon samet yaha tak satyanash kiya ki koi n chootta" 
Deuteronomy2:35 parantu pashuuon ko ham ne apana kar liya, aur un nagaron kee loott bhee ham ne le lee jinako ham ne jeet liya tha." 
Deuteronomy2:36 anorn ke nale ke chhoravale aroaer nagar se lekar, gilad tak koi nagar aeesa ucha n raha jo hamare samhane tthar sakata tha kyonaki hamare parameshvar yahova ne sabhon ko hamare vash men kar diya." 
Deuteronomy2:37 parantu ham ammoniyon ke desh ke nikat, varan yabbok nadee ke us par jitana desh haai, aur pahadee desh ke nagar jaha jaha jane se hamare parameshvar yahova ne ham ko mana kiya tha, vaha ham naheen gaae." 
Deuteronomy3:1 tab ham mudkar bashaan ke marga se chaddh chale aur bashaan ka og nam raja apanee saree sena samet hamara samhana karane ko nikal aya, ki aedraei men yuddh kare." 
Deuteronomy3:2 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, us se mat dra kyonaki maain usako saree sena aur desh samet tere hath men kiae deta hoo aur jaaisa too ne heshabon ke nivasee aemoriyon ke raja seehon se kiya haai vaaisa hee us se bhee karana." 
Deuteronomy3:3 so is prakar hamare parameshvar yahova ne saree sena samet bashaan ke raja og ko bhee hamare hath men kar diya aur ham usako yaha tak marate rahe ki un men se koi bhee n bach paya. 
Deuteronomy3:4 usee samay ham ne unake sare nagaron ko le liya, koi aeesa nagar n rah gaya jise ham ne us se n le liya ho, is reeati argob ka sara desha, jo bashaan men og ke rajy men tha aur us men satt nagar the, vah hamare vash men a gaya." 
Deuteronomy3:5 ye sab nagar gaddhvale the, aur unake unchee unchee shaharapanah, aur faattk, aur bede the, aur inako chhod bina shaharapanah ke bhee bahut se nagar the." 
Deuteronomy3:6 aur jaaisa ham ne heshabon ke raja seehon ke nagaron se kiya tha vaaisa hee ham ne in nagaron se bhee kiya, arthat sab base huae nagaron ko striayon aur balabachchon samet satyanash kar dala." 
Deuteronomy3:7 parantu sab ghareloo pashu aur nagaron kee loott ham ne apanee kar lee. 
Deuteronomy3:8 yon ham ne us samay yaradan ke is par rahanevale aemoriyon ke donon rajaon ke hath se arnon ke nale se lekar hermon parvat tak ka desh le liya. 
Deuteronomy3:9 hemorn ko seedonee log siryon, aur aemoree log saneer kahate haain." 
Deuteronomy3:10 samathr desh ke sab nagar, aur sara gilad, aur salka, aur aerdei tak jo og ke rajy ke nagar the, sara bashaan hamare vash men a gaya." 
Deuteronomy3:11 jo rapai rah gaae the, un men se keval bashaan ka raja og rah gaya tha, usakee charapai jo lohe kee haai vah to ammaeaniyon ke rabba nagar men padee haai, sadhaaran puroosh ke hath ke hisab se usakee lambai nau hath kee aur chaudai char hath kee haai." 
Deuteronomy3:12 jo desh ham ne us samay apane aadhaikar men le liya vah yah haai, arthat anorn ke nale ke kinarevale aroaer nagar se le sab nagaron samet gilad ke pahadee desh ka adha bhag, jise maain ne roobeaniyon aur gaadiyon ko de diya," 
Deuteronomy3:13 aur gilad ka bacha hua bhag, aur sara bashaan, arthat agorb ka sara desh jo og ke rajy men tha, inhen maain ne manashsho ke adho gotra ko de diya. sara bashaan to rapaiyon ka desh kahalata haai." 
Deuteronomy3:14 aur manashshoi yair ne gashooriyon aur makavaasiyon ke sivanon tak argob ka sara desh le liya, aur bashaan ke nagaron ka nam apane nam par habbotyair rakha, aur vahee nam aj tak bana haai." 
Deuteronomy3:15 aur maain ne gilad desh makeer ko de diya," 
Deuteronomy3:16 aur roobeniyon aur gaadiyon ko maain ne gilad se le anorn ke nale tak ka desh de diya, arthat us nale ka beech unaka sivana ttharaya, aur yabbok nadee tak jo ammoniyon ka sivana haai" 
Deuteronomy3:17 aur kinnoret se le pisaga kee salamee ke neeche ke araba ke tal tak, jo khara tal bhee kahalata haai, araba aur yaradan kee poorva kee or ka sara desh bhee maain ne unheen ko de diya.." 
Deuteronomy3:18 aur us samay maain ne tumhen yah agyaa dee, ki tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tumhen yah desh diya haai ki use apane aadhaikar men rakho tum sab yoddha haathaiyaraband hokar apane bhai israaaeliyon ke age age par chalo." 
Deuteronomy3:19 parantu tumharee striaya, aur balabachche, aur pashu, jinhen maain janata hoo ki bahut se haai, vah sab tumhare nagaron men jo maain ne tumhen diae haain rah jaae." 
Deuteronomy3:20 aur jab yahova tumhare bhaiyon ko vaaisa vishraam de jaaisa ki us ne tum ko diya haai, aur ve us desh ke aadhaikaree ho jaae jo tumhara parameshvar yahova unhen yaradan par deta haai tab tum bhee apane apane aadhaikar kee boomi par jo maain ne tumhen dee haai lauttoge." 
Deuteronomy3:21 fir maain ne usee samay yahoshoo se chitakar kaha, too ne apanee akho se dekha haai ki tere parameshvar yahova ne in donon rajaon se kya kya kiya haai vaaisa hee yahova un sab rajyon se karega jin men too par hokar jaaega." 
Deuteronomy3:22 un se n drana kyonki jo tumharee or se ladnevala haai vah tumhara parameshvar yahova haai.. 
Deuteronomy3:23 usee samay maain ne yahova se gidgidakar binatee kee, ki he prabhu yahova," 
Deuteronomy3:24 too apane das ko apanee maahima aur balavant hath dikhane laga haai svarga men aur prathvee par aeesa kaun devata haai jo tere se kam aur parakram ke karma kar sake? 
Deuteronomy3:25 isaliye mujhe par jane de ki yaradan parake us uttm desh ko, arthat us uttm pahad aur labanon ko bhee dekhne pau." 
Deuteronomy3:26 parantu yahova tumhare karan mujh se rooshtt ho gaya, aur meree n sunee kintu yahova ne mujh se kaha, bas kara is vishay men fir kabhee mujh se baten n karana." 
Deuteronomy3:27 pisaga pahad kee chottee par chaddh ja, aur poorva, pachchhim, uttr, daakkhian, charon or draashtti karake us desh ko dekh le kyonaki too is yaradan ke par jane n paaega." 
Deuteronomy3:28 aur yahoshoo ko agyaa de, aur use ddhaddhs dekar draddh kara kyonaki in logon ke age age vahee par jaaeega, aur jo desh too dekhega usako vahee unaka nij bhag kara dega." 
Deuteronomy3:29 tab ham betapor ke samhane kee tarai men tthare rahe.. 
Deuteronomy4:1 ab, he israael, jo jo vidhai aur niyam maain tumhen sikhana chahata hoon unhen sun lo, aur un par chalo jis se tum jeevit raho, aur jo desh tumhare pitaron ka parameshvar yahova tumhen deta haai us men jakar usake adhaikaree ho jao." 
Deuteronomy4:2 jo agyaa maain tum ko sunata hoon us men n to kuchh baddhana, aur n kuchh ghattana tumhare parameshvar yahova kee jo jo agyaa maain tumhen sunata hoon unhen tum manana." 
Deuteronomy4:3 tum ne to apanee ankhon se dekha haai ki balapor ke karan yahova ne kya kya kiya arthata jitane manushy balapor ke peechhe ho liye the un sabhon ko tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tumhare beech men se satyanash kar dala 
Deuteronomy4:4 parantu tum jo apane parameshvar yahova ke sath lipatte rahe ho sab ke sab aj tak jeeavit ho. 
Deuteronomy4:5 suno, maain ne to apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar tumhen vidhai aur niyam sikhaae haai, ki jis desh ke aadhaikaree hone jate ho us men tum unake anusar chalo." 
Deuteronomy4:6 so tum unako dhaaran karana aur manana kyonaki aur deshaen ke logon ke samhane tumharee buaddh iddh aur samajh isee se pragatt hogee, arthata ve in sab vidhaiyon ko sunakar kahenge, ki nishchay yah badee jati buddhmaian aur samajhdar haai." 
Deuteronomy4:7 dekho, kaun aeesee badee jaati haai jisaka devata usake aeese sameep rahata ho jaaisa hamara parameshvar yahova, jab ki ham us ko pukarate haain?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 fir kaun aeesee badee jaati haai jisake pas aeesee dharmamay vidhai aur niyam ho, jaaisee ki yah saree vyavastha jise maain aj tumhare samhane rakhta hoon?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 yah atyant avashyak haai ki tum apane vishay men sachet raho, aur apane man kee badee chaukasee karo, kaheen aeesa n ho ki jo jo baten tum ne apanee ankhon se dekheen unako bool jao, aur vah jeevan bhr ke liye tumhare man se jatee rahe kintu tum unhen apane betton poton ko sikhana." 
Deuteronomy4:10 vishosh karake us din kee baten jis men tum horeb ke pas apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane khde the, jab yahova ne mujh se kaha tha, ki un logon ko mere pas ikattha kar ki maain unhen apane vachan sunau, jis se ve seekhe, taki jitane din ve prathvee par jeevit rahen utane din mera bhy manate rahe, aur apane ladke balon ko bhee yahee sikhaaen." 
Deuteronomy4:11 tab tum sameep jakar us parvat ke neeche khde hua, aur vah pahad ag se dhadhak raha tha, aur usakee lau akash tak pahunchatee thee, aur usake charon or andhiayara, aur badal, aur ghaer andhakar chhaya hua tha." 
Deuteronomy4:12 tak yahova ne us ag ke beech men se tum se baten kee baton ka shabd to tum ko sunai pada, parantu koi roop n dekha keval shabd hee shabd sun pada." 
Deuteronomy4:13 aur us ne tum ko apanee vacha ke dason vachan batakar unake manane kee agyaa dee aur unhen patthr kee do paattyaiaon par likh diya. 
Deuteronomy4:14 aur mujh ko yahova ne usee samay tumhen vidhai aur niyam sikhane kee agyaa dee, isaliye ki jis desh ke aadhaikaree hone ko tum par jane par ho us men tum unako mana karo." 
Deuteronomy4:15 isaliye tum apane vishay men bahut savadhaan rahana. kyonaki jab yahova ne tum se horeb parvat par ag ke beech men se baten kee tab tum ko koi roop n dekh pada," 
Deuteronomy4:16 kaheen aeesa n ho ki tum bigadkar chahe puroosh chahe sree ke," 
Deuteronomy4:17 chahe prathvee par chalanevale kisee pashu, chahe akash men udnevale kisee pakshaee ke," 
Deuteronomy4:18 chahe boomi par renganevale kisee jantu, chahe prathvee ke jal men rahanevalee kisee machhlee ke roop kee koi mootira khodakar bana lo," 
Deuteronomy4:19 va jab tum akash kee or ankhe uttakar, soorya, chandrama, aur taron ko, arthata akash ka sara taragan dekho, tab bahakakar unhen dandvata karake unakee seva karane lago jinako tumhare parameshvar yahova ne dharatee par ke sab deshavalon ke liye rakha haai." 
Deuteronomy4:20 aur tum ko yahova lohe ke bhtthe ke sareekhe misr desh se nikal le aya haai, isaliye ki tum usakee prajaroopee nij bhag ttharo, jaaisa aj pragatt haai." 
Deuteronomy4:21 fir tumhare karan yahova ne mujh se krodha karake yah shapath khai, ki too yaradan par jane n paaega, aur jo uttm desh israaeliyon ka parameshvar yahova unhen unaka nij bhag karake deta haai us men too pravesh karane n paaega." 
Deuteronomy4:22 kintu mujhe isee desh men marana haai, maain to yaradan par naheen ja sakata parantu tum par jakar us uttm desh ke adhaikaree ho jaoge." 
Deuteronomy4:23 isaliye apane vishay men tum savadhaan raho, kaheen aeesa n ho ki tum us vacha ko boolakar, jo tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tum se bandhaee haai, kisee aur vastu kee mootira khodakar banao, jise tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tum ko mana kiya haai." 
Deuteronomy4:24 kyonaki tumhara parameshvar yahova bhsm karanevalee ag haai vah jal uttnevala parameshvar haai.. 
Deuteronomy4:25 yaadi us desh men rahate rahate bahut din beet jane par, aur apane bette-pote utpann hone par, tum bigadkar kisee vastu ke roop kee moorti khodakar banao, aur is reeti se apane parameshvar yahova ke prati burai karake use aprasann kar do," 
Deuteronomy4:26 to maain aj akash aur prathvee ko tumhare virooddh sakshaee karake kahata hoo, ki jis desh ke aadhaikaree hone ke liye tum yaradan par jane par ho us men tum jaldee bilkul nash ho jaoge aur bahut din rahane n paoge, kintu pooree reeti se nashtt ho jaoge." 
Deuteronomy4:27 aur yahova tum ko desh desh ke logon men titar bitar karega, aur jin jatiyon ke beech yahova tum ko pahunchaaega un men tum thode hee se rah jaoge." 
Deuteronomy4:28 aur vahan tum manushy ke banaae huae lakadee aur patthr ke devataon kee seva karoge, jo n dekhte, aur n sunate, aur n khate, aur n soonghate haain." 
Deuteronomy4:29 parantu vahan bhee yaadi tum apane parameshvar yahova ko ddoonddhoge, to vah tum ko mil jaaega, sharta yah haai ki tum apane poore man se aur apane sare praan se use ddoonddho." 
Deuteronomy4:30 ant ke dinon men jab tum sankatt men pado, aur ye sab vipaatiayan tum par a padengee, tab tum apane parameshvar yahova kee or firo aur usakee manana" 
Deuteronomy4:31 kyonaki tera parameshvar yahova dayalu ishvar haai, vah tum ko n to chhodega aur n nashtt karega, aur jo vacha us ne tere pitaron se shapath khakar bandhaee haai usako naheen boolega." 
Deuteronomy4:32 aur jab se parameshvar ne manushy ho utpann karake prathvee par rakha tab se lekar too apane utpann hone ke din tak kee baten pooch, aur akash ke aek chhor se doosare chhor tak kee baten pooch, kya aeesaee badee bat kabhee hui va sunane men ai haai?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 kya koi jaati kabhee parameshvar kee vanee ag ke beech men se atee hui sunakar jeevit rahee, jaaise ki too ne sunee haai?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 fir kya parameshvar ne aur kisee jaati ko doosaree jaati ke beech men nikalane ko kamar bandhakar pareeksha, aur chinh, aur chamatkar, aur yudd, aur balee hat, aur baddhai hui bhuja se aeese bade bhyanak kam kia, jaaise tumhare parameshvar yahova ne misr men tumhare dekhte kiae?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 yah sab tujh ko dikhaya gaya, isaliye ki too jan rakhe ki yahova hee parameshvar haai usako chhod aur koi haai hee naheen." 
Deuteronomy4:36 akash men se us ne tujhe apanee vanee sunai ki tujhe shaiksha de aur prathvee par us ne tujhe apanee badee ag dikhai, aur usake vachan ag ke beech men se ate huae tujhe sun pade." 
Deuteronomy4:37 aur us ne jo tere pitaron se praem rakha, is karan unake peechhe unake vansh ko chun liya, aur pratyaksha hokar tujhe apane bade samathrya ke dara misr se isaaliye nikal laya," 
Deuteronomy4:38 ki tujh se badee aur samarthee jatiyon ko tere age se nikalakar tujhe unake desh men pahunchaa, aur use tera nij bhag kar de, jaaisa aj ke din dikhai padta haai" 
Deuteronomy4:39 so aj jan le, aur apane man men soch bhee rak, ki upar akash men aur neeche prathvee par yahova hee parameshvar haai aur koi doosara naheen." 
Deuteronomy4:40 aur too usakee vidhaiyon aur agyaaon ko jo maain aj tujhe sunata hoon manana, isaaliye ki tera aur tere peechhe tere vansh ka bhee bhla ho, aur jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai us men tere din bahut varan sada ke liye hon." 
Deuteronomy4:41 tab moosa ne yaradan ke par poorva kee or teen nagar alag kia," 
Deuteronomy4:42 isaliye ki jo koi bina jane aur bina pahale se baair rakhe apane kisee bhai ko mar dale, vah un men se kisee nagar men bhag jaa, aur bhagakar jeevit rahe:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 arthata roobeniyon ka beser nagar jo jangal ke samathr desh men haai, aur gaadiyon ke gilad ka ramot, aur manashshoiyon ke bashaan ka golana." 
Deuteronomy4:44 fir jo vyavastha moosa ne israaeliyon ko dee vah yah haai 
Deuteronomy4:45 ye hee ve chitauaniyan aur niyam haain jinhen moosa ne israaeliyon ko us samay kah sunaya jab ve misr se nikale the," 
Deuteronomy4:46 arthata yaradan ke par betapor ke samhane kee tarai me, aemoriyon ke raja heshabonavasee seehon ke desh me, jis raja ko unhon ne misr se nikalane ke peechhe mara." 
Deuteronomy4:47 aur unhon ne usake desh ko, aur bashaan ke raja og ke desh ko, apane vash men kar liya yaradan ke par sooryoday kee or rahanevale aemoriyon ke rajaon ke ye desh the." 
Deuteronomy4:48 yah desh arnon ke nale ke chhoravale aroaer se lekar seeon, jo hemorn bhee kahalata haai," 
Deuteronomy4:49 us parvat tak ka sara desha, aur pisaga kee salamee ke neeche ke araba ke tal tak, yaradan par poorva kee or ka sara araba haai." 
Deuteronomy5:1 moosa ne sare israaeliyon ko bulavakar kaha, he israaeliyo, jo jo vidhai aur niyam maain aj tumhen sunata hoon ve suno, isaaliye ki unhen seekhkar manane men chaukasee karo." 
Deuteronomy5:2 hamare parameshvar yahova ne to horeb par ham se vacha bandhaee. 
Deuteronomy5:3 is vacha ko yahova ne hamare pitaron se nahee, ham hee se bandha, jo yahan aj ke din jeevit haain." 
Deuteronomy5:4 yahova ne us parvat par ag ke beech men se tum logon se amhane samhane baten kee 
Deuteronomy5:5 us ag ke dr ke mare tum parvat par n chaddhe, isaaliye maain yahova ke aur tumhare beech usaka vachan tumhen batane ko khda raha. tab us ne kaha," 
Deuteronomy5:6 tera parameshvar yahova, jo tujhe dasatv ke ghar arthata misr desh men se nikal laya haai, vah maain hoon." 
Deuteronomy5:7 mujhe chhod doosaron ko parameshvar karake n manana.. 
Deuteronomy5:8 tu apane liye koi moorti khodakar n banana, n kisee kee praatima banana jo akash me, va prathvee ke jal men haai" 
Deuteronomy5:9 too unako dandvata n karana aur n unakee upasana karana kyonki maain tera parameshvar yahova jalan rakhnevala ishvar hoo, aur jo mujh se baair rakhte haain unake betto, poto, aur parapoton ko pitaron ka dand diya karata hoo," 
Deuteronomy5:10 aur jo mujh se praem rakhte aur meree agyaaon ko manate haain un hajaron par karoona kiya karata hoon. 
Deuteronomy5:11 too apane parameshvar yahova ka nam vyarth n lena kyonaki jo yahova ka nam vyarth le vah unako nirdosh n ttharaaega.. 
Deuteronomy5:12 too vishraamadin ko manakar pavitra rakhna, jaaise tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe agyaa dee." 
Deuteronomy5:13 chh: din to parishram karake apana sara kamakaj karana 
Deuteronomy5:14 parantu satavan din tere parameshvar yahova ke liye vishraamadin haai us men n too kisee bhanti ka kamakaj karana, n tera betta, n teree bettee, n tera das, n teree dasee, n tera baail, n tera gadaha, n tera koi pashu, n koi paradeshaee bhee jo tere faattkon ke bheetar ho jis se tera das aur teree dasee bhee teree nai vishraam kare." 
Deuteronomy5:15 aur is bat ko smaran rakhna ki misr desh men too ap das tha, aur vahan se tera parameshvar yahova tujhe balavant hath aur baddhai hui bhuja ke dara nikal laya is karan tera parameshvar yahova tujhe vishraamadin manane kee agyaa deta haai.." 
Deuteronomy5:16 apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana, jaaise ki tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe agyaa dee haai jis se jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai us men too bahut din tak rahate paa, aur tera bhla ho.." 
Deuteronomy5:17 too hatya n karana.. 
Deuteronomy5:18 too vyabhaichar n karana.. 
Deuteronomy5:19 too choree n karana.. 
Deuteronomy5:20 too kisee ke virooddh joottee sakshaee n dena.. 
Deuteronomy5:21 too n kisee kee patnee ka lalach karana, aur n kisee ke ghar ka lalach karana, n usake khet ka, n usake das ka, n usakee dasee ka, n usake baail va gadahe ka, n usakee kisee aur vastu ka lalach karana.." 
Deuteronomy5:22 yahee vachan yahova ne us parvat par ag, aur badal, aur ghaer andhakar ke beech men se tumharee saree mandlee se pukarakar kaha aur is se adhaik aur kuchh n kaha. aur unhen us ne patthr kee do pattyaiaon par likhkar mujhe de diya." 
Deuteronomy5:23 jab parvat ag se dahak raha tha, aur tum ne us shabd ko aandhiayare ke beech men se ate suna, tab tum aur tumhare gotraen ke sab mukhy mukhy puroosh aur tumhare puraniae mere pas aae" 
Deuteronomy5:24 aur tum kahane lage, ki hamare parameshvar yahova ne ham ko apana tej aur maheema dikhai haai, aur ham ne usaka shabd ag ke beech men se ate huae suna aj ham ne dekh liya ki yadhyapi parameshvar manushy se baten karata haai taubhee manushy jeevit rahata haai." 
Deuteronomy5:25 ab ham kyon mar jaaen? kyonaki aeesee badee ag se ham bhsm ho jaaenge aur yadi ham apane parameshvar yahova ka shabd fir sune, tab to mar hee jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy5:26 kyonaki sare praanaiyon men se kaun aeesa haai jo hamaree nai jeeavit aur agnai ke beech men se bolate huae parameshvar ka shabd sunakar jeevit bacha rahe? 
Deuteronomy5:27 isaliye too sameep ja, aur jo kuchh hamara parameshvar yahova kahe use sun le fir jo kuchh hamara parameshvar yahova kahe use ham se kahana aur ham use sunenge aur use manenge." 
Deuteronomy5:28 jab tum mujh se ye baten kah rahe the tab yahova ne tumharee baten suneen tab us ne mujh se kaha, ki in logon ne jo jo baten tujh se kahee haain maain ne sunee haain inhon ne jo kuchh kaha vah tteek hee kaha." 
Deuteronomy5:29 bhla hota ki unaka man sadaaiv aeesa hee bana rahe, ki ve mera bhy manate huae meree sab agyaaon par chalate rahe, jis se unakee aur unake vansh kee sadaaiv bhlai hotee rahe!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 isaliye too jakar un se kah de, ki apane apane deron ko lautt jao." 
Deuteronomy5:31 parantu too yaheen mere pas khda rah, aur maain ve saree agyaaaen aur vidhaiyan aur niyam jinhen tujhe unako sikhana hoga tujh se kahoonga, jis se ve unhen us desh men jisaka adhaikar maain unhen dene par hoon manen." 
Deuteronomy5:32 isaliye tum apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar karane men chaukasee karana n to daahine mudna aur n banae. 
Deuteronomy5:33 jis marga men chalane kee agyaa tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tum ko dee haai us sare marga par chalate raho, ki tum jeevit raho, aur tumhara bhla ho, aur jis desh ke tum aadhaikaree hoge us men tum bahut dinon ke liye bane raho.." 
Deuteronomy6:1 yah vah agyaa, aur ve vidhaiyan aur niyam haain jo tumhen sikhane kee tumhare parameshvar yahova ne agyaa dee haai, ki tum unhen us desh men mano jisake adhaikaree hone ko par jane par ho" 
Deuteronomy6:2 aur too aur tera betta aur tera pota yahova ka bhy manate huae usakee un sab vidhaiyon aur agyaaon par, jo maain tujhe sunata hoo, apane jeevan bhr chalate rahe, jis se too bahut din tak bana rahe." 
Deuteronomy6:3 he israael, sun, aur aeesa hee karane kee chaukasee kara isaaliye ki tera bhla ho, aur tere pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ke vachan ke anusar us desh men jahan doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haain tum bahut ho jao." 
Deuteronomy6:4 he israael, sun, yahova hamara parameshvar haai, yahova aek hee haai" 
Deuteronomy6:5 too apane parameshvar yahova se apane sare man, aur sare jeev, aur saree shaktai ke sath praem rakhna." 
Deuteronomy6:6 aur ye agyaaaen jo maain aj tujh ko sunata hoon ve tere man men banee rahen 
Deuteronomy6:7 aur too inhen apane balabachchon ko samajhakar sikhaya karana, aur ghar men baaitte, marga par chalate, lettte, uttte, inakee charcha kiya karana." 
Deuteronomy6:8 aur inhen apane hath par chinhanee karake bandhana, aur ye teree ankhon ke beech tteeke ka kam den." 
Deuteronomy6:9 aur inhen apane apane ghar ke chaukhtt kee bajuon aur apane faattkon par likhna.. 
Deuteronomy6:10 aur jab tera parameshvar yahova tujhe us desh men pahunchaae jisake vishay men us ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob nam, tere poorvajon se tujhe dene kee shapath khai, aur jab vah tujh ko bade bade aur achchhe nagar, jo too ne naheen banaa," 
Deuteronomy6:11 aur achchhe achchhe padarthon se bhre huae ghar, jo too ne naheen bhre, aur khude huae kuna, jo too ne naheen khode, aur dakh kee baariyan aur jalapai ke vakshar, jo too ne naheen lagaa, ye sab vastuen jab vah de, aur too khake trapt ho," 
Deuteronomy6:12 tab savadhaan rahana, kaheen aeesa n ho ki too yahova ko bool jaa, jo tujhe dasatv ke ghar arthata misr desh se nikal laya haai." 
Deuteronomy6:13 apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy manana usee kee seva karana, aur usee ke nam kee shapath khana." 
Deuteronomy6:14 tum paraae devataon ke, arthata apane charon or ke deshaen ke logon ke devataon ke peechhe n ho lena" 
Deuteronomy6:15 kyonaki tera parameshvar yahova jo tere beech men haai vah jal uttnevala ishvar haai kaheen aeesa n ho ki tere parameshvar yahova ka kop tujh par bhdke, aur vah tujh ko prathvee par se nashtt kar dale.." 
Deuteronomy6:16 tum apane parameshvar yahova kee pareeksha n karana, jaaise ki tum ne massa men usakee pareeksha kee thee." 
Deuteronomy6:17 apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaao, chitauaniyo, aur vidhaiyon ko, jo us ne tujh ko dee haai, savadhaanee se manana." 
Deuteronomy6:18 aur jo kam yahova kee draashtti men tteek aur suhavana haai vahee kiya karana, jis se ki tera bhla ho, aur jis uttm desh ke vishay men yahova ne tere poorvajon se shapath khai us men too pravesh karake usaka aadhaikaree ho jaa," 
Deuteronomy6:19 ki tere sab shatra tere samhane se door kar diae jaae, jaaisa ki yahova ne kaha tha.." 
Deuteronomy6:20 fir age ko jab tera ladka tujh se poochhe, ki ye chitauaniyan aur vidhai aur niyam, jinake manane kee agyaa hamare parameshvar yahova ne tum ko dee haai, inaka prayojan kya haai?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 tab apane ladke se kahana, ki jab ham misr men firaun ke das the, tab yahova balavant hath se ham ko misr men se nikal le aya" 
Deuteronomy6:22 aur yahova ne hamare dekhte misr men firaun aur usake sare gharane ko du:kh denevale bade bade chinh aur chamatkar dikhaae 
Deuteronomy6:23 aur ham ko vah vahan se nikal laya, isaaliye ki hamen is desh men pahunchakar, jisake vishay men us ne hamare poorvajon se shapath khai thee, isako hamen saunp de." 
Deuteronomy6:24 aur yahova ne hamen ye sab vidhaiyan palane kee agyaa dee, isaaliye ki ham apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy mane, aur is reeti sadaaiv hamara bhla ho, aur vah ham ko jeeavit rakhe, jaaisa ki aj ke din haai." 
Deuteronomy6:25 aur yaadi ham apane parameshvar yahova kee drashtti men usakee agyaa ke anusar in sare niyamon ko manane men chaukasee kare, to vah hamare liye dharma ttharega.." 
Deuteronomy7:1 fir jab tera parameshvar yahova tujhe us desh men jisake adhaikaree hone ko too jane par haai pahunchaa, aur tere samhane se hittee, girgashae, aemoree, kananee, paarijjee, hivvee, aur yaboosee nam, bahut see jaatiyon ko arthata tum se badee aur samarthee saton jatiyon ko nikal de," 
Deuteronomy7:2 aur tera parameshvar yahova unhen tere dara hara de, aur too un par jay praapt kar le tab unhen pooree reeati se nashtt kar dalana un se n vacha bandhana, aur n un par daya karana." 
Deuteronomy7:3 aur n un se byah shaadee karana, n to unakee bettee ko apane bette ke liye byah lena." 
Deuteronomy7:4 kyonaki ve tere bette ko mere peechhe chalane se bahakaaengee, aur doosare devataon kee upasana karavaaengee aur is karan yahova ka kop tum par bhdk uttega, aur vah tujh ko shaeegha satyanash kar dalega." 
Deuteronomy7:5 un logon se aeesa bartav karana, ki unakee vediyon ko ddha dena, unakee latton ko tod dalana, unakee ashora nam mootirayon ko katt kattkar gira dena, aur unakee khudee hui mootiayon ko ag men jala dena." 
Deuteronomy7:6 kyonaki too apane parameshvar yahova kee pavitra praja haai yahova ne prathvee bhr ke sab deshaen ke logon men se tujh ko chun liya haai ki too usakee praja aur nij dhan tthare. 
Deuteronomy7:7 yahova ne jo tum se sneh karake tum ko chun liya, isaka karan yah naheen tha ki tum ginatee men aur sab deshaen ke logon se aadhaik the, kintu tum to sab deshaen ke logon se ginatee men thode the" 
Deuteronomy7:8 yahova ne jo tum ko balavant hath ke dara dasatv ke ghar men se, aur misr ke raja firaun ke hath se chhudakar nikal laya, isaka yahee karan haai ki vah tum se praem rakhta haai, aur us shapath ko bhee pooree karana chahata haai jo us ne tumhare poorvajon se khai thee." 
Deuteronomy7:9 isaliye jan rakh ki tera parameshvar yahova hee parameshvar haai, vah vishvasayogy ishvar haai aur jo us se praem rakhte aur usakee agyaaaen manate haain unake sath vah hajar peeddhee tak apanee vacha palata, aur un par karoona karata rahata haai" 
Deuteronomy7:10 aur jo us se baair rakhte haain vah unake dekhte un se badala lekar nashtt kar dalata haai apane baairee ke vishay men vilamb n karega, usake dekhte hee us se badala lega." 
Deuteronomy7:11 isaliye in agyaao, vidhaiyo, aur niyamon ko, jo maain aj tujhe chitata hoo, manane men chaukasee karana.." 
Deuteronomy7:12 aur tum jo in niyamon ko sunakar manoge aur in par chaloge, to tera parameshr yahova bhee karoonamay vacha ko palega jise us ne tere poorvajon se shapath khakar bandhaee thee" 
Deuteronomy7:13 aur vah tujh se praem rakhega, aur tujhe ashaeesh dega, aur ginatee men baddhaaega aur jo desh us ne tere poorvajon se shapath khakar tujhe dene ko kaha haai us men vah teree santan par, aur ann, naye dakhmadha, aur ttttke tel adi, boomi kee upaj par ashaeesh diya karega, aur teree gaya-baail aur bhed-bakaariyon kee baddhtee karega." 
Deuteronomy7:14 too sab deshaen ke logon se adhaik dhany hoga tere beech men n puroosh n sree nirvansh hogee, aur tere pashuuon men bhee aeesa koi n hoga." 
Deuteronomy7:15 aur yahova tujh se sab prakar ke rog door karega aur misr kee buree buree vyaadhaiyan jinhen too janata haai un men se kisee ko bhee tujhe lagane n dega, ye sab tere baairiyon hee ko lagenge." 
Deuteronomy7:16 aur desh desh ke jitane logon ko tera parameshvar yahova tere vash men kar dega, too un sabhon ko satyanash karana un par taras kee draashtti n karana, aur n unake devataon kee upasana karana, naheen to too fande men fans jaaega." 
Deuteronomy7:17 yaadi too apane man men soche, ki ve jatiyan jo mujh se aadhaik haain to maain unako kyonkar desh se nikal sakoonga?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 taubhee un se n drana, jo kuchh tere parameshvar yahova ne firaun se aur sare misr se kiya use bhlee bhanti smaran rakhna." 
Deuteronomy7:19 jo bade bade pareeksha ke kam too ne apanee ankhon se dekhe, aur jin chinho, aur chamatkaro, aur jis balavant hat, aur baddhai hui bhuja ke dara tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko nikal laya, unake anusar tera parameshvar yahova un sab logon se bhee jin se too drata haai karega." 
Deuteronomy7:20 is se aadhaik tera parameshvar yahova unake beech barre bhee bhejega, yahan tak ki un men se jo bachakar chhpai jaaenge ve bhee tere samhane se nash ho jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy7:21 us se bhy n khana kyonaki tera parameshvar yahova tere beech men haai, aur vah mahana aur bhy yogy ishvar haai." 
Deuteronomy7:22 tera parameshvar yahova un jatiyon ko tere age se dhaeere dhaeere nikal dega to too aek dam se unaka ant n kar sakega, naheen to banaaile pashu baddhkar teree hani karenge." 
Deuteronomy7:23 taubhee tera parameshvar yahova unako tujh se harava dega, aur jab tak ve satyanash n ho jaaen tab tak unako aati vyakul karata rahega." 
Deuteronomy7:24 aur vah unake rajaon ko tere hath men karega, aur too unaka bhee nam dharatee par se mitta dalega un men se koi bhee tere samhane khda n rah sakega, aur ant men too unhen satyanash kar dalega." 
Deuteronomy7:25 unake devataon kee khudee hui mootirayan tum ag men jala dena jo chandee va sona un par maddha ho usaka lalach karake n le lena, naheen to too usake karan fande men fansega kyonaki aeesee vastuen tumhare parameshvar yahova kee drashtti men gharaanait haain." 
Deuteronomy7:26 aur koi gharaanait vastu apane ghar men n le ana, naheen to too bhee usake saman nashtt ho jane kee vastu ttharega use satyanash kee vastu janakar us se gharana karana aur use kadapi n chahana kyonaki vah ashuuddh vastu haai." 
Deuteronomy8:1 jo jo agyaa maain aj tujhe sunata hoon un sabhon par chalane kee chaukasee karana, isaaliye ki tum jeevit raho aur baddhte raho, aur jis desh ke vishay men yahova ne tumhare poorvajon se shapath khai haai us men jakar usake adhaikaree ho jao." 
Deuteronomy8:2 aur smaran rakh ki tera parameshvar yahova un chalees vasharen men tujhe sare jangal ke marga men se isaliye le aya haai, ki vah tujhe namra banaa, aur teree pareeksha karake yah jan le ki tere man men kya kya haai, aur ki too usakee agyaaon ka palan karega va naheen." 
Deuteronomy8:3 us ne tujh ko namra banaya, aur bookha bhee hone diya, fir vah manna, jise n too aur n tere purakha hee janate the, vahee tujh ko khailaya isaaliye ki vah tujh ko sikhaae ki manushy keval rottee hee se naheen jeeavit rahata, parantu jo jo vachan yahova ke munh se nikalate haain un hee se vah jeevit rahata haai." 
Deuteronomy8:4 in chalees vasharen men tere vasr purane n hua, aur tere tan se bhee naheen gire, aur n tere panv foole." 
Deuteronomy8:5 fir apane man men yah to vichar kar, ki jaaisa koi apane bette ko tadna deta haai vaaise hee tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko tadna deta haai." 
Deuteronomy8:6 isaliye apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaaon ka palan karate huae usake magorn par chalana, aur usaka bhy manate rahana." 
Deuteronomy8:7 kyonaki tera parameshvar yahova tujhe aek uttm desh men liye ja raha haai, jo jal kee naadiyon ka, aur taraiyon aur pahadon se nikale huae gaahire gaahire soton ka desh haai." 
Deuteronomy8:8 fir vah gehoo, jau, dakhlatao, anjeero, aur anaron ka desh haai aur telavalee jalapai aur madha ka bhee desh haai." 
Deuteronomy8:9 us desh men ann kee mahangee n hogee, aur n us men tujhe kisee padarth kee ghattee hogee vahan ke patthr lohe ke haai, aur vahan ke pahadon men se too tanba khodakar nikal sakega." 
Deuteronomy8:10 aur too pett bhr khaaega, aur us uttm desh ke karan jo tera parameshvar yahova tujhe dega usaka dhany manega." 
Deuteronomy8:11 isaliye savadhaan rahana, kaheen aeesa n ho ki apane parameshvar yahova ko boolakar usakee jo jo agyaa, niyam, aur vidhai, maain aj tujhe sunata hoon unaka manana chhod de" 
Deuteronomy8:12 aeesa n ho ki jab too khakar trapt ho, aur achchhe achchhe ghar banakar un men rahane lage," 
Deuteronomy8:13 aur teree gaya-baailon aur bhed-bakaariyon kee baddhtee ho, aur tera sona, chandee, aur tera sab prakar ka dhan baddh jaa," 
Deuteronomy8:14 tab tere man men ahankar sama jaa, aur too apane parameshvar yahova ko bool jaa, jo tujh ko dasatv ke ghar arthata misr desh se nikal laya haai," 
Deuteronomy8:15 aur us bade aur bhyanak jangal men se le aya haai, jahan tej vishavale sarpa aur bichchoo haai, aur jalarahit sookhe desh men us ne tere liye chakamak kee chatthan se jal nikala," 
Deuteronomy8:16 aur tujhe jangal men manna khailaya, jise tumhare purakha janate bhee n the, isaliye ki vah tujhe namra banaa, aur teree pareeksha karake ant men tera bhla hee kare." 
Deuteronomy8:17 aur kaheen aeesa n ho ki too sochane lage, ki yah sampati mere hee samathrya aur mere hee bhujabal se mujhe praapt hui." 
Deuteronomy8:18 parantu too apane parameshvar yahova ko smaran rakhna, kyonki vahee haai jo tujhe sampati praapt karane ka samathrya isaliye deta haai, ki jo vacha us ne teere poorvajon se shapath khakar bandhaee thee usako poora kare, jaaisa aj pragatt haai." 
Deuteronomy8:19 yaadi too apane parameshvar yahova ko boolakar doosare devataon ke peechhe ho lega, aur usakee upasana aur unako dandvata karega, to maain aj tum ko chita deta hoon ki tum ni:sandeh nashtt ho jaoge." 
Deuteronomy8:20 jin jatiyon ko yahova tumhare sammukh se nashtt karane par haai, unhee kee nai tum bhee apane parameshvar yahova ka vachan n manane ke karan nashtt ho jaoge." 
Deuteronomy9:1 he israael, sun, aj too yaradan par isaaliye janevala haai, ki aeesee jaatiyon ko jo tujh se badee aur samarthee haai, aur aeese bade nagaron ko jinakee shharapanah akash se baten karatee haai, apane adhaikar men le le." 
Deuteronomy9:2 un men bade bade aur lambe lambe log, arthata anakavanshaee rahate haai, jinaka hal too janata haai, aur unake vishay men too ne yah suna haai, ki anakavaashaiyon ke samhane kaun tthar sakata haai?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 isaliye aj too yah jan le, ki jo tere age bhsm karanevalee ag kee nai par janevala haai vah tera parameshvar yahova haai aur vah unaka satyanash karega, aur vah unako tere samhane daba dega aur too yahova ke vachan ke anusar unako us desh se nikalakar shaeegha hee nashtt kar dalega." 
Deuteronomy9:4 jab tera parameshvar yahova unhen tere samhane se nikal chuke tab yah n sochana, ki yahova tere dharma ke karan tujhe is desh ka aadhaikaree hone ko le aya haai, kintu un jatiyon kee dushttta hee ke karan yahova unako tere samhane se nikalata haai." 
Deuteronomy9:5 too jo unake desh ka adhaikaree hone ke liye ja raha haai, isaka karan tera dharma va man kee seedhaai naheen haai tera parameshvar yahova jo un jatiyon ko tere samhane se nikalata haai, usaka karan unakee dushttta haai, aur yah bhee ki jo vachan us ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob, tere poorvajon ko shapath khakar diya tha, usako vah poora karana chahata haai." 
Deuteronomy9:6 isaliye yah jan le ki tera parameshvar yahova, jo tujhe vah achchha desh deta haai ki too usaka adhaikaree ho, use vah tere dharma ke karan naheen de raha haai kyonaki too to aek hatteelee jati haai." 
Deuteronomy9:7 is bat ka smaran rakh aur kabhee bhee n boolana, ki jangal men too ne kis kis reeti se apane parameshvar yahova ko krodhait kiya aur jis desh se too misr desh se nikala haai jab tak tum is sthan par n pahanuche tab tak tum yahova se balava hee balava karate aae ho." 
Deuteronomy9:8 fir horeb ke pas bhee tum ne yahova ko krodhait kiya, aur vah krodhait hokar tumhen nashtt karana chahata tha." 
Deuteronomy9:9 jab maain us vacha ke patthr kee paattyaiaon ko jo yahova ne tum se bandhaee thee lene ke liye parvat ke upar chaddh gaya, tab chalees din aur chalees rat parvat hee ke upar raha aur maain ne n to rottee khai n panee piya." 
Deuteronomy9:10 aur yahova ne mujhe apane hee hath kee likhee hui patthr kee donon paattyaiaon ko saunp diya, aur ve hee vachan jinhen yahova ne parvat ke upar ag ke madhy men se sabha ke din tum se kahe the ve sab un par likhe huae the." 
Deuteronomy9:11 aur chalees din aur chalees rat ke beet jane par yahova ne patthr kee ve do vacha kee paattyaiaaen mujhe de deen. 
Deuteronomy9:12 aur yahova ne mujh se kaha, ut, yahan se jhttpatt neeche ja kyonkai teree praja ke log jinako too misr se nikalakar le aya haai ve bigad gaae haain jis marga par chalane kee agyaa maain ne unhen dee thee usako unhon ne jhttpatt chhod diya haai arthata unhon ne turant apane liye aek mootira ddhalakar bana lee haai." 
Deuteronomy9:13 fir yahova ne mujh se yah bhee kaha, ki maain ne un logo ko dekh liya, ve hatteelee jati ke log haain" 
Deuteronomy9:14 isaliye ab mujhe too mat rok, taaki maain unhen nashtt kar daloo, aur dharatee ke upar se unaka nam va chinh tak mitta daloo, aur maain un se baddhkar aek badee aur samarthee jaati tujhee se utpann karoonga." 
Deuteronomy9:15 tab maain ulatte paair parvat se neeche utar chala, aur mere donon hathon men vacha kee donon pattyaiaaen theen." 
Deuteronomy9:16 aur maain ne dekha ki tum ne apane parameshvar yahova ke virooddh mahapap kiya aur apane liye aek bachhda ddhalakar bana liya haai, aur turant us marga se jis par chalane kee agyaa yahova ne tum ko dee thee usako tum ne taj diya." 
Deuteronomy9:17 tab maain ne un donon paattyaiaon ko apane dono hathon se lekar faenk diya, aur tumharee ankhon ke samhane unako tod dala." 
Deuteronomy9:18 tab tumhare us mahapap ke karan jise karake tum ne yahova kee draashtti men burai kee, aur use rees dilai thee, maain yahova ke samhane munh ke bal gir pada, aur pahile kee nai, arthata chalees din aur chalees rat tak, n to rottee khai aur n panee piya." 
Deuteronomy9:19 maain to yahova ke us kop aur jala-jalahatt se dr raha tha, kyonki vah tum se aprasann hokar tumhen satyanash karane ko tha. parantu yahova ne us bar bhee meree sun lee." 
Deuteronomy9:20 aur yahova haroon se itana krodhait hua ki use bhee satyanash karana chaha parantu usee samay maain ne haroon ke liye bhee praarthna kee. 
Deuteronomy9:21 aur maain ne vah bachhda jise banakar tum papee ho gaae the lekar, ag men dalakar foonk diya aur fir use pees peesakar aeesa choor choorakar dala ki vah dhool kee nai jeern ho gaya aur usakee us rakh ko us nadee men faenk diya jo parvat se nikalakar neeche bahatee thee." 
Deuteronomy9:22 fir tabera, aur massa, aur kibraetahattava men bhee tum ne yahova ko rees dilai thee." 
Deuteronomy9:23 fir jab yahova ne tum ko kodashabarne se yah kahakar bheja, ki jakar us desh ke jise maain ne tumhen diya haai aadhaikaree ho jao, tab bhee tum ne apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke virooddh balava kiya, aur n to usaka vishvas kiya, aur n usakee bat manee." 
Deuteronomy9:24 jis din se maain tumhen janata hoon us din se tum yahova se balava hee karate aae ho. 
Deuteronomy9:25 maain yahova ke samhane chalees din aur chalees rat munh ke bal pada raha, kyonaki yahova ne kah diya tha, ki vah tum ko satyanash karega." 
Deuteronomy9:26 aur maain ne yahova se yah praarthna kee, ki he prabhu yahova, apana prajaroopee nij bhag, jinako too ne apane mahana pratap se chhuda liya haai, aur jinako too ne apane balavant hath se misr se nikal liya haai, unhen nashtt n kara." 
Deuteronomy9:27 apane das ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob ko smaran kara aur in logon kee kattorata, aur dushttta, aur pap par drashtti n kar," 
Deuteronomy9:28 jis se aeesa n ho ki jis desh se too ham ko nikalakar le aya haai, vahan se log kahane lage, ki yahova unhen us desh men jisake desh ka vachan unako diya tha naheen pahuncha saka, aur un se baair bhee rakhta tha, isee karan us ne unhen jangal men nikalakar mar dala haai." 
Deuteronomy9:29 ye log teree praja aur nij bhag haai, jinako too ne apane bade samathrya aur balavant bhuja ke dara nikal le aya haai.." 
Deuteronomy10:1 us samay yahova ne mujh se kaha, paahilee paattyaiaon ke saman patthr kee do aur paattyaiaen gaddh le, aur unhen lekar mere pas parvat ke upar a ja, aur lakadee ka ek sandook bhee banava le." 
Deuteronomy10:2 aur maain un pattyaiaon par ve hee vachan likoonga, jo un pahilee paattyaiaon par the, jinhen too ne tod dala, aur too unhen us sandook men rakhna." 
Deuteronomy10:3 tab maain ne babool kee lakadee ka aek sandook banavaya, aur paahilee paattyaiaon ke saman patthr kee do aur paattyaiaaen gaddhee, tab unhen hathon men liye huae parvat par chaddh gaya." 
Deuteronomy10:4 aur jo das vachan yahova ne sabha ke din parvat par aagnai ke madhy men se tum se kahe the, ve hee us ne pahilon ke saman un pattyaiaon par likhe aur unako mujhe saunp diya." 
Deuteronomy10:5 tab maai parvat se neeche utar aya, aur paattyaiaon ko apane banavaae huae sandook men dhar diya aur yahova kee agyaa ke anusar ve vaheen rakheen hui haain."
