Deuteronomy10:6 tab israaelee yakaniyon ke kuon se kooch karake mosera tak aae. vahan haroon mar gaya, aur usako vaheen mittee dee gai aur usaka putra aeleeajar usake sthan par yajak ka kam karane laga." 
Deuteronomy10:7 ve vahan se kooch karake gudagoda ko, aur gudagoda se yotabata ko chale, is desh men jal kee nadiyan haain." 
Deuteronomy10:8 us samay yahova ne levee gotra ko isaaliye alag kiya ki ve yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttaya kare, aur yahova ke sammukh khde hokar usakee sevatthal kiya kare, aur usake nam se ashaeervad diya kare, jis prakar ki aj ke din tak hota a raha haai." 
Deuteronomy10:9 is karan leviyon ko apane bhaiyon ke sath koi nij ansh va bhag naheen mila yahova hee unaka nij bhag haai, jaaise ki tere parameshvar yahova ne un se kaha tha." 
Deuteronomy10:10 maain to pahile kee nai us parvat par chalees din aur chalees rat tthara raha, aur us bar bhee yahova ne meree sunee, aur tujhe nash karane kee manasa chhod dee." 
Deuteronomy10:11 fir yahova ne mujh se kaha, ut, aur too in logon kee aguvai kar, taaki jis desh ke dene ko maain ne unake poorvajon se shapath khakar kaha tha us men ve jakar usako apane adhaikar men kar len.." 
Deuteronomy10:12 aur ab, he israael, tera parameshvar yahova tujh se isake sivay aur kya chahata haai, ki too apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy mane, aur usake sare magorn par chale, us se praem rakhe, aur apane poore man aur apane sare praan se usakee seva kare," 
Deuteronomy10:13 aur yahova kee jo jo agyaa aur vidhai maain aj tujhe sunata hoon unako grahan kare, jis se tera bhla ho?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 sun, svarga aur sab se uncha svarga bhee, aur prathvee aur us men jo kuchh haai, vah sab tere parameshvar yahova hee ka haai" 
Deuteronomy10:15 taubhee yahova ne tere poorvajon se sneh aur praem rakha, aur unake bad tum logon ko jo unakee santan ho sarva deshaen ke logon ke madhy men se chun liya, jaaisa ki aj ke din pragatt haai." 
Deuteronomy10:16 isaliye apane apane day ka khtana karo, aur age ko hatteele n raho." 
Deuteronomy10:17 kyonaki tumhara parameshvar yahova vahee ishvaron ka parameshvar aur prabhuon ka prabhu haai, vah mahana parakramee aur bhy yogy ishvar haai, jo kisee ka paksha naheen karata aur n ghoos leta haai." 
Deuteronomy10:18 vah anathon aur vidhava ka nyay chukata, aur paradeashaiyon se aeesa praem karata haai ki unhen bhojan aur vasr deta haai." 
Deuteronomy10:19 isaliye tum bhee paradeashaiyon se praem bhav rakhna kyonki tum bhee misr desh men paredashaee the. 
Deuteronomy10:20 apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy manana usee kee seva karana aur usee se lipatte rahana, aur usee ke nam kee shapath khana." 
Deuteronomy10:21 vahee tumharee stuti ke yogy haai aur vahee tera parameshvar haai, jis ne tere sath ve bade mahatv ke aur bhyanak kam kiae haai, jinhen too ne apanee ankhon se dekha haai." 
Deuteronomy10:22 tere purakha jab misr men gaae tab sattr hee manushy the parantu ab tere parameshvar yahova ne teree ginatee akash ke taron ke saman bahut kar diya haai.. 
Deuteronomy11:1 isaliye too apane parameshvar yahova se atyant praem rakhna, aur jo kuchh us ne tujhe saunpa haai usaka, arthata usee vidhaiyo, niyamo, aur agyaaon ka nity palan karana." 
Deuteronomy11:2 aur tum aj yah soch samajh lo kyonaki maain to tumhare bala-bachchon se naheen kahata, jinhon ne n to kuchh dekha aur n jana haai ki tumhare parameshvar yahova ne kya kya tadna kee, aur kaaisee maahima, aur balavant hat, aur baddhai hui bhuja dikhai," 
Deuteronomy11:3 aur misr men vahan ke raja firaun ko kaaise kaaise chinh dikhaa, aur usake sare desh men kaaise kaaise chamatkar ke kam kiae" 
Deuteronomy11:4 aur us ne misr kee sena ke ghaedon aur rathon se kya kiya, arthata jab ve tumhara peechha kar rahe the tab us ne unako lal samudra men dubokar kis prakar nashtt kar dala, ki aj tak unaka pata naheen" 
Deuteronomy11:5 aur tumhare is sthan men pahunchane tak us ne jangal men tum se kya kya kiya 
Deuteronomy11:6 auair us ne roobenee aeleeab ke putra datan aur abeeram se kya kya kiya arthata prathvee ne apana munh pasarake unako gharano, aur dero, aur sab anucharon samet sab israaeliyon ke dekhte dekhte kaaise nigal liya" 
Deuteronomy11:7 parantu yahova ke in sab bade bade kamon ko tum ne apanee ankhon se dekha haai. 
Deuteronomy11:8 is karan jitanee agyaaaen maain aj tumhen sunata hoon un sabhon ko mana karana, isaaliye ki tum samarthee hokar us desh men jisake adhaikaree hone ke liye tum par ja rahe ho pravesh karake usake adhaikaree ho jao," 
Deuteronomy11:9 aur us desh men bahut din rahane pao, jise tumhen aur tumhare vansh ko dene kee shapath yahova ne tumhare poorvajon se khain thee, aur us men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haain." 
Deuteronomy11:10 dekho, jis desh ke aadhaikaree hone ko tum ja rahe ho vah misr desh ke saman naheen haai, jahan se nikalakar aae ho, jahan tum beej bote the aur hare sag ke khet kee reeti ke anusar apane panv kee naaliyan banakar seenchate the" 
Deuteronomy11:11 parantu jis desh ke aadhaikaree hone ko tum par jane par ho vah pahadon aur taraiyon ka desh haai, aur akash kee vashara ke jal se sinchata haai" 
Deuteronomy11:12 vah aeesa desh haai jisakee tere parameshvar yahova ko suadhai rahatee haai aur varsha ke adi se lekar ant tak tere parameshvar yahova kee draashtti us par nirantar lagee rahatee haai.. 
Deuteronomy11:13 aur yaadi tum meree agyaaon ko jo aj maain tumhen sunata hoon dhyan se sunakar, apane sampoorn man aur sare praan ke sat, apane parameshvar yahova se praem rakho aur usakee seva karate raho," 
Deuteronomy11:14 to maain tumhare desh men barasat ke adi aur ant donon samayon kee vashara ko apane apane samay par barasaunga, jis se too apana ann, naya dakhmadha, aur ttttka tel sanchay kar sakega." 
Deuteronomy11:15 aur maai tere pashuuon ke liye tere maaidan men ghaas upajaunga, aur too pett bhr khaaega aur santushtt rahega." 
Deuteronomy11:16 isaliye apane vishay men savadhaan raho, aeesa n ho ki tumhare man dhaekha khaae, aur tum bahakakar doosare devataon kee pooja karane lago aur unako dandvata karane lago," 
Deuteronomy11:17 aur yahova ka kop tum par bhdke, aur vah akash kee vashara band kar de, aur boomi apanee upaj n de, aur tum us uttm desh men se jo yahova tumhen deta haai shaeegha nashtt ho jao." 
Deuteronomy11:18 isaliye tum mere ye vachan apane apane man aur praan men dhaaran kiae rahana, aur chinhanee ke liye apane hathon par bandhana, aur ve tumharee ankhon ke madhy men tteeke ka kam den." 
Deuteronomy11:19 aur tum ghar men baaitte, marga par chalate, lettte-uttte inakee charcha karake apane ladkebalon ko sikhaya karana." 
Deuteronomy11:20 aur inhen apane apane ghar ke chaukhtt ke bajuon aur apane faattkon ke upar likhna 
Deuteronomy11:21 isaliye ki jis desh ke vishay men yahova ne tere poorvajon se shapath khakar kaha tha, ki maain use tumhen doonga, us men tumhare aur tumhare ladkebalon kee deegharayu ho, aur jab tak prathvee ke upar ka akash bana rahe tab tak ve bhee bane rahen." 
Deuteronomy11:22 isaliye yaadi tum in sab agyaaon ke manane men jo maain tumhen sunata hoon pooree chaukasee karake apane parameshvar yahova se praem rakho, aur usake sab margon par chalo, aur us se lipatte raho," 
Deuteronomy11:23 to yahova un sab jaatiyon ko tumhare age se nikal dalega, aur tum apane se badee aur samarthee jaatiyon ke aadhaikaree ho jaoge." 
Deuteronomy11:24 jis jis sthan par tumhare panv ke talave paden ve sab tumhare hee ho jaaenge, arthata jangal se labanon tak, aur parat nam mahanad se lekar pashchaim ke samudra tak tumhara sivana hoga." 
Deuteronomy11:25 tumhare samhane koi bhee khda n rah sakega kyonaki jitanee boomi par tumhare panv padenge us sab par rahanevalon ke man men tumhara parameshvar yahova apane vachan ke anusar tumhare karan un men dr aur thrathrahatt utpann kar dega. 
Deuteronomy11:26 suno, maain aj ke din tumhare age ashaeesh aur shaap donon rakh deta hoon." 
Deuteronomy11:27 arthata yaadi tum apane parameshvar yahova kee in agyaaon ko jo maain aj tumhe sunata hoon mano, to tum par ashaeesh hogee," 
Deuteronomy11:28 aur yaadi tum apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaaon ko naheen manoge, aur jis marga kee agyaa maain aj sunata hoon use tajakar doosare devataon ke peechhe ho loge jinhen tum naheen janate ho, to tum par shaap padega." 
Deuteronomy11:29 aur jab tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko us desh men pahunchaae jisake adhaikaree hone ko too jane par haai, tab ashaeesh gareejjeem parvat par se aur shaap aebal parvat par se sunana." 
Deuteronomy11:30 kya ve yaradan ke par, soorya ke ast hone kee or, araba ke nivasee kanaaniyon ke desh me, gilgal ke samhane, more ke banj vrakshaen ke pas naheen haai?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 tum to yaradan par isee liye jane par ho, ki jo desh tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhen deta haai usake aadhaikaree hokar us men nivas karoge" 
Deuteronomy11:32 isaliye jitanee vidhaiyan aur niyam maain aj tum ko sunata hoon un sabhon ke manane men chaukasee karana.. 
Deuteronomy12:1 jo desh tumhare poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova ne tumhen adhaikar men lene ko diya haai, us men jab tak tum boomi par jeevit raho tab tak in vidhaiyon aur niyamon ke manane men chaukasee karana." 
Deuteronomy12:2 jin jatiyon ke tum aadhaikaree hoge unake log unche unche pahadon va tteelon par, va kisee bhanti ke hare vraksha ke tale, jitane sthanon men apane devataon kee upasana karate haai, un sabhon ko tum pooree reeati se nashtt kar dalana" 
Deuteronomy12:3 unakee veadiyon ko ddha dena, unakee latton ko tod dalana, unakee ashora nam mootirayon ko ag men jala dena, aur unake devataon kee khudee hui mootirayon ko kattkar gira dena, ki us desh men se unake nam tak mitt jaen." 
Deuteronomy12:4 fir jaaisa ve karate haai, tum apane parameshvar yahova ke liye vaaisa n karana." 
Deuteronomy12:5 kintu jo sthan tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare sab gotraen men se chun lega, ki vahan apana nam banaae rakhe, usake usee nivasasthan ke pas jaya karana" 
Deuteronomy12:6 aur vaheen tum apane homabali, aur melabali, aur danshamansha, aur uttai hui bhent, aur mannat kee vastuae, aur svechchhabali, aur gaya-baailon aur bhed-bakaariyon ke paahilautte le jaya karana" 
Deuteronomy12:7 aur vaheen tum apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane bhojan karana, aur apane apane gharane samet un sab kamon par, jin men tum ne hath lagaya ho, aur jin par tumhare parameshvar yahova kee ashaeesh milee ho, anand karana." 
Deuteronomy12:8 jaaise ham ajakal yahan jo kam jisako bhata haai vahee karate haain vaaisa tum n karana 
Deuteronomy12:9 jo vishraamasthan tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare bhag men deta haai vahan tum ab tak to naheen pahunche. 
Deuteronomy12:10 parantu jab tum yaradan par jakar us desh men jisake bhagee tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhen karata haai bas jao, aur vah tumhare charon or ke sab shatrauon se tumhen vishraam de," 
Deuteronomy12:11 aur tum nidr rahane pao, tab jo sthan tumhara parameshvar yahova apane nam ka nivas ttharane ke liye chun le usee men tum apane homabali, aur melabali, aur dashamansha, aur uttai huin bhentte, aur mannaton kee sab uttm uttm vastuen jo tum yahova ke liye sankalp karoge, nidan jitanee vastuon kee agyaa maain tum ko sunata hoon un sabhon ko vaheen le jaya karana." 
Deuteronomy12:12 aur vahan tum apane apane bette beattyaien aur das daasiyon saahit apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane anand karana, aur jo leveey tumhare faattkon men rahe vah bhee anand kare, kyonaki usaka tumhare sang koi nij bhag va ansh n hoga." 
Deuteronomy12:13 aur savadhaan rahana ki too apane homabaliyon ko har aek sthan par jo dekhne men aae n chaddhana 
Deuteronomy12:14 parantu jo sthan tere kisee gotra men yahova chun le vaheen apane homabaaliyon ko chaddhaya karana, aur jis jis kam kee agyaa maain tujh ko sunata hoon usako vaheen karana." 
Deuteronomy12:15 parantu too apane sab faattkon ke bheetar apane jee kee ichchha aur apane parameshvar yahova kee dee hui ashaeesh ke anusar pashu marake kha sakega, shuud aur ashuud manushy donon kha sakenge, jaaise ki chikare aur harin ka mansa." 
Deuteronomy12:16 parantu usaka lohoo n khana use jal kee nai boomi par undel dena. 
Deuteronomy12:17 fir apane ann, va naye dakhmadha, va ttttke tel ka dashamansha, aur apane gaya-baailon va bhed-bakaariyon ke paahilautte, aur apanee mannaton kee koi vastu, aur apane svechchhabaali, aur uttai hui bhentten apane sab faattkon ke bheetar n khana" 
Deuteronomy12:18 unhen apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane usee sthan par jisako vah chune apane bette bettyaien aur das daasiyon ke, aur jo leveey tere faattkon ke bheetar rahenge unake sath khana, aur too apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane apane sab kamon par jin men hath lagaya ho anand karana." 
Deuteronomy12:19 aur savadhaan rah ki jab tak too boomi par jeevit rahe tab tak leaviyon ko n chhodna.. 
Deuteronomy12:20 jab tera parameshvar yahova apane vachan ke anusar tera desh baddhaa, aur tera jee mans khana chahe, aur too sochane lage, ki maain mans khaunga, tab jo mans tera jee chahe vahee kha sakega." 
Deuteronomy12:21 jo sthan tera parameshvar yahova apana nam banaae rakhne ke liye chun le vah yaadi tujh se bahut door ho, to jo gaya-baail bhed-bakaree yahova ne tujhe dee ho, un men se jo kuchh tera jee chahe, use meree agyaa ke anusar marake apane faattkon ke bheetar kha sakega." 
Deuteronomy12:22 jaaise chikare aur harin ka mans khaya jata haai vaaise hee unako bhee kha sakega, shuud aur ashuud dono prakar ke manushy unaka mans kha sakenge." 
Deuteronomy12:23 parantu unaka lohoo kisee bhanti n khana kyonki lohoo jo haai vah praan hee haai, aur too mans ke sath praan kabhee bhee n khana." 
Deuteronomy12:24 usako n khana use jal kee nain boomi par undel dena. 
Deuteronomy12:25 too use n khana isaaliye ki vah kam karane se jo yahova kee drashtti men tteek haain tera aur tere bad tere vansh ka bhee bhla ho. 
Deuteronomy12:26 parantu jab too koi vastu paavitra kare, va mannat mane, to aeesee vastuaen lekar us sthan ko jana jisako yahova chun lega," 
Deuteronomy12:27 aur vahan apane homabaliyon ke mans aur lohoo donon ko apane parameshvar yahova kee vedee par chaddhana, aur melabaliyon ka lohoo usakee vedee par undelakar unaka mans khana." 
Deuteronomy12:28 in baton ko jinakee agyaa maain tujhe sunata hoon chitt lagakar sun, ki jab too vah kam kare jo tere parameshvar yahova kee drashtti men bhla aur tteek haai, tab tera aur tere bad tere vansh ka bhee sada bhla hota rahe." 
Deuteronomy12:29 jab tera parameshvar yahova un jatiyon ko jinaka adhaikaree hone ko too ja raha haai tere age se nashtt kare, aur too unaka adhaikaree hokar unake desh men bas jaa," 
Deuteronomy12:30 tab savadhaan rahana, kaheen aeesa n ho ki unake satyanash hone ke bad too bhee unakee nai fans jaa, arthata yah kahakar unake devataon ke sambandha men yah poochhpachh n karana, ki un jatiyon ke log apane devataon kee upasana kis reeti karate the? maain bhee vaaisee hee karoonga." 
Deuteronomy12:31 too apane parameshvar yahova se aeesa vyavahar n karana kyonki jitane prakar ke kamon se yahova gharana karata haai aur baaira-bhav rakhta haai, un sabhon ko unhon ne apane devataon ke liye kiya haai, yahan tak ki apane bette beattyaien ko bhee ve apane devataon ke liye aagnai men dalakar jala dete haain.." 
Deuteronomy12:32 jitanee baton kee maain tum ko agyaa deta hoon unako chaukas hokar mana karana aur n to kuchh un men baddhana aur n un men se kuchh ghattana.. 
Deuteronomy13:1 yaadi tere beech koi bhvishyadvkta va svapn dekhnevala pragatt hokar tujhe koi chinh va chamatkar dikhaa," 
Deuteronomy13:2 aur jis chinh va chamatkar ko praman ttharakar vah tujh se kahe, ki ao ham paraae devataon ke anuyayee hokar, jinase tum ab tak anajan rahe, unakee pooja kare," 
Deuteronomy13:3 tab tum us bhavishyadvkta va svapn dekhne vale ke vachan par kabhee kan n dharana kyonaki tumhara parameshvar yahova tumharee pareeksha lega, jis se yah jan le, ki ye mujh se apane sare man aur sare praan ke sath praem rakhte haain va naheen?" 
Deuteronomy13:4 tum apane parameshvar yahova ke peechhe chalana, aur usaka bhy manana, aur usakee agyaaon par chalana, aur usaka vachan manana, aur usakee seva karana, aur usee se lipatte rahana." 
Deuteronomy13:5 aur aeesa bhvishyadvkta va svapn dekhnevala jo tum ko tumhare parameshvar yahova se faerake, jis ne tum ko misr desh se nikala aur dasatv ke ghar se chhudaya haai, tere usee parameshvar yahova ke marga se bahakane kee bat kahanevala ttharega, is karan vah mar dala jaae. is reeti se too apane beech men se aeesee burai ko door kar dena.." 
Deuteronomy13:6 yaadi tera saga bhai, va betta, va bettee, va teree arddhangin, va praan piry tera koi mitra nirale men tujh ko yah kahakar fausalane lage, ki ao ham doosare devataon kee upasana va pooja kare, jinhen n to too n tere purakha janate the," 
Deuteronomy13:7 chahe ve tumhare nikatt rahanevale as pas ke logon ke, chahe prathvee ke aek chhor se leke doosare chhor tak door door ke rahanevalon ke devata ho," 
Deuteronomy13:8 to too usakee n manana, aur n to usakee bat sunana, aur n us par taras khana, aur n komalata dikhana, aur n usako chhpai rakhna" 
Deuteronomy13:9 usako avashy ghaat karana usake ghaat karane men paahile tera hath utte, peechhe sab logon ke hath utte." 
Deuteronomy13:10 us par aeesa patthravah karana ki vah mar jaa, kyonki us ne tujh ko tere us parameshvar yahova se, jo tujh ko dasatv ke ghar arthata misr desh se nikal laya haai, bahakane ka yatn kiya haai." 
Deuteronomy13:11 aur sab israaelee sunakar bhy khaaenge, aur aeesa bura kam fir tere beech n karenge.." 
Deuteronomy13:12 yaadi tere kisee nagar ke vishay me, jise tera parameshvar yahova tujhe rahane ke liye deta haai, aeesee bat tere sunane men aa," 
Deuteronomy13:13 ki kitane adham purooshaen ne tere hee beech men se nikalakar apane nagar ke nivaasiyon ko yah kahakar bahaka diya haai, ki ao ham aur devataon kee jin se ab tak anajan rahe upasana kare," 
Deuteronomy13:14 to poochhpachh karana, aur khojana, aur bhleen bhanti pata lagana aur yaadi yah bat sach ho, aur kuchh bhee sandeh n rahe ki tere beech aeesa ghainauna kam kiya jata haai," 
Deuteronomy13:15 to avashy us nagar ke nivaasiyon ko talavar se man dalana, aur pashu adi us sab samet jo us men ho usako talavar se satyanash karana." 
Deuteronomy13:16 aur us men kee saree loott chauk ke beech ikatthee karake us nagar ko loott samet apane parameshvar yahova ke liye mano savrvang hom karake jalana aur vah sada ke liye deeh rahe, vah fir basaya n jaae." 
Deuteronomy13:17 aur koi satyanash kee vastu tere hath n lagane paae jis se yahova apane bhdke huae kop se shaant hokar jaaisa us ne tere poorvajon se shapath khai thee vaaisa hee tujh se daya ka vyavahar kare, aur daya karake tujh ko ginatee men baddhaae." 
Deuteronomy13:18 yah tab hoga jab too apane parameshvar yahova kee jitanee agyaaaen maain aj tujhe sunata hoon un sabhon ko manega, aur jo tera parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai vahee karega.." 
Deuteronomy14:1 tum apane parameshvar yahova ke putra ho isaaliye mare huon ke karan n to apana shareer cheerana, aur n bhauhon ke bal mundana." 
Deuteronomy14:2 kyonaki too apane parameshvar yahova ke liye aek paavitra samaj haai, aur yahova ne tujh ko prathvee bhr ke samast deshaen ke logon men se apanee nij sampati hone ke liye chun liya haai." 
Deuteronomy14:3 too koi ghainaunee vastu n khana. 
Deuteronomy14:4 jo pashu tum kha sakate ho ve ye haai, arthata gaya-baail, bhed-bakaree," 
Deuteronomy14:5 haari, chikara, yakhmoor, banaailee bakaree, sabar, neelagay, aur baainelee bhed." 
Deuteronomy14:6 nidan pashuuon men se jitane pashu chire va fatte khuravale aur pagur karanevale hote haain unaka mans tum kha sakate ho. 
Deuteronomy14:7 parantu pagur karanevale va chire khuravalon men se in pashuuon ko, arthata unt, khraha, aur shaapan ko n khana, kyonaki ye pagur to karate haain parantu chire khur ke nahee hote, is karan ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain." 
Deuteronomy14:8 fir sooar, jo chire khur ka hota haai parantu pagur naheen karata, is karan vah tumhare liye ashuuddh haai. tum n to inaka mans khana, aur n inakee loth choona.." 
Deuteronomy14:9 fir jitane jalajantu haain un men se tum inhen kha sakate ho, arthata jitanon ke pankh aur chhlaike hote haain." 
Deuteronomy14:10 parantu jitane bina pankh aur chhlaike ke hote haain unhen tum n khana kyonaki ve tumhare liye ashuuddh haain.. 
Deuteronomy14:11 sab shuuddh pakshiayon ka mans to tum kha sakate ho. 
Deuteronomy14:12 parantu inaka mans n khana, arthata ukab, hadfaod, kurara" 
Deuteronomy14:13 garood, cheel aur bhanati bhanati ke shaahee" 
Deuteronomy14:14 aur bhanti bhanati ke sab kaga 
Deuteronomy14:15 shuutarmurga, tahamas, jalakukkat, aur bhanti bhanati ke baja" 
Deuteronomy14:16 chhotta aur bada donon jaati ka ullo, aur ghaugghoo" 
Deuteronomy14:17 dhanesha, gidd, hadgeela" 
Deuteronomy14:18 saras, bhanti bhanati ke bagule, nauva, aur chamageedad." 
Deuteronomy14:19 aur jitane renganevale pakheroo haain ve sab tumhare liye ashuuddh haain ve khaae n jaaen. 
Deuteronomy14:20 parantu sab shuuddh pankhvalon ka mans tum kha sakate ho.. 
Deuteronomy14:21 jo apanee mratyu se mar jaae use tum n khana use apane faattkon ke bheetar kisee paredashaee ko khane ke liye de sakate ho, va kisee paraae ke hath bech sakate ho parantu too to apane parameshvar yahova ke liye paavitra samaj haai. bakaree ka bachcha usakee mata ke doodha men n pakana.." 
Deuteronomy14:22 beej kee saree upaj men se jo praativarsha khet men upaje usaka danshamansh avashy alag karake rakhna. 
Deuteronomy14:23 aur jis sthan ko tera parameshvar yahova apane nam ka nivas ttharane ke liye chun le us men apane ann, aur naye dakhmadha, aur ttttke tel ka dashamansha, aur apane gaya-baailon aur bhed-bakaariyon ke paahilautte apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane khaya karana jis se tum usaka bhy nity manana seekhoge." 
Deuteronomy14:24 parantu yadi vah sthan jis ko tera parameshvar yahova apana nam banaae rakhne ke liye chun lega bahut door ho, aur is karan vahan kee yatra tere liye itanee lambee ho ki too apane parameshvar yahova kee ashaeesh se milee hui vastuen vahan n le ja sake," 
Deuteronomy14:25 to use bechake, roopaye ko bandha, hath men liye huae us sthan par jana jo tera parameshvar yahova chun lega," 
Deuteronomy14:26 aur vahan gaya-baail, va bhed-bakaree, va dakhmadha, va madira, va kisee bhanti kee vastu kyon n ho, jo tera jee chahe, use usee roopaye se mol lekar apane gharane samet apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane khakar anand karana." 
Deuteronomy14:27 aur apane faattkon ke bheetar ke leveey ko n chhodna, kyonaki tere sath usaka koi bhag va ansh n hoga.." 
Deuteronomy14:28 teen teen varsha ke beetane par teesare varsha kee upaj ka sara dashanmansh nikalakar apane faattkon ke bheetar ikattha kar rakhna 
Deuteronomy14:29 tab leveey jisaka tere sang koi nij bhag va ansh n hoga vah, aur jo paradeshae, aur anat, aur vidhavanae tere faattkon ke bheetar ho, ve bhee akar pett bhr khaaen jis se tera parameshvar yahova tere sab kamon men tujhe ashaeesh de.." 
Deuteronomy15:1 sat sat varsha beetane par tum chhuttkara diya karana," 
Deuteronomy15:2 arthata jis kisee ren denevale ne apane padosee ko kuchh udhaar diya ho, to vah use chhod de aur apane padosee va bhai se usako barabas n bhrava le, kyonki yahova ke nam se is chhuttkare ka prachar hua haai." 
Deuteronomy15:3 paradeshaee manushy se too use barabas bhrava sakata haai, parantu jo kuchh tere bhai ke pas tera ho usako too bina bhravaae chhod dena." 
Deuteronomy15:4 tere beech koi daaridra n rahega, kyonki jis desh ko tera parameshvar yahova tera bhag karake tujhe deta haai, ki too usaka adhaikaree ho, us men vah tujhe bahut hee ashaeesh dega." 
Deuteronomy15:5 itana avashy haai ki too apane parameshvar yahova kee bat chitt lagakar sune, aur in saree agyaaon ke manane men jo maain aj tujhe sunata hoon chaukasee kare." 
Deuteronomy15:6 tab tera parameshvar yahova apane vachan ke anusar tujhe ashaeesh dega, parantu tujhe udhaar lena n padega aur too bahut jatiyon par prabhuta karega, parantu ve tere upar prabhuta n karane paaengee.." 
Deuteronomy15:7 jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai usake kisee faattk ke bheetar yaadi tere bhaiyon men se koi tere pas draaridra ho, to apane us daaridra bhai ke liye n to apana day kattor karana, aur n apanee mutthee kadee karana" 
Deuteronomy15:8 jis vastu kee ghattee usako ho, usaka jitana prayojan ho utana avashy apana hath ddheela karake usako udhaar dena." 
Deuteronomy15:9 sachet rah ki tere man men aeesee adham chinta n samaa, ki satavan varsha jo chhuttkare ka varsha haai vah nikatt haai, aur apanee drashtti too apane us daridra bhai kee or se kroor karake use kuchh n de, to yah tere liye pap ttharega." 
Deuteronomy15:10 too usako avashy dena, aur use dete samay tere man ko bura n lage kyoki isee bat ke karan tera parameshvar yahova tere sab kamon men jin men too apana hath lagaaega tujhe ashaeesh dega." 
Deuteronomy15:11 tere desh men daaridra to sada paae jaaenge, isaliye maain tujhe yah agyaa deta hoon ki too apane desh men apane deena-daridra bhaiyon ko apana hath ddheela karake avashy dan dena.." 
Deuteronomy15:12 yaadi tera koi bhaibandha, arthata koi ibraee va ibirn, tere hath bike, aur vah chh: varsha teree seva kar chuke, to satave varsha usako apane pas se svatantra karake jane dena." 
Deuteronomy15:13 aur jab too usako svatantra karake apane pas se jane de tab use choochhe hath n jane dena 
Deuteronomy15:14 varan apanee bhed-bakaariyo, aur khlihan, aur dakhmadha ke kund men se bahutayat se dena tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe jaaisee ashaeesh dee ho usee ke anusar use dena." 
Deuteronomy15:15 aur is bat ko smaran rakhna ki too bhee misr desh men das tha, aur tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe chhuda liya is karan maain aj tujhe yah agyaa sunata hoon." 
Deuteronomy15:16 aur yaadi vah tujh se or tere gharane se praem rakhta haai, aur tere sang anand se rahata ho, aur is karan tujh se kahane lage, ki maain tere pas se n jaunga" 
Deuteronomy15:17 to sutaree lekar usaka kan kivad par lagakar chhedana, tab vah sada tera das bana rahega. aur apanee dasee se bhee aeesa hee karana." 
Deuteronomy15:18 jab too usako apane pas se svatantra karake jane de, tab use chhod dena tujh ko kaattnai n jan pade kyonaki us ne chh: varsha do majadooron ke barabar teree seva kee haai. aur tera parameshvar yahova tere sare kamon men tujh ko ashaeesh dega.." 
Deuteronomy15:19 teree gayon aur bhed-bakaariyon ke jitane pahilautte nar hon un sabhon ko apane parameshvar yahova ke liye paavitra rakhna apanee gayon ke pahilautton se koi kam n lena, aur n apanee bhed-bakaariyon ke paahilautton ka un katarana." 
Deuteronomy15:20 us sthan par jo tera parameshvar yahova chun lega too yahova ke samhane apane apane dharane samet prati varsha usaka mans khana. 
Deuteronomy15:21 parantu yadi us men kisee prakar ka dosh ho, arthata vah langada va andha ho, va us men kisee aur hee prakar kee burai ka dosh ho, to use apane parameshvar yahova ke liye baali n karana." 
Deuteronomy15:22 usako apane faattkon ke bheetar khana shuuddh aur ashuuddh donon prakar ke manushy jaaise chikare aur harin ka mans khate haain vaaise hee usaka bhee kha sakenge. 
Deuteronomy15:23 parantu usaka lohoo n khana use jal kee nai boomi par undel dena.. 
Deuteronomy16:1 abeeb ke maheene ko smaran karake apane parameshvar yahova ke liy fasah ka pavrva manana kyonkai abeeb maheene men tera parameshvar yahova rat ko tujhe misr se nikal laya. 
Deuteronomy16:2 isaliye jo sthan yahova apane nam ka nivas ttharane ko chun lega, vahee apane parameshvar yahova ke liye bhed-bakaariyon aur gaya-baail fasah karake bali karana." 
Deuteronomy16:3 usake sang koi khmeeree vastu n khana sat din tak akhmeeree rottee jo du:kh kee rottee haai khaya karana kyonaki too misr desh se utavalee karake nikala tha isee reeati se tujh ko misr desh se nikalane ka din jeevan bhr smaran rahega. 
Deuteronomy16:4 sat din tak tere sare desh men tere pas kaheen khmeer dekhne men bhee n aae aur jo pashu too paahile din kee sandhya ko baali kare usake mans men se kuchh bihan tak rahane n paae. 
Deuteronomy16:5 fasah ko apane kisee faattk ke bheetar, jise tera parameshvar yahova tujhe de baali n karana." 
Deuteronomy16:6 jo sthan tera parameshvar yahova apane nam ka nivas karane ke liye chun le keval vahee, varsha ke usee samay jis men too misr se nikala tha, arthata sooraj oobane par sandhyakal ko, fasah ka pashuubaali karana." 
Deuteronomy16:7 tab usaka mans usee sthan men jise tera parameshvar yahova chun le boonjakar khana fir bihan ko uttkar apane apane dere ko lautt jana. 
Deuteronomy16:8 chh: din tak akheemeeree rottee khaya karana aur sataven din tere parameshvar yahova ke liye mahasabha ho us din kisee prakar ka kamakaj n kiya jaae.. 
Deuteronomy16:9 fir jab too khet men hansua lagane lage, tab se arambh karake sat attvare ginana." 
Deuteronomy16:10 tab apane parameshvar yahova kee ashaeesh ke anusar usake liye svechchha bali dekar attvaron nam pavrva manana 
Deuteronomy16:11 aur us sthan men jo tera parameshvar yahova apane nam ka nivas karane ko chun le apane apane bette-bettyaie, dasa-daasiyon samet too aur tere faattkon ke bheetar jo leveey ho, aur jo jo paradeshae, aur anat, aur vidhavaaen tere beech men ho, ve sab ke sab apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane anand karen." 
Deuteronomy16:12 aur smaran rakhna ki too bhee misr men das tha isaaliye in vidhaiyon ke palan karane men chaukasee karana.. 
Deuteronomy16:13 too jab apane khalihan aur dakhmadha ke kund men se sab kuchh ikattha kar chuke, tab jhopaadiyon ka pavrva sat din manate rahana" 
Deuteronomy16:14 aur apane is pavrva men apane apane bette bettyaie, dasa-daasiyon samet too aur jo leveey, aur paradeshae, aur anat, aur vidhavaaen tere faattkon ke bheetar hon ve bhee anand karen." 
Deuteronomy16:15 jo sthan yahova chun le us men tu apane parameshvar yahova ke liye sat din tak pavrva manate rahana kyonki tera parameshvar yahova teree saree baddhtee men aur tere sab kamon men tujh ko ashaeesh dega too anand hee karana. 
Deuteronomy16:16 uvarsha men teen bar, arthata akhmeeree rottee ke pavrva, aur attvaron ke pavrva, aur jhopadiyon ke pavrva, in teenon pavrva men tumhare sab puroosh apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane us sthan men jo vah chun lega jaen. aur dekho, choochhe hath yahova ke samhane koi n jae" 
Deuteronomy16:17 sab puroosh apanee apanee poonjee, aur us ashaeesh ke anusar jo tere parameshvar yahova ne tujh ko dee ho, diya karen.." 
Deuteronomy16:18 too apane aek aek gotra men se, apane sab faattkon ke bheetar jinhen tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko deta haai nyayee aur saradar niyukt kar lena, jo logon ka nyay dharma se kiya karen." 
Deuteronomy16:19 tum nyay n bigadna too n to pakshapat karana aur n to ghoos lena, kyonki ghoos buddhmaian kee ankhen andhaee kar detee haai, aur dhaarmiyon kee baten palatt detee haai." 
Deuteronomy16:20 jo kuchh nitant tteek haai usee ka peechha pakade rahana, jis se too jeevit rahe, aur jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai usaka aadhaikaree bana rahe.." 
Deuteronomy16:21 too apane parameshvar yahova kee jo vedee banaaeega usake pas kisee prakar kee lakadee kee banee hui ashora ka sthapan n karana. 
Deuteronomy16:22 aur n koi latt khdee karana, kyonaki us se tera parameshvar yahova gharana karata haai.." 
Deuteronomy17:1 too apane parameshvar yahova ke liye koi baail va bhed-bakaree bali n karana jis men dosh va kisee prakar kee khott ho kyonki aeesa karana tere parameshvar yahova ke sameep gharanait haai.. 
Deuteronomy17:2 jo baastaiyan tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai, yaadi un men se kisee men koi puroosh va sree aeesee pai jaa, jis ne tere parameshvar yahova kee vacha todkar aeesa kam kiya ho, jo usakee draashtti men bura haai," 
Deuteronomy17:3 arthata meree agyaa ka ullanghan karake paraae devataon kee, va soorya, va chandrama, va akash ke gan men se kisee kee upasana kee ho, va usako dandvat kiya ho," 
Deuteronomy17:4 aur yah bat tujhe batalai jaae aur tere sunane men aae tab bhlee bhanti poochhpachh karana, aur yaadi yah bat sach tthare ki israael men aeesa gharaanait karma kiya gaya haai," 
Deuteronomy17:5 to jis puroosh va sree ne aeesa bura kam kiya ho, us puroosh va sree ko bahar apane faattkon par le jakar aeesa patthravah karana ki vah mar jaae." 
Deuteronomy17:6 jo praandand ke yogy tthare vah aek hee kee sakshaee se n mar dala jaa, kintu do va teen manushyon kee sakshaee se mar dala jaae." 
Deuteronomy17:7 usake mar dalane ke liye sab se paahile saakshiayon ke hat, aur unake bad aur sab logon ke hath us par utten. isee reeati se aeesee burai ko apane madhy se door karana.." 
Deuteronomy17:8 yaadi teree baastaiyon ke bheetar koi jhgade kee bat ho, arthata apas ke koon, va vivad, va marapeett ka koi mukama utte, aur usaka nyay karana tere liye kaattnai jan pade, to us sthan ko jakar jo tera parameshvar yahova chun lega" 
Deuteronomy17:9 leveey yajakon ke pas aur un dino ke nyayiyon ke pas jakar poochhtachh karana, ki ve tum ko nyay kee baten batalaaen." 
Deuteronomy17:10 aur nyay kee jaaisee bat us sthan ke log jo yahova chun lega tujhe bata de, usee ke anusar karana aur jo vyavastha ve tujhe den usee ke anusar chalane men chaukasee karana" 
Deuteronomy17:11 vyavastha kee jo bat ve tujhe bataae, aur nyay kee jo bat ve tujh se kahe, usee ke anusar karana jo bat ve tujh ko bataaen us se dahine va baaen n mudna." 
Deuteronomy17:12 aur jo manushy aabhaiman karake us yajak kee, jo vahan tere parameshvar yahova kee seva tthal karane ko upaasthiat rahega, n mane, va us nyayee kee n sune, to vah manushy mar dala jaae is prakar too israael men se aeesee burai ko door kar dena." 
Deuteronomy17:13 is se sab log sunakar dr jaaenge, aur fir abhaiman naheen karenge.." 
Deuteronomy17:14 jab too us desh men pahunche jise tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai, aur usaka aadhaikaree ho, aur un men basakar kahane lage, ki charon or kee sab jaatiyon kee nai maain bhee apane upar raja ttharaunga" 
Deuteronomy17:15 tab jisako tera parameshvar yahova chun le avashy usee ko raja ttharana. apane bhaiyon hee men se kisee ko apane upar raja ttharana kisee paradeshaee ko jo tera bhai n ho too apane upar adhaikaree naheen tthara sakata. 
Deuteronomy17:16 aur vah bahut ghaede n rakhe, aur n is manasa se apanee praja ke logon ko misr men bheje ki usake pas bahut se ghaede ho jaae, kyonki yahova ne tum se kaha haai, ki tum us marga se fir kabhee n lauttna." 
Deuteronomy17:17 aur vah bahut striayan bhee n rakhe, aeesa n ho ki usaka man yahova kee or se palatt jaae aur n vah apana sona roopa bahut baddhaae." 
Deuteronomy17:18 aur jab vah rajagaee par virajaman ho, tab isee vyavastha kee pustak, jo leveey yajakon ke pas rahegee, usakee aek nakal apane liye kar le." 
Deuteronomy17:19 aur vah use apane pas rakhe, aur apane jeevan bhr usako paddha kare, jis se vah apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy manana, aur is vyavastha aur in vidhaiyon kee saree baton ke manane men chaukasee karana seekhe" 
Deuteronomy17:20 jis se vah apane man men ghamand karake apane bhaiyon ko tuchchh n jane, aur in agyaaon se n to dahine mude aur n baaen jis se ki vah aur usake vansh ke log israaeliyon ke madhy bahut dinon tak rajy karate rahen.." 
Deuteronomy18:1 leveey yajakon ka, varan sare leveey gotraiyon ka, israaeliyon ke sang koi bhag va ansh n ho unaka bhojan havy aur yahova ka diya hua bhag ho." 
Deuteronomy18:2 unaka apane bhaiyon ke beech koi bhag n ho kyonaki apane vachan ke anusar yahova unaka nij bhag tthara haai. 
Deuteronomy18:3 aur chahe gaya-baail chahe bhed-bakaree ka melabali ho, usake karanevale logon kee or se yajakon ka hak yah ho, ki ve usaka kandha aur donon gal aur jhojh yajak ko den." 
Deuteronomy18:4 too usaka apanee paahilee upaj ka ann, naya dakhmadha, aur ttttka tel, aur apanee bhendon ka vah un dena jo paahilee bar katara gaya ho." 
Deuteronomy18:5 kyonaki tere parameshvar yahova ne tere sab gotraiyon men se usee ko chun liya haai, ki vah aur usake vansh sada usake nam se seva tthal karane ko upasthiat hua karen.." 
Deuteronomy18:6 fir yadi koi leveey israael kee baastaiyon men se kisee se, jahan vah paradeshaee kee nai rahata ho, apane man kee badee abhailasha se us sthan par jaae jise yahova chun lega," 
Deuteronomy18:7 to apane sab leveey bhaiyoen kee nai, jo vahan apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane upaasthiat honge, vah bhee usake nam se seva tthal kare." 
Deuteronomy18:8 aur apane poorvajon ke bhag kee mol ko chhod usako bhojan ka bhag bhee unake saman mila kare.. 
Deuteronomy18:9 jab too us desh men pahunche jo tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai, tab vahan kee jatiyon ke anusar ghainauna kam karane ko n seekhna." 
Deuteronomy18:10 tujh men koi aeesa n ho jo apane bette va bettee ko ag men hom karake chaddhanevala, va bhavee kahanevala, va shuubh ashuubh muhootorn ka mananevala, va ttonha, va tantriak," 
Deuteronomy18:11 va bajeegar, va ojhon se poochhnevala, va boot sadhanevala, va booton ka jaganevala ho." 
Deuteronomy18:12 kyonaki jitane aeese aeese kam karate haain ve sab yahova ke sammukh gharanait haain aur inheen gharaanait kamon ke karan tera parameshvar yahova unako tere samhane se nikalane par haai. 
Deuteronomy18:13 too apane parameshvar yahova ke sammukh siddh bana rahana. 
Deuteronomy18:14 ve jaatiyan jinaka adhaikaree too hone par haai shuubh-ashuubh muhootoren ke mananevalon aur bhavee kahanevalon kee suna karatee haai parantu tujh ko tere parameshvar yahova ne aeesa karane naheen diya. 
Deuteronomy18:15 tera parameshvar yahova tere madhy se, arthata tere bhaiyon men se mere saman aek nabee ko utpann karega too usee kee sunana" 
Deuteronomy18:16 yah teree us binatee ke anusar hoga, jo too ne horeb pahad ke pas sabha ke din apane parameshvar yahova se kee thee, ki mujhe n to apane parameshvar yahova ka shabd fir sunana, aur n vah badee ag fir dekhnee pade, kaheen aeesa n ho ki mar jaun." 
Deuteronomy18:17 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, ki ve jo kuchh kahate haain so tteek kahate haain." 
Deuteronomy18:18 so maain unake liye unake bhaiyon ke beech men se tere saman aek nabee ko utpann karoonga aur apana vachan usake munh men daloonga aur jis jis bat kee maain use agyaa doonga vahee vah unako kah sunaaega. 
Deuteronomy18:19 aur jo manushy mere vah vachan jo vah mere nam se kahega grahan n karega, to maain usaka hisab us se loonga." 
Deuteronomy18:20 parantu jo nabee aabhaiman karake mere nam se koi aeesa vachan kahe jisakee agyaa maain ne use n dee ho, va paraae devataon ke nam se kuchh kahe, vah nabee mar dala jaae." 
Deuteronomy18:21 aur yaadi too apane man men kahe, ki jo vachan yahova ne naheen kaha usako ham kis reeti se pahichanen?" 
Deuteronomy18:22 to paahichan yah haai ki jab koi nabee yahova ke nam se kuchh kahe tab yaadi vah vachan n ghatte aur poora n ho jaa, to vah vachan yahova ka kaha hua naheen parantu us nabee ne vah bat aabhaiyan karake kahee haai, too us se bhy n khana.." 
Deuteronomy19:1 jab tera parameshvar yahova un jatiyon ko nash kare jinaka desh vah tujhe deta haai, aur too unake desh ka aadhaikaree ho ke unake nagaron aur gharon men rahane lage," 
Deuteronomy19:2 tab apane desh ke beech jisaka adhaikaree tera parameshvar yahova tujhe kar deta haai teen nagar apane liye alag kar dena. 
Deuteronomy19:3 aur too apane liye marga bhee taaiyar karana, aur apane desh ke jo tera parameshvar yahova tujhe saunp deta haai teen bhag karana, taaki har aek koonee vaheen bhag jaae." 
Deuteronomy19:4 aur jo koonee vahan bhagakar apane praan ko bachaa, vah is prakar ka ho arthata vah kisee se bina paahile baair rakhe va usako bina jane boojhe mar dala ho" 
Deuteronomy19:5 jaaise koi kisee ke sang lakadee kattne ko jangal men jaa, aur vraksha kattne ko kulhadee hath se uttaa, aur kulhadee bentt se nikalakar us bhai ko aeesee lage ki vah mar jaae to vah us nagaron men se kisee men bhagakar jeeavit rahe" 
Deuteronomy19:6 aeesa n ho ki marga kee lambai ke karan koon ka palatta lenevala apane krodha ke jvalan men usaka peechha karake usako ja pakade, aur mar dale, yadhypi vah praandand ke yogy nahee, kyonki us se baair naheen rakhta tha." 
Deuteronomy19:7 isaliye maain tujhe yah agyaa deta hoo, ki apane liye teen nagar alag kar rakhna." 
Deuteronomy19:8 aur yaadi tera parameshvar yahova us shapath ke anusar jo us ne tere poorvajon se khai thee tere sivanon ko baddhakar vah sara desh tujhe de, jisake dene ka vachan us ne tere poorvajon ko diya tha" 
Deuteronomy19:9 yaadi too in sab agyaaon ke manane men jinhen maain aj tujh ko sunata hoon chaukasee kare, aur apane parameshvar yahova se praem rakhe aur sada usake margon par chalata rahe to in teen nagaron se aadhaik aur bhee teen nagar alag kar dena," 
Deuteronomy19:10 isaliye ki tere us desh men jo tera parameshvar yahova tera nij bhag karake deta haai kisee nirdosh ka koon n bahaya jaa, aur usaka dosh tujh par n lage." 
Deuteronomy19:11 parantu yadi koi kisee se baair rakhkar usakee ghaat men lage, aur us par lapakakar use aeesa mare ki vah mar jaa, aur fir un nagaron men se kisee men bhag jaa," 
Deuteronomy19:12 to usake nagar ke puraaniye kisee ko bhejakar usako vahan se mangakar koon ke palatta lenevale ke hath men saunp de, ki vah mar dala jaae." 
Deuteronomy19:13 us par taras n khana, parantu nirdosh ke koon ka dosh israel se door karana, jis se tumhara bhla hon.." 
Deuteronomy19:14 jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko deta haai, usaka jo bhag tujhe milega, us men kisee ka sivana jise agale logon ne ttharaya ho n hattana.." 
Deuteronomy19:15 kisee manushy ke virooddh kisee prakar ke adharma va pap ke vishay me, chahe usaka pap kaaisa hee kyo n ho, aek hee jan kee sakshaee n sunana, parantu do va teen sakshaeeyon ke kahane se bat pakkee tthare." 
Deuteronomy19:16 yaadi koi joottee sakshaee denevala kisee ke virooddh yahova se fir jane kee sakshaee dene ko khda ho," 
Deuteronomy19:17 to ve donon manushy, jinake beech aeesa mukama utta ho, yahova ke sammuk, arthata un dinon ke yajakon aur nyayiyon ke samhane khde kiae jaaen" 
Deuteronomy19:18 tab nyayee bhlee bhanati poochhpachh kare, aur yadi yah nirny paae ki vah jootta sakshaee haai, aur apane bhai ke virooddh joottee sakshaee dee haai" 
Deuteronomy19:19 to apane bhai kee jaaisee bhee hani karavane kee yuaktai us ne kee ho vaaisee hee tum bhee usakee karana isee reeati se apane beech men se aeesee burai ko door karana. 
Deuteronomy19:20 aur doosare log sunakar drenge, aur age ko tere beech fir aeesa bura kam naheen karenge." 
Deuteronomy19:21 aur too bilakul taras n khana praan kee santee praan ka, ankh kee santee ankh ka, dant kee santee dant ka, hath kee santee hath ka, panv kee santee panv ka dand dena.." 
Deuteronomy20:1 jab too apane shatrauon se yuddh karane ko jaa, aur ghaede, rat, aur apane se adhaik sena ko dekhe, tab un se n drana tera parameshvar yahova jo tujh ko misr desh se nikal le aya haai vah tere sang haai." 
Deuteronomy20:2 aur jab tum yuddh karane ko shatrauon ke nikatt jao, tab yajak sena ke pas akar kahe," 
Deuteronomy20:3 he israaeliyon suno, aj tum apane shatrauon se yuddh karane ko nikatt aae ho tumhara man kachcha n ho tum mat dro, aur n thrathrao, aur n unake samhane bhy khao" 
Deuteronomy20:4 kyonaki tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare shatrauon se yuddh karane aur tumhen bachane ke liye tumhare sang chalata haai. 
Deuteronomy20:5 fir saradar sipaahiyon se yah kahe, ki tum men se kaun haai jis ne naya ghar banaya ho aur usaka samarpan n kiya ho? to vah apane ghar ko lautt jaae aur doosara manushy usaka samarpan kare." 
Deuteronomy20:6 aur kaun haai jis ne dakh kee baree lagai ho, parantu usake fal n khaae hon? vah bhee apane ghar ko lautt jaa, aeesa n ho ki vah sangraam men mara jaa, aur doosara manushy usake fal khaae." 
Deuteronomy20:7 fir kaun haai jis ne kisee sree se byah kee bat lagai ho, parantu usako byah n laya ho? vah bhee apane ghar ko lautt jaa, aeesa n ho ki vah yuddh men mara jaa, aur doosara manushy us se byah kar le." 
Deuteronomy20:8 isake alava saradar sipaahiyon se yah bhee kahe, ki kaun kaun manushy haai jo drapoek aur kachche man ka haai, vah bhee apane ghar ko lautt jaa, aeesa n ho ki usakee dekha dekhee usake bhaiyon ka bhee hiyav toott jaae." 
Deuteronomy20:9 aur jab pradhaan sipaahiyon se yah kah chuke, tab un par pradhaanata karane ke liye senapaatiyon ko niyukt karen.." 
Deuteronomy20:10 jab too kisee nagar se yuddh karane ko unake nikatt jaa, tab paahile us se saandhi karane ka samachar de." 
Deuteronomy20:11 aur yaadi vah sandhi karana angeekar kare aur tere liye apane faattk khol de, tab jitane us men hon ve sab tere adhaeen hokar tere liye begar karanevale ttharen." 
Deuteronomy20:12 parantu yadi ve tujh se sandhi n kare, parantu tujh se ladna chahe, to too us nagar ko ghor lena" 
Deuteronomy20:13 aur jab tera parameshvar yahova use tere hath men saunp de tab us men ke sab purooshaen ko talavar se mar dalana. 
Deuteronomy20:14 parantu striayan aur balabachche, aur pashu aadi jitanee loott us nagar men ho use apane liye rakh lena aur tere shatrauon kee loott jo tera parameshvar yahova tujhe de use kam men lana." 
Deuteronomy20:15 is prakar un nagaron se karana jo tujh se bahut door haai, aur in jatiyon ke nagar naheen haain." 
Deuteronomy20:16 parantu jo nagar in logon ke haai, jinaka adhaikaree tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko ttharane par haai, un men se kisee praanee ko jeeavit n rakh chhodna," 
Deuteronomy20:17 parantu unako avashy satyanash karana, arthata hitiayo, aemoriyo, kanaaniyo, parijjaiyo, hivvaiyo, aur yaboosiyon ko, jaaise ki tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe agyaa dee haai" 
Deuteronomy20:18 aeesa n ho ki jitane ghainaune kam ve apane devataon kee seva men karate aae haain vaaisa hee karana tumhen bhee sikhaae, aur tum apane parameshvar yahova ke virooddh pap karane lago.." 
Deuteronomy20:19 jab too yuddh karate huae kisee nagar ko jeetane ke liye use bahut dinon tak ghore rahe, tab usake vrakshaen par kulhadee chalakar unhen nash n karana, kyonaki unake fal tere khane ke kam aaenge, isaaliye unhen n kattna. kya maaidan ke vraksha bhee manushy haain ki too unako bhee ghor rakhe?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 parantu jin vrakshaen ke vishay men too yah jan le ki inake fal khane ke naheen haai, to unako kattkar nash karana, aur us nagar ke virooddh us samay tak kott bandho rahana jab tak vah tere vash men n a jaae.." 
Deuteronomy21:1 yaadi us desh ke maaidan men jo tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai kisee mare huae kee loth padee hui mile, aur usako kis ne mar dala haai yah jan n pade," 
Deuteronomy21:2 to tere siyane log aur nyayee nikalakar us loth ke charon or ke aek aek nagar kee dooree ko napen 
Deuteronomy21:3 tab jo nagar us loth ke sab se nikatt tthare, usake siyane log aek aeesee kalor le rakhe, jis se kuchh kam n liya gaya ho, aur jis par jooa kabhee n rakha gaya ho." 
Deuteronomy21:4 tab us nagar ke siyane log us kalor ko aek barahamasee nadee kee aeesee tarai men jo n jotee aur n boi gai ho le jaae, aur usee tarai men us kalor ka gala tod den." 
Deuteronomy21:5 aur leveey yajak bhee nikatt aae, kyonki tere parameshvar yahova ne unako chun liya haai ki usakee seva tthal karen aur usake nam se ashaeervad diya kare, aur unake kahane ke anusar har aek jhgade aur marapeett ke mukame ka nirny ho." 
Deuteronomy21:6 fir jo nagar us loth ke sab se nikatt tthare, usake sab siyane log us kalor ke upar jisaka gala tarai men toda gaya ho apane apane hath dhaekar kahe," 
Deuteronomy21:7 yah koon ham se naheen kiya gaya, aur n yah hamaree ankhon ka dekha hua kam haai." 
Deuteronomy21:8 isaliye, he yahova, apanee chhudai hui israaelee praja ka pap ddhanpakar nirdosh koon ka pap apanee israael praja ke sir par se utara. tab us koon ka dosh unako kshama kar diya jaaega." 
Deuteronomy21:9 yon vah kam karake jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai too nirdosh ke koon ka dosh apane madhy men se door karana.. 
Deuteronomy21:10 jab too apane shatrauon se yuddh karane ko jaa, aur tera parameshvar yahova unhen tere hath men kar de, aur too unhen bandhaua kar le," 
Deuteronomy21:11 tab yaadi too bandhauon men kisee sundar sree ko dekhkar us par mohit ho jaa, aur us se byah kar lena chahe," 
Deuteronomy21:12 to use apane ghar ke bheetar le ana, aur vah apana sir mundaa, nakoon kattaa," 
Deuteronomy21:13 aur apane bandhauai ke vasr utarake tere ghar men maheene bhr rahakar apane mata pita ke liye vilap karatee rahe usake bad too usake pas jana, aur too usaka paati aur vah teree patnee bane." 
Deuteronomy21:14 fir yadi vah tujh ko achchhee n lage, to jahan vah jana chahe vahan use jane dena usako roopaya lekar kaheen n bechana, aur too ne jo usakee pata-panee lee, is karan us se dasee ka sa byavahar n karana.." 
Deuteronomy21:15 yaadi kisee puroosh kee do paatnaiyan ho, aur use aek piry aur doosaree apiry ho, aur pirya aur apirya donon striayan bette jane, parantu jetta apirya ka ho," 
Deuteronomy21:16 to jab vah apane putraen ko sampaati ka battvara kare, tab yadi apirya ka betta jo sachamuch jetta haai yadi jeevit ho, to vah pirya ke bette ko jettans n de sakega" 
Deuteronomy21:17 vah yah janakar ki apirya ka betta mere pauroosh ka pahila fal haai, aur jette ka aadhaikar usee ka haai, usee ko apanee saree sampaati men se do bhag dekar jettansee mane.." 
Deuteronomy21:18 yaadi kisee ke hatteela aur dangaait betta ho, jo apane mata-apita kee bat n mane, kintu tadna dene par bhee unakee n sune," 
Deuteronomy21:19 to usake mata-apita use pakadkar apane nagar se bahar faattk ke nikatt nagar ke siyanon ke pas le jaae," 
Deuteronomy21:20 aur ve nagar ke siyanon se kahe, ki hamara yah betta hatteela aur dangaait haai, yah hamaree naheen sunata yah uda aur piyakkad haai." 
Deuteronomy21:21 tab us nagar ke sab puroosh usako patthravah karake mar dale, yon too apane madhy men se aeesee burai ko door karana, tab sare israaelee sunakar bhy khaaenge." 
Deuteronomy21:22 fir yadi kisee se praandand ke yogy koi pap hua ho jis se vah mar dala jaa, aur too usakee loth ko vraksha par lattka de," 
Deuteronomy21:23 to vah loth rat ko vraksha par ttngee n rahe, avashy usee din use mittee dena, kyonki jo lattkaya gaya ho vah parameshvar kee or se shaaapit ttharata haai isaaliye jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tera bhag karake deta haai usakee boomi ko ashuuddh n karana.." 
Deuteronomy22:1 too apane bhai ke gaya-baail va bhed-bakaree ko bhttkee hui dekhkar anadekhee n karana, usako avashy usake pas pahuncha dena." 
Deuteronomy22:2 parantu yadi tera vah bhai nikatt n rahata ho, va too use n janata ho, to us pashu ko apane ghar ke bheetar le ana, aur jab tak tera vah bhai usako n ddoonddhe tab tak vah tere pas rahe aur jab vah use ddoonddhe tab usako de dena." 
Deuteronomy22:3 aur usake gadahe va vasr ke vishay, varan usakee koi vastu kyon n ho, jo us se kho gai ho aur tujh ko mile, usake vishay men bhee aeesa hee karana too dekhee-anadekhee n karana.." 
Deuteronomy22:4 too apane bhai ke gadahe va baail ko marga par gira hua dekhkar anadekhee n karana usake uttane men avashy usakee sahayata karana.. 
Deuteronomy22:5 koi sree puroosh ka pahirava n paahine, aur n koi puroosh sree ka paahirava pahine kyonaki aeese kamon ke sab karanevale tere parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men gharaanait haain.." 
Deuteronomy22:6 yaadi vraksha va boomi par tere samhane marga men kisee chidiya ka ghaensala mile, chahe us men bachche hon chahe ande, aur un bachchon va andon par unakee man baaittee hui ho, to bachchon samet man ko n lena" 
Deuteronomy22:7 bachchon ko apane liye le to le, parantu man ko avashy chhod dena isaaliye ki tera bhla ho, aur teree ayu ke din bahut hon.." 
Deuteronomy22:8 jab too naya ghar banaae tab usakee chht par ad ke liye munder banana, aeesa n ho ki koi chht par se gir pade, aur too apane gharane par koon ka dosh lagaae." 
Deuteronomy22:9 apanee dakh kee baree men do prakar ke beej n bona, aeesa n ho ki usakee saree upaj, arthata tera boya hua beej aur dakh kee baree kee upaj donon apavitra ttharen." 
Deuteronomy22:10 baail aur gadaha donon sang jotakar hal n chalana. 
Deuteronomy22:11 un aur sanee kee milavatt se bana hua vasr n pahinana.. 
Deuteronomy22:12 apane oddhne ke charon or kee kor par jhalar lagaya karana.. 
Deuteronomy22:13 yaadi koi puroosh kisee sree ko byahe, aur usake pas jane ke samay vah usako aapiry lage," 
Deuteronomy22:14 aur vah us sree kee namadharai kare, aur yah kahakar us par kukarma ka dosh lagaa, ki is sree ko maain ne byaha, aur jab us se sangaati kee tab us men kunvaree avastha ke lakshan n paa," 
Deuteronomy22:15 to us kanya ke mata-apita usake kunvareepan ke chinh lekar nagar ke vraddh logon ke pas faattk ke bahar jaaen 
Deuteronomy22:16 aur us kanya ka pita vraddh logon se kahe, maain ne apanee bettee is puroosh ko byah dee, aur vah usako apiry lagatee haai" 
Deuteronomy22:17 aur vah to yah kahakar us par kukarma ka dosh lagata haai, ki maain ne teree bettee men kunvareepan ke lakshan naheen paae. parantu meree bettee ke kunvareepan ke chinh ye haain. tab usake mata-apita nagar ke vraddh logon ke samhane us char ko faailaaen." 
Deuteronomy22:18 tab nagar ke siyane log us puroosh ko pakadkar tadna den 
Deuteronomy22:19 aur us par sau shokel roope ka dand bhee lagakar us kanya ke pita ko de, isaaliye ki us ne aek israaelee kanya kee namadharai kee haai aur vah usee kee patnee banee rahe, aur vah jeevan bhr us sree ko tyagane n paae." 
Deuteronomy22:20 parantu yadi us kanya ke kunvareepan ke chinh paae n jaae, aur us puroosh kee bat sach tthare," 
Deuteronomy22:21 to ve us kanya ko usake pita ke ghar ke dar par le jaae, aur us nagar ke puroosh usako patthravah karake mar dalen us ne to apane pita ke ghar men veshya ka kam karake burai kee haai yon too apane madhy men se aeesee burai ko door karana.." 
Deuteronomy22:22 yaadi koi puroosh doosare puroosh kee byahee hui sree ke sang sota hua pakada jaa, to jo puroosh us sree ke sang soya ho vah aur vah sree donon mar dalen jaaen is prakar too aeesee burai ko israael men se door karana.." 
Deuteronomy22:23 yaadi kisee kunvaree kanya ke byah kee bat lagee ho, aur koi doosara puroosh use nagar men pakar us se kukarma kare," 
Deuteronomy22:24 to tum un donon ko us nagar ke faattk ke bahar le jakar unako patthravah karake mar dalana, us kanya ko to isaaliye ki vah nagar men rahate huae bhee naheen chillai, aur us puroosh ko is karan ki us ne padosee kee sree kee pata-panee lee haai is prakar too apane madhy men se aeesee burai ko door karana.." 
Deuteronomy22:25 parantu yadi koi puroosh kisee kanya ko jisake byah kee bat lagee ho maaidan men pakar barabas us se kukarma kare, to keval vah puroosh mar dala jaa, jis ne us se kukarma kiya ho." 
Deuteronomy22:26 aur us kanya se kuchh n karana us kanya ka pap praandand ke yogy nahee, kyonki jaaise koi apane padosee par chaddhai karake use mar dale, vaaisee hee yah bat bhee ttharegee" 
Deuteronomy22:27 ki us puroosh ne us kanya ko maaidan men paya, aur vah chillai ko sahee, parantu usako koi bachanevala n mila." 
Deuteronomy22:28 yaadi kisee puroosh ko koi kunvaree kanya mile jisake byah kee bat n lagee ho, aur vah use pakadkar usake sath kukarma kare, aur ve pakade jaae," 
Deuteronomy22:29 to jis puroosh ne us se kukarma kiya ho vah us kanya ke pita ko pachas shokel roopa de, aur vah usee kee patnee ho, us ne us kee pata-panee lee is karan vah jeevan bhr use n tyagane paae.." 
Deuteronomy22:30 koi apanee sautelee mata ko apanee sree n banaa, vah apane pita ka oddhna n ughaare.." 
Deuteronomy23:1 jisake and kuchale gaae va ling katt dala gaya ho vah yahova kee sabha men n ane paae.. 
Deuteronomy23:2 koi kukarma se janma hua yahova kee sabha men n ane paae kintu das peeddhee tak usake vansh ka koi yahova kee sabha men n ane paae.. 
Deuteronomy23:3 koi ammonee va moabee yahova kee sabha men n ane paae unakee dasaveen peeddhee tak ka koi yahova kee sabha men kabhee n ane paae 
Deuteronomy23:4 is karan se ki jab tum misr se nikalakar ate the tab unhon ne ann jal lekar marga men tum se bhentt naheen kee, aur yah bhee ki unhon ne aramnaharaaim desh ke pator nagaravale bor ke putra bilam ko tujhe shaap dene ke liye daakshiana dee." 
Deuteronomy23:5 parantu tere parameshvar yahova ne tere nimitt usake shaap ko ashaeesh se palatt diya, isaliye ki tera parameshvar yahova tujh se praem rakhta tha." 
Deuteronomy23:6 too jeevan bhr unaka kushal aur bhlai kabhee n chahana. 
Deuteronomy23:7 kisee aedomee se gharana n karana, kyonki vah tera bhai haai kisee misree se bhee gharana n karana, kyonki usake desh men too paradeshaee hokar raha tha." 
Deuteronomy23:8 unake jo parapote utpann hon ve yahova kee sabha men n ane paen. 
Deuteronomy23:9 jab too shatrauon se ladne ko jakar chhavanee dale, tab sab prakar kee buree baton se bacha rahana." 
Deuteronomy23:10 yaadi tere beech koi puroosh us ashuuddhta se jo ratrai ko ap se ap hua karatee haai ashuuddh hua ho, to vah chhavanee se bahar jaa, aur chhavanee ke bheetar n aae" 
Deuteronomy23:11 parantu sandhya se kuchh paahile vah snan kare, aur jab soorya oob jaae tab chhavanee men aae." 
Deuteronomy23:12 chhavanee ke bahar tere disha firane ka aek sthan hua kare, aur vaheen disha firane ko jaya karana" 
Deuteronomy23:13 aur tere pas ke hathaiyaron men aek khnatee bhee rahe aur jab too disha firane ko baaitte, tab us se khodakar apane mal ko ddhanp dena." 
Deuteronomy23:14 kyonaki tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko bachane aur tere shatrauon ko tujh se haravane ko teree chhavanee ke madhy ghoomata rahega, isaaliye teree chhavanee pavitra rahanee chaahiye, aeesa n ho ki vah tere madhy men koi ashuuddh vastu dekhkar tujh se fir jaae.." 
Deuteronomy23:15 jo das apane svamee ke pas se bhagakar teree sharan le usako usake svamee ke hath n pakada dena 
Deuteronomy23:16 vah tere beech jo nagar use achchha lage usee men tere sang rahane paae aur too us par andhor n karana.. 
Deuteronomy23:17 israaelee striayon men se koi devadasee n ho, aur n israaeliyon men se koi puroosh aeesa bura kam karanevala ho." 
Deuteronomy23:18 too veshyapan kee kamai va kutte kee kamai kisee mannat ko pooree karane ke liye apane parameshvar yahova ke ghar men n lana kyonaki tere parameshvar yahova ke sameep ye donon kee donon kamai gharaanait karma haai.. 
Deuteronomy23:19 apane kisee bhai ko byaj par ren n dena, chahe roopaya ho, chahe bhojana-vastu ho, chahe koi vastu ho jo byaj par dee jati haai, use byaj n dena." 
Deuteronomy23:20 too paradeshaee ko byaj par ren to de, parantu apane kisee bhai se aeesa n karana, taki jis desh ka aadhaikaree hone ko too ja raha haai, vahan jis jis kam men apana hath lagaa, un sabhon ko tera parameshvar yahova tujhe ashaeesh de.." 
Deuteronomy23:21 jab too apane parameshvar yahova ke liye mannat mane, to usake pooree karane men vilamb n karana kyonaki tera parameshvar yahova use nishchay tujh se le lega, aur vilamb karane se too papee ttharega." 
Deuteronomy23:22 parantu yadi too mannat n mane, to tera koi pap naheen." 
Deuteronomy23:23 jo kuchh tere munh se nikale usake poora karane men chaukasee karana too apane munh se vachan dekar apanee ichchha se apane parameshvar yahova kee jaaisee mannat mane, vaaisa hee svatantrata poorvak use poora karana." 
Deuteronomy23:24 jab too kisee doosare kee dakh kee baree men jaa, tab pett bhr manamane dakh kha to kha, parantu apane patra men kuchh n rakhna." 
Deuteronomy23:25 aur jab too kisee doosare ke khde khet men jaa, tab too hath se balen tod sakata haai, parantu kisee doosare ke khde khet par hansua n lagana.." 
Deuteronomy24:1 yaadi koi puroosh kisee sree ko byah le, aur usake bad usamen lajja kee bat pakar us se aprasann ho, to vah usake liye tyagapatra likhkar aur usake hath men dekar usako apane ghar se nikal de." 
Deuteronomy24:2 aur jab vah usake ghar se nikal jaa, tab doosare puroosh kee ho sakatee haai." 
Deuteronomy24:3 parantu yadi vah us doosare puroosh ko bhee aapiry lage, aur vah usake liye tyagapatra likhkar usake hath men dekar use apane ghar se nikal de, va vah doosara puroosh jis ne usako apanee sree kar liya ho mar jaa," 
Deuteronomy24:4 to usaka paahila paati, jis ne usako nikal diya ho, usake ashuuddh hone ke bad use apanee patnee n banane paae kyonaki yah yahova ke sammukh gharaanait bat haai. is prakar too us desh ko jise tera parameshvar yahova tera bhag karake tujhe deta haai papee n banana.." 
Deuteronomy24:5 jo puroosh hal ka byaha hua ho, vah sena ke sath n jaae aur n kisee kam ka bhar us par dala jaae vah varsha bhr apane ghar men svatantrata se rahakar apanee byahee hui sree ko prasann karata rahe." 
Deuteronomy24:6 koi manushy chakkee ko va usake upar ke patt ko bandhak n rakhe kyonaki vah to manon praan hee ko bandhak rakhna haai.. 
Deuteronomy24:7 yaadi koi apane kisee israaelee bhai ko das banane va bech dalane kee manasa se churata hua pakada jaa, to aeesa chor mar dala jaae aeesee burai ko apane madhy men se door karana.." 
Deuteronomy24:8 koddh kee byaadhai ke vishay men chaukas rahana, aur jo kuchh leveey yajak tumhen sikhaaen usee ke anusar yatn se karane men chaukasee karana jaaisee agyaa maain ne unako dee haai vaaisa karane men chaukasee karana." 
Deuteronomy24:9 smaran rakh ki tere parameshvar yahova ne, jab tum misr se nikalakar a rahe the, tab marga men maariyam se kya kiya." 
Deuteronomy24:10 jab too apane kisee bhai ko kuchh udhaar de, tab bandhak kee vastu lene ke liye usake ghar ke bheetar n ghausana." 
Deuteronomy24:11 too bahar khda rahana, aur jisako too udhaar de vahee bandhak kee vastu ko tere pas bahar le aae." 
Deuteronomy24:12 aur yaadi vah manushy kangal ho, to usaka bandhak apane pas rakhe huae n sona" 
Deuteronomy24:13 soorya ast hote hote use vah bandhak avashy faer dena, isaaliye ki vah apana oddhna oddhkar so sake aur tujhe ashaeervad de aur yah tere parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men dharma ka kam ttharega.." 
Deuteronomy24:14 koi majadoor jo deen aur kangal ho, chahe vah tere bhaiyon men se ho chahe tere desh ke faattkon ke bheetar rahanevale paradeashaiyon men se ho, us par andhor n karana" 
Deuteronomy24:15 yah janakar, ki vah deen haai aur usaka man majadooree men laga rahata haai, majadooree karane hee ke din sooryast se paahile too usakee majadooree dena aeesa n ho ki vah tere karan yahova kee dohai de, aur too papee tthare.." 
Deuteronomy24:16 putra ke karan pita n mar dala jaa, aur n pita ke karan putra mar dala jaae jis ne pap kiya ho vahee us pap ke karan mar dala jaae.." 
Deuteronomy24:17 kisee paredashaee manushy va anath balak ka nyay n bigadna, aur n kisee vidhava ke kapade ko bandhak rakhna" 
Deuteronomy24:18 aur is ko smaran rakhna ki too misr men das tha, aur tera parameshvar yahova tujhe vahan se chhuda laya haai is karan maain tujhe yah agyaa deta hoon.." 
Deuteronomy24:19 jab too apane pakke khet ko katte, aur aek poola khet men bool se choott jaa, to use lene ko fir n lautt jana vah paradeshae, anat, aur vidhava ke liye pada rahe isaaliye ki parameshvar yahova tere sab kamon men tujh ko ashaeesh de." 
Deuteronomy24:20 jab too apane jalapai ke vraksha ko jhade, tab daaliyon ko doosaree bar n jhadna vah paradeshae, anat, aur vidhava ke liye rah jaae." 
Deuteronomy24:21 jab too apanee dakh kee baree ke fal tode, to usaka dana dana n tod lena vah paradeshae, anath aur vidhava ke liye rah jaae." 
Deuteronomy24:22 aur isako smaran rakhna ki too misr desh men das tha is karan maain tujhe yah agyaa deta hoon.. 
Deuteronomy25:1 yaadi manushyon ke beech koi jhgada ho, aur ve nyay karavane ke liye nyayiyon ke pas jaae, aur ve unaka nyay kare, to nirdosh ko nirdosh aur doshaee ko doshaee ttharaaen." 
Deuteronomy25:2 aur yaadi doshaee mar khane ke yogy tthare, to nyayee usako giravakar apane samhane jaaisa usaka dosh ho usake anusar kode ginakar lagavaae." 
Deuteronomy25:3 vah use chalees kode tak lagava sakata haai, is se adhaik naheen lagava sakata aeesa n ho ki is se adhaik bahut mar khailavane se tera bhai teree drashtti men tuchchh tthare.." 
Deuteronomy25:4 danvate samay chalate huae baail ka munh n bandhana. 
Deuteronomy25:5 jab koi bhai sang rahate ho, aur un men se aek niputra mar jaa, to usakee sree ka byah paragotraee se n kiya jaae usake paati ka bhai usake pas jakar use apanee patnee kar le, aur us se paati ke bhai ka dharma palan kare." 
Deuteronomy25:6 aur jo paahila betta us sree se utpann ho vah us mare huae bhai ke nam ka tthare, jis se ki usaka nam israael men se mitt n jaae." 
Deuteronomy25:7 yaadi us sree ke pati ke bhai ko use byahana n bhaa, to vah sree nagar ke faattk par vraddh logon ke pas jakar kahe, ki mere paati ke bhai ne apane bhai ka nam israael men banaae rakhne se nakar diya haai, aur mujh se pati ke bhai ka dharma palan karana naheen chahata." 
Deuteronomy25:8 tab us nagar ke vraddh us puroosh ko bulavakar use samajhaaen aur yadi vah apanee bat par ada rahe, aur kahe, ki mujhe isako byahana naheen bhavata," 
Deuteronomy25:9 to usake bhai kee patnee un vraddh logon ke samhane usake pas jakar usake panv se jootee utare, aur usake moonh par took de aur kahe, jo puroosh apane bhai ke vansh ko chalana n chahe us se isee prakar vyavahar kiya jaaega." 
Deuteronomy25:10 tab israael men us puroosh ka yah nam padega, arthata jootee utare huae puroosh ka gharana.." 
Deuteronomy25:11 yaadi do puroosh apas men marapeett karate ho, aur un men se aek kee patnee apane pati ko maranevale ke hath se chhudane ke liye pas jaa, aur apana hath baddhakar usake gupt ang ko pakade," 
Deuteronomy25:12 to us sree ka hath katt dalana us par taras n khana.. 
Deuteronomy25:13 apanee thailee men bhanti bhanati ke arthata ghatttee-baddhtee battkhre n rakhna. 
Deuteronomy25:14 apane ghar men bhanti bhanati ke, arthata ghatttee-baddhtee napuae n rakhna." 
Deuteronomy25:15 tere battkhre aur napuae poore poore aur dharma ke hon isaliye ki jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai us men teree ayu bahut ho. 
Deuteronomy25:16 kyonaki aeese kamon men jitane kuttlaita karate haain ve sab tere parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men gharaanait haain.. 
Deuteronomy25:17 smaran rakh ki jab too misr se nikalakar a raha tha tab amalek ne tujh se marga men kya kiya," 
Deuteronomy25:18 arthata unako parameshvar ka bhy n tha is karan us ne jab too marga men thka manda tha, tab tujh par chaddhai karake jitane nirbal hone ke karan sab se peechhe the un sabhon ko mara." 
Deuteronomy25:19 isaliye jab tera parameshvar yahova us desh me, jo vah tera bhag karake tere adhaikar men kar deta haai, tujhe charon or ke sab shatrauon se vishraam de, tab amalek ka nam dharatee par se mitta dalana aur tum is bat ko n boolana.." 
Deuteronomy26:1 fir jab too us desh men jise tera parameshvar yahova tera nij bhag karake tujhe deta haai pahunche, aur usaka aadhaikaree hokar un men bas jaa," 
Deuteronomy26:2 tab jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai, usakee boomi kee bhanati bhanati kee jo pahilee upaj too apane ghar laaega, us men se kuchh ttokaree men lekar us sthan par jana, jise tera parameshvar yahova apane nam ka nivas karane ko chun le." 
Deuteronomy26:3 aur un dinon ke yajak ke pas jakar yah kahana, ki maain aj tere parameshvar yahova ke samhane nivedan karata hoo, ki yahova ne ham logon ko jis desh ke dene kee hamare poorvajon se shapath khai thee us men maain a gaya hoon." 
Deuteronomy26:4 tab yajak tere hath se vah ttokaree lekar tere parameshvar yahova kee vedee ke samhane dhar de. 
Deuteronomy26:5 tab too apane parameshvar yahova se is prakar kahana, ki mera moolapuroosh aek aramee manushy tha jo marane par tha aur vah apane chhotte se paarivar samet misr ko gaya, aur vahan paradeshaee hokar raha aur vahana us se aek badee, aur samarthee, aur bahut manushyon se bhree hui jaati utpann hui." 
Deuteronomy26:6 aur misriyon ne ham logon se bura bartav kiya, aur hamen du:kh diya, aur ham se kaattnai seva leen." 
Deuteronomy26:7 parantu ham ne apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova kee dohai dee, aur yahova ne hamaree sunakar hamare dukh-shram aur andhor par drashtti kee" 
Deuteronomy26:8 aur yahova ne balavant hath aur baddhai hui bhuja se aati bhyanak chinh aur chamatkar dikhlakar ham ko misr se nikal laya 
Deuteronomy26:9 aur hamen is sthan par pahunchakar yah desh jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haain hamen de diya haai. 
Deuteronomy26:10 ab he yahova, dek, jo boomi too ne mujhe dee haai usakee pahalee upaj maain tere pas le aya hoon." 
Deuteronomy26:11 tab too use apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane rakhna aur yahova ko dandvat karana 
Deuteronomy26:12 aur jitane achchhe padarth tera parameshvar yahova tujhe aur tere gharane ko de, unake karan too leveeyon aur apane madhy men rahanevale paradeashaiyon saahit anand karana.." 
Deuteronomy26:13 aur too apane parameshvar yahova se kahana, ki maain ne teree sab agyaaon ke anusar pavitra ttharai hui vastuon ko apane ghar se nikala, aur leveey, paradeshae, anat, aur vidhava ko de diya haai teree kisee agyaa ko maain ne n to ttala haai, aur n boola haai." 
Deuteronomy26:14 un vastuon men se maain ne shaek ke samay naheen khaya, aur n un men se koi vastu ashuuddhta kee dasha men ghar se nikalee, aur n kuchh shaek karanevalon ko diya maain ne apane parameshvar yahova kee sun lee, maain ne teree sab agyaaon ke anusar kiya haai." 
Deuteronomy26:15 too svarga men se jo tera pavitra dhaam haai drashtti karake apanee praja israael ko ashaeesh de, aur is doodha aur madha kee dhaaraon ke desh kee boomi par ashaeesh de, jise too ne hamare poorvajon se khai hui shapath ke anusar hamen diya haai." 
Deuteronomy26:16 aj ke din tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko inheen vidhaiyon aur niyamon ke manane kee agyaa deta haai isaliye apane sare man aur sare praan se inake manane men chaukasee karana. 
Deuteronomy26:17 too ne to aj yahova ko apana parameshvar manakar yah vachan diya haai, ki maain tere banaae huae magorn par chaloonga, aur teree vidhaiyo, agyaao, aur niyamon ko mana karoonga, aur teree suna karoonga." 
Deuteronomy26:18 aur yahova ne bhee aj tujh ko apane vachan ke anusar apana prajaroopee nij dhan sampati mana haai, ki too usakee sab agyaaon ko mana kare," 
Deuteronomy26:19 aur ki vah apanee banai hui sab jaatiyon se aadhaik prashansa, nam, aur shaebha ke vishay men tujh ko praatishttit kare, aur too usake vachan ke anusar apane parameshvar yahova kee pavitra praja bana rahe." 
Deuteronomy27:1 fir israael ke vraddh logon samet moosa ne praja ke logon ko yah agyaa dee, ki jitanee agyaaaen maain aj tumhen sunata hoon un sab ko manana." 
Deuteronomy27:2 aur jab tum yaradan par hoke us desh men pahuncho, jo tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai, tab bade bade patthr khde kar lena, aur un par choona potana" 
Deuteronomy27:3 aur par hone ke bad un par is vyavastha ke sare vachanon ko likhna, isaaliye ki jo desh tere poorvajon ka parameshvar yahova apane vachan ke anusar tujhe deta haai, aur jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai, us desh men too jane paae." 
Deuteronomy27:4 fir jin patthron ke vishay men maain ne aj agyaa dee haai, unhen tum yaradan ke par hokar aebal pahad par khda karana, aur un par choona potana." 
Deuteronomy27:5 aur vaheen apane parameshvar yahova ke liye patthron kee aek vedee banana, un par koi aujar n chalana." 
Deuteronomy27:6 apane parameshvar yahova kee vedee anagaddhe patthron kee banakar un par usake liye homabaali chaddhana 
Deuteronomy27:7 aur vaheen melabali bhee chaddhakar bhojan karana, aur apane parameshvar yahova ke sammukh anand karana." 
Deuteronomy27:8 aur un patthron par is vyavastha ke sab vachanon ko shuuddh reeati se likh dena.. 
Deuteronomy27:9 fir moosa aur leveey yajakon ne sab israaeliyon se yah bhee kaha, ki he israael, chup rahakar suna aj ke din too apane parameshvar yahova kee praja ho gaya haai." 
Deuteronomy27:10 isaliye apane parameshvar yahova kee bat manana, aur usakee jo jo agyaa aur vidhai maain aj tujhe sunata hoon unaka palan karana." 
Deuteronomy27:11 fir usee din moosa ne praja ke logon ko yah agyaa dee," 
Deuteronomy27:12 ki jab tum yaradan par ho jao tab shaimaun, levee, yahooda, issakar, yusuf, aur binyameen, ye girijjeem pahad par khde hokar ashaeervad sunaaen." 
Deuteronomy27:13 aur rooben, gad, ashor, jabooloon, dan, aur naptalee, ye aebal pahad par khde hoke shaap sunaaen." 
Deuteronomy27:14 tab leveey log sab israaelee purooshaen se pukarake kahe," 
Deuteronomy27:15 ki shaaapit ho vah manushy jo koi mootira kareegar se khudavakar va ddhlavakar nirale sthan men sthapan kare, kyonki is se yahova ko gharana lagatee haai. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:16 shaapit ho vah jo apane pita va mata ko tuchchh jane. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:17 shaapit ho vah jo kisee doosare ke sivane ko hattaae. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:18 shaapit ho vah jo andho ko marga se bhttka de. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:19 shaapit ho vah jo paredashae, anat, va vidhava ka nyay bigade. tab sab log kahen ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:20 shaapit ho vah jo apanee sautelee mata se kukarma kare, kyonkai vah apane pita ka oddhna ughaarata haai. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:21 shaapit ho vah jo kisee prakar ke pashu se kukarma kare. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:22 shaapit ho vah jo apanee bahin, chahe sagee ho chahe sautelee, us se kukarma kare. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:23 shaapit ho vah jo apanee sas ke sang kukarma kare. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:24 shaapit ho vah jo kisee ko chhpaikar mare. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:25 shaapit ho vah jo nirdosh jan ke mar dalane ke liye dhan le. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy27:26 shaapit ho vah jo is vyavastha ke vachanon ko manakar poora n kare. tab sab log kahe, ameena.." 
Deuteronomy28:1 yaadi too apane parameshvar yahova kee sab agyaaae, jo maain aj tujhe sunata hoo, chaukasee se pooree karane ka chitt lagakar usakee sune, to vah tujhe prathvee kee sab jatiyon men shraeshtt karega." 
Deuteronomy28:2 fir apane parameshvar yahova kee sunane ke karan ye sab ashareevad tujh par poore honge. 
Deuteronomy28:3 dhany ho too nagar me, dhany ho too khet men." 
Deuteronomy28:4 dhany ho teree santan, aur teree boomi kee upaj, aur gay aur bhed-bakaree adi pashuuon ke bachche." 
Deuteronomy28:5 dhany ho teree ttokaree aur teree kattautee. 
Deuteronomy28:6 dhany ho too bheetar ate samay, aur dhany ho too bahar jate samaya." 
Deuteronomy28:7 yahova aeesa karega ki tere shatra jo tujh par chaddhai karenge ve tujh se har jaaenge ve aek marga se tujh par chaddhai karenge, parantu tere samhane se sat marga se hokar bhag jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy28:8 tere khton par aur jitane kamon men too hath lagaaega un sabhon par yahova ashaeesh dega isaaliye jo desh tera parameshvar yahova tujhe deta haai us men vah tujhe ashaeesh dega. 
Deuteronomy28:9 yaadi too apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaaon ko manate huae usake magorn par chale, to vah apanee shapath ke anusar tujhai apanee paavitra praja karake sthiar rakhega." 
Deuteronomy28:10 aur prathvee ke desh desh ke sab log yah dekhkar, ki too yahova ka kahalata haai, tujh se dr jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy28:11 aur jis desh ke vishay yahova ne tere poorvajon se shapath khakar tujhe dene ko kaha, tha us men vah teree santan kee, aur boomi kee upaj kee, aur pashuuon kee baddhtee karake teree bhlai karega." 
Deuteronomy28:12 yahova tere liye apane akasharoopee uttm bhndar ko kholakar teree boomi par samay par menh barasaya karega, aur tere sare kamon par ashaeesh dega aur too bahuteree jaatiyon ko udhaar dega, parantu kisee se tujhe udhaar lena n padega." 
Deuteronomy28:13 aur yahova tujh ko punchh nahee, kintu sir hee ttharaaega, aur too neeche nahee, parantu upar hee rahega yadi parameshvar yahova kee agyaaaen jo maain aj tujh ko sunata hoo, too unake manane men man lagakar chaukasee kare" 
Deuteronomy28:14 aur jin vachanon kee maain aj tujhe agyaa deta hoon un men se kisee se daahine va baaen mudke paraye devataon ke peechhe n ho le, aur n unakee seva kare.." 
Deuteronomy28:15 parantu yadi too apane parameshvar yahova kee bat n sune, aur usakee saree agyaaon aur vidhaiyon ke palane men jo maain aj sunata hoon chaukasee naheen karega, to ye sab shaap tujh par a padenge." 
Deuteronomy28:16 arthata shaapit ho too nagar me, shaaapit ho too khet men." 
Deuteronomy28:17 shaapit ho teree ttokaree aur teree kattautee. 
Deuteronomy28:18 shaapit ho teree santan, aur boomi kee upaj, aur gayon aur bhed-bakaariyon ke bachche." 
Deuteronomy28:19 shaapit ho too bheetar ate samay, aur shaaapit ho too bahar jate samaya." 
Deuteronomy28:20 fir jis jis kam men too hath lagaa, us men yahova tab tak tujh ko shaap deta, aur bhyaturan karata, aur dhamakee deta rahega, jab tak too mitt n jaa, aur shaeegha nashtt n ho jaae yah is karan hoga ki too yahova ko tyagakar dushtt kam karega." 
Deuteronomy28:21 aur yahova aeesa karega ki maree tujh men faailakar us samay tak lagee rahegee, jab tak jis boomi ke adhaikaree hone ke liye too ja raha haai us se tera ant n ho jaae." 
Deuteronomy28:22 yahova tujh ko kshayarog se, aur jvar, aur dah, aur badee jalan se, aur talavar se, aur jhulas, aur gerooi se marega aur ye us samay tak tera peechha kiye rahenge, tab tak too satyanash n ho jaae." 
Deuteronomy28:23 aur tere sir ke upar akash peetal ka, aur tere panv ke tale boomi lohe kee ho jaaegee." 
Deuteronomy28:24 yahova tere desh men panee ke badale baloo aur dhooli barasaaega vah akash se tujh par yahan tak barasegee ki too satyanash ho jaaega. 
Deuteronomy28:25 yahova tujh ko shatrauon se haravaaega aur too aek marga se unaka samhana karane ko jaaega, parantu sat marga se hokar unake samhane se bhag jaaega aur prathvee ke sab rajyon men mara mara firega." 
Deuteronomy28:26 aur teree loth akash ke bhanati bhanati ke pakshiayo, aur dharatee ke pashuuon ka ahar hogee aur unaka koi hakanevala n hoga." 
Deuteronomy28:27 yahova tujh ko misr ke se faode, aur bavaseer, aur dad, aur khujalee se aeesa peeadit karega, ki too changa n ho sakega." 
Deuteronomy28:28 yahova tujhe pagal aur andha kar dega, aur tere man ko atyant ghabara dega" 
Deuteronomy28:29 aur jaaise andha aandhiayare men ttttolata haai vaaise hee too din dupaharee men ttttolata firega, aur tere kam kaj sufal n honge aur too sadaaiv keval andhor sahata aur luttta hee rahega, aur tera koi chhudanevala n hoga." 
Deuteronomy28:30 too sree se byah kee bat lagaaega, parantu doosara puroosh usako bhrashtt karega ghar too banaaega, parantu us men basane n paaega dakh kee baree too lagaaega, parantu usake fal khane n paaega." 
Deuteronomy28:31 tera baail teree ankhon ke samhane mara jaaega, aur too usaka mans khane n paaega tera gadaha teree ankh ke samhane loott men chala jaaega, aur tujhe fir n milega teree bhed-bakaariyan tere shatrauon ke hath lag jaaengee, aur teree or se unaka koi chhudanevala n hoga." 
Deuteronomy28:32 tere bette-beattyaian doosare desh ke logon ke hath lag jaaenge, aur unake liye chav se dekhte dekhte teree ankhe rah jaaengee aur tera kuchh bas n chalega." 
Deuteronomy28:33 teree boomi kee upaj aur teree saree kamai aek anajane desh ke loge kha jaaenge aur sarvada too keval andhor sahata aur peesa jata rahega 
Deuteronomy28:34 yahan tak ki too un baton ke karan jo apanee ankhon se dekhega pagal ho jaaega. 
Deuteronomy28:35 yahova tere ghauttnon aur ttangon me, varan nakh se shaikh tak bhee asadhy faode nikalakar tujh ko peeadit karega." 
Deuteronomy28:36 yahova tujh ko us raja samet, jis ko too apane upar ttharaaega, teree aur tere poorvajon se anajanee aek jati ke beech pahunchaaega aur usake madhy men rahakar too katt aur patthr ke doosare devataon kee upasana aur pooja karega." 
Deuteronomy28:37 aur un sab jaatiyon men jinake madhy men yahova tujh ko pahunchaaega, vahan ke logon ke liye too chaakit hone ka, aur drashttant aur shaap ka karan samajha jaaega." 
Deuteronomy28:38 too khet men beej to bahut sa le jaaega, parantu upaj thodee hee battorega kyonki ttiiddayan use kha jaaengee." 
Deuteronomy28:39 too dakh kee baariyan lagakar un me kam to karega, parantu unakee dakh ka madha peene n paaega, varan fal bhee todne n paaega kyonaki keede unako kha jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy28:40 tere sare desh men jalapai ke vraksha to honge, parantu unaka tel too apane shareer men lagane n paaega kyonki ve jhd jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy28:41 tere bette-beattyaian to utpann honge, parantu tere rahenge naheen kyonaki ve bandhauvai men chale jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy28:42 tere sab vraksha aur teree boomi kee upaj ttiiddayan kha jaaengee. 
Deuteronomy28:43 jo paradeshaee tere madhy men rahega vah tujh se baddhta jaaega aur too ap ghattta chala jaaega. 
Deuteronomy28:44 vah tujh ko udhaar dega, parantu too usako udhaar n de sakega vah to sir aur too poonchh ttharega."
