Deuteronomy28:45 too jo apane parameshvar yahova kee dee hui agyaaon aur vidhaiyon ke manane ko usakee n sunega, is karan ye sab shaap tujh par a padenge, aur tere peechhe pade rahenge, aur tujh ko pakadenge, aur ant men too nashtt ho jaaega." 
Deuteronomy28:46 aur ve tujh par aur tere vansh par sada ke liye bane rahakar chinh aur chamatkar ttharenge 
Deuteronomy28:47 too jo sab padarth kee bahutayat hone par bhee anand aur prasannata ke sath apane parameshvar yahova kee seva naheen karega," 
Deuteronomy28:48 is karan tujh ko bookha, pyasa, nanga, aur sab padathorn se rahit hokar apane un shatrauon kee seva karanee padegee jinhen yahova tere virooddh bhejega aur jab tak too nashtt n ho jaae tab tak vah teree gardan par lehe ka jooa dal rakhega." 
Deuteronomy28:49 yahova tere virooddh door se, varan prathvee ke chhor se veg udnevale ukab see aek jati ko chaddha laaega jisakee bhasha ko too n samajhega" 
Deuteronomy28:50 us jaati ke logon ka vyavahar kroor hoga, ve n to booddhon ka munh dekhkar adar karenge, aur n balakon par daya karenge" 
Deuteronomy28:51 aur ve tere pashuuon ke bachche aur boomi kee upaj yahan tak kha janaege ki too nashtt ho jaaega aur ve tere liye n ann, aur n naya dakhmadha, aur n ttttka tel, aur n bachhde, n memne chhodenge, yahan tak ki too nash ho jaaega." 
Deuteronomy28:52 aur ve tere parameshvar yahova ke diye huae sare desh ke sab faattkon ke bheetar tujhe ghor rakhenge ve tere sab faattkon ke bheetar tujhe us samay tak ghorenge, jab tak tere sare desh men teree unchee unchee aur draddh shaharapanahen jin par too bhrosa karega gir n jaaen." 
Deuteronomy28:53 tab ghair jane aur us saketee ke samay jis men tere shatra tujh ko dalenge, too apane nij janmaae bette-bettyaien ka mans jinhen tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko dega khaaega." 
Deuteronomy28:54 aur tujh men jo puroosh komal aur ati sukumar ho vah bhee apane bhai, aur apanee praanpyaree, aur apane bache huae balakon ko kroor draashtti se dekhega" 
Deuteronomy28:55 aur vah un men se kisee ko bhee apane balakon ke mans men se jo vah ap khaaega kuchh n dega, kyonki ghair jane aur us saketee me, jis men tere shatra tere sare faattkon ke bheetar tujhe ghor dalenge, usake pas kuchh n rahega." 
Deuteronomy28:56 aur tujh men jo sree yahan tak komal aur sukumar ho ki sukumarapan ke aur komalata ke mare boomi par panv dharate bhee dratee ho, vah bhee apane praanapiry paati, aur bette, aur bettee ko," 
Deuteronomy28:57 apanee kheree, varan apane jane huae bachchaen ko kroor draashtti se dekhegee, kyonki ghair jane aur saketee ke samay jis men tere shatra tujhe tere faattkon ke bheetar ghorakar rakhenge, vah sab vastuon kee ghattee ke mare unhen chhpai ke khaaegee." 
Deuteronomy28:58 yaadi too in vyavastha ke sare vachanon ke palane me, jo is pustak men likhen haai, chaukasee karake us adaraneey aur bhyayogy nam ka, jo yahova tere parameshvar ka haai bhy n mane," 
Deuteronomy28:59 to yahova tujh ko aur tere vansh ko anokhe anokhe dand dega, ve dushtt aur bahut din rahanevale rog aur bharee bharee dand honge." 
Deuteronomy28:60 aur vah misr ke un sab rogon ko fir tere upar laga dega, jin se too bhy khata tha aur ve tujh men lage rahenge." 
Deuteronomy28:61 aur jitane rog adi dand is vyavastha kee pustak men naheen likhe haai, un sabhon ko bhee yahova tujh ko yahan tak laga dega, ki too satyanash ho jaaega." 
Deuteronomy28:62 aur too jo apane parameshvar yahova kee n manega, is karan akash ke taron ke saman anaginit hone kee santee tujh men se thode hee manushy rah jaaenge." 
Deuteronomy28:63 aur jaaise ab yahova kee tumharee bhlai aur baddhtee karane se harsha hota haai, vaaise hee tab usako tumhen nash varan satyanash karane se harsha hoga aur jis boomi ke adhaikaree hone ko tum ja rahe ho us par se tum ukhade jaoge." 
Deuteronomy28:64 aur yahova tujh ko prathvee ke is chhor se lekar us chhor tak ke sab deshaen ke logon men tittr bittr karega aur vahan rahakar too apane aur apane purakhaon ke anajane katt aur patthr ke doosare devataon kee upasana karega. 
Deuteronomy28:65 aur un jaatiyon men too kabhee chaain n paaega, aur n tere panv ko ttkaiana milega kyonki vahan yahova aeesa karega ki tera day kanpata rahega, aur teree ankhe dhaundhalee pad jaaegee, aur tera man kalapata rahega" 
Deuteronomy28:66 aur tujh ko jeevan ka nity sandeh rahega aur too din rat thrathrata rahega, aur tere jeevan ka kuchh bhrosa n rahega." 
Deuteronomy28:67 tere man men jo bhy bana rahega, usake karan too bhor ko ah marake kahega, ki sanjh kab hogee! aur sanjh ko ah marake kahega, ki bhor kab hoga." 
Deuteronomy28:68 aur yahova tujh ko navon par chaddhakar misr men us marga se lautta dega, jisake vishay men maain ne tujh se kaha tha, ki vah fir tere dekhne men n aaega aur vahana tum apane shatrauon ke hath dasa-dasee hone ke liye bika to rahoge, parantu tumhara koi graahak n hoga.." 
Deuteronomy29:1 istraaeliyon se jis vacha ke bandhane kee agyaa yahova ne moosa ko moab ke desh men dee usake ye hee vachan haai, aur jo vacha us ne un se horeb pahad par bandhaee thee yah us se alag haai." 
Deuteronomy29:2 fir moosa ne sab istraaeliyon ko bulakar kaha, jo kuchh yahova ne misr desh men tumhare dekhte firaun aur usake sab karmachaariyo, aur usake sare desh se kiya vah tum ne dekha haai" 
Deuteronomy29:3 ve bade bade pareeksha ke kam, aur chinh, aur bade bade chamatkar teree ankhon ke samhane huae" 
Deuteronomy29:4 parantu yahova ne aj tak tum ko n to samajhne kee buddh,i aur n dekhne kee ankhe, aur n sunane ke kan diae haain." 
Deuteronomy29:5 maain to tum ko jangal men chalees varsha liae fira aur n tumhare tan par vasr purane hua, aur n teree jootiyan tere paairon men puranee hui" 
Deuteronomy29:6 rottee jo tum naheen khane paa, aur dakhmadha aur maadira jo tum naheen peene paa, vah isaliye hua ki tum jano ki maain yahova tumhara parameshvar hoon." 
Deuteronomy29:7 aur jab tum is sthan par aa, tab heshabon ka raja seehon aur bashaan ka raja og, ye dono yuddh ke liye hamara samhana karane ko nikal aa, aur ham ne unako jeetakar unaka desh le liya" 
Deuteronomy29:8 aur roobeniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke logon ko nij bhag karake de diya." 
Deuteronomy29:9 isaliye is vacha kee baton ka palan karo, taaki jo kuchh karo vah sufal ho.." 
Deuteronomy29:10 aj kya vraddh log, kya saradar, tumhare mukhy mukhy puroosha, kya gotra gotra ke tum sab israaelee puroosha," 
Deuteronomy29:11 kya tumhare balabachche aur striaya, kya lakadhare, kya panabhre, kya teree chhavanee men rahanevale paradeshae, tum sab ke sab apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane isaliye khde huae ho," 
Deuteronomy29:12 ki jo vacha tera parameshvar yahova aj tujh se bandhata haai, aur jo shapath vah aj tujh ko khailata haai, us men too sajhee ho jaae" 
Deuteronomy29:13 isaliye ki us vachan ke anusar jo usane tujh ko diya, aur us shapath ke anusar jo usane ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob, tere poorvajon se khai thee, vah aj tujh ko apanee praja ttharaa, aur ap tera parameshvar tthare." 
Deuteronomy29:14 fir maain is vacha aur is shapath men keval tum ko nahee," 
Deuteronomy29:15 parantu unako bhee, jo aj hamare sang yahan hamare parameshvar yahova ke samhane khde haai, aur jo aj yahan hamare sang naheen haai, sajhee karata hoon." 
Deuteronomy29:16 tum janate ho ki jab ham misr desh men rahate the, aur jab marga men kee jatiyon ke beechon beech hokar a rahe the," 
Deuteronomy29:17 tab tum ne unakee kaaisee kaaisee ghainaunee vastue, aur kat, patthr, chandee, sone kee kaaisee mooraten dekheen." 
Deuteronomy29:18 isaliye aeesa n ho, ki tum logon men aeesa koi puroosha, va sre, va kul, va gotra ke log hon jinaka man aj hamare parameshvar yahova se fir jaa, aur ve jakar un jaatiyon ke devataon kee upasana karen fir aeesa n ho ki tumhare madhy aeesee koi jad ho, jis se vish va kadua beej uga ho," 
Deuteronomy29:19 aur aeesa manushy is shaap ke vachan sunakar apane ko ashaeervad ke yogy mane, aur yah soche ki chahe maain apane man ke hatt par chaloo, aur trapt hokar pyas ko mitta daloo, taubhee mera kushal hoga." 
Deuteronomy29:20 yahova usaka pap kshama naheen karega, varan yahova ke kop aur jalan ka dhauna usako chha lega, aur jitane shaap is pustak men likhen haain ve sab us par a padenge, aur yahova usaka nam dharatee par se mitta dega." 
Deuteronomy29:21 aur vyavastha kee is pustak men jis vacha kee charcha haai usake sab shaapon ke anusar yahova usako israael ke sab gotraen men se haani ke liye alag karega. 
Deuteronomy29:22 aur anevalee peeddhiyon men tumhare vansh ke log jo tumhare bad utpann honge, aur paredeshaee manushy bhee jo door desh se aaenge, ve us desh kee vipaatiayon aur us men yahova ke faailaae huae rog dekhkar," 
Deuteronomy29:23 aur yah bhee dekhkar ki isakee sab boomi gandhak aur lon se bhr gai haai, aur yahan tak jal gai haai ki is men n kuchh boya jata, aur n kuchh jam sakata, aur n ghaas ugatee haai, varan sadom aur amora, adama aur saboyeem ke saman ho gaya haai jinhen yahova ne apane kop aur jalajalahatt men ulatt diya tha" 
Deuteronomy29:24 aur sab jaatiyon ke log poochhenge, ki yahova ne is desh se aeesa kyon kiya? aur is bade kop ke bhdkane ka kya karan haai?" 
Deuteronomy29:25 tab log yah uttr denge, ki unake poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova ne jo vacha unake sath misr desh se nikalane ke samay bandhaee thee usako unhon ne toda haai." 
Deuteronomy29:26 aur paraae devataon kee upasana kee haai jinhen ve pahile naheen janate the, aur yahova ne unako naheen diya tha" 
Deuteronomy29:27 isaliye yahova ka kop is desh par bhdk utta haai, ki pustak me likhe huae sab shaap is par a paden" 
Deuteronomy29:28 aur yahova ne kop, aur jalajalahat, aur bada hee krodha karake unhen unake desh men se ukhad kar doosare desh men faenk diya, jaaisa ki aj pragatt haai.." 
Deuteronomy29:29 gupt baten hamare parameshvar yahova ke vash men haain parantu jo pragatt kee gai haain ve sada ke liye hamare aur hamare vansh men rahengee, isaaliye ki is vyavastha kee sab baten pooree hee jaaen.." 
Deuteronomy30:1 fir jab ashaeesh aur shaap kee ye sab baten jo maain ne tujh ko kah sunai haain tujh par ghatte, aur too un sab jatiyon ke madhy men rahakar, jahan tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko barabas pahunchaaega, in baton ko smaran kare," 
Deuteronomy30:2 aur apanee santan saahit apane sare man aur sare praan se apane parameshvar yahova kee or firakar usake pas lautt aa, aur in sab agyaaon ke anusar jo maain aj tujhe sunata hoon usakee baten mane" 
Deuteronomy30:3 tab tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko bandhauai se lautta le aaega, aur tujh par daya karake un sab deshaen ke logon men se jinake madhy men vah tujh ko tittr bittr kar dega fir ikattha karega." 
Deuteronomy30:4 chahe dharatee ke chhor tak tera barabas pahunchaya jana ho, taubhee tera parameshvar yahova tujh ko vahan se le akar ikattha karega." 
Deuteronomy30:5 aur tera parameshvar yahova tujhe usee desh men pahunchaaega jisake tere purakha aadhaikaree huae the, aur too fir usaka adhaikaree hoga aur vah teree bhlai karega, aur tujh ko tere purakhaon se bhee ginatee men adhaik baddhaaega." 
Deuteronomy30:6 aur tera parameshvar yahova tere aur tere vansh ke man ka khtana karega, ki too apane parameshvar yahova se apane sare man aur sare praan ke sath praem kare, jis se too jeevit rahe." 
Deuteronomy30:7 aur tera parameshvar yahova ye sab shaap kee baten tere shatrauon par jo tujh se baair karake tere peechhe padenge bhejega. 
Deuteronomy30:8 aur too firega aur yahova kee sunega, aur in sab agyaaon ko manega jo maain aj tujh ko sunata hoon." 
Deuteronomy30:9 aur yahova teree bhlai ke liye tere sab kamon me, aur teree santan, aur pashuuon ke bachchae, aur boomi kee upaj men teree baddhtee karega kyonaki yahova fir tere upar bhlai ke liye vaaisa hee anand karega, jaaisa us ne tere poorvajon ke upar kiya tha" 
Deuteronomy30:10 kyonaki too apane parameshvar yahova kee sunakar usakee agyaaon aur vidhaiyon ko jo is vyavastha kee pustak men likhee haain mana karega, aur apane parameshvar yahova kee or apane sare man aur sare praan se man firaaega.." 
Deuteronomy30:11 dekho, yah jo agyaa maain aj tujhe sunata hoo, vah n to tere liye anokhee, aur n door haai." 
Deuteronomy30:12 aur n to yah akash men haai, ki too kahe, ki kaun hamare liye akash men chaddhkar use hamare pas le aa, aur ham ko sunaae ki ham use manen?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 aur n yah samudr par haai, ki too kahe, kaun hamare liye samudr par jaa, aur use hamare pas le aa, aur ham ko sunaae ki ham use manen?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 parantu yah vachan tere bahut nikat, varan tere munh aur man hee men haai taaki too is par chale.." 
Deuteronomy30:15 sun, aj maain ne tujh ko jeevan aur mara, hani aur labh dikhaya haai." 
Deuteronomy30:16 kyonaki maain aj tujhe agyaa deta hoo, ki apane parameshvar yahova se praem karana, aur usake magorn par chalana, aur usakee agyaao, vidhaiyo, aur niyamon ko manana, jis se too jeevit rahe, aur baddhta jaa, aur tera parameshvar yahova us desh men jisaka adhaikaree hone ko too ja raha haai, tujhe ashaeesh de." 
Deuteronomy30:17 parantu yadi tera man bhttk jaa, aur too n sune, aur bhttkakar paraae devataon ko dandvat kare aur unakee upasana karane lage," 
Deuteronomy30:18 to maain tumhen aj yah chitaunee diae deta hoon ki tum ni:sandeh nashtt ho jaoge aur jis desh ka aadhaikaree hone ke liye too yaradan par ja raha haai, us desh men tum bahut dinon ke liye rahane n paoge." 
Deuteronomy30:19 maain aj akash aur prathvee donon ko tumhare samhane is bat kee sakshaee banata hoo, ki maain ne jeevan aur mara, ashaeesh aur shaap ko tumhare age rakha haai isaaliye too jeevan hee ko apana le, ki too aur tera vansh donon jeevit rahen" 
Deuteronomy30:20 isaliye apane parameshvar yahova se praem karo, aur usakee bat mano, aur us se lipatte raho kyonaki tera jeevan aur deergha jeevan yahee haai, aur aeesa karane se jis desh ko yahova ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob, tere poorvajon ko dene kee shapath khai thee us desh men too basa rahega.." 
Deuteronomy31:1 aur moosa ne jakar yah baten sab israaeliyon ko sunain. 
Deuteronomy31:2 aur us ne un se yah bhee kaha, ki aj maain aek sau beech varsha ka hoon aur ab maain chal fir naheen sakata kyonaki yahova ne mujh se kaha haai, ki too is yaradan par naheen jane paaega." 
Deuteronomy31:3 tere age par janevala tera parameshvar yahova hee haai vah un jatiyon ko tere samhane se nashtt karega, aur too unake desh ka aadhaikaree hoga aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar yahoshoo tere age age par jaaega." 
Deuteronomy31:4 aur jis prakar yahova ne aemoriyon ke raja seehon aur og aur unake desh ko nashtt kiya haai, usee prakar vah un sab jatiyon se bhee karega." 
Deuteronomy31:5 aur jab yahova unako tum se harava dega, tab tum un saree agyaaon ke anusar un se karana jo maain ne tum ko sunai haain." 
Deuteronomy31:6 too hiyav bandha aur draddh ho, un se n dr aur n bhyabheet ho kyonki tere sang chalanevala tera parameshvar yahova haai vah tujh ko dhaekha n dega aur n chhodega." 
Deuteronomy31:7 tab moosa ne yahoshoo ko bulakar sab israaeliyon ke sammukh kaha, ki too hiyav bandha aur draddh ho ja kyonki in logon ke sang us desh men jise yahova ne inake poorvajon se shapath khakar dene ko kaha tha too jaaega aur too inako usaka aadhaikaree kar dega." 
Deuteronomy31:8 aur tere age age chalanevala yahova haai vah tere sang rahega, aur n to tujhe dhaekha dega aur n chhod dega isaliye mat dr aur tera man kachcha n ho.." 
Deuteronomy31:9 fir moosa ne yahee vyavastha likhkar leveey yajakon ko, jo yahova kee vacha ke sandook uttanevale the, aur israael ke sab vraddh logon ko saunp dee." 
Deuteronomy31:10 tab moosa ne unako agyaa dee, ki sat sat varsha ke beetane par, arthata ugahee n hone ke varsha ke jhopadeevale pavrva me," 
Deuteronomy31:11 jab sab israaelee tere parameshvar yahova ke us sthan par jise vah chun lega akar ikatthe ho, tab yah vyavastha sab israaeliyon ko paddhkar sunana." 
Deuteronomy31:12 kya puroosha, kya sre, kya balak, kya tumhare faattkon ke bheetar ke paradeshae, sab logon ko ikattha karana ki ve sunakar seekhe, aur tumhare parameshvar yahova ka bhy manakar, is vyavastha ke sare vachanon ke palan karane men chaukasee kare," 
Deuteronomy31:13 aur unake ladkebale jinhon ne ye baten naheen suneen ve bhee sunakar seenkhe, ki tumhare parameshvar yahova ka bhy us samay tak manate rahe, jab tak tum us desh men jeeavit raho jisake adhaikaree hone ko tum yaradan par ja rahe ho.." 
Deuteronomy31:14 fir yahova ne moosa se kaha, tere marane ka din nikatt haai too yahoshoo ko bulava, aur tum donon milapavale tamboo men akar upasthiat ho ki maain usako agyaa doon. tab moosa aur yahoshoo jakar milapavale tamboo men upaasthiat huae." 
Deuteronomy31:15 tab yahova ne us tamboo men badal ke khmbhe men hokar darshan diya aur badal ka khmbha tamboo ke dar par tthar gaya. 
Deuteronomy31:16 tab yahova ne moosa se kaha, too to apane purakhaon ke sang so jane par haai aur ye lage uttkar us desh ke paraye devataon ke peechhe jinake madhy ve jakar rahenge vyabhaicharee ho jaaenge, aur mujhe tyagakar us vacha ko jo maain ne un se bandhaee haai todenge." 
Deuteronomy31:17 us samay mera kop in par bhdkega, aur maain bhee inhen tyagakar in se apana munh chhpai loonga, aur ye ahar ho jaenge aur bahut see vipaatiayan aur klesh in par a padenge, yahan tak ki ye us samay kahenge, kya ye vipaatiayan ham par is karan to naheen a padee, kyonki hamara parameshvar hamare madhy men naheen raha?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 us samay maain un sab buraiyon ke karan jo ye paraye devataon kee or firakar karenge ni:sandeh un se apana munh chhpai loonga. 
Deuteronomy31:19 so ab tum yah geet likh lo, aur too use israaeliyon ko sikhakar kantt kara dena, isaliye ki yah geet unake virooddh mera sakshaee tthare." 
Deuteronomy31:20 jab maain inako us desh men pahunchaunga jise dene kee maain ne inake poorvajon se shapath khain thee, aur jis men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai, aur khate-khate inaka pett bhr jaa, aur ye shtt-pushtt ho jaaenge tab ye paraye devataon kee or firakar unakee upasana karane lagenge, aur mera tiraskar karake meree vacha ko tod denge." 
Deuteronomy31:21 varan abhee bhee jab maain inhen is desh men jisake vishay maain ne shapath khai haai pahuncha naheen chuka, mujhe maloom haai, ki ye kya kya kalpana kar rahe haain isaaliye jab bahut see vipaatiayan aur klesh in par a padenge, tab yah geet in par sakshaee dega, kyonki inakee santan isako kabhee bhee naheen boolegee." 
Deuteronomy31:22 tab moosa ne usee din yah geet likhkar israaeliyon ko sikhaya. 
Deuteronomy31:23 aur us ne noon ke putra yahoshoo ko yah agyaa dee, ki hiyav bandha aur draddh ho kyonki israaeliyon ko us desh men jise unhen dene ko maain ne un se shapath khai haai too pahunchaaega aur maain ap tere sang rahoonga.." 
Deuteronomy31:24 jab moosa is vyavastha ke vachan ko adi se ant tak pustak men likh chuka," 
Deuteronomy31:25 tab us ne yahova ke sandook uttanevale leviyon ko agyaa dee," 
Deuteronomy31:26 ki vyavastha kee is pustak ko lekar apane parameshvar yahova kee vacha ke sandook ke pas rakh do, ki yah vahan tujh par sakshaee detee rahe." 
Deuteronomy31:27 kyonaki tera balava aur hatt mujhe maloom haai dekho, mere jeeavit aur sang rahate huae bhee tum yahova se balava karate aae ho fir mere marane ke bad bhee kyon n karoge!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 tum apane gotraen ke sab vraddh logon ko aur apane saradaron ko mere pas ikattha karo, ki maain unako ye vachan sunakar unake viruddh akash aur prathvee donon ko sakshaee banaun." 
Deuteronomy31:29 kyonaki mujhe maloom haai ki meree mratyu ke bad tum bilakul bigad jaoge, aur jis marga men chalane kee agyaa maain ne tum ko sunai haai usako bhee tum chhod doge aur ant ke dinon men jab tum vah kam karake jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai, apanee banai hui vastuon kee pooja karake usako ris dilaoge, tab tum par vipaati a padegee.." 
Deuteronomy31:30 tab moosa ne israael kee saree sabha ko is geet ke vachan aadi se ant tak kah sunaae: 
Deuteronomy32:1 he akasha, kan laga, ki maain boloon aur he prathvee, mere munh kee baten suna.." 
Deuteronomy32:2 mera upadesh menh kee nain barasega aur meree baten os kee nain ttpakengee, jaaise ki haree ghaas par jheesee, aur paudhaen par jhadiyan.." 
Deuteronomy32:3 maain to yahova nam ka prachar karoonga. tum apane parameshvar kee mahima ko mano! 
Deuteronomy32:4 vah chattan haai, usaka kam khra haai aur usakee saree gati nyay kee haai. vah sachcha ishvar haai, us men kuattlaita nahee, vah dharmee aur seedha haai.." 
Deuteronomy32:5 parantu isee jaati ke log tteddhe aur tirchhe haain ye bigad gaa, ye usake putra naheen yah unaka kalank haai.." 
Deuteronomy32:6 he mooddh aur nirbuaddh ilogo, kya tum yahova ko yah badala dete ho? kya vah tera pita naheen haai, jis ne tum ko mol liya haai? us ne tum ko banaya aur sthiar bhee kiya haai.." 
Deuteronomy32:7 praacheenakal ke dinon ko smaran karo, peeddhee peeddhee ke vasharen ko vicharo apane bap se poochho, aur vah tum ko bataaega apane vraddh logon se prashn karo, aur ve tujh se kah denge.." 
Deuteronomy32:8 jab paramapradhaan ne aek aek jati ko nij nij bhag bantt diya, aur adamiyon ko alag alag basaya, tab us ne desh desh ke logon ke sivane israaeliyon kee ginatee ke anusar ttharaae.." 
Deuteronomy32:9 kyonaki yahova ka ansh usakee praja haai yakoob usaka napa hua nij bhag haai.. 
Deuteronomy32:10 us ne usako jangal me, aur sunasan aur garajanevalon se bhree hui marooboomi men paya us ne usake chanhu or rahakar usakee raksha kee, aur apanee ankh kee putalee kee nai usakee sudhai rakhee.." 
Deuteronomy32:11 jaaise ukab apane ghaensale ko hila hilakar apane bachchon ke upar upar mandlata haai, vaaise hee us ne apane pankh faailakar usako apane paron par utta liya.." 
Deuteronomy32:12 yahova akela hee usakee aguvai karata raha, aur usake sang koi paraya devata n tha.." 
Deuteronomy32:13 us ne usako prathvee ke unche unche sthanon par savar karaya, aur usako kheton kee upaj khailai us ne use chattan men se madha aur chakamak kee chatthan men se tel chusaya.." 
Deuteronomy32:14 gayon ka dahee, aur bhed-bakaariyon ka doodha, memnon kee charbee, bakare aur bashaan kee jati ke meddhe, aur gehoon ka uttm se uttm atta bhee aur too dakhras ka madha piya karata tha.." 
Deuteronomy32:15 parantu yashooroon motta hokar lat marane laga too motta aur shtt-pushtt ho gaya, aur charbee se chha gaya haai tab us ne apane srajanahar ishvar ko taj diya, aur apane uddharamool chattan ko tuchchh jana.." 
Deuteronomy32:16 unhon ne paraae devataon ko manakar us men jalan upajai aur gharaanait karma karake usako ris dilai.. 
Deuteronomy32:17 unhon ne pishaachon ke liye jo ishvar n the bali chaddhaa, aur unake liye ve anajane devata the, ve to naye naye devata the jo thode hee din se prakatt huae the, aur jin se unake purakha kabhee dre naheen." 
Deuteronomy32:18 jis chattan se too utpann hua usako too bool gaya, aur ishvar jis se teree utpaati hui usako bhee too bool gaya haai.." 
Deuteronomy32:19 in baton ko dekhkar yahova ne unhen tuchchh jana, kyonki usake bette-beattyaien ne use ris dilai thee.." 
Deuteronomy32:20 tab us ne kaha, maain un se apana mukh chhpai loonga, aur dekoonga ki unaka ant kaaisa hoga, kyonki is jati ke log bahut tteddhe haain aur dhaekha denevale putra haain." 
Deuteronomy32:21 unhon ne aeesee vastu manakar jo ishvar naheen haai, mujh men jalan utpann kee aur apanee vyarth vastuon ke dara mujhe ris dilai. isaaliye maain bhee unake dara jo meree praja naheen haain unake man men jalan utpann karoonga aur ek mooddh jaati ke dara unhen ris dilaunga.." 
Deuteronomy32:22 kyonaki mere kop kee ag bhdk uttee haai, jo patal kee tah tak jalatee jaaegee, aur prathvee apanee upaj samet bhsm ho jaaegee, aur pahadon kee nevon men bhee ag laga degee.." 
Deuteronomy32:23 maain un par vipaati par vipaati bhejoonga aur un par maain apane sab teeron ko chhooonga.. 
Deuteronomy32:24 ve bookh se dubale ho jaaenge, aur angaron se aur kaattnai maharogon se graasit ho jaaenge aur maain un par pashuuon ke dant lagavaunga, aur dhooli par renganevale saporn ka vish chhod doonga.." 
Deuteronomy32:25 bahar ve talavar se marenge, aur kottriyon ke bheetar bhy se kya kunvare aur kunvariya, kya doodha peeta hua bachcha kya pakke balavale, sab isee prakar barabad honge." 
Deuteronomy32:26 maain ne kaha tha, ki maain unako door door se tittra-abittr karoonga, aur manushyon men se unaka smaran tak mitta daloonga" 
Deuteronomy32:27 parantu mujhe shatrauon kee chhed chhad ka dr tha, aeesa n ho ki drohee isako ulatta samajhkar yah kahane lage, ki ham apane hee bahubal se prabal hua, aur yah sab yahova se naheen hua.." 
Deuteronomy32:28 yah jaati yuktaheen to haai, aur in men samajh haai hee naheen.." 
Deuteronomy32:29 bhla hota ki ye buddhmaian hote, ki isako samajh lete, aur apane ant ka vichar karate!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 yaadi unakee chattan hee unako n bech detee, aur yahova unako auron ke hath men n kar deta to yah kyonkar ho sakata ki unake hajar ka peechha aek manushy karata, aur unake das hajar ko do manushy bhga dete?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 kyonaki jaaisee hamaree chattan haai vaaisee unakee chattan naheen haai, chahe hamare shatra hee kyon n nyayee hon.." 
Deuteronomy32:32 kyonaki unakee dakhlata sadom kee dakhlata se nikalee, aur amora kee dakh kee bariyon men kee haai unakee dakh vishabhree aur unake guchchhe kadve haain" 
Deuteronomy32:33 unaka dakhmadha sanpon ka sa vish aur kale nagon ka sa halahal haai.. 
Deuteronomy32:34 kya yah bat mere man men sanchit, aur mere bhndaron men muharaband naheen haai?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 palatta lena aur badala dena mera hee kam haai, yah unake panv fisalane ke samay pragatt hoga kyonki unakee vipaati ka din nikatt haai, aur jo dukh un par padnevale haai ve shaeegha a rahe haain.." 
Deuteronomy32:36 kyonaki jab yahova dekhega ki meree praja kee shaktai jatee rahee, aur kya bandhaua aur kya svadhaeen, un men koi bacha naheen raha, tab yahova apane logon ka nyay karega, aur apane dason ke vishay men taras khaaega.." 
Deuteronomy32:37 tab vah kahega, unake devata kahan haai, arthat vah chattan kahan jis par unaka bhrosa tha," 
Deuteronomy32:38 jo unake baalidanon kee charbee khate, aur unake tapavanon ka dakhmadha peete the? ve hee uttkar tumharee sahayata kare, aur tumharee ad hon!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 isaliye ab tum dekh lo ki maain hee vah hoo, aur mere sang koi devata naheen maain hee mar dalata, aur maain jilata bhee hoon maain hee ghaayal karata, aur maain hee changa bhee karata hoon aur mere hath se koi naheen chhuda sakata.." 
Deuteronomy32:40 kyonankai maain apana hath svarga kee or uttakar kahata hoo, kyonki maain anant kal ke liye jeeavit hoo," 
Deuteronomy32:41 so yaadi maain bijalee kee talavar par san dharakar jhlakau, aur nyay ko apane hath men le loo, to apane drohiyon se badala loonga, aur apane baaiariyon ko badala doonga.." 
Deuteronomy32:42 maain apane teeron ko lohoo se matavala karoonga, aur meree talavar mans khaaegee vah loho, mare huon aur bandhauon ka, aur vah mans, shatrauon ke pradhaanon ke shaeesh ka hoga.." 
Deuteronomy32:43 he anyajatiyo, usakee praja ke sath anand manao kyonaki vah apane dason ke lohoo ka palatta lega, aur apane drohiyon ko badala dega, aur apane desh aur apanee praja ke pap ke liye praayaashchait dega." 
Deuteronomy32:44 is geet ke sab vachan moosa ne noon ke putra hosho samet akar logon ko sunaae. 
Deuteronomy32:45 jab moosa ye sab vachan sab israaeliyon se kah chuka," 
Deuteronomy32:46 tab us ne un se kaha ki jitanee baten maain aj tum se chitakar kahata hoon un sab par apana apana man lagao, aur unake arthata is vyavastha kee saree baton ke manane men chaukasee karane kee agyaa apane ladkebalon ko do." 
Deuteronomy32:47 kyonaki yah tumhare liye vyarth kam nahee, parantu tumhara jeevan hee haai, aur aeesa karane se us desh men tumharee ayu ke din bahut honge, jisake adhaikaree hone ko tum yaradan par ja rahe ho.." 
Deuteronomy32:48 fir usee din yahova ne moosa se kaha," 
Deuteronomy32:49 us abareem pahad kee nabo nam chottee par, jo moab desh men yareeho ke samhane haai, chaddhkar kanan desh jise maain israealiyon kee nij boomi kar deta hoon usako dekh le." 
Deuteronomy32:50 tab jaaisa tera bhai haroon hor pahad par marakar apane logon men mil gaya, vaaisa hee too is pahad par chaddhkar mar jaaega, aur apane logon men mil jaaega." 
Deuteronomy32:51 isaka karan yah haai, ki seen jangal me, kadesh ke mareeba nam sote par, tum donon ne mera aparadha kiya, kyonaki tum ne israaeliyon ke madhy men mujhe paavitra n ttharaya." 
Deuteronomy32:52 isaliye vah desh jo maain israaeliyon ko deta hoo, too apane samhane dekh lega, parantu vahan jane n paaega.." 
Deuteronomy33:1 jo ashaeervad parameshvar ke jan moosa ne apanee mratyu se pahile israaeliyon ko diya vah yah haai.. 
Deuteronomy33:2 us ne kaha, yahova seenaai se aya, aur seir se unake liye uday hua us ne paran parvat par se apana tej dikhaya, aur lakhon paavitraen ke madhy men se aya, usake dahine hath se unake liye jvalamay vidhaiyan nikaleen.." 
Deuteronomy33:3 vah nishchay desh desh ke logon se praem karata haai usake sab paavitra log tere hath men haain: ve tere panvon ke pas baaitte rahate haai," 
Deuteronomy33:4 moosa ne hamen vyavastha dee, aur yakoob kee mandlee ka nij bhag ttharee.." 
Deuteronomy33:5 jab praja ke mukhy mukhy puroosha, aur israael ke gotraee aek sang hokar aekaatrait hua, tab vah yashooroon men raja tthara.." 
Deuteronomy33:6 rooben n mare, varan jeeavit rahe, taubhee usake yahan ke manushy thode hon.." 
Deuteronomy33:7 aur yahooda par yah ashaeervad hua jo moosa ne kaha, he yahova too yahooda kee sun, aur use usake logon ke pas pahuncha. vah apane liye ap apane hathon se lada, aur too hee usake drohiyon ke virooddh usaka sahayak ho.." 
Deuteronomy33:8 fir levee ke vishay men us ne kaha, tere tummeem aur ureem tere bhkt ke pas haai, jisako too ne massa men parakh liya, aur jisake sath mareeba nam sote par tera vadaavivad hua" 
Deuteronomy33:9 us ne to apane mata pita ke vishay men kaha, ki maain unako naheen janata aur n to us ne apane bhaiyon ko apana mana, aur n apane putraen ko paahichana. kyonki unhon ne teree baten manee, aur ve teree vacha ka palan karate haain.." 
Deuteronomy33:10 ve yakoob ko tere niyam, aur israael ko teree vyavastha sikhaaenge aur tere age dhoop aur teree vedee par sarvang pashu ko homabaali karenge.." 
Deuteronomy33:11 he yahova, usakee sampaati par ashaeesh de, aur usake hathon kee seva ko grahan kara usake virodhaiyon aur baairiyon kee kamar par aeesa mar, ki ve fir n utt saken.." 
Deuteronomy33:12 fir us ne binyameen ke vishay men kaha, yahova ka vah piry jan, usake pas nidr vas karega aur vah din bhr us par chhaya karega, aur vah usake kandhaen ke beech raha karata haai.." 
Deuteronomy33:13 fir yoosufa ke vishay men us ne kaha isaka desh yahova se ashaeesh paae arthata akash ke anamol padarth aur os, aur vah gahira jal jo neeche haai," 
Deuteronomy33:14 aur soorya ke pakaae huae anamol fal, aur jo anamol padarth chandrama ke ugaae ugate haai," 
Deuteronomy33:15 aur praacheen pahadon ke uttm padarth, aur sanatan pahadiyon ke anamol padarth," 
Deuteronomy33:16 aur prathvee aur jo anamol padarth us men bhre haai, aur jo jhadee men rahata tha usakee prasannata. in sabhon ke vishay men yoosufa ke sir par, arthata usee ke sir ke chand par jo apane bhaiyon se nyara hua tha ashaeesh hee ashaeesh fale.." 
Deuteronomy33:17 vah pratapee haai, mano gaya ka pahilautta haai, aur usake seeng banaaile baail ke se haain un se vah desh desh ke logon ko, varan prathvee ke chhor tak ke sab manushyon ko ddhkelega ve aepraaim ke lakhon lak, aur manashsho ke hajaron hajar haain.." 
Deuteronomy33:18 fir jabooloon ke vishay men us ne kaha, he jabooloon, too bahar nikalate samay, aur he issakar, too apane deron men anand kare.." 
Deuteronomy33:19 ve desh desh ke logon ko pahad par bulaaenge ve vahan dharmayagya karenge kyonaki ve samudr ka dhan, aur baloo ke chhpai huae anamol padarth se labh uttaaenge.." 
Deuteronomy33:20 fir gad ke vishay men us ne kaha, dhany vah haai jo gad ko baddhata haai! gad to sinhanee ke saman rahata haai, aur banh ko, varan sir ke chand tak ko faad dalata haai.." 
Deuteronomy33:21 aur us ne paahila ansh to apane liye chun liya, kyonaki vahan rais ke yogy bhag rakha hua tha tab us ne praja ke mukhy mukhy purooshaen ke sang akar yahova ka ttharaya hua dharma, aur israael ke sath hokar usake niyam ka praatipalan kiya.." 
Deuteronomy33:22 fir dan ke vishay men us ne kaha, dan to bashaan se koodanevala sinh ka bachcha haai.." 
Deuteronomy33:23 fir naptalee ke vishay men us ne kaha, he naptalee, too jo yahova kee prasannata se trapt, aur usakee ashaeesh se bhrapoor haai, too paachchhim aur dakkhian ke desh ka adhaikaree ho.." 
Deuteronomy33:24 fir ashor ke vishay men us ne kaha, ashor putraen ke vishay men ashaeesh paae vah apane bhaiyon men piry rahe, aur apana panv tel men duboae.." 
Deuteronomy33:25 tere joote lohe aur peetal ke honge, aur jaaise tere din vaaisee hee teree shaaktai ho.." 
Deuteronomy33:26 he yashooroon, ishvar ke tuly aur koi naheen haai, vah teree sahayata karane ko akash par, aur apana pratap dikhata hua akashamandl par savar hokar chalata haai.." 
Deuteronomy33:27 anadi parameshvar tera grahadhaam haai, aur neeche sanatan bhujaaen haain. vah shatrauon ko tere samhane se nikal deta, aur kahata haai, unako satyanash kar de.." 
Deuteronomy33:28 aur israael nidr basa rahata haai, ann aur naye dakhmadha ke desh men yakoob ka sota akela hee rahata haai aur usake upar ke akash se os pada karatee haai.." 
Deuteronomy33:29 he israael, too kya hee dhany haai! he yahova se uddhar pai hui praja, tere tuly kaun haai? vah to teree sahayata ke liye ddhal, aur tere pratap ke liye talavar haai tere shatra tujhe sarahenge, aur too unake unche sthanon ko raundega.." 
Deuteronomy34:1 fir moosa moab ke araba se nabo pahad par, jo pisaga kee aek chottee aur yareeho ke samhane haai, chaddh gaya aur yahova ne usako dan tak ka gilad nam sara desha," 
Deuteronomy34:2 aur naptalee ka sara desha, aur aepraaim aur manashsho ka desha, aur pachchhim ke samudr tak ka yahooda ka sara desha," 
Deuteronomy34:3 aur daakkhian desha, aur soar tak kee yareeho nam khjooravale nagar kee tarai, yah sab dikhaya." 
Deuteronomy34:4 tab yahova ne us se kaha, jis desh ke vishay men maain ne ibraaheem, isahak, aur yakoob se shapath khakar kaha tha, ki maain ise tere vansh ko doonga vah yahee haai. maain ne isako tujhe sakshaat dikhla diya haai, parantu too par hokar vahan jane n paaega." 
Deuteronomy34:5 tab yahova ke kahane ke anusar usaka das moosa vaheen moab desh men mar gaya," 
Deuteronomy34:6 aur us ne use moab ke desh men betapor ke samhane aek tarai men mittee dee aur aj ke din tak koi naheen janata ki usakee kabra kahan haai. 
Deuteronomy34:7 moosa apanee mratyu ke samay aek sau bees varsha ka tha parantu n to usakee ankhen dhaundhalee padee, aur n usaka pauroosh ghatta tha." 
Deuteronomy34:8 aur israaelee moab ke araba men moosa ke liye tees din tak rote rahe tak moosa ke liye rone aur vilap karane ke din poore hue. 
Deuteronomy34:9 aur noon ka putra yahoshoo buaddhmaianee kee atma se paripoorn tha, kyonaki moosa ne apane hath us par rakhe the aur israaelee us agyaa ke anusar jo yahova ne moosa ko dee thee usakee manate rahe." 
Deuteronomy34:10 aur moosa ke tuly israael men aeesa koi nabee naheen utta, jis se yahova ne amhane-samhane baten kee," 
Deuteronomy34:11 aur usako yahova ne firaun aur usake sab karmachaariyon ke samhane, aur usake sare desh me, sab chinh aur chamatkar karane ko bheja tha," 
Deuteronomy34:12 aur us ne sare israaeliyon kee draashtti men balavant hath aur bade bhy ke kam kar dikhaae.. 
Joshua1:1 yahova ke das moosa kee mratyu ke bad yahova ne usake sevak yahoshoo se jo noon ka putra tha kaha," 
Joshua1:2 mera das moosa mar gaya haai so ab too ut, kamar bandha, aur is saree praja samet yaradan par hokar us desh ko ja jise maain unako arthata israaeliyon ko deta hoon." 
Joshua1:3 us vachan ke anusar jo maain ne moosa se kaha, arthata jis jis sthan par tum panv dharoge vah sab maain tumhe de deta hoon." 
Joshua1:4 jangal aur us labanon se lekar parat mahanad tak, aur sooryast kee or mahasamudra tak hitiayon ka sara desh tumhara bhag ttharega." 
Joshua1:5 tere jeevan bhr koi tere samhane tthar n sakega jaaise maain moosa ke sang raha vaaise hee tere sang bhee rahoonga aur n to maain tujhe dhaekha doonga, aur n tujh ko chhooonga." 
Joshua1:6 isaliye hiyav bandhakar draddh ho ja kyonaki jis desh ke dene kee shapath maain ne in logon ke poorvajon se khai thee usaka aadhaikaree too inhen karega. 
Joshua1:7 itana ho ki too hiyav bandhakar aur bahut draddh hokar jo vyavastha mere das moosa ne tujhe dee haai un sab ke anusar karane men chaukasee karana aur us se n to dahine mudna aur n bana, tab jahan jahan too jaaega vahan vahan tera kam sufal hoga." 
Joshua1:8 vyavastha kee yah pustak tere chitt se kabhee n utarane paa, isee men din rat dhyan diae rahana, isaaliye ki jo kuchh us men likha haai usake anusar karane kee too chaukasee kare kyonki aeesa hee karane se tere sab kam sufal honge, aur too prabhavashaalee hoga." 
Joshua1:9 kya maain ne tujhe agyaa naheen dee? hiyav bandhakar draddh ho ja bhy n kha, aur tera man kachcha n ho kyonki jahan jahan too jaaega vahan vahan tera parameshvar yahova tere sang rahega.." 
Joshua1:10 tab yahoshoo ne praja ke saradaron ko yah agyaa dee," 
Joshua1:11 ki chhavanee men idhar udhar jakar praja ke logon ko yah agyaa do, ki apane apane liye bhojan taaiyar kar rakho kyonaki teen din ke bheetar tum ko is yaradan ke par utarakar us desh ko apane aadhaikar men lene ke liye jana haai jise tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare aadhaikar men denevala haai.." 
Joshua1:12 fir yahoshoo ne roobeaniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke logon se kaha," 
Joshua1:13 jo bat yahova ke das moosa ne tum se kahee thee, ki tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhen vishraam deta haai, aur yahee desh tumhen dega, usakee sudhai karo." 
Joshua1:14 tumharee striaya, balabachche, aur pashu to is desh men rahen jo moosa ne tumhen yaradan ke isee par diya, parantu tum jo shooraveer ho panati bandho huae apane bhaniyon ke age age par utar chalo, aur unakee sahayata karo" 
Joshua1:15 aur jab yahova unako aeesa vishraam dega jaaisa vah tumhen de chuka haai, aur ve bhee tumhare paramashevar yahova ke diae huae desh ke adhaikaree ho jaaenge tab tum apane adhaikar ke desh me, jo yahova ke das moosa ne yaradan ke is par sooyorday kee or tumhen diya haai, lauttkar isake adhaikaree hoge." 
Joshua1:16 tab unhon ne yahoshoo ko uttr diya, ki jo kuchh too ne hamen karane kee agyaa dee haai vah ham karenge, aur jahan kaheen too hamen bheje vahan ham jaaenge." 
Joshua1:17 jaaise ham sab baton men moosa kee manate the vaaise hee teree bhee mana karenge itana ho ki tera parameshvar yahova jaaisa moosa ke sang rahata tha vaaise hee tere sang bhee rahe. 
Joshua1:18 koi kyon n ho jo tere virooddh balava kare, aur jitanee agyaaaen too de unako n mane, to vah mar dala jaaega. parantu too draddh aur hiyav bandho raha.." 
Joshua2:1 tab noon ke putra yahoshoo ne do bheadiyon ko shaitteem se chupake se bhej diya, aur un se kaha, jakar us desh aur yareeho ko dekho. turant ve chal dia, aur rahab nam kisee veshya ke ghar men jakar so gaae." 
Joshua2:2 tab kisee ne yareeho ke raja se kaha, ki aj kee rat kai aek israaelee hamare desh ka bhed lene ko yahan aae huae haain." 
Joshua2:3 tab yareeho ke raja ne rahab ke pas yon kahala bheja, ki jo puroosh tere yahan aae haain unhen bahar le a kyonaki ve sare desh ka bhed lene ko aae haain." 
Joshua2:4 us sree ne donon purooshaen ko chhpai rakha aur is prakar kaha, ki mere pas kai puroosh aae to the, parantu maain naheen janatee ki ve kahan ke the" 
Joshua2:5 aur jab andhora hua, aur faattk band hone laga, tab ve nikal gaae mujhe maloom naheen ki ve kahan gaae tum faurtee karake unaka peechha karo to unhen ja pakadoge." 
Joshua2:6 us ne unako ghar kee chht par chaddhakar sanai kee lakaadiyon ke neeche chhpai diya tha jo us ne chht par saja kar rakhee thee. 
Joshua2:7 ve puroosh to yaradan ka marga le unakee khoj men ghaatt tak chale gaae aur jyon hee unako khojanevale faattk se nikale tyon hee faattk band kiya gaya. 
Joshua2:8 aur ye lettne n paae the ki vah sree chht par inake pas jakar 
Joshua2:9 in purooshaen se kahane lagee, mujhe to nishchay haai ki yahova ne tum logon ko yah desh diya haai, aur tumhara bhy ham logon ke man men samaya haai, aur is desh ke sab nivasee tumhare karan ghabara rahe haain." 
Joshua2:10 kyonaki ham ne suna haai ki yahova ne tumhare misr se nikalane ke samay tumhare samhane lal samudra ka jal sukha diya. aur tum logon ne seehon aur og nam yaradan par rahanevale aemoriyon ke donon rajaon ko satyanash kar dala haai. 
Joshua2:11 aur yah sunate hee hamara man pighal gaya, aur tumhare karan kisee ke jee men jee n raha kyonaki tumhara parameshvar yahova upar ke akash ka aur neeche kee prathvee ka parameshvar haai." 
Joshua2:12 ab maain ne jo tum par daya kee haai, isaaliye mujh se yahova kee shapath khao ki tum bhee mere pita ke gharane par daya karoge, aur isakee sachchee chinhanee mujhe do," 
Joshua2:13 ki tum mere matapita, bhaiyon aur baahinon ko, aur jo kuchh unaka haai un sabhon ko bhee jeevit rakh chhodo, aur ham sabhon ka praan marane se bachaoge." 
Joshua2:14 tab un purooshaen ne us se kaha, yaadi too hamaree yah bat kisee par pragatt n kare, to tumhare praan ke badale hamara praan jaae aur jab yahova ham ko yah desh dega, tab ham tere sath krapa aur sachchai se bartav karenge." 
Joshua2:15 tab rahab jisaka ghar shaharapanah par bana tha, aur vah vaheen rahatee thee, us ne unako khaidkee se rassee ke bal utarake nagar ke bahar kar diya." 
Joshua2:16 aur us ne un se kaha, pahad ko chale jao, aeesa n ho ki khojanevale tum ko paaen isaliye jab tak tumhare khojanevale lautt n aaen tab tak, arthata teen din vaheen chhpai rahata, usake bad apana marga lena." 
Joshua2:17 unhon ne us se kaha, jo shapath too ne ham ko khailai haai usake vishay men ham to nirdosh rahenge." 
Joshua2:18 tum, jab ham log is desh men aaenge, tab jis khaidkee se too ne ham ko utara haai us men yahee lal rang ke soot kee doree bandha dena aur apane mata pita, bhaiyo, varan apane pita ke gharane ko isee ghar men apane pas ikattha kar rakhna." 
Joshua2:19 tab jo koi tere ghar ke dar se bahar nikale, usake koon ka dosh usee ke sir padega, aur ham nirdosh ttharenge: parantu yadi tere sang ghar men rahate huae kisee par kisee ka hath pade, to usake koon ka dosh hamare sir par padega." 
Joshua2:20 fir yadi too hamaree yah bat kisee par pragatt kare, to jo shapath too ne ham ko khailai haai us se ham nirbandha ttharenge." 
Joshua2:21 us ne kaha, tumhare vachanon ke anusar ho. tab us ne unako vida kiya, aur ve chale gae aur us ne lal rang kee doree ko khaidkee men bandha diya." 
Joshua2:22 aur ve jakar pahad tak pahunche, aur vahan khojanevalon ke lauttne tak, arthata teen din tak rahe aur khojanevale unako sare marga men ddoonddhte rahe aur kaheen n paya." 
Joshua2:23 tab ve donon puroosh pahad se utare, aur par jakar noon ke putra yahoshoo ke pas pahunchakar jo kuchh un par beeta tha usaka varnn kiya." 
Joshua2:24 aur unhon ne yahoshoo se kaha, nisandeh yahova ne vah sara desh hamare hath men kar diya haai fir isake sivay usake sare nivasee hamare karan ghabara rahe haain.." 
Joshua3:1 bihan ko yahoshoo sabere utta, aur sab israaeliyon ko sath le shaitteem se kooch kar yaradan ke kinare aya aur ve par utarane se pahile vaheen ttkai gaae." 
Joshua3:2 aur teen din ke bad saradaron ne chhavanee ke beech jakar 
Joshua3:3 praja ke logon ko yah agyaa dee, ki jab tum ko apane parameshvar yahova kee vacha ka sandook aur use uttaae huae leveey yajak bhee dekh pade, tab apane sthan se kooch karake usake peechhe peechhe chalana," 
Joshua3:4 parantu usake aur tumhare beech men do hajar hath ke attkal antar rahe tum sandook ke nikatt n jana. taaki tum dekh sako, ki kis marga se tum ko chalana haai, kyonki ab tak tum is marga par hokar naheen chale." 
Joshua3:5 fir yahoshoo ne praja ke logon se kaha, tum apane ap ko paavitra karo kyonki kal ke din yahova tumhare madhy men ashcharyakarma karega." 
Joshua3:6 tab yahoshoo ne yajakon se kaha, vacha ka sandook uttakar praja ke age age chalo. tab ve vacha ka sandook uttakar age age chale." 
Joshua3:7 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, aj ke din se maain sab israaeliyon ke sammukh teree prashansa karana arambh karoonga, jis se ve jan len ki jaaise maain moosa ke sang rahata tha vaaise hee maain tere sang bhee hoon." 
Joshua3:8 aur too vacha ke sandook ke uttanevale yajakon ko yah agyaa de, ki jab tum yaradan ke jal ke kinare pahuncho, tab yaradan men khde rahana.." 
Joshua3:9 tab yahoshoo ne israaeliyon se kaha, ki pas akar apane parameshvar yahova ke vachan suno." 
Joshua3:10 aur yahoshoo kahane laga, ki is se tum jan loge ki jeevit ishvar tumhare madhy men haai, aur vah tumhare samahane se ni:sandeh kanaaniyo, hitiayo, hivvaiyo, parijjaiyo, girgaashaiyo, aemoriyo, aur yaboosiyon ko unake desh men se nikal dega." 
Joshua3:11 suno, prathvee bhr ke prabhu kee vacha ka sandook tumhare age age yaradan men jane par haai." 
Joshua3:12 isaliye ab israael ke gatraen men se barah purooshaen ko chun lo, ve aek aek gotra men se aek puroosh ho." 
Joshua3:13 aur jis samay prathvee bhr ke prabhu yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttanevale yajakon ke panv yaradan ke jal men padenge, us samay yaradan ka upar se bahata hua jal thm jaaega, aur ddher hokar tthara rahega." 
Joshua3:14 so jab praja ke logon ne apane deron se yaradan par jane ko kooch kiya, aur yajak vacha ka sandook uttaae huae praja ke age age chale," 
Joshua3:15 aur sandook ke uttanevale yaradan par pahunche, aur sandook ke uttanevale yajakon ke panv yaradan ke teer ke jal men oob gaae yaradan ka jal to kattnee ke samay ke sab din kadaron ke upar upar baha karata haai," 
Joshua3:16 tab jo jal upar kee or se baha ata tha vah bahut door, arthata adam nagar ke pas jo saratan ke nikatt haai rookakar aek ddher ho gaya, aur deevar sa utta raha, aur jo jal araba ka tal, jo khara tal bhee kahalata haai, usakee or baha jata tha, vah pooree reeati se sookh gaya aur praja ke lag yareeho ke samhane par utar gaae." 
Joshua3:17 aur yajak yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttaae huae yaradan ke beechon beech pahunchakar sthl par sthiar khde rahe, aur sab israaelee sthl hee sthl par utarate rahe, nidan us saree jati ke log yaradan par ho gaae.." 
Joshua4:1 jab us saree jati ke log yaradan ke par utar chuke, tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha," 
Joshua4:2 praja men se barah puroosha, arthatagotra peechhe aek aek puroosh ko chunakar yah agyaa de," 
Joshua4:3 ki tum yaradan ke beech me, jahan yajakon ne panv dhare the vahan se barah patthr uttakar apane sath pal le chalo, aur jahan aj kee rat padav hoga vaheen unako rakh dena." 
Joshua4:4 tab yahoshoo ne un barah purooshaen ko, jinhen us ne israaeliyon ke pratyek gotra men se chhanttkar tthara rakha tha," 
Joshua4:5 bulavakar kaha, tum apane parameshvar yahova ke sandook ke age yaradan ke beech men jakar israaeliyon ke gotraen kee ginatee ke anusar aek aek patthr uttakar apane apane kandho par rakho," 
Joshua4:6 jis se yah tum logon ke beech chinhanee tthare, aur age ko jab tumhare bette yah poochhe, ki in patthron ka kya matalab haai?" 
Joshua4:7 tab tum unhen uttr do, ki yaradan ka jal yahova kee vacha ke sandook ke samhane se do bhag ho gaya tha kyonki jab vah yaradan par a raha tha, tab yaradan ka jal do bhag ho gaya. so ve patthr israael ko sada ke liye smaran dilanevale ttharenge." 
Joshua4:8 yahoshoo kee is agyaa ken anusar israaeliyon ne kiya, jaaisa yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha tha vaaisa hee unhon ne israaeliyon ne kiya, jaaisa yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha tha vaaisa hee unhon ne israaelee gotraen kee ginatee ke anusar barah patthr yaradan ke beech men se utta liae aur unako apane sath le jakar padav men rakh diya." 
Joshua4:9 aur yaradan ke beech jahan yajak vacha ke sandook ko uttaae huae apane panv dhare the vahan yahoshoo ne barah patthr khde karaae ve aj tak vaheen paae jate haain. 
Joshua4:10 aur yajak sandook uttaae huae us samay tak yaradan ke beech khde rahe jab tak ve sab baten pooree n ho chukee, jinhen yahova ne yahoshoo ko logon se kahane kee agyaa dee thee. tab sab log faurtee se par utar gaae" 
Joshua4:11 aur jab sab log par utar chuke, tab yajak aur yahova ka sandook bhee unake dekhte par huae." 
Joshua4:12 aur roobenee, gadee, aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke log moosa ke kahane ke anusar israaeliyon ke age panati bandho huae par gaae" 
Joshua4:13 arthata koi chalees hajar puroosh yuddh ke hathaiyar bandho huae sangraam karane ke liye yahova ke samhane par utarakar yareeho ke pas ke araba men pahunche. 
Joshua4:14 us din yahova ne sab israealiyonke samhane yahoshoo kee mahima baddhai aur jaaise ve moosa ka bhy manate the vaaise hee yahoshoo ka bhee bhy usake jeevan bhr manate rahe.. 
Joshua4:15 aur yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha," 
Joshua4:16 ki sakshaee ka sandook uttanevale yajakon ko agyaa de ki yaradan men se nikal aaen. 
Joshua4:17 to yahoshoo ne yajakon ko agyaa dee, ki yaradan men se nikal ao." 
Joshua4:18 aur jyon hee yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttanevale yajak yaradan ke beech men se nikal aa, aur unake panv sthl par pade, tyon hee yaradan ka jal apane sthan par aya, aur paahile kee nain kadaro ke upar fir bahane laga." 
Joshua4:19 paahile maahine ke dasaven din ko praja ke logon ne yaradan men se nikalakar yareeho ke poorvee sivane par gilagal men apane dere dale. 
Joshua4:20 aur jo barah patthr yaradan men se nikale gaae the, unako yahoshoo ne gilagal men khde kiae." 
Joshua4:21 tab us ne israaeliyon se kaha, age ko jab tumhare ladkebale apane apane pita se yah poochhe, ki in patthron ka kya matalab haai?" 
Joshua4:22 tab tum yah kahakar unako batana, ki israaelee yaradan ke par sthl hee sthl chale aae the." 
Joshua4:23 kyonaki jaaise tumhare parameshvar yahova ne lal samudra ko hamare par ho jane tak hamare samhane se hattakar sukha rakha tha, vaaise hee us ne yaradan ka bhee jal tumhare par ho jane tak tumhare samhane se hattakar sukha rakha" 
Joshua4:24 isaliye ki prathvee ke sab deshaen ke log jan len ki yahova ka hath balavant haai aur tum sarvada apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy manate raho.. 
Joshua5:1 jab yaradan ke paachchhim kee or rahanevale aemoriyon ke sab rajaon ne, aur samudra ke pas rahanevale kananiyon ke sab rajaon ne yah suna, ki yahova ne israaeliyon ke par hone tak unake samhane se yaradan ka jal hattakar sukha rakha haai, tab israaeliyon ke dr ke mare unaka man ghabara gaya, aur unake jee men jee n raha.." 
Joshua5:2 us samay yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, chakamak kee chhuariyan banavakar doosaree bar israeliyon ka khtana kara den." 
Joshua5:3 tab yahoshoo ne chakamak kee chhuariyan banavakar khlaadiyan nam tteele par israaeliyon ka khtana karaya. 
Joshua5:4 aur yahoshoo ne jo khtana karaya, isaka karan yah haai, ki jitane yuddh ke yogy puroosh misr se nikale the ve sab misr se nikalane par jangal ke marga men mar gaae the." 
Joshua5:5 jo puroosh misr se nikale the un sab ka to khtana ho chuka tha, parantu jitane unake misr se nikalane par jangal ke marga men utpann huae un men se kisee ka khtana n hua tha." 
Joshua5:6 kyonaki israaelee to chalees varsha tak jangal men firate rahe, jab tak us saree jati ke log, arthata jitane yuddh ke yogy log misr se nikale the ve nash n ho gaa, kyonaki unhon ne yahova kee n manee thee so yahova ne shapath khakar un se kaha tha, ki jo desh maain ne tumhare poorvajon se shapath khakar tumhen dene ko kaha tha, aur us men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai, vah desh maain tum ko naheen dikhane ka." 
Joshua5:7 to un logon ke putra jin ko yahova ne unake sthan par utpann kiya tha, unaka khtana yahoshoo se karaya, kyonaki marga men unake khtana n hone ke karan ve khtanaraahit the." 
Joshua5:8 aur jab us saree jati ke logon ka khtana ho chuka, tab ve change ho jane tak apane apane sthan par chhavanee men rahe." 
Joshua5:9 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, tumharee namadharai jo misriyon men hui haai use maain ne aj door kee haai. is karan us sthan ka nam aj ke din tak gilagal pada haai.." 
Joshua5:10 so israaelee gilagal men dere dale huae rahe, aur unhon ne yareeho ke pas ke araba men poornmasee kee sandhya ke samay fasah mana." 
Joshua5:11 aur fasah ke doosare din ve us desh kee upaj men se akhmeeree rottee aur usee din se bhuna hua dana bhee khane lage. 
Joshua5:12 aur jis din ve us desh kee upaj men se khane lage, usee din bihan ko manna band ho gaya aur israaeliyon ko age fir kabhee manna n mila, parantu us varsha unhon ne kanan desh kee upaj men se khai.." 
Joshua5:13 jab yahoshoo yareeho ke pas tha tab us ne apanee ankhen uttai, aur kya dekha, ki hath men nangee talavar liye huae aek puroosh samhane khda haai aur yahoshoo ne usake pas jakar poochha, kya too hamaree or ka haai, va hamare baairiyon kee or ka?" 
Joshua5:14 us ne uttr diya, ki naheen maain yahova kee sena ka pradhaan hokar abhee aya hoon. tab yahoshoo ne prathvee par munh ke bal girakar dandvata kiya, aur us se kaha, apane das ke liye mere prabhu kee kya agyaa haai?" 
Joshua5:15 yahova kee sena ke pradhaan ne yahoshoo se kaha, apanee jootee panv se utar dal, kyonki jis sthan par too khda haai vah paavitra haai. tab yahoshoo ne vaaisa hee kiya.." 
Joshua6:1 aur yareeho ke sab faattk israaeliyon ke dr ke mare lagatar band rahe, aur koi bahar bheetar ane jane naheen pata tha." 
Joshua6:2 fir yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, sun, maain yareeho ko usake raja aur shooraveeron samet tere vash men kar deta hoon." 
Joshua6:3 so tum men jitane yoddha haain nagar ko ghor le, aur us nagar ke charon or aek bar ghoom aaen." 
Joshua6:4 aur chh: din tak aeesa hee kiya karana. 
Joshua6:5 aur jab ve jubalee ke narasinge der tak foonkate rahe, tab sab log naraasinge ka shabd sunate hee badee dhvani se jayajayakar karen tab nagar kee shaharapanah nev se gir jaaegee, aur sab log apane apane samhane chaddh jaaen." 
Joshua6:6 so noon ke putra yahoshoo ne yajakon ko bulavakar kaha, vacha ke sandook ko utta lo, aur sat yajak yahova ke sandook ke age age jubalee ke sat naraasinge liae chalen." 
Joshua6:7 fir us ne logon se kaha, age baddhkar nagar ke charon aur ghoom ao aur hathaiyaraband puroosh yahova ke sandook ke age age chalen." 
Joshua6:8 aur jab yahoshoo ye baten logon se kah chuka, to ve sat yajak jo yahova ke samhane sat naraasinge liye huae the naraasinge foonkate huae chale, aur yahova kee vacha ka sandook unake peechhe peechhe chala." 
Joshua6:9 aur haathaiyaraband puroosh naraasinge foonkanevale yajakon ke age age chale, aur peechhe vale sandook ke peechhe peechhe chale, aur yajak naraasinge foonkate huae chale." 
Joshua6:10 aur yahoshoo ne logon ko agyaa dee, ki jab tak maain tumhen jayajayakar karane kee agyaa n doo, tab tak jayajayakar n karo, aur n tumhara koi shabd sunane men aa, n koi bat tumhare munh se nikalane paae agyaa pate hee jayajayakar karana." 
Joshua6:11 us ne yahova ke sandook ko ek bar nagar ke charon or ghaumavaya tab ve chhavanee men aa, aur rat vaheen kattee.." 
Joshua6:12 bihan ko yahoshoo sabere utta, aur yajakon ne yahova ka sandook utta liya." 
Joshua6:13 aur un sat yajakon ne jubalee ke sat narasinge liae aur yahova ke sandook ke age age foonkate huae chale aur unake age hathaiyaraband puroosh chale, aur peechhevale yahova ke sandook ke peechhe peechhe chale, aur yajak narasinge foonkate chale gaae." 
Joshua6:14 is prakar ve doosare din bhee aek bar nagar ke charon or ghoomakar chhavanee men lautt aae. aur isee prakar unhon ne chh: din tak kiya. 
Joshua6:15 fir sataven din ve bhor ko bade tadke uttkar usee reeti se nagar ke charon or sat bar ghoom aae keval usee din ve sat bar ghoome. 
Joshua6:16 tab sataveen bar jab yajak naraasinge foonkate the, tab yahoshoo ne logon se kaha, jayajayakar karo kyonaki yahova ne yah nagar tumhen de diya haai." 
Joshua6:17 aur nagar aur jo kuchh us men haai yahova ke liye arpan kee vastu ttharegee keval rahab veshya aur jitane usake ghar men hon ve jeevit chhode jaaenge, kyonki us ne hamare bheje huae dooton ko chhpai rakha tha." 
Joshua6:18 aur tum arpan kee hui vastuon se savadhaanee se apane ap ko alag rakho, aeesa n ho ki arpan kee vastu ttharakar peechhe usee arpan kee vastu men se kuchh le lo, aur is prakar israaelee chhavanee ko bhrashtt karake use kashtt men dal do." 
Joshua6:19 sab chandee, sona, aur jo patra peetal aur lohe ke haai, ve yahova ke liye paavitra haai, aur usee ke bhndar men rakhe jaaen." 
Joshua6:20 tab logon ne jayajayakar kiya, aur yajak naraasinge foonkate rahe. aur jab logon ne naraasinge ka shabd suna to fir badee hee dhvaani se unhon ne jayajayakar kiya, tab shaharapanah nave se gir padee, aur log apane apane samhane se us nagar men chaddh gaa, aur nagar ko le liya." 
Joshua6:21 aur kya puroosha, kya sre, kya javan, kya booddhe, varan baail, bhed-bakaree, gadahe, aur jitane nagar men the, un sabhon ko unhon ne arpan kee vastu janakar talavar se mar dala." 
Joshua6:22 tab yahoshoo ne un donon purooshaen se jo us desh ka bhed lene gaae the kaha, apanee shapath ke anusar us veshya ke ghar men jakar usako aur jo usake pas hon unhen bhee nikal le ao." 
Joshua6:23 tab ve donon javan bheadiae bheetar jakar rahab ko, aur usake mata-apita, bhaiyo, aur sab ko jo usake yahan rahate the, varan usake sab kuttuambaiyon ko nikal laa, aur israael kee chhavanee se bahar baaitta diya." 
Joshua6:24 tab unhon ne nagar ko, aur jo kuchh us men tha, sab ko ag lagakar foonk diya keval chandee, sona, aur jo patra peetal aur lohe ke the, unako unhon ne yahova ke bhvan ke bhndar men rakh diya." 
Joshua6:25 aur yahoshoo ne rahab veshya aur usake pita ke gharane ko, varan usake sab logon ko jeeavit chhod diya aur aj tak usaka vansh israaeliyon ke beech men rahata haai, kyonki jo doot yahoshoo ne yareeho ke bhed lene ko bheje the unako us ne chhpai rakha tha." 
Joshua6:26 fir usee samay yahoshoo ne israaeliyon ke sammukh shapath rakhee, aur kaha, ki jo manushy uttkar is nagar yareeho ko fir se banaae vah yahova kee or se shaaapit ho. jab vah usakee nev dalega tab to usaka jetta putra marega, aur jab vah usake faattk lagavaaega tab usaka chhotta putra mar jaaega." 
Joshua6:27 aur yahova yahoshoo ke sang raha aur yahoshoo kee keearti us sare desh men faail gai.. 
Joshua7:1 parantu israaeliyon ne arpan kee vastu ke vishay men vishvasaghaat kiya arthata yahooda ke gotra ka akan, jo jerahavanshaee jabdee ka pota aur kamrmee ka putra tha, us ne arpan kee vastuon men se kuchh le liya is karan yahova ka kop israaeliyon par bhdk utta.." 
Joshua7:2 aur yahoshoo ne yareeho se aee nam nagar ke pas, jo betaven se laga hua betel kee poorva kee or haai, kitane purooshaen ko yah kahakar bheja, ki jakar desh ka bhed le ao. aur un purooshaen ne jakar aee ka bhed liya." 
Joshua7:3 aur unhon ne yahoshoo ke pas lauttkar kaha, sab log vahan n jaae, koi do va teen hajar puroosh jakar aee ko jeet sakate haain sab logon ko vahan jane ka kashtt n de, kyonki ve log thode hee haain." 
Joshua7:4 isaliye koi teen hajar puroosh vahan gaae parantu aee ke rahanevalon ke samhane se bhag aa," 
Joshua7:5 tab aee ke rahanevalon ne un men se koi chhttees puroosh mar dale, aur apane faattk se shabareem tak unaka peechha karake utarai men unako marate gaae. tab logon ka man pighalakar jal sa ban gaya." 
Joshua7:6 tab yahoshoo ne apane vasr faade, aur vah aur israaelee vraddh log yahova ke sandook ke samhane munh ke bal girakar prathvee par sanjh tak pade rahe aur unhon ne apane apane sir par dhool dalee." 
Joshua7:7 aur yahoshoo ne kaha, hay, prabhu yahova, too apanee is praja ko yaradan par kyon le aya? kya hamen aemoriyon ke vash men karake nashtt karane ke liye le aya haai? bhla hota ki ham santosh karake yaradan ke us par rah jate." 
Joshua7:8 hay, prabhu maain kya kahoo, jab israaeliyon ne apane shatrauon ko peett dikhai haai!" 
Joshua7:9 kyonaki kananee varan is desh ke sab nivasee yah sunakar ham ko ghor lenge, aur hamara nam prathvee par se mitta dalenge fir too apane bade nam ke liye kya karega?" 
Joshua7:10 yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, ut, khda ho ja, too kyon is bhanati munh ke bal prathvee par pada haai?" 
Joshua7:11 israaeliyon ne pap kiya haai aur jo vacha maain ne un se apane sath bandhaai thee usako unhon ne tod diya haai, unhon ne arpan kee vastuon men se le liya, varan choree bhee kee, aur chhl karake usako apane saman men rakh liya haai." 
Joshua7:12 is karan israaelee apane shatrauon ke samhane khde naheen rah sakate ve apane shatrauon ko peett dikhate haai, isaaliye ki ve ap arpan kee vastu ban gaae haain. aur yaadi tum apane madhy men se arpan kee vastu ko satyanash n kar daloge, to maain age ko tumhare sang naheen rahoonga." 
Joshua7:13 ut, praja ke logon ko pavitra kar, un se kaha ki bihan tak apane apane ko paavitra kar rakho kyonki israel ka parameshvar yahova yah kahata haai, ki he israel, tere madhy men arpan kee vastu haai isaaliye jab tak too arpan kee vastu ko apane madhy men se door n kare tab tak too apane shatrauon ke samhane khda n rah sakega." 
Joshua7:14 isaliye bihan ko tum gotra gotra ke anusar sameep khde kiae jaoge aur jis gotra ko yahova pakade vah aek aek kul karake pas aae aur jis kul ko yahova pakade so gharana gharana karake pas aae fir jis gharane ko yahova pakade vah aek aek puroosh karake pas aae. 
Joshua7:15 tab jo puroosh arpan kee vastu rakhe huae pakada jaaega, vah aur jo kuchh usaka ho sab ag men dalakar jala diya jaae kyonaki us ne yahova kee vacha ko toda haai, aur israael men anuchit karma kiya haai.." 
Joshua7:16 bihan ko yahoshoo savere uttkar israaeliyon ko gotra gotra karake sameep liva le gaya, aur yahooda ka gotra pakada gaya" 
Joshua7:17 tab us ne yahooda ke parivar ko sameep kiya, aur jerahavanashaiyon ka kul pakada gaya fir jerahavanshaiyon ke gharane ke aek aek puroosh ko sameep laya, aur jabdee pakada gaya" 
Joshua7:18 tab us ne usake gharane ke aek aek puroosh ko sameep khda kiya, aur yahooda gotra ka akan, jo jerahavanshaee jabdee ka pota aur kamrmee ka putra tha, pakada gaya." 
Joshua7:19 tab yahoshoo akan se kahane laga, he mere bette, israael ke parameshvar yahova ka adar kar, aur usake age angeekar kara aur jo kuchh too ne kiya haai vah mujh ko bata de, aur mujh se kuchh mat chhpaia." 
Joshua7:20 aur akan ne yahoshoo ko uttr diya, ki sachamuch maain ne israael ke parameshvar yahova ke virooddh pap kiya haai, aur is prakar maain ne kiya haai," 
Joshua7:21 ki jab mujhe loott men shainar desh ka aek sundar oddhna, aur do sau shokel chandee, aur pachas shokel sone kee aek itt dekh padee, tab maain ne unaka lalach karake unhen rakh liya ve mere dere ke bheetar boomi men gade haai, aur sab ke neeche chandee haai." 
Joshua7:22 tab yahoshoo ne doot bheje, aur ve us dere men daude gaae aur kya dekha, ki ve vastuen usake dere men gadee haai, aur sab ke neeche chandee haai." 
Joshua7:23 unako unhon ne dere men se nikalakar yahoshoo aur sab israeliyon ke pas lakar yahova ke samhane rakh diya. 
Joshua7:24 tab sab israaeliyon samet yahoshoo jerahavanshaee akan ko, aur us chandee aur oddhne aur sone kee intt ko, aur usake bette-bettyaien ko, aur usake baailo, gadahon aur bhed-bakaariyon ko, aur usake dere ko, nidan jo kuchh usaka tha un sab ko akor nam tarai men le gaya." 
Joshua7:25 tab yahoshoo ne us se kaha, too ne hamen kyon kashtt diya haai? aj ke din yahova tujhee ko kashtt dega. tab sab israaeliyon ne usako patthravah kiya aur unako ag men dalakar jalaya, aur unake upar patthr dal diae." 
Joshua7:26 aur unhon ne usake upar patthron ka bada ddher laga diya jo aj tak bana haai tab yahova ka bhdka hua kop shaant ho gaya. is karan us sthan ka nam aj tak akor tarai pada haai.. 
Joshua8:1 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, mat dr, aur tera man kachcha n ho kamar bandhakar sab yoddhaon ko sath le, aur aee par chaddhai kara sun, maain ne aee ke raja ko usakee praja aur usake nagar aur desh samet tere vash men kiya haai." 
Joshua8:2 aur jaaisa too ne yareeho aur usake raja se kiya vaaisa hee aee aur usake raja ke sath bhee karana keval tum pashuuon samet usakee loott to apane liye le sakoge isaliye us nagar ke peechhe kee or apane puroosh ghaat men laga do. 
Joshua8:3 so yahoshoo ne sab yoddhaon samet aee par chaddhai karane kee taaiyaree kee aur yahoshoo ne tees hajar purooshaen ko jo shooraveer the chunakar rat hee ko agyaa dekar bheja. 
Joshua8:4 aur unako yah agyaa dee, ki suno, tum us nagar ke peechhe kee or ghaat lagaae baaitte rahana nagar se bahut door n jana, aur sab ke sab taaiyar rahana" 
Joshua8:5 aur maain apane sab sathaiyon samet us nagar ke nikatt jaunga. aur jab ve pahile kee nain hamara samhana karane ko nikale, tab ham unake age se bhagenge" 
Joshua8:6 tab ve yah sochakar, ki ve pahile kee bhanti hamare samhane se bhage jate haai, hamara peechha karenge is prakar ham unake samhane se bhagakar unhen nagar se door nikal le jaaenge" 
Joshua8:7 tab tum ghaat men se uttkar nagar ko apana kar lena kyonki tumhara parameshvar yahova usako tumhare hath men kar dega. 
Joshua8:8 aur jab nagar ko le lo, tab us men ag lagakar foonk dena, yahova kee agyaa ke anusar hee kam karana suno, maain ne tumhen agyaa dee haai." 
Joshua8:9 tab yahoshoo ne unako bhej diya aur ve ghaat men baaittne ko chale gaa, aur betel aur aee ke madhy men aur aee kee paashchaim kee or baaitte rahe parantu yahoshoo us rat ko logon ke beech ttkai raha.." 
Joshua8:10 bihan ko yahoshoo savere utta, or logon kee ginatee lekar israaelee vraddh logon samet logon ke age age aee kee or chala." 
Joshua8:11 aur usake sang ke sab yoddha chaddh gaa, aur aee nagar ke nikatt pahunchakar usake samhane uttr kee or dere dal dia, aur unake aur aee ke beech aek tarai thee." 
Joshua8:12 tab us ne koi panch hajar puroosh chunakar betel aur aee ke madhyast nagar kee paashchaim kee or unako ghaat men baaitta diya. 
Joshua8:13 aur jab logon ne nagar kee uttr or kee saree sena ko aur usakee pashchaim or ghaat men baaitte huon ko bhee ttkaiane par kar diya, tab yahoshoo usee rat tarai ke beech gaya." 
Joshua8:14 jab aee ke raja ne yah dekha, tab ve faurtee karake savere utte, aur raja apanee saree praja ko lekar israaeliyon ke samhane un se ladne ko nikalakar ttharaae huae sthan par jo araba ke samhane haai pahuncha aur vah naheen janata tha ki nagar kee pichhlee aur log ghaat lagaae baaitte haain." 
Joshua8:15 tab yahoshoo aur sab israaelee un se mano har manakar jangal ka marga lekar bhag nikale. 
Joshua8:16 tab nagar ke sab log israaeliyon ka peechha karane ko pukar pukar ke bulaae gaae aur ve yahoshoo ka peechha karate huae nagar se door nikal gaae. 
Joshua8:17 aur n aee men aur ne betel men koi puroosh rah gaya, jo israaeliyon ka peechha karane ko n gaya ho aur unhon ne nagar ko khula hua chhodkar israaeliyon ka peechha kiya." 
Joshua8:18 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, apane hath ka barchha aee kee or baddha kyonaki maain use tere hath men de doonga. aur yahoshoo ne apane hath ke barchhe ko nagar kee or baddhaya." 
Joshua8:19 usake hath baddhate hee jo log ghaat men baaitte the ve jhttpatt apane sthan se utte, aur daudkar nagar men pravesh kiya aur usako le liya aur jhttpatt us men ag laga dee." 
Joshua8:20 jab aee ke purooshaen ne peechhe kee or firakar drashtti kee, to kya dekha, ki nagar ka dhooan akash kee or utt raha haai aur un men n to idhar bhagane kee shaktai rahee, aur n udhar, aur jo log jangal kee or bhage jate the ve firakar apane khdednevalon par toott pade." 
Joshua8:21 jab yahoshoo aur sab israaeliyon ne dekha ki ghaaatiyon ne nagar ko le liya, aur usaka dhoona utt raha haai, tab ghoomakar aee ke purooshaen ko marane lage." 
Joshua8:22 aur unaka samhana karane ko doosare bhee nagar se nikal aae so ve israaeliyon ke beech men pad gaa, kuchh israaelee to unake age, aur kuchh unake peechhe the so unhon ne unako yahan tak mar dala ki un men se n to koi bachane aur n bhagane paya." 
Joshua8:23 aur aee ke raja ko ve jeevit pakadkar yahoshoo ke pas le aae. 
Joshua8:24 aur jab israaelee aee ke sab nivaasiyon ko maaidan me, arthata us jangal men jahan unhon ne unaka peechha kiya tha ghaat kar chuke, aur ve sab ke sab talavar se mare gaae yahan tak ki unaka ant hee ho gaya, tab sab israaeliyon ne aee ko lauttkar use bhee talavar se mara." 
Joshua8:25 aur sree puroosha, sab milakar jo us din mare gaae ve barah hajar the, aur aee ke sab puroosh itane hee the." 
Joshua8:26 kyonaki jab tak yahoshoo ne aee ke sab nivaasiyon ko satyanash n kar dala tab tab us ne apana hat, jis se barchha baddhaya tha, fir n kheencha." 
Joshua8:27 yahova kee us agyaa ke anusar jo us ne yahoshoo ko dee thee israaeliyon ne pashu adi nagar kee loott apanee kar lee. 
Joshua8:28 tab yahoshoo ne aee ko foonkava diya, aur use sada ke liye khndhar kar diya: vah aj tak ujad pada haai." 
Joshua8:29 aur aee ke raja ko us ne sanjh tak vraksha par lattka rakha aur soorya oobate oobate yahoshoo kee agyaa se usakee loth vrash par se utarakar nagar ke faattk ke samhane dal dee gai, aur us par patthron ka baddha ddher laga diya, jo aj tak bana haai.." 
Joshua8:30 tab yahoshoo ne israael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye aebal parvat par aek vedee banavai," 
Joshua8:31 jaaisa yahova ke das moosa ne israaeliyon ko agyaa dee thee, aur jaaisa moosa kee vyavastha kee pustak men likha haai, us ne samooche patthron kee aek vedee banavai jis par aujar naheen chalaya gaya tha. aur us par unhon ne yahova ke liye homa-bali chaddhaa, aur melabaali kiae." 
Joshua8:32 usee sthan par yahoshoo ne israeliyon ke samhane un patthron ke upar moosa kee vyavastha, jo us ne likhee thee, usakee nakal karai." 
Joshua8:33 aur ve, kya deshaee kya paradeshae, sare israaelee apane vraddh logo, saradaro, aur nyaayiyon samet yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttanevale leveey yajakon ke samhane us sandook ke idhar udhar khde hua, arthata adho log to girijjeem parvat ke, aur adho aebal parvat ke samhane khde hua, jaaisa ki yahova ke das moosa ne pahile agyaa dee thee, ki israaelee praja ko ashareevad diae jaaen." 
Joshua8:34 usake bad us ne ashaeesh aur shaap kee vyavastha ke sare vachan, jaaise jaaise vyavastha kee pustak men likhe huae haai, vaaise vaaise paddh paddhkar suna die." 
Joshua8:35 jitanee baton kee moosa ne agyaa dee thee, un men se koi aeesee bat naheen rah gai jo yahoshoo ne israaelee kee saree sabha, aur striayo, aur bala-bachcho, aur unake sath rahanevale paradeshaee logon ke samhane bhee paddhkar n sunai.." 
Joshua9:1 yah sunakar hittee, aemoree, kananee, paarijjee, hivvee, aur yaboosee, jitane raja yaradan ke is par pahadee desh men aur neeche ke desh me, aur labanon ke samhane ke mahanagar ke tatt par rahate the," 
Joshua9:2 ve aek man hokar yahoshoo aur israaeliyon se ladne ko ikatthe huae.. 
Joshua9:3 jab gibon ke nivaasiyon ne suna ki yahoshoo ne yareeho aur aee se kya kya kiya haai," 
Joshua9:4 tab unhon ne chhl kiya, aur rajadooton ka bhesh banakar apane gadahon par purane bore, aur purane fatte, aur jode huae maadira ke kuppe ladakar" 
Joshua9:5 apane panvon men puranee ganttee hui jootiya, aur tan par purane vasr paahine, aur apane bhojan ke liye sookhee aur fafoondee lagee hui rottee le lee." 
Joshua9:6 tab ve gilagal kee chhavanee men yahoshoo ke pas jakar us se aur israaelee purooshaen se kahane lage, ham door desh sen aae haain isaliye ab tum ham se vacha bandhae." 
Joshua9:7 israaelee purooshaen ne un hivvaiyon se kaha, kya jane tum hamare madhy men hee rahate ho fir ham tum se vacha kaaise bandho?" 
Joshua9:8 unhon ne yahoshoo se kaha, ham tere das haain. tab yahoshoo ne un se kaha, tum kaun ho? aur kahan se aae ho?" 
Joshua9:9 unhon ne us se kaha, tere das bahut door ke desh se tere parameshvar yahova ka nam sunakar aae haain kyonaki ham ne yah sab suna haai, arthata usakee keerti aur jo kuchh us ne misr men kiya," 
Joshua9:10 aur jo kuchh us ne aemoriyon ke donon rajaon se kiya jo yaradan ke us par rahate the, arthata heshbon ke raja seehon se, aur bashaan ke raja og se jo ashtarot men tha." 
Joshua9:11 isaliye hamare yahan ke vraddhlogon ne aur hamare desh ke sab nivaasiyon ne ham se kaha, ki marga ke liye apane sath bhojanavastu lekar un se milane ko jao, aur un se kahana, ki ham tumhare das haain isaliye ab tum ham se vacha bandhae." 
Joshua9:12 jis din ham tumhare pas chalane ko nikale us din to ham ne apane apane ghar se yah rottee garam aur tajee lee thee parantu ab dekho, yah sookh gai haai aur is men fafoondee lag gai haai." 
Joshua9:13 fir ye jo madira ke kuppe ham ne bhr liye the, tab to naye the, parantu dekho ab ye fatt gaae haain aur hamare ye vasr aur jootiyan badee lambee yatra ke karan puranee ho gai haain." 
Joshua9:14 tab un purooshaen ne yahova se bina salah liye unake bhojan men se kuchh grahan kiya. 
Joshua9:15 tab yahoshoo ne un se mel karake un se yah vacha bandhae, ki tum ko jeevit chhodenge aur mandlee ke pradhaanon ne un se shapath khai." 
Joshua9:16 aur unake sath vacha bandhane ke teen din ke bad unako yah samachar mila ki ve hamare pados ke rahanevale log haai, aur hamare hee madhy men base haain." 
Joshua9:17 tab israaelee kooch karake teesare din unake nagaron ko jinake nam gibon, kapeera, berot, aur kiryatyareem haai pahunch gaa," 
Joshua9:18 aur israaeliyon ne unako n mara, kyonaki mandlee ke pradhaanon ne unake sang israael ke parameshvar yahova kee shapath khai thee. tab saree mandlee ke log pradhaanon ke virooddh kudkudane lage." 
Joshua9:19 tab sab pradhaanon ne saree mandlee se kaha, ham ne un se israael ke parameshvar yahova kee shapath khai haai, isaliye ab unako choo naheen sakate." 
Joshua9:20 ham un se yahee karenge, ki us shapath ke anusar ham unako jeeavit chhod denge, naheen to hamaree khai hui shapath ke karan ham par krodha padegan" 
Joshua9:21 fir pradhaanon ne un se kaha, ve jeevit chhode jaaen. so pradhaanon ke is vachan ke anusar ve saree mandlee ke liye lakadhare aur panee bhranevale bane." 
Joshua9:22 fir yahoshoo ne unako bulavakar kaha, tum to hamare hee beech men rahate ho, fir tum ne ham se yah kahakar kyon chhl kiya haai, ki ham tum se bahut door rahate haain?" 
Joshua9:23 isaliye ab tum shaapit ho, aur tum men se aeesa koi n rahega jo das, arthata mere parameshvar ke bhvan ke liye lakadhara aur panee bhranevala n ho." 
Joshua9:24 unhon ne yahoshoo ko uttr diya, tere dason ko yah nishchay batalaya gaya tha, ki tere parameshvar yahova ne apane das moosa ko agyaa dee thee ki tum ko vah sara desh de, aur usake sare nivaasiyon ko tumhare samhane se sarvanash kare isaliye ham logon ko tumhare karan se apane praanon ke lale pad gaa, isaliye ham ne aeesa kam kiya." 
Joshua9:25 aur ab ham tere vash men haai, jaaisa bartav tujhe bhla lage aur tteek jan pade, vaaisa hee vyavahar hamare sath kara." 
Joshua9:26 tab us ne un se vaaisa hee kiya, aur unhen israaeliyon ke hath se aeesa bachaya, ki ve unhen ghaat karane n paae." 
Joshua9:27 parantu yahoshoo ne usee din unako mandlee ke liye, aur jo sthan yahova chun le usamen usakee vedee ke liye, lakadhare aur panee bhranevale niyukt kar diya, jaaisa aj tak haai.." 
Joshua10:1 jab yarooshalem ke raja adoneesedek ne suna ki yahoshoo ne aee ko le liya, aur usako satyanash kar dala haai, aur jaaisa us ne yareeho aur usake raja se kiya haai, aur yah bhee suna ki gibon ke nivaasiyon ne israaeliyon se mel kiya, aur unake beech rahane lage haai," 
Joshua10:2 tab ve nipatt dr gaa, kyonki gibon bada nagar varan rajanagar ke tuly aur aee se bada tha, aur usake sab nivasee shooraveer the." 
Joshua10:3 isaliye yarooshalem ke raja adoneesedek ne hebraen ke raja hoham, yamroot ke raja piram, lakeesh ke raja yapee, aur aeglon ke raja dabeer ke pas yah kahala bheja," 
Joshua10:4 ki mere pas akar meree sahayata karo, aur chalo ham gibon ko maren kyonaki us ne yahoshoo aur israaeliyon se mel kar liya haai." 
Joshua10:5 isaliye yarooshalem, hebraen, yamroot, lakeesha, aur aeglon ke panchon aemoree rajaon ne apanee apanee saree sena ikatthee karake chaddhai kar dee, aur gibon ke samhane dere dalakar us se yuddh chhed diya." 
Joshua10:6 tak gibon ke nivaasiyon ne gilagal kee chhavanee men yahoshoo ke pas yon kahala bheja, ki apane dason kee or se too apana hath n hattana shaeegha hamare pas akar hamen bacha le, aur hamaree sahayata kara kyonaki pahad par rahanevale aemoriyon ke sab raja hamare virooddh ikatthe haae haain." 
Joshua10:7 tab yahoshoo sare yoddhaon aur sab shooraveeron ko sang lekar gilagal se chal pada. 
Joshua10:8 aur yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, un se mat dr, kyonaki maain ne unako tere hath men kar diya haai un men se aek puroosh bhee tere samhane ttkai n sakega." 
Joshua10:9 tab yahoshoo ratorat gilagal se jakar aekaaek un par toott pada. 
Joshua10:10 tab yahova ne aeesa kiya ki ve israaeliyon se ghabara gaa, aur israaeliyon ne gibon ke pas unaka bada sanhar kiya, aur bethoran ke chaddhav par unaka peechha karake ajeka aur makkeda tak unako marate gaae." 
Joshua10:11 fir jab ve israaeliyon ke samhane se bhagakar bethoron kee utarai par aa, tab ajeka pahunchane tak yahova ne akash se bade bade patthr un par barasaa, aur ve mar gaae jo olon se mare gaae unakee ginatee israaeliyon kee talavar se mare huon se aadhaik thee.." 
Joshua10:12 aur us samay, arthata jis din yahova ne aemoriyon ko israaeliyon ke vash men kar diya, us din yahoshoo ne yahova se israaeliyon ke dekhte is prakar kaha, he soorya, too gibon par, aur he chandrama, too ayyalon kee tarai ke upar thma raha.." 
Joshua10:13 aur soorya us samay tak thma raha aur chandrama us samay tak tthara raha, jab tak us jaati ke logon ne apane shatrauon se palatta n liya.. kya yah bat yashaar nam pustak men naheen likhee haai ki soorya akashamandl ke beechobeech tthara raha, aur lagabhg char pahar tak n ooba?" 
Joshua10:14 n to us se pahile koi aeesa din hua aur n usake bad, jis men yahova ne kisee puroosh kee sunee ho kyonki yahova to israael kee or se ladta tha.." 
Joshua10:15 tab yahoshoo sare israaeliyon samet gilagal kee chhavanee ko lautt gaya.. 
Joshua10:16 aur ve panchon raja bhagakar makkeda ke pas kee gufaa men ja chhpaie. 
Joshua10:17 tab yahoshoo ko yah samachar mila, ki panchon raja makkeda ke pas kee gufaa men chhpai huae hamen mile haain." 
Joshua10:18 yahoshoo ne kaha, gufaa ke munh par bade bade patthr luddhkakar unakee dekh bhal ke liye manushyon ko usake pas baaitta do" 
Joshua10:19 parantu tum mat ttharo, apane shatrauon ka peechha karake un men se jo jo pichhd gaae haain unako mar dalo, unhen apane apane nagar men pravesh karane ka avasar n do kyoki tumhare parameshvar yahova ne unako tumhare hath men kar diya haai." 
Joshua10:20 jab yahoshoo aur israaelee unaka sanhar karake nash kar chuke, aur un men se jo bach gaae ve apane apane gaddhvale nagar men ghaus gaa," 
Joshua10:21 tab sab log makkeda kee chhavanee ko yahoshoo ke pas kushala-kshom se lautt aae aur israaeliyon ke virooddh kisee ne jeebh tak n hilai. 
Joshua10:22 tab yahoshoo ne agyaa dee, ki gufaa ka munh kholakar un panchon rajaon ko mere pas nikal le ao." 
Joshua10:23 unhon ne aeesa hee kiya, aur yarooshalem, hebraen, yamroot, lakeesha, aur eglon ke un panchon rajaon ko gufaa men se usake pas nikal le ae." 
Joshua10:24 jab ve un rajaon ko yahoshoo ke pas nikal le aa, tab yahoshoo ne israael ke sab purooshaen ko bulakar apane sath chalanevale yoddhaon ke pradhaanon se kaha, nikatt akar apane apane panv in rajaon kee gardanon par rakho. aur unhon ne nikatt jakar apane apane panv unakee gardanon par rakhe." 
Joshua10:25 tab yahoshoo ne un se kaha, dro mat, aur n tumhara man kachcha ho hiyav bandhakar draddh ho kyonaki yahova tumhare sab shatrauon se jin se tum ladnevale ho aeesa hee karega." 
Joshua10:26 is ke bad yahoshoo ne unako marava dala, aur panch vrakshaen par lattka diya. aur ve sanjh tak un vrakshaen par lattke rahe." 
Joshua10:27 soorya oobate oobate yahoshoo se agyaa pakar logon ne unhen un vrakshaen par se utarake usee gufaa men jahan ve chhpai gaae the dal diya, aur us gufaa ke munh par bade bade patthr dhar dia, ve aj tak vaheen dhare huae haain.." 
Joshua10:28 usee din yahoshoo ne makkeda ko le liya, aur usako talavar se mara, aur usake raja ko satyanash kiya aur jitane praanee us men the un sabhon men se kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda aur jaaisa us ne yareeho ke raja ke sath kiya tha vaaisa hee makkeda ke raja se bhee kiya.." 
Joshua10:29 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet makkeda se chalakar libna ko gaya, aur libna se lada." 
Joshua10:30 aur yahova ne us ko bhee raja samet israaeliyon ke hath me kar diya aur yahoshoo ne usako aur us men ke sab praanaiyon ko talavar se mara aur us men se kisee ko bhee jeeavit n chhoda aur usake raja se vaaisa hee kiya jaaisa us ne yareeho ke raja ke sath kiya tha..
