Joshua10:31 fir yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet libna se chalakar lakeesh ko gaya, aur usake virooddh chhavanee dalakar lada" 
Joshua10:32 aur yahova ne lakeesh ko israael ke hath men kar diya, aur doosare din us ne usako jeet liya aur jaaisa us ne libna ke sab praaanaiyon ko talavar se mara tha vaaisa hee us ne lakeesh se bhee kiya." 
Joshua10:33 tab gejer ka raja horam lakeesh kee sahayata karane ko chaddh aya aur yahoshoo ne praja samet usako bhee aeesa mara ki usake liye kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda.. 
Joshua10:34 fir yahoshoo ne sab israaeliyon samet lakeesh se chalakar aeglon ko gaya aur usake virooddh chhavanee dalakar yuddh karane laga 
Joshua10:35 aur usee din unhon ne usako le liya, aur usako talavar se mara aur usee din jaaisa us ne lakeesh ke sab praaanaiyon ko satyanash kar dala tha vaaisa hee us ne aeglon se bhee kiya.." 
Joshua10:36 fir yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet aeglon se chalakar hebraen ko gaya, aur us se ladne laga" 
Joshua10:37 aur unhon ne use le liya, aur usako aur usake raja aur sab gavon ko aur un men ke sab praanaiyon ko talavar se mara jaaisa yahoshoo ne aeglon se kiya tha vaaisa hee us ne hebraen men bhee kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda us ne usako aur us men ke sab praanaiyon ko satyanash kar dala.." 
Joshua10:38 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet ghoomakar dabeer ko gaya, aur us se ladne laga" 
Joshua10:39 aur raja samet use aur usake sab ganvon ko le liya aur unhon ne unako talavar se ghaat kiya, aur jitane praanee un men the sab ko satyanash kar dala kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda, jaaisa yahoshoo ne hebraen aur libna aur usake raja se kiya tha vaaisa hee us ne dabeer aur usake raja se bhee kiya.." 
Joshua10:40 isee prakar yahoshoo ne us sare desh ko, arthatapahadee desha, daakkhian desha, neeche ke desha, aur ddhaloo desh ko, unake sab rajaon samet mara aur israael ke parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda, varan jitane praanee the sabhon ko satyanash kar dala." 
Joshua10:41 aur yahoshoo ne kadeshabarne se le ajja tak, aur gibon tak ke sare goshon desh ke logon ko mara." 
Joshua10:42 in sab rajaon ko unake deshaen samet yahoshoo ne aek hee samay men le liya, kyonaki israael ka parameshvar yahova israaeliyon kee or se ladta tha." 
Joshua10:43 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon samet gilagal kee chhavanee men lautt aya.. 
Joshua11:1 yah sunakar hasor ke raja yabeen ne madon ke raja yobab, aur shaimraen aur akshaap ke rajaon ko," 
Joshua11:2 aur jo jo raja uttr kee or pahadee desh me, aur kinneret kee dakkhian ke araba me, aur neeche ke desh me, aur pachchhim kee or dor ke unche desh men rahate the, unako," 
Joshua11:3 aur poorab paachchhim donon or ke rahanevale kananiyo, aur aemoriyo, hitiayo, parijjaiyo, aur pahadee yaboosiyo, aur mispa desh men hemorn pahad ke neeche rahanevale hivvaiyon ko bulava bheja." 
Joshua11:4 aur ve apanee apanee sena samet, jo samudra ke kinare baloo ke kinakon ke saman bahut thee, milakar nikal aa, aur unake sath bahut hee ghaede aur rath bhee the." 
Joshua11:5 tab ye sab raja sammati karake ikatthe hua, aur israaeliyon se ladne ko merom nam tal ke pas akar aek sang chhavanee dalee." 
Joshua11:6 tab yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha, un se mat dr, kyonaki kal isee samay maain un sabhon ke israaeliyon ke vash karake marava daloonga tab too unake ghaedon ke sum kee nas kattvana, aur unake rath bhsm kar dena." 
Joshua11:7 aur yahoshoo sab yoddhaon samet merom nam tal ke pas achanak pahunchakar un par toott pada. 
Joshua11:8 aur yahova ne unako israaeliyon ke hath men kar diya, isaliye unhon ne unhen mar liya, aur bade nagar seedon aur misrapotamaait tak, aur poorva kee or mispe ke maaidan tak unaka peechha kiya aur unako mara, aur un men se kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda." 
Joshua11:9 tab yahoshoo ne yahova kee agyaa ke anusar un se kiya, arthata unake ghaedon ke sum kee nas kattvai, aur unake rath ag men jalakar bhsm kar diae.." 
Joshua11:10 us samay yahoshoo ne ghoomakar hasor ko jo paahile un sab rajyon men mukhy nagar tha le liya, aur usake raja ko talavar se mar dala." 
Joshua11:11 aur jitane praanee us men the un sabhon ko unhon ne talavar se marakar satyanash kiya aur kisee praanee ko jeeavit n chhoda, aur hasor ko yahoshoo ne ag lagakar faunkava diya." 
Joshua11:12 aur un sab nagaron ko unake sab rajaon samet yahoshoo ne le liya, aur yahova ke das moosa kee agyaa ke anusar unako talavar se ghaat karake satyanash kiya." 
Joshua11:13 parantu hasor ko chhodkar, jise yahoshoo ne faunkava diya, israael ne aur kisee nagar ko jo apane tteele par basa tha naheen jalayan" 
Joshua11:14 aur in nagaron ke pashu aur inakee saree loott ko israaeliyon ne apana kar liya parantu manushyon ko unhon ne talavar se mar dala, yahan tak unako satyanash kar dala ki aek bhee praanee ko jeevit naheen chhoda gaya." 
Joshua11:15 jo agyaa yahova ne apane das moosa ko dee thee usee ke anusar moosa ne yahoshoo ko agyaa dee thee, aur tteek vaaisa hee yahoshoo ne kiya bhee jo jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee un men se yahoshoo ne koi bhee pooree kiae bina n chhodee.." 
Joshua11:16 tab yahoshoo ne us sare desh ko, arthata pahadee desha, aur sare dakkhianee desha, aur kul goshon desha, aur neeche ke desha, araba, aur israael ke pahadee desha, aur usake neeche vale desh ko," 
Joshua11:17 halak nam pahad se le, jo seir kee chaddhai par haai, balagad tak, jo labanon ke maaidan men hermon parvat ke neeche haai, jitane desh haain un sab ko jeet liya aur un deshaen ke sare rajaon ko pakadkar mar dala." 
Joshua11:18 un sab rajaon se yuddh karate karate yahoshoo ko bahut din lag gae. 
Joshua11:19 gibon ke nivasee hivvaiyon ko chhod aur kisee nagar ke logon ne israaeliyon se mel n kiya aur sab nagaron ko unhon ne lad ladkar jeet liya. 
Joshua11:20 kyonaki yahova kee jo manasa thee, ki apanee us agyaa ke anusar jo us ne moosa ko dee thee un par kuchh bhee daya n kare varan satyanash kar dale, is karan us ne unake man aeese kattor kar dia, ki unhon ne israaeliyon ka samhana karake un se yuddh kiya.." 
Joshua11:21 us samay yahoshoo ne pahadee desh men akar hebraen, dabeer, anab, varan yahooda aur israel donon ke sare pahadee desh men rahanevale anakiyon ko nash kiya yahoshoo ne nagaron samet unhen satyanash kar dala." 
Joshua11:22 israaeliyon ke desh men koi anakee n rah gaya keval ajja, gat, aur ashadod men koi koi rah gaae." 
Joshua11:23 jaaisa yahova ne moosa se kaha tha, vaaisa hee yahoshoo ne vah sara desh le liya aur use israael ke gotraen aur kulon ke anusar bantt karake unhen de diya. aur desh ko ladai se shaantai milee.." 
Joshua12:1 yaradan par sooryoday kee or, arthata arnon nale se lekar hermon parvat tak ke desha, aur sare poorvee araba ke jin rajaon ko israaeliyon ne marakar unake desh ko apane adhaikar men kar liya tha ye haain" 
Joshua12:2 aemoriyon ka heshabonavasee raja seehon, jo anorn nale ke kinare ke aroaer se lekar, aur usee nale ke beech ke nagar ko chhodkar yabbok nadee tak, jo ammoniyon ka sivana haai, adho gilad par," 
Joshua12:3 aur kinneret nam tal se lekar betyashaeemot se hokar araba ke tal tak, jo khara tal bhee kahalata haai, poorva kee or ke araba, aur daakkhian kee or pisaga kee salamee ke neeche neeche ke desh par prabhuta rakhta tha." 
Joshua12:4 fir bache huae rapaiyon men se bashaan ke raja og ka desh tha, jo ashatarot aur aeendrari men raha karata tha," 
Joshua12:5 aur hemorn parvat salaka, aur gashooriyo, aur makiyon ke sivane tak kul bashaan me, aur heshabon ke raja seehon ke sivane tak adho gilad men bhee prabhuta karata tha." 
Joshua12:6 israaeliyon aur yahova ke das moosa ne inako mar liya aur yahova ke das moosa ne unaka desh roobeaniyon aur gaadiyon aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke logon ko de diya.. 
Joshua12:7 aur yaradan ke paashchaim kee or, labanon ke maaidan men ke balagat se lekar seir kee chaddhai ke halak pahad tak ke desh ke jin rajaon ko yahoshoo aur israaeliyon ne marakar unaka desh israaeliyon ke gotraen aur kulon ke anusar bhag karake de diya tha ve ye haai," 
Joshua12:8 hittee, aur aemoree, aur kananee, aur paarijjee, aur hivvee, aur yaboosee, jo pahadee desh me, aur neeche ke desh me, aur araba me, aur ddhaloo desh men aur jangal me, aur dakkhianee desh men rahate the." 
Joshua12:9 aek, yareeho ka raja aek, betel ke pas ke aee ka raja" 
Joshua12:10 aek, yarooshalem ka raja aek, hebraen ka raja" 
Joshua12:11 aek, yamroot ka raja aek, lakeesh ka raja" 
Joshua12:12 aek, aeglon ka raja aek, gejer ka raja" 
Joshua12:13 aek, dabeer ka raja aek, geder ka raja" 
Joshua12:14 aek, horma ka raja aek, arad ka raja" 
Joshua12:15 aek, libna ka raja aek, adullam ka raja" 
Joshua12:16 aek, makkeda ka raja aek, betel ka raja" 
Joshua12:17 aek, tappooh ka raja aek, heper ka raja" 
Joshua12:18 aek, apek ka raja aek, lashshaaron ka raja" 
Joshua12:19 aek, madon ka raja aek, hasor ka raja" 
Joshua12:20 aek, shaimraenmaron ka raja aek, akshaap ka raja" 
Joshua12:21 aek, tanak ka raja aek, maagio ka raja" 
Joshua12:22 aek, kedesh ka raja aek, kamarail men ke yokanam ka raja" 
Joshua12:23 aek, dor nam unche desh men ke dor ka raja aek, gilagal men ke goyeem ka raja" 
Joshua12:24 aur aek, tirsa ka raja is prakar sab raja ikatees hue.." 
Joshua13:1 yahoshoo booddha aur bahut umra ka ho gaya aur yahova ne us se kaha, too booddha aur bahut umra ka ho gaya haai, aur bahut desh rah gaae haai, jo israael ke aadhaikar men abhee tak naheen aae." 
Joshua13:2 ye desh rah gaae haai, arthata palishtaiyon ka sara praant, aur sare gashooree" 
Joshua13:3 misr ke age shaeehor se lekar uttr kee or aekron ke sivane tak jo kanaaniyon ka bhag gina jata haai aur paalishiitayon ke panchon saradar, arthata ajja, ashadod, ashakalon, gat, aur aekron ke loga, aur dakkhianee or avvee bhee," 
Joshua13:4 fir apek aur aemoriyon ke sivane tak kanaaniyo ka sara desh aur seedoniyon ka mara nam desha," 
Joshua13:5 fir gavaaliyon ka desha, aur sooyorday kee or hemorn parvat ke neeche ke balagad se lekar hamat kee ghaattee tak sara labanon," 
Joshua13:6 fir labanon se lekar misrapotamaaim tak seedoniyon ke pahadee desh ke nivasee. inako maain israaeliyon ke samhane se nikal doonga itana ho ki too meree agyaa ke anusar chitthee dal dalakar unaka desh israael ko bantt de. 
Joshua13:7 isaliye too ab is desh ko navon gotraen aur manashsho ke adho gotra ko unaka bhag hone ke liye bantt de.. 
Joshua13:8 isake sath roobeniyon aur gaadiyon ko to vah bhag mil chuka tha, jise moosa ne unhen yaradan ke poorva kee or diya tha, kyonaki yahova ke das moosa ne unheen ko diya tha," 
Joshua13:9 arthata anorn nam nale ke kinare ke aroaek se lekar, aur usee nale ke beech ke nagar ko chhodkar deebon tak medava ke pas ka sara chauras desha" 
Joshua13:10 aur ammoniyon ke sivane tak heshabot men virajanevale aemoriyon ke raja seehon ke sare nagara 
Joshua13:11 aur gilad desha, aur gashooriyon aur makavaasiyon ka sivana, aur sara hemorn parvat, aur salka tak kul bashaan," 
Joshua13:12 fir ashatarot aur aedraei men virajanevale us og ka sara rajy jo rapaishon men se akela bach gaya tha kyonaki inhee ko moosa ne marakar unakee praja ko us desh se nikal diya tha. 
Joshua13:13 parantu israaeliyon ne gashooriyon aur maakiyon ko unake desh se n nikala isaaliye gashooree aur makee israaeliyon ke madhy men aj tak rahate haain. 
Joshua13:14 aur levee ke gotraiyon ko us ne koi bhag n diya kyonaki israael ke parameshvar yahova ke vachan ke anusar usee ke havy unake liye bhag tthare haain. 
Joshua13:15 moosa ne rooben ke gotra ko unake kulon ke anusar diya," 
Joshua13:16 arthata anorn nam nale ke kinare ke aroaer se lekar aur usee nale ke beech ke nagar ko chhodkar medaba ke pas ka sara chauras desha 
Joshua13:17 fir chauras desh men ka heshabon aur usake sab ganva fir deebon, bamotabal, betabalmon," 
Joshua13:18 yahasa, kademot, mepat," 
Joshua13:19 kiryataaim, sibama, aur tarai men ke pahad par basa hua serethshshahar," 
Joshua13:20 bentapor, pisaga kee salamee aur betyashaeemot," 
Joshua13:21 nidan chauras desh men base huae heshabon men virajanevale aemoriyon ke us raja seehon ke rajy ke kul nagar jinhen moosa ne mar liya tha. moosa ne aevee, rekem, soor, hoor, aur reba nam mian ke pradhaanon ko bhee mar dala tha jo seehon ke ttharaae huae hakim aur usee desh ke nivasee the." 
Joshua13:22 aur israaeliyon ne unake aur mare huon ke sath bor ke putra bhavee kahanevale bilam ko bhee talavar se mar dala. 
Joshua13:23 aur roobeniyon ka sivana yaradan ka teer tthara. roobeaniyon ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar nagaron aur ganvon samet yahee tthara.. 
Joshua13:24 fir moosa ne gad ke gotraiyon ko bhee kulon ke anusar unaka nij bhag karake bantt diya. 
Joshua13:25 tab yah tthara, arthata yajer adi gilad ke sare nagar, aur rabba ke samhane ke aroaer tak ammoniyon ka adha desha," 
Joshua13:26 aur heshabon se ramataamispe aur batoneem tak, aur mahanaaim se dabeer ke sivane tak," 
Joshua13:27 aur tarai men betharam, benimra, sukkot, aur sapon, aur heshbon ke raja seehon ke rajy ke bache huae bhag, aur kinneret nam tal ke sire tak, yaradan ke poorva kee or ka vah desh jisaka sivana yaradan haai." 
Joshua13:28 gaadiyon ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar nagaron aur ganvon samet yahee tthara.. 
Joshua13:29 fir moosa ne manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ko bhee unaka nij bhag kar diya vah manashshoiyon ke adho gotra ka nij bhag unake kulon ke anusar tthara. 
Joshua13:30 vah yah haai, arthata mahanaaim se lekar bashaan ke raja og ke rajy ka sab desha, aur bashaan men basee hui yair kee satton baastaiya," 
Joshua13:31 aur gilad ka adha bhag, aur ashtaarot, aur aedraei, jo bashaan men og ke rajy ke nagar the, ye manashsho ke putra makeer ke vansh ka, arthata makeer ke adho vansh ka nij bhag kulon ke anusar tthare.." 
Joshua13:32 jo bhag moosa ne moab ke araba men yareeho ke pas ke yaradan ke poorva kee or bantt diae ve ye hee haain. 
Joshua13:33 parantu levee ke gotra ko moosa ne koi bhag n diya israael ka parameshvar yahova hee apane vachan ke anusar unaka bhag tthara.. 
Joshua14:1 jo jo bhag israaeliyon ne kanan desh men paa, unhen aeleeajar yajak, aur noon ke putra yahoshoo, aur israaelee gotraen ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purooshaen ne unako diya ve ye haain." 
Joshua14:2 jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ke dara saddhe nau gotraen ke liye dee thee, usake anusar unake bhag chitthee dal dalakar diae gaae." 
Joshua14:3 moosa ne to addhai gotraen ke bhag yaradan par diae the parantu leaviyon ko usane unake beech koi bhag n diya tha. 
Joshua14:4 yoosufa ke vansh ke to do gotra ho gaae the, arthata manashsho aur aepraaima aur us desh men leaviyon ko kuchh bhag n diya gaya, keval rahane ke nagar, aur pashu adi dhan rakhne ko aur charaiyan unako mileen." 
Joshua14:5 jo agyaa yahova ne moosa ko dee thee usake anusar israaeliyon ne kiya aur unhon ne desh ko bantt liya.. 
Joshua14:6 tab yahoodee yahoshoo ke pas gilagal men aae aur kanajee yapunne ke putra kaleb ne us se kaha, too janata hoga ki yahova ne kadeshabarne men parameshvar ke jan moosa se mere aur tere vishay men kya kaha tha." 
Joshua14:7 jab yahova ke das moosa ne mujhe is desh ka bhed lene ke liye kadeshabarne se bheja tha tab maain chalees varsha ka tha aur maain sachche man se usake pas sandesh le aya. 
Joshua14:8 aur mere sathee jo mere sang gaae the unhon ne to praja ke logon ko nirash kar diya, parantu maain ne apane parameshvar yahova kee pooree reeati se bat manee." 
Joshua14:9 tab us din moosa ne shapath khakar mujh se kaha, too ne pooree reeati se mere parameshvar yahova kee baton ka anukaran kiya haai, is karan ni:sandeh jis boomi par too apane panv dhar aya haai vah sada ke liye tera aur tere vansh ka bhag hogee." 
Joshua14:10 aur ab dek, jab se yahova ne moosa se yah vachan kaha tha tab se paaitalees varsha ho chuke haai, jin men israaelee jangal men ghoomate firate rahe un men yahova ne apane kahane ke anusar mujhe jeevit rakha haai aur ab maain pachasee varsha ka hoon." 
Joshua14:11 jitana bal moosa ke bhejane ke din mujh men tha utana bal abhee tak mujh men haai yuddh karane, va bheetar bahar ane jane ke liye jitanee us samay mujh me samathrya thee utanee hee ab bhee mujh men samathrya haai." 
Joshua14:12 isaliye ab vah pahadee mujhe de jisakee charcha yahova ne us din kee thee too ne to us din suna hoga ki us men anakavanshaee rahate haai, aur bade bade gaddhvale nagar bhee haain parantu kya jane sambhv haai ki yahova mere sang rahe, aur usake kahane ke anusar maain unhen unake desh se nikal doon." 
Joshua14:13 tab yahoshoo ne usako ashaeervad diya aur hebraen ko yapunne ke putra kaleb ka bhag kar diya. 
Joshua14:14 is karan hebraen kanajee yapunne ke putra kaleb ka bhag aj tak bana haai, kyonki vah israael ke parameshvar yahova ka pooree reeati se anugamee tha." 
Joshua14:15 paahile samay men to hebraen ka nam kiryatarba tha vah arba anaakiyon men sab se bada puroosh tha. aur us desh ko ladai se shaantai milee.. 
Joshua15:1 yahoodiyon ke gotra ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar chitthee dalane se aedom ke sivane tak, aur daakkhian kee or seen ke jangal tak jo daakkhianee sivane par haai tthara." 
Joshua15:2 unake bhag ka daakkhianee sivana khare tal ke us sirevale kol se arambh hua jo dakkhian kee or baddha haai 
Joshua15:3 aur vah akrabbeem nam chaddhai kee daakkhianee or se nikalakar seen hote huae kadeshabarne ke dakkhian kee or ko chaddh gaya, fir hesron ke pas ho aar ko chaddhkar karkaa kee or mud gaya," 
Joshua15:4 vahan se ammon hote huae vah misr ke nale par nikala, aur us sivane ka ant samudra hua. tumhara daakkhianee sivana yahee hoga." 
Joshua15:5 fir poorvee sivana yaradan ke muhane tak khara tal hee tthara, aur uttr disha ka sivana yaradan ke muhane ke pas ke tal ke kol se arambh karake," 
Joshua15:6 bethogla ko chaddhte huae betaraba kee uttr kee or hokar roobenee bohanavale nam patthr tak chaddh gaya 
Joshua15:7 aur vahee sivana akor nam tarai se dabeer kee or chaddh gaya, aur uttr hote huae gilagal kee or jhuka jo nale kee dakkhian or kee adummeem kee chaddhai ke samhane haai vahan se vah aenashomesh nam sote ke pas pahunchakar aenarogel par nikala" 
Joshua15:8 fir vahee sivana hinnom ke putra kee tarai se hokar yaboos jo yarooshalem kahalata haai usakee dakkhian alang se baddhte huae us pahad kee chottee par pahuncha, jo pashchaim kee or hinnom kee tarai ke samhane aur rapaim kee tarai ke uttravale sire par haai" 
Joshua15:9 fir vahee sivana us pahad kee chottee se neptoh nam sote ko chala gaya, aur aepraen pahad ke nagaron par nikala fir vahan se bala ko jo kiryatyareem bhee kahalata haai pahuncha" 
Joshua15:10 fir vah bala se paashchaim kee or mudkar seir pahad tak pahuncha, aur yareem pahad jo kasalon bhee kahalata haai us kee uttravalee alang se hokar betashomesh ko utar gaya, aur vahan se timna par nikala" 
Joshua15:11 vahan se vah sivana aekron kee uttree alang ke pas hote huae shaikkaron gaya, aur bala pahad hokar yabnel par nikala aur us sivane ka ant samudra ka tatt hua." 
Joshua15:12 aur paashchaim ka sivana mahasamudra ka teer tthara. yahoodiyon ko jo bhag unake kulon ke anusar mila usakee charon or ka sivana yahee hua.. 
Joshua15:13 aur yapunne ke putra kaleb ko usane yahova kee agyaa ke anusar yahoodiyon ke beech bhag diya, arthata kiryatarba jo hebraen bhee kahalata haai vah arba anak ka pita tha." 
Joshua15:14 aur kaleb ne vahan se shoshau, aheeman, aur talmaai nam, anak ke teenon putraen ko nikal diya." 
Joshua15:15 fir vahan se vah dabeer ke nivaasiyon par chaddh gaya poorvakal men to dabeer ka nam kiryatseper tha. 
Joshua15:16 aur kaleb ne kaha, jo kiryatseper ko marakar le le use maain apanee bettee akasa ko byah doonga." 
Joshua15:17 tab kaleb ke bhai otneeael kanajee ne use le liya aur us ne use apanee bettee akasa ko byah diya. 
Joshua15:18 aur jab vah usake pas ai, tab us ne usako pita se kuchh boomi mangane ko ubhara, fir vah apane gadahe par se utar padee, aur kaleb ne us se poochha, too kya chahatee haai?" 
Joshua15:19 vah bolee, mujhe ashaeervad de too ne mujhe daakkhian desh men kee kuchh boomi to dee haai, mujhe jal ke sote bhee de. tab us ne upar ke sote, neeche ke sote, donon use diae.." 
Joshua15:20 yahoodiyon ke gotra ka bhag to unake kulon ke anusar yahee tthara.. 
Joshua15:21 aur yahoodiyon ke gotra ke kinare-vale nagar dakkhian desh men aedom ke sivane kee or ye haai, arthata kabasel, aeder, yagoor," 
Joshua15:22 keena, deemona, adada," 
Joshua15:23 kedesha, hasor, yitnan," 
Joshua15:24 jeep, telem, balot," 
Joshua15:25 hasorhadatta, kaariyyothesron, jo hasor bhee kahalata haai," 
Joshua15:26 aur amam, shama, molada," 
Joshua15:27 hasargaa, heshamon, betpalet," 
Joshua15:28 hasarshooal, bershoba, bijyotya," 
Joshua15:29 bala, iyyeem, aesem," 
Joshua15:30 aelatolad, kaseel, horma," 
Joshua15:31 sikalag, madamanna, sanasanna," 
Joshua15:32 labaot, shailheem, aeen, aur rimmona ye sab nagar untees haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:33 aur neeche ke desh men ye haain arthata aeshataol sora, ashana," 
Joshua15:34 janoh, aenaganneem, tappooh, aenam," 
Joshua15:35 yamroot, adullam, soko, ajeka," 
Joshua15:36 shaaraaim, adeetaaim, gadera, aur gaderotaaima ye sab chaudah nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:37 fir sanan, hadasha, migadalagad," 
Joshua15:38 dilan, mispe, yoktel," 
Joshua15:39 lakeesha, boskat, aeglon," 
Joshua15:40 kabbon, lahamas, kitaleesha," 
Joshua15:41 gaderot, betadagon, nama, aur makkeda ye solah nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:42 fir libna, aeeter, ashaan," 
Joshua15:43 yiptah, ashana, naseeb," 
Joshua15:44 keela, akajeeb aur mareshaa ye nau nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain." 
Joshua15:45 fir nagaron aur ganvon samet aekron," 
Joshua15:46 aur aekron se lekar samudra tak, apane apane ganvon samet jitane nagar ashadod kee alang par haain.." 
Joshua15:47 fir apane apane nagaron aur gavon samet ashadod, aur ajja, varan misr ke nale tak aur mahasamudra ke teer tak jitane nagar haain.." 
Joshua15:48 aur pahadee desh men ye haain arthata shaameer, yatteer, soko," 
Joshua15:49 danna, kiryatsanna jo dabeer bhee kahalata haai," 
Joshua15:50 anab, aeshatamo, aneem," 
Joshua15:51 goshon, holon, aur geelo ye gyarah nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:52 fir arab, dooma, aeshaan," 
Joshua15:53 yaneem, bettppooh, apeka," 
Joshua15:54 humata, kiryatarba jo hebraen bhee kahalata haai, aur seeora ye nau nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:55 fir maon, karmel, jeep, yoota," 
Joshua15:56 mijrael, yokadam, janoh," 
Joshua15:57 kaain, giba, aur timna ye das nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:58 fir halahool, betasoor, gador," 
Joshua15:59 marat, betanot, aur aelatakona ye chh: nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:60 fir kiryatabal jo kiryatbareem bhee kahalata haai, aur rabba ye do nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:61 aur jangal men ye nagar haai, arthata betaraba, mieen, sakaka" 
Joshua15:62 nibashaan, lonavala nagar, aur aenagadee, ye chh: nagar haai, aur inake ganv bhee haain.." 
Joshua15:63 yarooshalem ke nivasee yaboosiyon ko yahoodee n nikal sake isaaliye aj ke din tak yaboosee yahoodiyon ke sang yarooshalem men rahate haain.. 
Joshua16:1 fir yoosufa kee santan ka bhag chitthee dalane se ttharaya gaya, unaka sivana yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee se, arthata poorba kee or yareeho ke jal se arambh hokar us pahadee desh se hote hua, jo jangal men haai, betel ko pahuncha" 
Joshua16:2 vahan se vah looj tak pahuncha, aur aereakiyon ke sivane hote huae atarot par ja nikala" 
Joshua16:3 aur paashchaim kee or yapaletiyon ke sivane se utarakar fir neechevale bethoron ke sivane se hokar gejer ko pahuncha, aur samudra par nikala." 
Joshua16:4 tab manashsho aur aepraaim nam yoosufa ke donon putraen kee santan ne apana apana bhag liya. 
Joshua16:5 aepraaiamiyon ka sivana unake kulon ke anusar yah tthara arthata unake bhag ka sivana poorva se arambh hokar atraetadar se hote huae upar vale bethoron tak pahuncha 
Joshua16:6 aur uttree sivana pashchaim kee or ke mikamatat se arambh hokar poorva kee or mudkar tanatashaeelo ko pahuncha, aur usake pas se hote huae yanoh tak pahuncha" 
Joshua16:7 fir yanoh se vah atarot aur nara ko utarata hua yareeho ke pas hokar yaradan par nikala. 
Joshua16:8 fir vahee sivana tappooh se nikalakar, aur pashchaim kee or jakar, kana ke nale tak hokar samudra par nikala. aepraaimiyon ke gotra ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar yahee tthara." 
Joshua16:9 aur manashshoiyon ke bhag ke beech bhee kai aek nagar apane apane ganvon samet aepraaiamiyon ke liye alag kiye gaae. 
Joshua16:10 parantu jo kananee gejer men base the unako aepraaimiyon ne vahan se naheen nikala isaaliye ve kananee unake beech aj ke din tak base haai, aur begaree men das ke saman kam karate haain.." 
Joshua17:1 fir yoosufa ke jette manashsho ke gotra ka bhag chitthee dalane se yah tthara. manashsho ka jetta putra gilad ka pita makeer yoddha tha, is karan usake vansh ko gilad aur bashaan mila." 
Joshua17:2 isaliye yah bhag doosare manashshoishon ke liye unake kulon ke anusar tthara, arthata abeeaejer, helek, aseeael, shokem, heper, aur shameeda jo apane apane kulon ke anusar yoosufa ke putra manashsho ke vansh men ke puroosh the, unake alag alag vanshaen ke liye tthara." 
Joshua17:3 parantu heper jo gilad ka putra, makeer ka pota, aur manashsho ka parapota tha, usake putra salofaad ke bette nahee, bettyaian hee huin aur unake nam mahala, noa, hogla, milaka, aur tirsa haain." 
Joshua17:4 tab ve aeleeajar yajak, noon ke putra yahoshoo, aur pradhaanon ke pas jakar kahane lagee, yahova ne moosa ko agyaa dee thee, ki vah ham ko hamare bhaiyon ke beech bhag de. to yahoshoo ne yahova kee agyaa ke anusar unhen unake chachaon ke beech bhag diya." 
Joshua17:5 tab manashsho ko, yaradan par gilad desh aur bashaan ko chhod, das bhag mile" 
Joshua17:6 kyonaki manashshoiyon ke beech men manashshoi striayon ko bhee bhag mila. aur doosare manashshoiyon ko gilad desh mila. 
Joshua17:7 aur manashsho ka sivana ashor se lekar mikamatat tak pahuncha, jo shakem ke samhane haai fir vah dakkhian kee or baddhkar aenatappooh ke nivaasiyon tak pahuncha." 
Joshua17:8 tappooh kee boomi to manashsho ko milee, parantu tappooh nagar jo manashsho ke sivane par basa haai vah aepraaiamiyon ka tthara." 
Joshua17:9 fir vahan se vah sivana kana ke nale tak utarake usake daakkhian kee or tak pahunch gaya ye nagar yapi manashsho ke sivane par basa haai vah aepraaiamiyon ka tthara. 
Joshua17:10 daakkhian kee or ka desh to aepraaim ko aur uttr kee or ka manashsho ko mila, aur usaka sivana samudra tthara aur ve uttr kee or ashor se aur poorva kee or issakar se ja mile." 
Joshua17:11 aur manashsho kee, issakar aur ashor apane apane nagaron samet betashaan, yibalam, aur apane nagaron samet tanak ki nivasee, aur apane nagaron samet maagio ke nivasee, ye teenon jo unche sthanon par base haain mile." 
Joshua17:12 parantu manashshoi un nagaron ke nivaasiyon ko un men se naheen nikal sake isaaliye ve kananee us desh men bariyai se base hee rahe. 
Joshua17:13 taubhee jab israaelee samarthee ho gaa, tab kananiyon se begaree to karane lage, parantu unako pooree reeati se nikal bahar n kiya.." 
Joshua17:14 yoosufa kee santan yahoshoo se kahane lagee, ham to ginatee men bahut haai, kyonki ab tak yahova hamen ashaeesh hee deta aya haai, fir too ne hamare bhag ke liye chitthee dalakar kyon aek hee ansh diya haai?" 
Joshua17:15 yahoshoo ne un se kaha, yadi tum ginatee men bahut ho, aur aepraaim ka pahadee desh tumhare liye chhotta ho, to parijjayon aur rapaiyon ka desh jo jangal haai usamen jakar pedon ko katt dalo." 
Joshua17:16 yoosufa kee santan ne kaha, vah pahadee desh hamare liye chhotta haai aur kya betasan aur usake nagaron men rahanevale, kya yijrael kee tarai men rahenavale, jitane kananee neeche ke desh men rahate haai, un sabhon ke pas lohe ke rath haain." 
Joshua17:17 fir yahoshoo ne, kya aepraaimee kya manashshoi, arthata yoosufa ke sare gharane se kaha, han tum log to ginatee men bahut ho, aur tumharee badee samarth bhee haai, isaliye tum ko keval aek hee bhag n milega" 
Joshua17:18 pahadee desh bhee tumhara ho jaaega kyonaki vah jangal to haai, parantu usake ped katt dalo, tab usake as pas ka desh bhee tumhara ho jaaega kyonaki chahe kananee samarthee ho, aur unake pas lohe ke rath bhee ho, taubhee tum unhen vahan se nikal sakoge.." 
Joshua18:1 fir israaeliyon ko saree mandlee ne shaeelo men ikatthee hokar vahan milapavale tamboo ko khda kiya kyonaki desh unake vash men a gaya tha. 
Joshua18:2 aur israaeliyon men se sat gotraen ke log apana apana bhag bina paye rah gaae the. 
Joshua18:3 tab yahoshoo ne israaeliyon se kaha, jo desh tumhare poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova ne tumhen diya haai, use apane aadhaikar men kar lene men tum kab tak ddhlaiai karate rahoge?" 
Joshua18:4 ab praati gotra ke peechhe teen manushy tthara lo, aur maain unhen isaliye bhejoonga ki ve chalakar desh men ghoomen fire, aur apane apane gotra ke bhag ke prayojan ke anusar usaka hal likh likhkar mere pas lautt aaen." 
Joshua18:5 aur ve desh ke sat bhag likhe, yahoodee to daakkhian kee or apane bhag me, aur yoosufa ke gharane ke log uttr kee or apane bhag men rahen." 
Joshua18:6 aur tum desh ke sat bhag likhkar mere pas le ao aur maain yahan tumhare liye apane parameshvar yahova ke samhane chitthee daloonga. 
Joshua18:7 aur leaviyon ka tumhare madhy men koi bhag n hoga, kyonki yahova ka diya hua yajakapad hee unaka bhag haai aur gad, rooben, aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke log yaradan ke poorva kee or yahova ke das moosa ka diya hua apana apana bhag pa chuke haain." 
Joshua18:8 to ve puroosh uttkar chal diae aur jo us desh ka hal likhne ko chale unhen yahoshoo ne yah agyaa dee, ki jakar desh men ghoomo firo, aur usaka hal likhkar mere pas lautt ao aur maain yahan shailon men yahova ke samhane tumhare liye chitthee daloonga." 
Joshua18:9 tab ve puroosh chal dia, aur us desh men ghoome, aur usake nagaron ke sat bhag karake unaka hal pustak men likhkar shaeelo kee chhavanee men yahoshoo ke pas aae." 
Joshua18:10 tab yahoshoo ne shaeelon men yahova ke samhane unake liye chitthiyan daleen aur vaheen yahoshoo ne israaeliyon ko unake bhagon ke anusar desh bantt diya.. 
Joshua18:11 aur binyameeaniyon ke gotra kee chitthee unake kulon ke anusar nikalee, aur unaka bhag yahoodiyon aur yoosuafiyon ke beech men pada." 
Joshua18:12 aur unaka uttree sivana yaradan se arambh hua, aur yareeho kee uttr alang se chaddhte huae pashchaim kee or pahadee desh men hokar betaven ke jangal men nikala" 
Joshua18:13 vahan se vah looj ko pahuncha jo betel bhee kahalata haai, aur looj kee daakkhian alang se hote huae nichale bethoron kee dakkhian or ke pahad ke pas ho atraetaar ko utar gaya." 
Joshua18:14 fir pashchaimee sivana mudke bethoron ke samhane aur usakee dakkhian or ke pahad se hote huae kiryatabal nam yahoodiyon ke aek nagar par nikala jo kiryatyareem bhee kahalata haai pashchaim ka sivana yahee tthara. 
Joshua18:15 fir dakkhian alang ka sivana pashchaim se arambh hokar kiryatyareem ke sire se nikalakar neptoh ke sote par pahuncha 
Joshua18:16 aur us pahad ke sire par utara, jo hinnom ke putra kee tarai ke samhane aur rapaim nam tarai kee uttr or haai vahan se vah hinnom kee tarai me, arthata yaboos kee dakkhian alang hokar aenarogel ko utara" 
Joshua18:17 vahan se vah uttr kee or mudkar aenashomesh ko nikalakar us galeelot kee or gaya, jo adummeem kee chaddhai ke samhane haai, fir vahan se vah rooben ke putra bohan ke patthr tak utar gaya" 
Joshua18:18 vahan se vah uttr kee or jakar araba ke samhane ke pahad kee alang se hote huae araba ko utara 
Joshua18:19 vahan se vah sivana bethogla kee uttr alang se jakar khare tal kee uttr or ke kol men yaradan ke muhane par nikala dakkhian ka sivana yahee tthara. 
Joshua18:20 aur poorva kee or ka sivana yaradan hee tthara. binyameeaniyon ka bhag, charon or ke sivanon sahit, unake kulon ke anusar, yahee tthara." 
Joshua18:21 aur binyameeaniyon ke gotra ko unake kulon ke anusar ye nagar mile, arthata yareeho, bethogla, aemekkasees," 
Joshua18:22 betaraba, samaraaim, betel," 
Joshua18:23 avveem, para, opra," 
Joshua18:24 kaparammonee, opnee aur geba ye barah nagar aur inake ganv mile." 
Joshua18:25 fir gibon, rama, berot," 
Joshua18:26 mispe, kapeera, mosa," 
Joshua18:27 rekem, yirpel, tarala," 
Joshua18:28 sela, aelep, yaboos jo yarooshalem bhee kahalata haai, gibal aur kiryata ye chaudah nagar aur inake ganv unhen mile. binyameeaniyon ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar yahee tthara.." 
Joshua19:1 doosaree chitthee shamaun ke nam par, arthata shaimoniyon ke kulon ke anusar unake gotra ke nam par nikalee aur unaka bhag yahoodiyon ke bhag ke beech men tthara." 
Joshua19:2 unake bhag men ye nagar haai, arthata bershoba, shoba, molada," 
Joshua19:3 hasarshooal, bala, aesem," 
Joshua19:4 aelatolad, batool, horma," 
Joshua19:5 betalabaot, aur shaaroohena ye terah nagar aur inake ganv unhen mile." 
Joshua19:6 betalabaot, aur shaaroohena ye terah nagar aur inake ganv unhen mile." 
Joshua19:7 fir aeen, rimmon, aeeter, aur ashaan, ye char nagar ganvon sameta" 
Joshua19:8 aur balatber jo dikkhn desh ka rama bhee kahalata haai, vahan tak in nagaron ke charon or ke sab ganv bhee unhen mile. shaimaaniyon ke gotra ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar yahee tthara." 
Joshua19:9 shaimoniyon ka bhag to yahoodiyon ke ansh men se diya gaya kyonki yahoodiyon ka bhag unake liye bahut tha, is karan shaimoniyon ka bhag unheen ke bhag ke beech tthara.." 
Joshua19:10 teesaree chitthee jaboolooniyon ke kulon ke anusar unake nam par nikalee. aur unake bhag ka sivana sareed tak pahuncha 
Joshua19:11 aur unaka sivana pashchaim kee or marala ko chaddhkar dabbeshot ko pahuncha aur yokanam ke samhane ke nale tak pahunch gaya 
Joshua19:12 fir sareed se vah sooryoday kee or mudkar kisalottabor ke sivane tak panhucha, aur vahan se baddhte baddhte dabarat men nikala, aur yapee kee or ja nikala" 
Joshua19:13 vahan se vah poorva kee or age baddhkar gatheper aur itkaseen ko gaya, aur us rimmon men nikala jo nea tak faaila hua haai" 
Joshua19:14 vahan se vah sivana usake uttr kee or se mudkar hannaton par pahuncha, aur yiptahel kee tarai men ja nikala" 
Joshua19:15 kattat, nahalal, shaibhraen, yidala, aur betalehama ye barah nagar unake ganvon samet usee bhag ke tthare." 
Joshua19:16 jaboolooniyon ka bhag unake kulon ke anusar yahee tthara aur us men apane apane ganvon samet ye hee nagar haain.. 
Joshua19:17 chauthee chitthee issakariyon ke kulon ke anusar unake nam par nikalee. 
Joshua19:18 aur unaka sivana yijrael, kasullot, shoonem" 
Joshua19:19 haparaaim, shaeeon, anaharat," 
Joshua19:20 rabbeet, kishyot, aebes," 
Joshua19:21 remet, aenaganneem, aenahaa, aur betpasses tak pahuncha." 
Joshua19:22 fir vah sivana tabora-shahasooma aur betashomesh tak pahuncha, aur unaka sivana yaradan nadee par ja nikala is prakar unako solah nagar apane apane ganvon samet mile." 
Joshua19:23 kulon ke anusar issakaariyon ke gotra ka bhag nagaron aur ganvon samet yahee tthara.. 
Joshua19:24 panchaveen chitthee ashoriyon ke gotra ke kulon ke anusar unake nam par nikalee. 
Joshua19:25 unake sivane men helkat, halee, beten, akshaap," 
Joshua19:26 alammellek, amad, aur mishaal the aur vah pashchaim kee or kamrmel tak aur shaahorlibnat tak pahuncha" 
Joshua19:27 fir vah sooyorday kee or mudkar betadagon ko gaya, aur jabaloon ke bhag tak, aur yiptahel kee tarai men uttr kee or hokar betemek aur neeael tak pahuncha aur uttr kee or jakar kabool par nikala," 
Joshua19:28 aur vah aebraen, rahob, hammon, aur kana se hokar bade seedon ko pahuncha" 
Joshua19:29 vahan se vah sivana mudkar rama se hote huae son nam gaddhvale nagar tak chala gaya fir sivana hosa kee or mudkar aur akajeeb ke pas ke desh men hokar samudra par nikala," 
Joshua19:30 umma, apek, aur rahob bhee unake bhag men tthare is prakar bais nagar apane apane ganvon samet unako mile." 
Joshua19:31 kulon ke anusar ashoriyon ke gotra ka bhag nagaron aur ganvon samet yahee tthara.. 
Joshua19:32 chhttveen chitthee naptaaliyon ke kulon ke anusar unake nam par nikalee. 
Joshua19:33 aur unaka sivana helep se, aur sananneem men ke banj vraksha se, adameenekeb aur yabnel se hokar, aur lakkoom ko jakar yaradan par nikala" 
Joshua19:34 vahan se vah sivana pashchaim kee or mudkar ajanottabor ko gaya, aur vahan se hukkok ko gaya, aur dakkhian, aur jabooloon ke bhag tak, aur paashchaim kee or ashor ke bhag tak, aur sooyorday kee or yahooda ke bhag ke pas kee yaradan nadee par pahuncha." 
Joshua19:35 aur unake gaddhvale nagar ye haai, arthata sieem, ser, hammat, rakkat, kinneret," 
Joshua19:36 adama, rama, hasor," 
Joshua19:37 kedesha, aedraei, aenhaser," 
Joshua19:38 yiron, migadalel, horem, betanat, aur betashomesha ye unnees nagar ganvon samet unako mile." 
Joshua19:39 kulon ke unasar naptaliyon ke gotra ka bhag nagaron aur unake ganvon samet yahee tthara.. 
Joshua19:40 sataveen chitthee kulon ke anusar daniyon ke gotra ke nam par nikalee. 
Joshua19:41 aur unake bhag ke sivane men sora, aeshataol, irashamesha," 
Joshua19:42 shaalabbeen, ayyalon, yitala," 
Joshua19:43 aelon, timna, aekron," 
Joshua19:44 aelatake, gibbaton, balat," 
Joshua19:45 yahood, banebarak, gatraimmon," 
Joshua19:46 meyarkon, aur rakkon tthare, aur yapo ke samhane ka sivana bhee unaka tha." 
Joshua19:47 aur daaniyon ka bhag is se aadhaik ho gaya, arthata danee leshom par chaddhkar us se lade, aur use lekar talavar se mar dala, aur usako apane adhaikar men karake us men bas gaa, aur apane moolapuroosh ke nam par leshom ka nam dan rakha." 
Joshua19:48 kulon ke unasar daniyon ke gotra ka bhag nagaron aur ganvon samet yahee tthara.. 
Joshua19:49 jab desh ka bantta jana sivanon ke anusar nipatt gaya, tab israaeliyon ne noon ke putra yahoshoo ko bhee apane beech men aek bhag diya." 
Joshua19:50 yahova ke kahane ke anusar unhon ne usako usaka manga hua nagar diya, yah aepraaim ke pahadee desh men ka vimnatserah haai aur vah us nagar ko basakar us men rahane laga.." 
Joshua19:51 jo jo bhag aeleeajar yajak, aur noon ke putra yahoshoo, aur israaeliyon ke gotraen ke gharanon ke poorvajon ke mukhy mukhy purooshaen ne shaeelo me, milapavale tamboo ke dar par, yahova ke samhane chitthee dal dalake bantt diae ve ye hee haain. nidan unhon ne desh vibhajan ka kam nipatta diya.." 
Joshua20:1 fir yahova ne yahoshoo se kaha," 
Joshua20:2 israaeliyon se yah kah, ki maain ne moosa ke dara tum se sharan nagaron kee jo charcha kee thee usake anusar unako tthara lo," 
Joshua20:3 jis se jo koi bool se bina jane kisee ko mar dale, vah un men se kisee men bhag jaae isaliye ve nagar koon ke palatta lenevale se bachane ke liye tumhare sharansthan ttharen." 
Joshua20:4 vah un nagaron men se kisee ko bhag jaa, aur us nagar ke faattk men se khda hokar usake puraaniyon ko apana mukama kah sunaae aur ve usako apane nagar men apane pas ttkai le, aur use koi sthan de, jis men vah unake sath rahe." 
Joshua20:5 aur yaadi koon ka palatta lenevala usaka peechha kare, to ve yah janakar ki us ne apane padosee ko bina jane, aur pahile us se bina baair rakhe mara, us koonee ko usake hath men n den." 
Joshua20:6 aur jab tak vah mandlee ke samhane nyay ke liye khda n ho, aur jab tak un dinon ka mahayajak n mar jaa, tab tak vah usee nagar men rahe usake bad vah koonee apane nagar ko lauttkar jis se vah bhag aya ho apane ghar men fir rahane paae." 
Joshua20:7 aur unhon ne naptalee ke pahadee desh men galeel ke kedesh ko, aur aepraaim ke pahadee desh men shakem ko, aur yahooda ke pahadee desh men kiyryatarba ko, jo hebraen bhee kahalata haai paavitra ttharaya." 
Joshua20:8 aur yareeho ke pas ke yaradan ke poorva kee or unhon ne rooben ke gotra ke bhag men basere ko, jo jangal men chauras boomi par basa hua haai, aur gad ke gotra ke bhag men gilad ke ramot ko, aur manashsho ke gotra ke bhag men bashaan ke galan ko ttharaya." 
Joshua20:9 sare israaeliyon ke liye, aur un ke beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon ke liye bhee, jo nagar is manasa se ttharaae gaae ki jo koi kisee praanee ko bool se mar dale vah un men se kisee men bhag jaa, aur jab tak nyay ke liye mandlee ke samhane khda n ho, tab tak koon ka palatta lenevala use mar dalane n paa, ve yah hee haain.." 
Joshua21:1 tab leaviyon ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy puroosh aeleeajar yajak, aur noon ke putra yahoshoo, aur israaelee gotraen ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purooshaen ke pas akar" 
Joshua21:2 kanan desh ke shaeelo nagar men kahane lage, yahova ne moosa se hamen basane ke liye nagar, aur hamare pashuuon ke liye unheen nagaron kee charaiyan bhee dene kee agyaa dilai thee." 
Joshua21:3 tab israaeliyon ne yahova ke kahane ke anusar apane apane bhag men se leaviyon ko charaiyon samet ye nagar diae.. 
Joshua21:4 aur kahatiyon ke kulon ke nam par chitthee nikalee. isaaliye leaviyon men se haroon yajak ke vansh ko yahoodee, shaimon, aur binyameen ke gotraen ke bhagon men se terah nagar mile.." 
Joshua21:5 aur bakee kahaatiyon ko aepraaim ke gotra ke kulo, aur dan ke gotra, aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke bhagon men se chitthee dal dalakar das nagar diae gaae.." 
Joshua21:6 aur geshareaniyon ko issakar ke gotra ke kulo, aur ashor, aur naptalee ke gotraen ke bhagon men se, aur manashsho ke us adho gotra ke bhagon men se bhee jo bashaan men tha chitthee dal dalakar terah nagar diae gaae.." 
Joshua21:7 aur kulon ke anusar maraariyon ko rooben, gad, aur jabooloon ke gotraen ke bhagon men se barah nagar diae gaae.." 
Joshua21:8 jo agyaa yahova ne moosa se dilai bhee usake anusar israaeliyon ne leaviyon ko charaiyon samet ye nagar chitthee dal dalakar diae. 
Joshua21:9 unhon ne yahoodiyon aur shaimoniyon ke gotraen ke bhagon men se ye nagar jinake nam likhe haain die 
Joshua21:10 ye nagar leveey kahatee kulon men se haroon ke vansh ke liye the kyonaki pahilee chitthee unheen ke nam par nikalee thee. 
Joshua21:11 arthata unhon ne un ko yahooda ke pahadee desh men charon or kee charaiyon samet kiryatarba nagar de diya, jo anak ke pita arba ke nam par kahalaya aur hebraen bhee kahalata haai." 
Joshua21:12 parantu us nagar ke khet aur usake ganv unhon ne yapunne ke putra kaleb ko usakee nij boomi karake de diae.. 
Joshua21:13 tab unhon ne haroon yajak ke vansh ko charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar hebraen, aur apanee apanee charaiyon samet libna," 
Joshua21:14 yatteer, aeshatamo," 
Joshua21:15 holon, dabeer, aeen," 
Joshua21:16 yutta aur betashomesh diae is prakar un donon gotraen ke bhagon men se nau nagar diae gaae. 
Joshua21:17 aur binyameen ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet ye char nagar diae gaa, arthatagibon, geba," 
Joshua21:18 anatot aur almon 
Joshua21:19 is prakar haroonavanshaee yajakon ko terah nagar aur unakee charaiyan milee.. 
Joshua21:20 fir bakee kahatee leaviyon ke kulon ke bhag ke nagar chitthee dal dalakar aepraaim ke gotra ke bhag men se diae gaae. 
Joshua21:21 arthata unako charaiyon samet aepraaim ke pahadee desh men koonee sharan lene ka shakem nagar diya gaya, fir apanee apanee charaiyon samet gejer," 
Joshua21:22 kibasaaim, aur bethorona ye char nagar diae gaae." 
Joshua21:23 aur dan ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet, aelatake, gibbaton," 
Joshua21:24 ayyalon, aur gaatraimmona ye char nagar diae gaae." 
Joshua21:25 aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet tanak aur gaatraimmona ye do nagar diae gaae. 
Joshua21:26 is prakar bakee kahatiyon ke kulon ke sab nagar charaiyon samet das tthare.. 
Joshua21:27 fir leviyon ke kulon men ke geshareniyon ko manashsho ke adho gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar bashaan ka golan aur beshatara ye do nagar diae gaae. 
Joshua21:28 aur issakar ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet kishyon, dabarat," 
Joshua21:29 yamroot, aur aenaganneema ye char nagar diae gaae." 
Joshua21:30 aur ashor ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet mishaal, abdon," 
Joshua21:31 helkat, aur rahoba ye char nagar diae gaae." 
Joshua21:32 aur naptalee ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar galeel ka kedesha, fir hammotador, aur kartana ye teen nagar diae gaae." 
Joshua21:33 geshareaniyon ke kulon ke anusar unake sab nagar apanee apanee charaiyon samet terah tthare.. 
Joshua21:34 fir bakee leaviyo, arthata maraariyon ke kulon ko jabooloon ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet yoknam, karta," 
Joshua21:35 dimna, aur nahalala ye char nagar diae gaae." 
Joshua21:36 aur rooben ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet beser, yahasa," 
Joshua21:37 kedemot, aur mepata ye char nagar diae gaae." 
Joshua21:38 aur gad ke gotra ke bhag men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet koonee ke sharan nagar gilad men ka ramot, fir mahanaaim," 
Joshua21:39 heshabon, aur yajer, jo sab milakar char nagar haain diae gaae." 
Joshua21:40 leaviyon ke bakee kulon arthata marariyon ke kulon ke anusar unake sab nagar ye hee tthare, is prakar unako barah nagar chitthee dal dalakar diae gaae.." 
Joshua21:41 israaeliyon kee nij boomi ke beech leviyon ke sab nagar apanee apanee charaiyon samet adtalees tthare. 
Joshua21:42 ye sab nagar apane apane charon or kee charaiyon ke sath tthare in sab nagaron kee yahee dasha thee.. 
Joshua21:43 is prakar yahova ne israaeliyon ko vah sara desh diya, jise us ne unake poorvajon se shapath khakar dene ko kaha tha aur ve usake adhaikaree hokar us men bas gaae." 
Joshua21:44 aur yahova ne un sab baton ke anusar, jo us ne unake poorvajon se shapath khakar kahee thee, unhen charon or se vishraam diya aur unake shatrauon men se koi bhee unake samhane ttkai n saka yahova ne un sabhon ko unake vash men kar diya." 
Joshua21:45 jitanee bhlai kee baten yahova ne israael ke gharane se kahee theen un men se koi bhee n choottee sab kee sab pooree hui.. 
Joshua22:1 us samay yahoshoo ne roobeaniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ko bulavakar kaha," 
Joshua22:2 jo jo agyaa yahova ke das moosa ne tumhen dee theen ve sab tum ne manee haai, aur jo jo agyaa maain ne tumhen dee haain un sabhon ko bhee tum ne mana haai" 
Joshua22:3 tum ne apane bhaiyon ko is mut men aj ke din tak naheen chhoda, parantu apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa tum ne chaukasee se manee haai." 
Joshua22:4 aur ab tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tumhare bhaiyon ko apane vachan ke anusar vishraam diya haai isaaliye ab tum lauttkar apane apane deron ko, aur apanee apanee nij boomi me, jise yahova ke das moosa ne yaradan par tumhen diya haai chale jao." 
Joshua22:5 keval is bat kee pooree chaukasee karana ki jo jo agyaa aur vyavastha yahova ke das moosa ne tum ko dee haai usako manakar apane parameshvar yahova se praem rakho, usake sare margon par chalo, usakee agyaaaen mano, usakee bhnaktai me lauleen raho, aur apane sare man aur sare praan se usakee seva karo." 
Joshua22:6 tab yahoshoo ne unhen ashaeervad dekar vida kiya aur ve apane apane dere ko chale gaae.. 
Joshua22:7 manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ko moosa ne basan men bhag diya tha parantu doosare adho gotra ko yahoshoo ne unake bhaiyon ke beech yaradan ke paashchaim kee or bhag diya. unako jab yahoshoo ne vida kiya ki apane apane dere ko jaae," 
Joshua22:8 tab unako bhee ashaeervad dekar kaha, bahut se pashu, aur chandee, sona, peetal, loha, aur bahut se vasr aur bahut dhana-sampait liae huae apane apane dere ko lautt ao aur apane shatrauon kee loott kee sampaati ko apane bhaiyon ke sang bantt lena.." 
Joshua22:9 tab roobenee, gadee, aur manashsho ke adho gotraee israaeliyon ke pas se, arthata kanan desh ke shaeelo nagar se, apanee gilad nam nij boomi me, jo moosa se dilai hui, yahova kee agyaa ke anusar unakee nij boomi ho gai thee, jane kee manasa se lautt gaae." 
Joshua22:10 aur jab roobenee, gadee, aur manashsho ke adho gotraee yaradan kee us tarai men pahunche jo kanan desh men haai, tab unhon ne vahan dekhne ke yogy aek badee vedee banai." 
Joshua22:11 aur isaka samachar israaeliyon ke sunane men aya, ki roobeaniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ne kanan desh ke samhane yaradan kee tarai me, arthata usake us par jo israaeliyon ka haai, aek vedee banai haai." 
Joshua22:12 jab israaeliyon ne yah suna, tab israaeliyon kee saree mandlee un se ladne ke liye chaddhai karane ko shaeelo men ikatthee hui.." 
Joshua22:13 tab israaeliyon ne roobeniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ke pas gilad desh men aeleeajar yajak ke putra peenahas ko," 
Joshua22:14 aur usake sang das pradhaanon ko, arthata israael ke aek aek gotra men se poorvajon ke gharanon ke aek aek pradhaan ko bheja, aur ve israael ke hajaron men apane apane poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy puroosh the." 
Joshua22:15 ve gilad desh men roobeaniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ke pas jakar kahane lage," 
Joshua22:16 yahova kee saree mandlee yah kahatee haai, ki tum ne israael ke parameshvar yahova ka yah kaaisa vishvasaghaat kiya aj jo tum ne aek vedee bana lee haai, is men tum ne usake peechhe chalana chhodkar usake virooddh aj balava kiya haai?" 
Joshua22:17 suno, por ke vishay ka adharma hamare liye kuchh kam tha, yapi yahova kee mandlee ko bharee dand mila taubhee aj ke din tak ham us adharma se shuuddh naheen hue kya vah tumharee drashtti men aek chhottee bat haai," 
Joshua22:18 ki aj tum yahova ko tyagakar usake peechhe chalana chhod dete ho? kya tum yahova se fir jate ho, aur kal vah israael kee saree mandlee par krodhait hoga." 
Joshua22:19 parantu yadi tumharee nij boomi ashuuddh ho, to par akar yahova kee nij boomi me, jahan yahova ka nivas rahata haai, ham logon ke beech men apanee apanee nij boomi kar lo parantu hamare parameshvar yahova kee bedee ko chhod aur koi vedee banakar n to yahova se balava karo, aur n ham se." 
Joshua22:20 dekho, jab jerah ke putra akan ne arpan kee hui vastu ke vishay men vishvasaghaat kiya, tab kya yahova ka kop israael kee pooree mandlee par n bhdka? aur us puroosh ke adharma ka praandand akele usee ko n mila.." 
Joshua22:21 tab roobeniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotraiyon ne israael ke hajaron ke mukhy purooshaen ko yah uttr diya," 
Joshua22:22 ki yahova jo ishvaron ka parameshvar haai, ishvaron ka parameshvar yahova isako janata haai, aur israaelee bhee ise jan lenge, ki yadi yahova se firake va usaka vishvasaghaat karake ham ne yah kam kiya ho, to too aj ham ko jeeavit n chhod," 
Joshua22:23 yaadi aj ke din ham ne vedee ko isaliye banaya ho ki yahova ke peechhe chalana chhod de, va isaaliye ki us par homabali, annabali, va melabali chaddhaae, to yahova ap isaka hisab le" 
Joshua22:24 parantu ham ne isee vichar aur manasa se yah kiya haai ki kaheen bhavishy men tumharee santan hamaree santan se yah n kahane lage, ki tum ko israael ke parameshvar yahova se kya kama?" 
Joshua22:25 kyonaki, he roobeaniyo, he gadiyo, yahova ne jo hamare aur tumhare beech men yaradan ko ha tthara diya haai, isaaliye yahova men tumhara koi bhag naheen haai. aeesa kahakar tumharee santan hamaree santan men se yahova ka bhy chhuda degee." 
Joshua22:26 iseeliye ham ne kaha, ao, ham apane liye aek vedee bana le, vah homabali va melabali ke liye nahee," 
Joshua22:27 parantu isaaliye ki hamare aur tumhare, aur hamare bad hamare aur tumhare vansh ke beech men sakshaee ka kam de isaliye ki ham homabali, melabali, aur balidan chaddhakar yahova ke sammukh usakee upasana karen aur bhavishy men tumharee santan hamaree santan se yah n kahane paa, ki yahova men tumhara koi bhag naheen." 
Joshua22:28 isaliye ham ne kaha, ki jab ve log bhvishy men ham se va hamare vansh se yon kahane lege, tab ham un se kahenge, ki yahova ke vedee ke namoone par banee hui is vedee ko dekho, jise hamare purakhaon ne homabali va melabali ke liye naheen banaya parantu isaliye banaya tha ki hamare aur tumhare beech men sakshaee ka kam de." 
Joshua22:29 yah ham se door rahe ki yahova se firakar aj usake peechhe chalana chhod de, aur apane parameshvar yahova kee us vedee ko chhodkar jo usake nivas ke samhane haai homabali, aur annabali, va melabali ke liye doosaree vedee banaaen.." 
Joshua22:30 roobeniyo, gadiyo, aur manashsho ke adho gotraiyon kee in baton ko sunakar peenahas yajak aur usake sang mandlee ke pradhaan, jo israael ke hajaron ke mukhy puroosh the, ve ati prasann huae." 
Joshua22:31 aur aeleeajar yajak ke putra peenahas ne roobeaniyo, gadiyo, aur manashshoiyon se kaha, tum ne jo yahova ka aeesa vishvasaghaat naheen kiya, is se aj ham ne yah jan liya ki yahova hamare beech men haai: aur tum logon ne israaeliyon ko yahova ke hath se bachaya haai." 
Joshua22:32 tab aeleeajar yajak ka putra peenahas pradhaanon samet roobeaniyon aur gaadiyon ke pas se gilad hote huae kanan desh men israaeliyon ke pas lautt gaya: aur yah vratant unako kah sunaya. 
Joshua22:33 tab israaelee prasann hue aur parameshvar ko dhany kaha, aur roobeaniyon aur gaadiyon se ladne aur unake rahane ka desh ujadne ke liye chaddhai karane kee charcha fir n kee." 
Joshua22:34 aur roobeniyon aur gaadiyon ne yah kahakar, ki yah vedee hamare aur unake madhy men is bat ka sakshaee ttharee haai, ki yahova hee parameshvar haai: us vedee ka nam aed rakha.." 
Joshua23:1 isake bahut dinon ke bad, jab yahova ne israaeliyon ko unake charon or ke shatrauon se vishraam diya, aur yahoshoo booddha aur bahut ayu ka ho gaya," 
Joshua23:2 tab yahoshoo sab israaeliyon ko, arthata puraniyo, mukhy purooshae, nyaayiyo, aur saradaron ko bulavakar kahane laga, maain to ab booddha aur bahut ayu ka ho gaya hoon" 
Joshua23:3 aur tum ne dekha ki tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tumhare nimitt in sab jatiyon se kya kya kiya haai, kyonki jo tumharee or ladta aya haai vah tumhara parameshvar yahova haai." 
Joshua23:4 dekho, maain ne in bachee hui jaatiyon ko chitthee dal dalakar tumhare gotraen ka bhag kar diya haai aur yaradan se lekar sooryast kee or ke bade samudra tak rahanevalee un sab jatiyon ko bhee aeesa hee diya haai, jinako maain ne katt dala haai." 
Joshua23:5 aur tumhara parameshvar yahova unako tumhare samhane se unake desh se nikal dega aur tum apane parameshvar yahova ke vachan ke anusar unake desh ke adhaikaree ho jaoge. 
Joshua23:6 isaliye bahut hiyav bandhakar, jo kuchh moosa kee vyavastha kee pustak men likha haai usake poora karane men chaukasee karana, us se n to dahine mudna aur n baaen." 
Joshua23:7 ye jo jaatiyan tumhare beech rah gai haain inake beech n jana, aur n inake devataon ke namon kee charcha karana, aur n unakee shapath khailana, aur n unakee upasana karana, aur n unako dandvata karana," 
Joshua23:8 parantu jaaise aj ke din tak tum apane parameshvar yahova kee bhktai men lavaleen rahate ho, vaaise hee raha karana." 
Joshua23:9 yahova ne tumhare samhane se badee badee aur balavant jatiyan nikalee haain aur tumhare samhane aj ke din tak koi tthar naheen saka. 
Joshua23:10 tum men se aek manushy hajar manushyon ko bhgaaega, kyonaki tumhara parameshvar yahova apane vachan ke anusar tumharee or se ladta haai." 
Joshua23:11 isaliye apane parameshvar yahova se praem rakhne kee pooree chaukasee karana. 
Joshua23:12 kyonaki yadi tum kisee reeati yahova se firakar in jatiyon ke bakee logon se milane lago jo tumhare beech bache huae rahate the, aur in se byah shaadee karake inake sath samadhaiyana rishta jodo," 
Joshua23:13 to nishchay jan lo ki age ko tumhara parameshvar yahova in jatiyon ko tumhare samahane se naheen nikalega aur ye tumhare liye jal aur fande, aur tumhare panjaron ke liye kode, aur tumharee ankhon men kantte ttharegee, aur ant men tum is achchhee boomi par se jo tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tumhen dee haai nashtt ho jaoge." 
Joshua23:14 suno, maain to ab sab sansaariyon kee gaati par janevala hoo, aur tum sab apane apane day aur man men janate ho, ki jitanee bhlai kee baten hamare parameshvar yahova ne hamare vishay men kaheen un men se aek bhee bina pooree huae naheen rahee." 
Joshua23:15 to jaaise tumhare parameshvar yahova kee kahee hui sab bhlai kee baten tum par ghattee haai, vaaise hee yahova vipaati kee sab baten bhee tum par ghattate ghattate tum ko is achchhee boomi ke upar se, jise tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tumhen diya haai, satyanash kar dalega." 
Joshua23:16 jab tum us vacha ko, jise tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tum ko agyaa dekar apane sath banghaaya haai, ullanghan karake paraye devataon kee upasana aur unako dandvata karane lago, tab yahova ka kop tum par bhdkega, aur tum is achchhe desh men se jise us ne tum ko diya haai shaeegha nash jo jaoge.." 
Joshua24:1 fir yahoshoo ne israael ke sab gotraen ko shakem men ikattha kiya, aur israael ke vraddh logo, aur mukhy purooshae, aur nyaayiyo, aur saradaron ko bulavaya aur ve parameshvar ke samhane upasthiat huae." 
Joshua24:2 tab yahoshoo ne un sab logon se kaha, israael ka parameshvar yahova is prakar kahata haai, ki praacheen kal men ibraaheem aur nahor ka pita terah adi, tumhare purakha parat mahanad ke us par rahate huae doosare devataon kee upasana karate the." 
Joshua24:3 aur maain ne tumhare moolapuroosh ibraaheem ko mahanad ke us par se le akar kanan desh ke sab sthanon men firaya, aur usaka vansh baddhaya. aur use isahak ko diya" 
Joshua24:4 fir maain ne isahak ko yakoob aur aesav diya. aur aesav ko maain ne seir nam pahadee desh diya ki vah usaka adhaikaree ho, parantu yakoob betton-poton samet misr ko gaya." 
Joshua24:5 fir maain ne moosa aur haroon ko bhejakar un sab kamon ke dara jo maain ne misr men kiae us desh ko mara aur usake bad tum ko nikal laya. 
Joshua24:6 aur maain tumhare purakhaon ko misr men se nikal laya, aur tum samudra ke pas pahunche aur misriyon ne rath aur savaron ko sang lekar lal samudra tak tumhara peechha kiya." 
Joshua24:7 aur jab tum ne yahova kee dohai dee tab us ne tumhare aur misriyon ke beech men aandhiayara kar diya, aur un par samudra ko bahakar unako duba diya aur jo kuchh maain ne misr men kiya use tum logon ne apanee ankhon se dekha fir tum bahut din tak jangal men rahe." 
Joshua24:8 tab maain tum ko un aemoriyon ke desh men le aya, jo yaradan ke us par base the aur ve tum se lade aur maain ne unhen tumhare vash men kar diya, aur tum unake desh ke adhaikaree ho gaa, aur maain ne unako tumhare samhane se satyanash kar dala." 
Joshua24:9 fir moab ke raja sippor ka putra balak uttkar israael se lada aur tumhen shaap dene ke liye bor ke putra bilam ko bulava bheja," 
Joshua24:10 parantu maain ne bilam kee sunane ke liye naheen kee vah tum ko ashaeesh hee ashaeesh deta gaya is prakar maain ne tum ko usake hath se bachaya. 
Joshua24:11 tab tum yaradan par hokar yareeho ke pas aa, aur jab yareeho ke log, aur aemoree, paarijjee, kananee, hittee, girgashae, hibbee, aur yaboosee tum se lade, tab maain ne unhen tumhare vash men kar diya." 
Joshua24:12 aur maain ne tumhare age barron ko bheja, aur unhon ne aemoriyon ke donon rajaon ko tumhare samhane se bhga diya dekho, yah tumharee talavar va dhanush ka kam naheen hua." 
Joshua24:13 fir maain ne tumhen aeesa desh diya jis men tum ne parishram n kiya tha, aur aeese nagar bhee diae haain jinhen tum ne n basaya tha, aur tum un men base ho aur jin dakh aur jalapai ke bageechon ke fal tum khate ho unhen tum ne naheen lagaya tha." 
Joshua24:14 isaliye ab yahova ka bhy manakar usakee seva khrai aur sachchai se karo aur jin devataon kee seva tumhare purakha mahanad ke us par aur misr men karate the, unhen door karake yahova kee seva karo." 
Joshua24:15 aur yaadi yahova kee seva karanee tumhen buree lage, to aj chun lo ki tum kis kee seva karoge, chahe un devataon kee jinakee seva tumhare purakha mahanad ke us par karate the, aur chahe aemoriyon ke devataon kee seva karo jinake desh men tum rahate ho parantu maain to apane gharane samet yahova kee seva nit karoonga." 
Joshua24:16 tab logon ne uttr diya, yahova ko tyagakar doosare devataon kee seva karanee ham se door rahe" 
Joshua24:17 kyonaki hamara parameshvar yahova vahee haai jo ham ko aur hamare purakhaon ko dasatv ke ghar, arthata misr desh se nikal le aya, aur hamare dekhte bade bade ashcharya karma kia, aur jis marga par aur jitanee jatiyon ke madhy men se ham chale ate the un men hamaree raksha kee" 
Joshua24:18 aur hamare samhane se is desh men rahanevalee aemoree aadi sab jatiyon ko nikal diya haai isaaliye ham bhee yahova kee seva karenge, kyonaki hamara parameshvar vahee haai." 
Joshua24:19 yahoshoo ne logon se kaha, tum se yahova kee seva naheen ho sakatee kyonaki vah pavitra parameshvar haai vah jalan rakhnevala ishvar haai vah tumhare aparadha aur pap kshama n karega." 
Joshua24:20 yaadi tum yahova ko tyagakar paraae devataon kee seva karane lagoge, to yapi vah tumhara bhla karata aya haai taubhee vah firakar tumharee haani karega aur tumhara ant bhee kar dalega." 
Joshua24:21 logon ne yahoshoo se kaha, naheen ham yahova hee kee seva karenge." 
Joshua24:22 yahoshoo ne logon se kaha, tum ap hee apane sakshaee ho ki tum ne yahova kee seva karanee angeekar kar lee haai. unhon ne kaha, ha, ham sakshaee haain." 
Joshua24:23 yahoshoo ne kaha, apane beech paraae devataon ko door karake apana apana man israael ke parameshvar kee or lagao." 
Joshua24:24 logon ne yahoshoo se kaha, ham to apane parameshvar yahova hee kee seva karenge, aur usee kee bat manenge." 
Joshua24:25 tab yahoshoo ne usee din un logon se vacha bandhaai, aur shakem men unake liye vidhai aur niyam ttharaya.." 
Joshua24:26 yah sara vrattant yahoshoo ne parameshvar kee vyavastha kee pustak men likh diya aur aek bada patthr chunakar vahan us banjavraksha ke tale khda kiya, jo yahova ke paavitra sthan men tha." 
Joshua24:27 tab yahoshoo ne sab logon se kaha, suno, yah patthr ham logon ka sakshaee rahega, kyonki jitane vachan yahova ne ham se kahen haain unhen is ne suna haai isaliye yah tumhara sakshaee rahega, aeesa n ho ki tum apane parameshvar se mukar jao." 
Joshua24:28 tab yahoshoo ne logon ko apane apane nij bhag par jane ke liye vida kiya.. 
Joshua24:29 in baton ke bad yahova ka das, noon ka putra yahoshoo, aek sau das varsha ka hokar mar gaya." 
Joshua24:30 aur usako timnatserah me, jo aepraaim ke pahadee desh men gash nam pahad kee uttr alang par haai, usee ke bhag men mittee dee gai." 
Joshua24:31 aur yahoshoo ke jeevan bhr, aur jo vraddh log yahoshoo ke marane ke bad jeeavit rahe aur janate the ki yahova ne israael ke liye kaaise kaaise kam kiae the, unake bhee jeevan bhr israaelee yahova hee kee seva karate rahe." 
Joshua24:32 fir yoosufa kee haddiyan jinhen israaelee misr se le aae the ve shakem kee boomi ke us bhag men gadee gai, jise yakoob ne shakem ke pita hamor se aek sau chandee ke sikkon men mol liya tha isaliye vah yoosufa kee santan ka nij bhag ho gaya." 
Joshua24:33 aur haroon ka putra aeleeajar bhee mar gaya aur usako aepraaim ke pahadee desh men us pahadee par mittee dee gai, jo usake putra peenahas ke nam par gibatpeenahas kahalatee haai aur usako de dee gai thee.." 
Judges1:1 yahoshoo ke marane ke bad israaeliyon ne yahova se poochha, ki kanaaniyon ke virooddh ladne ko hamaree or se paahile kaun chaddhai karega?" 
Judges1:2 yahova ne uttr diya, yahooda chaddhai karega suno, maain ne is desh ko usake hath men de diya haai." 
Judges1:3 tab yahooda ne apane bhai shaimon se kaha, mere sang mere bhag men a, ki ham kanaaniyon se laden aur maain bhee tere bhag men jaunga. so shaimon usake sang chala." 
Judges1:4 aur yahooda ne chaddhai kee, aur yahova ne kananiyon aur paarijjaiyon ko usake hath men kar diya tab unhon ne bejek men un men se das hajar puroosh mar dale." 
Judges1:5 aur bejek men adoneebejek ko pakar ve us se lade, aur kananiyon aur paarijjaiyon ko mar dala." 
Judges1:6 parantu adoneebejek bhaga tab unhon ne usaka peechha karake use pakad liya, aur usake hath panv ke angootte katt dale." 
Judges1:7 tab adoneebejek ne kaha, hath panv ke angootte katte huae sattr raja meree mej ke neeche ttukade beenate the jaaisa maain ne kiya tha, vaaisa hee badala parameshvar ne mujhe diya haai. tab ve use yarooshalem ko le gaae aur vahan vah mar gaya.." 
Judges1:8 aur yahoodiyon ne yarooshalem se ladkar use le liya, aur talavar se usake nivaasiyon ko mar dala, aur nagar ko foonk diya." 
Judges1:9 aur tab yahoodee pahadee desh aur dakkhian desha, aur neeche ke desh men rahanevale kanaaniyon se ladne ko gaae." 
Judges1:10 aur yahooda ne un kanaaniyon par chaddhai kee jo hebraen men rahate the hebraen ka nam to poorvakal men kiryatarba tha aur unhon ne shoshau, aheeman, aur talmaai ko mar dala." 
Judges1:11 vahan se us ne jakar dabeer ke nivaasiyon par chaddhai kee. dabeer ka nam to poorvakal men kiryatseper tha. 
Judges1:12 tab kaleb ne kaha, jo kiryatseper ko marake le le use maain apanee bettee akasa ko byah doonga." 
Judges1:13 is par kaleb ke chhotte bhai kanajee otneeael ne use le liya aur us ne use apanee bettee akasa ko byah diya. 
Judges1:14 aur jab vah otneeael ke pas ai, tab us ne usako apane pita se kuchh boomi mangane ko ubhara fir vah apane gadahe par se utaree, tab kaleb ne us se poochha, too kya chahatee haai?" 
Judges1:15 vah us se bolee mujhe ashaeervad de too ne mujhe daakkhian desh to diya haai, to jal ke sote bhee de. is prakar kaleb ne usako upar aur neeche ke donon sote de diae.." 
Judges1:16 aur moosa ke sale, aek kenee manushy ke santan, yahoodee ke sang khjoor vale nagar se yahooda ke jangal men gaae jo arad ke dakkhian kee or haai, aur jakar israael logon ke sath rahane lage." 
Judges1:17 fir yahooda ne apane bhai shaimon ke sang jakar sapat men rahanevale kanaaniyon ko mar liya, aur us nagar ko satyanash kar dala. isaliye us nagar ka nam horma pada." 
Judges1:18 aur yahooda ne charon or kee boomi samet ajja, ashakalon, aur aekron ko le liya." 
Judges1:19 aur yahova yahooda ke sath raha, isaliye us ne pahadee desh ke nivaasiyon ko nikal diya parantu tarai ke nivaasiyon ke pas lohe ke rath the, isaaliye vah unhen n nikal saka." 
Judges1:20 aur unhon ne moosa ke kahane ke anusar hebraen kaleb ko de diya: aur us ne vahan se anak ke teenon putraen ko nikal diya. 
Judges1:21 aur yarooshalem men rahanevale yaboosiyon ko binyameeaniyon ne n nikala isaaliye yaboosee aj ke din tak yarooshalem men binyameeaniyon ke sang rahate haain.. 
Judges1:22 fir yoosufa ke gharane ne betel par chaddhai kee aur yahova unake sang tha. 
Judges1:23 aur yoosufa ke gharane ne betel ka bhed lene ko log bheje. aur us nagar ka nam poorvakal men looj tha. 
Judges1:24 aur paharooon ne aek manushy ko us nagar se nikalate huae dekha, aur us se kaha, nagar men jane ka marga hamen dikha, aur ham tujh par daya karenge." 
Judges1:25 jab us ne unhen nagar men jane ka marga dikhaya, tab unhon ne nagar ko to talavar se mara, parantu us manushy ko sare gharane samet chhod diya." 
Judges1:26 us manushy ne hitiayon ke desh men jakar ek nagar basaya, aur usaka nam looj rakha aur aj ke din tak usaka nam vahee haai.." 
Judges1:27 manashsho ne apane apane ganvon samet betashaan, tanak, dor, yibalam, aur maagion ke nivaasiyon ko n nikala is prakar kananee us desh men base hee rahe." 
Judges1:28 parantu jab israaelee samarthee hua, tab unhon ne kanaaniyon se begaree lee, parantu unhen pooree reeti se n nikala.." 
Judges1:29 aur aepraaim ne gejer men rahanevale kanaaniyon ko n nikala isaaliye kananee gejer men unake beech men base rahe.. 
Judges1:30 jabaloon ne kitraen aur nahalol ke nivaasiyon ko n nikala isaaliye kananee unake beech men base rahe, aur unake vash men ho gaae.." 
Judges1:31 ashor ne akko, seedon, ahalab, akajeeb, helava, apeek, aur rahob ke nivaasiyon ke beech men bas gaae kyonki unhon ne unako n nikala tha.." 
Judges1:32 isaliye ashoree log desh ke nivasee kanaaniyon ke beech men bas gaae kyonki unhon ne unako n nikala tha.. 
Judges1:33 naptalee ne betashomesh aur betanat ke nivaasiyon ko n nikala, parantu desh ke nivasee kanaaniyon ke beech men bas gaae taubhee betashomesh aur betanat ke log unake vash men ho gaae.." 
Judges1:34 aur aemoriyon ne daaniyon ko pahadee desh men bhga diya, aur tarai men ane n diya" 
Judges1:35 isaliye aemoree heres nam pahad, ayyalon aur shaalabeem men base hee rahe, taubhee yoosufa ka gharana yahan tak prabal ho gaya ki ve unake vash men ho gaae." 
Judges1:36 aur aemoriyon ke desh ka sivana akrabbeem nam parvat kee chaddhai se arambh karake upar kee or tha.. 
Judges2:1 aur yahova ka doot gilagal se bokeem ko jakar kahane laga, ki maain ne tum ko misr se le akar is desh men pahunchaya haai, jisake vishay men maain ne tumhare purakhaon se shapath khai thee. aur maain ne kaha tha, ki jo vacha maain ne tum se bandhaee haai, use maain kabhee n tooonga" 
Judges2:2 isaliye tum is desh ke nivaasiyon se vacha n bandhana tum unakee vediyon ko ddha dena. parantu tum ne meree bat naheen manee. tum ne aeesa kyon kiya haai? 
Judges2:3 isaliye maain kahata hoo, ki maain un logon ko tumhare samhane se n nikaloonga aur ve tumhare panjar men kantte, aur unake devata tumhare liye fande ttharenge." 
Judges2:4 jab yahova ke doot ne sare israaeliyon se ye baten kahee, tab ve log chilla chillakar rone lage." 
Judges2:5 aur unhon ne us sthan ka nam bokeem rakha. aur vahan unhon ne yahova ke liye baali chaddhaya.. 
Judges2:6 jab yahoshoo ne logon ko vida kiya tha, tab israaelee desh ko apane adhaikar men kar lene ke liye apane apane nij bhag par gaae." 
Judges2:7 aur yahoshoo ke jeevan bhr, aur un vraddh logon ke jeevan bhr jo yahoshoo ke marane ke bad jeeavit rahe aur dekh chuke the ki yahova ne israael ke liye kaaise kaaise bade kam kiae haai, israaelee log yahova kee seva karate rahe." 
Judges2:8 nidan yahova ka das noon ka putra yahoshoo aek sau das varsha ka hokar mar gaya. 
Judges2:9 aur usako timnatheres men jo aepraaim ke pahadee desh men gash nam pahad kee uttr alang par haai, usee ke bhag men mittee dee gai." 
Judges2:10 aur us peeddhee ke sab log bhee apane apane pitaron men mil gaae tab usake bad jo doosaree peeddhee hui usake log n to yahova ko janate the aur n us kam ko jo us ne israael ke liye kiya tha.. 
Judges2:11 isaliye israaelee vah karane lage jo yahova kee drashtti men bura haai, aur bal nam devataon kee upasana karane lage" 
Judges2:12 ve apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova ko, jo unhen misr desh se nikal laya tha, tyagakar paraye devataon kee upasana karane lage, aur unhen dandvata kiya aur yahova ko ris dilai." 
Judges2:13 ve yahova ko tyag kar ke bal devataon aur ashatoret deviyon kee upasana karane lage. 
Judges2:14 isaliye yahova ka kop israaeliyon par bhdk utta, aur us ne unako lutteron ke hath men kar diya jo unhen loottne lage aur us ne unako charon or ke shatrauon ke adhaeen kar diya aur ve fir apane shatrauon ke samhane tthar n sake." 
Judges2:15 jahan kaheen ve bahar jate vahan yahova ka hath unakee burai men laga rahata tha, jaaise yahova ne un se kaha tha, varan yahova ne shapath khai thee is prakar se bade sankatt men pad gaae." 
Judges2:16 taubhee yahova unake liye nyayee ttharata tha jo unhen loottnevale ke hath se chhudate the. 
Judges2:17 parantu ve apane nyaayiyon kee bhee naheen manate the varan vyabhaichaarin kee nain paraye devataon ke peechhe chalate aur unhen dandvata karate the unake poorvaj jo yahova kee agyaaaen manate the, unakee us leek ko unhon ne shaeegha hee chhod diya? aur unake anusar n kiya." 
Judges2:18 aur jab jab yahova unake liye nyayee ko ttharata tab tab vah us nyayee ke sang rahakar usake jeevan bhr unhen shatrauon ke hath se chhudata tha kyonki yahova unaka karahana jo andhor aur upadrav karanevalon ke karan hota tha sunakar du:khee tha. 
Judges2:19 parantu jab nyayee mar jata, tab ve fir paraye devataon ke peechhe chalakar unakee upasana karate, aur unhen dandvata karake apane purakhaon se adhaik bigad jate the aur apane bure kamon aur hatteelee chal ko naheen chhodte the." 
Judges2:20 isaliye yahova ka kop israael par bhdk utta aur us ne kaha, is jati ne us vacha ko jo maain ne unake poorvajon se bandhaee thee tod diya, aur meree bat naheen manee," 
Judges2:21 is karan jin jatiyon ko yahoshoo marate samay chhod gaya haai un men se maain ab kisee ko unake samhane se n nikaloonga 
Judges2:22 jis se unake dara maain israaeliyon kee pareeksha karoo, ki jaaise unake poorvaj mere marga par chalate the vaaise hee ye bhee chalenge ki naheen." 
Judges2:23 isaliye yahova ne un jaatiyon ko aekaaek n nikala, varan rahane diya, aur us ne unhen yahoshoo ke hath men bhee unako n saunpa tha.." 
Judges3:1 israaeliyon men se jitane kanan men kee ladaiyon men bhagee n huae the, unhen parakhne ke liye yahova ne in jaatiyon ko desh men isaaliye rahane diya" 
Judges3:2 ki peeddhee peeddhee ke israaeliyon men se jo ladai ko pahile n janate the ve seekhe, aur jan le," 
Judges3:3 arthata pancho saradaron samet paalishtaiyo, aur sab kanaaniyo, aur seedoniyo, aur balahermon nam pahad se lekar hamat kee tarai tak labanon parvat men rahanevale hivvaiyon ko." 
Judges3:4 ye isaliye rahane paae ki unake dara israaeliyon kee bat men pareeksha ho, ki jo agyaaaen yahova ne moosa ke dara unake poorvajon ko dilai thee, unhen ve manenge va naheen." 
Judges3:5 isaliye israaelee kananiyo, hitiayo, aemoriyo, parijjaiyo, hivvaiyo, aur yaboosiyon ke beech men bas gaae" 
Judges3:6 tab ve unakee beattyaian byah men lene lage, aur apanee bettyaian unake betton ko byah me dene lage aur unake devataon kee bhee upasana karane lage.." 
Judges3:7 is prakar israaeliyon ne yahova kee draashtti men bura kiya, aur apane parameshvar yahova ko boolakar bal nam devataon aur ashora nam deaviyon kee upasana karane lag gaae." 
Judges3:8 tab yahova ka krodha israaeliyon par bhdka, aur us ne unako aramnaharaaim ke raja kooshatraishaataaim ke adhaeen kar diya so israaelee att varsha tak kooshatraishaataaim ke adhaeen men rahe." 
Judges3:9 tab israaeliyon ne yahova kee dohai dee, aur usane israaeliyon ke liye kaleb ke chhotte bhai otneeael nam aek kanajee chhudanevale ko ttharaya, aur us ne unako chhudaya." 
Judges3:10 us men yahova ka atma samaya, aur vah israeliyon ka nyayee ban gaya, aur ladne ko nikala, aur yahova ne aram ke raja kooshatraishaataaim ko usake hath men kar diya aur vah kooshaatraishaataaim par jayavant hua." 
Judges3:11 tab chalees varsha tak desh men shaaantai banee rahee. aur unheen dinon men kanjee otneeael mar gaya.. 
Judges3:12 tab israaeliyon ne fir yahova kee drashtti men bura kiya aur yahova ne moab ke raja aeglon ko israael par prabal kiya, kyonaki unhon ne yahova kee drashtti men bura kiya tha." 
Judges3:13 isaliye us ne ammoniyon aur amaleakiyon ko apane pas ikattha kiya, aur jakar israael ko mar liya aur khjooravale nagar ko apane vash men kar liya." 
Judges3:14 tab israaelee attarah varsha tak moab ke raja aeglon ke adhaeen men rahe. 
Judges3:15 fir israaeliyon ne yahova kee dohai dee, aur us ne gera ke putra aehood nam aek binyameenee ko unaka chhudanevala ttharaya vah baaihattha tha. israaeliyon ne usee ke hath se moab ke raja aeglon ke pas kuchh bhentt bhejee." 
Judges3:16 aehood ne hath bhr lambee aek dodhaaree talavar banavai thee, aur usako apane vasr ke neeche daahinee jangha par lattka liya." 
Judges3:17 tab vah us bhentt ko moab ke raja aeglon ke pas jo bada motta puroosh tha le gaya. 
Judges3:18 jab vah bhentt ko de chuka, tab bhentt ke lanevale ko vida kiya." 
Judges3:19 parantu vah ap gilagal ke nikatt kee khudee hui mooraton ke pas lautt gaya, aur aeglon ke pas kahala bheja, ki he raja, mujhe tujh se aek bhed kee bat kahanee haai. tab raja ne kaha, thodee der ke liye bahar jao. tab jitane log usake pas upaasthiat the ve sab bahar chale gaae." 
Judges3:20 tab aehood usake pas gaya vah to apanee aek havadar attaree men akela baaitta tha. aehood ne kaha, parameshvar kee or se mujhe tujh se aek bat kahanee haai. tab vah gaee par se utt khda hua." 
Judges3:21 itane men aehood ne apana bayan hath baddhakar apanee daahinee jangha par se talavar kheenchakar usakee tond men ghaused dee 
Judges3:22 aur fal ke peechhe moott bhee paaitt gai, or fal charbee men dhansa raha, kyonaki us ne talavar ko usakee tond men se n nikala varan vah usake arapar nikal gai." 
Judges3:23 tab aehood chhjje se nikalakar bahar gaya, aur attaree ke kivad kheenchakar usako band karake tala laga diya." 
Judges3:24 usake nikal jate hee raja ke das aa, to kya dekhte haai, ki attaree ke kivadon men tala laga haai is karan ve bole, ki nishchay vah havadar kottree men laghaushanka karata hoga." 
Judges3:25 ve batt johate johate laajjait ho gaae tab yah dekhkar ki vah attaree ke kivad naheen kholata, unhon ne kunjee lekar kivad khole to kya dekha, ki unaka svamee boomi par mara pada haai." 
Judges3:26 jab tak ve soch vichar kar hee rahe the tab tak aehood bhag nikala, aur koodee hui mooraton kee paralee or hokar seire men jakar sharan lee." 
Judges3:27 vahan pahunchakar us ne aepraaim ke pahadee desh men naraasinga foonka tab israaelee usake sang hokar pahadee desh se usake peechhe peechhe neeche gaae. 
Judges3:28 aur us ne un se kaha, mere peechhe peechhe chale ao kyonaki yahova ne tumhare moabee shatrauon ko tumhare hath men kar diya haai. tab unhon ne usake peechhe peechhe jake yaradan ke ghaatton ko jo moab desh kee or haai le liya, aur kisee ko utarane n diya." 
Judges3:29 us samay unhon ne koi das hajar moaabiyon ko mar dala ve sab ke sab shtt pushtt aur shooraveer the, parantu un men se ek bhee n bacha." 
Judges3:30 is prakar us samay moab israael ke hath ke tale dab gaya. tab assee varsha tak desh men shaantai banee rahee.. 
Judges3:31 usake bad anat ka putra shamagar hua, us ne chh: sau palishtee purooshaen ko baail ke paaine se mar dala is karan vah bhee israel ka chhudanevala hua.." 
Judges4:1 jab aehood mar gaya tab israaeliyon ne fir yahova kee drashtti men bura kiya. 
Judges4:2 isaliye yahova ne unako hasor men virajanevale kanan ke raja yabeen ke adhaeen men kar diya, jisaka senapati seesara tha, jo anyajaatiyon kee haroshot ka nivasee tha." 
Judges4:3 tab israaeliyon ne yahova kee dohai dee kyonaki seesara ke pas lohe ke nau sau rath the, aur vah israaeliyon par bees varsha tak bada andhor karata raha." 
Judges4:4 us samay lappeedot kee sree dabora jo naabiya thee israeliyon ka nyay karatee thee. 
Judges4:5 vah aepraaim ke pahadee desh men rama aur betel ke beech men dabora ke khjoor ke tale baaitta karatee thee, aur israaelee usake pas nyay ke liye jaya karate the." 
Judges4:6 us ne abeenoam ke putra barak ko kedesh naptalee men se bulakar kaha, kya israel ke parameshvar yahova ne yah agyaa naheen dee, ki too jakar tabor pahad par chaddh aur naptaaliyon aur jaboolooniyon men ke das hajar purooshaen ko sang le ja?" 
Judges4:7 tab maain yabeen ke senapaati seesara ke rathon aur bheedbhad samet keeshaen nadee tak teree or kheench le aunga aur usako tere hath men kar doonga. 
Judges4:8 barak ne us se kaha, yaadi too mere sang chalegee to maain jaunga, naheen to n jaunga." 
Judges4:9 us ne kaha, ni:sandeh maain tere sang chaloongee taubhee yah yatra se teree to kuchh baddhai n hogee, kyonaki yahova seesara ko ek sree ke adhaeen kar dega. tab dabora uttkar barak ke sang kedesh ko gai." 
Judges4:10 tab barak ne jabooloon aur naptalee ke logon ko kedesh men bulava liya aur usake peechhe das hajar puroosh chaddh gaae aur dabora usake sang chaddh gai. 
Judges4:11 heber nam kenee ne un keaniyon men se, jo moosa ke sale hobab ke vansh ke the, apane ko alag karake kedesh ke pas ke sananneem ke banjavraksha tak jakar apana dera vaheen dala th." 
Judges4:12 jab seesara ko yah samachar mila ki abeenoam ka putra barak tabor pahad par chaddh gaya haai," 
Judges4:13 tab seesara ne apane sab rat, jo lohe ke nau sau rath the, aur apane sang kee saree sena ko anyajaatiyon ke haroshot ke keeshaen nadee par bulavaya." 
Judges4:14 tab dabora ne barak se kaha, utt! kyonki aj vah din haai jis men yahova seesara ko tere hath men kar dega. kya yahova tere age naheen nikala haai? is par barak aur usake peechhe peechhe das hajar puroosh tabor pahad se utar pade." 
Judges4:15 tab yahova ne sare rathon varan saree sena samet seesara ko talavar se barak ke samhane ghabara diya aur seesara rath par se utarake panv panv bhag chala. 
Judges4:16 aur barak ne anyajaatiyon ke haroshot tak rathon aur sena ka peechha kiya, aur talavar se seesara kee saree sena nashtt kee gai aur aek bhee manushy n bacha.." 
Judges4:17 parantu seesara panv panv heber kenee kee sree yaael ke dere ko bhag gaya kyonki hasor ke raja yabeen aur heber kenee men mel tha. 
Judges4:18 tab yaael seesara kee bhentt ke liye nikalakar us se kahane lagee, he mere prabhu, a, mere pas a, aur n dra. tab vah usake pas dere men gaya, aur us ne usake upar kambal dal diya." 
Judges4:19 tab seesara ne us se kaha, mujhe pyas lagee haai, mujhe thoda panee pila. tab us ne doodha kee kuppee kholakar use doodha pilaya, aur usako oddha diya." 
Judges4:20 tab us ne us se kaha, dere ke dar par khdee rah, aur yadi koi akar tujh se poochhe, ki yahan koi puroosh haai? tab kahana, koi bhee naheen."
