Judges4:21 isake bad heber kee sree yaael ne dere kee aek koonttee lee, aur apane hath men aek hathauda bhee liya, aur dabe panv usake pas jakar koonttee ko usakee kalapattee men aeesa ttok diya ki koonttee par hokar boomi men dhans gai vah to thka tha hee isaliye gaharee neend men so raha tha. so vah mar gaya." 
Judges4:22 jab barak seesara ka peechha karata hua aya, tab yaael us se bhentt karane ke liye nikalee, aur kaha, idhar a, jisaka too khojee haai usako maain tujhe dikhaungee. tab us ne usake sath jakar kya dekha ki seesara mara pada haai, aur vah koonttee usakee kanapattee men gadee haai." 
Judges4:23 is prakar parameshvar ne us din kanan ke raja yabeen ko israaeliyon ke samhane neecha dikhaya. 
Judges4:24 aur israaelee kanan ke raja yabeen par prabal hote gaa, yahan tak ki unhon ne kanan ke raja yabeen ko nashtt kar dala.." 
Judges5:1 usee din dabora aur abeenoam ke putra barak ne yah geet gaya," 
Judges5:2 ki israael ke aguvon ne jo aguvai kee aur praja jo apanee hee ichchha se bhratee hui, isake liye yahova ko dhany kaho!" 
Judges5:3 he rajao, suno he adhaipaatiyon kan lagao, maain ap yahova ke liye geet gaungee israael ke parameshvar yahova ka maain bhjan karoongee.." 
Judges5:4 he yahova, jab too seir se nikal chala, jab too ne aedom ke desh se prasthan kiya, tab prathvee dol uttee, aur akash toott pada, badal se bhee jal barasane laga.." 
Judges5:5 yahova ke pratap se pahad, israael ke parameshvar yahova ke pratap se vah seenaai pighalakar bahane laga." 
Judges5:6 anat ke putra shamagar ke dinon me, aur yaael ke dinon men sadken soonee padee thee, aur battohee pagadanadyaien se chalate the.." 
Judges5:7 jab tak maain dabora n uttee, jab tak maain israael men mata hokar n uttee, tab tak ganv soone pade the.." 
Judges5:8 naye naye devata mane gaa, us samay faattkon men ladai hotee thee. kya chalees hajar israaeliyon men bhee ddhal va barchhee kaheen dekhne men atee thee?" 
Judges5:9 mera man israael ke haakimon kee or laga haai, jo praja ke beech men apanee hee ichchha se bhratee hue. yahova ko dhany kaho.." 
Judges5:10 he ujalee gadahiyon par chaddhnevalo, he fasharen par virajanevalo, dhyan rakho.." 
Judges5:11 paraghatton ke as pas dhanudharaariyon kee bat ke kara, vahan ve yahova ke dharmamay kamon ka, israael ke liye usake dharmamay kamon ka bakhan karenge. us samay yahova kee praja ke log faattkon ke pas gaae.." 
Judges5:12 jag, jag, he dabora! jag, jag, geet suna! he barak, ut, he abeenoam ke putra, apane bandhauon ko bandhauai men le chala." 
Judges5:13 us samay thode se rais praja samet utar pade yahova shooraveeron ke virooddh mere hit utar aya. 
Judges5:14 aepraaim men se ve aae jisakee jad amalek men haai he binyameen, tere peechhe tere dalon me, makeer men se haakim, aur jabooloon men se senapaati dand liae huae utare" 
Judges5:15 aur issakar ke hakim dabora ke sang hua, jaaisa issakar vaaisa hee barak bhee tha usake peechhe lage huae ve tarai men jhpattkar gaae. rooben kee naadiyon ke pas bade bade kam man men ttane gaae.." 
Judges5:16 too charavahon ka seettee bajana sunane ko bhedshaalon ke beech kyon baaitta raha? rooben kee nadiyon ke pas bade bade kam soche gaae.. 
Judges5:17 gilad yaradan par rah gaya aur dan kyon jahajon men rah gaya? ashor samudra ke teer par baaitta raha, aur usakee khadiyon ke pas rah gaya.." 
Judges5:18 jabaloon apane praan par khelanevale log tthare naptalee bhee desh ke unche unche sthanon par vaaisa hee tthara. 
Judges5:19 raja akar lade, us samay kanan ke raja magio ke soton ke pas tanak men lade par roopayon ka kuchh labh n paya.." 
Judges5:20 akash kee or se bhee ladai hui varan taraon ne apane apane mandl se seesara se ladai kee.. 
Judges5:21 keeshaen nadee ne unako baha diya, arthata vahee praacheen nadee jo keeshaen nadee haai. he man, hiyav bandho age baddh.." 
Judges5:22 us samay ghaede ke khuron se ttap ka shabd hone laga, unake baalishtt ghaedon ke koodane se yah hooa.." 
Judges5:23 yahova ka doot kahata haai, ki meroj ko shaap do, usake nivaasiyon ko bharee shaap do, kyonaki ve yahova kee sahayata karane ko, shooraveeron ke virooddh yahova kee sahayata karane ko n aae.." 
Judges5:24 sab striayon men se kenee heber kee sree yaael dhany ttharegee deron men se rahanevalee sab striayon men vah dhany ttharegee.. 
Judges5:25 seesara ne panee manga, us ne doodha diya, raison ke yogy bartan men vah makkhn le ai.." 
Judges5:26 us ne apana hath koonttee kee or apana dahina hath baddhi ke hathaude kee or baddhaya aur hathaude se seesara ko mara, usake sir ko faod dala, aur usakee kanapattee ko arapar chhed diya.." 
Judges5:27 us sree ke panvo par vah jhuka, vah gira, vah pada raha us sree ke panvo par vah jhuka, vah gira jahan jhuka, vaheen mara pada raha.." 
Judges5:28 khaidkee men se aek sree jhankakar chillai, seesara kee mata ne jhlaimilee kee ott se pukara, ki usake rath ke ane men itanee der kyon lagee? usake rathon ke pahiyon ko aber kyon hui haai?" 
Judges5:29 usee buddhmaian praatishttit striayon ne use uttr diya, varan us ne apane ap ko is prakar uttr diya," 
Judges5:30 ki kya unhon ne loott pakar bantt naheen lee? kya aek aek puroosh ko aek aek varan do do kunvaariyan aur seesara ko range huae vasr kee loot, varan bootte kaddhe huae rangeele vasr kee loot, aur lootte huon ke gale men donon or bootte kaddhe huae rangeele vasr naheen mile?" 
Judges5:31 he yahova, tere sab shatra aeese hee nash ho jaaen! parantu usake praemee log pratap ke sath uday hote huae soorya ke saman tejomay hon.. fir desh men chalees varsha tak shaantai rahee.." 
Judges6:1 tab israaeliyon ne yahova kee draashtti men bura kiya, isaliye yahova ne unhen midhaaniyon ke vash men sat varsha kar rakha." 
Judges6:2 aur midhanee israaeliyon par prabal ho gaae. midhaaniyon ke dr ke mare israaeliyon ne pahadon ke gahire khddo, aur gufaao, aur kilon ko apane nivas bana liae." 
Judges6:3 aur jab jab israaelee beej bote tab tab midhanee aur amalekee aur poorvee log unake virooddh chaddhai karake 
Judges6:4 ajja tak chhavanee dal dalakar boomi kee upaj nash kar dalate the, aur israaeliyon ke liye n to kuchh bhojanavastu, aur n bhed-bakaree, aur n gaya-baail, aur n gadaha chhodte the." 
Judges6:5 kyonaki ve apane pashuuon aur doron ko liae huae chaddhai karate, aur ttiiddayon ke dal ke saman bahut ate the aur unake untt bhee anaaginat hote the aur ve desh ko ujadne ke liye us men aya karate the." 
Judges6:6 aur midhaaniyon ke karan israaelee badee durdasha men pad gaae tab israaeliyon ne yahova kee dohai dee.. 
Judges6:7 jab israaeliyon ne midhaaniyon ke karan yahova kee dohai dee," 
Judges6:8 tab yahova ne israaeliyon ke pas aek nabee ko bheja, jis ne un se kaha, israael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain tum ko misr men se le aya, aur dasatv ke ghar se nikal le aya" 
Judges6:9 aur maain ne tum ko misriyon ke hath se, varan jitane tum par andhor karate the un sabhon ke hath se chhudaya, aur unako tumhare samhane se barabas nikalakar unaka desh tumhen de diya" 
Judges6:10 aur maain ne tum se kaha, ki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoon aemoree log jinake desh men tum rahate ho unake devataon ka bhy n manana. parantu tum ne mera kahana naheen mana.." 
Judges6:11 fir yahova ka doot akar us banjavraksha ke tale baaitt gaya, jo opra men abeeaejeree yoash ka tha, aur usaka putra gidon aek dakhras ke kund men gehoon isaaliye jhad raha tha ki use midhaaniyon se chhpai rakhe." 
Judges6:12 usako yahova ke doot ne darshan dekar kaha, he shooraveer soorama, yahova tere sang haai." 
Judges6:13 gidon ne us se kaha, he mere prabhu, binatee sun, yaadi yahova hamare sang hota, to ham par yah sab vipaati kyon padtee? aur jitane ashcharyakarmon ka varnn hamare purakha yah kahakar karate the, ki kya yahova ham ko misr se chhuda naheen laya, ve kahan rahe? ab to yahova ne ham ko tyag diya, aur midhaaniyon ke hath kar diya haai." 
Judges6:14 tab yahova ne us par draashtti karake kaha, apanee isee shaktai par ja aur too israaeliyon ko midhaaniyon ke hath se chhudaaega kya maain ne tujhe naheen bheja?" 
Judges6:15 us ne kaha, he mere prabhu, binatee sun, maain israel ko kyonkar chhudau? dek, mera kul manashsho men sab se kangal haai, fir maain apane pita ke gharane men sab se chhotta hoon." 
Judges6:16 yahova ne us se kaha, nishchay maain tere sang rahoonga so too midhaaniyon ko aeesa mar lega jaaisa aek manushy ko." 
Judges6:17 gidon ne us se kaha, yadi tera anugrah mujh par ho, to mujhe isaka koi chinh dikha ki too hee mujh se baten kar raha haai." 
Judges6:18 jab tak maain tere pas fir akar apanee bhentt nikalakar tere samhane n rakoo, tab tak too yahan se n ja. us ne kaha, maain tere lauttne tak tthara rahoonga." 
Judges6:19 tab gidon ne jakar bakaree ka aek bachcha aur aek aepa maaide kee akhmeeree rottyaian taaiyar keen tab mans ko ttokaree me, aur joos ko tasale men rakhkar banjavraksha ke tale usake pas le jakar diya." 
Judges6:20 parameshvar ke doot ne us se kaha, mans aur akhmeeree rottyaien ko lekar is chattan par rakh de, aur joos ko undel de. us ne aeesa hee kiya." 
Judges6:21 tab yahova ke doot ne apane hath kee lattee ko baddhakar mans aur akhmeeree rottyaien ko chooa aur chattan se ag nikalee jis se mans aur akhmeeree rottyaian bhsm ho gai tab yahova ka doot usakee drashtti se antaradhyan ho gaya. 
Judges6:22 jab gidon ne jan liya ki vah yahova ka doot tha, tab gidon kahane laga, hay, prabhu yahova! maain ne to yahova ke doot ko sakshaat dekha haai." 
Judges6:23 yahova ne us se kaha, tujhe shaantai mile mat dr, too n marega." 
Judges6:24 tab gidon ne vahan yahova kee aek vedee banakar usaka nam yahova shaalom rakha. vah aj ke din tak abeeaejeriyon ke opra men banee haai. 
Judges6:25 fir usee rat ko yahova ne gidon se kaha, apane pita ka javan baail, arthata doosara sat varsha ka baail le, aur bal kee jo vedee tere pita kee haai use gira de, aur jo ashora devee usake pas haai use katt dala" 
Judges6:26 aur us draddh sthan kee chottee par ttharai hui reeti se apane parameshvar yahova kee aek vedee bana tab us doosare baail ko le, aur us ashora kee lakadee jo too katt dalega jalakar homabaali chaddha." 
Judges6:27 tab gidon ne apane sang das dason ko lekar yahova ke vachan ke anusar kiya parantu apane pita ke gharane aur nagar ke logon ke dr ke mare vah kam din ko n kar saka, isaaliye rat men kiya." 
Judges6:28 bihan ko nagar ke log savere uttkar kya dekhte haai, ki bal kee vedee giree padee haai, aur usake pas kee ashora kattee padee haai, aur doosara baail banai hui vedee par chaddhaya hua haai." 
Judges6:29 tab ve apas men kahane lage, yah kam kis ne kiya? aur poochhpachh aur ddoonddh-ddhanddh karake ve kahane lage, ki yah yoash ke putra gidon ka kam haai." 
Judges6:30 tab nagar ke manushyon ne yoash se kaha, apane putra ko bahar le a, ki mar dala jaa, kyonaki us ne bal kee vedee ko gira diya haai, aur usake pas kee ashora ko bhee katt dala haai." 
Judges6:31 yoash ne un sabhon se jo usake samhane khde huae the kaha, kya tum bal ke liye vad vivad karoge? kya tum use bachaoge? jo koi usake liye vad vivad kare vah mar dala jaaega. bihan tak tthare raho tab tak yadi vah parameshvar ho, to jis ne usakee vedee girai haai us se vah ap hee apana vad vivad kare." 
Judges6:32 isaliye us din gidon ka nam yah kahakar yaroobbal rakha gaya, ki is ne jo bal kee vedee girai haai to is par bal ap vad vivad kar le.." 
Judges6:33 isake bad sab midhanee aur amalekee aur poorvee ikatthe hua, aur par akar yijrael kee tarai men dere dale." 
Judges6:34 tab yahova ka atma gidon men samaya aur us ne narasinga foonka, tab abeeaejeree usakee sunane ke liye ikatthe huae." 
Judges6:35 fir us ne kul manashsho ke pas apane doot bheje aur ve bhee usake sameep ikatthe hue. aur us ne ashor, jabooloon, aur naptalee ke pas bhee doot bheje tab ve bhee us se milane ko chale aae." 
Judges6:36 tab gidon ne parameshvar se kaha, yadi too apane vachan ke anusar israael ko mere dara chhudaaega," 
Judges6:37 to sun, maain aek bhedee kee un khalihan men rakoonga, aur yaadi os keval us un par pade, aur use chhod saree boomi sookhee rah jaa, to maain jan loonga ki too apane vachan ke anusar israael ko mere dara chhudaaega." 
Judges6:38 aur aeesa hee hua. isaliye jab us ne bihan ko sabere uttkar us un ko dabakar us men se os nichodee, tab aek kattora bhr gaya." 
Judges6:39 fir gidon ne parameshvar se kaha, yadi maain aek bar fir kahoo, to tera krodha mujh par n bhdke maain is un se aek bar aur bhee teree pareeksha karoo, arthata keval un hee sookhee rahe, aur saree boomi par os pade." 
Judges6:40 is rat ko paramashevar ne aeesa hee kiya arthata keval un hee sookhee rah gai, aur saree boomi par os padee.." 
Judges7:1 tab gidon jo yaroobbal bhee kahalata haai aur sab log jo usake sang the savere utte, aur harod nam sote ke pas apane dere khde kiae aur midhaaniyon kee chhavanee unakee uttree or more nam pahadee ke pas tarai men padee thee.." 
Judges7:2 tab yahova ne gidon se kaha, jo log tere sang haain ve itane haain ki maain midhaaniyon ko unake hath naheen kar sakata, naheen to israael yah kahakar mere virooddh apanee badai marane lage, ki ham apane hee bhujabal ke dara bache haain." 
Judges7:3 isaliye too jakar logon men yah prachar karake suna de, ki jo koi dr ke mare thrathrata ho, vah gilad pahad se lauttkar chala jaae. tab bais hajar log lautt gaa, aur keval das hajar rah gaae." 
Judges7:4 fir yahova ne gidon se kaha, ab bhee log adhaik haain unhen sote ke pas neeche le chal, vahan maain unhen tere liye parakoonga aur jis jisake vishay men maain tujh se kahoo, ki yah tere sang chale, vah to tere sang chale aur jis jisake vishay me maain kahoo, ki yah tere sang n jaa, vah n jaae." 
Judges7:5 tab vah unako sote ke pas neeche le gaya vahan yahova ne gidon se kaha, jitane kutte kee nai jeebh se panee chapad chapad karake peeaen unako alag rakh aur vaaisa hee unhen bhee jo ghauttne ttekakar peeaen." 
Judges7:6 jinhon ne munh men hath laga chapad chapad karake panee piya unakee to ginatee teen sau ttharee aur bakee sab logon ne ghauttne ttekakar panee piya. 
Judges7:7 tab yahova ne gidon se kaha, in teen sau chapad chapad karake peenevalon ke dara maain tum ko chhudaunga, aur midhaaniyon ko tere hath men kar doonga aur sab log apane apane sthan ko lautt jaae." 
Judges7:8 tab un logon ne hath men seedha aur apane apane narasinge liae aur us ne israael ke sab purooshaen ko apane apane dere kee or bhej diya, parantu un teen sau purooshaen ko apane pas rakh chhoda aur midhan kee chhavanee usake neeche tarai men padee thee.." 
Judges7:9 usee rat ko yahova ne us se kaha, ut, chhavanee par chaddhai kara kyonki maain use tere hath kar deta hoon." 
Judges7:10 parantu yadi too chaddhai karate drata ho, to apane sevak foora ko sang lekar chhavanee ke pas jakar sun," 
Judges7:11 ki ve kya kah rahe haai usake bad tujhe us chhavanee par chaddhai karane ka hiyav hoga. tab vah apane sevak foora ko sang le un hathaiyara-bandon ke pas jo chhavanee kee chhor par the utar gaya. 
Judges7:12 midhanee aur amalekee aur sab poorvee log to ttiiddayon ke saman bahut se tarai men faaile pade the aur unake untt samudrateer ke baloo ke kinakon ke saman ginatee se bahar the. 
Judges7:13 jab gidon vahan aya, tab aek jan apane kisee sangee se apana svapn yon kah raha tha, ki sun, maain ne svapn men kya dekha haai ki jau kee aek rottee luddhkate luddhkate midhan kee chhavanee men ai, aur dere ko aeesa ttkkar mara ki vah gir gaya, aur usako aeesa ulatt diya, ki dera gira pada raha." 
Judges7:14 usake sangee ne uttr diya, yah yoash ke putra gidon nam ek israelee puroosh kee talavar ko chhod kuchh naheen haai usee ke hath men parameshvar ne midhan ko saree chhavanee samet kar diya haai.." 
Judges7:15 us svapn ka varnn aur fal sunakar gidon ne dandvata kee aur israel kee chhavanee men lauttkar kaha, utto, yahova ne midhanee sena ko tumhare vash men kar diya haai." 
Judges7:16 tab us ne un teen sau purooshaen ke teen jhund kia, aur aek aek puroosh ke hath men aek narasinga aur khalee ghada diya, aur ghadon ke bheetar aek mashaal thee." 
Judges7:17 fir us ne un se kaha, mujhe dekho, aur vaaisa hee karo suno, jab maain us chhavanee kee chhor par pahunchoo, tab jaaisa maain karoon vaaisa hee tum bhee karana." 
Judges7:18 arthata jab maain aur mere sab sangee narasinga foonken tab tum bhee chhavanee kee charon or naraasinge foonkana, aur lalakarana, ki yahova kee aur gidon kee talavara.." 
Judges7:19 beechavale pahar ke aadi men jyonhee paharooon kee badalee ho gai thee tyoheen gidon apane sang ke sau purooshaen samet chhavanee kee chhor par gaya aur narasinge ko foonk diya aur apane hath ke ghadon ko tod dala. 
Judges7:20 tab teenon jhundon ne naraasingon ko foonka aur ghadon ko tod dala aur apane apane baaen hath men mashaal aur daahine hath men foonkane ko narasinga liae huae chilla utte, yahova kee talavar aur gidon kee talavara." 
Judges7:21 tab ve chhavanee ke charon or apane apane sthan par khde rahe, aur sab sena ke log daudne lage aur unhon ne chilla chillakar unhen bhga diya." 
Judges7:22 aur unhon ne teen sau narasingon ko foonka, aur yahova ne aek aek puroosh kee talavar usake sangee par aur sab sena par chalavai to sena ke log sarera kee or betaashaitta tab aur tabbat ke pas ke abelamahola tak bhag gaae." 
Judges7:23 tab israaelee puroosh naptalee aur ashor aur manashsho ke sare desh se ikatthe hokar midhaaniyon ke peechhe pade. 
Judges7:24 aur gidon ne aepraaim ke sab pahadee desh men yah kahane ko doot bhej dia, ki midhaaniyon se muttbhed karane ko chale ao, aur yaradan nadee ke ghaatton ko betabara tak un se pahile apane vash men kar lo. tab sab aepraaimee purooshaen ne ikatthe hokar yaradan nadee ko betabara tak apane vash men kar liya." 
Judges7:25 aur unhon ne oreb aur jeb nam midhan ke do haakimon ko pakada aur oreb ko oreb nam chattan par, aur jeb ko jeb nam dakhras ke kund par ghaat kiya aur ve midhaaniyon ke peechhe pade aur oreb aur jeb ke sir yaradan ke par gidon ke pas le gaae.." 
Judges8:1 tab aepraaimee purooshaen ne gidane se kaha, too ne hamare sath aeesa bartav kyon kiya haai, ki jab too midhan se ladne ko chala tab ham ko naheen bulavaya? so unhon ne us se bada jhgada kiya." 
Judges8:2 us ne un se kaha, maain ne tumhare saman bhla ab kiya hee kya haai? kya epraaim kee chhodee hui dakh bhee abeeejer kee sab fasal se achchhee naheen haai?" 
Judges8:3 tumhare hee hathon men parameshvar ne orab aur jeb nam midhan ke haakimon ko kar diya tab tumhare barabar maain kar hee kya saka? jab us ne yah bat kahee, tab unaka jee usakee or se ttnda ho gaya.." 
Judges8:4 tab gidon aur usake sang teenon sau puroosha, jo thke mande the taubhee khdedte hee rahe the, yaradan ke teer akar par ho gaae." 
Judges8:5 tab us ne sukkot ke logon se kaha, mere peechhe in anevalon ko rottyaian do, kyonaki ye thke mande haain aur maain midhan ke jebah aur salmunna nam rajaon ka peechha kar raha hoon." 
Judges8:6 sukkot ke haakimon ne uttr diya, kya jebah aur salmunna tere hath men pad chuke haai, ki ham teree sena ko rottee de?" 
Judges8:7 gidon ne kaha, jab yahova jebah aur salmunna ko mere hath men kar dega, tab maain is bat ke karan tum ko jangal ke katteele aur bichchoo pedon se nuchavaunga." 
Judges8:8 vahan se vah panooael ko gaya, aur vahan ke logon se aeesee hee bat kahee aur panooael ke logon ne sukkot ke logon ka sa uttr diya." 
Judges8:9 us ne panooel ke logon se kaha, jab maain kushal se lautt aunga, tab is gummatt ko ddha doonga.." 
Judges8:10 jebah aur salmunna to kakorr men the, aur unake sath koi pandrah hajar purooshaen kee sena thee, kyonki poorviyon kee saree sena men se utane hee rah gaae the jo mare gaae the ve aek lakh bees hajar haathaiyaraband the." 
Judges8:11 tab gidon ne nobah aur yogbaha ke poorva kee or deron men rahanevalon ke marga men chaddhkar us sena ko jo nidr padee thee mar liya. 
Judges8:12 aur jab jebah aur salmunna ko pakad liya, aur saree sena ko bhga diya." 
Judges8:13 aur yoash ka putra gidon heres nam chaddhai par se ladai se lautta. 
Judges8:14 aur sukkot ke aek javan puroosh ko pakadkar us se poochha, aur us ne sukkot ke satahattron haakimon aur vraddh logon ke pate likhvaye." 
Judges8:15 tab vah sukkot ke manushyon ke pas jakar kahane laga, jebah aur salmunna ko dekha, jinake vishay men tum ne yah kahakar mujhe chiddhaya tha, ki kya jebah aur salmunna abhee tere hath men haai, ki ham tere thke mande janon ko rottee den?" 
Judges8:16 tab us ne us nagar ke vraddh logon ko pakada, aur jangal ke katteele aur bichchoo ped lekar sukkot ke purooshaen ko kuchh sikhaya." 
Judges8:17 aur us ne panooael ke gummatt ko ddha diya, aur us nagar ke manushyon ko ghaat kiya." 
Judges8:18 fir us ne jebah aur salmunna se poochha, jo manushy tum ne tabor par ghaat kiae the ve kaaise the? unhon ne uttr diya, jaaisa too vaaise hee ve bhee the arthata aek aek ka roop rajakumar ka sa tha." 
Judges8:19 us ne kaha, ve to mere bhai, varan mere sahodar bhai the yahova ke jeevan kee shapat, yadi tum ne unako jeevit chhoda hota, to maain tum ko ghaan n karata." 
Judges8:20 tab us ne apane jette putra yatere se kaha, uttkar inhen ghaat kara. parantu javan ne apanee talavar n kheenchee, kyonaki vah us samay tak ladka hee tha, isaliye vah dr gaya." 
Judges8:21 tab jebah aur salmunna ne kaha, too uttkar ham par prahar kara kyonki jaaisa puroosh ho, vaaisa hee usaka pauroosh bhee hoga. tab gidon ne uttkar jebah aur salmunna ko ghaat kiya aur unake untton ke galon ke chandraharon ko le liya.." 
Judges8:22 tab israael ke purooshaen ne gidon se kaha, too hamare upar prabhuta kar, too aur tera putra aur pota bhee prabhuta kare kyonki too ne ham ko midhan ke hath se chhudaya haai." 
Judges8:23 gidon ne un se kaha, maain tumhare upar prabhuta n karoonga, aur n mera putra tumhare upar prabhuta karega yahova hee tum par prabhuta karega." 
Judges8:24 fir gidon ne un se kaha, maain tum se kuchh mangata hoon arthata tum mujh ko apanee apanee loott men kee baaliyan do. ve to ishamaaelee the, is karan unakee baaliyan sone kee theen. unhon ne kaha, nishchay ham denge." 
Judges8:25 tab unhon ne kapada bichhakar us men apanee apanee loott men se nikalakar baaliyan dal deen. 
Judges8:26 jo sone kee baliyan us ne mang leen unaka taul aek hajar sat sau shokel hua aur unako chhod chandrahar, jhumake, aur baainganee rang ke vasr jo midhaaniyon ke raja pahine the, aur unake untton ke galon kee janjeera." 
Judges8:27 unaka gidon ne ek epod banavakar apane opra nam nagar men rakha aur sab israel vahan vyaabhaichaarinee kee nain usake peechhe ho liya, aur vah gidon aur usake gharane ke liye fanda tthara." 
Judges8:28 is prakar midhan israliyon se dab gaya, aur fir sir n uttaya. aur gidon ke jeevan bhr arthata chalees varsha tak desh chaain se raha." 
Judges8:29 yoash ka putra yaroobbal to jakar apane ghar men rahane laga. 
Judges8:30 aur gidon ke sattr bette utpann hua, kyonaki usake bahut striayan theen." 
Judges8:31 aur usakee jo aek rakhelee shakem men rahatee thee usake aek putra utpann hua, aur gidon ne usaka nam abeemelek rakha." 
Judges8:32 nidan yoash ka putra gidon poore buddhape men mar gaya, aur abeeaejeariyon ke opra nam ganv men usake pita yoash kee kabar men usako mittee dee gai.." 
Judges8:33 gidon ke marate hee israaelee fir gaa, aur vyabhaichaarinee kee nain bal devataon ke peechhe ho lia, aur balabareet ko apana devata man liya." 
Judges8:34 aur israaeliyon ne apane parameshvar yahova ko, jis ne unako charon or ke sab shatrauon ke hath se chhudaya tha, smaran n rakha" 
Judges8:35 aur n unhon ne yaroobbal arthata gidon kee us saree bhlai ke anusar jo us ne israaeliyon ke sath kee thee usake gharane ko praeeti dikhai.. 
Judges9:1 yaroobbal ka putra abeemelek shakem ko apane mamaon ke pas jakar un se aur apane nana ke sab gharane se yon kahane laga," 
Judges9:2 shakem ke sab manushyon se yah poochho, ki tumhare liye kya bhla haai? kya yah ki yaroobbal ke sattr putra tum par prabhuta karen? va yah ki aek hee puroosh tum par prabhuta kare? aur yah bhee smaran rakho ki maain tumhara had mans hoon." 
Judges9:3 tab usake mamaon ne shakem ke sab manushyon se aeesee hee baten kaheen aur unhon ne yah sochakar ki abeemelek to hamara bhai haai apana man usake peechhe laga diya. 
Judges9:4 tab unhon ne balabareet ke mandair men se sattr ttukade roope usako dia, aur unhen lagakar abeemelek ne neech aur luchche jan rakh lia, jo usake peechhe ho liae." 
Judges9:5 tab us ne opra men apane pita ke ghar jake apane bhaiyon ko jo yaroobbal ke sattr putra the aek hee patthr par ghaat kiya parantu yaroobbal ka yotam nam lahura putra chhpaikar bach gaya.. 
Judges9:6 tab shakem ke sab manushyon aur betamillo ke sab logon ne ikatthe hokar shakem ke khmbhe se pasavale banjavraksha ke pas abeemelek ko raja banaya. 
Judges9:7 isaka samachar sunakar yotam garijjeem pahad kee chottee par jakar khda hua, aur unche svar se pukara ke kahane laga, he shakem ke manushyo, meree suno, isaaliye ki parameshvar tumharee sunen." 
Judges9:8 kisee yug men vraksha kisee ka aabhaishok karake apane upar raja ttharane ko chale tab unhon ne jalapai ke vraksha se kaha, too ham par rajy kara." 
Judges9:9 tab jalapai ke vraksha ne kaha, kya maain apanee us chikanahatt ko chhodkar, jis se log parameshvar aur manushy donon ka adar man karate haai, vrakshaen ka adhaikaree hokar idhar udhar dolane ko chaloon?" 
Judges9:10 tab vrakshaen ne anjeer ke vraksha se kaha, too akar ham par rajy kara." 
Judges9:11 anjeer ke vraksha ne un se kaha, kya maain apane meettepan aur apane achchhe achchhe falon ko chhod vrakshaen ka aadhaikaree hokar idhar udhar dolane ko chaloon?" 
Judges9:12 fir vrakshaen ne dakhlata se kaha, too akar ham par rajy kara." 
Judges9:13 dakhlata ne un se kaha, kya maain apane naye madha ko chhod, jis se parameshvar aur manushy donon ko anand hota haai, vrakshaen kee aadhaikaarinee hokar idhar udhar dolane ko chaloon?" 
Judges9:14 tab sab vrakshaen ne jhdberee se kaha, too akar ham par rajy kara." 
Judges9:15 jhdberee ne un vrakshaen se kaha, yaadi tum apane upar raja hone ko mera abhaishok sachchai se karate ho, to akar meree chhanh men sharan lo aur naheen to, jhdberee se ag nikalegee jis se labanon ke devadaroo bhee bhsm ho jaaenge." 
Judges9:16 isaliye ab yaadi tum ne sachchai aur khrai se abeemelek ko raja banaya haai, aur yaroobbal aur usake gharane se bhlai kee, aur us ne usake kam ke yogy bartav kiya ho, to bhla." 
Judges9:17 mera pita to tumhare nimitt lada, aur apane praan par khelakar tum ko midhaaniyon ke hath se chhudaya" 
Judges9:18 parantu tum ne aj mere pita ke gharane ke virooddh uttkar balava kiya, aur usake sattr putra aek hee patthr par ghaat kia, aur usakee laundee ke putra abeemelek ko isaaliye shakem ke manushyon ke upar raja banaya haai ki vah tumhara bhai haai" 
Judges9:19 isaliye yaadi tum logon ne aj ke din yaroobbal aur usake gharane se sachchai aur khrai se bartav kiya ho, to abeemelek ke karan anand karo, aur vah bhee tumhare karan anand kare" 
Judges9:20 aur nahee, to abeemelek se aeesee ag nikale jis se shakem ke manushy aur betamillo bhsm ho jaaen: shakem ke manushyon aur betaamillo se aeesee ag nikale jis se abeemelek bhsm ho jaae." 
Judges9:21 tab yotam bhaga, aur apane bhai abeemelek ke dr ke mare ber ko jakar vahan rahane laga.." 
Judges9:22 aur abeemelek israael ke upar teen varsha haakim raha. 
Judges9:23 tab parameshvar ne abeemelek aur shakem ke manushyon ke beech aek buree atma bhej dee so shakem ke manushy abeemelek ka vishvasaghaat karane lage 
Judges9:24 jis se yaroobbal ke sattr putraen par kiae huae upadrav ka fal bhoga jaa, aur unaka kul unake ghaat karanevale unake bhai abeemelek ke sir par, aur usake apane bhaiyon ke ghaat karane men usakee sahayata karanevale shakem ke manushyon ke sir par bhee ho." 
Judges9:25 tab shakem ke manushyon ne pahadon kee chottyaien par usake liye ghaatakon ko baaittaya, jo us marga se sab ane janevalon ko loottte the aur isaka samachar abeemelek ko mila.." 
Judges9:26 tab aebed ka putra gal apane bhaiyon samet shakem men aya aur shakem ke manushyon ne usaka bhrosa kiya. 
Judges9:27 aur unhon ne maaidan men jakar apanee apanee dakh kee bariyon ke fal tode aur unaka ras raunda, aur stuti ka balidan kar apane devata ke maandair men jakar khane peene aur abeemelek ko kosane lage." 
Judges9:28 tab aebed ke putra gal ne kaha, abeemelek kaun haai? shakem kaun haai ki ham usake adhaeen rahen? kya vah yaroobbal ka putra naheen? shakem ke pita hamor ke logon ke to adhaeen ho, parantu hame usake adhaeen kyon rahen?" 
Judges9:29 aur yah praja mere vash men hotee ho kya hee bhla hota! tab to maain abeemelek ko door karata. fir us ne abeemelek se kaha, apanee sena kee ginatee baddhakar nikal a." 
Judges9:30 aebed ke putra gal kee ve baten sunakar nagar ke haakim jabool ka krodha bhdk utta. 
Judges9:31 aur us ne abeemelek ke pas chhpaike dooton se kahala bheja, ki aebed ka putra gal aur usake bhai shakem men ake nagaravalon ko tera virodha karane ko usaka rahe haain." 
Judges9:32 isaliye too apane sangavalon samet rat ko uttkar maaidan men ghaat laga. 
Judges9:33 fir bihan ko savere soorya ke nikalate hee uttkar is nagar par chaddhai karana aur jab vah apane sangavalon samet tera samhana karane ko nikale tab jo tujh se ban pade vahee us se karana.. 
Judges9:34 tab abeemelek aur usake sang ke sab log rat ko utt char jhund bandhakar shakem ke virooddh ghaat men baaitt gaae. 
Judges9:35 aur aebed ka putra gal bahar jakar nagar ke faattk men khda hua tab abeemelek aur usake sangee ghaat chhodkar utt khde huae. 
Judges9:36 un logon ko dekhkar gal jabool se kahane laga, dek, pahadon kee chottyaien par se log utare ate haain! jabool ne us se kaha, vah to pahadon hee chhaya haai jo tujhe manushyon ke saman dekh padtee haai." 
Judges9:37 gal ne fir kaha, dek, log desh ke beechonbeech hokar utare ate haai, aur aek jhund monaneem nam banj vraksha ke marga se chala ata haai." 
Judges9:38 jabool ne us se kaha, teree yah bat kahan rahee, ki abeemelek kaun haai ki ham usake adhaeen rahen? ye to ve hee log haain jinako too ne nikamma jana tha isaaliye ab nikalakar un se lad." 
Judges9:39 tab gal shakem ke purooshaen ka aguva ho bahar nikalakar abeemelek se lada. 
Judges9:40 aur abeemelek ne usako khdeda, aur abeemelek ke samhane se bhaga aur nagar ke faattk tak pahunchate pahunchate bahutere ghaayal hokar gir pade." 
Judges9:41 tab abeemelek arooma men rahane laga aur jabool ne gal aur usake bhaiyon ko nikal diya, aur shakem men rahane n diya." 
Judges9:42 doosare din log maaidan men nikal gaae aur yah abeemelek ko bataya gaya. 
Judges9:43 aur us ne apanee sena ke teen dal bandhakar maaidan men ghaat lagai aur jab dekha ki log nagar se nikale ate haain tab un par chaddhai karake unhen mar liya. 
Judges9:44 abeemelek apane sang ke dalon samet age daudkar nagar ke faattk par khda ho gaya, aur do dalon ne un sab logon par dhaava karake jo maaidan men the unhen mar dala." 
Judges9:45 usee din abeemelek ne nagar se din bhr ladkar usako le diya, aur usake logon ko ghaat karake nagar ko ddha diya, aur us par namak chhdikava diya.." 
Judges9:46 yah sunakar shakem ke gummatt ke sab rahanevale aelabareet ke maandair ke gaddh men ja ghause. 
Judges9:47 jab abeemelek ko yah samachar mila ki shakem ke gummatt ke sab manushy ikatthe huae haai," 
Judges9:48 tab vah apane sab sangiyon samet salamon nam pahad par chaddh gaya aur hath men kulhadee le pedon men se aek dalee kattee, or use uttakar apane kandho par rakh lee. aur apane sangavalon se kaha ki jaaisa tum ne mujhe karate dekha vaaisa hee tum bhee jhttpatt karo." 
Judges9:49 tab un sab logon ne bhee aek aek dalee katt lee, aur abeemelek ke peechhe ho unako gaddh par dalakar gaddh men ag lagai tab shakem ke gummatt ke sab sree puroosh jo attkal aek hajar the mar gaae.." 
Judges9:50 tab abeemelek ne tebes ko jakar usake samhane dere khde karake us ko le liya. 
Judges9:51 parantu aek nagar ke beech aek draddh gummatt tha, so kya sree puroosha, nagar ke sab log bhagakar us men ghause aur use band karake gummatt kee chht par chaddh gaae." 
Judges9:52 tab abeemelek gummatt ke nikatt jakar usake virooddh ladne laga, aur gummatt ke dar tak gaya ki us men ag lagaae." 
Judges9:53 tab kisee sree ne chakkee ke upar ka patt abeemelek ke sir par dal diya, aur usakee khopadee fatt gai." 
Judges9:54 tab us ne jhtt apane haathaiyaron ke ddhonevale javan ko bulakar kaha, apanee talavar kheenchakar mujhe mar dal, aeesa n ho ki log mere vishay men kahane paae, ki usako aek sree ne ghaat kiya. tab usake javan ne talavar bhonk dee, aur vah mar gaya." 
Judges9:55 yah dekhkar ki abeemelek mar gaya haai israaelee apane apane sthan ko chale gaae. 
Judges9:56 is prakar jo dushtt kam abeemelek ne apane sattr bhaiyon ko ghaat karake apane pita ke sath kiya tha, usako parameshvar ne usake sir par lautta diya" 
Judges9:57 aur shakem ke purooshaen ke bhee sab dushtt kam parameshvar ne unake sir par lautta dia, aur yaroobbal ke putra yotam ka shaap un par ghatt gaya.." 
Judges10:1 abeemelek ke bad israael ke chhudane ke liye tola nam aek issakaree utta, vah dodo ka pota aur pooa ka putra tha aur aepraaim ke pahadee desh ke shaameer nagar men rahata tha." 
Judges10:2 vah teis varsha tak israael ka nyay karata raha. tab mar gaya, aur usako shaameer men mittee dee gai.." 
Judges10:3 usake bad giladee yair utta, vah bais varsha tak israel ka nyay karata raha." 
Judges10:4 aur usake tees putra the jo gadaahiyon ke tees bachchon par savar hua karate the aur unake tees nagar bhee the jo gilad desh men haai, aur aj tak habbotyair kahalate haain." 
Judges10:5 aur yair mar gaya, aur usako kamon men mittee dee gai.." 
Judges10:6 tab israaeliyon ne fir yahova kee drashtti men bura kiya, arthata bal devataon aur ashtoret deaviyon aur aram, seedon, moab, ammoniyo, aur palishtaiyon ke devataon kee upasana karane lage aur yahova ko tyag diya, aur usakee upasana n kee." 
Judges10:7 tab yahova ka krodha israael par bhdka, aur us ne unhen paalishtaiyon aur ammoniyon ke adhaeen kar diya," 
Judges10:8 aur us varsha ye israaeliyon ko satate aur peesate rahe. varan yaradan par aemoriyon ke desh gilad men rahanevale sab israaeliyon par attarah varsha tak andhor karate rahe. 
Judges10:9 ammonee yahooda aur binyameen se aur aepraaim ke gharane se ladne ko yaradan par jate the, yahan tak ki israael bade sankatt men pad gaya." 
Judges10:10 tab israaeliyon ne yah kahakar yahova kee dohai dee, ki ham ne jo apane parameshvar ko tyagakar bal devataon kee upasana kee haai, yah ham ne tere virooddh maha pap kiya haai." 
Judges10:11 yahova ne israaeliyon se kaha, kya maain ne tum ko misriyo, aemoriyo, ammoniyo, aur palishtaiyon ke hath se n chhudaya tha?" 
Judges10:12 fir jab seedonee, aur amalekee, aur maonee logon ne tum par andhor kiya aur tum ne meree dohai dee, tab maain ne tum ko unake hath se bhee n chhudaya?" 
Judges10:13 taubhee tum ne mujhe tyagakar paraye devataon kee upasana kee haai isaliye maain fir tum ko n chhudaunga. 
Judges10:14 jao, apane mane huae devataon kee dohai do tumhare sankatt ke samay ve hee tumhen chhudaaen." 
Judges10:15 israaeliyon ne yahova se kaha, ham ne pap kiya haai isaaliye jo kuchh teree drashtti men bhla ho vahee ham se kara parantu abhee hamen chhuda." 
Judges10:16 tab ve paraae devataon ko apane madhy men se door karake yahova kee upasana karane lage aur vah israaeliyon ke kashtt ke karan kheadit hua.. 
Judges10:17 tab ammoniyon ne ikatthe hokar gilad men apane dere dale aur israaeliyon ne bhee ikatthe hokar mispa men apane dere dale. 
Judges10:18 tab gilad ke haakim aek doosare se kahane lage, kaun puroosh ammoniyon se sangraam arambh karega? vahee gilad ke sab nivaasiyon ka pradhaan ttharega.." 
Judges11:1 yiptah nam giladee bada shooraveer tha, aur vah veshya ka betta tha aur gilad se yiptah utpann hua tha." 
Judges11:2 gilad kee sree ke bhee bette utpann hue aur jab ve bade ho gaae tab yiptah ko yah kahakar nikal diya, ki too to parai sree ka betta haai is karan hamare pita ke gharane men koi bhag n paaega." 
Judges11:3 tab yiptah apane bhaiyon ke pas se bhagakar tob desh men rahane laga aur yiptah ke pas luchche manushy ikatthe ho gaae aur usake sang firane lage.. 
Judges11:4 aur kuchh dinon ke bad ammonee israael se ladne lage. 
Judges11:5 jab ammonee israael se ladte the, tab gilad ke vraddh log yiptah ko tob desh se le ane ko gaae" 
Judges11:6 aur yiptah se kaha, chalakar hamara pradhaan ho ja, ki ham ammoniyon se lad saken." 
Judges11:7 yiptah ne gilad ke vraddh logon se kaha, kya tum ne mujh se baair karake mujhe mere pita ke ghar se nikal n diya tha? fir ab sankatt men padkar mere pas kyon aae ho?" 
Judges11:8 gilad ke vraddh logon ne yiptah se kaha, is karan ham ab teree or fire haai, ki too hamare sang chalakar ammoniyon se lade tab too hamaree or se gilad ke sab nivaasiyon ka pradhaan ttharega." 
Judges11:9 yiptah ne gilad ke vraddh logon se poochha, yadi tum mujhe ammoniyon se ladne ko fir mere ghar le chalo, aur yahova unhen mere hath kar de, to kya maain tumhara pradhaan ttharoonga?" 
Judges11:10 gilad ke vraddh logon ne yiptah se kaha, nishchay ham teree is bate ke anusar karenge yahova hamare aur tere beech men in vachanon ka sunanevala haai." 
Judges11:11 tab yiptah gilad ke vraddh logon ke sang chala, aur logon ne usako apane upar mukhaiya aur pradhaan ttharaya aur yiptah ne apanee sab baten mispa men yahova ke sammukh kah sunai.." 
Judges11:12 tab yiptah ne ammoniyon ke raja ke pas dooton se yah kahala bheja, ki tujhe mujh se kya kam, ki too mere desh men ladne ko aya haai?" 
Judges11:13 ammoniyon ke raja ne yiptah ke dooton se kaha, karan yah haai, ki jab israaelee misr se aa, tab arnon se yabbok aur yaradan tak jo mera desh tha usako unhon ne chheen liya isaliye ab usako bina jhgada kiae faer de." 
Judges11:14 tab yiptah ne fir ammoniyon ke raja ke pas yah kahane ko doot bheje," 
Judges11:15 ki yiptah tujh se yon kahata haai, ki israael ne n to moab ka desh le liya aur n ammoniyon ka," 
Judges11:16 varan jab ve misr se nikale, aur israaelee jangal men hote huae lal samudra tak chale, aur kadesh ko aa," 
Judges11:17 tab israael ne aedom ke raja ke pas dooton se yah kahala bheja, ki mujhe apane desh men hokar jane de aur aedom ke raja ne unakee n manee. isee reeati us ne moab ke raja se bhee kahala bheja, aur us ne bhee n mana. isaliye israael kadesh men rah gaya." 
Judges11:18 tab us ne jangal men chalate chalate aedom aur moab donon deshaen ke bahar bahar ghoomakar moab desh kee poorva or se akar anorn ke isee par apane dere dale aur moab ke sivane ke bheetar n gaya, kyonaki moab ka sivana arnon tha." 
Judges11:19 fir israael ne aemoriyon ke raja seehon ke pas jo heshbon ka raja tha dooton se yah kahala bheja, ki hamen apane desh men se hokar hamare sthan ko jane de." 
Judges11:20 parantu seehon ne israael ka itana vishvas n kiya ki use apane desh men se hokar jane deta varan apanee saree praja ko ikatthee kar apane dere yahas men khde karake israael se lada. 
Judges11:21 aur israael ke parameshvar yahova ne seehon ko saree praja samet israael ke hath men kar diya, aur unhon ne unako mar liya isaliye israael us desh ke nivasee aemoriyon ke sare desh ka aadhaikaree ho gaya." 
Judges11:22 arthata vah anaun se yabbok tak aur jangal se le yaradan tak aemoriyon ke sare desh ka aadhaikaree ho gaya. 
Judges11:23 isaliye ab israael ke parameshvar yahova ne apanee israaelee praja ke samhane se aemoriyon ko unake desh se nikal diya haai fir kya too usaka aadhaikaree hone paaega? 
Judges11:24 kya too usaka adhaikaree n hoga, jisaka tera kamosh devata tujhe adhaikaree kar de? isee prakar se jin logon ko hamara parameshvar yahova hamare samhane se nikale, unake desh ke aadhaikaree ham honge." 
Judges11:25 fir kya too moab ke raja sippor ke putra balak se kuchh achchha haai? kya us ne kabhee israaeliyon se kuchh bhee jhgada kiya? kya vah un se kabhee lada? 
Judges11:26 jab ki israael heshbon aur usake gavon me, aur aroael aur usake gavon me, aur arnon ke kinare ke sab nagaron men teen sau varsha se basa haai, to itane dinon men tum logon ne usako kyon naheen chhuda liya?" 
Judges11:27 maain ne tera aparadha naheen kiya too hee mujh se yuddh chhedkar bura vyavahar karata haai isaaliye yahova jo nyayee haai, vah israaeliyon aur ammoniyon ke beech men aj nyay kare." 
Judges11:28 taubhee ammoniyon ke raja ne yiptah kee ye baten n maneen jinako us ne kahala bheja tha.. 
Judges11:29 tab yahova ka atma yiptah men sama gaya, aur vah gilad aur manashsho se hokar gilad ke mispe men aya, aur gilad ke mispe se hokar ammoniyon kee or chala." 
Judges11:30 aur yiptah ne yah kahakar yahova kee mannat manee, ki yadi too ni:sandeh ammoniyon ko mere hath men kar de," 
Judges11:31 to jab maain kushal ke sath ammoniyon ke pas se lautt aun tab jo koi mere bhentt ke liye mere ghar ke dar se nikale vah yahova ka ttharega, aur maain use homabaali karake chaddhaunga." 
Judges11:32 tab yiptah ammoniyon se ladne ko unakee or gaya aur yahova ne unako usake hath men kar diya. 
Judges11:33 aur vah aroaer se le minneet tak, jo bees nagar haai, varan abelakarameem tak jeetate jeetate unhen bahut badee mar se marata gaya. aur ammonee israaeliyon se har gaae.." 
Judges11:34 jab yiptah mispa ko apane ghar aya, tab usakee bettee dfa bajatee aur nachatee hui usakee bhentt ke liye nikal ai vah usakee aekalautee thee usako chhod usake n to koi betta tha aur koi n bettee." 
Judges11:35 usako dekhte hee us ne apane kapade faadkar kaha, hay, meree bettee! too ne kamar tod dee, aur too bhee mere kashtt denevalon men ho gai haai kyonki maain ene yahova ko vachan diya haai, aur use ttal naheen sakata." 
Judges11:36 us ne us se kaha, he mere pita, too ne jo yahova ko vachan diya haai, to jo bat tere munh se nikalee haai usee ke anusar mujh se bartav kar, kyonaki yahova ne tere ammonee shatrauon se tera palatta liya haai." 
Judges11:37 fir us ne apane pita se kaha, mere liye yah kiya jaa, ki do maheene tak mujhe chhode rah, ki maain apanee saheliyon saahit jakar pahadon par firatee hui apanee kunvareepan par rotee rahoon." 
Judges11:38 us ne kaha, ja. tab us ne use do maahine kee chhuttee dee isaaliye vah apanee saheliyon saahit chalee gai, aur pahadon par apanee kunvareepan par rotee rahee." 
Judges11:39 do maheene ke beetane par vah apane pita ke pas lautt ai, aur us ne usake vishay men apanee manee hui mannat ko pooree kiya. aur us kanya ne puroosh ka munh kabhee n dekha tha. isaliye israaeliyon men yah reeati chalee" 
Judges11:40 ki israaelee striayan prativarsha yiptah giladee kee bettee ka yash gane ko varsha men char din tak jaya karatee theen.. 
Judges12:1 tab aepraaimee puroosh ikatthe hokar sapon ko jakar yiptah se kahane lage, ki jab too ammoniyon se ladne ko gaya tab hamen sang chalane ko kyon naheen bulavaya? ham tera ghar tujh samet jala denge." 
Judges12:2 yiptah ne un se kaha, mera aur mere logon ka ammoniyon se bada jhgada hua tha aur jab maain ne tum se sahayata mangee, tab tum ne mujhe unake hath se naheen bachaya." 
Judges12:3 tab yah dekhkar ki tum mujhe naheen bachate maain apane praanon ko hathelee par rakhkar ammoniyon ke virooddh chala, aur yahova ne unako mere hath men kar diya fir tum ab mujh se ladne ko kyon chaddh aae ho?" 
Judges12:4 tab yiptah gilad ke sab purooshaen ko ikattha karake aepraaim se lada aur aepraaim jo kahata tha, ki he gilaadiyo, tum to aepraaim aur manashsho ke beech rahanevale aepraaimiyon ke bhgode ho, aur gilaadiyon ne unako mar liya." 
Judges12:5 aur gilaadiyon ne yaradan ka ghaatt un se pahile apane vash men kar liya. aur jab koi aepraaimee bhgoda kahata, ki mujhe par jane do, tab gilad ke puroosh us se poochhte the, kya too aepraaimee haai? aur yaadi vah kahata nahee," 
Judges12:6 to vah us se kahate, achchha, shaibbolet kah, aur vah kahata sibbolet, kyonki us se vah tteek bola naheen jata th tab ve usako pakadkar yaradan ke ghaatt par mar dalate the. is praakar us samay bayalees hajar aepraaimee mare gaae.." 
Judges12:7 yiptah chh: varsha tak israael ka nyay karata raha. tab yiptah giladee mar gaya, aur usako gilad ke kisee nagar men mittee dee gai.." 
Judges12:8 usake bad betalehem ka nivasee ibasan israel ka nyay karane laga. 
Judges12:9 aur usake tees bette hue aur us ne apanee tees bettyaian bahar byah dee, aur bahar se apane betton ka byah karake tees bahoo le aya. aur vah israael ka nyay sat varsha tak karata raha." 
Judges12:10 tab ibasan mar gaya, aur usako betalehem men mittee dee gai.." 
Judges12:11 usake bad jabooloonee elon israel ka nyay karane laga aur vah israel ka nyay das varsha tak karata raha. 
Judges12:12 tab aelon jabooloonee mar gaya, aur usako jabooloon ke desh ke ayyalon men mittee dee gai.." 
Judges12:13 usake bad hillel ka putra piratonee abdon israel ka nyay karane laga. 
Judges12:14 aur usake chalees bette aur tees pote hua, jo gadaahiyon ke sattr bachchon par savar hua karate the. vah att varsha tak israael ka nyay karata raha." 
Judges12:15 tab hillel ka putra piratonee abdon mar gaya, aur usako aepraaim ke desh ke piraton me, jo amalekiyon ke pahadee desh men haai, mittee dee gai.." 
Judges13:1 aur israaeliyon ne fir yahova kee drashtti men bura kiya isaliye yahova ne unako paalishtaiyon ke vash men chalees varsha ke liye rakha.. 
Judges13:2 daaniyon ke kul ka soravasee manoh nam aek puroosh tha, jisakee patnee ke banjh hone ke karan koi putra n tha." 
Judges13:3 is sree ko yahova ke doot ne darshan dekar kaha, sun, banjh hone ke karan tere bachcha naheen parantu ab too garbhvatee hogee aur tere betta hoga." 
Judges13:4 isaliye ab savadhaan rah, ki n to too dakhmadha va aur kisee bhanti kee madira peea, aur n koi ashuuddh vastu khaa," 
Judges13:5 kyonaki too garbhvatee hogee aur tere aek betta utpann hoga. aur usake sir par choora n fire, kyonaki vah janm hee se parameshvar ka najeer rahega aur israaeliyon ko paalishtaiyon ke hath se chhudane men vaheen hath lagaaega." 
Judges13:6 us sree ne apane paati ke pas jakar kaha, parameshvar ka ek jan mere pas aya tha jisaka roop parameshvar ke doot ka sa aati bhyayogy tha aur maain ne us se n poochha ki too kahan ka haai? aur n us ne mujhe apana nam bataya" 
Judges13:7 parantu us ne mujh se kaha, sun too garbhvatee hogee aur tere aek betta hoga isaaliye ab n to dakhmadha va aur kisee bhanti kee madira peena, aur n koi ashuuddh vastu khana, kyonaki vah ladka janm se maran ke din tak parameshvar ka najeer rahega." 
Judges13:8 tab manoh ne yahova se yah binatee kee, ki he prabhu, binatee sun, parameshvar ka vah jan jise too ne bheja tha fir hamare pas aa, aur hamen sikhlaae ki jo balak utpann honevala haai us se ham kya kya karen." 
Judges13:9 manoh kee yah bat parameshvar ne sun lee, isaaliye jab vah sree maaidan men baaittee thee, aur usaka paati manoh usake sang n tha, tab parameshvar ka vahee doot usake pas aya." 
Judges13:10 tab us sree ne jhtt daudkar apane paati ko yah samachar diya, ki jo puroosh us din mere pas aya tha usee ne mujhe darshan diya haai." 
Judges13:11 yah sunate hee manoh uttkar apanee patnee ke peechhe chala, aur us puroosh ke pas akar poochha, ki kya too vahee puroosh haai jisane is sree se baten kee theen? us ne kaha, maain vahee hoon." 
Judges13:12 manoh ne kaha, jab tere vachan poore ho jaaen to, us balak ka kaaisa ddhng aur usaka kya kam hoga?" 
Judges13:13 yahova ke doot ne manoh se kaha, jitanee vastuon kee charcha maain ne is sree se kee thee un sab se yah pare rahe." 
Judges13:14 yah koi vastu jo dakhlata se utpann hotee haai n khaa, aur n dakhmadha va aur kisee bhnati kee madira peea, aur n koi ashuuddh vastu khaae jo jo agyaa maain ne isako dee thee usee ko mane." 
Judges13:15 manoh ne yahova ke doot se kaha, ham tujh ko rok le, ki tere liye bakaree ka aek bachcha pakakar taaiyar karen." 
Judges13:16 yahova ke doot ne manoh se kaha, chahe too mujhe rok rakhe, parantu maain tere bhojan men se kuchh n khaunga aur yaadi too homabali karana chahe to yahova hee ke liye kara. manoh to n janata tha, ki yah yahova ka doot haai." 
Judges13:17 manoh ne yahova ke doot se kaha, apana nam bata, isaliye ki jab teree baten pooree hon tab ham tera adaraman kar saken." 
Judges13:18 yahova ke doot ne us se kaha, mera nam to adabhut haai, isaaliye too use kyon poochhta haai?" 
Judges13:19 tab manoh ne annabali samet bakaree ka aek bachcha lekar chattan par yahova ke liye chaddhaya tab us doot ne manoh aur usakee patnee ke dekhte dekhte aek adabhut kam kiya. 
Judges13:20 arthata jab lau us vedee par se akash kee or utt rahee thee, tab yahova ka doot us vedee kee lau men hokar manoh aur usakee patnee ke dekhte dekhte chaddh gaya tab ve boomi par munh ke bal gire." 
Judges13:21 parantu yahova ke doot ne manoh aur usakee patnee ko fir kabhee darshan n diya. tab manoh ne jan liya ki vah yahova ka doot tha. 
Judges13:22 tab manoh ne apanee patnee se kaha, ham nishchay mar jaaenge, kyonki ham ne parameshvar ka darshan paya haai." 
Judges13:23 usakee patnee ne us se kaha, yadi yahova hamen mar dalana chahata, to hamare hath se homabaali aur annabali grahan n karata, aur n vah aeesee sab baten ham ko dikhata, aur n vah is samay hamen aeesee baten sunata." 
Judges13:24 aur us sree ke aek betta utpann hua, aur usaka nam shaimashaen rakha aur vah balak baddhta gaya, aur yahova usako ashaeesh deta raha." 
Judges13:25 aur yahova ka atma sora aur aeshataol ke beech mahanadan men usako ubharane laga.. 
Judges14:1 shaimashaen timna ko gaya, aur timna men aek palishtaiee sree ko dekha." 
Judges14:2 tab us ne jakar apane mata pita se kaha, timna men maain ne aek paalishtaiee sree ko dekha haai, so ab tum us se mera byah kara do." 
Judges14:3 usake mata pita ne us se kaha, kya tere dhaaiyon kee beattyaien me, va hamare sab logon men koi sree naheen haai, ki too khtanaheen paalishtaiyon men se sree byahane chahata haai? shaimashaen ne apane pita se kaha, usee se mera byah kara de kyonki mujhe vahee achchhee lagatee haai." 
Judges14:4 usake mata pita n janate the ki yah bat yahova kee or se hotee haai, ki vah palishtaiyon ke virooddh danv ddoonddhta haai. us samay to palishtee israel par prabhuta karate the.." 
Judges14:5 tab shaimashaen apane mata pita ko sang le timna ko chalakar timna kee dakh kee baree ke pas pahuncha, vahan usake samhane aek javan sinh garajane laga." 
Judges14:6 tab yahova ka atma us par bal se utara, aur yadhypi usake hath men kuchh n tha, taubhee us ne usako aeesa faad dala jaaisa koi bakaree ka bachcha faade. apana yah kam usane apane pita va mata ko n batalaya." 
Judges14:7 tab us ne jakar us sree se batacheet kee aur vah shaimashaen ko achchhee lagee. 
Judges14:8 kuchh dinon ke beetane par vah use lane ko lautt chala aur us sinh kee loth dekhne ke liye marga se mud gaya? to kya dekha ki sinh kee loth men madhaumakkhiayon ka aek jhund aur madha bhee haai. 
Judges14:9 tab vah us men se kuchh hath men lekar khate khate apane mata pita ke pas gaya, aur unako yah bina bataa, ki maain ne isako sinh kee loth men se nikala haai, kuchh diya, aur unhon ne bhee use khaya." 
Judges14:10 tab usaka pita us sree ke yahan gaya, aur shaimashaen n javanon kee reeti ke anusar vahan jevanar kee." 
Judges14:11 usako dekhkar ve usake sang rahane ke liye tees sangiyon ko le ae. 
Judges14:12 shaimashaen ne us ne kaha, maain tum se aek pahelee kahata hoon yaadi tum is jevanar ke saton dinon ke bheetar use boojhkar arth bata do, to maain tum ko tees kurate aur tees jode kapade doonga" 
Judges14:13 aur yaadi tum use n bata sako, to tum ko mujhe tees kurte aur tees jode kapade dene padenge. unhon ne us se kaha, apanee pahelee kah, ki ham use sunen." 
Judges14:14 us ne un se kaha, khanevale men se khana, aur balavant men se meettee vastu nikalee. is pahelee ka arth ve teen din ke bheetar n bata sake." 
Judges14:15 sataven din unhon ne shaimashaen kee patnee se kaha, apane pati ko fausala ki vah hamen pahelee ka arth bataa, naheen to ham tujhe tere pita ke ghar samet ag men jalaaenge. kya tum logon ne hamara dhan lene ke liye hamara nevata kiya haai? kya yahee bat naheen haai?" 
Judges14:16 tab shaimashaen kee patnee yah kahakar usake samhane rone lagee, ki too to mujh se praem nahee, baair hee rakhta haai ki too ne aek pahelee meree jaati ke logon se to kahee haai, parantu mujh ko usaka arth bhee naheen bataya. us ne kaha, maain ne use apanee mata va pita ko bhee naheen bataya, fir kya maain tujh ko bata doon?" 
Judges14:17 aur jevanar ke saton dinon men vah sree usake samhane rotee rahee aur sataven din jab us ne usako bahut tang kiya tab us ne usako pahelee ka arth bata diya. tab us ne use apanee jati ke logon ko bata diya. 
Judges14:18 tab sataven din soorya oobane n paya ki us nagar ke manushyon ne shaimashaen se kaha, madha se aadhaik kya meetta? aur sinh se aadhaik kya balavant haai? us ne un se kaha, yadi tum meree kalor ko hal men n jotate, to meree pahelee ko kabhee n boojhte.." 
Judges14:19 tab yahova ka atma us par bal se utara, aur us ne ashkalon ko jakar vahan ke tees poorooshaen ko mar dala, aur unaka dhan loottkar tees jode kapadon ko pahelee ke batanevalon ko de diya. tab usaka krodha bhdka, aur vah apane pita ke ghar gaya." 
Judges14:20 aur shaimashaen kee patnee usake aek sangee ko jis se us ne mitra ka sa bartav kiya tha byah dee gai.. 
Judges15:1 parantu kuchh dinon bad, gehoon kee kattnee ke dinon me, shaimashaen ne bakaree ka aek bachcha lekar apanee sasural men jakar kaha, maain apanee patnee ke pas kottree men jaunga. parantu usake sasur ne use bheetar jane se roka." 
Judges15:2 aur usake sasur ne kaha, maain sachamuch yah janata tha ki too us se baair hee rakhta haai, isaaliye maain ne use tere sangee ko byah diya. kya usakee chhottee baahin us se sundar naheen haai? usake badale usee ko byah le." 
Judges15:3 shaimashaen ne un logon se kaha, ab chahe maain paalishtaiyon kee haani bhee karoo, taubhee unake vishay men nirdosh hee ttharoonga." 
Judges15:4 tab shaimashaen ne jakar teen sau lomaadiyan pakadee, aur mashaal lekar do do lomadiyon kee poonchh aek sath bandhae, aur unake beech aek aek mashaal bandhaa." 
Judges15:5 tab mashaalon men ag lagakar us ne lomaadiyon ko paalishtaiyon ke khde kheton men chhod diya aur pooliyon ke ddher varan khde khet aur jalapai kee baariyan bhee jal gain. 
Judges15:6 tab paalishtee poochhne lage, yah kis ne kiya haai? logon ne kaha, us timnee ke damad shaimashaen ne yah isaliye kiya, ki usake sasur ne usakee patnee use sangee ko byah dee. tab paalishtaiyon ne jakar us patnee aur usake pita donon ko ag men jala diya." 
Judges15:7 shaimashaen ne un se kaha, tum jo aeesa kam karate ho, isaliye maain tum se palatta lekar hee chup rahoonga." 
Judges15:8 tab us ne unako aati nitturata ke sath badee mar se mar dala tab jakar aetam nam chattan kee aek darar men rahane laga.. 
Judges15:9 tab paalishtaiyon ne chaddhai karake yahooda desh men dere khde kia, aur lahee men faail gaae." 
Judges15:10 tab yahoodee manushyon ne un se poochha, tum ham par kyon chaddhai karate ho? unhon ne uttr diya, shaimashaen ko bandhane ke liye chaddhai karate haai, ki jaaise us ne ham se kiya vaaise hee ham bhee us se karen." 
Judges15:11 tab teen hajar yahoodee puroosh aeetam nam chattan kee darar men jakar shaimashaen se kahane lage, kya too naheen janata ki palishtee ham par prabhuta karate haain? fir too ne ham se aeesa kyon kiya haai? us ne un se kaha, jaaisa unhon ne mujh se kiya tha, vaaisa hee maain ne bhee un se kiya haai." 
Judges15:12 unhon ne us se kaha, ham tujhe bandhakar palishtaiyon ke hath men kar dene ke liye aae haain. shaimashaen ne un se kaha, mujh se yah shapath khao ki tum mujh par prahar n karoge." 
Judges15:13 unhon ne kaha, aeesa n hoga ham tujhe kasakar unake hath men kar denge parantu tujhe kisee reeati man n dalenge. tab ve usako do nai raassaiyon se bandhakar us chattan par le gae." 
Judges15:14 vah lahee tak a gaya tha, ki palishtee usako dekhkar lalakarane lage tab yahova ka atma us par bal se utara, aur usakee banhon kee raassaiyan ag men jale huae san ke saman ho gai, aur usake hathon ke bandhan manon galakar toott pade." 
Judges15:15 tab usako gadahe ke jabade kee aek nai haddee milee, aur us ne hath baddha use lekar aek hajar purooshaen ko mar dala." 
Judges15:16 tab shaimashaen ne kaha, gadahe ke jabade kee haddee se ddher ke ddher lag gaa, gadahe ke jabade kee haddee hee se maain ne hajar purooshaen ko mar dala.." 
Judges15:17 jab vah aeesa kah chuka, tab us ne jabade kee haddee faenk dee aur us sthan ka nam ramata-lahee rakha gaya." 
Judges15:18 tab usako badee pyas lagee, aur us ne yahova ko pukar ke kaha too ne apane das se yah bada chhuttkara karaya haai fir kya maain ab pyason marake un khtanaheen logon ke hath men paoon?" 
Judges15:19 tab parameshvar ne lahee men okhlee sa gaddhha kar diya, aur us men se panee nikalane laga aur jab shaimashaen ne peeya, tab usake jee men jee aya, aur vah fir taja dam ho gaya. is karan us sote ka nam aenahakkore rakha gaya, vah aj ke din tak lahee men haain." 
Judges15:20 shaimashaen to paalishtaiyon ke dinon men bees varsha tak israael ka nyay karata raha.. 
Judges16:1 tab shaimashaen ajja ko gaya, aur vahan aek veshya ko dekhkar usake pas gaya." 
Judges16:2 jab aajjaiyon ko isaka samachar mila ki shaimashaen yahan aya haai, tab unhon ne usako ghor liya, aur rat bhr nagar ke faattk par usakee ghaat men lage rahe aur yah kahakar rat bhr chupachap rahe, ki bihan ko bhor hote hee ham usako ghaat karenge." 
Judges16:3 parantu shaimashaen adhaee rat tak pada rah kar, adhaee rat ko uttkar, us ne nagar ke faattk ke donon pallon aur dono bajuon ko pakadkar bendon samet ukhad liya, aur apane kanghaen par rakhkar unhen us pahad kee chottee par le gaya, jo hebraen ke samhane haai.." 
Judges16:4 isake bad vah sorek nam nale men rahanevalee daleela nam aek sree se praeeti karane laga. 
Judges16:5 tab paalishtaiyon ke saradaron ne us sree ke pas jake kaha, too usako fausalakar boojh le ki usake mahabal ka bhed kya haai, aur kaun upay karake ham us par aeese prabal ho, ki use bandhakar daba rakhen tab ham tujhe gyarah gyarah sau ttukade chandee denge." 
Judges16:6 tab daleela ne shaimashaen se kaha, mujhe bata de ki tere bade bal ka bhed kya haai, aur kisee reeati se koi tujhe bandhakar daba rakh sake." 
Judges16:7 shaimashaen ne us se kaha, yadi maain sat aeesee nai nai taton se bandha jaun jo sukhai n gai ho, to mera bal ghatt jayega, aur maain sadhaaran manushy sa ho jaunga." 
Judges16:8 tab paalishtaiyon ke saradar daleela ke pas aeesee nai nai sat taten le gaae jo sukhai n gai thee, aur un se us ne shaimashaen ko bandhaa." 
Judges16:9 usake pas to kuchh manushy kottree men ghaat lagaae baaitte the. tab us ne us se kaha, he shaimashaen, palishtee teree ghaat men haain! tab us ne tanton ko aeesa toda jaaisa san ka soot ag men choote hee toott jata haai. aur usake bal ka bhed n khula." 
Judges16:10 tab daleela ne shaimashaen se kaha, sun, too ne to mujh se chhl kiya, aur joott kaha haai ab mujhe bata de ki too kis vastu se bandha sakata haai." 
Judges16:11 us ne us se kaha, yadi maain aeesee nai nai rassaiyon se jo kisee kam men n ai hon kasakar bandha jau, to mera bal ghatt jaega, aur maain sadhaaran manushy ke saman ho jaunga." 
Judges16:12 tab daleela ne nai nai raassaiyan lekar aur usako bandhakar kaha, he shaimashaen, palishtee teree ghaat men haain! kitane manushy to us kottree men dhaat lagaae huae the. tab us ne unako soot kee nain apanee bhujaon par se tod dala." 
Judges16:13 tab daleela ne shaimashaen se kaha, ab tak too mujh se chhl karata, aur joott bolata aya haai ab mujhe bata de ki too kahe se bandha sakata haai? us ne kaha yaadi too mere sir kee saton latten tane men bune to bandha sakoonga." 
Judges16:14 so us ne use koonttee se jakada. tab us se kaha, he shaimashaen, palishtee teree ghaat men haain! tab vah neend se chaunk utta, aur koonttee ko dharan men se ukhadkar use tane samet le gaya." 
Judges16:15 tab daleela ne us se kaha, tera man to mujh se naheen laga, fir too kyon kahata haai, ki maain tujh se praeeti rakhta hoon? too ne ye teenon bar mujh se chhl kiya, aur mujhe naheen bataya ki tere bade bal ka bhed kya haai." 
Judges16:16 so jab us ne har din baten karate karate usako tang kiya, aur yahan tak hatt kiya, ki usake nakon men dam a gaya," 
Judges16:17 tab us ne apane man ka sara bhed kholakar us se kaha, mere sir par chhura kabhee naheen fira, kyonaki maain man ke pett hee se parameshvar ka najeer hoo, yadi maain mooda jau, to mera bal itana ghatt jaaega, ki maain sadhaaran manushy sa ho jaunga." 
Judges16:18 yah dekhkar, ki us ne apane man ka sara bhed mujh se kah diya haai, daleela ne palishtaiyon ke saradaron ke pas kahala bheja, ki ab kee bar fir ao, kyonaki us ne apane man ka sab bhed mujhe bata diya haai. tab palishtaiyon ke saradar hath men roopaya liae huae usake pas gaae." 
Judges16:19 tab us ne usako apane ghauttnon par sula rakha aur aek manushy bulavakar usake sir kee saton latten mundva daleen. aur vah usako dabane lagee, aur vah nirbal ho gaya." 
Judges16:20 tab us ne kaha, he shaimashaen, palishtee teree ghaat men haain! tab vah chaunkakar sochane laga, ki maain paahile kee nain bahar jakar jhttkoonga. vah to n janata tha, ki yahova usake pas se chala gaya haai." 
Judges16:21 tab paalishtaiyon ne usako pakadkar usakee ankhen faod dalee, aur use ajja ko le jake peetal kee beadiyon se jakad diya aur vah bandeegrah men chakkee peesane laga." 
Judges16:22 usake sir ke bal mund jane ke bad fir baddhne lage.. 
Judges16:23 tab paalishtaiyon ke saradar apane dagon nam devata ke liye bada yagy, aur anand karane ko yah kahakar ikatthe hua, ki hamare devata ne hamare shatra shaimashaen ko hamare hath men kar diya haai." 
Judges16:24 aur jab logon ne use dekha, tab yah kahakar apane devata kee stuati kee, ki hamare devata ne hamare shatra aur hamare desh ke nash karanevale ko, jis ne ham men se bahuton ko mar bhee dala, hamare hath men kar diya haai." 
Judges16:25 jab unaka man magan ho gaya, tab unhon ne kaha, shaimashaen ko bulava lo, ki vah hamare liye tamasha kare. isaaliye shaimashaen bandeegrah men se bulavaya gaya, aur unake liye tamasha karane laga, aur khmbhon ke beech khda kar diya gaya." 
Judges16:26 tab shaimashaen ne us ladke se jo usaka hath pakade tha kaha, mujhe un khmbhon ko jin se ghar sambhla hua haai choone de, ki maain us par ttek lagaun." 
Judges16:27 vah ghar to sree purooshaen se bhra hua tha palishtaiyon ke sab saradar bhee vahan the, aur chht par koi teen hajar satraee puroosh the, jo shaimashaen ko tamasha karate huae dekh rahe the." 
Judges16:28 tab shaimashaen ne yah kahakar yahova kee dohai dee, ki he prabhu yahova, meree sudhai le he parameshvar, ab kee bar mujhe bal de, ki maain paalishtaiyon se apanee donon ankhon ka aek hee palatta loon." 
Judges16:29 tab shaimashaen ne un donon beechavale khmbhon ko jin se ghar sambhla hua tha pakadkar aek par to daahine hath se aur doosare par baaen hath se bal laga diya. 
Judges16:30 aur shaimashaen ne kaha, palishtaiyon ke sang mera praan bhee jaae. aur vah apana sara bal lagakar jhuka tab vah ghar sab saradaron aur us men se sare logon par gir pada. so jinako us ne marate samay mar dala ve un se bhee adhaik the jinhen us ne apane jeevan men mar dala tha." 
Judges16:31 tab usake bhai aur usake pita ke sare gharane ke log aa, aur use uttakar le gaa, aur sora aur aeshataol ke madhy apane pita manoh kee kabar men mittee dee. usane israael ka nyay bees varsha tak kiya tha." 
Judges17:1 aepraaim ke pahadee desh men meeka nam aek puroosh tha. 
Judges17:2 us ne apanee mata se kaha, jo gyarah sau ttukade chandee tujh se le liae gaae the, jinake vishay men too ne mere sunate bhee shaap diya tha, ve meere pas haain maain ne hee unako le liya tha. usakee mata ne kaha, mere bette par yahova kee or se ashaeesh hoe." 
Judges17:3 jab us ne ve gyarah sau ttukade chandee apanee mata ko faer diae tab mata ne kaha, maain apanee or se apane bette ke liye yah roopaya yahova ko nishchay arpan karatee hoon taki us se aek moorat khodakar, aur doosaree ddhalakar banai jaa, so ab maain use tujh ko faer detee hoon." 
Judges17:4 jab us ne vah roopaya apanee mata ko faer diya, tab mata ne do sau ttukade ddhlavaaiyon ko dia, aur us ne un se aek mootira khodakar, aur doosaree ddhalakar banai aur ve meeka ke ghar men raheen." 
Judges17:5 meeka ke pas aek devasthan tha, tab us ne aek aepod, aur kai aek grahadevata banavaae aur apane aek bette ka sanskar karake use apana purohit tthara liyan" 
Judges17:6 un dinon men israeliyon ka koi raja n tha jisako jo tteek soojh padta tha vahee vah karata tha.. 
Judges17:7 yahooda ke kul ka aek javan leveey yahooda ke betalehem men paradeshaee hokar rahata tha. 
Judges17:8 vah yahooda ke betalehem nagar se isiliye nikala, ki jahan kaheen sthan mile vahan ja rahe. chalate chalate vah aepraaim ke pahadee desh men meeka ke ghar par a nikala." 
Judges17:9 meeka ne us se poochha, too kahan se ata haai? us ne kaha, maain to yahooda ke betalehem se aya hua aek leveey hoo, aur isaaliye chala jata hoo, ki jahan kaheen ttkaiana mujhe mile vaheen rahoon." 
Judges17:10 meeka ne us se kaha, mere sang rahakar mere liye pita aur purohit ban, aur maain tujhe praati varsha das ttukade roope, aur aek joda kapada, aur bhojanavastu diya karoonga tab vah leveey bheetar gaya." 
Judges17:11 aur vah leveey us puroosh ke sang rahane ko prasann hua aur vah javan usake sath betta sa bana raha. 
Judges17:12 tab meeka ne us leveey ka sanskar kiya, aur vah javan usaka purohit hokar meeka ke ghar men rahane laga." 
Judges17:13 aur meeka sochata tha, ki ab maain janata hoon ki yahova mera bhla karega, kyonki maain ne aek leveey ko apana purohit kar rakha haai.." 
Judges18:1 un dinon men israeliyon ka koi raja n tha. aur unheen dinon men daaniyon ke gotra ke log rahane ke liye koi bhag ddoonddh rahe the kyonki israelee gotraen ke beech unaka bhag us samay tak n mila tha. 
Judges18:2 tab daaniyon ne apane sab kul men se panch shooraveeron ko sora aur aeshataol se desh ka bhed lene aur us men dekh bhal karane ke liye yah kahakar bhej diya, ki jakar desh men dekh bhal karo. isaliye ve aepraaim ke pahadee desh men meeka ke ghar tak jakar vahan ttkai gaae." 
Judges18:3 jab ve meeka ke ghar ke pas aa, tab us javan leveey ka bol pahachana isaliye vahan mudkar us se poochha, tujhe yahan kaun le aya? aur too yahan kya karata haai? aur yahan tere pas kya haai?" 
Judges18:4 us ne un se kaha, meeka ne mujh se aeesa aeesa vyavahar kiya haai, aur mujhe naukar rakha haai, aur maain usaka purohit ho gaya hoon." 
Judges18:5 unhon ne us se kaha, parameshvar se salah le, ki ham jan len ki jo yatra ham karate haain vah safal hogee va naheen." 
Judges18:6 purohit ne un se kaha, kushal se chale jao. jo yatra tum karate ho vah tteek yahova ke samhane haai." 
Judges18:7 tab ve panch manushy chal nikale, aur laaish ko jakar vahan ke logon ko dekha ki seedoniyon kee nain nidr, bekhttke, aur shaantai se rahate haain aur is desh ka koi adhaikaree naheen haai, jo unhen kisee kam men roke, aur ye seedoniyon se door rahate haai, aur doosare manushyon se kuchh vyavahar naheen rakhte." 
Judges18:8 tab ve sora aur aeshtaol ko apane bhaiyon ke pas gaa, aur unake bhaiyon ne un se poochha, tum kya samachar le aae ho?" 
Judges18:9 unhon ne kaha, ao, ham un logon par chaddhai karen kyonaki ham ne us desh ko dekha ki vah bahut achchha haai. tum kyon chupachap rahate ho? vahan chalakar us desh ko apane vansh men kar lene men alas n karo." 
Judges18:10 vahan pahunchakar tum nidr rahate huae logon ko, aur lamba chauda desh paoge aur parameshvar ne use tumhare hath men de diya haai. vah aeesa sthan haai jis men prathvee bhr ke kisee padarth kee ghattee naheen haai.." 
Judges18:11 tab vahan se arthata sora aur aeshataol se daniyon ke kul ke chh: sau purooshaen ne yuddh ke hathaiyar bandhakar prasthan kiya. 
Judges18:12 unhonne jakar yahooda desh ke kiyryatyareem nagar men dere khde kie. is karan us sthan ka nam mahanedan aj tak pada haai, vah to kiyryatyareem ke paashchaim kee or haai." 
Judges18:13 vahan se ve age baddhkar aepraaim ke pahadee desh men meeka ke ghar ke pas aae. 
Judges18:14 tab jo panch manushy laaish ke desh ka bhed lene gaae the, ve apane bhaiyon se kahane lage, kya tum janate ho ki in gharon meen aek aepod, kai aek grahadevata, aek khudee aur aek ddhlee hui moorat haai? isaliye ab socho, ki kya karana chaahiye." 
Judges18:15 ve udhar mudkar us javan leveey ke ghar gaa, jo meeka ka ghar tha, aur usaka kushal kshom poochha." 
Judges18:16 aur ve chh: sau danee puroosh faattk men haathaiyar bandho huae khde rahe. 
Judges18:17 aur jo panch manushy desh ka bhed lene gaae the, unhon ne vahan ghausakar us khudee hui moorat, aur aepod, aur grahadevatao, aur ddhlee hui moorat ko le liya, aur vah purohit faattk men un haathaiyar bandho huae chh: sau purooshaen ke sang khda tha." 
Judges18:18 jab ve panch manushy meeka ke ghar men ghausakar khudee hui moorat, aepod, grahadevata, aur ddhlee hui moorat ko le aae the, tab purohit ne un se poochha, yah tum kya karate ho?" 
Judges18:19 unhon ne us se kaha, chup rah, apane munh ko hath se bandakar, aur ham logon ke sang chalakar, hamare liye pita aur purohit bana. tere liye kya achchha haai? yah, ki ek hee manushy ke gharane ka purohit ho, va yah, ki israealiyon ke ek gotra aur kul ka purohit ho?" 
Judges18:20 tab purohit prasann hua, so vah aepod, grahadevata, aur khudee hui moorat ko lekar un logon ke sang chala gaya." 
Judges18:21 tab ve mude, aur balabachcho, pashuuo, aur saman ko apane age karake chal diae." 
Judges18:22 jab ve meeka ke ghar se door nikal gaae the, tab jo manushy meeka ke ghar ke pasavale gharon men rahate the unhon ne ikatthe hokar daaniyon ko ja liya." 
Judges18:23 aur daaniyon ko pukara, tab unhon ne munh faer ke meeka se kaha, tujhe kya hua ki too itana bada dal liae ata haai?" 
Judges18:24 us ne kaha, tum to mere banavaae huae devataon aur purohit ko le chale ho fir mere pas kya rah gaya? to tum mujh se kyon poochhte ho? ki tujhe kya hua haai?" 
Judges18:25 daaniyon ne us se kaha, tera bol ham logon men sunai n de, kaheen aeesa n ho ki krodhaee jan tum logon par prahar karen? aur too apana aur apane ghar ke logon ke bhee praan ko kho de." 
Judges18:26 tab daaniyon ne apana marga liya aur meeka yah dekhkar ki ve mujh se adhaik balavant haain firake apane ghar lautt gaya. 
Judges18:27 aur ve meeka ke banavaae huae padathorn n aur usake purohit ko sath le laaish ke pas aa, jisake log shaaantai se aur bina khttke rahate the, aur unhon ne unako talavar se mar dala, aur nagar ko ag lagakar foonk diya." 
Judges18:28 aur koi bachanevala n tha, kyonaki vah seedon se door tha, aur ve aur manushyon se kuchh vyavahar n rakhte the. aur vah betrahob kee tarai men tha. tab unhon ne nagar ko draddh kiya, aur us men rahane lage." 
Judges18:29 aur unhon ne us nagar ka nam israael ke aek putra apane moolapuroosh dan ke nam par dan rakha parantu paahile to us nagar ka nam laaish tha. 
Judges18:30 tab daaniyon ne us khudee hui moorat ko khda kar liya aur desh kee bandhauai ke samay vah yonatan jo gesharem ka putra aur moosa ka pota tha, vah aur usake vansh ke log dan gotra ke purohit bane rahe." 
Judges18:31 aur jab tak parameshvar ka bhvan shaeelo men bana raha, tab tak ve meeka kee khudavai hui moorat ko sthapit kiae rahe.." 
Judges19:1 un dinon men jab israeliyon ka koi raja n tha, tab ek leveey puroosh epraaim ke pahadee desh kee paralee or paradeshaee hokar rahata tha, jis ne yahooda ke betalehem men kee ek suraaitin rakh lee thee." 
Judges19:2 usakee suraaiatin vyaabhaichar karake yahooda ke betalehem ko apane pita ke ghar chalee gai, aur char maheene vaheen rahee." 
Judges19:3 tab usaka paati apane sath aek sevak aur do gadahe lekar chala, aur usake yahan gaya, ki use samajha bujhakar le aae. vah use apane pita ke ghar le gai, aur us javan sree ka pita use dekhkar usakee bhentt se anandait hua." 
Judges19:4 tab usake sasur arthata us sree ke pita ne binatee karake use rok liya, aur vah teen din tak usake pas raha so ve vahan khate pite ttkai rahe." 
Judges19:5 chauthe din jab ve bhor ko sabere utte, aur vah chalane ko hua tab sree ke pita ne apane damad se kaha, aek ttukada rottee khakar apana jee ttnda kar, tab tum log chale jana." 
Judges19:6 tab un donon ne baaittkar sang sang khaya piya fir sree ke pita ne us puroosh se kaha, aur aek rat ttkai rahane ko prasann ho aur anand kara." 
Judges19:7 vah puroosh vida hone ko utta, parantu usake susar ne binatee karake use dabaya, isaliye us ne fir usake yahan rat bitai." 
Judges19:8 panchaven din bhor ko vah to vida hone ko savere utta parantu sree ke pita ne kaha, apana jee ttnda kar, aur tum donon din ddhlane tak rooke raho. tab un donon ne rottee khai." 
Judges19:9 jab vah puroosh apanee suraaiatin aur sevak samet vida hone ko utta, tab usake sasur arthata sree ke pita ne us se kaha, dekh din to ddhla chala haai, aur sanjh hone par haai isaaliye tum log rat bhr ttkai raho. dek, din to oobane par haai so yaheen anand karata hua rat bita, aur bihan ko savere uttkar apana marga lena, aur apane dere ko chale jana." 
Judges19:10 parantu us puroosh ne us rat ko ttkaina n chaha, isaliye vah uttkar vida hua, aur kattee bandho huae do gadahe aur apanee suraaitin sang liae huae yaboos ke samhane tak jo yarooshalem kahalata haai pahuncha." 
Judges19:11 ve yaboos ke pas the, aur din bahut ddhl gaya tha, ki sevak ne apane svamee se kaha, a, ham yaboosiyon ke is nagar men mudkar ttkaien." 
Judges19:12 usake svamee ne us se kaha, ham paraae nagar men jahan koi israelee naheen rahata, n utarenge giba tak baddh jaenge." 
Judges19:13 fir us ne apane sevak se kaha, a, ham udhar ke sthanon men se kisee ke pas jaae, ham giba va rama men rat bitaaen." 
Judges19:14 aur ve age kee or chale aur unake binyameen ke giba ke nikatt pahunchate pahunchate soorya ast ho gaya," 
Judges19:15 isaliye ve giba men ttkaine ke liye usakee or mud gaae. aur vah bheetar jakar us nagar ke chauk men baaitt gaya, kyonki kisee ne unako apane ghar men n ttkaiaya." 
Judges19:16 tab aek booddha apane khet ke kam ko nipattakar sanjh ko chala aya vah to aepraaim ke pahadee desh ka tha, aur giba men paradeshaee hokar rahata tha parantu us sthan ke log binyameenee the." 
Judges19:17 us ne ankhen uttakar us yatraee ko nagar ke chauk men baaitte dekha aur us booddhe ne poochha, too kidhar jata, aur kahan se ata haai?" 
Judges19:18 us ne us se kaha, ham log to yahooda ke betaleham se akar epraaim ke pahadee desh kee paralee or jate haai, maain to vaheen ka hoon aur yahooda ke betalehem tak gaya tha, aur yahova ke bhvan ko jata hoo, parantu koi mujhe apane ghar men naheen ttkaiata." 
Judges19:19 hamare pas to gadahon ke liye pual aur chara bhee haai, aur mere aur teree is dasee aur is javan ke liye bhee jo tere dason ke sang haai rottee aur dakhmadha bhee haai hamen kisee vastu kee ghattee naheen haai." 
Judges19:20 booddhe ne kaha, tera kalyan ho tere prayojan kee sab vastuaen mere sir hon parantu rat ko chauk men n bita." 
Judges19:21 tab vah usako apane ghar le chala, aur gadahon ko chara diya tab ve panv dhaekar khane peene lage." 
Judges19:22 ve anand kar rahe the, ki nagar ke luchchon ne ghar ko ghor liya, aur dar ko khttkhtta-khttkhttakar ghar ke us booddhe svamee se kahane lage, jo puroosh tere ghar men aya, use bahar le a, ki ham us se bhog karen." 
Judges19:23 ghar ka svamee unake pas bahar jakar un se kahane laga, nahee, nahee, he mere bhaiyo, aeesee burai n karo yah puroosh jo mere ghar par aya haai, is se aeesee mooddhta ka kam mat karo." 
Judges19:24 dekha, yahan meree kunvaree bettee haai, aur is puroosh kee suraaiatin bhee haai unako maain bahar le aunga. aur unaka pata-panee lo to lo, aur un se to jo chaho so karo parantu is puroosh se aeesee mooddhta ka kam mat karo." 
Judges19:25 parantu un manushyon ne usakee n manee. tab us puroosh ne apanee suraaiatin ko pakadkar unake pas bahar kar diya aur unhon ne us se kukarma kiya, aur rat bhr kya bhor tak us se leela kreeda karate rahe. aur pah fattte hee use chhod diya." 
Judges19:26 tab vah sree pah fattte huae jake us manushy ke ghar ke dar par jis men usaka pati tha gir gai, aur ujiyale ke hone tak vaheen padee rahee." 
Judges19:27 savere jab usaka paati ut, ghar ka dar khol, apana marga lene ko bahar gaya, to kya dekha, ki meree suraaiatin ghar ke dar ke pas devaddhee par hath faailaae huae padee haai." 
Judges19:28 us ne us se kaha, utt ham chalen. jab koi n bola, tab vah usako gadahe par ladakar apane sthan ko gaya." 
Judges19:29 jab vah apane ghar pahuncha, tab chooree le suraaitin ko ang ang karake katta aur use barah ttukade karake israael ke desh men bhej diya." 
Judges19:30 jitanon ne use dekha, ve sab apas men kahane lage, israaeliyon ke misr desh me chale ane ke samay se lekar aj ke din tak aeesa kuchh kabhee naheen hua, aur n dekha gaya so isako sochakar sammaati karo, aur batao.." 
Judges20:1 tab dan se lekar barshoba tak ke sab israaelee aur gilad ke log bhee nikale, aur unakee mandlee aek mat hokar mispa men yahova ke pas ikatthee hui." 
Judges20:2 aur saree praja ke pradhaan log, varan sab israaelee gotraen ke log jo char lakh talavar chalane vale pyade the, parameshvar kee praja kee sabha men upaasthiat huae." 
Judges20:3 binyameeaniyon ne to suna ki israaelee misma ko aae haain. aur israaelee poochhne lage, ham se kaho, yah burai kaaise hui?" 
Judges20:4 us mar dalee hui sree ke leveey pati ne uttr diya, maain apanee suraaitin samet binyameen ke giba men ttkaine ko gaya tha." 
Judges20:5 tab giba ke purooshaen ne mujh par chaddhai kee, aur rat ke samay ghar ko ghorake mujhe ghaat karana chaha aur meree suraaitin se itana kukarma kiya ki vah mar gai." 
Judges20:6 tab maain ne apanee suraaitin ko lekar ttukade ttukade kiya, aur israaeliyon ke bhag ke sare desh men bhej diya, unhon ne to israael men mahapap aur mooddhta ka kam kiya haai." 
Judges20:7 suno, he israaeliyo, sab ke sab dekho, aur yaheen apanee sammati do." 
Judges20:8 tab sab log aek man ho, uttkar kahane lage, n to ham men se koi apane dere jaaega, aur n koi apane ghar kee or mudega." 
Judges20:9 parantu ab ham giba se yah karenge, arthata ham chitthee dal dalakar us par chaddhai karenge," 
Judges20:10 aur ham sab israaelee gotraen men sau purooshaen men se das, aur hajar purooshaen men se aek sau, aur das hajar men se aek hajar purooshaen ko ttharaae, ki ve sena ke liye bhojanavastu pahunchaaen isaaliye ki ham binyameen ke giba men pahunchakar usako us mooddhta ka poora fal bhugata saken jo unhon ne israael men kee haai." 
Judges20:11 tab sab israaelee puroosh us nagar ke virooddh aek puroosh kee nain jutte huae ikatthe ho gaae.. 
Judges20:12 aur israaelee gotraiyon men kitane manushy yah poochhne ko bheje, ki yah kya burai haai jo tum logon men kee gai haai?" 
Judges20:13 ab un gibavasee luchchon ko hamare hath kar do, ki ham unako jan se mar ke israael men se burai nash karen. parantu binyameeaniyon ne apane bhai israaeliyon kee manane se inkar kiya." 
Judges20:14 aur binyameenee apane apane nagar men se akar giba men isaliye ikatthe hua, ki israaeliyon se ladne ko nikalen." 
Judges20:15 aur usee din gibavasee purooshaen ko chhod, jinakee ginatee sat sau chune huae puroosh ttharee, aur aur nagaron se aae huae talavar chalanevale binyameeaniyon kee ginatee chhbbees hajar puroosh ttharee." 
Judges20:16 in sab logon men se sat sau baainhatthe chune huae puroosh the, jo sab ke sab aeese the ki gofan se patthr marane men bal bhr bhee n chookate the." 
Judges20:17 aur binyameeaniyon ko chhod israaelee puroosh char lakh talavar chalanevale the ye sab ke sab yoddha the.. 
Judges20:18 sab israaelee uttkar betel ko gaa, aur yah kahakar parameshvar se salah lee, aur israaeliyon ne poochha, ki ham men se kaun binyameeaniyon se ladne ko paahile chaddhai kare? yahova ne kaha, yahooda paahile chaddhai kare." 
Judges20:19 tab israaeliyon ne bihan ko uttkar giba ke samhane dere dale. 
Judges20:20 aur israaelee puroosh binyameeaniyon se ladne ko nikal gaae aur israaelee purooshaen ne us se ladne ko giba ke virooddh panti bandhaee. 
Judges20:21 tab binyameeaniyon ne giba se nikal usee din bais hajar israaelee purooshaen ko marake mittee men mila diya. 
Judges20:22 taubhee israaelee puroosh logon ne hiyav bandhakar usee sthan men jahan unhon ne paahile din panati bandhaee thee, fir pantee bandhaee." 
Judges20:23 aur israaelee jakar sanjh tak yahova ke samhane rate rahe aur yah kahakar yahova se poochha, ki kya ham apane bhai binyameeaniyon se ladne ko fir pas jaaen? yahova ne kaha, ha, un par chaddhai karo." 
Judges20:24 tab doosare din israaelee binyameeaniyon ke nikatt pahunche.
