Judges20:25 tab binyameeaniyon ne doosare din unaka samhana karane ko giba se nikalakar fir attarah hajar israaelee purooshaen ko marake, jo sab ke sab talavar chalanevale the, mittee men mila diya." 
Judges20:26 tab sab israaelee, varan sab log betel ko gaae aur rote huae yahova ke samhane baaitte rahe, aur us din sanjh tak upavas kiae rahe, aur yahova ko homabaali aur melabali chaddhaae." 
Judges20:27 aur israaeliyon ne yahova se salah lee us samay to parameshvar ka vacha ka sandook vaheen tha," 
Judges20:28 aur peenahas, jo haroon ka pota, aur aeleeajar ka putra tha un dinon men usake samhane hajir raha karata tha. unhon ne poochha, kya maain aek aur bar apane bhai binyameeaniyon se ladne ko nikal jau, va unako chhodoon? yahova ne kaha, chaddhai kara kyonaki kal maain unako tere hath men kar doonga." 
Judges20:29 tab israaeliyon ne giba ke charon or logon ko dhaat men baaittaya. 
Judges20:30 teesare din israaeliyon ne binyameeaniyon par fir chaddhai kee, aur paahile kee nain giba ke virooddh panti bandhaee." 
Judges20:31 tab binyameenee un logon ka samhana karane ko nikale, aur nagar ke pas se kheenche gaae aur jo do sadk, aek betel ko aur doosaree giba ko gai haai, un men logon ko pahile kee nain marane lage, aur maaidan men koi tees israaelee mare gaae." 
Judges20:32 binyameenee kahane lage, ve paahile kee nain ham se mare jate haain. parantu israaeliyon ne kaha, ham bhagakar unako nagar men se sadkon men kheench le aaen." 
Judges20:33 tab sab israaelee purooshaen ne apane sthan men uttkar balatamar men panati bandhaee aur ghaat men baaitte huae israaelee apane sthan se, arthata maregeva se achanak nikale." 
Judges20:34 tab sab israaeliyon men se chhantte huae das hajar puroosh giba ke samhane aa, aur ghaer ladai hone lagee parantu ve n janate the ki ham par vipaati abhee pada chahatee haai." 
Judges20:35 tab yahova ne binyameeaniyon ko israael se harava diya, aur us din israaeliyon ne pachees hajar aek sau binyameenee purooshaen ko nash kiya, jo sab ke sab talavar chalanevale the.." 
Judges20:36 tab binyameeaniyon ne dekha ki ham har gaae. aur israaelee puroosh un ghaatakon par bhrosa karake jinhen unhon ne giba ke sath baaittaya tha binyameeaniyon ke samhane se chale gaae. 
Judges20:37 parantu ghaatak log faurtee karake giba par jhpatt gaae aur ghaatakon ne age baddhkar kul nagar ko talavar se mara. 
Judges20:38 israaelee purooshaen aur ghaatakon ke beech to yah chinh ttharaya gaya tha, ki ve nagar men se bahut bada dhooaen ka khmbha uttaaen." 
Judges20:39 israaelee puroosh to ladai men hattne lage, aur binyameeaniyon ne yah kahakar ki nishchay ve pahilee ladai kee nai ham se hare jate haai, israaeliyon ko mar dalane lage, aur tees aek purooshaen ko ghaat kiya." 
Judges20:40 parantu jab vah dhooaen ka khmbha nagar men se uttne laga, tab binyameeaniyon ne apane peechhe jo drashtti kee to kya dekha, ki nagar ka nagar dhoona hokar akash kee or ud raha haai." 
Judges20:41 tab israaelee puroosh ghoome, aur binyameenee puroosh yah dekhkar ghabara gaa, ki ham par vipaati a padee haai." 
Judges20:42 isaliye unhon ne israaelee purooshaen ko peett dikhakar jangal ka marga liya parantu ladai un se hotee hee rah, aur jo aur nagaron men se aae the unako israaelee raste men nash karate gaae." 
Judges20:43 unhon ne binyameeaniyon ko ghor liya, aur unhen khdeda, ve manooha men varan giba ke poorva kee or tak unhen latadte gae." 
Judges20:44 aur binyameeaniyon men se attarah hajar puroosh jo sab ke sab shooraveer the mare gaae. 
Judges20:45 tab ve ghoomakar jangal men kee rimmon nam chattan kee or to bhag gaae parantu israaeliyon ne un se panch hajar ko beenakar sadkon men mar dala fir gidom tak unake peechhe padke un men se do hajar puroosh mar dale. 
Judges20:46 tab binyameeaniyon men se jo us din mare gaae ve pachees hajar talavar chalanevale puroosh the, aur ye sab shooraveer the." 
Judges20:47 parantu chh: sau puroosh ghoomakar jangal kee or bhage, aur rimmon nam chattan men pahunch gaa, aur char maheene vaheen rahe." 
Judges20:48 tab israaelee puroosh lauttkar binyaminiyon par lapake aur nagaron men kya manushy, kya pashu, kya jo kuchh mila, sab ko talavar se nash kar dala. aur jitane nagar unhen mile un sabhon ko ag lagakar foonk diya.." 
Judges21:1 israaelee purooshaen ne to mispa men shapath khakar kaha tha, ki ham men koi apanee bettee kisee binyameenee ko n byah dega." 
Judges21:2 ve betel ko jakar sanjh tak parameshvar ke samhane baaitte rahe, aur foott foottkar bahut rote rahe." 
Judges21:3 aur kahate the, he israael ke parameshvar yahova, israael men aeesa kyon hone paya, ki aj israael men aek gotra kee ghattee hui haai?" 
Judges21:4 fir doosare din unhon ne savere utt vahan vedee banakar homabali aur melabali chaddhaae. 
Judges21:5 tab israaelee poochhne lage, israael ke sare gotraen men se kaun haai jo yahova ke pas sabha men n aya tha? unhon ne to bharee shapath khakar kaha tha, ki jo koi mispa ko yahova ke pas n aae vah nishchay mar dala jaaega." 
Judges21:6 tab israaelee apane bhai binyameen ke vishay men yah kahakar pachhtane lage, ki aj israael men se aek gotra katt gaya haai." 
Judges21:7 ham ne jo yahova kee shapath khakar kaha haai, ki ham unhen apanee kisee bettee ko n byah denge, isaaliye bache huon ko striayan milane ke liye kya karen?" 
Judges21:8 jab unhon ne yah poochha, ki israael ke gotraen men se kaun haai jo mispa ko yahova ke pas n aya tha? tab yah maloom hua, ki giladee yavesh se koi chhavanee men sabha ko n aya tha." 
Judges21:9 arthata jab logon kee ginatee kee gai, tab yah jana gaya ki giladee yavesh ke nivaasiyon men se koi yahan naheen haai." 
Judges21:10 isaliye mandlee ne barah hajar shooraveeron ko vahan yah agyaa dekar bhej diya, ki tum jakar striayon aur balabachchon samet giladee yavesh ko talavar se nash karo." 
Judges21:11 aur tumhen jo karana hoga vah yah haai, ki sab purooshaen ko aur jitanee striyon ne puroosh ka munh dekha ho unako satyanash kar dalana." 
Judges21:12 aur unhen giladee yavesh ke nivaasiyon men se char sau javan kumaariyan mileen jinhon ne puroosh ka munh naheen dekha tha aur unhen ve shaeelo ko jo kanan desh men haai chhavanee men le aae.. 
Judges21:13 tab saree mandlee ne un binyameeaniyon ke pas jo rimmon nam chattan par the kahala bheja, aur un se sanadhai ka prachar karaya." 
Judges21:14 tab binyameen usee samay lautt gaae aur unako ve striayan dee gain jo giladee yavesh kee striayon men se jeevit chhodee gain theen taubhee ve unake liye thodee theen. 
Judges21:15 tab log binyameen ke vishay fir yah kahake pachhtaye, ki yahova ne israael ke gotraen men ghattee kee haai." 
Judges21:16 tab mandlee ke vraddh gotraen ne kaha, ki binyameenee striayan jo nash hui haai, to bache huae purooshaen ke liye sree pane ka ham kya upay karen?" 
Judges21:17 fir unhon ne kaha, bache huae binyameeaniyon ke liye koi bhag chahiye, aeesa n ho ki israael men se aek gotra mitt jaae." 
Judges21:18 parantu ham to apanee kisee bettee ko unhen byah naheen de sakate, kyonki israaeliyon ne yah kahakar shapath khai haai ki shaaapit ho vah jo kisee binyameenee ko apanee ladkee byah de." 
Judges21:19 fir unhon ne kaha, suno, shaeelo jo betel kee uttr or, aur us sadk kee poorva or haai jo betel se shaken ko chalee gai haai, aur labona kee daakkhian or haai, us men prati varsha yahova ka aek parva mana jata haai." 
Judges21:20 isaliye unhon ne binyameeaniyon ko yah agyaa dee, ki tum jakar dakh kee baariyon ke beech ghaat lagaae baaitte raho," 
Judges21:21 aur dekhte raho aur yadi shaeelo kee ladkiyan nachane ko nikale, to tum dakh kee bariyon se nikalakar shaeelo kee ladkiyon men se apanee apanee sree ko pakadkar binyameen ke desh ko chale jana." 
Judges21:22 aur jab unake pita va bhai hamare pas jhgadne ko aaenge, tab ham un se kahenge, ki anugrah karake unako hamen de do, kyonaki ladai ke samay ham ne un men se aek aek ke liye sree naheen bachai aur tum logon ne to unako byah naheen diya, naheen to tum ab doshaee ttharate." 
Judges21:23 tab binyameeaniyon ne aeesa hee kiya, arthata unhon ne apanee ginatee ke anusar un nachanevaaliyon men se pakadkar striayan le leen tab apane bhag ko lautt gaa, aur nagaron ko basakar un men rahane lage." 
Judges21:24 usee samay israelee vahan se chalakar apane apane gotra aur apane apane gharane ko gaa, aur vahan se ve apane apane nij bhag ko gae." 
Judges21:25 un dinon men israeliyon ka koi raja n tha jisako jo tteek soojh padta tha vahee vah karata tha.. 
Ruth1:1 jin dinon men nyayee log nyay karate the un dinon men desh men akal pada, tab yahooda ke betalehem ka aek puroosh apanee sree aur dono putraen ko sang lekar moab ke desh men paradeshaee hokar rahane ke liye chala." 
Ruth1:2 us puroosh ka nam eleemelek, aur usakee paatnai ka nam naomee, aur usake do betton ke nam mahalon aur kilyon the ye epraatee arthata yahooda ke betalehem ke rahanevale the. aur moab ke desh men akar vahan rahe." 
Ruth1:3 aur naomee ka paati aeleemelek mar gaya, aur naomee aur usake dono putra rah gaae." 
Ruth1:4 aur inhon ne aek aek moabin byah lee aek sree ka nam orpa aur doosaree ka nam root tha. fir ve vahan koi das varsha rahe. 
Ruth1:5 jab mahalon aur kilyon donon mar gaa, tab naamee apane donon putraen aur paati se rahit ho gai." 
Ruth1:6 tab vah moab ke desh men yah sunakar, ki yahova ne apanee praja ke logon kee sudhai leke unhen bhojanavastu dee haai, us desh se apanee donon bahuon samet lautt jane ko chalee." 
Ruth1:7 tab vah apanee donon bahuon samet us sthan se jahan rahatee theen nikalee, aur unhone yahooda desh ko lautt jane ka marga liya." 
Ruth1:8 tab naomee ne apanee dono bahuon se kaha, tum apane apane maaike lautt jao. aur jaaise tum ne un se jo mar gaae haain aur mujh se bhee praeeti kee haai, vaaise hee yahova tumhare upar krapa kare." 
Ruth1:9 yahova aeesa kare ki tum fir pati karake unake gharon men vishraam pao. tab us ne un ko chooma, aur ve chilla chillakar rone lagee," 
Ruth1:10 aur us se kaha, nishchay ham tere sang teere logon ke pas chalengee." 
Ruth1:11 naomee ne kaha, he meree beattyaie, lautt jao, tum kyon mere sang chalogee? kya meree kokh men aur putra haain jo tumhare paati hon?" 
Ruth1:12 he meree bettyaie, lauttkar chalee jao, kyonki maain paati karane ko booddhee hoon. aur chahe maain kahatee bhee, ki mujhe asha haai, aur aj kee rat mere pati hota bhee, aur mere putra bhee hote," 
Ruth1:13 taubhee kya tum unake sayane hone tak asha lagaae ttharee rahateen? aur unake nimitt pati karane se rookee rahateen? he meree beattyaie, aeesa n ho, kyonki mera du:kh tumhare du:kh se bahut baddhkar haai dekho, yahova ka hath mere virooddh utta haai." 
Ruth1:14 tab ve fir se utteen aur orpa ne to apanee sas ko chooma, parantu root us se alag n hui." 
Ruth1:15 tab us ne kaha, dek, teree jittanee to apane logon aur apane devata ke pas lautt gai haai isaliae too apanee jittanee ke peechhe lautt ja." 
Ruth1:16 root bolee, too mujh se yah binatee n kar, ki mujhe tyag va chhodkar lautt ja kyonaki jidhar too jaae udhar maain bhee jaungee jahan too ttkai vahan maain bhee ttkaioongee tere log mere log honge, aur tera parameshvar mera parameshvar hoga" 
Ruth1:17 jahan too maregee vahan maain bhee maroongee, aur vaheen mujhe mittee dee jaaegee. yadi mratyu chhod aur kisee karan maain tujh se alag hou, to yahova mujh se vaaisa hee varan us se bhee aadhaik kare." 
Ruth1:18 jab us ne yah dekha ki vah mere sang chalane ko sthiar haai, tab us ne us se aur bat n kahee." 
Ruth1:19 so ve donon chal nikaleen aur betalehem ko pahunchee. aur unake betalehem men pahunchane par kul nagar meen unake karan dhoom machee aur striayan kahane lagee, kya yah naomee haai?" 
Ruth1:20 us ne un se kaha, mujhe naomee n kaho, mujhe mara kaho, kyonki sarvashaktaimana ne mujh ko bada du:kh diya haai." 
Ruth1:21 maain bhree pooree chalee gai thee, parantu yahova ne mujhe choochhee karake lauttaya haai. so jab ki yahova hee ne mere virooddh sakshaee dee, aur sarvashaktaiman ne mujhe du:kh diya haai, fir tum mujhe kyon naomee kahatee ho?" 
Ruth1:22 is prakar naomee apanee moaabin bahoo root ke sath lauttee, jo moab ke desh se ai thee. aur ve jo kattne ke arambh ke samay betalehem men pahunchee.." 
Ruth2:1 naomee ke paati aeleemelek ke kul men usaka aek bada dhanee kuttumbee tha, jisaka nam boaj tha." 
Ruth2:2 aur moabin root ne naomee se kaha, mujhe kisee khet men jane de, ki jo mujh par anugrah kee drashtti kare, usake peechhe peechhe maain sila beenatee jaun. us ne kaha, chalee ja, bettee." 
Ruth2:3 so vah jakar aek khet men lavanevalon ke peechhe beenane lagee, aur jis khet men vah sanyog se gai thee vah aeleemelek ke kuttumbee boaj ka tha." 
Ruth2:4 aur boaj betalehem se akar lavanevalon se kahane laga, yahova tumhare sang rahe, aur ve us se bole, yahova tujhe ashaeesh de." 
Ruth2:5 tab boaj ne apane us sevak se jo lavanevalon ke upar ttharaya gaya tha poochha, vah kis kee kanya haai." 
Ruth2:6 jo sevak lavanevalon ke upar ttharaya gaya tha us ne uttr diya, vah moabin kanya haai, jo naomee ke sang moab desh se lautt ai haai." 
Ruth2:7 us ne kaha tha, mujhe lavanevalon ke peechhe peechhe poolon ke beech beenane aur balen battorane de. to vah ai, aur bhor se ab tak yaheen haai, keval thodee der tak ghar men rahee thee." 
Ruth2:8 tab boaj ne root se kaha, he meree bettee, kya too sunatee haai? kisee doosare ke khet men beenane ko n jana, meree hee daasiyon ke sang yaheen rahana." 
Ruth2:9 jis khet ko ve lavateen hon usee par tera dhyan bandha rahe, aur unheen ke peechhe peechhe chala karana. kya maain ne javanon ko agyaa naheen dee, ki tujh se n bolen? aur jab jab tujhe pyas lage, tab tab too baratanon ke pas jakar javanon ka bhra hua panee peena." 
Ruth2:10 tab vah boomi tak jhukakar munh ke bal giree, aur us se kahane lagee, kya karan haai ki too ne mujh paradeshain par anugrah kee drashtti karake meree suadhai lee haai?" 
Ruth2:11 boaj ne uttr diya, jo kuchh too ne paati marane ke peechhe apanee sas se kiya haai, aur too kis reeti apane mata pita aur janmaboomi ko chhodkar aeese logon men ai haai jinako pahile too ne janatee thee, yah sab mujhe vistar ke sath bataya gaya haai." 
Ruth2:12 yahova teree karanee ka fal de, aur israael ka parameshvar yahova jisake pankhon ke tale too sharan lene ai haai tujhe poora badala den" 
Ruth2:13 us ne kaha, he mere prabhu, tere anugrah kee draashtti mujh par banee rahe, kyonki yadhyapi maain teree dasiyon men se kisee ke bhee barabar naheen hoo, taubhee too ne apanee dasee ke man men paaittnevalee baten kahakar mujhe shaantai dee haai." 
Ruth2:14 fir khane ke samay boaj ne us se kaha, yaheen akar rottee kha, aur apana kaur sirake men bora. to vah lavanevalon ke pas baaitt gai aur us ne usako bhunee hui balen dee aur vah khakar trapt hui, varan kuchh bacha bhee rakha." 
Ruth2:15 jab vah beenane ko uttee, tab boaj ne apane javanon ko agyaa dee, ki usako poolon ke beech beech men bhee beenane do, aur dosh mat lagao." 
Ruth2:16 varan mutthee bhr jane par kuchh kuchh nikal kar gira bhee diya karo, aur usake beenane ke liye chhod do, aur use ghaudko mata." 
Ruth2:17 so vah sanjh tak khet men beenatee rahee tab jo kuchh been chukee use fattka, aur vah koi aepa bhr jau nikala." 
Ruth2:18 tab vah use uttakar nagar men gai, aur usakee sas ne usaka beena hua dekha, aur jo kuchh us ne trapt hokar bachaya tha usako us ne nikalakar apanee sas ko diya." 
Ruth2:19 usakee sas ne us se poochha, aj too kahan beenatee, aur kahan kam karatee thee? dhany vah ho jis ne teree suadhai lee haai. tab us ne apanee sas ko bata diya, ki maain ne kis ke pas kam kiya, aur kaha, ki jis puroosh ke pas maain ne aj kam kiya usaka nam boaj haai." 
Ruth2:20 naomee ne apanee bahoo se kaha, vah yahova kee or se ashaeesh paa, kyonki us ne n to jeeavit par se aur n mare huon par se apanee karoona hattai! fir naomee ne us se kaha, vah puroosh to hamara kuttumbee haai, varan un men se haai jinako hamaree boomi chhudane ka aadhaikar haai." 
Ruth2:21 fir root moaabin bolee, us ne mujh se yah bhee kaha, ki jab tak mere sevak meree kattnee pooree n kar chuken tab tak unheen ke sang sang lagee raha." 
Ruth2:22 naomee ne apanee bahu root se kaha, meree bettee yah achchha bhee haai, ki too usee kee daasiyon ke sath sath jaya kare, aur ve tujh ko doosare ke khet men n milen." 
Ruth2:23 isaliye root jau aur gehoon donon kee kattnee ke ant tak beenane ke liye boaj kee dasiyon ke sath sath lagee rahee aur apanee sas ke yahan rahatee thee.. 
Ruth3:1 usakee sas naomee ne us se kaha, he meree bettee, kya maain tere liye ttanv n ddoonddoon ki tera bhla ho?" 
Ruth3:2 ab jisakee dasiyon ke pas too thee, kya vah boaj hamara kuttumbee naheen haai? vah to aj rat ko khlihan men jau fattkega." 
Ruth3:3 too snan kar tel laga, vasr pahinakar khlihan ko ja parantu jab tak vah puroosh kha pee n chuke tab tak apane ko us par pragatt n karana." 
Ruth3:4 aur jab vah lett jaa, tab too us ke lettne ke sthan ko dekh lena fir bheetar ja usake panv ughaarake lett jana tab vahee tujhe bataaega ki tujhe kya karana chahiye." 
Ruth3:5 us ne us se kaha, jo kuchh too kahatee haai vah sab maain karoongee." 
Ruth3:6 tab vah khalihan ko gai aur apanee sas kee agyaa ke anusar hee kiya. 
Ruth3:7 jab boaj kha pee chuka, aur usaka man anandait hua, tab jakar rashai ke aek sire par lett gaya. tab vah chupachap gai, aur usake panv ughaar ke lett gai." 
Ruth3:8 adhaee rat ko vah puroosh chaunk pada, aur age kee or jhukakar kya paya, ki mere panvon ke pas koi sree lettee haai." 
Ruth3:9 us ne poochha, too kaun haai? tab vah bolee, maain to teree dasee root hoon too apanee dasee ko apanee char oddha de, kyonki too hamaree boomi chhudanevala kuttumbee haai." 
Ruth3:10 us ne kaha, he bettee, yahova kee or se tujh par ashaeesh ho kyonki too ne apanee pichhlee praeeati pahilee se aadhaik dikhai, kyonki to, kya dhanee, kya kangal, kisee javan ke peechhe naheen lagee." 
Ruth3:11 isaliye ab, he meree bettee, mat dr, jo kuchh too kahegee maain tujh se karoonga kyonaki mere nagar ke sab log janate haain ki too bhlee sree haai." 
Ruth3:12 aur ab sach to haai ki maain chhudanevala kuttumbee hoo, taubhee aek aur haai jise mujh se paahile hee chhudane ka adhaikar haai." 
Ruth3:13 so rat bhr ttharee rah, aur sabere yadi vah tere liye chhudanevale ka kam karana chahe to achchha, vahee aeesa kare parantu yaadi vah tere liye chhudanevale ka kam karane ko prasann n ho, to yahova ke jeevan kee shapath maain hee vah kam karoonga. bhor tak lettee raha." 
Ruth3:14 tab vah usake panvon ke pas bhor tak lettee rahee, aur us se paahile ki koi doosare ko cheenh sake vah uttee aur boaj ne kaha, koi janane n paae ki khlihan men koi sree ai thee." 
Ruth3:15 tab boaj ne kaha, jo char too oddhe haai use faailakar thambh le. aur jab us ne use thambha tab us ne chh: napuae jau napakar usako utta diya fir vah nagar men chalee gai." 
Ruth3:16 jab root apanee sas ke pas ai tab us ne poochha, he bettee, kya hua? tab jo kuchh us puroosh ne us se kiya tha vah sab us ne use kah sunaya." 
Ruth3:17 fir us ne kaha, yah chh: napuae jau us ne yah kahakar mujhe diya, ki apanee sas ke pas choochhe hath mat ja." 
Ruth3:18 us ne kaha, he meree bettee, jab tak too n jane ki is bat ka kaaisa fal nikalega, tab tak chupachap baaittee rah, kyonki aj us puroosh ko yah kam bina nipattaae chaain n padega.." 
Ruth4:1 tab boaj faattk ke pas jakar baaitt gaya aur jis chhudanevale kuttumbee kee charcha boaj ne kee thee, vah bhee a gaya. tab boaj ne kaha, he faulane, ighar akar yaheen baaitt ja to vah udhar jakar baaitt gaya." 
Ruth4:2 tab us ne nagar ke das vraddh logon ko bulakar kaha, yaheen baaitt jao ve bhee baaitt gaae." 
Ruth4:3 tab vah chhudanevale kuttumbee se kahane laga, naomee jo moab desh se lautt ai haai vah hamare bhai aeleemelek kee aek ttukada boomi bechana chahatee haai." 
Ruth4:4 isaliye maain ne socha ki yah bat tujh ko jatakar kahoonga, ki too usako in baaitte huon ke samhane aur mere logon ke in vraddh logon ke samhane mol le. aur yadi too usako chhudana chahe, to chhuda aur yadi too chhudana n chahe, to mujhe aeesa hee bata de, ki maain samajh loon kyonki tujhe chhod usake chhudane ka aadhaikar aur kisee ko naheen haai, aur tere bad maain hoon. us ne kaha, maain use chhudaunga." 
Ruth4:5 fir boaj ne kaha, jab too us boomi ko naomee ke hath se mol le, tab use root moabin ke hath se bhee jo mare huae kee sree haai is manasa se mol lena padega, ki mare huae ka nam usake bhag men sthiar kar de." 
Ruth4:6 us chhudanevale kuttumbee ne kaha, maain usako chhuda naheen sakata, aeesa n ho ki mera nij bhag bigad jae. isaaliye mera chhudane ka aadhaikar too le le, kyonaki mujh se vah chhudaya naheen jata." 
Ruth4:7 agale samay men israael men chhudane ke badalane ke vishay men sab pakka karane ke liye yah vyavahar tha, ki manushy apanee jootee utar ke doosare ko deta tha. israael men gavahee isee reeati hotee thee." 
Ruth4:8 isaliye us chhudanevale kuttumbee ne boaj se yah kahakara ki too use mol le, apanee jootee utaree." 
Ruth4:9 tab boaj ne vraddh logon aur sab logon se kaha, tum aj is bat ke sakshaee ho ki jo kuchh aeleemelek ka aur jo kuchh kilyon aur mahalon ka tha, vah sab maain naomee ke hath se mol leta hoon." 
Ruth4:10 fir mahalon kee sree root moaabin ko bhee maain apanee patnee karane ke liye is manasa se mol leta hoo, ki mare huae ka nam usake nij bhag par sthiar karoo, kaheen aeesa n ho ki mare huae ka nam usake bhaiyon men se aur usake sthan ke faattk se mitt jaae tum log aj sakshaee tthare ho." 
Ruth4:11 tab faattk ke pas jitane log the unhon ne aur vraddh logon ne kaha, ham sakshaee haain. yah jo sree tere ghar men atee haai usako yahova israael ke gharane kee do upajanevalee rahel aur lia: ke saman kare. aur too aepraata men veerata kare, aur betalehem men tera bada nam ho" 
Ruth4:12 aur jo santan yahova is javan sree ke dara tujhe de usake karan se tera gharana peres ka sa ho jaa, jo tamar se yahooda ke dara utpann hua." 
Ruth4:13 tab boaj ne root ko byah liya, aur vah usakee patnee ho gai aur jab vah usake pas gaya tab yahova kee daya se us ko garbh raha, aur usake aek betta utpann hua." 
Ruth4:14 tab striayon ne naomee se kaha, yahova dhany haai, jis ne tujhe aj chhudanevale kuttumbee ke bina naheen chhoda israael men isaka bada nam ho." 
Ruth4:15 aur yah tere jee men jee le anevala aur tera buddhape men palanevala ho, kyonaki teree bahoo jo tujh se praem rakhtee aur sat betton se bhee tere liye shraeshtt haai usee ka yah betta haai." 
Ruth4:16 fir naomee us bachche ko apanee god men rakhkar usakee dhaai ka kam karane lagee. 
Ruth4:17 aur usakee padosinon ne yah kahakar, ki naomee ke aek betta utpann hua haai, ladke ka nam obed rakha. yishau ka pita aur daud ka dada vahee hua.." 
Ruth4:18 peres kee yah vanshaavalee haai, arthata peres se hebraen," 
Ruth4:19 aur hebraen se ram, aur ram se ammeenadab," 
Ruth4:20 aur ammeenadab se nahashaen, aur nahashaen se salmon" 
Ruth4:21 aur salmon se boaj, aur boaj se obed," 
Ruth4:22 aur obed se yishau, aur yishau se daud utpann hua.." 
1Samuel1:1 aepraaim ke pahadee desh ke ramataaim sopeem nam nagar ka nivasee aelkana nam puroosh tha, vah aepraemee tha, aur soop ke putra tohoo ka parapota, aeleehoo ka pota, aur yaroham ka putra tha." 
1Samuel1:2 aur usake do paatnaiyan theen aek ka to nam hanna aur doosaree ka paaninna tha. aur paninna ke to balak hua, parantu hanna ke koi balak n hua." 
1Samuel1:3 vah puroosh praati varsha apane nagar se senaon ke yahova ko dandvata karane aur melabali chaddhane ke liye shaeelo men jata tha aur vahan hopnee aur peenahas nam aelee ke donon putra rahate the, jo yahova ke yajak the." 
1Samuel1:4 aur jab jab aelkana melabali chaddhata tha tab tab vah apanee patnee paaninna ko aur usake sab bette-beattyaien ko dan diya karata tha 
1Samuel1:5 parantu hanna ko vah doona dan diya karata tha, kyonaki vah hanna se praeeati rakhta tha taubhee yahova ne usakee kokh band kar rakhee thee." 
1Samuel1:6 parantu usakee saut is karan se, ki yahova ne usakee kokh band kar rakhee thee, use atyant chiddhakar kuddhatee rahatee theen." 
1Samuel1:7 aur vah to praati varsha aeesa hee karata tha aur jab hanna yahova ke bhvan ko jatee thee tab paninna usako chiddhatee thee. isaliye vah rotee aur khana n khatee thee. 
1Samuel1:8 isaliye usake paati aelkana ne us se kaha, he hanna, too kyon rotee haai? aur khana kyon naheen khatee? aur mera man kyon udas haai? kya tere liye maain das betton se bhee achchha naheen hoon?" 
1Samuel1:9 tab shaeelo men khane aur peene ke bad hanna uttee. aur yahova ke mandair ke chaukhtt ke aek alang ke pas aelee yajak kursee par baaitta hua tha. 
1Samuel1:10 aur yah man men vyakul hokar yahova se praarthna karane aur bilakh bilakhkar rone lagee. 
1Samuel1:11 aur us ne yah mannat manee, ki he senaon ke yahova, yadi too apanee dasee ke du:kh par sachamuch drashtti kare, aur meree sudhai le, aur apanee dasee ko bool n jaa, aur apanee dasee ko putra de, to maain use usake jeevan bhr ke liye yahova ko arpan karoongee, aur usake sir par chhura firane n paaega." 
1Samuel1:12 jab vah yahova ke samhane aeesee praarthna kar rahee thee, tab aelee usake munh kee or tak raha tha." 
1Samuel1:13 hanna man hee man kah rahee thee usake hontt to hilate the parantu usaka shabd n sun padta tha isaliye aelee ne samajha ki vah nasho men haai. 
1Samuel1:14 tab aelee ne us se kaha, too kab tak nasho men rahegee? apana nasha utara." 
1Samuel1:15 hanna ne kaha, nahee, he mere prabhu, maain to du:khaiya hoon maain ne n to dakhmadha piya haai aur n madira, maain ne apane man kee bat kholakar yahova se kahee haai." 
1Samuel1:16 apanee dasee ko ochhee sree n jan jo kuchh maain ne ab tak kaha haai, vah bahut hee shaeakit hone aur chiddhai jane ke karan kaha haai." 
1Samuel1:17 aelee ne kaha, kushal se chalee ja israael ka parameshvar tujhe man chaha var de." 
1Samuel1:18 use ne kaha, teree dasee teree drashtti men anugrah pae. tab vah sree chalee gai aur khana khaya, aur usaka munh fir udas n raha." 
1Samuel1:19 bihan ko ve savere utt yahova ko dandvata karake rama men apane ghar lautt gaae. aur aelakana apanee sree hanna ke pas gaya, aur yahova ne usakee suadhai lee" 
1Samuel1:20 tab hanna garbhvatee hui aur samay par usake aek putra hua, aur usaka nam shamooael rakha, kyonki vah kahane lagee, maain ne yahova se mangakar ise paya haai." 
1Samuel1:21 fir aelkana apane poore gharane samet yahova ke samhane praati varsha kee melabaali chaddhane aur apanee mannat pooree karane ke liye gaya. 
1Samuel1:22 parantu hanna apane pati se yah kahakar ghar men rah gai, ki jab balak ka doodha choott jaaega tab maain usako le jaungee, ki vah yahova ko munh dikhaa, aur vahan sada bana rahe." 
1Samuel1:23 usake paati elakana ne us se kaha, jo tujhe bhla lage vahee kar, jab tak too usaka doodha n chhudaae tab tak yaheen ttharee raha keval itana ho ki yahova apana vachan poora kare. isaaliye vah sree vaheen ghar par rah gai aur apane putra ke doodha chhuttne ke samay tak usako pilatee rahee." 
1Samuel1:24 jab us ne usaka doodha chhudaya tab vah usako sang le gai, aur teen bachhde, aur aepa bhr atta, aur kuppee bhr dakhmadha bhee le gai, aur us ladke ko shaeelo men yahova ke bhvan men pahuncha diya us samay vah ladka hee tha." 
1Samuel1:25 aur unhon ne bachhda bali karake balak ko aelee ke pas pahuncha diya. 
1Samuel1:26 tab hanna ne kaha, he mere prabhu, tere jeevan kee shapat, he mere prabhu, maain vahee sree hoon jo tere pas yaheen khdee hokar yahova se praarthna karatee thee." 
1Samuel1:27 yah vahee balak haai jisake liye maain ne praarthna kee thee aur yahova ne mujhe munh manga var diya haai. 
1Samuel1:28 isee liye maain bhee use yahova ko arpan kar detee hoon ki yah apane jeevan bhr yahova hee ka bana rahe. tab us ne vaheen yahova ko dandvata kiya.. 
1Samuel2:1 aur hanna ne praarthna karake kaha, mera man yahova ke karan magan haai mera seeng yahova ke karan uncha, hua haai. mera munh mere shatrauon ke virooddh khul gaya, kyonki maain tere kiae huae uddhar se anaandait hoon." 
1Samuel2:2 yahova ke tuly koi paavitra nahee, kyonki tujh ko chhod aur koi haai hee naheen aur hamare parameshvar ke saman koi chattan naheen haai.." 
1Samuel2:3 foolakar ahankar kee or baten mat karo, aur andhor kee baten tumhare munh se n nikalen kyonaki yahova gyaanee ishvar haai, aur kamon ko taulanevala haai.." 
1Samuel2:4 shooraveeron ke dhanush toott gaa, aur ttokar khanevalon kee katt imen bal ka faentta kasa gaya.." 
1Samuel2:5 jo pett bhrate the unhen rottee ke liye majadooree karanee padee, jo bookhe the ve fir aeese n rahe. varan jo banjh thee usake sat hua, aur anek balakon kee mata ghaulatee jatee haai." 
1Samuel2:6 yahova marata haai aur jilata bhee haai vahee adhaelok men utarata aur us se nikalata bhee haai.. 
1Samuel2:7 yahova nirdhan karata haai aur dhanee bhee banata haai, vahee neecha karata aur uncha bhee karata haai." 
1Samuel2:8 vah kangal ko dhooli men se uttata aur daridra ko ghoore men se nikal khda karata haai, taki unako adhaipaatiyon ke sang bittaa, aur mahimayukt sinhasan ke aadhaikaree banaae. kyonaki prathvee ke khmbhe yahova ke haai, aur us ne un par jagat ko dhara haai." 
1Samuel2:9 vah apane bhkton ke pavon ko sambhale rahega, parantu dushtt aandhiayare men chupachap pade rahenge kyonki koi manushy apane bal ke karan prabal n hoga.." 
1Samuel2:10 jo yahova se jhgadte haain ve chakanachoor honge vah unake virooddh akash men garajega. yahova prathvee kee chhor tak nyay karega aur apane raja ko bal dega, aur apane aabhaishaikt ke seeng ko uncha karega.." 
1Samuel2:11 tab aelkana rama ko apane ghar chala gaya. aur vah balak aelee yajak ke samhane yahova kee seva tthal karane laga.. 
1Samuel2:12 aelee ke putra to luchche the unhon ne yahova ko n pahichana. 
1Samuel2:13 aur yajakon kee reeati logon ke sath yah thee, ki jab koi manushy melabaali chaddhata tha tab yajak ka sevak mans pakane ke samay aek traishoolee kantta hath men liye huae akar," 
1Samuel2:14 use kadahee, va handee, va hande, va tasale ke bheetar dalata tha aur jitana mans kantte men lag jata tha utana yajak ap leta tha. yon hee ve shaeelo men sare israeliyon se kiya karate the jo vahan ate the." 
1Samuel2:15 aur charbee jalane se pahile bhee yajak ka sevak akar melabali chaddhanevale se kahata tha, ki kabab ke liye yajak ko mans de vah tujh se paka hua nahee, kachcha hee mans lega." 
1Samuel2:16 aur jab koi us se kahata, ki nishchay charbee abhee jalai jaaegee, tab jitana tera jee chahe utana le lena, tab vah kahata tha, nahee, abhee de naheen to maain chheen loonga." 
1Samuel2:17 isaliye un javanon ka pap yahova kee draashtti men bahut bharee hua kyonaki ve manushy yahova kee bhentt ka tiraskar karate the.. 
1Samuel2:18 parantu shamooael jo balak tha sanee ka aepod pahine huae yahova ke samhane seva tthal kiya karata tha. 
1Samuel2:19 aur usakee mata prati varsha usake liye aek chhotta sa baga banakar jab apane paati ke sang praati varsha kee melabaali chaddhane atee thee tab bage ko usake pas laya karatee thee. 
1Samuel2:20 aur aelee ne aelkana aur usakee patnee ko ashaeervad dekar kaha, yahova is arpan kiae huae balak kee santee jo usako arpan kiya gaya haai tujh ko is patnee ke vansh de tab ve apane yahan chale gaae." 
1Samuel2:21 aur yahova ne hanna kee suadhai lee, aur vah garbhvatee hui or usake teen bette aur do beattyaian utpann hui. aur shamooael balak yahova ke sang rahata hua baddhta gaya." 
1Samuel2:22 aur aelee to ati booddha ho gaya tha, aur us ne suna ki mere putra sare israael se kaaisa kaaisa vyavahar karate haai, varan milapavale tamboo ke dar par seva karanevalee striayon ke sang kukarma bhee karate haain." 
1Samuel2:23 tab us ne un se kaha, tum aeese aeese kam kyon karate ho? maain to in sab logon se tumhare kukamorn kee charcha suna karata hoon." 
1Samuel2:24 he mere betto, aeesa n karo, kyonaki jo samachar mere sunane men ata haai vah achchha naheen tum to yahova kee praja se aparadha karate ho." 
1Samuel2:25 yaadi aek manushy doosare manushy ka aparadha kare, tab to parameshvar usaka nyay karega parantu yaadi koi manushy yahova ke virooddh pap kare, to usake liye kaun binatee karega? taubhee unhon ne apane pita kee bat n manee kyonaki yahova kee ichchha unhen mar dalane kee thee." 
1Samuel2:26 parantu shamooael balak baddhta gaya aur yahova aur manushy dono us se prasann rahate the.. 
1Samuel2:27 aur parameshvar ka aek jan aelee ke pas jakar us se kahane laga, yahova yon kahata haai, ki jab tere moolapuroosh ka gharana misr men firaun ke gharane ke vash men tha, tab kya maain us par nishchay pragatt n hua tha?" 
1Samuel2:28 aur kya maain ne use israael ke sab gotraen men se isaliye chun naheen liya tha, ki mera yajak hokar meree vedee ke upar chaddhave chaddhaa, aur dhoop jalaa, aur mere samhane aepod pahina kare? aur kya maain ne tere moolapuroosh ke gharane ko israaeliyon ke kul havy n diae the?" 
1Samuel2:29 isaliye mere melabali aur annabaali jinako maain ne apane dhaam men chaddhane kee agyaa dee haai, unhen tum log kyon panv tale raundate ho? aur too kyon apane putraen ka adar mere adar se aadhaik karata haai, ki tum log meree israaelee praja kee achchhee se achchhee bhentten kha khake motte ho jao?" 
1Samuel2:30 isaliye israael ke parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki maain ne kaha to tha, ki tera gharana aur tere moolapuroosh ka gharana mere samhane sadaaiv chala karega parantu ab yahova kee vanee yah haai, ki yah bat mujh se door ho kyonaki jo mera adar karen maain unaka adar karoonga, aur jo mujhe tuchchh janen ve chhotte samajhe jaaenge." 
1Samuel2:31 sun, ve din ate haai, ki maain tera bhujabal aur tere moolapuroosh ke gharane ka bhujabal aeesa tod daloonga, ki tere gharane men koi booddha hone n paaega." 
1Samuel2:32 israael ka kitana hee kalyan kyon n ho, taubhee tujhe mere dhaam ka du:kh dekh padega, aur tere gharane men koi kabhee booddha n hone paaega." 
1Samuel2:33 maain tere kul ke sab kisee se to apanee vedee kee seva n chheenoonga, parantu taubhee teree ankhen dekhtee rah jaaengee, aur tera man shaeakit hoga, aur tere ghar kee baddhtee sab apanee pooree javanee hee men mar mittengen." 
1Samuel2:34 aur meree is bat ka chinh vah vipaati hogee jo hopnee aur peenahas nam tere donon putraen par padegee arthata ve dono ke donon aek hee din mar jaaenge. 
1Samuel2:35 aur maain apane liye aek vishvasayogy yajak ttharaunga, jo mere day aur man kee ichchha ke anusar kiya karega, aur maain usaka ghar basaunga aur sthiar karoonga, aur vah mere aabhaishaikt ke age sab din chala fira karega." 
1Samuel2:36 aur aeesa hoga ki jo koi tere gharane men bacha rahega vah usee ke pas jakar aek chhotte se ttukade chandee ke va aek rottee ke liye dandvata karake kahega, yajak ke kisee kam men mujhe laga, jis se mujhe aek ttukada rottee mile.." 
1Samuel3:1 aur vah balak shamooael aelee ke samhane yahova kee seva tthal karata tha. aur un dinon men yahova ka vachan durlabh tha aur darshan kam milata tha. 
1Samuel3:2 aur us samay aeesa hua ki aelee kee ankhe to dhaunghalee hone lagee theen aur use n soojh padta tha jab vah apane sthan men letta hua tha," 
1Samuel3:3 aur parameshvar ka deepak ab tak bujha naheen tha, aur shamooael yaheva ke maandair men janha parameshvar ka sandook tha letta tha" 
1Samuel3:4 tab yahova ne shamooael ko pukara aur us ne kaha, kya agyaa!" 
1Samuel3:5 tab us ne aelee ke pas daudkar kaha, kya agyaa, too ne to mujhe pukara haai. vah bola, maain ne naheen pukara fir ja lett raha. to vah jakar lett gaya." 
1Samuel3:6 tab yahova ne fir pukar ke kaha, he shamooaela! shamooael uttkar aelee ke pas gaya, aur kaha, kya agyaa, too ne to mujhe pukara haai. us ne kaha, he mere bette, maain ne naheen pukara fir ja lett raha." 
1Samuel3:7 us samay tak to shamooel yahova ko naheen pahachanata tha, aur n to yahova ka vachan hee us par pragatt hua tha." 
1Samuel3:8 fir teesaree bar yahova ne shamooael ko pukara. aur vah uttke aelee ke pas gaya, aur kaha, kya agyaa, too ne to mujhe pukara haai. tab aelee ne samajh liya ki is balak ko yahova ne pukara haai." 
1Samuel3:9 isaliye aelee ne shamooael se kaha, ja lett rahe aur yaadi vah tujhe fir pukare, to too kahana, ki he yahova, kah, kyonaki tera das sun raha haai tab shamooael apane sthan par jakar lett gaya." 
1Samuel3:10 tab yahova a khda hua, aur pahile kee nain pukara, shamooaela! shamooaela! shamooael ne kaha, kah, kyonaki tera das sun raha haai." 
1Samuel3:11 yahova ne shamooael se kaha, sun, maain israael men aek kam karane par hoo, jisase sab sunanevalon par bada sannatta chha jaaega." 
1Samuel3:12 us din maain elee ke virooddh vah sab kuchh poora karoonga jo maain ne usake gharane ke vishay men kaha, use arambh se ant tak poora karoonga." 
1Samuel3:13 kyonaki maain to usako yah kahakar jata chuka hoo, ki maain us adharma ka dand jise vah janata haai sada ke liye usake ghar ka nyay karoonga, kyonaki usake putra ap shaapit huae haai, aur us ne unhen naheen roka." 
1Samuel3:14 is karan maain ne aelee ke gharane ke vishay yah shapath khai, ki aelee ke gharane ke adharma ka praayaashchait n to melabaali se kabhee hoga, aur n annabali se." 
1Samuel3:15 aur shamooael bhor tak letta raha tab us ne yahova ke bhvan ke kivadon ko khola. aur shamooael aelee ko us darshan kee baten batanen se dra. 
1Samuel3:16 tab aelee ne shamooael ko pukarakar kaha, he mere bette, shamooaela! vah bola, kya agyaa." 
1Samuel3:17 tab us ne poochha, vah kaun see bat haai jo yahova ne tujh se kahee haai? use mujh se n chhpaia. jo kuchh us ne tujh se kaha ho yadi too us men se kuchh bhee mujh se chhpaiaa, to parameshvar tujh se vaaisa hee varan us se bhee aadhaik kare." 
1Samuel3:18 tab shamooael ne usako rattee rattee baten kah sunai, aur kuchh bhee n chhpai rakha. vah bola, vah to yahova haai jo kuchh vah bhla jane vahee karen." 
1Samuel3:19 aur shamooael bada hota gaya, aur yahova usake sang raha, aur us ne usakee koi bhee bat nishfal hone naheen dee." 
1Samuel3:20 aur dan se beshorba tak ke rahanevale sare israaeliyon ne jan liya ki shamooael yahova ka nabee hone ke liye niyukt kiya gaya haai. 
1Samuel3:21 aur yahova ne shaeelo men fir darshan diya, kyonaki yahova ne apane ap ko shaeelo men shamooael par apane vachan ke dara pragatt kiya.." 
1Samuel4:1 aur shamooael ka vachan sare israael ke pas pahuncha. aur israaelee palishtaiyon se yuddh karane ko nikale aur unhon ne to aebenejer ke asa-pas chhavanee dalee, aur paalishtaiyon ne apek men chhavanee dalee." 
1Samuel4:2 tab paalishtaiyon ne israael ke virooddh panti bandhae, aur jab ghamasan yuddh hone laga tab israaelee paalishtaiyon se har aeg, aur unhon ne koi char hajar israaelee sena ke purooshaen ko maaidan hee men mar dala." 
1Samuel4:3 aur jab ve log chhavanee men lautt aa, tab israael ke vraddh log kahane lage, ki yahova ne aj hamen paalishtaiyon se kyon harava diya haai? ao, ham yahova kee vacha ka sandook shaeelo se mang le aae, ki vah hamare beech men akar hamen shatrauon ke hath se bachaae." 
1Samuel4:4 tab un logon ne shaeelon men bhejakar vahan se karoobon ke upar virajanevale senaon ke yahova kee vacha ka sandook manga liya aur parameshvar kee vacha ke sandook ke sath aelee ke donon putra, hopnee aur pinahas bhee vahan the." 
1Samuel4:5 jab yahova kee vacha ka sandook chhavanee men pahuncha, tab sare israaelee itane bal se lalakar utte, ki boomi goonj uttee." 
1Samuel4:6 is lalakar ka shabd sunakar palishtaiyon ne poochha, iabiryon kee chhavanee men aeesee badee lalakar ka kya karan haai? tab unhon ne jan liya, ki yahova ka sandook chhavanee men aya haai." 
1Samuel4:7 tab paalishtee drakar kahane lage, us chhavanee men parameshvar a gaya haai. fir unhon ne kaha, haya! ham par aeesee bat paahile naheen hui thee." 
1Samuel4:8 haya! aeese mahapratapee devataon ke hath se ham ko kaun bachaaega? ye to ve hee devata haain jinhon ne misriyon par jangal men sab prakar kee vipaatiayan dalee theen. 
1Samuel4:9 he paalishtaiyo, tum hiyav bandhae, aur purooshaarth jagao, kaheen aeesa n ho ki jaaise ibraee tumhare adhaeen ho gaae vaaise tum bhee unake adhaeen ho jao purooshaarth karake sangraam karo." 
1Samuel4:10 tab paalishtee ladai ke maaidan men toott pade, aur israaelee harakar apane apane dere ko bhagane lage aur aeesa atyant sanhar hua, ki tees hajar israaelee paaidal khet aae." 
1Samuel4:11 aur parameshvar ka sandook chheen liya gaya aur aelee ke dono putra, hopnee aur peenahas, bhee mare gaae." 
1Samuel4:12 tab aek binyameenee manushy ne sena men se daudkar usee din apane vasr faade aur sir par mittee dale huae shaeelo men pahuncha. 
1Samuel4:13 vah jab pahuncha us samay aelee, jisaka man parameshvar ke sandook kee chinta se thrathra raha tha, vah marga ke kinare kursee par baaitta batt joh raha tha. aur jyonhee us manushy ne nagar men pahunchakar vah samachar diya tyonhee sara nagar chilla utta." 
1Samuel4:14 chillane ka shabd sunakar aelee ne poochha, aeese hullad aur hahakar machane ka kya karan haai? aur us manushy ne jhtt jakar aelee ko poora hal sunaya." 
1Samuel4:15 ael to atthanave varsha ka tha, aur usakee ankhen dhaundhalee pad gai thee, aur use kuchh soojhta n tha." 
1Samuel4:16 us manushy ne elee se kaha, maain vahee hoon jo sena men se aya hoon aur maain sena se aj hee bhag aya. vah bola, he mere bette, kya samachar haai?" 
1Samuel4:17 us samachar denevale ne uttr diya, ki israelee palishtaiyon ke samhane se bhag gaae haai, aur logon ka bada bhyanak sanhar bhee hua haai, aur tere donon putra hopnee aur peenahas bhee mare gaa, aur parameshvar ka sandook bhee chheen liya gaya haai." 
1Samuel4:18 jyonhee us ne parameshvar ke sandook ka nam liya tyonhee aelee faattk ke pas kursee par se pachhad khakar gir pada aur booddhe aur bharee hone ke karan usakee gardan toott gai, aur vah mar gaya. us ne to israaeliyon ka nyay chalees varsha tak kiya tha." 
1Samuel4:19 usakee bahoo peenahas kee sree garbhvatee thee, aur usaka samay sameep tha. aur jab us ne parameshvar ke sandook ke chheen liae jane, aur apane sasur aur pati ke marane ka samachar suna, tab usako jachcha ka darda utta, aur vah duhar gai, aur usake ek putra utpann hua." 
1Samuel4:20 usake marate marate un striayon ne jo usake as pas khdee theen us se kaha, mat dr, kyonki tere pratra utpann hua haai. parantu us ne kud uttr n diya, aur n kuchh dhyan diya." 
1Samuel4:21 aur parameshvar ke sandook ke chheen liae jane aur apane sasur aur pati ke karan us ne yah kahakar us balak ka nam ikabod rakha, ki israael men se maahima utt gai!" 
1Samuel4:22 fir us ne kaha, israael men se mahima utt gai haai, kyonaki parameshvar ka sandook chheen liya gaya haai.." 
1Samuel5:1 aur paalishtaiyon ne parameshvar ka sandook aebanejer se uttakar ashadod men pahuncha diya 
1Samuel5:2 fir palishtaiyon ne parameshvar ke sandook ko uttakar dagon ke maandair men pahunchakar dagon ke pas dhar diya. 
1Samuel5:3 bihan ko ashadodiyon ne tadke uttkar kya dekha, ki dagon yahova ke sandook ke samhane aundho moonh boomi par gira pada haai. tab unhon ne dagon ko uttakar usee ke sthan par fir khda kiya." 
1Samuel5:4 fir bihan ko jab ve tadke utte, tab kya dekha, ki dagon yahova ke sandook ke samhane aundho munh boomi par gira pada haai aur dagon ka sir aur dono hatheliyan devaddhee par kattee hui padee haain nidan dagon ka keval dhad samoocha rah gaya." 
1Samuel5:5 is karan aj ke din tak bhee dagon ke pujaree aur jitane dagon ke maandair men jate haai, ve ashadod men dagon kee devaddhee par panv naheen dharate.." 
1Samuel5:6 tab yahova ka hath ashadodiyon ke upar bharee pada, aur vah unhen nash karane laga aur us ne ashadod aur usake as pas ke logon ke gilaattyaian nikaleen." 
1Samuel5:7 yah hal dekhkar ashadod ke logon ne kaha, israael ke devata ka sandook hamare madhy rahane naheen paaega kyonki usaka hath ham par aur hamare devata dagon par kattorata ke sath pada haai." 
1Samuel5:8 tab unhon ne paalishtaiyon ke sab saradaron ko bulava bheja, aur un se poochha, ham israael ke devata ke sandook se kya karen? ve bole, israael ke parameshvar ke sandook ko ghoomakar gat men pahunchaya jaae. to unhon ne israael ke parameshvar ke sandook ko ghaumakar gat men pahuncha diya." 
1Samuel5:9 jab ve usako ghaumakar vahan pahunche, to yoon hua ki yahova ka hath us nagar ke virooddh aeesa utta ki us men atyant halachal mach gai or us ne chhotte se bade tab us nagar ke sab logon ko mara, aur unake gilaattyaian nikalane lageen." 
1Samuel5:10 tab unhon ne parameshvar ka sandook aekron ko bheja aur jyonhee parameshvar ka sandook aekron men pahuncha tyonhee aekronee yah kahakar chillane lage, ki israael ke devata ka sandook ghaumakar hamare pas isaliye pahunchaya gaya haai, ki ham aur hamare logon ko marava dale." 
1Samuel5:11 tab unhon ne paalishtaiyon ke sab saradaron ko ikattha kiya, aur un se kaha, israael ke devata ke sandook ko nikal do, ki vah apen sthan par lautt jaa, aur ham ko aur hamare logon ko mar dalane n paae. us samast nagar men to mratyu ke bhy kee halachal mach rahee thee, aur parameshvar ka hath vahan bahut bharee pada tha." 
1Samuel5:12 aur jo manushy n mare ve bhee gilaattyaien ke mare pade rahe aur nagar kee chillahatt akash tak pahunchee.. 
1Samuel6:1 yahova ka sandook palishtaiyon ke desh men sat maheene tak raha. 
1Samuel6:2 tab paalishtaiyon ne yajakon aur bhavee karanevalon ko bulakar poochha, ki yahova ke sandook se ham kya karen? hamen bataon kee kya praayashchait dekar ham use usake sthan par bhejen?" 
1Samuel6:3 ve bole, yadi tum israael ke devata ka sandook vahan bheja, jo use vaaise hee n bhejana usakee hani bhrane ke liye avashy hee doshabaali dena. tab tum change ho jaoge, aur tum jan logon ki usaka hath tum par se kyon naheen uttaya gaya." 
1Samuel6:4 unhon ne poochha, ham usakee haani bhrane ke liye kon sa doshabaali den? ve bole, palishtee saradaron kee ginatee ke anusar sone kee panch gilaattyaia, aur sone ke panch choohe kyonki tum sab aur tumhare saradar donon ek hee rog se grasit ho." 
1Samuel6:5 to tum apanee gilaattyaien aur apane desh ke nash karanevale choohon kee bhee mooraten banakar israael ke devata kee maahima mano sambhv haai vah apana hath tum par se aur tumhare devataon aur desh par se utta le. 
1Samuel6:6 tum apane man kyon aeese hatteele karate ho jaaise misriyon aur firaun ne apane man hatteele kar diae the? jab us ne unake madhy men achambhiat kam kia, tab kya unhon ne un logon ko jane n diya, aur kya ve chale n gaae?" 
1Samuel6:7 so ab tum aek nai gadee banao, aur aeesee do dudhaar gayen lo jo suae tale n ai ho, aur un gayon ko us gadee men jotakar unake bachchon ko unake pas se lekar ghar ko lautta do." 
1Samuel6:8 tab yahova ka sandook lekar us gadee par dhar do, aur sane kee jo vastuen tum usakee hati bhrane ke liye doshabaali kee reeti se doge unhen doosare sandook men ghar ke usake pas rakh do. fir use ravana kar do ki chalee jaae." 
1Samuel6:9 aur dekhte rahana yaadi vah apane desh ke marga se hokar betashomesh ko chale, to jano ki hamaree yah badee hani usee kee or se hui: aur yadi nahee, to ham ko nishchay hoga ki yah mar ham par usakee or se nahee, parantu sanyog hee se hui." 
1Samuel6:10 un manushyon ne vaaisa hee kiya arthata do dudhaar gayen lekar us gadee men jotee, aur unake bachchon ko ghar men band kar diya." 
1Samuel6:11 aur yahova ka sandook, aur doosara sandook, aur sone ke choohon aur apanee gilaattyaien kee mooraton ko gadee par rakh diya." 
1Samuel6:12 tab gayon ne betashamesh ko seedha marga liya ve sadk hee sadk bambatee hui chalee gai, aur n daahine mudee aur n bayen aur palishtaiyon ke saradar unake peechhe peechhe betashomesh ke sivane tak gaae." 
1Samuel6:13 aur betashomesh ke log tarai men gehoon katt rahe the aur jab unhon ne ankhen uttakar sandook ko dekha, tab usake dekhne se anaandait hue." 
1Samuel6:14 aur gadee yahoshoo nam aek betashomeshaee ke khet men jakar vahan tthar gai, jahan aek bada patthr tha. tab unhon ne gadee kee lakadee ko cheera aur gayon ko homabaali karake yahova ke liye chaddhaya." 
1Samuel6:15 aur leveeyon ne yahova ke sandook ko us sandook ke samet jo sath tha, jis men sone kee vastuaen thee, utarake us bade patthr par dhar diya aur betashomesh ke logon ne usee din yahova ke liye homabaali aur melabali chaddhaae." 
1Samuel6:16 yah dekhkar paalishtaiyon ke panchon saradar usee din aekron ko lautt gaae.. 
1Samuel6:17 sone kee gilaattyaian jo paalishtaiyon ne yahova kee haati bhrane ke liye doshabaali karake de dee thee un men se aek to ashadod kee or se, aek ajja, aek ashkalon, aek gat, aur aek aekron kee or se dee gai thee." 
1Samuel6:18 aur vah sone ke choohe, kya shaharapanahavale nagar, kya bina shaharapanah ke ganv, varan jis bade patthr par yahova ka sandook dhara gaya tha vahan palishtaiyon ke panchon saradaron ke adhaikar tak kee sab baastaiyon kee ginatee ke anusar diae gaae. vah patthr to aj tak betashomeshaee yahoshoo ke khet men haai." 
1Samuel6:19 fir is karan se ki betashomesh ke logon ne yahova ke sandook ke bheetar jhanka tha us ne un men se sattr manushy, aur fir pachas hajar manushy mar dale aur vahan ke logon ne isaliye vilap kiya ki yahova ne logon ka bada hee sanhar kiya tha." 
1Samuel6:20 tab betashomesh ke log kahane lage, is pavitra parameshvar yahova ke samhane kaun khda rah sakata haai? aur vah hamare pas se kis ke pas chala jaae?" 
1Samuel6:21 tab unhon ne kiryatyareem ke nivaasiyon ke pas yon kahane ko doot bheje, ki palishtaiyon ne yahova ka sandook lautta diya haai isaaliye tum akar use apane yahan le jao.." 
1Samuel7:1 tab kiryatyareem ke logon ne jakar yahova ke sandook ko uttaya, aur abeenadab ke ghar men jo tteele par bana tha rakha, aur yahova ke sandook kee raksha karane ke liye abeenadab ke putra aeleeajar ko pavitra kiya.." 
1Samuel7:2 kiryatyareem men rahate rahate sandook ko bahut din hua, arthata bees varsha beet gaa, aur israael ka sara gharana vilap karata hua yahova ke peechhe chalane laga." 
1Samuel7:3 tab shamooael ne israael ke sare gharane se kaha, yaadi tum apane poorn man se yahova kee or fire ho, to paraae devataon aur ashtoret deaviyon ko apane beech men se door karo, aur yahova kee or apana man lagakar keval usee kee upasana karo, tab vah tumhen paalishtaiyon ke hath se chhudaaega." 
1Samuel7:4 tab israaeliyon ne bal devataon aur ashatoret deaviyon ko door kiya, aur keval yahova hee kee upasana karane lage.." 
1Samuel7:5 fir shamooael ne kaha, sab israaeliyon ko mispa men ikattha karo, aur maain tumhare liye yahova se praarthna karoonga." 
1Samuel7:6 tab ve mispa men ikatthe hua, aur jal bhrake yahova ke samhane undel diya, aur us din upavas kiya, aur vahan kahane lage, ki ham ne yahova ke virooddh pap kiya haai. aur shamooael ne mispa men israaeliyon ka nyay kiya." 
1Samuel7:7 jab paalishtaiyon ne suna ki israaelee mispa men ikatthe huae haai, tab unake saradaron ne israaeliyon par chaddhai kee. yah sunakar israaelee palishtaiyon se bhyabheet huae." 
1Samuel7:8 aur israaeliyon ne shamooael se kaha, hamare liye hamare parameshvar yahova kee dohai dena n chhod, jis se vah ham ko palishtaiyon ke hath se bachaae." 
1Samuel7:9 tab shamooael ne aek doodhapiuva memna le sarvang homabali karake yahova ko chaddhaya aur shamooael ne israaeliyon ke liye yahova kee dohai dee, aur yahova ne usakee sun lee." 
1Samuel7:10 aur jis samay shamooael homabali ho chaddha raha tha us samay palishtee israaeliyon ke sang yuddh karane ke liye nikatt a gaa, tab usee din yahova ne palishtaiyon ke upar badal ko bade kadk ke sath garajakar unhen ghabara diya aur ve israaeliyon se har gaae." 
1Samuel7:11 tab israaelee purooshaen ne mispa se nikalakar paalishtaiyon ko khdeda, aur unhen betakar ke neeche tak marate chale gaae." 
1Samuel7:12 tab shamooael ne aek patthr lekar mispa aur shon ke beech men khda kiya, aur yah kahakar usaka nam aebenejer rakha, ki yahan tak yahova ne hamaree sahayata kee haai." 
1Samuel7:13 tab paalishtee dab gaa, aur israaeliyon ke desh men fir n aa, aur shamooael ke jeevan bhr yahova ka hath palishtaiyon ke virooddh bana raha." 
1Samuel7:14 aur aekron aur gat tak jitane nagar paalishtaiyon ne israaeliyon ke hath se chheen liae the, ve fir israaeliyon ke vash men a gaae aur unaka desh bhee israaeliyon ne paalishtaiyon ke hath se chhudaya. aur israaeliyon aur aemoriyon ke beech bhee saandhi ho gai." 
1Samuel7:15 aur shamooael jeevan bhr israaeliyon ka nyay karata raha. 
1Samuel7:16 vah praati varsha betel aur gilagal aur mispa men ghooma-ghoomakar un sab sthanon men israaeliyon ka nyay karata tha. 
1Samuel7:17 tab vah rama men jahan usaka ghar tha lautt aya, aur vahan bhee israaeliyon ka nyay karata tha, aur vahan us ne yahova ke liye aek vedee banai.." 
1Samuel8:1 jab shamooael booddha hua, tab us ne apane putraen ko israaeliyon par nyayee ttharaya." 
1Samuel8:2 usake jette putra ka nam yoel, aur doosare ka nam abiyyah tha ye bershoba men nyay karate the." 
1Samuel8:3 parantu usake putra usakee rah par n chale, arthata lalach men akar ghoos lete aur nyay bigadte the.." 
1Samuel8:4 tab sab israaelee vraddh log ikatthe hokar rama men shamooael ke pas jakar 
1Samuel8:5 us se kahane lage, sun, too to ab booddha ho gaya, aur tere putra teree rah par naheen chalate ab ham par nyay karane ke liye sab jaatiyon kee reeati ke anusar hamare liye ek raja niyukt kar de." 
1Samuel8:6 parantu jo bat unhon ne kahee, ki ham par nyay karane ke liye hamare upar raja niyukt kar de, yah bat shamooael ko buree lagee. aur shamooael ne yahova se praarthna kee." 
1Samuel8:7 aur yahova ne shamooael se kaha, ve log jo kuchh tujh se kahen use man le kyonaki unhon ne tujh ko naheen parantu mujhee ko nikamma jana haai, ki maain unaka raja n rahoon." 
1Samuel8:8 jaaise jaaise kam ve us din se, jab se maain unhen misr se nikal laya, aj ke din tak karate aae haai, ki mujh ko tyagakar paraa, devataon kee upasana karate aae haai, vaaise hee ve tujh se bhee karate haain." 
1Samuel8:9 isaliye ab too unakee bat mana taubhee too gambheerata se unako bhlee bhanati samajha de, aur unako batala bhee de ki jo raja un par rajy karega usaka vyavahar kis prakar hoga.." 
1Samuel8:10 aur shamooael ne un logon ko jo us se raja chahate the yahova kee sab baten kah sunain. 
1Samuel8:11 aur us ne kaha jo raja tum par rajy karega usakee yah chal hogee, arthata vah tumhare putraen ko lekar apane rathon aur ghaedon ke kam par naukar rakhega, aur ve usake rathon ke age age dauda karenge" 
1Samuel8:12 fir vah unako hajar hajar aur pachas pachas ke upar pradhaan banaaega, aur kitanon se vah apane hal jutavaaega, aur apane khet kattvaaega, aur apane liye yuddh ke haathaiyar aur rathon ke saj banavaaega." 
1Samuel8:13 fir vah tumharee beattyaien ko lekar un se sugandhadravy aur rasoi aur rottyaian banavaaega. 
1Samuel8:14 fir vah tumhare kheton aur dakh aur jalapai kee baariyon men se jo achchhee se achchhee honge unhen le lekar apane karmachariyon ko dega. 
1Samuel8:15 fir vah tumhare beech aur dakh kee baariyon ko dasavan ansh le lekar apane hakimon aur karmachaariyon ko dega. 
1Samuel8:16 fir vah tumhare dasa-dasiyon ko, aur tumhare achchhe se achchhe javanon ko, aur tumhare gadahon ko bhee lekar apane kam men lagaaega." 
1Samuel8:17 vah tumharee bhed-bakaariyon ka bhee dasavan ansh lega nidan tum log us ke das ban jaoge. 
1Samuel8:18 aur us din tum apane us chune huae raja ke karan dohai doge, parantu yahova us samay tumharee n sunega." 
1Samuel8:19 taubhee un logon ne shamooael kee bat n sunee aur kahane lage, naheen! ham nishchay apane liye raja chahate haai," 
1Samuel8:20 jis se ham bhee aur sab jatiyon ke saman ho jaae, aur hamara raja hamara nyay kare, aur hamare age age chalakar hamaree or se yuddh kiya kare." 
1Samuel8:21 logon kee ye sab baten sunakar shamooael ne yahova ke kanon tak pahunchaya. 
1Samuel8:22 yahova ne shamooael se kaha, unakee bat manakar unake liye raja tthara de. tab shamooael ne israaelee manushyon se kaha, tum ab apane apane nagar ko chale jao.." 
1Samuel9:1 binyameen ke gotra men keesh nam ka aek puroosh tha, jo apeeh ke putra bakorat ka parapota, aur saror ka pota, aur abeeael ka putra tha vah aek binyameenee puroosh ka putra aur bada shaaktaishaalee soorama tha." 
1Samuel9:2 usake shaaul nam ek javan putra tha, jo sundar tha, aur israeliyon men koi us se baddhkar sundar n tha vah itana lamba tha ki doosare log usake kandho hee tak ate the." 
1Samuel9:3 jab shaaul ke pita keesh kee gadaahiyan kho gai, tab keesh ne apane putra shaaul se kaha, aek sevak ko apane sath le ja aur gadaahiyon ko ddoonddh la." 
1Samuel9:4 tab vah aepraaim ke pahadee desh aur shaleesha desh hote huae gaya, parantu unhen n paya. tab ve shaaleem nam desh bhee hokar gaa, aur vahan bhee n paya. fir binyameen ke desh men gaa, parantu gadaahiyan n mileen." 
1Samuel9:5 jab ve soofa nam desh men aa, tab shaaul ne apane sath ke sevak se kaha, a, ham lautt chale, aeesa n ho ki mera pita gadahiyon kee chinta chhodkar hamaree chinta karane lage." 
1Samuel9:6 us ne us se kaha, sun, is nagar men parameshvar ka ek jan haai jisaka bada adaraman hota haai aur jo kuchh vah kahata haai vah bina poora huae naheen rahata. ab ham udhar chale, sambhv haai vah ham ko hamar marga bataae ki kidhar jaen." 
1Samuel9:7 shaaul ne apane sevak se kaha, sun, yadi ham us puroosh ke pas chalen to usake liye kya le chalen? dek, hamaree thailiyon men kee rottee chuk gai haai aur bhentt ke yogy koi vastu haai hee nahee, jo ham parameshvar ke us jan ko den. hamare pas kya haai?" 
1Samuel9:8 sevak ne fir shaaul se kaha, ki mere pas to aeke shokel chandee kee chauthai haai, vahee maain parameshvar ke jan ko doonga, ki vah ham ko bataae ki kidhar jaaen." 
1Samuel9:9 poorvakal men to israael men jab koi aeesa kahata tha, ki chalo, ham dasharee ke pas chalen kyonaki jo aj kal nabee kahalata haai vah poorvakal men dasharee kahalata tha." 
1Samuel9:10 tab shaaul ne apane sevak se kaha, too ne bhla kaha haai ham chalen. so ve us nagar ko chale jahan parameshvar ka jan tha." 
1Samuel9:11 us nagar kee chaddhai par chaddhte samay unhen kai ek ladkiyan mileen jo panee bhrane ko nikalee theen unhon ne un se poochha, kya dasharee yahan haai?" 
1Samuel9:12 unhon ne uttr diya, ki haai dekho, vah tumhare age haai. ab faurtee karo aj unche sthan par logon ka yagya haai, isaaliye vah aj nagar men aya hua haai." 
1Samuel9:13 jyonhee tum nagar men pahuncho tyonhee vah tum ko unche sthan par khana khane ko jane se paahile milega kyonki jab tak vah n pahunche tab tak log bhojan karenge, isaaliye ki yagya ke vishay men vahee dhanyavad karata tab usake peechhe hee nyotaharee bhojan karate haain. isaliye tum abhee chaddh jao, isee samay vah tumhen milega." 
1Samuel9:14 ve nagar men chaddh gaae aur jyonhee nagar ke bheetar pahunche tyonhee shamooael unche sthan par chaddhne kee manasa se unake samhane a raha tha.. 
1Samuel9:15 shaaul ke ane se aek din pahile yahova ne shamooael ko yah chita rakha tha," 
1Samuel9:16 ki kal isee samay maain tere pas binyameen ke desh se aek puroosh ko bhejoonga, usee ko too meree israaelee praja ke upar pradhaan hone ke liye aabhaishok karata. aur vah meree praja ko paalishtaiyon ke hath se chhudaaega kyonaki maain ne apanee praja par krapa draashtti kee haai, isaliye ki unakee chillahatt mere pas panhuchee haai." 
1Samuel9:17 fir jab shamooael ko shaaul dekh pada, tab yahova ne us se kaha, jis puroosh kee charcha maain ne tu se kee thee vah yahee haai meree praja par yahee aadhaikar karega." 
1Samuel9:18 tab shaaul faattk men shamooael ke nikatt jakar kahane laga, mujhe bata ki dasharee ka ghar kahan haai?" 
1Samuel9:19 us ne kaha, dasharee to maain hoon mere age age unche sthan par chaddh ja, kyonki aj ke din tum mere sath bhoran khaoge, aur bihan ko jo kuchh tere man men ho sab kuchh maain tujhe batakar vida karoonga." 
1Samuel9:20 aur teree gadaahiyan jo teen din tuae kho gai theen unakee kuchh bhee chinta n kar, kyonki ve mil gain. aur israael men jo kuchh manabha haai vah kis ka haai? kya vah tera aur tere pita ke sare gharane ka naheen haai?" 
1Samuel9:21 shaaul ne uttr dekar kaha, kya maain binyameenee, arthata sab israaelee gotraen men se chhotte gotra ka naheen hoon? aur kya mera kul binyameenee ke gotra ke sare kulon men se chhotta naheen haai? isaaliye too mujh se aeesee baten kyon kahata haai?" 
1Samuel9:22 tab shamooael ne shaaul aur usake sevak ko kottree men pahunchakar nyotaharee, jo lagabhg tees jan the, unake sath mukhy sthan par baaitta diya." 
1Samuel9:23 fir shamooael ne rasoiye se kaha, jo ttukada maain ne tujhe dekar, apane pas rakh chhodne ko kaha tha, use le a." 
1Samuel9:24 to rasoiye ne jangha ko mans samet uttakar shaaul ke age dhar diya tab shamooael ne kaha, jo rakha gaya tha use dek, aur apane samhane dharake kha kyonki vah tere liye isee niyat samay tak, jisakee charcha karake maain ne logon ko nyota diya, rakha hua haai. aur shaaul ne us din shamooael ke sath bhojan kiya." 
1Samuel9:25 tab ve unche sthan se utarakar nagar men aa, aur us ne ghar kee chht par shaaul se baten keen." 
1Samuel9:26 bihan ko ve tadke utte, aur pah fattte fattte shamooael ne shaaul ko chht par bulakar kaha, ut, maain tum ko vida karoonga. tab shaaul utta, aur vah aur shamooael donon bahar nikal gaae." 
1Samuel9:27 aur nagar ke sire kee utarai par chalate chalate shamooael ne shaaul se kaha, apane sevak ko ham se age baddhne kee agyaa de, vah age baddh gaya, parantu too abhee khda rah ki maain tujhe parameshvar ka vachan sunaun.." 
1Samuel10:1 tab shamooael ne aek kuppee tel lekar usake sir par undela, aur use choomakar kaha, kya isaka karan yah naheen ki yahova ne apane nij bhag ke upar pradhaan hone ko tera aabhaishok kiya haai?" 
1Samuel10:2 aj jab too mere pas se chala jaaega, tab rahel kee kabra ke pas jo binyameen ke desh ke sivane par selasah men haai do jan tujhe milenge, aur kahenge, ki jin gadihiyon ko too ddoonddhne gaya tha ve mil haain aur sun, tera pita gadahiyon kee chinta chhodkar tumhare karan kuddhta hua kahata haai, ki maain apane putra ke liye kya karoon?" 
1Samuel10:3 fir vahan se age baddhkar jab too tabor ke banjavraksha ke pas pahunchega, tab vahan teen jan parameshvar ke pas betel ko jate huae tujhe milenge, jin men se aek to bakaree ke teen bachche, aur doosara teen rottee, aur teesara aek kuppee dakhmadha liae huae hoga." 
1Samuel10:4 aur ve tera kushal poochhenge, aur tujhe do rottee denge, aur too unhen unake hath se le lena." 
1Samuel10:5 tab too parameshvar ke pahad par pahunchega jahan palishtaiyon kee chaukee haai aur jab too vahan nagar men pravesh kare, tab nabiyon ka aek dal unche sthan se utarata hua tujhe milega aur unake age sitar, df, bansulee, aur veena honge aur ve naboovat karate honge." 
1Samuel10:6 tab yahova ka atma tujh par bal se utarega, aur too unake sath hokar naboovat karane lagega, aur too parivaartit hokar aur hee manushy ho jaaega." 
1Samuel10:7 aur jab ye chinh tujhe dekh padenge, tab jo kam karane ka avasar tujhe mile us men lag jana kyonki parameshvar tere sang rahega." 
1Samuel10:8 aur too mujh se paahile gilagal ko jana aur maain homabali aur melabali chaddhane ke liye tere pas aunga. too sat din tak meree batt johate rahana, tab maain tere pas pahunchakar tujhe bataunga ki tujh ko kya kya karana haai." 
1Samuel10:9 jyonhee us ne shamooael ke pas se jane ko peett faeree tyonhee parameshvar ne usake man ko parivartan kiya aur ve sab chinh usee din pragatt huae.. 
1Samuel10:10 jab ve udhar us pahad ke pas aa, tab nabiyon ka aek dal usako mila aur parameshvar ka atma us par bal se utara, aur vah usake beech men naboovat karane laga." 
1Samuel10:11 jab un sabhon ne jo use paahile se janate the yah dekha ki vah nabiyon ke beech men naboovat kar raha haai, tab apas men kahane lage, ki keesh ke putra ko yah kya hua? kya shaaul bhee naabiyon men ka haai?" 
1Samuel10:12 vahan ke aek manushy ne uttr diya, bhla, unaka bap kaun haai? is par yah kahavat chalane lagee, ki kya shaaul bhee naabiyon men ka haai?" 
1Samuel10:13 jab vah naboovat kar chuka, tab unche sthan par chaddh gaya.." 
1Samuel10:14 tab shaaul ke chacha ne us se aur usake sevak se poochha, ki tum kahan gaae the? us ne kaha, ham to gadaahiyon ko ddoonddhne gaae the aur jab ham ne dekha ki ve kaheen naheen milatee, tab shamooael ke pas gaae." 
1Samuel10:15 shaaul ke chacha ne kaha, mujhe batala de ki shamooael ne tum se kya kaha." 
1Samuel10:16 shaaul ne apane chacha se kaha, ki us ne hamen nishchay karake bataya ki gadaahiyan mil gain. parantu jo bat shamooael ne rajy ke vishay men kahee thee vah us ne usako n batai.." 
1Samuel10:17 tab shamooael ne praja ke logon ko mispa men yahova ke pas bulavaya 
1Samuel10:18 tab us ne israaeliyon se kaha, israael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain to israael ko misr desh se nikal laya, aur tum ko misriyon ke hath se, aur n sab rajyon ke hath se jo tum par andhor karate the chhudaya haai." 
1Samuel10:19 parantu tum ne aj apane parameshvar ko jo sab vipaatiayon aur kashtton se tumhara chhudanevala haai tuchchh jana aur us se kaha haai, ki ham par raja niyukt kar de. isaaliye ab tum gotra gotra aur hajar hajar karake yahova ke samhane khde ho jao." 
1Samuel10:20 tab shamooael sare israaelee gotraiyon ko sameep laya, aur chitthee binyameen ke nam par nikalee." 
1Samuel10:21 tab vah binyameen ke gotra ke kul kul karake sameep laya, aur chitthee matraee ke kul ke nam par nikalee fir chitthee keesh ke putra shaaul ke nam par nikalee. aur jab vah ddoonddha gaya, tab n mila." 
1Samuel10:22 tab unhon ne fir yahova se poochha, kya yahan koi aur anevala haai? yahova ne kaha, ha, suno, vah saman ke beech men chhpai hua haai." 
1Samuel10:23 tab ve daudkar use vahan se laae aur vah logon ke beech men khda hua, aur vah kandho se sir tak sab logon se lamba tha." 
1Samuel10:24 shamooael ne sab logon se kaha, kya tum ne yahova ke chune huae ko dekha haai ki sare logon men koi usake barabar naheen? tab sak log lalakarake bol utte, raja chiranjeev rahe.." 
1Samuel10:25 tab shamooael ne logon se rajaneeati ka varnn kiya, aur use pustak men likhkar yahova ke age rakh diya. aur shamooael ne sab logon ko apane apane ghar jan ko vida kiya." 
1Samuel10:26 aur shaaul giba ko apane ghar chala gaya, aur usake sath aek dal bhee gaya jinake man ko parameshvar ne ubhara tha." 
1Samuel10:27 parantu kai luchche logon ne kaha, yah jan hamara kya uddhar karega? aur unhon ne usako tuchchh jana, aur usake pas bhentt n laae. taubhee vah sunee anasunee karake chup raha.." 
1Samuel11:1 tab ammonee nahash ne chaddhai karake gilad ke yabes ke virooddh chhavanee dalee aur yabesh ke sab purooshaen ne nahash se kaha, ham se vacha bandha, aur ham teree adhaeenata mana lenge." 
1Samuel11:2 ammonee nahash ne un se kaha, maain tum se vacha is sharta par bandhoonga, ki maain tum sabhon kee dahinee ankhen faodkar ise sare israael kee namadharai ka karan kar doon." 
1Samuel11:3 yabesh ke vraddh logon ne us se kaha, hamen sat din ka avakash de tab tak ham israael ke sare desh men doot bhejenge. aur yadi ham ko koi bachane vala n milega, to ham tere hee pas nikal aaeenge." 
1Samuel11:4 dooton ne shaaulavale giba men akar logon ko yah sandesh sunaya, aur sab log chilla chillakar rone lage." 
1Samuel11:5 aur shaaul baailon ke peechhe peechhe maaidan se chala ata tha aur shaaul ne poochha, logon ko kya hua ki ve rote haain? unhon ne yabesh ke logon ka sandesh use sunaya." 
1Samuel11:6 yah sandesh sunate hee shaaul par parameshvar ka atma bal se utara, aur usaka kop bahut bhdk utta." 
1Samuel11:7 aur us ne aek jodee baail lekar usake ttukade ttukade katte, aur yah kahakar dooton ke hath se israael ke sare desh men kahala bheja, ki jo koi akar shaaul aur shamooael ke peechhe n ho lega usake baailon se aeesa hee kiya jaaega. tab yahova ka bhy logon men aeesa samaya ki ve aek man hokar nikal aae." 
1Samuel11:8 tab us ne unhen bejek men gin liya, aur israaeliyon ke teen lak, aur yahoodiyon ke tees hajar tthare." 
1Samuel11:9 aur unhon ne un dooton se jo aae the kaha, tum gilad men ke yabesh ke logon se yon kaho, ki kal dhoop tej hone kee ghadee tak tum chhuttkara paoge. tab dooton ne jakar yabesh ke logon ko sandesh diya, aur ve anandait hue." 
1Samuel11:10 tab yabesh ke logon ne kaha, kal ham tumhare pas nikal aaenge, aur jo kuchh tum ko achchha lage vahee ham se karana." 
1Samuel11:11 doosare din shaaul ne logon ke teen dal kiae aur unhon ne rat ke pichhle pahar men chhavanee ke beech men akar ammoniyon ko mara aur ghaam ke kade hone ke samay tak aeese marate rahe ki jo bach nikale vah yahan tak titar bitar huae ki do jan bhee aek sang kaheen n rahe. 
1Samuel11:12 tab log shamooael se kahane lage, jin manushyon ne kaha tha, ki kya shaaul ham par rajy karega? unako lao ki ham unhen mar dalen." 
1Samuel11:13 shaaul ne kaha, aj ke din koi mar dala n jaaega kyonki aj yahova ne israaeliyon ko chhuttkara diya haai.." 
1Samuel11:14 tab shamooael ne israaeliyon se kaha, ao, ham gilagal ko chale, aur vahan rajy ko naye sire se sthapit karen." 
1Samuel11:15 tab sab log gilagal ko chale, aur vahan unhon ne gilagal men yahova ke samhane shaaul ko raja banaya aur vaheen unhon ne yahova ko melabaali chaddhaae aur vaheen shaaul aur sab israaelee logon ne atyant anand manaya.." 
1Samuel12:1 tab shamooael ne sare israaeliyon se kaha, suno, jo kuchh tum ne mujh se kaha tha use manakar maain ne aek raja tumhare upar ttharaya haai." 
1Samuel12:2 aur ab dekho, vah raja tumhare age age chalata haai aur ab maain booddha hoo, aur mere bal ujale ho gaae haai, aur mere putra tumhare pas haain aur maain ladkapan se lekar aj tak tumhare samhane kam karata raha hoon." 
1Samuel12:3 maain upaasthiat hoon isaliye tum yahova ke samhane, aur usake abhaishaikt ke samane mujh par sakshaee do, ki maain ne kis ka baail le liya? va kis ka gadaha le liyea? va kis par andhor kiya? va kis ko peesa? va kis ke hath se apanee ankhen band karane ke liye ghoos liya? batao, aur maain vah tum ko faer doonga?" 
1Samuel12:4 ve bole, too ne n to ham par andhor kiya, n hamen peesa, aur n kisee ke hath se kuchh liya haai." 
1Samuel12:5 us ne un se kaha, aj ke din yahova tumhara sakshae, aur usaka aabhaishaikt is bat ka sakshaee haai, ki mere yahan kud naheen nikala. ve bole, ha, vah sakshaee haai." 
1Samuel12:6 fir shamooael logon se kahane laga, jo moosa aur haroon ko ttharakar tumhare poorvajon ko misr desh se nikal laya vah yahova hee haai." 
1Samuel12:7 isaliye ab tum khde raho, aur maain yahova ke samhane usake sab dharma ke kamon ke vishay me, jinhen us ne tumhare sath aur tumhare poorvajon ke sath kiya haai, tumhare sath vichar karoonga." 
1Samuel12:8 yakoob misr men gaya, aur tumhare poorvajon ne yahova kee dohai dee tab yahova ne moosa aur haroon ko bheja, aur unhon ne tumhare poorvajon ko misr se nikala, aur is sthan men basaya." 
1Samuel12:9 fir jab ve apane parameshvar yahova ko bool gaa, tab us ne unhen hasor ke senapaati seesara, aur palishtaiyon aur moab ke raja ke adhaeen kar diya aur ve un se lade." 
1Samuel12:10 tab unhon ne yahova kee dohai dekar kaha, ham ne yahova ko tyagakar aur bal devataon aur ashatoret deviyon kee upasana karake maha pap kiya haai parantu ab too ham ko hamare shatrauon ke hath se chhuda to ham teree upasana karenge." 
1Samuel12:11 isaliye yahova ne yaroobbal, badan, yiptah, aur shamooael ko bhejakar tum ko tumhare charon or ke shatrauon ke hath se chhudaya aur tum nidr rahane lage." 
1Samuel12:12 aur jab tum ne dekha ki ammoniyon ka raja nahash ham par chaddhai karata haai, tab yadhyapi tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhara raja tha taubhee tum ne mujh se kaha, nahee, ham par aek raja rajy karega." 
1Samuel12:13 ab us raja ko dekho jise tum ne chun liya, aur jisake liye tum ne praarthna kee thee dekho, yahova ne aee raja tumhare upar niyukt kar diya haai." 
1Samuel12:14 yaadi tum yahova ka bhy manate, usakee upasana karate, aur usakee bat sunate raho, aur yahova kee agyaa ko ttalakar us se balava n karo, aur tum aur vah jo tum par raja hua haai dono apane parameshvar yahova ke peechhe peechhe chalanevale bane raho, tab to bhla hoga" 
1Samuel12:15 parantu yadi tum yahova kee bat n mano, aur yahova kee agyaa ko ttalakar us se balava karo, to yahova ka hath jaaise tumhare purakhaon ke virooddh hua vaaise hee tumhare bhee virooddh uttega." 
1Samuel12:16 isaliye ab tum khde raho, aur is bade kam ko dekho jise yahova tumhare ankhon ke samhane karane par haai." 
1Samuel12:17 aj kya gehoon kee kattnee naheen ho rahee? maain yahova ko pukaroonga, aur vah megha garajaaega aur menh barasaaega tab tum jan loge, aur dekh bhee loge, ki tum ne raja mangakar yahova kee drashtti men bahut badee burai kee haai." 
1Samuel12:18 tab shamooael ne yahova ka pukara, aur yahova ne usee din megha garajaya aur menh barasaya aur sab log yahova se aur shamooael se atyant dr gaae." 
1Samuel12:19 aur sab logon ne shamooael se kaha, apane dason ke nimitt apane parameshvar yahova se praarthna kar, ki ham mar n jaaen kyonki ham ne apane sare papon se baddhkar yah burai kee haai ki raja manga haai." 
1Samuel12:20 shamooael ne logon se kaha, dro mata tum ne yah sab burai to kee haai, parantu ab yahova ke peechhe chalane se fir mat mudna parantu apane sampoorn man se us kee upasana karana" 
1Samuel12:21 aur mat mudna naheen to aeesee vyarth vastuon ke peechhe chalane lagoge jin se n kuchh labh pahunchega, aur n kuchh chhuttkara ho sakata haai, kyonki ve sab vyarth hee haain." 
1Samuel12:22 yahova to apane bade nam ke karan apanee praja ko n tajega, kyonki yahova ne tumhe apanee hee ichchha se apanee praja banaya haai." 
1Samuel12:23 fir yah mujh se door ho ki maain tumhare liye praarthna karana chhodkar yahova ke virooddh papee ttharoon maain to tumhen achchha aur seedha marga dikhata rahoonga. 
1Samuel12:24 keval itana ho ki tum log yahova ka bhy mano, aur sachchai se apane sampoorn man ke sath usakee upasana karo kyonki yah to socho ki us ne tumhare liye kaaise bade bade kam kiae haain." 
1Samuel12:25 parantu yadi tum burai karate hee rahoge, to tum aur tumhara raja donon ke donon mitt jaoge." 
1Samuel13:1 shaaul tees varsha ka hokar rajy karane laga, aur us ne israaeliyon par do varsha tak rajy kiya." 
1Samuel13:2 fir shaaul ne israaeliyon men se teen hajar purooshaen ko apane liye chun liya aur un men se do hajar shaaul ke sath mikamash men aur betel ke pahad par rahe, aur aek hajar yonatan ke sath binyameen ke giba men rahe aur doosare sab logon ko us ne apane apane dere men jane ko vida kiya." 
1Samuel13:3 tab yonatan ne paalishtaiyon kee us chaukee ko jo giba men bhee mar liya aur isaka samachar paalishtaiyon ke kanon men pada. tab shaaul ne sare desh men naraasinga faunkavakar yah kahala bheja, ki ibraee log sunen." 
1Samuel13:4 aur sab israaeliyon ne yah samachar suna ki shaaul ne palishtaiyon kee chaukee ko mara haai, aur yah bhee ki palishtee israael se gharana karane lage haain. tab log shaaul ke peechhe chalakar gilagal men ikatthe ho gaae.." 
1Samuel13:5 aur paalishtee israael se yuddh karane ke liye ikatthe ho gaa, arthata tees hajar rat, aur chh: hajar savar, aur samudra ke teer kee baloo ke kinakon ke saman bahut se log ikatthe hue aur betaven ke poorva kee or jakar mikamash men chhavanee dalee." 
1Samuel13:6 jab israaelee purooshaen ne dekha ki ham saketee men pade haain aur sachamuch log sankatt men pade the, tab ve log gufaao, jhadiyo, chattano, gaddhiyo, aur gaddhhon men ja chhpaie." 
1Samuel13:7 aur kitane ibraee yaradan par hokar gad aur gilad ke deshaen men chale gaae parantu shaaul gilagal hee men raha, aur sab log thrathrate huae usake peechhe ho liae.." 
1Samuel13:8 vah shamooael ke ttharaae huae samay, arthata sat din tak batt johata raha parantu shamooael gilagal men n aya, aur log usake pas se idhar udhar hone lage." 
1Samuel13:9 tab shaaul ne kaha, homabali aur melabali mere pas lao. tab us ne homabali ko chaddhaya." 
1Samuel13:10 jyonhee vah homabali ko chaddha chuka, to kshya dekhta haai ki shamooael a pahuncha aur shaaul us se milane aur namaskar karane ko nikala." 
1Samuel13:11 shamooael ne poochha, too ne kya kiya? shaaul ne kaha, jab maain ne dekha ki log mere pas se idhar udhar ho chale haai, aur too ttharaae huae edanon ke bheetar naheen aya, aur paalishtee mikapash men ikatthe huae haai," 
1Samuel13:12 tab maain ne socha ki palishtee gilagal men mujh par abhee a padenge, aur maain ne yahova se binatee bhee naheen kee haai so maain ne apanee ichchha n rahate bhee homabali chaddhaya." 
1Samuel13:13 shamooael ne shaaul se kaha, too ne moorkhta ka kam kiya haai too ne apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ko naheen mana naheen to yahova tera rajy israaeliyon ke upar sada sthiar rakhta." 
1Samuel13:14 parantu ab tera rajy bana n rahega yahova ne apane liye aek aeese puroosh ko ddoonddh liya haai jo usake man ke anusar haai aur yahova ne usee ko apanee praja par pradhaan hone ko ttharaya haai, kyonaki too ne yahova kee agyaa ko naheen mana.." 
1Samuel13:15 tab shamooael chal nikala, aur gilagal se binyameen ke giba ko gaya. aur shaaul ne apane sath ke logon ko ginakar koi chh: sau paae." 
1Samuel13:16 aur shaaul aur usaka putra yonatan aur jo log unake sath the ve binyameen ke giba men rahe aur palishtee mikamash men dere dale pade rahe. 
1Samuel13:17 aur paalishtaiyon kee chhavanee se nash karanevale teen dal bandhakar nikala aek dal ne shooal nam desh kee or fir ke opra ka marga liya," 
1Samuel13:18 aek aur dal ne mujhkar bethoron ka marga liya, aur aek aur dal ne mudkar us desh ka marga liya jo saboim nam tarai kee or jangal kee tarafa haai.." 
1Samuel13:19 aur israael ke poore desh men lohar kaheen naheen milata tha, kyonki palishtaiyon ne kaha tha, ki ibraee talavar va bhala banane n panae" 
1Samuel13:20 isaliye sab israaelee apane apane hal kee falee, aur bhale, aur kulhadee, aur hansua tej karane ke liye paalishtaiyon ke pas jate the" 
1Samuel13:21 parantu unake hansuo, faalo, khetee ke traishoolo, aur kulhadiyon kee dhaare, aur paainon kee noken tteek karane ke liye ve retee rakhte the." 
1Samuel13:22 so yuddh ke din shaaul aur yonatan ke sathaiyon men se kisee ke pas n to talavar thee aur n bhala, ve keval shaaul aur usake putra yonatan ke pas rahe." 
1Samuel13:23 aur paalishtaiyon kee chaukee ke sipahee nikalakar mikamash kee ghaattee ko gaae.. 
1Samuel14:1 aek din shaaul ke putra yonatan ne apane pita se bina kuchh kahe apane hathaiyar ddhonevale javan se kaha, a, ham udhar paalishtaiyon kee chaukee ke pas chalen." 
1Samuel14:2 shaaul to giba ke sire par migraen men ke anar ke ped ke tale ttkai hua tha, aur usake sang ke log koi chh: sau the" 
1Samuel14:3 aur aelee jo shaeelon men yahova ka yajak tha, usake putra pinahas ka pota, aur ikabod ke bhai, aheetoob ka putra ahiyyah bhee aepod paahine huae sang tha. parantu un logon ko maloom n tha ki yonatan chala gaya haai." 
1Samuel14:4 un ghaattyaien ke beech me, jin se hokar yonatan paalishtaiyon kee chaukee ko jana chahata tha, donon alangon par ek ek nokeelee chattan thee ek chattan ka nam to boses, aur doosaree ka nam sene tha." 
1Samuel14:5 aek chattan to uttr kee or mikamash ke samhane, aur doosaree daakkhian kee or geba ke samhane khdee haai." 
1Samuel14:6 tab yonatan ne apane haathaiyar ddhonevale javan se kaha, a, ham un khtanaraahit logon kee chaukee ke pas jaaen kya jane yahova hamaree sahayata kare kyonaki yahova ko kuchh rok nahee, ki chahe to bahut logon ke dara chahe thode logon ke dara chhuttkara de." 
1Samuel14:7 usake haathaiyar ddhonevale ne us se kaha, jo kuchh tere man men ho vahee kara udhar chal, maain teree ichchha ke anusar tere sang rahoonga." 
1Samuel14:8 yonatan ne kaha, sun, ham un manushyon ke pas jakar apane ko unhen dikhaaen." 
1Samuel14:9 yaadi ve ham se yon kahe, hamare ane tak tthare raho, tab to ham usee sthan par khde rahe, aur unake pas n chaddhen." 
1Samuel14:10 parantu yadi ve yah kahe, ki hamare pas chaddh ao, to ham yah janakar chaddhe, ki yahova unhen hamare sath kar dega. hamare liye yahee chinh ho." 
1Samuel14:11 tab un donon ne apane ko palishtaiyon kee chaukee par pragatt kiya, tab paalishtee kahane lage, dekho, ibraee log un bilon men se jahan ve chhpai rahe the nikale ate haain." 
1Samuel14:12 fir chaukee ke logon ne yonatan aur usake hathaiyar ddhonavale se pukar ke kaha, hamare pas chaddh ao, tab ham tum ko kuchh sikhaaenge. tab yonatan ne apane hathaiyar ddhonavale se kaha mere peechhe peechhe chaddh a kyonaki yahova unhen israaeliyon ke hath men kar dega." 
1Samuel14:13 aur yonatan apane hathon aur pavon ke bal chaddh gaya, aur usaka haathaiyar ddhonevala bhee usake peechhe peechhe chaddh gaya. aur palishtee yonatan ke samhane girate gaa, aur usaka haathaiyar ddhonevala usake peechhe peechhe unhen marata gaya." 
1Samuel14:14 yah paahila sanhar jo yonatan aur usake haathaiyar ddhoneval se hua, us men adho beegho boomi men bees aek puroosh mare gaae."
