1Samuel29:4 tab paalishtee hakim us se krodhait hue aur us se kaha, us puroosh ko lautta de, ki vah us sthan par jaae jo too ne usake liye ttharaya haai vah hamare sang ladai men n ane paaega, kaheen aeesa n ho ki vah ladai men hamara viradhaee ban jaae. fir vah apane svamee se kis reeti se mel kare? kya logon ke sir kattvakar n karega?" 
1Samuel29:5 kya yah vahee daud naheen haai, jisake vishay men log nachate aur gate huae aek doosare se kahate the, ki shaaul ne hajaron ko, par daud ne lakhon ko mara haai?" 
1Samuel29:6 tab akeesh ne daud ko bulakar us se kaha, yahova ke jeevan kee shapath too to seedha haai, aur sena men tera mere sang ana jana bhee mujhe bhavata haai kyonaki jab se too mere pas aya tab se lekar aj tak maain ne to tujh men koi burai naheen pai. taubhee saradar log tujhe naheen chahate." 
1Samuel29:7 isaliye ab too kushal se lautt ja aeesa n ho ki palishtee saradar tujh se aprasann hon. 
1Samuel29:8 daud ne akeesh se kaha, maain ne kya kiya haai? aur jab se maain tere samhane aya tab se aj tak too ne apane das men kya paya haai ki apane prabhu raja ke shatrauon se ladne n paun?" 
1Samuel29:9 akeesh ne daud ko uttr dekar kaha, ha, yah mujhe maloom haai, too meree draashtti men to parameshvar ke doot ke saman achchha lagata haai taubhee palishtee hakimon ne kaha haai, ki vah hamare sang ladai men ne jane paaega." 
1Samuel29:10 isaliye ab too apane prabhu ke sevakon ko lekar jo tere sath aae haain bihan ko tadke uttna aur tum bihan ko ladke uttkar ujiyala hote hee chale jana. 
1Samuel29:11 isaliye bihan ko daud apane janon samet tadke uttkar paalishtaiyon ke desh ko lau gaya. aur paalishtee yijrael ko chaddh gaae.. 
1Samuel30:1 teesare din jab daud apane janon samet sikalag pahuncha, tab unhon ne kya dekha, ki amalekiyon ne daakkhian desh aur sikalag par chaddhai kee. aur sikalag ko mar ke foonk diya," 
1Samuel30:2 aur us men kee sree aadi chhotte bade jitane the, sab ko bandhauai men le gaae unhon ne kisee ko mar to naheen dala, parantu sabhon ko lekar apana marga liya." 
1Samuel30:3 isaliye jab daud apane janon samet us nagar men pahuncha, tab nagar to jala pada tha, aur striayan aur bette-beachhyaian bandhauai men chalee gai theen." 
1Samuel30:4 tab daud aur ve log jo usake sath the chillakar itana roa, ki fir un men rone kee shaaktai n rahee." 
1Samuel30:5 aur daud kee do striaya, yijraelee aheenoam, aur kamarailee nabal kee sree abeegaail, bandhauai men gai theen." 
1Samuel30:6 aur daud bade sankatt men pada kyonki log apane bette-beattyaien ke karan bahut shaekit hokar us par patthravah karane kee charcha kar rahe the. parantu daud ne apane parameshvar yahova ko smaran karake hiyav bandhaa.. 
1Samuel30:7 tab daud ne aheemelek ke putra aebyatar yajak se kaha, aepod ko mere pas la. tab aebyatar aepod ko daud ke pas le aya." 
1Samuel30:8 aur daud ne yahova se poochha, kya maain is dal ka peechha karoon? kya usako ja pakaoonga? us ne us se kaha, peechha kara kyonki too nishchay usako pakadega, aur nisandeh sab kuchh chhuda laaega" 
1Samuel30:9 tab daud apanechh: sau sathee janon ko lekar basor nam nale tak pahuncha vahan kuchh log chhode jakar rah gaae. 
1Samuel30:10 daud to char sau purooshaen samet peechha kiae chala gaya parantu dausau jo aeese thk gaae the, ki basor nale ke par n ja sake vaheen rahe." 
1Samuel30:11 unako ek misree puroosh maaidan men mila, unhon ne use daud ke pas le jakar rottee dee aur us ne use khaya, tab use panee pilaya," 
1Samuel30:12 fir unhon ne usako anjeer kee ttiikaya ka aek ttukada aur do guchchhe kishaamish diae. aur jab us ne khaya, tab usake jee men jee aya us ne teen din aur teen rat se n to rottee khai thee aur n panee piya tha." 
1Samuel30:13 tab daud ne us se poochha, too kis ka jan haai? aur kahan ka haai? us ne kaha, maain ta misree javan ar aek amalekee manushy ka das hoo ar teen din huae ki maain beemar pada, ar mera svamee mujhe chhd gaya." 
1Samuel30:14 ham logon ne kareatiyon kee daakkhian disha me, aur yahooda ke desh me, aur kaleb kee dakkhian disha men chaddhai kee aur sikalag ko ag lagakar foonk diya tha." 
1Samuel30:15 daud ne us se poochha, kya too mujhe us dal ke pas pahuncha dega? us ne kaha, mujh se parameshvar kee yah shapath kha, ki maain tujhe n to an se maroonga, aur n tere svamee ke hath kar doonga, tab maain tujhe us dal ke pas pahuncha doonga." 
1Samuel30:16 jab us ne use pahunchaya, tab dekhne men aya ki ve sab boomi par chhttike huae khate peete, aur us badee loott ke kara, jo ve palishtaiyon ke desh aur yahooda desh se laae the, nach rahe haain." 
1Samuel30:17 isaliye daud unhen rat ke pahile pahar se lekar doosare din kee sanjh tak marata raha yahan tak ki char sau javan ko chhod, jo untton par chaddhkar bhag gaa, un men se aek bhee manushy n bacha." 
1Samuel30:18 aur jo kuchh amalekee le gaae the vah sab daud ne chhudaya aur daud ne apanee donon striayon ko bhee chhuda liya. 
1Samuel30:19 varan unake kya chhotte, kya bade,kya bette, kya beattyaia, kya loott ka mal, sab kuchh jo amalekee le gaae the, us men se koi vastu n rahee jo unako n milee ho kyonaki daud sab ka sab lautta laya." 
1Samuel30:20 aur daud ne sab bhedbakariya, aur gayabaail bhee loott liae aur inhen log yah kahate huae apane janavaron ke age hankate gaa, ki yah daud kee loott haai." 
1Samuel30:21 tab daud un do sau purushaen ke pas aya, jo aeese thk gaae the ki daud ke peechhe peechhe n ja sake the, aur basor nale ke pas chhod diae gaae the aur ve daud se aur usake sang ke logon se milane ko chale aur daud ne unake pas pahunchakar unaka kushal kshom poochha." 
1Samuel30:22 tab un logon men se jo daud ke sang gaae the sab dushtt aur ochhe logon ne kaha, ye log hamare sath nahee chale the, is karan ham unhen apane chhudaae huae loott ke mal men se kuchh n denge, keval aek aek manushy ko usakee stree aur bal bachche denge, ki ve unhen lekar chale jaaen." 
1Samuel30:23 parantu daud ne kaha, he mere bhaiyo, tum us mal ke sath aesa n karane paoge jise yahova ne hamen diya haai aur usane hamaree raksha kee, aur us dal ko jis ne hamare upar chaddhai kee thee hamare hath men kar diya haai." 
1Samuel30:24 aur is vishay men tumharee kaun sunega? ladai men janevale ka jaaisa bhag ho, saman ke pas baaitte haae ka bhee vaaisa hee bhag hoga donon aek hee saman bhag paaenge." 
1Samuel30:25 aur daud ne israaeliyon ke liye aeesee hee vidhai aur niyam ttharaya, aur vah us din se lekar age ko varan aj lon bana haai." 
1Samuel30:26 sikalag men pahunchakar daud ne yahoodee puraaniyon ke pas jo usake mitra the loott ke mal men se kuchh kuchh bheja, aur yah kahalaya, ki yahova ke shatrauon se lee hui loott men se tumhare liye yah bhentt haai." 
1Samuel30:27 arthatabetel ke dakkhian desh ke ramot,yatteer," 
1Samuel30:28 aroaer, sipamot, aeshtamo," 
1Samuel30:29 rakal, yarahameliyon ke nagaro, keniyon ke nagaro," 
1Samuel30:30 horma, korashaan, atak," 
1Samuel30:31 hebraen aadi jitane sthanon men daud apane janon samet fira karata tha, un sab ke puraniyon ke pas usane kuchh kuchh bheja." 
1Samuel31:1 paalishtee to israaaeliyon se lade aur israaaelee purush paalishtaiyon ke samhane se bhage, aur gilabo nam pahad par mare gaae." 
1Samuel31:2 aur paalishtee shaaul aur usake putraen ke peechhe lage rahe aur paalishtaiyon ne shaaul ke putra yonatan, abeenadab, aur malkeesh ko mar dala." 
1Samuel31:3 aur shaaul ke sath dhamasan yuddh ho raha tha, aur dhanudharaariyon ne use ja liya, aur vah unake karan atyant vyakul ho gaya." 
1Samuel31:4 tab shaaul ne apane haathaiyar ddhonevale se kaha, apanee talavar kheenchakar mujhe jhonk de, aesa n ho ki ve khtanaraahit log akar muujhe jhonk de, aur meree tttta karen. parantu ake hathaiyar ddhonevale ne atyant bhy khakar aeesa karane se inkar kiya. tab shaaul apanee talavar khdee karake us par gir pada." 
1Samuel31:5 yah dekhkar ki shaaul mar gaya, usaka haathaiyar ddhonevala bhee apanee talavar par ap girakar usake sath mar gaya." 
1Samuel31:6 yon shaaul, aur usake teenon putra, aur usaka hathaiyar ddhonevala, aur usake samast jan usee din aek sang mar gaae." 
1Samuel31:7 yah dekhkar ki israaaelee purush bhag gaa, aur shaaul aur usake putra mar gaa, us tarai kee paralee or vale au yaradan ke par rahanevale bhee israaaelee manushy apane apane nagaron ko chhodkar bhag gaae aur palishtee akar un men rahane lage." 
1Samuel31:8 doosare din jab palishtee mare huon ke mal ko loottne aa, tab unake shaaul aur usake teenon putra gilabo pahad par pade haae mile." 
1Samuel31:9 tab unhon ne shaaul ka sir katta, aur haathaiyar loott lia, aur paalishtaiyon ke desh ke sab sthanon men dooton ko isaaliye bheja, ki unake devalayon aur saghaaran logon men yah shuubh samachar dete jaaen." 
1Samuel31:10 tab unhon ne usake haathaiyar to ashtoret nam deviyon ke maandair men rakhe, aur usakee loth betashaan kee shaharapanah men jaddee." 
1Samuel31:11 jab giladavale yabesh ke nivaasiyon ne suna ki palishtaiyon ne shaaul se kya kya kiya haai," 
1Samuel31:12 tab sab shooraveer chale, aur ratonrat jakar shaaul aur usake putraen kee lothen betashaan kee shaharapanah par se yabesh men le aa, aur vahon foonk deen" 
1Samuel31:13 tab unhon ne unakee haaddiyan lekar yabesh ke jha ke ped ke neeche gad dee, aur sat din tak upavas kiya." 
2Samuel1:1 shaaul ke marane ke bad, jab daud amaleakiyon ko marakar lautta, aur daud ko sikalag men rahate huae do din ho gaa," 
2Samuel1:2 tab teesare din aeesa hua ki chhavanee men se shaaul ke pas se aek purush kapade faade sir par dhoolee dale huae aya. aur jab vah daud ke pas pahuncha, tab boomi par gira aur dandvata kiya." 
2Samuel1:3 daud ne us se poochha, too kahan se aya haai? us ne us se kaha, maain israaaelee chhavanee men se bachakar aya hoon." 
2Samuel1:4 daud ne us se poochha, vahan kya bat hui? mujhe bata. us ne kaha, yah, ki log ranboomi chhodkar bhag gaa, aur bahut log mare gaae aur shaaul aur usaka putra yonatan bhee mare gaae haain." 
2Samuel1:5 daud ne us samachar denevale javan se poochha, ki too kaaise janata haai ki shaaul aur usaka putra yonatan mar gaae?" 
2Samuel1:6 samachar denevale javan ne kaha, sanyog se maain gilabo pahad par tha to kya dekha, ki shaaul apane bhale kee ttek lagaae huae haai fir maain ne yah bhee dekha ki usaka peechha kiae huae rath aur savar bade veg se daude a rahe haain." 
2Samuel1:7 us ne peechhe firakar mujhe dekha, aur mujhe pukara. maain ne kaha,kya agyaa?" 
2Samuel1:8 us ne mujh se poochha, too kaun haai? maain ne us se kaha, maain to amalekee hoo." 
2Samuel1:9 us ne mujh se kaha, mere pas khda hokar mujhe mar dala kyonki mera sir to ghauma jata haai, parantu praan nahee nikalata." 
2Samuel1:10 tab maain ne yah nishchay jan liya, ki vah gir jane ke pahachata naheen bach sakata, usake pas khde hokar use mar dala aur maain usake sir ka mukutt aur usake hath ka kangan lekar yahan apane prabhu ke pas aya hoo." 
2Samuel1:11 tab daud ne apane kapade pakadkar faade aur jitane purush usake sang the unhon ne bhee vaaisa hee kiya 
2Samuel1:12 aur ve shaaul, aur usake putra yonatan, aur yahova kee praja, aur israaael ke gharane ke liye chhatee peettne aur rone lage, aur sanjh tak kuchh n khaya, is karan ki ve talavar se mare gaae the." 
2Samuel1:13 fir daud ne us samachar denevale javan se poochha, too kahan ka haai? us ne kaha, maain to paradeshaee ka betta arthata amalekee hoo." 
2Samuel1:14 daud ne us se kaha, too yahova ke aabhaishaikt ko nash karane ke liye hath baddhane se kyon naheen dra?" 
2Samuel1:15 tab daud ne aek javan ko bulakar kaha, nikatt jakar us par prahar kara. tab us ne use aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya." 
2Samuel1:16 aur daud ne us se kaha, tera koon tere hee sir par pade kyonki too ne yah kahakar ki maain hee ne yahova ke aabhaishaikt ko mar dala, apane munh se apane hee viruddh sakshaee dee haai." 
2Samuel1:17 shaaul aur yonatan ke liye daud ka banaya hua vilapageet tab daud ne shaaul aur usake putra yonatan ke vishay yah vilapageet banaya," 
2Samuel1:18 aur yahoodiyon ko yah dhanush nam geet sikhane kee agyaa dee yah yashaar nam pustak men likha hua haai 
2Samuel1:19 he israaael, tera shairomanai tere unche sthan par mara gaya. hay, shooraveer kyonkar gir pade haain!" 
2Samuel1:20 gat men yah n batao, aur n ashkalon kee sadkon men prachar karana n ho ki palishtee striyan anandait ho, n ho ki khtanaraahit logon kee beattyaian garva karane lagen." 
2Samuel1:21 he gilabo pahado, tum par n os pade, aur n vashara ho, aur n bhentt ke yogy upajavale khet paae jaaen! kyonki vahan shooraveeron kee ddhalen ashuuddh ho gai. aur shaaul kee ddhal bina tel lagaae rah gai." 
2Samuel1:22 joojhe huon ke lohoo bahane se, aur shooraveeron kee charbee khane se, yonatan ka dhanush lautt n jata tha, aur n shaaul kee talavar choochhee fir atee thee." 
2Samuel1:23 shaaul aur yonatan jeevanakal men to piry aur manabha the, aur apanee mratyu ke samay alag n hue ve ukab se bhee veg chalanevale, aur sinh se bhee aadhaik parakramee tho." 
2Samuel1:24 he israaaelee striyo, shaaul ke liye roo, vah to tumhen lal rang ke vastr paahinakar sukh deta, aur tumhare vastron ke upar sone ke gahane paahinata tha." 
2Samuel1:25 hay, yuddh ke beech shooraveer kaaise kam aae! he yonatan, he unche sthanon par joojhe hua," 
2Samuel1:26 he mere bhai yonatan, maain tere karan dukhait hoo too mujhe bahut manabha jan padta tha tera praem mujh par adabhut, varan striyon ke praem se bhee baddhkar tha." 
2Samuel1:27 hay, shooraveer kyonkar gir gaa, aur yuddh ke haathaiyar kaaise nash ho gaae haain!" 
2Samuel2:1 isake bad daud ne yahova se poochha, ki kya maain yahooda ke kisee nagar men jaun? yahova ne us se kaha, ha, ja. daud ne fir poochha, kis nagar men jaun? us ne kaha, hebraen men." 
2Samuel2:2 tab daud yijraelee aheenoam, aur kamenlee nabal kee stree abeegaail nam, apanee donon patnaiyon samet vaha gaya." 
2Samuel2:3 aur daud apane sathaiyon ko bhee aek aek ke gharane samet vahan le gaya aur ve hebraen ke ganvon men rahane lage. 
2Samuel2:4 aur yahoodee log gaa, aur vahan daud ka aabhaishok kiya ki vah yahooda ke gharane ka raja ho." 
2Samuel2:5 aur daud ko yah samachar mila, ki jinhon ne shaaul ko mittee dee ve gilad ke yabesh nagar ke log haain. tab daud ne dooton se gilad ke yabesh ke logon ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki yahova kee ashaish tum par ho, kyonaki tum ne apane prabhu shaaul par yah krapa karake usako mittee dee." 
2Samuel2:6 isaliye ab yahova tum se krapa aur sachchai ka barttav kare aur maain bhee tumharee is bhlai ka badala tum ko doonga, kyonki tum ne yah kam kiya haai." 
2Samuel2:7 aur ab hiyav bandhae, aur purushaarth karo kyonaki tumhara prabhu shaaul mar gaya, aur yahooda ke gharane ne apane upar raja hone ko mera abhaisheak kiya haai." 
2Samuel2:8 parantu ner ka putra abner jo shaaul ka pradhaan senapaati tha, us ne shaaul ke putra ishaboshot ko sang le par jakar mahanaaim men pahunchaya" 
2Samuel2:9 aur use gilad ashooriyon ke desh yijrael, aepraaim, binyameen, varan samast israaael ke desh par raja niyukt kiya." 
2Samuel2:10 shaaul ka putra ishaboshot chalees varsha ka tha jab vah israaael par rajy karane laga, aur do varsha tak rajy karata raha. parantu yahooda ka gharana daud ke paksha men raha." 
2Samuel2:11 aur daud ke hebraen men yahooda ke gharane par rajy karane ka samay saddhe sat varsha tha. 
2Samuel2:12 aur ner ka putra abner, aur shaaul ke putra ishaboshot ke jan, mahanaaim se gibon ko aae." 
2Samuel2:13 tab saruyah ka putra yoab, aur daud ke jan, hebraen se nikalakar un se gibon ke pokhre ke pas mile aur donon dal us pokhre kee aek aek or baaitt gaae." 
2Samuel2:14 tab abner ne yoab se kaha, javan log uttkar hamare samhane khelen. yoab ne kaha, ve utten." 
2Samuel2:15 tab ve utte, aur binyameen, arthaata shaaul ke putra ishaboshot ke paksha ke liye barah jan ginakar nikale, aur daud ke janon men se bhee barah nikale." 
2Samuel2:16 aur unhon ne aek doosare ka sir pakadkar apanee apanee talavar aek doosare ke panjar men bhonk dee aur ve aek hee sang mare. is se us sthan ka nam helkathssooreem pada, vah gibon men haai." 
2Samuel2:17 aur us din bada ghaer se yuddh hua aur abner aur israaael ke purush daud ke janon se har gaae. 
2Samuel2:18 vahan to yoab, abeeshau, aur asahel nam saruyah ke teenon putra the. aur asahel banaaile chikare ke saman veg daudnevalaa tha." 
2Samuel2:19 tab asahel abner ka peechha karane laga, aur usaka peechha karate huae n to dahinee or muda n bai ora." 
2Samuel2:20 abner ne peechhe firake poochha, kya too asahel haai? us ne kaha, han maain vahee hoo." 
2Samuel2:21 abner ne us se kaha, chahe daahinee, chahe bai or mud, kisee javan ko pakadkar usaka bakatar le le. parantu asahel ne usaka peechha n chhoda." 
2Samuel2:22 abner ne asahel se fir kaha, mera peechha chhod de mujh ko kyon tujhe marake mittee men mila dena pade? aeesa karake maain tere bhai yoab ko apana mukh kaaise dikhaunga?" 
2Samuel2:23 taubhee us ne hatt jane ko nakara tab abner ne apane bhale kee pichhadee usake pett men aeese maree, ki bhala arapar hokar peechhe nikala aur vah vaheen girake mar gaya. aur jitane log us sthan par aae jahan asahel girake mar gaya, vahan ve sab khddhe rahe." 
2Samuel2:24 parantu yoab aur abeeshau abner ka peechha karate rahe aur soorya oobate oobate ve amma nam us pahadee tak pahunche, jo gibon ke jangal ke marga men geeh ke samhane haai." 
2Samuel2:25 aur binyameenee ababner ke peechhe hokar aek dal ho gaa, aur aek pahadee kee chottee par khde hue." 
2Samuel2:26 tab abner yoab ko pukarake kahane laga, kya talavar sada maratee rahe? kya too naheen janata ki isaka fal dukhdai hoga? too kab tak apane logon ko agyaa n dega, ki apane bhaiyon ka peechha chhodkar lautto?" 
2Samuel2:27 yoab ne kaha, parameshvar ke jeevan kee shapat, ki yadi too n bola hota, to nisandeh log savere hee chale jate, aur apane apane bhai ka peechha n karate." 
2Samuel2:28 tab yoab ne naraasinga foonka aur sab log tthar gaa, aur fir israaaeliyon ka peechha n kiya, aur ladai fir n kee." 
2Samuel2:29 aur abner apane janon samet usee din ratonrat araba se hokar gaya aur yaradan ke par ho samast bitraen desh men hokar mahanaaim men pahuncha. 
2Samuel2:30 aur yoab abner ka peechha chhodkar lautta aur jab us ne sab logon ko ikatta kiya, tab kya dekha, ki daud ke janon men se unnees purush aur asahel bhee naheen haain." 
2Samuel2:31 parantu daud ke janon ne binyameeaniyon aur abner ke janon ko aeesa mara ki un men se teen sau satt jan mar gaae. 
2Samuel2:32 aur unhon ne asahel ko uttakar usake pita ke kabirstan me, jo betalehem men tha, mittee dee. tab yoab apane janon samet rat bhr chalakar pah fattte hebraen men pahuncha." 
2Samuel3:1 shaaul ke gharane aur daud ke gharane ke madhy bahut din tak ladai hotee rahee parantu daud prabal hota gaya, aur shaaul ka gharana nirbal padta gaya." 
2Samuel3:2 aur hebraen men daud ke putra utpann huae usaka jetta betta amnon tha, jo yijraelee aheenoam se utpann hua tha" 
2Samuel3:3 aur usaka doosara kilav tha, jisakee man karmenlee nabal kee stree abeegaail thee teesara abashaalom, jo gashoor ke raja talmaai kee bettee maka se utpann hua tha" 
2Samuel3:4 chautha adoniyyah, jo haggeet se utpann hua tha panchavan shapatyah, jisakee man abeetal thee" 
2Samuel3:5 chhttvan yitraam, jo aeegla nam daud kee sree se utpann hua. hebraen men daud se ye hee santan utpann hue." 
2Samuel3:6 jab shaaul aur daud donon ke gharanon ke madhy ladai ho rahee thee, tab abner shaaul ke gharane kee sahayata men bal baddhata gaya." 
2Samuel3:7 shaaul kee aek rakhelee thee jisaka nam rispa tha, vah ayya kee bettee thee aur ishaboshot ne abner se poochha, too mere pita kee rakhelee ke pas kyon gaya?" 
2Samuel3:8 ishaboshot kee baton ke karan abner ati krodhait hokar kahane laga, kya maain yahooda ke kutte ka sir hoo? aj tak maain tere pita shaaul ke gharane aur usake bhaiyon aur mitraen ko praeeati dikhata aya hoo, aur tujhe daud ke hath padne naheen diya fir too ab mujh par us sree ke vishay men dosh lagata haai?" 
2Samuel3:9 yaadi maain daud ke sath ishvar kee shapath ke anusar bartav n karu, to parameshavar abner se vaaisa hee, varan us se bhee aadhaik kare" 
2Samuel3:10 arthata maain rajy ko shaaul ke gharane se chheenoonga, aur daud kee rajagaee dan se lekar bershonba tak israaael aur yahooda ke upar sthiar karunga." 
2Samuel3:11 aur vah abner ko koi uttar n de saka, isaaliye ki vah us se drata tha." 
2Samuel3:12 tab abner ne usake nam se daud ke pas dooton se kahala bheja, ki desh kis ka haai? aur yah bhee kahala bheja, ki too mere sadha vacha bandha, aur maain teree sahayata karunga ki samast israaael ke man teree or faer doon." 
2Samuel3:13 daud ne kaha, bhla, maain tere sath vacha to bandhoonga parantu aek bat maain tujh se chahata hoo ki jab too mujh se bhentt karane aa, tab yadi too pahile shaaul kee bettee meekal ko n le aa, to mujh se bhentt n hogee." 
2Samuel3:14 fir daud ne shaaul ke putra ishaboshot ke pas dooton se yah kahala bheja, ki meree patnee meekal, jise maain ne aek sau palishtaiyon kee khladiyan dekar apanee kar liya tha, usako mujhe de de." 
2Samuel3:15 tab ishaboshot ne logon ko bhejakar use laaish ke putra palateeael ke pas se chheen liya. 
2Samuel3:16 aur usaka paati usake sath chala, aur bahooreem tak usake peechhe rota hua chala gaya. tab abner ne us se kaha, lautt ja aur vah lautt gaya." 
2Samuel3:17 aur abner ne israaael ke puraaniyon ke sang is prakar kee batacheet kee, ki pahile to tum log chahate the ki daud hamare upar raja ho." 
2Samuel3:18 ab vaaisa karo kyonki yahova ne daud ke vishay men yah kaha haai, ki apane das daud ke dara maain apanee praja israaael ko paalishtaiyo, varan unake sab shatrauon ke hath se chhudaunga." 
2Samuel3:19 fir abner ne binyameen se bhee baten keen tab abner hebraen ko chala gaya, ki israaael aur binyameen ke samast gharane ko jo kuchh achchha laga, vah daud ko sunaae." 
2Samuel3:20 tab abner bees purush sang lekar hebraen men aya, aur daud ne usake aur usake sangee purushaen ke liye jevanar kee." 
2Samuel3:21 tab abner ne daud se kaha, maain uttkar jaunga, aur apane prabhu raja ke pas sab israaael ko ikattha karunga, ki ve tere sath vacha bandho, aur too apanee ichchha ke anusar rajy kar sake. tab daud ne abner ko vida kiya, aur vah kushal se chala gaya." 
2Samuel3:22 tab daud ke kai aek jan yoab samet kaheen chaddhai karake bahut see loott liye huae a gaae. aur abner daud ke pas hebraen men n tha, kyon ki us ne usako vida kar diya tha, aur vah kushal se chala gaya tha." 
2Samuel3:23 jab yoab aur usake sath kee samast sena ai, tab lagon ne yobab ko bataya, ki ner ka putra abner raja ke pas aya tha, aur us ne usako bida kar diya, aur vah kushal se chala gaya." 
2Samuel3:24 tab yoab ne raja ke pas jakar kaha, too ne yah kya kiya haai? abner jo tere pas aya tha, to kya karan haai ki too ne usako jane diya, aur vah chala gaya haai?" 
2Samuel3:25 too ner ke putra abner ko janata hoga ki vah tujhe dhaekha dene, aur tere ane jane, aur kul kam ka bhed lene aya tha." 
2Samuel3:26 yoab ne daud ke pas se nikalakar daud ke anajane abner ke peechhe doot bheje, aur ve usako seera nam kund se lautta le aae." 
2Samuel3:27 jab abner hebraen ko lautt aya, tab yoab us se aekant men baten karane ke liye usako faattk ke bheetar alag le gaya, aur vahan apane bhai asahel ke koon ke palatte men usake pett men aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya." 
2Samuel3:28 isake bad jab daud ne yah suna, to kaha, ner ke putra abner ke koon ke vishay men apanee praja samet yahova kee draashtti men sadaaiv nirdosh rahoonga." 
2Samuel3:29 vah yoab aur usake pita ke samast gharane ko lage aur yoab ke vansh men koi n koi prameh ka rogee, aur koddhee, aur baaisakhee ka laganevala, aur talavar se khet anevala, aur bookhen maranevala sada hota rahe." 
2Samuel3:30 yoab aur usake bhai abeeshau ne abner ko is karan ghaat kiya, ki us ne unake bhai asahel ko gibon men ladai ke samay mar dala tha." 
2Samuel3:31 tab daud ne yoab aur apane sab sangee lagon se kaha, apane vasr faado, aur kamar men ttatt bandhakar abner ke age age chalo. aur daud raja svayan ath ke peechhe peechhe chala." 
2Samuel3:32 abner ko hebraen men mittee dee gai aur raja abner kee kabra ke pas foott foottkar roya aur sab log bhee roae. 
2Samuel3:33 tab daud ne abner ke vishay yah vilapageet banaya ki, kya uchit tha ki abner moooddh kee nai mare?" 
2Samuel3:34 n to tere hath bandho gaa, aur n tere panvon men bediyan dalee gai jaaise koi kuttlai manushyon se mara jaa, vaaise hee too mara gaya." 
2Samuel3:35 tab sab log usake vishay fir ro utte. tab sab log kuchh din rahate daud ko rottee khailane aae parantu daud ne shapath khakar kaha, yaadi maain soorya ke ast hone se paahile rottee va aur koi vastu khau, to parameshvar mujh se aeesa hee, varan is se bhee adhaik kare." 
2Samuel3:36 aur sab logon ne is par vichar kiya aur is se prasann hua, vaaise hee jo kuchh raja karata tha us se sab log prasann hote the." 
2Samuel3:37 tab un sab logon ne, varan samast israaael ne bhee, usee din jan liya ki ner ke putra abner ka ghaat kiya jana raja kee aur se nahee hua." 
2Samuel3:38 aur raja ne apane karmachariyon se kaha, kya tum log naheen janate ki israaael men aj ke din aek pradhaan aur pratapee manushy mara haai?" 
2Samuel3:39 aur yadhypi maain aabhaishaikt raja hoo taubhee aj nirbal hoo aur ve sarooyah ke putra mujh se aadhaik prachand haain. parantu yahova burai karanevale ko usakee burai ke anusar hee palatta de. 
2Samuel4:1 jab shaaul ke putra ne suna, ki abner hebraen men mara gaya, tab usake hath ddheele pad gaa, aur sab israaaelee bhee ghabara gaae." 
2Samuel4:2 shaaul ke putra ke do jan the jo dalon ke pradhaan the aek ka nam bana, aur doosare ka nam rekab tha, ye donon berotavasee binyameenee rimmon ke putra the, kyonki berot bhee binyameen ke bhag men gina jata haai" 
2Samuel4:3 aur berotee log gitaaim ko bhag gaa, aur aj ke din tak vaheen paradeshaee hokar rahate haain." 
2Samuel4:4 shaaul ke putra yonatan ke aek lagada betta tha. jab yijrael se shaaul aur yonatan ka samachar aya tab vah panch varsha ka tha us samay usakee dhaai use uttakar bhagee aur usake utavalee se bhagane ke karan vah girake langada ho gaya. aur usaka nam mapeeboshot tha. 
2Samuel4:5 us berotee rimmon ke putra rekab aur bana kade ghaam ke samay ishaboshot ke ghar men jab vah dopahar ko vishraam kar raha tha ae. 
2Samuel4:6 aur gehoon le jane ke bahane me ghar men ghaus gaae aur usake pett men mara tab rekab aur usaka bhai bana bhag nikale. 
2Samuel4:7 jab ve ghar men ghause, aur vah sone kee kottree men charapai par sota tha, tab anhon ne use mar dala, aur usaka sir katt liya, aur usaka sir lekar ratonrat araba ke marga se chale." 
2Samuel4:8 aur ve ishaboshot ka sir hebraen men daud ke pas le jakar raja se kahane lage, dek, shaaul jo tera shatra aur tere praanon ka graahak tha, usake putra ishaboshot ka yah sir haai to aj ke din yahova ne shaaul aur usake vansh se mere prabhu raja ka palatta liya haai." 
2Samuel4:9 daud ne berotee rimmon ke putra rekab aur usake bhai bana ko uttr dekar un se kaha, yahova jo mere praan ko sab vipaatiayon se chhudata aya haai, usake jeevan kee shapat," 
2Samuel4:10 jab kisee ne yah janakar, ki maain shuubh samachar deta hoo, sikalag men mujh ko shaaul ke marane ka samachar diya, tab maain ne usako pakadkar ghaat karaya arthata usako samachar ka yahee badala mila." 
2Samuel4:11 fir jab dushtt manushyon ne aek nirdosh manushy ko usee ke ghar me, varan usakee charapai hee par ghaat kiya, to maain ab avashy hee usake koon ka palatta tum se loonga, aur tumhen dharatee par se nashtt kar daloonga." 
2Samuel4:12 tab daud ne javanon ko agyaa dee, aur unhon ne unako ghaat karake unake hath panv katt dia, aur unakee lothon ko hebraen ke pokhre ke pas ttang diya. tab ishaboshot ke sir ko uttakar hebraen men abner kee kabra men gad diya." 
2Samuel5:1 daud ke yarooshalem men rajy karane ka arambh tab israaael ke sab gotra daud ke pas hebraen men akar kahane lage, sun, ham log aur too aek hee had mans haain." 
2Samuel5:2 fir bootakal men jab shaaul hamara raja tha, tab bhee israaael ka aguva too hee tha aur yahova ne tujh se kaha, ki meree praja israaael ka charavaha, aur israaael ka pradhaan too hee hoga." 
2Samuel5:3 so sab israaaelee puraniye hebraen men raja ke pas aae aur daud raja ne unake sath hebraen men yahova ke samhane vacha bandhae, aur unhon ne israaael ka raja hone ke liye daud ka abhaishok kiya." 
2Samuel5:4 daud tees varsha ka hokar rajy karane laga, aur chalees varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Samuel5:5 saddhe sat varsha tak to us ne hebraen men yahooda par rajy kiya, aur taaintees varsha tak yarooshalem men samast israaael aur yahooda par rajy kiya." 
2Samuel5:6 tab raja ne apane janon ko sath liae huae yarooshalem ko jakar yaboosiyon par chaddhai kee, jo us desh ke nivasee the. unhon ne yah samajhkar, ki daud yahan paaitt n sakega, us se kaha, jab tak too andhon aur langadon ko door n kare, tab tak yahan paaittne n paaega." 
2Samuel5:7 taubhee daud ne siyyon nam gaddh ko le liya, vahee daudapur bhee kahalata haai." 
2Samuel5:8 us din daud ne kaha, jo koi yaboosiyon ko marana chahe, use chaahiye ki nale se hokar chaddhe, aur andho aur langade jin se daud man se ghain karata haai unhen mare. is se yah kahavat chalee, ki andho aur lagade bhvan men ane n paenge." 
2Samuel5:9 aur daud us gaddh men rahane laga, aur usaka nam daudapur rakha. aur daud ne charon or millo se lekar bheetar kee or shaharapanah banavai." 
2Samuel5:10 aur daud kee badai aadhaik hotee gai, aur senaon ka parameshvar yahova usake sang rahata tha." 
2Samuel5:11 aur sor ke raja heeram ne daud ke pas doot, aur devadaroo kee lakadee, aur baddhi, aur rajamisree bheje, aur unhon ne daud ke liye aek bhvan banaya." 
2Samuel5:12 aur daud ko nishchay ho gaya ki yahova ne mujhe israaael ka raja karake sthiar kiya, aur apanee israaaelee praja ke nimitt mera rajy baddhaya haai." 
2Samuel5:13 jab daud hebraen se aya tab usake bad us ne yarooshalem kee aur aur rakhealiyan rakh lee, aur patnaiyan bana leen aur usake aur bette bettyaian utpann hui." 
2Samuel5:14 usake jo santan yarooshalem men utpann hua, unake ye nam haai, arthata shammo, shaebab, natan, sulaaiman," 
2Samuel5:15 yibhar, aeloshoo, nepeg, yapee," 
2Samuel5:16 aeleeshaama, aelyada, aur aelopeleta." 
2Samuel5:17 jab paalishtaiyon ne yah suna ki israaael ka raja hone ke liye daud ka abhaishok hua, tab sab palishtee daud kee khoj men nikale yah sunakar daud gaddh men chala gaya." 
2Samuel5:18 tab paalishtee akar rapaim nam tarai men faail gaae. 
2Samuel5:19 tab daud ne yahava se poochha, kya maain palishtaiyon par chaddhai karoon? kya too unhen mere hath kar dega? yahova ne daud se kaha, chaddhai kara kyonaki maain nishchay palishtaiyon ko teere hath kar doonga." 
2Samuel5:20 tab daud balaparaseem ko gaya, aur daud ne unhen vaheen mara tab us ne kaha, yahova mere samhane hokar mere shatrauon par jal kee dhaara kee nai toott pada haai." 
2Samuel5:21 vahan unhon ne apanee mooraton ko chhod diya, aur daud aur usake jan unhen utta le gaae." 
2Samuel5:22 fir doosaree bar paalishtee chaddhai karake rapaim nam tarai men faail gaae. 
2Samuel5:23 jab daud ne yahova se poochha, tab us ne kaha, chaddhai n kara unake peechhe se ghoomakar toot vrakshaen ke samhane se un par chhapa mara." 
2Samuel5:24 aur jab toot vrakshaen kee faunaagiyon men se sena ke chalane kee see ahatt tujhe sunai pade, tab yah janakar faurtee karana, ki yahova palishtaiyon kee sena ko marane ko mere age abhee padhaara haai." 
2Samuel5:25 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar daud geba se lekar gejer tak palishtaiyon ko marata gaya. 
2Samuel6:1 pavitra sandook ka yarooshalem men pahunchaya jana fir daud ne aek aur bar israaael men se sab bade veeron ko, jo tees hajar the, ikattha kiya." 
2Samuel6:2 tab daud aur jitane log usake sang the, ve sab uttkar yahooda ke bale nam sthan se chale, ki parameshvar ka vah sandook le aae, jo karoobon par virajanevale senaon ke yahova ka kahalata haai." 
2Samuel6:3 tab unhon ne parameshvar ka sandook aek nai gadee par chaddhakar tteele par rahanevale abeenadab ke ghar se nikala aur abeenadab ke ujja aur ahao nam do putra us nai gadee ko hankane lage. 
2Samuel6:4 aur unhon ne usako parameshvar ke sandook samet tteele par rahanevale abeenadab ke ghar se bahar nikala aur ahao sandook ke age age chala. 
2Samuel6:5 aur daud aur israaael ka samast gharana yahova ke age sanauvar kee lakadee ke bane huae sab prakar ke baje aur veena, sarangiya, df, dmaro, jhanjh bajate rahe." 
2Samuel6:6 jab ve nakon ke khlihan tak aa, tab ujja ne apana hath parameshvar ke sandook kee or baddhakar use tham liya, kyonaki baailon ne ttokar khai." 
2Samuel6:7 tab yahova ka kop ujja par bhdk utta aur parameshvar ne usake doesh ke karan usako vahan aeesa mara, ki vah vahan parameshvar ke sandook ke pas mar gaya." 
2Samuel6:8 tab daud aprasann hua, isaliye ki yahova ujja par toott pada tha aur us ne us sthan ka nam peresujja rakha, yah nam aj ke din tak vartaman haai." 
2Samuel6:9 aur us din daud yahova se drakar kahane laga, yahova ka sandook mere yahan kyonkar aae?" 
2Samuel6:10 isaliye daud ne yahova ke sandook ko apane yahan daudapur men pahunchana n chaha parantu gatavasee obededom ke yahan pahunchaya. 
2Samuel6:11 aur yahova ka sandook gatee obededom ke ghar men teen maheene raha aur yahova ne obededom aur usake samast gharane ko ashaish dee. 
2Samuel6:12 tab daud raja ko yah bataya gaya, ki yahova ne obededom ke gharane par, aur jo kuchh usaka haai, us par bhee parameshvar ke sandook ke karan aashaish dee haai. tab daud ne jakar parameshvar ke sandook ko obededom ke ghar se daudapur men anand ke sath pahooncha diya." 
2Samuel6:13 jab yahova ke sandook ke uttanevale chh kadam chal chuke, tab daud ne aek baail aur aek pala posa hua bachhda bali karaya." 
2Samuel6:14 aur daud sanee ka aepod kamar men kase huae yahova ke sammukh tan man se nachata raha. 
2Samuel6:15 yon daud aur israaael ka samast gharana yahova ke sandook ko jay jayakar karate aur naraasinga foonkate huae le chala. 
2Samuel6:16 jab yahova ka sandook daudapur men a raha tha, tab shaaul kee bettee meekal ne khaidkee men se jhankakar daud raja ko yahova ke sammukh nachate koodate dekha, aur use man hee man tuchchh jana." 
2Samuel6:17 aur log yahova ka sandook bheetar le aa, aur usake sthan me, arthata us tamboo men rakha, jo daud ne usake liye khda karaya tha aur daud ne yahova ke sammukh homabali aur melabali chaddhaae." 
2Samuel6:18 jab daud homabali aur melabali chaddha chuka, tab us ne senaon ke yahova ke nam se praja ko ashaeervad diya." 
2Samuel6:19 tab us ne samast praja ko, arthata, kya sree kya purusha, samast israaaelee bheed ke logon ko aek aek rottee, aur aek aek ttukada mans, aur kishaamish kee aek aek ttiikaya banttva dee. tab praja ke sab log apane apane ghar chale gaae." 
2Samuel6:20 tab daud apane gharane ko ashaeervad dene ke liye lautta. aur shaaul kee bettee meekal daud se milane ko nikalee, aur kahane lagee, aj israaael ka raja jab apana shareer apane karmachariyon kee laundyaien ke samhane aeesa ughaade huae tha, jaaisa koi nikamma apana tan ughaaddhe rahata haai, tab kya hee pratapee dekh padta tha!" 
2Samuel6:21 daud ne meekal se kaha, yahova, jis ne tere pita aur usake samast gharane kee santee mujh ko chunakar apanee praja israaael ka pradhaan hone ko tthara diya haai, usake sammukh maain ne aeesa khela,aur maain yahova ke sammukh isee prakar khela karoonga." 
2Samuel6:22 aur is se bhee maain adhaik tuchchh banoonga, aur apane lekhe neech ttharoonga aur jin launadyaien kee too ne charcha kee ve bhee mera adaraman karengee." 
2Samuel6:23 aur shaaul kee bettee meekal ke marane ke din tak usake koi santan n hua. 
2Samuel7:1 jab raja apane bhvan men rahata tha, aur yahova ne usako usake charon or ke sab shatrauaun se vishraam diya tha," 
2Samuel7:2 tab raja natan nam bhavishyadvkta se kahane laga, dek, maain to devadaru ke bane huae ghar men rahata hoo, parantu parameshvar ka sandook tamboo men rahata haai." 
2Samuel7:3 natan ne raja se kaha, jo kuchh tere man men ho use kara kyonki yahova tere sang haai." 
2Samuel7:4 usee din rat ko yahova ka yah vachan natan ke pas pahuncha," 
2Samuel7:5 ki jakar mere das daud se kah, yahova son kahata haai, ki kya too mere nivas ke liye ghar banavaaega?" 
2Samuel7:6 jis din se maain israaaliaeyon ko misra se nikal laya aj ke din tak maain kabhee ghar men naheen raha, tamboo ke nivas men aya jaya karata hoo." 
2Samuel7:7 jahan jahan maain samast israaaeliyon ke beech firata thai, kya maain ne kaheen israaael ke kisee gotra se, jise maain ne apanee praja israaael kee charavahee karane ko ttharaya ho, aeesee bat kabhee kahee, ki tum ne mere liaee devadaru ka ghar kyon naheen banavaya?" 
2Samuel7:8 isaliye ab too mere das daud se aeesa kah, ki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain ne to tujhe bhedshaala se, aur bhead-bakaarison ke peechhe peechhe firane se, is manasa se bula liya ki too meree praja israaael ka pradhaan ho jaae." 
2Samuel7:9 aur jahan kaheen too aya gaya, vahan vahan maain tere sang raha, aur tere samast shatrauon ko tere samhane se nash kiya haai fir maain tere nam ko prathvee par ke bade bade logon ke namon ke saman mahan kar doonga." 
2Samuel7:10 aur maain apanee praja israaael ke liye aek sthan ttharaunga, aur usako sthiar karoonga, ki vah apane hee sthan men basee raheegee, aur kabhee chalayaman n hogee aur kuattlai log use fir dukh n dene paaenge, jaaise ki pahile dinon men karate the," 
2Samuel7:11 varan us samay se bhee jab maain apanee praja israaael ke upar nyayee ttharata tha aur maain tujhe tere samast shatrauon se vishraam doonga. aur yahova tujhe yah bhee batata haai ki yahova tera ghar banaae rakhega. 
2Samuel7:12 jab teree ayu pooree ho jaaegee, aur too apane purakhaon ke sang so jaaega, tab maain tere nij vansh ko tere peechhe khda karanke usake rajy ko sthiar karoonga." 
2Samuel7:13 mere nam ka ghar vahee banavaaega, aur maain usakee rajagaee ko sadaaiv sthiar rakoonga." 
2Samuel7:14 maain usaka pita ttharoonga, aur vah mera putra ttharega. yadi vah adharma kare, to maain use manushyon ke yogy dand se, aur adaamiyon ke yogy mar se tadna doonga." 
2Samuel7:15 parantu meree karuna us par se aeese n hattegee, jaaise maain ne shaaul par se hattakar usako tere age se door kiya." 
2Samuel7:16 varan tera gharana aur tera rajy mere samhane sada attl bana rahega teree gaee sadaaiv banee rahegee. 
2Samuel7:17 in sab baton aur is darshan ke anusar natan ne daud ko samajha diya. 
2Samuel7:18 tab daud raja bheetar jakar yahova ke sammukh baaitta, aur kahane laga, he prabhu yahova, kya kahoo, aur mera gharana kya haai, ki too ne mujhe yahan tak pahuncha diya haai?" 
2Samuel7:19 parantu taubhee, he prabhu yahova, yah teree drashttee men chhottee see bat hui kyonaki tu ne apane das ke gharane ke vishay age ke bahut dinon tak kee charcha kee haai, aur he prabhu yahova, yah to manushy ka niyam haai!" 
2Samuel7:20 daud tujh se aur kya kah sakata haai? he prabhu yahava, too to apane das ko janata haai!" 
2Samuel7:21 too ne apane vachan ke nimit, aur apane hee man ke anusar, yah sab bada kam kiya haai, ki tera das usako jan le." 
2Samuel7:22 is kara, he yahova parameshvar, too mahana haai kyonki jo kuchh ham ne apane kanon se suna haai, usake anusar tere tuly koi nahee, aur n tujhe chhod koi aur parameshvar haai." 
2Samuel7:23 fir teree praja israaael ke bhee tuly kaun haai? yah to prathvee bhr men aek hee jaati haai jise parameshvar ne jakar apanee nij praja karane ko chhudaya, isaaliye ki vah apana nam kare, aur tumhare liye bade bade kam kare aur too apanee praja ke samhane, jise too ne misraee aadi jati jati ke logon aur unake devataon se chooda liya, apane desh ke liye bhyanak kam kare." 
2Samuel7:24 aur too ne apanee praja israaael ko apanee sada kee praja hone ke liye ttharaya aur he yahova, too ap usaka parameshvar haai." 
2Samuel7:25 ab he yahova parameshvar, too ne jo vachan apane das ke aur usake gharane ke vishay diya haai, use sada ke liye sthiar kar, aur apane kahane ke anoosar hee kara" 
2Samuel7:26 aur yah kar ki log tere nam kee maahima sada kiya kare, ki senaon ka yahova israaael ke upar parameshvar haai aur tere das daud ka gharana tere samhane attl rahe." 
2Samuel7:27 kyonaki, he senaon ke yahova, he israaael ke parameshvar, too ne yah kahakar apane das par pragatt kiya haai, ki maain tera ghar banaae rakoonga is karan tere das ko tujh se yah praarthna karane ka hiyav hua haai." 
2Samuel7:28 aur ab he prabhu yahova, too hee parameshvar haai, aur tere vachan saty haai, aur too ne apane das ko yah bhlai karane ka vachan diya haai" 
2Samuel7:29 to ab prasann hokar apane das ke gharane par aeesee ashaeesh de, ki vah tere sammukh sadaaiv bana rahe kyonaki, he prabhu yahova, too ne aeesa hee kaha haai, aur tere das ka gharana tujh se ashaeesh pakar sadaaiv dhany rahe." 
2Samuel8:1 isake bad daud ne palishtaiyon ko jeetakar apane adhaeen kar liya, aur daud ne palishtaiyon kee rajadhaanee kee prabhuta unake hath se chheen lee." 
2Samuel8:2 fir us ne moaabiyon ko bhee jeeta, aur inako boomi par littakar doree se mapa tab do doree se logon ko mapakar ghaat kiya, aur doree bhr ke logon ko jeeavit chhod diya. tab moabee daud ke adhaeen hokar bhentt le ane lage." 
2Samuel8:3 fir jab soba ka raja rahob ka putra hadadejer mahanad ke pas apana rajy fir jyon ka tyon karane ko ja raha tha, tab daud ne usako jeet liya." 
2Samuel8:4 aur daud ne us se aek hajar sat sau savar, aur bees hajar pyade chheen liae aur sab rathvale ghaedon ke sum kee nas kattvai, parantu aek sau rathvale ghaede bacha rakhe." 
2Samuel8:5 aur jab daamishk ke aramee soba ke raja hadadejer kee sahayata karane ko aa, tab daud ne aramiyon men se bais hajaar purush mare." 
2Samuel8:6 tab daud ne damishk men aram ke sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai is prakar aramee daud ke adhaeen hokar bhentt le ane lage. aur jahan jahan daud jata tha vahan vahan yahova usako jayavant karata tha. 
2Samuel8:7 aur hadadejer ke karmachariyon ke pas sone kee jo ddhalen theen unhen daud lekar yarooshalem ko aya. 
2Samuel8:8 aur betah aur barautaai nam hadadejer ke nagaron se daud raja bahut sa peetal le aya. 
2Samuel8:9 aur jab hamat ke raja toi ne suna ki daud ne hadadejer kee samast sena ko jeet liya haai," 
2Samuel8:10 tab toi ne yoram nam apane putra ko daud raja ke pas usaka kushal kshom poochhne, aur use isaliye badhaai dene ko bheja, ki us ne hadadejer se lad kar usako jeet liya tha kyonaki hadadejer toi se lada karata tha. aur yoram chandee, sone aur peetal ke patra liae huae aya." 
2Samuel8:11 inako daud raja ne yahova ke liye paavitra karake rakha aur vaaisa hee apane jeetee hui sab jatiyon ke sone chandee se bhee kiya," 
2Samuel8:12 arthata aramiyo, moaabiyo, ammaniyo, palishtaiyo, aur amalekiyon ke sone chandee ko, aur rahob ke putra soba ke raja hadadejer kee loott ko bhee rakha." 
2Samuel8:13 aur jab daud lomavalee tarai men attarah hajar araamiyon ko marake lautt aya, tab usaka bada nam ho gaya." 
2Samuel8:14 fir us ne aedom men sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai poore aedom men us ne sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan. baaittai, aur sab aedomee daud ke adhaeen ho gaae. aur daud jahan jahan jata tha vahan vahan yahova usako jayavant karata tha." 
2Samuel8:15 daud ke karmachaariyon kee namavalee daud to samast israaael par rajy karata tha, aur daud apanee samast praja ke sath nyay aur dharma ke kam karata tha." 
2Samuel8:16 aur pradhaan senapaati sarooyah ka putra yoab tha itihas ka likhnevala aheelood ka putra yahoshaapat tha 
2Samuel8:17 pradhaan yajak aheetoob ka putra sadok aur aebyatar ka putra aheemelek the mantraee sarayah tha 
2Samuel8:18 karetiyo aur paletiyon ka pradhaan yahoyada ka putra banayah tha aur daud ke putra bhee mantraee the. 
2Samuel9:1 daud ne poochha, kya shaaul ke gharane men se koi ab tak bacha haai, jisako maain yonatan ke karan praeeati dikhaun?" 
2Samuel9:2 shaaul ke gharane ka seeba nam aek karmacharee tha, vah daud ke pas bulaya gaya aur jab raja ne us se poochha, kya too seeba haai? tab us ne kaha, ha, tera das vahee haai." 
2Samuel9:3 raja ne poochha, kya shaaul ke gharane men se koi ab tak bacha haai, jisako maain parameshvar kee see praeeti dikhaun? seeba ne raja se kaha, ha, yonatan ka aek betta to haai, jo langada haai." 
2Samuel9:4 raja ne us se poochha, vah kahan haai? seeba ne raja se kaha, vah to lodabar nagar me, ammeeael ke putra makeer ke ghar men rahata haai." 
2Samuel9:5 tab raja daud ne doot bhejakar usako lodabar se, ammeeael ke putra makeer ke ghar se bulava liya." 
2Samuel9:6 jab mapeeboshot, jo yonatan ka putra aur shaaul ka pota tha, daud ke pas aya, tab muh ke bal girake dandvata kiya. daud ne kaha, he mapeeboshot! us ne kaha, tere das ko kya agyaa?" 
2Samuel9:7 daud ne us se kaha, mat dra tere pita yonatan ke karan maain nishchay tujh ko praeeati dikhaunga, aur tere dada shaaul kee saree booomi tujhe faer doonga aur too meree mej par nity bhojan kiya kara." 
2Samuel9:8 us ne dandvata karake kaha, tera das kya haai, ki too mujhe aeese mare kutte kee or draashtti kare?" 
2Samuel9:9 tab raja ne shaaul ke karmacharee seeba ko bulavakar us se kaha, jo kuchh shaaul aur usake samast gharane ka tha vah maain ne tere svamee ke pote ko de diya haai." 
2Samuel9:10 ab se too apane betton aur sevakon samet usakee boomi par khetee karake usakee upaj le aya karana, ki tere svamee ke pote ko bhojan mila kare parantu tere svamee ka pota mapeeboshot meree mej par nity bhojan kiya karega. aur seeba ke to pandrah putra aur bees sevak the." 
2Samuel9:11 seeba ne raja se kaha, mera prabhu raja apane das ko jo jo agyaa de, un sabhon ke anusar tera das karega. daud ne kaha, mapeeboshot rajakumaron kee nai meree mej par bhojan kiya kare." 
2Samuel9:12 mapeeboshot ke bhee meeka nam aek chhotta betta tha. aur seeba ke ghar men jitane rahate the ve sab mapeeboshot kee seva karate the. 
2Samuel9:13 aur mapeeboshot yarooshalem men rahata tha kyonaki vah raja kee mej par nity bhojan kiya karata tha. aur vah donon panvon ka pangula tha. 
2Samuel10:1 isake bad ammoniyon ka raja mar gaya, aur usaka hanoon nam putra usake sthan par raja hua." 
2Samuel10:2 tab daud ne yah socha, ki jaaise hanoon ke pita nahash ne mujh ko praeeti dikhai thee, vaaise hee maain bhee hanoon ko praeeti dikhaunga. tab daud ne apane kai karmachariyon ko usake pas usake pita ke vishay shaantai dene ke liye bhej diya. aur daud ke karmacharee ammoniyon ke desh men aae." 
2Samuel10:3 parantu ammoniyon ke haakim apane svamee hanoon se kahane lage, daud ne jo tere pas shaantai denevale bheje haai, vah kya teree samajh men tere pita ka adar karane kee manasa me bheje haain? kya daud ne apane karmachaariyon ko tere pas isee manasa me naheen bheja ki is nagar men ddoonddh ddhanddh karake aur isaka bhed lekar isako ulatt den?" 
2Samuel10:4 isaliye hanoon ne daud ke karmachariyon ko pakada, aur unakee adhaee-adhaee daddhee mudvakar aur adho vasr, arthata nitamb tak kattvakar, unako jane diya." 
2Samuel10:5 isaka samachar pakar daud ne logon ko un se milane ke liye bheja, kyonki ve bahut lajate the. aur raja ne yah kaha, ki jab tak tumharee daaddhiyan baddh n jaaen tab tak yareeho men tthare raho, tab lautt ana." 
2Samuel10:6 jab ammaaniyon ne dekha ki ham se daud aprasann haai, tab ammoniyon ne betrahob aur soba ke bees hajar aramee pyadon ko, aur hajar purushaen samet maka ke raja ko, aur barah hajaar tobee purushaen ko, vetan par bulavaya." 
2Samuel10:7 yah sunakar daud ne yoab aur shooraveeron kee samast sena ko bheja. 
2Samuel10:8 tab ammonee nikale aur faattk hee ke pas pantee bandhaee aur soba aur rahob ke aramee aur tob aur maka ke poorush un se nyare maaidan men the. 
2Samuel10:9 yah dekhkar ki age peechhe donon or hamare virud panti bandhaee haai, yoab ne sab bade baddhe israaaelee veeron men se bahuton ko chhanttkar araamiyon ke samhane unakee panati bandhaai," 
2Samuel10:10 aur aur logon ko apane bhai abeeshau ke hath saunp diya, aur us ne ammoniyon ke samhane unakee panati bandhaai." 
2Samuel10:11 fir us ne kaha, yaadi aramee mujh par prabal hone lage, to too meree sahayata karana aur yadi ammonee tujh par prabal hone lagonge, to maain akar teree sahayata karoonga." 
2Samuel10:12 too hiyab bandha, aur ham apane logon aur apane parameshvar ke nagaron ke nimitt purushaarth karen aur yahova jaaisa usako achchha lage vaaisa kare." 
2Samuel10:13 tab yoab aur jo log usake sath the araamiyon se yud karane ko nikatt gaae aur ve usake samhane se bhage. 
2Samuel10:14 yah dekhkar ki aramee bhag gaae haain ammonee bhee abeeshau ke samhane se bhagakar nagar ke bheetar ghause. tab yoab ammoniyon ke pas se lauttkar yarooshalem ko aya. 
2Samuel10:15 fir yah dekhkar ki ham israaaeliyon se har gaae aramee ikatthe huae. 
2Samuel10:16 aur hadadejer ne doot bhejakar mahanad ke par ke aramiyon ko bulavaya aur ve hadadejer ke senapaati shaevak ko apana pradhaan banakar helam ko aae. 
2Samuel10:17 isaka samachar pakar daud ne samast israaaeliyon ko ikattha kiya, aur yaradan ke par hokar helam men pahuncha. tab aram daud ke viruddh panti bandhakar us se lada." 
2Samuel10:18 parantu aramee israaaeliyon se bhage, aur daud ne aramiyon men se sat sau raathaiyon aur chaleey hajar savaron ko mar dala, aur unake senapati haebak ko aeesa ghaayal kiya ki vah vaheen mar gaya." 
2Samuel10:19 yah dekhkar ki ham israaael se har gaae haai, jitane raja hadadejer ke adhaeen the un sabhon ne israaael ke sath sanadhai kee, aur usake adhaeen ho gaae. aur aramee ammoniyon kee aur sahayata karane se dr gaae." 
2Samuel11:1 fir jis samay raja log yuddh karane ko nikala karate haai, us samay, arthata varsha ke arambh men daud ne yoab ko, aur usake sang apane sevakon aur samast israaaeliyon ko bheja aur unhon ne ammoniyon ko nash kiya, aur rabba nagar ko ghor liya. parantu daud sarooshalem men rah gaya." 
2Samuel11:2 sanjh ke samay daud palang par se uttkar rajabhvan kee chht par tthal raha tha, aur chht par se usako aek sre, jo ati sundar thee, nahatee hui dekh padee." 
2Samuel11:3 jab daud ne bhejakar us sree ko puchhvaya, tab kisee ne kaha, kya yah aeleeam kee bettee, aur hittei uriyyah kee patnee batashoba naheen haai?" 
2Samuel11:4 tab daud ne doot bhejakar use bulava liya aur vah daud ke pas ai, aur vah usake sath soya. vah to retu se shuuddh ho gai thee tab vah apane ghar lautt gai." 
2Samuel11:5 aur vah sree garbhvatee hui, tab daud ke pas kahala bheja, ki mujhe garbh haai." 
2Samuel11:6 tab daud ne yoab ke pas kahala bheja, ki hittee uriyyah ko mere pas bhej, tab yoab ne uriyyah ko daud ke pas bhej diya." 
2Samuel11:7 jab uriyyah usake pas aya, tab daud ne us se yoab aur sena ka kushal kshom aur yuddh ka hal poochha." 
2Samuel11:8 tab daud ne uriyyah se kaha, apane ghar jakar apane panv dhae. aur uriyyah rajabhvan se nikala, aur usake peechhe raja ke pas se kuchh inam bheja gaya." 
2Samuel11:9 parantu uriyyah apate svamee ke sab sevakon ke sang rajabhvan ke dar men lett gaya, aur apane ghar n gaya." 
2Samuel11:10 jab daud ko yah samachar mila, ki uriyyah apane ghar naheen gaya, tab daud ne uriyyah se kaha, kya too yatra karake naheen aya? to apane ghar kyon naheen gaya?" 
2Samuel11:11 uriyyah ne daud se kaha, jab sanadook aur israael aur yahooda jhopadiyon men rahate haai, aur mera svamee yoab aur mere svamee ke sevak khule maaidan par dere dale huae haai, to kya maain ghar jakar khau, peeu, aur apanee patnee ke sath soun? tere jeevan kee shapat, aur tere praan kee shapat, ki maain aeesa kam naheen karane ka." 
2Samuel11:12 daud ne uriyyah se kaha, aj yaheen rah, aur kal maain tujhe vida karoonga. isaaliye uriyyah us din aur doosare din bhee yarooshalem men raha." 
2Samuel11:13 tab daud ne use nevata diya, aur us ne usake samhane khaya piya, aur usee ne use matavala kiya aur sanjh kae vah apane svamee ke sevakon ke sang apanee charapai par sone ko nikala, parantu apane ghar n gaya." 
2Samuel11:14 bihan ko daud ne yoab ke nam par aek chitthee likhkar uriyyah ke hath se bhejadee. 
2Samuel11:15 us chitthee men yah likha tha, ki sab se ghaer yuddh ke samhane uriyyah ko rakhna, tab use chhodkar lautt abo, ki vah ghaayal ho kar mar jae." 
2Samuel11:16 aur yoab ne nagar ko achchhee reeati se dekh bhalakar jis sthan men vah janata tha ki veer haai, usee men uriyyah ko tthara diya." 
2Samuel11:17 tab nagar ke purushaen ne nikalakar yoab se yuddh kiya, aur lagon men se, arthata daud ke sevakon men se kitane khet aae aur un men hittee uriyyah bhee mar gaya." 
2Samuel11:18 tab yoab ne bhejakar daud ko yuddh ka poora hal bataya 
2Samuel11:19 aur doot ko agyaa dee, ki jab too yuddhka poora hal raja ko bata chuke," 
2Samuel11:20 tab yaadi raja jalakar kahane lage, ki tum lag ladne ko nagar ke aeese nikatt kyon gaae? kya tum n janate the ki ve shaharapanah par se teer chhodenge?" 
2Samuel11:21 yarubbeshot ke putra abeemelek ko kisane mar dala? kya aek sree ne shaharapanah par se chakkee ka uparala patt us par aeesa n dala ki vah tebes men mar gaya? fir tum haharapanah ke aese nikatt kyon gaae? to too yon kahana, ki tera das uriyyah hittee bhee mar gaya." 
2Samuel11:22 tab doot chal diya, aur jakar daud se yoab kee sab baten charnn keen." 
2Samuel11:23 doot ne daud se kaha, ki ve log ham par prabal hokar maaidan men hamare pas nikal aa, fir ham ne unhen faattk tak khdeda." 
2Samuel11:24 tab dhanudharariyon ne shaharapanah par se tere janon par teer chhode aur raja ke kitane jan mar gaa, aur tera das uriyyah hittee bhee mar gaya." 
2Samuel11:25 daud ne doot se kaha, yoab se yon kahana, ki is bat ke karan udas n ho, kyonaki talavar jaaise isako vaaise usako nash karatee haai to too nagar ke viruddh aadhaik draddhta se ladkar use ulatt de. aur too use hiyav bandhaa." 
2Samuel11:26 jab uriyyah kee sree ne suna ki mera paati mar gaya, tab vah apane paati ke liye rone peettte lagee." 
2Samuel11:27 aur jab usake vilap ke din beet chuke, tab daud ne use bulavakar apane ghar men rakh liya, aur vah usakee patnee ho gai, aur usake putra utpann hua. parantu us kam se jo daud ne kiya tha yahova krodhait hua." 
2Samuel12:1 tab yahova ne daud ke pas natan ko bheja, aur vah usake pas jakar kahane laga, aek nagar men do manushy rahate the, jin men se aek dhanee aur aek nirdhan tha." 
2Samuel12:2 dhanee ke pas to bahut see bhed-bakaariyan aur gay baail the 
2Samuel12:3 parantu nirdhan ke pas bhed kee aek chhottee bachchee ko chhod aur kuchh bhee n tha, aur usako us ne mol lekar jilaya tha. aur vah usake yahan usake balabachchon ke sath hee baddhee thee vah usake ttukade men se khatee, aur usake kattore men se peetee, aur usakee god me sotee thee, aur vah usakee bettee ke saman thee." 
2Samuel12:4 aur dhanee ke pas aek battohee aya, aur us ne us battohee ke liye, jo usake pas aya tha, bhojat banavane ko apanee bhed-bakaariyon va gay baailon men se kuchh n liya, parantu us nirdhan manushy kee bhed kee bachchee lekar us jan ke liye, jo usake pas aya tha, bhojan banavaya." 
2Samuel12:5 tab daud ka kop us manushy par bahut bhdka aur us ne natan se kaha, yahova ke jeevan kee shapat, jis manushy ne aeesa kam kiya vah praan dand ke yogy haai" 
2Samuel12:6 aur usako vah bhed kee bachchee ka auguna bhr dena hoga, kyonki us ne aeesa kam kiya, aur kuchh daya naheen kee." 
2Samuel12:7 tab natan ne daud se kaha, too hee vah manushy haai. israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain ne tera abhaishok karake tujhe israaael ka raja ttharaya, aur maain te tujhe shaaul ke hath se bachaya" 
2Samuel12:8 fir maain ne tere svamee ka bhvan tujhe diya, aur tere svamee kee patnaiyan tere bhag ke liye deen aur maain ne israaael aur sahooda ka gharana tujhe diya tha aur yaadi yah thoda tha, to maain tujhe aur bhee bahut kuchh denevala tha." 
2Samuel12:9 too ne yahova kee agyaa tuchchh janakar kyon vah kam kiya, jo usakee draashtti men bura haai? hittee uriyyah ko too ne talavar se ghaat kiya, aur usakee patnee ko apanee kar liya haai, aur uriyyah ko ammoniyon kee talavar se marava dala haai." 
2Samuel12:10 isaliye ab talavar tere ghar se kabhee door n hogee, kyonki too ne mujhe tuchchh janakar hittee uriyyah kee patnee ko apanee patnee kar liya haai." 
2Samuel12:11 yahova yon kahata haai, ki sun, maain tere ghar men se vipaattai uttakar tujh par daloonga aur teree paatnaiyon ko tere samhane lekar doosare ko doonga, aur vah din dupaharee men teree patnaiyon se kukarma karega." 
2Samuel12:12 too ne to vah kam chhpaiakar kiya par maain yah kam sab israaaeliyon ke samhane din dupaharee karaunga. 
2Samuel12:13 tab daud ne natan se kaha, maain ne yahova ke viruddh pap kiya haai. natan ne daud se kaha, yahova ne tere pap ko door kiya haai. too n marega." 
2Samuel12:14 taubhee too ne jo is kam ke dara yahova ke shatrauon ko tiraskar karane ka bada avasar diya haai, is karan tera jo betta utpann hua haai vah avashy hee marega." 
2Samuel12:15 tab natan apane ghar chala gaya. aur jo bachcha uriyyah kee patnee se daud ke dara utpann tha, vah yahova ka mara bahut rogee ho gaya." 
2Samuel12:16 aur daud us ladke ke liye parameshvar se binatee karane laga aur upavas kiya, aur bheetar jakar rat bhr boomi par pada raha." 
2Samuel12:17 tab usake gharane ke puraniye uttkar use boomi par se uttane ke liye usake pas gaae parantu us ne n chaha, aur unake sang rottee n khai." 
2Samuel12:18 sataven din bachcha mar gaya, aur daud ke karmacharee usako bachche ke marane ka samachar dene se dre unhon ne to kaha tha, ki jab tak bachcha jeevit raha, tab tak us ne hamare bamajhane par man n lagaya yaadi ham usako bachche ke mar jane ka hal sunaaen to vah bahut hee aadhaik dukhee hoga." 
2Samuel12:19 apane karmachaariyon ko apas men fausafausate dekhkar daud ne jan liya ki bachcha mar gaya to daud ne apane karmachariyon se poochha, kya bachcha mar gaya? unhon ne kaha, ha, mar gaya haai." 
2Samuel12:20 tab daud boomi par se utta, aur nahakar tel lagaya, aur vasr badala tab yahova ke bhvan men jakar dandvata kee fir apane bhvan men aya aur usakee agyaa par rottee usako parosee gai, aur us ne bhojan kiya." 
2Samuel12:21 tab usake karmachaariyon ne us se poochha, too ne yah kya kam kiya haai? jab tak bachcha jeevit raha, tab tak too upavas karata hua rota raha parantu jyonhee bachcha mar gaya, tyonhee too uttkar bhojan karane laga." 
2Samuel12:22 us ne uttar diya, ki jab tak bachcha jeevit raha tab tak to maain yah sochakar upavas karata aur rota raha, ki kya jane yahova maujh par aeesa anugrah kare ki bachcha jeevit rahe." 
2Samuel12:23 parantu ab vah mar gaya, fir maain upavas kyon karoon? kya maain use lautta la sakata hoon? maain to usake pas jaunga, parantu vah mere pas lautt n aaega." 
2Samuel12:24 tab daud ne apanee patnee batashoba ko shaantai dee, aur vah usake pas gaya aur asake aek putra utpann hua, aur us ne usaka nam sulaaiman rakha. aur vah sahova ka piry hua." 
2Samuel12:25 aur us ne natan bhvishyadvkta ke dara sandesh bhej diya aur us ne yahova ke karan usaka nam yadeedhah rakha. 
2Samuel12:26 aur yoab ne ammoniyon ke rabba nagar se ladkar rajanagar ko le liya. 
2Samuel12:27 tab yoab ne dooton se daud ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki maain rabba se lada aur jalavale nagar ko le liya haai." 
2Samuel12:28 so ab rahe huae logon ko ikattha karake nagar ke viruddh chhavanee dalakar use bhee le le aeesa n ho ki maain use le loo, aur vah mere nam par kahalaae." 
2Samuel12:29 tab daud sab logon ko ikattha karake rabba ko gaya, aur us se yuddh karake use le liya." 
2Samuel12:30 tab us ne unake raja ka mukut, jo taul men kikkar bhr sone ka tha, aur us men maanai jade the, usako usake sir par se utara, aur vah daud ke sir par rakha gaya. fir us ne us nagar kee bahut hee loott pai." 
2Samuel12:31 aur us ne usake rahanevalon ko nikalakar aro se do do ttukade karaya, aur lohe ke henge un par firavaa, aur lohe kee kulhaadiyon se unhen kattvaya, aur itt ke pajave men se chalavaya aur ammoniyon ke sab nagaron se bhee us ne aeesa hee kiya. tab daud samast logon samet yarooshalem ko lautt aya." 
2Samuel13:1 isake bad tamar nam aek sundaree jo daud ke putra abashaalom kee baahin thee, us par daud ka putra amnon mohit hua." 
2Samuel13:2 aur amnon apanee baahin tamar ke karan aeesa vikal ho gaya ki beemar pad gaya kyonaki vah kumaree thee, aur usake sath kuchh karana amnon ko kattnai jan padta tha." 
2Samuel13:3 amnon ke yonadab nam aek mitra tha, jo daud ke bhai shaima ka betta tha aur vah bada chatur tha." 
2Samuel13:4 aur us ne amnon se kaha, he rajakumar, kya karan haai ki too prati din aeesa dubala hota jata haai kya too mujhe n bataaega? amnon ne us se kaha, maain to apane bhai abashaalom kee baahin tamar par mohit hoon." 
2Samuel13:5 yonadab ne us se kaha, apane palang par lettkar beemar ban ja aur jab tera pita tujhe dekhne ko aa, tab us se kahana, meree baahin tamar akar mujhe rottee khailaa, aur bhojan ko mere samhane banaa, ki maain usako dekhkar usake hath se khaun." 
2Samuel13:6 aur amnon lettkar beemar bana aur jab raja use dekhne aya, tab amnon ne raja se kaha, meree baahin tamar akar mere dekhte do pooree banaa, ki maain usake hath se khaun." 
2Samuel13:7 aur daud ne apane ghar tamar ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki apane bhai amnon ke ghar jakar usake liye bhojan bana." 
2Samuel13:8 tab tamar apane bhai amnon ke ghar gai, aur vah pada hua tha. tab us ne atta lekar goondha, aur usake dekhte pooriyan. pakai." 
2Samuel13:9 tab us ne thal lekar unako usake liye parosa, parantu us ne khane se inakar kiya. tab amnon ne kaha, mere as pas se sab logon ko nikal do, tab sab log usake pas se nikal gaae." 
2Samuel13:10 tab amnon ne tamar se kaha, bhojat ko kottree men le a, ki maain tere hath se khaun. to tamar apanee banai hui pooriyon ko uttakar apane bhai amnon ke pas kottree men le gai." 
2Samuel13:11 jab vah unako usake khane ke liye nikatt le gai, tab us ne use pakadkar kaha, he meree baahin, a, mujh se mila." 
2Samuel13:12 us ne kaha, he mere bhai, aeesa nahee, mujhe bhrashtt n kara kyonki israael men aeesa kam hona naheen chahiye aeesee mooddhta ka kam n kara." 
2Samuel13:13 aur fir maain apanee namadharai liye huae kahan jaungee? aur too israaaeliyon men aek mooddh gina jaaega. too raja se batacheet kar, vah mujh ko tujhe byah dene ke liye mana n karega." 
2Samuel13:14 parantu us ne usakee n sunee aur us se balavan hone ke karan usake sath kukarma karake use bhrashtt kiya. 
2Samuel13:15 tab amnon us se atyant baair rakhne laga yahan tak ki yah baair usake paahile moh se baddhkar hua. tab amnon ne us se kaha, uttkar chalee ja." 
2Samuel13:16 us ne kaha, aeesa nahee, kyonki yah baddha upadrav, arthata mujhe nikal dena us pahile se baddhkar haai jo too ne mujh se kiya haai. parantu us ne usakee n sunee." 
2Samuel13:17 tab us ne apane tthaluae javan ko bulakar kaha, is sree ko mere pas se bahar nikal de, aur usake peechhe kivad men chittkanee laga de." 
2Samuel13:18 vah to rangaabirangee kuta pahine thee kyonaki jo rajakumaariyan kunvaree rahatee theen ve aeese hee vasr pahinatee theen. so amnon ke tthaluae ne use bahar nikalakar usake peechhe kivad men chittkanee laga dee. 
2Samuel13:19 tab tamar ne apane sir par rakh dalee, aur apanee rangaabirangee kuta ko faaddh dala aur sir par hath rakhe chillatee hui chalee gai." 
2Samuel13:20 usake bhai abashaalom ne us se poochha, kya tera bhai amnon tere sath raha haai? parantu ab, he meree baahin, chup rah, vah to tera bhai haai is bat kee chinta n kara. tab tamar apane bhai abashaalom ke ghar men man mare baaittee rahee." 
2Samuel13:21 jab ye sab baten daud raja ke kan men padee, tab vah bahut jhunjhla utta." 
2Samuel13:22 aur abashaalom ne amnon se bhla-bura kuchh n kaha, kyonaki amnon ne usakee bahin tamar ko bhrashtt kiya tha, is karan abashaalom us se gharana rakhta tha." 
2Samuel13:23 do parsha ke bad abashaalom ne aepraaim ke nikatt ke balhasor men apanee bhedonka un kataravaya aur abashaalom ne sab rajakumaron ko nevata diya. 
2Samuel13:24 vah raja ke pas jakar kahanalaga, binatee yah haai, ki tere das kee bhedon ka un katara jata haai, isaliye raja apane karmachariyo samet apane das ke sang chale." 
2Samuel13:25 raja ne abashaalom se kaha, he mere bette, aeesa naheen ham sab n chalenge, aeesa n ho ki tujhe aadhaik kashtt ho. tab abashaalom ne use binatee karake dabaya, parantu us ne jane se inakar kiya, taubhee use ashaeervad diya." 
2Samuel13:26 tab abashaalom ne kaha, yadi too naheen to mere bhai amnon ko hamare sang jane de. raja ne us se poochha, vah tere sang kyon chale?" 
2Samuel13:27 parantu abashaalom ne use aeesa dabaya ki us ne amnon aur sab rajakumaron ko usake sath jane diya. 
2Samuel13:28 au abashaalom ne apane sevako ko agyaa dee, ki savadhaan raho aur jab amnon dakhmadha peekar nasho men a jaa, aur maain tum se kahoo, amnon ko mar dalana. kya is agyaa ka denevala maain naheen hoon? hiyav bandhakar purushaarth karana." 
2Samuel13:29 to abashaalom ke sevakon ne amnon ke sath abashaalom kee agyaa ke anusar kiya. tab sab rajakumar utt khde hua, aur apane apane khchchar par chaddhkar bhag gaae." 
2Samuel13:30 ve marga hee men the, ki daud ko yah samachar mila ki abashaalom ne sab rajakumaron ko mar dala, aur un men se aek bhee naheen bacha." 
2Samuel13:31 tab daud ne uttkar apane vasr faade, aur boomi par gir pada, aur usake sab karmacharee vasr faade huae usake pas khde rahe." 
2Samuel13:32 tab daud ke bhai shaima ke putra yanadab ne kaha, mera prabhu yah n samajhe ki sab javan, arthata rajakumar mar dale gaae haai, keval amnon mara gaya haai kyonki jis din us ne abashaalom kee bahin tamar ko bhrashtt kiya, usee din se abashaalom kee agyaa se aeesee hee bat ttnee thee." 
2Samuel13:33 isaliye ab mera prabhu raja apane man men yah samajhkar ki sab rajakumar mar gaae udas n ho kyonaki keval amnon hee mar gaya haai. 
2Samuel13:34 itane men abashaalom bhag gaya. aur jo javan pahara deta th us ne ankhen uttakar dekha, ki peechhe kee or se pahad ke pas ke marga se bahut log chale a rahe haain." 
2Samuel13:35 tab yonadab ne raja se kaha, dek, rajakumar to a gaae haain jaaisa tere das ne kaha tha vaaisa hee hua." 
2Samuel13:36 vah kah hee chuka tha, ki rajakumar pahunch gaa, aur chilla chillakar rone lage aur raja bhee apane sab karmachariyon samet bilakh bilakh kar rone laga." 
2Samuel13:37 abashaalom to bhagakar gashoor ke raja ammeehoor ke putra talmaai ke pas gaya. aur daud apane putra ke liye din din vilap karata raha. 
2Samuel13:38 jab abashaalom bhagakar gashoor ko gaya, tab pahan teen parsha tak raha." 
2Samuel13:39 aur daud ke man men abashaalom ke pas jane kee badee lalasa rahee kyonki amnon jo mar gaya tha, is karan us ne usake vishay men shaantai pai." 
2Samuel14:1 aur sarooyah ka putra yoab tad gaya ki raja ka man abashaalom kee or laga haai. 
2Samuel14:2 isaliye yoab ne tako nagar men doot bhejakar vahan se aek buddhiman sree ko bulavaya, aur us se kaha, shaek karanevalee ban, arthata shaek ka pahirava pahin, aur tel n laga parantu aeesee sree ban jo bahut din se muae ke liye vilap karatee rahee ho." 
2Samuel14:3 tab raja ke pas jakar aeesee aeesee baten kahana. aur yoab ne usako jo kuchh kahana tha vah sikha diya. 
2Samuel14:4 jab vah takoin raja se baten karane lagee, tab munh ke bal boomi par gir dandvata karake kahane lagee, raja kee dohai" 
2Samuel14:5 raja ne us se poochha, tujhe kya chahiye? us ne kaha, sachamuch mera paati mar gaya, aur maain vidhava ho gai." 
2Samuel14:6 aur teree dasee ke do bette the, aur un donon ne maaidan men mar peett kee aur unako chhudanevala koi n tha, isaaliae aek ne doosare ko aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya." 
2Samuel14:7 aur yah sun sab kul ke log teree dasee ke viruddh uttkar yah kahate haai, ki jis ne apane bhai ko ghaat kiya usako hamen saunp de, ki usake mare huae bhai ke praan ke palatte men usako praan dand de aur varis ko bhee nash karen. is tarah ve mere angare ko jo bach gaya haai bujhaaenge, aur mere pati ka tam aur santan dharatee par se mitta dalenge." 
2Samuel14:8 raja ne sree se kaha, apate ghar ja, aur maain tere vishay agyaa doonga." 
2Samuel14:9 takoin ne raja se kaha, he mere prabhu, he raja, dosh mujhee ko aur mere pita ke gharane hee ko lage aur raja apanee gaee samet nidash tthare." 
2Samuel14:10 raja ne kaha, jo koi tujh se kuchh bole usako mere pas la, tab vah fir tujhe choone n paaega." 
2Samuel14:11 us ne kaha, raja apane parameshvar yahova ko smaran kare, ki koon ka palatta lenevala auair nash karane n paa, aur mere bette ka nash n hone pae. us ne kaha, yahova ke jeevan kee shapat, tere bette ka ek bal bhee boomi par girane n paega." 
2Samuel14:12 sree bolee, teree dasee apane prabhu raja se aek bat kahane paae." 
2Samuel14:13 us ne kaha, kahe ja. sree kahane lagee, fir too ne parameshvar kee praja kee haani ke liye aeesee hee yuktai kyon kee haai? raja ne jo yah vachan kaha haai, is se vah doshaee sa ttharata haai, kyonaki raja apane nikale huae ko lautta naheen lata." 
2Samuel14:14 ham ko to marana hee haai, aur boomi par gire huae jal ke saman ttharenge, jo fir uttaya naheen jata taubhee parameshvar praan naheen leta, varan aeesee yukit karata haai ki nikala hua usake pas se nikala hua n rahe." 
2Samuel14:15 aur ab maain jo apane prabhu raja se yah bat kahane ko ai hoo, isaka karan yah haai, ki logon ne mujhe dra diya tha isaliye teree dasee ne socha, ki maain raja se boloongee, kadaachit raja apanee dasee kee binatee ko pooree kare." 
2Samuel14:16 nisandeh raja sunakar avashy apanee dasee ko us manushy ke hath se bachaaega jo pajhe aur mere bette donon ko parameshvar ke bhag men se nash karana chahata haai. 
2Samuel14:17 so teree dasee ne socha, ki mere prabhu raja ke vachan se shaaantai mile kyonaki mera prabhu raja parameshvar ke kisee doot kee nai bhle-bure men bhed kar sakata haai isaaliye tera parameshvar yahova tere sang rahe." 
2Samuel14:18 raja ne uttar dekar us sree se kaha, jo bat maain tujh se poochhta hoon use mujh se n chhpaia. sree ne kaha, mera prabhu raja kahe jaae." 
2Samuel14:19 raja ne poochha, is bat men kya yoab tera sangee haai? sree ne uttar dekar kaha, he mere prabhu, he raja, tere praan kee shapat, jo kuchh mere prabhu raja ne kaha haai, us se koi n dahinee or mud sakata haai aur n bai. tere das yoab hee ne mujhe agyaa dee, aur ye sab baten usee ne teree dasee ko sikhai haai." 
2Samuel14:20 tere das yoab ne yah kam isaliye kiya ki bat ka rang badale. aur mera prabhu parameshvar ke aek doot ke tuly buaddhiman haai, yahan tak ki dharatee par jo kuchh hota haai un sab ko vah janata haai." 
2Samuel14:21 tab raja ne yoab se kaha, sun, maain ne yah bat manee haai too jakar abashaalom javan ko lautta la." 
2Samuel14:22 tab yoab ne boomi par munh ke bal gir dandvata kar raja ko ashaeervad diya aur yoab kahane laga, he mere prabhu, he raja, aj tera das jan gaya ki mujh par teree anagrah kee draashtti haai, kyonaki raja ne apane das kee binatee sunee haai." 
2Samuel14:23 aur yoab uttkar gashoor ko gaya, aur abashaalom ko yarooshalem le aya." 
2Samuel14:24 tab raja ne kaha, vah apane ghar jakar rahe aur mera darshan n paae. tab abashaalom apane ghar ja raha, aur raja ka darshan n paya." 
2Samuel14:25 samast israaael men sundarata ke karan bahut prashansa yogy abashaalom ke tuly aur koi n tha varan us men nakh se sikh tak kuchh dosh n tha. 
2Samuel14:26 aur vah varsha ke ant men apana sir munddhvata tha usake bal usako bharee jan padte the, is karan vah use mundata tha aur jab jab vah use mundata tab tab apane sir ke bal taulakar raja ke taul ke anusar do sau shokel bhr pata tha." 
2Samuel14:27 aur abashaalom ke teen bette, aur tamar nam aek bettee utpann hui thee aur yah roopavatee sree thee." 
2Samuel14:28 aur abashaalom raja ka darshan bina paae yarooshalem men do varsha raha. 
2Samuel14:29 tab abashaalom ne yoab ko bulava bheja ki use raja ke pas bheje parantu yoab ne usake pas ane se inakar kiya. aur us ne use doosaree bar bulava bheja, parantu tab bhee us ne ane se inakar kiya." 
2Samuel14:30 tab us ne apane sevakon se kaha, suno, yoab ka aek khet meree boomi ke nikatt haai, aur us men usaka jav khda haai tum jakar us men ag lagao. aur abashaalom ke sevakon ne us khet men ag laga dee." 
2Samuel14:31 tab yoab utta, aur abashaalom ke ghar men usake pas jakar us se poochhne laga, tere sevakon ne mere khet men kyon ag lagai haai?" 
2Samuel14:32 abashaalom ne yoab se kaha, maain ne to tere pas yah kahala bheja tha, ki yahan ana ki maain tujhe raja ke pas yah kahane ko bhejoo, ki maain gashoor se kyon aya? maain ab tak vahan rahata to achchha hota. isaliye ab raja mujhe darshan de aur yadi maain doshaee hoo, to vah mujhe mar dale." 
2Samuel14:33 to yoab ne raja ke pas jakar usako yah bat sunai aur raja ne abashaalom ko bulavaya. aur vah usake pas gaya, aur usake sammukh boomi par munh ke bal girake dandvata kee aur raja ne abashaalom ko chooma." 
2Samuel15:1 isake bad abashaalom ne rath aur ghaede, aur apate age age daudnevale pachas manushy rakh liae." 
2Samuel15:2 aur abashaalom savere uttkar faattk ke marga ke pas khda haa karata tha aur jab jab koi mui raja ke pas nyay ke liye ata, tab tab abashaalom usako pukarake poochhta tha, too kiy nagar se ata haai?" 
2Samuel15:3 aur vah kahata tha, ki tera das israaael ke faulane gotra ka haai. tab abashaalom us se kahata tha, ki sun, tera paksha to tteek aur nyay ka haai parantu raja kee or se teree yunanevala koi naheen haai." 
2Samuel15:4 fir abashaalom yah bhee kaha karata tha, ki bhla hota ki maain is desh men nyayee ttharaya jata! ki jitane mukamavale hote ve sab mere hee pas ate, aur maain unaka nyay chukata." 
2Samuel15:5 fir jab koi use dandvata karane ko nikatt ata, tab vah hath baddhakar usako pakadke choom leta tha." 
2Samuel15:6 aur jitane israaaelee raja ke pas apana mukama taai karane ko ate un sabhon se abashaalom aeesa hee vyavahar kiya karata tha is prakar abashaalom ne israaaelee manushyon ke man ko har liya. 
2Samuel15:7 char varsha ke beetane par abashaalom ne raja se kaha, mujhe hebraen jakar apanee us mannat ko pooree karane de, jo maain ne yahova kee manee haai." 
2Samuel15:8 tera das to jab aram ke gashoor men rahata tha, tab yah kahakar yahova kee mannat manee, ki yadi yahova mujhe sachamuch yarooshalem ko lautta le jaa, to maain yahova kee upasana karoonga." 
2Samuel15:9 raja ne us se kaha, kushal kshom se ja. aur vah chalakar hebraen ko gaya." 
2Samuel15:10 tab abashaalom ne israaael ke samast gotron men yah kahane ke liye bheadiae bheje, ki jag naraasinge ka shabd tum ko sun pade, tab kahana, ki abashaalom hebraen men raja hua!" 
2Samuel15:11 aur abashaalom ke sang do sau nevataharee yarooshalem se gaae ve seedho man se usaka bhed bina jane gaae. 
2Samuel15:12 fir jab abashaalom ka yagya hua, tab us ne geelovasee aheetopel ko, jo daud ka mantraee tha, bulava bheja ki vah apane nagar geelo se aae. aur rajadraeh kee goshttee ne bal pakada, kyonki abashaalom ke paksha ke log barabar baddhte gaae." 
2Samuel15:13 tab kisee ne daud ke pas jakar yah samachar diya, ki israaaelee manushyon ke man abashaalom kee or ho gaae haain." 
2Samuel15:14 tab daud ne apane sab karmachariyon se jo yarooshalem men usake sang the kaha, ao, ham bhag chalen naheen to ham men se korha bhee abashaalom se n bachega isaliye fauta karate chale chalo, aeesa n ho ki vah fauta karake hamen a ghore, aur hamaree haani kare, aur is nagar ko talavar se mar le." 
2Samuel15:15 raja ke karmachariyon ne us se kaha, jaaisa hamare prabhu raja ko achchha jan pade, vaaisa hee karane ke liye tere das taaiyar haain." 
2Samuel15:16 tab raja nikal gaya, aur usake peechhe usaka samast gharana nikala. aur raja das rakheliyon ko bhvan kee chaukasee karane ke liye chhod gaya." 
2Samuel15:17 aur raja nikal gaya, aur usake peechhe sab log nikale aur ve betamerhak men tthar gaae." 
2Samuel15:18 aur usake sab karmacharee usake pas se hokar age gaae aur sab karetee, aur sab paletee, aur sab gatee, arthata jo chh sau purush gat se usake peechhe ho liae the ve sab raja ke samhane se hokar age chale." 
2Samuel15:19 tab raja ne gatee ittaai se poochha, hamare sang too kyon chalata haai? lauttkar raja ke pas raha kyonki too paradeshaee aur apane desh se door haai, isaaliye apane sthan ko lautt ja." 
2Samuel15:20 too to kal hee aya haai, kya maain aj tujhe apane sath mara mara firaun? maain to jahan ja samoonga vahan jaunga. too lautt ja, aur apane bhaiyon ko bhee lautta de ishchar kee karuna aur yachchai tere sang rahe." 
2Samuel15:21 ittaai ne raja ko uttar dekar kaha, yahova ke jeevan kee shapat, aur mere prabhu raja ke jeevan kee shapat, jis kisee sthan men mera prabhu raja rahega, chahe marane ke liye ho chahe jeevit rahane ke liye, usee sthan men tera das bhee rahega." 
2Samuel15:22 tab daud ne ittaai se kaha, par chala. so gatee ittaai apane samast janon aur apane sath ke sab bala-bachchon samet par ho gaya." 
2Samuel15:23 sab rahanevale chilla chillakar roae aur sab log par hua, aur raja bhee kidraen nam nale ke par hua, aur sab log nale ke par jangal ke marga kee or par hokar chal pade." 
2Samuel15:24 tab kya dekhne men aya, ki sadok bhee aur usake sang sab leveey parameshvar kee vacha ka sandook uttaae huae haain aur unhon ne parameshvar ke sandook ko dhar diya, tab aebyatar chaddha, aur jab tak sab log nagar se n nikale tab tak vaheen raha." 
2Samuel15:25 tab raja ne sadok se kaha, parameshvar ke sandook ko nagar men lautta le ja. yaadi yahova ke anugrah kee drashtti mujh par ho, to vah mujhe lauttakar usako aur apane vasasthan ko bhee dikhaaega" 
2Samuel15:26 parantu yadi vah mujh se aeesa kahe, ki maain tujh se prasann nahee, taubhee maain hajir hoo, jaaisa usako bhaae vaaisa hee vah mere sath batrtav kare." 
2Samuel15:27 fir raja ne sadok yajak se kaha, kya too dasha naheen haai? so kushal kshom se nagar men lautt ja, aur tera putra aheemas, aur aebyatar ka putra yonatan, donon tumhare sang lautten." 
2Samuel15:28 suno, maain jangal ke ghaatt ke pas tab tak tthara rahoonga, jab tak tum logon se mujhe hal ka samachar n mile." 
2Samuel15:29 tab sadok aur aebyatar ne parameshvar ke sandook ko yarooshalem men lautta diya aur ap vahee rahe. 
2Samuel15:30 tab daud jalapaison ke pahad kee chaddhai par sir ddhanpe, nange panv, rota hua chaddhne laga aur jitane log usake sang the, ve bhee sir ddhanpe rote huae chaddh gaae." 
2Samuel15:31 tab daud ko yah samachar mila, ki abashaalom ke sangee rajadraeahiyon ke sath aheetopel haai. daud ne kaha, he yahova, aheetopel kee sammati ko moorkhta bana de." 
2Samuel15:32 jab daud chottee tak pahuncha, jahan parameshvar ko dandvata kiya karate the, tab aerekee hooshau angarakha faade, sir par mittee dale huae us se milane ko aya." 
2Samuel15:33 daud ne us se kaha, yaadi too mere sang age jaa, tab to mere liye bhar ttharega." 
2Samuel15:34 parantu yadi too nagar ko lauttkar abashaalom se kahane lage, he raja, maain tera karmacharee hoonga jaaisa maain bahut din tere pita ka karmacharee raha, vaaisa hee ab tera rahoonga, to too mere hit ke liye aheetopel kee sammati ko nishfal kar sakega." 
2Samuel15:35 aur kya vahan tere sang sadok aur aebyatar yajak n rahenge? isaaliye rajabhvan men se jo hal tujhe sun pade, use sadok aur aebyatar yajakon ko bataya karana." 
2Samuel15:36 unake sath to unake do putra, arthata sadok ka putra aheemas, aur ebyatar ka putra yonatan, vahan rahenge to jo samachar tum logon ko mile use mere pas unheen ke hath bheja karana." 
2Samuel15:37 aur daud ka mitra, hooshau, nagar ko gaya, aur abashaalom bhee yarooshalem men pahunch gaya." 
2Samuel16:1 daud chottee par se thodee door baddh gaya tha, ki mapeeboshot ka karmacharee meeba aek jodee, jeen bandho huae gadahon par do sau rottee, kishaamish kee aek sau ttiikaya, dhoopakal ke fal kee aek sau ttiikaya, aur kuppee bhr dakhmadha, lade huae us se a mila." 
2Samuel16:2 raja ne seeba se poochha, in se tera kya prayojan haai? seeba ne kaha, gadahe to raja ke gharane kee savaree ke liye haai, aur rottee aur dhoopakal ke fal javanon ke khane ke liye haai, aur dakhmadha isaliye haai ki jo koi jangal men thk jaae vah use peeae." 
2Samuel16:3 raja ne poochha, fir tere svamee ka betta kahan haai? seeba ne raja se kaha, vah to yah kahakar yarooshalem men rah gaya, ki ab israaael ka gharana mujhe mere pita ka rajy faer dega." 
2Samuel16:4 raja ne seeba se kaha, jo kuchh mapeeboshot ka tha vah sab tujhe mil gaya. seeba ne kaha, pranama he mere prabhu, he raja, mujh par tere anugrah kee draashtti banee rahe." 
2Samuel16:5 jab daud raja bahooreem tak pahuncha, tab shaaul ka aek kuttumbee vahan se nikala, vah gera ka putra shaimee nam ka tha aur vah kosata hua chala aya." 
2Samuel16:6 aur daud par, aur daud raja ke sab karmachaariyon par patthr faenkane laga aur shooraveeron samet sab log usakee daahinee bai donon or the." 
2Samuel16:7 aur shaimee kosata hua yon bakata gaya, ki door ho koonee, door ho ochhe, nikal ja, nikal ja!"
