2Samuel16:8 yahova ne tujh se shaaul ke gharane ke koon ka poora palatta liya haai, jisake sthan par too raja bana haai yahova ne rajy ko tere putra abashaalom ke hath kar diya haai. aur isaaliye ki too koonee haai, too apanee burai men ap fans gaya." 
2Samuel16:9 tab sarooyah ke putra abeeshau ne raja se kaha, yah mara hua kutta mere prabhu raja ko kyon shaap dene paae? mujhe udhar jakar usaka sir kattne de." 
2Samuel16:10 raja ne kaha, sarooyah ke betto, mujhe tum se kya kama? vah jo kosata haai, aur yahova ne jo us se kaha haai, ki daud ko shaap de, to us se kaun poochh sakata, ki too ne aeesa kyon kiya?" 
2Samuel16:11 fir daud ne abeeshau aur apane sab karmachaariyon se kaha, jab mera nij putra bhee mere praan ka khojee haai, to yah binyameenee ab aeesa kyon n karen? usako rahane do, aur shaap dene do kyonaki yahova ne us se kaha haai." 
2Samuel16:12 kadachita yahova is upadrav par, jo mujh par ho raha haai, drashtti karake aj ke shaap kee santee mujhe bhla badala de." 
2Samuel16:13 tab daud apane janon samet apana marga chala gaya, aur shaimee usake samhane ke pahad kee alang par se shaap deta, aur us par patthr aur dhooli faenkata hua chala gaya." 
2Samuel16:14 nidan raja apane sang ke sab logon samet apane ttkaiane par thka hua pahuncha aur vahan vishraam kiya. 
2Samuel16:15 abashaalom sab israaaelee logon samet yarooshalem ko aya, aur usake sang aheetopel bhee aya." 
2Samuel16:16 jab daud ka mitra aerekee hooshau abashaalom ke pas pahuncha, tab hooshau ne abashaalom se kaha, raja chiranjeev rahe! raja chiranjeev rahe!" 
2Samuel16:17 abashaalom ne us se kaha, kya yah teree praeeati haai jo too apane mitra se rakhta haai? too apane mitra ke sang kyon naheen gaya?" 
2Samuel16:18 hooshau ne abashaalom se kaha, aeesa nahee jisako yahova aur ve log, kya varan sab israaaelee log chahe, usee ka maain hoo, aur usee ke sang maain rahoonga." 
2Samuel16:19 aur fir maain kisakee seva karoon? kya usake putra ke samhane rahakar seva n karoon? jaaisa maain tere pita ke samhane rahakar seva karata tha, vaaisa hee tere samhane rahakar seva karoonga." 
2Samuel16:20 tab abashaalom ne aheetopel se kaha, tum log apanee sammaati do, ki kya karana chaahiye?" 
2Samuel16:21 aheetopel ne abashaalom se kaha, jin rakhealiyon ko tera pita bhvan kee chaukasee karane ko chhod gaya, unake pas too ja aur jab sab israaaelee yah sunenge, ki abashaalom ka pita us se ghain karata haai, tab tere sab sangee hiyav bandhonge." 
2Samuel16:22 so usakealiye bhvan kee chht ke upar aek tamboo khda kiya gaya, aur abashaalom samaroot israaael ke dekhte apane pita kee rakheliyon ke pas gaya." 
2Samuel16:23 un dinon jo sammaati aheetopel deta tha, vah aeesee hotee thee ki mano koi parameshvar ka vachan poochhleta ho aheetopel chahe daud ko chahe abashalom ko, jo jo sammati deta vah aeesee hee hotee thee." 
2Samuel17:1 fir aheetopel ne abashaalom se kaha, mujhe barah hajar purush chhanttne de, aur maain uttkar aj hee rat ko daud ka peechha karoonga." 
2Samuel17:2 aur jab vah thakit aur nirbal hoga, tab maain use pakadoonga, aur draunga aur jitane log usake sath haain sab bhagenge. aur maain raja hee ko maroonga," 
2Samuel17:3 aur maain sab logon ko tere pas lautta launga jis manushy ka too khojee haai usake milane me samast praja ka milana ho jaaega, aur samast praja kushal kshom se rahegee." 
2Samuel17:4 yah bat abashaalom aur sab israaaelee puraniyon ko uchit maloom padee. 
2Samuel17:5 fir abashaalom ne kaha, aerekee hooshau ko bhee bula la, aur jo vah kahega ham use bhee sunen." 
2Samuel17:6 jab hooshau abashaalom ke pas aya, tab abashaalom ne us se kaha, aheetopel ne to is prakar kee bat kahee haai kya ham usakee bat manen ki nahee? saadi nahee, to too kah de." 
2Samuel17:7 hooshau ne abashaalom se kaha, jo sammati aheetopel ne is bar dee vah achchhee naheen." 
2Samuel17:8 fir hooshau ne kaha, too to apane pita aur usake janon ko janata haai ki ve shooraveer haai, aur bachcha chheenee hui reechhnee ke saman odhait honge. aur tera pita yoddha haai aur aur logo ke sath rat naheen bitata." 
2Samuel17:9 is samay to vah kisee gaddhhe, va kisee doosare sthan men chhpai hoga. jab in men se paahile paahile koi koi mare jaae, tab isake sab sunanevale kahane lagenge, ki abashaalom ke pakshavale har gaae." 
2Samuel17:10 tab veer ka day, jo sinh ka sa hota haai, usaka bhee hiyav choott jaaega, samast israaael to janata haai ki tera pita veer haai, aur usake sangee bade yoddha haain." 
2Samuel17:11 isaliye meree sammati yah haai ki dan se lekar beshorba tak rahanevale samast israaaelee tere pas samudrateer kee baloo ke kinakon ke saman akatthe kiae jaa, aur too ap hee yuddh ko jaae." 
2Samuel17:12 aur jab ham usako kisee n kisee sthan men jahan vah mile ja pakadenge, tab jaaise os boomi par giratee haai vaaise hee ham us par toott padenge tab n to vah bachega, aur n usake sangiyon men se koi bachega." 
2Samuel17:13 aur yaadi vah kisee nagar men ghausa ho, to sab israaaelee us nagar ke pas raassaiyan le aaenge, aur ham use nale men kheenchenge, yahan tak ki usaka aek chhotta sa patthr bhee n rah jaaega." 
2Samuel17:14 tab abashaalom aur sab israaaelee purushaen ne kaha, aerekee hooshau kee bammaati aheetopel kee sammaati se umtam haai. sahova ne to aheetopel kee achchhee sammati ko nishfal karane ke liye ttana tha, ki yah abashaalom hee par vipaattai dale." 
2Samuel17:15 tab hooshau ne sadok aur aebyatar yajakon se kaha, aheetopel ne to abashaalom aur israaaelee puraniyon ko is is prakar kee sammati dee aur maain ne is is prakar kee sammati dee haai." 
2Samuel17:16 isaliye ab fauta kar daud ke pas kahala bhejo, ki aj rat jangalee ghaatt ke pas n ttharana, avashy par hee ho jana aeesa n ho ki raja aur jitane log usake sang ho, sab nash ho jaaen." 
2Samuel17:17 yonatan aur aheemay aenarogel ke pas tthare rahe aur aek laundee jakar unhen sandesha de atee thee, aur ve jakar raja daud ko sandesha dete the kyonki ve kisee ke dekhte nagar men nahee ja sakate the." 
2Samuel17:18 aek chhokare ne to unhen dekhkar abashaalom ko bataya parantu ve donon fauta se chale gaa, aur aek bahareemavasee manushy ke ghar pahunchakar jisake angan men kuna tha us men utar gaae." 
2Samuel17:19 tab usakee sree ne kapada lekar kunae ke munh par bichhaya, aur usake upar dalar hua ann faaila diya isaliye kuchh maloom n pada." 
2Samuel17:20 tab abashaalom ke sevak us ghar men us sree ke pas jakar kahane lage, aheemas aur yonatan kahan haain? sree ne un se kaha, ve to us chhottee nadee ke par gaae. tab unhon ne unhen ddoonddha, aur n pakar yarooshalem ko lautte." 
2Samuel17:21 jab ve chale gaa, tab ye kunae men se nikale, aur jakar daud raja ko samachar diya aur daud se kaha, tum log chalo, fauta karake nadee ke par ho jao kyonaki aheetopel ne tumharee hani kee aeesee aeesee sammati dee haai." 
2Samuel17:22 tab daud apane sab sanagiyon samet uttkar yaradan par ho gaya aur pah fattne tak un men se aek bhee n rah gaya jo yaradan ke par n ho gaya ho. 
2Samuel17:23 jab aheetopel ne dekha ki meree sammaati ke anusar kam naheen hua, tab us ne apane gadahe par kattee kasee, aur apane nagar men jakar apane ghar men gaya. aur apane gharane ke vishay jo jo agyaa denee thee vah dekar apane ko faansee laga lee aur vah mar gaya, aur usake pita ke kaabirstan men use mittee de dee gai." 
2Samuel17:24 daud to mahanaaim men pahuncha. aur abashaalom sab israaaelee purushaen samet yaradan ke par gaya. 
2Samuel17:25 aur abashaalom ne amasa ko yoab ke sthan par pradhaan senapaati ttharaya. yah amasa aek purush ka putra tha jisaka nam israaaelee yitrae tha, aur vah yoab kee mata, sarooyah kee bahin, abeegal nam nahash kee bettee ke sang soya tha." 
2Samuel17:26 aur israaaeliyon ne aur abashaalom ne gilad desh men chhavanee dalee. 
2Samuel17:27 jab daud mahanaaim men aya, tab ammoniyon ke rabba ke nivasee nahash ka putra shaebee, aur lodabaravasee ammeeael ka putra makeer, aur rogaleemavasee giladee barjillaai," 
2Samuel17:28 charapaiya, tasale mittee ke bartan, gehoo, jav, maaida, lobiya, masoor, chabena," 
2Samuel17:29 madha, makkhn, bhedbakariya, aur gay ke dahee ka paneer, daud aur usake sanagiyon ke khane ko yah sochakar le aa, ki jangal men ve log bookhe pyase aur thke mande honge." 
2Samuel18:1 tab daud ne apane sang ke logon kee ginatee lee, aur un par sahasrpaati aur shatapati ttharaae." 
2Samuel18:2 fir daud ne logon kee aek tihai to yoab ke, aur aek tihai sarooyah ke putra yoab ke bhai abeeshau ke, aur aek tihai gatee itteai ke, aadhaikar men karake yuddh men bhej diya. aur raja ne logon se kaha, maain bhee avashy tumhare sath chaloonga." 
2Samuel18:3 logoen ne kaha, too jane n paaega. kyonaki chahe ham bhag jaae, taubhee ve hamaree chinta n karenge varan chahe ham men se adho mare bhee jaae, taubhee ve hamaree chinta n karenge. kyonki hamare sareekhe das hajaar purush haain isaaliye achchha yah haai ki too nagar men se hamaree sahayata karane ko taaiyar rahe." 
2Samuel18:4 raja ne un se kaha, jo kuchh tumhen bhaae vahee maain karoonga. aur raja faattk kee aek or khda raha, aur sab log sau sau, aur hajaar, hajaar karake nikalane lage." 
2Samuel18:5 aur raja ne yoab, abeeshau, aur itte ko agyaa dee, ki mere nimitt us javan, arthata abashaalom se komalata karana. yah agyaa raja ne abashaalom ke vishay sab pradhaanon ko sab logon ke sunate dee." 
2Samuel18:6 so log israaael ka samhala karane ko maaidan men nikale aur aepraaim nam van men yuddh hua. 
2Samuel18:7 vahan israaaelee log daud ke janon se har gaa, aur us din aeesa bada sanhar hua ki bees hajar khet aae." 
2Samuel18:8 aur yuddh us samast desh men faail gaya aur us din jitane log talavar se mare gaa, un se bhee adhaik van ke karan mar gaae." 
2Samuel18:9 sanyog se abashaalom aur daud ke janon kee bhentt ho gai. abashaalom to aek khchchar par chaddha hua ja raha tha, ki khchchar aek bade banj vraksha kee ghanee daaliyon ke neeche se gaya, aur usaka sir us banj vraksha men attk gaya, aur vah adhar men lattka rah gaya, aur usaka khchchar nikal gaya." 
2Samuel18:10 isako dekhkar kisee manushy ne yoab ko bataya, ki maain ne abashaalom ko banj vraksha men ttnga hua dekha." 
2Samuel18:11 yoab ne batanevale se kaha, too ne yah dekha! fir kyon use vaheen marake boomi par n gira diya? to maain tujhe das tukade chandee aur aek kattbaind deta." 
2Samuel18:12 us manushy ne yoab se kaha, chahe mere hath men hajaar ttukade chandee taulakar diae jaaee, taubhee rajakumar ke viruddh hath n baddhaunga kyonaki ham logon ke sunate raja ne tujhe aur abeeshau aur ittaai ko yah agyaa dee, ki tum men se koi kyon n ho us javan arthata abashaalom ko n chooe." 
2Samuel18:13 yaadi maain dhaekha dekar usaka praan leta, to too ap mera virodhaee ho jata, kyonaki raja se koi bat chhpaiee naheen rahatee." 
2Samuel18:14 yoab ne kaha, maain tere sang yonhee tthara naheen rah sakata! so us ne teen lakadee hath men lekar abashaalom ke day me, jo banj vraksha men jeevaati lattka tha, chhed dala." 
2Samuel18:15 tab yoab ke das hathaiyar ddhonevale javanon ne abashaalom ko ghorake aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya. 
2Samuel18:16 fir yoab ne narasinga foonka, aur log inraaael ka peechha karane se lautte kyonki yoab praja ko bachana chahata tha." 
2Samuel18:17 tab logon ne abashaalom ko utarake us van ke aek bade gadhe men dal diya, aur us par patthron ka aek bahut bada ddher laga diya aur sab israaaelee apate apane dere ko bhag gaae." 
2Samuel18:18 apane jeete jee abashaalom ne yah sochakar ki mere nam ka smaran karanevala koi putra mere naheen haai, apane liye vah latt khdee karai thee jo raja kee tarai men haai aur latt ka apana hee nam rakha, jo aj ke din tak abashaalom kee latt kahalatee haai." 
2Samuel18:19 aur sadok ke putra aheemas ne kaha, mujhe daudkar raja ko yah samachar dene de, ki yahova ne nyay karake tujhe tere shatrauon ke hath se bachaya haai." 
2Samuel18:20 yoab ne us se kaha, too aj ke din samachar n de doosare din samachar dene paaega, parantu aj samachar n de, isaaliye ki rajakumar mar gaya haai." 
2Samuel18:21 tab yoab ne aek kooshaee se kaha jo kuchh too ne dekha haai vah jakar raja ko bata de. to vah kooshaee yoab ko dandvata karake daud gaya. 
2Samuel18:22 fir sadok ke putra aheemas ne doosaree bar yoab se kaha, jo ho so ho, parantu mujhe bhee kooshaee ke peechhe daud jane de. yoab ne kaha, he mere bette, tere samachar ka kuchh badala n milega, fir too kyon daud jana chahata haai?" 
2Samuel18:23 us ne yah kaha, jo ho so ho, parantu mujhe daud jane de. usane us se kaha, daud. tab aheemas dauda, aur tarai se hokar kooshaee ke age baddh gaya." 
2Samuel18:24 daud to do faattkon ke beech baaitta tha, ki paharua jo faattk kee chht se hokar shaharapanah par chaddh gaya tha, us ne ankhen uttakar kya dekha, ki aek manushy akela dauda ata haai." 
2Samuel18:25 jab paharuae ne pukarake raja ko yah bata diya, tab raja ne kaha, yaadi akela ata ho, to sandesha lata hoga. vah daudte daudte nikal aya." 
2Samuel18:26 fir paharuae ne aek aur manushy ko daudte huae dekh faattk ke rakhvale ko pukarake kaha, sun, aek aur manushy akela dauda ata haai. raja ne kaha, vah bhee sandesha lata hoga." 
2Samuel18:27 paharuae ne kaha, pujhe to aeesa dekh padta haai ki pahale ka daudna sadok ke putra aheemas ka sa haai. raja ne kaha, vah to bhla manushy haai, to bhla sandesh lata hoga." 
2Samuel18:28 tab aheemas ne pukarake raja se kaha, kalyan. fir us ne boomi par munh ke bal gir raja ko dandvata karake kaha, tera parameshvar yahova dhany haai, jis ne mere prabhu raja ke viruddh hath uttanevale manushyon ko tere vash men kar diya haai!" 
2Samuel18:29 raja ne poochha, kya us javan abashaalom ka kalyan haai? aheemas ne kaha, jab yoab ne raja ke karmacharee ko aur tere das ko bhej diya, tab mujhe badee bheed dekh padee, parantu maloom n hua ki kya hua tha." 
2Samuel18:30 raja ne kaha hattkar yaheen khda raha. aur vah hattkar khda raha. 
2Samuel18:31 tab kooshaee bhee a gaya aur kooshaee kahane laga, mere prabhu raja ke liye samachar haai. yahova ne aj nyay karake tujhe un sabhon ke hath se bachaya haai jo tere viruddh utte the." 
2Samuel18:32 raja ne kooshaee se poochha, kya vah javan arthata abashaalom kalyan se haai? kooshaee ne kaha, mere prabhu raja ke shatra, aur jitane teree haani ke liye utte haai, unakee dasha us javan kee see ho." 
2Samuel18:33 tab raja bahut ghabaraya, aur faattk ke upar kee attaree par rota hua chaddhne laga aur chalate chalate yon kahata gaya, ki hay mere bette abashaalom! mere bette, hay! mere bette abashaalom! bhla hota ki maain ap teree santee marata, hay! abashaalom! mere bette, mere bette!!" 
2Samuel19:1 tab yoab ko yah samachar mila, ki raja abashaalom ke liye ro raha haai aur vilap kar raha haai." 
2Samuel19:2 isaliye us din ka vijay sab logon kee samajh men vilap hee ka karan ban gaya kyonaki logon ne us din suna, ki raja apane bette ke liye kheadit haai." 
2Samuel19:3 aur us din log aeesa munh churakar nagar men ghause, jaaisa log yuddh se bhag ane se lajjait hokar munh churate haain." 
2Samuel19:4 aur raja munh ddhanpe huae chilla chillakar pukarata raha, ki hay mere bette abashaalom! hay abashaalom, mere bette, mere bette!" 
2Samuel19:5 tab yoab ghar men raja ke pas jakar kahane laga, tere karmachariyon ne aj ke din tera, aur tere bette-beattyaien ka aur teree patnaiyon aur rakheliyon ka praan to bachaya haai, parantu too te aj ke din un sabhon ka munh kala kiya haai" 
2Samuel19:6 isaliye ki too apane baaiariyon se praem aur apane praeamiyon se baair rakhta haai. too ne aj yah pragatt kiya ki tujhe haakimon aur karmachaariyon kee kuchh chinta naheen varan maain ne aj jan liya, ki yadi ham sab aj mare jate aur abashaalom jeevit rahata, to too bahut prasann hota." 
2Samuel19:7 isaliye ab uttkar bahar ja, aur apane karmachariyon ko shaantai de taheen to maain yahova kee shapath khakar kahata hoo, ki yadi too bahar n jaaega, to aj rat ko aek manushy bhee tere sang n rahega aur tere bachapan se lekar ab tak jitanee vipaattaiyan tujh par padee haain un sab se yah vipaattai badee hogee." 
2Samuel19:8 tab raja uttkar faattk men ja baaitta. aur jab sab logon ko yah bataya gaya, ki raja faattk men baaitta haai tab sab log raja ke samhane aae. aur israaaelee apane apane dere ko bhag gaae the." 
2Samuel19:9 aur israaael ke sab gotron men sab log apas men yah kahakar ddhgadte the, ki raja ne hamen hamare shatrauon ke hath se bachaya tha, aur paalishtaiyon ke hath se usee ne hamen chhudaya parantu ab vah abashaalom ke dr ke mare desh chhodkar bhag gaya." 
2Samuel19:10 aur abashaalom jisako ham ne apana raja hone ko abhaishok kiya tha, vah yuddh men mar gaya haai. to ab tum kyon chup rahate? aur jaja ko lautta le apane kee charcha kyon naheen karate?" 
2Samuel19:11 tab raja daud ne sadok aur aebyatar yajakon ke pas kahala bheja, ki yahoodee puraniyon se kaho, ki tum log raja ko bhvan pahunchane ke liye sab se peechhe kyon hote ho jab ki samast israaael kee batacheet raja ke sunane men ai haai, ki usako bhvan men pahunchaae?" 
2Samuel19:12 tum log to mere bhai, varan meree hee haddee aur mans ho to tum raja ko lauttane men sab ke peechhe kyon hote ho?" 
2Samuel19:13 fir amasa se yah kaho, ki kya too meree haddee aur mans naheen haai? aur yadi too yoab ke sthan par sada ke liye senapaati n tthare, to parameshvar mujh se vaaisa hee varan us se bhee adhaik kare." 
2Samuel19:14 is prakar us ne sab yahoodee purushaen ke man aeese apanee or kheench liya ki manon aek hee purush tha aur unhon ne raja ke pas kahala bheja, ki too apane sab karpachariyon ko sang lekar lautt a." 
2Samuel19:15 tab raja lauttkar yaradan tak a gaya aur yahoodee log gilagal tak gaae ki us se milakar use yaradan par le aae. 
2Samuel19:16 yahoodiyon ke sang gera ka putra binyameenee shaimee bhee jo bahooreemee tha fauta karake raja daud se bhentt karane ko gaya 
2Samuel19:17 usake sang hajaar binyameenee purush the. aur shaaul ke gharane ka karmacharee seeba apane pandrah putraen aur bees dason samet tha, aur ve raja ke samhane yaradan ke par panv paaidal utar gae." 
2Samuel19:18 aur aek beda raja ke parivar ko par le ane, aur jis kam men vah use lagane chahe usee men lagane ke liye par gaya. aur jab raja yaradan par jane par tha, tab gera ka putra shaimee usake pavon par girake," 
2Samuel19:19 raja se kahane laga, mera prabhu mere dosh ka lekha n kare, aur jis din mera prabhu raja yarooshalem ko chhod aya, us din tere das ne jo kuattlai kam kiya, use aeesa smaran n kar ki raja use apane dhyan men rakhe." 
2Samuel19:20 kyonaki tera das janata haai ki maain ne pap kiya dek, aj apane prabhu raja se bhentt karane ke liye yoosufa ke samast ghrane men se maain hee pahila aya hoo." 
2Samuel19:21 tab sarooyah ke putra abeeshau ne kaha, shaimee ne jo yahova ke aabhaishaikt ko shaap diya tha, is karan kya usako vadha karana n chaahiye?" 
2Samuel19:22 daud ne kaha, he sarooyah ke betto, mujhe tum se kya kam, ki tum aj mere virodhaee tthare ho? aj kya israaael men kisee ko praan dand milega? kya maain naheen janata ki aj maain israaael ka raja hua hoo?" 
2Samuel19:23 fir raja ne shaimee se kaha, tujhe praan dand n milega. aur raja ne us se shapath bhee khai." 
2Samuel19:24 tab shaaul ka pota mapeeboshot raja se bhentt karane ko aya us ne raja ke chale jane ke din se usake kushal kshom se fir ane ke din tak n apane pavon ke nakoon katte, aur n apanee daddhee banavai, aur n apane kapade dhaulavaae the." 
2Samuel19:25 to jab yarooshalemee raja se milane ko gaa, tab raja ne us se poochha, he mapeeboshot, too mere sang kyon naheen gaya tha?" 
2Samuel19:26 us ne kaha, he mere prabhu, he raja, mere karmacharee ne mujhe dhaekha diya tha tera das jo pangu haai isaliye tere das ne socha, ki maain gadahe par kattee kasavakar us par chaddh raja ke sath chala jaunga." 
2Samuel19:27 aur mere karmacharee ne mere prabhu raja ke samhane meree chugalee khai. parantu mera prabhu raja parameshvar ke doot ke saman haai aur jo kuchh tujhe bhaae vahee kara. 
2Samuel19:28 mere pita ka samast gharana teree or se praan dand ke yogy tha parantu too ne apane das ko apanee mej par khanevalon men gina haai. mujhe kya hak haai ki maain raja kee or dohai doon? 
2Samuel19:29 raja ne us se kaha, too apanee bat kee charcha kson karata rahata haai? meree agyaa yah haai, ki us boomi ko tum aur seeba donon apas men bantt lo." 
2Samuel19:30 mapeeboshot ne raja se kaha, mere prabhu raja jo kushal kshom se apane ghar aya haai, isaaliye seeba hee sab kuchh le le." 
2Samuel19:31 tab giladee barjillaai rogaleem se aya, aur raja ke sath yaradan par gaya, ki usako yaradan ke par pahunchaae." 
2Samuel19:32 baarjillaai to vraddh purush tha, arthata assee parsha kee ayu ka tha jab tak raja mahanaaim men rahata tha tab tak vah usaka palan poshan karata raha kyonaki vah bahut dhanee tha." 
2Samuel19:33 tab raja ne barjillaai se kaha, mere sang par chal, aur maain tujhe yarooshalem men apane pas rakhkar tera palan poshan karoonga." 
2Samuel19:34 baarjillaai ne raja se kaha, mujhe kitane din jeevit rahana haai, ki maain raja ke sang yarooshalenm ko jaun?" 
2Samuel19:35 aj maain assee varsha ka hoo kya maain bhle-bure ka vivek kar sakata hoo? kya tera das jo kuchh khata peeta haai usaka svad paahichan sakata haai? kya mujhe gavaaiyyon va gayikaon ka shabd ab sun padta haai? tera das ab apane prabhu raja ke liye kyon bojh ka karan ho? 
2Samuel19:36 tere das raja ke sang yaradan par hee tak jaaega. raja isaka aeesa bada badala mujhe kyon de? 
2Samuel19:37 apane das ko lauttne de, ki maain apane hee nagar men apane mata pita ke kaabirstan ke pas maroon. parantu tera das kimham upaasthiat haai mere prabhu raja ke sang vah par jaae aur jaaisa tujhe bhaae vaaiya hee us se vyavahar karana." 
2Samuel19:38 raja ne kaha, ha, kimhan mere sang par chalega, aur jaaisa tujhe bhaae vaaisa hee maain us se vyavahar karoonga varan jo kuchh too mujh se chahega vah maain tere liye karoonga." 
2Samuel19:39 tab sab log yaradan par gaa, aur raja bhee par hua tab raja ne baarjillaai ko choomakar ashaeervad diya, aur vah apane sthan ko lautt gaya." 
2Samuel19:40 tab raja gilgal kee or par gaya, aur usake sang kimham par hua aur sab sahoodee logon ne aur adho israaaelee logon ne raja ko par pahunchaya." 
2Samuel19:41 tab sab israaaelee purush raja ke pas aa, aur raja se kahane lage, kya karan haai ki hamare yahoodee bhai tujhe choree se le aa, aur parivar samet raja ko aur usake sab janon ko bhee yaradan par le aae haain?" 
2Samuel19:42 sab yahoodee purushaen ne israaaelee purushaen ko uttar diya, ki karan yah haai ki raja hamare gotra ka haai. to tum log is bat se kyon roott gaae ho? kya ham ne raja ka diya hua kuchh khaya haai? va us ne hamen kuchh dan diya haai?" 
2Samuel19:43 israaaelee purushaen ne yahoodee purushaen ko uttar diya, raja men das ansh hamare haain aur daud men hamara bhag tumhare bhag se bada haai. to fir tum ne hamen kyon tuchchh jana? kya apane raja ke lautta le ane kee charcha paahile ham hee ne n kee thee? aur yahoodee purushaen ne israaaelee purushaen se aadhaik kadee baten kaheen." 
2Samuel20:1 vahan sanyog se shoba nam aek binyameenee tha, vah ochha purush bikree ka putra tha vah naraasinga foonkakar kahane laga, daud men hamara kuchh ansh nahee, aur n yishau ke putra men hamara koi bhag haai he israaaeliyo, apane apane dere ko chale jao!" 
2Samuel20:2 isaliye sab israaaelee purush daud ke peechhe chalana chhodkar bikree ke putra shoba ke peechhe ho liae parantu sab yahoodee purush yaradan se yarooshalem tak apane raja ke sang lage rahe. 
2Samuel20:3 tab daud yarooshalem ko apane bhvan men aya aur raja ne un das rakhealiyon ko, jinhen vah bhvan kee chaukasee karane ko chhod gaya tha, alag aek ghar men rakha, aur unaka palan poshan karata raha, parantu un se sahavas n kiya. isaliye ve apanee apanee mratyu ke din tak vidhavapan kee see dasha men jeevit hee band rahee." 
2Samuel20:4 tab raja ne amasa se kaha, yahoodee purushaen ko teen din ke bheetar mere pas bula la, aur too bhee yahan upaasthiat rahana." 
2Samuel20:5 tab amasa yahoodiyon ko bulane gaya parantu usake ttharaae huae samay se adhaik rah gaya. 
2Samuel20:6 tab daud ne abeeshau se kaha, ab bikree ka putra shoba abashaalom se bhee hamaree aadhaik hani karega isaaliye too apane prabhu ke logon ko lekar usaka peechha kar, aeesa n ho ki vah gaddhvale nagar pakar hamaree drashtti se chhpai jaae." 
2Samuel20:7 tab yoab ke jan, aur karetee aur paletee log, aur sab shooraveer usake peechhe ho liae aur bikree ke putra shoba ka peechha karane ko yarooshalem se nikale." 
2Samuel20:8 ve gibon men us bharee patthr ke pas pahunche hee the, ki amasa un se a mila. yoab to yoddha ka vasr faette se kase huae tha, aur us faette men aek talavar usakee kamar par apanee myan men bandhaee hui thee aur jab vah chala, tab vah nikalakar gir padee." 
2Samuel20:9 to yoab ne amasa se poochha, he mere bhai, kya too kushal se haai? tab yoab ne apana dahina hath baddhakar amasa ko choomane ke liye usakee daddhee pakadee." 
2Samuel20:10 parantu amasa ne us talavar kee kuchh chinta n kee jo yaab ke hath men thee aur us ne use amasa ke pett men bhonk dee, jis se usakee antadiyan nikalakar dharatee par gir padee, aur us ne usako doosaree bar n mara aur vah mar gaya. tab yoab aur usaka bhai abeeshau bikree ke putra shoba ka peechha karane ko chale." 
2Samuel20:11 aur usake pas yaab ka aek javan khda hokar kahane laga, jo koi yoab ke paksha aur daud kee or ka ho vah yoab ke peechhe ho le." 
2Samuel20:12 amasa to sadk ke madhy apane lohoo men lott raha tha. to jab us manushy ne dekha ki sab log khde ho gaae haai, tab amasa ko sadk par se maaidan men utta le gaya, aur jab dekha ki jitane usake pas ate haain ve khde ho jate haai, tab us ne usake upar aek kapada dal diya." 
2Samuel20:13 usake sadk par se sarakaae jane par, sab log bikree ke putra shoba ka peechha karane ko yoab ke peechhe ho lie." 
2Samuel20:14 aur vah sab israaaelee gotron men hokar abel aur betamaka aur beariyon ke desh tak pahuncha aur ve bhee ikatthe hokar usake peechhe ho liae. 
2Samuel20:15 tab unhon ne usako betamaka ke abel men ghor liya aur nagar ke samhane aeesa damadama bandha ki vah shaharapanah se satt gaya aur yoab ke sang ke sab log shaharapanah ko girane ke liye dhakka dene lage. 
2Samuel20:16 tab aek buaddhiman rootraee ne nagar men se pukara, suno! suno! yoab se kaho, ki yahan aa, taki maain us se kuchh baten karoon." 
2Samuel20:17 jab yoab usake nikatt gaya, tab sree ne poochha, kya too yoab haai? us ne kaha, ha, maain vahee hoo. fir us ne us se kaha, apanee dasee ke vachan suna. us ne kaha, maain to sun raha hoo." 
2Samuel20:18 vah kahane lagee, praacheenakal men to log kaha karate the, ki abel men poochha jaae aur is reeti jhgade ko nipatta dete the." 
2Samuel20:19 maain to melaamilapavale aur vishvasayogy israaaeliyon men se hoo parantu too aek pradhan nagar nash karane ka yatn karata haai too yahova ke bhag ko kyon nigal jaaega? 
2Samuel20:20 yoab ne uttar dekar kaha, yah mujh se door ho, door, ki maain nigal jaun va nash karoon!" 
2Samuel20:21 bat aeesee naheen haai. shoba nam aepraaim ke pahadee desh ka aek purush jo bikree ka putra haai, us ne daud raja ke viruddh hath uttaaya haai to tum log keval usee ko saunp do, tab maain nagar ko chhodkar chala jaunga. sree ne yoab se kaha, usaka sir shaharapanah par se tere pas faenk diya jaaega." 
2Samuel20:22 tab sree apanee buaddhimanee se sab logon ke pas gai. tab unhon ne bikree ke putra shoba ka sir kattkar yoab ke pas faenk diya. tab yoab ne naraasinga foonka, aur sab log nagar ke pas se alag alag hokar apane apane dere ko gaae. aur yoab yarooshalem ko raja ke pas lautt gaya." 
2Samuel20:23 yoab to samast israaaelee sena ke upar pradhaan raha aur yahoyada ka mutra banayah karetiyon aur paletiyon ke upar tha 
2Samuel20:24 aur adoram begaron ke upar tha aur aheelood ka putra yahoshaapat itihas ka lekhk tha 
2Samuel20:25 aur shaya mantraee tha aur sadok aur aebyatar yajak the 
2Samuel20:26 aur yairee ira bhee daud ka aek mantraee tha. 
2Samuel21:1 daud ke dinon men lagatar teen baras tak akal pada to daud ne yahova se praarthna kee. yahova ne kaha, yah shaaul aur usake koonee gharane ke karan hua, kyonki us ne giboniyon ko marava dala tha." 
2Samuel21:2 tab raja ne giboniyo ko bulakar un se baten keen. gibonee log to israaaeliyon men se naheen the, ve bache huae aemoriyo men se the aur israaaeliyon ne unake sath shapath khai thee, parantu shaaul ko jo israaaeliyon aur yahoodiyon ke diye jalan hui thee, is se us ne unhen mar dasane ke liye yatn kiya tha." 
2Samuel21:3 tab daud ne giboniyon se poochha, maain tumhare liye kya karoon? aur kya karake aeesa praayashchait karoo, ki tum yahova ke nij bhag ko ashaeervad de sako?" 
2Samuel21:4 giboniyon ne us se kaha, hamare aur shaaul va usake gharane ke madhy rupaye paaise ka kuchh jhgada naheen aur n hamara kam haai ki kisee israaaelee ko mar dalen. us ne kaha, jo kuchh tum kaho, vahee maain tumhare liye karoonga." 
2Samuel21:5 unhon ne raja se kaha, jis purush ne ham ko nash kar diya, aur hamare viruddh aeesee yuktai dee ki ham aeese satyanash ho jae, ki israael ke desh men age ko n rah sake," 
2Samuel21:6 usake vansh ke sat jan hamen saunp diae jae, aur ham unhen yahova ke liye yahova ke chune huae shaaul kee giba nam bastee men faansee denge. raja ne kaha, maain unako saunp doonga." 
2Samuel21:7 parantu daud ne aur shaaul ke putra yonatan ne apas men yahova kee shapath khai thee, is karan raja ne yonatan ke putra mapeeboshot ko jo shaaul ka pota tha bacha rakha." 
2Samuel21:8 parantu amanee aur mapeeboshot nam, ayya kee bettee rispa ke donon putra jo shaaul se utpann huae the aur haaul kee bettee meekal ke panchon bette, jo vah maholavasee barjillaai ke putra adraeeael kee or se the, inako raja ne pakadvakar" 
2Samuel21:9 giboniyon ke hath saunp diya, aur unhon ne unhen pahad par yahova ke samhane faansee dee, aur saton aek sath nash hue. unaka mar dala jana to kattnee ke pahile dinon me, arthata jab kee kattnee ke arambh men hua." 
2Samuel21:10 tab ayya kee bettee rispa ne ttatt lekar, kattnee ke arambh se lekar jab tak akash se un par atyant vrashtti n padee, tab tak chattan par use apane neeche bichhaye rahee aur n to din men akash ke pakshiayon ko, aur n rat men banaaile pashuuon ko unhen choone diya." 
2Samuel21:11 jab ayya kee beettee shaaul kee rakhelee rispa ke is kam ka samachar aud ko mila," 
2Samuel21:12 tab daud ne jakar shaaul aur usake putra yonatan kee haddiyon ko giladee yabesh ke logon se le liya, jinhon ne unhen betashaan ke us chauk se chura liya tha, jahan palishtaiyon ne unhen us din ttanga tha, jab unhon ne shaaul ko gilbo pahad par mar dala tha" 
2Samuel21:13 to vah vahan se shaaul aur usake putra yonatan kee haaddiyon ko le aya aur faanyee paae huon kee haddiyan bhee ikatthee kee gai. 
2Samuel21:14 aur shaaul aur usake putra yonatan kee haddiyan binyameen ke desh ke jela men shaaul ke pita keesh ke kabirstan gadee gai aur daud kee sab agyaaon ke anusar kam hua. aur usake bad parameshvar ne desh ke liye praarthna sun lee. 
2Samuel21:15 paalishtaiyon ne dasraaael se fir yuddh kiya, aur daud apane janon samet jakar paalishtaiyon se ladne laga parantu daud thk gaya." 
2Samuel21:16 tab yishabobanob, jo rapai ke vansh ka tha, aur usake bhale ka fal taul men teen sau shokel peetal ka tha, aur vah nai talavar bandho huae tha, us ne daud ko marane ko ttana." 
2Samuel21:17 parantu sarooyah ke putra abeeshau ne daud kee sahayata karake us paalishtee ko aesa mara ki vah mar gaya. tab daud ke janon ne shapath khakar us se kaha, too fir hamare sang yuddh ko jane n paaega, aeesa n ho ki tere marane se israaael ka diy bujh jaae." 
2Samuel21:18 isake bad paalishtaiyon ke sath gob men fir yuddh hua us samay hooshaai sibbakaai ne rapaivanshaee sap ko mara. 
2Samuel21:19 aur gob men paalishtaiyon ke sath fir yuddh hua us men betalehem vasee yarayorageem ke putra aelhanan ne gatee golyat ko mar dala, jisake bachhen kee chhd jolahe kee dongee ke saman thee." 
2Samuel21:20 fir gat men bhee yuddh hua, aur vahan aek badee deel ka rapaivanshaee purush tha, jisake aek aek hath panv me, chh chh ungalee, arthata ginatee men chaubees ungaaliyan theen." 
2Samuel21:21 jab us ne israaael ko lalakara, tab daud ke bhai shaima ke putra yahonatan ne use mara." 
2Samuel21:22 ye hee char gat men us rapai se utpann huae the aur ve daud aur usake janon se mar dale gaae. 
2Samuel22:1 aur jis samay yahova ne daud ko usake sab shatrauon aur shaaul ke hath se bachaya tha, tab us ne yahova ke liye is geet ke vachan gaae" 
2Samuel22:2 us ne kaha, yahova meree chattan, aur mera gaddh, mera chhudanevala," 
2Samuel22:3 mera chattanaroopee parameshvar haai, jisaka maain sharanagat hoo, meree ddhal, mera bachanevala seeng, mera uncha gaddh, aur mera sharansthan haai, he mere uddhar katrta, too upadrav se mera uddhar kiya karata haai." 
2Samuel22:4 maain yahova ko jo stuati ke yogy haai pukaroonga, aur apane shatrauon se bachaya jaunga." 
2Samuel22:5 mratyu ke tarangon ne to mere charon or ghora dala, nastaikapan kee dhaaraon ne mujh ko ghabada diya tha" 
2Samuel22:6 adhaelok kee rassaiyan mere charon or thee, mratyu ke fande mere samhane the." 
2Samuel22:7 apane sankatt men maain ne yahova ko pukara aur apane parameshvar ke sammukh chillaya. aunr us ne meree bat ko apane maandair men se sun liya, aur meree dohai usake kanon men pahunchee." 
2Samuel22:8 tab prathvee hil gai aur dol uttee aur akash kee neven kanpakar bahut hee hil gai, kyonaki vah ati krodhait hua tha." 
2Samuel22:9 usake nathnon se dhauna nikala, aur usake munh se ag nikalakar bhsm karane lagee jis se koyale dahak utte." 
2Samuel22:10 aur vah svarga ko jhukakar neeche utar aya aur usake panvon ke tale ghaer andhakar chhaya tha. 
2Samuel22:11 aur vah karoob par savar hokar uda, aur pavan ke pankhon par chaddhkar dikhai diya." 
2Samuel22:12 aur us ne apane charon or ke anadhaiyare ko, meghaen ke samooh, aur akash kee kalee ghattaon ko apana mandp banaya." 
2Samuel22:13 usake sammukh kee jhlak to usake age age thee, ag ke koyale dahak utte." 
2Samuel22:14 yahova akash men se garaja, aur paramapradhaan ne apanee vanee sunai." 
2Samuel22:15 us ne teer chala chalakar mere shatrauon ko titar bitar kar diya, aur bijalee gira girakar usako parast kar diya." 
2Samuel22:16 tab samudra kee thah dikhai dene lagee, aur jagat kee neven khul gai, yah to yahova kee dantt se, aur usake nathnon kee sans kee jhonk se hua." 
2Samuel22:17 us ne upar se hath baddhakar mujhe thanm liya, aur mujhe gahare jal men se kheenchakar bahar nikala." 
2Samuel22:18 us ne mujhe mere balavant shatra se, aur mere baaiariyon se, jo mujh se aadhaik samath the, mujhe chhuda liya." 
2Samuel22:19 unhon ne meree vipaattai ke din mera samhana to kiya parantu yahova mera ashray tha. 
2Samuel22:20 aur us ne mujhe nikalakar chaude sthan men pahunchaya us ne mujh ko chhudaya, kyonaki vah mujh se prasann tha." 
2Samuel22:21 yahova ne mujh se mere dharma ke anusar vyavahar kiya mere kamon kee shuuddhata ke anusar us ne mujhe badala diya. 
2Samuel22:22 kyonaki maain yahova ke magan par chalata raha, aur apane parameshvar se munh modkar dushtt n bana." 
2Samuel22:23 usake sab niyam to mere samhane bane rahe, aur maain usakee vidhaiyon se hatt n gaya." 
2Samuel22:24 aur maain usake sath khra bana raha, aur adharma se apane ko bachaae raha, jis men mere fansane ka dr tha." 
2Samuel22:25 isaliye yahova ne mujhe mere dharma ke anusar badala diya, meree us shuuddhata ke anusar jise vah dekhta tha." 
2Samuel22:26 dayavant ke sath too apane ko dayavant dikhata khre purush ke sath too apane ko khra dikhata haai 
2Samuel22:27 shuuddh ke sath too apane ko shuuddh dikhata aur tteddhe ke sath too tirachha banata haai. 
2Samuel22:28 aur deen logon ko to too bachata haai, parantu abhaimaaniyon par draashtti karake unhen neecha karata haai." 
2Samuel22:29 he yahova, too hee mera deepak haai, aur yahova mere aandhiayare ko door karake ujiyala kar deta haai." 
2Samuel22:30 teree sahayata se maain dal par dhaava karata, apane parameshvar kee sahayata se maain shaharapanah ko faand jata hoo." 
2Samuel22:31 ishvar kee gaati khree haai yahova ka vachan taya hua haai vah apane sab sharanagaton kee ddhal haai. 
2Samuel22:32 yahova ko chhod kya koi ishvar haai? hamare parameshvar ko chhod kya aur koi chattan haai? 
2Samuel22:33 yah vahee ishvar haai, jo mera ati draddh kila haai, vah khre manushy ko apane marga men liae chalata haai." 
2Samuel22:34 vah mere paairon ko harinaiyon ke se bana deta haai, aur mujhe unche sthanon par khda karata haai." 
2Samuel22:35 vah mere hathon ko yuddh karana sikhata haai, yahan tak ki meree banhen peetal ke dhanush ko jhuka detee haain." 
2Samuel22:36 aur too ne mujh ko apane uddhar kee ddhal dee haai, aur teree namrata mujhe baddhatee haai." 
2Samuel22:37 too mere paairon ke liye sthan chauda karata haai, aur mere paair naheen fisale." 
2Samuel22:38 maain ne apane shatrauon ka peechha karake unhen satyanash kar diya, aur jab tak unaka ant n kiya tab tak n lautta." 
2Samuel22:39 aur maain ne unaka ant kiya aur unhen aeesa chhed dala haai ki ve utt naheen sakate varan ve to mere panvon ke neeche gire pade haain. 
2Samuel22:40 aur too ne yuddh ke liye meree kamar balavant kee aur mere virodhaiyon ko mere hee samhane parast kar diya. 
2Samuel22:41 aur too ne mere shatrauon kee peett mujhe dikhai, taki maain apane baairiyon ko katt daloon." 
2Samuel22:42 unhon ne batt to johee, parantu koi bachanevala n mila unhon ne yahova kee bhee batt johee, parantu us ne unako koi uttar n diya." 
2Samuel22:43 tab maain ne unako koott koottkar boomi kee dhooli ke saman kar diya, maain ne unhen sadkon aur galee koochon kee keechad ke saman pattkakar charon or faaila diya." 
2Samuel22:44 fir too ne muujhe praja ke jhgadon se chhudakar any jatiyon ka pradhaan hone ke liye meree raksha kee jin logon ko maain n janata tha ve bhee mere adhaeen ho jaaenge. 
2Samuel22:45 paradeshaee meree chapaloosee karenge ve mera nam sunate hee mere vash men aaenge. 
2Samuel22:46 paradeshaee murjhaaenge, aur apane kotton men se thrathrate huae nikalenge." 
2Samuel22:47 yahova jeeavit haai meree chattan dhany haai, aur parameshvar jo mere uddhar kee chattan haai, usakee maahima ho." 
2Samuel22:48 dhany haai mera palatta lenevala ishvar, jo desh desh ke logon ko mere vash men kar deta haai," 
2Samuel22:49 aur mujhe mere shatrauon ke beech se nikalata haai ha, too mujhe mere virodhaiyon se uncha karata haai, aur upadravee purush se bachata haai." 
2Samuel22:50 is kara, he yahova, maain jaati jati ke samhane tera dhanyavad karoonga, aur tere nam ka bhjan gaunga." 
2Samuel22:51 vah apane ttharaae huae raja ka bada uddhar karata haai, vah apane abhaishaikt daud, aur usake vansh par yuganuyug karuna karata rahega." 
2Samuel23:1 daud ke antaim vachan ye haain yishau ke putra kee yah vanee haai, us purush kee vanee haai jo unche par khda kiya gaya, aur yakoob ke parameshvar ka abhaishaikt, aur israaael ka madhaur bhjan ganevala haai" 
2Samuel23:2 yahova ka atma mujh men hokar bola, aur usee ka vachan mere munh men aya." 
2Samuel23:3 israaael ke parameshvar ne kaha haai, israaael kee chattan ne mujh se baten kee haai, ki manushyon men prabhuta karanevala aek dhama hoga, jo parameshvar ka bhy manata hua prabhuta karega," 
2Samuel23:4 vah mano bhor ka prakash hoga jab soorya nikalata haai, aeesa bhor jis men badal n ho, jaaisa vashara ke bad nirmal prakash ke karan boomi se haree haree ghaas ugatee haai." 
2Samuel23:5 kya mera gharana ishvar kee draashtti men aeesa naheen haai? us ne to mere sath sada kee aek aeesee vacha bandhaee haai, jo sab baton men tteek kee hui aur attl bhee haai. kyonki chahe vah usako pragatt n kare, taubhee mera poorn uddhar aur poorn aabhailasha ka vishay vahee haai." 
2Samuel23:6 parantu ochhe log sab ke sab nikammee jhaadiyon ke saman haain jo hath se pakadee naheen jateen 
2Samuel23:7 aur jo purush unako chooae use lohe aur bhale kee chhd se susaajjait hona chaahiye. isaliye ve apane hee sthan men ag se bhsm kar diae jaaenge. 
2Samuel23:8 daud ke shooraveeron ke nam ye haain arthata tahakamonee yoshshobyashshobet, jo saradaron men mukhy tha vah aesnee adeeno bhee kahalata tha jis ne aek hee samay men att sau purush mar dale." 
2Samuel23:9 usake bad ahohee dodaai ka putra eleeajar tha. vah us samay daud ke sang ke teenon veeron men se tha, jab ki unhon ne yuddh ke liye ekatrait huae paalishtaiyon ko lalakara, aur israaelee purush chale gaae the." 
2Samuel23:10 vah kamar bandhakar paalishtaiyon ko tab tak marata raha jab tak usaka hath thk n gaya, aur talavar hath se chipatt n gai aur us din yahova ne badee vijay karai aur jo log usake peechhe ho liae ve keval loottne hee ke liye usake peechhe ho liae." 
2Samuel23:11 usake bad age nam ek pahadee ka putra shamma tha. palishtaiyon ne ikatthe hokar ek sthan men dal bandha, jahan masoor ka ek khet tha aur log unake dr ke mare bhage." 
2Samuel23:12 tab us ne khet ke madhy men khde hokar use bachaya, aur palishtaiyon ko mar liya aur yahova ne badee vijay dilai." 
2Samuel23:13 fir teeson mukhy saradaron men se teen jan kattnee ke dinon men daud ke pas adullam nam gufaa men aa, aur palishtaiyon ka dal rapaim nam tarai men chhavanee kiae huae tha." 
2Samuel23:14 us samay daud gaddh men tha aur us samay paalishtaiyon kee chaukee betalehem men thee. 
2Samuel23:15 tab daud ne badee abhailasha ke sath kaha, kaun mujhe betalehem ke faattk ke pas ke kuen ka panee pilaaega?" 
2Samuel23:16 to ve teenon veer palishtaiyon kee chhavanee men toott pade, aur betalehem ke faattk ke kunae se panee bhrake daud ke pas le aae. parantu us ne peene se inakar kiya, aur yahova ke samhane ardha karake undela," 
2Samuel23:17 aur kaha, he yahova, mujh se aeesa kam door rahe. kya maain un manushyon ka lohoo peeun jo apane praanon par khelakar gaae the? isaaliye us ne us panee ko peene se inakar kiya. in teen veeron ne to ye hee kam kiae." 
2Samuel23:18 aur abeeshau jo sarooyah ke putra yoab ka bhai tha, vah teenon se mukhy tha. us ne apana bhala chalakar teen sau ko mar dala, aur teenon men namee ho gaya." 
2Samuel23:19 kya vah teenon se aadhaik pratishttit n tha? aur isee se vah unaka pradhaan ho gaya parantu mukhy teenon ke pad ko n pahuncha. 
2Samuel23:20 fir yahoyada ka putra banayah tha, jo kabaselavasee aek bade kam karanevale veer ka putra tha us ne sinh sareekhe do moabiyon ko mar dala. aur barfa ke samay us ne aek gadhe men utarake aek sinh ko mar dala." 
2Samuel23:21 fir us ne aek roopavana misraee purush ko mar dala. misraee to hath men bhala liae huae tha parantu banayah aek lattee hee liae huae usake pas gaya, aur misraee ke hath se bhala ko chheenakar usee ke bhale se use ghaat kiya." 
2Samuel23:22 aeese aeese kam karake yahoyada ka putra banayah un teenon veeron men namee ho gaya. 
2Samuel23:23 vah teeson se adhaik pratishttit to tha, parantu mukhy teenon ke pad ko n pahuncha. usako daud ne apanee nij sabha ka sabhasad niyukt kiya." 
2Samuel23:24 fir teeson men yoab ka bhai asahela betalehemee dodo ka putra aelhanan," 
2Samuel23:25 herodee shamma, aur aeleeka, peletee heles," 
2Samuel23:26 takoi ikkesh ka putra ira," 
2Samuel23:27 anatotee abeeaejaer, hooshaai mabunne," 
2Samuel23:28 ahohee salmon, natopahee maharaai," 
2Samuel23:29 aek aur natopahee bana ka putra heleb, binyameeaniyon ke giba nagar ke reebaai ka putra huttaai," 
2Samuel23:30 piratonee, banayah, gash ke nalon ke pas rahanevala hiai," 
2Samuel23:31 araba ka abeealbon, bahooreemee ajamavet," 
2Samuel23:32 shaalabonee aelyahaba, yashon ke vansh men se yonatan," 
2Samuel23:33 pahadee shamma, araree shaarar ka putra aheeam," 
2Samuel23:34 ahasabaai ka putra aeleepelett maka desh ka, geeloi aheetopel ka putra aeleeam," 
2Samuel23:35 kammenlee hesrae, arabee paraai" 
2Samuel23:36 sobai natan ka putra yigal, gadee banee," 
2Samuel23:37 ammonee selek, berotee naharaai ko sarooyah ke putra yoab ka hathaiyar ddhonevala tha," 
2Samuel23:38 yeteree ira, aur gareb," 
2Samuel23:39 aur hittee uriyyah tha sab milakar saaiaintees the. 
2Samuel24:1 aur yahova ka kop israaaeliyon par fir bhdka, aur us ne daud ko inakee hani ke liye yah kahakar ubhara, ki israaael aur yahooda kee ginatee le." 
2Samuel24:2 so raja ne yoab senapaati se jo usake pas tha kaha, too dan se beshba tak rahanevale sab israaaelee gotron men idhar udhar ghoom, aur tum log praja kee ginatee lo, taki maain jan loon ki praja kee kitanee ginatee haai." 
2Samuel24:3 yoab ne raja se kaha, praja ke log kitane hee kyon n ho, tera parameshvar yahova unako sauguna baddha de, aur mera prabhu raja ise apanee ankhon se dekhne bhee paae parantu, he mere prabhu, he raja, yah bat too kyon chahata haai?" 
2Samuel24:4 taubhee raja kee agyaa yoab aur senapaatiyon par prabal hui. so yoab aur senapati raja ke sammukh se israaaelee praja kee ginatee lene ko nikal gaae. 
2Samuel24:5 unhon ne yaradan par jakar aroer nagar kee daahinee or dere khde kia, jo gad ke nale ke madhy men aur yajer kee or haai." 
2Samuel24:6 tab ve gilad men aur tahateemhodashaee nam desh men gaa, fir danyan ko gaa, aur chakkar lagakar seedon men pahunche" 
2Samuel24:7 tab ve sor nam draddh gaddh, aur hibbaiyon aur kananiyon ke sab nagaron men gaae aur unhon ne yahooda desh kee dakkhian disha men beshonba men daura nipattaya." 
2Samuel24:8 aur sab desh men idhar udhar ghoom ghoomakar ve nau maheene aur bees din ke beetane par yarooshalem ko aae. 
2Samuel24:9 tab yoab ne praja kee ginatee ka jod raja ko sunaya aur talavar chalanevale yoddha israaael ke to att lak, aur yahooda ke panch nakh nikale." 
2Samuel24:10 praja kee ganna karane ke bad daud ka man vyakul hua. aur daud ne yahova se kaha, yah kam jo maain ne kiya vah mahapap haai. to ab, he yahova, apane das ka adharma door kara kyonaki mujh se badee moorkhta hui haai." 
2Samuel24:11 bihan ko jab daud utta, tab yahova ka yah vachan gad nam nabee ke pas jo daud ka dasha tha pahuncha," 
2Samuel24:12 ki jakar daud se kah, ki yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain tujh ko teen vipaattaiyan dikhata hoo un men se aek ko chun le, ki maain use tujh par daloon." 
2Samuel24:13 so gad ne daud ke pas jakar isaka samachar diya, aur us se poochha, kya tere desh men sat varsha ka akal pade? va teen maheene tak tere shatra tera peechha karate rahen aur too un se bhagata rahe? va tere desh men teen din tak maree faailee rahe? ab soch vichar kar, ki maain apane bhejanevale ko kya uttar doon." 
2Samuel24:14 daud ne gad se kaha, maai bade sankatt men hoo ham yahova ke hath men pade, kyonki usakee daya badee haai parantu manushy ke hath men maain n paoonga." 
2Samuel24:15 tab yahova israaaeliyon men bihan se le ttharaae huae samay tak maree faailaae raha aur dan se lekar beshba tak rahanevalee praja men se sattar hajaar purush mar gaae. 
2Samuel24:16 parantu jab doot ne yarooshalem ka nash karane ko us par apana hath baddhaya, tab yahova vah vipaattai dalakar shaeakit hua, aur praja ke nash karanevale doot se kaha, bas kara ab apana hath kheencha. aur yahova ka doot us samay arauna nam aek yaboosee ke khalihan ke pas tha." 
2Samuel24:17 to jab praja ka nash karanevala doot daud ko dikhai pada, tab us ne yahova se kaha, dek, pap to maain hee ne kiya, aur kuattlaita maain hee ne kee haai parantu in bhedon ne kya kiya haai? so tera hath mere aur mere pita ke gharane ke viruddh ho." 
2Samuel24:18 usee din gad ne daud ke pas akar us se kaha, jakar arauna yaboosee ke khalihan men yahova kee ek vedee banava." 
2Samuel24:19 so daud yahova kee agyaa ke anusar gad ka vah vachan manakar vahan gaya. 
2Samuel24:20 jab arauna ne draashtti kar daud ko karmachaariyo samet apanee or ate dekha, tab arauna ne nikalakar boomi par muh ke bal gir raja ko dandvata kee." 
2Samuel24:21 aur arauna ne kaha, mera prabhu raja apane das ke pas kyon padhaara haai? aud ne kaha, tujh se yah khlihan mol lene aya hoo, ki yahova kee aek bedee banavau, isaaliye ki yah vyaadhai praja par se door kee jaae." 
2Samuel24:22 araunar ne daud se kaha, mera prabhu raja jo kuchh use achchha lage so lekar chaddhaae dek, homabali ke liye to baail haai, aur danchane ke haathaiyar, aur baailon ka saman idhan ka kam denge." 
2Samuel24:23 yah sab arauna ne raja ko de diya. fir arauna ne raja se kaha, tera parameshvar yahova tujh se prasann hoae." 
2Samuel24:24 raja ne arauna se kaha, aeesa nahee, maai ye vastuen tujh se avashy dam dekar loonga maain apane parameshvar yahova ko sentament ke homabaali naheen chaddhane ka. so daud ne khalihan aur baailon ko chandee ke pachas shokel pen mol liya." 
2Samuel24:25 aur daud ne vahan yahova kee aek bedee banavakar homabaali aur melabali chaddhaae. aur yahova ne desh ke nimitt binatee sun lee, tab vah vyaadhai israaael par se door ho gai." 
1Kings1:1 daud raja booddha varan bahut puraaniya hua aur yadhyapi usako kapade oddhaye jate the, taubhee vah garma n hota tha." 
1Kings1:2 so usake karmachaariyon ne us se kaha, hamare prabhu raja ke liye koi javan kunvaree ddoonddhee jaa, jo raja ke sammukh rahakar usakee seva kiya kare aur tere pas letta kare, ki hamare prabhu raja ko gama pahunche." 
1Kings1:3 tab unhon ne samast israaaelee desh men sundar kunvaree ddoonddhte ddoonddhte abeeshag nam aek shoonemin ko paya, aur raja ke pas le aae." 
1Kings1:4 vah kanya bahut hee sundar thee aur vah raja kee dasee hokar usakee seva karatee rahee parantu raja us se sahabas n hua. 
1Kings1:5 tab haggeet ka putra adoniyyah sir uncha karake kahane laga ki maain raja hoonga so us ne rath aur savar aur apane age age daudne ko pachas purush rakh liae. 
1Kings1:6 usake pita ne to janm se lekar use kabhee yah kahakar udas n kiya tha ki too ne aeesa kyon kiya. vah bahut roopavan tha, aur abashaalom ke peechhe usaka janm hua tha." 
1Kings1:7 aur us ne sarooyah ke putra yoab se aur aebyatar yajak se batacheet kee, aur unhon ne usake peechhe hokar usakee sahayata kee." 
1Kings1:8 parantu sadok yajak yahoyada ka putra banayah, natan nabee, shaimee rei, aur daud ke shooraveeron ne adoniyyah ka sath n diya." 
1Kings1:9 aur adoniyyah ne johelet nam patthr ke pas jo aenarogel ke nikatt haai, bhed-baail aur taaiyar kiae huae pashoo bali kia, aur apane bhai sab rajakumaron ko, aur raja ke sab yahoodee karmachariyon ko bula liya." 
1Kings1:10 parantu natan nabee, aur banayah aur shooraveeron ko aur apane bhai sulaaiman ko us ne n bulaya." 
1Kings1:11 tab natan ne sulaaiman kee mata batashoba se kaha, kya too ne suna haai ki haggeet ka putra adoniyyah raja ban baaitta haai aur hamara prabhu daud hase naheen janata?" 
1Kings1:12 isaliye ab a, maain tujhe aeesee sammati deta hoo, jis se too apana aur apane putra sulaaiman ka praan bachaae." 
1Kings1:13 too daud raja ke pas jakar, us se yon pooch, ki he mere prabhu! he raja! kya too ne shapath khakar apanee dasee se naheen kaha, ki tera putra sulaaiman mere peechhe raja hoga, aur vah meree rajagaee par virajega? fir adoniyyah kyon raja ban baaitta haai?" 
1Kings1:14 aur jab too vahan raja se aeesee baten karatee rahegee, tab maain tere peechhe akar, teree baton ko pushtt karoonga." 
1Kings1:15 tab batashoba raja ke pas kottree men gai raja to bahut booddha tha, aur usakee seva tthal shoonemin abeeshag karatee thee." 
1Kings1:16 aur batashoba ne jhukakar raja ko dandvata kee, aur raja ne poochha, too kya chahatee haai?" 
1Kings1:17 us ne uttar diya, he mere prabhu, too ne to apane parameshvar yahova kee shapath khakar apanee dasee se kaha tha ki tera putra sulaaiman mere peechhe raja hoga aur vah meree gaee par virajega." 
1Kings1:18 ab dekh adoniyyah raja ban baaitta haai, aur ab tak mera prabhu raja ise naheen janata." 
1Kings1:19 aur us ne bahut se baail taaiyar kia, pashu aur bheden bali kee, aur sab rajakumaron kee aur aebyatar yajak aur yoab senapaati ko bulaya haai, parantu tere das sulaaiman ko naheen bulaya." 
1Kings1:20 aur he mere prabhu! je raja! sab isaaelee tujhe tak rahe haain ki too un se kahe, ki hamare prabhu raja kee gaee par usake peechhe kaun baaittega." 
1Kings1:21 naheen to jab hamara prabhu raja, apane purakhaon ke sang soaega, tab maain aur mera putra sulaaiman donon aparadhaee gine jaaenge." 
1Kings1:22 yon batashoba raja se baten kar hee rahee thee, ki natan nabee bhee a gaya." 
1Kings1:23 aur raja se kaha gaya ki natan nabee hajir haai tab vah raja ke sammukh aya, aur muh ke bal girakar raja ko dandvata kee." 
1Kings1:24 aur natan kahane laga, he mere pabhu, he raja! kya too ne kaha haai, ki adoniyyah mere peechhe raja hoga aur vah meree gaee par virajega?" 
1Kings1:25 dekh us ne aj neeche jakar bahut se baail, taaiyar kiae huae pashu aur bheden bali kee haai, aur sab rajakumaron aur senapatiyon ko aur aebyatar yajak ko bhee bulaliya haai aur ve usake sammukh khate peete huae kah rahe haain ki adoniyyah raja jeeavit rahe." 
1Kings1:26 parantu mujh tere das ko, aur sadok yajak aur yahoyada ke putra banayah, aur tere das sulaaiman ko us ne naheen bulaya." 
1Kings1:27 kya yah mere prabhu raja kee or se hua? too ne to apane das ko yah naheen jataya haai, ki prabhu raja kee gaee par kaun usake peechhe virajega." 
1Kings1:28 daud raja ne kaha, batashoba ko mere pas bula lao. tab vah raja ke pas akar usake samhane khdee hui." 
1Kings1:29 raja ne shapath khakar kaha, yahova jo mera praan sab jokhaimon se bachata aya haai," 
1Kings1:30 usake jeevan kee shapat, jaaisa maain ne tujh se israael ke parameshvar yahova kee shapath khakar kaha tha, ki tera putra sulaaiman mere peechhe raja hoga, aur vah mere badale meree gaee par virajega, vaaisa hee maain nishchay aj ke din karoonga." 
1Kings1:31 tab batashoba ne boomi par munh ke bal gir raja ko dandvata karake kaha, mera prabhu raja daud sada tak jeeavit rahe!" 
1Kings1:32 tab daud raja ne kaha, mere pas sadok yajak natan nabee, ahoyada ke putra banayah ko bula lao. so ve raja ke samhane aae." 
1Kings1:33 raja ne un se kaha, apane prabhu ke karmachariyo ko sath lekar mere putra sulaaiman ko mere nij khchchar par chaddhao aur geehon ko le jao" 
1Kings1:34 aur vahan sadok yajak aur natan nabee israaael ka raja hone ko usaka abhaishok karen tub tum sab narasinga foonkakar kahana, raja sulaaiman jeevit rahe." 
1Kings1:35 aur tum usake peechhe peechhe idhar ana, aur vah akar mere sinhasan par viraje, kyonki mere badale men vahee raja hoga aur usee ko maain ne israaael aur yahooda ka pradhaan hone ko ttharaya haai." 
1Kings1:36 tab yahoyada ke putra banayah ne kaha, ameen! mere prabhu raja ka parameshvar yahova bhee aeesa hee kahe." 
1Kings1:37 jis reeti yahova mere prabhu raja ke sang raha, usee reeti vah sulaaiman ke bhee sang rahe, aur usaka rajy mere prabhu daud raja ke rajy se bhee aadhaik baddhaae." 
1Kings1:38 tab sadok yajak aur natan nabee aur yahoyada ka putra banayah karetiyon aur paletiyon ko sang liae huae neeche gaa, aur sulaaiman ko raja daud ke khchchar par chaddhakar geehon ko le chale." 
1Kings1:39 tab sadok yajak ne yahova ke tamboo men se tel bhra hua seeng nikala, aur sulaaiman ka rajyaabhaishok kiya. aur ve narasinge foonkane lage aur sab log bol utte, raja sulaaiman jeevin rahe." 
1Kings1:40 tab sab log usake peechhe peechhe bansulee bajate aur itana bada anand karate huae upar gaa, ki unakee dhvaani se prathvee dol uttee." 
1Kings1:41 jab adoniyyah aur usake sab nevataharee kha chuke the, tab yah dhvani unako sunai padee. aur yoab ne narasinge ka shabd sunakar poochha, nagar men halachal aur chillahatt ka shabd kyon ho raha haai?" 
1Kings1:42 vah yah kahata hee tha, ki aebyatar yajak ka putra yonatan aya aur adoniyyah ne us se kaha, bheetar a too to bhla manushy haai, aur bhla samachar bhee laya hoga." 
1Kings1:43 yonatan ne adoniyyah se kaha, sachamuch hamare prabhu raja daud ne sulaaiman ko raja bana diya." 
1Kings1:44 aur raja ne sadok yajak, natan nabee aur yahoyada ke putra banayah aur karetiyon aur paletiyon ko usake sang bhej diya, aur unhon ne usako raja ke khchchar par chaddhaya haai." 
1Kings1:45 aur sadok yajak, aur natan nabee ne geehon men usaka rajyaabhaishok kiya haai aur ve vahan se aeesa anand karate huae upar gaae haain ki nagar men halachal mach gai, aur jo shabd tum ko sunai pad raha haai vahee haai." 
1Kings1:46 sulaaiman rajagaee par viraj bhee raha haai. 
1Kings1:47 fir raja ke karmacharee hamare prabhu daud raja ko yah kahakar dhany kahane aa, ki tera parameshvar, sulaaiman ka nam, tere nam se bhee mahan kare, aur usaka rajy tere rajy se bhee adhaik baddhaae aur raja ne apane palang par dandvata kee." 
1Kings1:48 fir raja ne yah bhee kaha, ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova dhany haai, jis ne aj mere dekhte aek ko meree gaee par virajaman kiya haai." 
1Kings1:49 tab jitane nevataharee adoniyyah ke sang the ve sab thrathra gaa, aur uttkar apana apana marga liya." 
1Kings1:50 aur adoniyyah sulaaiman se dr kar atta, aur jakar vedee ke seengon ko pakad liya." 
1Kings1:51 tab sulaaiman ko yah samachar mila ki adoniyyah sulaaiman raja se aeesa dr gaya haai ki us ne vedee ke seengon ko yah kahakar pakad liya haai, ki aj raja sulaaiman shapath khaae ki apane das ko talavar se n mar dalega." 
1Kings1:52 sulaaiman ne kaha, yaadi vah bhlamanasee dikhaae to usaka aek bal bhee boomi par girane n paaega, parantu yaadi us men dushttta pai jaa, to vah mara jaaega." 
1Kings1:53 tab raja sulaaiman ne logon ko bhej diya jo usako vedee ke pas se utar le aae tab us ne akar raja sulaaiman ko dandvata kee aur sulaaieman ne us se kaha, apane ghar chala ja." 
1Kings2:1 jab daud ke marane ka samay nikatt aya, tab us ne apane putra sulaaiman se kaha," 
1Kings2:2 ki maain lok kee reeati par kooch karanevala hoo isaaliye too hiyab bandhakar purushaarth dikha. 
1Kings2:3 aur jo kuchh tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe saunpa haai, usakee raksha karake usake magan par chala karana aur jaaisa moosa kee vyavastha men likha haai, vaaisa hee usakee vidhaiyon tatha agyaao, aur niyamo, aur chitauaniyon ka palan karate rahana jis se jo kuchh too kare aur jahan kaheen too jaa, us men too safal hoae" 
1Kings2:4 aur yahova apana vah vachan poora kare jo us ne mere vishay men kaha tha, ki yadi teree santan apanee chal ke vishay men aeese savadhaan rahe, ki apane sampoorn day aur sampoorn praan se sachchai ke sath nit mere sammukh chalate rahen tab to israaael kee rajagaee par virajanevale kee, tere kul parivar men ghattee kabhee n hogee." 
1Kings2:5 fir too svayan janata haai, ki sarooyah ke putra yoab ne mujh se kya kya kiya! arthata us ne ner ke putra abner, aur yeter ke putra amasa, israaael ke in do senapaatiyon se kya kya kiya. us ne un donon ko ghaat kiya, aur mel ke sapay yuddh ka lohoo bahakar us se apanee kamar ka kamaraband aur apane pavon kee jootiyan bhaigo deen." 
1Kings2:6 isaliye too apanee buaddhi se kam lena aur us pakke balavale ko adhaelok men shaanti se utarane n dena. 
1Kings2:7 fir giladee barjillaai ke putraen par krapa rakhna, aur ve teree mej par khanevalon men rahe, kyonki jab maain tere bhai abashaalom ke samhane se bhaga ja raha tha, tab unhon ne mere pas akar vaaisa hee kiya tha." 
1Kings2:8 fir sun, tere pas binyameenee gera ka putra bahooreemee shaimee rahata haai, jis din maain mahanaaim ko jata tha us din us ne mujhe kadai se shaap diya tha par jab vah meree bhentt ke liye yaradan ko aya, tab maain ne us se yahova kee yah shapath khai, ki maain tuujhe talavar se n mar daloonga." 
1Kings2:9 parantu ab too ise nidash n ttharana, too to buaddhiman purush haai tujhe maloom hoga ki usake sath kya karana chaahiye, aur us pakke balavale ka lohoo bahakar use adhaelok men utar dena." 
1Kings2:10 tab daud apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur daudamur men use mittee dee gai. 
1Kings2:11 daud ne israaael par chalees varsha rajy kiya, sat varsha to us ne habraen men aur taaintees varsha yarooshalem men rajy kiya tha." 
1Kings2:12 tab sulaaiman apane pita daud kee gaee par virajaman hua aur usaka rajy bahut draddh hua. 
1Kings2:13 aur haggeet ka putra adoniyyah, sulaaiman kee mata batashoba ke pas aya, aur batashoba ne poochha, kya too mitrabhav se ata haai?" 
1Kings2:14 us ne uttar diya, ha, mitrabhav se! fir vah kahane laga, mujhe tujh se ek bat kahanee haai. us ne kaha, kah!" 
1Kings2:15 us ne kaha, tujhe to maloom haai ki rajy mera ho gaya tha, aur samast israaelee meree or munh kiae the, ki maain rajy karoon parantu ab rajy palattkar mere bhai ka ho gaya haai, kyonaki vah yahova kee or se usako mila haai." 
1Kings2:16 isaliye ab maain tujh se aek bat mangata hoo, mujh se nahee n karana us ne kaha, kahe ja." 
1Kings2:17 us ne kaha, raja sulaaiman tujh se nahee n karega isaaliye us se kah, ki vah mujhe shoonemin abeeshag ko byah de." 
1Kings2:18 batashoba ne kaha, achchha, maain tere liye raja se kahoongee." 
1Kings2:19 tab batashoba adoniyyah ke liye raja sulaaiman se batacheet karane ko usake pas gai, aur raja usakee bhentt ke liye utta, aur use dandvata karake apane sinhasan par baaitt gaya fir raja ne apanee mata ke liye aek sinhasan rakh diya, aur vah usakee daahinee or baaitt gai." 
1Kings2:20 tab vah kahane lagee, maain tujh se aek chhotta sa varadan mangatee hoo isaaliye pujh se nahee n karana, raja ne kaha, he mata manga maain tujh se nahee n karoonga." 
1Kings2:21 us ne kaha, vah shooneamin abeeshag tere bhai adoniyyah ko byah dee jae." 
1Kings2:22 raja sulaaiman ne apanee mata ko uttar diya, too adoniyyah ke liye shoonemin abeeshag hee ko kyo mangatee haai? usake liye rajy bhee mang, kyonki vah to mera bada bhai haai, aur usee ke liye kya! aebyatar yajak aur sarooyah ke putra yoab ke liye bhee manga." 
1Kings2:23 aur raja sulaaiman ne yahova kee shapath khakar kaha, yadi adoniyyah ne yah bat apane praan par khelakar n kahee ho to parameshvar mujh se vaaisa hee kya varan us se bhee aadhaik kare." 
1Kings2:24 ab yahova jis ne pujhe sthiar kiya, aur mere pita daud kee rajagaee par virajaman kiya haai aur apane vachan ke anusar mere ghar basaya haai, usake jeepan kee shapath aj hee adoniyyah mar dala jaaega." 
1Kings2:25 aur raja sulaaiman ne yahoyada ke putra banayah ko bhej diya aur us ne jakar, usako aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya." 
1Kings2:26 aur aebyatar yajak se raja ne kaha, anatot men apanee boomi ko ja kyonki too bhee praandand ke yogy haai. aj ke din to maain tujhe n mar daloonga, kyonaki too mere pita daud ke samhane prabhu yahova ka sandook uttaya karata tha aur un sab dukhon men jo mere pita par pade the too bhee dukhee tha." 
1Kings2:27 aur sulaaiman ne aebyatar ko yahova ke yajak hone ke pad se utar diya, isaliye ki jo vachan yahova ne aelee ke vansh ke vishay men shaeelo men kaha tha, vah poora ho jaae." 
1Kings2:28 isaka samachar yoab tak pahuncha yoab abashaalom ke peechhe to naheen ho liya tha, parantu adoniyyah ke peechhe ho liya tha. tab yoab yahova ke tamboo ko bhag gaya, aur vedee ke seengon ko pakad liya." 
1Kings2:29 jab raja sulaaiman ko yah samachar mila, ki yoab yahova ke tamboo ko bhag gaya haai, aur vah vedee ke pas haai, tab sulaaiman ne yahoyada ke putra banayah ko yah kahakar bhej diya, ki too jakar use mar dala." 
1Kings2:30 tab banayah ne yahova ke tamboo ke pas jakar usase kaha, raja kee yah agyaa haai, ki nikal a. us ne kaha, nahee, maain yaheen mar jaunga. tab banayah ne lauttkar yah sandesh raja ko diya ki yoab ne mujhe yah uttar diya." 
1Kings2:31 raja ne us se kaha, usake kahane ke anusar usako mar dal, aur use mittee de aeesa karake nidashaen ka jo koon yoab ne kiya haai, usaka dosh too mujh par se aur mere pita ke gharane par se door karega." 
1Kings2:32 aur yahova usake sir vah koon lautta dega kyonaki us ne mere pita daud ke bina jane apane se adhaik dhama aur bhle do purushaen par, arthata israaael ke pradhaan senapaati ner ke putra abner aur yahooda ke pradhaan senapati yeter ke putra amasa par toottkar unako talavar se mar dala tha." 
1Kings2:33 yon yoab ke sir par aur usakee santan ke sir par koon sada tak rahega, parantu daud aur usake vansh aur usake gharane aur usake rajy par yahova kee or se shaanati sadaaiv tak rahegee." 
1Kings2:34 tab yahoyada ke putra banayah ne jakar yoab ko mar dala aur usako jangal men usee ke ghar men mittee dee gai. 
1Kings2:35 tab raja ne usake sthan par yahoyada ke putra banayah ko pradhaan senapaati ttharaya aur aebyatar ke sthan par sadok yajak ko ttharaya. 
1Kings2:36 aur raja ne shaimee ko bulava bheja, aur us se kaha, too yarooshalem men apana aek ghar banakar vaheen rahana aur nagar se bahar kaheen n jana." 
1Kings2:37 too nishchay jan rakh ki jis din too nikalakar kidraen nale ke par utare, usee din too nisandeh mar dala jaaega, aur tera lohoo tere hee sir par padega." 
1Kings2:38 shaimee ne raja se kaha, bat achchhee haai jaaisa mere prabhu raja ne kaha haai, vaaisa hee tera das karega. tab shaimee bahut din yarooshalem men raha." 
1Kings2:39 parantu teen varsha ke vyateet hone par shaimee ke do das, gat nagar ke raja maka ke putra akeesh ke pas bhag gaa, aur shaimee ko yah samachar mila, ki tere das gat men haain." 
1Kings2:40 tab shaimee uttkar apane gadahe par kattee kasakar, apane das ko ddoonddhne ke liye gat ko akeesh ke pas gaya, aur apane dason ko gat se le aya." 
1Kings2:41 jab sulaaiman raja ko isaka samachar mila, ki shaimee yarooshalem se gat ko gaya, aur fir lautt aya haai," 
1Kings2:42 tab us ne shaimee ko bulava bheja, aur us se kaha, kya maain ne tujhe yahova kee shapath n khailai thee? aur tujh se chitakar n kaha tha, ki yah nishchay jan rakh ki jis din too nikalakar kaheen chala jaa, usee din too nisandeh mar dala jaaega? aur kya too ne mujh se n kaha tha, ki jo bat maain ne sunee, vah achchhee haai?" 
1Kings2:43 fir too ne yahova kee shapath aur meree draddh agyaa kyon naheen manee? 
1Kings2:44 aur raja ne shaimee se kaha, ki too ap hee apane man men us sab dushttta ko janata haai, jo too ne mere pita daud se kee thee? isaaliye yahova tere sir par teree dushttta lautta dega." 
1Kings2:45 parantu raja sulaaiman dhany rahega, aur daud ka rajy yahova ke samhane sadaaiv draddh rahega." 
1Kings2:46 tab raja ne yahoyada ke putra banayah ko agyaa dee, aur us ne bahar jakar, usako aeesa mara ki vah bhee mar gaya. aur sulaaiman ke hath me rajy draddh ho gaya." 
1Kings3:1 fir raja sulaaiman misra ke raja firaun kee bettee ko byah kar usaka damad ban gaya, aur usako daudapur men lakar jab nak apana bhvan aur yahova ka bhvan aur yarooshalem ke charon or kee shaharapanah n banava chuka, tab tak usako vaheen rakha." 
1Kings3:2 kyonaki praja ke log to unche sthanon par baali chaddhate the aur un dinon tak yahova ke nam ka koi bhpan naheen bana tha. 
1Kings3:3 sulaaiman yahova se praem rakhta tha aur apane pita daud kee vidhaiyon par chalata to raha, parantu vah unche sthanon par bhee baali chaddhaya aur dhoop jalaya karata tha." 
1Kings3:4 aur raja gibon ko baali chaddhane gaya, kyonki mukhy uncha sthan vahee tha, tab vahan kee vedee par sulaaiman ne aek hajaar homabali chaddhaae." 
1Kings3:5 gibon men yahova ne rat ko svapn ke dara sulaaiman ko darshan dekar kaha, jo kuchh too chahe ki maain tujhe doo, vah manga." 
1Kings3:6 sulaaiman ne kaha, too apane das mere pita daud par badee karuna karata raha, kyonaki vah apane ko tere sammukh janakar tere sath sachchai aur dharma aur manakee seedhaai se chalata raha aur too ne yahan tak us par karuna kee thee ki use usakee gaee par birajanevala aek putra diya haai, jaaisa ki aj vartaman haai." 
1Kings3:7 aur ab he mere parameshvar yahova! toone apane das ko mere pita daud ke sthan par raja kiya haai, parantu maain chhotta ladka sa hoo jo bheetar bahar ana jana naheen janata." 
1Kings3:8 fir tera das teree chunee hui praja ke bahut se logon ke madhy men haai, jinakee ginatee bahutayat ke mare naheen ho sakatee." 
1Kings3:9 too apane das ko apanee praja ka nyay karane ke liye samajhne kee aeesee shaaktai de, ki maain bhle bure ko parakh sakoon kyonaki kaun aeesa haai ki teree itanee badee praja ka nyay kar sake?" 
1Kings3:10 is bat se prabhu prasann hua, ki sulaaiman ne aeesa varadan manga haai." 
1Kings3:11 tab parameshvar ne us se kaha, isaaliye ki too ne yah varadan manga haai, aur n to deerdhayu aur n dhan aur n apane shatrauon ka nash manga haai, parantu sapajhne ke vivek ka varadan manga haai isaliye sun," 
1Kings3:12 maain tere vachan ke anusar karata hoo, tujhe buaddhi aur vivek se bhra man deta hoo, yaha tak ki tere saman n to tujh se paahile koi kabhee hua, aur n bad men koi kabhee hoga." 
1Kings3:13 fir jo too ne naheen manga, arthata dhan aur maahima, vah bhee maain tujhe yahan tak deta hoo, ki tere jeevan bhr koi raja tere tuly n hoga." 
1Kings3:14 fir yadi too apane pita daud kee nai mere magan men chalata hua, meree vidhaiyon aur agyaaon ko manata rahega to maain teree ayu ko baddhaunga." 
1Kings3:15 tab sulaaiman jag utta aur dekha ki yah svapn tha fir vah yarooshalem ko gaya, aur yahova kee vacha ke sandook ke samhane khda hokar, homabaali aur melabali chaddhaa, aur apane sab karmachaariyon ke liye jevanar kee." 
1Kings3:16 us samay do veshyaen raja ke pas akar usake sammukh khdee hui. 
1Kings3:17 un men se ek stree kahane lagee, he mere prabhu! maain aur yah sree donon ek hee ghar men rahatee haain aur isake sang ghar men rahate huae mere ek bachcha hua." 
1Kings3:18 fir mere jachcha ke teen din ke bad aeesa hua ki yah sree bhee jachcha ho gai ham to sang hee sang thee, ham donon ko chhodkar ghar men aur koi bhee n tha." 
1Kings3:19 aur rat men is sree ka balak isake neeche dabakar mar gaya. 
1Kings3:20 tab is ne adhaee rat ko uttkar, jab teree dasee so hee rahee thee, tab mera ladka mere pas se lekar apanee chhatee men rakha, aur apana mara hua balak meree chhatee men litta diya." 
1Kings3:21 bhor ko jab maain apana balak doodha pilane ko uttee, tab use mara hua paya parantu bhor ko maain ne dhyan se yah dekha, ki vah mera putra nahee haai." 
1Kings3:22 tab doosaree sree ne kaha, naheen jeevit putra mera haai, aur mara putra tera haai. parantu vah kahatee rahee, naheen mara hua tera putra haai aur jeevit mera putra haai, yon ve raja ke samhane baten karatee rahee." 
1Kings3:23 raja ne kaha, aek to kahatee haai jo jeeavit haai, vahee mera putra haai, aur mara hua tera putra haai aur doosaree kahatee haai, nahee, jo mara haai vahee tera putra haai, aur jo jeeavit haai, vah mera putra haai." 
1Kings3:24 fir raja ne kaha, mere pas talavar le ao so aek talavar raja ke samhane lai gai." 
1Kings3:25 tab raja bola, jeeavite balak ko do ttukade karake adha isako aur adha usako do." 
1Kings3:26 tab jeeavit balak kee mata ka man apane bette ke sneh se bhr aya, aur us ne raja se kaha, he mere prabhu! jeevit balak usee ko de parantu usako kisee bhanti n mara. doosaree sree ne kaha, vah n to mera ho aur n tera, vah do ttukade kiya jaae." 
1Kings3:27 tab raja ne kaha, paahilee ko jeeavit balak do kisee bhanti usako n paro kyonki usakee mata vahee haai." 
1Kings3:28 jo nyay raja ne chukaya tha, usaka samachar samast israaael ko mila, aur unhon ne raja ka bhy mana, kyonaki unhon ne yah dekha, ki usake man men nyay karane ke liye parameshvar kee buaddhi haai." 
1Kings4:1 raja sulaaiman to samast israaael ke upar raja niyukt hua tha. 
1Kings4:2 aur usake haakim ye the, arthata sadok ka putra ajaryah yajak, aur shaeesha ke putra aeleehorop aur ahiyyah vradhaan mantree the." 
1Kings4:3 aheelood ka putra yahoshaapat, itihas ka lekhk tha." 
1Kings4:4 fir yahoyada ka putra banayah pradhaan senapati tha, aur sadok aur aebyatar yajak the!" 
1Kings4:5 aur natan ka putra ajaryah bhndaariyon ke upar tha, aur natan ka putra jabood yajak, aur raja ka mitra bhee tha." 
1Kings4:6 aur aheeshaar rajaparivar ke upar tha, aur abda ka putra adoneeram begaron ke upar muakhaiya tha." 
1Kings4:7 aur sulaaiman ke barah bhndaree the, jo samast israaaeliyon ke aadhaikaree hokar raja aur usake gharane ke liye bhojan ka prabandha karate the. aek aek purush praati varsha apane apane niyukt maheene men prabandha karata tha." 
1Kings4:8 aur unake nam ye the, arthata aepraaim ke pahadee esh men benhoora." 
1Kings4:9 aur makas, shaalbeem betashomesh aur aelonabethanan men bendeker tha." 
1Kings4:10 arubbot men benhesed jisake adhaikar men sauko aur heper ka samast desh tha. 
1Kings4:11 dor ke samast unche desh men benabeenadab jisakee sree sulaaiman kee bettee napat thee. 
1Kings4:12 aur aheelood ka putra bana jisake adhaikar men tanak, maagio aur betashaan ka vah sab desh tha, jo saratan ke pas aur yijrael ke neeche aur praetashaan se le abelamahola tak arthata yokamam kee paralee or tak haai." 
1Kings4:13 aur gila ke ramot men benageber tha, jisake adhaikar men manashshoi yair ke gilad ke ganv the, arthata isee ke aadhaikar men bashaan ke agab ka desh tha, jis men shaharapanah aur peetal ke bedevale satt bade bade nagar ie." 
1Kings4:14 aur ia ke putra aheenadab ke hath men mahanaaim tha. 
1Kings4:15 naptalee men aheemas tha, jis ne sulaaiman kee basamat nam bettee ko byah liya tha." 
1Kings4:16 aur ashor aur alot men hooshau ka putra bana," 
1Kings4:17 issakar men paruh ka putra yahoshaapat," 
1Kings4:18 aur binyameen men aela ka putra shaimee tha. 
1Kings4:19 uree ka putra geber gilad men arthata emoriyon ke raja seehan aur bashaan ke raja og ke desh men tha, is samast desh men vahee bhndaree tha." 
1Kings4:20 yahooda aur israaael ke log bahut the, ve samudra ke teer par kee baloo ke kinakon ke saman bahut the, aur khate-peete aur anand karate rahe." 
1Kings4:21 sulaaiman to mahanad se lekar paalishtaiyon ke desha, aur misra ke sivane tak ke sab rajyon ke upar prabhuta karata tha aur anake log sulaaiman ke jeevat bhr bhentt late, aur usake adhaeen rahate the." 
1Kings4:22 aur sulaaiman kee aek din kee rasoi men itana uttta tha, arthata tees kor maaida," 
1Kings4:23 satt kor atta, das taaiyar kiae huae baail aur charaiyon men se bees baail aur sau bhed-bakaree aur inako chhod" 
1Kings4:24 haarin, chikare, yakhmoor aur taaiyar kiae huae pakshaee kyonki mahanad ke is par ke samast desh par arthata tipsah se lekar ajja tak jitane raja the, un sabhon par sulaaiman prabhuta karata, aur apane charon or ke sab rahanevalon se mel rakhta tha." 
1Kings4:25 aur dan se beshba tak ke sab yahoodee aur israaaelee apanee apanee dakhlata aur anjeer ke vraksha tale sulaaiman ke jeevan bhr nidr rahate the. 
1Kings4:26 fir usake rath ke ghaedon ke liye sulaaiman ke chalees hajaar than the, aur usake barah hajaar savar the." 
1Kings4:27 aur ve bhndaree apane apane maheene men raja sulaaiman ke liye aur jitane usakee meja par ate the, un sabhon ke liye bhojan ka prabandha karate the, kisee vastu kee ghattee hone naheen patee thee." 
1Kings4:28 aur ghaedon aur veg chalanevale ghaedon ke liye jav aur pual jahan prayojan padta tha vahan agyaa ke anusar aek aek jan pahunchaya karata tha. 
1Kings4:29 aur parameshvar ne sulaaiman ko buddhi dee, aur usakee samajh bahut hee baddhai, aur usake day men samudra tatt kee baraloo ke kinakon ke tuly anaginit gun diae." 
1Kings4:30 aur sulaaiman kee buddhi poorva desh ke sab nivaasiyon aur misiryon kee bhee buddhi se baddhkar buaddhi thee. 
1Kings4:31 vah to aur sab manushyon se varan aetan, aejraehee aur heman, aur mahol ke putra kalakol, aur darda se bhee adhaik buddhiman tha aur usakee keeattair charon or kee sab jaatiyon men faail gai." 
1Kings4:32 us ne teen hajaar neeativachan kahe, aur usake ek hajaar panch geet bhee haai." 
1Kings4:33 fir us ne labanon ke devadaruon se lekar bheet men se ugate hu joofaa tak ke sab pedon kee charcha aur pashuuon paakshiayon aur renganevale jantuon aur machhaliyon kee charcha kee. 
1Kings4:34 aur desh desh ke log prathvee ke sab rajaon kee or se jinhon ne sulaaiman kee buaddhi kee keettair sunee thee, usakee buaddhi kee baten sunane ko aya karate the." 
1Kings5:1 aur sor nagar ke heeram raja ne apane doot sulaaiman ke pas bheje, kyonaki us ne suna tha, ki vah abhaishaikt hokar apane pita ke sthan par raja hua haai aur daud ke jeevan bhr heeram usaka mitra bana raha." 
1Kings5:2 aur sulaaiman ne heeram ke pas yon kahala bheja, ki nujhe maloom haai," 
1Kings5:3 ki mera pita daud apane parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan isaliye n banava saka ki vah charon or ladaiyon men tab tak bajha raha, jab nak yahova ne usake shatrauon ko usake panv tal n kar diya." 
1Kings5:4 parantu ab mere parameshvar yahova ne mujhe charon or se vishraam diya haai aur n to koi virodhaee haai, aur n kuchh vipaattai dekh padtee haai." 
1Kings5:5 maain ne apane parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banavane ko ttana haai arthata us ban ke anusar jo yahova ne mere pita daud se kahee thee ki tera putra jise maain tere sthan men gaee par baaittaunga, vahee mere nam ka bhvan banavaaega." 
1Kings5:6 isaliye ab too mere liye labanon par se devadaru kattne kee agyaa de, aur mere das tere dason ke sang rahenge, aur jo kuchh majadooree too ttharaa, vahee maain tujhe tere dason ke liye doonga, tujhe maloom to haai, ki seedoniyon ke barabar lamadee kattne ka bhed ham logon men se koi bhee naheen janata." 
1Kings5:7 sulaaiman kee ye baten sunakar, heeram bahut anaandait hua, aur kaha, aj yahova dhany haai, jis ne daud ko us badee jaati par rajy karane ke liye aek buaddhiman putra diya haai." 
1Kings5:8 tab heeram ne sulaaipan ke pas yon kahala bheja ki jo too ne mere pas kahala bheja haai vah meree samajh men a gaya, devadaroo aur sanovar kee lakadee ke vishay jo kuchh too chahe, vahee maain karoonga." 
1Kings5:9 mere das lakadee ko labanon se samudra tak pahunchaaenge, fir maain unake bede banavakar, jo sthan too mere liye ttharaa, vaheen par samudra ke marga se unako pahunchava oonga vahan maain unako kholakar dlava doonga, aur too unhen le lena aur too mere parivar ke liye bhojan dekar, meree bhee ichchha pooree karana." 
1Kings5:10 is prakar heeram sulaaiman kee ichchha ke anusar usako devadaroo aur sanovar kee lakadee dene laga. 
1Kings5:11 aur sulaaiman ne heeram ke paarivar ke khane ke liye use bees hajaar kor gehoon aur bees kor pera hua tel diya is prakar sulaaiman heeram ko prati varsha diya karata tha. 
1Kings5:12 aur yahova ne sulaaiman ko apane vachan ke anusar buaddhi dee, aur heeram aur sulaaiman ke beech mel bana raha varan un donon ne apas men vacha bhee bandha lee." 
1Kings5:13 aur raja sulaaiman ne poore israaael men se teen hajaar purush begar lagaa," 
1Kings5:14 aur unhen labanon pahad par paree paree karake, maheene maheene das hajaar bhej diya karata tha aur aek maheena to ve labanon par, aur do maheene ghar par raha karate the aur begaariyon ke upar adoneeram ttharaya gaya." 
1Kings5:15 aur sulaaiman ke sattar hajaar bojh ddhonevale aur pahad par assee hajaar vraksha kattnevale aur patthr nikalanevale the. 
1Kings5:16 inako chhod sulaaiman ke teen hajaar teen sau muakhaiye the, jo kam karanevalon ke upar the." 
1Kings5:17 fir raja kee agyaa se bade bade anamol patthr isaaliye khodakar nikale gaae ki bhvan kee nev, gaddhe huae patthron se dalee jaae." 
1Kings5:18 aur sulaaiman ke kareegaron aur heeram ke kareegaron aur gabaliyon ne unako gaddha, aur bhvan ke banane ke liye lakadee aur patthr taaiyar kiae." 
1Kings6:1 israaaeliyon ke misra desh se nikalane ke char sau asseeven varsha ke bad jo sulaaiman ke israaael par rajy karane ka chautha varsha tha, usake jeev nam doosare maheene men vah yahova ka bhvan banane laga." 
1Kings6:2 aur jo bhvan raja sulaaiman ne yahova ke liye banaya usakee lambai satt hat, chaudai bees hath aur unchai tees hath kee thee." 
1Kings6:3 aur bhvan ke mandair ke samhane ke osare kee lambai bees hath kee thee, arthata bhvan kee chaudai ke barabar thee, aur osare kee chaudai jo bhvan ke samhane thee, vah das hath kee thee." 
1Kings6:4 fir us ne bhvan men sthiar jhlaimileedar khaidkiyan banai. 
1Kings6:5 aur us ne bhvan ke asapas kee bheeton se satte huae arthata maandair aur darshana-sthan donon bheeton ke asapas us ne manjilen aur kottriyan banai. 
1Kings6:6 sab se neechevalee manajil kee chaudai panch hat, aur beechavalee kee chh hat, aur uparavalee kee sat hath kee thee, kyonaki us ne bhvan ke asapas bheet ko bahar kee or kusadar banaya tha isaliye ki kadiyan bhvan kee bheeton ko pakade huae n hon." 
1Kings6:7 aur banate samay bhpan aeese patthron ka banaya gaya, jo vahan le ane se pahile gaddhkar tteek kiae gaae the, aur bhvan ke banate samay hathaide vasoolee va aur kisee prakar ke lohe ke aujar ka shabd kabhee sunai naheen pada." 
1Kings6:8 bahar kee beechavalee kottriyon ka dar bhvan kee dahinee alang men tha, aur log chakkaradar seeaddhiyon par hokar beechavalee kottriyon men jate, aur un se uparavalee kottariyon par jaya karate the." 
1Kings6:9 us ne bhvan ko banakar poora kiya, aur usakee chht devadaru kee kaadiyon aur takhton se banee thee." 
1Kings6:10 aur poore bhvan se lagee hui jo manajilen us ne banai vah panch hath unchee thee, aur ve devadaru kee kadiyon ke dara bhvan se milai gai theen." 
1Kings6:11 tab yahova ka yah vachan sulaaiman ke pas pahuncha, ki yah bhvan jo noo bana raha haai,"
