1Kings6:12 yaadi too meree vidhaiyon par chalega, aur mere niyamon ko manega, aur meree sab agyaaon par chalata hua unaka palan karata rahega, to jo vachan maain ne tere vishay men tere pita daud ko diya tha usako maain poora karoonga." 
1Kings6:13 aur maain israaaeliyon ke madhy men nivas karoonga, aur apanee israaaelee praja ko n tajoonga." 
1Kings6:14 so sulaaiman ne bhvan ko banakar poora kiya. 
1Kings6:15 aur us ne bhvan kee bheeton par bheetaravar devadaru kee takhtabandee kee aur bhvan ke farsha se chht tak bheeton men bheetaravar lakadee kee takhtabandee kee, aur bhvan ke farsha ko us ne sanovar ke takhton se banaya." 
1Kings6:16 aur bhvan kee pichhlee alang men bhee us ne bees hath kee dooree par farsha se le bheeton ke upar tak devadaru kee takhtabandee kee is prakar us ne paramapavitra sthan ke liye bhvan kee aek bheetaree kottree banai. 
1Kings6:17 usake samhane ka bhvan arthata maandair kee lambai chalees hath kee thee. 
1Kings6:18 aur bhvan kee bheeton par bheetaravar devadaru kee lakadee kee takhtabandee thee, aur us men itdraayan aur khaile huae fool khude the, sab devadaru hee tha patbhr kuchh naheen dikhai padta tha." 
1Kings6:19 bhvan ke bheetar us te aek darshan sthan yahova kee vacha ka sandook rakhne ke liye taaiyar kiya. 
1Kings6:20 aur us darshana-sthan kee lambai chaudai aur unchai bees bees hath kee thee aur us ne us par chokha sona maddhvaya aur vedee kee takhtabandee devadaru se kee. 
1Kings6:21 fir sulaaiman ne bhvan ko bheetar bheetar chokhe sone se maddhvaya, aur darshana-sthan ke samhane sone kee sankalen lagai aur usako bhee sone se maddhvaya." 
1Kings6:22 aur us ne poore bhvan ko sone se maddhvakar usaka poora kam nipatta diya. aur darshana-sthan kee pooree vedee ko bhee us ne sone se maddhvaya. 
1Kings6:23 darshana-sthan men us ne das das hath unche jalapai kee lakadee ke do karoob bana rakhe. 
1Kings6:24 aek karoob ka aek pankh panch hath ka tha, aur usaka doosara pankh bhee panch hath ka tha, aek pankh ke sire se, doosare pankh ke sire tak das hath the." 
1Kings6:25 aur doosara karoob bhee das hath ka tha donon karoob aek hee nap aur aek hee akar ke the. 
1Kings6:26 aek karoob kee unchai das hath kee, aur doosare kee bhee itanee hee thee." 
1Kings6:27 aur us ne karoobon ko bheetaravale sthan men dharava diya aur karoobon ke pankh aeese faaile the, ki aek karoob ka aek pank, aek bheet se, aur doosare ka doosara pank, doosaree bheet se laga hua tha, fir unake doosare do pankh bhvan ke madhy men aek doosare se lage huae the." 
1Kings6:28 aur karoobon ko us ne sone se maddhvaya. 
1Kings6:29 aur us ne bhvan kee bheeton men bahar aur bheetar charon or karoob, khjoor aur khaile huae fool khudavaae." 
1Kings6:30 aur bhvan ke bheetar aur baharavale farsha us ne sone se maddhvaae. 
1Kings6:31 aur darshana-sthan ke dar par us ne jalapai kee lakadee ke kivad lagaae aur chaukhtt ke sirahane aur bajuon kee ka panchavan bhag thee. 
1Kings6:32 donon kivad jalapai kee lakadee ke the, aur us ne un men karoob, khjoor ke vraksha aur khaile huae fool khudavaae aur sone se maddha aur karoobon aur khjooron ke upar sona maddhva diya gaya." 
1Kings6:33 asee kee reeti us ne mandair ke dar ke liye bhee jalapai kee lakadee ke chaukhtt ke bajoo banaae aur vah bhvan kee chaudai kee chauthai thee. 
1Kings6:34 donon kivad sanovar kee lakadee ke the, jin men se aek kivad ke do palle the aur doosare kivad ke do palle the jo palattkar duhar jate the." 
1Kings6:35 aur un par bhee us ne karoob aur khjoor ke vraksha aur khaile huae fool khudavaae aur khude huae kam par us ne sona maddhvaya. 
1Kings6:36 aur us ne bheetaravale angan ke ghore ko gaddhe huae patthron ke teen rae, aur aek parat devadaroo kee kadiyan laga kar banaya." 
1Kings6:37 chauthe varsha ke jeev nam maheene men yahova ke bhvan kee nev dalee gai. 
1Kings6:38 aur gyarahaven varsha ke bool nam attven maheene me, vah bhvan us sab samet jo us men uchit samajha gaya ban chuka is reeati sulaaiman ko usake banane men sat varsha lage." 
1Kings7:1 aur sulaaiman ne apane mahal ko banaya, aur usake poora karane men terah varsha lage." 
1Kings7:2 aur us ne labanonee van nam mahal banaya jisakee lambai sau hat, chaudai pachas hath aur unchai tees hath kee thee vah to devadaru ke khmbhon kee char panti par bana aur khmbhon par devadaru kee kaadiyan dharee gai." 
1Kings7:3 aur khmbhon ke upar devadaru kee chhtavalee paaintalees kottriyan arthata aek aek mahal men pandrah kottariyan baneen. 
1Kings7:4 teenon mahalon men kadiyan dharee gai, aur teenon men khaidkiyan amhane samhane baneen." 
1Kings7:5 aur sab dar aur bajuon kee kaadiyan bhee chaukor thee, aur teenon mahalon men khaidkiyan amhane samhane baneen." 
1Kings7:6 aur us ne aek khmbhevala osara bhee banaya jisakee lambai pachas hath aur chaudai tees hath kee thee, aur in khmbhon ke samhane aek khmbhevala osara aur usake samhane devaddhee banai." 
1Kings7:7 fir us ne nyay ke sinhasan ke liye bhee aek osara banaya, jo nyay ka osara kahalaya aur us men aeek farsha se doosare farsha tak devadaru kee takhtabandee thee." 
1Kings7:8 aur usee ke rahane ka bhvan jo us osare ke bheetar ke aek aur angan men bana, vah bhee usee ddhb se bana. fir usee osare ke ddhb se sulaaiman ne firaun kee bettee ke liye jisako us ne byah liya tha, aek aur bhvan banaya." 
1Kings7:9 ye sab ghar bahar bheetar tev se munddher tak aeese anamol aur gaddhe huae patthron ke bane jo napakar, aur aron se cheerakar taaiyar kiye gaae the aur bahar ke angan se le bade angan tak lagaae gaae." 
1Kings7:10 usakee nev to bade mol ke bade bade arthata das das aur att att hath ke patthron kee dalee gai thee. 
1Kings7:11 aur upar bhee bade mol ke patthr the, jo nap se gaddhe huae the, aur devadaru kee lakadee bhee thee." 
1Kings7:12 aur bade angan ke charon or ke ghore men gaddhe huae patthron ke teen rae, aur devadaru kee kadiyon ka aek parat tha, jaaise ki yahova ke bhvan ke bheetaravale angan aur bhvan ke osare men lage the." 
1Kings7:13 fir raja sulaaiman ne sor se heeram ko bulava bheja. 
1Kings7:14 vah naptalee ke gotra kee kisee vidhava ka betta tha, aur usaka pita aek soravasee ttttera tha, aur vah peetal kee sab prakar kee kaeigaree men pooree buddhi, nimunta aur samajh rakhta tha. so vah raja sulaaiman ke pas akar usaka sab kam karane laga." 
1Kings7:15 us ne peetal ddhalakar attarah attahee hath unche do khmbhe banaa, aur ek ek ka ghora barah hath ke soot ka tha." 
1Kings7:16 aur us ne khmbhon ke siron par lagane ko peetal ddhalakar do kanganee banai aek aek kanganee kee unchai, panch panch hath kee thee." 
1Kings7:17 aur khmbhon ke siron par kee kangaaniyon ke liye charakhane kee sat sat jaliya, aur sankalon kee sat sat jhalaren baneen." 
1Kings7:18 aur us ne khmbhon ko bhee is prakar banaya ki khmbhon ke siron par kee aek aek kanganee ke ddhanpane ko charon aer jaaliyon kee aek aek panti par anaron kee do panatiyan hon. 
1Kings7:19 aur jo kangaaniyan osaron men khmbho ke siron par banee, un men char char hath unche sosan ke fool bane huae the." 
1Kings7:20 aur aek aek khmbhe ke sire par, us golai ke pas jo jalee se lagee thee, aek aur kanganee banee, aur aek aek kanganee par jo anar charon or panti panati karake bane the vah do sau the." 
1Kings7:21 un khmbhon ko us ne maandair ke osare ke pas khda kiya, aur daahinee or ke khmbhe ko khda karake usaka nam yakeen rakha fir bai or ke khmbhe ko kshada karake usaka nam boaja rakha." 
1Kings7:22 aur khmbhon ke siron par sosan ke fool ka kam bana tha khmbhon ka kam isee reeati hua. 
1Kings7:23 fir us ne aek ddhala hua aek bada hauja banaya, jo aek chhor se doosaree chhor tak das hath chauda tha, usaka akar gol tha, aur usakee unchai panch hath kee thee, aur usake charon or ka ghora tees hath ke soot ke barabar tha." 
1Kings7:24 aur usake charon or mohade ke neeche aek aek hath men das das indraayan bane, jo hauj ko ghore theen jab vah ddhala gaya tab ye indraayan bhee do panti karake ddhale gaae." 
1Kings7:25 aur vah barah bane huae baailon par rakha gaya jin men se teen uttar, teen paashchaim, teen daakkhian, aur teen poorva kee or munh kiae huae the aur un hee ke upar hauj tha, aur un sabhon ka pichhla ang bheetar kee or tha." 
1Kings7:26 aur usaka dal chauba bhr ka tha, aur usaka mohada kattore ke mohade kee nai sosan ke foolo ke kam se bana tha, aur us men do hajaar bat kee samai thee." 
1Kings7:27 fir us ne peetal ke das paye banaa, aek aek paye kee lambai char hat, chaudai bhee char hath aur unchai teen hath kee thee." 
1Kings7:28 un payon kee banavatt is prakar thee anake pattriyan thee, aur pattariyon ke beechon beech jod bhee the." 
1Kings7:29 aur jodon ke beechon beech kee pattariyon par sinh, baail, aur karoob bane the aur jodon ke upar bhee aek aek aur paya bana aur sinhon aur baailon ke neeche lattkate huae har bane the." 
1Kings7:30 aur aek aek paye ke liye peetal ke char pahiye aur peetal kee dhauriyan banee aur aek aek ke charon konon se lage huae kandho bhee ddhalakar banaae gaae jo haudee ke neeche tak pahunchate the, aur aek aek kandho ke pas har bane huae the." 
1Kings7:31 au haudee ka mohada jo paye kee kanganee ke bheetar aur upar bhee tha vah aek hath uncha tha, aur paye ka mohada jisakee chaudai deddh hath kee thee, vah paye kee banavatt ke saman gol bana aur paye ke usee mohade par bhee kuchh khuda hua kam tha aur unakee pattariyan gol nahee, chaukor theen." 
1Kings7:32 aur charon pahiye, pattriyo ke neeche the, aur aek aek paye ke paahiyon men dhauriyan bhee theen aur aek aek pahiye kee unchai deddh hath kee thee." 
1Kings7:33 paahiyon kee banavat, rath ke pahiye kee see thee, aur unakee dhauriya, putthiya, are, aur nabhen sab ddhalee hura theen." 
1Kings7:34 aur aek aek paye ke charon konon par char kandho the, aur kandho aur paye donon aek hee ttukade ke bane the." 
1Kings7:35 aur aek aek paye ke sire par adha hath unchee charon or golai thee, aur paye ke sire par kee tteken aur pattariyan paye se jude huae aek hee ttukade ke bane the." 
1Kings7:36 aur ttekon ke patton aur pattriyon par jitanee jagah jis par thee, us men us ne karoob, aur sinh, aur khjoor ke vraksha khod kar bhr diye, aur charon or har bhee banaae." 
1Kings7:37 isee prakar se us ne dason payon ko banaya sabhon ka aek hee sancha aur aek hee nap, aur aek hee akar tha." 
1Kings7:38 aur us ne peetal kee das haudee banai. aek aek haudee men chalees chalees bat kee samai thee aur aek aek, char char hath chaudee thee, aur dason payon men se aek aek par, aek aek haudee thee." 
1Kings7:39 aur us ne panch haudee shavan kee dakkhian kee or, aur panch usakee uttar kee or rakh deen aur hauja ko bhvan kee dahinee or arthata poorva kee or, aur dakkhian ke samhane dhar diya." 
1Kings7:40 aur heeram ne haudiyo, faavaadiyo, aur kattoron ko bhee banaya. so heeram ne raja sulaaiman ke liye yahova ke bhvan men jitana kam karana tha, vah sab nipatta diya," 
1Kings7:41 arthata do khmbhe, aur un kangaaniyon kee golaiyan jo donon khmbhon ke sire par thee, aur donon khmbhon ke siron par kee golaiyon ke ddhanpane ko do do jaaliya, aur donon jaaliyon ke liy char char sau anar," 
1Kings7:42 arthata khmbhon ke siron par jo golaiyan thee, unake ddhanpane ke liye arthata aek aek jalee ke liye anaron kee do do panti" 
1Kings7:43 das paye aur in par kee das haudee," 
1Kings7:44 aek hauja aur usake neeche ke barah baail, aur hande, faavaadiya," 
1Kings7:45 aur kattore bane. ye sab patra jinhen heeram ne yahova ke bhvan ke nimitt raja sulaaiman ke liye banaya, vah jhlakaye huae peetal ke bane." 
1Kings7:46 raja ne unako yaradan kee tarai men arthata sukkot aur saratan ke madhy kee chikanee mittavalee boomi men ddhala. 
1Kings7:47 aur sulaaiman ne sab patraen ko bahut aadhaik hone ke karan bina taule chhod diya, peetal ke taul ka vajan maloom n ho saka." 
1Kings7:48 yahova ke bhvan ke jitane patra the sulaaiman ne sab banaa, arthata sone kee vedee, aur sone kee vah meja jis par bhentt kee rottee rakhee jatee thee," 
1Kings7:49 aur chokhe sone kee deevatten jo bheetaree kottree ke age panch to daakkhian kee or, aur panch uttar kee or rakhee gai aur sone ke fool," 
1Kings7:50 deepak aur chimatte, aur chokhe sone ke tasale, kaainchiya, kattore, dhoopadan, aur karachhe aur bheetaravala bhvan jo paramapaavitra sthan kahalata haai, aur bhvan jo maandair kahalata haai, donon ke kivadon ke liye sone ke kabje bane." 
1Kings7:51 nidan jo jo kam raja sulaaiman ne yahova ke bhvan ke liye kiya, vah sab poora kiya gaya. tab sulaaiman ne apane pita daud ke pavitra kiae huae sone chandee aur patraen ko bheetar pahuncha kar yahova ke bhvan ke bhndaron men rakh diya." 
1Kings8:1 tab sulaaiman ne israaaelee puraaniyon ko aur gotraen ke sab mukhy purush jo israaaeliyon ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke pradhaan the,unako bhee yarooshalem men apane pas is manasa se ikattha kiya, ki ve yahova kee vacha ka sandook daudapur arthata siyon se upar le aaen." 
1Kings8:2 so sab israaaelee purush aetaneem nam sataven maheene ken parva ke samay raja sulaaiman ke pas ikatthe huae. 
1Kings8:3 jab sab israaaelee puraniye aa, tab yajakon ne sandook ko utta liya." 
1Kings8:4 aur yahova ka sandook, aur milap ka tambo, aur jitane pavitra patra us tamboo men the, un sabhon yajak aur lebeey log upar le gaae." 
1Kings8:5 aur raja sulaaiman aur samast israaaelee mandlee, jo usake pas iatthee hui thee, ve rub sandook ke samhane itanee bhed aur baail bali kar rahe the, jinakee ginatee kisee reeati se naheen ho sakatee thee." 
1Kings8:6 tab yajakon ne yahova kee vacha ka sandook usake sthan ko arthata bhvan ke darshana-sthan me, jo paramapaavitra sthan haai, pahunchakar karoobon ke pankhon ke tale rakh diya." 
1Kings8:7 karoob to sandook ke sthan ke upar pankh aeese faailaae huae the, ki ve upar se sandook aur usake dndon ko ddhanke the." 
1Kings8:8 dnde to aeese lambe the, ki unake sire us paavitra sthan se jo darshana-sthan ke samhane tha dikhai padte the parantu bahar se ve dikhai naheen padte the. ve aj ke din tak yaheen vatamapan haain." 
1Kings8:9 sandook men kuchh naheen tha, un do pattriyon ko chhod jo moosa ne horeb men usake bheetar us samay rakhee, jab yahova ne israaaeliyon ke misra se nikalane par unake sath vacha bandhaee thee." 
1Kings8:10 jab yajak pavitrasthan se nikale, tab yahova ke bhvan men badal bhr aya." 
1Kings8:11 aur badal ke karan yajak seva tthal karane ko khde n rah sake, kyonki yahova ka tej yahova ke bhvan men bhr gaya tha." 
1Kings8:12 tab sulaaiman kahane laga, yahova ne kaha tha, ki maain ghaer andhakar men vas kiae rahoonga." 
1Kings8:13 sachamuch maain ne tere liye aek vasasthan, varan aeesa draddh sthan banaya haai, jis men too yuganuyug bana rahe." 
1Kings8:14 aur raja ne israaael kee pooree sabha kee or munh faerakar usako ashaeervad diya aur pooree sabha khdee rahee. 
1Kings8:15 aur us ne kaha, dhany haai israaael ka parameshvar yahova! jis ne apane munh se mere pita daud ko yah vachan diya tha, aur apane hath se use poora kiya haai," 
1Kings8:16 ki jis din se maain apanee praja israaael ko misra se nikal laya, tab se maain ne kisee israaaelee gotra ka koi nagar naheen chuna, jis men mere nam ke nivas ke liye bhvan banaya jaae parantu maain ne daud ko chun liya, ki vah meree praja israaael ka aadhaikaree ho." 
1Kings8:17 mere pita daud kee yah manasa to thee ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banaae. 
1Kings8:18 parantu yahova ne mere pita daud se kaha, yah jo teree manasa haai, ki yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banaa, aeesee manasa karake too ne bhla to kiya" 
1Kings8:19 taubhee too us bhvan ko n banaaega tera jo nij putra hoga, vahee mere nam ka bhvan banaaega." 
1Kings8:20 yah jo vachan yahova ne kaha tha, use us ne poora bhee kiya haai, aur maain apane pita daud ke sthan par uttkar, yahova ke vachan ke anusar israaael kee gaee par virajaman hoo, aur israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke nam se is bhvan ko banaya haai." 
1Kings8:21 aur is men maain ne aek sthan us sandook ke liye ttharaya haai, jis men yahova kee vah vacha haai, jo us ne hamare purakhaon ko misra desh se nikalane ke samay un se bandhaee thee." 
1Kings8:22 tab sulaaiman israaael kee pooree sabha ke dekhte yahova kee vedee ke samhane khda hua, aur apane hath svarga kee or faailakar kaha, he yahova!" 
1Kings8:23 he israaael ke parameshvar! tere saman n to upar svarga me, aur n neeche prathvee par koi ishvar haai tere jo das apane sampoorn man se apane ko tere sammukh janakar chalate haai, unake liye too apanee vacha mooree karata, aur karuna karata rahata haai." 
1Kings8:24 jo vachan too ne mere pita daud ko diya tha, usaka too ne palan kiya haai, jaaisa too ne apane munh se kaha tha, vaaisa hee apane hath se usako poora kiya haai, jaaisa aj haai." 
1Kings8:25 isaliye ab he israaael ke parameshvar yahova! is vachan ko bhee poora kar, jo too ne apane das mere pita daud ko diya tha, ki tere kul me, mere samhane israaael kee gaee par virajanevale sadaaiv bane rahenge itana ho ki jaaise too svayan mujhe sammukh janakar chalata raha, vaaise hee tere vansh ke log apanee chalachalan men aeesee hee vaukasee karen." 
1Kings8:26 isaliye ab he israaael ke parameshvar apana jo vachan too ne apane das mere pita daud ko diya tha use sachcha siddh kara. 
1Kings8:27 kya parameshvar sachamuch prathvee par vas karega, svarga men varan sab se unche svarga men bhee too naheen samata, fir mere banaae huae is bhvan men kyonkar samaaega." 
1Kings8:28 taubhee he mere parameshvar yahova! apane das kee praarthna aur gidgidahatt kee or kan lagakar, meree chillahatt aur yah praarthna sun! jo maain aj tere samhane kar raha hoora" 
1Kings8:29 ki teree ankh is bhvan kee or arthata isee sthan kee or jisake vishay too ne kaha haai, ki mera nam vahan rahega, rat din khulee rahen aur jo praarthna tera das is sthan kee or kare, use too sun le." 
1Kings8:30 aur too apane das, aur apanee praja israaael kee praarthna jisako ve is sthan kee or gidgida ke karen use sunana, varad svarga. men se jo tera nivasasthan haai sun lena, aur sunakar kshama karana." 
1Kings8:31 jab koi kisee doosare ka aparadha kare, aur usako shapath khailai jaa, aur vah akar is bhvan men teree vedee ke samhane shapath khaa," 
1Kings8:32 tab too svarga men sun kar, arthata apane dason ka nyay karake dushtt ko dushtt tthara aur usakee chal usee ke sir lautta de, aur nidash ko nidash ttharakar, usake dharma ke anusar usako fal dena." 
1Kings8:33 fir jab neree praja israaael tere viruddh pap karane ke karan apane shatrauon se har jaa, aur teree or firakar tera nam le aur is bhvan men tujh se gidgidahatt ke sath praarthna kare," 
1Kings8:34 tab too svarga men se sunakar apanee praja israaael ka pap kshama karana aur unhen is desh men lautta le ana, jo too ne unake purukhaon ko diya tha." 
1Kings8:35 jab ve tere viruddh pap kare, aur is karan akash band ho jaa, ki vashara n hoa, aeese samay yadi ve is sthan kee or praarthna karake tere nam ko manen jab too unhen dukh deta haai, aur apane pap se fire, to too svarga men se sunakar kshama karana," 
1Kings8:36 aur apane daso, apanee praja israaael ke pap ko kshama karana too jo unako vah bhla marga dikhata haai, jis par unhen chalana chahiye, isaliye apane is desh par, jo too ne apanee praja ka bhag kar diya haai, panee barasa dena." 
1Kings8:37 jab is desh men kal va maree va jhulas ho va gerui va ttiiddayan va keede lagen va unake shatra unake desh ke faattkon men unhen ghor rakhe, athva koi vipaattai va rog kyon n ho," 
1Kings8:38 tab yaadi koi manushy va teree praja israaael apane apane man ka dukh jan le, aur gidgidahatt ke sath praarthna karake apane hath is bhvan kee or faailaaen" 
1Kings8:39 to too apane svagay nivasasthan men se sunakar kshama karuna, aur aeesa karana, ki aek aek ke man ko janakar usakee samast chal ke anusar usako fal dena too hee to sab adaamiyon ke man ke bhedon ka janane vala haai." 
1Kings8:40 tab ve jitane din is desh men rahe, jo too ne unake purakhaon ko diya tha, utane din tak tera bhy manate rahen." 
1Kings8:41 fir paradeshaee bhee jo teree praja israaael ka n ho, jab vah tera nam sunakar, door desh se aa," 
1Kings8:42 vah to tere bade tam aur balavant hath aur baddhai hui bhuja ka samachar paae isaaliye jab aeesa koi akar is bhvan kee or praarthna kare," 
1Kings8:43 tab too apane svagay nivasasthan men se sun, aur jis bat ke liye aeesa paradeshaee tujhe pukare, usee ke anusar vyavahar karana jis se prathvee ke sab deshaen ke log tera nam janakar teree praja israaael kee nai tera bhy mane, aur nishchay jane, ki yah bhvan jise maain ne banaya haai, vah tera hee kahalata haai." 
1Kings8:44 jab teree praja ke log jahan kaheen too unhen bheje, vahan apane shatrauon se ladai karane ko nikal jaae, aur is nagar kee or jise too ne chuna haai, aur is bhvan kee or jise maain ne tere nam par banaya haai, yahova se praarthna kare," 
1Kings8:45 tab too svarga men se unakee praarthna aur gidgidahatt sunakar unaka nyay kara. 
1Kings8:46 nishpap to koi manushy naheen haai yaadi ye bhee tere viruddh pap kare, aur too un par kop karake unhen shaauon ke hath kar de, aur ve unako bandhaua karake apane desh ko chahe vah door ho, chahe nikatt le javaae," 
1Kings8:47 to yaadi ve bandhauai ke desh men soch vichar kare, aur firakar apane bandhaua karanevalon ke desh men tujh se gidgidakar kahen ki ham ne pap kiya, aur kuattlaita or dushttta kee haai" 
1Kings8:48 aur yaadi ve apane un shatrauon ke desh men jo unhen bandhaua karake le gaae ho, apane sampoorn man aur sampoorn praan se teree or firen aur apane is desh kee or jo too ne unake purukhaon ko diya tha, aur is nagar kee or jise too ne chuna haai, aur is bhvan kee or jise maain ne tere nam ka banaya haai, tujh se praarthna kare," 
1Kings8:49 to too apane svagay nivasasthan men se unakee praarthna aur gidgidahatt sunana aur unaka nyay karana," 
1Kings8:50 aur jo pap teree praja ke log tere viruddh karenge, aur jitane aparadha ve tere viruddh karenge, sab ko kshama karake, unake bandhaua karanevalon ke man men aeesee daya upajana ki ve un par daya karen." 
1Kings8:51 kyonaki ve to teree praja aur tera nij bhag haain jinhen too lohe ke bhtthe ke madhy men se arthata misra se nikal laya haai. 
1Kings8:52 isaliye teree ankhen tere day kee gidgidahatt aur teree praja israaael kee gidgidahatt kee or aeesee khulee rahe, ki jab jab ve tujhe pukare, tab tab too unakee sun le" 
1Kings8:53 kyonaki he prabhu yahova apane us vachan ke anusar, jo too ne hamare purakhaon ko misra se nikalane ke samay apane das moosa ke dara diya tha, too ne in logon ko apana nij bhag hone ke liye prathvee kee sab jaatiyon se alag kiya haai." 
1Kings8:54 jab sulaaiman yahova se yah sab praarthna gidgidahatt ke sath kar chuka, tab vah jo ghauttne tteke aur akash kee or hath faailaae huae tha, so yahova kee vedee ke samhane se utta," 
1Kings8:55 aur khda ho, samast israaaelee sabha ko unche svar se yah kahakar ashaeervad diya, ki dhany haai yahova," 
1Kings8:56 jis ne tteek apane kathn ke anusar apanee praja israaael ko vishraam diya haai, jitanee bhlai kee baten usane apane das moosa ke dara kahee thee,un men se aek bhee bina pooree huae naheen rahee." 
1Kings8:57 hamara parameshvar yahova jaaise hamare purakhaon ke sang rahata tha, vaaise hee hamare sang bhee rahe, vah ham ko tyag n de aur n ham ko chhod de." 
1Kings8:58 vah hamare man apanee or aeesa firaae rakhe, ki ham usake sab magan par chala kare, aur usakee agyaaaen aur vidhaiyan aur niyam jinhen usane hamare purakhaon ko diya tha, nit mana karen." 
1Kings8:59 aur meree ye baten jinakee maain ne yahova ke samhane binatee kee haai, vah din aur rat hamare parameshvar yahova ke man men banee rahe, aur jaaisa din din prayojan ho vaaisa hee vah apane das ka aur apanee praja israaael ka bhee nyay kiya kare," 
1Kings8:60 aur is se prathvee kee sab jaatiyan yah jan le, ki yahova hee parameshvar haai aur koi doosara naheen." 
1Kings8:61 to tumhara man hamare parameshvar yahova kee or aeesee pooree reeati se laga rahe, ki aj kee nai usakee vidhaiyon par chalate aur usakee agyaaaen manate raho." 
1Kings8:62 tab raja samast israaael samet yahova ke sammukh melabali chaddhane laga. 
1Kings8:63 aur jo pashu sulaaiman ne melabaali men yahova ko chaddhaa, so bais hajar baail aur aek lakh bees hajar bheden theen. is reeti raja ne sab israaaeliyon samet yahova ke bhvan kee praatishtta kee." 
1Kings8:64 us din raja ne yahova ke bhvan ke samhanevale angan ke madhy bhee ek sthan paavitra kiya aur homabaali, aur annabali aur melabaliyon kee charabee vaheen chaddhai kyonaki jo peetal kee vedee yahova ke samhane thee, vah unake liye chhottee thee." 
1Kings8:65 aur sulaaiman ne aur usake sang samast israaael kee aek badee sabha ne jo hamat kee ghaattee se lekar misra ke nale tak ke sab deshaen se iatthee hui thee, do saptah tak arthata chaudah din tak hamare parameshvar yahova ke samhane parva ko mana. fir attven din us ne praja ke logon ko vida kiya." 
1Kings8:66 aur ve raja ko dhany, dhany, kahakar us sab bhlai ke karan jo yahova ne apane das daud aur apanee praja israaael se kee thee, anaandait aur magan hokar apane apane dere ko chale gaae." 
1Kings9:1 jab sulaaiman yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ko bana chuka, aur jo kuchh us ne karana chaha tha, use kar chuka," 
1Kings9:2 tab yahova ne jaaise gibon men usako darshan diya tha, vaaise hee doosaree bar bhee use darshan diya." 
1Kings9:3 aur yahova ne us se kaha, jo praarthna gidgidahatt ke sath too ne mujh se kee haai, usako maain ne suna haai, yah jo bhvan too ne banaya haai, us men maain ne apana nam sada ke liye rakhkar use pavitra kiya haai aur meree ankhen aur mera man nity vaheen lage rahenge." 
1Kings9:4 aur yade too apane pita daud kee nai man kee khrai aur sidhaai se apane ko mere samhane janakar chalata rahe, aur meree sab apagyaaon ke anusar kiya kare, aur meree vidhaiyon aur niyamon ko manata rahe, to maain tera rajy israaael ke upar sada ke liye sthir karoonga" 
1Kings9:5 jaaise ki maain ne tere pita daud ko vachan diya tha, ki tere kul men israaael kee gaee par virajanevale sada bane rahenge." 
1Kings9:6 parantu yadi tum log va tumhare vansh ke log mere peechhe chalana chhod den aur meree un agyaaon aur vidhaiyon ko jo maain ne tum ko dee haai, n mane, aur jakar paraye devataon kee upasana kare aur unhen dandvat karane lage," 
1Kings9:7 to maain israaael ko is desh men se jo maain ne unako diya haai, katt daloonga aur is bhvan ko jo maain ne apane nam ke liye paavitra kiya haai, apanee drashtti se utar doonga aur sab deshaen ke logon men israaael kee upama dee jayegee aur usaka drashttant chalega." 
1Kings9:8 aur yah bhvan jo unche par rahega, to jo koi isake pas hokar chalega, vah chakit hoga, aur talee bajaaega aur ve poochhenge, ki yahova ne is desh aur is bhvan ke sath kyon aeesa kiya haai" 
1Kings9:9 tab log kahenge, ki unhon ne apane parameshvar yahova ko jo unake purakhaon ko misra desh se nikal laya tha. tajakar paraye devataon ko pakad liya, aur unako dandvat kee aur unakee upasana kee is karan yahova ne yah sab vipaattai un par dal dee." 
1Kings9:10 sulaaiman ko to yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan donon ke banane men bees varsha lag gaae. 
1Kings9:11 tab sulaaiman ne sor ke raja heeram ko jis ne usake manamane devadaroo aur sanovar kee lakadee aur sona diya tha, galeel desh ke bees nagar diae." 
1Kings9:12 jab heeram ne sor se jakar un nagaron ko dekha, jo sulaaiman ne usako diae the, tab ve usako achchhe n lage." 
1Kings9:13 tab us ne kaha, he mere bhai, ye nagar kya too ne mujhe diae haain? aur us ne unaka nam kabool desh rakha." 
1Kings9:14 aur yahee nam aj ke din tak pada haai. fir heeram ne raja ke pas satt kikkar sona bhej diya. 
1Kings9:15 raja sulaaiman ne logon ko jo begaree men rakha, isaka prayojan yah tha, ki yahova ka aur apana bhvan banaa, aur millo aur yarooshalem kee shaharapanah aur hasor, maagio aur gejer nagaron ko draddh kare." 
1Kings9:16 gejer par to misra ke raja firaun ne chaddhai karake use le liya aur ag lagakar foonk diya, aur us nagar men rahanevale kanaaniyon ko mar dalakar, use apanee bettee sulaaiman kee ranee ka nij bhag karake diya tha," 
1Kings9:17 so sulaaiman ne gejer aur neechevale bathoren," 
1Kings9:18 balat aur tamar ko jo jangal men haai, draddh kiya, ye to desh men haain." 
1Kings9:19 fir sulaaiman ke jitane bhndar ke nagar the, aur usake rathon aur savaron ke nagar, unako varan jo kuchh sulaaiman ne yarooshalem, labanon aur apane rajy ke sab deshaen men banana chaha, un sab ko us ne draddh kiya." 
1Kings9:20 aemoree, hittee, parijjee, hibbee aur yaboosee jo rah gaae the, jo israaaeliyon men ke n the," 
1Kings9:21 unake vansh jo unake bad desh men rah gaa, aur unako israaelee satyanash n kar sake, unako to sulaaiman ne das kar ke begaree men rakha, aur aj tak unako vahee dasha haai." 
1Kings9:22 parantu israaaeliyon men se sulaaiman ne kisee ko das n banaya ve to yoddha aur usake karmacharee, usake hakim, usake saradar, aur usake ratho, aur savaron ke pradhaan hue." 
1Kings9:23 jo mukhy hakim sulaaiman ke kamon ke upar tthar ke kam karanevalon par prabhuta karate the, ye panch sau pachas the." 
1Kings9:24 jab firaun kee bettee daudapur men se apane us bhvan ko a gai, jo us ne usake liye banaya tha tab us ne millo ko banaya." 
1Kings9:25 aur sulaaiman us vedee par jo us ne yahova ke liye banai thee, praati varsha men teen bar homabaali aur melabali chaddhaya karata tha aur sath hee us vedee par jo yahova ke sammukh thee, dhoop jalaya karata tha, is prakar us ne us bhvan ko taaiyar kar diya." 
1Kings9:26 fir raja sulaaiman ne aesyonageber men jo aedom desh me lal samudra ke teer aelot ke pas haai, jahaj banaae." 
1Kings9:27 aur jahajon men heeram ne apane adhaikar ke mallahon ko, jo samudra se janakaree rakhte the, sulaaiman ke sevakon ke sang bhej diya." 
1Kings9:28 unhon ne opor ko jakar vahan se char sau bees kikkar sona, raja sulaaiman ko lakar diya." 
1Kings10:1 jab shaeeba kee ranee ne yahova ke nam ke vishay sulaaiman kee keett sunee, tab vah kattnai kattnai prashnon se usakee pareeksha karane ko chal padee." 
1Kings10:2 vah to bahut bharee dal, aur masalo, aur bahut sone, aur manai se lade untt sath liye huae yarooshalem ko ai aur sulaaiman ke pas pahunchakar apane man kee sab baton ke vishay men us se baten karane lagee." 
1Kings10:3 sulaaiman ne usake sab prashnon ka uttar diya, koi bat raja kee buaddhi se aeesee bahar n rahee ki vah usako n bata saka." 
1Kings10:4 jab shaeeba kee ranee ne sulaaiman kee sab buaddhimanee aur usaka banaya hua bhvan, aur usakee mej par ka bhojan dekha," 
1Kings10:5 aur usake karmacharee kis reeti baaittte, aur usake tthanluae kis reeti khde rahate, aur kaaise kaaise kapade paahine rahate haai, aur usake pilanevale kaaise haai, aur vah kaaisee chaddhai haai, jis se vah yahova ke bhvan ko jaya karata haai, yah sab jab us ne dekha, tab vah chakit ho gai." 
1Kings10:6 tab us ne raja se kaha, tere kamon aur buaddhimanee kee jo keett maain ne apane desh men sunee thee vah sach hee haai." 
1Kings10:7 parantu jab tak maain ne ap hee akar apanee ankhon se yah n dekha, tab tak maain ne un baton kee prateet n kee, parantu isaka adha bhee mujhe n bataya gaya tha teree buddhimanee aur kalyan us keett se bhee baddhkar haai, jo maain ne sunee thee." 
1Kings10:8 dhany haain tere jan! dhany haain tere ye sevak! jo nity tere sammukh upaasthiat rahakar teree buddhi kee baten sunate haain. 
1Kings10:9 dhany haai tera parameshvar yahova! jo tujh se aeesa prasann hua ki tujhe israaael kee rajagaee par virajaman kiya yahova israaael se sada praem rakhta haai, is karan us ne tujhe nyay aur dharma karane ko raja bana diya haai." 
1Kings10:10 aur us ne raja ko aek sau bees kikkar sona, bahut sa sugandha drayy, aur maanai diya jitana sugandha drayy shaeeba kee ranee ne raja sulaaiman ko diya, utana fir kabhee naheen aya." 
1Kings10:11 fir heeram ke jahaj bhee jo opeer se sona late the, vah bahut see chandan kee lakadee aur maanai bhee laae." 
1Kings10:12 aur raja ne chandan kee lakadee se yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke liye jangale aur gavaaiyon ke liye veena aur sarangiyan banavai aeesee chandan kee lakadee aj tak fir naheen ai, aur n dikhai padee haai." 
1Kings10:13 aur shaeeba kee ranee ne jo kuchh chaha, vahee raja sulaaiman ne usakee ichchha ke anusar usako diya, fir raja sulaaiman ne usako apanee udarata se bahut kuchh diya, tab vah apane janon samet apane desh ko lautt gai." 
1Kings10:14 jo sona prati varsha sulaaiman ke pas pahuncha karata tha, usaka taul chhsau chhyaiasatt kikkar tha." 
1Kings10:15 is se aadhaik saudagaron se, aur yyopaariyon ke len den se, aur dogalee jaatiyon ke sab rajao, aur apane desh ke gavarnaro se bhee bahut kuchh milata tha." 
1Kings10:16 aur raja sulaaiman ne sona gaddhbakar do sau badee badee ddhalen banavai aek aek ddhal men chh chh sau shokel sona laga. 
1Kings10:17 fir us ne sona gaddhvakar teen sau chhottee ddhalen bhee banavai aek aek chhottee ddhal me, teen mane sona laga aur raja ne unako labanonee van nam bhvan men rakhva diya." 
1Kings10:18 aur raja ne hatheedant ka aek bada sinhasan banavaya, aur uttam kundan se maddhvaya." 
1Kings10:19 us sinhasan men chh seeaddhiyan theen aur sinhasan ka sirahana pichhadee kee or gol tha, aur baaittne ke sthan kee donon alag ttek lagee thee, aur donon ttekon ke pas ek ek sinh khda hua bana tha." 
1Kings10:20 aur chhhon seeddhiyon kee donon alang aek aek sinh khda hua bana tha, kul barah hue. kisee rajy men aeesa kabhee naheen bana" 
1Kings10:21 aur raja sulaaiman ke peene ke sab patra sone ke bane the, aur labanonee ban nam bhvan ke sab patra bhee chokhe sone ke the, chandee ka koi bhee n tha. sulaaiman ke dinon men usaka kuchh lekha n tha." 
1Kings10:22 kyonaki samudra par heeram ke jahajon ke sath raja bhee tashash ke jahaja rakhta tha, or teen teen varsha par tashash ke jahaja sona, chandee, hatheedant, bandar aur mayoor le ate the." 
1Kings10:23 is prakar raja sulaaiman, dhan aur buaddhi men prathvee ke sab rajaon se baddhkar ho gaya." 
1Kings10:24 aur samast prathvee ke log usakee buaddhi kee baten sunane ko jo parameshvar ne man men utpann kee thee, sulaaiman ka darshan pana chahate the." 
1Kings10:25 aur ve praati varsha apanee apanee bhent, arthata chandee aur sone ke patra, vasr, shasr, sugandha drayy, ghaede, aur khchchar le ate the." 
1Kings10:26 aur sulaaiman ne rath aur savar ikatthe kar lia, to usake chaudah sau rat, aur barah hajar savar hua, aur unako us ne rathon ke nagaron me, aur yarooshalem men raja ke pas tthara rakha." 
1Kings10:27 aur raja ne bahutayat ke kara, yarooshalem men chandee ko to aeesa kar diya jaaise patthr aur devadaroo ko jaaise neeche ke desh ke goolara." 
1Kings10:28 aur jo ghaede sulaaiman rakhta tha, ve misra se ate the, aur raja ke vyoparee unhen jhund jhund karake ttharaae huae dam par liya karate the." 
1Kings10:29 aek rath to chh sau shokel chandee par, aur aek ghaeda deddh sau shokel par, misra se ata tha, aur isee dam par ve hittaiyon aur aram ke sab rajaon ke liye bhee vyopaariyon ke dara ate the." 
1Kings11:1 parantu raja sulaaiman firaun kee bettee, aur bahuteree aur paraye striayon se, jo moabee, ammonee, aedomee, seedotee, aur hittee thee, praeeati karane laga." 
1Kings11:2 ve un jaatiyon kee thee, jinake vishay men yahova ne israaaeliyon se kaha tha, ki tum unake madhy men n jana, aur n ve tumhare madhy men ane paae, ve tumhara man apane devataon kee or nisandeh faerengee unheen kee praeeati men sulaaiman lipt ho gaya." 
1Kings11:3 aur usake sat sau raaniya, aur teen sau rakhealiyan ho gai theen aur usakee in striayon ne usaka man bahaka diya." 
1Kings11:4 so jab sulaaiman booddha hua, tab usakee striayon ne usaka man paraye devataon kee or bahaka diya, aur usaka man apane pita daud kee nai apane parameshvar yahova par pooree reeati se laga n raha." 
1Kings11:5 sulaaiman to seedoniyon kee ashatoret nam devee, aur ammoniyon ke milkom nam gharaanait devata ke peechhe chala." 
1Kings11:6 aur sulaaiman ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai, aur yahova ke peechhe apane pita daud kee nai pooree reeati se n chala." 
1Kings11:7 un dinon sulaaiman ne yarooshalem ke samhane ke pahad par moaabiyon ke kamosh nam gharanait devata ke liye aur ammoniyon ke molek nam gharaanait devata ke liye ek ek uncha sthan banaya. 
1Kings11:8 aur apanee sab paraye striayon ke liye bhee jo apane apane devataon ko dhoop jalateen aur baalidan karatee thee, us ne aeesa hee kiya." 
1Kings11:9 tab yahova ne sulaaiman par krodha kiya, kyonaki usaka man israaael ke parameshvar yahova se fir gaya tha jis ne do bar usako darshan diya tha." 
1Kings11:10 aur us ne isee bat ke vishay men agyaa dee thee, ki paraye devataon ke peechhe n ho lena, taubhee us ne yahova kee agyaa n manee." 
1Kings11:11 aur yahova ne sulaaiman se kaha, tujh se jo aeesa kam hua haai, aur meree bandhaai hui vacha aur dee hui veedhai too ne pooree naheen kee, is karan maain jajy ko nishchay toojh se chheenakar tere aek karmacharee ko de doonga." 
1Kings11:12 taubhee tere pita daud ke karan tere dino men to aeesa n karoonga parantu tere putra ke hath se rajy chheen loonga. 
1Kings11:13 fir bhee maain poorn rajy to n chheen loonga, parantu apane das daud ke kara, aur apane chune huae yarooshalem ke kara, maain tere putra ke hath men aek gotra chhod doonga." 
1Kings11:14 so yahova ne aedomee hadad ko jo aedomee rajavansh ka tha, sulaaiman ka shatra bana diya." 
1Kings11:15 kyonaki jab daud aedom men tha, aur yoab senapaati mare huon ko mitt dene gaya," 
1Kings11:16 yoab to samast israaael samet vahan chh maheene raha, jab tak ki us ne aedom ke sab murushaen ko nash n kar diya" 
1Kings11:17 tab hadad jo chhotta ladka tha, apane pita ke kai aek aedomee sevakon ke sang misra ko jane kee manasa se bhaga." 
1Kings11:18 aur ve midhan se hokar paran ko aa, aur paran men se kai purushaen ko sang lekar misra men firaun raja ke pas gaa, aur firaun ne usako ghar diya, aur usako bhojan milane kee agyaa dee aur kuchh boomi bhee dee." 
1Kings11:19 aur hadad par firaun kee bade anugrah kee draashtti hui, aur us ne usako apanee salee arthata tahapanes ranee kee bahin byah dee." 
1Kings11:20 aur tahapanes kee bahin se ganoobat utpann hua aur isaka doodha tahapanes ne firaun ke bhvan men chhudaya tab banoobat firaun ke bhvan men usee ke putraen ke sath rahata tha. 
1Kings11:21 jab hadad ne misra men rahate yah suna, ki daud apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya, aur yoab senapaati bhee mar gaya haai, tab us ne firaun se kaha, mujhe agyaa de ki maain apane desh ko jaun!" 
1Kings11:22 firaun ne us se kaha, kyon? mere yahan tujhe kya ghattee hui ki too apane desh ko jala jana chahata haai? us ne uttar diya, kuchh naheen hui, taubhee mujhe apashy jane de." 
1Kings11:23 fir parameshvar ne usaka aek aur shatra kar diya, arthata aelyada ke putra rajon ko, vah to apane svamee soba ke raja hadadejer ke pas se bhaga tha" 
1Kings11:24 aur jab daud ne soba ke janon ko ghaat kiya, tab rajon apane pas kai purushaen ko ikatthe karake, aek dal ka pradhaan ho gaya, aur vah daamishk ko jakar vaheen rahane aur rajy karane laga." 
1Kings11:25 aur us haani ko chhod jo hadad ne kee, rajon bhee, sulaaiman ke jeevan bhr asraaael ka shatra bana raha aur vah israaael se gharana rakhta hua aram par rajy karata tha" 
1Kings11:26 fir nabat ka aur sarooah nam aek vidhava ka putra yarobam nam aek aepraaimee saredabasee jo sulaaiman ka karmacharee tha, us ne bhee raja ke viruddh sir uttaya." 
1Kings11:27 usaka raja ke viruddh sir attane ka yah karan hua, ki sulaaiman millo ko bana raha tha or apane pita daud ke nagar ke darar band kar raha tha." 
1Kings11:28 yarobam bada hooraveer tha, aur jab sulaaiman ne javan ko dekha, ki yah parishramee ha tab us ne usako yoosufa ke gharane ke sab kam par mukhaiya ttharaya." 
1Kings11:29 unheen dinon men yarobam yarooshalem se nikalakar ja raha tha, ki shaeelobasee ahiyyah nabee, nai char oddhe huae marga par us se mila aur keval ve hee donon maaidan men the." 
1Kings11:30 apaair aahiyyah ne apanee us nai char ko le liya, aur use faadkar barah ttukade kar diae." 
1Kings11:31 tab us ne yarobam se kaha, das ttukade le le kyonaki, israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki sun, maain rajy ko sulaaiman ke hath se chheen kar das gotra tere hath men kar doonga." 
1Kings11:32 parantu mere das daud ke karan aur yarooshalem ke karan jo maain ne israaael ke sab gotraen men se chuna haai, usaka aek gotra bana rahega." 
1Kings11:33 isaka karan yah haai ki unhon ne mujhe tyag kar seedoniyon kee devee ashtoret aur moabiyon ke devata kamosha, aur ammoniyon ke devata milkom ko dandvat kee, aur mere magan par naheen chale aur jo meree drashtti men tteek haai, vah naheen kiya, aur meree vedhaiyon aur niyamon ko naheen mana jaaisa ki usake pita daud ne kiya." 
1Kings11:34 taubhee maain usake hath se poorn rajy n le loonga, parantu mera chuna hua das daud jo meree agyaaaen aur vidhaiyan manata raha, usake karan maain usako jeevan bhr pradhaan ttharaae rakoonga." 
1Kings11:35 parantu usake putra ke hath se maain rajy arthata das gotra lekar tujhe de doonga. 
1Kings11:36 aur usake putra ko maain aek gotra doonga, isaliye ki yarooshsalem arthata us nagar men jise apana nam rakhne ko maain ne chuna haai, mere das daud ka deepak mere samhane sadaaiv bana rahe." 
1Kings11:37 parantu tujhe maain tthara loonga, aur too apanee ichchha bhr israaael par rajy karega." 
1Kings11:38 aur yaadi too mere das daud kee nai meree sab agyaaae, aur mere magan par chale, aur jo kam meree drashtti men tteek haai, vahee kare, aur meree vidhaiyan aur aaaen manata rahe, to maain tere sang rahoonga, aur jis tanah maain ne daud ka gharana banaae rakha haai, vaaise hee tera bhee gharana banaae rakoonga, aur tere hath israaael ko doonga." 
1Kings11:39 is pap ke karan maain daud ke vansh ko dukh doonga, taubhee sada tak naheen." 
1Kings11:40 aur sulaaiman ne yarobam ko mar dalana chaha, parantu yarobam misra ke raja shaeeshak ke pas bhag gaya, aur sulaaiman ke marane nak vaheen raha." 
1Kings11:41 sulaaiman kee aur sab baten aur usake sab kam aur usakee buaddhimanee ka varnn, kya sulaaiman ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
1Kings11:42 sulaaiman ko yarooshalem men sab israaael par rajy karate huae chalees varsha beete. 
1Kings11:43 aur sulaaiman apane purakhaon ke sang soya, aur usako usake pita daud ke nagar men mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra rahoobiyam usake sthan par raja hua." 
1Kings12:1 rahoobiyam to shakem ko gaya, kyonaki sab israaaelee usako raja banane ke liye vaheen gaae the." 
1Kings12:2 aur jab nabat ke putra yarobam ne yah suna, jo ab tak misra men rahata tha, thyonaki yarobam sulaaiman raja ke dr ke mare bhgakar misra men rahata tha." 
1Kings12:3 so un logon ne usako bulava bheja tab yarobam aur israaael kee samast sabha rahoobiyam ke pas jakar yon kahane lagee," 
1Kings12:4 ki tere pita ne to ham logon par bharee jooa dal rakha tha, to ab too apane pita kee kaattnai seva ko, aur us bharee jooae ko, jo us ne ham par dal rakha haai, kuchh halaka kara tab ham tere adhaeen rahenge." 
1Kings12:5 us ne kaha, ubhee to jao, aur teen din ke bad mere pas fir ana. tab ve chale gae." 
1Kings12:6 tab raja rahoobiyam ne un booddhon se jo usake pita sulaaiman ke jeevan bhr usake samhane upaasthiat raha karate the sammati lee, ki is praja ko kaaisa uttar dena uchit haai, is men tum kya sammati dete ho?" 
1Kings12:7 unhon ne usako yah uttar diya, ki yadi too abhee praja ke logon ka das banakar unake adhaeen ho aur un se madhaur baten kahe, to ve sadaaiv tere adhaeen bane rahenge." 
1Kings12:8 rahoobiyam ne us sammaati ko chhod diya, jo booddhon ne usako dee thee,aur un javanon se sammati lee, jo usake sang bade huae the, aur usake sammukh upaasthiat raha karate the." 
1Kings12:9 un se us ne poochha, maain praja ke logon ko kaaisa uttar doon? us men tum kya sammaati dete ho? unho ne to mujh se kaha haai, ki jo jooa tere pita ne ham par dal rakha haai, use too halaka kara." 
1Kings12:10 javanon ne jo usake sang bade huae the usako yah uttar diya, ki un logon ne tujh se kaha haai, ki tere pita ne hamara jooa bharee kiya tha, parantu too use hamare liaee halaka kara too un se yon kahana, ki meree chhnigualiya mere pita kee kamar se bhee mottee haai." 
1Kings12:11 mere pita ne tum par jo bharee jooa rakha tha, use maain aur bhee bharee karoonga mera pita to tum ko kodon se tadna deta tha, parantu maain bichchhuon se doonga." 
1Kings12:12 teesare din, jaaise raja ne ttharaya tha, ki teesare din mere pas fir ana, vaaise hee yarobam aur samast prajagan rahoobiyam ke pas upasthiat huae." 
1Kings12:13 tab raja ne praja se kadee baten kee," 
1Kings12:14 aur booddhon kee dee hui sammaati chhodkar, javanon kee sammati ke anusar un se kaha, ki mere pita ne to tumhara jooa bharee kar diya, parantu maain use aur bhee bharee kar doonga mere pita ne to kodon se tum ko tadna dee, parantu maain tum ko bichchhuon se tadna doonga." 
1Kings12:15 so raja ne praja kee ban naheen manee, isaka karan yah haai, ki jo vachan yahova ne shaeelovasee ahiyyah ke dara nabat ke putra yarobam se kaha tha, usako poora karane ke liye us ne aeesa hee ttharaya tha." 
1Kings12:16 jab sab israaael ne dekha ki raja hamaree naheen sunata, tab ve bole, ki daud ke sath hamara kya ansha? hamara to yishau ke putra men koi bhag naheen! he israaael apane apane dere ko chale jao ab he daud, apane hee gharane kee chinta kara." 
1Kings12:17 so israaael apane apane dere ko chale gaae. keval jitane israaaelee yahooda ke nagaron men base huae the un par rahoobiyam rajy karata raha. 
1Kings12:18 tab raja rahoobiyam ne adoram ko jo sab begaron par aadhaikaree tha, bhej diya, aur sab israaaeliyon ne asako patthravah kiya, aur vah mar gaya tab rahoobiyam fauta se apane rath par chaddhkar yarooshalem ko bhag gaya." 
1Kings12:19 aur israaael daud ke gharane se fir gaya, aur aj tak fira jua haai." 
1Kings12:20 yah sunakar ki yarobam lautt aya haai, samast israaael ne usako mandlee men bulava bhejakar, poorn israaael ke upar raja niyukt kiya, aur yahooda ke gotra ko chhodkar daud ke ghaarane se koi mila n raha." 
1Kings12:21 jab raoobiyam yarooshalem ko aya, tab us ne yahooda ke poorn gharane ko, aur binyameen ke gotra ko, jo milakar aek lakh assee hajar achchhe yoddha the, ikattha kiya, ki ve israaael ke gharane ke sath ladkar sulaaiman ke putra rahoobiyam ke vash men fir rajy kar den." 
1Kings12:22 tab parameshvan ka yah vachan parameshvar ke jan shamayah ke pas pahuncha ki yahooda ke raja sulaaiman ke pu,a rahoobiyam se," 
1Kings12:23 aur yahooda aur binyameen ke sab gharane se, aur sab logon se kah, yahova yon kahata haai," 
1Kings12:24 ki apane bhai israaaeliyon par chaddhai karake yuddh n karo tum apane apane ghar lautt jao, kyonaki yah bat meree hee or se hui haai. yahova ka yah vachan manakar unhon ne usake anusar lautt jane ko apana apana marga liya." 
1Kings12:25 tab yarobam aepraaim ke pahadee desh ke shakem nagar ko draddh karake us men rahane laga fir vahanse nikalakar panooael ko bhee draddh kiya. 
1Kings12:26 tab yarobam sochane laga, ki ab rajy daud ke gharane ka ho jaaega." 
1Kings12:27 yaadi praja ke log yarooshalem men bali karane ko jaae, to unaka man apane svamee yahooda ke raja rahoogiyam kee or firega, aur ve mujhe ghaat karake yahooda ke raja rahoobiyam ke ho jaaenge." 
1Kings12:28 to raja ne sammati lekar sone ke do bachhde banaae aur logon se kaha, yarooshalem ko jana tumharee shaktai se bahar haai isaliye he israaael apane devataon ko dekho, jo numhen misra desh se dikal laae haain." 
1Kings12:29 to us ne aek bachhde ko betel, aur doosare ko dan men sthpit kiya." 
1Kings12:30 aur yah bat pap ka karan hui kyonaki log us aek ke samhane dandvat karane ko dan tak jane lage. 
1Kings12:31 aur us ne unche sthanon ke bhvan banaa, aur sab prakar ke logon men se jo leveevanshaee n the, yajak ttharaae." 
1Kings12:32 fir yarobam ne attven maheene ke pandrahaven din yahooda ke parva ke saman aek parva ihara diya, aur vedee par bali chaddhane laga is reeti us ne betel men apane banaae huae bachhdon ke liye vedee par, baali kiya, aur apane banaae huae unche sthnon ke yajakon ko betel men tthara diya." 
1Kings12:33 aur jis maheene kee us ne apane man men kalpana kee thee arthata attven maheene ke pandrahaven din ko vah betel men apanee banai hui vedee ke pas chaddh gaya. us ne israaaeliyon ke liye aek pabrva tthara diya, aur dhoop jalane ko vedee ke pas chaddh gaya." 
1Kings13:1 tab yahova se vachan pakar parameshvar ka bak jan yahooda se betel ko aya, aur yarobam dhoop jalane ke liye vedee ke pas khda tha." 
1Kings13:2 us jan ne yahova se vachan pakar vedee ke viruddh yon pukara, ki vedee, he vedee! yahova yon kahata haai, ki sun, daud ke kul men yoshaiyyah nam ek ladka utpann hoga, vah un unche sthnon ke yajakon ko jo tujh par dhoop jalate haai, tujh par bali kar dega aur tujh par panushyon kee haddiyan jalai jaengee." 
1Kings13:3 aur us ne, usee din yah kahakar us bat ka aek chi bhee bataya, ki yah vachan jo yahova ne kaha haai, isaka chi yah haai ki yah vedee fatt jaaegee, aur is par kee rakh gir jaaegee." 
1Kings13:4 tab aeesa hua ki parameshvar ke jan ka yah vachan sunakar jo us ne betel ke viruddh pukar kar kaha, yarobam ne vedee ke pas se hath baddhakar kaha, usako pad lo tab usaka hath jo usakee or baddhaya gaya tha, sookh gaya aur vah use apanee or kheench n saka." 
1Kings13:5 aur vedee fatt gai, aur us par kee rakh gir gai so vah chi poora hua, jo parameshvar ke jan ne yahova se vachan pakar kaha tha." 
1Kings13:6 tab raja ne parameshvar ke jan se kaha, apane parameshvar yahova ko mana aur mere liye praarthna kar, ki mera hath jyon ka tyo ho jaae tab parameshvar ke jan ne yahova ko manaya aur raja ka hath fir jyon ka tyon ho gaya." 
1Kings13:7 tab raja ne parameshvar ke jan se kaha, mere sang ghar chalakar apana praan ttnda kar, aur maain tujhe dan bhee doonga." 
1Kings13:8 parameshvar ke jan ne raja se kaha, chahe noo mujhe apana adha ghar bhee de, taubhee tere ghar n chaloonga aur is sthn men maain n to rottee khaunga aur n panee peeunga." 
1Kings13:9 kyonaki yahova ke vachan ke dara mujhe yon agyaa milee haai, ki n to rottee khana, aur n panee peena, aur n us marga se lauttna jis se too jaaega." 
1Kings13:10 isaliye vah us marga se jise betel ko gaya tha n lauttkar, doosare marga se chala gaya." 
1Kings13:11 betel men aek booddha nabee rahata tha, aur usake aek bette ne akar us se un sab kamon ka varnn kiya jo parameshvar ke jan ne us din betel men kiae the aur jo baten us ne raja se kahee thee, unako bhee us ne apane pita se kah sunaya." 
1Kings13:12 usake betton ne to yah dekha tha, ki parameshvar ka vah jan jo yahooda se aya tha, kis marga se chala gaya, so unake pita ne un se poochha, vah kis marga se chala gaya?" 
1Kings13:13 aur us ne apane betton se kaha, mere liye gadahe par kattee bandhaer tab anhon ne gadahe par kattee bandhae, aur vah us par chaddha," 
1Kings13:14 aur parameshvar ke jan ke peechhe jakar use aek banjavraksha ke tale baaitta hua paya aur us se moochha, parameshvar ka jo jan yahooda se aya tha, kya too vahee haai?" 
1Kings13:15 us ne kaha ha, vahee hooooo. us ne us se kaha, mere sang ghar chalakar bhojan kara." 
1Kings13:16 us ne us se kaha, maain n to tere sang lautt sakata, aur n tere sang ghar men ja sakata hoo aur n maain is sthan men tere sang rottee khaunga, va panee peeunga." 
1Kings13:17 kyonaki yahova ke vachan ke dara mujhe yah agyaa milee haai, ki vahan n to rottee khana aur n panee peena, aur jis marga se too jaaega us se n lauttna." 
1Kings13:18 us ne kaha, jaaisa too nabee haai vaaisa hee maain bhee nabee hoo aur mujh se ek doot ne yahova se vachan pakar kaha, ki us purush ko apane sang apane ghar lautta le a, ki vah rottee khaa, aur panee peee. yah us ne us se joott kaha." 
1Kings13:19 ataaev vah usake sang lautt gaya aur usake ghar men rottee khai aur manee peeya. 
1Kings13:20 aur jab ve mej par baaitte hee the, ki yahova ka vachan us nabee ke pas pahuncha, jo doosare ko lautta le aya tha." 
1Kings13:21 aur us ne parameshvar ke us jan ko jo yahooda se aya tha, pukar ke kaha, yahova yon kahata haai isaliye ki too ne yahova ka vachan n mana, aur jo agyaa tere parameshvar yahova ne tujhe dee thee use bhee naheen mana" 
1Kings13:22 parantu jis sthan ke vishay us ne tujh se kaha tha, ki us men n to rottee khana aur n panee peena, usee men too ne lautt kar rottee khai, aur panee bhee piya haai is karan toojhe apane purakhaon ke kaabirstan men mittee naheen dee jaaegee." 
1Kings13:23 jab yah kha pee chuka, tab us ne parameshvar ke us jan ke liye jisako vah lautta le aya tha gadahe par kattee bandhaai." 
1Kings13:24 jab vah marga men chal raha tha, to aek sinh use mila, aur usako mar dala, aur usakee loth marga par padee rahee, aur gadaha usake pas khda raha aur sinh bhee loth ke pas khda raha." 
1Kings13:25 jo log udhar se chale a rahe the unhon ne yah dekh kar ki marga par aek loth padee haai, aur usake pas sinh khda haai, us nagar men jakar jahan vah booddha nabee rahata tha yah samachar sunaya." 
1Kings13:26 yah sunakar us nabee ne jo usako marga par se lautta le aya tha, kaha, parameshvar ka vahee jan hoga, jis ne yahova ke vachan ke viruddh kiya tha, is karan yahova ne usako sinh ke panje men padne diya aur yahova ke us vachan ke anusar jo us ne us se kaha tha, sinh ne use faadkar mar dala hoga." 
1Kings13:27 tab us ne apane betton se kaha, mere liye gadahe par kattee bandhae jab unhon ne kattee bandhae," 
1Kings13:28 tab us ne jakar us jan kee loth marga par padee hui, aur gadahe, aur sinh donon ko loth ke pas khde huae paya, aur yah bhee ki sinh ne n to lauth ko khaya, aur n badahe ko faada haai." 
1Kings13:29 tab us booddhe nabee ne parameshvar ke jan kee loth uttakar gadahe par lad lee, aur usake liye chhatee peettne laga, aur use mittee dene ko apane nagar men lautta le gaya." 
1Kings13:30 aur us ne usakee loth ko apane kaabirstan men rakha, aur log hay, mere bhai! yah kahakar chhatee peettne lage." 
1Kings13:31 fir use mittee dekar us ne apane betton se kaha, jab maain mar jaunga tab mujhe isee kabirstan men rakhna, jis men parameshvar ka yah jan rakha gaya haai, aur meree haddiyan usee kee haddiyon ke pas dhar dena." 
1Kings13:32 kyonaki jo vachan us ne yahova se pakar betel kee vedee aur shaenmaron ke nagaron ke sab unche sthanon ke bhvanon ke viruddh pukar ke kaha haai, vah nishchay poora ho jaaega." 
1Kings13:33 isake bad yarobam apanee buree chal se n fira. us ne fir sab prakar ke logo men se unche sthanon ke yajak banaa, varan jo koi chahata tha, usaka sanskar karake, vah usako unche sthanon ka yajak hone ko tthara deta tha." 
1Kings13:34 aur yah bat yarobam ke gharane ka pap ttharee, is karan usaka vinash hua, aur vah dharatee par se nash kiya gaya." 
1Kings14:1 us samay yarobam ka betta aabiyyah rogee hua. 
1Kings14:2 tab yarobam ne apanee sree se kaha, aeesa bhesh bana ki koi tujhe pahichan n sake ki yah yarobam kee sree haai, aur shaeelo ko chalee ja, vahan to aahiyyah nabee rahata haai jis ne mujh se kaha tha ki too is praja ka raja ho jaaega." 
1Kings14:3 usake pas too das rottee, aur papaadiyan aur ek kuppee madha liye huae ja, aur vah tujhe bataega ki ladke ko kya hoga." 
1Kings14:4 yarobam kee sree ne vaaisa hee kiya, aur chalakar haeelo ko pahunchee aur ahiyyah ke ghar par ai ahiyyah ko to kuchh soojh n padta tha, kyonaki buddhape ke karan usakee ankhen dhaundhalee pad gai theen." 
1Kings14:5 aur yahova ne aahiyyah se kaha, sun yarobam kee stree tujh se apane bette ke vishay men jo rogee haai kuchh poochhne ko atee haai, too us se ye ye baten kahana vah to akar apane ko doosaree aurat banaaegee." 
1Kings14:6 jab aahiyyah ne dar men ate huae usake panv kee ahatt sunee tab kaha, he yarobam kee sree! bheetar a too apane ko kyon doosaree stree banatee haai? mujhe tere liye bharee sandesh mila haai." 
1Kings14:7 too jakar yarobam se kah ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, ki maain ne to tujh ko praja men se baddhakar apanee praja israaael par pradhaan kiya," 
1Kings14:8 aur daud ke gharane se rajy chheenakar tujh ko diya, parantu too mere das daud ke saman n hua jo meree agyaaon ko manata, aur apane poorn man se mere peechhe peechhe chalata, aur keval vahee karata tha jo meree draashtti men tteek haai." 
1Kings14:9 too ne un sabhon se baddhkar jo tujh se paahile the burai, kee haai, aur jakar paraye devata kee upasana kee aur mooraten ddhalakar banai, jis se mujhe krodhait kar diya aur mujhe to peett ke peechhe faenk diya haai." 
1Kings14:10 is karan maain yarobam ke gharane par vipaattai daloonga, varan maain yarobam ke kul men se har aek ladke ko or kya bandhaua, kya svadhaeen israaael ke madhy har bak rahanevale ko bhee nashtt kar daloonga aur jaaisa koi gobar ko tab tak uttata rahata haai jab tak vah sab utta taheen liya jata, vaaise hee maain yarobam ke gharane kee safaai kar doonga." 
1Kings14:11 yarobam ke gharane ka jo koi nagar men mar jaa, usako kutte khaaenge aur jo maaidan men mare, usako akash ke pakshaee kha jaaenge kyonki yahova ne yah kaha haai!" 
1Kings14:12 isaliye too utt aur apane ghar ja, aur nagar ke bheetar tere panv padte hee vah balak tar jaaega." 
1Kings14:13 use to samast israaelee chhatee peettkar mittee denge yarobam ke santanon men se keval usee ko kabar milegee, kyonki yarobam ke gharane men se usee men kuchh paya jata haai jo yahova israael ke prabhu kee daashtti men bhla haai." 
1Kings14:14 fir yahova israaael ke liye aek aeesa raja khda karega jo usee din yarobam ke gharane ko nash kar dalega, parantu kaba?" 
1Kings14:15 yah abhee hoga. kyonaki yahova israaael ko aeesa marega, jaaisa jal kee dhaara se narakatt hilaya jata haai, aur vah unako is achchhee boomi men se jo us ne unake purakhaon ko dee thee ukhadkar mahanad ke par tittara-bittar karega kyonki unhon ne ashora tam mooraten apane liye banakar yahova ko krodha dilaya haai." 
1Kings14:16 aur un papon ke karan jo yarobam ne kiae aur israaael se karaae the, yahova israaael ko tyag dega." 
1Kings14:17 tab yarobam kee sree bida hokar chalee aur tirajaa ko ai, aur vah bhvan kee devaddhee par jaaise hee pahunchee ki vah balak mar gaya." 
1Kings14:18 tab yahova ke vachan ke anusar jo us ne apane das ahiyyah nabee se kahalaya tha, samast israaael ne usako mittee dekar usake liye shaek manaya." 
1Kings14:19 yarobam ke aur kam arthata us ne kaaisa kaaisa yuddh kiya, aur kaaisa rajy kiya, yah sab israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men likha haai." 
1Kings14:20 yarobam bais varsha tak rajy karake apane purakhaon ke sath so gaya aur nadab nam usaka putra usake sthan par raja hua. 
1Kings14:21 aur sulaaiman ka putra rahoobiyam yahooda men rajy karane laga. rahoobiyam ikatalees varsha ka hokar rajy karane laga aur yarooshalem jisako yahova ne sare israaaelee gotraen men se apana nam rakhne ke liye chun liya tha, us nagar men vah satrah varsha tak rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam nama tha jo ammonee sree thee." 
1Kings14:22 aur yahoodee log vah karane lage jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai, aur apane purakhaon se bhee aadhaik pap kake usakee jalan bhdkai." 
1Kings14:23 unhon ne to sab unche tteelon par, aur sab hare vrakshaen ke tale, unche sthan, aur latte, aur ashora nam mooraten bana leen." 
1Kings14:24 aur unake desh men purushagamee bhee the nidan ve un jaatiyon ke se sab ghainaune kam karate the jinhen yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se nikal diya tha. 
1Kings14:25 raja sahoobiyam ke panchaven varsha men misra ka raja shaeeshak, yarooshalem par chaddhai karake," 
1Kings14:26 yahova ke bhvan kee anamol vastuen aur rajabhvan kee anamol vastuae, sab kee sab utta le gaya aur sone kee jo ddhalen sulaaiman ne banai theen sab ko vah le gaya." 
1Kings14:27 isaliye raja rahoobiyam ne unake badale peetal kee ddhalen banavai aur unhen paharuon ke pradhaanon ke hath saunp diya jo rajabhvan ke dar kee rakhvalee karate the. 
1Kings14:28 aur jab jab raja yahova ke bhvan men jata tha tab tab paharuae unhen utta le chalate, aur fir apanee kottree men lauttakar rakh dete the." 
1Kings14:29 rahoobiyam ke aur sab kam jo us ne kiae vah kya yahooda ke rajao ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain? 
1Kings14:30 rahoobiyam aur yarobam men to sada ladai hotee rahee. 
1Kings14:31 aur rahoobiyam jisakee mata nama nam aek ammonin thee, apane purakhaon ke sath so gaya aur unheen ke pas daudapur men usako mittee dee gai aur usaka putra abiyyam usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
1Kings15:1 nabat ke putra yarobam ke rajy ke attarahaven varsha men aabiyyam yahooda par rajy karane laga. 
1Kings15:2 aur vah teen varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. usakee mata ka nam maka tha jo abashaalom kee putraee thee 
1Kings15:3 vah vaaise hee papon kee leek par chalata raha jaaise usake pita ne us se paahile kiae the aur usaka man apane parameshvar yahova kee or apane paradada daud kee nai pooree reeati se siddh n tha 
1Kings15:4 taubhee daud ke karan usake parameshvar yahova ne yarooshalem men use aek deepak diya arthata usake putra ko usake bad ttharaya aur yarooshalem ko banaae rakha. 
1Kings15:5 kyonaki daud vah kiya karata tha jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha aur hittee uriyyah kee bat ke sivay aur kisee bat men yahova kee kisee agyaa se jeevan bhr kabhee n muda. 
1Kings15:6 rahoobiyam ke jeevan bhr to usake aur yarobam ke beech ladai hotee rahee. 
1Kings15:7 aabiyyam ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, kya ve yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain? aur aabiyyam kee yarobam ke sath ladai hotee rahee." 
1Kings15:8 nidan aabiyyam apane purakhaon ke sang soya, aur usako daudapur men mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra asa usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
1Kings15:9 israaael ke raja yarobam ke beesaven varsha men asa yahooda par rajy karane laga 
1Kings15:10 aur yarooshalem men ikatalees varsha tak rajy karata raha, aur usakee mata aabishaalom kee putraee maka thee." 
1Kings15:11 aur asa ne apane moolapurush daud kee nai vahee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha. 
1Kings15:12 us ne to purushagamiyon ko desh se nikal diya, aur jitanee mooraten usake purakhaon ne banai thee un sabhon ko us ne door kar diya." 
1Kings15:13 varan usakee mata maka jis ne ashora ke liye aek ghainaunee moorat banai thee usako us ne rajamata ke pad se utar diya, aur asa ne usakee moorat ko katt dala aur kidraen ke nale men foonk diya." 
1Kings15:14 parantu unche sthan to ddhaae n gaae taubhee asa ka man jeevan bhr yahova kee or pooree reeti se laga raha. 
1Kings15:15 aur jo sona chandee aur patra usake pita ne arpan kiae the, aur jo usane svayan arpan kiae the, un sabhon ko us ne yahova ke bhvan men pahuncha diya." 
1Kings15:16 aur asa aur israaael ke raja basha ke beech unake jeevan bhr yuddh hota raha 
1Kings15:17 aur israaael ke raja basha ne yahooda par chaddhai kee, aur rama ko isaliye draddh kiya ki koi yahooda ke raja asa ke pas ane jane n paae." 
1Kings15:18 tab asa ne jitana sona chandee yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke bhndaron men rah gaya tha us sab ko nikal apane karmachaariyon ke hath sonpakar, daamishkavasee aram ke raja benhadad ke pas jo hejyon ka pota aur tabirmmon ka putra tha bhejakar yah kaha, ki jaaisa mere aur tere pita ke madhy men vaaisa hee mere aur tere madhy bhee vacha bandhaee jaae" 
1Kings15:19 dek, maain tere pas chandee sone kee bhentt bhejata hoo, isaaliye a, israaael ke raja basha ke sath kee apanee vacha ko ttal de, ki vah mere pas se chala jaae." 
1Kings15:20 raja asa kee yah bat manakar benhadad ne apane dalon ke pradhaanon se israaaelee nagaron par chaddhai karavakar iyyon, dan, abelvetmaka aur samast kinneret ko aur naptalee ke samast desh ko poora jeet liya." 
1Kings15:21 yah sunakar basha ne rama ko draddh karana chhod diya, aur tirsa men rahane laga." 
1Kings15:22 tab raja asa ne sare yahooda men prachar karavaya aur koi anasuna n raha, tab ve rama ke patthron aur lakadee ko jin se basa use draddh karata tha utta le gaa, aur un se raja asa ne binyameen ke geba aur mispa ko draddh kiya." 
1Kings15:23 asa ke aur kam aur usakee veerata aur jo kuchh us ne kiya, aur jo nagar us ne draddh kia, yah sab kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
1Kings15:24 parantu usake buddhape men to use panvon ka rog lag gaya. nidan asa apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya, aur use usake moolapurush daud ke nagar men unheen ke pas pittee dee gai aur usaka putra yahoshaapat usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
1Kings15:25 yahooda ke raja asa ke doosare varsha men yarobam ka putra nadab israaael par rajy karane laga aur do varsha tak rajy karata raha. 
1Kings15:26 us ne vah kam kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha aur apane pita ke marga par vahee pap karata hua chalata raha jo us ne israael se karavaya tha. 
1Kings15:27 nadab sab israaael samet palishtaiyon ke desh ke gibbaton nagar ko ghore tha. aur ussakar ke gotra ke aahiyyah ke putra basha ne usake viruddh rajadraeh kee goshttee karake gibbaton ke pas usako mar dala. 
1Kings15:28 aur yahooda ke raja asa ke teesare varsha men basha ne nadab ko mar dala, aur usake sthan par raja ban gaya." 
1Kings15:29 raja hote hee basha ne yarobam ke samast gharane ko mar dala us ne yarobam ke vansh ko yahan tak nashtt kiya ki aek bhee jeevit n raha. yah sab yahova ke us vachan ke anusar hua jo us ne apane das shaeelovasee ahiyyah se kahavaya tha. 
1Kings15:30 yah is karan hua ki yarobam ne svayan pap kia, aur israaael se bhee karavaae the, aur us ne israaael ke parameshvar yahova ko krodhait kiya tha." 
1Kings15:31 nadab ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, vah kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak pen naheen likhe haain?" 
1Kings15:32 asa aur israaael ke raja basha ke madhy men to unake jeevan bhr yuddh hota raha. 
1Kings15:33 yahooda ke raja asa ke teesare varsha men aahiyyah ka putra basha, tirsa men samast israaael par rajy karane laga, aur chaubees varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
1Kings15:34 aur us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, aur yarobam ke marga par vahee pap karata raha jise us ne hasraaael se karavaya tha." 
1Kings16:1 aur basha ke vishay yahova ka yah vachan hananee ke putra yehoo ke pas pahuncha," 
1Kings16:2 ki maain ne tujh ko mittee par se uttakar apanee praja israaael ka pradhaan kiya, parantu too yarobam kee see chal chalata aur meree praja israaael se aeese pap karata aya haai jin se ve mujhe krodha dilate haain." 
1Kings16:3 sun, maain basha aur usake gharane kee pooree reeti se safaai kar doonga aur tere gharane ko nabat ke putra yarobam ke saman kar doonga." 
1Kings16:4 basha ke ghar ka jo koi nagar men mar jaa, usako kutte kha dalenge, aur usaka jo koi maaidan men mar jaa, usako akash ke pakshaee kha dalenge." 
1Kings16:5 basha ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, aur usakee veerata yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
1Kings16:6 nidan basha apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur tirsa men use mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra aela usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
1Kings16:7 yahova ka jo vachan hananee ke putra yehoo ke dara basha aur usake gharane ke viruddh aya, vah n keval un sab buraiyon ke karan aya jo us ne yarobam ke gharane ke saman hokar yahova kee draashtti men kiya tha aur apane kamon se usako krodhait kiya, varan is karan bhee aya, ki us ne usako mar dala tha." 
1Kings16:8 yahooda ke raja asa ke chhbbeesave varsha men basha ka putra aela tirsa men israaael par rajy karane laga, aur do varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
1Kings16:9 jab vah tirsa men arsa nam bhndaree ke ghar men jo usake tirsavale bhvan ka pradhaan tha, daroo peekar matavala ho gaya tha, tab usake jimraee nam aek karmacharee ne jo usake adho rathon ka pradhaan tha," 
1Kings16:10 rajadraeh kee goshttee kee aur bheetar jakar usako mar dala, aur usake sthan par raja ban gaya. yah yahooda ke raja asa ke sattaisaven varsha men hua." 
1Kings16:11 aur jab vah rajy karane laga, tab gaee par baaittte hee us ne basha ke poore gharane ko mar dala, varan us ne n to usake kuttumbaiyon aur n usake mitraen men se aek ladke ko bhee jeeavit chhoda." 
1Kings16:12 is reeati yahova ke us vachan ke anusar jo us ne yehoo nabee ke dara basha ke viruddh kaha tha, jimraee ne basha ka samast gharana nashtt kar diya." 
1Kings16:13 isaka karan basha ke sab pap aur usake putra aela ke bhee pap the, jo unhon ne svayan ap karake aur israaael se bhee karava ke israaael ke parameshvar yahova ko yyarth baton se krodha dilaya tha." 
1Kings16:14 aela ke aaair sab kam jo us ne kia, vah kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men nahee likhe haain." 
1Kings16:15 yahooda ke raja asa ke sattaisaven varsha men jimraee tirsa men rajy karane laga, aur tirsa men sat din tak rajy karata raha. us samay log palishtaiyon ke desh gibbaton ke viruddh dere kiae huae the." 
1Kings16:16 to jab un dere lagaae huae logon ne suna, ki jimraee ne rajadraeh kee goshttee karake raja ko mar dala, tab usee din samast israaael ne omraee nam pradhaan senapati ko chhavanee men israaael ka raja banaya." 
1Kings16:17 tab omraee ne samast israaael ko sang le gibbaton ko chhodkar tirsa ko ghor liya. 
1Kings16:18 jab jimraee ne dekha, ki nagar le liya gaya haai, tab rajabhvan ke gummatt men jakar rajabhvan men ag laga dee, aur usee men svayan jal mara." 
1Kings16:19 yah usake papon ke karan hua kyonki us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, kyoki vah yarobam kee see chal aur usake kiae hooae aur israaael se karavaae huae pap kee leek par chala." 
1Kings16:20 jimraee ke aur kam aur jo rajadraeh kee goshttee us ne kee, yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
1Kings16:21 tab israaaelee praja ke do bhag kiae gaa, praja ke adho log to tibnee nam geenat ke putra ko raja karane ke liye usee ke peechhe ho lia, aur adho omraee ke peechhe ho liae." 
1Kings16:22 ant men jo log omraee ke peechhe huae the ve un par prabal huae jo geenat ke putra tibnee ke peechhe ho liae the, isaaliye tibnee mara gaya aur omraee raja ban gaya." 
1Kings16:23 yahooda ke raja asha ke ikateesaven varsha men omraee israaael par rajy karane laga, aur barah varsha tak rajy karata raha usane chhvarsha to tirsa men rajy kiya." 
1Kings16:24 aur us ne shamer se shaemaron pahad ko do kikkar chandee men mol lekar, us par aek nagar basaya aur apane basaae huae nagar ka nam pahad ke maalik shomer ke nam par shaemaron rakha." 
1Kings16:25 aur omraee ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha varan un sabhon se bhee jo usase paahile the aadhaik burai kee. 
1Kings16:26 vah nabat ke putra yarobam kee see sab chal chala, aur usake sab papon ke anusar jo us ne israaael se karavaae the jisake karan israaael ke parameshvar yahova ko unhon ne apane yyarth kamanse krodha dilaya tha." 
1Kings16:27 omraee ke aur kam jo us ne kia, aur jo veerata us ne dikhai, yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
1Kings16:28 nidan omraee apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur shaemaron men usako mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra ahab usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
1Kings16:29 yahooda ke raja asa ke adteesaven varsha men omraee ka putra ahab israaael par rajy karane laga, aur israaael par shaemaron men bais parsha tak rajy karata raha." 
1Kings16:30 aur omraee ke putra ahab ne un sab se adhaik jo us se pahile the, vah karma kiae jo yahova kee drashtti men bure the." 
1Kings16:31 us ne to nabat ke putra yarobam ke papon men chalana halakee see bat janakar, seedoniyon ke raja etabal kee bettee ijebel ko byah kar bal devata kee upasana kee aur usako dandvat kiya." 
1Kings16:32 aur us ne bal ka aek bhvan shaemaron men banakar us men bal kee aek vedee banai. 
1Kings16:33 aur ahab ne aek ashora bhee banaya, varan us ne un sab israaaelee rajaon se baddhkar jo us se paahile the israaael ke parameshvar yahova ko krodha dilane ke kam kiae." 
1Kings16:34 usake dinon men betelavasee heeel ne yareeho ko fir basaya jab us ne usakee nev dalee tab usaka jetta putra abeeram mar gaya, aur jab us ne usake faattk khde kiae tab usaka lahura putra sagoob mar gaya, yah yahova ke us vachan ke anusar hua, jo us ne noon ke putra yahoshoo ke dara kahalavaya tha." 
1Kings17:1 aur tishabee aeliyyah jo gilad ke paraeasiyon men se tha us ne ahab se kaha, israaael ka parameshva yahova jisake sammukh maain upasthit rahata hoo, usake jeevan kee shapath in vashan men mere bina kahe, n to menh barasega, aur n os padegee." 
1Kings17:2 tab yahova ka yah vachan usake pas pahuncha," 
1Kings17:3 ki yahan se chalakar poorab or mukh karake kareet nam nale pen jo yaradan ke samhane haai chhpai ja. 
1Kings17:4 usee nale ka panee too piya kar, aur maain ne kauvon ko agyaa dee haai ki ve toojhe vahan khailaen." 
1Kings17:5 yahova ka yah vachan manakar vah yaradan ke samhane ke kareet nam nale men jakar chhpai raha. 
1Kings17:6 aur sabere aur sanjh ko kauve usake pas rottee aur mans laya karate the aur vah nale ka panee piya karata tha. 
1Kings17:7 kuchh dinon ke bad us desh men vashara n hone ke karan nala sookh gaya. 
1Kings17:8 tab yahova ka yah vachan usake pas pahuncha," 
1Kings17:9 ki chalakar seedon ke sarapat nagar men jakar vaheen rah sun, maain ne vahan kee aek vidhava ko tere khailane kee agyaa dee haai." 
1Kings17:10 so vah vahan se chal diya, aur sarapat ko gaya nagar ke faattk ke pas pahunchakar us ne kya dekha ki, aek vidhava lakadee been rahee haai, usako bulakar us ne kaha, kisee patra men mere peene ko thoda panee le a." 
1Kings17:11 jab vah lene ja rahee thee, to us ne use pukar ke kaha apane hath men aek ttukada rottee bhee mere pas letee a." 
1Kings17:12 us ne kaha, tere parameshvar yahova ke jeevan kee shapath mere pas ek bhee rottee naheen haai keval ghade men mutthee bhr maaida aur kuppee men thoda sa tel haai, aur maain do ek lakadee beenakar liae jatee hoo ki apane aur apane bette ke liye use pakau, aur ham use khae, fir mar jaen." 
1Kings17:13 aeliyyah ne us se kaha, mat dra jakar apanee bat ke anusar kar, parantu paahile mere liye aek chhottee see rottee banakar mere pas le a, fir isake bad apane aur apane bette ke liye banana." 
1Kings17:14 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki jab tak yahova boomi par menh n barasaaega tab tak n to us ghade ka maaida chukega, aur n us kuppee ka tel ghattega." 
1Kings17:15 tab vah chalee gai, aur aeliyyah ke vachan ke anusar kiya, tab se vah aur sree aur usaka gharana bahut din tak khate rahe." 
1Kings17:16 yahova ke us vachan ke anusar jo us ne aeliyyah ke dara kaha tha, n to us ghade ka maaida chuka, aur n us kuppee ka tel ghatt gaya." 
1Kings17:17 in baton ke bad us sree ka betta jo ghar kee svaminee thee, rogee hua, aur usaka rog yahan tak baddha ki usaka sans lena band ho gaya." 
1Kings17:18 tab vah aeliyyah se kahane lagee, he parameshvar ke jan! mera tujh se kya kama? kya too isaaliye mere yahan aya haai ki mere bette kee mratyu ka karan ho aur mere pap ka smaran dilaae?" 
1Kings17:19 us ne us se kaha apana betta mujhe de tab vah use usakee god se lekar us attaree par le gaya jahan vah svayan rahata tha, aur apanee khatt par litta diya." 
1Kings17:20 tab us ne yahova ko pukarakar kaha, he mere parameshvar yahova! kya too is vidhava ka betta mar dalakar jisake yahan maain ttkai hoo, is par bhee vipaattai le aya haai?" 
1Kings17:21 tab vah balak par teen bar pasar gaya aur yahova ko pukarakar kaha, he mere parameshvar yahova! is balak ka praan is men fir dal de." 
1Kings17:22 aeliyyah kee yah bat yahova ne sun lee, aur balak ka praan us men fir a gaya aur vah jee utta." 
1Kings17:23 tab aeliyyah balak ko attaree par se neeche ghar men le gaya, aur aeliyyah ne yah kahakar usakee mata ke hath men saunp diya, ki dekh tera betta jeevit haai." 
1Kings17:24 sree ne aeliyyah se kaha, ab mujhe nishchay ho gaya haai ki too parameshvar ka jan haai, aur yahova ka jo vachan tere munh se nikalata haai, vah sach hota haai." 
1Kings18:1 bahut dinon ke bad, teesare varsha men yahova ka yah vachan aeliyyah ke pas pahuncha, ki jakar apane apap ko ahab ko dikha, aur maain boomi par menh barasa doonga." 
1Kings18:2 tab aeliyyah apane ap ko ahab ko dikhane gaya. us samay shaemaron men akal bharee tha. 
1Kings18:3 isaliye ahab ne obadhah ko jo usake gharane ka deevan tha bulavaya. 
1Kings18:4 obadhah to yahova ka bhy yahan tak manata tha ki jab ijaebel yahova ke naabiyon ko nash karatee thee, tab obadhah ne aek sau nabiyon ko lekar pachasa-pachas karake gufaaon men chhpai rakha aur ann jal dekar unaka palana-poshan karata raha." 
1Kings18:5 aur ahab ne obadhah se kaha, ki desh men jal ke sab soton aur sab nadiyon ke pas ja, kadachit itanee ghaas mile ki ham ghodon aur khchcharon ko jeeavit bacha sake," 
1Kings18:6 aur hamare sab pashu n mar jaaen. aur unhon ne apas men desh bantta ki us men hokar chalen aek or ahab aur doosaree or obadhah chala. 
1Kings18:7 obadhah marga men tha, ki aeliyyah usako mila use charanh kar vah munh ke bal gira, aur kaha, he mere prabhu aeliyyah, kya too haai?" 
1Kings18:8 us ne kaha han maain hee hoo jakar apane svamee se kah, ki eliyyah mila haai." 
1Kings18:9 us ne kaha, maain ne aeesa kya pap kiya haai ki too mujhe marava dalane ke liye ahab ke hath karana chahata haai?" 
1Kings18:10 tere parameshvar yahova ke jeevan kee shapath koi aeesee jati va rajy nahee, jis men mere svamee ne tujhe ddoonddhne ko n bheja ho, aur jab un logon ne kaha, ki vah yahan naheen haai, tab us ne us rajy va jati ko isakee shapath khailai ki aeliyyah naheen mila." 
1Kings18:11 aur ab too kahata haai ki jakar apane svamee se kah, ki aeliyyah mila!" 
1Kings18:12 fir jyon hee maain tere pas se chala jaunga, tyon hee yahova ka atma tujhe n jane kahan utta le jaaega, so jab maain jakar ahab ko bataunga, aur too use n milega, tab vah mujhe mar dalega parantu maain tera das apane ladkapan se yahova ka bhy manata aya hoo!" 
1Kings18:13 kya mere prabhu ko yah naheen bataya gaya, ki jab ijaebel yahova ke naabiyon ko ghaat karatee thee tab maain ne kya kiya? ki yahova ke nabiyon men se aek sau lekar pachaya-pachay karake gufaaon men chhpai rakha, aur unhen ann jal dekar palata raha." 
1Kings18:14 fir ab too kahata haai, jakar apane svamee se kah, ki aeliyyah mila haai! tab vah mujhe ghaat karega." 
1Kings18:15 aeliyyah ne kaha, senaon ka yahova jisake samhane maain rahata hoo, usake jeevan kee shapath aj maain apane ap ko use dikhaunga." 
1Kings18:16 tab obadhah ahab se milane gaya, aur usako bata diya, so ahab aeliyyah se milane chala." 
1Kings18:17 aeliyyah ko dekhte hee ahab ne kaha, he israaael ke satanevale kya too hee haai?" 
1Kings18:18 us ne kaha, maain ne israael ko kashtt naheen diya, parantu too hee ne aur tere pita ke gharane ne diya haai kyonki tum yahova kee agyaao ko ttalakar bal devataon kee upasana karane lage." 
1Kings18:19 ab doot bhejakar sare israaael ko aur bal ke saddhe char sau nabiyon aur ashora ke char sau naabiyon ko jo ijaebel kee mej par khate haai, mere pas kamrmel parvat par ikattha kar le." 
1Kings18:20 tab ahab ne sare israaaeliyon ko bula bheja aur naabiyon ko kamrmel parvat par ikattha kiya. 
1Kings18:21 aur aeliyyah sab logon ke pas akar kahane laga, tum kab tak do vicharon men lattke rahoge, yadi yahova parameshvar ho, to usake peechhe ho leoe aur yaadi bal ho, to usake peechhe ho leo. logon ne usake uttar men aek bhee bat n kahee." 
1Kings18:22 tab aeliyyah ne logon se kaha, yahova ke nabiyon men se keval maain hee rah gaya hoo aur bal ke nabee saddhe char sau manushy haain." 
1Kings18:23 isaliye do bachhde lakar hamen diae jaae, aur ve aek apane liye chunakar use ttukade ttukade kattkar lakadee par rakh de, aur kuchh ag n lagaaen aur maain doosare bachhde ko taaiyar karake lakadee par rakoonga, aur kuchh ag n lagaunga." 
1Kings18:24 tab tum to apane davata se praarthna karana, aur maain yahova se praarthna karoonga, aur jo ag girakar uttar de vahee parameshvar tthare. tab sab log bol utte, achchhee bata." 
1Kings18:25 aur aeliyyah ne bal ke nabiyon se kaha, pahile tum aek bachhda chunakar taaiyar kar lo, kyonki tum to bahut ho tab apane devata se praarthna karana, parantu ag n lagana." 
1Kings18:26 tab unhon ne us bachhde ko jo unhen diya gaya tha lekar taaiyar kiya, aur bhor se lekar dopahar tak vah yah kahakar bal se praarthna karate rahe, ki he bal hamaree sun, he bal hamaree sun! parantu n koi shabd aur n koi uttar denevala hua. tab ve apanee banai hui vedee par uchhlane koodane lage." 
1Kings18:27 dopahar ko aeliyyah ne yah kahakar unaka ttttha kiya, ki unche shabd se pukaro, vah to devata haai vah to dhyan lagaae hoga, va kaheen gaya hoga va yatra men hoga, va ho sakata haai ki sota ho aur use jagana chahiae." 
1Kings18:28 aur unhon ne bade shabd se pukar pukar ke apanee reeti ke anusar chhuriyon aur baarchhrien se apane apane ko yahan tak ghaayal kiya ki lohoo luhan ho gaae.
