1Kings18:29 ve dopahar bhr hee kya, varan bhentt chaddhane ke samay tak naboovat karate rahe, parantu koi shabd sun n pada aur n to kisee ne uttar diya aur n kan lagaya." 
1Kings18:30 tab aeliyyah ne sab logon se kaha, mere nikatt ao aur sab log usake nikatt aae. tab us ne yahova kee vedee kee jo girai gai thee marammat kee." 
1Kings18:31 fir aeliyyah ne yakoob ke putraen kee ginatee ke anusar jisake pas yahova ka yah pachan aya tha," 
1Kings18:32 ki tera nam israaael hoga, barah patthr chhantte, aur un patthron se yahova ke nam kee aek vedee banai aur usake charon or itana bada aek gadha khod diya, ki us men do saa beej sama sake." 
1Kings18:33 tab us ne vedee par lakadee ko sajaya, aur bachhde ko ttukade ttukade kattkar lakadee par dhar diya, aur kaha, char ghade panee bhr ke homabaali, pashu aur lakadee par undel do." 
1Kings18:34 tab us ne kaha, doosaree bar vaaisa hee karo tab logon ne doosaree bar vaaisa hee kiya. fir us ne kaha, teesaree bar karo tab logon ne teesaree bar bhee vaaisa hee kiya." 
1Kings18:35 aur jal vedee ke charon or bah gaya, aur gadhe ko bhee us ne jal se bhr diya." 
1Kings18:36 fir bhentt chaddhane ke samay aeliyyah nabee sameep jakar kahane laga, he ibraaheem, isahak aur israaael ke parameshvar yahova! aj yah pragatt kar ki israaael men too hee parameshvar haai, aur maain tera das hoo, aur maain ne ye sab kam tajh se vachan pakar kiae haain." 
1Kings18:37 he yahava! meree sun, meree sun, ki ye log jan len ki he yahova, too hee parameshvar haai, aur too hee unaka man lautta leta haai." 
1Kings18:38 tab yahova kee ag akash se pragatt hui aur homabaali ko lakadee aur patthron aur dhooli samet bhsm kar diya, aur gadhe men ka jal bhee sukha diya." 
1Kings18:39 yah dekh sab log munh ke bal girakar bol utte, yahova hee parameshvar haai, yahova hee parameshvar haai" 
1Kings18:40 aeliyyah ne un se kaha, bal ke naabiyon ko pakad lo, un men se aek bhee choottte n paae tab unhon ne unako pakad liya, aur aeliyyah ne unhen neeche kishaen ke nale men le jakar mar dala." 
1Kings18:41 fir aeliyyah ne ahab se kaha, uttkar kha pee, kyonki bharee vashara kee sanasanahatt sun padtee haai." 
1Kings18:42 tab ahab khane peene chala gaya, aur aeliyyah kamrmel kee chottee par chaddh gaya, aur boomi par gir kar apana munh ghauttnon ke beech kiya." 
1Kings18:43 aur us ne apane sevak se kaha, chaddhkar samudra kee or draashtti kar dek, tab us ne chaddhkar dekha aur lauttkar kaha, kuchh naheen deekhta. aeliyyah ne kaha, fir sat bar ja." 
1Kings18:44 sataveen bar us ne kaha, dekh samudra men se manushy ka hath sa aek chhotta adal utt raha haai. aeliyyah ne kaha, ahab ke pas jakar kah, ki rath jutava kar neeche ja, kaheen aeesa n ho ki noo vashara ke karan ruk jaae." 
1Kings18:45 thodee hee der men akash vayu se udai hui ghattao, aur andhaee se kala ho gaya aur bhree vashara hone lagee aur ahab savar hokar yijrael ko chala." 
1Kings18:46 tab yahova kee shaaktai aeliyyah par aeesee hui ki vah kamar bandhakar ahab ke age age yijrael tak daudta chala gaya. 
1Kings19:1 tab ahab ne ijaebel ko aeliyyah ke sab kam vistar se bataae ki us ne sab nabiyon ko talavar se kis prakar mar dala. 
1Kings19:2 tab ijaebel ne aeliyyah ke pas aek doot ke dara kahala bheja, ki yadi maain kal isee samay tak tera praan unaka sa n kar daloon to devata mere sath vaaisa hee varan us se bhee adhaik karen." 
1Kings19:3 yah dekh aeliyyah apana praan lekar bhaga, aur yahooda ke beshba ko pahunchakar apane sevak ko vaheen chhod diya." 
1Kings19:4 aur ap jangal men aek din ke marga par jakar aek jha ke ped ke tale baaitt gaya, vahan us ne yah kah kar apanee mratyu mangee ki he yahova bas haai, ab mera praan le le, kyonaki maain apane purakhaon se achchha naheen hoo." 
1Kings19:5 chah jha ke ped tale lettkar so gaya aur dekho aek doot ne use chookar kaha, uttkar kha." 
1Kings19:6 us ne draashtti karake kya dekha ki mere sirahane patthron par pako ui ek rottee, aur ek surahee panee dhara haai tab us ne khaya aur piya aur fir lett gaya." 
1Kings19:7 doosaree bar yahova ka doot aya aur use chookar kaha, uttkar kha, kyonki tujhe bahut bharee yatra karanee haai." 
1Kings19:8 tab us ne uttkar khaya piya aur usee bhojan se bal pakar chalees din rat chalate chalate parameshvar ke parvat horeb ko pahuncha. 
1Kings19:9 vahan vah aek gufaa men jakar ttkai aur yahova ka yah vachan usake pas pahuncha, ki he aeliyyah tera yahan kya kama?" 
1Kings19:10 un ne uttar diya senaon ke parameshvar yahova ke nimitt mujhe badee jalan hui haai, kyoki israaealiyon ne teree vacha al dee, teree bediyon ko gira diya, aur tere nabiyon ko talavar se ghaat kiya haai, aur maain hee akela rah gaya hoo aur ve mere praanon ke bhee khojee haain." 
1Kings19:11 us ne kaha, nikalakar yahova ke sammukh parvat par khda ho. aur yahova pas se hokar chala, aur yahova ke samhane ek badee prachand andhaee se pahad fattne aur chattanen toottne lagee, taubhee yahova us andhaee men n tha fir andhaee ke bad boonidol hooa, taubhee yahova us boonidol men n tha." 
1Kings19:12 fir boonidol ke bad ag dikhai dee, taubhee yahova us ag men n tha fir ag ke bad aek daba hua dhaeema shabd sunai diya." 
1Kings19:13 yah sunate hee aeliyyah ne apana munh char se ddhanpa, aur bahar jakar gufaa ke dar par khda hua. fir aek shabd use sunai diya, ki he aeliyyah tera yahan kya kama?" 
1Kings19:14 us ne kaha, mujhe senaaun ke parameshvar yahova ke nimitt badee jalan hui, kyonaki israaealiyon ne teree vacha ttal dee, aur teree vediyon ko gira diya haai aur tere nabiyon ko talavar se ghaat kiya haai aur maain hee akela rah gaya hoo aur ve mere praanon ke bhee khojee haain." 
1Kings19:15 yahova ne us se kaha, lauttkar damishk ke jangal ko ja, aur vahan pahunchakar aram ka raja hone ke liye hajaael ka," 
1Kings19:16 aur israaael ka raja hone ko nimashaee ke pote yehoo ka, aur apane sthan par nabee hone ke liye abelamahola ke shaapat ke putra aeleesha ka aabhaishok karana." 
1Kings19:17 aur hajaael kee talavar se jo koi bach jaae usako yehoo mar dalega aur jo koi yehoo kee talavar se bach jaae usako aeleesha mar dalega. 
1Kings19:18 taubhee maain sat hajar israaaeliyon ko bacha rakoonga. ye to ve sab haai, jinhon ne n to bal ke age ghauttne tteke, aur n munh se use chooma haai." 
1Kings19:19 tab vah vahan se chal diya, aur shaapat ka putra aeleesha use mila jo barah jodee baail apane age kiae huae ap barahaveen ke sath hokar hal jot raha th. usake pas jakar aeliyyah ne apanee char us par dal dee." 
1Kings19:20 tab vah baailon ko chhodkar aeliyyah ke peechhe dauda, aur kahane laga, mujhe apane mata-apita ko choomane de, tab maain tere peechhe chaloonga. us ne kaha, lautt ja, maain ne tujh se kya kiya haai?" 
1Kings19:21 tab vah usake peechhe se lautt gaya, aur aek jodee baail lekar baali kia, aur baailon ka saman jalakar unaka mans paka ke apane logon ko de diya, aur unhon ne khaya tab vah kamar bandhakar aeliyyah ke peechhe chala, aur usakee seva tthal karane laga." 
1Kings20:1 aur aram ke raja benhadad ne apanee saree sena ikatthee kee, aur usake sath battees raja aur ghaede aur rath the unhen sang lekar us ne shaemaron par chaddhai kee, aur use ghor ke usake viruddh lada." 
1Kings20:2 aur us ne nagar men israaael ke raja ahab ke pas dooton ko yah kahane ke liye bheja, ki benhadad tujh se yon kahata haai," 
1Kings20:3 ki tera chandee sona mera haai, aur teree striayon aur ladkebalon men jo jo uttam haain vah bhee sab mere haain." 
1Kings20:4 israaael ke raja ne usake pas kahala bheja, he mere prabhu! he raja! tere vachan ke anusar maain aur mera jo kuchh haai, sab tera haai." 
1Kings20:5 unheen dooton ne fir akar kaha benhadad tujh se yon kahata haai, ki maain ne tere pas yah kahala bheja tha ki tujhe apanee chandee sona aur striayan aur balak bhee mujhe dene padenge." 
1Kings20:6 parantu kal isee samay maain apane karmachaariyon ko tere pas bhejoonga aur ve tere aur tere karmachariyon ke dharon men ddoonddh-ddhanddh karenge, aur teree jo jo manabhavanee vastuen nikalen unhen ve apane apane hath men lekar aaenge." 
1Kings20:7 tab israaael ke raja ne apane desh ke sab puraaniyon ko bulavakar kaha, soch vichar karo, ki vah manushy hamaree hani hee ka abhailashaee haai us ne mujh se meree striaya, balak, chandee sona manga bheja haai, aur maain ne inkar n kiya." 
1Kings20:8 tab sab puraniyon ne aur sab sadhaaran logon ne us se kaha, usakee n sunana aur n manana." 
1Kings20:9 tab raja ne benhadad ke dooton se kaha, mere prabhu raja se meree or se kaho, jo kuuchh too ne pahile apane das se chaha tha vah to maain karoonga, parantu yah mujh se n hoga. tab benhadad ke dooton ne jakar use yah uttar suna diya." 
1Kings20:10 tab benhadad ne ahab ke pas kahala bheja, yadi shaemaron men itanee dhooli nikale ki mere sab peechhe chalaneharon kee mutthee bhr kar att jaae to devata mere sath aeesa hee varan is se bhee aadhaik karen." 
1Kings20:11 israaael ke raja ne uttar dekar kaha, us se kaho, ki jo hathaiyar bandhata ho vah usakee nai n foole jo unhen utarata ho." 
1Kings20:12 yah vachan sunate hee vah jo aur rajaon samet deron men pee raha tha, us ne apane karmachaariyon se kaha, panati bandhae, tab unhon ne nagar ke viruddh panti bandhaee." 
1Kings20:13 tab aek nabee te israaael ke raja ahab ke pas jakar kaha, yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, yah badee bheed jo too ne dekhee haai, us sab ko maain aj tere hath men kar doonga, is se too jan lega, ki maain yahova hoo." 
1Kings20:14 ahab ne poochha, kis ke dara? us ne kaha yahova yon kahata haai, ki pradeshaen ke haakimon ke sevakon ke dara! fir us ne poochha, yuddh ko kaun arambh kare? us ne uttar diya, too hee." 
1Kings20:15 tab us ne pradeshaen ke hakimon ke sevakon kee ginatee lee, aur ve do sau battees nikale aur unake bad us ne sab israaaelee logon kee ginatee lee, aur ve sat hajar nikale." 
1Kings20:16 ye dopahar ko nikal gaa, us samay benhadad apane sahayak batteeson rajaon samet deron men daroo peekar matavala ho raha tha." 
1Kings20:17 pradeshaen ke hakimon ke sevak pahile nikale. tab benhadad ne doot bheje, aur unhon ne us se kaha, shaemaron se kuchh manushy nikale ate haain." 
1Kings20:18 us ne kaha, chahe ve mel karane ko nikale ho, chahe ladne ko, taubhee unhen jeevit hee pakad lao." 
1Kings20:19 tab pradeshaen ke hakimon ke sevak aur unake peechhe kee sena ke sipahee nagar se nikale. 
1Kings20:20 taur ve apane apane samhane ke purush ko parane lage aur aramee bhage, aur israaael ne unaka peechha kiya, aur aram ka raja benhadad, savaron ke sang ghaede par chaddha, aur bhagakar bach gaya." 
1Kings20:21 tab israaael ke raja ne bhee nikalakar ghaedon aur rathon ko mara, aur araamiyon ko badee mar se mara." 
1Kings20:22 tab us nabee ne israaael ke raja ke pas jakar kaha, jakar ladai ke liye apane ko draddh kar, aur sachet hokar soch, ki kya karana haai, kyonki naye varsha ke lagate hee aram ka raja fir tujh par chaddhai karega." 
1Kings20:23 tab aram ke raja ke karmachaariyon ne us se kaha, un logon ka devata pahadee devata haai, is karan ve ham par prabal huae isaliye ham un se chauras boomi par laden to nishchay ham un par prabal ho jaaenge." 
1Kings20:24 aur yah bhee kam kar, arthata sab rajaon ka pad le le, aur unake sthan par senapaatiyon ko tthara de." 
1Kings20:25 fir aek aur sena jo teree us sena ke barabar ho jo nashtt ho gai haai, ghaede ke badale ghaeda, aur rath ke badale rat, apane liye gin le tab ham chauras boomi par un se lade, aur nishchay un par prabal ho jaaenge. unakee yah sammaati manakar benhadad ne vaaisa hee kiya." 
1Kings20:26 aur naye varsha ke lagate hee benhadad ne araamiyon ko ikattha kiya, aur israaael se ladne ke liye apek ko gaya." 
1Kings20:27 aur israaaelee bhee ikatthe kiae gaa, aur unake bhojan kee taaiyaree hui tab ve unaka samhana karane ko gaa, aur israaaelee unake samhane dere dalakar bakaariyon ke do chhotte jhund se dekh pade, parantu araamiyon se desh bhr gaya." 
1Kings20:28 tab parameshvar ke usee jan ne israaael ke raja ke pas jakar kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, aramiyon ne yah kaha haai, ki yahova pahadee devata haai, parantu neechee boomi ka naheen haai is karan maain us badee bheed ko tere hath men kar doonga, tab tumhen bodha ho jaaega ki maain yahova hoo." 
1Kings20:29 aur ve sat din amhane samhane dere dale pade rahe tab sataven din yuddh chhdi gaya aur aek din men israaaeliyon ne aek lakh aramee piyade mar dale. 
1Kings20:30 jo bach gaa, vah apek ko bhagakar nagar men ghause, aur vahan un bache huae logon men se sattais hajar purush shharapanah kee deeval ke girane se dab kar mar gaae. benhadad bhee bhag gaya aur nagar kee aek bheetaree kottree men gaya." 
1Kings20:31 tab usake karmachaariyon ne us se kaha, sun, ham ne to suna haai, ki israaael ke gharane ke raja dayalu raja hote haai, isaadiye hamen kamar men ttatt aur sir par rassaiyan bandho huae israaael ke raja ke pas jane de, sambhv haai ki vah tera praan bacha le." 
1Kings20:32 tab ve kamar men ttatt aur sir par rassaiyan bandha kar israaael ke raja ke pas jakar kahane lage, tera das benhadad tujh se kahata haai, krapa kar ke mujhe jeevit rahane de. raja ne uttar diya, kya vah ab tak jeevit haai? vah to mera bhai haai." 
1Kings20:33 un logon ne ise shuubh shakun janakar, fauta se boojh lene ka yatn kiya ki yah usake man kee bat haai ki nahee, aur kaha, han tera bhai benhadada. raja ne kaha, jakar usako le ao. tab benhadad usake pas nikal aya, aur us ne use apane rath par chaddha liya." 
1Kings20:34 tab benhadad ne us se kaha, jo nagar mere peeta ne tere pita se le liae the, unako maain faer doonga aur jaaise mere pita ne shaemaron men apane liye sadken banavai, vaaise hee too damishk men sadken banavana. ahab ne kaha, maain isee vacha par tujhe chhod deta hoo, tab us ne benhadad se vacha bandhakar, use svatantra kar diya." 
1Kings20:35 isake bad naabiyon ke chelon men se aek jan ne yahova se vachan pakar apane sangee se kaha, mujhe mar, jab us manushy ne use marane se inakar kiya," 
1Kings20:36 tab us ne us se kaha, too ne yahova ka vachan naheen mana, is karan sun, jyonhee too mere pas se chala jaaega, tyonhee sinh se mar dala jaaega. tab jyonhee vah usake pas se chala gaya, jyonhee use aek sinh mila, aur usako mar dala." 
1Kings20:37 fir usako doosara manushy mila, aur us se bhee us ne kaha, mujhe mara. aur us ne usako aeesa mara ki vah ghaayal hua." 
1Kings20:38 tab vah nabee chala gaya, aur ankhon ko pagadee se ddhanpakar raja kee batt johata hua marga par khda raha." 
1Kings20:39 jab raja pas hokar ja raha tha, tab us ne usakee dohai dekar kaha, ki jab tera das yuddh kshotra men gaya tha tab koi manushy meree or mudkar kisee manushy ko mere pas le aya, aur mujh se kaha, is patushy kee chaukasee kara yaadi yah kisee reeati choott jaa, to usake praan ke badale tujhe apana praan dena hoga naheen to kikkar bhr chandee dena padega." 
1Kings20:40 usake bad tera das idhar udhar kam men fans gaya, fir vah n mila. israael ke raja ne us se kaha, tera aeesa hee nyay hoga too ne ap apana nyay kiya haai." 
1Kings20:41 nabee ne jhtt apanee ankhon se pagadee uttai, tab israaael ke raja ne use pahichan liya, ki vah koi nabee haai." 
1Kings20:42 tab us ne raja se kaha, yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, isaaliye ki too ne apane hath se aeese aeek manushy ko jane diya, jise maain ne satyanash ho jane ko ttharaya tha, tujhe usake praan kee santee apana praan aur usakee praja kee santee, apanee praja denee padegee." 
1Kings20:43 tab israaael ka raja udas aur aprasann hokar ghar kee or jala, aur shaemaron ko aya." 
1Kings21:1 nabot nam aek yijraelee kee aek dakh kee baree shaemaron ke raja ahab ke rajamaandair ke pas yijrael men thee. 
1Kings21:2 in baton ke bad eeab ne nabot se kaha, teree dakh kee baree meere ghar ke pas haai, too use mujhe de ki maain us men sag pat kee baree lagaun aur maain usake badale tujhe us se achchhee aek baattkai doonga, naheen to teree ichchha ho to maain tujhe usaka mooly de doonga." 
1Kings21:3 nabot ne yahab se kaha, yahova n kare ki maain apane purakhaon ka nij bhag tujhe doon!" 
1Kings21:4 yijraelee nabot ke is vachan ke karan ki maain tujhe apane purakhaon ka nij bhag n doonga, ahab udas aur aprasann hokar apate ghar gaya, aur bichhaune par lett gaya aur munh faer liya, aur kuchh bhejan n kiya." 
1Kings21:5 tab usakee patnee ijaebel ne usake pas akar poochha, tera man kyon aeesa udas haai ki too kuchh bhojan naheen karata?" 
1Kings21:6 us ne kaha, karan yah haai, ki maain ne yijraelee nabot se kaha ki rupaya lekar mujhe apanee dakh kee baree de, naheen to yadi noo chahe to maain usakee santee doosaree dakh kee baree doonga aur usane kaha, maain apanee dakh kee baree tujhe n doonga." 
1Kings21:7 usakee patnee ijaebel ne us se kaha, kya too israael par rajy karata haai ki naheen? uttkar bhojan kara aur tera man anandait ho yijraelee nabot kee dakh kee baree maain tujhe dilava doongee." 
1Kings21:8 tab us ne ahab ke nam se chitthee likhkar usakee angoottee kee chhap lagakar, un puraniyon aur raison ke pas bhej dee jo usee nagar men nabot ke pados men rahate the." 
1Kings21:9 us chitthee men us ne yon likha, ki upavas ka prachar karo, aur nabot ko logon ke samhane unche sthan par baaittana." 
1Kings21:10 tab do neech janon ko usake samhane baaittana jo sakshaee dekar us se kahe, too ne parameshvar aur raja donon kee ninda kee. nab num log use bahar le jakar usako patthravah karana, ki vah mar jaae." 
1Kings21:11 ijaebel kee chitthee men kee agyaa ke anusar nagar men rahanevale puraniyon aur raison ne upavas ka prachar kiya," 
1Kings21:12 aur nabot ko logon ke samhane unche sthan par baaittaya. 
1Kings21:13 tab do neech jan akar usake sammukh baaitt gaae aur un neech janon ne logon logon ke samhane nabot ke vimddh yah sakshaee dee, ki nabot ne parameshvar aur raja donon kee ninda kee. is par unhon ne use nagar se bahar le jakar usako patthravah kiya, aur vah mar gaya." 
1Kings21:14 tab unhon ne ijaebel ke pas yah kahala bheja ki nabot patthravah karake mar dala gaya haai. 
1Kings21:15 yah sunate hee ki nabot patthravah karake maradala gaya haai, ijaebel ne ahab se kaha, uttkar yijraelee nabot kee dakh kee baree ko jise us ne tujhe rupaya lekar dene se bhee inakar kiya tha apane aadhaikar men le, kyonaki nabot jeeavit naheen parantu vah mar gaya haai." 
1Kings21:16 yijraelee nabot kee mratyu ka samachar pate hee ahab usakee dakh kee baree apane aadhaikar men lene ke liye vahan jane ko utt khda hua. 
1Kings21:17 tab yahova ka yah vachan nishabee aeliyyah ke pas pahuncha, ki chal," 
1Kings21:18 shaemaron men rahanevale israaael ke raja ahab se milane ko ja vah to nabot kee dakh kee baree men haai, use apane aadhaikar men lene ko vah vahan gaya haai." 
1Kings21:19 aur us se yah kahana, ki yahova yon kahata haai, ki kya too ne ghaat kiya, aur aadhaikaree bhee ban baaitta? fir too us se yah bhee kahana, ki yahova yon kahata haai, ki jis sthan par kutton ne nabot ka lohoo chatta, usee sthan par kutte tera bhee lohoo chattenge." 
1Kings21:20 aeliyyah ko dekhkar ahab ne kaha, he mere shatra! kya too ne mera pata lagaya haai? us ne kaha ha, lagaya to haai aur isaka karan yah haai, ki jo yahova kee drashtti men bura haai, use karane ke liye too ne apane ko bech dala haai." 
1Kings21:21 maain tujh par aeesee vipaattai daloonga, ki tujhe pooree reeati se mitta daloonga aur ahab ke ghar ke aek aek ladke ko aur kya bandhaua, kya svadhaeen israaael men har aek rahanevale ko bhee nash kar daloonga." 
1Kings21:22 aur maain tera gharana nabat ke putra yarobam, aur ahiyyah ke putra basha ka sa kar doonga isaliye ki too ne mujhe krodhait kiya haai, aur israaael se pap karavaya haai." 
1Kings21:23 aur ijaebel ke vishay men yahova yah kahata haai, ki yijrael ke kile ke pas kutte ijaebel ko kha dalenge." 
1Kings21:24 ahab ka jo kai nagar men mar jaaega usako kutte kha lenge aur jo koi maaidan men mar jaaega usako akash ke pakshaee kha jaaenge. 
1Kings21:25 sachamuch ahab ke tuly aur koi n tha jisane apanee patnee ijaebel ke usakane par vah kam karane ko jo yahova kee drashtti men bura haai, apane ko bech dala tha." 
1Kings21:26 vah to un aemoriyon kee nai jinako yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se desh se nikala tha bahut hee ghainaune kam karata tha, arthata mooraton kee upasana karane laga tha." 
1Kings21:27 aeliyyah ke ye vachan sunakar ahab ne apane vasr faade, aur apanee deh par ttatt lapettkar upavas karane aur ttatt hee oddhe pada rahane laga, aur dabe panvon chalane laga." 
1Kings21:28 aur yahova ka yah vachan tishabee aeliyyah ke pas pahuncha," 
1Kings21:29 ki kya too ne dekha haai ki ahab mere samhane namra ban gaya haai? is karan ki vah mere samhane namra ban gaya haai maain vah vipaattai usake jeete jee us par n daloonga parantoo usake putra ke dinon men maain usake gharane par vah pipaattai bhejoonga. 
1Kings22:1 aur teen varsha tak aramee aur israaaelee bina yuddh rahe. 
1Kings22:2 teesare varsha men yahooda ka raja yahoshaapat israaael ke raja ke pas gaya. 
1Kings22:3 tab israaael ke raja ne apane karmachaariyon se kaha, kya tum ko maloom haai, ki gilad ka ramot hamara haai? fir ham kyon chupachap rahate aur use aram ke raja ke hath se kyon naheen chheen lete haain?" 
1Kings22:4 aur us ne yahoshaapat se poochha, kya too mere sang gilad ke ramot se ladne ke liye jaaega? yahoshaapat ne israaael ke raja ko uttar diya, jaaisa too haai vaaisa maain bhee hoo. jaaisee teree praja haai vaaisee hee meree bhee praja haai, aur jaaise tere ghaede haain vaaise hee mere bhee ghaede haain." 
1Kings22:5 fir yahoshaapat ne israaael ke raja se kaha," 
1Kings22:6 ki aj yahova kee ichchha maloom kar le, nab israaael ke raja ne nabiyon ko jo koi char sau purush the ikattha karake un se poochha, kya maain gilad ke ramot se yuddh karane ke liye chaddhai karoo, va ruka rahoon? unhon ne uttar diya, chaddhai kar kyonaki prabhu usako raja ke hath men kar dega." 
1Kings22:7 parantu yahoshaapat ne poochha, kya yahan yahova ka aur bhee koi nabee naheen haai jis se ham poochh len?" 
1Kings22:8 israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha, ha, yimla ka putra meekayah aek purush aur haai jisake dara ham yahoeva se poochh sakate haain? parantu maain us se gharana rakhta hoo, kyonki vah mere vishy kalyan kee naheen varan haani hee kee bhvishyadanee karata haai." 
1Kings22:9 yahoshaapat ne kaha, raja aeesa n kahe. tab dasraaael ke raja ne aek hakim ko bulava kar kaha, yimla ke putra meekayah ko fauta se le a." 
1Kings22:10 israaael ka raja aur yahooda ka raja yahoshaapat, apane apane rajavasr paahine huae shaemaron ke faattk men aek khule sthan men apane apane sinhasan par virajaman the aur sab bhavishyadvkta unake sammukh bhavishyadanee kar rahe the." 
1Kings22:11 tab kanana ke putra sidaakiyyah ne lohe ke seeng banakar kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, ki in se too araamiyon ko marate marate nash kar dalega." 
1Kings22:12 aur sab naabiyon ne isee ashay kee bhavishyadanee karake kaha, gilad ke ramot par chaddhai kar aur too kratarth ho kyonaki yahova use raja ke hath men kar dega." 
1Kings22:13 aur jo doot meekayah ko bulane gaya tha us ne us se kaha, sun, bhavishyadvkta aek hee munh se raja ke vishay shuubh vachan kahate haain to teree baten unakee see hon too bhee shuubh vachan kahana." 
1Kings22:14 meekayah ne kaha, yahova ke jeevan kee shapath jo kuchh yahova mujh se kahe, vahee maain kahoonga." 
1Kings22:15 jab vah raja ke pas aya, tab raja ne us se poochha, he meekayah! kya ham gilad ke ramot se yuddh karane ke liye chaddhai karen va ruke rahen? us ne usako uttar diya ha, chaddhai kar aur too kratarth ho aur yahova usako raja ke hath men kar de." 
1Kings22:16 raja ne us se kaha, mujhe kitanee bar tujhe shapath dharakar chitana hoga, ki too yahova ka smaran karake mujh se sach hee kaha." 
1Kings22:17 meekayah ne kaha mujhe samast israaael bina charapahe kee bhedbakariyon kee nai pahadon para tittar bittar dekh pada, aur yahova ka yah vachan aya, ki ve to anath haain ataaev ve apate apane ghar kushal kshom se lautt jaaen." 
1Kings22:18 tab israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha, kya maain ne tujh se n kaha tha, ki vah mere vishay kalyan kee naheen hani hee kee bhvishyadanee karega." 
1Kings22:19 meekayah ne kaha is karan too yahova ka yah vachan sun! mujhe sinhasan par virajaman yahova aur usake pas daahine banyen khdee iui svarga kee samast sena dikhai dee haai. 
1Kings22:20 tab yahova ne poochha, ahab ko kaun aeesa bahakaaega, ki vah gilad ke ramo par chaddhai karake khet aae tab kisee te kuch, aur kisee ne kuchh kaha." 
1Kings22:21 nidan aek atma pas akar yahov ke sammukh khdee hui, aur kahane lagee, maain usako vahakaungee yahova ne poochha, kis upay se?" 
1Kings22:22 us ne kaha, maain jakar usake sab bhvishyadvktaon men paaittkar un se joott bulavaungee. yahova ne kaha, tera usako bahakana sufal hoga, jakar aeesa hee kara." 
1Kings22:23 to ab sun yahova ne tere in sab bhvishyadvktaon ke munh men aek joott bolanevalee atma paaittai haai, aur yahova ne tere vishy haani kee bat kahee haai." 
1Kings22:24 tab kanana ke putra sidaakijyah ne meekayah ke nikatt ja, usake gal par thpeda mar kar poochha, yahova ka anma mujhe chhodkar toojh se baten karane ko kidhar gaya?" 
1Kings22:25 meekayah ne kaha, jis din too chhpaine ke liye kottree se kottree men bhgega, tab toojhe bodha hoga." 
1Kings22:26 tab israaael ke raja ne kaha, meekayah ko nagar ke haakim amon aur yoash rajakumar ke pas le ja" 
1Kings22:27 aur un se kah, raja yon kahata haai, ki isako bandeegrah men dalo, aur jab tak maain kushal se n au, tab tak ise dukh kee rottee aur panee diya karo." 
1Kings22:28 aur meekayah ne kaha, yadi too kabhee kushal se lautte, to jan ki yahova ne mere dara naheen kaha. fir us ne kaha, he logo tum sab ke sab sun lo." 
1Kings22:29 tab israaael ke raja aur yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat donon ne gilad ke ramot par chaddhai kee. 
1Kings22:30 aur israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha, maain to bhesh badalakar yuddh kshotra men jaunga, parantu too apane hee vasr paahine rahana. tab israaael ka raja bhesh badalakar yuddh kshotra men gaya." 
1Kings22:31 aur aram ke raja ne to apane rathon ke batteeson pradhaanon ko agyaa dee thee, ki n to chhotte se lado aur n bade se, keval israaael ke raja se yooddh karo." 
1Kings22:32 to jab rathon ke pradhaanon ne yahoshaapat ko dekha, tab kaha, nishchay israaael ka raja vahee haai. aur ve usee se yuddh karane ko mude tab yahoshapat chilla utta." 
1Kings22:33 yah dekhakar ki vah israaael ka raja naheen haai, rathon ke pradhaan usaka peechha chhodkar lautt gaae." 
1Kings22:34 tab kisee ne attkal se aek teer chalaya aur vah israaael ke raja ke jhlaim aur nichale vasr ke beech chhedakar laga tab usane apane sarathee se kaha, maain ghaayal ho gaya hoo isaaliye bagador faer kar mujhe sena men se bahar nikal le chala." 
1Kings22:35 aur us din yuddh baddhta gaya aur raja apane rath men auron ke sahare araamiyon ke sammukh khda raha, aur sanjh ko mar gaya aur usake ghaav ka lohoo bahakar rath ke paudan men bhr gaya." 
1Kings22:36 soorya oobate huae sena men yah pukar hui, ki har aek apane nagar aur apane desh ko lautt jaae." 
1Kings22:37 jab raja mar gaya, tab shaemaron ko pahunchaya gaya aur shaemaron men use mittee dee gai." 
1Kings22:38 aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar jab usaka rath shaemaron ke pokhre men dhaeya gaya, tab kutton ne usaka lohoo chatt liya, aur veshyaaen yaheen snan karatee theen." 
1Kings22:39 ahab ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, aur hatheedant ka jo bhvan us ne banaya, aur jo jo nagar us ne basaae the, yah sab kya israaaelee rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
1Kings22:40 nidan ahab apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usaka putra ahajyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
1Kings22:41 israaael ke raja ahab ke chauthe varsha men asa ka putra yahoshaapat yahooda par rajy karane laga. 
1Kings22:42 jab yahoshaapat rajy karane laga, tab vah paaintees varsha ka tha. aur pachees parsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur usakee mata ka nam ajooba tha, jo shailhee kee bettee thee." 
1Kings22:43 aur usakee chal sab prakar se usake pita asa kee see thee, arthat jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai vahee vah karata raha, aur us se kuchh n muda. taubhee unche sthan ddhaae n gaa, praja ke log unche sthanon par us samay bhee baali kiya karate the aur dhoop bhee jalaya karate the." 
1Kings22:44 yahoshaapat ne israaael ke raja se mel kiya. 
1Kings22:45 aur yahoshaapat ke kam aur jo veerata us ne dikhai, aur us ne jo jo ladaiyan kee, yah sab kya yahooda ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
1Kings22:46 purushagamiyon men se jo usake pita asa ke dinon men rah gaae the, unako us ne desh men se nash kiya." 
1Kings22:47 us samay edam men koi raja n tha ek nayab rajakaj ka kam karata tha. 
1Kings22:48 fir yahoshaapat ne tashash ke jahaj sona lane ke liye opeer jane ko banava lia, parantu ve aeshyonageber men toott gaa, asaliye vahan n ja sake." 
1Kings22:49 tab ahab ke putra ahajyah ne yahoshaapat se kaha, mere jahaajiyon ko apane jahaajiyon ke sang, jahajon men jane de, parantu yahoshaapat ne inakar kiya." 
1Kings22:50 nidan yahoshaapat apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usako usake purakhaon ke sath usake moolapurush daud ke nabar men mittee dee gai. aur usaka putra yahoram usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
1Kings22:51 yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ke satrahaven varsha men ahab ka putra ahajyah shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane laga aur do varsha tak israaael par rajy karata raha. 
1Kings22:52 aur us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha. aur usakee chaj usake mata pita, aur nabat ke putra yarobam kee see thee jis ne israaael se pap karavaya tha." 
1Kings22:53 jaaise usaka pita bal kee upasane aur use dandvat karane se israaael ke parameshvar yahova ko krodhait karata raha vaaise hee ahajyah bhee karata raha. 
2Kings1:1 ahab ke marane ke bad moab israaael ke viruddh ho gaya. 
2Kings1:2 aur ahajyah aek jhlaimileedar khaidkee men se, jo shaemaron men usakee attaree men thee, gir pada, aur beemar ho gaya. tab us ne dooton ko yah kahakar bheja, ki tum jakar aekron ke balajaboob nam devata se yah poochh ao, ki kya maain is beemaree se bachoonga ki naheen?" 
2Kings1:3 tab yahova ke doot ne tishabee aeliyyah se kaha, uttkar shaemaron ke raja ke dooton se milane ko ja, aur un se kah, kya israaael men koi parameshvar naheen jo tum aekron ke balajaboob devata se poochhne jate ho?" 
2Kings1:4 isaliye ab yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, ki jis palang par too pada haai, us par se kabhee n uttega, parantu mar hee jaaega. tab aeliyyah chala gaya." 
2Kings1:5 jab ahajyah ke doot usake pas lautt aa, tab us ne un se poochha, tum kyon lautt aae ho?" 
2Kings1:6 unhon ne us se kaha, ki ek manushy ham se milane ko aya, aur kaha, ki jis raja ne tum ko bheja usake pas lauttkar kaho, yahova yon kahata haai, ki kya israael men koi parameshvar naheen jo too ekron ke balajaboob devata se poochhne ko bhejata haai? is karan jis palang par too pada haai, us par se kabhee n uttega, parantu mar hee jaega." 
2Kings1:7 us ne un se poochha, jo manushy tum se milane ko aya, aur tum se ye baten kahee, usaka kaaisa ranga-roop tha?" 
2Kings1:8 unhon ne usako uttar diya, vah to ronar manushy tha aur apanee kamar men chamade ka faentta bandho huae tha. us ne kaha, vah tishabee eliyyah hoga." 
2Kings1:9 tab us ne usake pas pachas sipaahiyon ke aek pradhaan ko usake pachason sipaahiyon samet bheja. pradhaan ne usake pas jakar kya dekha ki vah pahad kee chottee par baaitta haai. aur us ne us se kaha, he parameshvar ke bhkt raja ne kaha haai, ki too utar a." 
2Kings1:10 aeliyyah ne us pachas sipaahiyon ke pradhaan se kaha, yadi maain parameshvar ka bhkt hoo to akash se ag girakar tujhe tere pachason samet bhsm kar dale. tab akash se ag utaree aur use usake pachason samet bhsm kar diya." 
2Kings1:11 fir raja ne usake pas pachas sipaahiyon ke aek aur pradhaan ko, pachason sipaahiyon samet bhej diya. pradhaan ne us se kaha he parameshvar ke bhkt raja ne kaha haai, ki fauta se too utar a." 
2Kings1:12 aeliyyah ne uttar dekar un se kaha, yadi maain parameshvar ka bhkt hoo to akash se ag girakar tujhe, tere pachason samet bhsm kar dale tab akash se parameshvar kee ag utaree aur use usake pachason samet bhsm kar diya." 
2Kings1:13 fir raja ne teesaree bar pachas sipaahiyon ke aek aur pradhaan ko, pachason sipaahiyon samet bhej diya, aur pachas ka vah teesara pradhaan chaddhkar, aeliyyah ke samhane ghauttnon ke bal gira, aur gidgida kar us se kahane laga, he parameshvar ke bhkt mera praan aur tere in pachas dason ke praan teree draashtti men anamol ttharen." 
2Kings1:14 pachas pachas sipaahiyon ke jo do pradhaan apane apane pachason samet pahile aae the, unako to ag ne akash se girakar bhsm kar dala, parantu ab mera praan teree drashtti men anamol tthare." 
2Kings1:15 tab yahova ke doot ne uliyyah se kaha, usake sang neeche ja, us se pat dra. tab aeliyyah uttkar usake sang raja ke pas neeche gaya." 
2Kings1:16 aur us se kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, ki too ne to aekron ke balajaboob devata se poochhne ko doot bheje the to kya israaael men koi parameshvar naheen ki jis se too poochh sake? is karan too jis palang par pada haai, us par se kabhee n uttega, parantu mar hee jaaega." 
2Kings1:17 yahova ke is vachan ke anusar jo aeliyyah ne kaha tha, vah mar gaya. aur usake santan n hone ke karan yahoram usake sthan par yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ke putra yahoram ke doosare varsha men rajy karane laga." 
2Kings1:18 ahajyah ke aur kam jo us ne kiae vah kya israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain? 
2Kings2:1 jab yahova aeliyyah ko bavandr ke dara svarga men utta lene ko tha, tab aeliyyah aur aeleesha donon sang sang gilagal se chale." 
2Kings2:2 aeliyyah ne aeleesha se kaha, yahova mujhe betel tak bhejata haai isaliye too yaheen tthara raha. aeleesha ne kaha, yahova ke aur tere jeevan kee shapath maain tujhe naheen chhodne ka isaliye ve betel ko chale gaae." 
2Kings2:3 aur betelavasee bhavishyadvktaon ke chele aeleesha ke pas akar kahane lage, kya tujhe maloom haai ki aj yahova tere svamee ko tere upar se utta lene par haai? us ne kaha, ha, mujhe bhee yah maloom haai, tum chup raho." 
2Kings2:4 aur aeliyyah ne us se kaha, he aeleesha, yahova mujhe yareeho ko bhejata haai isaliye too yaheen tthara rah us ne kaha, yahova ke aur tere jeevan kee shapath maain tujhe naheen chhodne ka so ve yareeho ko aae." 
2Kings2:5 aur yareehovasee bhavishyadvktaon ke chele aeleesha ke pas akar kahane lage, kya tujhe maloom haai ki aj yahova tere svamee ko tere upar se utta lene par haai? us ne uttar diya, han mujhe bhee maloom haai, tum chup raho." 
2Kings2:6 fir aeliyyah ne us se kaha, yahova mujhe yaradan tak bhejata haai, so too yaheen tthara raha us ne kaha, yahova ke aur tere jeevan kee shapath maain tujhe naheen chhodneka so ve donon age chane." 
2Kings2:7 aur bhavishyadvktaon ke chelon men se pachas jan jakar unake samhane door khde hua, aur ve donon yaradan ke teer khde hue." 
2Kings2:8 tab aeliyyah ne apanee char pakadkar aeentt lee, aur jal par mara, tab vah idhar udhar do bhag ho gaya aur ve donon sthl hee sthl par utar gaae." 
2Kings2:9 unake par pahunchane par ealiyyah ne eleesha se kaha, us se paahile ki maain tere pas se utta liye jaun jo kuchh too chahe ki maain tere liye karoon vah manga eleesha ne kaha, tujh men jo atma haai, usaka doona bhag mujhe mil jae." 
2Kings2:10 aeliyyah ne kaha, too ne kaattnai bat mangee haai, taubhee yadi too mujhe utta liye jane ke bad dekhne paae to tere liye aeesa hee hoga naheen to n hoga." 
2Kings2:11 ve chalate chalate baten kar rahe the, ki achanak aek agnai may rath aur agnaimay dhaedon ne unako alag alag kiya, aur aeliyyah bavandr men hokar svarga par chaddh gaya." 
2Kings2:12 aur use aeleesha dekhta aur mukarata raha, hanay mere pita! hay mere pita! hay israaael ke rath aur savaro! jab vah usako fir dekh n pada, tab us ne apate vasr pade aur faadkar do bhag kar diae." 
2Kings2:13 fir us ne aeliyyah kee char uttai jo us par se giree thee, aur vah lautt gaya, aur yaradan ke teer par khda hua." 
2Kings2:14 aur us ne aeliyyah kee vah char jo us par se giree thee, pakad kar jal par maree aur kaha, aeliyyah ka parameshvar yahova kahan haai? jab us ne jal par mara, tab vah idhar udhar do bhag ho gaya aur aeleesha par ho gaya." 
2Kings2:15 use dekhkar bhvishyadvktaon ke chele jo yareeho men usake samhane the, kahane lage, ealiyyah men jo atma thee, vahee eleesha par tthar gai haai so ve us se milane ko aae aur usake samhane boomi tak jhukakar dandvat kee." 
2Kings2:16 tab unhon ne us se kaha, sun, tere dason ke pas pachas balavan purush haai, ve jakar tere svamee ko ddooddhe, sambhv haai ki kya jane yahova ke atma ne usako uttakar kiseen pahad par va kisee tarai men dal diya ho us ne kaha, mat bhejo." 
2Kings2:17 jab unhon ne usako yahan tak dabaya ki vah lajjait ho gaya, tab us ne kaha, bhej do so unhon ne pachas purush bhej dia, aur ve use teen din tak ddoonddhte rahe parantu n paya." 
2Kings2:18 us samay tak vah yareeho men tthara raha, so jab ve usake pas lautt aa, tab us ne un se kaha, kya maain ne tum se n kaha tha, ki mat jao?" 
2Kings2:19 us nagar ke nivaasiyon ne eleesha se kaha, dek, yah nagar manabhavane sthan par basa haai, jaaisa mera prabhu dekhta haai parantu panee bura haai aur boomi garbh giranevalee haai." 
2Kings2:20 us ne kaha, ek naye pyale men namak dalakar mere pas le ao ve use usake pas le ae." 
2Kings2:21 tab vah jal ke sote ke pas nikal gaya, aur us men namak dalakar kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain yah panee tteek kar deta hoo, jis se vah fir kabhee mratyu va garbh girane ka karan n hoga." 
2Kings2:22 aeleesha ke is vachan ke anusar panee tteek ho gaya, aur aj tak aeesa hee haai." 
2Kings2:23 vahan se vah betel ko chala, aur marga kee chaddhai men chal raha tha ki nagar se chhotte ladke nikalakar usaka ttttha karake kahane lage, he chanduae chaddh ja, he chanduae chaddh ja." 
2Kings2:24 tab us ne peechhe kee or fir kar un par drashtti kee aur yahova ke nam se unako shaap diya, tab jangal men se do reeachhiinayon ne nikalakar un men se bayalees ladke faad dale." 
2Kings2:25 vahan se vah kamrmel ko gaya, aur fir vahan se shaemaron ko lautt gaya." 
2Kings3:1 yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ke attarahaven varsha men ahab ka putra yahoram shaimaron men rajy karane laga, aur barah parsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Kings3:2 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai naubhee us ne apane mata-pita ke barabar naheen kiya varan apane pita kee banavai hui bal kee latt ko door kiya. 
2Kings3:3 taubhee vah nabat ke putra yarobam ke aeese papon men jaaise us ne israaael se bhee karaae lipatta raha aur un se n fira. 
2Kings3:4 moab ka raja mesha bahut see bhed-bakaariyan rakhta tha, aur israaael ke raja ko aek lakh bachche aur aek lakh meddhon ka un kar kee reeati se diya karata tha." 
2Kings3:5 jab ahab mar gaya, tab moab ke raja ne israaael ke raja se balava kiya." 
2Kings3:6 us samay raja yahoram ne shaemaron se nikalakar sare israael kee ginatee lee. 
2Kings3:7 aur us ne jakar yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ke pas yon kahala bheja, ki moab ke raja ne mujh se balava kiya haai, kya too mere sang moab se ladne ko chalega? us ne kaha, han maain chaloonga, jaaisa too vaaisa maai, jaaisee teree praja vaaisee meree praja, aur jaaise tere dhaede vaaise mere bhee ghaede haain." 
2Kings3:8 fir us ne poochha, ham kis marga se jaaen? us ne uttar diya, aedom ke jangal se hokara." 
2Kings3:9 tab israaael ka raja, aur yahooda ka raja, aur aedom ka raja chale aur jab sat din tak dhoomakar chal chuke, tab sena aur usake peechhe peechhe chalanevale pashuuon ke liye kuchh panee n mila." 
2Kings3:10 aur israaael ke raja ne kaha, hay! yahova ne in teen rajaon ko isaaliye ikattha kiya, ki unako moab ke hath men kar de." 
2Kings3:11 parantu sahoshaapat ne kaha, kya yahan yahova ka koi nabee naheen haai, jisake dara ham yahova se poochhen? israaael ke raja ke kisee karmacharee ne uttar dekar kaha, ha, shaapat ka putra aeleesha jo aeliyyah ke hathon ko dhaulaya karata tha vah to yahan haai." 
2Kings3:12 tab yahoshaapat ne kaha, usake pas yahova ka vachan pahuncha karata haai. tab israaael ka raja aur yahoshaapat aur aedom ka raja usake pas gaae." 
2Kings3:13 tab aeleesha ne israaael ke raja se kaha, mera tujh se kya kam haai? apane pita ke bhavishyadvktaon aur apanee mata ke naabiyon ke pas ja. israaael ke raja ne us se kaha, aeesa n kah, kyonaki yahova ne in teenon rajaon ko isaliye ikattha kiya, ki inako moab ke hath men kar de." 
2Kings3:14 aeleesha ne kaha, senaon ka yahova jisake sammukh maain upasthiat raha karata hoo, usake jeevan kee shapath yadi maain yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat ka adar man n karata, to maain n to teree or muh karata aur n tujh par draashtti karata." 
2Kings3:15 ab koi bajavaaiyya mere pas le ao. jab bajavaaiyya bajane laga, tab yahova kee shaaktai aeleesha par iui." 
2Kings3:16 aur us ne kaha, is nale men tum log itana khodo, ki is men gadhe hee gadhe ho jaaen." 
2Kings3:17 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai, ki tumhare samhane n to vayu chalegee, aur n vashara hogee taubhee yah nala panee se bhr jaaega aur apate gay baailon aur pashuuon samet tum peene paoge." 
2Kings3:18 aur isako halakee see bat janakar yahova moab ko bhee tumhare hath men kar dega. 
2Kings3:19 tab tum sab gaddhvale aur uttam nagaron ko nash karana, aur sab achchhe vrakshaen ko katt dalana, aur jal ke sab kheton ko bhr dena, aur sab achchhe kheton men patthr faenkakar unhen bigad dena." 
2Kings3:20 vihan ko annabaali chaddhane ke samay aedom kee or se jal bah aya, aur desh jal se bhr gaya." 
2Kings3:21 yah sunakar ki rajaon ne ham se yuddh karate ke liye chaddhai kee haai, jitane moaabiyon kee avastha hathaiyar bandhane yogy thee, ve sab bulakar ikatthe kiae gaa, aur sivane par khde hue." 
2Kings3:22 bihan ko jab ve utte us samay soorya kee kiranon us jal par aeesee padeen ki vah moaabiyon kee paralee or se lohoo sa lal dikhai pada. 
2Kings3:23 to ve kahane lage vah to lohoo hoga, nisandeh ve raja aek doosare ko marakar nash ho gaae haai, isaaliye ab he moabiyo loott lene ko jao" 
2Kings3:24 aur jab ve israaael kee chhavanee ke pas aae hee the, ki israaaelee uttkar moaabiyon ko marane lage aur ve unake samhane se bhag gaae aur ve moab ko marate marate unake desh men pahunch gaae." 
2Kings3:25 aur unhon ne nagaron ko ddha diya, aur sab achchhe kheton men aek aek purush ne apana apana matthr dal kar unhon bhr diya aur jal ke sab soton ko bhr diya aur sab achchhe achchhe vrakshaen ko katt dala, yahan tak ki keerhareshot ke patthr to rah gaa, parantu usako bhee charon or gofan chalanevalon ne jakar mara." 
2Kings3:26 yah dekhkar ki ham yuddh men har chale, moab ke raja ne sat sau talavar rakhnevale purush sang lekar aedom ke raja tak panti cheerakar pahunchane ka yatn kiya parantu pahunch n saka." 
2Kings3:27 tab us ne apane jette putra ko jo usake sthan men rajy karanevala tha pakadkar shaharapanah par homabaali chaddhaya. is karan israaael par bada hee krodha hua, so ve use chhodkar apane desh ko lautt gaae." 
2Kings4:1 bhavishyadvktaon ke chelon kee paatnaiyon men se aek sree ne aeleesha kee dohai dekar kaha, tera das mera paati mar gaya, aur too janata haai ki vah yahova ka bhy pananevala tha, aur jisaka vah karjadar tha vah aya haai ki mere donon putraen ko apane day banane ke liye le jaae." 
2Kings4:2 aeleesha ne us se poochha, maain tere liye kya karoon? mujh se kah, ki tere ghar men kya haai? us ne kaha, teree dasee ke ghar men aek handee tel ko chhod aur kuchh taheen haai." 
2Kings4:3 us ne kaha, too bahar jakar apanee sab padosinon se khalee baratan mang le a, aur thode baratan n lana." 
2Kings4:4 fir too apane betton samet apane ghar men ja, aur dar band karaken un sab baratanon men tel undel dena, aur jo bhr jaae unhen alag rakhna." 
2Kings4:5 tab vah usake pas se chalee gai, aur apane betton samet apane ghar jakar dar band kiya tab ve to usake pas baratan late gaae aur vah undelatee gai." 
2Kings4:6 jab baratan bhr gaa, tab us ne apane bette se kaha, mere pas aek aur bhee le a, us ne us se kaha, aur baratan to naheen raha. tab tel thm gaya." 
2Kings4:7 tab us ne jakar parameshvar ke bhkt ko yah bata diya. or us ne kaha, ja tel bechakar ren bhr de aur jo rah jaa, us se too apane putraen sahit apana nirvah karana." 
2Kings4:8 fir aek din kee bat haai ki aeleesha shoonem ko gaya, jahan aek kuleen sree thee, aur us ne use rottee khane ke liye binatee karake vivash kiya. aur jab jab vah udhar se jata, tab tab vah vahan rottee khane ko utarata tha." 
2Kings4:9 aur us sree ne apane paati se kaha, sun yah jo bar bar hamare yahan se hokar jaya karata haai vah mujhe parameshvar ka koi pavitra bhkt jan padta haai." 
2Kings4:10 to ham bheet par aek chhottee uparauttee kottree banaae, aur us men usake liye aek khat, aek mej, aek kusa aur aek deevatt rakhe, ki jab jab vah hamare yahan aa, tab tab usee men ttkai kare." 
2Kings4:11 aek din kee bat haai, ki vah vahan jakar us uparauttee kottree men ttkai aur usee men lett gaya." 
2Kings4:12 aur us ne apane sevak gehajee se kaha, us shuuneamin ko bula le. usake bulane se vah usake samhane khdee hui." 
2Kings4:13 tab us ne gehajee se kaha, is se kah, ki too ne hamare liye aeesee badee chinta kee haai, to tere liye kya kiya jaae? kya teree charcha raja, va pradhaan senapaati se kee jaae? us ne uttar diya maain to apane hee logon men rahatee hoo." 
2Kings4:14 fir us ne kaha, to isake liye kya kiya jaae? gehajee ne uttar diya, nishchay usake koi ladka nahee, aur usaka pati booddha haai." 
2Kings4:15 us ne kaha, usako bula le. aur jab us ne use bulaya, tab vah dar men khdee hui." 
2Kings4:16 tab us ne kaha, basant retu men din poore hone par too aek betta chhatee se lagaaegee. sree ne kaha, he mere prabhu! he parameshvar ke bhkt aeesa nahee, apanee dasee ko dhaekha n de." 
2Kings4:17 aur sree ko garbh raha, aur vasant retu ka jo samay aeleesha ne us se kaha tha, usee samay jab din poore hua, tab usake putra utpann hua." 
2Kings4:18 aur jab ladka bada ho gaya, tab aek din vah apane pita ke pas lavanevalon ke nikatt nikal gaya." 
2Kings4:19 aur us ne apane pita se kaha, ah! mera sir, ah! mera sira. tab pita ne apane sevak se kaha, isako isakee mata ke pas le ja." 
2Kings4:20 vah use uttakar usakee mata ke pas le gaya, fir vah dopahar tak usake ghauttnon par baaitta raha, tab mar gaya." 
2Kings4:21 tab us ne chaddhkar usako parameshvar ke bhkt kee khatt par litta diya, aur nikalakar kivad band kiya, tab utar gai." 
2Kings4:22 aur us ne apane paati se pukarakar kaha, mere pas aek sevak aur aek gadahee turant bhej de ki maain parameshvar ke bhkt ke yahan jhtt patt ho aun." 
2Kings4:23 us ne kaha, aj too usake yahan kyon jaegee? aj n to naye chand ka, aur n vishraam ka din haai us ne kaha, kalyan hoga." 
2Kings4:24 tab us sree ne gadahee par kattee bandha kar apane sevak se kaha, hanke chala aur mere kahe bina hankane men ddhlaiai n karana." 
2Kings4:25 to vah chalate chalate karmel parvat ko parameshvar ke bhkt ke nikatt pahunchee. use door se dekhkar parameshvar ke bhkt ne apane sevak gehajee se kaha, dek, udhar to vah shoonemin haai." 
2Kings4:26 ab us se milane ko daud ja, aur us se pooch, ki too kushal se haai? tera paati bhee kushal se haai? aur ladka bhee kushal se haai? poochhne par sree ne uttar diya, ha, kushal se haain." 
2Kings4:27 vah pahad par parameshvar ke bhkt ke pas pahunchee, aur usake panv pakadne lagee, tab gehajee usake pas gaya, ki use dhakka dekar hattaa, parantu parameshvar ke bhkt ne kaha, use chhod de, usaka man yyakul haai parantu yahova ne mujh ko naheen bataya, chhpai hee rakha haai." 
2Kings4:28 tab vah kahane lagee, kya maain ne apane prabhu se putra ka var manga tha? kya maain ne n kaha tha mujhe dhaekha n de?" 
2Kings4:29 tab aeleesha ne gehajee se kaha, apanee kamar bandha, aur meree chhdee hath men lekar chala ja, marga men yaadi koi tujhe mile to usaka kushal n poochhna, aur koi tera kushal poochhe, to usako uttar n dena, aur meree yah chhdee us ladke ke munh par dhar dena." 
2Kings4:30 tab ladke kee man ne aeleesha se kaha, yahova ke aur tere jeevan kee shapath maain tujhe n chhodoongee. to vah uttkar usake peechhe peechhe chala." 
2Kings4:31 un se paahile pahunchakar gehajee ne chhdee ko us ladke ke munh par rakha, parantu koi shabd n sun pada, aur n us ne kan lagaya, tab vah eleesha se milane ko lautt aya, aur usako batalaadiya diya, ki ladka naheen jaga." 
2Kings4:32 jab aeleesha ghar men aya, tab kya dekha, ki ladka mara hua usakee khatt par pada haai." 
2Kings4:33 tab us ne akela bheetar jakar kivad band kiya, aur yahova se praarthna kee." 
2Kings4:34 tab vah chaddhkar ladke par is reeati se lett gaya ki apana munh usake munh se aur apanee ankhen usakee ankhon se aur apane hath usake hathon se mila diye aur vah ladke par pasar gaya, tab ladke kee deh garma hone lagee." 
2Kings4:35 aur vah use chhodkar ghar men idhar udhar tthalane laga, aur fir chaddhkar ladke par pasar gaya tab ladke ne sat bar chheenka, aur apanee ankhen kholeen." 
2Kings4:36 tab aeleesha ne gehajee ko bulakar kaha, shooneamin ko bula le. jab usake bulane se vah usake pas ai, tab us ne kaha, apane bette ko utta le." 
2Kings4:37 vah bheetar bai, aur usake pavon par gir boomi tak jhukakar dandvat kiya fir apane bette ko uttakar nikal gai." 
2Kings4:38 tab aeleesha gilagal ko lautt gaya. us samay desh men akal tha, aur bhvishyadvktaon ke chele usake samhane baaitte huae the, aur us ne apane sevak se kaha, handa chaddhakar bhvishyadvktaon ke chelon ke liye kuchh paka." 
2Kings4:39 tab koi maaidan men sag todne gaya, aur koi jangalee lata pakar apanee ankavar bhr indraayan tod le aya, aur faank faank karake pakane ke liye hande men dal diya, aur ve usako n pahichanate the." 
2Kings4:40 tab unhon ne un manushyon ke khane ke liye hande men se parosa. khate samay ve chillakar bol utte, he parameshvar ke bhkt hande men mahur haai, aur ve us men se kha n sake." 
2Kings4:41 tab aeleesha ne kaha, achchha, kuchh maaida le ao, tab us ne use hande men dal kar kaha, un logon ke khane ke liye paros de, fir hande men kuchh hani kee vastu n rahee." 
2Kings4:42 aur koi patushy balashaaleesha se, pahile upaje huae jav kee bees rottyaia, aur apanee boree men haree balen parameshvar ke bhkt ke pas le aya to aeleesha ne kaha, un logon ko khane ke liye de." 
2Kings4:43 usake tthaluae ne kaha, kya maain sau manushyon ke samhane itana hee rakh doon? us ne kaha, logon ko de de ki khe, kyonki yahova yon kahata haai, unake khane ke bad kuchh bach bhee jaega." 
2Kings4:44 tab us ne unake age dhar diya, aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar unake khane ke bad kuchh bach bhee gaya." 
2Kings5:1 aram ke raja ka naman nam senapati apane svamee kee drashtti men bada aur pratishttit pumsh tha, kyonki yahova ne usake dara aramiyon ko vijayee kiya tha, aur yah shooraveer tha, parantu koddhee tha." 
2Kings5:2 aramee loeg dal bandhakar israaael ke desh men jakar vahan se aek chhottee ladkee bandhauvai men le aae the aur vah naman kee patnee kee seva karatee thee. 
2Kings5:3 us ne apanee svamin se kaha, jo mera svamee shaemaron ke bhavishyadvkta ke pas hota, to kya hee achchha hota! kyonaki vah usako koddh se changa kar deta." 
2Kings5:4 to kisee ne usake prabhu ke pas jakar kah diya, ki israaaelee ladkee is prakar kahatee haai." 
2Kings5:5 aram ke raja ne kaha, too ja, maain israaael ke raja ke pas aek patra bhejoonga tab vah das kikkar chandee aur chhhajar ttukade sona, aur das jode kapade sath lekar ravana ho gaya." 
2Kings5:6 aur vah israaael ke raja ke pas vah patra le gaya jis men yah likha tha, ki jab yah patra tujhe mile, tab janana ki maain ne naman nam apane aek karmacharee ko tere pas isaaliye bheja haai, ki too usaka koddh door kar de." 
2Kings5:7 is patra ke paddhne par israaael ka raja apane vasr faadkar bola, kya maain maranevala aur jilanevala parameshvar hoo ki us purush ne mere pas kisee ko isaliye bheja haai ki maain usaka koddh door karoon? soch vichar to karo, vah mujh se jhgade ka karan ddoonddhta hoga." 
2Kings5:8 yah sunakar ki israaael ke raja ne apane vasr faade haai, parameshvar ke bhkt aeleesha ne raja ke pas kahala bheja, too ne kyon apane vasr faade haain? vah mere pas aa, tab jan lega, ki israaael men bhavishyadvkta to haai." 
2Kings5:9 tab naman dhaedon aur rathon samet aeleesha ke dar par akar khda hua. 
2Kings5:10 tab aeleesha ne aek doot se usake pas yah kahala bheja, ki too jakar yaradan men sat bar dubakee mar, tab tera shareer jyon ka tyon ho jaaega, aur too shuuddh hoga." 
2Kings5:11 parantu naman krodhait ho yah kahata hua chala gaya, ki maain ne to socha tha, ki avashy vah mere pas bahar aaega, aur khda hokar apane parameshvar yahova se praarthna karake koddh ke sthan par apana hath faerakar koddh ko door karega!" 
2Kings5:12 kya damishk kee abana aur parpar nadiyan israaael ke sab jalashayon se attam naheen haain? kya maain un men snan karake shuuddh naheen ho sakata hoo? isaaliye vah jalajalahatt se bhra hua lauttkar chala gaya. 
2Kings5:13 tab usake sevak pas akar kahane lage, he hamare pita yaadi bhvishyadvkta tujhe koi bharee kam karane kee agyaa deta, to kya too use n karata? fir jab vah kahata haai, ki snan karake shuuddh ho ja, to kitana adhaik ise manana chaahiye." 
2Kings5:14 tab us ne parameshvar ke bhkt ke vachan ke anusar yaradan ko jakar us men sat bar dubakee maree, aur usaka shareer chhotte ladke ka sa ho gaya aur vah shuuddh ho gaya." 
2Kings5:15 tab vah apane sab dal bal samet parameshvar ke bhkt ke yahan lautt aya, aur usake sammukh khda hokar kahane laga sun, ab maain ne jan liya haai, ki samast prathvee men israaael ko chhod aur kaheen parameshvar naheen haai. isaliye ab apane das kee bhentt grahan kara." 
2Kings5:16 aeleesha ne kaha, yahova jisake sammukh maain upasthiat rahata hoo usake jeevan kee shapath maain kuchh bhentt n loonga, aur jab us ne usako bahut vivash kiya ki bhentt ko grahan kare, tab bhee vah inakar hee karata raha." 
2Kings5:17 tab naman ne kaha, achchha, to tere das ko do khchchar mittee mile, kyonaki age ko tera das yahova ko chhod aur kisee ishvar ko homabali va melabali n chaddhaaega." 
2Kings5:18 aek bat to yahova tere das ke liye kshama kare, ki jab mera svamee rimmon ke bhvan men dandvat karane ko jaa, aur vah mere hath ka sahara le, aur yon mujhe bhee rimmon ke bhvan men dandvat karanee pade, tab yahova tere das ka yah kam kshama kare ki maain rimmon ke bhvan men dandvat karoon." 
2Kings5:19 us ne us se kaha, kushal se bida ho." 
2Kings5:20 vah usake yahan se thodee door jala gaya tha, ki parameshvar ke bhkt aeleesha ka sevak gehajee sochane laga, ki mere svamee ne to us aramee naman ko aeesa hee chhod diya haai ki jo vah le aya tha usako us ne n liya, parantu yahova ke jeevan kee shapath maain usake peechhe daudkar us se kuchh n kuchh le loonga." 
2Kings5:21 tab gehajee naman ke peechhe dauda, aur naman kisee ko apane peechhe daudta hooa dekhkar, us se milane ko rath se utar pada, aur poochha, sab kushal kshom to haai?" 
2Kings5:22 us ne kaha, ha, sab kushal haai parantu mere svamee ne mujhe yah kahane ko bheja haai, ki epraaim ke pahadee desh se bhvishyadvktaon ke chelon men se do javan mere yahan abhee aae haai, isaadiye unake liye ek kikkar chandee aur do jode vasr de." 
2Kings5:23 naman ne kaha, do kikkar lene ko prasann ho, tab us ne us se bahut binatee karake do kikkar khndee alag thailiyon men bandhakar, do jode vasr samet apane do sevakon par lad diya, aur ve unhen usake age age le chale." 
2Kings5:24 jab vah tteele ke pas pahuncha, tab us ne un vastuon ko un se lekar ghar men rakh diya, aur un manushyon ko bida kiya, aur ve chale gaae." 
2Kings5:25 aur vah bheetar jakar, apane svamee ke samhane khda hua. aeleesha ne us se poochha, he gehajee too kahan se ata haai? us ne kaha, tera das to kaheen naheen gaya," 
2Kings5:26 us ne us se kaha, jab vah purush idhar munh faerakar tujh se milane ko apane rath par se utara, tab vah poora hal mujhe maloom tha kya yah samay chandee va vasr va jalapai va dakh kee baariya, bhed-bakaariya, gayabaail aur dasa-dasee lene ka haai?" 
2Kings5:27 is karan se naman ka koddh tujhe aur tere vansh ko sada laga rahega. tab vah him sa shvet koddhee hokar usake samhane se chala gaya. 
2Kings6:1 aur bhavishyadvktaon ke chelon men se kisee ne aeleesha se kaha, yah sthan jis men ham tere samhane rahate haai, vah hamare liye saket haai." 
2Kings6:2 isaliye ham yaradan tak jaae, aur vahan se aek aek ballee lekar, yahan apane rahane ke liye aek sthan bana len us ne kaha, achchha jao." 
2Kings6:3 tab kisee ne kaha, apane dason ke sang chalane ko prasann ho, us ne kaha, chalata hoo." 
2Kings6:4 to vah unake sang chala aur ve yaradan ke teer pahunchakar lakadee kattne lage. 
2Kings6:5 parantu jab aek jan ballee katt raha tha, to kulhadee bentt se nikalakar jal men gir gai so vah chillakar kahane laga, hay! mere prabhu, vah to manganee kee thee." 
2Kings6:6 parameshvar ke bhkt ne poochha, vah kahan giree? jab us ne sthan dikhaya, tab us ne aek lakadee kattkar vahan dal dee, aur vah laha panee par taairane laga." 
2Kings6:7 us ne kaha, use utta le, tab us ne hath baddhakar use le liya." 
2Kings6:8 oair aram ka jaja israaael se yuddh kar raha tha, aur sammati karake apane karmachariyon se kaha, ki amuk sthan par meree chhavanee hogee." 
2Kings6:9 tab parameshvar ke bhkt ne israaael ke raja ke pas kahala bheja, ki chaukasee kar aur amuk sthan se hokar n jana kyonaki vahan aramee chaddhai karanevale haain." 
2Kings6:10 tab israaael ke raja ne us sthan ko, jisakee charcha karake parameshvar ke bhkt ne use chitaya tha, bhejakar, apanee raksha kee aur us prakar aek do bar naheen varan bahut bar hua." 
2Kings6:11 is karan aram ke raja ka man bahut ghabara gaya so us ne apane karmachariyon ko bulakar un se poochha, kya tum mujhe n bataoge ki ham logon men se kaun israaael ke raja kee or ka haai? usake aek karmacharee ne kaha, he mere prabhu! he raja! aeesa nahee," 
2Kings6:12 aeleesha jo israaael men bhvishyadvkta haai, vah israaael ke raja ko ve baten bhee bataya karata haai, jo too shayan kee kottree men bolata haai." 
2Kings6:13 raja ne kaha, jakar dekho ki vah kahan haai, tab maain bhejakar use pahadva mangaunga. aur usako yah samachar mila ki vah dotan men haai." 
2Kings6:14 tab us ne vahan ghaedon aur rathon samet aek bharee dal bheja, aur unhon ne rat ko akar nagar ko ghor liya." 
2Kings6:15 bhor ko parameshvar ke bhkt ka tthalua utta aur nikalakar kya dekhta haai ki ghaedon aur rathon samet aek dal nagar ko ghore huae pada haai. aur usake sevak ne us se kaha, hay! mere svamee, ham kya karen?" 
2Kings6:16 us ne kaha, mat dra kyonaki jo hamaree or haai, vah un se adhaik haai, jo unakee or haain." 
2Kings6:17 tab aeleesha ne yah praarthna kee, he yahova, isakee ankhen khol de ki yah dekh sake. tab yahova ne sevak kee ankhen khol dee, aur jab vah dekh saka, tab kya dekha, ki aeleesha ke charon or ka pahad aagnaimay ghaedon aur rathon se bhra hua haai." 
2Kings6:18 jab aramee usake pas aa, tab aeleesha ne yahova se praarthna kee ki is dal ko andha kar dala. aeleesha ke is vachan ke anusar us ne unhen andha kar diya." 
2Kings6:19 tab aeleesha ne un se kaha, yah to marga naheen haai, aur n yah nagar haai, mere peechhe ho lo maain tumhen us panushy ke pas jise tum ddoonddh rahe ho pahunchaunga. tab us ne unhen shaemaron ko pahuncha diya." 
2Kings6:20 jab ve shaemaron men a gaa, tab aeleesha ne kaha, he yahova, in logon kee ankhen khol ki dekh saken. tab yahova ne unakee ankhen kholee, aur jab ve dekhne lage tab kya dekha ki ham shaemaron ke madhy men haain." 
2Kings6:21 unako dekhkar israael ke raja ne eleesha se kaha, he mere pita, kya maain inako mar loon? maain unako mar loon?" 
2Kings6:22 us ne uttar diya, mat mara. kya too unako mar diya karata haai, jinako too talavar aur dhanush se bandhaua bana leta haai? too unako ann jal de, ki kha peekar apane svamee ke pas chale jaen." 
2Kings6:23 tab us ne unake liye badee jevanar kee, aur jab ve kha pee chuke, tab us ne unhen bida kiya, aur ve apane svamee ke pas chale gaae. isake bad aram ke dal israaael ke desh men fir n aae." 
2Kings6:24 parantu isake bad aram ke raja bennhadad ne apanee samast sena ikatthee karake, shaemaron par chaddhai kar dee aur usako ghor liya." 
2Kings6:25 tab shaemaron men bada akal pada aur vah aeesa ghaira raha, ki ant men aek gadahe ka sir chandee ke assee ttukadon men aur kab kee chauthai bhr kabootar kee beett panch ttukade chandee tak bikane lagee." 
2Kings6:26 aur israaael ka raja shaharapanah par tthal raha tha, ki aek sree ne pukar ke us se kaha, he prabhu, he raja, bacha." 
2Kings6:27 us ne kaha, yadi yahova tujhe n bachaa, to maain kahan se tujhe bachaun? kya khlihan men se, va dakhras ke kund men se?" 
2Kings6:28 fir raja ne us se poochha, tujhe kya hua? us ne uttar diya, is sree ne mujh se kaha tha, mujhe apana betta de, ki ham aj use kha le, fir kal maain apana betta doongee, aur ham use bhee khaaengee." 
2Kings6:29 tab mere bette ko pakakar ham ne kha liya, fir doosare din jab maain ne is se kaha ki apana betta de ki ham use kha le, tab is ne apane bette ko chhpai rakha." 
2Kings6:30 us sree kee ye baten sunate hee, raja ne apane vasr faade vah to shaharapanah par tthal raha tha, jab logon ne dekha, tab unako yah dekh pada ki vah bheetar apanee deh par ttatt paahine haai." 
2Kings6:31 tab vah bol utta, yadi maain shaapat ke vutra aeleesha ka sir aj usake ghad par rahane doo, to parameshvar mere sath aeesa hee varan is se bhee aadhaik kare." 
2Kings6:32 aeleesha apane ghar men baaitta hua tha, aur puraaniye bhee usake sang baaitte the. so jab raja ne apane pas se aeb jan bheja, tab us doot ke pahunchane se paahile us ne puraniyon se kaha, dekho, is koonee ke bette ne kisee ko mera sir kattte ko bheja haai isaaliye jab vah doot aa, tab kivad band karake roke rahana. kya usake svamee ke panv kee ahatt usake peechhe naheen sun padtee?" 
2Kings6:33 vah un se yon baten kar hee raha tha ki doot usake pas a pahuncha. aur raja kahane laga, yah vipaattai yahova kee or se haai, ab maain age ko yahova kee batt kyon johata rahoon?" 
2Kings7:1 tab aeleesha ne kaha, yahova ka vachan suno, yahova yon kahata haai, ki kal isee samay shaemaron ke faattk men saa bhr maaida aek shokel men aur do saa jav bhee aek shokel men bikega." 
2Kings7:2 tab us saradar ne jisake hath par raja taakiya karata t, parameshvar ke bhkt ko uttar dekar kaha, sun, chahe yahova akash ke jhrokhe khole, taubhee kya aeesee bat ho sakegee? us ne kaha, sun, too yah apanee ankhon se to dekhega, parantu us ann men se kuchh khane n paaega." 
2Kings7:3 aur char koddhee faattk ke bahar the ve apas men kahane lage, ham kyon yahan baaitte baaitte mar jaaen?" 
2Kings7:4 yaadi ham kahe, ki nagar men jaae, to vahan mar jaaenge kyonaki vahan manhagee padee haai, aur jo ham yaheen baaitte rahe, taubhee mar hee jaaenge. to ao ham aram kee sena men pakade jaaen yaadi ve ham ko jilaae rakhen to ham jeeavit rahenge, aur yaadi ve ham ko mar dale, taubhee ham ko marana hee haai." 
2Kings7:5 tab ve sanjh ko aram kee chhavanee men jane ko chale, aur aram kee chhavanee kee chhor par pahunchakar kya dekha, ki vahan koi naheen haai." 
2Kings7:6 kyonaki prabhu ne aram kee sena ko rathon aur ghaedon kee aur bharee sena kee see ahatt sunai thee, aur ve apas men kahane lage the ki, suno, israaael ke raja ne hittee aur misraee rajaon ko betan par bulavaya haai ki ham par chaddhai karen." 
2Kings7:7 isaliye ve sanjh ko uttkar aeese bhag gaa, ki apane dere, ghaede, gadahe, aur chhavanee jaaisee kee taaisee chhod-chhad apana apana praan lekar bhag gaae." 
2Kings7:8 to jab ve koddhee chhavanee kee chhor ke deron ke pas pahunche, tab aek dere men ghausakar khaya piya, aur us men se chandee, sona aur vasr le jakar chhpai rakha fir lauttkar doosare dere men ghaus gaae aur us men se bhee le jakar chhpai rakha." 
2Kings7:9 tab ve apas men kahane lage, jo ham kar rahe haain vah achchha kam naheen haai, yah anand ke samachar ka din haai, parantu ham kisee ko naheen batate. jo ham pah fattne tak tthare rahen to ham ko dand milega so ab ao ham raja ke gharane ke pas jakar yah bat batala den." 
2Kings7:10 tab ve chale aur nagar ke chaukeedaron ko bulakar bataya, ki ham jo aram kee chhavanee men gaa, to kya dekha, ki vahan koi naheen haai, aur manushy kee kuchh ahatt naheen haai, keval bandho hooae ghaede aur gadahe haai, aur dere jaaise ke taaise haain." 
2Kings7:11 tab chaukeedaron ne pukar ke rajabhvan ke bheetar samachar diya. 
2Kings7:12 aur raja rat hee ko utta, aur apane karmachaariyon se kaha, maain tumhen batata hoo ki araamiyon ne ham se kya kiya haai? ve janate haai, ki ham log bookhe haain is karan ve chhavanee men se maaidan men chhpaine ko yah kahakar gaae haai, ki jab ve nagar se nikalenge, tab ham unako jeevit hee pakadkar nagar men ghausane paaenge." 
2Kings7:13 parantu raja ke kisee karmacharee ne uttar dekar kaha, ki jo ghaede tagar men bach rahe haain un men se log panch ghaede le, aur unako bhejakar ham hal jan len. ve to israaael kee sab bheed ke saman haain jo nagar men rah gaae haain varan israaael kee jo bheed mar mitt gai haai ve usee ke saman haain." 
2Kings7:14 so unhon ne do rath aur unake ghaede liye, aur raja ne unako aram kee seena ke peechhe bheja aur kaha, jao, dekho." 
2Kings7:15 tab ve yaradan tak unake peechhe chale gaa, aur kya dekha, ki poora marga vasren aur patraen se bhra pada haai, jinhen araamiyon ne utavalee ke mare faenk diya tha tab doot lautt aa, aur raja se yah kah sunaya." 
2Kings7:16 tab logon ne nikalakar aram ke deron ko loott liya aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar aek saa maaida aek shokel me, aur do saa jav aek shokel men bikane laga." 
2Kings7:17 aur raja ne us saradar ko jisake hath par vah takiya karata tha faattk ka adhaikaree ttharaya tab vah faattk men logon ke pavon ke neeche dabakar mar gaya. yah parameshvar ke bhkt ke us vachan ke anusar hua jo us ne raja se usake yahan ane ke yamay kaha tha. 
2Kings7:18 parameshvar ke bhkt ne jaaisa raja se yah kaha tha, ki kal isee samay shaemaron ke faattk men do saa jav aek shokel me, aur aek saa maaida aek shokel men bikega, vaaisa hee hua." 
2Kings7:19 aur us saradar ne parameshvar ke bhkt ko, uttar dekar kaha tha, ki sun chahe yahova akash men jhrokhe khole taubhee kya aeesee bat ho sakegee? aur us ne kaha tha, sun, too yah apanee ankhon se to dekhega, parantu us ann men se khane n paaega." 
2Kings7:20 so usake sath tteek vaaisa hee hua, ataaev vah faattk men logon ke panvon ke neeche dabakar mar gaya." 
2Kings8:1 jis sree ke bette ko aeleesha ne jilaya tha, us se us ne kaha tha ki apane gharane samet yahan se jakar jahan kaheen too rah sake vahan raha kyonki yahova kee ichchha haai ki akal pade, aur vah is desh men sat varsha tak bana rahega." 
2Kings8:2 parameshvar ke bhkt ke is vachan ke anusar vah sree apane gharane samet palishtaiyon ke desh men jakar sat varsha rahee. 
2Kings8:3 sat varsha ke beetane par vah palishtaiyon ke desh se lautt ai, aur apane ghar aur boomi ke liye dohai dene ko raja ke pas gai." 
2Kings8:4 raja parameshvar ke bhkt ke sevak gehajee se baten kar raha tha, aur us ne kaha ki jo bade bade kam aeleesha ne kiye haain unahen mujh se varnn kara." 
2Kings8:5 jab vah raja se yah varnn kar hee raha tha ki aeleesha ne aek murde ko jilaya, tab jis sree ke bette ko us ne jilaya tha vahee akar apane ghar aur boomi ke liye dohai dene lagee. tab gehajee ne kaha, he mere prabhu! he raja! yah vahee sree haai aur yahee usaka betta haai jise aeleesha ne jilaya tha." 
2Kings8:6 jab raja ne stree se moochha, tab us ne us se sab kah diya. tab raja ne aek hakim ko yah kahakar usake sath kar diya ki lo kuchh isaka tha varan jab se is ne desh ko chhod diya tab se isake khet kee jitanee amadanee ab tak hui ho sab ise faer de." 
2Kings8:7 aur aeleesha daamishak ko gaya. aur jab aram ke raja benhadad ko jo rogee tha yah samachar mila, ki parameshvar ka bhkt yahan bhee aya haai," 
2Kings8:8 tab us ne hajaael se kaha, bhentt lekar parameshvar ke bhkt se milane ko ja, aur usake dara yahova se yah pooch, ki kya benhadad jo rogee haai vah bachega ki naheen?" 
2Kings8:9 tab hajaael bhentt ke liye daamishk kee sab uttam uttam vastuon se chalees untt ladavakar, us se milane ko chala, aur usake sammukh khda hokar kahane laga, tere putra aram ke raja benhadad ne mujhe tujh se yah poochhne ko bheja haai, ki kya maain jo rogee hoo to bachoonga ki naheen?" 
2Kings8:10 aeleesha ne us se kaha, jakar kah, too nishchay bach sakata, taubhee yahova ne mujh par pragatt kiya haai, ki too nisandeh mar jaaega." 
2Kings8:11 aur vah usakee or ttkattkee bandha kar dekhta raha, yahan tak ki vah lajjait hua. aur parameshvar ka bhkt rone laga." 
2Kings8:12 tab hajaael ne poochha, mera prabhu kyon rota haai? us ne uttar diya, isaliye ki mujhe maloom haai ki noo israaaeliyon par kya kya upadrav karega unake gaddhvale tagaron ko too foonk dega unake javanon ko too talavar se ghaat karega, unake balabachchon ko too pattk dega, aur unakee garbhvatee striayon ko too cheer dalega." 
2Kings8:13 hajaael ne kaha, tera das jo kutte sareekha haai, vah kya haai ki aeesa bada kam kare? aeleesha ne kaha, yahova ne mujh par yah pragatt kiya haai ki too aram ka raja ho jaaega." 
2Kings8:14 tab vah aeleesha se bida hokar apane svamee ke pas gaya, aur us ne us se poochha, aeleesha ne tujh se kya kaha? us ne uttar diya, us ne mujh se kaha ki benhadad nisandeh bachega." 
2Kings8:15 doosare din us ne rajai ko lekar jal se bhaigo diya, aur usako usake munh par aeesa oddha diya ki vah mar gaya. tab hajaael usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings8:16 israaael ke raja ahab ke putra yoram ke panchaven varsha me, jab yahooda ka raja yahoshaapat jeevit tha, tab yahoshaapat ka putra yahoram yahooda par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings8:17 jab vah raja hua, tab battees varsha ka tha, aur att varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha." 
2Kings8:18 vah israaael ke rajaon kee see chal chala, jaaise ahab ka gharana chalata tha, kyonki usakee sree ahab kee bettee thee aur vah us kam ko karata tha jo yahova kee drashtti men bura haai." 
2Kings8:19 taubhee yahova ne yahooda ko nash karana n chaha, yah usake das daud ke karan hua, kyonaki us ne usako vachan diya tha, ki tere vansh ke nimitt maain sada tere liye aek deepak jalata hua rakoonga." 
2Kings8:20 usake dinon men edom ne yahooda kee adhaeenata chhodkar apana ek raja bana liya. 
2Kings8:21 tab yoram apane sab rath sath liye huae sair ko gaya, or rat ko uttkar un aedomiyon ko jo use ghore huae the, aur rathon ke pradhaanon ko bhee mara aaair log apane apane dere ko bhag gaae." 
2Kings8:22 yon aedom yahooda ke vash se choott gaya, aur aj tak vaaisa hee haai. us samay libna ne bhee yahooda kee adhaeenata chhod dee." 
2Kings8:23 yoram ke aur sab kam aur jo kuchh us ne kiya, vah kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings8:24 nidan yoram apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur unake beech daudapur men use mittee dee gai aur usaka putra ahajjah usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Kings8:25 ahab ke putra israaael ke raja yoram ke barahaven varsha men yahooda ke raja yahoram ka putra ahajyah rajy karane laga. 
2Kings8:26 jab ahajyah raja bana, tab bais varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men aek hee varsha rajy kiya. aur usakee mata ka nam atalyah tha, jo israaael ke raja omraee kee potee thee." 
2Kings8:27 vah ahab ke gharane kee see chal chala, aur ahab ke gharane kee nai vah kam karata tha, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai, kyonki vah ahab ke gharane ka damad tha." 
2Kings8:28 aur vah ahab ke putra yoram ke sang gilad ke ramot men aram ke raja hajaael se ladne ko gaya, aur araamiyon ne yoram ko ghaayal kiya." 
2Kings8:29 so raja yoram isaliye lautt gaya, ki yijraail men un ghaavon ka ilaj karaa, jo usako araamiyon ke hath se us samay lage, jab vah hajaael ke sath lad raha tha. aur ahab ka putra yoram to yijraail men rogee raha, is karan yahooda ke raja yahoram ka putra ahajayah usako dekhne gaya." 
2Kings9:1 tab aeleesha bhavishyadvkta ne bhavishyadvktaon ke chelon men se aek ko bulakar us se kaha, kamar bandha, aur hath men tel kee yah kuppee lekar gilad ke ramot ko ja." 
2Kings9:2 aur vahan pahoonchakar yehoo ko jo yahoshaapat ka putra aur nimashaee ka pota haai, ddoonddh lena tab bheetar ja, usakee khda karakar usake bhiyon se alag aek bheetaree kottree men le jana." 
2Kings9:3 tab tel kee yah kuppee lekar tel ko usake sir par yah kah kar dalana, yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain israaael ka raja hone ke liye tera abhaishok kar deta hoo. tab dar kholakar bhagana, vilamh n karana." 
2Kings9:4 tab vah javan bhvishyadvkta gilad ke ramot ko gaya. 
2Kings9:5 vahan pahunchakar us ne kya dekha, ki senapati baaitte haae haain tab us ne kaha, he senapaati, mujhe tujh se kuchh kahana haai. yehoo ne poochha, ham sabhon men kis se? us ne kaha he senapati, tujhee se!" 
2Kings9:6 tab vah uttkar ghar men gaya aur us ne yah kahakar usake sir par tel dala ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain apanee praja israaael par raja hone ke liye tera abhaishok kar deta hoo." 
2Kings9:7 to too apane svamee ahab ke gharane ko mar dalana, jis se mujhe apane das bhavishyadvktaon ke varan apane sab dason ke koon ka jo ijaebel ne bahaya, palatta mile." 
2Kings9:8 kyonaki ahab ka samast gharana nash ho jaaega, aur maain ahab ke vansh ke har bak ladke ko aur israaael men ke kya bandhaua, kya svadhaeen, har aek ko nash kar daloonga." 
2Kings9:9 aur maain ahab ka gharana nabat ke putra yarobam ka sa, aur aahiyyah ke putra basha ka sa kar doonga." 
2Kings9:10 aur ijaebel ko yijraail kee boomi men kutte khaaenge, aur usako mittee denevala koi n hoga. tab vah dar kholakar bhag gaya." 
2Kings9:11 tab yehoo apane svamee ke karmachariyon ke pas nikal aya, aur aek ne us se poochha, kya kushal haai, vah bavala kyon tere pas aya tha? us ne un se kaha, tum ko maloom hoga ki vah kaun haai aur us se kya batacheet hui." 
2Kings9:12 unhon ne kaha joott haai, hamen bata de. us ne kaha, us ne mujh se kaha to bahut, parantu matalab yah haai ki yahova yon kahata haai ki maain israael ka raja hone ke liye tera abhaishok kar deta hoo." 
2Kings9:13 tab unhon ne jhtt apana apana vasr utar kar usake teeche seeddhee hee par bichhaya, aur naraasinge foonkakar kahane lage, yehoo raja haai." 
2Kings9:14 yon yehoo jo nimashaee ka pota aur yahoshaapat ka putra tha, us ne yoram se rajadraeh kee goshttee kee. yoram to sab israaael samet aram ke raja hajaael ke karan gilad ke ramot kee raksha kar raha tha" 
2Kings9:15 parantu raja yoram ap apane ghaav ka jo aram ke raja hajaael se yuddh karane ke samay usako aramiyon se lage the, unaka ilaj karane ke liye yijraail ko lautt gaya tha. tab yehoo ne kaha, yadi tumhara aeesa man ho, to is nagar men se koi nikal kar yijraail men sunane ko n jane paae." 
2Kings9:16 tab yehoo rath par chaddhkar, yijraail ko chala jahan yoram pada hua tha aur yahooda ka raja ahajyah yoram ke dekhne ko vahan aya tha." 
2Kings9:17 yijraail ke gummatt par, jo paharua khda tha, us ne yehoo ke sang ate huae dal ko dekhkar kaha, mujhe aek dal deekhta haai yoram ne kaha, aek savar ko bulakar un logon se milane ko bhej aur vah un se poochhe, kya kushal haai?" 
2Kings9:18 tab bak savar us se milane ko gaya, aur us se kaha, raja poochhta haai, kya kushal haai? yehoo ne kaha, kushal se tera kya kama? hattkar mere peechhe chala. tab paharuae ne kaha, vah doot unake pas pahuncha to tha, parantu lauttkar naheen aya." 
2Kings9:19 tab usane doosara savar bheja, aur us ne unake pas pahunchakar kaha, raja poochhta haai, kya kushal haai? yehoo ne kaha, kushal se tera kya kama? hattkar mere peechhe chala." 
2Kings9:20 tab paharuae ne kaha, vah bhee unake pas pahuncha to tha, parantu lauttkar naheen aya. hankana nimashaee ke pote yehoo ka sa haai vah to baudhe kee nai hankata haai." 
2Kings9:21 yoram ne kaha, mera rath jutava. jab usaka rath jut gaya, tab israaael ka raja yoram aur yahooda ka raja ahajyah, dono apane apane rath par chaddhkar nikal gaa, aur yehoo se milane ko bahar jakar yijraail nabot kee boomi men us se bhentt kee." 
2Kings9:22 yehoo ko dekhte hee yoram ne poochha, he yehoo kya kushal haai, yehoo ne uttar diya, jab tak teree mata ijaebel chhnaialapan aur ttona karatee rahe, tab tak kushal kahan?" 
2Kings9:23 tab yaram ras faer ke, aur ahajyah se yah kahakar ki he ahajyah vishvasaghaat haai, bhag chala." 
2Kings9:24 tab yehoo ne dhanush ko kan tak kheenchakar yoram ke pakhaudon ke beech aeesa teer mara, ki vah usaka day faodkar nikal gaya, aur vah apane rath men jhukakar gir pada." 
2Kings9:25 tab yehoo ne bidakar nam apane aek saradar se kaha, use uttakar yijraailee nabot kee boomi men faenk de smaran to kar, ki jab maain aur to, ham dono aek sang savar hokar usake pita ahab ke peechhe peechhe chal rahe the tab yahova ne us se yah bhree vachan kahavaya tha, ki yahova kee yah vanee haai," 
2Kings9:26 ki nabot aur usake putraen ka jo koon hua, use maain ne dekha haai, aur yahova kee yah vanaeee haai, ki maain usee boomi men tujhe badala doonga. to ab yahova ke us vachan ke anusar ise uttakar usee boomi men faenk de." 
2Kings9:27 yah dekhkar yahooda ka raja ahajyah baree ke bhvan ke marga se bhag chala. aur yehoo ne usaka peechha karake kaha, use bhee rath hee par maro to vah bhee yibalam ke pas kee goor kee chaddhai par mara gaya, aur magio tak bhgakar mar gaya." 
2Kings9:28 tab usake karmachaariyon ne use rath par yarooshalem ko pahunchakar daudapur men usake purakhaon ke beech mittee dee. 
2Kings9:29 ahajyah to ahab ke putra yoram ke gyarahaven varsha men yahooda par rajy karane laga tha. 
2Kings9:30 jab yehoo yijraail ko aya, tab ijaebel yah sun apanee ankhon men surma laga, apana sir sanvarakar, khaidkee men se jhankane lagee." 
2Kings9:31 jab yehoo faattk men hokar a raha tha tab us ne kaha, he apane svamee ke ghaat karane vale jimrae, kya kushal haai?" 
2Kings9:32 tab us ne khaidkee kee or munh uttakar poochha, meree or kaun haai? kauna? is par do teen khojon ne usakee or jhanka." 
2Kings9:33 tab us ne kaha, use neeche gira do. so unhon ne usako neeche gira diya, aur usake lohoo ke kuchh chheentte bheet par aur kuchh ghaedon par pade, aur unhon ne usako panv se latad diya." 
2Kings9:34 tab vah bheetar jakar khane peene laga aur kaha, jao us sraaapit sree ko dekh lo, aur use mittee do vah to raja kee bettee haai." 
2Kings9:35 jab ve use mittee dene gaa, tab usakee khopadee panvon aur hathealiyon ko chhodkar usaka aur kuchh n paya." 
2Kings9:36 so unhon ne lauttkar us se kah diya tab us ne kaha, yah yahova ka vah vachan haai, jo us ne apane das tishabee aeliyyah se kahalavaya tha, ki ijaebel ka mans yijraail kee boomi men kutton se khaya jaaega." 
2Kings9:37 aur ijaebel kee loth yijraail kee boomi par khad kee nai padee rahegee, yahan tak ki koi n kahega, yah ijaebel haai." 
2Kings10:1 ahab ke to sattar bette, pote, shaemaron men rahate the. so yehoo ne shaemaron men un puraniyon ke pas, aur jo yijraail ke hakim the, aur jo ahab ke ladkevalon ke palanevale the, unake pas patra likhkar bheje," 
2Kings10:2 ki tumhare svamee ke bette, pote to tumhare pas rahate haai, aur tumhare rat, aur dhode bhee haai, aur tumhare aek gaddhvala nagar, aur hathaiyar bhee haain to is patra ke hath lagate hee," 
2Kings10:3 apane svamee ke betton men se jo sab se achchha aur yogy ho, usako chhanttkar, usake pita kee gaee par baaittao, aur apane svamee ke gharane ke liye lado." 
2Kings10:4 parantu ve nipatt dr gaa, aur kahane lage, usake samhane do raja bhee tthar n sake, fir ham kahan tthar sakenge?" 
2Kings10:5 tab jo raj gharane ke kam par tha, aur jo nagar ke upar tha, unhon ne aur puraniyon aur ladkebalon ke palanevalon ne yehoo ke pas yon kahala bheja, ki ham tere das haai, jo kuchh too ham se kahe, use ham karenge ham kisee ko raja n banaaenge, jo tujhe bhaae vaheen kara." 
2Kings10:6 tab us ne doosara patra likhkar unake pas bheja, ki yadi tum meree or ke ho aur meree mano, to apane svamee ke betton poton ke sir kattvakar kal isee samay tak mere pas yijraail men hajir hona. rajaputra to jo sattar matushy the, ve us nagar ke raison ke pas palate the." 
2Kings10:7 yah patra unake hath lagate hee, unhon ne un sattaron rajaputraen ko pakadkar mar dala, aur unake sir ttokaariyon men rakhkar yijraail ko usake pas bhej diae." 
2Kings10:8 aur aek doot ne usake pas jakar bata diya, ki rajakumaron ke sir agaae haain. tab us ne kaha, unhen faattk men do ddher karake bihan tak rakho." 
2Kings10:9 bihan ko us ne bahar ja khde hokar sab logon se kaha, tum to nidash ho, maain ne apane svamee se rajadraeh kee goshttee karake use ghaat kiya, parantu in sabhon ko kis ne mar dala?"
