2Kings10:10 ab jan lo ki jo vachan yahova ne apane das aeliyyah ke dara kaha tha, use us ne poora kiya haai jo vachan yahova ne ahab ke gharane ke vishay kaha, us men se aek bhee bat bina pooree huae n rahegee." 
2Kings10:11 tab ahab ke gharane ke jitane log yijraail men rah gaa, un sabhon ko aur usake jitane pradhaan purush aur mitra aur yajak the, un sabhon ko yehoo ne mar dala, yahan tak ki us ne kisee ko jeeavit n chhoda." 
2Kings10:12 tab vah vahan se chalakar shaemaron ko gaya. aur marga men charavahon ke un katarane ke sthan par pahuncha hee tha," 
2Kings10:13 ki yahooda ke raja ahayyah ke bhi yehoo se mile aur jab us ne poochha, tum kaun ho? tab unhon ne uttar diya, ham ahajyah ke bhai haai, aur rajamutraen aur rajamata ke betton ka kushalakshom poochhne ko jate haain." 
2Kings10:14 tab us ne kaha, inhen jeevit pakado. so unhon ne unako jo bayalees purush the, jeeavit pakada, aur un katarate ke sthan kee babalee par mar dala, us ne un men se kisee ko n chhoda." 
2Kings10:15 jab vah vahan se chala, tab rekab ka putra yahonadab samhane se ata hua usako mila. usaka kashal us ne poochhkar kaha, mera man to teree or nishkapatt haai so kya tera man bhee vaaisa hee haai? yahonadab ne kaha, ha, aeesa hee haai. fir us ne kaha, aeesa ho, to apana hath mujhe de. us ne apana hath use diya, aur vah yah kahakar use apane pas rath par chaddhane laga," 
2Kings10:16 ki mere sang chala. aur dek, ki mujhe yahova ke nimitt kaaisee jalan rahatee haai. tab vah usake rath par chaddha diya gaya." 
2Kings10:17 shaemaron ko pahunchakar us ne yahova ke us vachan ke anusar jo us ne aeliyyah se kaha tha, ahab ke jitane shaemaron men bache rahe, un sabhon ko mar ke vinash kiya." 
2Kings10:18 tab yehoo ne sab logon ko ikattha karake kaha, ahab ne to bal kee thodee hee upasana kee thee, ab yehoo usakee apasana baddhke karega." 
2Kings10:19 isaliye ab bal ke sab naabiyo, sab upasakon aur sab yajakon ko mere pas bula lao, un men se koi bhee n rah jaae kyonaki bal ke liye mera aek bada yagya honevala haai jo koi n aae vah jeeavit n bachega. yehoo ne yah kam kamatt karake bal ke sab upasakon ko nash karane ke liye kiya." 
2Kings10:20 tab yehoo ne kaha, bal kee aek paavitra mahasabha ka prachar karo. aur logon ne prachar kiya." 
2Kings10:21 aur yehoo ne sare israaael men doot bheje tab val ke sab upasak aa, yahan tak ki aeesa koi n rah gaya jo n aya ho. aur ve bal ke bhvan men itane aa, ki vah aek sire se doosare sire tak bhr gaya." 
2Kings10:22 tab us ne us manushy se jo vasr ke ghar ka adhaikaree tha, kaha, bal ke sab upasakon ke liye vasr nikal le a so vah unake liye vasr nikal le aya." 
2Kings10:23 tab yehoo rekab ke putra yahonadab ko sang lekar bal ke bhpan men gaya, aur bal ke upasakon se kaha, ddoonddhkar dekho, ki yahan tumhare sang yahova ka koi upasak to naheen haai, keval bal hee ke upasak haain." 
2Kings10:24 tab ve melabaali aur homabali chaddhane ko bheetar gaae. yehoo ne to assee purush bahar tthara kar un se kaha tha, yadi un manushyon men se jinhen maain tumhare hath kar doo, kortt bhee bachane paa, to jo use jane dega usaka praa, usake praan kee santee jaaega." 
2Kings10:25 fir jab homabali chaddh chuka, tab sanhoo ne paharuon aur saradaron se kaha, bheetar jakar unhen mar dalo koi nikalane n paae. tab unhon ne unhen talavar se mara aur paharuae aur saradar unako bahar faenkakar bal ke bhvan ke nagar ko gaae." 
2Kings10:26 aur unhon ne bal ke bhvan men kee latten nikalakar foonk deen. 
2Kings10:27 aur bal kee latt ko unhon ne tod dala aur bal ke bhvan ko ddhakar payakhana bana diya aur vah aj tak aeesa hee haai. 
2Kings10:28 yon yehoo ne bal ko israaael men se nash karake door kiya. 
2Kings10:29 aitaubhee nabat ke putra yarobam, jis ne israaael se pap karaya tha, usake papon ke anusar karane, arthata betel aur dan men ke sone ke bachhdon kee pooja, us se yehoo alag n hua." 
2Kings10:30 aur yahova ne yehoo se kaha, isaliye ki noo ne vah kiya, jo meree drashtti men tteek haai, aur ahab ke gharane se meree ichchha ke anusar bartav kiya haai, tere parapote ke putra tak teree santan israaael kee gaee par birajatee rahegee." 
2Kings10:31 parantu yehoo ne israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee yyavastha par poorn man se chalane kee chaukasee n kee, varan yarobam jis ne israaael se pap karaya tha, usake papon ke anusar karane se vah alag n hua." 
2Kings10:32 un dinon yahova israael ko ghattane laga, isaliye hajael ne israael ke un sare deshaen men unako mara" 
2Kings10:33 yaradan se poorab kee or gilad ka sara desha, aur gadee aur roobenee aur manashshoi ka desh arthata aroaer se lekar jo anan kee tarai ke pas haai, gilad aur bashaan taka." 
2Kings10:34 yehoo ke aur sab kam aur jo kuchh us ne kiya, aur usakee poorrn veerata, yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings10:35 nidan yehoo apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya, aur shaemaron men usako mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra yahoahaj usake sthan par raja ban gaya." 
2Kings10:36 yehoo ke shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane ka samay to atthais varsha ka tha. 
2Kings11:1 jab ahajyah kee mata atalyah ne dekha, ki mera putra mar gaya, tab us ne poore rajavansh ko nash kar dala." 
2Kings11:2 parantu yahoshoba jo raja yoram kee bettee, aur ahajyah kee baahin thee, us ne ahajyah ke putra yoash ko ghaat honevale rajakumaron ke beech men se churakar dhaai samet bichhaune rakhne kee kottree men chhpai diya. aur unhon ne use atalyah se aeesa chhpai rakha, ki vah mara n gaya." 
2Kings11:3 aur vah usake pas yahova ke bhvan men chhvarsha chhpai raha, aur atalyah desh par rajy karatee rahee." 
2Kings11:4 sataven varsha men yahoyada ne jalladon aur paharuon ke shatapaatiyon ko bula bheja, aur unako yahova ke bhvan men apane pas le aya aur un se vacha bandhaee aur yahova ke bhvan men unako shapath khailakar, unako rajaputra dikhaya." 
2Kings11:5 aur us ne unhen agyaa dee, ki aek kam karo arthata tum men se aek tihai log jo vishraamadin ko anevale ho, vah rajabhvan ke pahare kee chaukasee karen." 
2Kings11:6 aur aek tihai log soor nam faattk men tthare rahe, aur aek tihai log paharuon ke peechhe ke faattk men rahen yon tum bhvan kee chaukasee karake logon ko roke rahana." 
2Kings11:7 aur tumhare do dal arthata jitane vishraam din ko bahar janevale hon vah raja ke asapas hokar yahova ke bhvan kee chaukasee karen. 
2Kings11:8 aur tum apane apane hath men haathaiyar liye huae raja ke charon or rahana, aur jo koi pantiyon ke bheetar ghausana chahe vah mar dala jaa, aur tum raja ke ate-jate samay usake sang rahana." 
2Kings11:9 yahayada yajak kee in sab agyaaon ke anusar shatapaatiyon ne kiya. ve vishraamadin ko anevale aur janevale donon dalon ke apane apane janon ko sang lekar yahoyada yajak ke pas gaae. 
2Kings11:10 tab yajak ne shatapatiyon ko raja daud ke barchhe, aur ddhalen jo yahova ke bhvan men theen de deen." 
2Kings11:11 isaliye ve paharuae apane apane hath men haathaiyar liae huae bhvan ke dakkhianee kone se lekar uttaree kone tak vedee aur bhvan ke pas raja ke charon or usakee ad karake khde huae. 
2Kings11:12 tab us ne rajakumar ko bahar lakar usake sir par mukut, aur sakshaeepatra dhar diya tab logon ne usaka abhaishok karake usako raja banaya fir talee baja bajakar bol utte, raja jeevit rahe." 
2Kings11:13 jab atalyah ko paharuon aur logon ka halachal sun pada, tab vah unake pas yahova ke bhvan men gai." 
2Kings11:14 aur us ne kya dekha ki raja reeati ke anusar khmbhe ke pas khda haai, aur raja ke pas pradhaan aur turahee bajanevale khde haain. aur log anand karate aur turaahiyan baja rahe haain. tab atalyah apane vasr faadkar rajadraeha rajadraeh yon pukarane lagee." 
2Kings11:15 tab yahoyada yajak ne dal ke aadhaikaree shatapatiyon ko agyaa dee ki use apanee pantiyon ke beech se nikal le jao aur jo koi usake peechhe chale use talavar se mar dalo. kyonaki yajak ne kaha, ki vah yahova ke bhvan men n mar dalee jaae." 
2Kings11:16 isaliye unhon ne donon or se usako jagah dee, aur vah us marga ke beech se chalee gai, jis se ghaede rajabhvan men jaya karate the aur vahan vah mar dalee gai." 
2Kings11:17 tab yahoyada ne yahova ke, aur raja-praja ke beech yahova kee praja hone kee vacha bandhaai, aur us ne raja aur praja ke madhy bhee vacha bandhaai." 
2Kings11:18 tab sab logon ne bal ke bhvan ko jakar ddha diya, aur usakee veadiyan aur mooraten bhlee bhnti tod deen aur matan nam bal ke yajak ko vediyon ke samhane hee ghaat kiya. aur yajak ne yahova ke bhvan par aadhaikaree tthara diae." 
2Kings11:19 tab vah shatapaatiyo, jalladon aur paharuon aur sab logon ko sath lekar raja ko yahova ke bhvan se neeche le gaya, aur paharuon ke faattk ke marga se rajabhvan ko pahuncha diya. aur raja rajagaee par virajaman hua." 
2Kings11:20 tab sab log anandait hua, aur nagar men shaantai hui. atalyah to rajabhvan ke pas talavar se mar dalee gai thee." 
2Kings11:21 jab yoash raja hua, us samay vah sat parsha ka tha." 
2Kings12:1 yehoo ke sataven varsha men yoash rajy karane laga, aur yarooshalem men chalees varsha tak rajy karata raha. usakee mata ka nam sibya tha jo beshba kee thee." 
2Kings12:2 aur jab tak yahoyada yajak yoash ko shaiksha deta raha, tab tak vah vahee kam karata raha jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai." 
2Kings12:3 taubhee unche sthan giraae n gaae praja ke log tab bhee unche sthan par bali chaddhate aur dhoop jalate rahe. 
2Kings12:4 aur yoash ne yajakon se kaha, pavitra kee hui vastuon ka jitana rupaya yahova ke bhvan men pahunchaya jaa, arthata gine huae logon ka rupaya aur jitane rupaye ke jo koi yogy ttharaya jaa, aur jitana rupaya jisakee ichchha yahova ke bhvan men le ane kee ho," 
2Kings12:5 in sab ko yajak log apanee jan pahachan ke logon se liya karen aur bhvan men jo kuchh tootta footta ho usako sudhaar den. 
2Kings12:6 taubhee yajakon ne bhvan men jo tootta footta tha, use yoash raja ke teisaven varsha tak naheen sudhaara tha." 
2Kings12:7 isaliye raja yoash ne yahoyada yajak, aur aur yajakon ko bulavakar poochha, bhvan men jo kuchh tootta footta haai, use tum kyon naheen sudhaarate? ab se apanee jan pahachan ke logon se aur rupaya n lena, aur jo tumhen mile, use bhvan ke sudhaarane ke liye de dena." 
2Kings12:8 tab yajakon ne manaliya ki n to ham praja se aur rupaya len aur n bhvan ko sudhaaren. 
2Kings12:9 tab yahoyada yajak ne aek sandook le, asake ddhkane men chhed karake usako yahova ke bhvan men anevalon ke dahine hath par vedee ke pas dhar diya aur dar kee rakhvalee karanevale yajak us men vah sab rupaya dalate lage jo yahova ke bhvan men laya jata tha." 
2Kings12:10 jab unhon ne dekha, ki sandook men bahut rupaya haai, tab raja ke pradhaan aur mahayajak ne akar use thailiyon men bandha diya, aur yahova ke bhvan men paae huae rupaye ko gin liya." 
2Kings12:11 tab unhon ne us taule huae rupaye ko un kam karanevalon ke hath men diya, jo yahova ke bhvan men adhaikaree the aur inhon ne use yahova ke bhvan ke bananevale baddhiyo, rajo, aur sangatarashaen ko diye." 
2Kings12:12 aur lakadee aur gaddhe huae patthr mol lene me, varan jo kuchh bhvan ke tootte footte kee marammat men khrcha hota tha, us men lagaya." 
2Kings12:13 marantu jo rupaya yahova ke bhvan men ata tha, us se chandee ke tasale, chimatte, kattore, turaahiyan aadi sone va chandee ke kisee prakar ke patra n bane." 
2Kings12:14 parantu vah kam karanevale ko diya gaya, aur unhon ne use lekar yahova ke bhvan kee marammat kee." 
2Kings12:15 aur jinake hath men kam karanevalon ko dene ke liye rupaya diya jata tha, un se kuchh hisab n liya jata tha, kyonki ve sachchai se kam karate the." 
2Kings12:16 jo rupaya doshabaaliyon aur papabaaliyon ke liye diya jata tha, yah to yahova ke bhvan men n lagaya gaya, vah yajakon ko milata tha." 
2Kings12:17 tab aram ke raja hajaael ne gat nagar par chaddhai kee, aur us se ladai karake use le liya. tab us ne yarooshalem par bhee chaddhai karane ko apana munh kiya." 
2Kings12:18 tab yahooda ke raja yoash ne un sab paavitra vastuon ko jinhen usake purakha yahoshaapat yahoram aur ahajyah nam yahooda ke rajaon ne pavitra kiya tha, aur apanee paavitra kee hui vastuon ko bhee aur jitana sona yahova ke bhvan ke bhndaron men aur rajabhvan men mila, us sab ko lekar aram ke raja hajaael ke pas bhej diya aur vah yarooshalem ke pas se chala gaya." 
2Kings12:19 yoash ke aur sab kam jo us ne kiya, vah kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Kings12:20 yoash ke karmachaariyon ne rajadraeh kee goshttee karake, usako millo ke bhvan men jo silla kee utarai par tha, mar dala." 
2Kings12:21 arthata shaimat ka putra yojakar aur shaemer ka putra yahojabad, jo usake karmacharee the, unhon ne use aeesa mara, ki vah mar gaya. tab use usake purakhaon ke beech daudapur men mittee dee, aur usaka putra amasyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings13:1 ahajyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yoash ke teisaven varsha men yanhoo ka mutra yahoahaj shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane laga, aur satrah varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Kings13:2 aur us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha arthata nabat ke putra yarobam jis ne israaael se pap karaya tha, usake papon ke anusar vah karata raha, aur unako chhod n diya." 
2Kings13:3 isaliye yahova ka krodha israaaeliyon ke viruddh bhdk utta, aur us ne unako aram ke raja hajaael, aur usake putra benhadad ke adhaeen kar diya." 
2Kings13:4 tab yahoahaj yahova ke samhane gidgidaya aur yahova ne usakee sun lee kyonaki us ne israaael par andhor dekha ki aram ka raja un par kaaisa andhor karata tha. 
2Kings13:5 isaliye yahova ne israaael ko aek chhudanevala diya aur ve aram ke vash se choott gaae aur israaaelee agale dinon kee nai fir apane apane dere men rahane lage. 
2Kings13:6 taubhee ve aeese papon se n fire, jaaise yarobam ke gharane ne kiya, aur jinake anusar us ne israaael se pap karaae the parantu un men chalate rahe, aur shaemaron men ashora bhee khdee rahee." 
2Kings13:7 aram ke raja ne to yahoahaj kee sena men se keval pachas savar, das rat, aur das hajar pyade chhod diae the kyonki us ne unako nash kiya, aur raund raundakar ke dhooli men mila diya tha." 
2Kings13:8 yahoahaj ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, aur usakee veerata, yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings13:9 nidan yahoahaj apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur shaemaron men use miee dee bai aur usaka putra yoash usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Kings13:10 yahooda ke raja yoash ke rajy ke saainteesaven varsha men yahoahaj ka putra yahoash shaemaron men israaael par rajy karate laga, aur solah varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Kings13:11 aur us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, arthata nabat ka putra yarobam jis ne israaael se pap karaya tha, usake papo ke anusar vah karata raha, aur un se alag n hua." 
2Kings13:12 yoash ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, aur khsai veerata se vah sahooda ke raja amasyah se lada, yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings13:13 nidan yoash apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur yarobam usakee gaee par virajaman hua aur yoash ko shaemaron men iyaraaael ke rajaon ke beech mittee dee gai. 
2Kings13:14 aur aeleesha ko vah rog lag gaya jis se vah marane par tha, tab israaael ka raja yoash usake pas gaya, aur usake upar rokar kahane laga, hay mere pita! hay mere pita! hay israaael ke rath aur savaro! aeleesh ne us se kaha, dhanush aur teer le a." 
2Kings13:15 vah usake pas dhanush aur teer le aya. 
2Kings13:16 tab us ne israaael ke raja se kaha, dhanush par apana hath laga. jab us ne apana hath lagaya, tab aeleesha ne apane hath raja ke hathon par dhar diae." 
2Kings13:17 tab us ne kaha, poorva kee khaidkee khola. jab us ne use khol diya, tab aeleesha ne kaha, teer chhod de us ne teer chhoda. aur aeleesha ne kaha, yah teer yahova kee or se chhuttkare arthata aram se chhuttkare ka chi haai, isaliye too apek men aram ko yahan tak mar lega ki unaka ant kar dalega." 
2Kings13:18 fir us ne kaha, teeron ko le aur jab us ne unhen liya, tab us ne israaael ke raja se kaha, boomi par mara tab vah teen bar mar kar tthar gaya." 
2Kings13:19 aur parameshvar ke jan ne us par krodhait hokar kaha, tujhe to panch chh bar marana chahiye tha. aeesa karate se to too aram ko yahan tak marata ki unaka ant kar dalata, parantu ab too unhen teen hee bar marega." 
2Kings13:20 tab aeleesha mar gaya, aur use mittee dee gai. aek varsha ke bad moab ke dal desh men aae." 
2Kings13:21 log kisee manushy ko mitthee de rahe the, ki aek dal unhen dekh pada tab unhon ne us loth ko aeleesha kee kabar men dal diya, aur aeleesha kee haaddhiyon ke choote hee vah jee utta, aur apane pavon ke bal khda ho gaya." 
2Kings13:22 yahoahaj ke jeevan bhr aram ka raja hajaael israaael par andhor hee karata raha. 
2Kings13:23 parantu yahova ne un par anugrah kiya, aur un par daya karake apanee us vacha ke karan jo us ne ibraaheem, isahak aur yakoob se bandhaee thee, un par krapa draashtti kee, aur n to unhen nash kiya, aur n apane samhane se nikal diya." 
2Kings13:24 tab aram ka raja hajaael mar gaya, aur usaka putra benhadad usake sthan par raja ban gaya." 
2Kings13:25 aur yahoahaj ke putra yahoash ne hajaael ke putra benhadad ke hath se ve nagar fir le lia, jinhen us ne yuddh karake usake pita yahoahaj ke hath se chheen liya tha. yoash ne usako teen bar jeetakar israaael ke nagar fir le liae." 
2Kings14:1 israaael ke raja yahoahaj ke putra soash ke doosare varsha men yahooda ke raja yoash ka mutra asasyah raja hua. 
2Kings14:2 jab vah rajy karane laga. tab vah pachees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men unatees varsha rajy karata raha. aur usakee mata ka nam yahoaeen tha, jo yarooshalem kee thee." 
2Kings14:3 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha taubhee apane mool purush daud kee nai n kiya us ne tteek apane pita yoash ke se kam kie. 
2Kings14:4 usake dinon men unche sthan giraae n gae log tab bhee un par bali chaddhate, aur dhoop jalate rahe." 
2Kings14:5 jab rajy usake hath men sthiar ho gaya, tab us ne apane un karmachariyon ko mar dala, jinhon ne usake pita raja ko mar dala tha." 
2Kings14:6 parantu un kooniyon ke ladkevalon ko us ne n mar dala, kyonaki yahova kee yah agyaa moosa kee yyavastha kee pustak men likhee haai, ki putra ke karan pita n mar dala jaa, aur pita ke karan putra n mar dala jaae jis ne pap kiya ho, vahee us pap ke karan mar dala jaae." 
2Kings14:7 usee amasyah ne lon kee tarai men das hajar edomee purush mar dale, aur sela nagar se yuddh karake use le liya, aur usaka nam yoktel rakha, aur vah nam aj tak chalata haai." 
2Kings14:8 tab amasyah ne israaael ke raja yoash ke pas jo yehoo ka pota aur yahoahaj ka putra tha dooton se kahala bheja, ki a ham aek doosare ka samhana karen." 
2Kings14:9 israaael ke raja yoash ne yahooda ke raja amasyah ke pas yon kahala bheja, ki labanon par kee aek jhdberee ne labanon ke aek devadaru ke pas kahala bheja, ki apanee bettee mere bette ko byah de itane men labanon men ka aek banapashu pas se chala gaya aur us jhdberee ko raund dala." 
2Kings14:10 too ne aedomiyon ko jeeta to haai isaaliye too fool utta haai. usee par badai parata hua ghar rah ja too apanee haani ke liye yahan kyon hath uttata haai, jis se too kya varan yahooda bhee teecha khaaega?" 
2Kings14:11 parantu amassah ne n mana. tab israaael ke raja yoash ne chaddhai kee, aur us ne aur yahooda ke raja amasyah ne yahooda desh ke betashomesh men aek doosare ka samahana kiya." 
2Kings14:12 aur yahooda israaael se har gaya, aur aek aek apane apane dere ko bhaga." 
2Kings14:13 tab israaael ke raja yoash ne yahooda ke raja amasyah ko jo ahajyah ka pota, aur yoash ka putra tha, betashomesh men pakad liya, aur yarooshalem ko gaya, aur yarooshalem kee shaharapanah men se bapraaimee faattk se konevale faattk tak char sau hath gira diae." 
2Kings14:14 aur jitana sona, chandee aur jitane patra yahova ke bhvan men aur rajabhvan ke bhndaron men mile, un sab ko aur bandhak logon ko bhee lekar vah shaemaron ko lautt gaya." 
2Kings14:15 yoash ke aur kam jo us ne kia, or usakee veerata aur us ne kis reeti yahooda ke raja amasyah se yuddh kiya, yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings14:16 nidan yoash apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur use israaael ke rajaon ke beech shaemaron men mittee dee gai aur usaka putra yarobam usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Kings14:17 yahoahaj ke putra israaael ke raja yahoash ke marane ke bad yoash ka putra yahooda ka raja amasyah pandrah varsha jeeavit raha. 
2Kings14:18 amasyah ke aur kam kya yahooda ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain? 
2Kings14:19 jab yarooshalem men usake viruddh rajadraeh kee goshttee kee gai, tab vah lakeesh ko bhag gaya. so unhon ne lakeesh tak usaka peechha karake usako vahan mar dala." 
2Kings14:20 tab vah ghaedon par rakhkar yarooshalem men pahunchaya gaya, aur vahan usake purakhaon ke beech usako daudapur men mittee dee gai." 
2Kings14:21 tab sararee yahoodee praja ne ajaryah ko lekar, jo solah varsha ka tha, usake pita amasyah ke sthan par raja niyukt kar diya." 
2Kings14:22 jab raja amasyah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya, usake bad ajaryah ne aelat ko draddh karake yahooda ke vash men fir kar liya." 
2Kings14:23 yahooda ke raja yoash ke putra amasyah ke rajy ke pandrahaven varsha men israaael ke raja yoash ka putra yarobam shaemaron men rajy karane laga, aur aekatalees varsha rajy karata raha." 
2Kings14:24 us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha arthata nabat ke putra yarobam jis ne israael se pap karaya tha, usake papon ke anusar vah karata raha, aur un se vah alag n hua." 
2Kings14:25 us ne israael ka sivana hamat kee ghaattee se le araba ke tal tak jyon ka tyon kar diya, jaaisa ki israael ke parameshvar yahova ne aamittaai ke putra apane das gatheperavasee yona bhavishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha." 
2Kings14:26 kyonaki yahova ne israaael ka dukh dekha ki bahut hee kaattnai haai, varan kya bandhaua kya svadhaeen koi bhee bacha n raha, aur n israaael ke liye koi sahayak tha." 
2Kings14:27 yahova ne naheen kaha tha, ki maain israaael ka nam gharatee par se mitta daloonga. so us ne yoash ke putra yarobam ke dara unako choottkara diya." 
2Kings14:28 yarobam ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, aur kaaise parakram ke sath us ne yuddh kiya, aur daamishk aur hamat ko jo pahale yahooda ke rajy men the israaael ke vash men fir mila liya, yah sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings14:29 nidan yarobam apane purakhaon ke sang jo israaael ke raja the so gaya, aur usaka putra jakaryah usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings15:1 israaael ke raja yarobam ke sataisaven varsha men yahooda ke raja amasyah ka putra ajaryah raja hua. 
2Kings15:2 jab vah rajy karane laga, tab solah varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men bavan varsha rajy karata raha. usakee mata ka nam yakolyah tha, jo yarooshalem kee thee." 
2Kings15:3 jaaise usaka pita amasyah kiya karata tha jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha, vaaise hee vah bhee karata tha." 
2Kings15:4 taubhee unche sthan giraae n gaae praja ke log us samay bhee un par bali chaddhate, aur dhoop jalate rahe." 
2Kings15:5 aur yahova ne us raja ko aeesa mara, ki vah marane ke din tak koddhee raha, aur alag aek ghar men rahata tha. aur yotam nam rajaputra usake gharane ke kam par adhaikaree hokar desh ke logon ka nyay karata tha." 
2Kings15:6 ajaryah ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, vah kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men taheen likhe haain?" 
2Kings15:7 nidan ajaryah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur asako daudapuur men usake purakhaon ke beech mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra yotam usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings15:8 yahooda ke raja ajaryah ke adteesaven varsha men yarobam ka putra jakaryah israaael par shaemaron men rajy karane laga, aur chh maheene rajy kiya." 
2Kings15:9 us ne apane purakhaon kee nai vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai, arthata nabat ke putra yarobam jis ne israael se pap karaya t, usake papon ke anusar vah karata raha, aur un se vah alag n hua." 
2Kings15:10 aur yabesh ke putra shalloom ne us se rajadraeh kee goshttee karake usako praja ke samhane mara, aur usaka ghaat karake usake sthan par raja hua." 
2Kings15:11 jakaryah ke aur kam israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men likhe haain. 
2Kings15:12 yon yahova ka vah vachan poora hua, jo us ne yehoo se kaha tha, ki tere parapote ke putra tak teree santan israaael kee gaee par baaitttee jaaegee. aur vaaisa hee hua." 
2Kings15:13 yahooda ke raja ujjaiyyah ke unataleesaven varsha men yabesh ka putra shalloom rajy karane laga, aur maheene bhr shaemaron men rajy karata raha." 
2Kings15:14 kyonaki gadee ke putra manahem ne, tirsa se shaemaron ko jakar yabesh ke putra shalloom ko vaheen mara, aur use ghaat karake usake sthan par raja hua." 
2Kings15:15 shalloom ke aur kam aur us ne rajadraeh kee jo goshttee kee, yah sab israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee mustak men likha haai." 
2Kings15:16 tab manahem ne tirsa se jakar, sab nivaasiyon aur as pas ke desh samet tipsah ko is karan mar liya, ki tipsahiyon ne usake liye faattk n khele the, is karan us ne unhen mar liya, aur us men jitanee garbhvatee striayan thee, us sabhon ko cheer dala." 
2Kings15:17 yahooda ke raja ajaryah ke unataleesaven varsha men gadee ka putra manahem israaael par rajy karane laga, aur das varsha shaemaron men rajy karata raha." 
2Kings15:18 us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, arthata nabat ke putra yarobam jis ne israael se pap karaya tha, usake papon ke anusar vah karata raha, aur un se vah jeevan bhr alag n hua." 
2Kings15:19 ashshoor ke raja pool ne desh par chaddhai kee, aur manahem ne usako hajar kikkar chandee is ichchha se dee, ki vah usaka yahayak hokar rajy ko usake hath men sthiar rakhe." 
2Kings15:20 yah chandee ashshoor ke raja ko dene ke liye manahem ne bade bade dhanavan israaaeliyon se le lee, aek aek purush ko pachas pachas shokel chandee denee padee tab ashshoor ka raja desh ko chhodkar lautt gaya." 
2Kings15:21 manahem ke aur kam jo us ne kia, ve sab kya israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Kings15:22 nidan manahem apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usaka putra makahayah usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Kings15:23 yahooda ke raja ajaryah ke pachasaven varsha men manahem ka putra pakahayah shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane laga, aur do varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Kings15:24 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, arthata nabat ke putra yarobam jis ne israael se pap riaya tha, usake papon ke anusar vah karata raha, aur un se vah alag n hua." 
2Kings15:25 usake saradar ramalyah ke putra pekah ne us se rajadraeh kee goshttee karake, shaemaron ke rajabhvan ke gummatt men usako aur usake sang agab aur arye ko mara aur pekah ke sang pachas giladee purush the, aur vah usaka ghaat karake usake sthan par raja ban gaya." 
2Kings15:26 pakahayah ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, vah israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men likhe haain." 
2Kings15:27 yahooda ke raja ajaryah ke bavanaven varsha men ramalyah ka putra pekah shaemaron men israaael par rajy karane laga, aur bees varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Kings15:28 us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, arthata nabat ke putra yarobam, jis ne israaaeel se pap karaya tha, usake papon ke anusar vah karata raha, aur un se vah alag n hua." 
2Kings15:29 israaael ke raja pekah ke dinon men ashshoor ke raja tiglatpaileser ne akar iyyon, abelbetmaka, yanoh, kedesh aur hasor nam nagaron ko aur gilad aur galeel, varan naptalee ke poore desh ko bhee le liya, aur unake logon ko bandhaua karake ashshoor ko le gaya." 
2Kings15:30 ujiyyah ke putra yotam ke beesaven varsha men ela ke putra hosho ne ramalyah ke putra pekah se rajadraeh kee goshttee karake use mara, aur use ghaat karake usake sthan par raja ban gaya." 
2Kings15:31 pekah ke aur sab kam jo us ne kiae vah israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men likhe haain. 
2Kings15:32 ramalyah ke putra israaael ke raja pekah ke doosare varsha men yahooda ke jaja ujiyyah ka putra yotam raja hua. 
2Kings15:33 jab vah rajy karane laga, tab pachees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men solah varsha tak rajy karata raha. aur usakee pata ka nam yaroosha tha jo sadok kee bettee thee." 
2Kings15:34 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha, arthata jaaisa usake pita ujiyyah ne kiya tha, tteek vaaisa hee us ne bhee kiya." 
2Kings15:35 taubhee unche sthan giraae n gaa, praja ke log un par us samay bhee bali chaddhate aur dhoom jalate rahe. yahova ke bhvan ke unche faattk ko isee ne banaya tha." 
2Kings15:36 yotam ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, ve kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Kings15:37 un dinon men yahova aram ke raja raseen ko, aur ramalyah ke putra pekah ko, yahooda ke viruddh bhejane laga." 
2Kings15:38 nidan yotam apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur apane mulapurush daud ke nagar men apane purakhaon ke beech usako mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra ahaj usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings16:1 ramalyah ke putra pekah ke satrahaven varsha men yahooda ke raja yotam ka putra ahaj rajy karane laga. 
2Kings16:2 jab ahaj rajy karane laga, tab vah bees parsha ka tha, aur solah varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur us ne apane moolapurush daud ka sa kam naheen kiya, jo usake parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha." 
2Kings16:3 parantu vah israaael ke rajaon kee see chal chala, varan un jaatiyon ke ghainaune kamon ke anusar, jinhen yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se desh se nikal diya tha, us ne apane bette ko bhee ag men hom kar diya." 
2Kings16:4 aur unche sthanon par, aur pahaadiyon par, aur sab hare vrakshaen ke tale, vah bali chaddhaya aur dhoom jalaya karata tha." 
2Kings16:5 tab aram ke raja raseen, aur ramalyah ke putra israaael ke raja pekah ne ladne ke liye yarooshalem par chaddhai kee, aur unhon ne ahaj ko ghor liya, parantu yuddh karake un se kuchh ban n pada." 
2Kings16:6 us samay aram ke raja raseen ne, elat ko aram ke vash men karake, yahoodiyon ko vahan se nikal diya tab aramee log elat ko gaa, aur aj ke din tak vahan rahate haain." 
2Kings16:7 aur ahaj ne doot bhejakar ashshoor ke raja tiglatpaileser ke pas kahala bheja ki mujhe apana das, varan betta janakar chaddhai kar, aur mujhe aram ke raja aur israaael ke raja ke hath se bacha jo mere viruddh utte haain." 
2Kings16:8 aur ahaj ne yahova ke bhvan men aur rajabhvan ke bhndaron men jitana sona-chandee mila use ashshoor ke raja ke pas bhentt karake bhej diya. 
2Kings16:9 usakee manakar ashshoor ke raja ne damishk par chaddhai kee, aur use lekar usake logon ko bandhaua karake, keer ko le gaya, aur raseen ko mar dala." 
2Kings16:10 tab raja ahaj ashshoor ke raja tiglatpaileser se bhentt karane ke liye daamishk ko gaya, aur vahan kee vedee dekhkar usakee sab banavatt ke anusar usaka nakasha uriyyah yajak ke pas namoona karake bhej diya." 
2Kings16:11 aur tteek isee namoone ke anusar jise raja ahaj ne daamishk se bheja tha, uriyyah yajak ne raja ahaj ke daamishk se ane tak aek vedee bana dee." 
2Kings16:12 jab raja damishk se aya tab us ne us vedee ko dekha, aur usake nikatt jakar us par bali chaddhaae." 
2Kings16:13 usee vedee par us ne apana homabaali aur annabali jalauya, aur ardha diya aur melabaaliyon ka lohoo chhdik diya." 
2Kings16:14 aur peetal kee jo vedee yahova ke samhane rahatee thee usako us ne bhvan ke samhane se arthata apanee vedee aur yahova ke bhvan ke beech se hattakar, us vedee kee utar or rakh diya." 
2Kings16:15 tab raja ahaj ne uriyyah yajak ko yah agyaa dee, ki bhor ke hopabali aur sanjh ke annabaali, raja ke homabaali aur usake annabali, aur sab sadhaaran logon ke homabali aur ardha badee vedee par chaddhaya kar, aur homabaliyon aur melabaaliyon ka sab lohoo us par chhdika aur peetal kee vedee ke vishay maain vichar karoonga." 
2Kings16:16 raja ahaj kee is agyaa ke anusar uriyyah yajak ne kiya. 
2Kings16:17 fir raja ahaj ne kursiyon kee pattriyon ko katt dala, aur haudiyon ko un par se utar diya, aur bade haud ko un peetal ke baailon par se jo usake tale the utarakar, patthron ke farsha par dhar diya." 
2Kings16:18 aur vishraam ke din ke liye jo chhaya hua sthan bhvan men bana tha, aur raja ke bahar ke pravesh karane ka faattk, unako us ne ashshoor ke raja ke karan yahova ke bhvan se alag kar diya." 
2Kings16:19 ahaj ke aur kam jo us ne kia, ve kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Kings16:20 nidan ahaj apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur use usake purakhaon ke beech daudapur men mittee dee gai, aur usaka putra hijaakiyyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings17:1 yahooda ke raja ahaj ke barahaven varsha men aela ka putra hosho shaemaron me, israaael par rajy karane laga, aur nau varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Kings17:2 us ne vahee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, parantu israael ke un rajaon ke barabar naheen jo us se pahile the." 
2Kings17:3 us par ashshoor ke raja shalmaneser ne chaddhai kee, aur hosho usake adhaeen hokar, usako bhentt dene laga." 
2Kings17:4 parantu ashshoor ke raja ne hosho ko rajadraeh kee goshttee karanevala jan liya, kyonaki us ne so nam misra ke raja ke pas doot bheje, aur ashshoor ke raja ke pas saaliyana bhentt bhejanee chhod dee is karan ashshoor ke raja ne usako band kiya, aur bedee dalakar bandeegrah men dal diya." 
2Kings17:5 tab ashshoor ke raja ne poore desh par chaddhai kee, aur shaemaron ko jakar teen varsha tak use ghore raha." 
2Kings17:6 hosho ke nauven varsha men ashshoor ke raja ne shaemaron ko le liya, aur israaael ko ashshoor men le jakar, halah men aur gojan kee nadee habor ke pas aur madiyon ke nagaron men basaya." 
2Kings17:7 isaka yah karan haai, ki yadhyapi israaaeliyon ka parameshvar yahova unako misra ke raja firaun ke hath se chhudakar misra desh se nikal laya tha, taubhee unhon ne usake viruddh pap kiya, aur paraye devataon ka bhy mana." 
2Kings17:8 aur jin jatiyon ko yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se desh se tikala tha, unakee reeti par, aur apane rajaon kee chalai hui reetiyon par chalate the." 
2Kings17:9 aur israaaeliyon ne kapatt karake apane parameshvar yahova ke viruddh anuchit kam kia, arthat paharuon ke gummatt se lekar gaddhvale nagar tak apanee saree bastaiyon men unche sthan bana liae" 
2Kings17:10 aur sab unchee pahadiyon par, aur sab hare vukshaen ke tale latten aur ashora khde kar liae." 
2Kings17:11 aur aeese unche sthanon men un jatiyon kee nai jinako yahova ne unake samhane se nikal diya tha, dhoop jalaya, aur yahova ko krodha dilane ke yogy bure kam kiae." 
2Kings17:12 aur mooraton kee upasana kee, jisake vishay yahova ne un se kaha tha ki tum yah kam n karana." 
2Kings17:13 taubhee yahova ne sab bhvishyadvktaon aur sab dashairyon ke dara israaael aur yahooda ko yah kah kar chitaya tha, ki apanee buree chal chhodkar us saree yyavastha ke anusar jo maain ne tumhare purakhaon ko dee thee, aur apane das bhavishyadvktaon ke hath toomhare pas pahunchai haai, meree agyaaon aur vidhaiyon ko mana karo." 
2Kings17:14 parantu unhon ne n mana, varan apane un purakhaon kee nai, jinhon ne apane parameshvar yahova ka vishvas n kiya tha, ve bhee hatteele ban gaae." 
2Kings17:15 aur ve usakee vidhaiyon aur apane purakhaon ke sath usakee vacha, aur jo chitauaniyan us ne unhen dee thee, unako tuchchh janakar, nikammee baton ke peechhe ho liae jis se ve ap nikamme ho gaa, aur apane charon or kee un jaatiyon ke peechhe bhee ho liae jinake vishay yahova ne unhen agyaa dee thee ki unake se kam n karana." 
2Kings17:16 varan unhon ne apane parameshvar yahova kee sab agyaaon ko tyag diya, aur do bachhdon kee mooraten ddhalakar banai, aur ashora bhee banai aur akash ke sare ganon ko dandvat kee, aur bal kee upasana kee." 
2Kings17:17 aur apane bette-bettyaien ko ag men hom karake chaddhaya aur bhavee kahanevalon se poochhne, aur ttona karane lage aur jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha jis se vah krodhait bhee hota haai, usake karane ko apanee ichchha se bik gaae." 
2Kings17:18 is karan yahova israaael se aati krodhait hua, aur unhen apane samhane se door kar diya yahooda ka gotra chhod aur koi bacha n raha." 
2Kings17:19 yahooda ne bhee apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaaaen n manee, varan jo vidhaiyan israaael ne chalai thee, un par chalane lage." 
2Kings17:20 tab yahova ne israaael kee saree santan ko chhod kar, unako dukh diya, aur loottnevalon ke hath kar diya, aur ant men unhen apane samhane se nikal diya." 
2Kings17:21 us ne israael ko to daud ke gharane ke hath se chheen liya, aur unhon ne nabat ke putra yarobam ko apana raja banaya aur yarobam ne israael ko yahova ke peechhe chalane se door kheenchakar un se bada pap karaya." 
2Kings17:22 so jaaise pap yarobam ne kiae the, vaaise hee pap israaaelee bhee karate rahe, aur un se alag n huae." 
2Kings17:23 ant men yahova ne israaael ko apane samhane se door kar diya, jaaise ki us ne apane sab das bhvishyadvktaon ke dara kaha tha. is prakar israaael apane desh se nikalakar ashshoor ko pahanchaya gaya, jahan vah aj ke din tak rahata haai." 
2Kings17:24 aur ashshoor ke raja ne babel, koota, abva hamat aur sapavaainm nagaron se logon ko lakar, israaaeliyon ke sthan par shaemaroen ke nagaron men basaya so ve shaemaron ke aadhaikaree hokar usake nagaron men rahane lage." 
2Kings17:25 jab ve vahan pahile paahile rahane lage, tab yahova ka bhy n manate the, is karan yahova ne unake beech sinh bheje, jo unako mar dalane lage." 
2Kings17:26 is karan unhon ne ashshoor ke raja ke pas kahala bheja ki jo jatiyan too ne unake deshaen se nikalakar shaemaron ke nagaron men basa dee haai, ve us desh ke devata kee reeati naheen janatee, us se us ne usake madhy sinh bheje haain jo unako isaliye mar dalate haain ki ve us desh ke devata kee reeati naheen janate." 
2Kings17:27 tab ashshoor ke raja ne agyaa dee, ki jin yajakon ko tum us desh se le aa, un men se aek ko vahan pahuncha do aur vah vahan jakar rahe, aur vah unako us desh ke devata kee reeti sikhaae." 
2Kings17:28 tab jo yajak shaemaron se nikale gaae the, un men se aek jakar betel men rahane laga, aur unako sikhane laga ki yahova ka bhy kis reeti se manana chahiye." 
2Kings17:29 taubhee aek aek jati ke logon ne apane apane nij devata banakar, apane apane basaae huae nagar men un unche sthanon ke bhvanon men rakha jo shaemaroniyon ne basaae the." 
2Kings17:30 babel ke manushyon ne to sukkotabanot ko, koot ke panushyon ne nergal ko, hamat ke manushyon ne ashaeema ko," 
2Kings17:31 aur aabvaiyon ne nibhj, aur tatrtak ko sthaapit kiya aur sapavamee log apane betton ko adrammelek aur anammelek nam sapavaainm ke devataon ke liye hom karake chaddhane lage." 
2Kings17:32 yon ve yahava ka bhy manate to the, parantu sab prakar ke logon men se unche sthanon ke yajak bhee tthara dete the, jo unche sthanon ke bhvanon men unake liye baali karate the." 
2Kings17:33 ve yahova ka bhy manate to the, parantu un jatiyon kee reeati par, jinake beech se ve nikale gaae the, apane apane devataon kee bhee upasana karate rahe." 
2Kings17:34 aj ke din tak ve apanee pahilee reeatiyon par chalate haai, ve yahova ka bhy naheen manate." 
2Kings17:35 n to upanee vidhaiyon aur niyamon par aur n us yyavastha aur agyaa ke anusar chalate haai, jo yahova ne yakoob kee santan ko dee thee, jisaka nam us ne israaael rakha tha. un se yahova ne bacha bandhakar unhen yah agyaa dee thee, ki tum paraye devataon ka bhy n manana aur n unhen dandvat karana aur n unakee upasana karana aur n unako bali chaddhana." 
2Kings17:36 parantu yahova jo tum ko bade bal aur baddhai hui bhuja ke dara miyara desh se nikal le aya, tum usee ka bhy manana, usee ko dandvat karana aur usee ko bali chaddhana." 
2Kings17:37 aur us ne jo jo vidhaiyan aur niyam aur jo yyavastha aur agyaaaen tumhare liye likhee, unhen tum sada chaukasee se manate raho aur paraye devataon ka bhy n manana." 
2Kings17:38 aur jo vacha maain ne tumhare sath bandhaee haai, use n boolana aur paraye devataon ka bhy n manana." 
2Kings17:39 keval apane parameshvar yahova ka bhy panana, vahee tum ko tumhare sab shatrauon ke hath se bachaaega." 
2Kings17:40 taubhee unhon ne n mana, parantu ve apanee paahilee reeati ke anusar karate rahe." 
2Kings17:41 ataaev ve jaatiyan yahova ka bhy manatee to thee, parantu apanee khudee hui mooraton kee upasana bhee karatee rahee, aur jaaise ve karate the vaaise hee unake bette pote bhee aj ke din tak karate haain." 
2Kings18:1 aela ke putra israaael ke raja hosho ke teesare varsha men yahooda ke raja ahaj ka putra hijaakiyyah raja hua. 
2Kings18:2 jab vah rajy karane laga tab pachchees varsha ka tha, aur unatees varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur usakee mata ka nam abee tha, jo jakaryah kee bettee thee." 
2Kings18:3 jaaise usake moolapurush daud ne kiya tha jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai vaaisa hee us ne bhee kiya. 
2Kings18:4 us ne unche sthan gira dia, latton ko tod diya, ashora ko katt dala. aur peetal ka jo sanp moosa ne banaya tha, usako us ne is karan choor choor kar diya, ki un dinon tak israaelee usake liye dhoop jalate the aur us ne usaka nam nahushatan rakha." 
2Kings18:5 vah israaael ke parameshvar yahova par bhrosa rakhta tha, aur usake bad yahooda ke sab rajaon men koi usake barabar n hua, aur n us se paahile bhee aeesa koi hua tha." 
2Kings18:6 aur vah yahova se lipatta raha aur usake peechhe chalana n chhoda aur jo agyaaaen yahova ne moosa ko dee thee, unaka vah palan karata raha." 
2Kings18:7 isaliye yahova usake sang raha aur jahan kaheen vah jata tha, vahan usaka kam safal hota tha. aur us ne ashshoor ke raja se balava karake, usakee adhaeenata chhod dee." 
2Kings18:8 us ne paalishtaiyon ko gajjaa aur usake sivanon tak, paharuon ke gummatt aur gaddhvale nagar tak mara." 
2Kings18:9 raja hijaakiyyah ke chauthe varsha men jo aela ke putra israaael ke raja hosho ka satavan varsha tha, ashshoor ke raja shalmaneser ne shaemaron par chaddhai karake use ghor liya." 
2Kings18:10 aur teen varsha ke beetane par unhon ne usako le liya. is prakar hijaakiyyah ke chhttven varsha men jo israaael ke raja hosho ka nauvan varsha tha, shaemaron le liya gaya." 
2Kings18:11 tab ashshoor ka raja israaael ko bandhaua karake ashshoor men le gaya, aur halah men or gojan kee nadee habor ke pas aur madiyon ke nagaron men use basa diya." 
2Kings18:12 isaka karan yah tha, ki unhon ne apane parameshvar yahova kee bat n manee, varan usakee vacha ko toda, aur jitanee agyaaaen yahova ke das moosa ne dee thee, unako ttal diya aur n unako suna aur n unake anusar kiya." 
2Kings18:13 hijaakiyyah raja ke chaudahaven varsha men ashshoor ke raja sanhereeb ne yahooda ke sab gaddhvale nagaron par chaddhai karake unako le liya. 
2Kings18:14 tab yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ne ashshoor ke raja ke pas lakeesh ko kahala bheja, ki mujh se aparadha hua, mere pas se lautt ja aur jo bhr too mujh par dalega usako maain uttaunga. to ashshoor ke raj ne yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ke liye teen sau kikkar chandee aur tees kikkar lona tthara diya." 
2Kings18:15 tab jitanee chandee yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke bhndaron men milee, us sab ko hijaakiyyah ne use de diya." 
2Kings18:16 us samay hijaakiyyah ne yahova ke mandair ke kivadon se aur un khmbhon se bhee jin par yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ne sona maddha tha, sone ko chheelakar ashshoor ke raja ko de diya." 
2Kings18:17 taubhee ashshoor ke raja ne tatrtan, rabasarees aur rabashaake ko badee sena dekar, lakeesh se yarooshalem ke pas hijaakiyyah raja ke viruddh bhej diya. so ve yarooshalem ko gaae aur vahan pahunchakar upar ke pokhre kee nalee ke pas dhobiyon ke khet kee sadk par jakar khde huae." 
2Kings18:18 aur jab unhon ne raja ko pukara, tab hilaakiyyah ka putra aelyakeem jo rajagharane ke kam par tha, aur shobna jo mantraee tha aur asap ka putra yoah jo iatihas ka likhnevala tha, ye teenon unake pas bahar nikal gaae." 
2Kings18:19 rabashaake ne un se kaha, hijaakiyyah se kaho, ki maharajaadhairaj arthata ashshoor ka raja yon kahata haai, ki too kis par bhrosa karata haai?" 
2Kings18:20 too jo kahata haai, ki mere yahan yuddh ke liye yuaktai aur parakram haai, so to keval bat hee bat haai. too kis par bhrosa rakhta haai ki too ne mujh se balava kiya haai?" 
2Kings18:21 sun, too to us kuchale huae narakatt arthata misra par bhrosa rakhta haai, us par yadi koi ttek lagaa, to vah usake hath men chubhkar chhedega. misra ka raja firaun apane sab bhrosa rakhnevalon ke liye aeesa hee haai." 
2Kings18:22 fir yadi tum mujh se kaho, ki hamara bhrosa apane parameshvar yahova par haai, to kya yah vahee naheen haai jisake unche sthanon aur vediyon ko hijaakiyyah ne door karake yahooda aur yarooshalem se kaha, ki tum isee vedee ke samhane jo yarooshalem men haai dandvat karana?" 
2Kings18:23 to ab mere svamee ashshoor ke raja ke pas muchh bandhak rak, tab maain tujhe do hajar ghaede doonga, kya too un par savar chaddha sakega ki naheen?" 
2Kings18:24 fir too mere svamee ke chhotte se chhotte karmacharee ka bhee kaha n man kar kyon rathon aur savaron ke liye misra par bhrosa rakhta haai? 
2Kings18:25 kya maain ne yahova ke bina kahe, is sthan ko ujadne ke liye chaddhai kee haai? yahova ne mujh se kaha haai, ki us desh par chaddhai karake use ujad de." 
2Kings18:26 tab hilaakiyyah ke putra aelyakeem aur shobna yoah ne rabashaake se kaha, apane dason se aramee bhasha men baten kar, kyonki ham use samajhte haain aur ham se yahoodee bhasha men shaharapanah par baaitte huae logon ke sunate baten n kara." 
2Kings18:27 rabashaake ne un se kaha, kya mere svamee ne mujhe tumhare svamee hee ke, va tumhare hee pas ye baten kahane ko bheja haai? kya us ne mujhe un logon ke pas naheen bheja, jo shaharapanah par baaitte haai, taki numhare sang unako bhee apanee bishtta khana aur apana mootra peena pade?" 
2Kings18:28 tab rabashaake ne khde ho, yahoodee bhasha men unche shabd se kaha, maharajadhairaj arthta ashshoor ke raja kee bat suno." 
2Kings18:29 raja yon kahata haai, ki hijaakiyyah tum ko bhulane n paa, kyonaki vah tumhen mere hath se bacha n sakega." 
2Kings18:30 aur vah tum se yah kahakar yahova par bhrosa karane n paa, ki yahova nishchay ham ko bachaaega aur yah nagar ashshoor ke raja ke vash men n padega." 
2Kings18:31 hijaakiyyah kee mat suno. ashshoor ka raja kahata haai ki bhentt bhejakar mujhe prasann karo aur mere pas nikal ao, aur pratyek apanee apanee dakhlata aur anjeer ke vraksha ke fal khata aur apane apane kund ka panee peeta rahe." 
2Kings18:32 tab maain akar tum ko aeese desh men le jaunga, jo tumhare desh ke saman anaj aur naye dakhmadha ka desha, rottee aur dakhbariyon ka desha, jalapaiyon aur madha ka desh haai, vahan tum maroge nahee, jeevit rahoge to jab hijaakiyyah yah kahakar tum ko bahakaa, ki yahova ham ko bachaaega, tab usakee n sunana." 
2Kings18:33 kya aur jatiyon ke devataon ne apane apane desh ko ashshoor ke raja ke hath se kabhee bachaya haai? 
2Kings18:34 hamat aur arpad ke devata kahan rahe? sapavaainm, hena aur iyva ke devata kahan rahe? kya unhon ne shaemaron ko mere hath se bachaya haai," 
2Kings18:35 desh desh ke sab devataon men se aeesa kaun haai, jis ne apane desh ko mere hath se bachaya ho? fir kya yahova yarooshalem ko mere hath se bachaaega." 
2Kings18:36 parantu sab log chup rahe aur usake uttar men aek bat bhee n kahee, kyonaki raja kee aeesee agyaa thee, ki usako uttar n dena." 
2Kings18:37 tab hilaakiyyah ka putra aelyakeem jo rajagharane ke kam par tha, aur shobna jo mantraee tha, aur asap ka putra yoah jo iatihas ka likhnevala tha, apane vasr faade hua, hijaakiyyah ke pas jakar rabashaake kee baten kah sunai." 
2Kings19:1 jab hijaakiyyah raja ne yah suna, tab vah apane vasr faad, ttatt oddhkar yahova ke bhpan men gaya." 
2Kings19:2 aur us ne aelyakeem ko jo rajagharane ke kam par tha, aur shobna mantraee ko, aur yajakon ke puraaniyon ko, jo sab ttatt oddhe huae the, amos ke putra yashaayah bhavishyadvkta ke pas bhej diya." 
2Kings19:3 unhon ne us se kaha, hijaakiyyah yon kahata haai, aj ka din sankat, aur ulahane, aur ninda ka din haai bachche janmane par huae par jachcha ko janm dene ka bal n raha." 
2Kings19:4 kadachit tera parameshvar yahova rabashaake kee sab baten sune, jise usake svamee ashshoor ke raja ne jeevate parameshvar kee ninda karane ko bheja haai, aur jo baten tere parameshvar yahava ne sunee haain unhen dpatte isaaliye too in bache huon ke liye jo rah gaae haain praarthna kara." 
2Kings19:5 jab hijaakiyyah raja ke karmacharee yashaayah ke pas aa," 
2Kings19:6 tab yashaayah ne un se kaha, apane svamee se kaho, yaheva yon kahata haai, ki jo vachan too ne sune haai, jinake dara ashshoor ke raja ke janon ne meree ninda kee haai, unake karan mat dra." 
2Kings19:7 sun, maain usake man men praerana karoonga, ki vah kuchh samachar sunakar apane desh ko lautt jaa, aur maain usako usee ke desh men talavar se marava daloonga." 
2Kings19:8 tab rabashaake ne lauttkar ashshoor ke raja ko libna nagar se yuddh karate paya, kyonki us ne suna tha ki vah lakeesh ke pas se utt gaya haai." 
2Kings19:9 aur jab us ne koosh ke raja tirhaka ke vishy yah suna, ki vah mujh se ladne ko nikala haai, tab us ne hijaakiyyah ke pas dooton ko yah kah kar bheja," 
2Kings19:10 tum yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah se yon kahana tera parameshvar jisaka too bhrosa karata haai, yah kahakar tujhe dhaekha n dene paa, ki yarooshalem ashshoor ke raja ke vash men n padega." 
2Kings19:11 dek, too ne to suna haai ashshoor ke rajaon ne sab deshaen se kaaisa yyavahar kiya haai unhen satyanash kar diya haai. fir kya too bachega?" 
2Kings19:12 gojan aaair haran aur resep aur talassar men rahanevale aedenee, jin jatiyoen ko mere purakhaon ne nash kiya, kya un men se kisee jaati ke devataon ne usako bacha liya?" 
2Kings19:13 hamat ka raja, aur arpad ka raja, aur samavaainm nagar ka raja, aur hena aur iyva ke raja ye sab kahan rahe? is patraee ko hijaakiyyah ne dooton ke hath se lekar paddha." 
2Kings19:14 tab yahova ke bhvan men jakar usako yahova ke samhane faaila diya. 
2Kings19:15 aur yahova se yah praarthna kee, ki he israaael ke parameshvar yahova! he karoobon par virajanevale! prathvee ke sab rajyon ke upar keval too hee parameshvar haai. akash aur prathvee ko too hee ne banaya haai." 
2Kings19:16 he yahova! kan lagakar sun, he yahova ankh kholakar dek, aur sanhereeb ke vachanoen ko sun le, jo us ne jeevate parameshvar kee ninda karane ko kahala bheje haain." 
2Kings19:17 he yahova, sach to haai, ki ashshoor ke rajaon ne jatiyon ko aur unake deshaen ko ujada haai." 
2Kings19:18 aur unake devataon ko ag men jhenka haai, kyonaki ve ishvar n the ve manushyon ke banaae huae katt aur patthr hee ke the is karan ve unako nash kar sake." 
2Kings19:19 isaliye ab he hamare parameshvar yahova too hamen usake hath se bacha, ki prathvee ke rajy rajy ke log jan len ki keval too hee yahova haai." 
2Kings19:20 tab amos ke putra yashaayah ne hijaakiyyah ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki jo praarthna too ne ashshoor ke raja sanhereeb ke vishay mujh se kee, use maain ne suna haai." 
2Kings19:21 usake vishay men yahova ne yah vachan kaha haai, ki siyyon kee kumaree kanya tujhe tuchchh janatee aur tujhe tttthon men udatee haai, yarooshalem kee putrae, tujh par sir hilatee haai." 
2Kings19:22 too ne jo namadharai aur ninda kee haai, vah kisakee kee haai? aur too ne jo bada bol bola aur ghamand kiya haai vah kisake viruddh kiya haai? israaael ke paavitra ke viruddh too ne kiya haai!" 
2Kings19:23 apane dooton ke dara too ne prabhu kee ninda karake kaha haai, ki vahut se rath lekar maain parvaton kee chottyaien par, varan labanon ke beech tak chaddh aya hoo, aur maain usake unche unche devadaruon aur achchhe achchhe sanovaron ko katt daloonga aur us men jo sab se uncha ttkaine ka sthan hoga us men aur usake van kee faladai bariyon men pravesh karoonga." 
2Kings19:24 maain ne to khudavakar paradesh ka panee piya aur misra kee naharon men panv dharate hee unhen sukha daloonga. 
2Kings19:25 kya too ne naheen suna, ki praacheenakal se maain ne yahee ttharaya? aur agale dinon se isakee taaiyaree kee thee, unhen ab maain ne poora bhee kiya haai, ki too gaddhvale nagaron ko khndhar hee khndhar kar de," 
2Kings19:26 isee karan unake rahanevalon ka bal ghatt gaya ve vismait aur lajjait hue ve maaidan ke chhotte chhotte pedon aur haree ghaas aur chht par kee ghaas, aur aeese anaj ke saman ho gaa, jo baddhne se paahile sookh jata haai." 
2Kings19:27 maain to tera baaitta rahana, aur kooch karana, aur lautt ana janata hoo, aur yah bhee ki too mujh par apana krodha bhdkata haai." 
2Kings19:28 is karan ki too mujh par apana krodha bhdkata aur tere aabhaiman kee baten mere kanon men padee haain maain teree nak men apanee nakel dalakar aur tere munh men apana lagam lagakar, jis marga se too aya haai, usee se tujhe lotta doonga." 
2Kings19:29 aur tere liye yah chinh hoga, ki is varsha to tum use khaoge jo ap se ap uge, aur doosare varsha use jo utpann ho vah khaoge aur teesare varsha beej bone aur use lavane paoge, aur dakh kee bariyan lagane aur unaka fal khane paoge." 
2Kings19:30 aur yahooda ke gharane ke bache huae log fir jad pakadenge, aur falenge bhee." 
2Kings19:31 kyonaki yarooshalem men se bache huae aur siyyon parvat ke bhage huae log nikalenge. yahova yah kam apanee jalan ke karan karega. 
2Kings19:32 isaliye yahova ashshoor ke raja ke vishay men yon kahata haai ki vah is nagar men pravesh karane, varan is par aek teer bhee marane n paaega, aur n vah ddhal lekar isake samhane ane, va isake viruddh damadama banane paaega." 
2Kings19:33 jis marga se vah aya, usee se vah lautt bhee jaaega, aur is nagar men pravesh n karane paaega, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
2Kings19:34 aur maain apane nimitt aur apane das daud ke nimitt is nagar kee raksha karake ise bachaunga. 
2Kings19:35 usee rat men kya hua, ki yahova ke doot ne nikalakar ashshooriyon kee chhavanee men ek lakh pachasee hajar purushaen ko mara, aur bhor ko jab log sabere utte, tab dekha, ki loth hee loth padee haai." 
2Kings19:36 tab ashshoor ka raja sanhereeb chal diya, aur lauttkar neenave men rahane laga." 
2Kings19:37 vahan vah apane devata nisraek ke mandair men dandvat kar raha tha, ki ademmelek aur sareser ne usako talavar se mara, aur ararat desh men bhag gaae. aur usee ka putra aesarhaon usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Kings20:1 un dinon men hijaakiyyah aeesa rogee hua ki marate par tha, aur amos ke putra yashaayah bhavishyadvkta ne usake pas jakar kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, ki apane gharane ke vishay jo agyaa denee ho vah de kyonaki too naheen bachega, mar jaega." 
2Kings20:2 tab us ne bheet kee or munh faer, yahova se praarthna karake kaha, he yahova!" 
2Kings20:3 maain bintee karata hoo, smaran kar, ki maain sachchai aur khre man se apane ko tere sammukh janakar chalata aya hoo aur jo tujhe achchha tagata haai vahee maain karata aya hoo. tab hijaakiyyah bilak bilak kar roya." 
2Kings20:4 aur aeesa hua ki yashaayah nagar ke beech tak jane bhee n paya tha ki yahova ka yah vachan usake pas pahuncha," 
2Kings20:5 ki lauttkar meree praja ke pradhaan hijaakiyyah se kah, ki tere moolapurush daud ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain ne teree praarthna sunee aur tere ansoo dekhe haain dek, maain tujhe changa karata hoo parason too yahova ke bhvan men ja sakega." 
2Kings20:6 aur maain teree ayoo pandrah varsha aur baddha doonga. aur ashshoor ke raja ke hath se tujhe aur is nagar ko bachaunga, aur maain apane nimitt aur apane das daud ke nimitt is nagar kee raksha karoonga." 
2Kings20:7 tab yashaayah ne kaha, anjeeron kee aek ttiikaya lo. jab unhon ne use lekar faode par bandha, tab vah changa ho gaya." 
2Kings20:8 hijaakiyyah ne yashaayah se poochha, yahova jo mujhe changa karega aur maain parason yahova ke bhvan ko ja sakoonga, isaka kya chinh hoga?" 
2Kings20:9 yashaayah ne kaha, yahova jo apane kahe huae vachan ko poora karega, is bat ka yahova kee or se tere liye yah chinh hoga, ki dhoopaghadee kee chhaya das ansh age baddh jaaegee, v das ansh ghatt jaaegee." 
2Kings20:10 hijaakiyyah ne kaha, chhaya ka das ansh age nddhna to halakee bat haai, isaaliae aeesa ho ki chhaya das ansh peechhe lautt jaae." 
2Kings20:11 tab yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ne yahova ko pukara, aur ahaj kee ghoopaghadee kee chhaya, jo das ansh ddhl chukee thee, yahova ne usako peechhe kee or lautta diya." 
2Kings20:12 us samay baladan ka putra barodakabaladan jo babel ka raja tha, us ne hijaakiyyah ke rogee hone kee charcha sunakar, usake pas patraee aur bhentt bhejee." 
2Kings20:13 unake lanevalon kee manakar hijaakiyyah ne unako apane anamol padathn ka sab bhndar, aur chandee aur sona aur sugandha drayy aur uttam tel aur apane hathaiyaron ka poora ghar aur apane bhndaron men jo jo vastuen thee, ve sab dikhai hijaakiyyah ke bhvan aur rajy bhr men koi aeesee vastu n rahee, jo us ne unhen n dikhkhai ho." 
2Kings20:14 tab yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ne hijaakiyyah raja ke pas jakar puchha, ve manushy kya kah gaae? aur kahan se tere pas aae the? hijaakiyyah ne kaha, ve to door desh se arthata babel se aae the." 
2Kings20:15 fir us ne poochha, tere bhvan men unhon ne kya kya dekha haai? hijaakiyyah ne kaha, jo kuchh mere bhvan men haai, vah sab unhon ne dekha. mere bhndaron men koi aeesee vastu nahee, jo maain ne unhen n dikhai ho." 
2Kings20:16 yashaayah ne hijaakiyyah se kaha, yahova ka vachan sun le." 
2Kings20:17 aeese din anevale haai, jin men jo kuchh tere bhvan men haai, aur jo kuchh tere murakhaon ka rakha hua aj ke din tak bhndaron men haai vah sab babel ko utt jaaega yahova yah kahata haai, ki koi vastu n bachegee." 
2Kings20:18 aur jo putra tere vansh men utpann ho, un men se bhee kitanon ko ve bandhauai men le jaaenge aur ve khoje banakar babel ke rajabhvan men rahenge." 
2Kings20:19 hijaakiyyah ne yashaayah se kaha, yahova ka vachan jo too ne kaha haai, vah bhla hee haai, fir us ne kaha, kya mere dinon men shaanati aur sachchai banee n rahengee?" 
2Kings20:20 hijaakiyyah ke aur sab kam aur usakee saree veerata aur kis reeti us ne aek pokhra aur nalee khudavakar nagar men panee pahuncha diya, yah sag kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings20:21 nidan hijaakiyyah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usaka putra manashsho usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Kings21:1 jab manashsho rajy karane laga, tab vah barah varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men pachapan varsha tak rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam heepseeba tha." 
2Kings21:2 us ne un jaatiyon ke ghainaune kamon ke anusar, jinako yahova ne israaealiyon ke samhane desh se nikal diya tha, vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha." 
2Kings21:3 us ne un unche sthanon ko jinako usake pita hijaakiyyah ne nash kiya tha, fir banaya, aur israael ke raja ahab kee nai bal ke liye veadiyan aur ek ashora banavai, aur akash ke kul gan ko dandvat aur unakee upasana karata raha." 
2Kings21:4 aur us ne yahova ke us bhvan men vediyan banai jisake vishay yahova ne kaha tha, ki yarooshalem men maain apana nam rakoonga." 
2Kings21:5 varan yahova ke bhvan ke donon anganon men bhee us ne akash ke kul gan ke liye veadiyan banai. 
2Kings21:6 fir us ne apane bette ko ag men hom karake chaddhaya aur shuubhashuubh muhuttanko manata, aur ttona karata, aur ojhon aur boot siddhivalon se yyavahar karata tha varan us ne aeese bahut se kam kiae jo yahova kee drashtti men bure haai, aur jin se vah krodhait hota haai." 
2Kings21:7 aur ashora kee jo moorat us ne khudavai, usako us ne us bhvan men sthapit kiya, jisake vishay yahova ne daud aur usake putra sulaaiman se kaha tha, ki is bhvan men aur yarooshalem me, jisako maain ne israaael ke sab gotraen men se chun liya haai, maain sadaaiv apana nam rakoonga." 
2Kings21:8 aur yaadi ve meree sab agyaaon ke aur mere das moosa kee dee hui pooree yyavastha ke anusar karane kee chaukasee kare, to maain aeesa n karoonga ki jo desh maain ne israaael ke purakhon ko diya tha, us se ve fir nikalakar mare mare firen." 
2Kings21:9 parantu unhon ne n mana, baran manashsho ne unako yahan tak bhttka diya ki unhon ne un jatiyon se bhee baddhkar burai kee jinhen yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se vinash kiya tha." 
2Kings21:10 isaliye yahova ne apane das bhavishyadvktaon ke dara kaha," 
2Kings21:11 ki yahooda ke raja manashsho ne jo ye gharanait kam kia, aur jitanee buraiyan aemoriyon ne jo us se paahile the kee thee, un se bhee adhaik buraiyan keen aur yahoodiyon se apanee banai hui mooraton kee pooja karava ke unhen pap men fansaya haai." 
2Kings21:12 is karan israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai ki suno, maain yarooshalem aur yahooda par aeesee vipaattai dalana chahata hoo ki jo koi usaka samachar sunega vah bade sannatte men a jaaega." 
2Kings21:13 aur jo mapane kee doree maain ne shaemaron par dalee haai aur jo sahul maain ne ahab ke gharane par lattkaya haai vahee yarooshalem par daloonga. aur maain yarooshalem ko aeesa pochoonga jaaise koi thalee ko ponchhta haai aur use ponchhkar ulatt deta haai. 
2Kings21:14 aur maain apane nij bhag ke bache huon ko tyagakar shatrauon ke hath kar doonga aur ve apane sab shatrauon ke liae loott aur dhan ban jaaenge. 
2Kings21:15 isaka karan yah haai, ki jab se unake purakha misra se nikale tab se aj ke din tak ve vah kam karake jo meree draashtti men bura haai, mujhe ris dilate a rahe haain." 
2Kings21:16 manashsho ne to n keval vah kam karake yahoodiyon se pap karaya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai, varan nidashaen ka koon bahut bahaya, yahan tak ki us ne yarooshalem ko aek sire se doosare sire tak koon se bhr diya." 
2Kings21:17 manashsho ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, aur jo pap us ne kia, vah sab kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
2Kings21:18 nidan manashsho apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur use usake bhvan kee baree men jo ujjar kee baree kahalatee thee mittee dee gai aur usaka putra amon usake sthan par raja hua. 
2Kings21:19 jab amon rajy karane laga, tab vah bais parsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men do varsha tak rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam mashuullemet tha jo yotbavasee haroom kee bettee thee." 
2Kings21:20 aur us ne apane pita manashsho kee nai vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai." 
2Kings21:21 aur vah apane pita ke saman pooree chal chala, aur jin mooraton kee upasana usaka pita karata tha, unakee vah bhee upasana karata, aur unhen dandvat karata tha." 
2Kings21:22 aur us ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko tyag diya, aur yahova ke marga par n chala." 
2Kings21:23 aur amon ke karmachariyon ne draeh kee goshttee karake raja ko usee ke bhvan men mar dala. 
2Kings21:24 tab sadhaaran logon ne un sabhon ko mar dala, jinhon ne raja amon se draeh kee goshttee kee thee, aur logon ne usake putra yoshaiyyah ko usake sthan par raja kiya." 
2Kings21:25 amon ke aur kam jo us ne kia, vah kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain." 
2Kings21:26 use bhee ujjar kee baree men usakee nij kabar men mittee dee gai aur usaka putra yoshaiyyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Kings22:1 jab yoshaiyyah rajy karane laga, tab vah att varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men aekatees varsha tak rajy karata raha. aur usakee mata ka nam yadeeda tha jo boskatavasee adaya kee bettee thee." 
2Kings22:2 us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai aur jis marga par usaka moolapurush daud chala tteek usee par vah bhee chala, aur us se n to daahinee or aur n bai or muda." 
2Kings22:3 apane rajy ke attarahaven varsha men raja yoshaiyyah ne asalyah ke putra shaapan mantraee ko jo mashuullam ka pota tha, yahova ke bhvan men yah kahakar bheja, ki hilaakiyyah mahayajak ke pas jakar kah," 
2Kings22:4 ki jo chandee yahova ke bhvan men lai gai haai, aur darapalon ne praja se ikatthee kee haai," 
2Kings22:5 usako jodkar, un kam karanevalon ko saunp de, jo yahova ke bhvan ke kam par mukhaiye haain fir ve usako yahova ke bhvan men kam karanevale kareegaron ko de, isaaliye ki us men jo kuchh tootta footta ho usakee ve marammat karen." 
2Kings22:6 arthata baddhiyo, rajon aur sangatarashaen ko de, aur bhvan kee marammat ke liye lakadee aur gaddhe huae patthr mol lene men lagaaen." 
2Kings22:7 parantu jinake hath men vah chandee saunpee gai, un se hisab n liya gaya, kyonki ve sachchai se kam karate the." 
2Kings22:8 aur hilaakiyyah mahayajak ne shaapan mantraee se kaha, mujhe yahova ke bhvan men yyavastha kee pustak milee haai tab hilaakiyyah ne shaapan ko vah pustak dee, aur vah use paddhne laga." 
2Kings22:9 tab shaapan mantraee ne raja ke pas lauttkar yah sandesh diya, ki jo chanadee bhvan men milee, use tere karmachaariyo ne thailiyon men dal kar, unako saunp diya jo yahova ke bhvan men kam karanevale haain." 
2Kings22:10 fir shapan mantraee ne raja ko yah bhee bata diya, ki hilaakiyyah yajak ne use aek pustak dee haai. tab shapan use raja ko paddhkar sunane laga." 
2Kings22:11 yyavastha kee us pustak kee baten sunakar raja ne apane vasr faade. 
2Kings22:12 fir us ne hilaakiyyah yajak, shaapan ke putra aheekam, meekayah ke putra akabor, shaapan mantraee aur asaya tam apane aek karmacharee ko agyaa dee," 
2Kings22:13 ki yah pustak jo milee haai, usakee baton ke vishy tum jakar meree or praja kee aur sab sahoodiyon kee or se yahova se poochho, kyonaki yahova kee badee hee jalajalahatt ham par is karan bhdkee haai, ki hamare purakhaon ne is pustak kee baten n manee ki kuchh hamare liye likha haai, usake anusar karate." 
2Kings22:14 hilaakiyyah yajak aur aheekam, akabor, shaapan aur asaya ne hulda naabiya ke pas jakar us se baten kee, vah us shalloom kee patnee thee jo tikava ka putra aur harhas ka pota aur vasren ka rakhvala tha, aur vah sree yarooshalem ke naye ttole men rahatee thee." 
2Kings22:15 us ne un se kaha, israael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki jis purush ne tum ko mere pas bheja, us se yah kaho," 
2Kings22:16 yahova yon kahata haai, ki sun, jis pustak ko yahooda ke raja ne paddha haai, usakee sab baton ke anusar maain is sthan aur isake nivaasiyon par vipaattai dala chahata hoo.n" 
2Kings22:17 un logon ne mujhe tyag kar paraye devataon ke liye dhoop jalaya aur apanee banai hui sab vastuon ke dara mujhe krodha dilaya haai, is karan meree jalajalahatt is sthan par bhdkegee aur fir shaant n hogee." 
2Kings22:18 parantu yahooda ka raja jis ne tumhen yahova se poochhne ko bheja haai us se tum yon kaho, ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova kahata haai." 
2Kings22:19 isaliye ki too ve baten sunakar deen hua, aur meree ve baten sunakar ki is sthan aur isake nivaasiyon ko dekhkar log chaakit honge, aur shap diya karenge, too ne yahova ke samhane apana sir navaya, aur apane vasr faadkar mere samhane roya haai, is karan maain ne teree sunee haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
2Kings22:20 isaliye dek, maain aeesa karoonga, ki too apane purakhaon ke sang mil jaaega, aur too shaanati se apanee kabar ko pahunchaya jaaega, aur jo vipaattai maain is sthan par dala chahata hoo, us men se tujhe apanee okhon se kuchh bhee dekhna n padega. tab unhon ne lauttkar raja ko yahee sandesh diya." 
2Kings23:1 raja ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke sab puraaniyon ko apane pas ikattha bulavaya. 
2Kings23:2 aur raja, yahooda ke sab logon aur yarooshalem ke sab nivaasiyon aur yajakon aur naabiyon varan chhotte bade saree praja ke logon ko sang lekar yahova ke bhvan men gaya. tab us ne jo vacha kee mustak yahova ke bhvan men milee thee, usakee sab baten unako paddhkar sunai." 
2Kings23:3 tab raja ne khmbhe ke pas khda hokar yahova se is ashay kee vacha bandhae, ki maain yahova ke peechhe peechhe chaloonga, aur apane sare man aur sare praan se usakee agyaaae, chitauaniyan aur vidhaiyon ka nit palan kiya karoonga? aur is vacha kee baton ko jo is pustak men likhee haai pooree karoonga. aur sab praja vacha men sambhagee hui." 
2Kings23:4 tab raja ne hilaakiyyah mahayajak aur usake neeche ke yajakon aur darapalon ko agyaa dee ki jitane patra bal aur ashora aur akash ke sab gan ke liye bane haai, un sabhon ko yahova ke maandair men se nikal le ao. tab us ne unako yarooshalem ke bahar kidraen ke kheton men foonkakar unakee rakh betel ko pahuncha dee." 
2Kings23:5 aur jin pujaariyon ko yahooda ke rajaon ne yahooda ke nagaron ke unche sthanon men aur yarooshalem ke as pas ke sthanon men dhoop jalane ke liye ttharaya tha, unako aur jo bal aur soorya-chandrama, raashaichakr aur akash ke kul gan ko dhoop jalate the, unako bhee raja ne door kar diya." 
2Kings23:6 aur vah ashora ko yahova ke bhvan men se nikalakar yarooshalem ke bahar kidraen nale men livale gaya aur vaheen usako foonk diya, aur peesakar bukanee kar diya. tab vah bukanee sadhaaran logon kee kabaron par faenk dee." 
2Kings23:7 fir purushagaamiyon ke ghar jo yahova ke bhvan men the, jahan striayan ashora ke liye parde buna karatee thee, unako us ne ddha diya." 
2Kings23:8 aur us ne yahooda ke sab nagaron se yajakon ko bulavakar geba se beshba tak ke un unche sthanon ko, jahan un yajakon ne dhoop jalaya tha, ashuuddh kar diya aur faattkon ke unche sthan arthata jo sthan nagar ke yahoshoo nam hakim ke faattk par the, aur nagar ke faattk ke bheetar janevale kee bai or the, unako us ne ddha diya." 
2Kings23:9 taubhee unche sthanon ke yajak yarooshalem men yahova kee bedee ke pas n aa, ve akhmeeree rottee apane bhiyon ke sath khate the." 
2Kings23:10 fir us ne topet ko jo hinnomavanshaiyon kee tarai men tha, ashuuddh kar diya, taaki koi apane bette va bettee ko molok ke liye ag men hom karake n chaddhaae." 
2Kings23:11 aur jo ghaede yahooda ke rajaon ne soorya ko arpan karake, yahova ke bhvan ke dar par natanmelek nam khoje kee bahar kee kottree men rakhe the, unako us ne door kiya, aur soorya ke rathon ko ag men foonk diya." 
2Kings23:12 aur ahaj kee attaree kee chht par jo vediyan yahooda ke rajaon kee banai hui thee, aur jo vediyan manashsho ne yahova ke bhvan ke donon anganon men banai thee, unako raja ne ddhakar pees dala aur unakee bukanee kidraen nale men faenk dee." 
2Kings23:13 aur jo unche sthan israaael ke raja sulaaiman ne yarooshalem kee poorva or aur vikaree nam pahadee kee daakkhian alang, ashtoret nam seedoniyon kee ghainaunee devee, aur kamosh nam moabiyon ke ghainaune devata, aur milkom nam ammoniyon ke ghainaune devata ke liye banavaae the, unako raja ne ashuuddh kar diya." 
2Kings23:14 aur us ne latton ko tod diya aur ashoron ko katt dala, aur unake sthan manushyon kee haddiyon se bhr diae." 
2Kings23:15 fir betel men jo vedee thee, aur jo uncha sthan nabat ke putra yarobam ne banaya tha, jis ne israaael se pap karaya tha, us vedee aur us unche sthan ko us ne ddha diya, aur unche sthan ko foonkakar bukanee kar diya aur ashora ko foonk diya." 
2Kings23:16 aur yoshaiyyah ne fir kar vahan ke pahad kee kabaron ko dekha, aur logon ko bhejakar un kabaron se haaddiyan nikalava deen aur vedee par jalavakar usako ashuuddh kiya. yah yahova ke us vachan ke anusar hua, jo parameshvar ke us bhkt ne pukarakar kaha tha jis ne inheen baton kee charcha kee thee." 
2Kings23:17 tab us ne poochha, jo khmbha mujhe dikhai padta haai, vah kya haai? tab nagar ke logon ne us se kaha, vah parameshvar ke us bhkt jan kee kabar haai, jis ne yahooda se akar isee kam kee charcha pukarakar kee jo too ne betel kee vedee se kiya haai." 
2Kings23:18 tab us ne kaha, usako chhod do usakee haaddiyon ko koi n hattaae. tab unhon ne usakee haaddiyan us nabee kee haddiyon ke sang jo shaemaron se aya tha, rahane dee." 
2Kings23:19 fir unche sthan ke jitane bhpan shaemaron ke nagaron men the, jinako israaael ke rajaon ne banakar yahova ko ris dilai thee, un sabhon ko yoshaiyyah ne gira diya aur jaaisa jaaisa us ne betel men kiya tha, vaaisa vaaisa un se bhee kiya." 
2Kings23:20 aur un unche sthanon ke jitane yajak vahan the un sabhon ko us ne unhee veadiyon par baali kiya aur un par manushyon kee haddiyan jalakar yarooshalem ko lautt gaya. 
2Kings23:21 aur raja ne saree praja ke logon ko agyaa dee, ki is vacha kee pustak men jo kuchh likha haai, usake anusar apane parameshvar yahova ke liye fasah ka parva mano." 
2Kings23:22 nishchay aeesa fasah n to nyayiyon ke dinon men mana gaya tha jo israaael ka nyay karate the, aur n israaael va yahooda ke rajaon ke dinon men mana gaya tha." 
2Kings23:23 raja yoshaiyyah ke attarahaven varsha men yahova ke liye yarooshalem men yah fasah mana gaya. 
2Kings23:24 fir ojhe, bootaasiddhivale, grahadevata, mooraten aur jitanee ghainaunee vastuen yahood desh aur yarooshalem men jahan kaheen dikhai padee, un sabhon ko yoshaiyyah ne us manasa se nash kiya, ki yyavastha kee jo baten us pustak men likhee theen jo hilaakiyyah yajak ko yahova ke bhvan men milee thee, unako vah pooree kare." 
2Kings23:25 aur usake tuly n to us se paahile koi aeesa raja hua aur n usake bad aeesa koi raja utta, jo moosa kee pooree yyavastha ke anusar apane poorn man aur moorn praan aur poorn shaaktai se yahova kee or fira ho." 
2Kings23:26 taubhee yahova ka bhdka hua bada kop shaant n hua, jo is karan se yahooda par bhdka tha, ki manashsho ne yahova ko krodha par krodha dilaya tha." 
2Kings23:27 aur yahova ne kaha tha jese maain ne israaael ko apane samhane se door kiya, vaaise hee sahooda ko bhee door karoonga aur is yarooshalem nagar se jise maain ne chuna aur is bhvan se jisake vishay maain ne kaha, ki yah mere nam ka nivas hoga, maain hath uttaunga." 
2Kings23:28 yoshaiyyah ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, vah kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Kings23:29 usake dinon men firauna-nako nam misra ka raja ashshoor ke raja ke viruddh parat mahanad tak gaya to yoshaiyyah raja bhee usaka samhana karane ko gaya, aur us ne usako dekhte hee maagio men mar dala." 
2Kings23:30 tab usake karmachaariyon ne usakee loth aek rath par rakh maagio se le jakar yarooshalem ko pahunchai aur usakee nij kabar men rakh dee. tab sadhaaran logon ne yoshaiyyah ke putra yahoahaj ko lekar usaka aabhaishok karake, usake pita ke sthan par raja niyukt kiya." 
2Kings23:31 jab yahoahaj rajy karane laga, tab vah teriras varsha ka tha, aur teen maheene tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam hamootal tha, jo libnavasee yirmayah kee bettee thee." 
2Kings23:32 us ne ieek apane purakhaon kee nai vahee kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai." 
2Kings23:33 usako firauna-nako ne hamat desh ke ribala nagar men bandha rakha, taki vah yarooshalem men rajy n karane paa, fir us ne desh par sau kikkar chandee aur kikkar bhr sona juramana kiya." 
2Kings23:34 tab firauna-nako ne yoshaiyyah ke putra aelyakeem ko usake pita yoshaiyyah ke sthan par raja niyukt kiya, aur usaka nam badalakar yahoyakeem rakha aur yahoahaj ko le gaya. so yahoahaj misra men jakar vaheen mar gaya." 
2Kings23:35 yahoyakeem ne firaun ko vah chandee aur sona to diya parantu desh par isaliye kar lagaya ki firaun kee agyaa ke anusar use de sake, arthata desh ke sab logon se jitana jis par lagan laga, utanee chandee aur sona us se firauna-nako ko dene ke liye le liya." 
2Kings23:36 jab sahoyakeem rajy karane laga, tab vah pachees parsha ka tha, aur gyarah varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam jabeeda tha jo roomavasee adayah kee bettee thee." 
2Kings23:37 us ne tteek apane purakhaon kee nai vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai. 
2Kings24:1 usake dinon men babel ke raja nabookadanessar ne chaddhai kee aur yahoyakeem teen varsha tak usake adhaeen raha tab us ne fir kar us se balava kiya. 
2Kings24:2 tab yahava ne usake viruddh aur yahooda ko nash karane ke liye kasadiyo, araamiyo, moaabiyon aur ammoniyon ke dal bheje, yah yahova ke us vachan ke anusar hua, jo us ne apane das bhvishyadvktaon ke dara kaha tha." 
2Kings24:3 nisandeh yah yahooda par yahova kee agyaa se hua, taki vah unako apane samhane se door kare. yah manashsho ke sab papon ke karan hua." 
2Kings24:4 aur nidashaen ke us koon ke karan jo us ne kiya tha kyonaki us ne yarooshalem ko nidashaen ke koon se bhr diya tha, jisako yahova ne kshama karana n chaha." 
2Kings24:5 yahoyakeem ke aur sab kam jo us ne kia, vah kya yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Kings24:6 nidan yahoyakeem apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usaka putra yahoyakeen usake sthan par raja hua. 
2Kings24:7 aur misra ka raja apane desh se bahar fir kabhee n aya, kyonaki babel ke raja ne misra ke nale se lekar parat mahanad tak jitana desh misra ke raja ka tha, sab ko apane vash men kar liya tha." 
2Kings24:8 jab yahoyakeen rajy karane laga, tab vah attarah varsha ka tha, aur teen maheene tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam tahushta tha, jo yarooshalem ke aelanatan kee bettee thee." 
2Kings24:9 us ne tteek apane pita kee nai vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai." 
2Kings24:10 usake dinon men babel ke raja nabookadanessar ke karmachariyon ne yarooshalem par chaddhai karake nagar ko ghor liya. 
2Kings24:11 aur jab babel ke raja nabookadanessar ke karmacharee nagar ko ghore huae the, tab vah ap vahan a gaya." 
2Kings24:12 aur yahooda ka raja yahoyakeen apanee mata aur karmachaariyo, hakimon aur khojon ko sang lekar babel ke raja ke pas gaya, aur babel ke raja ne apane rajy ke attven varsha me unako pakad liya." 
2Kings24:13 tab us ne yahova ke bhvan men aur rajabhvan men rakha hua poora dhan vahan se nikal liya aur sone ke jo patra israaael ke raja sulaaiman ne banakar yahova ke mandair men rakhe the, un sabhon ko us ne ttukade ttukade kar dala, jaaisa ki yahova ne kaha tha." 
2Kings24:14 fir vah poore yarooshalem ko arthata sab haakimon aur sab dhanavanon ko jo milakar das hajar the, aur sab kareegaron aur loharon ko bandhaua karake le gaya, yahan tak ki sadhaaran logon men se kangalon ko chhod aur koi n rah gaya." 
2Kings24:15 aur vah yahoyakeen ko babel men le gaya aur usakee mata aur striayon aur khojon ko aur desh ke bade logon ko vah bandhaua karake yarooshalem se babel ko le gaya. 
2Kings24:16 aur sab dhanavan jo sat hajar the, aur kareegar aur lohar jo milakar aek hajar the, aur ve sab veer aur yuddh ke yogy the, unhen babel ka raja bandhaua karake babel ko le gaya." 
2Kings24:17 aur babel ke raja ne usake sthan par usake chacha mattanyah ko raja niyukt kiya aur usaka nam badalakar sidaakiyyah rakha. 
2Kings24:18 jab sidaakiyyah rajy karane laga, tab vah ikkees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men gyarah varsha tak rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam hamootal tha, jo libnavasee yirmayah kee bettee thee." 
2Kings24:19 us ne tteek yahoyakeem kee leek par chalakar vahee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai. 
2Kings24:20 kyonaki yahova ke kop ke karan yarooshalem aur yahooda ko aeesee dasha hui, ki ant men us ne unako apane samhane se door kiya." 
2Kings25:1 aur sidaakiyyah ne babel ke raja se balava kiya. usake rajy ke nauven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke dasaven din ko babel ke raja nabookadanessar ne apanee pooree sena lekar yarooshalem par chaddhai kee, aur usake pas chhavanee karake usake charon or kott banaae." 
2Kings25:2 aur nagar sidaakiyyah raja ke gyarahaven varsha tak ghaira hua raha. 
2Kings25:3 chauthe maheene ke nauven din se nagar men mahangee yahan tak baddh gai, ki desh ke logon ke liye kuchh khane ko n raha." 
2Kings25:4 tab nagar kee shaharapanah men darar kee gai, aur donon bheeton ke beech jo faattk raja kee baree ke nikatt tha us marga se sab yoddha rat hee rat nikal bhage. kasadee to nagar ko ghore huae the, parantu raja ne araba ka marga liya." 
2Kings25:5 tab kasadiyon kee sena ne raja ka peechha kiya, aur usako yareeho ke pas ke araba men ja liya, aur usakee pooree sena usake pas se titar bitar ho gai." 
2Kings25:6 tab ve raja ko pakadkar ribala men babel ke raja ke pas le gaa, aur use dand kee agyaa dee gai." 
2Kings25:7 aur unhon ne sidaakiyyah ke putraen ko usake samhane ghaat kiya aur sidaakiyyah kee ankhen faod daleen aur use peetal kee bediyon se jakadkar babel ko le gaae. 
2Kings25:8 babel ke raja nabookadanessar ke unneesaven varsha ke panchaven maheene ke sataven din ko jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan jo babel ke raja ka aek karmacharee t, yarooshalem men aya." 
2Kings25:9 aur us ne yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan aur yarooshalem ke sab gharon ko arthata har aek bade ghar ko ag lagakar foonk diya. 
2Kings25:10 aur yarooshalem ke charon or kee sab shaharapanah ko kasadiyo kee pooree sena ne jo jalladon ke pradhaan ke sang thee ddha diya. 
2Kings25:11 aur jo log nagar men rah gaae the, aur jo log babel ke raja ke pas bhag gaae the, aur sadhaaran log jo rah gaae the, in sabhen ko jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan bandhaua karake le gaya." 
2Kings25:12 parantu jalladon ke pradhaan ne desh ke kangalon men se kitanon ko dakh kee bariyon kee seva aur kashtakaree karane ko chhod diya.
