2Kings25:13 aur yahova ke bhvan men jo peetal ke khmbhe the aur kuarsiyan aur peetal ka haud jo yahova ke bhvan men tha, inako kasadee todkar unaka peetal babel ko le gaae." 
2Kings25:14 aur haandiyo, faavaadiyo, chimatto, dhoopadanon aur peetal ke sab patraon ko jin se seva tthal hotee thee, ve le gaae." 
2Kings25:15 aur karachhe aur kattoriyan jo sone kee thee, aur jo kuchh chandee ka tha, vah sab sona, chandee, jalladon ka pradhaan le gaya." 
2Kings25:16 donon khmbhe, aek haud aur jo kursiyan sulaaiman ne yahova ke bhvan ke liye banaae the, in sab vastuon ka peetal taul se bahar tha." 
2Kings25:17 aek aek khmbhe kee unchai attarah attarah hath kee thee aur aek aek khmbhe ke upar teen teen hath unchee peetal kee aek aek kanganee thee, aur aek aek kanganee par charon or jo jalee aur anar bane the, ve sab peetal ke the." 
2Kings25:18 aur jalladon ke pradhaan ne sarayah mahayajak aur usake neeche ke yajak sapanyah aur teenon darapalon ko pakad liya. 
2Kings25:19 aur nagar men se us ne aek hakim ko pakada jo yodaon ke upar tha, aur jo purush raja ke sammukh raha karate the, un men se panch jan jo nagar men mile, aur senapaati ka munshaee jo logon ko sena men bhratee kiya karata tha aur logon men se satt purush jo nagar men mile." 
2Kings25:20 inako jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan pakadkar ribala ke raja ke pas le gaya. 
2Kings25:21 tab babel ke raja ne unhen hamat desh ke ribala men aeesa mara ki ve mar gaae. yon yahoodee bandhaua banake apane desh se tikal diae gaae. 
2Kings25:22 aur jo log yahooda desh men rah gaa, jinako babel ke raja nabookadanessar ne chhod diya, un par us ne aheekam ke putra gadalyah ko jo shaapan ka pota tha aadhaikaree ttharaya." 
2Kings25:23 jab dalon ke sab pradhaanon ne arthata natanyah ke putra ishmaael karehoo ke putra yohanan, natopai, tanhoomet ke putra sarayah aur kisee makai ke putra yajanyah ne aur unake janon ne yah suna, ki babel ke raja ne gadalyah ko aadhaikaree ttharaya haai, tab ve apane apane janon samet mispa men gadalyah ke pas aae." 
2Kings25:24 aur gadalyah ne un se aur unake janon se shapath khakar kaha, kasaadiyon ke sipaahiyon se n dro, desh men rahate huae babel ke raja ke adhaeen raho, tab numhara bhla hoga." 
2Kings25:25 parantu sataven maheene men natanyah ka putra ishmaael, jo aeleeshaama ka pota aur rajavansh ka tha, us ne das jan sang le gadalyah ke pas jakar use aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya, aur jo yahoodee aur kasadee usake sang mispa men rahate the, unako bhee mar dala." 
2Kings25:26 tab kya chhotte kya bade saree praja ke log aur dalon ke pradhaan kasadiyon ke dr ke mare uttkar misra men jakar rahane lage. 
2Kings25:27 fir yahooda ke raja yahoyakeen kee bandhauai ke taainteesaven varsha men arthata jis varsha men babel ka raja aeveelmarodak rajagaee par virajaman hua, usee ke barahaven maheene ke sattaisaven din ko us ne yahooda ke raja yahoyakeen ko bandeegrah se nikalakar bada pad diya." 
2Kings25:28 aur us se madhaur madhaur vachan kahakar jo raja usake sang babel men bandhauae the unake sinhasanon se usake sinhasan ko aadhaik uncha kiya," 
2Kings25:29 aur usake bandeegrah ke vasr badal diae aur us ne jeevan bhr nity raja ke sammukh bhojan kiya. 
2Kings25:30 aur praatidin ke khrcha ke liye raja ke yahan se nity ka ksharcha ttharaya gaya jo usake jeevan bhr lagatar use milata raha.

1Chronicles1:2 kenan, mahalalel, yereda" 
1Chronicles1:3 hanok, matoosholah, lemeka" 
1Chronicles1:4 nooh, shom, ham aur yepet." 
1Chronicles1:5 yepet ke putra gomer, magog, madaai, savan, toobal, meshok aur teeras haain." 
1Chronicles1:6 aur gomer ke putra ashakanaj, deepat aur togarma haain." 
1Chronicles1:7 aur yavan ke putra aeleesha, tashasha, aur kittee aur rodanee log haain." 
1Chronicles1:8 ham ke putra kusha, misra, poot aur kanan haain." 
1Chronicles1:9 aur koosh ke putra saba, habeela, sabata, rama aur sabtaka haain aur rama ke putra shaba aur dadan haain." 
1Chronicles1:10 aur koosh se nimraed utpann hua mrathvee par paahila veer vahee hua. 
1Chronicles1:11 aur misra se loodee, anamee, lahavee, naptahee." 
1Chronicles1:12 patroosee, kasaloohee vahan se paalishtee nikale aur kaptoree utpann hue." 
1Chronicles1:13 kanan se usaka jetta seedon aur hitta. 
1Chronicles1:14 aur yaboosee, aemoree, girgashaee." 
1Chronicles1:15 hiyvee, aka,seenee." 
1Chronicles1:16 arvadee, samaree aur hamatee utpann huae." 
1Chronicles1:17 shom ke putra aelam, ashshoor, arpakshad, lood, aram, us, hool, geter aur meshok haain." 
1Chronicles1:18 aur arpakshad se sholah aur sholah se aeber utpann hua. 
1Chronicles1:19 aur aeber ke do putra utpann huae aek ka nam peleg is karan rakha gaya ki usake dinon men prathvee banttee gai aur usake bhai ka nam yoktan tha. 
1Chronicles1:20 aur yoktan se almodad, shuulep, hasarmavet, yeraha." 
1Chronicles1:21 hadoram, ujal, dikla." 
1Chronicles1:22 aebal, abeemaael, shaba," 
1Chronicles1:23 opeer, haveela aur sobab utpann hue ye hee sab yoktan ke putra haain." 
1Chronicles1:24 shom, arpakshad, sholaha." 
1Chronicles1:25 aeber, peleg, roo." 
1Chronicles1:26 saroog, nahor, terah," 
1Chronicles1:27 abraam, vahee ibraaheem bhee kahalata haai." 
1Chronicles1:28 ibraaheem ke putra isahak aur ishmaael haain. 
1Chronicles1:29 inakee vanshaavaaliyan ye haain. ishmaael ka jetta navayot, fir kedar, adavel, mibasama." 
1Chronicles1:30 mishma, dooma, massa, hadad, tema." 
1Chronicles1:31 yatoor, napeesha, kedama. ye ishmaael ke putra huae." 
1Chronicles1:32 fir katoora jo ibraaheem kee rakhelee thee, usake ye putra utpann hua, arthata us se jimraan, yokshaan, madan, midhan, yishabak aur shooh utpann hue. yokshaan ke putra shaba aur dadata." 
1Chronicles1:33 aur midhan ke putra aepa, aeper, hanok, abeeda aur aelada, ye sab katoora ke putra haain." 
1Chronicles1:34 ibraaheem se isahak utpann hua. isahak ke putra aesav aur israaaela. 
1Chronicles1:35 aesav ke putra aeleepaj, rooael, yoosha, yalam aur korah haain." 
1Chronicles1:36 aeleepaj ke ye putra haain teman, omar, sapee, gatam, kanaj, timna aur apaleka." 
1Chronicles1:37 rooael ke putra nahat, jerah, shamma aur mijja." 
1Chronicles1:38 fir seir ke putra lotan, shaebal, siboen, ana, deeshaen, aeser aur deeshaan haain." 
1Chronicles1:39 aur lotan ke putra horee aur homam, aur lotan kee bahin timna theen." 
1Chronicles1:40 shaebal ke putra alyan, manahat, aebal, shashaee aur onama." 
1Chronicles1:41 aur sibon ke putra ayya, aur ana. ana ka putra deeshaena. aur deeshaen ke putra hamraan, aeshaban, yitraan aur karana." 
1Chronicles1:42 aeser ke putra bilhan, jachan aur yakana. aur deeshaan ke putra us aur aran haain." 
1Chronicles1:43 jab kisee raja ne israaaeliyon par rajy n kiya tha, tab aedom ke desh men ye raja huae arthata bor ka putra bela aur usakee rajadhaanee ka nam dinhaba tha." 
1Chronicles1:44 bela ke marane par, bosraai jerah ka putra yobab, usake sthan par raja hua." 
1Chronicles1:45 aur yobab ke marane par, temaniyon ke desh ka hooshaam usake sthan par raja hua." 
1Chronicles1:46 fir hooshaam ke marane par, badad ka putra hadad, usake sthan par raja hua yah vahee haai, jis ne midhaaniyon ko moab ke desh men mar liya aur usakee rajadhaanee ka nam abeet tha." 
1Chronicles1:47 aur hadad ke marane par, masraekai samla usake sthan par raja hua." 
1Chronicles1:48 fir samla ke marane par shaaul, jo mahanad ke tatt par ke rahobot nagar ka tha, vah usake sthan par raja hua." 
1Chronicles1:49 aur shaaul ke marane par akabor ka putra balhanan usake sthan par raja hua. 
1Chronicles1:50 aur balhanan ke marane par, hadad usake sthan par raja hua aur usakee rajadhaanee ka nam pai tha. aur usakee patnee ka nam mahetabel tha jo mejaahab kee natinee aur matrod kee bettee thee. aur hadad mar gaya." 
1Chronicles1:51 fir aedom ke aadhaipaati ye the arthata aadhaipaati timna, adhaipaati alya, adhaipaati yatet, adhaipaati oholeevama," 
1Chronicles1:52 aadhaipaati aela, aadhaipaati peenon, adhaipaati kanaj," 
1Chronicles1:53 aadhaipaati teman, adhaipaati mibasar, aadhaipaati magdeeael, aadhaipaati irama." 
1Chronicles1:54 aedom ke ye adhaipaati hue. 
1Chronicles2:1 israaael ke ye putra huae rooben, shaimon, levee, sahooda, issakar, jabooloon, dana." 
1Chronicles2:2 yoosuf, binyameen, nantalee, gad aur ashora." 
1Chronicles2:3 yahooda ke ye putra huae aer, onan aur shola, usake ye teenon putra, batashoo nam aek kananee sree se utpann huae. aur yahooda ka jetta aer, yahova kee drashtti men bura tha, is karan us ne usako mar dala." 
1Chronicles2:4 yahooda kee bahoo tamar se peres aur jerah utpann hue. yahooda ke sab putra panch huae. 
1Chronicles2:5 meres ke putra hesraen aur hamoola. 
1Chronicles2:6 aur jereh ke putra jimrae, aetan, heman, kalakol aur dara sab milakar pancha." 
1Chronicles2:7 fir kama ka putra akar jo arpan kee hui pastu ke vishay men vishvasaghaat karake israaaeliyon ka kashtt denevala hua. 
1Chronicles2:8 aur aetan ka putra ajaryaha. 
1Chronicles2:9 hesraen ke jo putra utpann huae yarael, ram aur kaloobaai." 
1Chronicles2:10 aur ram se ammeenadab aur ammeenadab se nahashaen utpann hua jo yahoodiyon ka pradhaan bana. 
1Chronicles2:11 aur nahashaen se salma aur salma se boaj," 
1Chronicles2:12 aur boaj se obed aur obed se yishau utpann hua. 
1Chronicles2:13 aur yishau se usaka jetta aeleeab aur doosara abeenadab teesara shaima. 
1Chronicles2:14 chautha natanel aur panchavan raain. chhtta osem aur satavan daud utpann hua. 
1Chronicles2:15 inakee baahinen sarooyah or abeegaail theen. 
1Chronicles2:16 aur sarooyah ke putra abeeshau, yoab aur asahel ye teen the." 
1Chronicles2:17 aur abeegaail se amasa utpann hua, aur amasa ka pita ishmaaelee yeter tha." 
1Chronicles2:18 hesraen ke putra kaleb ke ajooba nam aek stree se, aur yareeot se, bette utpann hue aur isake putra ye hooae arthata yeshor, shobab aur adana." 
1Chronicles2:19 jab ajooba mar gai, sab kaleb ne aepraat ko byah liya aur jisase hoor utpann hua." 
1Chronicles2:20 aur hoor se uree aur uree se basalel utpann hua. 
1Chronicles2:21 isake bad hesraen gilad ke pita makeer kee bettee ke pas gaya, jise us ne tab byah liya, jab vah satt varsha ka tha aur us se sagoob utpann hua." 
1Chronicles2:22 aur sagoob se yair janma, jisake gilad desh men teis nagar the." 
1Chronicles2:23 aur gashoor aur aram ne yair kee bastaiyon ko aur ganvon samet kanat ko, un se le liya ye sab nagar milakar satt the. ye sab gilad ke pita makeer ke putra huae." 
1Chronicles2:24 aur jab hesraen kalebepraata men mar gaya, tab usakee aabiyyah nam sree se ashahoor utpann hua jo tako ka pita hua." 
1Chronicles2:25 aur hesraen ke jette yarael ke ye putra huae arthata ram jo usaka jetta tha aur boona, oren, osem aur yaahiyyaha." 
1Chronicles2:26 aur yarael kee aek aur patnee thee, jisaka nam atara tha vah onam kee mata thee." 
1Chronicles2:27 aur yarael ke jette ram ke ye putra hua, arthata mas, yameen aur aekera." 
1Chronicles2:28 aur onam ke putra shammaai aur yada hue. aur shammaai ke putra nadab aur abeeshoor hue. 
1Chronicles2:29 aur abeeshoor kee patnee ka nam abeehaail tha, aur us se ahaban aur moleed utpann huae." 
1Chronicles2:30 aur nadab ke putra seled aur atpaaim huae seled to nisantan mar gaya. aur attaaim ka putra yishaee. 
1Chronicles2:31 aur yishaee ka putra shoshaan aur shoshaan ka putra ahalaai. 
1Chronicles2:32 fir shammaai ke bhai yada ke putra yeter aur yonatan huae yeter to nisantan mar gaya. 
1Chronicles2:33 yanatan ke putra pelet aur jaja yarael ke putra ye huae. 
1Chronicles2:34 shoshaan ke to betta n hua, keval beattyaian hui. shoshaan ke pas yarha nam aek misraee das tha." 
1Chronicles2:35 aur shoshaan ne usako apanee bettee byah dee, aur us se attaai utpann hua." 
1Chronicles2:36 aur attaai se natan, natan se jabada." 
1Chronicles2:37 jabad se aepalal, aepalal se obeda." 
1Chronicles2:38 obed se yeho, yehoo se ajaryaha." 
1Chronicles2:39 ajaryah se helaais, helaais se aelasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 aelasa se sismaai, sismaai se shallooma." 
1Chronicles2:41 shalloom se yakamyah aur yakamyah se aeleeshaama utpann hue. 
1Chronicles2:42 fir yarael ke bhai kaleb ke ye putra huae arthata usaka jetta mesha jo jeep ka pita hua. aur maresha ka putra hebraen bhee usee ke vansh men hua. 
1Chronicles2:43 aur hebraen ke putra korah, tappooh, rekem aur shoma." 
1Chronicles2:44 aur shoma se yorkam ka pita raham aur rekem se shammaai utpann hua tha. 
1Chronicles2:45 aur shammaai ka putra maon hua aur maon betsoor ka pita hua. 
1Chronicles2:46 fir aepa jo kaleb kee rakhelee thee, us se haran, mosa aur gajej utpann hue aur haran se gajej utpann hua." 
1Chronicles2:47 fir yahadaai ke putra regem, yotam, geshaan, pelet, aepa aur shaapa." 
1Chronicles2:48 aur maka jo kaleb kee rakhelee thee, us se shober aur tirhana utpann hue." 
1Chronicles2:49 fir us se madamanna ka pita shaap aur makabena aur giba ka pita shaba utpann hue. aur kaleb kee bettee akasa thee. kaleb ke putra yen hue. 
1Chronicles2:50 aepraata ke jette hoor ka putra kiryatyareem ka pita shaebala. 
1Chronicles2:51 betalehem ka pita salma aur betagader ka pita harepa. 
1Chronicles2:52 aur kiryatyareem ke pita shaebal ke vansh men haroae adho manuhotavasee," 
1Chronicles2:53 aur kiryatyareem ke kul arthata yitrae, pootee, shoomatee aur mishraai aur in se sorai aur aeshtaolee nikale." 
1Chronicles2:54 fir salma ke vansh men betalehem aur natopai, atraetabetyoab aur adho manahatee, soree." 
1Chronicles2:55 fir yabes men rahanevale lekhkon ke kul arthata tiratee, shaimatee aur sookatee huae. ye rekab ke gharane ke moolapurush hamman ke vanshavale kenee haain." 
1Chronicles3:1 daud ke putra jo hebraen men us se utpann huae ve ye haain jetta amnon jo yijraelee aheenoam se, doosara daaniyyel jo karmelee abeegaail se utpann hua." 
1Chronicles3:2 teesara abashaalom jo gashoor ke raja talmaai kee bettee maka ka mutra tha, chautha odaniyyah jo harageet ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles3:3 panchavan shapatyah jo abeetal se, aur chhttvan yitraam jo usakee sree aegla se utpann hua." 
1Chronicles3:4 daud se hebraen men chh putra utpann hua, aur vahan us ne saddhe sat varsha rajy kiya aur yarooshalem men taaintees varsha rajy kiya." 
1Chronicles3:5 aur yarooshalem men usake ye putra utpann huae arthata shaima, shaebab, tatan aur sulaaiman, ye charo ammeeael kee bettee batashoo se utpann huae." 
1Chronicles3:6 aur yibhar, aeleeshaama aeleepeleta." 
1Chronicles3:7 negah, nepeg, yapee." 
1Chronicles3:8 aeleeshaama, aelyada aur aeleemelet, ye nau putra the, ye sab daud ke putra the." 
1Chronicles3:9 aur inako chhod rakhealiyon ke bhee putra the, aur inakee bahin tamar thee." 
1Chronicles3:10 fir sulaaiman ka putra rahabam utpann hua rahabam ka aabiyyah ka asa, asa ka yahoshaapata." 
1Chronicles3:11 yahoshapat ka yoram, yoram ka ahajyah, ahajyah ka yoasha." 
1Chronicles3:12 yoash ka amasyah, amasyah ka ajaryah, ajaryah ka yotama." 
1Chronicles3:13 yotam ka ahaj, ahaj ka hijaakiyyah, hijaakiyyah ka manashsho." 
1Chronicles3:14 manashsho ka amon, aur amon ka yoshaiyyah putra hua." 
1Chronicles3:15 aur yoshaiyyah ke putra usaka jeia yohanan, doosara yahoyakeema teesara sidaakiyyah, chauaitha shallooma." 
1Chronicles3:16 aur yahoyakeem ka putra yakonyah, isaka putra sidaakiyyaha." 
1Chronicles3:17 or yakonyah ka putra asseer, usaka putra shaalateeaela." 
1Chronicles3:18 aur malkeeram, padayah, shoenassar, yakamyah, hoshaama aur nadabyaha." 
1Chronicles3:19 aur padayah ke putra jarubbabel aur shaimee huae aur jarubbabel ke putra mashuullam aur hananyah, jinakee baheen shalomeet thee." 
1Chronicles3:20 aur hashooba, ohel, berekyah, hasadhah aur yooshamesed, pancha." 
1Chronicles3:21 aur hananyah ke putra palatyah aur yashaayaha. aur rapayah ke putra arnan ke putra obadhah ke putra aur shakanyah ke putra. 
1Chronicles3:22 aur takanyah ka putra shamayaha. aur shamayah ke putra hattoosh aur yigal, bareeh, naryah aur shapat, chh." 
1Chronicles3:23 aur naryah ke putra aelyoaenaai, hijaakiyyah aur ajraeekam, teena." 
1Chronicles3:24 aur aelyoaenaai ke putra hodabyah, aelyashaeeb, palayah, akakoob, yohanan, dalayah aur ananee, sata." 
1Chronicles4:1 yahooda ke putra peres, hesraen, kama, hoor aur shaebala." 
1Chronicles4:2 aur shaebal ke putra rayah se yahat aur yahat se ahoomaai aur lahad utpann hua, ye sorai kul haain." 
1Chronicles4:3 aur aetam ke pita ke ye putra huae arthata yijrael, yishma aur yidasha, jinakee bahin ka nam hassalelaponee tha." 
1Chronicles4:4 aur gador ka pita panooael, aur roosha ka pita aejera. ye aepraata ke jette hoor ke santan haai, jo betalehem ka pita hua." 
1Chronicles4:5 aur tako ke pita ashahoor ke heba aur nara nam do striayan theen. 
1Chronicles4:6 aur nara se ahujjam, heper, temanee aur hahashataree utpann hua, nara ke ye hee putra, hue." 
1Chronicles4:7 aur hela ke putra, seret, yisahar aur aemnana." 
1Chronicles4:8 fir kos se anoob aur sobeva utpann huae aur usek vansh men haroon ke putra aharhel ke kul bhee utpann hue. 
1Chronicles4:9 aur yabes apane bhiyon se adhaik pratishttit hua, aur usakee mata ne yah kahakar usaka nam yabes rakha, ki maain ne ise peedit hokar utpann kiya." 
1Chronicles4:10 aur yabes ne israaael ke parameshvar ko yah kahakar pukara, ki bhla hota, ki too mujhe sachamuch ashaeesh deta, aur mera desh baddhata, aur tera hath mere sath rahata, aur too mujhe burai se aeesa bacha rakhta ki maain us se peeadit t hota! aur jo kuchh us ne manga, vah parameshvar ne use diya." 
1Chronicles4:11 fir shooha ke bhai kaloob se aeshaton ka pita maheer utpann hua. 
1Chronicles4:12 aur aeshaton ke vansh men rama ka gharana, aur paseh aur irnahash ka pita taahinna utpann hua, reka ke log ye hee haain." 
1Chronicles4:13 aur kanaj ke putra, otneeael aur sarayah, aur otneeael ka putra hatata." 
1Chronicles4:14 monotaai se opra aur sarayah se yoab jo geharashaeem ka pita hua ve kareegar the. 
1Chronicles4:15 aur yapunne ke putra kaleb ke putra aela aur nam, aur aela ke putra kanaja." 
1Chronicles4:16 aur yahallel ke putra, jeep, jeepa, teeraya aur asarela." 
1Chronicles4:17 aur aejra ke putra yeter, mered, aeper aur yalon, aur usakee sree se miyryam, shammaai aur aeshatamo ka pita yishabah utpann hue." 
1Chronicles4:18 aur usakee yahoodin sree se gador ka pita yered, soko ke pita heber aur janoh ke pita yakooteeael utpann hua, ye firon kee bettee bitya ke putra the jise mered ne byah liya tha." 
1Chronicles4:19 aur hodiyyah kee sree jo naham kee baahin thee, usake putra keela ka pita aek geremee aur aeshatamo ka pita aek makai." 
1Chronicles4:20 aur shaeemon ke putra amnon, rinna, benhanan aur tolon aur yishaee ke putra johet aur benajoheta." 
1Chronicles4:21 yahooda ke putra shola ke putra leka ka pita aer, maresha ka pita lada aur ashabe ke gharane ke kul jis men san ke kapade ka kam hota tha." 
1Chronicles4:22 aur yokeem aur kojeba ke manushy aur yoash aur sarap jo moab men prabhuta karate the aur yashoob, lehem inaka vrattant praacheen haai." 
1Chronicles4:23 ye kumhar the, aur nataim aur gadera men rahate the jahan ve raja ka kamakaj karate huae usake pas rahate the." 
1Chronicles4:24 shaimon ke putra namooael, yameen, yareeb, jerah aur shaaula." 
1Chronicles4:25 aur shaaul ka putra shalloom, shalloom ka putra mibasam aur mibasam ka mishma hua." 
1Chronicles4:26 aur mishma ka putra hammooael, usaka putra jakkoor, aur usaka putra shaimee." 
1Chronicles4:27 shaimee ke solah bette aur chh beattyaian hui parantu usake bhaiyon ke bahut bette n hue aur unaka sara kul yahoodiyon ke barabar n baddha. 
1Chronicles4:28 ve bershaba, molada, hasarshooala." 
1Chronicles4:29 bilha, aesem, tolada." 
1Chronicles4:30 batooael, horma, silkag," 
1Chronicles4:31 betamarkabot, hasasrooseem, betabiree aur shaaraaim men bas gaae daud ke rajay ke samay tak unake ye hee nagar rahe." 
1Chronicles4:32 aur unake ganv aetam, aeen, rimmon, token aur ashaan nam panch nagara." 
1Chronicles4:33 aur bal tak jitane ganv in nagaron ke asapas the, unake basane ke sthan ye hee the, aur yah unakee vanshaavalee haain." 
1Chronicles4:34 fir mashaebab aur yamlek aur apasyah ka putra yoshaa. 
1Chronicles4:35 aur yoael aur yoshaibyah ka putra yeho, jo sarayah ka pota, aur aseeael ka paramota tha." 
1Chronicles4:36 aur aelyoaenaai aur yakoba, yashaehayah aur asayah aur adeeael aur yaseemeeael aur banayaha." 
1Chronicles4:37 aur shaipee ka putra jeeja jo allon ka putra, yah yadayah ka putra, yah shaimraee ka putra, yah shamayah ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles4:38 ye jinake nam likhen huae haai, apane apane kul men pradhaan the aur unake pitaron ke gharane bahut baddh gaae." 
1Chronicles4:39 ye apanee bhed-bakaariyon ke liye charai ddoonddhne ko gador kee ghaattee kee tarai kee poorva or tak gaae. 
1Chronicles4:40 aur unako uttam se uttam charai milee, aur desh lamba-chauda, chaait aur shaanati ka tha kyonki vahan ke paahile rahanevale ham ke vansh ke the." 
1Chronicles4:41 aur jinake nam upar likhe haai, unhon ne yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ke dinon men vahan akar jo moonee vahan mile, unako deron samet marakar aeesa satyanash kar dala ki ah tak unaka pata naheen haai, aur ve unake sthan men rahane lage, kyonaki vahan unakee bhed-bakaariyon ke liye charai theen." 
1Chronicles4:42 aur un men se arthata shaimoniyon men se pach sau purush apane upar palatyah, naryah, rapayah aur ujjeeael nam yishaee ke putraen ko apane pradhaan ttharaya" 
1Chronicles4:43 tab ve seid pahad ko gaa, aur jo amelekee bachakar rah gaae the unako mara, aur aj ke din tab vahan rahate haain." 
1Chronicles5:1 israaael ka jetta to rooben tha, parantu us ne jo apane pita ke bichhaune ko ashuud kiya, is karan jette ka aadhaikar israaael ke putra yoosufa ke putraen ko diya gaya. vanshaavalee jette ke adhaikar ke anusar naheen ttharee." 
1Chronicles5:2 kyoki yahooda apane bhiyon par prabal ho gaya, aur pradhaan usake vansh se hua parantu jette ka adhaikar yoosufa ka tha." 
1Chronicles5:3 israaael ke jette putra rooben ke putra ye hua, arthata hanok, pallo, hesraen aur kama." 
1Chronicles5:4 aur yoael ke putra shamayah, shamayah ka gog, gog ka shaimee." 
1Chronicles5:5 shaimee ka meeka, meeka ka rayah, rayah ka bala." 
1Chronicles5:6 aur bal ka putra bera, isako ashshoor ka raja tilagataapilaneser bandhauai men le gaya aur vah roobeniyo ka pradhaan tha." 
1Chronicles5:7 aur usake bhaiyon kee chanshavalee ke likhte yamay ve apane apane kul ke anusar ye tthare, arthata mukhy to yeeael, fir jakaryaha." 
1Chronicles5:8 aur ajaj ka putra bela jo shoma ka pota aur yoael ka parapota tha, vah aroaer men aur nabo aur balmon tak rahata tha." 
1Chronicles5:9 aur poorva or vah us jangal ke sivane tak raha jo parat mahanad tak mahunchata haai, kyonaki unake pashu gilad desh men baddh gaae the." 
1Chronicles5:10 aur shaul ke dinon men unhon ne haagiryon se yuddh kiya, aur hagraee unake hath se mare gaae tab ve gilad kee saree poorabee alang men apane deron men rahane lage." 
1Chronicles5:11 gadee unake samhane salka tak bashaan desh men rahate the. 
1Chronicles5:12 arthata mukhy to yoael aur doosara shaapam fir yanaai aur shaapat, ye bashaan men rahate the." 
1Chronicles5:13 aur unake bhai apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar meekaael, mashuullam, shoba, yoraai, yakan, jee aur aeber, sat the." 
1Chronicles5:14 ye abeehaail ke putra the, jo hooree ka putra tha, yah yorah ka putra, yah gilad ka putra, yah mikaael ka putra, yah yashaeeshau ka putra, yah yahado ka putra, yah booj ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles5:15 inake pitaron ke gharanon ka mukhy poorush abdeeael ka putra, aur goonee ka pota ahee tha." 
1Chronicles5:16 ye log bashaan me, gilad aur usake ganvon me, aur shaaron kee sab charaiyon men usakee paralee or tak rahate the." 
1Chronicles5:17 in sabhon kee vanshaavalee yahooda ke raja yonatan ke dinon aur israaael ke raja yarobam ke dinon men likhee gai. 
1Chronicles5:18 roobeniyo, gadiyon aur manashshon ke adho gotra ke yoddha jo ddhal bandhane, talavar chalane, aur dhanush ke teer chhodne ke yogy aur yuddh karana seekhe huae the, ve chauvalees hajar sat sau satt the, jo yuddh men jane ke yogy the." 
1Chronicles5:19 inhon ne haagiryon aur yatoor napeesh aur nodab se yuddh kiya tha. 
1Chronicles5:20 unake viruddh inako sahayata milee, aur agraee un sab samet jo unake sath the unake hath men kar diae gaa, kyonaki yuddh men inhon ne parameshvar kee dohai dee thee aur us ne unakee binatee is karan sunee, ki inhon ne us par bhrosa rakha tha." 
1Chronicles5:21 aur inhon ne unake pashu har lia, arthaata untt to pachas hajar, bhed-bakaree addhai lak, gadahe do hajar, aur manushy aek lakh bandhauae karake le gaae." 
1Chronicles5:22 aur bahut se mare pade the kyonaki vah ladai parameshvar kee or se hui. aur ye unake sthan men banshuuai ke samay tak base rahe. 
1Chronicles5:23 fir manashsho ke adho gotra kee santan us desh men base, aur ve bashaan se le balheman, aur saneer aur heman parvat tak faail gaae." 
1Chronicles5:24 aur unake pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purush ye the, arthata aeper, yishae, aeleeael, ajraeeael, yirmayah, hodayyah aur yahadeeael, ye bade veer aur namee aur apane pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purush the." 
1Chronicles5:25 aur unhon ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar se vishvasaghaat kiya, aur us desh ke log jinako parameshvar ne unake samhane se vinash kiya tha, unake devataon ke peechhe yyabhaichaarin kee nai ho liae." 
1Chronicles5:26 isaliye israaael ke parameshvar ne ashshoor ke raja pool aur ashshoor ke raja tilagatpailaneser ka man ubhara, aur inhon ne unhen arthata roobeniyo, gadiyon aur manashsho ke adho gotra ke logon ko bandhaua karake halah, habor aur hara aur gojan nadee ke pas pahuncha diya aur ve aj ke din tak vaheen rahate haain." 
1Chronicles6:1 levee ke putra geshan, kahat aur mararee." 
1Chronicles6:2 aur kahat ke putra, amraam, yisahar, hebraen aur ujjeeaela." 
1Chronicles6:3 aur amraam kee santan haroon, moosa aur maariyanm, aur haroon ke putra, nadab, abeeho, aeleeajar aur itamara." 
1Chronicles6:4 aeleeajar se peenahas, peenahas se abeeshoo." 
1Chronicles6:5 abeeshoo se bukkee, bukkee se ujjee." 
1Chronicles6:6 ujjee se jaraah, jaraah se marayota." 
1Chronicles6:7 marayot se amaryah, amaryah se aheetooba." 
1Chronicles6:8 aheetoob se sadok, sadok se aheemasa." 
1Chronicles6:9 aheemas se ajaryah, ajaryah se yohanana." 
1Chronicles6:10 aur yohanan se ajaryah, utpann hua jo sulaaiman ke yarooshalem men banaae huae bhvan men yajak ka kam karata tha" 
1Chronicles6:11 fir ajaryah se amaryah, amaryah se yaheetooba." 
1Chronicles6:12 yaheetoob se sadok, sadok se shallooma." 
1Chronicles6:13 shalloom se hilaakiyyah, hilaakiyyah se ajaryaha." 
1Chronicles6:14 ajaryah se sarayah, aur sarayah se yahosadak utpann hua." 
1Chronicles6:15 aur jab yahova, yahooda aur yarooshalem ko nabookadanessar ke dara bandhaua karake le gaya, tab yahosadak bhee bandhaua hokar gaya." 
1Chronicles6:16 levee ke putra gesham, kahat aur mararee." 
1Chronicles6:17 aur gesham ke putraen ke nam ye the, arthata libnee aur shaimee." 
1Chronicles6:18 aur kahat ke putra amraam, yisahar, hebraen aur ujjeeaela." 
1Chronicles6:19 aur mararee ke putra mahalee aur mooshaee aur apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar leviyon ke kul ye huae. 
1Chronicles6:20 arthata, geshan ka putra libnee hua, libnee ka yahat, yahat ka jimma." 
1Chronicles6:21 jimma ka yoah, yoah ka io, io ka jerah, aur jerah ka putra yataraai hua." 
1Chronicles6:22 fir kahat ka putra ammeenadab hua, ammeenadab ka korah, korah ka asseera." 
1Chronicles6:23 asseer ka aelkana, aelkana ka aebyasap, aebyasap ka asseera." 
1Chronicles6:24 asseer ka tahat, tahat ka ureeael, ureeael ka ujjaiyyah aur ujjaiyyah ka putra shaaul hua." 
1Chronicles6:25 fir aelkana ke putra amasaai aur aheemota. 
1Chronicles6:26 aelkana ka putra sopaai, sopaai ka nahata." 
1Chronicles6:27 nahat ka aeleeab, aeleeab ka yaroham, aur yaroham ka putra aelkana hua." 
1Chronicles6:28 aur shamooael ke putra, usaka jetta yoael aur doosara abiyyah hua." 
1Chronicles6:29 fir mararee ka putra mahalee, mahalee ka libnee, libnee ka shaimee, shaimee ka ujja." 
1Chronicles6:30 ujja ka shaima shaima ka haaggaiyyah aur haggaiyyah ka putra asayah hua. 
1Chronicles6:31 fir jinako daud ne sandook ke ttkaiana pane ke bad yahova ke bhvan men gane ke aadhaikaree tthara diyaya ve ye haain. 
1Chronicles6:32 jab tab sulaaiman yarooshalem men yahova ke bhvan ko banava n chuka, tab tak ve milapavale tamboo ke nivas ke samhane gane ke dara seva karate the aur is seva men niyam ke anusar upasthiat hua karate the." 
1Chronicles6:33 jo apane apane putraen samet upaasthiat hua karate the ve ye haai, arthata kahaatiyon men se heman gavaaiya jo yoael ka putra tha, aur yoael shamuael ka." 
1Chronicles6:34 shamooael aelkana ka, aelkana yaroham ka, yaroham aeleeael ka, aeleeael toh ka." 
1Chronicles6:35 toh soop ka, soop aelkana ka, aelkana mahat ka, mahat amasaai ka." 
1Chronicles6:36 amasaai aelkana ka, aelkana yoael ka, yoael ajaryah ka, ajaryah sapanyah ka." 
1Chronicles6:37 samanyah tahat ka, tahat asseer ka, asseer aebyasap ka, aettyasap korah ka." 
1Chronicles6:38 korah yisahar ka, yisahar kahat ka, kahat levee ka aur levee israaael ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles6:39 aur usaka bhai asap jo usake daahine khda hua karata tha vah berekyah ka putra tha, aur berekyah shaima ka." 
1Chronicles6:40 shaima meekaael ka, meekaael baseyah ka, baseyah maalmaiyyah ka." 
1Chronicles6:41 maalkaiyyah aetnee ka, aetnee jerah ka, jerah adayah ka." 
1Chronicles6:42 adayah aetan ka, aetan jimma ka, jimma shaimee ka." 
1Chronicles6:43 shaimee yahat ka, yahat gesham ka, gesham levee ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles6:44 aur bai or unake bhai mararee khde hote the, arthata aetav jo keeshaee ka putra tha, aur keeshaee abdee ka, abdee mallook ka." 
1Chronicles6:45 mallook hashabyah ka, hashabyah amasyaah ka, amasyah hilaakiyyah ka." 
1Chronicles6:46 hilaakiyyah amasee ka, amasee banee ka, banee shomer ka." 
1Chronicles6:47 shomer mahalee ka, mahalee mooshaee ka, mooshaee mararee ka, aur mararee levee ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles6:48 aur inake bhai jo leveey the vah parameshvar ke bhvan ke nivas kee sab prakar kee seva ke liye arpan kiae huae the. 
1Chronicles6:49 parantu haroon aur usake putra hopabali kee vedee, aur dhoop kee vedee donon par baalidan chaddhate, aur param paavitrasthan ka sab kam karate, aur israaaeliyon ke liye praayaashchait karate the, jaaise ki parameshvar ke das moosa ne agyaaaaen dee theen." 
1Chronicles6:50 aur haroon ke vansh men ye hua, arthata usaka putra aeleeajar hua, aur aeleeajar ka peenahas, peenahas ka abeeshoo." 
1Chronicles6:51 abeeshoo ka bukkee, bukkee ka ujjee, ujjee ka jaraaha." 
1Chronicles6:52 jaraah ka marayot, marayot ka amaryah, amaryah ka aheetooba." 
1Chronicles6:53 aheetoob ka sadok aur sadok ka aheemas putra hua. 
1Chronicles6:54 aur unake bhagon men unakee chhavaaniyon ke anusar unakee baastaiyan ye haai, arthata kahat ke kulon men se pahilee chitthee jo haroon kee santan ke nam par nikalee." 
1Chronicles6:55 arthata charon or kee charaiyon samet yahooda desh ka hebraen unhen mila. 
1Chronicles6:56 parantu us nagar ke khet aur ganv yapunne ke putra kaleb ko diae gaae. 
1Chronicles6:57 aur haroon kee santan ko sharannagar hebraen, aur charaiyon samet libna," 
1Chronicles6:58 aur yatteer aur apanee apanee charaiyon samet aeshatamo. heelen, dabeera." 
1Chronicles6:59 ashaan aur betashomesha. 
1Chronicles6:60 aur binyameen ke gotra men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet geba, allemet aur anatot diae gaae. unake gharanon ke sab nagar terah the." 
1Chronicles6:61 aur shosh kahaatiyon ke gotra ke kul, arthata manashsho ke adho gotra men se chitthee dalakar das nagar diae gaae." 
1Chronicles6:62 aur geshamiyon ke kulon ke anusar unhen issakar, ashor aur naptalee ke gotra, aur bashaan men rahanevale manashsho ke gotra men se terah nagar mile." 
1Chronicles6:63 marariyon ke kulon ke anusar unhen rooben, gad aur jabooloon ke gotron men se chitthee dalakar barah nagar diae gaae." 
1Chronicles6:64 aur israaaeliyon ne leaviyon ko ye nagar charaiyon samet diae. 
1Chronicles6:65 aur unhon ne yahoodiyo, shaimoniyon aur binyameeaniyon ke gotraen men se ve nagar dia, jinake nam upar diae gaae haain." 
1Chronicles6:66 aur kahatiyon ke kai kulon ko unake bhag ke nagar aepraaim ke gotra men se mile. 
1Chronicles6:67 so unako apanee apanee charaiyon samet aepraaim ke pahadee desh ka shakem jo sharan nagar tha, fir gejera." 
1Chronicles6:68 yokamam, betherona." 
1Chronicles6:69 ayyalon aur gatraimmona. 
1Chronicles6:70 aur manashsho ke adho gotra men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet aner aur bilam shosh kahaatiyon ke kul ko mile. 
1Chronicles6:71 fir geshamiyon ko manashsho ke adho gotra ke kul men se to apanee apanee charaiyon samet bashaan ka golan aur ashatarota. 
1Chronicles6:72 aur issakar ke gotra men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet kedesha, dabarata." 
1Chronicles6:73 ramot aur anem," 
1Chronicles6:74 aur ashor ke gotra men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet mashaal, abdona." 
1Chronicles6:75 hookok aur rahoba. 
1Chronicles6:76 aur naptalee ke gotra men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet galeel ka kedesh hammon aur kiryataaim mile. 
1Chronicles6:77 fir shosh leaviyon arthata marariyon ko jabooloon ke gotra men se to apanee apanee charaiyon samet shaimmon aur tabora. 
1Chronicles6:78 aur yareeho ke pas kee yaradan nadee kee poorva aur rooben ke gotra men se to apanee apanee charaiyon samet jangal ka beser, yahasa." 
1Chronicles6:79 kademot aur mepata. 
1Chronicles6:80 aur gad ke gotra men se apanee apanee charaiyon samet gilad ka ramot mahanaaim," 
1Chronicles6:81 heshaebon aur yajer diae gaae. 
1Chronicles7:1 issakar ke putra tola, pooa, yashoob aur shaimraen, char the." 
1Chronicles7:2 aur tola ke putra ujjee, rapayah, yareeael, yahamaai, yibasam aur shamooael, ye apate apate pitaron ke gharanon arthata tola kee santan ke mukhy purush aur bade veer the, aur daud ke dinon men unake vansh kee ginatee bais hajar chh sau thee." 
1Chronicles7:3 aur ujjee ka putra yijraah, aur yijraah ke putra meekaael, obadhah, yoael aur yishshiayyah panch the ye sab mukhy purush the." 
1Chronicles7:4 aur unake sath unakee vanshaavaaliyon aur pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar sena ke dalon ke chhttees hajar yoddha the kyonki unake bahut striayan aur putra the. 
1Chronicles7:5 aur unake bhai jo issakar ke sab kulon men se the, ve sattasee hajar bade veer the, jo apanee apanee vanshaavalee ke anusar gine gaae." 
1Chronicles7:6 binyameen ke putra bela, beker aur yadeeael ye teen the." 
1Chronicles7:7 bela ke putra aesabon, ujjee, ujjeeael, yareemot aur iree ye panch the. ye apane apane pitaron ke gharaton ke mukhy purush aur bade veer the, aur apanee apanee vanshaabalee ke anusar unakee ginatee bais hajar chauntees thee." 
1Chronicles7:8 aur beker ke putra jameera, yoasha, baleeaejer, aelyoaenaai, omrae, yaremot, aabiyyah, anatot aur alemet ye sab beker ke putra the." 
1Chronicles7:9 ye jo apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purush aur bade veer the, inake vansh kee ginatee apanee apanee vanshaavalee ke anusar bees hajar do sau thee." 
1Chronicles7:10 aur yadeeael ka putra bilhan, aur bilhan ke putra, yoosha, binyameen, aehood, kanana, jetan, tashash aur aheeshahar the." 
1Chronicles7:11 ye sab jo yadeeael kee santan aur apane apane pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush aur bade veer the, inake vansh se sena men yuddh karane ke yagy satrah hajar do sau purush the." 
1Chronicles7:12 aur ir ke putra shuuppeem aur huppeem aur aher ke putra hooshaee the. 
1Chronicles7:13 naptalee ke putra, aehaseeael, goonee, yeser aur shalloom the, ye bilha ke pote the." 
1Chronicles7:14 manashsho ke putra, asraeeael jo usakee aramee rakhelee sree se utpann hua tha aur us aramee sree ne gilad ke pita makeer ko bhee janm diya." 
1Chronicles7:15 aur makeer jasakee baahin ka nam maka tha us ne huppeem aur shuuppeem ke liye striayan byah lee, aur doosare ka nam salofaad tha, aur salofaad ke beattyaian hui." 
1Chronicles7:16 fir makeer kee sree maka ke aek putra utpann hua aur usaka nam peresh rakha aur usake bhai ka nam shoresh tha aur isake putra ulam aur rakem the. 
1Chronicles7:17 aur ulam ka putra badana. ye gilad kee santan the jo makeer ka putra aur manashsho ka pota tha. 
1Chronicles7:18 fir usakee bahin hammoleket ne ishahod, abeeaejer aur mahala ko janm diya." 
1Chronicles7:19 aur shameeda ke putra aan, shokem, likhee aur aneeam the." 
1Chronicles7:20 aur aepraaim ke putra shootelah aur shootelah ka bered, bered ka tahat, tahat ka aelada, aelada ka tahata." 
1Chronicles7:21 tahat ka jabad aur jabad ka putra shootelah hua, aur yejer aur aelad bhee jinhen gat ke manushyon ne jo us desh men utpann huae the isaaliye ghaat kiya, ki ve unake pashu har lene ko utar aae the." 
1Chronicles7:22 so unaka pita aepraaim unake liye bahut din shaek karata raha, aur usake bhai use shaanti dene ko aae." 
1Chronicles7:23 aur vah apanee patnee ke pas gaya, aur us ne garbhvatee hokar aek putra ko janm diya aur bapraaim ne usaka nam is karan bareea rakha, ki usake gharane men vipaattai padee thee." 
1Chronicles7:24 aur usakee putraee shora thee, jis ne nichale aur uparavale donon bethoran nam nagaron ko aur ujjenashora ko draddh karaya." 
1Chronicles7:25 aur usaka putra repa tha, aur reshop bhee, aur usaka putra telah, telah ka tahan, tahan ka ladan," 
1Chronicles7:26 ladan ka ammeehood, ammeehood ka aeleeshaama." 
1Chronicles7:27 aeleeshama ka noon, aur noon ka putra yahoshoo tha." 
1Chronicles7:28 aur unakee nij boomi aur bastaiyan ganvon samet betel aur poorva kee or naran aur pashchaim kee or ganvon samet gejer, fir ganvon samet shakem, aur ganvon samet ajja theen." 
1Chronicles7:29 aur manashshoiyon ke sivane ke pas apane apane ganvon samet betashaan, tanak, maagio aur dora. in men israaael ke putra yusufa kee santan ke log rahate the." 
1Chronicles7:30 ashor ke putra, yimna, yishva, yishvee aur barueea, aur unakee bahin serah hui." 
1Chronicles7:31 aur bareea ke putra, heber aur malkeeael aur yah bijat ka pita hua." 
1Chronicles7:32 aur heber ne yapalet, shaemer, hotam aur unakee baahin shooa ko janm diya." 
1Chronicles7:33 aur yapalet ke putra pasak bimhal aur ashvata. yapalet ke ye hee putra the. 
1Chronicles7:34 aur shomer ke putra, ahee, rohaga, yahubba aur aram the." 
1Chronicles7:35 aur usake bhai helem ke putra sopah, yimna, sholesh aur amal the." 
1Chronicles7:36 aur sopah ke putra, sooh, harneper, shooal, veree, imraa." 
1Chronicles7:37 beser, hod, shamma, shailasa, yitraan aur bera the.." 
1Chronicles7:38 aur yeter ke putra, yapunne, pispa aur ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 aur ulla ke putra, arah, hanneeael aur risya." 
1Chronicles7:40 ye sab ashor ke vush men hua, aur apane apane pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush aur bade se bade veer the aur pradhaanon men mukhy the. aur ye jo apanee apanee vanshaavalee ke anusar sena men yuddh karane ke liye gine gaa, inakee ginatee chhbbees hajar thee." 
1Chronicles8:1 binyameen se usaka jetta bela, doosara ashabel, teesara ah," 
1Chronicles8:2 chautha noha aur panchavan rapa utpann hua. 
1Chronicles8:3 aur bela ke putra, aar, gera, abeehooda." 
1Chronicles8:4 abeeshoo, naman, ahoh," 
1Chronicles8:5 gera, shapoopan aur hooram the." 
1Chronicles8:6 aur aehood ke putra ye huae geba ke nivaasiyon ke pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush ye the, jinhen bandhauai men manahat ko le gaae the." 
1Chronicles8:7 aur naman, aahiyyah aur gera inhen bhee bandhaua karake manahat ko le gaae the, aur us ne ujja aur ahilood ko janm diya." 
1Chronicles8:8 aur shaharaaim se hashaeem aur bara nam apanee striayon ko chhod dene ke bad moab desh men ladke utpann huae. 
1Chronicles8:9 aur usakee apanee sree hodesh se yoab, sibya, mesha, malkam, yoos, sokya," 
1Chronicles8:10 aur mirma utpann huae usake ye putra apane apane pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush the. 
1Chronicles8:11 aur hooshaeem se abeetoob aur aelpal ka janm hua. 
1Chronicles8:12 aelpal ke putra aeber, mishaam aur shomer, isee ne ono aur ganvon samet lod ko basaya." 
1Chronicles8:13 fir vareea aur shoma jo ayyalon ke nivaasiyon ke pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush the, aur jinhon ne gat ke nivaasiyon ko bhga diya." 
1Chronicles8:14 aur ao, haasak, yaramota." 
1Chronicles8:15 jabadhah, arad, aedera." 
1Chronicles8:16 meekaael, yispa, yoha, jo baaeia ke putra the." 
1Chronicles8:17 jabadhah, mashuullam, hijakee, hebara." 
1Chronicles8:18 yishamaraai, yijaleea, yobab, jo aelpal ke putra the." 
1Chronicles8:19 aur yakeem, jikree, jabdee." 
1Chronicles8:20 aeleeaenaai, sillataai, aeleeaela." 
1Chronicles8:21 adayah, barayah aur shaimraat jo shaimee ke putra the." 
1Chronicles8:22 aur yishapan, yaber, aeleeaela." 
1Chronicles8:23 abdon, jikree,hanana." 
1Chronicles8:24 hananyah, aelam, antotiyyaha." 
1Chronicles8:25 yipadayah aur panooael jo shaashak ke putra the. 
1Chronicles8:26 aur shamasharaai, shaharyah, atalyaha." 
1Chronicles8:27 yoreshyah, aeliyyah aur jikr jo yaroham ke putra the." 
1Chronicles8:28 ye apanee apanee peeddhee men apane apane pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush aur pradhaan the, ye yarooshalem men rahate the." 
1Chronicles8:29 aur gibon men gibon ka pita rahata tha, jisakee patnee ka tam maka tha." 
1Chronicles8:30 aur usaka jetta putra abdon tha, fir shoor, keesha, bal, nadaba." 
1Chronicles8:31 gadora ao aur jeker huae. 
1Chronicles8:32 aur mikot se shaima utpann hua. aur ye bhee apane bhiyon ke samhane yarooshalem men rahate the, apane bhaiyon hee ke sath." 
1Chronicles8:33 aur ner se keesh utpann hua, keesh se shaaul, aur shaaul se yonatan, malakeesha, abeenadab, aur aeshabal utpann hua." 
1Chronicles8:34 aur yonatan ka putra mareebbal hua, aur mareebbal se meeka utpann hua." 
1Chronicles8:35 aur meeka ke putra peeton, melek, tare aur ahaja." 
1Chronicles8:36 aur ahaj se yahoaa utpann hua. aur yahoaa se alemet, ajamavet aur jimraee aur jimraee se mosa." 
1Chronicles8:37 mosa se bina utpann hua. aur isaka putra rapa hua, rapa ka aelasa aur aelasa ka putra asel hua." 
1Chronicles8:38 aur asel ke chh putra huae jinake ye nam the, arthata ajraeekam, bokaro, yishmaael, shaaryah, obadhah, aur hanana. ye hee sab asel ke putra the." 
1Chronicles8:39 or usake bhai aeshok ke ye putra hua, arthata usaka jetta ulam, doosara yoosha, teesara aeleepeleta." 
1Chronicles8:40 aur ulam ke putra shooraveer aur dhanudhararee hua, aur unake bahut bette-pote arthata deddh sau huae. ye hee sab binyameen ke vansh ke the." 
1Chronicles9:1 is prakar sab israaaelee apanee apanee vanshaavalee ke anusar, jo israaael ke rajaon ke vrattant kee pustak men likhee haai, gine gaae. aur yahoodee apane vishvasaghaat ke karan bandhauai men babul ko pahunchaae gaae." 
1Chronicles9:2 jo log apanee apanee nij boomi arthata apane nagaron men rahate the, vah israaaelee, yajak, leveey aur nateen the." 
1Chronicles9:3 aur yarooshalem men kuchh yahoodee kuchh binyameen, aur kuchh aepraaimee, aur manashshoi, rahate the" 
1Chronicles9:4 arthata yahooda ke putra peres ke vansh men se ammeehood ka putra utaai, jo omraee ka putra, aur imraee ka pota, aur banee ka parapota tha." 
1Chronicles9:5 aur shaeeloiyon men se usaka jetta putra asayah aur usake putra. 
1Chronicles9:6 aur jerah ke vansh men se yooael, aur inake bhi, ye chh sau nabbe hue." 
1Chronicles9:7 fir binyameen ke vansh men se salloo jo mashuullam ka putra, hodayyah ka pota, aur hassanooa ka parapota tha." 
1Chronicles9:8 aur yibiryyah jo yaroham ka putra tha, aela jo ujjee ka putra, aur mikree ka pota tha, aur mashuullam jo shapatyah ka putra, rooael ka pota, aur yibnaiyyah ka parapota tha" 
1Chronicles9:9 aur inake bhai jo apanee apanee vanshaavalee ke anusar milakar nau sau chhppana. ye sab purush apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy the. 
1Chronicles9:10 aur yajakon men se yadayah, yahoyareeb aur yakeen," 
1Chronicles9:11 aur ajaryah jo parameshvar ke bhvan ka pradhaan aur hilaakiyyah ka putra tha, yah pashuullam ka putra, yah sadok ka putra, yah marayot ka putra, yah aheetoob ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles9:12 aur adayah jo yaroham ka putra tha, yah pashahoor ka putra, yah malkaiyah ka putra, yah masaai ka putra, yah adoael ka putra, yah jera ka putra, yah pashuullam ka putra, yah mashailleet ka putra, yah immer ka putra tha." 
1Chronicles9:13 aur unake bhai the, jo apane apane pitaron ke gharanon men satrah sau satt mukhy purush the, ve parameshvar ke bhvan kee seva ke kam men bahut nipun purush the." 
1Chronicles9:14 fir leviyon men se mararee ke vansh men se shamayah jo hashshoov ka putra, ajraeekam ka pota, aur hashayyah ka parapota tha." 
1Chronicles9:15 aur bakabakkar, heresh aur galal aur asap ke vansh men se mattanyah jo meeka ka putra, aur jikree ka pota tha." 
1Chronicles9:16 aur obadhah jo shamayah ka putra, galal ka pota aur yadootoon ka parapota tha, aur berekyah jo asa ka putra, aur aelkana ka pota tha, jo natopaiyon ke ganvon men rahata tha." 
1Chronicles9:17 or darapalon men se apane apane bhiyon sahit shalloom, akkoob, talmon aur aheeman, un men se mukhy to shalloom tha." 
1Chronicles9:18 aur vah ab tak poorva or raja ke faattk ke pas darapalee karata tha. leviyon kee chhavanee ke darapal ye hee the. 
1Chronicles9:19 aur shalloom jo kore ka putra, aebyasap ka pota, aur korah ka parapota tha, aur usake bhai jo usake moolapurush ke gharane ke arthata korahee the, vah is kam ke adhaikaree the, ki ve tamboo ke darapal hon. unake purakha to yahova kee chhavanee ke aadhaikaree, aur paaittav ke ravavale the." 
1Chronicles9:20 aur agale samay men aeleeajar ka putra peenahas jisake sang yahova rahata tha vah unaka pradhaan tha. 
1Chronicles9:21 mesholemyah ka putra jakaryah milapavale tamboo ka darapal tha. 
1Chronicles9:22 ye sab jo darapal hone ko chune gaa, vah do sau barah the. ye jinake purakhaon ko daud aur shamooael dasha ne vishvasayogy janakar ttharaya tha, vah apane apane ganv men apanee apanee vanshaavalee ke anusar gine gaae." 
1Chronicles9:23 so ve aur unakee santan yahova ke bhvan arthata tamboo ke bhvan ke faattkon ka aadhaikar baree baree rakhte the. 
1Chronicles9:24 darapal poorva, paashchaim, uttar, dakkhian, charon disha kee or chaukee dete the." 
1Chronicles9:25 or unake bhai jo ganvon men rahate the, unako sat sat din ke bad baree baree se unake sang rahane ke liye ana padta tha." 
1Chronicles9:26 kyonaki charon pradhaan darapal jo leveey the, ve vishvasayogy janakar parameshvar ke bhvan kee kottariyon aur bhndaron ke adhaikaree ttharaae gaae the." 
1Chronicles9:27 aur ve parameshvar ke bhvan ke asapas isaaliye rat bitate the, ki usakee raksha unhen saunpee gai thee, aur bhora-bhor ko use kholana unheen ka kam tha." 
1Chronicles9:28 aur un men se kuchh upasana ke patraen ke adhaikaree the, kyonki ye ginakar bheetar pahunchaa, aur ginakar bahar tikale bhee jate the." 
1Chronicles9:29 aur un men se kuchh saman ke, aur pavitrasthan ke patraen ke, aur maaide, dakhmadha, tel, loban aur sugandhadrayyon ke adhaikaree ttharaae gaae the." 
1Chronicles9:30 aur yajakon ke putraen men se kuchh sugandhadrayyon men gandhaee ka kam karate the. 
1Chronicles9:31 aur maatityah nam aek leveey jo korahee shalloom ka jetta tha use bishvasayogy janakar tavon par banai hui vastuon ka adhaikaree niyukt kiya tha. 
1Chronicles9:32 aur usake bhiyon arthat kahaatiyon men se kuchh to bhnttvalee rottee ke adhaikaree the, ki har aek vishraamadin ko use taaiyar kiya karen." 
1Chronicles9:33 aur ye gavaaiye the jo leveey pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy the, aur kottriyon men rahate, aur aaair kam se chootte the kyonaki ve rata-din apane kam men lage rahate the." 
1Chronicles9:34 ye hee apanee apanee peeddhee men leaviyon ke pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush the, ye yarooshalem men rahate the." 
1Chronicles9:35 aur gibon men gibon ka pita yeeael rahata tha, jisakee patnee ka nam maka th." 
1Chronicles9:36 usaka jetta putra abdon hua, fir sur, keesha, bal, ner, nadaba." 
1Chronicles9:37 gador, ao, jakaryah aur milkota." 
1Chronicles9:38 aur milkot se shaimam utpann hua aur ye bhee apane bhiyon ke samhane apane bhiyon ke sang yarooshalem men rahate the. 
1Chronicles9:39 aur ner se keesha, keesh se shaaul, aur shaaul se yonatan, malkeesha, abeenadab aur aeshabal utpann huae." 
1Chronicles9:40 aur yonatan ka putra mareebbal hua, aur mareebbal se meeka utpann hua." 
1Chronicles9:41 aur meeka ke putra peeton, melek, tahra aur ahaj the." 
1Chronicles9:42 aur ahaj se yara aur yara se alemet, ajamavet aur jimrae, aur jimraee se mosa." 
1Chronicles9:43 aur mosa se bina utpann hua aur bina ka putra rapayah hua, rapayah ka aelasa, aur aelasa ka putra asel hua." 
1Chronicles9:44 aur asel ke chh putra huae jinake ye nam the, arthata ajraeekam, bokaro, yishmaael, shaaryah, obadhah aur hatana asel ke ye hee putra hue." 
1Chronicles10:1 paalishtee israaaeliyon se lade aur israaaelee paalishtaiyon ke samhane se bhage, aur gilabo nam pahad par mare gaae." 
1Chronicles10:2 aur paalishtee shaaul aur usake putraen ke peechhe lage rahe, aur paalishtaiyon ne shaaul ke putra yonatan, abeenadab aur malkeeshoo ko mar dala." 
1Chronicles10:3 aur shaaul ke sath dhamasan yuddh hota raha aur dhanudharariyon ne use ja liya, aur vah unake karan yyakul ho gaya." 
1Chronicles10:4 tab shaaul ne apane haathaiyar ddhonevale se kaha, apanee talavar kheenchakar mujhe jhonk de, kaheen aeesa n ho ki ve khtanaraahit log akar meree ttttha kare, parantu usake haathyaiar ddhonevale ne bhyabheet hokar aeesa karane se inakar kiya, tab shaaul apanee talavar khdee karake us par gir pada." 
1Chronicles10:5 yah dekhkar ki shaaul mar gaya haai usaka haathaiyar ddhonepasal bhee apanee talavar par ap girakar mar gaya. 
1Chronicles10:6 yon shaaul aur usake teenon putra, aur usake gharane ke sab log aek sang mar gaae." 
1Chronicles10:7 yah dekhkar ki ve bhag gaa, aur shaaul aur usake putra mar gaa, us tarai men rahanevale sab israaaelee manushy apane apane nagar ko chhodkar bhag gaae aur palishtee akar un men rahane lage." 
1Chronicles10:8 doosare din jab palishtee mare huon ke mal ko loottne aa, tab unako shaaul aur usake putra gilabo pahad par pade huae mile." 
1Chronicles10:9 tab unhon ne usake vasren ko utar usaka sir aur hathaiyar le liya aur paalishtaiyon ke desh ke sab sthanon men dooton ko isaaliye bheja ki unake devataon aur sadhaaran logon men yah shuubh samachar dete jaaen. 
1Chronicles10:10 tab unhon ne usake haathaiyar apane devalay men rakhe, aur usakee khopadee ko dagon ke mandair men lattka diya." 
1Chronicles10:11 jab gilad ke yabesh ke sab logon ne suna ki palishtaiyon ne shaaul se kya kya kiya haai. 
1Chronicles10:12 tab sab shooraveer chale aur shaaul aur usake putraen kee lothen uttakar yabesh men le aa, aur unakee haddiyon ko yabesh men aek banj vraksha ke tale gad diya aur sat din tak anashan kiya." 
1Chronicles10:13 yon shaaul us vishvasaghaat ke karan mar gaya, jo us ne yahova se kiya tha kyonaki us ne yahova ka vachan ttal diya tha, fir us ne bootasiddhi karanevalee se poochhkar sammaati lee thee." 
1Chronicles10:14 us ne yahova se n poochha tha, isaaliye yahova ne use marakar rajy ko yishau ke putra daud ko de diya." 
1Chronicles11:1 tab sab israaaelee daud ke pas hebraen men ikatthe hokar kahane lage, sun, ham log aur too aek hee haddee aur mans haain." 
1Chronicles11:2 agale dinon men jab shaaul raja tha, tab bhee israaaeliyon ka agua too hee tha, aur tere parameshvar yahova ne tujh se kaha, ki meree praja israaael ka charavaha, aur meree praja israaael ka pradhaan, too hee hoga." 
1Chronicles11:3 isaliye sab israaaelee puraniye hebraen men raja ke pas aa, aur daud ne unake sath hebraen men yahova ke samhane vacha bandhaee aur unhon ne yahova ke vachan ke anusar, jo us ne shamooael se kaha tha, israaael ka raja hone ke liye daud ka abhaishok kiya." 
1Chronicles11:4 tab sab israaaeliyon samet daud yarooshalem gaya, jo yaboos bhee kahalata tha, aur vahan yaboosee nam us desh ke nivasee rahate the." 
1Chronicles11:5 tab yaboos ke nivaasiyon ne daud se kaha, too yahan ane naheen paaega. taubhee daud ne siyyon nam gaddh ko le liya, vahee daudapur bhee kahalata haai." 
1Chronicles11:6 aur daud ne kaha, jo koi yaboosiyon ko sab se paahile marega, vah mukhy senapati hoga, tab sarooyah ka putra yoab sab se paahile chaddh gaya, aur senapaati ban gaya." 
1Chronicles11:7 aur daud us gaddh men rahane laga, isaaliye usaka nam daudapur pada." 
1Chronicles11:8 aur us ne nagar ke charon or, arthata millo se lekar charon or shaharapanash banavai, aur yoab ne shosh nagar ke khshdharon ko fir basaya." 
1Chronicles11:9 aur daud kee pratishtta adhaik baddhtee gai aur senaon ka yahova usake sang tha. 
1Chronicles11:10 yahova ne israaael ke vishy jo vachan kaha tha, usake anusar daud ke jin shooraveeron ne sab israaaeliyon samet usake rajy men usake paksha men hokar, use raja banane ko jaor diya, un men se mukhy purush ye haain." 
1Chronicles11:11 daud ke shooraveeron kee namavalee yah haai, arthata kisee hakmonee ka putra yashaebam jo teeson men mukhy t, us ne teen sau purushaen par bhala chala kar, unhen aek hee samay men mar dala." 
1Chronicles11:12 usake bad ahohee dodo ka putra eleeajar jo teenon mahan veeron men se ek tha. 
1Chronicles11:13 vah pasadammeem men jahan jav ka aek khet tha, daud ke sang raha jab paalishtee vahan yuddh karane ko iatthe huae the, aur log paalishtaiyon ke samhane se bhag gaae." 
1Chronicles11:14 tab unhon ne us khet ke beech men khde hokar usakee raksha kee, aur paalishtaiyon ko mara, aur yahova ne unaka bada uddhar kiya." 
1Chronicles11:15 aur teeson mukhy purushaen men se teen daud ke pas chattan ko, arthata adullam nam gufaa men gaa, aur paalishtaiyon kee chhavanan rapaim nam tarai men padee iui thee." 
1Chronicles11:16 us samay daud gaddh men tha, aur us samay paalishtaiyon kee ek chaukee betalehem men thee." 
1Chronicles11:17 tab daud ne badee abhailasha ke sath kaha, kaun mujhe betalehem ke faattk ke pas ke kuen ka panee pilaaega." 
1Chronicles11:18 tab ve teenon jan palishtaiyon kee chhavanee men toott pade aur betalehem ke faattk ke kuen se panee bhrakar daud ke pas le aae parantu daud ne peene se inakar kiya aur yahova ke samhane ardha karake undela. 
1Chronicles11:19 aur us ne kaha, mera parameshvar mujh se aeesa karana door rakhe kya maain in manushyon ka lohoo peeun jinhon ne apane praanon par khela haai? ye to apane praan par khelakar use le aae haain. isaliye us ne vah panee peene se inakar kiya. in teen veeron ne ye hee kam kiae." 
1Chronicles11:20 aur abeeshau jo yoab ka bhai tha, vah teenon men mukhy tha. aur us ne apana bhala chalakar teen sau ko mar dala aur teenon men namee ho gaya." 
1Chronicles11:21 doosaree shraenee ke teenon men vah adhaik pratishttit tha, aur unaka pradhaan ho gaya, parantu mukhy teenon ka pad ko n pahuncha." 
1Chronicles11:22 yahoyada ka putra banayah tha, jo kabajel ke aek veer ka putra tha, jis ne bade bade kam kiae the, us ne sinh saman do moaabiyon ko mar dala, aur himaretu men us ne aek gadhe men utar ke aek sinh ko mar dala." 
1Chronicles11:23 fir us ne aek deelavale arthata panch hath lambe misraee purush ko mar dala, vah misraee hath men julahon ka ddheka ka aek bhala liae huae tha, parantu banayah aek lattee hee liae huae usake pas gaya, aur misraee ke hath se bhale ko chheenakar usee ke bhale se use ghaat kiya." 
1Chronicles11:24 aeese aeese kam karake yahoyada ka putra banayah un teenon veeron meen namee ho gaya. 
1Chronicles11:25 vah to teeson se adhaik pratishttit tha, parantu mukhy teenon ke pad ko n pahuncha. usako daud ne apanee nij sabha men sabhasad kiya." 
1Chronicles11:26 fir dalon ke veer ye the, arthata yoab ka bhai asahel, betalehemee dodo ka putra aelhanana." 
1Chronicles11:27 haroree shammot, palonee helesa." 
1Chronicles11:28 takoi ikkesh ka putra ira, anatotee abeeaejera." 
1Chronicles11:29 sibbake hosatee, ahohee ilaai." 
1Chronicles11:30 maharaai natopai, aek aur natopai bana ka putra heleda." 
1Chronicles11:31 binyameeaniyon ke giba nagaravasee reebaai ka putra itaai, piratonee banayaha." 
1Chronicles11:32 gashake nalon ke pas rahanevala hooraai, arabavasee abeeaela." 
1Chronicles11:33 bahooreemee ajamavet, shalbonee aelyahaba." 
1Chronicles11:34 geejoi hashom ke putra, fir hararee shaage ka putra yonatana." 
1Chronicles11:35 hararee sakar ka putra aheeam, ur ka putra aeleepala." 
1Chronicles11:36 makerai heper, palonee ahiyyaha." 
1Chronicles11:37 karmelee hesrae, aejbaai ka putra naraai." 
1Chronicles11:38 natan ka bhai yoael, hagraee ka putra mibhara." 
1Chronicles11:39 mammonee selek, berotee naharaai jo sarooyah ke putra yoab ka hathaiyar ddhonevala tha." 
1Chronicles11:40 yeteree ira aur gareba. 
1Chronicles11:41 hittee uriyyah, ahalaai ka putra jabada." 
1Chronicles11:42 tees purushaen samet roobenee shaeeja ka putra adeena jo roobeaniyon ka muakhaiya tha. 
1Chronicles11:43 maka ka putra hanan, metenee yoshaapata." 
1Chronicles11:44 ashatarotee ujjaiyyah, aroaeree hotam ke putra shaama aur yeeaela." 
1Chronicles11:45 shaimraee ka putra yadeeael aur usaka bhai teesee, yoha." 
1Chronicles11:46 mahaveemee aeleeael, aelanam ke putra yareebaai aur yoshayyah," 
1Chronicles11:47 moabee yitma, aeleeael, obed aur masobai yaseeaela." 
1Chronicles12:1 jab daud sikalag men keesh ke putra shaaul ke dr ke mare chhpai rahata tha, tab ye usake pas vahan aa, aur ye un veeron men se the jo yuddh men usake sahayak the." 
1Chronicles12:2 ye dhanudhararee the, jo daahine-baye, donon hathon se gofan ke patthr aur dhanush ke teer chala sakate the aur ye shaaul ke bhaiyon men se binyameenee the." 
1Chronicles12:3 mukhy to aheeaejer aur doosara yoash tha jo gibavasee shamaa ka putra tha fir ajamavet ke putra yajeeael aur pelet, fir baraka aur anatotee yehoo." 
1Chronicles12:4 aur gibonee yishamayah jo teeson men se aek veer aur unake upar bhee tha fir yirmayah, yahajeeael, yohanan, gaderavasee yojabada." 
1Chronicles12:5 aeloojaai, yareemot, balyah, shamaryah, haroopee shapatyaha." 
1Chronicles12:6 aelkana, yishaiyyah, ajarel, yoaejer, yashaebam, jo sab korahavanshaee the." 
1Chronicles12:7 aur gadoravasee yaroham ke putra yoaela aur jabadhaha. 
1Chronicles12:8 fir jab daud janbal ke gaddh men rahata tha, tab ye gadee jo shooraveer the, aur yuddh vidha seekhe huae aur ddhal aur bhala kam men lanevale the, aur unake muh sinh ke se aur ve pahadee mrag ke saman veg se daudnevale the, ye aur gaadiyon se alag hokar usake pas aae." 
1Chronicles12:9 arthata mukhy to aejer, doosara obadhah, teesara aeleeaba." 
1Chronicles12:10 chautha mishmanna, panchapan yirmayaha." 
1Chronicles12:11 chhtta attaai, satavan aeleeaela." 
1Chronicles12:12 attvan yohanan, nauvan aelajabada." 
1Chronicles12:13 dasavan yirmayah aur gyarahavan makabannaai tha. 
1Chronicles12:14 ye gadee mukhy yoddha the, un men se jo sab se chhotta tha vah to aek sau ke upar, aur jo sab se bada tha, vah hajar ke upar tha." 
1Chronicles12:15 ye hee ve haai, jo pahile maheene men jab yaradan nadee sab kadadon ke upar upar bahatee thee, tab usake par utare aur poorva aur pashchaim danon or ke sab tarai ke rahanevalon ko bhga diya." 
1Chronicles12:16 aur kai aek binyameenee aur yahoodee bhee daud ke pas gaddh men aae. 
1Chronicles12:17 un se milane ko daud nikala aur un se kaha, yaadi tum mere pas mitrabhav se meree sahayata karane ko aae ho, tab to mera man tum se laga rahega parantu jo tum mujhe dhaekha dekar mere shatrauon ke hath pakadvane aae ho, to hamare pitaron ka parameshvar is par drashtti karake dantte, kyonki mere hath se koi upadrav naheen hua." 
1Chronicles12:18 ab atma amasaai men samaya, jo teeson veeron men mukhy tha, aur us ne kaha, he daud! ham tere haain he yishau ke putra! ham teree or ke haai, tera kushal hee kushal ho aur tere sahayakon ka kushal ho, kyonki tera parameshvar teree sahayata kiya karata haai. isaaliye daud ne unako rakh liya, aur apane dal ke muakhaiye tthara diae." 
1Chronicles12:19 fir kuchh manashshoi bhee us samay daud ke pas bhag gaa, jab vah paalishtaiyon ke sath hokar shaaul se ladne ko gaya, parantu usakee kuchh sahayata n kee, kyonaki palishtaiyon ke saradaron ne sammati lene par vah kahakar use bida kiya, ki vah hamare sir kattvakar apane svamee shaaul se fir mil jaaega." 
1Chronicles12:20 jab vah siklag ko ja raha tha, tab ye manashshoi usake pas bhag gaae arthata adana, yojabad, yadeeael, meekaael, yojabad, aeleehoo aur sillataai jo manashsho ke hajaron ke mukhaiye the." 
1Chronicles12:21 inhon ne lutteron ke dal ke viruddh daud kee sahayata kee, kyonaki ye sab shooraveer the, aur sena ke pradhaan bhee ban gaae." 
1Chronicles12:22 varan pratidin log daud kee sahayata karane ko usake pas ate rahe, yahan tak ki parameshvar kee sena ke saman aek badee sena ban gai." 
1Chronicles12:23 fir log ladne ke liye haathaiyar bandho huae hobraen men daud ke pas isaliye aae ki yahova ke vachan ke anusar shaaul ka rajy usake hath men kar den unake muakhaiyon kee ginatee yah haai. 
1Chronicles12:24 yahooda ke ddhal aur bhala liae huae chh hajar att sau hathaiyarabandha ladne ko baae. 
1Chronicles12:25 shaimonee sat hajar aek sau taaiyar shooraveer ladne ko aae. 
1Chronicles12:26 leveey char hajar chh sau aae. 
1Chronicles12:27 aur haroon ke gharane ka pradhaan yahoyada tha, aur usake sath teen hajar sat sau aae." 
1Chronicles12:28 aur sadok nam aek javan veer bhee aya, aur usake pita ke gharane ke bais pradhaan aae." 
1Chronicles12:29 aur shaaul ke bhai binyameeaniyon men se teen hajar aa, kyonki us samay tak adho binyameeaniyon se aadhaik shaaul ke gharane ka paksha karate rahe." 
1Chronicles12:30 fir aepraaimiyon men se bade veer aur apane apane pitaron ke gharanon men namee purush bees hajar att sau aae. 
1Chronicles12:31 aur manashsho ke adho gotra men se daud ko raja banane ke liye attarah hajar aa, jinake nam bataae gaae the." 
1Chronicles12:32 aur issakariyon men se jo samay ko pahachanate the, ki israaael ko kya karana uchit haai, unake pradhaan do sau the aur unake sab bhai unakee agyaa men rahate the." 
1Chronicles12:33 fir jabooloon men se yuddh ke sab prakar ke haathaiyar liae huae ladne ko panati bandhanevale yoddha pachas hajar aa, ve panati bandhnevale the aur chanchal n the." 
1Chronicles12:34 fir naptalee men se pradhaan to aek hajar, aur unake sang ddhal aur bhala liae saaintees hajar aae." 
1Chronicles12:35 aur daaniyon men se ladne ke liye panti bandhanevale attais hajar chh sau aae. 
1Chronicles12:36 aur ashor men se ladne ko panti bandhanevale chalees hajar yoddha aae. 
1Chronicles12:37 aur yaradan par rahanevale roobenee, gadee aur manashsho ke adho gotraiyon men se yuddh ke sab prakar ke hathaiyar liae huae aek lakh bees hajar aae." 
1Chronicles12:38 ye sab yuddh ke liye panti bandhanevale daud ko sare israaael ka raja banane ke liye hebraen men sachche man se aa, aur aur sab israaaelee bhee daud ko raja banane ke liye sahamat the." 
1Chronicles12:39 aur ve vahan teen din daud ke sang khate peete rahe, kyonaki unak bhaiyon ne unake liye taaiyaree kee thee." 
1Chronicles12:40 aur jo unake nikatt varan issakar, jabooloon aur naptalee tak rahate the, ve bhee gadaho, untto, khchcharon aur baailon par maaida, anjeeron aur kishaamish kee ttiikaya, dakhmadha aur tel aadi bhojanavastu ladakar laa, aur baail aur bhed-bakaariyan bahutayat se laae kyonki israaael men anand manaya jaraha tha." 
1Chronicles13:1 aur daud ne sahasrpaatiyo, shatapatiyon aur sab pradhaanon se sammati lee." 
1Chronicles13:2 tab daud ne israaael kee saree mandlee se kaha, yadi yah tum ko achchha lage aur hamare parameshvar kee ichchha ho, to israaael ke sab deshaen men jo hamare bhai rah gaae haain aur unake sath jo yajak aur leveey apane apane charaivale nagaron men rahate haai, unake pas bhee yah kahala bhejen ki hamare pas ikatthe ho jao." 
1Chronicles13:3 aur ham apane parameshvar ke sandamak ko apane yahan le aaen kyonaki shaaul ke dinon men ham usake sameep naheen jate the. 
1Chronicles13:4 aur samast mandlee ne kaha, ham aeesa hee karenge, kyonaki yah bat un sab logon kee draashtti men uchit maloom hui." 
1Chronicles13:5 tab daud ne misra ke shaeehor se le hamat kee ghaattee tab ke sab israaaeliyon ko isaliye ikattha kiya, ki parameshvar ke sandook ko kiryatyareem se le aae." 
1Chronicles13:6 tab daud sab israaaeliyon ko sang lekar bala ko gaya, jo kiryatyareem bhee kahalata aur yahooda ke bhag men tha, ki parameshvar yahova ka sandook vahan se le aae vah to karoobon par virajanevala haai, aur usaka nam bhee yahee liya jata haai." 
1Chronicles13:7 tab unhon ne parameshvar ka sandook aek nai gadee par chaddhakar, abeenadab ke ghar se nikala, aur ujja aur ao us gadee ko hankane lage." 
1Chronicles13:8 aur daud aur sare israaaelee parameshvar ke samhane tan man se geet gate aur beena, sarangee, df, jhanjh aur turahiyan bajate the." 
1Chronicles13:9 jab ve keedon ke khlihan tak aa, tab ujja ne apana hath sandook thamane ko baddhaya, kyonki baailon ne ttokar khai thee." 
1Chronicles13:10 tab yahova ka kop ujja par bhdk utta aur us ne us ko mara kyonki us ne sandook par hath lagaya tha vah vaheen parameshvar ke samhane mar gaya. 
1Chronicles13:11 tab daud aprasann hua, isaliye ki yahova ujja par toott pada tha aur us ne us sthan ka nam peresujja rakha, yah nam aj tak bana haai." 
1Chronicles13:12 aur us din daud parameshvar se drakar kahane laga, maain parameshvar ke sandook ko apane yahan kaaise le aun?" 
1Chronicles13:13 tab daud ne sandook ko apane yahan daudapur men n laya, parantu obededom nam gatee ke yahan le gaya." 
1Chronicles13:14 aur parameshvar ka sandook obededom ke yahan usake gharane ke pas teen maheene tak raha, aur yahova ne obededom ke gharane par aur jo kuchh usaka tha us par bhee ashaeesh dee." 
1Chronicles14:1 aur sor ke raja heeram ne daud ke pas doot bheje, aur usaka bhvan banane ko devadaru kee lakadee aur raj aur baddhi bheje." 
1Chronicles14:2 aur daud ko nishchay ho gaya ki yahova ne mujhe israaael ka raja karake sthiar kiya, kyonaki usakee praja israaael ke nimitt usaka rajy atyant baddh gaya tha." 
1Chronicles14:3 aur yarooshalem men daud ne aur striayan byah lee, aur un se aur bette-beattyaian utpann hui." 
1Chronicles14:4 usake jo santan yarooshalem men utpann hua, unake nam ye haain arthata shammo,shaebab, natan, sulaaimana" 
1Chronicles14:5 yibhar, aeleeshoo, aelapeleta" 
1Chronicles14:6 nogah, nepeg, yapee, aeleeshaama," 
1Chronicles14:7 belyada aur aeleepeleda. 
1Chronicles14:8 jab paalishtaiyon ne suna ki poore israaael ka raja hone ke liye daud ka abhaishok hua, tab sab palishtaiyon ne daud kee khoj men chaddhai kee yah sunakar daud unaka samhana karane ko nikal gaya." 
1Chronicles14:9 aur paalishtee aae aur rapaim nam tarai men dhaava mara. 
1Chronicles14:10 tab daud ne parameshvar se poochha, kya maain palishtaiyon par chaddhai karoon? aur kaya too unhen mere hath men kar dega? yahova ne us se kaha, chaddhai kar, kyonki maain unhen tere hath men kar doonga." 
1Chronicles14:11 isaliye jab ve balaparaseem ko aa, tab daud ne un ko vaheen mar liya tab daud ne kaha, parameshvar mere dara mere shatrauon par jal kee dhaara kee nai toott pada haai. is karan us sthan ka nam balaparaseem rakha gaya." 
1Chronicles14:12 vahan ve apane devataon ko chhod gaa, aur daud ko agyaa se ve ag lagakar foonk diae gaae." 
1Chronicles14:13 fir doosaree bar paalishtaiyon ne usee taii men dhaava mara. 
1Chronicles14:14 tab daud ne parameshvar se fir poochha, aur parameshvar ne us se kaha, unaka peechha mat kara un se mudkar toot ke vrakshaen ke samhane se un par chhapa mara." 
1Chronicles14:15 aur jab toot ke vrakshaen kee faunaagiyon men se sena ke chalane kee see ahatt tujhe sun pade, tab yah janakar yuddh karane ko nikal jana ki parameshvar palishtaiyon kee sena ko marane ke liye tere age ja raha haai." 
1Chronicles14:16 parameshvar kee is agyaa ke anusar daud ne kiya, aur israaaeliyon ne paalishtaiyon kee sena ko gibon se lekar gejer tak mar liya." 
1Chronicles14:17 tab daud kee keettair sab deshaen men faail gai, aur yahova ne sab jatiyon ke man men usaka bhy bhr diya." 
1Chronicles15:1 tab daud ne daudapur men bhvan banavaa, aur parameshvar ke sandook ke liye aek sthan taaiyar karake aek tamboo khda kiya." 
1Chronicles15:2 tab daud ne kaha, leaviyon ko chhod aur kisee ko parameshvar ka sandook uttana naheen chaahiye, kyonaki yahova ne unako isee liye chuna haai ki ve parameshvar ka sandook uttaaen aur usakee seva tthal sada kiya karen." 
1Chronicles15:3 tab daud ne sab israaaeliyon ko yarooshalem men isaaliye iattha kiya ki yahova ka sandook us sthan par pahunchaae, jise us ne usake liye taaiyar kiya tha." 
1Chronicles15:4 isaliye daud ne haroon ke santanon aur leviyon ko ikattha kiya 
1Chronicles15:5 arthata kahatiyon men se ureeael nam pradhaan ko aur usake aek sau bees bhaiyon ko 
1Chronicles15:6 marariyon men se asayah nam pradhaan ko aur usake do sau bees bhaiyon ko 
1Chronicles15:7 geshamiyon men se yoael nam pradhaan ko aur usake aek sau tees bhaiyon ko 
1Chronicles15:8 aeleesapaniyon men se shamayah nam pradhaan ko aur usake do sau bhaiyon ko 
1Chronicles15:9 hebraeaniyon men se aeleeael nam pradhaan ko aur usake assee bhaiyon ko 
1Chronicles15:10 aur ujjeeaeliyon men se ammeenadab nam pradhaan ko aur usake aek sau barah bhaiyon ko. 
1Chronicles15:11 tab daud ne sadok aur aebyatar nam yajakon ko, aur ureeael, asayah, yoael, shamayah, aeleeael aur ammeenadab nam leaviyon ko bulavakar un se kaha," 
1Chronicles15:12 tum to leveey pitaron ke gharanon men mukhy purush ho isaliye apane bhaiyon samet apane apane ko pavitra karo, ki tum israaael ke parameshvar yahova ka sandook us sthan par pahuncha sako jisako maain ne usake liye taaiyar kiya haai." 
1Chronicles15:13 kyonaki pahilee bar tum ne usako n uttaya is karan hamara parameshvar yahova ham par toott pada, kyonki ham usakee khoj men niyam ke anusar n lage the." 
1Chronicles15:14 tab yajakon aur leaviyon ne apane apane ko paavitra kiya, ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova ka sandook le ja saken." 
1Chronicles15:15 tab us agyaa ke anusar jo moosa ne yahova ka vachan sunakar dee thee, leaviyon ne sandook ko dndon ke bal apane kandhaen par utta liya." 
1Chronicles15:16 aur daud ne pradhaan leviyon ko agyaa dee, ki apane bhai gavaaiyon ko baje arthata sarangee, veena aur jhanjh dekar bajane aur anand ke sath unche svar se gane ke liye niyukt karen." 
1Chronicles15:17 tab leaviyon ne yoael ke putra heman ko, aur usake bhaiyon men se berekyah ke putra asap ko, aur apane bhai maraariyon men se kooshaayah ke putra aetan ko ttharaya." 
1Chronicles15:18 aur unake sath unhon ne doosare pad ke apane bhaiyon ko arthata jakaryah, ben, yajeeael, shameeramot, yaheeael, unnee, aeleeab, banayah, maseyah, mattaityah, aeleepaleh, mikaneyah, aur obededom aur peeael ko jo darapal the ttharaya." 
1Chronicles15:19 yon heman, asap aur aetan nam ke gavaaiye to peetal kee jhanjh baja bajakar rag chalane ko" 
1Chronicles15:20 aur jakaryah, ajeeael, shameeramot, yaheeael, unnee, aeleeab, maseyah, aur banayah, alamot, nam rag men sarangee bajane ko" 
1Chronicles15:21 aur maattaityah, aeleepaleh, mikaneyah obededom, yeeael aur ajajyah veena khrja men chhedne ko ttharaae gaae." 
1Chronicles15:22 aur rag uttane ka aadhaikaree kananyah nam leaviyon ka pradhaan tha, vah rag uttane ke vishay shaiksha deta tha, kyonki vah nipun tha." 
1Chronicles15:23 aur berekyah aur aelakana sandook ke darapal the. 
1Chronicles15:24 aur shabanyah, yoshaapat, natanel, amasaai, jakaryah, banayah aur aeleeaejer nam yajak parameshvar ke sandook ke age age turaahiyan bajate huae chale, aur obededom aur yahiyyah usake darapal the." 
1Chronicles15:25 aur daud aur israaaeliyon ke puraniye aur sahasrpati sab milakar yahova kee vacha ka sandook obededom ke ghar se anand ke sath le ane ke liae gaae. 
1Chronicles15:26 jab parameshvar ne leaviyon kee sahayata kee jo yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttanevale the, tab unhon ne sat baail aur sat meddhe baali kiae." 
1Chronicles15:27 daud, aur yahova kee vacha ka sandook uttanevale sab leveey aur ganevale aur ganevalon ke sath rag uttanevale ka pradhaan kananyah, ye sab to san ke kapade ke bage pahine the, aur daud san ke kapade ka aepod pahine tha." 
1Chronicles15:28 is prakar sab israaaelee yahova kee vacha ke sandook ko jayajayakar karate, aur naraasinge, turaahiyan aur jhanjh bajate aur sarangiyan aur veena bajate huae le chale." 
1Chronicles15:29 jab yahova kee vacha ka sandook daudapur men pahuncha tab shaaul kee bettee meekal ne khaidkee men se jhankakar daud raja ko koodate aur khelate huae dekha, aur use man hee man toochchh jana." 
1Chronicles16:1 tab parameshvar ka sandook le akar us tamhoo men rakha gaya jo daud ne usake liye khda karaya tha aur parameshvar ke samhane homabali aur melabali chaddhaae gaae. 
1Chronicles16:2 jab daud homabali aur melabali chaddha jooka, tab us ne yahova ke nam se praja ko ashaeervad diya." 
1Chronicles16:3 aur us ne kya purusha, kya sre, sab israaaeliyon ko aek aek rottee aur aek aek ttukada mans aur kishaamish kee aek aek ttiikaya banttva dee." 
1Chronicles16:4 tab us ne kai leviyon ko isaliye tthara diya, ki yahova ke satdook ke samhane seva tthal kiya kare, aur israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee charcha aur usaka dhanyavad aur stuti kiya karen." 
1Chronicles16:5 unaka muakhaiya to asap tha, aur usake neeche jakaryah tha, fir yeeel, shameeramot, yaheeel, maattaityah, eleeab banayah, obededom aur yeeel the ye to saranagiyan aur veenaen liye huae the, aur asap jhanjh par rag bajata tha." 
1Chronicles16:6 aur banayah aur yahajeeael nam yajak parameshvar kee vacha ke sandook ke samhane nity turahiyan bajane ke liae niyukt kiae gaae. 
1Chronicles16:7 tab usee din daud ne yahova ka dhanyavad karane ka kam asam aur usake bhaiyon ko saunp diya. 
1Chronicles16:8 yahova ka dhanyavad karo, us se praarthna karo desh desh men usake kamon ka prachar karo." 
1Chronicles16:9 usaka geet gao, usaka bhjan karo, usake sab ashcharya-kaman ka dhyan karo." 
1Chronicles16:10 usake paavitra nam par ghapand karo yahova ke khojiyon ka day anandait ho. 
1Chronicles16:11 yahova aur usakee samarth kee khoj karo usake darshan ke liae lagatar khoj karo. 
1Chronicles16:12 usek kiae huae ashkhryakarma, usake chamatkar aur nyayavachan smaran karo." 
1Chronicles16:13 he usake das israaael ke vansha, he yakoob kee santan tum jo usake chune huae ho!" 
1Chronicles16:14 vahee hamara parameshvar yahova haai, usake nyay ke kam prathvee bhr men hote haain." 
1Chronicles16:15 usakee vacha ko sada smaran rakho, yah vahee vachan haai jo us ne hajar peeaddhiyon ke liye tthara diya." 
1Chronicles16:16 vah vacha us ne ibraaheem ke sath bandhae, aur usee ke vishay us ne isahak se shapath khai," 
1Chronicles16:17 aur usee ko us ne yakoob ke liye vidhai karake aur israaael ke liye sada kee vacha bandhakar yah kahakar draddh kiya, ki" 
1Chronicles16:18 maain kanan desh tujhee ko doonga, vah bantt men tumhara nij bhag hoga." 
1Chronicles16:19 us samay to tum ginatee men thode the, varan bahut hee thode aur us desh men paradeshaee the." 
1Chronicles16:20 aur ve aek jaati se doosaree jaati me, aur aek jajy se doosare men firate to rahe," 
1Chronicles16:21 parantu us ne kisee panushy ko un par andhor karane n diya aur vah rajaon ko unake nimitt yah dhamakee deta tha, ki" 
1Chronicles16:22 mere abhaishaikton ko mat chhuo, aur n mere naabiyon kee haani karo." 
1Chronicles16:23 he samast prathvee ke logo yahova ka geet gao. praatidin usake kiae huae uddhar ka shuubh samachar sunate raho. 
1Chronicles16:24 anyajatiyon men usakee maahima ka, aur desh desh ke logon men usake ashcharya-kaman ka varnn karo." 
1Chronicles16:25 kyonaki yahova mahan aur stuti ke ati yogy haai, vah to sab devataon se aadhaik bhyayogy haai." 
1Chronicles16:26 kyonaki desh desh ke sab devata moortiyan hee haain parantu yahova hee ne svarga ko banaya haai. 
1Chronicles16:27 usake charon or vibhv aur aeeshvarya haai usake sthan men samarth aur anand haai. 
1Chronicles16:28 he desh desh ke kulo, yahova ka gunanuvad karo, yahova kee mahima aur samarth ko mano." 
1Chronicles16:29 yahova ke nam kee maahima aeesee mano jo usake nam ke yogy haai. bhentt lekar usake sammukh aao, paavitrata se shaebhayaman hokar yahova ko dandvat karo." 
1Chronicles16:30 he saree prathvee ke logo usake samhane thrathrao! jagat aeesa sthiar haai, ki vah ttlane ka naheen." 
1Chronicles16:31 akash anand kare aur prathvee magan ho, aur jaati jati men log kahe, ki yahova raja" 
1Chronicles16:32 hua haai. samudra aur us men kee sab vastuaen garaj utte, maaidan aur jo kuchh us men haai so prafaullait hon." 
1Chronicles16:33 usee samay van ke vraksha yahova ke samhane jayajayakar kare, kyonki vah prathvee ka nyay karane ko anevala haai." 
1Chronicles16:34 yahova ka dhanyavad karo, kyonaki vah bhla haai usakee karuna sada kee haai." 
1Chronicles16:35 aur yah kaho, ki he hamare uddhar karanevale parameshvar hamara uddhar kar, aur ham ko ikattha karake anyajatiyon se chhuda, ki ham tere paavitra nam ka dhanyavad kare, aur teree stuti karate huae tere vishay badai karen." 
1Chronicles16:36 anadikal se anantakal tak israaael ka parameshvar yahova dhany haai. tab sab praja ne ameen kaha aur yahova kee stuati kee. 
1Chronicles16:37 tab us ne vahan arthata yahova kee vacha ke sandook ke samhane asap aur usake bhaiyon ko chhod diya, ki pratidin ke prayojan ke anusar ve sandook ke samhane nity seva tthal kiya karen!" 
1Chronicles16:38 aur adsatt bhaiyon samet obededom ko, aur darapalon ke liye yadootoon ke putra obededom aur hosa ko chhod diya." 
1Chronicles16:39 fir us ne sadok yajak aur usake bhai yajakon ko yahova ke nivas ke samhane, jo gibon ke unche sthan men tha, tthara diya," 
1Chronicles16:40 ki ve nity savere aur sanjh ko homabali kee vedee par yahova ko homabaali chaddhaya kare, aur un sab ke anusar kiya kare, jo yahova kee yyavastha men likha haai, jise us ne israaael ko diya tha." 
1Chronicles16:41 aur unake sang us ne heman aur yadootoon aur doosaron ko bhee jo nam lekar chune gaae the tthara diya, ki yahova kee sada kee karuna ke karan usaka dhanyavad karen." 
1Chronicles16:42 aur unake sang us ne heman aur yadootoon ko bajanevalon ke liye turahiyan aur jhanjhen aur parameshvar ke geet gane ke liye baje dia, aur yadootoon ke betton ko faattk kee rakhvalee karane ko tthara diya." 
1Chronicles16:43 nidan praja ke sab log apane apane ghar chale gaa, aur daud apane gharane ko ashaeervad dene lautt gaya." 
1Chronicles17:1 jab daud apane bhvan men rahane laga, tab daud ne natan nabee se kaha, dek, maain to devadaru ke bane huae ghar men rahata hoo, parantu yahova kee vacha ka sandook tamboo men rahata haai." 
1Chronicles17:2 natan ne daud se kaha, jo kuchh tere man men ho use kar, kyonaki parameshvar tere sang haai." 
1Chronicles17:3 usee din rat ko parameshvar ka yah vachan natan ke pas pahuncha, jakar mere das daud se kah," 
1Chronicles17:4 yahova yon kahata haai, ki mere nivas ke liye too ghar banavane n paaega." 
1Chronicles17:5 kyonaki jis din se maain israaaeliyon ko misra se le aya, aj ke din tak maain kabhee ghar men naheen raha parantu aek tamboo se doosare tamboo ko or aek nivas se doosare nivas ko aya jaya karata hoo." 
1Chronicles17:6 jahan jahan maain ne sab israaaeliyon ke beech ana jana kiya, kya maain ne israaael ke nyaayiyon men se jinako maain ne apanee praja kee charavahee karane ko ttharaya tha, kisee se aeesee bat kabhee kahee, ki tum logon ne mere liye devadaru ka ghar kyon naheen banavaya?" 
1Chronicles17:7 so ab too mere das daud se aeesa kah, ki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain ne to tujh ko bhedshaala se aur bhed-bariyon ke peechhe peechhe firane se is manasa se bula liya, ki too meree praja israaael ka pradhaan ho jaae" 
1Chronicles17:8 aur jahan kaheen too aya aur gaya, vahan maain tere sang raha, aur tere sab shatrauon ko tere samhane se nashtt kiya haai. ab maain tere nam ko prathvee ke bade bade logon ke namo ke saman bada kar doonga." 
1Chronicles17:9 aur maain apanee praja israaael ke liye aek sthan ttharaunga, aur usako sthiar karoonga ki vah apane hee sthan men basee rahe aur kabhee chalayaman n ho aur kuttlai log unako nash n karane paaenge, jaaise ki pahile dinon men karate the" 
1Chronicles17:10 us samay bhee jab maain apanee praja israael ke upar nyayee ttharata tha so maain tere sab shatrauon ko daba doonga. fir maain tujhe yah bhee batata hoo, ki yahova tera ghar banaye rakhega." 
1Chronicles17:11 jab teree ayu pooree ho jayegee aur tujhe apane pitaron ke sang jana padega, tab maain tere bad tere vansh ko jo tere putraen men se hoga, khda karake usake rajy ko sthiar karoonga." 
1Chronicles17:12 mere liae aek ghar vahee banaaega, aur maain usakee rajagaee ko sadaaiv sthiar rakoonga."
