1Chronicles17:13 maain usaka pita ttharoonga aur vah mera putra ttharega aur jaaise maain ne apanee karuna us par se jo tujh se paahile tha hattai, vaaise maain us par se n hattaunga," 
1Chronicles17:14 varan maain usako apane ghar aur apane rajy men sadaaiv sthiar yakoonga aur usakee rajagaee sadaaiv attl rahegee. 
1Chronicles17:15 in sab baton aur is darshan ke anusar natan ne daud ko samajha diya. 
1Chronicles17:16 tab daud raja bheetar jakar yahova ke sammukh baaitta, aur kahane laga, he yahova parameshvar! maain kya hoo? aur mera gharana kya haai? ki too ne mujhe yahan tak pahunchaya haai?" 
1Chronicles17:17 aur he parameshvar! yah teree draashtti men chhottee see bat hui, kyonki too ne apane das ke gharane ke vishay bhavishy ke bahut dinon tak kee charcha kee haai, aur he yahova parameshvar! too ne mujhe unche pad ka matushy sa jana haai." 
1Chronicles17:18 jo maahima tere das par dikhai gai haai, usake vishay daud tujh se aur kya kah sakata haai? too to apane das ko janata haai." 
1Chronicles17:19 he yahova! too ne apane das ke nimitt aur apane man ke anusar yah bada kam kiya haai, ki tera das usako jan le." 
1Chronicles17:20 he yahova! jo kuchh ham ne apane kanon se suna haai, usake anusar tere tuly koi nahee, aur n tujhe chhod aur koi parameshvar haai." 
1Chronicles17:21 fir teree praja israaael ke bhee tuly kaun haai? vah to prathvee bhr men aek hee jaati haai, use parameshvar ne jakar apanee nij praja karane ko chhudaya, isaaliye ki too bade aur dravane kam karake apana nam kare, aur apanee praja ke samhane se jo too ne misra se chhuda lee thee, jaati jati ke logon ko nikal de." 
1Chronicles17:22 kyonaki too ne apanee praja israaael ko apanee sada kee praja hone ke liye ttharaya, aur he yahova! too ap usaka parameshvar tthara." 
1Chronicles17:23 isaliye, ab he yahova, too ne jo vachan apane das ke aur usake gharane ke vishay diya haai, vah sadaaiv attl rahe, aur apane vachan ke anusar hee kara." 
1Chronicles17:24 aur tera nam sadaaiv attl rahe, aur yah kahakar teree badai sada kee jaa, ki senaon ka yahova israaael ka parameshvar haai, varan vah israaael hee ke liye parameshvar haai, aur tera das daud ka gharana tere samhane sthiar rahe." 
1Chronicles17:25 kyonaki he mere parameshvar, too ne yah kahakar apane das par pragatt kiya haai ki maain tera ghar banaae rakoonga, is karan tere das ko tere sammukh praarthna karane ka hiyab hua haai." 
1Chronicles17:26 aur ab he yahova too hee parameshvar haai, aur too ne apane das ko yah bhlai karane ka vachan diya haai." 
1Chronicles17:27 aur ab too ne prasann hokar, apane das ke gharane par aeesee ashaeesh dee haai, ki vah tere sammukh sadaaiv bana rahe, kyonaki he yahova, too ashaeesh de chuka haai, isaliye vah sadaaiv ashaeeashait bana rahe." 
1Chronicles18:1 isake bad daud ne palishtaiyon ko jeetakar apane adhaeen kar liya, aur ganvon samet gat nagar ko paalishtaiyon ke hath se chheen liya." 
1Chronicles18:2 fir us ne moaabiyon ka bhee jeet liya, aur moabee daud ke adhaeen hokar bhentt lane lage." 
1Chronicles18:3 fir jab soba ka raja hadarejer parat mahanad ke pas apane rajy sthiar karane ko ja raha tha, tab daud ne usako hamat ke pas jeet liya." 
1Chronicles18:4 aur daud ne usase aek hajar rat, sat hajar savar, aur bees hajar piyade har lia, aur daud ne sab rathvale ghodon ke sum kee nas kattvai, parantu aek sau rathvale dhode bacha rakhe." 
1Chronicles18:5 aur jab daamishk ke aramee, soba ke raja hadarejer kee sahayata karane ko aa, tab daud ne aramiyon men se bais hajar purush mare." 
1Chronicles18:6 tab daud ne damishk ke aram men sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai so aramee daud ke adhaeen hokar bhentt le ane lage. aur jahan jahan daud jata, vahan vahan yahova usako jay dilata tha." 
1Chronicles18:7 aur hadarejer ke karmachariyon ke pas sone kee jo ddhalen thee, unhen daud lekar yarooshalem ko aya." 
1Chronicles18:8 aur hadarejer ke tibht aur koon nam nagaron se daud bahut sa peetal le aya aur usee se suleman ne peetal ke haud aur khmbhon aur peetal ke patraen ko banavaya. 
1Chronicles18:9 jab hamat ke raja to ne suna, ki daud ne soba ke raja hadarejer kee samast sena ko jeet liya haai," 
1Chronicles18:10 tab us ne hadoram nam apane putra ko daud raja ke pas usaka kushal kshom poochhne aur use badhaai dene ko bheja, isaaliye ki us ne hadarejer se ladkar use jeet liya tha kyonki hadarejer to se lada karata tha aur hadoram sone chandee aur peetal ke sab prakar ke patra liye huae aya." 
1Chronicles18:11 inako daud raja ne yahova ke liye paavitra karake rakha, aur vaaisa hee us sone-chandee se bhee kiya jise sab jaatiyo se, arthata aedomiyon moabiyo, ammoniyo, palishtaiyo, aur amalekiyon se praapt kiya tha." 
1Chronicles18:12 fir yarooyah ke putra abeeshau ne lan kee tarai men attarah hajar aedomiyon ko mar liya. 
1Chronicles18:13 tab us ne aedom men sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaittai aur sab aedomee daud ke adhaeen ho gaae. aur daud jahan jahan jata tha vahan vahan yahova usako jay dilata tha. 
1Chronicles18:14 daud to sare israaael par rajy karata tha, aur vah apanee sab praja ke sath nyay aur dharma ke kam karata tha." 
1Chronicles18:15 aur pradhaan senapaati sarooyah ka putra yoab tha itihas ka likhnevala aheelood ka putra yahoshaapat tha. 
1Chronicles18:16 pradhaan yajak, aheetoob ka putra sadok aur aebyatar ka putra abeemelek the mantraee shabasha tha." 
1Chronicles18:17 karetiyon aur paletiyon ka pradhaan yahoyada ka putra banayah tha aur daud ke putra raja ke pas mukhaiye hokar rahate the. 
1Chronicles19:1 isake bad ammoniyon ka raja nahash mar gaya, aur usaka putra usake sthan par raja hua." 
1Chronicles19:2 tab daud ne yah socha, ki hanoon ke pita nahash ne jo mujh par praeeti dikhai thee, isaaliye maain bhee us par praeeati dikhaunga. tab daud ne usake pita ke vishay shaanati dene ke liye doot bheje. aur daud ke karpacharee ammoniyon ke desh men hanoon ke pas use shaanati dene ko aae." 
1Chronicles19:3 parantu ammoniyon ke haakim hanoon se kahane lage, daud ne jo tere pas shaanati denevale bheje haai, vah kya teree samajh men tere pita ka adar karane kee manasa se bheje haain? kya usake karmacharee isee manasa se tere pas naheen aa, ki ddoonddh-ddhanddh karen aur nashtt kare, aur desh ka bhed len?" 
1Chronicles19:4 tab hanoon ne daud ke karmachariyon ko pakada, aur unake bal mudvaa, aur adho vasr arthata nitamb tak kattvakar unako jane diya." 
1Chronicles19:5 tab kitanon ne jakar daud ko bata diya, ki un purushaen ke sath kaaisa bartav kiya gaya, so us ne logon ko un se milane ke liye bheja kyonki ve purush bahut lajate the. aur raja ne kaha, jab tak tumharee daddhiyan baddh n jaae, tab tak yareeho men tthare raho, aur bad ko lautt ana." 
1Chronicles19:6 jab ammoniyon ne dekha, ki ham daud ko ghainaune lagate haai, tab hanoon aur ammoniyon ne aek hajar kikkar chandee, aramnaharaaim aur arammaka aur soba ko bhejee, ki rath aur savar kiraye par bulaaen." 
1Chronicles19:7 so unhon ne battees hajar rat, aur maka ke raja aur usakee sena ko kiraye par bulaya, aur inhon ne akar medaba ke samhane, apane dere khde kiae. aur ammonee apane apane nagar men se ikatthe hokar ladne ko aae." 
1Chronicles19:8 yah sunakar daud ne yoab aur shooraveeron kee pooree sena ko bheja. 
1Chronicles19:9 tab ammonee nikale aur nagar ke faattk ke pas panati bandhae, aur jo raja aae the, ve un se alag maaidan men the." 
1Chronicles19:10 yah dekhkar ki age peechhe donon or hamare viruddh panti bandhaee haai, yoab ne sab bade bade israaaelee veeron men se kitaton ko chhanttkar aramiyon ke samhane unakee panati bandhaai" 
1Chronicles19:11 aur shosh logon ko apane bhai abeeshau ke hath saunp diya, aur unhon ne ammoniyon ke samhane panati bandhaee." 
1Chronicles19:12 aur us ne kaha, yadi aramee mujh par prabal hone lage, to too meree sahayata karana aur yadi ammonee tujh par prabal hone lage, to maain teree sahayata karoonga." 
1Chronicles19:13 too hiyab bandha aur ham sab apane logon aur apane parameshvar ke nagaron ke nimitt purushaarth karen aur yahova jaaisa usako achchha lage, vaaisa hee karega." 
1Chronicles19:14 tab yoab aur jo log usake sath the, araamiyon se yuddh karane ko unake samhane gaa, aur ve usake samhane se bhage." 
1Chronicles19:15 yah dekhkar ki aramee bhag gaae haai, ammonee bhee usake bhai abeeshau ke samhane se bhagakar nagar ke bheetar ghause. tab yoab yarooshalem ko lautt aya." 
1Chronicles19:16 fir yah dekhkar ki ve israaaeliyon se har gaae haain araamiyon ne doot bhejakar mahanad ke par ke araamiyon ko bulavaya, aur hadarejer ke senapaati shaepak ko apana pradhaan banaya." 
1Chronicles19:17 isaka samachar pakar daud ne sab israaaeliyon ko ikattha kiya, aur yaradan par hokar un par chaddhai kee aur unake viruddh panti bandhaai, tab ve us se ladne lage." 
1Chronicles19:18 parantu aramee israaaeliyon se bhage, aur daud ne un men se sat hajar rathaiyon aur chalees hajar pyadon ko mar dala, aur shaepak senapati ko bhee mar dala." 
1Chronicles19:19 yah dekhkar ki ve israaaeliyon se har gaae haai, hadarejer ke karmachaariyon ne daud se sanadhai kee aur usake adhaeen ho gaae aur aramiyon ne ammoniyon kee sahayata fir karanee n chahee." 
1Chronicles20:1 fir naye varsha ke arambh men jab raja log yuddh karane ko nikala karate haai, tab yoab ne bharee sena sang le jakar ammoniyon ka desh ujad diya aur akar rabba ko ghor liya parantu daud yarooshalem men rah gaya aur yoab ne rabba ko jeetakar ddha diya." 
1Chronicles20:2 tab daud ne unake raja ka mukutt usake sir se utarakar kya deekha, ki usaka taul kikkar bhr sone ka haai, aur us men manai bhee jade the aur vah daud ke sir par rakha gaya. fir us ne us nagar se bahut saman loott men paya." 
1Chronicles20:3 aur us ne usake rahanevalon ko nikalakar aron aur lohe ke hengon aur kulhaadiyon se kattvaya aur ammoniyon ke sab nagaron ke sath bhee daud ne vaaisa hee kiya. tab daud sab logon samet yarooshalem ko lautt gaya. 
1Chronicles20:4 isake bad gejer men palishtaiyon ke sath yuddh hua us samay hooshaai sibbakaai ne sippaai ko, jo rapa kee santan tha, mar dala aur ve dab gaae." 
1Chronicles20:5 aur paalishtaiyon ke sath fir yuddh hua us men yair ke putra aelhanan ne gatee golyat ke bhai lahamee ko mar dala, jisake barchhe kee chhd, julahe kee dongee ke saman thee." 
1Chronicles20:6 fir gat men bhee yuddh hua, aur vahan aek bade deel ka purush tha, jo rapa kee santan tha, aur usake aek aek hath panv men chh chh ungaaliyan arthata sab milakar chaubees ungaaliyan theen." 
1Chronicles20:7 jab us ne israaaeliyon ko lalakara, tab daud ke bhai shaima ke putra yonatan ne usako mara." 
1Chronicles20:8 ye hee gat men rapa se utpann huae the, aur ve daud aur usake sevakon ke hath se mar dale gaae." 
1Chronicles21:1 aur shautan ne israaael ke viruddh uttkar, daud ko usakaya ki israaaeliyon kee ginatee le." 
1Chronicles21:2 tab daud ne yoab aur praja ke hakimon se kaha, tum jakar bashorba se le dan tak ke israaael kee ginatee lekar mujhe batao, ki maain jan loon ki ve kitane haain." 
1Chronicles21:3 yoab ne kaha, yahova kee praja ke kitane hee kyon n ho, vah unako sau guna baddha de parantu he mere prabhu! he raja! kya ve sab raja ke adhaeen naheen haain? mera prabhu aeesee bat kyon chahata haai? vah israaael par dosh lagane ka karan kyon bane?" 
1Chronicles21:4 taubhee raja kee agyaa yoab par prabal hui. tab yoab vida hokar sare israaael men dhoomakar yarooshalem ko lautt aya. 
1Chronicles21:5 tab yoab ne praja kee ginatee ka jod, daud ko sunaya aur sab talavaariye purush israaael ke to gyarah lak, aur yahooda ke char lakh sattar hajar tthare." 
1Chronicles21:6 parantu un men yoab ne levee aur binyameen ko n gina, kyonaki vah raja kee agyaa se ghauna karata tha" 
1Chronicles21:7 aur yah bat parameshvar ko buree lagee, isaliye us ne israaael ko mara." 
1Chronicles21:8 aur daud ne parameshvar se kaha, yah kam jo maain ne kiya, vah mahapap haai. parantu ab apane das ka adharma door kara mujh se to badee moorkhta hui haai." 
1Chronicles21:9 tab yahova ne daud ke dasha gad se kaha," 
1Chronicles21:10 jakar daud se kah, ki yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain tujh ko teen vipaattaiyan dikhata hoo, un men se aek ko chun le, ki maain use tujh par daloon." 
1Chronicles21:11 tab gad ne daud ke pas jakar us se kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, ki jisako too chahe use chun le" 
1Chronicles21:12 ya to teen varsha ka kal pade va teen maheene tak tere virodhaee tujhe nash karate rahe, aur tere shatrauaun kee talavar tujh par chalatee rahe va teen din tak yahova kee talavar chale, arthata maree desh men faaile aur yahova ka doot israaaelee desh men charon or vinash karata rahe. ab soch, ki maain apane bhejanevale ko kya uttar doon." 
1Chronicles21:13 daud ne gad se kaha, maain bade sankatt men pada hoo maain yahova ke hath men padoo, kyonki usakee daya bahut badee haai parantu manushy ke hath men mujhe padna n pade." 
1Chronicles21:14 tab yahova ne israaael men maree faailai, aur israaael men sattar hajar purush mar mitte." 
1Chronicles21:15 fir parameshvar ne aek doot yarooshalem ko bhee use nash karane ko bheja aur vah nash karane hee par tha, ki yahova dukh dene se kheadit hua, aur nash karanevale doot se kaha, bas kara ab apana hath kheench le. aur yahova ka doot yaboosee ornan ke khalihan ke pas khda tha." 
1Chronicles21:16 aur daud ne ankhen uttakar dekha, ki yahova ka doot hath men kheenchee hui aur yarooshalem ke upar baddhai hui aek talavar liye huae akash ke beech khda haai, tab daud aur puraaniye ttatt paahine huae munh ke bal gire." 
1Chronicles21:17 tab daud ne parameshvar se kaha, jis ne praja kee ginatee lene kee agyaa dee thee, vah kya maain naheen hoo? ha, jis ne pap kiya aur bahut burai kee haai, vah to maain hee hoo. parantu in bhed-bakaariyon ne kya kiya haai? isaaliye he mere parameshvar yahova! tera hath mere pita ke gharane ke viruddh ho, parantu teree praja ke viruddh n ho, ki ve mare jaaen." 
1Chronicles21:18 tab yahova ke doot ne gad ko daud se yah kahane kee agyaa dee, ki daud chaddhkar yaboosee ornan ke khalihan men yahova kee aek vedee banaae." 
1Chronicles21:19 gad ke is vachan ke anusar jo us ne yahova ke nam se kaha tha, daud chaddh gaya." 
1Chronicles21:20 tab ornan ne peechhe fir ke doot ko dekha, aur usake charon bette jo usake sang the chhpai gaa, ornan to gehoon danvata tha." 
1Chronicles21:21 jab daud ornan ke pas aya, tab ornan ne draashtti karake daud ko dekha aur khalihan se bahar jakar boomi tak jhukakar daud ko dandvat kiya." 
1Chronicles21:22 tab daud ne ornan se kaha, us khlihan ka sthan mujhe de de, ki maain us par yahova ko aek vedee banau, usaka poora dam lekar use pujh ko de, ki yah vipitt praja par se door kee jaae." 
1Chronicles21:23 ornan ne daud se kaha, ise le le, aur mere prabhu raja ko jo kuchh bhaae vah vahee kare sun, maain tujhe homabaali ke liye baail aur idhan ke liye danbane ke hathaiyar aur annabaali ke liye gehoo, yah sab maain deta hoo." 
1Chronicles21:24 raja daud ne ornan se kaha, so nahee, maain avashy isaka poora dam hee dekar ise mol loonga jo tera haai, use maain yahova ke liye naheen loonga, aur n sentament ka homabali chaddhaunga." 
1Chronicles21:25 tab daud ne us sthan ke liye ornan ko chh sau shokel sona taulakar diya. 
1Chronicles21:26 tab daud ne vahan yahova kee aek vedee banai aur homabali aur melabali chaddhakar yahova se praarthna kee, aur us ne hopabali kee vedee par svarga se ag girakar usakee sun lee." 
1Chronicles21:27 tab yahova ne doot ko agyaa dee aur us ne apanee talavar fir myan men kar lee. 
1Chronicles21:28 yah dekhkar ki yahova ne yaboosee ornan ke khlihan men meree sun lee haai, daud ne usee samay vahan baalidan kiya." 
1Chronicles21:29 yahova ka nivas jo moosa ne jangal men banaya tha, aur homabaali kee vedee, ye donon us samay gibon ke unche sthan par the." 
1Chronicles21:30 parantu daud parameshvar ke pas usake samhane n ja saka, kyonki vah yahova ke doot kee talavar se dr gaya tha." 
1Chronicles22:1 tab daud kahane laga, yahova parameshvar ka bhvan yahee haai, aur israaael ke liye homabaali kee vedee yahee haai." 
1Chronicles22:2 tab daud ne israaael ke desh men jo paradeshaee the unako ikattha karane kee agyaa dee, aur parameshvar ka bhvan banane ko patthr gaddhne ke liye raj tthara diae." 
1Chronicles22:3 fir daud ne faattkon ke kivadon kee keelon aur jodon ke liye bahut sa loha, aur taul se bahar bahut peetal," 
1Chronicles22:4 aur ginatee se bahar devadar ke ped ikatthe kiae kyonaki seedon aur sor ke log daud ke pas bahut se devadar ke ped laae the. 
1Chronicles22:5 aur daud ne kaha, mera putra sulaaiman sukumar aur ladka haai, aur jo bhvan yahova ke liye banana haai, use atyant tejomay aur sab deshaen men prasiddh aur shaebhayaman hona chaahiye isaliye maain usake liye taaiyaree karoonga. so daud ne marane se pahile bahut taaiyaree kee." 
1Chronicles22:6 fir us ne apane putra sulaaiman ko bulakar israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye bhvan banane kee agyaa dee. 
1Chronicles22:7 daud ne apane putra sulaaiman se kaha, meree manasa to thee, ki apane parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banaun." 
1Chronicles22:8 parantu yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha, ki too ne lohoo bahut bahaya aur baddhe bade yuddh kiae haai, so too mere nam ka bhvan n banane paaega, kyonki too ne boomi par meree draashtti men bahut lohoo bahaya haai." 
1Chronicles22:9 dek, tujh se aek putra utpann hoga, jo shaant purush hoga aur maain usako charon or ke shatrauaun se shaaantai doonga usaka nam to sulaaiman hoga, aur usake dinon men maain israaael ko shaantai aur chaain doonga." 
1Chronicles22:10 vahee mere nam ka bhvan banaaega. aur vahee mera putra ttharega aur maain usaka pita ttharoonga, aur usakee rajagaee ko maain israaael ke upar sada ke liye sthiar rakoonga." 
1Chronicles22:11 ab he mere putra, yahova tere sang rahe, aur too kratarth hokar us vachan ke anusar jo tere parameshvar yahova ne tere vishay kaha haai, usaka bhvan banana." 
1Chronicles22:12 ab yahova tujhe buddhi aur samajh de aur israaael ka adhaikaree tthara de, aur too apane parameshvar yahova kee yyavastha ko manata rahe." 
1Chronicles22:13 too tab hee kratarth hoga jab un vidhaiyon aur niyamon par chalane kee chaukasee karega, jinakee agyaa yahova ne israaael ke liye moosa ko dee thee. hiyab bandha aur draddh ho. mat dra aur tera man kachcha n ho." 
1Chronicles22:14 sun, maain ne apane klesh ke samay yahova ke bhvan ke liye aek lakh kikkar sona, aur das lakh kikkar chandee, aur peetal aur loha itana ikattha kiya haai, ki bahutayat ke karan taul se bahar haai aur lakadee aur patthr maain ne ikatthe kiae haai, aur too unako baddha sakega." 
1Chronicles22:15 aur tere pas bahut kareegar haai, arthata patthr aur lakadee ke kattne aur gaddhnevale varan sab bhanati ke kam ke liye sab prakar ke praveen purush haain." 
1Chronicles22:16 sona, chandee, peetal aur lohe kee to kuchh ginatee naheen haai, so too us kam men lag ja! yahova tere sang nit rahe." 
1Chronicles22:17 fir daud ne israaael ke sab hakimon ko apane putra sulaaiman kee sahayata karane kee agyaa yah kahakar dee," 
1Chronicles22:18 ki kya tumhara parameshvar yahova tumhare sang naheen haai? kya us ne numhen charon or se vishraam naheen diya? us ne to desh ke nivaasiyon ko mere vash men kar diya haai aur desh yahova aur usakee praja ke samhane daba hua haai. 
1Chronicles22:19 sab tan man se apane parameshvar yahova ke pas jaya karo, aur jee lagakar yahova parameshvar ka paavitrasthan banana, ki tum yahova kee vacha ka sandook aur parameshvar ke pavitra patra us bhvan men lao jo yahova ke nam ka bananevala haai." 
1Chronicles23:1 daud to booddha varan bahut booddha ho gaya tha, isaaliye us ne apane putra sulaaiman ko isagaael par raja niyukt kar diya." 
1Chronicles23:2 tab us ne israaael ke sab hakimon aur yajakon aur leamiyon ko ikattha kiya. 
1Chronicles23:3 aur jitane leveey tees varsha ke aur us se adhaik avastha ke the, ve gine aea, aur aek aek purush ke ginane se unakee ginatee adtees hajar hui." 
1Chronicles23:4 in men se chaubees hajar to yahova ke bhvan ka kam chalane ke liye niyukt hua, aur chh hajar saradar aur nyayee." 
1Chronicles23:5 aur char hajar darapal niyukt hua, aur char hajar un bajon se yahova kee stuati karane ke liye ttharaae gaae jo daud ne stuti karane ke liye banaae the." 
1Chronicles23:6 fir daud ne unako geshan, kahat aur mararee nam levee ke putraen ke anusar dalon men alag alag kar diya." 
1Chronicles23:7 geshaniyon men se to ladan aur shaimee the. 
1Chronicles23:8 aur ladan ke putra saradar yaheeael, fir jetam aur yoael ye teen the." 
1Chronicles23:9 aur shaimee ke putra shalemeet, hajeeael aur haran se teen the. ladan ke kul ke poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy purush ye hee the." 
1Chronicles23:10 fir shaimee ke putra yahat, jeena, yoosha, aur vareea ke putra shaimee yahee char the." 
1Chronicles23:11 yahat mukhy tha, aur jeeja doosara yoosh aur bareea ke vahut bette n hua, is karan ve sab milakar pitaron ka aek hee gharana tthare." 
1Chronicles23:12 kahat ke putra amraam, yisahar, hebraen aur ujjeeael chara. amraam ke putra haroon aur moosa." 
1Chronicles23:13 haroon to isaaliye alag kiya gaya, ki vah aur usake santan sada paramapavitra vastuon ko pavitra ttharaae, aur sada yahova ke sammukh dhoop jalaya karen aur usakee seva tthal kare, aur usake nam se ashaeervad diya karen." 
1Chronicles23:14 parantu parameshvar ke bhkt moosa ke putraen ke nam levee ke gotra ke beech gine gaae. 
1Chronicles23:15 moosa ke putra, gesham aur aeleeaejera." 
1Chronicles23:16 aur gesham ka putra shabooael mukhy tha. 
1Chronicles23:17 aur aeleeaejer ke putra rahabyah mukhya aur aeleeaejer ke aur koi putra n hua, parantu rahabyah ke bahut se bette hue." 
1Chronicles23:18 yisahar ke putron men se shalomeet mukhy tthara. 
1Chronicles23:19 hebraen ke putra yareeyyah mukhy, doosara amaryah, teesara yahajeeael, aur chautha yakamam tha." 
1Chronicles23:20 ujjeeel ke putron men se mukhy to meeka aur doosara yishshiayyah tha. 
1Chronicles23:21 mararee ke putra mahalee aur mooshee. mahalee ke putra aeleeajar aur keesh the. 
1Chronicles23:22 aeleeajar putraheen mar gaya, usake keval bettyaian hui so keesh ke putraen ne jo unake bhai the unhen byah liya." 
1Chronicles23:23 mooshaee ke putra mahalee aedor aur yaremot yah teen the. 
1Chronicles23:24 leveey pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purush ye hee the, ye nam le lekar, aek aek purush karake gine gaa, aur bees varsha kee va us se aadhaik avastha ke the aur yahova ke bhvan men seva tthal karate the." 
1Chronicles23:25 kyonaki daud ne kaha, israaael ke parameshvar yahova ne apanee praja ko vishraam diya haai, aur vah to yarooshalem men sada ke liye bas gaya haai." 
1Chronicles23:26 aur leaviyon ko nivas aur us kee upasana ka saman fir uttana n padega. 
1Chronicles23:27 kyonaki daud kee pichhlee agyaaon ke anusar bees varsha va us se aadhaik avastha ke leveey gine gaae. 
1Chronicles23:28 kyonaki unaka kam to haroon kee santan kee seva tthal karana tha, arthat yah ki ve anganon aur kottriyon me, aur sab pavitra vastuon ke shuuddh karane men aur parameshvar ke bhvan kee upasana ke sab kamon men seva tthal karen." 
1Chronicles23:29 aur bhentt kee rottee ka, annabaaliyon ke maaide ka, aur akhmeeree papaadiyon ka, aur tave par banaae huae aur sane huae ka, aur mapane aur taulane ke sab prakar ka kam karen." 
1Chronicles23:30 aur praati bhor aur prati sanjh ko yahova ka dhanyavad aur usakee stuati karane ke liye khde raha karen. 
1Chronicles23:31 aur vishraamadinon aur naye chand ke dino, aur niyat payvan men ginatee ke niyam ke anusar nity yahova ke sab hopabaaliyon ko baddhaaen." 
1Chronicles23:32 aur yahova ke bhvan kee upasana ke vishay milapavale namboo aur pavitrasthan kee raksha kare, aur apane bhai harooniyon ke saunpe huae kam ko chaukasee se karen." 
1Chronicles24:1 fir haroon kee santan ke dal ye the. haroon ke putra to nadab, abeeho, aeleeajar aur itamar the." 
1Chronicles24:2 parantu nadab aur abeehoo apane pita ke samhane putraheen mar gaa, is liye yajak ka kam aeleeajar aur itamar karate the." 
1Chronicles24:3 aur daud ne aeleeajar ke vansh ke sadok aur itamar ke vansh ke ahanmelek kee sahayata se unako apanee apanee seva ke anusar dal dal karake bantt diya. 
1Chronicles24:4 aur aeleeajar ke vansh ke mukhy purusha, itamar ke vansh ke mukhy purushaen se aadhaik the, aur ve yon bantte gaae arthata aeleeajar ke vansh ke pitaron ke gharanon ke solah, aur itamar ke vansh ke pitaron ke gharanon ke att mukhy purush the." 
1Chronicles24:5 tab ve chitthee dalakar barabar barabar bantte gaa, kyonki aeleeajar aur itamar donon ke vanshaen men paavitrasthan ke haakim aur parameshvar ke hakim niyukt huae the." 
1Chronicles24:6 aur natanel ke putra shamayah ne jo leveey tha, unake nam raja aur hakimon aur sadok yajak, aur aebyatar ke putra aheemelek aur yajakon aur leaviyon ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purushaenke samhane likhe arthata pitaron ka aek gharana to aeleeajar ke vansh men se aur aek itamar ke vansh men se liya gaya." 
1Chronicles24:7 paahilee chitthee to yahoyareeb ke, aur doosaree yadayah," 
1Chronicles24:8 teesaree hareem ke, chauthee soreem ke," 
1Chronicles24:9 panchaveen malkaiyyah ke, chhttveen miyyameen ke," 
1Chronicles24:10 sataveen hakkos ke, attveen aabiyyah ke," 
1Chronicles24:11 nauveen yehoo ke, dasaveen shakanyah ke," 
1Chronicles24:12 gyarahaveen aelyashaeeb ke, barahaveen yakeem ke," 
1Chronicles24:13 terahaveen huppa ke, chaudahaveen yesebab ke," 
1Chronicles24:14 pandrahaveen bilga ke, lolahaveen immer ke," 
1Chronicles24:15 satarahaveen hejeer ke, attarahaveen happaitses ke," 
1Chronicles24:16 unneesaveen pataah ke, beesaveen yahejakel ke," 
1Chronicles24:17 ikkeesaveen yakeen ke, baisaveen gamool ke," 
1Chronicles24:18 teisaveen dalayah ke, aur chaubeesaveen sajyah ke nam par nikaleen." 
1Chronicles24:19 unakee sevakai ke liye unaka yahee niyam ttharaya gaya ki ve apane us niyam ke anusar jo israael ke parameshvar yahova kee agyaa ke anusar unake moolapurush haroon ne chalaya tha, yahova ke bhvan men jaya karen." 
1Chronicles24:20 bache huae leaviyon men se amraam ke vansh men se shoobaael, shoobaael ke vansh men se yehadayaha." 
1Chronicles24:21 bacha rahabyah, sorahabyah, ke vansh men se yishshiayyah mukhy tha." 
1Chronicles24:22 isahaariyon men se shalomot aur halomot ke vansh men se yahata. 
1Chronicles24:23 aur hebraen ke vansh men se mukhy to yariyyah, doosara amaryah, teesara yahajeeael, aur chautha yakamama." 
1Chronicles24:24 ujjeeel ke vansh men se meeka aur meeka ke vansh men se shaameera. 
1Chronicles24:25 meeka ka bhai yishshiayyah, yishshiayyah ke vansh men se jakaryaha." 
1Chronicles24:26 mararee ke putra mahalee aur mooshaee aur yajiyyah ka putra bino tha. 
1Chronicles24:27 mararee ke putra yaajiyyah se bino aur shaeham, jakkoo aur ibraee the." 
1Chronicles24:28 mahalee se, aeleeajar jisake koi putra n tha." 
1Chronicles24:29 keesh se kaeesh ke vansh men yaraola. 
1Chronicles24:30 aur mooshaee ke putra, mahalee, aeder aur yareemota. apane apane pitaro ke gharanon ke anusar ye hee leveey santan ke the." 
1Chronicles24:31 inhon ne bhee apane bhai haroon kee santanon kee nai daud raja aur sadok aur aheemelek aur yajakon aur leaviyon ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purushaen ke samhane chitthiyan dalee, arthata mukhy purush ke pitaron ka gharana usake chhotte bhai ke pitaron ke gharane ke barabar tthara." 
1Chronicles25:1 fir daud aur senapaatiyon ne asap, heman aur yadootoon ke kitane putraen ko sevakai ke liye alag kiya ki ve veena, sarangee aur jhanjh baja bajakar naboovat karen. aur is sevakai ke kam karanevale manushyon kee ginatee yah thee" 
1Chronicles25:2 arthata asap ke putraen men se to jakkoor, yosep, natanyah aur asharela, asap ke ye putra asap hee kee agyaa men the, jo raja kee agyaa ke anusar naboovat karata tha." 
1Chronicles25:3 fir yadootoon ke putraen men se gadalyah, sareeyashaayah, hasabyah, mattaityah, ye hee chh apane pita yadootoon kee agyaa men hokar jo yahova ka dhanyavad aur stuati kar karake naboovat karata tha, veena bajate the." 
1Chronicles25:4 aur heman ke putraen men se, mukkaiyyah, mattanyah, lajjeeael, shabooael, yareemot, hananyah, hananee, aeleeata, gilatee, romamateeaejer, yoshabakasha, mallotee, hoteer aur mahajeeota." 
1Chronicles25:5 parameshvar kee praatigyaanukool jo usaka nam baddhane kee thee, ye sab heman ke putra the jo raja ka dasha tha kyonaki parameshvar ne heman ko chaudah bette aur teen beattyaian deen theen." 
1Chronicles25:6 ye sab yahova ke bhvan men gane ke liye apane apane pita ke adhaeen rahakar, parameshvar ke bhvan, kee sevakai men jhanj, sarangee aur veena bajate the. aur asap, yadootoon aur heman raja ke adhaeen rahate the." 
1Chronicles25:7 in sabhon kee ginatee bhaiyon samet jo yahova ke geet seekhe huae aur sab prakar se nipun the, do sau attasee thee." 
1Chronicles25:8 aur unhon ne kya bada, kya chhotta, kya guro, kya chela, apanee apanee baree ke liye chitthee dalee." 
1Chronicles25:9 aur paahilee chitthee asap ke betton men se yosep ke nam par nikalee, doosaree gadalyah ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the." 
1Chronicles25:10 teesaree jakkoor ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:11 chauthee yisraee ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:12 panchaveen natanyah ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:13 chhtteen bukkaiyyah ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:14 sataveen yasarela ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:15 attveen yashaayah ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:16 nauveen matanyah ke nam par nikalee, jisake putra aur bhai samet barah the." 
1Chronicles25:17 dasaveen shaimee ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:18 gyarahaveen ajarel ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:19 barahaveen hashabyah ke nam par nikalee, jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the." 
1Chronicles25:20 terahavee shoobaael ke nam par nikalee, jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the." 
1Chronicles25:21 chaudahaveen mattaiyyah ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:22 pandrahaveen yaremot ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:23 solahaveen hananyah ke nam par nikalee, jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the." 
1Chronicles25:24 satrahaveen yoshabakasha ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:25 attarahaveen haranee ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:26 unneesaveen mallotee ke nam par nikalee, jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the." 
1Chronicles25:27 beesaveen ialiyyata ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:28 ikkeesaveen hoteer ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:29 baisaveen gilatee ke nam par tikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:30 teisaveen mahajeeot ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles25:31 aur chaubeesaveen chitthee romamateeaejer ke nam par nikalee jisake putra aur bhai us samet barah the. 
1Chronicles26:1 fir darapalon ke dal ye the koraahiyon men se to masholemyah, jo kore ka putra aur asap ke santanon mense tha." 
1Chronicles26:2 aur masholemyah ke putra hua, arthata usaka jetta jakaryah doosara yadeeael, teesara javadhah," 
1Chronicles26:3 chautha yateeael, panchavan aelam, chhttvan yahohanan aur satavan aelyahoaenaai." 
1Chronicles26:4 fir obedeedom ke bhee putra hua, usaka jetta shamayah, doosara yahojabad, teesara yoah, chautha sakar, panchavan natanel," 
1Chronicles26:5 chhttvan ammeeael, satavan issakar aur attvan pullataai, kyonaki parameshvar ne use ashaeesh dee thee." 
1Chronicles26:6 aur usake putra shamayah ke bhee putra utpann hua, jo shooraveer hone ke karan apane pita ke gharane par prabhuta karate the." 
1Chronicles26:7 shamayah ke putra ye the, arthata otee, rapaael, obed, aelajabad aur unake bhai aeleehoo aur samakyah balavan purush the." 
1Chronicles26:8 ye sab abededom kee santan men se the, ve aur unake putra aur bhai is sevakai ke liye balavan aur shaaktaiman the ye obededomee basatt the." 
1Chronicles26:9 aur masholemyah ke putra aur bhai attarah the, jo balavan the." 
1Chronicles26:10 fir mararee ke vansh men se hosa ke bhee putra the, arthata mukhy to shaimraee jisako jetta n hone par bhee usake pita ne mukhy ttharaya," 
1Chronicles26:11 doosara hilkaiyyah, teesara tabalyah aur chautha jakaryah tha hosa ke sab putra aur bhai milakar terah the." 
1Chronicles26:12 darapalon ke dal in mukhy purushaen ke the, ye apane bhaiyon ke barabar hee yahova ke bhvan men seva tthal karate the." 
1Chronicles26:13 inhon ne kya chhotte, kya bade, apane apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar aek aek faattk ke liye chitthee dalee." 
1Chronicles26:14 poorva kee or kee chitthee sholemyah ke nam par nikalee. tab unhon ne usake putra jakaryah ke nam kee chitthee dalee vah buaddhiman mantraee tha aur chitthee uttar kee or ke liye nikalee. 
1Chronicles26:15 daakkhian kee or ke liye obodedom ke nam par chitthee nikalee, aur usake betton ke nam par khjane kee kottree ke liye." 
1Chronicles26:16 fir shuuppeem aur hosa ke namon kee chitthee paashchaim kee or ke liye nikalee, ki ve shalleket nam faattk ke pas chaddhai kee sadk par amhane samhane chaukeedaree kiya karen." 
1Chronicles26:17 poorva or jo chh leveey the, uttar kee or pratidin char, daakkhian kee or praatidin char, aur khjane kee kottree ke pas do tthare." 
1Chronicles26:18 paashchaim or ke parbar nam sthan par unchee sadk ke pas to char aur parbar ke pas do rahe. 
1Chronicles26:19 ye darapalon ke dal the, jin men se kitane to korah ke the aur kitane mararee ke vansh ke the." 
1Chronicles26:20 fir leviyon men se aahiyyah parameshvar ke bhvan aur paavitra kee hui vastuo, donon ke bhndaron ka adhaikaree niyukt hua." 
1Chronicles26:21 ye ladan kee santan ke the, arthata gershonayon kee santan jo ladan ke kul ke the, arthata ladan aur gershonee ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purush the, arthata yahoaelee." 
1Chronicles26:22 yahoaelee ke putra ye the, arthata jetam aur usaka bhai yoael jo yahova ke bhvan ke khjane ke adhaikaree the." 
1Chronicles26:23 amraaamiyo, yisahariyo, hebraeniyon aur ujjeeaeliyon men se." 
1Chronicles26:24 aur shabooael jo moosa ke putra geshorm ke vansh ka tha, vah khjanon ka mukhy aadhaikaree tha." 
1Chronicles26:25 aur usake bhaiyon ka vrattant yah haai aeleeajar ke kul men usaka putra rahabyah, rahabyah ka putra yashaayah, yashaayah ka putra yoram, yoram ka putra jikree, aur jikree ka putra shalomot tha." 
1Chronicles26:26 yahee shalomot apane bhaiyon samet un sab paavitra kee hui pastuon ke bhndaron ka adhaikaree tha, jo raja daud aur pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purushaen aur sahasrapatiyon aur shatapaatiyon aur mukhy senapatiyon ne paavitra kee theen." 
1Chronicles26:27 jo loott ladaiyon men milatee thee, us men se unhon ne yahova ka bhvan draddh karane ke liye kuchh paavitra kiya." 
1Chronicles26:28 varan jitana shamooael dasha, keesh ke putra shaaul, ner ke putra abner, aur sarooyah ke putra yoab ne paavitra kiya tha, aur jo kuchh jis kisee ne paavitra kar rakha tha, vah sab shalomot aur usake bhaiyon ke adhaikar men tha." 
1Chronicles26:29 yisahariyon men se kananyah aur usake putra, israaael ke desh ka kam arthata saradar aur nyayee ka kam karane ke liye niyukt hue." 
1Chronicles26:30 aur hebraeaniyon men se hashayyah aur usake bhai jo satrah sau balavan purush the, ve yahova ke sab kam aur raja kee seva ke vishay yaradan kee paashchaim or rahanevale israaaeliyon ke aanaikaree tthare." 
1Chronicles26:31 hebraeaniyon men se yaariyyah mukhy tha, arthata hebraeaniyon kee peeddhee peeddhee ke pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar daud ke rajy ke chaleesaven varsha men ve ddoonddhe gaa, aur un men se kai shooraveer gilad ke yajer men mile." 
1Chronicles26:32 aur usake bhai jo veer the, pitaron ke gharanon ke do hajar sat sau mukhy purush the, inako daud raja ne parameshvar ke sab vishayon aur raja ke vishay men roobeniyo, gadiyon aur manashshoke adho gotra ka aadhaikaree ttharaya." 
1Chronicles27:1 israaaeliyo kee ginatee, arthata mitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purushaen aur yahasrapatiyon aur shatapaatiyon aur unake saradaron kee ginatee jo varsha bhr ke maheene maheene upaasthiat hone aur chhuttee panevale dalon ke sab vishayon men raja kee seva tthal karate the, aek aek dal men chaubees hajar the." 
1Chronicles27:2 paahile maheene ke liye paahile dal ka aadhaikaree jabdeeael ka putra yashaebam niyukt hua aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:3 vah peres ke vansh ka tha aur pahile maheene men sab senapaatiyon ka aadhaikaree tha. 
1Chronicles27:4 aur doosare maheene ke dal ka adhaikaree dodaai nam aek ahohee tha, aur usake dal ka pradhaan miklot tha, aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the." 
1Chronicles27:5 teesare maheene ke liye teesara senapaati yahoyada yajak ka putra banayah tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:6 yah vahee banayah haai, jo teeson shooron men veer, aur teeson men shraeshtt bhee tha aur usake dal men usaka putra ammeejabad tha." 
1Chronicles27:7 chauthe maheene ke liye chautha senapati yoab ka bhai asahel tha, aur usake bad usaka putra jabadhah tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the." 
1Chronicles27:8 panchaven maheene ke liye panchavan senapati yijraahee shamhoot tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:9 chhttven maheene ke liye chhttvan senapaati takoi ikkesh ka putra ira tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:10 sataven maheene ke liye satavan senapaati aepraaim ke vansh ka heles palonee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:11 attven maheene ke liye attvan senapaati jerah ke vansh men se hooshaai sibbakaai tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:12 nauven maheene ke liye nauvan senapati binyameenee abeeaejer anatotavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:13 dasaven maheene ke liye dasavan senapaati jerahee maharaai natopavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:14 gyarahaven maheene ke liye gyarahavan senapaati aepraaim ke vansh ka banayah piratonavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:15 barahaven maheene ke liye barahavan senapati otneeael ke vansh ka heldaai natopavasee tha aur usake dal men chaubees hajar the. 
1Chronicles27:16 fir israaaelee gotron ke ye aadhaikaree the arthata roobeniyon ka pradhaan jikree ka putra aeleeajara shaimoniyon se maka ka putra shapatyaha. 
1Chronicles27:17 levee se kamooael ka putra hashabyaha haroon kee santan ka sadoka. 
1Chronicles27:18 yahooda ka aeleehoo nam daud ka aek bhai, issakar se meekaael ka putra omnee." 
1Chronicles27:19 jabooloon se obadhah ka putra yishamayah, naptalee se ajraeeael ka putra yareemota." 
1Chronicles27:20 aepraaim se ajajyah ka putra hosho, manashsho se adho gotra ka, fadayah ka putra yoaela." 
1Chronicles27:21 gilad men adho gotra manashsho se jakaryah ka putra io, binyameen se abner ka putra yaseeael," 
1Chronicles27:22 aur dan se yaroham ka putra ajarel, tthara. ye hee israaael ke gotraen ke hakim the." 
1Chronicles27:23 parantu daud ne unakee ginatee bees varsha kee avastha ke teeche n kee, kyonki yahova ne israaael kee ginatee akash ke taron ke barabar baddhane ke liye kaha tha." 
1Chronicles27:24 sarooyah ka putra yoab ginatee lene laga, par nipatta n saka kyonki ishvar ka krodha israaael par bhdka, aur yah ginatee raja daud ke itihas men naheen likhee gai." 
1Chronicles27:25 fir adeeael ka putra ajamavet raj bhndaron ka adhaikaree tha, aur dehat aur nagaron aur ganvon aur gaddhon ke bhndaron ka anaikaree ujjaiyyah ka putra yahonatan tha." 
1Chronicles27:26 aur jo boomi ko jotakar bokar khetee karate the, unaka adhaikaree kaloob ka putra aejraee tha." 
1Chronicles27:27 aur dakh kee baariyon ka aadhaikaree ramai shaimee aur dakh kee baariyon kee upaj jo dakhmadha ke bhndaron men rakhne ke liye thee, usaka aadhaikaree shaapamee jabdee tha." 
1Chronicles27:28 or neeche ke desh ke jalapai aur goolar ke vrakshaen ka adhaikaree gaderee balhanan tha aur tel ke bhndaron ka adhaikaree yoash tha. 
1Chronicles27:29 aur shaaron men charanevale gaya-baailon ka adhaikaree shaaronee shaitrau tha aur taraiyon ke gaya-baailon ka aadhaikaree adalaai ka putra shaapat tha. 
1Chronicles27:30 aur untton ka aadhaikaree ishmaaelee obeel aur gadaahiyon ka aadhaikaree meronotavasee yehadayaha. 
1Chronicles27:31 aur bhaid-bakaariyon ka aadhaikaree hagraee yajeej tha. ye hee sab raja daud ke dhan sammattai ke adhaikaree the. 
1Chronicles27:32 aur daud ka bhteeja yonatan aek samajhdar mantraee aur shaasree tha, aur kisee hakmonee ka putra aeheeael rajaputraen ke sang raha karata tha." 
1Chronicles27:33 aur aheetopel raja ka mantraee tha, aur aerekee hooshau raja ka mitra tha." 
1Chronicles27:34 aur yaheetopel ke bad banayah ka putra yahoyada aur aeyyatar mantraee ttharaae gaae. aur raja ka pradhaan senapati yoab tha. 
1Chronicles28:1 aur daud ne israaael ke sab haakimon ko arthata gotraen ke haakimon aur raja kee seva tthal karanevale dalon ke haakimon ko aur sahasrapatiyon aur shatapaatiyon aur raja aur usake putraen ke pashu aadi sab dhan sampattai ke adhaikaariyo, saradaron aur veeron aur sab shooraveeron ko yarooshalem men bulavaya." 
1Chronicles28:2 tab daud raja khda hokar kahane laga, he mere bhaiyon! aur he meree praja ke logo! meree suno, meree manasa to thee ki yahova kee vacha ke sandook ke liye aur ham logon ke parameshvar ke charanon kee peeddhee ke liye vishraam ka aek bhvan banau, aur maain ne usake banane kee taaiyaree kee thee." 
1Chronicles28:3 parantu parameshvar ne mujh se kaha, too mere nam ka bhvan banane n paaega, kyonaki too yuddh karanevala haai aur too ne lohoo bahaya haai." 
1Chronicles28:4 taubhee israaael ke parameshvar yahova ne mere pita ke sare gharane men se mujhee ko chun liya, ki israaael ka raja sada bana rahoon arthata us ne yahooda ko pradhaan hone ke liye aur yahooda ke gharane men se mere pita ke gharane ko chun liya aur mere pita ke putraen men se vah mujhee ko sare israaael ka raja banane ke liye prasann hua." 
1Chronicles28:5 aur mere sab putraen men se yahova ne to mujhe bahut putra diae haain us ne mere putra sulaaiman ko chun liya haai, ki vah israaael ke upar yahova ke rajy kee gaee par viraje." 
1Chronicles28:6 aur us ne mujh se kaha, ki tera putra sulaaiman hee mere bhvan aur anganon ko banaaega, kyonki maain ne usako chun liya haai ki mera putra tthare, aur maain usaka pita ttharoonga." 
1Chronicles28:7 aur saadi vah meree agyaaon aur niyamon ke manane men aj kal kee nai draddh rahe, to maain usaka rajy sada sthiar rakoonga." 
1Chronicles28:8 isaliye ab israaael ke dekhte arthatayahova kee mandlee ke dekhte, aur apane parameshvar ke samhane, apane parameshvar yahova kee sab agyaaon ko mano aur un par dhyan karate raho taaki tum is achchhe desh ke aadhaikaree bane raho, aur ise apane bad apane vansh ka sada ka bhag hone ke liye chhod jao." 
1Chronicles28:9 aur he mere putra sulaaiman! too apane pita ke parameshvar ka gyaan rak, aur khre man aur prasann jeev se usakee seva karata raha kyonki yahova man ko janchata aur vichar men jo kuchh utpann hota haai use samajhta haai. yaadi too usakee khoj men rahe, to vah tujh ko milega parantu yadi too usako tyag de to vah sada ke liye tujh ko chhod dega." 
1Chronicles28:10 ab chaukas rah, yahova ne tujhe aek aeesa bhvan banane ko chun liya haai, jo pavitrasthan ttharega, hiyav bandhakar is kam men lag ja." 
1Chronicles28:11 tab daud ne apane putra sulaaiman ko mandair ke osare, kottariyo, bhndaron attariyo, bheetaree kottariyo, aur praayashchait ke ddhkane se sthan ka namoona," 
1Chronicles28:12 aur yahova ke bhvan ke anganon aur charon or kee kottariyo, aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke bhndaron aur vavitra kee hui vastuon ke bhndaron ke, jo jo namoone ishvar ke atma kee praerana se usako mile the, ve sab de diae." 
1Chronicles28:13 fir yajakon aur lebiyon ke dalo, aur yahova ke bhvan kee seva ke sab kamo, aur yahova ke bhvan kee seva ke sab saman," 
1Chronicles28:14 arthatasab prakar kee seva ke liye sone ke patraen ke nimitt sona taulakar, aur sab prakar kee seva ke liye chandee ke patron ke nimitt chandee taulakar," 
1Chronicles28:15 aur sone kee deevatton ke liye, aur unake deepakon ke liye praati aek aek deevat, aur usake deepakon ka sona taulakar aur chandee ke deevatton ke liye aek aek deevat, aur usake deepak kee chandee, prati aek aek deevatt ke kam ke anusar taulakar," 
1Chronicles28:16 or bhentt kee rottee kee mejon ke liye aek aek mej ka sona taulakar, aur jandee kee mejon ke liye chandee," 
1Chronicles28:17 aur chokhe sone ke kantto, kattoron aur pyalon aur sone kee kattoriyon ke liye aek aek kattoree ka sona taulakar, aur chandee kee kattoriyon ke liye aek aek kattoree kee chandee taulakar," 
1Chronicles28:18 aur dhoop kee vedee ke liye tapaya hua sona taulakar, aur rath arthta yahova kee vacha ka sandook ddhankanevale aur pankh faailaae huae karoobon ke namoone ke liye sona de diya." 
1Chronicles28:19 maain ne yahova kee shaktai se jo mujh ko milee, yah sab kuchh bajhkar likh diya haai." 
1Chronicles28:20 fir daud ne apane putra sulaaiman se kaha, hiyav bandha aur draddh hokar is kam men lag ja. mat dr, aur tera man kachcha n ho, kyonki yahova parameshvar jo mera parameshvar haai, vah tere sang haai aur jab tak yahova ke bhvan men jitana kam karana ho vah n ho chuke, tab tak vah n to tujhe dhaekha dega aur n tujhe tyagega." 
1Chronicles28:21 aur dekh parameshvar ke bhvan ke sab kam ke liye jajakon aur leaviyon ke dal ttharaae gaae haai, aur sab prakar kee seva ke liye sab prakar ke kam prasannata se karanevale buaddhiman purush bhee tera sath denge aur hakim aur saree praja ke log bhee jo kuchh too kahega vahee karenge." 
1Chronicles29:1 fir raja daud ne saree sabha se kaha, mera putra sulaaiman sukumar ladka haai, aur keval usee ko parameshvar ne chuna haai kam to bharee haai, kyonki yah bhvan manushy ke liye nahee, yahova parameshvar ke liye banega." 
1Chronicles29:2 maain ne to apanee shaktai bhr, apane parameshvar ke bhvan ke nimitt sone kee vastuon ke liye sona, chandee kee vastuon ke liye chanee, peetal kee vastuon ke liye peetal, lohe kee vastuon ke liye loha, aur lakadee kee vastuon ke liye lakadee, aur sulaaimanee patthr, aur jadne ke yogy manai, aur pachchee ke kam ke liye radg radg ke nag, aur sab bhanti ke manai aur bahut sangamarmar ikattha kiya haai." 
1Chronicles29:3 fir mera man apane parameshvar ke bhvan men laga haai, is karan jo kuchh maain ne pavitra bhvan ke liye ikattha kiya haai, us sab se adhaik maain apana nij dhan bhee jo sona chandee ke roop men mere pas haai, apane parameshvar ke bhvan ke liye de deta hoo." 
1Chronicles29:4 arthata teen hajar kikkar opeer ka sona, aur sat hajar kikkar tapai hui chandee, jis se kottariyon kee bheeten maddhee jaaen." 
1Chronicles29:5 aur sone kee vastuon ke liye sona, aur chandee kee vastuon ke liye chandee, aur kareegaron se bananevale sab prakar ke kam ke liye maain use deta hoo. aur kaun apanee ichchha se yahova ke liye apane ko arpan kar deta haai?" 
1Chronicles29:6 tab pitaron ke gharanon ke pradhaanon aur israaael ke gotraen ke hakimon aur sahasrapatiyon aur shatapaatiyon aur raja ke kam ke adhaikaariyoen ne apanee apanee ichchha se," 
1Chronicles29:7 parameshvar ke bhvan ke kam ke liye panch hajar kikkar aur das hajar darkanon sona, das hajar kikkar chandee, attarah hajar kikkar peetal, aur aek lakh kikkar loha de diya." 
1Chronicles29:8 aur jinake pas manai the, unhon ne unhen yahova ke bhvan ke khjane ke liye geshanee yaheeael ke hatha men de diya." 
1Chronicles29:9 tab praja ke log anaandait hua, kyonki hakimon ne prasann hokar khre man aur apanee apanee ichchha se yahova ke liye bhentt dee thee aur daud raja bahut hee anandait hua." 
1Chronicles29:10 tab daud ne saree sabha ke sammukh yahova ka dhanyavad kiya, aur daud ne kaha, he yahova! he hamare mool purush israaael ke parameshvar! anadikal se anantakal tak too dhany haai." 
1Chronicles29:11 he yahova! mahima, parakram, shaebha, samathrya aur vibhv, tera hee haai kyonki akash aur prathvee men jo kuchh haai, vah tera hee haai he yahova! rajy tera haai, aur too sabhon ke upar mukhy aur mahan tthara haai." 
1Chronicles29:12 dhan aur maahima teree or se milatee haai, aur too sabhon ke upar prabhuta karata haai. samathrya aur parakram tere hee hath men haai, aur sab logon ko baddhana iaur bal dena tere hath men haai." 
1Chronicles29:13 isaliye ab he hamare parameshvar! ham tera dhnyavad aur tere maahimayukt nam kee stuti karate haain. 
1Chronicles29:14 maain kya hoo? aur meree praja kya haai? ki ham ko is reeti se apanee ichchha se tujhe bhentt dene kee shaaktai mile? tujhee se to sab kuchh milata haai, aur ham ne tere hath se pakar tujhe diya haai." 
1Chronicles29:15 teree drashtti men ham to apane sab purakhaon kee nai paraae aur paradeshaee haain prathvee par hamare din chhaya kee nai beete jate haai, aur hamara kuchh ttkaiana naheen." 
1Chronicles29:16 he hamare parameshvar yahova! vah jo bada sanchay ham ne tere paavitra nam ka aek bhvan banane ke liye kiya haai, vah tere hee hath se hame mila tha, aur sab tera hee haai." 
1Chronicles29:17 aur he mere parameshvar! maain janata hoo ki too man ko janchata haai aur sidhaai se prasann rahata haai maain ne to yah sab kuchh man kee sidhaai aur apanee ichchha se diya haai aur ab maain ne anand se dekha haai, ki teree praja ke log jo yahan upasthiat haai, vah apanee ichchha se tere liye bhentt dete haain." 
1Chronicles29:18 he yahova! he hamare purakha ibraaheem, isahak aur israaael ke parameshvar! apanee praja ke man ke vicharon men yah bat banaae rakh aur unake man apanee or lagaae rakh." 
1Chronicles29:19 aur mere putra sulaaiman ka man aeesa khra kar de ki vah teree agyaaon chitauaniyon aur vidhaiyon ko manata rahe aur yah sab kuchh kare, aur us bhvan ko banaa, jisakee taaiyaree maain ne kee haai." 
1Chronicles29:20 tab daud ne saree sabha se kaha, tum apane parameshvar yahova ka dhanyavad karo. tab sabha ke sab logon ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ka dhanyavad kiya, aur apana apana sir jhukakar yahova ko aur raja ko dandvat kiya." 
1Chronicles29:21 aur doosare din unhon ne yahova ke liye baalidan kia, arthata adhan samet aek hajar baail, aek hajar meddhe aur aek hajar bhed ke bachche homabaali karake chaddhaa, aur sab israaael ke liye bahut se melabali chaddhaae. usee din yahova ke samhane unhon ne bade anand se khaya aur piya." 
1Chronicles29:22 fir unhon ne daud ke putra sulaaiman ko doosaree bar raja ttharakar yahova kee or se pradhaan hone ke liye usaka aur yajak hone ke liye sadok ka abhaishok kiya. 
1Chronicles29:23 tab sulaaiman apane pita daud ke sthan par raja hokar yahova ke sinhasan par virajane laga aur bhagyavan hua, aur israaael usake adhaeen hua." 
1Chronicles29:24 aur sab haakimon aur shooraveeron aur raja daud ke sab putraen ne sulaaiman raja kee adhaeenata angeekar kee. 
1Chronicles29:25 aur yahova ne sulaaiman ko sab israaael ke dekhte bahut baddhaya, aur use aeesa rajakeey aeeshvarya diya, jaaisa us se paahile israaael ke kisee raja ka n hua tha." 
1Chronicles29:26 is prakar yihau ke putra daud ne sare israaael ke upar rajy kiya. 
1Chronicles29:27 aur usake israaael par rajy karane ka samay chalees varsha ka tha us ne sat varsha to hebraen men aur taaintees varsha yarooshalem men rajy kiya. 
1Chronicles29:28 aur vah poore booddhape kee avastha men deegharayu hokar aur dhan aur vibhv, manamana bhogakar mar gaya aur usaka putra sulaaiman usake sthan par raja hua." 
1Chronicles29:29 aadi se ant tak raja daud ke sab kamon ka vrattant," 
1Chronicles29:30 aur usake sab rajy aur parakram ka, aur us par aur israaael par, varan desh desh ke sab rajyon par jo kuchh beeta, isaka bhee vrattant shamooael dasha aur natan nabee aur gad dasha kee pustakon men likha hua haai." 
2Chronicles1:1 daud ka putra sulaaiman rajy men sthiar ho gaya, aur usaka parameshvar yahova usake sang raha aur usako bahut hee baddhaya." 
2Chronicles1:2 aur sulaaiman ne sare israaael se, arthata sahasrapaatiyo, shatapatiyo, nyaayiyon aur israaael ke sab raison se jo pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purush the, baten keen." 
2Chronicles1:3 aur sulaaiman pooree mandlee samet gibon ke unche sthan par gaya, kyonaki parameshvar ka milapavala tambo, jise yahova ke das moosa ne jangal men banaya tha, vah vaheen par tha." 
2Chronicles1:4 parantu parameshvar ke sandook ko daud kiryatyareem se us sthan par le aya tha jise us ne usake liye taaiyar kiya tha, us ne to usake liye yarooshalem men aek tamboo khda karaya tha." 
2Chronicles1:5 aur peetal kee jo vedee uree ke putra basalel ne, jo hoor ka pota tha, banai thee, vah gibon men yahova ke nivas ke samhane thee. isaaliye sulaaiman mandlee samet usake pas gaya." 
2Chronicles1:6 aur sulaaiman ne vaheen us peetal kee vedee ke pas jakar, jo yahova ke samhane milapavale tamboo ke pas thee, us par aek hajar homabaali chadaae." 
2Chronicles1:7 usee din rat ko parameshvar ne sulaaiman ko darshan dekar us se kaha, jo kuchh too chahe ki maain tujhe doo, vah manga." 
2Chronicles1:8 sulaaiman ne parameshvar se kaha, too mere pita daud par badee karuna karata raha aur mujh ko usake sthan par raja banaya haai." 
2Chronicles1:9 ab he yahova parameshvar! jo bachan too ne mere pita daud ko diya tha, vah poora ho too ne to mujhe aeesee praja ka raja banaya haai jo boomi kee dhooli ke kinakon ke saman bahut haai." 
2Chronicles1:10 ab mujhe aeesee buaddhi aur gyaan de, ki maain is praja ke samhane andara- bahar ana-jana kar sakoo, kyonki kaun aeesa haai ki teree itanee badee praja ka nyay kar sake?" 
2Chronicles1:11 parameshvar ne sulaaiman se kaha, teree jo aeesee hee manasa hui, arthat too ne n to dhan sampattai mangee haai, n aeeshvaryaaur n apane baaiariyon ka praan aur n apanee deegharayu mangee, keval buaddhi aur gyaan ka var manga haai, jis se too meree praja ka jisake upar maain ne tujhe raja niyukt kiya haai, nyay kar sake," 
2Chronicles1:12 is karan buddhi aur gyaaan tujhe diya jata haai. aur maain tujhe itana dhan sampaattai aur aeeshvarya doonga, jitana n to tujh se paahile kisee raja ko, mila aur n tere bad kisee raja ko milega." 
2Chronicles1:13 tab sulaaiman gibon ke unche sthan se, arthata milapavale tamboo ke samhane se yarooshalem ko aya aur vahan israaael par rajy karane laga." 
2Chronicles1:14 fir sulaaiman ne rath aur savar ikatthe kar liye aur usake chaudah sau rath aur barah hajar savar the, aur unako us ne rathon ke nagaron me, aur yarooshalem men raja ke pas tthara rakha." 
2Chronicles1:15 aur raja ne aeesa kiya, ki yarooshalem men sone-chandee ka mooly bahutayat ke karan patthron ka sa, aur devadaron ka mooly neeche ke desh ke goolaron ka sa bana diya." 
2Chronicles1:16 aur jo ghaede sulaaiman rakhta tha, ve misra se ate the, aur raja ke yyaparee unhen jhund ke jhund ttharaae huae dam par liya karate the." 
2Chronicles1:17 aek rath to chh sau shokel chandee par, aur aek ghaeda deddh sau shokel par misra se ata tha aur isee dam par ve hittaiyon ke sab rajaon aur aram ke rajaon ke liye unheen ke dara laya karate the." 
2Chronicles2:1 aur sulaaiman ne yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan aur apana rajabhvan banane ka vichar kiya. 
2Chronicles2:2 isaliae sulaaiman ne sattar hajar bojhyai aur assee hajar pahad se patthr kattnevale aur vraksha kattnevale, aur in par teen hajar chh sau mukhaiye ginatee karake ttharaae." 
2Chronicles2:3 tab sulaaiman ne sor ke raja hooram ke pas kahala bheja, ki jaaisa too ne mere pita daud se batrtav kiya, arthata usake rahane ka bhvan banane ko devadar bheje the, paaisa hee ab mujh se bhee batrtav kara." 
2Chronicles2:4 dek, maain apane parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banane par hoo, ki use usake liye paavitra karoon aur usake sammukh sugaandhiat dhoom jalau, aur nity bhentt kee rottee us men rakhee jaae aur pratidin sabere aur sanjh ko, aur vishraam aur naye chand ke dinon men aur hamare parameshvar yahova ke sab niyat pabban men homabali chaddhaya jaae. israaael ke liye aeesee hee sada kee vidhai haai." 
2Chronicles2:5 aur jo bhvan maain banane par hoo, vah mahan hoga kyonki hamara parameeshvar sab devataon men mahan haai." 
2Chronicles2:6 parantu kis kee itanee shaktai haai, ki usake liye bhvan banaa, vah to svarga men varan sab se unche svarga men bhee naheen samata? maain kya hoo ki usake samhane dhoop jalane ko chhod aur kisee manasa se usaka bhvan banaun?" 
2Chronicles2:7 so ab too mere pas aek aeesa manushy bhej de, jo sone, chandee, peetal, lohe aur baainjanee, lal aur neele kapade kee kareegaree men nipun ho aur nakkashaee bhee janata ho, ki vah mere pita daud ke ttharaae huae nipun panushyon ke sath hokar jo mere pas yahooda aur yarooshalem men rahate haai, kam kare." 
2Chronicles2:8 fir labanon se mere pas devadar, sanovar aur chandan kee lakadee bhejana, kyonaki maain janata hoo ki tere das labanon men vraksha kattna janate haai, aur tere dason ke sang mere das bhee rahakar," 
2Chronicles2:9 mere liye bahut see lakadee taaiyar karenge, kyonki jo bhvan maain banana chahata hoo, vah bada aur achambhe ke yogy hoga." 
2Chronicles2:10 aur tere das jo lakadee kattenge, unako maain bees hajar kor kootta hua ganhoo, bees hajar kor jav, bees hajar bat dakhmadha aur bees hajar bat tel doonga." 
2Chronicles2:11 tab sor ke raja hooram ne chitthee likhkar sulaaiman ke pas bhejee, ki yahova apanee praja se praem rakhta haai, is se us ne tujhe unaka raja kar diya." 
2Chronicles2:12 fir hooram ne yah bhee likha ki dhany haai israaael ka parameshvar yahova, jo akash aur prathvee ka srajanahar haai, aur us ne daud raja ko aek buaddhiman, chatur aur samajhdar putra diya haai, taki vah yahova ka aek bhvan aur apana rajabhvan bhee banaae." 
2Chronicles2:13 isaliye ab maain aek buddhiman aur samajhdar purush ko, arthata hoorama-abee ko bhejata hoo," 
2Chronicles2:14 jo aek danee sree ka betta haai, aur usaka pita sor ka tha. aur vah sone, chandee, peetal, lohe, patthr, lakadee, baainjanee aur neele aur lal aur sooksham san ke kapade ka kam, aur sab prakar kee nakkashaee ko janata aur sab bhanati kee kareegaree bana sakata haai so tere chatur manushyaen ke sang, aur mere prabhu tere pita daud ke chatur manushyon ke sang, usako bhee kam mile." 
2Chronicles2:15 aur mere prabhu ne jo gehoo, jav, tel aur dakhmadha bhejane kee charcha kee haai, use apane dason ke pas bhjaiva de." 
2Chronicles2:16 aur ham log jitanee lakadee ka tujhe prayojan ho utanee labanon par se kattenge, aur bede banavakar samudra ke marga se japa ko pahuchaaenge, aur too use yarooshalem ko le jana." 
2Chronicles2:17 tab sulaaiman ne israaaelee desh ke sab paradeashaiyon kee ginatee lee, yah us ginatee ke bad hui jo usake pita daud ne lee thee aur ve deddh lakh teen hajar chh sau purush nikale." 
2Chronicles2:18 un men se us ne sattar hajar bojhyai, assee hajar pahad par patthr kattnevale aur vraksha kattnevale aur teen hajar chh sau un logon se kam karanevale mukhaiye niyukt kie." 
2Chronicles3:1 tab sulaaiman ne yarooshalem men moriyyah nam pahad par usee sthan men yahova ka bhvan banana arambh kiya, jise usake pita daud ne darshan pakar yaboosee ornan ke khlihan men taaiyar kiya tha" 
2Chronicles3:2 us ne apane rajy ke chauthe varsha ke doosare maheene ke, doosare din ko banana arambh kiya." 
2Chronicles3:3 parameshvar ka jo bhvan sulaaiman ne banaya, usaka yah ddhv haai, arthata usakee lambai to praacheen kal kee nap ke anusar satt hat, aur usakee chaudai bees hath kee thee." 
2Chronicles3:4 aur bhvan ke samhane ke osare kee lambai to bhvan kee chaudai ke barabar bees hath kee aur usakee unchai aek sau bees hath kee thee. sulaaiman ne usako bheetar chokhe sone se maddhvaya. 
2Chronicles3:5 aur bhvan ke bade bhag kee chht us ne sanovar kee lakadee se pattvai, aur usako achchhe sone se maddhvaya, aur us par khjoor ke vraksha kee aur sankalon kee nakkashaee karai." 
2Chronicles3:6 fir shaebha dene ke liye us ne bhvan men manai jadvaae. aur yah sona pavaainm ka tha. 
2Chronicles3:7 aur us ne bhvan ko, arthata usakee kadiyo, devaaddhiyo, bheeton aur kivadon ko sone se maddhvaya, aur bheeton par karoob khudavaae." 
2Chronicles3:8 fir us ne bhvan ke paramapavitra sthan ko banaya usakee lambai to bhvan kee chaudai ke barabar bees hath kee thee, aur usakee chaudai bees hath kee thee aur us ne use chh sau kikkar chokhe sone se maddhvaya." 
2Chronicles3:9 aur sone kee keelon ka taul pachas shokel tha. aur us ne attariyon ko bhee sone se maddhvaya. 
2Chronicles3:10 fir bhvan ke paramapavitra sthan men usane nakkashaee ke kam ke do karoob banavaae aur ve sone se maddhvaae gaae. 
2Chronicles3:11 karoobon ke pankh to sab milakar bees hath lambe the, arthata aek karoob ka aek pankh panch hath ka aur bhvan kee bheet tak pahuncha hua tha aur usaka doosara pankh panch hath ka tha aur doosare karoob ke pankh se mila hua tha." 
2Chronicles3:12 aur doosare karoob ka bhee aek pankh panch hath ka aur bhvan kee doosaree bheet tak pahuncha tha, aur doosara pankh panch hath ka aur paahile karoob ke pankh se satta hua tha." 
2Chronicles3:13 in karoobon ke pankh bees hath faaile huae the aur ve apane apane panvon ke bal khde the, aur apana apana mukh bheetar kee or kiae huae the." 
2Chronicles3:14 fir us ne beechavale parde ko neele, baainjanee aur lal rang ke san ke kapade ka banavaya, aur us par karoob kaddhvaae." 
2Chronicles3:15 aur bhvan ke samhane us ne paaintees paaintees hath unche do khmbhe banavaa, aur jo kanganee aek aek ke upar thee vah panch panch hath kee thee." 
2Chronicles3:16 fir us ne bheetaree kottree men sankalen banavakar khmbhon ke upar lagai, aur aek sau anar bhee banakar sankalon par lattkaae." 
2Chronicles3:17 us ne in khmbhon ko maandair ke samhane, ek to usakee daahinee or aur doosara bai or khda karaya aur daahine khmbhe ka nam yakeen aur bayen khmbhe ka nam boaja rakha." 
2Chronicles4:1 fir us ne peetal kee aek vedee banai, usakee lambai aur chaudai bees bees hath kee aur unchai das hath kee thee." 
2Chronicles4:2 fir us ne aek ddhala hua haud banavaya jo chhor se chhor tak das hath tak chauda tha, usaka akar gol tha, aur usakee unchai panch hath kee thee, aur usake charon or ka ghor tees hath ke nap ka tha." 
2Chronicles4:3 aur usake tale, usake charon or, aek aek hath men das das baailon kee pratimaaen banee thee, jo haud ko ghore theen jab vah ddhala gaya, tab ye baail bhee do panti karake ddhale gaae." 
2Chronicles4:4 aur vah barah bane huae baailon par dhara gaya, jin men se teen uttar, teen paashchaim, teen daakkhian aur teen poorva kee or munh kiae huae the aur inake upar haud ghara tha, aur un sabhon ke pichhle ang bheetaree bhag men padte the." 
2Chronicles4:5 aur haud kee mottai chauva bhr kee thee, aur usaka mohada kattore ke mohade kee nai, sosan ke foolon ke kam se bana tha, aur us men teen hajar bat bhrakar samata tha." 
2Chronicles4:6 fir us ne dhaene ke liye das haudee banavakar, panch daahinee aur panch bai or rakh deen. un men homabali kee vastuen dhaei jatee thee, parantu yajakon ke dhaene ke lilaye bada haud tha." 
2Chronicles4:7 fir us ne sone kee das deevatt vidhai ke anusar banavai, aur panch dahinee or aur panch bai or maandair men rakhva deen." 
2Chronicles4:8 fir us ne das mej banavakar panch dahinee or aur pach bai or mandair men rakhva deen. aur us ne sone ke aek sau kattore banavaae. 
2Chronicles4:9 fir us ne yajakon ke angan aur bade angan ko banavaya, aur is angan men faattk banavakar unake kivadon par peetal maddhvaya." 
2Chronicles4:10 aur us ne haud ko bhvan kee dahinee or arthata poorva aur daakkhian ke kone kee or rakhva diya. 
2Chronicles4:11 aur hooram ne hando, faavaadiyo, aur kattoron ko banaya. aur hooram ne raja sulaaiman ke liye parameshvar ke bhvan men jo kam karana tha use nipatta diya" 
2Chronicles4:12 arthata do khmbhe aur golon samet ve kangaaniyan jo khmbhon ke siron par thee, aur khmbhon ke siron par ke golon ko ddhanpane ke liae jaliyon kee do do panti" 
2Chronicles4:13 aur donon jaliyon ke liye char sau anar aur jo gole khmbhon ke siron par the, unako ddhanpanevalee aek aek jalee ke liye anaron kee do do panati banai." 
2Chronicles4:14 fir us n kuarsiyan aur kuarsiyon par kee hauadiya," 
2Chronicles4:15 aur unake neeche ke barah baail banaae. 
2Chronicles4:16 fir hoorama-abee ne hando, faavaadiyo, kantton aur inake sab saman ko yahova ke bhvan ke liye raja sulaaiman kee agyaa se jhlakaae huae peetal ke banavaae." 
2Chronicles4:17 raja ne usako yaradan kee tarai men arthata sukkot aur saratan ke beech kee chikanee mitteevalee boomi men ddhlavaya. 
2Chronicles4:18 sulaaiman ne ye sab patra bahut banavaa, yahan tak ki peetal ke taul ka hisab n tha." 
2Chronicles4:19 aur sulaaiman ne parameshvar ke bhvan ke sab patra, sone kee vedee, aur ve mej jin par bhentt kee rottee rakhee jatee thee," 
2Chronicles4:20 aur deepakon samet chokhe sone kee deevatte, jo vidhai ke anusar bheetaree kottree ke samhane jala karateen theen." 
2Chronicles4:21 aur sone baran nire sone ke fool, deepak aur chimatte" 
2Chronicles4:22 aur chokhe sone kee kaainachiya, kattore, dhoopadan aur karachhe banavaae. fir bhvan ke dar aur param pavitra sthan ke bheetaree kivad aur bhvan arthata maandair ke kivad sone ke bane." 
2Chronicles5:1 is prakar sulaaiman ne yahova ke bhvan ke liye jo jo kam banavaya vah sab nipatt gaya. tab sulaaiman ne apane pita daud ke pavitra kiae huae sone, chandee aur sab patraen ko bheetar pahunchakar parameshvar ke bhvan ke bhaeadaron men rakhva diya." 
2Chronicles5:2 tab sulaaiman ne israaael ke puraniyon ko aur gotraen ke sab mukhy purusha, jo israaaeliyon ke pitaron ke gharanon ke pradhaan the, unako bhee yarooshalem men is manasa se ikattha kiya, ki ve yahova kee vacha ka sandook daudapur se arthata siyyon se upar liva le aaen." 
2Chronicles5:3 sab israaaelee purush sataven maheene ke parva ke samay raja ke pas ikatthe hue. 
2Chronicles5:4 jab israaael ke sab puraaniye aa, tab leviyon ne sandook ko utta liya." 
2Chronicles5:5 aur leveey yajak sandook aur milap ka tamboo aur jitane pavitra patra us tamboo men the un sabhon ko upar le gaae. 
2Chronicles5:6 aur raja sulaaiman aur sab israaaelee mandlee ke log jo usake pas ikatthe huae the, unhon ne sandook ke samhane itanee bhed aur baail baali kia, jinakee ginatee aur hisab bahutayat ke karan n ho sakatee thee." 
2Chronicles5:7 tab yajakon ne yahova kee vacha ka sanadook usake sthan me, arthata bhvan kee bheetaree kottree men jo paramapavitra sthan haai, pahanchakar, karoobon ke pankhon ke tale rakh diya." 
2Chronicles5:8 sandook ke sthan ke upar karoob to pankh faailaae huae the, jisase ve upar se sandook aur usake dndon ko ddhanpe the." 
2Chronicles5:9 dnde to itane lambe the, ki unake sire sandook se nikale huae bheetaree kottree ke samhane dekh padte the, parantu bahar se ve dikhi n padte the. ve aj ke din tak vaheen haain." 
2Chronicles5:10 sandook men patthr kee un do pattyaiaon ko chhod kuchh n tha, jinhen moosa ne horeb men usake bheetar us samay rakha, jab yahova ne israaaeliyon ke misra se nikalane ke bad unake sath vacha bandhaee thee." 
2Chronicles5:11 jab yajak pavitrasthan se nikale jitane yajak upasthiat the, un sabhon ne to apane apane ko pavitra kiya tha, aur alag alag dalon men hokar seva n karate the" 
2Chronicles5:12 aur jitane leveey gavaaiye the, ve sab ke sab arthata mutraen aur bhiyon samet asap, heman aur yadootoon san ke vasr paahine jhanj, saranagiyan aur veenaaen liye hua, vedee ke poorva alang men khde the, aur unake sath aek sau bees yajak turahiyan baja rahe the." 
2Chronicles5:13 to jab turahiyan bajanevale aur ganevale aek svar se yahova kee stuti aur dhanyavad karane lage, aur turaahiya, jhanjh aadi baje bajate huae yahova kee yah stuati unche shabd se karane lage, ki vah bhla haai aur usakee karuna sada kee haai, tab yahova ke bhvan me badal chha gaya," 
2Chronicles5:14 aur badal ke karan yajak log seva-tthal karane ko khde n rah sake, kyonki yahova ka tej parameshvar ke bhvan men bhr gaya tha." 
2Chronicles6:1 tab sulaaiman kahane laga, yahova ne kaha tha, ki maain ghaer andhakar maain vas kiae rahoonga." 
2Chronicles6:2 parantu maain ne tere liye aek vasasthan varan aeesa draddh sthan banaya haai, jis men too yug yug rahe." 
2Chronicles6:3 aur raja ne israaael kee pooree sabha kee or munh faerakar usako ashaeervad diya, aur israaael kee pooree sabha khdee rahee." 
2Chronicles6:4 aur us ne kaha, dhany haai israaael ka parameshvar yahova, jis ne apane munh se mere pita daud ko yah vachan diya tha, aur apane hathon se ise poora kiya haai," 
2Chronicles6:5 ki jis din se maain apanee praja ko misra desh se nikal laya, tab se maain ne n to israaael ke kisee gotra ka koi nagar chuna jis men mere nam ke nivas ke liye bhvan banaya jaa, aur n koi manushy chuna ki vah meree praja israaael par pradhaan ho." 
2Chronicles6:6 parantu maain ne yarooshalem ko isaaliye chuna haai, ki mera nam vahan ho, aur daud ko chun liya haai ki vah meree praja israaael par pradhaan ho." 
2Chronicles6:7 mere pita daud kee yah manasa thee ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banavaae. 
2Chronicles6:8 parantu yahova ne mere pita daud se kaha, teree jo manasa haai ki yahova ke nam ka aek bhvan banaa, aeesee manasa karake noo ne bhla to kiya" 
2Chronicles6:9 taubhee too us bhvan ko banane n paaega tera jo nij putra hoga, vahee mere nam ka bhvan banaaega." 
2Chronicles6:10 yah vachan jo yahova ne kaha tha, use us ne poora bhee kiya haai or maain apane pita daud ke sthan par uttkar yahova ke vachan ke anusar israaael kee gaee par virajaman hoo, aur israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke nam ke is bhvan ko banaya haai." 
2Chronicles6:11 aur is men maain ne us sandook ko rakh diya haai, jis men yahova kee vah vacha haai, jo us ne israaaeliyon se bandhaee thee." 
2Chronicles6:12 tab vah israaael kee saree sabha ke dekhte yahova kee vedee ke samhane khda hua aur apane hath faailaae. 
2Chronicles6:13 sulaaiman ne panch hath lambee, panch hath chaudee aur teen hath unchee peetal kee aek chaukee banakar angan ke beech rakhvai thee usee par khde hokar us ne sare israaael kee sabha ke samane ghauttne ttekakar svarga kee or hath faailaae huae kaha," 
2Chronicles6:14 he yahova, he israaael ke parameshvar, tere saman n to svarga men aur n prathvee par koi ishvar haai tere jo das apane sare man se apane ko tere sammukh janakar jalate haai, unake liye too apanee vacha pooree karata aur karuna karata rahata haai." 
2Chronicles6:15 too ne jo vachan mere pita daud ko diya tha, usaka too ne palan kiya haai jaaisa too ne apane munh se kaha tha, vaaisa hee apane hath se usako hamaree ankhon ke samhane poora bhee kiya haai." 
2Chronicles6:16 isaliye ab he israaael ke parameshvar yahova is vachan ko bhee moora kar, jo too ne apane das mere pita daud ko diya tha, ki tere kul men mere samhane israaael kee gaee par virajanevale sada bane rahenge, yah ho ki jaaise too apane ko mere sammukh janakar chalata raha, vaaise hee tere vansh ke log apanee chal chalan men aeesee chaukasee kare, ki meree yyavastha par chalen." 
2Chronicles6:17 ab he israaael ke parameshvar yahova jo vachan too ne apane das daud ko diya t, vah savcha kiya jaae." 
2Chronicles6:18 parantu kya parameshvar sachamuch manushyon ke sang puthvee par vas karega? svarga men varan sab se unche svarga men bhee too naheen samata, fir mere banaae huae is bhvan men too kyonkar samaaega?" 
2Chronicles6:19 taubhee he mere parameshvar yahova, apane das kee praarthna aur gidgidahatt kee or dhyan de aur meree pukar aur yah praarthna sun, jo maain tere samhane kar raha hoo." 
2Chronicles6:20 vah yah haai ki teree ankhen is bhvan kee or, arthta isee sthan kee or jisake vishay men too ne kaha haai ki maain us men apana nam rakoonga, rat din khulee rahe, aur jo praarthna tera das is sthan kee or kare, use too sun le." 
2Chronicles6:21 aur apane das, aur apanee praja israaael kee praarthna jisako ve is sthan kee or munh kiae huae gidgidakar kare, use sun lena svarga men se jo tera nivasasthan haai, sun lena aur sunakar kshama karana." 
2Chronicles6:22 jab koi kisee doosare ka aparadha kare aur usako shapath khailai jaa, aur vah akar is bhvan men teree vedee ke samhane shapath khaa," 
2Chronicles6:23 tab too svarga men se sunana aur manana, aur apane dason ka nyay karake dushtt ko badala dena, aur usakee chal usee ke sir laaitta dena, aur nidash ko nidash ttharakar, usake dharma ke anusar usako fal dena." 
2Chronicles6:24 fir yadi teree praja israaael tere viruddh pap karane ke karan apane shatrauon se har jaae, aur teree or firaka tera nam mane, aur is bhvan men tujh se praarthna aur gidgidahatt kare," 
2Chronicles6:25 to too svarga men se sunana aur apanee praja israaael ka pap kshama karana, aur unhen is desh men lautta le ana jise too ne unako aur unake purakhaon ko diya haai." 
2Chronicles6:26 jab ve tere viruddh pap kare, aur is karan akash itana band ho jaae ki vashara n ho, aeese samay yaadi ve is sthan kee or praarthna karake tere nam ko mane, aur too jo unhen dukh deta haai, is karan ve apane pap se fire," 
2Chronicles6:27 to too svarga men se sunana, aur apane dason aur apanee praja israaael ke pap ko kshama karana too jo unako vah bhla marga dikhata haai jis par unhen chalana chahiye, isaliye apane is desh par jise too ne apanee praja ka bhag karake diya haai, panee barasa dena." 
2Chronicles6:28 jab is desh men kal va maree va jhulas ho va gerui va ttiiddayan va keede lage, va unake shatra unake desh ke faattkon men unhen ghor rakhe, va koi vipaattai va rog ho" 
2Chronicles6:29 tab yaadi koi manushy va teree saree praja israaael jo apana apana dukh aur apana apana khed jan kar aur gidgidahatt ke sath praarthna karake apane hath is bhvan kee or faailaae 
2Chronicles6:30 jo too apane svagay nivasasthan se sunakar kshama karana, aur aek aek ke man kee janakar usakee chal ke anusar use fal dena too hee to adamiyon ke man ka jananevala haai" 
2Chronicles6:31 ki ve jitane din is desh men rahe, jise too ne unake purakhaon ko diya tha, utane din tak tera bhy manate huae tere magan par chanate rahen." 
2Chronicles6:32 fir paradeshaee bhee jo teree praja israaael ka n ho, jab vah tere bade nam aur balavant hath aur baddhai hui bhuja ke karan door desh se aa, aur akar is bhvan kee or munh kiae huae praarthna kare," 
2Chronicles6:33 tab too apane svagay nivasasthan men se sune, aur jis bat ke liye aeesa paradeshaee tujhe pukare, usake anusar karana jis se puthvee ke sab deshaen ke log tera nam janakar, teree praja israaael kee nai tera bhy manen aur nishchay kare, ki yah bhvan jo maain ne banaya haai, vah tera hee kahalata haain." 
2Chronicles6:34 jab teree praja ke log jahan kaheen too unhen bheje vahan apane shatrauon se ladai karane ko nikal jaae, aur is nagar kee or jise too ne chuna haai, aur is bhvan kee or jise maain ne tere nam ka banaya haai, munh kiae huae tujh se praarthna kare," 
2Chronicles6:35 tab too svarga men se unakee praarthna aur gidgidahatt sunana, aur unaka nyay karana." 
2Chronicles6:36 nishpap to koi manushy naheen haai, yaadi ve bhee tere viruddh pap karen aur too un par kop karake unhen shatrauon ke hath kar de, aur ve unheen bandhaua karake kisee desh ko, chahe vah door ho, chahe nikat, le jaae," 
2Chronicles6:37 to yaadi ve bandhauai ke desh men soch vichar kare, aur firakar apanee bandhauai karanevalon ke desh men tujh se gidgidakar kahe, ki ham ne pap kiya, aur kuattlaita aur dooshttta kee haai" 
2Chronicles6:38 so yaadi ve apanee bandhauai ke desh men jahan ve unhen bandhaua karake le gaae hon apane poore man aur sare jeev se teree or fire, aur apane is desh kee or jo too ne unake purakhaon ko diya tha, aur is nagar kee or jise too ne chuna haai, aur is bhvan kee or jise maain ne tere nam ka banaya haai, munh kiae huae tujh se praarthna kare," 
2Chronicles6:39 to too apane svagay nivasasthan men se unakee praarthna aur gidgidahatt sunana, aur unaka nyay karana aur jo pap teree praja ke log tere viruddh kare, unhen kshama karana." 
2Chronicles6:40 aur he mere parameshvar! jo praarthna is sthan men kee jaae usakee or apanee ankhen khole rah aur apane kan lagaae rakh. 
2Chronicles6:41 ab he yahova parameshvar, uttkar apane samathrya ke sandook samet apane vishraamasthan men a, he yahova parameshvar tere yajak uddhararoopee vasr paahine rahe, aur tere bhkt log bhlai ke karan anand karate rahen." 
2Chronicles6:42 he yahova parameshvar, apane abhaishaikt kee praarthna ko anasunee n kar, too apane das daud par kee gai karuna ke kam smaran rakh." 
2Chronicles7:1 jab sulaaiman yah praarthna kajuka, tab svarga se ag ne girakar homabaliyon tatha aur baliyon ko bhsm kiya, aur yahova ka tej bhvan men bhr gaya." 
2Chronicles7:2 aur yajak yahova ke bhvan men pravesh n kar sake, kyonaki yahova ka tej yahova ke bhvan men bhr gaya tha." 
2Chronicles7:3 aur jab ag giree aur yahova ka tej bhvan par chha gaya, tab sab israaaelee dekhte rahe, aur farsha par jhukakar apana apana munh boomi kee or kiae huae dandvat kiya, aur yon kahakar yahova ka dhanyavad kiya ki, vah bhla haai, usakee karuna sada kee haai." 
2Chronicles7:4 tab sab praja samet raja ne yahova ko bali chaddhai. 
2Chronicles7:5 aur raja sulaaiman ne bais hajar baail aur aek lakh bees hajar bhed -bakariyan chaddhai. yon pooree praja samet raja ne yahova ke bhvan kee pratishtta kee. 
2Chronicles7:6 aur yajak apana apana karya karane ko khde rahe, aur leveey bhee yahova ke geet ke gane ke liye baje liye hooae khde the, jinhen daud raja ne yahova kee sada kee karuna ke karan usaka dhanyavad karane ko banakar unake dara stuati karai thee aur inake samhane yajak log turaahiyan bajate rahe aur sab israaaelee kshade rahe." 
2Chronicles7:7 fir sulaaiman ne yahova ke bhvan ke samhane angan ke beech aek sthan vavitra karake homabaali aur melabaliyon kee chaba vaheen chaddhai, kyonki sulaaiman kee banai iui peetal kee bedee homabali aur annabali aur chaba ke liye chhottee thee." 
2Chronicles7:8 usee samay sulaaiman ne aur usake sang hamat kee ghaattee se lekar misra ke nale tak ke sare israael kee ek bahut badee sabha ne sat din tak parva ko mana. 
2Chronicles7:9 aur attven din ko unhon ne mahasabha kee, unhon ne vedee kee pratishtta sat din kee aur pavan ko bhee sat din mana." 
2Chronicles7:10 nidan sataven maheene ke teisaven din ko us ne praja ke logon ko vida kiya, ki ve apane apane dere ko jaae, aur ve us bhlai ke karan jo yahova ne daud aur sulaaiman aur apanee praja israaael par kee thee anandait the." 
2Chronicles7:11 yon sulaaiman yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ko bana chuka, aur yahova ke bhvan men aur apane bhvan men jo kuchh us ne banana chaha, us men usaka manorath poora hua." 
2Chronicles7:12 tab yahova ne rat men usako darshan dekar us se kaha, maain ne teree praarthana sunee aur is sthan ko yagya ke bhvan ke liye apanaya haai." 
2Chronicles7:13 yaadi maain akash ko aeesa band karoo, ki vashara n ho, va ttiidyon ko desh ujadne kee agyaa doo, va apanee praja men maree faailau," 
2Chronicles7:14 tab yaadi meree praja ke log jo mere kahalate haai, deen hokar praarthna karen aur mere darshan ke khojee hokar apanee buree chal se fire, to maain svarga men se sunakar unaka pap kshama karoonga aur unake desh ko jyon ka tyon kar doonga." 
2Chronicles7:15 ab se jo praarthna is sthan men kee jaaegee, us par meree ankhen khulee aur mere kan lage rahenge." 
2Chronicles7:16 aur ab maain ne is bhvan ko apanaya aur pavitra kiya haai ki mera nam sada ke liye is men bana rahe meree ankhen aur mera man donon nity yaheen lage rahenge. 
2Chronicles7:17 aur yaadi too apane pita daud kee nai apane ko mere sammukh janakar chalata rahe aur meree sab agyaaon ke anusar kiya kare, aur meree vidhaiyon aur niyamon ko manata rahe," 
2Chronicles7:18 to maain teree rajagaee ko sthiar rakoonga jaaise ki maain ne tere pita daud ke sath vacha bandhaee thee, ki tere kul men israaael par prabhuta karanevala sada bana rahega." 
2Chronicles7:19 parantu yadi tum log firo, aur meree vidhaiyon aur agyaaon ko jo maain ne tum ko dee haain tyago, aur jakar paraye devataon kee upasana karo aur unhen dandvat karo," 
2Chronicles7:20 to maain unako apane desh men se jo maain ne unako diya haai, jad se ukhaoonga aur is bhvan ko jo maain ne apane nam ke liye paavitra kiya haai, apanee drashtti se door karoonga aur aeesa karoonga ki desh desh ke logon ke beech usakee upama aur namadharai chalegee."
