2Chronicles7:21 aur yah bhvan jo itana vishaal haai, usake pas se ane janevale chaakit hokar poochhenge ki yahova ne is desh aur is bhvan se aeesa kyon kiya haai." 
2Chronicles7:22 tab log kahenge, ki un logon ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko jo unako misra desh se nikal laya tha, tyagakar paraye devataon ko grahan kiya, aur unhen dajhadvat kee aur unakee upasana kee, is karan us ne yah sab vipaattai un par dalee haai." 
2Chronicles8:1 sulaaiman ko yahova ke bhvan aur apane bhvan ke banane men bees varsha lage. 
2Chronicles8:2 tab jo nagar hooram ne sulaaiman ko diae the, unhen sulaaiman ne draddh karake un men israaaeliyon ko basaya." 
2Chronicles8:3 tab sulaaiman soba ke hamat ko jakar, us par jayavant hua." 
2Chronicles8:4 aur us ne tadamor ko jo jangal men haai, aur hamat ke sab bhndar nagaron ko draddh kiya." 
2Chronicles8:5 fir us ne uparavale aur neechevale donon bethoron ko shaharapanah aur faattkon aur bedon se draddh kiya. 
2Chronicles8:6 aur us ne balat ko aur sulaaiman ke jitane bhndar nagar the aur usake rathon aur savaron ke jitane nagar the unako, aur jo kuchh sulaaiman ne yarooshalem, labanon aur apane rajy ke sab desh men banana chaha, un sab ko banaya." 
2Chronicles8:7 hittaiyo, aemoriyo, parijjaiyo, hiyivayon aur yaboosiyon ke bache huae log jo israaael ke n the," 
2Chronicles8:8 unake vansh jo unake bad desh men rah gaa, aur jinaka israaealiyon ne ant n kiya tha, un men se to kitanon ko sulaaiman ne begar men rakha aur aj tak unakee vahee dasha haai." 
2Chronicles8:9 parantu israaaeliyon men se sulaaiman ne apane kam ke liye kisee ko das n banaya, ve to yoddha aur usake haakim, usake saradar aur usake rathen aur savaron ke pradhaan hue." 
2Chronicles8:10 aur sulaaiman ke saradaron ke pradhaan jo praja ke logon par prabhuta karanevale the, ve addhai sau the." 
2Chronicles8:11 fir sulaaiman firaun kee bettee ko daudapur men se us bhvan men le aya jo us ne usake liye banaya tha, kyonaki us ne kaha, ki jis jis sthan men yahova ka sandook aya haai, vah pavitra haai, isaaliye meree ranee israaael ke raja daud ke bhvan men n rahane paaegee." 
2Chronicles8:12 tab sulaaiman ne yahova kee us vedee par jo us ne osare ke age banai thee, yahova ko homabali chaddhai." 
2Chronicles8:13 vah moosa kee agyaa ke aur din din ke prayojan ke anusar, arthata vishraam aur naye chand aur praati varsha teen bar ttharaae huae pavan arthata akhmeeree rottee ke payrva, aur attvaron ke payrva, aur jhopadiyon ke payrva men baali chaddhaya karata tha." 
2Chronicles8:14 aur us ne apane pita daud ke niyam ke anusar yajakon kee sevakai ke liye unake dal ttharaa, aur leaviyon ko unake kamon par ttharaya, ki har aek din ke prayojan ke anusar ve yahova kee stuati aur yajakon ke samhane seva-tthal kiya kare, aur aek aek faattk ke pas darapalon ko dal dal karake tthara diya kyonaki parameshvar ke bhkt daud ne aeesee agyaa dee thee." 
2Chronicles8:15 aur raja ne bhndaron ya kisee aur bat men yajakon aur leaviyon ke liye jo jo agyaa dee thee, unhonne n ttala." 
2Chronicles8:16 aur sulaaiman ka sab kam jo us ne yahova ke bhvan kee nev dalane se lekar usake poora karane tak kiya vah tteek hua. nidan yahova ka bhvan poora hua. 
2Chronicles8:17 tab sulaaiman aesyonageber aur aelot ko gaya, jo aedom ke desh men samudra ke teer par haain." 
2Chronicles8:18 aur hooram ne usake pas apane jahajiyon ke dara jahaj aur samudra ke janakar mallah bhej dia, aur unhon ne sulaaiman ke jahaajiyon ke sang opeer ko jakar vahan se saddhe char sau kikkar sona raja sulaaiman ko la diya." 
2Chronicles9:1 jab shaeeba kee ranee ne sulaaiman kee keeattair sunee, tab vah kaattnai kattnai prashnon se usakee pareeksha karane ke liye yarooshalem ko chalee. vah bahut bharee dal aur masalon aur bahut sone aur manai se lade untt sath liye huae ai, aur sulaaiman ke pas pahunchakar usase apane man kee sab baton ke vishay baten keen." 
2Chronicles9:2 sulaaiman ne usake sab prashnon ka uttar diya, koi bat sulaaiman kee buaddhi se aeesee bahar n rahee ki vah use n bata sake." 
2Chronicles9:3 jab shaeeba kee ranee ne sulaaiman kee buaddhimanee aur usaka banaya hua bhvan 
2Chronicles9:4 aur usakee mej par ka bhojan dekha, aur usake karmacharee kis reeti baaittte aur usake tthaluae kis reeti khde rahate aur kaaise kaaise kapade paahine rahate haai, aur usake pilanevale kaaise haai, aur ve kaaise kapade paahine haai, aur vah kaaisee chaddhai haai jis se vah yahova ke bhvan ko jaya karata haai, jab us ne yah sab dekha, tab vah chakit ho gai." 
2Chronicles9:5 tab us ne raja se kaha, maain ne tere kamon aur buddhimanee kee jo keettair apane desh men sunee vah sach hee haai." 
2Chronicles9:6 parantu jab tak maain ne ap hee akar apanee ankhon se yah n dekha, tab tak maain ne unakee prateeti n kee parantu teree buaddhi kee adhaee badai bhee mujhe n batai gai thee too us keeattair se baddhkar haai jo maain ne sunee thee." 
2Chronicles9:7 dhany haain tere jan, dhany haain tere ye sevak, jo nity tere sammukh upaasthiat rahakar teree buddhi kee baten sunate haain." 
2Chronicles9:8 dhany haai tera parameshvar yahova, jo tujh se aeesa prasann hua, ki tujhe apanee rajagaee par isaaliye virajaman kiya ki too apane parameshvar yahova kee or se rajy kare tera parameshvar jo israaael se praem karake unhen sada ke liye sthir karana jahata t, usee karan us ne tujhe nyay aur dharma karane ko unaka raja bana diya." 
2Chronicles9:9 aur us ne raja ko aek sau bees kikkar sona, bahut sa sugandha drayy, aur maanai diae jaaise sugandhadrayy shaeeba kee ranee ne raja sulaaiman ko dia, vaaise dekhne men naheen aae." 
2Chronicles9:10 fir hooram aur sulaaiman donon ke jahajee jo oshaeer se sona late the, ve chandan kee lakadee aur maanai bhee late the." 
2Chronicles9:11 aur raja ne chandan kee lakadee se yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke liye chabootare aur gavaaiyon ke liye veenaaen aur saranagiyan banavai aeesee vastuaen us se paahile yahooda desh men n dekh padee theen 
2Chronicles9:12 aur shaeeba kee ranee ne jo kuchh chaha vahee raja sulaaiman ne usako usakee ichchha ke anusar diya yah us se aadhaik tha, jo vah raja ke pas le ai thee. tab vah apane janon samet apane desh ko lautt gai." 
2Chronicles9:13 jo sona prati varsha sulaaiman ke pas pahucha karata tha, usaka taul chh sau chhyaiasatt kikkar tha." 
2Chronicles9:14 yah us se aadhaik tha jo saudagar aur yyaparee late the aur arab desh ke sab raja aur desh ke adhaipaati bhee sulaaiman ke pas sona chandee late the. 
2Chronicles9:15 aur raja sulaaiman ne sona gaddhakar do sau badee badee ddhalen banavai aek aek ddhal men chhchhsau shokel gaddha hua sona laga. 
2Chronicles9:16 fir us ne sona gaddhakar teen sau chhottee ddhalen aur bhee banavai aek aek chhottee ddhal me teen sau shokel sona laga, aur raja ne unako labanonee ban namak bhvan men rakha diya." 
2Chronicles9:17 aur raja ne hatheedant ka aek bada sinhasan banaya aur chokhe sone se maddhaya. 
2Chronicles9:18 us sinhasan men chh seeaddhyaian aur sone ka ek pavadan tha ye sab sinhasan se jude the, aur baaittne ke sthan kee donoen alang ttek lagee thee aur donon ttekon ke pas ek ek sinh khda hua bana tha." 
2Chronicles9:19 aur chhhon seeddhiyon kee donon alang men aek aek sinh khda hua bana tha, ve sab barah hue. kisee rajy men aeesa kabhee n bana." 
2Chronicles9:20 aur raja sulaaiman ke peene ke sab patra sone ke the, aur labanonee ban namak bhvan ke sab patra bhee chokhe sone ke the sulaaiman ke dinon men chandee ka kuchh hisab n tha." 
2Chronicles9:21 kyonaki hooram ke jahaajiyon ke sang raja ke tashash ko janevale jahaj the, aur teen teen varsha ke bad ve tashash ke jahaj sona, chandee, hatheedant, bandar aur mor le ate the." 
2Chronicles9:22 yon raja sulaaiman dhan aur buaddhi men prathvee ke sab rajaon se baddhkar ho gaya. 
2Chronicles9:23 aur prathvee ke sab raja sulaaiman kee us buaddhi kee baten sunane ko jo parameshvar ne usake man men upajai theen usaka darshan karana chahate the. 
2Chronicles9:24 aur ve praati varsha apanee apanee bhentt arthata chandee aur sone ke patra, vasr-shasr, sugandhadrayy, ghaede aur khchchar le ate the." 
2Chronicles9:25 aur apane ghodon aur rathon ke liye sulaaiman ke char hajar than aur barah hajar savar bhee the, jinako us ne rathon ke nagaron men aur yarooshalem men raja ke pas tthara rakha." 
2Chronicles9:26 aur vah mahanad se le paalishtaiyon ke desh aur misra ke sivane tak ke sab rajaon par prabhuta karata tha. 
2Chronicles9:27 aur raja ne aeesa kiya, ki bahutayat ke karan yarooshalem men chandee ka mooly patthron ka aur devadar ka mooly neeche ke desh ke goolaron ka sa ho gaya." 
2Chronicles9:28 aur log misra se aur aur sab deshaen se sulaaiman ke liye ghaede late the. 
2Chronicles9:29 aadi se ant tak sulaaiman ke aur sab kam kya natan nabee kee pustak me, aur shaeelovasee ahiyyah kee taboovat kee pustak me, aur nabat ke putra yarobam ke vishay io dasha ke darshan kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Chronicles9:30 sulaaiman ne yarooshalem men sare israaael par chalees varsha tak rajy kiya. 
2Chronicles9:31 aur sulaaiman apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usako usake pita daud ke nagar men mittee dee gai aur usaka putra rahoobiyam usake sthan par raja hua. 
2Chronicles10:1 rahoobiyam shakem ko gaya, kyonaki sare israaaelee usako raja banane ke liye vaheen gaae the." 
2Chronicles10:2 aur nabat ke putra yarobam ne yah suna vah to misra men rahata tha, jahan vah sulaaiman raja ke dr ke mare bhag gaya tha, aur yarobam misra se lautt aya." 
2Chronicles10:3 tab unhon ne usako bulavap bheja so yarobam aur sab israaaelee akar rahoobiyam se kahane lage," 
2Chronicles10:4 tere pita ne to ham logon par bharee jooa dal rakha tha, isaaliye ab too apane pita kee kaattnai seva ko aur us bharee jooae ko jise us ne ham par dal rakha haai kuchh halaka kar, tab ham tere adhaeen rahenge." 
2Chronicles10:5 us ne un se kaha, teen din ke uparant mere pas fir ana, to ve chale gae." 
2Chronicles10:6 tab raja rahoobiyam ne un booddhon se jo usake pita sulaaiman ke jeevan bhr usake samhane apaasthit raha karate the, yah kahakar sammaati lee, ki is praja ko kaaisa uttar dena uchit haai, is men tum kya sammati dete ho?" 
2Chronicles10:7 unhon ne usako yah uttar diya, ki yadi too is praja ke logon se achchha batrtav karake unhen prasann kare aur un se madhaur baten kahe, to ve sada tere adhaeen bane rahenge." 
2Chronicles10:8 parantu us ne us sammati ko jo booddhon ne usako dee thee chhod diya aur un javanon se sammaati lee, jo usake sang bade huae the aur usake sammukh upaasthiat raha karate the." 
2Chronicles10:9 un se us ne poochha, maain praja ke logon ko kaaisa uttar doo, is men tum kya sammaati dete ho? unhon ne to mujh se kaha haai, ki jo jooa tere pita ne ham par dal rakha haai, use too halaka kara." 
2Chronicles10:10 javanon ne jo us ke sang bade huae the usako yah uttar diya, ki un lagon ne tujh se kaha haai, ki tere pita ne hamara jooa bharee kiya tha, parantu use hamare liye halaka kara too un se yon kahana, ki meree chhnigualiya mere pita kee kaatt ise bhee mottee ttharegee." 
2Chronicles10:11 mere mita ne tum par jo bharee jooa rakha tha, use maain aur bhee bharee karoonga mera pita to toom ko kodon se tadna deta tha, parantu maain bichchhuon se doonga." 
2Chronicles10:12 teesare din jaaise raja ne ttharaya tha, ki teesare din mere pas fir ana, vaaise hee yarobam aur saree praja rahoobiyam ke pas upasthiat hui." 
2Chronicles10:13 tab raja ne us se kadee baten kee, aur rahoobiyam raja ne booddhon kee dee hui sammati chhodkar" 
2Chronicles10:14 javanon kee sammaati ke anusar un se kaha, mere pita ne to tumhara jooa bharee kar diya, parantu maain use aur bhee kattnai kar doonga mere pita ne to tum ko kodon se tadna dee, parantu maain bichchhuon se tadna doonga." 
2Chronicles10:15 is prakar raja ne praja kee binatee n manee isaka karan yah haai, ki jo vachan yahova ne shaeelovasee aahiyyah ke dara nabat ke putra yarobam se kaha tha, usako poora karane ke liye parameshvar ne aeesa hee ttharaya tha." 
2Chronicles10:16 jab sab israaaeliyon ne dekha ki raja hamaree naheen sunata, tab ve bole ki daud ke sath hamara kya ansha? hamara to yishau ke putra men koi bhag naheen haai. he israaaeliyo, apane apane dere ko chale jao. ab he daud, apane hee gharane kee chinta kara." 
2Chronicles10:17 tab sab israaaelee apane dere ko chale gaae. keval jitane israaaelee yahooda ke nagaron men base huae the, unheen par rahoobiyam rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles10:18 tab raja rahoobiyam ne hadoram ko jo sab begaron par aadhaikaree tha bhej diya, aur israaaeliyon ne usako patthravah kiya aur vah mar gaya. tab rahoobiyam fauta se apane rath par chaddhkar, yarooshalem ko bhag gaya." 
2Chronicles10:19 yon israaael daud ke gharane se fir gaya aur aj tak fira hua haai. 
2Chronicles11:1 jab rahoobiyam yarooshalem ko aya, tab us ne yahooda aur binyameen ke gharane ko jo milakar aek lakh assee hajar achchhe yoddha the ikattha kiya, ki israaael ke sath yuddh karen jis se rajy rahoobiyam ke vash men fir a jaae." 
2Chronicles11:2 tab yahova ka yah vachan parameshvar ke bhkt shamayah ke pas pahuncha," 
2Chronicles11:3 ki yahooda ke raja sulaaiman ke putra rahoobiyam se aur yahooda aur binyameen ke sab israaaeliyon se kah," 
2Chronicles11:4 yahova yon kahata haai, ki apane bhaiyon par chaddhai karake yuddh n karo. tum apane apane ghar lautt jao, kyonki yah bat meree hee or se hui haai. yahova ke ye vachan manakar, ve yarobam par bina chaddhai kiae lautt gaae." 
2Chronicles11:5 so rahoobiyam yarooshalem men rahane laga, aur yahooda men bachav ke liye ye nagar draddh kia," 
2Chronicles11:6 arthata betalehem, aetam, takoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 betsoor, soko, adullama." 
2Chronicles11:8 gat, maresha, jeepa." 
2Chronicles11:9 adoraaim, lakeesha, ajeka." 
2Chronicles11:10 sora, ayyalot aur hebraen jo yahooda aur binyameen men haai, draddh kiya." 
2Chronicles11:11 aur us ne draddh nagaron ko aur bhee draddh karake un men pradhaan ttharaa, aur bhoejan vastu aur tel aur dakhmadha ke bhndar rakhva diae." 
2Chronicles11:12 fir aek aek nagar men us ne ddhalen aur bhale rakhvakar unako atyant draddh kar diya. yahooda aur binyameen to usake the. 
2Chronicles11:13 aur sare israaael ke yajak aur leveey bhee apane sab desh se uttkar usake pas gaae. 
2Chronicles11:14 yon leveey apanee charaiyon aur nij boomi chhodkar, yahooda aur yarooshalem men aa, kyonki yarobam aur usake putraen ne unako nikal diya tha ki ve yahova ke liye yajak ka kam n karen." 
2Chronicles11:15 aur us ne unche sthanon aur bakaron aur apane banaae huae bachhdon ke liye, apanee or se yajak tthara liae." 
2Chronicles11:16 aur leaviyon ke bad israaael ke sab gotraen men se jitane man lagakar israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke khojee the ve apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko bali chaddhane ke liye yarooshalem ko aae. 
2Chronicles11:17 aur unhon ne yahooda ka rajy sthiar kiya aur sulaaiman ke putra rahoobiyam ko teen varsha tak draddh karaya, kyonaki teen varsha tak ve daud aur sulaaiman kee leek par chalate rahe." 
2Chronicles11:18 aur rahoobiyam ne aek sree ko byah liya, arthata mahalat ko jisaka pita daud ka putra yareemot aur mata yishau ke putra aeleeab kee bettee abeehaail thee." 
2Chronicles11:19 aur us se yoosha, shamaryah aur jaham nam putra utpann huae." 
2Chronicles11:20 aur usake bad us ne abashalom kee bettee maka ko byah liya, aur us se aabiyyah, atte, jeeja aur shalomeet utpann hue." 
2Chronicles11:21 rahoobiyam ne attarah raaniyan byah leen aur satt rakhealiyan rakhee, aur usake attais bette aur satt beattyaian utpann hui. abashalom kee naatinee maka se vah apanee sab raniyon aur rakheliyon se aadhaik praem rakhta tha" 
2Chronicles11:22 so rahoobiyam ne maka ke bette aabiyyah ko mukhy aur sab bhaiyon men pradhaan is manasa se tthara diya, ki use raja banaae." 
2Chronicles11:23 aur vah samajh boojhkar kam karata tha, aur us ne apane sab putraen ko alag alag karake yahooda aur binyameen ke sab dashaen ke sab gaddhvale nagaron men tthara diya aur unhen bhojan vastu bahutayat se dee, aur unake liye bahut see striayan ddoonddhee." 
2Chronicles12:1 parantu jab rahoobiyam ka rajy draddh ho gaya, aur vah ap sthiar ho gaya, tab us ne aur usake sath sare israaael ne yahova kee yyavastha ko tyag diya." 
2Chronicles12:2 unhon ne jo yahova se vishvasaghaat kiya, us karan raja rahoobiyam ke panchapen varsha men misra ke raja shaeeshak ne," 
2Chronicles12:3 barah sau rath aur satt hajar savar liye huae yarooshalem par chaddhai kee, aur jo log usake sang misra se aa, arthata loobee, sukkaiyyee, kooshae, ye anaginat the." 
2Chronicles12:4 aur us ne yahooda ke gaddhvale nagaron ko le liya, aur yarooshalem tak aya." 
2Chronicles12:5 tab shamayah nabee rahoobiyam aur yahooda ke hakimon ke pas jo shaeeshak ke dr ke mare yarooshalem men iatthe huae the, akar kahane laga, yahova yon kahata haai, ki tum ne mujh ko chhod diya haai, isaaliye maain ne tum ko chhodkar shaeeshak ke hath men kar diya haai." 
2Chronicles12:6 tab israaael ke hakim aur raja deen ho gaa, aur kaha, yahova dhama haai." 
2Chronicles12:7 jab yahova ne dekha ki ve deen huae haai, tab yahova ka yah vachan shamayah ke pas pahuncha ki ve deen ho gaae haai, maain unako nashtt n karoonga maain unaka kuchh bachav karoonga, aur meree jalajalahatt shaeeshak ke dara yarooshalem par n bhdkegee." 
2Chronicles12:8 taubhee ve usake adhaeen to rahenge, taaki ve meree aur desh desh ke rajyon kee bhee seva jan len." 
2Chronicles12:9 tab misra ka raja shaeeshak yarooshalem par chaddhai karake yahova ke bhvan kee anamol vastuaen aur rajabhvan kee anamol vastuen utta le gaya. vah sab kuchh utta le gaya, aur sone kee jo faariyan sulaaiman ne banai thee, unako bhee vah le gaya." 
2Chronicles12:10 tab raja rahoobiyam ne unake badale peetal kee ddhalen banavai aur unhen paharuon ke pradhaanon ke hath saunp diya, jo rajabhvan ke dar kee rakhvalee karate the." 
2Chronicles12:11 aur jab jab raja yahova ke bhvan men jata, tab tab paharuae akar unhen utta le chalate, aur fir paharuon kee kottree men lauttakar rakh dete the." 
2Chronicles12:12 jab rahoobiyam deen hua, tab yahova ka krodha us par se utar gaya, aur us ne usaka poora vinash n kiya aur yahooda men achchhe gun bhee the." 
2Chronicles12:13 so raja rahoobiyam yarooshalem men draddh hokar rajy karata raha. jab rahoobiyam rajy karane laga, tab aekanalees varsha kee ayu ka tha, aur yarooshalem men arthata us nagar me, jise yahova ne apana nam banaae rakhne ke liye israaael ke sare gotra men se chun liya tha, satrah varsha tak rajy karata raha. usakee mata ka nam nama tha, jo ammonee stree thee." 
2Chronicles12:14 us ne vah karma kiya jo bura haai, arthata us ne apane man ko yahova kee khoj men n lagaya." 
2Chronicles12:15 aadi se ant tak rahoobiyam ke kam kya shamayah nabee aur io dasha kee pustakon men vanshaavaliyon kee reeati par naheen likhe haain? rahoobiyam aur yarobam ke beech to ladai sada hotee rahee. 
2Chronicles12:16 aur rahoobiyam apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur daudapur men usako mittee dee gai. aur usaka putra aabiyyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Chronicles13:1 yarobam ke attarahaven varsha men abiyyah yahooda par rajy karane laga. 
2Chronicles13:2 vah teen varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha, aur usakee mata ka nam meekayah tha jo gibavasee ureeael kee bettee thee. aur aabiyyah aur yarobam ke beech men ladai hai." 
2Chronicles13:3 aabiyyah ne to bade yoddhaon ka dal, arthata char lakh chhntte huae purush lekar ladne ke liye panti bandhaai, aur yarobam ne att lakh chhntte huae purush jo aede shooraveer the, lekar usake viruddh panti bandhaai." 
2Chronicles13:4 tab aabiyyah samaraaim nam pahad par, jo aepraaim ke pahadee desh men haai, khda hokar kahane laga, he yarobam, he sab israaaeliyo, meree suno." 
2Chronicles13:5 kya tum ko n janana chaahia, ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova ne lonavalee vacha bandhakar daud ko aur usake vansh ko israaael ka rajy sada ke liye de diya haai." 
2Chronicles13:6 taubhee nabat ka putra yarobam jo daud ke putra sulaaiman ka karmacharee tha, vah apane svamee ke viruddh utta haai." 
2Chronicles13:7 aur usake pas halake aur ochhe manushy ikattha ho gaae haain aur jab sulaaiman ka putra rahoobiyam ladka aur alhad man ka tha aur unaka samhana n kar sakata tha, tab ve usake viruddh samath ho gaae." 
2Chronicles13:8 aur ab tum sochate ho ki ham yahova ke rajy ka samhana karenge, jo daud kee santan ke hath men haai, kyonaki tum sab milakar bada samaj ban gaae ho aur tumhare pas ve sone ke bachhde bhee haain jinhen yarobam ne tumhare devata hone ke liye banavaya." 
2Chronicles13:9 kya tum ne yahova ke yajakon ko, arthata haroon kee santan aur leaviyon ko nikalakar desh desh ke logon kee nai yajak niyukt naheen kar liae? jo koi aek bachhda aur sat meddhe apana sanskar karane ko le ata, to unaka yajak ho jata haai jo ishvar naheen haai." 
2Chronicles13:10 parantu ham logon ka parameshvar yahova haai aur ham ne usako naheen tyaga, aur hamare pas yahova kee seva tthal karanevale yajak haroon kee santan aur apane apane kam men lage huae leveey haain." 
2Chronicles13:11 aur ve nity savere aur sanjh ko yahova ke liye homabaali aur sugandhadrayy ka dhoop jalate haai, aur shooddh mej par bhentt kee rottee sajate aur sone kee deevatt aur usake deepak sanjh-sanjh ko jalate haain ham to apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaaon ko manate rahate haai, parantu tum ne usako tyag diya haai." 
2Chronicles13:12 aur dekho, hamare sang hamara pradhaan parameshvar haai, aur usake yajak tumhare viruddh sans vandhakar foonkane ko turahiyan liye huae bhee hamare sath haain. he israaaeliyo apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova se mat lado, kyonki tum kratarth n hoge." 
2Chronicles13:13 parantu yarobam ne ghaatakon ko unake peechhe bhej diya, ve to yahooda ke samhane the, aur ghaatak unake peechhe the." 
2Chronicles13:14 aur jab yahoodiyon ne peechhe ko munh faera, to dekha ki hamare age aur peechhe donon or se ladai honevalee haai tab unhon ne yahova kee dohai dee, aur yajak turahiyon ko foonkane lage." 
2Chronicles13:15 tab yahoodee purushaen ne jay jayakar kiya, aur jab yahoodee purushaen ne jay jayakar kiya, tab parameshvar ne aabiyyah aur yahooda ke samhane, yarobam aur sare israaaeliyon ko mara." 
2Chronicles13:16 aur israaaelee yahooda ke samhane se bhage, aur parameshvar ne unhen unake hath men kar diya." 
2Chronicles13:17 aur aabiyyah aur usakee praja ne unhen badee mar se mara, yahan tak ki israaael men se panch lakh chhntte huae purush mare gaae." 
2Chronicles13:18 us samay to israaelee dab gaa, aur yahoodee is karan prabal huae ki unhon ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova par bhrosa rakha tha." 
2Chronicles13:19 tab aabiyyah ne yarobam ka peechha karake us se betel, yashaana aur aepraen nagaron aur unake ganvon ko le liya." 
2Chronicles13:20 aur aabiyyah ke jeevan bhr yarobam fir samath n hua nidan yahova ne usako aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya. 
2Chronicles13:21 parantu abiyyah aur bhee samath ho gaya aur chaudah striayan byah leen jin se bais bette aur solah beattyaian utpann hui. 
2Chronicles13:22 aur aabiyyah ke kam aur usakee chal chalan, aur usake vachan, io nabee kee katha men likhe haain." 
2Chronicles14:1 nidan aabiyyah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya, aur usako daudapur men mittee dee gai aur usaka putra asa usake sthan par rajy karane laga. isake dinon men das varsha tak desh men chaain raha." 
2Chronicles14:2 aur asa ne vahee kiya jo usake parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men achchha aur tteek tha. 
2Chronicles14:3 us ne to parai veadiyon ko aur unche sthanon ko door kiya, aur latton ko tudva dala, aur ashora nam mooraton ko tod dala." 
2Chronicles14:4 aur yahoodiyon ko agyaa dee ki apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova kee khoj karen aur yyavastha aur agyaa ko manon. 
2Chronicles14:5 aur us ne unche sthanon aur soorya kee praatimaon ko yahooda ke sab nagaron men se door kiya, aur usake samhane rajy men chaain raha." 
2Chronicles14:6 aur us ne yahooda men gaddhvale nagar basaa, kyonki desh men chaain raha. aur un barason men use kisee se ladai n karanee padee kyonaki yahova ne use vishraam diya tha." 
2Chronicles14:7 us ne yahoodiyon se kaha, ao ham in nagaron ko basaen aur unake charon or shaharapanah, gaddh aur faattkon ke palle aur bede banaen desh ab tak hamare samhane pada haai, kyonki ham ne, apane parameshvar yahova kee khoj kee haai hamane usakee khoj kee aur us ne hamako charon or se vishraam diya haai. tab unhon ne un nagaron ko basaya aur kratarth hue." 
2Chronicles14:8 fir asa ke pas ddhal aur bachh rakhnevalon kee aek sena thee, arthata yahooda men se to teen lakh purush aur binyameen men se faree rakhnevale aur dhanudhararee do lakh assee hajar ye sab shooraveer the." 
2Chronicles14:9 aur unake viruddh das lakh purushaen kee sena aur teen sau rath liye huae jerah nam aek kooshaee nikala aur maresha tak a gaya. 
2Chronicles14:10 tab asa usaka samhana karane ko chala aur maresha ke nikatt sapata nam tarai men yuddh kee panti bandhaee gai. 
2Chronicles14:11 tab asa ne apane parameshvar yahova kee yon dohai dee, ki he yahova! jaaise too samath kee sahayata kar sakata haai, vaaise hee shaaktaiheen kee bhee he hamare parameshvar yahova! hamaree sahayata kar, kyonki hamara bhrosa tujhee par haai aur tere nam ka bhrosa karake ham is bheed ke viruddh aae haain. he yahova, too hamara parameshvar haai manushy tujh par prabal n hone paaega." 
2Chronicles14:12 tab yahova ne kooshaiyon ko asa aur yahoodiyon ke samhane mara aur kooshaee bhag gaae. 
2Chronicles14:13 aur asa aur usake sang ke logon ne unaka peechha garar tak kiya, aur itane kooshaee mare gaa, ki ve fir sir n utta sake kyonaki ve yahova aur usakee sena se har gaa, aur yahoodee bahut sa loott le gaae." 
2Chronicles14:14 aur unhon ne garar ke as pas ke sab nagaron ko mar liya, kyonaki yahova ka bhy unake rahanevalon ke man men sama gaya aur unhon ne un nagaron ko loott liya, kyonaki un men bahut sa dhan tha." 
2Chronicles14:15 fir pashuu-shaalaon ko jeetakar bahut see bhed- bakaariyan aur untt loottkar yarooshalem ko lautte. 
2Chronicles15:1 tab parameshvar ka atma oded ke putra ajaryah men sama gaya," 
2Chronicles15:2 aur vah asa se bhentt karane nikala, aur us se kaha, he asa, aur he sare yahooda aur binyameen meree suno, jab tak tum yahova ke sang rahoge tab tak vah tumhare sang rahega aur yadi tum usakee khoj men lage raho, tab to vah tum se mila karega, parantu yadi tum usako tyag doge to vah bhee tum ko tyag dega." 
2Chronicles15:3 bahut din israaael bina saty parameshvar ke aur bina sikhanevale yajak ke aur bina byavastha ke raha. 
2Chronicles15:4 parantu jab jab ve sankatt men padkar israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee or fire aur usako ddoonddha, tab tab vah unako mila." 
2Chronicles15:5 us samay n to janevale ko kuchh shaanti hotee thee, aur n anevale ko, varan sare desh ke sab nivaasiyon men bada hee kolahal hota tha." 
2Chronicles15:6 aur jaati se jati aur tagar se nagar choor kiae jate the, kyonaki parameshvar nana prakar ka kashtt dekar unhen ghabara deta tha." 
2Chronicles15:7 parantu tum log hiyab bandhae aur tumhare hath ddheele n pade, kyonki tumhare kam ka badala milega." 
2Chronicles15:8 jab asa ne ye vachan aur oded nabee kee naboovat sunee, tab us ne hiyab bandhakar yahooda aur binyameen ke sare desh men se, aur un nagaron men se bhee jo us ne aepraaim ke pahadee desh men le liye the, sab ghainaunee vastuen door kee, aur yahova kee jo vedee yahova ke osare ke samhane thee, usako naye sire se banaya." 
2Chronicles15:9 aur us ne sare yahooda aur binyameen ko, aur aepraaim, manashsho aur shaimon men se jo log usake sang rahate the, unako ikattha kiya, kyonaki ve yah dekhkar ki usaka parameshvar yahova usake sang rahata haai, israaael men se usake pas bahut se chale aae the." 
2Chronicles15:10 asa ke rajy ke pandrahaven varsha ke teesare maheene men ve yarooshalem men iatthe hue. 
2Chronicles15:11 aur usee samay unhon ne us loott men se jo ve le aae the, sat sau baail aur sat hajar bhed-bakaariya, yahova ko bali karake chaddhai." 
2Chronicles15:12 aur unhon ne vacha bandhaee ki ham apane poore man aur sare jeev se apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova kee khoj karenge. 
2Chronicles15:13 aur kya bada, kya chhotta, kya stree, kya purusha, jo koi israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee khoj n kare, vah mar dala jaaega." 
2Chronicles15:14 aur unhon ne jay jayakar ke sath turahiyan aur narasinge bajate huae unche shabd se yahova kee shapath khai. 
2Chronicles15:15 aur yah shapath khakar sab yahoodee anaandait hua, kyonki unhon ne apane sare man se shapatha khai aur badee aabhailasha se usako ddoonddha aur vah unako mila, aur yahova ne charon or se unhen vishraam diya." 
2Chronicles15:16 baran asa raja kee mata maka jis ne ashora ke pas rakhne ke liae aek ghainaunee moorat banai, usako us ne rajamata ke pad se utar diya, aur asa ne usakee moorat kattkar pees dalee aur kidraen nale men foonk dee." 
2Chronicles15:17 unche sthan to israaealiyon men se n ddhaae gaa, taubhee asa ka man jeevan bhr tishkapatt raha." 
2Chronicles15:18 aur us ne jo sona chandee, aur patra usake pita ne arpan kiae the, aur jo us ne ap arpan kiae the, unako parameshvar ke bhvan men pahancha diya." 
2Chronicles15:19 aur raja asa ke rajy ke paainteesaven varsha tak fir ladai n hui. 
2Chronicles16:1 asa ke rajy ke chhtteesaven varsha men israaael ke raja basha ne yahooda par chaddhai kee aur rama ko isaaliye draddh kiya, ki yahooda ke raja asa ke pas koi ane jane n paae." 
2Chronicles16:2 tab as ne yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan ke bhndaron men se chandee-sona nikal daamishkavasee aram ke raja benhadad ke pas doot bhejakar yah kaha," 
2Chronicles16:3 ki jaaise mere-tere pita ke beech vaaise hee mere-tere beech bhee vacha bandho dekh maain tere pas chandee-sona bhejata hoo, isaaliye a, israaael ke raja basha ke sath kee apanee vacha ko tod de, taki vah mujh se door ho." 
2Chronicles16:4 benhadad ne raja asa kee yah bat manakar, apane dalon ke pradhaanon se israaaelee nagaron par chaddhai karavakar iyyon, dan, abelmaaim aur naptalee ke sab bhndaravale nagaron ko jeet liya." 
2Chronicles16:5 yah sunakar basha ne rama ko draddh karana chhod diya, aur apana vah kam band kara diya." 
2Chronicles16:6 tab raja asa ne poore yahooda desh ko sath liya aur rama ke patthron aur lakadee ko, jin se basa kam karata tha, utta le gaya, aur un se us ne geva, aur mispa ko draddh kiya." 
2Chronicles16:7 us samay hananee dasha yahooda ke raja asa ke pas jakar kahane laga, too ne jo apane parameshvar yahova par bhrosa nahee rakha varan aram ke raja hee par bhrosa rakha haai, is karan aram ke raja kee sena tere hath se bach gai haai." 
2Chronicles16:8 kya kooshaiyon aur loobiyon kee sena badee n thee, aur kya us men bahut hee rat, aur savar n thee? taubhee too ne yahova par bhrosa rakha tha, is karan us ne unako tere hath men kar diya." 
2Chronicles16:9 dek, yahova kee drashtti saree prathvee par isaliye firatee rahatee haai ki jinaka man usakee or nishkamatt rahata haai, unakee sahayata men vah apana samarth dikhaae. toone yah kam moorkhta se kiya haai, isaaliye ab se too ladaiyon me fansa rahega." 
2Chronicles16:10 tab asa dasha par krodhait hua aur use katt men ttonkava diya, kyonaki vahausakee aeesee bat ke karan us par krodhait tha. aur usee samay se asa praja ke kuchh logon ko peesane bhee laga." 
2Chronicles16:11 aadi se lekar ant tak asa ke kam yahooda au israaael ke rajaon ke vrattant men likhe haain. 
2Chronicles16:12 apane rajy ke unateesaven varsha men asa ko panv ka rog hua, aur vah rog atyant baddh gaya, taubhee us ne rogee hokar yahova kee naheen vaaidhon hee kee sharan lee." 
2Chronicles16:13 nidan asa apane rajy ke aekataleesaven varsha men marake apane purakhaon ke sath so gaya. 
2Chronicles16:14 tab usako usee kee kabra men jo us ne daudapur men khudava lee thee, mittee dee gai aur vah sugandhadrayyon aur gandhaee ke kam ke bhanati bhanati ke masalon se bhre huae aek bichhaune par litta diya gaya, aur bahut sa sugandhadrayy usake liye jalaya gaya." 
2Chronicles17:1 aur usaka putra yahoshaapat usake sthan par rajy karane laga, aur israaael ke viruddh apana bal baddhaya." 
2Chronicles17:2 aur us ne yahooda ke sab gaddhvale nagaron men sipaahiyon ke dal tthara dia, aur yahooda ke desh men aur aepraaim ke un nagaron men bhee jo usake pita asa ne le liye the, sipaahiyon kee chauakiyan baaitta deen." 
2Chronicles17:3 aur yahova yahoshaapat ke sang raha, kyonaki vah apane moolapurush daud kee praacheen chal see chal chala aur bal devataon kee khoj men n laga." 
2Chronicles17:4 varan vah apane pita ke parameshvar kee khoj men laga rahata tha aur usee kee agyaaon par chalata tha, aur israaael ke se kam naheen karata tha." 
2Chronicles17:5 is karaaea yahova ne rajy ko usake hath men draddh kiya, aur sare yahoodee usake pas bhentt laya karate the, aur usake pas bahut dhan aur usaka vibhv baddh gaya." 
2Chronicles17:6 aur yahova ke magan par chalate chalate usaka man magan ho gaya fir us ne yahooda se unche sthan aur ashora nam mooraten door kar deen. 
2Chronicles17:7 aur us ne apane rajy ke teesare varsha men benhaail, obadhah, jakaryah, natanel aur meekayah namak apane hakimon ko yahooda ke nagaron men shaiksha dene ko bhej diya." 
2Chronicles17:8 aur unake sath shamayah, natanyah, jabadhah, asahel, shameeramot, yahonatan, adoniyyah, tobiyyah aur tobadoniyyah, nam leveey aur unake sang aeleeshaama aur yahoram namak yajak the." 
2Chronicles17:9 so unhon ne yahova kee yyavastha kee pustak apane sath liye huae yahooda men shaiksha dee, varan ve yahooda ke sab nagaron men praja ko sikhate huae ghoome." 
2Chronicles17:10 aur yahooda ke as pas ke deshaen ke rajy rajy men yahova ka aeesa dr sama gaya, ki unhon ne yahoshaapat se yuddh n kiya." 
2Chronicles17:11 varan kinate palishtee yahoshapat ke pas bhentt aur kar samajhkar chandee laae aur arabee log bhee sat hajar sat sau meddhe aur sat hajar sat sau bakare le aae. 
2Chronicles17:12 aur yahoshaapat bahut hee baddhta gaya aur us ne yahooda men kile aur bhndar ke nagar taaiyar kiae. 
2Chronicles17:13 aur yahooda ke nagaron men usaka bahut kam hota tha, aur yarooshalem men usake yoddha arthata shooraveer rahate the." 
2Chronicles17:14 aur inake pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar inakee yah ginatee thee, arthata yahoodee sahasrapati to ye the, pradhaan adana jisake sath teen lakh shooraveer the," 
2Chronicles17:15 aur usake bad pradhaan yahohanan jisake sath do lakh assee hajar purush the. 
2Chronicles17:16 aur isake bad jikree ka putra amasyah, jis ne apane ko apanee hee ichchha se yahova ko arpan kiya tha, usake sath do lakh shooraveer the." 
2Chronicles17:17 fir binyameen men se aelyada namak aek shooraveer jisake sath ddhal rakhnevale do lakh dhanudhararee the. 
2Chronicles17:18 aur usake neeche yahojabad jisake sath yuddh ke hathaiyar bandho huae aek lakh assee hajar purush the. 
2Chronicles17:19 ve ye haai, jo raja kee seva men lavaleen the. aur ye un se alag the jinhen raja ne sare yahooda ke gaddhvale nagaron men tthara diya." 
2Chronicles18:1 yahoshapat bada dhanavan aur aeeshvayryavan ho gaya aur us ne ahab ke sath samadhaiyana kiya. 
2Chronicles18:2 kuchh varsha ke bad vah shaemaron men ahab ke pas gaya, tab ahab ne usake aur usake sanagiyon ke liye bahut see bhed-bakaariyan aur gaya-baail kattkar, use gilad ke ramot par chaddhai karane ko usakaya." 
2Chronicles18:3 aur israaael ke raja ahab ne yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat se kaha, kya too mere sath gilad ke ramot par chaddhai karega? us ne use uttar diya, jaaisa too vaaisa maain bhee hoo, aur jaaisee teree praja, vaaisee meree bhee praja haai. ham log yuddh men tera sath denge." 
2Chronicles18:4 fir yahoshaapat te israaael ke raja se kaha, aj yahova kee agyaa le." 
2Chronicles18:5 tab israaael ke raja ne naabiyon ko jo char sau purush the, ikattha karake un se poochha, kya ham gilad ke ramot par yuddh karane ko chaddhai kare, athva maain ruka rahoon? unhon ne uttar diya chaddhai kar, kyonaki parameshvar usako raja ke hath kar dega." 
2Chronicles18:6 parantu yahoshaapat ne poochha, kya yahon yahova ka aur bhee koi nabee naheen haai jis se ham poochh len?" 
2Chronicles18:7 israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha, ha, aek purush aur haai, jisake dara ham yahova se poochh sakate haain parantu maain us se gharana karata hoo kyonki vah mere vishy kabhee kalyan kee nahee, sada haani hee kee naboovat karata haai. vah yimla ka putra meekayah haai. yahoshaapat ne kaha, raja aeesa n kahe." 
2Chronicles18:8 tab israaael ke raja ne aek haakim ko bulavakar kaha, yimla ke putra meekayah ko fauta se le a." 
2Chronicles18:9 israaael ka raja aur yahooda ka raja yahoshaapat apane apane rajavasr pahine hua, apane apane sinhasan par baaitte huae the ve shaemaron ke faattk men aek khule sthan men baaitte the aur sab nabee unake samhane naboovat kar rahe the." 
2Chronicles18:10 tab kanana ke putra sidaakiyyah ne lohe ke seeng banavakar kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, ki in se too araamiyon ko marate marate nash kar dalega." 
2Chronicles18:11 aur sab naabiyon ne isee ashay kee naboovat karake kaha, ki gilad ke ramot par chaddhai kar aur too kratarth hove kyonki yahova use raja ke hath kar dega." 
2Chronicles18:12 aur jo doot meekayah ko bulane gaya tha, us ne us se kaha, sun, nabee log aek hee munh se raja ke vishay haubh vachan kahate haain so teree bat unakee see ho, too bhee shuubh vachan kahana." 
2Chronicles18:13 meekayah ne kaha, yahova ke jeevan kee saunh, jo kuchh mera parameshvar kahe vahee maain bhee kahoonga." 
2Chronicles18:14 jab vah raja ke pas aya, tab raja ne us se poochha, he meekayah, kya ham gilad ke ramot par yuddh karane ko chaddhai karen athva maain ruka rahoon? us ne kaha, ha, tum log chaddhai karo, aur kratarth hoo aur ve tumhare hath men kar diae jaaenge." 
2Chronicles18:15 raja ne us se kaha, mujhe kitanee bar tujhe shapath dharakar chitana hoga, ki too yahova ka smaran karake mujh se sach hee kaha." 
2Chronicles18:16 meekayah ne kaha, mujhe sara israaael bina charavahe kee bhend-bakaariyon kee nai pahadon par titar bitar dikhai pada, aur yahova ka vachan aya ki ve to anath haai, isaaliye har aek apane apane ghar kushal kshom se lautt jaaen." 
2Chronicles18:17 tab israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha, kya maain ne tujh se n kaha tha, ki vah mere vishay kalyan kee nahee, hani hee kee naboovat karega?" 
2Chronicles18:18 meekayah ne kaha, is karan tum log yahova ka yah vachan suno mujhe sinhasan par virajaman yahova aur usake daahine baaen khdee hui svarga kee saree sena dikhai padee." 
2Chronicles18:19 tab yahova ne poochha, israaael ke raja ahab ko kaun aeesa bahakaaega, ki vah gilad ke ramot par chaddhai karake khet aa, tab kisee ne kuchh aur kisee ne kuchh kaha." 
2Chronicles18:20 nidan aek atma pas akar yahova ke sammukh khdee hui, aur kahane lagee, maain usako bahakaungee." 
2Chronicles18:21 yahova ne poochha, kis upay se? us ne kaha, maain jakar usake sab nabiyon men paaitt ke un se joott bulavaungee. yahova ne kaha, tera usako bahakana safal hoga, jakar aeesa hee kara." 
2Chronicles18:22 isaliye tun ab yahova ne tere in nabiyon ke munh men aek joott bolanevalee atma paaittai haai, aur yahova ne tere vishay haani kee bat kahee haai." 
2Chronicles18:23 tab kanana ke putra sidaakiyyah ne nikatt ja, meekayah ke gal par thppad marakar poochha, yahova ka atma mujhe chhodkar tujh se baten karane ko kidhar gaya." 
2Chronicles18:24 us ne kaha, jis din too chhpaine ke liye kottree se kottree men bhagega, tab jan lega." 
2Chronicles18:25 is par israaael ke raja ne kaha, ki meekayah ko nagar ke haakim amon aur rajakumar yoash ke pas lauttakar," 
2Chronicles18:26 un se kaho, raja yon kahata haai, ki isako bandeegrah men dalo, aur jab tak maain kushal se n au, tab tak ise dukh kee rottee aur panee diya karo." 
2Chronicles18:27 tab meekayah ne kaha, yadi too kabhee kushal se lautte, to jan, ki yahova ne mere dara naheen kaha. fir us ne kaha, he logo, tum sab ke sab sunan lo." 
2Chronicles18:28 tab israaael ke raja aur yahooda ke raja yahoshaapat donon ne gilad ke ramot par chaddhai kee. 
2Chronicles18:29 aur israaael ke raja ne yahoshaapat se kaha, maain to bhesh badalakar yuddh men jaunga, parantu too apane hee vasr pahine raha. israaael ke raja ne bhesh badala aur ve donon yuddh men gaae." 
2Chronicles18:30 aram ke raja ne to apane rathon ke pradhaanon ko agyaa dee thee, ki n to chhotte se lado aur n bade se, keval israaael ke raja se lado." 
2Chronicles18:31 so jab rathon ke pradhaanon ne yahoshaapat ko dekha, tab kaha israaael ka raja vahee haai, aur ve usee se ladne ko mude. is par yahoshaapat chilla utta, tab yahova ne usakee sahayata kee. aur parameshvar ne unako usake pas se fir jane kee praerana kee." 
2Chronicles18:32 so yah dekhkar ki vah israaael ka raja nahee haai, rathon ke pradhaan usaka peechha chhod ke lautt gaae." 
2Chronicles18:33 tab kisee ne attkal se aek teer chalaya, aur vah israaael ke raja ke jhlaim aur nichale vasr ke beech chhedakar laga tab us ne apane sarathee se kaha, maain ghaayal hua, isaliye lagam faerake mujhe sena men se bahar le chala." 
2Chronicles18:34 aur us din yuddh baddhta gaya aur israaael ka raja apane rath men araamiyon ke sammukh sanjh tak khda raha, parantu soorya ast hote-hote vah mar gaya." 
2Chronicles19:1 aur yahooda ka raja yahoshaapat yarooshalem ko apane bhvan men kushal se lautt gaya. 
2Chronicles19:2 tab hananee nam dasha ka putra yehoo yahoshaapat raja se bhentt karane ko nikala aur us se kahane laga, kya dushtton kee sahayata karanee aur yahova ke baairiyon se praem rakhna chahiye? is kam ke karan yahova kee or se tujh par krodha bhdka haai." 
2Chronicles19:3 taubhee tujh men kuchh achchhee baten pai jatee haain. too ne to desh men se ashoron ko nash kiya aur upane man ko parameshvar kee khoj men lagaya haai. 
2Chronicles19:4 yahoshaapat yarooshalem men rahata tha, aur us ne bershoba se lekar bapraaim ke pahadee desh tak apanee praja men fir daura karake, unako unake pitaron ke parameshvar yahova kee or faer diya." 
2Chronicles19:5 fir us ne yahooda ke aek aek gaddhvale nagar men nyayee ttharaya. 
2Chronicles19:6 aur us ne nyayiyon se kaha, socho ki kya karate ho, kyonaki tum jo nyay karoge, vah manushy ke liye nahee, yahova ke liye karoge aur vah nyay karate samay tumhare sath rahega." 
2Chronicles19:7 ab yahova ka bhy tum men bana rahe chaukasee se kam karana, kyonaki hamare parameshvar yahova men kuchh kuttlaita naheen haai, aur n vah kisee ka paksha karata aur n ghoos leta haai." 
2Chronicles19:8 aur yarooshalem men bhee yahoshaapat ne leviyon aur yajakon aur israaael ke pitaron ke gharanon ke kuchh mukhy purushaen ko yahova kee or se nyay karane aur mukamon ko janchane ke liye ttharaya. 
2Chronicles19:9 aur ve yarooshalem ko lautte. aur us ne unako agyaa dee, ki yahova ka bhy manakar, sachchai aur nishkapatt man se aeesa karana." 
2Chronicles19:10 tumhare bhai jo apane apane nagar men rahate haai, un men se jisaka koi mukama tumhare samhane aa, chahe vah koon ka ho, chahe yyavastha, athva kisee agyaa ya vidhai va niyam ke vishay ho, unako chita dena, ki yahova ke vishay doshaee n hoo. besa n ho ki tum par aur tumhare bhaiyon par usaka krodha bhdke. aeesa karo to tum doshaee n ttharoge." 
2Chronicles19:11 aur dekho, yahova ke vishy ke sab mukamon men to amaryah mahayajak aur raja ke vishay ke sab mukamon men yahooda ke gharane ka pradhaan ishmaael ka putra jabadhah tumhare upar aadhaikaree haai aur leveey tumhare samhane saradaron ka kam karenge. isaaliye hiyab bandhakar kam karo aur bhle manushy ke sath yahova rahega." 
2Chronicles20:1 isake bad moabiyon aur ammoniyon ne aur unake sath kai mooniyon ne yuddh karane ke liye yahoshaat par chaddhai kee. 
2Chronicles20:2 tab logon ne akar yahoshaapat ko bata diya, ki tal ke par se aedom desh kee or se aek badee bheed tujh par chaddhai kar rahee haai aur dek, vah hasasontamar tak jo aenagadee bhee kahalata haai, pahunch gai haai." 
2Chronicles20:3 tab yahoshapat dr gaya aur yahova kee khoj men lag gaya, aur poore yahooda men upavas ka prachar karavaya." 
2Chronicles20:4 so yahoodee yahova se sahayata mangane ke liye ikatthe hua, varan ve yahooda ke sab nagaron se yahova se bhentt karate ko aae." 
2Chronicles20:5 tab yahoshapat yahova ke bhvan men naye angan ke samhane yahoodiyon aur yarooshalemiyon kee mandlee men khda hokar 
2Chronicles20:6 yah kahane laga, ki he hamare pitaron ke parameshvar yahova! kya too svarga men parameshvar naheen haai? aur kya too jaati jati ke sab rajyon ke upar prabhuta naheen karata? aur kya tere hath men aeesa bal aur parakram naheen haai ki tera samhana koi naheen kar sakata?" 
2Chronicles20:7 he hamare parameshvar! kya too ne is desh ke nivaasiyon ko apanee praja israaael ke samhane se nikalakar inhen apane mitra ibraaheem ke vansh ko sada ke liye naheen de diya? 
2Chronicles20:8 ve is men bas gaae aur is men tere nam ka aek pavitrasthan banakar kaha," 
2Chronicles20:9 ki yadi talavar ya maree athva akal va aur koi vipaattai ham par pade, taubhee ham isee bhvan ke samhane aur tere samhane tera nam to is bhvan men basa haai khde hokar, apane klesh ke karan teree dohai denge aur too sunakar bachaaega." 
2Chronicles20:10 aur ab ammonee aur moabee aur seir ke pahadee desh ke log jin par too ne israaael ko misra desh se ate samay chaddhai karane n diya, aur ve unakee or se mud gaae aur unako vinash n kiya," 
2Chronicles20:11 dek, ve hee log tere diae huae aadhaikar ke is desh men se jisaka adhaikar too ne hamen diya haai, ham ko nikalakar kaaisa badala hamen de rahe haain." 
2Chronicles20:12 he hamare parameshvar, kya too unaka nyay n karega? yah jo badee bheed ham par chaddhai kar rahee haai, usake samhane hamara to bas naheen chalata aur hamen huchh soojhta naheen ki kya karana chaahiye? parantu hamaree ankhen teree or lagee haain." 
2Chronicles20:13 aur sab yahoodee apane apane balabachcho, strieeyon aur putraen samet yahova ke sammukh khde rahe." 
2Chronicles20:14 tab asap ke vansh men se yahajeeael nam aek leveey jo jakaryah ka putra aur banayah ka pota aur mattanyah ke putra yeeael ka parapota tha, us men mandlee ke beech yahova ka atma samaya." 
2Chronicles20:15 aur vah kahane laga, he sab yahoodiyo, he yarooshalem ke rahanevalo, he raja yahoshaapat, tum sab dhyan do yahova tum se yon kahata haai, tum is badee bheed se mat dro aur tumhara man kachcha n ho kyonki yuddh tumhara nahee, parameshvar ka haai." 
2Chronicles20:16 kal unaka samhana karane ko jana. dekho ve sees kee chaddhai par chaddhe ate haain aur yarooael nam jangal ke samhane nale ke sire par tumhen milenge. 
2Chronicles20:17 is ladai men tumhen ladna n hoga he yahooda, aur he yarooshalem, tthare rahana, aur khde rahakar yahova kee or se apana bachav dekhna. mat dro, aur tumhara man kachcha n ho kal unaka samhana karane ko chalana aur yahova tumhare sath rahega." 
2Chronicles20:18 tab yahoshaapat boomi kee or munh karake bhuka aur sab yahoodiyon aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ne yahova ke samhane girake yahova ko dandvat kiya. 
2Chronicles20:19 aur kahatiyon aur korahiyon men se kuchh leveey khde hokar israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee stuati atyant unche svar se karane lage. 
2Chronicles20:20 bihan ko ve sabere uttkar takoa ke jangal kee or nikal gaae aur chalate samay yahoshaapat ne khde hokar kaha, he yahoodiyo, he yarooshalem ke nivaasiyo, meree suuno, apane parameshvar yahova par vishvas rakho, tab tum sthiar rahoge usake naabiyon kee prateet karo, tab tum kratarth ho jaoge." 
2Chronicles20:21 tab us ne praja ke sath sammati karake kitanon ko ttharaya, jo ki pavitrata se shaebhayaman hokar haathaiyarabandon ke age age chalate huae yahova ke geet gaae, aur yah kahate huae usakee stuti kare, ki yahova ka dhanyavad karo, kyonki usakee karuna sada kee haai." 
2Chronicles20:22 jis samay ve gakar stuati karane lage, usee samay yahova ne ammoniyon moabiyon aur seir ke pahadee desh ke logon par jo yahooda ke viruddh a rahe the, ghaatakon ko baaitta diya aur ve mare gaae." 
2Chronicles20:23 kyonaki ammoniyon aur moabiyon ne seir ke pahadee desh ke nivaasiyon ko drane aur satyanash karane ke liye un par chaddhai kee, aur jab ve seir ke pahadee desh ke nivaasiyon ka ant kar chuke, tab un sabhon ne aek doosare ke nash karane men hath lagaya." 
2Chronicles20:24 so jab yahoodiyon ne jangal kee chaukee par pahunchakar us bheed kee or draashtti kee, tab kya dekh ki ve boomi par padee hui loth haain aur koi naheen bacha." 
2Chronicles20:25 tab yahoshaapat aur usakee praja loott lene ko gaae aur lothon ke beecha bahut see sammaattai aur manabhavane gahane mile unhon ne itane gahane utar liye ki unako n le ja sake, varan loott itanee milee, ki battorate battorate teen din beet gaae." 
2Chronicles20:26 chauthe din ve baraka nam tarai men ikatthe huae aur vahan yahova ka dhanyavad kiya is karan us sthan ka nam baraka kee taaii pada, jo aj tak haai." 
2Chronicles20:27 tab ve, arthata yahooda aur yarooshalem nagar ke sab purush aur unake age age yahoshaapat, anand ke sath yarooshalem lautte kyonaki yahova ne unhen shatrauon par anandait kiya tha." 
2Chronicles20:28 so ve saranagiya, veenaaen aur turaahiyan bajate huae yarooshalem men yahova ke bhvan ko aae." 
2Chronicles20:29 aur jab desh desh ke sab rajyon ke logon ne suna ki israaael ke shatrauon se yahova lada, tab unake man men parameshvar ka dr sama gaya." 
2Chronicles20:30 aur yahoshaapat ke rajy ko chaain mila, kyonaki usake parameshvar ne usako charon or se vishraam diya." 
2Chronicles20:31 yon yahoshaapat ne yahooda par rajy kiya. jab vah rajy karane laga tab vah paaintees varsha ka tha, aur pachchees varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur usakee mata ka nam ajooba tha, jo shailhee kee bettee thee." 
2Chronicles20:32 aur vah apane pita asa kee leek par chala or us se n muda, arthata jo yahova kee drashtti men tteek haai vahee vah karata raha." 
2Chronicles20:33 taubhee unche sthan ddhaae n gaa, varan ab tak praja ke logon ne apana man apane pitaron ke parameshvar kee or n lagaya tha." 
2Chronicles20:34 aur aadi se ant tak yahoshaapat ke aur kam, hananee ke putra yehoo ke vishay us vrattant men likhe haai, jo israaael ke rajaon ke vrattant men paya jata haain." 
2Chronicles20:35 isake bad yahood ke raja yahoshaapat ne israaael ka raja ahajyah se jo badee dushttta karata tha, mel kiya." 
2Chronicles20:36 arthata us ne usake sath isaliye mel kiya ki tashash jane ko jahaj banavaa, aur unhon ne aeese jahaj aesyonageber men banavaae." 
2Chronicles20:37 tab dodavah ke putra mareshaavasee aeleeajar ne yahoshaapat ke viruraddh yah naboovat kahee, ki too ne jo ahajyah se mel kiya, is karan yahova teree banavai hui vastuon ko tod dalega. so jaharaj toott gaae aur tashash ko n ja sake." 
2Chronicles21:1 nidan yahoshaapat apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya, aur usako usake purakhaon ke beech daudapur men mittee dee gai aur usaka putra yahoram usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Chronicles21:2 isake bhai jo yahoshaapat ke putra the, ye the, arthata ajaryah, yaheeael, jakaryah, ajaryah, meekaael aur shapatyaha ye sab israaael ke raja yahoshaapat ke putra the." 
2Chronicles21:3 aur unake pita ne unhe chandee sona aur anamol vastuen aur bade bade dan aur yahooda men gaddhvale nagar diae the, parantu yahoram ko us ne rajy de diya, kyonaki vah jetta tha." 
2Chronicles21:4 jab yahoram apane pita ke rajy par niyukt hua aur balavant bhee ho gaya, tab usane apane sab bhaiyon ko aur israaael ke kuchh hakimon ko bhee talavar se ghaat kiya." 
2Chronicles21:5 jab yahoram raja hua, tab vah battees varsha ka tha, aur vah att varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles21:6 vah israaael ke rajaon kee see chal chala, jaaise ahab ka gharana chalata tha, kyonki usakee patnee ahab kee bettee thee. aur vah us kam ko karata tha, jo yahova kee drashtti men bura haai." 
2Chronicles21:7 taubhee yahova ne daud ke gharane ko nash karana n chaha, yah us vacha ke karan tha, jo usane daud se bandhaee thee. aur us vachan ke anusar tha, jo us ne usako diya tha, ki men aeesa karoonga ki tera aur tere vansh ka deepak kabhee n bujhega." 
2Chronicles21:8 usake dinon men edom ne yahooda kee adhaeenata chhodkar apane upar ek raja bana liya. 
2Chronicles21:9 so yahoram apane haakimon aur apane sab rathon ko sath lekar udhar gaya, aur rathon ke pradhaanon ko mara." 
2Chronicles21:10 yon aedom yahooda ke vash se choott gaya aur aj tak vaaisa hee haai. usee samay libna ne bhee usakee adhaeenata chhod dee, yah is karan hua, ki us ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko tyag diya tha." 
2Chronicles21:11 aur us ne yahooda ke pahadon par unche sthan banaae aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon se yyabhaichar karaya, aur yahooda ko bahaka diya." 
2Chronicles21:12 tab aeliyyah nabee ka aek patra usake pas aya, ki tere moolapurush daud ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki too jo n to apane pita yahoshaapat kee leek par chala haai aur n yahooda ke raja asa kee leek par," 
2Chronicles21:13 varan israaael ke rajaon kee leek par chala haai, aur ahab ke gharane kee nai yahooliyon aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon se yyabhaichar karaya haai aur apane pita ke gharane men se apane bhaiyon ko jo tujh se achchhe the, ghaat kiya haai," 
2Chronicles21:14 is karan yahova teree praja, putrae, striayon aur saree sammaattai ko badee mar se marega." 
2Chronicles21:15 aur too antaadiyon ke rog se bahut peedit ho jaaega, yahan tak ki us rog ke karan teree antadiyan praatidin nikalatee jaaengee." 
2Chronicles21:16 aur yahova ne paalishtaiyon ko aur kooshaiyon ke pas rahanevale arabiyon ko, yahoram ke viruddh ubhara." 
2Chronicles21:17 aur ve yahooda par chaddhai karake us par toott pade, aur rajabhvan men jitanee sampattai milee, us sab ko aur raja ke putraen aur striayon ko bhee le gaa, yahan tak ki usake lahure bette yahoahaj ko chhod, usake pas koi bhee putra n raha." 
2Chronicles21:18 in sab ke bad yahova ne use antadiyon ke asadhyarog se peeadit kar diya. 
2Chronicles21:19 aur kuchh samay ke bad arthata do varsha ke ant men us rog ke karan usakee antaadiyan nikal padee, or vah atyant peeadit hokar mar gaya. aur usakee praja ne jaaise usake purakhaon ke liye sugandhadrayy jalaya tha, vaaisa usake liye kuchh n jalaya." 
2Chronicles21:20 vah jab rajy karane laga, tab battees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men att varsha tak rajy karata raha aur sab ko apiry hokar jata raha. aur usako daudapur men mittee dee gai, parantu rajaon ke kaabirstan men naheen." 
2Chronicles22:1 tab yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ne usake lahure putra ahajyah ko usake sthan par raja banaya kyonaki jo dal araabiyon ke sang chhavanee men aya tha, us ne usake sab bade bade betton ko ghaat kiya tha so yahooda ke raja yahoram ka putra ahajyah raja hua." 
2Chronicles22:2 jab ahajyah raja hua, tab vah bayalees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men bak hee varsha rajy kiya, aur usakee mata ka tam atalyah tha, jo omraee kee potee thee." 
2Chronicles22:3 vah ahab ke gharane kee see chal chala, kyonaki usakee mata use dushttta karane kee sammaati detee thee." 
2Chronicles22:4 aur vah ahab ke gharane kee nai vah kam karata tha jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai, kyonki usake pita kee mratyu ke bad ve usako aeesee sammati dete the, jis se usaka vinash hua." 
2Chronicles22:5 aur vah unakee sammaati ke anusar chalata tha, aur israaael ke raja ahab ke putra yahoram ke sang gilad ke ramot men aram ke raja hajaael se ladne ko gaya aur araamiyon ne yahoram ko ghaayal kiya." 
2Chronicles22:6 so raja yahoram isaaliye lautt gaya ki yijrael men un ghaavon ka itaj karaae jo usako aramiyon ke hath se us samay lage the jab vah hajaael ke sath lad raha tha. aur ahab ka putra yahoram jo yijrael men rogee tha, is karan se yahooda ke raja yahoram ka putra ahajyah usako dekhne gaya." 
2Chronicles22:7 aur ahajyah ka vinash yahova kee or se hua, kyonaki vah yahoram ke pas gaya tha. aur jab vah vahan pahuncha, tab yahoram ke sang nimashaee ke putra yehoo ka samhana karane ko nikal gaya, jisaka abhaishok yahova ne isaliye karaya tha ki vah ahab ke gharane ko nash kare." 
2Chronicles22:8 aur jab yehoo ahab ke gharane ko dand de raha tha, tab usako yahooda ke hakim aur ahajyah ke bhteeje jo ahajyah ke tthaluae the, mile, aur us ne unako ghaat kiya." 
2Chronicles22:9 tab us ne ahajyah ko ddoonddha. vah shaemaron men chhpai tha, so logon ne usako pakad liya aur yehoo ke pas pahunchakar usako mar dala. tab yah kahakar usako mittee dee, ki yah yahoshapat ka pota haai, jo apane poore man se yahova kee khoj karata tha. aur ahajyah ke gharane men rajy karane ke yogy koi n raha." 
2Chronicles22:10 jab ahajyah kee mata atalyah ne dekh ki mera putra mar gaya, tab us ne uttkar yahooda ke gharane ke sare rajavansh ko nash kiya." 
2Chronicles22:11 parantu yahoshavat jo raja kee bettee thee, us ne ahajyah ke putra yoash ko ghaat honevale rajakumaron ke beech se churakar dhaai samet bichhaune rakhne kee kottree men chhpai diya. is prakar raja yahoram kee bettee yahoshavat jo yahoyada yajak kee sree aur ahajyah kee bahin thee, us ne yoash ko atalyah se aeesa chhpai rakha ki vah use mar dalane n pai." 
2Chronicles22:12 aur vah usake pas parameshvar ke bhvan men chh varsha chhpai raha, itane dinon tak atalyah desh par rajy karatee rahee." 
2Chronicles23:1 sataven varsha men yahoyada ne hiyab bandhakar yaroham ke putra ajaryah, yahohanan ke putra ishvaael, obed ke putra ajaryah, adayah ke putra maseyah aur jikree ke putra baleeshapat, in shatapatiyon se vacha bandhaee." 
2Chronicles23:2 tab ve yahooda men ghoomakar yahooda ke sab nagaron men se leaviyon ko aur israaael ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purushaen ko ikattha karake yarooshalem ko le aae. 
2Chronicles23:3 aur us saree maaedlee ne parameshvar ke bhvan men raja ke sath vacha bandhae, aur yahoyada ne un se kaha, suno, yah rajakumar rajy karega jaaise ki yahova ne daud ke vansh ke vishay kaha haai." 
2Chronicles23:4 to tum aek kam karo, arthata tum yajakon aur leviyon kee aek tihai log jo vishraamadin ko anevale ho, ve darapalee kare," 
2Chronicles23:5 aur aek tihai log rajabhvan men rahen aur aek tihai log nev ke faattk ke pas rahen aur sab log yahova ke bhvan ke anganon men rahen. 
2Chronicles23:6 parantu yajakon aur seva tthal karanevale leviyon ko chhod aur koi yahova ke bhvan ke bheetar n ane paae ve to bheetar aae, kyonki ve pavitra haain parantu sab log yahova ke bhvan kee chaukasee karen." 
2Chronicles23:7 aur leveey log apane apane hath men hathaiyar liye huae raja ke charon or rahen aur jo koi bhvan ke bheetar ghause, vah mar dala jaae. aur tum raja ke ate jate usake sath rahana." 
2Chronicles23:8 yahoyada yajak kee in sab agyaaon ke anusar leaviyon aur sab yahoodiyon ne kiya. unhon ne vishraamadin ko anevale aur vishraamadin ko janevale donon dalon ke, apane apane janon ko apane sath kar liya, kyonaki yahoyada yajak ne kisee dal ke leaviyon ko vida n kiya th." 
2Chronicles23:9 tab yahoyada yajak ne shatapaatiyon ko raja daud ke barchhe aur bhale aur ddhalen jo parameshvar ke bhvan men thee, de deen." 
2Chronicles23:10 fir us ne un sab logon ko apane apane hath men haathaiyar liye huae bhvan ke daakkhianee kone se lekar, uttaree kone tak vedee aur bhvan ke pas raja ke charon or usakee ad karake khda kar diya." 
2Chronicles23:11 tab unhon ne rajakumar ko bahar la, usake sir par mukutt rakha aur sakshaeepatra dekar use raja banaya aur yahoyada aur usake putraen ne usaka abhaishok kiya, aur log bol utte, raja jeeavit rahe." 
2Chronicles23:12 jab atalyah ko un logon ka halla, jo daudte aur raja ko sarahate the sun pada, tab vah logon ke pas yahova ke bhvan men gai." 
2Chronicles23:13 aur us ne kya dekha, ki raja dar ke nikatt khmbhe ke pas khda haai aur raja ke pas pradhaan aur turahee bajanevale khde haai, aur sab log anand kar rahe haain aur turaahiyan baja rahe haain aur gane bajanevale baje bajate aur stuati karate haain. tab atalyah apane vasr faadkar pukarane lagee, rajadraeh, rajadraeh!" 
2Chronicles23:14 tab yahoyada yajak ne dal ke aadhaikaree shatapatiyon ko bahar lakar un se kaha, ki use apanee pantiyon ke beech se nikal le jao aur jo koi usake peechhe chale, vah talavar se mar dala jaae. yajak ne kaha, ki use yahova ke bhvan men n mar dalo." 
2Chronicles23:15 tab unhon ne donon or se usako jagah dee, aur vah rajabhvan ke ghaedafaattk ke dar tak gai, aur vahan unhon ne usako mar dala." 
2Chronicles23:16 tab yahoyada ne apane aur saree praja ke aur raja ke beech yahova kee praja hone kee vacha bandhavai. 
2Chronicles23:17 tab sab logon ne bal ke bhvan ko jakar ddha diya aur usakee veadiyon aur mooraton ko ttukade ttukade kiya, aur mattan nam bal ke yajak ko vediyon ke samhane hee ghaat kiya." 
2Chronicles23:18 tab yahoyada ne yahova ke bhvan kee seva ke liye un leveey yajakon ko tthara diya, jinhen daud ne yahova ke bhvan par dal dal karake isaaliye ttharaya tha, ki jaaise moosa kee yyavastha men likha haai, vaaise hee ve yahova ko homabali chaddhaya kare, aur daud kee chalai hui vidhai ke anusar anand karen aur gaaen." 
2Chronicles23:19 aur us ne yahova ke bhvan ke faattkon par darapalon ko isaliye khda kiya, ki jo kisee reeati se ashuuddh ho, vah bheetar jane n paae." 
2Chronicles23:20 aur vah shatapaatiyon aur raison aur praja par prabhuta karanevalon aur desh ke sab logon ko sath karake raja ko yahova ke bhvan se neeche le gaya aur unche faattk se hokar rajabhvan men aya, aur raja ko rajagaee par baaittaya." 
2Chronicles23:21 tab sab log anandait huae aur nagar men shaaantai hui. atalyah to talavar se mar hee dalee gai thee. 
2Chronicles24:1 jab yoash raja hua, tab vah sat varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men chalees varsha tak rajy karata raha usakee mata ka nam sibya tha, jo beshorba kee thee." 
2Chronicles24:2 aur jab tak yahoyada yajak jeeavit raha, tab tak yoash vah kam karata raha jo yahova kee drashtti men tteek haai." 
2Chronicles24:3 aur yahaseyada ne usake do byah karaae aur us se bette-beattyaian utpann hui. 
2Chronicles24:4 isake bad yoash ke man men yahova ke bhvan kee marammat karane kee manasa upajee. 
2Chronicles24:5 tab us ne yajakon aur leaviyon ko ikattha karake kaha, prati varsha yahooda ke nagaron men ja jakar sab israaaeliyon se rupaye liya karo jis se tumhare parameshvar ke bhvan kee marammat ho dekho isakam men fauta karo. taubhee leaviyon ne kuchh fauta n kee." 
2Chronicles24:6 tab raja ne yahoyada mahayajak ko bulava kar poochha, kya karan haai ki too ne leviyon ko draddh agyaa naheen dee ki ve yahooda aur yarooshalem se us chande ke rupaae le aaen jisaka niyam yahova ke das moosa aur israaael kee mandlee ne sakshaeepatra ke tamboo ke nimitt chalaya tha." 
2Chronicles24:7 us dushtt stree atalyah ke betton ne to parameshvar ke bhvan ko tod diya aur yahova ke bhvan kee sab pavitra kee hui vastuen bal devataon ko de dee theen. 
2Chronicles24:8 aur raja ne aek sandook banane kee agyaa dee aur vah yahova ke bhvan ke faattk ke pas bahar rakha gaya. 
2Chronicles24:9 tab yahooda aur yarooshalem men yah prachar kiya gaya ki jis chande ka niyam parameshvar ke das moosa ne jangal men israaael men chalaya tha, usake rupaae yahova ke nimitt le ao." 
2Chronicles24:10 to sab haakim aur praja ke sab log anandait ho rupaae lakar jab tak chanda poora n hua tab tak sandook men dalate gaae. 
2Chronicles24:11 aur jab jab vah sandook leviyon ke hath se raja ke pradhaanon ke pas pahunchaya jata aur yah jan padta tha ki us men rupaae bahut haai, tab tab raja ke pradhaan aur mahayajak ka naib akar sandook ko khalee karate aur tab use fir usake sthan par rakh dete the. unhon ne pratidin aeesa kiya aur bahut rupaae iattha kiae." 
2Chronicles24:12 tab raja aur yahoyada ne vah rupaae yahova ke bhvan men kam karanevalon ko de dia, aur unhon ne rajon aur baddhiyon ko yahova ke bhvan ke sudhaarane ke liye, aur loharon aur tttteron ko yahova ke bhvan kee marammat karane ke liye majadooree par rakha." 
2Chronicles24:13 aur kareegar kam karate gaae aur kam poora hota gaya aur unhon ne parameshvar ka bhvan jaaisa ka taaisa banakar draddh kar diya. 
2Chronicles24:14 jab unhon ne vah kam nipatta diya, tab ve shosh rupaae raja aur yahoyada ke pas le gaa, aur un se yahova ke bhvan ke liye patra banaae gaa, arthata seva tthal karane aur homabaali chaddhane ke patra aur dhoopadan adi sone chandee ke patra. aur jab tak yahoyada jeeavit raha, tab tak yahova ke bhvan men homabali nity chaddhaae jate the." 
2Chronicles24:15 parantu yahoyada booddha ho gaya aur deegharayu hokar mar gaya. jab vah mar gaya tab aek sau tees varsha ka tha. 
2Chronicles24:16 aur daudapur men rajaon ke beech usako mittee dee gai, kyonki us ne israaael men aur parameshvar ke aur usake bhvan ke vishay men bhla kiya tha." 
2Chronicles24:17 yahoyada ke marane ke bad yahooda ke haakimon ne raja ke pas jakar use dandvat kee, aur raja ne unakee manee." 
2Chronicles24:18 tab ve apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ka bhvan chhodkar ashoron aur mooraton kee upasana karane lage. so unake aeese doshaee hone ke karan parameshvar ka kroedha yahooda aur yarooshalem par bhdka. 
2Chronicles24:19 taubhee us ne unake pas nabee bheje ki unako yahova ke pas faer laaen aur inhon ne unhen chita diya, parantu unhon ne kan n lagaya." 
2Chronicles24:20 aur parameshvar ka atma yahoyada yajak ke putra jakaryah men sama gaya, aur vah unche sthn par khda hokar logon se kahane laga, parameshvar yon kahata haai, ki tum yahova kee agyaaon ko kyon ttalate ho? aeesa karake tum bhagyavan naheen ho sakate, dekho, tum ne to yahova ko tyag diya haai, is karan us ne bhee tum ko tyag diya." 
2Chronicles24:21 tab logon ne us se draeh kee goshttee karake, raja kee agyaa se yahova ke bhvan ke angan men usako patthravah kiya." 
2Chronicles24:22 yon raja yoash ne vah praeeati boolakar jo yahoyada ne us se kee thee, usake putra ko ghaat kiya. aur marate samay us ne kaha yahova is par draashtti karake isaka lekha le." 
2Chronicles24:23 taye varsha ke lagate aramiyon kee sena ne us par chaddhai kee, aur yahooda or yarooshalem akar praja men se sab haakimon ko nash kiya aur unaka sab dhan loottkar damishk ke raja ke pas bheja." 
2Chronicles24:24 aramiyon kee sena thede hee purushaen kee to ai, pantu yahova ne aek bahut badee sena unake hath kar dee, kyonki unhon ne apane pitaro ke parameshva ko tyag diya th. aur yoash ko bhee unhon ne dand diya." 
2Chronicles24:25 aur jab ve use bahut hee rogee chhod gaa, tab usake karmachariyon ne yahoyada yajak ke putraen ke koon ke karan us se draeh kee goshttee karake, use usake bichhaune par hee aeesa mara, ki vah mar gaya aur unhon ne usako daud pur men mittee dee, parantu rajaon ke kabirstan men naheen." 
2Chronicles24:26 jinhon ne us se rajadraeh kee goshttee kee, ve ye the, arthata ammonin, shaimat ka putra jabad aur shaimirt, moaabin ka putra yahojabada." 
2Chronicles24:27 usake betton ke vishay aur usake viruddh, jo bade dand kee taboovat hui, usake aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke banane ke vishay ye sab baten rajaon ke vrattant kee pustak men likhee haain. aur usaka putra amasyah usake sthan par raja hua." 
2Chronicles25:1 jab amasyah rajy karane laga tab vah vachees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men unatees varsha tak rajy karata raha aur usakee mata ka nam yahoaan tha, jo yarooshalem kee thee." 
2Chronicles25:2 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai, parantu khre man se n kiya." 
2Chronicles25:3 jab rajy usake hath men sthiar ho gaya, tab us ne apane un karmachariyon ko mar dala jinhon ne usake pita raja ko mar dala tha." 
2Chronicles25:4 parantu us ne unake ladkevalon ko n mara kyonaki us ne yahova kee us agyaa ke anusar kiya, jo moosa kee yyavastha kee pustak men likhee haai, ki putra ke karan pita n mar dala jaa, aur n pita ke karan putra mar dala jaa, jis ne pap kiya ho vahee us pap ke karan mar dala jaae." 
2Chronicles25:5 aur amasyah ne yahooda ko varan sare yahoodiyon aur binyameeaniyon ko ikattha karake unako, pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar sahasrapaatiyon aur shatapaatiyon ke aadhaikar men ttharaya aur un men se jitanon kee avastha bees varsha kee athva us se adhaik thee, unakee ginatee karake teen lakh bhala chalanevale aur ddhal uttanevale bade bade yoddha paae." 
2Chronicles25:6 fir us ne aek lakh israaaelee shooraveeron ko bhee aek sau kikkar chandee dekar bulava rakha. 
2Chronicles25:7 parantu parameshvar ke aek jan ne usake pas akar kaha, he raja israaael kee sena tere sath jane n paae kyonki yahova israaael arthata aepraaim kee kul santan ke sang naheen rahata." 
2Chronicles25:8 yaadi too jakar purushaarth kare aur yuddh ke liye hiyav vandho, taubhee parameshvar tujhe shatrauon ke samhane giraaega, kyonki sahayata karane aur gira dene donon men parameshvar samath haai." 
2Chronicles25:9 amasyah ne parameshvar ke bhkt se poochha, fir jo sau kikkar chandee maain israaaelee dal ko de chuka hoo, usake vishay kya karoon? parameshvar ke bhkt ne uttar diya, yahova tujhe is se bhee bahut aadhaik de sakata haai." 
2Chronicles25:10 tab amasyah ne unhen arthata us dal ko jo aepraaim kee or se usake pas aya tha, alag kar diya, ki ve apane sthan ko lautt jaaen. tab unaka krodha yahoodiyo par bahut bhdk utta, aur ve atyant krodhait hokar apane sthan ko lautt gaae." 
2Chronicles25:11 parantu amasyah hiyab bandhakar apane logon ko le chala, aur lon kee tarai men jakar, das hajar seiriyon ko mar dala." 
2Chronicles25:12 aur yahooliyon ne das hajar ko bandhaua karake chattan kee chottee par le gaye, aur chattan kee chottee par se gira diya, so ve sab choor choor ho gaae." 
2Chronicles25:13 parantu us dal ke purush jise amasyah ne lautta diya ki ve usake sath yuddh karane ko n jaae, shomaron se betheron tak yahooda ke sab nagaron par toott pade, aur unake teen hajar nivasee mar dale aur bahut loott le lee." 
2Chronicles25:14 jab amasyah aedoniyon ka sanhar karake lautt aya, tab us ne seiariyon ke devataon ko le akar apane devata karake khda kiya, aur unheen ke samhane dandvat karane, aur unheen ke liye dhoop jalane laga." 
2Chronicles25:15 tab yahova ka krodha amasyah par bhdk utta aur us ne usake pas aek nabee bheja jis ne us se kaha, jo devata apane logon ko tere hath se bacha n sake, unakee khoj men too kyon laga haai?" 
2Chronicles25:16 vah us se kah hee raha tha ki us ne us se poochha, kya ham ne tujhe rajamantraee tthara diya haai? chup rah! kya too mar khana chahata haai? tab vah nabee yah kahakar chup ho gaya, ki mujhe maloom haai ki parameshvar ne tujhe nash karane ko ttana haai, kyonki too ne aeesa kiya haai aur meree sammati naheen manee." 
2Chronicles25:17 tab yahooda ke raja amasyah ne sammati lekar, israaael ke raja yoash ke pas, jo yehoo ka pota aur yahoahaj ka putra tha, yon kahala bheja, ki a ham aek doosare ka samhana karen." 
2Chronicles25:18 israaael ke raja yoash ne yahooda ke raja amasyah ke pas yon kahala bheja, ki labanon par kee aek jhdberee ne labanon ke aek devadar ke pas kahala bheja, ki apanee bettee mere bette ko byah de itane men labanon ka koi van pashu pas se chala gaya aur us jhdberee ko daund dala." 
2Chronicles25:19 too kahata haai, ki maain ne aedomiyon ko jeet liya haai is karan too fool utta aur badai marata haai! apane ghar men rah ja too apanee haani ke liye yahan kyon hath dalata haai, is se too kya, varan yahooda bhee neecha khaaega." 
2Chronicles25:20 parantu amasyah ne n mana. yah to parameshvar kee or se hua, ki vah unhen unake shatrauon ke hath kar de, kyonaki ve aedom ke devataon kee khoj men lag gaae the." 
2Chronicles25:21 tab israaael ke raja yoash ne chaddhai kee aur us ne aur yahooda ke raja amasyah ne yahooda desh ke betashomesh men aek doosare ka samhana kiya. 
2Chronicles25:22 aur yahooda israaael se har gaya, aur har aek apane apane dere ko bhaga." 
2Chronicles25:23 tab israaael ke raja yoash ne yahooda ke raja amasyah ko, jo yahoahaj ka pota aur yoash ka putra tha, betashomesh men pakada aur yarooshalem ko le gaya aur yarooshalem kee shaharapanah men se bapraaimee faattk se konevale faattk tak char sau hath gira diae." 
2Chronicles25:24 aur jitana sona chandee aur jitane patra parameshvar ke bhvan men obededom ke pas mile, aur rajabhvan meen jitana khjana tha, us sab ko aur bandhak logon ko bhee lekar vah shaemaron ko lott gaya." 
2Chronicles25:25 yahoahaj ke putra israaael ke raja yoash ke marane ke bad yoash ka putra yahooda ka raja amasyah pandrah varsha tak jeevit raha. 
2Chronicles25:26 aadi se ant tak amasyah ke aur kam, kya yahooda aur israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men naheen likhe haain?" 
2Chronicles25:27 jis samay apasyah yahova ke peechhe chalana chhodkar fir gaya tha us samay se yarooshalem men usake viruddh draeh kee goshttee hone lagee, aur vah lakeesh ko bhag gaya. so dooton ne lakeesh tak usaka peechha kar ke, usako vaheen mar dala." 
2Chronicles25:28 tab vah ghaedon par rakhkar pahunchaya gaya aur use usake purakhaon ke beech yahooda ke nagar men mittee dee gai. 
2Chronicles26:1 tab sab yahoodee praja ne ujjaiyyah ko lekar jo solah varsha ka tha, usake pita amasyah ke sthan par raja banaya." 
2Chronicles26:2 jab raja amasyah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya tab ujjaiyyah ne aelot nagar ko draddh kar ke yahooda men fir mila liya. 
2Chronicles26:3 jab ujjaiyyah rajy karane laga, tab vah solah varsha ka tha. aur yarooshalem men bavan varsha tak rajy karata raha, aur usakee mata ka nam yakeelyah tha, jo yarooshalem kee thee." 
2Chronicles26:4 jaaise usaka pita amasyah, kiya karata tha vaaisa hee usane bhee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha." 
2Chronicles26:5 aur jakaryah ke dinon men jo parameshvar ke darshan ke vishay samajh rakhta tha, vah parameshvar kee khoj men laga rahata tha aur jab tak vah yahova kee khoj men laga raha, tab tak parameshvar usako bhagyavan kiae raha." 
2Chronicles26:6 tab us ne jakar palishtaiyon se yuddh kiya, aur gat, yabne aur ashadod kee shaharapanahen gira dee, aur ashadod ke asapas aur palishtaiyon ke beech men nagar basaae." 
2Chronicles26:7 aur parameshvar ne paalishtaiyon aur goorbalavasee, araabiyon aur mooniyon ke viruddh usakee sahayata kee." 
2Chronicles26:8 aur ammonee ujjaiyyah ko bhentt dene lage, varan usakee keettair misra ke sivane tak bhee faail gairar, kyonki vah atyant samath ho gaya tha." 
2Chronicles26:9 fir ujjaiyyah ne yarooshalem men kone ke faattk aur tarai ke faattk aur shaharapanah ke mod par gummatt banavakar draddh kiae. 
2Chronicles26:10 aur usake bahut janavar the isaaliye us ne jangal men aur neeche ke desh aur chauras desh men gummatt banavaae aur bahut se haud khudavaa, aur pahadon par aur kamrmel men usake kisan aur dakh kee baariyon ke malee the, kyonki vah khetee kisanee karanevala tha." 
2Chronicles26:11 fir ujjaiyyah ke yoddhaon kee aek sena thee jinakee ginatee yeeael munshaee aur maseyah saradar, hananyah namak raja ke aek hakim kee agyaa se karate the, aur usake anusar vah dal bandhakar ladne ko jatee thee." 
2Chronicles26:12 pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purush jo shooraveer the, unakee pooree ginatee do hajar chh sau thee." 
2Chronicles26:13 aur unake aadhaikar men teen lakh saddhe sat hajar kee aek badee badee sena thee, jo shatrauon ke viruddh raja kee sahayata karane ko bade bal se yuddh karanevale the." 
2Chronicles26:14 inake liye arthata pooree sena ke liye ujjaiyyah ne ddhale, bhale, ttop, jhlaim, dhanush aur gofan ke patthr taaiyar kiae." 
2Chronicles26:15 fir us ne yarooshalem men gummatton aur kangooron par rakhne ko chatur purushaen ke nikale huae yantra bhee banavaae jinake dara teer aur bade bade patthr faenke jate the. aur usakee keettair door door tak faail gai, kyonki use adabhut yahayata yahan tak milee ki vah samath ho gaya." 
2Chronicles26:16 parantu jab vah samath ho gaya, tab usaka man fool utta aur us ne bigadkar apane parameshvar yahova ka vishvasaghaat kiya, arthata vah dhoop kee vedee par dhoom jalane ko yahova ke mandair men ghaus gaya." 
2Chronicles26:17 aur ajaryah yajak usake bad bheetar gaya, aur usake sang yahova ke assee yajak bhee jo veer the gaae." 
2Chronicles26:18 aur unhon ne ujjaiyyah raja ka samhana karake us se kaha, he ujjaiyyah yahova ke liye dhoop jalana tera kam nahee, haroon kee santan arthata un yajakon hee ka kam haai, jo dhoop jalane ko pavitra kiae gaae haain. too pavitrasthan se nikal ja too ne vishvasaghaat kiya haai, yahova parameshvar kee or se yah teree maahima ka karan n hoga." 
2Chronicles26:19 tab ujjaiyyah dhoop jalane ko dhoopadan hath men liye huae jhunjhla utta. aur vah yajakon par jhunjhla raha tha, ki yajakon ke dekhte dekhte yahova ke bhvan men dhoop kee vedee ke pas hee usake mathe par koddh pragatt hua." 
2Chronicles26:20 aur ajaryah mahayajak aur sab yajakon ne us par drashtti kee, aur kya dekha ki usake mathe par koddh nikala haai! tab uthon ne usako vahan se jhttpatt nikal diya, varan yah janakar ki yahova ne mujhe koddhee kar diya haai, us ne ap bahar jane ko utavalee kee." 
2Chronicles26:21 aur ujjaiyyah raja marane ke din tak koddhee raha, aur koddh ke karan alag aek ghar men rahata tha, vah to yahova ke bhvan men jane n pata tha. aur usaka putra yoetam rajagharane ke kam par niyukt kiya gaya aur vah logon ka nyay bhee karata tha." 
2Chronicles26:22 aadi se ant tak ujjaiyyah ke aur kamon ka varnn to amos ke putra yashaayah nabee ne likha haai. 
2Chronicles26:23 nidan ujjaiyyah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya, aur usako usake purakhaon ke nikatt rajaon ke mittee dene ke khet men mittee dee gai kyonki unhon ne kaha, ki vah koddhee haai. aur usaka putra yotam usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Chronicles27:1 jab yotam rajy karane laga tab vah pachees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men solah varsha tak rajy karata raha. aur usakee mata ka nam yaroosha tha, jo sadok kee bettee thee." 
2Chronicles27:2 us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai, arthata jaaisa usake pita ujjaiyyah ne kiya tha, tteek vaaisa hee us ne bhee kiya taubhee vah yahova ke maandair men n ghausa. aur praja ke log tab bhee bigadee chal chalate the." 
2Chronicles27:3 usee ne yahova ke bhvan ke uparavale faattk ko banaya, aur opel kee shaharapanah par bahut kuchh banavaya." 
2Chronicles27:4 fir us ne yahooda ke pahadee desh men kai nagar draddh kia, aur jangalon men gaddh aur gummatt banaae." 
2Chronicles27:5 aur vah ammoniyon ke raja se yuddh karake un par prabal ho gaya. usee varsha ammoniyon ne usako sau kikkar chandee, aur das das hajar kor gehoon aur jav diya. aur fir doosare aur teesare varsha men bhee unhon ne use utana hee diya." 
2Chronicles27:6 yon yotam samath ho gaya, kyonaki vah apane ap ko apane parameshvar yahova ke sammukh janakar seedhaee chal chalata tha." 
2Chronicles27:7 yotam ke aur kam aur usake sab yuddh aur usakee chal chalan, in sab baton ka varnn israaael aur yahooda ke rajaon ke itihas men likha haai." 
2Chronicles27:8 jab vah raja hua, tab pachees varsha ka tha aur vah yarooshalem men solah varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles27:9 nidan yotam apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur use daudapur men mittee dee gai. aur usaka putra ahaj usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Chronicles28:1 jab ahaj rajy karane laga tab vah bees varsha ka tha, aur solah varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur apane moolapurush daud ke saman kam naheen kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha," 
2Chronicles28:2 parantu vah israaael ke rajaon kee see chal chala, aur bal devataon kee moortiyan ddhlavakar banai" 
2Chronicles28:3 aur hinnom ke bette kee tarai men dhoooop jalaya, aur un jaatiyon ke ghainaune kamon ke anusar jinhen yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se desh se nikal diya tha, apane ladkebalon ko ag men hom kar diya." 
2Chronicles28:4 aur unche sthanon par, aur pahaadiyon par, aur sab hare vrakshaen ke tale vah bali chaddhaya aur dhoom jalaya karata tha." 
2Chronicles28:5 isaliye usake parameshvar yahova ne usako aramiyon ke raja ke hath kar diya, aur ve usako jeetakar, usake bahut se logon ko bandhaua banake damishk ko le gaae. aur vah israaael ke raja ke vash men kar diya gaya, jis ne use badee mar se mara." 
2Chronicles28:6 aur ramalyah ke putra pekah ne, yahooda men aek hee din men aek lakh bees hajar logon ko jo sab ke sab veer the, ghaat kiya, kyonaki unhon ne apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko tyag diya tha." 
2Chronicles28:7 aur jikree namak aek aepraaimee veer ne maseyah namak aek rajaputra ko, aur rajabhvan ke pradhaan ajraeekam ko, aur aelakana ko, jo raja ka mantraee tha, mar dala." 
2Chronicles28:8 aur israaaelee apane bhaiyon men se traiyo, betton aur beattyaien ko milakar do lakh logon ko bandhaua banake, aur unakee bahut loott bhee chheenakar shaeemaron kee or le chale."
