2Chronicles28:9 parantu vahan oded namak yahova ka aek nabee tha vah shaemaron ko anevalee sena se milakar un se kahane laga, suno, tumhare pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ne yahoodiyon par jhunjhlakar unako tumhare hath kar diya haai, aur tum ne unako aeesa krodha karake ghaat kiya jisakee chillahatt svarga ko pahunch gai haai." 
2Chronicles28:10 aur ab tum ne ttana haai ki yahoodiyon aur yarooshalemiyon ko apane dasa-dasee banakar dabaae rakho. kya tum bhee apane parameshvar yahova ke yahan dashaee naheen ho? 
2Chronicles28:11 isaliye ab meree suno aur in bandhauon ko jinhen tum apane bhaiyon men se bandhaua banake le aae ho, lautta do, yahova ka krodha to tum par bhdka haai." 
2Chronicles28:12 tab aepraaiamiyon ke kitane mukhy purush arthata yohanan ka putra ajaryah, maashaillemot ka putra berekyah, shalloom ka putra yahijaakiyyah, aur hadalaai ka putra amasa, ladai se anevalon ka samhana karake, un se kahane lage." 
2Chronicles28:13 tum in bandhauon ko yahan mat lao kyonaki tum ne vah bat ttanee haai jisake karan ham yahova ke yahan doshaee ho jaaenge, aur us se hamara pap aur dosh baddh jaaega, hamara dosh to bada haai aur israaael par bahut krodha bhdka haai." 
2Chronicles28:14 tab un haathaiyar bandhaen ne bandhauon aur loott ko haakimon aur saree sabha ke samhane chhod diya. 
2Chronicles28:15 tab jin purushaen ke nam upar likhe haai, unhon ne uttkar bandhauon ko le liya, aur loott men se sab nange logon ko kapade, aur jootiyan paahinai aur khana khailaya, aur panee pilaya, aur tel mala aur tab nirbal logon ko gadahon par chaddhakar, yareeho ko jo khjoor ka nagar kahalata haai, unake bhaiyon ke pas pahuncha diya. tab ve shaemaron ko lautt aae." 
2Chronicles28:16 us samay raja ahaj ne ashshoor ke rajaon ke pas doot bhejakar sahayata mangee. 
2Chronicles28:17 kyonaki aedomiyon ne yahooda men akar usako mara, aur bandhauon ko le gaae the." 
2Chronicles28:18 aur paalishtayon ne neeche ke desh aur yahooda ke dakkhian desh ke nagaron par chaddhai karake, betashomesha, ayyalon aur gaderot ko, aur apane apane ganvon samet soko, timna, aur gimajo ko le liya aur un men rahane lage the." 
2Chronicles28:19 yon yahova ne israaael ke raja ahaj ke karan yahooda ko daba diya, kyonaki vah nirankush hokar chala, aur yahova se bada vishvasaghaat kiya." 
2Chronicles28:20 tab ashshoor ka raja tilagataapilaneser usake viruddh aya, aur usako kashtt diya draddh naheen kiya." 
2Chronicles28:21 ahaj ne to yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan aur hakimon ke gharon men se dhan nikalakar ashshoor ke raja ko diya, parantu isase usakee kuchh sahayata n hui." 
2Chronicles28:22 aur klesh ke samay raja ahaj ne yahova se aur bhee vishvasaghaat kiya. 
2Chronicles28:23 aur us ne daamishk ke devataon ke liye jinhon ne usako mara tha, baali chaddhaya kyonaki us ne yah socha, ki aramee rajaon ke devataon ne unakee yahayata kee, to maain unake liye baali chaddhaunga ki ve meree sahayata karen. parantu ve usake aur sare israaael ke patan ka karan huae." 
2Chronicles28:24 fir ahaj ne parameshvar ke bhvan ke patra battorakar tudva dale, aur yahova ke bhvan ke daron ko band kar diya aur yarooshalem ke sab konon men veadiyan banai." 
2Chronicles28:25 aur yahooda ke aek aek nagar men us ne paraye devataon ko dhoop jalane ke liye unche sthan banaa, aur apane mitaron ke parameshvar yahova ko ris dilai." 
2Chronicles28:26 aur usake aur kamo, aur adi se ant tak usakee pooree chal chalan ka varnn yahooda aur israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men likha haai." 
2Chronicles28:27 nidan ahaj apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usako yarooshalem nagar men mittee dee gai, parantu vah israaael ke rajaon ke kabirstan men pahunchaya n gaya. aur usaka putra hijaakiyyah usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Chronicles29:1 jab hijaakiyyah rajy karane laga tab vah pachees varsha ka tha, aur unatees varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur usakee mata ka tam aabiyyah tha, jo jakaryah kee bettee thee." 
2Chronicles29:2 jaaise usake moolapurush daud ne kiya tha arthata jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek tha vaaisa hee us ne bhee kiya. 
2Chronicles29:3 apane rajy ke pahile varsha ke pahile maheene men us ne yahova ke bhvan ke dar khulava dia, aur unakee marammat bhee karai." 
2Chronicles29:4 tab us ne yajakon aur leaviyon ko le akar poorva ke chauk men ikattha kiya. 
2Chronicles29:5 aur un se kahane laga, he leviyo meree suno! ab apane apane ko pavitra karo, aur apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova ke bhvan ko pavitra karo, aur pavitrasthan men se maail nikalo." 
2Chronicles29:6 dekho hamare purakhaon ne vishvasaghaat karake vah karma kiya tha, jo hamare parameshvar yahova kee drashtti men bura haai aur usako taj karake yahova ke nivas se munh faerakar usako peett dikhai thee." 
2Chronicles29:7 fir unhon ne osare ke dar band kia, aur deepakon ko bujha diya tha aur paavitra sthan men israaael ke parameshvar ke liye n to dhoop jalaya aur n homabaali chaddhaya tha." 
2Chronicles29:8 isaliye yahova ka krodha yahooda aur yarooshalem par bhdka haai, aur us ne aeesa kiya, ki ve mare mare firen aur chaakit hone aur talee bajane ka karan ho jaae, jaaise ki tum apanee ankhon se dekh rahe ho." 
2Chronicles29:9 dekho, as karan hamare bap talavar se mare gaa, aur hamare bette-bettyaian aur striayan bandhauai men chalee gai haain." 
2Chronicles29:10 ab mere man ne yah nirny kiya haai ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova se vacha bandhoo, isaaliye ki usaka bhdka hua krodha ham par se door ho jaae." 
2Chronicles29:11 he mere betto, ddhlaiai n karo dekho, yahova ne apane sammukh khde rahane, aur apanee seva tthal karane, aur apane tthaluae aur dhoop jalanevale ka kam karane ke liye tumheen ko chun liya haai." 
2Chronicles29:12 tab leveey utt khde hua, arthata kahaatiyon men se amasaai ka putra mahat, aur ajaryah ka putra yoael, aur marariyon men se abdee ka putra keesha, aur yahallelel ka putra ajaryah, aur geshaniyon men se jimma ka putra yoah, aur yoah ka putra aedena." 
2Chronicles29:13 aur aeleesapan kee santan men se shaimrae, aur yooael aur asap kee santan men se jakaryah aur mattanyaha." 
2Chronicles29:14 aur heman kee santan men se yahooael aur shaimee, aur yadootoon kee santan men se shamayah aur ujjeeaela." 
2Chronicles29:15 inhon ne apane bhaiyon ko ikattha kiya aur apane apane ko paavitra karake raja kee us agyaa ke anusar jo us ne yahova se vachan pakar dee thee, yahova ke bhvan ke shuuddh karane ke liye bheetar gaae." 
2Chronicles29:16 tab yajak yahova ke bhvan ke bheetaree bhag ko shuuddh karane ke liye us men jakar yahova ke mandair men jitanee ashuuddh vastuen mieen un sab ko nikalakar yahova ke bhvan ke angan men le gaa, aur leaviyon ne unhen uttakar bahar kidraen ke nale men pahuncha diya." 
2Chronicles29:17 paahile maheene ke paahile din ko unhon ne pavitra karane ka kam arambh kiya, aur usee maheene ke attven din ko ve yahova ke osare tak a gaae. is prakar unhon ne yahova ke bhvan ko att din men pavitra kiya, aur paahile maheene ke solahaven din ko unhon ne us kam ko poora kiya." 
2Chronicles29:18 tab unhon ne raja hijaakiyyah ke pas bheetar jakar kaha, ham yahova ke poore bhvan ko aur patraen samet homabaali kee vedee aur bhentt kee rottee kee mej ko bhee shuuddh kar chuke." 
2Chronicles29:19 aur jitane patra raja ahaj ne apane rajy men vishvasaghaat karake faenk diae the, unako bhee ham ne tteek karake pavitra kiya haai aur ve yahova kee vedee ke samhane rakhe huae haain." 
2Chronicles29:20 tab raja hijaakiyyah sabere uttkar nagar ke haakimon ko ikattha karake, yahova ke bhvan ko gaya." 
2Chronicles29:21 tab ve rajy aur pavitrasthan aur yahooda ke nimitt sat bachhde, sat meddhe, sat bhed ke bachche, aur papabaali ke liye sat bakare le aa, aur us ne haroon kee santan ke leaviyon ko agyaa dee ki in sab ko yahova kee vedee par chaddhaaen." 
2Chronicles29:22 tab unhon ne bachhde bali kia, aur yajakon ne unaka lohoo lekar vedee par chhdik diya tab unhon ne meddhe baali kia, aur unaka lohoo bhee vedee par chhdik diya. aur bhed ke bachche bali kia, aur unaka bhee lohoo vedee par chhdik diya." 
2Chronicles29:23 tab ve papabaali ke bakaron ko raja aur mandlee ke sameep le aae aur un par apane apane hath rakhe. 
2Chronicles29:24 tab yajakon ne unako baali karake, unaka lohoo vedee par chhdik kar papabali kiya, jis se sare israaael ke liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaae. kyonaki raja ne sare israaael ke liye homabaali aur papabali kiae jane kee agyaa dee thee." 
2Chronicles29:25 fir us ne daud aur raja ke dasha gad, aur natan nabee kee agyaa ke anusar jo yahova kee or se usake naabiyon ke dara ai thee, jhanj, saranagiyan aur veenaaen liae huae leaviyon ko yahova ke bhvan men khda kiya." 
2Chronicles29:26 tab leveey daud ke chalaae baje liae hua, aur yajak turahiyan liae huae khde huae." 
2Chronicles29:27 tab hijaakiyyah ne vedee par homabaali chaddhane kee agyaa dee, aur jab homabali chaddhne lagee, tab yahova ka geet arambh hua, aur turahiyan aur israaael ke raja daud ke baje bajane lage." 
2Chronicles29:28 aur mandlee ke sab log dandvat karate aur ganevale gate aur turahee foonkanevale foonkate rahe yah sab tab tak hoeta raha, jab tak homabaali chaddh n chukee." 
2Chronicles29:29 aur jab baali chaddh chukee, tab raja aur jitane usake sang vahan the, un sabhon ne sir jhukakar dandvat kiya." 
2Chronicles29:30 aur raja hijaakiyyah aur hakimon ne leaviyon ko agyaa dee, ki daud aur asap dasha ke bhjan gakar yahova kee stuti karen. aur unhon ne anand ke sath stuati kee aur sir navakar dandvat kiya." 
2Chronicles29:31 tab hijaakiyyah kahane laga, ab tum ne yahova ke nimitt apana arpan kiya haai isaaliye sameep akar yahova ke bhvan men melabali aur dhanyavadabaali pahunchao. tab mandlee ke logon ne melabali aur dhanyavadabaali pahuncha dia, aur jitane apanee ichchha se dena chahate the unhon ne bhee homabaali pahunchaae." 
2Chronicles29:32 jo homabaali pashu mandlee ke lag le aa, unakee ginatee yah thee sattar baail, aek sau meddhe, aur do sau bhed ke bachche ye sab yahova ke nimitt homabaali ke kam men aae." 
2Chronicles29:33 aur paavitra kiae huae pashu, chh sau baail aur teen hajar bhed-bakaariyan thee." 
2Chronicles29:34 parantu yajak aeese thede the, ki ve sab homabali pashuuon kee khalen n utar sake, tab unake bhai leveey us samay tak unakee sahayata karate rahe jab tak vah kam nipatt n gaya, aur yajakon ne apane ko paavitra n kiya kyonaki leveey apane ko paavitra karane ke liye paavitra yajakon se aadhaik seedho man ke the." 
2Chronicles29:35 aur fir homabali pashu bahut the, aur melabali pashuuon kee chaba bhee bahut thee, aur aek aek homabaali ke sath ardha bhee dena pada. yon yahova ke bhvan men kee upasana tteek kee gai." 
2Chronicles29:36 tab hijaakiyyah aur saree praja ke log us kam ke karan anandait hua, jo yahova ne apanee praja ke liye taaiyar kiya tha kyonaki vah kam aekaaek ho gaya tha." 
2Chronicles30:1 fir hijaakiyyah ne sare israaael aur yahooda men kahala bheja, aur aepraaim aur manashsho ke pas is ashay ke patra likh bheje, ki tum yarooshalem ko yahova ke bhvan men israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye fasah manane ko ao." 
2Chronicles30:2 raja aur usake hakimon aur yarooshalem kee mandlee ne sammaati kee thee ki fasah ko doosare maheene men manaaen. 
2Chronicles30:3 ve use us samay is karan n mana sakate the, kyonki thode hee yajakon ne apane apane ko pavitra kiya tha, aur praja ke log yarooshalem men ikatthe n huae the." 
2Chronicles30:4 aur yah bat raja aur saree mandlee ko achchhee lagee. 
2Chronicles30:5 tab unhon ne yah tthara diya, ki bershoba se lekar dan ke sare israaaeliyon men yah prachar kiya jay, ki yarooshalem men israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye fasah manane ko chale ao kyonki unhon ne itanee badee sankhya men usako is prakar n manaya tha jaaisa ki likha haai." 
2Chronicles30:6 isaliye harakare raja aur usake haakimon se chitthiyan lekar, raja kee agyaa ke anusar sare israaael aur yahooda men ghoome, aur yah kahate gaa, ki he israaaeliyo! ibraaheem, isahak aur israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee or firo, ki vah ashshoor ke rajaon ke hath se bache huae tum logaen kee or fire." 
2Chronicles30:7 aur apane purakhaon aur bhaiyon ke saman mat bano, jinhon ne apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova se vishvasaghaat kiya tha, aur us ne unhen chaakit hone ka karan kar diya, jaaisa ki tum svayan dekh rahe ho." 
2Chronicles30:8 ab apane purakhaon kee nai hatt n karo, varan yahova ke adhaeen hokar usake us paavitrasthan men ao jise us ne sada ke liye paavitra kiya haai, aur apane parameshvar yahova kee upasana karo, ki usaka bhdka hua krodha tum par se door ho jaae." 
2Chronicles30:9 yaadi tum yahova kee or firoge to jo tumhare bhaiyon aur ladkebalon ko bandhaua banake le gaae haai, ve un par daya karenge, aur ve is desh men lautt sakenge kyonki tumhara parameshvar yahova anugrahakaree aur dayalu haai, aur yaadi tum usakee or firoge to vah apana munh tum se n modega." 
2Chronicles30:10 is prakar harakare aepraaim aur manashsho ke deshon men nagar nagar hote huae jabooloon tak gaae parantu unhon ne unakee hansee kee, aur unhen tttthon men udaya." 
2Chronicles30:11 taubhee ashor, manashsho aur jabooloon men se kuchh log deen hokar yarooshalem ko aae." 
2Chronicles30:12 aur yahooda men bhee parameshvar kee aeesee shaaktai hui, ki ve aek man hokar, jo agyaa raja aur hakimon ne yahova ke vachan ke anusar dee thee, use manane ko taaiyar huae." 
2Chronicles30:13 is prakar adhaik log yarooshalem men isaliye ikatthe hua, ki doosare maheene men akhmeeree rottee ka pavrva manen. aur bahut badee sabha ikatthee ho gai." 
2Chronicles30:14 aur unhon ne uttkar, yarooshalem kee veadiyon aur dhoom jalane ke sab sthanon ko uttakar kidraen nale men faenk diya." 
2Chronicles30:15 tab doosare maheene ke chaudahaven din ko unhon ne fasah ke pashu bali kiae tab yajak aur leveey lajjait huae aur apane ko paavitra karake homabaaliyon ko yahova ke bhvan men le aae. 
2Chronicles30:16 aur ve apane niyam ke anuusar, arthata parameshvar ke jan moosa kee vyavastha ke anusar, apane apane sthan par khde hua, aur yajakon ne rakt ko leviyon ke hath se lekar chhdik diya." 
2Chronicles30:17 kyonaki sabha men bahute aeese the jinhon ne apane ko pavitra n kiya tha isaliye sab ashuuddh logon ke fasah ke pashuuon ko bali karane ka adhaikar leaviyon ko diya gaya, ki unako yahova ke liye paavitra karen." 
2Chronicles30:18 bahut se logon ne arthata aepraaim, manashsho, issakar aur jabooloon men se bahuton ne apane ko shuuddh naheen kiya tha, taubhee ve fasah ke pashu ka mans likhee hui vidhai ke viruddh khate the. kyonkee hijaakiyyah ne unake liye yah praarthna kee thee, ki yahova jo bhla haai, vah un sabhon ke pap ddhanp de" 
2Chronicles30:19 jo parameshvar kee arthata apane poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova kee khoj men man lagaae huae haai, chahe ve paavitrasthan kee vidhai ke anusar shuuddh n bhee hon." 
2Chronicles30:20 aur yahova ne hijaakiyyah kee yah praarthn sunakar logon ko changa kiya. 
2Chronicles30:21 aur jo israaaelee yarooshalem men upaasthiat the, ve sat din tak akhmeeree rottee ka pavrva bade anand se manate rahe aur praatidin leveey aur yajak unche shabd ke baje yahova ke liye bajakar yahova kee stuti karate rahe." 
2Chronicles30:22 aur jitane leveey yahova ka bhjan buddhimanee ke sath karate the, unako hijaakiyyah ne shaaantai ke vachan kahe. is prakar ve melabaali chaddhakar aur apane purvajon ke parameshvar yahova ke sammukh papangeekar karate rahe aur us niyat pavrva ke saton din tak khate rahe." 
2Chronicles30:23 tab saree sabha ne sammaati kee ki ham aur sat din varva manenge so unhon ne aur sat din anand se pavrva manaya. 
2Chronicles30:24 kyonaki yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ne sabha ko aek hajar bachhde aur sat hajar bhed-bakaariyan de dee, aur hakimon ne sabha ko aek hajar bachhde aur das hajar bhed-bakaariyan dee, aur bahut se yajakon ne apane ko paavitra kiya." 
2Chronicles30:25 tab yajakon aur leaviyon samet yahooda kee saree sabha, aur israaael se aae huon kee sabha, aur israaael ke desh se aae hua, aur yahooda men rahanevale paradeshae, in sabhon ne anand kiya." 
2Chronicles30:26 so yarooshalem men bada anand hua, kyonaki daud ke putra israaael ke raja sulaaiman ke dinon se aeesee bat yarooshalem men n hui thee." 
2Chronicles30:27 ant men leveey yajakon ne khde hokar praja ko ashaeervad diya, aur unakee sunee gai, aur unakee praarthna usake papitra dhaam tak arthata svarga tak pahunchee." 
2Chronicles31:1 jab yah sab ho chuka, tab jitane israaaelee apaasthiat the, un sabhon ne yahooda ke nagaron men jakar, sare yahooda aur binyameen aur aepraem aur manashsho men ki latton ko tod diya, ashoron ko katt dala, aur unche sthanon aur vediyon ko gira diya aur unhon ne un sab ka ant kar diya. tab sab israaaelee apane apane nagar ko lauttkar, apanee apanee nij boomi men pahunche." 
2Chronicles31:2 aur hijaakiyyah ne yajakon ke dalon ko aur leaviyon ko varan yajakon aur leviyon donon ko, prati dal ke anusar aur aek aek matushy ko usakee sevakai ke anusar isaliye tthara diya, ki ve yahova kee chhavanee ke daron ke bheetar homabali, melabali, seva tthal, dhanyavad aur stuati kiya karen." 
2Chronicles31:3 fir us ne apanee sampattai men se rajabhasha ko homabaaliyon ke liye tthara diya arthta sabere aur sanjh kee homabali aur vishraam aur naye chand ke dinon aur niyat samayon kee homabaali ke liye jaaisa ki yahova kee vyavastha men likha haai. 
2Chronicles31:4 aur us ne yarooshalem men rahanevalon ko yajakon aur leviyon ko unaka bhag dene kee agyaa dee, taaki ve yahova kee vyavastha ke kam man lagakar kar saken." 
2Chronicles31:5 yah agyaa sunate hee israaaelee ann, naya dakhmadha, ttttka tel, madha aaadi khetee kee sab bhanti kee pahilee upaj bahutayat se dene, aur sab vastuon ka dashamansh aadhaik matra men lane lage." 
2Chronicles31:6 aur jo israaaelee aur yahoodee, yahooda ke nagaron men rahate the, ve bhee baailon aur bhed-bakaariyon ka dashamansha, aur un paavitra vastuon ka dashamansha, jo unake parameshvar yahova ke nimitt paavitra kee gai thee, lakar ddher ddher karake rakhne lage." 
2Chronicles31:7 is prakar ddher ka lagana unhon ne teesare maheene men arambh kiya aur sataven maheene men poora kiya. 
2Chronicles31:8 jab hijaakiyyah aur hakimon ne akar un ddheron ko dekha, tab yahova ko aur usakee praja israaael ko dhany dhany kaha." 
2Chronicles31:9 tab hijaakiyyah ne yajakon aur leviyon se un ddheron ke vishay poochha. 
2Chronicles31:10 aur ajaryah mahayajak ne jo sadok ke gharane ka tha, us se kaha, jab se log yahova ke bhvan men uttai hui bhentten lane lage haai, tab se ham log pett bhr khane ko pate haai, varan bahut bacha bhee karata haai kyonki yahova ne apanee praja ko ashaeesh dee haai, aur jo shosh rah gaya haai, usee ka yah bada ddher haai." 
2Chronicles31:11 tab hijaakiyyah ne yahova ke bhvan men kottriyan taaiyar karane kee agyaa dee, aur ve taaiyar kee gai." 
2Chronicles31:12 tab logon ne uttai hui bhentte, dashamansh aur pavitra kee hui vastue, sachchai se pahunchai aur unake mukhy adhaikaree to konanyah nam aek leveey aur oosara usaka bhai shaimee nayab tha." 
2Chronicles31:13 aur konanyah aur usake bhai shaimee ke neeche, hijaakiyyah raja aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke pradhaan ajaryah donon kee agyaa se aheeael, ajajyah, nahat, asahel, yareemet, yojabad, aeleeael, yismakyah, mahat aur banayah adhaikaree the." 
2Chronicles31:14 aur parameshvar ke liye svechchhabaaliyon ka aadhaikaree yimna leveey ka putra kore tha, jo poorva faattk ka darapal tha, ki vah yahova kee uttai hui bhentte, aur paramapaavitra vastuaen bantta kare." 
2Chronicles31:15 aur usake aadhaikar men aeden, minyameen, yeshoo, shamayah, amaryah aur shakanyah yajakon ke nagaron men rahate the, ki ve kya bade, kya chhotte, apane bhaiyon ko unake dalon ke anusar sachchai se diya kare," 
2Chronicles31:16 aur unake alava unako bhee de, jo purushaen kee vanshaavalee ke anusar gine jakar teen varsha kee avastha ke va us se adhaik ayu ke the, aur apane apane dal ke anusar apanee apanee sevakai nibahane ko din din ke kam ke anusar yahova ke bhvan men jaya karate the." 
2Chronicles31:17 aur un yajakon ko bhee de, jinakee vanshaavalee unake pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar kee gai, aur un leaviyon ko bhee jo bees varsha kee avastha se le age ko apane apane dal ke anusar, apane apane kam nibahate the." 
2Chronicles31:18 aur saree sabha men unake balabachcho, striayo, betton aur beattyaien ko bhee de, jinakee vanshavalee thee, kyonki ve sachchai se apane ko paavitra karate the." 
2Chronicles31:19 fir haroon kee santan ke yajakon ko bhee jo apane apane nagaron ke charaivale maaidan men rahate the, dene ke liye ve purush niyukt kiae gaae the jinake nam upar likhe huae the ki ve yajakon ke sab purushaen aur un sab leaviyon ko bhee unaka bhag diya karen jinakee vanshaavalee thee." 
2Chronicles31:20 aur sare yahooda men bhee hijaakiyyah ne aeesa hee prabandha kiya, aur jo kuchh usake parameshvar yahova kee drashtti men bhla or tteek aur sachchai ka tha, use vah karata tha." 
2Chronicles31:21 aur jo jo kam us ne parameshvar ke bhvan kee upasana aur vyavastha aur agyaa ke vishay apane parameshvar kee khoj men kiya, vah us ne apana sara man lagakar kiya aur us men kratarth bhee hua." 
2Chronicles32:1 in baton aur aeese prabandha ke bad ashshoor ka raja sanhereeb ne akar yahooda men pravesh kar or gaddhvale nagaron ke viruddh dere dalakar unako apane labh ke liye lena chaha. 
2Chronicles32:2 yah dekhkar ki sanhereeb nikatt aya haai aur yarooshalem se ladne kee manasa karata haai," 
2Chronicles32:3 hijaakiyyah ne apane hakimon aur veeron ke sath yah sammati kee, ki nagar ke bahar ke soton ko pattva den aur unhon ne usakee sahayata kee." 
2Chronicles32:4 is par bahut se log ikatthe hua, aur yah kahakar, ki ashshoor ke raja kyon yahan aae, aur akar bahut panee paae, unhonne sab soton ko patt diya aur us nadee ko sukha diya jo desh ke madhy hokar bahatee thee." 
2Chronicles32:5 fir hijaakiyyah ne hiyav bandhakar shaharapanah jahan kaheen toottee thee, vahan vahan usako banavaya, aur use gummatton ke barabar uncha kiya aur bahar aek aur shaharapanah banavai, aur daudapur men millo ko draddh kiya. aur bahut se teer aur ddhalen bhee banavai." 
2Chronicles32:6 tab us ne praja ke upar senapaati niyukt kiae aur unako nagar ke faattk ke chauk men ikattha kiya, aur yah kahakar unako dhaeeraj diya," 
2Chronicles32:7 ki hiyav bandhae aur draddh ho tum n to ashshoor ke raja se dro aur n usake sang kee saree bheed se, aur n tumhara man kachcha ho kyonaki jo hamare sath haai, vah usake sangiyon se bada haai." 
2Chronicles32:8 arthata usaka sahara to matushy hee haai parantu hamare sat, hamaree sahayata aur hamaree or se yuddh karane ko hamara parameshvar yahova haai. isaliye praja ke log yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah kee baton par bhrosa kiae rahe." 
2Chronicles32:9 isake bad ashshoor ka raja sanhereeb jo saree sena samet lakeesh ke samhane pada tha, us ne apane karmachaariyon ko yarooshalem men yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah aur un sab yahoodiyon se jo yarooshalem men the yon kahane ke liye bheja," 
2Chronicles32:10 ki ashshoor ka raja sanhereeb kahata haai, ki tumhen kis ka bhrosa haai jisase ki tum ghore huae yarooshalem men baaitte ho?" 
2Chronicles32:11 kya hijaakiyyah tum se yah kahakar ki hamara parameshvar yahova ham ko ashshoor ke raja ke panje se bachaaega tumhen naheen bhramata haai ki tum ko bookhon pyason mare? 
2Chronicles32:12 kya usee hijaakiyyah ne usake unche sthan aur veadiyo door karake yahooda aur yarooshalem ko agyaa naheen dee, ki tum aek hee vedee ke samhane dandvat karana aur usee par dhoop jalana?" 
2Chronicles32:13 kya tum ko maloom nahee, ki maain ne aur mere purakhaon ne desh desh ke sab logon se kya kya kiya haai? kya un deshon kee jatiyon ke devata kisee bhee upay se apane desh ko mere hath se bacha sake?" 
2Chronicles32:14 jitanee jatiyon ka mere purakhaon ne satyanash kiya haai unake sab devataon men se aeesa kaun tha jo apanee praja ko mere hath se bacha saka ho? fir tumhara devata tum ko mere hath se kaaise bacha sakega? 
2Chronicles32:15 ab hijaakiyyah tum ko is reeti bhulane athva bahakane n paa, aur tum usakee prateeati n karo, kyonki kisee jaati ya rajy ka koi devata apanee praja ko n to mere hath se aur n mere purakhaon ke hath se bacha saka. yah nishchay haai ki tumhara devata tum ko mere hath se naheen bacha sakega." 
2Chronicles32:16 is se bhee aadhaik usake karmachariyon ne yahova parameshvar kee, aur usake das hijaakiyyah kee ninda kee." 
2Chronicles32:17 fir us ne aeesa aek patra bheja, jis men israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee ninda kee ye baten likhee thee, ki jaaise desh desh kee jatiyon ke devataon ne apanee apanee praja ko mere hath se naheen bachaya vaaise hee hijaakiyyah ka devata bhee apanee praja ko mere hath se naheen bacha sakega." 
2Chronicles32:18 aur unhon ne unche shabd se un yarooshaleamiyon ko jo shaharapanah par baaitte the, yahoodee bolee men pukara, ki unako drakar ghabarahatt men dal den jis se nagar ko le len." 
2Chronicles32:19 aur unhon ne yarooshalem ke parameshvar kee aeesee charcha kee, ki mano prathvee ke desh desh ke logon ke devataon ke barabar ho, jo manushyon ke banaae huae haain." 
2Chronicles32:20 tab in ghattnaon ke karan raja hijaakiyyah aur amos ke putra yashaayah nabee donon ne praarthna kee aur svarga kee or dohai dee. 
2Chronicles32:21 tab yahova ne aek doot bhej diya, jis ne ashshoor ke raja kee chhavanee men sab shooraveero, pradhaanon aur senapaatiyon ko nash kiya. aur vah laajjait hokar, ane desh ko lautt gaya. aur jab vah apane devata ke bhvan men tha, tab usake nij putraen ne vaheen use talavar se mar dala." 
2Chronicles32:22 yon yahova ne hijaakiyyah aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ko ashshoor ke raja sanhereeb aur apane sab shatrauon ke hath se bachaya, aur charon or unakee aguvai kee." 
2Chronicles32:23 aur bahut log yarooshalem ko yahova ke liye bhentt aur yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ke liye anamol vastuaen le ane lage, aur us samay se vah sab jatiyon kee draashtti men mahan tthara." 
2Chronicles32:24 un dinon hijaakiyyah aeesa rogee hua, ki vah mara chahata tha, tab us ne yahova se praarthna kee aur us ne us se baten karake usake liye ek chamatkar dikhaya." 
2Chronicles32:25 parantu hijaakiyyah ne us upakar ka badala n diya, kyonaki usaka man fool utta tha. is karan usaka kop us par aur yahooda aur yarooshalem par bhdka." 
2Chronicles32:26 tab hijaakiyyah yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon samet apane man ke foolane ke karan deen ho gaya, isaliye yahova ka krodha un par hijaakiyyah ke dinon men n bhdka." 
2Chronicles32:27 aur hijaakiyyah ko bahut hee dhan aur vibhv mila aur us ne chandee, sone, manaiyo, sugandhadravy, ddhalon aur sab prakar ke manabhavane patraen ke liye bhndar banavaae." 
2Chronicles32:28 fir us ne ann, naya dakhmadha, aur ttttka lel ke liye bhndar, aur sab bhanati ke pashuuon ke liye than, aur bhed-bakaariyon ke liye bhedshaalaaen banavai." 
2Chronicles32:29 aur us ne nagar basaa, aur bahut hee bhed-bakaariyon aur gaya-baailon kee sampattai ikattha kar lee, kyonki parameshvar ne use bahut hee dhan diya tha." 
2Chronicles32:30 usee hijaakiyyah ne geehon nam nadee ke upar ke sote ko pattkar us nadee ko neeche kee or daudapur kee paachchhim alang ko seedha pahunchaya, aur hijaakiyyah apane sab kamon men kratarth hota tha." 
2Chronicles32:31 taubhee jab babel ke haakimon ne usake pas usake desh men kiae huae chamatkar ke vishay poochhne ko doot bheje tab parameshvar ne usako isaaliye chhod diya, ki usako parakh kar usake man ka sara bhed jan le." 
2Chronicles32:32 hijaakiyyah ke aur kam, or usake bhaktai ke kam amos ke putra yashaayah nabee ke darshan nam pustak me, aur yahooda aur israaael ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men likhe haain." 
2Chronicles32:33 ant men hijaakiyyah apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur usako daud kee santan ke kabirstan kee chaddhai par mittee dee gai, aur sab yahoodiyon aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ne usakee mratyu par usaka adaraman kiya. aur usaka putra manashsho usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Chronicles33:1 jab manashsho rajy karane laga tab vah barah varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men pachapan varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles33:2 us ne vah kiya, jo yahova kee draashtti men bura tha, arthata un jaatiyon ke ghainaune kamon ke anusar jinako yahova ne israaealiyon ke samhane se desh se tikal diya tha." 
2Chronicles33:3 us ne un unche sthanon ko jinhen usake pita hijaakiyyah ne tod diya tha, fir banaya, aur bal nam devataon ke liye veadiyan or ashora nam mooraten banai, aur akash ke sare gan ko dandvat karata, aur unakee upasana karata raha." 
2Chronicles33:4 aur us ne yahova ke us bhvan me vediyan banai jisake vishay yahova ne kaha tha ki yarooshalem men mera nam sada bana rahega. 
2Chronicles33:5 varan yahova ke bhvan ke donon anganon men bhee us ne akash ke sare gan ke liye veadiyan banai. 
2Chronicles33:6 fir us ne hinnom ke bette kee tarai men apane ladkebalon ko hom karake chaddhaya, aur shuubh-ashuubh muhootan ko manata, aur ttona aur tantra-mantra karata, aur ojhon aur bootasiddhivalon se vyavahar karata tha. varan us ne aeese bahut se kam kia, jo yahova kee draashtti men bure haain aur jin se vah aprasann hota haai." 
2Chronicles33:7 aur us ne apanee khudavai hui moottair parameshvar ke us bhvan men sthapan kee jisake vishay parameshvar ne daud aur usake putra sulaaiman se kaha tha, ki is bhvan me, aur yarooshalem me, jisako maain ne israaael ke sab gotraen men se chun liya haai maain ana nam sarvada rakoonga," 
2Chronicles33:8 aur maain aeesa n karoonga ki jo desh maain ne tumhare purakhaon ko diya tha, us men se israaael fir mara mara fire itana avashy ho ki ve meree sab agyaaon ko arthata moosa kee dee hui saree vyavastha aur vidhaiyon aur niyamon ko palan karane kee chaukasee karen." 
2Chronicles33:9 aur manashsho ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ko yahan tak bhttka diya ki unhon ne un jatiyon se bhee baddhkar burai kee, jinhen yahova ne israaaeliyon ke samhane se vinash kiya tha." 
2Chronicles33:10 aur yahova ne manashsho aur usakee praja se baten kee, parantu unhon ne kuchh dhyan naheen diya." 
2Chronicles33:11 tab yahova ne un par ashshoor ke senapaatiyon se chaddhai karai, aur ye manashsho ko nakel dalakar, aur peetal kee bediyan jakadkar, use babel ko le gaae." 
2Chronicles33:12 tab sankatt men padkar vah apane parameshvar yahova ko manane laga, aur apane poorvajon ke parameshvar ke samhane bahut deen hua, aur us se praarthna kee." 
2Chronicles33:13 tab us ne prasann hokar usakee binatee sunee, aur usako yarooshalem men pahunchakar usaka rajy lautta diya. tab manashsho ko nishchay ho gaya ki yahova hee parameshvar haai." 
2Chronicles33:14 isake bad us ne daudamur se bahar geehon ke pashchaim kee or nale men machchhlee faattk tak aek shaharapanah banavai, fir opel ko ghorakar bahut uncha kar diya aur yahooda ke sab gaddhvale nagaron men senapati tthara diae." 
2Chronicles33:15 fir us ne paraye devataon ko aur yahova ke bhvan men kee moottair ko, aur jitanee vediyan us ne yahova ke bhvan ke parvat par, aur yarooshalem men banavai thee, un sab ko door karake nagar se bahar faenkava diya." 
2Chronicles33:16 tab us ne yahova kee vedee kee marammat kee, aur us par melabaali aur dhanyavadabaali chaddhane laga, aur yahoodiyon ko israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee upasana karate kee agyaa dee." 
2Chronicles33:17 taubhee praja ke log unche sthanon par baalidan karate rahe, parantu keval apane parameshvar yahova ke liye." 
2Chronicles33:18 manashsho ke or kam, aur us ne jo praarthna apane parameshvar se kee, aur un dashairyon ke vachan jo israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke nam se us se baten karate the, yah sab israaael ke rajaon ke iatihas men likha hua haai." 
2Chronicles33:19 aur usakee praarthna aur vah kaaise sunee gai, aur usaka sara pap aur vishvasaghaat aur us ne deen hone se pahile kahan kahan unche sthan banavaa, aur ashora nam aur khudee hui moottairyan khdee karai, yah sab hosho ke vachanon men jikha haai." 
2Chronicles33:20 nidan manashsho apane purakhaon ke sang so gaya aur use usee ke ghar men mittee dee gai aur usaka putra amon usake sthan par rajy karane laga. 
2Chronicles33:21 jab amon rajy karane laga, tab vah bais varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men do varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles33:22 aur us ne apane pita manashsho kee nai vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai. aur jitanee moottairyan usake pita manashsho ne khodakar banavai thee, vah bhee un sabhon ke samhane balidan karata aur un sabhon kee upasana bhee karata tha." 
2Chronicles33:23 aur jaaise usaka pita manashsho yahova ke samhane deen hua, vaaise vah deen n hua, varan amon adhaik doshaee hota gaya." 
2Chronicles33:24 aur usake karmachaariyon ne draeh kee goshttee karake, usako usee ke bhvan men mar dala." 
2Chronicles33:25 tab sadhaaran logon ne un sabhon ko mar dala, jinhon ne raja amon se draeh kee goshttee kee thee aur logon ne usake putra yoshaiyyah ko usake sthan par raja banaya." 
2Chronicles34:1 jab yoshaiyyah rajy karane laga tab vah att varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men ikatees varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles34:2 us ne vah kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men tteek haai, aur jin magan par usaka moolapurush daud chalata raha, unheen par vah bhee chala karata tha aur us se n to daahinee or mooda, aur n bain ora." 
2Chronicles34:3 vah ladka hee tha, arthat usako gaee par baaitte att varsha poore bhee n huae the ki apane moolamurush daud ke parameshvar kee khoj karane laga, aur barahaven varsha men vah unche sthanon aur ashera nam mooraton ko aur khudee aur ddhlee hui mooraton ko door karake, yahooda aur yarooshalem ko shuuddh karane laga." 
2Chronicles34:4 aur baladevataon kee vediyan usake samhane tod dalee gai, aur soorya kee praatimayen jo unake upar unche par thee, us ne katt dalee, aur ashora nam, aur khudee aur ddhlee hui mooraton ko us ne todkar pees dala, aur unakee bukanee un logon kee kabaron par chhtaira dee, jo unako baali chaddhate the." 
2Chronicles34:5 aur pujariyon kee haaddiyan us ne unheen kee veadiyon par jalai. yon us ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ko shuuddh kiya. 
2Chronicles34:6 fir manashsho, aepraaim aur shaimon ke baran naptalee tak ke nagaron ke khndharon me, us ne vediyon ko tod dala," 
2Chronicles34:7 aur ashora nam aur khudee hui mooraton ko peesakar bukanee kar dala, aur israaael ke sare desh kee soorya kee sab pratimaon ko kattkar yarooshalem ko lautt gaya." 
2Chronicles34:8 fir apane rajy ke attarahaven varsha men jab vah desh aur bhvan donon ko shuuddh kar chuka, tab us ne asalyah ke putra shaapan aur nagar ke hakim maseyah aur yoahaj ke putra iatihas ke lekhk yoah ko apane parameshvar yahova ke bhvan kee marammat karane ke liye bhej diya." 
2Chronicles34:9 so unhon ne hilkaiyyah mahayajak ke pas jakar jo rupaya parameshvar ke bhvan men laya gaya tha, arthata jo leveey darabanon ne manashshiayo, aepraaimiyon aur sab bache huae israaaeliyon se aur sab yahoodiyon aur binyameeaniyon se aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ke hath se lekar ikattha kiya tha, usako saunp diya." 
2Chronicles34:10 arthata unhon ne use un kam karanevalon ke hath saunp diya jo yahova ke bhvan ke kam par mukhaiye the, aur yahova ke bhvan ke un kam karanevalon ne use bhvan men jo kuchh tootta footta tha, usakee marammat karane men lagaya." 
2Chronicles34:11 arthata unhon ne use baddhiyon aur rajon ko diya ki ve gaddhe huae patthr aur jodon ke liye lakadee mol le, aur un gharon ko patten jo yahooda ke rajaon ne nash kar diae the." 
2Chronicles34:12 aur ve manushy sachchai se kam karate the, aur unake adhaikaree marareey, yahat aur obadhah, leveey aur kahatee, jakaryah aur mashuullam kam chalanevale aur gane-bajane ka bhed sab jananevale leveey bhee the." 
2Chronicles34:13 fir ve bojhyaien ke aadhaikaree the aur bhanati bhanati kee sevakai aur kam chalanevale the, aur kuchh leveey munshaee saradar aur daraban the." 
2Chronicles34:14 jab ve us rupaye ko jo yahova ke bhvan men pahunchaya gaya tha, nikal rahe the, tab hilkaiyyah yajak ko moosa ke dara dee hui yahova kee vyavastha kee pustak milee." 
2Chronicles34:15 tab hilkaiyyah ne shaapan mantraee se kaha, mujhe yahova ke bhvan men vyavastha kee pustak milee haai tab hilkaiyyah ne shaapan ko vah pustak dee." 
2Chronicles34:16 tab shaapan us pustak ko raja ke pas le gaya, aur yah sandesh diya, ki jo jo kam tere karmachaariyon ko saunpa gaya tha use ve kar rahe haain." 
2Chronicles34:17 aur jo rupaya yahova ke bhvan men mila, usako unhon ne undelakar muakhaiyon aur kareegaron ke hathon men saunp diya haai." 
2Chronicles34:18 fir shaapan mantraee ne raja ko yah bhee bata diya ki hilkaiyyah yajak ne mujhe aek pustak dee haai tab shapan ne us men se raja ko paddhkar sunaya. 
2Chronicles34:19 vyavastha kee ve baten sunakar raja ne apane vasr faaddhe. 
2Chronicles34:20 fir raja ne hilkaiyyah shaapan ke putra aheekam, meeka ke putra abdon, shaapan mantraee aur asayah nam apane karmacharee ko agyaa dee," 
2Chronicles34:21 ki tum jakar meree or se aur israaael aur yahooda men rahanevalon kee or se is pai hui pustak ke vachanon ke vishy yahova se poochho kyonaki yahova kee badee hee jalajalahatt ham par isaaliye bhdkee haai ki hamare purakhaon ne yahova ka vachan naheen mana, aur is pustak men likhee hui sab agyaaon ka palan naheen kiya." 
2Chronicles34:22 tab hilkayyah ne raja ke aur aur dooton samet hulda nabiya ke pas jakar us se usee bat ke anusar baten kee, vah to us shalloom kee sree thee jo tokht ka putra aur hasra ka pota aur vasralay ka rakhvala tha aur vah sree yarooshalem ke naye ttole men rahatee thee." 
2Chronicles34:23 us ne un se kaha, israael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki jis purush ne tum ko mere pas bheja, us se yah kaho," 
2Chronicles34:24 ki yahova yon kahata haai, ki sun, maain is sthan aur is ke nivaasiyon par vipaattai dalakar yahooda ke raja ke samhane jo pustak paddhee gai, us men jitane shaap likhe haain un sabhon ko poora karoonga." 
2Chronicles34:25 un logon ne mujhe tyagakar paraye devataon ke liye dhoop jalaya haai aur apanee banai hui sab vastuon ke dara mujhe ris dilai haai, is karan meree jalajalahatt is sthan par bhdk uttee haai, aur shaant n hogee." 
2Chronicles34:26 parantu yahooda ka raja jis ne tumhen yahova ke poochhne ko bhej diya haai us se tum yon kaho, ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai," 
2Chronicles34:27 ki isaaliye ki too ve baten sunakar deen hua, aur parameshvar ke samhane apana sir navaya, aur usakee baten sunakar jo usane is sthan aur is ke nivaasiyon ke viruddh kahee, too ne mere samhane apana sir navaya, aur vasr faadkar mere samhane roya haai, is karan maain ne teree sunee haai yahova kee yahee banee haai." 
2Chronicles34:28 sun, maain tujhe tere purakhaon ke sang aeesa milaunga ki too shaanti se apanee kabra ko pahunchaya jayaga aur jo vipaattai maain is sthan par, aur isake nivaasiyon par dalana chahata hoo, us men se tujhe apanee ankhon se kuchh bhee dekhna n padega. tab un logon ne lauttkar raja ko yahee sandesh diya." 
2Chronicles34:29 tab raja ne sahooda aur yarooshalem ke sab puraaniyon ko ikatthe hone ko bachalava bheja. 
2Chronicles34:30 aur raja yahooda ke sab logon aur yarooshalem ke sab nivaasiyon aur yajakon aur leaviyon varan chhotte bade saree praja ke logon ko sang lekar yahova ke bhvan ko gaya tab us n jo vacha kee pustak yahova ke bhvan men milee thaee us men kee saree baten unako paddhkar sunai. 
2Chronicles34:31 tab raja ne apane sthan par khda hokar, yahova se is ashay kee vacha bandhaee ki maain yahova ke peechhe peechhe chaloonga, aur apane poorn man aur poorn jeev se usakee agyaaae, chitauaniyon aur vidhaiyon ka palan karoonga, aur in vacha kee baton ko jo is pustak men likhee haai, pooree karoonga." 
2Chronicles34:32 aur us ne un sabhon se jo yarooshalem men aur binyameen men the vaaisee hee vacha bandhaai. aur yarooshalem ke nivasee, parameshvar jo unake pitaron ka parameshvar tha, usakee vacha ke anusar karane lage." 
2Chronicles34:33 aur yoshaiyyah ne israaaeliyon ke sab deshaen men se sab ghainaunee vastuon ko door karake jitane israaael men mile, un sabhon se upasana karai arthata unake parameshvar sahova kee upasana karai. aur usake jeevan bhr unhon ne apane poovajon ke parameshvar yahova ke peechhe chalana n chhoda." 
2Chronicles35:1 aur yoshaiyyah ne yarooshalem men yahova ke liye fasah parva mana aur pahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko fasah ka pashu bali kiya gaya. 
2Chronicles35:2 aur us ne yajakon ko apane apane kam men ttharaya, aur yahova ke bhvan men kee seva karane ko unaka hiyab bandhaaya." 
2Chronicles35:3 fir leveey jo sab israaael liyon ko sikhate aur yahova ke liye paavitra tthare the, un se us ne kaha, tum pavitra sandook ko us bhvan men rakho jo daud ke putra israaael ke raja sulaaiman ne banavaya tha ab tum ko kandhaen par bojh uttana n hoga. ab apane parameshvar yahova kee aur usakee praja israaael kee seva karo." 
2Chronicles35:4 aur israaael ke raja daud aur usake putra sulaaiman donon kee likhee hui vidhaiyon ke anusar, apane apane pitaron ke anusar, apane apane dal men taaiyar raho." 
2Chronicles35:5 aur tumhare bhai logon ke pitaron ke gharanon ke bhagon ke anusar paavitrasthan men khde raho, arthata unake aek bhag ke liye leaviyon ke aek aek pitar ke gharane ka aek bhag ho." 
2Chronicles35:6 aur fasah ke pashuuon ko baali karo, aur apane apane ko paavitra karake apane bhaiyon ke liye taaiyaree karo ki ve yahova ke us vachan ke anusar kar sake, jo us ne moosa ke dara kaha tha." 
2Chronicles35:7 fir yoshaiyyah ne sab logon ko jo vahan upaasthiat the, tees hajar bhedon aur bakaariyon ke bachche aur teen hajar baail diae the ye sab fasah ke baalidanon ke liye raja kee sampattai men se diae gaae the." 
2Chronicles35:8 aur usake haakimon ne praja ke logo, yajakon aur leviyon ko svechchha -baaliyon ke liye pashu diae. aur hilkaiyyah, jakaryah aur yaheeael nam parameshvar ke bhvan ke pradhaanon ne yajakon ko do hajar chhsau bhed -bakaariyan. aur teen sau baail fasah ke balidanon ke liae diae." 
2Chronicles35:9 aur konanyah ne aur shamayah aur natanel jo usake bhai the, aur hasabyah, yeeael aur yojabad namak leviyon ke pradhaanon ne leviyon ko panch hajar bhed-bakaariya, aur panch sau baail fasah ke baalidanon ke liye diae." 
2Chronicles35:10 is prakar upasana kee taaiyaree ho gai, aur raja kee agyaa ke anusar yajak apane apane sthan par, aur leveey apane apane dal men khde huaee." 
2Chronicles35:11 tab fasah ke pashu baali kiae gaa, aur yajak bali karanevalon ke hath se lohoo ko lekar chhdik dete aur leveey unakee khal utarate gaae." 
2Chronicles35:12 tab unhon ne homabaali ke pashu isaliye alag kiae ki unhen logon ke pitaron ke gharanon ke bhagon ke anusar de, ki ve unhen yahova ke liye chaddhva den jaaisa ki moosa kee pustak men likha haai aur baailon ko bhee unhon ne vaaisa hee kiya." 
2Chronicles35:13 tab unhon ne fasah ke pashuuon ka mans vidhai ke anusar ag men boonja, aur paavitra vastuae, hanadyaien aur handon aur thaaliyon men sijha kar foota se logon ko pahuncha diya." 
2Chronicles35:14 tab unhon ne apane liye aur yajakon ke liye taaiyaree kee, kyonki haroon kee santan ke yajak homabali ke pashu aur charabee rat tak chaddhate rahe, is karan leviyon ne apane liye aur haroon kee santan ke yajakon ke liye taaiyaree kee." 
2Chronicles35:15 aur asap ke vansh ke gavaaiye, daud, asap, heman aur raja ke dasha yadootoon kee agyaa ke anusar apane apane sthan par rahe, aur darapal aek aek faattk par rahe. unhen apana apana kam chhodna n pada, kyonki unake bhi leaviyon ne unake liye taaiyaree kee." 
2Chronicles35:16 yon usee din raja yoshaiyyah kee agyaa ke anusar fasah manane aur yahova kee bedee par homabaali chaddhane ke liye yahova kee saree apasana kee taaiyaree kee gai. 
2Chronicles35:17 jo israaaelee vahan upaasthiat the unhon ne fasah ko usee samay aur akhmeeree rottee ke parva ko sat din tak mana. 
2Chronicles35:18 is fasah ke barabar shamooael nabee ke dinon se israaael men koi fasah manaya n gaya tha, aur n israaael ke kisee raja ne aeesa manaya, jaaisa yoshaiyyah aur yajako, leviyon aur jitane yahoodee aur israaaelee upasthiat the, unahon ne aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ne manaya." 
2Chronicles35:19 yah fasah yoshaiyyah ke rajy ke attarahaven varsha men manaya gaya. 
2Chronicles35:20 isake bad jab yoshaiyyah bhvan ko taaiyar kar chuka, tab misra ke raja nako ne parat ke pas ke kurkameesh nagar se ladne ko chaddhai kee aur yoshaiyyah usaka samhana karane ko gaya." 
2Chronicles35:21 parantu us ne usake pas dooton se kahala bheja, ki he yahooda ke raja mera tujh se kya kam! aj maain tujh par naheen usee kul par chaddhai kar raha hoo, jisake sath maain yuddh karata hoo fir parameshvar ne mujh se fauta karane ko kaha haai. isaliye parameshvar jo mere sang haai, usase alag rah, kaheen aeesa n ho ki vah tujhe nash kare." 
2Chronicles35:22 parantu yoshaiyyah ne us se munh n moda, varan us se ladne ke liye bhesh badala, aur nako ke un vachanon ko n mana jo us ne parameshvar kee or se kahe the, aur magio kee tarai men us se yuddh karane ko gaya." 
2Chronicles35:23 tab dhanudharariyon ne raja yoshaiyyah kee or teer chhode aur raja ne apane sevakon se kaha, maain to bahut ghaayal hua, isaliye mujhe yahan se le jao." 
2Chronicles35:24 tab usake sevakon ne usako rath par se utar kar usake doosare rath par chaddhaya, aur yarooshalem le gaye. aur vah mar gaya aur usake purakhaon ke kabirstan men usako mittee dee gai. aur yahoodiyon aur yarooshalemiyon ne yoshaiyyah ke liae vilap kiya." 
2Chronicles35:25 aur yirmayah ne yoshaiyyah ke liye vilap ka geet banaya aur sab ganevale aur ganevaliyan apane vilap ke geeton men yoshaiyyah kee charcha aj tak karatee haain. aur inaka gana israaael men aek vidhai ke tuly ttharaya gaya aur ye baten vilapageeton men likhee hui haain. 
2Chronicles35:26 yoshaiyyah ke aur kam aur bhktai ke jo kam us ne usee ke anusar kiae jo yahova kee vyavastha men likha hua haai. 
2Chronicles35:27 aur aadi se ant tak usake sab kam israaael aur yahooda ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men likhe huae haain. 
2Chronicles36:1 tab desh ke logon ne yoshaiyyah ke putra yahoahaj ko lekar usake pita ke sthan par yarooshalem men raja banaya. 
2Chronicles36:2 jab yahoahaj rajy karane laga, tab vah teis varsha ka tha, aur teen maheene tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles36:3 tab misra ke raja ne usako yarooshalem men rajagaee se unar diya, aur desh par sau kikkar chandee aur kikkar bhr lona juramane men dand lagaya." 
2Chronicles36:4 tab misra ke raja ne usake bhai aelyakeem ko yahooda aur yarooshalem ka raja banaya aur usaka nam badalakar yahoyakeem rakha. aur nako usake bhai yahoahaj ko misra men le gaya. 
2Chronicles36:5 jab yahoyakeem rajy karane laga, tab vah pachees varsha ka tha, aur gyarah varsha tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur us ne vah kam kiya, jo usake parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men bura haai." 
2Chronicles36:6 us par babel ke raja nabookadanessar ne chaddhai kee, aur babel le jane ke liye usako beadiyan pahana deen." 
2Chronicles36:7 fir nabookadanessar ne yahova ke bhvan ke kuchh patra babel le jakar, apane mandair men jo babel men tha, rakh diae." 
2Chronicles36:8 yahoyakeem ke aur kam aur us ne jo jo ghainaune kam kia, aur us men jo jo biuraiyan pai gai, vah israaael aur yahooda ke rajaon ke itihas kee pustak men likhee haain. aur usaka putra yahoyakeen usake sthan par rajy karane laga." 
2Chronicles36:9 jab yahoyakeen rajy karane laga, tab vah att varsha ka tha, aur teen maheene aur das din tak yarooshalem men rajy karata raha. aur us ne vah kiya, jo parameshvar yahova kee duashtti men bura haai." 
2Chronicles36:10 naye varsha ke lagate hee nabookadanessar ne logon ko bhejakar, use aur yahova ke bhvan ke manabhavane patraen ko babel men mangava liya, aur usake bhai sidaakiyyah ko yahooda aur yarooshalem par raja niyukt kiya." 
2Chronicles36:11 jab sidaakiyyah rajy karane laga, tab vah ikkees varsha ka tha, aur yarooshalem men gyarah varsha tak rajy karata raha." 
2Chronicles36:12 aur us ne vahee kiya, jo usake parameshvar yahova kee draashtti men bura haai. yadhaapi yirmayah nabee yahova kee or se baten kahata tha, taubhee vah usake samhane deen n hua." 
2Chronicles36:13 fir nabookadanessar jis ne use parameshvar kee shapath khailai thee, us se us ne balava kiya, aur us ne hatt kiya aur apana man kattor kiya, ki vah israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee or n fire." 
2Chronicles36:14 varan sab pradhaan yajakon ne aur logon ne bhee any jatiyon ke se ghainaune kam karake bahut bada vishvasaghaat kiya, aur yahova ke bhvan ko jo us ne yarooshalem men paavitra kiya tha, ashuuddh kar dala." 
2Chronicles36:15 aur unake poorvajon ke parameshvar yahova ne bada yatn karake apane dooton se unake pas kahala bheja, kyonki vah apanee praja aur apane dhaam par taras khata tha" 
2Chronicles36:16 parantu ve parameshvar ke dooton ko tttthon men udate, usake vachanon ko tuchchh janate, aur usake naabiyon kee hansee karate the. nidan yahova apanee praja par aeesa jhunjhla utta, ki bachane ka koi upay n raha." 
2Chronicles36:17 tab us ne un par kasadiyon ke raja se chaddhai karavai, aur is ne unake javanon ko unake pavitra bhvan hee men talavar se mar dala. aur kya javan, kya kunvaree, kya booddhe, kya pakke balavale, kisee par bhee komalata n kee yahova ne sabhon ko usake hath men kar diya." 
2Chronicles36:18 aur kya chhotte, kya bade, parameshvar ke bhvan ke sab patra aur yahova ke bhvan, aur raja, aur usake haakimon ke khjane, in sabhon ko vah babel men le gaya." 
2Chronicles36:19 aur kasadiyo ne parameshvar ka bhvan foonk diya, aur yarooshalem kee shaharapanah ko tod dala, aur ag laga kar usake sab bhvanon ko jalaya, aur us men ka sara bahumooly saman nashtt kar diya." 
2Chronicles36:20 aur jo talavar se bach gaa, unhen vah babel ko le gaya, aur faaras ke rajy ke prabal hone tak ve usake aur usake betton-poton ke adhaeen rahe." 
2Chronicles36:21 yah sab isaliye hua ki yahova ka jo vachan yirmayah ke munh se nikala tha, vah poora ho, ki desh apane vishraam kalon men mukh bhogata rahe. isaliye jab tak vah soona pada raha tab tak arthata sattar varsha ke poore hone tak usako vishraam mila." 
2Chronicles36:22 faaras ke raja koosraoo ke paahile varsha men yahova ne usake man ko ubhara ki jo vachan yirmayah ke munh se nikala tha, vah poora ho. isaaliye us ne apane samast rajy men yah prachar karavaya, aur is ashay kee chitthiyan likhvai," 
2Chronicles36:23 ki faaras ka raja korasraoo kahata haai, ki svarga ke parameshvar yahova ne prathvee bhr ka rajy mujhe diya haai, aur usee ne mujhe agyaa dee haai ki yarooshalem jo yahooda men haai us men mera aek bhvan banava isaaliye he usakee praja ke sab logo, tum men se jo koi chahe ki usaka parameshvar yahova usake sath rahe, to vah vahan ravana ho jaae." 
Ezra1:1 faaras ke raja kusroo ke pahile varsha men yahova ne faaras ke raja kusroo ka man ubhara ki yahova ka jo vachan yirmayah ke munh se nikala tha vah poora ho jaa, isaaliye us ne apane samast rajy men yah prachar karavaya aur likhva bhee diya:" 
Ezra1:2 ki faaras ka raja kusroo yon kahata haai: ki svarga ke parameshvar yahova ne prathvee bhr ka rajy mujhe diya haai, aur us ne mujhe agyaa dee, ki yahooda ke yarooshalem men mera aek bhvan banava." 
Ezra1:3 usakee samast praja ke logon men se tumhare madhy jo koi ho, usaka parameshvar usake sath rahe, aur vah yahooda ke yarooshalem ko jakar israel ke parameshvar yahova ka bhvan banaae - jo yarooshalem men haai vahee parameshvar haai." 
Ezra1:4 aur jo koi kisee sthan men rah gaya ho, jahan vah rahata ho, us sthan ke manushy chandee, sona, dhan aur pashu dekar usakee sahayata karen aur is se adhaik parameshvar ke yarooshalem ke bhvan ke liye apanee apanee ichchha se bhee bhentt chaddhaaen.." 
Ezra1:5 tab yahooda aur binyameen ke jitane pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purooshaen aur yajakon or leviyon ka man parameshvar ne ubhara tha ki jakar yarooshalem men yahova ke bhvan ko banaae, ve sab utt khde hue" 
Ezra1:6 aur unake asapas sab rahanevalon ne chandee ke patra, sona, dhan, pashu aur anamol vastuaen dekar, unakee sahayata kee yah un sab se adhaik tha, jo logon ne apanee apanee ichchha se diya." 
Ezra1:7 fir yahova ne bhvan ke jo patra nabookadanessar ne yarooshalem se nikalakar apane devata ke bhvan men rakhe the," 
Ezra1:8 unako kusroo raja ne, mitoodan khjanchee se nikalava kar, yahoodiyon ke shoshabassar nam pradhaan ko ginakar saunp diya." 
Ezra1:9 unakee ginatee yah thee, arthata sone ke tees aur chandee ke ek hajar parat aur unatees chhuree," 
Ezra1:10 sone ke tees aur maghyam prakar ke chandee ke char sau das kattore tatha aur prakar ke patra aek hajara. 
Ezra1:11 sone chandee ke patra sab milakar panch hajar char sau the. in sabhon ko shoshabassar us samay le aya jab bandhauae babel se yarooshalem ko aae.. 
Ezra2:1 jinako babel ka raja nabookadanessar babel ko bandhaua karake le gaya i, un men se praant ke jo log bandhauai se choottkar yarooshalem aur yahooda ko apane apane nagar men lautte ve ye haain." 
Ezra2:2 ye jaroobbabel, yeshoo, nahemyah, sarayah, relayah, maurdakaai, bilashaan, mispar, bigavaai, rahoom aur bana ke sath aae. israaelee praja ke manushyon kee ginatee yah haai, arthata" 
Ezra2:3 parosh kee santan do hajar aek sau bahattr," 
Ezra2:4 shapatyah kee santan teen sau bahattr," 
Ezra2:5 arah kee santan sat sau pachhhattr," 
Ezra2:6 pahatmoab kee santan yeshoo aur yoab kee santan men se do hajar att sau barah," 
Ezra2:7 aelam kee santan barah sau chauvan," 
Ezra2:8 jatoo kee santan nau sau paaintalees," 
Ezra2:9 jakkaai kee santan sat sau paaintalees," 
Ezra2:10 banee kee santan chh: sau bayalees 
Ezra2:11 bebaai kee santan chh: sau teis," 
Ezra2:12 ajagad kee santan barah sau bais," 
Ezra2:13 adoneekam kee santan chh: sau chhyaiasat," 
Ezra2:14 bigvaai kee santan do hajar chhppan," 
Ezra2:15 adeen kee santan char sau chauvan," 
Ezra2:16 yaahijaakiyyah kee santan ater kee santan men se atthanave," 
Ezra2:17 besaai kee santan teen sau teis," 
Ezra2:18 yora ke log aek sau barah," 
Ezra2:19 hashoom ke log do sau teis," 
Ezra2:20 gibbar ke log panchanave," 
Ezra2:21 betaleehem ke log aek sau teis," 
Ezra2:22 natopa ke manushy chhppana 
Ezra2:23 anatot ke manushy aek sau atthais," 
Ezra2:24 ajmavet ke log bayalees," 
Ezra2:25 kiryatareem kapeera aur berot ke log sat sau taaitalees," 
Ezra2:26 rama aur geba ke log chh: sau ikkees," 
Ezra2:27 mikamas ke manushy aek sau bais," 
Ezra2:28 betel aur aee ke manushy do sau teis," 
Ezra2:29 nabo ke log bavan," 
Ezra2:30 magbees kee santan aek sau chhppan," 
Ezra2:31 doosare aelam kee santan barah sau chauvan," 
Ezra2:32 hareem kee santan teen sau bees," 
Ezra2:33 lod, hadeed aur ono ke log sat sau pachees," 
Ezra2:34 yareeho ke log teen sau paaitalees," 
Ezra2:35 sana ke log teen hajar chh: sau teesa.. 
Ezra2:36 fir yajakon arthata yeshoo ke gharane men se yadayah kee santan nau sau tihattr," 
Ezra2:37 immer kee santan aek hajar bavan," 
Ezra2:38 pashahoor kee santan barah sau saaintalees," 
Ezra2:39 hareem kee santan aek hajar sataraha. 
Ezra2:40 fir leveey, arthata yeshoo kee santan aur kadamiael kee santan hodabyah kee santan men se chauhattra." 
Ezra2:41 fir gavaaiyon men se asap kee santan aek sau atthaisa. 
Ezra2:42 fir darabanon kee santan, shalloom kee santan, ater kee santan, talmon kee santan, akkoob kee santan, hateeta kee santan, aur shaebaai kee santan, ye sab milakar aek sau unatalees huae." 
Ezra2:43 fir nateen kee santan, seeha kee santan, hasoopa kee santan, tabbaot kee santana." 
Ezra2:44 keros kee santan, seeaha kee santan, padon kee santan," 
Ezra2:45 lavana kee santan, hagaba kee santan, akkoob kee santan," 
Ezra2:46 hagab kee santan, shamalaai kee santan, hanan kee santan," 
Ezra2:47 gil kee santan, gahar kee santan, rayah kee santan," 
Ezra2:48 raseen kee santan, nakoda kee santan, gajjam kee santan," 
Ezra2:49 ujja kee santan, paseh kee santan, besaai kee santan," 
Ezra2:50 asna kee santan, mooneem kee santan, napeeseem kee santan," 
Ezra2:51 bakabook kee santan, hakoopa kee santan, hahroor kee santana." 
Ezra2:52 basaloot kee santan, maheeda kee santan, hashara kee santan," 
Ezra2:53 bakors kee santan, seesara kee santan, temah kee santan," 
Ezra2:54 naseeh kee santan, aur hateepa kee santana.." 
Ezra2:55 fir sulaaiman ke dason kee santan, sotaai kee santan, hassoperet kee santan, parooda kee santan," 
Ezra2:56 yala kee santan, dakorn kee santan, giel kee santan," 
Ezra2:57 shapatyah kee santan, hatteel kee santan, pokaretasabayeem kee santan, aur amee kee santana." 
Ezra2:58 sab nateen aur sulaaiman ke dason kee santan, teen sau banave the.." 
Ezra2:59 fir jo telmelah, telahashara, karoob, aan aur immer se aa, parantu ve apane apane pitaron ke gharane aur vanshaavalee n bata sake ki ve israael ke haai, ve ye haain:" 
Ezra2:60 arthata dalayah kee santan, tobiyyah kee santan aur nakoda kee santan, jo milakar chh: sau bavan the." 
Ezra2:61 aur yajakon kee santan men se habayah kee santan, hakkos kee santan aur barjillaai kee santan, jis ne giladee barjille kee aek bettee ko byah liya aur usee ka nam rakh liya tha." 
Ezra2:62 in sabhon ne apanee apanee vanshaavalee ka patra auron kee vanshaavalee kee pothaiyon men ddoonddha, parantu ve n mile, isaliye ve ashuuddh ttharakar yajakapad se nikale gaae." 
Ezra2:63 aur aadhaipaati ne un se kaha, ki jab tak ureem aur tummeem dhaaran karanevala koi yajak n ho, tab tak koi paramapavitra vastu khane n paae.." 
Ezra2:64 samast mandlee milakar bayalees hajar teen sau satt kee thee. 
Ezra2:65 inako chhod inake sat hajar teen sau saaintees dasa-daasiyan aur do sau ganavale aur ganevaliyan theen. 
Ezra2:66 un ke ghaede sat sau chhttees, khchchar do sau paaintalees, untt char sau paaintees," 
Ezra2:67 aur gadahe chh: hajar sat sau bees the. 
Ezra2:68 aur pitaron ke gharanon ke kuchh mukhy mukhy purooshaen ne jab yahova ke bhsan ko jo yarooshalem men haai, aa, tab parameshvar ke bhvan ko usee ke sthan par khda karane ke liye apanee apanee ichchha se kuchh diya." 
Ezra2:69 unhon ne apanee apanee poonjee ke anusar ikasatt hajar darkamon sona aur panch hajar mane chandee aur yajakon ke yogy ek sau angarakhe apanee apanee ichchha se us kam ke khjane men de die. 
Ezra2:70 tab yajak aur leveey aur logon men se kuchh aur gavaaiye aur darapal aur nateen log apane nagar men aur sab israaelee apane apane nagar men fir bas gaae.. 
Ezra3:1 jab satavan maheena aya, aur israaaelee apane apane nagar men bas gaa, to log yarooshalem men aek man hokar ikatthe hue." 
Ezra3:2 tab yosadak ke putra yeshoo ne apane bhai yajakon samet aur shaalateeael ke putra jaroobbabel ne apane bhaiyon samet kamar bandhakar israaael ke parameshvar kee vedee ko banaya ki us par homabali chaddhaae, jaaise ki parameshvar ke bhkt moosa kee vyavastha men likha haai." 
Ezra3:3 tab unhon ne vedee ko usake sthan par khda kiya kyonaki unhen us or ke deshaen ke logon ka bhy raha, aur ve us par yahova ke liye homabaali arthata pratidin sabere aur sanjh ke homabaali chaddhane lage." 
Ezra3:4 aur unhon ne jhopadiyon ke parva ko mana, jaaise ki likha haai, aur pratidin ke homabali aek aek din kee ginatee aur niyam ke anusar chaddhaae." 
Ezra3:5 aur usake bad nity homabaali aur naye naye chand aur yahova ke paavitra kiae huae sab niyat pavan ke bali aur apanee apanee ichchha se yahova ke liye sab svechchhabaali har aek ke liye baali chaddhaae. 
Ezra3:6 sataven maheene ke paahile din se ve yahova ko homabali chaddhane lage. parantu yahova ke maandair kee nev tab tak n dalee gai thee. 
Ezra3:7 tab unhon ne patthr gaddhnevalon aur kareegaron ko rupaya, aur seedonee aur soree logon ko khne-peene kee vastuen aur tel diya, ki ve faaras ke raja kusraoo ke patra ke anusar devadar kee lakadee labanon se japa ke pas ke samudra men pahunchaaen." 
Ezra3:8 unake parameshvar ke bhvan me, jo yarooshalem men haai, apane ke doosare varsha ke doosare maheene me, shaalateeel ke putra jarubbabel ne aur yosadak ke putra yeshoo ne aur unake aur bhaiyon ne jo yajak aur leveey the, aur jitane bandhauai se yarooshalem men aae the unhon ne bhee kam ko arambh kiya, aur bees varsha athva usase adhaik avastha ke leaviyon ko yahova ke bhvan ka kam chalane ke liye niyukt kiya." 
Ezra3:9 to seshoo aur usake bette aur bhai aur kadameeael aur usake bette, jo yahooda kee santan the, aur henadad keen santan aur unake bette parameshvar ke bhvan men kareegaron ka kam chalane ko khde huae." 
Ezra3:10 aur jab rajon ne yahova ke mandair kee nev dalee tab apane vasr pahine hua, aur turahiyan liye huae yajak, aur jhanjh liye huae asap ke vansh ke leveey isaaliye niyukt kiae gaae ki israaaeliyon ke raja daud kee chalai hui reeti ke anusar yahova kee stuati karen." 
Ezra3:11 so ve yah ga gakar yahova kee stuati aur dhanyavad karane lage, ki vah bhla haai, aur usakee karuna israaael par sadaaiv banee haai. aur jab ve yahova kee stuti karane lage tab sab logon ne yah janakar ki yahova ke bhvan kee neb ab pad rahee haai, unche shabd se jay jayakar kiya." 
Ezra3:12 parantu bahutere yajak aur leveey aur poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy purusha, arthata ve booddhe jinhon ne pahila bhvan dekha tha, jab is bhvan kee nev unakee ankhon ke samhane padee tab foott foottkar rone lage, aur bahutere anand ke mare unche shabd se jay jayakar kar rahe the." 
Ezra3:13 isaliye log, anand ke jay jayakar ka shabd, logon ke rone ke shabd se alag pahichan n sake, kyonaki log unche shabd se jay jayakar kar rahe the, aur vah shabd door tak sunai deta tha." 
Ezra4:1 jab yahooda aur binyameen ke shatrauon ne yah suna ki bandhauai se chootte huae log israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye maandair bana rahe haai," 
Ezra4:2 tab ve jarubbabel aur poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purushaen ke pas akar un se kahane lage, hamen bhee apane sang banane do kyonaki tumharee nai ham bhee tumhare parameshvar kee khoj men lage huae haai, aur ashshoor ka raja aesarhaon jis ne hamen yahan pahunchaya, usake dinon se ham usee ko bali chaddhate bhee haain." 
Ezra4:3 jarubbabel, yeshoo aur israaael ke pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purushaen ne un se kaha, hamare parameshvar ke liye bhvan banane men tum ko ham se kuchh kam naheen ham hee log aek sang milakar faaras ke raja kusraoo kee agyaa ke anusar israaael ke parameshvar yahova ke liye use banaaenge." 
Ezra4:4 tab us desh ke log yahoodiyon ke hath ddheela karane aur unhen drakar mandair banane men rukavatt dalane lage. 
Ezra4:5 aur faaras ke raja kusraoo ke jeevan bhr varan faaras ke raja dara ke rajy ke samay tak unake manorath ko nishfal karane ke liye vakeelon ko rupaya dete rahe. 
Ezra4:6 shraayarsha ke rajy ke pahile dinon men unhon ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ka doshapatra use likh bheja. 
Ezra4:7 fir artashratra ke dinon men bishalam, mithdat aur tabel ne aur usake sahachaariyon ne faaras ke raja artashratra ko chitthee likhee, aur chitthee aramee ashraron aur aramee bhasha men likhee gai." 
Ezra4:8 arthata rahoom rajamantraee aur shailashau mantraee ne yarooshalem ke viruddh raja artashratra ko is ashay kee chitthee likhee. 
Ezra4:9 us samay rahoom rajamantraee aur shaimashau mantraee aur unake aur sahachariyon ne, arthata deenee, aparsatakee, tarpalee, afaarasee, erekee, babelee, shooshanee, dehavee, elamee," 
Ezra4:10 aadi jatiyon ne jinhen mahan aur pradhaan osnappar ne par le akar shaemaron nagar men aur mahanad ke is par ke shosh desh men basaya tha, aek chitthee likhee." 
Ezra4:11 jo chitthee unhon ne artashratra raja ko likhee, usakee yah nakal haai,-tere das jo mahanad ke par ke manushy haai, ityadi." 
Ezra4:12 raja ko yah vidit ho, ki jo yahoodee tere pas se chale aa, ve hamare pas yarooshalem ko pahunche haain. ve us dangaait aur ghainaune nagar ko basa rahe haain varan usakee shaharapanah ko khda kar chuke haain aur usakee nev ko jod chuke haain." 
Ezra4:13 ab raja ko vidit ho ki yadi vah nagar bas gaya aur usakee shaharapanah ban chukee, tab to ve log kar, chungee aur rahadaree fir n denge, aur ant men rajaon kee hani hogee." 
Ezra4:14 ham log to rajamaandair ka namak khate haain aur uchit naheen ki raja ka anadar hamare dekhte ho, is karan ham yah chitthee bhejakar raja ko chita dete haain." 
Ezra4:15 tere purakhaon ke iatihas kee pustak men khoj kee jaae tab iatihas kee pustak men too yah pakar jan lega ki vah nagar balava karanevala aur rajaon aur praanton kee hani karanevala haai, aur praacheen kal se us men balava machata aya haai. aur isee karan vah nagar nashtt bhee kiya gaya tha." 
Ezra4:16 ham raja ko nishchay kara dete haain ki yadi vah nagar basaya jaae aur usakee shaharapanah ban chuke, tab isake karan mahanad ke is par tera koi bhag n rah jaaega." 
Ezra4:17 tab raja ne rahoom rajamantraee aur shaimashau mantraee aur shaemaron aur mahanad ke is par rahanevale unake aur sahachaariyon ke pas yah uttar bheja, kushal, ityadi." 
Ezra4:18 jo chitthee tum logon ne hamare pas bhejee vah mere samhane paddh kar safa safa sunai gai. 
Ezra4:19 aur meree agyaa se khoj kiye jane par jan pada haai, ki vah nagar praacheenakal se rajaon ke viruddh sir uttata aya haai aur usamen danga aur balava hota aya haai." 
Ezra4:20 yarooshalem ke samath raja bhee huae jo mahanad ke par se samast desh par rajy karate the, aur kar, chungee aur rahadaree unako dee jatee thee." 
Ezra4:21 isaliye ab is agyaa ka prachar kar ki ve manushy roke jaaen aur jab tak meree or se agyaa n mile, tab tak vah nagar banaya n jaae." 
Ezra4:22 aur chaukas raho, ki is bat men ddheele n hona rajaon kee haani karanevalee vah burai kyon baddhne paae?" 
Ezra4:23 jab raja artashratra kee yah chitthee rahoom aur shaimashau mantraee aur unake sahachariyon ko paddhkar sunai gai, tab ve utavalee karake yarooshalem ko yahoodiyon ke pas gaae aur bhujabal aur baariyai se unako rok diya." 
Ezra4:24 tab parameshvar ke bhvan ka kam jo yarooshalem men haai, ruk gaya aur faaras ke raja dara ke rajy ke doosare varsha tak ruka raha." 
Ezra5:1 tab haggaai namak nabee aur io ka pota jakaryah yahooda aur yarooshalem ke yahoodiyon se naboovat karane lage, unhon ne israaael ke parameshvar ke nam se un se naboovat kee." 
Ezra5:2 tab shaalateeael ka putra jarubbabel aur yosadak ka putra yeshoo, kamar bandhakar parameshvar ke bhvan ko jo yarooshalem men haai banane lage aur parameshvar ke ve nabee unaka sath dete rahe." 
Ezra5:3 usee samay mahanad ke is par ka tattanaai nam adhaipaati aur shatabajanaai apane sahachariyon samet unake pas jakar yon poochhne lage, ki is bhvan ke banane aur is shaharapanah ke khde karane kee kis ne tum ko agyaa dee haai?" 
Ezra5:4 tab ham logon se yah kaha, ki is bhvan ke bananevalon ke kya kya nam haain?" 
Ezra5:5 parantu yahoodiyon ke puraniyon ke parameshvar kee draashtti un par rahee, isaliye jab tak is bat kee charcha dara se n kee gai aur isake vishay chitthee ke dara uttar n mila, tab tak unhon ne inako n roka." 
Ezra5:6 jo chitthee mahanad ke is par ke aadhaipaati tattanaai aur shatabajanaai aur mahanad ke is par ke unake sahacharee aparsaakiyon ne raja dana ke pas bhejee usakee nakal yah haai 
Ezra5:7 unhon ne usako ek chitthee likhee, jis men yah likha tha ki raja dara ka kushal kshom sab prakar se ho." 
Ezra5:8 raja ko vidit ho, ki ham log yahooda nam praant men mahan parameshvar ke bhvan ke pas gaae the, vah bade bade patthron se ban raha haai, aur usakee bheeton men kaadiyan jud rahee haain aur yah kam un logon se fauta ke sath ho raha haai, aur sufal bhee hota jata haai." 
Ezra5:9 isaliye ham ne un puraniyon se yon poochha, ki yah bhvan banavane, aur yah shaharapanah khdee karane kee aagyaa kis ne tumhen dee?" 
Ezra5:10 aur ham ne unake nam bhee poochhe, ki ham unake mukhy purushaen ke nam likhkar tujh ko jata saken." 
Ezra5:11 aur unhon ne hamen yon uttar diya, ki ham to shakash aur prathvee ke parameshvar ke das haai, aur jis bhvan ko bahut varsha huae israaaeliyon ke aek bade raja ne banakar taaiyar kiya tha, usee ko ham bana rahe haain." 
Ezra5:12 jab hamare purakhaon ne svarga ke parameshvar ko ris dilai thee, tab us ne unhen babel ke kasadee raja nabookadanessar ke hath men kar diya tha, aur us ne is bhvan ko nash kiya aur logon ko bandhaua karake babel ko le gaya." 
Ezra5:13 parantu babel ke raja kusraoo ke paahile varsha men usee kusraoo raja ne parameshvar ke is bhvan ke banane kee agyaa dee 
Ezra5:14 aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke jo sone aur chandee ke patra nabookadanessar yarooshalem ke mandair men se nikalavakar babel ke maandair men le gaya tha, unako raja kusraoo ne babel ke mandair men se nikalavakar shoshabassar namak aek purush ko jise us ne aadhaipaati tthara diya tha, saunp diya." 
Ezra5:15 aur us ne usase kaha, ye patra le jakar yarooshalem ke maandair men rak, aur parameshvar ka vah bhvan apane sthan par banaya jaae." 
Ezra5:16 tab usee shoshabassar ne akar parameshvar ke bhvan kee jo yarooshalem men haai nev dalee aur tab se ab tak yah ban raha haai, parantu ab tak naheen ban paya." 
Ezra5:17 ab yaadi raja ko achchha lage to babel ke rajabhndar men is bat kee khoj kee jaa, ki raja kusraoo ne sachamuch parameshvar ke bhvan ke jo yarooshalem men haai banavane kee agyaa dee thee, ya naheen. tab raja is vishay men apanee ichchha ham ko bataae." 
Ezra6:1 tab raja dara kee agyaa se babel ke pustakalay men jahan khjana bhee rahata tha, khoj kee gai." 
Ezra6:2 aur made nam praant ke ahamata nagar ke rajagaddh men aek pustak milee, jis men yah vrattant likha tha" 
Ezra6:3 ki raja kusraoo ke pahile varsha men usee kusraoo raja ne yah agyaa dee, ki parameshvar ke bhvan ke vishy jo yarooshalem men haai, arthata vah bhvan jis men balidan kiae jate the, vah banaya jaae aur usakee nev draddhta se dalee jaa, usakee unchai aur chaudai satt satt hath kee hon" 
Ezra6:4 us men teen rae bharee bharee patthron ke ho, aur ek parat nai lakadee ka ho aur inakee lagat rajabhvan men se dee jae." 
Ezra6:5 aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke jo sone or chandee ke patra nabookadanessar ne yarooshalem ke mandair men se nikalavakar babel ko pahuncha diae the vah lauttakar yarooshalem ke maandair men apane apane sthan par pahunchaae jaae, aur too unhen parameshvar ke bhvan men rakh dena." 
Ezra6:6 ab he mahanad ke par ke aadhaipaati tattanaai! he shatabajanaai! tum apane sahacharee mahanad ke par ke aparsakiyon samet vahan se alag raho 
Ezra6:7 parameshvar ke us bhvan ke kam ko rahane do yahoodiyon ka aadhaipaati aur yahoodiyon ke puraniye parameshvar ke us bhvan ko usee ke sthan par banaaen. 
Ezra6:8 varan maain agyaa deta hoon ki tumhen yahoodiyon ke un puraniyon se aeesa bartav karana hoga, ki parameshvar ka vah bhvan banaya jaae arthata raja ke dhan men se, mahanad ke par ke kar men se, un purushaen ka fauta ke sath khrcha diya jaae aeesa n ho ki unako rukana pade." 
Ezra6:9 aur kya bachhde! kya meddhe! kya memne! svarga ke parameshvar ke homabaliyon ke liye jis jis vastu ka unhen prayojan ho, aur jitana gehoo, namak, dakhmadha aur tel yarooshalem ke yajak kahe, vah sab unhen bina bool chook praatidin diya jaa," 
Ezra6:10 isaliye ki ve svarga ke parameshvar ko sukhdayak sugandhavale bali chaddhakar, raja aur rajakumaron ke deedharayu ke liye praarthna kiya karen." 
Ezra6:11 fir maain ne agyaa dee haai, ki jo koi yah agyaa ttale, usake ghar men se kadee nikalee jaa, aur us par vah svayan chaddhakar jakada jaa, aur usaka ghar is aparadha ke karan ghoora banaya jaae." 
Ezra6:12 aur parameshvar jis ne vahan apane nam ka nivas ttharaya haai, vah kya raja kya praja, un sabhon ko jo yah agyaa ttalane aur parameshvar ke bhvan ko jo yarooshalem men haai nash karane ke liye hath baddhaae, nashtt karen. mujh dara ne yah agyaa dee haai fauta se aeesa hee karana." 
Ezra6:13 tab mahanad ke is par ke aadhaipaati tattanaai aur shatabajanaai aur unake sahachariyon ne dara raja ke chitthee bhejane ke kara, usee ke anusar fauta se kam kiya." 
Ezra6:14 tab yahoodee puraaniye, haggaai nabee aur io ke pote jakaryah ke naboovat karane se maandair ko banate rahe, aur kratarth bhee huae. or israaael ke parameshvar kee agyaa ke anusar aur faaras ke raja kusrao, dara aur artakshatra kee agyaaon ke anusar banate banate use poora kar liya." 
Ezra6:15 is prakar vah bhvan raja dara ke rajy ke chhttven varsha men adar maheene ke teesare din ko banakar samapt hua. 
Ezra6:16 israaaelee, arthata yajak leveey aur aur jitane bandhauai se aae the unhon ne parameshvar ke us bhvan kee pratishtta utsav ke sath kee." 
Ezra6:17 aur us bhvan kee pratishtta men unhon ne aek sau baail aur do sau meddhe aur char sau memne aur fir sab israaael ke nimitt papabaali karake israaael ke gotron kee ginatee ke anusar barah bakare chaddhaae. 
Ezra6:18 tab jaaise moosa kee pustak men likha haai, vaaise hee unhon ne parameshvar kee aradhana ke liye jo yarooshalem men haai, baree baree se shajakon aur dal dal ke leaviyon ko niyukt kar diya." 
Ezra6:19 fir pahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko bandhauai se aae huae logon ne fasah mana. 
Ezra6:20 kyonaki yajakon aur leviyon ne aek man hokar, apane apane ko shuuddh kiya tha isaliye ve sab ke sab shuuddh the. aur unhon ne bandhauai se aae huae sab logon aur apane bhai yajakon ke liye aur apane apane liye fasah ke pashu baali kiae." 
Ezra6:21 tab bandhauai se lautte huae israaaelee aur jitane aur desh kee any jatiyon kee ashuuddhata se isaliye alag ho gaae the ki israaael ke parameshvar yahova kee khoj kare, un sabhon ne bhojan kiya." 
Ezra6:22 aur akhmeeree rottee ka varva sat din tak anand ke sath manate rahe kyonaki yahova ne unhen anaandait kiya tha, aur ashshoor ke raja ka man unakee or aeesa faer diya ki vah parameshvar arthata israaael ke parameshvar ke bhvan ke kam men unakee sahayata kare." 
Ezra7:1 in baton ke bad arthata faaras ke raja artakshatra ke dinon me, aejra babel se yarooshalem ko gaya. vah sarayah ka putra tha. aur sarayah ajaryah ka putra tha, ajaryah hilkaiyyah ka," 
Ezra7:2 hilkaiyyah shalloom ka, shalloom sadok ka, shadok" 
Ezra7:3 aheetoob ka, aheetoob amaryah ka, amaryah ajaryah ka, ajaryah marayot ka," 
Ezra7:4 marayot jaraah ka, jaraah ujjee ka, ujjee bukkee ka," 
Ezra7:5 bukkee abeeshoo ka, abeeshoo peenahas ka, peenahas aeleeajar ka aur aeleeajar haroon mahayajak ka putra tha." 
Ezra7:6 yahee aejra moosa kee vyavastha ke vishy jise israaael ke parameshvar yahova ne dee thee, nipun shaasree tha. aur usake parameshvar yahova kee krapadraashtti jo us par rahee, isake karan raja ne usaka munh manga var de diya." 
Ezra7:7 aur kitane israaaelee, aur yajak leveey, gavaaiye, aur darapal aur nateen ke kuchh log artakshatra raja ke sataven varsha men yarooshalem ko le gaae." 
Ezra7:8 aur vah raja ke sataven varsha ke panchaven maheene men yarooshalem ko pahuncha. 
Ezra7:9 paahile maheene ke paahile din ko vah babel se chal diya, aur usake parameshvar kee krapadraashtti us par rahee, is karaaea panchaven maheene ke pahile din vah yarooshalem ko pahuncha." 
Ezra7:10 kyonaki aejra ne yahova kee vyavastha ka arth boojh lene, aur usake anusar chalane, aur israaael men vidhai aur niyam sikhane ke liye apana man lagaya tha." 
Ezra7:11 jo chitthee raja artakshakh ne aejra yajak aur shaasree ko dee thee jo yahova kee agyaaon ke vachanon ka, aur usakee israaaeliyon men chalai hui vidhaiyon ka shaasree tha, usakee takal yah haai" 
Ezra7:12 arthata, aejra yajak jo svarga ke parameshvar kee vyavastha ka poorn shaasree haai, usako artakshatra maharajaadhairaj kee or se, ityaadi." 
Ezra7:13 maain yah agyaa deta hoo, ki mere rajy men jitane israaaelee aur unake yajak aur leveey apanee ichchha se yarooshalem jana chahe, ve tere sath jane paaen." 
Ezra7:14 too to raja aur usake saton mantraiyon kee or se isaliye bheja jata haai, ki apane parameshvar kee vyavastha ke vishay jo tere pas haai, yahooda aur yarooshalem kee dasha boojh le," 
Ezra7:15 aur jo chandee-sona, raja aur usake maatraiyon ne israaael ke parameshvar ko jisaka nivas yarooshalem men haai, apanee ichchha se diya haai," 
Ezra7:16 aur jitana chandee-sona kul babel praant men tujhe milega, aur jo kuchh log aur yajak apanee ichchha se apane parameshvar ke bhvan ke liye jo yarooshalem men haain denge, usako le jaae." 
Ezra7:17 is karan too us rupaye se fauta ke sath baail, meddhe aur memne unake yogy annabali aur ardha kee vastuon samet mol lena aur us vedee par chaddhana, jo tumhare parameshvar ke yarooshalemavale bhvan men haai." 
Ezra7:18 aur jo chandee-sona bacha rahe, us se jo kuchh tujhe aur tere bhaiyon ko uchit jan pade, vahee apane parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar karana." 
Ezra7:19 aur tere parameshvar ke bhvan kee upasana ke liye jo patra tujhe saupe jato haai, unhen yarooshalem ke parameshvar ke samhane de dena." 
Ezra7:20 aur in se aadhaik jo kuchh tujhe apane parameshvar ke bhvan ke liye avashyak janakar dena pade, vah rajakhjane men se de dena." 
Ezra7:21 maain artakshatra raja yah agyaa deta hoo, ki tum mahanad ke par ke sab khjanchiyon se jo kuchh bajra yajak, jo svarga ke parameshvar kee vyavastha ka shaasree haai, tum logon se chahe, vah fauta ke sath kiya jaae." 
Ezra7:22 arthta sau kikkar tak chandee, sau kor tak gehoo, sau bat tak dakhmadha, sau bat tak tel aur namak jitana chahiye utana diya jaae." 
Ezra7:23 jo jo agyaa svarga ke parameshvar kee or se mile, tteek usee ke anusar svarga ke parameshvar ke bhvan ke liye kiya jay, raja aur rajakumaron ke rajy par parameshvar ka krodha kyon bhdkane paae." 
Ezra7:24 fir ham tum ko chita dete haai, ki parameshvar ke us bhvan ke kisee yajak, leveey, gavaaiye, darapal, nateen ya aur kisee sevak se kar, chungee, athva rahadaree lene kee agyaa naheen haai." 
Ezra7:25 fir he aejra! tere parameshvar se milee hui buddhi ke anusar jo tujh men haai, nyayiyon aur vichar karanevalon ko niyukt kar jo mahanad ke par rahanevale un sab logon men jo tere parameshvar kee vyavastha janate hon nyay kiya karen aur jo jo unhen n janate ho, unako tum sikhaya karo." 
Ezra7:26 aur jo koi tere parameshvar kee vyavastha aur raja kee vyavastha n mane, usako fauta se dand diya jaa, chahe praandan, chahe deshanikala, chahe mal japt kiya jana, chahe ked karana." 
Ezra7:27 dhany haai hamare pitaron ka parameshvar yahova, jis ne aeesee manasa raja ke man men utpann kee haai, ki yahova ke yarooshalem ke bhvan ko sanvare," 
Ezra7:28 aur moojh par raja aur usake mantraiyon aur raja ke sab bade hakimon ko dayalu kiya. mere parameshvar yahova kee krapadrashtti jo mujh par hui, isake anusar man ne hiyav bandha, aur israaael men se mukhy purushaen ko ikattha kiya, ki ve mere sang chalen." 
Ezra8:1 unake poorvajon ke gharanon ke mukhy mukhy purush ye haai, aur jo log raja artakshatra ke rajy men babel se mere sang yarooshalem ko gaae unakee vanshaavalee yah haai" 
Ezra8:2 arthata peenahas ke vansh men se gesham, itamar ke vansh men se daaniyyel, daud ke vansh men se hattoosa." 
Ezra8:3 shakanyah ke vansh ke parosh ke gotra men se jakaryah, jisake sang deddh sau purushon kee vanshaavalee hui." 
Ezra8:4 pahatmoab ke vansh men se jaraah ka putra aelyahoaenaai, jisake sang do sau purush the." 
Ezra8:5 shakanyah ke vansh men se yahajeeael ka putra, jisake sang teen sau purush the." 
Ezra8:6 adeen ke vansh men se yonatan ka putra aebed, jisake sang pachas purush the." 
Ezra8:7 aelam ke vansh men se atalyah ka putra yashaayah, jisake sang sattar purush the." 
Ezra8:8 shapatyah ke vansh men se meekaael ka putra jabadhah, jisake sang assee purush the." 
Ezra8:9 yoab ke vansh men se yaheeael ka putra obadhah, jisake sang do sau attarah purush the." 
Ezra8:10 shalomeet ke vansh men se yosibyah ka putra, jisake sang aek sau satt purush the." 
Ezra8:11 bebaai ke vansh men se bebaai ka putra jakaryah, jisake sang atthais purush the." 
Ezra8:12 ajagad ke vansh men se hakkatan ka putra yohanan, jisake sang aek sau das purush the." 
Ezra8:13 adoneekam ke vansh men se jo peechhe gaaen unake ye nam haain arthata aeleepelet, yeeael, aur samayah, aur unake sang satt purush the." 
Ezra8:14 aur bigavaai ke vansh men se utaai aur jabbood the, aur unake sang sattar purush the." 
Ezra8:15 inako maain ne us nadee ke pas jo ahava kee or bahatee haai ikattha kar liya, aur vahan ham log teen din dere dale rahe, aur maain ne vahan logon aur yajakon ko dekh liya parantu kisee leveey ko n paya." 
Ezra8:16 maain ne aeleeaejer, areeael, shamayah, aelanatan, yareeb, aelanatan, natan, jakaryah aur mashoollam ko jo mukhy purush the, aur yoyareeb aur aelanatan ko jo buaddhiman the" 
Ezra8:17 bulavakar, io ke pas jo kasipya nam sthan ka pradhaan tha, bhej diya aur unako samajha diya, ki kasipya sthan men io aur usake bhai nateen logon se kya kya kahana, ki ve hamare pas hamare parameshvar ke bhvan ke liye seva tthal karanevalon ko le aaen."
