Ezra8:18 aur hamare parameshvar kee krapadraashtti jo ham par hui isake anusar ve hamare pas ishshokel ke jo israaael ke parapota aur levee ke pota mahalee ke vansh men se tha, aur shorebyah ko, aur usake putraen aur bhaiyon ko, arthata attarah janon ko" 
Ezra8:19 aur hashabyah ko, aur usake sang mararee ke vansh men se yashaayah ko, aur usake putraen aur bhaiyon ko, arthata bees janon ko" 
Ezra8:20 aur nateen logon men se jinhen daud aur haakimon ne leaviyon kee seva karane ko ttharaya tha do sau bees naatinon ko le aae. in sabhon ke nam likhe huae the. 
Ezra8:21 tab maain ne vahan arthata ahava nadee ke teer par upavas ka prachar is ashay se kiya, ki ham parameshvar ke samhane deen hon aur us se apane aur apane balabachchon aur apanee samast sampattai ke liye saral yatra mangen." 
Ezra8:22 kyonaki maain marga ke shatrauon se vachane ke liye sipaahiyon ka dal aur savar raja se mangane se lajata t, kyonki ham raja se yah kah chuke the ki hamara parameshvar apane sab khojiyon par, bhlai ke liye krapadraashtti rakhta haai aur jo use tyag dete haai, usaka bal aur kop unake viruddh haai." 
Ezra8:23 isee vishay par ham ne upavas karake apane parameshvar se praarthna kee, aur us ne hamaree sunee." 
Ezra8:24 tab maain ne mukhy yajakon men se barah purushaen ko, arthata shorebyah, hashabyah aur inake das bhaiyon ko alag karake, jo chandee, sona aur patra," 
Ezra8:25 raja aur usake manatraiyon aur usake haakimon aur jitane israaaelee apaasthiat the unhon ne hamare parameshvar ke bhvan ke liye bhentt diae the, unhon taulakar unako diya." 
Ezra8:26 arthata maain ne unake hath men saddhe chh sau kikkar chandee, sau kikkar chandee ke patra," 
Ezra8:27 sau kikkar sona, hajar darkamon ke sone ke bees kattore, aur sone sareekhe anamol chokhe chamakanevale peetal ke do patra laulakar de diye." 
Ezra8:28 aur maain ne un se kaha, tum to yahova ke liye paavitra ho, aur ye patra bhee pavitra haain aur yah chandee aur sona bhentt ka haai, jo tumhare pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ke liye prasannata se dee gai." 
Ezra8:29 isaliye jagate raho, aur jab tak tum inhen yarooshalem men pradhaan yajakon aur leaviyon aur israaael ke pitaron ke gharanon ke pradhaanon ke samhane yahova ke bhvan kee kottriyon men taulakar n do, tab tak inakee raksha karate raho." 
Ezra8:30 tab yajakon aur leaviyon ne chandee, sone aur patraen ko taulakar le liya ki unhen yarooshalem ko hamare parameshvar ke bhvan men pahunchaaen." 
Ezra8:31 paahile maheene ke barahaven din ko ham ne ahava nadee se kooch karake yarooshalem ka marga liya, aur hamare parameshvar kee krapadraashtti ham par rahee aur us ne ham ko shatrauon aur marga par ghaat laganevalon ke hath se bachaya." 
Ezra8:32 nidan ham yarooshalem ko pahunche aur vahan teen din rahe. 
Ezra8:33 fir chauthe din vah vandee-sona aur patra hamare parameshvar ke bhvan men ureeyah ke putra maremot yajak ke hath men taulakar diae gaae. aur usake sang peenahas ka putra aeleeajar tha, aur unake sath yehoo ka putra yojabad leveey aur bilnooi ka putra noadhah leveey the." 
Ezra8:34 ve sab vastuaen ginee aur taulee gai, aur unaka taul usee samay likha gaya." 
Ezra8:35 jo bandhauai se aae the, unhon ne israaael ke parameshvar ke liye homabaali chaddhaae arthata samast israaael ke nimitt barah bachhde, chhyaianave meddhe aur satahattar memne aur papabaali ke liye barah bakare yah sab yahova ke liye homabaali tha." 
Ezra8:36 tab unhon ne raja kee agyaaaen mahanad ke is par ke adhaikaariyon aur aadhaipaatiyon ko dee aur unhon ne israaaelee logon aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke kam men sahayata kee. 
Ezra9:1 tab ye kam ho chuke, tab hakim mere pas akar kahane lage, n to israaaelee log, n yajak, n leveey is or ke deshaen ke logon se alag hue varan unake se, arthata kananiyo, hittaiyo, parijjaiyo, yaboosiyo, ammoniyo, moaabiyo, misiryon aur aemoriyon ke se ghainaune kam karate haain." 
Ezra9:2 kyonaki unhon ne unakee bettyaien men se apane aur apane betton ke liye striayan kar lee haain aur pavitra vansh is or ke deshaen ke logon men mil gaya haai. varan haakim aur saradar is vishvasaghaat men mukhy huae haain. 
Ezra9:3 yah bat sunakar maain ne apane vasr aur bage ko faada, aur apane sir aur daddhee ke bal noche, aur vismait hokar baaitta raha." 
Ezra9:4 tab jitane log israaael ke parameshvar ke vachan sunakar bandhauai se aae huae logon ke vishvasaghaat ke karan thrathrate the, sab mere pas ikatthe hua, aur maain sanjh kee bhentt ke samay tak vismait hokar baaitta raha." 
Ezra9:5 parantu sanjh kee bhentt ke samay maain vasr aur baga faade huae upavas kee dasha men utta, fir ghauttnon ke bal jhuka, aur apane hath apane parameshvar yahova kee or faailakar kaha," 
Ezra9:6 he mere parameshvar! mujhe teree or apana munh uttate laj atee haai, aur he mere parameshvar! mera munh kala haai kyonki ham logon ke adharma ke kam hamare sir par baddh gaae haai, aur hamara dosh baddhte akash tak pahuncha haai" 
Ezra9:7 apane purakhaon ke dinon se lekar aj ke din tak ham bade doshaee haai, aur apane adharma ke kamon ke karan ham apane rajaon aur yajakon samet desh desh ke rajaon ke hath men kiae gaae ki talavar, bandhauai, lootte jane, aur munh kala ho jane kee vipaattaiyon men paden jaaise ki aj hamaree dasha haai." 
Ezra9:8 aur ab thode din se hamare parameshvar yahova ka anugrah ham par hua haai, ki ham men se koi koi bach nikale, aur ham ko usake pavitra sthan men aek koonttee mile, aur hamara parameshvar hamaree ankhon men jayoti ane de, aur dasatv men ham ko kuchh vishraaantai mile." 
Ezra9:9 ham das to haain hee, parantu hamare dasatv men hamare parameshvar ne ham ko naheen chhod diya, baran faaras ke rajaon ko ham par aeese krapalu kiya, ki ham naya jeevan pakar apane parameshvar ke bhvan ko uttane, aur isake khndharon ko sudhaarane paa, aur hamen yahooda aur yarooshalem men ad milee." 
Ezra9:10 aur ab he hamare parameshvar isake bad ham kya kahe, yahee ki ham ne teree un agyaaon ko tod diya haai," 
Ezra9:11 jo too ne yah kahakar apane das naabiyon ke dara dee, ki jis desh ke aadhaikaree hone ko tum jane par ho, vah to desh desh ke logon kee ashuuddhata ke karan aur unake ghainaune kamon ke karan ashuuddh desh haai, anhon ne use aek sivane se doosare sivane tak apanee ashuuddhata se bhr diya haai." 
Ezra9:12 isaliye ab too n to apanee bettyaian unake betton ko byah dena aur n unakee beattyaien se apane betton ka byah karana, aur n kabhee unaka kushal kshoem chahana, isaliye ki tum balavan bano aur us desh ke achchhe achchhe padarth khane pao, aur use aeesa chhod jao, ki vah tumhare vansh ke aadhaikar men sadaaiv bana rahe." 
Ezra9:13 aur us sab ke bad jo hamare bure kamon aur bade dosh ke karan ham par beeta haai, jab ki he hamare parameshvar too ne hamare adharma ke barabar hamen dand naheen diya, varan ham men se kitanon ko bacha rakha haai," 
Ezra9:14 to kya ham teree agyaaon ko fir se ullanghan karake in ghainaune kam karanevale logon se samadhaiyana ka sambandha karen? kya too ham par yahan tak kop n karega lis se ham mitt jaaen aur n to koi bache aur n koi rah jaae? 
Ezra9:15 he israaael ke parameshvar yahova! too to dhama haai, ham bachakar mukt huae haain jaaise ki aj vartaman haain. dek, ham tere samhane doshaee haai, is karan koi tere samhane khda naheen rah sakata." 
Ezra10:1 jab aejra parameshvar ke bhvan ke samhane pada, rota hua praarthna aur pap ka angeekar kar raha tha, tab israaael men se purushae, striayon aur ladkevalon kee aek bahut badee mandlee usake pas ikatthee hui aur log bilak bilak kar ro rahe the." 
Ezra10:2 tab yaheeael ka putra shakanyah jo aelam ke vush men ka tha, aejra se kahane laga, ham logon ne is desh ke logon men se anyajati striayan byah kar apane parameshvar ka vishvasaghaat to kiya haai, parantu is dasha men bhee israaael ke liye ash haai." 
Ezra10:3 ab ham apane parameshvar se yah vacha bandho, ki ham apane prabhukee sammati aur apane parameshvar kee agyaa sunakar thrathranevalon kee sammaati ke anusar aeesee sab striayon ko aur unake ladkevalon ko door karen aur vyavastha ke anusar kam kiya jaae." 
Ezra10:4 too ut, kyonki yah kam tera hee haai, aur ham tere sath haai isaaliye hiyav bandhakar is kam men lag ja." 
Ezra10:5 tab aejra utta, aur yajako, leviyon aur sab israaaeliyon ke pradhaanon ko yah shapath khailai ki ham isee vachan ke anusar karenge aur unhon ne vaaisee hee shapath khai." 
Ezra10:6 tab bajra parameshvar ke bhvan ke samhane se utta, aur aelyashaeeb ke putra yohanan kee kottree men gaya, aur vahan pahunchakar n to rottee khai, n panee piya, kyonaki vah bandhauai men se nikal aae huon ke vishvasaghaat ke karan shaek karata raha." 
Ezra10:7 tab unhon ne yahooda aur yarooshalem men rahanevale bandhauai men se aae huae sab logon men yah prachar karaya, ki tum yarooshalem men iatthe ho" 
Ezra10:8 aur jo koi hakimon aur puraniyon kee sammaati n manega aur teen din ke bheetar n aae to usakee samast dhana-sampattai nashtt kee jaaegee aur vah ap bandhauai se aae huon kee sabha se alag kiya jaaega. 
Ezra10:9 tab yahooda aur binyameen ke sab manushy teen din ke bheetar yarooshalem men ikatthe hue yah nauven maheene ke beesaven din men hua aur sab log parameshvar ke bhvan ke chauk men us vishay ke karan aur jhdee ke mare kanpate huae baaitte rahe. 
Ezra10:10 tab aejra yajak khda hokar un se kahane laga, tum logon ne vishvasaghaat karake anyajati-astriayan byah lee, aur is se israaael ka dosh baddh gaya haai." 
Ezra10:11 so ab apane pitaron ke parameshvar yahova ke samhane apana pap man lo, aur usakee ichchha pooree karo, aur is desh ke logon se aur anyajaatistriayon se nyare ho jao." 
Ezra10:12 tab pooree mandlee ke logon ne unche shabd se kaha, jaaisa too ne kaha haai, vaaisa hee hamen karana uchit haai." 
Ezra10:13 parantu log bahut haai, aur jhdee ka samay haai, aur ham bahar khde naheen rah sakate, aur yah do aek din ka kam naheen haai, kyonki ham ne is bat men bada aparadha kiya haai." 
Ezra10:14 samast mandlee kee or se hamare hakim niyukt kiae jaaen aur jab tak hamare parameshvar ka bhdka hua kop ham se door n ho, aur yah kam nipatt n jaa, tab tak hamare nagaron ke jitane nivaasiyon ne anyajati-astriayan byah lee ho, ve niyat samayon par aya kare, aur unake sang aek nagar ke puraaniye aur nyayee aaen." 
Ezra10:15 isake viruddh keval asahel ke putra yonatan aur tikava ke putra yahajayah khde hua, aur mashuullam aur shabbataai leaviyon ne unakee sahayata kee." 
Ezra10:16 parantu bandhauai se aae huae logon ne vaaisa hee kiya. tab aejra yajak aur pitaron ke gharanon ke kitane mukhy purush apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke anusar apane sab nam likhakar alag kiae gaa, aur dasaven maheene ke paahile din ko is bat kee tahakeekat ke liye baaitte." 
Ezra10:17 aur paahile maheene ke paahile din tak unhon ne un sab purushaen kee bat nipatta dee, jinhon ne anyajaati-astriayon ko byah liya tha." 
Ezra10:18 aur yajakon kee santan men se ye jan paae gaae jinhon ne anyajaati-astriayon ko byah liya tha, arthata yeshoo ke putra, yosadak ke putra, aur usake bhai maseyah, aeleeajar, yareeb aur gadalyaha." 
Ezra10:19 inhon ne hath marakar vachan diya, ki ham apanee striayon ko nikal denge, aur unhon ne doshaee ttharakar, apane apane dosh ke karan aek aek meddha bali kiya." 
Ezra10:20 aur immer kee santan men se hananee aur jabadhah," 
Ezra10:21 aur hareem kee santan men se maseyah, aeleeyah, shamayah, yaheeael aur ujjaiyaha." 
Ezra10:22 aur pashahoor kee santan men se ulyoaenaai, maseyah, ishamaael, natanel, yojabad aur aelasa." 
Ezra10:23 fir leviyon men se yojabad, shaimee, kelayah jo kaleeta kahalata haai, pataah, yahooda aur aeleeajara." 
Ezra10:24 aur gavaaiyon men se aelyashaeev aur darapalon men se shalloom, telem aur uree." 
Ezra10:25 aur israaael men se parosh kee santan men ramyah, yijjaiyah, malkaiyah, miyameen, aeleeajar, maalkaiyah aur banayaha." 
Ezra10:26 aur aelam kee santan men se mattanyah, jakaryah, yaheeael abdee, yaremot aur aeliyaha." 
Ezra10:27 aur jatoo kee santan men se aelyoaenaai, aelyashaeeb, sattanyah, yaremot, jabad aur ajeeja." 
Ezra10:28 aur bebaai kee santan men se yahohanan, hananyah, jabbaai aur atalaai." 
Ezra10:29 aur banee kee santan men se mashuullam, mallook, adayah, yashoob, shaal aur yaramota." 
Ezra10:30 aur pahatamoab kee santan men se adana, kalal, banayah, maseyah, mattanyah, basalel, binnooi aur manashsho." 
Ezra10:31 aur hareem kee santan men se aeleeajar, yishshiayah, maalkaiyah, shamayah, shaimona" 
Ezra10:32 binyameen, mallook aur shamaryaha." 
Ezra10:33 aur hashoom kee santan men se mattanaai, mattatta, jabad, aeleepelet, yaremaai, manashsho aur shaimee." 
Ezra10:34 aur banee kee santan men se madaai, amraam, uela" 
Ezra10:35 banayah, bedayah, kaloohee" 
Ezra10:36 banyah, maremot, aelyashaeeba" 
Ezra10:37 mattanyah, mattanaai, yasoo" 
Ezra10:38 vanee, vinnooi, shaimee" 
Ezra10:39 sholemyah, natan, adayaha" 
Ezra10:40 maknadabaai, shaashau, shaaraai" 
Ezra10:41 ajarel, sholemyah, shomaryaha" 
Ezra10:42 shalloom, amaryah aur yosefa." 
Ezra10:43 aur nabo kee santan men se yeeael, maattainyah, jabad, jabeena, yao, yoael aur banayaha." 
Ezra10:44 in sabhon ne anyajaati-astriayan byah lee thee, aur kitanon kee striyon se ladke bhee utpann huae the." 
Nehemiah1:1 hakalyah ke putra nahemayah ke vachana. beesaven varsha ke kisalave nam maheene me, jab maain shooshan nam rajagaddh men rahata tha," 
Nehemiah1:2 tab hananee nam mera aek bhai aur yahooda se aae huae kai aek purush aae tab maain ne un se un bache huae yahoodiyon ke vishay jo bandhauai se choott gaae the, aur yarooshalem ke vishy men poochha." 
Nehemiah1:3 unhon ne mujh se kaha, jo bache huae log bandhauai se choottkar us praant men rahate haai, ve badee durdasha men pade haai, aur unakee ninda hotee haai kyonki yarooshalem kee shaharapanah toottee hui, aur usake faattk jale huae haain." 
Nehemiah1:4 ye baten sunate hee maain baaittkar rone laga aur kitane din tak vilap karata aur svarga ke parameshvar ke sammukh upavas karata aur yah kahakar praarthna karata raha. 
Nehemiah1:5 he svarga ke parameshvar yahova, he mahan aur bhyayogy ishvar! too jo apane praem rakhnevale aur agyaa mananevale ke vishy apanee vacha palata aur un par karuna karata haai" 
Nehemiah1:6 too kan lagaae aur ankhen khole rah, ki jo praarthna maain tera das is samay tere das israaaeliyon ke liye din rat karata rahata hoo, use too sun le. maain israaaeliyon ke papon ko jo ham logon ne tere viruddh kiae haai, man leta hoo. maain aur mere pita ke gharane donon ne pap kiya haai." 
Nehemiah1:7 ham ne tere samhane bahut burai kee haai, aur jo agyaaae, vidhaiyan aur niyam too ne apane das moosa ko diae the, unako ham ne naheen mana." 
Nehemiah1:8 us vachan kee sudhai le, jo too ne apane das moosa se kaha tha, ki yadi tum log vishvasaghaat karo, to maain tum ko desh desh ke logon men titar bitar karoonga." 
Nehemiah1:9 parantu yadi tum meree or firo, aur meree agyaaaen mano, aur un par chalo, to chahe tum men se nikale huae log akash kee chhor men bhee ho, taubhee maain unako vahan se ikattha karake us sthan men pahunchaunga, jise maain ne apane nam ke nivas ke liye chun liya haai." 
Nehemiah1:10 ab ve tere das aur teree praja ke log haain jinako too ne apanee badee samarth aur balavant hath ke dara chhuda liya haai. 
Nehemiah1:11 he prabhu binatee yah haai, ki too apane das kee praarthna par, aur apane un dason kee praarthna par, jo tere nam ka bhy manana chahate haai, kan laga, aur aj apane das ka kam sufal kar, aur us purush ko us par dayalu kara. maain to raja ka piya tha." 
Nehemiah2:1 artakshatra raja ke beesaven varsha ke neesan nam maheene me, jab usake samhane dakhmadha tha, tab maain ne dakhmadha uttakar raja ko diya. is se paahile maain usake samhane kabhee udas n hua tha." 
Nehemiah2:2 tab raja ne mujh se poochha, too to regee naheen haai, fir tera munh kyon utara haai? yah to man hee kee udasee hogee." 
Nehemiah2:3 tab maain atyant dr gaya. aur raja se kaha, raja sada jeevit rahe! jab vah nagar jis men mere purakhaon kee kabaren haai, ujad pada haai aur usake faattk jale huae haai, to mera munh kyon n utare?" 
Nehemiah2:4 raja ne mujh se poochha, fir too kya mangata haai? tab maain ne svarga ke parameshvar se praarthna karake, raja se kaha" 
Nehemiah2:5 yaadi raja ko bhaa, aur too apane das se prasann ho, to mujhe yahooda aur mere purakhaon kee kabaron ke nagar ko bhej, taaki maain use banaun." 
Nehemiah2:6 tab raja ne jisake pas ranee bhee baaittee thee, mujh se poochha, too kitane din tak yatra men rahega? aur kab laaittega? so raja mujhe bhejane ko prasann hua aur maain ne usake liye aek samay niyukt kiya." 
Nehemiah2:7 fir maain ne raja se kaha, yaadi raja ko bhaa, to mahanad ke par ke adhaipaatiyon ke liye is ashay kee chitthiyan mujhe dee jaaen ki jab tak maain yahooda ko n mahunchoo, tab tak ve mujhe apane apane desh men se hokar jane den." 
Nehemiah2:8 aur sarakaree jangal ke rakhvale asap ke liye bhee is ashay kee chitthee mujhe dee jaae taaki vah mujhe bhvan se lage huae rajagaddh kee kaadiyon ke liye, aur shaharapanah ke, aur us ghar ke liye, jis men maain jakar rahoonga, lakadee de. mere parameshvar kee krapadrashtti mujh par thee, isaaliye raja ne yah binatee grahan kiya." 
Nehemiah2:9 tab maain ne mahanad ke par ke adhaipaatiyon ke pas jakar unhen raja kee chitthiyan deen. ija ne mere sang senapaati aur savar bhee bheje the. 
Nehemiah2:10 yah sunakar ki aek manushy israaaeliyon ke kalyan ka upay karane ko aya haai, horonee samballat aur tobiyah nam karmacharee jo ammonee tha, un donon ko bahut bura laga." 
Nehemiah2:11 jab maain yarooshalem pahunch gaya, tab vahan teen din raha." 
Nehemiah2:12 tab maain thode purushaeen ko lekar rat ko utta maain ne kisee ko naheen bataya ki mere parameshvar ne yarooshalem ke hit ke liye mere man men kya upajaya tha. aur apanee savaree ke pashu ko chhod koi pashu mere sang n tha. 
Nehemiah2:13 maain rat ko tarai ke faattk men hokar nikala aur ajagar ke sote kee or, aur koodafaattk ke pas gaya, aur yarooshalem kee toottee padee hui shaharapanah aur jale faattkon ko dekha." 
Nehemiah2:14 tab maain age baddhkar sote ke faattk aur raja ke kund ke pas gaya parantu meree savaree ke pashu ke liye age jane ko sthan n tha. 
Nehemiah2:15 tab maain rat hee rat nale se hokar shaharapanah ko dekhta hua chaddh gaya fir ghoomakar taii ke faattk se bheetar aya, aur is prakar lautt aya." 
Nehemiah2:16 aur haakim n janate the ki maain kahan gaya aur kya karata tha varan maain ne tab tak n to yahoodiyon ko kuchh bataya tha aur n yajakon aur n raison aur n hakimon aur n doosare kam karanevalon ko. 
Nehemiah2:17 tab maain ne un se kaha, tum to ap dekhte ho ki ham kaaisee durdasha men haai, ki yarooshalem ujad pada haai aur usake faattk jale huae haain. to ao, ham yarooshalem kee shaharapanah ko banaae, ki bhvishy men hamaree namadharai n rahe." 
Nehemiah2:18 fir maain ne unako batalaya, ki mere parameshvar kee krapadraashtti mujh par kaaisee hui aur raja ne mujh se kya kya baten kahee theen. tab unhon ne kaha, ao ham kamar bandhakar banane lagen. aur unhon ne is bhle kam ko karane ke liye hiyav bandha liya." 
Nehemiah2:19 yah sunakar horonee samballat aur tobiyah nam karmacharee jo ammonee tha, aur geshom nam aek arabee, hameen tttthon men udane lage aur hamen tuchchh janakar kahan lage, yah tum kya kam karate ho." 
Nehemiah2:20 kya tum raja ke viruddh balava karoge? tab maain ne unako uttar dekar un se kaha, svarga ka parameshvar hamara kam sufal karega, isaliye ham usake das kamar bandhakar banaaenge parantu yarooshalem men tumhara n to koi bhag, n hakk, n smarak haai." 
Nehemiah3:1 tab aelyashaeeb mahayajak ne apane bhai yajakon samet kamar bandhakar bhedfaattk ko banaya. unhon ne usakee pratishtta kee, aur usake pallon ko bhee lagaya aur hammea nam gummatt tak varan hananel ke gummatt ke pas tak unhon ne shaharapanah kee praatishtta kee." 
Nehemiah3:2 us se age yareeho ke manushyon ne banaya. aur in se age imraee ke putra jakkoor ne banaya. 
Nehemiah3:3 fir machhleefaattk ko hassana ke betton ne banaya unhon ne usakee kadiyan lagai, aur usake palle, tale aur bende lagaae." 
Nehemiah3:4 aur un se age maremot ne jo hakkos ka pota aur uriyah ka putra tha, marammat kee. aur in se age mashuullam ne jo mashojabel ka pota, aur barekyah ka putra tha, marammat kee. aur is se age bana ke putra sadok ne marammat kee." 
Nehemiah3:5 aur in se age takoiyon ne marammat kee parantu unake raison ne apane prabhu kee seva ka jooa apanee gardan par n liya. 
Nehemiah3:6 fir purane faattk kee marammat paseh ke putra yoyada aur basodayah ke putra mashuullam ne kee unhon ne usakee kadiyan lagai, aur usake palle, tale aur bende lagaae." 
Nehemiah3:7 aur un se age gibonee malatyah aur meronotee yadon ne aur gibon aur mispa ke manushyon ne mahanad ke par ke aadhaipaati ke sinhasan kee or se marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:8 un se age harhayah ke putra ujeeel ne aur aur sunaron ne marammat kee. aur is se age hananyah ne, jo gaandhiayon ke samaj ka tha, marammat kee aur unhon ne chaudee shaharapanah tak yarooshalem ko draddh kiya." 
Nehemiah3:9 aur un se age hoor ke putra rapayah ne, jo yarooshalem ke adho jile ka haakim tha, marammat kee." 
Nehemiah3:10 aur un se age harumap ke putra yadayah ne apane hee ghar ke samhane marammat kee aur is se age hashabnayah ke putra hattoosh ne marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:11 hareem ke putra maalkaiyah aur pahattoab ke putra hashshoob ne aek aur bhag kee, aur bhtton ke gummatt kee marammat kee." 
Nehemiah3:12 is se age yarooshalem ke adho jile ke haakim hallohesh ke putra shalloom ne apanee bettyaien samet marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:13 tarai ke faattk kee marammat hanoon aur janoh ke nivaasiyon ne kee unhon ne usako banaya, aur usake tale, bende aur palle lagaa, aur hajar hath kee shaharapanah ko bhee arthata koodafaattk tak banaya." 
Nehemiah3:14 aur koodafaattk kee marammat rekab ke putra maalkaiyah ne kee, jo bethkkerem ke jile ka haakim tha usee ne usako banaya, aur usake tale, bende aur palle lagaae." 
Nehemiah3:15 aur sotafaattk kee marammat kolhoje ke putra shalloom ne kee, jo mispa ke jile ka haakim tha usee ne usako banaya aur patta, aur usake tale, bende aur palle lagaae aur usee ne raja kee baree ke pas ke sholah nam kund kee shaharapanah ko bhee daudapur se utaranevalee seeddhee tak banaya." 
Nehemiah3:16 usake bad aj ajabook ke putra nahemayah ne jo betasoor ke adho jile ka haakim tha, daud ke kaabirstan ke samhane tak aur banaae huae pokhre tak, varan veeron ke ghar tak bhee marammat kee." 
Nehemiah3:17 isake bad banee ke putra rahoom ne kitane leviyon samet marammat kee. is se age keela ke adho jile ke haakim hashabyah ne apane jile kee or se marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:18 usake bad unake bhaiyon samet keela ke adho jile ke haakim henadad ke putra bavvaai ne marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:19 us se age ek aur bhag kee marammat jo shaharapanah ke mod ke pas shasren ke ghar kee chaddhai ke samhane haai, yeshu ke putra ejaer ne kee, jo mispa ka hakim tha." 
Nehemiah3:20 fir aek aur bhag kee arthata usee mod se le aelyashaeeb mahayajak ke ghar ke dar tak kee marammat jabbaai ke putra barook ne tan man se kee. 
Nehemiah3:21 isake bad aek aur bhag kee arthata aelyashaeeb ke ghar ke dar se le usee ghar ke sire tak kee marammat, maremot ne kee, jo hakkos ka pota aur uriyah ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah3:22 usake bad un yajakon ne marammat kee jo tarai ke manushy the. 
Nehemiah3:23 unake bad binyameen aur hashshoob ne apane ghar ke samhane marammat kee aur inake peechhe ajaryah ne jo maseyah ka putra aur ananyah ka pota tha apane ghar ke pas marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:24 tab aek aur bhag kee, arthata ajaryah ke ghar se lekar shaharapanah ke mod tak varan usake kone tak kee marammat henadad ke putra binnooi ne kee." 
Nehemiah3:25 fir usee mod ke samhane jo uncha gummatt rajabhvan se bahar nikala hua bandeegrah ke angan ke pas haai, usake samhane ujaai ke putra palal ne marammat kee. isake bad parosh ke putra padayah ne marammat kee." 
Nehemiah3:26 nateen log to opel men poorab kee or jalafaattk ke samhane tak aur bahar nikale huae gummatt tak rahate the. 
Nehemiah3:27 padayah ke bad takoiyon ne aek aur bhag kee marammat kee, jo bahar tikale huae bade gummatt ke samhane aur obel kee shaharapanah tak haai." 
Nehemiah3:28 fir ghaedafaattk ke upar yajakon ne apane apane ghar ke samhane marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:29 inake bad immer ke putra sadok ne apane ghar ke samhane marammat kee aur tab pooravee faattk ke rakhvale shakanyah ke putra samayah ne marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:30 isake bad sholemyah ke putra hananyah aur salap ke chhttven putra hanoon ne aek aur bhag kee marammat kee. tab berekyah ke putra mashuullam ne apanee kottree ke samhane marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:31 usake bad maalkaiyah ne jo sunar tha natinon aur vyapaariyon ke sthan tak ttharaae huae sthan ke faattk ke samhane aur kone ke kotte tak marammat kee. 
Nehemiah3:32 aur konevale kotte se lekar bhedfaattk tak sunaron aur vyapariyon ne marammat kee. 
Nehemiah4:1 jab samballat ne suna ki yahoodee log shaharapanah ko bana rahe haai, tab us ne bura mana, aur bahut risiyakar yahoodiyon ko tttthon men udane laga." 
Nehemiah4:2 vah apane bhaiyon ke aur shaemaron kee sena ke samhane yon kahane laga, ve nirbal yahoodee kya kiya chahate haain? kya ve vah kam apane bal se karenge? kya ve apana sthan draddh karenge? kya ve yagya karenge? kya ve aj hee sab kam nipatta dalenge? kya ve mitteeke ddheron men ke jale huae patthron ko fir naye sire se banaaenge?" 
Nehemiah4:3 usake pas to ammonee tobiyah tha, aur vah kahane laga, jo kuchh ve bana rahe haai, yadi koi geedad bhee us par chaddhe, to vah unakee banai hui patthr kee shaharapanah ko tod dega." 
Nehemiah4:4 he hamare parameshvar sun le, ki hamara apaman ho raha haai aur unaka kiya hua apaman unheen ke sir par lautta de, aur unhen bandhauai ke desh men luttva de." 
Nehemiah4:5 aur unaka adharma too n ddhanp, aur n unaka pap tere sammukh se mittaya jaae kyonki unhon ne tujhe shaharapanah bananevalon ke samhane krodha dilaya haai." 
Nehemiah4:6 aur ham logon ne shaharapanah ko banaya aur saree shaharapanah adhaee unchai tak jud gai. kyonaki logon ka man us kam men nit laga raha. 
Nehemiah4:7 jab samballat aur tobiyah aur arabiyo, ammoniyon aur ashadodiyon ne suna, ki yarooshalem kee shaharapanah kee marammat hotee jatee haai, aur us men ke nake band hone lage haai, tab unhon ne bahut hee bura mana" 
Nehemiah4:8 aur sabhon ne aek man se goshttee kee, ki jakar yarooshalem se lade, aur us men gadbadee dalen." 
Nehemiah4:9 parantu ham logon ne apane parameshvar se praarthna kee, aur unake dr ke mare unake viruddh din rat ke paharuae tthara diae." 
Nehemiah4:10 aur yahoodee kahane lage, ddhonevalon ka bal ghatt gaya, aur mittee bahut padee haai, isaliye shaharapanah ham se naheen ban sakatee." 
Nehemiah4:11 aur hamare shatra kahane lage, ki jab tak ham unake beech men n mahunche, aur unhen ghaat karake vah kam band n kare, tab tak unako n kuchh maloom hoga, aur n kuchh dikhai padega." 
Nehemiah4:12 fir jo yahoodee unake as pas rahate the, unhon ne sab sthanon se das bar a akar, ham logon se kaha, tum ko hamare pas lautt ana chahiye." 
Nehemiah4:13 is karan maain ne logon ko talavare, barchhrian aur dhanush dekar shaharapanah ke peechhe sab se neeche ke khule sthanon men gharane gharane ke anusar baaitta diya." 
Nehemiah4:14 tab maain dekhkar utta, aur raison aur haakimon aur aur sab logon se kaha, un se mat dro prabhu jo mahan aur bhyayogy haai, usee ko smaran karake, apane bhaiyo, betto, bettyaie, striayon aur gharon ke liye yuddh karana." 
Nehemiah4:15 jab hamare shatrauon ne suna, ki yah bat ham ko maloom ho gai haai aur parameshvar ne unakee yuaktai nishfal kee haai, tab ham sab ke sab shaharapanah ke pas apane apane kam par lautt gaae." 
Nehemiah4:16 aur us din se mere adho sevak to us kam me lage rahe aur adho barchhrie, talavaro, dhanushaen aur jhlaimon ko dhaaran kiae rahate the aur yahooda ke sare dharane ke peechhe haakim raha karate the." 
Nehemiah4:17 shaharapanah ke bananevale aur bojh ke ddhonevale donon bhar uttate the, arthta aek hath se kam karate the aur doosare hath se hathaiyar pakade rahate the." 
Nehemiah4:18 aur raj apanee apanee jangha par talavar lattkaae huae banate the. aur narasinge ka foonkanevala mere pas rahata tha. 
Nehemiah4:19 isaliye maain ne raiso, hakimon aur sab logon se kaha, kam to bada aur faaila hua haai, aur ham log shaharapanah par alag alag aek doosare se door rahate haain." 
Nehemiah4:20 isaliye jidhar se narasinga tumhen sunai de, udhar hee hamare pas ikatthe ho jana. hamara parameshvar hamaree or se ladega." 
Nehemiah4:21 yon ham kam men lage rahe, aur un men adho, pau fattne se taron ke nikalane tak baarchhrian liye rahate the." 
Nehemiah4:22 fir usee samay maain ne logon se yah bhee kaha, ki aek aek manushy apane das samet yarooshalem ke bheetar rat bitaya kare, ki ve rat ko to hamaree rakhvalee kare, aur din ko kam men lage rahen." 
Nehemiah4:23 aur n to maain apane kapade utarata tha, aur n mere bhai, n mere sevak, n ve paharuae jo mere anuchar the, apane kapade utarate the sab koi panee ke pas hathaiyar liye huae jagate the." 
Nehemiah5:1 tab log aur unakee striayon kee or se unake bhai yahoodiyon ke kiruddh badee chillahatt machee. 
Nehemiah5:2 kitane to kahate the, ham apane bette-beattyaien samet bahut praanee haai, isaaliye hamen ann milana chahiye ki use khakar jeevit rahen." 
Nehemiah5:3 aur kitane kahate the, ki ham apane apane kheto, dakh kee bariyon aur gharon ko mahangee ke karan bandhak rakhte haai, ki hamen ann mile." 
Nehemiah5:4 fir kitane yah kahate the, ki ham ne raja ke kar ke liye apane apane kheton aur dakh kee bariyon par rupaya udhaar liya." 
Nehemiah5:5 parantu hamara aur hamare bhaiyon ka shareer aur hamare aur unake ladkebale aek hee saman haai, taubhee ham apane bette-bettyaien ko das banate haain varan hamaree koi koi bettee dasee bhee ho chukee haain aur hamara kuchh bas naheen jalata, kyonki hamare khet aur dakh kee bariyan auron ke hath padee haain." 
Nehemiah5:6 yah chillahatt or ye baten sunakar maain bahut krodhait hua. 
Nehemiah5:7 tab apane man men soch vichar karake maain ne raison aur hakimon ko ghaudkakar kaha, tum apane apane bhai se byaj lete ho. tab maain ne unake viruddh aek badee sabha kee." 
Nehemiah5:8 aur maain ne un se kaha, ham logon ne to apanee shaktai bhr apane yahoodee bhaiyon ko jo anyajatiyon ke hath bik gaae the, dam dekar chhudaya haai, fir kya tum apane bhaiyon ko bechoge? kya ve hamare hath bikenge? tab ve chup rahe aur kuchh n kah sake." 
Nehemiah5:9 fir maain kahata gaya, jo kam tum karate ho vah achchha naheen haai kya tum ko is karan hamare parameshvar ka bhy manakar chalana n chaahiye ki hamare shatra jo anyajati haai, ve hamaree namadharai n karen?" 
Nehemiah5:10 maain bhee aur mere bhai aur sevak unako rupaya aur anaj udhaar dete haai, parantu ham isaka byaj chhod den." 
Nehemiah5:11 aj hee anako unake khet, aur dak, aur jalapai kee bariya, aur ghar faer do aur jo rupaya, ann, naya dakhmadha, aur ttttka tel tum un se le lete ho, usaka sauvan bhag faer do?" 
Nehemiah5:12 anhon ne kaha, ham unhen faer denge, aur un se kuchh n lenge jaaisa too kahata haai, vaaisa hee ham karenge. tab maain ne yajakon ko bulakar un logon ko yah shapath khailai, ki ve isee vachan ke anusar karenge." 
Nehemiah5:13 fir maain ne apane kapade kee chhor jhadkar kaha, isee reeati se jo koi is vachan ko poora n kare, usako parameshvar jhadkar, usaka ghar aur kamai us se chhudaa, aur isee reeti se vah jhada jaa, aur choochha ho jaae. tab saree sabha ne kaha, amen! aur yahova kee stuati kee. aur logon ne is vachan ke anusar kam kiya." 
Nehemiah5:14 fir jab se maain yahooda desh men unaka aadhaipaati ttharaya gaya, arthata raja artakshatra ke beesaven varsha se le usake batteesaven varsha tak, arthata barah varsha tak maain aur mere bhai adhaipaati ke hak ka bhojan khate rahe." 
Nehemiah5:15 parantu pahile aadhaipaati jo mujh se age the, vah praja par bhar dalate the, aur un se rottee, aur dakhmadha, aur is se adhaik chalees shokel chandee lete the, varan unake sevak bhee praja ke upar aadhaikar jatate the parantu maain aeesa naheen karata tha, kyonaki maain yahova ka bhy manata tha." 
Nehemiah5:16 fir maain shaharapanah ke kam men lipatta raha, aur ham logon ne kuchh boomi mol n lee aur mere sab sevak kam karane ke liye vahan ikatthe rahate the." 
Nehemiah5:17 fir meree mej par khanevale aek sau pachas yahoodee aur hakim aur ve bhee the, jo charon or kee anyajatiyon men se hamare pas aae the." 
Nehemiah5:18 aur jo praatidin ke liye taaiyar kiya jata tha vah aek baail, chh achchhee achchhee bheden v bakariyan thee, aur mere liye chidiyen bhee taaiyar kee jatee theen das das din ke bad bhanati bhanati ka bahut dakhmadha bhee taaiyar kiya jata tha parantu taubhee maain ne aadhaipaati ke hak ka bhoj naheen liya," 
Nehemiah5:19 kyonaki kam ka bhar praja par bharee tha. he mere parameshvar! jo kuchh maain ne is praja ke liye kiya haai, use too mere hit ke liye smaran rakh." 
Nehemiah6:1 jab samballat, tobiyah aur arabee geshom aur hamare aur shatrauon ko yah samachar mila, ki maain shaharapanah ko banava chuka aur yadhyapi us samay tak bhee maain faattkon men palle n laga chuka tha, taubhee shaharapanah men koi darar n rah gaya tha." 
Nehemiah6:2 tab samballat aur geshom ne mere pas yon kahala bheja, ki a, ham ono ke maaidan ke kisee ganv men aek doosare se bhentt karen. parantu ve meree hani karane kee ichchha karate the." 
Nehemiah6:3 parantu maain ne unake pas dooton se kahala bheja, ki maain to bharee kam men laga hoo, vahan naheen ja sakata mere ise chhodkar tumhare pas jane se vah kam kyon band rahe?" 
Nehemiah6:4 fir unhon ne char bar mere pas vaaisee hee bat kahala bhejee, aur maain ne unako vaaisa hee uttar diya." 
Nehemiah6:5 tab panchavee bar samballat ne apane sevak ko khulee hui chitthee dekar mere pas bheja," 
Nehemiah6:6 jis men yon likha tha, ki jati jati ke logon men yah kaha jata haai, aur geshom bhee yahee bat kahata haai, ki tumharee aur yahoodiyon kee manasa balava karane kee haai, aur is karan too us shaharapanah ko banavata haai aur too in baton ke anusar unaka raja banana chahata haai." 
Nehemiah6:7 aur too ne yarooshalem men nabee ttharaae haai, jo yah kahakar tere vishay prachar kare, ki yahoodiyon men aek raja haai. ab aeesa hee samachar raja ko diya jaaega. isaaliye ab a, ham aek sath sammaati karen." 
Nehemiah6:8 tab maain ne usake pas kahala bheja ki jaaisa too kahata haai, vaaisa to kuchh bhee naheen hua, too ye baten apane man se gaddhta haai." 
Nehemiah6:9 ve sab log yah sochakar hamen drana chahate the, ki unake hath ddheele pade, aur kam band ho jaae. parantu ab he parameshvar too mujhe hiyav de." 
Nehemiah6:10 aur maain shamayah ke ghar men gaya, jo dalayah ka putra aur mahetabel ka pota tha, vah to band ghar men tha us ne kaha, a, ham parameshvar ke bhvan arthata maandair ke bheetar apas men bhentt kare, aur mandair ke dar band karen kyonaki ve log tujhe ghaat karane aaenge, rat hee ko ve tujhe ghaat karane aaenge." 
Nehemiah6:11 parantu maain ne kaha, kya mujh aeesa manushy bhage? aur tujh aeesa kaun haai jo apana praan bachane ko maandair men ghause? maain naheen jane ka." 
Nehemiah6:12 fir maain ne jan liya ki vah parameshvar ka bheja naheen haai parantu us ne har bat ishvar ka vachan kahakar meree haani ke liye kahee, kyonki tobiyah aur samballat ne use rupaya de rakha tha." 
Nehemiah6:13 unhon ne use is karan rupaya de rakha tha ki maain dr jau, aur vaaisa hee kam karake papee ttharoo, aur unako apavad lagane ka avasar mile aur ve meree namadharai kar saken." 
Nehemiah6:14 he mere raparameshvar! tobiyah, samballat, aur noadhah, nabiya aur aur titane nabee mujhe drana chahate the, un sab ke aeese aeese kamon kee suadhai rakh." 
Nehemiah6:15 aelool maheene ke pacheesaven din ko arthata bavan din ke bheetar shaharapanah ban chukee. 
Nehemiah6:16 jab hamare sab shatrauon ne yah suna, tab hamare charon or rahanevale sab anyajaati dr gaa, aur bahut lajjait hue kyonki unhon ne jan liya ki yah kam hamare parameshvar kee or se hua." 
Nehemiah6:17 un dinon men bhee yahoodee raison aur tobiyah ke beech chitth bahut aya jaya karatee thee. 
Nehemiah6:18 kyonaki vah arah ke putra shakamyah ka damad tha, aur usake putra yahohanan ne berekyah ke putra mashuullam kee bettee kee byah liya tha is karan bahut se yahoodee usaka paksha karane kee shapath khaae huae the." 
Nehemiah6:19 aur ve mere sunate usake bhle kamon kee charcha kiya karate, aur meree baten bhee usako sunaya karate the. aur tobiyah mujhe drane ke liye chitthiyan bheja karata tha." 
Nehemiah7:1 jab shaharapanah ban gai, aur maain ne usake faattk khde kia, aur darapal, aur gavaaiye, aur leveey log ttharaye gaa," 
Nehemiah7:2 tab maain ne apane bhai hananee aur rajagaddh ke hakim hananyah ko yarooshalem ka aadhaikaree ttharaya, kyonaki yah sachcha purush aur bahuteron se aadhaik parameshvar ka bhy mananevala tha." 
Nehemiah7:3 aur maain ne un se kaha, jab tak ghaam kada n ho, tab tak yarooshalem ke faattk n khole jaaen aur jab paharuae pahara dete rahe, tab hee faattk band kiae jaaen aur bede lagaae jaaen. fir yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon men se too rakhvale tthara jo apana apana pahara apane apane ghar ke samhane diya karen." 
Nehemiah7:4 nagar to lamba chauda tha, parantu us men log thode the, aur ghar naheen bane the." 
Nehemiah7:5 tab mere parameshvar ne mere man men yah upajaya ki raiso, hakimon aur praja ke logon ko isaliye ikatthe karoo, ki ve apanee apanee vanshaavalee ke anusar gine jaaen. aur mujhe paahile paahil yarooshalem ko aae huon ka vanshaavaleepatra mila, aur us men maain ne yon likh hua paya" 
Nehemiah7:6 jinako babel ka raja, nabookadanessar bandhaua karake le gaya tha, un men se praant ke jo log bandhauai se choottkar, yarooshalem aur yahooda ke apane apane nagar ko aae." 
Nehemiah7:7 ve jarubbabel, yeshoo, nahemayah, ajaryah, ramyah, nahamanee, mordakaai, bilashaan, misperet, vigvaai, nahoom aur bana ke sang aae." 
Nehemiah7:8 israaaelee praja ke logon kee ginatee yah haai arthata parosh kee santan do hajar aek sau bahattar," 
Nehemiah7:9 sapatyah kee santan teen sau bahattar, aah kee santan chh sau bavana." 
Nehemiah7:10 pahatmoab kee santan yane yeshoo aur yoab kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:11 do hajar att sau attaraha. 
Nehemiah7:12 aelam kee santan barah sau chauvan," 
Nehemiah7:13 jattoo kee santan att sau paaintaleesa. 
Nehemiah7:14 javakaai kee santan sat sau satt. 
Nehemiah7:15 binnooi kee santan chhsau adtaleesa. 
Nehemiah7:16 bebaai kee santan chhsau atthaisa. 
Nehemiah7:17 ajagad kee santan do hajar teen sau baisa. 
Nehemiah7:18 adoneekam kee santan chhsau sadsatt. 
Nehemiah7:19 bigbaai kee santan do hajar sadsatt. 
Nehemiah7:20 adeen kee santan chhsau pachapana. 
Nehemiah7:21 hichaakiyyah kee santan ater ke vansh men se atthanave. 
Nehemiah7:22 hasham kee santan teen sau atthaisa. 
Nehemiah7:23 baaisaai kee santan teen sau chaubeesa. 
Nehemiah7:24 hareep kee santan aek sau baraha. 
Nehemiah7:25 gibon ke log pachanave. 
Nehemiah7:26 betalehem aur natopa ke manushy aek sau atthasee. 
Nehemiah7:27 anatot ke manushy aek sau atthaisa. 
Nehemiah7:28 beetajamavat ke manushy bayaleesa. 
Nehemiah7:29 kiryatyareem, kapeer, aur berot ke manushy sat sau taaintaleesa." 
Nehemiah7:30 rama aur geba ke manushy chhsau ikkeesa. 
Nehemiah7:31 mikapas ke manushy aek sau baisa. 
Nehemiah7:32 betel aur aee ke manushy aek sau teisa. 
Nehemiah7:33 doosare nabo ke manushy bavana. 
Nehemiah7:34 doosare aelam kee santan barah sau chauvana. 
Nehemiah7:35 hareem kee santan teen sau beesa. 
Nehemiah7:36 yareeho ke log teen sau paaintaleesa. 
Nehemiah7:37 lod hadeed aur onon ke log sat sau ikkeesa. 
Nehemiah7:38 sana ke log teen hajar nau sau teesa. 
Nehemiah7:39 fir yajak arthata yeshoo ke gharane men se yadayah kee santan nau sau tihattara. 
Nehemiah7:40 immer kee santan aek hajar bavana. 
Nehemiah7:41 pashahoor kee santan barah sau saaintaleesa. 
Nehemiah7:42 hareem kee santan aek hajar satraha. 
Nehemiah7:43 fir leveey ye the arthata hodava ke dansh men se kadameeael kee santan yeshoo kee santan chauhattara. 
Nehemiah7:44 fir gavaaiye ye the arthata asap kee santan aek sau adtaleesa. 
Nehemiah7:45 fir darapal ye the arthata shalloom kee santan, ater kee santan, talmon kee santan, akkoob kee santan, hateeta kee santan, aur shaebaai kee santan, jo sab milakar aek sau adtees huae." 
Nehemiah7:46 fir nateen arthta seeha kee santan, hasoopa kee santan, tabbaot kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:47 keros kee santan, seea kee santan, padon kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:48 labana kee santan, hagava kee santan, shalmaai kee santana." 
Nehemiah7:49 hanan kee santan, giel kee santan, gahar kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:50 raya kee santan, raseen kee santan, nakoda kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:51 gajjam kee santan, ujja kee santan, paseh kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:52 besaai kee santan, mooneem kee santan, namooshas kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:53 bakabook kee santan, hakoopa kee santan, hahroor kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:54 basaleet kee santan, maheeda kee santan, hashara kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:55 bakas kee santan, seesara kee santan, temeh kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:56 naseeh kee santan, aur hateepa kee santana." 
Nehemiah7:57 fir sulaaiman ke dason kee santan, arthata sotaai kee santan, soperet kee santan, pareeda kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:58 yala kee santan, dakan kee santan, giel kee santan," 
Nehemiah7:59 shapatyah kee santan, hatteel kee santan, pokeret savayeem kee santan, aur amon kee santana." 
Nehemiah7:60 nateen aur sulaaiman ke dason kee santan milakar teen sau banave the. 
Nehemiah7:61 aur ye ve haai, jo telamelah, telahashara, karoob, aon, aur immer se yarooshalem ko gaa, parantu apane apane pitaron ke gharane aur vanshaavalee n bata sake, ki israaael ke haai, va naheen" 
Nehemiah7:62 arthata dalayah kee santan, tobiyyah kee santan, aur dakoda kee santan, jo sab milakar chh sau bayalees the." 
Nehemiah7:63 aur yajakon men se hobayah kee santan, hakkos kee santan, aur baarjillaai kee santan, jis ne giladee barjillaai kee bettyaien men se aek ko byah liya, aur unheen ka nam rakh liya tha." 
Nehemiah7:64 inhon ne apana apana vanshaavaleepatra aur aur vanshaavaleepatraen men doonddha, parantu n paya, isaliye ve ashuuddh ttharakar yajakapad se nikalegaae." 
Nehemiah7:65 aur aadhaipaati ne un se kaha, ki jab tak ureem aur tummeem dhaaran karanevala koi yajak n utte, tab tak tum koi paramapaavitra vastu khane n paoge." 
Nehemiah7:66 pooree mandlee ke log milakar bayalees hajar teen sau satt tthare. 
Nehemiah7:67 inako chhod unake sat hajar teen sau saaintees dasa-daasiya, aur do sau paaintalees ganevale aur ganevaliyan theen." 
Nehemiah7:68 unake ghaede sat sau chhttees, khchchar do sau paaintalees," 
Nehemiah7:69 untt char sau paaintees aur gadahe chh hajar sat sau bees the. 
Nehemiah7:70 aur pitaron ke gharanon ke kai aek mukhy purushaen ne kam ke liye diya. aadhaipaati ne to chande men hajar darkamon sona, pachas kattore aur panch sau tees yajakon ke angarakhe diae." 
Nehemiah7:71 aur pitaron ke gharanon ke kai mukhy mukhy purushaen ne us kam ke chande men bees hajar darkamon sona aur do hajar do sau mane chandee dee. 
Nehemiah7:72 aur shosh praja ne jo diya, vah bees hajar darkamon sona, do hajar mane chandee aur sadsatt yajakon ke angarakhe huae." 
Nehemiah7:73 is prakar yajak, leveey, darapal, gavaaiye, praja ke kuchh log aur nateen aur sab israaaelee apane apane nagar men bas gaae." 
Nehemiah8:1 jab satavan maheena nikatt aya, us samay sab israaaelee apane apane nagar men the. tab un sab logon ne aek man hokar, jalafaattk ke samhane ke chauk men ikatthe hokar, bajra shaasree se kaha, ki moosa kee jo vyavastha yahova ne israaael ko dee thee, usakee pustak le a." 
Nehemiah8:2 tab aejra yajak sataven maheene ke paahile din ko kya sre, kya purusha, jitane sunakar samajh sakate the, un sabhon ke samhane vyavastha ko le aya." 
Nehemiah8:3 aur vah usakee baten bhor se do pahar tak us chauk ke samhane jo jalafaattk ke samhane tha, kya sre, kya purush aur sab samajhne valon ko paddhkar sunata raha aur log vyavastha kee pustak par kan lagaae rahe." 
Nehemiah8:4 aejra shaasre, katt ke aek machan par jo isee kam ke liye bana tha, khda ho gayan aur usakee dahinee alang maattaityah, shoma, anayah, uriyyah, hilkaiyyah aur maseyaha aur bai alang, padayah, meeshaaael, malkaiyyah, hashoom, hashbaana,jakaryah aur mashuullam khde huae." 
Nehemiah8:5 tab aejra ne jo sab logon se unche par tha, sabhon ke dekhte us pustak ko khol diya aur jab us ne usako khola, tab sab log utt khade hue." 
Nehemiah8:6 tab aejra ne mahan parameshvar yahova ko dhany kaha aur sab logon ne apane apane hath uttakar amen, amen, kaha aur sir jhukakar apana apana matha boomi par ttek kar yahova ko dandvat kiya." 
Nehemiah8:7 aur yeshoo, banee, shorebyah, yameen, akkoob, shabbataai, hodiyyah, maseyah, kaleeta, ajaryah, yojabad, hanan aur palaayah nam leveey, logon ko vyavastha samajhate gaa, aur log apane apane sthan par khde rahe." 
Nehemiah8:8 aur unhon ne parameshvar kee vyavastha kee pustak se paddhkar arth samajha diya aur logon ne patt ko samajh liya. 
Nehemiah8:9 tab nahemayah jo adhaipaati tha, aur aejra jo yajak aur shaasree tha, aur jo leveey logon ko samajha rahe the, unhon ne sab logon se kaha, aj ka din tumhare parameshvar yahova ke liye paavitra haai isaaliye vilap n karo aur n roo. kyonaki sab log vyavastha ke vachan sunakar rote rahe." 
Nehemiah8:10 fir us ne un se kaha, ki jakar chikana chikana bhojan karo aur meetta meetta ras piyo, aur jinake liye kuchh taaiyar naheen hua unake pas baaina bhejo kyonki aj ka din hamare prabhu ke liye paavitra haai aur udas mat raho, kyonki yahova ka anand tumhara draddh gaddh haai." 
Nehemiah8:11 yon leaviyon ne sab logon ko yah kahakar chup kara diya, ki chup raho kyonki aj ka din pavitra haai aur udas mat raho." 
Nehemiah8:12 tab sab log khane, peene, baaina bhejane aur bada anand manane ko chale gaa, kyonaki jo vachan unako samajhaae gaae the, unhen ve samajh gaae the." 
Nehemiah8:13 aur doosare din ko bhee samast praja ke pitaron ke gharane ke mukhy mukhy purush aur yajak aur leveey log, aejra shaasree ke pas vyavastha ke vachan dhyan se sunane ke liye ikatte huae." 
Nehemiah8:14 aur unhen vyavastha men yah likha hua mila, ki yahova ne moosa se yah agyaa dilai thee, ki israaaelee sataven maheene ke parva ke samay jhopaadiyon men raha kare," 
Nehemiah8:15 aur apane sab nagaron aur yarooshalem men yah sunaya aur prachar kiya jaa, ki pahad par jakar jalapai, taailavraksha, menhadee, khjoor aur ghane ghane vrakshaen kee daaliyan le akar jhopaadiyan banao, jaaise ki likha haai." 
Nehemiah8:16 so sab log bahar jakar daaliyan le aa, aur apane apane ghar kee chht par, aur apane anganon me, aur parameshvar ke bhvan ke anganon me, aur jalafaattk ke chauk me, aur aepraaim ke faattk ke chauk me, jhonpadiyan bana leen." 
Nehemiah8:17 varan sab mandlee ke log jitane bandhauai se choottkar lautt aae the, jhonpaadiyan bana kar un men ttkaie. noon ke putra yahoshoo ke dinon se lekar us din tak israaaeliyon ne aeesa naheen kiya tha. aur us samay bahut bada anand hua." 
Nehemiah8:18 fir paheele din se pichhle din tak aejra ne praatidin parameshvar kee vyavastha kee pustak men se paddh paddhkar sunaya. yon ve sat din tak parva ko manate rahe, aur sattven din niyam ke anusar mahasabha hui." 
Nehemiah9:1 fir usee maheene ke chaubeesaven din ko israaaelee upavas ka ttatt pahine aur sir par dhool dale hua, ikatthe ho gaae." 
Nehemiah9:2 tab israaael ke vansh ke log sab anyajaati logon se alag ho gaa, aur khde hokar, apane apane papon aur apane purakhaon ke adharma ke kamon ko man liya." 
Nehemiah9:3 tab unhon ne apane apane sthan par khde hokar din ke aek pahar tak apane parameshvar yahova kee vyavastha kee pustak paddhte, aur aek aur pahar apane papon ko manate, aur apane parameshvar yahova ko dandvat karate rahe." 
Nehemiah9:4 aur yeshoo, banee, kadameeael, shabanyah, bunnee, shorebyah, banee aur kananee ne leviyon kee seeddhee par khde hokar unche svar se apane parameshvar yahova kee dohai dee." 
Nehemiah9:5 fir yeshoo, kadameeael, banee, hashabnayah, shorebyah, hodiyyah, shabanyah, aur pataah nam leaviyon ne kaha, khde ho apane parameshvar yahova ko anadikal se anantakal tak dhany kaho. tera mahimayukt nam dhany kaha jaa, jo sab dhanyavad aur stuati se pare haai." 
Nehemiah9:6 too hee akela yahova haai svarga varan sab se unche svarga aur usake sab ga, aur prathvee aur jo kuchh us men haai, aur samudra aur jo kuchh us men haai, sabhon ko too hee ne banaya, aur sabhon kee raksha too hee karata haai aur svarga kee samast sena tujhee ko dandvat karatee haain." 
Nehemiah9:7 he yahova! too vahee parameshvar haai, jo abraaham ko chunakar kasadiyon ke ur nagar men se nikal laya, aur usaka nam ibraaheem rakha" 
Nehemiah9:8 aur usake man ko apane sath sachcha pakar, us se vacha bandhae, ki maain tere vansh ko kanaaniyo, hittaiyo, aemoriyo, parijjaiyo, yaboosiyo, aur girgaashaiyon ka desh doonga aur too ne apana vah vachan poora bhee kiya, kyonaki too dhama haai." 
Nehemiah9:9 fir too ne misra men hamare purakhaon ke dukh par drashtti kee aur lal samudra ke tatt par unakee dohai sunee. 
Nehemiah9:10 aur firaun aur usake sab karmacharee varan usake desh ke sab logon ko dand dene ke liye chinh aur chamatkar dikhaae kyonki too janata tha ki ve un se abhaiman karate haain aur too ne apana aeesa bada nam kiya, jaaisa aj tak vartaman haai." 
Nehemiah9:11 aur too ne unake age samudra ko aeesa do bhag kiya, ki ve samudra ke beech sthl hee sthl chalakar par ho gaae aur jo unake peechhe pade the, unako too ne gahire sthanon men aeesa dal diya, jaaisa patthr mahajalaraashai men dala jaae." 
Nehemiah9:12 fir too ne din ko badal ke khmbhe men hokar aur rat ko ag ke khmbhe men hokar unakee aguai kee, ki jis marga par unhen chalana tha, us men unako ujiyala mile." 
Nehemiah9:13 fir too ne seenaai parvat par utarakar akash men se unake sath baten kee, aur unako seedho niyam, sachchee vyavastha, aur achchhee vidhaiya, aur agyaaaen deen." 
Nehemiah9:14 aur unhen apane paavitra vishraam din ka gyaan diya, aur apane das moosa ke dara agyaaaen aur vidhaiyan aur vyavastha deen." 
Nehemiah9:15 aur unakee bookh mittane ko akash se unhen bhojan diya aur unakee pyas bujhane ko chattan men se unake liye panee nikala, aur unhen agyaa dee ki jis desh ko tumhen dene kee maain ne shapath khai haai usake aadhaikaree hone ko tum us men jao." 
Nehemiah9:16 parantu unhon ne aur hamare purakhaon ne aabhaiman kiya, aur hatteele bane aur teree agyaaaen n manee" 
Nehemiah9:17 aur agyaa manane se inakar kiya, aur jo ashcharyakarma too ne unake beech kiae the, unaka smaran n kiya, varan hatt karake yahan tak balava karanevale bane, ki aek pradhaan ttharaya, ki apane dasatv kee dasha men lautte. parantu too kshama karanevala anugrahakaree aur dayalu, vilamb se kop karanevala, aur atikarunamay ishvar haai, too ne unako n tyaga." 
Nehemiah9:18 varan jab danhon ne bachhda ddhalakar kaha, ki tumhara parameshvar jo tumhen misra desh se chhuda laya haai, vah yahee haai, aur tera bahut tiraskar kiya," 
Nehemiah9:19 tab bhee too jo aati dayalu haai, unako jangal men n tyaga n to din ko aguai karanevala badal ka khmbha un par se hatta, aur n rat ko ujiyala denevala aur unaka marga dikhanevala ag ka khmbha." 
Nehemiah9:20 varan too ne unhen samajhane ke liye apane atma ko jo bhla haai diya, aur apana manna unhen khailana n chhoda, aur unakee pyas bujhane ko panee deta raha." 
Nehemiah9:21 chalees varsha tak too jangal men unaka aeesa palan poshan karata raha, ki unako kuchh ghattee n hui n to unake vasr purane huae aur n unake panv men soojan hui." 
Nehemiah9:22 fir too ne rajy rajy aur desh desh ke logon ko unake vash men kar diya, aur disha disha men unako bantt diya yon ve heshabon ke raja seehon aur bashaan ke raja og donon ke deshaen ke aadhaikaree ho gaae." 
Nehemiah9:23 fir too ne unakee santan ko akash ke taron ke saman baddhakar unhen us desh men pahuncha diya, jisake vishay too ne unake poorvajon se kaha tha ki ve us men jakar usake aadhaikaree ho jaaenge." 
Nehemiah9:24 so yah santan jakar usakee adhaikaarin ho gai, aur too ne unake dara desh ke nivasee kanaaniyon ko dabaya, aur rajaon aur desh ke logon samet unako, unake hath men kar diya, ki ve un se jo chahen so karen." 
Nehemiah9:25 aur unhon ne gaddhvale nagar aur upaja boomi le lee, aur sab bhanati kee achchhee vastuon se bhre huae gharon ke, aur khude huae haudon ke, aur dakh aur jalapai bariyon ke, aur khane ke falavale bahut se vrakshaen ke adhaikaree ho gaae ve use kha khakar trapt hua, aur shtt-pushtt ho gaa, aur teree badee bhlai ke karan sukh bhogate rahe." 
Nehemiah9:26 parantu ve tujh se firakar balava karanevale ban gaae aur teree vyavastha ko tyag diya, aur tere jo nabee teree or unhen faerane ke liye unako chitate rahe unako unhon ne ghaat kiya, aur tera bahut tiraskar kiya." 
Nehemiah9:27 is karan too ne unako unake shatrauon ke hath men kar diya, aur unhon ne unako sankatt men dal diya taubhee jab jab ve sankatt men padkar teree dohai dete rahe tab tab too svarga se unakee sunata raha aur too jo atidayalu haai, isaaliye unake chhudanevale ko bhejata raha jo unako shatrauon ke hath se chhudate the." 
Nehemiah9:28 parantu jab jab unako chaain mila, tab tab ve fir tere samhane burai karate the, is karan too unako shatrauon ke hath men kar deta tha, aur ve un par prabhuta karate the taubhee jab ve firakar teree dohai dete, tab too svarga se unakee sunata aur too jo dayalu haai, isaliye bar bar unako chhudata," 
Nehemiah9:29 aur unako jitata tha ki unako fir apanee vyavastha ke adhaeen kar de. parantu ve aabhaiman karate rahe aur teree agyaaaen naheen manate the, aur tere niyam, jinako yadi manushy mane, to unake karan jeevit rahe, unake viruddh pap karate, aur hatt karake apana kandha hattate aur n sunate the." 
Nehemiah9:30 too to bahut varsha tak unakee sahata raha, aur apane atma se nabiyon ke dara unhen chitata raha, parantu ve kan naheen lagate the, isaaliye too ne unhen desh desh ke logon ke hath men kar diya." 
Nehemiah9:31 taubhee too ne jo atidayalu haai, unaka ant naheen kar dala aur n unako tyag diya, kyonaki too anugrahakaree aur dayalu ishvar haai." 
Nehemiah9:32 ab to he hamare parameshvar! he mahan parakramee aur bhyayogy ishvar! jo apanee vacha palata aur karuna karata raha haai, jo bada kasht, ashshoor ke rajaon ke dinon se le aj ke din tak hamen aur hamare rajao, hakimo, yajako, nabiyo, purakhao, varan teree samast praja ko bhogana pada haai, vah teree draashtti men thoda n tthare." 
Nehemiah9:33 taubhee jo kuchh ham par beeta haai usake vishy too to dhama haai too ne to sachchai se kam kiya haai, parantu ham ne dushttta kee haai." 
Nehemiah9:34 aur hamare rajaon aur haakimo, yajakon aur purakhaon ne, n to teree vyavastha ko mana haai aur n teree agyaaon aur chitauaniyon kee or dhyan diya haai jin se too ne unako chitaya tha." 
Nehemiah9:35 unhon ne apane rajy me, aur us bade kalyan ke samay jo too ne unhen diya tha, aur is lambe chaude aur upaja desh menn teree seva naheen kee aur n apane bure kamon se pashchatap kiya." 
Nehemiah9:36 dek, ham aj kal das haain jo desh too ne hamare pitaron ko diya tha ki usakee uttam upaj khaae, isee men ham das haain." 
Nehemiah9:37 isakee upaj se un rajaon ko jinhen too ne hamare papon ke karan hamare upar ttharaya haai, bahut dhan milata haai aur ve hamare shareeron aur hamare pashuuon par apanee apanee ichchha ke anusar prabhuta jatate haai, isaaliye ham bade sankatt men pade haain." 
Nehemiah9:38 is sab ke kara, ham sachchai ke sath vacha bandhate, aur likh bhee dete haai, aur hamare hakim, leveey aur yajak us par chhap lagate haain." 
Nehemiah10:1 jinhon ne chhap lagai ve ye haai, arthata hakalyah ka putra nahemayah jo adhaipaati tha, aur sidaakiyyaha" 
Nehemiah10:2 marayah, ajaryah, yirmayaha" 
Nehemiah10:3 pashahoor, amaryah, malkaiyyaha" 
Nehemiah10:4 hatoosha, shabanyah, mallooka" 
Nehemiah10:5 hareem, mareyot, obadhaha" 
Nehemiah10:6 daaniyyel, ginnaton, barooka" 
Nehemiah10:7 mashuullam, abiyyah, miyyameena" 
Nehemiah10:8 majyah, bilagaai aur shamayaha ye hee to yajak the." 
Nehemiah10:9 aur levee ye the ajanyah ka putra yeshoo, henadad kee santan men se binnai aur kadameeaela" 
Nehemiah10:10 aur unake bhai shabanyah, hodiyyah, kaleeta, palayah, hanana" 
Nehemiah10:11 meeka, rahob, hashabyaha" 
Nehemiah10:12 jakkoor, shorebyah, shabanyaha." 
Nehemiah10:13 hodiyyah, banee aur baneena" 
Nehemiah10:14 fir praja ke pradhaan ye the parosha, pahatmoab, aelam, jatto, banee" 
Nehemiah10:15 bunee, ajagad, bebaai" 
Nehemiah10:16 adoniyyah, bigvaai, adeena" 
Nehemiah10:17 ater, hijaakiyyah, majjoora" 
Nehemiah10:18 hodiyyah, hashoom, besaai" 
Nehemiah10:19 hareef, anatot, nobaai" 
Nehemiah10:20 magpeeasha, mashuullam, hejeera" 
Nehemiah10:21 mashojabel, sadok, yaoo" 
Nehemiah10:22 palatyah, hanan, anayaha" 
Nehemiah10:23 hosho, hananyah, hashshooba" 
Nehemiah10:24 hallohesha, pilha, shaebeka" 
Nehemiah10:25 rahoom, hashabna, mashoyaha" 
Nehemiah10:26 aahiyyah, hanan, anana" 
Nehemiah10:27 mallook, hareem aur bana." 
Nehemiah10:28 shosh log arthata yajak, leveey, darapal, gavaaiye aur nateen log, nidan jitane parameshvar kee vyavastha manane ke liye desh desh ke logon se alag huae the, un sabhen ne apanee striayon aur un betten-bettyaien samet jo samajhnevale the," 
Nehemiah10:29 apane bhai raison se milakar shapath khai, ki ham parameshvar kee us vyavastha par chalenge jo usake das moosa ke dara dee gai haai, aur apane prabhu yahova kee sab agyaaae, niyam aur vidhaiyan manane men chaukasee karenge." 
Nehemiah10:30 aur ham n to apanee bettyaian is desh ke logon ko byah denge, aur n apane betton ke liye unakee beattyaian byah lenge." 
Nehemiah10:31 aur jab is desh ke log vishraamadin ko ann va aur bika vastuaen bechane ko le ayenge tab ham un se n to vishraamadin ko n kisee paavitra din ko kuchh lenge aur sataven varsha men boomi padee rahane denge, aur apane apane n kee vasoolee chhod denge." 
Nehemiah10:32 fir ham logon ne aeesa niyam bandha liya jis se ham ko apane parameshvar ke bhvan kee upasana ke liye aek aek tihai shokel dena padega 
Nehemiah10:33 arthata bhentt kee rottee aur nity annabaali aur nity homabaali ke liye, aur vishraamadinon aur naye chand aur niyat pabban ke balidanon aur aur pavitra bhentton aur israaael ke praayashchaitt ke nimitt pap baaliyon ke liye, nidan apane parameshvar ke bhvan ke sare kam ke liye." 
Nehemiah10:34 fir kya yajak, kya leveey, kya sadhaaran log, ham sabhon ne is bat ke ttharane ke liye chitthiyan dalee, ki apane pitaron ke gharanon ke anusar prati varsha men ttharaae huae samayon par lakadee kee bhentt vyavastha men likhee hui bat ke anusar ham apane parameshvar yahova kee vedee par jalane ke liye apane parameshvar ke bhvan men laya karenge." 
Nehemiah10:35 aur apanee apanee boomi kee pahilee upaj aur sab bhanati ke vrakshaen ke pahile fal praati varsha yahova ke bhvan men le aaenge. 
Nehemiah10:36 aur vyavastha men likhee hui bat ke anusar, apane apane paahilautte betton aur pashuuo, arthata pahilautte bachhdon aur memnon ko apane parameshvar ke bhvan men un yajakon ke pas laya karenge, jo hamare parameshvar ke bhvan men seva tthal karate haain." 
Nehemiah10:37 aur apana paahila goondha hua atta, aur uttai hui bhentte, aur sab prakar ke vrakshaen ke fal, aur naya dakhmadha, aur ttttka tel, apane parameshvar ke bhvan kee kottariyon men yajakon ke pas, aur apanee apanee boomi kee upaj ka dashamansh leaviyon ke pas laya karenge kyonaki ve leveey haai, jo hamaree khetee ke sab nagaron men dashamansh lete haain." 
Nehemiah10:38 aur jab jab leveey dashamansh le, tab tab unake sang haroon kee santan ka koi yajak raha kare aur leveey dashamanshaen ka dashamansh hamare parameshvar ke bhvan kee kottriyon men arthata bhndar men pahunchaya karenge." 
Nehemiah10:39 kyonaki jin kottariyon men paavitra sthan ke patra aur seva tthal karanevale yajak aur darapal aur gavaaiye rahate haai, un men israaaelee aur leveey, anaj, naye dakhpadha, aur ttttke tel kee uttai hui bhentte pahunchaaenge. nidan ham apane parameshvar ke bhvan ko n chhodenge." 
Nehemiah11:1 praja ke hakim to yarooshalem men rahate the, aur shosh logon ne yah ttharane ke liye chitthiyan dalee, ki das men se aek manushy yarooshalem me, jo pavitra nagar haai, bas jaaen aur nau manushy aur aur nagaron men basen." 
Nehemiah11:2 aur jinhon ne apanee hee ichchha se yarooshalem men vas karana chaha un sabhon ko logon ne ashairvad diya. 
Nehemiah11:3 us praant ke mukhy mukhy purush jo yarooshalem men rahate the, ve ye haain parantu yahooda ke nagaron men ek ek manushy apanee nij boomi men rahata tha arthata israaelee, yajak, leveey, nateen aur sulaaiman ke dason ke santan" 
Nehemiah11:4 yarooshalem men to kuchh yahoodee aur binyameenee rahate the. yahoodiyon men se to yeres ke vansh ka atayah jo ajjaiyyah ka putra tha, yah jakaryah ka putra, yah amaryah ka putra, yah shapatyah ka putra, yah mahalalel ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:5 aur maseyah jo barook ka putra tha, yah kolahoje ka putra, yah hajayah ka putra, yah adayah ka putra, yah yoyareeb ka putra, yah jakaryah ka putra, yah aur yah shaeeloi ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:6 peres ke vansh ke jo yarooshalem men rahate the, vah sab milakar char sau adsatt shooraveer the." 
Nehemiah11:7 aur binyameeaniyon men se salloo jo mashuullam ka putra tha, yah yoaed ka putra, yah padayah ka putra tha, yah kolayah ka putra yah maseyah ka putra, yah iteeaeh ka putra, yah yashaayah ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:8 aur usake bad gabyaai sallaai jinake sath nau sau atthais purush the. 
Nehemiah11:9 inaka rakhval jikree ka putra yoael tha, aur hassanooa ka putra yahooda nagar ke pradhaan ka nayab tha." 
Nehemiah11:10 fir yajakon men se yoyareeb ka putra yadayah aur yakeena. 
Nehemiah11:11 aur sarayah jo parameshvar ke bhvan ka pradhaan aur hilkaiyyah ka putra tha, yah mashuullam ka putra, yah sadok ka putra, yah marayot ka putra, yah aheetoob ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:12 aur inake att sau bais bhai jo us bhvan ka kam karate the aur adayah, jo yaroham ka putra tha, yah palalyah ka vutra, yah amsee ka putra, yah jakaryah ka putra, yah pashahoor ka putra, yah malkaiyyah ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:13 aur isake do sau bayalees bhai jo pitaron ke gharanon ke pradhaan the aur amashau jo ajarel ka putra tha, yah ahajaai ka putra, yah mashaillemot ka putra, yah immer ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:14 aur inake aek sau atthais shooraveer bhai the aur inaka rakhval haggadoleem ka putra jabdeeael tha. 
Nehemiah11:15 fir leviyon men se shamayah jo hashshoob ka putra tha, yah ajraeekam ka putra, yah hushabyah ka putra, yah bunnee ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:16 or shabbat aur yojabad mukhy leviyon men se parameshvar ke bhvan ke baharee kam par tthare the. 
Nehemiah11:17 aur mattanyah jo meeka ka putra aur jabdee ka pota, aur asap ka parapota tha vah praarthna men dhanyavad karanevalon ka mukhaiya tha, aur bakabukyah apane bhaiyon men doosara pad rakhta tha aur abda jo shammoo ka putra, aur galal ka pota, aur yadootoon ka parapota tha." 
Nehemiah11:18 jo leveey pavitra nagar men rahate the, vah sab milakar do sau chaurasee the." 
Nehemiah11:19 aur akkoob aur talmon nam darapal aur unake bhai jo faattkon ke rakhvale the, aek sau bahattar the." 
Nehemiah11:20 aur shosh israaaelee yajak aur leveey, yahooda ke sab nagaron men apane apane bhag par rahate the." 
Nehemiah11:21 aur nateen log opel men rahate aur naatinon ke upar seeha, aur gishpa ttharaae gaae the." 
Nehemiah11:22 aur jo leveey yarooshalem men rahakar parameshvar ke bhvan ke kam men lage rahate the, unaka muakhaiya asap ke vansh ke gavaaiyon men ka ujjee tha, jo banee ka putra tha, yah hashabyah ka putra, yah mattanyah ka putra aur yah hashabyah ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah11:23 kyonaki unake vishay raja kee agyaa thee, aur gavaaiyon ke pratidin ke prayojan ke anusar tteek prabandha tha." 
Nehemiah11:24 aur praja ke sab kam ke liye mashojabel ka putra pataah jo yahooda ke putra jerah ke vansh men tha, vah raja ke pas rahata tha." 
Nehemiah11:25 bach gaae ganv aur unake khet, so kuchh yahoodee kiryatarba, aur unake ganv me, kuchh deebon, aur usake ganvon me, kuchh yakabsel aur usake ganvon men rahate the." 
Nehemiah11:26 fir yeshoo, molada, betpeleta" 
Nehemiah11:27 hamarshooal, aur bershoba aur aur usake ganvon men" 
Nehemiah11:28 aur sikalag aur makona aur unake ganvon men 
Nehemiah11:29 aennimmon, sora, yamroot," 
Nehemiah11:30 janoh aur adoollam aur unake ganvon me, lakeesha, aur usake kheton men ajeka, aur usake ganvon men ve beshorba se le hinnom kee tarai tak dere dale huae rahate the." 
Nehemiah11:31 aur binyameenee geba se lekar mikamasha, ayya aur betel aur usake ganvon men" 
Nehemiah11:32 anatot, nob, ananyah," 
Nehemiah11:33 hasor, rama, gittaaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 hadeed, saboim, naballat," 
Nehemiah11:35 lod, ono aur kareegaron kee tarai tak rahate the." 
Nehemiah11:36 aur kitane leviyon ke dal yahooda aur binyameen ke praanton men bas gaae. 
Nehemiah12:1 jo yajak aur leveey shaalateeael ke putra jarubbabel aur yeshoo ke sang yarooshalem ko gaae the, ve ye the arthata sarayah, yirmayah, aejra," 
Nehemiah12:2 amaryah, mallook, hattoosha," 
Nehemiah12:3 shakanyah, rahoom, maremot," 
Nehemiah12:4 io, ginnatoi, aabiyyah," 
Nehemiah12:5 meeyyameen, madhah, bilaga," 
Nehemiah12:6 shamayah, yoareeb, yadayah," 
Nehemiah12:7 sallo, amok, hilkaiyyah aur yadayaha. yeshoo ke dinon men yajakon aur unake bhaiyon ke mukhy mukhy purusha, ye hee the." 
Nehemiah12:8 fir ye leveey gaae arthata yeshoo, binnooi, kadameeael, shorebyah, yahooda aur vah mattanyah jo apane bhaiyon samet dhanyavad ke kam par ttharaya gaya tha." 
Nehemiah12:9 aur unake bhai bakabukyah aur unno unake samhane apanee apanee sevakai men lage rahate the. 
Nehemiah12:10 aur yeshoo se yoyakeem utpann hua aur yoyakeem se aelyashaeeb aur aelyashaeeb se yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 aur yoyada se yonatan aur yonatan se ya utpann hua. 
Nehemiah12:12 aur yoyakeem ke dinon men ye yajak apane apane pitaron ke gharane ke mukhy purush the, arthata sharayah ka to marayaha yirmayah ka hananyaha." 
Nehemiah12:13 aejra ka mashuullama amaryah ka yahohanana. 
Nehemiah12:14 mallookee ka yonatana shabanyah ka yosepa. 
Nehemiah12:15 hareem ka adana marayot ka helakaai. 
Nehemiah12:16 io ka jakaryaha ginnaton ka mashuullama. 
Nehemiah12:17 aabiyyah ka jikree minyameen ke moadhah ka pilataai. 
Nehemiah12:18 bilaga ka shammoo shaamayah ka yahonatana. 
Nehemiah12:19 yoyareeb ka mattanaai yadayah ka ujjee. 
Nehemiah12:20 sallaai ka kallaai amok ka aebera. 
Nehemiah12:21 hilkaiyyah ka hashabyaha aur yadayah ka natanela. 
Nehemiah12:22 aelyashaeeb, yoyada, yohanan aur ya ke dinon men leveey pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purushaen ke nam likhe jate the, aur dara faarasee ke rajy men yajakon ke bhee nam likhe jate the." 
Nehemiah12:23 jo leveey pitaron ke gharanon ke mukhy purush the, unake nam aelyashaeeb ke putra yohanan ke dinon tak iatihas kee pustak men likhe jate the." 
Nehemiah12:24 aur leaviyon ke mukhy purush ye the arthata hasabyah, shorebyah aur kadameeael ka putra yeshoo aur unake samhane unake bhai parameshvar ke bhkt daud kee agyaa ke anusar amhane-samhane stuti aur dhanyavad karane par niyukt the." 
Nehemiah12:25 mattanyah, bakabukyah, obadhah, mashuullam, talmon aur akkoob faattkon ke pas ke bhndaron ka pahara denevale darapal the." 
Nehemiah12:26 yoyakeem ke dinon men jo yosadak ka pota aur yeshoo ka putra tha, aur nahemayah aadhaipaati aur aejra yajak aur shaasree ke dinon men ye hee the." 
Nehemiah12:27 aur yarooshalem kee shaharapanah kee pratishtta ke samay leveey apane sab sthanon men ddoonddhe gaa, ki yarooshalem ko pahunchaae jaae, jis se anand aur dhanyavad karake aur jhanj, sarangee aur veena bajakar, aur gakar usakee praatishtta karen." 
Nehemiah12:28 to gavaaiyon ke santan yarooshalem ke charon or ke desh se aur natopaatiyon ke ganvon se," 
Nehemiah12:29 aur betagilagal se, aur geba aur ajmabet ke kheton se ikatthe huae kyonaki gavaaiyon ne yarooshalem ke asa-pas ganv basa liye the." 
Nehemiah12:30 tab yahakon aur leaviyon ne apane apane ko shuuddh kiya aur unhon ne praja ko, aur faattkon aur shaharapanah ko bhee shuuddh kiya." 
Nehemiah12:31 tab maain ne yahoodee haakimon ko shaharapanah par chaddhakar do bade dal ttharaa, jo dhanyavad karate huae dhoomadhaam ke sath chalate the. inamen se aek dal to dakkhian or, arthata koodafaattk kee or shaharapanah ke upar upar se chala" 
Nehemiah12:32 aur usake peechhe peechhe ye chale, arthata hoshayah aur yahooda ke adho hakim," 
Nehemiah12:33 aur ajaryah, aejra, mashuullam," 
Nehemiah12:34 yahooda, binyameen, shamayah, aur yirmayah," 
Nehemiah12:35 aur yajakon ke kitane putra turahiyan liye huae arthata jakaryah jo yohanan ka putra tha, yah shamayah ka putra, yah mattanyah ka putra, yah meekayah ka putra, yah jakkoor ka putra, yah asap ka putra tha." 
Nehemiah12:36 aur usake bhai shamayah, ajarel, milalaai, gilalaai, maaee, natanel, yahooda aur hananee parameshvar ke bhkt daud ke baje liye huae the aur unake age age aejra shaasree chala." 
Nehemiah12:37 ye setafaattk se ho seedho daudapur kee seeddhee par chaddh, shaharapanah kee unchai par se chalakar, daud ke bhvan ke upar se hokar, poorab kee or jalafaattk tak pahunche." 
Nehemiah12:38 aur dhanyavad karane aur dhoomadhaam se chalanevalon ka doosara dal, aur unake peechhe peechhe maai, aur adho log un se milane ko shaharapanah ke upar upar se bhtthon ke gummatt ke pas se chaudee shaharapanah taka." 
Nehemiah12:39 aur aepraaim ke faattk aur purane faattk, aur machhleefaattk, aur hananel ke gummat, aur hammea nam gummatt ke pas se hokar bhed faattk tak chale, aur paharuon ke faattk ke pas khde ho gaae." 
Nehemiah12:40 tab dhanyavad karane valon ke donon dal aur maain aur mere sath adho haakim parameshvar ke bhvan men khde ho gaae. 
Nehemiah12:41 aur aelyakeem, maseyah, minyameen, meekayah, aelyoaenaai, jakaryah aur hananyah nam yajak turaahiyan liye huae the." 
Nehemiah12:42 aur maseyah, shamayah, aeleeajar, ujjee, yahohanan, maalkaiyyah, aelam, or aejer khde huae the aur gavaaiye jinaka mukhaiya yijraah tha, vah unche svar se gate bajate rahe." 
Nehemiah12:43 usee din logon ne bade bade melabaali chaddhaa, aur anand liya kyonaki parameshvar ne unako bahut hee anandait kiya tha striayon ne aur balabachchon ne bhee anand kiya. aur yarooshalem ke anand kee dhvaani door door tak faail gai." 
Nehemiah12:44 usee din khjaanon ke, uttai hui bhentton ke, pahilee paahilee upaj ke, aur dashamanshaen kee kottriyon ke aadhaikaree ttharaae gaa, ki un men nagar nagar ke kheton ke anusar un vastuon ko jama kare, jo vyavastha ke anusar yajakon aur leviyon ke bhag men kee thee kyonaki yahoodee upasthit yajakon aur leviyon ke karan anaandait the." 
Nehemiah12:45 isaliye ve apane parameshvar ke kam aur shuuddhata ke vishay chaukasee karate rahe aur gavaaiye or darapal bhee daud aur usake putra sulaaiman kee agyaa ke anusar vaaisa hee karate rahe. 
Nehemiah12:46 praacheenakal, arthata daud aur asap ke dinon men to gavaaiyon ke pradhaan the, aur parameshvar kee stuati aur dhanyavad ke geet gaae jate the." 
Nehemiah12:47 aur jarubbabel aur nahemayah ke dinon men sare israaaelee, gavaaiyon aur darapalon ke pratidin ka bhag dete rahe aur ve leviyon ke ansh paavitra karake dete the aur leveey haroon kee santan ke ansh pavitra karake dete the." 
Nehemiah13:1 usee din moosa kee pustak logon ko paddhkar sunai gai aur us men yah likha hua mila, ki koi ammonee va moabee parameshvar kee sabha men kabhee n ane pae" 
Nehemiah13:2 kyonaki unhon ne ann jal lekar israaaeliyon se bhentt naheen kee, varan bilam ko unhen shaap dene ke liye daakshiana dekar bulavaya tha,taubhee hamare parameshvar ne us shaap ko ashaeesh se badal diya." 
Nehemiah13:3 yah vyavastha sunakar, unhon ne israaael men se milee julee bheed ko alag alag kar diya." 
Nehemiah13:4 is se paahile aelyashaeeb yajak jo hamare parameshvar ke bhvan kee kottriyon ka aadhaikaree aur tobiyyah ka sambandhaee tha. 
Nehemiah13:5 us ne tobiyyah ke liye ek badee kottree taaiyar kee thee jis men pahile annabaali ka saman aur loban aur patra aur anaj, naye dakhmadha aur ttttke tel ke dashamansha, jinhen leviyo, gavaaiyon aur darapalon ko dene kee agyaa thee, rakhee hui thee aur yajakon ke liye uttai hui bhentt bhee rakhee jatee theen." 
Nehemiah13:6 parantu maain is samay yarooshalem men naheen tha, kyonki babel ke raja artakshatra ke batteesaven varsha men maain raja ke pas chala gaya. fir kitane dinon ke bad raja se chhuttee mangee," 
Nehemiah13:7 aur maain yarooshalem ko aya, tab maain ne jan liya, ki aelyashaeeb ne tobiyyah ke liye parameshvar ke bhvan ke anganon men aek kottree taaiyar kar, kya hee burai kee haai." 
Nehemiah13:8 ise maain ne bahut bura mana, aur tobiyyah ka sara ghareloo saman us kottree men se faenk diya." 
Nehemiah13:9 tab meree agyaa se ve kottriyan shuuddh kee gai, aur maain ne parameshvar ke bhvan ke patra aur annabali ka saman aur loban un men fir se rakhva diya." 
Nehemiah13:10 fir mujhe maloom hua ki leviyon ka bhag unhen naheen diya gaya haai aur is karan kam karanevale leveey aur gavaaiye apane apane khet ko bhag gaae haain. 
Nehemiah13:11 tab maain ne hakimon ko danttkar kaha, parameshvar ka bhvan kyon tyaga gaya haai? fir maain ne unako ikattha karake, aek aek ko usake sthan par niyukt kiya." 
Nehemiah13:12 tab se sab yahoodee anaj, naye dakhmadha aur ttttke tel ke dashamansh bhndaron men lane lage." 
Nehemiah13:13 aur maain ne bhndaron ke aadhaikaree sholemyah yajak aur sadok munshaee ko, aur leaviyon men se padayah ko, aur unake neeche hanan ko, jo mattanyah ka pota aur jakkoor ka putra tha, niyukt kiya ve to vishvasayogy gine jate the, aur apane bhaiyon ke may banttna unaka kam tha." 
Nehemiah13:14 he mere parameshvar! mera yah kam mere hit ke liye smaran rak, aur jo jo sukarma maain ne apane parameshvar ke bhvan aur us men kee aradhana ke vishay kiae haain unhe mitta n dala." 
Nehemiah13:15 unheen dinon men maain ne yahooda men kitanon ko dekha jo vishraamadin ko haaidon men dakh raundate, aur pooliyon ko le ate, aur gadahon par ladate the vaaise hee ve dakhmadha, dak, anjeer aur bhanti bhanati ke bojh vishraamadin ko yarooshalem men late the tab jis din ve bhojanavastu bechate the, usee din maain ne unako chita diya." 
Nehemiah13:16 fir us men soree log rahakar machhlee aur bhanti bhanati ka sauda le akar, yahoodiyon ke hath yarooshalem men vishraamadin ko becha karate the." 
Nehemiah13:17 tab maain ne yahooda ke raison ko danttkar kaha, tum log yah kya burai karate ho, jo vishraamadin ko apaavitra karate ho?" 
Nehemiah13:18 kya tumhare purakha aeesa naheen karate the? aur kya hamare parameshvar ne yah sab vipaattai ham par aur is nagar par n dalee? taubhee tum vishraamadin ko apaavitra karane se israaael par parameshvar ka krodha aur bhee bhdkate jate ho. 
Nehemiah13:19 so jab vishraamavar ke paahile din ko yarooshalem ke faattkon ke asa-pas andhera hone laga, tab maain ne agyaa dee, ki unake palle band kiae jaae, aur yah bhee agyaa dee, ki ve vishraamavar ke poore hone tak khole n jaaen. tab maain ne apane kitane sevakon ko faattkon ka adhaikaree tthara diya, ki vishraamavar ko koi bojh bheetar ane n paae." 
Nehemiah13:20 isaliye vyoparee aur bhanati bhanati ke saude ke bechanevale yarooshalem ke bahar do aek ber ttkaie. 
Nehemiah13:21 tab maain ne unako chitakar kaha, tum log shaharapanah ke samhane kyon ttkaite ho? yaadi tum fir aeesa karoge to maain tum par hath baddhaunga. isaliye us samay se ve fir vishraamabar ko naheen aae." 
Nehemiah13:22 tab maain ne leviyon ko agyaa dee, ki apane apane ko shuuddh karake faattkon kee rakhvalee karane ke liye aya karo, taaki vishraamadin pavitra mana jaae. he mere parameshvar! mere hit ke liye yah bhee smaran rakh aur apanee badee karuna ke anusar mujh par taras kha." 
Nehemiah13:23 fir unheen dinon men mujh ko aeese yahoodee dikhai pade, jinhon ne ashadodee, ammonee aur moabee striayan byah lee theen." 
Nehemiah13:24 aur unake ladkebalon kee adhaee bolee ashadodee thee, aur ve yahoodee bolee n bol sakate the, donon jati kee bolee bolate the." 
Nehemiah13:25 tab maain ne unako dantta aur kosa, aur un men se kitanon ko pittva diya aur unake bal nuchavaae aur unako parameshvar kee yah shapath khailai, ki ham apanee bettyaian unake betton ke sath byah men n denge aur n apane liye va apane betton ke liye unakee beettyaian byah men lenge." 
Nehemiah13:26 kya israaael ka raja sulaaiman isee prakar ke pap men n fansa th? bahuteree jaatiyon men usake tuly koi raja naheen hua, aur vah apane parameshvar ka piry bhee tha, aur parameshvar ne use sare israaael ke upar raja niyukt kiya parantu usako bhee anyajaati striayon ne pap men fansaya." 
Nehemiah13:27 to kya ham tumharee sunakar, aeesee badee burai karen ki anyajaati kee striayan byah kar apane parameshvar ke viruddh pap karen?" 
Nehemiah13:28 aur aelyashaeeb mahayajak ke putra yoyada ka aek putra, horonee samballat ka damad tha, isaliye maain ne usako apane pas se bhga diya." 
Nehemiah13:29 he mere parameshvar unakee hani ke liye yajakapad aur yajakon or leviyon kee vacha ka toda jana smaran rakh. 
Nehemiah13:30 is prakar maain ne unako sab anyajatiyon se shuuddh kiya, aur aek aek yajak aur leveey kee baree aur kam tthara diya." 
Nehemiah13:31 fir maain ne lakadee kee bhentt le ane ke vishosh samay tthara dia, aur paahilee paahilee upaj ke dene ka prabandha bhee kiya. he mere parameshvar! mere hit ke liye mujhe smaran kara." 
Esther1:1 kshayarsha nam raja ke dinon men ye baten hui yah vahee kshayarsha haai, jo aek sau satais praanton par, arthata hindustan se lekar koosh desh tak rajy karata tha." 
Esther1:2 unheen dinon men jab kshayarsha raja apanee us rajagaee par virajaman tha jo shooshan nam rajagaddh men thee. 
Esther1:3 vahan us ne apane rajy ke teesare varsha men apane sab hakimon aur karmachaariyon kee jevanar kee. faaras aur madaai ke senapati aur praanta- praant ke pradhaan aur haakim usake sammukh a gaae. 
Esther1:4 aur vah unhen bahut din varan aek sau assee din tak apane rajaavibhv ka dhan aur apane mahatmy ke anamol padarth dikhata raha. 
Esther1:5 itane dinon ke beetane par raja ne kya chhotte ky bade un sabhon kee bhee jo shooshan nam rajagaddh men ikatthe huae the, rajabhvan kee baree ke angan men sat din tak jevanar kee." 
Esther1:6 vahan ke parde shvet aur neele soot ke the, aur san aur baainjanee rang kee doriyon se chandee ke chhllon me, sangamarmar ke khmbhon se lage huae the aur vahan kee chauakiyan sone-chandee kee theen aur lal aur shvet aur peele aur kale sangamarmar ke bane huae farsha par dharee hui theen." 
Esther1:7 us jevanar men raja ke yogy dakhmadha bhainn bhainn roop ke sone ke patron men dalakar raja kee udarata se bahutayat ke sath pilaya jata tha. 
Esther1:8 peena to niyam ke anusar hota tha, kisee ko barabas naheen pilaya jata tha kyonaki raja ne to apane bhvan ke sab bhndariyon ko agyaa dee thee, ki jo pahun jaaisa chahe usake sath vaaisa hee bartav karana." 
Esther1:9 ranee bashatee ne bhee raja kshayarsha ke bhvan men striyon kee jevanar kee. 
Esther1:10 sataven din, jab raja ka man dakhmadha men magn tha, tab us ne mahooman, bijata, habana, bigata, abagata, jeter aur karkas nam saton khejon ko jo kshayarsha raja ke sammukh seva tthal kiya karate the, aagyaa dee," 
Esther1:11 ki ranee vashatee ko rajamukutt dhaaran kiae huae raja ke sammukh le ao jis se ki desh desh ke logon aur haakimon par usakee sundarata pragatt ho jaae kyonki vah dekhne men sundar thee. 
Esther1:12 khojon ke dara raja kee yah agyaa pakar ranee vashatee ne ane se inakar kiya. is par raja bade krodha se jalane laga. 
Esther1:13 tab raja ne samay samay ka bhed jananevale panaidton se puchha raja to neeti aur nyay ke sab gyaaaniyon se aeesa hee kiya karata tha. 
Esther1:14 aur usake pas karshana, shotar, adamata, tashasha, meres, marsana, aur mamookan nam faaras, aur madaai ke saton kheje the, jo raja ka darshan karate, aur rajy men mukhy mukhy padon par niyukt kiae gaae the." 
Esther1:15 raja ne poochha ki ranee vashatee ne raja kshayarsha kee khojon dara dilai hui agyaa ka ulanghan kiya, to neeati ke anusar usake sath kya kiya jaae?" 
Esther1:16 tab mamookan ne raja aur haakimon kee upasthiaati men uttar diya, ranee vashatee ne jo anuachit kam kiya haai, vah n keval raja se parantu sab hakimon se aur un sab deshaen ke logon se bhee jo raja kshayarsha ke sab praanton men rahate haain." 
Esther1:17 kyonaki ranee ke is kam kee charcha sab striayon men hogee aur jab yah kaha jaaega, ki raja kshayarsha ne ranee vashatee ko apane samhane le ane kee agyaa dee parantu vah n ai, tab ve bhee apane apane pati ko tuchchh janane lagengee."
