Esther1:18 aur aj ke din faarasee aur madee hakimon kee striayan jinhon ne ranee kee yah bat sunee haai to ve bhee raja ke sab haakimon se aeesa hee kahane lagengee is prakar bahut hee gharana aur krodha utpann hoga. 
Esther1:19 yaadi raja ko sveekar ho, to yah agyaa nikale, aur faarsiyon aur maadiyon ke kanoon men likhee bhee jaa, jis se kabhee badal n sake, ki ranee vashatee raja kshayarsha ke sammukh fir kabhee ane n paa, aur raja pattranee ka pad kisee doosaree ko de de jo us se achchhee ho." 
Esther1:20 aur jab raja kee yah agyaa usake sare rajy men sunai jaaegee, tab sab patnaiyan chhotte, bade, apane apane pati ka adaraman karatee rahengee." 
Esther1:21 yah bat raja aur hakimon ko pasand ai aur raja ne mamookan kee sammati man lee aur apane rajy me," 
Esther1:22 arthta pratyek praant ke aksharon men aur pratyek jaati kee bhasha men chitthiyan bhejee, ki sab purush apane apane ghar men adhaikar chalaae, aur apanee jati kee bhasha bola karen." 
Esther2:1 in baton ke bad jab raja kshayarsha kee jalajalahatt ttndee ho gai, tab us ne ranee vashatee kee, aur jo kam us ne kiya tha, aur jo usake vishay men agyaa nikalee thee usakee bhee sudhai lee." 
Esther2:2 tab raja ke sevak jo usake tthaluae the, kahane lage, raja ke liye sundar tatha yuvatee kunvariyan ddoonddhee jaaen." 
Esther2:3 aur raja ne apane rajy ke sab praanton men logon ko isaliye niyukt kiya ki ve sab sundar yuvatee kunvariyon ko shooshan gaddh ke ranavas men ikattha karen aur striayon ke rakhvale hege ko jo raja ka khoja tha saup den aur shuuddh karane ke yogy vastuaen unhen dee jaaen. 
Esther2:4 tab un men se jo kunvaree raja kee draashtti men uttam tthare, vah ranee vashatee ke sthan par pattranee banai jaae. yah bat raja ko pasand ai aur us ne aeesa hee kiya." 
Esther2:5 shooshan gaddh men mordakaai nam aek yahoodee rahata tha, jo keesh nam ke aek binyameenee ka parapota, shaimee ka pota, aur yair ka putra tha." 
Esther2:6 vah un bandhauon ke sath yarooshalem se bandhauai men gaya tha, jinhen babel ka raja nabookadanessar, yahooda ke raja yakonyah ke sang bandhaua karake le gaya tha." 
Esther2:7 us ne hadassa nam apanee chacheree bahin ko, jo ester bhee kahalatee thee, pala-posa tha kyonaki usake mata-mita koi n the, aur vah ladkee sundar aur roopavatee thee, aur jab usake mata-pita mar gaa, tab mordakaai ne usako apanee bettee karake pala." 
Esther2:8 jab raja kee agyaa aur niyam sunaae gaa, aur bahut see yuvatee striaya, shooshan gaddh men hege ke aadhaikar men ikatthee kee gai, tab aester bhee rajabhvan men striayon ke rakhvale hege ke adhaikar men saunpee gai." 
Esther2:9 aur vah yuvatee sree usakee draashtti men achchhee lagee aur vah us se prasann hua, tab us ne bina vilamb use rajabhvan men se shuuddh karane kee vastuae, aur usaka bhojan, aur usake liye chunee hui sat saheliyan bhee dee, aur usako aur usakee sahealiyon ko ranavas men sab se achchha rahane ka sthan diya." 
Esther2:10 aester ne n apanee jati batai thee, n apana kula kyonki mordakaai ne usako agyaa dee thee, ki use n batana." 
Esther2:11 mordakaai to praatidin ranavas ke angan ke samhane tthalata tha taki jane kee aester kaaisee haai aur usake sath kya hoga? 
Esther2:12 jab aek aek kanya kee baree hui, ki vah kshayarsha raja ke pas jaa, aur yah us samay hua jab usake sath striayon ke liye ttharaae huae niyam ke anusar barah mah tak vyavahar kiya gaya tha arthata unake shuuddh karane ke din is reeti se beet gaa, ki chh mah tak gandharas ka tel lagaya jata tha, aur chh mah tak sugandhadavy, aur striayon ke shuuddh karane ka aur aur saman lagaya jata tha." 
Esther2:13 is prakar se vah kanya jab raja ke pas jatee thee, tab jo kuchh vah chahatee ki ranavas se rajabhvan men le jaa, vah usako diya jata tha." 
Esther2:14 sanjh ko to vah jatee thee aur bihan ko vah lauttkar ranavas ke doosare ghar men jakar rakheliyon ke rakhvale raja ke khoje shaashagaj ke aadhaikar men ho jatee thee, aur raja ke pas fir naheen jatee thee. aur yadi raja us se prasann ho jata tha, tab vah nam lekar bulai jatee thee." 
Esther2:15 jab mordakaai ke chacha abeehaail kee bettee aester, jisako mordakaai ne bettee manakar rakha tha, usakee baree ai ki raja ke pas jaa, tab jo kuchh striayon ke rakhvale raja ke khoje hege ne usake liye ttharaya tha, us se adhaik us ne aur kuchh n manga. aur jitanon ne aester ko dekha, ve sab us se prasann hue." 
Esther2:16 yon aester rajabhvan men raja kshayarsha ke pas usake rajy ke sataven varsha ke tebet nam dasaven maheene men pahunchai gai. 
Esther2:17 aur raja ne aester ko aur sab striayon se adhaik pyar kiya, aur aur sab kunvaariyon se aadhaik usake anugrah aur krapa kee draashtti usee par hui, is karan us ne usake sir par rajamukutt rakha aur usako vashatee ke sthan par ranee banaya." 
Esther2:18 tab raja ne apane sab hakimon aur karmachaariyon kee badee jevanar karake, use aester kee jevanar kaha aur praanton men chhuttee dilai, aur apanee udarata ke yogy inam bhee bantte." 
Esther2:19 jab kunvaariyan doosaree bar ikatthee kee gai, tab mordakaai rajabhvan ke faattk men baaitta tha." 
Esther2:20 aur aester ne apanee jaati aur kul ka pata naheen diya tha, kyonaki mordakaai ne usako aeesee agyaa dee thee ki n bataae aur aester mordakaai kee bat aeesee manatee thee jaaise ki usake yahan apane palan poshan ke samay manatee thee." 
Esther2:21 unheen dinon men jab mordakaai raja ke rajabhvan ke faattk men baaitta karata tha, tab raja ke khoje jo darapal bhee the, un men se bikatan aur teresh nam do janon ne raja kshayarsha se roottkar us par hath chalane kee yuktai kee." 
Esther2:22 yah bat mordakaai ko maloom hui, aur us ne aester ranee ko yah bat batai, aur aester ne mordakaai ka nam lekar raja ko chitaunee dee." 
Esther2:23 tab janch padtal hone par yah bat sach nikalee aur ve donon vraksha par lattka diae gaa, aur yah vrattant raja ke samhane itihas kee pustak men likh liya gaya." 
Esther3:1 in baton ke bad raja kshayarsha ne agamee hammadata ke putra haman ko unch pad diya, aur usako mahatv dekar usake liye usake sathee hakimon ke sinhasanon se uncha sinhasan ttharaya." 
Esther3:2 aur raja ke sab karmacharee jo rajabhvan ke faattk men raha karate the, ve haman ke samhane jhukakar dandvat kiya karate the kyonaki raja ne usake vishay aeesee hee agyaa dee thee parantu mordakaai n to jhukata tha aur n usako dandvat karata tha." 
Esther3:3 tab raja ke karmacharee jo rajabhvan ke faattk men raha karate the, unhon ne mordakaai se poochha," 
Esther3:4 too raja kee agyaa kyon ulanghan karata haai? jab ve us se pratidin aeesa hee kahate rahe, aur us ne unakee aek n manee, tab unhon ne yah dekhne kee ichchha se ki mordakaai kee yah bat chalegee ki nahee, haman ko bata diya us ne to unako bata diya tha ki maain yahoodee hoo." 
Esther3:5 jab haman ne dekha, ki mordakaai naheen jhukata, aur n mujh ko dandvat karata haai, tab haman bahut hee krodhait hua." 
Esther3:6 us ne keval mordakaai par hath chalana apanee maryada ke neeche jana. kyonki unhon ne haman ko yah bata diya tha, ki mordakaai kis jati ka haai, isaliye haman ne kshayarsha ke samraajy men rahanevale sare yahoodiyon ko bhee mordakaai kee jaati janakar, vinash kar dalane kee yuktai nikalee." 
Esther3:7 raja kshayarsha ke barahaven varsha ke neesan nam paahile maheene me, haman ne adar nam barahaven maheene tak ke aek aek din aur aek aek maheene ke liye poora arthata chitthee apane samhane dlavai." 
Esther3:8 aur haman ne raja kshayarsha se kaha, tere rajy ke sab praanton men rahanevale desh desh ke logon ke madhy men titar bitar aur chhttikee hui aek jati haai, jisake niyam aur sab logon ke niyamon se bhainn haain aur ve raja ke kanoon par naheen chalate, isaaliye unhen rahane dena raja ko labhdayak naheen haai." 
Esther3:9 yaadi raja ko sveekar ho to unhen nashtt karane kee agyaa likhee jaa, aur maain raj ke bhndariyon ke hath men rajabhndar men pahunchane ke lilaye, das hajar kikkar chandee doonga." 
Esther3:10 tab raja ne apanee angoottee apane hath se utarakar agagee hammadata ke putra haman ko, jo yahoodiyon ka vaairee tha de dee." 
Esther3:11 aur raja ne haman se kaha, vah chandee tujhe dee gai haai, aur ve log bhee, taaki too un se jaaisa tera jee chahe vaaisa hee vyavahar kare." 
Esther3:12 yon usee pahile maheene ke terahaven din ko raja ke lekhk bulaae gaa, aur haman kee agyaa ke anusar raja ke sab adhaipaatiyo, aur sab praanton ke pradhaano, aur desh desh ke logon ke haakimon ke liye chitthiya, aek aek praant ke aksharon me, aur aek aek desh ke logon kee bhasha men raja kshayarsha ke nam se likhee gai aur un men raja kee angoottee kee chhap lagai gai." 
Esther3:13 aur rajy ke sab praanton men is ashay kee chitthiyan har daakiyon ke dara bhejee gai ki aek hee din me, arthata adar nam barahaven maheene ke terahaven din ko, kya javan, kya booddha, kya sre, kya balak, sab yahoodee vidhvansaghaat aur nash kiae jaaen aur unakee dhan sammaattai loott lee jaae." 
Esther3:14 us agyaa ke lekh kee nakalen sab praanton men khulee hui bhejee gai ki sab deshaen ke log us din ke liye taaiyar ho jaen. 
Esther3:15 yah agyaa shooshan gaddh men dee gai, aur daakiae raja kee agyaa se turant nikal gaae. aur raja aur haman to jevanar men baaitt gaae parantu shooshan nagar men ghabarahatt faail gai." 
Esther4:1 jab mordakaai ne jan liya ki kya kya kiya gaya haai tab mordakaai vasr faad, ttatt pahin, rakh dalakar, nagar ke madhy jakar unche aur dukhbhre shabd se chillane laga" 
Esther4:2 aur vah rajabhvan ke faattk ke samhane pahuncha, parantu ttatt pahine huae rajabhvan ke faattk ke bheetar to kisee ke jane kee agyaa n thee." 
Esther4:3 aur aek aek praant me, jahan jahan raja kee agyaa aur niyam pahuncha, vahan vahan yahoodee bada vilap karane aur upavas karane aur rone peettne lage varan bahutere ttatt paahine aur rakh dale huae pade rahe." 
Esther4:4 aur aester ranee kee sahealiyon aur khojon ne jakar usako bata diya, tab ranee shaek se bhr gai aur mordakaai ke pas vasr bhejakar yah kahalaya ki ttatt utarakar inhen paahin le, parantu us ne unhen n liya." 
Esther4:5 tab aester ne raja ke khojon men se hatak ko jise raja ne usake pas rahane ko ttharaya tha, bulavakar agyaa dee, ki mordakaai ke pas jakar maloom kar le, ki kya bat haai aur isaka kya karan haai." 
Esther4:6 tab hatak nagar ke us chauk me, jo rajabhvan ke faattk ke samhane tha, mordakaai ke pas nikal gaya." 
Esther4:7 mordakaai ne usako sab kuchh bata diya ki mere upar kya kya beeta haai, aur haman ne yahoodiyon ke nash karane kee anumati pane ke liye rajabhndar men kitanee chandee bhr dene ka vachan diya haai, yah bhee tteek tteek batala diya." 
Esther4:8 fir yahoodiyon ko vinash karane kee jo agyaa shooshan men dee gai thee, usakee aek nakal bhee us ne hatak ke hath me, aester ko dikhane ke liye dee, aur use sab hal batane, aur yah agyaa dene ko kaha, ki bheetar raja ke pas jakar apane logon ke liye gidgidakar binatee kare." 
Esther4:9 tab hatak ne aester ke pas jakar mordakaai kee baten kah sunai. 
Esther4:10 tab aester ne hatak ko mordakaai se yah kahane kee agyaa dee," 
Esther4:11 ki raja ke sab karmachaariyo, varan raja ke praanton ke sab logon ko bhee maloom haai, ki kya purush kya sree koi kyon n ho, jo agyaa bina paae bheetaree angan men raja ke pas jaaega usake mar dalane hee kee agyaa haai keval jisakee or raja sone ka rajadand baddhaae vahee bachata haai. parantu maain ab tees din se raja ke pas naheen bulai gai hoo." 
Esther4:12 aester kee ye baten mordakaai ko sunai gai. 
Esther4:13 tab mordakaai ne aester ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki too man hee man yah vichar n kar, ki maain hee rajabhvan men rahane ke karan aur sab yahoodiyon men se bachee rahoongee." 
Esther4:14 kyonaki jo too is samay chupachap rahe, to aur kisee n kisee upay se yahoodiyon ka chhuttkara aur uddhar ho jaaega, parantu too apane pita ke gharane samet nash hogee. fir kya jane tujhe aeese hee kattnai samay ke liye rajapad mil gaya ho?" 
Esther4:15 tab aester ne mordakaai ke pas yah kahala bheja," 
Esther4:16 ki too jakar shooshan ke sab yahoodiyon ko ikattha kar, aur tum sab milakar mere nimitt upavas karo, teen din rat n to kuchh khao, aur n kuchh peeo. aur maain bhee apanee saheliyon saahit usee reeati upavas karoongee. aur aeesee hee dasha men maain niyam ke viruddh raja ke pas bheetar jaungee aur yadi nash ho gai to ho gai." 
Esther4:17 tab mordakaai chala gaya aur aester kee agyaa ke anusar hee us ne kiya. 
Esther5:1 teesare din aester apane rajakeey vasr paahinakar rajabhvan ke bheetaree angan men jakar, rajabhvan ke samhane khdee ho gai. raja to rajabhvan men rajagaee par bhvan ke dar ke samhane virajaman tha" 
Esther5:2 aur jab raja ne aester ranee ko angan men khdee huirar dekha, tab us se prasann hokar sone ka rajadand jo usake hath men tha usakee or baddhaya. tab aester ne nikatt jakar rajadand kee lok chhui." 
Esther5:3 tab raja ne us se poochha, he aesater ranee, tujhe kya chaahiye? aur too ky mangatee haai? mang aur tujhe adha rajy tak diya jaaega." 
Esther5:4 aester ne kaha, yadi raja ko sveekar ho, to aj haman ko sath lekar us jevanar men aa, jo maain ne raja ke liye taaiyar kee haai." 
Esther5:5 tab raja ne agyaa dee ki haman ko turant le ao, ki aester ka nimantran grahan kiya jaae. so raja aur haman aester kee taaiyar kee hui jevanar men aae." 
Esther5:6 jevanar ke samay jab dakhmadha piya jata tha, tab raja ne aester se kaha, tera kya nivedan haai? vah poora kiya jaaega. aur too kya mangatee haai? mang, or adha rajy tak tujhe diya jaaega." 
Esther5:7 aester ne uttar diya, mera nivedan aur jo maain mangatee hoo vah yah haai," 
Esther5:8 ki yadi raja mujh par prasann haai aur mera nivedan sunana aur jo varadan maain mangoon vahee dena raja ko sveekar ho, to raja aur haman kal us jevanar men aaen jise maain unake liye karoongee, aur kal maain raja ke is vachan ke anusar karoongee." 
Esther5:9 us din haman anandait or man men prasann hokar bahar gaya. parantu jab us ne mordakaai ko rajabhvan ke faattk men dekha, ki vah usake samhane n to khda hua, aur n hatta, tab vah mordakaai ke viruddh krodha se bhr gaya." 
Esther5:10 taubhee vah apane ko rokakar apane ghar gaya aur apane mitraen aur apanee sree jeresh ko bulava bheja. 
Esther5:11 tab haman ne, un se apane dhan ka vibhv, aur apane ladke-balon kee baddhtee aur raja ne usako kaaise kaaise baddhaya, aur aur sab haakimon aur apane aur sab karmachaariyon se uncha pad diya tha, in sab ka varnn kiya." 
Esther5:12 haman ne yah bhee kaha, ki aester ranee ne bhee mujhe chhod aur kisee ko raja ke sang, apanee kee hui jevanar men ane n diya aur kal ke liye bhee raja ke sang us ne mujhee ko nevata diya haai." 
Esther5:13 taubhee jab jab mujhe vah yahoodee mordakaai rajabhvan ke faattk men baaitta hua dikhai padta haai, tab tab yah sab meree draashtti men vyarth haai." 
Esther5:14 usakee patnee jeresh aur usake sab mitraen ne us se kaha, pachas hath uncha faansee ka ek khmbha, banaya jaa, aur bihan ko raja se kahana, ki us par mordakaai lattka diya jae tab raja ke sang anand se jevanar men jana. is bat se prasann hokar haman ne baaisa hee faansee ka ek khmbha banavaya." 
Esther6:1 us rat raja ko neend naheen ai, isaliye usakee agyaa se itihas kee pustak lai gai, aur paddhkar raja ko sunai gai." 
Esther6:2 aur yah likha hua mila, ki jab raja kshayarsha ke haakim jo darapal bhee the, un men se bigatana aur teresh nam do janon ne us par hath chalane kee yuktai kee thee use mordakaai ne pragatt kiya tha." 
Esther6:3 tab raja ne poochha, isake badale mordakaai kee kya praatishtta aur badai kee gai? raja ke jo sevak usakee seva tthal kar rahe the, unhon ne usako uttar diya, usake liye kuchh bhee naheen kiya gaya." 
Esther6:4 raja ne poochha, angan men kaun haai? usee samay to haman raja ke bhvan se baharee angan men is manasa se aya tha, ki jo khmbha us ne mordakaai ke liye taaiyar karaya tha, us par usako lattka dene kee charcha raja se kare." 
Esther6:5 tab raja ke sevakon ne us se kaha, angan men to haman khda haai. raja ne kaha, use bheetar bulava lao." 
Esther6:6 jab haman bheetar aya, tab raja ne us se poochha, jis manushy kee pratishtta raja karana chahata ho to usake liye kya karana uchit hoga? haman ne yah sochakar, ki mujh se adhaik raja kis kee pratishtta karana chahata hoga?" 
Esther6:7 raja ko uttar diya, jis manushy kee pratishtta raja karana chahe," 
Esther6:8 to usake liye rajakeey vasr laya jaa, jo raja pahinata haai, aur aek ghoda bhee, jis par raja savar hota haai, or usake sir par jo rajakeey mukutt dhara jata haai vah bhee laya jaae." 
Esther6:9 fir vah vasr, aur vah ghoda raja ke kisee bade haakim ko saunpa jaa, aur jisakee pratishtta raja karana chahata ho, usako vah vasr pahinaya jaa, aur us ghaede par savar karake, nagar ke chauk men use firaya jaae aur usake age age yah prachar kiya jaa, ki jisakee pratishtta raja karana chahata haai, usake sath aeesa hee kiya jaaega." 
Esther6:10 raja ne haman se kaha, fauta karake apane kahane ke anusar us vasr aur us ghaede ko lekar, us yahoodee mordakaai se jo rajabhvan ke faattk men baaitta karata haai, vaaisa hee kara. jaaisa too ne kaha haai us men kuchh bhee kamee hone n paae." 
Esther6:11 tab haman ne us vasr, aur us ghaede ko lekar, mordakaai ko pahinaya, aur use ghaede par chaddhakar, nagar ke chauk men is prakar pukarata hua ghaumaya ki jisakee pratishtta raja karana chahata haai usake sath aeesa hee kiya jaaega." 
Esther6:12 tab mordakaai to rajabhvan ke faattk men lautt gaya parantu haman shaek karata hua aur sir ddhanpe huae jhtt apane ghar ko gaya. 
Esther6:13 aur haman ne apanee pattee jeresh aur apane sab mitraen se sab kuchh jo us par beeta tha varnn kiya. 
Esther6:14 tab usake buaddhiman mitraen aur usakeee patnee jeresh ne us se kaha, mordakaai jise too neecha dikhna chahata haai, yaadi vah yahoodiyon ke vansh men ka haai, to too us par prabal n hone paaega us se pooree reeti neecha hee khaega. ve us se baten kar hee rahe the, ki raja ke khoje akar, haman ko aester kee kee hui jevanar men fauta se liva le gaae." 
Esther7:1 so raja aur haman aester ranee kee jevanar men agaae. 
Esther7:2 aur raja ne doosare din dakhmadha peete-peete aester se fir poochha, he aester ranee! tera kya nivedan haai? vah poora kiya jaaega. aur too kya mangatee haai? mang, aur adha rajy tak tujhe diya jaaega." 
Esther7:3 aester ranee ne uttar diya, he raja! yaadi too mujh par prasann haai, aur raja ko yah sveekar ho, to mere nivedan se mujhe, aur mere mangane se mere logon ko praandan mile." 
Esther7:4 kyonaki maain aaair meree jati ke log bech dale gaae haai, aur ham sab vidhvansaghaat aur nash kiae janevale haain. yaadi ham keval dasa-dasee ho jane ke liye bech dale jate, to maain chup rahatee chahe us dasha men bhee vah virodhaee raja kee haani bhr n sakata." 
Esther7:5 tab raja kshayarsha ne aester ranee se poochha, vah kaun haai? aur kahan haai jis ne aeesa karane kee manasa kee haai?" 
Esther7:6 aester ne uttar diya haai ki vah virodhaee aur shatra yahee dushtt haman haai. tab haman raja-ranee ke samhate bhyabheet ho gaya. 
Esther7:7 raja to jalajalahatt men a, madha peene se uttkar, rajabhvan kee baree men nikal gaya aur haman yah dekhkar ki raja ne meree hani ttanee hogee, aester ranee se praandan mangane ko khda hua." 
Esther7:8 jab raja rajabhvan kee baree se dakhmadha peene ke sthan men lautt aya tab kya dekha, ki haman usee chaukee par jis par aester baaittee haai pada haai aur raja ne kaha, kya yah ghar hee men mere samhane hee ranee se barabas karana chahata haai? raja ke munh se yah vachan nikala hee tha, ki sevakon ne haman ka munh ddhanp diya." 
Esther7:9 tab raja ke samhane upasthit rahanevale khojon men se havana nam aek ne raja se kaha, haman ko yahan pachas hath uncha faansee ka aek khmbha khda haai, jo us ne mordakaai ke liye banavaya haai, jis ne raja ke hit kee bat kahee thee. raja ne kaha, usako usee par lattka do." 
Esther7:10 tab haman usee khmbhe par jo us ne mordakaai ke liye taaiyar karaya tha, lattka diya gaya. is par raja kee jalajalahatt ttndee ho gai." 
Esther8:1 usee din raja kshayarsha ne yahoodiyon ke virodhaee haman ka gharabar ester ranee ko de diya. aur mordakaai raja ke samhane aya, kyonki ester ne raja ko bataya tha, ki us se usaka kya nata tha" 
Esther8:2 tab raja ne apanee vah angoottee jo us ne haman se le lee thee, utar kar, mordakaai ko de dee. aur aesater ne mordakaai ko haman ke gharabar par adhaikaree niyukt kar diya." 
Esther8:3 fir aester doosaree bar raja se bolee aur usake panv par gir, ansoo baha bahakar us se gidgidakar bintee kee, ki agagee haman kee burai aur yahoodiyon kee haani kee usakee yuktai nishfal kee jaae." 
Esther8:4 tab raja ne aester kee or sone ka rajadand baddhaya. 
Esther8:5 tab aester uttkar raja ke samhane khdee hui aur kahane lagee ki yadi raja ko sveekar ho aur vah mujh se prasann haai aur yah bat usako tteek jan pade, aur maain bhee usako achchhee lagatee hoo, to jo chitthiyan hammadata agagee ke putra haman ne raja ke sab praanton ke yahoodiyon ko nash karane kee yuktai karake likhai thee, unako palattne ke liye likha jaae." 
Esther8:6 kyonaki maain apane jaati ke logon par padnevalee us vipaattai ko kis reeti se dekh sakoongee? aur maain apane bhaiyon ke vinash ko kyonkar dekh sakoongee? 
Esther8:7 tab raja kshayarsha ne aester ranee se aur mordakaai yahoodee se kaha, maain haman ka gharabar to aester ko de chuka hoo, aur vah faansee ke khmbhe par lattka diya gaya haai, isaliye ki us ne yahoodiyon par hath baddhaya tha." 
Esther8:8 so tum apanee samajh ke anusar raja ke nam se yahoodiyon ke nam par likho, aur raja kee angoottee kee chhap bhee lagao kyonki jo chitthee raja ke nam se likhee jaa, aur us par usakee angoottee kee chhap lagai jaa, usako koi bhee palatt naheen sakata." 
Esther8:9 so usee samay arthata seevan nam teesare maheene ke teisaven din ko raja ke lekhk bulavaae gaae aur jis jis bat kee agyaa mordakaai ne unhen dee thee use yahoodiyon aur aadhaipaatiyon aur hindustan se lekar koosh tak, jo aek sau sattais praant haai, un sabhon ke aadhaipaatiyon aur haakimon ko aek aek praant ke aksharon men aur aek aek desh ke logon kee bhasha me, aur yahoodiyon ko unake aksharon aur bhasha men likhee gai." 
Esther8:10 mordakaai ne raja kshayarsha ke nam se chitthiyan likhakar, aur un par raja kee angoottee kee chhap lagakar, veg chalanevale sarakaree ghaedo, khchcharon aur sandniyon kee dak lagakar, harakaron ke hath bhej deen." 
Esther8:11 in chitthiyon men sab nagaron ke yahoodiyon ko raja kee or se anumati dee gai, ki ve ikatthe hon aur apana apana praan bachane ke liye taaiyar hokar, jis jati va praant se log anyay karake unako va unakee striayon aur balabachchon ko dukh dena chahe, unako vidhvansaghaat aur nash kare, aur unakee dhan sammattai loott len." 
Esther8:12 aur yah raja kshayarsha ke sab praanton men aek hee din men kiya jaa, arthata adar nam barahaven maheene ke terahaven din ko." 
Esther8:13 is agyaa ke lekh kee nakale, samast praanton men sab deshon ke logon ke pas khulee hui bhejee gai taaki yahoodee us din apane shatrauon se palatta lene ko taaiyar rahen." 
Esther8:14 so harakare veg chalanevale sarakaree ghaedon par savar hokar, raja kee agyaa se fauta karake jaldee chale gaa, aur yah agyaa shooshan rajagaddh men dee gai thee." 
Esther8:15 tab mordakaai neele aur shvet rang ke rajakeey vasr paahine aur sir par sone ka bada mumutt dhare huae aur sookshamasan aur baainjanee rang ka baga paahine hua, raja ke sammukh se nikala, aur shooshan nagar ke log anand ke mare lalakar utte." 
Esther8:16 aur yahoodiyon ko anand aur harsha hua aur unakee badee praatishtta hui. 
Esther8:17 aur jis jis praant, aur jis jis nagar me, jahan kaheen raja kee agyaa aur niyam pahunche, vahan vahan yahoodiyon ko anand aur harsha hua, aur unhon ne jevanar karake us din ko khushaee ka din mana. aur us desh ke logon men se bahut log yahoodee ban gaa, kyonki unake man men yahoodiyon ka dr sama gaya tha." 
Esther9:1 adar nam barahaven maheene ke terahaven din ko, jis din raja kee agyaa aur niyam poore hone ko the, aur yahoodiyon ke shatra un par prabal hone kee asha rakhte the, parantu isake ulatte yahoodee apane vaairiyon par prabal hua, us din," 
Esther9:2 yahoodee log raja kshayarsha ke sab praanton men apane apane nagar men ikatthe hua, ki jo unakee hani karane ka yatn kare, un par hath chalaae. aur koi unaka samhana n kar saka, kyonaki unaka bhy desh desh ke sab logon ke man men sama gaya tha." 
Esther9:3 varan praanton ke sab haakimon aur aadhaipaatiyon aur pradhaanon aur raja ke karmachaariyon ne yahoodiyon kee sahayata kee, kyonki unake man men mordakaai ka bhy sama gaya tha." 
Esther9:4 mordakaai to raja ke yahan bahut pratishttit tha, aur usakee keettair sab praanton men faail gai varan us purush mordakaai kee mahima baddhtee chalee gai." 
Esther9:5 aur yahoodiyon ne apane sab shatrauon ko talavar se marakar aur ghaat karake nash kar dala, aur apane vaairiyon se apanee ichchha ke anusar bartav kiya." 
Esther9:6 aur shooshan rajagaddh men yahoodiyon ne panch sau manushyon ko ghaat karake nash kiya. 
Esther9:7 aur unhon ne parshandata, dalpon, aspata," 
Esther9:8 porata, adalya, areedata," 
Esther9:9 parmashata, areesaai, areedaai aur vaaijata," 
Esther9:10 arthata hammadata ke putra yahoodiyon ke virodhaee haman ke dason putraen ko bhee ghaat kiya parantu unake dhan ko n lootta. 
Esther9:11 usee din shooshan rajagaddh men ghaat kiae huon kee ginatee raja ko sunai gai. 
Esther9:12 tab raja ne aester ranee se kaha, yahoodiyon ne shooshan rajagaddh hee men panch sau manushy aur haman ke dason putraen ko bhee ghaat karake nash kiya haai fir rajy ke aur aur praanton men unhon ne n jane kya kya kiya hoga! ab is se aadhaik tera nivedan kya haai? vah bhee poora kiya jaaega. aur too kya mangatee haai? vah bhee tujhe diya jaaega." 
Esther9:13 aester ne kaha, yadi raja ko sveekar ho to shooshan ke yahoodiyon ko aj kee nai kal bhee karane kee agyaa dee jaa, aur haman ke dason putra faansee ke khmbhen par lattkaae jaaen." 
Esther9:14 raja ne kaha, aeesa kiya jaae yah agyaa shooshan men dee gai, aur haman ke dason putra lattkaae gaae." 
Esther9:15 aur shooshan ke yahoodiyon ne adar maheene ke chaudahaven din ko bhee ikatthe hokar shooshan men teen sau purushaen ko ghaat kiya, parantu dhan ko n lootta." 
Esther9:16 rajy ke aur aur praanton ke yahoodee ikatthe hokar apana apana praan bachane ke liye khde hua, aur apane vaairiyon men se pachahattar hajar manushyon ko ghaat karake apane shatrauon se vishraam paya parantu dhan ko n lootta." 
Esther9:17 yah adar maheene ke terahaven din ko kiya gaya, aur chaudahaven din ko unhon ne vishraam karake jevanar kee aur anand ka din ttharaya." 
Esther9:18 parantu shooshan ke yahoodee adar maheene ke terahaven din ko, aur usee maheene ke chaudahaven din ko ikatthe hua, aur usee maheene ke pandrahaven din ko unhon ne vishraam karake jevanar ka aur anand ka din ttharaya." 
Esther9:19 is karan dehatee yahoodee jo bina shaharapanah kee baastaiyon men rahate haai, ve adar maheene ke chaudahaven din ko anand or jevanar aur khushaee aur apas men baaina bhejane ka din niyukt karake manate haain." 
Esther9:20 in baton ka vrattant likhkar, mordakaai ne raja kshayarsha ke sab praanton me, kya nikatt kya door rahanevale sare yahoodiyon ke pas chitthiyan bhejee," 
Esther9:21 aur yah agyaa dee, ki adar maheene ke chaudahaven aur usee maheene ke pandrahaven din ko prati varsha mana karen." 
Esther9:22 jin men yahoodiyon ne apane shatrauon se vishraam paya, aur yah maheena jis men shaek anand se, aur vilap khushaee se badala gaya mana karen aur unako jevanar aur anand aur aek doosare ke pas baaina bhejane or kangalon ko dan dene ke din manen." 
Esther9:23 aur yahoodiyon ne jaaisa arambh kiya tha, aur jaaisa mordakaai ne unhen likha, vaaisa hee karane ka nishchay kar liya." 
Esther9:24 kyonaki hammadata agagee ka putra haman jo sab yahoodiyon ka virodhaee tha, us ne yahoodiyon ke nash karane kee yuktai kee, aur unhen mitta dalane aur nash karane ke liye poor arthata chitthee dalee thee." 
Esther9:25 parantu jab raja ne yah jan liya, tab us ne agyaa dee aur likhvai ki jo dushtt yuaktai haman ne yahoodiyon ke viruddh kee thee vah usee ke sir par palatt aa, tab vah aur usake putra faansee ke kshambhon par lattkaae gaae." 
Esther9:26 is karan un dinon ka nam poor shabd se pooreem rakha gaya. is chitthee kee sab baton ke kara, aur jo kuchh unhon ne is vishay men dekha aur jo kuchh un par beeta tha, usake karan bhee" 
Esther9:27 yahoodiyon ne apane apane liye aur apanee santan ke liye, aur un sabhon ke liye bhee jo un men mil gaae the yah attl pran kiya, ki us lekh ke anusar prati varsha usake ttharaae huae samay men ve ye do din manen." 
Esther9:28 aur peeddhee peeddhee, kul kul, praant praant, nagar nagar men ye din smaran kiae aur mane jaaenge. aur pooreem nam ke din yahoodiyon men kabhee n mittenge aur unaka smaran unake vansh se jata n rahega." 
Esther9:29 fir abeehaail kee bettee aester ranee, aur mordakaai yahoodee ne, pooreem ke vishay yah doosaree chitthee bade aadhaikar ke sath likhee." 
Esther9:30 isakee nakalen mordakaai ne kshayarsha ke rajy ke, aek sau sattaison praanton ke sab yahoodiyon ke pas shaantai denevalee aur sachchee baton ke sath is ashay se bhejee," 
Esther9:31 ki pooreem ke un dinon ke vishosh ttharaae huae samayon men mordakaai yahoodee aur aester ranee kee agyaa ke anusar, aur jo yahoodiyon ne apane aur apanee santan ke liye ttan liya tha, usake anusar bhee upavas aur vilap kiae jaaen." 
Esther9:32 aur pooreem ke vishy ka yah niyam aester kee agyaa se bhee sthiar kiya gaya, aur unakee charcha pustak men likhee gai." 
Esther10:1 aur raja kshayarsha ne desh aur samudra ke ttapoo donon par kar lagaya. 
Esther10:2 aur usake mahatmy aur parakram ke kamo, aur mordakaai kee us badai ka poora byora, jo raja ne usakee kee thee, kya vah madaai aur faaras ke rajaon ke iatihas kee pustak men naheen likha haai?" 
Esther10:3 nidan yahoodee mordakaai, kshayarsha raja hee ke neeche tha, aur yahoodiyon kee draashtti men bada tha, aur usake sab bhai us se prasann the, kyonki vah apane logon kee bhlai kee khoj men raha karata tha aur apane sab logon se shaantai kee baten kaha karata tha." 
Job1:1 uja desh men ayyoob nam ek purush tha vah khra aur seedha tha aur parameshvar ka bhy manata aur burai se pare rahata tha. 
Job1:2 usake sat bette aur teen bettyaian utpann hui. 
Job1:3 fir usake sat hajar bhed-bakaariya, teen hajar unt, panch sau jodee baail, aur panch sau gadahiya, aur bahut hee dasa-dasiyan theen varan usake itanee sampaattai thee, ki poorabiyon men vah sab se bada tha." 
Job1:4 usake bette upane apane din par ek doosare ke ghar men khane-peene ko jaya karate the aur apanee teenon baahinon ko apane sang khane-peene ke liye bulava bhejate the. 
Job1:5 aur jab jab jevanar ke din poore ho jate, tab tab ayyoob unhen bulavakar paavitra karata, aur badee bhor uttkar unakee ginatee ke anusar homabali chaddhata tha kyonaki ayyoob sochata tha, ki kadaachita mere ladkon ne pap karake parameshvar ko chhod diya ho. isee reeti ayyoob sadaaiv kiya karata tha." 
Job1:6 aek din yahova parameshvar ke putra usake samhane upaasthiat hua, aur unake beech shautan bhee aya." 
Job1:7 yahova ne shautan se poochha, too kahan se ata haai? shautan ne yahova ko uttar diya, ki prathvee par idhara-udhar ghoomate-firate aur dolate-dalate aya hoo." 
Job1:8 yahova ne shautan se poochha, kya too ne mere das ayyoob par dhyan diya haai? kyonki usake tuly khra aur seedha aur mera bhy mananevala aur burai se door rahanevala manushy aur koi naheen haai." 
Job1:9 shautan ne yahova ko uttar diya, kya ayyoob parameshvar ka bhy bina labh ke manata haai?" 
Job1:10 kya too ne usakee, aur usake ghar kee, aur jo kuchh usaka haai usake charon or bada naheen bandhaa? too ne to usake kam par ashaeesh dee haai, aur usakee sampaattai desh bhr men faail gai haai." 
Job1:11 parantu ab apana hath baddhakar jo kuchh usaka haai, use choo tab vah tere munh par teree ninda karega." 
Job1:12 yahova ne shautan se kaha, sun, jo kuchh usaka haai, vah sab tere hath men haai keval usake shareer par hath n lagana. tab shautan yahova ke samhane se chala gaya." 
Job1:13 aek din ayyoob ke bette-bettyaian bade bhai ke ghar men khate aur dakhmadha pee rahe the 
Job1:14 tab aek doot ayyoob ke pas akar kahane laga, ham to baailon se hal jot rahe the, aur gadaahiyan unake pas char rahee thee," 
Job1:15 ki shaba ke log dhaava karake unako le gaa, aur talavar se tere sevakon ko mar dala aur maain hee akela bachakar tujhe samachar dene ko aya hoo." 
Job1:16 vah abhee yah kah hee raha tha ki doosara bhee akar kahane laga, ki parameshvar kee ag akash se giree aur us se bhed-bakaariyan aur sevak jalakar bhsm ho gaae aur maain hee akela bachakar tujhe samachar dene ko aya hoo." 
Job1:17 vah abhee yah kah hee raha tha, ki aek aur bhee akar kahane laga, ki kasadee log teen gol bandhakar untton par dhaava karake unhen le gaa, aur talavar se tere sevakon ko mar dala aur maain hee akela bachakar tujhe samachar dene ko aya hoo." 
Job1:18 vah abhee yah kah hee raha tha, ki aek aur bhee akar kahane laga, tere bett-bettyaian bade bhai ke ghar men khate aur dakhmadha peete the," 
Job1:19 ki jangal kee or se badee prachand vayu chalee, aur ghar ke charon konon ko aeesa jhonka mara, ki vah javanon par gir pada aur ve mar gaae aur maain hee akela bachakar tujhe samachar dene ko aya hoo." 
Job1:20 tab ayyoob utta, aur baga faad, sir mundakar boomi par gira aur dandvata karake kaha," 
Job1:21 maain apanee man ke pett se nanga nikala aur vaheen nanga lautt jaunga yahova ne diya aur yahova hee ne liya yahova ka nam dhany haai. 
Job1:22 in sab baton men bhee ayyoob ne n to pap kiya, aur n parameshvar par moorkhta se dosh lagaya." 
Job2:1 fir aek aur din yahova parameshvar ke putra usake samhane upaasthiat hua, aur unake beech shautan bhee usake samhane upasthiat hua." 
Job2:2 yahova ne shautan se poochha, too kahan se ata haai? shautan ne yahova ko uttar diya, ki idhara-udhar ghoomate-firate aur dolate-dalate aya hoo." 
Job2:3 yahova ne shautan se poochha, kya too ne mere das ayyoob par dhyan diya haai ki prathvee par usake tuly khra aur seedha aur mera bhy mananevala aur burai se door rahanevala manushy aur koi naheen haai? aur yadhaapi too ne mujhe usako bina karan satyanash karate ko ubhara, taubhee vah ab tak apanee khrai par bana haai." 
Job2:4 shautan ne yahova ko uttar diya, khal ke badale khal, parantu praan ke badale manushy apana sab kuchh de deta haai." 
Job2:5 so keval apana hath baddhakar usakee haaddiyan aur mans cho, tab vah tere munh par teree ninda karega." 
Job2:6 yahova ne shautan se kaha, sun, vah tere hath men haai, keval usaka praan chhod dena." 
Job2:7 tab shautan yahova ke samhane se nikala, aur ayyoob ko panv ke talave se le sir kee chottee tak bade bade faodon se peeadit kiya." 
Job2:8 tab ayyoob khujalane ke liye aek tteekara lekar rakh par baaitt gaya. 
Job2:9 tab usakee sree us se kahane lagee, kya too ab bhee apanee khrai par bana haai? parameshvar kee ninda kar, aur chahe mar jaae to mar ja." 
Job2:10 us ne us se kaha, too ek mooddh sree kee see baten karatee haai, kya ham jo parameshvar ke hath se sukh lete haai, dukh n len? in sab baton men bhee ayyoob ne apane munh se koi pap naheen kiya." 
Job2:11 jab temanee aeleepaj, aur shoohee biladad, aur namatee sopar, ayyoob ke in teen mitraen ne is sab vipaattai ka samachar paya jo us par padee thee, tab ve apas men yah ttanakar ki ham ayyoob ke pas jakar usake sang vilap karenge, aur usako shaaantai denge, apane apane yahan se usake pas chale." 
Job2:12 jab unhon ne door se ankh uttakar ayyoob ko dekha aur use n cheenh sake, tab chillakar ro utte aur apana apana baga faada, aur akash kee or dhooli udakar apane apane sir par dalee." 
Job2:13 tab ve sat din aur sat rat usake sang boomi par baaitte rahe, parantu usaka dukh bahut hee bada jan kar kisee ne us se aek bhee bat n kahee." 
Job3:1 isake bad ayyoob munh kholakar apane janmaadin ko dhaikkarane 
Job3:2 aur kahane laga," 
Job3:3 vah din jal jaae jis men maain utpann hua, aur vah rat bhee jis men kaha gaya, ki bette ka garbh raha." 
Job3:4 vah din andhiayara ho jaae! upar se ishvar usakee sudhai n le, aur n us men prakash hoae." 
Job3:5 aandhiayara aur mratyu kee chhaya us par rahe. badal us par chhaae rahen aur din ko andhora kar denevalee cheejon use draaen. 
Job3:6 ghaer andhakar us rat ko pakade varsha ke dinon ke beech vah anand n karane paa, aur n maheenon men usakee ginatee kee jaae." 
Job3:7 suno, vah rat banjh ho jaae us men gane ka shabd n sun pade" 
Job3:8 jo log kisee din ko dhaikkarate haai, aur libyatan ko chhedne men nipun haai, use dhkikaren." 
Job3:9 usakee sandhya ke tare prakash n den vah ujiyale kee batt johe par vah use n mile, vah bhor kee palakon ko bhee dekhne n pae" 
Job3:10 kyonaki us ne meree mata kee kokh ko band n kiya aur kashtt ko meree draashtti se n chhpaiaya. 
Job3:11 maain garbh hee men kyon n mar gaya? pett se nikalate hee mera praan kyon n chootta? 
Job3:12 maain ghauttnon par kyon liya gaya? maain chhaatiyon ko kyon peene paya? 
Job3:13 aeesa n hota to maain chupachap pada rahata, maain sota rahata aur vishraam karata," 
Job3:14 aur maain prathvee ke un rajaon aur mantriayon ke sath hota jinhon ne apane liye sunasan sthan banava lia," 
Job3:15 va maain un rajakumaron ke sath hota jinake pas sona tha jinhon ne apane gharon ko chandee se bhr liya tha 
Job3:16 va maain asamay gire huae garbh kee nai hua hota, va aeese bachchon ke saman hota jinhon ne ujiyale ko kabhee dekha hee n ho." 
Job3:17 us dasha men dushtt log fir dukh naheen dete, aur thke mande vishraam pate haain." 
Job3:18 us men bandhauae ek sang sukh se rahate haain aur paarishram karanevale ka shabd naheen sunate. 
Job3:19 us men chhotte bade sab rahate haai, aur das apane svamee se svatantra rahata haai." 
Job3:20 dukhaiyon ko ujiyala, aur udas manavalon ko jeevan kyon diya jata haai?" 
Job3:21 ve mratyu kee batt johate haain par vah atee naheen aur gade huae dhan se adhaik usakee khoj karate haain 
Job3:22 ve kabra ko pahunchakar anandait aur atyant magan hote haain. 
Job3:23 ujiyala us purush ko kyon milata haai jisaka marga chhpai haai, jisake charon or ishvar ne ghora bandha diya haai?" 
Job3:24 mujhe to rottee khane kee santee lambee lambee sansen atee haai, aur mera vilap dhaara kee nai bahata rahata haai." 
Job3:25 kyonki jis dravanee bat se maain drata hoo, vahee mujh par a padtee haai, aur jis bat se maain bhy khata hoo vahee mujh par a jatee haai." 
Job3:26 mujhe n to chaain, n shaaantai, n vishraam milata haai parantu dukh hee ata haai." 
Job4:1 tab temanee aeleepaj ne kaha," 
Job4:2 yaadi koi tujh se kuchh kahane lage, to kya tujhe bura lagega? parantu bole bina kaun rah sakata haai?" 
Job4:3 sun, too ne bahuton ko shaiksha dee haai, aur nirbal logon ko balavant kiya haai." 
Job4:4 girate huon ko too ne apanee baton se sambhal liya, aur ladkhdate huae logon ko too ne balavant kiya." 
Job4:5 parantu ab vipaattai to tujhee par a padee, aur too nirash hua jata haai us ne tujhe chhua aur too ghabara utta." 
Job4:6 kya parameshvar ka bhy hee tera asara naheen? aur kya teree chalachalan jo khree haai teree asha naheen? 
Job4:7 kya tujhe maloom haai ki koi nidash bhee kabhee nash hua haai? ya kaheen sajjan bhee katt dale gaae? 
Job4:8 mere dekhne men to jo pap ko jotate aur dukh bote haai, vahee usako kattte haain." 
Job4:9 ve to ishvar kee shvas se nash hote, aur usake krodha ke jhoke se bhsm hote haain." 
Job4:10 sinh ka garajana aur hinsak sinh ka dahadna band ho ata haai. aur javan sinhon ke dant tode jate haain. 
Job4:11 shaikar n pakar booddha sinh mar jata haai, aur sinhanee ke bachche titar bitar ho jate haain." 
Job4:12 aek bat chupake se mere pas pahunchai gai, aur usakee kuchh bhnak mere kan men padee." 
Job4:13 rat ke svapnon kee chintaon ke beech jab manushy gaharee nidra men rahate haai," 
Job4:14 mujhe aeesee thrathrahatt aur kanpakanpee lagee ki meree sab haaddiyan tak hil utteen. 
Job4:15 tab aek atma mere samhane se hokar chalee aur meree deh ke roaen khde ho gaae. 
Job4:16 vah chupachap tthar gai aur maain usakee akraati ko pahichan n saka. parantu meree ankhon ke samhane koi rup tha paahile sannatta chhaya raha, fir mujhe aek shabd sun pada," 
Job4:17 kya nashaman manushy ishvar se adhaik nyayee hoga? kya manushy apane srajanahar se aadhaik pavitra ho sakata haai? 
Job4:18 dek, vah apane sevakon par bhrosa naheen rakhta, aur apane svargadooton ko moorkh ttharata haai" 
Job4:19 fir jo mittee ke gharon men rahate haai, aur jinakee nev mittee men dalee gai haai, aur jo patange kee nai pis jate haai, unakee kya ganna." 
Job4:20 ve bhor se sanjh tak nash kiae jate haai, ve sada ke liye mitt jate haai, aur koi unaka vichar bhee naheen karata." 
Job4:21 kya unake dere kee doree unake andar hee andar naheen katt jatee? ve bina buaddhi ke hee mar jate haain! 
Job5:1 pukar kar dekh kya koi haai jo tujhe uttar dega? aur paavitraen men se too kis kee or firega? 
Job5:2 kyonaki mooddh to khed karate karate nash ho jata haai, aur bhola jalate jalate mar mittta haai." 
Job5:3 maain ne mooddh ko jad pakadte dekha haai parantu achanak maain ne usake vasasthan ko dhaikkara. 
Job5:4 usake ladkebale uddhar se door haai, aur ve faattk men peese jate haai, aur koi naheen haai jo unhen chhudae." 
Job5:5 usake khet kee upaj bookhe log kha lete haai, varan katteelee bad men se bhee nikal lete haain aur pyasa unake dhan ke liye fanda lagata haai." 
Job5:6 kyonaki vipaattai dhool se utpann naheen hotee, aur n kashtt boomi men se ugata haai" 
Job5:7 parantu jaaise chingariyan upar hee upar ko ud jatee haai,vaaise hee manushy kashtt hee bhogane ke liye utpann hua haai." 
Job5:8 parantu maain to ishvar hee ko khojata rahoonga aur apana mukama parameshvar par chhod doonga. 
Job5:9 vah to aese bade kam karata haai jinakee thah naheen lagatee, aur itane ashcharyakarma karata haai, jo gine naheen jate." 
Job5:10 vahee prathvee ke upar vashara karata, aur kheton par jal barasata haai." 
Job5:11 isee reeti vah namra logon ko unche sthan par bittata haai, aur shaek ka pahirava pahine huae log unche par pahuchakar bachate haain." 
Job5:12 vah to dhootrta logon kee kalpanaaen vyarth kar deta haai, aur unake hathon se kuchh bhee ban naheen padta." 
Job5:13 vah buaddhimanon ko unakee dhootrtata hee men fansata haai aur kuattlai logon kee yuaktai door kee jatee haai. 
Job5:14 un par din ko andhora chha jata haai, aur din dupaharee men ve rat kee nai ttttolate firate haain." 
Job5:15 parantu vah daridraen ko unake vachanarupee talavar se aur balavanon ke hath se bachata haai. 
Job5:16 isaliye kangalon ko asha hotee haai, aur kuattlai manushyon ka munh band ho jata haai." 
Job5:17 dek, kya hee dhany vah manushy, jisako ishvar tadna deta haai isaliye too sarvashaaktaiman kee tadna ko tuchchh mat jana." 
Job5:18 kyonaki vahee ghaayal karata, aur vahee pattee bhee bandhata haai vahee marata haai, aur vahee apane hathon se changa bhee karata haai." 
Job5:19 vah tujhe chh vipaattaiyon se chhudaaega varan sat se bhee teree kuchh haani n hone paaegee. 
Job5:20 akal men vah tujhe mutyu se, aur yuddh men talavar kee dhaar se bacha lega." 
Job5:21 too vachanaroopee kode se bacha rahega aur jab vinash aa, tab bhee tujhe bhy n hoga." 
Job5:22 too ujad aur akal ke dinon men hasamukh rahega, aur tujhe banaaile jantuon se dr n lagega." 
Job5:23 varan maaidan ke patthr bhee tujh se vacha bandho rahenge, aur vanapashu tujh se mel rakhenge." 
Job5:24 aur tujhe nishchay hoga, ki tera dera kushal se haai, aur jab too apane nivas men dekhe tab koi vastu khoi n hogee." 
Job5:25 tujhe yah bhee nishchait hoga, ki mere bahut vansh honge. aur mere santan prathvee kee ghaas ke tuly bahut honge." 
Job5:26 jaaise pooliyon ka ddher samay par khlihan men rakha jata haai, vaaise hee too pooree avastha ka hokar kabra ko pahunchega." 
Job5:27 dek, ham ne khoj khojakar aeesa hee paya haai ise too sun, aur apane labh ke liye dhyan men rakh." 
Job6:1 fir ayyoob ne kaha," 
Job6:2 bhla hota ki mera khed taula jata, aur meree saree vipaattai tula men dharee jatee!" 
Job6:3 kyonaki vah samudra kee baloo se bhee bharee ttharatee isee karan meree baten utavalee se hooi haain. 
Job6:4 kyonaki sarvashaktaiman ke teer mere andar chubhe haain aur unaka vish meree atma men baaitt gaya haai ishvar kee bhyankar bat mere viruddh panti bandho haain. 
Job6:5 jab banaaile gadahe ko ghaas milatee, tab kya vah renkata haai? aur baail chara pakar kya dkarata haai?" 
Job6:6 jo faeeka haai vah kya bina namak khaya jata haai? kya ande kee safaedee men bhee kuchh svad hota haai? 
Job6:7 jin vastuon ko maain choona bhee naheen chahata vahee mano mere liye ghainauna ahar ttharee haain. 
Job6:8 bhla hota ki mujhe munh manga var milata aur jis bat kee maain asha karata hoo vah ishvar mujhe de deta! 
Job6:9 ki ishvar prasann hokar mujhe kuchal dalata, aur hath baddhakar mujhe katt dalata!" 
Job6:10 yahee meree shaantai ka karan varan bharee peeda men bhee maain is karan se uchhl padta kyonaki maain ne us paavitra ke vachanon ka kabhee inkar naheen kiya. 
Job6:11 mujh men bal hee kya haai ki maain asha rakoon? aur mera ant hee kya hoga, ki maain dhaeeraj dharoon?" 
Job6:12 kya meree draddhta patthron kee see haai? kya mera shareer peetal ka haai? 
Job6:13 kya maain niradhaar naheen hoo? kya kam karane kee shaaktai mujh se door naheen ho gai? 
Job6:14 jo padosee par krapa naheen karata vah sarvashaktaiman ka bhy manana chhod deta haai. 
Job6:15 mere bhai nale ke saman vishvasaghaatee ho gaae haai, varan un nalon ke saman jinakee dhaar sookh jatee haai" 
Job6:16 aur ve barafa ke karan kale se ho jate haai, aur un men him chhpai rahata haai." 
Job6:17 parantu jab garamee hone lagatee tab unakee dhaaraaen lop ho jatee haai, aur jab kadee dhoop padtee haai tab ve apanee jagah se ud jate haain" 
Job6:18 ve ghoomate ghoomate sookh jatee, aur sunasan sthan men bahakar nash hotee haain." 
Job6:19 tema ke banajare dekhte rahe aur shaba ke kaafilevalon ne unaka rasta dekha. 
Job6:20 ve laajjait huae kyonaki unhon ne bhrosa rakha tha aur vahan pahuchakar unake munh sookh gaae. 
Job6:21 usee prakar ab tum bhee kuchh n rahe meree vipaattai dekhkar tum dr gaae ho. 
Job6:22 kya maain ne tum se kaha tha, ki mujhe kuchh do? va apanee sampaattai men se mere liye ghoos do?" 
Job6:23 va mujhe satanevale ke hath se bachao? va upadrav karanevalon ke vash se chhuda lo? 
Job6:24 mujhe shaiksha do aur maain chup rahoonga aur mujhe samajhao, ki maain ne kis bat men chook kee haai." 
Job6:25 sachchai ke vachanon men kitana prabhav hota haai, parantu tumhare vivad se kya labh hota haai?" 
Job6:26 kya tum baten pakadne kee kalpana karate ho? nirash jan kee baten to vayu kee see haain. 
Job6:27 tum anathon par chitthee dalate, aur apane mitra ko bechakar labh uttanevale ho." 
Job6:28 isaliye ab krapa karake mujhe dekho nishchay maain tumhare samhane kadapi joott n boloonga. 
Job6:29 fir kuchh anyay n hone paae fir is mukame men mera dharma jyon ka tyon bana haai, maain saty par hoo." 
Job6:30 kya mere vachanon men kuchh kuattlaita haai? kya maain dushttta naheen pahachan sakata? 
Job7:1 kya manushy ko prathvee par kattnai seva karanee naheen padtee? kya usake din majadoor ke se naheen hote? 
Job7:2 jaaisa koi das chhaya kee aabhailasha kare, va majadoor apanee majadooree kee asha rakhe" 
Job7:3 vaaisa hee maain anarth ke maheenon ka svamee banaya gaya hoo, aur mere liye klesh se bhree raten ttharai gai haain." 
Job7:4 jab maain lett jata, tab kahata hoo, maain kab utoonga? aur rat kab beetegee? aur pau fattne tak chhttpattate chhttpattate ukata jata hoo." 
Job7:5 meree deh keedon aur aur mittee ke ddhelon se ddhkee hui haai mera chamada simatt jata, aur fir gal jata haai." 
Job7:6 mere din julahe kee dhadkee se aadhaik fauta se chalanevale haain aur nirasha men beete jate haain. 
Job7:7 yad kar ki mera jeevan vayu hee haai aur maain apanee ankhon se kalyan fir n dekoonga. 
Job7:8 jo mujhe ab dekhta haai use maain fir dikhai n doonga teree ankhen meree or hongee parantu maain n miloonga. 
Job7:9 jaaise badal chhttkar lop ho jata haai, vaaise hee adhaelok men utaranevala fir vahan se naheen lautt sakata" 
Job7:10 vah apane ghar ko fir lautt n aaega, aur n apane sthan men fir milega." 
Job7:11 isaliye maain apana munh band n rakoonga apane man ka khed kholakar kahoonga aur apane jeev kee kaduvahatt ke karan kudkudata rahoonga. 
Job7:12 kya maain samudra hoo, va magaramachchh hoo, ki too mujh par pahara baaittata haai?" 
Job7:13 jab jab maain sochata hoon ki mujhe khatt par shaantai milegee, aur bichhaune par mera khed kuchh halaka hoga" 
Job7:14 tab tab too mujhe svapnon se ghabara deta, aur darshanon se bhyabheet kar deta haai" 
Job7:15 yahan tak ki mera jee faansee ko, aur jeevan se mratyu ko adhaik chahata haai." 
Job7:16 mujhe apane jeevan se gharana atee haai maain sarvada jeevit rahana naheen chahata. mera jeevanakal sans sa haai, isaliye mujhe chhod de." 
Job7:17 manushy kya haai, ki too use mahatv de, aur apana man us par lagaa," 
Job7:18 aur praati bhor ko usakee sudhai le, aur prati kshan use janchata rahe?" 
Job7:19 too kab tak meree or ankh lagaae rahega, aur itanee der ke liye bhee mujhe n chhodega ki maain apana took nigal loon?" 
Job7:20 he manushyon ke takanevale, maain ne pap to kiya hoga, to maain ne tera kya bigada? too ne kyon mujh ko apana nishaana bana liya haai, yahan tak ki maain apane upar apahee bojh hua hoo?" 
Job7:21 aur too kyon mera aparadha kshama naheen karata? aur mera adharma kyon door naheen karata? ab to maain mittee men so jaunga, aur too mujhe yatn se ddoonddhega par mera pata naheen milega." 
Job8:1 tab shoohee biladad ne kaha," 
Job8:2 too kab tak aeesee aeesee baten karata rahega? aur tere munh kee baten kab tak prachand vayu see rahegee? 
Job8:3 kya ishvar anyay karata haai? aur kya sarvashaktaiman dharma ko ulatta karata haai? 
Job8:4 yaadi tere ladkebalon ne usake viruddh pap kiya haai, to us ne unako unake aparadha ka fal bhugataya haai." 
Job8:5 taubhee yadi too ap ishvar ko yatn se ddoonddhta, aur sarvashaaktaiman se gidgidakar binatee karata," 
Job8:6 aur yaadi too nirmal aur dharmee rahata, to nishchay vah tere liye jagata aur teree dhaaarmikata ka nivas fir jyon ka tyon kar deta." 
Job8:7 chahe tera bhag paahile chhotta hee raha ho parantu ant men teree bahut baddhtee hotee. 
Job8:8 agalee peeddhee ke logon se to pooch, aur jo kuchh unake purakhaon ne janch padtal kee haai us par dhyan de." 
Job8:9 kyonaki ham to kal hee ke haai, aur kuchh naheen janate aur prathvee par hamare din chhaya kee nai beetate jate haain." 
Job8:10 kya ve log tujh se shaiksha kee baten n kahenge? kya ve apane man se bat n nikalenge? 
Job8:11 kya kachhar kee ghaas panee bina baddh sakatee haai? kya sarakanda keech bina baddhta haai? 
Job8:12 chahe vah haree ho, aur kattee bhee n gai ho, taubhee vah aur sab bhanti kee ghaas se paahile hee sookh jatee haai." 
Job8:13 ishvar ke sab bisaranevalon kee gaati aeesee hee hotee haai aur bhktaiheen kee asha toott jatee haai. 
Job8:14 usakee ash ka mool katt jata haai aur jisaka vah bhrosa karata haai, vah makadee ka jala ttharata haai." 
Job8:15 chahe vah apane ghar par ttek lagaae parantu vah n ttharega vah use draddhta se thanbhega parantu vah sthiar n rahega. 
Job8:16 vah ghaam pakar hara bhra ho jata haai, aur usakee daaliyan bageeche men charon or faailatee haain." 
Job8:17 usakee jad kankaron ke ddher men lipattee hui rahatee haai, aur vah patthr ke sthan ko dekh leta haai." 
Job8:18 parantu jab vah apane sthan par se nash kiya jaa, tab vah sthan us se yah kahakar munh mod lega ki maain ne use kabhee dekha hee naheen." 
Job8:19 dek, usakee anand bhree chal yahee haai fir usee mittee men se doosare ugenge." 
Job8:20 dek, ishvar n to khre manushy ko nikamma janakar chhod deta haai, aur n burai karanevalon ko sanbhalata haai." 
Job8:21 vah to tujhe hansamukh karega aur tujh se jayajayakar karaaega. 
Job8:22 tere baairee lajja ka vasr paahinenge, aur dushtton ka dera kaheen rahane n paaega." 
Job9:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha," 
Job9:2 maain nishchay janata hoo, ki bat aeesee hee haai parantu manushy ishvar kee draashtti men kyonkar dharmee tthar sakata haai?" 
Job9:3 chahe vah us se mukama ladna bhee chahe taubhee manushy hajar baton men se aek ka bhee uttar n de sakega. 
Job9:4 vah buaddhiman aur aati samarthee haai usake virodha men hatt karake kaun kabhee prabal hua haai? 
Job9:5 vah to parvaton ko achanak hatta deta haai aur unhen pata bhee naheen lagata, vah krodha men akar unhen ulatt pulatt kar deta haai." 
Job9:6 vah prathvee ko hilakar usake sthan se alag karata haai, aur usake khmbhe kanpane lagate haain." 
Job9:7 usakee agyaa bina soorya uday hota hee naheen aur vah taron par muhar lagata haai 
Job9:8 vah akashamandl ko akela hee faailata haai, aur samudra kee unchee unchee laharon par chalata haai" 
Job9:9 vah saptaashair, mragaashaira aur kachapaachiya aur daakkhian ke nakshatraen ka bananevala haai." 
Job9:10 vah to aeese bade karma karata haai, jinakee thah naheen lagatee aur itane ashcharyakarma karata haai, jo gine naheen ja sakate." 
Job9:11 dekho, vah mere samhane se hokar to chalata haai parantu mujhko naheen dikhai padta aur age ko baddh jata haai, parantu mujhe soojh hee naheen padta haai." 
Job9:12 dekho, jab vah chheenane lage, tab usako kaun rokega? kaun us se kah sakata haai ki too yah kya karata haai?" 
Job9:13 ishvar apana krodha ttnda naheen karata. aabhaimanee ke sahayakon ko usake panv tale jhukana padta haai. 
Job9:14 fir maain kya hoo, jo use uttar doo, aur baten chhantt chhanttkar us se vivad karoon?" 
Job9:15 chahe maain nidash bhee hota parantu usako uttar n de sakata maain apane mui se gidgidakar binatee karata. 
Job9:16 chahe mere pukarane se vah uttar bhee deta, taubhee maain is bat kee prateeti n karata, ki vah meree bat sunata haai." 
Job9:17 vah to andhaee chalakar mujhe tod dalata haai, aur bina karan mere chott par chott lagata haai." 
Job9:18 vah mujhe sans bhee lene naheen deta haai, aur mujhe kadvahatt se bhrata haai." 
Job9:19 jo samathrya kee charcha ho, to dekho, vah balavan haai aur yaadi nyay kee charcha ho, to vah kahega mujh se kaun mukama ladega?" 
Job9:20 chahe maain nidash hee kyon n hoo, parantu apane hee munh se doshaee ttharoonga khra hone par bhee vah mujhe kuttlai ttharaaega." 
Job9:21 maain khra to hoo, parantu apana bhed naheen janata apane jeevan se mujhe gharan atee haai." 
Job9:22 bat to aek hee haai, is se maain yah kahata hoo ki ishvar khre aur dushtt donon ko nash karata haai." 
Job9:23 jab log vipaattai se achanak marane lagate haain tab vah nidash logon ke janche jane par hansata haai. 
Job9:24 desh dushtton ke hath men diya gaya haai. vah usake nyayiyon kee ankhon ko moond deta haai isaka karanevala vahee n ho to kaun haai? 
Job9:25 mere din harakare se bhee aadhaik veg se chale jate haain ve bhage jate haain aur unako kalyan kuchh bhee dikhai naheen deta. 
Job9:26 ve veg chal se navon kee nai chale jate haai, va aher par jhpattte huae ukaab kee nai." 
Job9:27 jo maain kahoo, ki vilap karana jool jaunga, aur udasee chhodkar apana man prafaullait kar doonga," 
Job9:28 tab maain apane sab dukhon se drata hoo. maain to janata hoo, ki too mujhe nidash n ttharaaega." 
Job9:29 maain to doshaee ttharoonga fir vyarth kyon paarishram karoon? 
Job9:30 chahe maain him ke jal men snan karoo, aur apane hath khar se nirmal karoo," 
Job9:31 taaibhee too mujhe gadhe men dal hee dega, aur mere vasr bhee mujh se ghainaaenge." 
Job9:32 kyonaki vah mere tuly manushy naheen haai ki maain us se vadavivad kar sakoo, aur ham donon aek doosare se mukama lad saken." 
Job9:33 ham donon ke beech koi bichavai naheen haai, jo ham donnon par apana hath rakhe." 
Job9:34 vah apana sontta mujh par se door kare aur usakee bhy denevalee bat mujhe n ghabaraae. 
Job9:35 tab maain us se nidr hokar kuchh kah sakoonga, kyonki maain apanee draashtti men aeesa naheen hoo." 
Job10:1 mera praan jeeavit rahane se ukatata haai maain svatantrata poorvak kudkudaunga aur maain apane man kee kadvahatt ke mare baten karoonga. 
Job10:2 maai ishvar se kahoonga, mujhe doshaee n tthara mujhe bata de, ki too kis karan moojh se mukama ladta haai?" 
Job10:3 kya tujhe andhor karana, aur dushtton kee yuaktai ko sufal karake apane hathon ke banaae huae ko nikamma janana bhla lagata haai?" 
Job10:4 kya teree deshdhaariyon kee see bankhen haai? aur kya tera dekhna manushy ka sa haai? 
Job10:5 kya tere din manushy ke din ke saman haai, va tere varsha purush ke samayon ke tuly haai," 
Job10:6 ki too mera adharma ddoonddhta, aur mera pap poochhta haai?" 
Job10:7 tujhe to maloom hee haai, ki maain dushtt naheen hoo, aur tere hath se koi chhudanevala naheen!" 
Job10:8 too ne apane hathon se mujhe tteek racha haai aur jodkar banaya haai taubhee mujhe nash kiae dalata haai. 
Job10:9 smaran kar, ki too ne mujh ko goondhaee hui mittee kee nai banaya, kya too mujhe fir dhool men milaaega?" 
Job10:10 kya too ne mujhe doodha kee nai undelakar, aur dahee ke saman jamakar naheen banaya?" 
Job10:11 fir too ne mujh par chamada aur mans chaddhaya aur haaddiyan aur nasen goonthkar mujhe banaya haai. 
Job10:12 too ne mujhe jeevan diya, aur mujh par karuna kee haai aur teree chaukasee se mere praan kee raksha hai haai." 
Job10:13 taubhee too ne aeesee baton ko apane man men chhpai rakha maain to jan gaya, ki too ne aeesa hee karane ko ttana tha." 
Job10:14 jo maain pap karoo, to too usaka lekha lega aur adharma karane par mujhe nidash n ttharaaega." 
Job10:15 jo maain dushttta karoon to mujh par hay! aur jo maain dhama banoon taubhee maain sir n uttaunga, kyonaki maain apaman se bhra hua hoon aur apane dukh par dhyan rakhta hoo." 
Job10:16 aur chahe sir uttaun taubhee too sinh kee nai mera aher karata haai, aur fir mere viruddh ashcharyakarma karata haai." 
Job10:17 too mere samhane apane naye naye sakshaee le ata haai, aur mujh par apana krodha baddhata haai aur mujh par sena par sena chaddhai karatee haai." 
Job10:18 too ne mujhe garbh se kyon nikala? naheen to maain vaheen praan chhodta, aur koi mujhe dekhne bhee n pata." 
Job10:19 mera hona n hone ke saman hota, aur pett hee se kabra ko pahunchaya jata." 
Job10:20 kya mere din thode naheen? mujhe chhod de, aur meree or se munh faer le, ki mera man thoda shaant ho jaae" 
Job10:21 is se paahile ki maain vahan jau, jahan se fir n lautoonga, arthata aandhiayare aur dhaer andhakar ke desh me, jahan andhakar hee andhakar haai" 
Job10:22 aur mratyu ke andhakar ka desh jis men sab kuchh gadbad haai aur jahan prakash bhee aeesa haai jaaisa andhakara. 
Job11:1 tab namatee sopar ne kaha 
Job11:2 bahut see baten jo kahee gai haai, kya unaka uttar dena n chaahiye? kya bakavadee manushy dhama ttharaya jaae?" 
Job11:3 kya tere bade bol ke karan log chup rahen? aur jab too ttttha karata haai, to kya koi tujhe laajjait n kare?" 
Job11:4 too to yah kahata haai ki mera siddhant shuuddh haai aur maain ishvar kee drashtti men pavitra hoo. 
Job11:5 parantu bhla ho, ki ishvar svayan baten kare, aur tere viruddh munh khole," 
Job11:6 aur tujh par buaddhi kee gupt baten pragatt kare, ki unaka marma teree buddhi se baddhkar haai. isaaliye jan le, ki ishvar tere adharma men se bahut kuchh bool jata haai." 
Job11:7 kya too ishvar ka gooddh bhed pa sakata haai? aur kya too sarvashaktaiman ka marma pooree reeti se chanch sakata haai? 
Job11:8 vah akash sa uncha haai too kya kar sakata haai? vah adhaelok se gaahira haai, too kahan samajh sakata haai?" 
Job11:9 usakee map prathvee se bhee lambee haai aur samudra se chaudee haai. 
Job11:10 jab ishvar beech se gujarakar band kar de aur adalat men bulaa, to kaun usako rok sakata haai." 
Job11:11 kyonaki vah pakhndee manushyon ka bhed janata haai, aur anarth kam ko bina soch vichar kiae bhee jan leta haai." 
Job11:12 panantu manushy choochha aur nirbauddhi hota haai kyonki manushy janm hee se jangalee gadahe ke bachche ke saman hota haai. 
Job11:13 yaadi too apana man shuuddh kare, aur ishvar kee or apane hath faailaa," 
Job11:14 aur jo koi anarth kam tujh se hota ho use door kare, aur apane deron men koi kuttlaita n rahane de," 
Job11:15 tab to too nishchay apana munh nishkalank dikha sakega aur too sthir hokar kabhee n drega. 
Job11:16 tab too apana dukh bool jaaega, too use us panee ke saman smaran karega jo bah gaya ho." 
Job11:17 aur tera jeevan dopahar se bhee aadhaik prakashaman hoga aur chahe andhora bhee ho taubhee vah bhor sa ho jaaega. 
Job11:18 aur tujhe asha hogee, is karan too nirbhy rahega aur apane charon or dekh dekhkar too nirbhy vishraam kar sakega." 
Job11:19 aur jab too lettega, tab koi tujhe draaega naheen aur bahutere tujhe prasann karate ka yatn karenge." 
Job11:20 parantu dushtt logon kee ankhen rah jaaengee, aur unhen koi sharun sthan n milega aur unakee asha yahee hogee ki praan nikal jaae." 
Job12:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha 
Job12:2 nisandeh manushy to tum hee ho aur jab tum maroge tab buaddhi bhee jatee rahegee. 
Job12:3 parantu tumharee nai mujh men bhee samajh haai, maain tum logon se kuchh teecha naheen hoo kaun aeesa haai jo aeesee baten n janata ho?" 
Job12:4 maain ishvar se praarthna karata tha, aur vah meree sun diya karata tha parantu ab mere padosee mujh par hansate haain jo dhama aur khra manushy haai, vah hansee ka karan ho gaya haai." 
Job12:5 dukhee log to suakhaiyon kee samajh men tuchchh jane jate haain aur jinake panv fisala chahate haain unaka apaman avashy hee hota haai. 
Job12:6 dakuon ke dere kushal kshom se rahate haai, aur jo ishvar ko krodha dilate haai, vah bahut hee nidr rahate haain aur unake hath men ishvar bahut deta haai." 
Job12:7 pashuuon se to poochh aur ve tujhe dikhaaenge aur akash ke pakshiayon se, aur ve tujhe bata denge." 
Job12:8 prathvee par dhyan de, tab us se tujhe shaiksha milegee or samudra kee machhaliyan bhee tujh se varnn karengee." 
Job12:9 kaun in baton ko naheen janata, ki yahova hee ne apane hath se is sansar ko banaya haai." 
Job12:10 usake hath men ek ek jeevadhaaree ka praa, aur ek ek dehadhaaree manushy kee atma bhee rahatee haai." 
Job12:11 jaaise jeebh se bhojan chakha jata haai, kya vaaise hee kan se vachan naheen parakhe jate?" 
Job12:12 booddhan men buddhi pai jatee haai, aur lambee ayuvalon men samajh hotee to haai." 
Job12:13 ishvar men pooree buaddhi aur parakram paae jate haain yuktai aur samajh usee men haain. 
Job12:14 dekho, jisako vah ddha de, vah fir banaya naheen jata jis manushy ko vah band kare, vah fir khola naheen jata." 
Job12:15 dekho, jab vah vashara ko rok rakhta haai to jal sookh jata haai fir jab vah jal chhod deta haai tab prathvee ulatt jatee haai." 
Job12:16 us men samathrya aur khree buaddhi pai jatee haai dhaekh denevala aur dhaekha khanevala donon usee ke haain. 
Job12:17 vah mantraiyon ko loottkar bandhauai men le jata, aur nyaayiyon ko moorkh bana deta haai." 
Job12:18 vah rajaon ka aadhaikar tod deta haai aur unakee kamar par bandhan bandhavata haai. 
Job12:19 vah yajakon ko loottkar bandhauai men le jata aur samaathairyon ko ulatt deta haai. 
Job12:20 vah vishvasayoegy purushaen se bolane kee shaaktai aur puraaniyon se vivek kee shaaktai har leta haai. 
Job12:21 vah haakimon ko apaman se ladata, aur balavanon ke hath ddheele kar deta haai." 
Job12:22 vah aandhiayare kee gaharee baten pragatt karata, aur mratyu kee chhaya ko bhee prakash men le ata haai." 
Job12:23 vah jaatiyon ko baddhata, aur unako nash karata haai vah unako faailata, aur bandhauai men le jata haai." 
Job12:24 vah prathvee ke mukhy logon kee buaddhi uda deta, aur unako nirjan sthanon men jahan rasta naheen haai, bhttkata haai." 
Job12:25 ve bin ujiyale ke andhore men ttttolate firate haain aur vah unhen aeesa bana deta haai ki ve matavale kee nai dgamagate huae chalate haain. 
Job13:1 suno, maain yah sab kuchh apanee ankh se dekh chuka, aur apane kan se sun chuka, aur samajh bhee chuka hoo." 
Job13:2 jo kuchh tum janate ho vah maain bhee janata hoo maain tum logon se kuchh kam naheen hoo. 
Job13:3 maain to sarvashaktaiman se baten karoonga, aur meree abhailasha ishvar se vadaavivad karane kee haai." 
Job13:4 parantu tum log joottee bat ke gaddhnevale ho tum sabake sab nikamme vaaidh ho. 
Job13:5 bhla hota, ki tum bilakul chup rahate, aur is se tum buddhiman ttharate." 
Job13:6 mera vivad suno, aur meree bahas kee baton par kan lagao." 
Job13:7 kya tum ishvar ke nimitt tteddhee baten kahoge, aur usake paksha men kapatt se bologe?" 
Job13:8 kya tum usaka pakshapat karoge? aur ishvar ke liye mukama chalaoge. 
Job13:9 kya yah bhla hoga, ki vah tum ko janche? kya jaaisa koi manushy ko dhaekha de, vaaisa hee tum kya usako bhee dhokha doge?" 
Job13:10 jo tum chhpaikar pakshapat karo, to vah nishchay tum ko danttega." 
Job13:11 kya tum usake mahatmy se bhy n khaoge? kya usaka dr tumhare man men n samaaega? 
Job13:12 tumhare smaranyogy neeativachan rakh ke saman haain tumhare kott mittee hee ke tthare haain 
Job13:13 mujh se bat karana chhodo, ki maain bhee kuchh kahane paun fir mujh par jo chahe vah a pade." 
Job13:14 maain kyon apana mans apane danton se chabaun? aur kyon apana praan hathelee par rakoon? 
Job13:15 vah mujhe ghaat karega, mujhe kuchh asha naheen taubhee maain apanee chal chalan ka paksha loonga." 
Job13:16 aur yah bhee mere bachav ka karan hoga, ki bhktaiheen jan usake samhane naheen ja sakata." 
Job13:17 chitt lagakar meree bat suno, aur meree binatee tumhare kan men pade." 
Job13:18 dekho, maain ne apane bahas kee pooree taaiyaree kee haai mujhe nishchay haai ki maain nidash ttharoonga." 
Job13:19 kaun haai jo mujh se mukama lad sakega? aeesa koi paya jaa, to maain chup hokar praan chhooonga." 
Job13:20 do hee kam mujh se n kar, tab maain tujh se naheen chhpaioonga" 
Job13:21 apanee tadna mujh se door kar le, aur apane bhy se mujhe bhyabheet n kara." 
Job13:22 tab tere bulane par maain boloonga naheen to maain prashn karoonga, aur too mujhe uttar de." 
Job13:23 mujh se kitane adharma ke kam aur pap huae haain? mere aparadha aur pap mujhe jata de. 
Job13:24 too kis karan apana munh faer leta haai, aur mujhe apana shatra ginata haai?" 
Job13:25 kya too udte huae patte ko bhee kanpaaega? aur sookhe dnttl ke peechhe padega? 
Job13:26 too mere liye kaattnai dukhon kee agyaa deta haai, aur meree javanee ke adharma ka fal mujhe bhugata deta haai." 
Job13:27 aur mere panvon ko katt men ttonkata, aur meree saree chal chalan dekhta rahata haai aur mere panvon kee charon or seema bandha leta haai." 
Job13:28 aur maain sadee galee vastu ke tuly hoon jo nash ho jatee haai, aur keeda khaae kapade ke tuly hoo." 
Job14:1 manushy jo sree se utmann hota haai, vah thede dinon ka aur dukh se bhra rahata haai." 
Job14:2 vah fool kee nai khailata, fir toda jata he vah chhaya kee reeti par ddhl jata, aur kaheen ttharata naheen." 
Job14:3 fir kya too aeese par drashtti lagata haai? kya too mujhe apane sath kachaharee men ghaseettta haai? 
Job14:4 ashuuddh vastu se shuuddh vastu ko kaun nikal sakata haai? koi naheen. 
Job14:5 manushy ke din niyukt kiae gaae haai, aur usake maheenon kee ginatee tere pas likhee haai, aur too ne usake liye aeesa sivana bandha haai jise vah par naheen kar sakata," 
Job14:6 is karan us se apana munh faer le, ki vah aram kare, jab tak ki vah majadoor kee nai apana din poora n kar le." 
Job14:7 vuksha kee to asha rahatee haai, ki chahe vah katt dala bhee jaa, taubhee fir panapega aur us se narma narma daaliyan nikalatee hee rahengee." 
Job14:8 chahe usakee jad boomi men puranee bhee ho jaa, aur usaka toontt mittee men sookh bhee jaa," 
Job14:9 taubhee vashara kee gandha pakar vah fir panapega, aur paudho kee nai us se shaakhaaen foottengee." 
Job14:10 parantu purush mar jata, aur pada rahata haai jab usaka praan choott gaya, tab vah kahan raha?" 
Job14:11 jaaise neel nadee ka jal ghatt jata haai, aur jaaise mahanad ka jal sookhte sookhte sookh jata haai," 
Job14:12 vaaise hee manushy lett jata aur fir naheen uttta jab tak akash bana rahega tab tak vah n jagega, aur n usakee neend toottegee." 
Job14:13 bhla hota ki too mujhe adhaelok men chhpai leta, aur jab tak tera kop ttnddha n ho jaae tab tak mujhe chhpaiaae rakhta, aur mere liye samay niyukt karake fir meree suadhai leta." 
Job14:14 yaadi manushy mar jaae to kya vah fir jeevit hoga? jab tak mera choottkara n hota tab tak maain apanee kaattnai seva ke sare din asha lagaae rahata. 
Job14:15 too mujhe bulata, aur maain bolata tujhe apane hath ke banaae huae kam kee aabhailasha hotee." 
Job14:16 parantu ab too mere pag pag ko ginata haai, kya too mere pap kee tak men laga naheen rahata?" 
Job14:17 mere aparadha chhap lagee hui thailee men haai, aur too ne mere adharma ko see rakha haai." 
Job14:18 aur nishchay pahad bhee girate girate nash ho jata haai, aur chattan apane sthan se hatt jatee haai" 
Job14:19 aur patthr jal se ghais jate haai, aur boomi kee dhooli usakee baddh se bahai jatee haai usee prakar too manushy kee asha ko mitta deta haai." 
Job14:20 too sada us par prabal hota, aur vah jata rahata haai too usaka chihara bigadkar use nikal deta haai." 
Job14:21 usake putraen kee badai hotee haai, aur yah use naheen soojhta aur unakee ghattee hotee haai, parantu vah unaka hal naheen janata." 
Job14:22 keval apane hee karan usakee deee ko dukh hota haai aur apane hee karan usaka praan andar hee andar shaeakit rahata haai. 
Job15:1 tab temanee aeleepaj ne kaha," 
Job15:2 kya buddhiman ko uchit haai ki agyaanata ke sath uttar de, va upane antakaran ko poorabee pavan se bhre?" 
Job15:3 kya vah nishfal vachanon se, va vyarth baton se vadavivad kare?" 
Job15:4 varan too bhy manana chhod deta, aur ishvar ka dhyan karana auron se chhudata haai." 
Job15:5 too apane munh se apana adharma pragatt karata haai, aur dhootrta logon ke bolane kee reeati par bolata haai." 
Job15:6 maain to naheen parantu tera munh hee tujhe doshaee ttharata haai aur tere hee vachan tere viruddh sakshaee dete haain. 
Job15:7 kya pahila matushy too hee utpann hua? kya teree utpattai pahadon se bhee paahile hui? 
Job15:8 kya too ishvar kee sabha men baaitta sunata tha? kya buddhi ka tteeka too hee ne le rakha haai? 
Job15:9 too aeesa kya janata haai jise ham naheen janate? tujh men aeesee kaun see samajh haai jo ham men naheen? 
Job15:10 ham logon men to pakke balavale aur aati puraaniye manushy haai, jo tere pita se bhee bahut ayu ke haain." 
Job15:11 ishvar kee shaantaidayak bate, aur jo vachan tere liye komal haai, kya ye teree drashtti men tuchchh haain?" 
Job15:12 tera man kyon tujhe kheench le jata haai? aur too ankh se kyon saain karata haai? 
Job15:13 too bhee apanee atma ishvar ke viruddh karata haai, aur apane munh se vyarth baten nikalane deta haai." 
Job15:14 manushy haai kya ki vah nishkalank ho? aur jo sree se utpann hua vah haai kya ki nidash ho sake? 
Job15:15 dek, vah apane pavitraen par bhee vishvas naheen karata, aur svarga bhee usakee draashtti men nirmal naheen haai." 
Job15:16 fir manushy adhaik ghainauna aur maleen haai jo kuattlaita ko panee kee nai peeta haai. 
Job15:17 maain tujhe samajha doonga, isaaliye meree sun le, jo maain ne dekha haai, usee ka varnn maain karata hoo." 
Job15:18 ve hee baten jo buddhimanon ne apane purakhaon se sunakar bina chhpaiaae bataya haai. 
Job15:19 keval unheen ko desh diya gaya tha, aur unake madhy men koi videshaee ata jata naheen tha." 
Job15:20 dushtt jan jeevan bhr peeda se tadpata haai, aur balatkaree ke vashan kee ginatee ttharai hui haai." 
Job15:21 usake kan men dravana shabd goonjata rahata haai, kushal ke samay bhee nashak us par a padta haai." 
Job15:22 use andhiyare men se fir nikalane kee kuchh asha naheen hotee, aur talavar usakee ghaat men rahatee haai." 
Job15:23 vah rottee ke liye mara mara firata haai, ki kahan milegee. use nishchay rahata haai, ki andhakar ka din mere pas hee haai." 
Job15:24 sankatt aur durghattna se asako dr lagata rahata haai, aeese raja kee nai jo yuddh ke liye taaiyar ho, ve us par prabal hote haain." 
Job15:25 us ne to ishvar ke viruddh hath baddhaya haai, aur sarvashaaktaiman ke viruddh vah tal ttonkata haai," 
Job15:26 aur sir uttakar aur apanee mottee mottee ddhalen dikhata hua ghamand se us par dhaava karata haai 
Job15:27 isaliye ki usake munh par chikanai chha gai haai, aur usakee kamar men chaba jamee haai." 
Job15:28 aur vah ujade huae nagaron men bas gaya haai, aur jo ghar rahane yogy nahee, aur khndhar hone ko chhode gaae haai, un men bas gaya haai." 
Job15:29 vah dhanee n rahega, aur n usakee sampattai banee rahegee, aur aeese logon ke khet kee upaj boomi kee or n bhukane paaegee." 
Job15:30 vah aandhiayare se kabhee n nikalega, aur usakee daaliyan ag kee lapatt se jhulas jaaengee, aur ishvar ke munh kee shvas se vah ud jaaega." 
Job15:31 vah apane ko dhaekha dekar vyarth baton ka bhrosa n kare, kyonaki usaka badala dhaekha hee hoga." 
Job15:32 vah usake niyat din se pahile poora ho jaaega usakee daliyan haree n rahengee. 
Job15:33 dakh kee nai usake kachche fal jhd jaaenge, aur usake fool jalapai ke vraksha ke se girenge." 
Job15:34 kyonaki bhktaiheen ke paarivar se kuchh ban n padega, aur jo ghoos lete haai, unake tamboo ag se jal jaaenge." 
Job15:35 unake upadrav ka pett rahata, aur anarth utpann hota haai aur ve apane antakaran men chhl kee baten gaddhte haain." 
Job16:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha," 
Job16:2 aeesee bahut see baten maain sun chuka hoo, tum sab ke sab nikamme shaantaidata ho." 
Job16:3 kya vyarth baton ka ant kabhee hoga? too kaun see bat se jhdikakar uttar deta. 
Job16:4 jo tumharee dasha meree see hotee, to maain bhee tumharee see baten kar sakata maain bhee tumhare viruddh baten jod sakata, aur tumhare viruddh sir hila sakata." 
Job16:5 varan maain apane vachanon se tum ko hiyav dilata, aur baton se shaantai dekar tumhara shaek ghatta deta." 
Job16:6 chahe maain boloon taubhee mera shaek n ghattega, chahe maain chup rahoo, taubhee mera dukh kuchh kam n hoga." 
Job16:7 parantu ab us ne pujhe ukata diya haai us ne mere sare parivar ko ujad dala haai. 
Job16:8 aur us ne jo mere shareer ko sukha dala haai, vah mere viruddh sakshaee tthara haai, aur mera dubalapan mere viruddh khda hokar mere samhane sakshaee deta haai." 
Job16:9 us ne krodha men akar mujh ko faada aur mere peechhe pada haai vah mere viruddh dant peesata aur mera vaairee mujh ko ankhen dikhata haai. 
Job16:10 ab log mujh par munh pasarate haai, aur meree namadharai karake mere gal par thpeda marate, aur mere viruddh bheed lagate haain." 
Job16:11 ishvar ne mujhe kuttlaien ke vash men kar diya, aur dushtt logon ke hath men faenk diya haai." 
Job16:12 maain sukh se rahata tha, aur us ne mujhe choor choor kar dala us ne meree gardan pakadkar mujhe ttukade ttukade kar diya fir us ne pujhe apana nishaana banakar khda kiya haai." 
Job16:13 usake teer mere charon or ud rahe haai, vah nirday hokar mere gudan ko bedhata haai, aur mera mitt boomi par bahata haai." 
Job16:14 vah shoor kee nai mujh par dhaava karake mujhe chott par chott pahunchakar ghaayal karata haai. 
Job16:15 maain ne apanee khal par ttatt ko see liya haai, aur apana seeng mittee men maaila kar diya haai." 
Job16:16 rote rote mera munh sooj gaya haai, aur meree ankhon par ghaer andhakar chha gaya haai" 
Job16:17 taubhee mujh se koi upadrav naheen hua haai, aur meree praarthna pavitra haai." 
Job16:18 he prathvee, too mere lohoo ko n ddhanpana, aur meree dohai kaheen n ruke." 
Job16:19 ab bhee svarga men mera sakshaee haai, aur mera gavah upar haai." 
Job16:20 mere mitra mujh se gharana karate haai, parantu maain ishvar ke samhane ansoo bahata hoo," 
Job16:21 ki koi ishvar ke viruddh sajjan ka, aur adamee ka mukama usake padosee ke viruddh lade." 
Job16:22 kyonaki thode hee vashan ke beetane par maain us marga se chala jaunga, jis se maain fir vapis n lautoonga." 
Job17:1 mera praan nash hua chahata haai, mere din poore ho chuke haain mere liye kabra taaiyar haai." 
Job17:2 nishchay jo mere sang haain vah ttttha karanevale haai, aur unaka jhgada ragada mujhe lagatar dikhai deta haai." 
Job17:3 jamanat de apane aur mere beech men too hee jamin ho kaun haai jo mere hath par hath mare? 
Job17:4 too ne inaka man samajhne se roka haai, is karan too inako prabal n karega." 
Job17:5 jo apane mitraen ko chugalee khakar lootta deta, usake ladkon kee ankhen rah jaaengee." 
Job17:6 us ne aeesa kiya ki sab log meree upama dete haain aur log mere munh par tookate haain. 
Job17:7 khed ke mare meree ankhon men ghaunghalapan chha gaya haai, aur mere sab ang chhaya kee nai ho gaae haain." 
Job17:8 ise dekhkar seedho log chaakit hote haai, aur jo nidash haai, vah bhktaiheen ke viruddh ubhrate haain." 
Job17:9 taubhee dhama log apana marga pakade rahenge, aur shuuddh kam karanevale samathrya par samathrya pate jaaenge." 
Job17:10 tum sab ke sab mere pas ao to ao, parantu mujhe tum logon men aek bhee buaddhiman n milega." 
Job17:11 mere din to beet chuke, aur meree manasaaen mitt gai, aur jo mere man men tha, vah nash hua haai." 
Job17:12 ve rat ko din ttharate ve kahate haai, andhiayare ke nikatt ujiyala haai." 
Job17:13 yaadi meree ash yah ho ki adhaelok mera dhaam hoga, yadi maain ne aandhiayare men apana bichhauna bichha liya haai," 
Job17:14 yaadi maain ne sadahatt se kaha ki too mera pita haai, aur keede se, ki too meree ma, aur meree baahin haai," 
Job17:15 to meree asha kahan rahee? aur meree asha kis ke dekhne men aaegee? 
Job17:16 vah to adhaelok men utar jaaegee, aur us samet mujhe bhee mittee men vishraam milega." 
Job18:1 tab shoohee bildad ne kaha," 
Job18:2 tum kab tak fande laga lagakar vachan pakadte rahoge? chitt lagao, tab ham bolenge." 
Job18:3 ham log tumharee drashtti men kyon pashu ke tuly samajhe jate, aur ashuuddh tthare haain." 
Job18:4 he apane ko krodha men faadnevale kya tere nimitt prathvee ujad jaaegee, aur chattan apane sthan se hatt jaaegee?" 
Job18:5 taubhee dushtton ka deepak bujh jaaega, aur usakee ag kee lau n chamakegee." 
Job18:6 usake dere men ka ujiyala andhora ho jaega, aur usake upar ka diya bujh jaega." 
Job18:7 usake bade bade faal chhotte ho jaenge aur vah apanee hee yuktai ke dara girega. 
Job18:8 vah apana hee panv jal men fansaaega, vah fandon par chalata haai." 
Job18:9 usakee edee fande men fans jaegee, aur vah jal men pakada jaega." 
Job18:10 fande kee raassaiyan usake liye boomi me, aur jal raste men chhpai diya gaya haai." 
Job18:11 charon or se dravanee vastuaen use draaengee aur usake peechhe padkar usako bhgaaengee. 
Job18:12 usaka bal dukh se ghatt jaega, aur vipaattai usake pas hee taaiyar rahegee." 
Job18:13 vah usake ang ko kha jaaegee, varan kal ka pahilautta usake angon ko kha lega." 
Job18:14 apane jis dere ka bhrosa vah karata haai, us se vah chheen liya jaaega aur vah bhyankarata ke raja ke pas pahunchaya jaaega." 
Job18:15 jo usake yahan ka naheen haai vah usake dere men vas karega, aur usake ghar par gandhak chhtairai jaaegee." 
Job18:16 usakee jad to sookh jaegee, aur daliyan katt jaengee." 
Job18:17 prathvee par se usaka smaran mitt jaaega, aur bajaar men usaka nam kabhee n sun padega." 
Job18:18 vah ujiyale se andhiayare men ddhkel diya jaaega, aur jagat men se bhee bhgaya jaaega." 
Job18:19 usake kuttumbaiyon men usake koi putrapautra n rahega, aur jahan vah rahata tha, vahan koi bacha n rahega." 
Job18:20 usaka din dekhkar poorabee log chaakit honge, aur pashchaim ke nivaasiyon ke roen khde ho jaenge." 
Job18:21 nisandeh kuattlai logon ke nivas aeese ho jate haai, aur jisako ishvar ka gyaan naheen rahata usaka sthan aeesa hee ho jata haai." 
Job19:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha," 
Job19:2 tum kab tak mere praan ko dukh dete rahoge aur baton se mujhe choor choor karoge? 
Job19:3 in dason bar tum log meree ninda hee karate rahe, tumhen lajja naheen atee, ki tum mere sath kattorata ka baratav karate ho?" 
Job19:4 man liya ki mujh se bool hui, taubhee vah bool to mere hee sir par rahegee." 
Job19:5 yaadi tum sachamuch mere viruddh apanee badai karate ho aur praman dekar meree tinda karate ho," 
Job19:6 to yah jan lo ki ishvar ne mujhe gira diya haai, aur mujhe apane jal men fansa liya haai." 
Job19:7 dekho, maain upadrav! upadrav! yon chillata rahata hoo, parantu koi naheen sunata maain sahayata ke liye dohai deta rahata hoo, parantu koi nyay naheen karata." 
Job19:8 us ne mere marga ko aeesa roondha haai ki maain age chal naheen sakata, aur meree dgaren andhoree kar dee haain." 
Job19:9 mera vibhv us ne har liya haai, aur mere sir par se mukutt utar diya haai." 
Job19:10 us ne charon or se mujhe tod diya, bas maain jata raha, aur mera asara us ne vraksha kee nai ukhad dala haai." 
Job19:11 us ne mujh par apana krodha bhdkaya haai aur apane shatrauon men mujhe ginata haai.
