Job19:12 usake dal ikatthe hokar mere viruddh morcha bandhate haai, aur mere dere ke charon or chhavanee dalate haain." 
Job19:13 us ne mere bhaiyon ko mujh se door kiya haai, aur jo meree jan pahachan ke the, ve bilakul anajan ho gaae haain." 
Job19:14 mere kuttunbee mujhe chhod gaae haai, aur jo mujhe janate the vah mujhe bool gaae haain." 
Job19:15 jo mere ghar men raha karate the, ve, varan meree daasiyan bhee mujhe anajana ginane lageen haain unakee draashtti men maain paradeshaee ho gaya hoo." 
Job19:16 jab maain apane das ko bulata hoo, tab vah naheen bolata mujhe us se gidgidana padta haai." 
Job19:17 meree sans meree sree ko aur meree gandha mere bhaiyon kee drashtti men ghainaunee lagatee haai. 
Job19:18 ladke bhee mujhe tuchchh janate haain aur jab maain uttne lagata, tab ve mere viruddh bolate haain." 
Job19:19 mere sab param mitra mujh se desh rakhte haai, aur jin se maain ne praem kiya so palattkar mere virodhaee ho gaae haain." 
Job19:20 meree khal aur mans meree haddiyon se satt gaae haai, aur maain bal bal bach gaya hoon." 
Job19:21 he mere mitrae! mujh par daya karo, daya, kyonki ishvar ne mujhe mara haai." 
Job19:22 tum ishvar kee nai kyon mere peechhe pade ho? aur mere mans se kyon trapt naheen hue? 
Job19:23 bhla hota, ki meree baten likhee jateen bhla hota, ki ve pustak men likhee jatee," 
Job19:24 aur lohe kee ttankee aur shaeesho se ve sada ke liye chattan par khodee jateen. 
Job19:25 mujhe to nishchay haai, ki mera chhudanevala jeevit haai, aur vah ant men prathvee par khda hoga." 
Job19:26 aur apanee khal ke is prakar nash ho jane ke bad bhee, maain shareer men hokar ishvar ka darshan paunga." 
Job19:27 usaka darshan maain ap apanee ankhon se apane liye karoonga, aur n koi doosara. yadhypi mera day andar hee andar choor choor bhee ho jaa," 
Job19:28 taubhee mujh men to dharma ka mool paya jata haai! aur tum jo kahate ho ham isako kyonkar sataaen! 
Job19:29 to tum talavar se dro, kyonki jalajalahatt se talavar ka dand milata haai, jis se tum jan lo ki nyay hota haai." 
Job20:1 tab namatee sopar ne kaha," 
Job20:2 mera jee chahata haai ki uttar doo, aur isaaliye bolane men fauta karata hoo." 
Job20:3 maain ne aeesee chitaunee sunee jis se meree ninda hui, aur meree atma apanee samajh ke anusar tujhe uttar detee haai." 
Job20:4 kya too yah niyam naheen janata jo praacheen aur us samay ka haai, jab manushy prathvee par basaya gaya," 
Job20:5 ki dushtton ka talee bajana jaldee band ho jata aur bhaktaiheenon ka anand pal bhr ka hota haai? 
Job20:6 chahe aeese manushy ka mahatmy akash tak pahunch jaa, aur usaka sir badalon tak pahunche," 
Job20:7 taubhee vah apanee vishtta kee nai sada ke liye nash ho jaaega aur jo usako dekhte the ve poochhenge ki vah kahan raha? 
Job20:8 vah svapn kee nai lop ho jaaega aur kisee ko fir n milega rat men dekhe huae roop kee nai vah rahane n paaega. 
Job20:9 jis ne usako dekha ho fir use n dekhega, aur apane sthan par usaka kuchh pata n rahega." 
Job20:10 usake ladkebale kangalon se bhee binatee karenge, aur vah apana chheena hua mal faer dega." 
Job20:11 usakee haaddiyon men javanee ka bal bhra hua haai parantu vah usee ke sath mittee men mil jaega. 
Job20:12 chahe burai usako meettee lage, aur vah use apanee jeebh ke neeche chhpai rakhe," 
Job20:13 aur vah use bacha rakhe aur n chhode, varan use apane taloo ke beech daba rakhe," 
Job20:14 taubhee usaka bhojan usake pett men palattega, vah usake andar nag ka sa vish ban jaaega." 
Job20:15 us ne jo dhan nigal liya haai use vah fir ugal dega ishvar use usake pett men se nikal dega. 
Job20:16 vah nagon ka vish choos lega, vah karaait ke dsane se mar jaaega." 
Job20:17 vah naadiyon arthata madha aur dahee kee naadiyon ko dekhne n paaega. 
Job20:18 jisake liye us ne paarishram kiya, usako use lautta dena padega, aur vah use nigalane n paaega usakee mol lee hui vastuon se jitana anand hona chaahiye, utana to use n milega." 
Job20:19 kyonaki us ne kangalon ko peesakar chhod diya, us ne ghar ko chheen liya, usako vah baddhane n paaega." 
Job20:20 lalasa ke mare usako kabhee shaantai naheen milatee thee, isaaliye vah apanee koi manabhavanee vastu bacha n sakega." 
Job20:21 koi vastu usaka kaur bina huae n bachatee thee isaliye usaka kushal bana n rahega 
Job20:22 pooree sampaattai rahate bhee vah saketee men padega tab sab dukhaiyon ke hath us par uttenge. 
Job20:23 aeesa hoga, ki usaka pett bhrane ke liye ishvar apana krodha us par bhdkaaega, aur rottee khane ke samay vah us par padega." 
Job20:24 vah lohe ke hathaiyar se bhagega, aur peetal ke dhanush se mara jaaega." 
Job20:25 vah us teer ko kheenchakar apane pett se nikalega, usakee chamakeelee nonk usake pitte se hokar nikalegee, bhy us men samaaega." 
Job20:26 usake gade huae dhan par ghaer andhakar chha jaega. vah aeesee ag se bhsm hoga, jo manushy kee foonkee hui n ho aur usee se usake dere men jo bacha ho vah bhee bhsm ho jaega." 
Job20:27 akash usaka athrma pragatt karega, aur prathvee usake viruddh khdee hogee." 
Job20:28 usake ghar kee baddhtee jatee rahegee, vah usake krodha ke din bah jaegee." 
Job20:29 parameshvar kee or se dushtt manushy ka ansha, aur usake liye ishvar ka ttharaya hua bhag yahee haai." 
Job21:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha," 
Job21:2 chitt lagakar meree bat suno aur tumharee shaaantai yahee tthare. 
Job21:3 meree kuchh to saho, ki maain bhee baten karoon aur jab maain baten kar chukoo, tab peechhe ttttha karana." 
Job21:4 kya maain kisee manushy kee dohai deta hoo? fir maain adhaeer kyon n houn? 
Job21:5 meree or chitt lagakar chaakit ho, aur apanee apanee ungalee dant tale dabao." 
Job21:6 jab maain smaran karata tab maain ghabara jata hoo, aur meree deh men kanpakanpee lagatee haai." 
Job21:7 kya karan haai ki dushtt log jeeavit rahate haai, varan booddhe bhee ho jate, aur unaka dhan baddhta jata haai?" 
Job21:8 unakee santan unake sang, aur unake balabachche unakee ankhon ke samhane bane rahate haain." 
Job21:9 unake ghar men bhyaraahit kushal rahata haai, aur ishvar kee chhdee un par naheen padtee." 
Job21:10 unaka sand gaabhain karata aur chookata nahee, unakee gayen biyatee haain aur bachcha kabhee naheen girateen." 
Job21:11 ve apane ladkon ko jhund ke jhund bahar jane dete haai, aur unake bachche nachate haain." 
Job21:12 ve dfa aur veena bajate huae gate, aur bansuree ke shabd se anaandait hote haain." 
Job21:13 ve apane din sukh se bitate, aur pal bhr hee men adhaelok men utar jate haain." 
Job21:14 taubhee ve ishvar se kahate the, ki ham se door ho! teree gaati janane kee ham ko ichchha naheen rahatee." 
Job21:15 sarvashaaktaiman kya haai, ki ham usakee seva karen? aur jo ham us se binatee bhee karen to hamen kya labh hoga?" 
Job21:16 dekho, unaka kushal unake hath men naheen rahatee, dushtt logon ka vichar mujh se door rahe." 
Job21:17 kitanee bar dushtton ka deepak bujh jata haai, aur un par vipaattai a padtee haai aur ishvar krodha karake unake bantt men shaek deta haai," 
Job21:18 aur ve vayu se udaae huae boose kee, aur bavandr se udai hui boosee kee nai hote haain." 
Job21:19 ishvar usake adharma ka dand usake ladkebalon ke liye rakh chhodta haai, vah usaka badala usee ko de, taaki vah jan le." 
Job21:20 dushtt apana nash apanee hee ankhon se dekhe, aur sarvashaktaiman kee jalajalahatt men se ap pee le." 
Job21:21 kyonaki jab usake maheenon kee ginatee katt chukee, to apane badavale gharane se usaka kya kam raha." 
Job21:22 kya ishvar ko koi gyaan sikhaaega? vah to unche pad par rahanevalon ka bhee nyay karata haai. 
Job21:23 koi to apane poore bal men bade chaain aur sukh se rahata hua mar jata haai. 
Job21:24 usakee dohaniyan doodha se aur usakee haaddiyan goode se bhree rahatee haain. 
Job21:25 aur koi apane jeev men kuddh kuddhkar bina sukh bhoge mar jata haai. 
Job21:26 ve donon barabar mittee men mil jate haai, aur keede unhen ddhank lete haain." 
Job21:27 dekho, maain tumharee kalpanaaen janata hoo, aur un yuktaiyon ko bhee, jo tum mere vishay men anyay se karate ho." 
Job21:28 tum kahate to ho ki rais ka ghar kahan raha? dushtton ke nivas ke dere kahan rahe? 
Job21:29 parantu kya tum ne battohiyon se kabhee naheen poochha? kya tum unake is vishay ke pramanon se anajan ho," 
Job21:30 ki vipaattai ke din ke liye durjan rakha jata haai aur mahapralay ke samay ke liye aeese log bachaae jate haain? 
Job21:31 usakee chal usake munh par kaun kahega? aur us ne jo kiya haai, usaka palatta kaun dega?" 
Job21:32 taubhee vah kabra ko pahunchaya jata haai, aur log us kabra kee rakhvalee rite rahate haain." 
Job21:33 nale ke ddhele usako sukhdayak lagate haain aur jaaise poorvakal ke log anaginit ja chuke, vaaise hee sab manushy usake bad bhee chale jaaenge." 
Job21:34 tumhare uttaron men to joott hee paya jata haai, isaliye tum kyon mujhe vyarth shaantai dete ho?" 
Job22:1 tab temanee aeleepaj ne kaha," 
Job22:2 kya purush se ishvar ko labh pahunch sakata haai? jo buaddhiman haai, vah apane hee labh ka karan hota haai." 
Job22:3 kya tere dhama hone se sarvashaaktaiman sukh pa sakata haai? teree chal kee khrai se kya use kuchh labh ho sakata haai? 
Job22:4 vah to tujhe danttta haai, aur tujh se mukama ladta haai, to kya is dasha men teree bhaktai ho sakatee haai?" 
Job22:5 kya teree burai bahut naheen? tere adharma ke kamon ka kuchh ant naheen. 
Job22:6 too ne to apane bhai ka bandhak akaran rakh liya haai, aur nange ke vasr utar liye haain." 
Job22:7 thke huae ko too ne panee n pilaya, aur bookhe ko rottee dene se inakar kiya." 
Job22:8 jo balavan tha usee ko boomi milee, aur jis purush kee pratishtta hui thee, vahee us men bas gaya." 
Job22:9 too ne vidhavaon ko choochhe hath lautta diya. aur anathon kee bahen tod dalee gai. 
Job22:10 is karan tere charon or fande lage haai, aur achanak dr ke mare too ghagara raha haai." 
Job22:11 kya too andhiayare ko naheen dekhta, aur us baddh ko jis men too oob raha haai?" 
Job22:12 kya ishvar svarga ke unche sthan men naheen haai? unche se unche taron ko dekh ki ve kitane unche haain.. 
Job22:13 fir too kahata haai ki ishvar kya janata haai? kya vah ghaer andhakar kee ad men hokar nyay karega? 
Job22:14 kalee ghattaon se vah aeesa chhpai rahata haai ki vah kuchh naheen dekh sakata, vah to akashamandl hee ke upar chalata firata haai." 
Job22:15 kya too us purane raste ko pakade rahega, jis par ve anarth karanevale chalate haain?" 
Job22:16 ve apane samay se pahale utta liae gaae aur unake ghar kee nev nadee baha le gai. 
Job22:17 unhon ne ishvar se kaha tha, ham se door ho ja aur yah ki sarvashaktaiman hamara kya kar sakata haai?" 
Job22:18 taubhee us ne unake ghar achchhe achchhe padathnse bhr diae, parantu dushtt logon ka vichar mujh se door rahe. 
Job22:19 dhama leg dekhkar anaandait hote haain aur nidash log unakee hansee karate haai, ki" 
Job22:20 jo hamare viruddh utte the, nisandeh mitt gaae aur unaka bada dhan ag ka kaur ho gaya haai." 
Job22:21 us se melamilap kar tab tujhe shaaantai milegee aur is se teree bhlai hogee. 
Job22:22 usake munh se shaiksha sun le, aur usake vachan apane man men rakh." 
Job22:23 yaadi too sarvashaktaiman kee or firake sameep jaa, aur apane dere se kuttlai kam door kare, to too ban jaaega." 
Job22:24 too apanee anamol vastuon ko dhooli par, varan opeer ka kundan bhee nalon ke patthron men dal de," 
Job22:25 tab sarvashaaktaiman ap teree anamol vastu aur tere liye chamakeelee chandee hoga. 
Job22:26 tab too sarvashaaktaiman se sukh paaega, aur ishvar kee or apana munh bekhttke utta sakega." 
Job22:27 aur too us se praarthna karega, aur vah teree sunega aur too apanee mannatoen ko pooree karega." 
Job22:28 jo bat too ttane vah tujh se ban bhee padegee, aur tere magan par prakash rahega." 
Job22:29 chahe durbhagy ho taubhee too kahega ki subhagy hoga, kyonaki vah namra manushy ko bachata haai." 
Job22:30 varan jo nidash n ho usako bhee vah bachata haai tere shuuddh kamon ke karan too chhudaya jaaega. 
Job23:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha," 
Job23:2 meree kudkudahatt ab bhee naheen ruk sakatee, meree mar mere karahane se bharee haai." 
Job23:3 bhla hota, ki maain janata ki vah kahan mil sakata haai, tab maain usake virajane ke sthan tak ja sakata!" 
Job23:4 maain usake samhane apana mukama pesh karata, aur bahut se praman deta." 
Job23:5 maain jan leta ki vah mujh se uttar men kya kah sakata haai, aur jo kuchh vah mujh se kahata vah maain samajh leta." 
Job23:6 kya vah apana bada bal dikhakar mujh se mukama ladta? nahee, vah mujh par dhyan deta." 
Job23:7 sajjan us se vivad kar sakate, aur is reeati maain apane nyayee ke hath se sada ke liye choott jata." 
Job23:8 dekho, maain age jata hoo parantu vah naheen milata maain peechhe hattta hoo, parantu vah dikhai naheen padta" 
Job23:9 jab vah bai or kam karata haai tab vah mujhe dikhai naheen deta vah to dahinee or aeesa chhpai jata haai, ki mujhe vah dikhai hee naheen padta." 
Job23:10 parantu vah janata haai, ki maain kaaisee chal chala hoo aur jab vah mujhe ta lega tab maain sone ke saman nikaloonga." 
Job23:11 mere paair usake magan men sthiar rahe aur maain usee ka marga bina mude thame raha. 
Job23:12 usakee agyaa ka palan karane se maain n hatta, aur maain ne usake vachan apanee ichchha se kaheen aadhaik kam ke janakar suraakshiat rakhe." 
Job23:13 parantu vah aek hee bat par ada rahata haai, aur kaun usako us se fira sakata haai? jo kuchh usaka jee chahata haai vahee vah karata haai." 
Job23:14 jo kuchh mere liye us ne ttana haai, usee ko vah poora karata haai aur usake man men aeesee aeesee bahut see baten haain." 
Job23:15 is karan maain usake sammukh ghabara jata hoo jab maain sochata hoo tab us se thrathra uttta hoo. 
Job23:16 kyonaki mera man ishvar hee ne kachcha kar diya, aur sarvashaaktaiman hee ne mujh ko asamanjas men dal diya haai." 
Job23:17 isaliye ki maain is andhayare se paahile katt dala n gaya, aur us ne ghaer andhakar ko mere samhane se n chhpaiaya." 
Job24:1 sarvashaaktaiman ne samay kyon naheen ttharaya, aur jo log usaka gyaan rakhte haain ve usake din kyon dekhne naheen pate?" 
Job24:2 kuchh log boomi kee seema ko baddhate, aur bhed bakariyan chheenakar charate haain." 
Job24:3 ve anathon ka gadaha hank le jate, aur vidhava ka baail kandhak kar rakhte haain." 
Job24:4 ve daaridra logon ko marga se hatta dete, aur desh ke deenon ko ikatthe chhpaina padta haai." 
Job24:5 dekho, ve jangalee gadahon kee nai apane kam ko aur kuchh bhojan yatn se ddoonddhne ko nikal jate haain unake ladkebalon ka bhojan unako jangal se milata haai." 
Job24:6 unako khet men chara kattna, aur dushtton kee bachee bachai dakh battorana padta haai." 
Job24:7 rat ko unhen bina vasr nange pade rahana aur jade ke samay bina oddhe pade rahana padta haai. 
Job24:8 ve pahadon par kee jhdiyon se bheege rahate, aur sharan n pakar chattan se lipatt jate haain." 
Job24:9 kuchh log anath balak ko ma kee chhatee par se chheen lete haai, aur deen logon se bandhak lete haain." 
Job24:10 jis se ve bina vasr nange firate haain aur bookh ke mare, pooliyan ddhote haain." 
Job24:11 ve unakee bheeton ke bheetar tel perate aur unake kundon men dakh raundate huae bhee pyase rahate haain. 
Job24:12 ve bade nagar men karahate haai, aur ghaayal kiae huon ka jee dohai deta haai parantu ishvar moorkhta ka hisab naheen leta." 
Job24:13 fir kuchh log ujiyale se baair rakhte, ve usake magan ko naheen pahachanate, aur n usake magan men bane rahate haain." 
Job24:14 koonee, pah fattte hee uttkar deen daaridra manushy ko ghaat karata, aur rat ko chor ban jata haai." 
Job24:15 vyabhaicharee yah sochakar ki koi mujh ko dekhne n paa, din oobane kee rah dekhta rahata haai, aur vah apana munh chhpaiaae bhee rakhta haai." 
Job24:16 ve aandhiayare ke samay gharon men sendha marate aur din ko chhpai rahate haain ve ujiyale ko janate bhee naheen. 
Job24:17 isaliye un sabhon ko bhor ka prakash ghaer andhakar sa jan padta haai, kyonki ghaer andhakar ka bhy ve janate haain." 
Job24:18 ve jal ke upar halakee vastu ke sareekhe haai, unake bhag ko prathvee ke rahanevale kosate haai, aur ve apanee dakh kee bariyon men lauttne naheen pate." 
Job24:19 jaaise sookhe aur ghaam se him ka jal sookh jata haai vaaise hee papee log adhaelok men sookh jate haain. 
Job24:20 mata bhee usako bool jatee, aur keede use choosate he, bhveeshy men usaka smaran n rahega is reeati tteddha kam karanevala vraksha kee rai katt jata haai." 
Job24:21 vah banjh sree ko jo kabhee naheen janee loottta, aur vidhava se bhlai karana naheen chahata haai." 
Job24:22 balatkariyon ko bhee ishvar apanee shaaktai se kheench leta haai, jo jeeavit rahane kee asha naheen rakhta, vah bhee fir utt baaittta haai." 
Job24:23 unhen aeese bekhttke kar deta haai, ki ve sambhle rahate haain aur usakee krapadraashtti unakee chal par lagee rahatee haai." 
Job24:24 ve baddhte haai, tab thodee ber men jate rahate haai, ve dabaae jate aur sabhon kee nai rakh liye jate haai, aur anaj kee bal kee nai katte jate haain." 
Job24:25 kya yah sab sach naheen! kaun mujhe jhuttlaaega? kaun meree baten nikammee ttharaaega? 
Job25:1 tab shoohee bildad ne kaha," 
Job25:2 prabhuta karana aur drana yah usee ka kam haai vah apane unche unche sthanon men shaantai rakhta haai. 
Job25:3 kya usakee senaon kee ginatee ho sakatee? aur kaun haai jis par usaka prakash naheen padta? 
Job25:4 fir manushy ishvar kee drashtti men dhama kyonkar tthar sakata haai? aur jo sree se utpann hua haai vah kyonkar nirmal ho sakata haai? 
Job25:5 dek, usakee drashtti men chandrama bhee andhora ttharata, aur tare bhee nirmal naheen ttharate." 
Job25:6 fir manushy kee kya ginatee jo keeda haai, aur adamee kahan raha jo kenchua haai!" 
Job26:1 tab ayyoob ne kaha," 
Job26:2 nirbal jan kee too ne kya hee badee sahayata kee, aur jisakee banh men samathrya nahee, usako too ne kaaise sambhala haai?" 
Job26:3 nirbuaddhi manushy ko too ne kya hee achchhee sammaati dee, aur apanee khree buaddhi kaaisee bhlee bhanti pragatt kee haai?" 
Job26:4 too ne kisake hit ke liye baten kahee? aur kisake man kee baten tere munh se nikaleen? 
Job26:5 bahut din ke mare huae log bhee jalaanidhai aur usake nivaasiyon ke tale tadpate haain. 
Job26:6 adhaelok usake samhane udhada rahata haai, aur vinash ka sthan ddhnp naheen sakata." 
Job26:7 vah uttar disha ko niradhaar faailaae rahata haai, aur bina ek prathvee ko lattkaae rakhta haai." 
Job26:8 vah jal ko apanee kalee ghattaon men bandha rakhta, aur badal usake bojh se naheen fattta." 
Job26:9 vah apane sinhasan ke samhane badal faailakar usako chhpaiaae rakhta haai. 
Job26:10 ujiyale aur andhiayare ke beech jahan sivana bandha haai, vahan tak us ne jalaanidhai ka sivana tthara rakha haai." 
Job26:11 usakee ghaudkee se akash ke khmbhe thrathrakar chaakit hote haain. 
Job26:12 vah apane bal se samudra ko uchhalata, aur apanee buddhi se ghapand ko chhed deta haai." 
Job26:13 usakee atma se akashamandl svachchh ho jata haai, vah apane hath se veg bhaganevale nag ko mar deta haai." 
Job26:14 dekho, ye to usakee gati ke kinare hee haain aur usakee ahatt fausafausahatt hee see to sun padtee haai, fir usake parakram ke garajane ka bhed kaun samajh sakata haai?" 
Job27:1 ayyoob ne aur bhee apanee gooddh bat uttai aur kaha," 
Job27:2 maain ishvar ke jeevan kee shapath khata hoo jis ne mera nyay bigad diya, arthata us sarvashaaktaiman ke jeevan kee jis ne mera praan kadua kar diya." 
Job27:3 kyonaki ab tak meree sans barabar atee haai, aur ishvar ka atma mere nathunon men bana haai." 
Job27:4 maain yah kahata hoo ki mere munh se koi kuattlai bat n nikalegee, aur n maain kapatt kee baten boloonga." 
Job27:5 ishvar n kare ki maain tum logon ko sachcha ttharau, jab tak mera praan n chootte tab tak maain apanee khrai se n hatoonga." 
Job27:6 maain apana dharma pakade huae hoo aur usako hath se jane n doonga kyonaki mera man jeevan bhr mujhe doshaee naheen ttharaaega. 
Job27:7 mera shatra dushtton ke saman, aur jo mere viruddh uttta haai vah kuattlaien ke tuly tthare." 
Job27:8 jab ishvar bhaktaiheen manushy ka praan le le, tab yadhyapi us ne dhan bhee praapt kiya ho, taubhee usakee kya asha rahegee?" 
Job27:9 jab vah sankatt men pade, tab kya ishvar usakee dohai sunega?" 
Job27:10 kya vah sarvashaktaiman men sukh pa sakega, aur har samay ishvar ko pukar sakega?" 
Job27:11 maain tumhen ishvar ke kam ke vishay shaiksha doonga, aur sarvashaktaiman kee bat maain n chhpaiaunga" 
Job27:12 dekho, tum log sab ke sab use svayan dekh chuke ho, fir tum vyarth vichar kyon pakade rahate ho?" 
Job27:13 dushtt panushy ka bhag ishvar kee or se yah haai, aur balatkariyon ka ansh jo ve sarvashaaktaiman ke hath se pate haai, vah yah haai, ki" 
Job27:14 chahe usake ladkebale ginatee men baddh bhee jaae, taubhee talavar hee ke liye baddhenge, aur usakee santan pett bhr rottee n khane paaegee." 
Job27:15 usake jo log bach jaen ve marakar kabra ko pahunchenge aur usake yahan kee vidhavaen n roengee. 
Job27:16 chahe vah rupaya dhooli ke saman battor rakhe aur vasr mittee ke kinakon ke tuly anaginit taaiyar karaa," 
Job27:17 vah unhen taaiyar karaae to sahee, parantu dhama unhen pahin lega, aur usaka rupaya nidash log apas men banttenge." 
Job27:18 us ne apana ghar keede ka sa banaya, aur khet ke rakhvale ko jhopadee kee nai banaya." 
Job27:19 vah dhanee hokar lett jaae parantu vah gada n jaaega ankh kholate hee vah jata rahega. 
Job27:20 bhy kee dhaaraaen use baha le jaaengee, rat ko bavandr usako uda le jaaega." 
Job27:21 puravai use aeesa uda le jaaegee, aur vah jata rahega aur usako usake sthan se uda le jaaegee." 
Job27:22 kyonaki ishvar us par vipaattaiyan bina taras khaae dal dega, usake hath se vah bhag jane chahega. log us par talee bajaaenge," 
Job27:23 aur us par aeesee susakariyan bhrenge ki vah apane sthan par n rah sakega. 
Job28:1 chandee kee khaani to hotee haai, aur sone ke liye bhee sthan hota haai jahan log tate haain." 
Job28:2 joha mittee men se nikala jata aur patthr pighalakar peetal banaya jata haai 
Job28:3 manushy aandhiayare ko door kar, door door tak khod khod kar, andhiayare or ghaer andhakar men patthr ddoonddhte haain." 
Job28:4 jahan log rahate haain vahan se door ve khaani khodate haain vahan prathvee par chalanevalon ke boole bisare huae ve manushyon se door lattke huae joolate rahate haain. 
Job28:5 yah boomi jo haai, is se rottee to milatee haai, parantu usake neeche ke sthan mano ag se ulatt diae jate haain." 
Job28:6 usake patthr neelamaanai ka sthan haai, aur usee men sone kee dhooli bhee haai." 
Job28:7 usaka marga koi mansaharee pakshaee naheen janata, aur kisee giddh kee drashtti us par naheen padee." 
Job28:8 us par aabhaimanee pashuuon ne panv naheen dhara, aur n us se hokar koi sinh kabhee gaya haai." 
Job28:9 vah chakamak ke patthr par hath lagata, aur pahadon ko jad hee se ulatt deta haai." 
Job28:10 vah chattan khodakar naliyan banata, aur usakee ankhon ko har aek anamol vastu dikhai padtee haai." 
Job28:11 vah naadiyon ko aeesa rok deta haai, ki un se aek boond bhee panee naheen ttpakata aur jo kuchh chhpai haai use vah ujiyale men nikalata haai." 
Job28:12 parantu buddhi kahan mil sakatee haai? aur samajh ka sthan kahan haai? 
Job28:13 usaka mol manushy ko maloom nahee, jeevanalok men vah kaheen naheen milatee!" 
Job28:14 athah sagar kahata haai, vah mujh men naheen haai, aur samudra bhee kahata haai, vah mere pas naheen haai." 
Job28:15 chokhe sone se vah mol liya naheen jata. aur n usake dam ke liye chandee taulee jatee haai. 
Job28:16 n to usake sath opeer ke kundan kee barabaree ho sakatee haai aur n anamol sulaaimanee patthr va neelamanai kee. 
Job28:17 n sona, n kanch usake barabar tthar sakata haai, kundan ke gahane ke badale bhee vah naheen milatee." 
Job28:18 moonge aur sfaattkaimaanai kee usake age kya charcha! buddhi ka mol manaik se bhee adhaik haai. 
Job28:19 koosh desh ke padamarag usake tuly naheen tthar sakate aur n us se chokhe kundan kee barabaree ho sakatee haai. 
Job28:20 fir buddhi kahan mil sakatee haai? aur samajh ka sthan kahan? 
Job28:21 vah sab praanaiyon kee ankhon se chhpaiee haai, aur akash ke paakshiayon ke dekhne men naheen atee." 
Job28:22 vinash or mratyu kahatee haai, ki hamane usakee charcha sunee haai." 
Job28:23 parantu parameshvar usaka marga samajhta haai, aur usaka sthan usako maloom haai." 
Job28:24 vah to prathvee kee chhor tak takata rahata haai, aur sare akashamandl ke tale dekhta bhalata haai." 
Job28:25 jab us ne vayu ka taul ttharaya, aur jal ko napuae men napa," 
Job28:26 aur menh ke liye vidhai aur garjan aur bijalee ke liye marga ttharaya," 
Job28:27 tab us ne buaddhi ko dekhkar usaka bakhan bhee kiya, aur usako siddh karake usaka poora bhed boojh liya." 
Job28:28 tab us n manushy se kaha, dek, prabhu ka bhy manana yahee buddhi haai aur burai se door rahana yahee samajh haai." 
Job29:1 ayyoob ne aur bhee apanee gooddh bat uttai aur kaha," 
Job29:2 bhla hota, ki meree dasha beete huae maheenon kee see hotee, jin dinon men ishvar meree raksha karata tha," 
Job29:3 jab usake deepak ka prakash mere sir par rahata tha, aur us se ujiyala pakar maain andhore men chalata tha." 
Job29:4 ve to meree javanee ke din the, jab ishvar kee mitrata mere dere par pragatt hotee thee." 
Job29:5 us samay tak to sarvashaktaiman mere sang rahata tha, aur mere ladkebale mere charon or rahate the." 
Job29:6 tab maain apane pagon ko malai se dhaeta tha aur mere pas kee chattanon se tel kee dhaaraaen baha karatee theen. 
Job29:7 jab jab maain nagar ke faattk kee or chalakar khule sthan men apane baaittne ka sthan taaiyar karata tha," 
Job29:8 tab tab javan mujhe deekhkar chhpai jate, aur puraniye uttkar khde ho jate the." 
Job29:9 haakim log bhee bolane se ruk jate, aur hath se munh moonde rahate the." 
Job29:10 pradhaan log chup rahate the aur unakee jeebh taloo se satt jatee thee. 
Job29:11 kyonaki jab koi mera samachar sunata, tab vah mujhe dhany kahata tha, aur jab koi mujhe dekhta, tab mere vishay sakshaee deta tha" 
Job29:12 kyonaki maain dohai denevale deen jan ko, aur asahay anath ko bhee chhudata tha." 
Job29:13 jo nash hone par tha mujhe ashaeervad deta tha, aur mere karan vidhava anand ke mare gatee thee." 
Job29:14 maain dharma ko paahine raha, aur vah mujhe ddhanke raha mera nyay ka kam mere liye bage aur sundar pagadee ka kam deta tha." 
Job29:15 maain andhaen ke liye ankhe, aur langadon ke liye panv ttharata tha." 
Job29:16 daaridra logon ka maain pita ttharata tha, aur jo meree paahichan ka n tha usake mukame ka hal maain poochhtachh karake jan leta tha." 
Job29:17 maain kuttlai manushyon kee daddhen tod dalata, aur unaka shaikar unake munh se chheenakar bacha leta tha." 
Job29:18 tab maain sochata tha, ki mere din baloo ke kinakon ke saman anaginat honge, aur apane hee basere men mera praan choottega." 
Job29:19 meree jad jal kee or faailee, aur meree dalee par os rat bhr padee," 
Job29:20 meree mahima jyon kee tyon banee rahegee, aur mera dhanush mere hath men sada naya hota jaaega." 
Job29:21 log meree hee or kan lagakar tthare rahate the aur meree sammaati sunakar chup rahate the. 
Job29:22 jab maain bol chukata tha, tab ve aur kuchh n bolate the, meree baten un par menh kee tai barasa karatee theen." 
Job29:23 jaaise log barasat kee vaaise hee meree bhee batt dekhte the aur jaaise barasat ke ant kee vashara ke liye vaaise hee ve munh pasare rahate the. 
Job29:24 jab unako kuchh asha n rahatee thee tab maain hansakar unako prasann karata tha aur koi mere munh ko bigad n sakata tha. 
Job29:25 maain unaka marga chun leta, aur un men mukhy ttharakar baaitta karata tha, aur jaaisa sena men raja va vilap karanevalon ke beech shaantaidata, vaaisa hee maain rahata tha." 
Job30:1 parantu ab jinakee avastha mujh se kam haai, ve meree hansee karate haai, ve jinake pitaon ko maain apanee bhed bakaariyon ke kutton ke kam ke yogy bhee n janata tha." 
Job30:2 unake bhujabal se mujhe kya labh ho sakata tha? unaka paurush to jata raha. 
Job30:3 ve daaridrata aur kal ke mare dubale pade huae haai, ve andhore aur sunasan sthanon men sukhee dhool faankate haain." 
Job30:4 ve jhadee ke asapas ka loniya sag tod lete, aur jha kee jaden khate haain." 
Job30:5 ve manushyon ke beech men se nikale jate haai, unake peechhe aeesee pukar hotee haai, jaaisee jor ke peechhe." 
Job30:6 dravane nalon me, boomi ke bilon me, aur chattanon me, unhen rahana padta haai." 
Job30:7 ve jhaadiyon ke beech renkate, aur bichchoo paudhaen ke neeche ikatthe pade rahate haain." 
Job30:8 ve mooddhon aur neech logon ke vansh haain jo mar mar ke is desh se nikale gaae the. 
Job30:9 aeese hee log ab mujh par lagate geet gate, aur mujh par tana marate haain." 
Job30:10 ve mujh se ghain khakar door rahate, va mere munh par tookane se bhee naheen drate." 
Job30:11 ishvar ne jo meree rassee kholakar mujhe dakh diya haai, isaaliye ve mere samhane munh men lagam naheen rakhte." 
Job30:12 meree dahinee alang par bajaroo log utt khde hote haai, ve mere panv saraka dete haai, aur mere nash ke liye apane upay bandhate haain." 
Job30:13 jinake koi sahayak nahee, ve bhee mere raston ko bigadte, aur meree vipaattai ko baddhate haain." 
Job30:14 mano bade nake se ghausakar ve a padte haai, aur ujad ke beech men hokar mujh par dhaava karate haain." 
Job30:15 muujh men ghabarahatt chha gai haai, aur mera raisapan mano vayu se udaya gaya haai, aur mera kushal badal kee nai jata raha." 
Job30:16 aur ab maain shaekasagar men ooba jata hoo dukh ke dinon ne mujhe jakad liya haai. 
Job30:17 rat ko meree haddiyan mere andar chhdai jatee haain aur meree nason men chaain naheen padtee 
Job30:18 meree beemaree kee bahutayat se mere vasr ka roop badal gaya haai vah mere kutten ke gale kee nai mujh se lipattee hui haai. 
Job30:19 us ne mujh ko keechad men faenk diya haai, aur maain mittee aur rakh ke tuly ho gaya hoo." 
Job30:20 maain teree dohai deta hoo, parantu too naheen sunata maain khda hota hoo parantu too meree or ghoorane lagata haai." 
Job30:21 too badalakar mujh par kattor ho gaya haai aur apane balee hath se mujhe satata he. 
Job30:22 too mujhe vayu par savar karake udata haai, aur andhaee ke panee men mujhe gala deta haai." 
Job30:23 ha, mujhe nishchay haai, ki too mujhe mratyu ke vash men kar dega, aur us ghar men pahunchaaega, jo sab jeeavit praaanaiyon ke liye ttharaya gaya haai." 
Job30:24 taubhee kya koi girate samay hath n baddhaaega? aur kya koi vipaattai ke samay dohai n dega? 
Job30:25 kya maain usake liye rota naheen tha, jisake durdin ate the? aur kya daridra jan ke karan maain praan men dukhait n hota tha?" 
Job30:26 jab maain kushal ka marga johata tha, tab vipaattai a padee aur jab maain ujiyale ka asara lagaae tha, tab andhakar chha gaya." 
Job30:27 meree antadiyan nirantar ubalatee rahatee haain aur aram naheen pateen mere dukh ke din a gaae haain. 
Job30:28 maain shaek ka paahirava pahine huae mano bina soorya kee gama ke kala ho gaya hoo. aur sabha men khda hokar sahayata ke liye dohai deta hoo. 
Job30:29 maain geedadon ka bhai aur shuuturmugan ka sangee ho gaya hoo. 
Job30:30 mera chamada kala hokar mujh par se girata jata haai, aur tap ke mare meree haddiyan jal gai haain." 
Job30:31 is karan meree veena se vilap aur meree bansuree se rone kee dhvaani nikalatee haai. 
Job31:1 maain ne apanee ankhon ke vishay vacha bandhaee haai, fir maain kisee kunvaree par kyonkar ankhen lagaun?" 
Job31:2 kyonaki ishvar svarga se kaun sa ansh aur sarvashaktaiman upar se kaun see sampattai banttta haai? 
Job31:3 kya vah kuttlai manushyon ke liye vipaattai aur anarth kam karanevalon ke liye satyanash ka karan naheen haai? 
Job31:4 kya vah meree gaati naheen dekhta aur kya vah mere pag pag naheen ginata? 
Job31:5 yaadi maain vyarth chal chalata hoo, va kapatt karane ke liye mere paair daude hon" 
Job31:6 to maain dharma ke tarajoo men taula jau, taki ishvar meree khrai ko jan le." 
Job31:7 yaadi mere pag marga se bahak gaae ho, aur mera man meree ankho kee dekhee chal chala ho, va mere hathon ko kuchh kalank laga ho" 
Job31:8 to maain beej bou, parantu doosara khaae varan mere khet kee upaj ukhad dalee jaae." 
Job31:9 yaadi mera day kisee sree par mohit ho gaya haai, aur maain apane padosee ke dar par ghaat men baaitta hoo" 
Job31:10 to meree sree doosare ke liye peese, aur paraae purush usako bhrashtt karen." 
Job31:11 kyonaki vah to mahapap hota aur nyayiyon se dand pane ke yogy adharma ka kam hota 
Job31:12 kyonaki vah aeesee ag haai jo jalakar bhsm kar detee haai, aur vah meree saree upaj ko jad se nash kar detee haai." 
Job31:13 jab mere das va dasee ne mujh se jhgada kiya, tab yaadi maain ne unaka hak mar diya ho" 
Job31:14 to jab ishvar utt khda hoga, tab maain kya karoonga? aur jab vah aaega tab maain kya uttar doonga?" 
Job31:15 kya vah usaka bananevala naheen jis ne mujhe garbh men banaya? kya aek hee ne ham donon kee soorat garbh men n rachee thee? 
Job31:16 yaadi maain ne kangalon kee ichchha pooree n kee ho, va mere karan vidhava kee ankhen kabhee rah gai ho," 
Job31:17 va maain ne apana ttukada akela khaya ho, aur us men se anath n khane paae ho," 
Job31:18 parantu vah mere ladkapan hee se mere sath is prakar pala jis prakar pita ke sat, aur maain janm hee se vidhava ko palata aya hoo" 
Job31:19 yaadi maain ne kisee ko vasrheen marate huae dekha, va kisee daaridra ko jisake pas oddhne ko n tha" 
Job31:20 aur usako apanee bhedon kee un ke kapade n diae ho, aur us ne garma hokar mujhe ashaeervad n diya ho" 
Job31:21 va yaadi maain ne faattk men apane sahayak dekhkar anathon ke marane ko apana hath uttaya ho," 
Job31:22 to meree banh pakhaude se ukhdkar gir pade, aur meree bhuja kee haddee toott jaae." 
Job31:23 kyonaki ishvar ke pratap ke karan maain aeesa naheen kar sakata tha, kyonaki usakee or kee vipaattai ke karan maain bhyabheet hokar thrathrata tha." 
Job31:24 yaadi maain ne sone ka bhrosa kiya hota, va kundan ko apana asara kaha hota," 
Job31:25 va apane bahut se dhan va apanee badee kamai ke karan anand kiya hota," 
Job31:26 va soorya ko chamakate va chandrama ko mahashaebha se chalate huae dekhkar 
Job31:27 maain man hee man mohit ho gaya hota, aur apane munh se apana hath choom liya hota" 
Job31:28 to yah bhee nyayiyon se dand pane ke yogy adharma ka kam hota kyonaki aeesa karake maain ne sarvashraeshtt ishvar ka inakar kiya hota. 
Job31:29 yaadi maain apane baairee ke nash se anaandait hota, va jab us par vipaattai padee tab us par hansa hota" 
Job31:30 parantu maain ne n to usakee shaap dete hua, aur n usake praandand kee praarthna karate huae apane munh se pap kiya haai" 
Job31:31 yaadi mere dere ke rahanevalon ne yah n kaha hota, ki aeesa koi kahan milega, jo isake yahan ka mans khakar trapt n hua ho?" 
Job31:32 paradeshaee ko sadk par ttkaina n padta tha maain battohee ke liye apana dar khula rakhta tha 
Job31:33 yaadi maain ne adam kee nai apana aparadha chhpaiakar apane adharma ko ddhanp liya ho," 
Job31:34 is karan ki maain badee bheed se bhy khata tha, va kuleenon se tuchchh kiae jane se dr gaya yahan tak ki maain dar se bahar n nikala,-" 
Job31:35 bhla hota ki mera koi sunanevala hota! sarvashaaktaiman abhee mera tyay chukaae! dekho mera dastakht yahee haai. bhla hota ki jo shaikayatanama mere mui ne likha haai vah mere pas hota! 
Job31:36 nishchay maain usako apane kandho par uttaae firata aur sundar pagadee janakar apane sir men bandho rahata. 
Job31:37 maain usako apane pag pag ka hisab deta maain usake nikatt pradhaan kee nai nidr jata. 
Job31:38 yaadi meree boomi mere viruddh dohai detee ho, aur usakee reghaariyan milakar rotee hon" 
Job31:39 yaadi maain ne apanee boomi kee upaj bina majooree diae khi, va usake maalik ka praan liya ho" 
Job31:40 to gehoon ke badale jhdbedee, aur jav ke badale jangalee ghaas ugen! ayyoob ke vachan poore huae haain." 
Job32:1 tab un teenon purushaen ne yah dekhkar ki ayyoob apanee draashtti men nidash haai usako uttar dena chhod diya. 
Job32:2 aur boojee barakel ka putra aeleehoo jo ram ke kul ka tha, usaka krodha bhdk utta. ayyoob par usaka krodha isaliye bhdk utta, ki us ne parameshvar ko nahee, apane hee ko nidash ttharaya." 
Job32:3 fir ayyoob ke teenon mitraen ke viruddh bhee usaka krodha is karan bhdka, ki ve ayyoob ko uttar n de sake, taubhee usako doshaee ttharaya." 
Job32:4 aeleehoo to apane ko un se chhotta janakar ayyoob kee baton ke ant kee batt johata raha. 
Job32:5 parantu jab aeleehoo ne dekha ki ye teenon purush kuchh uttar naheen dete, tab usaka krodha bhdk utta." 
Job32:6 tab boojee barakel ka putra aeleehoo kahane laga, ki maain to javan hoo, aur tum bahut booddhe ho is karan maain ruka raha, aur apana vichar tum ko batane se drata tha." 
Job32:7 maain sochata tha, ki jo ayu men bade haain ve hee bat kare, aur jo bahut varsha ke haai, ve hee buddhi sikhaaen." 
Job32:8 parantu manushy men atma to haai hee, aur sarvashaktaiman apanee dee hui sans se unhen samajhne kee shaktai deta haai." 
Job32:9 jo buaddhiman haain ve bade bade log hee naheen aur nyay ke samajhnevale booddhe hee naheen hote. 
Job32:10 isaliye maain kahata hoo, ki meree bhee suno maain bhee apana vichar bataunga." 
Job32:11 maain to tumharee baten sunane ko tthara raha, maain tumhare praman sunane ke liye tthara raha jab ki tum kahane ke liye shabd ddooddhte rahe." 
Job32:12 maain chitt lagakar tumharee sunata raha. parantu kisee ne ayyoob ke paksha ka khndn naheen kiya, aur n usakee baton ka uttar diya." 
Job32:13 tum log mat samajho ki ham ko aeesee buaddhi milee haai, ki usaka khndn manushy naheen ishvar hee kar sakata haai." 
Job32:14 jo baten us ne kaheen vah mere viruddh to naheen kahee, aur n maain tumharee see baton se usako uttar doonga." 
Job32:15 ve vismait hua, aur fir kuchh uttar naheen diya unhon ne baten karana chhod diya." 
Job32:16 isaliye ki ve kuchh naheen bolate aur chupachap khde haai, kya is karan maain tthara rahoon?" 
Job32:17 parantu ab maain bhee kuchh kahoonga maain bhee apana vichar pragatt karoonga. 
Job32:18 kyonaki mere man men baten bhree haai, aur meree atma mujhe ubhar rahee haai." 
Job32:19 mera man us dakhmadha ke saman haai, jo khola n gaya ho vah nai kuappaiyon kee nai fatta chahata haai." 
Job32:20 shaantai pane ke liye maain boloonga maain munh kholakar uttar doonga. 
Job32:21 n maain kisee adamee ka paksha karoonga, aur n maain kisee manushy ko chapaloosee kee padavee doonga." 
Job32:22 kyonaki mujhe to chapaloosee karana ata hee naheen naheen to mera sirajanahar kshan bhr men mujhe utta leta. 
Job33:1 taubhee he ayyoob! meree baten sun le, aur mere sab vachanon par kan laga." 
Job33:2 maain ne to apana munh khola haai, aur meree jeebh munh men chulabula rahee haai." 
Job33:3 meree baten mere man kee sidhaai pragatt karengee jo gyaan maain rakhta hoon use khrai ke sath kahoonga. 
Job33:4 mujhe ishvar kee atma ne banaya haai, aur sarvashaaktaiman kee sans se mujhe jeevan milata haai." 
Job33:5 yaadi too mujhe uttar de sake, to de mere samhane apanee baten kram se rachakar khda ho ja." 
Job33:6 dekh maain ishvar ke sanmukh tere tuly hoo maain bhee mittee ka bana hua hoo. 
Job33:7 sun, tujhe mere dr ke mare ghabarana n padega, aur n too mere bojh se dabega." 
Job33:8 nisandeh teree aeesee bat mere kanon men padee haai aur maain ne tere vachan sune haai, ki" 
Job33:9 maain to pavitra aur niraparadha aur nishkalank hoo aur mujh men adhrma naheen haai. 
Job33:10 dek, vah mujh se jhgadne ke danv ddoonddhta haai, aur mujhe apana shatra samajhta haai" 
Job33:11 vah mere donon panvon ko katt men ttonk deta haai, aur meree saree chal kee dekhbhal karata haai." 
Job33:12 dek, maain tujhe uttar deta hoo, is bat men too sachcha naheen haai. kyonki ishvar manushy se bada haai." 
Job33:13 too us se kyon jhgadta haai? kyonki vah apanee kisee bat ka lekha naheen deta. 
Job33:14 kyonaki ishvar to aek kya varan do bar bolata haai, parantu log us par chitt naheen lagate." 
Job33:15 svapn me, va rat ko diae huae darshan me, jab manushy ghaer nidra men pade rahate haai, va bichhaune par sote samay," 
Job33:16 tab vah manushyon ke kan kholata haai, aur unakee shaiksha par muhar lagata haai," 
Job33:17 jis se vah manushy ko usake sankalp se roke aur garva ko manushy men se door kare. 
Job33:18 vah usake praan ko gaddhhe se bachata haai, aur usake jeevan ko khdg kee mar se bachata he." 
Job33:19 use tadna bhee hetee haai, ki vah apane bichhaune par pada pada tadpata haai, aur usakee haddee haddee men lagatar jhgada hota haai" 
Job33:20 yahan tak ki usaka praan rottee se, aur usaka man svaadishtt bhojan se gharana karane lagata haai." 
Job33:21 usaka mans aeesa sookh jata haai ki dikhai naheen deta aur usakee haddiyan jo paahile dikhai naheen detee theen nikal atee haain. 
Job33:22 nidan vah kabar ke nikatt pahunchata haai, aur usaka jeevan nash karanevalon ke vash men ho jata haai." 
Job33:23 yaadi usake liye koi bichavai svarga doot mile, jo hajar men se aek hee ho, jo bhavee kahe. aur jo manushy ko bataae ki usake liye kya tteek haai." 
Job33:24 to vah us par anugrah karake kahata haai, ki use gaddhhe men jane se vacha le, mujhe chhudautee milee haai." 
Job33:25 tab us manushy kee deh balak kee deh se adhaik svasth aur komal ho jaaegee usakee javanee ke din fir lautt aaenge. 
Job33:26 vah ishvar se binatee karega, aur vah us se prasann hoga, vah anand se ishvar ka darshan karega, aur ishvar manushy ko jyon ka tyon dhama kar dega." 
Job33:27 vah manushyon ke samhane gane or kahane lagata haai, ki maain ne pap kiya, aur sachchai ko ulatt pulatt kar diya, parantu usaka badala mujhe diya naheen gaya." 
Job33:28 us ne mere praan kabra men padne se bachaya haai, mera jeevan ujiyale ko dekhega." 
Job33:29 dek, aeese aeese sab kam ishvar purush ke sath do bar kya varan teen bar bhee karata haai," 
Job33:30 jis se usako kabra se bachaa, aur vah jeevanalok ke ujiyale ka prakash paae." 
Job33:31 he ayyoob! kan lagakar meree suna chup rah, maain aur boloonga." 
Job33:32 yaadi tujhe bat kahanee ho, to mujhe uttar de bol, kyonaki maain tujhe nidash ttharana chahata hoo." 
Job33:33 yaadi nahee, to tu meree suna chup rah, maain tujhe buaddhi kee bat sikhaunga." 
Job34:1 fir aeleehoo yon kahata gaya 
Job34:2 he buaddhimano! meree baten suno, aur he gyaaniyo! meree baton par kan lagao" 
Job34:3 kyonaki jaaise jeebh se chakha jata haai, vaaise hee vachan kan se parakhe jate haain." 
Job34:4 jo kuchh tteek haai, ham apane liye chun len jo bhla haai, ham apas men samajh boojh len." 
Job34:5 kyonaki ayyoob ne kaha haai, ki maain nidash hoo, aur ishvar ne mera haka mar diya haai." 
Job34:6 yadhypi maain sachchai par hoo, taubhee jootta ttharata hoo, maain niraparadha hoo, parantu mera ghaav asadhy haai." 
Job34:7 ayyoob ke tuly kaun shooraveer haai, jo ishvar kee ninda panee kee nai peeta haai," 
Job34:8 jo anarth karanevalon ka sath deta, aur dushtt manushyon kee sangati rakhta haai?" 
Job34:9 us ne to kaha haai, ki manushy ko is se kuchh labh naheen ki vah anand se parameshvar kee sangati rakhe." 
Job34:10 isaliaee he samajhvalo! meree suno, yah sambhv naheen ki ishvar dushttta ka kam kare, aur sarvashakitaman burai kare." 
Job34:11 vah manushy kee karanee ka fal deta haai, aur pratyek ko apanee apanee chal ka fal bhugatata haai." 
Job34:12 nisandeh ishvar dushttta naheen karata aur n sarvashaktaiman anyay karata haai. 
Job34:13 kis ne prathvee ko usake hath men saunp diya? va kis ne sare jagat ka prabandha kiya? 
Job34:14 yaadi vah manushy se apana man hattaye aur apana atma aur shvas apane hee men samett le," 
Job34:15 to sab dehadhaaree aek sang nash ho jaaenge, aur manushy fir mittee men mil jaaega." 
Job34:16 isaliye isako sunakar samajh rak, aur meree in baton par kan laga." 
Job34:17 jo nyay ka baairee ho, kya vah shaasan kare? jo poorn dhama haai, kya too use dushtt ttharaaega?" 
Job34:18 vah raja se kahata haai ki too neech haai aur pradhaanon se, ki tum dushtt ho." 
Job34:19 ishvar to haakimon ka paksha naheen karata aur dhanee aur kangal donon ko apane banaae huae janakar un men kuchh bhed naheen karata. 
Job34:20 adhaee rat ko pal bhr men ve mar jate haai, aur praja ke log hilaae jate aur jate rahate haain. aur pratapee log bina hath lagaae utta liae jate haain." 
Job34:21 kyonaki ishvar kee ankhen manushy kee chalachalan par lagee rahatee haai, aur vah usakee saree chal ko dekhta rahata haai." 
Job34:22 aeesa andhiayara va ghaer andhakar kaheen naheen haai jis men anarth karanevale chhpai saken. 
Job34:23 kyonaki us ne manushy ka kuchh samay naheen ttharaya taaki vah ishvar ke sammukh adalat men jaae. 
Job34:24 vah bade bade balavanon ko bina muchhpachh ke choor choor karata haai, aur unake sthan par auron ko khda kar deta haai." 
Job34:25 isaliye ki vah unake kamon ko bhlee bhanati janata haai, vah unhen rat men aeesa ulatt deta haai ki ve choor choor ho jate haain." 
Job34:26 vah unhen dushtt janakar sabhon ke dekhte marata haai," 
Job34:27 kyonaki unhon ne usake peechhe chalana chhod diya haai, aur usake kisee marga par chitt n lagaya," 
Job34:28 yahan tak ki unake karan kangalon kee dohai us tak pahunchee aur us ne deen logon kee dohai sunee. 
Job34:29 jab vah chaain deta to use kaun doshaee tthara sakata haai? aur jab vah munh faer le, tab kaun usaka darshan pa sakata haai? jaati bhr ke sath aur akele manushy, donon ke sath usaka barabar vyavahar haai" 
Job34:30 taaki bhktaiheen rajy karata n rahe, aur praja fande men fansai n jaae." 
Job34:31 kya kisee ne kabhee ishvar se kaha, ki maain ne dand saha, ab maain bhvishy men burai n karoonga," 
Job34:32 jo kuchh mujhe naheen soojh padta, vah too mujhe sikha de aur yaadi maain ne tteddha kam kiya ho, to bhavishy men vaaisa n karoonga?" 
Job34:33 kya vah tere hee man ke anusar badala paae kyonki too us se aprasann haai? kyonaki tujhe nirny karana haai, n ki mujhe is karan jo kuchh tujhe samajh padta haai, vah kah de." 
Job34:34 sab gyaanee purush varan jitale buddhiman meree sunate haain ve mujh se kahenge, ki" 
Job34:35 ayyoob gyaan kee baten naheen kahata, aur n usake vachan samajh ke sath hote haain." 
Job34:36 bhla hota, ki ayyoob ant tab pareeksha men rahata, kyonki us ne anaathairyon ke se uttar diae haain." 
Job34:37 aur vah apane pap men virodha baddhata haai or hamare beech talee bajata haai, aur ishvar ke piruddh bahut see baten banata haai." 
Job35:1 fir aeleehoo is prakar aur bhee kahata gaya," 
Job35:2 ki kya too ise apana hama samajhta haai? kya too dava karata haai ki tera dharma ishvar ke dharma se aadhaik haai? 
Job35:3 jo too kahata haai ki mujhe is se kya labh? aur mujhe papee hone men aur n hone men kaun sa adhaik antar haai? 
Job35:4 maain tujhe aur tere sathaiyon ko bhee aek sang uttar deta hoo. 
Job35:5 akash kee or draashtti karake dekh aur akashamandl ko tak, jo tujh se uncha haai." 
Job35:6 yaadi too ne pap kiya haai to ishvar ka kya bigadta haai? yadi tere aparadha bahut hee baddh jaaen taubhee too usake sath kya karata haai? 
Job35:7 yaadi too dhama haai to usako kya de deta haai va use tere hath se kya mil jata haai? 
Job35:8 teree dushttta ka fal tujh aeese hee purush ke liye haai, aur tere dharma ka fal bhee manushy matra ke liye haai." 
Job35:9 bahut andhor hone ke karan ve chillate haain aur balavan ke bahubal ke karan ve dohai dete haain. 
Job35:10 taubhee koi yah naheen kahata, ki mera srajanevala ishvar kahan haai, jo rat men bhee geet gavata haai," 
Job35:11 aur hamen prathvee ke pashuuon se aadhaik shaiksha deta, aur akash ke pakshiayon se adhaik buddhi deta haai?" 
Job35:12 ve dohai dete haain parantu koi uttar naheen deta, yah bure logon ke ghamand ke karan hota haai." 
Job35:13 nishchay ishvar vyarth baten kabhee naheen sunata, aur n sarvashaktaiman un par chitt lagata haai." 
Job35:14 to too kyon kahata haai, ki vah mujhe darshan naheen deta, ki yah mukama usake samhane haai, aur too usakee batt johata hua tthara haai?" 
Job35:15 parantu abhee to us ne krodha karake dand naheen diya haai, aur abhaiman par chitt bahut naheen lagaya" 
Job35:16 is karan ayyoob vyarth munh kholakar agyaanata kee baten bahut banata haai. 
Job36:1 fir aeleehoo ne yah bhee kaha," 
Job36:2 kuchh tthara rah, aur maain tujh ko samajhaunga, kyonki ishvar ke paksha men mujhe kuchh aur bhee kahana haai." 
Job36:3 maain apane gyaan kee bat door se le aunga, aur apane sirajanahar ko dhama ttharaunga." 
Job36:4 nishchay meree baten joottee n hongee, vah jo tere sang haai vah poora gyaanee haai." 
Job36:5 dek, ishvar samath haai, aur kisee ko tuchchh naheen janata vah samajhne kee shaktai men samarth haai." 
Job36:6 vah dushtton ko jilaae naheen rakhta, aur deenon ko unaka hak deta haai." 
Job36:7 vah dhaarmiyon se apanee ankhen naheen faerata, varan unako rajaon ke sang sada ke liye sinhasan par baaittata haai, aur ve unche pad ko praapt karate haain." 
Job36:8 or chahe ve bediyon men jakade jaaen aur dukh kee rassaiyon se bandho jaa," 
Job36:9 taubhee ishvar un par unake kam, aur unaka yah aparadha pragatt karata haai, ki unhon ne garva kiya haai." 
Job36:10 vah unake kan shaiksha sunane ke liye kholata haai, aur agyaa deta haai ki ve burai se pare rahen." 
Job36:11 yaadi ve sunakar usakee seva kare, to ve apane din kalyan se, aur apane varsha sukh se poore karate haain." 
Job36:12 parantu yadi ve n sune, to ve khdg se nash ho jate haai, aur agyaanata men marate haain." 
Job36:13 parantu ve jo man hee man bhktaiheen hokar krodha baddhate, aur jab vah unako bandhata haai, tab bhee dohai naheen dete," 
Job36:14 ve javanee men mar jate haain aur unaka jeevan loochchon ke beech men nash hota haai. 
Job36:15 vah duakhyaien ko unake dukh se chhudata haai, aur upadrav men unaka kan kholata haai." 
Job36:16 parantu vah tujh ko bhee klesh ke munh men se nikalakar aeese chaude sthan men jahan saketee naheen haai, pahucha deta haai, aur chikana chikana bhojan teree mej par parosata haai." 
Job36:17 parantu too ne dushtton ka sa nirny kiya haai isaliye nirny aur nyay tujh se lipatte rahate haai. 
Job36:18 dek, too jalajalahatt se ubhr ke ttttha mat kar, aur n praayashchaitt ko aadhaik bada janakar marga se mud." 
Job36:19 kya tera rona va tera bal tujhe dukh se chhuttkara dega? 
Job36:20 us rat kee aabhailasha n kar, jis men desh desh ke log apane apane sthan se mittaae jate haain." 
Job36:21 chaukas rah, anarth kam kee or mat fir, too ne to dakh se adhaik isee ko chun liya haai." 
Job36:22 dek, ishvar apane samadhrya se bade bade kam karata haai, usake saman shaikshak kaun haai?" 
Job36:23 kis ne usake chalane ka marga ttharaya haai? aur kaun us se kah sakata haai, ki too ne anuachit kam kiya haai?" 
Job36:24 usake kamon kee mahima aur prashansa karane ko smaran rak, jisakee prashansa ka geet manushy gate chale aae haain." 
Job36:25 sab manushy usako dhyan se dekhte aae haai, aur manushy use door door se dekhta haai." 
Job36:26 dek, ishvar mahan aur hamare gyaan se kaheen pare haai, aur usake varsha kee ginatee anant haai." 
Job36:27 kyonaki vah to jal kee boonden upar ko kheench leta haai ve kuhare se menh hokar ttpakatee haai," 
Job36:28 ve unche unche badal undelate haain aur manushyon ke upar bahutayat se barasate haain. 
Job36:29 fir kya koi badalon ka faailana aur usake mandl men ka garajana samajh sakata haai? 
Job36:30 dek, vah apane ujiyale ko chahuor faailata haai, aur samudra kee thah ko ddhanpata haai." 
Job36:31 kyonaki vah desh desh ke logon ka nyay inheen se karata haai, aur bhojanavastuen bahutayat se deta haai." 
Job36:32 vah bijalee ko apane hath men lekar use agyaa deta haai ki dushman par gire. 
Job36:33 isakee kadk usee ka samachar detee haai pashu bhee pragatt karate haain ki andhad chaddha ata haai. 
Job37:1 fir is bat par bhee mera day kanpata haai, aur apane sthan se uchhl padta haai." 
Job37:2 usake bolane ka shabd to suno, aur us shabd ko jo usake munh se nikalata haai suno." 
Job37:3 vah usako sare akash ke tale, aur apanee bijalee ko prathvee kee chhor tak bhejata haai." 
Job37:4 usake peechhe garajane ka shabd hota haai vah apane pratapee shabd se garajata haai, aur jab usaka shabd sunai deta haai tab bijalee lagatar chamakane lagatee haai." 
Job37:5 ishvar garajakar apana shabd adabhut reeati se sunata haai, aur bade bade kam karata haai jinako ham naheen samajhte." 
Job37:6 vah to him se kahata haai, prathvee par gir, aur isee prakar menh ko bhee aur moosaladhaar vashara ko bhee aeesee hee agyaa deta haai." 
Job37:7 vah sab manushyon ke hath par muhar kar deta haai, jis se usake banaae huae sab manushy usako pahachanen." 
Job37:8 tab vanapashu gufaaon men ghaus jate, aur apanee apanee mandon men rahate haain." 
Job37:9 daakkhian disha se bavandr aur utarahiya se jada ata haai. 
Job37:10 ishvar kee shvas kee foonk se barafa padta haai, tab jalashayon ka patt jam jata haai." 
Job37:11 fir vah ghattaon ko bhafa se ladata, aur apanee bijalee se bhre huae ujiyale ka badal door tak faailata haai." 
Job37:12 ve usakee buaddhi kee yuktai se idhar udhar firaae jate haai, isaaliye ki jo agyaa vah unako de, usee ko ve basai hui prathvee ke upar pooree karen." 
Job37:13 chahe tadna dene ke liye, chahe apanee prathvee kee bhlai ke liye va manushyon par karuna karane ke liye vah use bheje." 
Job37:14 he ayyoob! is par kan laga aur sun le chupachap khda rah, aur ishvar ke ashcharyakaman ka vichar kara." 
Job37:15 kya too janata haai, ki ishvar kyonkar apane badalon ko agyaa deta, aur apane badal kee bijalee ko chamakata haai?" 
Job37:16 kya too ghattaon ka taulana, va sarvagyaanee ke ashcharyakarma janata haai?" 
Job37:17 jab prathvee par daakkhianee hava hee ke karan se sannatta rahata haai tab tere vasr garma ho jate haain? 
Job37:18 fir kya too usake sath akashamandl ko tan sakata haai, jo ddhale huae darpan ke tuly draddh haai?" 
Job37:19 too hamen yah sikha ki us se kya kahana chaahiye? kyonaki ham andhiayare ke karan apana vyakhyan tteek naheen rach sakate. 
Job37:20 kya usako banaya jaae ki maain bolana chahata hoo? kya koi apana satyanash chahata haai? 
Job37:21 abhee to akashamandl men ka bada prakash dekha naheen jata jab vayu chalakar usako shuuddh karatee haai. 
Job37:22 uttar disha se sunahalee jyoti atee haai ishvar bhyayogy tej se abooshait haai. 
Job37:23 sarvashaaktaiman jo aati samath haai, aur jisaka bhed ham pa naheen sakate, vah nyay aur poorn dharma ko chhod atyachar naheen kar sakata." 
Job37:24 isee karan sajjan usaka bhy manate haai, aur jo apanee drashtti men buddhiman haai, un par vah drashtti naheen karata." 
Job38:1 tab yahova ne ayyoob ko adhaee men se yoon uttar diya,"

Job38:3 purush kee nai apanee kamar bandha le, kyonaki maain tujh se prashn karata hoo, aur too mujhe uttar de." 
Job38:4 jab maain ne prathvee kee nev dalee, tab too kahan tha? yadi too samajhdar ho to uttar de." 
Job38:5 usakee nap kis ne ttharai, kya too janata haai us par kis ne soot kheencha?" 
Job38:6 usakee nev kaun see vastu par rakhee gai, va kis ne usake kone ka patthr littaya,"

Job38:14 vah aeesa badalata haai jaaisa mohar ke neeche chikanee mittee badalatee haai, aur sab vastuaen mano vasr paahine huae dikhai detee haain." 
Job38:15 dushtton se unaka ujiyala rok liya jata haai, aur unakee baddhai hui banh todee jatee haai."

Job38:20 kya too use usake sivane tak hatta sakata haai, aur usake ghar kee dgar paahichan sakata haai?" 
Job38:21 nisandeh too yah sab kuchh janata hoga! kyonaki too to us samay utpann hua tha, aur too bahut ayu ka haai." 
Job38:22 fir kya too kabhee him ke bhndar men paaitta, va kabhee olon ke bhndar ko too ne dekha haai," 
Job38:23 jisako maain ne sankatt ke samay aur yuddh aur ladai ke din ke liye rakh chhoda haai? 
Job38:24 kis marga se ujiyala faailaya jata haai, or puravai prathvee par bahai jatee haai?" 
Job38:25 mahavraashtti ke liye kis ne nala katta, aur kadkanevalee bijalee ke liye marga banaya haai," 
Job38:26 ki nirjan desh men aur jangal men jahan koi manushy naheen rahata menh barasakar," 
Job38:27 ujad hee ujad desh ko seenche, aur haree ghaas ugae?" 
Job38:28 kya menh ka koi pita haai, aur os kee boonden kis ne utpann kee?" 
Job38:29 kis ke garbh se barfa nikala haai, aur akash se gire huae pale ko kaun utpann karata haai?" 
Job38:30 jal patthr ke saman jam jata haai, aur gahire panee ke upar jamavatt hotee haai." 
Job38:31 kya too kachapachiya ka guchchha goonth sakata va mragashaira ke bandhan khol sakata haai? 
Job38:32 kya too rashaiyon ko tteek tteek samay par uday kar sakata, va saptashair ko sathaiyon samet liae chal sakata haai?" 
Job38:33 kya too akashamandl kee vidhaiyan janata aur prathvee par unaka aadhaikar tthara sakata haai?

Job38:35 kya too bijalee ko agyaa de sakata haai, ki vah jaa, aur tujh se kahe, maain upaasthiat hoo?" 
Job38:36 kis ne antakaran men buddhi upajai, aur man men samajhne kee shaktai kis ne dee haai?"

Job38:38 jab dhooli jam jatee haai, aur ddhele aek doosare se satt jate haain?"
