Job39:1 kya too janata haai ki pahad par kee jangalee bakariyan kab bachche detee haain? va jab harinaiyan biyatee haai, tab kya too dekhta rahata haai?" 
Job39:2 kya too unake maheene gin sakata haai, kya too unake biyane ka samay janata haai?" 
Job39:3 jab ve baaittkar apane bachchon ko janatee, ve apanee peedon se choott jatee haain?" 
Job39:4 unake bachche shttpushtt hokar maaidan men baddh jate haain ve nikal jate aur fir naheen lauttte. 
Job39:5 kis ne banaaile gadahe ko svadhaeen karake chhod diya haai? kis ne usake bandhan khole haain? 
Job39:6 usaka ghar maain ne nirjal desh ko, aur usaka nivas loniya boomi ko ttharaya haai." 
Job39:7 vah nagar ke kolahal par hansata, aur hankanevale kee hank sunata bhee naheen." 
Job39:8 pahadon par jo kuchh milata haai use vah charata vah sab bhanti kee hariyalee ddoonddhta firata haai. 
Job39:9 kya jangalee sanddh tera kam karane ko prasann hoga? kya vah teree charanee ke pas rahega? 
Job39:10 kya too jangalee sanddh ko rasse se bandhakar reghaariyon men chala sakata haai? kya vah nalon men tere peechhe peechhe henga faerega? 
Job39:11 kya too usake bade bal ke karan us par bhrosa karega? va jo paarishram ka kam tera ho, kya too use us par chhodega?" 
Job39:12 kya too usaka vishvas karega, ki vah tera anaj ghar le aa, aur tere khalihan ka ann ikattha kare?" 
Job39:13 fir shuuturamuga apane pankhon ko anand se faulatee haai, parantu kya ye pankh aur par sneh ko pragatt karate haain?" 
Job39:14 kyonaki vah to apane ande boomi par chhod detee aur dhooli men unhen garma karatee haai 
Job39:15 aur isakee suadhai naheen rakhtee, ki ve panv se kuchale jaaenge, va koi vanapashu unako kuchal dalega." 
Job39:16 vah apane bachchon se aeesee kattorata karatee haai ki mano usake naheen haain yadhyapi usaka kashtt akarath hota haai, taubhee vah nishchaint rahatee haai" 
Job39:17 kyonaki ishvar ne usako buddhiraahit banaya, aur use samajhne kee shaktai naheen dee." 
Job39:18 jis samay vah seedhaee hokar apane pankh faailatee haai, tab ghaede aur usake savar donon ko kuchh naheen samajhtee haai." 
Job39:19 kya too ne ghaede ko usaka bal diya haai? kya too ne usakee gardan men faharatee hui ayal jamai haai? 
Job39:20 kya usako ttddaiee kee see uchhlane kee shaaktai too deta haai? usake kunkkarane ka shabd dravana hota haai. 
Job39:21 vah tarai men ttap marata haai aur apane bal se haashairt rahata haai, vah haathaiyarabandon ka samhana karane ko nikal padta haai." 
Job39:22 vah dr kee bat par hansata, aur naheen ghabarata aur talavar se peechhe naheen hattta." 
Job39:23 tarkash aur chamakata hua sang or bhala us par khdkhdata haai. 
Job39:24 vah ris aur krodha ke mare boomi ko nigalata haai jab naraasinge ka shabd sunai deta haai tab vah rukata naheen. 
Job39:25 jab jab narasinga bajata tab tab vah hin hin karata haai, aur ladai aur afasaron kee lalakar aur jaya-jayakar ko door se soondha leta he." 
Job39:26 kya tere samajhane se baja udta haai, aur dakkhian kee or udne ko apane pankh faailata haai?" 
Job39:27 kya ukab teree agyaa se upar chaddh jata haai, aur unche sthan par apana ghaensala banata haai?" 
Job39:28 vah chattan par rahata aur chattan kee chottee aur draddhsthan par basera karata haai. 
Job39:29 vah apanee ankhon se door tak dekhta haai, vahan se vah apane aher ko tak leta haai." 
Job39:30 usake bachche bhee lohoo choosate haain aur jahan ghaat kiae huae log hote vahan vah bhee hota haai. 
Job40:1 fir yahova ne ayyoob se yah bhee kaha 
Job40:2 kya jo bakavas karata haai vah sarvashaktaiman se jhgada kare? jo ishvar se vivad karata haai vah isaka uttar de. 
Job40:3 tab ayyoob te yahova ko uttar diya 
Job40:4 dek, maain to tuchchh hoo, maain tujhe kya uttar doon? maain apanee angulee dant tale dabata hoo." 
Job40:5 aek bar to maain kah chuka, parantu aur kuchh n kahoonga han do bar bhee maain kah chuka, parantu ab kuchh aur age n baddhoonga." 
Job40:6 tab yahova ne ayyoob ko adhaee men se yah uttar diya 
Job40:7 purush kee nai apanee kamar bandha le, maain tujh se prashn karata hoo, aur too mujhe bata." 
Job40:8 kya too mera nyay bhee vyarth ttharaaega? kya too ap nidash ttharane kee manasa se mujh ko doshaee ttharaaega? 
Job40:9 kya tera bahubal ishvar ke tuly haai? kya too usake saman shabd se garaj sakata haai? 
Job40:10 ab apane ko maahima aur pratap se sanvar aur aeeshvayrya aur tej ke vasr paahin le. 
Job40:11 apane aati krodha kee baddh ko baha de, aur aek aek ghamandee ko dekhte hee use neecha kara." 
Job40:12 har aek ghamandee ko dekhkar jhuka de, aur dushtt logon ko jahan khde hon vahan se gira de." 
Job40:13 unako ek sang mittee men mila de, aur us gupt sthan men unake munh bandha de." 
Job40:14 tab maain bhee tere vishay men man loonga, ki tera hee daahina hath tera udar kar sakata haai." 
Job40:15 us jalagaj ko dek, jisako maain ne tere sath banaya haai, vah baail kee nai ghaas khata haai." 
Job40:16 dekh usakee kaatt imen bal haai, aur usake pett ke patthon men usakee samathrya rahatee haai." 
Job40:17 vah apanee poonchh ko devadar kee nai hilata haai usakee jandhaen kee nasen aek doosare se milee hui haain. 
Job40:18 usakee haattiyan mano peetal kee naaliyan haai, usakee pasualiyan mano loehe ke bende haain." 
Job40:19 vah ishvar ka mukhy karya haai jo usaka sirajanahar ho usake nikatt talavar lekar aae! 
Job40:20 nishchay pahadon par usaka chara milata haai, jahan aur sab vanapashu kalol karate haain." 
Job40:21 vah chhtanar vrakshaen ke tale narakatton kee ad men aur keech par letta karata haai 
Job40:22 chhtanar vraksha us par chhaya karate haai, vah nale ke bent ke vrakshaen se ghaira rahata haai." 
Job40:23 chahe nadee kee baddh bhee ho taubhee vah n ghabaraaega, chahe yaradan bhee baddhkar usake munh tak aae parantu vah nirbhy rahega." 
Job40:24 jab vah chaukas ho tab kya koi usako pakad sakega, va fande lagakar usako nath sakega?" 
Job41:1 fir kya too libyatan athva magar ko bansee ke dara kheench sakata haai, va doree se usakee jeebh daba sakata haai?" 
Job41:2 kya too usakee nak men nakel laga sakata va usaka jabada keel se bedha sakata haai? 
Job41:3 kya vah tujh se bahut gidgidahatt karega, va tujh se meettee baten bolega?" 
Job41:4 kya vah tujh se vacha bandhega ki vah sada tera das rahe? 
Job41:5 kya too us se aeese khelega jaaise chidiya se, va apanee ladkiyon ka jee bahalane ko use bandha rakheega?" 
Job41:6 kya machhuon ke dal use bika mal samajhenge? kya vah use vyopaariyon men bantt denge? 
Job41:7 kya too usaka chamada bhale se, va usaka sir machhuve ke tirashoolon se bhr sakata haai?" 
Job41:8 too us par apana hath hee dhare, to ladai ko kabhee n boolega, aur bhvishy men kabhee aeesa n karega." 
Job41:9 dek, use pakadne kee asha nishfal rahatee haai usake dekhne hee se man kachcha pad jata haai." 
Job41:10 koi aeesa sahasee nahee, jo usako bhdkaae fir aeesa kaun haai jo mere samhane tthar sake?" 
Job41:11 kis ne pujhe paahile diya haai, jisaka badala mujhe dena pade! dek, jo kuchh saree dharatee par haai so mera haai." 
Job41:12 maain usake angon ke vishay, aur usake bade bal aur usakee banavatt kee shaebha ke vishay chup n rahoonga." 
Job41:13 usake upar ke pahirave ko kaun utar sakata haai? usake danton kee donon pantiyon ke arthata jabadon ke beech kaun aega? 
Job41:14 usake mukh ke donon kivad kaun khol sakata haai? usake dant charon or se dravane haain. 
Job41:15 usake chhlaikon kee rekhaen ghamand ka karan haain ve mano kadee chhap se band kiae huae haain. 
Job41:16 ve aek doosare se aeese jude huae haai, ki un men kuchh vayu bhee naheen paaitt sakatee." 
Job41:17 ve apas men mile huae aur aeese satte huae haai, ki alag alag naheen ho sakate." 
Job41:18 fir usake chheenkane se ujiyala chamak uttta haai, aur usakee ankhen bhor kee palakon ke saman haain." 
Job41:19 usake munh se jalate huae paleete nikalate haai, aur ag kee chinagariyan chootttee haain." 
Job41:20 usake nathuanon se aeesa dhauan nikalata haai, jaaisa khaulatee hui handee aur jalate huae narakatton se." 
Job41:21 usakee sans se koyale sulagate, aur usake munh se ag kee lau nikalatee haai." 
Job41:22 usakee gardan men samathrya banee rahatee haai, aur usake samhane dr nachata rahata haai." 
Job41:23 usake mans par mans chaddha hua haai, aur aeesa apas men satta hua haai jo hil naheen sakata." 
Job41:24 usaka day patthr sa draddh haai, varan chakkee ke nichale patt ke saman draddh haai." 
Job41:25 jab vah uttne lagata haai, tab samath bhee dr jate haai, aur dr ke mare unakee sudha budha lop ho jatee haai." 
Job41:26 yaadi koi us par talavar chalaa, to us se kuchh n ban padega aur n bhale aur n bachh aur n teer se." 
Job41:27 vah lohe ko pual sa, aur peetal ko sadee lakadee sa janata haai." 
Job41:28 vah teer se bhgaya naheen jata, gofan ke patthr usake liye boose se ttharate haain." 
Job41:29 laattyaian bhee boose ke saman ginee jatee haain vah bachh ke chalane par hansata haai. 
Job41:30 usake nichale bhag paaine tteekare ke saman haai, keech par mano vah henga faerata haai." 
Job41:31 vah gaahire jal ko hande kee nai mathta haai usake karan neel nadee maraham kee handee ke saman hotee haai. 
Job41:32 vah apane peechhe chamakeelee leek chhodta jata haai. gaahira jal mano shvet dikhai dene lagata haai. 
Job41:33 dharatee par usake tuly aur koi naheen haai, jo aeesa nirbhy banaya gaya haai." 
Job41:34 jo kuchh uncha haai, use vah takata hee rahata haai, vah sab ghamaanaidyon ke upar raja haai." 
Job42:1 tab ayyoob yahova ko uttar diya 
Job42:2 maain janata hoo ki too sab kuchh kar sakata haai, aur teree yuktaiyon men se koi ruk naheen sakatee." 
Job42:3 too kaun haai jo gyaan raahit hokar yuaktai par parada dalata haai? parantu maain ne to jo naheen samajhta tha vahee kaha, arthata jo baten mere liye aadhaik kattnai aur meree samajh se bahar theen jinako maain janata bhee naheen tha." 
Job42:4 maain nivedan karata hoon sun, maain kuchh kahoonga, maain tujh se prashn karata hoo, too mujhe bata de." 
Job42:5 maain kanon se tera samachar suna tha, parantu ab meree ankhen tujhe dekhtee haain" 
Job42:6 isaliye mujhe apane upar gharana atee haai, aur maain dhooli aur rakh men pashchattap karata hoo." 
Job42:7 aur aeesa hua ki jab yahova ye baten ayyoob se kah chuka, tab us ne temanee aeleepaj se kaha, mera krodha tere aur tere donon mitraen par bhdka haai, kyonki jaaisee tteek bat mere das ayyoob ne mere vishay kahee haai, vaaisee tum logon ne naheen kahee." 
Job42:8 isaliye ab tum sat baail aur sat meddhe chhanttkar mere das ayyoob ke pas jakar apane nimitt homabaali chaddhao, tab mera das ayyoob tumhare liye praarthna karega, kyonki usee kee maain grahan karoonga aur nahee, to maain tum se tumharee mooddhta ke yogy bartav karoonga, kyonki tum logon ne mere vishay mere das ayyoob kee see tteek bat naheen kahee." 
Job42:9 yah sun temanee aeleepaj, shoohee bildad aur namatee sopar ne jakar yahova kee aagyaa ke anusar kiya, aur yahova ne ayyoob kee praarthna grahan kee." 
Job42:10 jab ayyoob ne apane mitraen ke liye praarthna kee, tab yahorava ne usaka sara dukh door kiya, aur jitana ayyoob ka paahile tha, usaka dugana yahova ne use de diya." 
Job42:11 tab usake sab bhai, aur sab bahine, aur jitane pahile usako janate paahichanate the, un sabhon ne akar usake yahan usake sang bhojan kiya aur jitanee vipaattai yahova ne us par dalee thee, us sab ke vishay unhon ne vilap kiya, aur use shaaantai dee aur use aek aek sikka or sone kee aek aek balee dee." 
Job42:12 aur yahova ne ayyoob ke pichhle dinon men usako agale dinon se aadhaik ashaeesh dee aur usake chaudah hajar bhend bakariya, chhhajar unt, hajar jodee baail, aur hajar gadaahiyan ho gai." 
Job42:13 aur usake sat bette or teen bettyaian bhee utpann hui. 
Job42:14 in men se us ne jettee bettee ka nam to yameema, doosaree ka kaseea aur teesaree ka kerenhappook rakha." 
Job42:15 aur us sare desh men aensee striayan kaheen n thee, jo ayyoob kee beattyaien ke saman sundar ho, aur unake pita ne unako unake bhaiyon ke sang hee sampati dee." 
Job42:16 isake bad ayyoob aek sau chalees varsha jeevit raha, aur char peeddhee tak apana vansh dekhne paya." 
Job42:17 nidan ayyoob vraddhavastha men deegharayu hokar mar gaya. 
Psalms1:1 kya hee dhany haai vah puroosh jo dushtton kee yuaktai par naheen chalata, aur n papiyon ke marga men khda hota aur n ttttha karanevalon kee mandlee men baaittta haai!" 
Psalms1:2 parantu vah to yahova kee vyavastha se prasann rahata aur usakee vyavastha par rat din dhyan karata rahata haai. 
Psalms1:3 vah us vraksha ke saman haai, jo bahatee naliyon ke kinare lagaya gaya haai. aur apanee retu men falata haai, aur jisake patte kabhee murajhate naheen. isaliye jo kuchh vah puroosh kare vah safal hota haai.." 
Psalms1:4 dushtt log aeese naheen hote, ve us boosee ke saman hote haai, jo pavan se udai jatee haai." 
Psalms1:5 is karan dushtt log adalat men sthiar n rah sakenge, aur n papee dhaarmiyon kee mandlee men ttharenge" 
Psalms1:6 kyonaki yahova dharmiyon ka marga janata haai, parantu dushtton ka marga nash ho jaaega.." 
Psalms2:1 jaati jati ke log kyon hullad machate haai, aur desh desh ke log vyarth baten kyon soch rahe haain?" 
Psalms2:2 yahova ke aur usake aabhaishaikt ke virooddh prathvee ke raja milakar, aur haakim apas men sammaati karake kahate haai, ki" 
Psalms2:3 ao, ham unake bandhan tod dale, aur unakee rassaiyon ko apane upar se utar faenke.." 
Psalms2:4 vah jo svarga men virajaman haai, hansega, prabhu unako tttthon men udaaega." 
Psalms2:5 tab vah un se krodha karake baten karega, aur krodha men kahakar unhen ghabara dega, ki" 
Psalms2:6 maain to apane ttharaae huae raja ko apane paavitra parvat siyyon kee rajagaee par baaitta chuka hoon. 
Psalms2:7 maain us vachan ka prachar karoonga: jo yahova ne mujh se kaha, too mera putra haai, aj too mujh se utpann hua." 
Psalms2:8 mujh se mang, aur maain jati jati ke logon ko teree sampati hone ke liye, aur door door ke deshaen ko teree nij boomi banane ke liye de doonga." 
Psalms2:9 too unhen lohe ke dnde se ttukade ttukade karega. too kumhar ke bartan kee nain unhen chakana choor kar dalega.. 
Psalms2:10 isaliye ab, he rajao, buddhmaian bano he prathvee ke nyaayiyo, yah upadesh grahan karo." 
Psalms2:11 drate huae yahova kee upasana karo, aur kanpate huae magan ho." 
Psalms2:12 putra ko choomo aeesa n ho ki vah krodha kare, aur tum marga hee men nash ho jao kyonaki kshan bhr men usaka krodha bhdkane ko haai.. dhany haai ve jinaka bhrosa us par haai.." 
Psalms3:1 he yahova mere satanevale kitane baddh gaae haain! vah jo mere virooddh uttte haain bahut haain. 
Psalms3:2 bahut se mere praan ke vishay men kahate haai, ki usaka bachav parameshvar kee are se naheen ho sakata." 
Psalms3:3 parantu he yahova, too to mere charon or meree ddhal haai, too meree mahima aur mere mastaishk ka uncha karanevala haai." 
Psalms3:4 maain unche shabd se yahova ko pukarata hoo, aur vah apane pavitra parvat par se mujhe uttr deta haai." 
Psalms3:5 maain lettkar so gaya fir jag utta, kyonaki yahova mujhe samhalata haai." 
Psalms3:6 maain un das hajar manushyon se naheen drata, jo mere virooddh charon or panati bandho khde haain.." 
Psalms3:7 ut, he yahova! he mere parameshvar mujhe bacha le! kyonaki too ne mere sab shatrauon ke jabadon par mara haai aur too ne dushtton ke dant tod dale haain.." 
Psalms3:8 uddhar yahova hee kee or se hota haai he yahova teree ashaeesh teree praja par ho.. 
Psalms4:1 he mere dharmamay parameshvar, jab maain pukaroon tab too mujhe uttr de jab maain saketee men pada tab too ne mujhe vistar diya. mujh par anugrah kar aur meree praarthna sun le.." 
Psalms4:2 he manushyon ke putrae, kab tak meree maahima ke badale anadar hota rahega? tum kab tak vyarth baton se praeeti rakhoge aur joottee yuktai kee khoj men rahoge?" 
Psalms4:3 yah jan rakho ki yahova ne bhkt ko apane liye alag kar rakha haai jab maain yahova ko pukaroonga tab vah sun lega.. 
Psalms4:4 kanpate raho aur pap mat karo apane apane bichhaune par man hee man socho aur chupachap raho. 
Psalms4:5 dharma ke balidan chaddhao, aur yahova par bhrosa rakho.." 
Psalms4:6 bahut se haain jo kahate haai, ki kaun ham ko kuchh bhlai dikhaaega? he yahova too apane mukh ka prakash ham par chamaka!" 
Psalms4:7 too ne mere man men us se kaheen aadhaik anand bhr diya haai, jo unako ann aur dakhmadha kee baddhtee se hotee thee." 
Psalms4:8 maain shaaantai se lett jaunga aur so jaunga kyonki, he yahova, keval too hee mujh ko aekant men nishchaint rahane deta haai.." 
Psalms5:1 he yahova, mere vachanon par kan laga mere dhyan karane kee or man laga." 
Psalms5:2 he mere raja, he mere parameshvar, meree dohai par dhyan de, kyonaki maain tujhee se praarthna karata hoon." 
Psalms5:3 he yahova, bhor ko meree vanee tujhe sunai degee, maain bhor ko praarthna karake teree batt johoonga." 
Psalms5:4 kyonaki too aeesa ishvar naheen jo dushttta se prasann ho burai tere sath naheen rah sakatee. 
Psalms5:5 ghamandee tere sammukh khde hone n panaege tujhe sab anarthkariyon se gharana haai. 
Psalms5:6 too unako jo joott bolate haain nash karega yahova to hatyare aur chhlee manushy se gharana karata haai. 
Psalms5:7 parantu maain to teree apar karoona ke karan tere bhvan men aunga, maain tera bhy manakar tere pavitra maandair kee or dandvata karoonga." 
Psalms5:8 he yahova, mere shatrauon ke karan apane dharma ke marga men meree aguvai kara mere age age apane seedho marga ko dikha." 
Psalms5:9 kyonaki unake munh men koi sachchai naheen unake man men niree dushttta haai. unaka gala khulee hui kabra haai, ve apanee jeebh se chikanee chupadee baten karate haain." 
Psalms5:10 he parameshvar too unako doshaee tthara ve apanee hee yuktaiyon se ap hee gir jaaen unako unake aparadhaen kee aadhaikai ke karan nikal bahar kar, kyonaki unhon ne tujh se balava kiya haai.." 
Psalms5:11 parantu jitane tujh par bhrosa rakhte haain ve sab anand kare, ve sarvada unche svar se gate rahen kyonki too unakee raksha karata haai, aur jo tere nam ke praemee haain tujh men prafauallait hon." 
Psalms5:12 kyonaki too dharmee ko aashaish dega he yahova, too usako apane anugraharoopee ddhal se ghore rahega.." 
Psalms6:1 he yahova, too mujhe apane krodha men n dant, aur n jhunjhlahatt men mujhe tadna de." 
Psalms6:2 he yahova, mujh par anugrah kar, kyonki maain kumhala gaya hoon he yahova, mujhe changa kar, kyonaki meree haaddiyon men bechaainee haai." 
Psalms6:3 mera praan bhee bahut khedit haai. aur to, he yahova, kab taka?" 
Psalms6:4 lautt a, he yahova, aur mere praan bacha apanee karoona ke nimitt mera uddhar kara." 
Psalms6:5 kyonaki mratyu ke bad tera smaran naheen hota adhaelok men kaun tera dhanyavad karega? 
Psalms6:6 maain karahate karahate thk gaya maain apanee khatt ansuon se bhaigota hoon prati rat mera bichhauna bheegata haai. 
Psalms6:7 meree ankhen shaek se baaittee jatee haai, aur mere sab satanevalon ke karan ve dhaundhala gai haain.." 
Psalms6:8 he sab anarthkariyo mere pas se door ho kyonaki yahova ne mere rone ka shabd sun liya haai. 
Psalms6:9 yahova ne mera gidgidana suna haai yahova meree praarthna ko grahan bhee karega. 
Psalms6:10 mere sab shatra laajjait honge aur bahut ghabaraaenge ve lautt jaaenge, aur aekaaek lajjait honge.." 
Psalms7:1 he mere parameshvar yahova, mera bhrosa tujh par haai sab peechha karanevalon se mujhe bacha aur chhuttkara de," 
Psalms7:2 aeesa n ho ki ve mujh ko sinh kee nai faadkar ttukade ttukade kar dalen aur koi mera chhudanevala n ho.. 
Psalms7:3 he mere parameshvar yahova, yadi maain ne yah kiya ho, yaadi mere hathon se kuttlai kam hua ho," 
Psalms7:4 yaadi maain ne apane mel rakhnevalon se bhlai ke badale burai kee ho, varan maain ne usako jo akaran mera baairee tha bachaya haai" 
Psalms7:5 to shatra mere praan ka peechha karake mujhe a pakade, varan mere praan ko boomi par raunde, aur meree maahima ko mittee men mila de.." 
Psalms7:6 he yahova krodha karake utt mere krodhabhre satanevale ke virooddh too khda ho ja mere liye jaga! too ne nyay kee agyaa to de dee haai. 
Psalms7:7 desh desh ke logon kee mandlee tere charon or ho aur too unake upar se hokar unche sthanon par lautt ja. 
Psalms7:8 yahova samaj samaj ka nyay karata haai yahova mere dharma aur khrai ke anusar mera nyay chuka de.. 
Psalms7:9 bhla ho ki dushtton kee burai ka ant ho jaa, parantu dharma ko too sthiar kara kyonki dharmee parameshvar man aur marma ka gyaata haai." 
Psalms7:10 meree ddhal parameshvar ke hath men haai, vah seedho manavalon ko bachata haai.." 
Psalms7:11 parameshvar dharmee aur nyayee haai, varan aeesa ishvar haai jo praati din krodha karata haai.." 
Psalms7:12 yaadi manushy n fire to vah apanee talavar par san chaddhaaega vah apana dhanush chaddhakar teer sandhaan chuka haai. 
Psalms7:13 aur us manushy ke liye us ne mratyu ke haathaiyar taaiyar kar liae haain: vah apane teeron ko aagnaiban banata haai. 
Psalms7:14 dekh dushtt ko anarth kam kee peedaaen ho rahee haai, usako utpat ka garbh haai, aur us se joott utpann hua. us ne gadha khodakar use gahira kiya," 
Psalms7:15 aur jo khai us ne banai thee us men vah ap hee gira. 
Psalms7:16 usaka utpat palatt kar usee ke sir par padega aur usaka upadrav usee ke mathe par padega.. 
Psalms7:17 maain yahova ke dharma ke anusar usaka dhanyavad karoonga, aur paramapradhaan yahova ke nam ka bhjan gaunga.." 
Psalms8:1 he yahova hamare prabhu, tera nam saree prathvee par kya hee pratapamay haai! too ne apana vibhv svarga par dikhaya haai." 
Psalms8:2 too ne apane baairiyon ke karan bachchon aur doodha piuvon ke dara samathrya kee nev dalee haai, taki too shatra aur palatta lenevalon ko rok rakhe." 
Psalms8:3 jab maain akash ko, jo tere hathon ka karya haai, aur chandrama aur taragan ko jo too ne niyukt kiae haai, dekhta hoon" 
Psalms8:4 to fir manushy kya haai ki too usaka smaran rakhe, aur adamee kya haai ki too usakee sudhai le?" 
Psalms8:5 kyonaki too ne usako parameshvar se thoda hee kam banaya haai, aur maahima aur pratap ka mukutt usake sir par rakha haai." 
Psalms8:6 too ne use apane hathon ke kayorn par prabhuta dee haai too ne usake panv tale sab kuchh kar diya haai. 
Psalms8:7 sab bhed-bakaree aur gaya-baail aur jitane vanapashu haai," 
Psalms8:8 akash ke pakshaee aur samudr kee machhliya, aur jitane jeeva-jantu samudron men chalate firate haain." 
Psalms8:9 he yahova, he hamare prabhu, tera nam saree prathvee par kya hee pratapamay haai.." 
Psalms9:1 he yahova parameshvar maain apane poorn man se tera dhanyavad karoonga maain tere sab ashcharya karmon ka varnn karoonga. 
Psalms9:2 maain tere karan anaandait aur prafauallait hounga, he paramapradhaan, maain tere nam ka bhjan gaunga.." 
Psalms9:3 jab mere shatra peechhe hattte haai, to ve tere samhane se ttokar khakar nash hote haain." 
Psalms9:4 kyonaki too ne mera nyay aur mukama chukaya haai too ne sinhasan par virajaman hokar dharma se nyay kiya. 
Psalms9:5 too ne anyajatiyon ko jhdika aur dushtt ko nash kiya haai too ne unaka nam anantakal ke liye mitta diya haai. 
Psalms9:6 shatra jo haai, vah mar gaa, ve anantakal ke liye ujad gaae haain aur jin nagaron ko too ne ddha diya, unaka nam va nishaan bhee mitt gaya haai." 
Psalms9:7 parantu yahova sadaaiv sinhasan par virajaman haai, us ne apana sinhasan nyay ke liye siddh kiya haai" 
Psalms9:8 aur vah ap hee jagat ka nyay dharma se karega, vah desh desh ke logon ka mukama khrai se nipattaaega.." 
Psalms9:9 yahova pise huon ke liye uncha gaddh ttharega, vah sankatt ke samay ke liye bhee uncha gaddh ttharega." 
Psalms9:10 aur tere nam ke jananevale tujh par bhrosa rakhenge, kyonaki he yahova too ne apane khojiyon ko tyag naheen diya.." 
Psalms9:11 yahova jo siyyon men virajaman haai, usaka bhjan gao! jati jati ke logon ke beech men usake mahakamorn ka prachar karo!" 
Psalms9:12 kyonaki koon ka palatta lenevala unako smaran karata haai vah deen logon kee dohai ko boolata.. 
Psalms9:13 he yahova, mujh par anugrah kara. too jo mujhe mratyu ke faattkon ke pas se uttata haai, mere du:kh ko dekh jo mere baairee mujhe de rahe haain" 
Psalms9:14 taaki maain siyyon ke faattkon ke pas tere sab gunon ka varnn karoo, aur tere kiae huae uddhar se magan houn.." 
Psalms9:15 any jativalon ne jo gadha khoda tha, usee men ve ap gir pade jo jal unhon ne lagaya tha, us men unheen ka panv fans gaya." 
Psalms9:16 yahova ne apane ko pragatt kiya, us ne nyay kiya haai dushtt apane kiae huae kamon men fans jata haai." 
Psalms9:17 dushtt adhaelok men lautt jaaenge, tatha ve sab jatiyan bhee ja parameshvar ko bool jatee haai." 
Psalms9:18 kyonaki daridr log anantakal tak bisare huae n rahenge, aur n to namra logon kee asha sarvada ke liye nash hogee." 
Psalms9:19 ut, he parameshvar, manushy prabal n hone pae! jatiyon ka nyay tere sammukh kiya jae." 
Psalms9:20 he parameshvar, unako bhy dila! jaatiyan apane ko manushyamatra hee janen." 
Psalms10:1 he yahova too kyon door khda rahata haai? sankatt ke samay men kyon chhpai rahata haai? 
Psalms10:2 dushtton ke ahankar ke karan dee manushy khdede jate haain ve apanee hee nikalee hui yuaktaiyon men fans jaaen.. 
Psalms10:3 kyonaki dushtt apanee aabhailasha par ghamand karata haai, aur lobhee parameshvar ko tyag deta haai aur usaka tiraskar karata haai.." 
Psalms10:4 dushtt apane abhaiman ke karan kahata haai ki vah lekha naheen lene ka usaka poora vichar yahee haai ki koi parameshvar haai hee naheen.. 
Psalms10:5 vah apane marga par draddhta se bana rahata haai tere nyay ke vichar aeese unche par hote haai, ki usakee drashtti vahan tak naheen pahunchatee jitane usake virodhaee haain un par vah faunkarata haai." 
Psalms10:6 vah apane man men kahata haai ki maain kabhee ttlane ka naheen: maain peeddhee se peeddhee tak du:kh se bacha rahoonga.. 
Psalms10:7 usaka munh shaap aur chhl aur andhor se bhra haai utpat aur anarth kee baten usake munh men haain. 
Psalms10:8 vah ganvon ke ghaton men baaitta karata haai, aur gupt sthanon men nirdosh ko ghaat karata haai, usakee ankhe lachar kee ghaat men lagee rahatee haai." 
Psalms10:9 jaaisa sinh apanee jhadee men vaaisa hee vah bhee chhpaikar ghaat men baaitta karata haai vah deen ko pakadne ke liye ghaat lagaae rahata haai," 
Psalms10:10 vah deen ko apane jal men fansakar ghaseett lata haai, tab use pakad leta haai." 
Psalms10:11 vah jhuk jata haai aur vah dabak kar baaittta haai aur lachar log usake mahabalee hathon se pattke jate haain. 
Psalms10:12 vah apane man men sochata haai, ki ishvar bool gaya, vah apana munh chhpaiata haai vah kabhee naheen dekhega.." 
Psalms10:13 ut, he yahova he ishvar, apana hath baddha aur deenon ko n boola." 
Psalms10:14 parameshvar ko dushtt kyon tuchchh janata haai, aur apane man men kahata haai ki too lekha n lega?" 
Psalms10:15 too ne dekh liya haai, kyonki too utpat aur kalapane par duashtti rakhta haai, taaki usaka palatta apane hath men rakhe lachar apane ko tere hath men saunpata haai anathon ka too hee sahayak raha haai. dushtt kee bhuja ko tod dala" 
Psalms10:16 yahova anantakal ke liye maharaj haai usake desh men se anyajati log nash ho gaae haain.. 
Psalms10:17 he yahova, too ne namra logon kee aabhailasha sunee haai too unaka man taaiyar karega, too kan lagakar sunega" 
Psalms10:18 ki anath aur pise huae ka nyay kare, taki manushy jo mittee se bana haai fir bhy dikhane n paae.." 
Psalms11:1 mera bhrosa parameshvar par haai tum kyonaki mere praan se kahate ho ki pakshaee kee nai apane pahad par ud ja? 
Psalms11:2 kyonaki dekho, dushtt apana dhanush chaddhate haai, aur apana teer dhanush kee doree par rakhte haai, ki seedho manavalon par andhiayare men teer chalaaen." 
Psalms11:3 yaadi neven ddha dee jaaen to dharmee kya kar sakata haai? 
Psalms11:4 parameshvar apane paavitra bhvan men haai parameshvar ka sinhasan svarga men haai usakee ankhen manushy kee santan ko nit dekhtee rahatee haain aur usakee palaken unako janchatee haain. 
Psalms11:5 yahova dharmeen ko parakhta haai, parantu vah un se jo dushtt haain aur upadrav se praeeti rakhte haain apanee atma men gharana karata haai." 
Psalms11:6 vah dushtton par fande barasaaega ag aur gandhak aur prachand looh unake kattoron men bantt dee jaaengee. 
Psalms11:7 kyonaki yahova dharmee haai, vah dharma ke hee kamon se prasann rahata haai dharmeejan usaka darshan paaenge.." 
Psalms12:1 he parameshvar bacha le, kyonki aek bhee bhkt naheen raha manushyon men se vishvasayogy lag mar mitte haain." 
Psalms12:2 un men se pratyek apane padosee se joottee baten kahata haai ve chapaloosee ke otton se do rangee baten karate haain.. 
Psalms12:3 prabhu sab chapaloos otton ko aur us jeebh ko jis se bada bol nikalata haai katt dalega. 
Psalms12:4 ve kahate haain ki ham apanee jeebh hee se jeetenge, hamare ontt hamare hee vash men haain hamar prabhu kaun haai?" 
Psalms12:5 dee logon ke lutt jane, aur daaridron ke karahane ke kara, parameshvar kahata haai, ab maain utoonga, jis par ve faunkarate haain use maain chaain vishraam doonga." 
Psalms12:6 parameshvar ka vachan pavitra haai, us chandai ke saman jo bhttee men mittee par tai gai, aur sat bar nirmal kee gai ho.." 
Psalms12:7 too hee he parameshvar unakee raksha karega, unako is kal ke logon se sarvada ke liye bachaae rakhega." 
Psalms12:8 jab manushyon men neechapan ka adar hota haai, tab dushtt log charon or akadte firate haain.." 
Psalms13:1 he parameshvar too kab taka? kya sadaaiv mujhe boola rahega? too kab tak apana mukhda mujh se chhpaiaae rahega? 
Psalms13:2 maain kab tak apane man hee man men yuktaiyan karata rahoo, aur din bhr apane day men duakhait raha karoo, kab tak mera shatra mujh par prabal rahega?" 
Psalms13:3 he mere parameshvar yahova meree or dhyan de aur mujhe uttr de, meree ankhon men jyoti ane de, naheen to mujhe mratyu kee neend a jaaegee" 
Psalms13:4 aeesa n ho ki mera shatra kahe, ki maain us par prabal ho gaya aur aeesa n ho ki jab maain dgamagane lagoon to mere shatra magan hon.." 
Psalms13:5 parantu maain ne to teree karoona par bhrosa rakha haai mera day tere uddhar se magan hoga. 
Psalms13:6 maain parameshvar ke nam ka bhjan gaunga, kyonki us ne meree bhlai kee haai.." 
Psalms14:1 moorkh ne apane man men kaha haai, koi parameshvar haai hee naheen. ve bigad gaa, unhon ne ghainaune kam kiae haai, koi sukarmee naheen." 
Psalms14:2 parameshvar ne svarga men se manushyon par drashtti kee haai, ki dekhe ki koi buaddhmaian, koi parameshvar ka khojee haai ya naheen." 
Psalms14:3 ve sab ke sab bhttk gaa, ve sab bhrashtt ho gaae koi sukarmee nahee, aek bhee naheen." 
Psalms14:4 kya kisee anarthkaree ko kuchh bhee gyaan naheen rahata, jo mere logon ko aeese kha jate haain jaaise rottee, aur parameshvar ka nam naheen lete?" 
Psalms14:5 vahan un par bhy chha gaya, kyonaki parameshvar dharmee logon ke beech men nirantar rahata haai." 
Psalms14:6 tum to deen kee yuaktai kee hansee udate ho isaliye ki yahova usaka sharansthan haai. 
Psalms14:7 bhla ho ki israael ka uddhar siyyon se pragatt hota! jab yahova apanee praja ko dasatv se lautta le aaega, tab yakoob magan aur israael anandait hoga.." 
Psalms15:1 he parameshvar tere tamboo men kaun rahega? tere paavitra parvat par kaun basane paaega? 
Psalms15:2 vah jo khrai se chalata aur dharma ke kam karata haai, aur day se sach bolata haai" 
Psalms15:3 jo apanee jeebh se ninda naheen karata, aur n apane mitra kee burai karata, aur n apane padosee kee ninda sunata haai" 
Psalms15:4 vah jisakee drashtti men nikamma manushy tuchchh haai, aur jo yahova ke dravaaiyon ka adar karata haai, jo shapath khakar badalata naheen chahe hani uttana pade" 
Psalms15:5 jo apana roopaya byaj par naheen deta, aur nirdosh kee haani karane ke liye ghoos naheen leta haai. jo koi aeesee chal chalata haai vah kabhee n dgamagaaega.." 
Psalms16:1 he ishvar meree raksha kar, kyonki maain tera hee sharanagat hoon." 
Psalms16:2 maain ne parameshvar se kaha haai, ki too hee mera prabhu haai tere sivaae meree bhlai kaheen naheen." 
Psalms16:3 prathvee par jo paavitra log haai, ve hee adar ke yogy haai, aur unheen se maain prasann hoon." 
Psalms16:4 jo paraae devata ke peechhe bhagate haain unaka du:kh baddh jaaega maain unake lohoovale tapavan naheen tapaunga aur unaka nam apane otton se naheen loonga.. 
Psalms16:5 yahova mera bhag aur mere kattore ka hissa haai mere bantt ko too sthiar rakhta haai. 
Psalms16:6 mere liye map kee doree manabhavane sthan men padee, aur mera bhag manabhavana haai.." 
Psalms16:7 maain yahova ko dhany kahata hoo, kyonki us ne mujhe sammaati dee haai varan mera man bhee rat men mujhe shaiksha deta haai." 
Psalms16:8 maain ne yahova ko nirantar apane sammukh rakha haai: isaliye ki vah mere daahine hath rahata haai maain kabhee n dgamagaunga.. 
Psalms16:9 is karan mera day anandait aur meree atma magan hui mera shareer bhee chaain se rahega. 
Psalms16:10 kyonaki too mere praan ko adhaelok men n chhodega, n apane pavitra bhkt ko sadne dega.."

Psalms17:1 he yahova parameshvar sachchai ke vachan sun, meree pukar kee or dhyan de. meree praarthna kee or jo nishkapatt munh se nikalatee haai kan laga." 
Psalms17:2 mere mukamen ka nirny tere sammukh ho! teree ankhen nyay par lagee rahen! 
Psalms17:3 too ne mere day ko jancha haai too ne rat ko meree dekhbhal kee, too ne mujhe parakha parantu kuchh bhee khottapan naheen paya maain ne ttan liya haai ki mere munh se aparadha kee bat naheen nikalegee." 
Psalms17:4 manavee kamon men maain tere munh ke vachan ke dara krooron kee see chal se apane ko bachaae raha. 
Psalms17:5 mere panv tere pathon men sthiar rahe, fisale naheen.."

Psalms17:7 too jo apane daahine hath ke dara apane sharangaton ko unake virodhaiyon se bachata haai, apanee adabhut karoona dikha." 
Psalms17:8 apane ankho kee putalee kee nai suraakshiat rakh apane pankhon ke tale mujhe chhpai rak,"

Psalms18:1 he parameshvar, he mere bal, maain tujh se praem karata hoon." 
Psalms18:2 yahova meree chattan, aur mera gaddh aur mera chhudanevala haai mera ishvar, meree chattan haai, jisaka maain sharanagat hoo, vah meree ddhal aur meree muaktai ka gaddh haai." 
Psalms18:3 maain yahova ko jo stuati ke yogy haai pukaroonga is prakar maain apane shatrauon se bachaya jaunga..

Psalms18:5 patal kee rassaiyan mere charo or thee, aur mratyu ke fande mujh par aae the." 
Psalms18:6 apane sankatt men maain ne yahova parameshvar ko pukara maain ne apane parameshvar ko dohai dee. aur us ne apane maandair men se meree baten sunee. aur meree dohai usake pas pahunchakar usake kanon men padee..

Psalms18:9 aur vah svarga ko neeche jhukakar utar aya aur usake panvon tale ghaer andhakar tha. 
Psalms18:10 aur vah karoob par savar hokar uda, varan pavan ke pankhon par savaree karake veg se uda." 
Psalms18:11 us ne aandhiayare ko apane chhpaine ka sthan aur apane charon or meghaen ke andhakar aur akash kee kalee ghattaon ka mandp banaya. 
Psalms18:12 usakee upasthiaati kee jhlak se usakee kalee ghattaen fatt gai ole aur angare. 
Psalms18:13 tab yahova akash men garaja, aur paramapradhaan ne apanee vanee sunai, ole or angare.."

Psalms18:15 tab jal ke nale dekh pade, aur jagat kee neven pragatt hui, yah to yahova teree dantt se, aur tere nathnon kee sans kee jhonk se hua.." 
Psalms18:16 us ne upar se hath baddhakar mujhe thanm liya, aur gaahire jal men se kheench liya." 
Psalms18:17 us ne mere balavant shatra se, aur un se jo mujh se gharana karate the mujhe chhudaya kyonaki ve adhaik samarthee the." 
Psalms18:18 meree vipaati ke din ve mujh par a pade. parantu yahova mera ashray tha. 
Psalms18:19 aur us ne mujhe nikalakar chaude sthan men pahunchaya, us ne mujh ko chhudaya, kyonaki vah mujh se prasann tha." 
Psalms18:20 yahova ne mujh se mere dharma ke anusar vyavahar kiya aur mere hathon kee shuuddhta ke anusar us ne mujhe badala diya. 
Psalms18:21 kyonaki maain yahova ke magorn par chalata raha, aur dushttta ke karan apane parameshvar se door n hua." 
Psalms18:22 kyonaki usake sare nirny meere sammukh bane rahe aur maain ne usakee vidhaiyon ko n tyaga. 
Psalms18:23 aur maain usake sammukh siddh bana raha, aur adharma se apane ko bachaae raha." 
Psalms18:24 yahova ne mujhe mere dharma ke anusar badala diya, aur mere hathon kee us shuuddhta ke anusar jise vah dekhta tha.." 
Psalms18:25 dayavant ke sath too apane ko dayavant dikhata aur khre puroosh ke sath too apane ko khra dikhata haai. 
Psalms18:26 shuuddh ke sath too apane ko shuuddh dikhata, aur tteddhe ke sath too tirchha banata haai." 
Psalms18:27 kyonaki too dee logon ko to bachata haai parantu ghamand bhree ankhon ko neechee karata haai. 
Psalms18:28 ha, too hee mere deepak ko jalata haai mera parameshvar yahova mere aandhiayare ko ujiyala kar deta haai." 
Psalms18:29 kyonaki teree sahayata se maain sena par dhaava karata hoon aur apane parameshvar kee sahayata se shaharapanah ko langha jata hoon. 
Psalms18:30 ishvar ka marga sachchaai yahova ka vachan taya hua haai vah apane sab sharanagaton kee ddhal haai.. 
Psalms18:31 yahova ko chhod kya koi ishvar haai? hamare parameshvar ko chhod kya aur koi chattan haai? 
Psalms18:32 yah vahee ishvar haai, jo samarth se mera kattbaindha bandhata haai, aur mere marga ko siddh karata haai." 
Psalms18:33 vahee mere paairon ko haarinaiyon ke paairon ke saman banata haai, aur mujhe mere unche sthanon par khda karata haai." 
Psalms18:34 vah mere hathon ko yuddh karana sikhata haai, isaliye meree bahon se peetal ka dhanush jhuk jata haai." 
Psalms18:35 too ne mujh ko apane bachav kee ddhal dee haai, too apane daahine hath se mujhe sambhale huae haai, aur meree namrata ne mahatv diya haai." 
Psalms18:36 too ne mere paairon ke liye sthan chauda kar diya, aur mere paair naheen fisale." 
Psalms18:37 maain apane shatrauon ka peechha karake unhen pakad loonga aur jab tab unaka ant n karoon tab tak n lautoonga.

Psalms18:40 too ne mere shatrauon kee peett meree or faer dee, taki maain unako katt daloon jo mujh se desh rakhte haain."

Psalms18:47 dhany haai mera palatta lenevala ishvara! jis ne desh desh ke logon ko mere vansh men kar diya haai

Psalms25:1 he yahova maain apane man ko teree or uttata hoon.

Psalms25:7 he yahova apanee bhlai ke karan meree javanee ke papon aur mere aparadhaen ko smaran n kara apanee karoona hee ke anusar too mujhe smaran kara.. 
Psalms25:8 yahova bhla aur seedha haai isaaliye vah paapiyon ko apana marga dikhlaaega. 
Psalms25:9 vah namra logon ko nyay kee shaiksha deta, han vah namra logon ko apana marga dikhlaaega." 
Psalms25:10 jo yahova kee vacha aur chitauaniyon ko manate haai, unake liye usake sab marga karoona aur sachchai haain.." 
Psalms25:11 he yahova apane nam ke nimitt mere adharma ko jo bahut haain kshama kara.. 
Psalms25:12 vah kaun haai jo yahova ka bhy manata haai? yahova usako usee marga par jis se vah prasann hota haai chalaaega. 
Psalms25:13 vah kushal se ttkai rahega, aur usaka vansh prathvee par adhaikaree hoga." 
Psalms25:14 yahova ke bhed ko vahee janate haain jo us se drate haai, aur vah apanee vacha un par pragatt karega." 
Psalms25:15 meree ankhe sadaaiv yahova par ttkattkee lagaae rahatee haai, kyonki vahee mere panvon ko jal men se chhudaaega.." 
Psalms25:16 he yahova meree or firakar mujh par anugrah kara kyonaki maain akela aur deen hoon. 
Psalms25:17 mere day ka klesh baddh gaya haai, too mujh ko mere du:khon se chhuda le." 
Psalms25:18 too mere du:kh aur kashtt par drashtti kar, aur mere sab papon ko kshama kara.." 
Psalms25:19 mere shatrauon ko dekh ki ve kaaise baddh gaae haai, aur mujh se bada baair rakhte haain." 
Psalms25:20 mere praan kee raksha kar, aur mujhe chhuda mujhe laajjait n hone de, kyonki maain tera sharanagat hoon." 
Psalms25:21 khrai aur seedhaai mujhe surakshiat rakhe, kyonki mujhe tere hee asha haai.." 
Psalms25:22 he parameshvar israael ko usake sare sankatton se chhuda le.. 
Psalms26:1 he yahova, mera nyay kar, kyonki maain khrai se chalata raha hoo, aur mera bhrosa yahova par attl bana haai." 
Psalms26:2 he yahova, mujh ko janch aur parakh mere man aur day ko parakh." 
Psalms26:3 kyonaki teree karoona to meree ankhon ke samhane haai, aur maain tere saty marga par chalata raha hoon.." 
Psalms26:4 maain nikammee chal chalanevalon ke sang naheen baaitta, aur n maain kapattyaien ke sath kaheen jaunga" 
Psalms26:5 maain kukaarmiyon kee sangaati se gharana rakhta hoo, aur dushtton ke sang n baaitoonga.." 
Psalms26:6 maain apane hathon ko nirdoshata ke jal se dhaeunga, tab he yahova maain teree vedee kee pradakshiana karoonga," 
Psalms26:7 taaki mera dhanyavad unche shabd se karoo," 
Psalms26:8 aur tere sab ashcharyakarmon ka varnn karoon.. he yahova, maain tere dhaam se teree mahima ke nivasasthan se praeeati rakhta hoon." 
Psalms26:9 mere praan ko paapiyon ke sat, aur mere jeevan ko hatyaron ke sath n mila." 
Psalms26:10 ve to ochhapan karane men lage rahate haai, aur unaka dahina hath ghoos se bhra rahata haai.." 
Psalms26:11 parantu maain to khrai se chalata rahoonga. too mujhe chhuda le, aur mujh par anugrah kara." 
Psalms26:12 mere panv chauras sthan men sthiar haai sabhaon men maain yahova ko dhany kaha karoonga.. 
Psalms27:1 yahova parameshvar meree jyoti aur mera uddhar haai maain kis se droon? yahova mere jeevan ka draddh gaddh tthara haai, maain kis ka bhy khaun?" 
Psalms27:2 jab kukarmiyon ne jo mujhe satate aur mujhee se baair rakhte the, mujhe kha dalane ke liye mujh par chaddhai kee, tab ve hee ttokar khakar gir paden.." 
Psalms27:3 chahe sena bhee mere virooddh chhavanee dale, taubhee maain n droonga chahe mere virooddh ladai ttn jaa, us dasha men bhee maain hiyav bandho nishiichat rahoonga.." 
Psalms27:4 aek var maain ne yahova se manga haai, usee ke yatn men laga rahoonga ki maain jeevan bhr yahova ke bhvan men rahane pau, jis se yahova kee manoharata par drashtti lagaae rahoo, aur usake mandair men dhyan kiya karoon.." 
Psalms27:5 kyonaki vah to mujhe vipaati ke din men apane mandp men chhpai rakhega apane tamboo ke guptasthan men vah mujhe chhpai lega, aur chattan par chaddhaaega." 
Psalms27:6 ab mera sir mere charon or ke shatrauon se uncha hoga aur maain yahova ke tamboo men jayajayakar ke sath baalidan chaddhaunga aur usaka bhjan gaunga.. 
Psalms27:7 he yahova, mera shabd sun, maain pukarata hoo, too mujh par anugrah kar aur mujhe uttr de." 
Psalms27:8 too ne kaha haai, ki mere darshan ke khojee ho. isaliye mera man tujh se kahata haai, ki he yahova, tere darshan ka maain khojee rahoonga." 
Psalms27:9 apana mukh mujh se n chhpaia.. apane das ko krodha karake n hatta, too mera sahayak bana haai. he mere uddhar karanevale parameshvar mujhe tyag n de, aur mujhe chhod n de!" 
Psalms27:10 mere mata pita ne to mujhe chhod diya haai, parantu yahova mujhe sambhal lega.." 
Psalms27:11 he yahova, apane marga men meree aguvai kar, aur mere drohiyon ke karan mun ko chauras raste par le chala." 
Psalms27:12 mujh ko mere satanevalon kee ichchha par n chhod, kyonki jootte sakshaee jo upadrav karane kee dhaun men haain mere virooddh utte haain.." 
Psalms27:13 yaadi mujhe vishvas n hota ki jeeviton kee prathvee par yahova kee bhlai ko dekoonga, to maain moochchhit ho jata." 
Psalms27:14 yahova kee batt johata raha hiyav bandha aur tera day draddh rahe ha, yahova hee kee batt johata raha!" 
Psalms28:1 he yahova, maain tujhee ko pukaroonga he meree chattan, meree sunee anasunee n kar, aeesa n ho ki tere chup rahane se maain kabra men pade huon ke saman ho jaun jo patal men chale jate haain." 
Psalms28:2 jab maain teree dohai doo, aur tere paavitrasthan kee bheetaree kottree kee or apane hath uttau, tab meree gidgidahatt kee bat sun le." 
Psalms28:3 un dushtton aur anarthkariyon ke sang mujhe n ghaseett jo apane padosiyon se baten to mel kee bolate haain parantu day men burai rakhte haain. 
Psalms28:4 unake kamon ke aur unakee karanee kee burai ke anusar un se bartav kar, unake hathon ke kam ke anusar unhen badala de unake kamon ka palatta unhen de." 
Psalms28:5 ve yahova ke kamon par aur usake hai ke kamon par dhyan naheen karate, isaliye vah unhen pachhadega aur fir n uttaaega.." 
Psalms28:6 yahova dhany haai kyonaki us ne meree gidgidahatt ko suna haai. 
Psalms28:7 yahova mera bal aur meree ddhal haai us par bhrosa rakhne se mere man ko sahayata milee haai isaaliye mera day prafaullait haai aur maain geet gakar usaka dhanyavad karoonga. 
Psalms28:8 yahova unaka bal haai, vah apane abhaishaikt ke liye uddhar ka draddh gaddh haai." 
Psalms28:9 he yahova apanee praja ka uddhar kar, aur apane nij bhag ke logon ko ashaeesh de aur unakee charavahee kar aur sadaaiv unhen sambhale raha.." 
Psalms29:1 he parameshvar ke putraen yahova ka, han yahova kee ka gunanuvad karo, yahova kee maahima aur samarth ko saraho." 
Psalms29:2 yahova ke nam kee maahima karo pavitrata se shaebhayaman hokar yahova ko dandvata karo. 
Psalms29:3 yahova kee vanee meghaen ke upar sun padtee haai pratamee ishvar garajata haai, yahova ghane meghaen ke upar rahata haai." 
Psalms29:4 yahova kee vanee shaktaishaalee haai, yahova kee vanee pratapamay haai." 
Psalms29:5 yahova kee vanee devadaron ko tod dalatee haai yahova labanon ke devadaron ko bhee tod dalata haai. 
Psalms29:6 vah unhen bachhde kee nai aur labanon aur shairyon ko jangalee bachhde ke saman uchhalata haai.. 
Psalms29:7 yahova kee vanee ag kee lapatton ko cheeratee haai. 
Psalms29:8 yahova kee vanee van ko hila detee haai, yahova kadesh ke van ko bhee kanpata haai.." 
Psalms29:9 yahova kee vanee se harinaiyon ka garbhpat ho jata haai. aur arany men patajhd hotee haai aur usake mandair men sab koi maahima hee maahima bolata rahata haai.. 
Psalms29:10 jalapralay ke samay yahova virajaman tha aur yahova sarvada ke liye raja hokar virajaman rahata haai.

Psalms30:1 he yahova maain tujhe sarahoonga, kyonki too ne mujhe kheenchakar nikala haai, aur mere shatrauon ko mujh par anand karane naheen diya." 
Psalms30:2 he mere parameshvar yahova, maain ne teree dohai dee aur too ne mujhe changa kiya haai." 
Psalms30:3 he yahova, too ne mera praan adhaelok men se nikala haai, too ne mujh ko jeeavit rakha aur kabra men padne se bachaya haai.."

Psalms30:5 kyonaki usaka krodha, to kshan bhr ka hota haai, parantu usakee prasannata jeevan bhr kee hotee haai. kadaachita rat ko rona pade, parantu sabere anand pahunchega.." 
Psalms30:6 maain ne to chaain ke samay kaha tha, ki maain kabhee naheen ttlane ka."

Psalms31:1 he yahova mera bhrosa tujh par haai mujhe kabhee laajjait hona n pade too apane dharmee hone ke karan mujhai chhuda le! 
Psalms31:2 apana kan meree or lagakar turant mujhe chhuda le! 
Psalms31:3 kyonaki too ne mere liye chattan aur mera gaddh haai isaliye apane nam ke nimitt meree aguvai kar, aur mujhe age le chala." 
Psalms31:4 jo jal unhon ne mere liye bichhaya haai us se too mujh ko chhuda le, kyonki too hee mera draddh gaddh haai." 
Psalms31:5 maain apanee atma ko tere hee hath men saunp deta hoon he yahova, he satyavadee ishvar, too ne mujhe mol lekar mukt kiya haai.." 
Psalms31:6 jo vyarth vastuon par man lagate haai, un se maain gharana karata hoon parantu mera bhrosa yahova hee par haai." 
Psalms31:7 maain teree karoona se magan aur anaandait hoo, kyonki too ne mere du:kh par drashtti kee haai, mere kashtt ke samay too ne meree suadhai lee haai," 
Psalms31:8 aur too ne mujhe shatra ke hath men padne naheen diya too ne mere panvon ko chaude sthan men khda kiya haai.. 
Psalms31:9 he yahova, mujh par anugrah kar kyonaki maain sankatt men hoon meree ankhe varan mera praan aur shareer sab shaek ke mare ghaule jate haain." 
Psalms31:10 mera jeevan shaek ke mare aur meree avastha karahate karahate ghatt chalee haai mera bal mere adharma ke karan jata rah, or meree haaddiyan ghaul gai.." 
Psalms31:11 apane sab virodhaiyon ke karan mere padosiyon men meree namadharai hui haai, apane janapahichanavalon ke liye dr ka karan hoon jo mujh ko sadk par dekhte haai vah mujh se door bhag jate haain." 
Psalms31:12 maain mratak kee nai logon ke man se bisar gaya maain tootte basan ke saman ho gaya hoon.

Psalms31:14 parantu he yahova maain ne to tujhee par bhrosa rakha haai, maain ne kaha, too mera parameshvar haai." 
Psalms31:15 mere din tere hath men haai too mujhe mere shatrauon aur mere satanevalon ke hath se chhuda. 
Psalms31:16 apane das par apane munh ka prakash chamaka apanee karoona se mera uddhar kara.. 
Psalms31:17 he yahova, mujhe lajjait n hone de kyonki maain ne tujh ko pukara haai dushtt laajjait hon aur ve patal men chupachap pade rahen." 
Psalms31:18 jo anhakar aur apaman se dharmee kee ninda karate haai, unake joott bolanevale munh band kiae jaaen.." 
Psalms31:19 aha, teree bhlai kya hee badee haai jo too ne apane dravaaiyon ke liye rakh chhodee haai, aur apane sharanagaton ke liye manushyon ke samhane pragatt bhee kee haai!" 
Psalms31:20 too unhen darshan dene ke guptasthan men manushyon kee buree goshttee se gupt rakhega too unako apane mandp men jhgade-ragade se chhpai rakhega.. 
Psalms31:21 yahova dhany haai, kyonaki us ne mujhe gaddhvale nagar men rakhkar mujh par addhbhut karoona kee haai."

Psalms33:1 he dhaarmiyon yahova ke karan jayajayakar karo kyonnki dharmee logon ko stuati karanee sohatee haai.

Psalms33:3 usake liye naya geet gao, jayajayakar ke sath bhlee bhanati bajao.." 
Psalms33:4 kyonaki yahova ka vachan seedha haai aur usaka sab kam sachchai se hota haai. 
Psalms33:5 vah dharma aur nyay se praeeti rakhta haai yahova kee karoona se prathvee bhrapoor haai.. 
Psalms33:6 akashamandl yahova ke vachan se, aur usake sare gan usake munh hee shvas se bane."

Psalms33:10 yahova anyajayien kee yuaktai ko vyarth kar deta haai vah desh desh ke logon kee kalpanaon ko nishfal karata haai. 
Psalms33:11 yahova kee yuaktai sarvada sthiar rahegee, usake man kee kalpanaaen peeddhee se peeddhee tak banee rahengee." 
Psalms33:12 kya hee dhany haai vah jaati jisaka parameshvar yahova haai, aur vah samaj jise us ne apana nij bhag hone ke liye chun liya ho!" 
Psalms33:13 yahova svarga se draashtti karata haai, vah sab manushyon ko niharata haai"

Psalms33:15 vahee jo un sabhon ke dayon ko gaddhta, aur unake sab kamon ka vichar karata haai." 
Psalms33:16 koi aeesa raja nahee, jo sena kee bahutayat ke karan bach sake veer apanee badee shaktai ke karan choott naheen jata." 
Psalms33:17 bach nikalane ke liye ghaeda vyarth haai, vah apane bade bal ke dara kisee ko naheen bacha sakata haai.."

Psalms33:19 ki vah unake praan ko mratyu se bachaa, aur akal ke samay unako jeevit rakhe.."

Psalms34:1 maain har samay yahova ko dhany kaha karoonga usakee stuati nirantar mere mukh se hotee rahegee. 
Psalms34:2 maain yahova par ghamand karoonga namra log yah sunakar anaandait honge. 
Psalms34:3 mere sath yahova kee badai karo, aur ao ham milakar usake nam kee stuati karen." 
Psalms34:4 maain yahova ke pas gaya, tab us ne meree sun lee, aur mujhe pooree reeati se nirbhy kiya." 
Psalms34:5 jinhon ne usakee or drashtti kee unhon ne jyoti pai aur unaka munh kabhee kala n hone paya. 
Psalms34:6 is deen jan ne pukara tab yahova ne sun liya, aur usako usake sab kashtton se chhuda liya.." 
Psalms34:7 yahova ke dravaaiyon ke charon or usaka doot chhavanee kiae huae unako bachata haai. 
Psalms34:8 parakhkar dekho ki yahova kaaisa bhla haai! kya hee dhany haai vah puroosh jo usakee sharan leta haai. 
Psalms34:9 rahe yahova ke pavitra logo, usaka bhy mano, kyonaki usake dravaaiyon ko kisee bat kee ghattee naheen hotee!"

Psalms34:11 he ladko, ao, meree suno, maain tum ko yahova ka bhy manana sikhaunga." 
Psalms34:12 vah kaun manushy haai jo jeevan kee ichchha rakhta, aur deegharayu chahata haai taaki bhlai dekhe?" 
Psalms34:13 apanee jeebh ko burai se rok rak, aur apane munh kee chaukasee kar ki us se chhl kee bat n nikale." 
Psalms34:14 burai ko chhod aur bhlai kara mel ko ddoonddh aur usee ka peechha kara.. 
Psalms34:15 yahova kee ankhe dhaarmiyon par lagee rahatee haai, aur usake kan bhee usakee dohai kee or lage rahate haain."

Psalms34:17 dharmee dohai dete haain aur yahova sunata haai, aur unako sab vipaatiayon se chhudata haai."

Psalms34:19 dharmee par bahut see vipaatiayan padtee to haai, parant yahova usako un sab se mukt karata haai." 
Psalms34:20 vah usakee haddee haddee kee raksha karata haai aur un men se aek bhee toottne naheen patee. 
Psalms34:21 dushtt apanee burai ke dara mara jaaega aur dharmee ke baairee doshaee ttharenge. 
Psalms34:22 yahova apane dason ka praan mol lekar bacha leta haai aur jitane usake sharanagat haain un men se koi bhee doshaee n ttharega.. 
Psalms35:1 he yahova jo mere sath mukama ladte haai, unake sath too bhee mukama lad jo mujh se yud karate haai, un se too yud kara." 
Psalms35:2 ddhal aur bhala lekar meree sahayata karane ko khda ho. 
Psalms35:3 barchhee ko kheench aur mera peechha karanevalon ke samhane akar unako roka aur mujh se kah, ki maain tera udar hoon.." 
Psalms35:4 jo mere praan ke graahak haain ve lajjait aur niradar hon! jo meree hati kee kalpana karate haai, vah peechhe hattaae jaaen aur unaka munh kala ho!" 
Psalms35:5 ve vayu se ud janevalee boosee ke saman ho, aur yahova ka doot unhen hankata jaae!" 
Psalms35:6 unaka marga andhiayara aur fisalaha ho, aur yahova ka doot unako khdedta jae.." 
Psalms35:7 kyonaki akaran unhon ne mere liye apana jal gadhe men bichhaya akaran hee unhon ne mera praan lene ke liye gadha khoda haai. 
Psalms35:8 achanak un par vipaati a pade! aur jo jal unhon ne bichhaya haai usee men ve ap hee fanse aur usee vipaati men ve ap hee paden! 
Psalms35:9 parantu maain yahova ke karan apane man men magan hounga, maain usake kiae huae udar se hashairt hounga." 
Psalms35:10 meree haddee haddee kahengee, he yahova tere tuly kaun haai, jo dee ko bade bade balavanton se bachata haai, aur lutteron se deen daaridr logon kee raksha karata haai?" 
Psalms35:11 jootte sakshaee khde hote haain aur jo bat maain naheen janata, vahee mujh se poochhte haain." 
Psalms35:12 ve mujh se bhlai ke badale burai karate haain yahan tak ki mera praan ub jata haai. 
Psalms35:13 jab ve rogee the tab to maain ttatt paahine raha, aur upavas kar karake du:kh uttata raha aur meree praarthna ka fal meree god men lautt aya." 
Psalms35:14 maain aeesa bhav rakhta tha ki mano ve mere sangee va bhai haain jaaisa koi mata ke liye vilap karata ho, vaaisa hee maain ne shaek ka paahirava pahine huae sir jhukakar shaek kiya.." 
Psalms35:15 parantu jab maain langadane laga tab ve log anandait hokar ikatthe hua, neech log aur jinhen maain janata bhee n tha ve mere virood ikatthe huae ve mujhe lagatar faadte rahe" 
Psalms35:16 un pakhndee bhandon kee nai jo pett ke liye upahas karate haai, ve bhee mujh par dant peesate haain.." 
Psalms35:17 he prabhu too kab tak dekhta rahega? is vipaati se, jis men unhon ne mujhe dala haai mujh ko chhuda! javan sihon se mere praan ko bacha le!" 
Psalms35:18 maain badee sabha men tera dhanyavad karoonga bahutere logon ke beech men teree stuti karoonga.. 
Psalms35:19 mere joott bolanevale shatra mere virood anand n karane paae, jo akaran mere baairee haai, ve apas men naain se saain n karane panae." 
Psalms35:20 kyonaki ve mel kee baten naheen bolate, parantu desh men jo chupachap rahate haai, unake virood chhl kee kalpanaaen karate haain." 
Psalms35:21 aur unhon ne mere virood munh pasarake kaha aha, aha, ham ne apanee ankhon se dekha haai!" 
Psalms35:22 he yahova, too ne to dekha haai chup n raha! he prabhu, mujh se door n raha!" 
Psalms35:23 ut, mere nyay ke liye jag, he mere parameshvar, he mere prabhu, mere mukama nipattane ke liye a!" 
Psalms35:24 he mere parameshvar yahova, too apane dharma ke anusar mera nyay chuka oshra unhen mere virood anand karane n de!" 
Psalms35:25 ve man men n kahane paae, ki aha! hamaree to ichchha pooree hui! vah yah n kahen ki ham use nigal gaae haain.." 
Psalms35:26 jo meree hati se anaandait hote haain unake munh lajja ke mare aek sath kale hon! jo mere virooddh badai marate haain vah lajja aur anadar se ddhnp jaaen! 
Psalms35:27 jo mere dharma se prasann rahate haai, vah jayajayakar aur anand kare, aur nirantar karate rahe, yahova kee badai ho, jo apane das ke kushal se prasann hota haai!" 
Psalms35:28 tab mere munh se tere dharma kee charcha hogee, aur din bhr teree stuti nikalegee.." 
Psalms36:1 dushtt jan ka aparan mere day ke bheetar yah kahata haai ki parameshvar ka bhy usakee drashtti men naheen haai. 
Psalms36:2 vah apane adharma ke pragatt hone aur gharanait ttharane ke vishay apane man men chikanee chupadee baten vicharata haai. 
Psalms36:3 usakee baten anarth aur chhl kee haain us ne buddh iddh aur bhlai ke kam karane se hath uttaya haai. 
Psalms36:4 vah apane bichhaune par pade pade anarth kee kalpana karata haai vah apane kumarga par draddhta se bana rahata haai burai se vah hath naheen uttata.. 
Psalms36:5 he yahova teree karoona svarga men haai, teree sachchai akashamandl tak pahunchee haai." 
Psalms36:6 tera dharma unche parvaton ke saman haai, tere niyam athah sagar tthare haain he yahova too manushy aur pashu donon kee raksha karata haai.." 
Psalms36:7 he parameshvar teree karoona, kaaisee anamol haai! manushy tere pankho ke tale sharan lete haain." 
Psalms36:8 ve tere bhvan ke chikane bhojan se trapt honge, aur too apanee sukh kee nadee men se unhen pilaaega." 
Psalms36:9 kyonaki jeevan ka sota tere hee pas haai tere prakash ke dara ham prakash paaenge..

Psalms37:1 kukarmiyon ke karan mat kuddh, kuttlai kam karanevalon ke vishay dah n kara!" 
Psalms37:2 kyonaki ve ghaas kee nai jhtt katt jaaenge, aur haree ghaas kee nai murjha jaaenge." 
Psalms37:3 yahova par bhrosa rak, aur bhla kara desh men basa rah, aur sachchai men man lagaae raha." 
Psalms37:4 yahova ko apane sukh ka mool jan, aur vah tere manorathon ko moora karega.." 
Psalms37:5 apane marga kee chinta yahova par chhod aur us par bhrosa rak, vahee poora karega." 
Psalms37:6 aur vah tera dharma jyoti kee nai, aur tera nyay dopahar ke ujiyale kee nai pragatt karega.." 
Psalms37:7 yahova ke samhane chupachap rah, aur dhaeeraj se usaka astra rakh us manushy ke karan n kuddh, jisake kam sufal hote haai, aur vah kuree yuaktaiyon ko nikalata haai!" 
Psalms37:8 krodha se pare rah, aur jalajalahatt ko chhod de! mat kuddh, us se burai hee nikalegee."

Psalms37:10 thode din ke beetane par dushtt rahega hee naheen aur too usake sthan ko bhleen bhanti dekhne par bhee usako n paaega. 
Psalms37:11 parantu namra log prathvee ke aadhaikaree honge, aur badee shaaantai ke karan anand manaaenge." 
Psalms37:12 dushtt dharmee ke virooddh buree yuktai nikalata haai, aur us par dant peesata haai" 
Psalms37:13 parantu prabhu us par hansega, kyonki vah dekhta haai ki usaka din anevala haai.." 
Psalms37:14 dushtt log talavar kheenche aur dhanush baddhaae huae haai, taki deen daridr ko gira de, aur seedhaee chal chalanevalon ko vadha karen." 
Psalms37:15 unakee talavaron se unheen ke day chhdaienge, aur unake dhanush tode jaenge.." 
Psalms37:16 dharmee ko thoda se mal dushtton ke bahut se dhan se uttm haai. 
Psalms37:17 kyonaki dushtton kee bhujaaen to todee jaaengee parantu yahova dharmiyon ko sambhalata haai.. 
Psalms37:18 yahova khre logon kee ayu kee sudhai rakhta haai, aur unaka bhag sadaaiv bana rahega." 
Psalms37:19 vipaati ke samay, unakee asha n toottegee aur n ve lajjait honge, aur akal ke dinon men ve trapt rahenge.." 
Psalms37:20 dushtt log nash ho jaaenge aur yahova ke shatra khet kee suthree ghaas kee nai nash honge, ve dhooaen kee nai bilay jaaenge.." 
Psalms37:21 dushtt ren leta haai, aur bhrata naheen paranatu dharmeen anugrah karake dan deta haai" 
Psalms37:22 kyonkai jo us se ashaeesh pate haain ve to prathvee ke aadhaikaree honge, parantu jo us se shaapit hote haai, ve nash ko jaaenge.." 
Psalms37:23 manushy kee gaati yahova kee or se draddh hotee haai, aur usake chalan se vah prasann rahata haai" 
Psalms37:24 chahe vah gire taubhee pada n rah jaaega, kyonki yahova usaka hath thanbhe rahata haai.." 
Psalms37:25 maain ladkapan se lekar buddhape tak dekhta aya hoon parantu n to kabhee dharmee ko tyaga hua, aur n usake vansh ko ttukade mangate dekha haai." 
Psalms37:26 vah to din bhr anugrah kar karake ren deta haai, aur usake vansh par ashaeesh falatee rahatee haai.." 
Psalms37:27 burai ko chhod bhlai kara aur too sarvada bana rahega. 
Psalms37:28 kyonaki yahova nyay se praeeti rakhta aur apane bhkton ko n tajega. unakee to raksha sada hotee haai, parantu dushtton ka vansh katt dala jaaega." 
Psalms37:29 dharmee log prathvee ke adhaikaree honge, aur us men sada base rahenge.." 
Psalms37:30 dharmee apane munh se buaddh ikee baten karata, aur nyay ka vachan kahata haai."

Psalms37:32 dushtt dharmee kee tak men rahata haai. aur usake mar dalane ka yatn karata haai. 
Psalms37:33 yahova usako usake hath men n chhodega, aur jab usaka vichar kiya jaae tab vah use doshaee n ttharaaega.." 
Psalms37:34 yahova kee batt johata rah, aur usake marga par bana rah, aur vah tujhe baddhakar prathvee ka aadhaikaree kar dega jab dushtt katt dale jaaenge, tab too dekhega.."

Psalms37:40 aur yahova unakee sahayata karake unako bachata haai vah unako dushtton se chhudakar unaka udar karata haai, isaaliye ki unhon ne us men apanee sharan lee haai.."

Psalms38:3 tere krodha ke karan mere shareer men kuchh bhee arogyata naheen aur mere pap ke karan meree haaddiyon men kuchh bhee chaain naheen.

Psalms39:1 maain ne kaha, maain apanee chalachalan men chaukasee karoonga, taki meree jeebh se pap n ho jab tak dushtt mere samhane haai, tab tak maain lagam lagaae apana munh band kiae rahoonga."

Psalms42:2 jeevate ishvar parameshvar ka maain pyasa hoo, maain kab jakar parameshvar ko apana munh dikhaunga?" 
Psalms42:3 mere ansoo din aur rat mera ahar huae haain aur log din bhr mujh se kahate rahate haai, tera parameshvar kahan haai?" 
Psalms42:4 maain bheed ke sang jaya karata tha, maain jayajayakar aur dhanyavad ke sath utsav karanevalee bheed ke beech men parameshvar ke bhvan ko dhaeere dhaeere jaya karata tha yah smaran karake mera praan shaeakit ho jata haai." 
Psalms42:5 he mere praa, too kyon gira jata haai? aur too andar hee andar kyon vyakul haai? parameshvar par asha lagaae raha kyonaki maain usake darshan se uddhar pakar fir usaka dhanyavad karoonga.." 
Psalms42:6 he mere parameshvara mera praan mere bheetar gira jata haai, isaliye maain yardan ke pas ke desh se aur harmon ke pahadon aur misagar kee pahadee ke upar se tujhe smaran karata hoon."
