Psalms42:9 maain ishvar se jo meree chattan haai kahoonga, too mujhe kyon bool gaya? maain shatra ke andhor ke mare kyon shaek ka paahirava pahine huae chalata firata hoon?" 
Psalms42:10 mere satanevale jo meree ninda karate haain mano us men meree haaddiyan choor choor hotee haai, mano kattar se chhdaiee jatee haai, kyonki ve din bhr mujh se kahate rahate haai, tera parameshvar kahan haai?" 
Psalms42:11 he mere praan too kyon gira jata haai? too andar hee andar kyon vyakul haai? parameshvar par bhrosa rakh kyonki vah mere mukh kee chamak aur mera parameshvar haai, maain fir usaka dhanyavad karoonga.." 
Psalms43:1 he parameshvar, mera nyay chuka aur vidharmee jati se mera mukama lad mujh ko chhlee aur kuattlai puroosh se bacha." 
Psalms43:2 kyonaki he parameshvar, too hee meree sharan haai, too ne kyon mujhe tyag diya haai? maain shatra ke andhor ke mare shaek ka pahirava pahine huae kyon firata rahoon?" 
Psalms43:3 apane prakash aur apanee sachchai ko bheja ve meree aguvai kare, ve hee mujh ko tere paavitra parvat par aur tere nivas sthan men pahunchaae!" 
Psalms43:4 tab maain parameshvar kee vedee ke pas jaunga, us ishvar ke pas jo mere aati anand ka kund haai aur he parameshvar, he mere parameshvar maain veena baja bajakar tera dhanyavad karoonga.." 
Psalms43:5 he mere praan too kyon gira jata haai? too andar hee andar kyon vyakul haai? parameshvar par bhrosa rak, kyonki vah mere mukh kee chamak aur mera parameshvar haai maain fir usaka dhanyavad karoonga.." 
Psalms44:1 he parameshvar ham ne apane kanon se suna, hamare bapadadon ne ham se varnn kiya haai, ki too ne unake dinon men aur praacheenakal men kya kya kam kiae haain." 
Psalms44:2 too ne apane hath se jaatiyon ko nikal diya, aur inako basaya too ne desh desh ke logon ko du:kh diya, aur inako charon or faaila diya" 
Psalms44:3 kyonaki ve n to apanee talavar ke bal se is desh ke adhaikaree hua, aur n apane bahubal se parantu tere daahine hath aur teree bhuja aur tere prasann mukh ke karan jayavant huae kyonaki too unako chahata tha.." 
Psalms44:4 he parameshvar, too hee hamara maharaja haai, too yakoob ke uddhar kee agyaa deta haai." 
Psalms44:5 tere sahare se ham apane drohiyon ko ddhkelakar gira denge tere nam ke pratap se ham apane virodhaiyon ko raundenge. 
Psalms44:6 kyonaki maain apane dhanush par bhrosa n rakoonga, aur n apanee talavar ke bal se bachaoonga." 
Psalms44:7 parantu too hee ne ham ko drohiyon se bachaya haai, aur hamare baaiariyon ko nirash aur lajjait kiya haai." 
Psalms44:8 ham parameshvar kee badai din bhr karate rahate haai, aur sadaaiv tere nam ka dhanyavad karate rahenge.." 
Psalms44:9 taubhee too ne ab ham ko tyag diya aur hamara anadar kiya haai, aur hamare dalon ke sath age naheen jata." 
Psalms44:10 too ham ko shatra ke samhane se hatta deta haai, aur hamare baairee manamane loott mar karate haain." 
Psalms44:11 too ne hamen kasai kee bhedon ke saman kar diya haai, aur ham ko any jaatiyon men tittr bittr kiya haai." 
Psalms44:12 too apanee praja ko sentament bech dalata haai, parantu unake mol se too dhanee naheen hota.." 
Psalms44:13 too hamare padosiyon se hamaree namadharai karata haai, aur hamare charon or se rahanevale ham se hansee ttttha karate haain." 
Psalms44:14 too ham ko anyajatiyon ke beech men upama ttharata haai, aur desh desh ke leag hamare karan sir hilate haain. din bhr hamen tiraskar sahana padta haai," 
Psalms44:15 aur kalank lagane aur ninda karanevale ke bol se," 
Psalms44:16 aur shatra aur badala lenevalon ke kara, bura-bhla kahanevalon aur ninda karanevalon ke karan." 
Psalms44:17 yah sab kuchh ham par beeta taubhee ham tujhe naheen boole, n teree vacha ke vishay vishvasaghaat kiya haai." 
Psalms44:18 hamare man n bahake, n hamare paair taree batt se mude" 
Psalms44:19 taubhee too ne hamen geedadon ke sthan men pees dala, aur ham ko ghaer andhakar men chhpai diya haai.." 
Psalms44:20 yaadi ham apane parameshvar ka nam bool jate, va kisee paraae devata kee or apane hath faailate," 
Psalms44:21 to kya parameshvar isaka vichar n karata? kyonki vah to man kee gupt baton ko janata haai. 
Psalms44:22 parantu ham din bhr tere nimitt mar dale jate haai, aur un bhedon ke saman samajhe jate haain jo vadha hone par haain.." 
Psalms44:23 he prabhu, jaga! too kyon sota haai? utt! ham ko sada ke liye tyag n de!" 
Psalms44:24 too kyon apana munh chhpai leta haai? aur hamara du:kh aur sataya jana bool jata haai? 
Psalms44:25 hamara praan mittee se lag gaya hamara pett boomi se satt gaya haai. 
Psalms44:26 hamaree sahayata ke liye utt khda ho! aur apanee karoona ke nimitt ham ko chhuda le.. 
Psalms45:1 mera day aek sundar vishay kee umang se umand raha haai, jo bat maain ne raja ke vishay rachee haai usako sunata hoon meree jeebh nipun lekhk kee lekhnee banee haai." 
Psalms45:2 too manushy kee santanon men param sundar haai tere otton men anugrah bhra hua haai isaliye parameshvar ne tujhe sada ke liye ashaeesh dee haai. 
Psalms45:3 he veer, too apanee talavar ko jo tera vibhv aur pratap haai apanee katt ipar bandha!" 
Psalms45:4 satyata, namrata aur dharma ke nimitt apane aeeshvarya aur pratap par safalata se savar ho tera daahina hath tujhe bhyanak kam sikhlaae!" 
Psalms45:5 tere teer to tej haai, tere samhane desh desh ke log girenge raja ke shatrauon ke day un se chhdaienge.." 
Psalms45:6 he parameshvar, tera sinhasan sada sarvada bana rahega tera rajadand nyay ka haai." 
Psalms45:7 too ne dharma se praeeati aur dushttta se baair rakha haai. is karan parameshvar ne han tere parameshvar ne tujh ko tere saathaiyon se aadhaik harsha ke tel se aabhaishok kiya haai. 
Psalms45:8 tere sare vasr, gandharas, agar, aur tel se sugaandhiat haai, too hatheedant ke maandairon men taravale bajon ke karan anaandait hua haai." 
Psalms45:9 teree pratishttit striayon men rajakumaariyan bhee haain teree dahinee or pattranee, opeer ke kundan se vibooshait khdee haai.." 
Psalms45:10 he rajakumaree sun, aur kan lagakar dhyan de apane logon aur apane pita ke ghar ko bool ja" 
Psalms45:11 aur raja tere roop kee chah karega. kyonaki vah to tera prabhu haai, too use dandvata kara." 
Psalms45:12 sor kee rajakumaree bhee bhentt karane ke liye upasthiat hogee, praja ke dhanavan log tujhe prasann karane ka yatn karenge.." 
Psalms45:13 rajakumaree mahal men ati shaebhayaman haai, usake vasr men sunahale bootte kaddhe huae haain" 
Psalms45:14 vah boottedar vasr paahine huae raja ke pas pahunchai jaaegee. jo kumaariyan usakee saheliyan haai, ve usake peechhe peechhe chalatee hui tere pas pahunchai jaaengee." 
Psalms45:15 ve anandait aur magan hokar pahunchai jaaengee, aur ve raja ke mahal men pravesh karengee.." 
Psalms45:16 tere pitaron ke sthan par tere putra honge jinako too saree prathvee par haakim ttharaaega. 
Psalms45:17 maain aeesa karoonga, ki teree nam kee charcha peeddhee se peeddhee tak hotee rahegee is karan desh desh ke log sada sarvada tera dhanyavad karate rahenge.." 
Psalms46:1 parameshvar hamara sharansthan aur bal haai, sankatt men ati sahaj se milanevala sahayaka." 
Psalms46:2 is karan ham ko koi bhy naheen chahe prathvee ulatt jaa, aur pahad samudr ke beech men dal diae jaaen" 
Psalms46:3 chahe samudr garaje aur faen uttaa, aur pahad usakee baddh se kanp utte.." 
Psalms46:4 aek nadee haai jisakee naharon se parameshvar ke nagar men arthata paramapradhaan ke pavitra nivas bhvan men anand hota haai. 
Psalms46:5 parameshvar us nagar ke beech men haai, vah kabhee ttlane ka naheen pau fattte hee parameshvar usakee sahayata karata haai." 
Psalms46:6 jaati jati ke log jhlla utte, rajy rajy ke log dgamagane lage vah bol utta, aur prathvee pighal gai." 
Psalms46:7 senaon ka yahova hamare sange haai yakoob ka parameshvar hamara uncha gaddh haai.. 
Psalms46:8 ao, yahova ke mahakarma dekho, ki us ne prathvee par kaaisa kaaisa ujad kiya haai." 
Psalms46:9 vah prathvee kee chhor tak ladaiyon ko mittata haai vah dhanush ko todta, aur bhale ko do ttukade kar dalata haai, aur rathon ko ag men jhonk deta haai!" 
Psalms46:10 chup ho jao, aur jan lo, ki maain hee parameshvar hoon. maain jatiyon men mahana hoo, maain prathvee bhr men mahana hoon!" 
Psalms46:11 senaon ka yahova hamare sang haai yakoob ka parameshvar hamara uncha gaddh haai.. 
Psalms47:1 he desh desh ke sab logo, taliyon bajao! unche shabd se parameshvar ke liye jayajayakar karo!" 
Psalms47:2 kyonaki yahova paramapradhaan aur bhyayogy haai, vah saree prathvee ke upar maharaja haai." 
Psalms47:3 vah desh ke logon ko hamare sammukh neecha karata, aur anyajaatiyon ko hamare panvon ke neeche kar deta haai." 
Psalms47:4 vah hamare liye uttm bhag chun lega, jo usake piry yakoob ke ghamand ka karan haai.." 
Psalms47:5 parameshvar jayajayakar saahit, yahova narasinge ke shabd ke sath upar gaya haai." 
Psalms47:6 parameshvar ka bhjan gao, bhjan gao! hamare maharaja ka bhjan gao, bhjan gao!" 
Psalms47:7 kyeanki parameshvar saree praathvaiee ka maharaja haai samajh boojhkar buddh ise bhjan gao 
Psalms47:8 parameshvar jaati jati par rajy karata haai parameshvar apane pavitra sinhasan par virajaman haai. 
Psalms47:9 rajy rajy ke rais ibraaheem ke parameshvar kee praja hone ke liye ikatthe huae haain. kyonki prathvee kee ddhalen parameshvar ke vash men haai, vah to shairomanai haai!" 
Psalms48:1 hamare parameshvar ke nagar me, aur apane pavitra parvat par yahova mahana aur ati stuati ke yogy haai!" 
Psalms48:2 siyyon parvat unchai men sundar aur saree prathvee ke harsha ka karan haai, rajaadhairaj ka nagar uttreey sire par haai." 
Psalms48:3 usake mahalon men parameshvar uncha gaddh mana gaya haai. 
Psalms48:4 kyonaki dekho, raja log ikatthe hua, ve aek sang age baddh gaae." 
Psalms48:5 unhon ne ap hee dekha aur dekhte hee vismait hua, ve ghabarakar bhag gae." 
Psalms48:6 vahan kapakapee ne unako a pakada, aur jachcha kee see peedaaen unhen hone lageen." 
Psalms48:7 too poorvee vayu se tashareesh ke jahajon ko tod dalata haai. 
Psalms48:8 senaon ke yahova ke nagar me, apane parameshvar ke nagar me, jaaisa ham ne suna tha, vaaisa dekha bhee haai parameshvar usako sada draddh aur sthiar rakhega.." 
Psalms48:9 he parameshvar ham ne tere mandair ke bheetar teree karoona par dhyan kiya haai. 
Psalms48:10 he parameshvar tere nam ke yogy teree stuati prathvee kee chhor tak hotee haai. tera daahina hath dharma se bhra haai 
Psalms48:11 tere nyay ke kamon ke karan siyyon parvat anand kare, aur yahooda ke nagar kee putraiyan magan hon!" 
Psalms48:12 siyyon ke charon or chalo, aur usakee parikrama karo, usake gummatton ko gin lo," 
Psalms48:13 usakee shaharapanah par draashtti lagao, usake mahalon ko dhyan se dekho jis se ki tum anevalee peeddhee ke logon se is bat ka varnn kar sako." 
Psalms48:14 kyonaki vah parameshvar sada sarvada hamara parameshvar haai, vah mratyu tak hamaree aguvai karega.." 
Psalms49:1 he desh desh ke sab logon yah suno! he sansar ke sab nivaasiyo, kan lagao!" 
Psalms49:2 kya unch, kya neech kya dhanee, kya daridr, kan lagao!" 
Psalms49:3 mere munh se buaddh ikee baten nikalengee aur mere day kee baten samajh kee hongee. 
Psalms49:4 maain neetivachan kee or apana kan lagaunga, maain veena bajate huae apanee gupt bat prakaashait karoonga.." 
Psalms49:5 vipaati ke dinon men jab maain apane adnga maranevalon kee buraiyon se ghairoo, tab maain kyon droon?" 
Psalms49:6 jo apanee sampaati par bhrosa rakhte, aur apane dhan kee bahutayat par foolate haai," 
Psalms49:7 un men se koi apane bhai ko kisee bhanti chhuda naheen sakata haai aur n parameshvar ko usakee santee praayaashchaitt men kuchh de sakata haai," 
Psalms49:8 kyonaki unake praan kee chhudautee bharee haai vah ant tak kabhee n chuka sakenge. 
Psalms49:9 koi aeesa naheen jo sadaaiv jeevit rahe, aur kabra ko n dekhe.." 
Psalms49:10 kyonaki dekhne men ata haai, ki buddhmaian bhee marate haai, aur moorkh aur pashu sareekhe manushy bhee donon nash hote haai, aur apanee sampati auron ke liye chhod jate haain." 
Psalms49:11 ve man hee man yah sochate haai, ki unaka ghar sada sthiar rahega, aur unake nivas peeddhee se peeddhee tak bane rahenge isaliye ve apanee apanee boomi ka nam apane apane nam par rakhte haain." 
Psalms49:12 parantu manushy pratishtta pakar bhee sthiar naheen rahata, vah pashuuon ke saman hota haai, jo mar mittte haain.." 
Psalms49:13 unakee yah chal unakee moorkhta haai, taubhee unake bad log unakee baton se prasann hote haain." 
Psalms49:14 ve adhaelok kee manon bhed-bakaariyan ttharaae gaae haain mratyu unaka gaderiya ttharee aur bihan ko seedho log un par prabhuta karenge aur unaka sundar roop adhaelok ka kaur ho jaaega aur unaka koi adhaar n rahega. 
Psalms49:15 parantu parameshvar mere praan ko adhaelok ke vash se chhuda lega, kyonaki vahee mujhe grahan kar apanaaega.." 
Psalms49:16 jab koi dhanee ho jaae aur usake ghar ka vibhv baddh jaa, tab too bhy n khana." 
Psalms49:17 kyonaki vah mar kar kuchh bhee sath n le jaaega n usaka vibhv usake sath kabra men jaaega. 
Psalms49:18 chahe vah jeete jee apane ap ko dhany kahata rahe, jab too apanee bhlai karata haai, tab ve log teree prashansa karate haain" 
Psalms49:19 taubhee vah apane purakhaon ke samaj men milaya jaaega, jo kabhee ujiyala n dekhenge." 
Psalms49:20 manushy chahe pratishttit bhee hon parantu yaadi ve samajh naheen rakhte, to ve pashuuon ke saman haain jo mar mittte haain.." 
Psalms50:1 ishvar parameshvar yahova ne kaha haai, aur udayachal se lekar astachal tak prathvee ke logon ko bulaya haai." 
Psalms50:2 siyyon se, jo param sundar haai, parameshvar ne apana tej dikhaya haai." 
Psalms50:3 hamara parameshvar aaega aur chupachap n rahega, ag usake age age bhsm karatee jaaegee aur usake charon or badee andhaee chalegee." 
Psalms50:4 vah apanee praja ka nyay karane ke liye upar se akash ko aur prathvee ko bhee pukarega: 
Psalms50:5 mere bhkton ko mere pas ikattha karo, jinhon ne balidan chaddhakar mujh se vacha bandhaee haai!" 
Psalms50:6 aur svarga usake dharmee hone ka prachar karega kyonki parameshvar to ap hee nyayee haai.. 
Psalms50:7 he meree praja, sun, maain bolata hoo, aur he israael, maain tere vishay sakshaee deta hoon. parameshvar tera parameshvar maain hee hoon." 
Psalms50:8 maain tujh par tere melabaaliyon ke vishay dosh naheen lagata, tere homabali to nity mere liye chaddhte haain." 
Psalms50:9 maain n to tere ghar se baail n tere pashuushaalon se bakare le loonga. 
Psalms50:10 kyonaki van ke sare jeevajantu aur hajaron pahadon ke janavar mere hee haain. 
Psalms50:11 pahadon ke sab pakshiayon ko maain janata hoo, aur maaidan par chalane firanevale janavar mere hee haain.." 
Psalms50:12 yaadi maain bookha hota to tujh se n kahata kyonaki jagata aur jo kuchh us men haai vah mera haai. 
Psalms50:13 kya maain baail ka mans khau, va bakaron ka lohoo peeun?" 
Psalms50:14 parameshvar ko dhanyavad hee ka balidan chaddha, aur paramapradhaan ke liye apanee mannaten pooree kara" 
Psalms50:15 aur sankatt ke din mujhe pukara maain tujhe chhudaunga, aur too meree maahima karane paaega.." 
Psalms50:16 parantu dushtt se parameshvar kahata haai: tujhe meree vidhaiyon ka varnn karane se kya kama? too maree vacha kee charcha kyon karata haai? 
Psalms50:17 too to shaiksha se baair karata, aur mere vachanon ko tuchchh jatana haai." 
Psalms50:18 jab too ne chor ko dekha, tab usakee sangati se prasann hua aur parasreegamiyon ke sath bhagee hua.." 
Psalms50:19 too ne apana munh burai karane ke liye khola, aur teree jeebh chhl kee baten gaddhtee haai." 
Psalms50:20 too baaitta hua apane bhai ke virooddh bolata aur apane sage bhai kee chugalee khata haai. 
Psalms50:21 yah kam too ne kiya, aur maain chup raha isaliye too ne samajh liya ki parameshvar bilakul mere samhane haai. parantu maain tujhe samajhaunga, aur teree ankhon ke samhane sab kuchh alag alag dikhaunga.." 
Psalms50:22 he ishvar ko boolanevalo yah bat bhlee bhanti samajh lo, kaheen aeesa n ho ki maain tumhen faad daloo, aur koi chhudanevala n ho!" 
Psalms50:23 dhanyavad ke balidan ka chaddhanevala meree maahima karata haai aur jo apana charitra uttm rakhta haai usako maain parameshvar ka kiya hua uddhar dikhaunga! 
Psalms51:1 he parameshvar, apanee karoona ke anusar mujh par anugrah kara apanee badee daya ke anusar mere aparadhaen ko mitta de." 
Psalms51:2 mujhe bhleen bhanti dhaekar mera adharma door kar, aur mera pap chhudakar mujhe shuuddh kara!" 
Psalms51:3 maain to apane aparadhaen kon janata hoo, aur mera pap nirantar meree drashtti men rahata haai." 
Psalms51:4 maain ne keval tere hee virooddh pap kiya, aur jo teree drashtti men bura haai, vahee kiya haai, taki too bolane men dharmee aur nyay karane men nishkalank tthare." 
Psalms51:5 dek, maain adharma ke sath utpann hua, aur pap ke sath apanee mata ke garbh men pada.." 
Psalms51:6 dek, too day kee sachchai se prasann hota haai aur mere man hee men gyaan sikhaaega." 
Psalms51:7 joofaa se mujhe shuuddh kar, to maain paavitra ho jaunga mujhe dhae, aur maain him se bhee adhaik shvet banoonga." 
Psalms51:8 mujhe harsha aur anand kee baten suna, jis se jo haddiyan too ne tod dalee haain vah magan ho jaaen." 
Psalms51:9 apana mukh mere papon kee or se faer le, aur mere sare adharma ke kamon ko mitta dala.." 
Psalms51:10 he parameshvar, mere andar shuuddh man utpann kar, aur mere bheetar sthiar atma naye sire se utpann kara." 
Psalms51:11 mujhe apane samhane se nikal n de, aur apane pavitra atma ko mujh se alag n kara." 
Psalms51:12 apane kiae huae uddhar ka harsha mujhe fir se de, aur udar atma dekar mujhe sambhala.." 
Psalms51:13 jab maain aparadhaiyon ko tera marga sikhaunga, aur papee teree or firenge." 
Psalms51:14 he parameshvar, he mere uddharakarta parameshvar, mujhe hatya ke aparadha se chhuda le, tab maain tere dharma ka jayajayakar karane paunga.." 
Psalms51:15 he prabhu, mera munh khol de tab maain tera gunanuvad kar sakoonga." 
Psalms51:16 kyoki too melabali men prasann naheen hota, naheen to maain deta homabali se bhee too prasann naheen hota." 
Psalms51:17 tootta man parameshvar ke yogy balidan haai he parameshvar, too tootte aur pise huae man ko tuchchh naheen janata.." 
Psalms51:18 prasann hokar siyyon kee bhlai kar, yarooshalem kee shaharapanah ko too bana," 
Psalms51:19 tab too dharma ke balidanon se arthata sarvang pashuuon ke homabaali se prasann hoga tab log teree vedee par baail chaddhaaenge.. 
Psalms52:1 he veer, too burai karane par kyon ghamand karata haai? ishvar kee karoona to anant haai." 
Psalms52:2 teree jeebh keval dushttta gaddhtee haai sare dhare huae asture kee nain vah chhl ka kam karatee haai. 
Psalms52:3 too bhlai se baddhkar burai men aur adharma kee bat se baddhkar joott se praeeati rakhta haai. 
Psalms52:4 he chhlee jeebh too sab vinash karanevalee batoen se prasann rahatee haai.. 
Psalms52:5 he ishvar tujhe sada ke liye nash kar dega vah tujhe pakadkar tere dere se nikal dega aur jeevaton ke lok men tujhe ukhad dalega. 
Psalms52:6 tab dharmee log is ghattna ko dekhkar dr jaaenge, aur yah kahakar us par hansenge, ki" 
Psalms52:7 dekho, yah vahee puroosh haai jis ne parameshvar ko apanee sharan naheen mana, parantu apane dhan kee bahutayat par bhrosa rakhta tha, aur apane ko dushttta men draddh karata raha!" 
Psalms52:8 parantu maain to parameshvar ke bhvan men hare jalapai ke vraksha ke saman hoon. maain ne parameshvar kee karoona par sada sarvada ke liye bhrosa rakha haai. 
Psalms52:9 maain tera dhanyavad sarvada karata rahoonga, kyonki too hee ne yah kam kiya haai. maain tere hee nam kee batt johata rahoonga, kyonki yah tere paavitra bhkton ke samhane uttm haai.." 
Psalms53:1 mooddh ne apane man men kaha haai, ki koi parameshvar haai hee naheen. ve bigad gaa, unhon ne kuattlaita ke ghainaune kam kiae haain koi sukarmee naheen.." 
Psalms53:2 parameshvar ne svarga par se manushyon ke upar draashtti kee taki dekhe ki koi buaddh ise chalanevala va parameshvar ko poochhnevala haai ki naheen.. 
Psalms53:3 ve sab ke sab hatt gaae sab aek sath bigad gaae koi sukarmee nahee, aek bhee naheen.. kya un sab anarthkaariyon ko kuchh bhee gyaan naheen" 
Psalms53:4 jo mere logon ko aeese khate haain jaaise rottee aur parameshvar ka nam naheen lete? 
Psalms53:5 vahan un par bhy chha gaya jahan bhy ka koi karan n tha. kyonaki yahova n unakee haaddiyon ko, jo tere virooddh chhavanee dale pade the, titar bitar kar diya too ne to unhen laajjait kar diya isaliye ki parameshvar ne unako nikamma ttharaya haai.." 
Psalms53:6 bhla hota ki israael ka poora uddhar siyyon se nikalata! jab parameshvar apanee praja ko bandhauvai se lautta le aaega tab yakoob magan aur israael anandait hoga.. 
Psalms54:1 he parameshvar apane nam ke dara mera udar kar, aur apane parakram se mera nyay kara."

Psalms54:3 kyonaki paradeshaee mere virood utte haai, aur balatkaree mere praan ke graahak huae haain unhon ne parameshvar ko apane sammukh naheen jana.."

Psalms103:15 manushy kee ayu ghaas ke saman hotee haai, vah maaidan ke fool kee nain foolata haai," 
Psalms103:16 jo pavan lagate hee tthar naheen sakata, aur n vah apane sthan men fir milata haai." 
Psalms103:17 parantu yahova kee karoona usake dravaaiyon par yug yug, aur usaka dharma unake natee-poton par bhee pragatt hota rahata haai," 
Psalms103:18 arthata un par jo usakee vacha ka palan karate aur usake upadeshaen ko smaran karake un par chalate haain.. 
Psalms103:19 yahova ne to apana sinhasan svarga men sthiar kiya haai, aur usaka rajy pooree sraashtti par haai." 
Psalms103:20 he yahova ke dooto, tum jo bade veer ho, aur usake vachan ke manane se usako poora karate ho usako dhany kaho!" 
Psalms103:21 he yahova kee saree senao, he usake tthaluo, tum jo usakee ichchha pooree karate ho, usako dhany kaho!" 
Psalms103:22 he yahova kee saree srashtti, usake rajy ke sab sthanon men usako dhany kaho. he mere man, too yahova ko dhany kaha!" 
Psalms104:1 he mere man, too yahova ko dhany kaha! he mere parameshvar yahova, too atyant mahan haai! too vibhv aur aeeshvarya ka vasr paahine huae haai,"

Psalms104:4 jo pavanon ko apane doot, aur dhadhakatee ag ko apane tthaluae banata haai.."

Psalms119:30 maain ne sachchai ka marga chun liya haai, tere niyamon kee or maain chitt lagaae rahata hoon." 
Psalms119:31 maain teree chitauaniyon men lavaleen hoo, he yahova, meree asha n tod!" 
Psalms119:32 jab too mera hiyav baddhaaega, tab maain teree agyaao ke marga men dauoonga.." 
Psalms119:33 he yahova, mujhe apanee vidhaiyon ka marga dikha de tab maain use ant tak pakade rahoonga." 
Psalms119:34 mujhe samajh de, tab maain teree vyavastha ko pakade rahoonga aur poorn man se us par chaloonga." 
Psalms119:35 apanee agyaaon ke path men mujh ko chala, kyonki maain usee se prasann hoon." 
Psalms119:36 mere man ko lobh kee or nahee, apanee chitauaniyon hee kee or faer de." 
Psalms119:37 meree ankhon ko vyarth vastuon kee or se faer de too apane marga men mujhe jila. 
Psalms119:38 tera vachan jo tere bhy mananevalon ke liye haai, usako apane das ke nimitt bhee poora kara." 
Psalms119:39 jis namadharai se maain drata hoo, use door kara kyonaki tere niyam uttm haain." 
Psalms119:40 dek, maain tere upadeshaen ka abhailashaee hoon apane dharma ke karan mujh ko jila." 
Psalms119:41 he yahova, teree karoona aur tera kiya hua uddhar, tere vachan ke anusar, mujh ko bhee mile" 
Psalms119:42 tab maain apanee namadharai karanevalon ko kuchh uttr de sakoonga, kyonaki mera bhrosa, tere vachan par haai." 
Psalms119:43 mujhe apane saty vachan kahane se n rok kyonaki meree asha tere niyamon par haai. 
Psalms119:44 tab maain teree vyavastha par lagatar, sada sarvada chalata rahoonga" 
Psalms119:45 aur maain chode sthan men chala fira karoonga, kyonki maain ne tere upadeshaen kee sudhai rakhee haai." 
Psalms119:46 aur maain teree chitauaniyon kee charcha rajaon ke samhane bhee karoonga, aur sankoch n karoonga" 
Psalms119:47 kyonaki maain teree agyaaon ke karan sukhee hoo, aur maain un se praeeti rakhta hoon." 
Psalms119:48 maain teree agyaaon kee or jin men maain praeeti rakhta hoo, hath faailaunga aur teree vidhaiyon par dhyan karoonga.." 
Psalms119:49 jo vachan too ne apane das ko diya haai, use smaran kar, kyonki too ne mujhe asha dee haai." 
Psalms119:50 mere du:kh men mujhe shaaantai usee se hui haai, kyonaki tere vachan ke dara maain ne jeevan paya haai." 
Psalms119:51 aabhaimaaniyon ne mujhe atyant tttthe men udaya haai, taubhee maain teree vyavastha se naheen hatta." 
Psalms119:52 he yahova, maain ne tere praacheen niyamon ko smaran karake shaaantai pai haai." 
Psalms119:53 jo dushtt teree vyavastha ko chhode huae haai, unake karan maain santap se jalata hoon." 
Psalms119:54 jahan maain paradeshaee hokar rahata hoo, vahan teree vidhaiya, mere geet gane ka vishay banee haain." 
Psalms119:55 he yahova, maain ne rat ko tera nam smaran kiya aur teree vyavastha par chala hoon." 
Psalms119:56 yah mujh se is karan hua, ki maain tere upadeshaen ko pakade huae tha.." 
Psalms119:57 yahova mera bhag haai maain ne tere vachanon ke anusar chalane ka nishchay kiya haai. 
Psalms119:58 maain ne poore man se tujhe manaya haai isaaliye apane vachan ke anusar mujh par anugrah kara. 
Psalms119:59 maain ne apanee chalachalan ko socha, aur teree chitauaniyon ka marga liya." 
Psalms119:60 maain ne teree agyaaon ke manane men vilamb nahee, faurtee kee haai." 
Psalms119:61 maain dushtton kee rassaiyon se bandha gaya hoo, taubhee maain teree vyavastha ko naheen boola." 
Psalms119:62 tere dharmamay niyamon ke karan maain adhaee rat ko tera dhanyavad karane ko utoonga. 
Psalms119:63 jitane tera bhy manate aur tere upadeshaen par chalate haai, unaka maain sangee hoon." 
Psalms119:64 he yahova, teree karoona prathvee men bhree hui haai too mujhe apanee vidhaiyan sikha!" 
Psalms119:65 he yahova, too ne apane vachan ke anusar apane das ke sang bhlai kee haai." 
Psalms119:66 mujhe bhlee viveka-shaktai aur gyaan de, kyonki maain ne teree agyaaon ka vishvas kiya haai." 
Psalms119:67 us se paahile ki maain du:khait hua, maain bhttkata tha parantu ab maain tere vachan ko manata hoon." 
Psalms119:68 too bhla haai, aur bhla karata bhee haai mujhe apanee vidhaiyan sikha." 
Psalms119:69 aabhaimaaniyon ne to mere virooddh joott bat gaddhee haai, parantu maain tere upadeshaen ko poore man se pakade rahoonga." 
Psalms119:70 unaka man motta ho gaya haai, parantu maain teree vyavastha ke karan sukhee hoon." 
Psalms119:71 mujhe jo du:kh hua vah mere liye bhla hee hua haai, jis se maain teree vidhaiyon ko seekh sakoon."

Psalms142:5 he yahova, maain ne teree dohai dee haai maain ne kaha, too mera sharansthan haai, mere jeete hee too mera bhag haai." 
Psalms142:6 meree chillahatt ko dhyan dekar sun, kyonki meree badee durdasha ho gai haai! jo mere peechhe pade haai, un se mujhe bacha le kyonki ve mujh se adhaik samarthee haain."

Psalms143:3 shatra to mere praan ka gahak hua haai us ne mujhe choor karake mittee men milaya haai, aur mujhe ddher din ke mare huon ke saman andhore sthan men dal diya haai." 
Psalms143:4 meree atma bheetar se vyakul ho rahee haai mera man vikal haai.. 
Psalms143:5 mujhe praachaeenakal ke din smaran ate haai, maain tere sab adabhut kamon par dhyan karata hoo, aur tere kam ko sochata hoon." 
Psalms143:6 maain teree or apane hath faailaae hooae hoon sookhee boomi kee nain maain tera pyasa hoon..

Psalms143:8 apanee karoona kee bat mujhe shaeegha suna, kyonaki maain ne tujhee par bhrosa rakha haai. jis marga se mujhe chalana haai, vah mujh ko bata de, kyonki maain apana man teree hee or lagata hoon.." 
Psalms143:9 he hayova, mujhe shatrauon se bacha le maain teree hee ad men a chhpai hoon."

Psalms143:11 he yahova, mujhe apane nam ke nimitt jila! too jo dharmee haai, mujh ko sankatt se chhuda le!"

Psalms144:10 too rajaon ka uddhar karata haai, aur apane das daud ko talavar kee mar se bachata haai."

Proverbs3:1  
Proverbs3:2 kyonaki aeesa karane se teree ayu baddhegee, aur too adhaik kushal se rahega." 
Proverbs3:3 krapa aur sachchai tujh se alag n hone paaen varan unako apane gale ka har banana, aur apanee dayaroopee pattyai par likhna." 
Proverbs3:4 aur too parameshvar aur manushy donon ka anugrah paaega, too aati buddhmaian hoga.." 
Proverbs3:5 too apanee samajh ka sahara n lena, varan sampoorn man se yahova par bhrosa rakhna." 
Proverbs3:6 usee ko smaran karake sab kam karana, tab ve tere liye seedha marga nikalega." 
Proverbs3:7 apanee draashtti men buddhmaian n hona yahova ka bhy manana, aur burai se alag rahana." 
Proverbs3:8 aeesa karane se tera shareer bhla changa, aur teree haddiyan pushtt rahengee." 
Proverbs3:9 apanee sanpaati ke dara aur apanee boomi kee pahilee upaj de dekar yahova kee praatishtta karana 
Proverbs3:10 is prakar tere khtte bhre aur poore rahenge, aur tere rasakundon se naya dakhmadha umandta rahega.." 
Proverbs3:11 he mere putra, yahova kee shaiksha se munh n modna, aur jab vah tujhe dantte, tab too bura n manana," 
Proverbs3:12 kyonaki yahova jis se praem rakhta haai usako danttta haai, jaaise ki bap us bette ko jise vah aadhaik chahata haai.." 
Proverbs3:13 kya hee dhany haai vah manushy jo buaddh ipaa, aur vah manushy jo samajh praapt kare," 
Proverbs3:14 kyonaki buddh ikee praaptai chandee kee praaaptai se badee, aur usaka labh chokhe sone ke labh se bhee uttm haai." 
Proverbs3:15 vah moonge se adhaik anamol haai, aur jitanee vastuon kee too lalasa karata haai, un men se koi bhee usake tuly n ttharegee." 
Proverbs3:16 usake daahine hath men deegharayu, aur usake baen hath men dhan aur mahima haai." 
Proverbs3:17 usake marga manabha haai, aur usake sab marga kushal ke haain." 
Proverbs3:18 jo buaddh iko grahan kar lete haai, unake liye vah jeevan ka vraksha banatee haai aur jo usako pakade rahate haai, vah dhany haain.." 
Proverbs3:19 yahova ne prathvee kee nev buaddh ihee se dalee aur svarga ko samajh hee ke dara sthiar kiya. 
Proverbs3:20 usee ke gyaan ke dara gaahire sagar foott nikale, aur akashamandl se os ttpakatee haai.." 
Proverbs3:21 he mere putra, ye baten teree draashtti kee ott n hane paaen khree buddh iddh aur vivek kee raksha kar," 
Proverbs3:22 tab in se tujhe jeevan milega, aur ye tere gale ka har banenge." 
Proverbs3:23 aur too apane marga par nidr chalega, aur tere panv men ttes n lagegee." 
Proverbs3:24 jab too lettega, tab bhy n khaaega, jab too lettega, tab sukh kee neend aaegee." 
Proverbs3:25 achanak anevale bhy se n drana, aur jab dushtton par vipaati a pade, tab n ghabarana" 
Proverbs3:26 kyonaki yahova tujhe sahara diya karega, aur tere panv ko fande men fansane n dega." 
Proverbs3:27 jinaka bhla karana chaahiye, yaadi tujh men shaktai rahe, to unaka bhla karane se n rookana.." 
Proverbs3:28 yaadi tere pas dene ko kuchh ho, to apane padosee se n kahana ki ja kal fir ana, kal maain tujhe doonga." 
Proverbs3:29 jab tera padosee tere pas bekhttke rahata haai, tab usake virooddh buree yuktai n bandhana." 
Proverbs3:30 jis manushy ne tujh se bura vyavahar n kiya ho, us se akaran mukama khda n karana." 
Proverbs3:31 upadravee puroosh ke vishay men dah n karana, n usakee see chal chalana" 
Proverbs3:32 kyonaki yahova kuttlai se gharana karata haai, parantu vah apana bhed seedho logon par kholata haai.." 
Proverbs3:33 dushtt ke ghar par yahova ka shaap aur dhaarmiyon ke vasasthan par usakee ashaeesh hotee haai. 
Proverbs3:34 ttttha karanevalon se vah nishchay ttttha karata haai aur deenon par anugrah karata haai. 
Proverbs3:35 buaddhmaian maahima ko paaenge, aur moorkhon kee baddhtee apaman hee kee hogee.." 
Proverbs4:1 he mere putrae, pita kee shaiksha suno, aur samajh praapt karane men man lagao." 
Proverbs4:2 kyonaki maain ne tum ko uttm shaiksha dee haai meree shaiksha ko n chhodo. 
Proverbs4:3 dekho, maain bhee apane pita ka putra tha, aur mata ka akela dulara tha," 
Proverbs4:4 aur mera pita mujhe yah kahakar sikhata tha, ki tera man mere vachan par laga rahe too meree agyaaon ka palan kar, tab jeevit rahega." 
Proverbs4:5 buaddh iko praapt kar, samajh ko bhee praapt kara unako bool n jana, n meree baton ko chhodna." 
Proverbs4:6 buaddh iko n chhod, vah teree raksha karegee us se praeeati rak, vah tera pahara degee." 
Proverbs4:7 buaddh ishraeshtt haai isaaliye usakee praaptai ke liye yatn kara jo kuchh too praapt kare use praapt to kar parantu samajh kee praaptai ka yatn ghattne n paae. 
Proverbs4:8 usakee badai kar, vah tujh ko baddhaegee jab too us se lipatt jaa, tab vah teree mahima karegee." 
Proverbs4:9 vah tere sir par shaebhayaman booshan bandhogee aur tujhe sundar mukutt degee.. 
Proverbs4:10 he mere putra, meree baten sunakar grahan kar, tab too bahut varsha tab jeeavit rahega." 
Proverbs4:11 maain ne tujhe buaddh ika marga bataya haai aur seedhaai ke path par chalaya haai. 
Proverbs4:12 chalane men tujhe rok ttok n hogee, aur chahe too daude, taubhee ttokar n khaaega." 
Proverbs4:13 shaiksha ko pakade rah, use chhod n de usakee raksha kar, kyonki vahee tera jeevan haai." 
Proverbs4:14 dushtton kee batt men panv n dharana, aur n bure logon ke marga par chalana." 
Proverbs4:15 use chhod de, usake pas se bhee n chal, usake nikatt se mudkar age baddh ja." 
Proverbs4:16 kyonaki dushtt log yaadi burai n kare, to unako neend naheen atee aur jab tak ve kisee ko ttokar n khailaae, tab tak unhen neend naheen milatee." 
Proverbs4:17 ve to dushttta se kamai hui rottee khate, aur upadrav ke dara paya hua dakhmadha peete haain." 
Proverbs4:18 parantu dharmiyon kee chal us chamakatee hui jyoti ke saman haai, jisaka prakash dopahar tak adhaik adhaik baddhta rahata haai." 
Proverbs4:19 dushtton ka marga ghaer andhakaramay haai ve naheen janate ki ve kis se ttokar khate haain.. 
Proverbs4:20 he mere putra mere vachan dhyan dharake sun, aur apana kan meree baton par laga." 
Proverbs4:21 inako apanee ankhon kee ott n hone de varan apane man men dhaaran kara. 
Proverbs4:22 kyonaki jinakon ve praapt hotee haai, ve unake jeevit rahane ka, aur unake sare shareer ke change rahane ka karan hotee haain." 
Proverbs4:23 sab se aadhaik apane man kee raksha kara kyonki jeevan ka mool srot vahee haai. 
Proverbs4:24 tteddhee bat apane munh se mat bol, aur chalabajee kee baten kahana tujh se door rahe." 
Proverbs4:25 teree ankhen samhane hee kee or lagee rahe, aur teree palaken age kee or khulee rahen." 
Proverbs4:26 apane panv dharane ke liye marga ko samathr kar, aur tere sab marga tteek rahen." 
Proverbs4:27 n to dahinee or muddhna, aur n bain ora apane panv ko burai ke marga par chalane se hatta le.." 
Proverbs5:1 he mere putra, meree buddh ikee baton par dhyan de, meree samajh kee or kan laga" 
Proverbs5:2 jis se tera vivek surakshiat bana rahe, aur too gyaan ke vachanon ko thamen rahe." 
Proverbs5:3 kyonaki parai sree ke otton se madha ttpakata haai, aur usakee baten tel se bhee aadhaik chikanee hotee haain" 
Proverbs5:4 parantu isaka parinam nagadauna sa kaduva aur dodhaaree talavar sa paaina hota haai.

Proverbs5:6 isaliye use jeevan ka samathr path naheen mil pata usake chalachalan men chanchalata haai, parantu use vah ap naheen janatee.." 
Proverbs5:7 isaliye ab he mere putrae, meree suno, aur meree baton se munh n modo."

Proverbs5:14 maain sabha aur mandlee ke beech men praaya: sab buraiyon men ja pada.. 
Proverbs5:15 too apane hee kund se panee, aur apane hee koonae se sote ka jal piya karana."

Proverbs5:17 yah keval tere hee liye rahe, aur tere sang auron ke liye n ho."

Proverbs6:1 he mare putra, yaadi too apane padosee ka uttradayee hua ho, athva paradeshaee ke liye hath par hath mar kar uttradayee hua ho," 
Proverbs6:2 to too apane hee moonh ke vachanon se fansa, aur apane hee munh kee baton se pakada gaya." 
Proverbs6:3 isaliye he mere putra, aek kam kar, arthata too jo apane padosee ke hath men pad chuka haai, to ja, usako sashttang pranam karake mana le." 
Proverbs6:4 too ne to apanee akhon men neend, aur n apanee palakon men jhpakee ane de" 
Proverbs6:5 aur apane ap ko haarinee ke saman shaikaree ke hath se, aur chidiya ke saman chidimar ke hath se chhuda.." 
Proverbs6:6 he alasee, chyoonttyaien ke pas ja unake kam par dhyan de, aur buddhmaian ho." 
Proverbs6:7 unake n to koi nyayee hota haai, n pradhaan, aur n prabhuta karanevala,"

Proverbs6:9 he alasee, too kab tak sota rahega? teree neend kab toottegee?"

Proverbs6:13 vah naain se saain aur panv se ishaara, aur apanee agunaliyon se sakent karata haai," 
Proverbs6:14 usake man men ulatt faer kee baten rahatee, vah lagatar burai gaddhta haai aur jhgada ragada utpann karata haai." 
Proverbs6:15 is karan us par vipaati achanak a padegee, vah pal bhr men aeesa nash ho jaaega, ki bachane ka koi upay n rahega.."

Proverbs6:17 arthata ghamand se chaddhee hui ankhe, joott bolanevalee jeeb, aur nirdosh ka lohoo bahanevale hat," 
Proverbs6:18 anarth kalpana gaddhnevala man, burai karane ko veg daudnevale panv," 
Proverbs6:19 joott bolanevala sakshaee aur bhaiyon ke beech men jhgada utpann karanevala manushya. 
Proverbs6:20 he mere putra, meree agyaa ko man, aur apanee mata kee shaiksha ka n taja." 
Proverbs6:21 in ko apane day men sada gantt bandho rakh aur apane gale ka har bana le. 
Proverbs6:22 vah tere chalane men teree aguvai, aur sote samay teree raksha, aur jagate samay tujh se baten karegee." 
Proverbs6:23 agyaa to deepak haai aur shaiksha jyoti, aur sikhanevale kee dantt jeevan ka marga haai," 
Proverbs6:24 taaki tujh ko buree sree se bachaae aur parai sree kee chikanee chupadee baton se bachaae. 
Proverbs6:25 usakee sundarata dekhkar apane man men usakee aabhailasha n kara vah tujhe apane kattaksha se fansane n pae 
Proverbs6:26 kyonaki veshyagaman ke karan manushy ttukadon ka bhaikharee ho jata haai, parantu vyabhaichaarinee anamol jeevan ka aher kar letee haai." 
Proverbs6:27 kya ho sakata haai ki koi apanee chhatee par ag rakh le aur usake kapade n jalen? 
Proverbs6:28 kya ho sakata haai ki koi angare par chale, aur usake panv n jhulasen?" 
Proverbs6:29 jo parai sree ke pas jata haai, usakee dasha aeesee haai varan jo koi usako chooaega vah dand se n bachega." 
Proverbs6:30 jo chare bookh ke mare apana pett bhrane ke liye choree kare, usake to log tuchchh naheen janate" 
Proverbs6:31 taubhee yadi vah pakada jaa, to usako sataguna bhr dena padega varan apane ghar ka sara dhan dena padega."

Proverbs7:2 meree agyaaon ko man, is se too jeeavit rahega, aur meree shaiksha ko apanee ankh kee putalee jana" 
Proverbs7:3 unako apanee ungaaliyon men bandha, aur apane day kee paattyai par likh le." 
Proverbs7:4 buaddh ise kah ki, too meree baahin haai, aur samajh ko apanee sathain bana" 
Proverbs7:5 tab too parai sree se bachega, jo chikanee chupadee baten bolatee haai.." 
Proverbs7:6 maain ne aek din apane ghar kee khaidkee se, arthata apane jhrokhe se jhanka," 
Proverbs7:7 tab maain ne bhole logon men se aek nirbuaddh ijavan ko dekha

Proverbs7:13 tab us ne us javan ko pakadkar chooma, aur nirlajjata kee cheshtta karake us se kaha,"

Proverbs7:21 aeesee hee baten kah kahakar, us ne usako apanee prabal maya men fansa liya aur apanee chikanee chupadee baton se usako apane vash men kar liya."

Proverbs8:1 kya buddh inaheen pukaratee haai, kya samajh unche shabd se naheen bolatee haai?" 
Proverbs8:2 vah to unche sthanon par marga kee aek or or tirmuhaniyon men khdee hotee haai 
Proverbs8:3 faattkon ke pas nagar ke paaittav me, aur daron hee men vah unche svar se kahatee haai," 
Proverbs8:4 he manushyo, maain tum ko pukaratee hoo, aur meree bat sab adamiyon ke liye haai." 
Proverbs8:5 he bholo, chaturai seekho aur he mookhor, apane man men samajh lon" 
Proverbs8:6 suno, kyonki maain uttm baten kahoongee, aur jab munh kholoongee, tab us se seedhaee baten nikalengee" 
Proverbs8:7 kyonaki mujh se sachchai kee baton ka varnn hoga dushttta kee baton se mujh ko gharana atee haai.. 
Proverbs8:8 mere munh kee sab baten dharma kee hotee haai, un men se koi tteddhee va ulatt faer kee bat naheen nikalatee haai." 
Proverbs8:9 samajhvale ke liye ve sab sahaj, aur gyaan ke praapt karanevalon ke liye aati seedhaee haain." 
Proverbs8:10 chandee nahee, meree shaiksha hee ko lo, aur uttm kundan se baddhkar gyaan ko grahan karo." 
Proverbs8:11 kyonaki buddh,i moonge se bhee achchhee haai, aur saree manabhavanee vastuon men koi bhee usake tuly naheen haai." 
Proverbs8:12 maain jo buddh ihoo, so chaturai men vas karatee hoo, aur gyaan aur vivek ko praapt karatee hoon." 
Proverbs8:13 yahova ka bhy manana burai se baair rakhna haai. ghaman, anhakar, aur buree chal se, aur ulatt faer kee bat se bhee maain baair rakhtee hoon." 
Proverbs8:14 uttm yuktai, aur khree buaddh imeree hee haai, maain to samajh hoo, aur parakram bhee mera haai." 
Proverbs8:15 mere hee dara raja rajy karate haai, aur adhaikaree dharma se vichar karate haain" 
Proverbs8:16 mere hee dara raja hakim aur rais, aur prathvee ke sab nyayee shaasan karate haain." 
Proverbs8:17 jo mujh se praem rakhte haai, un se maain bhee praem rakhtee hoo, aur jo mujh ko yatn se tadke uttkar khojate haai, ve mujhe pate haain." 
Proverbs8:18 dhan aur praatishtta mere pas haai, varan ttharanevala dhan aur dharma bhee haain." 
Proverbs8:19 mera fal chokhe sone se, varan kundan se bhee uttm haai, aur meree upaj uttm chandee se achchhee haai." 
Proverbs8:20 maain dharma kee batt me, aur nyay kee dgaron ke beech men chalatee hoo," 
Proverbs8:21 jis se maain apane praemiyon ko paramarth ke bhagee karoo, aur unake bhndaron ko bhr doon." 
Proverbs8:22 yahova ne mujhe kam karate ke arambh me, varan apane praacheenakal ke kamon se bhee pahile utpann kiya." 
Proverbs8:23 maain sada se varan adi hee se prathvee kee srashtti ke pahile hee se ttharai gai hoon. 
Proverbs8:24 jab n to gahira sagar tha, aur n jal ke sote the tab hee se maain utpann hui." 
Proverbs8:25 jab pahad va pahadiyan sthiar n kee gai thee," 
Proverbs8:26 jab yahova ne n to prathvee aur n maaidan, n jagat kee dhooli ke paramanu banaae the, in se paahile maain utpann hui." 
Proverbs8:27 jab us ne akash ko sthiar kiya, tab maain vahan thee, jab us ne gaahire sagar ke upar akashamandl ttharaya," 
Proverbs8:28 jab us ne akashamandl ko upar se sthiar kiya, aur gaahire sagar ke sote foottne lage," 
Proverbs8:29 jab us ne samudra ka sivana ttharaya, ki jal usakee agyaa ka ullanghan n kar sake, aur jab vah prathvee kee nev kee doree lagata tha," 
Proverbs8:30 tab maain kareegar see usake pas thee aur prati din maain usakee prasannata thee, aur has samay usake samhane anaandait rahatee thee." 
Proverbs8:31 maain usakee basai hui prathvee se prasann thee aur mera sukh manushyon kee sangati se hota tha.. 
Proverbs8:32 isaliye ab he mere putrae, meree suno kya hee dhany haain ve jo mere marga ko pakade rahate haain." 
Proverbs8:33 shaiksha ko suno, aur buddhmaian ho jao, usake vishay men anasunee n karo." 
Proverbs8:34 kya hee dhany haai vah manushy jo meree sunata, varan meree devaddhee par praati din khda rahata, aur mere daron ke khnbhon ke pas drashtti lagaae rahata haai." 
Proverbs8:35 kyonaki jo mujhe pata haai, vah jeevan ko pata haai, aur yahova us se prasann hota haai." 
Proverbs8:36 parantu jo mera aparadha karata haai, vah apane hee par upadrav karata haai jitane mujh se baair rakhte ve mratyu se praeeti rakhte haain.." 
Proverbs9:1 buaddh ine apana ghar banaya aur usake saton khnbhe gaddhe huae haain. 
Proverbs9:2 us ne apane pashu vadha karake, apane dakhmadha men masala milaya haai, aur apanee meja lagai haai." 
Proverbs9:3 us ne apanee saheliya, sab ko bulane ke liye bhejee haai vah nagar ke unche sthanon kee chottee par pukaratee haai," 
Proverbs9:4 jo koi bhola he vah mudkar yaheen aae! aur jo nirbuaddh ihaai, us se vah kahatee haai," 
Proverbs9:5 ao, meree rottee khao, aur mere masala milaae huae dakhmadha ko peeo." 
Proverbs9:6 bholon ka sang chhodo, aur jeeavit raho, samajh ke marga men seedho chalo." 
Proverbs9:7 jo ttttha karanevale ko shaiksha deta haai, so apamaanit hota haai, aur jo dushtt jan ko danttta haai vah kalankit hota haai.." 
Proverbs9:8 ttttha karanevale ko n dantt aeesa n ho ki vah tujh se baair rakhe, buddhmaian ko dant, vah to tujh se praem rakhega." 
Proverbs9:9 buaddhmaian ko shaiksha de, vah aadhaik buddhmaian hoga dharmee ko chita de, vah apanee vidha baddhaaega." 
Proverbs9:10 yahova ka bhy manana buaddh ika arambh haai, aur paramapaavitra ishvar ko janana hee samajh haai." 
Proverbs9:11 mere dara to teree ayu baddhegee, aur tere jeevan ke varsha aadhaik honge." 
Proverbs9:12 yaadi too buddhmaian ho, te buaddh ika fal too hee bhogega aur yaadi too ttttha kare, to dand keval too hee bhogega.." 
Proverbs9:13 moorkhtaroopee sree haura machanevalee haai vah to bholee haai, aur kuchh naheen janatee." 
Proverbs9:14 vah apane ghar ke dar me, aur nagar ke unche sthanon men maachiya par baaittee hui" 
Proverbs9:15 jo battohee apana apana marga pakade huae seedho chale jate haai, unako yah kah kahakar pukaratee haai," 
Proverbs9:16 jo koi bhola haai, vah mudkar yaheen aae jo nirbuaddh ihaai, us se vah kahatee haai," 
Proverbs9:17 choree ka panee meetta hota haai, aur luke chhpai kee rottee achchhee lagatee haai." 
Proverbs9:18 aur vah naheen janata haai, ki vahan mare huae pade haai, aur us sree ke nevataharee adhaelok ke nichale sthanon men pahunche haain.." 
Proverbs10:1 sulaaiman ke neetivachana.. buddhmaian putra se pita anandait hota haai, parantu moorkh putra ke karan mata udas rahatee haai." 
Proverbs10:2 dushtton ke rakhe huae dhan se labh nahee hota, parantu dharma ke karan mratyu se bachav hota haai." 
Proverbs10:3 dharmee ko yahova bookhon marane naheen deta, parantu dushtton kee aabhailasha vah pooree hone naheen deta." 
Proverbs10:4 jo kam men ddhlaiai karata haai, vah nirdhan ho jata haai, parantu kamamaju log apane hathon ke dara dhanee hote haain." 
Proverbs10:5 jo betta dhoopakal men battorata haai vah buaddh ise kam karanevala haai, parantu jo betta kattnee ke samay bharee neend men pada rahata haai, vah lajja ka karan hota haai." 
Proverbs10:6 dharmee par bahut se ashareevad hote haai, parantu upadrav dushtton ka munh chha leta haai." 
Proverbs10:7 dharmee ko smaran karake log ashaeervad dete haai, parantu dushtton ka nam mitt jata haai." 
Proverbs10:8 jo buaddhmaian haai, vah agyaaon ko sveekar karata haai, parantu jo bakavadee aur mooddh haai, vah pachhad khata haai." 
Proverbs10:9 jo khrai se chalata haai vah nidr chalata haai, parantu jo tteddhee chal chalata haai usakee chal pragatt ho jatee haai." 
Proverbs10:10 jo naain se saain karata haai us se auron ko dukh milata haai, aur jo bakavadee aur mooddh haai, vah pachhad khata haai." 
Proverbs10:11 dharmee ka munh to jeevan ka sota haai, parantu upadrav dushtton ka munh chha leta haai." 
Proverbs10:12 baair se to jhgade utpann hote haai, parantu praem se sab aparadha ddhnp jate haain." 
Proverbs10:13 samajhvalon ke vachanon men buaddh ipai jatee haai, parantu nirbuaddh ikee peett ke liye koda haai." 
Proverbs10:14 buaddhmaian log gyaan ko rakh chhodte haai, parantu mooddh ke bolane se vinash nikatt ata haai." 
Proverbs10:15 dhanee ka dhan usaka draddh nagar haai, parantu kangal log nirdhan hone ke karan vinash hote haain." 
Proverbs10:16 dharmee ka parishram jeevan ke liye hota haai, parantu dushtt ke labh se pap hota haai." 
Proverbs10:17 jo shaiksha par chalata vah jeevan ke marga par haai, parantu jo dantt se munh modta, vah bhttkata haai." 
Proverbs10:18 jo baair ko chhpai rakhta haai, vah joott bolata haai, aur jo apavad faailata haai, vah moorkh haai." 
Proverbs10:19 jahan bahut baten hotee haai, vahan aparadha bhee hota haai, parantu jo apane munh ko band rakhta haai vah buaddh ise kam karata haai." 
Proverbs10:20 dharmee ke vachan to uttm chandee haain parantu dushtton ka man bahut halaka hota haai. 
Proverbs10:21 dharmee ke vachanon se bahuton ka palanaposhan hota haai, parantu mooddh log nirbuaddh ihone ke aran mar jate haain." 
Proverbs10:22 dhan yahova kee ashaeesh hee se milata haai, aur vah usake sath du:kh naheen milata." 
Proverbs10:23 moorkh ko to mahapap karana hansee kee bat jan padtee haai, parantu samajhvale puroosh men buaddh irahatee haai." 
Proverbs10:24 dushtt jan jis vipaati se drata haai, vah us par a padtee haai, parantu dhaarmiyon kee lalasa pooree hotee haai." 
Proverbs10:25 bavandr nikal jate hee dushtt jan lop ho jata haai, parantu dharmee sada lon sthiar haai." 
Proverbs10:26 jaaise dant ko siraka, aur ankh ko dhoona, vaaise alasee unako lagat haai jo usako kaheen bhejate haain." 
Proverbs10:27 yahova ke bhy manane se ayu baddhtee haai, parantu dushtton ka jeevan thode hee dinon ka hota haai." 
Proverbs10:28 dhaarmiyon ko asha rakhne men anand milata haai, parantu dushtton kee asha toott jatee haai." 
Proverbs10:29 yahova khre manushy ka gaddh ttharata haai, parantu anarthkaariyon ka vinash hota haai." 
Proverbs10:30 dharmee sada attl rahega, parantu dushtt prathvee par basane n paaenge." 
Proverbs10:31 dharmee ke munh se buaddh ittpakatee haai, par ulatt faer kee bat kahane vale kee jeebh kattee jayegee." 
Proverbs10:32 dharmee gahanyogy bat samajh kar bolata haai, parantu dushtton ke munh se ulatt faer kee baten nikalatee haain.." 
Proverbs11:1 chhl ke tarajoo se yahova ko gharana atee haai, parantu vah poore battkhre se prasann hota haai." 
Proverbs11:2 jab aabhaiman hota, tab apaman bhee hota haai, parantu namra logon men buaddh ihotee haai." 
Proverbs11:3 seedho log apanee khrai se aguvai pate haai, parantu vishvasaghaatee apane kapatt se vinash hote haain." 
Proverbs11:4 kop ke din dhan se to kuchh labh naheen hota, parantu dharma mratyu se bhee bachata haai." 
Proverbs11:5 khre manushy ka marga dharma ke karan seedha hota haai, parantu dushtt apanee dushttta ke karan gir jata haai." 
Proverbs11:6 seedho logon ko bachav unake dharma ke karan hota haai, parantu vishvasaghaatee log apanee hee dushttta men fansate haain." 
Proverbs11:7 jab dushtt marata, tab usakee asha toott jatee haai, aur adharmee kee asha vyarth hotee haai." 
Proverbs11:8 dharmee vipaati se choott jata haai, parantu dushtt usee vipaati men pad jata haai." 
Proverbs11:9 bhaktaiheen jan apane padosee ko apane munh kee bat se bigadta haai, parantu dharmee log gyaan ke dara bachate haain." 
Proverbs11:10 jab dhaarmiyon ka kalyan hota haai, tab nagar ke log prasann hote haai, parantu jab dushtt nash hote, tab jaya-jayakar hota haai." 
Proverbs11:11 seedho logon ke ashaeervad se nagar kee baddhtee hotee haai, parantu dushtton ke munh kee bat se vah ddhaya jata haai." 
Proverbs11:12 jo apane padosee ko tuchchh janata haai, vah nirbuaddh ihaai, parantu samajhdar puroosh chupachap rahata haai." 
Proverbs11:13 jo lutarai karata firata vah bhed pragatt karata haai, parantu vishvasayogy manushy bat ko chhpai rakhta haai." 
Proverbs11:14 jahan buddh ikee yuaktai nahee, vahan praja vipaati men padtee haai parantu sammaati denevalon kee bahutayat ke karan bachav hota haai." 
Proverbs11:15 jo paradeshaee ka uttradayee hota haai, vah bada du:kh uttata haai, parantu jo uttradayitv se gharana karata, vah nidr rahata haai." 
Proverbs11:16 anugrah karanevalee sree praatishtta naheen khotee haai, aur balatkaree lag dhan ko naheen khote." 
Proverbs11:17 krapalu manushy apana hee bhla karata haai, parantu jo kroor haai, vah apanee hee deh ko du:kh deta haai." 
Proverbs11:18 dushtt mithya kamai kamata haai, parantu jo dharma ka beej bota, usako nishchay fal milata haai." 
Proverbs11:19 jo dharma men draddh rahata, vah jeevan pata haai, parantu jo burai ka peechha karata, vah mratyu ka kaur ho jata haai." 
Proverbs11:20 jo man ke tteddhe haai, un se yahova ko gharana atee haai, parantu vah khree chalavalon se prasann rahata haai." 
Proverbs11:21 maain draddhta ke sath kahata hoo, bura manushy nirdosh n ttharega, parantu dharmee ka vansh bachaya jaaega." 
Proverbs11:22 jo sundar sree vivek naheen rakhtee, vah toothn men sone kee natth pahine huae sooar ke saman haai." 
Proverbs11:23 dhaarmiyon kee lalasa to keval bhlai kee hotee haai parantu dushtton kee asha ka fal krodha hee hota haai. 
Proverbs11:24 aeese haai, jo chhtaira dete haai, taubhee unakee baddhtee hee hotee haai aur aeese bhee haain jo yarthath se kam dete haai, aur is se unakee ghatttee hee hotee haai." 
Proverbs11:25 udar praanee shtt pushtt ho jata haai, aur jo auron kee khetee seenchata haai, usakee bhee seenchee jaegee." 
Proverbs11:26 jo apana anaj rakh chhodta haai, usakee log shaap dete haai, parantu jo use bech deta haai, usako ashaeervad diya jata haai." 
Proverbs11:27 jo yatn se bhlai karata haai vah auron kee prasannata khojata haai, parantu jo doosare kee burai ka khojee hota haai, usee par burai a padtee haai." 
Proverbs11:28 jo apane dhan par bhrosa rakhta haai vah gir jata haai, parantu dharmee log naye patte kee nai lahalahate haain." 
Proverbs11:29 jo apane gharane ko du:kh deta, usaka bhag vayu hee hoga, aur mooddh buaddhmaian ka das ho jata haai." 
Proverbs11:30 dharmee ka pratifal jeevan ka vraksha hota haai, aur buaddhmaian manushy logon ke man ko moh leta haai." 
Proverbs11:31 dek, dharmee ko prathvee par fal milega, to nishchay haai ki dushtt aur papee ko bhee milega.."

Proverbs12:4 bhlee sree apane pati ka mukutt haai, parantu jo lajja ke kam karatee vah mano usakee haddiyon ke sadne ka karan hotee haai."

Proverbs12:26 dharmee apane padosee kee aguvai karata haai, parantu dushtt log apanee hee chal ke karan bhttk jate haain."

Proverbs13:2 sajjan apanee baton ke karan uttm vastu khane pata haai, parantu vishvasaghaatee logon ka pett upadrav se bhrata haai." 
Proverbs13:3 jo apane munh kee chaukasee karata haai, vah apane praan kee raksha karata haai, parantu jo gal bajata usaka vinash jo jata haai." 
Proverbs13:4 alasee ka praan lalasa to karata haai, aur usako kuchh naheen milata, parantu kamakajee shtt pushtt ho jate haain." 
Proverbs13:5 dharmee jootte vachan se baair rakhta haai, parantu dushtt lajja ka karan aur lajjait ho jata haai." 
Proverbs13:6 dharma khree chal chalanevalee kee raksha karata haai, parantu papee apanee dushttta ke karan ulatt jata haai." 
Proverbs13:7 koi to dhan battorata, parantu usake pas kuchh naheen rahata, aur koi dhan uda deta, taubhee usake pas bahut rahata haai." 
Proverbs13:8 praan kee chhudautee manushy ka dhan haai, parantu nirdhan ghaudkee ko sunata bhee naheen." 
Proverbs13:9 dhaarmiyon kee jyoti anand ke sath rahatee haai, parantu dushtton ka diya bujh jata haai." 
Proverbs13:10 jhgade ragade keval anhakar hee se hote haai, parantu jo log sammaati manate haai, unake pas buddh irahatee haai." 
Proverbs13:11 nirdhan ke pas mal naheen rahata, parantu jo apane paarishram se battorata, usakee baddhtee hotee haai." 
Proverbs13:12 jab asha pooree hone se vilamb hota haai, to man shaithail hota haai, parantu jab lalasa pooree hotee haai, tab jeevan ka vraksha lagata haai." 
Proverbs13:13 jo vachan ko tuchchh janata, vah nash ho jata haai, parantu agyaa ke dravaaiye ko achchha fal milata haai." 
Proverbs13:14 buaddhmaian kee shaiksha ka jeevan ka sota haai, aur usake dara log mratyu ke fandon se bach sakate haain." 
Proverbs13:15 subuddh ike karan anugrah hota haai, parantu vishvasaghaaatiyon ka marga kada hota haai." 
Proverbs13:16 sab chatur to gyaan se kam karate haai, parantu moorkh apanee mooddhta faailata haai." 
Proverbs13:17 dushtt doot burai men fansata haai, parantu vishvasayogy doot se kushalakshom hota haai." 
Proverbs13:18 jo shaiksha ko sunee-anasunee karata vah nirdhan hota aur apaman pata haai, parantu jo dantt ko manata, usakee mahima hotee haai." 
Proverbs13:19 lalasa ka poora hona to praan ko meetta lagata haai, parantu burai se hattna, mookhorn ke praan ko bura lagata haai." 
Proverbs13:20 buaddhmaianon kee sangati kar, tab too bhee buaddhmaian ho jaaega, parantu moorkhon ka sathee nash ho jaaega." 
Proverbs13:21 burai paapiyon ke peechhe padtee haai, parantu dhaarmiyon ko achchha fal milata haai." 
Proverbs13:22 bhla manushy apane natee-poton ke liye bhag chhod jata haai, parantu papee kee sampati dharmee ke liye rakhee jatee haai." 
Proverbs13:23 nirbal logon ko khetee baree se bahut bhojanavastu milatee haai, parantu aeese log bhee haain jo anyay ke karan mitt jate haain." 
Proverbs13:24 jo bette par chhdee naheen chalata vah usaka baairee haai, parantu jo us se praem rakhta, vah yatn se usako shaiksha deta haai." 
Proverbs13:25 dharmee pett bhr khate pata haai, parantu dushtt bookhe hee rahate haain.." 
Proverbs14:1 har buaddhmaian sree apane ghar ko banatee haai, par mooddh sree usako apane hee hathon se ddha detee haai." 
Proverbs14:2 jo seedhaai se chalata vah yahova ka bhy mananevala haai, parantu jo tteddhee chal chalata vah usako tuchchh jananevala ttharata haai." 
Proverbs14:3 mooddh ke munh men garva ka ankur haai, parantu buaddhmaian log apane vachanon ke dara raksha pate haain." 
Proverbs14:4 jahan baail nahee, vahan gaushaala nirmal to rahatee haai, parantu baail ke bal se anaj kee baddhtee hatee haai." 
Proverbs14:5 sachcha sakshaee joott naheen bolata, parantu jootta sakshaee joottee baten udata haai." 
Proverbs14:6 ttttha karanevala buddh iko ddoonddhta, parantu naheen pata, parantu samajhvale ko gyaan sahaj se milata haai." 
Proverbs14:7 moorkh se alag ho ja, too us se gyaan kee bat n paaega." 
Proverbs14:8 chatur kee buddh iapanee chal ka janana haai, parantu moorkhon kee mooddhta chhl karana haai." 
Proverbs14:9 mooddh log doshaee hone ko ttttha janate haai, parantu seedho logon ke beech anugrah hota haai." 
Proverbs14:10 man apana hee du:kh janata haai, aur paradeshaee usake anand men hath naheen dal sakata." 
Proverbs14:11 dushtton ko ghar vinash ho jata haai, parantu seedho logon ke tamboo men abadee hotee haai." 
Proverbs14:12 aeesa marga haai, jo manushy ko tteek dekh padta haai, parantu usake ant men mratyu hee milatee haai." 
Proverbs14:13 hansee ke samay bhee man udas hota haai, aur anand ke ant men shaek hota haai." 
Proverbs14:14 jisaka man ishvar kee or se hatt jata haai, vah apanee chalachalan ka fal bhogata haai, parantu bhla manushy ap hee ap santushtt hota haai." 
Proverbs14:15 bhola to har aek bat ko sach manata haai, parantu chatur manushy samajh boojhkar chalata haai." 
Proverbs14:16 buaddhmaian drakar burai se hattta haai, parantu moorkh ddheett hokar nidr rahata haai." 
Proverbs14:17 jo jhtt krodha kare, vah mooddhta ka kam bhee karega, aur jo buree yuktaiyan nikalata haai, us se log baair rakhte haain." 
Proverbs14:18 bholon ka bhag mooddhta hee hota haai, parantu chaturon ko gyaanaroopee mukutt bandha jata haai." 
Proverbs14:19 bure log bhlon ke sammuk, aur dushtt log dharmee ke faattk par dandvata karate haain." 
Proverbs14:20 nirdhan ka padosee bhee us se gharana karata haai, parantu dhanee ke bahutere praemee hote haain." 
Proverbs14:21 jo apane padosee ko tuchchh janata, vah pap karata haai, parantu jo deen logon par anugrah karata, vah dhany hota haai." 
Proverbs14:22 jo buree yuktai nikalate haai, kya ve bhram men naheen padte? parantu bhlee yuaktai nikalanevalon se karoona aur sachchai ka vyavahar kiya jata haai." 
Proverbs14:23 paarishram se sada labh hota haai, parantu bakavad karane se keval ghatttee hotee haai." 
Proverbs14:24 buaddhmaianon ka dhan unaka mukutt ttharata haai, parantu mookhorn kee mooddhta niree mooddhta haai." 
Proverbs14:25 sachcha sakshaee bahuton ke praan bachata haai, parantu jo joottee baten udaya karata haai us se dhaekha hee hota haai." 
Proverbs14:26 yahova ke bhy manane se draddh bhrosa hota haai, aur usake putraen ke sharansthan milata haai." 
Proverbs14:27 yahova ka bhy manana, jeevan ka sota haai, aur usake dara log mratyu ke fandon se bach jate haain." 
Proverbs14:28 raja kee mahima praja kee bahutayat se hotee haai, parantu jahan praja nahee, vahan haakim nash ho jata haai." 
Proverbs14:29 jo vilamb se krodha karanevala haai vah bada samajhvala haai, parantu jo adhaeer haai, vah mooddhta kee baddhtee karata haai." 
Proverbs14:30 shaant man, tan ka jeevan haai, parantu man ke jalane se haaddiyan bhee jal jatee haain." 
Proverbs14:31 jo kangal par andhor karata, vah usake karta kee nind karata haai, parantu jo daaridra par anugrah karata, vah usakee maahima karata haai." 
Proverbs14:32 dushtt manushy burai karata hua nash ho jata haai, parantu dharmee ko mratyu ke samay bhee sharan milatee haai."

Proverbs20:2 raja ka bhy dikhana, sinh ka garajana haai jo us par rosh karata, vah apane praan ka aparadhaee hota haai." 
Proverbs20:3 mukamen se hath uttana, puroosh kee maahima ttharatee haai parantu sab mooddh jhgadne ko taaiyar hote haain." 
Proverbs20:4 alasee manushy shaeet ke karan hal naheen jotata isaaliye kattnee ke samay vah bheesh mangata, aur kuchh naheen pata." 
Proverbs20:5 manushy ke man kee yuaktai athah to haai, taubhee samajhvala manushy usako nikal leta haai." 
Proverbs20:6 bahut se manushy apanee krapa ka prachar karate haain parantu sachcha puroosh kaun pa sakata haai? 
Proverbs20:7 dharmee jo khrai se chalata rahata haai, usake peechhe usake ladkebale dhany hote haain." 
Proverbs20:8 raja jo nyay ke sinhasan par baaitta karata haai, vah apanee drashtti hee se sab burai ko uda deta haai." 
Proverbs20:9 kaun sah sakata haai ki maain ne apane day ko paavitra kiya athva maain pap se shuuddh hua hoon? 
Proverbs20:10 ghatttee-baddhtee battkhre aur ghattte-baddhte napuae in donon se yahova gharana karata haai. 
Proverbs20:11 ladka bhee apane kamon se pahichana jata haai, ki usaka kam pavitra aur seedha haai, va naheen." 
Proverbs20:12 sunane ke liye kan aur dekhne ke liye jo ankhen haai, un donon ko yahova ne banaya haai." 
Proverbs20:13 neend se praeeati n rak, naheen to daaridra ho jaaega ankhen khol tab too rottee se trapt hoga." 
Proverbs20:14 mol lene ke samay graahak tuchchh tuchchh kahata haai parantu chale jane par baddhai karata haai.

Proverbs25:23 jaaise uttreey vayu vashara ko latee haai, vaaise hee chugalee karane se mukh par krodha chha jata haai."

Proverbs25:26 jo dharmee dushtt ke kahane men ata haai, vah gandale sote aur bigade huae kund ke saman haai."
