Proverbs31:14 vah vyopar ke jahajon kee nai apanee bhojanavastuaen door se mangavatee haain. 
Proverbs31:15 vah rat hee ko utt baaitttee haai, aur apane gharane ko bhojan khailatee haai aur apanee laundiyon ko alag alag kam detee haai." 
Proverbs31:16 vah kisee khet ke vishay men soch vichar karatee haai aur use mol le letee haai aur apane parishram ke fal se dakh kee baree lagatee haai. 
Proverbs31:17 vah apanee kaatt iko bal ke faentte se kasatee haai, aur apanee bahon ko draddh banatee haai." 
Proverbs31:18 vah parakh letee haai ki mera vyopar labhdayak haai. rat ko usaka diya naheen bujhta. 
Proverbs31:19 vah atteran men hath lagatee haai, aur charakha pakadtee haai." 
Proverbs31:20 vah deen ke liye mutthee kholatee haai, aur daaridra ke sanbhalane ko hath baddhatee haai." 
Proverbs31:21 vah apane gharane ke liye him se naheen dratee, kyonaki usake ghar ke sab log lal kapade paahinate haain." 
Proverbs31:22 vah taakiye bana letee haai usake vasr sooksham san aur baainjanee rang ke hote haain. 
Proverbs31:23 jab usaka paati sabha men desh ke puraaniyon ke sang baaittta haai, tab usaka sanman hota haai." 
Proverbs31:24 vah san ke vasr banakar bechatee haai aur vyoparee ko kamaraband detee haai. 
Proverbs31:25 vah bal aur pratap ka pahirava pahine rahatee haai, aur anevale kal ke vishay par hansatee haai." 
Proverbs31:26 vah buaddh ikee bat bolatee haai, aur usake vachan krapa kee shaiksha ke anusar hote haain." 
Proverbs31:27 vah apane gharane ke chalachalan ko dhyan se dekhtee haai, aur apanee rottee bina paarishram naheen khatee." 
Proverbs31:28 usake putra utt uttkar usako dhany kahate haai, unaka pati bhee uttkar usakee aeesee prashansa karata haai:" 
Proverbs31:29 bahut see striayon ne achchhe achchhe kam to kiae haain parantu too un sabhon men shraeshtt haai. 
Proverbs31:30 shaebha to joottee aur sundarata vyarth haai, parantu jo sree yahova ka bhy manatee haai, usakee prashansa kee jaaegee." 
Proverbs31:31 usake hathon ke parishram ka fal use do, aur usake karyon se sabha men usakee prashansa hogee.." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 yarooshalem ke raja, daud ke putra aur upadeshak ke vachana." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 upadeshak ka yah vachan haai, ki vyarth hee vyarth, vyarth hee vyarth! sab kuchh vyarth haai." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 us sab paarishram se jise manushy dharatee par karata haai, usako kya labh praapt hota haai?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 aek peeddhee jatee haai, aur doosaree peeddhee atee haai, parantu prathvee sarvada banee rahatee haai." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 soorya uday hokar ast bhee hota haai, aur apane uday kee disha ko veg se chala jata haai." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 vayu dakkhian kee or bahatee haai, aur uttr kee or ghoomatee jatee haai vah ghoomatee aur bahatee rahatee haai, aur apane chakkaron men lautt atee haai." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 sab naadiyan samudra men ja milatee haai, taubhee samudra bhr naheen jata jis sthan se naadiyan nikalatee haain udhar hee ko ve fir jatee haain." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 sab baten parishram se bhree haain manushy isaka varnn naheen kar sakata n to ankhen dekhne se trapt hotee haai, aur n kan sunane se bhrate haain." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 jo kuchh hua tha, vahee fir hoga, aur jo kuchh ban chuka haai vahee fir banaya jaaega aur soorya ke neeche koi bat nai naheen haai." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 kya aeesee koi bat haai jisake vishay men log kah saken ki dekh yah nai haai? yah to praacheen yugon men vartaman thee. 
Ecclesiastes1:11 praacheen baton ka kuchh smaran naheen raha, aur honevalee baton ka bhee smaran unake bad honevalon ko n rahega.." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 maain upadeshak yarooshalem men israael ka raja tha. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 aur maain ne apana man lagaya ki jo kuchh soorya ke neeche kiya jata haai, usaka bhed buaddh ise soch sochakar maloom karoon yah bade du:kh ka kam haai jo parameshvar ne manushyon ke liye ttharaya haai ki ve us men lagen." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 maain ne un sab kamon ko dekha jo soorya ke neeche kiae jate haain dekho ve sab vyarth aur mano vayu ko pakadna haai. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 jo tteddha haai, vah seedha naheen ho sakata, aur jitanee vastuon men ghattee haai, ve ginee naheen jateen.." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 maain ne man men kaha, dek, jitane yarooshalem men mujh se paahile the, un sabhon se maain ne bahut adhaik buddh ipraapt kee haai aur mujh ko bahut buaddh iddh aur gyaan mil gaya haai." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 aur maain ne apana man lagaya ki buddh ika bhed loon aur bavalepan aur moorkhta ko bhee jan loon. mujhe jan pada ki yah bhee vayu ko pakadna haai.. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 kyonaki bahut buaddh ike sath bahut khed bhee hota haai, aur jo apana gyaan baddhata haai vah apana du:kh bhee baddhata haai.." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 maain ne apane man se kaha, chal, maain tujh ko anand ke dara janchoonga isaliye anandait aur magan ho. parantu dekho, yah bhee vyarth haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 maain ne hansee ke vishay men kaha, yah to bavalapan haai, aur anand ke vishay me, us se kya praapt hota haai?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 maain ne man men socha ki kis prakar se meree buddh ibanee rahe aur maain apane praan ko dakhmadha peene se kyonkar bahalaun aur kyonkar moorkhta ko thame rahoo, jab tak maloom n karoon ki vah achchha kam kaun sa haai jise manushy jeevan bhr karata rahe." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 maain ne bade bade kam kiae maain ne apane liye ghar banava liae aur apane liye dakh kee baariyan lagavai 
Ecclesiastes2:5 maain ne apane liye baariyan aur bag lagava lia, aur un men bhanti bhanati ke faladai vraksha lagaae." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 maain ne apane liye kund khudava liae ki un se vah van seencha jaae jis men paudho lagaae jate the. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 maain ne das aur dasiyan mol lee, aur mere ghar men das bhee utpann hue aur jitane mujh se pahile yarooshalem men the us ne kaheen aadhaik gaya-baail aur bhed-bakaariyon ka maain svamee tha." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 maain ne chandee aur sona aur rajaon aur praanton ke bahumooly padathorn ka bhee sangrah kiya maain ne apane liye gavaaiyon aur ganevaliyon ko rakha, aur bahut see kaaminiyan bhee, jin se manushy sukh pate haai, apanee kar leen.." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 is prakar maain apane se paahile ke sab yarooshalemavasiyon se aadhaik mahan aur dhanaddhy ho gaya taubhee meree buddh ittkaiane rahee. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 aur jitanee vastuon ke dekhne kee maain ne lalasa kee, un sabhon ko dekhne se maain n rooka maain ne apana man kisee prakar ka anand bhogane se n roka kyonki mera man mere sab parishram ke karan anaandait hua aur mere sab parishram se mujhe yahee bhag mila." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 tab maain ne fir se apane hathon ke sab kamon ko, aur apane sab parishram ko dekha, to kya dekha ki sab kuchh vyarth aur vayu ko pakadna haai, aur sansar men koi labh naheen.." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 fir maain ne apane man ko faera ki buddh iddh aur bavalepan aur moorkhta ke kayorn ko dekoon kyonaki jo manushy raja ke peechhe aaega, vah kya karega? keval vahee jo hota chala aya haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 tab maain ne dekha ki ujiyala anadhaiyare se jitana uttm haai, utana buddh ibhee moorkhta se uttm haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 jo buaddhmaian haai, usake sir men ankhen rahatee haai, parantu moorkh andhaiyare men chalata haai taubhee maain ne jan liya ki donon kee dasha aek see hotee haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 tab maain ne man men kaha, jaaisee moorkh kee dasha hogee, vaaisee hee meree bhee hogee fir maain kyon adhaik buddhmaian hua? aur maain ne man men kaha, yah bhee vyarth hee haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 kyonaki ne to buddhmaian ka aur n moorkh ka smaran sarvada bana rahega, parantu bhvishy men sab kuchh bisar jaaega." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 buaddhmaian kyonkar moorkh ke saman marata haai! isaaliye maain ne apane jeevan se gharana kee, kyonaki jo kam sansar men kiya jata haai mujhe bura maloom hua kyonaki sab kuchh vyarth aur vayu ko pakadna haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 maain ne apane sare paarishram ke praatifal se jise maain ne dharatee par kiya tha gharana kee, kyonaki avashy haai ki maain usaka fal us manushy ke liye chhod jaun jo mere bad aaega." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 yah kaun janata haai ki vah manushy buddhmaian hoga va moorkh? taubhee dharatee par jitana parishram maain ne kiya, aur usake liye buaddh iprayog kee us sab ka vahee aadhaikaree hoga. yah bhee vyarth hee haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 tab maain apane man men us sare paarishram ke vishay jo maain ne dharatee par kiya tha nirash hua," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 kyonaki aeesa manushy bhee haai, jisaka karya paarishram aur buaddh iddh aur gyaan se hota haai aur safal bhee hota haai, taubhee usako aeese manushy ke liye chhod jana padta haai, jis ne us men kuchh bhee parishram n kiya ho. yah bhee vyarth aur bahut hee bura haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 manushy jo dharatee par man laga lagakar parishram karata haai us se usako kya labh hota haai? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 usake sab din te du:khon se bhre rahate haai, aur usaka kam khed ke sath hota haai rat ko bhee usaka man chaain naheen pata. yah bhee vyarth hee haai." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 manushy ke liye khane-peene aur paarishram karate huae apane jeev ko sukhee rakhne ke sivay aur kuchh bhee achchha naheen. maain ne dekha ki yah bhee parameshvar kee or se milata haai. 
Ecclesiastes2:25 kyonaki khane-peene aur sukh bhogane men mujh se adhaik samarth kaun haai? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 jo manushy parameshvar kee draashtti men achchha haai, usako vah buaddh iddh aur gyaan aur anand deta haai parantu papee ko vah du:khbhra kam hee deta haai ki vah usaka dene ke liye sanchay karake ddher lagaae jo parameshvar kee draashtti men achchha ho. yah bhee vyarth aur vayu ko pakadna haai.." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 har aek bat ka aek avasar aur pratyek kam ka, jo akash ke neeche hota haai, aek samay haai." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 janm ka samay, aur maran ka bhee samaya bone ka samaya aur boae huae ko ukhadne ka bhee samay haai" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 ghaat karane ka samay, aur changa karane ka bhee samaya ddha dene ka samay, aur banane ka bhee samay haai" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 rone ka samay, aur hansane ka bhee samaya chhatee peettne ka samay, aur nachane ka bhee samay haai" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 patthr faenkane ka samay, aur patthr battorane ka bhee samaya gal lagane ka samay, aur gal lagane se rookane ka bhee samay haai" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 ddoonddhne ka samay, aur kho dene ka bhee samaya bacha rakhne ka samay, aur faenk dene ka bhee samay haai" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 faadne ka samay, aur seene ka bhee samaya chup rahane ka samay, aur bolane ka bhee samay haai" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 praem ka samay, aur baair karane ka bhee samaya ladai ka samay, aur mel ka bhee samay haai." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 kam karanevale ko aadhaik parishram se kya labh hota haai? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 maain ne us du:khbhre kam ko dekha haai jo parameshvar ne manushyon ke liye ttharaya haai ki ve us men lage rahen. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 us ne sab kuchh aeesa banaya ki apane apane samay par ve sundar hote haai fir us ne manushyon ke man men anadi-anant kal ka gyaan utpann kiya haai, taubhee kal ka gyaan utpann kiya haai, vah adi se ant tak manushy boojh naheen sakata." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 maain ne jan liya haai ki manushyon ke liye anand karane aur jeevan bhr bhlai karane ke siyav, aur kuchh bhee achchha naheen" 
Ecclesiastes3:13 aur yah bhee parameshvar ka dan haai ki manushy khaae-peeae aur apen sab paarishram men sukhee rahe. 
Ecclesiastes3:14 maain janata hoon ki jo kuchh parameshvar karata haai vah sada sthiar rahega n to us men kuchh baddhaya ja sakata haai aur n kuchh ghattaya ja sakata haai parameshvar aesa isaaliye karata haai ki log usaka bhy manen. 
Ecclesiastes3:15 jo kuchh hua vah is se pahile bhee ho chuka jo honevala haai, vah ho bhee chuka haai aur parameshvar beetee hui bat ko fir poochhta haai." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 fir maain ne sansar men kya dekha ki nyay ke sthan men dushttta hotee haai, aur dharma ke sthan men bhee dushttta hotee haai." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 maain ne man men kaha, parameshvar dharmee aur dushtt donon ka nyay karega, kyonaki usake yahan aek aek vishay aur aek aek kam ka samay haai." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 maain ne man men kaha ki yah isaaliye hota haai ki parameshvar manushyon ko janche aur ki ve dekh saken ki ve pashuu-saman haain. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 kyonaki jaaisee manushyon kee vaaisee hee pashuuon kee bhee dasha hotee haai donon kee vahee dasha hotee haai, jaaise aek marata vaaise hee doosara bhee marata haai. sabhon kee svans aek see haai, aur manushy pashu se kuchh baddhkar naheen sab kuchh vyarth hee haai." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 sab aek sthan me jate haain sab mittee se bane haai, aur sab mittee men fir mil jate haain." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 kya manushy ka praan upar kee or chaddhta haai aur pashuuon ka praan neeche kee or jakar mittee men mil jata haai? kaun janata haai? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 so maain ne yah dekha ki is se adhaik kuchh achchha naheen ki manushy apane kamon ke anandait rahe, kyonaki usaka bhagy yahee haai kaun usake peechhe honevalee baton ko dekhne ke liye usako lautta laaega?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 tab maain ne vah sab andhor dekha jo sansar men hota haai. aur kya dekha, ki andhor sahanevalon ke ansoo bah rahe haai, aur unako koi shaantai denevala naheen! andhore karanevalon ke hath men shaktai thee, parantu unako koi shaaantai denevala naheen tha." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 isaliye maain ne mare huon ko jo mar chuke haai, un jeevaton se jo ab tak jeevit haain aadhaik saraha" 
Ecclesiastes4:3 varan un donon se aadhaikar subhagee vah haai jo ab tak hua hee nahee, n ye bure kam dekhe jo sansar men hote haain.." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 tab men ne sab paarishram ke kam aur sab safal kamon ko dekha jo log apane padosee se jalan ke karan karate haain. yah bhee vyarth aur man ka kuddhna haai.. 
Ecclesiastes4:5 moorkh chhatee par hath rakhe rahata aur apana mans khata haai. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 chaain ke sath aek mutthar aep use mutthiyon se achchha haai, jinake sath parishram aur man ka kuddhna ho.." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 fir maain ne dharatee par yah bhee vyarth bat dekhee. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 koi akela rahata aur usaka koi naheen haai n usake betta haai, n bhai haai, taubhee usake parishram ka ant naheen hota n usakee ankhen dhan se santushtt hotee haai, aur n vah kahata haai, maain kis ke liye paarishram karata aur apane jeevan ko sukhrahit rakhta hoon? yah bhee vyarth aur nira du:khbhra kam haai." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 aek se do achchhe haai, kyonki unake parishram ka achchha fal milata haai." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 kyonaki yadi un men se aek gire, to doosara usako uttaaega parantu hay us par jo akela hokar gire aur usaka koi uttanevala n ho." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 fir yadi do jan aek sang soae to ve garma rahenge, parantu koi akela kyonkar garma ho sakata haai?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 yaadi koi akele par prabal ho to ho, parantu do usaka samhana kar sakenge. jo doree teen tage se battee ho vah jaldee naheen tootttee.." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 buaddhmaian ladka daaridra hon par bhee aeese booddhe aur moorkh raja se adhaik uttm haai jo fir sammati grahan n kare," 
Ecclesiastes4:14 chahe vah usake rajy men dhanaheen utpann hua ya bandeegrah se nikalakar raja hua ho. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 maain ne sab jeevaton ko jo dharatee par chalate firate haain dekha ki ve us doosare ladke ke sang ho liye haain jo unaka sthan lene ke liye khda hua. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 ve sab log anaginit the jin par vah pradhaan hua tha. taubhee bhvishy men honevale log usake karan anandait n honge. ni:sandeh yah bhee vyarth aur man ka kuddhna haai.. 
Ecclesiastes5:1 jab too parameshvar ke bhvan men jaa, tab savadhaanee se chalana sunane ke liye sameep jana moorkhon ke balidan chaddhane se achchha haai kyonaki ve naheen janate ki bura karate haain." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 baten karane men utavalee n karana, aur n apane man se koi bat utavalee se parameshvar ke samhane nikalana, kyonaki parameshvar svarga men haain aur too prathvee par haai isaaliye tere vachan thode hee hon.." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 kyonaki jaaise karya kee aadhaikata ke karan svapn dekha jata haai, veaise hee bahut see baton ka bolanevala moorkh ttharata haai." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 jab too parameshvar ke liye mannat mane, tab usake poora karane men vilamb n karana kyanaki vah mookhorn se prasann naheen hota. jo mannat too ne manee ho use pooree karana." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 mannat manakar pooree n karane se mannat ka n manana hee achchha haai. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 koi vachan kahakar apane ko pap men ne fansana, aur n ishvar ke doot ke samhane kahana ki yah bool se hua parameshvar kyon tera bol sunakar aprasann ho, aur tere hath ke karyon ko nashtt kare?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 kyonaki svapnon kee aadhaikata se vyarth baton kee bahutayat hotee haai: parantu too parameshvar ko bhy manana.. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 yaadi too kisee praant men nirdhanon par andhor aur nyay aur dharma ko bigadta dekhe, to is se chakit n hona kyonki aek adhaikaree se bada doosara rahata haai jise in baton kee sudhai rahatee haai, aur un se bhee or aadhaik bade rahate haain." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 boomi kee upaj sab ke liye haai, varan khetee se raja ka bhee kam nikalata haai." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 jo roopaye se praeeti rakhta haai vah roopaye se trapt n hoga aur n jo bahut dhan se praeeti rakhta haai, labh se: yah bhee vyarth haai." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 jab sampaati baddhtee haai, to usake khanevale bhee baddhte haai, tab usake svamee ko ise chhod aur kya labh hota haai ki us sampati ko apanee ankhon se dekhe?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 paarishram karanevala chahe thoda khaa, ya bahut, taubhee usakee neend sukhdai hotee haai parantu dhanee ke dhan ke baddhne ke karan usako neend naheen atee." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 maain ne dharatee par aek badee buree bala dekhee haai arthata vah dhan jise usake maalik ne apanee hee hani ke liye rakha ho," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 aur vah kisee bure kam men ud jata haai aur usake ghar men betta utpann hota haai parantu usake hath me kuchh nahee rahata. 
Ecclesiastes5:15 jaaisa vah man ke pett se nikala vaaisa hee lautt jaaega nanga hee, jaaisa aya tha, aur apane parishram ke badale kuchh bhee n paaega jise vah apane hath men le ja sake." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 yah bhee aek badee bala haai ki jaaisa vah aya, tteek vaaisa hee vah jaaega use us vyarth paarishram se aur kya labh haai?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 keval isake ki us ne jeevan bhr bechaainee se bhojan kiya, aur bahut hee du:akhait aur rogee raha aur krodha bhee karata raha?" 
Ecclesiastes5:18 sun, jo bhlee bat maain ne dekhee haai, varan jo uchit haai, vah yah ki manushy khaae aur peeae aur apane paarishram se jo vah dharatee par rita haai, apanee saree ayu bhr jo parameshvar ne use dee haai, sukhee rahe: kyonki usaka bhag yahee haai." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 varan har aek manushy jise parameshvar ne dhan sampaati dee ho, aur un se anand bhogane aur us men se apana bhag lene aur paarishram karate huae anand karane ko shaktai bhee dee ho- yah parameshvar ka varadan haai." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 is jeevan ke din use bahut smaran n rahenge, kyonki parameshvar usakee sun sunakar usake man ko anandamay rakhta haai.." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 aek burai jo maain ne dharatee par dekhee haai, vah manushyon ko bahut bharee lagatee haai:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 kisee manushy ko parameshvar dhan sampaati aur pratishtta yahan tak deta haai ki jo kuchh usaka man chahata haai use usakee kuchh bhee ghattee naheen hotee, taubhee paramashevar usako us men se khane naheen deta, koi doosara kee use khata haai yah vyarth aur bhyanak du:kh haai." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 yaadi kisee puroosh ke sau putra ho, aur vah bahut varsha jeevit rahe aur usakee ayu baddh jaa, parantu n usako praan prasann rahe aur n usakee antaim kriya kee jaa, to maain kahata hoon ki aeese manushy se adhoore samay ka janma hua bachcha uttm haai." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 kyonaki vah vyarth hee aya aur andhore men chala gaya, or usaka nam bhee andhore men chhpai gaya" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 aur n soorya ko dekha, n kisee cheej ko janane paya taueeaee isako us manushy se aadhaik chaain mila." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 han chahe vah do hajar varsha jeevit rahe, aur kuchh sukh bhogane n paa, to use kya? kya sab ke sab aek hee sthan men naheen jate?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 manushy ka sara parishram usake pett ke liye hota haai taubhee usaka man naheen bhrata. 
Ecclesiastes6:8 jo buaddhmaian haai vah moorkh se kis bat men baddhkar haai? aur kangal jo yah janata haai ki is jeevan men kis prakar se chalana chaahiye, vah bhee us se kis bat men baddhkar haai?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 ankhon se dekh lena man kee chanchalata se uttm haai: yah bhee vyarth aur man ka kuddhna haai. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 jo kuchh hua haai usaka nam yug ke arambh se rakha gaya haai, aur yah pragatt haai ki vah adamee haai, ki vah us se jo us se adhaik shaktaiman haai jhgada naheen kar sakata haai." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 bahut see aeesee baten haain jinake karan jeevan aur bhee vyarth hota haai to fir manushy ko kya labh? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 kyonaki manushy ke kshanaik vyarth jeevan men jo vah parachhai kee nai bitata haai kaun janata haai ki usake liye achchha kya haai? kyonaki manushy ko kaun bata sakata haai ki usake bad duniya men kya hoga? 
Ecclesiastes7:1 achchha nam anamol itra se aur mratyu ka din janm ke din se uttm haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 jevanar ke ghar jane se shaek hee ke ghar jana uttm haai kyonki sab manushyon ka ant yahee haai, aur jo jeevit haai vah man lagakar is par sochega." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 hansee se khed uttm haai, kyonaki munh par ke shaek se man sudharata haai." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 buaddhmaianon ka man shaek karanevalon ke ghar kee or laga rahata haai parantu moorkhon ka man anand karanevalon ke ghar laga rahata haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 moorkhon ke geet sunane se buddhmaian kee ghaudkee sunana uttm haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 kyonaki moorkh kee hansee handee ke neeche jalate huae kantto hee characharahatt ke saman hotee haai yah bhee vyarth haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 nishchay andhor se buddhmaian bavala ho jata haai aur ghoos se buaddh inash hotee haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 kisee kam ke arambh se usaka ant uttm haai aur dhaeerajavant puroosh garvee se uttm haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 apane man men utavalee se krodhait n ho, kyonaki krodha moorkhon hee ke day men rahata haai." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 yah n kahana, beete din is se kyon uttm the? kyonki yah too buddhmaianee se naheen poochhta." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 buaddh ibapautee ke sath achchhee hotee haai, varan jeevit rahanevalon ke liye labhkaree haai." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 kyonaki buddh ikee ad roopaye kee ad ka kam deta haai parantu gyaan kee shraeshttta yah haai ki buddh ise usake rakhnevalon ke praan kee raksha hotee haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 parameshvar ke kam par draashtti kara jis vastu ko us ne tteddha kiya ho use kaun seedha kar sakata haai? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 sukh ke din sukh man, aur du:kh ke din socha kyonaki parameshvar ne donon ko aek hee sang rakha haai, jis se manushy apane bad honevalee kisee bat ko n boojh sake." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 apane vyarth jeevan men maain ne yah sab kuchh dekha haai koi dharmee apane dharma ka kam karate huae nash ho jata haai, aur dushtt burai karate huae deegharayu hota haai." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 apane ko bahut dharmee n bana, aur n apane ko adhaik buddhmaian bana too kyon apane kee nash ka karan ho?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 atyant dushtt bhee n ban, aur n moorkh ho too kyon apane samay se pahile mare?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 yah achchha haai ki too is bat ko pakade rahe or us bat par se bhee hath n uttaae kyonaki jo parameshvar ka bhy manata haai vah in sab kattnaiaiyon se par jo jaaega.. 
Ecclesiastes7:19 buaddh ihee se nagar ke das hakimon kee apeksha buaddhmaian ko aadhaik samarth praapt hotee haai. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 ni:sandeh prathvee par koi aeesa dharmee manushy naheen jo bhlai hee kare aur jis se pap n hua ho.. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 jitanee baten kahee jaaen sab par kan n lagana, aeesa n ho ki too sune ki tera das tujhee ko shaap deta haai" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 kyonaki too ap janata haai ki too ne bhee bahut ber auron ko shaap diya haai.. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 yah sab maain ne buddh ise janch liya haai maain ne kaha, maain buaddhmaian ho jaunga parantu yah mujh se door raha." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 vah jo door aur atyant gaahira haai, usaka bhed kaun pa sakata haai?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 maain ne apana man lagaya ki buddh ike vishay men jan loon ki khoj nikaloon aur usaka bhed janoo, aur ki dushttta kee moorkhta aur moorkhta jo nira bavalapan haai janoon." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 aur maain ne mratyu se bhee adhaik dra:khdai aek vastu pai, arthata vah sree jisaka man fanda aur jal haai aur jisake hath hathkadiyan haai jis puroosh se parameshvar prasann haai vahee us se bachega, parantu papee usaka shaikal hoga" 
Ecclesiastes7:27 dek, upadeshak kahata haai, maain ne gyaan ke liye alag alag baten milakar janchee, aur yah bat nikalee," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 jise mera man ab tak ddoonddh raha haai, parantu naheen paya. hajar men se maain ne aek puroosh ko paya, parantu un men aek bhee sree naheen pai." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 dekho, maain ne keval yah bat pai haai, ki parameshvar ne manushy ko seedha banaya, parantu unhon ne bahut see yuaktaiyan nikalee haain.." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 buaddhmaian ke tuly kaun haai? aur kisee bat ka arth kaun laga sakata haai? manushy kee buddh ike karan usaka mukh chamakata, aur usake mucha kee kattorata door ho jatee haai." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 maain tujhe sammaati deta hoon ki parameshvar kee shapath ke karan raja kee agyaa mana. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 raja ke samhane se utavalee ke sath n lauttna aur n buree bat par hatt karana, kyonaki vah jo kuchh chahata haai karata haai." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 kyonaki raja ke vachan men to samathrya rahatee haai, aur kaun us se kah sakata haai ki too kya karata haai?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 jo agyaa ko manata haai, vah jokhaim se bachega, aur buddhmaian ka man samay aur nyay ka bhed janata haai." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 kyonaki har aek vishay ka samay aur niyam hota haai, yaadhip manushy ka du:kh usake liye bahut bharee hota haai." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 vah naheen janata ki kya honevala haai, aur kab hoga? yah usako kaun bata sakata haai?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 aeesa koi manushy naheen jisaka vash praan par chale ki vah use nikalate samay rok le, aur n koi mratyu ke din par adhaikaree hota haai aur n use ladai se chhrattee mil sakatee haai, aur n dushtt log apanee dushttta ke karan bach sakate haain." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 jitane kam dharatee par kiae jate haain un sab ko dhyanapoorvak dekhne men yah sab kuchh maain ne dekha, aur yah bhee dekha ki aek manushy doosare manushy par aadhaikaree hokar apane upar hani lata haai.." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 tab maain ne dushtton ko gaddhe jate dekha arthata unakee to kabra banee, parantu jinhon ne tteek kam kiya tha ve paavitrasthan se nikal gaae aur unaka smaran bhee nagar men n raha yah bhee vyarth hee haai." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 bure kam ke dand kee agyaa faurtee se naheen dee jatee is karan manushyon ka man bura kam karane kee ichchha se bhra rahata haai. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 chahe papee sau bar pap kare apane din bhee baddhaa, taubhee mujhe nishchay haai ki jo parameshvar se drate haain aur apane tai usako sammukh janakar eeay se chalate haai, unaka bhla hee hoga" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 parantu dushtt ka bhla naheen hone ka, aur n usakee jeevanaroopee chhaya lambee hone paaegee, kyonki vah parameshvar ka bhy naheen manata.." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 aek vyarth bat prathvee par hotee haai, arthata aeese dharmee haain jinakee vah dasha hotee haai jo dushtton kee honee chaahiye, aur aeese dushtt haain jinakee vah dasha hotee haai ho dharmiyon kee honee chahiye. maain ne kah ki yah bhee vyarth hee haai." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 tab maain ne anand ko saraha, kyonki soorya ke neeche manushy ke liye khane-peene aur anand karane ko chhod aur kuchh bhee achchha nahee, kyonki yahee usake jeevan bhr jo parameshvar usake liye dharatee par ttharaa, usake paarishram men usake sang bana rahega.." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 jab maain ne buddh ipraapt karane aur sab kam dekhne ke liye jo prathvee par kiae jate haain apana man lagaya, ki kaaise manushy rata-din jagate rahate haain" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 tab maain ne parameshvar ka sara kam dekha jo soorya ke neeche kiya jata haai, usakee thah manushy naheen pa sakata. chahe manushy usakee khoj men kitana bhee parishram kare, taubhee usako n jan paaega aur yaadhip buddhmaian kahe bhee ki maain use samajoonga, taubhee vah use n pa sakega.." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 yah sab kuchh maain ne man lagakar vichara ki in sab baton ka bhed pau, ki kis prakar dharmee aur buddhmaian lag aur unake kam parameshvar ke hath men haain manushy ke age sab prakar kee baten haain parantu vah naheen janata ki vah praem haai v baaira." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 sab baten sabhon ko aek saman hotee haai, dharmee ho ya dusht, bhle, shuuddh ya ashuudd, yagya karane aur n karanevale, sabhon kee dasha aek hee see hotee haai. jaaisee bhle manushy kee dasha, vaaisee hee papee kee dashaa jaaisee shapath khanevale kee dasha, vaaisee hee usakee jo shapath khane se drata haai." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 jo kuchh soorya ke neeche kiya jata haai us men yah aek dosh haai ki sab logon kee aek see dasha hotee haai aur manushyon ke manon men burai bhree hui haai, aur jab tak ve jeeavit rahate haain unake man men bavalapan rahata haai, aur usake bad ve mare huon men ja milate haain." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 usako parantu jo sab jeevaton men haai, use asha haai, kyonki jeevata kutta mare huae sinh se baddhkar haai." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 kyonaki jeevate to itana janate haain ki ve marenge, parantu mare huae kuchh bhee naheen janate, aur n unako kuchh aur badala mil sakata haai, kyonaki unaka smaran mitt gaya haai." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 unaka praem aur unaka baair aur unakee dah nash ho chukee, aur ab jo kuchh soorya ke neeche kiya jata haai us men sada ke liye unaka aur koi bhag n hoga.." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 apane marga par chala ja, apanee rottee anand se khaya kar, aur man men sukh manakar apana dakhmadha piya kara kyonki parameshvar tere kamon se prasann ho chuka haai.." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 tere vasr sada ujale rahe, aur tere sir par tel kee ghattee n ho.." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 apane vyarth jeevan ke sare din jo us ne soorya ke neeche tere liye ttharaae haain apanee pyaree patnee ke sang men bitana, kyonki tere jeevan aur tere paarishram men jo too soorya ke neeche karata haai tera yahee bhag haai." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 jo kam tujhe mile use apanee shaktai bhr karana, kyonki adhaelok men jahan too janevala haai, n kam n yuktai n gyaan aur n buddh ihaai.." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 fir maain ne dharatee par dekha ki n to daud men veg daudnevale aur n yuddh men shooraveer jeetate n buaddhmaian log rottee pate n samajhvale dhan, aur n praveenon par anugrah hota haai, ve sab samay aur sanyog ke vash men haai." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 kyonaki manushy apana samay naheen janata. jaaise machhaliyan dukhdai jal men bajhtee aur chidiye fande men fansatee haai, vaaise hee manushy dukhdai samay men jo un par achanak a padta haai, fans jate haain.." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 maain ne soorya ke neeche is prakar kee buddh ikee bat bhee dekhee haai, jo mujhe badee jan padee." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 aek chhotta sa nagar tha, jis men thode hee log the aur kisee bade raja ne us par chaddhai karake use ghor liya, aur usake virooddh bade bade ghaus banavaae." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 parantu us men aek daridra buaddhmaian puroosh paya gaya, aur us ne us nagar ko apanee buddh ike dara bachaya. taubhee kisee ne us daaridra ka smaran n rakha." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 tab maain ne kaha, yadhypi daridra kee buaddh ituchchh samajhee jatee haai aur usaka vachan koi naheen sunata taubhee parakram se buaddh iuttm haai." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 buaddhmaianon ke vachan jo dhaeeme dhaeeme kahe jate haain ve mookhorn ke beech prabhuta karanevale ke chilla chillakar kahane se aadhaik sune jate haain. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 ladai ke hathaiyaron se buddh iuttm haai, parantu aek papee bahut bhlai nash karata haai.." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 mar hui makkhiayon ke karan gandhaee ka tel sadne aur basane lagata haai aur thodee see moorkhta buaddh iddh aur praatishtta ko ghatta detee haai. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 buaddhmaian ka man uchit bat kee or rahata haai parantu moorkh ka man usake vipareet rahata haai. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 varan jab moorkh marga par chalata haai, tab usakee samajh kam naheen detee, aair vah sab se kahata haai, maain moorkh hoon.." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 yaadi hakim ka krodha tujh par bhdke, to apana sthan n chhodna, kyonaki dhaeeraj dharane se bade bade pap rookate haain.." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 aek burai haai jo maain ne soorya ke neeche dekhee, vah hakim kee bool se hotee haai:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 arthata moorkh badee praatishtta ke sthanon men ttharaae jate haai, aur dhanaval log neeche baaittte haain." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 maain ne dason ko ghaedon par chaddhe, aur raison ko dason kee nai boomi par chalate huae dekha haai.." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 jo gadha khode vah us men girega aur jo bada tode usako sarpa dsega. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 jo patthr faode, vah un se ghaayal hoga, aur jo lakadee katte, use usee se dr hoga." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 yaadi kulhada thotha ho aur manushy usakee dhaar ko paainee n kare, to adhaik bal lagana padega parantu safal hone ke liye buaddh ise labh hota haai." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 yaadi mantra se pahile sarpa dse, to mantra paddhnevale ko kuchh bhee labh naheen.." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 buaddhmaian ke vachanon ke karan anugrah hota haai, parantu moorkh apane vachanon ke dara nash hote haain." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 usakee bat ka arambh moorkhta ka, aur unaka ant dukhdai bavalapan hota haai." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 moorkh bahut baten baddhakar bolata haai, taubhee koi manushy naheen janata ki kya hoga, aur kaun bata sakata haai ki usake bad kya honevala haai?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 moorkh ko paarishram se thkavatt hee hotee haai, yahan tak ki vah naheen janata ki nagar ko kaaise jaae.." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 he desha, tujh par hay jab tera raja ladka haai aur tere hakim praata:kal bhoj karate haain!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 he desha, too dhany haai jab tera raja kuleen haai aur tere hakim samay par bhoj karate haai, aur vah bhee matavale hone ko nahee, varant bal baddhane ke liye!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 alasy ke karan chht kee kadiyan dab jatee haai, aur hathon kee sustee se ghar choota haai." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 bhoj hansee khushaee ke liye kiya jata haai, aur dakhmadha se jeevan ko anand milata haai aur roopayon se sab kuchh praapt hota haai." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 raja ko man men bhee shaap n dena, n dhanavan ko apane shayan kee kottree men shaap dena kyonaki koi akash ka pakshaee teree vanee ko le jaaega, aur koi udanevala jantu us bat ko pragatt kar dega.." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 apanee rottee jal ke upar dal de, kyonaki bahut din ke bad too use fir paaega." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 sat varan att janon ko bhee bhag de, kyonaki too naheen janata ki prathvee par kya vipaati a padegee." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 yaadi badal jal bhre haai, tab usaka boomi par undel dete haain aur vraksha chahe daakkhian kee or gire ya uttr kee or, taubhee jis sthan par vraksha girega, vaheen pada rahega." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 jo vayu ko takata rahega vah beej bone n paaega aur jo badalon ko dekhta rahega vah lavane n paaega. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 jaaise too vayu ke chalane ka marga naheen janata aur kis reeti se garbhvatee ke pett men haaddiyan baddhtee haai, vaaise hee too parameshvar ka kam naheen janata jo sab kuchh karata haai.." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 bhor ko apana beej bo, aur sanjh ko bhee apana hath n roka kyonki too naheen janata ki kaun sufal hoga, yah va vah va donon ke donon achchhe nikalenge." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 ujiyala manabhavana hota haai, aur dhoop ke dekhne se ankhon ko sukh hota haai." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 yaadi manushy bahut varsha jeevit rahe, to un sabhon men anaandait rahe parantu yah smaran rakhe ki andhiayare se din bhee bahut honge. jo kuchh hota haai vah vyarth haai.." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 he javan, apanee javanee men anand kar, aur apanee javanee ke dinon ke magan raha apanee manamanee kar aur apanee ankhon kee drashtti ke anusar chala. parantu yah jan rakh ki in sab baton ke vishay men parameshvar tera nyay karega.." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 apane man se khed aur apanee deh se du:kh door kar, kyonki ladkapan aur javanee dono vyarth haai." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 apanee javanee ke dinon men apane srajanahar ko smaran rak, is se paahile ki vipaati ke din aur ve varsha aae, jin men too kahe ki mera man in men naheen lagata." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 is se paahile ki soorya aur prakash aur chandrama aur taragan andhore ho jaae, aur vashara hone ke badal fir ghair jaaen" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 us samay ghar ke paharooye kanpenge, aur balavant jhuk jayange, aur pisanahaariyan thodee rahane ke karan kam chhod dengee, aur jhrokhon men se dekhnevaliyan andhaee ho jaegee," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 aur sadk kee or ke kivad band honge, aur chakkee peesane ka shabd dhaeema hoga, aur tadke chidiya bolate hee aek utt jaaega, aur sab ganevaliyon ka shabd dhaeema ho jaaega." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 fir jo uncha ho us se bhy khaya jaaega, aur marga men dravanee vastuen manee jaaengee aur badam ka ped foolega, aur ttddaiee bhee bharee lagegee, aur bookh baddhanevala fal fir kam n dega kyonki manushy apane sada ke ghar ko jayega, aur rone peettnevale sadk sadk firenge." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 us samay chandee ka tar do tookade ho jaega aur sone ka kattora toottega aur sote ke pas ghada foottega, aur kund ke pas rahatt toott jaega," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 jab mittee jyon kee tyon mittee men mil jaaegee, aur atma parameshvar ke pas jis ne use diya lautt jaaegee." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 upadeshak kahata haai, sab vyarth hee vyarth sab kuchh vyarth haai." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 upadeshak jo buddhmaian tha, vah praja ko gyaan bhee sikhata raha, aur dhyan lagakar aur poochhpachh karake bahut se neetivachan kram se rakhta tha." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 upadeshak ne manabhavane shabd khoje aur seedhaai se ye sachchee baten likh deen.. 
Ecclesiastes12:11 buaddhmaianon ke vachan paainon ke saman hote haai, aur sabhaon ke pradhaanon ke vachan gadee hui keelon ke saman haai, kyonki aek hee charavahe kee or se milate haain." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 he mere putra, inhee men chaukasee seekh. bahut pustakon kee rachana ka ant naheen hota, aur bahut paddhna deh ko thka deta haai.." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 sab kuchh suna gaya ant kee bat yah haai ki parameshvar ka bhy man aur usakee agyaaon ka palan kara kyonki manushy ka sampoorn karttvy yahee haai. 
Ecclesiastes12:14 kyonaki parameshvar sab kamon aur sab gupt baton ka, chahe ve bhlee hon ya buree, nyay karega.." 
SongOfSongs1:1 shraeshttgeet jo sulaaiman ka haai.. 
SongOfSongs1:2 vah apane munh ke chumbanon se mujhe choome! kyonki tera praem dakhmadha se uttm haai," 
SongOfSongs1:3 tere bhanati bhanati ke itraen ka sugandha uttm haai, tera nam undele huae itra ke tuly haai iseeliye kumariyan tujh se praem rakhtee haain" 
SongOfSongs1:4 mujhe kheench le ham tere peechhe daudenge raja mujhe apane mahal men le aya haai. ham tujh men magan aur anandait honge ham dakhmadha se aadhaik tere praem kee charcha karenge ve tteek hee tujh se praem rakhtee haain.. 
SongOfSongs1:5 he yarooshalem kee putraiyo, maain kalee to hoon parantu sundar hoo, kedar ke tambuon ke aur sulaaiman ke padorn ke tuly hoon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 mujhe isaaliye n ghoor ki maain savalee hoo, kyonki maain dhoop se jhulas gai. meree mata ke putra mujh se aprasann the, unhon ne mujh ko dakh kee baariyon kee rakhvaalin banaya parantu maain ne apanee nij dakh kee baree kee rakhvalee naheen kee!" 
SongOfSongs1:7 he mere praanpiry mujhe bata, too apanee bhed-bakaariyan kahan charata haai, dopahar ko too unhen kahan baaittata haai maain kyon tere sangiyon kee bhed-bakaariyon ke pas ghoonghatt kaddhe huae bhttkatee firoon?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 he striayon men sundaree, yaadi too yah n janatee ho to bhed-bakaariyon ke khuron ke chinhon par chal aur charavahon ke tambuon ke pas apanee bakaariyon ke bachchon ko chara.." 
SongOfSongs1:9 he meree piry maain ne teree tulana firaun ke rathon men jutee hui ghaedee se kee haai. 
SongOfSongs1:10 tere gal keshaen ke latton ke beech kya hee sundar haai, aur tera kantt heeron kee ladon ke beecha." 
SongOfSongs1:11 ham tere liye chandee ke fooladar sone ke abooshan banaaenge. 
SongOfSongs1:12 jab raja apanee mej ke pas baaitta tha meree jattamasee kee sugandha faail rahee thee. 
SongOfSongs1:13 mera praemee mere liye loban kee thailee ke saman haai jo meree chhatiyon ke beech men padee rahatee haai.. 
SongOfSongs1:14 mera pramee mere liye menhadee ke foolon ke guchchhe ke saman haai, jo aenagadee kee dakh kee baariyon men hota haai.." 
SongOfSongs1:15 too sundaree haai, he meree piry, too sundaree haai teree ankhen kabootaree kee see haain." 
SongOfSongs1:16 he meree piry too sundar aur manabhavanee haai. aur hamara bichhauna bhee hara haai 
SongOfSongs1:17 hamare ghar ke barage devadar haain aur hamaree chht kee kadiyan sanauvar haain.. 
SongOfSongs2:1 maain shaaron desh ka gulab aur taraiyon men ka sosan fool hoon.. 
SongOfSongs2:2 jaaise sosan fool katteele pedon ke beech vaaise hee meree piry yuvatiyon ke beech men haai.. 
SongOfSongs2:3 jaaise seb ke vraksha jangal ke vrakshaen ke beech me, vaaise hee mera praemee javanon ke beech men haai. maain usakee chhaya men hashairt hokar baaitt gai, aur usaka fal mujhe khane me meetta laga." 
SongOfSongs2:4 vah mujhe bhoj ke ghar men le aya, aur usaka jo jhnda mere upar faharata tha vah praem tha." 
SongOfSongs2:5 mujhe sookhee dakhon se sanbhalo, seb khailakar bal do: kyonki maain praem men rogee hooon." 
SongOfSongs2:6 kasha, usaka bayan hath mere sir ke neeche hota, aur apane dahine hath se vah mera alingan karata!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 he yarooshalem kee putraiyo, maain tum se chikaariyon aur maaidan kee haarinaiyon kee shapath dharakar kahatee hoo, ki jab tak praem ap se n utte, tab tak usako n usakao n jagao.." 
SongOfSongs2:8 mere praemee ka shabd sun padta haai! dekho, vah pahadon ko faandata hua ata haai." 
SongOfSongs2:9 mera praemee chikare va javan haarin ke saman haai. dekho, vah hamaree bheet ke peechhe khda haai, aur khaidkiyon kee or tak raha haai, aur jhnjhree men se dekh raha haai." 
SongOfSongs2:10 mera praemee mujh se kah raha haai, he meree piry, he meree sundaree, uttkar chalee a" 
SongOfSongs2:11 kyonaki dek, jada jata raha vashara bhee ho chukee aur jatee rahee haai." 
SongOfSongs2:12 prathvee par fool dikhai dete haai, chidiyon ke gane ka samay a pahuncha haai, aur hamare desh men pinduk ka shabd sunai deta haai." 
SongOfSongs2:13 anjeer pakane lage haai, aur dakhlataaen fool rahee haain ve sugandha de rahee haain. he meree piry, he meree sundaree, uttkar chalee a." 
SongOfSongs2:14 he meree kabootaree, pahad kee dararon men aur tteelon ke kujj men tera mukh mujhe dekhne de, tera bol mujhe sunane de, kyonki tera bol meetta, aur tera mukh aati sundar haai." 
SongOfSongs2:15 jo chhottee lomaadiyan dakh kee baariyon ko bigadtee haai, unhen pakad le, kyonki hamaree dakh kee bariyon men fool lage haain.." 
SongOfSongs2:16 mera pramee mera haai aur maain usakee hoo, vah apanee bhed-bakaariyon sosan foolon ke beech men charata haai." 
SongOfSongs2:17 jab tak din ttnda n ho aur chhaya lambee hote hote mitt n jaa, tab tak he mere praemee us chikare va javan haarin ke saman ban jo beter ke pahadon par firata haai." 
SongOfSongs3:1 rat ke samay men apane palang par apane praanpiry ko ddoonddhtee rahee maain use ddoonddhtee to rahee, parantu use n paya maain ne kaha, maain ab uttkar nagar me," 
SongOfSongs3:2 aur sadkon aur chaukon men ghoomakar apane praanpiry ko ddoonddoongee. maain use ddoonddhtee to rahee, parantu use n paya." 
SongOfSongs3:3 jo paharooae nagar men ghoomate the, ve mujhe mile, maain ne un se poochha, kya tum ne mere praanpiry ko dekha haai?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 mujh ko unake pas se age baddhe thode hee der hui thee ki mera praanapiry mujhe mil gaya. maain ne usako pakad liya, aur usako jane n diya jab tak use apanee mat ke ghar arthata apanee jananee kee kottree men n le ai.." 
SongOfSongs3:5 he yarooshalem kee putraiyo, maain tum se chikaariyon aur maaidan kee haarinaiyon kee shapath dharakar kahatee hoo, ki jab tak praem ap se n utte, tab tak usako n usakao aur n jagao.." 
SongOfSongs3:6 yah kya haai jo dhooaen ke khmbhe ke saman, gandharas aur loban se sugandhiat, aur vyoparee kee sab bhanti kee bukanee lagaae huae jangal se nikala ata haai?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 dekho, yah sulaaiman kee palakee haai! usake charon or israael ke shooraveeron men ke satt veer chal rahe haain." 
SongOfSongs3:8 ve sab ke sab talavar bandhanevale aur yuddh vidha men nipun haain. pratyek puroosh rat ke dr se jangha par talavar lattkaae rahata haai.

SongOfSongs3:10 us ne usake khmbhe chandee ke, usaka sirahana sone ka, aur gaee argavanee rang kee banavai he aur usake beech ka sthan yarooshalem kee putraiyon kee or se bade praem se jada gaya haai." 
SongOfSongs3:11 he siyyon kee putraiyon nikalakar sulaaiman raja par draashtti dalo, dekho, vah vahee mukutt pahine huae haai jise usakee mata ne usake vivah ke din aur usake man ke anand ke din, usake sir par rakha tha.." 
SongOfSongs4:1 he meree piry too sundar haai, too sundar haai! teree ankhen teree latton ke beech men kabootaron kee see dikhai detee haai. tere bal un bakariyon ke jhund ke saman haain jo gilad pahad ke ddhal par lettee hui hon." 
SongOfSongs4:2 tere dant un un kataree hui bhedon ke jhund ke saman haai, jo nahakar upar ain ho, un men har aek ke do do judva bachche hote haain. aur un men se kisee ka sakshaee naheen mara." 
SongOfSongs4:3 tere hontt lal rang kee doree ke saman haai, aur tera munh manohar haai, tere kapol teree latton ke neeche anar kee faak se dekh padte haain." 
SongOfSongs4:4 tera gala daud ke gummatt ke saman haai, jo asr-shasr ke liye bana ho, aur jis par hajar ddhalen ttngee hui ho, ve sab ddhalen shooraveeron kee haain." 
SongOfSongs4:5 teree donon chhaatiyan mrag ke do judve bachchon ke tuly haai, jo sosan foolon ke beech men charate hon." 
SongOfSongs4:6 jab tak din ttnda n ho, aur chhaya lambee hote hote mitt n jaa, tab tak maain shaeegharta se gandharas ke pahad aur loban kee pahadee par chala jaunga." 
SongOfSongs4:7 he meree piry too sarvang sundaree haai tujh men koi dosh naheen. 
SongOfSongs4:8 he meree dulhain, too mere sang labanon se, mere sang labanon se chalee a. too amana kee chottee par se, shaneer aur hermon kee chottee par se, sihon kee gufaaon se, chiton ke pahadon par se drashtti kara." 
SongOfSongs4:9 he meree bahin, he meree dulhain, too ne mera man moh liya haai, too ne apanee ankhon kee aek hee chitavan se, aur apane gale ke aek hee heere se mera day moh liya haai." 
SongOfSongs4:10 he meree bahin, he meree dulhain, tera praem kya hee manohar haai! tera praem dakhmadha se kya hee uttm haai, aur tere itraen ka sugandha is prakar ke masalon ke sugandha se!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 he meree dulhain, tere hotton se madha ttpakata haai teree jeebh ke neeche madha or doodha rahata haai teree jeebh ke neeche madha aur doodha rahata haai tere vasren ka sugandha labanon ka sa haai." 
SongOfSongs4:12 meree bahin, meree dulhain, kivad lagai hui baree ke saman, kivad band kiya hua sota, or chhap lagaya hua jhrana haai." 
SongOfSongs4:13 tere ankur uttm falavalee anar kee baree ke tuly haai, jis men menhadee aur sumbul,"

SongOfSongs5:1 he meree bahin, he meree dulhain, maain apanee baree men aya hoo, maain ne apana gandharas aur balasan chun liya maain ne madha samet chhtta kha liya, maain ne doodha aur dakhmadha bhee liya.. he mitrae, tum bhee khao, he pyaro, piyo, manamana piyo!"

Isaiah1:1 amos ke putra yashaayah ka darshan, jisako us ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke vishay men ujjaiyah, yotam, ahaj, aur hijaakiyyah nam yahooda ke rajaon ke dinon men paya." 
Isaiah1:2 he svarga sun, aur he prathvee kan laga kyonaki yahova kahata haai: maain ne balabachchon ka palan poshan kiya, aur unako baddhaya bhee, parantu unhon ne mujh se balava kiya." 
Isaiah1:3 baail to apane malik ko aur gadaha apane svamee kee charanee ko pahichanata haai, parantu israael mujhen naheen janata, meree praja vichar naheen karatee.." 
Isaiah1:4 hay, yah jati pap se kaaisee bhree haai! yah samaj adharma se kaaisa lada hua haai! is vansh ke log kaaise kukarmee haai, ye ladkebale kaaise bigade huae haain! unhon ne yahova ko chhod diya, unhon ne israael ke pavitra ko tuchchh jana haai! ve paraae banakar door ho gaae haain.." 
Isaiah1:5 tum balava kar karake kyon adhaik mar khana chahate ho? tumhara sir ghaavon se bhr gaya, aur tumhara day du:kh se bhra haai." 
Isaiah1:6 nakh se sir tak kaheen bhee kuchh arogyata nahee, keval chott aur kode kee mar ke chinh aur sade huae ghaav haain jo n dabaye gaa, n bandho gaa, n tel lagakar naramaye gaae haain.." 
Isaiah1:7 tumhara desh ujada pada haai, tumhare nagar bhsm ho gaae haain tumhare kheton ko paradeshaee log tumhare dekhte hee nigal rahe haain vah paradeshyaien se nash kiae huae desh ke saman ujad haai." 
Isaiah1:8 aur siyyon kee bettee dakh kee baree men kee jhopadee kee nain chhod dee gai haai, va kakadee ke khet men kee chhpaariya ya ghaire huae nagar ke saman akelee khdee haai." 
Isaiah1:9 yaadi senaon ka yahova hamare thode se logon ko n bacha rakhta, to ham sadom ke saman ho jate, aur amora ke saman ttharate.." 
Isaiah1:10 he sadom ke nyaiyo, yahova ka vachan suno! he amora kee praja, hamare parameshvar kee shaiksha par kan laga." 
Isaiah1:11 yahova yah kahata haai, tumhare bahut se melabali mere kis kam ke haain? maain to meddhon ke homabaaliyon se aur pale huae pashuuon kee charbee se agha gaya hoon" 
Isaiah1:12 maain bachhdon va bhed ke bachchon va bakaron ke lohoo se prasann naheen hota.. tum jab apane munh mujhe dikhane ke liye ate ho, tab yah kaun chahata haai ki tum mere anganon ko panv se raundo?" 
Isaiah1:13 vyarth annabali fir mat lao dhoop se mujhe gharana haai. naye chand aur vishraamadin ka manana, aur sabhaon ka prachar karana, yah mujhe bura lagata haai. mahasabha ke sath hee sath anarth kam karana mujh se saha naheen jata." 
Isaiah1:14 tumhare naye chandon aur niyat pavorn ke manane se maain jee se baair rakhta hoon ve sab mujhe bojh se jan padte haai, maain unako sahate sahate ukata gaya hoon." 
Isaiah1:15 jab tum meree or hath faailao, tab maain tum se munh faer loonga tum kitanee hee praarthna kyon n karo, taubhee maain tumharee n sunoonga kyonki tumhare hath koon se bhre haain." 
Isaiah1:16 apane ko dhaekar paavitra karo: meree ankhon ke samhane se apane bure kamon ko door karo bhvishy men burai karata chhod do," 
Isaiah1:17 bhlai karana seekho yatn se nyay karo, upadravee ko sudhaaro anath ka nyay chukao, vidhava ka mukama lado.." 
Isaiah1:18 yahova kahata haai, ao, ham apas men vadaavivad karen: tumhare pap chahe lal rang ke ho, taubhee ve him kee nain ujale ho jaaenge aur chahe argavanee rang ke ho, taubhee ve un ke saman shvet ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah1:19 yaadi tum agyaakaree hokar meree mano," 
Isaiah1:20 to is desh ke uttm se uttm padathai khaoge aur yadi tum ne mano aur balava karo, to talavar se mare jaoge yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Isaiah1:21 jo nagaree satee thee so kyonkar vyabhaichaarin ho gai! vah nyay se bhree thee aur us men dharma paya jata tha, parantu ab us men hatyare hee paae jate haain. teree chandee ghaatu ka maail ho gai," 
Isaiah1:22 tere dakhmadha men panee mil gaya haai. 
Isaiah1:23 tere hakim hatteele aur choron se mile haain. ve sab ke sab ghoos khanevale aur bhentt ke lalachee haain. ve anath ka nyay naheen karate, aur n vidhava ka mukama apane pas ane dete haain." 
Isaiah1:24 is karan prabhu senaon ke yahova, israael ke shaktaiman kee yah vanee haai: suno, maain apane shatrauon ko door karake shaantai paunga, aur apane baairiyon se palatta loonga." 
Isaiah1:25 aur maain tum par hath baddhakar tumhara dhaatu ka maail pooree reeati se door karoonga. 
Isaiah1:26 aur maain tum men pahile kee nain nyayee aur adi kal ke saman mantraee fir niyukt karoonga. usake bad too dhamrapuree aur satee nagaree kahalaaegee.. 
Isaiah1:27 siyyon nyay ke dara, aur jo us men firenge ve dharma ke dara chhuda liae jaaenge." 
Isaiah1:28 parantu balavaiyon aur papiyon ka aek sang nash hoga, aur jinhon ne yahova ko nyaga haai, unaka ant ho jaaega." 
Isaiah1:29 kyonaki jin banjavrakshaen se tum praeeti rakhte the, un se ve lajjait honge, aur jin bariyon se tum prasann rahate the, usake karan tumhare munh kale honge." 
Isaiah1:30 kyonaki tum patte murjhaae huae banjavraksha ke, aur bina jal kee baree ke saman ho jaoge." 
Isaiah1:31 aur balavan to san aur usaka kam chingaree banega, aur donon aek sath jalenge, aur koi bujhanevala n hoga.." 
Isaiah2:1 amos ke putra yashaayah ka vachan, jo us ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke vishay men darshan men paya.." 
Isaiah2:2 ant ke dinon men aeesa hoga ki yahova ke bhvan ka parvat sab pahadon par draddh kiya jaaega, aur sab pahaadiyon se aadhaik uncha kiya jaaega aur har jati ke lage dhaara kee nai usakee or chalengen." 
Isaiah2:3 aur bahut deshaen ke lage aaenge, aur apas men kahenge: ao, ham yahova ke parvat par chaddhkar, yakoob ke parameshvar ke bhvan men jaaen tab vah hamako apane marga sikhaaega, aur ham usake pathon par chalenge. kyonaki yahova kee vyavastha siyyon se, aur usaka vachan yarooshalem se nikalega." 
Isaiah2:4 vah jaati jati ka nyay karega, aur desh desh ke logon ke jhgadon ko mittaaega aur ve apanee talavaren peettkar hal ke faal aur apane bhalon ko hansiya banaaenge tab aek jati doosaree jaati ke virooddh fir talavar n chalaaegee, n log bhvishy men yuddh kee vidha seekhenge.." 
Isaiah2:5 he yakoob ke gharane, a, ham yahova ke prakash men chalen.." 
Isaiah2:6 too ne apanee praja yakoob ke gharane ko tyag diya haai, kyonki ve poorviyon ke vyavahar par tan man se chalate aur palishtaiyon kee nai ttona karate haai, aur paradeshaiyon ke sath hath milate haain." 
Isaiah2:7 unaka desh chandee aur sone se bhrapoor haai, aur unake rath anaginit haain." 
Isaiah2:8 unaka desh mooraton se bhra haai ve apane hathon kee banai hui vastuon ko jinhen unahon ne apanee ungaliyon se sanvara haai, dandvata karate haain." 
Isaiah2:9 is se manushy jhukate, aur bade manushy pranam karate haai, is karan unako kshama n kara!" 
Isaiah2:10 yahova ke bhy ke karan aur usake pratap ke mare chattan men ghaus ja, aur mittee men chhpai ja." 
Isaiah2:11 kyonaki adaamiyon kee ghamand bhree ankhen neechee kee jaaengee aur manushyon ka ghamand door kiya jaaega aur us din keval yahova hee unche par virajaman rahega.. 
Isaiah2:12 kyonaki senaon ke yahova ka din sab ghamaandiyon aur unchee gardanavalon par aur unnati se foolanevalonpar aaega aur ve jhukaae jaaenge 
Isaiah2:13 aur labanon ke sab devadaron par jo unche aur baden haain 
Isaiah2:14 basan ke sab banjavrakshaen para aur sab unche pahadon aur sab unchee pahadiyon para 
Isaiah2:15 sab unche gummatton aur sab draddh shaharapanahon para 
Isaiah2:16 tashareesh ke sab jahajon aur sab sundar chitrakaree par vah din ata haai. 
Isaiah2:17 aur manushy ka garva mittaya jaaega, aur manushyon ka ghamand neecha kiya jaaega aur us din keval yahova hee unche par virajaman rahega." 
Isaiah2:18 aur mooraten sab kee sab nashtt ho jaaengee. 
Isaiah2:19 aur jab yahova prathvee ke kaampait karane ke liye uttega, tab usake bhy ke karan aur usake pratap ke mare log chattanon kee guufaaon aur boomi ke bilon men ja ghausenge.." 
Isaiah2:20 us din log apanee chandee-sone kee mooraton ko jinhen unhon ne dandvata karane ke liye banaya tha, chhchoondaron aur chamageedadon ke age faenkenge," 
Isaiah2:21 aur jab yahova prathvee ko kaampait karane ke liye uttega tab ve usake bhy ke karan aur usake pratap ke mare chattanon kee dararon or pahaadiyon ke chhedon men ghausenge. 
Isaiah2:22 so tum manushy se pare raho jisakee shvas usake nathnon men haai, kyonki usaka mooly haai hee kya?" 
Isaiah3:1 suno, prabhu senaon ka yahova yarooshalem aur yahooda ka sab prakar ka sahara aur sirahana arthata ann ka sara adhaar, aur jal ka sara adhaar door kar dega" 
Isaiah3:2 aur vee aur yoddha ko, nyayee aur nabee ko, bhavee vakta aur vraddh ko, pachas sipaahiyon ke saradar aur praatishttit puroosh ko," 
Isaiah3:3 mantraee aur chatur kareegar ko, aur nipun ttonhe ko bhee door kar dega." 
Isaiah3:4 aur maain ladkon ko unake haakim kar doonga, aur bachche un par prabhuta karenge." 
Isaiah3:5 aur praja ke lage apas men aek doosare par, aur har aek apane padosee par andhor karenge aur javan vraddh janon se aur neech jan mananeey logon se asabhyata ka vyavahar karenge.." 
Isaiah3:6 us samay jab koi puroosh apane pita ke ghar men apane bhai ko pakadkar kahega ki tere pas to vasr haai, a hamara nyayee ho ja aur is ujade desh ko apane vash men kar le" 
Isaiah3:7 tab vah shapath khakar kahega, maain changa karanehara n hoonga kyonki mere ghar men n to rottee haai aur n kapade isaliye tum mujhe praja ka nyayee naheen niyukt kar sakoge." 
Isaiah3:8 yarooshalem to dgamagaya aur yahooda gir gaya haai kyeanaki unake vachan aushra unake kam yahova ke virooddh haai, jo usakee tejomay ankhon ke samhane balava karanevale tthare haain.." 
Isaiah3:9 unaka chihara bhee unake virooddh sakshaee deta haai ve sadomiyon kee nai apane ap ko ap hee bakhanate aur naheen chhpaiate haain. un par haya! kyonaki unhon ne apanee hani ap hee kee haai. 
Isaiah3:10 dhaarmiyon se kaho ki unaka bhla hoga, kyonki usake kamon ka fal usako milega." 
Isaiah3:11 meree praja par bachche andhor karate aur striayan un par prabhuta karatee haain. he meree praja, tere aguve tujhe bhttkate haai, aur tere chalane ka marga bhuta dete haain.." 
Isaiah3:12 meree praja par bachche andhor karate aur striayan un par prabhuta karatee haain. he meree praja, tere aguv tujhe bhttkate haai, aur tere chalane ka marga bhula dete haain.." 
Isaiah3:13 yahova desh desh ke logon se mukama ladne aur unaka nyay karane ke liye khda haai. 
Isaiah3:14 yahova apanee praja ke vraddh aur hakimon ke sath yah vivad karata haai, tum hee ne baree kee dakh kha dalee haai, aur deen logon ka dhan loottkar tum ne apane gharon men rakha haai." 
Isaiah3:15 senaon ke prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, tum kyon meree praja ko dalate, aur deen logon ko pees dalate ho!" 
Isaiah3:16 yahova ne yah bhee kaha haai, kyonaki siyyon kee striayan ghamand karateen aur sir unche kiye ankhen mattkateen aur ghaunghaurooon ko chhmachhmatee hui ttumuk ttumuk chalatee haai," 
Isaiah3:17 isaliye prabhu yahova unake sir ko ganja karega, aur unake tan ko ugharavaaega.." 
Isaiah3:18 us samay prabhu ghaunghaurooo, jaliyo," 
Isaiah3:19 chandraharo, jhumako, kado, ghoonghatto," 
Isaiah3:20 pagadiyo, paaikariyo, pattuko, sugandhapatrae, gando," 
Isaiah3:21 angoottyaie, nattho," 
Isaiah3:22 sundar vasre, kutiayo, charo, battuo," 
Isaiah3:23 darpano, malamal ke vasre, bundaiyo, dupatton in sabhon kee shaebha ko door karega." 
Isaiah3:24 aur sugandha kee santee sadahat, sundar karghanee kee santee bandhan kee rassee, gunthen huae balon kee santee ganjapan, sundar pattuke kee santee ttatt kee pettee, aur sundarata kee santee dag honge." 
Isaiah3:25 tere puroosh talavar se, aur shooraveer yuddh me mare jaaenge." 
Isaiah3:26 aur usake faattkon men sans bhrana aur vilap karana hoga aur boomi par akelee baaittee rahegee. 
Isaiah4:1 us samay sat striayan ek puroosh ko pakadkar kahengee ki rottee to ham apanee hee khaengee, aur vasr apane hee paahinengee, keval ham teree kahalaen hamaree namadharai ko door kara.." 
Isaiah4:2 us samay israel ke bache huon ke liye yahova ka pallav, booshan aur mahima ttharega, aur boomi kee upaj, badai aur shaebha ttharegee." 
Isaiah4:3 aur jo koi siyyon men bacha rahe, aur yarooshalem men rahe, arthata yarooshalem men jitanon ke nam jeevanapatra men likhe ho, ve pavitra kahalaaenge." 
Isaiah4:4 yah tab hoga, jab prabhu nyay karanevalee aur bhsm karanevalee atma ke ddhara siyyon kee striayon ke mal ko dhae chukega aur yarooshalem ke koon ko door kar chukega." 
Isaiah4:5 tab yahova siyyon parvat ke aek aek ghar ke upar, aur usake sabhasthnon ke upar, din ko to dhoonae ka badal, aur rat ko dhadhakatee ag ka prakash sirajega, aur samast vibhv ke upar aek mandp chhaya rahega." 
Isaiah4:6 vah din ko ghaam se bachane ke liye aur andhaee-panee aur jhdee men aek sharan aur ad hoga.. 
Isaiah5:1 ab maain apane piry ke liye aur usakee dakh kee baree ke vishay men geet gaunga: aek ati upaja tteele par mere piry kee aek dakh kee baree thee. 
Isaiah5:2 us ne usakee mittee khodee aur usake patthr beenakar us men uttm jaati kee ek dakhlata lagai usake beech men us ne ek gummatt banaya, aur dakhras ke liye ek kund bhee khoda tab us ne dakh kee asha kee, parantu us men nikammee dakhen hee lageen.." 
Isaiah5:3 ab he yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon aur he yahooda ke manushyo, mere aur meree dakh kee baree ke beech nyay karo." 
Isaiah5:4 meree dakh kee baree ke liye aur kya karana rah gaya jo maain ne usake liye n kiya ho? fir kya karan haai ki jab maain ne dakh kee asha kee tab us men nikammee dakhen lageen? 
Isaiah5:5 ab maain tum ko jatata hoon ki apanee dakh kee baree se kya karoonga. maain usake kanttevale bade ko ukhad doonga ki vah chatt kee jaa, aur usakee bheet ko ddha doonga ki vah raundee jaae." 
Isaiah5:6 maain use ujad doonga vah n to fir chhanttee aur n khodee jaaegee aur us men bhanti bhanati ke katteele ped ugenge maain meghaen ko bhee agyaa doonga ki us par jal n barasaaen.. 
Isaiah5:7 kyonaki senaon ke yahova kee dakh kee baree israael ka gharana, aur usaka manabha paudha yahooda ke log haai aur us ne un men nyay kee asha kee parantu anyay dekh pada us ne dharma kee asha kee, parantu use chillahatt hee sun padee!" 
Isaiah5:8 hay un par jo ghar se ghar, aur khet se khet yahan tak milate jate haain ki kuchh sthan naheen bachata, ki tum desh ke beech akele rah jao." 
Isaiah5:9 senaon ke yahova ne mere sunate kaha haai: nishchay bahut se ghar sunasan ho jaaenge, aur baden bade aur sundar ghar nirjan ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah5:10 kyonaki das beegho kee dakh kee baree se aek hee bat dakhmadha milega, aur homer bhr ke beech se aek hee aepa ann utpann hoga.." 
Isaiah5:11 hay un par jo bade tadke uttkar maadira peene lagate haain aur badee rat tak dakhmadha peete rahate haain jab tak unako garmee n chaddh jaae! 
Isaiah5:12 unakee jevanaron men veena, sarangee, df, bansalee aur dakhmadha, ye sab paye jate haain parantu ve yahova ke karya kee or drashtti naheen karate, aur usake hathon ke kam ko naheen dekhte.." 
Isaiah5:13 isaliye agyaanata ke karan meree praja bandhauai men jatee haai, usake pratishttit puroosh bookhon marate aur sadhaaran log pyas se byakul hote haain." 
Isaiah5:14 isaliye adhaelok ne atyant lalasa karake apana munh bepaariman pasara haai, aur unaka vibhv aur bheed bhad aur anand karanevale sab ke sab usake munh men ja padte haain." 
Isaiah5:15 sadhaaran manushy dabaae jate aur bade manushy neeche kiae jate haai, aur abhaimaaniyon kee ankhen neechee kee jatee haain." 
Isaiah5:16 parantu senaon ka yahova nyay karane ke karan mahan ttharata, aur pavitra parameshvar dharmee hone ke karan pavitra ttharata haai!" 
Isaiah5:17 tab bhedon ke bachche mano apane khet men charenge, parantu shttpushtton ke ujade sthan paradeashaiyon ko charai ke liye milenge.." 
Isaiah5:18 hay un par jo adharma ko anarth kee raassaiyon se aur pap ko mano gadee ke rasse se kheench le ate haai," 
Isaiah5:19 jo kahate haai, vah faurtee kare aur apane kam ko shaeegha kare ki ham usako dekhen aur israael ke paavitra kee yuaktai pragatt ho, vah nikatt aae ki ham usako samajhen!" 
Isaiah5:20 hay un par jo bure ko bhla aur bhle ko bura kahate, jo andhaiyare ko ujiyala aur ujiyale ko anadhaiyara ttharate, aur kaduve ko meetta aur meette ko kadva karake manate haain!" 
Isaiah5:21 hay un par jo apanee draashtti men gyaanee aur apane lekhe buddhmaian haain! 
Isaiah5:22 hay un par jo dakhmadha peene men veer aur maadira ko tej banane men bahadur haai," 
Isaiah5:23 jo ghoos lekar dushtton ko nirdosha, aur nirdoshaen ko doshaee ttharate haain!" 
Isaiah5:24 is karan jaaise agnai kee lau se koonttee bhsm hotee haai aur sookhee ghaas jalakar baaitt jatee haai, vaaise hee unakee jad sad jaaegee aur unake fool dhool hokar ud jaaenge kyonaki unhon ne senaon ke yahova kee vyavastha ko nikammee jana, aur israael ke paavitra ke vachan ko tuchchh jana haai." 
Isaiah5:25 is karan yahova ka krodha apanee praja par bhdka haai, aur us ne unake virooddh hath baddhakar unako mara haai, aur pahad kanp utte aur logon kee lothen sadkon ke beech kooda see padee haain. itane par bhee usaka krodha shaant naheen hua aur usaka hath ab tak baddha hua haai.." 
Isaiah5:26 vah door door kee jaatiyon ke liye jhnda khda karega, aur seenttee bajakar unako prathvee kee chhor se bulaaega dekho, ve faurtee karake veg se aaenge!" 
Isaiah5:27 un men koi thka naheen n koi ttokar khata haai koi unghane va sonevala nahee, kisee ka faentta naheen khula, aur kisee ke jooton ka bandhan naheen tootta" 
Isaiah5:28 unake teer chokhe aur dhanush chaddhaae huae haai, unake ghaedon ke khur vajra ke se aur rathon ke paahiye bavandr sareekhe haain." 
Isaiah5:29 ve sinh va javan sinh kee nai garajate haain ve gurrakar aher ko pakad lete aur usako le bhagate haai, aur koi use un se naheen chhuda sakata." 
Isaiah5:30 us samay ve un par samudra ke garjan kee nai garjenge aur yaadi koi desh kee or dekhe, to use andhakar aur sankatt dekh padega aur jyoti meghaen se chhpai jaegee.." 
Isaiah6:1 jis varsha ujjaiyyah raja mara, maain ne prabhu ko bahut hee unche sinhasan par virajaman dekha aur usake vasr ke ghor se maandair bhr gaya." 
Isaiah6:2 us se unche par sarap dikhai die unake chh: chh: pankh the do pankhon se ve apane munh ko ddhanpe the aur do se apane panvon ko, aur do se ud rahe the." 
Isaiah6:3 aur ve aek doosare se pukar pukarakar kah rahe the: senaon ka yahova paavitra, paavitra, paavitra haai saree prathvee usake tej se bhrapoor haai." 
Isaiah6:4 aur pukaranevale ke shabd se devaddhiyon kee neven dol uttee, aur bhvan dhoonae se bhr gaya." 
Isaiah6:5 tab maain ne kaha, haya! haya! maain nash hooa kyonaki maain ashuuddh honttvala manushy hoo, aur ashuuddh honttvale manushyon ke beech men rahata hoon kyonaki maain ne senaon ke yahova maharajadhairaj ko apanee ankhon se dekha haai!" 
Isaiah6:6 tab aek sarap hath men angara liae hua, jise us ne chimatte se vedee par se utta liya tha, mere pas ud kar aya." 
Isaiah6:7 aur us ne us se mere munh ko chookar kaha, dek, is ne tere hontton ko choo liya haai, isaaliy tera adharma door ho gaya aur tere pap kshama ho gaae." 
Isaiah6:8 tab maain ne prabhu ka yah vachan suna, maain kis ko bhenjoo, aur hamaree or se kaun jaaega? tab maain ne kaha, maain yahan hoon! mujhe bhej" 
Isaiah6:9 us ne kaha, ja, aur in logon se kah, sunate hee raho, parantu n samajho dekhte hee raho, parantu n boojho." 
Isaiah6:10 too in logon ke man ko motte aur unake kanon ko bharee kar, aur unakee ankhon ko band kara aeesa n ho ki ve ankhon se dekhe, aur kanon se sune, aur man se boojhe, aur man firaven aur change ho jaaen." 
Isaiah6:11 tab maain ne poochha, he prabhu kab taka? us ne kaha, jab tak nagar n ujade aur un men koi rah n jaa, aur gharon men koi manushy n rah jaa, aur desh ujad aur sunasan ho jaa," 
Isaiah6:12 aur yahova manushyon ko us men se door kar de, aur desh ke bahut se sthan nirjan ho jaaen." 
Isaiah6:13 chahe usake nivaasiyon ka dasavan ansh bhee rah jaa, taubhee vah nash kiya jaaega, paranatu jaaise chhotte va bade banjavraksha ko katt dalane par bhee usaka toontt bana rahata haai, vaaise hee pavitra vansh usaka toontt ttharega.." 
Isaiah7:1 yahooda ka raja ahaj jo yotam ka putra aur ujjaiyyah ka pota tha, usake dinon men aram ke raja raseen aur israael ke raja ramalyah ke putra pekah ne yarooshalem se ladne ke liye chaddhai kee, parantu yuddh karake un se kuchh ban n pada" 
Isaiah7:2 jab daud ke gharane ko yah samachar mila ki araamiyon ne aepraaiamiyon se saandhi kee haai, tab usaka aur praja ka bhee man aeesa kanp utta jaaise van ke vraksha vayu chalane se kanp jate haain." 
Isaiah7:3 tab yahova ne yashaayah se kaha, apane putra shaaryashoob ko lekar dhaeabiyon ke khet kee sadk se uparalee pokhre kee nalee ke sire par ahaj se bhentt karane ke liye ja," 
Isaiah7:4 aur us se kah, savadhaan aur shaant ho aur un donon dhoonan nikalatee lukattyaien se arthata raseen aur araamiyon ke bhdke huae kop se, aur ramalyah ke putra se mat dr, aur n tera man kachcha ho." 
Isaiah7:5 kyanaki araamiyon aur ramalyah ke putra samet aepraaimiyon ne yah kahakar tere virooddh buree yuktai ttanee haai ki ao," 
Isaiah7:6 ham yahooda par chaddhai karake usako ghabara de, aur usako apane vash men lakar tabel ke putra ko raja niyukt kar den." 
Isaiah7:7 isaliye prabhu yahova ne yah kaha haai ki yah yuktai n to safal hogee aur n pooree. 
Isaiah7:8 kyeanki aram ka sir damishk, or damishk ka sir raseen haai. fir aepraaim ka sir shaemaron aur shaemaron ka sir ramalyah ka putra haai." 
Isaiah7:9 paainsatt varsha ke bheetar aepraaim ka bal itana toott jaaega ki vah jati banee n rahegee. yadi tum log is bat kee prateeati n karo to nishchay tum sthiar n rahoge.. 
Isaiah7:10 fir yahova ne ahaj se kaha," 
Isaiah7:11 apane parameshvar yahova se koi chinh manga chahe vah gahire sthan ka ho, va upar asaman ka ho." 
Isaiah7:12 ahaj ne kaha, maain naheen mangane ka, aur maain yahova kee pareeksha naheen karoonga." 
Isaiah7:13 tab us ne kaha, he daud ke gharane suno! kya tum manushyon ko ukata dena chhottee bat samajhkar ab mere parameshvar ko bhee ukata doge?" 
Isaiah7:14 is karan prabhu ap hee tum ko aek chinh dega. suno, aek kumaree garbhvatee hogee aur putra janegee, aur usaka nam immanooael rakhegee." 
Isaiah7:15 aur jab tak vah bure ko tyagana aur bhle ko grahan karana n jane tab tak vah makkhn aur madha khaaega. 
Isaiah7:16 kyonaki us se pahile ki vah ladka bure ko tyagana aur bhle ko grahan karana jane, vah desh jisake donon rajaon se too ghabara raha haai nirjan ho jaaega." 
Isaiah7:17 yahova tujh par, teree praja par aur tere pita ke gharane par aeese dinon ko le aaega ki jab se aepraaim yahooda se alag ho gaya, tab ve vaaise din kabhee naheen aae , arthata ashshoor ke raja ke din.." 
Isaiah7:18 us samay yahova un makkhiayon ko jo misr kee nadiyon ke siron par rahatee haai, aur un madhaumaakkhiayon ko jo ashshoor desh men rahatee haai, seettee bajakar bulaega." 
Isaiah7:19 aur ve sab kee sab akar is desh ke pahadee nalon me, aur chattanon kee dararon me, aur sab bhttkattaiyon aur sab charaiyon par baaitt jaaengee.." 
Isaiah7:20 usee samay prabhu mahanad ke paravale ashshoor ke rajaroopee bhade ke choore se sir aur panvon ke ronen moondega, us se daddhee bhee pooree mund jaegee.." 
Isaiah7:21 us samay aeesa hoga ki manushy keval ek kalor aur do bhedon ko palega 
Isaiah7:22 aur ve itana doodha dengee ki vah makkhn khaya karega kyonaki jitane is desh men rah jaaenge vah sab makkhn aur madha khaya karenge.. 
Isaiah7:23 us samay jin jin sthanen men hajar ttukade chandee kee hajar dakhlataen haai, un sab sthanen men katteele hee katteele ped honge." 
Isaiah7:24 teer aur dhanush lekar log vahan jaya karenge, kyonaki sare desh men katteele ped ho jaaenge aur jitane pahad kudal se khode jate haai," 
Isaiah7:25 un sabhon par katteele pedon ke dr ke mare koi n jaega, ve gaye baailon ke charane ke, aur bhed bakaariyon ke raundane ke liye honge.." 
Isaiah8:1 fir yahova ne mujh se kaha, aek badee paattyai lekar us par sadhaaran aksharon se yah likh: mahesharalalhashabaj ke liye." 
Isaiah8:2 aur maain vishvasayogy purooshaen ko arthata uriyyah yajak aur jeberekyah ke putra jakaryah ko is bat kee sakshaee karoonga. 
Isaiah8:3 aur maain apanee patnee ke pas gaya, aur vah garbhvatee hui aur usake putra utpann hua. tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, usaka nam mahesharalalhashabaj rakh" 
Isaiah8:4 kyonaki is se pahile ki vah ladka bapoo aur ma pukaran jane, daamishk aur shaemaron donon kee dhana-sampati loottkar ashshoor ka raja apane desh ko bhejega.." 
Isaiah8:5 yahova ne fir mujh se doosaree bar kaha," 
Isaiah8:6 isaliye ki log shaeeloh ke dhaeere dhaeere bahanevale sote ko nikamma janate haai, aur raseen aur ramalyah ke putra ke sang aeka karake anand karate haai," 
Isaiah8:7 is karan sun, prabhu un par us prabal aur gaahire mahanad ko, arthata ashshoor ke raja ko usake sare pratap ke sath chaddha laaega aur vah unake sab nalon ko bhr dega aur sare kadadon se chhlakakar bahega" 
Isaiah8:8 aur vah yahooda par bhee chaddh aaega, aur baddhte baddhte us par chaddhega aur gale tak pahunchega aur he immanuel, tera samast desh usake pankhon ke faailane se ddhnp jaaega.." 
Isaiah8:9 he logo, halla karo to karo, parantu tumhara satyanash ho jaaega. he prathvee ke door door desh ke sab logon kan lagakar suno, apanee apanee kamar kaso to kaso, parantu tumhare ttukade ttukade kiae jaaenge apanee kamar kaso to kaso, parantu tumhara satyanash ho jaaega." 
Isaiah8:10 tum yuaktai karo to karo, parantu vah nishfal ho jaaegee, tum kuchh bhee kaho, parantu tumhara kaha hua ttharega nahee, kyonki parameshvar hamare sang haai.." 
Isaiah8:11 kyonaki yahova draddhta ke sath mujh se bola aur in logon kee see chal chalane ko mujhe mana kiya," 
Isaiah8:12 aur kaha, jis bat ko yah log rajadraeh kahe, usako tum rajadraeh n kahana, aur jis bat se ve drate haain us se tum n drana aur n bhy khana." 
Isaiah8:13 senaon ke yahova hee ko paavitra janana usee ka dr manana, aur usee ka bhy rakhna." 
Isaiah8:14 aur vah sharansthan hoga, parantu israael ke dono gharanon ke liye ttokar ka patthr aur ttes kee chattan, aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ke liye fanda aur jal hoga." 
Isaiah8:15 aur bahut se log ttokar khaaenge ve girenge aur chakanachoor honge ve fande men fasenge aur pakade jaaenge. 
Isaiah8:16 chitaunee ka patra band kar do, mere chelon ke beech shaiksha par chhap laga do." 
Isaiah8:17 maain us yahova kee batt johata rahoonga jo apane munkh ko yakoob ke gharane se chhpaiaye haai, aur maain usee par asha lagaae rahoonga." 
Isaiah8:18 dek, maain aur jo ladke yahova ne mujhe saunpe haai, usee senaon ke yahova kee or se jo siyyon parvat par nivas kiae rahata haai israaeliyon ke liye chinh aur chamatkar haain." 
Isaiah8:19 jab log tum se kahen ki ojhaon aur ttonhon ke pas jakar poochho jo gunagunate aur fausafausate haai, tab tum yah kahana ki kya praja ko apane parameshvar hee ke pas jakar n poochhna chaahiye? kya jeevaton ke liye mudorn se poochhna chaahiye?" 
Isaiah8:20 vyavastha aur chitaunee hee kee charcha kiya karo! yadi ve log is vachanon ke anusar n bolen to nishchay unake liye pau n fattegee 
Isaiah8:21 ve is desh men kleashait aur bookhe firate rahenge aur jab ve bookhe honge, tab ve krodha men akar apane raja aur apane parameshvar ko shaap denge, aur apana mukh upar akash kee or uttaaenge" 
Isaiah8:22 tab ve prathvee kee or draashtti karenge parantu unhen saketee aur andhiayara arthata sankatt bhra andhakar hee dekh padega aur ve ghaer andhakar men ddhkel diae jaaenge.. 
Isaiah9:1 taubhee sankatt-bhra andhakar jata rahega. pahile to us ne jabooloon aur naptalee ke deshaen ka apaman kiya, parantu antaim dinon men tal kee or yaradan ke par kee anyajatiyon ke galeel ko mahima dega." 
Isaiah9:2 jo log aandhiayare men chal rahe the unhon ne bada ujiyala dekha aur jo log ghaer andhakar se bhre huae mratyu ke desh men rahate the, un par jyoti chamakee." 
Isaiah9:3 too ne jaati ko baddhaya, too ne usako bahut anand diya ve tere samhane kattnee ke samay ka sa anand karate haai, aur aeese magan haain jaaise log loott banttne ke samay magan rahate haain." 
Isaiah9:4 kyonaki too ne usakee gardan par ke bharee jooae aur usake bahange ke bans, us par andhor karanevale kee lattee, in sabhon ko aeesa tod diya haai jese midhaaniyon ke din men kiya tha." 
Isaiah9:5 kyonaki yuddh men ladnevale sipaahiyon ke joote aur lohoo men lathde huae kapade sab ag ka kaur ho jaaenge. 
Isaiah9:6 kyeanki hamare liye aek balak utpann hua, hamen aek putra diya gaya haai aur prabhuta usake kandho par hogee, aur usaka nam adabhut yuaktai karanevala parakramee parameshvar, anantakal ka pita, aur shaantai ka rajakumar rakha jaaega." 
Isaiah9:7 usakee prabhuta sarvada baddhtee rahegee, aur usakee shaantai ka ant n hoga, isaliye vaa uisako daud kee rajagaeepar is samay se lekar sarvada ke liye nyay aur dharma ke dara sthiar kiae or sanbhale rahega. senaon ke yahova kee dhaun ke dara yah ho jaega.." 
Isaiah9:8 prabhu ne yakoob ke pas aek sandesh bheja haai, aur vah israael par pragatt hua haai" 
Isaiah9:9 aur saree praja ko, aepraaiamiyon aur shaemaronavasiyon ko maloom ho jaaega jo garva aur kattorata se bolate haain: intten to gir gai haai," 
Isaiah9:10 parantu ham gaddhen huae patthron se ghar banaaenge goolar ke vraksha to katt gaae haain parantu ham unakee santee devadaron se kam lenge. 
Isaiah9:11 is karan yahova un par raseen ke baairiyon ko prabal karega," 
Isaiah9:12 aur unake shatrauon ko arthata pahile aram ko aur tab palishtaiyon ko ubharega, aur ve munh kholakar israaeliyon ko nigal lenge. itane par bhee usaka krodha shaant naheen hua aur usaka hath ab tak baddha hua haai.." 
Isaiah9:13 taubhee ye log apane maranevale kee or naheen fire aur n senaon ke yahova kee khoj karate haain. 
Isaiah9:14 is karan yahova israael men se sir aur poonchh ko, khjoor kee daliyon aur sarakande ko, aek hee din men katt dalega." 
Isaiah9:15 puraniya aur praatishttit puroosh to sir haai, aur joottee baten sikhanevala nabee poonchh haai" 
Isaiah9:16 kyonaki jo in logon kee aguvai karate haain ve inako bhttka dete haai, aur jinakee aguvai hotee haai ve nash ho jate haain." 
Isaiah9:17 is karan prabhu n to inake javanon se prasann hoga, aur n inake anath balakon aur vidhavaon par daya karega kyonki har aek ke mukh se moorkhta kee baten nikalatee haain. itane par bhee usaka krodha shaant naheen hua aur usaka hath ab tak baddha hua haai.." 
Isaiah9:18 kyonaki dushttta ag kee nai dhadhakatee haai, vah unttkattaron aur kantton ko bhsm karatee haai, varan vah ghane van kee jhaadiyon men ag lagatee haai aur vah dhauna men chakara chakarakar upar kee or utttee haai." 
Isaiah9:19 senaon ke yahova ke rosh ke mare yah desh jalaya gaya haai, aur ye log ag kee indhan ke saman haain ve apas men aek doosare se daya ka vyavahar naheen karate." 
Isaiah9:20 ve daahinee or se bhojanavastu chheenakar bhee bookhe rahate, aur bayen or se khakar bhee trapt naheen hote un men se pratyek manushy apanee apanee banhon ka mans khata haai," 
Isaiah9:21 manashsho aepraaim ko aur aepraaim manashsho ko khata haai, aur ve donon milakar yahooda ke virooddh haain itane par bhee usaka krodha shaant naheen hua, aur usaka hath ab tak baddha hua haai.." 
Isaiah10:1 hay un par jo dushttta se nyay karate, aur un par jo utpat karane kee agyaa likh dete haai," 
Isaiah10:2 ki ve kangalon ka nyay bigaden aur meree praja ke dee logon ka hak mare, ki ve vidhavaon ko lootten aur anathon ka mal apana len!" 
Isaiah10:3 tum dand ke din aur us apaati ke din jo door se aaegee kya karoge? tum sahayata ke liye kisake pas bhag kar jaoge? 
Isaiah10:4 aur tum apane vibhv ko kahan rakha chhodoge? ve keval bandhauon ke paairon ke pas gir padenge aur mare huon ke neeche dabe pade rahenge. itane par bhee usaka krodha shaant naheen hua aur usaka hath ab tak baddha hua haai.. 
Isaiah10:5 ashshoor par hay, jo mere krodha ka latt aur mere hath men ka sontta haai! vah mera krodha haai." 
Isaiah10:6 maain usako aek bhktaiheen jaati ke virooddh bhejoonga, aur jin logon par mera rosh bhdka haai unake virooddh usako agyaa doonga ki chheen chhan kare aur loott le, aur unako sadkon kee keech ke saman latade." 
Isaiah10:7 parantu usakee aeesee manasa n hogee, n usake man men yahee haai ki maain bahut see jatiyon ka nash aur ant kar daloon." 
Isaiah10:8 kayonaki vah kahata haai, kya mere sab haakim raja ke tuly naheen haai?" 
Isaiah10:9 kya kalano karkameesh ke saman naheen haai? kya hamat arpad ke aur shaemaron damishk ke saman naheen? 
Isaiah10:10 jis prakar mera hath mooraton se bhre huae un rajyon par pahuncha jinakee mooraten yarooshalem aur shaemaron kee mooraton se baddhkar thee, aur jis prakar maain ne shaemaron aur usakee mooraton se kiya," 
Isaiah10:11 kya usee prakar maain yarooshalem se aur usakee mooraton se bhee n karoon? 
Isaiah10:12 is karan jab prabhu siyyon parvat par aur yarooshalem men apana sab kam ka chukega, tab maain ashshoor ke raja ke garva kee baton ka, aur usakee ghamand bhree ankhon ka palatta doonga." 
Isaiah10:13 us ne kaha haai, apane hee bahubal aur buaddh ise maain ne yah kam kiya haai, kyonki maain chatur hoon maain ne desh desh ke sivanon ko hatta diya, aur unake rakhe huae dhan ko loo liya maain ne veer kee nai gaee par virajaneharon ko utar diya haai." 
Isaiah10:14 desh desh ke logon kee dhanasampati, chidiyon ke ghaensalon kee nai, mere hath ai haai, aur jaaise koi chhode huae andon ko battor le vaaise hee maain ne saree prathvee ko battor liya haai aur koi pankh fadfadane va chonch kholane va cheen cheen karanevala n tha.." 
Isaiah10:15 kya kulhada usak virooddh jo us se kattta ho deeng mare, va aree usake virooddh jo use kheenchata ho badai kare? kya sontta apane chalanevale ko chalaae va chhdee use uttaae jo katt naheen haai!"
