Isaiah10:16 is karan prabhu arthata senaon ka prabhu us raja ke shttpushtt yoddhaon ko dubala kar dega, aur usake aeeshvarya ke neeche ag kee see jalan hogee." 
Isaiah10:17 israael kee jyoti to ag ttharegee, aur israael ka pavitra jvala ttharega aur vah usake jhad jhnkhar ko aek hee deen men bhsm karega." 
Isaiah10:18 aur jaaise rogee ke kshaeen ho jane par usakee dasha hotee haai vaaisee hee vah usake van aur faladai baree kee shaebha pooree reeti se nash karega. 
Isaiah10:19 us van ke vraksha itane thode rah jaenge ki ladka bhee unako gin kar likh lega.. 
Isaiah10:20 us samay israel ke bache huae log aur yakoob ke gharane ke bhage hua, apane maranevale par fir kabhee bhrosa n rakhenge, parantu yahova jo israel ka paavitra haai, usee par ve sachchai se bhrosa rakhenge." 
Isaiah10:21 yakoob men se bache huae log parakramee parameshvar kee or firenge. 
Isaiah10:22 kyonaki he israael, chahe tere log samudra kee baloo ke kinakon ke saman bhee bahut ho, taubhee nishchay haai ki un men se keval bache log bhee lauttenge. satyanash to poore nyay ke sath ttana gaya haai." 
Isaiah10:23 kyonaki prabhu senaon ke yahova ne sare desh ka satyanash kar dena ttana haai.. 
Isaiah10:24 isaliye prabhu senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, he siyyon men rahanevalon meree praja, ashshoor se mat dra chahe vah sontten se tujhe mare aur misr kee nai tere upar chhdee uttaaen." 
Isaiah10:25 kyonaki ab thodee hee der haai ki meree jalan aur krodha unaka satyanash karake shaant hoga 
Isaiah10:26 aur senaon ka yahova usake virooddh koda uttakar usako aeesa marega jaaisa us ne oreb nam chattan par midhaaniyon ko mara tha aur jeya us ne misriyon ke virooddh samudra par lattee baddhai, vaaisa hee usakee or bhee baddhaaega." 
Isaiah10:27 us samay aeesa hoga ki usaka bojh tere kandho par se aur usaka jooa teree gardan par se utta liya jaega, aur abhaishok ke karan vah jooa tod dala jaega.." 
Isaiah10:28 vah ayyata men aya haai, aur migraen men se hokar age baddh gaya haai mikamash men us ne apana saman rakha haai." 
Isaiah10:29 ve ghaattee se par ho gaa, unhon ne geba men rat kattee rama thrathra utta haai, shaaul ka giba bhag nikala haai." 
Isaiah10:30 he galleem kee bettee chilla! he laaisha ke lagon kan lagao! hay bechara anatota! 
Isaiah10:31 madamena mara mara firata haai, gebeem ke nivasee bhagane ke liye apana apana saman ikatta kar rahe haain." 
Isaiah10:32 aj hee ke din vah nob men ttkaiega tab vah siyyon pahad par, aur yarooshalem kee pahadee par hath uttakar ghamakaaega." 
Isaiah10:33 dekho, prabhu senaon ka yahova pedon ko bhyanak roop se chhantt dalega uche uche vraksha katte jaaenge, aur jo uche haain so neeche kiae jaaenge." 
Isaiah10:34 vah ghane van ko lohe se katt dalega aur labanon aek pratapee ke hath se nash kiya jaaega.. 
Isaiah11:1 tab yishau ke toontt men se aek dalee foott nikalegee aur usakee jad men se aek shaakha nikalakar falavant hogee. 
Isaiah11:2 aur yahova kee atma, buaddh iddh aur samajh kee atma, yuktai aur parakram kee atma, aur gyaan aur yahova ke bhy kee atma us par ttharee rahegee." 
Isaiah11:3 or usako yahova ka bhy sugandha sa bhaaega.. vah munh dekha nyay n karega aur n apane kanon ke sunane ke anusar nirny karega 
Isaiah11:4 parantu vah kangalon ka nyay dharma se, aur prathvee ke namra logon ka nirny kharai se karega aur vah prathvee ko apane vachan ke sontte se marega, aur apane foonk ke jhonke se dushtt ko mitta dalega." 
Isaiah11:5 usakee kaatt ika faentta dharma aur usakee kamar ka faentta sachchai hogee.. 
Isaiah11:6 tab bheadiya bhed ke bachche ke sang raha karega, aur cheeta bakaree ke bachche ke sath baaitta rahega, aur bachhda aur javan sinh aur pala posa hua baail teenon ikatthe rahenge, aur aek chhotta ladka unakee aguvai karega." 
Isaiah11:7 gay aur reechhnee milakar charengee, aur unake bachche ikatthe baaittenge aur sinh baail kee nain boosa khaya karega." 
Isaiah11:8 doodhaapiuva bachcha karaait ke bil par khelega, aur doodha chhudaya hua ladka nag ke bil men hath dalega." 
Isaiah11:9 mere sare paavitra parvat par n to koi du:kh dega aur n haani karega kyonki prathvee yahova ke gyaan se aeesee bhr jaaegee jaaisa jal samudra men bhra rahata haai.. 
Isaiah11:10 us samay yishau kee jad desh desh ke logon ke liye ek jhnda hogee sab rajyon ke log use ddoonddhenge, aur usaka vishraamasthan tejomay hoga.." 
Isaiah11:11 us samay prabhu apana hath doosaree bar baddhakar bache huon ko, jo usakee praja ke rah gaae haai, ashshoor se, misr se, patraes se, koosh se, elam se, shainar se, hamat se, aur samudra ke deepon se mol lekar chhudaega." 
Isaiah11:12 vah anyajatiyon ke liye jhnda khda karake israael ke sab nikale huon ko, aur yahooda ke sab bikhre huon ko prathvee kee charon dishaaon se ikattha karega." 
Isaiah11:13 aepraaim fir dah n karega aur yahooda ke tang karanevale katt dale jaaenge n to aepraaim yahooda se dah karega aur n yahooda aepraaim ko tang karega. 
Isaiah11:14 parantu ve pashchaim kee or palishtaiyon ke kandho par jhpatta marenge, aur milakar poorviyon ko loottenge. ve aedom aur moab par hath baddhaaenge, aur ammonee unake adhaeen ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah11:15 aur yahova misr ke samudra kee khadee ko sukha dalega, aur mahanad par apana hath baddhakar prachand loo se aeesa sukhaaega ki vah sat dhaar ho jaaega, aur log loota pahine huae bhee par ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah11:16 aur usakee praja ke bache huon ke liye ashshoor se aek aeesa raja-marga hoga jaaisa misr desh se chale ane ke samay israael ke liye hua tha.. 
Isaiah12:1 us din too kahega, he yahova, maain tera dhanyavad karata hoo, kyonki yadhip too mujh par krodhait hua tha, parantu ab tera krodha shaant hua, aur too ne mujhe shaaantai dee haai.." 
Isaiah12:2 parameshvar mera uddhar haai, maain bhrosa rakoonga aur n thrathraunga kyonki prabhu yahova mera bal aur mere bhjan ka vishay haai, aur vah mera uddharakarta ho gaya haai.." 
Isaiah12:3 tum anandapoorvak uddhar ke soton se jal bhroge. 
Isaiah12:4 aur us din tum kahoge, yahova kee stuati karo, us se praarthna karo sab jaatiyon men usake bade kamon ka prachar karo, aur kaho ki usaka nam mahan haai.." 
Isaiah12:5 yahova ka bhjan gao, kyonaki us ne pratapamay kam kiae haai, ise saree prathvee par pragatt karo." 
Isaiah12:6 he siyyon men basanevalee too jayajayakar kar aur unche svar se ga, kyonaki israael ka paavitra tujh men mahan haai.." 
Isaiah13:1 babul ke vishay kee bharee bhvishyavanee jisako amos ke putra yashaayah ne darshan men paya. 
Isaiah13:2 munde pahad par aek jhnda khda karo, hath se saain karo aur aur un se unche svar se pukaro ki ve saradaron ke faattkon men pravesh karen." 
Isaiah13:3 maain ne svayan apane pavitra kiae huon ko agyaa dee haai, maain ne apane krodha ke liye apane veeron ko bulaya haai jo mere pratap ke karan prasann haain.." 
Isaiah13:4 pahadon par aek badee bheed ka sa kolahal ho raha haai, mano aek badee faauj kee halachal hon. rajy rajay kee ikatthee kee hui jatiyan halachal macha rahee haain. senaon ka yahova yuddh ke liye apanee sena ikatthee kar raha haai." 
Isaiah13:5 ve door desh se, akash ke chhor se aae haai, ha, yahova apane krodha ke haathaiyaron samet sare desh ko nash karane ke liye aya haai.." 
Isaiah13:6 haya-hay karo, kyonaki yahova ka din sameep haai vah sarvashaktaimana kee or se mano satyanash karane ke liye ata haai." 
Isaiah13:7 is karan sab ke hath ddheele padenge, aur har aek manushy ka day pighal jaaega," 
Isaiah13:8 aur ve ghabara jaaegen. unako peeda aur shaek hoga unako jachcha kee see peedaaen uttengee. ve chaakit hokar aek doosare ko takenge unake munh jal jayenge.. 
Isaiah13:9 dekho, yahova ka vah din rosh aur krodha aur nirdayata ke sath ata haai ki vah prathvee ko ujad dale aur paapiyon ko us men se nash kare." 
Isaiah13:10 kyonaki akash ke taragan aur bade bade nakshatra apana prakash n denge, aur soorya uday hote hote andhora ho jaaega, aur chandrama apana prakash n dega." 
Isaiah13:11 maain jagat ke logon ko unakee burai ke kara, aur dushtton ko unake adharma ka dand doonga maain aabhaimaaniyon ke aabhaiman ko nash karoongaae aur upadrav karanevalon ke ghamand ko tooonga." 
Isaiah13:12 maain manushy ko kundan se, aur adamee ko opeer ke sone se bhee adhaik mahanga karoonga." 
Isaiah13:13 isaliye maain akash ko kanpaunga, aur prathvee apane sthan se ttl jaaegee yah senaon ke yahova ke rosh ke karan aur usake bhdke huae krodha ke din hoga." 
Isaiah13:14 aur ve khdede huae haari, va bin charavahe kee bhedon kee nain apane apane logon kee or firenge, aur apane apane desh ko bhag jaaenge." 
Isaiah13:15 jo koi mile so bedha jaaega, aur jo koi pakada jaa, vah talavar se mar dala jaaega." 
Isaiah13:16 unake bala-bachche unake samhane pattk diae jaenge aur unake ghar lootte jaenge, aur unakee striayan bhrashtt kee jaengee.." 
Isaiah13:17 dekho, maain unake virooddh madee logon ko ubharoonga jo n to chandee ka kuchh vichar karenge aur n sone ka lalach karenge." 
Isaiah13:18 ve teeron se javanon ko marenge, aur bachchaen par kuchh daya n karenge, ve ladkon par kuchh taras n khaaenge." 
Isaiah13:19 aur babul jo sab rajyon ka shairomanai haai, aur jisakee shaebha par kasadee log foolate haai, vah aeesa ho jaaega jaaise sadom aur amora, jab parameshvar ne unhen ulatt diya tha." 
Isaiah13:20 vah fir kabhee n basega aur yug yug us men koi vas n karega arabee log bhee us men dera khda n karenge, aur n charavahe us men apane pashu baaittaaenge." 
Isaiah13:21 vahan jangalee jantu baaittenge, aur ulloo unake gharon men bhre rahenge vahan shuuturmurga basenge, aur chhgalamanas vahan nachenge. us nagar ke raja-bhvanon men hundar," 
Isaiah13:22 aur usake sukh-avilas ke maandairon men geedad bola karenge usake nash hone ka samay nikatt a gaya haai, aur usake din ab bahut naheen rahe.." 
Isaiah14:1 yahova yakoob par daya karega, aur israael ko fir apanakar, unheen ke desh men basaaega, aur paradeshaee un se mil jaaenge aur apane apane ko yakoob ke gharane se mila lenge." 
Isaiah14:2 aur desh desh ke log unako unheen ke sthan men pahunchaaenge, aur israael ka gharana yahova kee boomi par unaka adhaikaree hokar unako das aur daasiyan banaaega kyonaki ve apane bandhauvai men le janevalon ko bandhaua karenge, aur jo un par atyachar karate the un par ve shaasan karenge.." 
Isaiah14:3 aur jis din yahova tujhe tere santap aur ghabarahatt se, aur us kaattnai shram se jo tujh se liya gaya vishraam dega," 
Isaiah14:4 us din too babul ke raja par tana marakar kahega ki parishram karanevala kaaisa nash ho gaya haai, sunahale maandairon se bhree nagaree kaaisee nash ho gai haai!" 
Isaiah14:5 yahova ne dushtton ke sontte ko aur anyay se shaasan karanevalon ke latt ko tod diya haai," 
Isaiah14:6 jis se ve manushyon ko lagatar rosh se marate rahate the, aur jati jati par krodha se prabhuta karate aur lagatar unake peechhe pade rahate the." 
Isaiah14:7 ab saree prathvee ko vishraam mila haai, vah chaain se haai log unche svar se ga utte haain." 
Isaiah14:8 sanauvar aur labanon ke devadar bhee tujh par anand karake kahate haai, jab se too giraya gaya tab se koi hamen kattne ko naheen aya." 
Isaiah14:9 patal ke neeche adhaelo men tujh se milane ke liye halachal ho rahee haai vah tere liye mudorn ko arthataprathvee ke sab saradaron ko jagata haai, aur vah jaati jati se sab rajaon ko unake sinhasan par se utta khda karata haai." 
Isaiah14:10 ve sab tujh se kahenge, kya too bhee hamaree nai nirbal ho gaya haai? kya too hamare saman hee ban gaya?" 
Isaiah14:11 tera vibhv aur teree sarangiyon ko shabd adhaelok men utara gaya haai keede tera bichhauna aur kechuae tera oddhna haain.. 
Isaiah14:12 he bhor ke chamakanevale tare too kyonkar akash se gir pada haai? too jo jaati jati ko hara deta tha, too ab kaaise kattkar boomi par giraya gaya haai?" 
Isaiah14:13 too man men kahata to tha ki maain svarga par chaddoonga maain apane sinhasan ko ishvar ke taragan se aadhaik uncha karoonga aur uttr disha kee chhor par sabha ke parvat par birajoonga 
Isaiah14:14 maain meghaen se bhee unche unche sthanon ke upar chaddoonga, maain paramapradhaan ke tuly ho jaunga." 
Isaiah14:15 parantu too adhaelok men us gadhe kee tah tak utara jaaega. 
Isaiah14:16 jo tujhe dekhenge tujh ko takate huae tere vishay men soch sochakar kahenge, kya yah vahee puroosh haai jo prathvee ko chaain se rahane n deta tha aur rajy rajy men ghabarahatt dgyal deta tha" 
Isaiah14:17 jo jagat ko jangal banata aur usake nagaron ko ddha deta tha, aur apane bandhauon ko ghar jane naheen deta tha?" 
Isaiah14:18 jaati jati ke sab raja apane apane ghar par maahima ke sath aram se pade haain 
Isaiah14:19 parantu too nikammee shaakh kee nain apanee kabar men se faenka gaya too un mare huon kee lothon se ghaira haai jo talavar se bidhakar gadhe men patthron ke beech men latadee hui loth ke saman pade haai. 
Isaiah14:20 too unake sath kabra men n gada jaaega, kyonki too ne apane desh ko ujad diya, aur apanee praja ka ghaat kiya haai. kukaarmiyon ke vansh ka nam bhee kabhee n liya jaaega." 
Isaiah14:21 unake poorvajon ke adharma ke karan putraen ke ghaat kee taaiyaree karo, aeesa n ho ki ve fir uttkar prathvee ke adhaikaree ho jae, aur jagat men bahut se nagar basaen.." 
Isaiah14:22 senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain unake virooddh utoonga, aur babul ka nam aur nishaan mitta daloonga, aur betton-poton ko katt daloonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Isaiah14:23 maain usako sahee kee mand aur jal kee jheelen kar doonga, aur maain use satyanash ke jhaoo se jhad daloonga, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Isaiah14:24 senaon ke yahova ne yah shapath khai haai, ni:sandeh jaaisa maain ne ttana haai, vaaisa hee ho jaaega, aur jaaisee maain ne yuaktai kee haai, vaaisee hee pooree hogee," 
Isaiah14:25 ki maain ashshoor ko apane hee desh men tod doonga, aur apane pahadon par use kuchal daloonga tab usaka jooa unakee gardanon par se aur usaka bojh unake kandhaen par se utar jaaega." 
Isaiah14:26 yahee yuktai saree prathvee ke liye ttharai gai haai aur yah vahee hath haai jo sab jaatiyon par baddha hua haai. 
Isaiah14:27 kyonaki senaon ke yahova ne yuktai kee haai aur kaun usaka ttal sakata haai? usaka hath baddhaya gaya haai, use kaun rok sakata haai?" 
Isaiah14:28 jis varsha men ahaj raja mar gaya usee varsha yah bharee bhavishyadanee hui: 
Isaiah14:29 he sare palishteen too isaaliye anand n kar, ki tere maranevale kee lattee toott gai, kyonki sarpa kee jad se aek kala nag utpann hoga, aur usaka fal aek udnevala aur tej vishavala aagnaisarpa hoga." 
Isaiah14:30 tab kangalon ke jette khaaenge aur daridra log nidr baaittne paaenge, parantu maain tere vansh ko bookh se mar daloonga, aur tere bache huae log ghaat kiae jaaenge." 
Isaiah14:31 he faattk, too hay hay kara he nagar, too chilla he palishteen too sab ka sab pighal ja! kyonaki uttr se aek dhooan uttega aur usakee sena men se koi peechhe n rahega.." 
Isaiah14:32 tab anyajatiyon ke dooton ko kya uttr diya jaaega? yah ki yahova ne siyyon kee nev dalee haai, aur usakee praja ke deen log us men sharan lenge.." 
Isaiah15:1 moab ke vishay bharee bhvishyadanee. nishchay moab ka ar nagar aek hee rat men ujad aur nash ho gaya haai nishchay moab ka keer nagar aek hee rat men ujad aur nash ho gaya haai. 
Isaiah15:2 baait aur deebon unche sthanon par rone ke liye chaddh gaae haain nabo aur medaba ke upar moab hay hay karata haai. un sabhon ke sir mude hua, aur sabhon kee daaddhiyan munddhee hui haain" 
Isaiah15:3 sadkon men log ttatt paahine haain chhton par aur chaukon men sab koi ansoo bahate huae hay hay karate haain. 
Isaiah15:4 heshabon aur aelale chilla rahe haai, unaka shabd yahas tak sunai padta haai is karan moab ke hathaiyaraband chilla rahe haain usaka jee aati udas haai." 
Isaiah15:5 mera man moab ke liye dohai deta haai usake rais soar aur aeglatashaleeshaiyya tak bhage jate haain. dekho, looheet kee chaddhai par ve rote huae chaddh rahe haain suno, horeenaaim ke marga men ve nash hone kee chillaahatt macha rahe haain." 
Isaiah15:6 nimraeem ka jal sookh gaya ghaas kumhala gai aur haariyalee murjha gai, aur namee kuchh bhee naheen rahee." 
Isaiah15:7 isaliye jo dhan unhon ne bacha rakha, aur jo kud unhon ne ikattha kiya haai, us sab ko ve us nale ke par liye ja rahe haain jis men majanoovraksha haain." 
Isaiah15:8 is karan moab ke charon or ke sivane men chillahatt ho rahee haai, us men ka hahakar aegalaaim aur bereleem men bhee sun padta haai." 
Isaiah15:9 kyonaki deemon ka sota lohoo se bhra hua haai taubhee maain deemon par aur du:kh daloonga, maain bache huae moabiyon aur unake desh se bhage huon ke virooddh sinh bhejoonga.." 
Isaiah16:1 jangal kee or se sela nagar se siyyon kee bettee ke parvat par desh ke haakim ke liye bhedon ke bachchon ko bhejo. 
Isaiah16:2 moab kee bettyaian anorn ke ghaatt par ujade huae bachchon ke saman haain. 
Isaiah16:3 sammaati karo, nyay chukao dopahar hee men apanee chhaya ko rat ke saman karo ghar se nikale huon ko chhpai rakho, jo mare mare firate haain unako mat pakadvao." 
Isaiah16:4 mere log jo nikale huae haain ve tere beech men rahen nash karanevale se moab ko bachao. peesanevala naheen raha, loott patt fir n hogee kyonki desh men se andhor karanevale nash ho gaae haain." 
Isaiah16:5 tab daya ke sath aek sinhasan sthiar kiya jaaega aur us par daud ke tamboo men sachchai ke sath aek virajaman hoga jo soch vichar kar sachcha nyay karega aur dharma ke kam par tatpar rahega.. 
Isaiah16:6 ham ne moab ke garva ke vishay suna haai ki vah atyant aabhaimanee tha usake abhaiman aur garva aur rosh ke sambandha men bhee suna haai parantu usaka bada bol vyarth haai. 
Isaiah16:7 kyonaki moab hay hay karega sab ke sab moab ke liye hahakar karenge. keeraharasat kee dakh kee ttiikayon ke liye ve aati nirash hokar lambee lambee sans liya karenge.. 
Isaiah16:8 kyonaki heshabon ke khet aur sibama kee dakh lataaen murjha gain anyajaatiyon ke aadhaikaariyon ne unakee uttm uttm lataon ko katt kattkar gira diya haai, ye yajer tak pahunchee aur jangal men bhee faailatee gain aur baddhte baddhte tal ke par door tak baddh gai theen." 
Isaiah16:9 maain yajer ke sath sibama kee dakhlataon ke liye bhee rounga he heshabon aur aelale, maain tumhen apane ansuon se seenchoonga kyonaki tumhare dhoopakal ke falon ke aur anaj kee kattnee ke samay kee lalakar sunai padee haai." 
Isaiah16:10 aur faladai bariyon men se anand aur maganata jatee rahee dakh kee bariyon men geet n gaya jaaega, n harsha ka shabd sunai dega aur dakhras ke kundon men koi dakh n raundega, kyonaki maain unake harsha ke shabd ko band karoonga." 
Isaiah16:11 isaliye mera man moab ke karan aur mera day keerahaaires ke karan veena ka sa krandan karata haai.. 
Isaiah16:12 aur jab moab unche sthan par munh dikhate dikhate thk jaa, aur praarthna karane ko apane paavitra sthan men aa, to use kuchh labh n hoga." 
Isaiah16:13 yahee vah bat haai jo yahova ne is se pahile moab ke vishay men kahee thee. 
Isaiah16:14 parantu ab yahova ne yon kaha haai ki majadooron ke vasharen ke saman tee varsha ke bheetar moab ka vibhv aur usakee bheed-bhad sab tuchchh ttharegee aur thode jo bachenge unaka koi bal n hoga.. 
Isaiah17:1 daamishk ke vishay bharee bhvishyavanee. dekho, daamishk nagar n rahega, vah khndhar hee khndhar ho jaaega." 
Isaiah17:2 aroaer ke nagar nirjan ho jaaenge, ve pashuuon ke jhundon kee charai banenge pashu un men baaittenge aur unaka koi bhganevala n hoga." 
Isaiah17:3 aepraaim ke gaddhvale nagar, aur damishk ka rajy aur bache huae aramee, teenon bhavishy men n rahenge aur jo dasha israaeliyon ke vibhv kee hui vahee unakee hogee senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Isaiah17:4 aur us samay yakoob ka vibhv ghatt jaaega, aur usakee mottee deh dubalee ho jaaegee." 
Isaiah17:5 aur aeesa hoga jaaisa lavanevala anaj kattkar balon ko apanee ankavar men samette va rapaim nam tarai men koi sila beenata ho. 
Isaiah17:6 taubhee jaaise jalapai vraksha ke jhadte samay kuchh fal rah jate haai, arthata faunagee par do-teen fal, aur falavant daliyon men kaheen kaheen chara-panch fal rah jate haai, vaaise hee un men sila binai hogee, israael ke parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Isaiah17:7 us samay manushy apane karta kee or draashtti karega, aur usakee ankhen israel ke paavitra kee or lagee rahengee" 
Isaiah17:8 vah apanee banai hui vediyon kee or draashtti n karega, aur n apanee banai hui ashora nam mooraton va soorya kee pratimaon kee or dekhega." 
Isaiah17:9 us samay unake gaddhvale nagar ghane van, aur unake nirjan sthan pahadon kee chottyaien ke saman honge jo israealiyon ke dr ke mare chhod diae gaae the, aur ve ujad pade rahenge.." 
Isaiah17:10 kyonaki too apane uddharakarta parameshvar ko bool gaya aur apanee draddh chattan ka smaran naheen rakha is karan chahe too manabhavane paudho lagaye aur videshaee kalam jamaye," 
Isaiah17:11 chahe ropane ke din too apane charon aur bada bandho, aur bihan hee ko un men fool khailane lage, taubhee santap aur asadhy du:kh ke din usaka fal nash ho jayega.." 
Isaiah17:12 hay, haya! desh desh ke bahut se logon ka kaaisa nad ho raha haai, ve samudra kee laharon kee nain garajate haain. rajy rajy ke logon ka kaaisa garjan ho raha haai, ve prachand dhaara ke saman nad karate haain!" 
Isaiah17:13 rajy rajy ke log baddh ke bahut se jal kee nai nad karate haai, parantu vah unako ghaudkega, aur ve door bhag jaaenge, aur aeese udaae jaaenge jaaise pahadon par kee boosee vayu se, aur dhooli bavandr se ghaumakar udai jatee haai." 
Isaiah17:14 sanjh ko, dekho, ghabarahatt haai! aur bhor se paahile, ve lop ho gaye haain! hamare nash karanevalon ko bhag aur hamare loottnevale kee yahee dasha hogee.." 
Isaiah18:1 hay, pankhon kee fadfadahatt se bhre huae desha, too jo koosh kee naadiyon ke pare haai" 
Isaiah18:2 aur samudra par dooton ko narakatt kee navon men baaittakar jal ke marga se yah kahake bhejata haai, he faurteele dooto, us jaati ke pas jao jisake log balishtt aur sundar haai, jo adi se ab tak dravane haai, jo mapane aur raundanevala bhee haai, aur jinaka desh naadiyon se vibhaajit kiya hua haai.." 
Isaiah18:3 he jagat ke sab rahanevalo, aur prathvee ke sab nivaasiyo, jab jhnda pahadon par khda kiya jaa, use dekho! jab narasinga foonka jaa, tab suno!" 
Isaiah18:4 kyonaki yahova ne mujh se yon kaha haai, dhoop kee tej garmee va kattnee ke samay ke osavale badal kee nain maain shaant hokar niharoonga." 
Isaiah18:5 kyonaki dakh todne ke samay se pahile jab fool fool chuke, aur dakh ke guchchhe pakane lage, tab vah tthaaniyon ko hansuon se katt dalega, aur faailee hui daaliyon ko tod todkar alag faenk dega." 
Isaiah18:6 ve pahadon ke mansaharee pakshiayon aur vana-pashuuon ke liye ikatthe pade rahenge. aur mansaharee pakshaee to unako nochate nochate dhoopakal bitaaenge, aur sab bhanti ke vanapashu unako khate khate jada kattenge." 
Isaiah18:7 us samay jis jati ke log balishtt aur sundar haai, aur jo adi hee se dravane hote aae haai, aur mapane aur raundanevale haai, aur jinaka desh naadiyon se vibhaajit kiya hua haai, us jaati se senaon ke yahova ke nam ke sthan siyyon parvat par senaon ke yahova ke pas bhentt pahunchai jaegee.." 
Isaiah19:1 misr ke vishay men bharee bhvishyavanee. dekho, yahova shaeegha udnevale badal par savar hokar misr men a raha haai" 
Isaiah19:2 aur misr kee mooraten usake ane se thrathra uttengee, aur misriyon ka day panee-panee ho jaaega. aur maain misriyon ko aek doosare ke virooddh ubharoonga, aur ve apas men ladenge, pratyek apane bhai se aur har aek apane padosee se ladega, nagar nagar men aur rajy rajy men yuddh chhdienga" 
Isaiah19:3 aur misriyon kee buaddh imaree jaaegee aur maain unakee yuktaiyon ko vyarth kar doonga aur ve apanee mooraton ke pas aur ojhean aur fausafausanevale ttonhon ke pas ja jakar un se poochhenge 
Isaiah19:4 parantu maain misriyon ko aek kattor svamee ke hath men kar doonga aur aek kroor raja un par prabhuta karega, prabhu senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Isaiah19:5 aur samudra ka jal sookh jaaega, aur mahanadee sookh kar khalee ho jaaegee" 
Isaiah19:6 aur nale basane lagenge, aur misr kee naharen bhee sookh jaaengee, aur narakatt aur hoogale kumhala jaaenge." 
Isaiah19:7 neel nadee ke teer par ke kachhar kee ghaas, aur jo kuchh neel nadee ke pas boya jaaega vah sookhkar nashtt ho jaaega, aur usaka pata tak n lagega." 
Isaiah19:8 sab machhuve jitane neel nadee men bansee dalate haain vilap karenge aur lambee lambee sasen lenge, aur jo jal ke upar jal faenkate haain ve nirbal ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah19:9 fir jo log dhaune huae san se kam karate haain aur jo soot se bunate haain unakee asha toott jaaegee. 
Isaiah19:10 misr ke rais to nirash aur usake sab majadoor udas ho jaaenge.. 
Isaiah19:11 nishchay soan ke sab haakim moorkh haain aur firaun ke buaddhmaian maantriayon kee yuktai pashu kee see ttharee. fir tum firaun se kaaise kah sakate ho ki maain buaddhmaianon ka putra aur praacheen rajaon kee santan hoon? 
Isaiah19:12 ab tere buddhmaian kahan haai? senaon ke yahova ne misr ke vishay jo yuaktai kee haai, usako yaadi ve janate hon to tujhe bataaen." 
Isaiah19:13 soan ke hakim mooddh ban gaae haai, nop ke hakimon ne dhaekha khaya haai aur jin par misr ke gotraen ke pradhaan logon ka bhrosa tha unhon ne misr ko bhrama diya haai." 
Isaiah19:14 yahova ne us men bhramata utpann kee haai unhon ne misr ko usake sare kamon men vaman karate huae matavale kee nai dgamaga diya haai. 
Isaiah19:15 aur misr ke liye koi aeesa kam n rahega jo sir va poonchh se athva pradhaan va sadhaaran se ho sake.. 
Isaiah19:16 us samay misree, striayon ke saman ho jaenge, aur senaon ka yahova jo apana hath un par baddhaega usake dr ke mare ve thrathraenge aur kanp uttenge." 
Isaiah19:17 or yahooda ka desh misr ke liye yahan tak bhy ka karan hoga ki jo koi usakee charcha sunega vah thrathra uttega senaon ke yahova kee us yuaktai ka yahee fal hoga jo vah misr ke virooddh karata haai.. 
Isaiah19:18 us samay misr desh men panch nagar honge jinake log kanan kee bhasha bolenge aur yahova kee shapath khayenge. un men se ek ka nam nashanagar rakha jaega.. 
Isaiah19:19 us samay misr desh ke beech men yahova ke liye ek vedee hogee, aur usake sivane ke pas yahova ke liye ek khnbha khda hoga." 
Isaiah19:20 vah misr desh men senaon ke yahova ke liye chinh aur sakshaee ttharega aur jab ve andhor karanevale ke karan yahova kee dohai denge, tab vah unake pas aek uddharakarta aur rakshak bhejega, aur unhen mukt karega." 
Isaiah19:21 tab yahova apane ap ko misriyon par pragatt karega aur misree us samay yahova ko pahichanenge aur melabali aur annabali chaddhakar usakee upasana karenge, aur yahova ke liye mannat manakar pooree bhee karenge." 
Isaiah19:22 aur yahova misriyon ko marega, aur marega aur changa bhee karega, aur ve yahova kee or firenge aur vah unakee binatee sunakar unako changa karega.." 
Isaiah19:23 us samay misr se ashshoor jane ka ek rajamarga hoga, aur ashshooree misr men aenge aur misree log ashshoor ko jaenge, aur misree ashshooriyon ke sang milakar aradhana karenge.." 
Isaiah19:24 us samay israel, misr aur ashshoor teenon milakar prathvee ke liye ashaeesh ka karan honge." 
Isaiah19:25 kyonaki senaon ka yahova un teenon ko yah kahakar ashaeesh dega, dhany ho meree praja misr, aur mera rakh hua ashshoor, aur mera nij bhag israaela.." 
Isaiah20:1 jis varsha men ashshoor ke raja sargon kee agyaa se tartan ne ashadod akar us se yuddh kiya aur usako le bhee liya," 
Isaiah20:2 usee varsha yahova ne amos ke putra yashaayah se kaha, jakar apanee kamar ka ttatt khol aur apanee jootiyan utara so us ne vaaisa hee kiya, aur vah nanga aur nange panv ghoomata firata tha." 
Isaiah20:3 aur yahova ne kaha, jis prakar mera das yashaayah teen varsha se ughaada aur nange panv chalata aya haai, ki misr aur koosh ke liye chinh aur chamatkar ho," 
Isaiah20:4 usee prakar ashshoor ka raja misree aur koosh ke logon ko bandhaua karake desha-nikal karega, kya ladke kya booddhe, sabhon ko bandhauae karake ughaade aur nange panv aur nitamb khule le jaega, jis se misr lajjait ho." 
Isaiah20:5 tab ve koosh ke karan jis par unakee asha thee, aur misr ke hetu jis par ve foolate the vyakul aur laajjait ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah20:6 aur samudra ke is par ke basanevale us samay yah kahenge, dekho, jin par ham asha rakhte the or jinake pas ham ashshoor ke raja se bachane ke liye bhagane ko the unakee aeesee dasha ho gai haai. to fir ham log kaaise bachenge?" 
Isaiah21:1 samudra ke pas ke jangal ke vishay bharee vachana. jaaise dakkhianee prachand bavandr chala ata haai, vah jangal se arthata dravane desh se nikatt a raha haai." 
Isaiah21:2 kashtt kee baton ka mujhe darshan dikhaya gaya haai vishvasaghaatee vishvasaghaat karata haai, aur nashak nash karata haai. he aelam, chaddhai kar, he madaai, ghor le usaka sab karahana maain band karata hoon." 
Isaiah21:3 is karan meree kaatt imen kaattnai peeda haai mujh ko mano jachcha peeden ho rahee haai maain aeese sankatt men padtr gaya hoon ki kuchh sunai naheen deta, maain aesa ghabara gaya hoon ki kuchh dikhai naheen danta." 
Isaiah21:4 mera day dhadkata haai, maain atyant bhyabheet hoo, jis sanjh kee maain batt johata tha use us ne meree thrathrahatt ka karan kar diya haai." 
Isaiah21:5 bhojan kee taaiyaree ho rahee haai, paharooae baaittaae ja rahe haai, khana-peena ho raha haai. he hakimo, utto, ddhal men tel malo!" 
Isaiah21:6 kyonaki prabhu ne mujh se yon kaha haai, jakar aek paharooa khda kar de, aur vah jo kuchh dekhe use bataae." 
Isaiah21:7 jab vah savar dekhe jo do-do karake ate ho, aur gadahon aur untton ke savar, tab bahut hee dhyan dekar sune." 
Isaiah21:8 aur us ne sinh ke se shabd se pukara, he prabhu maain din bhr khda pahara deta raha aur maain ne pooree raten pahare par katta." 
Isaiah21:9 aur kya dekhta hoon ki manushyon ka dal aur do-do karake sava chale a rahe haain! aur vah bol utta, gir pada, babul gir pada aur usake devataon ke sab khudee hui mooraten boomi par chakanachoor kar dalee gai haain." 
Isaiah21:10 he mere daaen hua, aur mere khalihan ke ann, jo baten maain ne israael ke parameshvar senaon ke yahova se sunee haai, unako maain ne tumhen jata diya haai." 
Isaiah21:11 dooma ke vishay bharee vachana. seir men se koi mujhe pukar raha haai, he paharooa, rat ka kya samachar haai? he paharooa, rat kee kya khbar haai?" 
Isaiah21:12 paharooae ne kaha, bhor hotee haai aur rat bhee. yaadi tum poochhna chahate ho to poochho fir lauttkar ana.." 
Isaiah21:13 arab ke virooddh bharee vachana. he dadanee battohiyo, tum ko arab ke jangal men rat bitanee padegee." 
Isaiah21:14 ve pyase ke pas jal laa, tema desh ke rahanevale rottee lekar bhaganevale se milane ke liye nikal a rahe haain." 
Isaiah21:15 kyonaki ve talavaron ke samhane se varan nangee talavar se aur tane huae dhanush se aur ghaer yuddh se bhage haain. 
Isaiah21:16 kyonaki prabhu ne mujh se yon kaha haai, majadoor ke vasharen ke anusar aek varsha men kedar ka sara vibhv mittaya jaaega" 
Isaiah21:17 aur kedar ke dhanudhararee shooraveeron men se thode hee rah jaaenge kyonaki israael ke parameshvar yahova ne aeesa kaha haai.. 
Isaiah22:1 darshan kee tarai ke vishay men bharee vachana. tumhen kya hua ki tum sab ke sab chhton par chaddh gaae ho," 
Isaiah22:2 he kolahal aur udham se bhree prasann nagaree? tujh men jo mare gaae haain ve n to talavar se aur n ladai men mare gaae haain. 
Isaiah22:3 tere sab nyayee aek sang bhag gaae aur dhanudharariyon se bandho gaae haain. aur tere jitane shosh paae gaae ve aek sang bandho gaa, ve door bhage the." 
Isaiah22:4 is karan maain ne kaha, meree or se munh faer lo ki maain bilak bilakakar roun mere nagar satyanash hone ke shaek men mujhe shaaantai dene ka yatn mat karo.." 
Isaiah22:5 kyonaki senaon ke prabhu yahova ka ttharaya hua din hoga, jab darshan kee tarai men kolahal aur raunda jana aur bechaainee hogee shaharapanah men surang lagai jaaegee aur dohai ka shabd pahadon tak pahunchega." 
Isaiah22:6 aur aelam paaidalon ke dal aur savaron samet tarkash bandho huae haai, aur keer ddhal khole huae haai." 
Isaiah22:7 teree uttm uttm taraiyan rathon se bhree hui hongee aur savar faattk ke samhane panti bandhonge. us ne yahooda ka ghoonghatt khol diya haai. 
Isaiah22:8 us din too ne van nam bhvan ke asr-shasr ka smaran kiya," 
Isaiah22:9 aur too ne daudapur kee shaharapanah kee dararon ko dekha ki ve bahut haai, aur too ne nichale pokhre ke jal ko ikattha kiya." 
Isaiah22:10 aur yarooshalem ke gharon ko ginakar shaharapanah ke draddh karane ke liye gharon ko ddha diya. 
Isaiah22:11 too ne donon bheeton ke beech purane pokhre ke jal ke liye aek kund khoda. parantu too ne usake karta ko smaran naheen kiya, jis ne praacheenakal se usako tthara rakha tha, aur n usakee or too ne drashtti kee.." 
Isaiah22:12 us samay senaon ke prabhu yahova ne rone-peettne, sir mundane aur ttatt paahinane ke liye kaha tha" 
Isaiah22:13 parantu kya dekha ki harsha aur anand manaya ja raha haai, gaya-baail ka ghaat aur bhed-bakaree ka vadha kiya ja raha haai, mans khaya aur dakhmadha peeya ja raha haai. aur kahate haai, ao khaaen-peeae, kyonki kal to hamen marana haai." 
Isaiah22:14 senaon ke yahova ne mere kan men kaha aur apane man kee bat pragatt kee, nishchay tum logon ke is adharma ka kuchh bhee praayaashchaitt tumharee mratyu tak n ho sakega, senaon ke prabhu yahova ka yahee kahana haai." 
Isaiah22:15 senaon ka prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, shobana nam us bhndaree ke pas jo rajagharane ke kam par niyukt haai jakar kah, yahan too kya karata haai?" 
Isaiah22:16 aur yahan tera kaun haai ki too ne apanee kabar yahan khudavai haai? too apanee kabar unche sthan men khudavata aur apane rahane ka sthan chattan men khudavata haai? 
Isaiah22:17 dek, yahova tujh ko badee shaktai se pakadkar bahut door faenk dega." 
Isaiah22:18 vah tujhe marodkar gend kee nai lambe chaude desh men faenk dega he apane svamee ke gharane ko lajjait karanevale vahan too marega aur tere vibhv ke rath vaheen rah jaaenge. 
Isaiah22:19 maain tujh ko tere sthan par se ddhkel doonga, aur too apane pad se utar diya jayega." 
Isaiah22:20 us samay maain hilkaiyah ke putra apane das elyakeem ko bulakar, use tera angarakha pahanaunga," 
Isaiah22:21 aur usakee kamar men teree pettee kasakar bandhoonga, aur teree prabhuta usake hath men doonga. aur vah yarooshalem ke rahanevalon aur yahooda ke gharane ka pita ttharega." 
Isaiah22:22 aur maain daud ke gharane kee kunjee usake kandho par rakoonga, aur vah kholega aur koi band n kar sakega vah band karega aur koi khol n sakega." 
Isaiah22:23 aur maain usako draddh sthan men koonttee kee nain gaoonga, aur vah apane pita ke gharane ke liye vibhv ka karan hoga." 
Isaiah22:24 aur usake pita se gharane ka sara vibhv, vansh aur santan, sab chhotte-chhotte patra, kya kattore kya suraahiya, sab us par ttangee jaaengee." 
Isaiah22:25 senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai ki us samay vah koonttee jo draddh sthan men gadee gai thee, vah ddheelee ho jaaegee, aur kattkar girai jaaegee aur us ka bojh gir jaaega, kyonaki yahova ne yah kaha haai." 
Isaiah23:1 sor ke vishay bharee vachana. he tashareesh ke jahajon hay, hay, karo kyonki vah ujad gaya vahan n to koi ghar aur n koi sharan ka sthan haai! yah bat unako kitiayon ke desh men se pragatt kee gai haai." 
Isaiah23:2 he samudra ke teer ke rahanevalo, jinako samudra ke par janevale seedonee vyapaariyon ne dhan se bhr diya haai, chup raho!" 
Isaiah23:3 shaeehor ka ann, aur neel nadee ke pas kee upaj mahasagar ke marga se usako minatee thee, kyonki vah aur jatiyon ke liye vyopar ka sthan tha." 
Isaiah23:4 he seedon, laajjait ho, kyonki samudra ne arthata samudra ke draddh saian ne yah kaha haai, maain ne n to kabhee janmane kee peeda janee aur n balak ko janm diya, aur n betton ko pala aur n beattyaien ko posa haai." 
Isaiah23:5 jab sor ka samachar misr men pahunche, tab ve sunakar sankatt men padenge." 
Isaiah23:6 he samudra ke teer ke rahanevalon hay, hay, karo! par hokar tashareesh ko jao." 
Isaiah23:7 kya yah tumharee prasannata se bhree hui nagaree haai jo praacheenakal se basee thee, jisake panv use basane ko door le jate the?" 
Isaiah23:8 sor jo rajaon kee gaee par baaittatee thee, jisake vyoparee haakim the, aur jisake mahajan prathvee bhr men pratishttit the, usake virooddh kis ne aeesee yuaktai kee haai?" 
Isaiah23:9 senaon ke yahova hee ne aeesee yuktai kee haai ki samast gaurav ke ghamand ko tuchchh kar de aur prathvee ke pratishttiton ka apaman karavaae. 
Isaiah23:10 he tashareesh ke nivaasiyon neel nadee kee nai apane desh men faail jao ab kuchh bandhan naheen raha. 
Isaiah23:11 us ne apana hath samudra par baddhakar rajyon ko hila diya haai yahova ne kanan ke draddh kilon ke nash karane kee agyaa dee haai. 
Isaiah23:12 aur us ne kaha haai, he seedon, he bhrashtt kee hui kumaree, too fir prasann hone kee naheen ut, par hokar kitiayon ke pas ja, parantu vahan bhee tujhe chaain n milega.." 
Isaiah23:13 kasadiyon ke desh ko dekho, vah jaati ab n rahee ashshoor ne us desh ko jangalee jantuon ka sthan banaya. unhon ne apane gummatt uttaae aur rajabhvanon ko ddha diya, aur usako khndhar kar diya." 
Isaiah23:14 he tashareesh ke jahajo, hay, hay, karo, kyonaki tumhara draddhsthan ujad gaya haai." 
Isaiah23:15 us samay ek raja ke dinon ke anusar sattr varsha ke beetane par sor veshya kee nain geet gane lagega. 
Isaiah23:16 he bisaree hui veshya, veena lekar nagar men ghoom, bhlee bhanati baja, bahut geet ga, jis se log fir tujhe yad karen." 
Isaiah23:17 sattr varsha ke beetane par yahova sor kee suadhai lega, aur vah fir chhnaiale kee kamai par man lagakar dharatee bhr ke sab rajyon ke sang chhnaiala karengee." 
Isaiah23:18 usake vyopar kee praaptai, aur usake chhnaiale kee kamai, yahova ke liye paavitra ki jaegee vah n bhndar men rakhee jaegee n sanchay kee jaegee, kyonki usake vyopar kee praaaptai unheen ke kam men aegee jo yahova ke samhane raha karenge, ki unako bhrapoor bhojan aur chamakeela vasr mile.." 
Isaiah24:1 suno, yahova prathvee ko nirjan aur sunasan karane par haai, vah usako ulattkar usake rahanevalon ko titar bitar karega." 
Isaiah24:2 aur jaaisee yajaman kee vaaisee yajak kee jaaisee das kee vaaisee svamee kee jaaisee dasee kee vaaisee svaminee kee jaaisee lenevale kee vaaisee bechanevale kee jaaisee udhaar denevale kee vaaisee udhaar lenevale kee jaaisee byaj lenevale kee vaaisee byaj denevale kee sabhon kee aek hee dasha hogee. 
Isaiah24:3 prathvee shoony aur satyanash ho jaaegee kyonaki yahova hee ne yah kaha haai.. 
Isaiah24:4 prathvee vilap karegee aur murjhaaegee, jagat kumhalaaega aur murjha jaaega prathvee ke mahan log bhee kumhala jaaenge." 
Isaiah24:5 prathvee apane rahanevalon ke karan ashuuddh ho gai haai, kyonki unhon ne vyavastha ka ullanghan kiya aur vidhai ko palatt dala, aur sanatan vacha ko tod diya haai." 
Isaiah24:6 is karan prathvee ko shaap grasega aur us men rahanevale doshaee ttharenge aur isee karan prathvee ke nivasee bhsm honge aur thode hee manushy rah jaaenge. 
Isaiah24:7 naya dakhmadha jata rahega, dakhlata murjha jaaegee, aur jitane man men anand karate haain sab lambee lambee sans lenge." 
Isaiah24:8 dfa ka sukhdai shabd band ho jaaega, veena ka sukhdai shabd shaant ho jaaega." 
Isaiah24:9 ve gakar fir dakhmadha n peeaenge peenevale ko maadira kadukee lagegee. 
Isaiah24:10 gadbadee machanevalee nagaree nash hogee, usaka har aek ghar aeesa band kiya jaaega ki koi paaitt n sakega." 
Isaiah24:11 sadkon men log dakhmadha ke liye chillaaenge anand mitt jaaega: desh ka sara harsha jata rahega. 
Isaiah24:12 nagar ujad hee ujad rahega, aur usake faattk todkar nash kiae jaaenge." 
Isaiah24:13 kyonaki prathvee par desh desh ke logon men aeesa hoga jaaisa ki jalapaiyon ke jhadne ke samay, va dakh todne ke bad koi koi fal rah jate haain.." 
Isaiah24:14 ve log gala kholakar jayajayakar karenge, aur yahova ke mahatmy ko dekhkar samudra se lalakarenge." 
Isaiah24:15 is karan poorva men yahova kee mahima karo, aur samudra ke deepon men israael ke parameshvar yahova ke nam ka gunanuvad karo." 
Isaiah24:16 prathvee kee chhor se hamen aeese geet kee dhvani sun padtee haai, ki dharmee kee maahima aur badai ho. parantu maain ne kaha, hay, haya! maain nash ho gaya, nasha! kyonaki vishvasaghaatee vishvasaghaat karate, ve bada hee vishvasaghaat karate haain.." 
Isaiah24:17 he prathvee ke rahanevalon tumhare liye bhy aur gadha aur fanda haai! 
Isaiah24:18 jo koi bhy ke shabd se bhage vah gadhe men girega, aur jo koi gadhe men se nikale vah fande men fansega. kyonaki akash ke jhrokhe khul jaaenge, aur prathvee kee nev dol uttegee. prathvee atyant kampayaman hogee." 
Isaiah24:19 vah matavale kee nain bahut dgamagaaegee 
Isaiah24:20 aur machan kee nai dolegee vah apane pap ke bojh se dabakar giregee aur fir n uttegee.. 
Isaiah24:21 us samay aeesa hoga ki yahova akash kee sena ko akash men aur prathvee ke rajaon ko prathvee hee par dand dega. 
Isaiah24:22 ve bandhauon kee nai gadhe men ikatthe kiae jaaenge aur bandeegrah men band kiae jaaenge aur bahut dinon ke bad unakee suadhai lee jaaegee. 
Isaiah24:23 tab chandrama sankuchit ho jaaega aur soorya laajjait hoga kyonaki senaon ka yahova siyyon parvat par aur yarooshalem men apanee praja ke puraniyon ke samhane pratap ke sath rajy karega.. 
Isaiah25:1 he yahova, too mera parameshvar haai maain tujhe sarahoonga, maain tere nam ka dhanyavad karoonga kyonki too ne ashcharyakarma kiae haai, too ne praacheenakal se pooree sachchai ke sath yuaktaiyan kee haain." 
Isaiah25:2 too ne nagar ko deeh, aur us gaddhvale nagar ko khndhar kar dala haai too ne paradeshaiyon kee rajapuree ko aeesa ujada ki vah nagar naheen raha vah fir kabhee basaya n jaaega." 
Isaiah25:3 is karan balavant rajy ke log teree maahima karenge bhyankar anyajatiyon ke nagaron men tera bhy mana jaaega. 
Isaiah25:4 kyonaki too sankatt men deenon ke liye gaddh, aur jab bhyanak logon ka jhonka bheet par bauchhar ke saman hota tha, tab too daridraen ke liye unakee shara, aur tapan men chhaya ka sthan hua." 
Isaiah25:5 jaaise nirjal desh men badal kee chhaya se tapan ttndee hotee haai veaise hee too paradeshaiyon ka kolahal aur kroor logon ko jayajayakar band karata haai.. 
Isaiah25:6 senaon ka yahova isee parvat par sab deshaen ke logon ke liye aeesee jevanar karega jis men bhanati bhanati ka chikana bhojan aur nithra hua dakhmadha hoga uttm se uttm chikana bhojan aur bahut hee nithra hua dakhmadha hoga. 
Isaiah25:7 aur jo parda sab deshaen ke logon par pada haai, jo ghoonghatt sab anyajaatiyon par lattka hua haai, use vah isee parvat par nash karega." 
Isaiah25:8 vah mratyu ko sada ke liye nash karega, aur prabhu yahova sabhon ke mukh par se ansoo ponchh dalega, aur apanee praja kee namadharai saree prathvee par se door karega kyonki yahova ne aeesa kaha haai.." 
Isaiah25:9 aur us samay yah kaha jaaega, dekho, hamara parameshvar yahee haai ham isee kee batt johate aae haai, ki vah hamara uddhar kare. yahova yahee haai ham usakee batt johate aae haain. ham us se uddhar pakar magan aur anaandait honge." 
Isaiah25:10 kyonaki is parvat par yahova ka hath sarvada bana rahega aur moab apane hee sthan men aeesa latada jaaega jaaisa ghoore men pual latada jata haai. 
Isaiah25:11 aur vah us men apane hath is prakar faailaaega, jaaise koi taairate huae faailaae parantu vah usake garva ko todega aur usakee chaturai ko nishfal kar dega." 
Isaiah25:12 aur usakee unchee unchee aushra draddh shaharapanahon ko vah jhukaaega aur neecha karega, varan boomi par girakar mittee men mila dega.." 
Isaiah26:1 us samay yahooda desh men yah geet gaya jaega, hamara ek draddh nagar haai uddhar ka kam dene ke liye vah usakee shaharapanah aur gaddh ko niyukt karata haai." 
Isaiah26:2 faattkon ko kholo ki sachchai ka palan karanevalee aek dharmee jaati pravesh kare. 
Isaiah26:3 jisaka man tujh men dhaeeraj dhare huae haai, usakee too poorn shaaantai ke sath raksha karata haai, kyonki vah tujh par bhrosa rakhta haai." 
Isaiah26:4 yahova par sada bhrosa rak, kyonaki prabhu yahova sanatan chattan haai." 
Isaiah26:5 vah unche padavale ko jhuka deta, jo nagar unche par basa haai usako vah neeche kar deta. vah usako boomi par girakar mittee men mila deta haai." 
Isaiah26:6 vah panvon se, varan daridraen ke paairon se raunda jaaega.." 
Isaiah26:7 dharmee ka marga sachchai haai too jo svayan sachchai haai, too dharmee kee aguvai karata haai." 
Isaiah26:8 he yahova, tere nyay ke marga men ham log teree batt johate aae haain tere nam ke smaran kee hamare praanon men lalasa banee rahatee haai." 
Isaiah26:9 rat ke samay maain jee se taree lalasa karata hoo, mera sampoorn man se yatn ke sath tujhe ddoonddhta haai. kyonki jab tere nyay ke kam prathvee par pragatt hote haai, tab jagat ke rahanevale dharma kee seekhte haain." 
Isaiah26:10 dushtt par chahe daya bhee kee jaae taubhee vah dharma ko n seekhega dharmarajy men bhee vah kuattlaita karega, aur yahova ko mahatmy use soojh n padega.." 
Isaiah26:11 he yahova, tera hath baddha hua haai, par ve naheen dekhte. parantu ve janenge ki tujhe praja ke liye kaaisee jalan haai, aur lajaaenge." 
Isaiah26:12 tere baairee ag se bhsm honge. he yahova, too hamare liye shaantai ttharaaega, ham ne jo kuchh kiya haai use too hee ne hamare liye kiya haai." 
Isaiah26:13 he hamare parameshvar yahova, tere sivay aur svamee bhee ham par prabhuta karate the, parantu teree krapa se ham keval tere hee nam ka gunanuvad karenge." 
Isaiah26:14 ve mar gaae haai, fir kabhee jeeavit naheen honge unako mare bahut din hua, ve fir naheen uttne ke too ne unaka vichar karake unako aeesa nash kiya ki ve fir smaran men n aaenge." 
Isaiah26:15 parantu too ne jati ko baddhaya he yahova, too ne jaati ko baddhaya haai too ne apanee mahima dikhai haai aur us desh ke sab sivanon ko too ne baddhaya haai.." 
Isaiah26:16 he yahova, du:kh men ve tujhe smaran karate the, jab too unhen tadna deta tha tab ve dabe svar se apane man kee bat tujh par pragatt karate the." 
Isaiah26:17 jaaise garbhvatee sree janane ke samay aeentttee aur peedon ke karan chilla utttee haai, ham log bhee, he yahova, tere samhane vaaise hee ho gaae haain." 
Isaiah26:18 ham bhee garbhvatee hua, ham bhee aeentte, ham ne mano vayu hee ko janm diya. ham ne desh ke liye koi uddhar ka kam naheen kiya, aur n jagat ke rahanevale utpann huae." 
Isaiah26:19 tere mare huae log jeevit honge, murde utt khde honge. he mittee men basanevalo, jagakar jayajayakar karo! kyonki teree os jyoti se utpann hotee haai, aur prathvee murdo ko lautta degee.." 
Isaiah26:20 he mere logo, ao, apanee apanee kottree men pravesh karake kivadon ko band karo thodee der tak jab tak krodha shaant n ho tab tak apane ko chhpai rakho." 
Isaiah26:21 kyonaki dekho, yahova prathvee nivaasiyon ko adharma ka dand dene ke liye apane sthan se chala ata haai, aur prathvee apana koon pragatt karegee aur ghaat kiae huon ko aur aadhaik n chhpai rakhegee.." 
Isaiah27:1 us samay yahova apanee kadee, badee, aur pod talavar se livyatan nam veg aur tteddhe chalanevale sarpa ko dand dega, aur jo ajagar samudra men rahata haai usako bhee ghaat karega.." 
Isaiah27:2 us samay ek sundar dakh kee baree hogee, tum usaka yash gana!" 
Isaiah27:3 maain yahova usakee raksha karata hoon maain kshan kshan usako seenchata rahoonga. aeesa n ho ki koi usakee haati kare. 
Isaiah27:4 mere man men jalajalahatt naheen haai. yadi koi bhanti bhanati ke katteele ped mujh se ladne ko khde karata, to maain un par panv baddhakar unako pooree reeti se bhsm kar deta." 
Isaiah27:5 va mere sath mel karane ko ve meree sharan le, ve mere sath mel kar len.." 
Isaiah27:6 bhavishy men yakoob jad pakadega, aur israael foola-falega, aur usake falon se jagat bhr jaaega.." 
Isaiah27:7 kya us ne use mara jaaisa us ne usake maranevalon ko mara tha? kya vah ghaat kiya gaya jaaise usake ghaat kiae huae ghaat hue? 
Isaiah27:8 jab too ne use nikala, tab socha-vichar kar usako du:kh diya: use ne puravai ke din usako prachand vayu se uda diya haai." 
Isaiah27:9 is se yakoob ke adharma ka praayaashchait kiya jaaega aur usake pap ke door hone ka pratifal yah hoga ki ve vedee ke sab patthron ko choona banane ke patthron ke saman chakanachoor karenge, aur ashora aur soorya kee praatimaaen fir khdee n rahengee." 
Isaiah27:10 kyonaki gaddhvala nagar nirjan hua haai, vah chhodee hui bastee ke saman nirjan aur jangal ho gaya haai vahan bachhde charenge aur vaheen baaittenge, aur pedon kee daaliyon kee faunagee ko kho lenge." 
Isaiah27:11 jab usakee shaakhaaen sookh jaaen tab todee jaaengee aur striayan akar unako todkar jala dengee. kyonki ye log nirbuaddh ihaain isaliye unaka karta un par daya n karega, aur unaka rachanevala un par anugrah n karega.." 
Isaiah27:12 us samay yahova mahanad se lekar misr ke nale tak apane ann ko fattkega, aur he israealiyon tum ek ek karake ikatthe kiae jaoge." 
Isaiah27:13 us samay bada naraasinga foonka jaega, aur jo ashshoor desh men nash ho rahe the aur jo misr desh men barabas basaae huae the ve yarooshalem men akar pavitra parvat par yahova ko dandvata karenge.." 
Isaiah28:1 ghamand ke mukutt par haya! jo aepraaim ke matavalon ka haai, aur unakee bhdkeelee sundarata par jo murjhanevala fool haai, jo ati upaja tarai ke sire par dakhmadha se matavalon kee haai." 
Isaiah28:2 dekho, prabhu ke pas aek balavant aur samarthee haai jo ole kee vashara va ujadnevalee andhaee ya baddh kee prachand dhaar kee nai haai vah usako kattorata se boomi par gira dega." 
Isaiah28:3 aepraaimee matavalon ke ghamand ka mukutt panv se latada jaaega 
Isaiah28:4 aur unakee bhdkeelee sundarata ka murjhanevala fool jo aati upaja tarai ke sire par haai, vah graeeshmakal se pahile pake anjeer ke saman hoga, jise dekhnevala dekhte hee hath men le aur nigal jaae.." 
Isaiah28:5 us samay senaon ka yahova svayan apanee praja ke bache huon ke liye sundar aur pratapee mukutt ttharega 
Isaiah28:6 aur jo nyay karane ko baaittte haain unake liye nyay karanevalee atma aur jo chaddhai karate huae shatrauon ko nagar ke faattk se hatta dete haai, unake liye vah bal ttharega.." 
Isaiah28:7 ye bhee dakhmadha ke karan dgamagate aur maadira se ladkhdate haain yajak aur nabee bhee madira ke karan dgamagate haai, dakhmadha ne unako bhula diya haai, ve madira ke karan ladkhdate aur darshan pate huae bhttke jate, aur nyay men bool karate haain." 
Isaiah28:8 kyonaki sab bhojan asan vaman aur mal se bhre haai, koi shuuddh sthan naheen bacha.." 
Isaiah28:9 vah kisako gyaan sikhaaega, aur kisako apane samachar ka arth samajhaaega? kya unako jo doodha chhudaae huae aur stan se alagaae huae haain? kyonki agyaa par agyaa, agyaa par agyaa," 
Isaiah28:10 niyam par niyam, niyam par niyam thoda yaha, thoda vahan.." 
Isaiah28:11 vah to in logon se paradeshaee hontton aur videshaee bhashaavalon ke dara baten karega 
Isaiah28:12 jin se us ne kaha, vishraam isee se milega isee ke dara thke huae ko vishraam do parantu unhon ne sunana n chaha." 
Isaiah28:13 isaliye yahova ka vachan unake pas agyaa par agyaa, agyaa par agyaa, niyam par niyam, niyam par niyam haai, thoda yaha, thoda vaha, jis se ve ttokar khakar chitt giren aur ghaayal ho jaae, aur fande men fansakar pakade jaaen.." 
Isaiah28:14 is karan he ttttha karanevalo, yarooshalemavasee praja ke hakimo, yahova ka vachan suno!" 
Isaiah28:15 tum ne kaha haai ki ham ne mratyu se vacha bandhaee aur adhaelok se pratigyaa karai haai is karan vipaati jab baddh kee nai baddh aae tab hamare pas n aaegee kyonaki ham ne joott kee sharan lee aur mithya kee ad men chhpai huae haain. 
Isaiah28:16 isaliye prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain ne siyyon men nev ka patthr rakha haai, aek parakha hua patthr, kone ka anamol aur aati draddh nev ke yogy patthra: aur jo koi vishvas rakhe vah utavalee n karega." 
Isaiah28:17 aur maain nyay kee doree aur dharma ko sahul ttharaunga aur tumhara joott ka sharansthan olon se bah jaaega, aur tumhare chhpaine ka sthan jal se oob jaaega." 
Isaiah28:18 tab jo vacha tum ne mratyu se bandhaee haai vah toott jaaegee, aur jo pratigyaa tum ne adhaelok se karai vah n ttharegee jab vipaati baddh kee nai baddh aa, tab tum us men oob hee jaoge." 
Isaiah28:19 jab jab vah baddh aa, tab tab vah tum ko le jaaegee vah praati din varan rat din baddha karengee aur is samachar ka sunana hee vyakul hone ka karan hoga." 
Isaiah28:20 kyonaki bichhauna ttang faailane ke liye chhotta, aur oddhna oddhne ke liye sakara haai.." 
Isaiah28:21 kyonaki yahova aeesa utt khda hoga jaaisa vah parajeem nam parvat par khda hua aur jaaisa gibon kee tarai men us ne krodha dikhaya tha vah ab fir krodha dikhaaega, jis se vah apana kam kare, jo achambhiat kam haai, aur vah karya kare jo anokha haai." 
Isaiah28:22 isaliye ab tum ttttha mat karo, naheen to tumhare bandhan kase jaaenge kyonki maain ne senaon ke prabhu yahova se yah suna haai ki sare desh ka satyanash ttana gaya haai.." 
Isaiah28:23 kan lagakar meree suno, dhyan dharakar mera vachan suno." 
Isaiah28:24 kya hal jotanevala beej bone ke liye lagatar jotata rahata haai? kya vah sada dharatee ko cheerata aur hengata rahata haai? 
Isaiah28:25 kya vah usako chauras karake saunfa ko naheen chhtairata, jeere ko naheen bakherata aur gehoon ko panti panati karake aur jab ko usake nij sthan par, aur kattyai gehoon ko khet kee chhor par naheen bota?" 
Isaiah28:26 kyonaki usaka parameshvar usako tteek tteek kam karana sikhlata aur batalata haai.. 
Isaiah28:27 danvane kee gadee se to saunfa dai naheen jatee, aur gadee ka pahiya jeere ke upar naheen chalaya jata parantu saunfa chhdee se, aur jeera sontten se jhada jata haai." 
Isaiah28:28 rottee ke ann par dayen kee jatee haai, parantu koi usako sada danvata naheen rahata aur n gadee ke paahiye n ghaede us par chalata haai, vah use choor choor naheen karata." 
Isaiah28:29 yah bhee senaon ke yahova kee or se niyukt hua haai, vah adabhut yuaktaivala aur mahabuddhmaian haai.." 
Isaiah29:1 hay, areeael, areeael, hay us nagar par jis men daud chhavanee kiae huae raha! varsha par varsha jadte jao, utsav ke parva apane apane samay par manate jao." 
Isaiah29:2 taubhee maain to areeael ko saketee men daloonga, vahan rona peettna rahega, aur vah meree draashtti men sachamuch areeael sa ttharega." 
Isaiah29:3 aur maain charon or tere virooddh chhavanee karake tujhe kotton se ghor loonga, aur tere virooddh gaddh bhee banaunga." 
Isaiah29:4 tab too girakar boomi men dala jaaega, aur dhool par se bolega, aur teree bat boomi se dhaeemee dhaeemee sunai degee tera bol boomi par se praet ka sa hoga, aur too dhool se gunagunakar bolega.." 
Isaiah29:5 tab tere paradeshaee baairiyon kee bheed sooksham dhooli kee nai, aur un bhyanak loagon kee bheed boose kee nai udain jaaegee." 
Isaiah29:6 aur senaon ka yahova achanak badal garajata, boomi ko kampata, aur mahadhvani karata, bavandr aur andhaee chalata, aur nash karanevalee agnai bhdkata hua usake pas aaega." 
Isaiah29:7 aur jaatiyon kee saree bheed jo areeael se yuddh karegee, or jitane log usake aur usake gaddh ke virooddh ladenge aur usako saketee men dalenge, ve sab rat ke dekhe huae svapn ke saman ttharenge." 
Isaiah29:8 aur jaaisa koi bookha svapan men to dekhta haai ki vah kha raha haai, parantu jagakar dekhta haai ki usaka pett bookha hee haai, va koi pyasa svapan men dekhen kee vah pee raha haai, parantu jagakar dekhta haai ki usaka gala sookha jata haai aur vah pyasa mar raha haai vaaisee hee un sab jatiyon kee bheed kee dasha hogee jo siyyon parvat se yuddh karengee.." 
Isaiah29:9 tthar jao aur chaakit hoo! ve matavale to haai, parantu dakhmadha se nahee, ve dgamagate to haai, parantu maadira peene se naheen!" 
Isaiah29:10 yahova ne tum ko bharee neend men dal diya haai aur us ne tumharee nabeeroopee ankhon ko band kar diya haai aur tumhare dashareeroopee siron par parda dala haai. 
Isaiah29:11 isaliye sare darshan tumhare liye aek lapettee aur muhar kee hui pustak kee baton ke saman haai, jise koi paddhe-alikhe manushy ko yah kahakar de, ise paddh, aur vah kahe, maain naheen paddh sakata kyonki is par muhar kee hui haai." 
Isaiah29:12 tab vahee pustak anapaddhe ko yah kahakar dee jaa, ise paddh, aur vah kahe, maain to anapaddh hoon.." 
Isaiah29:13 aur prabhu ne kaha, ye log jo munh se mera adar karate huae sameep ate parantu apana man mujh se door rakhte haai, aur jo keval manushyon kee agyaa sun sunakar mera bhy manate haain." 
Isaiah29:14 is karan sun, maain inake sath adabhut kam varan ati adabhut aur achambhe ka kam karoonga tab inake buaddhmaianon kee buddh inashtt hogee, aur inake praveenon kee praveenta jatee rahegee.." 
Isaiah29:15 hay un par jo apanee yuaktai ko yahova se chhpaiane ka bada yatn karate, aur apane kam andhore men karake kahate haai, ham ko kaun dekhta haai? ham ko kaun janata haai?" 
Isaiah29:16 tumharee kaaisee ulattee samajh haai! kya kumhar mittee ke tuly gina jaaega? kya banai hui vastu apane kartta ke vishay kahe ki us ne mujhe naheen banaya, va rachee hui vastu apane rachanevale ke vishay kahe, ki vah kuchh samajh naheen rakhta?" 
Isaiah29:17 kya ab thode hee dinon ke beetane par labanon fir faladai baree n ban jaaega, aur faladai baree jangal n ginee jaaegee?" 
Isaiah29:18 us samay bahire pustak kee baten sunane legenge, aur andho jinhen ab kuchh naheen soojhta, ve dekhne legenge." 
Isaiah29:19 namra log yahova ke karan fir anaandait honge, aur daridra manushy israael ke pavitra ke karan magan honge." 
Isaiah29:20 kyonaki upadravee fir n rahenge aur ttttha karanevalon ka ant hoga, aur jo anarth karane ke liye jagate rahate haai, jo manushyon ko vachan men fansate haai," 
Isaiah29:21 aur jo sabha men ulahana dete unake liye fanda lagate, aur dharma ko vyarth bat ke dara bigad dete haai, ve sab mitt jaaenge.." 
Isaiah29:22 is karan ibraaheem ka chhudanevala yahova, yakoob ke gharane ke vishay yon kahata haai, yakoob ko fir lajjait hona n padega, usaka mukh fir neecha n hoga." 
Isaiah29:23 kyonaki jab usake santan mera kam dekhenge, jo maain unake beech men karoonga, tab ve mere nam ko paavitra manenge, aur israael ke parameshvar ko aati bhy manenge." 
Isaiah29:24 us samay jinaka man bhttka ho ve buddh ipraapt karenge, aur jo kudkudate haain vah shaiksha grahan karenge.." 
Isaiah30:1 yahova kee yah vanee haai, hay un balava karanevale ladkon par jo yuaktai to karate parantu meree or se naheen vacha to bandhate parantu mere atma ke sikhaye naheen aur is prakar pap par pap baddhate haain." 
Isaiah30:2 ve mujh se bin poochhe misr ko jate haain ki firaun kee raksha men rahe aur misr kee chhaya men sharan len. 
Isaiah30:3 isaliye firaun ka sharansthan tumharee lajja ka, aur misr kee chhaya men sharan lena tumharee ninda ka karan hoga." 
Isaiah30:4 usake haakim soan men aae to haain aur usake doot ab hanes men pahunche haain. 
Isaiah30:5 ve sab aek aeesee jati ke karan laajjait honge jis se unaka kuchh labh n hoga, jo sahayata aur laabh ke badale lajja aur namadharai ka karan hogee.." 
Isaiah30:6 daakkhian desh ke pashuuon ke vishay bharee vachana. ve apanee dhan sampati ko javan gadahon kee peett par, aur apane khjanon ko untton ke koobadon par lade hua, sankatt aur saketee ke desh men hokar, jahan sinh aur sinhanee, nag aur udnevale tej vishadhar sarpa rahate haai, un logon ke pas ja rahe haain jin se unako labh n hoga." 
Isaiah30:7 kyonaki misr kee sahayata vyarth aur nikammee haai, is karan maain ne usako baaittee rahanevalee rahab kaha haai.." 
Isaiah30:8 ab akar isako unake samhane patthr par khod, aur pustak men lik, ki vah bhvishy ke liye varan sada ke liye sakshaee banee rahe." 
Isaiah30:9 kyonaki ve balava karanevale log aur joott bolanevale ladke haain jo yahova kee shaiksha ko sunana naheen chahate. 
Isaiah30:10 ve daashairyon se kahate haai, dasharee mat bano aur naabiyon se kahate haai, hamare liye tteek naboovat mat karo ham se chikanee chupadee baten bolo, dhaekha denevalee naboovat karo." 
Isaiah30:11 marga se mudo, path se hatto, aur israael ke pavitra ko hamare samhane se door karo." 
Isaiah30:12 is karan israael ka paavitra yon kahata haai, tum log jo mere is vachan ko nikamma janate aur andhor aur kuattlaita par bhrosa karake unheen par ttek lagate ho" 
Isaiah30:13 is karan yah adharma tumhare liye unchee bheet ka tootta hua bhag hoga jo fattkar girane par ho, aur vah achanak pal bhr men toottkar gir padega," 
Isaiah30:14 aur kumhar ke bartan kee nai foottkar aeesa chakanachoor hoga ki usake ttukadon ka aek tteekara bhee n milega jis se angettee men se ag lee jaae va haud men se jal nikala jaae.. 
Isaiah30:15 prabhu yahova, israael ka paavitra yon kahata haai, lautt ane aur shaant rahane men tumhara uddhar haai shaant rahate aur bhrosa rakhne men tumharee veerata haai. parantu tum ne aeesa naheen kiya," 
Isaiah30:16 tum ne kaha, nahee, ham to ghaedon par chaddhkar bhagenge, isaaliye tum bhagoge aur yah bhee kaha ki ham tej savaree par chalenge, so tumhara peechha karanevale us se bhee tej honge." 
Isaiah30:17 aek hee kee dhamakee se aek hajar bhagenge, aur panch kee dhamakee se tum aeesa bhagoge ki ant men tum pahad kee chottee ke dnde va tteele ke upar kee dhvaja ke saman rah jaoge jo chinh ke liye gade jate haain." 
Isaiah30:18 taubhee yahova isaaliye vilamb karata haai ki tum par anugrah kare, aur isaliye unche uttega ki tum par daya kare. kyonki yahova nyayee parameshvar haai kya hee dhany haain ve jo us par asha lagaae rahate haain.." 
Isaiah30:19 he siyyon ke logon tum yarooshalem men base raho tum fir kabhee n rooge, vah tumharee dohai sunate hee tum par nishchay anugrah karega: vah sunate hee tumharee manega." 
Isaiah30:20 aur chahe prabhu tumhen vipaati kee rottee aur du:kh ka jal bhee de, taubhee tumhare upadeshak fir n chhpaie, aur tum apanee ankhon se apane upadeshakon ko dekhte rahoge." 
Isaiah30:21 aur jab kabhee tum dahinee va bai or mudne lago, tab tumhare peechhe se yah vachan tumhare kanon men padega, marga yahee haai, isee par chalo." 
Isaiah30:22 tab tum vah chandee jis se tumharee khudee hui mootiayan maddhee haai, aur vah sona jis se tumharee ddhlee hui mootiayan abooshait haai, ashuuddh karoge. tum unako maaile kuchaaile vasr kee nain faenk doge aur kahoge, door ho." 
Isaiah30:23 aur vah tumhare liye jal barasaaega ki tum khet men beej bo sako, aur boomi kee upaj bhee uttm aur bahutayat se hogee. us samay tumhare janavaron ko lambee-chaudee charai milegee." 
Isaiah30:24 aur baail aur gadahe jo tumharee khetee ke kam men aaenge, ve soop aur daliya se fattka hua svaadishtt chara khaaenge." 
Isaiah30:25 aur us mahasanhar ke samay jab gummatt gir padenge, sab unche unche pahadon aur pahadiyon par naaliyan aur sote paae jaaenge." 
Isaiah30:26 us samay yahova apanee praja ke logon ka ghaav bandhoga aur unakee chott changa karega tab chandrama ka prakash soorya ka sa, aur soorya ka prakash sataguna hoga, arthata attvare bhr ka prakash ek din men hoga.." 
Isaiah30:27 dekho, yahova door se chala ata haai, usaka prakop bhdk utta haai, aur dhooaen ka badal utt raha haai usake hontt krodha se bhre huae aur usakee jeebh bhsm karanevalee ag ke saman haai." 
Isaiah30:28 usakee sans aeesee umandnevalee nadee ke saman haai jo gale tak pahunchatee haai vah sab jaatiyon ko nash ke soop se fattkega, aur desh desh ke logon ko bhttkane ke liye unake jabhdon men lagam lagaega.." 
Isaiah30:29 tab tum paavitra parva kee rat ka sa geet gaoge, aur jaaisa log yahova ke parvat kee or us se milane ko, jo israael kee chattan haai, bansulee bajate huae jate haai, vaaise hee tumhare man men bhee anand hoga." 
Isaiah30:30 aur yahova apanee pratapeevanee sunaaega, aur apana krodha bhdkata aur ag kee lau se bhsm karata hua, aur prachand andhaee aur ati vashara aur olon ke sath apana bhujabal dikhaaega." 
Isaiah30:31 ashshoor yahova ke shabd kee shaktai se nash ho jaaega, vah use sontte se marega." 
Isaiah30:32 aur jab jab yahova usako dand dega, tab tab sath hee dfa aur veena bajengee aur vah hath baddhakar usako lagatar marata rahega." 
Isaiah30:33 bahut kal se topet taaiyar kiya gaya haai, vah raja kee ke liye ttharaya gaya haai, vah lamba chauda aur gahira bhee banaya gaya haai, vahan kee chita men ag aur bahut see lakadee haain yahova kee sans jalatee hui gandhak kee dhaara kee nain usako sulagaaegee.." 
Isaiah31:1 hay un par jo sahayata pane ke liye misr ko jate haain aur ghaedon ka asara karate haain jo rathon par bhrosa rakhte kyonki ve bahut haai, aur savaron par, kyonaki ve ati balavan haai, par israael ke paavitra kee or draashtti naheen karate aur n yahova kee khoj karate haain!" 
Isaiah31:2 parantu vah bhee buddhmaian haai aur du:kh dega, vah apane vachan n ttalega, parantu uttkar kukaarmiyon ke gharane par aur anarthkariyon ke sahayakon par bhee chaddhai karega." 
Isaiah31:3 misree log ishvar nahee, manushy hee haain aur unake ghaede atma nahee, mans hee haain. jab yahova hath baddhaaega, tab sahayata karanevale aur sahayatak chahanevale donon ttokar khakar girenge, aur ve sab ke sab aek sang nashtt ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah31:4 fir yahova ne mujh se yon kaha, jis prakar sinh va javan sinh jab apane aher par gurrata ho, aur charavahe ikatthe hokar usake virooddh badee bheed lagaae, taubhee vah unake bol se n ghabaraaega aur n unake kolahal ke karan dabega, usee prakar senaon ka yahova, siyyon parvat aur yarooshalem kee pahadee par, yuddh karane ko utarega." 
Isaiah31:5 pankh faailai hui chidiyon kee nain senaon ka yahova yarooshalem kee raksha karega vah usakee raksha karake bachaaega, aur usako bin chooae hee uddhar karega.." 
Isaiah31:6 he israaeliyo, jisake virooddh tum ne bharee balava kiya haai, usee kee or firo." 
Isaiah31:7 us samay tum log sone chandee kee apanee apanee moortiyon se jinhen tum banakar papee ho gaae ho dharana karoge. 
Isaiah31:8 tab ashshoor us talavar se giraya jaaega jo manushy kee naheen vah us talavar ka kaur ho jaaega jo adamee kee naheen aur vah talavar ke samhane se bhagega aur usake javan begar men pakade jaaenge. 
Isaiah31:9 vah bhy ke mare apane sundar bhvan se jata rahega, aur usake hakim dhabarahatt ke karan dhvaja tyag kar bhag jaaenge, yahova jis kee agnai siyyon men aur jisaka bhttha yaroosholam men haai, usee yah vanee haai.." 
Isaiah32:1 dekho, aek raja dharma se rajy karega, aur rajakuma nyay se hukoomat karenge." 
Isaiah32:2 har aek mano andhaee se chhpaine ka sthan, aur bauchhar se ad hoga ya nirjal desh men jal ke jhrane, v tapt boomi men badee chattan kee chhaya." 
Isaiah32:3 us samay dekhnevalon kee ankhen dhaundhalee n hongee, aur sunanevalon ke kan lage rahenge." 
Isaiah32:4 utavalon ke man gyaan kee baten samajhenge, aur tutalanevalon kee jeebh faurtee se aur safa bolegee." 
Isaiah32:5 mooddh fir udar n kahalaaega aur n kanjoos danee kaha jaaega. 
Isaiah32:6 kyonaki mooddh to mooddhta hee kee baten bolata aur man men anarth hee gaddhta rahata haai ki vah bin bhktai ke kam kare aur yahova ke virooddh joott kahe, bookhe ko bookha hee rahane de aur pyase ka jal rok rakhe." 
Isaiah32:7 chhlee kee chalen buree hotee haai, vah dushtt yuaktaiyan nikalata haai ki daridra ko bhee joottee baton men lootte jab ki ve tteek aur namrata se bhee bolate hon." 
Isaiah32:8 parantu udar manushy udarata hee kee yuktaiyan nikalata haai, vah udarata men sthiar bhee rahega.." 
Isaiah32:9 he sukhee striayo, uttkar meree suno he nishchaint puatraiyo, mere vachan kee or kan lagao." 
Isaiah32:10 he nishchaint striayo, varsha bhr se kuchh hee aadhaik samay men tum vikal ho jaogee kyonaki todne ko dakhen n hongee aur n kisee bhanti ke fal hath lagenge." 
Isaiah32:11 he sukhee striayo, thrathrao, he nishchaint striayo, vikal ho apane apane vasr utarakar apanee apanee kamar men ttatt kaso." 
Isaiah32:12 ve manabha kheton aur falavant dakhlataon ke liye chhatee peettengee. 
Isaiah32:13 mere lagon ke varan prasann nagar ke sab harsha bhre gharon men bhee bhanti bhanati ke katteele ped upajenge. 
Isaiah32:14 kyonaki rajabhvan tyaga jaaega, kolahal se bhra nagar sunasan ho jaaega aur pahadee aur un par ke paharooon ke ghar sada ke liye mande aur jangalee gadahon ko viharasthan aur gharaailoo pashuuon kee charai us samay tak bane rahenge" 
Isaiah32:15 jab tak atma upar se ham par undela n jaa, aur jangal faladayak baree n bane, aur faladayak baree fir van n ginee jaae." 
Isaiah32:16 tab us jangal men nyay basega, aur us faladayak baree men dharma rahega." 
Isaiah32:17 aur dharma ka fal shaanti aur usaka parinam sada ka chaain aur nishchaint rahana hoga. 
Isaiah32:18 mere log shaaantai ke sthanon men nishchaint rahenge, aur vishraam ke sthanon men sukh se rahenge." 
Isaiah32:19 aur van ke vinash ke samay ole girenge, aur nagar pooree reeti se chaupatt ho jaaega." 
Isaiah32:20 kya hee dhany ho tum jo sab jalashayon ke pas beech bote, aur baailon aur gadahon ko svatantrata se charate ho.." 
Isaiah33:1 hay tujh nash karanevale par jo nash naheen kiya gaya tha hay tujh vishvasaghaatee par, jisake sath vishvasaghaat naheen kiya gaya! jab too nash kar chuke, tab too nash kiya jaaega aur jab too vishvasaghaat kar chuke, tab tere sath vishvasaghaat kiya jaaega.." 
Isaiah33:2 he yahova, ham logon par anugrah kara ham teree hee batt johate haain. bhor ko too unaka bhujabal, sankatt ke samay hamara uddharakartta tthara." 
Isaiah33:3 hulladre sunate hee desh desh ke log bhag gaa, tere uttne par anyajaatiyan tittra-abittr hui." 
Isaiah33:4 aur jaaise ttiiddayan chatt karatee haain vaaise hee tumharee loott chatt kee jaaegee, aur jaaise ttiiddayan toott padtee haai, vaaise hee ve us par toott padenge.." 
Isaiah33:5 yahova mahan hua haai, vah unche par rahata haai us ne siyyon ko nyay aur dharma se paripoorn kiya haai" 
Isaiah33:6 aur uddhar, buaddh iddh aur gyaan kee bahutayat tere dinon ka adhaar hogee yahova ka bhy usaka dhan hoga.." 
Isaiah33:7 dek, unake shooraveer bahar chilla rahe haain sandhai ke doot bilak bilakakar ro rahe haain." 
Isaiah33:8 rajamarga sunasan pade haai, un par battohee ab naheen chalate. us ne vacha ko ttal diya, nagaron ko tuchchh jana, us ne manushy ko kuchh n samajha." 
Isaiah33:9 prathvee vilap karatee aur murjha gai haai labanon kumhala gaya aur us par siyahee chha gai haai shaaron marooboomi ke saman ho gaya bashaan aur karmel men patajhd ho raha haai.. 
Isaiah33:10 yahova kahata haai, ab maain utoonga, maain apana pratap dikhaunga ab maain mahan ttharoonga." 
Isaiah33:11 tum men sookhee ghaas ka garbh rahega, tum se boosee utpann hogee tumharee sans ag haai jo tumhen bhsm karegee." 
Isaiah33:12 desh desh ke log foonke huae choone ke saman ho jaaenge, aur katte huae katteele pedon kee nai ag men jalaae jaaenge.." 
Isaiah33:13 he door door ke logo, suno ki maain ne kya kiya haai? aur tum bhee jo nikatt ho, mera parakram jan lo." 
Isaiah33:14 siyyon ke papee thrathra gaae haain: bhktaiheenon ko kanpakanpee lagee haai: ham men se kon prachand ag men rah sakata? ham men se kaun us ag men bana rah sakata haai jo kabhee naheen bujhegee? 
Isaiah33:15 jo dharma se chalata aur seedhaee baten bolata jo andhor ke labh se gharana karata, jo ghoos nahee leta jo koon kee bat sunane se kan band karata, aur burai dekhne se ankh moond leta haai. vahee unche sthanon men nivas karega." 
Isaiah33:16 vah chattanon ke gaddhon men sharan liae huae rahega usako rottee milegee aur panee kee ghattee kabhee n hogee.. 
Isaiah33:17 too apanee ankhon se raja ko usakee shaebha sahit dekhega aur lambe chaude desh par draashtti karega. 
Isaiah33:18 too bhy ke dinon ko smaran karega: lekha lenevala aur kar taul kar lenevala kahan raha? gummatton ka ginanevala kahan raha? 
Isaiah33:19 jinakee kattnai bhasha too naheen samajhta, aur jinakee ladbadatee jeebh kee bat too naheen boojh sakata un nirday logon ko too fir n dekhega." 
Isaiah33:20 hamare parva ke nagar siyyon par drashtti kara! too apanee ankhon se yaroosholam ko dekhega, vah vishraam ka sthan, aur aeesa tamboo haai jo kabhee giraya naheen jaaega, jisaka koi koontta kabhee ukhada n jaaega, aur n koi rassee kabhee toottegee." 
Isaiah33:21 vahan mahapratapee yahova hamare liye rahega, vah bahut badee badee nadiyon aur naharo ka sthan hoga, jis men dandvalee nav n chalegee aur n shaebhayaman jahaj us men hokar jaaega." 
Isaiah33:22 kyonaki yahova hamara nyayee, yahova hamara hakim, yahova hamara raja haai vahee hamara uddhar karega.." 
Isaiah33:23 teree rassaiyan ddheelee ho gai, ve mastool kee jad ko draddh n rakh sakee, aur n pal ko tan sakeen.. tab badee loott chheenakar banttee gai, langade log bhee loott ke bhagee hue." 
Isaiah33:24 koi nivasee n kahega ki maain rogee hoon aur jo lag us men basenge, unaka adharma kshama kiya jaaega.." 
Isaiah34:1 he jaati jati ke logo, sunane ke liye nikatt ao, aur he rajy rajy ke logo, dhyan se suno! prathvee bhee, aur jo kuchh us men haai, jagat aur jo kuchh us men utpann hota haai, sab suno." 
Isaiah34:2 yahova sab jaatiyon par krodha kar raha haai, aur unakee saree sena par usakee jalajalahatt bhdkee hui haai, us ne unako satyanash hone, aur sanhar hone ko chhod diya haai." 
Isaiah34:3 unake mare huae faenk diye jaenge, aur unakee lothon kee durgandha uttegee unake lohoo se pahad gal jaenge." 
Isaiah34:4 akash ke sare gan jate rahenge aur akash kagaj kee nai lapetta jaaega. aur jaaise dakhlata va anjeer ke vraksha ke patte murjhakar gir jate haai, vaaise hee usake sare gan dhaundhale hokar jate rahenge.." 
Isaiah34:5 kyonaki meree talavar akash men peekar trapt hui haai dekho, vah nyay karane ko aedom par, aur jin par mera shaap haai un par padegee." 
Isaiah34:6 yahova kee talavar lohoo se bhr gai haai, vah charbee se aur bhedon ke bachchon aur bakaron ke lohoo se, aur meddhon ke gurdon kee charbee se trapt hui haai. kyonki bosra nagar men yahova ka aek yagya aur aedom desh men bada sanhar hua haai." 
Isaiah34:7 unake sang jangalee sanddh aur bachhde aur baail vadha honge, aur unakee boomi lohoo se bheeg jaegee aur vahan kee mittee charbee se agha jaegee.." 
Isaiah34:8 kyonaki palatta lene ko yahova ka aek din aur siyyon ka mukama chukane ka aek varsha niyukt haai. 
Isaiah34:9 aur aedom kee nadiyan ral se aur usakee mittee gandhak se badal jaaegee usakee boomi jalatee hui ral ban jaaegee. 
Isaiah34:10 vah rata-adin n bujhegee usaka dhoona sadaaiv uttta rahega. yug yug vah ujad pada rahega koi us men se hokar kabhee n chalega. 
Isaiah34:11 us men dhaneshapakshaee aur sahee paae jaenge aur vah ulloo aur kauve ka basera hoga. vah us par gadbad kee doree aur sunasanee ka sahool tanega. 
Isaiah34:12 vahan n to rais honge aur n aeesa koi hoga jo rajy karane ko ttharaya jaae usake sab hakimon ka ant hoga.. 
Isaiah34:13 usake mahalon men katteele ped, gaddhon men bichchoo paudho aur jhad ugenge. vah geedadon ka vasasthan aur shuuturmugon ka angan ho jaega." 
Isaiah34:14 vahan nirjal desh ke jantu siyaron ke sang milakar basenge aur ronar jantu aek doosare ko bulaaenge vahan leeleet nam jantu vasasthan pakar chaain se rahega.. 
Isaiah34:15 vahan udnevalee sanpin ka bil hoga ve ande dekar unhen sevengee aur apanee chhaya men battor lengee vahan giddh apanee sathain ke sath ikatthe rahenge. 
Isaiah34:16 yahova kee pustak se ddoonddhkar paddho in men se aek bhee bat bina poora huae n rahegee koi bina joda n rahega. kyonki maain ne apane munh se yah agyaa dee haai aur usee kee atma ne unhen ikattha kiya haai. 
Isaiah34:17 usee ne unake liye chitthee dalee, usee ne apane hath se doree dalakar us dansh ko unake liye bantt diya haai vah sarvada unaka hee bana rahega aur ve peeddhee se peeddhee tab us men base rahenge.." 
Isaiah35:1 jangal aur nirjal desh prafauallait honge, marooboomi magan hokar kesar kee nain foolegee" 
Isaiah35:2 vah atyant prabhuallait hogee aur anand ke sath jayajayakar karegee. usakee shaebha labanon kee see hogee aur vah karmel aur shaaron ke tuly tejomay ho jaaegee. ve yahova kee shaebha aur hamare parameshvar ka tej dekhenge.. 
Isaiah35:3 ddheele hathon ko draddh karo aur thrathrate huae ghauttnon ko sthiar karo. 
Isaiah35:4 ghabaranevalon se kaho, hiyav bandhae, mat dro! dekho, tumhara parameshvar palatta lene aur pratifal dene ko a raha haai. ha, parameshvar akar tumhara uddhar karega.." 
Isaiah35:5 tab andhaen kee ankhe kholee jaaengee aur baahiron ke kan bhee khole jaaenge 
Isaiah35:6 tab langada haarin kee see chaukaadiyan bhrega aur goonge apanee jeebh se jayajayakar karenge. kyonaki jangal men jal ke sote foott nikalenge aur marooboomi men nadiyan bahane lagengeeddh 
Isaiah35:7 mragatrashna tal ban jaaegee aur sookhee boomi men sote foottenge aur jis sthan men siyar baaitta karate haain us men ghaas aur narakatt aur sarakande honge.. 
Isaiah35:8 aur vahan aek sadk arthata rajamarga hoga, usaka nam pavitra marga hoga koi ashuuddh jan us par se n chalane paaega vah to unheen ke liye rahega aur us marga par jo chalenge vah chahe moorkh bhee hon taubhee kabhee n bhttkenge." 
Isaiah35:9 vahan sinh n hoga or n koi hinsak jantu us par n chaddhega n vahan paya jaaega, parantu chhudaae huae us men nit chalenge." 
Isaiah35:10 aur yahova ne chhudaae huae log lauttkar jayajayakar karate huae siyyon men aaenge aur unake sir par sada ka anand hoga ve harsha aur anand paaenge aur shaek aur lambee sans ka lena jata rahega.. 
Isaiah36:1 hijaakiyyah raja ke chaudahaven varsha me, ashshoor ke raja sanhereeb ne yahooda ke sab gaddhvale nagaron par chaddhai karake unako le liya." 
Isaiah36:2 aur ashshoor ke raja ne rabashaake kee badee sena dekar lakeesh se yarooshalem ke pas hijaakiyyah raja ke virooddh bhej diya. aur vah uttree pokhre kee nalee ke pas dhaeabiyon ke khet kee sadk par jakar khda hua. 
Isaiah36:3 tab hilkaiyyah ka putra aelyakeem jo rajagharane ke kam par niyukt tha, aur shobna jo mantraee tha, aur asap ka putra yoah jo iatihas ka lekhk tha, ye teenon us se milane ko bahar nikal gaae.." 
Isaiah36:4 rabashaake ne un se kaha, hijaakiyyah se kaha, maharajadhairaj ashshoor ka raja yon kahata haai ki too kisaka bhrosa kiae baaitta haai?" 
Isaiah36:5 mera kahana haai ki kya munh se baten banana hee yuddh ke liye parakram aur yuaktai haai? too kis par bhrosa rakhta haai ki too ne mujh se balava kiya haai? 
Isaiah36:6 sun, too to us kuchale huae narakatt arthata misr par bhrosa rakhta haai us par yaadi koi ttek lagaae to vah usake hath men chubhkar chhed kar dega. misr ka raja firaun un sab ke sath aeesa hee karata haai jo us par bhrosa rakhte haain." 
Isaiah36:7 fir yadi too mujh se kahe, hamara bhrosa apane parameshvar yahova par haai, to kya vah vahee naheen haai jisake unche sthanon aur vediyon ko ddha kar hijaakiyyah ne yahooda aur yarooshalem ke logon se kaha ki tum is vedee ke samhane dandvata kiya karo?" 
Isaiah36:8 isaliye ab mere svamee ashshoor ke raja ke sath vacha bandha tab maain tujhe do hajar ghaede doonga yaadi too un par savar chaddha sake. 
Isaiah36:9 fir too rathon aur savaron ke liye misr par bhrosa rakhkar mere svamee ke chhotte se chhotte karmacharee ko bhee kaaise hatta sakega? 
Isaiah36:10 kya maain ne yahova ke bina kahe is desh ko ujadne ke liye chaddhai kee haai? yahova ne mujh se kaha haai, us desh par chaddhai karake use ujad de.." 
Isaiah36:11 tab aelyakeem, shobna aur yoah ne rabashaake se kaha, apane dason se aramee bhasha men bat kar kyonaki ham use samajhte haain ham se yahoodee bhasha men shaharapanah par baaitte huae logon ke sunate baten n kara." 
Isaiah36:12 rabashaake ne kaha, kya mere svamee ne mujhe tere svamee hee ke va tumhare hee pas ye baten kahane ko bheja haai? kya us ne mujhe un logon ke pas naheen bheja jo shaharapanah par baaitte haain jinhen tumhare sang apanee vishtta khana aur apana mootra peena padega?" 
Isaiah36:13 tab rabashaake ne khde hokar yahoodee bhasha men unche shabd se kaha, maharajaadhairaj ashshoor ke raja kee baten suno!" 
Isaiah36:14 raja yon kahata haai, hijaakiyyah tum ko dhaekha n de, kyonaki vah tumhen bacha n sakega." 
Isaiah36:15 aeesa n ho ki hijaakiyyah tum se yah kahakar bhulava de ki yahova nishchay ham ko bachaaega ki yah nagar ashshoor ke raja ke vash men n padega. 
Isaiah36:16 hijaakiyyah kee mat suno ashshoor ka raja kahata haai, bhentt bhejakar mujhe prasann karo aur mere pas nikal ao tab tum apanee apanee dakhlata aur anjeer ke vraksha ke fal kha paoge, aur apane apane kund ka panee piya karoge" 
Isaiah36:17 jab tak maain akar tum ko aeese desh men n le jaun jo tumhare desh ke saman anaj aur naye dakhmadha ka desh aur rottee aur dakh kee baariyon ka desh haai. 
Isaiah36:18 aeesa n ho ki hijaakiyyah yah kahakar tum ko bahakaae ki yahova ham ko bachaaega. kya aur jaatiyon ke devataon ne apane apane desh ko ashshoor ke raja ke hath se bachaya haai? 
Isaiah36:19 hamat aur arpad ke devata kahan rahe? sapavaraim ke devata kahan rahe? kya unhon ne shaemaron ko mere hath se bachaya? 
Isaiah36:20 desh desh ke devataon men se aeesa kaun haai jis ne apane desh ko mere hath se bachaya ho? fir kya yahova yarooshalem ko mere hath se bachaaega? 
Isaiah36:21 parantu ve chup rahe aur usake uttr men aek bat bhee n kahee, kyonki raja kee aeesee agyaa thee ki usako uttr n dena."
