Isaiah36:22 tab hilkaiyyah ka putra aelyakeem jo rajagharane ke kam par niyukt tha aur shobna jo mantraee tha aur asap tha, inhon ne hijaakiyyah ke pas vasr faade huae jakar rabashaake kee baten kah sunai.." 
Isaiah37:1 jab hijaakiyyah raja ne yah suna, tab vah apane vasr faad aur ttatt oddhkar yahova ke bhvan men gaya." 
Isaiah37:2 aur us ne aelyakeem ko jo rajagharane ke kam par niyukt tha aur shobna mantraee ko aur yajakon ke puraaniyon ko jo sab ttatt oddhe huae the, amos ke putra yashaayah nabee ke pas bhej diya." 
Isaiah37:3 unhon ne us se kaha, hijaakiyyah yon kahata haai ki aj ka din sankatt aur ulahane aur ninda ka din haai, bachche janmane par huae par jachcha ko janane ka bal n raha." 
Isaiah37:4 sambhv haai ki tere parameshvar yahova ne rabashaake kee baten sunee jise usake svamee ashshoor ke raja ne jeevate parameshvar kee ninda karane ko bheja haai, aur ja baten tere parameshvar yahova ne sunee haain unhen dapatte so too in bache huon ke liye jo rah gaae haai, praarthna kara.." 
Isaiah37:5 jab hijaakiyyah raja ke karmacharee yashaayah ke pas aae. 
Isaiah37:6 tab yashaayah ne un se kaha, apane svamee se kaho, yahova yon kahata haai ki jo vachan too ne sune haain jinake dara ashshoor ke raja ke janon men meree ninda kee haai, unake karan mat dra." 
Isaiah37:7 sun, maain usake man men praerana karoonga jis se vah kuchh samachar sunakar apane desh ko lautt jaae aur maain usako usee desh men talavar se marava daloonga.." 
Isaiah37:8 tab rabashaake ne lauttkar ashshoor ke raja ko libna nagar se yuddh karate paya kyonki us ne suna tha ki vah lakeesh ke pas se utt gaya haai. 
Isaiah37:9 us ne koosh ke raja tirhaka ke vishay yah suna ki vah us se ladne ko nikala haai. tab us ne hijaakiyyah ke pas dooton ko yah kahakar bheja. 
Isaiah37:10 ki tum yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah se yon kahana, tera parameshvar jis par too bhrosa karata haai, yah kahakar tujhe dhaekha n dene paae ki yarooshalem ashshoor ke raja ke vash men n padega." 
Isaiah37:11 dek, too ne suna haai ki ashshoor ke rajaon ne sab deshaen se kaaisa vyavahar kiya ki unhen satyanash hee kar diya." 
Isaiah37:12 fir kya too bach jaaega? gojaan aur haran aur resep men rahanevalee jin jatiyon ko aur talassar men rahanevale aedenee logon ko mere purakhaon ne nash kiya, kya unake devataon ne unhen bacha liya?" 
Isaiah37:13 hamat ka raja, arpad ka raja, sapavaraim nagar ka raja, aur hena aur ivva ke raja, ye sab kahan gaae?" 
Isaiah37:14 is patraee ko hijaakiyyah ne dooton ke hath se lekar paddha tab us ne yahova ke bhvan men jakar us patraee ko yahova ke samhane faaila diya. 
Isaiah37:15 aur yahova se yah praarthna kee," 
Isaiah37:16 he senaon ke yahova, he karoobon par virajaman israael ke parameshvar, prathvee ke sab rajyon ke upar keval too hee parameshvar haai akash aur prathvee ko too hee ne banaya haai." 
Isaiah37:17 he yahova, kan lagakar suna yahova ankh kholakar dekh aur sanhereeb ke sab vachanon ko sun le, jis ne jeevate parameshvar kee ninda karane ko likh bheja haai." 
Isaiah37:18 he yahova, sach to haai ki ashshoor ke rajaon ne sab jatiyon ke deshaen ko ujada haai" 
Isaiah37:19 aur unake devataon ko ag men jhonka haai kyonaki ve ishvar n the, ve keval manushyon kee kareegaree, katt aur patthr hee the is karan ve unako nash kar sake." 
Isaiah37:20 ab he hamare parameshvar yahova, too hamen usake hath se bacha jis se prathvee ke rajy rajy ke log jan len ki keval too hee yahova haai.." 
Isaiah37:21 tab amos ke putra yashaayah ne hijaakiyyah ke pas yah kahala bheja, israael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, too ne jo ashshoor ke raja sanhereeb ke vishay men mujh se praarthna kee haai," 
Isaiah37:22 usake vishay yahova ne yah vachan kaha haai, siyyon kee kumaree kanya tujhe tuchchh janatee haai aur tttthon men udatee haai yarooshalem kee putraee tujh par sir hilatee haai.." 
Isaiah37:23 too ne kis kee namadharai aur ninda kee haai? aur too jo bada bol bola aur ghamand kiya haai, vah kis ke virooddh kiya haai? israael ke paavitra ke virooddh!" 
Isaiah37:24 apane karmachaariyon ke dara too ne prabhu kee ninda karake kaha haai ki bahut se rath lekar maain parvaton kee chottyaien par varan labanon ke beech tak chaddh aya hoon maain usake unche unche devadaron aur achchhe achchhe sanaubaron ko katt daloonga aur usake door door ke unche sthanon men aur usake van kee faladai bariyon men pravesh karoonga. 
Isaiah37:25 maain ne khudavakar panee piya aur misr kee naharon men panv dharate hee unhen sukha diya. 
Isaiah37:26 kya too ne naheen suna ki praacheenakal se maain ne yahee ttana aur poorvakal se isakee taaiyaree kee thee? isaliye ab maain ne yah poora bhee kiya haai ki too gaddhvale nagaron ko khndhar kee khndhar kar de. 
Isaiah37:27 isee karan unake rahanevalon ka bal ghatt gaya aur ve vismait aur lajjait hue: ve maaidan ke chhotte chhotte pedon aur haree ghaas aur chht par kee ghaas aur aeese anaj ke saman ho gaae jo baddhne se paahile hee sookh jata haai.. 
Isaiah37:28 maain to tera baaittna, kooch karana aur lautt ana janata hoon aur yah bhee ki too mujh par apana krodha bhdkata haai." 
Isaiah37:29 is karan ki too mujh par apana krodha bhdkata aur tere aabhaiman kee baten mere kanon men padee haai, maain teree nak men nakel dalakar aur tere munh men apanee lagam lagakar jis marga se too aya haai usee marga se tujhe lautta doonga.." 
Isaiah37:30 aur tere liye yah chinh hoga ki is varsha to tum use khaoge jo ap se ap uge, aur doosare varsha vah jo us se utpann ho, aur teesare varsha beej bokar use lavane paoge aur dakh kee bariyan lagane aur unaka fal khane paoge." 
Isaiah37:31 aur yahooda ke gharane ke bache huae log fir jad pakadenge aur foolen-falenge 
Isaiah37:32 kyonaki yarooshalem se bache huae aur siyyon parvat se bhage huae log nikalenge. senaon ka yahova apanee jalan ke karan yah kam karega.. 
Isaiah37:33 isaliye yahova yashshoor ke raja ki vishay yon kahata haai ki vah is nagar men pravesh karane, varan is par aek teer bhee marane n paaega aur n vah ddhal lekar isake samhane ane va isake virooddh damadama bandhane paaega." 
Isaiah37:34 jis marga se vah aya haai usee se vah lautt bhee jaaega aur is nagar men pravesh n karane paaega, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Isaiah37:35 kyonaki maain apane nimitt aur apane das daud ke nimit, is nagar kee raksha karake use bachaunga.." 
Isaiah37:36 b yahova ke doot ne nikalakar ashshooriyon kee chhavanee men aek lakh pachasee hajar purooshaen ko mara aur bhor ko jab log savere utte tab kya dekha ki loth hee loth padee haain. 
Isaiah37:37 tab ashshoor ka raja sanhereeb chal diya aur lauttkar neenave men rahane laga. 
Isaiah37:38 vahan vah apane devata nisrok ke maandair men dandvata kar raha tha ki itane men usake putra adrammelek aur sharesen ne usako talavar se mara aur ararat desh men bhag gaae. aur usaka putra aesarhaon usake sthan par rajy karane laga.. 
Isaiah38:1 un dinon men hijaakiyyah aeesa rogee hua ki vah marane par tha. aur amos ke putra yashaayah nabee ne usake pas jakar kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, apane gharane ke vishay jo agyaa denee ho vah de, kyonaki too n bachega mar hee jaega." 
Isaiah38:2 tab hijaakiyyah ne bhee kee or munh faerakar yahova se praarthna karake kaha 
Isaiah38:3 he yahova, maain binatee karata hoo, smaran kar ki maain sachchai aur khre man se apane ko tere sammukh janakar chalata aya hoon aur jo teree draashtti men uchit tha vahee karata aya hoon. aur hijaakiyyah bilak bilakakar rone laga." 
Isaiah38:4 tab yahova ka yah vachan yashaayah ke pas pahuncha," 
Isaiah38:5 jakar hijaakiyyah se kah ki tere moolapuroosh daud ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain ne teree praarthna sunee aur tere ansoo dekhe haain sun, maain teree ayu pandrah varsha aur baddha doonga." 
Isaiah38:6 ashshoor ke raja ke hath se maain teree aur is nagar kee raksha karake bachaunga.. 
Isaiah38:7 yahova apane is kahe huae vachan ko poora karega," 
Isaiah38:8 aur yahova kee or se is bat ka tere liye yah chinh hoga ki dhoop kee chhaya jo ahaj kee dhoopaghadee men ddhl gai haai, maain das ansh peechhe kee or lautta doonga. so vah chhaya jo das ansh ddhl chukee thee lautt gai.." 
Isaiah38:9 yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ka lekh jo us ne likha jab vah rogee hokar changa ho gaya tha, vah yah haai:" 
Isaiah38:10 maain ne kaha, apanee ayu ke beech hee maain adhaelok ke faattkon men pravesh karoonga kyonaki meree shosh ayu har lee gai haai." 
Isaiah38:11 maain ne kaha, maain yah ko jeeviton kee boomi men fir n dekhne paunga is lok ke nivaasiyon ko maain fir n dekoonga." 
Isaiah38:12 mera ghar charavahe ke tamboo kee nai utta liya gaya haai maain ne jolahe kee nain apane jeevan ko lapett diya haai vah mujhe tant se katt lega aek hee din men too mera ant kar dalega. 
Isaiah38:13 maain bhor tak apane man ko shaant karata raha vah sinh kee nain meree sab haaddiyon ko todta haai aek hee din men too mera ant kar dalata haai. 
Isaiah38:14 maain soopabene va saras kee nai chyoon chyoon karata, maain pinduk kee nai vilap karata hoon. meree ankhen upar dekhte dekhte patthra gai haain. he yahova, mujh par andhor ho raha haai too mera sahara ho!" 
Isaiah38:15 maain kya kahoon? usee ne mujh se praatigyaa kee aur poora bhee kiya haai. maain jeevan bhr kaduahatt ke sath dhaeere dhaeere chalata rahoonga.. 
Isaiah38:16 he prabhu, inheen baton se log jeeavit haai, aur in sabhon se meree atma ko jeevan milata haai. too mujhe changa kar aur mujhe jeeavit rakh!" 
Isaiah38:17 dek, shaaantai hee ke liye mujhe badee kaduahatt milee parantu too ne sneh karake mujhe vinash ke gadhe se nikala haai, kyonaki mere sab papon ko too ne apanee peett ke peechhe faenk diya haai." 
Isaiah38:18 kyonaki adhaelok tera dhanyavad naheen kar sakata, n mratyu teree stuati kar sakatee haai jo kabar men paden ve teree sachchai kee asha naheen rakh sakate" 
Isaiah38:19 jeeavit, ho jeeavit hee tera dhanyavad karata haai, jaaisa maain aj kar raha hoon pita teree sachchai ka samachar putraen ko deta haai.." 
Isaiah38:20 yahova mera uddhar karega, isaliye ham jeevan bhr yahova ke bhvan men taravale bajon par apane rache huae geet gaten rahenge.." 
Isaiah38:21 yashaayah ne kaha tha, anjeeron kee aek ttiikaya banakar hijaakiyyah ke faade par bandhaee jaa, tab vah bachega." 
Isaiah38:22 aur hijaakiyyah ne poochha tha ki isaka kya chinh haai ki maain yahova ke bhvan ko fir jane paunga? 
Isaiah39:1 us samay baladan ka putra marodak baladan, jo babul ka raja tha, us ne hijaakiyyah ke rogee hone aur fir change ho jane kee charcha sunakar usake pas patraee aur bhentt bhejee." 
Isaiah39:2 in se hijaakiyyah ne prasann hokar apane anamol padathorn ka bhndar aur chandee, sona, sugandha dravy, uttm tel or bhndaron men jo jo vastuen thee, ve sab unako dikhlain. hijaakiyyah ke bhvan aur rajy bhr men koi aeesee vastu naheen rah gai jo us ne unhen n dikhai ho." 
Isaiah39:3 tab yashaayah nabee ne hijaakiyyah raja ke pas jakar poochha, ve manushy kya kah gaae? aur ve kahan se tere pas aae the? hijaakiyyah ne kaha, ve to door desh se arthata babul se mere pas aae the." 
Isaiah39:4 fir us ne poochha, tere bhvan men unhon ne kya kya dekha haai? hijaakiyyah ne kaha, jo kuchh mere bhvan men haai vah sab unhon ne dekhe haai mere bhndaron men koi aeesee vastu naheen jo maain ne unhen n dikhai ho.." 
Isaiah39:5 tab yashaayah ne hijaakiyyah se kaha, senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan sun le:" 
Isaiah39:6 aeese din anevale haai, ji men jo kuchh tere bhvan men haai aur jo kuchh aj ke din tak tere purakhaon ka rakha hua tere bhndaron men haai, vah sab babul ko utt jaaega yahova yah kahata haai ki koi vastu n bachegee." 
Isaiah39:7 aur jo putra tere vansh men utpann ho, un men se bhee kitanon ko ve bandhauai men le jaaenge aur vah khoje banakar babul ke rajabhvan men rahenge." 
Isaiah39:8 hijaakiyyah ne yashaayah se kaha, yahova ka vachan jo too ne kaha haai vah bhla hee haai. fir us ne kaha, mere dinon men to shaantai aur sachchai banee rahegee.." 
Isaiah40:1 tumhara parameshvar yah kahata haai, meree praja ko shaantai do, shaaantai!" 
Isaiah40:2 yarooshalem se shaaantai kee baten kaho aur us se pukarakar kaho ki teree kaattnai seva pooree hui haai, tere adharma ka dand angeekar kiya gaya haai: yahova ke hath se too apane sab papon ka doona dand pa chuka haai.." 
Isaiah40:3 kisee kee pukar sunai detee haai, jangal men yahova ka marga sudhaaro, hamare parameshvar ke liye araba men aek rajamarga chauras karo." 
Isaiah40:4 har aek tarai bhr dee jaae aur har aek pahad aur pahadee gira dee jaae jo tteddha haai vah seedha aur jo uncha neecha haai vah chauras kiya jaae. 
Isaiah40:5 tab yahova ka tej pragatt hoga aur sab praanee usako aek sang dekhenge kyonaki yahova ne ap hee aeesa kaha haai.. 
Isaiah40:6 bolanevale ka vachan sunai diya, prachar kara! maain ne kaha, maain kya prachar karoon? sab praanee ghaas haai, unakee shaebha maaidan ke fool ke saman haai." 
Isaiah40:7 jab yahova kee sans us par chalatee haai, tab ghaas sookh jatee haai, aur fool murjha jata haai ni:sandeh praja ghaas haai." 
Isaiah40:8 ghaas to sookh jatee, aur fool murjha jata haai parantu hamare parameshvar ka vachan sadaaiv attl rahega.." 
Isaiah40:9 he siyyon ko shuubh samachar sunanevalee, unche pahad par chaddh ja he yarooshalem ko shuubh samachar sunanevalee, bahut unche shabd se suna, unche shabd se suna, mat dra yahooda ke nagaron se kah, apane parameshvar ko dekho!" 
Isaiah40:10 dekho, prabhu yahova samarth dikhata hua raha haai, vah apane bhujabal se prabhuta karega dekha, jo majadooree dene kee haai vah usake pas haai aur jo badala dene ka haai vah usake hath men haai." 
Isaiah40:11 vah charavahe kee nain apane jhund ko charaaega, vah bhedon ke bachchon ko ankavar men liae rahega aur doodha pilanevaaliyon ko dhaeere dhaeere le chalega.." 
Isaiah40:12 kis ne mahasagar ko chulloo se mapa aur kis ke bitte se akash ka nap hua, kis ne prathvee kee mittee ko napave men bhra aur pahadon ko tarajoo men aur pahadiyon ko kantte men taula haai?" 
Isaiah40:13 kis ne yahova kee atma ko marga bataya va usaka mantraee hokar usako gyaan sikhaya haai? 
Isaiah40:14 us ne kis se sammati lee aur kis ne use samajhakar nyay ka path bata diya aur gyaan sikhakar buddh ika marga jata diya haai? 
Isaiah40:15 dekho, jatiyan to dol kee aek boond va paladon par kee dhooli ke tuly tthareen dekho, vah deepon ko dhooli ke kinakon sareekhe uttata haai." 
Isaiah40:16 labanon kee idhan ke liye thoda hoga aur us men ke jeeva-jantu homabaali ke liye bas n honge. 
Isaiah40:17 saree jatiyan usake samhane kuchh naheen haai, ve usakee drashtti men lesh aur shoony se bhee ghatt tthareen haain.." 
Isaiah40:18 tum ishvar ko kis ke saman bataoge aur usakee upama kis se doge? 
Isaiah40:19 moorata! kareegar ddhalata haai, sonar usako sone se maddhta aur usake liye chandee kee sankalen ddhalakar banata haai." 
Isaiah40:20 jo kangal itana arpan naheen kar sakata, vah aeesa vraksha chun leta haai jo n ghaune tab aek nipun kareegar ddoonddhkar moorat khudavata aur use aeesa sthiar karata haai ki vah hil n sake.." 
Isaiah40:21 kya tum naheen janate? kya tum ne naheen suna? kya tum ko arambh hee se naheen bataya gaya? kya tum ne prathvee kee nev padne ke samay hee se vichar naheen kiya? 
Isaiah40:22 yah vah haai jo prathvee ke ghore ke upar akashamandl par virajaman haai aur prathvee ke rahanevale ttddaiee ke tuly haai jo akash ko malamal kee nain faailata aur aeesa tan deta haai jaaisa rahane ke liye tamboo tana jata haai 
Isaiah40:23 jo bade bade haakimon ko tuchchh kar deta haai, aur prathvee ke adhaikaariyon ko shoony ke saman kar deta haai.." 
Isaiah40:24 ve rope hee jate, ve boae hee jate, unake toontt boomi men jad hee pakad pate ki vah un par pavan bahata aur ve sookh jate, aur andhaee unhen boose kee nai uda le jatee haai.." 
Isaiah40:25 so tum mujhe kis ke saman bataoge ki maain usake tuly ttharoon? us paavitra ka yahee vachan haai. 
Isaiah40:26 apanee ankhen upar uttakar dekho, kis ne inako siraja? vah in ganon ko gin ginakar nikalata, un sab ko nam le lekar bulata haai? vah aeesa samarthee aur atyant balee haai ki un men ke koi bina aae naheen rahata.." 
Isaiah40:27 he yakoob, too kyon kahata haai, he israael too kyon bolata haai, mera marga yahova ke chhpai hua haai, mera parameshvar mere nyay kee kuchh chinta naheen karata?" 
Isaiah40:28 kya tum naheen janate? kya tum ne naheen suna? yahova jo sanatan parameshvar aur prathvee bhr ka sirajanahar haai, vah n thkata, n shraamit hota haai, usakee buddh iagam haai." 
Isaiah40:29 vah thke huae ko bal deta haai aur shaktaiheen ko bahut samarth deta haai. 
Isaiah40:30 taroon to thkate aur shramit ho jate haai, aur javan ttokar khakar girate haain" 
Isaiah40:31 parantu jo yahova kee batt johate haai, ve naya bal praapt karate jaaenge, ve ukabon kee nai udenge, ve daudenge aur shramit n honge, chalenge aur thkit n honge.." 
Isaiah41:1 he deepo, mere samhane chup raho desh desh ke log naya bal praapt karen ve sameep akar bolen ham apas men nyay ke liye aek doosare ke sameep aaen.." 
Isaiah41:2 kis ne poorva disha se aek ko ubhara haai, jise vah dharma ke sath apane panv ke pas bulata haai? vah jatiyon ko usake vash men kar deta aur usako rajaon par aadhaikaree ttharata haai usakee talavar vah unhen dhool ke saman, aur usake dhanush se udaae huae boose ke saman kar deta haai." 
Isaiah41:3 vah unhen khdedta aur aeese marga se, jis par vah kabhee n chala tha, bina rok ttok age baddhta haai." 
Isaiah41:4 ki ne yah kam kiya haai aur aadi se peeddhiyon ko bulata aya haai? maain yahova, jo sab se pahila, aur ant ke samay rahoonga maain vaheen hoon.." 
Isaiah41:5 deep dekhkar drate haai, prathvee ke door desh kanp utte aur nikatt a gaae haain." 
Isaiah41:6 ve aek doosare kee sahayata karate haain aur un men se aek apane bhai se kahata haai, hiyav bandha!" 
Isaiah41:7 baddhi sonar ko aur hathaude se barabar karanevala nihai par maranevale ko yah kahakar hiyav bandha raha haai, jod to achchhee haai, so vah keel ttonk ttonkakar usako aeesa draddh karata haai ki vah sthiar rahe.." 
Isaiah41:8 he mere das israael, he mere chune huae yakoob, he mere praemee ibraaheem ke vansha" 
Isaiah41:9 too jise maain ne prathvee ke door door deshaen se liya aur prathvee kee chhor se bulakar yah kaha, too mera das haai, maain ne tujhe chula haai aur taja naheen" 
Isaiah41:10 mat dr, kyonki maain tere sang hoo, idhar udhar mat tak, kyonaki maain tera parameshvar hoon maain tujhe draddh karoonga aur teree sahayata karoonga, apane dharmamay daahine hath se maain tujhe samhale rahoonga.." 
Isaiah41:11 dek, jo tujh se krodhait haai, ve sab lajjait honge jo tujh se jhgadte haain unake munh kale honge aur ve nash hokar mitt jaaenge." 
Isaiah41:12 jo tujh se ladte haain unhen ddoonddhne par bhee too n paaega jo tujh se yuddh karate haain ve nash hokar mitt jaaenge. 
Isaiah41:13 kyonaki maain tera parameshvar yahova, tera daahina hath pakadkar kahoonga, mat dr, maain teree sahayata karoonga.." 
Isaiah41:14 he keede sareekhe yakoob, he israael ke manushyo, mat dro! yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain teree sahayata karoonga israael ka pavitra tera chhudanevala haai." 
Isaiah41:15 dek, maain ne tujhe chhureevale danvane ka aek naya aur chokha yantra ttharaya haai too pahadon ko dany danyakar ooksham dhooli kar dega, aur pahadiyon ko too boose ke saman kar dega." 
Isaiah41:16 too unako fattkega, aur pavan unhen uda le jaaegee, aur andhaee unhen titara-abitar kar degee. parantu too yahova ke karan magan hoga aur israael ke paavitra ke karan badai marega.." 
Isaiah41:17 jab dee aur daaridra log jal ddoonddhne par bhee n payen aur unaka taloo pyas ke mare sookh jaye maain yahova unakee binatee sunoonga, maain israael ka parameshvar unako tyag n doongan" 
Isaiah41:18 maain munde tteelon se bhee naadiyan aur maaidanon ke beech men sote bahaunga maain jangal ko tal aur nirjal desh ko sote hee sote kar doonga. 
Isaiah41:19 maain jangal men devadar, babool, menhadee, aur jalapai ugaunga maain araba men sanauvar, tidhaar vraksha, aur seedha sanaubar ikatthe lagaunga" 
Isaiah41:20 jis se log dekhkar jan le, aur sochakar pooree reeti se samajh len ki yah yahova ke hath ka kiya hua aur israael ke paavitra ka sraja hua haai.." 
Isaiah41:21 yahova kahata haai, apana mukama lado yakoob ka raja kahata haai, apane praman do." 
Isaiah41:22 ve unhen dekar ham ko bataaen ki bhvishy men kya hoga? poorvakal kee ghattnaaen batao ki adi men kya kya hua, jis se ham unhen sochakar jan saken ki bhvishy men unaka kya fal hoga va honevalee ghattnaaen ham ko suna do." 
Isaiah41:23 bhavishy men jo kuchh ghattega vah batao, tab ham manenge ki tum ishvar ho bhla va bura kuchh to karo ki ham dekhkar aek chakit ko jaaen." 
Isaiah41:24 dekho, tum kuchh naheen ho, tum se kuchh naheen banata jo koi tumhen janata haai vah gharanait haai.." 
Isaiah41:25 maain ne aek ko uttr disha se ubhara, vah a bhee gaya haai vah poorva disha se haai aur mera nam leta haai jaaisa kumhar gilee mittee ko latadta haai, vaaisa hee vah hakimon ko keech ke saman latad dega." 
Isaiah41:26 kis ne is bat ko pahile se bataya tha, jis se ham yah janate? kis ne poorvakal se yah pragatt kiya jis se ham kahen ki vah sachcha haai? koi bhee batanevala nahee, koi bhee sunanevala nahee, tumharee baton ka koi bhee sunanevala naheen haai." 
Isaiah41:27 maain hee ne pahile siyyon se kaha, dek, unhen dek, aur maain ne yarooshalem ko aek shuubh samachar denevala bheja." 
Isaiah41:28 maain ne dekhne par bhee kisee ko n paya un men se koi mantraee naheen jo mere poochhne par kuchh uttr de sake. 
Isaiah41:29 suno, un sabhon ke kam anarth haain unake kam tuchchh haai, aur unakee ddhlee hui mootiayan vayu aur mithya haain.." 
Isaiah42:1 mere das ko dekho jise maain sanbhale hoo, mere chune huae ko, jis se mera jee prasann haai maain ne us par apana atma rakha haai, vah anyajatiyon ke liye nyay pragatt karega." 
Isaiah42:2 n vah chillaaega aur n unche shabd se bolega, n sadk men apanee vanee sunayega." 
Isaiah42:3 kuchale huae narakatt ko vah n todega aur n ttmaittmaiatee battee ko bujhaaega vah sachchai se nyay chukaaega. 
Isaiah42:4 vah n thkega aur n hiyav chhodega jab tak vah nyay ko prathvee par sthiar n kare aur deepon ke log usakee vyavastha kee batt jahenge.. 
Isaiah42:5 ishvar jo akash ka srajane aur tananevala haai, jo upaj saahit prathvee ka faailanevala aur us par ke logon ko sans aur us par ke chalanevalon ko atma denevala yahave haai, vah yon kahata haai:" 
Isaiah42:6 mujh yahova ne tujh ko dharma se bula liya haai maain tera hath tham kar teree raksha karoonga maain tujhe praja ke liye vacha aur jatiyon ke liye prakash ttharaunga ki too andhaen kee ankhen khole," 
Isaiah42:7 bandhauon ko bandeegrah se nikale aur jo andhiayare men baaitte haain unako kalakottree se nikale. 
Isaiah42:8 maain yahova hoo, mera nam yahee haai apanee maahima maain doosare ko n doonga aur jo stuti mere yogy haai vah khudee hui mooraton ko n doonga." 
Isaiah42:9 dekho, pahilee baten to ho chukee haaie, ab maain nai baten batata hoon unake hone se pahile maain tum ko sunata hoon.." 
Isaiah42:10 he samudra par chalanevalo, he samudra ke sab rahanevalo, he deepo, tum sab apane rahanevalo samet yahova ke liye naya geet gao aur prathvee kee chhor se usakee stuti karo." 
Isaiah42:11 jangal aur us men kee baastaiyan aur kedar ke base huae ganv jayajayakar karen sela ke rahanevale jayajayakar kare, ve pahadon kee chottyaien par se unche shabd se lalakaren." 
Isaiah42:12 ve yahova kee maahima pragatt karen aur deepon men usaka gunanuvad karen. 
Isaiah42:13 yahova veer kee nain nikalega aur yoddha ke saman apanee jalan bhdkaaega, vah unche shabd se lalakarega aur apane shatrauon par jayavant hoga.." 
Isaiah42:14 bahut kal se to maain chup raha aur maun sadho apane ko rokata raha parantu ab jachcha kee nain chillaunga maain hanfa hanfakar sans bhroonga. 
Isaiah42:15 pahadon aur pahaadiyon ko maain sukha daloonga aur unakee sab haariyalee jhulasa doonga maain nadiyon ko deep kar doonga aur talon ko sukha daloonga. 
Isaiah42:16 maain andhaen ko aek marga se le chaloonga jise ve naheen janate aur unako aeese pathon se chalaunga jinhen ve naheen janate. unake age maain aandhiayare ko ujiyala karoonga aur tteddhe magorn ko seedha kayanga. maain aeese aeese kam karoonga aur unako n tyagoonga. 
Isaiah42:17 jo log khudee hui mooraton par bhrosa rakhte aur ddhlee hui mooraton se kahate haain ki tum hamare ishvar ho, unako peechhe hattna aur atyant lajjait hona padega.." 
Isaiah42:18 he baahiro, suno he andhae, ankh kholo ki tum dekh sako!" 
Isaiah42:19 mere das ke siyav kaun andha haai? aur mere bheje huae doot ke tuly kaun baahira haai? mere mitra ke saman kaun andha ya yahova ke das ke tuly andha kaun haai? 
Isaiah42:20 too bahut see baton par draashtti karata haai parantu unhen dekhta naheen haai kan to khule haain parantu sunata naheen haai.. 
Isaiah42:21 yahova ko apanee dhaarmikata ke nimitt hee yah bhaya haai ki vyavastha kee badai aadhaik kare. 
Isaiah42:22 parantu ye log lutt gaae haai, ye sab ke sab gadhiyon men fanse huae aur kalakottariyon men band kiae huae haain ye pakade gaae aur koi inhen naheen chhudata ye lutt gaae aur koi agyaa naheen deta ki faer do." 
Isaiah42:23 tum men se kaun is par kan lagaaega? kaun dhyan dharake honahar ke liye sunega? 
Isaiah42:24 kis ne yakoob ko luttvaya aur israael ko lutteron ke vash men kar diya? kya yahova ne yah naheen kiya jisake virooddh ham ne pap kiya, jisake margon par unhon ne chalana n chaha aur n usakee vyavastha ko mana?" 
Isaiah42:25 is kan us par us ne apane krodha kee ag bhdkai aur yuddh ka bal chalana aur yadhip ag usake charon or lag gai, taubhee vah n samajha vah jal bhee gaya, taubhee n cheta.." 
Isaiah43:1 he israael tera rachanevala aur he yakoob tera srajanahar yahova ab yon kahata haai, mat dr, kyonaki maain ne tujhe chhuda liya haai maain ne tujhe nam lekar bulaya haai, too mera hee haai." 
Isaiah43:2 jab too jal men hokar jaa, maain tere sang sang rahoonga aur jab too nadiyon men hokar chale, tab ve tujhe n duba sakengee jab too ag men chale tab tujhe anch n lagegee, aur usakee lau tujhe n jala sakegee." 
Isaiah43:3 kyonaki maain yahova tera parameshvar hoo, israael ka paavitra maain tera uddharakarta hoon. teree chhudautee men maain misr ko aur teree santee koosh aur saba ko deta hoon." 
Isaiah43:4 meree drashtti men too anamol aur pratishttit tthara haai aur maain tujh se praem rakhta hoo, is karan maain teree santee manushyon ko aur tere praan ke badale men rajy rajy ke logon ko de doonga." 
Isaiah43:5 mat dr, kyonki maain tere sath hoon maain tere vansh ko poorva se le aunga, aur paachchhim se bhee ikattha karoonga." 
Isaiah43:6 maain uttr se kahoonga, de de, aur daakkhian se ki rok mat rakh mere putraen ko door se aur meree putraiyon ko prathvee kee chhor se le ao" 
Isaiah43:7 har aek ko jo mera kahalata haai, jisako maain ne apanee maahima ke liye sraja, jisako maain ne racha aur banaya haai.." 
Isaiah43:8 ankh rahate huae andhaen ko aur kan rahate huae baahiron ko nikal le ao! 
Isaiah43:9 jaati jati ke log ikatthe kiae jaaen aur rajy rajy ke log aekaatrait hon. un men se kaun yah bat bata sakata va beetee hui baten hamen suna sakata haai? ve apane sakshaee le aaen jis se ve sachche tthare, ve sun len aur kahe, yah saty haai." 
Isaiah43:10 yahova kee vanee haai ki tum mere sakshaee ho aur mere das ho, jinhen maain ne isaliye chuna haai ki samajhkar meree prateeati karo aur yah jan lo ki maain vahee hoon. mujh se pahile koi ishvar n hua aur n mere bad koi hoga." 
Isaiah43:11 maain hee yahova hoon aur mujhe chhod koi uddharakarta naheen. 
Isaiah43:12 maain hee ne samachar diya aur uddhar kiya aur varnn bhee kiya, jab tumhare beech men koi paraya devata n tha isaaliye tum hee mere sakshaee ho, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Isaiah43:13 maain hee ishvar hoon aur bhavishy men bhee maain hee hoon mere hath se koi chhuda n sakega jab maain kam karana chahoon tab kaun mujhe rok sakega.. 
Isaiah43:14 tumhara chhudanevala aur israael ka pavitra yahova yon kahata haai, tumhare nimitt maain ne babul ko bheja haai, aur usake sab rahanevalon ko bhgodon kee dasha men aur kasaadiyon ko bhee unheen ke jahajon par chaddhakar le aunga jin ke vishay ve bada bol bolate haain." 
Isaiah43:15 maain yahova tumhara paavitra, israael ka srajanahar, tumhara raja hoon." 
Isaiah43:16 yahova jo samudra men marga aur prachand dhaara men path banata haai," 
Isaiah43:17 jo rathon aur ghaedon ko aur shooraveeron samet sena ko nikal lata haai, ve to aek sang vaheen rah gaae aur fir naheen utt sakate, ve bujh gaa, ve san kee battee kee nain bujh gaae haain. vah yon kahata haai," 
Isaiah43:18 ab beetee hui ghattnaon ka smaran mat karo, n praacheenakal kee baton par man lagao." 
Isaiah43:19 dekho, maain aek nai bat karata hoon vah abhee pragatt hogee, kya tum us se anajan rahoge? maain jangal men aek marga banaunga aur nirjal desh men nadiyan bahaunga." 
Isaiah43:20 geedad aur shuutarmurga aadi jangalee jantu meree mahima karenge kyonki maain apanee chunee hui praja ke peene ke liye jangal men jal aur nirjal desh men nadiyan bahaunga. 
Isaiah43:21 is praja ko maain ne apane liye banaya haai ki ve mera gunanuvad karen.. 
Isaiah43:22 taubhee he yakoob, too ne mujh se praarthna naheen kee varan he israael too mujh se ukata gaya haai!" 
Isaiah43:23 mere liye homabaali karane ko too memne naheen laya aur n melabaali chaddhakar meree mahima kee haai. dek, maain ne annabali chaddhane kee kaattnai seva tujh se naheen karai, n tujh se dhoop lekar tujhe thka diya haai." 
Isaiah43:24 too mere liye sugandhiat narakatt roopaaee se mol naheen laya aur n melabaliyon kee charbee se mujhe trapt kiya. parantu too ne apane papon ke karan mujh par bojh latt diya haai, aur apane adharma ke kamon se mujhe thka diya haai.." 
Isaiah43:25 maain vahee hoon jo apane nam ke nimitt tere aparadhaen ko mitta deta hoon aur tere papon ko smaran n karoonga. 
Isaiah43:26 mujhe smaran karo, ham apas men vivad karen too apanee bat ka varnn kar jis se too nirdosh tthare." 
Isaiah43:27 tera moolapuroosh papee hua aur jo jo mere aur tumhare beech bichavai hua, ve mujh se balava karate chale aae haain." 
Isaiah43:28 is karan maain ne paavitrasthan ke haakimon ko apavitra ttharaya, maain ne yakoob ko satyanash aur israael ko nindait hone diya haai.." 
Isaiah44:1 parantu ab he mere das yakoob, he mere chune huae israael, sun le!" 
Isaiah44:2 tera kartta yahova, jo tujhe garbh hee se banata aya aur teree sahayata karega, yon kahata haai, he mere das yakoob, he mere chune huae yashooroon, mat dra!" 
Isaiah44:3 kyonaki maain pyasee boomi par jal aur sookhee boomi par dhaaraaen bahaunga maain tere vansh par apanee atma aur teree santan par apanee ashaeesh undeloonga. 
Isaiah44:4 ve un majanuon kee nain baddhenge jo dhaaraon ke pas ghaas ke beech men hote haain. 
Isaiah44:5 koi kahega, maain yahova ka hoo, koi apana nam yakoob rakhega, koi apane hath par likhega, maain yahova ka hoo, aur apana kulanam israaelee bataaega.." 
Isaiah44:6 yahova, jo israael ka raja haai, arthata senaon ka yahova jo usaka chhudanevala haai, vah yon kahata haai, maain sab se pahila hoo, aur maain hee ant tak rahoonga mujhe chhod koi parameshvar haai hee naheen." 
Isaiah44:7 aur jab se maain ne praacheenakal men manushyon ko ttharaya, tab se kaun hua jo meree nain usako prachar kare, va bataae va mere liye rache athva honahar baten paahile hee se pragatt kare?" 
Isaiah44:8 mat dro aur n bhyaman ho kya maain ne praacheenakal hee se ye baten tumhen naheen sunain aur tum par pragatt naheen keen? tum mere sakshaee ho. kya mujhe chhod koi aur parameshvar haai? nahee, mujhe chhod koi chattan naheen maain kisee aur ko naheen janata.." 
Isaiah44:9 jo moorat khodakar banate haai, ve sab ke sab vyarth haain aur jin vastuon men ve anand ddoonddhte un se kuchh labh n hoga usake sakshae, n to ap kuchh dekhte aur n kuchh janate haai, isaaliye unako laajjait hona padega." 
Isaiah44:10 kis ne devata va nishfal moorat ddhalee haai? 
Isaiah44:11 dek, usake sab sanagiyon ko to laajjait hona padega, kareegar to manushy hee haai ve sab ke sab ikatthe hokar khde hon ve dr jaaenge ve sab ke sab laajjait honge." 
Isaiah44:12 lohar aek basoola angaron me banata aur hathaudon se gaddhkar taaiyar karata haai, apane bhujabal se vah usako banata haai fir vah bookha ho jata haai aur usaka bal ghattta haai, vah panee naheen peeta aur thk jata haai." 
Isaiah44:13 baddhi soot lagakar ttankee se rakha karata haai aur randanee se kam karata aur parakar se rekha kheenchata haai, vah usaka akar aur manushy kee see sundarata banata haai taki log us ghar men rakhen." 
Isaiah44:14 vah devadar ko kattta va van ke vrakshaen men se jaati jati ke banjavraksha chunakar sevata haai, vah aek toos ka vraksha lagata haai jo vashara ka jal pakar baddhta haai." 
Isaiah44:15 tab vah manushy ke indhan ke kam men ata haai vah us men se kuchh sulagakar tapata haai, vah usako jalakar rottee banata haai usee se vah devata bhee banakar usako dandvata karata haai vah moorat khudavakar usake samhane pranam karata haai." 
Isaiah44:16 aur usake bache huae bhag ko lekar vah aek devata arthata aek moorat usaka aek bhag to vah ag men jalata aur doosare bhag se mans pakakar khata haai, vah mans boonakar trapt hota fir tapakar kahata haai, aha, maain garma ho gaya, maain ne ag dekhee haai!" 
Isaiah44:17 khodakar banata haai tab vah usake samhane pranam aur dandvata karata aur us se praarthna karake kahata haai, mujhe bacha le, kyonki too mera devata haai. ve kuchh naheen janate, n kuchh samajh rakhte haain" 
Isaiah44:18 kyonaki unakee ankhen aeesee moondee gai haain ki ve dekh naheen sakate aur unakee buaddh iaeesee ki ve boojh naheen sakate. 
Isaiah44:19 koi is par dhyan naheen karata, aur n kisee ko itana gyaan va samajh rahatee haai ki kah sake, usaka aek bhag to maain ne jala diya aur usake koyalon par rottee banai aur mans boonakar khaya haai fir kya maain usake bache huae bhag ko ghainaunee vastu banaun? kya maain katt ko pranam karoon?" 
Isaiah44:20 vah rakh khata haai bhramai hui buaddh ike karan vah bhttkaya gaya haai aur vah n apane ko bacha sakata aur n yah kah sakata haai, kya mere dahine hath men mithya naheen?" 
Isaiah44:21 he yakoob, he israael, in baton ko smaran kar, too mera das haai, maain ne tujhe racha haai he israael, too mera das haai, maain tujh ko n bisaraunga." 
Isaiah44:22 maain ne tere aparadhaen ko kalee ghatta ke saman aur tere papon ko badal ke saman mitta diya haai meree or fir lautt a, kyonki maain ne tujhe chhuda liya haai.." 
Isaiah44:23 he akasha, unche svar se ga, kyonki yahova ne yah kam kiya haai he prathvee ke gahire sthano, jayajayakar karo he pahado, he van, he van ke sab vrakshae, gala kholakar unche svar se gao! kyonaki yahova ne yakoob ko chhuda liya haai aur israael men mahimavan hoga.." 
Isaiah44:24 yahova, tera uddharakartta, jo tujhe garbh hee se banata aya haai, yon kahata haai, maain yahova hee sab ka bananevala hoon jis ne akele hee akash ko tana aur prathvee ko apanee hee shaaktai se faailaya haai." 
Isaiah44:25 maain jootte logon ke kahe huae chinhon ko vyarth kar deta aur bhavee kahanevalon ko bavala kar deta hoon jo buaddhmaianon ko peechhe hatta deta aur unakee paanditai ko moorkhta banata hoon 
Isaiah44:26 aur apane das ke vachan ko poora karata aur apane dooton kee yuktai ko sufal karata hoon jo yarooshalem ke vishay kahata haai, vah fir basai jaaegee aur yahooda ke nagaron ke vishay, ve fir banaae jaaenge aur maain unake khndharon ko sudhaaroonga" 
Isaiah44:27 jo gaahire jal se kahata haai, too sookh ja, maain teree naadiyon ko sukhaunga" 
Isaiah44:28 jo kusroo ke vishay men kahata haai, vah mera ttharaya hua charavaha haai aur meree ichchha pooree karega yarooshalem ke vishay kahata haai, vah basai jaaegee aur maandair ke vishay ki teree nev dalee jaaegee.." 
Isaiah45:1 yahova apane aabhaishaikt kusroo ke vishay yon kahata haai, maain ne us ke daahine hath ko isaliye tham liya haai ki usake samhane jaatiyon ke daba doon aur rajaon kee kamar ddheelee karoo, usake samhane faattkon ko aeesa khol doon ki ve faattk band n kiae jaaen." 
Isaiah45:2 maain tere age age chaloonga aur unchee unchee boomi ko chauras karoonga, maain peetal ke kivadon ko tod daloonga aur lohe ke bedon ko ttukade ttukade kar doonga." 
Isaiah45:3 maain tujh ko anghakar men chhpai doonga, jis se too jane ki maain israael ka parameshvar yahova hoon jo tujhe nam lekar bulata haai." 
Isaiah45:4 apane das yakoob aur apane chune huae israael ke nimitt maain ne nam lekar tujhe bulaya haai yadhip too mujhe naheen janata, taubhee maain ne tujhe padavee dee haai." 
Isaiah45:5 maain yahova hoon aur doosara koi nahee, mujhe chhod koi parameshvar naheen yadhypi too mujhe naheen janata, taubhee maain teree kamar kasoonga," 
Isaiah45:6 jis se udayachal se lekar astachal tak log jan len ki mujh bina koi haai hee naheen haai. 
Isaiah45:7 maain ujiyale ka bananevala aur andhiayare ka srajanahar hoo, maain shaantai ka data aur vipaati ko rachata hoo, maain yahova hee in sabhon ka kartta hoon." 
Isaiah45:8 he akasha, upar se dharma barasa, akashamandl se dharma kee vashara ho prathvee khule ki uddhar utpann ho aur dharma bhee usake sang ugaae maain yahova hee ne use utpann kiya haai.." 
Isaiah45:9 hay us par jo apane rachanevale se jhgadta haai! vah to mittee ke tteekaron men se aek tteekara hee haai! kya mittee kumhar se kahegee, too yah kya karata haai? kya kareegar ka banaya hua karya usake vishay kahega ki usake hath naheen haai?" 
Isaiah45:10 hay us par jo apane pita se kahe, too kya janmata haai? aur man se kahe, too kis kee mata haai?" 
Isaiah45:11 yahova jo israael ka pavitra aur usaka bananevala haai, vah yon kahata haai, kya tum anevalee ghattnaaen mujh se poochhoge? kya mere putraen aur mere kamon ke vishay mujhe agyaa doge?" 
Isaiah45:12 maain hee ne prathvee ko banaya aur usake upar manushyon ko sraja haai maain ne apane hee hathon se akash ko tana aur usake sare ganon kon agyaa dee haai. 
Isaiah45:13 maain hee ne us puroosh ko dhaaarmikata se ubhara haai aur maain usake sab magorn ko seedha karoonga vah mere nagar ko fir basaaega aur mere bandhauon ko bina dam ya badala liae chhuda dega, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Isaiah45:14 yahova yon kahata haai, misriyon kee kamai aur kooshaiyon ke byopar ka labh aur sabai log jo deela-daulavale haai, tere pas chale aaenge, aur tere hee ho jaaenge, ve tere peechhe peechhe chalenge ve sankalon men bandho huae chale aaenge aur tere samhane dandvata kar tujh se binatee karake kahenge, nishchay parameshvar tere hee sath haai aur doosara koi naheen usake sivay koi aur parameshvar naheen.." 
Isaiah45:15 he israael ke parameshvar, he uddharakartta! nishchay too aeesa ishvar haai jo apane ko gupt rakhta haai." 
Isaiah45:16 mootiayon ke gaddhnevale sab ke sab laajjait aur chakit honge, ve sab ke sab vyakul honge." 
Isaiah45:17 paranatu israael yahova ke dara yug yug ka uddhar paaega tum yug yug varan anantakal tak n to kabhee laajjait aur n kabhee vyakul hoge.. 
Isaiah45:18 kyonaki yahova jo akash ka srajanahar haai, vahee parameshvar haai usee ne prathvee ko rakh aur banaya, usee ne usako sthiar bhee kiya us ne use sunasan rahane ke liye naheen parantu basane ke liye use racha haai. vahee yon kahata haai, maain yahova hoo, mere siva doosara aur koi naheen haai." 
Isaiah45:19 maain ne n kisee gupt sthan me, n andhakar desh ke kisee sthan men baten keen maain ne yakoob ke vansh se naheen kaha, mujhe vyarth men ddoonddhon. maain yahova saty hee kahata hoo, maain uchit baten hee batata hoon.." 
Isaiah45:20 he anyajatiyon men se bache huae logo, ikatthe hokar ao, aek sang milakar nikatt ao! vah jo apanee lakadee kee khodee hui mooraten liae firate haain aur aeese devata se jis se uddhar naheen ho sakata, praarthna karate haai, ve agyaan haain." 
Isaiah45:21 tum prachar karo aur unako lao ha, ve apas men sammaati karen kis ne praacheenakal se yah pragatt kiya? kis ne praacheenakal men isakee soochana paahile hee se dee? kya maain yahova hee ne yah naheen kiya? isaliye mujhe chhod koi aur doosara parameshvar naheen haai, dharmee aur uddharakarta ishvar mujhe chhod aur koi naheen haai.." 
Isaiah45:22 he prathvee ke door door ke desh ke rahanevalo, tum meree or firo aur uddhar pao! kyonaki maain hee ishvar hoon aur doosara koi naheen haai." 
Isaiah45:23 maain ne apanee hee shapath khai, dharma ke anusar mere mukh se yah vachan nikala haai aur vah naheen ttlega, pratyek ghauttna mere sammukh jhukega aur pratyek ke mukh se meree hee shapath khai jaaegee.." 
Isaiah45:24 log mere vishay men kahenge, keval yahova hee men dharma aur shaktai haai. usee ke pas log aaenge. aur jo us se rootte rahenge, unhen lajjait hona padega." 
Isaiah45:25 israael ke sare vansh ke log yahova hee ke karan dharmee ttharenge, aur usakee maahima karenge.." 
Isaiah46:1 bel devata jhuk gaya, nabo devata nab gaya haai, unakee praatimaaen pashuuon varan gharaailoo pashuuon par ladee haain jin vastuon ko tum uttaae firate the, ve ab bharee bojh ho gain aur thkit pashuuon par ladee haain." 
Isaiah46:2 ve nab gaa, ve aek sang jhuk gaa, ve us bhar ko chhuda naheen sake, aur ap bhee bandhauai men chale gaae haain.." 
Isaiah46:3 he yakoob ke gharane, he israael ke gharane ke sab bache huae logo, meree or kan lagakar suno tum ko maain tumharee utpaati hee se uttaae raha aur janm hee se liae firata aya hoon." 
Isaiah46:4 tumhare buddhape men bhee maain vaaisa hee bana rahoonga aur tumhare bal pakane ke samay tak tumhen uttaae rahoonga. maain ne tumhen banaya aur tumhen liae firata rahoonga 
Isaiah46:5 maain tumhen uttaae rahoonga aur chhudata bhee rahoonga.. tum kis se meree upama doge aur mujhe kis ke saman bataoge, kis se mera milan karoge ki ham aek saman ttharen?" 
Isaiah46:6 jo thailee se sona undelate va kantte men chandee taulate haai, jo sunar ko majaduree dekar us se devata banavale haai, tab ve use pranam karate varan dandvata bhee karate haain!" 
Isaiah46:7 ve usako kandho par uttakar liae firate haai, ve use usake sthan men rakh dete aur vah vaheen khda rahata haai vah apane sthan se hatt naheen sakata yaadi koi usakee dohai bhee de, taubhee n vah sun sakata haai aur n vipaati se usaka uddhar kar sakata haai.." 
Isaiah46:8 he aparaadhaiyo, is bat ko smaran karo aur dhyan do, is par fir man lagao." 
Isaiah46:9 praacheenakal kee baten smaran karo jo arambh hee se haai kyonki ishvar maain hee hoo, doosara koi naheen maain hee parameshvar hoon aur mere tuly koi bhee naheen haai." 
Isaiah46:10 maai to ant kee bat adi se aur praacheenakal se us bat ko batata aya hoon jo ab tak naheen hui. maain kahata hoo, meree yuaktai sthiar rahegee aur maain apanee ichchha ko pooree karoonga." 
Isaiah46:11 maain poorva se aek ukab pakshaee ko arthata door desh se apanee yuktai ke poora karanevale puroosh ko bulata hoon. maain hee ne yah bat kahee haai aur use pooree bhee karoonga maain ne yah vichar bangha haai aur use sufal bhee karoonga. 
Isaiah46:12 he kattor manavalo tum jo dharma se door ho, kan lagakar meree suno." 
Isaiah46:13 maain apanee dhaaarmikata ko sameep le ane par hoon vah door naheen haai, aur mere uddhar karane men vilamb n hoga maain siyyon ka uddhar karoonga aur israael ko maahima doonga.." 
Isaiah47:1 he babul kee kumaree bettee, utar a aur dhooli par baaitt he kasaadiyon kee bettee too bina sinhasan boomi par baaitt! kyonki too ab fir komal aur sukumar n kahalaaegee." 
Isaiah47:2 chakkee lekar atta pees, apana ghoonghatt hatta aur ghaaghara samentt le aur ughaaree ttangon se naadiyon ko par kara." 
Isaiah47:3 teree nagnata ughaadee jaaegee aur teree lajja pragatt hogee. maain badala loonga aur kisee manushy ko grahan n karoonga.. 
Isaiah47:4 hamara chhuttkara denevale ka nam senaon ka yahova aur israael ka pavitra haai.. 
Isaiah47:5 he kasadiyon kee bettee, chupachap baaittee rah aur andhiayare men jo kyonaki too ab rajy rajy kee svaamin n kahalaaegee." 
Isaiah47:6 maain ne apanee praja se krodhait hokar apane nij bhag ko apaavitra ttharaya aur tere vash men kar diya too n un par kuchh daya n kee booddhon par too ne apana atyant bharee jooa rakh diya. 
Isaiah47:7 too ne kaha, maain sarvada svamin banee rahoongee, so too ne apane man men in baton par vichar n kiya aur yah bhee n socha ki unaka kya fal hoga.." 
Isaiah47:8 isaliye sun, too jo raga-rang men ulajhee hui nidr baaittee rahatee haai aur man men kahatee haai ki maain hee hoo, aur mujhe chhod koi doosara naheen maain vidhava kee nain n baaitoongee aur n mere ladkebol mittenge." 
Isaiah47:9 sun, ye donon du:kh arthata ladkon ka jata rahata aur vidhava ho jana, achanak aek hee din tujh par a padenge. tere bahut se ttonon aur tere bharee bharee tantra-mantraen ke rahate bhee ye tujh par apane poore bal se a padenge.." 
Isaiah47:10 too ne apanee dushttta par bhrosa rakha, too ne kaha, mujhe koi naheen dekhta teree buddh iddh aur gyaan ne tujhe bahakaya aur too ne apane man men kaha, maain hee hoon aur mere sivay koi doosara naheen." 
Isaiah47:11 parantu teree aeesee durgatee hogee jisaka mantra too naheen janatee, aur tujh par aeesee vipaati padegee ki too praayashchait karake usaka nivaran n kar sakegee achanak vinash tujh par a padega jisaka tujhe kuchh bhee pata naheen.." 
Isaiah47:12 apane tantra mantra aur bahut se ttonahon ko, jinaka too ne balyavastha hee se abhyas kiya haai upayog men la, sambhv haai too un se labh utta sake ya unake bal se sthiar rah sake." 
Isaiah47:13 too to yuaktai karate karate thk gai haai ab tere jyotishaee jo nakshatraen ko dhyan se dekhte aur naye naye chand ko dekhkar honahar batate haai, ve khde hokar tujhe un baton se bachaae jo tujh par ghattengee.." 
Isaiah47:14 dekh ve boose ke saman hokar ag se bhsm ho jaaenge ve apane praanon ko jvala se n bacha sakenge. vah ag tapane ke liye nahee, n aeesee hogee jisake samhane koi baaitt sake!" 
Isaiah47:15 jinake liye too paarishram karatee ai haai ve sab tere liye vaaise hee honge, aur jo teree yuvavastha se tere sang vyopar karate aae haai, un me nse pratyek apanee apanee disha kee or chale jaaenge tera bachanevala koi n rahega.." 
Isaiah48:1 he yakoob ke gharane, yah bat sun, tum jo israaelee kahalate ho jo yahova ke nam kee shapath khate ho aur israael ke parameshvar kee charcha to karate ho, parantu sachchai aur dharma se naheen karate." 
Isaiah48:2 kyonaki ve apane ko pavitra nagar ke batate haai, aur israael ke parameshvar par jisaka nam senaon ka yahova haai bhrosa karate haain.." 
Isaiah48:3 honevalee baton ko to maain ne praacheenakal hee se bataya haai, aur unakee charcha meere munh se nikalee, maain ne achanak unhen pragatt kiya aur ve baten sachamuch huin." 
Isaiah48:4 maain janata tha ki too hatteela haai aur teree gardan lohe kee nas aur tera matha peetal ka haai. 
Isaiah48:5 is karan maain ne in baton ko praacheenakal hee se tujhe bataya unake hone se pahile hee maain ne tujhe bata diya, aeesa n ho ki too yah kah paae ki yah mere devata ka kam haai, meree khodee aur ddhlee hui mootirayon kee agyaa se yah hua.." 
Isaiah48:6 too ne suna he, so ab in sab baton par dhyan kara aur dekho, kya tum usaka prachar n karoge? ab se maain tujhe nai nai baten aur aesee gupt baten sunaunga jinhen too nahee janata." 
Isaiah48:7 ve abhee abhee srajee gai haai, praacheenakal se naheen parantu aj se paahile too ne unhen suna bhee n tha, aeesa n ho ki too kahe ki dekh maain to inhen janata tha." 
Isaiah48:8 han nishchay too ne unhen n to suna, n jana, n is se paahile tere kan hee khule the. kyonaki maain janata tha ki too nishchay vishvasaghaat karega, aur garbh hee se tera nam aparadhaee pada haai.." 
Isaiah48:9 apane hee nam ke nimitt maain krodha karane men vilamb karata hoo, or apanee mahima ke nimitt apane tain rok rakhta hoo, aeesa n ho ki maain tujhe katt daloon." 
Isaiah48:10 dek, maain ne tujhe nirmal to kiya, parantu, chandee kee nain naheen maain ne du:kh kee bhtthee men parakhkar tujhe chun liya haai." 
Isaiah48:11 apane nimit, han apane hee nimitt maain ne yah kiya haai, mera nam kyon apaavitra tthare? apanee maahima maain doosare ko naheen doonga.." 
Isaiah48:12 he yakoob, he mere bulaae huae israael, meree or kan lagakar suna! maain vahee hoo, maain hee aadi aur maain hee ant hoon." 
Isaiah48:13 nishchay mere hee hath ne prathvee kee nev dalee, aur mere hee daahine hath ne akash faailaya jab maain unako bulata hoo, ve aek sath upaasthiat ho jate haain.." 
Isaiah48:14 tum sab ke sab ikatthe hokar suno! un men se kis ne kabhee in baton ka samachar diya? yahova us se praem rakhta haai: vah babul par apanee ichchha pooree karega, aur kasaadiyon par usaka hath padega." 
Isaiah48:15 maain ne, han maain hee ne kaha aur usako bulaya haai, maain usako le aya hoo, aur, usaka kam sufal hoga." 
Isaiah48:16 mere nikatt akar is bat ko suno: aadi se lekar ab tak maain ne koi bhee bat gupt men nahee kahee jab se vah hua tab se maain vahan hoon. aur ab prabhu yahova ne aur usakee atma ne mujhe bhej diya haai.. 
Isaiah48:17 yahova jo tera chhudanevala aur israael ka paavitra haai, vah yo kahata haai, maain hee tera parameshvar yahova hoon jo tujhe tere labh ke liye shaiksha deta hoo, aur jis marga se tujhe jana haai usee marga par tujhe le chalata hoon." 
Isaiah48:18 bhla hota ki too ne meree agyaaon ko dhyan se suna hota! tab teree shaantai nadee ke saman aur tera dharma samudra kee laharon ke nai hota 
Isaiah48:19 tera vansh baloo ke kinakon ke tuly hota, aur teree nij santan usake kanon ke saman hotee unaka nam mere sammukh se n kabhee katta aur n mittaya jata.." 
Isaiah48:20 babul men se nikal jao, kasaadiyon ke beech men se bhag jao jayajayakar karate huae is bat ko prachar karake sunao, prathvee kee chhor tak isakee charcha faailao kahate jao ki yahova ne apane das yakoob ko chhuda liya haai!" 
Isaiah48:21 jab vah unhen nirjal deshaen men le gaya, tab ve pyase n huae us ne unake liye chattan men se panee nikala us ne chattan ko cheera aur jal bah nikala." 
Isaiah48:22 dushtton ke liye kuchh shaantai nahee, yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Isaiah49:1 he deepo, meree aur kan lagakar suno he door door ke rajyon ke lago, dhyan lagakar meree suno! yahova ne mujhe garbh hee men se bulaya, jab maain mata ke pett men tha, tab hee us ne mera nam bataya." 
Isaiah49:2 us ne mere munh ko chokhee talavar ke saman banaya aur apane hath kee ad men mujhe chhpai rakha us ne mujh ko chamakila teer banakar apane tarkash men gupt rakha. 
Isaiah49:3 or mujh se kaha, too mera das israael haai, maain tujh men apanee mahima pragatt karoonga." 
Isaiah49:4 tab maain ne kaha, maain ne to vyarth parishram kiya, maain ne vyarth hee apana bal kho diya haai taubhee nishchay mera nyay yahova ke pas haai aur mere paarishram ka fal mere parameshvar ke hath men haai.." 
Isaiah49:5 or ab yahova jis ne mujhe janm hee se isaaliye rakh ki maain usaka das hokar yakoob ko usakee or faer le aun arthata israael ko usake pas ikattha karoo, kyonki yahova kee drashtti men maain adarayogy hoon aur mera parameshvar mera bal haai," 
Isaiah49:6 usee ne mujh se yah bhee kaha haai, yah to halakee see bat haai ki too yakoob ke gotraen ka uddhar karane aur israel ke rakshiat logon ko lautta le ane ke liye mera sevak tthare maain tujhe anyajatiyon ke liye jyoti ttharaunga ki mera uddhar prathvee kee ek or se doosaree or tak faail jae.." 
Isaiah49:7 jo manushyon se tuchchh jana jata, jis se jatiyon ko gharana haai, aur, jo aparaadhaiyon ka das haai, israael ka chhudanevala aur usaka pavitra arthata yahave yon kahata haai, ki raja use dekhkar khde ho jaaenge aur hakim dandvata karenge yah yahova ke nimitt hoga, jo sachcha aur israael ka pavitra haai aur jis ne tujhe chun liya haai.." 
Isaiah49:8 yahova yon kahata haai, apanee prasannata ke samay maain ne teree sun lee, uddhar karane ke din maain ne teree sahayata kee haai maain teree raksha karake tujhe logon ke liye aek vacha ttharaunga, taaki desh ko sthiar kare aur ujade huae sthanon ko unake adhaikaariyon ke hath men de de aur bandhauon se kahe, bandeegrah se nikal ao" 
Isaiah49:9 aur jo aandhiayare men haain un se kahe, apane ap ko dikhlao! ve magorn ke kinare kinare pett bhrane paaenge, sab munde tteelon par bhee unako charai milegee." 
Isaiah49:10 ve bookhe aur pyase honge, n looh aur n ghaam unhen lagega, kyonaki, vah ja un par daya karata haai, vahee unaka aguva hoga, aur jal ke soton ke pas unhen le chalega." 
Isaiah49:11 aur, maain apane sab pahadon ko marga bana doonga, aur mere rajamarga unche kiae jaaenge." 
Isaiah49:12 dekho, ye door se aaenge, aur, ye uttr aur pachchhim se aur seeniyon ke desh se aaenge." 
Isaiah49:13 he akasha, jayajayakar kar, he prathvee, magan ho he pahado, gala kholakar jayajayakar karo! kyonki yahova ne apanee praja ko shaantai dee haai aur apane deen logon par daya kee haai.." 
Isaiah49:14 parantu siyyon ne kaha, yahova ne mujhe tyag diya haai, mera prabhu mujhe bool gaya haai." 
Isaiah49:15 kya yah ho sakata haai ki koi mata apane dooghapiuve bachche ko bool jaae aur apane janmaae huae ladke par daya n kare? ha, vah to bool sakatee haai, parantu maain tujhe naheen bool sakata." 
Isaiah49:16 dek, maain ne tera chitra hatheliyon par khodakar banaya haai teree shaharapanah sadaaiv meree drashtti ke samhane banee rahatee haai." 
Isaiah49:17 tere ladke faurtee se a rahe haain aur khndhar bananevale aur ujadnevale tere beech se nikale ja rahe haain. 
Isaiah49:18 apanee ankhen uttakar charon or dek, ve sab ke sab ikatthe hokar tere pas a rahe haain. yahova kee yah vanee haai ki mere jeevan kee shapat, too nishchay un sabhon ko gahane ke saman pahil legee, too dualhain kee nai apane shareer men un sab ko bandha legee.." 
Isaiah49:19 tere jo sthan sunasan aur ujade haai, aur tere jo desh khndhar hee khndhar haai, un men ab nivasee n samaaenge, aur, tujhe nashtt karanevale door ho jaaenge." 
Isaiah49:20 tere putra jo tujh se le liae gaae ve fir tere kan men kahane paaenge ki yah sthan hamare liye saket haai, hamen aur sthan de ki us men rahen." 
Isaiah49:21 tab too man men kahegee, kis ne inako mere liye janmaya? maain to putraheen aur banjh ho gai thee, dasatv men aur yahan vahan maain ghoomatee rahee, inako kis ne pala? dek, maain akelee rah gai thee fir ye kahan the?" 
Isaiah49:22 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dek, ye apana hath jati jati ke logon kee or uttaunga, aur desh desh ke logon ke samhane apana jhnda khda karoonga tab ve tere putraen ko apanee god men liae aaenge, aur teree puatraiyon ko apane kandho par chaddhakar tere pas pahunchaaenge." 
Isaiah49:23 raja tere bachchon ke nija-sevak aur unakee raniyan doodha pilane ke liye teree dhaaiyon hongee. ve apanee nak boomi par ragadkar tujhe dandvata karenge aur tere panvon kee dhooli chattenge. tab too yah jan legee ki maain hee yahova hoon meree batt johanevale kabhee laajjait n honge.. 
Isaiah49:24 kya veer ke hath se shaikar chheena ja sakata haai? kya dushtt ke banghauae chhudaae ja sakate haain? 
Isaiah49:25 taubhee yahova yon kahata haai, ha, veer ke bandhauae us se chheen liae janaege, aur balatkaree ka shaikar usake hath se chhuda liya jaaega, kyonki jo tujh se ladte haain un se maain ap mukama laoonga, aur tere ladkebalon ka maain uddhar karoonga." 
Isaiah49:26 jo tujh par andhor karate haain unako maain unheen ka mans khailaunga, aur, ve apana lohoo peekar aeese matavale honge jaaise naye dakhmadha se hote haain. tab sab praanee jan lenge ki tera uddharakarta yahova aur tera chhudanevala, yakoob ka shaaktaiman maain hee hoon.." 
Isaiah50:1 tumharee mata ka tyagapatra kahan haai? jise maain ne use tyagate samay diya tha? ya maain ne kis vyoparee ke hath tumhen becha? yahova yon kahata haai, suno, tum apane hee adharma ke kamon ke karan bik gaa, aur tumhor hee aparadhaen ke karan tumharee mata chhod dee gai." 
Isaiah50:2 isaka kya karan haai ki jab maain aya tab koi n mila? aur jab maain ne pukara, tab koi n bola? kya mera hath aeesa chhotta ho gaya haai ki chhuda naheen sakata? kya mujh men uddhar karane kee shaaktai naheen? dekho, maai aek dhamakee se samudra ko sukha deta hoo, maain mahanadon ko registhan bana deta hoo, unakee machhaliyan jal bina mar jatee aur basatee haain." 
Isaiah50:3 maain akash ko mano shaek ka kala kapada pahinata, aur ttatt ko unaka oddhna bana deta hoon.." 
Isaiah50:4 prabhu yahova ne mujhe seekhnevalon kee jeebh dee haai ki maain thke huae ko apane vachan ke dara sanbhalana janoon. bhor ko vah nit mujhe jagata aur mera kan kholata haai ki maain shaishy ke saman sunoon. 
Isaiah50:5 prabhu yahova ne mera kan khola haai, aur maain ne virodha n kiya, n peechhe hatta." 
Isaiah50:6 maain ne maranevalon ko apanee peett aur galamochh nochanevalon kee or apane gal kiae apamaanit hone aur tookane se maain ne munh n chhpaiaya.. 
Isaiah50:7 kyonaki prabhu yahova meree sahayata karata haai, is karan maain ne sankoch naheen kiya varan apana matha chakamak kee nain kada kiya kyonaki mujhe nishchay tha ki mujhe laajjait hona n padega." 
Isaiah50:8 jo mujhe dharmee ttharata haai vah mere nikatt haai. mere sath kaun mukama karega? ham amane-samhane khde hon. mera virodhaee kaun haai? vah mere nikatt aae. 
Isaiah50:9 suno, prabhu yahova meree sahayata karata haai mujhe kaun doshaee tthara kasega? dekho, ve sab kapade ke saman purane ho jaaenge unako keede kha jaaenge.." 
Isaiah50:10 tum men se kaun haai jo yahova ka bhy manata aur usake das kee baten sunata haai, jo aandhiayare men chalata ho aur usake pas jyoti n ho? vah yahova ke nam ka bhrosa rakhe, aur apane parameshvar par asha lagaae rahe." 
Isaiah50:11 dekho, tum sab jo ag jalate aur agnaibanon ko kamar men bandhate ho! tum sab apanee jalai hui ag men aur apane jalaae huae agnaibanon ke beech ap hee chalo. tumharee yah dasha meree hee or se hogee, tum santap men pade rahoge.." 
Isaiah51:1 he dharma par chalanevalo, he yahova ke ddoonddhnevalo, kan lagakar meree suno jis chattan men se tum khode gaae aur jis khani men se tum nikale gaa, us par dhyan karo." 
Isaiah51:2 apane moolapuroosh ibraaheem aur apanee mata sara par dhyan karo jab vah akela tha, tab hee se maain ne usako bulaya aur ashaeesh dee aur baddha diya." 
Isaiah51:3 yahova ne siyyon ko shaaantai dee haai, us ne usake sab khndharon ko shaantai dee haai vah usake jangal ko adan ke saman aur usak nirjal desh ko yahova kee battkai ke saman banaaega us men harsha aur anand aur dhanyavad aur bhjan gane ka shabd sunai padega.." 
Isaiah51:4 he meree praja ke logo, meree or dhyan dharo he mere logo, kan lagakar meree suno kyonaki meree or se vyavastha dee jaaegee, aur maain apana niyam desh desh ke logon kee jyoti hone ke liye sthiar karoonga." 
Isaiah51:5 mera chhuttkara nikatt haai mera uddhar pragatt hua haai maain apane bhujabal se desh desh ke logon ka nyay karoonga. deep meree batt jahenge aur mere bhujabal par asha rakhenge. 
Isaiah51:6 akash kee or apanee ankhen uttao, aur prathvee ko niharo kyonki akash dhaunae hee nai lop ho jaaega, prathvee kapade ke saman puranee ho jaaegee, aur usake rahanevale yon hee jate rahenge parantu jo uddhar maain karoonga vah sarvada ttharega, aur mere dharma ka ant n hoga.." 
Isaiah51:7 he dharma ke jananevalo, jinake man men meree vyavastha haai, tum kan lagakar meree suno manushyon kee namadharai se mat dro, aur unake ninda karane se vismait n ho." 
Isaiah51:8 kyonaki dhaun unhen kapade kee nain aur keeda unhen un kee nain khaaega parantu mera dharma anantakal tak, aur mera uddhar peeddhee se peeddhee tak bana rahega." 
Isaiah51:9 he yahova kee bhuja, jag! jag aur bal dhaaran kara jaaise praacheenakal men aur beete huae peeddhiyon me, vaaise hee ab bhee jaga. kya too vahee naheen haai jis ne rahab ko ttukade ttukade kiya aur magaramachchh ko chheda?" 
Isaiah51:10 kya too vahee naheen jis ne samudra ko arthata gahire sagar ke jal ko sukha dala aur usakee gaharai men apane chhudaae haon ke par jane ke liye marga nikala tha? 
Isaiah51:11 so yahova ke chhudaae huae log lauttkar jayajayakar karate huae siyyon men aaenge, aur unake siron par anant anand goonjata rahega ve harsha aur anand praapt karenge, aur shaek aur sisaakiyon ka ant ho jaaega.." 
Isaiah51:12 maai, maain hee tera shaaantaidata hoon too kaun haai jo maranevale manushy se, aur ghaas ke saman murjhanevale adamee se drata haai," 
Isaiah51:13 aur akash ke tananevale aur prathvee kee nev dalanevale apane karta yahova ko bool gaya haai, aur jab draehee nash karane ko taaiyar hota haai tab usakee jalajalahatt se din bhr lagatar thrathrata haai? parantu draehee kee jalajalahatt kahan rahee?" 
Isaiah51:14 bandhaua shaeegha hee svatantr kiya jaaega vah gadhe men n marega aur n use rottee kee kamee hogee. 
Isaiah51:15 jo samudra ko uthla-puthl karata jis se usakee laharon me garajan hotee haai, vah maain hee tera parameshvar yahova hoon mera nam senaon ka yahova haai. aur maain ne tere munh men apane vachan dale," 
Isaiah51:16 aur tujhe apane hath kee ad men chhpai rakha haai ki maain akash ko tanoon aur prathvee kee nev daloo, aur siyyon se kahoo, tum meree praja ho.." 
Isaiah51:17 he yarooshalem jag! jag utt! khdee ho ja, too ne yahova ke hath se usakee jalajalahatt ke kattore men se piya haai, too ne kattore ka ladkhda denevala mad poora poora hee pee liya haai." 
Isaiah51:18 jitane ladkon ne us se janm liya un men se koi n raha jo usakee aguvai karake le chale aur jitane ladke us ne pale-pose un men se koi n raha jo usake hath ko tham le. 
Isaiah51:19 ye do vipaatiayan tujh par a padee haain kaun tere sang vilap karega? ujad aur vinash aur mahangee aur talavar a padee haai kaun tujhe shaantai dega? 
Isaiah51:20 tere ladke moochchhirt hokar har aek sadk ke sire par, mahajal men fanse huae haarin kee nai pade haain yahova kee jalajalahatt aur tere parameshvar kee dhamakee ke karan ve achet pade haain.." 
Isaiah51:21 is karan he dukhaiyaree sun, too matavalee to haai, parantu dakhmadha peekar naheen" 
Isaiah51:22 tera prabhu yahova jo apanee praja ka mukama ladnevala tera parameshvar haai, vah yon kahata haai, sun maain ladkhda denevale mad ke kattore ko arthata apanee jalajalahatt ke kattore ko tere hath se le leta hoon tujhe us men se fir kabhee peena n padega." 
Isaiah51:23 aur maain use tere un du:kh denevalon ke hath men doonga, jinhon ne tujh se kaha, lett ja, ki ham tujh par panv dharakar age chalen aur too ne aundho munh girakar apanee peett ko boomi aur age chalanevalon ke liye sadk bana diya.." 
Isaiah52:1 he siyyon, jag, jag! apana bal dhaaran kara he pavitra nagar yarooshalem, apane shaebhayaman vasr paahin le kyonki tere beech khtanarahit aur ashuuddh log fir kabhee pravesh n karane paaenge." 
Isaiah52:2 apane upar se dhool jhad de, he yarooshalem, utt he siyyon kee bandee bettee apane gale ke bandhan ko khol de.." 
Isaiah52:3 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai, tum jo sentament bik gaae the, isaaliye ab bina roopaya diae chhudaae bhee jaoge." 
Isaiah52:4 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, meree praja paahile to misr men paradeshaee hokar rahane ko gai thee, aur ashshooriyon ne bhee bina karan un par atyachar kiya." 
Isaiah52:5 isaliye yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain ab yahan kya karoon jab ki meree praja sentament har lee gai haai? yahova yah bhee kahata haai ki jo un par prabhuta karate haain ve udham macha rahe haai, aur, mere nam ki ninda lagatar din bhr hotee rahatee haai." 
Isaiah52:6 is karan meree praja mera nam jan legee vah us samay jan legee ki jo baten karata haai vah yahova hee haai dekho, maain hee hoon.." 
Isaiah52:7 pahadon par usake panv kya hee suhavane haain jo shuubh samachar lata haai, jo shaantai kee baten sunata haai aur kalyan ka shuubh samachar aur uddhar ka sandesh deta haai, jo siyyon se kahata he, tera parameshvar rajy karata haai." 
Isaiah52:8 sun, tere paharooae pukar rahe haai, ve aek saath jayajayakar kar rahen haain kyonki ve sakshaata dekh rahe haain ki yahova siyyon ko lautt raha haai." 
Isaiah52:9 he yarooshalem ke khndharo, aek sang umang men akar jayajayakar karo kyonaki yahova ne apanee praja ko shaantai dee haai, us ne yarooshalem ko chhuda liya haai." 
Isaiah52:10 yahova ne saree jatiyon ke samhane apanee pavitra bhuja pragatt kee haai aur prathvee ke door door deshaen ke sab log hamare parameshvar ka kiya hua uddhar nishchay dekh lenge.. 
Isaiah52:11 door ho, door, vahan se nikal jao, koi ashuuddh vastu mat chhuo usake beech se nikal jao he yahova ke patraen ke ddhonevalo, apane ko shuuddh karo." 
Isaiah52:12 kyonaki tum ko utavalee se nikalana nahee, aur n bhagate huae chalana padega kyonaki yahova tumhare age age aguvai karata hua chalega, aur, israael ka parameshvar tumhare peechhe bhee raksha karata chalega.." 
Isaiah52:13 dekho, mera das buaddh ise kam karega, vah uncha, mahan aur ati mahan ho jaaega." 
Isaiah52:14 jaaise bahut se log use dekhkar chaakit huae kyonaki usaka roop yahan tak bigada hua tha ki manushya ka sa n jan padta tha aur usakee sundarata bhee adamiyon kee see n rah gai thee," 
Isaiah52:15 vaaise hee vah bahut see jatiyon ko paavitra karega aur usako dekhkar raja shaant rahenge kyonaki ve aeesee bat dekhenge jisaka varnn unake sunane men bhee naheen aya, aur, aeesee bat unakee samajh men aaegee jo unhon ne abhee tak sunee bhee n thee.." 
Isaiah53:1 jo samachar hamen diya gaya, usaka kis ne vishvas kaya? aur yahova ka bhujabal kis par pragatt hua?" 
Isaiah53:2 kyonaki vah usake samhane ankur kee nai, aur aeesee jad ke saman uga jo nirjal boomi men foott nikale usakee n to kuchh sundarata thee ki ham usako dekhte, aur n usaka roop hee hamen aeesa dikhai pada ki ham usako chahate." 
Isaiah53:3 vah tuchchh jana jata aur manushyon ka tyaga hua tha vah du:khee puroosh tha, rog se usakee jan pahichan thee aur log us se mukh faer lete the. vah tuchchh jana gaya, aur, ham ne usaka mooly n jana.." 
Isaiah53:4 nishchay us ne hamare rogon ko sah liya aur hamare hee du:khon ko utta liya taubhee ham ne use parameshvar ka mara-kootta aur durdasha men pada hua samajha. 
Isaiah53:5 parantu vah hamare hee aparadhae ke karan ghaayal kiya gaya, vah hamare adharma ke kamon ke hetu kuchala gaya hamaree hee shaantai ke liye us par tadna padee ki usake kode khane se ham change ho jaaen." 
Isaiah53:6 ham to sab ke sab bhedon kee nain bhttk gaae the ham men se har aek ne apana apana marga liya aur yahova ne ham sabhon ke adharma ka bojh usee par lad diya.. 
Isaiah53:7 vah sataya gaya, taubhee vah sahata raha aur apana munh n khola jis prakar bhed vadha hone ke samay va bhedee un katarane ke samay chupachap shaant rahatee haai, vaaise hee us ne bhee apana munh n khola." 
Isaiah53:8 atyachar karake aur dosh lagakar ve use le gaae us samay ke logon men se kis ne is par dhyan diya ki vah jeevaton ke beech men se utta liya gaya? mere hee logon ke aparadhaen ke karan us par mar padee. 
Isaiah53:9 aur usakee kabra bhee dushtton ke sang ttharai gai, aur mratyu ke samay vah dhanavan ka sangee hua, yadhypi us ne kisee prakar ka apadrav n kiya tha aur usake munh se kabhee chhl kee bat naheen nikalee thee.." 
Isaiah53:10 taubhee yahova ko yahee bhya ki use kuchale usee ne usako rogee kar diya jab too usaka praan doshabali kare, tab vah apana vansh dekhne paaega, vah bahut din jeevit rahega usake hath se yahova kee ichchha pooree ho jaaegee." 
Isaiah53:11 vah apane praanon ka du:kh uttakar use dekhega aur trapt hoga apane gyaan ke dara mera dharmee das bahuteron ko dharmee ttharaaega aur unake adharma ke kamon ka bojh ap utta lega. 
Isaiah53:12 is karan maain use mahan logon ke sang bhag doonga, aur, vah samathairyon ke sang loott bantt lega kyonaki usane apana praan mratyu ke liye undel diya, vah aparaadhaiyon ke sang gina gaya taubhee us ne bahuton ke pap ka bojh utt liya, aur, aparadhaiyon ke liye binatee karata haai.." 
Isaiah54:1 he banjh too jo putraheen haai jayajayakar kara too jise janmane kee peede naheen hui, gala kholakar jayajayakar kar aur pukara! kyonaki tyagee hui ke ladke suhagin ke ladkon se aadhaik honge, yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Isaiah54:2 apane tamboo ka sthan chauda kar, aur tere dere ke patt lambe kiae jaaen hath mat rok, rassaiyon ko lambee aur koontton ko draddh kara." 
Isaiah54:3 kyonaki too dahine-baaen faailegee, aur tera vansh jaati-jati ka adhaikaree hoga aur ujade huae nagaron ko fir se basaaega.." 
Isaiah54:4 mat dr, kyonki teree asha fir naheen toottegee mat ghabara, kyonki too fir lajjait n hogee aur tujh par siyahee n chhaaegee kyonaki too apanee javanee kee lajja bool jaaegee, aur, apane vidhavapan kee namadharai ko fir smaran n karegee." 
Isaiah54:5 kyeaaki tera kartta tera paati haai, usaka nam senaon ka yahova haai aur israael ka paavitra tera chhudanevala haai, vah saree prathvee ka bhee parameshvar kahalaaega." 
Isaiah54:6 kyonaki yahova ne tujhe aeesa bulaya haai, mano too chhodee hui aur man kee duakhaiya aur javanee kee tyagee hui sree ho, tere parameshvar ka yahee vachan haai." 
Isaiah54:7 kshan bhr hee ke liye maain ne tujhe chhod diya tha, parantu ab badee daya karake maain fir tujhe rakh loonga." 
Isaiah54:8 krodha ke jhkore men akar maain ne pal bhr ke liye tujh se munh chhpaiaya tha, parantu ab anant karoona se maain tujh par daya karoonga, tere chhudanevale yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Isaiah54:9 yah meree drashtti men nooh ke samay ke jalapralay ke saman haai kyonaki jaaise maain ne shapath khai thee ki nooh ke samay ke jalapralay se prathvee fir n oobegee, vaaise hee maain ne yah bhee shapath khai haai ki fir kabhee tujh par krodha n karoonga aur n tujh ko dhamakee doonga." 
Isaiah54:10 chahe pahad hatt jaaen aur pahaadiyan ttl jaae, taubhee meree karoona tujh par se kabhee n hattegee, aur meree shaantaidayak vacha n ttlegee, yahova, jo tujh par daya karata haai, usaka yahee vachan haai.." 
Isaiah54:11 he du:khaiyaree, too jo andhaee kee satai haai aur jis ko shaaantai naheen milee, sun, maain tere patthron kee pachcheekaree karake baaittaunga, aur teree nev neelamaanai se daloonga." 
Isaiah54:12 tere kalash maain maanaiakon se, tere faattk lalaadiyon se aur tere sab sivanon ko manohar ratnon se banaunga." 
Isaiah54:13 too dhaarmikata ke dara sthiar hogee too andhor se bachegee, kyonki tujhe drana n padega aur too bhyabheet hone se bachegee, kyonki bhy ka karan tere pas n aaega." 
Isaiah54:14 too dhaarmikata ke dara sthiar hogee too andhor se bachegee, kyonki tujhe drana n padega aur too bhyabheet hone se bachegee, kyonki bhy ka karan tere pas n aaega." 
Isaiah54:15 sun, log bheed lagaaenge, parantu meree or se naheen jitane tere virooddh bheed lagaaenge ve tere karan gireenge." 
Isaiah54:16 sun, aek lohar koaele kee ag dhaenkakar isake liye haathaiyar banata haai, vah mera hee sraja hua haai. ujadne ke liye bhee meree or se aek nash karanevala sraja gaya haai." 
Isaiah54:17 jitane hathaiyar teree hani ke liye banaae jaae, un men se koi safal n hoga, aur, jitane log mui hokar tujh par nalish karen un sabhon se too jeet jaaega. yahova ke dason ka yahee bhag hoga, aur ve mere hee karan dharmee ttharenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Isaiah55:1 aho sab pyase logo, panee ke pas ao aur jinake pas roopaya n ho, tum bhee akar mol lo aur khao! dakhmadha aur doodha bin roopaae aur bina dam hee akar le lo." 
Isaiah55:2 jo bhojanavastu naheen haai, usake liye tum kyon roopaya lagate ho, aur, jis se pett naheen bhrata usake liye kyon parishram karate ho? meree or man lagakar suno, tab uttm vastuen khane paoge aur chikanee chikanee vastuen khakar santushtt ho jaoge." 
Isaiah55:3 kan lagao, aur mere pas ao suno, tab tum jeevit raheage aur maain tumhare sath sada kee vacha bandhoonga arthata daud par kee attl karoona kee vacha." 
Isaiah55:4 suno, maain ne usako rajy rajy ke logon ke liye sakshaee aur pradhaan aur agyaa denevala ttharaya haai." 
Isaiah55:5 sun, too aeesee jaati ko jise too naheen janata bulaaega, aur aeesee jaatiyan jo tujhe naheen janateen tere pas daudee aaengee, ve tere parameshvar yahova aur israael ke pavitra ke nimitt yah karengee, kyonaki us ne tujhe shaebhayaman kiya haai.." 
Isaiah55:6 jab jab yahova mil sakata haai tab tak usakee khoj men raho, jab tak vah nikatt haai tab tak use pukaro" 
Isaiah55:7 dushtt apanee chalachalan aur anarthkaree apane soch vichar chhodkar yahova hee kee or fire, vah us par daya karega, vah hamare parameshvar kee or fire aur vah pooree reeati se usako kshama karega." 
Isaiah55:8 kyonaki yahova kahata haai, mere vichar aur tumhare vichar aek saman naheen haai, n tumharee gati aur meree gaati aek see haai." 
Isaiah55:9 kyonaki meree aur tumharee gati men aur mere aur tumhare soch vicharon me, akash aur prathvee ka antar haai.." 
Isaiah55:10 jis prakar se vashara aur him akash se girate haain aur vahan yon hee lautt naheen jate, varan boomi par padkar upaj upajate haain jis se bolanevale ko beej aur khanevale ko rottee milatee haai," 
Isaiah55:11 usee prakar se mera vachan bhee hoga jo mere mukh se nikalata haai vah vyarth ttharakar mere pas n lauttega, parantu, jo meree ichchha haai use vah poora karega, aur jis kam ke liye maain ne usako bheja haai use vah sufal karega.." 
Isaiah55:12 kyonaki tum anand ke sath nikaloge, aur shaantai ke sath pahunchaae jaoge tumhare age age pahad aur pahadiyan gala kholakar jayajayakar karengee, aur maaidan ke sab vraksha anand ke mare talee bajaaenge." 
Isaiah55:13 tab bhttkattaiyon kee santee sanauvar ugenge aur bichchhu pedon kee santee menhadee ugegee aur is se yahova ka nam hoga, jo sada ka chinh hoga aur kabhee n mittega." 
Isaiah56:1 yahova yon kahata haai, nyay ka palan karo, aur dharma ke kam karo kyonaki maain shaeegha tumhara uddhar karoonga, aur mera dharmee hona pragatt hoga." 
Isaiah56:2 kya hee dhany haai vah manushy jo aeesa hee karata, aur vah adamee jo is par sthiar rahata haai, jo vishraapadin ko pavitra manata aur apavitra karane se bacha rahata haai, aur apane hath ko sab bhanti kee burai karane se rokata haai." 
Isaiah56:3 jo paradeshaee yahova se mil gaae haai, ve n kahen ki yahova hamen apanee praja se nishchay alag karega aur khoje bhee n kahen ki ham to sookhe vraksha haain." 
Isaiah56:4 kyonaki jo khoje mere vishraamadin ko manate aur jis bat se maain prasann rahata hoon usee ko apanate aur meree vacha ko palate haai, unake vishay yahova yon kahata haai" 
Isaiah56:5 ki maain apane bhvan aur apanee shahara-panah ke bheetar unako aeesa nam doonga jo putra-puatraiyon se kaheen uttm hoga maain unaka nam sada banaae rakoonga aur vah kabhee n mittaya jaaega. 
Isaiah56:6 paradeshaee bhee jo yahova ke sath is ichchha se mile huae haain ki usakee seva tthal karen aur yahova ke nam se praeeti rakhen aur usake das ho jaae, jitane vishraamadin ko apaavitra karane se bache rahate aur meree vacha ko palate haai," 
Isaiah56:7 unako maain apane pavitra parvat par le akar apane praarthna ke bhvan men anandait karoonga unake homabaali aur melabali meree vedee par grahan kiae jaenge kyonki mera bhvan sab deshaen ke logon ke liye praarthna ka ghar kahalaega. 
Isaiah56:8 prabhu yahova, jo nikale huae israaeliyon ko ikatthe karanevala haai, usakee yah vanee haai ki jo ikatthe kiae gaae haain unake sath maain auron ko bhee ikatthe karake mila doonga.." 
Isaiah56:9 he maaidan ke sab jantuo, he van ke sab pashuuo, khane ke liye ao." 
Isaiah56:10 usake paharooae andho haai, ve sab ke sab agyaanee haai, ve sab ke sab goonge kutte haain jo boonk naheen sakate ve svapn dekhnevale aur lette rahakar sote rahana chahate haain." 
Isaiah56:11 ve marabookhe kutte haain jo kabhee trapt naheen hote. ve charavahe hen jin men samajh hee naheen un sabhon ne apane apane labh ke liye apana apana marga liya haai. 
Isaiah56:12 ve kahate haain ki ao, ham dakhmadha le aae, ao maadira peekar chhk jaaen kal ka din bhee to aj hee ke saman atyant suhavana hoga.." 
Isaiah57:1 dharmee jan nash hota haai, aur koi is bat kee chinta naheen karata bhkt manushy utta liae jate haai, parantu koi naheen sochata. dharmee jan isaaliye utta liya gaya ki anevalee apati se bach jaa," 
Isaiah57:2 vah shaantai ko pahunchata haai jo seedhaee chal chalata haai vah apanee khatt par vishraam karata haai.. 
Isaiah57:3 parantu tum, he jadoogaratee ke putrae, he vyaabhaicharee aur vyaabhaichaarinee kee santan, yahan nikatt ao." 
Isaiah57:4 tum kis par hansee karate ho? tum kis par munh kholakar jeebh nikalate ho? kya tum pakhndee aur jootte ke vansh naheen ho," 
Isaiah57:5 tum, jo sab hare vrakshaen ke tale devataon ke karan kamatur hote aur nalon men aur chattanon hee dararon ke beech bala-bachchon ko vadha karate ho?" 
Isaiah57:6 nalon ke chikane patthr hee tera bhag aur ansh tthare too ne unake liye tapavan diya aur annabaali chaddhaya haai. kya maain in baton se shaant ho jaun? 
Isaiah57:7 aek bade unche pahad par too ne apana bichhauna chhaiya haai, vaheen too baali chaddhane ko chaddh gai." 
Isaiah57:8 too ne apanee chinhanee apane dar ke kivad aur chaukhtt kee ad hee men rakhee mujhe chhodkar too auron ko apane tai dikhane ke liye chaddhee, too ne apanee khatt chaudee kee aur un se vacha bandha lee, too ne unakee khatt ko jahan dekha, pasand kiya." 
Isaiah57:9 too tel liae huae raja ke pas gai aur bahut sugaandhiat tel apane kam men lai apane doot too ne door tak bheje aur adhaelok tak apane ko neecha kiya. 
Isaiah57:10 too apanee yatra kee lambai ke karan thk gai, taubhee too ne n kaha ki yah vyarth haai tera bal kuchh adhaik ho gaya, isee karan too naheen thkee.." 
Isaiah57:11 too ne kis ke dr se joott kaha, aur kisaka bhy manakar aeesa kiya ki mujh ko smaran naheen rakha n mujh par dhyan diya? kya maain bahut kal se chup naheen raha? is karan too mera bhy naheen manatee." 
Isaiah57:12 maain ap tere dharma aur karmon ka varnn karoonga, parantu, un se tujhe kuchh labh n hoga." 
Isaiah57:13 jab too dohai de, tab jin mootirayon ko too ne jama kiya haai vah hee tujhe chhudaaen! ve to sab kee sab vayu se varan aek hee foonk se ud jaaengee. parantu jo meree sharan lega vah desh ka adhaikaree hoga, aur mere pavitra parvat ko bhee adhaikaree hoga.." 
Isaiah57:14 aur yah kaha jaaega, panti bandha bandhakar rajamarga banao, meree praja ke marga men se har aek ttokar door karo." 
Isaiah57:15 kyonaki jo mahan aur uttm aur sadaaiv sthiar rahata, aur jisaka nam pavitra haai, vah yon kahata haai, maain unche par aur pavitra sthan men nivas karata hoo, aur usake sang bhee rahata hoo, jo khedit aur namra haai, ki, namra logon ke day aur kheadit logon ke man ko haashairt karoon." 
Isaiah57:16 maain sada mukama n ladta rahoonga, n sarvada krodhait rahoonga kyonki atma mere banaae huae haain aur jeev mere samhane moochchhirt ho jate haain." 
Isaiah57:17 usake lobh ke pap ke karan maain ne krodhait hokar usako du:kh diya tha, aur krodha ke mare us se munh chhpaiaya tha parantu vah apane manamane marga men door bhttkata chala gaya tha." 
Isaiah57:18 maain usakee chal dekhta aya hoo, taubhee ab usako changa karoonga maain use le chaloonga aur vishosh karake usake shaek karanevalon ko shaantai doonga." 
Isaiah57:19 maain munh ke fal ka srajanahar hoon yahova ne kaha haai, jo door aur jo nikatt haai, donon ko pooree shaantai mile aur maain usako changa karoonga." 
Isaiah57:20 parantu dushtt to laharate samuudra ke saman haai jo sthiar naheen rah sakata aur usaka jal maail aur keech uchhalata haai. 
Isaiah57:21 dushtton ke liye shaantai naheen haai, mere parameshvar ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Isaiah58:1 gala kholakar pukar, kuchh n rakh chhod, naraasinge ka sa uncha shabd kara meree praja ko usaka aparadha arthata yakoob ke gharane ko usaka pap jata de." 
Isaiah58:2 ve praati din mere pas ate aur meree gaati boojhne kee ichchha aeesee rakhte haain mano ve dharmee loge haain jinhon ne apane parameshvar ke niyamon ko naheen ttala ve mujh se dharma ke niyam poochhte aur parameshvar ke nikatt ane se prasann hote haain. 
Isaiah58:3 ve kahate haai, kya karaaea haai ki ham ne to upavas rakha, parantu too ne isakee sudhai naheen lee? ham ne du:kh uttaya, parantu too ne kuchh dhyan naheen diya? suno, upavas ke din tum apanee hee ichchha pooree karate ho aur apane sevakon se kattnai kamon ko karate ho." 
Isaiah58:4 suno, tumhare upavas ka fal yah hota haai ki tum apas men ladte aur jhgadte aur dushttta se ghoonse marate ho. jaaisa upavas tum ajakar rakhte ho, us se tumharee praarthna upar naheen sunai degee." 
Isaiah58:5 jis upavas se maain prasann hota hoon arthata jis men manushy svayan ko deen kare, kya tum is prakar karate ho? kya sir ko jha kee nain jhukana, apane neeche ttatt bichhana, aur rakh faainane hee ko tum upavas aur yahova ko prasann karane ka din kahate ho?" 
Isaiah58:6 jis upavas se maain prasann hota hoo, vah kya yah nahee, ki, anyay se banaae huae daso, aur andhor sahanevalon ka jua todkar unako chhuda lena, aur, sab juon ko tookade tookade kar dena?"
