Isaiah58:7 kya vah yah naheen haai ki apanee rottee bookhon ko bantt dena, anath aur mare mare firate huon ko apane ghar le ana, kisee ko nanga dekhkar vasr pahinana, aur apane jatibhaiyon se apane ko n chhpaiana?" 
Isaiah58:8 tab tera prakash pau fattne kee nain chamakega, aur too shaeegha changa ho jaaega tera dharma tere age age chalega, yahova ka tej tere peechhe raksha karate chalega." 
Isaiah58:9 tab too pukarega aur yahova uttr dega too dohai dega aur vah kahega, maain yahan hoon. yaadi too andhor karana aur ungalee mattkana, aur, dushtt baten bolana chhod de," 
Isaiah58:10 udarata se bookhe kee sahayata kare aur deen du:akhaiyon ko santushtt kare, tab aandhiayare men tera prakash chamakega, aur tera ghaer andhakar dopahar ka sa ujiyala ho jaega." 
Isaiah58:11 aur yahova tujhe lagatar liae chalega, aur kal ke samay tujhe trapt aur teree haddiyon ko haree bhree karega aur too seenchee hui baree aur aeese sote ke saman hoga jisaka jal kabhee naheen sookhta." 
Isaiah58:12 aur tere vansh ke log bahut kal ke ujade huae sthanon ko fir basaaenge too peeddhee peeddhee kee padee hui nev par ghar uttaaega tera nam tootte huae bade ka sudhaarak aur pathon ka tteek karanevala padega.. 
Isaiah58:13 yaadi too vishraamadin ko ashuuddh n kare arthata mere us paavitra din men apanee ichchha pooree karane ka yatn n kare, aur vishraamadin ko anand ka din aur yahova ka pavitra kiya hua din samajhkar mane yadi too usaka sanman karake us din apane marga par n chale, apanee ichchha pooree n kare, aur apanee hee baten n bole," 
Isaiah58:14 to too yahova ke karan sukhee hoga, aur maain tujhe desh ke unche sthanon par chalane doonga maain tere moolapuroosh yakoob ke bhag kee upaj men se tujhe khailaunga, kyonki yahova hee ke mukh se yah vachan nikala haai.." 
Isaiah59:1 suno, yahova ka hath aeesa chhotta naheen ho gaya ki uddhar n kar sake, n vah aeesa baahira ho gaya haai ki sun n sake" 
Isaiah59:2 kyonaki tumhare hath hatya se aur tumharee anguliyan adharma ke kamor se apaavitra ho gai haai tumhare munh se to joott aur tumharee jeebh se kuattlai baten nikalatee haain. 
Isaiah59:3 kyonaki tumhare hath hatya se aur tumharee anguliyan adharma ke kamorn se apaavitra ho gain haain tumhare munh se to joott aur tumharee jeebh se kuttlai baten nikalatee haain. 
Isaiah59:4 koi dharma ke sath naalish naheen karata, n koi sachchai se mukama ladta haai ve mithya par bhrosa rakhte haain aur joott baten bakate haai, usako mano utpat ka garbh rahata, aur ve anarth ko janm dete haain." 
Isaiah59:5 ve sanpin ke ande sete aur makadee ke jale banate haain jo koi unake ande khata vah mar jata haai, aur jab koi aek ko faodta tab us men se sapola nikalata haai." 
Isaiah59:6 unake jale kapade ka kam n denge, n ve apane kamon se apane ko ddhap sakenge. kyonaki unake kam anarth hee ke hote haai, aur unake hathon se apadrav ka kam hota haai." 
Isaiah59:7 ve burai karane ko daudte haai, aur nirdosh kee hatya karane ko tatpar rahate haain unakee yuaktaiyan vyarth haai, ujad aur vinash hee unake margon men haain." 
Isaiah59:8 shaantai ka marga ve janate hee naheen aur n unake vyavahar men nyay haai unake path tteddhe haai, jo koi un par chale vah shaaantai n paaega.." 
Isaiah59:9 is karan nyay ham se door haai, aur dharma hamare sameep hee naheen ata ham ujiyale kee batt to johate haai, parantu, dekho andhiayara hee bana rahata haai, ham prakash kee asha to lagaae haai, parantu, ghaer andhakar hee men chalate haain." 
Isaiah59:10 ham andhaen ke saman bheet ttttolate haai, ha, ham bina ankh ke logon kee nain ttttolate haain ham dina-dopahar rat kee nain ttokar khate haai, shttpushtton ke beech ham mudorn ke saman haain." 
Isaiah59:11 ham sab ke sab reechhon kee nai chillate haain aur pandukon ke saman chyoon chyoon karate haain ham nyay kee batt to johate haai, par vah kaheen naheen aur uddhar kee batt johate haain par vah ham se door hee rahata haai." 
Isaiah59:12 kyonaki hamare aparadha tere samhane bahut huae haai, hamare pap hamare virooddh sakshaee de rahe haain hamare aparadha hamare sang haain aur ham apane adharma ke kam janate haain:" 
Isaiah59:13 ham ne yahova ka aparadha kiya haai, ham us se mukar gaae aur apane parameshvar ke peechhe chalana chhod diya, ham andhor karane lage aur ulatt faer kee baten kahee, ham ne joottee baten man men gaddheen aur kahee bhee haain." 
Isaiah59:14 nyay to peechhe hattaya gaya aur dharma door khda rah gaya sachchai bajar men gir padee aur sidhaai pravesh naheen karane patee. 
Isaiah59:15 ha, sachchai khoi, aur jo burai se bhagata haai so shaikar ho jata haai.. yah dekhkar yahova ne bura mana, kyonki nyay jata raha," 
Isaiah59:16 us ne dekha ki koi bhee puroosh nahee, aur is se achambha kiya ki koi binatee karanevala naheen tab us ne apane hee bhujabal se uddhar kiya, aur apane dharmee hone ke karan vah sambhl gaya." 
Isaiah59:17 us ne dharma ko jhlaim kee nai paahin liya, aur usake sir par uddhar ka ttop rakha gaya us ne palatta lene ka vasr dhaaran kiya, aur jalajalahatt ko bage kee nai paahin liya haai." 
Isaiah59:18 unake kamorn ke anusar vah unako fal dega, apane draehiyon par vah apana krodha bhdkaega aur apane shatrauon ko unakee kamai dega vah deepavasiyon ko bhee unakee kamai bhr dega." 
Isaiah59:19 tab paashchaim kee or log yahova ke nam ka, aur poorva kee or usakee mahima ka bhy manenge kyonki jab shatra mahanad kee nain chaddhai karenge tab yahova ka atma usake virooddh jhnda khda karega.." 
Isaiah59:20 aur yakoob men jo aparadha se man firate haain unake liye siyyon men aek chhudanevala aaega, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Isaiah59:21 aur yahova yah kahata haai, jo vacha maain ne un se bandhaee haai vah yah haai, ki mera atma tujh par tthara haai, aur apane vachan jo maain ne tere munh men dale haain ab se lekar sarvada tak ve mere munh se, aur, tere putraen aur poton ke munh se bhee kabhee n hattenge.." 
Isaiah60:1 ut, prakashaman ho kyonaki tera prakash a gaya haai, aur yahova ka tej tere upar uday hua haai." 
Isaiah60:2 dek, prathvee par to andhiayara aur rajy rajy ke logon par ghaer andhakar chhaya hua haai parantu tere upar yahova uday hoga, aur usaka tej tujh par pragatt hoga." 
Isaiah60:3 aur anyajatiyan tere pas prakash ke liye aur raja tere arohan ke pratap kee or aaenge.. 
Isaiah60:4 apanee ankhen charo or uttakar dekh ve sab ke sab ikatthe hokar tere pas a rahe haain tere putra door se a rahe haai, aur teree puatraiyan hathon-hath pahunchai ja rahee haain." 
Isaiah60:5 tab too ise dekhegee aur tera mukh chamakega, tera day thrathraaega aur anand se bhr jaaega kyonki samudra ka sara dhan aur anyajatiyon kee dhana-sampati tujh ko milegee." 
Isaiah60:6 tere desh men untton ke jhund aur midhan aur aepadeshaen kee sadniyan ikatthee hongee shaiba ke sab log akar sona aur loban bhentt laaenge aur yahova ka gunanuvad anand se sunaaenge. 
Isaiah60:7 kedar kee sab bhed-bakaariyan ikatthee hokar teree ho jaaengee, nabayot ke meddhe teree seva tthal ke kam men aaenge meree vedee par ve grahan kiae jaaenge aur maain apane shaebhayaman bhvan ko aur bhee pratapee kar doonga.." 
Isaiah60:8 ye kaun haain jo badal kee nai aur darbaon kee or udte huae kabootaron kee nai chale ate haain? 
Isaiah60:9 nishchay deep meree hee batt dekhenge, pahile to tashareesh ke jahaj aaenge, ki, mere putraen ko sone chandee samet tere parameshvar yahova arthata israael ke paavitra ke nam ke nimitt door se pahunchaa, kyonki us ne tujhe shaebhayaman kiya haai.." 
Isaiah60:10 paradeshaee log teree shaharapanah ko uttaaenge, aur unake raja teree seva tthal karenge kyonki maain ne krodha men akar tujhe du:kh diya tha, parantu ab tujh se prasann hokar tujh par daya kee haai." 
Isaiah60:11 tere faattk sadaaiv khule rahenge din aur rat ve band n kiae jaaenge jis se anyajaatiyon kee dhana-sampati aur unake raja bandhauae hokar tere pas pahunchaae jaaen. 
Isaiah60:12 kyonaki jo jati aur rajy ke log teree seva n karen ve nashtt ho jaaenge han aeesee jaatiyan pooree reeati se satyanash ho jaaengee. 
Isaiah60:13 labanon ka vibhv arthata sanaubar aur devadar aur seedho sanaubar ke ped aek saai tere pas aaenge ki mere paavitrasthan ko sushaeabhait karen aur maain apane charanon ke sthan ko mahima doonga. 
Isaiah60:14 tere du:kh denevalon kee santan tere pas sir jhukaae huae anaegen aur jinhon ne tera tiraskar kiya sab tere panvon par girakar dandvata karenge ve tera nam yahova ka nagar, israael ke paavitra ka siyyon rakhenge.." 
Isaiah60:15 too jo tyagee gai aur gharaanait ttharee, yahan tak ki koi tujh men se hokar naheen jata tha, isakee santee maain tujhe sada ke ghamand ka aur peeddhee peeddhee ke harsha ka karan ttharaunga." 
Isaiah60:16 too anyajatiyon ka doodha pee legee, too rajaon kee chhatiyan choosegee aur too jan legee ki maain yahave tera uddharakartta aur tera chhudanevala, yakoob ka sarvashaktaiman hoon.." 
Isaiah60:17 maain peetal kee santee loha, lohe kee santee chandee, lakadee kee santee peetal aur patthr kee santee loha launga. maain tere haakimon ko mela-amilap aur chaudhariyon ko dhaarmikata ttharaunga." 
Isaiah60:18 tere desh men fir kabhee upadrav aur tere sivanon ke bheetar utpat va andhor kee charcha n sunai padegee parantu too apanee shaharapanah ka nam uddhar aur apane faattkon ka nam yash rakhegee. 
Isaiah60:19 fir din ko soorya tera ujiyala n hoga, n chandanee ke liye chandrama parantu yahova tere liye sada ka ujiyala aur tera parameshvar teree shaebha ttharega." 
Isaiah60:20 tera soorya fir kabhee ast n hoga aur n tere chandrama kee jyoti malin hogee kyonaki yahova teree sadaaiv kee jyoti hoga aur tare vilap ke din samapt ho jaaenge. 
Isaiah60:21 aur tere log sab ke sab dharmee honge ve sarvada desh ke adhaikaree rahenge, ve mere lagaae huae paudho aur mere hathon ka kam ttharenge, jis se meree maahima pragatt ho." 
Isaiah60:22 chhotte se chhotta aek hajar ho jaaega aur sab se durbal aek samarthee jati ban jaaega. maain yahova hoon tteek samay par yah sab kuchh shaeegharta se poora karoonga.. 
Isaiah61:1 prabhu yahova ka atma mujh par haai kyonaki yahova ne susamachar sunane ke liye mera abhaishok kiya aur mujhe isaaliye bheja haai ki khedit man ke logon ko shaantai doon ki bandhauon ke liye svatantrata ka aur kaaiadiyon ke liye chhuttkare ka prachar karoon 
Isaiah61:2 ki yahova ke prasann rahane ke varsha ka aur hamare parameshvar ke palatta lene ke din ka prachar karoon ki sab vilap karanevalon ko shaantai doon 
Isaiah61:3 aur siyyon ke vilap karanevalon ke sir par kee rakh door karake sundar pagadee bandha doo, ki unaka vilap door karake harsha ka tel lagaun aur unakee udasee hattakar yash ka oddhna oddhaun jis se ve dharma ke banjavraksha aur yahova ke lagaae huae kahalaaen aur jis se usakee mahima pragatt ho." 
Isaiah61:4 tab ve bahut kal ke ujade huae sthanon ko fir basaaenge, poorvakal se pade huae khndharon men ve fir ghar banaaenge ujade huae nagaron ko jo peeddhee peeddhee men ujade huae hon ve fir naye sire se basaaenge.." 
Isaiah61:5 paradeshaee a khde honge aur tumharee bhed-bakaariyon ko charaaenge aur videshaee log tumhare charavahe aur dakh kee baree ke malee honge 
Isaiah61:6 par tum yahova ke yajak kahalaoge, ve tum ko hamaro parameshvar ke sevak kahenge aur tum anyajaatiyon kee dhana-sampati ko khaoge, unake vibhv kee vastuaen pakar tum badai karoge." 
Isaiah61:7 tumharee namadharai kee santee doona bhag milega, anadar kee santee tum apane bhag ke karan jayajayakar karoge tum apane desh men doone bhag ke adhaikaree hoge aur sada anaandait bane rahoge.." 
Isaiah61:8 kyonaki, maain yahova nyay se praeeati rakhta hoo, maain anyay aur dkaaitee se gharana karata hoon isaaliye maain unako unake sath sada kee vacha bandhoonga." 
Isaiah61:9 unaka vansh anyajatiyon men aur unakee santan desh desh ke logon ke beech prasiddh hogee jitane unako dekhenge, paahichan lenge ki yah vah vansh haai jisako parameshvar ne ashaeesh dee haai.." 
Isaiah61:10 maain yahova ke karan aati anaandait hounga, mera praan parameshvar ke karan magan rahega kyonaki us ne mujhe uddhar ke vasr paahinaa, aur dharma kee char aeese oddha dee haai jaaise doolha foolon kee mala se apane apako sajata aur dualhain apane gahanon se apana singar karatee haai." 
Isaiah61:11 kyonaki jaaise boomi apanee upaj ko ugatee, aur baree men jo kuchh boya jata haai usako vah upajatee haai, vaaise hee prabhu yahova sab jaatiyon ke samhane dhaaarmikata aur dhanyavad ko baddhaaega.." 
Isaiah62:1 siyyon ke nimitt maain chup n rahoonga, aur yarooshalem ke nimitt maain chaain n loonga, jab tak ki usakee dhaaarmikata prakash kee nain aur usaka uddhar jalate huae paleete ke saman dikhai n de." 
Isaiah62:2 jab anyajatiyan tera dharma aur sab raja teree maahima dekhenge aur tera aek naya nam rakha jaaega jo yahova ke mukh se nikalega. 
Isaiah62:3 too yahova ke hath men aek shaebhayaman mukutt aur apane pameshvar kee hathelee men rajamukutt ttharegee. 
Isaiah62:4 too fir tyagee hui n kahalaaegee, aur teree boomi fir ujadee hui n kahalaaegee parantu too hepseeba aur teree boomi byoola kahalaaegee kyonki yahova tujh se prasann haai, aur teree boomi suhagan hogee." 
Isaiah62:5 kyonaki jis prakar javan puroosh aek kumaree ko byah lata haai, vaaise hee tere putra tujhe byah lenge aur, jaaise dulha apanee dulhain ke karan haashairt hota haai, vaaise hee tera parameshvar tere karan haashairt hoga.." 
Isaiah62:6 he yarooshalem, maain ne teree shaharapanah par paharooae baaittaae haain ve dina-rat kabhee chup n rahenge. he yahova ko smaran karanevalo, chup n raho," 
Isaiah62:7 aur, jab tak vah yarooshalem ko sthiar karake usakee prashansa prathvee par n faaila de, tab tak use bhee chaain n lene do." 
Isaiah62:8 yahova ne apane daahine hath kee aur apanee balavant bhuja kee shapath khai haai: nishchay maain bhavishy men tera ann ab fir tere shatrauon ko khane ke liye n doonga, aur paradeashaiyon ke putra tera naya dakhmadha jisake liye too ne paarishram kiya haai, naheen peene paaenge" 
Isaiah62:9 keval ve hee, jinhon ne use khtte men rakha ho, us se khakar yahova kee stuati karenge, aur jinhon ne dakhmadha bhndaron men rakha ho, ve hee use mere paavitrasthan ke anganon men peene paaenge.." 
Isaiah62:10 jao, faattkon men se nikal jao, praja ke liye marga sudhaaro rajamarga sudhaarakar uncha karo, us men ke patthr been beenakar faenk do, desh desh ke logon ke liye jhnda khda karo." 
Isaiah62:11 dekho, yahova ne prathvaiee kee chhor tak is agyaa ka prachar kiya haai: siyyon kee bettee se kaho, dek, tera uddharakarta ata haai, dek, jo majadooree usako denee haai vah usake pas haai aur usaka kam usake samane haai." 
Isaiah62:12 aur log unako paavitra praja aur yahova ke chhudaae huae kahenge aur tera nam grahan kee hui arthata na-tyagee hui nagaree padega.. 
Isaiah63:1 yah kaun haai jo aedom desh ke bostra nagar se baainjanee vasr pahine huae chala ata haai, jo aati balavan aur bhdkeela pahirava pahine huae joomata chala ata haai? yah maain hee hoo, jo dharma se bolata aur poora uddhar karane kee shaktai rakhta hoon." 
Isaiah63:2 tera pahirava kyon lal haai? aur kya karan haai ki tere vasr haud men dakh raundanevale ke saman haain? 
Isaiah63:3 maain ne to akele hee haud men dakhen raundee haai, aur desh ke logon men se kisee ne mera sath naheen diya ha, maain ne apane krodha men akar unhen raunda aur jalakar unhen latada unake lohoo ke chheentte mere vasren par pade haai, is se mera sara pahirava dhabbedar ho gaya haai." 
Isaiah63:4 kyonaki palatta lene ka din mere man men tha, aur meree chhudai hui praja ka varsha a pahuncha haai." 
Isaiah63:5 maain ne khoja, par koi sahayak n dikhai pada maain ne is se achambha bhee kiya ki koi sambhalanevala naheen tha tab maain ne apane hee bhujabal se uddhar kiya, aur meree jalajalahatt hee ne mujhe samhala." 
Isaiah63:6 ha, maain ne apane krodha men akar desh desh ke logon ko latada, apanee jalajalahatt se maain ne unhen matavala kar diya, aur unake lohoo ko boomi par baha diya.." 
Isaiah63:7 jitana upakar yahova ne ham logon ka kiya arthata israael ke gharane par daya aur atyant karoona karake us ne ham se jitanee bhlai, ki us sab ke anusar maain yahova ke karoonamay kamon ka varnn aur usaka gunanuvad karoonga." 
Isaiah63:8 kyonaki us ne kaha, nisndeh ye meree praja ke log haai, aeese ladke haain jo dhaekha nadenge aur vah unaka uddharakarta ho gaya." 
Isaiah63:9 unake sare sankatt men us ne bhee kashtt uttaya, aur usake sammukh rahanevale doot ne unaka uddhar kiya praem aur komalata se us ne ap kee unako chhudaya us ne unhen uttaya aur praacheenakal se sada unhen liae fira." 
Isaiah63:10 taubhee unhon ne balava kiya aur usake paavitra atma ko kheadit kiya is karan vah palattkar unaka shatra ho gaya, aur svayan un se ladne laga." 
Isaiah63:11 tab usake logon ko unake praacheen din arthata moosa ke din smaran aa, ve kahane lage ki jo apanee bhedon ko unake charavahe samet samudra men se nikal laya vah kahan haai? jis ne unake beech apana pavitra atma dala, vah kahan haai?" 
Isaiah63:12 jis ne apane pratapee bhujabal ko moosa ke dahine hath ke sath kar diya, jis ne unake samhane jal ko do bhag karake apana sada ka nam kar liya," 
Isaiah63:13 jo unako gaahire samudra men se le chala jaaisa ghaede ko jangal men vaaise hee unako bhee ttokar n lagee, vah kahan haai?" 
Isaiah63:14 jaaise gharaailoo pashu tarai men utar jata haai, veaise hee yahova ke atma n unako vishraam diya. isee prakar se too ne apanee praja kee aguvai kee taaki apana nam mahimayukt banaae.." 
Isaiah63:15 svarga se, jo tera pavitra aur maahimapoorn vasasthan haai, drashtti kara. teree jalan aur parakram kahan rahe? teree daya aur karoona mujh par se hatt gai haain." 
Isaiah63:16 nishchay too hamara pita haai, yadhyapi ibraaheem hamen naheen paahichanata, aur israael hamen grahan naheen karata taubhee, he yahova, too hamara pita aur hamara chhudanevala haai praacheenakal se yahee tera nam haai." 
Isaiah63:17 he yahova, too kyon ham ko apane margon se bhttka deta, aur hamare man aeese kattor karata haai ki ham tera bhy naheen manate? apane das, apane nij bhag ke gotraen ke nimitt lautt a." 
Isaiah63:18 teree pavitra praja to thode hee kal tak mere paavitrasthan kee aadhaikaree rahee hamare draehiyon ne use latad diya haai. 
Isaiah63:19 ham log to aeese ho gaae haai, mano too ne ham par kabhee prabhuta naheen kee, aur unake saman jo kabhee tere n kahalaae.." 
Isaiah64:1 bhla ho ki too akash ko faadkar utar aae aur pahad tere samhane kanp utte. 
Isaiah64:2 jaaise ag jhad-jhnkhad ko jala detee va jal ko ubalatee haai, usee reeti se too apane shatrauon par apana nam aeesa pragatt kar ki jati jati ke log tere pratap se kanp utten!" 
Isaiah64:3 jab too ne aeese bhyanak kam kiae jo hamaree asha se bhee baddhkar the, tab too utar aya, pahad tere pratap se kanp utte." 
Isaiah64:4 kyonaki praacheenakal hee se tujhe chhod koi aur aeesa parameshvar n to kabhee dekha gaya aur n kal se usakee charcha sunee gai jo apanee batt johanevalon ke liye kam kare. 
Isaiah64:5 too to unheen se milata haai jo dharma ke kam harsha ke sath karate, aur tere magorn par chalate huae tujhe smaran karate haain. dek, too krodhait hua tha, kyonaki ham ne pap kiya hamaree yah dasha to bahut kal se haai, kya hamara uddhar ho sakata haai?" 
Isaiah64:6 ham to sab ke sab ashuuddh manushy ke se haai, aur hamare dharma ke kam sab ke sab maaile chithdon ke saman haain. ham sab ke sab patte kee nain murjha jate haai, aur hamare adharma ke kamon ne hamen vayu kee nain uda diya haai." 
Isaiah64:7 koi bhee tujh se sahayata lene ke liye chaukasee karata haai ki tujh se lipatta rahe kyonaki hamare adharma ke kamon ke karan too ne ham se apana munh chhpai liya haai, aur hamen hamaree buraiyon ke vash men chhod diya haai.." 
Isaiah64:8 taubhee, he yahova, too hamar pita haai dek, ham to mittee haai, aur too hamara kumhar haai ham sab ke sab tere hath ke kam haain." 
Isaiah64:9 isaliye he yahova, atyant krodhait n ho, aur anantakal tak hamare adharma ko smaran n rakh. vichar karake dek, ham teree binatee karate haai, ham sab teree praja haain." 
Isaiah64:10 dek, tere paavitra nagar jangal ho gaa, siyyon sunasan ho gaya haai, yarooshalem ujad gaya haai." 
Isaiah64:11 hamara paavitra aur shaebhayaman maandair, jis men hamare poorvaj teree stuti karate the, ag se jalaya gaya, aur hamaree manabhavanee vastuaen sab nashtt ho gai haain." 
Isaiah64:12 he yahova, kya in baton ke hote bhee too apane ko roke rahega? kya too ham logon ko is atyant durdasha men rahane dega?" 
Isaiah65:1 jo mujh ko poochhte bhee n the ve mere khojee haain jo mujhe ddoonddhte bhee n the unhon ne mujhe pa liya, aur jo jaati meree naheen kahalai thee, us se bhee maain kahata hoo, dek, maain upaasthiat hoon." 
Isaiah65:2 maain aek hatteelee jati ke logon kee or din bhr hath faailaae raha, jo apanee yuktaiyon ke anusar bure margon men chalate haain." 
Isaiah65:3 aeese lo, jo mere samhane hee bariyon men baali chaddha chaddhakar aur intton par dhoop jala jalakar, mujhe lagatar krodha dilate haain." 
Isaiah65:4 ye kabra ke beech baaittte aur chhpai huae sthanon men rat bitate jo sooar ka mans khate, aur gharaanait vastuon ka ras apane bartanon men rakhte" 
Isaiah65:5 jo kahate haai, hatt ja, mere nikatt mat a, kyonaki maain tujh se paavitra hoon. ye meree nak men dhoonaen v us ag ke saman haain jo din bhr jalatee rahatee haai." 
Isaiah65:6 dekho, yah bat mere samhane likhee hui haai: maain chup n rahoonga, maain nishchay badala doonga varan tumhare aur tumhare purakhaon ke bhee adharma ke kamon ka badala tumharee god men bhr doonga." 
Isaiah65:7 kyonaki unhon ne pahadon par dhoop jalaya aur pahadiyon par meree ninda kee haai, isaliye maain yahova kahata hoo, ki, unake pichhle kamon ke badale ko maain inakee god men taulakar doonga.." 
Isaiah65:8 yahova yon kahata haai, jis bhanati dakh ke kisee guchchhe men jab naya dakhmadha bhr ata haai, tab log kahate haai, use nash mat kar, kyonaki us men ashaeesh haai usee bhanti maain apane dason ke nimitt aeesa karoonga ki sabhon ko nash n karoonga." 
Isaiah65:9 maain yakoob men se aek vansha, aur yahooda men se apane parvaton ka aek vaaris utpann karoonga mere chune huae usake varis honge, aur mere das vahan nivas karenge." 
Isaiah65:10 meree praja jo mujhe ddoonddhtee haai, usakee bhend-bakaariyan to shaaron men charengee, aur usake gaya-baail akor nam tarai men vishraam karenge." 
Isaiah65:11 parantu tum jo yahova ko tyag dete aur mere paavitra parvat ko bool jate ho, jo bhagy devata ke liye menj par bhojan kee vastuaen sajate aur bhavee devee ke liye masala mila hua dakhmadha bhr dete ho" 
Isaiah65:12 maain tumhen gin ginakar talavar ka kaur banaunga, aur tum sab ghaat hone ke liye jhukoge kyonaki, jab maain ne tumhen bulaya tum ne uttr n diya, jab maain bola, tab tum ne meree n sunee varan jo mujhe bura lagata haai vahee tum ne nit kiya, aur jis se maain aprasann hota hoo, usee ko tum ne apanaya.." 
Isaiah65:13 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, mere das to khaaenge, par tum bookhe rahoge mere das peeaenge, par tum pyase rahoge mere das anand karenge, par tum lajjait hoge" 
Isaiah65:14 dekho, mere das harsha ke mare jayajayakar karenge, parantu tum shaek se chillaoge aur khed ke mare hay hay, karoge." 
Isaiah65:15 mere chune huae log tumharee upama de dekar shaap denge, aur prabhu yahova tujh ko nash karega parantu apane dason ka doosara nam rakhega." 
Isaiah65:16 tab sare desh men jo koi apane ko dhany kahega vah sachche parameshvar ka nam lekar apane ko dhany kahega, aur jo koi desh men shapath khaae vah sachche parameshvar ke nam se shapath khaaega kyonaki pichhla kashtt door ho gaya aur vah meree ankhon se chhpai gaya haai.." 
Isaiah65:17 kyonaki dekho, maain naya akash aur nai prathvee utpann karane par hoo, aur pahilee baten smaran n rahengee aur soch vichar men bhee n aaengee." 
Isaiah65:18 isaliye jo maain utpann karane par hoo, usake karan tum haashairt ho aur sada sarvada magan raho kyonaki dekho, maain yarooshalem ko magan aur usakee praja ko anandait banaunga." 
Isaiah65:19 maain ap yarooshalem ke karan magan, aur apanee praja ke hetu hashairt hoonga us men fir rone va chillane ka shabd n sunai padega." 
Isaiah65:20 us men fir n to thode din ka bachcha, aur n aeesa booddha jata rahega jis ne apanee ayu pooree n kee ho kyonki jo ladkapan men maranevala haai vah sau varsha ka hokar marega, parantu papee sau varsha ka hokar shraapit ttharega." 
Isaiah65:21 ve ghar banakar un men basenge ve dakh kee bariyan lagakar unaka fal khaaenge. 
Isaiah65:22 aeesa naheen hoga ki ve banaaen aur doosara base va ve lagaae, aur doosara khaae kyonki meree praja kee ayu vrakshaen kee see hogee, aur mere chune huae apane kamon ka poora labh uttaaenge." 
Isaiah65:23 unaka paarishram vyarth n hoga, n unake balak ghabarahatt ke liye utpann honge kyonaki ve yahova ke dhany logon ka vansh ttharenge, aur unake balabachche un se alag n honge." 
Isaiah65:24 unake pukarane se pahile hee maain unako uttr doonga, aur unake mangate hee maain unakee sun loonga." 
Isaiah65:25 bheadiya aur memna aek sang chara karenge, aur sinh baail kee nai boosa khaaega aur sarpa ka ahar mittee hee rahega. mere sare paavitra parvat par n to koi kisee ko du:kh dega aur n koi kisee kee haani karega, yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Isaiah66:1 yahova yon kahata haai, akash mera sinhasan aur prathvee mere charanon kee chaukee haai tum mere liye kaaisa bhvan banaoge, aur mere vishraam ka kaun sa sthan hoga?" 
Isaiah66:2 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ye sab vastuaen mere hee hath kee banai hui haai, so ye sab meree hee haain. parantu maain usee kee or drashtti karoonga jo dee aur kheadit man ka ho, aur mera vachan sunakar thrathrata ho.." 
Isaiah66:3 baail ka bali karanevala manushy ke mar dalanevale ke saman haai jo bhed ke chaddhanevala haai vah usake saman haai jo kutte ka gala kattta haai jo annabali chaddhata haai vah mano sooar ka lohoo chaddhanevale ke saman haai aur, jo loban jalata haai, vah usake saman haai jo moorat ko dhany kahata haai. in sabhon ne apana apana marga chun liya haai, aur ghainaunee vastuon se unake man prasann hate haain." 
Isaiah66:4 isaliye maain bhee unake liye du:kh kee baten nikaloonga, aur jin baton se ve drate haain unheen ko un par launga kyonaki jab maain ne unhen bulaya, tab koi n bola, aur jab maain ne un se baten kee, tab unhon ne meree n sunee parantu jo meree draashtti men bura tha vahee ve karate rahe, aur jis se maain aprasann hota tha usee ko unhon ne apanaya.. tum jo yahova ka vachan sunakar thrathrate ho yahova ka yah vachan suno:" 
Isaiah66:5 tumhare bhai jo tum se baair rakhte aur mere nam ke nimitt tum ko alag kar dete haain unhon ne kaha haai, yahova kee maahima to baddhe, jis se ham tumhara anand dekhte paaen parantu unheen ko laajjait hona padega.." 
Isaiah66:6 suno, nagar se kolahal kee dhoom, mandair se aek shabd, sunai deta haai! vah yahova ka shabd haai, vah apane shatrauon ko unakee karanee ka fal de raha haai!" 
Isaiah66:7 usakee peedaen uttane se pahale hee us ne janma diya usako peedaen hone se paahile hee us se betta janma. 
Isaiah66:8 aeesee bat kis ne kabhee sunee? kis ne kabhee aeesee baten dekhee? kya desh aek hee din men utpann ho sakata haai? kya aek jati kshan matra men hee utpann ho sakatee haai? kyonki siyyon kee peedaaen uttee hee theen ki us se santan utpann ho gaae. 
Isaiah66:9 yahova kahata haai, kya maain use janmane ke samay tak pahunchakar n janmaun? tera parameshvar kahata haai, maain jo garbh deta hoon kya maain kokh band karoon?" 
Isaiah66:10 he yarooshalem se sab praem rakhnevalo, usake sath anand karo aur usake karan magan ho he usake vishay sab vilap karanevalo usake sath haashairt ho!" 
Isaiah66:11 jis se tum usake shaaantairoopee stan se doodha pee peekar trapt ho aur doodha peekar usakee mahima kee bahutayat se atyant sukhee ho.. 
Isaiah66:12 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain usakee or shaantai ko nadee kee nai, aur anyajaatiyon ke dhan ko nadee kee baddh ke saman baha doonga aur tum us se peeoge, tum usakee god men uttaae jaoge aur usake ghauttnon par kudaae jaoge." 
Isaiah66:13 jis prakar mata apane putra ko shaantai detee haai, vaais hee maain bhee tumhen shaaantai dunga tum ko yarooshalem hee men shaantai milegee." 
Isaiah66:14 tum yah dekhoge aur prafaullait hoge tumharee haddiyan ghaas kee nain haree bhree hongee aur yahova ka hath usake dason ke liye pragatt hoga, aur, usake shatrauon ke upar usaka krodha bhdkega.." 
Isaiah66:15 kyonaki dekho, yahova ag ke sath aaega, aur usake rath bavandr ke saman honge, jis se vah apane krodha ko jalajalahatt ke sath aur apanee chitaunee ko bhsm karanevalee ag kee lapatt men pragatt kare." 
Isaiah66:16 kyonaki yahova sab praaanaiyon ka nyay ag se aur apanee talavar se karega aur yahova ke mare huae bahut honge.. 
Isaiah66:17 jo log apane ko isaliye paavitra aur shuuddh karate haain ki bariyon men jaaen aur kisee ke peechhe khde hokar sooar va choohe ka mans aur aur gharaanait vastuen khate haai, ve aek hee sang nash ho jaaenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Isaiah66:18 kyonaki maain unake kam aur unakee kalpanaae, donon achchhee reeati se janata hoon. aur vah samay ata haai jab maain saree jatiyon aur bhainn bhainn bhasha bolanevalon ko ikattha karoonga aur ve akar meree mahima dekhenge." 
Isaiah66:19 aur maain un se aek chinh pragatt karoonga aur unake bache huon ko maain un anyajaatiyon ke pas bhejoonga jinhon ne n to mera samachar suna haai aur n meree maahima dekhee haai, arthata tashareeashaiyon aur dhanudhararee pooliyon aur loodiyon ke pas, aur tabaaliyon aur yoonaaniyon aur door deepavasiyon ke pas bhee bhej doonga aur ve anyajaatiyon men meree mahima ka varnn karenge." 
Isaiah66:20 aur jaaise israaelee log annabaali ko shuuddh patra men dharakar yahova ke bhvan men le ate haai, vaaise hee ve tumhare sab bhaiyon ko ghaedo, ratho, palaayie, khchcharon aur sadniyon par chaddha chaddhakar mere paavitra parvat yarooshalem par yahova kee bhentt ke liye le aaenge, yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Isaiah66:21 aur un men se maain kitane logon ko yajak aur leveey pad ke liye bhee chun loonga.. 
Isaiah66:22 kyeanki jis prakar naya akash aur nai prathvee, jo maain banane par hoo, mere sammukh banee rahegee, usee prakar tumhara vansh aur tumhara nam bhee bana rahega yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Isaiah66:23 fir aeesa hoga ki aek naye chand se doosare naye chand ke din tak aur aek vishraam din se doosare vishraam din tak samast praanee mere samhane dandvata karane ko aya karenge yahova ka yahee vachan haai.. 
Isaiah66:24 tab ve nikalakar un logon kee lothon par jinhon ne mujh se balava kiya draashtti dalenge kyonaki un men pade huae keede kabhee n marenge, unakee as kabhee n bujhegee, aur sare manushyon ko un se atyant gharana hogee.." 
Jeremiah1:1 hilkaiyyah ka putra yirmayah jo binyameen desh ke anatot men rahanevale yajakon men se tha, usee ke ye vachan haain." 
Jeremiah1:2 yahova ka vachan usake pas amon ke putra yahooda ke raja yoshaiyyah ke dinon men usake rajy ke terahaven varsha men pahuncha. 
Jeremiah1:3 isake bad yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke dinon me, aur yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke gyarahaven varsha ke ant tak bhee pragatt hota raha jab tak usee varsha ke panchaven maheene men yarooshalem ke nivasee bandhauai men n chale gaae." 
Jeremiah1:4 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah1:5 garbh men rachane se pahile hee maain ne tujh par chitt lagaya, aur utpann hone se pahile hee maain ne tujhe aabhaishok kiya maain ne tujhe jaatiyon ka bhavishyadvkta ttharaya." 
Jeremiah1:6 tab maain ne kaha, hay, prabhu yahova! dek, maain to bolana hee naheen janata, kyonaki maain ladka hee hoo." 
Jeremiah1:7 parantu yahova ne mujh se kaha, mat kah ki maain ladka hoo kyonki jis kisee ke pas maain tujhe bhejoon vahan too jaaega, aur jo kuchh maain tujhe aja doon vahee too kahega." 
Jeremiah1:8 too unake mukh ko dekhkar mat dr, kyonki tujhe chhudane ke liye maain tere sath hoo, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah1:9 tab yahova ne hath baddhakar mere munh ko chhua aur yahova ne mujh se kaha, dek, maain ne apane vachan tere munh men dal diye haain." 
Jeremiah1:10 sun, maain ne aj ke din tujhe jaatiyon aur rajyon par aadhaikaree ttharaya haai anhen girane aur ddha dene ke liye, nash karane aur katt dalane ke liye, ya unhen banane aur ropane ke liye." 
Jeremiah1:11 aur yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha, he yirmayah, tujhe kya dikhai padta haai? maain ne kaha, mujhe badam kee aek tthanee dikhai padtee haai." 
Jeremiah1:12 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, tujhe tteek dikhai padta haai, kyonki maain apane vachan ko poora karane ke liye jagrat hoo." 
Jeremiah1:13 fir yahova ka vachan doosaree bar mere pas pahancha, aur us ne poochha, tujhe kya dikhai padta haai? maain ne kaha, mujhe ubalata hua aek handa dikhai padta haai jisaka munh uttar disha kee or se haai." 
Jeremiah1:14 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, is desh ke sab rahanevalon par uttar disha se vipaattai a padegee." 
Jeremiah1:15 yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain uttar disha ke rajyon aur kulon ko bulaunga aur ve akar yarooshalem ke faattkon men aur usake charon or kee shaharapanah, aur yahooda ke aur sab nagaron ke samhane apana apana sinhasan lagaaenge." 
Jeremiah1:16 aur unakee saree burai ke karan maain un par dand kee agyaa doonga kyonaki unhon ne mujhe tyagakar doosare devataon ke liye dhoop jalaya aur apanee banai hui vastuon ko dandvata kiya haai. 
Jeremiah1:17 isaliye too apanee kamar kasakar utt aur jo kuchh kahane kee maain tujhe agyaa doon vahee un se kaha. too unake mukh ko dekhkar n ghabarana, aeesa n ho ki maain tujhe unake samhane ghabara doon." 
Jeremiah1:18 kyonaki sun, maain ne aj tujhe is sare desh aur yahood ke rajao, hakimo, aur yajakon aur sadhaaran logon ke virud gaddhvala nagar, aur lohe ka khmbha, aur peetal kee shaharapanah banaya haai." 
Jeremiah1:19 ve tujh se ladenge to sahee, parantu tujh par prabal n honge, kyonaki bachane ke liye maain tere sath hoo, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah2:1 yahova ka vah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah2:2 aur yarooshalem men pukarakar yah suna de, yahova yah kahata haai, teree javanee ka sneh aur tere vivah ke samay ka praem mujhe smaran ata haai ki too kaaise jangal men mere peechhe peechhe chalee jahan boomi jotee-boi n gai thee." 
Jeremiah2:3 israaael, yahova ke liye paavitra aur usakee pahalee apaj thee. use khanevale sab doshaee ttharenge aur vipaattai men padenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah2:4 he yakoob ke gharane, he israaael ke gharane ke kulon ke logo, yahova ka vachan suno!" 
Jeremiah2:5 yahova yon kahata haai, tumhare purakhaon ne mujh men kaun aeesee kuattlaita pai ki mujh se door hatt gaae aur nikammee vastuon ke peechhe hokar svayan nikamme ho gaae?" 
Jeremiah2:6 unhon ne itana bhee n kaha ki jo hamen misra desh se nikal le aya vah yahova kahan haai? jo hamen jangal men se or ret aur gadhon se bhre huae nirjal aur ghaer andhakar ke desh se jis men hokar koi naheen chalata, aur jis men koi manushy naheen rahata, hamen nikal le aya." 
Jeremiah2:7 aur maain tum ko is upaja desh men le aya ki usaka fal aur uttam upaj khao parantu mere is desh men akar tum ne ise ashuuddha kiya, aur mere is nij bhag ko gharaanaiat kar diya haai." 
Jeremiah2:8 yajakon ne bhee naheen poochha ki yahova kahan haai jo vyavastha sikhate the ve bhee mujh ko n janate the charavahon ne bhee mujh se balava kiya bhavishyadvktaon ne bal devata ke nam se bhvishyadanee kee aur nishfal baton ke peechhe chale. 
Jeremiah2:9 is karan yahova yah kahata haai, maain fir tum se vivad, aur tumhare bette aur poton se bhee prashn karoonga." 
Jeremiah2:10 kittaiyon ke deepon men par jakar dekho, ya kedar men doot bhejakar bhlee bhanti vichar karo aur dekho dekho, ki aeesa kam kaheen aur bhee hua haai? kya kisee jaati ne apane devataon ko badal diya jo parameshvar bhee naheen haain?" 
Jeremiah2:11 parantu meree praja ne apanee mahima ko nikammee vastu se badal diya haai. 
Jeremiah2:12 he akasha, chaakit ho, bahut hee thrathra aur sunasan ho ja, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah2:13 kyonaki meree praja ne do buraiyan kee haain unhon ne mujh bahate jal ke sote ko tyag diya haai, aur, anhon ne haud bana lia, varan bese haud jo toott gaae haai, aur jin men jal naheen rah sakata." 
Jeremiah2:14 kya israaael das haai? kya vah ghar men janma hua dans haai? fir vah kyon shaikar bana? 
Jeremiah2:15 javan sinhon ne usake viruddh garajakar nad kiya. unhon ne usake desh ko ujad diya unhon ne usake nagaron ko aeesa ujad diya ki un men koi basanevala hee n raha. 
Jeremiah2:16 aur nop aur tahapathes ke nivasee bhee tere desh kee upaj chatt kar gaae haain. 
Jeremiah2:17 kya yah teree hee karanee ka fal nahee, jo too ne apane parameshvar yahova ko chhod diya jo tujhe marga men liae chala?" 
Jeremiah2:18 aur ab tujhe misra ke marga se kya labh haai ki too seehor ka jal peeae? athva ashshoor ke marga se bhee tujhe kya labh ki too mahanad ka jal peeae? 
Jeremiah2:19 teree burai hee teree tadna karegee, aur tera bhttk jana tujhe ulahana dega. jan le aur dekh ki apane parameshvar yahova ko tyagana, yah buree aur kadvee bat haai tujhe mera bhy hee naheen raha, prabhu senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah2:20 kyonaki bahut samay pahile maain ne tera jooa tod dala aur tere bandhan khol diae parantu too ne kaha, maain seva n karoongee. aur sab unche-unche tteelon par aur sab hare pedon ke neeche too vyaabhaichaarin ka sa kam karatee rahee." 
Jeremiah2:21 maain ne to tujhe uttam jaati kee dakhlata aur uttam beej karake lagaya tha, fir too kyon mere liye jangalee dakhlata ban gai?" 
Jeremiah2:22 chahe too apane ko sajjee se dhaeae aur bahut sa sabun bhee prayog kare, taubhee tere adharma ka dhabba mere samhane bana rahega, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah2:23 too kyonkar kah sakatee haai ki maain ashuuddh nahee, maain bal devataon ke peechhe naheen chalee? tarai men kee apanee chal dekh aur jan le ki too ne kya kiya haai? too veg se chalanevalee aur idhar udhar firanevalee sandnee haai," 
Jeremiah2:24 jangal men palee hui jangalee gadahee jo kamatur hokar vayu soondhatee firatee haai tab kaun use vash men kar sakata haai? jitane usako ddoonddhte haain ve vyarth parishram n karen kyonki ve use usakee tu men paaenge. 
Jeremiah2:25 apane panv nange aur gala sukhaae n raha. parantu too ne kaha, nahee, aeesa naheen ho sakata, kyonki mera praem doosaron se lag gaya haai aur maain unake peechhe chalatee rahoongee." 
Jeremiah2:26 jaaise chor pakade jane par laajjait hota haai, vaaise hee israaael ka gharana rajao, hakimo, yajakon aur bhvishyadvktaon samet laajjait hoga." 
Jeremiah2:27 ve katt se kahate haai, too mera bap haai, aur patthr se kahate haai, too ne mujhe janm diya haai. is prakar unhon ne meree or munh naheen peett hee faeree haai parantu vipaattai ke samay ve kahate haai, uttkar hamen bacha!" 
Jeremiah2:28 parantu jo devata too ne bana liae haai, ve kahan rahe? yadi ve teree vipaattai ke samay tujhe bacha sakate haain to abhee utten kyonaki he yahooda, tere nagaron ke barabar tere devata bhee bahut haain." 
Jeremiah2:29 tum kyon mujh se vadaavivad karate ho? tum sabhon ne mujh se balava kiya haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah2:30 maain ne vyarth hee tumhare betton kee tadna kee, unhon ne kuchh bhee naheen mana tum ne apane bhavishyadvktaon ko apanee hee talavar se aeesa katt dala haai jaaisa sinh faadta haai." 
Jeremiah2:31 he logo, yahova ke vachan par dhyan do! kya maain israaael ke liye jangal va ghaer andhakar ka desh bana? tab meree praja kyon kahatee haai ki ham to ajad ho gaae haain so tere pas fir n aaenge?" 
Jeremiah2:32 kya kumaree apane midgar va dualhain apanee sajavatt bool sakatee haai? taubhee meree praja ne yugon se mujhe bisara diya haai. 
Jeremiah2:33 praem lagane ke liye too kaaisee sundar chal chalatee haai! buree striayon ko bhee too ne apanee see chal sikhai haai. 
Jeremiah2:34 tere ghaanghare men nidash aur daaridra logon ke lohoo ka chinh paya jata haai too ne unhen sendha lagate naheen pakada. parantu in sab ke hote huae bhee too kahatee haai, maain nidash hoon" 
Jeremiah2:35 nishchay usaka krodha mujh par se hatt jaaega. dek, too jo kahatee haai ki maain ne pap naheen kiya, isaliye maain tera nyay karaunga." 
Jeremiah2:36 too kyon naya marga pakadne ke liye itanee danvadol firatee haai? jaaise ashshooriyon se too laajjait hui vaaise hee misiryon se bhee hogee. 
Jeremiah2:37 vahan se bhee too sir par hath rakhe huae yon hee chalee aaegee, kyonaki jin par too ne bhrosa rakha haai unako yahova ne nikamma ttharaya haai, aur usake karan too safal n hogee." 
Jeremiah3:1 ve kahate haai, yadi koi apanee patnee ko tyag de, aur vah usake pas se jakar doosare purush kee ho jaa, to vah pahila kya usake pas fir jaaega? kya vah desh aati ashuuddh n ho jaaega? yahova kee yah vanee haai ki too ne bahut se praemiyon ke sath vyabhaichar kiya haai, kya too ab meree or firegee?" 
Jeremiah3:2 munde tteelon kee or ankhen uttakar dekh! aeesa kaun sa sthan haai jahan too ne kukarma n kiya ho? magan men too aeesee baaittee jaaise aek arabee jangal men. too ne desh ko apane vyabhaichar se ashuuddh kar diya haai. 
Jeremiah3:3 isee karan jhadiyan aur barasat kee pichhlee vashara naheen hotee taubhee tera matha veshya ka sa haai, too lajjait hona hee naheen janatee." 
Jeremiah3:4 kya too ab mujhe pukarakar kahegee, he mere pita, too hee meree javanee ka sathee haai?" 
Jeremiah3:5 kya vah man men sada krodha rakhe rahega? kya vah usako sada banaae rahega? too ne aeesa kaha to haai, parantu too ne bure kam prabalata ke sath kiae haain." 
Jeremiah3:6 fir yoshaiyyah raja ke dinon men yahova ne mujh se yah bhee kaha, kya too ne dekha ki bhttkanevalee israaael ne kya kiya haai? us ne sab unche pahadon par aur sab hare pedon ke tale ja jakar vyaabhaichar kiya haai." 
Jeremiah3:7 tab maain ne sova, jab ye sab kam vah kar chuke tab meree or firegee parantu vah n firee, aur usakee vishvasaghaatee bahin yahooda ne yah dekha." 
Jeremiah3:8 fir maain ne dekha, jab maain ne bhttkanevalee israaael ko usake vyabhaichar karane ke karan tyagakar use tyagapatra de diya taubhee usakee vishvasaghaatee bahin yahooda n dree, varan jakar vah bhee vyabhaichaarinee ban gai." 
Jeremiah3:9 usake nirlajja-vyabhaichaarinee hone ke karan desh bhee ashuuddh ho gaya, us ne patthr aur katt ke sath bhee vyabhaichar kiya." 
Jeremiah3:10 itane par bhee usakee vishvasaghaatee bahin yahooda poorn man se meree or naheen firee, parantu kapatt se, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah3:11 aur yahova ne mujh se kaha, bhttkanevalee israaael, vishvasaghaaatin yahooda se kam doshaee nikalee haai." 
Jeremiah3:12 too jakar uttar disha men ye baten prachar kar, yahova kee yah vanee haai, he bhttkanevalee israaael lautt a, maain tujh par krodha kee drashtti n karoonga kyonki yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain karunamay hoo maain sarvada krodha n rakhe rahoonga." 
Jeremiah3:13 keval apana yah adharma man le ki too apane parameshvar yahova se fir gai aur sab hare pedon ke tale idhar udhar doosaron ke pas gai, aur meree baton ko naheen mana, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah3:14 he bhttkanevale ladko lautt ao, kyonki maain tumhara svamee hoo yahova kee yah vanee haai. tumhare pratyek nagar peechhe aek, aur pratyek kul peechhe do ko lekar maain siyyon men pahuncha doonga." 
Jeremiah3:15 aur maain tumhen apane man ke anukool charavahe doonga, jo gyaan aur buaddhi se tumhen charaaenge." 
Jeremiah3:16 un dinon men jab tum is desh men baddho, aur foolo-falo, tab log fir aeesa n kahenge, yahova kee vacha ka sandooka yahova kee yah bhee vanee he. usaka vichar bhee unake man men n aega, n log usake n rahane se chinta karenge aur n usakee marammat hogee." 
Jeremiah3:17 us samay sarooshalem yahova ka sinhasan kahalaega, aur sab jatiyan usee yarooshalem men mere nam ke nimitt ikatthee hua karengee, aur, ve fir apane bure man ke hatt par n chalengee." 
Jeremiah3:18 un dinon men yahooda ka gharana israael ke gharane ke sath chalega aur ve donon milakar uttar ke desh se is desh men aenge jise maain ne unake poorvajon ko nij bhag karake diya tha. 
Jeremiah3:19 maain ne socha tha, maain kaaise tujhe ladkon men ginakar vah manabhavana desh doon jo sab jatiyon ke deshaen ka shairomanai haai. aur maain ne socha ki too mujhe pita kahegee, aur mujh se fir n bhttkegee." 
Jeremiah3:20 is men to sandeh naheen ki jaaise vishvasaghaatee sree apane piry se man faer letee haai, vaaise hee he israaael ke gharane, too mujh se fir gaya haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah3:21 munde tteelon par se israaaeliyon ke rone aur gidgidane ka shabd sunai de raha haai, kyonki ve tteddhee chal chalate rahe haain aur apane parameshvar yahova ko bool gaae haain." 
Jeremiah3:22 he bhttkanevale ladko, lautt ao, maain tumhara bhttkana sudhaar doonga. dek, ham tere pas aae haain kyonaki too hee hamara parameshvar yahova haai." 
Jeremiah3:23 nishkhy pahadon aur pahadiyon par ka kolahal vyarth hee haai. israaael ka uddhar nishchay hamare parameshvar yahova hee ke dara haai. 
Jeremiah3:24 parantu hamaree javanee hee se us badanamee kee vastu ne hamare purakhaon kee kamai arthata unakee bhed-bakaree aur gaya-baail aur unake bette-beattyaien ko nigal liya haai. 
Jeremiah3:25 ham laajjait hokar lett jaae, aur hamara sankoch hamaree oddhnee ban jaae kyonaki hamare purakha aur ham bhee yuva avastha se lekar aj ke din tak apane parameshvar yahova ke viruddh pap karate aae haain aur ham ne apane parameshvar yahova kee baton ko naheen mana haai." 
Jeremiah4:1 yahova kee yah vanee haai, he israaael yadi too lautt aye, to mere pas lautt a. yadi too ghainaunee vastuon ko mere samhane se door kare, to tujhe avara firana n padega," 
Jeremiah4:2 aur yaadi too sachchai aur nyay aur dharma se yahova ke jeevan kee shapath khaa, to anyajaatiyan usake karan apane apako dhany kahengee, aur usee par ghamand karengee." 
Jeremiah4:3 kyonaki yahooda aur yarooshalem ke logon se yahova ne yon kaha haai, apanee padtee boomi ko joto, aur katteele jhadon men beej mat boo." 
Jeremiah4:4 he yahooda ke logo aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyo, yahova ke liye apana khtana karo ha, apane man ka khtana karo naheen to tumhare bure kamon ke karan mera krodha ag kee nai bhdkega, aur aeesa hoga kee koi use bujha n sakega." 
Jeremiah4:5 yahooda men prachar karo aur yarooshalem men yah sunao poore desh men naraasinga foonko gala kholakar lalakaro aur kaho, ao, ham ikatthe hon or gaddhvale nagaron men jaaen!" 
Jeremiah4:6 siyyon ke marga men jhnda khda karo, apana saman battorake bhago, khde mat raho, kyonaki maain uttar kee disha se vipaattai aur satyanash le aya chahata hoo." 
Jeremiah4:7 aek sinh apanee jhadee se nikala, jati jati ka nash karanevala chaddhai karake a raha haai vah kooch karake apane sthan se isaaliye nikala haai ki tumhare desh ko ujad de aur tumhare nagaron ko aeesa sunasan kar de ki un men koi basanevala n rahane paae." 
Jeremiah4:8 isaliye kamar men ttatt bandhae, vilap aur hay hay karo kyonki yahova ka bhdka hua kop ham par se ttla naheen haai." 
Jeremiah4:9 us samay raja aur haakimon ka kaleja kanp uttega yajak chaakit honge aur nabee achambhiat ho jaenge, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah4:10 tab maain ne kaha, hay, prabhu yahova, too ne to yah kahakar ki tum ko shaaantai milegee nishchay apanee is praja ko aur yarooshalem ko bhee bada dhaekha diya haai kyonki talavar praanon ko mittane par haai." 
Jeremiah4:11 us samay teree is praja se aur yarooshalem sen bhee kaha jaega, jangal ke munde tteelon par se praja ke logon kee or loo bah rahee haai, vah aeesee vayu naheen jis se osana va farachhana ho," 
Jeremiah4:12 parantu meree or se aeese kamon ke liye aadhaik prachand vayu bahegee. ab maain unako dand kee agyaa doonga. 
Jeremiah4:13 dekho, vah badalon kee nai chaddhai karake a raha haai, usake rath bavandr ke saman aur usake ghaede ukabon se bhee aadhaik veg se chalate haain. ham par hay, ham nash huae!" 
Jeremiah4:14 he yarooshalem, apana day burai se dhae, ki, tumhara uddhar ho jaae. tum kab tak vyarth kalpanaaen karate rahoge?" 
Jeremiah4:15 kyonaki dan se shabd sun pad raha haai aur aepraaim ke pahadee desh se vipaattai ka samachar a raha haai. 
Jeremiah4:16 anyajatiyon men suna do, yarooshalem ko bhee isaka samachar do, paharuae door desh se akar yahooda ke nagaron ke viruddh lalakar rahe haain." 
Jeremiah4:17 ve khet ke rakhvalon kee nai usako charon or se ghor rahe haai, kyonki us ne mujh se balava kiya haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah4:18 yah teree chal aur tere kamon hee ka fal haain. yah teree dushttta haai aur ati dukhdai haai is se tera day chhdai jata haai. 
Jeremiah4:19 hay! hay! mera day bheetar hee bheetar tadpata haai! aur mera man ghabarata haai! maain chup naheen rah sakata kyonki he mere praa, naraasinge ka shabd aur yuddh kee lalakar tujh tak pahunchee haai." 
Jeremiah4:20 nash par nash ka samachar a raha haai, sara desh loott liya gaya haai. mere dere achanak or mere tamboo aekaaek lootte gaae haain." 
Jeremiah4:21 aur kitane din tak mujhe unaka jhgada dekhna aur narasinge ka shabd sunana padega? 
Jeremiah4:22 kyonaki meree praja mooddh haai, ve mujhe naheen janate ve aeese moorkh ladke haain jin men kuchh bhee samajh naheen. burai karane ko to ve buaddhiman haai, parantu bhlai karana ve naheen janate." 
Jeremiah4:23 maain ne prathvee par dekha, vah soonee aur sunasan padee thee aur akash ko, aur us men koi jyoti naheen thee." 
Jeremiah4:24 maain ne pahadon ko dekha, me hil rahe the, aur sab pahadiyon ko ki ve dol rahee theen." 
Jeremiah4:25 fir maain ne kya dekha ki koi panushy bhee n tha aur sab pakshaee bhee ud gaae the. 
Jeremiah4:26 fir maain kya dekhta hoo ki yahova ke pratap aur us bhdke huae prakop ke karan upaja desh jangal, aur usake sare nagar khndhar ho gaae the." 
Jeremiah4:27 kyonaki yahova ne yah bataya ki sara desh ujad ho jaaega taubhee maain usaka ant n kar daloonga. 
Jeremiah4:28 is karan prathvee vilap karegee, aur akash shaek ka kala vasr pahinega kyonki maain ne aeesa hee karate ko ttana aur kaha bhee haai maain is se naheen pachhtaunga aur n apane pran ko chhodoonga." 
Jeremiah4:29 nagar ke sare log savaron aur dhanudharariyon ka kolahal sasunakar bhage jate haain ve jhadiyon men ghausate aur chattanon par chaddhe jate haain sab nagar nirjan ho gaa, aur un men koi bakee n raha." 
Jeremiah4:30 aur too jab ujadegee tab kya karegee? chahe too lal radg ke vasr paahine aur sone ke abooshan dhaaran kare aur apanee ankhon men anjan lagaa, parantu vyarth hee too apana sharangar karegee. kyonaki tere mitra tujhe nikammee janate haain ve tere praanon ke khojee haain." 
Jeremiah4:31 kyonaki maain ne jachcha ka shabd, pahilautta janatee hui sree kee see chillahatt sunee haai, yah siyyon kee bettee ka shabd haai, jo hanfatee aur hath faailaae huae yon kahatee haai, hay mujh par, maain hatyaron ke hath padkar moorchhri ho chalee hoo." 
Jeremiah5:1 yarooshalem kee sadkon men idhar udhar daudkar dekho! usake chaukon men ddoonddho yadi koi aeesa mil sake jo tyay se kam kare aur sachchai ka khojee ho to maain usaka pap kshama karoonga. 
Jeremiah5:2 yadhymi usake nivasee yahova ke jeevan kee shapath bhee khaae, taubhee nishchay ve joottee shapath khate haain." 
Jeremiah5:3 he yahova, kya teree draashtti sachchai par naheen haai? too ne unako dukh diya, parantu ve shaeakit naheen huae too ne unako nash kiya, parantu unhon ne tadna se bhee naheen mana. unhon ne apana man chattan se bhee adhaik kattor kiya haai unhon ne pashchattap karane se inakar kiya haai." 
Jeremiah5:4 fir maain ne socha, ye log to kadgal aur abodha hee haain kyonaki ye yahova ka marga aur apane parameshvar ka niyam naheen janate." 
Jeremiah5:5 isaliye maain bade logon ke pas jakar unako sunaunga kyonki ve to yahova ka marga aur apane parameshvar ka niyam janate haain. parantu un sabhon ne milakar jooae ko tod diya haai aur bandhanon ko khol dala haai. 
Jeremiah5:6 is karan van men se aek sinh akar unahen mar dalega, nirjal desh ka aek bhediya unako nash karega. aur aek cheeta unake nagaron ke pas ghaat lagaae rahega, aur jo koi un men se nikale vah faada jaaega kyonki unake aparadha bahut baddh gaae haain aur ve mujh se bahut hee door hatt gaae haain." 
Jeremiah5:7 maain kyonkar tera pap kshama karoon? tere ladkon ne mujh ko chhodkar unakee shapath khai haai jo parameshvar naheen haai. jab maain ne unaka pett bhr diya, tab unhon ne vyabhaichar kiya aur veshyaon ke gharon men bheed kee bheed jate the." 
Jeremiah5:8 ve khailaae-pilaae be-lagam ghodon ke saman ho gaa, ve apane apane padosee kee sree par hinaahinane lage." 
Jeremiah5:9 kya maain aeese kamon ka unhen dand n doon? yahova kee yah vanee haai kya maain aeesee jati se apana palatta n loon? 
Jeremiah5:10 shaharapanah par chaddhke usaka nash to karo, taubhee usaka ant mat kar dalo usakee jad rahane do parantu usakee daliyon ko todkar faenk do, kyonki ve yahova kee naheen haain." 
Jeremiah5:11 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki israaael aur yahooda ke gharanon ne mujh se bada vishvasaghaat kiya haai. 
Jeremiah5:12 unhon ne yahova kee baten jhuttlakar kaha, vah aeesa naheen haai vipaattai ham par n padegee, n ham talavar ko aur n mahangee ko dekhenge." 
Jeremiah5:13 bhavishyadvkta hava ho jaaenge un men ishvar ka vachan naheen haai. unake sath aeesa hee kiya jaaega! 
Jeremiah5:14 is karan senaon ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ye log jo aeesa kahate haai, isaaliye dek, maain apana vachan tere munh men ag, aur is praja ko katt banaunga, aur vah unako bhsm karegee." 
Jeremiah5:15 yahova kee yah vanee haai, he israaael ke gharane, dek, maain tumhare viruddh door se aeesee jaati ko chaddha launga jo samath aur praacheen haai, usakee bhasha tum n samajhoge, aur n yah janoge ki ve log kya kah rahe haain." 
Jeremiah5:16 unaka tarkash khulee kabra haai aur ve sab ke sab shooraveer haain. 
Jeremiah5:17 tumhare pakke khet aur bhojanavastuaen jo tumhare bette-beattyaien ke khane ke liye haain unhen ve kha jaaenge. ve tumharee bhead-bakaariyon aur gaya-baailon ko kha dalenge ve tumharee dakhon aur anjeeron ko kha jaaenge aur jin gaddhvale nagaron par tum bhrosa rakhte ho unhen ve talavar ke bal se nash kar denge. 
Jeremiah5:18 taubhee, yahova kee yah vanee haai, un dinon men bhee maain tumhara ant n kar daloonga." 
Jeremiah5:19 aur jab tum poochhoge ki hamare parameshvar yahova ne ham se ye sab kam kis liye kiae haai, tab tum un se kahana, jis prakar se tum ne mujh ko tyagakar apane desh men doosare devataon kee seva kee haai, usee prakar se tum ko paraye desh men paradeshaiyon kee seva karanee padegee." 
Jeremiah5:20 yakoob ke gharane men yah prachar karo, aur yahooda men yah sunao" 
Jeremiah5:21 he moorkh aur nirbuaddhi logo, tum jo ankhen rahate huae naheen dekhte, jo kan rahate huae naheen sunate, yah suno." 
Jeremiah5:22 yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya tum log mera bhy naheen manate? kya tum mere sammukh naheen thrathrate? maain ne baloo ko samudra ka sivana ttharakar yug yug ka aeesa bandha ttharaya ki vah use landha n sake aur chahe usakee laharen bhee utte, taubhee ve prabal n ho sake, ya jab ve garajen taubhee usako n landha saken." 
Jeremiah5:23 par is praja ka hatteela aur balava karanevala man haai inhon ne balava kiya aur door ho gaae haain. 
Jeremiah5:24 ve man men itana bhee naheen sochate ki hamara parameshvar yahova to barasat ke arambh aur ant donon samayon ka jal samay par barasata haai, aur kattnee ke niyat saptahon ko hamare liye rakhta haai, isaaliye ham usaka bhy manen." 
Jeremiah5:25 parantu tumhare adharma ke kamon hee ke karan ve ruk gaa, aur tumhare papon hee ke karan tumharee bhlai naheen hotee." 
Jeremiah5:26 meree praja men dushtt log paae jate haain jaaise chideemar tak men rahate haai, vaaise hee ve bhee ghaat lagaae rahate haain. ve fanda lagakar manushyon ko apane vash men kar lete haain." 
Jeremiah5:27 jaaisa pinjada chidiyon se bhra ho, vaaise hee unake ghar chhl se bhre rahate haain isee prakar ve baddh gaae aur dhanee ho gaae haain." 
Jeremiah5:28 ve motte aur chikane ho gaae haain. bure kamon men ve seema ko landha gaae haain ve nyay, vishosh karake anathon ka nyay naheen chukate is se unaka kam safal naheen hota ve kangalon ka haka bhee naheen dilate." 
Jeremiah5:29 isaliye, yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya maain in baton ka dand n doon? kya maain aeesee jaati se palatta n loon?" 
Jeremiah5:30 desh men aeesa kam hota haai jis se chakit aur romanchit hona chaahiye. 
Jeremiah5:31 bhachishyadvkta joottmoott bhavishyadanee karate haain aur yajak unake sahare se prabhuta karate haain meree praja ko yah bhata bhee haai, parantu ant ke samay tum kya karoge?" 
Jeremiah6:1 he binyameeaniyo, yarooshalem men se apana apana saman lekar bhago! takoa men naraasinga foonko, aur bethkkerem par jhnda uncha karo kyonki uttar kee disha se anevalee vipaattai badee aur vinash lanevalee haai." 
Jeremiah6:2 siyyon kee sundar aur sukumar bettee ko maain nash karane par hoo. 
Jeremiah6:3 charavahe apanee apanee bhed-bakaariyan sang liae huae us par chaddhkar usake charon or apane tamboo khde karenge, ve apane apane pas kee ghaas chara lenge." 
Jeremiah6:4 ao, usake viruddh yuddh kee taaiyaree karo utto, ham do pahar ko chaddhai karen! hay, hay, din ddhlata jata haai, aur sanjh kee parachhai lambee ho chalee haai!" 
Jeremiah6:5 utto, ham rat hee rat chaddhai karen aur usake mahalon ko ddha den." 
Jeremiah6:6 senaon ka yahova tum se kahata haai, vraksha katt kattkar yarooshalem ke virud damadama bandhae! yah vahee nagar haai jo dand ke yogy haai is men andhor hee anadhor bhra hua haai." 
Jeremiah6:7 jaaisa kooaen men se nity naya jal nikala karata haai, vaaisa hee is nagar men se nity nai burai nikalatee haai is men utpat aur upadrav ka kolahal macha rahata haai chott aur marapeett mere dekhne men nirantar atee haai." 
Jeremiah6:8 he yarooshalem, tadna se hee man le, naheen to too mere man se bhee utar jaaegee aur, maain tujh ko ujadkar nirjan kar daloonga." 
Jeremiah6:9 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, israaael ke sab bache huae dakhlata kee nai ddoonddhkar tode jaaenge dakhke todnevale kee nai us lata kee daaliyon par fir apana hath laga." 
Jeremiah6:10 maain kis se boloon aur kisako chitakar kahoon ki ve manen? dek, ye uncha sunate haai, ve dhyan bhee naheen de sakate dek, yahova ke vachan kee ve ninda karate aur use naheen chahate haain." 
Jeremiah6:11 is karan yahova ka kop mere man men bhr gaya he maain use rokate rokate ukata gaya hoo. bajaaron men bachchon par aur javanon kee sabha men bhee use undel de kyonaki pati apanee patnee ke sath aur adhod booddhe ke sath pakada jaaega. 
Jeremiah6:12 un logon ke ghar aur khet aur striayan sab auron ko ho jaengeen kyonki maain is desh ke rahanevalon par hath baddhaunga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah6:13 kyonaki un men chhotte se lekar bade tak sab ke sab lalachee haain aur kya bhavishyadvkta kya yajak sab ke sab chhl se kam karate haain. 
Jeremiah6:14 ve, shaantai haai, shaantai, aeesa kah kahakar meree praja ke ghaav ko upar hee upar changa karate haai, parantu shaantai kuchh bhee naheen." 
Jeremiah6:15 kya ve kabhee apane gharanait kamon ke karan lajjait hue? nahee, ve kuchh bhee lajjait naheen huae ve laajjait hona janate hee naheen is karan jab aur log neeche gire, tab ve bhee girenge, aur jab maain unako dand dene lagoonga, tab ve ttokar khakar girenge, yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Jeremiah6:16 yahova yon bhee kahata haai, sadkon par khde hokar dekho, aur poochho ki praacheenakal ka achchha marga kaun sa haai, usee men chalo, aur tum apane apane man men chaain paoge. par unhon ne kaha, ham us par n chalenge." 
Jeremiah6:17 maain ne tumhare liye paharuae baaittakar kaha, narasinge ka shabd dhyan se sunana! par unhon ne kaha, ham n sunenge." 
Jeremiah6:18 isaliye, he jaatiyo, suno, aur he mandlee, dek, ki in logon men kya ho raha haai." 
Jeremiah6:19 he prathvee, suna dek, ki maain is jaati par vah vipaattai le aunga jo unakee kalpanaon ka fal haai, kyonaki inhon ne mere vachanon par dhyan naheen lagaya, aur meree shaiksha ko inhon ne nikammee jana haai." 
Jeremiah6:20 mere liye jo loban shaba se, aur sugandhiat narakatt jo door desh se ata haai, isaka kya prayojan haai? tumhare homabaliyon se maain prasann naheen hoo, aur n tumhare melabali mujhe meette lagate haain." 
Jeremiah6:21 is karan yahova ne yon kaha haai, dekho, maain is praja ke age ttokar khaunga, aur bap aur betta, padosee aur mitra, sab ke sab ttokar khakar nash honge." 
Jeremiah6:22 yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, uttar se varan prathvee kee chhor se aek badee jati ke log is desh ke virodha men ubhare jaaenge." 
Jeremiah6:23 ve dhanush aur bachh dhaaran kiae huae aaenge, ve kroor aur nirday haai, aur jab ve bolate haain tab mano samudra garajata haai ve ghaedon par chaddhe huae aaenge, he siyyon, ve veer kee nai sashasr hokar tujh par chaddhai karenge." 
Jeremiah6:24 isaka samachar sunate hee hamare hath ddheele pad gaae haain ham sankatt men pade haain jachcha kee see peeda ham ko uttee haai. 
Jeremiah6:25 maaidan men mat nikalo, marga men bhee n chalo kyonaki vahan shatra kee talavar aur charon or bhy dekh padta haai." 
Jeremiah6:26 he meree praja kamar men ttatt bandha, aur rakh men lott jaaisa aekalaute putra ke liye vilap hota haai vaaisa hee bada shaekamay vilap kara kyonki nash karanevala ham par achanak a padega." 
Jeremiah6:27 maain ne isaaliye tujhe apanee praja ke beech gummatt va gaddh tthara diya ki too unakee chal parakhe aur jan le. 
Jeremiah6:28 ve sab bahut hee hattee haai, ve lutarai karate firate haain un sabhon kee chal bigadee haai, ve nira tamba aur loha hee haain." 
Jeremiah6:29 ghaunkanee jal gai, shaeesha ag men jal gaya ddhalanevale ne vyarth hee ddhala haai kyonki bure log naheen nikale gaae." 
Jeremiah6:30 unaka nam khottee chandee padega, kyonaki yahova ne unako khotta paya haai." 
Jeremiah7:1 jo vachan yahova kee or se yirmayah ke pas pahuncha vah yah haai 
Jeremiah7:2 yahova ke bhvan ke faattk men khda ho, aur yah vachan prachar kar, or kah, he sab yahoodiyo, tum jo yahova ko dandvata karane ke liye in faattkon se pravesh karate ho, yahova ka vachan suno." 
Jeremiah7:3 senaon ka yahova jo israaael ka parameshvar haai, yon kahata haai, apanee apanee chal aur kam sudhaaro, tab maain tum ko is sthan men base rahane doonga." 
Jeremiah7:4 tum log yah kahakar joottee baton par bhrosa mat rakho, ki yahee yahova ka maandair haai yahee yahova ka mandair, yahova ka maandaira." 
Jeremiah7:5 yaadi tum sachamuch apanee apanee chal aur kam sudhaaro, aur sachamuch manushya-manushy ke beech nyay karo," 
Jeremiah7:6 paradeshaee aur anath aur vidhava par andhor n karo is sthan men nidash kee hatya n karo, aur doosare devataon ke peechhe n chalo jis se tumharee haani hotee haai," 
Jeremiah7:7 to maain tum ko is nagar me, aur is desh men jo maain ne tumhare poorvajon ko diya tha, yug yug ke liye rahane doonga." 
Jeremiah7:8 dekho, tum joottee baton par bhrosa rakhte ho jin se kuchh labh naheen ho sakata." 
Jeremiah7:9 tum jo choree, hatya aur vyaabhaichar karate, joottee shapath khate, bal devata ke liye dhoop jalate, aur doosare devataon ke peechhe jinhen tum pahile naheen janate the chalate ho," 
Jeremiah7:10 to kya yah uchit haai ki tum is bhvan men ao jo mera kahalata haai, aur mere samhane khde hokar yah kaho ki ham isaaliye choott gaae haain ki ye sab gharaanait kam karen?" 
Jeremiah7:11 kya yah bhvan jo mera kahalata haai, tumharee draashtti men dakuon kee gufaa ho gaya haai? maain ne svayan yah dekha haai, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah7:12 mera jo sthan shaeelo men tha, jahan maain ne paahile apane nam ka nivas ttharaya tha, vahan jakar dekho ki maain ne apanee praja israaael kee burai ke karan usakee kya dasha kar dee haai?" 
Jeremiah7:13 ab yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki tum jo ye sab kam karate aae ho, aur yadhypi maain tum se bade yatn se baten karata raha hoo, taubhee tum ne naheen suna, aur tumhen bulata aya parantu tum naheen bole," 
Jeremiah7:14 isaliye yah bhvan jo mera kahalata haai, jis par tum bhrosa rakhte ho, aur yah sthan jo maain ne tum ko aur tumhare poorvajon ko diya tha, isakee dasha maain shaeelo kee see kar doonga." 
Jeremiah7:15 aur jaaisa maain ne tumhare sab bhaiyon ko arthat sare aepraaiamiyon ko apane samhane se door kar diya haai, vaaisa hee tum ko bhee door kar doonga." 
Jeremiah7:16 is praja ke liye too praarthna mat kar, n in logon ke liye unche svar se pukar n mujh se binatee kar, kyonaki maain teree naheen sunoonga." 
Jeremiah7:17 kya too naheen dekhta ki ye log yahooda ke nagaron aur yarooshalem kee sadkon men kya kar rahe haain? 
Jeremiah7:18 dek, ladke bale to idhan battorate, bap ag sulagate aur striayan atta goondhatee haai, ki svarga kee ranee ke liye rottyaian chaddhaae aur mujhe krodhait karane ke liye doosare devataon ke liye tapavan den." 
Jeremiah7:19 yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya ve mujhee ko krodha dilate haain? kya ve apane hee ko naheen jis se unake munh par siyahee chhaae?" 
Jeremiah7:20 so prabhu yahova ne yon kaha haai, kya manushy, kya pashu, kya maaidan ke vraksha, kya boomi kee upaj, un sab par jo is sthan men haai, mere kop kee ag bhdkane par haai vah nity jalatee rahegee aur kabhee n bujhegee." 
Jeremiah7:21 senaon ka yahova jo israaael ka parameshvar haai, yon kahata haai, apane melabaliyon ke sath apane homabaali bhee chaddhao aur mans khao." 
Jeremiah7:22 kyonaki jis samay maain ne tumhare poorvajon ko misra desh men se nikala, us samay maain ne unhen homabali aur melabali ke vishy kuchh agyaa n dee thee." 
Jeremiah7:23 parantu maain ne to unako yah agyaa dee ki mere vachan ko mano, tab maain tumhara parameshvar hoonga, aur tum meree praja ttharoge aur jis marga kee maain tumhen agyaa doon usee men chalo, tab tumhara bhla hoga." 
Jeremiah7:24 par unhon ne meree n sunee aur n meree baton par kan lagaya ve apanee hee yuaktaiyon aur apane bure man ke hatt par chalate rahe aur peechhe hatt gaae par age n baddhe. 
Jeremiah7:25 jis din tumhare purakha misra desh se nikale, us din se aj tak maain to apane sare daso, bhvishyadvktaon ko, tumhare pas bade yatn se lagatar bhejata raha" 
Jeremiah7:26 parantu unhon ne meree naheen sunee, n apana kan lagaya unhon ne hatt kiya, aur apane purakhaon se baddhkar buraiyan kee haain." 
Jeremiah7:27 too sab baten un se kahega par ve teree n sunenge too unako bulaaega, par ve n bolenge." 
Jeremiah7:28 tab too un se kah dena, yah vahee jaati haai jo apane parameshvar yahova kee naheen sunatee, aur tadna se bhee naheen manatee sachchai nash ho gai, aur unake munh se door ho gai haai." 
Jeremiah7:29 apane bal mundakar faenk de munde tteelon par chaddhkar vilap ka geet ga, kyonaki yahova ne is samay ke nivaasiyon par krodha kiya aur unhen nikamma janakar tyag diya haai." 
Jeremiah7:30 yahova kee yah vanee haai, isaka karan yah haai ki yahoodiyon ne vah kam kiya haai, jo meree draashtti men bura haai unhon ne us bhvan men jo mera kahalata haai, apanee gharaanait vastuen rakhkar use ashuuddh kar diya haai." 
Jeremiah7:31 aur unhon ne hinnomavanshaiyon kee tarai men topet nam unche sthan banakar, apane bette-beattyaien ko ag men jalaya haai jisakee agyaa maain ne kabhee naheen dee aur n mere man men vah kabhee aya." 
Jeremiah7:32 yahova kee yah vanee haai, isaliye aeese din ate haain ki vah tarai fir n to topet kee aur n hinnomavanshaiyon kee kahalaaegee, varan ghaat kee tarai kahalaaegee aur topet men itanee kabraen hongee ki aur sthan n rahega." 
Jeremiah7:33 isaliye in logon kee lothen akash ke paakshiayon aur prathvee ke pashuuon ka ahar hongee, aur unako bhganevala koi n rahega." 
Jeremiah7:34 us samay maain aeesa karoonga ki yahooda ke nagaron aur yarooshalem kee sadkon men n to harsha aur anand ka shabd sun padega, aur n dulhe va dulhain ka kyonki desh ujad hee ujad ho jaega." 
Jeremiah8:1 yahova kee yah vanee haai, us samay yahooda ke rajao, hakimo, yajako, bhvishyadvktaon aur yarooshalem ke rahanevalon kee haaddiyan kabraen men se nikalakar," 
Jeremiah8:2 soorya, chandrama aur akash ke sare ganon ke samhane faailai jaaengee kyonki ve unheen se praem rakhte, unheen kee seva karate, unheen ke peechhe chalate, aur unheen ke pas jaya karate aur unheen ko dandvata karate the aur n ve ikatthee kee jaaengee n kabra men rakhee jaaengee ve boomi ke upar khad ke saman padee rahengee." 
Jeremiah8:3 tab is bure kul ke bache huae log un sab sthanon men jis men maain ne unhen nikal diya haai, jeevan se mratyu hee ko aadhaik chahenge, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah8:4 too un se yah bhee kah, yahova yon kahata haai ki jab manushy girate haain to kya fir naheen uttte?" 
Jeremiah8:5 jab koi. bhttk jata haai to kya vah lautt naheen ata? fir kya karan haai ki ye yarooshalemee sada door hee door bhttkate jate haain? ye chhl naheen chhodte, aur fir lauttne se inakar karate haain." 
Jeremiah8:6 maain ne dhyan dekar suna, parantu ye tteek naheen bolate in men se kisee ne apanee burai se pachhtakar naheen kaha, hay! maain ne yah kya kiya haai? jaaisa ghaeda ladai men veg se daudta haai, vaaise hee in men se har aek jan apanee hee daud men daudta haai." 
Jeremiah8:7 akash men lagalag bhee apane niyat samayon ko janata haai, aur pandukee, soopabenee, aur saras bhee apane ane ka samay rakhte haain parantu meree praja yahova ka niyam naheen janatee." 
Jeremiah8:8 tum kyonkar kah sakate ho ki ham buddhiman haai, aur yahova kee dee hui vyapastha hamare sath haai? parantu unake shaastriayon ne usaka jootta vivaran likhkar usako joott bana diya haai." 
Jeremiah8:9 buaddhiman laajjait ho gaa, ve vismait huae aur pakade gaae dekho, unhon ne yahova ke vachan ko nikamma jana haai, un men buaddhi kahan rahee?" 
Jeremiah8:10 is karan maain unakee striayon ko doosare purushaen ko aur unake khet doosare aadhaikaariyon ke vash men kar doonga, kyonaki chhotte se lekar bade tak ve sab ke sab lalachee haain kya bhavishyadvkta kya yajak, ve sab ke chhl se kam karate haain." 
Jeremiah8:11 unhon ne, shaantai haai, shaantai aeesa kah kahakar meree praja ke ghaav ko upar hee upar changa kiya, parantu shaaantai kuchh bhee naheen haai." 
Jeremiah8:12 kaya ve gharaanait kam karake lajjait hue? nahee, ve kuchh bhee lajjait naheen hua, ve laajjait hona janate hee naheen. is karan jab aur log neeche gire, tab ve bhee girenge jab unake dand ka samay aaega, tab ve bhee ttokar khakar girenge, yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Jeremiah8:13 yahova kee sah bhee vanree haai, maain un sabhon ka ant kar doonga. n to unakee dakhlataon men dakh pai jaaengee, aur n anjeer ke praksha men anjeer varan unake patte bhee sookh jaaenge, aur jo kuchh maain ne unhen diya haai vah unake pas se jata rahega." 
Jeremiah8:14 ham kyon chupa-chap baaitte haain? ao, ham chalakar gaddhvale nagaron men ikatthe nash ho jaaen kyonki hamara parameshvar yahova ham ko nash karana chahata haai, aur hamen vish peene ko diya haai kyonki ham ne yahova ke viruddh pap kiya haai." 
Jeremiah8:15 ham shaantai kee batt johate the, parantu kuchh kalyan naheen mila, aur changai kee asha karate the, parantu ghabarana hee pada haai." 
Jeremiah8:16 unake ghaedon ka faurrana dan se sun padta haai, aur balavant ghaedon ke hinaahinane ke shabd se sara desh kanp utta haai. unhon ne akar hamare desh ko aur jo kuchh us men haai, aur hamare nagar ko nivaasiyon samet nash kiya haai." 
Jeremiah8:17 kyonaki dekho, maain tumhare beech men aeese sanp aur nag bhejoonga jin par mantra n chalega, aur ve tum ko dsenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah8:18 hay! hay! is shaek kee dasha men mujhe shaaantai kahan se milegee? mera day bheetar hee bheetar tadpata haai! 
Jeremiah8:19 mujhe apane logon kee chillahatt door ke desh se sunai detee haai kya yahova siyyon men naheen haain? kya usaka raja us men naheen? unhon ne kyon mujh ko apanee khodee hui mooraton aur paradesh kee vyarth vastuon ke dara kyon krodha dilaya haai? 
Jeremiah8:20 kattnee ka samay beet gaya, fal todne kee tu bhee samapt ho gai, aur hamara uddhar naheen hua." 
Jeremiah8:21 apane logon ke dukh se maain bhee dukhait hua, maain shaek ka paahirava pahine aati achambhe men ooba hoo." 
Jeremiah8:22 kya gilad desh men kuchh balasan kee aushaadhai naheen? kya us men koi vaaidh naheen? yaadi haai, to mere logon ke ghaav kyon change naheen hue?" 
Jeremiah9:1 bhla hota, ki mera sir jal hee jal, aur meree ankhen asuon ka sota hotee, ki maain rat din apane mare huae logon ke liye rota rahata." 
Jeremiah9:2 bhla hota ki mujhe jangal men battohiyon ka koi ttkaiab milata ki maain apane logon ko chhodkar vaheen chala jata! kyonaki ve sab vyaabhaicharee haai, ve vishvasaghaaatiyon ka samaj haain." 
Jeremiah9:3 apanee apanee jeebh ko ve dhanush kee nai joott holane ke liye taaiyar karate haai, aur desh men balavant to ho gaa, parantu sachchai ke liye naheen ve burai par burai baddhate jate haai, aur ve mujh ko janate hee nahee, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah9:4 apane apane sangee se chaukas raho, apane bhai par bhee bhrosa n rakho kyonki sab bhai nishchay adnga marenge, aur har aek padosee lutarai karate firenge." 
Jeremiah9:5 ve aek doosare ko ttgenge aur sach naheen bolenge unhon ne joott hee bolana seekha haai aur kuttlaita hee men paarishram karate haain. 
Jeremiah9:6 tera nivas chhl ke beech haai chhl hee ke karan ve mera gyaan naheen chahate, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah9:7 isaliye senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain unako tapakar parakoonga, kyonaki apanee praja ke karan maain un se aur kya kar sakata hoon?" 
Jeremiah9:8 unakee jeebh kal ke teer ke saman bedhanevalee haai, us se chhl kee baten nikalatee haain ve munh se to ek doosare se mel kee bat bolate haain par man hee man ek doosare kee ghaat men lage rahate haain." 
Jeremiah9:9 kya maain aeesee baton ka dand n doon? yahova kee sah vanee haai, kya maain aeesee jati se apana palatta n loon?" 
Jeremiah9:10 maain pahadon ke liye ro utoonga aur shaek ka geet gaunga, aur jangal kee charaiyon ke liye vilap ka geet gaunga, kyonki ve aeese jal gaae haain ki koi un men se hokar naheen chalata, aur un men ddhor ka shabd bhee naheen sunai padta pashuu-pakshaee sab bhag gaae haain." 
Jeremiah9:11 maain yarooshalem ko deeh hee deeh karake geedadon ka sthan banaunga aur yahooda ke nagaron ko aeesa ujad doonga ki un men koi n basega. 
Jeremiah9:12 jo buaddhiman murush ho vah isaka bhed samajh le, aur jis ne yahova ke mukh se isaka karan suna ho vah bata de. desh ka nash kyon hua? kyon vah jangal kee nai aeesa jal gaya ki us men se hokar koi naheen chalata?" 
Jeremiah9:13 aur yahova ne kaha, kyonki unhon ne meree vyavastha ko jo maain ne unake age rakhee thee chhod diya aur n meree bat manee aur n usake anusar chale haai," 
Jeremiah9:14 varan ve upane hatt par bal nam devataon ke peechhe chale, jaaisa unake purakhaon ne unako sikhlaya." 
Jeremiah9:15 is kara, senaon ka yahova, israaael ka parameshvar yon kahata haai, sun, maain apanee is praja ko kadvee vastu khailaunga aur vish pilaunga." 
Jeremiah9:16 aur maain un logon ko aeesee jatiyon men titar bitar karoonga jinhen n to ve n unake purakha janate the aur jab tak unaka ant n ho jaae tab tak meree or se talavar unake peechhe padegee. 
Jeremiah9:17 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, socho, aur vilap karanevaliyon ko bulao buddhiman striayon ko batalava bhejo" 
Jeremiah9:18 ve fauta karake ham logon ke liye shaek ka geet gaaen ki hamaree ankhon se ansoo bah chalen aur hamaree palaken jal bahaae. 
Jeremiah9:19 siyyon se shaek ka yah geet sun padta haai, ham kaaise nash ho gaae! ham kyon lajja men pad gaae haai, kyonki ham ko apana desh chhodna pada aur hamare ghar gira diae gaae haain." 
Jeremiah9:20 isaliye, he striayo, yahova ka yah vachan suno, aur usakee yah agyaa mano tum apanee apanee bettyaien ko shaek ka geet, aur apanee apanee padosinon ko vilap ka geet sikhao." 
Jeremiah9:21 kyonaki mratyu hamaree khaidkiyon se hokar hamare mahalon men ghaus ai haai, ki, hamaree sadkon men bachchon ko aur chaukon men javanon ko mitta de." 
Jeremiah9:22 too kah, yahova yon kahata haai, manushyon kee lothen aeesee padee rahengee jaaisa khad khet ke upar, aur pooliyan kattnevale ke peechhe padee rahatee haai, aur unaka koi uttanevala n hoga." 
Jeremiah9:23 yahova yon kahata haai, buddhiman apanee buaddhi par ghamand n kare, n veer apanee veerata par, t dhanee apane dhan par ghamand kare" 
Jeremiah9:24 parantu jo ghamand kare vah isee bat par ghamand kare, ki vah mujhe janata aur samajhta he, ki maain hee vah yahova hoo, jo prathvee par karuna, nyay aur dharma ke kam karata haai kyonaki maain inheen baton se prasann rahata hoo." 
Jeremiah9:25 dekho, yahova kee yah vanee haai ki aeese din anevale haain ki jinaka khtana hua ho, unako khtanarahiton ke saman dand doonga," 
Jeremiah9:26 arthata misiryo, yahoodiyo, aedomiyo, ammoniyo, moaabiyon ko, aur un reagistan ke nivaasiyon ke saman jo apane gal ke balon ko munda dalate haain kyonaki ye sab jatiyen to khtanarahit haai, aur israaael ka sara gharana bhee man men khtanaraahit haai." 
Jeremiah10:1 yahova yon kahata haai, he israaael ke gharane jo vachan yahova tum se kahata haai use suno." 
Jeremiah10:2 anyajatiyon ko chal mat seekho, n unakee nai akash ke chinhon se vismait ho, isaaliye ki anyajaati log un se vismait hote haain." 
Jeremiah10:3 kyonaki deshaen ke logon kee reeatiyan to nikammee haain. moorat to ban men se kisee ka katta hua katt haai jise kareegar ne basoole se banaya haai. 
Jeremiah10:4 log usako sone-chandee se sajate aur hathaide se keel ttonk ttonkakar duddh karate haain ki vah hila-dul n sake. 
Jeremiah10:5 ve khradakar tad ke ped ke saman gol banai jatee haai, par bol naheen sakateen unhen uttaae firana padta haai, kyonki ve chal naheen sakateen. un se mat dro, kyonaki, n to ve kuchh bura kar sakatee haain aur n kuchh bhla." 
Jeremiah10:6 he yahova, tere saman koi naheen haai too mahan haai, aur tera nam parakram men bada haai." 
Jeremiah10:7 he sab jaatiyon ke raja, tujh se kaun n drega? kyonaki yah tere yogy haai anyajatiyon ke sare buddhimanon me, aur unake sare rajyon men tere saman koi naheen haai." 
Jeremiah10:8 parantu ve pashu sareekhe nire moorkh haain moottairyon se kya shaikshaa? ve to katt hee haain! 
Jeremiah10:9 pattar banai hui chandee tashash se lai jatee haai, aur ufaaj se sona. ve kareegar aur sunar ke hathon kee kareegaree haain unake paahirave neele aur baainjanee rang ke vasr haain un men jo kuchh haai vah nipun kareegaron kee kareegaree hee haai." 
Jeremiah10:10 parantu yahova vastav men parameshvar haai jeeavit parameshvar aur sada ka raja vahee haai. usake prakop se prathvee kanpatee haai, aur jaati jati ke log usake krodha ko sah naheen sakate." 
Jeremiah10:11 tum un se yah kahana, ye devata jinhon ne akash aur prathvee ko naheen banaya ve prathvee ke upar se aur akash ke neeche se nashtt ho jaaenge." 
Jeremiah10:12 usee ne prathvee ko apanee samarth se banaya, us ne jagat ko apanee buaddhi se sthiar kiya, aur akash ko apanee praveenta se tan diya haai." 
Jeremiah10:13 jab vah bolata haai tab akash men jal ka bada shabd hota haai, aur prathvee kee chhor se vah kuhare ko uttata haai. vah vashara ke liye bijalee chamakata, aur apane bhndar men se pavan chalata haai." 
Jeremiah10:14 sab manushy pashu sareekhe gyaanarahit haain apanee khodee hui mooraton ke karan sab sunaron kee asha tootttee haai kyonaki unakee ddhalee hui mooraten joottee haai, aur un men sans hee naheen haai." 
Jeremiah10:15 ve vyarth aur tttthe hee ke yogy haain jab unake dand ka samay aaega tab ve nash ho jaaengeen. 
Jeremiah10:16 parantu yakoob ka nij bhag unake saman naheen haai, kyonaki vah to sab ka srajanahar haai, aur israaael usake nij bhag ka gotra haai senaon ka yahova usaka nam haai." 
Jeremiah10:17 he ghore huae nagar kee rahanevalee, apanee gattree boomi par se utta!" 
Jeremiah10:18 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai, maain ab kee bar is desh ke rahanevalon ko mano gofan men dharake faenk doonga, aur unhen aeese aeese sankatt men daloonga ki unakee samajh men bhee naheen aaega." 
Jeremiah10:19 mujh par hay! mera ghaav changa hone ka naheen. fir maain ne socha, yah to rog hee haai, isaliye mujh ko ise sahana chahiye." 
Jeremiah10:20 mera tamboo lootta gaya, aur sab raassaiyan toott gai haain mere ladkebale mere pas se chale gaa, aur naheen haain ab koi naheen raha jo mere tamboo ko tane aur meree kanaten khdee kare." 
Jeremiah10:21 kyonaki charavahe pashu sareekhe haai, aur ve yahova ko naheen pukarate isee karan ve buddhi se naheen chalate, aur unakee sab bheden titara-abitar ho gai haain." 
Jeremiah10:22 sun, aek shabd sunai deta haai! dek, vah a raha haai! uttar disha se bada hullad mach raha haai taaki yahooda ke nagaron ko ujadkar geedadon ka sthan bana de."
