Jeremiah10:23 he yahova, maain jan gaya hoo, ki manushy ka marga usake vash men naheen haai, manushy chalata to he, parantu usake dg usake adhaeen naheen haain." 
Jeremiah10:24 he yahova, meree tadna kar, par nyay se krodha men akar nahee, kaheen aeesa n ho ki maain nash ho jaun." 
Jeremiah10:25 jo jaati tujhe naheen janatee, aur jo tujh se praarthna naheen karate, unheen par apanee jalajalahatt undela kyonaki unhon ne yakoob ko nigal liya, varan, use khakar ant kar diya haai, aur usake nivasasthan ko ujad diya haai." 
Jeremiah11:1 yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha 
Jeremiah11:2 is vacha ke vachan suno, aur yahooda ke purushaen aur yarooshalem ke rahanevalon se kaho." 
Jeremiah11:3 un se kaho, israael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, sraaapit haai vah manushy, jo is vacha ke vachan n mane" 
Jeremiah11:4 jise maain ne tumhare purakhaon ke sath lohe kee bhtthee arthata misra desh men se nikalane ke samay, yah kahake bandhaee thee, meree suno, aur jitanee agyaaaen maain tumhen deta hoo un sabhon ka palan karo. is se tum meree praja ttharoge, aur maain tumhara parameshvar ttharoonga" 
Jeremiah11:5 aur jo shapath maain ne tumhare pitaron se khi thee ki jis desh men doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai, use maain tum ko doonga, use pooree karoonga aur dekho, vah pooree hui haai. yah sunakar maain ne kaha, he yahova, aeesa hee ho." 
Jeremiah11:6 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, ye sab vachan yahood ke nagaron aur yarooshalem kee sadkon men prachar karake kah, is vacha ke vachan suno aur usake anusar chalo." 
Jeremiah11:7 kyonaki jis samay se maain tumhare purakhaon ko misra desh se chhuda le aya tab se aj ke din tak unako draddhta se chitata aya hoo, meree bat suno." 
Jeremiah11:8 parantu anhon ne n sunee aur n meree baton par kan lagaya, kintu apane apane bure man ke hatt par chalate rahe. isaaliye maain ne unake vishay is vacha kee sab baton ko poorn kiya haai jisake manane kee maain ne unhen agyaa dee thee aur unhon ne n manee." 
Jeremiah11:9 fir yahova ne mujh se kaha, yahoodiyon aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon men vidraeh paya gaya haai." 
Jeremiah11:10 jaaise inake purakha mere vachan sunane se inakar karate the, vese hee ye bhee unake adhaman ka anusaran karake doosare devataon ke peechhe chalate aur unakee upasana karate haain israaael aur yahooda ke gharanon ne us vaacha ko jo maain ne unake poorvajon se bandhaee thee, tod diya haai." 
Jeremiah11:11 isaliye yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain in par aeesee vipaattai dalane par hoo jis se ye bach n sakenge aur chahe ye meree dohai den taubhee maain inakee n sunoonga." 
Jeremiah11:12 us samay sarooshalem aur yahooda ke nagaron ke nivasee un devataon kee dohai denge jinake liye ve dhoop jalate haai, parantu ve unakee vipaattai ke samay unako kabhee n bacha sakenge." 
Jeremiah11:13 he yahooda, jitane tere nagar haain utane hee tere devata bhee haain aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ne har aek sadk men us lajjapoorn bal kee veadiyan bana banakar usake liye dhoop jalaya haai." 
Jeremiah11:14 isaliye too meree is praja ke liye praarthna n karana, n koi in logon ke liye unche svar se binatee kare, kyonaki jis samay ye apanee vipaattai ke mare meree dohai denge, tab maain unakee n sunoonga." 
Jeremiah11:15 meree pirya ko mere ghar men kya kam haai? us ne to bahuton ke sath kukarma kiya, aur teree pavitrata pooree reeti se jatee rahee haai. jab too burai karatee haai, tab pusann hotee haai." 
Jeremiah11:16 yahova ne tujh ko haree, manohar, sundar falavalee jalapai to kaha tha, parantu us ne bade hullad ke shabd hote hee us men ag lagai gai, aur usakee daaliyan tod dalee gai." 
Jeremiah11:17 senaon ka yahova, jis ne tujhe lagaya, us ne tujh par vipaattai dalane ke liye kaha haai isaka karan israaael aur yahooda ke gharanon kee yah burai haai ki unhon ne mujhe ris dilane ke liye bal ke nimitt dhoop jalaya." 
Jeremiah11:18 yahova ne mujhe bataya aur yah bat mujhe maloom ho gai kyonki yahova hee ne unakee yuktaiyan mujh par pragatt keen. 
Jeremiah11:19 maain to vadha honevale bhed ke bachche ke saman anajan tha. maain n janata tha ki ve log meree haani kee yuktaiyan yah kahakar karate haai, ao, ham fal samet is vraksha ko ukhad de, aur jeeviton ke beech men se katt dale, tab isaka nam tak fir smaran n rahe." 
Jeremiah11:20 parantu, ab he senaon ke yahova, he dhama nyayee, he antakaran kee baton ke gyaata, too unaka palatta le aur mujhe dikha, kyonaki maain ne apana mukama tere hath men chhod diya haai." 
Jeremiah11:21 isaliye yahova ne mujh se kaha, anatot ke log jo tere praan ke khojee haain aur yah kahate haain ki too yahova ka nam lekar bhavishyadanee n kar, naheen to hamare hathon se marega." 
Jeremiah11:22 isaliye senaon ka yahova unake vishay yon kahata haai, maain unako dand doonga unake javan talavar se, aur unake ladke-ladkiyan bookhon marenge" 
Jeremiah11:23 aur un men se koi bhee n bachega. maain anatot ke logon par yah vipaattai daloonga unake dand ka din anevala haai. 
Jeremiah12:1 he yahova, yaadi maain tujh se mukama ladoo, taubhee too dhama haai mujhe apane sath is vishay par vadavivad karane de. dushtton kee chal kyon safanl hotee haai? kya karan haai ki vishvasaghaatee bahut sukh se rahate haain?" 
Jeremiah12:2 too unako bota aur ve jad bhee pakadte ve baddhte aur falate bhee haain too unake munh ke nikatt haai parantu unake manon se door haai. 
Jeremiah12:3 he yahova too mujhe janata haai too mujhe dekhta haai, aur too ne mere man kee pareeksha karake dekha ki maain teree or kis prakar rahata hoo. jaaise bhed-bakaariyan ghaat hone ke liye jhund men se nikalee jatee haai, vaaise hee unako bhee nikal le aur vadha ke din ke liye taaiyar kara." 
Jeremiah12:4 kab tak desh vilap karata rahega, aur sare maaidan kee ghaas sookhee rahegee? desh ke nivaasiyon kee burai ke karan pashuu-pakshaee sab nash ho gaae haai, kyonki un logon ne kaha, vah hamare ant ko n dekhega." 
Jeremiah12:5 too jo pyadon hee ke sang daudkar thk gaya haai to ghodon ke sang kyonkar barabaree kar sakega? aur yadhypi too shaaantai ke is desh men nidr haai, parantu yaradan ke asapas ke dhane jangal men too kya karega?" 
Jeremiah12:6 kyonaki tere bhai aur tere gharane ke logon ne bhee tera vishvasaghaat kiya haai ve tere peechhe lalakarate haai, yadi ve tujh se meettee baten bhee kahe, taubhee unakee prateeti n karana." 
Jeremiah12:7 maain ne apana ghar chhod diya, apana nij bhag maain ne tyag diya haai maain ne apanee praanapirya ko shatrauon ke vash men kar diya haai." 
Jeremiah12:8 kyonaki mera nij bhag mere dekhne men van ke sinh ke saman ho gaya aur mere viruddh garaja haai is karan maain ne us se baair kiya haai. 
Jeremiah12:9 kya mera nij bhag meree draashtti men chitteevale shaikaree pakshaee ke saman naheen haai? kya shaikaree pakshaee charon or se use ghore huae haain? jao sab jangalee pashuuon ko ikattha karo unako lao ki kha jaaen. 
Jeremiah12:10 bahut se charavahon ne meree dakh kee baree ko bigad kar diya, unhon ne mere bhag ko latada, varan mere manohar bhag ke khet ko sunasan jangal bana diya haai." 
Jeremiah12:11 unhon ne usako ujad diya vah ujadkar mere samhane vilap kar raha haai. sara desh ujad gaya haai, taubhee koi naheen sochata." 
Jeremiah12:12 jangal ke sab munde tteelon par nashak chaddh aae haain kyonaki yahova kee talavar desh ke aek chhor se lekar doosaree chhor tak nigalatee jatee haai kisee manushy ko shaanantai naheen milatee. 
Jeremiah12:13 unhon ne gehoon to boya, parantu katteele ped katte, unhon ne kashtt to uttaya, parantu us se kuchh labh n hua. yahova ke krodha ke bhdkane ke karan tum apane kheton kee upaj ke vishay men laajjait ho." 
Jeremiah12:14 mere dushtt padosee us bhag par hath lagate haai, jisaka bhagee maain ne apanee praja israaael ko banaya haai. unake vishy yahova yon kahata haai ki maain unako unakee boomi men se ukhad daloonga, aur yahooda ke gharane ko bhee unake beech men se ukhdoonga." 
Jeremiah12:15 unhen ukhadne ke bad maain fir un par daya karoonga, aur un men se har ek ko usake nija bhag aur boomi men fir se lagaunga." 
Jeremiah12:16 aur yaadi ve meree praja kee chal seekhkar mere hee nam kee saugandha, yahova ke jeevan kee saugandha, khane lage, jis prakar se unhon ne meree praja ko bal kee saugandha khana sikhlaya tha, tab meree praja ke beech unaka bhee vansh baddhega." 
Jeremiah12:17 parantu yadi ve n mane, to maain us jaati ko aeesa ukhadoonga ki vah fir kabhee n pananpegee, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah13:1 yahova ne mujh se yon kaha, jakar sanee kee aek pettee mol le, use kamar men bandha aur jal men mat bheegane de." 
Jeremiah13:2 tab maain ne aek pettee mol lekar yahova ke vachan ke anusar apanee kamar men bandha lee. 
Jeremiah13:3 tab toosaree bar yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha ki 
Jeremiah13:4 jo pettee too ne mol lekar kaatt imen kas lee haai, use parat ke teer par le ja aur vahan use kadade par kee aek darar men chhpai de." 
Jeremiah13:5 yahova kee is agyaa ke anusar maain ne usako parat ke teer par le jakar chhpai diya. 
Jeremiah13:6 bahut dinon ke bad yahova ne mujh se kaha, ut, fir parat ke pas ja, aur jis pettee ko maain ne tujhe vahan chhpaiane kee agyaa dee use vahan se le le." 
Jeremiah13:7 tab maain parat ke pas gaya or khodakar jis sthan men maain ne pettee ko chhpaiaya tha, vahan se usako nikal liya. aur dekho, pettee bigad gai thee vah kisee kam kee n rahee." 
Jeremiah13:8 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahucha, yahova yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah13:9 isee prakar se maain yahoodiyon ka garva, aur yarooshalem ka bada garva nashtt kar doonga." 
Jeremiah13:10 is dushtt jati ke log jo mere vachan sunane se inakar karate haain jo apane man ke hatt par chalate, doosare devataon ke peechhe chalakar unakee upasana karate or unako dandvata karate haai, ve is pettee ke saman ho jaaenge jo kisee kam kee naheen rahee." 
Jeremiah13:11 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki jis prakar se pettee manushy kee kamar men kasee jatee haai, usee prakar se maain ne israaael ke sare gharane aur yahooda ke sare gharane ko apanee kaatt imen bandha liya tha ki ve meree praja banen aur mere nam aur keettair aur shaebha ka karan ho, parantu unhon ne n mana." 
Jeremiah13:12 isaliye too un se yah vachan kah, israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dakhmadha ke sab kuppe dakhmadha se bhr diae jaaenge. tab ve tujh se kahenge, kya ham naheen janate ki dakhmadha ke sab kuppe dakhmadha se bhr diae jaaenge?" 
Jeremiah13:13 tab too un se kahana, yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain is desh ke sab rahanevalon ko, vishosh karake daudavansh kee gaee par virajaman raja aur yajak aur bhavishyadvkta aadi yarooshalem ke sab nivaasiyon ko apanee koparoopee madira pilakar achet kar doonga." 
Jeremiah13:14 tab maain unhen aek doosare se ttkara doonga arthata bap ko bette se, aur bette ko bap se, yahova kee yah vanee haai. maain un par komalata naheen dikhaunga, n taras khunga aur n daya karake unako nashtt hone se bachaunga." 
Jeremiah13:15 dekho, aur kan lagao, garva mat karo, kyonki yahova ne yon kaha haai." 
Jeremiah13:16 apane parameshvar yahova kee badai karo, is se paahile ki vah andhakar laae aur tumhare panv andhore pahadon par ttokar khaae, aur jab tum prakash ka asara dekho, tab vah usako mratyu kee chhaya se badal aur use ghaer andhakar bana de." 
Jeremiah13:17 aur yaadi tum ise n suno, to maain akele men tumhare garva ke karan rounga, aur meree ankhon se ansuon kee dhaara bahatee rahegee, kyonki yahova kee bheden bandhaua kar lee gai haain." 
Jeremiah13:18 raja aur rajamata se kah, neeche baaitt jao, kyonaki tumhare siron ke shaebhayaman mukutt utar liae gaae haain." 
Jeremiah13:19 daakkhian desh ke nagar ghore gaae haai, koi unhen bacha n sakega sampoorn yahoodee jati bandee ho gai haai, vah pooree reeti se bandhauai men chalee gai haai." 
Jeremiah13:20 apanee okhen uttakar unako dekh jo uttar disha se a rahe haain. vah sundar jhund jo tujhe saunpa gaya tha kahan haai? 
Jeremiah13:21 jab vah tere un mitraen ko tere upar pradhaan ttharaaega jinhen too ne apanee hani karane kee shaiksha dee haai, tab too kya kahegee? kya us samay tujhe jachcha kee see peedaaen n uttengee?" 
Jeremiah13:22 aur yaadi too apane man men soche ki ye baten kis karan mujh par padee haai, to tere bade adharma ke karan tera anchal uttaya gaya haai aur teree aediyan baariyai se nangee kee gai haain." 
Jeremiah13:23 kya habashaee apana chamada, va cheeta apane dhabbe badal sakata haai? yadi ve aeesa kar sake, to too bhee, jo burai karana seekh gai haai, bhlai kar sakegee." 
Jeremiah13:24 is karan maain unako aeesa titara-abitar karoonga, jaaisa boosa jangal ke pavan se titara-abitar kiya jata haai." 
Jeremiah13:25 yahova kee yah vanee haai, tera hissa aur mujh se ttharaya hua tera bhag yahee haai, kyonaki too ne mujhe boolakar joott par bhrosa rakha haai." 
Jeremiah13:26 isaliye maain bhee tera anchal tere munh tak uttaunga, tab teree laj janee jaaegee." 
Jeremiah13:27 vyabhaichar aur chochala aur chhnaialapan aadi tere ghainaune kam jo too ne maaidan aur tteelon par kiae haai, ve sab maain ne dekhe haain. he yarooshalem, tujh par hay! too apane ap ko kab tak shuuddh n karegee? aur kitane din tak too banee rahegee?" 
Jeremiah14:1 yahova ka vachan jo yirmayah ke pas sookhe varsha ke vishay men pahuncha 
Jeremiah14:2 yahooda vilap karata aur faattkon men log shaek ka pahirava pahine huae boomi par udas baaitte haain aur yarooshalem kee chillahatt akash tak pahunch gai haai. 
Jeremiah14:3 aur unake bade log unake chhotte logon ko panee ke liye bhejate haain ve gadhon par akar panee naheen pate isaliye choochhe bartan liae huae ghar lautt jate haain ve lajjait aur nirash hokar sir ddhanp lete haain. 
Jeremiah14:4 desh men panee n barasane se boomi men darar pad gaae haai, is karan kisan log nirash hokar sir ddhanp lete haain." 
Jeremiah14:5 haarinee bhee maaidan men bachcha janakar chhod jatee haai kyonaki haree ghaas naheen milatee. 
Jeremiah14:6 jangalee gadahe bhee munde tteelon par khde huae geedadon kee nai hanfate haain unakee ankhen dhaundhala jatee haain kyonaki hariyalee kuchh bhee naheen haai. 
Jeremiah14:7 he yahova, hamare adharma ke kam hamare viruddh sakshaee de rahe haai, ham tera sang chhodkar bahut door bhttk gaae haai, aur ham ne tere viruddh pap kiya haai taubhee, too apane nam ke nimitt kuchh kara." 
Jeremiah14:8 he israaael ke adhaar, sankatt ke samay usaka bachanevala too hee haai, too kyon is desh men paradeshaee kee nai haai? too kyon us battohee ke saman haai jo rat bhr rahane ke liye kaheen ttkaita ho?" 
Jeremiah14:9 too kyon aek vismait purush ya aeese veer ke saman haai jo bacha n sake? taubhee he yahova too hamare beech men haai, aur ham tere kahalate haain isaliye hamako n taja." 
Jeremiah14:10 yahova ne in logon ke vishay yon kaha inako aeesa bhttkana achchha lagata haai ye kukarma men chalane se naheen ruke isaaliye yahova in se prasann naheen haai, vah inaka adharma smaran karega aur unake pap ka dand dega." 
Jeremiah14:11 fir yahova ne mujh se kaha, is praja kee bhlai ke liye praarthna mat kara." 
Jeremiah14:12 chahe ve upavas bhee kare, taubhee maain inakee duhai n sunoonga, aur chahe ve homabali aur annabali chaddhaae, taubhee maain un se prasann n hounga maain talavar, mahangee aur maree ke dara inaka ant kar daloonga." 
Jeremiah14:13 tab maain ne kaha, hay, prabhu yahova, dek, bhvishyadvkta in se kahate haain ki n to tum par talavar chalegee aur n mahangee hogee, yahova tum ko is sthan men sada kee shaantai dega." 
Jeremiah14:14 aur yahova ne mujh se kaha, ye bhvishyadvkta mera nam lekar joottee bhavishyadanee karate haai, maain ne unako n to bheja aur n kuchh agyaa dee aur n un se koi bhee bat kahee. ve tum logon se darshan ka jootta dava karake apane hee man se vyarth aur dhaekhe kee bhavishyadanee karate haain." 
Jeremiah14:15 is karan jo bhvishyadvkta mere bina bheje mera nam lekar bhvishyadanee karate haain ki us desh men n to talavar chalegee aur n mahangee hogee, unake vishay yahova yon kahata haai, ki, ve bhvishyadvkta ap talavar aur mahangee ke dara nash kiae jaaenge." 
Jeremiah14:16 aur jin logon se ve bhavishyadanee kahate haai, ve mahangee aur talavar ke dara mar jane par is prakar yarooshalem kee sadkon men faenk diae jaaenge, ki n to unaka, n unakee striayon ka aur n unake bette-bettyaien ka koi mittee denevala rahega. kyonki maain unakee burai unheen ke upar undeloonga." 
Jeremiah14:17 too un se yah bat kah, meree okhon se din rat ansoo lagatar bahate rahe, ve n ruken kyonki mere logon kee kunvaree bettee bahut hee kuchalee gai aur ghaayal hui haai." 
Jeremiah14:18 yaadi maain maaidan men jau, to dekho, talavar ke mare huae pade haain! aur yaadi maain nagar ke bheetar au, to dekho, bookh se adhmooae pade haain! kyonaki bhvishyadvkta aur yajak desh men kamai karate firate aur samajh naheen rakhte haain." 
Jeremiah14:19 kya too ne yahooda se bilakul hath utta liya? kya too siyyon se ghain karata haai? nahee, too ne kyon ham ko aeesa mara haai ki ham change ho hee naheen sakate? ham shaantai kee batt johate rahe, taubhee kuchh kalyan naheen hua aur yadhyapi ham achchhe ho jane kee asha karate rahe, taubhee ghabarana hee pada haai." 
Jeremiah14:20 he yahova, ham apanee dushttta aur apane purakhaon ke adharma ko bhee man lete haai, kyonki ham ne tere viruddh pap kiya haai." 
Jeremiah14:21 apane nam ke nimitt hamen n ttukara apane tejomay sinhasan ka apaman n kara jo vacha too ne hamare sath bandhae, use smaran kar aur use n tod." 
Jeremiah14:22 kya anyajaatiyon kee mooraton men se koi vashara kar sakata haai? kya akash jhadiyan laga sakata haai? he hamare parameshvar yahova, kya too hee in sab baton ka karanevala naheen haai? ham tera hee asara dekhte rahenge, kyonaki in saree vastuon ka srajanahar too hee haai." 
Jeremiah15:1 fir yahova ne mujh se kaha, yaadi moosa aur shamooael bhee mere samhane khde hote, taubhee mera man in logon kee or n firata. inako mere samhane se nikal do ki ve nikal jaaen!" 
Jeremiah15:2 aur yaadi ve tujh se poochhen ki ham kahan nikal jaaen? to kahana ki yahova yon kahata haai, jo maranevale haai, ve marane ko chale jaae, jo talavar se maranevale haai, ve talavar se marane ko jo akal se maranevale haai, ve akal se marane ko, aur jo bandhauae honevale haai, ve bandhauai men chale jaaeen." 
Jeremiah15:3 maain unake viruddh char prakar ke vinash ttharaunga mar dalane ke liye talavar, faad dalane ke liye kutte, noch dalane ke liye akash ke pakshae, aur faadkar khane ke liye maaidan ke hinsak jantu, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah15:4 yah hijaakiyyah ke putra, yahooda ke raja manashsho ke un kamon ke karan hoga jo us ne yarooshalem men kiae haai, aur maain unhen aeesa karoonga ki ve prathvee ke rajy rajy men mare mare firenge." 
Jeremiah15:5 he yarooshalem, tujh par kaun taras khaaega, aur kaun tere liye shaek karega? kaun tera kushal poochhne ko teree or mudega?" 
Jeremiah15:6 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki too mujh ko tyagakar peechhe hatt gai haai, isaaliye maain tujh par hath baddhakar tera nash karoonga kyonki, maain taras khate khate ukata gaya hoo." 
Jeremiah15:7 maain ne unako desh ke faattkon men soop se fattk diya haai unhon ne kumarga ko naheen chhoda, is karan maain ne apanee praja ko nirvash kar diya, aur nash bhee kiya haai." 
Jeremiah15:8 unakee vidhavaae mere dekhne men samudra kee baloo ke kinakon se adhaik ho gai haain unake javanon kee mataon ke viruddh dupaharee hee ko maain ne lutteron ko ttharaya haai maain ne unako achanak sankatt men dal diya aur ghabara diya haai. 
Jeremiah15:9 sat ladkon kee mata bhee behal ho gai aur praan bhee chhod diya usaka soorya dopahar hee ko ast ho gaya usakee asha toott gai aur usaka munh kala ho gaya. aur jo rah gaae haain unako bhee maain shatrauon kee talavar se marava daloonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah15:10 he meree mata, mujh par hay, ki too ne mujh aeese manushy ko utpann kiya jo sansar bhr se jhgada aur vadaavivad karanevala tthara haai! n to maain ne vyaj ke liye rupaye dia, aur n kisee se udhaar liae haai, taubhee log mujhe kosate haain." 
Jeremiah15:11 yahova ne kaha, nishchay maain teree bhlai ke liye tujhe draddh karoonga vipaattai aur kashtt ke samay maain shatra se bhee teree binatee karaunga." 
Jeremiah15:12 kya koi peetal va loha, uttar disha ka loha tod sakata haai?" 
Jeremiah15:13 tere sab papon ke karan jo sarvatra desh men huae haain maain teree dhana-sampattai aur khjane, bina dam diae lutt jane doonga." 
Jeremiah15:14 maain aeesa karoonga ki vah shatrauon ke hath aeese desh men chala jaaega jise too naheen janatee haai, kyonaki mere krodha kee ag bhdk uttee haai, aur vah tum ko jalaaegee." 
Jeremiah15:15 he yahova, too to janata haai mujhe smaran kar aur meree sudhai lekar mere satanevalon se mera palatta le. too dhaeeraj ke sath krodha karanevala haai, isaliye mujhe n utta le tere hee nimitt meree namadharai hui haai." 
Jeremiah15:16 jab tere vachan mere pas pahunche, tab maain ne unhen mano kha liya, aur tere vachan mere man ke harsha aur anand ka karan hue kyonki, he senaon ke parameshvar yahova, maain tera kahalata hoo." 
Jeremiah15:17 teree chhaya mujh par iui maain man bahalanevalon ke beech baaittkar prasann naheen hua tere hath ke dabav se maain akela baaitta, kyonaki too ne mujhe krodha se bhr diya tha." 
Jeremiah15:18 meree peeda kyon lagatar banee rahatee haai? meree chott kee kyon koi aushaadhai naheen haai? kya too sachamuch mere liye dhaekha denevalee nadee aur sookhnevale jal ke saman hoga? 
Jeremiah15:19 yah sunakar yahova ne yon kaha, yadi too fire, to maain firase tujhe apane samhane khda karoonga. yaadi too anamol ko kahe aur nikamme ko n kahe, tab too mere mukh ke saman hoga. ve log teree or firenge, parantu too unakee or n firana." 
Jeremiah15:20 aur maain tujh ko un logon ke samhane peetal kee draddh shaharapanah banaunga ve tujh se ladenge, parantu tujh par prabal n honge, kyonaki maain tujhe bachane aur tera uddhar karane ke liye tere sath hoo, yahova kee yah vanee haai. maain tujhe dushtt logon ke hath se bachaunga," 
Jeremiah15:21 aur upadravee logon ke panje se chhuda loonga. 
Jeremiah16:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah16:2 is sthan men vivah karake bette-bettyaian mat janma. 
Jeremiah16:3 kyonaki jo bette-beattyaian is sthn men utpann hon aur jo mataaen unhen janen aur jo pita unhen is desh men janmaae," 
Jeremiah16:4 unake vishay yahova yon kahata haai, ve buree buree beemaariyon se marenge. unake liye koi chhatee n peettega, n unako mittee dega ve boomi ke upar khad kee nai pade rahenge. ve talavar aur mahangee se mar mittenge, aur unakee lothen akash ke pakshiayon aur maaidan ke pashuuon ka ahar hongee." 
Jeremiah16:5 yahova ne kaha, jis ghar men ronapeettna ho us men n jana, n chhatee peettne ke liye kaheen jana aur n in logon ke liye shaek karana kyonki yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain ne apanee shaantai aur karuna aur daya in logon par se utta lee haai." 
Jeremiah16:6 is karan is desh ke chhotte-bade sab marenge, n to inako mittee dee jaaegee, n log chhatee peettenge, n apana shareer cheerenge, aur n sir mundaaenge. inake liye koi shaek karanevalon ko rottee n battenge ki shaek men unhen shaantai den" 
Jeremiah16:7 aur n log pita va mata ke marane par kisee ko shaantai ke liye kattore men dakhmadha pilaaenge. 
Jeremiah16:8 too jevanar ke ghar men inake sath khane-peene ke liye n jana. 
Jeremiah16:9 kyonaki senaon ka yahova, israaael ka parameshvar yon kahata haai, dek, tum logon ke dekhte aur tumhare hee dinon men maain aeesa karoonga ki is sthan men n to harsha aur n anand ka shabd sunai padega, n dulhe aur n dualhain ka shabda." 
Jeremiah16:10 aur jab too in logon se ye sab baten kahe, aur ve tujh se poochhen ki yahova ne hamare upar yah saree badee vipaattai dalane ke liye kyon kaha haai? hamara adharma kya haai aur ham ne apane parameshvar yahova ke viruddh kaun sa pap kiya haai?" 
Jeremiah16:11 to too in logon se kahana, yahova kee yah vanee haai, kyonki tumhare purakha mujhe tyagakar doosare devataon ke peechhe chale, aur unakee upasana karake unako dandvata kee, aur mujh ko tyag diya aur meree vyavastha ka palan naheen kiya," 
Jeremiah16:12 or jitanee burai tumhare purakhaon ne kee thee, us se bhee adhaik tum karate ho, kyonki tum apane bure man ke hatt par chalate ho aur meree naheen sunate" 
Jeremiah16:13 is karan maain tum ko is desh se ukhadkar aeese desh men faenk doonga, jisako n to tum janate ho aur n tumhare purakha janate the aur vahan tum rata-din doosare devataon kee upasana karate rahoge, kyonaki vahan maain tum par kuchh anugrah n karoonga." 
Jeremiah16:14 fir yahova kee yah vanee hui, dekho, aeese din anevale haain jin men fir yah n kaha jaaega ki yahova jo israaaeliyon ko misra desh se chhuda le aya usake jeevan kee saugandha," 
Jeremiah16:15 varan yah kaha jaaega ki yahova jo israaaeliyon ko uttar ke desh se aur un sab deshaen se jahan us ne unako barabas kar diya tha chhuda le aya, usake jeevan kee saugandha. kyonki maain unako unake nij desh men jo maain ne unake poorvajon ko diya tha, lautta le aunga." 
Jeremiah16:16 dekho, yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maai bahut se machhuon ko bulava bhejoonga ki ve in logon ko pakad le, aur, fir maain bahut se bahealiyon ko bulava bhejoonga ki ve inako aher karake sab pahadon aur pahaadiyon par se aur chattanon kee dararon men se nikalen." 
Jeremiah16:17 kyonaki unaka poora chala-chalan meree ankhon ke samhane pragatt haai vah meree draashtti se chhpai naheen haai, n unaka adharma meree akhon se gupt haai. so maain unake adharma aur pap ka doona dand doonga," 
Jeremiah16:18 kyonaki unhon ne mere desh ko apanee gharaanait vastuon kee lothon se ashuuddh kiya, aur mere nij bhag ko apanee ashuuddhata se bhr diya haai." 
Jeremiah16:19 he yahova, he mere bal aur draddh gaddh, sankatt ke samay mere sharansthan, jaatijaati ke log prathvee kee chahunor se tere pas akar kahenge, nishchay hamare purakha joottee, vyarth aur nishfal vastuon ko apanate aae haain." 
Jeremiah16:20 kya manushy ishvaron ko banaae? nahee, ve ishvar naheen ho sakate!" 
Jeremiah16:21 is kara, aek is bar, maain in logon ko apana bhujabal aur parakram dikhaunga, aur ve janenge ki mera nam yahova haai." 
Jeremiah17:1 yahooda ka pap lohe kee ttankee aur heere kee nok se likha hua haai vah unake dayaroopee pattyai aur unakee vediyon ke seengon par bhee khuda hua haai. 
Jeremiah17:2 unakee veadiyan aur ashora nam deaviyan jo hare pedon ke pas aur unche tteelon ke upar haai, ve unake ladkon ko bhee smaran rahatee haain." 
Jeremiah17:3 he mere parvat, too jo maaidan men haai, teree dhana-sampaattai aur bhndar maain tere pap ke karan lutt jane doonga, aur tere pooja ke unche sthan bhee jo tere desh men paae jate haain." 
Jeremiah17:4 too apane hee dosh ke karan apane us bhag ka aadhaikaree n rahane paaega jo maain ne tujhe diya haai, aur maain aeesa karoonga ki too anajane desh men apane shatrauon kee seva karega, kyonki too ne mere krodha kee ag aeesee bhdkai jo sarvada jalatee rahegee." 
Jeremiah17:5 yahova yon kahata haai, sraaapit haai vah purush jo manushy par bhrosa rakhta haai, aur usaka sahara leta haai, jisaka man yahova se bhttk jata haai." 
Jeremiah17:6 vah nirjal desh ke adhamooae ped ke saman hoga aur kabhee bhlai n dekhega. vah nirjal aur nirjan tatha lonachhai boomi par basega. 
Jeremiah17:7 dhany haai vah purush jo yahova par bhrosa rakhta haai, jis ne parameshvar ko apana adhaar mana ho." 
Jeremiah17:8 vah us vraksha ke saman hoga jo nadee ke teer par laga ho aur usakee jad jal ke pas faailee ho jab ghaam hoga tab usako n lagega, usake patte hare rahenge, aur sookhe varsha men bhee unake vishay men kuchh chinta n hogee, kyonki vah tab bhee falata rahega." 
Jeremiah17:9 man to sab vastuon se adhaik dhaekh denevala hota haai, us men asadhy rog laga haai usaka bhed kaun samajh sakata haai?" 
Jeremiah17:10 maain yahova man kee khojata aur day ko janchata hoo taaki pratyek jan ko usakee chala-chalan ke anusar arthata usake kamon ka fal doon. 
Jeremiah17:11 jo anyay se dhan battorata haai vah us teetar ke saman hota haai jo doosaree chidiya ke diae huae andon ko setee haai, usakee adhaee ayu men hee vah us dhan ko chhod jata haai, aur ant men vah mooddh hee ttharata haai." 
Jeremiah17:12 hamara paavitra aradhanalay aadi se unche sthan par rakhe huae aek tejomay sinhasan ke saman haai. 
Jeremiah17:13 he yahova, he israaael ke adhaar, jitane tujhe chhod dete haain ve sab laajjait honge jo tujh se bhttk jate haain unake nam boomi hee par likhe jaaenge, kyonaki unhon ne bahate jal ke sote yahova ko tyag diya haai." 
Jeremiah17:14 he yahova mujhe changa kar, tab maain changa ho jaunga mujhe bacha, tab maain bach jaunga kyonaki maain teree hee stuati karata hoo." 
Jeremiah17:15 sun, ve mujh se kahate haai, yahova ka vachan kahan raha? vah abhee poora ho jaae!" 
Jeremiah17:16 parantu too mera hal janata haai, maain ne tere peechhe chalate huae utavalee karake charavahe ka kam naheen chhoda n maain ne us anevalee vipaattai ke din kee lalasa kee haai jo kuchh maain bola vah tujh par pragatt tha." 
Jeremiah17:17 mujhe n ghabara sankatt ke din too hee mera sharansthan haai. 
Jeremiah17:18 he yahova, meree asha toottne n de, mere satanevalon hee kee asha tootte unheen ko vismait kara parantu mujhe nirasha se bacha un par vipaattai dal aur unako chakanachoor kar de!" 
Jeremiah17:19 yahova ne mujh se yon kaha, jakar sadar faattk men khda ho jis se yahooda ke raja varan yarooshalem ke sab rahanevale bheetara-bahar aya jaya karate haain" 
Jeremiah17:20 aur un se kah, he yahooda ke rajao aur sab yahoodiyo, he yarooshalem ke sab nivaasiyo, aur sab logo jo in faattkon men se hokar bheetar jate ho, yahova ka vachan suno." 
Jeremiah17:21 yahova yon kahata haai, savadhaan raho, vishraam ke din koi bojh mat uttao aur n koi bojh yarooshalem ke faattkon ke bheetar le ao." 
Jeremiah17:22 vishraam ke din apane apane ghar se bhee koi bojh bahar mat leo aur n kisee reeati ka kam kaj karo, varan us agyaa ke anusar jo maain ne tumhare purakhaon ko dee thee, vishraam ke din ko pavitra mana karo." 
Jeremiah17:23 parantu unhon ne n suna aur n kan lagaya, parantu isake vipareet hatt kiya ki n sunen aur tadna se bhee n manen." 
Jeremiah17:24 parantu yadi tum sachamuch meree suno, yahova kee yah vanee haai, aur vishraam ke din is nagar ke faattkon ke bheetar koi bojh n le ao aur vishraamadin ko pavitra mano, aur us men kisee reeati ka kam kaj n karo," 
Jeremiah17:25 tab to daud kee gaee par virajaman raja, rathon aur ghaedon par chaddhe huae haakim aur yahooda ke log aur yarooshalem ke nivasee is nagar ke faattkon se hokar pravesh kiya karenge aur yah nagar sarvada basa rahega." 
Jeremiah17:26 aur log homabaali, melabali annabali, loban aur dhanyavadabali liae huae yahooda ke nagaron se aur yarooshalem ke asapas se, binyameen ke desh aur neeche ke desh se, pahadee desh aur dakkhian desh se, yahova ke bhvan men aya karenge." 
Jeremiah17:27 parantu yadi tum meree sunakar vishraam ke din ko pavitra n mano, aur us din yarooshalem ke faattkon se bojh liae huae pravesh karate raho, to maain yarooshalem ke faattkon men ag lagaunga aur us se yarooshalem ke mahal bhee bhsm ho jaaenge aur vah ag fir n bujhegee." 
Jeremiah18:1 yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha, uttkar kumhar ke ghar ja," 
Jeremiah18:2 aur vahan maain tujhe apane vachan sunavaunga. 
Jeremiah18:3 so maain kumhar ke ghar gaya aur kya dekha ki vah chak par kuchh bana raha haai! 
Jeremiah18:4 aur jo mittee ka basan vah bana raha tha vah bigad gaya, tab us ne usee ka doosara basan apanee samajh ke anusar bana diya." 
Jeremiah18:5 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha, he israaael ke gharane," 
Jeremiah18:6 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki is kumhar kee nai tumhare sath kya maain bhee kam naheen kar sakata? dek, jaaisa mittee kumhar ke hath men rahatee haai, vaaisa hee he israaael ke gharane, tum bhee mere hath men ho." 
Jeremiah18:7 jab maain kisee jaati va rajy ke vishay kahoon ki use ukhadoonga va ddha doonga athva nash karoonga," 
Jeremiah18:8 tab yaadi us jati ke log jisake vishay maain ne kah bat kahee ho apanee burai se fire, to maain us vipaattai ke vishay jo maain ne un par dalane ko ttana ho pachhtaunga." 
Jeremiah18:9 aur jab maain kisee jaati va rajy ke vishay kahoon ki maain use banaunga aur ropoonga 
Jeremiah18:10 tab yaadi ve us kam ko karen jo meree drashtti men bura haai aur meree bat n mane, to maain us bhlai ke vishy jise maain ne unake liye karane ko kaha ho, pachhtaunga." 
Jeremiah18:11 isaliye ab too yahooda aur yarooshalem ke nichaasiyoen se yah kah, yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain tumharee haani kee yuktai aur tumhare viruddh prabandha kar raha hoo. isaaliye tum apane apane bure marga se firo aur apana apana chalachalan aur kam sudhaaro." 
Jeremiah18:12 parantu ve kahate haai, aeesa naheen hone ka, ham to apanee hee kalpanaon ke anusar chalenge aur apane bure man ke hatt par bane rahenge." 
Jeremiah18:13 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, anyajaatiyon se poochh ki aeesee baten kya kabhee kisee ke sunane men ai haai? israaael kee kumaree ne jo kam kiya haai usake sunane se rom rom khde ho jate haain." 
Jeremiah18:14 kya labanon ka him jo chattan par se maaidan men bahata haai band ho sakata haai? kya vah ttnda jal jo door se bahata haai kabhee sookh sakata haai? 
Jeremiah18:15 parantu meree praja mujhe bool gai haai ve nikammee vastuon ke liye dhoop jalate haain unhon ne apane praacheenakal ke magan men ttokar khai haai, aur pagadandiyon aur behad magan men bhttk gaae haain." 
Jeremiah18:16 is se unaka desh aeesa ujad ho gaya haai ki log us par sada talee bajate rahenge aur jo koi usake pas se chale vah chaakit hoga aur sir hilaaega. 
Jeremiah18:17 maain unako puravai se udakar shatra ke samhane se titara-abitar kar doonga. unakee vipaattai ke din maain unako munh naheen parantu peett dikhaunga. 
Jeremiah18:18 tab ve kahane lage, chalo, yirmayah ke viruddh yuaktai kare, kyonki n yajak se vyavastha, n gyaanee se sammati, n bhavishyadvkta se vachan door honge. ao, ham usakee koi bat pakadkar usako nash karaaen aur fir usakee kisee bat par dhyan n den." 
Jeremiah18:19 he yahova, meree or dhyan de, aur jo log mere sath jhgadte haain unakee baten suna." 
Jeremiah18:20 kya bhlai ke badale men burai ka vyavahar kiya jaae? too is bat ka smaran kar ki maain unakee bhlai ke liye tere samhane praarthna karane ko khda hua jis se teree jalajalahatt un par se utar jaa, aur ab unhon ne mere praan lene ke liye gadha khoda haai." 
Jeremiah18:21 isaliye unake ladkebalon ko bookh se marane de, ve talavar se katt mare, aur unakee striayan nirvash aur vidhava ho jaaen. unake purush maree se mare, aur unake javan ladai men talavar se mare jaaen." 
Jeremiah18:22 jab too un par achanak shatraudal chaddhaa, tab unake gharon se chillahatt sunai de! kyonki unhon ne mere liye gadha khoda aur mere fansane ko fande lagaae haain." 
Jeremiah18:23 he yahova, too unakee sab yuaktaiyan janata haai jo ve meree mratyu ke liye karate haain. is karan too unake is adharma ko n ddhanp, n unake pap ko apane samhane se mitta. ve tere dekhte hee ttokar khakar gir jaae, apane krodha men akar un se isee prakar ka vyavahar kara." 
Jeremiah19:1 yahova ne yon kaha, too jakar kumhar se mittee kee banai hui aek surahee mol le, aur praja ke kuchh puraniyon men se aur yajakon men se bhee kuchh praacheenon ko sath lekar," 
Jeremiah19:2 hinnomiyon kee tarai kee or us faattk ke nikatt chala ja jahan tteekare faenk diae jate haain aur jo vachan maain kahoo, use vahan prachar kara." 
Jeremiah19:3 too yah kahana, he yahooda ke rajao aur yarooshalem ke sab nivaasiyo, yahova ka vachan suno. israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, is sthan par maain aeesee vipaattai dalane par hoo ki jo koi usaka samachar sune, us par sannatta chha jaaega." 
Jeremiah19:4 kyonaki yahan ke logon ne mujhe tyag diya, aur is sthan men doosare devataon ke liye jinako n to ve janate haai, aur n unake purakha va yahooda ke purane raja janate the dhoop jalaya haai aur isako paraya kar diya haai aur unhon ne is sthan ko nidashaen ke lohoo se bhr diya," 
Jeremiah19:5 aur bal kee pooja ke unche sthanon ko banakar apane ladkebalon ko bal ke liye hom kar diya, yadhypi maain ne kabhee bhee jisakee agyaa naheen dee, n usakee charcha kee aur n vah kabhee mere man men aya." 
Jeremiah19:6 is karan yahova kee yah vanee haai ki aeese din ate haain ki yah sthan fir topet va hinnomiyon kee tarai n kahalaaega, varan ghaat hee kee tarai kahalaaega." 
Jeremiah19:7 aur maain is sthan men yahooda aur yarooshalem kee yuaktaiyon ko nishfal kar doonga aur unhen unake praanon ke shatrauon ke hath kee talavar chalavakar gira doonga. unakee lothon ko maain akash ke pakshiayon aur boomi ke jeevajantuon ka ahar kar doonga. 
Jeremiah19:8 aur maain is nagar ko aeesa ujad doonga ki log ise dekhkar drenge jo koi isake pas se hokar jaae vah isakee sab vipaattaiyon ke karan chakit hoga aur ghabaraaega. 
Jeremiah19:9 aur ghair jane aur us saketee ke samay jis men unake praan ke shatra unhen dal denge, maain unake bette-beattyaien ka mans unhen khailaunga aur aek doosare ka bhee mans khailaunga." 
Jeremiah19:10 tab too us surahee ko un manushyon ke samhane tod dena jo tere sang jaaenge," 
Jeremiah19:11 aur un se kahana, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki jis prakar yah mittee ka basan jo toott gaya ki fir banaya n ja sake, isee prakar maain is desh ke logon ko aur is nagar ko tod daloonga. aur topet nam tarai men itanee kabraen hongee ki kabra ke liye aur sthan n rahega." 
Jeremiah19:12 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain is sthan aur isake rahanevalon ke sath aeesa hee kam karoonga, maain is nagar ko topet ke saman bana doonga." 
Jeremiah19:13 aur yarooshalem ke ghar aur yahooda ke rajaon ke bhvan, jinakee chhton par akash kee saree sena ke liye dhoop jalaya gaya, aur any devataon ke liye tapavan diya gaya haai, ve sab topet ke saman ashuuddh ho jaaenge." 
Jeremiah19:14 tab yirmayah topet se lauttkar, jahan yahova ne use bhvishyadanee karane ko bheja tha, yahova ke bhvan ke angan men khda hua, aur sab logon se kahane laga" 
Jeremiah19:15 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata he, dekho, sab ganvon samet is nagar par vah saree vipaattai dalana chahata hoo jo maain ne is par lane ko kaha haai, kyonaki unhon ne hatt karake mere vachan ko naheen mana haai." 
Jeremiah20:1 jab yirmayah yah bhvishyadanee kar raha tha, tab immer ka putra pashahoor ne jo yajak aur yahova ke bhvan ka pradhaan rakhvala tha, vah sab suna." 
Jeremiah20:2 so pashahoor ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko mara aur use us katt men dal diya jo yahova ke bhvan ke upar binyameen ke faattk ke pas haai. 
Jeremiah20:3 bihan ko jab pashahoor ne yirmayah ko katt men se nikalavaya, tab yirmayah ne us se kaha, yahova ne tera nam pashahoor naheen magormissabeeb rakha haai." 
Jeremiah20:4 kyonaki yahova ne yon kaha haai, dek, maain tujhe tere liye aur tere sab mitraen ke liye bhee bhy ka karan ttharaunga. ve apane shatrauon kee talavar se tere dekhte hee vadha kiae jaaenge. aur maain sab yahoodiyon ko babul ke raja ke vash men kar doonga vah unako bandhaua karake babul men le jaaega, aur talavar se mar dalega." 
Jeremiah20:5 fir maain is nagar ke sare dhan ko aur is men kee kamai aur sab anamol vastuon ko aur yahooda ke rajaon ka jitana rakha hua dhan haai, us sab ko unake shatrauon ke vash men kar doonga aur ve usako loottkar apana kar lenge aur babul men le jaaenge." 
Jeremiah20:6 aur, he pashahoor, too un sab samet jo tere ghar men rahate haain bandhauai men chala jaaega apane un mitraen samet jin se too ne joottee bhvishyadanee kee, too babul men jaaega aur vaheen marega, aur vaheen tujhe aur unhen bhee mittee dee jaaegee." 
Jeremiah20:7 he yahova, too ne mujhe dhaekha diya, aur maain ne dhaekha khaya too mujh se balavant haai, is karan too mujh par prabal ho gaya. din bhr meree hansee hotee haai sab koi mujh se ttttha karate haain." 
Jeremiah20:8 kyonaki jab maain baten karata hoo, tab maain jor se pukar pukarakar lalakarata hoo ki upadrav aur utpat hua, han utpat! kyonki yahova ka vachan din bhr mere liye ninda aur ttttha ka karan hota rahata haai." 
Jeremiah20:9 yaadi maain kahoo, maain usakee charcha n karoonga n usake nam se boloonga, to mere day kee aeesee dasha hogee mano meree haddiyon men dhadhakatee hui ag ho, aur maain apane ko rokate rokate thk gaya par mujh se raha naheen jata." 
Jeremiah20:10 maain ne bahuton ke munh se apana apavad suna haai. charon or bhy hee bhy haai! meree jan pahachan ke sab jo mere ttokar khane kee batt johate haai, ve kahate haai, usake dosh batao, tab ham unakee charcha faaila denge. kadaachit vah dhaekha khaa, to ham us par prabal hokar, us se badala lenge." 
Jeremiah20:11 parantu yahova mere sath haai, vah bhyankar veer ke saman haai is karan mere satanevale prabal n honge, ve ttokar khakar girenge. ve buaddhi se kam naheen karate, isaliye unhen bahut lajjait hona padega. unaka apaman sadaaiv bana rahega aur kabhee boola n jaaega." 
Jeremiah20:12 he senaon ke yahova, he dhaarmiyon ke parakhnevale aur day aur man ke gyaata, jo badala too un se lega, use maain dekoo, kyonki maain ne apana mukama tere upar chhod diya haai." 
Jeremiah20:13 yahova ke liye gao yahova kee stuati karo! kyonki vah daridra jan ke praan ko kukaarmiyon ke hath se bachata haai. 
Jeremiah20:14 sraapit ho vah din jis men maain utpann hua! jis din meree mata ne mujh ko janm diya vah dhany n ho! 
Jeremiah20:15 sraapit ho vah jan jis ne mere pita ko yah samachar dekar usako bahut anandait kiya ki tere ladka utpann hua haai. 
Jeremiah20:16 us jan kee dasha un nagaron kee see ho jinhen yahova ne bin daya ddha diya use savere to chillahatt aur dopahar ko yuddh kee lalakar sunai diya kare," 
Jeremiah20:17 kyonaki us ne mujhe garbh hee men n mar dala ki meree mata ka garbhashay hee meree kabra hotee, aur maain usee men sada pada rahata." 
Jeremiah20:18 maain kyon utpat aur shaek bhogane ke liye janma aur ki apane jeevan men paarishram aur ducha dekoo, aur upane din namadharai men vyateet karoon?" 
Jeremiah21:1 yah vachan yahova kee or se yirmayah ke pas us samay pahuncha jab sidaakiyyah raja ne usake pas maalkaiyyah ke putra pashahoor aur maseyah yajak ke putra sapanyah ke hath se yah kahala bheja ki," 
Jeremiah21:2 hamare liye yahova se pooch, kyonaki babul ka raja nabookadanessar hamare viruddh yuddh kar raha haai kadachit yahova ham se apane sab ashcharyakaman ke anusar aeesa vyavahar kare ki vah hamare pas se utt jaae." 
Jeremiah21:3 tab yirmayah ne un se kaha, tum sidaakiyyah se yon kaho, israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah21:4 dekho, yuddh ke jo hathaiyar tumhare hathon men haai, jin se tum babul ke raja aur shaharapanah ke bahar ghoranevale kasadiyon se lad rahe ho, unako maain lauttakar is nagar ke beech men ikattha karoonga" 
Jeremiah21:5 aur maain svayan hath baddhakar aur balavant bhuja se, aur krodha aur jalajalahatt aur bade krodha men akar tumhare viruddh laoonga." 
Jeremiah21:6 aur maain is nagar ke rahanevalon ko kya manushy, kya pashu sab ko mar daloonga ve badee maree se marenge." 
Jeremiah21:7 aur usake bad, yahova kee yah vanee haai, he yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah, maain tujhe, tere karmachariyon aur logon ko varan jo log is nagar men maree, talavar aur mahangee se bache rahenge unako babul ke raja nabookadanessar aur unake praan ke shatrauon ke vash men kar doonga. vah unako talavar se mar dalega un par n to vah taras khaaega, n kuchh komalata dikhaaega aur n kuchh daya karega." 
Jeremiah21:8 aur is praja ke logon se kah ki yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain tumhare samhane jeevan ka marga aur mratyu ka marga bhee batata hoo." 
Jeremiah21:9 jo koi is nagar men rahe vah talavar, mahangee aur maree se marega parantu jo koi nikalakar un kasadiyon ke pas jo tum ko ghor rahe haain bhag jaae vah jeevit rahega, aur usaka praan bachega." 
Jeremiah21:10 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain ne is nagar kee or apana mukh bhlai ke liye nahee, varan burai hee ke liye kiya haai yah babul ke raja ke vash men pad jaaega, aur vah isako faunkava dega." 
Jeremiah21:11 or yahooda ke rajakul ke logon se kah, yahova ka vachan suno," 
Jeremiah21:12 he daud ke gharane! yahova yon kahata haai, bhor ko nyay chukao, aur lutte huae ko andhor karanevale ke hath se chhudao, naheen to tumhare bure kamon ke karan mere krodha kee ag bhdkegee, aur aeesee jalatee rahegee ki koi use bujha n sakega." 
Jeremiah21:13 he tarai men rahanevalee aur samathr desh kee chattana tum jo kahate ho ki ham par kaun chaddhai kar sakega, aur hamare vasasthan men kaun pavesh kar sakega? yahova kahata haai ki maain tumhare viruddh hoo." 
Jeremiah21:14 aur yahova kee vanee haai ki maain tumhen dand dekar tumhare kamon ka fal tumhen bhugataunga. maain usake van men ag lagaunga, aur usake charon or sab kuchh bhsm ho jaaega." 
Jeremiah22:1 yahova ne yon kaha, yahooda ke raja ke bhvan men utarakar yah vachan kah," 
Jeremiah22:2 he daud kee gaee par virajaman yahooda ke raja, too apane karmachaariyon aur apanee praja ke logon samet jo in faattkon se aya karate haai, yahova ka vachan suna." 
Jeremiah22:3 yahova yon kahata haai, nyay aur dharma ke kam karo aur lutte huae ko andhor karanevale ke hath se chhudao. aur paradeshae, anath aur vidhava par andhor v upadrav mat karo, n is sthan men nidashaen ka lohoo bahao." 
Jeremiah22:4 dekho, yadi tum aeesa karoge, to is bhvan ke faattkon se hokar daud kee gaee par virajaman raja rathon aur ghaedon par chaddhe huae apane apane karmachaariyon aur praja samet pravesh kiya karenge." 
Jeremiah22:5 parantu, yadi tum in baton ko n mano to, maain apanee hee saugandha khakar kahata hoo, yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki yah bhvan ujad ho jaaega." 
Jeremiah22:6 kyonaki yahova yahooda ke raja ke is bhvan ke vishay men yon kahata haai, too mujhe gilad desh sa aur labanon ke shaikhr sa dikhai padta haai, parantu nishchay maain tujhe marusthl v aek nirjan nagar banaunga." 
Jeremiah22:7 maain nash karanevalon ko haathaiyar dekar tere viruddh bhejoonga ve tere sundar devadaron ko kattkar ag men jhonk denge. 
Jeremiah22:8 aur jaati jati ke log jab is nagar ke pas se nikalenge tab aek doosare se poochhenge, yahova ne is bade nagar kee aeesee dasha kyon kee haai?" 
Jeremiah22:9 tab log kahenge, isaka karan yah he ki unhon ne apane parameshvar yahova kee vacha ko todkar doosare devataon ko dandvata kee aur unakee upasana bhee kee." 
Jeremiah22:10 mare huon ke liye mat roo, usake liye vilap mat karo. usee ke liye foott foottkar roo jo paradesh chala gaya haai, kyonki vah lauttkar apanee janmaboomi ko fir kabhee dekhne n paaega." 
Jeremiah22:11 kyonaki yahooda ke raja yoshaiyyah ka putra shalloom, jo apane pita yoshaiyyah ke sthan par raja tha aur is sthan se nikal gaya, usake vishay men yahova yon kahata haai ki vah fir yahan lauttkar n ane paaega." 
Jeremiah22:12 vah jis sthan men bandhaua hokar gaya haai usee men mar jaaega, aur is desh ko fir kabhee dekhne n paaega." 
Jeremiah22:13 us par hay jo apane ghar ko adharma se aur apanee uparauttee kottariyon ko anyay se banavata haai jo apane padosee se begaree men kam karata haai aur usakee majadooree naheen deta. 
Jeremiah22:14 vah kahata haai, maain apane liye lamba-chauda ghar aur havadar kotta bana loonga, aur vah khaidkiyan banakar unhen devadar kee lakadee se patt leta haai, aur sindoor se rang deta haai." 
Jeremiah22:15 too jo devadar kee lakadee ka abhailashaee haai, kya is reeti se tera rajy sthiar rahega. dek, tera pita nyay aur dharma ke kam karata tha, aur vah khata peeta aur sukh se bhee rahata tha!" 
Jeremiah22:16 vah is karan sukh se rahata tha kyonki vah deen aur daridra logon ka nyay chukata tha. kya yahee mera gyaan rakhna naheen haai? yahova kee yah vanee haai. 
Jeremiah22:17 parantu too keval apana hee labh dekhta haai, aur nidashaen kee hatya karane aur andhor aur upadrav karane men apana man aur drashtti lagata haai." 
Jeremiah22:18 isaliye yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke vishay men yahova yah kahata haai, ki jaaise log is reeti se kahakar rote haai, hay mere bhai, hay meree baahin! is prakar koi hay mere prabhu va hay tera vibhv kahakar usake liye vilap n karega." 
Jeremiah22:19 varan usako gadahe kee nai mittee dee jaaegee, vah ghaseettkar yarooshalem ke faattkon ke bahar faenk diya jaaega." 
Jeremiah22:20 labanon par chaddhkar hay hay kar, tab bashaan jakar unche svar se chilla fir abareem pahad par jakar haya-hay kar, kyonaki tere sab mitra nash ho gaae haain." 
Jeremiah22:21 tere sukh ke samay maain ne tujh ko chitaya tha, parantu too ne kaha, maain teree n sunoongee. yuvavastha hee se teree chal aeesee haai ki too meree bat naheen sunatee." 
Jeremiah22:22 tere sab charavahe vayu se udaae jaaenge, aur tere mitra bandhauai men chale jaaenge nishchay too us samay apanee saree buraiyon ke karan lajjait hogee aur tera munh kala ho jaaega." 
Jeremiah22:23 he labanon kee rahanevalee, he devadar men apana ghaensala bananevalo, jab tujh ko jachcha kee see peedaaen utten tab too vyakul ho jaaegee!" 
Jeremiah22:24 yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, chahe yahoyakeem ka putra yahooda ka raja konyah, mere daahine hath kee angoottee bhee hota, tobhee maain use utar faenkata." 
Jeremiah22:25 maain tujhe tere praan ke khojiyon ke hat, aur jin se too drata haai unake arthata babul ke raja nabookadanessar aur kasadiyon ke hath men kar doonga." 
Jeremiah22:26 maain tujhe teree jananee samet aek paraae desh men jo tumharee janmaboomi naheen haai faenk doonga, aur tum vaheen mar jaoge." 
Jeremiah22:27 parantu jis desh men ve lauttne kee badee lalasa karate haai, vahan kabhee lauttne n paaenge." 
Jeremiah22:28 kya, yah purush koenyah tuchchh aur tootta hua bartan haai? kya yah nikamma bartan haai? fir vah vansh samet anajane desh men kyon nikalakar faenk diya jaaega?" 
Jeremiah22:29 he prathvee, prathvee, he prathvee, yahova ka vachan sun!" 
Jeremiah22:30 yahova yon kahata haai ki is purush ko nirvash likho, usaka jeevanakal kushal se n beetega aur n usake vansh men se koi bhagyavan hokar daud kee gaee par virajaman va yahoodiyon par prabhuta karanevala hoga." 
Jeremiah23:1 un charavahon par hay jo meree charai kee bhed-bakaariyon ko titara-abitar karate or nash karate haai, yahova yah kahata haai." 
Jeremiah23:2 isaliye israaael ka parameshvar yahova apanee praja ke charavahon se yon kahata haai, tum ne meree bhed-bakaariyon kee suadhai naheen lee, varan unako titara-abitar kiya aur barabas nikal diya haai, is karan yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain tumhare bure kamon ka dand doonga." 
Jeremiah23:3 tab meree bhed-bakaariyan jo bachee haai, unako maain un sab deshaen men se jin men maain ne unhen barabas bhej diya haai, svayan hee unhen lautta lakar unheen kee bhedshaala men ikattha karoonga, aur ve fir foolen-falengee." 
Jeremiah23:4 maain unake liye aeese charavahe niyukt karoonga jo unhen charaaenge aur tab ve n to fir drengee, n vismait hongee aur n un men se koi kho jaaengee, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah23:5 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai, dekh aeese din ate haain jab maain daud ke kul men aek dhama ankur ugaunga, aur vah raja banakar buddhi se rajy karega, aur apane desh men nyay aur dharma se prabhuta karega." 
Jeremiah23:6 usake dinon men yahoodee log bache rahenge, aur israaelee log nidr base rahenge aur yahova usaka nam yahova hamaree dhaarmikata rakhega." 
Jeremiah23:7 so dek, yahova kee yah vanee haai ki aeese din aaenge jin men log fir n kahenge, ki yahova jo ham israaaeliyon ko misra desh se chhuda le aya, usake jeevan kee saugandha," 
Jeremiah23:8 parantu ve yah kahenge, yahova jo israaael ke gharane ko uttar desh se aur un sab deshaen se bhee jahan us ne hamen barabas nikal diya, chhuda le aya, usake jeevan kee saugandha. tab ve apane hee desh men base rahenge." 
Jeremiah23:9 bhavishyadvktaon ke vishay mera day bheetar hee bheetar fatta jata haai, meree sab haaddiyan thrathratee haai yahova ne jo pavitra vachan kahe haai, unhen sunakar, maain aeese manushy ke saman ho gaya hoo jo dakhmadha ke nasho men choor ho gaya ho," 
Jeremiah23:10 kyonaki yah desh vyabhaichaariyon se bhra haai is par aeesa shaap pada haai ki yah vilap kar raha haai van kee charaiyan bhee sookh gai. log badee daud to daudte haai, parantu burai hee kee ora aur veerata to karate haai, parantu anyay hee ke sath." 
Jeremiah23:11 kyonaki bhvishyadvkta aur sajak donon bhaktaiheen ho gaae haain apane bhvan men bhee maain ne unakee burai pai haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah23:12 is karan unaka marga andhora aur fisalaha hoga jis men ve ddhkelakar gira diae jaaenge kyonki, yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain unake dand ke varsha men un par vipaattai daloonga!" 
Jeremiah23:13 shaemaron ke bhvishyadvktaon men maain ne yah moorkhta dekhee thee ki ve bal ke nam se bhvishyadanee karate aur meree praja israaael ko bhttka dete the. 
Jeremiah23:14 parantu yarooshalem ke naabiyon men maain ne aeese kam dekhe haai, jin se rongatte khde ho jate haai, arthata vyaabhaichar aur pakhshd ve kukaarmiyon ko aeesa hiyav bandhaate haain ki ve apanee apanee burai se pashchattap bhee naheen karate sab nivasee meree draashtti men sadomiyon aur amoriyon ke saman ho gaae haain." 
Jeremiah23:15 is karan senaon ka yahova yarooshalem ke bhavishyadvktaon ke vishay men yon kahata haai, dek, maain unako kaduvee vastuaen khailaunga aur vish pilaunga kyonki unake karan sare desh men bhaktaiheenata faail gai haai." 
Jeremiah23:16 senaon ke yahova ne tum se yon kaha haai, in bhavishyadvktaon kee baton kee or jo tum se bhavishsadanee karate haain kan mat lagao, kyonaki ye tum ko vyarth baten sikhate haain ye darshan ka dava karake yahova ke mukh kee nahee, apane hee man kee baten kahate haain." 
Jeremiah23:17 jo log mera tiraskar karate haain un me ye bhvishyadvkta sada kahate rahate haain ki yahova kahata haai, tumhara kalyan hoga aur jitane log apane hatt hee par chalate haai, un se ye kahate haai, tum par koi vipaattai n padegee." 
Jeremiah23:18 bhla kaun yahova kee gupt sabha men khda hokar usaka vachan sunane aur samajhne paya haai? 
Jeremiah23:19 va kis ne dhyan dekar mera vachan suna haai? dekho, yahova kee jalajalahatt ka prachand bavandr aur andhaee chalane lagee haai aur usaka jhonka dushtton ke sir par jor se lagega." 
Jeremiah23:20 jab tak yahova apana kam aur apanee yuaktaiyon ko pooree n kar chuke, tab tak usaka krodha shaant n hoga. ant ke dinon men tum is bat ko bhlee bhanti samajh sakoge." 
Jeremiah23:21 ye bhavishyadvkta bina mere bheje daud jate aur bina mere kuchh kahe bhavishyadanee karane lagate haain. 
Jeremiah23:22 yaadi ye meree shaiksha men sthiar rahate, to meree praja ke logon ko mere vachan sunate aur ve apanee buree chal aur kamon se fir jate." 
Jeremiah23:23 yahova kee yah vanee haai, kaya maain aeesa parameshvar hoo, jo door nahee, nikatt hee rahata hoo?" 
Jeremiah23:24 fir yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya koi aeese gupt sthanon men chhpai sakata haai, ki maain use n dekh sakoon? kya svarga aur prathvee donon mujh se paripoorn naheen haain?" 
Jeremiah23:25 maain ne in bhvishyadvktaon kee baten bhee suneen haain jo mere nam se yah kahakar joottee bhvishyadanee karate haain ki maain ne svapn dekha haai, svapn!" 
Jeremiah23:26 jo bhavishyadvkta joottmoott bhavishyadanee karate aur apane man hee ke chhl ke bhvishyadvkta haai, yah bat kab tak unake man men samai rahegee?" 
Jeremiah23:27 jaaise meree praja ke logon ke purakha mera nam boolakar bal ka nam lene lage the, vaaise hee ab ye bhvishyadvkta unhen apane apane svapn bata batakar mera nam bhulana chahate haain." 
Jeremiah23:28 yaadi kisee bhavishyadvkta ne svapn dekha ho, to vah use bataa, parantu jis kisee ne mera vachan suna ho to vah mera vachan sachchai se sunaae. yahova kee yah vanee haai, kahan boosa aur kahan gehoon?" 
Jeremiah23:29 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai ki kya mera vachan ag sa naheen haai? fir kya vah aeesa hathauda naheen jo patthr ko faod dale? 
Jeremiah23:30 yahova kee yah vanee haai, dekho, jo bhvishyadvkta mere vachan auron se chura churakar bolate haai, maain unake viruddh hoo." 
Jeremiah23:31 fir yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai ki jo bhvishyadvkta usakee yah vanee haai, aeesee joottee vanee kahakar apanee apanee jeebh dulate haai, maain unake bhee viruddh hoo." 
Jeremiah23:32 yahava kee yah bhee vanee haai ki jo bina mere bheje va bina meree agyaa paae svapn dekhne ka jootta dava karake bhavishyadanee karate haai, aur usaka varnn karake meree praja ko jootte ghamand men akar bhramate haai, unake bhee maain viruddh hoo aur un se meree praja ke logon ka kuchh labh n hega." 
Jeremiah23:33 yaadi sadhaaran logon men se koi jan va koi bhvishyadvkta va yajak tum se poochhe ki yahova ne kya prabhvashaalee vachan kaha haai, to us se kahana, kya prabhvashaalee vachana? yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain tum ko tyag doonga." 
Jeremiah23:34 aur jo bhavishyadvkta va yajak va sadhaaran manushy yahova ka kaha hua bharee vachana aeesa kahata rahe, usako gharane samet maain dand doonga." 
Jeremiah23:35 tum log aek doosare se aur apane apane bhai se yon puchhna, yahova ne kya uttar diya?" 
Jeremiah23:36 va, yahova ne kya kaha haai? yahova ka kaha hua bharee vachana, is prakar tum bhavishy men n kahana naheen to tumhara aeesa kahana hee dand ka karan ho jaaega kyonki hamara parameshvar senaon ka yahova jo jeeavit parameshvar haai, tum logon ne usake vachan bigad diae haain." 
Jeremiah23:37 too bhavishyadvkta se yan poochh ki yahova ne tujhe kya uttar diya? 
Jeremiah23:38 va, yahova ne kya kaha haai? yadi tum yahova ka kaha hua prabhavashaalee vachana isee prakar kahoge, to yahova ka yah vachan suno, maain ne to tumhare pas kahala bheja haai, bhvishy men aeesa n kahana ki yahova ka kaha hua prabhavashaalee vachana. parantu tum yah kahate hee rahate ho, ki yahova ka kaha hua prabhavashaalee vachana." 
Jeremiah23:39 is karan dekho, maain tum ko bilakul bool jaunga aur tum ko aur is nagar ko jise maain ne tumhare purakhaon ko, aur tum ko bhee diya haai," 
Jeremiah23:40 tyagakar apane samhane se door kar doonga. aur maain aeesa karoonga ki tumharee namadharai aur anadar sada bana rahega aur kabhee boola n jaaega. 
Jeremiah24:1 jab babul ka raja nabookadanessar, yahoyakeem ke putra yahooda ke raja yakonyah ko, aur yahooda ke haakimon aur loharon aur aur kareegaron ko bandhaua karake yarooshalem se babul ko le gaya, to usake bad yahova ne mujh ko apane maandair ke samahane rakhe huae anjeeron ke do ttokare dikhaae." 
Jeremiah24:2 aek ttokare men to paahile se pake achchhe achchhe anjeer the, aur doosare ttokare men bahut nikamme anjeer the, varan ve aeese nikamme the ki khane ke yogy bhee n the." 
Jeremiah24:3 fir yahova ne mujh se poochha, he yirmayah, tujhe kya dekh padta haai? maain ne kaha, anjeera jo anjeer achchhe haain so to bahut hee achchhe haai, parantu jo nikamme haai, so bahut hee nikamme haain varan aeese nimamme haain ki khane ke yogy bhee naheen haain." 
Jeremiah24:4 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah24:5 ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jaaise achchhe anjeeron ko, vaaise hee maain yahoodee bandhauon ko jinhen maain ne is sthan se kasaadiyon ke desh men bhej diya haai, dekhkar prasann hoonga." 
Jeremiah24:6 maain un par krapadrashtti rakoonga aur unako is desh men lautta le aunga aur unhen nash n karoonga, parantu banaunga unhen ukhad n daloonga, parantu lagaae rakoonga." 
Jeremiah24:7 maain unaka aeesa man kar doonga ki ve mujhe janenge ki maain yahova hoo aur ve meree praja ttharenge aur maain unaka parameshvar ttharoonga, kyonaki ve meree or sare man se firenge." 
Jeremiah24:8 parantu jese nikamme anjeer, nikamme hone ke karan khaae naheen jate, usee prakar se maain yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah aur usake hakimon aur bache huae yarooshalemiyon ko, jo is desh men va misra men rah gaae haai, chhod doonga." 
Jeremiah24:9 is karan ve prathvee ke rajy rajy men mare mare firate huae hukh bhogate rahenge aur jitane sthanon men maain unhen barabas nikal doonga, un sabhon men ve namadharai aur drashttant aur sraap ka vishay honge." 
Jeremiah24:10 aur maain un men talavar chalaunga, aur mahangee aur maree faailaunga, aur ant men is desh men se jise maain ne unake purakhaon ko aur unako diya, ve mitt jaaenge." 
Jeremiah25:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke chauthe varsha men jo babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke rajy ka paahila varsha tha," 
Jeremiah25:2 yahova ka jo vachan yirmayah nabee ke pas pahuncha, aur jise yirmayah nabee ne sab yahoodiyon aur yarooshalem ke sab nivaasiyon se kaha, vah yah haai" 
Jeremiah25:3 amon ke putra yahooda ke raja yoshaiyyah ke rajy ke terahaven varsha se lekar aj ke din tak arthata teis varsha se yahova ka vachan mere pas pahunchata aya he aur maain use bade yatn ke sath tum se kahata aya hoo parantu tum ne use naheen suna. 
Jeremiah25:4 aur yadhypi yahova tumhare pas apane sare dason athva bhavishyadvktaon ko bhee yah kahane ke liye bade yatn se bhejata aya haai 
Jeremiah25:5 ki apanee apanee buree chal aur apane apane bure kamon se firo tab jo desh yahova ne praacheenakal men tumhare pitaron ko aur tum ko bhee sada ke liye diya haai us par base rahane paoge parantu tum ne n to suna aur n kan lagaya haai. 
Jeremiah25:6 aur doosare devataon ke peechhe hokar unakee upasana aur unako dandvata mat karo, aur n apanee banai hui vastuon ke dara mujhe ris dilao tab maain tumharee kuchh hani n karoonga." 
Jeremiah25:7 yah sunane par bhee tum ne meree naheen manee, varan apanee banai hui vastuon ke dara mujhe ris dilate aae ho jis se tumharee haani hee ho sakatee haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah25:8 isaliye senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki tum ne jo mere vachan naheen mane," 
Jeremiah25:9 jasaliye suno, maain uttar men rahanevale sab kulon ko bulaunga, aur apane das babul ke raja nabookadanessar ko bulava bhejoonga aur un sabhon ko is desh aur isake nivaasiyon ke viruddh aur isake as pas kee sab jaatiyon ke viruddh bhee le aunga aur in sab deshaen ka maain satyanash karake unhen aeesa ujad doonga ki log inhen dekhkar talee bajaaenge varan ye sada ujade hee rahenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah25:10 aur maain aeesa karoonga ki in men n to harsha aur n anand ka shabd sunai padega, aur n dulhe va dulhain ka, aur n chakkee ka bhee shabd sunai padega aur n in men diya jalega." 
Jeremiah25:11 saree jatiyon ka yah desh ujad hee ujad hoga, aur ye sab jaatiyan sattar varsha tak babul ke raja ke adhaeen rahengee." 
Jeremiah25:12 jab sattar varsha beet chuke, tab maain babul ke raja aur us jaati ke logon aur kasadiyon ke desh ke sab nivaasiyon ko adhrma ka dand doonga, yahova kee yah vanee haai aur us desh ko sada ke liye ujad doonga." 
Jeremiah25:13 maain us desh men apane ve sab vachan poore karoonga jo maain ne usake vishay men kahe haai, aur jitane vachan yirmayah ne saree jaatiyon ke viruddh bhavishyadanee karake pustak men likhe haain." 
Jeremiah25:14 kyonaki bahut see jaatiyon ke log aur bade bade raja bhee un se apanee seva karaaenge aur maain unako unakee karanee ka fal bhugataunga. 
Jeremiah25:15 israaael ke parameshvar yahova ne mujh se yon kaha, mere hath se is jalajalahatt ke dakhmadha ka kattora lekar un sab jatiyon ko pila de jinake pas maain tujhe bhejata hoo." 
Jeremiah25:16 ve use peekar us talavar ke karan jo maain unake beech men chalaunga ladkhdaaenge aur bavale ho jaaenge. 
Jeremiah25:17 so maain ne yahova ke hath se vah kattora lekar un sab jaatiyon ko jinake pas yahova ne mujhe bheja, pila diya." 
Jeremiah25:18 arthata yarooshalem aur yahooda ke nagaron ke nivaasiyon ko, aur unake rajaon aur haakimon ko pilaya, taki unaka desh ujad ho jaae aur log talee bajaae, aur usakee upama dekar shaap diya karen jaaisa ajakal hota haai." 
Jeremiah25:19 aur misra ke raja firaun aur usake karmachaariyo, hakimo, aur saree praja ko" 
Jeremiah25:20 aur sab dogale manushyon kee jatiyon ko aur us desh ke sab rajaon ko aur palishtaiyon ke desh ke sab rajaon ko aur ashkalon ajja aur aekron ke aur ashadod ke bache huae logon ko 
Jeremiah25:21 aur aedoniyo, moaabiyon aur ammoniyon ko aur sare rajaon ko" 
Jeremiah25:22 aur seedon ke sab rajaon ko, aur samudra par ke deshaen ke rajaon ko" 
Jeremiah25:23 fir dadaaniyo, temaiyon aur boojiyon ko aur jitane apane gal ke balon ko munda dalate haai, un sabhon ko bhee" 
Jeremiah25:24 aur arab ke sab rajaon ko aur jangal men rahanevale dogale manushyon ke sab rajaon ko 
Jeremiah25:25 aur jimrae, aelam aur madaai ke sab rajaon ko" 
Jeremiah25:26 aur kya nikatt kya door ke uttar disha ke sab rajaon ko aek sang pilaya, nidan dharatee bhr men rahanevale jagat ke rajyon ke sab logon ko maain ne pilaya. aur in sab ke peechhe shoshak ke raja ko bhee peena padega." 
Jeremiah25:27 tab too un se yah kahana, senaon ka yahova jo israaael ka parameshvar haai, yon kahata haai, peeo, aur matavale ho aur chhatt karo, gir pado aur fir kabhee n utto, kyonaki yah us talavar ke karan se hoga jo maain tumhare beech men chalaunga." 
Jeremiah25:28 aur yaadi ve tere hath se yah kattora lekar peene se inakar karen to un se kahana, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki tum ko nishchay peena padega." 
Jeremiah25:29 dekho, jo nagar mera kahalata haai, maain paahile usee men vipaattai dalane lagoonga, fir kya tum log nidash ttharake bachoge? tum nidash ttharake n bachoge, kyonaki maain prathvee ke sab rahanevalon par talavar chalane par hoo, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee he." 
Jeremiah25:30 itanee baten bhvishyadanee kee reeti par un se kahakar yah bhee kahana, yahova upar se garajega, aur apane usee paavitra dhaam men se apana shabd sunaaega vah apanee charai ke sthan ke viruddh jor se garajega vah prathvee ke sare nivaasiyon ke viraddh bhee dakh latadnevalon kee nai lalakarega." 
Jeremiah25:31 prathvee kee chhor lon bhee kolahal hoga, kyonki sab jatiyon se yahova ka mukama haai vah sab matushyon se vadavivad karega, aur dushtton ko talavar ke vash men kar dega." 
Jeremiah25:32 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, vipaattai aek jati se doosaree jaati men faailegee, aur badee andhaee prathvee kee chhor se uttegee!" 
Jeremiah25:33 us samay yahova ke mare huon kee lothen prathvee kee ek chhor se doosaree chhor tak padee rahengee. unake liye koi rone-peettnevala n rahega, aur unakee lothen n to battoree jaengee aur n kabaron men rakhee jaengee ve boomi ke upar khad kee nai padee rahengee." 
Jeremiah25:34 he charavaho, hay hay karo aur chillao, he balavant meddho aur bakaro, rakh men lotto, kyonaki tumhare vadha hone ke din a pahunche haai, aur maain manabha baratan kee nai tumhara satyanash karoonga." 
Jeremiah25:35 us samay n to charavahon ke bhagane ke liye koi sthan rahega, aur n balavant meddhe aur bakare bhagane paenge." 
Jeremiah25:36 charavahon kee chillahatt aur balavant meddhon aur bakaron ke mimiyane ka shabd sunai padta haai! kyonki yahova unakee charai ko nash karega," 
Jeremiah25:37 aur yahova ke krodha bhdkane ke karan shaantai ke sthan nashtt ho jaaenge, jin vasasthanon men ab shaaantai haai, ve nashtt ho jaaenge." 
Jeremiah25:38 yuva sinh kee nai vah apane ttauair ko chhodkar nikalata haai, kyonki andhor karaneharee talavar aur usake bhdke huae kop ke karan unaka desh ujad ho gaya haai." 
Jeremiah26:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajay ke arambh me, yahova kee or se yah vachan pahuncha, yahova yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah26:2 yahova ke bhvan ke angan men khda hokar, yahooda ke sab nagaron ke logon ke samhane jo yahova ke bhvan men dandvata karane ko aae, ye vachan jinake vishay un se kahane kee agyaa maain tujhe deta hoo kah de un men se koi vachan mat rakh chhod." 
Jeremiah26:3 sambhv haai ki ve sunakar apanee apanee buree chal se firen aur maain unakee hani karane se pachhtaun jo unake bure kamon ke karan maain ne ttana tha. 
Jeremiah26:4 isaliye too un se kah, yahova yon kahata haai, yaadi tum meree sunakar meree vyavastha ke anusar jo maain ne tum ko sunava dee haai n chalo," 
Jeremiah26:5 aur n mere das bhavishyadvktaon ke vachanon par kan lagaoge, jinhen maain tumhare pas bada yatn karake bhejata aya hoo, parantu tum ne unakee naheen sunee," 
Jeremiah26:6 to maain is bhvan ko shaeelo ke saman ujad doonga, aur is nagar ka aeesa satyanash kar doonga ki prathvee kee saree jaatiyon ke log usakee upama de dekar shaap diya karenge." 
Jeremiah26:7 jab yirmayah ye vachan yahova ke bhvan men kah raha tha, tab yajak aur bhvishyadvkta aur sab sadhaaran log sun rahe the." 
Jeremiah26:8 aur jab yirmayah sab kuchh jise saree praja se kahane kee agyaa yahova ne dee thee kah chuka, tab yajakon aur bhavishyadvktaon aur sab sadhaaran logon ne yah kahakar usako pakad liya, nishchay tujhe praandand hoga." 
Jeremiah26:9 too ne kyon yahova ke nam se yah bhvishyadanee kee ki yah bhvan shaeelo ke saman ujad ho jaaega, aur yah nagar aeesa ujadega ki us men koi n rah jaaega? itana kahakar sab sadhaaran logon ne yahova ke bhvan men yirmayah ke viruddh bheed lagai." 
Jeremiah26:10 yahooda ke hakim ye baten sunakar, raja ke bhvan se yahova ke bhvan men chaddh aae aur usake naye faattk men baaitt gaae." 
Jeremiah26:11 tab yajakon aur bhavishyadvktaon ne hakimon aur sab logon se kaha, yah manushy praandand ke yogy haai, kyonaki is ne is nagar ke viruddh aeesee bhvishyadanee kee haai jise tum bhee apane kanon se sun chuke ho." 
Jeremiah26:12 tab yirmayah ne sab hakimon aur sab logon se kaha, jo vachan tum ne sune haai, use yahova hee ne mujhe is bhvan aur is nagar ke viruddh bhavishyadanee kee reeti par kahane ke liye bhej diya haai." 
Jeremiah26:13 isaliye ab apana chalachalan aur apane kam sudhaaro, aur apane parameshvar yahova kee bat mano tab yahova us vipaattai ke vishay men jisakee charcha us ne tum se kee haai, pachhtaaega." 
Jeremiah26:14 dekho, maain tumhare vash men hoo jo kuchh tumharee draashtti men bhla aur tteek ho vahee mere sath karo." 
Jeremiah26:15 par yah nishchay jano, ki, yadi tum mujhe mar daloge, to apane ko aur is nagar ko aur isake nivaasiyon ko nidash ke hatyare banaoge kyonaki sachamuch yahova ne mujhe tumhare pas ye sab vachan sunane ke liye bheja he." 
Jeremiah26:16 tab haakimon aur sab logon ne yajakon aur nabiyon se kaha, yah manushy praandand ke yogy naheen haai kyonki us ne hamare parameshvar yahova ke nam se ham se kaha haai." 
Jeremiah26:17 aur desh ke puraaniyon men se kitanon ne uttkar praja kee saree mandlee se kaha," 
Jeremiah26:18 yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ke dinon men morasetee meekayah bhvishyadanee kahata tha, us ne yahooda ke sare logon se kaha, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki siyyon jotakar khet banaya jaaega aur yarooshalem khaedhar ho jaaega, aur bhvanavala parvat jangalee sthan ho jaaega." 
Jeremiah26:19 kya yahooda ke raja hijaakiyyah ne va kisee yahoodee ne usako kaheen marava dala? kya us raja ne yahova ka bhy n mana or us se binatee n kee? aur tab yahova ne jo vipaattai un par dalane ke liye kaha tha, usake vishay kya vah n pachhtaya? aeesa karake ham apane praanon kee badee haani karenge." 
Jeremiah26:20 fir shamayah ka putra uriyyah nam kiryatyareem ka aek purush jo yahova ke nam se bhvishyadanee kahata tha us ne bhee is nagar aur is desh ke viruddh tteek aeesee hee bhvishyadanee kee jaaisee yirmayah ne abhee kee haai. 
Jeremiah26:21 aur jab yahoyakeem raja aur usake sab veeron aur sab hakimon ne usake vachan sune, tab raja ne use marava dalane ka yatn kiya aur uriyyah yah sunakar dr ke mare misra ko bhag gaya." 
Jeremiah26:22 tab yahoyakeem raja ne misra ko log bheje arthata akabor ke putra aelanatan ko kitane aur purushaen ke sath misra ko bheja. 
Jeremiah26:23 aur ve uriyyah ko misra se nikalakar yahoyakeem raja ke pas le aae aur us ne use talavar se maravakar usakee loth ko sadhaaran logon kee kabaron men finkava diya. 
Jeremiah26:24 parantu shaapan ka putra aheekam yirmayah kee sahayata karane laga aur vah logon ke vash men vadha hone ke liye naheen diya gaya. 
Jeremiah27:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra, yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke arambh men yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha." 
Jeremiah27:2 yahova ne mujh se yah kaha, bandhan aur jooae banavakar apanee gardan par rakh." 
Jeremiah27:3 tab unhen aedom aur moab aur ammon aur sor aur seedon ke rajaon ke pas, un dooton ke hath bhejana jo yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ke pas yarooshalem men aae haain." 
Jeremiah27:4 aur unako unake svamiyon ke liye yah kahakar agyaa dena, ki, israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah27:5 apane apane svamee se yon kaho ki prathvee ko aur prathvee par ke manushyon aur pashuuon ko apanee badee shaktai aur baddhai hui bhuja ke dara maain ne banaya, aur jis kisee ko maain chahata hoo usee ko maain unhen diya karata hoo." 
Jeremiah27:6 ab maain ne ye sab desha, apane das babul ke raja nabookadanessar ko ap hee de diae haain aur maaidan ke jeevajantuon ko bhee maain ne use diya haai ki ve usake adhaeen rahen." 
Jeremiah27:7 ye sab jaatiyan usake aur usake bad usake bette aur pote ke adhaeen us samay tak rahengee jab tak usake bhee desh ka din n aae tab bahut see jaatiyan aur bade bade raja us se bhee apanee seva karavaaenge. 
Jeremiah27:8 so jo jaati va rajy babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke adhaeen n ho aur usaka jooa apanee gardan par n le le, us jaati ko maain talavar, mahangee aur maree ka dand us samay tak deta rahoonga jab tak usako usake hath ke dara mitta n doon yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah27:9 isaliye tum log apane bhavishyadvktaon aur bhavee kahanevalon aur ttonahon aur tantraikon kee or chitt mat lagao jo tum se kahate haain ki tum ko babul ke raja ke adhaeen naheen hona padega. 
Jeremiah27:10 kyonaki ve tum se joottee bhvishyadanee karate haai, jis se tum apane apane desh se door ho jao aur maain ap tum ko door karake nashtt kar doon." 
Jeremiah27:11 parantu jo jati babul ke raja ka jooa apanee gardan par lekar usake adhaeen rahegee usako maain usee ke desh men rahane doonga aur vah us men khetee karatee hui basee rahegee, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah27:12 aur yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah se bhee maain ne ye baten kahee, apanee praja samet too babul ke raja ka jooa apanee gardan par le, aur usake aur usakee praja ke adhaeen rahakar jeevit raha." 
Jeremiah27:13 jab yahova ne us jaati ke vishay jo babul ke raja ke adhaeen n ho, yah kaha haai ki vah talavar, mahangee aur maree se nash hogee to fir too kyon apanee praja samet marana chahata haai?" 
Jeremiah27:14 jo bhavishyadvkta tujh se kahate haain ki tujh ko babul ke raja ke adhaeen n hona padega, unakee mat suna kyonki ve tujh se joottee bhvishyadanee karate haain." 
Jeremiah27:15 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain ne unhen naheen bheja, ve mere nam se joottee bhkishyadanee karate haain aur isaka fal yahee hoga ki maain tujh ko desh se nikal doonga, aur too un nabiyon samet jo tujh se bhvishyadanee karate haain nashtt ho jaaega." 
Jeremiah27:16 tab yajakon aur sadhaaran logon se bhee maain ne kaha, yahova yon kahata haai, tumhare jo bhavishyadvkta tum se yah bhavishyadanee karate haain ki yahova ke bhvan ke patra ab shaeegha hee babul se lautta diae jaaenge, unake vachanon kee or kan mat dharo, kyonaki ve tum se joottee bhvishyadanee karate haain." 
Jeremiah27:17 unakee mat suno, babul ke raja ke adhaeen hokar aur usakee seva karake jeevit raho." 
Jeremiah27:18 yah nagar kyon ujad ho jaae? yaadi ve bhvishyadvkta bhee ho, aur yadi yahova ka vachan unake pas ho, to ve senaon ke yahova se binatee karen ki jo patra yahova ke bhvan men aur yahooda ke raja ke bhvan men aur yarooshalem men rah gaae haai, ve babul n jane paaen." 
Jeremiah27:19 kyonaki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki jo khmbhe aur peetal kee nand, gangal aur kuarsiyan aur aur patra is nagar men rah gaae haai," 
Jeremiah27:20 jinhen babul ka raja nabookadanessar us samay n le gaya jab vah yahoyakeem ke putra yahooda ke raja yakonyah ko aur yahooda aur yarooshalem ke sab kuleenon ko bandhaua karake yarooshalem se babul ko le gaya tha," 
Jeremiah27:21 jo patra yahova ke bhvan men aur yahooda ke raja ke bhvan men aur yarooshalem men rah gaae haai, unake vishay men israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki ve bhee babul men pahunchaae jaaenge" 
Jeremiah27:22 aur jab tak maain unakee sudhai n loon tab tak vaheen rahenge, aur tab maain unhen lakar is sthan men fir rakh doonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah28:1 fir usee varsha, arthata yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke chauthe varsha ke panchaven maheene me, ajjoor ka putra hananyah jo gibon ka aek bhavishyadvkta tha, us ne mujh se yahova ke bhvan me, yajakon aur sab logon ke samhane kaha," 
Jeremiah28:2 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki maain ne babul ke raja ke jooae ko tod dala haai. 
Jeremiah28:3 yahova ke bhvan ke jitane patra babul ka raja nabookadanessar is sthan se uttakar babul le gaya, unhen maain do varsha ke bheetar fir isee sthan men le aunga." 
Jeremiah28:4 aur maain yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ka putra yakonyah aur sab yahoodee bandhauae jo babul ko gaae haai, unako bhee is sthan men lautta le aunga kyonaki maain ne babul ke raja ke jooae ko tod diya haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah28:5 tab yirmayah nabee ne hananyah nabee se, yajakon aur un sab logon ke samhane jo yahova ke bhvan men khde huae the kaha," 
Jeremiah28:6 ameen! yahova aeesa hee kare jo baten too ne bhvishyadanee karake kahee haain ki yahova ke bhvan ke patra aur sab bandhauae babul se is sthan men fir aaenge, anhen yahova poora kare." 
Jeremiah28:7 taubhee mera yah vachan sun, jo maain tujhe aur sab logon ko kah sunata hoo." 
Jeremiah28:8 jo bhavishyadvkta praacheenakal se mere aur tere paahile hote aae the, unhon ne to bahut se deshaen aur bade rajyon ke viruddh yuddh aur vipaattai aur maree ke vishay bhavishyadanee kee thee." 
Jeremiah28:9 parantu jo bhvishyadvkta kushal ke vishay bhavishyadanee kare, to jab usaka vachan poora ho, tab hee us bhvishyadvkta ke vishy yah nishchay ho jaaega ki yah sachamuch yahova ka bheja hua haai." 
Jeremiah28:10 tab hananyah bhvishyadvkta ne us jooae ko jo yirmayah bhvishyadvkta kee gardan par tha, utarakar tod diya." 
Jeremiah28:11 aur hananyah ne sab logon ke samhane kaha, yahova yon kahata haai ki isee prakar se maain poore do varsha ke bheetar babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke jooae ko sab jaatiyon kee gardan par se utarakar tod doonga. tab yirmayah bhvishyadvkta chala gaya." 
Jeremiah28:12 jab hananyah bhvishyadvkta ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta kee gardan par se jooa utarakar tod diya, usake bad yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha" 
Jeremiah28:13 jakar hananyah se yah kah, yahova yon kahata haai ki too ne katt ka jooa to tod diya, parantu aeesa karake too ne usakee santee lohe ka jooa bana liya haai." 
Jeremiah28:14 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki maain in sab jaatiyon kee gardan par lohe ka jooa rakhta hoo aur ve babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke adhaeen rahenge, aur inako usake adhaeen hona padega, kyonki maaidan ke jeevajantu bhee maain usake vash men kar deta hoo." 
Jeremiah28:15 aur yirmayah nabee ne hananyah nabee se yah bhee kaha, he hananyah, dekh yahova ne tujhe naheen bheja, too ne in logon ko joottee asha dilai haai." 
Jeremiah28:16 isaliye yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, ki dek, maain tujh ko prathvee ke upar se utta doonga, isee varsha men too marega kyonaki too ne yahova kee or se firane kee baten kahee haain." 
Jeremiah28:17 is vachan ke anusar hananyah usee varsha ke sataven maheene men mar gaya. 
Jeremiah29:1 usee varsha yirmayah nabee ne is ashay kee patrae, un puraaniyon aur bhavishyadvktaon aur sadhaaran logon ke pas bhejeen jo bandhauon men se bache the, jinako nabookadanessar yarooshalem se babul ko le gaya tha." 
Jeremiah29:2 yah patraee us samay bhejee gai, jab yakonyah raja aur rajamata, khoje, yahooda aur yarooshalem ke haakim, lohar aur any kareegar yarooshalem se chale gaae the." 
Jeremiah29:3 yah patraee shaapan ke putra aelasa aur hilkaiyyah ke putra gamaryah ke hath bhejee gai, jinhen yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ne babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke pas babul ko bheja." 
Jeremiah29:4 us men likha tha ki jitane logon ko maain ne yarooshalem se bandhaua karake babul men pahunchava diya haai, un sabhon se israael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata he" 
Jeremiah29:5 ghar banakar un men bas jao bariyan lagakar unake fal khao. 
Jeremiah29:6 byah karake bettebettyaian janmao aur apane betton ke liye striayan byah lo aur apanee beattyaian purushaen ko byah do, ki ve bhee bette-beattyaian janmaaen aur vahan ghatto naheen varan baddhte jao."
