Jeremiah29:7 parantu jis nagar men maain ne tum ko bandhaua karake bheej diya haai, usake kushal ka yatn kiya karo, aur usake hit ke liye yahova se praarthna kiya karo. kyonki usake kushal se tum bhee kushal ke sath rahoge." 
Jeremiah29:8 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova tum se yon kahata haai ki tumhare jo bhavishyadvkta aur bhavee kahanevale tumhare beech men haai, ve tum ko bahakane n paae, aur jo svapn ve numhare nimitt dekhte haain unakee or kan mat dharo," 
Jeremiah29:9 kyonaki ve mere nam se tum ko joottee bhavishyadanee sunate haain maain ne unhen naheen bheja, mujh yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah29:10 yahova yon kahata haai ki vabul ke sattar varsha poore hone par maain tumharee suadhai loonga, aur apana yah manabhvana vachan ki maain tumhen is sthan men lautta le aunga, poora karoonga." 
Jeremiah29:11 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki jo kalpanaaen maain tumhare vishay karata hoo unhen maain janata hoo, ve hanee kee nahee, varan kushal hee kee haai, aur ant men tumharee asha pooree karoonga." 
Jeremiah29:12 tab us samay tum mujh ko pukaroge aur akar mujh se praarthna karoge aur maain tumharee sunoonga. 
Jeremiah29:13 tum mujhe ddoonddhoge aur paoge bhee kyonaki tum apane sampoorn man se mere pas aoge. 
Jeremiah29:14 maain tumhen miloonga, yahova kee yah vanee haai, aur bandhauai se lautta le aunga aur tum ko un sab jaatiyon aur sthanon men se jin men maain ne tum ko barabas nikal diya haai, aur tumhen ikattha karake is sthan men lautta le aunga jahan se maain ne tumhen bandhaua karavake nikal diya tha, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah29:15 tum kahate to ho ki yahova ne hamare liye babul men bhvishyadvkta pragatt kiae haain. 
Jeremiah29:16 parantu jo raja daud kee baee par virajaman haai, aur jo praja is nagar men rahatee haai, arthata tumhare jo bhai tumhare sang bandhauai men naheen gaa, un sabhon ke vishay senaon ka yahova yah kahata haai," 
Jeremiah29:17 suno, maain unake beech talavar chalaunga aur mahangee karoonga, aur maree faailaunga aur unhen aeese ghainaune anjeeron ke saman karoonga jo nikamme hone ke karan khaae naheen jate." 
Jeremiah29:18 maain talavar, mahangee aur maree liae huae unaka peechha karoonga, aur aeesa karoonga ki ve prathvee ke rajy rajy men mare mare firenge, aur un sab jaatiyon men jin ke beech maain unhen barabas kar doonga, unakee aeesee dasha karoonga ki log unhen deshakar chakit honge aur talee bajaaenge aur unaka apaman karenge, aur unakee upama dekar shaap diya karenge." 
Jeremiah29:19 kyonaki jo vachan maain ne apane das bhvishyadvktaon ke dara unake pas bada yatn karake kahala bheje haai, unako unhon ne naheen suna, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah29:20 isaliye he sare bandhauo, jinhen maain ne yarooshalem se babul ko bheja haai, tum usaka yah vachan suno" 
Jeremiah29:21 kolayah ka putra ahab aur maseyah ka putra sidaakiyyah jo mere nam se tum ko joottee bhavishyadanee sunate haai, unake vishay israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki suno, maain unako babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke hath men kar doonga, aur vah unako tumhare samhane mar dalega." 
Jeremiah29:22 aur sab yahoodee bandhauae jo babul men rahate haai, unakee upama dekar yah shaap diya karenge yahova tujhe sidaakiyyah aur ahab ke saman kare, jinhen babul ke raja ne ag men boon dala," 
Jeremiah29:23 kyonaki unhon ne israaaeliyon men mooddhta ke kam kia, arthata apane padosiyon kee striayon ke sath vyaabhaichar kiya, aur bina meree agyaa paae mere nam se jootte vachan kahe. isaka jananevala aur gavah maain ap hee hoo, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah29:24 aur nehelamee shamayah se too yah kah, ki, israaael ke parameshvar yahova ne yon kaha haai," 
Jeremiah29:25 isaliye ki too ne yarooshalem ke sab rahanevalon aur sab yajakon ko aur yaseyah ke putra sapanyah yajak ko apane hee nam kee is ashay kee patraee bhejee," 
Jeremiah29:26 ki, yahava ne yahoyada yajak ke sthan par tujhe yajak tthara diya taaki too yahova ke bhvan men rakhval hokar jitane vahan pagalapan karate aur bhvishyadvkta ban baaitte haain unhen katt men ttonke aur unake gale men lohe ke patte dale." 
Jeremiah29:27 so yirmayah anatotee jo tumhara bhvishyadvkta ban baaitta haai, usako too ne kyon naheen ghaudka?" 
Jeremiah29:28 us ne to ham logon ke pas babul men yah kahala bheja haai ki bandhauai to bahut kal tak rahegee, so ghar banakar un men raho, aur baariyan lagakar unake fal khao." 
Jeremiah29:29 yah patraee sapanyah yajak ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko paddh sunai. 
Jeremiah29:30 tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha ki sab bandhauon ke pas yah kahala bhej," 
Jeremiah29:31 yahova nehelamee shamayah ke vishay yon kahata haai ki shamayah ne mere bina bheje tum se jo bhvishyadanee kee aur tum ko joott par bhrosa dilaya haai," 
Jeremiah29:32 isaliye yahova yon kahata haai, ki suno, maain us nehelamee shamayah aur usake vansh ko dand diya chahata hoo usake ghar men se koi in prajaon men n rah jaaega. 33 aur jo bhlai maain apanee praja kee karanevala hoo, usako vah dekhne n paaega, kyonki us ne yahova se fir jane kee baten kahee haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah30:1 yahova ka jo vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha vah yah haai 
Jeremiah30:2 israaael ka parameshvar yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, jo vachan maain ne tujh se kahe haain un sabhon ko pustak men likh le." 
Jeremiah30:3 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai, aeese din ate haain ki maain apanee israaaelee aur yahoodee praja ko bandhauai se lautta launga aur jo desh maain ne unake pitaron ko diya tha us men unhen faer le aunga, aur ve fir usake adhaikaree honge, yahova ka yahee vachan he." 
Jeremiah30:4 jo vachan yahova ne israaaeliyon aur yahoodiyon ke vishay kahe the, ve ye haain" 
Jeremiah30:5 yahova yon kahata haai thrathra denevala shabd sunai de raha haai, shaantai nahee, bhy hee ka haai." 
Jeremiah30:6 poochho to bhla, aur dekho, kya purush ko bhee kaheen janane kee peeda utttee haai? fir kya karan haai ki sab purush jachcha kee nai apanee apanee kamar apane hathon se dabaae huae dekh padte haain? kyon sab ke mukh faeeke rang ke ho gaae haain?" 
Jeremiah30:7 hay, hay, vah din kya hee bharee hoga! usake saman aur koi din naheen vah yakoob ke sankatt ka samay hoga parantu vah us se bhee chhudaya jaaega." 
Jeremiah30:8 aur senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki us din maain usaka rakha hua jooa tumharee gardan par se tod doonga, aur tumhare bandhanon ko ttukade-ttukade kar daloonga aur paradeshaee fir un se apanee seva n karane paaenge." 
Jeremiah30:9 parantu ve apane parameshvar yahova aur apane raja daud kee seva karenge jisako maain un par rajy karane ke liye ttharaunga. 
Jeremiah30:10 isaliye he mere das yakoob, tere liye yahova kee yah vanee haai, mat dra he israaael, vismait n ho kyonaki maain door desh se tujhe aur tere vansh ko bandhauai ke desh se chhuda le aunga. tab yakoob lauttkar, chaain aur sukh se rahega, aur koi usako drane n paaega." 
Jeremiah30:11 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai, tumhara uddhar karane ke liye maain tumhare sang hoo isaaliye maain un sab jatiyon ka ant kar daloonga, jin men maain ne unhen titara-abitar kiya haai, parantu tumhara ant n karoonga. tumharee tadna maain vichar karake karoonga, aur tumhen kisee prakar se nidash n ttharaunga." 
Jeremiah30:12 yahova yon kahata haai tere dukh kee koi aushadha nahee, aur teree chott gaahiree aur dukhprad haai." 
Jeremiah30:13 tera mukama ladne ke liye koi nahee, tera ghaav bandhane ke liye n pattee, n malaham haai." 
Jeremiah30:14 tere sab mitra tujhe bool gaae ve tumharee suadhai naheen lete kyonki tere bade adharma aur bharee papon ke kara, maain ne shatra banakar tujhe mara haai maain ne kroor banakar tadn dee haai." 
Jeremiah30:15 too apane ghaav ke mare kyon chillatee haai? teree peeda kee koi aushadha naheen. tere bade adharma aur bharee papon ke karan maain ne tujh se aeesa vyavahar kiya haai. 
Jeremiah30:16 parantu jitane tujhe ab khaae lete haai, ve ap hee khaae jaaenge, aur tere draehee ap sab ke sab bandhauai men jaaenge aur tere loottnevale ap luttenge or jitane tera dhan chheenate haai, unaka dhan maain chhnaivaunga." 
Jeremiah30:17 maain tera ilaj karake tere ghaavon ko changa karoonga, yahova kee yah vanee haai kyonki tera nam ttukarai hui pada haai vah to siyyon haai, usakee chinta kaun karata haai?" 
Jeremiah30:18 yahova kahata haai maain yakoob ke tamboo ko bandhauai se lauttata hoo aur usake gharon par daya karoonga or nagar apane hee khndhar par fir basega, aur rajabhvan paahile ke anusar fir ban jaaega." 
Jeremiah30:19 tab un men se dhany kahane, aur anand karane ka shabd sunai padega." 
Jeremiah30:20 maain unaka vibhv baddhaunga, aur ve thode n honge. unake ladkevale praacheenakal ke saman honge, aur unakee mandlee mere samhane sthiar rahegee aur jitane un par andhor karate haain unako maain dand doonga." 
Jeremiah30:21 unaka mahapurush unheen men se hoga, aur jo un par prabhuta karega, vah unheen men se utpann hoga maain use apane nikatt bulaunga, aur vah mere sameep a bhee jaega, kyonki kaun haai jo apane ap mere sameep a sakata haai? yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah30:22 us samay tum meree praja ttharoge, aur maain tumhara parameshvar ttharoonga." 
Jeremiah30:23 dekho, yahova kee jalajalahatt kee andhaee chal rahee haai! vah ati prachand andhaee haai dushtton ke sir par vah jor se lagegee." 
Jeremiah30:24 jab tak yahova apana kam n kar chuke aur apanee yuaktaiyon ko pooree n kar chuke, tab tak usaka bhdka hua krodha shaant n hoga. ant ke dinon men tum is bat ko samajh sakoge." 
Jeremiah31:1 un dinon men maain sare israaelee kulon ka parameshvar ttharoonga aur ve meree praja ttharenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah31:2 yahova yon kahata haai jo praja talavar se bach nikalee, un par jangal men anugrah hua maain israaael ko vishraam dene ke liye taaiyar hua." 
Jeremiah31:3 yahova ne mujhe door se darshan dekar kaha haai. maain tujh se sada praem rakhta aya hoo is karan maain ne tujh par apanee karuna banaae rakhee haai. 
Jeremiah31:4 he israaaelee kumaree kanya! maain tujhe fir basaunga vahan too fir singar karake dfa bajane lagegee, aur anand karanevalon ke beech men nachatee hui nikalegee." 
Jeremiah31:5 too shaemaron ke pahadon par angoor kee bariyan fir lagaaegee aur jo unhen lagaaenge, ve unake fal bhee khane paaenge." 
Jeremiah31:6 kyonaki aeesa din aaega, jis men aepraaim ke pahadee desh ke paharuae pukarenge utto, ham apane parameshvar yahova ke pas siyyon ko chalen." 
Jeremiah31:7 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai yakoob ke karan anand se jayajayakar karo jaatiyon men jo shraeshtt haai usake liye unche shabad se stuati karo, aur kaho, he yahova, apanee praja israaael ke bache huae logon ka bhee uddhar kara." 
Jeremiah31:8 dekho, maain unako uttar desh se le aunga, aur prathvee ke kone kone se ikatthe karoonga, aur unake beech andho, langade, garbhvatee, aur jachcha striayan bhee aaengee aek badee mandlee yahan lautt aaegee." 
Jeremiah31:9 ve ansoo bahate huae aaenge aur gidgidate huae mere dara pahunchaae jaaenge, maain unhen naadiyon ke kinare kinare se aur aeese chauras marga se le aunga, jis se ve ttokar n khane paaenge kyonaki maain israaael ka pita hoo, aur aepraaim mera jetta haai." 
Jeremiah31:10 he jaati jati ke logo, yahova ka vachan suno, aur door door ke deepon men bhee isaka prachar karo kaho, ki jis ne israaaeliyon ko titara- bitar kiya tha, vahee unhen ikatthe bhee karega, aur unakee aeesee raksha karega jaaisee charavaha apane jhund kee karata haai." 
Jeremiah31:11 kyonaki yahova ne yakoob ko chhuda liya, aur us shatra ke panje se jo us se aadhaik balavant haai, use chhuttkara diya haai." 
Jeremiah31:12 isaliye ve siyyon kee chottee par akar jayajayakar karenge, aur yahova se anaj, naya dakhmadha, ttttka tel, bhed-bakaariyan aur gaya-baailon ke bachche adi uttam uttam dan pane ke liye tanta bandhakar chalenge aur unaka praan seenchee hui baree ke saman hoga, aur ve fir kabhee udas n honge." 
Jeremiah31:13 us samay unakee kumaariyan nachatee hui harsha karengee, aur javan aur booddhe ek sang anand karenge. kyonki maain unake shaek ko door karake unhen anandait karoonga, maain unhen shaaantai doonga, aur dukh ke badale anand doonga." 
Jeremiah31:14 maain yajakon ko chikanee vastuon se aati trapt karoonga, aur meree praja mere uttam danon se santushtt hogee, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah31:15 yahova yah bhee kahata haai sun, rama nagar men vilap aur bilak bilakakar rone ka shabd sunane men ata haai. rahel apane ladkon ke liye ro rahee haai aur apane ladkon ke karan shaant naheen hotee, kyonki ve jate rahe." 
Jeremiah31:16 yahova yon kahata he rone-peettne aur ansoo bahane se ruk ja kyonki tere paarishram ka fal milanevala haai, aur ve shatrauon ke desh se lautt aaenge." 
Jeremiah31:17 ant men teree asha pooree hogee, yahova kee yah vanee haai, tere vansh ke log apane desh men lautt aaenge." 
Jeremiah31:18 nishchay maain ne aepraaim ko ye baten kahakar vilap karate suna haai ki too ne meree tadna kee, aur meree tadna aeese bachhde kee see hui jo nikala n gaya ho parantu ab too mujhe faer, tab maain firoonga, kyonaki too mera parameshvar haai." 
Jeremiah31:19 bhttk jane ke bad maain pachhtaya aur sikhaae jane ke bad maain ne chhatee peettee purane papon ko smasan kar maain laajjait hua aur mera munh kala ho gaya. 
Jeremiah31:20 kya aepraaim mera piry putra naheen haai? kya vah mera dulara ladka naheen haai? jab jab maain usake viruddh baten karata hoo, tab tab mujhe usaka smaran ho ata haai. isaaliye mera man usake karan bhr ata haai aur maain nishchay us par daya karoonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah31:21 he israaaelee kumaree, jis rajamarga se too gai thee, usee men khmbhe aur jhnde khde kara aur apane in nagaron men lautt ane par man laga." 
Jeremiah31:22 he bhttkanevalee kanya, too kab tak idhar udhar firatee rahegee? yahova kee aek nai sraashtti prathvee par pragatt hogee, arthata naree purush kee sahayata karegee." 
Jeremiah31:23 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai jab maain yahoodee bandhauon ko unake desh ke nagaron men lauttaunga, tab un men yah ashaeervad fir diya jaaega he dharmabhre vasasthan, he paavitra parvat, yahova tujhe ashaeesh de!" 
Jeremiah31:24 aur yahooda aur usake sab nagaron ke log aur kisan aur charavahe bhee us men ikatte basenge. 
Jeremiah31:25 kyonaki maain ne thke huae logon ka praan trapt kiya, aur udas logon ke praan ko bhr diya haai." 
Jeremiah31:26 is par maain jag utta, aur dekha, or meree neend mujhe meettee lagee." 
Jeremiah31:27 dek, yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki aeese din anevale haain jin men maain israaael aur yahooda ke gharanon ke ladkebale aur pashu donon ko bahut baddhaunga." 
Jeremiah31:28 aur jis prakar se maain soch sochakar unako girata aur ddhata, nashtt karata, katt dalata aur satyanash hee karata tha, usee prakar se maain ab soch sochakar unako ropoonga aur baddhaunga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah31:29 un dinon men ve fir n kahenge ki purakha logon ne to jangalee dakh khai, parantu unake vansh ke dant khtte ho gaae haain." 
Jeremiah31:30 kyonaki jo koi jangalee dakh khaae usee ke dant khtte ho jaaenge, aur har aek manushy apane hee adharma ke karan mara jaaega." 
Jeremiah31:31 fir yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai, sun, aeese din anevale haain jab maain israaael aur yahooda ke gharanon se nai vacha bandhoonga." 
Jeremiah31:32 vah us vacha ke saman n hogee jo maain ne unake purakhaon se us samay bandhaee thee jab maain unaka hath pakadkar unhen misra desh se nikal laya, kyonki yadhyapi maain unaka paati tha, taubhee unhon ne meree vah vacha tod dalee." 
Jeremiah31:33 parantu jo vacha maain un dinon ke bad israaael ke gharane se bandhoonga, vah yah haai maain apanee vyavastha unake man men samavaunga, aur use unake day par likoonga aur maain unaka parameshvar ttharoonga, aur ve meree praja ttharenge, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah31:34 aur tab unhen fir aek doosare se yah n kahana padega ki yahova ko jano, kyonki, yahova kee yah vanee haai ki chhotte se lekar bade tak, sab ke sab mera gyaan rakhenge kyonaki maain unaka adharma kshama karoonga, aur unaka pap fir smaran n karoonga." 
Jeremiah31:35 jisane din ko prakash dene ke liye soorya ko aur rat ko prakash dene ke liye chandrama aur taragan ke niyam ttharaae haai, jo samudra ko uchhalata aur usakee laharon ko garajata haai, aur jisaka nam senaon ka yahova haai, vahee yahova yon kahata haai" 
Jeremiah31:36 yaadi ye niyam mere samhane se ttl jaaen tab hee yah ho sakega ki israaael ka vansh meree drashtti men sada ke liye aek jaati ttharane kee apeksha mitt sakega. 
Jeremiah31:37 yahova yon bhee kahata haai, yadi upar se akash mapa jaae aur neeche se puthvee kee nev khod khodakar pata lagaya jaa, tab hee maain israaael ke sare vansh ko anake sab papon ke karan un se hath uttaunga." 
Jeremiah31:38 dek, yahova kee yah vanee haai, aeese din a rahe haain jin men yah nagar hananel ke gummatt se lekar kone ke faattk tak yahova ke liye banaya jaaega." 
Jeremiah31:39 aur mapane kee rassee fir age baddhkar seedhaee gareb pahadee tak, aur vahan se ghoomakar goa ko pahunchegee." 
Jeremiah31:40 aur lothon aur rakh kee sab tarai aur kidraen nale tak jitane khet haai, ghaedon ke poova faattk ke kone tak jitanee boomi haai, vah sab yahova ke liye paavitra ttharegee. sada tak vah nagar fir kabhee n to giraya jaaega aur n ddhaya jaaegau" 
Jeremiah32:1 yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke dasaven varsha men jo nabookadanessar ke rajy ka attarahavan varsha tha, yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha." 
Jeremiah32:2 us samay babul ke raja kee sena ne yarooshalem ko ghor liya tha aur yirmayah bhvishyadvkta yahooda ke raja ke pahare ke bhvan ke angan men kaaidee tha. 
Jeremiah32:3 kyonaki yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ne yah kahakar use kaaid kiya tha, ki, too aeesee bhavishyadanee kyon karata haai ki yahova yon kahata haai dekho, maain yah nagar babul ke raja ke vash men kar doonga, vah isako le lega" 
Jeremiah32:4 aur yahooda ka raja sidaakiyyah kasaadiyon ke hath se n bachega parantu vah babul ke raja ke vash men avashy hee padega, aur vah aur babul ka raja apas men amhane-samhane baten karenge aur apanee apanee ankhon se aek doosare ko dekhenge." 
Jeremiah32:5 aur vah sidaakiyyah ko babul men le jaaega, aur jab tak maain usakee suadhai n loo, tab tak vah vaheen rahega, yahova kee yah vanee haai. chahe tum log kasaadiyon se lado bhee, taubhee tumhare ladne se kuchh ban n padega." 
Jeremiah32:6 yirmayah ne kaha, yahova ka vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah32:7 dek, shallam ka putra hanamel jo tera chachera bhai haai, so tere pas yah kahane ko ane par haai ki mera khet jo anatot men haai use mol le, kyonki use mol lekar chhudane ka aadhaikar tera hee haai." 
Jeremiah32:8 so yahova ke vachan ke anusar mera chachera bhai hanamel pahare ke angan men mere pas akar kahane laga, mera jo khet binyameen desh ke anatot men haai use mol le, kyonaki usake svamee hone aur usake chhuda lene ka adhaikar tera hee haai isaliye too use mol le. tab maain ne jan liya ki vah yahova ka vachan tha." 
Jeremiah32:9 isaliye maain ne us anatot ke khet ko apane chachere bhai hanamel se mol le liya, aur usaka dam chandee ke sattarah shokel taulakar de diae." 
Jeremiah32:10 aur maain ne dastaveja men dastakht aur muhar ho jane par, gavahon ke samhane vah chandee kantte men taulakar use de dee." 
Jeremiah32:11 tab maain ne mol lene kee donon dastabejen jin men sab shatan likhee hui thee, aur jin men se aek par muhar thee aur doosaree khulee thee," 
Jeremiah32:12 unhen lekar apane chachere bhai hanamel ke aur un gavahon ke samhane jinhon ne dastaveja men dastakht kiae the, aur un sab yahoodiyon ke samhane bhee jo pahare ke angan men baaitte huae the, neariyyah ke putra barook ko jo mahaseyah ka pota tha, saunp diya." 
Jeremiah32:13 tab maain ne unake samhane barook ko yah agyaa dee 
Jeremiah32:14 ki israaael ke parameshvar senaon ke yahova yon kahata haai, in mol lene kee dastavejaon ko jin par muhar kee hui haai aur jo khulee hui haai, inhen lekar mittee ke bartan men rak, taaki ye bahut din tak rahen." 
Jeremiah32:15 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, is desh men ghar aur khet or dakh kee baariyan fir bechee aur mol lee jaaengee." 
Jeremiah32:16 jab maain ne mol lene kee vah dastaveja neariyyah ke putra barook ke hath men dee, tab maain ne yahova se yah praarthna kee," 
Jeremiah32:17 he prabhu yahova, too ne bade samarth aur baddhai hui bhuja se akash aur prathvee ko banaya haai! tere liye koi kam kattnai naheen haai." 
Jeremiah32:18 too hajaron par karuna karata rahata parantu poorvajon ke adharma ka badala unake bad unake vansh ke logon ko bhee deta haai, he mahan aur parakramee parameshvar, jisaka nam senaon ka yahova haai," 
Jeremiah32:19 too badee yuaktai karanevala aur samarth ke kam karanevala haai teree drashtti manushyon ke sare chalachalan par lagee rahatee haai, aur too har aek ko usake chalachalan aur karma ka fal bhugatata haai." 
Jeremiah32:20 too ne misra desh men chinh aur chamatkar kia, aur aj tak israaaeliyon varan sab manushyon ke beech vaaisa karata aya haai, aur is prakar too ne apana aeesa nam kiya haai jo aj ke din tak bana haai." 
Jeremiah32:21 too apanee praja israaael ko misra desh men se chinhon aur chamatkaron aur samath hath aur baddhai hui bhuja ke dara, aur bade bhyanak kamon ke sath nikal laya." 
Jeremiah32:22 fir too ne yah desh unhen diya jisake dene kee shapath too ne unake poorvajon se khai thee jisamen doodha aur madha kee dhaaraaen bahatee haai, aur ve akar isake aadhaikaree hue." 
Jeremiah32:23 taubhee unhon ne teree naheen manee, aur n teree vyavastha par chale varan jo kuchh too ne unako karane kee agyaa dee thee, us men se unhon ne kuchh bhee naheen kiya. is karan too ne un par yah sab vipaattai dalee haai." 
Jeremiah32:24 ab in damadamon ko dek, ve log is nagar ko le lene ke liye a gaae haai, or yah nagar talavar, mahangee aur maree ke karan in chaddhe huae kasaadiyon ke vash men kiya gaya haai. jo too ne kaha tha vah ab poora hua haai, aur too ise dekhta bhee haai." 
Jeremiah32:25 taubhee, he prabhu yahova, too ne mujh se kaha haai ki gavah bulakar us khet ko mol le, yadhypi ki yah nagar kasadiyon ke vash men kar diya gaya haai." 
Jeremiah32:26 tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha, maain to sab praaanaiyon ka parameshvar yahova hoo" 
Jeremiah32:27 kya mere liye koi bhee kam kattnai haai? 
Jeremiah32:28 so yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain yah nagar kasadiyon aur babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke vash men kar dene par hoo, aur vah isako le lega." 
Jeremiah32:29 jo kasadee is nagar se yuddh kar rahe haai, ve akar is men ag lagakar foonk denge, aur jin gharon kee chhton par unhon ne bal ke liye dhoop jalakar aur doosare devataon ko tapavan dekar mujhe ris dilai haai, ve ghar jala diae jaaenge." 
Jeremiah32:30 kyonaki israaael aur yahooda, jo kam mujhe bura lagata haai, vahee ladkapan se karate aae haain israaaelee apanee banai hui vastuon se mujh ko ris hee ris dilate aae haai, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah32:31 yah nagar jab se basa haai tab se aj ke din tak mere krodha aur jalajalahatt ke bhdkane ka karan hua haai, isaliye ab maain isako apane samhane se is karan door karoonga" 
Jeremiah32:32 kyonaki israaael aur yahooda apane rajaon hakimo, yajakon or bhvishyadvktaon samet, kya yahooda desh ke, kya yarooshalalem ke nivasee, sab ke sab burai par burai karake mujh ko ris dilate aae hen." 
Jeremiah32:33 unhon ne meree or munh naheen varan peett hee faer dee haai yadhyapi maain unhen bade yatn se sikhata aya hoo, taubhee unhon ne meree shaiksha ko naheen mana." 
Jeremiah32:34 varan jo bhvan mera kahalata haai, us men bhee unhon ne apanee gharaanait vastuen sthapan karake use ashuuddh kiya haai." 
Jeremiah32:35 unhon ne hinnomiyon kee tarai men bal ke unche unche sthan banakar apane bette-beattyaien ko molak ke liye hom kiya, jisakee agyaa maain ne kabhee naheen dee, aur n yah bat kabhee mere man men ai ki aeesa gharanait kam kiya jaae aur jis se yahoodee log pap men fanse." 
Jeremiah32:36 parantu ab israaael ka parameshvar yahova is nagar ke vishay me, jisake liye tum log kahate ho ki vah talavar, mahangee aur maree ke dara babul ke raja ke vash men pada hua haai yon kahata haai" 
Jeremiah32:37 dekho, maain unako un sab deshaen se jin men maain ne krodha aur jalajalahatt men akar unhen barabas nikal diya tha, lautta le akar isee nagar men ikatthe karoonga, aur nidr karake basa doonga." 
Jeremiah32:38 aur ve meree praja ttharenge, aur maain unaka parameshshvar ttharoonga" 
Jeremiah32:39 maain unako aek hee man aur aek hee chal kar doonga ki ve sada mera bhy manate rahe, jis se unaka aur unake bad unake vansh ka bhee bhla ho." 
Jeremiah32:40 maain un se yah vacha bandhoonga, ki maain kabhee unaka sang chhodkar unaka bhla karana n chhodoonga aur apana bhy maain unake man se aeesa upajaunga ki ve kabhee mujh se alag hona n chahenge." 
Jeremiah32:41 maain badee prasannata ke sath unaka bhla karata rahoonga, aur sachamuch unhen is desh men apane sare man or praan se basa doonga." 
Jeremiah32:42 dek, yahova yon kahata haai ki jaaise maain ne apanee is praja par yah sab badee vipaattai dal dee, vaaise hee nishchay in se vah sab bhlai bhee karoonga jisake karane ka vachan maain ne diya he. so yah desh jisake vishay tum log kahate ho" 
Jeremiah32:43 ki yah ujad ho gaya haai, is men n to manushy rah gaae haain aur n pashu, yah to kasaadiyon ke vash men pad chuka haai, isee men fir se khet mol liae jaaenge," 
Jeremiah32:44 aur binyameen ke desh me, yarooshalem ke as pas, aur yahooda desh ke arthata pahadee desha, neeche ke desh aur dakkhian desh ke nagaron men log gavah bulakar khet mol lenge, aur dastaveja men dastakht aur muhar karenge kyonki maain unake dinon ko lautta le aunga yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah33:1 jis samay yirmayah pahare ke angan men band tha, us samay yahova ka vachan doosaree bar usake pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah33:2 yahova jo prathvee ka rachanevala haai, jo usako sthiar karata haai, usaka nam yahova haai vah yah kahata haai," 
Jeremiah33:3 mujh se praarthna kar aur maain teree sunakar tujhe baddhee-badee aur kaattnai baten bataunga jinhen too abhee naheen samajhta. 
Jeremiah33:4 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar yahova is nagar ke gharon aur yahooda ke rajaon ke bhvanon ke vishay men jo isaliye giraae jate haain ki damadamon aur talavar ke sath subheete se lad sake, yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah33:5 kasadiyon se yuddh karane ko ve log ate to haai, parantu maain krodha aur jalajalahatt men akar unako maravaunga aur unakee lothen usee sthan men bhr doonga kyonaki unakee dushttta ke karan maain ne is nagar se mukh faer liya haai." 
Jeremiah33:6 dek, maain is nagar ka ilaj karake isake nivaasiyon ko changa karoonga aur un par pooree shaaantai aur sachchai pragatt karoonga." 
Jeremiah33:7 maain yahooda aur israaael ke bandhauon ko lautta le aunga, aur unhen pahile kee nai basaunga." 
Jeremiah33:8 maain unako unake sare adharma aur pap ke kam se shuuddh karoonga jo unhon ne mere viruddh kiae haain aur unhon ne jitane adharma aur aparadha ke kam mere viruddh kiae haai, un sab ko maain kshama karoonga." 
Jeremiah33:9 kyonaki ve vah sab bhlai ke kam sunenge jo maain unake liye karoonga aur ve sab kalyan aur shaaantai kee charcha sunakar jo maain un se karoonga, drenge aur thrathraaenge ve prathvee kee un jaatiyon kee draashtti men mere liye hasharanevale aur stuati aur shaebha ka karan ho jaaenge." 
Jeremiah33:10 yahova yon kahata haai, yah sthan jisake vishay tum log kahate ho ki yah to ujad ho gaya haai, is men n to manushy rah gaya haai aur n pashu, arthata yahooda desh ke nagar aur yarooshalem kee sadken jo aeesee sunasan padee haain ki un men n to koi manushy rahata haai aur n koi pashu," 
Jeremiah33:11 inheen men harsha aur anand ka shabd, dulhe-dulhain ka shabd, aur is bat ke kahanevalon ka shabd fir sunai padega ki senaon ke yahova ka dhanyavad karo, kyonki yahova bhla haai, aur usakee karuna sada kee haai. aur yahova ke bhvan men dhanyavadabali lanevalon ka bhee shabd sunai dega kyonaki maain is desh kee dasha paahile kee nai jyon kee tyon kar doonga, yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Jeremiah33:12 senaon ka yahova kahata haai sab ganvon samet yah sthan jo aeesa ujad haai ki is men n to manushy rah gaya haai aur n pashu, isee men bhed-bakaariyan baaittanevale charavahe fir basenge." 
Jeremiah33:13 pahadee desh men aur neeche ke desh me, dakkhian desh ke nagaron me, binyameen desh me, aur yarooshalem ke as pas, nidan yahooda desh ke sab nagaron men bhed-bakaariyan fir gina-ginakar charai jaaengee, yahova ka yahee vachan he." 
Jeremiah33:14 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai, dek, aeese din anevale haain ki kalyan ka jo vachan maain ne israaael aur yahooda ke gharanon ke vishay men kaha haai, use poora karoonga." 
Jeremiah33:15 un dinon men aur un samayon men maain daud ke vansh men dharma kee ek dal ugaunga aur vah is desh men nyay aur dharma ke kam karega. 
Jeremiah33:16 un dinon men yahooda bacha rahega aur yarooshalem nidr basa rahega aur usaka nam yah rakha jaega athraata yahova hamaree dhaarmikata. 
Jeremiah33:17 yahova yon kahata haai, daud ke kul men israaael ke gharane kee gaee par virajanevale sadaaiv bane rahenge," 
Jeremiah33:18 aur leveey yajakon ke kulon men praatidin mere liye homabaali chaddhanevale aur annabaali jalanevale aur melabali chaddhanevale sadaaiv bane rahenge. 
Jeremiah33:19 fir yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha, yahova yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah33:20 maain ne din aur rat ke vishay men jo vacha bandhaee haai, jab tum usako aeesa tod sako ki din aur rat apane apane samay men n ho," 
Jeremiah33:21 tab hee jo vacha maain ne apane das daud ke sang bandhaee haai toott sakegee, ki tere vansh kee gaee par virajanevale sadaaiv bane rahenge, aur meree vacha meree seva tthal karatevale leveey yajakon ke sang bandhaee rahegee." 
Jeremiah33:22 jaaisa akash kee sena kee ginatee aur samudra kee baloo ke kinakon ka pariman naheen ho sakata haai usee prakar maain apane das daud ke vansh aur apane sevak leaviyon ko baddhakar anaaginit kar doonga. 
Jeremiah33:23 yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahucha, kya too ne naheen dekha" 
Jeremiah33:24 ki ye log kya kahate haai, ki, jo do kul yahova ne chun liae the un donon se us ne ab hath uttaya haai? yah kahakar ki ye meree praja ko tuchchh janate haain aur ki yah jati unakee drashtti men gir gai haai." 
Jeremiah33:25 yahova yon kahata haai, yadi din aur rat ke vishay meree vacha attl n rahe, aur yadi akash aur prathvee ke niyam mere ttharaae huae n rah jaae," 
Jeremiah33:26 tab hee maain yakoob ke vansh se hath uttaunga,aur ibraaheem, isahak aur yakoob ke vansh par prabhuta karane ke liye apane das daud ke vansh men se kisee ko fir n ttharaunga. parantu isake vipareet maain un par daya karake unako bandhauai se lautta launga." 
Jeremiah34:1 jab babul ka raja nabookadanessar apanee saree sena samet aur prathvee ke jitane rajy usake vash men the, un sabhon ke logon samet yarooshalem aur usake sab ganvon se lad raha tha, tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah34:2 israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jakar yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah se kah, yahova yon kahata haai, ki dek, maain is nagar ko babul ke raja ke vash men kar dene par hoo, aur vah ise faunkava dega." 
Jeremiah34:3 aur too usake hath se n bachega, nishchay pakada jaaega aur usake vash men kar diya jaaega aur teree ankhen babul ke raja ko dekhengee, aur tum amhane-samhane baten karoge aur too babul ko jaaega." 
Jeremiah34:4 taubhee he yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah, yahova ka yah bhee vachan tun jise yahova tere vishay men kahata haai, ki too talavar se mara n jaaega." 
Jeremiah34:5 too shaantai ke sath marega. aur jaaisa tere pitaron ke liye arthata jo tujh se paahile raja the, unake liye sugandha dravy jalaya gaya, vaaisa hee tere liye bhee jalaya jaaega aur log yah kahakar, hay mere prabhu! tere liye chhatee peettenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah34:6 ye sab vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ne yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah se yarooshalem men us samay kahe," 
Jeremiah34:7 jab babul ke raja kee sena yarooshalem se aur yahooda ke jitane nagar bach gaae the, un se arthata lakeesh aur ajeka se lad rahee thee kyonaki yahooda ke jo gaddhvale nagar the un men se keval ve hee rah gaae the." 
Jeremiah34:8 yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas us samay aya jab sidaakiyyah raja ne saree praja se jo yarooshalem men thee yah vacha bandhaai ki dason ke svadhaeen hone ka prachar kiya jaa," 
Jeremiah34:9 ki sab log apane apane dasa-dasee ko jo ibraee va iabirn hon svadhaeen karake jane de, aur koi apane yahudee bhai se fir apanee seva n karaae." 
Jeremiah34:10 tab sab haakimon aur saree praja ne yah pran kiya ki ham apane apane dasa-daasiyon ko svatantra kar denge aur fir un se apanee seva n karaaenge so us pran ke anusar unako svatantra kar diya. 
Jeremiah34:11 parantu isake bad ve fir gaae aur jin dasa-daasiyon ko unhon ne svatatra karake jane diya tha unako fir apane vash men lakar das aur dasee bana liya. 
Jeremiah34:12 tab yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah34:13 israaael ka parameshvar yahova tum se yon kahata haai, jis samay maain tumhare pitaron ko dasatv ke ghar arthata misra desh se nikal le aya, us samay maain ne ap un se yah kahakar vacha bandhae" 
Jeremiah34:14 ki tumhara jo ibraee bhai tumhare hath men becha jaae usako tum sataven baras men chhod dena chh baras to vah tumharee seva kare parantu isake bad tum usako svatantra karake apane pas se jane dena. parantu tumhare pitaron ne meree n sunee, n meree or kan lagaya." 
Jeremiah34:15 tum abhee fire to the aur apane apane bhai ko svatantra kar dene ka prachar karake jo kam meree draashtti men bhla he use tum ne kiya bhee tha, aur jo bhvan mera kahalata haai us men mere samhane vacha bhee bandhaee thee" 
Jeremiah34:16 par tum bhttk gaae aur mera nam is reeati se ashuuddh kiya ki jin dasa-daasiyon ko tum svatantra karake unakee ichchha par chhod chuke the unhen tum ne fir apane vash men kar liya haai, aur ve fir tumhare dasa- dasiyan ban gaae haain." 
Jeremiah34:17 is karan yahova yon kahata haai ki tum ne jo meree agyaa ke anusar apane apane bhai ke svatantra hone ka prachar naheen kiya, so yahova ka yah vachan haai, suno, maain tumhare is prakar se svatantra hone ka prachar karata hoo ki tum talavar, maree aur mahangee men padoge aur maain aeesa karoonga ki tum prathvee ke rajy rajy men mare mare firoge." 
Jeremiah34:18 aur jo log meree vacha ka ullanghan karate haain aur jo pran unhon ne mere samhane aur bachhde ko do bhag karake usake donon bhagon ke beech hokar kiya parantu use poora n kiya," 
Jeremiah34:19 arthata yahooda desh aur yarooshalem nagar ke haakim, khoje, yajak aur sadhaaran log jo bachhde ke bhagon ke beech hokar gaae the," 
Jeremiah34:20 unako maain unake shatrauon arthata unake praan ke khojiyon ke vash men kar doonga aur unakee loth akash ke paakshiayon aur maaidan ke pashuuon ka ahar ho jaengee. 
Jeremiah34:21 aur maain yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah aur usake hakimon ko unake shatrauon aur unake praan ke khojiyon arthata babul ke raja kee sena ke vash men kar doonga jo tumhare samhane se chalee gai haai. 
Jeremiah34:22 yahova ka yah vachan haai ki dekho, maain unako agyaa dekar is nagar ke pas lautta le aunga aur ve ladkar ise le lenge aur foonk denge aur yahooda ke nagaron ko maain aeesa ujad doonga ki koi un men n rahega." 
Jeremiah35:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy men yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha 
Jeremiah35:2 rekabiyon ke gharane ke pas jakar un se baten kar aur unhen yahova ke bhvan kee aek kottree men le jakar dakhmadha pila. 
Jeremiah35:3 tab maain ne yajanyah ko jo habassainyah ka pota aur yirmayah ka putra tha, aur usake bhaiyon aur sab putraen ko, nidan rekabiyon ke sare gharane ko sath liya." 
Jeremiah35:4 aur maain unako parameshvar ke bhvan me, yigdalyah ke putra hanan, jo parameshvar ka aek jan t, usakee kottree men le aya jo hakimon kee us kottree ke pas thee aur shalloom ke pratra devaddhee ke rakhvale maseyah kee kottree ke upar thee." 
Jeremiah35:5 tab maain ne rekaabiyon ke gharane ko dakhmadha se bhre huae hande aur kattore dekar kaha, dakhmadha peeo." 
Jeremiah35:6 unhon ne kaha, ham dakhmadha n peeenge kyonki rekab ke putra yonadab ne jo hamara purakha tha ham ko yah agyaa dee thee ki tum kabhee dakhmadha n peena n tum, n tumhare putra." 
Jeremiah35:7 n ghar banana, n beej bona, n dakh kee baree lagana, aur n unake aadhaikaree hona parantu jeevan bhr tambuon hee men rahana jis se jis desh men tum paradeshaee ho, us men bahut din tak jeete raho." 
Jeremiah35:8 isaliye ham rekab ke putra apane purakha yonadab kee bat manakar, usakee saree agyaaon ke anusar chalate haai, n ham aur n hamaree striayan va putra-puatraiyan kabhee dakh madha peetee haai," 
Jeremiah35:9 aur n ham ghar banakar un men rahate haain. ham n dakh kee baree, n khet, aur n beej rakhte haain" 
Jeremiah35:10 ham tambuon hee men raha karate haai, aur apane purakha yonadab kee bat manakar usakee saree agyaaon ke anusar kam karate haain." 
Jeremiah35:11 parantu jab babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne is desh par chaddhai kee, tab ham ne kaha, chalo, kasadiyon aur aramiyon ke dalon ke dr ke mare yarooshalem men jaaen. is karan ham ab yarooshalem men rahate haain." 
Jeremiah35:12 tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha. 
Jeremiah35:13 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki jakar yahooda desh ke logon aur yarooshalem nagar ke nivaasiyon se kah, yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya tum shaiksha manakar meree n sudoge?" 
Jeremiah35:14 dekho, rekab ke putra yonadab ne jo agyaa apane vansh ko dee thee ki tum dakhmadha n peena so to manee gai haai yahan tak ki aj ke din bhee ve log kuchh naheen peete, ve apane purakha kee agyaa manate haain par yadhypi maain tum se bade yatn se kahata aya hoo, taaibhee tum ne meree naheen sunee." 
Jeremiah35:15 maain tumhare pas apane sare das nabiyon ko bada yatn karake yah kahane ko bhejata aya hoo ki apanee buree chal se firo, aur apane kam sudhaaro, aur doosare devataon ke peechhe jakar unakee upasana mat karo tab utum is desh men jo maain ne tumhare pitaron ko diya tha aur tum ko bhee diya haai, basane paoge. par tum ne meree or kan naheen lagaya n meree sunee haai." 
Jeremiah35:16 dekho rekab ke putra yonadab ke vansh ne to apane purakha kee agyaa ko man liya par tum ne meree naheen sunee. 
Jeremiah35:17 isaliye senaon ka parameshvar yahova, jo israaael ka parameshvar haai, yon kahata haai ki dekho, yahooda desh aur yarooshalem nagar ke sare nivaasiyon par jitanee vipaattai dalane kee maain ne charcha kee haai vah un par ab dalata hoo kyonki maain ne unako sunaya par unhon ne naheen suna, maain ne unako bulaya par unhon ne uttar n diya." 
Jeremiah35:18 aur rekabiyon ke gharane se yirmayah ne kaha, israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova tum se yon kahata haai, isaliye ki tum ne jo apane purakha yonadab kee agyaa manee, varan usakee sab agyaaon ko man liya aur jo kuchh us ne kaha usake anusar kam kiya haai," 
Jeremiah35:19 isaliye israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, rekab ke putra yonadab ke vansh men sada aeesa jan paya jaaega jo mere sammukh khda rahe." 
Jeremiah36:1 fir yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke chauthe baras men yahova kee or se yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah36:2 aek pustak lekar jitane vachan maain ne tujh se yoshaiyyah ke dinon se lekar arthata jab maain tujh se baten karane laga us samay se aj ke din tak israaael aur yahooda aur sab jatiyon ke vishay men kahe haai, sab ko us men likh." 
Jeremiah36:3 kya jane yahooda ka gharana us saree vipaattai ka samachar sunakar jo maain un par dalane kee kalpana kar raha hoo apanee buree chal se fire aur maain unake adharma aur pap ko kshama karoon. 
Jeremiah36:4 to yirmayah ne neriyyah ke putra barook ko bulaya, aur barook ne yahova ke sab vachan jo us ne yirmayah se kahe the, usake mukh se sunakar pustak men likh diae." 
Jeremiah36:5 fir yirmayah ne barook ko agyaa dee aur kaha, maain to bandha hua hoo, maain yahova ke bhvan men naheen ja sakata." 
Jeremiah36:6 so tu upavas ke din yahova ke bhvan men jakar usake jo vachan too ne mujh se sunakar likhe haai, pustak men se logon ko paddhkar sunana, aur jitane yahoodee log apane apane nagaron se aaenge, unako bhee paddhkar sunana." 
Jeremiah36:7 kya jane ve yahova se gidgidakar praarthna karen aur apanee apanee buree chal se firen kyonki jo krodha aur jalajalahatt yahova ne apanee is praja par bhdkane ko kaha haai, vah badee haai." 
Jeremiah36:8 yirmayah bhvishyadvkta kee is agyaa ke anusar neriyyah ke putra barook ne, yahova ke bhvan men us pustak men se usake vachan paddhkar sunaae." 
Jeremiah36:9 aur yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke panchaven baras ke nauven maheene men yarooshalem men jitane log the, aur yahooda ke nagaron se jitane log yarooshalem men aae the, unhon ne yahova ke samhane upavas karane ka prachar kiya." 
Jeremiah36:10 tab barook ne yahova ke bhvan men sab logon ko shaapan ke putra gamaryah jo pradhaan tha, usakee kottree men jo upar ke angan men yahova ke bhvan ke naye faattk ke pas thee, yirmayah ke sab vachan pustak men se paddh sunaae." 
Jeremiah36:11 tab shaapan ke putra gamaryah ke bette meekayah ne yahova ke sare vachan pustak men se sune. 
Jeremiah36:12 aur vah rajabhvan ke pradhaan kee kottree men utar gaya, aur kya dekha ki vahan aeleeshama pradhaan aur shamayah ka putra dalayah aur ababor ka putra aelanatan aur shaapan ka putra gamaryah aur hananyah ka putra sidaakiyyah aur sab hakim baaitte huae haain." 
Jeremiah36:13 aur meekayah ne jitane vachan us samay sune, jab barook ne pustak men se logon ko paddh sunaae the, ve sab varnn kiae." 
Jeremiah36:14 unhen sunakar sab haakimon ne yahoodee kee jo natanyah ka putra or sholemyah ka pota aur kooshaee ka parapota tha, barook ke pas yah kahane ko bheja, ki jis pustak men se too ne sab logon ko paddh sunaya he, use apane hath men leta a. so neriyyah ka putra barook vah pustak hath men liae huae unake pas aya." 
Jeremiah36:15 tab unhon ne us se kaha, ab baaitt ja aur hamen yah paddhkar suna. tab barook ne unako paddhkar suna diya." 
Jeremiah36:16 jab ve un sab vachanon ko sun chuke, tab thrathrate huae aek doosare ko dekhne lage aur unhon ne barook se kaha, ham nishchay raja se in sab vachanon ka varnn karenge." 
Jeremiah36:17 fir unhon ne barook se kaha, ham se kah, kya too ne ye sab vachan usake mukh se sunakar likhe?" 
Jeremiah36:18 barook ne un se kaha, vah ye sab vachan apane mukh se mujhe sunata gaya or maain inhen pustak men syahee se likhta gaya." 
Jeremiah36:19 tab haakimon ne barook se kaha, ja, too apane apako aur yirmayah ko chhpai, aur koi n janane paae ki tum kahan ho." 
Jeremiah36:20 tab ve pustak ko aeleeshama pradhaan kee kottree men rakhkar raja ke pas angan men aae aur raja ko ve sab vachan kah sunaae. 
Jeremiah36:21 tab raja ne yahoodee ko pustak le ane ke liye bheja, us ne use aeleeshaama pradhaan kee kottree men se lekar raja ko aur jo haakim raja ke as pas khde the unako bhee paddh sunaya." 
Jeremiah36:22 raja shaeetakal ke bhvan men baaitta hua tha, kyonaki nauvan maheena tha aur usake samhane angeettee jal rahee thee." 
Jeremiah36:23 jab yahoodee teen char prashtt paddh chuka, tab us ne use chakoo se katta aur jo ag angeettee men thee us men faenk diya so angeettee kee ag men pooree poostak jalakar bhsm ho gai." 
Jeremiah36:24 parantu n koi dra aur n kisee ne apane kapade faade, arthata n to raja ne aur n usake kamrachaariyon men se kisee ne aeesa kiya, jinhon ne ve sab vachan sune the." 
Jeremiah36:25 aelanatan, aur dalayah, aur gamaryah ne to raja se binatee bhee kee thee ki pustak ko n jalaa, parantu us ne unakee aek n sunee." 
Jeremiah36:26 or raja ne rajaputra yarahamel ko aur ajraeeael ke putra sarayah ko aur abdel ke putra sholemyah ko agyaa dee ki barook lekhk aur yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko pakad le, parantu yahova ne unako chhpai rakha." 
Jeremiah36:27 jab raja ne un vachanon kee pustak ko jo barook ne yirmayah ke mukh se sun sunakar likhee thee, jala diya, tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha ki" 
Jeremiah36:28 fir aek aur pustak lekar us men yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem kee jalai hai paahilee pustak ke sab vachan likh de. 
Jeremiah36:29 aur yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke vishay men kah ki yahova yon kahata haai, too ne us pustak ko yah kahakar jala diya haai ki too ne us men yah kyon likha haai ki babul ka raja nishchay akar is desh ko nash karega, aur us men n to manushy ko chhodega aur n pashu ko." 
Jeremiah36:30 isaliye yahova yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke vishay men yon kahata haai, ki usaka koi daud kee gaee par virajaman n rahega aur usakee loth aeesee faenk dee jaaegee ki din ko dhaam men or rat ko pale men padee rahegee." 
Jeremiah36:31 aur maain usako aur usake vansh aur karmachariyon ko unake adharma ka dand doonga aur jitanee vipaattai maain ne un par aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon aur yahooda ke sab logon par dalane ko kaha haai, aur jisako unhon ne sach naheen mana, un sab ko maain un par daloonga." 
Jeremiah36:32 tab yirmayah ne doosaree pustak lekar neriyyah ke putra barook lekhk ko dee, aur jo pustak yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ne ag men jala dee thee, us men ke sab vachanon ko barook ne yirmayah ke mukh se sun sunakar us men likh diae aur un vachanon men unake saman aur bhee bahut see baten baddha dee gai." 
Jeremiah37:1 aur yahoyakeem ke putra konyah ke sthan par yoshaiyyah ka putra sidaakiyyah rajy karane laga, kyonki babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne usee ko yahooda desh men raja ttharaya tha." 
Jeremiah37:2 parantu n to us ne, n usake karmachariyon ne, aur n sadhaaran logon ne yahova ke vachanon ko mana jo us ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha." 
Jeremiah37:3 sidaakiyyah raja ne sholemyah ke putra yahookal or maseyah ke putra samanyah yajak ko yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke pas yah kahala bheja, ki, hamare nimitt hamare parameshvar yahova se praarthna kara." 
Jeremiah37:4 us samay yirmayah bandeegrah men n dala gaya tha, or logon ke beech aya jaya karata tha." 
Jeremiah37:5 us samay firaun kee sena chaddhai ke liye misra se nikalee tab kasadee jo yarooshalem ko ghore huae the, usaka samachar sunakar yarooshlem ke pas se chale gae." 
Jeremiah37:6 tab yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah37:7 israaael ka parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, yahuda ke jis raja ne tum ko praarthna karane ke liye mere pas bheja haai, us se yon kaho, ki dek, firaun kee jo sena tumharee sahayata ke liye nikalee haai vah apane desh misra men lautt jaaegee." 
Jeremiah37:8 aur kasadee fir vapis akar is nagar se ladenge ve isako le lenge aur foonk denge. 
Jeremiah37:9 yahova yon kahata haai, yah kahakar tum apane apane man men dhaekha n khao ki kasadee hamare pas se nishchay chale gaae haain kyonaki ve naheen chale gaae." 
Jeremiah37:10 kyonaki yadi tum ne kasaadiyon kee saree sena ko jo tum se ladtee haai, aeesa mar bhee liya hota ki un men se keval ghaayal log rah jate, taubhee ve apane apane tamboo men se uttkar is nagar ko foonk dete." 
Jeremiah37:11 jab kasadiyon kee sena firaun kee sena ke dr ke mare yarooshalem ke pas se kooch kar gai," 
Jeremiah37:12 tab yirmayah yarooshalem se nikalakar binyameen ke desh kee or isaaliye ja nikala ki vahan se aur logon ke sang apana ansh le. 
Jeremiah37:13 jab vah binyameen ke faattk men pahuncha, tab yiriyyah namak paharuon ka aek saradar vahan tha jo sholemyah ka putra aur hananyah ka pota tha, aur us ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko yah kahakar pakad liya, too kasadiyon ke pas bhaga jata haai." 
Jeremiah37:14 tab nirmayah ne kaha, yah joott haai maain kasaadiyon ke pas naheen bhaga jata hoo. parantu yiriyyah ne usakee aek n munee, so vah use pakadkar haakimon ke pas le gaya." 
Jeremiah37:15 tab haakimon ne yirmayah se krodhait hokar use pittvaya, aur yonatan pradhaan ke ghar men bandee banakar dlava diya kyonaki unhon ne usako sadhaaran bandeegrah bana diya tha." 
Jeremiah37:16 yirmayah us talaghar men jis men kai aek kottriyan thee, rahane laga." 
Jeremiah37:17 usake bahut din beetane par sidaakiyyah raja ne usako bulava bheja, aur apane bhvan men us se chhpaikar yah prashn kiya, kya yahova kee or se koi vachan paiuncha haai? yirmayah ne kaha, ha, pahuncha haai. vah yah haai, ki too babul ke raja ke vash men kar diya jaega." 
Jeremiah37:18 fir yirmayah ne sidaakiyyah raja se kaha, maain ne tera, tere karmachaariyon ka, v teree praja ka kya aparadha kiya haai, ki tum logon ne mujh ko bandeegrah men dlavaya haai?" 
Jeremiah37:19 tumhare jo bhvishyadvkta tum se bhavishyadanee karake kaha karate the ki babul ka raja tum par aur is desh par chaddhai naheen karega, ve ab kahan haai?" 
Jeremiah37:20 ab, he mere pubhu, he raja, meree praarthna grahan kar ki mujhe yonatan pradhaan ke ghar men fir n bhej, naheen to maain vahan mar jaunga." 
Jeremiah37:21 tab sidaakiyyah raja kee agyaa se yirmayah pahare ke angan men rakha gaya, aur jab tak nagar kee sab rottee n chuk gai, tab tak usako rotteevalon kee dookan men se praatidin aek rottee dee jatee thee. or yirmayah pahare ke angan men rahane laga." 
Jeremiah38:1 fir jo vachan yirmayah sab logon se kahata tha, unako mattan ke putra shapanyah, pashahoor ke putra gadalyah, sholemyah ke putra yookal aur malkaiyyah ke putra pashahoor ne suna," 
Jeremiah38:2 ki, yahova yon kahata haai ki jo koi is nagar men rahega vah talavar, pahangee or maree se marega parantu jo koi kasadiyon ke pas nikal bhage vah apana praan bachakar jeeavit rahega." 
Jeremiah38:3 yahova yon kahata haai, yah nagar babul ke raja kee sena ke vash men kar diya jaaega aur vah isako le lega." 
Jeremiah38:4 isaliye un haakimon ne raja se kaha ki us purush ko marava dal, kyonaki vah jo is nagar men bache huae yodaon aur any sab logon se aeese aeese vachan kahata haai jis se unake hath panv ddheele ho jate haain. kyonaki vah purush is praja ke logon kee bhlai naheen varan burai hee chahata haai." 
Jeremiah38:5 sidaakiyyah raja ne kaha, suno, vah to tumhare vash men he kyonaki aeesa naheen ho sakata ki raja tumhare virud kuchh kar sake." 
Jeremiah38:6 tab unhon ne yirmayah ko lekar rajaputra malkaiyyah ke us gadhe men jo pahare ke angan men tha, raassaiyon se utarakar dal diya. aur us gadhe meen panee naheen keval daladal tha, aur yirmayah keechad men dhans gaya." 
Jeremiah38:7 us samay raja binyameen ke faattk ke pas baaitta tha so jab ebedamelek kooshaee ne jo rajabhvan men ek khoja tha, suna, ki unhon ne yirmayah ko gadhe men dal diya haai,-" 
Jeremiah38:8 tab aebedamelek rajabhvan se nikalakar raja se kahane laga," 
Jeremiah38:9 he mere svamee, he raja, un logon ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta se jo kuchh kiya haai vah bura kiya haai, kyonki unhon ne usako gadhe men dal diya haai vahan vah bookh se mar jaaega kyonaki nagar men kuchh rottee naheen rahee haai." 
Jeremiah38:10 tab raja ne aebedamelek kooshaee ko yah agyaa dee ki yahan se tees purush sath lekar yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko marane se paahile gadhe men se nikala. 
Jeremiah38:11 so aebedamelek utane purushaen ko sath lekar rajabhvan ke bhndar ke talaghar men gaya aur vahan se fattepurane kapade aur chithde lekar yirmayah ke pas us gadhe men raassaiyon se utar diae. 
Jeremiah38:12 aur aebedamelek kooshaee ne yirmayah se kaha, ye purane kapade aur chithddhe apanee kankhon men raassaiyon ke neeche rakh le. so yirmayah ne vaaisa hee kiya." 
Jeremiah38:13 tab unhon ne yirmayah ko rassaiyon se kheenchakar, gadhe men se nikala. aur yirmayah pahare ke angan men rahane laga." 
Jeremiah38:14 sidaakiyyah raja ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ko yahova ke bhvan ke teesare dar men apane pas bulava bheja. aur raja ne yirmayah se kaha, maain tujh se aek bat puchhta hoo mujh se kuchh n chhpaia." 
Jeremiah38:15 yirmayah ne sidaakiyyah se kaha, yaadi maain tujhe batau, to kya too mujhe marava n dalega? aur chahe maain tujhe sammati bhee doo, taubhee too meree n manega." 
Jeremiah38:16 tab sidaakiyyah raja ne akele men yirmayah se shapath khai, yahova jis ne hamara yah jeev racha haai, usake jeevan kee saugandha n maain to tujhe marava daloonga, aur n un manushyon ke vash men kar doonga jo tere praan ke khojee haain." 
Jeremiah38:17 yirmayah ne sidaakiyyah se kaha, senaon ka parameshvar yahova jo israaael ka parameshvar haai, vah yon kahata haai, yadi too babul ke raja ke hakimon ke pas sachamuch nikal jaa, tab to tera praan bachega, aur yah nagar foonka n jaaega, aur too apane gharane samet jeevit rahega." 
Jeremiah38:18 parantu, yadi too babul ke raja ke hakimon ke pas n nikal jaa, to yah nagar kasaadiyon ke vash men kar diya jaaega, or ve ise foonk denge, aur too unake hath se bach n sakega." 
Jeremiah38:19 sidaakiyyah ne yirmayah se kaha, jo yahoodee log kasaadiyon ke pas bhag gaae haai, maain un se drata hoo, aeesa n ho ki maain unake vash men kar diya jaun aur ve mujh se ttttha karen." 
Jeremiah38:20 yirmayah ne kaha, too unake vash men n kar diya jaaega jo kuchh maain tujh se kahata hoo use yahova kee bat samajhkar man le tab tera bhla hoga, aur tera praan bachega." 
Jeremiah38:21 aur yaadi too nikal jana sveekar n kare to jo bat yahova ne mujhe darshan ke dara batai haai, vah yah haai" 
Jeremiah38:22 dek, yahooda ke raja ke ranavas men jitanee striayan rah gai haai, ve babul ke raja ke hakimon ke pas nikal kar pahunchai jaaengee, aur ve tujh se kahengee, tere mitraen ne tujhe bahakaya, aur unakee ichchha pooree ho gai aur jab tere panv keech men dhans gaae to ve peechhe fir gaae haain." 
Jeremiah38:23 teree sab striayan aur ladkebale kasadiyon ke pas nikal kar pahunchaae jaaenge aur too bhee kasadiyon ke hath se n bachega, varan too pakadkar babul ke raja ke vash men kar diya jaaega or is nagar ke foonke jane ka karan too hee hoga." 
Jeremiah38:24 tab sidaakiyyah ne yirmayah se kaha, in baton ko koi n janane paa, to too mara n jaaega." 
Jeremiah38:25 yaadi hakim log yah sunakar ki maain ne tujh se batacheet kee haai tere pas akar kahane lage, hamen bata ki too ne raja se kya kaha, ham se koi bat n chhpai, aur ham tujhe n marava dalenge aur yah bhee bata, ki raja ne tujh se kya kaha," 
Jeremiah38:26 to too un se kahana, ki maain ne raja se gidgidakar binatee kee thee ki mujhe yonatan ke ghar men fir bapis n bhej naheen to vahan mar jaunga." 
Jeremiah38:27 fir sab hakimon ne yirmayah ke pas akar poochha, aur jaaisa raja ne usako agyaa dee thee, tteek vaaisa hee us ne unako uttar diya. so ve us se aur kuchh n bole aur n vah bhed khula." 
Jeremiah38:28 is prakar jis din yarooshalem le liya gaya us din tak vah pahare ke angan hee men raha. 
Jeremiah39:1 yahooda ke raja sidaakiysah ke rajy ke nauven varsha ke dasaven maheene me, babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne apanee saree sena samet yarooshalem par chaddhai karake use ghor liya." 
Jeremiah39:2 aur sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke gyarahaven varsha ke chauthe maheene ke nauven din ko us nagar kee shaharapanah todee gai. 
Jeremiah39:3 so jab yarooshalem le liya gaya, tab nergalasareser, aur samagarnabo, aur khejon ka pradhaan sarsakeem, aur magon ka pradhaan nergalasareser adi, babul ke raja ke sab hakim beech ke faattk men pravesh karake baaitt gaae." 
Jeremiah39:4 jab yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah aur sab yodaon ne unhen dekha tab rat hee rat raja kee baree ke marga se donon bheeton ke beech ke faattk se hokar nagar se nikalakar bhag chale aur araba ka marga liya. 
Jeremiah39:5 parantu kasaadiyon kee sena ne unako khdedkar sidaakiyyah ko yareeho ke araba men ja liya aur unako babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke pas hamat desh ke ribala men le gaae aur us ne vahan usake dand kee agyaa dee. 
Jeremiah39:6 tab babul ke raja ne sidaakiyyah ke putraen ko usakee ankhon ke samhane ribala men ghaat kiya aur sab kuleen yahoodiyon ko bhee ghaat kiya. 
Jeremiah39:7 us ne sidaakiyyah kee ankhon ko faudva dala aur usako babul le jane ke liye beadiyon se jakadva rakha. 
Jeremiah39:8 kasadiyon ne rajabhvan aur praja ke gharon ko ag lagakar foonk diya, or yarooshalem kee shaharapanah ko ddha diya." 
Jeremiah39:9 tab jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan praja ke bache huon ko jo nagar men rah gaae the, aur jo log usake pas bhag aae the unako arthata praja men se jitane rah gaae un sab ko bandhaua karake babul ko le gaya." 
Jeremiah39:10 parantu praja men se jo aeese kangal the jinake pas kuchh n tha, unako jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan yahooda desh men chhod gaya, aur jate samay unako dakh kee baariyan aur khet de diae." 
Jeremiah39:11 babul ke raja nagookadanessar ne jalladon ke pradhaan naboojaradan ko yirmayah ke vishay men yah agyaa dee," 
Jeremiah39:12 ki usako lekar us par krapadraashtti banaae rakhna aur usakee kuchh hani n karana jaaisa vah tujh se kahe vaaisa hee us se vyavahar karana. 
Jeremiah39:13 so jalladon ke pradhaan naboojaradan aur khejon ke pradhaan naboosajaban aur magon ke pradhaan nergalasareser jyotishaiyon ke saradar," 
Jeremiah39:14 aur babul ke raja ke sab pradhaanon ne, logon ko bhejakar yirmayah ko pahare ke angan men se bulava liya aur gadalyah ko jo aheekam ka putra aur shaapan ka pota tha saunp diya ki vah use ghar pahunchaae. tab se vah logon ke sath rahane laga." 
Jeremiah39:15 jab yirmayah pahare ke angan men kaaid tha, tab yahova ka yah vachan usake pas pahuncha," 
Jeremiah39:16 ki, jakar aebedamelek kooshaee se kah ki israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, dek, maain apane ve vachan jo maain ne is nagar ke vishay men kaho haain is prakar poora karoonga ki isaka kushal n hoga, haani hee hogee, or us samay unaka poora hona tujhe dikhai padega." 
Jeremiah39:17 parantu yahova kee yah vanee haai ki us samay maain tujhe bachaunga, aur jin manushyon se too bhy khata haai, too unake vash men naheen kiya jaaega." 
Jeremiah39:18 kyonaki maain tujhe, nishchay bachaunga, aur too talavar se n marega, tera praan bacha rahega, yahova kee yah vanee haai. yah is karan hoga, ki too ne mujh par bhrosa rakha haai." 
Jeremiah40:1 jab jalladon ke pradhaan naboojaradan ne yirmayah ko rama men un sab yarooshalemee aur yahoodee bandhauon ke beech hathkadiyon se bandha hua pakar jo babul jane ko the chhuda liya, usake bad yahova ka vachan usake pas pahuncha." 
Jeremiah40:2 jalladon ke pradhaan naboojaradan ne yirmayah ko us samay apane pas bula liya, or kaha, is sthan par yah jo vipaattai padee haai vah tere parameshvar yahova kee kahee hui thee." 
Jeremiah40:3 or jaaisa yahova ne kaha tha vaaisa hee us ne poora bhee kiya haai. tum logon ne jo yahova ke virud pap kiya or usakee agyaa naheen manee, is karan tumharee yah dasha hui haai." 
Jeremiah40:4 ab maain teree in hathkaadiyon ko katte deta hoo, aur yadi mere sang babul men jana tujhe achchha lage to chal, vahan maain tujh par krapadraashtti rakoonga aur yadi mere sang babul jana tujhe n bhaa, to yaheen rah ja. dek, sara desh tere samhane pada he, jidhar jana tujhe achchha aur tteek janche udhar hee chala ja." 
Jeremiah40:5 vah vaheen tha ki naboojaradan ne fir us se kaha, gadalyah jo aheekam ka putra aur shaapan ka pota haai, jisako babul ke raja ne yahooda ke nagaron par aadhaikaree ttharaya haai, usake pas lautt ja aur usake sang logon ke beech rah, va jahan kaheen tujhe jana tteek jan pade vaheen chala ja. so jalladon ke pradhaan ne usako seedha aur kuchh dravy bhee dekar vida kiya." 
Jeremiah40:6 tab yirmayah aheekam ke putra gadalyah ke pas mispa ko gaya, aur vahan un logon ke beech jo desh men rah gaae the, rahane laga." 
Jeremiah40:7 yodaon ke jo dal dihat men the, jab unake sab pradhaanon ne apane janon samet suna ki babul ke raja ne aheekam ke putra gadalyah ko desh ka aadhaikaree ttharaya haai, aur desh ke jin kangal logon ko vah babul ko naheen le gaya, kya purusha, kya sre, kya balabachche, un sabhon ko use saunp diya haai," 
Jeremiah40:8 tab natanyah ka putra ishmaael, kareh ke putra yohanan, yonatan aur tanhooset ka putra sarayah, aepaai natopavasee ke putra aur kisee makavasee ka putra yajanyah apane janon samet gadalyah ke pas mispa men aae." 
Jeremiah40:9 aur gadalyah jo aheekam ka putra aur shaapan ka pota tha, us ne un se aur unake janon se shapath khakar kaha, kasaadiyon ke adhaeen rahane se mat dro. isee desh men rahate huae babul ke raja ke adhaeen raho tab numhara bhla hoga." 
Jeremiah40:10 maain to iseealiye mispa men rahata hoon ki jo kasadee log hamare yahan aae, unake samhane haajir hua karoon parantu tum dakhmadha aur dhoopakal ke fal aur tel ko battorake apane baratanon men rakho aur apane liae huae nagaron men base raho." 
Jeremiah40:11 fir jab moaabiyo, ammoniyo, aedomiyon aur any sab jatiyon ke beech rahanevale sab yahoodiyon ne suna ki babul ke raja ne yahoodiyon men se kuchh logon ko bacha liya aur un par gadalyah ko jo aheekam ka putra aur shaapan ka pota haai adhaikaree niyukt kiya haai," 
Jeremiah40:12 tab sab yahoodee jin jin sthanon men titara-abitar ho gaae the, vahan se lauttkar yahooda desh ke mispa nagar men gadalyah ke pas, aur bahut dakhmadha aur dhoopakal ke fal battorane lage." 
Jeremiah40:13 tab kareh ka putra yohanan aur maaidan men rahanevale yodaon ke sab dalon ke pradhaan mispa men gadalyah ke pas akar kahane lage, kya too janata haai" 
Jeremiah40:14 ki ammoniyon ke raja balees ne natatyah ke putra ishmaael ko tujhe jan se marane ke liye bheja haai? parantu aheekam ke putra gadalyah ne unakee prateeati n kee. 
Jeremiah40:15 fir kareh ke putra yohanan ne gadalyah se mispa men chhpaikar kaha, mujhe jakar natanyah ke putra ishmaael ko mar dalane de or koi ise n janega. vah kyon tujhe mar dale, aur jitane yahoodee log tere pas ikatthe huae haain ve kyon titara-abitar ho jaaen aur bache huae yahoodee kyon nash hon?" 
Jeremiah40:16 yaheekam ke putra gadalyah ne kareh ke putra yohanan se kaha, aeesa kam mat kar, too ishmaael ke vishay men joott bolata haai." 
Jeremiah41:1 aur sataven maheene men aeesa hua ki ishmaael jo natanyah ka putra aur aeleeshaama ka pota aur rajavansh ka aur raja ke pradhaan purushaen men se tha, so das jan sang lekar mispa men aheekam ke putra gadalyah ke pas aya. vahan mispa men unhon ne aek sang bhojan kiya." 
Jeremiah41:2 tab natanyah ke putra ishmaael aur usake sang ke das janon ne uttkar gadalyah ko, jo aheekam ka putra aur shapan ka pota tha, or jise babul ke raja ne desh ka adhaikaree ttharaya tha, use talavar se aeesa mara ki vah mar gaya." 
Jeremiah41:3 aur ishmaael ne gadalyah ke sang jitane yahoodee mispa men the, aur jo kasadee yoda vahan mile, un sabhon ko mar dala." 
Jeremiah41:4 gadalyah ke mar dalane ke doosare din jab koi ise n janata tha," 
Jeremiah41:5 tab shakem aur shaeelo aur shaemaron se assee purush daddhee mudaa, vasr faade, shareer cheere huae aur hath men annabali aur loban liae hua, yahova ke bhvan men jane ko ate dikhai diae." 
Jeremiah41:6 tab natanyah ka putra ishmaael un se milane ko mispa se nikala, aur rota hua chala. jab vah un se mila, tab kaha, aheekam ke putra gadalyah ke pas chalo." 
Jeremiah41:7 jab ve us nagar men aae tab natanyah ke putra ishmaael ne apane sangee janon samet unako ghaat karake gadhe men faenk diya. 
Jeremiah41:8 parantu un men se das manushy ishmaael se kahane lage, ham ko n mara kyonaki hamare pas maaidan men rakha hua gehoo, jav, tel aur madha haai. so us ne unhen chhod diya aur unake bhaiyon ke sath naheen mara." 
Jeremiah41:9 jis gadhe men ishmaael n un logon kee sab lothen jinhen us ne mara tha, gadalyah kee loth ke pas faenk dee thee, yah vahee gadha haai jise asa raja ne israaael ke raja basha ke dr ke mare khudavaya tha, usako natanyah ke putra ishmaael ne mare huon se bhr diya." 
Jeremiah41:10 tab jo log mispa men bache huae the, arthata rajakumaariyan aur jitane aur log mispa men rah gaae the jinhen jalladon ke pradhaan naboojaradan ne aheekam ke putra gadalyah ko saunp diya tha, un sabhon ko natanyah ka putra ishmaael bandhaua karake ammoniyon ke pas le jane ko chala." 
Jeremiah41:11 jab kareh ke putra yohanan ne aur yodaon ke dalon ke un sab pradhaanon ne jo usake sang the, suna, ki natanyah ke putra ishmaael ne yah sab burai kee haai," 
Jeremiah41:12 tab ve sab janon ko lekar natanyah ke putra ishmaael se ladne ko nikale aur usako us bade jalashay ke pas paya jo gibon men haai. 
Jeremiah41:13 kareh ke putra yohanan ko, aur dalon ke sab pradhaanon ko dekhkar jo usake sang the, ishmaael ke sath jo log the, ve sab anaandait hue." 
Jeremiah41:14 aur jitane logon ko ishmaael mispa se bandhaua karake liae jata tha, ve palattkar kareh ke putra yohanan ke pas chale aae." 
Jeremiah41:15 parantu natanyah ka putra ishmaael att purush samet yohanan ke hath se bachakar ammoniyon ke pas chala gaya. 
Jeremiah41:16 tab praja men se jitane bach gaae the, arthata jin yodao, striayo, balabachchon aur khojon ko kareh ka putra yohanan, aheekam ke putra gadalyah ke mispa men mare jane ke bad natanyah ke putra ishmaael ke pas se chhudakar gibon se faer le aya tha, unako vah apane sab sangee dalon ke pradhaanon samet lekar chal diya." 
Jeremiah41:17 aur betalehem ke nikatt jo kimham kee saray haai, us men ve isaaliye ttkai gaae ki misra men jaaen." 
Jeremiah41:18 kyonaki ve kasaadiyon se drate the isaka karan yah tha ki aheekam ka putra gadalyah jise babul ke raja ne desh ka adhaikaree ttharaya tha, use natanyah ke putra ishmaael ne mar dala tha." 
Jeremiah42:1 tab kareh ka putra yohanan, hoshayah ka putra yajanyah, dalon ke sab pradhaan aur chhotte se lekar bade tak, sab log yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke nikatt akar kahane lage," 
Jeremiah42:2 hamaree binatee grahan karake apane parameshvar yahova se ham sab bache huon ke liye praarthna kar, kyonaki too apanee ankhon se dekh raha haai ki ham jo pahale bahut the, ab thode hee bach gaae haain." 
Jeremiah42:3 isaliye praarthna kar ki tera parameshvar yahova ham ko bataae ki ham kis marga se chale, aur kaun sa kam karen?" 
Jeremiah42:4 so yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ne un se kaha, maain ne tumharee sunee haai dekho, maain tumhare vachanon ke anusar tumhare parameshvar yahova se praarthna karoonga or jo uttar yahova tumhare liye dega maain tum ko bataunga maain tum se koi bat n chhpaiaunga." 
Jeremiah42:5 tab unhon ne yirmayah se kaha, yaadi tera parameshvar yahova tere dara hamare pas koi vachan pahunchaae aur ham usake anusar n kare, to yahova hamare beech men sachcha aur vishvasayogy sakshaee tthare." 
Jeremiah42:6 chahe vah bhlee bat ho, chahe buree, taubhee ham apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaa, jisake pas ham tujhe bhejate haai, manenge, kyonaki jab ham apane parameshvar yahova kee bat manen tab hamara bhla ho." 
Jeremiah42:7 das din ke beetane par yahova ka vachan yirmayah ke pas pahuncha. 
Jeremiah42:8 tab us ne kareh ke putra yohanan ko, usake sath ke dalon ke pradhaanon ko, aur chhotte se lekar bade tak jitane log the, un sabhon ko bulakar un se kaha," 
Jeremiah42:9 israaael ka parameshvar yahova, jisake pas tum ne mujh ko isaaliye bheja ki maain tumharee binatee usake age kah sunau, vah yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah42:10 yaadi tum isee desh men rah jao, tab to maain tum ko nash naheen karoonga varan banaae rakoonga aur tumhen n ukhaoonga, varan rope rakoonga kyonaki tumharee jo haani maain ne kee haai us se maain pachhtata hoo." 
Jeremiah42:11 tum babul ke raja se drate ho, so us se mat dro yahova kee yah vanee haai, us se mat dro, kyonaki maain tumharee raksha karane aur tum ko usake hath se bachane ke liye tumhare sath hoo." 
Jeremiah42:12 maain tum par daya karoonga, ki vah bhee tum par daya karake tum ko tumharee boomi par fir se basa dega." 
Jeremiah42:13 parantu yadi tum yah kahakar ki ham is desh men n rahenge apane parameshvar yahova kee bat n mano, aur kaho ki ham to misra desh jakar vaheen rahenge," 
Jeremiah42:14 kyonaki vahan n ham yud dekhenge, n naraasinge ka shabd sunenge aur n ham ko bhojan kee dhattee hoga, to, he bache huae yahoodiyo, yahova ka yah vachan suno" 
Jeremiah42:15 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, ki yadi tum sachamuch misra kee or jane ka munh karo, aur vahan rahane ke liye jao," 
Jeremiah42:16 to aeesa hoga ki jis talavar se tum drate ho, vahee vahan misra desh men tum ko ja legee, aur jis mahangee ka bhy tum khate ho, vah misra men tumhara peechha n chhodegee aur vaheen tum maroge." 
Jeremiah42:17 jitane manushy misra men rahane ke liye usakee or munh kare, ve sab talavar, mahangee aur maree se marenge, aur jo vipaattai maain unake beech daloonga, us se koi bacha n rahega." 
Jeremiah42:18 israaael ka parameshvar senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, ki jis prakar se mera kop aur jalajalahatt yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon par bhdk uttee thee, usee prakar se yaadi tum misra men jao, to meree jalajalahatt tumhare upar aeesee bhdk uttegee ki log chakit honge, aur tumharee upama dekar shaap diya karenge aur tumharee ninda kiya karenge. tum us sthan ko fir n dekhne paoge." 
Jeremiah42:19 he bache huae yahoodiyo, yahova ne tumhare vishay men kaha haai, misra men mat jao. tum nishchay jano ki maain ne aj tum ko chitakar yah bat bata dee haai." 
Jeremiah42:20 kyonaki jab tum ne mujh ko yah kahakar apane parameshvar yahova ke pas bhej diya ki hamare nimitt hamare parameshvar yahova se praarthna kar aur jo kuchh hamara parameshvar yahova kahe usasee ke anusar ham ko bata aur ham vaaisa hee karenge, tab tum jan boojhke apane hee ko dhaekha dete the." 
Jeremiah42:21 dekho, maain aj tum ko bataae deta hoo, parantu, aur jo kuchh tumhare parameshvar yahova ne tum se kahane ke liye mujh ko bheja haai, us men se tum koi bat naheen manate." 
Jeremiah42:22 ab tum nishchay jano, ki jis sthan men tum paradeshaee hoke rahane kee ichchha karate ho, us men tum talavar, mahangee aur maree se mar jaoge." 
Jeremiah43:1 jab yirmayah unake parameshvar yahova ke ve sab vachan kah chuka, jinake kahane ke liye us ne usako un sab logon ke pas bheja tha," 
Jeremiah43:2 tab hoshaaya ke putra ajaryaah aur kareh ke putra yohanan aur sab abhaimanee purushaen ne yirmayah se kaha, too joott bolata haai. hamare parameshvar yahova ne tujhe yah kahane ke liye naheen bheja ki misra men rahane ke liye mat jao" 
Jeremiah43:3 parantu neriyyah ka putra barook tujh ko hamare virud usakata haai ki ham kasaadiyon ke hath men paden aur ve ham ko mar dalen va bandhaua karake babul ko le jaaen. 
Jeremiah43:4 so kareh ka putra yohanan aur dalon ke sab pradhaanon aur sab logon ne yahova kee yah agyaa n manee ki ve yahooda ke desh men hee rahen. 
Jeremiah43:5 aur kareh ka putra yohanan aur dalon ke aur sab pradhaan un sab yahoodiyon ko jo anyajatiyon ke beech titarabitar ho gaae the, aur un men se lauttkar yahooda desh men rahane lage the, ve unako le gaae," 
Jeremiah43:6 purusha, sre, balabachche, rajakumaariya, aur jitane praaanaiyon ko jalladon ke pradhaan naboojaradan ne gadalyah ko jo aheekam ka putra aur shaapan ka mota tha, saunp diya tha, unako aur yirmayah bhvishyadvkta aur neariyyah ke putra barook ko ve le gaae" 
Jeremiah43:7 aur yahova kee agyaa n manakar ve misra desh men tahapanhes nagar tak a gaae. 
Jeremiah43:8 tab yahova ka yah vachan tahapanhes men yirmayah ke pas pahuncha 
Jeremiah43:9 apane hath se bade patthr le, aur yahoodee purushaen ke samhane us itt ke chabootare men jo tahapanhes men firaun ke bhvan ke dar ke pas haai, choona faer ke chhpai de," 
Jeremiah43:10 aur un purushaen se kah, ki israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova, yon kahata haai, dekho, maain babul ke raja apane sevak nabookadanessar ko bulava bhejoonga, aur vah apana sinhasan in patthron ke upar jo maain ne chhpai rakhe haai, rakhega aur apana chhtra inake upar tanavaaega." 
Jeremiah43:11 vah ake misra desh ko marega, tab jo maranevale hon ve mratyu ke vash me, jo bandhauae honevale hon ve bandhauai me, aur jo talavar ke liye hen ve talavar ke vash men kar diae jaaenge." 
Jeremiah43:12 maain misra ke devalayon men ag lagaunga aur vah unhen faunkava dega aur bandhauai men le jaaega aur jaaisa koi charavaha apana vasr oddhta haai, vaaisa hee vah misra desh ko samett lega aur tab bekhttke chala jaaega." 
Jeremiah43:13 vah misra desh ke sooryagrah ke khmbhon ko tudva dalega aur misra ke devalayon ko ag lagakar foonkava dega. 
Jeremiah44:1 jitane yahoodee log misra desh men migdol, tahapanhes aur nop nagaron aur patraes desh men rahate the, unake vishay yirmayah ke pas yah vachan pahuncha," 
Jeremiah44:2 israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki jo vipaattai maain yarooshalem aur yahooda ke sab nagaron par dal chuka hoo, vah sab tum logon ne dekhee haai. dekho, ve aj ke din kaaise ujade huae aur nirjan haai," 
Jeremiah44:3 kyonaki unake nivaasiyon ne vah burai kee jis se unhon ne mujhe ris dilai thee ve jakar doosare devataon ke liye dhoop jalate the aur unakee upasana karate the, jinhen n to tum aur n tumhare purakha janate the." 
Jeremiah44:4 taubhee maain apane sab das bhavishyadvktaon ko bade yatn se yah kahane ke liye tumhare pas bhejata raha ki yah gharaanait kam mat karo, jis se maain gharana rakhta hoo." 
Jeremiah44:5 par unhon ne meree n sunee aur n meree or kan lagaya ki apanee burai se firen aur doosare devataon ke liye dhoom n jalaaen. 
Jeremiah44:6 is karan meree jalajalahatt aur kop kee ag yahooda ke nagaron aur yarooshalem kee sadkon par bhdk gai aur ve aj ke din tak ujad aur sunasan pade haain. 
Jeremiah44:7 ab yahova, senaon ka parameshvar, jo israaael ka parameshvar haai, yon kahata haai, tum log kyon apanee yah badee hani karate ho, ki kya purusha, kya sre, kya balak, kya doodhaapiuva bachcha, tum sab yahooda ke beech se nash kiae jao, aur koi n rahe?" 
Jeremiah44:8 kyonaki is misra desh men jahan tum paradeshaee hokar rahane ke liye aae ho, tum apane kamon ke dara, arthata doosare devataon ke liye dhoop jalakar mujhe ris dilate ho jis se tum nash ho jaoge or prathvee bhr kee sab jaatiyon ke log tumharee jati kee namadharai karenge aur tumharee upama dekar shaap diya karenge." 
Jeremiah44:9 jo jo buraiyan tumhare purakha, yahooda ke raja aur unakee striaya, aur tumharee striaya, varan tum ap yahooda desh aur yarooshalem kee sadkon men karate the, kya use tum bool gaae ho?" 
Jeremiah44:10 aj ke din tak unaka man choor naheen hua or n ve drate haain aur n meree us vyavastha aur un vidhaiyon par chalate haain jo maain ne tumhare poorvajon ko aur tum ko bhee sunavai haain. 
Jeremiah44:11 is karan israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova, yon kahata haai, dekho, maain tumhare virud hokar tumharee haani karoonga, taaki sab yahoodiyon ka ant kar doon." 
Jeremiah44:12 aur bache huae yahoodee jo hatt karake misra desh men akar rahane lage haai, ve sab mitt jaaenge is misra desh men chhotte se lekar bade tak ve talavar aur mahangee ke dara marak mitt jaaenge aur log unhen kosenge aur chaakit honge aur unakee upama dekar shaap diya karenge aur ninda bhee karenge." 
Jeremiah44:13 so jaaisa maain ne yarooshalem ko talavar, mahangee aur maree ke dara dand diya haai, vaaisa hee misra desh men rahanevalon ko bhee dand doonga," 
Jeremiah44:14 ki jo bache huae yahoodee misra desh men paradeshaee hokar rahane ke liye aae haai, yadhyapi ve yahooda desh men rahane ke liye lauttne kee badee aabhailasha rakhte haai, taubhee un men se aek bhee bachakar vahan n lauttne paaega keval kuchh hee bhage huon ko chhod koi bhee vahan n lauttne paaega." 
Jeremiah44:15 tab misra desh ke patraes men rahanevale jitane purush janate the ki unakee striayan doosare devataon ke liye dhoop jalatee haai, aur jitanee striayan badee mandlee men pas khdee thee, un sabhon ne yirmayah ko yah uttar diya," 
Jeremiah44:16 jo vachan too ne ham ko yahova ke nam se sunaya haai, usako ham naheen sunane kee." 
Jeremiah44:17 jo jo mannaten ham man chuke haain unhen ham nishchay pooree karengee, ham svarga kee ranee ke liye dhoop jalaaenge aur tapavan denge, jaaise ki hamare purakha log aur ham bhee apane rajaon aur aur hakimon samet yahooda ke nagaron men aur yarooshalem kee sadkon men karate the kyonaki us samay ham pett bhrake khate aur bhle change rahate aur kisee vipaattai men naheen padte the." 
Jeremiah44:18 parantu jab se ham ne svarga kee ranee ke liye dhoop jalana aur tapavan dena chhod diya, tab se ham ko sab vastuon kee ghattee haai aur ham talavar aur mahangee ke dara mitt chale haain." 
Jeremiah44:19 aur striayon ne kaha, jab ham svarga kee ranee ke liye dhoop jalateen aur chandraakar rottyaian banakar tapavan detee thee, tab apane apane pati ke bin jane aeesa naheen karatee theen." 
Jeremiah44:20 tab yirmayah ne, kya sre, kya purusha, jitane logon ne yah uttar diya, un sab se kaha," 
Jeremiah44:21 tumhare purakha aur tum jo apane rajaon aur hakimon aur logon samet yahooda desh ke nagaron aur yarooshalem kee sadkon men dhoop jalate the, kya vah yahova ke dhyan men naheen aya?" 
Jeremiah44:22 kya us ne usako smaran n kiya? so jab yahova tumhare bure aur sab gharanait kamon ko aur aadhaik n sah saka, tab tumhara desh ujadkar nirjan aur sunasan ho gaya, yahan tak ki log usakee upama dekar shaap diya karate haai, jaaise ki aj hota haai." 
Jeremiah44:23 kyonaki tum dhoop jalakar yahova ke virud pap karate aur usakee naheen sunate the, aur usakee vyavastha aur vidhaiyon aur chitauaniyon ke anusar naheen chale, is karan yah vipaattai tum par a padee haai, jaaise ki aj haai." 
Jeremiah44:24 fir yirmayah ne un sab logon se aur un sab striayon se kaha, he sare misra desh men rahanevale yahoodiyo, yahova ka vachan suno" 
Jeremiah44:25 israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova, yon kahata haai, ki tum ne aur tumharee striayon ne mannaten manee aur yah kahakar unhen pooree karate ho ki ham ne svarga kee ranee ke liye dhoop jalane aur tapavan dene kee jo jo mannaten manee haain unhen ham avashy hee pooree karenge aur tum ne apane hathon se aeesa hee kiya. so ab tuum apanee apanee mannaton ko manakar pooree karo!" 
Jeremiah44:26 parantu he misra desh men rahanevale sare yahoodiyo yahova ka vachan suno suno, maain ne apane bade nam kee shapath khai haai ki ab poore misra desh men koi yahoodee manushy mera nam lekar fir kabhee yah n kahane paaega ki prabhu yahova ke jeevan kee saugandha." 
Jeremiah44:27 suno, ab maain unakee bhlai nahee, hani hee kee chinta karoonga so misra desh men rahanevale sab yahoodee, talavar aur mahangee ke dara mittkar nash ho jaaenge jab tak ki unaka sarvanash n ho jaae." 
Jeremiah44:28 aur jo talavar se bachakar aur misra desh se lauttkar yahooda desh men pahunchenge, ve thode hee honge aur misra desh men rahane ke liye aae huae sab yahoodiyon men se jo bach paaenge, ve jan lenge ki kisaka vachan poora hua, mera va unaka." 
Jeremiah44:29 is bat ka maain yah chinh deta hoo, yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki maain tumhen isee sthan men dand doonga, jis se tum jan loge ki tumharee haani karane men mere vachan nishchay poore honge." 
Jeremiah44:30 yahova yon kahata he, dekho, jaaisa maain ne yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ko usake shatra arthata usake praan ke khojee babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke hath men kar diya, vaaise hee maain misra ke raja firaun hopra ko bhee usake shatrauon ke, arthata usake praan ke khojiyon ke hath men kar doonga." 
Jeremiah45:1 yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke chauthe varsha me, jab neriyyah ka putra barook yirmayah bhvishyadvkta se bhavishyadanee ke ye vachan sunakar pustak men likh chuka tha," 
Jeremiah45:2 tab us ne us se yah vachan kaha, ki israaael ka parameshvar yahova,tujh se yon kahata haai," 
Jeremiah45:3 he barook, too ne kaha, hay mujh par! kyonaki yahova ne mujhe dukh par dukh diya haai maain karahate karahate thk gaya aur mujhe kuchh chaain naheen milata." 
Jeremiah45:4 too yon kah, yahova yon kahata haai, ki dek, is sare desh ko jise maain ne banaya tha, use maain ap ddha doonga, aur jin ko maain ne ropa tha, unhen svayan ukhad faenkoonga." 
Jeremiah45:5 isaliye sun, kya too apane liye badai khoj raha haai? use mat khoja kyonki yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki maain sare manushyon par vipaattai daloonga parantu jahan kaheen too jaaega vahan maain tera praan bachakar tujhe jeeavit rakoonga." 
Jeremiah46:1 anyajatiyon ke vishay yahova ka jo vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke pas pahuncha, vah yah haai." 
Jeremiah46:2 misra ke vishaya. misra ke raja firaun niko kee sena jo parat mahanad ke teer par karkameesh men thee, aur jise babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne yoshaiyyah ke putra yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke chauthe varsha men jeet liya tha," 
Jeremiah46:3 us sena ke vishaya,ddhalen aur fariyan taaiyar karake ladne ko nikatt chale ao. 
Jeremiah46:4 ghaedon ko jutavao aur he savaro, ghaedon par chaddhkar ttop paahine huae khde ho jao bhalon ko paaina karo, jhlaimon ko paahin lo!"
