Jeremiah46:5 maain kyon unako vsakul dekhta hoo? ve vismait hokar peechhe hatt gaae. unake shooraveer giraae gaae aur utavalee karake bhag gaae ve peechhe dekhte bhee naheen kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki charon or bhy hee bhy he!" 
Jeremiah46:6 n veg chalanevala bhagane paaega aur n veer bachane paaega kyonaki uttar disha men parat mahanad ke teer par ve sab ttokar khakar gir pade. 
Jeremiah46:7 yah kaun haai, jo neel nadee kee nai, jisaka jal mahanadon ka sa uchhlata haai, baddha chala ata haai?" 
Jeremiah46:8 misra neel nadee kee nai baddhta haai, usaka jal mahanadon ka sa uchhlata haai. vah kahata haai, maain chaddhkar prathvee ko bhr doonga, maain nagaron ko unake nivaasiyon samet nash kar doonga." 
Jeremiah46:9 he misraee savaro age baddho, he rathaiyo bahut hee veg se chalao! he ddhal pakadnevale kooshaee aur pootee veero, he dhanudhararee loodiyo chale ao." 
Jeremiah46:10 kyonaki vah din senaon ke yahova prabhu ke badala lene ka din hoga jis men vah apane draeahiyon se badala lega. so talavar khakar trapt hogee, aur unaka lohoo peekar chhk jaaegee. kyonki, uttar ke desh men paran mahanad ke teer par, senaon ke yahova prabhu ka yagya haai." 
Jeremiah46:11 he misra kee kumaree kanya, gilad ko jakar balasan aushaadhai le too vyarth hee bahut ilaj karatee haai, too changee naheen hogee!" 
Jeremiah46:12 kyonaki sab jati ke logon ne suna haai ki too neech ho gai aur prathvee teree chillahatt se bhr gai haai veer se veer ttokar khakar gir pade ve donon aek sang gir gaae haain. 
Jeremiah46:13 yahova ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta se yah vachan bhee kaha ki babul ka raja nabookadanessar kyonkar akar misra desh ko mar lega 
Jeremiah46:14 misra men varnn karo, aur migdol men sunao ha, or nop aur tahapanhes men sunakar yah kaho ki khde hokar taaiyar ho jao kyonki tumhare charon or sab kuchh talavar kha gai haai." 
Jeremiah46:15 tere balavant jan kyon bilay gaae haain? ve is karan khde n rah sake kyonki yahova ne unhen ddhkel diya. 
Jeremiah46:16 us ne bahuton ko ttokar khailai, ve ek doosare par gir pade aur ve kahane lage, utto, chalo, ham andhor karanevale kee talavar ke dr ke mare apane apane logon or apanee apanee janmaboomi men fir lautt jaen." 
Jeremiah46:17 vahan ve pukar ke kahate haai, misra ka raja firaun satyanash hua kyonki us ne apana bahumooly avasar khe diya." 
Jeremiah46:18 vah rajadhairaj jisaka nam senaon ka yahova haai, usakee yah vanee haai ki mere jeevan kee saugandha, jaaisa tabor any pahadon me, aur jaaisa kamal samudra ke kinare haai, vaaisa hee vah aaega." 
Jeremiah46:19 he misra kee rahanevalee putraee! bandhauai men jane ka saman taaiyar kar, kyonaki nop nagar ujad aur aeesa bhsm ho jaaega ki us men koi bhee n rahega." 
Jeremiah46:20 misra bahut hee sundar bachhyai to haai, parantu uttar disha se nash chala ata haai, vah a hee gaya haai." 
Jeremiah46:21 usake jo sipahee kiraye par aae haain vah pose huae bachhdon ke saman haain unhon ne munh moda, aur ek sang bhag gaa, ve khde naheen rahe kyonaki unakee vipaattai ka din aur dand pane ka samay a gaya." 
Jeremiah46:22 usakee ahatt sarpa ke bhagane kee see hogee kyonki ve vrakshaen ke kattnevalon kee sena aur kulhaadiyan liae huae usake virud chaddh aenge. 
Jeremiah46:23 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki chahe usaka van bahut hee ghana ho, parantu ve usako katt dalenge, kyonaki ve ttiiddayon se bhee adhaik anaaginit haain." 
Jeremiah46:24 misraee kanya laajjait hogee, vah uttar disha ke logon ke vash men kar dee jaaegee." 
Jeremiah46:25 israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova kahata haai, dekho, maain nagaravasee amon aur firaun raja aur misra ko usake sab devataon aur rajaon samet aur firaun ko un samet jo us par bhrosa rakhte haain dand dene par hoo." 
Jeremiah46:26 maain unako babul ke raja nabookadanessar aur usake karmachaariyon ke vash men kar doonga jo unake praan ke khojee haain. usake bad vah praacheenakal kee nai fir basaya jaaega, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah46:27 parantu he mere das yakoob, too mat dr, aur he israaael, vismait n ho kyonaki maain tujhe aur tere vansh ko bandhauai ke door desh se chhuda le aunga. yakoob lauttkar chaain aur sukh se rahega, aur koi use drane n paaega." 
Jeremiah46:28 he mere das yakoob, yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki too mat dr, kyonaki maain tere sath hoo. or yadhyapi maain un sab jaatiyon ka ant kar daloonga jin men maain ne tujhe barabas nikal diya haai, taubhee tera ant n karoonga. maain teree tadna vichar karake karoonga, parantu tujhe kisee prakar se nidash n ttharaunga." 
Jeremiah47:1 firon ke gajja nagar ko jeet lene se pahile yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke pas paalishtaiyon ke vishay yahova ka yah vachan pahuncha 
Jeremiah47:2 yahova yon kahata haai ki dekho, uttar disha se umandnevalee nadee desh ko us sab samet jo us men haai, aur nivaasiyon samet nagar ko dubo legee. tab manushy chillaaenge, varan desh ke sab rahanevale haya-hay karenge." 
Jeremiah47:3 shatrauon ke balavant ghaedon kee ttap, rathon ke veg chalane aur unake pahiyon ke chalane ka kolahal sunakar pita ke hath-panv aeese ddheele pad jaaenge, ki vah munh modkar apane ladkon ko bhee n dekhega." 
Jeremiah47:4 kyonaki sab palishtaiyon ke nash hone ka din ata haai aur sor aur sidon ke sab bache huae sahayak mitt jaaenge. kyonki yahova palishtaiyon ko jo kaptor nam samudra teer ke bache huae rahanevale haai, unako bhee nash karane par haai." 
Jeremiah47:5 gajja ke log sir mudaae haai, ashkalon jo paalishtaiyon ke neechan men akela rah gaya haai, vah bhee mittaya gaya haai too kab tak apanee deh cheerata rahega?" 
Jeremiah47:6 he yahova kee talavar! too kab tak shaant n hogee? too apanee miyan men ghaus ja, shaant ho, aur thmee rah!" 
Jeremiah47:7 too kyonkar thm sakatee haai? kyonaki yahova ne tujh ko agyaa dekar ashkalon aur samudrateer ke virud ttharaya haai. 
Jeremiah48:1 moab ke vishay israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai naboo par hay, kyonki vah nash ho gaya! kiryataaim kee asha toott gai, vah le liya gaya haai uncha gaddh nirash aur vismait ho gaya haai." 
Jeremiah48:2 moab kee prashansa jatee rahee. heshabon men usakee haani kee kalpana kee gai haai ao, ham usako aeesa nash karen ki vah rajy n rah jaae. he madamen, too bhee sunasan ho jaaega talavar tere peechhe padegee." 
Jeremiah48:3 horonaaim se chillahatt ka shabd suno! nash aur bade dakh ka shabd sunai deta haai! 
Jeremiah48:4 moab ka satyanash ho raha haai usake nanhe bachchon kee chillahatt sun padee. 
Jeremiah48:5 kyonaki looheet kee chaddhai men log lagatar rote huae chaddhenge aur horonaaim kee utar men nash kee chillahatt ka sankatt hua haai. 
Jeremiah48:6 bhago! apana apana praan bachao! us adhamooae ped ke saman ho jao jangal men hota haai! 
Jeremiah48:7 kyonaki too jo apane kamon aur sampaattai par bhrosa rakhta haai, is karan too bhee pakada jaaega aur kamosh devata bhee apane yajakon aur hakimon samet bandhauai men jaaega." 
Jeremiah48:8 yahova ke vachan ke anusar nash karanevale tumhare har aek nagar par chaddhai karenge, aur koi nagar n bachega neechanavale aur pahad par kee chauras boomivale donon nash kiae jaaenge." 
Jeremiah48:9 moab ke pankh laga do taki vah udkar door ho jaae kyonaki usake nagar aeese ujad ho jaaenge ki un men koi bhee n basane paaega. 
Jeremiah48:10 shaapit haai vah jo yahova ka kam alasy se karata haai aur vah bhee jo apanee talavar lohoo bahane se rok rakhta haai. 
Jeremiah48:11 moab bachapan hee se sukhee haai, usake neeche talachhtt haai, vah aek baratan se doosare baratan men undela naheen gaya aur n bandhauai men gaya isaliye usaka svad us men sthiar haai, aur usakee gandha jyon kee tyon banee rahatee haai." 
Jeremiah48:12 is karan yahova kee yah vanee haai, aeese din aaenge, ki maain logon ko usake undelane ke liye bhejoonga, aur ve usako undelenge, aur jin ghadon men vah rakha hua haai, unako choochhe karake faod dalenge." 
Jeremiah48:13 tab jaaise israaael ke gharane ko betel se laajjait hona pada, jis par ve bhrosa rakhte the, vaaise hee moabee log kamosh se lajjait hange." 
Jeremiah48:14 tum kaaise kah sakate ho ki ham veer aur parakramee yoda haain? 
Jeremiah48:15 moab to nash hua, usake nagar bhsm ho gaae aur usake chune huae javan ghaat hone ko utar gaa, rajadhairaj, jisaka nam senaon ka yahova haai, usakee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah48:16 moab kee vipaattai nikatt a gai, aur usake sankatt men padne ka din bahut hee veg se ata haai." 
Jeremiah48:17 usake as pas ke sab rahanevalo, aur usakee keeattair ke sab jananevalo, usake liye vilap karo kaho hay! yah majaboot sontta aur sundar chhdee kaaise toott gai haai?" 
Jeremiah48:18 he deebon kee rahanevalee too apana vibhv chhodkar pyasee baaittee rah! kyonki moab ke nash karanevale ne tujh par chaddhai karake tere draddh gaddhon ko nash kiya haai. 
Jeremiah48:19 he aroaer kee rahanevalee too marga men khdee hokar takatee rah! jo bhagata haai us se, aur jo bach nikalatee haai us se pooch, ki, kya hua haai?" 
Jeremiah48:20 moab kee asha toottegee, vah vismait ho gaya tum hay hay karo aur chillao anan men bhee yah batao ki moab nash hua haai." 
Jeremiah48:21 chauras boomi ke desh men holon," 
Jeremiah48:22 yahasa, mepat, deebon, nabo, betaadibalataaim," 
Jeremiah48:23 aur kiyryataaim, betagamool, betamon," 
Jeremiah48:24 aur kaariyyot, bosra, aur kya door kya nikat, moab desh ke sare nagaron men dand kee agyaa pooree hui haai." 
Jeremiah48:25 yahova kee yah vanee haai, moab ka seeng katt gaya, aur bhuja toott gai haai." 
Jeremiah48:26 usako mataval karo, kyonki us ne yahova ke virud badai maree haai isaaliye moab apanee chhantt men lottega, aur tttthon men udaya jaega." 
Jeremiah48:27 kya too ne bhee israaael ko tttthon men naheen udaya? kya vah choron ke beech pada gaya tha ki jab too usakee charcha karata tab too sir hilata tha? 
Jeremiah48:28 he moab ke rahanevalo apane apane nagar ko chhodkar ddhang kee darar men baso! us paaedukee ke saman ho jo gufaa ke munh kee aek or ghaensala banatee ho. 
Jeremiah48:29 ham ne moab ke garva ke vishay men suna haai ki vah atyant aabhaimanee haai usaka garva, abhaiman aur ahankar, aur usaka man foolana prasid haai." 
Jeremiah48:30 yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain usake rosh ko bhee janata hoo ki vah vyarth hee haai, usake bade bol se kuchh ban n pada." 
Jeremiah48:31 is karan maain moabiyon ke liye haya-hay karoonga han maain sare moabiyon ke liye chillaunga keehares ke logon ke liye vilap kiya jaaega. 
Jeremiah48:32 he sibama kee dakhlata, maain tumhare liye yajer se bhee adhaik vilap karoonga! teree daliyan to tal ke par baddh gai, varan yajer ke tal tak bhee pahunchee theen par nash karanevala tere dhoopakal ke falon par, aur todee hui dakhon par bhee toott pada haai." 
Jeremiah48:33 falavalee bariyon se aur moab ke desh se anand aur magan hona utt gaya haai maain ne aeesa kiya ki dakhras ke kundon men kuchh dakhmadha n raha log fir lalakarate huae dakh n raundenge jo lalakar honevalee haai, vah ab naheen hogee." 
Jeremiah48:34 heshabon kee chillahatt sunakar log aelale aur yahas tak, aur soar se horonaaim aur aeglatashaleeshaiya tak bhee chillate huae bhage chale gaae haain. kyonki nimraeem ka jal bhee sookh gaya haai." 
Jeremiah48:35 aur yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki maain unche sthan par chaddhava chaddhana, aur devataon ke liye dhoop jalana, donon ko moab men band kar doonga." 
Jeremiah48:36 is karan mera man moab aur keehares ke logon ke liye bansulee sa ro rokar alapata haai, kyonaki jo kuchh unhon ne kamakar bachaya haai, vah nash ho gaya haai." 
Jeremiah48:37 kyonaki sab ke sir munde gaae aur sab kee daaddhiyan nochee gai sab ke hath cheere hua, aur sab kee kamaron men ttatt bandha hua haai." 
Jeremiah48:38 moab ke sab gharon kee chhton par aur sab chaunkon men rona peettna ho raha haai kyonki maain ne moab ko tuchchh baratan kee nai tod dala haai yahova kee yah vanee haai. 
Jeremiah48:39 moab kaaise vismait ho gaya! hay, hay, karo! kyonki us ne kaaise lajjait hokar peett faeree haai! is prakar moab ke charon or ke sab rahanevale usaka ttttha karenge aur vismait ho jaaenge." 
Jeremiah48:40 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, vah ukab sa udega aur moab ke upar apane pankh faailaaega." 
Jeremiah48:41 kaariyyot le liya gaya, aur gaddhvale nagar doosaron ke vash men pad gaae. us din moabee veeron ke man jachcha straee ke se ho jaaenge" 
Jeremiah48:42 aur moab aeesa titara-abitar ho jaaega ki usaka dal toott jaaega, kyonki us ne yahova ke virud badai maree haai." 
Jeremiah48:43 yahova kee yah vanee haai ki he moab ke rahanevale, tere liye bhy aur gadha aur fande ttharaae gaae haain." 
Jeremiah48:44 jo koi bhy se bhage vah gadhe men girega, aur jo koi gadhe men se nikale, vah fande men fansega. kyonaki maain moab ke rand ka din us par le aunga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah48:45 jo bhage huae haain vah heshabon men sharan lekar khde ho gaae haain parantu heshabon se ag aur seehon ke beech se lau nikalee, jis se moab desh ke kone aur balavaaiyon ke chonde bhsm ho gaae haain." 
Jeremiah48:46 he moab tujh par hay! kamosh kee praja nash ho gai kyonki tere sree-purush donon bandhauai men gaae haain. 
Jeremiah48:47 taubhee yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki ant ke dinon men maain moab ko bandhauai se lautta le aunga. moab ke dand ka vachan yaheen tak hua." 
Jeremiah49:1 ammoniyon ke vishay yahova yon kahata haai, kya israaael ke putra naheen haain? kya usaka koi varis naheen raha? fir malkam kyon gad ke desh ka adhaikaree hua? aur usakee praja kyon usake nagaron men basane pai haai?" 
Jeremiah49:2 yahova kee yah vanee haai, aeese din anevale haai, ki maain ammoniyon ke rabba nam nagar ke virud yud kee lalakar sunavaunga, aur vah ujadkar khndhar ho jaaega, aur usakee baastaiyan foonk dee jaaengee tab jin logon ne israaaeliyon ke desh ko apana liya haai, unake desh ko israaaelee apana lenge, yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Jeremiah49:3 he heshabon haya-hay kara kyonaki ye nagar nash ho gaya. he rabba kee beattyaie chillao! aur kamar men ttatt bandhae, chhatee peetttee hui badon men idhar udhar daudo! kyonaki malkam apane yajakon aur hakimon samet bandhauai men jaaega." 
Jeremiah49:4 he bhttkanevalee bettee! too apane desh kee taraiyon par, vishosh kar apane bahut hee apaja tarai par kyon foolatee haai? too kyon yah kahakar apane rakhe huae dhan par bhrosa rakhtee haai, ki mere virud kaun chaddhai kar sakega?" 
Jeremiah49:5 prabhu senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, dek, maain tere charon or ke sab rahanevalon kee or se tere man men bhy upajane par hoo, aur tere log apane apane samhane kee or ddhkel diae jaaenge aur jab ve mare mare firenge, tab koi unhen ikattha n karega." 
Jeremiah49:6 parantu usake bad maain ammoniyon ko bandhauai se lautta launga yahova kee yahee vanee haai. 
Jeremiah49:7 aedom ke vishay, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, kya teman men ab kuchh buadi naheen rahee? kya vahan ke gyaaniyon kee yuaktai nishfal ho gai? kya unakee budi jatee rahee haai?" 
Jeremiah49:8 he dadan ke rahanevalo bhago, lautt jao, vahan chhpaikar baso! kyonaki jab maain aesav ko dand dene lagoonga, tab us par bharee vipaattai padegee." 
Jeremiah49:9 yaadi dakh ke todnevale tere pas ate, to kya ve kaheen kaheen dakh n chhod jate? aur yaadi chor rat ko ate to kya ve jitana chahate utana dhan loottkar n le jate?" 
Jeremiah49:10 kyonaki maain ne aesav ko udhaara haai, maain ne usake chhpaine ke sthanon ko pragatt kiya haai yahan tak ki vah chhpai n saka. usake vansh aur bhai aur padosee sab nash ho gaae haain aur usaka ant ho gaya." 
Jeremiah49:11 apane anath balakon ko chhod jao, maain unako jilaunga aur tumharee vidhavaaen mujh par bhrosa rakhen." 
Jeremiah49:12 kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, jo isake yogy n the ki kattore men se peeae, unako to nishchay peena padega, fir kya too kisee prakar se nidash ttharakar bach jaaega? too nidash ttharakar n bachega, tujhe avashy hee peena padega." 
Jeremiah49:13 kyonaki yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain ne apanee saugandha khai haai, ki bosra aeesa ujad jaaega ki log chakit honge, aur usakee upama dekar ninda kiya karenge aur shaap diya karenge aur usake sare ganv sada ke liye ujad ho jaaenge." 
Jeremiah49:14 maain ne yahova kee or se samachar suna haai, varan jaati jati men yah kahane ko aek doot bhee bheja gaya haai, ikatthe hokar aedom par chaddhai karo aur us se ladne ke liye utto." 
Jeremiah49:15 kyonaki maain ne tujhe jatiyon men chhotta, aur manushyon men tuchchh kar diya haai." 
Jeremiah49:16 he chattan kee dararon men base hua, he pahadee kee chottee par kila bananevale! tere bhyanak roop aur man ke aabhaiman ne tujhe dhaekha diya haai. chahe too ukab kee nai. apana basera unche sthan par banaa, taubhee maain vahan se tujhe utar launga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah49:17 aedom yahan tak ujad jaaega ki jo koi usake pas se chale vah chakit hoga, aur usake sare dukhon par talee bajaaega." 
Jeremiah49:18 yahova ka yah vachan haai, ki jaaisee sadom baur amora aur unake as pas ke nagaron ke ulatt jane se unakee dasha hui thee, vaaisee hee usakee dasha hogee, vahan n koi manushy rahega, aur n koi adamee us men ttkaiega." 
Jeremiah49:19 dekho, vah sinh kee nai yaradan ke as pas ke ghane jangalon se sada kee charai par chaddhega, aur maain unako usake samhane se jhtt bhga doonga tab jisako maain chun loo, usako un par adhaikaree ttharaunga. mere tuly kaun haai? aur kaun mujh par mukama chalaaega? vah charavaha kahan haai jo mera samhana kar sakega?" 
Jeremiah49:20 dekho, yahova ne aedom ke virud kya yuktai kee haai aur teman ke rahanevalon ke virud kaaisee kalpana kee haai? nishchay vah bhed-bakaariyon ke bachchon ko ghaseett le jaaega vah charai ko bhed-bakaariyon se nishchay khalee kar dega." 
Jeremiah49:21 unake girane ke shabd se prathvee kanp uttegee aur aeesee chillahatt machegee jo lal samudra tak sunai padegee. 
Jeremiah49:22 dekho, vah ukab kee nai nikalakar ud aaega, or bosra par apane pankh faailaaega, aur us din aedomee shooraveeron ka man jachcha sree ka sa ho jaaega." 
Jeremiah49:23 daamishk ke vishay, hamat aur arpad kee ash toottee haai, kyonki unhon ne bura samachar suna haai, ve gal gaae haain samudra par chinta haai, vah shaant naheen ho sakata." 
Jeremiah49:24 daamishk balaheen hokar bhagane ko firatee haai, parantu kanpakanpee ne use pakada haai, jachcha kee see peeden use uttee haain." 
Jeremiah49:25 hay, vah nagar, vah prashansa yogy puree, jo mere harsha ka karan haai, vah chhoda jaaega!" 
Jeremiah49:26 senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki usake javan chaukon men giraae jaaenge, aur sab yodaon ka bolana band ho jaaega." 
Jeremiah49:27 aur maain damishk kee shaharapanah men ag lagaunga jis se benhadad ke rajabhvan bhsm ho jaaenge. 
Jeremiah49:28 kedar aur hasor ke rajyon ke vishay jinhen babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne mar liya. yahova yon kahata haai, uttkar kedar par chaddhai karo! poorabiyon ko nash karo!" 
Jeremiah49:29 ve unake dere aur bhed-bakaariyan le jaaenge, unake tamboo aur sab baratan uttakar untton ko bhee hank le jaaenge, aur un logon se pukarake kahenge, charon or bhy hee bhy haai." 
Jeremiah49:30 yahova kee yah vanee haai, he hasor ke rahanevalo bhago! door door mare mare firo, kaheen jakar chhpaike baso. kyonki babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne tumhare virud yuaktai aur kalpana kee haai." 
Jeremiah49:31 yahova kee yah vanee haai, uttkar us chaain se rahanevalee jati ke logon par chaddhai karo, jo nidr rahate haai, aur bina kivad aur bende ke yon ho base huae haain." 
Jeremiah49:32 unake untt aur anaaginit gaya-baail aur bhed-bakaariyan loott men jaengee, kyonki maain unake gal ke bal mundanevalon ko udakar sab dishaaon men titara-abitar karoonga aur charon or se un par vipaattai lakar daloonga, yahov kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah49:33 hasor geedadon ka vasasthan hoga aur sada ke liye ujad ho jaaega, vahan n koi manushy rahega, aur n koi adamee us men ttkaiega." 
Jeremiah49:34 yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke arambh men yahova ka yah vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke pas aelam ke vishay pahuncha. 
Jeremiah49:35 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain aelam ke dhanush ko jo unake parakram ka mukhy karan haai, todoonga" 
Jeremiah49:36 aur maain akash ke charon or se vayu bahakar unhen charon dishaaon kee or yahan tak titara-abitar karoonga, ki aeesee koi jati n rahegee jis men aelamee bhagate huae n aaen." 
Jeremiah49:37 maain aelam ko unake shatrauon aur unake praan ke khojiyon ke samhane vismait karoonga, aur un par apana kop bhdkakar vipaattai daloonga. aur yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki talavar ko un par chalavate chalavate maain unaka ant kar daloonga" 
Jeremiah49:38 aur maain aelam men apana sinhasan rakhkar unake raja aur hakimon ko nash karoonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah49:39 parantu yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai, ki ant ke dinon men maain aelam ko bandhauai se lautta le aunga." 
Jeremiah50:1 babul aur kasaadiyon ke desh ke vishay men yahova ne yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara yah vachan kaha 
Jeremiah50:2 jaatiyon men batao, sunao aur jhnda khda karo sunao, mat chhpaiao ki babul le liya gaya, bel ka munh kala ho gaya, marodak vismait ho gaya. babul kee pratimaaen laajjait hui aur usakee bedaul mooraten vismait ho gai." 
Jeremiah50:3 kyonaki uttar disha se aek jaati us par chaddhai karake usake desh ko yahan tak ujad kar degee, ki kya manushy, kya pashu, as men koi bhee n rahega sab bhag jaaenge." 
Jeremiah50:4 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki un dinon men israaaelee aur yahooda aek sang aaenge, ve rote huae apane parameshvar yahova ko ddoonddhne ke liye chale aaenge." 
Jeremiah50:5 ve siyyon kee or munh kiae huae usaka marga poochhte aur apas men yah kahate aaenge, ki ao ham yahova se mel kar le, usake sath aeesee vacha bandho jo kabhee boolee n jaa, parantu sada sthiar rahe." 
Jeremiah50:6 meree praja khoi hui bheden haain unake charavahon ne unako bhttka diya aur pahadon par bhttkaya haai ve pahad-pahad aur pahadee-pahadee ghoomate-ghoomate apane baaittne ke sthan ko bool gai haain. 
Jeremiah50:7 jitanon ne unhen paya ve unko kha gaae aur unake satanevalon ne kaha, is men hamara kuchh dosh nahee, kyonki unhon ne yahova ke virud pap kiya haai jo dharma ka adhaar haai, aur unake poorvajon ka ashray tha." 
Jeremiah50:8 babul ke beech men se bhago, kasadiyon ke desh se jaaise bakare apane jhund ke aguve hote haai, vaaise hee nikal ao." 
Jeremiah50:9 kyonaki dekho, maain uttar ke desh se badee jaatiyon ko ubharakar unakee mandlee babul par chaddha le aunga, aur ve usake virud panti bandhonge aur usee disha se vah le liya jaaega. unake teer chatur veer ke se honge un men se koi akarath n jaaega." 
Jeremiah50:10 aur kasadiyon ka desh aeesa luttega ki sab loottnevalon ka pett bhr jaaega, yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Jeremiah50:11 he mere bhag ke loottnevalo, tum jo meree praja par anand karate aur hulasate ho, aur ghaas charanevalee baachhyai kee nai uchhlate aur balavant ghaedon ke saman hinaahinate ho," 
Jeremiah50:12 tumharee mata atyant lajjait hogee aur tumharee jananee ka munh kala hoga. kyonaki vah sab jatiyon men neech hogee, vah jangal aur maru aur nirjal desh ho jaaegee." 
Jeremiah50:13 yahova ke krodha ke kara, vah desh nirjan rahega, vah ujad hee ujad hoga jo koi babul ke pas se chalega vah chakit hoga, aur usake sab dukh dekhkar talee bajaaega." 
Jeremiah50:14 he sab dhanudharariyo, babul ke charon or usake virud panti bandhae us par teer chalao, unhen mat rakh chhodo, kyonaki us ne yahova ke virud pap kiya haai." 
Jeremiah50:15 charon or se us par lalakaro, us ne har manee usake kott giraae gaa, usakee shaharapanah ddhai gai. kyayonki yahova us se apana badala lene par haai so tum bhee us se apana apana badala lo, jaaisa us ne kiya haai, vaaisa hee tum bhee us se karo." 
Jeremiah50:16 babul men se bonevale aur kattnevale donon ko nash karo, ve dukhdai talavar ke dr ke mare apane apane logon ko or fire, aur apane apane desh kee bhag jaaen." 
Jeremiah50:17 israaael bhgai hui bhed haai, sinhon ne usako bhga diya haai. pahile to ashshoor ke raja ne usako kha dala, aur tab babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne usakee haaddiyon ko tod diya haai." 
Jeremiah50:18 is karan israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, jaaise maain ne ashshoor ke raja ko dand diya tha, vaaise hee ab desh samet babul ke raja ko dand doonga." 
Jeremiah50:19 maain israaael ko usakee charai men lautta launga, aur vah kamal aur bashaan men fir charega, aur aepraaim ke pahadon par aur gilad men fir bhr pett khane paaega." 
Jeremiah50:20 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki un dinon men israaael ka adharma ddoonddhne par bhee naheen milega, aur yahooda ke pap khojane par bhee naheen milenge kyonaki jinhen maain bachau, unake pap bhee kshama kar doonga." 
Jeremiah50:21 too marataaim desh aur pakod nagar ke nivaasiyon par chaddhai kara. manushyon ko to mar dal, aur dhan ka satyanash kara yahova kee yah vanee haai, aur jo jo agyaa maain tujhe deta hoo, un sabhon ke anusar kara." 
Jeremiah50:22 suno, us desh men yud aur satyanash ka sa shabd ho raha haai." 
Jeremiah50:23 jo hathauda saree prathvee ke logon ko choor choor karata tha, vah kaaisa katt dala gaya haai! babul sab jatiyon ke beech men kaaisa ujad ho gaya haai!" 
Jeremiah50:24 he babul, maain ne tere liye fanda lagaya, aur too anajane us men fas bhee gaya too ddoonddhkar pakada gaya haai, kyonki too yahova ka virodha karata tha." 
Jeremiah50:25 prabhu, senaon ke yahova ne apane shasren ka ghar kholakar, apane krodha pragatt karane ka saman nikala haai kyonaki senaon ke prabhu yahova ko kasaadiyon ke desh men aek kam karana haai." 
Jeremiah50:26 prathvee kee chhor se ao, aur usakee bakhariyon ko kholo usako ddher hee ddher bana do aeesa satyanash karo ki us men kuchh bhee n bacha rahen." 
Jeremiah50:27 usake sab baailon ko nash karo, ve ghaat hone ke sthan men utar jaen. un par hay! kyonaki unake dand pane ka din a pahuncha haai." 
Jeremiah50:28 suno, babul ke desh men se bhaganevalon ka sa bol sunai padta haai jo siyyon men yah samachar dene ko daude ate haai, ki hamara parameshvar yahova apane mandair ka badala le raha haai." 
Jeremiah50:29 sab dhanudharariyon ko babul ke virud ikatthe karo, usake charon or chhavanee dalo, koi jan bhagakar nikalane n paae. usake kam ka badala use deo, jaaisa us ne kiya haai, tteek vaaisa hee usake sath karo kyonaki us ne yahova israaael ke paavitra ke virud aabhaiman kiya haai." 
Jeremiah50:30 is karan usake javan chaukon men giraae jaaenge, aur sab yodaon ka bol band ho jaaega, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah50:31 prabhu senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, he abhaimanee, maain tere virud hoo tere dand pane ka din a gaya haai." 
Jeremiah50:32 aabhaimanee ttokar khakar girega or koi use fir n uttaaega aur maain usake nagaron men ag lagaunga jis se usake charon or sab kuchh bhsm ho jaaega. 
Jeremiah50:33 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, israaael aur yahooda donon barabar pise huae haain aur jitanon ne unako bandhaua kiya ve unhen pakade rahate haai, aur jane naheen dete." 
Jeremiah50:34 unaka chhudanevala samath haai senaon ka yahova, yahee usaka nam he. vah unaka mukama bhlee bhanati ladega ki prathvee ko chaain de parantu babul ke nivaasiyon ko vyakul kare." 
Jeremiah50:35 yahova kee yah vanee haai, kasadiyon aur babul ke hakim, paandit adi sab nivaasiyon par talavar chalegee!" 
Jeremiah50:36 bada bol bolanevalon par talavar chalegee, aur ve moorkh banenge! usake shooraveeron par bhee talavar chalegee, aur ve vismait ho jaaenge!" 
Jeremiah50:37 usake savaron aur raathaiyon par aur sab mile jule logon par bhee talavar chalegee, aur ve striayen ban jaenge! usake bhndaron par talavar chalegee, aur ve lutt jaenge!" 
Jeremiah50:38 usake jalashayon par sookha padega, aur ve sookh jaenge! kyonaki vah khudee hui mooraton se bhra hua desh haai, aur ve apanee bhyanak praatimaon par bavale haain." 
Jeremiah50:39 isaliye nirjal desh ke jantu siyaron ke sang milakar vahan basenge, aur shuuturmurga us men vas karenge, aur vah fir sada tak basaya n jaaega, n yug yug us men koi vas kar sakega." 
Jeremiah50:40 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki sadom aur amora aur unake as pas ke nagaron kee jaaisee dasha us samay hui thee jab parameshvarane unako ulatt diya tha, vaaisee hee dasha babul kee bhee hogee, yahan tak ki koi manushy us men n rah sakega, aur n koi adamee us men ttkaiega." 
Jeremiah50:41 suno, uttar disha se aek desh ke log ate haai, aur prathvee kee chhor se aek badee jati aur bahut se raja uttkar chaddhai karenge." 
Jeremiah50:42 ve dhanush aur bachh pakade huae haain ve kroor aur nirday haain ve samudra kee nai garajenge aur ghaedon par chaddhe huae tujh babul kee bettee ke virud panti bandho huae yuda karanevalon kee nai aaenge. 
Jeremiah50:43 unaka samachar sunate hee babul ke raja ke hath panv ddheele pad gaa, aur usako jachcha kee see peeden utteen." 
Jeremiah50:44 suno, vah sinh kee nai aaega jo yaradan ke as pas ke ghane jangal se nikalakar draddh bhedshaale par chaddhe, parantu maain unako usake samhane se jhtt bhga doonga tab jisako maain chun loo, usee ko un par aadhaikaree ttharaunga. dekho, mere tuly kaun he? kaun mujh par mukama chalaaega? vah charavaha kahan haai jo mera samhana kar sakega?" 
Jeremiah50:45 so suno ki yahova ne babul ke virud kya yuktai kee haai aur kasaadiyon ke desh ke virud kaun see kalpana kee haai nishchay vah bhed-bakaariyon ke bachchon ko ghaseett le jaaega, nishchay vah unakee charaiyon ko bhed-bakaariyon se khalee kar dega." 
Jeremiah50:46 babul ke loott liae jane ke shabd se prathvee kanp uttee haai, aur usakee chillahatt jaatiyon men sunai padtee haai." 
Jeremiah51:1 yahova yon kahata haai, maain babul ke aur lebakamaai ke rahanevalon ke virud aek nash karanevalee vayu chalaunga" 
Jeremiah51:2 aur maain babul ke pas aeese logon ko bhejoonga jo usako fattka-fattkakar uda denge, aur is reeti usake desh ko sunasan karenge aur vipaattai ke din charon or se usake virud honge." 
Jeremiah51:3 dhanudhararee ke virud aur jo apana jhlaim pahine haain dhanudhararee dhanush chaddhaae huae utte usake javanon se kuchh komalata n karana usakee saree sena ko satyanash karo. 
Jeremiah51:4 kasadiyon ke desh men mare huae aur usakee sadkon men chhdai huae log girenge. 
Jeremiah51:5 kyonaki, yadhyapi israaael aur yahooda ke desha, israaael ke pavitra ke virud kiae huae papon se bhrapoor ho gaae haai, taubhee unake parameshvar, senaon ke yahova ne unako tyag naheen diya." 
Jeremiah51:6 babul men se bhago, apana apana praan bachao! usake adharma men bhagee hokar tum bhee n mitt jao kyonaki yah yahova ke badala lene ka samay haai, vah usako badala dene par haai." 
Jeremiah51:7 babul yahova ke hath men sone ka kattora tha, jis se saree prathvee ke log matavale hote the jaati jati ke logon ne usake dakhmadha men se piya, is karan ve bhee bavale ho gaae." 
Jeremiah51:8 babul achanak le lee gai aur nash kee gai haai. usake liye haya-hay karo! usake ghaavon ke liye balasan aushadhai lao sambhv haai vah changee ho sake. 
Jeremiah51:9 ham babul ka ilaj karate to the, parantu vah changee naheen hui. so ao, ham usako tajakar upane apane desh ko chale jaaen kyonaki us par kiae huae nyay ka nirny akash varan svarga tak bhee pahunch gaya haai." 
Jeremiah51:10 yahova ne hamare dharma ke kam pragatt kiae haain so ao, ham siyyon men apane parameshvar yahova ke kam ka varnn karen." 
Jeremiah51:11 teeron ko paaina karo! ddhalen thame raho! kyonki yahova ne madee rajaon ke man ko ubhara haai, us ne babul ko nash karane kee kalpana kee haai, kyonki yahova arthata usake mandair ka yahee badala haai" 
Jeremiah51:12 babul kee shaharapanah ke virud jhnda khda karo bahut paharuae baaittao ghaat laganevalon ko baaittao kyonki yahova ne babul ke rahanevalon ke virud jo kuchh kaha tha, vah ab karane par haai varan kiya bhee haai." 
Jeremiah51:13 he bahut jalashayon ke beech basee hui aur bahut bhndar rakhnevalee, tera ant a gaya, tere lobh kee seema pahanch gai haai." 
Jeremiah51:14 senaon ke yahova ne apanee hee shapath khai haai, ki nishchay maain tujh ko ttiiddayon ke saman anaginit manushyon se bhr doonga, aur ve tere virud lalakarenge." 
Jeremiah51:15 usee ne prathvee ko apane samarth se banaya, aur jagat ko apanee buadi se sthiar kiya aur akash ko apanee praveenta se tan diya haai." 
Jeremiah51:16 jab vah bolata haai tab akash men jal ka bada shabd hota haai, vah prathvee kee chhor se kuhara uttata haai. vah vashara ke liye bijalee banata, aur apane bhndar men se pavan nikal le ata haai." 
Jeremiah51:17 sab manushy pashu sareekhe gyaanarahit haai sab sonaron ko apanee khodee hui mooraton ke karan laajjait hona padega kyonki unakee ddhalee hui mooraten dhaekha denevalee haai, aur unake kuchh bhee sans naheen chalatee." 
Jeremiah51:18 ve to vyarth aur tttthe hee ke yogy haai jab unake nash kiae jane ka samay aaega, tab ve nash hee hongee." 
Jeremiah51:19 parantu jo yakoob ka nij bhag haai, vah unake saman nahee, vah to sab ka bananevala haai, aur israaael usaka nij bhag haai usaka nam senaon ka yahova haai." 
Jeremiah51:20 too mera farasa aur yud ke liye haathaiyar ttharaya gaya haai tere dara maain jaati jati ko titara-abitar karoonga aur tere hee dara rajy rajy ko nash karoonga. 
Jeremiah51:21 tere hee dara maain savar samet ghaedon ko ttukade ttukade karoonga 
Jeremiah51:22 tere hee dara rathee samet rath ko bhee ttukade ttukade karoonga tere hee dara maain sree purush donon ko ttukade ttukade karoonga tere hee dara maain booddhe aur ladke donon ko ttukaddhe ttukade karoonga, aur javan purush aur javan sree donon ko maain tere hee dara ttukade ttukade karoonga" 
Jeremiah51:23 tere hee dara maain bhed-bakaariyon samet charavahe ko ttukade ttukade karoonga tere hee dara maain kisan aur usake jode baailon ko bhee ttukade ttukade karoonga adhaipaatiyon or haakimon ko bhee maain tere hee dara ttukade ttukade karoonga. 
Jeremiah51:24 maain babul ko aur sare kasaadiyon ko bhee un sab buraiyon ka badala doonga, jo unhon ne tum logon ke samhane siyyon men kee haai yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah51:25 he nash karanevale pahad jisake dara saree prathvee nash hui haai, yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain tere virud hoo aur hath baddhakar tujhe ddhangon par se luddhka doonga aur jala hua pahad banaunga." 
Jeremiah51:26 log tujh se n to ghar ke kone ke liye patthr lenge, aur n nev ke liye, kyonaki too sada ujad rahega, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah51:27 desh men jhnda khda karo, jaati jati men naraasinga foonko usake virud jaati jati ko taaiyar karo ararat, minnee aur ashkanaj nam rajyon ko usake virud bulalao, usake virud senapaati bhee ttharao ghaedon ko shaikhravalee ttiiddayon ke saman anaginit chaddha le ao." 
Jeremiah51:28 usake virud jaatiyon ko taaiyar karo madee rajaon ko unake aadhaipaatiyon sab haakimon saahit aur us rajy ke sare desh ko taaiyar karo. 
Jeremiah51:29 yahova ne vichara haai ki vah babul ke desh ko aeesa ujad kare ki us men koi bhee n rahe isaliye prathvee kanpatee haai aur dukhait hotee haai 
Jeremiah51:30 babul ke shooraveer gaddhon men rahakar ladne se inakar karate haai, unakee veerata jatee rahee haai aur yah dekhkar ki unake vasasthanon men ag lag gai ve sree ban gaae haain usake faattkon ke bende tode gaae haain." 
Jeremiah51:31 aek harakara doosare harakare se aur aek samachar denevala doosare samachar denevale se milane aur babul ke raja ko yah samachar dene ke liye daudega ki tera nagar charon or se le liya gaya haai 
Jeremiah51:32 aur ghaatt shatrauon ke vash men ho gaae haai, tal bhee sukhaye gaa, or yoda ghabara utte haain." 
Jeremiah51:33 kyonaki israaael ka parameshvar, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai babul kee bettee danvate samay ke khalihan ke saman haai, thode hee dinon men usakee kattnee ka samay aaega." 
Jeremiah51:34 babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne mujh ko kha liya, mujh ko pees dala us ne mujhe choochhe bartan ke saman kar diya, us ne magaramachchh kee nai mujh ko nigal liya haai aur mujh ko svaadishtt bhejan janakar apana pett mujh se bhr liya haai, us ne mujh ko barabas nikal diya he." 
Jeremiah51:35 siyyon kee rahanevalee kahegee, ki jo upadrav mujh par aur mere shareer par hua haai, vah babul par palatt jaae. aur yarooshalem kahegee ki mujh men kee hui hatyaon ka dosh kasadiyon ke desh ke rahanevalon par lage." 
Jeremiah51:36 isaliye yahova kahata haai, maain tera kukama ladoonga aur tera badala loonga. maain usake tal ko aur usake soton ko sukha doonga" 
Jeremiah51:37 aur babul khndhar, aur geedadon ka vasasthan hoga aur log use dekhkar chakit honge aur talee bajaaenge, aur us men koi n rahega." 
Jeremiah51:38 log aek sang aeese garajenge aur gurraaenge, jaaise yuva sinh v sinh ke bachche aher par karate haain." 
Jeremiah51:39 parantu jab jab ve uttejit ho, tab maain jevanar taaiyar karake unhen aeesa matavala karoonga, ki ve hulasakar sada kee neend men padenge aur kabhee n jagenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah51:40 maain unako, bhedon ke bachcho, aur meddhon aur bakaron kee nai ghaat kara doonga." 
Jeremiah51:41 shoshak, jisakee prashansa sare prathvee par hotee thee kaaise le liya gaya? vah kaaise pakada gaya? babul jaatiyon ke beech kaaise sunasan ho gaya haai?" 
Jeremiah51:42 babul ke upar samudra chaddh aya haai, vah usakee bahut see laharon men oob gaya haai." 
Jeremiah51:43 usake nagar ujad gaa, usaka desh nirjan aur nirjal ho gaya haai, us men koi manushy naheen rahata, aur us se hokar koi adamee naheen chalata." 
Jeremiah51:44 maain babul men bel ko dand doonga, aur us ne jo kuchh nigal liya haai, vah usake munh se ugalavaunga. jaatiyon ke log fir usakee or tanta bandho huae n chalenge babul kee shaharapanah girai jaaegee." 
Jeremiah51:45 he meree praja, us men se nikal ao! apane apane praan ko yahova ke bhdke huae kop se bachao!" 
Jeremiah51:46 jab udtee hui bat us desh men sunee jaa, tab tumhara man n dhabaraae aur jo udtee hui charcha prathvee par sunee jaaegee tum us se n drana usake aek varsha bad aek aur bat udtee hui aaegee, tab usake bad doosare varsha men aek aur bat udtee hui aaegee, aur us desh men upadrav hoga, aur aek haakim doosare ke virud hoga." 
Jeremiah51:47 isaliye dek, ve din ate haain jab maain babul kee khudee hui mooraton par dand kee agyaa karoonga us sare desh ke logon ka munh kala ho jaaega, aur usake sab mare huae log usee men pade rahenge." 
Jeremiah51:48 tab svarga aur prathvee ke sare nivasee babul par jayajayakar karenge kyonki uttar disha se nash karanevale us par chaddhai karenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Jeremiah51:49 jaaise babul ne israaael ke logon ko mara, vaaise hee sare desh ke log usee men mar dale jaaenge." 
Jeremiah51:50 he talavar se bache huo, bhgo, khde mat raho! yahova ko door se smaran karo, aur yarooshalem kee bhee suadhai lo" 
Jeremiah51:51 ham vyakul haai, kyonki ham ne apanee namadharai sunee haai yahova ke pavitra bhvan men vidhama ghaus aae haai, is karan ham laajjait haain." 
Jeremiah51:52 so dekho, yahova kee yah vanee haai, aeese din anevale haain ki maain usakee khudee hui mooraton par dand bhejoonga, aur usake sare desh men log ghaayal hokar karahate rahenge." 
Jeremiah51:53 chahe babul aeesa uncha ban jaae ki akash se baten kare aur usake unche gaddh aur bhee draddh kiae jaae, taubhee maain use nash karane ke liye, logon ko bhejoonga, yahova kee yah banee haai." 
Jeremiah51:54 babul se chillahatt ka shabd sunai padta haai! kasaadiyon ke desh se satyanash ka bada kolahal sunaira deta haai. 
Jeremiah51:55 kyonaki yahova babul ko nash kar raha haai aur usake bade kolahal ko band kar raha haai. is se unaka kolahal mahasagar ka sa sunai deta haai. 
Jeremiah51:56 babul par bhee nash karanevale chaddh aae haai, aur usake shooraveer pakade gaae haain aur unake dhanush tod dale gaae kyonaki yahova badala denevala parameshvar haai, vah avashy hee badala lega." 
Jeremiah51:57 maain usake hakimo, pandito, adhaipaatiyo, raiso, aur shooraveeron ko aeesa matavala karoonga ki ve sada kee neend men padenge aur fir n jagenge, senaon ke yahova, jisaka nam rajaadhairaj haai, usakee yahee vanee haai" 
Jeremiah51:58 senaon ka yahova yon bhee kahata haai, babul kee chaudee shaharapanah nev se ddhai jaaegee, aur usake unche faattk ag lagakar jalaae jaaenge. aur us men rajy rajy ke logon ka paarishram vyarth ttharega, aur jatiyon ka paarishram ag ka kaur ho jaaega aur ve thk jaaenge." 
Jeremiah51:59 yahooda ke raja sidaakiyyah ke rajy ke chauthe varsha men jab usake sath sarayah bhee babul ko gaya tha, jo neariyyah ka putra aur mahaseyah ka pota aur rajabhvan ka adhaikaree bhee tha," 
Jeremiah51:60 tab yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ne usako ye baten batai arthata ve sab baten jo babul par padnevalee vipaattai ke vishay likhee hui haai, unhen yirmayah ne pustak men likh diya." 
Jeremiah51:61 aur yirmayah ne sarayah se kaha, jab too babul men pahunche, tab apashy hee ye sab vachan padna," 
Jeremiah51:62 aur yah kahana, he yahova too ne to is sthan ke vishay men yah kaha haai ki maain ise aeesa mitta doonga ki is men kya manushy, kya pashu, koi bhee n rahega, varan yah sada ujad pada rahega." 
Jeremiah51:63 aur jab too is pustak ko paddh chuke, tab ise aek patthr ke sang bandhakar parat mahanad ke beech men faenk dena," 
Jeremiah51:64 aur yah kahana, yon hee babul oob jaaega aur maain us par aeesee vipaattai daloonga ki vah fir kabhee n uttega. yon usaka sara paarishram vyarth hee ttharega aur ve thke rahenge. yahan tak yirmayah ke vachan haain." 
Jeremiah52:1 jab sidaakiyyah rajy karane laga, tab vah ikkees varsha ka tha aur yarooshalem men gyarah varsha tak rajy karata raha. usakee mata ka nam hamootal tha jo libnavasee yirmayah kee bettee thee." 
Jeremiah52:2 aur us ne yahoyakeem ke sab kamon ke anusar vahee kiya jo yahova kee draashtti men bura haai. 
Jeremiah52:3 nishchay yahova ke kop ke karan yarooshalem aur yahooda kee aeesee dasha hui ki ant men us ne unako apane samhane se door kar diya. aur sidaakiyyah ne babul ke raja se balava kiya. 
Jeremiah52:4 aur usake rajay ke nauven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke dasaven din ko babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne apanee saree sena lekar yarooshalem par chaddhai kee, aur us ne usake pas chhavanee karake usake charon or kila banaya." 
Jeremiah52:5 yon nagar ghora gaya, aur sidaakiyyah raja ke gyarahaven varsha tak ghaira raha." 
Jeremiah52:6 chauthe maheene ke nauven din se nagar men mahangee yahan tak baddh gai, ki logon ke liye kuchh rottee n rahee." 
Jeremiah52:7 tab nagar kee shaharapanah men darar kee gai, aur donon bheeton ke beech jo faattk raja kee baree ke nikatt tha, us se sab yoda bhagakar rat hee rat nagar se nikal gaa, aur araba ka marga liya. us samay kasadee log nagar ko ghore huae the." 
Jeremiah52:8 parantu unakee sena ne raja ka peechha kiya, aur usako yareeho ke pas ke araba men ja pakada tab usakee saree sena usake pas se titara-abitar ho gai." 
Jeremiah52:9 so ve raja ko pakadkar hamat desh ke ribala men babul ke raja ke pas le gaa, aur vahan us ne usake dand kee agyaa dee." 
Jeremiah52:10 babul ke raja ne sidaakiyyah ke putraen ko usake samhane ghaat kiya, aur yahooda ke sare haakimon ko bhee ribala men ghaat kiya." 
Jeremiah52:11 fir babul ke raja ne sidaakiyyah kee ankhon ko faudva dala, aur usako bediyon se jakadkar babul tak le gaya, aur usako bandeegrah men dal diya. so vah mratyu ke din tak vaheen raha." 
Jeremiah52:12 fir usee varsha arthata babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke rajy ke unneesaven varsha ke panchaven maheene ke dasaven din ko jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan jo babul ke raja ke sammukh khda rahata tha yarooshalem men aya. 
Jeremiah52:13 aur us ne yahova ke bhvan aur rajabhvan aur yarooshalem ke sab bade bade gharon ko ag lagavakar faunkava diya. 
Jeremiah52:14 aur kasadiyon kee saree sena ne jo jalladon ke pradhaan ke sang thee, yarooshalem ke charon or kee sab shaharapanah ko ddha disha." 
Jeremiah52:15 aur jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan kangal logon men se kitanon ko, aur jo log nagar men rah gaae the, aur jo log babul ke raja ke pas bhag gaae the, aur jo kareegar rah gaae the, un sab ko bandhaua karake le gaya." 
Jeremiah52:16 parantu, dihat ke kangal logon men se kitanon ko jalladon ke pradhaan naboojaradan ne dakh kee bariyon kee seva aur kisanee karane ko chhod diya." 
Jeremiah52:17 aur yahova ke bhvan men jo peetal ke khmbhe the, aur kuarsiyon aur peetal ke hauj jo yahova ke bhvan men the, un sabhon ko kasadee log lodkar unaka peetal babul ko le gaae." 
Jeremiah52:18 aur handiyo, faavaadiyo, kaainchiyo, kattoro, ghoopadano, nidan peetal ke aur sab patraen ko, jin se log seva tthal karate the, ve le gaae." 
Jeremiah52:19 aur tasalo, karachho, kattoriyo, hanadiyo, deevatto, dhoopadano, aur kattoron men se jo kuchh sone ka tha, unake sone ko, aur jo kuchh chandee ka tha unakee chandee ko bhee jalladon ka pradhaan le gaya." 
Jeremiah52:20 donon khmbhe, aek hauj aur peetal ke barahon baail jo payon ke neeche the, in sab ko to sulaaiman raja ne yahova ke bhvan ke liye banavaya tha, aur in sab ka peetal taul se bahar tha." 
Jeremiah52:21 jo khmbhe the, un men se aek aek kee unchai attarah hat, aur ghora barah hat, aur mottai char angul kee thee, aur ve khokhle the." 
Jeremiah52:22 aek aek kee kanganee peetal kee thee, aur aek aek kanganee kee unchai panch hath kee thee aur us par charon or jo jalee aur anar bane the ve sab peetal ke the." 
Jeremiah52:23 kangaaniyon ke charon alangon par chhyaianave anar bane the, aur jalee ke upar charon or aek sau anar the." 
Jeremiah52:24 aur jalladon ke pradhaan ne sarayah mahayajak aur usake neeche ke sapanyah yajak, aur teenon devaddheedaron ko pakad liya" 
Jeremiah52:25 aur nagar men se us ne aek khoja pakad liya, jo yodaon ke upar tthara tha aur jo purush raja ke sammukh raha karate the, un men se sat jan jo nagar men mile aur senapaati ka munshaee jo sadhaaran logon ko sena men bhratee karata tha aur sadhaaran logon men se satt purush jo nagar men mile," 
Jeremiah52:26 in sab ko jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan ribala men babul ke raja ke pas le gaya. 
Jeremiah52:27 tab babul ke raja ne unhen hamat desh ke ribala men aeesa mara ki ve mar gaae. 
Jeremiah52:28 yo yahoodee apane desh se bandhauae hokar chale gaae. jin logon ko nabookadanessar bandhaua karake le gaya, so ye haai, arthta usake rajy ke sataven varsha men teen hajar teis yahoodee" 
Jeremiah52:29 fir apane rajy ke attarahaven varsha men nabookadanessar yarooshalem se att sau battees praanaieeyon ko bandhaua karake le gaya 
Jeremiah52:30 fir nabookadanessar ke rajy ke teisaven varsha men jalladon ka pradhaan naboojaradan sat sau paaintalees yahoodee janon ko bandhauae karake le gaya sab praanee milakar char hajar chhsau huae. 
Jeremiah52:31 fir yahooda ke raja yahoyakeen kee bandhauai ke saainteesaven varsha men arthata jis varsha babul ka raja aebeelamarodak rajagaee par virajaman hua, usee ke barahaven maheene ke pacheesaven din ko us ne yahooda ke raja yahoyakeen ko bandeegrah se nikalakar bada pad diya" 
Jeremiah52:32 aur us se madhaur madhaur vachan kahakar, jo raja usake sath babul men bandhauae the, unake sinhasanon se usake sinhasan ko adhaeek uncha kiya." 
Jeremiah52:33 aur usake bandeegrah ke vasr badal diae aur vah jeevan bhr nity raja ke sammukh bhojan karata raha 
Jeremiah52:34 aur praati din ke khrcha ke liye babul ke raja ke yahan se usako nity kuchh milane ka prabandha hua. yah prabandha usakee mratyu ke din tak usake jeevan bhr lagatar bana raha. 
Lamentations1:1 jo nagaree logon se bhrapoor thee vah ab kaaisee akelee baaittee hui haai! vah kyon aek vidhava ke saman ban gai? vah jo jatiyon kee draashtti men mahan aur praanton men ranee thee, ab kyon kar denevalee ho gai haai." 
Lamentations1:2 rat ko vah foott foott kar rotee haai, usake ansoo galon par ddhlakate haain usake sab yaron men se ab koi use shaaantai naheen deta usake sab mitraen ne us se vishvasaghaat kiya, aur usake shatra ban gaae haain." 
Lamentations1:3 yahooda dukh aur kattnai dasatv se bachane ke liye paradesh chalee gai parantu anyajatiyon men rahatee hui vah chaain naheen patee usake sab khdednevalon ne usakee saketee men use pakad liya haai. 
Lamentations1:4 siyyon ke marga vilap kar rahe haai, kyonki niyat pavan men koi naheen ata haai usake sab faattk sunasan pade haai, usake yajak karahate haain usakee kumaariyan shaekit haai, aur vah ap kattnai dukh bhog rahee haai." 
Lamentations1:5 usake draehee pradhaan ho gaa, usake shatra unnati kar rahe haai, kyonki yahova ne usake bahut se aparadhaen ke karan use dukh diya haai usake balabachchon ko shatra hank hank kar bandhauai men le gae." 
Lamentations1:6 siyyon kee putraee ka sara pratap jata raha haai. usake hakim aeese haarinon ke saman ho gaae haain jo kuchh charai naheen pate ve khdednevalon ke samhane se balaheen hokar bhagate haain. 
Lamentations1:7 yarooshalem ne, in dakh bhre aur sankatt ke dinon me, jab usake log draeahiyon ke hath men pade aur usaka koi yahayak n raha, tab apanee sab manabhavanee vastuon ko jo praacheenakal se usakee thee, smaran kiya haai. usake draeahiyon ne usako ujada dekhkar tttthon men udaya haai." 
Lamentations1:8 yarooshalem ne bada pap kiya, isaliye vah ashuuddh sree see ho gai haai jitane usaka adar karate the ve usaka niradar karate haai, kyonki unhon ne usakee nangai dekhee haai ha, vah karahatee hui munh faer letee haai." 
Lamentations1:9 usakee ashuuddhata usake vasr par haai us ne apane ant ka smaran n rakha isaaliye vah bhyankar reeti se girai gai, aur koi use shaantai naieen deta haai. he yahova, mere dukh par drashtti kar, kyonaki shatra mere viruddh safal hua haai!" 
Lamentations1:10 draehiyon ne usakee sab manabhavanee vastuon par hath baddhaya haai ha, anyajaatiyon ko, jinake vishay men too ne agyaa dee thee ki ve teree sabha men bhagee n hone paaengee, unako us ne tere pavitrasthan men ghausa hua dekha haai." 
Lamentations1:11 usake sab nivasee karahate huae bhojanavastu ddoonddh rahe haain unhon ne apana praan bachan ke liaee apanee manabhavanee vastuen bechakar bhojan mol liya haai. he yahova, drashtti kar, aur dhyan se dek, kyonaki maain tuchchh ho gai hoo." 
Lamentations1:12 he sab battohiyo, kya tumhen is bat kee kuchh bhee chinta naheen? drashtti karake dekho, kya mere dukh se baddhkar koi aur peeda haai jo yahova ne apane krodha ke din mujh par dal dee haai?" 
Lamentations1:13 us ne upar se meree haaddiyon men ag lagai haai, aur ve us se bhsm ho gai us ne mere paairon ke liye jal lagaya, aur mujh ko ulatta faer diya haai us ne aeesa kiya ki maain tyagee hui see aur rog se lagatar nirbal rahatee hoo." 
Lamentations1:14 us ne jooae kee rassaiyon kee nai mere aparadhaen ko apane hath se kasa haai us ne unhen battkar meree gardan par chaddhaya, aur mera bal ghatta diya haai jinaka maain samhana bhee naheen kar sakatee, unheen ke vash men yahova ne mujhe kar diya haai." 
Lamentations1:15 yahova ne mere sab parakramee purushaen ko tuchchh jana us ne niyat parva ka prachar karake logon ko mere viruddh bulaya ki mere javanon ko pees dalen yahooda kee kumaree kanya ko yahova ne mano kolhoo men pera haai. 
Lamentations1:16 in baton ke karan maain rotee hoo meree ankhon se ansoo kee dhaara bahatee rahatee haai kyonki jis shaaantaidata ke karan mera jee hara bhra ho jata tha, vah mujh se door ho gaya mere ladkebale akele ho gaa, kyonki shatra prabal hua haai." 
Lamentations1:17 siyyon hath faailaae huae haai, use koi shaaantai naheen deta yahova ne yakoob ke vishay men yah agyaa dee haai ki usake charon or ke nivasee usake draehee ho jaaen yarooshalem unake beech ashuuddh sree ke saman ho gai haai." 
Lamentations1:18 yahova sachchai par haai, kyonaki maain ne usakee agyaa ka ullanghan kiya haai he sab logo, suno, aur meree peeda ko dekho! mere kumar aur kumariyan bandhauai men chalee gai haain." 
Lamentations1:19 maain ne apane mitraen ko pukara parantu unhon ne bhee mujhe chhokha diya jab mere yajak aur puraniye isaliye bhojanavastu ddoonddh rahe the ki khane se unaka jee hara ho jaa, tab nagar hee men unake praan choott gaae." 
Lamentations1:20 he yahova, draashtti kar, kyonaki maain sankatt men hoo, meree antaadiyan aeenttee jatee haai, mera day ulatt gaya haai, kyonki maain ne bahut balava kiya haai. vahar to maain talavar se nirvash hotee hoo aur ghar men mratyu viraj rahee haai." 
Lamentations1:21 unhon ne suna haai ki maain karahatee hoo, parantu koi mujhe shaantai naheen deta. mere sab shatrauon ne meree vipaattai ka samachar suna haai ve is se hashairt ho gaae ki too hee ne yah kiya haai. parantu jis din kee charcha too ne prachar karake sunai haai usako too dikha, tab ve bhee mere saman ho jaenge." 
Lamentations1:22 unakee saree dushttta kee or draashtti kara aur jaaisa mere sare aparadhaen ke karan too ne mujhe dand diya, vaaisa hee unako bhee dand de kyonki maain bahut hee karahatee hoo, aur mera day rog se nirbal ho gaya haai." 
Lamentations2:1 yahova ne siyyon kee putraee ko kis prakar apane kop ke badalon se ddhanp diya haai! us ne israaael kee shaebha ko akash se dharatee par pattk diya aur kop ke din apane panvon kee chaukee ko smaran naheen kiya. 
Lamentations2:2 yahova ne yakoob kee sab baastaiyon ko nitturata se nashtt kiya haai us ne rosh men akar yahooda kee putraee ke draddh gaddhon ko ddhakar mittee men mila diya haai us ne hakimon samet rajy ko apavitra ttharaya haai. 
Lamentations2:3 us ne krodha men akar israael ke seeng ko jad se katt dala haai us ne shatra ke samhane unakee sahayata karane se apana daahina hath kheench liya he us ne charon or bhsm karatee hui lau kee nai yakoob ko jala diya haai. 
Lamentations2:4 us ne shatra banakar dhanush chaddhaya, aur vaairee banakar daahina hath baddhaae huae khda haai aur jitane dekhne men manabhavane the, un sab ko us ne ghaat kiya siyyon kee putraee ke tamboo par us ne ag kee nai apanee jalajalahatt bhdka dee haai." 
Lamentations2:5 yahova shatra ban gaya, us ne israaael ko nigal liya usake sare bhvanon ko us ne mitta diya, aur usake draddh gaddhon ko nashtt kar dala haai aur yahooda kee putraee ka dona-peettna bahut baddhay haai." 
Lamentations2:6 us ne apana mandp baree ke machan kee nai achanak gira diya, apane milapasthan ko us ne nash kiya haai yahova ne siyyon men niyat varvar aur vishraamadin donon ko bhula diya haai, aur apane bhdke huae kop se raja aur sajak donon ka tiraskar kiya haai." 
Lamentations2:7 yahova ne apanee vedee man se utar dee, aur apana kaavitrasthan apaman ke sath taj diya haai usake bhvanon kee bheeton ko us ne shatrauon ke vash men kar diya yahova ke bhvan men unhon ne aeesa kolahal machaya ki mano niyat varsha ka din ho." 
Lamentations2:8 yahova ne siyyon kee kumaree kee shaharapanah tod dalane ko ttana tha us ne doree dalee aur apana hath use nash karane se naheen kheencha us ne kile aur shaharapanah donon se vilap karavaya, ve donon aek sath giraae gaae haain." 
Lamentations2:9 usake faattk boomi men dhay gaae haai, unake bedon ko us ne todkar nash kiya. usake raja aur hakim anyajaatiyon men rahane ke karan vyavastharaahit ho gaae haai, aur usake bhvishyadvkta yahova se darshan naheen pate haain." 
Lamentations2:10 siyyon kee putraee ke puraniye boomi par chupachap baaitte haain unhon ne apane sir par dhool udai aur ttatt ka faentta bandha haai yarooshalem kee koomaariyon ne apana apana sir boomi tak jhukaya haai. 
Lamentations2:11 meree ankhen ansoo bahate bahate rah gai haain meree antadiyan aeenttee jatee haain mere logon kee putraee ke vinash ke karan mera kaleja fatt gaya haai, kyonki bachche varan doodhaapiuve bachche bhee nagar ke chaukon me moochchhirt hote haain." 
Lamentations2:12 ve apanee apanee mata se rokar kahate haai, ann aur dakhmadha kahan haain? ve nagar ke chaukon men ghaayal kiae huae manushy kee nai moochchhirt hokar apane praan apanee apanee mata kee god men chhodte haain." 
Lamentations2:13 he yarooshalem kee putrae, maain tujh se kya kahoon? maain teree upama kis se doon? he siyyon kee kumaree kanya, maain kaun see vastu tere saman ttharakar tujhe shaantai doon? kyonki tera dukh samudra sa apar haai tujhe kaun changa kar sakata haai?" 
Lamentations2:14 tere bhvishyadvktaon ne darshan ka dava karake tujh se vyarth aur moorkhta kee baten kahee haain unhon ne tera adharma pragatt naheen kiya, naheen to teree vradhauai n hone patee parantu unhon ne tujhe vyarth ke aur jootte vachan bataae. jo tere liye desh se nikal diae jane ka karan hue." 
Lamentations2:15 sab battohee tujh par talee bajate haain ve yarooshalem kee putraee par yah kahakar talee bajate aur sir hilate haai, kya yah vahee nagaree haai jise paramasundaree aur saree prathvee ke harsha ka karan kahate the?" 
Lamentations2:16 tere sab shatrauon ne tujh par munh pasara haai, ve talee bajate aur dant peesate haai, ve kahate haai, ham use nigal gaae haain! jis din kee batt ham johate the, vah yahee haai, vah ham ko mil gaya, ham usako dekh chuke haain!" 
Lamentations2:17 yahova ne jo kuchh ttana tha vahee kiya bhee haai, jo vachan vah praacheenakal se kahata aya haai vahee us ne poora bhee kiya haai us ne nitturata se tujhe ddha diya haai, us ne shatrauon ko tujh par anandait kiya, aur tere draeahiyon ke seeng ko uncha kiya he." 
Lamentations2:18 ve prabhu kee or tan man se pukarate haain! he siyyon kee kumaree kee shaharapanaha, apane ansoo rat din nadee kee nai bahatee rah! taanik bhee vishraam n le, n teree ankh kee putalee chaain le!" 
Lamentations2:19 rat ke har pahar ke arambh men uttkar chillaya kar! prabhu ke sammukh apane man kee baton ko ghaara kee nai undel! tere balabachche jo har aek sadk ke sire par bookh ke karan moochchhirt ho rahe haai, unake praan ke nimitt apane hath usakee or faaila." 
Lamentations2:20 he yahova draashtti kar, aur dhyan se dekh ki too ne yah sab dukh kis ko diya haai? kya striayan apana fal arthata apanee god ke bachchon ko kha dalen? he prabhu, kya yajak aur bhvishyadvkta tere pavitrasthan men ghaat kiae jaaen?" 
Lamentations2:21 sadkon men ladke aur booddhe donon boomi par pade haain meree kumariyan aur javan log talavar se gir gaae haain too ne kop karane ke din unhen ghaat kiya too ne nitturata ke sath unaka vadha kiya haai. 
Lamentations2:22 too ne mere bhy ke karanon ke niyat parva kee bheed ke saman charon or se bulaya haai aur yahova ke kop ke din n to koi bhag nikala aur n koi bach raha haai jin ko maain ne god men liya aur pala-posakar baddhaya tha, mere shatra ne unaka ant kar dala haai." 
Lamentations3:1 usake rosh kee chhdee se dukh bhoganevala purush maain hee hoon 
Lamentations3:2 vah mujhe le jakar ujiyale men nahee, andhiayare hee men chalata haai" 
Lamentations3:3 usaka hath din bhr mere hee viruddh uttta rahata haai. 
Lamentations3:4 us ne mera mans aur chamada gala diya haai, aur meree haaddiyon ko tod diya haai" 
Lamentations3:5 us ne mujhe rokane ke liye kila banaya, aur mujh ko kaattnai dukh aur shram se ghora haai" 
Lamentations3:6 us ne mujhe bahut din ke mare huae logon ke saman andhore sthanon men basa diya haai. 
Lamentations3:7 mere charon or us ne bada bandha haai ki maain nikal naheen sakata us ne mujhe bharee sankal se jakada haai 
Lamentations3:8 maain chilla chillake dohai deta hoo, taubhee vah meree praarthta naheen sunata" 
Lamentations3:9 mere magan ko us ne gaddhe huae patthron se rok rakha haai, meree dgaron ko us ne tteddhee kar diya haai." 
Lamentations3:10 vah mere liye ghaat men baaitte huae reechh aur ghaat lagaae huae sinh ke saman haai 
Lamentations3:11 us ne mujhe mere magan se bhula diya, aur mujhe faad dala us ne mujh ko ujad diya haai." 
Lamentations3:12 us ne dhanush chaddhakar mujhe apane teer ka nishaana banaya haai. 
Lamentations3:13 us ne apanee teeron se mere day ko bedha diya haai 
Lamentations3:14 sab log mujh par hansate haain aur din bhr mujh par ddhalakar gaeet gate haai," 
Lamentations3:15 us ne mujhe kattnai dukh se bhr diya, aur nagadauna pilakar trapt kiya haai." 
Lamentations3:16 us ne mere danton ko kankaree se tod dala, aur mujhe rakh se ddhanp diya haai" 
Lamentations3:17 aur mujh ko man se utarakar kushal se raahit kiya haai maain kalyan bool gaya hoo 
Lamentations3:18 isaliaee maain ne kaha, mera bal nash hua, aur meree ash jo yahova par thee, vah toott gai haai." 
Lamentations3:19 mera dukh aur mara mara firana, mera nagadaune aura-aur vish ka peena smaran kar!" 
Lamentations3:20 maain unheen par sochata rahata hoo, is se mera praan ddhla jata haai." 
Lamentations3:21 parantu maain yah smaran karata hoo, iseealiye mujhe aasha haai" 
Lamentations3:22 ham mitt naheen gaae yah yahova kee mahakaruna ka fal haai, kyonaki usakee daya amar haai." 
Lamentations3:23 praati bhor vah nai hotee rahatee haai teree sachchai mahan haai. 
Lamentations3:24 mere man ne kaha, yahova mera bhag haai, is karan maain us men asha rakoonga." 
Lamentations3:25 jo yahova kee batt johate aur usake pas jate haai, unake liye yahova bhla haai." 
Lamentations3:26 yahova se uddhar pane kee asha rakhkar chupachap rahana bhla haai. 
Lamentations3:27 purush ke liye javanee men jooa uttana bhla haai. 
Lamentations3:28 vah yah janakar akela chupachap rahe, ki parameshvar hee ne us par yah bojh dala haai" 
Lamentations3:29 vah apana munh dhool men rakhe, kaya jane is men kuchh asha ho" 
Lamentations3:30 vah apana gal apane maranevale kee or faere, aur namadharai sahata rahe." 
Lamentations3:31 kyonaki prabhu man se sarvada utare naheen rahata," 
Lamentations3:32 chahe vah dukh bhee de, taubhee apanee karuna kee bahutayat ke karan vah daya bhee karata haai" 
Lamentations3:33 kyonaki vah manushyon ko apane man se n to dabata haai aur n dukh deta haai. 
Lamentations3:34 prathvee bhr ke bandhauon ko panv ke tale daalit karana," 
Lamentations3:35 kisee purush ka haka paramapradhaan ke samhane marana," 
Lamentations3:36 aur kisee manushy ka mukama bigadna, in teen kamon ko yahova dekh naheen sakata." 
Lamentations3:37 yaadi yahova ne agyaa n dee ho, tab kaun haai ki vachan kahe aur vah poora ho jaae?" 
Lamentations3:38 vipaattai aur kalya, kya donon paramapradhaan kee agyaa se naheen hote?" 
Lamentations3:39 so jeeavit manushy kyon kudkudaae? aur purush apane pap ke dand ko kyon bura mane? 
Lamentations3:40 ham apane chalachalan ko dhyan se parakhe, aur yahova kee or firen!" 
Lamentations3:41 ham svargavasee parameshvar kee or man lagaaen aur hath faailaaen aur kahen 
Lamentations3:42 ham ne to aparadha aur balava kiya haai, aur too ne kshama naheen kiya." 
Lamentations3:43 tera kop ham par haai, too hamare peechhe pada haai, too ne bina taras khaae ghaat kiya haai." 
Lamentations3:44 too ne apane ko megha se ghor liya haai ki tujh tak praarthna n pahunch sake. 
Lamentations3:45 too ne ham ko jaati jati ke logon ke beech men kooda-karkatt sa ttharaya haai. 
Lamentations3:46 hamare sab shatrauon ne ham par apana apana munh faailaya haai 
Lamentations3:47 bhy aur gadha, ujad aur vinasha, ham par a pade haain" 
Lamentations3:48 meree ankhon se meree praja kee putraee ke vinash ke karan jal kee dhaaraaen bah rahee haai. 
Lamentations3:49 meree ankh se lagatar ansoo bahate rahenge," 
Lamentations3:50 jab tak yahova svarga se meree or n dekhe 
Lamentations3:51 apanee nagaree kee sab striayon ka hal dekhne par mera dukh baddhta haai. 
Lamentations3:52 jo vyarth mere shatra bane haai, unhon ne nirdayata se chidiya ke saman mera aher kiya haai" 
Lamentations3:53 unhon ne mujhe gadhe men dalakar mere jeevan ka ant karane ke liye mere upar patthr luddhkaae haain 
Lamentations3:54 mere sir par se jal bah gaya, maain ne kaha, maain ab nash ho gaya." 
Lamentations3:55 he yahova, gaahire gadhe men se maain ne tujh se praarthna kee" 
Lamentations3:56 too ne meree sunee ki jo dohai dekar maain chillata hoo us se kan n faer le! 
Lamentations3:57 jab maain ne tujhe pukara, tab too ne mujh se kaha, mat dr!" 
Lamentations3:58 he yahova, too ne mera mukama ladkar mera praan bacha liya haai." 
Lamentations3:59 he yahova, jo anyay mujh par hua haai use too ne dekha haai too mera nyay chuka." 
Lamentations3:60 jo badala unhon ne mujh se liya, aur jo kalpanaaen mere viruddh kee, unhen bhee too ne dekha haai." 
Lamentations3:61 he yahova, jo kalpanaaen aur ninda ve mere viruddh karate haai, ve bhee too ne sunee haain." 
Lamentations3:62 mere virodhaiyon ke vachan, aur jo kuchh bhee ve mere viruddh lagatar sochate haai, unhen too janata haai." 
Lamentations3:63 unaka uttna-baaittna dhyan se dekh ve mujh par lagate huae geet gate haain. 
Lamentations3:64 he yahova, too unake kamon ke anusar unako badala dega." 
Lamentations3:65 too unaka man sunn kar dega tera shaap un par hoga. 
Lamentations3:66 he yahova, too apane kop se unako khded-khdedkar dharatee par se nash kar dega." 
Lamentations4:1 sona kaaise khotta ho gaya, atyant khra sona kaaise badal gaya haai? pavitrasthan ke patthr to har aek sadk ke sire par faenk diae gaae haain." 
Lamentations4:2 siyyon ke uttam putra jo kundan ke tuly the, ve kumhar ke banaae huae mittee ke ghadon ke saman kaaise tuchchh gine gaae haain!" 
Lamentations4:3 geedadin bhee apane bachchon ko thn se lagakar pilatee haai, parantu mere logon kee bettee van ke shuuturmugan ke tuly nirdayee ho gai haai." 
Lamentations4:4 doodhapeeuve bachchon kee jeebh pyas ke mare taloo men chipatt gai haai balabachche rottee mangane haai, parantu koi unako naheen deta." 
Lamentations4:5 jo svadishtt bhejan khate the, ve ab sadkon men vyakul firate haain jo makhmal ke vasren men pale tho ab ghooron par lettte haain." 
Lamentations4:6 mere logon kee bettee ka adharma sadom ke pap se bhee aadhaik ho gaya jo kisee ke hath dale bina bhee kshan bhr men ulatt gaya tha. 
Lamentations4:7 usake kuleen him se nirmal aur doodha se bhee aadhaik ujjval the unakee deh moongon se adhaik lal, aur unakee sundarata neelamaanai kee see thee." 
Lamentations4:8 parantu ab unaka roop andhakar se bhee aadhaik kala haai, ve sadkon men cheenhen naheen jate unaka chamada haddiyon men satt gaya, aur lakadee ke saman sookh gaya haai." 
Lamentations4:9 talavar ke mare huae bookh ke mare huon se adhaik achchhe the jinaka praan khet kee upaj bina bookh ke mare sookhta jata he. 
Lamentations4:10 dayalu striayon ne apane hee hathon se apane bachchon ko pakaya haai mere logon ke vinash ke samay ve hee unaka ahar ban gaae. 
Lamentations4:11 yahova ne apanee pooree jalajalahatt pragatt kee, us ne apana kop bahut hee bhdkaya aur siyyon men aeesee ag lagai jis se usakee nev tak bhsm ho gai he." 
Lamentations4:12 prathvee ka koi raja va jagat ka koi bansee isakee kabhee prateeati n kar sakata tha, ki draehee aur shatra yarooshalem ke faattkon ke bheetar ghausane paaenge." 
Lamentations4:13 yah usake bhavishyadvktaon ke papon aur usake yajakon ke adharma ke kamon ke karan hua haai kyonaki ve usake beech dharmiyon kee hatya karate aae haain. 
Lamentations4:14 ve ab sadkon men andho sareekhe mare mare firate haai, aur mano lohoo kee chheentton se yahan tak ashuuddh haain ki koi unake vasr naheen choo sakata." 
Lamentations4:15 log unako pukarakar kahate haai, are ashuuddh logo, hatt jao! hatt jao! ham ko mat chooo! jab ve bhagakar mare mare firane lage, tab anyajati logon ne kaha, bhvishy men ve yahan ttkaine naheen paaenge." 
Lamentations4:16 yahova ne apane kop se unhen titara-abitar kiya, vah fir un par daya draashtti n karega n to yajakon ka sanman hua, aur n puraaniyon par kuchh anugrah kiya gaya." 
Lamentations4:17 hamaree ankhen vyarth hee sahayata kee batt johate johate rah gai haai, ham lagatar aek aeesee jaati kee or takate rahe jo bacha naheen sakee." 
Lamentations4:18 log hamare peechhe aeese pade ki ham apane nagar ke chaukon men bhee naheen chal sake hamara ant nikatt aya hamaree ayu pooree hui kyonki hamara ant a gaya tha. 
Lamentations4:19 hamare khdednevale akash ke ukabon se bhee aadhaik veg se chalate the ve pahadon par hamare peechhe pad gaae aur jangal men hamare liye ghaat lagakar baaitt gaae. 
Lamentations4:20 yahova ka aabhaishaikt jo hamara praan tha, aur jisake vishay ham ne socha tha ki anyajaatiyon ke beech ham usakee sharan men jeevit rahenge, vah unake khode huae gadhon men pakada gaya." 
Lamentations4:21 he aedom kee putrae, too jo uj desh men rahatee haai, hashairt t aur anaandait raha parantu yah kattora tujh tak bhee pahunchega, aur too manavalee hokar apane ap ko nanga karegee." 
Lamentations4:22 he yiyyon kee putrae, tere adharma ka dand samapt hua, vah fir tujhe bandhauai men n le jaaega parantu he aedom kee putrae, tere adharma ka dand vah tujhe dega, vah tere papon ko pragatt kar dega." 
Lamentations5:1 he yahova, smaran kar ki ham par kya kya beeta haai hamaree or drashtti karake hamaree namadharai ko dekh!" 
Lamentations5:2 hamara bhag paradeashaiyon ka ho gaya or hamare ghar parayon ke ho gaae haain. 
Lamentations5:3 ham anath aur pitaheen ho gaae hamaree mataaen vidhava see ho gai haain. 
Lamentations5:4 ham mol lekar panee peete haai, ham ko lakadee bhee dam se milatee haai." 
Lamentations5:5 khdednevale hamaree gardan par toott pade haain ham thk gaae haai, hamen vishraam naheen milata." 
Lamentations5:6 ham svayan misra ke adhaeen ho gaa, aur ashshoor ke bhee, taki peett bhr saken." 
Lamentations5:7 hamare purakhaon ne pap kiya, or mar mitte haain parantu unake adharma ke kamon ka bhar ham ko uttana pada haai." 
Lamentations5:8 hamare upar das adhaikar rakhte haain unake hath se koi hamen naheen chhudata. 
Lamentations5:9 jangal men kee talavar ke karan ham apane praan jokhaim men dalakar bhojanavastu le ate haain. 
Lamentations5:10 bookh kee jhulasane valee ag ke kara, hamara chamada tandoor kee nai kala ho gaya haai." 
Lamentations5:11 siyyon men striaya, aur yahooda ke nagaron men kumariyan bhrashtt kee gai haain." 
Lamentations5:12 haakim hath ke bal ttange gaae haain aur puraaniyon ka kuchh bhee adar naheen kiya gaya. 
Lamentations5:13 javanon ko chakkee chalanee padtee haai aur ladkebale lakadee ka bojh uttate huae ladkhdate haain. 
Lamentations5:14 ab faattk par puraaniye naheen baaittte, n javanon ka geet sunai padta haai." 
Lamentations5:15 hamare man ka harsha jata raha, hamara nachana vilap men badal gaya haai." 
Lamentations5:16 hamare sir par ka mukutt gir pada he ham par hay, kyonaki ham ne pap kiya haai!" 
Lamentations5:17 is karan hamara day nirbal ho gaya haai, inheen baton se hamaree ankhen dhaundhalee pad gai haai," 
Lamentations5:18 kyonaki siyyon parvat ujad pada haai us men siyar ghoomate haain. 
Lamentations5:19 parantu he yahova, too to sada tak virajaman rahega tera rajy peeddhee-peeddhee bana rahega." 
Lamentations5:20 too ne kyon ham ko sada ke liye bhula diya haai, aur kyon bahut kal ke liye hamen chhod diya haai?" 
Lamentations5:21 he yahova, ham ko apanee or faer, tab ham fir sudhar jaaenge. praacheenakal kee nai hamare din badalakar jyon ke tyon kar de!" 
Lamentations5:22 kya too ne hamen bilkul tyag diya he? kya too ham se atyant krodhait haai? 
Ezekiel1:1 teesaven varsha ke chauthe maheene ke panchaven din, maain bandhauon ke beech kabar nadee ke teer par tha, tab svarga khul gaya, aur maain ne parameshvar ke darshan paae." 
Ezekiel1:2 yahoyakeem raja kee bandhauai ke panchaven varsha ke chauthe maheene ke panchaven din ko, kasaadiyon ke desh men kabar nadee ke teer par," 
Ezekiel1:3 yahova ka vachan boojee ke putra yahejakel yajak ke pas pahucha aur yahova kee shaaktai us par vaheen pragatt hui. 
Ezekiel1:4 jab maain dekhne laga, to kya dekhta hoo ki uttar disha se badee ghatta, aur laharatee hui ag sahit badee andhaee a rahee haai aur ghatta ke charon or prakash aur ag ke beechon-beech se jhlakaya hua peetal sa kuchh dikhai deta haai." 
Ezekiel1:5 fir usake beech se char jeevadhaaariyon ke saman kuchh nikale. aur unaka roop manushy ke saman tha," 
Ezekiel1:6 parantu un men se har aek ke char char mukh aur char char pankh the. 
Ezekiel1:7 unake panv seedho the, aur unake panvon ke taluae bachhdon ke khuron ke se the aur ve jhlakaae huae peetal kee nai chamakate the." 
Ezekiel1:8 unakee charon alang par pankhon ke neeche manushy ke se hath the. aur un charon ke mukh aur pankh is prakar ke the 
Ezekiel1:9 unake pankh ek doosare se paraspar mile huae the ve apane apane samhane seedho hee chalate huae mudte naheen the. 
Ezekiel1:10 unake samhane ke mukhon ka roop manushy ka sa tha aur un charon ke dahinee or ke mukh sinh ke se, bai or ke mukh baail ke se the, aur charon ke peechhe ke mukh ukab pakshaee ke se the." 
Ezekiel1:11 unake chehare aeese the. aur unake mukh aur pankh upar kee or alag alag the har ek jeevadhaaree ke do do pankh the, jo ek doosare ke pankhon se mile huae the, aur do do pankhon se unaka shareer ddhnpa hua tha." 
Ezekiel1:12 aur ve seedho apane apane samhane hee chalate the jidhr atma jana chahata tha, ve udhar hee jate the, aur chalate samay mudte naheen the." 
Ezekiel1:13 aur jeebadhaariyon ke roop angaron aur jalate huae paleeton ke saman dikhai dete the, aur vah ag jeevadhaariyon ke beech idhar udhr chalatee firatee hui bada prakash detee rahee aur us ag se bijalee nikalatee thee." 
Ezekiel1:14 aur jeevadhaariyon ka chalana-firana bijalee ka sa tha. 
Ezekiel1:15 jab maain jeevadhaaariyon ko dekh hee raha tha, to kya dekha ki boomi par unake pas charon mukhen kee ginatee ke anusar, aek aek paahiya tha." 
Ezekiel1:16 paahiyon ka roop aur banavatt faeeroje kee see thee, aur charon ka aek hee roop tha aur unaka roop aur banavatt aeesee thee jaaise aek paahiye ke beech doosara pahiya ho." 
Ezekiel1:17 chalate samay ve apanee charon alangon kee or chal sakate the, aur chalane men mudte naheen the." 
Ezekiel1:18 aur un charon pahiyon ke ghore bahut bade aur dravane the, aur unake ghoron men charon or ankhen hee ankhen bhree hui theen." 
Ezekiel1:19 aur jab jeevadhaaree chalate the, tab paahiye bhee unake sath chalate the aur jab jeevadhaaree boomi par se uttte the, tab pahiye bhee uttte the." 
Ezekiel1:20 jidhar atma jana chahatee thee, udhar hee ve jate, aur aur pahiye jeevadhaariyon ke sath uttte the kyonaki unakee atma pahiyon men thee." 
Ezekiel1:21 jab ve chalate the tab ye bhee chalate the aur jab jab ve khde hote the tab ye bhee khde hote the aur jab ve boomi par se uttte the tab pahiye bhee unake sath uttte the kyonaki jeevadhaaariyon kee atma paahiyon men thee. 
Ezekiel1:22 jeevadhaariyon ke siron ke upar akashmandl sa kuchh tha jo barfa kee nai bhyanak reeati se chamakta tha, aur vah unake siron ke upar faaila hua tha." 
Ezekiel1:23 aur akashamandl ke neeche, unake pankh aek doosare kee or seedho faaile huae the aur har aek jeevadhaaree ke do do aur pankh the jin se unake shareer ddhnpe huae the." 
Ezekiel1:24 aur unake chalate samay unake pankhon kee fadfadahatt kee ahatt mujhe bahut se jal, va sarpashaktaiman kee vanee, va sena ke halachal kee see sunai padtee thee aur jab ve khde hote the, tab apane pankh lattka lete the." 
Ezekiel1:25 fir unake siron ke upar jo akashamandl tha, usake upar se aek shabd sunai padta tha aur jab ve khde hote the, tab apane pankh lattka lete the." 
Ezekiel1:26 aur jo akashamandl unake siron ke upar tha, usake upar mano kuchh neelam ka bana hua sinhasan tha is sinhasan ke upar manushy ke saman koi dikhai deta tha." 
Ezekiel1:27 aur usakee mano kamar se lekar upar kee or mujhe jhlakaya hua peetal sa dikhai pada, aur usake bheetar aur charon or ag see dikhai padtee thee fir us manushy kee kamar se lekar neeche kee or bhee mujhe kuchh ag see dikhai padtee thee aur usake charon or prakash tha." 
Ezekiel1:28 jaaise vashara ke din badal men dhanush dikhai padta haai, vaaise hee charon or ka prakash dikhai deta tha. yahova ke tej ka roop aeesa hee tha. aur use dekhkar, maain munh ke bal gira, tab maain ne aek shabd suna jaaise koi baten karata haai." 
Ezekiel2:1 aur us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, apane panvon ke bal khda ho, aur maain tujh se baten karoonga." 
Ezekiel2:2 jaaise hee us ne mujh se yah kaha, tyonhee atma ne mujh men samakar mujhe panvon ke bal khda kar diya aur jo mujh se baten karata tha maain ne usakee sunee." 
Ezekiel2:3 aur us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, maain tujhe israaaeliyon ke pas arthata balava karanevalee jaati ke pas bhejata hoo, jinhon ne mere viruddh balava kiya haai unake purakha aur ve bhee aj ke dil tak mera aparadha karate chale aae haain." 
Ezekiel2:4 is peeddhee ke log jinake pas maain tujhe bhejata hoo, ve nirlajj aur hatteele haain" 
Ezekiel2:5 aur too un se kahana, prabhu yahova yon kahata he, is se ve, jo balava karanevale gharane ke haai, chahe ve sunen v n sune, taubhee ve itana jan lenge ki hamare beech aek bhvishyadvkta pragatt hua haai." 
Ezekiel2:6 aur he manushy ke santan, too un se n drana chahe tujhe kantto, unttkattaron or bichchuon ke beech bhee rahana pade, taubhee unake vachanon se n drana yadhypi ve balavai gharane ke haai, taubhee n to unake vachanon se drana, aur n unake munh dekhkar tera man kachcha ho." 
Ezekiel2:7 so chahe ve sunen ya n sunen taubhee too mere vachan un se kahana, ve to bade balavai haain." 
Ezekiel2:8 parantu he manushy ke santan, jo maain tujh se kahata hoo, use too sun le, us balavai gharane ke saman too bhee balavai n banana jo men tujhe deta hoo, use munh kholakar kha le." 
Ezekiel2:9 tab maain ne drashtti kee aur kya dek, ki meree or aek hath baddha hua haai aur us men aek pusatak haai." 
Ezekiel2:10 usako us ne mere samhane kholakar faailaya, or vah donon or likhee hui thee aur jo us men likha tha, ve vilap aur shaek aur dukhbhre vachan the." 
Ezekiel3:1 tab us ne mujh se kaha he manushy ke santan, jo tujhe mila haai use kha le arthata is pustak ko kha, tab jakar israaael ke gharane se baten kara." 
Ezekiel3:2 so maain ne munh khola aur us ne vah pustak pujhe khaila dee. 
Ezekiel3:3 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, yah pustak jo maain tujhe deta hoo use pacha le, aur apanee antaadiyan is se bhr le. so maain ne use kha liya aur mere munh men vah madha ke tuly meettee lagee." 
Ezekiel3:4 fir us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, too israaael ke gharane ke pas jakar unako mere vachan suna." 
Ezekiel3:5 aikyanki too kisee anokhee bolee va kattnai bhashaavalee jati ke pas naheen bheja jata haai, parantu israaael hee ke gharane ke pas bheja jata haai." 
Ezekiel3:6 anokhee bolee va kattnai bhashaavalee bahut see jaatiyon ke pas jo teree bat samajh n sake, too naheen bheja jata. nisandeh yaadi maain tujhe aeeson ke pas bhejata to ve teree sunate." 
Ezekiel3:7 parantu israaael ke gharanevale teree sunane se inakar karenge ve meree bhee sunane se inakar karate haain kyonki israaael ka sara gharana ddheett aur kattor man ka haai. 
Ezekiel3:8 dek, maain tere mukh ko unake mukh ke samhane, aur tere mathe ko unake mathe ke samhane, ddheett kar deta hoo." 
Ezekiel3:9 maain tere mathe ko heere ke tuly kada kar dota hoo jo chakamak patthr se bhee kada hota haai so too un se n drana, aur n unake munh dekhkar tera man kachcha ho kyonki ve balavai gharane ke haain." 
Ezekiel3:10 fir us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, ikatane vachan maain tujh se kahoo, ve sab day men rakh aur kanon se suna." 
Ezekiel3:11 aur un bandhauon ke pas jakar, jo tere jati bhai haai, un se baten karana aur kahana, ki prabhu yahova yon kahata haai chahe ve sune, v n sunen." 
Ezekiel3:12 tab atma ne mujhe uttaya, aur maain ne apane peechhe badee ghadghadahatt ke sath aek shabd suna, ki yahova ke bhvan se usaka tej dhany haai." 
Ezekiel3:13 aur usake sath hee un jeevadhaariyon ke pankhon ka shabd, jo aek doosare se lagate the, aur unake sang ke paahiyon ka shabd aur aek badee hee ghadghadahatt sun padee." 
Ezekiel3:14 so atma mujhe uttakar le gai, aur maain kattnai dukh se bhra hua, aur man men jalata hua chala gaya aur yahova kee shaaktai mujh men prabal thee" 
Ezekiel3:15 aur maain un bandhauon ke pas aya jo kabar nadee ke teer par telabeeb men rahate the. aur vahan maain sat din tak unake beech vyakul hokar baaitta raha. 
Ezekiel3:16 sat din ke vyateet hone par yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel3:17 he manushy ke santan maain ne tujhe israaael ke gharane ke liye paharua niyukt kiya haai too mere munh kee bat sunakar, unhen meree or se chitana." 
Ezekiel3:18 jab maain dushtt se kahoon ki too nishchay marega, aur yadi too usako n chitaa, aur n dushtt se aeesee bat kahe jis se ki vah sachet ho aur apana dushtt marga chhodkar jeeavit rahe, to vah dushtt apane adharma men fansa hua marega, parantu usake koon ka lekha maain tujhee se loonga." 
Ezekiel3:19 par yaadi too dushtt ko chitaa, aur vah apanee dushttta or dushtt parga se n fire, to vah to apane adharma men fansa hua mar jaaega parantu too apane praanon ko bachaaega." 
Ezekiel3:20 fir jab dhama jan apane dharma se firakar kuttlai kam karane lage, aur maain usake samhane ttokar rakoo, to vah mar jaaega, kyonaki too ne jo usako naheen chitaya, isaaliye vah apane pap men fansa hua marega aur jo dharma ke karma us ne kiae ho, unakee sudhai n lee jaaegee, par usake koon ka lekha maain tujhee se loonga."
