Ezekiel3:21 parantu yadi too dhama ko aeesa kahakar chitaa, ki vah pap n kare, aur vah pap se bach jaa, to vah chitaunee ko grahan karane ke karan nishchay jeevit rahega, aur too apane praan ko bachaaega." 
Ezekiel3:22 fir yahova kee shaktai vaheen mujh par pragatt hui, aur us ne mujh se kaha, uttkar maaidan men ja aur vahan maain tujh se baten karoonga." 
Ezekiel3:23 tab maain uttkar maaidan men gaya, aur vahan kya dekha, ki yahova ka pratap jaaisa mujhe kabar nadee ke teer par, vaaisa hee yahan bhee dikhai padta haai aur maain munh ke bal gir pada." 
Ezekiel3:24 tab atma ne mujh men samakar mujhe panvon ke bal khda kar diya fir vah mujh se kahane laga, ja apane ghar ke bheetar dar band karake baaitt raha." 
Ezekiel3:25 aur he manushy ke santan, dekh ve log tujhe rassaiyon se jakadkar bandha rakhenge, aur too nikalakar unake beech jane naheen paaega." 
Ezekiel3:26 aur maain teree jeebh tere taloo se lagaunga jis se too mauain rahakar unaka danttnevala n ho, kyonaki ve balavai gharane ke haain." 
Ezekiel3:27 parantu jab jab maain tujh se baten karoo, tab tab tere munh ko kholoonga, aur too un se aeesa kahana, ki prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, jo sunata haai vah sun le aur jo naheen sunata vah n sune, ve to balavai gharane ke haain hee." 
Ezekiel4:1 aur he manushy ke santan, too aek itt le aur use apane samhane rakhkar us par aek nagar, arthata yarooshalem ka chitra kheencha" 
Ezekiel4:2 tab use ghor arthata usake viruddh kila bana aur usake samhane damadama bandha aur chhavanee dal, aur usake charon or yuddh ke yantra laga." 
Ezekiel4:3 tab too lohe kee thalee lekar usako lohen kee shaharapanah manakar apane or us nagar ke beech khda kara tab apana munh usake samhane karake use ghorava, is reeti se too use ghor rakhna. yah israaael ke gharane ke liye chinh ttharega." 
Ezekiel4:4 fir too apane banyen panjar ke bal lettkar israaael ke gharane ka adharma apane upar rakh kyonki jitane din too us panjar ke bal letta rahega, utane din tak un logon ke adharma ka bhar sahata raha." 
Ezekiel4:5 maain ne unake adharma ke bashan ke tuly tere liye din ttharaae haai, arthata teen sau nabbe dina utane din tak too israaael ke gharane ke adharma ka bhar sahata raha." 
Ezekiel4:6 aur jab itane din poore ho jaae, tab apane dahine panjar ke bal lettkar yahooda ke gharane ke adharma ka bhar sah lena maain ne usake liye bhee aur tere liye aek varsha kee santee aek din arthata chalees din ttharaae haain." 
Ezekiel4:7 aur too yarooshalem ke ghorane ke liye banh ughaade huae apana munh ughar karake usake viruddh bhavishyadanee karana. 
Ezekiel4:8 aur dek, maain tujhe rassaiyon se jakaoonga, aur jab tak usake ghorane ke din poore n ho, tab tak too karavatt n le sakega." 
Ezekiel4:9 aur too gehoo, jav, sem, masoor, bajara, aur kaattyai gehoon lekar, aek basan men rakhkar un se rottee banaya karana. jitane din too apane panjar ke bal letta rahega, utane arthata teen sau nabbe din tak use khaya karana." 
Ezekiel4:10 aur jo bhejan too khaa, use taul taulakar khana, arthata praati din bees bees shokel bhr khaya karata, aur use samay samay par khana." 
Ezekiel4:11 panee bhee too mapakar piya karana, arthata praati din heen ka chhttvan ansh peena aur usako samay samay par peena." 
Ezekiel4:12 aur apana bhojan jab kee rottyaien kee nai banakar khaya karana, aur usako manushy kee bishtta se unake dekhte danaya karana." 
Ezekiel4:13 fir yahova ne kaha, isee prakar se israaael un jatiyon ke beech apanee apanee rottee ashuuddhata se khaya karenge, jahan men unhen barabas pahunchaunga." 
Ezekiel4:14 tab maain ne kaha, hay, yahova parameshvar dek, mera man kabhee ashuuddh naheen hua, aur n maain ne bachapan se lekar ab tak apanee mratyu se mare huae va faade huae pashu ka mans khaya, aur n kisee prakar ka ghainauna mans mere punh men kabhee gaya haai." 
Ezekiel4:15 tab us ne mujh se kaha, dek, maain ne tere liye manushy kee vishtta kee santee gobar ttharaya haai, aur usee se too apanee rottee banana." 
Ezekiel4:16 fir us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, dek, maain yarooshalem men annaroopee adhaar ko door karoonga so vahan ke log taul tolakar aur chinta kar karake rottee khaya karenge aur map mapakar aur vismait ho hokar panee piya karenge." 
Ezekiel4:17 aur is se unhen rottee aur panee kee ghattee hogee aur ve sab ke sab ghabaraaenge, aur apane adharma men fanse huae sookh jaaenge." 
Ezekiel5:1 aur he manushy ke santan, aek paainee talavar le, aur use na ke chhure ke kam men lakar apane sir aur daddhee ke bal moond dala tab taulane ka kantta lekar balon ke bhag kara." 
Ezekiel5:2 jab nagar ke ghairane ke din poore ho, tab nagar ke bheetar aek tihai ag men dalakar jalana aur aek tihai lekar charon or talavar se marana or aek tihai ko pavan men udana, aur maain talavar kheenchakar usake peechhe chalaunga." 
Ezekiel5:3 tab in men se thode se bal lekar apane kapade kee chhor men bandhana. 
Ezekiel5:4 fir un men se bhee thode se lekar ag ke beech dalana ki ve ag men jal jaaen tab usee men se aek lo bhdkakar israaael ke sare dharane men faail jaaegee. 
Ezekiel5:5 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, yarooshalem gesee hee haai maain ne usako anyajaatiyon ke beech men ttharaya, aur vah charon or deshaen se ghairee haai." 
Ezekiel5:6 us ne mere niyamon ke viruddh kam karake anyajatiyon se aadhaik dushttta kee, aur meree vidhaiyon ke viruddh charon or ke deshaen ke logoen se adhaik burai kee haai kyonaki unhon ne mere niyam tuchchh jane, aur ve meree vidhaiyon par naheen chale." 
Ezekiel5:7 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, tum log jo apane charon or kee jaatiyon se aadhaik hullad machate, aur n meree vidhaiyon par chalate, n mere niyamon ko manate aur apane charon or kee jaatiyon ke niyamon ke anusar bhee n kiya," 
Ezekiel5:8 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain svayan tere viruddh hoo aur anyajaatiyon ke dekhte maain tere beech nyay ke kam karoonga." 
Ezekiel5:9 aur tere sab ghainaune kamon ke karan maain tere beech aeesa karoonga, jaaisa n ab tak kiya haai, aur n bhavishy men fir karoonga." 
Ezekiel5:10 so tere beech ladkebale apane apane bap ka, aur bap apane apane ladkebalon ka mans khaaenge aur maain tujh ko dand doonga," 
Ezekiel5:11 aur tere sab bache huon ko charon or titara-abitar karoonga. isaaliye prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki mere jeevan kee saugandha, isaliye ki too ne mere paavitrasthan ko apanee saree ghainaunee mooraton aur sare ghainaune kamon se ashuuddh kiya haai, maain tujhe ghattaunga, aur tujh par daya kee draashtti n karoonga, aur tujh par kuchh bhee komalata n karoonga." 
Ezekiel5:12 teree aek tihai to maree se maregee, aur tere beech bookh se mar mittegee aek tihai tere as pas talavar se maree jaaegee aur aek tihai ko maain charon or titara-abitar karoonga aur talavar kheenchakar unake peechhe chalaunga." 
Ezekiel5:13 is prakar se mera kop shaant hoga, aur apanee jalajalahatt un par pooree reeti se bhdkakar maain shaantai paunga aur jab maain apanee jalajalahatt un par pooree reeti se bhdka chukoo, tab ve jan lenge ki mujh yahova hee ne jalan men akar yah kaha haai." 
Ezekiel5:14 aur maain tujhe tere charon or kee jaatiyon ke beech, sab battohiyon ke dekhte huae ujaoonga, aur teree namadharai karaunga." 
Ezekiel5:15 so jab maain tujh ko kop aur jalajalahatt aur risavalee ghaudkiyon ke sath dand doonga, tab tere charon or kee jaatiyon ke samhane namadharai, ttttha, shaiksha aur vismay hoga, kyonaki moojh yahova ne yah kaha haai." 
Ezekiel5:16 yah us samay hoga, jab maain un logon ko nash karane ke liye tum par mahangee ke teekhe teer chalakar, tumhare beech mahangee baddhaunga, aur tumhare annaroopee adhaar ko door karoonga." 
Ezekiel5:17 aur maain tumhare beech mahangee aur dushtt jantu bhejoonga jo tumhen nisantan karenge aur maree aur koon tumhare beech chalate rahenge aur maain tum par talavar chalavaunga, mujh yahova ne yah kaha haai." 
Ezekiel6:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha. 
Ezekiel6:2 he matushy ke santan apana mukh israaael ke pahadon kee or karake unake viruddh bhavishyadanee kar," 
Ezekiel6:3 aur kah, he israaael ke pahado, prabhu yahova ka vachan suno! prabhu yahova pahadon aur pahadiyon se, aur nalon aur taraiyon se yon kahata haai, dekho, maain tum par talavar chalavaunga, aur tumhare pooja ke unche sthanon ko nash karoonga." 
Ezekiel6:4 tumharee vediyan ujadengee aur tumharee soorya kee praatimaaen todee jaaengee aur maain tum men se mare huon ko tumharee mooraton ke age faenk doonga. 
Ezekiel6:5 maain israaaeliyon kee lothon ko unakee mooraton ke samhane rakoonga, aur unakee haddiyon ko tumharee vediyon ke as pas chhtaira doongan" 
Ezekiel6:6 tumhare jitane basaae huae nagar haai, ve sab aeese ujad jaaenge, ki tumhare pooja ke unche sthan bhee ujad ho jaaenge, tumharee veadiyan ujadengee aur ddhai jaaengee, tumharee mooraten jatee rahengee aur tumharee soorya kee pratimaaen kattee jaaengee aur tumharee saree kareegaree mittai jaaegee." 
Ezekiel6:7 aur tumhare beech mare huae girenge, aur tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel6:8 taubhee maain kitanon ko bacha rakoonga. so jab tum desh desh men titara-abitar hoge, tab anyajaatiyon ke beech tumhare kuchh log talavar se bach jaaenge." 
Ezekiel6:9 aur ve bache huae jog, un jatiyon ke beech, jin men ve bandhauae hokar jaaenge, mujhe smaran karenge aur yah bhee ki hamara vyaabhaicharee day yahova se kaaise hatt gaya haai aur vyaabhaichaarinee kee see hamaree ankhen mooraton par kaaisee lagee haain jis se yahova ka man tootta haai. is reeati se un buraiyon ke kara, jo unhon ne apane sare ghainaune kam karake kee haai, ve apanee drashtti men ghainaune ttharenge." 
Ezekiel6:10 tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo, aur unakee saree haani karane ko maain ne jo yah kaha haai, use vyarth naheen kaha." 
Ezekiel6:11 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, ki apana hath marakar aur apana panv pattkakar kah, israaael ke gharane ke sare ghainaune kamon par hay, hay, kyonaki ve talavar, book, aur maree se nash ho jaaenge." 
Ezekiel6:12 jo door ho vah maree se marega, aur jo nikatt ho vah talavar se mar dala jaaega aur jo bachakar nagar men rahate huae ghora jaa, vah bookh se marega. is bhanti maain apanee jalajalahatt un par pooree reeati se utaroonga." 
Ezekiel6:13 aur jab har aek unchee pahadee aur pahadon kee har aek chottee par, aur har aek hare ped ke neeche, aur har aek ghane banjavraksha kee chhaya me, jahan jahan ve apanee sab mooraton ko sukhdayak sugandha dravy chaddhate haai, vahan unake mare huae log apanee veadiyon ke as pas apanee mooraton ke beech men pade rahenge tab tum log jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel6:14 maain apana hath unake viruddh baddhakar us desh ko sare gharon samet jangal se le dibala kee or tak ujad hee ujad kar doonga. tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel7:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel7:2 he manushy ke santan, prabhu yahova israaael kee boomi ke vishay men yon kahata haai, ki ant hua charon konon samet desh ka ant a gaya haai." 
Ezekiel7:3 tera ant bhee a gaya, aur maain apana kop tujh par bhdkakar tere chalachalan ke anusar tujhe dand doonga aur tere sare ghainaune kamon ka fal tujhe doonga." 
Ezekiel7:4 meree dayadrashtti tujh par n hogee, aur n maain kotalata karoonga aur jab tak tere ghainaune pap tujh men bane rahenge tab tak maain tere chalachalan ka fal tujhe doonga. tab too jan lega ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel7:5 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, vipaattai haai, aek badee vipaattai haai! dekho, vah atee haai." 
Ezekiel7:6 ant a gaya haai, sab ka ant aya haai vah tere viruddh jaga haai. dekho, vah ata haai." 
Ezekiel7:7 he desh ke nivasee, tere liye chakr ghoom chuka, samay a gaya, din nikatt haai pahadon par anand ke shabd ka din nahee, hullad hee ka hoga." 
Ezekiel7:8 ab thode dinon men maain apanee jalajalahatt tujh par bhdkaunga, aur tujh par poora kop undeloonga aur tere chalachalan ke anusar tujhe dand doonga. aur tere sare ghainaune kamon ka fal tujhe bhugataunga." 
Ezekiel7:9 meree dayadrashtti tujh par n hogee aur n maain tujh par kopalata karoonga. maain teree chalachalan ka fal tujhe bhugataunga, aur tere ghainaune pap tujh men bane rahenge. tab tum jan loge ki maain yahova dand denevala hoo." 
Ezekiel7:10 dekho, us din ko dekho, vah ata haai! chakr ghoom chuka, chhdee fool chukee, abhaiman foola haai." 
Ezekiel7:11 upadrav baddhte baddhte dushttta ka dand ban gaya un men se koi n bachega, aur n unakee bheed-bhad, n unake dhan men se kuchh rahega aur n un men se kisee ke liye vilap sun padega." 
Ezekiel7:12 samay a gaya, din nikatt a gaya haai n to mol lenevala anand kare aur n bechanevala shaek kare, kyonaki unakee saree bheed par kop bhdk utta haai." 
Ezekiel7:13 chahe ve jeevit rahe, taubhee bechanevala bechee hui vastu ke pas kabhee lauttne n paaega kyonki darshan kee yah bat desh kee saree bheed par ghattegee koi n lauttega koi bhee manushy, jo adharma men jeevit rahata haai, bal n pakad sakega." 
Ezekiel7:14 unhonne narasinga foonka aur sab kuchh taaiyar kar diya parantu yuddh men koi naheen jata kyonaki desh kee saree bheed par mera kop bhdka hua haai. 
Ezekiel7:15 bahar talavar aur bheetar mahangee aur maree haain jo maaidan men ho vah talavar se marega, aur jo nagar men ho vah bookh aur maree se mara jaaega." 
Ezekiel7:16 aur un men se jo bach nikalenge ve bachenge to sahee parantu apane apane adharma men fase rahakar taraiyon men rahanevale kabootaron kee nai pahadon ke upar vilap karate rahenge. 
Ezekiel7:17 sab ke hath ddheele aur sab ke ghauttne aati nirbal ho jaaenge. 
Ezekiel7:18 aur ve kamar men ttatt kasenge, aur unake roae khde honge sab ke munh sookh jaaenge aur sab ke sir moonde jaaenge." 
Ezekiel7:19 ve apanee chandee sadkon men faenk denge, aur unaka sona ashuuddh vastu chhharega yahova kee jalan ke din unaka sona chandee unako bacha n sakegee, n us se unaka jee santushtt hoga, n unake pett bhrenge. kyonki vah unake adharma ke ttokar ka karan hua haai." 
Ezekiel7:20 unaka desh jo shaebhayaman aur shairomanai tha, usake vishay men unhon ne garva hee garva karake us men apanee gharanait vastu on kee moorate, aur gharaanait vastuen bana rakhee, is karan maain ne use unake liye ashuuddh vastu ttharaya he." 
Ezekiel7:21 aur maain use loottne ke liye paradeashaiyon ke hat, aur ghan chhaeenane ke liye prathvee ke bushtt logon ke vash men kar doonga aur ve use apaavitra kar dalenge." 
Ezekiel7:22 maain un se munh faer loonga, tab ve mere raakshiat sthan ko apaavitra karenge dakoo us men ghausakar use apavitra karenge" 
Ezekiel7:23 aek sankal bana de, kyonki desh anyay kee hatya se, aur nagar upadrav se bhra hua haai." 
Ezekiel7:24 maain anyajaatiyon ke bure se bure logon ko launga, jo unake gharon ke svamee ho jaaenge aur maain samathairyon ka garva tod doonga aur unake pavitrasthan apavitra kiae jaaenge." 
Ezekiel7:25 satyanash hone par haai tab ddoonddhne par bhee unhen shaantai n milengee. 
Ezekiel7:26 vipaattai par vipaattai aaegee aur udtee hui charcha par charcha sunai padegee aur log bhavishyadvkta se darshan kee bat poochhenge, parantu yajak ke pas se vyavastha, aur puraaniye ke pas se sammaati dene kee shaaktai jatee rahegee." 
Ezekiel7:27 raja to shaek karega, aur rais udaseeroopee vasr paahinenge, aur desh ke logon ke hath ddheele padenge. maain unake chalan ke anusar un se bartav karoonga, aur unakee kamai ke saman unako dand doonga tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel8:1 fir chhttven varsha ke chhttven maheene ke panchaven din ko jab maain apane ghar men baaitta tha, aur yahoodiyon ke puradiye mere samhane baaitte the, tab prabhu yahova kee shaktai vaheen mujh par pragatt hui." 
Ezekiel8:2 aur maain ne dekha ki ag ka sa aek roop dikhi deta haai usakee kamar se neeche kee or ag haai, aur usakee kamar se upar kee or jhlakaae huae peetal kee jhlak see kuchh haai." 
Ezekiel8:3 us ne hath sa kuchh baddhakar mere sir ke bal pakade tab atma ne mujhe prathvee aur akash ke beech men uttakar parameshvar ke dikhaae huae darshanon men yarooshalem ke maandair ke bheetar, angan ke us faattk ke pas pahucha diya jisaka munh uttar kee or haai aur jis men us jalan upajanevalee pratima ka sthan tha jisake karan desh upajata haai." 
Ezekiel8:4 fir vahan israaael ke parameshvar ka tej vaaisa hee tha jaaisa maain ne maaidan men dekha tha. 
Ezekiel8:5 us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, apanee ankhen uttar kee or uttakar dekh. so maain ne apanee ankhen uttar kee or uttakar dekha ki vedee ke faattk kee uttar kee or usake praveshasthan hee men vah dah upajanevalee praatima haai." 
Ezekiel8:6 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, kya too dekhta haai ki ye log kya kar rahe haain? israaael ka gharana kya hee bade gharaanait kam yahan karata haai, taki maain apane paavitrasthan se door ho jaun parantu too in se bhee aadhaik gharaanait kam dekhega." 
Ezekiel8:7 tab vah mujhe angan ke dar par le gaya, aur maain ne dekha, ki bheet men aek chhed haai." 
Ezekiel8:8 tab us ne moojh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, bheet ko faod to maain ne bheet ko faodkar kya dekha ki aek dar haai" 
Ezekiel8:9 us ne mujh se kaha, bheetar jakar dekh ki ye log yahan kaaise kaaise aur aati gharaanait kam kar rahe haain." 
Ezekiel8:10 so maain ne bheetar jakar dekha ki charon or kee bheet par jaati jati ke renganevale jantuon aur gharaanait pashuuon aur israaael ke gharane kee sab mooraton ke chitra khaiche huae haain. 
Ezekiel8:11 aur israaael ke gharane ke puraaniyon men se sattar purush jin ke beech men shaapan ka putra yajanyah bhee haai, ve un chitraen ke samhane khde haai, aur har aek purush apane hath men ghoopadan liae huae haai aur dhoop ke dhooaen ke badal kee sugandha utt rahee haai." 
Ezekiel8:12 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, kya too ne dekha haai ki israaael ke gharane ke puraniye apanee apanee nakkashaeevalee kottriyon ke bheetar arthata andhiayare men kya kar rahe haain? ve kahate haain ki yahova ham ko naheen dekhta yahova ne desh ko tyag diya haai." 
Ezekiel8:13 fir us ne mujh se kaha, too in se aur bhee aati gharaanait kam dekhega jo ve karate haain." 
Ezekiel8:14 tab vah mujhe yahova ke bhvan ke us faattk ke pas le gaya jo uttar kee or tha aur vahan sitrayan baaittee hui tammooj ke liye ro rahee theen. 
Ezekiel8:15 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, kya too ne yah dekha haai? fir in se bhee bade ghararaanait kam too dekhega." 
Ezekiel8:16 tab vah mujhe yahova ke bhvan ke bheetaree angan men le gaya aur vahan yahova ke bhvan ke dar ke pas osare aur vedee ke beech koi pachchees purush apanee peett yahova ke bhvan kee or aur apane mukh poorva kee or kiae huae the aur ve poorva disha kee or soorya ko dandvata kar rahe the. 
Ezekiel8:17 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, kya too ne yah dekha? kya yahooda ke gharane ke liye gharanait kamon ka karana jo ve yahan karate haain chhottee bat haai? unhonne apane desh ko upadrav se bhr diya, aur fir yahan akar mujhe ris dilate haain. varan ve dalee ko apanee nak ke age liae rahate haain." 
Ezekiel8:18 isaliye maain bhee jalajalahatt ke sath kam karoonga, n maain daya karoonga aur n maain komalata karoonga aur chahe ve mere kanon men unche shabd se pukare, taubhee maain unakee bat n sunoonga." 
Ezekiel9:1 fir us ne mere kanon men unche shabd se pukarakar kaha, nagar ke adhaikaariyon ko apane apane hath men nash karane ka hathaiyar liae huae nikatt lao." 
Ezekiel9:2 is par chhpurusha, uttar kee or uparee faattk ke marga se apane apane hath men ghaat karane ka hathaiyar liae huae aae aur unake beech san ka vasr paahine, kamar men likhne kee davat bandho huae aek aur purush tha aur ve sab bhvan ke bheetar jakar peetal kee vedee ke pas khde huae." 
Ezekiel9:3 aur israaael ke parameshvar ka tej karoobon par se, jinake upar vah raha karata tha, bhvan kee devaddhee par utt aya tha aur us ne us san ke vasr pahine huae purush ko jo kamar men davat bandho huae tha, pukara." 
Ezekiel9:4 aur yahova ne us se kaha, is yarooshalem nagar ke bheetar idhar udhar jakar jitane manushy un sab gharaanait kamon ke karan jo us men kiae jate haai, sansen bhrate aur dukh ke mare chillate haai, unake mathon par chinh kar de." 
Ezekiel9:5 tab us ne mere sunate huae doosaron se kaha, nagar men unake peechhe peechhe chalakar marate jao kisee par daya n karana aur n komalata se kam karana." 
Ezekiel9:6 booddhe, yuva, kunvaree, balabachche, striaya, sab ko marakar nash karo, parantu jis kisee manushy ke mathe par vah chinh ho, usake nikatt n jana. aur mere pavitrasthan hee se arambh karo. aur unhon ne un puraaniyon se arambh kiya jo bhvan ke samhane the." 
Ezekiel9:7 fir us ne un se kaha, bhvan ko ashuuddh karo, aur anganon ko lothon se bhr do. chalo, bahar nikalo. tab ve nikalakar nagar men marane lage." 
Ezekiel9:8 jab ve mar rahe the, aur maain akela rah gaya, tab maain munh ke bal gira aur chillakar kaha, hay prabhu yahova! kya too apanee jalajalahatt yarooshalem par bhdkakar israaael ke sab bache huon ko bhee nash karega?" 
Ezekiel9:9 tab us ne mujh se kaha, israaael aur yahooda ke gharanon ka adharma atyant hee aadhaik haai, yahan tak ki desh hatya se aur nagar anyay se bhr gaya haai kyonki ve kahate hen ki yahova ne prathvee ko tyag diya aur yahova kuchh naheen dekhta." 
Ezekiel9:10 isaliye un par daya n hogee, n maain komalata karoonga, varan unakee chal unheen ke sir lautta doonga." 
Ezekiel9:11 tab maain ne kya dekha, ki jo purush san ka vasr paahine huae aur kamar men davat bandho tha, us ne yah kahakar samachar diya, jaaise too ne agyaa dee, maain ne vaaise hee kiya haai." 
Ezekiel10:1 isake bad maain ne dekha ki karoobon ke siron ke upar jo akashamandl haai, us men neelamanai ka sinhasan sa kuchh dikhai deta haai." 
Ezekiel10:2 tab yahova ne us san ke vasr pahine huae purush se kaha, ghoomanevale paahiyon ke beech karoobon ke neeche ja aur apanee donon muatthiyon ko karoobon ke beech ke angaron se bhrakar nagar par chhtaira de. so vah mere dekhte dekhte unake beech men gaya." 
Ezekiel10:3 jab vah purush bheetar gaya, tab ve karub bhvan kee daakkhian or khde the aur badal bheetaravale angan men bhra hua tha." 
Ezekiel10:4 tab yahova ka tej karoobon ke upar se uttkar bhvan kee devaddhee par a gaya aur badal bhvan men bhr gaya aur vah angan yahova ke tej ke prakash se bhr gaya. 
Ezekiel10:5 aur karoobon ke pankhon ka shabd baharee angan tak sunai deta tha, vah sarvashaaktaimana parameshvar ke bolane ka sa shabd tha." 
Ezekiel10:6 jab us ne san ke vasr pahine huae purush ko ghoomanevale pahiyon ke bheetar karoobon ke beech men se ag lene kee agyaa dee, tab vah unake beech men jakar aek paahiye ke pas khda hua." 
Ezekiel10:7 tab karoobon ke beech se aek karoob ne apana hath baddhakar, us ag men se jo karoobon ke beech men thee, kuchh uttakar san ke vasr paahine huae purush kee mutthee men de dee aur vah use lekar bahar chala gaya." 
Ezekiel10:8 karoobon ke pankhon ke neeche to manushy ka hath sa kuchh dikhai deta tha. 
Ezekiel10:9 tab maain ne dekha, ki karooben ke pas char pahiye haain arthata aek aek karoob ke pas aek aek pahiya haai, aur pahiyon ka roop faeerojaa ka sa haai." 
Ezekiel10:10 aur unaka aeesa roop haai, ki charon aek se dikhai dete haai, jaaise aek pahiye ke beech doosara pahiya ho." 
Ezekiel10:11 chalane ke samay ve apanee charon alangon ke bal se chalate haain aur chalate samay mudte nahee, varan jidhar unaka sir rahata haai ve udhar hee usake peechhe chalate haain aur chalate samay ve mudte naheen." 
Ezekiel10:12 aur peett hath aur pankhon samet karoobon ka sara shareer aur jo pahiye unake haai, ve bhee sab ke sab charon or ankhon se bhre huae haain." 
Ezekiel10:13 mere sunate huae in paahiyon ko chakkar kaha gaya, arthata ghoomanevale paahiye." 
Ezekiel10:14 aur aek aek ke char char mukh the aek mukh to karoob ka sa, doosara panushy ka sa, teesara sinh ka sa, aur chautha ukab pakshaee ka sa." 
Ezekiel10:15 aur karoob boomi par se utt gaae. ye ve hee jeevadhaaree haai, jo maain ne kabar nadee ke pas dekhe the." 
Ezekiel10:16 aur jab jab ve karoob chalate the tab tab ve pahiye unake pas pas chalate the aur jab jab karoob prathvee par se uttne ke liye apane pankh uttate tab tab pahiye unake pas se naheen mudte the. 
Ezekiel10:17 jab ve khde hote tab ye bhee khde hote the aur jab ve uttte tab ye bhee unake sang uttte the kyonki jeevadhaaariyon kee atma in men bhee rahatee thee. 
Ezekiel10:18 yahova ka tej bhvan kee devaddhee par se uttkar karoobon ke upar tthar gaya. 
Ezekiel10:19 aur karoob apane pankh uttakar mere dekhte dekhte prathvee par se uttkar nikal gaae aur pahiye bhee unake sang sang gaa, aur ve sab yahova ke bhvan ke poova faattk men khde ho gaae aur israaael ke parameshvar ka tej unake upar tthara raha." 
Ezekiel10:20 ye ve hee jeevadhaaree haain jo maain ne kabar nadee ke pas israaael ke parameshvar ke neeche dekhe the aur maain ne jan liya ki ve bhee karoob haain 
Ezekiel10:21 har aek ke char mukh aur char pankh aur pankhon ke neeche manushy ke se hath bhee the. 
Ezekiel10:22 aur unake mukhon ka roop vahee haai jo maain ne kabar nadee ke teer par dekha tha. aur unake mukh hee kya varan unakee saree deh bhee vaaisee hee thee. ve seedho apane apane samhane hee chalate the. 
Ezekiel11:1 tab atma ne mujhe uttakar yahova ke bhvan ke poova faattk ke pas jisaka munh poova disha kee or haai, pahuncha diya aur vahan maain ne kya dekha, ki faattk hee men pachchees purush haain. aur maain ne unake beech ajjoor ke putra yajanyah ko aur banayah ke putra palatyah ko dekha, jo praja ke pradhaan the." 
Ezekiel11:2 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, jo manushy is nagar men anarth kalpana aur buree yuktai karate haain ve ye hee haain." 
Ezekiel11:3 ye kahate haai, ghar banane ka samay nikatt nahee, yah nagar handa aur ham us men ka mans haai." 
Ezekiel11:4 isaliye he manushy ke santan, inake viruddh bhavishyadanee kar, bhavishyadanee." 
Ezekiel11:5 tab yahova ka atma mujh par utara, aur mujh se kaha, aeesa kah, yahova yon kahata haai, ki he israaael ke gharane tum ne aeesa hee kaha he jo kuchh tumhare man men ata haai, use maain janata hoo." 
Ezekiel11:6 tum ne to is nagar men bahuton ko mar dala varan usakee sadkon ko lothon se bhr diya haai. 
Ezekiel11:7 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, ki jo manushy tum ne is men mar dale haai, unakee lothen hee is nagararoopee hande men ka mans haai aur tum isake beech se nikale jaoge." 
Ezekiel11:8 tum talavar se drate ho, aur maain tum par talavar chalaunga, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel11:9 maain tum ko is men se nikalakar paradeashaiyon ke hath men kar doonga, aur tum ko dand dilaunga." 
Ezekiel11:10 tum talavar se marakar giroge, aur maain tumhara mukama, israaael ke desh ke sivane par chukaunga tab tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel11:11 yah nagar tumhare liye handa n banega, aur n tum is men ka mans hoge maain tumhara mukama israaael ke desh ke sivane par chukaunga." 
Ezekiel11:12 tab tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo tum to meree vidhaiyon par naheen chale, aur mere niyamon ko tum ne naheen mana parantu apane charon or kee anyajaatiyon kee reeatiyon par chale ho." 
Ezekiel11:13 maain is prakar kee bhavishyadanee kar raha tha, ki banayah ka putra palatyah mar gaya. tab maain munh ke bal girakar unche shabd se chilla utta, aur kaha, hay prabhu yahova, kya too israaael ke bache huon ko satyanash kar dalega?" 
Ezekiel11:14 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel11:15 he manushy ke santan, yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ne tere nikatt bhaiyon se varan israaael ke sare gharane se bhee kaha haai ki tum yahova ke pas se door ho jao yah desh hamare hee aadhaikar men diya gaya haai." 
Ezekiel11:16 parantu too un se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai ki maain ne tum ko door door kee jaatiyon men basaya aur desh desh men titara-abitar kar diya to haai, taubhee jin deshaen men tum aae huae ho, un men maain svayan tumhare liye thode din tak pavitrasthan ttharoonga." 
Ezekiel11:17 isaliye, un se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, ki maain tum ko jaati jati ke logon ke beech se battoroonga, aur jin deshaen men tum titara-abitar kiae gaae ho, un men se tum ko ikattha karoonga, aur tumhen israaael kee boomi doonga." 
Ezekiel11:18 aur ve vahan pahunchakar us desh kee sab gharanait mooraten aur sab gharanait kam bhee us men se door karenge. 
Ezekiel11:19 aur maain unaka day aek kar doonga aur unake bheetar nai atma utpann karoonga, aur unakee deh men se patthr ka sa day nikalakar unhen mans ka day doonga," 
Ezekiel11:20 jis se ve meree vidhaiyon par nit chala karen aur mere niyamon ko manen aur ve meree praja ttharenge, aur maain unaka parameshvar ttharoonga." 
Ezekiel11:21 parantu ve log jo apanee gharaanait mooraton aur gharanait kamon men man lagakar chalate rahate haai, unako maain aeesa karoonga ki unakee chal unheen ke sir par padengee, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel11:22 is par karoobon ne apane pankh uttaa, aur pahiye unake sang sang chale aur israaael ke parameshvar ka tej unake upar tha." 
Ezekiel11:23 tab yahova ka tej nagar ke beech men se uttkar us parvat par tthar gaya jo nagar kee poorva or haai. 
Ezekiel11:24 fir atma ne mujhe uttaya, aur parameshvar ke atma kee shaaktai se darshan men mujhe kasaadiyon ke desh men bandhauon ke pas pahuncha diya. aur jo darshan maain ne paya tha vah lop ho gaya." 
Ezekiel11:25 tab jitanee baten yahova ne mujhe dikhai thee, ve maain ne bandhauon ko bata deen." 
Ezekiel12:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel12:2 he manushy ke santan, too balava karanevale gharane ke beech men rahata haai, jinake dekhne ke liye ankhen to haai, parantu naheen dekhte aur sunane ke liye kan to haain parantu naheen sunate kyonki ve balava karanevale gharane ke haain." 
Ezekiel12:3 isaliye he manushy ke santan din ko bandhauai ka saman, taaiyar karake unake dekhte huae utt jana, unake dekhte huae apana sthan chhodkar doosare sthan ko jana. yadhyapi ve balava karanevale gharane ke haai, taubhee sambhv haai ki ve dhyan den." 
Ezekiel12:4 so too din ko unake dekhte huae bandhauai ke saman kee nai apana saman nikalana, aur tab too sanjh ko bandhauai men janevale ke saman unake dekhte huae utt jana." 
Ezekiel12:5 unake dekhte huae bheet ko faodkar usee se apana saman nikalana. 
Ezekiel12:6 unake dekhte huae use apane kandho par uttakar andhore men nikalana, aur apana munh ddhanpe rahana ki boomi tujhe n dekh pade kyonki maain ne tujhe israael ke gharane ke liye ek chinh ttharaya haai." 
Ezekiel12:7 us agyaa ke anusar maain ne vaaisa hee kiya. din ko maain ne apana saman bandhauai ke saman kee nai nikala, aur sanjh ko apane hath se bheet ko faoda fir andhore men saman ko nikalakar, unake dekhte huae apane kandho par uttaae huae chala gaya." 
Ezekiel12:8 bihan ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel12:9 he manushy ke santan, kya israaael ke gharane ne arthata us balava karanevale gharane ne tujh se yah naheen poochha, ki yah too kya karata haai?" 
Ezekiel12:10 too un se kah ki prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, yah prabhavashaalee vachan yarooshalem ke pradhaan purush aur israaael ke sare gharane ke vishy men haai jisake beech men ve rahate haain." 
Ezekiel12:11 too un se kah, maain numhare liye chinh hoo jaaisa maain ne kiya haai, vaaisa hee israaaelee lagon se bhee kiya jaaega unako uttkar bandhauai men jana padega." 
Ezekiel12:12 unake beech men jo pradhaan haai, so andhore men apane kangho par bojh uttaae huae nikalega vah apana saman nikalane ke liye bheet ko faodega, aur apana munh ddhanpe rahega ki usako boomi n dekh pade." 
Ezekiel12:13 aur maain us par apana jal faailaunga, aur vah mere fande men fansega aur maain use kasadiyon ke desh ke babul men pahuncha doonga yadhypi vah us nagar men mar jaaega, taubhee usako n dekhega." 
Ezekiel12:14 aur jitane usake sahayak usake as pas honge, unako aur usakee saree ttoliyon ko maain sab dishaaon men titara-abitar kar doonga aur talavar kheenchakar unake peechhe chalavaunga." 
Ezekiel12:15 aur jab maain unhe jati jati men titara-abitar kar doonga, aur desh desh men chhnnai bheenn kar doonga, tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel12:16 parantu maain un men se thede se logon ko talavar, bookh aur maree se bacha rakoonga aur ve apane gharaanait kam un jatiyon men bakhan karenge jinake beech men ve pahunchenge tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel12:17 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel12:18 he manushy ke santan, kanpate huae apanee rottee khana aur thrathrate aur chinta karate huae apana panee peena" 
Ezekiel12:19 aur is desh ke logon se yon kahana, ki prabhu yahova yarooshalem aur israaael ke desh ke nivaasiyon ke vishay men yon kahata haai, ve apanee rottee chinta ke sath khaaenge, aur apana panee vismay ke sath peeaenge kyonki desh apane sab rahanevalon ke upadrav ke karan apanee saree bhrapooree se raahit ho jaaega." 
Ezekiel12:20 aur base huae nagar ujad jaaenge, aur desh bhee ujad ho jaaega tab tum log jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel12:21 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel12:22 he manushy ke santan yah kya kahavat haai jo tum log israaael ke desh men kaha karate ho, ki din adhaik ho gaae haai, aur darshan kee koi bat pooree naheen hui?" 
Ezekiel12:23 isaliye un se kah, pabhu yahova yon kahata haai, maain is kahavat ko band karoonga aur yah kahavat israaael par fir n chalegee. aur too un se kah ki vah din nikatt a gaya haai, aur darshan kee sab baten pooree hone par haain." 
Ezekiel12:24 kyonaki israaael ke gharane men n to aur adhaik jootte darshan kee koi bat aur n koi chikanee-chupadee bat fir kahee jaaegee. 
Ezekiel12:25 kyonaki maain yahova hoo jab maain boloo, tab jo vachan maain kahoo, vah poora ho jaaega. us men vilamb n hoga, parantu, he balava karanevale gharane tumhare hee dinon men maain vachan kahoonga, aur vah poora ho jaaega, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel12:26 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel12:27 he manushy ke santan, dek, israaael ke gharane ke log yah kah rahe haain ki jo darshan vah dekhta haai, vah bahut din ke bad poora honevala haai aur ki vah door ke samay ke vishay men bhavishyadanee karata haai." 
Ezekiel12:28 isaliye too un se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, mere kisee bachan ke poora hone men fir vilamb n hoga, varan jo vachan maain kahoo, so vah nishchay poora hoga, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel13:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel13:2 he manushy ke santan, israaael ke jo bhavishyadvkta apane hee man se bhavishyavanee karate haai, unake virud bhavishyavanee karake too kah, yahova ka vachan suno." 
Ezekiel13:3 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, hay, un mooddh bhvishyadvktaon par jo apanee hee atma ke peechhe bhttk jate haai, aur kuchh darshan naheen paya!" 
Ezekiel13:4 he israaael, tere bhvishyadvkta khndharon men kee lomadiyon ke saman bane haain." 
Ezekiel13:5 tum ne nakon men chaddhkar israaael ke gharane ke liye bheet naheen sudhaaree, jis se ve yahova ke din yuddh men sthiar rah sakate." 
Ezekiel13:6 ve log jo kahate haai, yahova kee yah vanee haai, unhon ne bhavee ka vyarth aur jootta dava kiya haai aur tab bhee yah asha dilai ki yahova yah vachan poora karega taubhee yahova ne unhen naheen bheja." 
Ezekiel13:7 kya tumhara darshan jootta naheen haai, aur kya tum joottmoott bhavee naheen kahate? tum kahate ho, ki yahova kee yah vanee haai parantu maain ne kuchh naheen kaha haai." 
Ezekiel13:8 is karan prabhu yahova tum se yon kahata haai, tum ne jo vyarth bat kahee aur jootte darshan dekhe haai, isaaliye maain tumhare viruddh hoo, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel13:9 jo bhavishyadvkta jootte darshan dekhte aur joottmoott bhavee kahate haai, mera hath unake viruddh hoga, aur ve meree praja kee goshttee men bhagee n honge, n unake nam israaael kee namavalee men likhe jaaenge, aur n ve israaael ke desh men pravesh karane paaenge is se tum log jan loge ki maain prabhu yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel13:10 kyonaki ha, kyonki unhon ne shaantai haai, aeesa kahakar meree praja ko bahakaya he jab ki shaaantai naheen haai aur isaaliye ki jab koi bheet banata haai tab ve usakee kachchee lesai karate haain." 
Ezekiel13:11 un kachchee lesai karanevalon se kah ki vah gir jaegee. kyonaki bade jor kee vashara hogee, aur bade bade ole bhee girenge, aur prachand andhaee use giraegee." 
Ezekiel13:12 so jab bheet gir jaaegee, tab kya log tum se yah n kahenge ki jo lesai tum ne kee vah kahan rahee?" 
Ezekiel13:13 is karan prabhu yahova tum se yon kahata haai, maain jalakar usako pachand andhaee ke dara giraunga aur mere kop se bharee vashara hogee, aur meree jalajalahatt se bade bade ole girenge ki bheet ko nash karen." 
Ezekiel13:14 is reeati jis bheet par tum ne kachchee lesai kee haai, use maain ddha doonga, varan mittee men milaunga, aur usakee nev khul jaaegee aur jab vah giregee, tab tum bhee usake neeche dabakar nash hoge aur tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel13:15 is reeati maain bheet aur usakee kachchee lesai karanevale donon par apanee jalajalahatt poorn reeti se bhdkaunga fir tum se kahoonga, n to bheet rahee,aur n usake lesanevale rahe," 
Ezekiel13:16 arthata israaael ke ve bhvishyadvkta jo yarooshalem ke vishay men bhavishyadanee karate aur unakee shaaantai ka darshan batate the, parantu prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki shaaantai haai hee naheen." 
Ezekiel13:17 fir he manushy ke santan, too apane logon kee striayon se vimukh hokar, jo apane hee man se bhavishyadanee karatee he unake viruddh bhavishyadanee karake kah," 
Ezekiel13:18 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, jo striayan hath ke sab jodo ke liye taakiya seeteen aur praaanaiyon ka aher karane ko sab prakar ke manushyon kee ankh ddhanpane ke liye kapade banatee haai, un par hay! kya tum meree praja ke praanon ka aher karake apane nij praan bacha rakhogee?" 
Ezekiel13:19 tum ne to muutthee mutthee bhr jav aur rottee ke ttukadon ke badale mujhe meree praja kee draashtti men apaavitra ttharakar, aur apanee un joottee baton ke dara, jo meree praja ke log tum se sunate haai, jo nash ke yogy n the, unako mar dala aur jo bachane ke yogy n the un praanon ko bacha rakha haai." 
Ezekiel13:20 is karan prabhu yahova tum se yon kahata haai, dekho, maain tumhare un taakiyon ke virud hoo, jinake dara tum praanon ka aher karatee ho, isaaliye jinhen tum aher kar karake udatee ho unako maain tumharee banh par se chheenakar unako chhuda doonga." 
Ezekiel13:21 maain tumhare sir ke buka ko faadkar apanee praja ke logon ko numhare hath se chhudaunga, aur age ko ve tumhare vash men n rahenge ki tum unaka aher kar sako tab tum jan logee ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel13:22 tum ne jo joott kahakar dhama ke man ko udas kiya haai, yadhyapi maain ne usako udas karana naheen chaha, aur tum ne dushtt jan ko hiyav bandhaaya haai, taki vah apane bure marga se n fire aur jeeavit rahe." 
Ezekiel13:23 is karan tum fir n to jootta darshan dekhogee, aur n bhavee kahogee kyonki maain apanee praja ko tumhare hath se dudaunga. tab tum jan logee ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel14:1 fir israaael ke kitane puraaniye mere pas akar mere samhane baaitt gaae. 
Ezekiel14:2 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel14:3 he manushy ke santan, in purushaen ne to apanee mooraten apane man men sthaapit kee, aur apane adharma kee ttokar apane samhane rakhee haai fir kya ve mujh se kuchh bhee poochhne paaenge?" 
Ezekiel14:4 so too un se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, ki israaael ke gharane men se jo koi apanee mooraten apane man men sthapit karake, aur apane adharma kee ttokar apane samhane rakhkar bhvishyadvkta ke pas aa, usako, maain yahova, usakee bahut see mooraton ke anusar hee uttar doonga," 
Ezekiel14:5 jis se israaael ka gharana, jo apanee mooraton ke dara mujhe tyagakar door ho gaya haai, unhen maain unheen ke man ke dara fansaunga." 
Ezekiel14:6 so israaael ke gharane se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata he, firo aur apanee mooraton ko peett ke peechhe karo aur apane sab gharaanait kamon se munh modo." 
Ezekiel14:7 kyonaki israaael ke gharane men se aur usake beech rahanevale paradeashaiyon men se bhee koi kyon n ho, jo mere peechhe ho lena chhodkar apanee mooraten apane man men sthaapit kare, aur apane adharma kee ttokar apane samhane rakhe, aur tab mujh se apanee koi bat poochhne ke liye bhavishyadvkta ke pas aa, to usako, maain yahova ap hee uttar doonga." 
Ezekiel14:8 aur maain us manushy ke viruddh hokar usako vismait karoonga, aur chinh ttharaunga aur usakee kahavat chanaunga aur use apanee praja men se nash karoonga tab tum log jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel14:9 aur yaadi bhvishyadvkta ne dhaekha khakar koi vachan kaha ho, to jano ki mujh yahova ne us bhvishyadvkta ko dhaekha diya haai aur maain apana hath usake viruddh baddhakar use apanee praja israaael men se nash karoonga." 
Ezekiel14:10 ve sab log apane apane adharma ka bojh uttaaenge, arthata jaaisa bhavishyadvkta se poochhnevale ka adharma ttharega, vaaisa hee bhavishyadvkta ka bhee adharma ttharega." 
Ezekiel14:11 taaki israaael ka gharana age ko mere peechhe ho lena n chhode aur n apane bhanti bhanati ke aparadhaen ke dara age ko ashuuddh bane varan ve meree praja banen aur maain unaka parameshvar ttharoo, prabhu yahova kee yahee anee haai." 
Ezekiel14:12 aur yahova ka yah vachan mere pas mahuncha," 
Ezekiel14:13 he manushy ke santan, jab kisee desh ke log mujh se vishvasaghaat karake papee ho jaae, aur maain apana hath us desh ke viruddh baddhakar usaka annaroopee adhaar door karoo, aur us men akal dalakar us men se manushy aur pashu donon ko nash karoo," 
Ezekiel14:14 tab chahe us men nooh, daniyyel aur ayyoob ye teenon purush ho, taubhee ve apane dharma ke dara keval apane hee praanon ko bacha sakenge prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee he." 
Ezekiel14:15 yaadi maain kisee desh men dushtt jantu bhejoon jo usako nirjan karake ujad kar dale, aur jantuon ke karan koi us men hokar n jaae," 
Ezekiel14:16 to chahe use men ve teen purush ho, taubhee prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, n ve putraen ko or n puatraiyon ko bacha sakenge ve hee akele bachenge parantu desh ujad ho jaaega." 
Ezekiel14:17 aur yaadi maain us desh par talavar kheechakar kahoo, he talavar us desh men chala aur is reeti maain us men se manushy aur pashu nash karoo," 
Ezekiel14:18 tab chahe us men ve teen purush bhee ho, taubhee prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, n to ve putraen ko aur n puatraiyon ko bacha sakenge, ve hee akele bachenge." 
Ezekiel14:19 yaadi maain us desh men maree faailaun aur us par apanee jalajalahatt bhdkakar usaka lohoo aeesa bahaun ki vahan ke manushy aur pashu donon nash ho," 
Ezekiel14:20 to chahe nooh, daniyyel aur ayyoob bhee us men ho, taubhee, prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, ve n putraen ko aur n puatraiyon ko bacha sakenge, apane dharma ke dara ve keval apane hee praanon ko bacha sakenge." 
Ezekiel14:21 kyonaki prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, maain yarooshalem par apane charon dand pahunchaunga, arthata talavar, akal, dushtt jantu aur maree, jin se manushy aur pashu sab us men se nash hon." 
Ezekiel14:22 taubhee us men thode se putra-puatraiyan bachengee jo vahan se nikalakar tumhare pas pahunchai jaaengee, aur tum unake chalachalan aur kamon ko dekhkar us vipaattai ke vishay men jo maain yarooshalem par daloonga, varan jitanee vipaattai maain us par daloonga, us sab ke vishay men shaantai paoge." 
Ezekiel14:23 jab tum unaka chalachalan aur kam dekho, tab ve tumharee shaaantai ke karan honge aur tum jan loge ki maain ne yarooshalem men jo kuchh kiya, vah bina karan naheen kiya, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haain" 
Ezekiel15:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel15:2 he manushy ke santan, sab vrakshaen men angoor kee lata kee kya shraeshttta haai? angoor kee shaakha jo jangal ke pedon ke beech utpann hotee haai, us men kya gun haai?" 
Ezekiel15:3 kya koi vastu banane ke liye us men se lakadee lee jatee, va koi bartan ttangane ke liye us men se koonttee ban sakatee haai?" 
Ezekiel15:4 vah to indhan banakar ag men jhonkee jatee haai usake donon sire ag se jal jate, aur usake beekh ka bhag bhsm ho jata haai, kya vah kisee bhee kam kee haai?" 
Ezekiel15:5 dek, jab vah banee thee, tab bhee vah kisee kam kee n thee, fir jab vah ag ka indhan hokar bhsm ho gai haai, tab kis kam kee ho sakatee haai?" 
Ezekiel15:6 so prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, jaaise jangal ke pedon men se maain angoor kee lata ko ag ka indhan kar deta hoo, vaaise hee maain yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ko nash kar doonga." 
Ezekiel15:7 maain un se viruddh hoonga, aur ve aek ag men se nikalakar fir doosaree ag ka indhan ho jaaenge aur jab maain un se vimukh hoonga, tab tum log jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel15:8 aur maain unaka desh ujad doonga, kyonki unhon ne mujh se vishvasaghaat kiya haai, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel16:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel16:2 he manushy ke santan, yarooshalem ko usake sab gharanait kam jata de." 
Ezekiel16:3 aur us se kah, he yarooshalem, prabhu yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, tera janm aur teree utpaattai kanaaniyon ke desh se hui tera pita to aemoree aur teree mata hittain thee." 
Ezekiel16:4 aur tera janm aeese hua ki jis din too janmee, us din n tera nal katta gaya, n too shuuddh hone ke liye dhaei gai, n tere kuchh lon mala gaya aur n too kuchh kapadon men lamettee gai." 
Ezekiel16:5 kisee kee dayadraashtti tujh par naheen hui ki in kamon men se tere liye aek bhee kam kiya jata varan apane janm ke din too gharaanait hone ke karan khule maaidan men faenk dee gai thee. 
Ezekiel16:6 aur jab maain tere pas se hokar nikala, aur tujhe lohoo men lottte huae dekha, tab maain ne tujh se kaha, he nohoo men lotttee hui jeevit raha ha, tujh hee se maain ne kaha, he lohoo me lotttee hui, jeevit raha." 
Ezekiel16:7 fir maain ne tujhe khet ke birule kee nai baddhaya, aur too baddhte baddhte badee ho gai aur ati sundar ho gai teree chhatiyan sudaul hui, aur tere bal baddhe taubhee too nangee thee." 
Ezekiel16:8 maain ne fir tere pas se hokar jate huae tujhe dekha, aur ab too pooree sree ho gai thee so maain ne tujhe apana vasr oddhakar tera tan ddhanp diya aur saugandha khakar tujh se pacha bandhaee aur too meree ho gai, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel16:9 tab maain ne tujhe jal se nahalakar tujh par se lohoo dhae diya, aur teree deh par tel mala." 
Ezekiel16:10 fir maain ne tujhe boottedar vasr aur sooison ke chamade kee jootiyan paahinai aur teree kamar men sooksham san bandha, aur tujhe reshamee kapada oddhaya." 
Ezekiel16:11 tab maain ne tera shrarangar kiya, aur tere hathen men choodiyan aur gale men toda pahinaya." 
Ezekiel16:12 fir maain ne teree nak men natth aur tere kanon men baaliyan paahinai, aur tere sir par shaebhayaman mukutt dhara." 
Ezekiel16:13 tere abooshan sone chandee ke aur tere vasr sooksham san, resham aur boottedar kamade ke bane fir tera bhojan maaida, madha aur tel hua aur too atyant sundar, varan ranee hone ke yogy ho gai." 
Ezekiel16:14 aur teree sundarata kee keettair anyajaatiyon men faail gai, kyonaki us pratap ke kara, jo maain ne apanee or se tujhe diya tha, too atyant sundar thee, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel16:15 parantu too apanee sundarata par bhrosa karake apanee namavaree ke karan vyaabhaichar karane lagee, aur sab yatraiyon ke sang bahut kukarma kiya, aur jo koi tujhe chahata tha too usee se milatee thee." 
Ezekiel16:16 too ne apane vasr lekar rang birang ke unche sthan bana lia, aur un par vyabhaichar kiya, aeese kukarma kiae jo n kabhee huae aur n honge." 
Ezekiel16:17 aur too ne apane sushaeabhait gahane lekar jo mere diae huae sone-chandee ke the, un se purushaen kee mooraten bana lee, aur un se bhee vyabhaichar karane lagee" 
Ezekiel16:18 aur apane boottedar vasr lekar unako pahinaa, aur mera tel aur mera dhoop unake samhane chaddhaya." 
Ezekiel16:19 aur jo bhojan maain ne tujhe diya tha, arthata jo maaida, tel aur madha maain tujhe khailata tha, vah sab tu ne unake samhane sukhdayak sugatdha karake rakha prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai ki yon hee hua." 
Ezekiel16:20 fir too ne apane putra-puatraiyan lekar jinhen too ne mere liye janm diya, un mooraton ko naaivedh karake chaddhai. kya tera vsabhaichar aeesee chhottee bat theen" 
Ezekiel16:21 ki too ne mere ladkebale un mooraton ke age ag men chaddhakar ghaat kiae haain? 
Ezekiel16:22 aur too ne apane sab gharanait kamon men aur vyabhaichar karate hua, apane bachapan ke dinon kee kabhee sudhai n lee, jab ki too nangee apane lohoo men lottnee thee." 
Ezekiel16:23 aur teree us saree burai ke peechhe kya hua? 
Ezekiel16:24 prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, hay, tujh par hay! ki too ne aek gummatt banava liya, aur har aek chauk men aek uncha sthan banava liya" 
Ezekiel16:25 aur aek aek sadk ke sire par bhee too ne apana uncha sthan banavakar apanee sundarata gharanait kara dee, aur har aek yatraee ko kukarma ke liye bulakar mahavyabhaichaarinee ho gai." 
Ezekiel16:26 too ne apane padosee misraee logon se bhee, jo motte-taje haai, vyaabhaichar kiya aur mujhe krodha dilane ke liye apana vyabhaichar chaddhatee gai." 
Ezekiel16:27 is karan maain ne apana hath tere viruddh baddhakar, tera prati din ka khana ghatta diya, aur teree baaiarin palishtee striayan jo tere mahapap kee chal se lajatee haai, unakee ichchha par maain ne tujhe chhod diya haai." 
Ezekiel16:28 fir bhee teree trashna n bujhee, isaliye too ne ashshooree logon se bhee vyabhaichar kiya aur un se vyabhaichar karane par bhee teree trashna n bujhee." 
Ezekiel16:29 fir too len den ke desh men vyabhaichar karate karate kasadiyon ke desh tak pahunchee, aur vahan bhee teree trashna n bujhee." 
Ezekiel16:30 prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai ki tera day kaaisa chanchal haai ki too ye sab kam karatee haai, jo nirlajj veshya hee ke kam haain?" 
Ezekiel16:31 too ne har aek sadk ke sire par jo apana gummat, aur har chauk men apana uncha sthan banavaya haai, kya isee men too veshya ke saman naheen ttharee? kyonaki too aeesee kamai par hansatee haai." 
Ezekiel16:32 too vyabhaichaarinee patnee haai. too paraye purushaen ko apane paati kee santee grahan karatee haai. 
Ezekiel16:33 sab veshyaon ko to rupaya milata haai, parantu too ne apane sab mitraen ko svayan rupaae dekar, aur unako lalach dikhakar bulaya haai ki ve charon or se akar tujh se vyaabhaichar karen." 
Ezekiel16:34 is prakar tera vyabhaichar aur vyabhaichaariyon se ulatta haai. tere peechhe koi vyabhaicharee naheen chalata, aur too kisee se dam letee nahee, varan too hee detee haai isee karan too ulattee ttharee." 
Ezekiel16:35 is kara, he veshya, yahova ka vachan sun," 
Ezekiel16:36 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, ki too ne jo vyaabhaichar men aati nirlajj hokar, apanee deh apane mitraen ko dikhai, aur apanee mooraton se gharanait kam kia, aur apane ladkebalon ka lohoo bahakar unhen bali chaddhaya haai," 
Ezekiel16:37 is karan dek, maain tere sab mitraen ko jo tere praemee haain aur jitanon se too ne praeeati lagai, aur jitanon se too ne vaair rakha, un sabhon ko charon or se tere viruddh ikattha karake unako teree deh nangee karake dikhaunga, aur ve tera tan dekhenge." 
Ezekiel16:38 tab maain tujh ko aeesa dand doonga, jaaisa vyabhaichaarinaiyon aur lohoo bahanevalee striayon ko diya jata haai aur krodha aur jalan ke sath tera lohoo bahaunga." 
Ezekiel16:39 is reeati maain tujhe unake vash men kar doonga, aur ve tere gummatton ko ddha denge, aur tere unche sthanon ko toddenge ve tere vasr barabas utarenge, aur tere sundar gahane chheen lenge, aur tujhe nanga karake chhod denge." 
Ezekiel16:40 tab tere viruddh aek sabha ikatthee karake ve tujh ko patthravah karenge, aur apanee kattaron se varapar chhedenge." 
Ezekiel16:41 tab ve ag lagakar tere gharon ko jala denge, aur toojhe bahut see striayon ke dekhte dand denge aur maain tera vyabhaichar band karoonga, aur too fir chhnaiale ke liye dam n degee." 
Ezekiel16:42 aur jab maain tujh par pooree jalajalahatt pragatt kar chukoonga, tab tujh par aur n jaloonga varan shaant ho jaunga aur fir n risiyaunga." 
Ezekiel16:43 too ne jo apane bachapan ke din smaran nahee rakhe, varan in sab baton ke dara mujhe chiddhaya is karan maain tera chalachalan tere sir par daloonga aur too apane sab pichhle gharaanait kamon se aur aadhaik mahapap n karegee, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel16:44 dek, sab kahavat kahanevale tere vishay yah kahavat kahenge, ki jaaisee man vaaisee putraee." 
Ezekiel16:45 teree man jo apane pati aur ladkebalon se gharana karatee thee, too bhee tteek usakee putraee ttharee aur teree baahinen jo apane apane paati aur ladkebalon se ghararana karatee thee, too bhee tteek unakee bahin nikalee. teree mata hittain aur pita aemoree tha." 
Ezekiel16:46 teree badee bahin haemaron haai, jo apanee putraiyon samet teree bai or rahatee haai, aur teree chhottee baahin, jo teree dahinee or rahatee haai vah puatraiyon samet sadom haai." 
Ezekiel16:47 too unakee see chal naheen chalee, aur n unake se gharaanait kamon hee se santushtt hui yah to bahut chhottee bat ttharatee, parantu tera sara chalachalan un se bhee adhaik bigad gaya." 
Ezekiel16:48 prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, teree bahin sadom ne apanee puatraiyon samet tere or teree putraiyon ke saman kam naheen kiae." 
Ezekiel16:49 dek, teree baahin sadom ka adharma yah tha, ki vah apanee putraiyon saahit ghamand karatee, pett bhr bhrake khatee, aur sukh chaain se rahatee thee aur deen daridra ko n sanbhalatee thee." 
Ezekiel16:50 so vah garva karake mere samhane gharaanait kam karane lagee, aur yah dekhkar maain ne unhen door kar diya." 
Ezekiel16:51 fir shaemaron ne tere papon ke adho bhee pap naheen kiae too ne to us se baddhkar gharanait kam kiae or apane ghaer gharanait kamon ke dara apanee bahinon ko jeet liya. 
Ezekiel16:52 so too ne jo apanee baahinon ka nyay kiya, is karan lajjait ho, kyonki too ne un se baddhkar gharanait pap kiae haain is karan ve tujh se kam doshaee ttharee haain. so too is bat se lajja kar aur lajatee rah, kyonaki too ne apanee bahinon ko kam doshaee ttharaya haai." 
Ezekiel16:53 jab maain unako arthata putraiyon saahit sadom aur shaemaron ko bandhauai se faer launga, tab unake beech hee tere bandhauon ko bhee faer launga," 
Ezekiel16:54 jis se too lajatee rahe, aur apane sab kamon ko dekhkar lajaa, kyonaki too unakee shaaantai hee ka karan hui haai." 
Ezekiel16:55 aur teree bahinen sadom aur shaemaron apanee apanee puatraiyon samet apanee pahilee dasha ko fir pahunchengee, aur too bhee apanee puatraiyon saahit apanee pahilee dasha ko fir pahanchegee." 
Ezekiel16:56 jab tak teree burai pragatt n hui thee, arthata jis samay tak too as pas ke logon samet aramee aur paalishtee striayon kee jo ab charon or se tujhe tuchchh janatee haai, namadharai karatee thee," 
Ezekiel16:57 un apane ghmand ke dinon men to too apanee baahin sadom ka nam bhee n letee thee. 
Ezekiel16:58 parantu ab tujh ko apane mahapap aur gharaanait kamon ka bhar ap hee uttana pada haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel16:59 prabhu yahova yah kahata haai, maain tere sath aeesa hee bartav karoonga, jaaisa too ne kiya haai, kyonki too ne to vacha todkar shapath tuchchh janee haai," 
Ezekiel16:60 taubhee maain tere bachapan ke dinon kee apanee vacha smaran karoonga, aur tere sath sada kee vacha bandhoonga." 
Ezekiel16:61 aur jab too apanee baahinon ko arthata apanee badee aur chhottee bahinon ko grahan kare, tab too apana chalachalan smaran karake lajjait hogee aur maain unhen teree puatraiyan tthara doonga parantu yah teree vacha ke anusar n karoonga." 
Ezekiel16:62 maain tere sath apanee vacha sthiar karoonga, aur tab too jan legee ki maain yahova hoo," 
Ezekiel16:63 jis se too smaran karake lajjait ho, aur lajja ke mare fir kabhee munh n khole. yah us samay hoga, jab maain tere sab kamon ko ddhanpoonga, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel17:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel17:2 he manushy ke santan, israaael ke gharane se yah pahelee aur drashttant kaha praboo yahova yon kahata he," 
Ezekiel17:3 aek lambe pankhvale, paron se bhre aur radnge biradnge bade ukab pakshaee ne labanon jakar aek devadar kee faunagee noch lee." 
Ezekiel17:4 tab us ne us faunagee kee sab se upar kee patalee tthanee ko tod liya, aur use len den karanevalon ke desh men le jakar vyopariyon ke aek nagar men lagaya." 
Ezekiel17:5 tab us ne desh ka kuchh beej lekar aek upaja khet men boya, aur use bahut jal bhre sthan men majanoo kee nai lagaya." 
Ezekiel17:6 aur vah ugakar chhottee faailanevalee angoor kee lata ho gai jisakee daliyan usakee or jhukee, aur usakee sor usake neeche faaileen is prakar se vah angoor kee lata hokar kanakha faodne aur patton se bhrane lagee." 
Ezekiel17:7 fir aur aek lambe pankhvala aur paron se bhra hua bada ukab pakshaee tha aur vah angoor kee lata us sthan se jahan vah lagai gai thee, us doosare ukab kee or apanee sor faailane aur apanee daaliyan jhukane lagee ki vah use kheencha kare." 
Ezekiel17:8 parantu vah to isaaliye achchhee boomi men bahut jal ke pas lagai gai thee, ki kanakhaen faode, aur fale, aur uttam angoor kee lata bane." 
Ezekiel17:9 so too yah kah, ki prabhu yahova yon poochhta haai, kya vah foole falegee? kya vah usako jad se n ukhadega, aur usake falon ko n jhad dalega ki vah apanee sab haree nai pattaiyon samet sookh jaae? ise jad se ukhadne ke liye aadhaik bal aur bahut se manushyon kee avashyakata n hogee." 
Ezekiel17:10 chahe, vah lagee bhee rahe, taubhee kya vah foole falegee? jab puravai use lage, tab kya vah bilakul sookh n jaaegee? vah to jahan ugee haai usee kyaree men sookh jaaegee." 
Ezekiel17:11 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha, us balava karanevale gharane se kah," 
Ezekiel17:12 kya tum in baton ka arth naheen samajhte? fir un se kah, babul ke raja ne yarooshalem ko jakar usake raja aur aur pradhaanon ko lekar apane yahan babul men pahunchaya." 
Ezekiel17:13 tab rajavansh men se aek purush ko lekar us se vacha bandhae, aur usako vash men rahane kee shapath khailai, aur desh ke samath purushaen ko le gaya" 
Ezekiel17:14 ki vah rajy nirbal rahe aur sir n utta sake, varan vacha palane se sthiar rahe." 
Ezekiel17:15 taubhee is ne ghaede aur badee sena mangane ko apane doot misra men bhejakar us se balava kiya. kya vah foole falega? kya aeese kamon ka karanevala bachega? kya vah apanee vacha todne par bhee bach jaaega? 
Ezekiel17:16 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, jis raja kee khailai hui shapath us ne tuchchh janee, aur jisakee vacha us ne todee, usake yahan jis ne use raja banaya tha, arthata babul men hee vah usake pas hee mar jaaega." 
Ezekiel17:17 aur jab ve bahut se praaanaiyon ko nash karane ke liye damadama bandho, aur gaddh banaae, tab firaun apanee badee sena aur bahuton kee mandlee rahate bhee yuddh men usakee sahayata n karega." 
Ezekiel17:18 kyonaki us n shapath ko tuchchh jana, aur vacha ko toda dekho, us ne vachan dene par bhee aeese aeese kam kiae haai, so vah bachane n paaega." 
Ezekiel17:19 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai ki mere jeevan kee saugandha, us ne meree shapath tuchchh janee, aur meree vacha todee haai yah pap maain usee ke sir par daloonga." 
Ezekiel17:20 aur maain apana jal us par faailaunga aur vah mere fande men fansega aur maain usako babul men pahunchakar us vishvasaghaat ka mukama us se ladoonga, jo us ne mujh se kiya haai." 
Ezekiel17:21 aur usake sab dalon men se jitane bhagen ve sab talavar se mare jaaenge, aur jo rah jaaen so charon dishaaon men titara-abitar ho jaaenge. tab tum log jan loge ki mujh yahova hee ne aeesa kaha haai." 
Ezekiel17:22 fir prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, maain bhee devadar kee unchee faunagee men se kuchh lekar lagaunga, aur usakee sab se uparavalee kanakhaon men se aek komal kanakha todkar aek aati unche parvat par lagaunga." 
Ezekiel17:23 arthata israaael ke unche parvat par lagaunga so vah daaliyan faodkar balavant aur uttam devadar ban jaaega, aur usake neeche arthata usakee daliyon kee chhaya men bhanati bhanati ke sab pakshaee basera karenge." 
Ezekiel17:24 tab maaidan ke sab vraksha jan lenge ki mujh yahova hee ne unche vraksha ko neecha aur neeche praksha ko uncha kiya, hare vraksha ko sukha diya, aur sookhe vraksha ko faulaya falaya haai. mujh yahova hee ne yah kaha aur vaaisa hee kar bhee diya haai." 
Ezekiel18:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel18:2 tum log jo israaael ke desh ke vishay men yah kahavat kahate ho, ki jangalee angoor to purakha log khate, parantu dant khtte hote haain ladkebalon ke. isaka kya arth haai?" 
Ezekiel18:3 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai ki mere jeevan kee shapat, tum ko israaael men fir yah kahavat kahane ka avasar n milega." 
Ezekiel18:4 dekho, sabhon ke praan to mere haain jaaisa pita ka praa, vaaisa hee putra ka bhee praan haai donon mere hee haain. isaliye jo praanee pap kare vahee mar jaaega." 
Ezekiel18:5 jo koi dhama ho, aur nyay aur dharma ke kam kare," 
Ezekiel18:6 aur n to pahadon par bhojan kiya ho, n israaael ke gharane kee mooraton kee or ankhen uttai hon n parai sree ko bigada ho, aur n retumatee ke pas gaya ho," 
Ezekiel18:7 aur n kisee par andhor kiya ho varan renee ko usakee bandhak faer dee ho, n kisee ko lootta ho, varan bookhe ko apanee rottee dee ho aur nange ko kapada oddhaya ho," 
Ezekiel18:8 n byaj par rupaya diya ho, n rupaae kee baddhtee lee ho, aur apana hath kuattlai kam se roka ho, manushy ke beech sachchai se nyay kiya ho," 
Ezekiel18:9 aur meree vidhaiyon par chalata aur mere niyamon ko manata hua sachchai se kam kiya ho, aeesa manushy dhama haai, vah nishchay jeevit rahega, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel18:10 parantu yadi usaka putra dako, hatyara, va upar kahe huae papon men se kisee ka karanevala ho," 
Ezekiel18:11 aur upar kahe huae uchit kamon ka karanevala n ho, aur pahadon par bhojan kiya ho, parai sree ko bigada ho," 
Ezekiel18:12 deen daaridra par andhor kiya ho, auron ko lootta ho, bandhak n faer dee ho, mooraton kee or ankh uttai ho, gharanait kam kiya ho," 
Ezekiel18:13 byaj par rupaya diya ho, aur baddhtee lee ho, to kya vah jeevit rahega? vah jeevit n rahega isaliye ki us ne ye sab ghainaune kam kiae haain vah nishchay marega aur usaka koon usee ke sir padega." 
Ezekiel18:14 fir yadi aeese manushy ke putra hon aur vah apane pita ke ye sab pap dekhkar bhy ke mare unake saman n karata ho. 
Ezekiel18:15 arthata n to pahadon par bhojan kiya ho, n israaael ke gharane kee mooraton kee or ankh uttai ho, n parai sree ko bigada ho," 
Ezekiel18:16 n kisee par andhor kiya ho, n kuchh bandhak liya ho, n kisee ko lootta ho, varan apanee rottee bookhe ko dee ho, nange ko kapada oddhaya ho," 
Ezekiel18:17 deen jan kee haani karane se hath roka ho, byaj aur baddhee n lee ho, mere niyamon ko mana ho, aur meree vidhaiyon par chala ho, to vah apane pita ke adharma ke karan n marega, varan jeevit hee rahega." 
Ezekiel18:18 usaka pita, jis ne andhor kiya aur lootta, aur apane bhaiyon ke beech anuchit kam kiya haai, vahee apane adharma ke karan mar jaega." 
Ezekiel18:19 taubhee tum log kahate ho, kyon? kya putra pita ke adharma ka bhar naheen uttata? jab putra ne nyay aur dharma ke kam kiae ho, aur meree sab vidhaiyon ka palanakar un par chala ho, to vah jeeavit hee rahega." 
Ezekiel18:20 jo praanee pap kare vahee marega, n to putra pita ke adharma ka bhar uttaaega aur n pita putra ka dhama ko apane hee dharma ka fal, aur dushtt ko apanee hee dushttta ka fal milega." 
Ezekiel18:21 parantu yadi dushtt jan apane sab papon se firakar, meree sab vidhaiyon ka palan kare aur nyay aur dharma ke kam kare, to vah n marega varan jeevit hee rahega." 
Ezekiel18:22 us ne jitane aparadha kiae ho, un men se kisee ka smaran usake viruddh n kiya jaega jo dharma ka kam us ne kiya ho, usake karan vah jeevit rahega." 
Ezekiel18:23 prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya maain dushtt ke marane se kuchh bhee prasann hota hoo? kya maain is se prasann naheen hota ki vah apane marga se firakar jeevit rahe?" 
Ezekiel18:24 parantu jab dhama apane dharma se firakar tteddhe kam, varan dushtt ke sab gharanait kamon ke anusar karane lage, to kya vah jeeavit rahega? jitane dharma ke kam us ne kiae ho, un men se kisee ka smaran n kiya jaaega. jo vishvasaghaat aur pap us ne kiya ho, usake karan vah mar jaaega." 
Ezekiel18:25 taubhee tum log kahate ho, ki prabhu kee gaati aekasee naheen. he israaael ke gharane, dek, kya meree gati aekasee naheen? kya tumharee hee gati anuachit naheen haai?" 
Ezekiel18:26 jab dhama apane dharma se firakar, tteddhe kam karane lage, to vah unake karan marega, arthata vah apane tteddhe kam hee ke karan mar jaaega." 
Ezekiel18:27 fir jab dushtt apane dushtt kamon se firakar, nyay aur dharma ke kam karane lage, to vah apana praan bachaaega." 
Ezekiel18:28 vah jo soch vichar kar apane sab aparadhaen se fira, is karan n marega, jeeavit hee rahega." 
Ezekiel18:29 taubhee israaael ka gharana kahata haai ki prabhu kee gaati aekasee naheen. he israaael ke gharane, kya meree gaati aekasee naheen? kya tumharee hee gati anuachit naheen?" 
Ezekiel18:30 prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, he israaael ke gharane, maain tum men se har aek manushy ka nyay usakee chalachalan ke anusar hee karoonga. pashchattap karo aur apane sab aparadhaen ko chhodo, tabhee tumhara adharma tumhare ttokar khane ka karan n hoga." 
Ezekiel18:31 apane sab aparadhaen ko jo tum ne kiae haai, door karo apana man aur apanee atma badal dalo! he israaael ke gharane, tum kyon maro?" 
Ezekiel18:32 kyonaki, prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, jo mare, usake marane se maain prasann naheen hota, isaaliye pashchattap karo, tabhee tum jeeavit rahoge." 
Ezekiel19:1 aur israaael ke pradhaanon ke vishay too yah vilapageet suna," 
Ezekiel19:2 teree mata aek kaaisee sinhanee thee! vah sinhon ke beech baaitta karatee aur apane bachchon ko javan sinhon ke beech palatee posatee thee. 
Ezekiel19:3 apane bachchon men se us ne aek ko pala aur vah javan sinh ho gaya, aur aher pakadna seekh gaya us ne manushyon ko bhee faad khaya." 
Ezekiel19:4 aur jaati jati ke logon ne usakee charcha sunee, aur use apane khode huae gadhe men fansaya aur usake nakel dalakar use misra desh men le gaae." 
Ezekiel19:5 jab usakee man ne dekha ki vah dhaeeraj dhare rahee taubhee usakee asha toott gai, tab apane aek aur bachche ko lekar use javan sinh kar diya." 
Ezekiel19:6 tab vah javan sinh hokar sinhon ke beech chalane firane laga, aur vah bhee aher pakadna seekh gaya aur manushyon ko bhee faad khaya." 
Ezekiel19:7 aur us ne unake bhvanon ko bigada, aur unake nagaron ko ujada varan usake garajane ke dr ke mare desh aur jo kuchh us men tha sab ujad gaya." 
Ezekiel19:8 tab charon or ke jati jati ke log apane apane praant se usake viruddh nikal aa, aur usake liye jal lagaya aur vah unake khode huae gadhe men fans gaya." 
Ezekiel19:9 tab ve usake nakel dalakar aur kattghare men band karake babul ke raja ke pas le gaa, aur gaddh men band kiya, ki usaka bol israaael ke pahadee desh men fir sunai n de." 
Ezekiel19:10 teree mata jis se too atpann hua, vah teer par lagee hui dakhlata ke saman thee, aur gaahire jal ke karan falon aur shaakhaon se bhree hui thee." 
Ezekiel19:11 aur prabhuta karanevalon ke rajadandon ke liye us men mottee mottee tthaniyan theen aur usakee uncharira itanee iui ki vah badalon ke beech tak pahunchee aur apanee bahut see daliyon samet bahut hee lambee dikhai padee. 
Ezekiel19:12 taubhee vah jalajalahatt ke sath ukhadkar boomi par girai gai, aur usake fal puravai hava ke lagane se sookh gaae aur usakee mottee tthaaniyan toottkar sookh gai aur ve ag se bhsm ho gai." 
Ezekiel19:13 ab vah jangal me, varan nirjal desh men lagai gai haai." 
Ezekiel19:14 aur usakee shaakhaon kee tthaaniyon men se ag nikalee, jis se usake fal bhsm ho gaa, aur prabhuta karane ke yogy rajadand ke liye us men ab koi mottee tthanee n rahee. yahee vilapageet haai, aur yah vilapageet bana rahega." 
Ezekiel20:1 sataven varsha ke panchaven maheene ke dasaven din ko israaael ke kitane puraaniye yahova se prashn karane ko aa, aur mere samhane baaitt gaae." 
Ezekiel20:2 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel20:3 he manushy ke santan, israaaelee puraaniyon se yah kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, kya tum mujh se prashn karane ko aae ho? prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai ki mere jeevan kee saugandha, tum mujh se prashn karane n paoge." 
Ezekiel20:4 he manushy ke santan, kya too unaka nyay n karega? kya too unaka nyay n karega? unake purakhaon ke ghainaune kam unhen jata de," 
Ezekiel20:5 aur un se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, jis din maain ne israaael ko chun liya, aur yakoob ke gharane ke vansh se shapath khai, aur misra dekh men apane ko un par pragatt kiya, aur un se shapath khakar kaha, maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoo," 
Ezekiel20:6 usee din maain ne un se yah bhee shapath khai, ki maain tum ko misra desh se nikalakar ek desh men pahunchaunga, jise maain ne tumhare liye chun liya haai vah sab deshaen ka shairomanai haai, aur us men doodha aur madha kee dharaen bahatee haain." 
Ezekiel20:7 fir maain ne un se kaha, jin ghainaunee vastuon par tum men se har aek kee ankhen lagee haai, unhen faenk do aur misra kee mooraton se apane ko ashuuddh n karo maain hee tumhara parameshvar yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel20:8 parantu ve mujh se bigad gaae aur meree sunanee n chahee jin ghainaunee vastuon par unakee ankhen lagee thee, unakee kisee ne faenka nahee, aur n misra kee mooraton ko chhoda. tab maain ne kaha, maain yahee, misra desh ke beech mum par apanee jalajalahatt bhdkaunga. aur poora kop dikhaunga." 
Ezekiel20:9 taubhee maain ne apane nam ke nimitt aeesa kiya ki jinake beech ve the, aur jinake dekhte huae maain ne unako misra desh se nikalane ke liye apane ko un par pragatt kiya tha un jaatiyon ke samhane ve apaavitra n tthare." 
Ezekiel20:10 maain unako misra desh se nikalakar jangal men le aya. 
Ezekiel20:11 vahan unako maain ne apanee vidhaiyan batai aur apane niyam bhee bataae ki jo matushy unako mane, vah unake karan jeevit rahega." 
Ezekiel20:12 fir maain ne unake liye apane vishraamadin ttharaae jo mere aur unake beech chinh ttharen ki ve janen ki maain yahova unaka paavitra karanevala hoo. 
Ezekiel20:13 taubhee israaael ke gharane ne jangal men mujh se balava kiya ve meree vidhaiyon par n chale, aur mere niyamon ko tuchchh jana, jinhen yadi manushy mane to vah unake karan jeevit rahega aur unhon ne mere vishraamadinon ko aati apaavitra kiya. tab maain ne kaha, maain jangal men in par apanee jalajalahatt bhdkakar inaka ant kar daloonga." 
Ezekiel20:14 parantu maain ne apane nam ke nimitt aeesa kiya ki ve un jatiyon ke samhane, jinake dekhte maain unako nikal laya tha, apaavitra n tthare." 
Ezekiel20:15 fir maain ne jangal men un se shapath khai ki jo desh maain ne unako de diya, aur jo sab deshaen ka shairomanai haai, jis men doodha aur madha kee dharaaen bahatee haai, us men unhen n pahunchaunga," 
Ezekiel20:16 kyonaki unhon ne mere niyam tuchchh jane aur meree vidhaiyon par n chale, aur mere vishraamadin apaavitra kiae the isaaliye ki unaka man unakee mooraton kee or laga raha." 
Ezekiel20:17 laubhee maain ne un par krapa kee drashtti kee, aur unhen nash n kiya, aur n jangal men pooree reeti se unaka ant kar dala." 
Ezekiel20:18 fir maain ne jangal men unakee santan se kaha, apane purakhaon kee vidhaiyon par n chalo, n unakee eiti yon ko mano aur n unakee mooraten poojakar apane ko ashuuddh karo." 
Ezekiel20:19 maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoo, meree vidhaiyon par chalo, or mere niyamon ke manane men chaukasee karo," 
Ezekiel20:20 aur mere vishraamadinon ko paavitra mano ki ve mere aur tumhare beech chinh tthare, aur jis se tum jano ki maain tumhara parameshvar yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel20:21 parantu unakee santan ne bhee mujh se balava kiya ve meree vidhaiyon par n chale, n mere niyamon ke manane men chaukasee kee jinhen yadi manushy mane to vah unake karan jeevit rahega mere vishraamadinon ko unhon ne apavitra kiya. tab maain ne kaha, maain jangal men un par apanee jalajalahatt bhdkakar apana kop dikhlaunga." 
Ezekiel20:22 taubhee maain ne hath kheench liya, aur apane nam ke nimitt aeesa kiya, ki un jatiyon ke samhane jinake dekhte huae maain unhen nikal laya tha, ve apaavitra n tthare." 
Ezekiel20:23 fir maain ne jangal men un se shapath khai, ki maain tumhen jaati jati men titara-abitar karoonga, aur desh desh men chhtaira doonga," 
Ezekiel20:24 kyonaki unhon ne mere niyam n mane, meree vidhaiyon ko tuchchh jana, mere vishraamadinon ko apavitra kiya, aur apane purakhaon kee mooraton kee or unakee ankhen lagee raheen." 
Ezekiel20:25 fir maain ne unake liye aeesee aeesee vidhaiyan ttharai jo achchhee n thee aur aeesee aeesee reeatiyan jinake karan ve jeeavit n rah saken 
Ezekiel20:26 arthata ve apane sab paahilautton ko ag men hom karane lage is reeati maain ne unhen unaheen kee bhentton ke dara ashuuddh kiya jis se unhen nirvash kar daloon aur tab ve jan len ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel20:27 he manushy ke santan, too israaael ke gharane se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, tumhare purakhaon ne is men bhee meree ninda kee ki unhon ne mera vishvasaghaat kiya." 
Ezekiel20:28 kyonaki jab maain ne unako us desh men pahunchaya, jisake unhen dene kee shapath maain ne un se khai thee, tab ve har aek unche tteele aur har aek ghane vraksha par draashtti karake vaheen apane melabaali karane lage aur vaheen ris dilanevalee apanee bhentten chaddhane lage aur vaheen apana sukhdayak sugandhadravy jalane lage, aur vaheen apane tapavan dene lage." 
Ezekiel20:29 tab maain ne un se poochha, jis unche sthan ko tum log jate ho, us se kya prayojan haai? isee se usaka nam aj tak bama kahalata haai." 
Ezekiel20:30 isaliye israaael ke gharane se kah, prabhu yahova tum se yah poochhta haai, kya tum bhee apane purakhaon kee reeti par chalakar ashuuddh hokar, aur unake ghainaune kamon ke anusar vyabhaichaarinee kee nai kam karate ho?" 
Ezekiel20:31 aj tak jab jab tum apanee bhentten chaddhate aur apane ladkebalon ko hom karake ag men chaddhate ho, tab tab tum apanee mooraton ke nimitt ashuuddh ttharate ho. he israaael ke gharane, kya tum mujh se pooghane paoge? prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee shapath tum mujh se poochhne n paoge." 
Ezekiel20:32 jo bat tumhare man men atee haai ki ham katt aur patthr ke upasak hokar anyajatiyon aur desh desh ke kulon ke saman ho jaaenge, vah kisee bhanti pooree naheen hone kee." 
Ezekiel20:33 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, mere jeevan kee shapath maain nishchay balee hath aur baddhai hui bhuja se, aur bhdkai iui jalajalahatt ke sath tumhare upar rajy karoonga." 
Ezekiel20:34 maain balee hath aur baddhai hui bhuja se, aur bhdkai hui jalajalahatt ke sath tumhen desh desh ke logon men se alag karoonga, aur un deshon se jin men tum titara-abitar ho gaae the, ikattha karoonga" 
Ezekiel20:35 aur maain tumhen desh desh ke logon ke jangal men le jakar, vahan amhane-samhane tum se mukama ladoonga." 
Ezekiel20:36 jis prakar maain tumhare poorvajon se misra desharoopee jangal men mukama ladta tha, usee prakar tum se mukama ladoonga, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel20:37 maain tumhen lattee ke tale chalaunga. aur tumhen vacha ke bandhan men daloonga. 
Ezekiel20:38 maain tum men se sab balavaiyon ko nikalakar jo mera aparadha karate haai tumhen shuuddh karoonga aur jis desh men ve ttkaite haain us men se maain unhen nikal doonga parantu israaael ke desh men ghausane n doonga. tab tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel20:39 aur he israaael ke gharane tum se to prabhu yahova yon kahata haai ki jakar apanee apanee mooraton kee upasana karo aur yadi tum meree n sunoge, to age ko bhee yahee kiya karo parantu mere pavitra nam ko apanee bhentton or mooraton ke dara fir apaavitra n karana." 
Ezekiel20:40 kyonaki prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai ki israaael ka sara gharana apane desh men mere pavitra parvat par, israaael ke unche parvat par, sab ka sab meree upasana karega vahee maain un se prasann hoonga, aur vaheen maain tumharee uttai hui bhentten aur chaddhai hui uttam uttam vastue, aur tumaharee sab paavitra kee hui vastuen tum se liya karoonga." 
Ezekiel20:41 jab maain tumhen desh desh ke logon men se alag karoon aur un deshaen se jin men tum titara-abitar huae ho, ikattha karoo, tab tum ko sukhdayak sugandha janakar grahan karoonga, aur any jaatiyon ke samhane tumhare dara pavitra ttharaya jaunga." 
Ezekiel20:42 aur jab maain tumhen israaael ke desh men pahunchau, jisake dene kee shapath maain ne tumhare poorvajon se khai thee, tab tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel20:43 aur vahan tum apanee chal chalan aur apane sab kamon ko jinake karane se tum ashuuddh huae ho smaran karoge, aur apane sab bure kamon ke karan apanee drashtti men ghainaune ttharoge." 
Ezekiel20:44 aur he israaael ke gharane, jab maain tumhare sath tuthare bure chalachalan aur bigade huae kamon ke anusar nahee, parantu apane hee nam ke nimitt bartav karoo, tab tum jan loge ki meain yahova hoo, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel20:45 aur yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel20:46 he manushy ke santan, apana mukh dakkhian kee or kar, dakkhian kee or vachan suna, aur daakkhian desh ke van ke vishay men bhavishyadanee kara" 
Ezekiel20:47 aur daakkhian desh ke van se kah, yahova ka yah vachan sun, prabhu yahova yon kahata heai, maain tujh men ag lagaunga, aur tujh men kya hare, kya sookhe, jitane ped haai, sab ko vah bhsm karegee asakee dhadhakatee jvala n bujhegee, aur usake karan dakkhian se uttar tak sab ke mukh jhulas jaaenge." 
Ezekiel20:48 tab sab praanaiyon ko soojh padega ki vah ag yahova kee lagai hui haai aur vah kabhee n bujhegee. 
Ezekiel20:49 tab maain ne kaha, hay parameshvar yahova! log to mere vishay men kaha karate haain ki kya vah drashttant hee ka kahanevala naheen haai?" 
Ezekiel21:1 yahova ka sah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel21:2 he manushy ke santan, apana mukh yarooshalem kee or kar aur paavitrasthanon kee or vachan suna israaael desh ke vishay men bhavishyadanee kar aur us se kah," 
Ezekiel21:3 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain tere viruddh hoo, or apanee talavar miyan men se kheenchakar tujh men se dhama aur adhama donon ko nash karoonga." 
Ezekiel21:4 isaliye ki maain tujh men se dhama aur adhama sab ko nash karanevala hoo, is kara, meree talavar miyan se nikalakar daakkhian se uttar tak sab praanaiyon ke viruddh chalegee" 
Ezekiel21:5 tab sab praanee jan lenge ki yahova ne miyan men se apanee talavar kheenchee haai or vah us men fir rakhee n jaaegee. 
Ezekiel21:6 so he manushy ke santan, too ah mar, bharee khed kar, aur toottee kamar lekar logon ke samhane ah mara." 
Ezekiel21:7 aur jab ve tujh se poochhen ki too kayon ah marata haai, tab kahana, samachar ke karan. kyonki aeesee bat anevalee haai ki sab ke man toott jaaenge aur sab ke hath ddheele padenge, sab kee atma bebas aur sab ke ghoottne nirbal ho jaaenge. dekho, aeesee hee bat anevalee haai, aur vah avashy pooree hogee, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel21:8 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha, he manushy ke santan, bhvishyadanee karake kah," 
Ezekiel21:9 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dek, sat chaddhai hui talavar, aur jhlakai hui talavar!" 
Ezekiel21:10 vah isaliye san chaddhai gai ki us se ghaat kiya jaa, aur isaliye jhlakai gai ki bijalee kee nai chamake! to kya ham haashairt ho? vah to yahova ke putra ka rajadand haai aur sab pedon ko tuchchh jananevala haai." 
Ezekiel21:11 aur vah jhlakane ko isaaliye dee gai ki hath men lee jaae vah isaaliye san chaddhai aur jhlakai gai ki ghaat karanevalon ke hath men dee jaae. 
Ezekiel21:12 he manushy ke santan chilla, aur hay, hay, kar! kyonaki vah meree praja par chala chahatee haai, vah israaael ke sare pradhaanon par chala chahatee haai meree praja ke sang ve bhee talavar ke vash men a gaae. is karan too apanee chhatee peett." 
Ezekiel21:13 kyonaki sachamuch usakee janch hui haai, aur yaadi use tuchchh jananevala rajadand bhee n rahe, to kya? parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel21:14 so he manushy ke santan, bhvishyadanee kar, aur hath par hath de mar, aur teen bar talavar ka bal duguna kiya jaae vah to ghaat karane kee talavar varan bade se bade ke ghaat karane kee talavar haai, jis se kottariyon men bhee koi naheen bach sakata." 
Ezekiel21:15 maain ne ghaat karanevalee talavar ko unake sab faattkon ke viruddh isaliye chalaya haai ki logon ke man toott jaae, aur ve bahut ttokar khaaen. hay, hay! vah to bijalee ke saman banai gai, aur ghaat karane ko san chaddhai gai haai." 
Ezekiel21:16 sikudkar daahinee or ja, fir taaiyar hokar bai or mud, jidhar bhee tera mukh ho."
