Ezekiel21:17 maain bhee talee bajaunga aur apanee jalajalahatt ko ttnda karoonga, mujh yahova ne aeesa kaha haai." 
Ezekiel21:18 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel21:19 he manushy ke santan, do marga tthara le ki babul ke raja kee talavar aae donon marga aek hee desh se nikalen! fir aek chinh kar, arthata nagar ke marga ke sir par aek chinh kara" 
Ezekiel21:20 aek marga tthara ki talavar ammoniyon ke rabba nagar par, aur yahooda desh ke gaddhvale nagar yarooshalem par bhee chale." 
Ezekiel21:21 kyonaki babul ka raja tirmuhane arthata donon magan ke nikalane ke sthan par bhavee boojhne ko khda hua haai, us ne teeron ko hila diya, aur grahadevataon se prashn kiya, aur kaleje ko bhee dekha." 
Ezekiel21:22 usake daahine hath men yarooshalem ka nam haai ki vah usakee or yuddh ke yantra lagaa, aur gala faadkar ghaat karane kee agyaa de aur unche shabd se lalakare, faattkon kee or yuddh ke yantra lagaae aur damadama bandho aur kott banae." 
Ezekiel21:23 parantu log to us bhavee kahane ko mithya samajhenge unhon ne jo unakee shapath khai haai is karan vah unake adharma ka smaran karakar unhen pakad lega. 
Ezekiel21:24 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, isaaliye ki tumhara adharma jo smaran kiya gaya haai, aur tumhare aparadha jo khul gaae haai, kasonki tumhare sab kamon men pap hee pap dikhai pada haai, aur tum smaran men aae ho, isaliye tum unheen se pakade jaoge." 
Ezekiel21:25 aur he israaael dushtt pradhaan, tera din a gaya haai adharma ke ant ka samay pahunch gaya haai." 
Ezekiel21:26 tere vishay men parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, pagadee utar, aur mukutt bhee utar de vah jyon ka tyon naheen rahane ka jo neecha haai use uncha kar aur jo uncha haai use neecha kara." 
Ezekiel21:27 maain isako ulatt doonga aur ulatt pulatt kar doonga han ulatt doonga aur jab tak usaka aadhaikaree n aae tab tak vah ulatta hua rahega tab maain use de doonga. 
Ezekiel21:28 fir he manushy ke santan, bhavishyadanee karake kah ki prabhu yahova ammoniyon aur unakee kee hui namadharai ke vishay men yon kahata haai too yon kah, kheenchee hui talavar haai, vah talavar ghaat ke liye jhlakai hui haai ki nash kare aur bijalee ke saman ho,-" 
Ezekiel21:29 jab tak ki ve tere vishay men jootte darshan pate, aur jootte bhavee tujh ko batate haain,-ki too un dushtt asadhy ghaayalon kee gardanon par pade jinaka din a gaya, aur jinake adharma ke ant ka samay a pahuncha haai." 
Ezekiel21:30 usako miyan men fir rakh. jis sthan men too sirajee gai aur jis desh men teree utpattai hui, usee men maain tera nyay karoonga." 
Ezekiel21:31 aur maain tujh par apana krodha bhdkaunga aur tujh par apanee jalajalahatt kee ag foonk doonga or tujhe pashu sareekhe manushy ke hath kar doonga jo nash karane men nipun haain. 
Ezekiel21:32 too ag ka kaur hogee tera koon desh men bana rahega too smaran men n rahegee kyonaki mujh yahova hee ne aeesa kaha haai. 
Ezekiel22:1 aur yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel22:2 he manushy ke santan, kya too us hatyare nagar ka nyay n karega? kya too usaka nyay n karega? usako usake sab ghainaune kam jata de," 
Ezekiel22:3 aur kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, he nagar too apane beech men hatya karata haai jis se tera samay aa, aur apanee hee hani karane aur ashuuddh hone ke liye mooraten banata haai." 
Ezekiel22:4 jo hatya too ne kee haai, us se too doshaee ttharee, aur jo mooraten too ne banai haai, unake karan too ashuuddh ho gai haai too ne apane ant ke din ko sameep kar liya, aur apane pichhle vashaan tak pahunch gai haai. is karan maain ne tujhe jaati jati ke logon kee or se namadharai ka aur sab deshaen ke tttthe ka karan kar diya haai." 
Ezekiel22:5 he badanam, he hullad se bhre huae nagar, jo nikatt aur jo door haai, ve sab tujhe tttthon men udaaenge." 
Ezekiel22:6 dek, israaael ke pradhaan log apane apane bal ke anusar tujh men hatya karanevale huae haain." 
Ezekiel22:7 tujh men mata-apita tuchchh jane gaae haain tere beech paradeshaee par andhor kiya gaya aur anath aur vidhava tujh men peesee gai haain. 
Ezekiel22:8 too ne meree pavitra vastuon ko tuchchh jana, aur mere vishraamadinon ko apavitra kiya haai." 
Ezekiel22:9 tujh men luchche log hatya karane ka tatpar hua, aur tere logon ne pahadon par bhojan kiya haai tere beech mahapap kiya gaya haai." 
Ezekiel22:10 tujh men pita kee desh udhaaree gai tujh men retumatee sree se bhee bhog kiya gaya haai. 
Ezekiel22:11 kisee ne tujh men padosee kee sree ke sath ghainauna kam kiya aur kisee ne apanee bahoo ko bigadkar mahapap kiya haai, aur kisee ne apanee baahin arthata apane pita kee bettee ko bhrashtt kiya haai." 
Ezekiel22:12 tujh men hatya karane ke liye unhon ne ghoos lee haai, too ne byaj aur sood liya aur apane padosiyon ko pees peesakar anyay se labh uttaya aur mujh ko too ne jhula diya haai, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel22:13 so dek, jo labh too ne anyay se uttaya aur apane beech hatya kee haai, us se maain ne hath par hath de mara haai." 
Ezekiel22:14 so jin dinon men tera nyay karoonga, kya un men tera day draddh yaaur tere hath sthiar rah sakenge? mujh yahova ne yah kaha haai, aur aeesa hee karoonga." 
Ezekiel22:15 maain tere logon ko jati jati men titara-abitar karoonga, aur desh desh men chhtaira doonga, aur teree ashuuddhta ko tujh men se nash karoonga." 
Ezekiel22:16 aur too jaati jati ke dekhte huae apanee hee draashtti men apaavitra ttharegee tab too jan legee ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel22:17 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel22:18 he manushy ke santan, israaael ka gharana meree drashtti men dhaatu ka maail ho gaya haai ve sab ke sab bhttee ke beech ke peetal aur range aur lohe aur shaeesho ke saman ban gaae ve chandee ke maail ke saman ho gaae haain." 
Ezekiel22:19 is karan prabhu yahova un se yon kahata haai, isaaliye ki tum sab ke sab dhaatu ke maail ke saman ban gaae ho, ho dekho, taain tum ko yarooshalem ke bheetar ikattha karane par hoo." 
Ezekiel22:20 jaaise log chandee, peetal, loha, shaeesha, aur ranga isaaliye bhtthee ke bheetar battorakar rakhte haain ki unhe ag foonkakar pighalaae, vaaise hee maain tum ko apane kop aur jalajalahatt se ikattha karake vaheen rakhkar pighala doonga." 
Ezekiel22:21 maain tum ko vahan battorakar apane rosh kee ag se foonkoonga, aur tum usake beech pighalaae jaoge." 
Ezekiel22:22 jaaise chandee bhtthee ke beech men pighalai jatee haai, vaaise hee tum usake beech men pighalaae jaoge tab tum jan loge ki jis ne ham par apanee jalajalahatt bhdkai haai, vah yahova haai." 
Ezekiel22:23 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel22:24 he manushy ke santan, us desh se kah, too aeesa desh haai jo shuuddh naheen hua, aur jalajalahatt ke din men tujh par vashara naheen huirar" 
Ezekiel22:25 tere bhvishyadvktaon ne tujh men rajadraeh kee goshttee kee, unhon ne garajanevale sinh kee nai aher pakada aur praaanaiyon ko kha dala haai ve rakhe huae anamol dhan ko chheen lete haai, aur tujh men bahut striayon ko vidhava kar diya he." 
Ezekiel22:26 usake yajakon ne meree vyavastha ka arth kheenchakhanchakar lagaya haai, aur meree paavitra vastuon ko apaavitra kiya haai unhon ne pavitranapavitra ka kuchh bhed naheen mana, aur n auron ko shuuddh-ashuuddh ka bhed sikhaya haai, aur ve mere vishraamadinon ke vishay men nishchaint rahate haai, jis se maain unake beech apavitra ttharata hoo." 
Ezekiel22:27 usake pradhaan hundaron kee nai aher pakadte, aur anyay se labh uttane ke liye hatya karate haain aur praan ghaat karane ko tatpar rahate haain." 
Ezekiel22:28 aur usake bhavishyadvkta unake liye kachchee lesai karate haai, unaka darshan pana midhya haai yahova ke bina kuchh kahe bhee ve yah kahakar joottee bhavee batate haain ki prabhu yahova yon kahata haai." 
Ezekiel22:29 desh ke sadhaaran log bhee andhor karate aur paraya dhan chheenate haai, ve deen daridra ko peesate aur nyay kee chinta chhodkar paradeshaee par andhoer karate haain." 
Ezekiel22:30 aur maain ne un men aeesa manushy ddoonddhna chaha jo bade ko sudhaare aur desh ke nimitt nake men mere samhane aeesa khda ho ki mujhe usako nash n karana pade, parantu aeesa koi n mila." 
Ezekiel22:31 is karan maain ne un par apana rosh bhdkaya aur apanee jalajalahatt kee ag se unhen bhsm kar diya haai maain ne unakee chal unhee ke sir par lautta dee haai, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Ezekiel23:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel23:2 he manushy ke santan, do striayan thee, jo aek hee ma kee bettee thee," 
Ezekiel23:3 ve apane bachapan hee men veshya ka kam misra men karane lagee unakee chhatiyan kunvarapan men paahile vaheen meenjee gai aur unaka maradan bhee hua. 
Ezekiel23:4 un ladkiyon men se badee ka nam ohola aur usakee baahin ka nam oholeeba tha. ve meree ho gai, aur unake putra putraiyan utpann hui. unake namon men se ohola to shaemaron, aur oheleeba yarooshalem haai." 
Ezekiel23:5 ohola jab meree thee, tab hee vyaabhaichaarinee hokar apane mitraen par mohit hone lagee jo usake padosee ashshooree the." 
Ezekiel23:6 ve to sab ke sab neele vasr paahinanevale manabhavane javan, adhaipaati aur pradhaan the, aur ghaedon par savar the." 
Ezekiel23:7 so us ne unheen ke sath vyabhaichar kiya jo sab ke sab savattam ashshooree the aur jis kisee par vah mohit hui, usee kee mooraton se vah ashuuddh hui." 
Ezekiel23:8 jo vyabhaichar us ne misra men seekha tha, usako bhee us ne n chhoda kyonaki bachapan men manushyon ne usake sath kukarma kiya, aur usakee chhaatiyan meenjee, aur tana-man se usake sath vyaabhaichar kiya gaya tha." 
Ezekiel23:9 is karan maain ne usako unheen ashshooree mitraen ke hath kar diya jin par vah mohit hui thee. 
Ezekiel23:10 unhon ne usako nangee kiya usake putra-mutraiyan chheenakar usako talavar se ghaat kiya is prakar unake hath se dand pakar vah striayon men prasiddh ho gai. 
Ezekiel23:11 usakee baahin oholeeba ne yah dekha, taubhee vah mohit hokar vyabhaichar karane men apanee baahin se bhee adhaik baddh gai." 
Ezekiel23:12 vah apane ashshooree padosiyon par mohit hotee thee, jo sab ke sab aati sundar vasr paahinanevale aur ghaedon ke savar manabhavane, javanan adhaipaati aur aur prakar ke pradhaan the." 
Ezekiel23:13 tab maain ne dekha ki vah bhee ashuuddh ho gai un donon bahinon kee aek hee chal thee. 
Ezekiel23:14 parantu oholeeba aadhaik vyaabhaichar karatee gai so jab us ne bheet par sendoor se kheenche huae aeese kasadee purushon ke chitra dekhe," 
Ezekiel23:15 jo kaatt imen faentte bandho hua, sir men chhor lattkatee hui rangeelee pagadiyan paahine hua, aur sab ke sab apanee kasadee janmaboomi arthata babul ke logon kee reeti par pradhaanon ka roop dhare huae the," 
Ezekiel23:16 tab unako dekhte hee vah un par mohit hui aur unake pas kasadiyon ke desh men doot bheje. 
Ezekiel23:17 so babulee log usake pas palang par aa, aur usake sath vyaabhaichar karake use ashuuddh kiya aur jab vah un se ashuuddh ho gai, tab usaka man un se fir gaya." 
Ezekiel23:18 taubhee jab vah tan udhadtee aur vyabhaichar karatee gai, tab mera man jaaise usakee baahin se fir gaya tha, vaaise hee us se bhee fir gaya." 
Ezekiel23:19 is par bhee vah misra desh ke apane bachapan ke din smaran karake jab vah veshya ka kam karatee thee, aur adhaik vyaabhaichar karatee gai" 
Ezekiel23:20 aur aeese misraen par mohit hui, jinaka mans gadahon ka sa, aur veerya ghaedon ka sa tha." 
Ezekiel23:21 too is prakar se apane bachapan ke us samay ke mahapap ka smaran karatee haai jab misraee log teree chhatiyan meenjate the. 
Ezekiel23:22 is karan he oholeeba, parameshvar yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, dek, maain tere misraen ko ubharakar jin se tera man fir gaya charon or se tere viruddh le aunga." 
Ezekiel23:23 arthata babuliyon aur sab kasadiyon ko, aur pakod, shae aur koa ke logon ko aur unake sath sab ashshooriyon ko launga jo sab ke sab ghaedon ke savar manabhavane javan aadhaipaati, aur kai prakar ke pratinidhai, pradhaan aur namee purush haain." 
Ezekiel23:24 ve log haathaiyar, rat, chhkade aur desh desh ke logon ka dal liae huae tujh par chaddhai karenge aur ddhal aur faree aur ttop dhaaran kiae huae tere viruddh charon or panati bandhonge aur maain unheen ke hath nyay ka kam saunpoonga, aur ve apane apane niyam ke anusar tera nyay karenge." 
Ezekiel23:25 aur maain tujh par jaloonga, jis se ve jalajalahatt ke sath tujh se bartav karenge. ve teree nak aur kan katt lenge, aur tera jo bhee bacha rahega vah talavar se mara jaaega. ve tere putra-puatraiyon ko chheen le jaaenge, aur tera jo bhee bacha rahega, vah ag se bhsm ho jaaega." 
Ezekiel23:26 ve tere vasr bhee utarakar tere sundara-sundar gahane chheen le jaaenge. 
Ezekiel23:27 is reeati se maain tera mahapap aur jo veshya ka kam too ne misra desh men seekha tha, use bhee tujh se chhudaunga, yahan tak ki too fir apanee ankh unakee or n lagaaegee aur n misra desh ko fir smaran karegee." 
Ezekiel23:28 kyonaki prabhu yahova tujh se yon kahata haai, dek, maain tujhe unake hath saunpoonga jin se too vaair rakhtee haai aur jin se tera man fir gaya haai" 
Ezekiel23:29 aur ve tujh se vaair ke sath bartav karenge, aur teree saree kamai ko utta lenge, aur tujhe nanga karake chhod denge, aur tere tan ke ughaade jane se tera vyabhaichar aur mahapap pragatt ho jaaega." 
Ezekiel23:30 ye kam tujh se is karan kiae jaaenge kyonki too anyajaatiyon ke peechhe vyaabhaichaarinee kee nai ho gai, aur unakee mooraten poojakar ashuuddh ho gai haai." 
Ezekiel23:31 too apanee baahin kee leek par chalee haai is karan maain tere hath men usaka sa kattora doonga. 
Ezekiel23:32 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, apanee baahin ke kattore se tujhe peena padega jee gaahira aur chauda haai too hansee aur tttthon men udai jaaegee, kyonaki us kattore men bahut kuchh samata haai." 
Ezekiel23:33 too matavalepan aur dukh se chhk jaaegee. too apanee baahin shaemaron ke kattore ko, arthata vismay aur ujad ko peekar chhk jaaegee." 
Ezekiel23:34 us men se too gar garakar peeegee, aur usake ttkairon ko bhee chabaegee aur apanee chhaatiyan ghaayal karegee kyonaki maain hee ne aeesa kaha haai, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel23:35 too ne jo mujhe bhula diya haai aur apana munh mujh se faer liya haai, isaaliye too ap hee apane mahapap aur vyabhaichar ka bhar utta, parameshvar yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Ezekiel23:36 yahova ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, kya too ohola aur oholeeba ka nyay karega? to fir unake ghainaune kam unhen jata de." 
Ezekiel23:37 kyonaki unhon ne vyaabhaichar kiya haai, aur unake hathon men koon laga haai unhon ne apanee mooraton ke sath vyabhaichar kiya, aur apane ladkebale jo mujh se utpann huae the, un mooraton ke age bhsm hone ke liye chaddhaae haain." 
Ezekiel23:38 fir unhon ne mujh se aeesa bartav bhee kiya ki usee ke sath mere pavitrasthan ko bhee ashuuddh kiya aur mere vishraamadinon ko apavitra kiya haai. 
Ezekiel23:39 ve apane ladkebale apanee mooraton ke samhane baali chaddhakar usee din mera paavitrasthan apavitra karane ko us men ghausee. dek, unhon ne is bhanati ka kam mere bhvan ke bheetar kiya he." 
Ezekiel23:40 aur unhon ne door se purushaen ko bulava bheja, aur ve chale bhee aae. unake liye too naha dhae, ankhon men anjan laga, gahane pahinakara" 
Ezekiel23:41 sundar palang par baaittee rahee aur tere samhane aek meja bichhee hui thee, jis par too ne mera dhoop aur mera tel rakha tha." 
Ezekiel23:42 tab usake sath nishchaint logon kee bheed ka kolahal sun pada, aur un sadhaaran logon ke pas jangal se bulaae huae piyakkad log bhee the unhon ne un donon baahinon ke hathon men choodyaian paahinai, aur unake siron par shaebhayaman mukutt rakhe." 
Ezekiel23:43 tab jo kyabhaichar karate karate buaddhiya ho gai thee, usake vishay men bol utta, ab to ve usee ke sath vyabhaichar karenge." 
Ezekiel23:44 kyonaki ve usake pas aeese gaae jaaise log veshya ke pas jate haain. vaaise hee ve ohola aur oholeeba nam mahapaapinee striayon ke pas gaae. 
Ezekiel23:45 so dhama log vyaabhaichaarinaiyon aur hatyaron ke yogy usaka nyay karen kyonki ve vyaabhaichaarineeyon aur hatyaron ke yogy usaka nyay karen kyonaki ve vyaabhaichaarinee haai, aur unake hathon men koon laga haai." 
Ezekiel23:46 is karan parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain aek bheed se un par chaddhai karakar unhen aeesa karoonga ki ve maree maree firengee aur lattee jaaengee." 
Ezekiel23:47 aur us bheed ke log unako pattravah karake unhen apanee talavaron se katt dalenge, tab ve unake putra-puatraiyon ko ghaat karake unake ghar bhee ag lagakar foonk denge." 
Ezekiel23:48 is prakar maain mahapap ko desh men se door karoonga, aur sab striayan shaiksha makar tumhara sa mahapap karane se bachee rahegee." 
Ezekiel23:49 tumhara mahapap tumhare hee sir padega aur tum nishchay apanee mooraton ko pooja ke papon ka bhar uttaoge aur tab tum jan loge ki maain parameshvar yahova hoon. 
Ezekiel24:1 naven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke dasaven din ko, yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel24:2 he manushy ke santan, aj ka din likh rak, kyonaki aj hee ke din babul ke raja ne yarooshalem a ghora haai." 
Ezekiel24:3 aur is balabai gharane se yah drashttant kah, prabhu yahova kahata haai, hande ko ag par ghar do use dharakar us men panee dal do" 
Ezekiel24:4 tab us men jandha, kandha aur sab achchhe achchhe ttukade battorakar rakho aur use uttam uttam haaddiyon se bhr do." 
Ezekiel24:5 jhund men se sab se achchhe pashu lekar un haddiyon ko hagade ke neeche ddher karo aur unako bhlee-bhanati pakao taki bheetar hee haaddiyan bhee pak jaaen. 
Ezekiel24:6 isaliye prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, hay, us hatyaree nagaree par! hay us hande par! jisaka morcha us men bana haai aur chootta naheen us men se ttukada ttukada karake nikal lo, us par chitthee n dalee jaae." 
Ezekiel24:7 kyonaki us nagaree men kiya hua koon us men haai us ne use boomi par dalakar dhooli se naheen ddhanpa, parantu nangee chattan par rakh diya." 
Ezekiel24:8 isaliye maain ne bhee usaka koon nangee chattan par rakha haai ki vah ddhnp n sake aur ki badala lene ko jalajalahatt bhdke. 
Ezekiel24:9 prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, hay, us koonee nagaree par! maain bhee ddher ko bada karoonga." 
Ezekiel24:10 aur aadhaik lakadee dal, ag ko bahut tej kar, mans ko bhlee bhanati paka aur masala mila, aur haaddiyan bhee jala do." 
Ezekiel24:11 tab hande ko choochha karake angaron par rakh jis se vah garma ho aur usaka peetal jale aur us men ka maail gale, aur usaka morcha nashtt ho jaae." 
Ezekiel24:12 maain usake karan paarishram karate karate thk gaya, parantu usaka bharee morcha us se choottta nahee, usaka morcha ag ke dara bhee naheen choottta." 
Ezekiel24:13 he nagaree teree ashuuddhta mahapap kee haai. maain to tujhe shuuddh karana chahata tha, parantu too shuuddh naheen hui, is karan jab tak maain apanee lajalajahatt tujh par shaant n kar loo, tab tak too fir shuuddh n kee jaaegee." 
Ezekiel24:14 mujh yahova hee ne yah kaha haai aur vah ho jaaega, maain aeesa hee karoonga, maain tujhe n chhodoonga, n tujh par taras khunga n pachhtaunga tere chalachalan aur kamon hee ke anusar tera nyay kiya jaaega, prabhu yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel24:15 yahova ka yah bhee vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel24:16 he manushy ke santan, dek, maain teree ankhon kee piry ko marakar tere pas se le lene par hoo parantu n too rona-peettna aur n ansoo bahana." 
Ezekiel24:17 lambee sansen le to le, parantu ve sunai n paden mare huon ke liye bhee vilap n karana. sir par pagadee bandho aur panvon men jootee pahane rahana aur n to apane hontt ko ddhanpana n shaek ke yogy rottee khana." 
Ezekiel24:18 tab maain savere logon se bola, aur sanjh ko meree sree mar gai. aur bihan ko maain ne agyaa ke anusar kiya." 
Ezekiel24:19 tab log mujh se kahane lage, kya too hamen n bataaega ki yah jo too karata haai, isaka ham logon ke liye kya arth haai?" 
Ezekiel24:20 maain ne unako uttar diya, yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel24:21 too israaael ke gharane se kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain apane paavitrasthan ko jisake gaddh hone par tum foolate ho, aur jo tamharee ankhon ka chaha hua haai, aur jisako tumhara man chahata haai, use maain apaavitra karane par hoon aur apane jin bette-beattyaien ko tum vahan chhod aae ho, ve talavar se mare jaaenge." 
Ezekiel24:22 aur jaaisa maain ne kiya haai vaaisa hee tum log karoge, tum bhee apane hontt n ddhanpoge, n shaek ke yogy rottee khaoge." 
Ezekiel24:23 toom sir par pagadee bandho aur panvon men jootee paahine rahoge, n tum rooge, n chhatee peettoge, varan apane adharma ke kamon men fanse huae galate jaoge aur aek doosare kee or karahate rahoge." 
Ezekiel24:24 is reeati yahojakel tumhare liye chinh ttharega jaaisa us ne kiya, tteek vaaisa hee tum bhee karoge. aur jab yah ho jaa, tab tum jan loge ki maain parameshvar yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel24:25 aur he manushy ke santan, kya yah sach nahee, ki jis din maain unaka draddh gaddh, unakee shaebha, aur harsha ka kara, aur unake bette-beattyaian jo unakee shaebha, unakee ankhon ka anand, aur man kee chah haai, unako maain un se le loonga," 
Ezekiel24:26 usee din jo bhagakar bachega, vah tere pas akar tujhe samachar sunaega." 
Ezekiel24:27 usee din tera munh khulega, aur too fir chup n rahega parantu us bache huae ke sath baten karega. so too in logon ke liye chinh ttharega aur ye jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel25:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel25:2 he manushy ke santan, ammoniyon kee or munh karake unake vishay men bhavishyadanee kara." 
Ezekiel25:3 un se kah, he ammoniyo, parameshvar yahova ka vachan suno, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai ki tum ne jo mere paavitrasthan ke vishay jab vah apavitra kiya gaya, aur israael ke desh ke vishay jab vah ujad gaya, aur yahooda ke gharane ke vishay jab ve bandhauai men gaa, aha, aha! kaha!" 
Ezekiel25:4 is karan dekho, maain tujh ko poorabiyon ke aadhaikar men karane par hoo aur ve tere beech apanee chhavaniyan dalenge aur apane ghar banaaenge ve tere fal khaaenge aur tera doodha peeaenge." 
Ezekiel25:5 aur maain rabba nagar ko untton ke rahane aur ammoniyon ke desh ko bhed-bakaariyon ke baaittne ka sthan kar doonga tab tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel25:6 kyonaki parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, tum ne jo israaael ke desh ke karan talee bajai aur nache, aur apane sare man ke aabhaiman se anand kiya," 
Ezekiel25:7 is karan dek, maain ne apana hath tere upar baddhaya haai aur tujh ko jati jati kee loott kar doonga, aur desh desh ke logon men se tujhe mittaunga aur desh desh men se nash karoonga. maain tera satyanash kar daloonga tab too jan lega ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel25:8 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, moab aur seir jo kahate haai, dekho, yahooda ka gharana aur sab jatiyon ke saman ho gaya he." 
Ezekiel25:9 is karan dek, moab ke desh ke kinare ke nagaron ko betyashaeemot, balamon, aur kiryataaim, jo us desh ke shairomanai haai, maain unaka marga kholakar" 
Ezekiel25:10 unhen pooraabiyon ke vash men aeesa kar doonga ki ve amyoniyon par chaddhai karen aur maain ammoniyon ko yahan tak unake adhaikar men kar doonga ki jati jati ke beech unaka smaran fir n rahega. 
Ezekiel25:11 aur maain moab ko bhee dand doonga. aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel25:12 parameshvar yahova yon bhee kahata haai, aedom ne jo yahooda ke gharane se palatta liya, aur un se badala lekar bada doshaee ho gaya haai," 
Ezekiel25:13 is karan parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain aedom ke desh ke viruddh apana hath baddhakar us men se manushy aur pashu donon ko mittaunga aur teman se lekar dadan tak usako ujad kar doonga aur ve talavar se mare jaaenge." 
Ezekiel25:14 aur maain apanee praja israaael ke dara aedom se apana badala loonga aur ve us desh men mere kop aur jalajalahatt ke anusar kam karenge. tab ve mera palatta lena jan lenge, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel25:15 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, kyonki palishtee logon ne palatta liya, varan apanee yug yug kee shatrauta ke karan apane man ke abhaiman se badala liya ki nash kare," 
Ezekiel25:16 is karan parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain paalishtaiyon ke viruddh apana hath baddhane par hoo, aur kareatiyon ko mitta daloonga aur samudrateer ke bache huae rahanevalon ko nash karoonga." 
Ezekiel25:17 aur maain jalajalahatt ke sath mukama ladkar, un se kadai ke sath palatta loonga. aur jab maain un se badala le loonga, tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel26:1 gsarahaven varsha ke paheele maheene ke pahile din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahancha," 
Ezekiel26:2 he manushy ke santan, sor ne jo yarooshalem ke vishy men kaha haai, aha, aha. jo desh desh ke logon ke faattk ke saman thee, vah nash hogai." 
Ezekiel26:3 usake ujad jane se maain bhrapoor ho jaunga! is karan parameshvar yahova kahata haai, he sor, dek, maain tere piruddh hoo aur aeesa karoonga ki bahut see jaatiyan tere viruddh aeesee uttengee jaaise samudra kee laharen utttee haain." 
Ezekiel26:4 aur ve sor kee shaharapanah ko giraaengee, aur usake gummatton ko tod dalengee aur maain us par se usakee mittee khurachakar use nangee chattan kar doonga." 
Ezekiel26:5 vah samudra ke beech ka jal faailane hee ka sthan ho jaaega kyonaki parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai aur vah jati jati se lutt jaaega 
Ezekiel26:6 aur usakee jo beattyaian maaidan men haai, ve talavar se maree jaaengee. tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel26:7 kyonaki parameshvar yahova yah kahata haai, dek, maain sor ke viruddh rajadhairaj babul ke raja nabookadanessar ko ghodo, ratho, savaro, badee bheed, aur dal samet uttar disha se le aunga." 
Ezekiel26:8 aur teree jo bettyaian maaidan men ho, unako vah talavar se marega, aur tere viruddh kott banaaega aur damadama bandhoga aur ddhal uttaaega." 
Ezekiel26:9 aur vah teree shaharapanah ke viruddh yuddh ke yantra chalaaega aur tere gummatton ko farason se ddha dega. 
Ezekiel26:10 usake ghaede itane honge, ki too unakee dhooli se ddhnp jaega, aur jab vah tere faattkon men aeese ghausega jaaise log nakevale nagar men ghausate haai, tab teree shaharapanah savaro, chhkado, aur rathon ke shabd se kanp uttegee." 
Ezekiel26:11 vah apane ghodon kee ttapon se teree sab sadkon ko raund dalega, aur tere nivaasiyon ko talavar se mar dalega, aur tere bal ke khnbhe boomi par biraae jaaenge." 
Ezekiel26:12 aur log tera dhan loottenge aur tere vyopar kee vastuaen chheen lenge ve teree shaharapanah ddha denge aur tere manabha ghar tod dalenge tere patthr aur kat, aur teree dhooli ve jal men faenk denge." 
Ezekiel26:13 aur maain tere geeton ka suratal band karoonga, aur teree veenaon kee dhvani fir sunai n degee." 
Ezekiel26:14 maain tujhe nangee chattan kar doonga too jal faailane hee ka sthan ho jaaega aur fir basaya n jaaega kyonki mujh yahova hee ne yah kaha haai, parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Ezekiel26:15 parameshvar yahova sor se yon kahata haai, tere girane ke shabd se jab ghaayal log karahenge aur tujh men ghaat hee ghaat hoga, tab kya ttapoo n kanp uttenge?" 
Ezekiel26:16 tab samudrateer ke sab pradhaan log apane apane sinhasan par se utarenge, aur apane bagae aur boottedar vasr utarakar thrathrahatt ke vasr paahinenge aur boomi par baaittkar kshan kshan men kanpenge aur tere karan vismait rahenge." 
Ezekiel26:17 aur ve tere vishay men vilap ka geet banakar tujh se kahenge, hay! mallahon kee basai hui hay! sarahee hui nagaree jo samudra ke beech nivaasiyon samet samath rahee aur sab ttkainevalon kee dranevalee nagaree thee, too kaaisee nash hui haai?" 
Ezekiel26:18 tere girane ke din ttapoo kanp uttenge, aur tere jate rahane ke karan samudra se sab ttapoo ghabara jaaenge." 
Ezekiel26:19 kyonaki parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jab maain tujhe nirjan nagaron ke saman ujad karoonga aur tere upar mahasagar chaddhaunga, aur too gaahire jal men oob jaaega," 
Ezekiel26:20 tab gadhe men aur giranevalon ke sang maain tujhe bhee praacheen logon men utar doonga aur gadhe men aur giranevalon ke sang tujhe bhee neeche ke lok men rakhkar praacheenakal ke ujade huae sthanon ke saman kar doonga yahan tak ki too fir n basega aur n jeevan ke lok men koi sthan paaega. 
Ezekiel26:21 maain tujhe ghabarane ka karan karoonga, aur too bhvishy men fir n rahega, varan ddoonddhne par bhee tera pata n lagega, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel27:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel27:2 he manushy ke santan, sor ke vishay aek vilap ka geet banakar us se yon kah," 
Ezekiel27:3 he samudra ke paaittav par rahanevalee, he bahut se deepon ke liye desh desh ke logon ke sath vyopar karanevalee, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, he sor too ne kaha haai ki maain sarvang sundar hoo." 
Ezekiel27:4 tere sivane samudra ke beech haain tere bananevale ne tujhe sarvang sundar banaya. 
Ezekiel27:5 teree sab pattariyan saneer parvat ke sanauvar kee lakadee kee banee haain tere mastool ke liye labanon ke devadar liae gaae haain. 
Ezekiel27:6 tere dand bashaan ke banjavrakshaen ke bane tere jahajaon ka pattav kittaiyon ke deepon se laae huae seedho sanauvar kee hatheedant jadee hui lakadee ka bana. 
Ezekiel27:7 tere jahajaon ke pal misra se laae huae boottedar san ke kapade ke bane ki tere liye jhnde ka kam den teree chandanee aeleesha ke deepon se laae huae neele aur baainjanee rang ke kapadon kee banee. 
Ezekiel27:8 tere khenevale seedon aur arbad ke rahanevale the he sor, tere hee beech ke buaddhmaian log tere manjhee the." 
Ezekiel27:9 tere kareegar jodai karanevale gabal nagar ke puraniye aur buaddhmaian log the tujh men vyopar karane ke liye mallahon samet samudra par ke sab jahaj tujh men a gaae the. 
Ezekiel27:10 teree sena men faarasee, loodee, aur pootee log bhratee huae the unhon ne tujh men ddhal, aur ttopee ttangee aur unheen ke karan tera pratap baddha tha." 
Ezekiel27:11 teree shaharapanah par teree sena ke sath arbad ke log charon or the, aur tere gummatton men shooraveer khde the unhon ne apanee ddhalen teree charon or kee shaharapanah par ttangee thee teree sundarata unake dara pooree hui thee." 
Ezekiel27:12 apanee sab prakar kee sampattai kee bahutayat ke karan tashashaee log tere vyoparee the unhon ne chandee, loha, ranga aur seesa dekar tera mal mol liya." 
Ezekiel27:13 yavan, toobal, aur meshok ke log tere mal ke badale dasa-dasee aur peetal ke patra tujh se vyopar karate the." 
Ezekiel27:14 togarma ke gharane ke logon ne teree sampaattai lekar ghaede, savaree ke ghaede aur khchchar diae." 
Ezekiel27:15 dadanee tere vyoparee the bahut se deep tere hatt bane the ve tere pas hatheedant kee seeng aur abanoos kee lakadee vyopar men late the. 
Ezekiel27:16 teree bahut kareegaree ke karan aram tera vyoparee tha marakat, baaijanee rang ka aur boottedar vasr, san, mooga, aur laladee dekar ve tera mal lete the." 
Ezekiel27:17 yahooda aur israaael bhee tere vyoparee the unhon ne minneet ka gehoo, pannag, aur madha, tel, aur balasan dekar tera mal liya." 
Ezekiel27:18 tujh men bahut kareegaree hui aur sab prakar ka dhan ikatta hua, is se damishk tera vyoparee hua tere pas helabon ka dakhmadha aur ujala un pahunchaya gaya." 
Ezekiel27:19 badan aur yavan ne tere mal ke badale men soot diya aur unake karan faaulad, taj aur agar men bhee tera vyopar hua." 
Ezekiel27:20 savaree ke chara-jame ke liye dadan tera vyoparee hua. 
Ezekiel27:21 arab aur kedar ke sab pradhaan tere vyoparee tthare unhon ne memne, meddhe, aur bakare laakar tere sath lena-den kiya." 
Ezekiel27:22 shaba aur rama ke vyoparee tere vyoparee tthare unhon ne uttam uttam jati ka sab bhanati ka masala, sarva bhanti ke manai, aur sona dekar tera mal liya." 
Ezekiel27:23 haran, kanne, aeden, shaba ke vyoparee, aur ashshoor aur kalamad, ye sab nere vyoparee tthare." 
Ezekiel27:24 inhon ne uttam uttam vastuaen arthata oddhne ke neele aur boottedar vasr aur doriyon se bandhaee aur devadar kee banee hui chi?a vichitra kapadon kee pettyaian lakar tere sath lena-den kiya. 
Ezekiel27:25 tashash ke jahaja tere vyopar ke mal ke ddhonevale huae. unake dara too samudra ke beech rahakar bahut dhanavana aur pratapee ho gai thee. 
Ezekiel27:26 tere khaivaaiyon ne tujhe gahire jal men pahuncha diya haai, aur puravai ne tujhe samudra ke beech tod diya haai." 
Ezekiel27:27 jis din too oobegee, usee din tera dhana-sampattai, vyopar ka mal, mallah, manjhee, judai ka kam karanevale, vyoparee log, aur tujh men jitane sipahee haai, aur teree saree bheed-bhad samudra ke beech gir jaaengee." 
Ezekiel27:28 tere manajhyaien kee chillahatt ke shabd ke mare tere as pas ke sthan kanp uttenge. 
Ezekiel27:29 aur sab khenevale aur mallah, aur samudra men jitane manjhee rahate haai, ve apane apane jahaja par se utarenge," 
Ezekiel27:30 aur ve boomi par khde hokar tere pishay men unche shabd se bilak bilakakar roaenge. ve apane apane sir par dhooli udakar rakh men lottenge 
Ezekiel27:31 aur tere shaek men apane sir mundva denge, aur kamar men ttatt bandhakar apane man ke kade dukh ke sath tere vishay men roaenge aur chhatee peettenge." 
Ezekiel27:32 ve vilap karate huae tere vishay men vilap ka yah geet banakar gaaenge, sor jo ab samudra ke beech chupachap padee haai, usake tuly kaun nagaree haai?" 
Ezekiel27:33 jab tera mal samudra par se nikalata tha, tab bahut see jatiyon ke log trapt hote the tere dhan aur vyopar ke mal kee bahutayat se prathvee ke raja dhanee hote the." 
Ezekiel27:34 jis samay too athah jal men laharon se toottee, us samay tere vayopar ka mal, aur tere sab nivasee bhee tere bheetar rahakar nash ho gaae." 
Ezekiel27:35 ttapuon ke sab rahanevale tere karan vismait hue aur unake sab rajaon ke roaen khde ho gaa, aur unake munh udas dekh pade haain." 
Ezekiel27:36 desh desh ke vyoparee tere viruddh hathaudee baja rahe haain too bhy ka karan ho gai haai aur fir sthiar n rah sakegee. 
Ezekiel28:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel28:2 he manushy ke santan, sor ke pradhaan se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai ki too ne man men foolakar yah kaha haai, maain ishvar hoo, maain samudra ke beech parameshvar ke asan par baaitta hoo, parantu, yadhypi too apane apako parameshvar sa dikhata haai, taubhee too ishvar nahee, manushy hee haai." 
Ezekiel28:3 too daaniyyel se adhaik buddhmaian to haai koi bhed tujh se chhpai n hoga 
Ezekiel28:4 too ne apanee buaddh iddh aur samajh ke dara dhan praapt kiya, aur apane bhndaron men sona-chandee rakha haai" 
Ezekiel28:5 too ne badee buaddh ise lena-den kiya jis se tera dhan baddha, aur dhan ke karan tera man fool utta haai." 
Ezekiel28:6 is karan parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, too jo apana man parameshvar sa dikhata haai," 
Ezekiel28:7 isaliye dek, maain tujh par aeese paradeshaiyon se chaddhai karaunga, jo sab jatiyon se aadhaik balatkaree haain ve apanee talavaren teree buddh ikee shaebha par chalaaenge aur teree chamaka-damak ko bigadenge." 
Ezekiel28:8 ve tujhe kabar men utarenge, aur too samudra ke beech ke mare huon kee reeati par mar jaaega." 
Ezekiel28:9 tab, kya too apane ghaat karanevale ke samhane kahata rahega ki too parameshvar haai? tooo apane ghaayal karanevale ke hath men ishvar nahee, manushy hee ttharega." 
Ezekiel28:10 too paradeashaiyon ke hath se khtanaheen logon kee nai mara jaaega kyonki maain hee ne aeesa kaha haai, parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai." 
Ezekiel28:11 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel28:12 he manushy ke santan, sor ke raja ke vishay men vilap ka geet banakar us se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, too to uttam se bhee uttam haai too buddh ise bhrapoor aur sarvang sundar haai." 
Ezekiel28:13 too parameshvar kee aeden nam baree men tha tere pas aboosha, manaik, padamarag, heera, faeerojaa, sulaaimanee maanai, yashab, teelamanai, marakad, aur lal sab bhanti ke manai aur sone ke paahirave the tere dfa aur bansualiyan tujhee men banai gai theen jis din too siraja gaya tha us din ve bhee taaiyar kee gai theen." 
Ezekiel28:14 too chhanevala abhaishaikt karoob tha, maain ne tujhe aeesa ttharaya ki too parameshvar ke pavitra parvat par rahata tha too ag sareekhe chamakanevale maanaiyon ke beech chalata firata tha." 
Ezekiel28:15 jis din se too siraja gaya, aur jis din tak tujh men kuttlaita n pai gai, us samay tak too apanee saree chalachalan men nidash raha." 
Ezekiel28:16 parantu lena-den kee bahutayat ke karan too upadrav se bhrakar papee ho gaya isee se maain ne tujhe apaavitra janakar parameshvar ke parvat par se utara, aur he chhanevale karoob maain ne tujhe ag sareekhe chamakanevale maanyaien ke beech se nash kiya haai." 
Ezekiel28:17 sundarata ke karan tera man fool utta tha aur vibhv ke karan teree buaddh ibigad gai thee. maain ne tujhe boomi par pattk diya aur rajaon ke samhane tujhe rakha ki ve tujh ko dekhen. 
Ezekiel28:18 tere adharma ke kamo kee bahutayat se aur tere lena-den kee kuttlaita se tere pavitrasthan apavitra ho gaae so maain ne tujh men se aeesee ag utpann kee jis se too bhsm hua, aur maain ne tujhe sab dekhnevalon ke samhane boomi par bhsm kar dala haai." 
Ezekiel28:19 desh desh ke logon men se jitane tujhe janate haain sab tere karan vismait hue too bhy ka karan hua haai aur fir kabhee paya n jaaega. 
Ezekiel28:20 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel28:21 he manushy ke santan, apana mukh seedon kee or karake usake viruddh bhavishyadanee kar," 
Ezekiel28:22 aur kah, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, he seedon, maain tere viruddh hoo maain tere beech apanee mahima karaunga. jab maain usake beech dand doonga aur us men apane ko pavitra ttharaunga, tab log jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel28:23 maain us men maree faailaunga, aur usakee sadkon men lohoo bahaunga aur usake charon or talavar chalegee tab usake beech ghaayal log girenge, aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel28:24 aur israaael ke gharane ke charon or kee jitanee jatiyan unake sath aabhaiman ka bartav karatee haai, un men se koi unaka chubhnevala katta va bedhanevala shool fir n ttharegee tab ve jan lengee ki maain parameshvar yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel28:25 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jab men israaael ke gharane ko un sab logon men se ikattha karoonga, jinake beech ve titara-abitar huae haai, aur desh desh ke logon ke samhane unake dara paavitra ttharoonga, tab ve us desh men vas karenge jo maain ne apane das yakoob ko diya tha." 
Ezekiel28:26 ve us men nidr base rahenge ve ghar banakar aur dakh kee baariyan lagakar nidr rahenge tab maain unake charon or ke sab logon ko dand doonga jo un se aabhaiman ka bartav karate haai, tab ve jan lenge ki unaka parameshvar yahova hee haai." 
Ezekiel29:1 dasaven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke barahaven din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel29:2 he manushy ke santan, apana mukh misra ke raja firaun kee or karake usake aur sare misra ke viruddh bhavishyadanee kara" 
Ezekiel29:3 yah kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, he misra ke raja firaun, maain tere viruddh hoo, he bade nagar, too jo apanee nadiyon ke beech pada rahata haai, jis ne kaha haai ki meree nadee meree nij kee haai, aur maain hee ne usako apane liye banaya haai." 
Ezekiel29:4 maain tere jabadon men akade daloonga, aurateree nadiyon kee machhliyon ko teree khal men chipattaunga, aur teree khal men chipattee hui teree nadiyon kee sab machhliyon samet tujh ko teree naadiyon men se nikaloonga." 
Ezekiel29:5 tab maain tujhe teree nadiyon kee saree machhaliyon samet jangal men nikal doonga, aur too maaidan men pada rahega kisee bhee prakar se teree suadhai n lee jaaegee. maain ne tujhe vanapashuuon aur akash ke paakshiayon ka ahar kar diya haai." 
Ezekiel29:6 tab misra ke sare nivasee jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. ve to israaael ke gharane ke liye narakatt kee ttek tthare the. 
Ezekiel29:7 jab unhon ne tujh par hath ka bal diya tab too toott gaya aur unake pakhaude ukhd hee gaae aur jab unhon ne tujh par ttek lagai, tab too toott gaya, aur unakee kamar kee saree nasen chaddh gai." 
Ezekiel29:8 is karan prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain tujh par talavar chalavakar, tere manushy aur pashu, sabhon ko nash karoonga." 
Ezekiel29:9 tab misra desh ujad hee ajad hoga aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. ds ne kaha haai ki meree nadee meree apanee hee haai, aur maain hee ne use banaya." 
Ezekiel29:10 is karan dek, maain tere aur teree nadiyon ke viruddh hoo, aur misra desh ko migdol se lekar savene tak varan koosh desh ke sivane tak ujad hee ujad kar doonga." 
Ezekiel29:11 chalees varsha tak us men manushy va pashu ka panv tak n padega aur n us men koi basega. 
Ezekiel29:12 chalees varsha tak maain misra desh ko ujade huae deshaen ke beech ujad kar rakoonga aur usake nagar ujade huae nagaron ke beech khndhar hee rahenge. maain misiryon ko jati jati men chhnnai-abhainn kar doonga, aur desh desh men titara-abitar kar doonga." 
Ezekiel29:13 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai ki chalees varsha ke beetane par maain misiryon ko un jatiyon ke beech se ikattha karoonga, jin men ve titara-abitar huae" 
Ezekiel29:14 aur maain misiryon ko bandhauai se chhudakar patraas desh me, jo unakee janmaboomi haai, fir pahunchaunga aur vahan unaka chhotta sa rajy ho jaaega." 
Ezekiel29:15 vah sab rajyon men se chhotta hoga, aur fir apana sir aur jatiyon ke upar n uttaaega kyonki maain misiryon ko aeesa ghattaunga ki ve anyajaatiyon par fir prabhuta n karane paaenge." 
Ezekiel29:16 aur vah fir israaael ke gharane ke bhrose ka karan n hoga, kyonki jab ve fir unakee bor dekhne lage, tab ve unake adharma ko smaran karenge. aur tab ve jan lenge ki maain parameshvar yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel29:17 fir sattaisaven varsha ke pahale maheene ke pahile din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel29:18 he manushy ke santan, babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne sor ke ghorane men apanee sena se bada parishram karaya har aek ka sir chandala ho gaya, aur har aek ke kandhaen ka chamada ud gaya taubhee usako sor se n to is bade paarishram kee majadooree kuchh milee aur n usakee sena ko." 
Ezekiel29:19 is karan parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, dek, maain babul ke raja nabookadanessar ko misra desh doonga aur vah usakee bheed ko le jaaega, aur usakee dhan sampaattai ko loottkar apana kar lega so yahee pajadooree usakee sena ko milegee." 
Ezekiel29:20 maain ne usake parishram ke badale men usako misra desh is karan diya haai ki un logon ne mere liye kam kiya tha, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee he." 
Ezekiel29:21 usee samay maain israael ke gharane ka ek seeng ugaunga, aur unake beech tera munh kholoonga. aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel30:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel30:2 he manushy ke santan, bhvishyadanee karake kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, hay, hay karo, hay us din par!" 
Ezekiel30:3 kyonaki vah din arthata yahova ka din nikatt haai vah badalon ka din, aur jaatiyon ke dand ka samay hoga." 
Ezekiel30:4 misra men talavar chalegee, aur jab misra men log mare jakar girenge, tab koosh men bhee sankatt padega, log misra ko loott le laaenge, aur usakee teven ulatt dee jaaengee." 
Ezekiel30:5 koosha, poot, lood aur sab dogale, aur koob log, aur vacha bandho huae desh ke nivasee, misiryon ke sang talavar se mare jaaenge." 
Ezekiel30:6 yahova yon kahata haai, misra ke sanbhalanevale bhee gir jaaenge, aur apanee jis samarth par misraee foolate haai, vah toottegee migdol se lekar savene tak usake nivasee talavar se mare jaaenge, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel30:7 aur ve ujade huae deshaen ke beech ujade ttharenge, aur unake nagar khndhar kiae huae nagaron men gine jaaenge." 
Ezekiel30:8 jab maain misra men ag lagaunga. aur usake sab sahayak nash honge, tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel30:9 us samay mere samhane se doot jahajaon par chaddhkar nidr nikalenge aur kooshaiyon ko draenge aur un par aeesa sankatt padega jaaisa ki misra ke dand ke samaya kyonki dak, vah din ata haai!" 
Ezekiel30:10 parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, maain babul ke raja nabookadanessar ke hath se misra kee bheed-bhad ko nash kara doonga." 
Ezekiel30:11 vah apanee praja samet, jo sab jatiyon men bhyanak haai, us desh ke nash karane ko pahunchaya jaaega aur ve misra ke viruddh talavar kheenchakar desh ko mare huon se bhr denge." 
Ezekiel30:12 aur maain nadiyon ko sukha daloonga, aur desh ko bure logon ke hath kar doonga aur maain paradeashaiyon ke dara desh ko, aur jo kuchh us men haai, ujad kara doonga mujh yahova hee ne yah kaha haai." 
Ezekiel30:13 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain nop men se mooraton ko nash karoonga aur us men kee mooraton ko rahane n doonga fir koi pradhaan misra desh men n uttega aur men misra desh men bhy upajaunga." 
Ezekiel30:14 maain patraes ko ujadoonga, aur soan men ag lagaunga, aur no ko dand doonga." 
Ezekiel30:15 aur seen jo misra ka draddh sthan haai, us par maain apanee jalajalahatt bhdkaunga, aur no kee bheed-bhad ka ant kar daloonga." 
Ezekiel30:16 aur maain misra men ag lagaunga seen bahut thrathraaega aur no faada jaaega aur nop ke virodhaee din dahade uttenge. 
Ezekiel30:17 aven aur peeveset ke javan talavar se girenge, aur ye nagar bandhauai men chale jaaenge." 
Ezekiel30:18 jab maain misiryon ke juon ko tahapanhes men todoonga, tab us men din ko andhora hoga, aur usakee samarth jis par vah foolata haai, vah nash ho jaaegee us par ghatta chha jaaegee aur usakee bettyaian bandhauai men chalee jaaengee." 
Ezekiel30:19 is prakar maain misiryon ko dand doonga. aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel30:20 fir gyarahaven varsha ke paahile maheene ke sataven din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel30:21 he manushy ke santan, maain ne misra ke raja firaun kee bhuja tod dee haai aur dekh? n to vah jodee gai, n us par lep lagakar pattee chaddhai gai ki vah bandhane se talavar pakadne ke yogy ban sake." 
Ezekiel30:22 so prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain misra ke raja firaun ke viruddh hoo, aur usakee achchhee aur toottee deenon bhujaon ko todoonga aur talavar ko usake hath se giraunga." 
Ezekiel30:23 maain misiryon ko jati jati men titara-abitar karoonga, aur desh desh men chhtairaunga." 
Ezekiel30:24 aur maain babul ke raja kee bhujaon ko balee karake apanee talavar usake hath men doonga parantu firaun kee bhujaon ko todoonga, aur vah usake samhane aeesa karahega jaaisa maranahar ghaayal karahata haai." 
Ezekiel30:25 maain babul ke raja kee bhujaon ko sambhaloonga, aur firaun kee bhujaaen ddheelee padengee, tab ve janenge ki maain yahova hoo. jab maain babul ke raja ke hath men apanee talavar doonga, tab vah use misra desh par chalaaega" 
Ezekiel30:26 aur maain misiryon ko jati jati men titara-abitar karoonga aur desh desh men chhtaira doonga. tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel31:1 gyarahaven varsha ke teesare maheene ke pahile din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel31:2 he manushy ke santan, misra ke raja firaun aur usakee bheed se kah, apanee badai men too kis ke saman haai." 
Ezekiel31:3 dek, ashshoor to labanon ka aek devadar tha jisakee sundar sundar shaakhe, ghanee chhaya deteen aur badee unchee thee, aur usakee faunagee badalon tak pahunchatee thee." 
Ezekiel31:4 jal ne use baddhaya, us gaahire jal ke karan vah uncha hua, jis se nadiyan usake sthan ke charon or bahatee thee, aur usakee naliyan nikalakar maaidan ke sare vrakshaen ke pas pahunchatee theen." 
Ezekiel31:5 is karan usakee unchai maaidan ke sab vrakshaen se aadhaik hui usakee tthaniyan bahut hui, aur usakee shaakhaaen lambee ho gai, kyonaki jab ve nikalee, tab unako bahut jal mila." 
Ezekiel31:6 usakee tthaniyon men akash ke sab prakar ke pakshaee basera karate the, aur usakee shaakhaon ke neeche maaidan ke sab bhanti ke jeevajantu janmate the aur usakee chhaya men sab badee jatiyan rahatee theen." 
Ezekiel31:7 vah apanee badai aur apanee daliyon kee lambai ke karan sundar hua kyonki usakee jad bahut jal ke nikatt thee. 
Ezekiel31:8 parameshvar kee baree ke devadar bhee usako n chhpai sakate the, sanaubar usakee tthaaniyon ke saman bhee n the, aur n aman vraksha usakee shaakhaon ke tuly the parameshvar kee baree ka bhee koi vraksha sundarata men usake barabar n tha." 
Ezekiel31:9 maain ne use daaliyon kee bahutayat se sundar banaya tha, yahan tak ki aeden ke sab vraksha jo parameshvar kee baree men the, us se dah karate the." 
Ezekiel31:10 is karan parameshvar yahova ne yon kaha haai, usakee unchai jo baddh gai, aur usakee faunagee jo badalon tak pahunchee haai, aur apanee unchai ke karan usaka man jo fool utta haai," 
Ezekiel31:11 isaliye jaatiyon men jo samath haai, maain usee ke hath usako kar doonga, aur vah nishchay us se bura vyavahar karega. usakee dushttta ke karan maain ne usako nikal diya haai." 
Ezekiel31:12 paradeshae, jo jaatiyon men bhyanak log haai, ve usako kattkar chhod denge, usakee daaliyan pahadon par, aur sab taraiyon men girai jaaengee, aur usakee shaakhaaen desh ke sab nalon men toottee padee rahengee, aur jati jati ke sab log usakee chhaya ko chhodkar chale jaaenge." 
Ezekiel31:13 us gire huae vraksha par akash ke sab pakshaee basera karate haai, aur usakee shaakhaon ke upar maaidan ke sab jeevajantu chaddhne pate haain." 
Ezekiel31:14 yah isaliye hua haai ki jal ke pas ke sab vrakshaen men se koi apanee unchai n baddhaa, n apanee faunagee ko badalon tak pahunchaa, aur un men se jitane jal pakar draddh ho gaae haain ve unche hone ke karan sir n uttaaen kyonki ve bhee sab ke sab kabar men gade huae manushyon ke saman mratyu ke vash karake adhaelok men dal diae jaaenge." 
Ezekiel31:15 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jis din vah adhaelok men utar gaya, us din maain ne vilap karaya aur gaahire samudra ko ddhanp diya, aur naadiyon ka bahut jal ruk gaya aur usake karan maain ne labanon par udasee chha dee, aur maaidan ke sab vraksha moorchhri hue." 
Ezekiel31:16 jab maain ne usako kabar men gade huon ke pas adhaelok men faenk diya, tab usake girane ke shabd se jaati jati thrathra gai, aur aeden ke sab vraksha arthata labanon ke uttam uttam vrakshaen ne, jitane us se jal pate haai, un sabhon ne adhaelok men shaaantai pai." 
Ezekiel31:17 ve bhee usake sang talavar se mare huon ke pas adhaelok men utar gaae arthata ve jo usakee bhuja the, aur jati jati ke beech usakee chhaya men rahate the." 
Ezekiel31:18 so maahima aur badai ke vishay men aeden ke vrakshaen men se too kis ke saman haai? too to aeden ke aur vrakshaen ke sath adhaelok men utara jaaega, aur khtanaheen logon ke beech talavar se mare huon ke sang pada rahega. firaun apanee saree bhed-bhad samet yon hee hoga, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel32:1 barahaven varsha ke barahaven maheene ke pahile din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel32:2 he manushy ke santan, misra ke raja firaun ke vishay vilap ka geet banakar usako suna jati jati men teree upama javan sinh se dee gai thee, parantu too samudra ke magar ke saman haai too apanee nadiyon men toott pada, aur unake jal ko panvon se mathkar gandala kar diya." 
Ezekiel32:3 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain bahut see jatiyon kee sabha ke dara tujh par apana jal faailaunga, aur ve tujhe mere mahajal men kheench lenge." 
Ezekiel32:4 tab maain tujhe boomi par chhodoonga, aur maaidan men faenkakar akash ke sab pakshiayon ko tujh par baaittaunga aur tere mans se saree prathvee ke jeevajantuon ko trapt karoonga." 
Ezekiel32:5 maain tere mans ko pahadon par rakoonga, aur taraiyon ko teree unchai se bhr doonga." 
Ezekiel32:6 aur jis desh men too taairata haai, usako pahadon tak maain tere lohoo se kheenchoonga aur usake nale tujh se bhr jaaenge." 
Ezekiel32:7 jis samay maain tujhe mittane lagoo, us samay maain akash ko ddhanpoonga aur taron ko dhaundhala kar doonga maain soorya ko badal se chhpaiaunga, aur chandrama apana prakash n dega." 
Ezekiel32:8 akash men jitanee prakashaman jyotiyan haai, un sab ko maain tere karan dhaundhala kar doonga, aur tere desh men andhakar kar doonga, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel32:9 jab maain tere vinash ka samachar jati jati men aur tere anajane deshaen men faailaunga, tab bade bade deshaen ke logon ke man men ris upajaunga." 
Ezekiel32:10 maain bahut see jaatiyon ko tere karan vismait kar doonga, aur jab maain unake rajaon ke samhane apanee talavar bhejoonga, tab tere karan unake roaen khde ho jaaenge, aur tere girane ke din ve apane apane praan ke liye kanpate rahenge." 
Ezekiel32:11 kyonaki pameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, babul ke raja kee talavar tujh par chalegee." 
Ezekiel32:12 maain teree bheed ko aeese shooraveeron kee talavaron ke dara giraunga jo sab jatiyon me bhyanak haain. ve misra ke ghamand ko todenge, aur usakee saree bheed ka satyanash hoga." 
Ezekiel32:13 maain usake sab pashuuon ko usake bahutere jalashayon ke teer par se nash karoonga aur bhavishy men ve n to manushy ke panv se aur n pashuuon ke khuron se gandale kiae jaaenge. 
Ezekiel32:14 tab maain unaka jal nirmal kar doonga, aur unakee nadiyan tel kee nai bahengee, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel32:15 jab maain misra desh ko ujad kar doonga aur jis se vah bhrapoor haai, us se choochha kar doonga, aur jab maain usake sab rahanevalon ko maroonga, tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel32:16 logon ke vilap karane ke liye vilap ka geet yahee haai jaati-jati kee striayan ise gaaengee misra aur usakee saree bheed ke vishay ve yahee vilapageet gaaengee, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel32:17 fir barahaven varsha ke pahile maheene ke pandrahaven din ko yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel32:18 he manushy ke santan, misra kee bheed ke liye haya-hay kar, aur usako pratapee jatiyon kee beattyaien samet kabar men gade huon ke pas adhaelok men utara." 
Ezekiel32:19 too kis se manohar haai? too utarakar khtanaheenon ke sang pada raha. 
Ezekiel32:20 ve talavar se mare huon ke beech girenge, un ke liye talavar hee ttharai gai haai so misra ko usakee saree bheed samet ghaseett le jao." 
Ezekiel32:21 samath shooraveer us se aur usake sahayakon se adhaelok men baten karenge ve khtanaheen log vahan talavar se mare pade haain. 
Ezekiel32:22 apanee saree sabha samet ashshoor bhee vahan haai, usakee kabaren usake charon or haain sab ke sab talavar se mare gaae haain." 
Ezekiel32:23 usakee kabaren gadhe ke konon men banee hui haai, aur usakee kabar ke charon or usakee sabha haai ve sab ke sab jo jeevanalok men bhy upajate the, ab talavar se mare pade haain." 
Ezekiel32:24 vahan aelam haai, aur usakee kabar kee charon or usakee saree bheed haai ve sab ke sab talavar se mare gaae haai, ve khtanaheen adhaelok men utar gaae haain ve jeevanalok men bhy upajate the, parantu ab kabar men aur gade huon ke sang unake munh par bhee siyahee chhai hui haai." 
Ezekiel32:25 usakee saree bheed samet use mare huon ke beech sej milee, usakee kabaren usee ke charon or haai, ve sab ke sab khtanaheen talavar se mare gae unhon ne jeevanalok men bhy upajaya tha, parantu ab kabar men aur gade huon ke sang unake munh par siyahee chhai hui haai aur ve mare huon ke beech rakhe gaae haain." 
Ezekiel32:26 vahan saree bheed samet meshok aur toobal haai, unake charon or kabaren haain ve sab ke sab khtanaheen talavar se mare gaa, kyonki jeevanalok men ve bhy upajate the." 
Ezekiel32:27 aur un gire huae khtanaheen shooraveeron ke sang ve pade n rahenge jo apane apane yuddh ke haathaiyar liae huae adhaelok men utar gaae haai, vahan unakee talavaren unake siron ke neeche rakhee hui haai, aur unake adharma ke kam unakee haddiyon men vyape haain kyonaki jeevanalok men un se shooraveeron ko bhee bhy upajata tha." 
Ezekiel32:28 isaliye too bhee khtanaheenon ke sang anga-bhng hokar talavar se mare huon ke sang pada rahega. 
Ezekiel32:29 vahan aedom aur usake raja aur usake sare pradhaan haai, jo parakramee hone par bhee talavar se mare huon ke sang rakhe haain gadhe men gade huae khtanaheen logon ke sang ve bhee pade rahenge." 
Ezekiel32:30 vahan uttar disha ke sare pradhaan aur sare seedonee bhee haain jo mare huon ke sang utar gaae unhon ne apane parakram se bhy upajaya tha, parantu ab ve laajjait huae aur talavar se aur mare huon ke sath ve bhee khtanaheen pade huae haai, aur kabar men any gade huon ke sang unake munh par bhee siyahee chhai hui haai." 
Ezekiel32:31 inhen dekhkar firaun bhee apanee saree bheed ke vishay men shaantai paaega, han firaun aur usakee saree sena jo talavar se maree gai haai, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel32:32 kyonaki maain ne usake karan jeevanalok men bhy upajaya tha isaaliye vah saree bheed samet talavar se aur mare huon ke sahit khtanaheenon ke beech littaya jaaega, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel33:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel33:2 he manushy ke santan, apane logon se kah, jab maain kisee desh par talavar chalane lagoo, aur us desh ke log kisee ko apana paharua karake ttharaae," 
Ezekiel33:3 tab yaadi vah yah dekhkar ki is desh par talavar chala chahatee haai, narasinga foonkakar logon ko chita de," 
Ezekiel33:4 to jo koi naraasinge ka shabd sunane par n chete aur talavar ke chalane se mar jaa, usaka koon usee ke sir padega." 
Ezekiel33:5 us ne narasinge ka shabd suna, paranatu n cheta so usaka koon usee ko lagega. parantu, yadi vah chet jata, to apana praan bacha leta." 
Ezekiel33:6 parantu yadi paharua yah dekhne par ki talavar chala chahatee haai narasinga foonkakar logon ko n chitaa, aur talavar ke chalane se un men se koi mar jaa, to vah to apane adharma men fansa hua mar jaaega, parantu usake khun ka lekha maain paharuae hee se loonga." 
Ezekiel33:7 isaliye, he manushy ke santan, maain ne tujhe israaael ke gharane ka paharua tthara diya haai tu mere munh se vachan sun sunakar unhon meree or se chita de." 
Ezekiel33:8 yaadi maain dushtt se kahoo, he dusht, too nishchay marega, tab yadi too dushtt ko usake marga ke vishay n chitaa, to vah dushtt apane adharma men fansa hua marega, parantu usake koon ka lekha men tujhee se loonga." 
Ezekiel33:9 parantu yadi too dushtt ko usake marga ke vishay chitaae ki vah apane marga se fire aur vah apane marga me n fire, to vah to apane adharma men fansa hua marega, parantu too apana praan bacha lega." 
Ezekiel33:10 fir he manushy ke santan, israaael ke gharane se yah kah, tum log kahate ho, hamare aparadhaen aur papon ka bhar hamare upar lada hua haai aur ham usake karan galate jate haain ham kaaise jeeavit rahen?" 
Ezekiel33:11 so too ne un se yah kah, parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, maain dushtt ke marane se kuchh bhee prasann naheen hota, parantu is se ki dushtt apane marga se firakar jeevit rahe he israaael ke gharane, tum apane apane bure marga se fir jao tum kyon maro?" 
Ezekiel33:12 aur he manushy ke santan, apane logon se yah kah, jab dhama jan aparadha kare tab usaka dharma use bacha n sakega aur dushtt kee dushttta bhee jo ho, jab vah us se fir jaa, to usake karan vah n girega aur dhama jan jab vah pap kare, tab apane dharma ke karan jeevit n rahega." 
Ezekiel33:13 yaadi maain dhama se kahoon ki too nishchay jeevit rahega, aur vah apane dharma par bhrosa karake kuattlai kam karane lage, tab usake dharma ke kamon men se kisee ka smaran n kiya jaaega jo kuttlai kam us ne kiae hon vah unhee men fansa hua marega." 
Ezekiel33:14 fir jab maain dushtt se kahoo, too dishchay marega, aur vah apane pap se firakar nyay aur dharma ke kam karane lage," 
Ezekiel33:15 arthata yaadi dushtt jan bandhak faer de, apanee loottee hui vastuen bhr de, aur bina kuattlai kam kiae jeevanadayak vidhaiyon par chalane lage, to vah n marega vah nishchay jeevit rahega." 
Ezekiel33:16 jitane pap us ne kiae ho, un men se kisee ka smaran n kiya jaaega us ne nyay aur dharma ke kam kiae aur vah nishchay jeevit rahega." 
Ezekiel33:17 taubhee tumhare log kahate haai, prabhu kee chal tteek naheen parantu unheen kee chaj tteek naheen haai." 
Ezekiel33:18 jab dhama apane dharma se firakar kuttlai kam karane lage, tab nishchay vah un men fansa hua mar jaaega." 
Ezekiel33:19 aur jab dushtt apanee dushttta se firakar nyay aur dharma ke kam karane lage, tab vah unake karan jeevit rahega." 
Ezekiel33:20 taubhee tum kahate ho ki prabhu kee chal tteek naheen? he israaael ke gharane, maain har aek vyaktai ka nyay usakee chal hee ke anusar karoonga." 
Ezekiel33:21 fir hamaree bandhauai ke gyarahaven varsha ke dasaven maheene ke panchaven din ko, aek vyaaktai jo yarooshalem se bhagakar bach gaya tha, vah mere pas akar kahane laga, nagar le liya gaya." 
Ezekiel33:22 us bhage huae ke ane se pahile sanjh ko yahova kee shaktai mujh par hui thee aur bhor tak arthata us manushy ke ane tak us ne mera munh khol diya yo mera muh khula hee raha, aur maain fir goonga n raha." 
Ezekiel33:23 tab yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel33:24 he manushy ke santan, israaael kee boomi ke un khndharon ke rahanevale yah kahate haai, ibraaheem aek hee manushy tha, taubhee desh ka aadhaikaree hua parantu ham log bahut se haai, isaaliye desh nishchay hamare hee adhaikar men diya gaya haai." 
Ezekiel33:25 is karan too un se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, tum log to mans lohoo samet khate aur apanee mooraton kee or drashtti karate, aur hatya karate ho fir kya tum us desh ke adhaikaree rahane paoge?" 
Ezekiel33:26 tum apanee apanee talavar par bhrosa karate aur ghainaune kam karate, aur apane apane padosee kee sree ko ashuuddh karate ho fir kya tum us desh ke adhaikaree rahane paoge?" 
Ezekiel33:27 too un se yah kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, nisandeh jo log khndharon men rahate haai, ve talavar se girenge, aur jo khule maaidan men rahata haai, use maain jeevajantuon ka ahar kar doonga, aur jo gaddhon aur gufaaon men rahate haai, ve maree se marenge." 
Ezekiel33:28 aur maain us desh ko ujad hee ujad kar doonga aur usake bal ka ghamand jata rahega aur israaael ke pahad aeese ujadenge ki un par hokar koi n chalega. 
Ezekiel33:29 so jab maain un logon ke kiae huae sab ghainaune kamon ke karan us desh ko ujad hee ujad kar doonga, tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel33:30 aur he manushy ke santan, tere log bheeton ke pas aur gharon ke daron men tere vishay men baten karate aur aek doosare se kahate haai, ao, suno, ki yahova kee or se kaun sa vachan nikalata haai." 
Ezekiel33:31 ve praja kee nai tere pas ate aur meree praja banakar tere samhane baaittkar tere vachan sunate haai, parantu ve un par chalate naheen munh se to ve bahut praem dikhate haai, parantu unaka man lalach hee men laga rahata haai." 
Ezekiel33:32 aur too unakee draashtti men praem ke madhaur geet ganevale aur achchhe bajanevale ka sa tthara haai, kyonaki ve tere vachan sunate to haai, parantu un par chalate naheen." 
Ezekiel33:33 so jab yah bat ghattegee, aur vah nishchay ghattegee! tab ve jan lenge ki hamare beech aek bhvishyadvkta aya tha." 
Ezekiel34:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel34:2 he manushy ke santan, israaael ke charavahon ke viruddh bhavishyadanee karake un charavahon se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, hay israaael ke charavahon par jo apane apane pett bhrate haain! kya charavahon ko bhed- bakaariyon ka pett n bhrana chahiae?" 
Ezekiel34:3 tum log chaba khate, un paahinate aur motte motte pashuuon ko kattte ho parantu bhed-bakaariyon ko tum naheen charate." 
Ezekiel34:4 tum ne beemaron ko balavan n kiya, n rogiyon ko changa kiya, n ghayalon ke ghaavon ko bandha, n nikalee hui ko faer laa, n khorira iui ko khoja, parantu tum ne bal aur jabaradastee se adhaikar chalaya haai." 
Ezekiel34:5 ve charavahe ke n hone ke karan titara-abitar hui aur sab vanapashuuon ka ahar ho gai. 
Ezekiel34:6 meree bhed-bakaariyan titara-abitar hui haai ve sare pahadon aur unche unche tteelon par bhttkatee theen meree bhed-bakaariyan saree prathvee ke upar titara-abitar hui aur n to koi unakee sudhai leta tha, n koi unako ddoonddhta tha." 
Ezekiel34:7 is kara, he charavaho, yahova ka vachan suno." 
Ezekiel34:8 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, meree bhed-bakaariyan jo lutt gai, aur meree bhed-bakaariyan jo charavahe ke n hone ke karan sab vanapashuuon ka ahar ho gai aur isaaliye ki mere charavahon ne meree bhed-bakaariyon kee suadhai naheen lee, aur meree bhed- bakaariyon ka pett nahee, apana hee apana pett bhra" 
Ezekiel34:9 is karan he charavaho, yahova ka vachan suno," 
Ezekiel34:10 parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, dekho, maain charavahon ke viruddh hoo aur maain un se apanee bhed-bakaariyon ka lekha loonga, aur unako fir unhen charane n doonga ve fir apana apana pett bhrane n paaenge. maain apanee bhed-bakaariyan unake munh se chhudaunga ki age ko ve unaka ahar n hon." 
Ezekiel34:11 kyonaki parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain ap hee apanee bhed-kariyon kee suadhai doonga, aur unhen ddoonddhoonga." 
Ezekiel34:12 jaaise charavaha apanee bhed-bakaariyon men se bhttkee hui ko fir se apane jhund men battorata haai, vaaise hee maain bhee apanee bhed-bakaariyon ko battoroonga maain unhe un sab sthanon se nikal le aunga, jahan jahan ve badal aur ghaer andhakar ke din titara-abitar ho gai hon." 
Ezekiel34:13 aur maain unhon desh desh ke logon men se nikaloonga, aur desh desh se iattha karoonga, aur unheen ke nij boomi men le aunga aur israaael ke pahadon par or nalon men aur us desh ke sab base huae sthanon men charaunga." 
Ezekiel34:14 maain unhen achchhee charai men charaunga, aur israaael ke unche unche pahadon par unako charai milegee vahan ve achchhee haariyalee men baaitta karengee, aur israaael ke pahadon par uttam se uttam charai charengee." 
Ezekiel34:15 maain ap hee apanee bhed-bakaariyon ka charavaha hoonga, aur maain ap hee unhen baaittaunga, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel34:16 maain khoi hui ko ddoonddhoonga, aur nikalee hui ko faer launga, aur ghaayal ke ghaav bandhoonga, aur beemar ko balavana karoonga, aur jo mottee aur balavant haain unhen maain nash karoonga maain unakee charavahee nyay se karoonga." 
Ezekiel34:17 aur he mere jhun, tum se parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dekho maain bhed-bhed ke beech aur meddhon aur bakaron ke beech nyay karata hoo." 
Ezekiel34:18 kya tumhen yah chhottee bat jan padtee haai ki tum achchhee charai char lo aur shosh charai ko apane panvon se raundo aur kya tumhen yah chhottee bat jan padtee haai ki tum nirmal jal pee lo aur shosh jal ko apane panvon se gandala karo? 
Ezekiel34:19 aur kya meree bhed-bakaariyon ko tumhare panvon se raunde huae ko charana, aur tumhare panvon se gandale kiae huae ko peena padega?" 
Ezekiel34:20 is karan parameshvar yahova un se yon kahata haai, dekho, maain ap mottee aur dubalee bhed-bakaariyon ke beech nyay karoonga." 
Ezekiel34:21 tum jo sab beemaron ko panjar aur kandho se yahan tak ddhkelate aur seeng se yahan tak marate ho ki ve titara-abitar ho jatee haai," 
Ezekiel34:22 is karan maain apanee bhed-bakaariyon ko chhudaunga, aur ve fir n luttengee, aur maain bhed-bhed ke aur bakaree-bakaree ke beech nyay karoonga." 
Ezekiel34:23 aur maain un par aeesa aek charavaha ttharaunga jo unakee charavahee karega, vah mera das daud hoga, vahee unako charaaega, aur vahee unaka charavaha hoga." 
Ezekiel34:24 aur maai, yahova, unaka parameshvar ttharoonga, aur mera das daud unake beech pradhaan hoga mujh yahova hee ne yah kaha haai." 
Ezekiel34:25 maain unake sath shaaantai kee vacha bandhoonga, aur dushtt jantuon ko desh men n rahane doonga so ve jangal men nidr rahenge, aur van men soaenge." 
Ezekiel34:26 aur maain unhen aur apanee pahadee ke as pas ke sthanon ko ashaeesh ka karan bana doonga aur menh ko maain tteek samay men barasaya karoonga aur ve ashaeeshaen kee vashara hongee. 
Ezekiel34:27 aur maaidan ke vraksha falenge aur boomi apanee upaj upajaaegee, aur ve apane desh men nidr rahenge jab maain unake jooae ko todkar un logon ke hath se chhudaunga, jo un se seva karate haai, tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel34:28 ve fir jati-jati se lootte n jaaenge, aur n vanapashu unhen faad khaaenge ve nidr rahenge, aur unako koi n draaega." 
Ezekiel34:29 aur maain unake liye mahan bariyen upajaunga, aur ve desh men fir bookhon n marenge, aur n jaati-jati ke log fir unakee ninda karenge." 
Ezekiel34:30 aur ve janenge ki maain parameshvar yahova, unake sang hoo, aur ve jo israaael ka gharana haai, ve meree praja haai, mujh parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haain." 
Ezekiel34:31 tum to meree bhed-bakaariya, meree charai kee bhed-bakaariyan ho, tum to manushy ho, aur maain tumhara parameshvar hoo, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel35:1 yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel35:2 he manushy ke santan, apana munh seir pahad kee or karake usake viruddh bhavishyadanee kar," 
Ezekiel35:3 aur us se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, he seir pahad, maain tere viruddh hoo aur apana hath tere viruddh baddhakar tujhe ujad hee ujad kar doonga." 
Ezekiel35:4 maain tere nagaron ko khndhar kar doonga, aur too ujad ho jaaega tab too jan lega ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel35:5 kyonaki too israaaeliyon se yuga-yug kee shatrauta rakhta tha, aur unakee vipaattai ke samay jab unake adharma ke dand ka samay pahuncha, tab unhen talavar se mare jane ko de diya." 
Ezekiel35:6 isaliye parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee saugandha, maain tujhe hatya kiae jane ke liye taaiyar karoonga or koon tera peechha karega too to koon se n ghainata tha, as karan koon tera peechha karega." 
Ezekiel35:7 is reeati maain seir pahad ko ujad hee ujad kar doonga, aur jo us men ata-jata ho, maain usako nash karoonga." 
Ezekiel35:8 aur maain usake pahadon ko mare huon se bhr doonga tere tteelo, taraiyon aur sab nalon men talavar se mare huae girenge!" 
Ezekiel35:9 maain tujhe yug yug ke liye ujad kar doonga, aur tere nagar fir n basenge. tab tum jan lage ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel35:10 kyonaki too ne kaha haai, ki ye donon jaatiyan aur ye donon desh mere honge aur ham hee unake svamee ho jaaenge, yadhyapi yahova vahan tha." 
Ezekiel35:11 is kara, parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee sauganadha, tere kop ke anusar, aur jo jalajalahatt too ne un par apane vaair ke karan kee haai, usee ke anusar maain tujh se bartav karoonga, aur jab maain tera nyay karoo, tab tum men apane ko pragatt karoonga." 
Ezekiel35:12 aur too janega, ki mujh yahova ne teree sab tiraskar kee baten sunee haai, jo too ne israaael ke pahadon ke vishay men kahee, ki, ve to ujad gaa, ve ham hee ko diae gaae haain ki ham unhen kha dalen." 
Ezekiel35:13 tum ne apane muunh se mere viruddh badai maree, aur mere viruddh bahut baten kahee haain ise maain ne suna haai." 
Ezekiel35:14 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jab prathvee bhr men anand hoga, tab maain tujhe ujad karoonga." 
Ezekiel35:15 too israaael ke gharane ke nij bhag ke ujad jane ke karan anaandait hua, so maain bhee tujh se vaaisa hee karoonga he seir pahad, he aedom ke sare desha, too ujad ho jaaega. tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel36:1 fir he manushy ke santan, too israaael ke pahadon se bhavishyadanee karake kah, he israaael ke pahado, yahova ka vachan suno." 
Ezekiel36:2 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, shatra ne to tumhare vishay men kaha haai, aha! praacheenakal ke unche sthan ab hamare adhaikar men a gaae." 
Ezekiel36:3 is karan bhvishyadanee karake kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, logon ne jo tumhen ujada aur charon or se tumhen aeesa nigal liya ki tum bachee hui jatiyon ka aadhaikar ho jao, aur lutare tumharee charcha karate aur sadhaaran log tumharee ninda karate haain" 
Ezekiel36:4 is kara, he israaael ke pahado, parameshvar yahova ka vachan suno, parameshvar yahova tum se yon kahata haai, arthata pahadon aur pahaadiyon se aur nalon aur taraiyon se, aur ujade huae khndharon aur nirjan nagaron se jo charon or kee bachee hui jatiyon se lutt gaae aur unake hansane ke karan ho gaae haain" 
Ezekiel36:5 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, nishchay maain ne apanee jalan kee ag men bachee hui jatiyon ke aur sare aedom ke viruddh men kaha haai ki jinhon ne mere desh ko apane man ke poore anand aur abhaiman se apane aadhaikar men kiya haai ki vah paraya hokar lootta jaae." 
Ezekiel36:6 is karan israaael ke desh ke vishay men bhavishyadanee karake pahado, pahaadiyo, nalo, aur taraiyon se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, tum ne jatiyon kee ninda sahee haai, is karan maain apanee badee jalajalahatt se bola hoo." 
Ezekiel36:7 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain ne yah shapath khai haai ki nisandeh tumhare charon or jo jaatiyan haai, unako apanee ninda ap hee sahanee padegee." 
Ezekiel36:8 parantu, he israaael ke pahado, tum par daliyan panapengee aur unake fal meree praja israaael ke liye lagenge kyonki usaka lautt ana nikatt haai." 
Ezekiel36:9 aur dekho, maain tumhare paksha men hoo, aur tumharee or krapadraashtti karoonga, aur tum jote-boae jaoge" 
Ezekiel36:10 aur maain tum par bahut manushy arthata israaael ke sare gharane ko basaunga aur nagar fir basaae aur khndhar fir banaaen jaaenge. 
Ezekiel36:11 aur maain tum par manushy aur pashu donon ko bahut baddhaunga aur ve baddhenge aur foolen-falenge aur maain tum ko praacheenakal kee nai basaunga, aur pahile se aadhaik tumharee bhlai karoonga. tab tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel36:12 aur maain aeesa karoonga ki manushy arthta meree praja israaael tum par chala-afiregee aur ve tumhare svamee honge, aur tum unaka nij bhag honge, aur ve fir tumhare karan nirvash n ho jaaenge." 
Ezekiel36:13 parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, jo log tum se kaha karate haai, ki too manushyon ka khanevala haai, aur apane par basee hui jaati ko tirvash kar deta haai," 
Ezekiel36:14 so fir too manushyon ko n khaega, aur n apane par basee hui jaati ko nirvash karega, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel36:15 aur maain fir jati-jati ke logon se teree ninda n sunavaunga, aur tujhe jaati-jati kee or se fir namadharai n sahanee padegee, aur tujh par basee hui jati ko too fir ttokar n khailaaega, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel36:16 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel36:17 he manushy ke santan, jab israaael ka gharana apane desh men rahata tha, tab apanee chalachalan aur kamon ke dara ve usako ashuuddh karate the unakee chalachalan mujhe retumatee kee ashuuddhta see jan padtee thee." 
Ezekiel36:18 so jo hatya unhon ne desh men kee, aur desh ko apanee mooraton ke dara ashuuddh kiya, isake karan maain ne un par apanee jalajalahatt bhdkai." 
Ezekiel36:19 aur maain ne unhen jati-jati men titara-abitar kiya, aur ve desh desh men chhtair gaae unake chalachalan aur kamon ke anusar maain ne unako dand diya." 
Ezekiel36:20 parantu jab ve un jatiyon men pahunche jin men ve pahunchaae gaa, tab unhon ne mere pavitra nam ko apavitra ttharaya, kyonki log unake vishay men yah kahane lage, ye yahova kee praja haai, parranatu usake desh se nikale gaae haain." 
Ezekiel36:21 parantu maain ne apane paavitra nam kee suadhai lee, jise israaael ke gharane ne un jatiyon ke beech apavitra ttharaya tha, jahan ve gaae the." 
Ezekiel36:22 is karan too israaael ke gharane se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, he israaael ke gharane, maain is ko tumhare nimitt nahee, parantu apane paavitra nam ke nimitt karata hoo jise tum ne un jaatiyon men apavitra ttharaya jahan tum gaae the." 
Ezekiel36:23 aur maain apane bade nam ko pavitra ttharaunga, jo jatiyon men apavitra ttharaya gaya, jise tum ne unake beech apavitra kiya aur jab maain unakee drashtti men tumhare beech paavitra ttharoonga, tab ve jaatiyan jan legee ki maain yahova hoo, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel36:24 maain tum ko jatiyon men se le loonga, aur deshaen men se ikattha karoonga aur tum ko tumhare nij desh men pahuncha doonga." 
Ezekiel36:25 maain tum par shuuddh jal chhdikoonga, aur tum shuuddh ho jaoge aur maain tum ko tumharee saree ashuuddhta aur mooraton se shuuddh karoonga." 
Ezekiel36:26 maain tum ko naya man doonga, aur tumhare bheetar nai atma utpann karoonga aur tumharee deh men se patthr ka day nikalakar tum ko mans ka day doonga." 
Ezekiel36:27 aur maain apana atma tumhare bheetar dekar aeesa karoonga ki tum meree vidhaiyon par chaloge aur mere niyamon ko manakar unake anusar karoge. 
Ezekiel36:28 tum us desh men basoge jo maain ne tumhare pitaron ko diya tha aur tum meree praja ttharoge, aur maain tumhara parameshvar ttharoonga." 
Ezekiel36:29 aur maain tum ko tumharee saree ashuuddhta se chhudaunga, aur ann upajane kee agyaa dekar, use baddhaunga aur tumhare beech akal n daloonga." 
Ezekiel36:30 maain vrakshaen ke fal aur khet kee upaj baddhaunga, ki jatiyon men akal ke karan fir tumharee namadharai n hogee." 
Ezekiel36:31 tab tum apane bure chalachalan aur apane kamon ko jo achchhe naheen the, smaran karake apane adharma aur ghainaune kamon ke karan apane ap se gharana karoge." 
Ezekiel36:32 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, tum jan jo ki maain isako tumhare nimitt naheen karata. he israaael ke gharane apane chalachalan ke vishay men laajjait ho aur tumhara mukh kala ho jaae." 
Ezekiel36:33 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jab maain tum ko tumhare sab adharma ke kamon se shuuddh karoonga, tab tumhare nagaron ko basaunga aur tumhare khndhar fir banaae jaaenge." 
Ezekiel36:34 aur tumhara desh jo sab ane janevalon ke samhane ujad haai, vah ujad hone kee santee jota boya jaaega." 
Ezekiel36:35 aur log kaha karenge, yah desh jo ujad tha, so aeden kee baree sa ho gaya, aur jo nagar khndhar aur ujad ho gaae aur ddhaae gaae the, so gaddhvale hua, aur basaae gaae haain." 
Ezekiel36:36 tab jo jaatiyan tumhare as pas bachee rahengee, so jan lengee ki mujh yahova ne ddhaae huae ko fir banaya, aur ujad men ped rope haai, mujh yahova ne yah kaha, aur aeesa hee karoonga." 
Ezekiel36:37 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, israaael ke gharane men fir mujh se binatee kee jaaegee ki maain unake liye yah karoon arthata maain un men manushyon kee ginatee jhod-bakaariyon kee nai baddhaun." 
Ezekiel36:38 jaaise paavitra samayon kee bhed-bakaariya, arthataniyat pavan ke samay yarooshalem men kee bhed-bakaariyan anaginit hotee haain vaaise hee jo nagar ab khnddhhar haain ve anaginit manushyon ke jhundon se bhr jaaenge. tab ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel37:1 yahova kee shaaktai mujh par hui, aur vah mujh men apana atma samavakar bahar le gaya aur mujhe tarai ke beech khda kar diya vah tarai haaddiyon se bhree hui thee." 
Ezekiel37:2 tab us ne mujhe unake charon or ghaumaya, aur tarai kee tah par bahut hee haaddiyon theen aur ve bahut sookhee theen." 
Ezekiel37:3 tab us ne mujh se poochha, he manushy ke santan, kya ye haaddiyan jee sakatee haain? maain ne kaha, he parameshvar yahova, too hee janata haai." 
Ezekiel37:4 tab us ne mujh se kaha, in haddiyon se bhavishyadanee karake kah, he sookhee haaddiyo, yahova ka vachan suno." 
Ezekiel37:5 parameshvar yahova tum haaddiyon se yon kahata he, dekho, maain ap tum men sans samavaunga, aur tum jee uttogee." 
Ezekiel37:6 aur maain tumharee nasen upajakar mans chaddhaunga, aur tum ko chamade se ddhanpoonga aur tum men sans samavaunga aur tum jee jaogee aur tum jan logee ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel37:7 is agyaa ke anusar maain bhavishyadanee karane laga aur maain bhvishyadanee kar hee raha tha, ki aek ahatt ai, aur bhuidol hua, aur ve haaddiyan ikatthee hokar haddee se haddee jud gai." 
Ezekiel37:8 aur maain dekhta raha, ki un men nasen utpann hui aur mans chaddha, aur ve upar chamade se ddhnp gai parantu un men sans kuchh n thee." 
Ezekiel37:9 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan sans se bhavishyadanee kar, aur sans se bhvishyadanee karake kah, he sans, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai ki charon dishaaon se akar in ghaat kiae huon men sama ja ki ye jee utten." 
Ezekiel37:10 usakee is agyaa ke anusar maain ne bhavishyadanee kee, tab sans un men a gai, or ve jeekar apane apane panvon ke bal khde ho gae aur ek bahut badee sena ho gai." 
Ezekiel37:11 fir us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, ye haddiyan israaael ke sare gharane kee upama haain. ve kahat haai, hamaree haddiyan sookh gai, aur hamaree asha jatee rahee ham pooree reeti se katt chooke haain." 
Ezekiel37:12 is karan bhvishyadanee karake un se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, he meree praja ke logo, dekho, maain tumaharee kabaren kholakar tum ko un se nikaloonga, aur israaael ke desh men pahuncha doonga." 
Ezekiel37:13 so jab maain tumaharee kabaren kholoo, aur tum ko un se nikaloo, tab he meree praja ke logo, tum jan loge ki maain yahova hoo." 
Ezekiel37:14 aur maain tum men apana atma samavaunga, aur tum jeeoge, aur tum ko tumhare nij desh men basaunga tab tum jan loge ki mujh yahova hee ne yah kaha, aur kiya bhee haai, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel37:15 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha,"
