Ezekiel37:16 he manushy ke santan, aek lakadee lekar us par lik, yahooda kee aur usake sangee israaaeliyon kee tab doosaree lakadee lekar us par lik, yoosufa kee arthata gapraaim kee, aur usake sangee israaaeliyon kee lakadee." 
Ezekiel37:17 fir un lakaadiyon ko aek doosaree se jodkar aek hee kar le ki ve tere hath men aek hee lakadee ban jaaen. 
Ezekiel37:18 aur jab tere log tujh se poochhe, kya too hamen n bataaega ki in se tera kya abhaipraay haai?" 
Ezekiel37:19 tab un se kahana, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain yoosufa kee lakadee ko jo aepraaim ke hath men haai, aur israaael ke jo gotra usake sangee haai, unako lekar yahooda kee lakadee se jodkar usake sath aek hee lakadee kar doonga aur donon mere hath men aek hee lakadee banengee." 
Ezekiel37:20 aur jin lakaadiyon par too aeesa likhega, ve unake samhane tere hath men rahen." 
Ezekiel37:21 aur too un logon se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain israaaeliyon ko un jaatiyon men se lekar jin men ve chale gaae haai, charon or se ikattha karoonga aur unake nij desh men pahuchaunga." 
Ezekiel37:22 aur maain unako us desh arthata israaael ke pahadon par aek hee jaati kar doonga aur un sabhon ka aek hee raja hoga aur ve fir do n rahenge aur n do rajyon men kabhee battenge. 
Ezekiel37:23 ve fir apanee moorato, aur ghainaune kamon va apane kisee prakar ke pap ke dara apane ko ashuuddh n karenge parantu maain unako un sab baastaiyon se, jahan ve pap karate the, nikalakar shuuddh rooniga, aur ve meree praja honge, aur maain unaka parameshvar hoonga." 
Ezekiel37:24 mera das daud unaka raja hoga so un sabhon ka aek hee charavaha hoga. ve mere niyamon par chalenge aur meree vidhaiyon ko manakar unake anusar chalenge. 
Ezekiel37:25 ve us desh men rahenge jise maain ne apane das yakoob ko diya tha aur jis men tumhare purakha rahate the, usee men ve aur unake bette-pote sada base rahenge aur mera das daud sada unaka pradhaan rahega." 
Ezekiel37:26 maain unake sath shaaantai kee vacha bandhoonga vah sada kee vacha ttharegee aur maain unhen sthan dekar ginatee men baddhaunga, aur unake beech apana paavitrasthan sada banaae rakoonga." 
Ezekiel37:27 mere nivas ka tamboo unake upar tana rahega aur maain unaka parameshvar hoonga, aur ve meree praja honge." 
Ezekiel37:28 aur jab mera pavitrasthan unake beech sada ke liye rahega, tab sab jaatiyan jan lengee ki maain yahova israaael ka pavitra karanevala hoo." 
Ezekiel38:1 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Ezekiel38:2 he manushy ke santan, apana munh magog desh ke gog kee or karake, jo rosha, meshok aur toobal ka pradhaan haai, usake viruddh bhavishyadanee kara." 
Ezekiel38:3 aur yah kah, he gog, he rosha, meshok, aur toobal ke pradhaan, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, dek, maain tere viruddh hoo." 
Ezekiel38:4 maain tujhe ghauma le aunga, aur tere jabadon men ankade dalakar tujhe nikaloonga aur teree saree sena ko bhee arthata ghaedon aur savaron ko jo sab ke sab kavach paahine huae aek badee bheed haai, jo faree aur ddhal liae huae sab ke sab talavar chalanevale honge" 
Ezekiel38:5 aur unake sang faaras, koosh aur poot ko, jo sab ke sab ddhal liae aur ttop lagaae honge" 
Ezekiel38:6 aur gomer aur usake sare dalon ko, aur uttar disha ke door door deshaen ke togarma ke gharane, aur usake sare dalon ko nikaloonga tere sang bahut se deshaen ke log honge." 
Ezekiel38:7 isaliye too taaiyar ho ja too aur jitanee bheed tere pas ikatthee ho, taaiyar rahana, aur too unaka aguva banana." 
Ezekiel38:8 bahut dinon ke beetane par teree sudhai lee jaaegee aur ant ke vashan men too us desh men aaega, jo talavar ke vash se chootta hua hoga, aur jisake nivasee bahut see jaatiyon men se ikatthe honge arthata too israaael ke pahadon par aaega jo nirantar ujad rahe haain parantu ve desh desh ke logon ke vash se chhudaae jakar sab ke sab nidr rahenge." 
Ezekiel38:9 too chaddhai karega, aur andhaee kee nai aaega, aur apane sare dalon aur bahut deshaen ke logon samet megha ke saman desh par chha jaaega." 
Ezekiel38:10 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, us din tere man men aeesee aeesee baten aaengee ki too aek buree yuaktai bhee nikalega" 
Ezekiel38:11 aur too kahega ki maain bin shaharapanah ke ganvon ke desh par chaddhai karoonga maain un logon ke pas jaunga jo chaain se nidr rahate haain jo sab ke sab bina shaharapanah or bina bedon aur pallon ke base huae haain 
Ezekiel38:12 taaki chheenakar too unhen lootte aur apana hath un khndharon par baddhaae jo fir basaae gaa, aur un logon ke viruddh faere jo jatiyon men se iatthe huae the aur prathvee kee nabhee par base huae ddhor aur aur sampattai rakhte haain." 
Ezekiel38:13 shaba aur dadan ke log aur tashash ke vyoparee apane desh ke sab javan sinhon samet tujh se kahenge, kya too loottne ko ata haai? kya too ne dhan chheenane, sona-chadee uttane, ddhor aur aur sampaattai le jane, aur badee loott apana lene ko apanee bheed ikattee kee haai?" 
Ezekiel38:14 is kara, he manushy ke santan, bhavishyadanee karake gog se kah, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jis samay meree praja israaael nidr basee rahegee, kya tujhe isaka samachar n milega?" 
Ezekiel38:15 aur too uttar disha ke door door sthanon se aaega too aur tere sath bahut see jaatiyon ke log, jo sab ke sab ghaedon par chaddhe huae honge, arthata aek badee bheed aur balavant sena." 
Ezekiel38:16 aur jaaise badal boomi par chha jata haai, vaaise hee too meree praja israaael ke desh par aeese chaddhai karega. isaaliye he gog, ant ke dinon men aeesa hee hoga, ki maain tujh se apane desh par isaaliye chaddhai karaunga, ki jab maain jaatiyon ke dekhte tere dara apane ko paavitra ttharau, tab ve mujhe paahichan lenge." 
Ezekiel38:17 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, kya too vahee naheen jisakee charcha maain ne praacheenakal men apane dason ke, arthata israaael ke un bhvishyadvktaon dara kee thee, jo un dinon men vashan tak yah bhvishyadanee karate gaa, ki yahova gog se israaaeliyon par chaddhai karaaega?" 
Ezekiel38:18 aur jis din israaael ke desh par gog chaddhai karega, usee din meree jalajalahatt mere mukh se pragatt hogee, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel38:19 aur maain ne jalajalahatt aur krodha kee ag men kaha ki nisandeh us din israaael ke desh men bada bhuidol hoga. 
Ezekiel38:20 aur mere darshan se samudra kee machhliyan aur akash ke pakshae, maaidan ke pashu aur boomi par jitane jeevajantu rengate haai, aur boomi ke upar jitane manushy rahate haai, sab kanp uttenge aur pahad giraae jaaenge aur chaddhaiyan nash hongee, aur sab bheeten girakar mittee men mil jaaengee." 
Ezekiel38:21 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai ki maain usake viruddh talavar chalane ke liye apane sab pahadon ko pukaroonga aur har aek kee talavar usake bhai ke viruddh uttegee. 
Ezekiel38:22 aur maain maree aur oon ke dara us se mukama ladoonga aur us par aur usake dalon par, aur un bahut see jatiyon par jo usake pas hongee, maain badee jhdee lagaunga, aur ole aur ag aur gandhak barasaunga." 
Ezekiel38:23 is prakar maain apane ko mahan aur pavitra ttharaunga aur bahut see jaatiyon ke samhane apane ko pragatt karoonga. tab ve jan lengee ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel39:1 fir he manushy ke santan, gog ke viruddh bhavishyadanee karake yah kah, he gog, he rosha, meshok aur toobal ke pradhaan, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, maain tere viruddh hoo." 
Ezekiel39:2 maain tujhe ghauma le aunga, aur uttar disha ke door door deshaen se chaddha le aunga, aur israaael ke pahadon par pahunchaunga." 
Ezekiel39:3 vahan maain tera dhanush tere baaen hath se giraunga, aur tere teeron ko tere daahine hath se gira doonga." 
Ezekiel39:4 too apane sare dalon aur apane sath kee saree jatiyon samet israaael ke pahadon par mar dala jaaega maain tujhe bhanati bhanati ke mansaharee pakshiyon aur vanapashuuon ka ahar kar doonga. 
Ezekiel39:5 too khet men girega, kyonki maain hee ne aeesa kaha haai, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel39:6 maain magog men aur deepon ke nidr rahanevalon ke beech ag lagaunga aur ve jan lenge ki maain yahova hoo. 
Ezekiel39:7 aur maain apanee praja israaael ke beech apana nam pragatt karoonga aur apana pavitra nam fir apaavitra n hone doonga tab jati-jati ke log bhee jan lenge ki maain yahova, israaael ka pavitra hoo." 
Ezekiel39:8 yah ghattna hua chahatee haai aur vah ho jaaegee, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai. yah vahee din haai jisakee charcha maain ne kee haai." 
Ezekiel39:9 tab israaael ke nagaron ke rahanevale nikalenge aur hathaiyaron men ag lagakar jala denge, ddhal, aur faree, dhanusha, aur teer, lattee, bachh, sab ko ve sat varsha tak jalate rahenge." 
Ezekiel39:10 aur isake karan ve maaidan men lakadee n beenenge, n jangal men kattenge, kyonaki ve hathaiyaron hee ko jalaya karenge ve apane loottnevale ko loottenge, aur apane chheenanevalon se chheenenge, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel39:11 us samay maain gog ko israael ke desh men kaabirstan doonga, vah tal kee poorva or hoga vah ane janevalon kee tarai kahalaegee, aur ane janevalon ko vahan rukana padega vahan sab bheed samet gog ko mittee dee jaegee aur us sthan ka nam gog kee bheed kee tarai padega." 
Ezekiel39:12 israaael ka gharana unako sat maheene tak mittee deta rahega taki apane desh ko shuuddh kare. 
Ezekiel39:13 desh ke sab log milakar unako mittee denge aur jis samay meree mahima hogee, us samay unaka bhee nam bada hoga, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel39:14 tab ve manushyon ko niyukt karenge, jo nirantar isee kam men lage rahenge, arthata desh men ghooma-ghaamakar ane janevalon ke sang hokar desh ko shuuddh karane ke liye unako jo boomi ke upar pade ho, mittee denge aur sat maheene ke beetane tak ve ddoonddh ddoonddhkar yah kam karate rahenge." 
Ezekiel39:15 aur desh men ane janevalon men se jab koi manushy kee haddee dekhe, tab usake pas aek chinh khda karega, yah us samay tak bana rahega jab tak mittee denevale use gog kee bheed kee tarai men gad n den." 
Ezekiel39:16 vahan ke nagar ka nam bhee hamona haai. yon desh shuuddh kiya jaaega. 
Ezekiel39:17 fir he manushy ke santan, parameshvar yahova yon kahata he, bhanti bhanati ke sab pakshiayon aur sab vanapashuuon ko agyaa de, ikatthe hokar ao, mere is bade yagya men jo maain tumhare liye israaael ke pahadon par karata hoo, har aek disha se ikatthe ho ki tum mans khao aur lohoo peeo." 
Ezekiel39:18 tum shooraveeron ka mans khaoge, aur prathvee ke pradhaanon ka lohoo peeoge aur meddho, memno, bakaron aur baailon ka bhee jo sab ke sab bashaan ke taaiyar kiae huae honge." 
Ezekiel39:19 aur mere us bhoj kee chaba se jo maain tumhare liye karata hoo, tum khate-khate adha jaoge, aur usaka lohoo meete-peete chhk jaoge." 
Ezekiel39:20 tum meree meja par ghaado, savaro, shooraveero, aur sab prakar ke yoddhaon se trapt honge, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel39:21 aur maain jati-jati ke beech apanee mahima pragatt karoonga, aur jaati-jati ke sab log mere nyay ke kam jo maain karoonga, aur mera hath jo un par padega, dekh lenge." 
Ezekiel39:22 us din se age israael ka gharana jan lega ki yahova hamara parameshvar haai. 
Ezekiel39:23 aur jaati-jati ke log bhee jan lenge ki israaael ka gharana apane adharma ke karan bandhauai men gaya tha kyonki unhon ne mujh se aeesa vishvasaghaat kiya ki maain ne apana munh un se faer liya aur anako unake vaaiariyon ke vash kar diya, aur ve sab talavar se mare gaae." 
Ezekiel39:24 maain ne unakee ashuuddhta aur aparadhaen hee ke anusar un se bartav karake un se apana munh faer liya tha. 
Ezekiel39:25 isaliye parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ab maain yakoob ko bandhauai se faer launga, aur israaael ke sare gharane par daya karoonga aur apane paavitra nam ke liye mujhe jalan hogee." 
Ezekiel39:26 tab us sare vishvasaghaat ke karan jo unhon ne mere viruddh kiya ve laajjait honge aur apane desh men nidr rahenge aur koi unako n draaega. 
Ezekiel39:27 aur jab maain unako jati-jati ke beech se faer launga, aur un shatrauon ke deshaen se ikattha karoonga, tab bahut jatiyon kee draashtti men unake dara paavitra ttharoonga." 
Ezekiel39:28 aur tab ve jan lenge ki yahova hamara parameshvar haai, kyonaki maain ne unako jaati-jati men bandhaua karake fir unake nij desh men ikattha kiya haai. maain un men se kisee ko fir paradesh men n chhooonga," 
Ezekiel39:29 aur un se apana munh fir kabhee n faer loonga, kyonaki maain ne israaael ke gharane par apana atma undela haai, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel40:1 hamaree bandhauai ke pachcheesaven varsha arthata yarooshalem nagar ke le liae jane ke bad chaudahaven varsha ke paahile maheene ke dasaven din ko, yahova kee shaktai mujh par hui, aur us ne mujhe vahan pahunchaya." 
Ezekiel40:2 apane darshanon men parameshvar ne mujhe israaael ke desh men pahunchaya aur vahan aek bahut unche pahad par khda kiya, jis par dakkhian or mano kisee nagar ka akar tha." 
Ezekiel40:3 jab vah mujhe vahan le gaya, to maain ne kya dekha ki peetal ka roop ghare huae aur hath men san ka faeeta aur mapane ka bans liae huae aek purush faattk men khda haai." 
Ezekiel40:4 us purush ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, apanee ankhon se dek, aur apane kanon se suna aur jo kuchh maain tujhe dikhaunga us sab par dhyan de, kyonaki too isaaliye yahan pahunchaya gaya haai ki maain tujhe ye baten dikhaun aur jo kuchh too dekhe vah israael ke gharane ko batae." 
Ezekiel40:5 aur dekho, bhvan ke bahar charon or aek bheet thee, aur us purush ke hath men mapane ka bans tha, jisakee lambai aeese chhhath kee thee jo sadhaaran hathon se chauva bhr aadhaik haai so us ne bheet kee mottai mapakar bans bhr kee pai, fir usakee unchai bhee mapakar bans bhr kee pai." 
Ezekiel40:6 tab vah us faattk ke pas aya jisaka munh poorva kee or tha, aur usakee seeddhee par chaddhkar faattk kee donon devaddhiyon kee chaudai mapakar aek aek bans bhr kee pai." 
Ezekiel40:7 aur paharevalee kottriyan bans bhr lambee aur bans bhr chaudee thee aur do kottriyon ka antar panch hath ka tha aur faattk kee devaddhee jo faattk ke osare ke pas bhvan kee or thee, vah bhee bans bhr kee thee." 
Ezekiel40:8 tab us ne faattk ka vah osara jo bhvan ke samhane tha, mapakar bans bhr ka paya." 
Ezekiel40:9 aur us ne faattk ka osara mapakar att hath ka paya, aur usake khmbhe do do hath ke paa, aur faattk ka osara bhvan ke samhane tha." 
Ezekiel40:10 aur poova faattk kee donon or teen teen paharevalee kottriyan theen jo sab aek hee map kee thee, aur donon or ke khmbhe bhee aek hee map ke the." 
Ezekiel40:11 fir us n faattk ke dar kee chaudai mapakar das hath kee pai aur faattk kee lambai mapakar terah hath kee pai. 
Ezekiel40:12 aur donon or kee paharevalee kottariyon ke age hath bhr ka sthan tha aur donon or kottariyan chhchh hath kee theen. 
Ezekiel40:13 fir us ne faattk ko aek or kee paharevalee kottree kee chht se lekar doosaree or kee paharevalee kottree kee chht tak mapakar pachchees hath kee dooree pai, aur dar amhane-samhane the." 
Ezekiel40:14 fir us ne satt hath ke khmbhe mape, aur angan, faattk ke as pas, khmbhon tak tha." 
Ezekiel40:15 or faattk ke baharee dar ke age se lekar usake bheetaree osare ke age tak pachas hath ka antar tha. 
Ezekiel40:16 aur paharevalee kottriyon me, aur faattk ke bheetar charon or kottriyon ke beech ke khmbhe ke beech beech men jhlaimileedar khaidkiyan thee, aur khmbhon ke osare men bhee vaaisee hee thee aur faattk ke bheetar ke charon or khaidkiyan theen aur har aek khmbhe par khjoor ke ped khude huae the." 
Ezekiel40:17 tab vah mujhe baharee angan men le gaya aur us angan ke charon or kottariyan theen aur aek farsha bana hua tha jis par tees kottariyan banee theen. 
Ezekiel40:18 aur yah farsha arthata nichala farsha faattkon se laga hua tha aur unakee lambai ke anusar tha. 
Ezekiel40:19 fir us ne nichale faattk ke age se lekar bheetaree angan ke bahar ke age tak mapakar sau hath paae vah poorva aur uttar donon or aeesa hee tha. 
Ezekiel40:20 tab baharee angan ke uttaramukhee faattk kee lambai aur chaudai us ne mapee. 
Ezekiel40:21 aur usakee donon or teen teen paharevaalee kottriyan thee, aur isake bhee khmbhon ke osare kee map pahile faattk ke anusar thee isakee lambai pachas aur chaudai pachchees hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel40:22 aur isakee bhee khaidkiyon aur khmbhon ke osare aur khjooron kee map poorvamukhee faattk kee see thee aur is par chaddhne ko sat seeaddhiyan theen aur unake samhane isaka osara tha. 
Ezekiel40:23 aur bheetaree angan kee uttar aur poorva or doosare faattkon ke samhane faattk the aur us ne faattkon kee dooree mapakar sau hath kee pai. 
Ezekiel40:24 fir vah mujhe daakkhian or le gaya, aur dakkhian or aek faattk tha aur us ne isake khmbhe aur khmbhon ka osara mapakar inakee vaaisee hee map pai." 
Ezekiel40:25 aur un khaidkiyon kee nai isake aur isake khmbhon ke osaron ke charon or bhee khaidkiyan theen isakee bhee lambai pachas aur chaudai pachchees hath kee thee. 
Ezekiel40:26 aur is men bhee chaddhne ke liye sat seeaddhiyan theen aur unake samhane khmbhon ka osara tha aur usake donon or ke khmbhon par khjoor ke ped khude huae the. 
Ezekiel40:27 aur daakkhian or bhee bheetaree angan ka aek faattk tha, aur us ne dakkhian or ke donon faattkon kee dooree mapakar sau hath kee pai." 
Ezekiel40:28 tab vah daakkhianee faattk se hokar mujhe bheetaree angan men le gaya, aur us ne dakkhianee faattk ko mapakar vaaisa hee paya." 
Ezekiel40:29 arthata isakee bhee paharevalee kottriya, aur khmbhe, aur khmbhon ka osara, sab vaaise hee the aur isake aur isake khmbhon ke osare ke bhee charon or bhee khaidkiyan theen aur isakee lambai pachas aur chaudai pachchees hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel40:30 aur isake charon or ke khmbhon ka osar bhee pachchees hath lamba, aur pachas hath chauda tha." 
Ezekiel40:31 aur isaka khmbhon ka osara baharee angan kee or tha, aur isake khmbhon par bhee khjoor ke ped khude huae the, aur is par chaddhne ko att seeaddhiyan theen." 
Ezekiel40:32 fir vah purush mujhe poorva kee or bheetaree angan men le gaya, aur us or ke faattk ko mapakar vaaisa hee paya." 
Ezekiel40:33 aur isakee bhee paharevalee kottriyan aur khmbhe aur khmbhon ka osara, sab vaaise hee the aur isake aur isake khmbhon ke osare ke charon or bhee khaidkiyan theen isakee lambai pachas aur chaudai pachchees hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel40:34 isaka osara bhee baharee angan kee or tha, aur usake donon or ke khmbhon par khjoor ke ped khude huae the aur is par bhee chaddhne ko att seeaddhiyan theen." 
Ezekiel40:35 fir us purush ne mujhe uttaree faattk ke pas le jakar use mapa, aur usakee bhee map vaaisee hee pai." 
Ezekiel40:36 usake bhee paharevalee kottriyan aur khmbhe aur unaka osara tha aur usake bhee charon or khaidkiyan theen usakee lambai pachas aur chaudai pachchees hath kee thee. 
Ezekiel40:37 usake khmbhe baharee angan kee or the, aur un par bhee donon or khjoor ke ped khude huae the aur us men chaddhne ko att seeaddhiyan theen." 
Ezekiel40:38 fir faattkon ke pas ke khmbhon ke nikatt dar samet kottree thee, jahan homabaali dhaeya jata tha." 
Ezekiel40:39 aur homabaali, papabali, aur doshabali ke pashuuon ke vadha karane ke liye faattk ke osare ke pas usake donon or do do mejaen theen." 
Ezekiel40:40 aur faattk kee aek baharee alang par arthata uttaree faattk ke dar kee chaddhai par do mejaen theen aur usakee doosaree baharee alang par bhee, jo faattk ke osare ke pas thee, do mejen theen." 
Ezekiel40:41 faattk kee donon alangon par char char mejen thee, so sab milakar att mejaen thee, jo balipashu vadha karane ke liye theen." 
Ezekiel40:42 fir homabali ke liye tarasho huae patthr kee char mejaen thee, jo deddh hath lambee, deddh hath chaudee, aur hath bhr unchee theen un par homabaali aur melabali ke pashuuon ko vadha karane ke hathaiyar rakhe jate the." 
Ezekiel40:43 bheetar charon or chauve bhr kee ankadiyan lagee thee, aur mejaon par chaddhave ka mans rakha hua tha." 
Ezekiel40:44 aur bheetaree angan kee uttaree faattk kee alang ke bahar ganevalon kee kottriyan theen jinake dar dakkhian or the aur poova faattk kee alang par aek kottree thee, jisaka dar uttar or tha." 
Ezekiel40:45 us ne mujh se kaha, yah kottree, jisaka dar dakkhian kee or haai, un yajakon ke liye haai jo bhvan kee chaukasee karate haai," 
Ezekiel40:46 aur jis kottree ka dar uttar or haai, vah un yajakon ke liye haai jo vedee kee chaukasee karate haain ye sadok kee santan haain aur leaviyon men se yahova kee seva tthal karane ko keval ye hee usake sameep jate haain." 
Ezekiel40:47 fir us ne angan ko mapakar use chaukona arthata sau hath lamba aur sau hath chauda paya aur bhvan ke samhane vedee thee. 
Ezekiel40:48 fir vah mujhe bhvan ke osare men le gaya, aur osare ke donon or ke khmbhon ko mapakar panch panch hath ka paya aur donon or faattk kee chaudai teen teen hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel40:49 osare kee lambai bees hath aur chaudai gyarah hath kee thee aur us par chaddhne ko seeaddhiyan theen aur donon or ke khmbhon ke pas latten theen. 
Ezekiel41:1 fir vah mujhe maandair ke pas le gaya, aur usake donon or ke khmbhon ko mapakar chhchh hath chaude paya, yah to tamboo kee chaudai thee." 
Ezekiel41:2 aur dar kee chaudai das hath kee thee, aur dar kee donon alangen panch panch hath kee theen aur us ne maandair kee lambai mapakar chalees hath kee, aur usakee chaudai bees hath kee pai." 
Ezekiel41:3 tab us ne bheetar jakar dar ke khmbhon ko mapa, aur do do hath ka paya aur dar chh hath ka tha aur dar kee chaudai sat hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel41:4 tab us ne bheetar ke bhvan kee lambai aur chaudai maandair ke samhane mapakar bees bees hath kee pai aur us ne mujh se kaha, yah to paramapavitra sthan haai." 
Ezekiel41:5 fir us ne bhvan kee bheet ko mapakar chh hath kee paya, aur bhvan ke as pas char char hath chaudee baharee kottriyan theen." 
Ezekiel41:6 aur ye baharee kottriyan timahalee theen aur aek aek mahal men tees tees kottriyan theen. bhvan ke as pas kee bheet isaliye thee ki baharee kottariyan usake sahare men ho aur usee men kottariyon kee kaadiyan paaittai hui theen aur bhvan kee bheet ke sahare men n theen. 
Ezekiel41:7 aur bhvan ke as pas jo kottariyan bahar thee, un men se jo upar thee, ve adhaik chaudee theen arthata bhvan ke as pas jo kuchh bana tha, vah jaaise jaaise upar kee or chaddhta gaya, vaaise vaaise chauda hota gaya is reeti, is ghar kee chaudai upar kee or baddhee hui thee, aur log neechale mahal ke beech se uparale mahal ko chaddh sakate the." 
Ezekiel41:8 fir maain ne bhvan ke as pas unchee boomi deshae, aur baharee kottariyon kee unchai jod tak chh hath ke bans kee thee." 
Ezekiel41:9 baharee kottriyon ke liye jo bheet thee, vah panch hath mottee thee, aur jo sthan khalee rah gaya tha, vah bhvan kee baharee kottriyon ka sthan tha." 
Ezekiel41:10 baharee kottriyon ke beech beech bhvan ke as pas bees hath ka antar tha. 
Ezekiel41:11 aur baharee kottriyon ke dar us sthan kee or the, jo khalee tha, arthata aek dar uttar kee or aur doosara dakkhian kee or tha aur jo sthan rah gaya, usakee chaudai charon or panch hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel41:12 fir jo bhvan maandair ke pashchaimee angan ke samhane tha, vah sattar hath chauda tha aur bhvan ke as pas kee bheet panch hath mottee thee, aur usakee lambai nabbe hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel41:13 tab us n bhvan kee lambai mapakar sau hath kee pai aur bheeton samet angan kee bhee lambai mapakar sau hath kee pai. 
Ezekiel41:14 aur bhvan ka poova samhana aur usaka angan sau hath chauda tha. 
Ezekiel41:15 fir us ne peechhe ke angan ke samhane kee bheet kee lambai jisake donon or chhjje the, mapakar sau hath kee pai aur bheetaree bhvan aur angan ke osaron ko bhee mapa." 
Ezekiel41:16 tab us ne devaddhiyon aur jhlaimileedar khaidkiyo, aur as pas ke teenon mahalon ke chhjjon ko mapa jo devaddhee ke samhane the, aur charon or unakee takhta-bandee hui thee aur boomi se khaidkiyon tak aur khaidkiyon ke as pas sab kaheen takhtabandee hui thee." 
Ezekiel41:17 fir us ne dar ke upar ka sthan bheetaree bhvan tak or usake bahar bhee aur as pas kee saree bheet ke bheetar aur bahar bhee mapa. 
Ezekiel41:18 aur us men karoob aur khjoor ke ped aeese hude huae the ki do do karoobon ke beech aek aek khjoor ka ped tha aur karoobon ke do do mukh the. 
Ezekiel41:19 is prakar se aek aek khjoor kee aek or manushy ka mukh banaya hua tha, aur doosaree or javan sinh ka mukh banaya hua tha. isee reeati sare bhvan ke charon or bana tha." 
Ezekiel41:20 boomi se lekar dar ke upar tak karoob aur khjoor ke ped khude huae the, mandair kee bheet isee bhanti banee hui thee." 
Ezekiel41:21 bhvan ke daron ke khmbhe chaupahal the, aur paavitrasthan ke samhane ka roop mandair ka sa tha." 
Ezekiel41:22 vedee katt kee banee thee, aur usakee unchai teen hat, or lambai do hath kee thee aur usake kone aur usaka sara patt aur alangen bhee katt kee theen. aur us ne muujh se kaha, yah to yahova ke sammukh kee meja haai." 
Ezekiel41:23 aur maandair aur pavitrasthan ke daron ke do do kivad the. 
Ezekiel41:24 aur har aek kivad men do do mudnevale palle the, har aek kivad ke liye do do palle." 
Ezekiel41:25 aur jaaise maandair kee bheeton men karoob aur khjoor ke ped khude huae the, vaaise hee usake kivadon men bhee the, aur osare kee baharee or lakadee kee mottee mottee dharanen theen." 
Ezekiel41:26 aur osare ke donon or jhlaimileedar khaidkiyan theen aur khjoor ke ped khude the aur bhvan kee baharee kottariyan aur mottee mottee dharanen bhee theen. 
Ezekiel42:1 fir vah mujhe baharee angan men uttar kee or le gaya, aur mujhe un do kottriyon ke pas laya jo bhvan ke angan ke samhane aur usakee uttar or theen." 
Ezekiel42:2 sau hath kee dooree par uttaree dar tha, aur chaudai pachas hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel42:3 bheetaree angan ke bees hath samhane aur baharee angan ke farsha ke samhane teenon mahalon men chhjje the. 
Ezekiel42:4 aur kottriyon ke samhane bheetar kee or janevala das hath chauda aek marga tha aur hath bhr ka aek aur marga tha aur kottariyon ke dar uttar or the. 
Ezekiel42:5 aur uparalee kottariyan chhottee thee, arthata chhjjon ke karan ve nichalee aur bichalee kottariyon se chhottee theen." 
Ezekiel42:6 kyonaki ve simahalee thee, aur anganon ke saman unake khmbhe n the is karan uparalee kottriyan nichalee aur bichalee kottariyon se chhottee theen." 
Ezekiel42:7 aur jo bheet kottriyon ke bahar unake pas pas thee arthata kottariyon ke samhane baharee angan kee or thee, usakee lambai pachas hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel42:8 kyonaki baharee angan kee kottariyan pachas hath lambee thee, aur mandair ke samhane kee alang sau hath kee thee." 
Ezekiel42:9 aur in kottriyon ke neeche poorva kee or marga tha, jahan log baharee angan se in men jate the." 
Ezekiel42:10 angan kee bheet kee chaudai men poorva kee or alag sthan aur bhvan donon ke samhane kottriyan theen. 
Ezekiel42:11 aur unake samhane ka marga uttaree kottariyon ke marga sa th unakee lambai-chaudai barabar thee aur nikas aur ddhng unake dar ke se the. 
Ezekiel42:12 aur daakkhianee kottariyon ke daron ke anusar marga ke sire par dar tha, arthata poorva kee or kee bheet ke samhane, jahan se log un men pravesh karate the." 
Ezekiel42:13 fir us ne mujh se kaha, ye uttaree aur dakkhianee kottariyan jo angan ke samhane he, ve hee pavitra kottriyan haai, jin men yahova ke sameep janevale yajak paramapavitra vastuaen khaya karenge ve paramapavitra vastuae, aur annabali, aur papabali, aur doshabali, vaheen rakhenge kyonki vah sthan paavitra he." 
Ezekiel42:14 jab jab yajak log bheetar jaaenge, tab tab nikalane ke samay ve pavitrasthan se baharee angan men yon hee n nikalenge, arthata ve pahile apanee seva tthal ke vasr pavitrasthan men rakh denge kyonaki ye kottariyan paavitra haain. tab ve aur vasr pahinakar sadhaaran logon ke sthan men jaaenge." 
Ezekiel42:15 jab vah bheetaree bhvan ko map chuka, tab mujhe poorva disha ke faattk ke marga se bahar le jakar bahar ka sthan charon or mapane laga." 
Ezekiel42:16 us ne poova alang ko mapane ke bans se mapakar panch sau bans ka paya. 
Ezekiel42:17 tab us ne uttaree alang ko mapane ke bans se mapakar panch sau bans ka paya. 
Ezekiel42:18 tab us ne daakkhianee alang ko mapane ke bans se mapakar panch sau bans ka paya. 
Ezekiel42:19 aur paachchhimee alang ko mudkar us ne mapane ke bans se mapakar use panch sau bans ka paya. 
Ezekiel42:20 us ne us sthan kee charon alangen mapee, aur usakee charon or ek bheet thee, vah panch sau bans lambee aur panch sau bans chaudee thee, aur isaliye banee thee ki pavitra aur sarvasadhaaran ko alag alag kare." 
Ezekiel43:1 fir vah mujh ko us faattk ke pas le gaya jo poorvamukhee tha. 
Ezekiel43:2 tab israaael ke parameshvar ka tej poorva disha se aya aur usakee vanee bahut se jal kee gharagharahatt see hui aur usake tej se prathvee prakashait hui. 
Ezekiel43:3 aur yah darshan us darshan ke tuly tha, jo maain ne use nagar ke nash karane ko ate samay dekha tha aur us darshan ke saman, jo maain ne kabar nadee ke teer par dekha tha aur maain munh ke bal gir pada." 
Ezekiel43:4 tab yahova ka tej us faattk se hokar jo poorvamukhee tha, bhvan men a gaya." 
Ezekiel43:5 tab atma ne mujhe uttakar bheetaree angan men pahunchaya aur yahova ka tej bhvan men bhra tha. 
Ezekiel43:6 tab maain ne aek jan ka shabd suna, jo bhvan men se mujh se bol raha tha, aur vah purush mere pas khda tha." 
Ezekiel43:7 us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, yahova kee yah vanee haai, yah to mere sinhasan ka sthan aur mere panv rakhne kee jagah haai, jahan maain israael ke beech sada vas kiae rahoonga. aur n to israael ka gharana, aur n usake raja apane vyaabhaichar se, va upane unche sthanon men apane rajaon kee lothon ke dara mera pavitra nam fir ashuuddh ttharaenge." 
Ezekiel43:8 ve apanee devaddhee meree devaddhee ke pas, aur apane dar ke khmbhe mere dar ke khmbhon ke nikatt banate the, aur mere aur unake beech keval bheet hee thee, aur unhon ne apane ghainaune kamon se mera pavitra nam ashuuddh ttharaya tha isaaliye maain ne kop karake unhen nash kiya." 
Ezekiel43:9 ab ve apana vyabhaichar aur apane rajaon kee lothen mere sammukh se door kar de, tab maain unake beech sada vas kiae rahoonga." 
Ezekiel43:10 he manushy ke santan, too israaael ke gharane ko is bhvan ka namoona dikha ki ve apane adharma ke kamon se laajjait hokar us namoone ko mapen." 
Ezekiel43:11 aur yaadi ve apane sare kamon se lajjait ho, to unhen is bhvan ka akar aur svaroop, aur isake bahar bheetar ane jane ke marga, aur isake sab akar aur vidhaiya, aur niyam batalana, aur unake samhane likh rakhna jis se ve isaka sab akar aur isakee sab vidhaiyan smaran karake unake anusar karen." 
Ezekiel43:12 bhvan ka niyam yah haai ki pahad kee chottee ke charon or ka sampoorn bhag paramapavitra haai. dekh bhvan ka niyam yahee haai. 
Ezekiel43:13 aur aeese hath ke map se jo sadhaaran hath se chauva bhr adhaik ho, vedee kee map yah haai, arthata usaka adhaar aek hath ka, aur usakee chaudai aek hath kee, aur usake charon or kee chhor par kee pattree aek chauve kee. aur vedee kee unchai yah haai" 
Ezekiel43:14 boomi par dhare huae adhaar se lekar nichalee kusa tak do hath kee unchai rahe, aur usakee cha.dai hath bhr kee ho aur chhottee kusa se lekar badee kusa tak char hath hon aur usakee chaudai hath bhr kee ho" 
Ezekiel43:15 aur uparala bhag char hath uncha ho aur vedee par jalane ke sthan ke char seeng upar kee or nikale hon. 
Ezekiel43:16 aur vedee par jalane ka sthan chaukor arthata barah hath lamba aur barah hath chauda ho. 
Ezekiel43:17 aur nichalee kusa chaudah hath lambee aur chaudah chaudee ho, aur usake charon or kee pattree adho hath kee ho, aur usaka adhar charon aur hath bhr ka ho. usakee seeddhee usakee poorva or ho." 
Ezekiel43:18 fir us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jis din hamabali chaddhane aur lohoo chhdikane ke liye vedee banai jaa, us din kee vidhaiyan ye ttharen" 
Ezekiel43:19 arthata leveey yajak log, jo sadok kee santan haai, aur meree seva tthal karane ko mere sameep rahate haai, unhen too papabali ke liye aek bachhda dena, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel43:20 tab too usake lohoo men se kuchh lekar vedee ke charon seengon aur kusa ke charon konon aur charon or kee pattree par lagana is prakar se usake liye praayaashchaitt karane ke dara usako pavitra karana. 
Ezekiel43:21 tab papabaali ke bachhde ko lekar, bhvan ke pavitrasthan ke bahar ttharaae huae sthan men jala dena." 
Ezekiel43:22 aur doosare din aek nidash bakara papabaali karake chaddhana aur jaaise bachhde ke dara vedee pavitra kee jaa, vaaise hee vah is bakare ke dara bhee pavitra kee jaaegee." 
Ezekiel43:23 jab too use pavitra kar chooke, tab aek nidash bachhda aur aek nidash meddha chaddhana." 
Ezekiel43:24 too unhen yahova ke samhane le ana, aur yajak log un par lon dalakar unhen yahova ko homabali karake chaddhaaen." 
Ezekiel43:25 sat din tak noo prati din papabali ke liye aek bakara taaiyar karana, aur nidash bachhda aur bhedon men se nidash meddha bhee taaiyar kiya jaae." 
Ezekiel43:26 sat din tak yajak log vedee ke liye praayaashchaitt karake use shuuddh karate rahen isee bhanati usaka sanskar ho. 
Ezekiel43:27 aur jab ve din samapt ho, tab attven din ke bad se yajak log tumhare homabali aur melabali vedee par chaddhaya karen tab maain tum se prasann hoonga, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel44:1 fir vah mujhe paavitrasthan ke us baharee faattk ke pas lautta le gaya, jo poorvamukhee haai aur vah band tha." 
Ezekiel44:2 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, yah faattk band rahe aur khela n jaae koi is se hokar bheetar jane n paae kyonki israaael ka parameshvar yahova is se hokar bheetar aya haai is karan yah band rahe." 
Ezekiel44:3 keval pradhaan hee, pradhaan hone ke kara, mere samhane bhojan karane ko vahan baaittega vah faattk ke osare se hokar bheetar jaa, aur isee se hokar nikale." 
Ezekiel44:4 fir vah uttaree faattk ke pas hokar mujhe bhvan ke samhane le gaya tab maain ne desh ki yahova ka bhvan yahova ke tej se bhr gaya haai aur maain munh ke bal gir pada. 
Ezekiel44:5 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, dhyan dekar apanee ankhon se dek, aur jo kuchh maain tujh se apane bhvan kee sab vidhaiyon aur niyamon ke vishay men kahoo, vah sab apane kanon se suna aur bhvan ke paaittav aur paavitrasthan ke sab nikason par dhyan de." 
Ezekiel44:6 aur un balavaiyon arthata israaael ke gharane se kahana, parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, he israaael ke gharane, apane sab gharaanait kamon se ab hath utta." 
Ezekiel44:7 jab tum mera bhojan arthata chaba aur lohoo chaddhate the, tab tum birane logon ko jo man aur tan donon ke khtanaheen the, mere pavitrasthan men ane dete the ki ve mera bhvan apaavitra karen aur unhon ne meree vacha ko tod diya jis se tumhare sab gharanait kam baddh gaae." 
Ezekiel44:8 aur toom ne meree paavitra vastuon kee raksha n kee, parantu tum ne apane hee man se any logon ko mere pavitrasthan men meree vastuon kee raksha karanevale ttharaya." 
Ezekiel44:9 isaliye parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, ki israaaeliyon ke beech jitane any log ho, jo man aur tan donon ke khtanaheen haai, un men se koi mere pavitrasthan men n ane paae." 
Ezekiel44:10 parantu leveey log jo us samay mujh se door ho gaae the, jab israaaelee log mujhe chhodkar apanee mooraton ke peechhe bhttk gaae the, ve apane adharma ka bhar uttaaenge." 
Ezekiel44:11 parantu ve mere paavitrasthan men tthaluae hokar bhvan ke faattkon ka pahara denevale aur bhvan ke tthalug rahen ve homabali aur melabali ke pashu logon ke liye vadha kare, aur unakee seva tthal karane ko unake samhane khde hua karen." 
Ezekiel44:12 kyonaki israaael ke gharane kee seva tthal ve unakee mooraton ke samhane karate the, aur unake ttokar khane aur adharma men fansane ka karan ho gaae the is karan maain ne unake vishay men shapath khai haai ki ve apane adharma ka bhar uttaae, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel44:13 ve mere sameep n aae, aur n mere liye yajak ka kam karen aur n meree kisee paavitra pastu, va kisee paramapavitra vasatu ko choone paaen ve apanee lajja ka aur jo gharaanait kam unhon ne kia, unaka bhee bhar uttaaen. taubhee maain unhen bhvan men kee saunpee hui vastuon ka rakshak ttharaunga" 
Ezekiel44:14 us men seva ka jitana kam ho, aur jo kuchh us men karana ho, usake karanevale ve hee hon" 
Ezekiel44:15 fir leveey yajak jo sadok kee santan haai, aur jinhon ne us samay mere pavitrasthan kee raksha kee jab israaaelee mere pas se bhttk gaae the, ve meree seva tthal karane ko mere sameep aya kare, aur mujhe chaba aur lohoo chaddhane ko mere sammukh khde hua kare, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel44:16 ve mere pavitrasthan men aya kare, aur meree meja ke pas meree seva tthal karane ko aaen aur meree vastuon kee raksha karen." 
Ezekiel44:17 aur jab ve bheetaree angan ke faattkon se hokar jaya kare, tab san ke vasr paahine huae jaae, aur jab ve bheetaree angan ke faattkon men va usake bheetar seva tthal karate ho, tab kuchh un ke vasr n pahinen." 
Ezekiel44:18 ve sir par san kee sundar ttopiyan paahinen aur kamar men san kee janaghaiya bandhon hon kisee aeese kapade se ve kamar n bandhon jis se paseena hota haai. 
Ezekiel44:19 aur jab ve baharee angan men logon ke pas nikale, tab jo vasr paahine huae ve seva tthal karate the, unhen utarakar aur paavitra kottriyon men rakhkar doosare vasr paahine, jis se log unake vasren ke karan paavitra n ttharen." 
Ezekiel44:20 aur n to ve sir mundaae, aur n bal lambe hone den ve keval apane bal kattaaen." 
Ezekiel44:21 aur bheetaree angan men jane ke samay koi yajak dakhmadha n peeae. 
Ezekiel44:22 ve vidhava va chhodee hui satraee ko byah n len keval israaael ke gharane ke pansh men se kunvaree va aeesee vidhava bayah len jo kisee yajak kee sree hui ho. 
Ezekiel44:23 ve meree praja ko paavitra apavitra ka bhed sikhaya kare, aur shuuddh ashuuddh ka antar bataya karen." 
Ezekiel44:24 aur jab koi mukama ho tab nyay karane ko bhee ve hee baaitte, aur mere niyamon ke anusar nyay karen. mere sab niyat paban ke vishay bhee ve meree vyavastha aur vidhaiyan palan kare, aur mere vishraamadinon ko paavitra manen." 
Ezekiel44:25 ve kisee manushy kee loth ke pas n jaaen ki ashuuddh ho jaaen keval mata-pita, bette-bettee bhai, aur aeesee baahin kee loth ke karan jisaka vivah n hua ho ve apane ko ashuuddh kar sakate haain." 
Ezekiel44:26 aur jab ve ashuuddh ho jaae, tab unake liye sat din gine jaaen aur tab ve shuuddh tthare," 
Ezekiel44:27 aur jis din ve pavitrasthan arthata bheetaree angan men seva tthal karane ko fir pravesh kare, us nid apane liye papabaali chaddhaae, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee he." 
Ezekiel44:28 aur unaka aek hee nij bhag hoga, arthata unaka bhag maain hee hoo tum unhen israaael ke beech kuchh aeesee boomi n dena jo unakee nij ho unakee nij boomi maain hee hoo." 
Ezekiel44:29 ve annabaali, papabali aur doshabali khaya karen aur israaael men jo vastu arpan kee jaa, vah unako mila kare." 
Ezekiel44:30 aur sab prakar kee sab se pahilee upaj aur sab prakar kee uttai hui vastu jo tum uttakar chaddhao, yajakon ko mila kare aur naye ann ka paahila goondha hua atta bhee yajak ko diya karana, jis se tum logon ke ghar men ashaeesh ho." 
Ezekiel44:31 jo kuchh apane ap mare va faada gaya ho, chahe pakshaee ho ya pashu usaka mans yajak n khaae." 
Ezekiel45:1 jab tum chitthee dalakar desh ko bantto, tab desh men se aek bhag paavitra janakar yahova ko arpan karana usakee lambai pachchees hajar bans kee aur chaudai das hajar bans kee ho vah bhag apane charon or ke sivane tak pavitra tthare." 
Ezekiel45:2 us men se paavitrasthan ke liye panch sau bans lambee aur panch sau bans chaudee chaukonee boomi ho, aur usakee charon or pachas pachas hath chaudee boomi choottee padee rahe." 
Ezekiel45:3 us paavitra bhag men tum pachchees hajar bans lambee aur das hajar bans chaudee boomi ko mapana, aur usee men paavitrasthan banana, jo paramapaavitra tthare." 
Ezekiel45:4 jo yajak pavitrasthn kee seva tthal karen aur yahova kee seva tthal karane ko sameep aae, vah unheen ke liye ho vahan unake gharon ke liye sthan ho aur pavitrasthan ke liye paavitra tthare." 
Ezekiel45:5 fir pachchees hajar bans lamba, aur das hajar bans chauda aek bhag, bhvan kee seva tthal karanevale leviyon kee bees kottriyon ke liye ho." 
Ezekiel45:6 fir nagar ke liye, arpan kiae huae paavitra bhag ke pas, tum panch hajar bans chaudee aur pachchees hajar bans lambee, vishosh boomi ttharana vah israaael ke sare gharane ke liye ho." 
Ezekiel45:7 aur pradhaan ka nij bhag pavitra arpan kiae huae bhag aur nagar kee vishosh boomi kee donon or arthata dono kee pashchaim aur poorva dishaaon men donon bhagon ke samhane hon aur usakee lambai pashchaim se lekar poorva tak un do bhagon men se kisee bhee aek ke tuly ho. 
Ezekiel45:8 israaael ke desh men pradhaan kee yahee nij boomi ho. aur mere ttharaae huae pradhaan meree praja par fir andhor n karen parantu israaael ke gharane ko usake gotraen ke anusar desh mile. 
Ezekiel45:9 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, he israaael ke pradhano! bas karo, upadrav aur utpat ko door karo, aur nyay aur dharma ke kam kiya karo meree praja ke logon ko nikal dena chhod do, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel45:10 tumhare pas sachcha tarajo, sachcha aepa, aur sachcha bat rahe." 
Ezekiel45:11 aepa aur bat donon aek hee nap ke ho, arthata donon men homer ka dasavan ansh samaae donon kee nap homer ke hisab se ho." 
Ezekiel45:12 aur shokel bees gera ka ho aur tumhara mana bees, pachchees, ya pandrah shokel ka ho." 
Ezekiel45:13 tumharee uttai hui bhentt yah ho, arthata gehoon ke homer se aepa ka chhttvan ansha, aur jav ke homer men se aepa ka chhttvan ansh dena." 
Ezekiel45:14 aur tel ka niyat ansh kor men se bat ka dasavan ansh ho kor to das bat arthata aek homer ke tuly haai, kyonaki homer das bat ka hota haai." 
Ezekiel45:15 aur israaael kee uttam uttam charaiyon se do do sau bhedbakariyon men se aek bhed va bakaree dee jaae. ye sab vastuen annabali, homabali aur melabali ke liye dee jaaen jis se unake liye praayaashchaitt kiya jaa, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel45:16 israaael ke pradhaan ke liye desh ke sab log yah bhentt den. 
Ezekiel45:17 pava, naye chand ke dino, vishraamadinon aur israaael ke gharane ke sab niyat samayon men homabaali, annabali, aur ardha dena pradhaan hee ka kam ho. israaael ke gharane ke liye praayaashchaitt karane ko vah papabaali, annabali, homabali, aur melabali taaiyar kare." 
Ezekiel45:18 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, pahile maheene ke pahale din ko too aek nidash bachhda lekar paavitrasthan ko paavitra karata." 
Ezekiel45:19 is papabaali ke lohoo men se yajak kuchh lekar bhvan ke chaukhtt ke khmbho, aur vedee kee kusa ke charon kono, aur bheetaree angan ke faattk ke khmbhon par lagaae." 
Ezekiel45:20 fir maheene ke sataven din ko sab bool men pade huon aur bholon ke liye bhee yon hee karana isee prakar se bhvan ke liye praayaashchaitt karana. 
Ezekiel45:21 paahile maheene ke chaudahaven din ko tumhara fasah hua kare, vah sat din ka parva ho aur us men akhmeeree rottee khi jaae." 
Ezekiel45:22 us din pradhaan apane aur praja ke sab logon ke nimitt ek bachhda papabali ke liye taaiyar kare. 
Ezekiel45:23 aur parva ke saton din vah yahova ke liye homabaali taaiyar kare, arthata har aek din sat sat nidash bachhde aur sat sat nidash meddhe aur praati din aek aek bakara papabali ke liye taaiyar kare." 
Ezekiel45:24 aur har aek bachhde aur meddhe ke sath vah aepa bhr annabaali, aur aepa peechhe heen bhr tel taaiyar kare." 
Ezekiel45:25 sataven maheene ke pandrahaven din se lekar sat din tak arthata parva ke dinon men vah papabaali, homabali, annabali, aur tel isee vidhai ke anusar kiya kare." 
Ezekiel46:1 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, bheetaree angan ka poorvamukhee faattk kam kaj ke chhaon din band rahe, parantu vishraamadin ko khula rahe. aur naye chand ke din bhee khula rahe." 
Ezekiel46:2 pradhaan bahar se faattk ke osare ke marga se akar faattk ke aek khmbhe ke pas khda ho jaa, aur yajak usaka homabali aur melabali taaiyar karen aur vah faattk kee devaddhee par dandvata kare tab vah bahar jaa, aur faattk sanjh se pahile band n kiya jaae." 
Ezekiel46:3 aur log vishraam aur naye chand ke dinon men us faattk ke dar men yahova ke samhane dandvata karen. 
Ezekiel46:4 aur vishraamadin men jo homabali pradhaan yahova ke liye chaddhaa, vah bhed ke chh nidash bachche aur aek nidash meddhe ka ho." 
Ezekiel46:5 aur annabaali yah ho, arthata meddhe ke sath aepa bhr ann aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath yathashaktai ann aur aepa peechhe heen bhr tela." 
Ezekiel46:6 aur naye chand ke din vah aek nidash bachhda aur bhed ke chh bachche aur aek meddha chaddhaae ye sab nidash hon. 
Ezekiel46:7 aur bachhde aur meddhe donon ke sath vah aek aek aepa annabali taaiyar kare, aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath yathashaktai ann, aur aepa peechhe heen bhr tela." 
Ezekiel46:8 aur jab pradhaan bheetar jaae tab vah faattk ke osare se hokar jaa, aur usee marga se nikal jaae." 
Ezekiel46:9 jab sadhaaran log niyat samayon men yahova ke samhane dandvata karane aae, tab jo uttaree faattk se hokar dandvata karane ko bheetar aa, vah dakkhianee faattk se hokar nikale, aur jo dakkhianee faattk se hokar bheetar aa, vah uttaree faattk se hokar nikale, arthata jo jis faattk se bheetar aya ho, vah usee faattk se n lautte, apane samhane hee nikal jaae." 
Ezekiel46:10 aur jab ve bheetar aaen tab pradhaan unake beech hokar aae, aur jab ve nikale, tab ve aek sath nikalen." 
Ezekiel46:11 aur pavan aur any niyat samayon ka annabaali bachhde peechhe aepa bhr, aur meddhe peechhe aepa bhr ka ho aur bhed ke bachchon ke sath yathashaaktai ann aur aepa peechhe heen bhr tela." 
Ezekiel46:12 fir jab pradhaan homabali va melabali ko svechchha baali karake yahova ke liye taaiyar kare, tab poorvamukhee faattk unake liye khola jaa, aur vah apana homabali va melabali vaaise hee taaiyar kare jaaise vah vishraamadin ko karata haai tab vah nikale, aur usake nikalane ke peechhe faattk band kiya jaae." 
Ezekiel46:13 aur praati din too varsha bhr ka aek nidash bhed ka bachcha yahova ke homabali ke liye taaiyar karana, yah praati bhor ko taaiyar kiya jaae." 
Ezekiel46:14 aur praati bhor ko usake sath aek annabali taaiyar karana, arthata aepa ka chhttvan ansh aur maaida men milane ke liye heen bhr tel kee tihai yahova ke liye sada ka annabali nity vidhai ke anusar chaddhaya jaae." 
Ezekiel46:15 bhed ka bachcha, annabali aur tel, praati bhor ko nity homabaali karake chaddhaya jaae." 
Ezekiel46:16 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, yadi pradhaan apane kisee putra ko kuchh de, to vah usaka bhag hokar usake poton ko bhee mile bhag ke niyam ke anusar vah unaka bhee nij ghan tthare." 
Ezekiel46:17 parantu yadi vah apane bhag men se apane kisee karmacharee ko kuchh de, to chhuttee ke varsha tak to vah usaka bana rahe, parantu usake bad pradhaan ko laaitta diya jaae aur usaka nij bhag hee usake putraen ko mile." 
Ezekiel46:18 aur praja ka aeesa koi bhag pradhaan n le, jo andhor se unakee nij boomi se chheena ho apane putraen ko vah apanee hee nij boomi men se bhag de aeesa n ho ki meree praja ke log apanee apanee nij boomi se titara-abitar ho jaaen." 
Ezekiel46:19 fir vah mujhe faattk kee aek alang men dar se hokar yajakon kee uttaramukhee pavitra kottriyon men le gaya vahan paashchaim or ke kone men aek sthan tha. 
Ezekiel46:20 tab us ne mujh se kaha, yah vah sthan haai jis men yajak log doshabaali aur papabali ke mans ko pakaaen aur annabali ko pakaae, aeesa n ho ki unhen baharee angan men le jane se sadhaaran log pavitra ttharen." 
Ezekiel46:21 tab us ne mujhe baharee angan men le jakar us angan ke charon konon men firaya, aur angan ke har aek kone men aek aek ott bana tha," 
Ezekiel46:22 arthata angan ke charon konon men chalees hath lambe aur tees hath chaude ott the charon konon ke otton kee aek hee map thee. 
Ezekiel46:23 aur bheetar charon or bheet thee, aur bheeton ke neeche pakane ke choolhe bane huae the." 
Ezekiel46:24 tab us ne mujh se kaha, pakane ke ghar, jahan bhvan ke tthaluae logon ke baalidanon ko pakaae, ve ye hee haain." 
Ezekiel47:1 fir vah mujhe bhvan ke dar par lautta le gaya aur bhvan kee devaddhee ke neeche se aek sota nikalakar poorva or bah raha tha. bhvan ka dar to poorvamukhee tha, aur sota bhvan ke poorva aur vedee ke dakkhian, neeche se nikalata tha." 
Ezekiel47:2 tab vah mujhe uttar ke faattk se hokar bahar le gaya, aur bahar bahar se ghaumakar baharee arthata poorvamukhee faattk ke pas pahuncha diya aur daakkhianee alang se jal paseejakar vah raha tha." 
Ezekiel47:3 jab vah purush hath men mapane kee doree liae huae poorva or nikala, tab us ne bhvan se lekar, hajar hath tak us sote ko mapa, aur mujhe jal men se chalaya, aur jal ttkhnon tak tha." 
Ezekiel47:4 us ne fir hajar hath mapakar mujhe jal men se chalaya, aur jal ghauttnon tak tha, fir or hajar hath mapakar mujhe jal men se chalaya, aur jal kamar tak tha." 
Ezekiel47:5 tab fir us ne aek hajar hath mape, aur aeesee nadee ho gai jisake par maain n ja saka, kyonaki jal baddhkar taairane ke yogy tha arthata aeesee nadee thee jisake par koi n ja sakata tha." 
Ezekiel47:6 tab us ne mujh se poochha, he manushy ke santan, kya too ne yah dekha haai? fir us ne mujhe nadee ke teer lauttakar pahuncha diya." 
Ezekiel47:7 lauttkar maain ne kya dekha, ki nadee ke donon teeron par bahut se vraksha haain." 
Ezekiel47:8 tab us ne mujh se kaha, yah sota poova desh kee or bah raha haai, aur araba men utarakar tal kee or bahega aur yah bhvan se nikala hua seedha tal men mil jaaega aur usaka jal meetta ho jaaega." 
Ezekiel47:9 aur jahan jahan yah nadee bahe, vahan vahan sab prakar ke bahut ande denevale jeevajantu jeeaenge aur machhaliyan bhee bahut ho jaaengee kyonki is sote ka jal vahan pahuncha haai, aur tal ka jal meetta ho jaaega aur jaha kaheen yah nadee pahunchegee vahan sab jantu jeeaenge." 
Ezekiel47:10 tal ke teer par machhve khde rahenge, aur aenagadee se lekar aeeneglaaim tak ve jal faailaae jaaenge, aur unhen mahasagar kee see bhanati bhanati kee anaaginit machhaliyan milengee." 
Ezekiel47:11 parantu tal ke pas jo daladal or gadhe haai, unaka jal meetta n hoga ve khare hee rahenge." 
Ezekiel47:12 aur nadee ke donon teeron par bhanati bhanati ke khane yogy faladai praksha upajenge, jinake patte n murjhaaenge aur unaka falana bhee kabhee band n hoga, kyonaki nadee ka jal paavitra sthan se tikala haai. un men maheene maheene, naye naye fal lagenge. unake fal to khane ke, or patte aushadhai ke kam aaenge." 
Ezekiel47:13 parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jis sivane ke bheetar tum ko yah desh apane barahon gotraen ke anusar banttna padega, vah yah haai yoosufa ko do bhag milen." 
Ezekiel47:14 aur use tum aek doosare ke saman nij bhag men paoge, kyonki maain ne shapath khai ki use tumhare pitaron ko doonga, so yah desh tumhara nij bhag ttharega." 
Ezekiel47:15 desh ka sivana yah ho, arthata uttar or ka sivana mahasagar se lekar hetalon ke pas se sadad kee ghaattee tak pahunche," 
Ezekiel47:16 aur us sivane ke pas hamat berota, aur sibraaim jo damishk or hamat ke sivanon ke beech men haai, aur hasarhatteekon tak, jo hauran ke sivane par haai." 
Ezekiel47:17 aur yah sivana samudra se lekar daamishk ke sivane ke pas ke hasarenon tak mahunche, aur usakee uttar or hamat ho. uttar ka sivana yahee ho." 
Ezekiel47:18 aur poova sivana jisakee aek or hauran daamishka aur yaradan kee or gilad aur israaael ka desh ho uttaree sivane se lekar poova tal tak use mapana. poova sivana to yahee ho. 
Ezekiel47:19 aur daakkhianee sivana tamar se lekar kadesh ke mareebot nam sote tak arthata misra ke nale tak, aur mahasagar tak mahunche. daakkhianee sivana yahee ho." 
Ezekiel47:20 aur paashchaimeeasivana dakkhianee sivane se lekar hamat kee ghaattee ke samhane tak ka mahasagar ho. pachchhimee sivana yahee ho. 
Ezekiel47:21 is prakar desh ko israaael ke gotraen ke anusar apas men bantt lena. 
Ezekiel47:22 aur isako apas men aur un paradeshaiyon ke sath bantt lena, jo tumhare beech rahate huae balakon ko janmaaen. ve tumharee draashtti men deshaee israaaeliyon kee nai tthare, aur tumhare gotraen ke beech apana apana bhag paaen." 
Ezekiel47:23 jo paradeshaee jis gotra ke desh men rahata ho, usako vaheen bhag dena, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel48:1 gotron ke bhag ye hon uttar sivane se laga hua hetalon ke marga ke pas se hamat kee ghaattee tak, aur daamishk ke sivane ke pas ke hamarenan se uttar or hamat ke pas tak aek bhag dan ka ho aur usake poova aur pashchaimee sivane bhee hon." 
Ezekiel48:2 dan ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pashchaim tak ashor ka aek bhag ho. 
Ezekiel48:3 ashor ke sivane se laga hua, poorva se pashchaim tak naptalee ka aek bhag ho." 
Ezekiel48:4 taptalee ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pashchaim tak manashsho ka aek bhaga. 
Ezekiel48:5 manashsho ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak aepraaim ka aek bhag ho. 
Ezekiel48:6 aepraaim ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak rooben ka aek bhag ho. 
Ezekiel48:7 aur rooben ke sivane se laga hua, poorva se pachchhim tak yahooda ka aek bhag ho." 
Ezekiel48:8 yahooda ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak vah arpan kiya hua bhag ho, jise tumhen arpan karana hoga, vah pachchees hajar bans chauda aur poorva se paachchhim tak kisee aek gotra ke bhag ke tuly lamba ho, aur usake beech men paavitrasthan ho." 
Ezekiel48:9 jo bhag tumhen yahova ko arpan karana hoga, usakee lambai pachchas hajar bans aur chaudai das hajar bans kee ho." 
Ezekiel48:10 yah arpan kiya hua pavitra bhag yajakon ko mile vah uttar or pachchees hajar bans lamba, paachchhim or das hajar bans chauda, poorva or das hajar bans chauda aur dakkhian or pachchees hajar bans lamba ho aur usake beechobeech yahova ka paavitrasthan ho." 
Ezekiel48:11 yah vishosh pavitra bhag sadok kee santan ke un yajakon ka ho jo meree agyaaon ko palate rahe, aur israaaeliyon ke bhttk jane ke samay leviyon kee nai n bhttke the." 
Ezekiel48:12 so desh ke arpan kiae huae bhag men se yah unake liye arpan kiya hua bhag, arthataparamapavitra desh tthare aur leviyon ke sivane se laga rahe." 
Ezekiel48:13 aur yajakon ke sivane se laga hua leviyon ka bhag ho, vah pachchees hajar bans lamba aur das hajar bans chauda ho. saree lambai pachchees hajar bans kee aur chodai das hajar bans kee ho." 
Ezekiel48:14 ve us men se n to kuchh beje, n doosaree boomi se badalen aur n boomi kee pahilee upaj aur kisee ko dee jaae. kyonaki vah yahova ke liye paavitra haai." 
Ezekiel48:15 aur chaudai ke pachchees hajar bans ke samhane jo panch hajar bacha rahega, vah nagar aur bastee aur charai ke liye sadhaaran bhag ho aur nagar usake beech men ho." 
Ezekiel48:16 or nagar kee yah map ho, arthata uttar, daakkhian, poorva aur pachchhim or saddhe char char hajar hath." 
Ezekiel48:17 aur nagar ke pas uttar, daakkhian, poorva, pachchhim, charaiyan hon jo addhai addhai sau bans chaudee hon." 
Ezekiel48:18 aur arpan kiae huae paavitra bhag ke pas kee lambai men se jo kuchh bache, arthata poorva aur paachchhim donon or das das bans jo arpan kiae huae bhag ke pas ho, usakee upaj nagar men paarishram karanevalon ke khane ke liye ho." 
Ezekiel48:19 aur israaael ke sare gotraen men se jo tagar men parishram kare, ve usakee khetee kiya karen." 
Ezekiel48:20 sara arpan kiya hua bhag pachchees hajar bans lamba aur pachchees hajar bans chauda ho tumhen chaukona pavitra bhag arpan karana hoga jis men nagar kee vishosh boomi ho. 
Ezekiel48:21 aur jo bhag rah jaa, vah pradhaan ko mile. paavitra arpan kiae huae bhag kee, aur nagar kee vishosh boomi kee donon or arthata unakee poorva aur paachchhim alangon ke pachchees pachchees hajar bans kee chaudai ke pas, jo or gotraen ke bhagon ke pas rahe, vah pradhaan ko mile. aur arpan kiya hua pavitra bhag aur bhvan ka pavitrasthan unake beech men ho." 
Ezekiel48:22 jo pradhaan ka bhag hoga, vah leviyon ke beech aur nagaron kee vishosh boomi ho. pradhaan ka bhag yahooda aur binyameen ke sivane ke beech men ho." 
Ezekiel48:23 any gotron ke bhag is prakar hon poorva se paachchhim tak binyameen ka aek bhag ho. 
Ezekiel48:24 binyameen ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak shaimon ka aek bhaga. 
Ezekiel48:25 shaimon ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak issakar ka aek bhaga. 
Ezekiel48:26 issakar ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak jabooloon ka aek bhaga. 
Ezekiel48:27 jabooloon ke sivane se laga hua poorva se pachchhim tak gad ka aek bhaga. 
Ezekiel48:28 aur gad ke sivane ke pas dakkhian or ka sivana tamar se lekar kadesh ke mareebot nam sote tak, aur misra ke nale or mahasagar tak pahunche." 
Ezekiel48:29 jo desh tumhen israaael ke gotraen ko banttna hoga vah yahee haai, aur unake bhag bhee ye hee haai, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Ezekiel48:30 tagar ke nikas ye ho, arthata uttar kee alang jisakee lambai saddhe char hajar bans kee ho." 
Ezekiel48:31 us men teen faattk ho, arthata ek rooben ka faattk, ek yahooda ka faattk, aur ek levee ka faattk ho kyonki nagar ke faattkon ke nam israael ke gotraen ke namon par rakhne honge." 
Ezekiel48:32 aur poorab kee alang saddhe char hajar bans lambee jo, aur us men teen faattk hon arthata aek yoosufa ka faattk, aek binyameen ka faattk, aur aek dan ka faattk ho." 
Ezekiel48:33 aur daakkhian kee alang saddhe char hajar bans lambee ho, aur us men teen faattk hon arthata aek shaimon ka faattk, aek issakar ka faattk, aur aek jabooloon ka faattk ho." 
Ezekiel48:34 aur paashchaim kee alang saddhe char hajar bans lambee ho, aur us men teen faattk hon arthta aek gad ka faattk, aek ashor ka faattk aur naptalee ka faattk ho." 
Ezekiel48:35 tagar kee charon alangon ka ghora attarah hajar bans ka ho, aur us din se age ko nagar ka nam yahova shaamma rahega." 
Daniel1:1 yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ke rajy ke teesare varsha men babul ke raja nabookadanessar ne yaroosholam par chaddhai karake usako ghor liya. 
Daniel1:2 tab parameshvar ne yahooda ke raja yahoyakeem ko parameshvar ke bhvan ke kai patraen sahit usake hath men kar diya aur us ne un patraen ko shainar desh men apane devata ke mandair men le jakar, apane devata ke bhndar men rakh diya." 
Daniel1:3 tab us raja ne apane khojon ke pradhaan ashapanaj ko agyaa dee ki israaelee rajaputraen aur pratishttit purooshaen men se aeese kai javanon ko la," 
Daniel1:4 jo nirdosha, sundar aur sab prakar kee buddh imen pravee, aur gyaan men nipun aur vidana aur rajamandair men hajir rahane ke yogy hon aur unhen kasaadiyon ke shaasr aur bhasha kee shaiksha de." 
Daniel1:5 aur raja ne agyaa dee ki usake bhojan aur peene ke dakhmadha men se unhen praatidin khane-peene ko diya jaae. is prakar teen varsha tak unaka palan poshan hota rahe tab usake bad ve raja ke samhane haajir kiae jaaen. 
Daniel1:6 un men yahooda kee santan se chune hua, daaniyyel, hananyah, meeshaael, aur ajaryah nam yahoodee the." 
Daniel1:7 aur khojon ke pradhaan ne unake doosare nam rakhen arthata daaniyyel ka nam rakhe arthata daaniyyel ka nam us ne belatashassar, hananyah ka shadrak, meeshaaael ka meshak, aur ajaryah ka nam abedanago rakha.." 
Daniel1:8 parantu daniyyel ne apane man men ttan liya ki vah raja ka bhojan khakar, aur usake peene ka dakhmadha peekar apavitra n hoae isaliye us ne khojon ke pradhaan se binatee kee ki use apavitra n hona pade." 
Daniel1:9 parameshvar ne khojon ke pradhaan ke man men daniyyel ke prati krapa aur daya bhr dee. 
Daniel1:10 aur khojon ke pradhaan ne daniyyel se kaha, maain apane svamee raja se drata hoo, kyonki tumhara khana-peena usee ne ttharaya haai, kaheen aeesa n ho ki vah tera munh tere sangee ke javanon se utara hua aur udas dekhe aur tum mera sir raja ke samhane jakhaim men dalo." 
Daniel1:11 tab daaniyyel ne us mukhaiye se, jisako khojon ke pradhaan ne daaniyyel, hananyah, meeshaaael, aur ajaryah ke upar dekhbhal karane ke liye niyakt kiya tha, kaha," 
Daniel1:12 maain teree binatee karata hoo, apane dason ko das din tak janch, hamare khane ke liye sagapat aur peene ke liye panee hee diya jaae." 
Daniel1:13 fir das din ke bad hamare munh aur jo javan raja ka bhojan khate haain unake munh ko dekh aur jaaisa tujhe dekh pade, usee ke anusar apane dason se vyavahar karana." 
Daniel1:14 unakee yah binatee us ne man lee, aur das din tak unako janchata raha." 
Daniel1:15 das din ke bad unake munh raja ke bhojan ke khanevale sab javanon se adhaikar achchhe aur chikane dekh pade. 
Daniel1:16 tab vah muakhaiya unaka bhojan aur unake peene ke liye ttharaya hua dakhmadha donon chhudakar, unako sagapat dene laga.." 
Daniel1:17 aur parameshvar ne un charon javanon ko sab shaasre, aur sab prakar kee vidhaon men buddhmaianee aur praveenta dee aur daaniyyel sab prakar ke darshan aur svapan ke arth ka gyaanee ho gaya." 
Daniel1:18 tab jitane din ke bad nabookadanessar raja ne javanon ko bheetar le ane kee agyaa dee thee, utane din ke beetane par khojon ke pradhaan unhen usake samane le gaya." 
Daniel1:19 aur raja un se batacheet karane laga aur daaniyyel, hananyah, meeshaaael, aur ajaryah ke tuly un sab men se koi n tthara isaaliye ve raja ke sammukh hajir rahane lage." 
Daniel1:20 aur buaddh iddh aur har prakar kee samajh ke vishay men jo kuchh raja un se poochhta tha us men ve rajy bhr ke sab jyotishayon aur tantriayon se dasagune nipun ttharate the. 
Daniel1:21 aur daaniyyel kusroo raja ke pahile varsha tak bana raha.. 
Daniel2:1 apane rajy ke doosare varsha men nabookadanessar ne aeesa svapn dekha jis se usaka man bahut hee vyakul ho gaya aur usako neend n ai. 
Daniel2:2 tab raja ne agyaa dee, ki jyotishae, tantrae, ttonahe aur kasadee bulaae jaaen ki ve raja ko usaka svapt bataaen so ve aae aur raja ke samhane haajir hue." 
Daniel2:3 tab raja ne un se kaha, maain ne aek svapn dekha haai, aur mera man vyakul haai ki svapan ko kaaise samajoon." 
Daniel2:4 kasadiyon ne, raja se aramee bhasha men kaha, he raja, too chiranjeev rahe! apane dason ko svapn bata, aur ham usaka fal bataaenge." 
Daniel2:5 raja ne kasaadiyon ko uttr diya, maain yah agyaa de chuka hoon ki yadi tum fal samet svapn ko n bataoge to tum ttukade ttukade kiae jaoge, aur tumhare ghar faunkava diae jaaenge." 
Daniel2:6 aur yaadi tum fal samet svapn ko bata do to mujh se bhanati bhanati ke dan aur bharee praatishtta paoge. 
Daniel2:7 isaliye tum mujhe fal samet svapn batao. unhon ne doosaree bar kaha, he raja svapn tere dason ko bataya jaa, aur ham usaka fal samajha denge." 
Daniel2:8 raja ne uttr diya, maain nishchay janata hoon ki tum yah dekhkar, ki raja ke munh se agyaa nikal chukee haai, samay baddhana chahate ho." 
Daniel2:9 isaliye yaadi tum mujhe svapn n batao to tumhare liye aek hee agyaa haai. kyonaki tum ne goshttee kee hogee ki jab tak samay n badale, tab tak ham raja ke samhane joottee aur gapashap kee baten kaha karenge. isaliye tum mujhe svapn ko batao, tab maain janoonga ki tum usaka fal bhee samajha sakate ho." 
Daniel2:10 kasadiyon ne raja se kaha, prathvee bhr men aeesa koi manushy naheen jo raja ke man kee bat bata sake aur n koi aeesa raja, va pradhaan, va hakim kabhee hua haai jis ne kisee jyotishaee va tantrae, va kasadee se aeesee bat poochhee ho." 
Daniel2:11 jo bat raja poochhta haai, vah anokhee haai, aur devataon ko chhodkar jinaka nivas manushyon ke sang naheen haai, aur koi doosara nahee, jo raja ko yah bata sake.." 
Daniel2:12 is par raja ne jhunjhlakar, aur bahut kee krodhait hokar, babul ke sab paanditon ke nash karane kee agyaa de dee." 
Daniel2:13 so yah agyaa nikalee, aur pandit logon ka ghaat hone par tha aur log daaniyyel aur usake sanagiyon ko ddoonddh rahe the ki ve bhee ghaat kiae jaaen." 
Daniel2:14 tab daaniyyel ne, jalladon ke pradhaan ayork se, jo babul ke paanditon ko ghaat karane ke liye nikala tha, soch vicharakar aur buaddhmaianee ke sath kaha" 
Daniel2:15 aur raja ke hakim aryok se poochhne laga, yah agyaa raja kee or se aeesee utavalee ke sath kyon nikalee? tab aryok ne daniyyel ko isaka bhed bata diya." 
Daniel2:16 aur daaniyyel ne bheetar jakar raja se binatee kee, ki usake liye koi samay ttharaya jaa, to vah maharaj ko svapn ka fal bata dega." 
Daniel2:17 tab daaniyyel ne apane ghar jakar, apane sangee hananyah, meeshaaael, aur ajaryah ko yah hal batakar kaha," 
Daniel2:18 is bhed ke vishash men svarga ke paramashevar kee daya ke liye yah kahakar praarthna karo, ki babul ke aur sab paanditon ke sang daniyyel aur usake sangee bhee nash n kiae jaaen." 
Daniel2:19 tab vah bhed daaniyyel ko rat ke samay darshan ke dara pragatt kiya gaya. so daniyyel ne svarga ke parameshvar ka yah kahakar dhanyavad kiya," 
Daniel2:20 parameshvar ka nam yuganuyug dhany haai kyonki buddh iddh aur parakram usee ke haain. 
Daniel2:21 samayon aur retuon ko vahee palattta haai rajaon ka ast aur uday bhee vahee karata haai buddhmaianon ko buddh iddh aur samajhvalon ko samajh bhee vahee deta haai 
Daniel2:22 vahee gooddh aur gupt baton ko pragatt karata haai vah janata haai ki andhiayare men kya haai, aur usake sang sada prakash bana rahata haai." 
Daniel2:23 he mere poorvajon ke paramashevar, maain tera dhanyavad aur stuti karata hoo, kyonki too ne mujhe buaddh iddh aur shaaktai dee haai, aur jis bhed ka khulana ham logon n tujh se mange tha, use too ne mujh par pragatt kiya haai, too ne ham ko raja kee bat batai haai." 
Daniel2:24 tab daaniyyel ne aryok ke pas, jise raja ne babul ke paanditon ke nash karane ke liye ttharaya tha, bheetar jakar kaha, babul ke panditon ka nash n kar, mujhe raja ke sammukh bheetar le chal, maain fal bataunga.." 
Daniel2:25 tab ayork ne daniyyel ko raja ke sammukh shaeegha bheetar le jakar us se kaha, yahoodee bandhauon men se aek puroosh mujh ko mila haai, jo raja ko svapn ka fal bataaega." 
Daniel2:26 raja ne daniyyel se, jisaka nam belatashassar bhee tha, poochha, kya tujh men itanee shaktai haai ki jo svapn maain ne dekha haai, use fal samet mujhe bataae?" 
Daniel2:27 daaniyyel ne raja ka uttr diya, jo bhed raja poochhta haai, vah n to paandit n tantrae, n jyotishae, n doosare bhavee batanevale raja ko bata sakate haai," 
Daniel2:28 parantu bhedon ka pragattkartta parameshvar svarga men haai aur usee ne nabookadanessar raja ko jataya haai ki ant ke dinon men kya kya honavala haai. tera svapan aur jo kuchh too ne palang par pade huae dekha, vah yah haai:" 
Daniel2:29 he raja, jab tujh ko palang par yah vichar hua ki bhvishy men kya kya honevala haai, tab bhedon ko kholanevale ne tujh ko bataya, ki kya kya honevala haai." 
Daniel2:30 mujh par yah bhed is karan naheen khola gaya ki maain aur sab praanaiyon se aadhaik buddhmaian hoo, parantu keval isee karan khola gaya haai ki svapan ka fal raja ko bataya jaa, aur too apane man ke vichar samajh sake.." 
Daniel2:31 he raja, jab too dekh raha tha, tab aek badee mootira dekh padee, aur vah mootira jo tere samhane khdee thee, so lambee chaudee thee usakee chamak anupam thee, aur usaka roop bhyankar tha." 
Daniel2:32 us mootira ka sir to chokhe sone ka tha, usakee chhatee aur bhujaen chandee kee, usaka pett aur jangho peetal kee," 
Daniel2:33 usakee ttange lohe kee aur usake panv kuchh to lohe ke aur kuchh mittee ke the. 
Daniel2:34 fir dekhte dekhte, too ne kya dekha, ki aek patthr ne, bina kisee ke khode, ap hee ap ukhdkar us mootira ke panvon par lagakar jo lohe aur mittee ke the, unako choor choor kar dala." 
Daniel2:35 tab loha, mittee, peetal, chandee aur sona bhee sab choor choor ho gaa, aur dhoopakal men khalihanon ke boose kee nain hava se aeese ud gaae ki unaka kaheen pata n raha aur vah patthr jo mootira par laga tha, vah bada pahad banakar saree prathvee men faail gaya.." 
Daniel2:36 svapan to yon hee hua aur ab ham usaka fal raja ko samajha dete haain. 
Daniel2:37 he raja, too to maharajaadhaira haai, kyonki svarga ke parameshvar ne tujh ko rajy, samarth, shaktai aur mahima dee haai," 
Daniel2:38 aur jahan kaheen manushy paae jate haai, vahan us ne un sabhon ko, aur maaidan ke jeevajantu, aur akash ke pakshaee bhee tere vash men kar diae haain aur tujh ko un sab ka adhaikaree ttharaya haai. yah sone ka sir too hee haai." 
Daniel2:39 tere bad aek rajy aur uday hoga jo tujh se chhotta hoga fir aek aur teesara peetal ka sa rajy hoga jis men saree prathvee a jaaegee. 
Daniel2:40 aur chautha rajy lohe ke tuly majaboot hoga lohe se to sab vastuen choor choor ho jatee aur pis jatee haain isaliye jis bhanati lohe se ve sab kuchalee jatee haai, usee bhanti, us chauthe rajy se sab kuchh choor choor hokar pis jaaega." 
Daniel2:41 aur too ne jo mootira ke panvon aur unakee ungaaliyon ko dekha, jo kuchh kumhar kee mittee kee aur kuchh lohe kee thee, is se vah chautha rajy batta hua hoga taubhee us men lohe ka sa kadapan rahega, jaaise ki too ne kumhar kee mittee ke sang loha bhee mila hua dekha tha." 
Daniel2:42 aur jaaise panvon kee ungaaliyan kuchh to lohe kee aur kuchh mittee kee thee, isaka arth yah haai, ki vah rajy kuchh to draddh aur kuchh nirbal hoga." 
Daniel2:43 aur too ne jo lohe ko kumhar kee mittee ke sang mila hua dekha, isaka arth yah haai, ki us rajy ke log aek doosare manushyon se mile jule to rahenge, parantu jaaise loha mittee ke sath mel naheen khata, vaaise hee ve bhee aek n bane rahenge." 
Daniel2:44 aur un rajaon ke dinon men svarga ka parameshvar, aek aeesa rajy uday karega jo anantakal tak n toottega, aur n vah kisee doosaree jati ke hath men kiya jaaega. varan vah un sab rajyon ko choor choor karega, aur unaka ant kar dalega aur vah sada sthiar rahega" 
Daniel2:45 jaaisa too ne dekha ki aek patthr kisee ke hath ke bin khode pahad men se ukhda, aur us ne lohe, peetar, mittee, chandee, aur sone ko choor choor kiya, isee reeti mahana parameshvar ne raja ko jataya haai ki isake bad kya kya honevala haai. n svapn men aur n usake fal men kuchh sandeh haai.." 
Daniel2:46 itana sunakar nabookadanessar raja ne munh ke bal girakar daniyyel ko dandvata kee, aur agyaa dee ki usako bhentt chaddhao, aur usake samhane sugandha vastu jalao." 
Daniel2:47 fir raja ne daaniyyel se kaha, sach to yah haai ki tum logon ka parameshvar, sab ishvaron ka ishvar, rajaon ka raja aur bhedon ka kholanevala haai, isaliye too yah bhed pragatt kar paya." 
Daniel2:48 tab raja ne daniyyel ka pad bada kiya, aur usako bahut se bade bade dan diae aur yah agyaa dee ki vah babul ke sare praant par hakim aur babul ke sab paanditon par mukhy pradhaan bane." 
Daniel2:49 tab daaniyyel ke binatee karane se raja ne shadrak, meshak, aur abedanago ko babul ke praant ke karya ke upar niyukt kar diya parantu daniyyel ap hee raja ke darabar men raha karata tha.." 
Daniel3:1 nabookadanessar raja ne sone kee aek moorat banavai, jinakee unchai satt hat, aur chaudai chh: hath kee thee. aur us ne usako babul ke praant ke doora nam maaidan men khda karaya." 
Daniel3:2 tab nabookadanessar raja ne aadhaipaatiyo, hakimo, gavarnaro, jajo, khjannaachiyo, nyaayiyo, shaaastriayo, adi praanta-praant ke sab aadhaikaariyon ko bulava bheja ki ve us moorat kee pratishtta men aaen jo us ne khdee karai thee." 
Daniel3:3 tab aadhaipaati, hakim, garvanar, jaj, khjannachee, nyayee, shaasree aadi praanta-praant ke sab aadhaikaree nabookadanessar raja kee khdee karai hui moorat kee praatishtta ke liye ikatthe hua, aur us moorat ke samhane khde hue." 
Daniel3:4 tab ddhniddhoriye ne unche shabd se pukarakar kaha, he desha-desh aur jati-jati ke logo, aur bhainn bhainn bhasha bolanevalo, tum ko yah agyaa sunai jatee haai ki," 
Daniel3:5 jis samay tum narasinge, bansulee, veena, sarangee, sitar, shahanai aadi sab prakar ke bajon ka shabd suno, tum usee samay girakar nabookadanessar raja kee khdee karai huae sone kee moorat ko dandvata karo." 
Daniel3:6 aur jo koi girakar dandvata n karega vah usee ghadee dhadhakate huae bhtthe ke beech men dal diya jaaega. 
Daniel3:7 is karan us samay jyon hee sab jati ke logon ko narasinge, bansulee, veena, sarangee, sitar shahanai adi sab prakar ke bajon ka shabd sun pada, tyon hee desha-desh aur jati-jati ke logon aur bhainna-abhainn bhasha bolanevalon ne girakar us sone kee moorat ko jo nabookadanessar raja ne khdee karai thee, dandvata kee.." 
Daniel3:8 usee samay kai ek kasadee puroosh raja ke pas gaa, aur kapatt se yahoodiyon kee chugalee khai." 
Daniel3:9 ve nabukadanessar raja se kahane lage, he raja, too chiranjeev rahe." 
Daniel3:10 he raja, too ne to yah agyaa dee haai ki jo manushy naraasinge, bansulee, veena, sarangee, sitar, shahanai aadi sab prakar ke bajon ka shabd sune, vah girakar us sone kee moorat ko dandvat kare" 
Daniel3:11 aur jo koi girakar dandvata n kare vah dhadhakate huae bhtthe ke beech men dal diya jaae. 
Daniel3:12 dek, shadrak, meshak, aur abedanago nam kuchh yahoodee puroosh haai, jinhen too ne babul ke praant ke karya ke upar niyukt kiya haai. un purooshaen ne, he raja, teree agyaa kee kuchh chinta naheen kee ve tere devata kee upasana naheen karate, aur jo sone kee moorat too ne khdee karai haai, usako dandvata naheen karate.." 
Daniel3:13 tab nabookadanessar ne rosh aur jalajalahatt men akar agyaa dee ki shadrak meshak aur abedanago ko lao. tab ve puroosh raja ke samhane haajir kiae gaae. 
Daniel3:14 nabookadanessar ne un se poochha, he shadrak, meshak aur abedanago, tum log jo mere devata kee upasana naheen karate, aur meree khdee karai hui sone kee moorat ko dandvata naheen karate, so kya tum jan boojhkar aeesa karate ho?" 
Daniel3:15 yaadi tum abhee taaiyar ho, ki jab naraasinge, bausulee, veena, sarangee, sitar, shahanai aadi sab prakar ke bajon ka shabd suno, aur usee kshan girakar meree banavai hui moorat ko dandvata karo, to bachoge aur yadi tum dandvata ne karo to isee ghadee dhadhakate huae bhtthe ke beech men dale jaoge fir aeesa kaun devata haai, jo tum ko mere hath se chhuda sake?" 
Daniel3:16 shadrak, meshak aur abedanago ne raja se kaha, he nabookadanessar, is vishay men tujhe uttr dene ka hamen kuchh prayojan naheen jan padta." 
Daniel3:17 hamara parameshvar, jisakee ham upasana karate haain vah ham ko us dhadhakate huae bhtte kee ag se bachane kee shaaktai rakhta haai varan he raja, vah hamen tere hath se bhee chhuda sakata haai." 
Daniel3:18 parantu, yadi nahee, to he raja tujhe maloom ho, ki ham log tere devata kee upasana naheen karenge, aur n teree khdee karai hui sone kee moorat ko dandvata karenge.." 
Daniel3:19 tab nabookadanessar jhunjhla utta, aur usake chehare ka rang shadrak, meshak aur abedanago kee or badal gaya. aur us ne agyaa dee ki bhtthe ko sataguna adhaik dhadhaka do." 
Daniel3:20 fir apanee sena men ke kai aek balavana purooshaen ko us ne agyaa dee, ki shadrak, meshak aur abedanago ko bandhakar unhen dhadhakate huae bhtthe men dal do." 
Daniel3:21 tab ve puroosh apane mojo, angarakho, bagon aur aur vasren saahit bandhakar, us dhadhakate huae bhtthe men dal diae gaae." 
Daniel3:22 vah bhttha to raja kee draddh agyaa hone ke karan atyant dhadhakaya gaya tha, is karan jin purooshaen ne shadrak, meshak aur abedanago ko uttaya ve hee ag kee anch se jal mare." 
Daniel3:23 aur usee dhadhakate huae bhtthe ke beech ye teenon puroosha, shadrak, meshak aur abedanago, bandho huae faenk diae gaae.." 
Daniel3:24 tab nabookadanessare raja achaambhiat hua aur ghabarakar utt khda hua. aur apane mantriayon se poochhne laga, kya ham ne us ag ke beech teen hee puroosh bandho huae naheen dlavaae? unhon ne raja ko uttr diya, han raja, sach bat to haai." 
Daniel3:25 fir us ne kaha, ab maain dekhta hoon ki char puroosh ag ke beech khule huae tthal rahe haai, aur unako kuchh bhee hani naheen pahunchee aur chauthe puroosh ka svaroop ishvar ke putra ke sadrashy haai.." 
Daniel3:26 fir nabookadanessar us dhadhakate huae bhtthe ke dar ke pas jakar kahane laga, he shadrak, meshak aur abedanago, he paramapradhaan parameshvar ke daso, nikalakar yahan ao! yah sunakar shadrak, meshak aur abedanago ag ke beech se nikal aae." 
Daniel3:27 jab aadhaipaati, hakim, garvanar aur raja ke mantriayon ne, jo ikatthe huae the, un purooshaen kee or dekha, tab unakee deh men ag ka kuchh bhee prabhav naheen paya aur unake sir ka aek bal bhee n jhulasa, n unake moje kuchh bigade, n un men jalane kee kuchh gandha pai gai." 
Daniel3:28 nabookadanessar kahane laga, dhany haai shadrak, meshak aur abedanago ka parameshvar, jis ne apana doot bhejakar apane in dason ko isaaliye bachaya, kyonaki inhon ne raja kee agyaa n manakar, usee par bhrosa rakha, aur yah sochakar apana shareer bhee arpan kiya, ki ham apane parameshvar ko chhod, kisee devata kee upasana va dandvata n karenge." 
Daniel3:29 isaliye ab maain yah agyaa deta hoon ki desha-desh aur jati-jati ke logo, aur bhainna-abhainn bhasha bolanevalon men se jo koi shadrak, meshak aur abedanago ke parameshvar kee kuchh ninda karega, vah ttukade ttukade kiya jaaega, aur usaka ghar ghoora banaya jaaega kyonki aeesa koi aur devata naheen jo is reeati se bacha sake." 
Daniel3:30 tab raja ne babul ke praant men shadrak, meshak, abedanago ka pad aur uncha kiya.." 
Daniel4:1 nabookadanessar raja kee or se desha-desh aur jaati jati ke logo, aur bhainna-abhainn bhasha bolanevale jitane saree prathvee par rahate haai, un sabhon ko yah vachan mila, tumhara kushal kshom baaee!" 
Daniel4:2 mujhe yah achchha laga, ki paramapradhaan parameshvar ne mujhe jo jo chinh aur chamatkar dikhaae haai, unako pragatt karoon." 
Daniel4:3 usake dikhaae huae chinh kya hee bade, aur usake chamatkaron men kya hee badee shaaktai pragatt hotee haai! usaka rajy to sada ka aur usakee prabhuta peeddhee se peeddhee tak banee rahatee haai.." 
Daniel4:4 maain nabookadanessar apane bhvan men chaain se aur prafaullait rahata tha. 
Daniel4:5 maain ne aeesa svapn dekha jisake karan maain dr gaya aur palang par pade pade jo vichar mere man men aae aur jo baten maai ne dekhee, unake karan maain ghabara gaya tha." 
Daniel4:6 tab maain ne agyaa dee ki babul ke sab paandit mere svapn ka fal mujhe batane ke liye mere samhane haajir kiae jaaen. 
Daniel4:7 tab jyotishae, tantrae, kasadee aur honahar batanevale bheetar aa, aur maain ne unako apana svapn bataya, parantu ve usaka fal n bata sake." 
Daniel4:8 nidan daaniyyel mere sammukh aya, jisaka nam mere devata ke nam ke karan belatashassar rakha gaya tha, aur jis men pavitra ishvaron kee atma rahatee haai aur maain ne usako apana svapn yah kahakar bata diya," 
Daniel4:9 ki, he beletashssar too to sab jyotishaiyon ka pradhaan haai, maain janata hoon ki tujh men pavitra ishvaron kee atma rahatee haai, aur too kisee bhed ke karan naheen ghabarata isaaliye jo svapan maain ne dekha haai use fal samet mujhe batakar samajha de." 
Daniel4:10 jo darshan maain ne palang par paya vah yah haai: maain ne dekha, ki prathvee ke beechobeech aek vraksha laga haai usakee unchai bahut badee haai." 
Daniel4:11 vah vraksha bada hokar draddh ho gaya, aur usakee unchai svarga tak pahunchee, aur vah saree prathvee kee chhor tak dekh padta tha." 
Daniel4:12 usake patte sundar, aur us men bahut fal the, yahan tak ki us men sabhon ke liye bhojan tha. usake neeche maaidan ke sab pashuuon ko chhaya milatee thee, aur usakee daliyon men akash kee sab chidiyan basera karata thee, aur sab praanee us se ahar pate the.." 
Daniel4:13 maain ne palang par darshan pate samay kya dekha, ki aek pavitra paharooa svarga se utar aya." 
Daniel4:14 us ne unche shabd se pukarakar yah kaha, vraksha ko katt dalo, usakee daliyon ko chhantt do, usake patte jhad do aur usake fal chhtaira dalo pashu usake neeche se hatt jae, aur chidiyen usakee daaliyon par se ud jaen." 
Daniel4:15 taubhee usake toontt ko jad samet boomi men chhodo, aur usako lohe aur peetal ke bandhan se bandhakar maaidan kee haree ghaas ke beech rahane do. vah akash kee os se bheenga kare aur boomi kee ghaas khane men maaidan ke pashuuon ke sang bhagee ho." 
Daniel4:16 usaka man badale aur manushy ka n rahe, parantu pashu ka sa ban jae aur us par sat kal beeten." 
Daniel4:17 yah agyaa paharooon ke nirny se, aur yah bat paavitra logon ke vachan se nikalee, ki jo jeevit haain ve jan len ki paramapradhaan paramashevar manushyon ke rajy men prabhuta karata haai, aur usako jise chahe use de deta haai, aur vah chhotte se chhotte manushy ko bhee us par niyukt kar deta haai." 
Daniel4:18 mujh nabookadanessar raja ne yahee svapan dekha. so he belatashassar, too isaka fal bata, kyonki mere rajy men aur koi paandit isaka fal mujhe samajha naheen sakata, parantu tujh men to paavitra ishvaron kee atma rahatee haai, is karan too use samajha sakata haai.." 
Daniel4:19 tab daaniyyel jisaka nam belatashassar bhee tha, ghadee bhr ghabarata raha, aur sochate sochate vyakul ho gaya. tab raja kahane laga, he belatashassar is svapn se, va isake fal se too vyakul mat ho. belatashassar ne kaha, he mere prabhu, yah svapn tere baaiariyon par, aur isaka arth tere draeahiyon par fale!"
