Daniel4:20 jis vraksha ho too ne dekha, jo bada aur draddh ho gaya, aur jisakee unchai svarga tak pahunchee aur jo prathvee ke sire tak dikhai deta tha" 
Daniel4:21 jisake patte sundar aur fal bahut the, aur jis men sabhon ke liye bhojan tha jisake neeche maaidan ke sab pashu rahate the, aur jisakee daliyon men akash kee chidiyan basera karatee thee," 
Daniel4:22 he raja, vah too hee haai. too mahan aur samarthee ho gaya, teree mahima baddhee aur svarga tak pahunch gai, aur teree prabhuta prathvee kee chhor tak faailee haai." 
Daniel4:23 aur he raja, too ne jo aek pavitra paahirooae ko svarga se utarate aur yah kahate dekha ki vraksha ko katt dalo aur usaka nash karo, taubhee usake toontt ko jad samet boomi men chhodo, aur usako lohe aur peetal ke bandhan se bandhakar maaidan kee haree ghaas ke beech men rahane do vah akash kee os se bheega kare, aur usako maaidan ke pashuuon ke sang hee bhag mile aur jab tak sat yug us par beet n chuke, tab tak usakee aeesee hee dasha rahe." 
Daniel4:24 he raja, isaka fal jo paramapradhaan ne ttana haai ki raja par ghatte, vah yah haai," 
Daniel4:25 ki too manushyon ke beech se nikala jaaega, aur maaidan ke pashuuon ke sang rahega too baailon kee nai ghaas charega aur sat yug tujh par beetenge, jab tak ki too n jan le ki manushyon ke rajy men paramapradhaan hee prabhuta karata haai, aur jise chahe vah use de deta haai." 
Daniel4:26 aur us vraksha ke toontt ko jad samet chhodne kee agyaa jo hui haai, isaka arth yah haai ki tera rajy tere liye bana rahega aur jab too jan lega ki jagat ka prabhu svarga hee men haai, tab too fir se rajy karane paaega." 
Daniel4:27 is kara, he raja, meree yah sammati sveekar kar, ki yadi too pap chhodkar dharma karane lage, aur adharma chhodkar deena-heenon par daya karane lage, to sambhv haai ki aeesa karane se tera chaain bana rahe.." 
Daniel4:28 yah sab kuchh nabookadanessar raja par ghatt gaya. 
Daniel4:29 barah maheene beetane par jab vah babul ke rajabhvan kee chht par tthal raha tha, tab vah kahane laga," 
Daniel4:30 kya yah bada babul naheen haai, jise maain hee ne apane bal aur samarth se rajaanivas hone ko aur apane pratap kee badai ke liye basaya haai?" 
Daniel4:31 yah vachan raja ke munh se nikalane bhee n paya tha ki akashavanee hui, he raja nabookadanessar tere vishay men yah agyaa nikalatee haai ki rajy tere hath se nikal gaya," 
Daniel4:32 aur too manushyon ke beech men se nikala jaaega, aur maaidan ke pashuuon ke sang rahega aur baailon kee nain ghaas charega9 aur sat kal tujh par beetenge, jab tak ki too n jan le ki paramapradhaan, manushyon ke rajy men prabhuta karata haai aur jise chahe vah use de deta haai." 
Daniel4:33 usee ghadee yah vachan nabookadanessar ke vishay men poora hua. vah manushyon men se nikala gaya, aur baailon kee nain ghaas charane laga, aur usakee deh akash kee os se bheegatee thee, yahan tak ki usake bal ukab paakshiayon ke paron se aur usake nakoon chidiyon ke changulon ke saman baddh gae.." 
Daniel4:34 un dinon ke beetane par, mujh nabookadanessar ne apanee ankhen svarga kee or uttai, aur meree buaddh ifir jyon kee tyon ho gai tab maain ne paramapradhaan ko dhany kaha, aur jo sada jeevit haai usakee stuati aur mahima yah kahakar karane laga: usakee prabhuta sada kee haai aur usaka rajy peeddhee se peeddhee tab bana rahanevala haai." 
Daniel4:35 prathvee ke sab rahanevale usake samhane tuchchh gine jate haai, aur vah svarga kee sena aur prathvee ke rahanevalon ke beech apanee ichchha ke anusar kam karata haai aur koi usako rokakar us se naheen kah sakata haai, too ne yah kya kiya haai?" 
Daniel4:36 usee samay, meree buaddh ifir jyon kee tyon ho gai aur mere rajy kee maahima ke liye mera pratap aur mukutt mujh par fir a gaya. aur mere mantraee aur pradhaan log mujh se bhentt karane ke liye ane lage, aur maain rajy men sthiar ho gaya aur meree aur aadhaik prashansa hone lagee." 
Daniel4:37 ab maain nabookadanessar svarga ke raja ko sarahata hoo, aur usakee stuati aur mahima karata hoon kyonki usake sab kam sachche, aur usake sab vyavahar nyay ke haain aur jo log ghamand se chalate haai, unhen vah neecha kar sakata haai.." 
Daniel5:1 belashassar nam raja ne apane hajar pradhaanon ke liye badee jevanar kee, aur un hajar logon ke samhane dakhmadha piya.." 
Daniel5:2 dakhmadha peete peete belashassar ne agyaa dee, ki sone-chandee ke jo patra mere pita nabookadanessar ne yarooshalem ke maandair men se nikale the, unhen le ao ki raja apane pradhaano, aur raniyon aur rakheliyon samet un men se peeae." 
Daniel5:3 tab jo soene ke patra yarooshalem men parameshvar ke bhvan ke mandair men se nikale gaae the, ve laae gaae aur raja apane pradhaano, aur raniyo, aur rakhealiyon samet un men se peene laga.." 
Daniel5:4 ve dakhmadha pee peekar sone, chandee, peetal, lohe, katt aur patthr ke devataon kee stuati kar hee rahe the," 
Daniel5:5 ki usee ghadee manushy ke hath kee see kai ungaliyan nikalakar deevatt ke samhane rajamaandair kee bheet ke choone par kuchh likhne lageen aur hath ka jo bhag likh raha tha vah raja ko dikhai pada. 
Daniel5:6 use dekhkar raja bhyabheet ho gaya, aur vah apane soch men ghabara gaya, aur usakee kaatt ike jod ddheele ho gaa, aur kanpate kanpate usake ghauttne ek doosare se lagane lage." 
Daniel5:7 tab raja ne unche shabd se pukarakar tantriayo, kasaadiyon aur aur honahar batanevalon ko haajir karavane kee agyaa dee. jab babul ke paandit pas aa, tab raj un se kahane laga, jo koi vah likha hua paddhkar usaka arth mujhe samajhaae use baainjanee rang ka vasr aur usake gale men sone kee kanttmala pahinai jaaegee aur mere rajy men teesara vahee prabhuta karega." 
Daniel5:8 tab raja ke sab pandit log bheetar aa, parantu us likhe huae ko n paddh sake aur n raja ko usaka arth samajha sake." 
Daniel5:9 is par belashassar raja nipatt ghabara gaya aur bhyatur ho gaya aur usake pradhaan bhee bahut vyakul hue.. 
Daniel5:10 raja aur pradhaanon ke vachanon ko sunakar, ranee jevanar ke ghar men ai aur kahane lagee, he raja, too yugayug jeevit rahe, apane man men n ghabara aur n udas ho." 
Daniel5:11 tere rajy men daaniyyel aek puroosh haai jisaka nam tere pita ne belatashassar rakha tha, us men paavitra ishvaron kee atma rahatee haai, aur us raja ke dinon men us men prakasha, praveenta aur ishvaron ke tuly buddh ipai gai. aur he raja, tera pita jo raja tha, us ne usako sab jyotishaiyo, tantriayo, kasaadiyon aur aur honahar batanevalon ka pradhaan ttharaya tha," 
Daniel5:12 kyonaki us men uttm atma, gyaan aur praveenta, aur svapnon ka fal batane aur paheliyan kholane, aur sandeh door karane kee shaktai pai gai. isaaliye ab daaniyyel bulaya jaa, aur vah isaka arth bataaega.." 
Daniel5:13 tab daaniyyel raja ke samhane bheetar bulaya gaya. raja daaniyyel se poochhne laga, kya too vahee daniyyel haai jo mere pita nabookadanessar raja ke yahooda desh se laae huae yahoodee bandhauon men se haai?" 
Daniel5:14 maain ne tere vishay men suna haai ki ishvar kee atma tujh men rahatee haai aur prakasha, praveenta aur uttm buaddh itujh men pai jatee haai." 
Daniel5:15 dek, abhee paandit aur tantraee log mere samhane isaaliye laae gaae the ki yah likha hua paddhen aur usaka arth mujhe bataae, parantu ve us bat ka arth n samajha sake." 
Daniel5:16 parantu maain ne tere vishay men suna haai ki daniyyel bhed khol sakata aur sandeh door kar sakata haai. isaaliye ab yaadi too us likhe huae ko paddh sake aur usaka arth bhee mujhe samajha sake, to tujhe baainjanee rang ka vasr, aur tere gale men sone kee kanttmala paahinai jaaegee, aur rajy men teesara too hee prabhuta karega.." 
Daniel5:17 daaniyyel ne raja se kaha, apane dan apane hee pas rakh aur jo badala too dena chahata haai, vah doosare ko de vah likhee hui bat maain raja ko paddh sunaunga, aur usaka arth bhee tujhe samajhaunga." 
Daniel5:18 he raja, paramapradhaan parameshvar ne tere pita nabookadanessar ko rajy, badai, praatishtta aur pratap diya tha" 
Daniel5:19 aur us badai ke karan jo us ne usako dee thee, desha-desh aur jaati jati ke sab log, aur bhainna-abhainn bhasha bolanevale usake samhane kanpate aur thrathrate the, jise vah chahata use vah ghaat karata tha, aur jisako vah chahata use vah jeeavit rakhta tha jise vah chahata use vah uncha pad deta tha, aur jisako vah chahata use vah gira deta tha." 
Daniel5:20 parantu jab usaka man fool utta, aur usakee atma kattor ho gai, yahan tak ki vah abhaiman karane laga, tab vah apane rajaasinhasan par se utara gaya, aur usakee pratishtta bhng kee gai" 
Daniel5:21 vah manushyon men se nikala gaya, aur usaka man pashuuon ka sa, aur usaka nivas jangalee gadahon ke beech ho gaya vah baailon kee nain ghaas charata, aur usaka shareer akash kee os se bheega karata tha, jab tak ki us ne jan n liya ki paramapradhaan paramashevar manushyon ke rajy men prabhuta karata haai aur jise chahata usee ko us par adhaikaree ttharata haai." 
Daniel5:22 taubhee, he belashassar, too jo usaka putra haai, aur yah sab kuchh janata tha, taubhee tera man namra n hua." 
Daniel5:23 varan too ne svarga ke prabhu ke virooddh sir uttakar usake bhvan ke patra mangavakar apane samhane dharava lia, aur apane pradhaanon aur raniyon aur rakheliyon samet too ne un men dakhmadha piya aur chandee-sone, peetal, lohe, katt aur patthr ke devata, jo n dekhte n sunate, n kuchh janate haai, unakee to stuati kee, parantu parameshvar, jisake hath men tera praan haai, aur jisake vash men tera sab chalana firana haai, usaka sanman too ne naheen kiya.." 
Daniel5:24 tab hee yah hath ka aek bhag usee kee or se pragatt kiya gaya haai aur ve shabd likhe gaae haain. 
Daniel5:25 aur jo shabd likhe gaae ve ye haai, mane, mane, takel, aur uparseena." 
Daniel5:26 is vaky ka arth yah haai, mane, arthata parameshvar ne tere rajy ke din ginakar usaka ant kar diya haai." 
Daniel5:27 takel, too mano tarajoo men taula gaya aur halaka paya gaya." 
Daniel5:28 pares, arthata tera rajy banttkar madiyon aur faarasiyon ko diya gaya haai.." 
Daniel5:29 tab belashassar ne agyaa dee, aur daniyyel ko baainjanee rang ka vasr aur usake gale men sone kee kanttmala pahinai gai aur ddhniddhoriye ne usake vishay men pukara, ki rajy men teesara daaniyyel hee prabhuta karega.." 
Daniel5:30 usee rat kasaadiyon ka raja belashassar mar dala gaya. 
Daniel5:31 aur dara madee jo koi basatt varsha ka tha rajagaee par virajaman hua.. 
Daniel6:1 dara ko yah achchha laga ki apane rajy ke upar aek sau bees aeese aadhaipaati ttharaa, jo poore rajy men aadhaikar rakhen." 
Daniel6:2 aur unake upar us ne teen adhyaksha, jin men se daniyyel aek tha, isaaliye ttharaa, ki ve un adhaipaatiyon se lekha liya rake, aur is reeti raja kee kuchh haani n hone paae." 
Daniel6:3 jab yah dekha gaya ki daniyyel men uttm atma rahatee haai, tab usako un adhyakshaen aur adhaipaatiyon se aadhaik pratishtta milee varan raja yah bhee sochata tha ki usako sare rajy ke upar ttharaae." 
Daniel6:4 tab adhyaksha aur adhaipaati rajakarya ke vishay men daaniyyel ke virooddh dosh ddoonddhne lage parantu vah vishvasayogy tha, aur usake kam men koi bool va dosh n nikala, aur ve aeesa koi aparadha va dosh n pa sake." 
Daniel6:5 tab ve log kahane lage, ham us daniyyel ke parameshvar kee vyavastha ko chhod aur kisee vishay men usake virooddh koi dosh n pa sakenge.." 
Daniel6:6 tab ve adhyaksha aur adhaipaati raja ke pas utavalee se aa, aur us se kaha, he raja dara, too yugayug jeeavit rahe." 
Daniel6:7 rajy ke sare adhyakshaen ne, aur haakimo, adhaipaatiyo, nyaayiyo, aur gavarnaron ne bhee apas men sammati kee haai, ki raja aeesee agyaa de aur aeesee kadee agyaa nikale, ki tees din tak jo koi, he raja, tujhe chhod kisee aur manushy va devata se binatee kare, vah sinhon kee mand men dal diya jaae." 
Daniel6:8 isaliye ab he raja, aeesee agyaa de, aur is patra par hastakshar kar, jis se yah bat madiyon aur faarasiyon kee attl vyavastha ke anusar adala-badal n ho sake." 
Daniel6:9 tab dara raja ne us agyaapatra par hastakshar kar diya.. 
Daniel6:10 jab daaniyyel ko maloom hua ki us patra par hastakshar kiya gaya haai, tab vah apane ghar men gaya jisakee uparauttee kottree kee khaidkiyan yarooshalem ke samane khulee rahatee thee, aur apanee reeti ke anusar jaaisa vah din men teen bar apane parameshvar ke samhane ghauttne ttekakar praarthna aur dhanyavad karata tha, vaaisa hee tab bhee karata raha." 
Daniel6:11 tab un purooshaen ne utavalee se akar daniyyel ko apane parameshvar ke samane binatee karate aur gidgidate huae paya. 
Daniel6:12 so ve raja ke pas jakar, usakee rajaagyaa ke vishay men us se kahane lage, he raja, kya too ne aeese agyaapatra par hastakshar naheen kiya ki tees din tak jo koi tujhe chhod kisee manushy va devata se binatee karega, vah sinhon kee mand men dal diya jaaega? raja ne uttr diya, ha, madiyon aur faarasiyon kee attl vyavastha ke anusar yah bat sthiar haai." 
Daniel6:13 tab unhon ne raja se kaha, yahoodee bandhauon men se jo daniyyel haai, us ne, he raja, n to teree or kuchh dhyan diya, aur n tere hastakshar kiae huae agyaapatra kee ora vah din men teen bar binatee kiya karata haai.." 
Daniel6:14 yah vachan sunakar, raja bahut udas hua, aur daaniyyel ke bachane ke upay sochane laga aur soorya ke ast hone tak usake bachane ka yatn karata raha." 
Daniel6:15 tab ve puroosh raja ke pas utavalee se akar kahane lage, he raja, yah jan rak, ki madiyon aur faarasiyon men yah vyavastha haai ki jo jo manahee va agyaa raja ttharaa, vah naheen badal sakatee.." 
Daniel6:16 tab raja ne agyaa dee, aur daaniyyel lakar sinhon kee mand men dal diya gaya. us samay raja ne daniyyel se kaha, tera parameshvar jisakee too nity upasana karata haai, vahee tujhe bachaae!" 
Daniel6:17 tab aek patthr lakar us gadhe ke munh par rakha gaya, aur raja ne us par apanee angoottee se, aur apane pradhaanon kee angoottyaien se muhar laga dee ki daniyyel ke vishay men kuchh badalane ne paae." 
Daniel6:18 tab raja apane mahal men chala gaya, aur us rat ko bina bhojan pada raha aur usake pas sukh vilas kee koi vastu naheen pahunchai gai, aur use neend bhee naheen ai.." 
Daniel6:19 bhor ko pau fattte hee raja utta, aur sinhon ke gadhe kee or faurtee se chala gaya." 
Daniel6:20 jab raja gadhe ke nikatt aya, tab shaekabhree vanee se chillane laga aur daniyyel se kaha, he daaniyyel, he jeevate parameshvar ke das, kya tera parameshvar jisakee too nity upasana karata haai, tujhe sinhon se bacha saka haai?" 
Daniel6:21 tab daaniyyel ne raja se kaha, he raja, too yugayug jeeavit rahe!" 
Daniel6:22 mere parameshvar ne apana doot bhejakar sinhon ke munh ko aeesa band kar rakha ki unhon ne meree kuchh bhee haani naheen kee isaka karan yah haai, ki maain usake samhane nirdosh paya gaya aur he raja, tere sammukh bhee maain ne koi bool naheen kee." 
Daniel6:23 tab raja ne bahut anandait hokar, daniyyel ko gadhe men se nikalane kee agyaa dee. so daniyyel gadhe men se nikala gaya, aur us par haani ka koi chinh n paya gaya, kyonki vah apane parameshvar par vishvas rakhta tha." 
Daniel6:24 aur raja ne agyaa dee ki jin purooshaen ne daaniyyel kee chugalee khai thee, ve apane apane ladkebalon aur striayon samet lakar sinhon ke gadhe men dal diae jaaen aur ve gadhe kee pendee tak bhee n pahunche ki sinhon ne un par jhpattkar sab haaddiyon samet unako chaba dala.." 
Daniel6:25 tab dara raja ne saree prathvee ke rahanevale desha-desh aur jati-jati ke sab logo, aur bhainna-abhainn bhasha bolanevalon ke pas yah likha, tumhara bahut kushal ho." 
Daniel6:26 maain yah agyaa deta hoon ki jahan jahan mere rajy ka adhaikar haai, vahan ke log daaniyyel ke parameshvar ke sammukh kanpate aur thrathrate rahe, kyonki jeevata aur yuganayug tak rahanevala parameshvar vahee haai usaka rajy avinashaee aur usakee prabhuta sada sthiar rahegee." 
Daniel6:27 jis ne daniyyel ko sinhon se bachaya haai, vahee bachane aur chhudanevala haai aur svarga men aur prathvee par chinhon aur chamatkaron ka pragatt karanevala haai." 
Daniel6:28 aur daaniyyel, dara aur kusroo faarasee, donon ke rajy ke dinon men bhagyavana raha.." 
Daniel7:1 babul ke raja belashassar ke paahile varsha me, daniyyel ne palang par svapn dekha. tab us ne vah svapn likha, aur baton ka saransh bhee varnn kiya." 
Daniel7:2 daaniyyel ne yah kaha, maain ne rat ko yah svapn dekha ki mahasagar par chaumukhee andhaee chalane lagee." 
Daniel7:3 tab samudra men se char bade bade jantu, jo aek doosare se bhainn the, nikal aae." 
Daniel7:4 paahila jantu sinh ke saman tha aur usake pankh ukab ke se the. aur mere dekhte dekhte usake pankhon ke par neeche gaae aur vah boomi par se uttakar, manushy kee nain panvon ke bal khda kiya gaya aur usako manushy ka day diya gaya." 
Daniel7:5 fir maain ne aek aur jantu dekha jo reechh ke saman tha, aur aek panjar ke bal utta hua tha, aur sake munh men danton ke beech teen pasulee theen aur lag us se kah rahe the, uttkar bahut mans kha." 
Daniel7:6 isake bad maain ne drashtti kee aur dekha ki cheete ke saman aek aur jantu haai jisakee peett par pakshaee ke se char pankh haain aur us jantu ke char sir the aur usako adhaikar diya gaya. 
Daniel7:7 fir isake bad maain ne svapn men draashtti kee aur dekha, ki aek chautha jantu haai jo bhyankar aur dravana aur bahut samarthee haai aur usake bade bade lohe ke dant haain vah sab kuchh kha dalata haai aur choor choor karata haai, aur jo bach jata haai, use paairon se raundata haai. aur vah sab paahile jantuon se bhainn haai aur usake das seeng haain." 
Daniel7:8 maain un seengon ko dhyan se dekh raha tha to kya dekha ki unake beech aek aur chhotta sa seeng nikala, aur usake bal se un pahile seengon men se teen ukhade gaae fir maain ne dekha ki is seeng men manushy kee see ankhe, aur bada bol bolanevala munh bhee haai." 
Daniel7:9 maain ne dekhte dekhte ant men kya dekha, ki sinhasan rakhe gaa, aur koi ati praacheen virajaman hua usaka vasr him sa ujala, aur sir ke bal nirmal un sareekhe the usaka sinhasan aagnaimay aur usake paahiye dhadhakatee hui ag ke se dekh padte the." 
Daniel7:10 us praacheen ke sammukh se ag kee dhaara nikalakar bah rahee thee fir hajaron hajar log usakee seva tthal kar rahe the, aur lakhon lakh log usake samhane hajir the fir nyayee baaitt gaa, aur pustaken kholee gain." 
Daniel7:11 us samay us seeng ka bada bol sunakar maain dekhta raha, aur dekhte dekhte ant men dekha ki vah jantu ghaat kiya gaya, aur usaka shareer dhadhakatee hui ag men bhsm kiya gaya." 
Daniel7:12 aur rahe huae jantuon ka adhaikar le liya gaya, parantu unaka praan kuchh samay ke liye bachaya gaya." 
Daniel7:13 maain ne rat men svapn men dekha, aur dekho, manushy ke santan sa koi akash ke badalon samet a raha tha, aur vah us aati praacheen ke pas pahuncha, aur usako ve usake sameep laae." 
Daniel7:14 tab usako aeesee prabhuta, mahima aur rajy diya gaya, ki desha-desh aur jati-jati ke log aur bhainna-abhainn bhasha balanevale sab usake adhaeen hon usakee prabhuta sada tak attl, aur usaka rajy aavinashaee tthara.." 
Daniel7:15 aur mujh daaniyyel ka man vikal ho gaya, aur jo kuchh maain ne dekha tha usake karan maain ghabara gaya." 
Daniel7:16 tab jo log pas khde the, un men se aek ke pas jakar maain ne un saree baton ka bhed poochha, us n yah kahakar mujhe un baton ka arth bataya," 
Daniel7:17 un char bade bade jantuon ka arth char rajy haai, jo prathvee par uday honge." 
Daniel7:18 parantu paramapradhaan ke paavitra log rajy ko paaenge aur yuganayug usake aadhaikaree ban rahenge.. 
Daniel7:19 tab mere man men yah ichchha hui kee us chauthe jantu ka bhed bhee jan loon jo aur teenon se bhainn aur aati bhyankar tha aur jisake dant lohe ke aur nakh peetal ke the vah sab kuchh kha dalata, aur choor choor karata, aur bache huae ko paairon se raund dalata tha." 
Daniel7:20 fir usake sir men ke das seengon ka bhed, aur jis naye seeng ke nikalane se teen seeng gir gaa, arthata jis seeng kee ankhen aur bada bol bolanevala munh aur sab aur seengon se adhaik bhyankar tha, usaka bhee bhed janane kee mujhe ichchha hui." 
Daniel7:21 aur maain ne dekha tha ki vah seeng paavitra logon ke sang ladai karake un par us samay tak prabal bhee ho gaya," 
Daniel7:22 jab tab vah aati praacheen n aya, aur paramapradhaan ke paavitra log nyayee n tthare, aur un pavitra logon ke rajyadhaikaree hone ka samay n a pahuncha.." 
Daniel7:23 us ne kaha, us chauthe jantu ka arth, ek chautha rajy haai, jo prathvee par hokar aur sab rajyon se bhainn hoga, aur saree prathvee ko nash karega, aur danvakar choora-choor karega." 
Daniel7:24 aur un das seengon ka arth yah haai, ki us rajy men se das raja uttenge, aur unake bad un paahilon se bhainn aek aur raja uttega, jo teen rajaon ko gira dega." 
Daniel7:25 aur vah paramapradhaan ke virooddh baten kahega, aur paramapradhaan ke paavitra logon ko pees dalega, aur samayon aur vyavastha ke badal dene kee asha karega, varan saddhe teen kal tak ve sab usake vash men kar diae jaaenge." 
Daniel7:26 parantu, tab nyayee baaittenge, aur usakee prabhuta chheenakar mittai aur nash kee jaaegee yahan tak ki usaka ant hee ho jaaega." 
Daniel7:27 tab rajy aur prabhuta aur dharatee par ke rajy kee maahima, paramapradhaan hee kee praja arthata usake paavitra logon ko dee jaaegee, usaka rajy sada ka rajy haai, aur sab prabhuta karanevale usake adhaeen honge aur usakee agyaa manenge." 
Daniel7:28 is bat ka varnn maain ab kar chuka, parantu mujh daaniyyel ke man men badee ghabarahatt banee rahee, aur maain bhyabheet ho gaya aur is bat ko maai. apane man men rakhe raha.." 
Daniel8:1 belashassar raja ke rajy ke teesare varsha men us pahile darshan ke bad aek aur bat mujh daniyyel ko darshan ke dara dikhai gai. 
Daniel8:2 jab maain aelam nam praant me, shooshan nam rajagaddh men rahata tha, tab maain ne darshan men dekha ki maain ulaai nadee ke kinare par hoon." 
Daniel8:3 fir maain ne ankh uttakar dekha, ki us nadee ke samhane do seengavala aek meddha khda haai, usake donon seeng bade haai, parantu un men se aek aadhaik bada haai, aur jo bada haai, vah doosare ke bad nikala." 
Daniel8:4 maain ne us meddhe ko dekha ki vah pashchaim, uttr aur dakkhian kee or seeng marata haai, aur koi jantu usake samhane khda naheen rah sakata, aur n usake hath se koi kisee ko bacha sakata haai aur vah apanee hee ichchha ke anusar kam karake baddhta jata tha.." 
Daniel8:5 maain soch hee raha tha, to fir kya dekha ki aek bakara pashchaim disha se nikalakar saree prathvee ke upar aeesa fir ki chalate samay boomi par panv n chhuaya aur us bakare kee ankhon ke beech aek dekhne yogy seeng tha." 
Daniel8:6 vah us do seengavale meddhe ke pas jakar, jisako maain ne nadee ke samhane khda dekha tha, us par jalakar apane poore bal se lapaka." 
Daniel8:7 maain ne dekha ki vah meddhe ke nikatt akar us par jhunjhlaya aur meddhe ko marakar usake donon seengon ko tod diya aur usaka samhana karane ko meddhe ka kuchh bhee vash n chala tab bakare ne usako boomi par girakar raund dala aur meddhe ko usake hath se chhudanevala koi n mila. 
Daniel8:8 tab bakara atyant badai marane laga, aur jab balavant hua, tak usaka bada seeng toott gaya, aur usakee santee dekhne yogy char seeng nikalakar charon dishaaon kee or baddhne lage.." 
Daniel8:9 fir in men se aek chhotta sa seeng aur nikala, jo dakkhian, poorab aur shairomanai desh kee or bahut hee baddh gaya." 
Daniel8:10 vah svarga kee sena tak baddh gaya aur us men se aur taron men se bhee kitanon ko boomi par girakar raund dala. 
Daniel8:11 varan vah us sena ke pradhaan tak bhee baddh gaya, aur usaka nity homabaali band kar diya gaya aur usaka pavitra vasasthan gira diya gaya." 
Daniel8:12 aur logon ke aparadha ke karan nity homabaali ke sath sena bhee usake hath men kar dee gai, aur us seeng ne sachchai ko mittee men mila diya, aur vah kam karate karate safal ho gaya." 
Daniel8:13 tab maain ne aek pavitra jan ko bolate suna fir aek aur pavitra jan ne us paahile bolanevale aparadha ke vishay men jo kuchh darshan dekha gaya, vah kab tak falata rahega arthata pavitrasthan aur sena donon ko raunda jana kab tak hota rahega?" 
Daniel8:14 aur us ne mujh se kaha, jab tak sanjh aur savera do hajar teen sau bar n ho, tab tak vah hota rahega tab paavitrasthan shuuddh kiya jaaega.." 
Daniel8:15 yah bat darshan me dekhkar, maai, daniyyel, isake samajhne ka yatn karane laga itane men puroosh ke roop dhare huae koi mere sammukh khda hua dekh pada." 
Daniel8:16 tab mujhe ulaai nadee ke beech se aek manushy ka shabd sun pada, jo pukarakar kahata tha, he jibraaael, us jan ko usakee dekhee hui baten samajha de." 
Daniel8:17 tab jahan maain khda tha, vahan vah mere nikatt aya aushra usake ate hee maain ghabara gaya, aur munh ke bal gir pada. tab us ne mujh se kaha, he manushy ke santan, un dekhee hui baton ko samajh le, kyonki usaka arth ant hee ke samay men falega.." 
Daniel8:18 jab vah mujh se baten kar raha tha, tab maain apana munh bhuami kee or kiae huae bharee neend men pada tha, parantu us ne mujhe chookar seedha khda kar diya." 
Daniel8:19 tab us ne kaha, krodha bhdkane ke ant ke dinon men jo kuchh hoga, vah maain tujhe jatata hoon kyonki ant ke ttharaae huae samay men vah sab poora ho jaaega." 
Daniel8:20 jo do seengavala meddha too ne dekha haai, usaka arth madiyon aur faarasiyon ke rajy se haai." 
Daniel8:21 aur vah ronar bakara yoonan ka rajy haai aur usakee ankhon ke beech jo bada seeng nikala, vah pahila raja tthara." 
Daniel8:22 aur vah seeng jo toott gaya aur usakee santee jo char seeng nikale, isaka arth yah haai ki us jati se char rajy uday honge, parantu unaka bal us paahile ka sa n hoga." 
Daniel8:23 aur un rajyon ke ant samay men jab aparadhaee poora bal pakadenge, tab kroor drashttivala aur pahelee boojhnevala aek raja uttega." 
Daniel8:24 usaka samathrya bada hoga, parantu us pahile raja ka sa naheen aur vah adabhuta reeati se logon ko nash karega, aur safal hokar kam karata jaega, aur samathairyon aur paavitra logon ke samuday ko nash karega." 
Daniel8:25 usakee chaturai ke karan usaka chhl safal hoga, aur vah man men foolakar nidr rahate huae bahut logon ko nash karega. vah sab haakimon ke haakim ke virooddh bhee khda hoga parantu ant ko vah kisee ke hath s ebina mar khaae toott jaega." 
Daniel8:26 sanjh aur savere ke vishay men jo kuchh too ne dekha aur suna haai vah sach haai parantu jo kuchh too ne darshan men dekha haai use band rak, kyonki vah bahut dinon ke bad falega.." 
Daniel8:27 tab mujh daaniyyel ka bal jata raha, aur maain kuchh din tak beemar pada raha tab maain uttkar raja ka kamakaj fir karane laga parantu jo kuchh maain ne dekha tha us se maain chaakit raha, kyonaki usaka koi samajhanevala n tha.." 
Daniel9:1 madee kshayarsha ka putra dara, jo kasaadiyon ke desh par raja ttharaya gaya tha," 
Daniel9:2 usake rajy ke pahile varsha me, mujh daniyyel ne shaasr ke dara samajh liya ki yarooshalem kee ujadee hui dasha yahova ke us vachan ke anusar, jo yirmayah nabee ke pas pahuncha tha, kuchh vasharen ke beetane par arthata sattr varsha ke bad pooree ho jaegee." 
Daniel9:3 tab maain apana mukh parameshvar kee or karake gidgidahatt ke sath praarthna karane laga, aur upavas kar, ttatt pahin, rakh men baaittkar varadan mangane laga." 
Daniel9:4 maain ne apane parameshvar yahova se is prakar praarthna kee aur pap ka angeekar kiya, he prabhu, too mahan aur bhyayogy parameshvar haai, jo apane praem rakhne aur agyaa mananevalon ke sath apanee vacha ko poora karata aur karoona karata rahata haai," 
Daniel9:5 ham logon ne to pap, kuattlaita, dushttta aur balava kiya haai, aur teree agyaaon aur niyamon ko tod diya haai." 
Daniel9:6 aur tere jo das nabee log, hamare rajao, hakimo, poorvajon aur sab sadhaaran logon se tere nam se baten karate the, unakee ham ne naheen sunee." 
Daniel9:7 he prabhu, too dharmee haai, parantu ham logon ko aj ke din lajjait hona padta haai, arthata yarooshalem ke nivasee adi sab yahoodee, kya sameep kya door ke sab israaelee log jinhen too ne us vishvasaghaat ke karan jo unhoen ne tera kiya tha, desh desh men barabas kar diya haai, un sabhon ko laajjait hona padta haai." 
Daniel9:8 he yahova ham logon ne apane rajao, hakimon aur poorvajon samet tere virooddh pap kiya haai, is karan ham ko laajjait hona padta haai." 
Daniel9:9 parantu, yadhyapi ham apane parameshvar prabhu se fir gaa, taubhee too dayasagar aur kshama kee khani haai." 
Daniel9:10 ham to apane parameshvar yahova kee shaiksha sunane par bhee us par naheen chale jo us ne apane das naabiyon se hamako sunai. 
Daniel9:11 varan sab israaeliyon ne teree vyavastha ka ullanghan kiya, aur aeese hatt gaae ki teree naheen sunee. is karan jis shaap kee charcha parameshvar ke das moosa kee vyavastha men likhee hui haai, vah shaap ham par ghatt gaya, kyonaki ham ne usake virooddh pap kiya haai." 
Daniel9:12 so us ne hamare aur nyayiyon ke vishay jo vachan kahe the, unhen ham par yah badee vipaati dalakar poora kiya haai yahan tak ki jaaisee vipaati yarooshalem par padee haai, vaaisee saree dharatee par aur kaheen naheen padee." 
Daniel9:13 jaaise moosa kee vyavastha men likha haai, vaaise hee yah saree vipaati ham par a padee haai, taubhee ham apane parameshvar yahova ko manane ke liye n to apane adharma ke kamon se fire, aur ne teree saty baton par dhyan diya." 
Daniel9:14 is karan yahova ne soch vicharakar ham par vipaati dalee haai kyonki hamara parameshvar yahova jitane kam karata haai un sabhon men dharmee ttharata haai parantu ham ne usakee naheen sunee. 
Daniel9:15 aur ab, he hamare parameshvar, he prabhu, too ne apanee praja ko misr desh se, balee hath ke dara nikal lakar apana aeesa bada nam kiya, jo aj tak praasiddh haai, parantu ham ne pap kiya haai aur dushttta hee kee haai." 
Daniel9:16 he prabhu, hamare papon aur hamare purakhaon ke adharma ke kamon ke karan yarooshalem kee aur teree praja kee, aur hamare as pas ke sab logon kee or se namadharai ho rahee haai taubhee too apane sab dharma ke kamon ke karan apana krodha aur jalajalahatt apane nagar yarooshalem par se utar de, jo tere paavitra parvat par basa haai." 
Daniel9:17 he hamare parameshvar, apane das kee praarthna aur gidgadahatt sunakar, apane ujade huae paavitrasthan par apane mukh ka prakash chamaka he prabhu, apane nam ke nimitt yah kara." 
Daniel9:18 he mere parameshvar, kan lagakar sun, ankh kholakar hamaree ujadee hui dasha aur us nagar ko bhee dekh jo tera kahalata haai kyonki ham jo tere samhane gidgidakar praarthna karate haai, so apane dharma ke kamon par nahee, varan teree badee daya hee ke kamon par bhrosa rakhkar karate haain." 
Daniel9:19 he prabhu, sun le he prabhu, pap kshama kara he prabhu, dhyan dekar jo karata haai use kar, vilamb n kara he mere parameshvar, tera nagar aur teree praja teree hee kahalatee haai isaliye apane nam ke nimitt aeesa hee kara.." 
Daniel9:20 is prakar maain praarthna karata, aur apane aur apane israaelee jati bhaiyon ke pap ka angeekar karata hua, apane parameshvar yahova ke sammukh usake pavitra parvat ke liye gidgidakar binatee karata hee tha," 
Daniel9:21 tab vah puroosh jibraaael jis maain ne us samay dekha jab mujhe pahile darshan hua tha, us ne veg se udne kee agyaa pakar, sanjh ke annabali ke samay mujh ko choo liya aur mujhe samajhakar mere sath baten karane laga." 
Daniel9:22 us ne mujh se kaha, he daniyyel, maain tujhe buaddh iddh aur praavinta dene ko abhee nikal aya hoon." 
Daniel9:23 jab too gidgidakar binatee karane laga, tab hee isakee agyaa nikalee, isaaliye maain tujhe batane aya hoo, kyonki too ati piry tthara haai isaaliye us vishay ko samajh le aur darshan kee bat ka arth boojh le.." 
Daniel9:24 tere logon aur tere pavitra nagar ke liye sattr saptah ttharaae gaae haain ki unake ant tak aparadha ka hona band ho, aur papon ko ant aur adharma ka praayashchaitt kiya jaa, aur yugayug kee dhaarmikata pragatt hoae aur darshan kee bat par aur bhavishyavanee par chhap dee jaa, aur paramapaavitra ka aabhaishok kiya jaae." 
Daniel9:25 so yah jan aur samajh le, ki yarooshalem ke fir basane kee agyaa ke nikalane se lekar abhaishaikt pradhaan ke samay tak sat saptah beetenge. fir basatt saptahon ke beetane par chauk aur khai samet vah nagar kashtt ke samay men fir basaya jaaega." 
Daniel9:26 aur un basatt saptahon ke beetane par aabhaishaikt puroosh katta jaaega: aur usake hath kuchh n lagega aur anevale pradhaan kee praja nagar aur pavitrasthan ko nash to karegee. parantu us pradhaan ka ant aeesa hoga jaaisa baddh se hota haai taubhee usake ant tak ladai hotee rahegee kyonaki usaka ujad jana nishchay ttana gaya haai. 
Daniel9:27 aur vah pradhaan aek saptah ke liye bahuton ke sang draddh vacha bandhoga, parantu adho saptah ke beetane par vah melabaali aur annabaali ko band karega aur kangoore par ujadnevalee gharanait vastuen dikhai dengee aur nishchay se ttnee hui bat ke samapt hone tak parameshvar ka krodha ujadnevale par pada rahega.." 
Daniel10:1 faaras desh ke raja kusroo ke rajy ke teesare varsha men daaniyyel par, jo belatashassar bhee kahalata haai, aek bat pragatt kee gai. aur vah bat sach thee ki bada yuddh hoga. us ne is bat ko boojh liya, aur usako is dekhee hui bat kee samajh a gai.." 
Daniel10:2 un dinon maai, daniyyel, teen saptah tak shaek karata raha." 
Daniel10:3 un teen saptahon ke poore hone tak, maain ne n to svaadishtt bhojan kiya aur n mans va dakhmadha apane munh men rakha, aur n apanee deh men kuchh bhee tel lagaya." 
Daniel10:4 fir pahile maahine ke chaubeesaven din ko jab maain hiekel nam nabee ke teer par tha," 
Daniel10:5 tab maain ne ankhen uttakar dekha, ki san ka vasr paahine hua, aur ufaaj desh ke kundan se kamar bandho huae aek puroosh khda haai." 
Daniel10:6 usaka shareer faeeroja ke saman, usaka mukh bijalee kee nai, usakee ankhen jalate huae deepak kee see, usakee bahen aur panv chamakaae huae peetal ke se, aur usake vachanon ke shabd bheedon ke shabd ka sa tha." 
Daniel10:7 usako keval mujh daniyyel hee ne dekha, aur mere sangee manushyon ko usaka kuchh bhee darshan n hua parantu ve bahut hee thrathrane lage, aur chhpaine ke liye bhag gae." 
Daniel10:8 tab maain akela rahakar yah adabhut darshan dekhta raha, is se mera bal jata raha maain bhyatur ho gaya, aur mujh men kuchh bhee bal n raha." 
Daniel10:9 taubhee maain ne us puroosh ke vachanon ka shabd suna, aur jab vah mujhe sun pada tab maain munh ke bal gir gaya aur gaharee neend men boomi par aundho munh pada raha.." 
Daniel10:10 fir kisee ne apane hath se meree deh ko chhua, aur mujhe uttakar ghauttnon aur hatheliyon ke bal thrathrate huae baaitta diya." 
Daniel10:11 tab us ne mujh se kaha, he daniyyel, he aati piry puroosha, jo vachan maain tujh se kahata hoon use samajh le, aur seedha khda ho, kyonaki maain abhee tere pas bheja gaya hoon. jab us ne mujh se yah vachan kaha, tab maain khda to ho gaya parantu thrathrata raha." 
Daniel10:12 fir us ne mujh se kaha, he daaniyyel, mat dr, kyonki pahile hee din ko jab too ne samajhne-boojhne ke liye man lagaya aur apane parameshvar ke samhane apane ko deen kiya, usee din tere vachan sune gaa, aur maain tere vachanon ke karan a gaya hoon." 
Daniel10:13 faaras ke rajy ka pradhaan ikkees din tak mera samhana kiae raha parantu meekaael jo mukhy pradhaanon men se haai, vah meree sahayata ke liye aya, isaaliye maain faaras ke rajaon ke pas raha," 
Daniel10:14 aur jab maain tujhe samajhane aya hoo, ki ant ke dinon men tere logon kee kya dasha hogee. kyonki jo darshan too ne dekha haai, vah kuchh dinon ke bad poora hoga.." 
Daniel10:15 jab vah puroosh mujh se aeesee baten kah chuka, tab maain ne boomi kee or munh kiya aur chupaka rah gaya." 
Daniel10:16 tab manushy ke santan ke saman kisee ne mere ontt chhua, aur maain munh kholakar balane laga. aur jo mere samhane khda tha, us se maain ne kaha, he mere prabhu, darshan kee baton ke karan mujh ko peeda see uttee, aur mujh men kuchh bhee bal naheen raha." 
Daniel10:17 so prabhu ka das, apane prabhu ke sath kyonkar baten kar sake? kyonaki meree deh men ne to kuchh bal raha, aur n kuchh sans hee rah gai.." 
Daniel10:18 tab manushy ke saman kisee ne mujhe chookar fir mera hiyav bandhaaya. 
Daniel10:19 aur us ne kaha, he ati piry puroosha, mat dr, tujhe shaantai mile too draddh ho aur tera hiyav bandha rahe. jab us ne yah kaha, tab maain ne hiyav bandhakar kaha, he mere prabhu, ab kah, kyonki too ne mera hiyav bandhaaya haai." 
Daniel10:20 tab us ne kaha, kya too janata haai ki maain kis karan tere pas aya hoon? ab maain faaras ke pradhaar se ladne ko launttranga aur jab maain nikaloonga, tab yoonana ka pradhaan aaega." 
Daniel10:21 aur jo kuchh sachchee baton se bhree hui pustak men likha hua haai, vah maain tujhe batata hoon un pradhaanon ke viroodd, tumhare pradhaan meekaael ko chhod, mere sang sthiar rahanevala aur koi bhee naheen haai.." 
Daniel11:1 aur dara nam madee raja ke rajy ke paahile varsha men usako hiyav dilane aur bal dene ke liye maain khda ho gaya.. 
Daniel11:2 aur ab maain tujh ko sachchee bat batata hoon. dek, faaras ke rajy men ab teen aur raja uttenge aur chautha raja un sabhon se adhaik dhanee hoga aur jab vah dhan ke karan samarthee hoga, tab sab logon ko yoonan ke rajy ke virooddh ubharega." 
Daniel11:3 usake bad ek parakramee raja uttkar apana rajy bahut baddhaega, aur apanee ichchha ke anusar hee kam kiya karega." 
Daniel11:4 aur jab vah bada hoga, tab usaka rajy toottega aur charon dishaaon men battkar alag alag ho jaaega aur n to usake rajy kee shaktai jyon kee tyon rahegee aur n usake vansh ko kuchh milega kyonki usaka rajy ukhdkar, unakee apeksha aur logon ko praapt hoga.." 
Daniel11:5 tab daakkhian desh ka raja bal pakadega parantu usaka aek hakim us se adhaik bal pakadkar prabhuta karega yahan tak ki usakee prabhuta badee ho jaaegee. 
Daniel11:6 kai vasharen ke beetane par, ve donon apas men milenge, aur daakkhian desh ke raja kee bettee uttr desh ke raja ke pas shaantai kee vacha bandhane ko aaegee parantu usaka bahubal bana n rahega, aur n vah raja aur n usaka nam rahega parantu vah sree apane pahunchanevalon aur apane pita aur apane sambhalanevalon samet alag kar dee jaaegee.." 
Daniel11:7 fir usakee jadon men se aek dal utpann hokar usake sthan men baddhegee vah sena samet uttr ke raja ke gaddh men pravesh karega, oshra un se yuddh karake prabal hoga." 
Daniel11:8 tab vah usake devataon kee ddhlee hui moorato, aur sone-chandee ke manabha patraen ko chheenakar misr men le jaaega isake bad vah kuchh varsha tak uttr desh ke raja ke virooddh hath roke rahega." 
Daniel11:9 ratab vah raja daakkhian desh ke raja ke desh men aaega, parantu fir apane desh men lautt jaaega.." 
Daniel11:10 usake putra jhgada machakar bahut se bade bade dal ikatte karenge, aur upandnevalee nadee kee nain akar desh ke beech hokar jaenge, fir lauttte huae usake gaddh tak jhgada machate jaaeenge." 
Daniel11:11 tab daakkhian desh ka raja chiddhega, aur nikalakar uttr desh ke us raja se yuddh karega, aur vah raja ladne ke liye badee bheed ikatthee karega, parantu vah bheed usake hath men kar dee jaaegee." 
Daniel11:12 us bheed ko jeet karake usaka man fool uttega, aur vah lakhon logon ko giraega, parantu vah prabal n hoga." 
Daniel11:13 kyonaki uttr desh ka raja lauttkar paahilee se bhee badee bheed ikatthee karega aur kai dinon varan vasharen ke beetane par vah nishchay badee sena aur sampaati liae huae aaega.. 
Daniel11:14 un dinon men bahut se log dakkhian desh ke raja ke virooddh uttenge varan tere logon men se bhee balatkaree log utt khde honge, jis se is darshan kee bat pooree ho jaegee parantu ve ttokar khakar girenge." 
Daniel11:15 tab uttr desh ka raja akar kila bandhoga aur draddh nagar le lega. aur daakkhian desh ke n to pradhaan khde raheenge aur n bade veera kyonaki kisee ke khde rahane ka bal n rahega. 
Daniel11:16 tab jo bhee unake virooddh aaega, vah apanee ichchha pooree karega, aur vah hath men styanash liae huae shairomanai desh men bhee khda hoga aur usaka samhana karanevala koi n rahega." 
Daniel11:17 tab vah apane rajy ke poorn bal samet, kai seedho logon ko sang liae huae ane lagega, aur apanee ichchha ke anusar kam kiya karega. aur vah usako aek sree isaliye dega ki usaka rajy bigada jaae parantu vah sthiar n rahegee, n us raja kee hogee." 
Daniel11:18 tab vah ddheepon kee or munh karake bahuton ko le lega parantu aek senapaati usake ahankar ko mittaaega varan usake ahankar ke anukool use badala deta. 
Daniel11:19 tab vah apane desh ke gaddhon kee or munh faerega, aur vah ttokar khakar girega, aur kaheen usaka pata n rahega." 
Daniel11:20 tab usake sthan men koi aeesa uttega, jo shairomanai rajy men andhor karanevale ko ghaumaaega parantu thode din beetane par vah krodha va yuddh kiae bina hee nash ho jaaega." 
Daniel11:21 usake sthan men ek tuchchh manushy uttega, jisakee rajapratishtta pahile to n hogee, taubhee vah chaain ke samay akar chikanee-chupadee baton ke dara rajy ko praapt karega." 
Daniel11:22 tab usakee bhujaroopee baddh se log, varan vacha ka pradhaan bhee usake samhane se bahakar nash honge." 
Daniel11:23 kyonaki vah usake sang vacha bandhane par bhee chhl karega, aur thode hee logon ko sang liae huae chaddhkar prabal hoga." 
Daniel11:24 chaain ke samay vah praant ke uttm se uttm sthanon par chaddhai karega aur jo kam n usake purakha aur n usake purakhaon ke purakha karate the, use vah karega aur loottee hui dhana-sampati un men bahut bantta karega. vah kuchh kal tak draddh nagaron ke lene kee kalpana karata rahega." 
Daniel11:25 tab vah daakkhian desh ke raja ke virooddh badee sena liae huae apane bal aur hiyav ko baddhaaega, aur daakkhian desh ka raja atyant badee samarthee sena liae huae yuddh to karega, parantu tthar n sakega, kyonki log usake virooddh kalpana karenge." 
Daniel11:26 usake bhojan ke khanevale bhee usako haravaenge aur yaghapi usakee sena baddh kee nain chaddhengee, taubhee usake bahut se log mar mittenge." 
Daniel11:27 tab un donon rajaon ke man burai karane men lagenge, yahan tak ki ve aek hee mej par baaitte huae apas men joott bolenge, parantu is se kuchh ban n padega kyonaki in sab baton ka ant niyat hee samay men honevala haai." 
Daniel11:28 tab uttr desh ka raja badee loott liae huae apane desh ko lauttega, aur usaka man pavitra vacha ke virooddh ubhrega, aur vah apanee ichchh pooree karake apane desh ko lautt jaaega.." 
Daniel11:29 niyat samay par vah fir dakkhian desh kee or jaaega, parantu us pichhlee bar ke saman is bar usaka vash n chalega." 
Daniel11:30 kyonaki kitiayon ke jahaj usake virooddh aaenge, aur vah udas hokar lauttega, aur pavitra vacha par chiddhkar apanee ichchha pooree karega. vah lauttkar paavitra vacha ke todnevalon kee suadhai lega." 
Daniel11:31 tab usake sahayak khde hokar, draddh pavitra sthan ko apaavitra karenge, aur nity homabaali ko band karenge. aur ve us gharaanait vastu ko khda karenge jo ujad kara detee haai." 
Daniel11:32 aur jo dushtt hokar us vacha ko todenge, unako vah chikanee-chupadee baten kah kahakar bhktaiheen kar dega parantu jo log apane parameshvar ka gyaan rakhenge, ve hiyav bandhakar bade kam karenge." 
Daniel11:33 aur logon ko sikhanevale buddhmaian jan bahuton ko samajhaaenge, taubhee ve bahut din tak talavar se chhdaikar aur ag men jalakar, aur bandhauae hokar aur luttkar, bade du:kh men pade rahenge." 
Daniel11:34 jab ve du:kh men padenge tab thoda bahut sambhlenge, parantu bahut se log chikanee-chupadee baten kah kahakar un se mil jaaenge" 
Daniel11:35 aur sikhanevalon men se kitanen girenge, aur isaliye girane paaenge ki janche jaae, aur nirmal aur ujale kiae jaaen. yah dasha ant ke samay tak banee rahegee, kyonaki in sab baton ka ant niyat samay men honevala haai.." 
Daniel11:36 tab vah raja apanee ichchha ke anusar kam karega, aur apane ap ko sare devataon se uncha aur bada ttharaaega varan sab devataon ke parameshvar ke virooddh bhee anokhee baten kahega. aur jab tak parameshvar ka krodha n ho jaae tab tak us raja ka karya safal hota rahega kyonaki jo kuchh nishchay karake ttana hua haai vah avashy hee poora honevala haai." 
Daniel11:37 u 
Daniel11:38 vah apane rajapad par sthiar rahakar draddh gaddhon hee ke devata ka samman karega, aek aeese devata ka jise usake purakha bhee n janate the, vah sona, chandee, maanai aur manabhavanee vastuen chaddhakar usaka samman karega." 
Daniel11:39 us birane devata ke sahare se vah ati draddh gaddhon se ladega, aur jo koi usako mane use vah badee praatishtta dega. aeese logon ko vah bahuton ke upar prabhuta dega, aur apane labh ke liae apane desh kee boomi ko bantt dega.." 
Daniel11:40 ant ke samay daakkhian desh ka raja usako seeng marane lagega parantu uttr desh ka raja us par bavandr kee nain bahut se rath-savar aur jahaj lekar chaddhai karega is reeti se vah bahut se deshaen men faail jaaega, aur un men se nikal jaaega." 
Daniel11:41 vah shairomanai desh men bhee aaega. aur bahut se desh ujad jaaenge, parantu aeedomee, moabee aur mukhy mukhy ammonee aadi jatiyon ke desh usake hath se bach jaaenge." 
Daniel11:42 vah kai deshaen par hath baddhaaega aur misr desh bhee n bachega. 
Daniel11:43 vah misr ke sone chandee ke khjanon aur sab manabhavanee vastuon ka svamee ho jaaega aur loobee aur kooshaee log bhee usake peechhe ho lenge. 
Daniel11:44 usee samay vah poorab aur uttr dishaaon se samachar sunakar ghabaraega, aur bade krodha men akar bahuton ko satyanash karane ke liye nikalega." 
Daniel11:45 aur vah donon samudraen ke beech paavitra shairomanai parvat ke pas apana rajakeey tamboo khda karaaega itana karane par bhee usaka ant ja jaaega, aur koi usaka sahayak n rahega.." 
Daniel12:1 usee samay meekael nam bada pradhaan, jo tere jati-bhaiyon ka paksha karane ko khda rahata haai, vah uttega. tab aeese sankatt ka samay hoga, jaaisa kisee jaati ke utpann hone ke samay se lekar ab tak kabhee n hua hoga parantu us samay tere logon men se jitanon ke nam parameshvar kee pustak men likhe huae haai, ve bach nikalenge." 
Daniel12:2 aur jo boomi ke neeche soae rahenge un men se bahut se log jag uttenge, kitane to sada ke jeevan ke liye, aur kitane apanee namadharai aur sada tak atyant ghainaune ttharane ke liye." 
Daniel12:3 tab sikhanevalon kee chamak akashamandl kee see hogee, aur jo bahuton ko dharmee banate haai, ve sarvada kee nain prakashaman rahenge." 
Daniel12:4 parantu he daniyyel, too is pustak par muhar karake in vachanon ko ant samay tak ke liye band rakh. aur bahut log poochh-pachh aur ddoonddh-ddhanddh karenge, aur is se gyaan baddh bhee jaaega.." 
Daniel12:5 yah sab sun, mujh daniyyel ne drashtti karake kya dekha ki aur do puroosh khden haai, aek to nadee ke is teer par, aur doosara nadee ke us teer par haai." 
Daniel12:6 yah sab sun, mujh daniyyel ne drashtti karake kya desha ki aur do puroosh khden haai, aek to nadee ke is teer par, aur doosara nadee ke us teer par haai." 
Daniel12:7 tab jo puroosh san ka vasr pahine huae nadee ke jal ke upar tha, us se un purooshaen men se aek ne poochha, in ashcharyakamorn ka ant kab tak hoga?" 
Daniel12:8 tab jo puroosh san ka vasr pahine huae nadee ke jal ke upar tha, us ne mere sunate daahina aur banya apane donon hath svarga kee or uttakar, sada jeevit rahanevale kee shapath khakar kaha, yah dasha saddhe teen kal tak hee rahegee aur jab pavitra praja kee shaktai toottte toottte samapt ho jaaegee, tab ye baten pooree hongee." 
Daniel12:9 us ne kaha, he daniyyel chala ja kyonaki ye baten antasamay ke liye band haain aur in par muhar dee hui haai." 
Daniel12:10 bahut log to apane apane ko nirmal aur ujale karenge, aur svachchh ho jaaenge parantu dushtt log dushttta hee karate rahenge aur dushtton men se koi ye baten n samajhega parantu jo buaddhmaian haai ve hee samajhenge." 
Daniel12:11 aur jab se nity homabaali uttai jaaegee, aur vah ghainaunee vastu jo ujad kara detee haai, sthapit kee jaaegee, tab se barah sau nabbe din beetenge." 
Daniel12:12 kya hee dhany haai vah, jo dhaeeraj dharakar terah sau paaintees din ke ant tak bhee pahunche." 
Daniel12:13 ab too jakar ant tak tthara raha aur too vishraam karata rahega aur un dinon ke ant men too apane nij bhag par khda hoga.. 
Hosea1:1 yahooda ke raja ujjaiyah, yotam, ahaj, aur hijaakiyyah ke dinon men aur israael ke raja yoash ke putra yarobam ke dinon me, yahova ka vachan beree ke putra hosho ke pas pahuncha.." 
Hosea1:2 jab yahova ne hosho ke dara paahile paahil baten kee, tab us ne hosho se yah kaha, jakar aek veshya ko apanee patnee bana le, aur usake kukarma ke ladkebalon ko apane ladkebale kar le, kyonaki yah desh yahova ke peechhe chalana chhodkar veshya ka sa bahut kam karata haai." 
Hosea1:3 so us ne jakar dibalaaim kee bettee gomer ko apanee patnee kar liya, aur vah us se garbhvatee hui aur usake putra utpann hua." 
Hosea1:4 tab yahova ne us se kaha, usaka nam yijraail rakh kyonaki thode hee kal men maain yehoo ke gharane ko yijraail kee hatya ka dand doonga, aur maain israael ke gharane ke rajy ka ant kar doonga." 
Hosea1:5 aur us samay maain yijraail kee tarai men israael ke dhanush ko tod daloonga.. 
Hosea1:6 aur vah sree fir garbhvatee hui aur usake aek bettee utpann hui. tab yahova ne hosho se kaha, usaka nam loroohama rakh kyonki maain israael ke gharane men fir kabhee daya karake unaka aparadha kisee prakar se kshama n karoonga." 
Hosea1:7 parantu yahooda ke gharane par maain daya karoonga, aur unaka uddhar karoonga unaka uddhar maain dhanush va talavar va yuddh va ghaedon va savaron ke dara nahee, parantu unake parameshvar yahova ke dara karoonga.." 
Hosea1:8 jab us sree ne loroohama ka dudha chhudaya, tab vah garbhvatee hui aur us se aek putra utpann hua." 
Hosea1:9 tab yahova ne kaha, isaka nam loammee rakh kyonki tum log meree praja naheen ho, aur n maain tumhara parameshvar rahoonga.." 
Hosea1:10 taubhee israaeliyon kee ginatee samudra kee baloo kee see ho jaaegee, jinaka mapana-aginana anahona haai aur jis sthan men un se yah kaha jata tha ki tum meree praja naheen ho, usee sthan men ve jeeavit parameshvar ke putra kahalaaenge." 
Hosea1:11 tab yahoodee aur israaelee donon ikatthe ho apana aek pradhaan ttharakar desh se chale aaenge kyonki yijrael ka din prasiddh hoga. 
Hosea2:1 isaliye tum log apane bhaiyon se ammee aur apanee baahinon se roohama kaho.. 
Hosea2:2 apanee mata se vivad karo, vivad kyonaki vah meree sree naheen aur n maain usaka pati hoon. vah apane munh par se apane chhnaialapan ko aur chhaatiyon ke beech se vyabhaicharon ko alag kare" 
Hosea2:3 hananee to maain usake vasr utarakar usako janm ke din ke saman nangee kar doonga, aur usako maroosthl ke saman aur marooboomi sareekhee banaunga, aur use pyas se mar daloonga." 
Hosea2:4 usake ladkebalon par bhee maain kuchh daya n karoonga, kyonaki ve kukarma ke ladke haain." 
Hosea2:5 unakee mata ne chhnaiala kiya haai jisake garbh men ve pade, us ne lajja ke yogy kam kiya haai. us ne kaha, mere yar jo mujhe rottee-panee, un, san, tel aur madh dete haai, maain unheen ke peechhe chaloongee." 
Hosea2:6 isaliye dekho, maain usake marga ko kantton se ghoroonga, aur aeesa bada khda karoonga ki vah rah n pa sakegee." 
Hosea2:7 vah apane yaron ke peechhe chalane se bhee n paaegee aur unhen ddoonddhne se bhee n paaegee. tab vah kahegee, maain apane pahile paati ke pas fir jaungee, kyonaki meree paahilee dasha is samay kee dasha se achchhee thee." 
Hosea2:8 vah yah naheen janatee thee, ki ann, naya dakhmadha aur tel maain hee use deta tha, aur usake liye vah chandee sona jisako ve bal devata ke kam men le ate haai, maain hee baddhata tha." 
Hosea2:9 is karan maain ann kee retu men apane ann ko, aur naye dakhmadha ke hone ke samay men apane naye dakhmadha ko har loonga aur apana un aur san bhee jin se vah apana tan ddhanpatee haai, maain chheen loonga." 
Hosea2:10 ab maain usake yaron ke samhane usake tan ko ughaaoonga, aur mere hath se koi use chhuda n sakega." 
Hosea2:11 aur maain usake parva, naye chand aur vishraamadin adi sab niyat samayon ke utsavon ka ant kar doonga." 
Hosea2:12 aur maain usakee dakhlataon aur anjeer ke vrakshaen ko, jinake vishay vah kahatee haai ki yah mere chhnaiale kee praaaptai haai jise mere yaron ne mujhe dee haai, unhen aeesa ujaoonga ki ve jangal se ho jaaenge, aur vana-pashu unhen char dalenge." 
Hosea2:13 aur ve din jin men vah bal devataon ke liye dhoop jalatee, aur natth aur har pahine apane yaron ke peechhe jatee aur mujhko boole rahatee thee, un dinon ka dand maain use doonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Hosea2:14 isaliye dekho, maain use mohit karake jangal men le jaunga, aur vahana us se shaantai kee baten kahoonga." 
Hosea2:15 aur vaheen maain usako dakh kee baariyan doonga, aur akor kee tarai ko asha ka dar kar doonga aur vahan vah mujh se aeesee baten kahegee jaaisee apanee javanee ke dinon men arthata misr desh se chale ane ke samay kahatee thee." 
Hosea2:16 aur yahova kee yah vanee haai ki us samay too mujhe ishaee kahegee aur fir balee n kahegee. 
Hosea2:17 kyonaki bhvishy men maain use bal devataon ke nam n lene doonga aur n unake nam fir smaran men rahenge. 
Hosea2:18 aur us samay maain unake liye vana-pashuuon aur akash ke paakshiayon aur boomi par ke renganevale jantuon ke sath vacha bandhoonga, aur dhanush aur talavar todkar yuddh ko unake desh se door kar doonga aur aeesa karoonga ki ve log nidr soya karenge." 
Hosea2:19 aur maain sada ke liye tujhe apanee sree karane kee pratigyaa karoonga, aur yah pratigyaa dharma, aur nyay, aur karoonna, aur daya ke sath karoonga." 
Hosea2:20 aur yah sachchai ke sath kee jaaegee, aur too yahova ko jan legee.." 
Hosea2:21 aur yahova kee yah vanee haai ki us samay maain akash kee sunakar usako uttr doonga, aur vah prathvee kee sunakar use uttr dega" 
Hosea2:22 aur prathvee ann, naye dakhmadha, aur taje tel kee sunakar unako uttr degee, aur ve yijrael ko uttr denge." 
Hosea2:23 aur maain apane liye use desh men bounga, aur loroohama par daya karoonga, aur loammee se kahoonga, too meree praja haai, aur vah kahega, he mere parameshvara.." 
Hosea3:1 fir yahova ne mujh se kaha, ab jakar aek aeesee sree se praeeti kar, jo vyabhaichaarinee hone par bhee apane piry kee pyaree ho kyonaki usee bhanti yadhyapi israaelee paraae devataon kee or fire, aur dakh kee ttiikayon se praeeati rakhte haai, taubhee yahova un se praeeti rakhta haai." 
Hosea3:2 tab maain ne aek sree ko chandee ke pandrah ttukade aur deddh homer jav dekar mol liya. 
Hosea3:3 aur maain ne us se kaha, too bahut din tak mere liye baaittee rahana aur n to chhnaiala karana, aur n kisee puroosh kee sree ho jana aur maain bhee tere liye aeesa hee rahoonga." 
Hosea3:4 kyonaki israaelee bahut din tak bina raja, bina haakim, bina yagy, bina lat, aur bina aepod va grahadevataon ke baaitte rahenge." 
Hosea3:5 usake bad ve apane parameshvar yahova aur apane raja daud ko fir ddoonddhne lagenge, aur ant ke dinon men yahova ke pas, aur usee uttm vastuon ke liye thrathrate huae aenge.." 
Hosea4:1 he israaeliyo, yahova ka vachan suno is desh ke nivaasiyon ke sath yahova ka mukama haai. is dansh men n to kuchh sachchai haai, n kuchh karoona aur n kuchh parameshvar ka gyaan hee haai." 
Hosea4:2 yahan shaap dene, joott bolane, vadha karane, churane, aur vyaabhaichar karane ko chhod kuchh naheen hota ve vyavastha kee seema ko langhakar kukarma karate haain aur koon hee koon hota rahata haai." 
Hosea4:3 is karan yah desh vilap karega, aur maaidan ke jeeva-jantuo, aur akash ke pakshiayon samet usake sab nivasee kumhala jaaenge aur samudra kee machhliyan bhee nash ho jaaengee.." 
Hosea4:4 dekho, koi vada-avivad n kare, n koi ulahana de, kyonki tere log to yajakon se vada-avivad karanevalon ke saman haain." 
Hosea4:5 too dinadupaharee ttokar khaaega, aur rat ko bhvishyadvkta bhee tere sath ttokar khaaega aur maain teree mata ko nash karoonga." 
Hosea4:6 mere gyaan ke n hone se meree praja nash ho gai too ne mere gyaan ko tuchchh jana haai, isaaliye maain tujhe apana yajak rahane ke ayogy ttharaunga. aur isaliye ki too ne apane parameshvar kee vyavastha ko taj diya haai, maain bhee tere ladkebalon ko chhod doonga." 
Hosea4:7 jaaise ve baddhte gaa, vaaise hee ve mere virooddh pap karate gaae maain unake vibhv ke badale unaka anadar karoonga." 
Hosea4:8 ve meree praja ke papabaaliyon ko khate haai, aur praja ke papee hone kee lalasa karate haain." 
Hosea4:9 isaliye jo praja kee dasha hogee, vahee yajak kee bhee hogee maain unake chalachalan ka dand doonga, aur unake kamon ke anukool unhen badala doonga." 
Hosea4:10 ve khaaenge to sahee, parantu trapt n honge, aur veshyagaman to karenge, parantu n baddhenge kyonaki unhon ne yahova kee or man lagana chhod diya haai.." 
Hosea4:11 veshyagaman aur dakhmadha aur taja dakhmadha, ye teenon buaddh iko bhrashtt karate haain." 
Hosea4:12 meree praja ke log katt ke putale se prashn karate haai, aur unakee chhdee unako bhvishy batatee haai. kyonki chhnaiala karanevalee atma ne unhen bahakaya haai, aur ve apane parameshvar kee adhaeenata chhodkar chhnaiala karate haain." 
Hosea4:13 banj, chinar aur chhotte banj vrakshaen kee chhaya achchhee hotee haai, isaaliye ve unake neeche aur pahadon kee chottyaien par yagya karate, aur tteelon par dhoop jalate haain.. is karan tumharee beattyaian chhnaial aur tumharee bahuaen vyabhaichaarinee ho gai haain." 
Hosea4:14 jab tumharee bettyaian chhnaiala aur tumharee bahuen vyaabhaichar kare, tab maain unako dand n doonga kyonki manushy ap hee veshyaon ke sath aekant men jate, aur devadasiyon ke sathee hokar yagya karate haain aur jo log samajh naheen rakhte, ve nash ho jaaenge.." 
Hosea4:15 he israael, yadhypi too chhnaiala karata haai, taubhee yahooda doshaee n bane. gilagal ke jao aur n betaven ko chaddh jao aur yahova ke jeevan kee saugandha kahakar shapath n khao." 
Hosea4:16 kyonaki israael ne hatteelee kalor kee nain hatt kiya haai, kya ab yahova unhen bhed ke bachche kee nain lambe chaude maaidan men charaaega?" 
Hosea4:17 aepraaim mooraton ka sangee ho gaya haai isaaliye usako rahane de. 
Hosea4:18 ve jab dakhmadha pee chukate haain tab veshyagaman karane men lag jate haain unake pradhaan log niradar hone se aadhaik praeeati rakhte haain. 
Hosea4:19 andhaee unako apane pankhon men bandhakar uda le jaaegee, aur unake baalidanon ke karan unakee asha toott jaaegee.." 
Hosea5:1 he yajako, yah bat suno! he israael ke gharane, dhyan dekar suno! he raja ke gharane, tum bhee kan lagao! kyonki tum par nyay kiya jaaega kyonki tum misapa men fanda, aur tabor par lagaya hua jal ban gaae ho." 
Hosea5:2 un bigade huon ne ghaer hatya kee haai, isaaliye maain un sabhon ko tadna doonga.." 
Hosea5:3 maain aepraaim ka bhed janata hoo, aur israael kee dasha mujh se chhpaiee naheen haai he aepraaim, too ne chhnaiala kiya, aur israael ashuuddh hua haai." 
Hosea5:4 unake kam unhen apane parameshvar kee or firane naheen dete, kyonki chhnaiala karanevalee atma un men rahatee haai aur ve yahova ko naheen janate hen.." 
Hosea5:5 israael ka garva usee ke virooddh sakshaee deta haai, aur israael aur aepraaim apane adharma ke karan ttokar khaaenge, aur yahooda bhee unake sang ttokar khaaega." 
Hosea5:6 ve apanee bhed-bakaariyan aur gaya-baail lekar yahova ko ddoonddhne chalenge, parantu vah unako n milega kyonki vah un se door ho gaya haai." 
Hosea5:7 ve vyabhaichar ke ladke jane haain is se unhon ne yahova ka vishvasaghaat kiya haai. is karan ab chand unaka aur unake bhagon ke nash ka karan hoga.. 
Hosea5:8 giba men narasinga, aur rama men turaheen foonko. betaven men lalakar kar kaho he binyameen, apane peechhe dekh!" 
Hosea5:9 nyay ke din men aepraaim ujad ho jaaega jis bat ko hona nishchay haai, maain ne usee ka sandesh israael ke sab gotraen ko diya haai." 
Hosea5:10 yahooda ke hakim unake saman huae haain jo sivana baddha lete haain maain un par apanee jalajalahatt jal kee nain undeloonga. 
Hosea5:11 aepraaim par andhor kiya gaya haai, vah mukama har gaya haai kyonaki vah jee lagakar us agyaa par chala." 
Hosea5:12 isaliye maain aepraaim ke liye keede ke saman aur yahooda ke gharane ke liye sadahatt ke saman hoonga.. 
Hosea5:13 jab aepraaim ne apana rog, aur yahooda ne apana ghaav dekha, tab aepraaim ashshoor ke pas gaya, aur yareb raja ko kahala bheja. parantu n vah tumhen changa kar sakata aur n tumhar ghaav achchha kar sakata haai." 
Hosea5:14 kyonaki maain aepraaim ke liye sinh, aur yahooda ke gharane ke liye javan sinh banoonga. maain ap hee unhen faadkar le jaunga jab maain utta le jaunga, tab mere panje se koi n chhuda sakega." 
Hosea5:15 jab tak ve apane ko aparadhaee manakar mere darshan ke khojee n honge tab tak maain apane sthan ko lautoonga, aur jab ve sankatt men padenge, tab jee lagakar mujhe ddoonddhne lagenge.." 
Hosea6:1 chalo, ham yahova kee or firen kyonki usee ne faada, aur vahee changa bhee karega usee ne mara, aur vahee hamare ghaavon par pattee bandhoga." 
Hosea6:2 do din ke bad vah ham ko jilaaega aur teesare din vah hamako uttakar khda karega tab ham usake sammukh jeevit rahenge. 
Hosea6:3 ao, ham gyaan ddoonddhe, varan yahova ka gyaan praapt karane ke liye yatn bhee karen kyonki yahova ka pragatt hona bhor ka sa nishachint haai vah vashara kee nain hamare upar aaega, varan barasat ke ant kee vashara ke saman jis se boomi sinchatee haai.." 
Hosea6:4 he aepraaim, maain tujh se kya karoon? he yahooda, maain tujh se kya karoon? tumhar sneh to bhor ke megha ke saman, aur savere ud janevalee os ke saman haai." 
Hosea6:5 is karan maain ne bhavishyadvktaon ke dara mano un par kulhadee chalakar unhen katt dala, aur apane vachanon se unako ghaat kiya, aur mera nyay prakasha ke saman chamakata haai." 
Hosea6:6 kyonaki maain baalidan se nahee, sthiar praem hee se prasann hota hoo, aur homabaliyon se aadhaik yah chahata hoon ki log parameshvar ka gyaan rakhen.." 
Hosea6:7 parantu un logon ne adam kee nai vacha ko tod diya unhon ne vahan mujh se vishvasaghaat kiya haai. 
Hosea6:8 gilad nam gaddhee to anarthkariyon se bhree haai, vah koon se bhree hui haai." 
Hosea6:9 jaaise dakuon ke dal kisee kee ghaat men baaittte haai, vaaise hee yajakon ka dal shakem ke marga men vadha karata haai, varan unhon ne mahapap bhee kiya haai." 
Hosea6:10 israael ke gharane men maain ne roaen khde hone ka karan dekha haai us men aepraaim ka chhnaiala aur israael kee ashuuddhta pai jatee haai.. 
Hosea6:11 aur he yahooda, jab maain apanee praja ko bandhauai se lautta le aunga, us samay ke liye tere nimitt bhee badala ttharaya hua haai.." 
Hosea7:1 jab maain israael ko changa karata hoon tab aepraaim ka adharma aur shaemaron kee buraiyan pragatt ho jatee haain ve chhl se kam karate haai, chor bheetar ghausata, aur dakuon ka dal bahar chheen leta haai." 
Hosea7:2 taubhee ve naheen sochate ki yahova hamaree saree burai ko smaran rakhta haai. isaaliye ab ve apane kamon ke jal men fasenge, kyonaki unake karya meree drashtti men bane haain." 
Hosea7:3 ve raja ko burai karane se, aur hakimon ko joott bolane se anaandait karate haain." 
Hosea7:4 ve sab ke sab vyabhaicharee haain ve us tandoor ke saman haain jisako pakanevala garma karata haai, par jab tak atta goondha naheen jata aur khmeer se fool naheen chukata, tab tak vah ag ko naheen usakata." 
Hosea7:5 hamare raja ke janm din men hakim dakhmadha peekar choor huae us ne ttttha karanevalon se apana hath milaya. 
Hosea7:6 jab tak ve ghaat lagaae rahate haai, tab tak ve apana man tandoor kee nai taaiyar kiae rahate haain unaka pakanevala rat bhr sota rahata haai vah bhor ko tandoor kee dhadhakatee lau ke saman lal ho jata haai." 
Hosea7:7 ve sab ke sab tandoor kee nai dhadhakate, aur apane nyaayiyon ko bhsm karate haain. unake sab raja mare gaae haain aur un men se koi meree dohai naheen deta haai.." 
Hosea7:8 aepraaim desh desh ke logon se milajula rahata haai aepraaim aeesee chapatee tthara haai jo ulattee n gai ho. 
Hosea7:9 paradeashaiyon ne usaka bal tod dala, parantu vah ise naheen janata usake sir men kaheen kaheen pake bal haai, parantu vah ise bhee naheen janata." 
Hosea7:10 israael ka garva usee ke virood sakshaee deta haai in sab baton ke rahate huae bhee ve apane parameshvar yahova kee or naheen fire, aur n usako ddoonddha haai.." 
Hosea7:11 aepraaim aek bholee pandukee ke saman ho gaya haai jis ke kuchh buddh inaheen ve misriyon kee dohai dete, aur ashshoor ko chale jate haain." 
Hosea7:12 jab ve jaae, tab unake upar maain apana jal faailaunga maain unhen aeesa kheench loonga jaaise akash ke pakshaee kheenche jate haain maain unako aeesee tadna doonga, jaaisee unakee mandlee sun chukee haai." 
Hosea7:13 un par hay, kyonki ve mere pas se bhttk gae! unaka satyanash hoa, kyonki unhon ne mujh se balava kiya haai! maain to unhen chhudata raha, parantu ve mujh se joott bolate aae haain.." 
Hosea7:14 ve man se meree dohai naheen dete, parantu apane bichhaune par pade huae hay, hay, karate haain ve ann aur naye dakhmadha pane ke liye bheed lagate, aur mujh se balava karate haain." 
Hosea7:15 maain unako shaiksha deta raha aur unakee bhujaon ko balavant karata aya hoo, taubhee ve mere virooddh buree kalpana karate haain." 
Hosea7:16 ve firate to haai, parantu paramapradhaan kee or naheen ve dhaekha denevale dhanush ke saman haain isaaliye unake haakim apanee krodhabhree baton ke karan talavar se mare jaaenge. misr desh men unake tttthon men udaae jane ka yahee karan hoga.." 
Hosea8:1 apane munh men naraasinga laga. vah ukab kee nain yahova ke ghar par jhpattega, kyonki mere ghar ke logon ne meree vacha todee, aur meree vyavastha ka ullanghan kiya haai." 
Hosea8:2 ve mujh se pukarakar kahenge, he hamare parameshvar, ham israaelee log tujhe janate haain." 
Hosea8:3 parantu israael ne bhlai ko man se utar diya haai shatra usake peechhe padega.. 
Hosea8:4 ve rajaon ko ttharate rahe, parantu meree ichchha se naheen. ve haakimon ko bhee ttharate rahe, parantu mere anajane men. unhon ne apana sona-chandee lekar mooraten bana leen jis se ve hee nash ho jaaen." 
Hosea8:5 he shaemaron, us ne tere bachhde ko man se utar diya haai, mera krodha un par bhdka haai. ve nirdosh hone men kab tak vilamb karenge?" 
Hosea8:6 yah israael se hua haai.. aek kareegar ne use banaya vah parameshvar naheen haai. is karan shaemaron ka vah bachhda ttukade ttukade ho jaaega.. 
Hosea8:7 ve vayu bote haai, aur ve bavandr lavenge. unake liye kuchh khet rahega naheen n unakee upaj se kuchh atta hoga aur yadi ho bhee to paradeshaee usako kha dalenge." 
Hosea8:8 israael nigala gaya ab ve anyajatiyon men aeese nikamme tthare jaaise tuchchh baratan ttharata haai. 
Hosea8:9 kyonaki ve ashshoor ko aeese chale gaa, jaaisa jangalee gadaha jhund se bichhud ke rahata haai aepraaim ne yaron ko majadooree par rakha haai." 
Hosea8:10 yadhypi ve anyajaatiyon men se majadoor banakar rakhe, taubhee maain unako ikattha karoonga. aur ve haakimon aur raja ke bojh ke karan ghattne legenge." 
Hosea8:11 aepraaim ne pap karane ko bahut see vediyan banai haai, ve hee vediyan usake papee ttharane ka karan bhee tthareen." 
Hosea8:12 maain to unake liye apanee vyavastha kee lakhon baten likhta aya hoo, parantu ve unhen paraya samajhte haain." 
Hosea8:13 ve mere liye baalidan to karate haai, aur pashu baali bhee karate haai, parantu usaka fal mans hee haai ve ap hee use khate haain parantu yahova un se prasann naheen hota. ab vah unake adharma kee suadhai lekar unake pap ka dand dega ve misr men lautt jaaenge." 
Hosea8:14 kyonaki israael ne apane kartta ko bisara kar mahal banaa, aur yahooda ne bahut se gaddhvale nagaron ko basaya haai parantu maain unake nagaron men ag lagaunga, aur us se unake gaddh bhsm ho jaaenge." 
Hosea9:1 he israael, too desh desh ke logon kee nain anand men magan mat ho! kyonki too apane parameshvar ko chhodkar veshya banee. too ne ann ke har aek khlihan par chhnaiale kee kamai anand se lee haai." 
Hosea9:2 ve n to khlihan ke ann se trapt honge, aur n kund ke dakhmadha se aur n naye dakhmadha ke dhattne se ve dhaekha khaaenge." 
Hosea9:3 ve yahova ke desh men rahane n paaenge parantu aepraaim misr men lautt jaaega, aur ve ashshoor men ashuuddh vastuaen khaaenge.." 
Hosea9:4 ve yahova ke liye dakhmadha ka ardha n denge, aur n unake baalidan usako bhaaenge. unakee rottee shaek karanevalon ka sa bhojan ttharegee jitane use khaaenge sab ashuuddh ho jaaenge kyonki unakee bhojanavasatu unakee bookh bujhane hee ke liye hogee vah yahova ke bhvan men n a sakegee.." 
Hosea9:5 niyat samay ke parva aur yahova ke utsav ke din tum kya karoge? 
Hosea9:6 dekho, ve satyanash hone ke dr ke mare chale gaae parantu vahan mar jaaenge aur misree unakee lothen ikatthee karenge aur mop ke nivasee unako mittee denge. unakee manabhavanee chandee kee vastuaen bichchhu pedon ke beech men padengee, aur unake tambuon men jhdberee ugegee." 
Hosea9:7 dand ke din aae haain badala lene ke din aae haain aur israael yah jan lega. unake bahut se adharma aur bade desh ke karan bhvishyadvkta to moorkh, aur jis puroosh par atma utarata haai, vah bavala ttharega.." 
Hosea9:8 aepraaim mere parameshvar kee or se paharooa haai bhvishyadvkta sab magorn men bahealiye ka fanda haai, aur vah apane parameshvar ke ghar men baairee hua haai." 
Hosea9:9 ve giba ke dinon kee bhanti atyant bigade haain so vah unake adharma kee suadhai lekar unake pap ka dand dega.. 
Hosea9:10 maain ne israael ko aeesa paya jaaise koi jangal men dakh paae aur tumahare purakhaon par aeese draashtti kee jaaise anjeer ke pahile falon par drashtti kee jatee haai. parantu unhon ne por ke bal ke pas jakar apane tai lajja ka karan hone ke liye arpan kar diya, aur jis par mohit ho gaae the, ve usee ke saman ghainaune ho gaae." 
Hosea9:11 aepraaim ka vibhv pakshaee kee nain ud jaaega n to kisee ka janm hoga, n kisee ko garbh rahega, aur n koi sree garbhvatee hogee!" 
Hosea9:12 chahe ve apane ladkebalon ka palanaposhan kar bade bhee kare, taubhee maain unhen yahan tak nirvansh karoonga ki koi bhee n bachega. jab maain un se door ho jaunga, tab un par haya!" 
Hosea9:13 jaaisa maain ne sor ko dekha, vaaisa aepraaim ko bhee manabha sthan men basa hua dekha taubhee use apane ladkebalon ko ghaatak ke samhane le jana padega." 
Hosea9:14 he yahova, unako dand de! too kya dega? yah, ki unakee striayon ke garbh gir jaae, aur sthan sookhe rahen.." 
Hosea9:15 unakee saree burai gilgal men haai vaheen maain ne un se gharana kee. unake bure kamon ke karan maain unako apane ghar se nikal doonga. aur un se fir praeeati n rakoonga, kyonaki unake sab hakim balava karanevale haain." 
Hosea9:16 aepraaim mara hua haai, unakee jad sookh gai, un men fal n lagega. aur chahe unakee striayan bachche bhee n janen taubhee maain unake janme huae dularon ko mar daloonga.." 
Hosea9:17 mera parameshvar unako nikamma ttharaaega, kyonki unhon ne usakee naheen sunee. ve anyajaatiyon ke beech mare mare firenge.." 
Hosea10:1 israael aek lahalahatee hui dakhlata see haai, jis men bahut se fal bhee lage, parantu jyon jyon usake fal baddhe, tyon tyon us ne aadhaik vediyan banain jaaise jaaise usakee boomi sudharee, vaaise hee ve sundar latten banate gaye." 
Hosea10:2 unaka man batta hua haai ab ve doshaee ttharenge. vah unakee veadiyon ko tod dalega, aur unakee latton ko ttukade ttukade karega." 
Hosea10:3 ab ve kahenge, hamare koi raja naheen haai, kyonki ham ne yahova ka bhy naheen mana so raja hamara kya kar sakata haai?" 
Hosea10:4 ve baten banate aur joottee shapath khakar vacha bandhate haain is karan khet kee reghaaariyon men dhatoore kee nain dand foole falega. 
Hosea10:5 samariya ke nivasee betaven ke bachhde ke liye drate rahenge, aur usake log usake liye vilap karenge aur usake pujaree jo usake karan magan hote the usake pratap ke liye is karan vilap karenge kyonki vah un men se utt gaya haai." 
Hosea10:6 vah yareb raja kee bhentt ttharane ke liye ashshoor desh men pahunchaya jaaega. aepraaim lajjait hoga, aur israael bhee apanee yuktai se lajaaega.." 
Hosea10:7 samariya apane raja samet jal ke bulabule kee nain mitt jaaega. 
Hosea10:8 aur aven ke unche sthan jo israael k pap haai, ve nash honge. unakee veadiyon par jhdberee, ped aur unttkattare ugenge aur us samay log pahadon se kahane lagenge, ham ko chhpai lo, aur tteelon se ki ham par gir pado.." 
Hosea10:9 he israael, too giba ke dinon men pap karata aya haai ve usee men bane rahen kya ve giba men kuattlai manushyon ke sang ladai men n fanse?" 
Hosea10:10 jab meree ichchha hogee tab maain unhen tadna doonga, aur desh desh ke log unake virooddh ikatthe ho jaaenge kyonaki ve apane donon adharmon men fasen huae haain.." 
Hosea10:11 aepraaim seekhee hui baachhyai haai, jo ann danvane se prasann hotee haai, parantu maain ne usakee sundar gardan par jua rakha haai maain aepraaim par savar chaddhaunga yahooda hal, aur yakoob henga kheenchega." 
Hosea10:12 apane liye dharma ka beej boo, tab karoona ke anusar khet kattne paoge apanee padtee boomi ko joto dekho, abhee yahova ke peechhe ho lene ka samay haai, ki vah aae aur tumhare upar uddhar barasaae.." 
Hosea10:13 tum ne dushttta ke liye hal jota aur anyay ka khet katta haai aur tum ne dhaekhe ka fal khaya haai. aur yah isaaliye hua kyonki tum ne apane kuvyavahar par, aur apane bahut se veeron par bhrosa rakha tha." 
Hosea10:14 is karan tumhare logon men hullad uttega, aur tumhare sab gaddh aeese nash kiae jaaenge jaaisa betarbel nagar yuddh ke samay shalman ke dara nash kiya gaya us samay mataaen apane bachchon samet pattk dee gain thee." 
Hosea10:15 tumharee atyant burai ke karan betel se bhee isee prakar ka vyavahar kiya jaaega. bhor hote hee israael ka raja pooree reeati se mitt jaaega.. 
Hosea11:1 jab israael balak tha, tab maain ne us se praem kiya, aur apane putra ko misr se bulaya." 
Hosea11:2 parantu jitana ve unako bulate the, utana hee ve bhage jate the ve bal devataon ke liye baalidan karate, aur khudee hui mooraton ke liye dhoop jalate gaae.." 
Hosea11:3 maain hee aepraaim ko panva-panv chalata tha, aur unako god men liae firata tha, parantu ve n janate the ki unaka changa karanevala maain hoon." 
Hosea11:4 maain unako manushy janakar praem kee doree se kheenchata tha, aur jaaisa koi baail ke gale kee jot kholakar usake samhane ahar rakh de, vaaisa hee maain ne un se kiya." 
Hosea11:5 vah misr desh men lauttne n paaega ashshoor hee usaka raja hoga, kyonaki us ne meree or firane se inakar kar diya haai." 
Hosea11:6 talavar unake nagaron men chalegee, aur unake bedon ko poora nash karegee aur yah unakee yuktaiyon ke karan hoga." 
Hosea11:7 meree praja mujh se fir jane men lagee rahatee haai yadhypi ve unako paramapradhaan kee or bulate haai, taubhee un men se koi bhee meree maahima naheen karata.." 
Hosea11:8 he aepraaim, maain tujhe kyonki chhod doon? he israael, maain kyonkar tujhe shatra ke vash men kar doon? maain kyonkar tujhe adama kee nai chhod doo, aur saboyeem ke saman kar doon? mera day to ulatt pulatt ho gaya, mera man sneh ke mare pighal gaya haai." 
Hosea11:9 maain apane krodha ko bhdkane n doonga, aur n maain fir aepraaim ko nash karoonga kyonki maain manushy naheen parameshvar hoo, maain tere beech men rahanevala pavitra hoon maain krodha karake n aunga.." 
Hosea11:10 ve yahova ke peechhe peechhe chalenge vah to sinh kee nain garajega aur tere ladke paashchaim disha se thrathrate huae aaenge. 
Hosea11:11 ve misr se chidiyon kee nain aur ashshoor ke desh se pandukee kee bhanati thrathrate huae aaenge aur maain unako unheen ke gharon men basa doonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Hosea11:12 aepraaim ne mithya se, aur israael ke gharane ne chhl se mujhe ghor rakha haai aur yahooda ab tak paavitra aur vishvasayogy parameshvar kee or chanchal bana rahata haai.." 
Hosea12:1 aepraaim panee peettta aur puravaira ka peechha karata rahata haai vah lagatar joott aur utpat ko baddhata rahata haai ve ashshoor ke sath vacha bandhate aur misr men tel bhejate haain. 
Hosea12:2 yahooda ke sath bhee yahova ka mukama haai, aur vah yakoob ko usake chalachalan ke anusar dand dega usake kamon ke anusar vah usako badala dega." 
Hosea12:3 apanee mata kee kokh hee men us ne apane bhai ko adnga mara, aur bada hokar vah parameshvar ke sath lada." 
Hosea12:4 vah doot se lada, aur jeet bhee gaya, vah roya aur us ne gidgidakar binatee kee. betel men vah usako mila, aur vaheen us ne ham se baten kee." 
Hosea12:5 yahova, senaon ka paramashevar, jisaka smaran yahova nam se hota haai." 
Hosea12:6 isaliye too apane parameshvar kee or fira krapa aur nyay ke kam karata rah, aur apane parameshvar kee batt nirantar johata raha.." 
Hosea12:7 vah vyoparee haai, aur usake hath men chhl ka tarajoo haai andhor karata hee usako bhata haai." 
Hosea12:8 aepraaim kahata haai, maain dhanee ho gaya, maain ne sampati praapt kee haai mere kisee kam men aeesa adharma naheen paya gaya jis se pap lage." 
Hosea12:9 maain yahova, misr desh hee se tera parameshvar hoon maain fir tujhe tambuon men aeesa basaunga jaaisa niyat parva ke dinon men hua karata haai.." 
Hosea12:10 maain ne bhvishyadvktaon ke dara baten kee, aur bar bar darshan deta raha aur bhavishyadvktaon ke dara drashttant kahata aya hoon." 
Hosea12:11 kya gilad kukarmee naheen? ve poore chhlee ho gaae haain. gilgal men baail baali kiae jate haai, varan unakee veadiyan un ddheron ke saman haain jo khet kee reghaariyon ke pas hon." 
Hosea12:12 yakoob aram ke maaidan men bhag gaya tha vahan israael ne aek patnee ke liye seva kee, aur patnee ke liye vah charavahee karata tha." 
Hosea12:13 aek bhavishyadvkta ke dara yahova israael ko misr se nikal le aya, aur bhvishyadvkta hee ke dara usakee raksha hui." 
Hosea12:14 aepraaim ne atyant ris dilai haai isaliye usaka kiya hua koon usee ke upar bana rahega, aur us ne apane parameshvar ke nam men jo batta lagaya haai, vah usakee ko lauttata jaaega.." 
Hosea13:1 jab aepraaim bolata tha, tab log kanpate the aur jab israael men bada tha parantu jab vah bal ke karan doshaee ho gaya, tab vah mar gaya." 
Hosea13:2 aur ab ve log pap par pap baddhate jate haai, aur apanee buddh ise chandee ddhalakar aeesee mooraten banai haain jo kareegaron hee se baneen. unheen ke vishay log kahate haai, jo naramegha kare, ve bachhdon ko choomen!" 
Hosea13:3 is karan ve bhor ke megha, tadke sookh janevalee os, khlihan par se andhaee ke mare udnevalee boosee, ya chimanee se nikalate huae dhooaen ke saman honge.." 
Hosea13:4 misr desh hee se maain yahova, tera parameshvar hoon too mujhe chhod kisee ko parameshvar karake n janana kyonki mere siva koi tera uddharakarta naheen haain." 
Hosea13:5 maain ne us samay tujh par man lagaya jab too jangal men varan atyant sookhe desh men tha. 
Hosea13:6 parantu jab israaelee charaae jate the aur ve trapt ho gaa, tab trapt hone par unaka man ghamand se bhr gaya is karan ve mujh ko bool gaae." 
Hosea13:7 so maain unake liye sinh sa bana hoon maain cheete kee nain unake marga men ghaat lagaae rahoonga. 
Hosea13:8 maain bachche chheenee hui reechhnee ke saman banakar unako miloonga, aur unake day kee jhlilee ko faaoonga, aur sinh kee nain unako vaheen kha daloonga, jaaise bana-pashu unako faad dale.." 
Hosea13:9 he israael, tere vinash ka karan yah haai, ki too mera arthata apane sahayak ka virodhaee haai." 
Hosea13:10 ab tera raja kahan raha ki tere sab nagaron men vah tujhe bachaae? aur tere nyayee kahan rahe, jinake vishay men too ne kaha tha ki mere liye raja aur hakim tthara den?" 
Hosea13:11 maain ne krodha men akar tere liye raja banaye, aur fir jalajalahatt men akar unako hatta bhee diya." 
Hosea13:12 aepraaim ka adharma gatta hua haai, unaka pap sanchay kiya hua haai." 
Hosea13:13 usako jachcha kee see peedaae uttengee, parantu vah nirbuaddh iladka haai jo janm ke samay tteek se naheen ata." 
Hosea13:14 maain usako adhaelok ke vash se chhuda loonga aur mratyu se usako chhuttkara doonga. he mratyu, teree marane kee shaktai kahan rahee? he adhaelok, teree nash karane kee shaktai kahan raheen? maain fir kabhee naheen pachhtaunga.." 
Hosea13:15 chahe vah apane bhaiyon se adhaik foolen-fale, taubhee puravai us par chalegee, aur yahova kee or se maroosthl se aaegee, aur usaka kund sookhega aur usaka sota nirjan ho jaaega. usakee rakhee hui sab manabhavanee vastuen vah loott le jaaega." 
Hosea13:16 samariya doshaee ttharega, kyonaki us ne apane parameshvar se balava kiya haai ve talavar se mare jaaenge, unake bachche pattke jaaenge, aur unakee garbhvatee striayan cheer daleen jaaengee.." 
Hosea14:1 he israael, apane parameshvar yahova ke pas lautt a, kyonaki too ne apane adharma ke karan ttokar khai haai." 
Hosea14:2 baten seekhkar aur yahova kee or firakar, us se kah, sab adharma door kara anugrah se ham ko grahan kara tab ham dhanyavad roopee bali chaddhaaenge." 
Hosea14:3 ashshoor hamara uddhar n karega, ham ghaedon par savar n honge aur n ham fir apanee banai hui vastuon se kahenge, tum hamare ishvar ho kyonaki anath par too hee daya karata haai.." 
Hosea14:4 maain unakee bhttk jane kee adat ko door karoonga maain sentament un se praem karoonga, kyonki mera krodha un par se utar gaya haai." 
Hosea14:5 maain israael ke liye os ke saman hoonga vah sosan kee nai foole-falega, aur labanon kee nain jad faailaaega."
