Hosea14:6 usakee jad se paudho foottkar nikalenge usakee shaebha jalapai kee see, aur usakee sugandha labanon kee see hogee." 
Hosea14:7 jo usakee chhaya men baaittenge, ve ann hee nain baddhenge, ve dakhlata kee nai foole-falenge aur usakee keetira labanon ke dakhmadha kee see hogee.." 
Hosea14:8 aepraaim kahega, mooraton se ab mera aur kya kama? maain usakee sunakar us par drashtti banaae rakoonga. maain hare sanauvar sa hoon mujhee se too fal paya karega.." 
Hosea14:9 jo buaddhmaian ho, vahee in baton ko samajhega jo praveen ho, vahee inhen boojh sakega kyonaki yahova ke marga seedho haai, aur dharmee un men chalate rahenge, parantu aparadhaee un men ttokar khakar girenge.." 
Joel1:1 yahova ka vachan jo patooael ke putra yoael ke pas pahuncha, vah yah haai:" 
Joel1:2 he puraniyo, suno, he desh ke sab rahanevalo, kan lagakar suno! kya aeesee bat tumhare dinon me, va tumhare purakhaon ke dinon men kabhee hui haai?" 
Joel1:3 apane ladkebalon se isaka varnn karo, aur ve apane ladkebalon se, aur fir unake ladkebale anevalee peeddhee ke logon se.." 
Joel1:4 jo kuchh gajam nam ttddaiee se bacha use arbe nam ttddaiee ne kha liya. aur jo kuchh arbe nam ttddaiee se bacha, use yelek nam ttddaiee ne kha liya, aur jo kuchh yelek nam ttddaiee se bacha, use haseel nam ttddaiee ne kha liya haai." 
Joel1:5 he matavalo, jag utto, aur roo aur he sab dakhmadha peelevalo, naye dakhmadha ke karan hay, hay, karo kyonki vah tum ko ab n milega.." 
Joel1:6 dekho, mere desh par aek jati ne chaddhai kee haai, vah samarthee haai, aur usake log anaginit haain usake dant sinh ke se, aur daddhen sihanee kee see haain." 
Joel1:7 us ne meree dakhlata ko ujad diya, aur mere anjeer ke vraksha ko tod dala haai us ne usakee sab chhal chheelakar use gira diya haai, aur usakee daliyan chhlaine se safaed ho gai haain.." 
Joel1:8 jaaise yuvatee apane paati ke liye kaatt imen ttatt bandho huae vilap karatee haai, vaaise hee tum bhee vilap karo." 
Joel1:9 yahova ke bhvan men n to annabaali aur n ardha ata haai. usake tthaluae jo yajak haai, ve vilap kar rahe haain." 
Joel1:10 khetee maree gai, boomi vilap karatee haai kyonki ann nash ho gaya, naya dakhmadha sookh gaya, tel bhee sookh gaya haai.." 
Joel1:11 he kisano, lajjait ho, he dakh kee baree ke maaliyo, gehoon aur jav ke liye hay, hay karo kyonaki khetee maree gai haai." 
Joel1:12 dakhlata sookh gai, aur anjeer ka vraksha kumhala gaya haai. anar, tad, sev, varan maaidan ke sab vraksha sookh gaae haain aur manushyon ka harsha jata raha haai.." 
Joel1:13 he yajako, kaatt imen ttatt bandhakar chhatee peett-peett ke roo! he vedee ke tthaluo, hay, hay, karo. he mere parameshvar ke tthaluo, ao, ttatt oddhe huae rat bitao! kyonki tumhare parameshvar ke bhvan men annabali aur ardha ab naheen ate.." 
Joel1:14 upavas ka din ttharao, mahasabha ka prachar karo. puraaniyon ko, varan desh ke sab rahanevalon ko bhee apane parameshvar yahova ke bhvan men ikatthe karake usakee dohai do.." 
Joel1:15 us din ke karan haya! kyonki yahova ka din nikatt haai. vah sarvashaktaiman kee or se satyanash ka din hokar aega. 
Joel1:16 kya bhojanavastuaen hamare dekhte nash naheen huin? kya hamare parameshvar ke bhvan ka anand aur magan jata naheen raha? 
Joel1:17 beej ddhelon ke neeche jhulas gaa, bhndar soone pade haain khtte gir pade haai, kyonki khetee maree gai." 
Joel1:18 pashu kaaise karahate haain? jhund ke jhund gaya-baail vikal haai, kyonki unake liye charai naheen rahee aur jhund ke jhund bhed-bakaariyan pap ka fal bhog rahee haain.." 
Joel1:19 he yahova, maain teree dohai deta hoo, kyonki jangal kee charaiyan ag ka kaur ho gai, aur maaidan ke sab vraksha jvala se jal gaae." 
Joel1:20 vana-pashu bhee tere liye hanfate haai, kyonki jal ke sote sookh gaa, aur jangal kee charaiyan ag ka kaur ho gain.." 
Joel2:1 siyyon men naraasinga foonko mere pavitra parvat par sans bandhakar foonko! desh ke sab rahanevale kanp utte, kyonki yahova ka din ata haai, varan vah nikatt hee haai." 
Joel2:2 vah andhakar aur timir ka din haai, vah badalee ka din haai aur andhiayare ka sa faailata haai. jaaise bhor ka prakash pahadon par faailata haai, vaaise hee aek badee aur samarthee jati aaegee praacheenakal men vaaisee kabhee n hui, aur n usake bad bhee fir kisee peeddhee men hogee.." 
Joel2:3 usake age age to ag bhsm karatee jaegee, aur usake peechhe peechhe lau jalatee jaegee. usake age kee boomi to eden kee baree ke saman hogee, parantu usake peechhe kee boomi ujad maroosthl ban jaegee, aur us se kuchh n bachega.." 
Joel2:4 unaka roop ghaedon ka sa haai, aur ve savaree ke ghaedon kee nain daudte haain." 
Joel2:5 unake koodane ka shabd aeesa hota haai jaaisa pahadon kee chottyaien par rathon ke chalane ka, va koonttee bhsm karatee hui lau ka, ya jaaise panti bandho huae balee yoddhaon ka shabd hota haai.." 
Joel2:6 unake samane jaati jati ke log peedit hote haai, sab ke mukh maleen hote haain." 
Joel2:7 ve shooraveeron kee nain daudte, aur yoddhaon kee bhanti shaharapanah par chaddhte haain ve apane apane marga par chalate haai, aur koi apanee panti se alag n chalega." 
Joel2:8 ve aek doosare ko dhakka naheen lagate, ve apanee apanee rah par chalate haain shasren ka samhana karane se bhee unakee panati naheen tootttee." 
Joel2:9 ve nagar men idhara-udhar daudte, aur shaharapanah par chaddhte haain ve gharon men aeese ghausate haain jaaise chor khaidkiyon se ghausate haain.." 
Joel2:10 unake age prathvee kanp utttee haai, aur akash thrathrata haai. soorya aur chandrama kale ho jate haai, aur tare naheen jhlakate." 
Joel2:11 yahova apane us dal ke age apana shabd sunata haai, kyonki usakee sena bahut hee badee haai jo apana vachan poora karanevala haai, vah samarthee haai. kyonki yahova ka din bada aur ati bhyanak haai usako kaun sah sakega?" 
Joel2:12 taubhee yahova kee yah vanee haai, abhee bhee suno, upavas ke sath rote-peettte apane poore man se firakar mere pas ao." 
Joel2:13 apane vasr nahee, apane man hee ko faadkar apane parameshvar yahova kee or firo kyonaki vah anugrahakaree, dayalu, vilamb se krodha karanevala, karoonaanidhaan aur du:kh dekar pachhtanehara haai." 
Joel2:14 kya jane vah firakar pachhtaae aur aeesee ashaeesh de jis se tumhare parameshvar yahova ka annabaali aur ardha diya jaae.. 
Joel2:15 siyyon men naraasinga foonko, upavas ka din ttharao, mahasabha ka prachar karo" 
Joel2:16 logon ko ikattha karo. sabha ko pavitra karo puraaniyon ko bula lo bachchon aur doodhapeeuvon ko bhee ikattha karo. dulha apanee kottree se, aur dulhain bhee apane kamare se nikal aaen.." 
Joel2:17 yajak jo yahova ke tthaluae haai, ve angal aur vedee ke beech men ro rokar kahe, he yahova apanee praja par taras kha aur apane nij bhag kee namadharai n hone de n anyajatiyan usakee upama dene paaen. jaati jati ke log apas men kyan kahane paae, ki unaka parameshvar kahan raha?" 
Joel2:18 tab yahova ko apane desh ke vishay men jalan hui, aur us ne apanee praja par taras khaya." 
Joel2:19 yahova ne apanee praja ke logon ko uttr diya, suno, maain ann aur naya dakhmadha aur taja tel tumhen dene par hoo, aur tum unhen pakar trapt hoge aur maain bhvishy men anyajatiyon se tumharee namadharai n hone doonga.." 
Joel2:20 maain uttr kee or se ai hui sena ko tumhare pas se door karoonga, aur use aek nirjal aur ujad desh men nikal doonga usaka aga to poorab ke tal kee or aur usaka peechha pashchaim ke samudra kee or hoga us se durgandha uttegee, aur usakee sadee gandha faailegee, kyonaki us ne bahut bure kam kiae haain.." 
Joel2:21 he desha, too mat dra too magan ho aur anand kar, kyonaki yahova ne bade bade kam kiae haain!" 
Joel2:22 he maaidan ke pashuuo, mat dro, kyonaki jangal men charai ugegee, aur vraksha falane legenge anjeer ka vraksha aur dakhlata apana apana bal dikhane lagengee." 
Joel2:23 he siyyoniyo, tum apane parameshvar yahova ke karan magan ho, aur anand karo kyonaki tumhare liye vah vashara, arthata barasat kee paahilee vashara bahutayat se dega aur paahile ke saman agalee aur pichhlee vashara ko bhee barasaaega.." 
Joel2:24 tab khalihan ann se bhr jaaenge, aur rasakund naye dakhmadha aur taje tel se umadenge." 
Joel2:25 aur jin vasharen kee upaj arbe nam ttiiddayo, aur yelek, aur haseel ne, aur gajam nam ttiiddayon ne, arthata mere bade dal ne jisako maain ne tumhare beech bheja, kha lee thee, maain usakee hani tum ko bhr doonga.." 
Joel2:26 tum pett bhrakar khaoge, aur trapt hoge, aur apane parameshvar yahova ke nam kee stuti karoge, jis ne tumhare liye ashcharya ke kam kiae haain. aur meree praja kee asha fir kabhee n toottegee." 
Joel2:27 tab tum janoge ki maain israael ke beech men hoo, aur maai, yahova, tumhara parameshvar hoon aur koi doosara naheen haai. aur meree praja kee asha fir kabhee n toottegee.." 
Joel2:28 un baton ke bad maain sab praanaiyon par apana atma undeloonga tumhare bette-beattyaian bhavishyadanee karengee, aur tumhare puraaniye svapn dekhenge, aur tumhare javan darshan dekhenge." 
Joel2:29 tumhare das aur dasiyon par bhee maain un dinon men apana atma undeloonga.. 
Joel2:30 aur maain akash men aur prathvee par chamatkar, arthata lohoo aur ag aur dhooaen ke khmbhe dikhaunga." 
Joel2:31 yahova ke us bade aur bhyanak din ke ane se paahile soorya aandhiayara hoga aur chandrama rakt sa ho jaaega. 
Joel2:32 us samay jo koi yahova se praarthna karega, vah chhuttkara paega aur yahova ke vachan ke anusar siyyon parvat par, aur yarooshalem men jin bache huon ko yahova bulaega, ve udar paenge.." 
Joel3:1 kyonaki suno, jin dinon men aur jis samay maain yahooda aur yarooshalem vasiyon ko bandhauai se lautta le aunga," 
Joel3:2 us samay maain sab jaatiyon ko ikatthee karake yahoshapat kee tarai men le jaunga, aur vahan unake sath apanee praja arthata apane nij bhag israel ke vishay men jise unhon ne anyajatiyon men titara-abitar karake mere desh ko bantt liya haai, un se mukama laoonga." 
Joel3:3 unhon ne to meree praja par chitthee dalee, aur ek ladka veshya ke badale men de diya, aur ek ladkee bechakar dakhmadha peeya haai.." 
Joel3:4 he sor, aur seedon aur paalishteen ke sab pradeshae, tum ko mujh se kya kama? kya tum mujh ko badala doge? yaadi tum mujhe badala bhee do, to maain shaeegha hee tumhara diya hua badala, tumhare hee sir par dal doonga." 
Joel3:5 kyonaki tum ne meree chandee-sona le liya, aur meree achchhee aur manabhavanee vastuen apane mandairon men le jakar rakhee haai" 
Joel3:6 aur yahoodiyon aur yarooshalemiyon ko yoonaaniyon ke hath isaliye bech dala haai ki ve apane desh se door kiae jaaen. 
Joel3:7 isaliye suno, maain unako us sthan se, jahan ke janevalon ke hath tum ne unako bech diya, bulane par hoo, aur tumhara diya hua badala, tumhare hee sir par dal doonga." 
Joel3:8 maain tumhare bette-bettyaien ko yahoodiyon ke hath bikava doonga, aur ve usako shabaiyon ke hath bech denge jo door desh ke rahanevale haain kyonki yahova ne yah kaha haai.." 
Joel3:9 jaati jati men yah prachar karo, yuddh kee taaiyaree karo, apane shooraveeron ko ubharo. sab yoddha nikatt akar ladne ko chaddhen." 
Joel3:10 apane apane hal kee faal ko peettkar talavar, aur apanee apanee hanasiya ko peettkar barchhee banao jo balaheen ho vah bhee kahe, maain veer hoon.." 
Joel3:11 he charon or ke jati jati ke logo, faurtee karake ao aur ikatthe ho jao. he yahova, too bhee apane shooraveeron ko vahan le ja." 
Joel3:12 jaati jati ke log ubhrakar chaddh jaaen aur yahoshaapat kee tarai men jaae, kyonki vahan maain charon are kee saree jaatiyon ka nyay karane ko baaitoonga.." 
Joel3:13 hansua lagao, kyonki khet pak gaya haai. ao, dakh raundo, kyonaki hauja bhr gaya haai. rasakund umandne lage, kyonaki unakee burai bahut badee haai.." 
Joel3:14 nibattare kee tarai men bheed kee bheed haai! kyonki nibattare kee tarai men yahova ka din nikatt haai. 
Joel3:15 soorya aur chandrama apana apana prakash n denge, aur n tare chamakenge.." 
Joel3:16 aur yahova siyyon se garajega, aur yarooshalem se bada shabd sunaaega aur akash aur prathvee thrathraaenge. parantu yahova apanee praja ke liye sharansthan aur israaeliyon ke liye gaddh ttharega.." 
Joel3:17 is prakar tum janoge ki yahova jo apane pavitra parvat siyyon par vas kiae rahata haai, vahee hamara parameshvar haai. aur yarooshalem pavitra ttharega, aur paradeshaee us men hokar fir n jane paaenge.." 
Joel3:18 aur us samay pahadon se naya dakhmadha ttpakane lagega, aur tteelon se doodha bahane lagega, aur yahooda desh ke sab nale jal se bhr jaaenge aur yahova ke bhvan men se aek sota foott nikalega, jis se shaitteem ka nam nala seencha jaaega.." 
Joel3:19 yahoodiyon par upadrav karane ke kara, misr ujad aur aedom ujada hua maroosthl ho jaaega, kyonaki unhon ne unake desh men nirdosh kee hatya kee thee." 
Joel3:20 parantu yahooda sarvada aur yarooshalem peeddhee peeddhee tab bana rahega. 
Joel3:21 kyonaki unaka koon, jo ab tak maain ne paavitra naheen ttharaya tha, use ab pavitra ttharaunga, kyonki yahova siyyon men vas kiae rahata haai.." 
Amos1:1 amos takoi jo bhed-bakaariyon ke charanevalon men se tha, usake ye vachan haain jo us ne yahooda ke raja ujjaiyah ke, aur yoash ke putra israael ke raja yarobam ke dinon me, bhuindol se do varsha pahile, israael ke vishay men darshan dekar kahe.." 
Amos1:2 yahova siyyon se garajega aur yarooshalem se apana shabd sunaaega tab charavahon kee charaiyan vilap karengee, aur kamrmel kee chottee jhulas jaaegee.." 
Amos1:3 yahova yon kahata haai, damishk ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke karan maain usaka dand n chhooonga kyonaki unhon ne gilad ko lohe ke danvanevale yantraen se raund dala haai." 
Amos1:4 isaliye maain hajaael ke rajabhvan men ag jalaunga, aur us se benhadad ke rajabhvan bhee bhsm ho jaaenge." 
Amos1:5 maain damishk ke bendon ko tod daloonga, aur aven nam tarai ke rahanevalon ko aur aeden ke ghar men rahanevale rajadanddhaaree ko nash karoonga aur aram ke log bandhauae hokar keer ko jaaenge, yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Amos1:6 yahova yon kahata haai, ajja ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke karan maain usaka dand n chhooonga kyonaki ve sab logon ko bandhaua karake le gaae ki unhen aedom ke vash men kar den." 
Amos1:7 isaliye maain ajja kee shaharapanah men ag lagaunga, aur us se usake bhvan bhsm ho jaaenge." 
Amos1:8 maain ashadod ke rahanevalon ko aur ashkalon ke rajadanddhaaree ko bhee nash karoonga maain apana hath aekron ke virooddh chalaunga, aur shosh palishtee log nash honge, parameshvar yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Amos1:9 yahova yon kahata haai, sor ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke karan maain usaka dand n chhooonga kyonaki unhon ne sab logon ko bandhaua karake aedom ke vash men kar diya aur bhai kee see vacha ka smaran n kiya." 
Amos1:10 isaliye maain sor kee shaharapanah par ag lagaunga, aur us se usake bhvan bhee bhsm ho jaaenge.." 
Amos1:11 yahova yon kahata haai, aedom ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke karan maain usaka dand n chhooonga kyonaki us ne apane bhai ko talavar liae huae khdeda aur kuchh bhee daya n kee, parantu krodha se unako lagatar faadta hee raha, aur apane rosh ko anant kal ke liye banaae raha." 
Amos1:12 isaliye maain teman men ag lagaunga, aur us se bosra ke bhvan bhsm ho jaaenge.." 
Amos1:13 yahova yon kahata haai, ammon ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke karan maain usaka dand n chhooonga, kyonaki unhon ne apane sivane ko baddha lene ke liye gilad kee gaabhairnee striayon ka pett cheer dala." 
Amos1:14 isaliye maain rabba kee shaharapanah men ag lagaunga, aur us se usake bhvan bhee bhsm ho jaaenge. us yuddh ke din men lalakar hogee, vah andhaee varan bavandr ka din hoga" 
Amos1:15 aur unaka raja apane hakimon samet bandhauai men jaaega, yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Amos2:1 yahova yon kahata haai, moab ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke kara, maain usaka dand n chhooonga kyonaki us ne aedom ke raja kee haddiyon ko jalakar choona kar diya." 
Amos2:2 isaliye maain moab men ag lagaunga, aur us se kaariyyot ke bhvan bhsm ho jaaenge aur moab hullad aur lalakar, aur narasinge ke shabd hote-hote mar jaaega." 
Amos2:3 maain usake beech men se nyayee ko nash karoonga, aur sath hee sath usake sab hakimon ko bhee ghaat karoonga, yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Amos2:4 yahova yon kahata haai, yahooda ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke kara, maain usaka dand n chhooonga kyonaki unahon ne yahova kee vyavastha ko tuchchh jana aur meree vidhaiyon ka naheen mana aur apane jootte devataon ke karan jinake peechhe unake purakha chalate the, ve bhee bhttk gaae haain." 
Amos2:5 isaliye maain yahooda men ag lagaunga, aur us se yarooshalem ke bhvan bhsm ho jaaenge.." 
Amos2:6 yahova yon kahata haai, israael ke teen kya, varan char aparadhaen ke kara, maain usaka dand n chhooonga kyonaki unhon ne nirdosh ko roopaye ke liye aur daaridra ko aek jodee jootiyon ke liye bech dala haai." 
Amos2:7 ve kangalon ke sir par kee dhooli ka bhee lalach karate, aur namra logon ko marga se hatta dete haain aur bapa-betta donon aek hee kumaree ke pas jate haai, jis se mere paavitra nam ko apavitra ttharaaen." 
Amos2:8 ve har aek vedee ke pas bandhak ke vasren par sote haai, aur dand ke roopaye se mol liya hua dakhmadha apane devata ke ghar men pee lete haain.." 
Amos2:9 maain ne unake samhane se aemoriyon ko nash kiya tha, jinakee lambai devadaron kee see, aur jinaka bal banj vrakshaen ka sa tha taubhee maain ne upar se usake fal, aur neeche se usakee jad nash kee." 
Amos2:10 aur maain tum ko misr desh se nikal laya, aur jangal men chalees varsha tak liae firata raha, ki tum aemoriyon ke desh ke adhaikaree ho jao." 
Amos2:11 aur maain ne tumhare putraen men se nabee hone ke liye aur tumhare kuchh javanon men se najeer hone ke liye ttharaya. he israaeliyo, kya yah sab sach naheen haai? yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Amos2:12 parantu tum ne najeeron ko dakhmadha pilaya, aur nabiyon ko agyaa dee ki bhvishyadvvanee n karen.." 
Amos2:13 dekho, maain tum ko aeesa dabaunga, jaaisee poolon se bhree hui gadee neeche ko dabai jatee haai." 
Amos2:14 isaliye veg daudnevale ko bhag jane ka sthan n milega, aur samarthee ka samarth kuchh kam n dega aur n parakramee apana praan bacha sakega" 
Amos2:15 dhanudhararee khda n rah sakega, aur faurtee se daudnevala n bachega savar bhee apana praan n bacha sakega" 
Amos2:16 aur shooraveeron men jo adhaik dhaeer ho, vah bhee us din nanga hokar bhag jaaega, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos3:1 he israaeliyo, yah vachan suno jo yahova ne tumhare vishay men arthata us sare kul ke vishay men kaha haai jis maain misr desh se laya hoon:" 
Amos3:2 prathvee ke sare kulon men se maain ne keval tumheen par man lagaya haai, is karan maain tumhare sare adharma ke kamon ka dand doonga.." 
Amos3:3 yaadi do manushy paraspar sahamat n ho, to kya ve aek sang chal sakenge?" 
Amos3:4 kya sinh bina aher paae van men garajenge? kya javan sinh bina kuchh pakade apanee mand men se gurraaega? 
Amos3:5 kya chidiya bina fanda lagaae fansegee? kya bina kuchh fanse fanda boomi par se uchakega? 
Amos3:6 kya kisee nagar men naraasinga foonkane par log n thrathraaenge? kya yahova ke bina bheje kisee nagar men koi vipaati padegee? 
Amos3:7 isee prakar se prabhu yahova apane das bhvishyadvktaon par apana marma bina prakatt kiae kuchh bhee n karega. 
Amos3:8 sinh garaja kaun n drega? parameshvar yahova bola kaun bhavishyavanee n karega? 
Amos3:9 ashdod ke bhvan aur misr desh ke rajabhvan par prakar karake kaho, samaariya ke pahadon par ikatthe hokar dekho ki us men kya hee bada kolahal aur usake beech kya hee andhor ke kam ho rahe haain." 
Amos3:10 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki jo lo apane bhvanon men upadrav aur dkaaitee ka dhan battor rakhte haai, ve seedhaai se kam karana janate hee naheen." 
Amos3:11 is karan parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, desh ka ghoranevala aek shatra hoga, aur vah tera bal todega, aur tere bhvan lootte jaaenge.." 
Amos3:12 yahova yon kahata haai, jis bhanati charavaha sinh ke munh se do ttange va kan ka aek ttukada chhudata haai, vaaise hee israaelee log, jo samaariya men bichhaune ke aek kone va reshamee gaee par baaitta karate haai, ve bhee chhudaae jaaenge.." 
Amos3:13 senaon ke parameshvar, prabhu yahova kee yah vanee haai, dekho, aur yakoob ke gharane se yah bat chitakar kaho," 
Amos3:14 jis samay maain israael ko usake aparadhaen ka dand doonga, usee samay maain betel kee veadiyon ko bhee dand doonga, aur vedee ke seeng toottkar bhmi par gir padenge." 
Amos3:15 aur maain jade ke bhvan ko aur dhoopakal ke bhvan, donon ko giraunga aur hatheedant ke bane bhvan bhee nash honge, aur bade bade ghar nash ho jaaenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:1 he bashaan kee gayo, yah vachan suno, tum jo samaariya parvat par ho, jo kangalon par andhor karatee, aur daridraen ko kuchal dalatee ho, aur apane apane paati se kahatee ho ki la, de ham peeaen!" 
Amos4:2 parameshvar yahova apanee paavitrata kee shapath khakar kahata haai, dekho, tum par aeese din anevale haai, ki tum kattyaiaon se, aur tumharee santan machhlee kee baansaiyon se kheench liae jaaenge." 
Amos4:3 aur tum bade ke nakon se hokar seedhaee nikal jaogee aur hamrmon men dalee jaagee, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:4 betel men akar aparadha karo, aur gilgal men akar bahut se aparadha karo apane chaddhave bhor ko, aur apane dashamansh har teesare din le aya karo" 
Amos4:5 dhanyavadabali khmeer milakar chaddhao, aur apane svechchhabaaliyon kee charcha chalakar unaka prachar karo kyonki he israaeliyo, aeesa karana tumako bhvata haai, parameshvar yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:6 maain ne tumhare sab nagaron men dant kee safaai kara dee, aur tumhare sab sthanon men rottee kee ghattee kee haai, taubhee tum meree or firakar n aa, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:7 aur jab kattnee ke teen maheene rah gaa, tab maain ne tumhare liye vashara n kee maain ne aek nagar men jal barasakar doosare men n barasaya aek khet men jal barasa, aur doosara khet jis men n barasa vah sookh gaya." 
Amos4:8 isaliye do teen nagaron ke log panee peene ko mare mare firate huae aek hee nagar men aa, parantu trapt n huae taubhee tum meree or n fire, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:9 maain ne tumako looh aur gerooi se mara haai aur jab tumharee vattkaiaaen aur dakh kee bariya, aur anjeer aur jalapai ke vraksha bahut ho gaa, tab ttiiddayan unhen kha gain taubhee tum meree or firakar n aa, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:10 maain ne tumhare beech men misr desh kee see maree faailai maain ne tumhare ghaadon ko chhnaiva kar tumhare javanon ko talavar se ghaat kara diya aur tumharee chhavanee kee durgandha tumhare pas pahunchai taubhee tum meree or firakar n aa, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:11 maain ne tum men se kai aek ko aeesa ulatt diya, jaaise parameshvar ne sadom aur amora ko ulatt diya tha, aur tum ag se nikalee hui lukattee ke saman tthare taubhee tum meree or firakar n aa, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos4:12 is kara, he israael, maain tujh se aeesa hee karoonga, aur isaliye ki maain tujh men yah kam karane par hoo, he israael, apane parameshvar ke samhane ane ke liye taaiyar ho ja.." 
Amos4:13 dek, pahadon ka bananevala aur pavan ka sirajanevala, aur manushy ko usake man ka vichar batanevala aur bhor ko andhakar karanevala, aur jo prathvee ke unche sthanon par chalanevala haai, usee ka nam senaon ka parameshvar yahova haai.." 
Amos5:1 he israael ke gharon, is vilap ke geet ke vachan sun jo maain tumhare vishay men kahata hoon:" 
Amos5:2 israael kee kumaree kanya gir gai, aur fir utt n sakegee vah apanee hee boomi par pattk dee gai haai, aur usaka uttanevala koi naheen.." 
Amos5:3 kyonaki parameshvar yahova yon kahata haai, jis nagar se hajar nikalate the, us men israael ke gharane ke sau hee bache rahenge, aur jis se sau nikalate the, us men das bache rahenge.." 
Amos5:4 yahova, israael ke gharane se yon kahata haai, meree khoj men lago, tab jeeavit rahoge." 
Amos5:5 betel kee khoj men n lago, n gilgal men pravesh karo, aur n barshoba ko jao kyonki gilgal nishchay bandhauai men jaaega, aur betel soona padega.." 
Amos5:6 yahova kee khoj karo, tab jeevit rahoge, naheen to vah yoosufa ke gharane par ag kee nain bhdkega, aur vah use bhsm karegee, aur betel men koi usaka bujhanevala n hoga." 
Amos5:7 he nyay ke bigadnevalon aur dharma ko mittee men milanevalon! 
Amos5:8 jo kachapaachiya aur mragashaira ka bananevala haai, jo ghaer andhakar ko bhor ka prakash banata haai, jo din ko andhakar karake rat bana deta haai, aur samudra ka jal sthl ke upar baha deta haai, usaka nam yahova haai." 
Amos5:9 vah turant hee balavant ko vinash kar deta, aur gaddh ka bhee satyanash karata haai.." 
Amos5:10 jo sabha se ulahana deta haai us se ve baair rakhte haai, aur khree bat bolanevale se gharana karate haain." 
Amos5:11 tum jo kangalon ko latada karate, aur bhentt kahakar us se ann har lete ho, isaliye jo ghar tum ne gaddhe huae patthron ke banaae haai, un men rahane n paoge aur jo manabhavanee dakh kee baariyan tum ne lagai haai, unaka dakhmadha n peene paoge." 
Amos5:12 kyonaki maain janata hoon ki tumhare pap bharee haain. tum dharmee ko satate aur ghoos lete, aur faattk men daaridraen ka nyay bigadte ho." 
Amos5:13 is karan jo buddhmaiana ho, vah aeese samay chupaka rahe, kyonaki samay bura haai.." 
Amos5:14 he logo, burai ko nahee, bhlai ko ddoonddho, taki tum jeevit raho aur tumhara yah kahana sach tthare ki senaon ka parameshvar yahova tumhare sang haai." 
Amos5:15 burai se baair aur bhlai se praeeati rakho, aur faattk men nyay ko sthiar karo kya jane senaon ka parameshvar yahova yoosufa se bache huon par anugrah kare.." 
Amos5:16 is karan senaon ka parameshvar, prabhu yahova yon kahata haai, ab chaukon men rona-peettna hoga aur sab sadkon men log hay, hay, karenge! ve kisanon ko shaek karane ke liye, aur jo log vilap karane ken nipun haai, unhen rone-peettne ko bulaaenge." 
Amos5:17 aur sab dakh kee baariyon men rona-peettna hoga, kyonaki yahova yon kahata haai, maain tumhare beech men se hokar jaunga." 
Amos5:18 hay tum par, jo yahova ke din kee abhailasha karate ho! yahova ke din se tumhara kya labh hoga? vah jo ujiyale ka nahee, andhiayare ka din hoga." 
Amos5:19 jaaisa koi sinh se bhage aur use bhaloo mile va ghar men akar bheet par hath tteke aur sanp usako dse. 
Amos5:20 kya yah sach naheen haai ki yahova ka din ujiyale ka nahee, varan aandhiayare hee ka hoga? ha, aeese ghaer andhakar ka jis men kuchh bhee chamak n ho.." 
Amos5:21 maain tumhare pavorn se baair rakhta, aur unhen nikamma janata hoo, aur tumharee mahasabhaon se maain prasann naheen." 
Amos5:22 chahe tum mere liye homabaali aur annabali chaddhao, taubhee maain prasann n hoonga, aur tumhare pale huae pashuuon ke melabaliyon kee or n takoonga." 
Amos5:23 apane geeton ko kolahal mujh se door karo tumharee saranagiyon ka sun maain n sunoonga. 
Amos5:24 parantu nyay ko nadee kee nai, aur dharma mahanad kee nain bahane do." 
Amos5:25 he israael ke gharane, tum jangal men chalees varsha tak pashuubaali aur annabali kya mujhee ko chaddhate rahe?" 
Amos5:26 nahee, tum to apane raja ka tambo, aur apanee mooraton ko charanpeet, aur apane devata ka tara liae firate rahe." 
Amos5:27 is karan maain tum ko daamishk ke us par bandhauai men kar doonga, senaon ke parameshvar yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Amos6:1 hay un par jo siyyon men sukh se rahate, aur un par jo samaariya ke parvat par nishchaint rahate haai, ve jo shraeshtt jaati men prasiddh haai, jin ke pas israael ka gharana ata haai!" 
Amos6:2 kalane nagar ko jakar dekho, aur vahan se hamat nam bade nagar ko jao fir palishtaiyon ke gat nagar ko jao. kya ve in rajyon se uttm haain? kya unaka desh tumhare desh se kuchh bada haai?" 
Amos6:3 tum bure din ko door kar dete, aur upadrav kee gaee ko nikatt le ate ho.." 
Amos6:4 tum hathee dant ke palangon par lettte, aur apane apane bichhaune par panv faailaae sote ho, aur bhed-bakaariyon men se memne aur gaushaalaon men se bachhde khate ho." 
Amos6:5 tum sarangee ke sath geet gate, aur daud kee nain bhanti bhanati ke baje buaddh ise nikalate ho" 
Amos6:6 aur kattoron men se dakhmadha peete, aur uttm uttm tel lagate ho, parantu yoosufa par anevalee vipaati ka hal sunakar shaeakit naheen hote." 
Amos6:7 is karan ve ab bandhauai men paahile jaaenge, aur jo panv faailaae sote the, unakee dhoom jatee rahegee.." 
Amos6:8 senaon ke parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, parameshvar yahova ne apanee hee shapath khakar kaha haai: jis par yakoob ghamand karata haai, us se maain gharana, aur use rajabhvanon se baair rakhta hoon aur maain is nagar ko us sab samet jo us men haai, shatra ke vash men kar doonga.." 
Amos6:9 aur yaadi kisee ghar men das puroosh bache rahe, taubhee ve mar jaaenge." 
Amos6:10 aur jab kisee ka chacha, jo usaka jalanevala ho, usakee haddiyon ko ghar ke nikalane ke liye uttaaega, aur jo ghar ke kone men ho us se kahega, kya tere pas koi aur haai? tab vah kahega, koi naheen tab vah kahega, chup rahe! hamen yahova ka nam naheen lena chahiae.." 
Amos6:11 kyonaki yahova kee agyaa se bade ghar men chhech, aur chhotte ghar men darar hogee." 
Amos6:12 kya ghaede chattan par dauden? kya koi aeese sthan men baailon se joten jahan tum logon ne nyay ko vish se, aur dharma ke fal ko kadve fal se badal dala haai?" 
Amos6:13 tum aeesee vastu ke karan anand karate ho jo vyarth haai aur kahate ho, kya ham apane hee yatn se samarthee naheen ho gaae?" 
Amos6:14 is karan senaon ke parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, he israael ke gharane, dek, maain tumhare virooddh aek aeesee jati khdee karoonga, jo hamat kee ghaattee se lekar araba kee nadee tak tumako sankatt men dalegee.." 
Amos7:1 parameshvar yahova ne mujhe yah dikhaya, aur maain kya dekhta hoon ki us ne pichhlee ghaas ke ugane ke arambh me ttiiddayan utpann kee aur vah raja kee kattnee ke bad kee pichhlee ghaas theen." 
Amos7:2 jab ve ghaas kha chukee, tab maain ne kaha, he parameshvar yahova, kshama kara! naheen to yakoob kaaise sthiar rah sakega? vah kitana nirbal haai!" 
Amos7:3 isake vishay men yahova pachhtaya, aur us se kaha, aeesee bat ab n hogee.." 
Amos7:4 parameshvar yahova ne mujhe yah dikhaya: aur kya dekhta hoon ki parameshvar yahova ne ag ke dara mukama ladne ko pukara, aur us ag se mahasagar sookh gaya, aur desh bhee bhsm hua chahata tha." 
Amos7:5 tab maain ne kaha, he parameshvar yahova, thm ja! naheen to yakoob kaaise sthiar rah sakega? vah kaaisa nirbal haai." 
Amos7:6 isake vishay men bhee yahova pachhtaya aur parameshvar yahova ne kaha, aeesee bat fir n hogee.." 
Amos7:7 us ne mujhe yah bhee dikhaya: maain ne dekha ki prabhu sahul lagakar banai hui kisee bheet par khda haai, aur usake hath men sahul haai." 
Amos7:8 aur yahova ne mujh se kaha, he amos, tujhe kya dekh padta haai? maain ne kaha, aek sahula. tab parameshvar ne kaha, dek, maain apanee praja israael ke beech men sahul lagaunga." 
Amos7:9 maain ab unako n chhooonga. isahak ke unche sthan ujad, aur israael ke paavitrasthan sunasan ho jaaenge, aur maain yarobam ke gharane par talavar kheeche huae chaddhai karoonga.." 
Amos7:10 tab betel ke yajak amasyah ne israael ke raja yarobam ke pas kahala bheja, ki, amos ne israael ke gharane ke beech men tujh se rajadraeh kee goshttee kee haai usake sare vachanon ko desh naheen sah sakata." 
Amos7:11 kyonaki amos yon kahata haai, ki, yarobam talavar se mara jaaega, aur israael apanee boomi par se nishchay banghauai men jaaega.." 
Amos7:12 aur amasyah ne amos se kaha, he dasharee, yahan se nikalakar yahooda desh men bhag ja, aur vaheen rottee khaya kar, aur vaheen bhvishyadanee kiya kara" 
Amos7:13 parantu betel men fir kabhee bhavishyadanee n karana, kyonaki yah raja ka paavitrasthan aur raja-nagar haai." 
Amos7:14 amos ne uttr dekar amasyah se kaha, maain ne to bhavishyadvkta tha, aur n bhvishyadvkta ka betta maain to gaya-baail ka charavaha, aur goolar ke vrakshaen ka chhanttnehara tha," 
Amos7:15 aur yahova ne mujhe bhed-bakaariyon ke peechhe peechhe firane se bulakar kaha, ja, meree praja israael se bhvishyadanee kara." 
Amos7:16 isaliye ab too yahova ka vachan sun, too kahata haai ki israael ke virooddh bhavishyadanee mat kara aur isahak ke gharane ke virooddh bar bar vachan mat suna." 
Amos7:17 is karan yahova yon kahata haai, teree sree nagar men veshya ho jaaegee, aur tere bette-bettyaian talavar se maree jaaengee, aur teree boomi doree dalakar bantt lee jaaegeen aur too ap ashuuddh desh men marega, aur israael apanee boomi par se nishchay bandhaai men jaaega.." 
Amos8:1 parameshvar yahova ne mujh ko yon dikhaya: ki, dhoopakal ke falon se bhree hui aek ttokaree haai." 
Amos8:2 aur us ne kaha, he amos, tujhe kya dekh padta haai? maain ne kaha, dhoopakal ke falon se bhree aek ttokaree. tab yahova ne mun se kaha, meree praja israael ka ant a gaya haai maain ab usako aur n chhooonga." 
Amos8:3 parameshvar yahova kee vanee haai, ki us din rajamandair ke geet hahakar men badal jaaenge, aur lathon ka bada ddher lagega aur sab sthanon men ve chupachap faenk dee jaaengee.." 
Amos8:4 yah suno, tum jo daridraen ko nigalana aur desh ke namra logon ko nash karana chahate ho," 
Amos8:5 jo kahate ho naya chand kab beetega ki ham ann bech saken? aur vishraamadin kab beetega, ki ham ann ke khtte kholakar aepa ko chhotta aur shokel ko bharee kar de, aur chhl se dandee mare," 
Amos8:6 ki ham kangalon ke roopaya dekar, aur daaridraen ko aek jodee jootiyan dekar mol le, aur nikamma ann bechen?" 
Amos8:7 yahova, jis par yakoob ko ghamand karana uchit haai, vahee apanee shapath khakar kahata haai, maain tumhare kisee kam ko kibhee n booloonga." 
Amos8:8 kya is karan boomi n kanpegee? aur kya un par ke sab rahanevale vilap n karenge? yah desh sab ka sab misr kee neel nadee ke saman hoga, jo baddhtee haai, fir laharen maratee, aur ghatt jatee haai.." 
Amos8:9 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, us samay maain soorya ka dopahar ke samay ast karoonga, aur is desh ko din dupaharee aandhiayara kar doonga." 
Amos8:10 maain tumhare pavorn ke utsav door karake vilap karaunga, aur tumhare sab geeton ko door karake vilap ke geet gavaunga maain tum sab kee katt imen ttatt bandhaaunga, aur tum sab ke siron ko mundaunga aur aeesa vilap karaunga jaaisa aekalaute ke liye hota haai, aur usaka ant kattnai du:kh ke din ka sa hoga.." 
Amos8:11 parameshvar yahova kee yah vanee haai, dekho, aeese din ate haai, jab maain is desh men mahangee karoonga us men ne to ann kee bookh aur n panee kee pyas hogee, parantu yahova ke vachanon ke sunane hee kee bookh pyas hogee." 
Amos8:12 aur log yahova ke vachan kee khoj men samudra se samudra tab aur uttr se poorab tak mare mare firenge, parantu usako n paaenge.." 
Amos8:13 us samay sundar kumaariyan aur javan puroosh donon pyas ke mare moorchha khaenge. 
Amos8:14 jo log samariya ke pap mool devata kee shapath khate haai, aur jo kahate haain ki dan ke devata ke jeevan kee shapat, aur beshorba ke panth kee shapat, ve sab gir padenge, aur fir n uttenge.." 
Amos9:1 maain ne prabhu ko vedee ke upar khda dekha, aur us ne kaha, khmbhe kee kangaaniyon par mar jis se devaaddhiyan hile, aur unako sab logon ke sir par girakar ttukade ttukade kara aur jo nash hone se bache, unhen maain talavar se ghaat karoonga un men se aek bhee n bhag nikalega, aur jo apane ko bachaa, vah bachane n paaega.." 
Amos9:2 kyonaki chahe ve khodakar adhaelok men utar jaae, to vahan se maain hath baddhakar unhen launga chahe ve akash par chaddh jaae, to vahan se maain unhen utar launga." 
Amos9:3 chahe ve kamrmel men chhpai jaae, parantu vahan bhee maain unhen ddoonddh-ddoonddhkar pakad loonga, aur chahe ve samudra kee thah men meree draashtti se ott ho, vahan bhee maain sarpa ko unhen dsane kee agyaa doonga." 
Amos9:4 aur chahe shatra unhen hankakar bandhauai men le jaae, vahan bhee maain agyaa dekar talavar se unhen ghaat karaunga aur maain un par bhlai karane ke liye nahee, burai kee karane ke liye draashtti karoonga.." 
Amos9:5 senaon ke parameshvar yahova ke sparsha karane se prathvee pighalatee haai, aur usake sare rahanevale vilap karate haain aur vah sab kee sab misr kee nadee ke saman jo jatee haai, jo baddhtee haai fir laharen maratee, aur ghatt jatee haai." 
Amos9:6 jo akash men apanee kottriyan banata, aur apane akashamandl kee nev prathvee par dalata, aur samudra ka jal gharatee par baha deta haai, usee ka nam yahova haai.." 
Amos9:7 he israaeliyo, yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya tum mere lekhe kooshaiyon ke saman naheen ho? kya maain israael ko misr desh se aur paalishtaiyon ko kaptor se naheen nikal laya? aur araamiyon ko keer se naheen nikal laya?" 
Amos9:8 dekho, parameshvar yahova kee drashtti is papa-may rajy par lagee haai, aur maain isako dharatee par se nash karoonga taubhee maain pooree reeati se yakoob ke gharane ko nash n karoonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Amos9:9 meree agyaa se israael ka dharana sab jatiyon men aeesa chala jaaega jaaisa ann chalanee men chala jata haai, parantu usaka aek bhee pushtt dana boomi par n girega." 
Amos9:10 meree praja men ke sab papee jo kahate haain ki vah vipaati ham par n padegee, aur n hamen ghoregee, ve sab talavar se mare jaaenge." 
Amos9:11 us samay maain daud kee giree hui jhopadee ko khda karoonga, aur usake bade ke nakon ko sudhaaroonga, aur usake khndharon ko fir banaunga, aur jaaisa vah praacheenakal se tha, usako vaaisa hee bana dunga" 
Amos9:12 jis se ve bache huae aedomiyon ko varan sab anyajaatiyon ko jo meree kahalatee haai, apane adhaikar men le, yahova jo yah kam poora karata haai, usakee yahee vanee haai.." 
Amos9:13 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai, dekho, aeese din ate haai, ki hal jotanevala lavanevale ko aur dakh raundanevala beech bonevale ko ja lega aur pahadon se naya dakhmadha ttpakane lagega, aur sab pahadiyon se bah nikalega." 
Amos9:14 maain apanee praja israael ke bandhauon ko faer le aunga, aur ve ujade huae nagaron ko sudhaarakar un men basenge ve dakh kee bariyan lagakar dakhmadha peeaenge, aur bageeche lagakar unake fal khaaenge." 
Amos9:15 maain unhe, unheen kee boomi men bounga, aur ve apanee boomi men se jo maain ne unhen dee haai, fir kabhee ukhade n jaaenge, tumhare parameshvar yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Obadiah1:1 obadhah ka darshana.. ham logon ne yahova kee or se samachar suna haai, aur aek doot anyajaatiyon men yah kahane ko bheja gaya haai:" 
Obadiah1:2 utto! ham us se ladne ko utten! maain tujhe jaatiyon men chhotta kar doonga, too bahut tuchchh gina jaega." 
Obadiah1:3 he pahadon kee dararon men basanevale, he unche sthan men rahanevale, tere abhaiman ne tujhe dhaekha diya haai too man men kahata haai," 
Obadiah1:4 kaun mujhe boomi par utar dega? parantu chahe too ukab kee nain uncha udta ho, varan taragan ke beech apana ghaensala banaae ho, taubhee maain tujhe vahan se neeche giraunga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Obadiah1:5 yaadi chora-dakoo rat ko tere pas ate, hay, too kaaise mitta diya gaya haai! to kya ve churaae huae dhan se trapt hokar chale n jate? aur yaadi dakh ke todnevale tere pas ate, to kya ve kaheen kaheen dakh n chhod jate?" 
Obadiah1:6 parantu aesav ka dhan kaaise khojakar lootta gaya haai, usaka gupt dhan kaaise pata laga lagakar nikala gaya haai!" 
Obadiah1:7 jitanon ne tujh se vacha bandhaee thee, un sabhon ne tujhe sivane tak ddhkel diya haai jo log tujh se mel rakhte the, ve tujh ko dhaeka dekar tujh par prabal huae haain ve teree rottee khate haai, ve tere liye fanda lagate haain, us men kuchh samajh naheen haai." 
Obadiah1:8 yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya maain us samay aedom men se buaddhmaianon ko, aur aesav ke pahad men se chaturai ko nash n karoonga?" 
Obadiah1:9 aur he teman, tere shooraveeron ka man kachcha n ho jaaega, aur yon aesav ke pahad par ka har aek puroosh ghaat hokar nash ho jaaega." 
Obadiah1:10 he aesav, aek upadrav ke karan jo too ne apane bhai yakoob par kiya, too lajja se ddhnpega aur sada ke liye nash ho jaaega." 
Obadiah1:11 jis din paradeshaee log usakee dhan sampaati chheenakar le gaa, aur birane logon ne usake faattkon se ghausakar yarooshalem par chitthee dalee, us din too bhee un men se aek tha." 
Obadiah1:12 parantu tujhe uchit n tha ki too apane bhai ke din me, arthata usakee vipaati ke din men usakee or dekhta rahata, aur yahoodiyon ke nash hone ke din unake upar anand karata, aur unake sankatt ke din bada bol bolata." 
Obadiah1:13 tujhe uchit n tha ki meree praja kee vipaati ke din too usake faattk se ghausata, aur usakee vipaati ke din usakee dhan sampati par hath lagata." 
Obadiah1:14 tujhe uchit n tha ki tiramuhane par usake bhaganevalon ko mar dalane ke liye khda hota, aur sankatt ke din usake bache huon ko pakadata.." 
Obadiah1:15 kyonaki saree anyajatiyon par yahova ke din ka ana nikatt haai. jaaisa tu ne kiya haai, vaaisa hee tujh se bhee kiya jaaega, tera vyavahar lauttkar tere hee sir par padega." 
Obadiah1:16 jis prakar too ne mere pavitra parvat par piya, usee prakar se saree anyajaatiyan lagatar peetee rahengee, varan ve sudka-sudkakar peeaengee, aur aesee ho jaaengee jaaisee kabhee hui hee naheen." 
Obadiah1:17 parantu us samay siyyon parvat par bache huae log rahenge, or vah pavitrasthan ttharega aur yakoob ka gharana apane nij bhagon ka aadhaikaree hoga." 
Obadiah1:18 tab yakoob ka gharana ag, aur yoosufa ka gharana lau, aur aesav ka gharana koonttee banega aur ve un men ag lagakar unako bhsm karenge, aur aesav ke gharane ka koi n bachega kyonaki yahova hee ne aeesa kaha haai.." 
Obadiah1:19 daakkhian desh ke log aesav ke pahad ke aadhaikaree ho jaaenge, aur neeche ke desh ke log palishtaiyon ke aadhaikaree honge aur yahoodee, aepraaim aur samariya ke dihat ko apane bhag men kar lenge, aur binyameen gilad ka aadhaikaree hoga." 
Obadiah1:20 israaeliyon ke us dal men se jo lag bandhauai men jakar kananiyon ke beech sarapat tak rahate haai, aur yarooshaleamiyon men se jo log bandhauai men jakar saparad men rahate haai, ve sab dakkhian desh ke nagaron ke adhaikaree ho jaaenge." 
Obadiah1:21 aur uddhar karanevale aesav ke pahad ka nyay karane ke liye siyyon parvat par chaddh aaenge, aur rajy yahova hee ka ho jaaega.." 
Jonah1:1 yahova ka yah vachan amitaai ke putra yona ke pas pahuncha," 
Jonah1:2 uttkar us bade nagar neenave ko ja, aur usake virooddh prachar kara kyonaki usakee burai meree draashtti men baddh gai haai." 
Jonah1:3 parantu yona yahova ke sammukh se tashareesh ko bhag jane ke liye utta, aur yapo nagar ke jakar tashareesh janevala aek jahaj paya aur bhada dekar us par chaddh gaya ki unake sath hokar yahova ke sammukh se tashareesh ko chala jaae.." 
Jonah1:4 tab yahova ne samudra men aek prachand andhaee chalai, aur samudra men badee andhaee uttee, yahan tak ki jahaj toottne par tha." 
Jonah1:5 tab mallah log drakar apane apane devata kee dohai dene lage aur jahaj men jo vyopar kee samagraee thee use samudra men faenkane lage ki jahaj halka ho jaae. parantu yona jahaj ke nichale bhag men utarakar so gaya tha, aur gaharee neend men pada hua tha." 
Jonah1:6 tab manjhee usake nikatt akar kahane laga, too bharee neend men pada hua kya karata haai? ut, apane devata kee dohai de! sambhv haai ki parameshvar hamaree chinta kare, aur hamara nash n ho.." 
Jonah1:7 tab unhon ne apas men kaha, ao, ham chitthee dalakar jan len ki yah vipaati ham par kis ke karan padee haai. tab unhon ne chitthee dalee, aur chitthee yona ke nam par nikalee." 
Jonah1:8 tab unhon ne us se kaha, hamen bata ki kis ke karan yah vipaati ham par padee haai? tera udhym kya haai? aur too kahan se aya haai? too kis desh aur kis jati ka haai?" 
Jonah1:9 us ne un se kaha, maain ibraee hoon aur svarga ka parameshvar yahova jis ne jal sthl donon ko banaya haai, usee ka bhy manata hoon." 
Jonah1:10 tab ve nipatt dr gaa, aur us se kahane lage, too ne yah kya kiya haai? ve jan gaae the ki vah yahova ke sammukh se bhag aya haai, kyonki us ne ap hee unako bata diya tha.." 
Jonah1:11 tab unhon ne us se poochha, ham tere sath kya karen jis se samudra shaant ho jaae? us samay samudra kee laharen baddhtee hee jatee theen." 
Jonah1:12 us ne un se kaha, mujhe uttakar samudra men faenk do tab samudra shaant pad jaega kyonki maain janata hoo, ki yah bharee andhaee tumhare upar mere hee karan ai haai." 
Jonah1:13 taubhee ve bade yatn se khete rahe ki usako kinare par lagaae, parantu pahunch n sake, kyonaki samudra kee laharen unake virooddh baddhtee hee jatee theen." 
Jonah1:14 tab unhon ne yahova ko pukarakar kaha, he yahova ham binatee karate lae, ki is puroosh ke praan kee santee hamara nash n ho, aur n hamen nirdosh kee hatya ka doshaee tthara kyonki he hayova, jo kuchh teree ichchha thee vahee too ne kiya haai." 
Jonah1:15 tab unhon ne yona ko uttakar samudra men faenk diya aur samudra kee bhyanak laharen thm gain. 
Jonah1:16 tab un manushyon ne yahova ka bahut hee bhy mana, aur usako bhentt chaddhai aur mannaten maneen.." 
Jonah1:17 yahova ne aek bada sa magaramachchh ttharaya tha ki yona ko nigal le aur yona us magaramachchh ke pett men teen din aur teen rat pada raha.. 
Jonah2:1 tab yona ne usake pett men se apane parameshvar yahova se praarthna karake kaha," 
Jonah2:2 maain ne sankatt men pade huae yahova kee dohai dee, aur us ne meree sun lee haai adhaelok ke udar men se maain chilla utta, aur too ne meree sun lee." 
Jonah2:3 too ne mujhe gahire sagar men samudra kee thah tak dal diya aur maain dhaaraon ke beech men pada tha, teree bhdkai hui sab tarang aur laharen mere upar se bah gain." 
Jonah2:4 tab maain ne kaha, maain tere samhane se nikal diya gaya hoon taubhee tere pavitra maandair kee or fir takoonga." 
Jonah2:5 maain jal se yahan tak ghaira hua tha ki mere praan nikale jate the gaahira sagar mere charon or tha, aur mere sir men sivar lipatta hua tha." 
Jonah2:6 maain pahadon kee jad tak pahunch gaya tha maain sada ke liye boomi men band ho gaya tha taubhee he mere parameshvar yahova, too ne mere praanon ko gadhe men se uttaya haai." 
Jonah2:7 jab maain moorchha khane laga, tab maain ne yahova ko smaran kiya aur meree praarthna tere pas varan tere pavitra maandair men pahunch gai." 
Jonah2:8 jo log dhaekhe kee vyarth vastuon par man lagate haai, ve apane karoonanidhaan ko chhod dete haain." 
Jonah2:9 parantu maain unche shabd se dhanyavad karake tujhe balidan chaddhaunga jo mannat maain ne manee, usako pooree karoonga. uddhar yahova hee se hota haai." 
Jonah2:10 aur yahova ne magaramachchh ko agyaa dee, aur us ne yona ko sthl par ugal diya.." 
Jonah3:1 tab yahova ka yah vachan doosaree bar yona ke pas pahuncha," 
Jonah3:2 uttkar us bade nagar neenave ko ja, aur jo bat maain tujh se kahoonga, usaka us men prachar kara." 
Jonah3:3 tab yona yahova ke vachan ke anusar neenave ko gaya. neenave aek bahut bada lagar tha, vah teen din kee yatra ka tha." 
Jonah3:4 aur yona ne nagar men pravesh karake aek din kee yatra pooree kee, aur yah prachar karata gaya, ab se chalees din ke beetane par neenave ulatt diya jaaega." 
Jonah3:5 tab neenave ke manushyon ne parameshvar ke vachan kee prateeti kee aur upavas ka prachar kiya gaya aur bade se lekar chhotte tak sabhon ne ttatt oddha. 
Jonah3:6 tab yah samachar neenave ke raja ke kan men pahuncha aur us ne sinhasan par se ut, apana rajakeey oddhna utarakar ttatt oddh liya, aur rakh par baaitt gaya." 
Jonah3:7 aur raja ke pradhaanon se sammaati lekar neenave men is agyaa ka ddheenddhora pittvaya, ki kya manushy, kya gaya-baail, kya bhed-bakaree, ya aur pashu, koi kuchh bhee n khaaen ve ne khanae aur n panee peeven." 
Jonah3:8 aur manushy aur pashu donon ttatt oddhe, aur ve parameshvar kee dohai chilla-achilla kar den aur apane kumarga se firen aur us upadrav se, jo ve karate haai, pashchatap karen." 
Jonah3:9 sambhv haai, parameshvar daya kare aur apanee ichchha badal de, aur usaka bhdka hua kop shaant ho jaae aur ham nash hone se bach jaaen.." 
Jonah3:10 jab parameshvar ne unake kamon ko dekha, ki ve kumarga se fir rahe haai, tab parameshvar ne apanee ichchha badal dee, aur unakee jo haani karane kee ttanee thee, usako n kiya.." 
Jonah4:1 yah bat yona ko bahut hee buree lagee, aur usaka krodha bhdka." 
Jonah4:2 aur us ne yahova se yah kahakar praarthna kee, he yahova jab maain apane desh men tha, tab kya maain yahee bat n kahata tha? isee karan maain ne teree agyaa sunate hee tashareesh ko bhag jane ke liye faurtee kee kyonki maain janata tha ki too anugrahakaree aur dayalu parameshvar haai, vilamb se kop karanevala karoonanidhaan haai, aur du:kh dene se prasann naheen hota." 
Jonah4:3 so ab he yahova, mera praan le le kyonaki mere liye jeeavit rahane se marana hee bhla haai." 
Jonah4:4 yahova ne kaha, tera jo krodha bhdka haai, kya vah uchit haai?" 
Jonah4:5 is par yona us nagar se nikalakar, usakee poorab or baaitt gaya aur vahan aek chhppar banakar usakee chhaya men baaitta hua yah dekhne laga ki nagar ko kya hoga?" 
Jonah4:6 tab yahova parameshvar ne aek rend ka ped lagakar aeesa baddhaya ki yona ke sir par chhaya ho, jis se usaka du:kh door ho. yona us rend ke ped ke karan bahut hee anaandait hua." 
Jonah4:7 bihan ko jab pau fattne lagee, tab parameshvar ne aek keede ko bheja, jis ne rend ka ped aesa katta ki vah sookh gaya." 
Jonah4:8 jab soorya uga, tab parameshvar ne puravai bahakar loo chalai, aur ghaam yona ke sir par aeesa laga ki vah moochrchha khane laga aur us ne yah kahakar mratyu mangee, mere liye jeeavit rahane se marana hee achchha haai." 
Jonah4:9 parameshvar ne yona se kaha, tera krodha, jo rend ke ped ke karan bhdka haai, kya vah uchit haai? us ne kaha, ha, mera jo krodha bhdka haai vah achchha hee haai, varan krodha ke mare marana bhee achchha hota." 
Jonah4:10 tab yahova ne kaha, jis rend ke ped ke liye too ne kuchh paarishram naheen kiya, n usako baddhaya, jo aek hee rat men hua, aur aek hee rat men nash bhee hua us par too ne taras khai haai." 
Jonah4:11 fir yah bada nagar neenave, jis men aek lakh bees hajar se aadhaim manushy haai, jo apane dahine baaen hathon ka bhed naheen paahichanate, aur bahut ghareloo pashu bhee us men rahate haai, to kya maain us par taras n khaun?" 
Micah1:1 yahova ka vachan, jo yahooda ke raja yotam, ahaj aur hijaakiyyah ke dinon men meeka moreshotee ko pahuncha, jis ko us ne shaemaron aur yarooshalem ke vishay men paya.." 
Micah1:2 he jaati-jati ke sab logo, suno! he prathvee too us sab samet jo tujh men haai, dhyan de! aur prabhu yahova tumhare viroodd, varan parameshvar apane paavitra maandair men se tum par sakshaee de." 
Micah1:3 kayonaki dek, yahova apane paavitrasthan se bahar nikal raha haai, aur vah utarakar prathvee ke unche sthanon par chalega." 
Micah1:4 aur pahad usake neeche gal jaaenge, aur tarai aeese fattengee, jaaise mom ag kee anch se, aur panee jo ghaatt se neeche bahata haai." 
Micah1:5 yah sab yakoob ke aparadha, aur israael ke gharane ke pap ke karan se hota haai. yakoob ka aparadha kya haai? kya samaariya naheen? aur yahooda ke unche sthan kya haain? kya yarooshalem naheen?" 
Micah1:6 is karan maain samariya ko maaidan ke khet ka ddher kar doonga, aur dakh ka bageecha banaunga aur maain usake patthron ko khdd men luddhka doonga, aur usakee nev ukhad doonga." 
Micah1:7 usakee sab khudee hui mooraten ttukade ttukade kee jaengee aur jo kuchh us ne chhnaiala karake kamaya haai vah ag se bhsm kiya jaega, aur usakee sab pratimaon ko maain chakanachoor karoonga kyonki chhnaiale hee kee kamai se usane usako sanchay kiya haai, aur vah fir chhnaiale kee see kamai ho jaegee.." 
Micah1:8 is karan maain chhatee peettkar hay, hay, karoonga maain lutta hua sa aur nanga chala fira karoonga maain geedadon kee nai chillaunga, aur shaturmugon kee nain rounga." 
Micah1:9 kyonaki usaka ghaav asadhy haai aur vipaati yahooda par bhee a padee, varan vah mere jaatibhaiyon par padkar yarooshalem ke faattk tak pahunch gai haai.." 
Micah1:10 gat nagar men isakee charcha mat karo, aur mat roo betaapra men dhooti men lottpott karo." 
Micah1:11 he shaapeer kee rahanevalee nangee hokar nirlaj chalee ja sanan kee rahanevalee naheen nikal sakatee betasel ke rone peettne ke karan usaka sharansthan tum se le liya jaaega. 
Micah1:12 kyonaki marot kee rahanevalee to kushal kee batt johate-johate tadp gai haai, kyonki yahova kee or se yarooshalem ke faattk tak vipaati a pahunchee haai." 
Micah1:13 he lakeesh kee rahanevalee apane rathon men veg chalanevale ghaede jota tujhee se siyyon kee praja ke pap ka arambh hua, kyonki israael ke aparadha tujhee men paae gaae." 
Micah1:14 is karan too gat ke moreshot ko dan dekar door kar dega akajeeb ke ghar se israael ke raja dhaesha hee khaaenge. 
Micah1:15 he maresha kee rahanevalee maain fir tujh par aek adhaikaree ttharaunga, aur israael ke pratishttit logon ko adullam men ana padega." 
Micah1:16 apane dulare ladkon ke liye apana kesh kattvakar sir munda, varan apana poora sir giddh ke saman ganja kar de, kyonaki ve bandhauae hokar tere pas se chale gaae haain." 
Micah2:1 hay un par, jo bichhaunon par pade huae buraiyon kee kalpana karate aur dushtt karma kee ichchha karate haai, aur balavant hone ke karan bhor ko din nikalate hee ve usako poora karate haain." 
Micah2:2 ve kheton ka lalach karake unhen chhlee lete haai, aur gharon ka lalach karake unhen bhee le lete haain aur usake gharane samet puroosh par, aur usake nij bhag samet kisee puroosh par andhor aur atyachar kahate haain." 
Micah2:3 is kara, yahova yon kahata haai, maain is kul par aeesee vipaati dalane par hoo, jis ke neeche se tum apanee gardan hatta n sakoge kyonki vah vipaati ka samay hoga." 
Micah2:4 us samay yah atyant shaek ka geet drashttant kee reeati par gaya jaega: ham to sarvanash ho gae vah mere logon ke bhag ko bigadta haai hay, vah use mujh se kitanee door kar deta haai! vah hamare khet balava karanevale ko de deta haai." 
Micah2:5 is karan tera aeesa koi n ho, jo yahova kee mandlee men chitthee dalakar napane kee doree dale.." 
Micah2:6 bakavasee kaha karate haai, ki bakavas n karo. in baten ke liye n kaha karo aeese logon men se apaman n mittega." 
Micah2:7 he yakoob ke gharane, kya yah kaha jaae ki yahova ka atma adhaeer ho gaya haai? kya ye kam usee ke kiae huae haain? kya mere vachanon se usaka bhla naheen hota jo seedhaai se chalata haai?" 
Micah2:8 parantu kal kee bat haai ki meree praja shatra banakar mere virooddh uttee haai tum shaant aur bhole-bhale raahiyon ke tan par se chadar chheen lete ho jo ladai ka vichar n karake nidhadk chale jate haain. 
Micah2:9 meree praja kee striayon ko tum unake sukhdhaamon se nikal dete ho aur unake nanhen bachchon se tum meree dee hui uttm vastuaen sarvada ke liye chheen lete ho. 
Micah2:10 utto, chale jao! kyonki yah tumhara vishraamasthan naheen haai isaka karan vah ashuuddhta haai jo kaattnai du:kh ke sath tumhara nash karegee." 
Micah2:11 yaadi koi joottee atma men chalata huae joottee aur vyarth baten kahe aur kahe ki maain tumhen nity dakhmadha aur madira ke liye prachar sunata rahoonga, to vahee in logon ka bhvishyadvkta ttharega.." 
Micah2:12 he yakoob, maain nishchay tum sabhon ko ikattha karoonga maain israael ke bache huon ko nishchay ikattha karoonga aur bosra kee bhedbakariyon kee nain aek sang rakoonga. us jhund kee nain jo achchhee charai men ho, ve manushyon kee bahutayat ke mare kolahal machaaenge." 
Micah2:13 unake age age bade ka todnevala gaya haai, isaliye ve bhee use tod rahe haai, aur faattk se hokar nikal ja rahe haain unaka raja unake age age gaya arthata yahova unaka saradar aur aguva haai.." 
Micah3:1 aur maain ne kaha, he yakoob ke pradhaano, he israael ke gharane ke nyaiyo, suno! kya nyay ka bhed janana tumhara kam naheen?" 
Micah3:2 tum to bhlai se baair, aur burai se praeeti rakhte ho, mano, tum, logon par se unakee khal, aur unakee haddiyon par se unaka mans udhod lete ho" 
Micah3:3 varan tum mere logon ka mans kha bhee lete, aur unakee khal udhodte ho tum unakee haaddiyon ko handee men pakane ke liye ttukade ttukade karate ho." 
Micah3:4 ve us samay yahova kee dohai denge, parantu vah unakee n sunega, varan us samay vah unake bure kamon ke karan un se munh fael lega.." 
Micah3:5 yahova ka yah vachan haai ki jo bhvishyadvkta meree praja ko bhttka dete haai, aur jab unhen khane ko milata haai tab shaaantai, shaaantai, pukarate haai, aur yadi koi unake munh men kuchh n de, to usake virooddh yuddh karate ko taaiyar ho jate haain." 
Micah3:6 is karan tum par aeesee rat aaegee, ki tum ko darshan n milega, aur tum aeese andhakar men padoge ki bhavee n kah sakoge. bhvishyadvktaon ke liye soorya ast hoga, aur din rahate un par andhiayara chha jaaega." 
Micah3:7 dasharee laajjait honge, aur bhavee kahanevalon ke munh kale honge aur ve sab ke sab apane otton ko isaaliye ddhanpenge ki parameshvar kee or se uttr naheen milata." 
Micah3:8 parantu maain to yahova kee atma se shaaktai, nyay aur parakram pakar paripoorn hoon ki maain yakoob ko usaka aparadha aur israael ko usaka pap jata sakoon." 
Micah3:9 he yakoob ke gharane ke pradhaano, he israael ke gharane ke nyayiyo, he nyay se dharana karanevalo aur sab seedhaee baton kee tteddhee-meddhee karanevalo, yah bat suno." 
Micah3:10 tum siyyon ko hatya karake aur yarooshalem ko kuattlaita karake draddh karate ho. 
Micah3:11 usake pradhaan ghoos le lekar vichar karate, aur yajak dam le lekar vyavastha dete haai, aur bhvishyadvkta roopaye ke liye bhavee kahate haain taueeaee ve yah kahakar yahova par bhrosa rakhte haai, yahova hamare beech men haai, isaliye koi vipaati ham par n aegee." 
Micah3:12 isaliye tumhare karan siyyon jotakar khet banaya jaaega, aur yarooshalem deenh hee deenh ho jaaega, aur jis parvat par bhvan bana haai, vah van ke unche sthan sa ho jaaega.." 
Micah4:1 ant ke dinon men aeesa hoga ki yahova ke bhvan ke bhvan ka parvat sab pahadon par draddh kiya jaaega, aur sab pahaadiyon se aadhaik uncha kiya jaaega aur har jati ke log dhaara kee nain usakee or chalenge." 
Micah4:2 aur bahut jatiyon ke lag jaaenge, aur apas men kahenge, ao, ham yahova ke parvat par chaddhkar, yakoob ke parameshvar ke bhvan men jaaen tab vah ham ko apane marga sikhaaega, aur ham usake pathon par chalenge. kyonaki yahova kee vyavastha siyyon se, aur usaka vachan yarooshalem se nikalega." 
Micah4:3 vah bahut dekhon ke logon ka nyay karega, aur door door tak kee samarthee jatayon ke jhgadon ko mittaaega so ve apanee talavaren peettkar hal ke faal, aur apane bhalon se hanasiya banaaenge tab aek jati doosaree jaati ke virooddh talavar fir n chalaaegee" 
Micah4:4 aur log age ko yuddh vidha n seekhenge. parantu ve apanee apanee dakhlata aur anjeer ke vraksha tale baaitta karenge, aur koi unako n draaega senaon ke yahova ne yahee vachan diya haai.." 
Micah4:5 sab rajyon ke log to apane apane devata ka nam lekar chalate haai, parantu ham log apane parameshvar yahova ka nam lekar sada sarvada chalate rahenge.." 
Micah4:6 yahova kee yah vanee haai, us samay maain praja ke langadon ko, aur barabas nikale huon ko, aur jin ko maain ne du:kh diya haai un sab ko ikatthe karoonga." 
Micah4:7 aur langadon ko maain bacha rachoonga, aur door kiae huon ko aek samarthee jaati kar doonga aur yahova un par siyyon parvat ke upar se sada rajy karata rahega.." 
Micah4:8 aur he aeder ke gummat, he siyyon kee pahadee, paahilee prabhuta arthata yarooshalem ka rajy tujhe milega.." 
Micah4:9 ab too kyon chillatee haai? kya tujh men koi raja naheen raha? kya tera yuaktai karanevala nash ho gaya, jis se jachcha sree kee nain tujhe peeda utttee haai?" 
Micah4:10 he siyyon kee bettee, jachcha sree kee nain peeda uttakar utpann kara kyonaki ab too gaddhee men se nikalakar maaidan men basegee, varan babul tak jaaegee vaheen too chhudai jaaegee, arthata vaheen yahova tujhe tere shatrauon ke vash men se chhuda lega.." 
Micah4:11 aur ab bahut see jatiyan tere virooddh ikatthee hokar tere vishay men kahengee siyyon apaavitra kee jaa, aur ham apanee ankhon se usako niharen." 
Micah4:12 parantu ve yahova kee kalpanaaen naheen janate, n usakee yuaktai samajhte haai, ki vah unhen aeesa battor lega jaaise khalihan men poole battore jate haain." 
Micah4:13 he siyyon, utt aur danv kar, maain tere seengon ko lohe ke, aur tere khuon kon peetal ke bana doonga or too bahut see jatiyon ko choorachoor karegee, or unakee kamai yahova ko aur unakee dhana-sampaiti prathvee ke prabhu ke liye arpan karegee.." 
Micah5:1 ab he bahut dalon kee svaminee, dal bandha-bandhakar ikatthee ho, kyonki us ne ham logon ko ghor liya haai ve israael ke nyayee ke gal par sontta marenge." 
Micah5:2 he betalehem aepraata, yaadi too aeesa chhotta haai ki yahooda ke hajaron men gina naheen jata, taubhee tujh men se mere liye aek puroosh nikalega, jo israaeliyon men prabhuta karanevala hoga aur usaka nikalana praacheenakal se, varan anaadi kal se hota aya haai." 
Micah5:3 is karan vah unako us samay tak tyage rahega, jab tak jachcha utpann n kare tab israaeliyon ke pas usake bache huae bhai lauttkar un se mil jaaenge." 
Micah5:4 aur vah khda hokar yahova kee dee hui shaaktai se, aur apane parameshvar yahova ke nam ke pratap se, unakee charavahee karega. aur ve suraakshiat rahenge, kyonki ab vah prathvee kee chhor tak mahana ttharega.." 
Micah5:5 aur vah shaantai ka mool hoga, jab ashshooree hamare desh par chaddhai kare, aur hamare rajabhvanon men panv dhare, tab ham unake virooddh sat charavahe varan att pradhaan manushy khden karenge." 
Micah5:6 aur ve ashshoor ke desh ko varan paaittav ke sthanon tak nimraed ke desh ke talavar chalakar mar lenge aur jab ashshooree log hamare desh men aae, aur usake sivane ke bheetar panv dhare, tab vahee puroosh ham ko un se bachaaega." 
Micah5:7 aur yakoob ke bache huae log bahut rajyon ke beech aeesa kam denge, jaaisa yahova kee or se padnevalee os, aur ghaas par kee vashara, jo kisee ke liye naheen ttharatee aur manushyon kee batt naheen johatee." 
Micah5:8 aur yakoob ke bache huae log jaatiyon men aur desh desh ke logon ke beech aeese honge jaaise vanapashuuon men sinh, va bhed-bakaariyon ke jhundon men javan sinh hota haai, kyonaki jab vah unake beech men se jaa, to latadta aur faadta jaaega, aur koi bacha n sakega." 
Micah5:9 tera hath tere draehiyon par pade, aur tere sab shatra nash ho jaaen.." 
Micah5:10 yahova kee yahee vanee haai, us samay maain tere ghaedon ko tere beech men se nash karoonga aur tere rathon ka vinash karoonga." 
Micah5:11 or maain tere desh ke nagaron ko bhee nash karoonga, aur tere kilon ko ddha doonga." 
Micah5:12 aur maain tere tantra-mantra nash karoonga, aur tujh men ttonhe age ko n rahenge." 
Micah5:13 or maain teree khudee hui moorate, aur teree latte, tere beech men se nash karoonga aur too age ko apane hath kee banai hui vastuon ko dandvata n karega." 
Micah5:14 aur maain teree ashora nam mooraton ko teree boomi men se ukhad daloonga, aur tere nagaron ka vinash karoonga." 
Micah5:15 aur maain anyajaatiyon se jo mera kaha naheen manatee, krodha aur jal jalahatt ke sath palatta loonga.." 
Micah6:1 jo bat yahova kahata haai, use suno: uttkar, pahadon ke samhane vadavivad kar, aur tteele bhee teree sunane paaen." 
Micah6:2 he pahado, aur he prathvee kee attl nev, yahova ka vadaavivad suno, kyonki yahova ka apanee praja ke sath mukama haai, aur vah israael se vadavivad karata haai.." 
Micah6:3 he meree praja, maain ne tera kya kiya, aur kya karake maain ne tujhe ukata diya haai?" 
Micah6:4 mere virooddh sakshaee de! maain to tujhe misr desh se nikal le aya, aur dasatv ke ghar men se tujhe chhuda laya aur teree aguvai karane ko moosa, haroon aur maariyam ko bhej diya." 
Micah6:5 he meree praja, smaran kar, ki moab ke raja balak ne tere virooddh kaun see yuaktai kee? aur bor ke putra bilam ne usako kya sammati dee? aur shaitiam se gilgal tak kee baton ka smaran kar, jis se too yahova ke dharma ke kam samajh sake.." 
Micah6:6 maain kya lekar yahova ke sammukh au, aur upar rahanevale parameshvar ke samhane jhukoon? kya maain homabaali ke liye aek aek varsha ke bachhde lekar usake sammukh aun?" 
Micah6:7 kya yahova hajaron meddhon se, va tel kee lakhon naadiyon se prasann hoga? kya maain apane aparadha ke praayashchaitt men apane pahilautte ko va apane pap ke badale men apane janmaae huae kisee ko doon?" 
Micah6:8 he manushy, vah tujhe bata chuka haai ki achchha kya haai aur yahova tujh se ise chhod aur kya chahata haai, ki too nyay se kam kare, aur krapa se praeeti rakhe, aur apane parameshvar ke sath namrata se chale?" 
Micah6:9 yahova is nagar ko pukar raha haai, aur sampoorn gyaan, tere nam ka bhy manana haai: rajadand kee, aur jo use denevala haai usakee bat suno!" 
Micah6:10 kya ab tak dushtt ke ghar men dushttta se paya hua dhan aur chhotta aepa gharaanait naheen haai? 
Micah6:11 kya maain kapatt ka tarajoo aur ghattbaddh ke battkhron kee thailee lekar paavitra tthar sakata hoon? 
Micah6:12 yahan ke dhanavana log upadrav ka kam dekha karate haain aur yahan ke sab rahanevale joott bolate haain aur unake munh se chhl kee baten nikalatee haain. 
Micah6:13 is karan maain tujhe marate marate bahut hee ghaayal karata hoo, aur tere papon ke karan tujh ko ujad dalata hoon." 
Micah6:14 too khaaega, parantu trapt n hoga, tera patt jalata hee rahega aur too apanee sampati lekar chalega, parantu n bacha sakega, aur jo kuchh too bacha bhee le, usako maain talavar chalakar luttva doonga." 
Micah6:15 too boaega, parantu lavega naheen too jalapai ka tel nikalega, parantu lagane n paaega aur dakh raundega, parantu dakhmadha peene n paaega." 
Micah6:16 kyonaki ve omraee kee vidhaiyon par, aur ahab ke gharane ke sab kamon par chalate haain aur tum unakee yuktaiyon ke anusar chalate ho isaliye maain tujhe ujad doonga, aur is nagar ke rahanevalon par talee bajavaunga, aur tum meree praja kee namadharai sahoge.." 
Micah7:1 hay mujh par! kyonki maain us jal ke saman ho gaya hoon jo dhoopakal ke fal todne par, va rahee hutt dakh beenane ke samay ke ant men a jaa, mujhe to pakkee anjeeron kee lalasa thee, parantu khane ke liye koi guchchha nahee raha." 
Micah7:2 bhkt log prathvee par se nash ho gaae haai, aur manushyon men aek bhee seedha naheen jan naheen raha ve sab ke sab hatya ke liye ghaat lagate, aur jal lagakar apane apane bhai ka aher karate haain." 
Micah7:3 ve apane donon hathon se man lagakar burai karate haain haakim ghoos mangata, aur nyayee ghoos lene ko taaiyar rahata haai, aur rais apane man kee dushttta varnn karata haai isee prakar se ve sab milakar jalasajee karate haain." 
Micah7:4 un men se jo sab se uttm haai, jo sab se seedha haai, vah kanttevale bade se bhee bura haai. tere paharooon ka kaha hua din, arthata tere dand ka din a gaya haai. ab ve shaeegha chaunadhaiya jaenge." 
Micah7:5 mitra par vishvas mat karo, paramaamitra par bhee bhrosa mat rakho varan apanee arddhagin se bhee sanbhlakar bolana." 
Micah7:6 kyonaki putra pita ka apaman karata, aur bettee mata ke, aur patoh sas ke virooddh utttee haai manushy ke shatra usake ghar hee ke log hote haain." 
Micah7:7 parantu maain yahova kee or takata rahoonga, maain apane uddharakarta parameshvar kee batt johata rahoonga mera parameshvar meree sunega.." 
Micah7:8 he meree baaiarin, mujh par anand mat kara kyonki jyonhee maain giroonga tyonhee utoonga aur jyonhee maain andhakar men paoonga tyonahi yahova mere liye jyoti ka kam dega." 
Micah7:9 maain ne yahova ke virooddh pap kiya haai, is karan maain us samay tak usake krodha ko sahata rahoonga jab tak ki vah mera mukama ladkar mera nyay n chukaaega. us samay vah mujhe ujiyale men nikal le aaega, aur maain usaka dharma dekoonga." 
Micah7:10 tab meree baaiarin jo mujh se yah kahatee haai ki tera parameshvar yahova kahan raha, vah bhee use dekhegee aur lajja se munh ddhanpegee. maain apanee ankhon se use dekoonga tab vah sadkon kee keech kee nain latadee jaaegee.." 
Micah7:11 tere badon ke bandhane ke din usakee seema baddhai jaaegee. 
Micah7:12 us din ashshoor se, aur misr aur mahanad ke beech ke, aur samudra-samudra aur pahad-pahad ke beech men deshaen se log tere pas anege." 
Micah7:13 taubhee yah desh apane rahanevalon ke kamon ke karan ujad hee rahega.. 
Micah7:14 too lattee liye huae apanee praja kee charavahee kar, arthata apane nij bhag kee bhed-bakaariyon kee, jo kamrmel ke van men alag baaitttee haai ve poorvakal kee nain bashaan aur gilad men chara karen.." 
Micah7:15 jaaise ki misr desh se tere nikal ane ke dinon me, vaaisee hee ab maain usako adabhut kam dikhaunga." 
Micah7:16 anyajatiyan dekhkar apane sare parakram ke vishay men lajaaengee ve apane munh ko hath se chhpaiaaengee, aur unake kan bahire ho jaaenge." 
Micah7:17 ve sarpa kee nain mittee chattengee, aur boomi par renganevale jantuon kee bhanati apane bilon men se kanpatee hui nikalengee he hamare parameshvar yahova ke pas thrathratee hui aaengee, aur ve tujh se drengee.." 
Micah7:18 tere saman aeesa parameshvar kahan haai jo adharma ko kshama kare aur apane nij bhag ke bache huon ke aparadha ko ddhanp de? vah apane krodha ko sada banaae naheen rahata, kyonaki vah karoona se praeeati rakhta haai." 
Micah7:19 vah fir ham par daya karega, aur hamare adharma ke kamon ko latad dalega. too unake sab papon ko gaahire samudra men dal dega." 
Micah7:20 too yakoob ke vishay men vah sachchai, aur ibraaheem ke vishay men vah karoona pooree karega, jis kee shapath too praachaeenakal ke dinon se lekar ab tak hamare pitaron se khata aya haai.." 
Nahum1:1 neenave ke vishay men bharee vachana. aelkoshaee nahoom ke darshan kee pustaka.. 
Nahum1:2 yahova jal uttnevala aur badala lenevala ishvar haai yahova badala lenevala aur jalajalahatt karanevala haai yahova apane draehiyon se badala leta haai, aur apane shatrauon ka pap naheen boolata." 
Nahum1:3 yahova vilamb se krodha karanevala aur bada shaaktaiman haai vah doshaee ko kisee prakar nirdosh n ttharaaega.. yahova bavandr aur andhaee men hokar chalata haai, aur badal usake panvon kee dhooli haai." 
Nahum1:4 usake ghaudkane se mahanad sookh jate haai, aur samudra bhee nirjal ho jata haai bashaan aur kammarail kumhalate aur labanon kee hariyalee jatee rahatee haai." 
Nahum1:5 usake sparsha se pahad kanp uttte haain aur pahadiyan gal jatee haain usake pratap se prathvee varan sara sansar apane sab rahanevalon samet thrathra uttta haai.. 
Nahum1:6 usake krodha ka samhana kaun kar sakata haai? aur jab usaka krodha bhdkata haai, tab kaun tthar sakata haai? usakee jalajalahatt ag kee nain bhdk jatee haai, aur chattanen usakee shaktai se fatt fattkar giratee haain." 
Nahum1:7 yahova bhla haai sankatt ke din men vah draddh gaddh ttharata haai, aur apane sharanagaton kee sudhaee rakhta haai." 
Nahum1:8 parantu vah umadtee hui dhaara se usake sthan ka ant kar dega, aur apane shatrauon ko khdedkar andhakar men bhga dega." 
Nahum1:9 tum yahova ke virooddh kya kalpana kar rahe ho? vah tumhara ant kar dega vipaati doosaree bar padne n paaegee. 
Nahum1:10 kyeanki chahe ve kantton se ulajhe huae ho, aur madira ke nasho men choor bhee ho, taubhee ve sookhee koonttee kee nain bhsm kiae jaaenge." 
Nahum1:11 tujh men se aek nikala haai, jo yahova ke virooddh kalpana karata aur neechata kee yuktai bandhata haai.." 
Nahum1:12 yahova yon kahata haai, chahe ve sab prakar ke samarthee ho, aur bahut bhee ho, taubhee pooree reeati se katte jaaenge aur shoony ho jaaenge. maain ne tujhe du:kh diya haai, parantu fir n doonga." 
Nahum1:13 kyonaki ab maain usaka jooa teree gardan par se utarakar tod daloonga, aur tera bandhan faad daloonga.." 
Nahum1:14 yahova ne tere vishay men yah agyaa dee haai ki age ko tera vansh n chale maain tere devalayon men se ddhlee aur gaddhee hui mooraton ko katt daloonga, maain tere liye kabar khodoonga, kyonki too neech haai.." 
Nahum1:15 dekho, pahadon par shuubhsamachar ka sunanevala aur shaaantai ka prachar karanevala a raha haai! ab he yahooda, apane parva man, aur apanee mannaten pooree kar, kyonaki vah ochha fir kabhee tere beech men hokar n chalega, aur pooree reeti se nash hua haai.." 
Nahum2:1 satyanash karanevala tere virooddh chaddh aya haai. gaddh ko draddh kara marga dekhta hua chaukas raha apanee kamar kasa apana bal baddha de.. 
Nahum2:2 yahova yakoob kee badai israael kee badai ke saman jyon kee tyon kar raha haai, kyonaki ujadnevalon ne unako ujad diya haai aur dakhlata kee daliyon ko nash kiya haai.." 
Nahum2:3 usake shoorapeeron kee ddhalen lal rang se rangee gai, aur usake yoddha lal rang ke vasr paahine huae haain. taaiyaree ke din rathon ka loha ag kee nai chamakata haai, aur bhale hilaae jate haain." 
Nahum2:4 rath sadkon men bahut veg se hanke jate haain ve paleeton ke saman dikhain dete haai, aur unaka veg bijalee ka sa haai." 
Nahum2:5 vah apane shooraveeron ko smaran karata haai ve chalate chalate ttokar khate haai, ve shaharapanah kee or faurtee se jate haai, aur katt ka gummatt taaiyar kiya jata haai." 
Nahum2:6 naharon ke dar khul jate haai, aur rajabhvan galakar baaitta jata haai." 
Nahum2:7 huseb nangee karake bandhauvai men le lee jaaegee, aur usakee dasiyan chhatee peetttee hui pindukon kee nain vilap karengee." 
Nahum2:8 neenave jab se banee haai, tab se talab ke saman haai, taubhee ve bhage jate haai, aur khde ho khde ho, aeesa pukare jane par bhee koi munh naheen faerata." 
Nahum2:9 chandee ko lootto, sone ko lootto, usake rakhe huae dhan kee bahutayat, aur vibhv kee sab prakar kee manabhavanee samagraee ka kuchh pariman naheen.." 
Nahum2:10 vah khalee, choochheen aur soonee ho gai haai! man kachcha ho gaya, aur panv kanpate haain aur un sabhon ki kattyaien men badee peeda uttee, aur sabhon ke mukh ka rang ud gaya haai!" 
Nahum2:11 sinhon kee vah mand, aur javan sinh ke akhett ka vah sthan kahan raha jis men sinh aur sinhanee apane bachchon samet bekhttke firate the?" 
Nahum2:12 sinh to apane danvarooon ke liye bahut aher ko faadta tha, aur apanee sinhaniyon ke liye aher ka gala ghaentt ghaenttkar le jata tha, aur apanee gufaaon aur mandon ko aher se bhr leta tha.." 
Nahum2:13 senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain tere virooddh hoo, aur usake rathon ko bhsm karake dhaunaen men uda doonga, aur usake javan sinh sareekhe veer talavar se mare jaaenge maain tere aher ko prathvee par se nash karoonga, aur tere dooton ka bol fir suna n jaaega.." 
Nahum3:1 hay us hatyaree nagaree par, vah to chhl aur loott ke dhan se bhree hui haai loott kam naheen hotee haai." 
Nahum3:2 kodo kee fattkar aur paahiyon kee ghadghadahatt ho rahee haai ghaede koodate-faandate aur rath uchhlate chalate haain. 
Nahum3:3 savar chaddhai karate, talavaren aur bhale bijalee kee nain chamakate haai, mare huon kee bahutayat aur lothon ka bada ddher haai mudorn kee kuchh ginatee nahee, log murdon se ttokar kha khakar chalate haain!" 
Nahum3:4 yah sab us aati sundar veshya, aur nipun ttonahin ke chhnaiale ke dara jaati-jati ke logon ko, aur ttone ke dara kula-kul ke logon ko bech dalatee haai.." 
Nahum3:5 senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain tere virooddh hoo, aur tere vasr ko uttakar, tujhe jati-jati ke samhane nangee aur rajya-rajy ke samhane neecha dikhaunga." 
Nahum3:6 maain tujh par ghainaunee vastuen faenkakar tujhe tuchchh kar doonga, aur sab se teree hansee karaunga." 
Nahum3:7 aur jitane tujhe dekhenge, sab tere pas se bhagakar kahenge, neenave nash ho gai kaun usake karan vilap kare? ham usake liye shaantai denevala kahan se ddoonddhkar le aaen?" 
Nahum3:8 kya too amon nagaree se baddhkar haai, jo naharon ke beech basee thee, aur usake liye kila aur shaharapanah ka kam deta tha?" 
Nahum3:9 koosh aur misree usako anaginit bal dete the, poot aur loobee tere sahayak the.." 
Nahum3:10 taubhee usako bandhauvai men le gaa, aur usake nanhen bachche sadkon ke sire par pattk diae gaae aur usake praatishttit purooshaen ke liye unhon ne chitthee dalee, aur usake sab rais beadiyon se jakade gaae." 
Nahum3:11 too bhee matavalee hogee, too ghabara jaaegee too bhee shatra ke dr ke mare sharan ka sthan ddoonddhegee." 
Nahum3:12 tere sab gaddh aeese anjeer ke vrakshaen ke saman honge jin men pahile pakke anjeer lage ho, yadi ve hilaae jaaen to fal khanevale ke munh men girenge." 
Nahum3:13 dek, tere log jo tere beech men haai, ve striayan ban gaye haain. tere desh men pravesh karane ke marga tere shatrauon ke liye bilakul khule pade haain aur rookavatt kee chhden ag ke kaur ho gai haain.." 
Nahum3:14 ghair jane ke dinon ke liye panee bhr le, aur gaddhon ko adhaik draddh kara keechad le akar gara latad, aur bhtthe ko saja!" 
Nahum3:15 vahan too ag men bhsm hogee, aur talavar se too nash ho jaaegee. vah yelek nam ttddaiee kee nain tujhe nigal jaaegee.. yadhypi too arbe nam ttddaiee ke saman anaginit bhee ho jaae!" 
Nahum3:16 tere vyoparee akash ke taragan se bhee aadhaik anaaginit hue. ttddaiee chatt karake ud jatee haai. 
Nahum3:17 tere mukuttdhaaree log ttiiddayon ke saman, aur senapati ttiiddayon ke dalon sareekhe ttharenge jo jade ke din men badon par ttkaite haai, parantu jab soorya dikhai deta haai tab bhag jate haain aur koi naheen janata ki ve kahan gaae.." 
Nahum3:18 he ashshoor ke raja, tere ttharaae huae charavahe unghate haain tere shooraveer bharee neend men pad gaae haain. teree praja pahadon par titara-abitar ho gai haai, aur koi unako fir ikatthe naheen karata." 
Nahum3:19 tera ghaav n bhr sakega, tera rog asadhy haai. jitane tera samachar sunenge, ve tere upar talee bajaaenge. kyonki aeesa kaun haai jis par teree lagatar dushttta ka prabhav n pada ho?" 
Habakkuk1:1 bharee vachan jisako habakkook nabee ne darshan men paya.. 
Habakkuk1:2 he yahova maain kab tak teree dohai deta rahoonga, aur too n sunega? maain kab tak tere sammukh upadrava, upadrava chillata rahoonga? kya too uddhar naheen karega?" 
Habakkuk1:3 too mujhe anarth kam kyon dikhata haai? aur kya karan haai ki too utpat ko dekhta hee rahata haai? mere samhane loott-patt aur upadrav hote rahate haain aur jhgada hua karata haai aur vadaavivad baddhta jata haai. 
Habakkuk1:4 isaliye vyavastha ddheelee ho gai aur nyay kabhee naheen pragatt hota. dushtt log dharmee ko ghor lete haain so nyay ka koon ho raha haai.. 
Habakkuk1:5 anyajatiyon kee or chitt lagakar dekho, aur bahut hee chakit ho. kyonki maain tumhare hee dinon men aeesa kam karane par hoon ki jab vah tum ko bataya jaae to tum usakee prateeti n karoge." 
Habakkuk1:6 dekho, maain kasadiyon ko ubharane par hoo, ve kroor aur utavalee karanevalee jati haai, jo paraae vasasthanon ke adhaikaree hone ke liye prathvee bhr men faail gaae haain." 
Habakkuk1:7 ve bhyanak aur dravane haai, ve ap hee apane nyay kee badai aur prashansa ka karan haain." 
Habakkuk1:8 unake ghaede cheeton se bhee aadhaik veg chalanevale haai, aur sanjh ko aher karanevale hundaron se bhee aadhaik kroor haain unake savar door door koodate-faandate ate haain. ha, ve door se chale ate haain aur aher par jhpattnevale ukab kee nai jhpatta marate haain." 
Habakkuk1:9 ve sab ke sab upadrav karane ke liye ate haain samhane kee or mukh kiae huae ve seedho baddhe chale jate haai, aur bandhauon ko baloo ke kinakon ke saman battorate haain." 
Habakkuk1:10 rajaon ko ve tttthon men udate aur haakimon ka upahas karate haain ve sab draddh gaddhon ko tuchchh janate haai, kyonki ve damadama bandhakar unako jeet lete haain." 
Habakkuk1:11 tab ve vayu kee nai chalate aur maryada chhodkar doshaee ttharate haai, kyonki unaka bal hee unaka devata haai.." 
Habakkuk1:12 he mere prabhu yahova, he mere pavitra parameshvar, kya too anadi kal se naheen haai? is karan ham log naheen marane ke. he yahova, too ne unako nyay karane ke liye ttharaya haai he chattan, too ne ulahana dene ke liye unako baaittaya haai." 
Habakkuk1:13 teree ankhen aeesee shuuddh haain ki too burai ko dekh hee naheen sakata, aur utpat ko dekhkar chup naheen rah sakata fir too vishvasaghaaatiyon ko kyon dekhta rahata, aur jab dushtt nirdosh ko nigal jata haai, tab too kyon chup rahata haai?" 
Habakkuk1:14 too kyon manushyon ko samudra kee machhliyon ke saman aur un renganevale jantuon ke saman banata haai jin par koi shaasan karanevala naheen haai. 
Habakkuk1:15 vah un sab manushyon ko bansee se pakadkar utta leta aur jal men ghaseettta aur mahajal men fansa leta haai is karan vah anandait aur magan haai. 
Habakkuk1:16 iseeliye vah apane jal ke samhane bali chaddhata aur apane mahajal ke age dhoop jalata haai kyonaki inheen ke dara usaka bhag pushtt hota, aur usaka bhojan chikana hota haai." 
Habakkuk1:17 parantu kya vah jal ko khalee karane aur jati jati ke logon ko lagatar nirdayata se ghaat karane se hath n rokega? 
Habakkuk2:1 maain apane pahare par khda rahoonga, aur gummatt par chaddhkar tthara rahoonga, aur takata rahoonga ki mujh se vah kya kahega? aur maain apane diae huae ulahane ke vishay men uttr doon?" 
Habakkuk2:2 yahova ne mujh se kaha, darshan kee baten likh de varan paattyaiaon par safa safa likh de ki daudte huae bhee ve sahaj se paddhee jaaen."
