Habakkuk2:3 kyonaki is darshan kee bat niyat samay men pooree honevalee haai, varan isake poore hone ke samay veg se ata haai is men dhaekha n hoga. chahe is men vilamb bhee ho, taueeaee usakee batt jahate rahana kyonaki vah nishchay pooree hogee aur us men den n hogee." 
Habakkuk2:4 dek, usaka man foola hua haai, usaka man seedha naheen haai parantu dharmee apane vishvas ke dara jeeavit rahega." 
Habakkuk2:5 dakhmadha se dhaekha hota haai ahankaree puroosh ghar men naheen rahata, aur usakee lalasa adhaelok ke saman pooree naheen hotee, aur mratyu kee nain usaka pett naheen bhrata. vah sab jaatiyon ko apane pas kheench leta, aur sab deshaen ke logon ko apane pas ikatthe kar rakhta haai.." 
Habakkuk2:6 kya ve sab usaka drashttant chalakar, aur us par tana marakar n kahenge ki hay us par jo paraya dhal chheen chheenakar dhanavan ho jata haai? kab taka? hay us par jo apana ghar bandhak kee vastuon se bhr leta haai." 
Habakkuk2:7 jo tujh se karja lete haai, kya ve log achanak n uttenge? aur kya ve n jagenge jo tujh ko sankatt men dalenge?" 
Habakkuk2:8 aur kya too un se lootta n jaaega? too ne bahut see jaatiyon ko loott liya haai, so sab bache huae log tujhe bhee loott lenge. isaka karan manushyon kee hatya, aur vah apadrav bhee jo too ne is desh aur rajadhaanee aur isake sab rahanevalon par kiya haai.." 
Habakkuk2:9 hay us par, jo apane dhar ke liye anyay ke labh ka lobhee haai taki vah apana ghaensala unche sthan men banakar vipaati se bache." 
Habakkuk2:10 too ne bahut see jatiyon ko kattkar apane ghar liye lajja kee yuaktai bandhae, aur apane hee praan ka doshaee tthara haai." 
Habakkuk2:11 kyonaki ghar kee bheet ka patthr dohai deta haai, aur usake chht kee kadee unake svar men svar milakar uttr detee haain." 
Habakkuk2:12 hay us par jo hatya karake nagar ko banata, aur kuttlaita karake gaddh ko draddh karata haai." 
Habakkuk2:13 dekho, kya senaon ke yahova kee or se yah naheen hota ki desh desh ke log parishram to karate haain parantu ve ag ka kaur hote haain aur rajya-rajy ke logon ka parishram vyarth hee ttharata haai?" 
Habakkuk2:14 kyonaki prathvee yahova kee mahima ke gyaan se aeesee bhr jaaegee jaaise samudra jal se bhr jata haai.. 
Habakkuk2:15 hay us par, jo apane padosee ko maadira pilata, aur us men vish milakar usako matavala kar deta haai ki usako nanga dekhe." 
Habakkuk2:16 too maahima kee santee apaman hee se bhr gaya haai. too bhee pee, aur apane ko khtanaheen pragatt kara! jo kattora yahova ke dahine hath men rahata haai, so ghoomakar teree or bhee jaaega, aur tera vibhv teree chhantt se ashuuddh ho jaaega." 
Habakkuk2:17 kyonaki labanon men tera kiya hua upadrav aur vahan ke pashuuon par tera kiya hua utpat, jin se ve bhyabheet ho gaae the, tujhee par a padenge. yah manushyon kee hatya aur us upadrav ke karan hoga, jo is desh aur rajadhaanee aur isake sab rahanevalon par kiya gaya haai.." 
Habakkuk2:18 khudee hui moorat men kya labh dekhkar bananevale ne use khoda haai? fir joott sikhanevalee aur ddhlee hui moorat men kya labh dekhkar ddhalanevale ne us par itana bhrosa rakha haai ki n bolanevalee aur nikammee moorat banaae? 
Habakkuk2:19 hay us par jo katt se kahata haai, jag, va abol patthr se, utt! kya vah sikhaaega? dekho, vah sone chandee men maddha hua haai, parantu us men atma naheen haai.." 
Habakkuk2:20 parantu yahova apane pavitra maandair men haai samast prathvee usake samhane shaant rahe.. 
Habakkuk3:1 shgiyoneet kee reeti par habakkook nabee kee praarthna.. 
Habakkuk3:2 he yaheava, maain teree keetira sunakar dr gaya. he yahova, vartaman yug men apane kam ko poora kara isee yug men too usako prakatt kara krodha karate huae bhee daya karana smaran kara.." 
Habakkuk3:3 ishvar teman se aya, paavitra ishvar paran parvat se a raha haai. usaka tej akash par chhaya hua haai, aur prathvee usakee stuati se paripoorn ho gai haai.." 
Habakkuk3:4 usakee jyoti soorya ke tuly thee, usake hath se kirane nikal rahee theen aur in men usaka samarth chhpai hua tha." 
Habakkuk3:5 usake age age maree faailatee gai, aur usake panvon se mahajvar nikalata gaya." 
Habakkuk3:6 vah khda hokar prathvee ko nap raha tha us ne dekha aur jati jati ke log ghabara gaae tab sanatan parvat chakanachoor ho gaa, aur sanatan kee pahadiyan jhuk gai usakee gati anant kal se aek see haai." 
Habakkuk3:7 mujhe kooshaan ke tamboo men rahanevale du:kh se dabe dikhai pade aur midhan desh ke dere dgamaga gaae. 
Habakkuk3:8 he yahova, kya too nadiyon par risiyaya tha? kya tera krodha naadiyon par bhdka tha, athva kya teree jalajalahatt samudra par bhdkee thee, jab too apane ghaedon par aur uddhar karanevale vijayee rathon par chaddhkar a raha tha?" 
Habakkuk3:9 tera dhanush khol men se nikal gaya, tere dand ka vachan shaap ke sath hua tha. too ne dharatee ko naadiyon se cheer dala." 
Habakkuk3:10 pahad tujhe dekhkar kanp utte andhaee aur jalapralay nikal gaae gahira sagar bol utta aur apane hathon arthata laharon ko upar uttaya. 
Habakkuk3:11 tere udnevale teeron ke chalane kee jayoti se, aur tere chamakeele bhale kee jhlak ke prakash se soorya aur chandrama apane apane sthan par tthar gaae.." 
Habakkuk3:12 too krodha men akar prathvee par chal nikala, too ne jati jati ko krodha se nash kiya." 
Habakkuk3:13 too apanee praja ke uddhar ke liye nikala, ha, apane abhaishaikt ke sang hokar uddhar ke liye nikala. too ne dushtt ke ghar ke sir ko ghaayal karake use gal se nev tak nanga kar diya." 
Habakkuk3:14 too ne usake yoddhaon ke siron ko usee kee barchhee se chheda haai, ve mujh ko titara-abitar karane ke liye bavandr kee andhaee kee nain aa, aur deen logon ko ghaat lagakar mar dalane kee asha se anandait the." 
Habakkuk3:15 too apane ghaedon par savar hokar samudra se ha, jalapralay se par ho gaya.." 
Habakkuk3:16 yah sab sunate hee mera kaleja kanp utta, mere ontt thrathrane lage meree haddiyan sadne lagee, aur maain khde khde kanpane laga. maain shaaantai se us din kee batt johata rahoonga jab dal bandhakar praja chaddhai kare.." 
Habakkuk3:17 kyonaki chahe anjeer ke vrakshaen men fool n lage, aur n dakhlataon men fal lage, jalapai ke vraksha se keval dhaekha paya jaae aur kheton men ann n upaje, bhedshaalaon men bhed-bakaariyan n rahe, aur n thanon men gay baail ho," 
Habakkuk3:18 taubhee maain yahova ke karan anaandait aur magan rahoonga, aur apane uddharakartta parameshvar ke dara ati prasann rahoonga.." 
Habakkuk3:19 yahova parameshvar mera balamool haai, vah mere panv harinon ke saman bana deta haai, vah mujh ko mere unche sthanon par chalata haai.." 
Zephaniah1:1 amon ke putra yahooda ke raja yoshaiyyah ke dinon me, sapanyah ke pas jo hijaakiyyah ke putra amaryah ka parapota aur gadalyah ka pota aur kooshaee ka putra tha, yahova ka yah vachan pahuncha:" 
Zephaniah1:2 maain dharatee ke upar se sab ka ant kar doonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Zephaniah1:3 maain manushy aur pashu donon ka ant kar doonga maain akash ke paakshiayon aur samudra kee machhaliyon ka, aur dushtton samet unakee rakhee hui ttokaron ke karan ka bhee ant kar doonga maain manushy jati ko bhee dharatee par se nash kar daloonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Zephaniah1:4 maain yahooda par aur yarooshalem ke sab rahanevalon par hath uttaunga, aur is sthan men bal ke bache huon ko aur yajakon samet devataon ke pujariyon ke nam ko nash kar doonga." 
Zephaniah1:5 jo log apane apane ghar kee chht par akash ke gan ko dandvata karate huae yahova kee seva karane kee shapath khate haain 
Zephaniah1:6 aur jo yahova ke peechhe chalane se lautt gaae haai, aur jinhon ne n to yahova ko ddoonddha, aur n usakee khoj men lage, unako bhee maain satyanash kar daloonga.." 
Zephaniah1:7 parameshvar yahova ke samhane shaant raho! kyonaki yahova ka din nikatt haai yahova ne yagya siddh kiya haai, aur apane pahunon ko pavitra kiya haai." 
Zephaniah1:8 aur yahova ke yagya ke din, maain hakimon aur rajakumaron ko aur jitane paradesh ke vasr pahina karate haai, unako bhee dand doonga." 
Zephaniah1:9 us din maain un sabhon ko dand doonga jo devaddhee ko langhate, aur apane svamee ke ghar ko upadrav aur chhl se bhr dete haain.." 
Zephaniah1:10 yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki us din machhlee faattk ke pas chillahatt ka aur naye ttole mishnah men hahakar ka aur tteelon par bade dhamake ka shabd hoga." 
Zephaniah1:11 he maktesh ke rahanevalo, hay, hay, karo! kyonaki sab vyoparee mitt gaae jitane chandee se lade the, un sab ka nash ho gaya haai." 
Zephaniah1:12 us samay maain deepak liae huae yarooshalem men ddoonddh-ddhanddh karoonga, aur jo log dakhmadha ke talachhtt tatha maail ke saman baaitte huae man men kahate haain ki yahova n to bhla karega aur n bura, unako maain dand doonga." 
Zephaniah1:13 tab unakee dhan sampaati loottee jaaegee, aur unake ghar ujad honge ve ghar to banaaenge, parantu un men rahane n paaenge aur ve dakh kee bariyan lagaaenge, parantu un se dakhmadha n peene paaenge.." 
Zephaniah1:14 rayahova ka bhyanak din nikatt haai, vah bahut veg se sameep chala ata haai yahova ke din ka shabd sun padta haai, vahan veer du:kh ke mare chillata haai." 
Zephaniah1:15 vah rosh ka din, vah ujad aur udhod ka din, vah badal aur kalee ghatta ka din hoga." 
Zephaniah1:16 vah gaddhvale nagaron aur unche gummatton ke virooddh narasinga foonkane aur lalakarane ka din hoga. 
Zephaniah1:17 maain manushyon ko sankatt men daloonga, aur ve andhaen kee nain chalenge, kyonki unhon ne yahova ke virooddh pap kiya haai unaka lohoo dhooli ke saman, aur unaka mans vishtta kee nain faenk diya jaaega." 
Zephaniah1:18 yahova ke rosh ke din me, n to chandee se unaka bachav hoga, aur n sone se kyonaki usake jalan kee ag se saree prathvee bhsm ho jaaegee vah prathvee ke sare rahanevalon ko ghabarakar unaka ant kar dalega.." 
Zephaniah2:1 he nirlajj jati ke logo, ikatthe ho!" 
Zephaniah2:2 is se paahile ki dand kee agyaa pooree ho aur bachav ka din boosee kee nain nikale, aur yahova ka bhdkata hua krodha tum par a pade, aur yahova ke krodha ka din tum par aa, tum ikatthe ho." 
Zephaniah2:3 he prathvee ke sab namra logo, he yahova ke niyam ke mananevalo, usako ddoonddhte raho dharma se ddoonddho, namrata se ddoonddho sambhv haai tum yahova ke krodha ke din men sharan pao." 
Zephaniah2:4 kyonaki ajja to nirjan aur ashkalon ujad ho jaaega ashadod ke nivasee dinadupaharee nikal diae jaaenge, aur aekron ukhada jaaega.." 
Zephaniah2:5 samudrateer ke rahanevalon par haya karetee jaati par haya he kanan, he paalishtaiyon ke desha, yahova ka vachan tere virooddh haai aur maain tujh ko aeesa nash karoonga ki tujh men koi n bachega." 
Zephaniah2:6 aur usee samudrateer par charavahon ke ghar honge aur bhedshaalaon samet charai hogee. 
Zephaniah2:7 arthata vahee samudrateer yahooda ke gharane ke bache huon ko milegee, ve us par charaaenge ve ashkalon ke chhode huae gharon men sanjh ko lettenge, kyonki unaka parameshvar yahova unakee sudhai lekar unake bandhauon ko lautta le jaaega.." 
Zephaniah2:8 moab ne jo meree praja kee namadharai aur ammoniyon ne jo usakee ninda karake usake desh kee seema par chaddhai kee, vah mere kanon tak pahunchee haai." 
Zephaniah2:9 is karan israael ke parameshvar, senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, mere jeevan kee shapat, nishchay moab sadom ke saman, aur ammonee amora kee nain bichchoo pedon ke sthan aur namak kee khaniyan ho jaaenge, aur sadaaiv ujade rahenge. meree praja ke bache huae unako loottenge, aur meree jati ke shosh log unako apane bhag men paaenge." 
Zephaniah2:10 yah unake garva ka palatta hoga, kyonaki unhon ne senaon ke yahova kee praja kee namadharai kee, aur us par badai maree haai." 
Zephaniah2:11 yahova unako dravana dikhai dega, vah prathvee bhr ke devataon ko bookhon mar dalega, aur anyajaatiyon ke sab deepon ke nivasee apane apane sthan se usako dandvata karenge.." 
Zephaniah2:12 he kooshaiyo, tum bhee meree talavar se mare jaoge." 
Zephaniah2:13 vah apana hath uttr disha kee or baddhakar ashshoor ko nash karega, aur neenave ko ujad kar jangal ke saman nirjal kar dega." 
Zephaniah2:14 usake beech men sab jaati ke vanapashu jhund ke jhund baaittenge usake khmbhon kee kangaaniyon par dhanesh aur sahee donon rat ko basera karenge aur usakee khaidkiyon men bola karenge usakee devaddhiyan soonee padee rahengee, aur devadar kee lakadee ughaaree jaegee." 
Zephaniah2:15 yah vahee nagaree haai, jo magan rahatee aur nidr baaittee rahatee thee, aushra sochatee thee ki maain hee hoo, aur mujhe chhod koi haai hee naheen. parantu ab yah ujad aur vanapashuuon ke baaittne ka sthan ban gaya haai, yahan tak ki jo koi isake pas hokar chale, vah talee bajaaega aur hath hilaaega." 
Zephaniah3:1 hay balava karanevalee aur ashuuddh aur andhor se bhree hui nagaree! 
Zephaniah3:2 us ne meree naheen sunee, us ne tadna se bhee naheen mana, us ne yahova par bhrosa naheen rakha, vah apane parameshvar ke sameep naheen ai.." 
Zephaniah3:3 usake haakim garajanevale sinh tthare usake nyayee sanjh ko aher karanevale hundar haain jo bihan ke liye kuchh naheen chhodte. 
Zephaniah3:4 usake bhavishyadvkta vyarth bakanevale aur vishvasaghaatee haai, usake yajakon ne pavitrasthan ko ashuuddh kiya aur vyavastha men kheencha-khanch kee haai." 
Zephaniah3:5 yahova jo usake beech men haai, vah dharmee haai, vah kuttlaita n karega vah apana nyay praati bhor pragatt karata haai aur chookata naheen parantu kuattlai jan ko lajja atee hee naheen." 
Zephaniah3:6 maain ne anyajaatiyon ko yahan tak nash kiya, ki unake konevale gummatt ujad gaae maain ne unakee sadkon ko yahan tak soonee kiya, ki koi un par naheen chalata unake nagar yahan tak nash huae ki un men koi manushy varan koi bhee praanee naheen raha." 
Zephaniah3:7 maain ne kaha, ab too mera bhy manegee, aur meree tadna angeekar karegee jis se usaka dhaam us sab ke anusar jo maain ne ttharaya tha, nash n ho. parantu ve sab prakar ke bure bure kam yatn se karane lage.." 
Zephaniah3:8 is karan yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki jab tak maain nash karane ko n utoo, tab tak tum meree batt johate raho. maain ne yah ttana haai ki jati-jati ke aur rajya-rajy ke logon ko maain ikattha karoo, ki un par apane krodha kee ag pooree reeati se bhdkaun kyonaki saree prathvee meree jalan kee ag se bhsm ho jaaegee.." 
Zephaniah3:9 aur us samay maain desha-desh ke logon se aek nai aur shuuddh bhasha bulavaunga, ki ve sab ke sab yahova se praarthna kare, aur aek man se kandho se kandha milaae huae usakee seva karen." 
Zephaniah3:10 meree titara-abitar kee hui praja mujh se binatee karatee hui meree bhentt banakar aaegee.. 
Zephaniah3:11 us din, too apane sab bade se bade kamon se jinhen karake too mujh se fir gai thee, fir lajjait n hogee. us samay maain tere beech se sab foole huae ghamaandiyon ko door karoonga, aur too mere pavitra parvat par fir kabhee aabhaiman n karegee." 
Zephaniah3:12 kyonaki maain tere beech men deen aur kangal logon ka aek dal bacha rakoonga, aur ve yahova ke nam kee sharan lenge." 
Zephaniah3:13 israael ke bache huae log n to kuattlaita karenge aur n joott bolenge, aur n unake munh se chhl kee baten nikalengee. ve charenge aur vishraam karenge, aur koi unako dranevala n hoga.." 
Zephaniah3:14 he siyyon, unche svar se ga he israael, jayajayakar kara! he yarooshalem apane sampoorn man se anand kar, aur prasann ho!" 
Zephaniah3:15 yahova ne tera dand door kar diya aur tera shatra bhee door kiya gaya haai. israael ka raja yahova tere beech men haai, isaliye too fir vipaati n bhogegee." 
Zephaniah3:16 us samay yarooshalem se yah kaha jaega, he siyyon mat dr, tere hath ddheele n padne paen." 
Zephaniah3:17 tera parameshvar yahova tere beech men haai, vah uddhar karane men parakramee haai vah tere karan anand se magan hoga, vah apane praem ke mare chupaka rahega fir unche svar se gata hua tere karan magan hoga.." 
Zephaniah3:18 jo log niyat pavor men sammailit n hone ke karan kheadit rahate haai, unako maain ikattha karoonga, kyonki ve tere haain aur usakee namadharai unako bojh jan padtee haai." 
Zephaniah3:19 us samay maain un sabhon se jo tujhe du:kh dete haai, uchit bartav karoonga. aur maain langadon ko changa karoonga, aur barabas nikale huon ko ikattha karoonga, aur jinakee lajja kee charcha saree prathvee par faailee haai, unakee prashansa aur keeti sab kaheen faailaunga." 
Zephaniah3:20 usee samay maain tumhen le jaunga, aur usee samay maain tumhen ikattha karoonga aur jab maain tumhare samhane tumhare bandhauon ko lautta launga, tab prathvee kee saree jatiyon ke beech men tumharee keetira aur prashansa faaila doonga, yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Haggai1:1 dara raja ke doosare varsha ke chhttven maheene ke paahile din, yahova ka yah vachan, haggaai bhavishyadvkta ke dara, shaalateeael ke putra jaroobbabel ke pas, jo yahooda ka adhaipaati tha, aur yahosadak ke putra yahoshoo mahayajak ke pas pahuncha:" 
Haggai1:2 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, ye log kahate haain ki yahova ka bhvan banane ka samay naheen aya haai." 
Haggai1:3 fir yahova ka yah vachan haggaai bhavishyadvkta ke dara pahuncha," 
Haggai1:4 kya tumhare liye apane chhtavale gharon men rahane ka samay haai, jab ki yah bhvan ujad pada haai?" 
Haggai1:5 isaliye ab senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, apanee apanee chala-chalan par dhyan karo." 
Haggai1:6 tum ne bahut boya parantu thoda katta tum khate ho, parantu pett naheen bhrata tum peete ho, parantu pyas naheen bujhtee tum kapade paahinate ho, parantu garamate naheen aur jo majadooree kamata haai, vah apanee majadooree kee kamai ko chhedavalee thailee men rakhta haai.." 
Haggai1:7 senao ka yahova tum se yon kahata he, apane apane chalachalan par socho." 
Haggai1:8 pahad par chaddh jao aur lakadee le ao aur is bhvan ko banao aur maain usako dekhkar prasann hoonga, aur meree mahima hogee, yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Haggai1:9 tum ne bahut upaj kee asha rakhee, parantu dekho thedee hee haai aur jab tum use ghar le aa, tab maain ne usako uda diya. senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, aeesa kyon hua? kya isaliye nahee, ki mera bhvan ujad pada haai aur tum men se pratyek apane apane ghar ko dauda chala jata haai?" 
Haggai1:10 is karan akash se os girana aur prathvee se ann upajana donon band haain. 
Haggai1:11 aur meree agyaa se prathvee aur pahadon par, aur ann aur naye dakhmadha par aur taje tel par, aur jo kuchh boomi se upajata haai us par, aur manushyon aur gharaailoo pashuuon par, aur unake parishram kee saree kamai par bhee akal pada haai.." 
Haggai1:12 tab shaalateeael ke putra jaroobbabel aur yahosadak ke putra yahoshoo mahayajak ne sab bache huae logon samet apane paramashevar yahova kee bat manee aur jo vachan unake parameshvar yahova ne un se kahane ke liye haggaai bhavishyadvkta ko bhej diya tha, use unhon ne man liya aur logon ne yahova ka bhy mana." 
Haggai1:13 tab yahova ke doot haggaai ne yahova se agyaa pakar un logon se yah kaha, yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain tumhare sang hoon." 
Haggai1:14 aur yahova ne shaalateeael ke putra jaroobbabel ko jo yahooda ka adhaipaati tha, aur yahosadak ke putra yahoshoo mahayajak ko, aur sab bache huae logon ke man ko ubhar ka utsah se bhr diya ki ve akar apane parameshvar, senaon ke yahova ke bhvan ko banane men lag jaaen." 
Haggai1:15 yah dara raja ke doosare varsha ke chhttven maheene ke chaubeesaven din hua.. 
Haggai2:1 fir sataven maheene ke ikkeesaven din ko yahova ka yah vachan haggaai bhavishyadvkta ke pas pahuncha," 
Haggai2:2 shaalateeael ke putra yahooda ke adhaipaati jaroobbabel, aur yahosadak ke putra yahoshoo mahayajak aur sab bache huae logon se yah bat kah," 
Haggai2:3 tum men se kaun haai, jis ne is bhvan kee paahilee maahima dekhee haai? ab tum ise kaaisee dasha men dekhte ho? kya yah sach naheen ki yah tumharee draashtti men us pahile kee apeksha kuchh bhee achchha naheen haai?" 
Haggai2:4 taubhee, ab yahova kee yah vanee haai, he jaroobbabel, hiyav bandha aur he yahosadak ke putra yahoshoo mahayajak, hiyav bandha aur yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai ki he desh ke sab logo hiyav bandhakar kam karo, kyonaki maain tumhare sang hoo, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Haggai2:5 tumhare misr se nikalane ke samay jo vacha maain ne tum se bandhaee thee, usee vacha ke anusar mera atma tumhare beech men bana haai isaaliye tum mat dro." 
Haggai2:6 kyonaki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, ab thodee hee der bakee haai ki maain akash aur prathvee aur samudra aur sthl sab ko kampait karoonga." 
Haggai2:7 aushra maai. saree jaatiyon ko kampakapaunga, aur saree jaatiyon kee manabhavanee vastuaen aaengee aur maain is bhvan ko apanee mahima ke tej se bhr doonga, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Haggai2:8 chandee to meree haai, aur sona bhee mera hee haai, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Haggai2:9 is bhvan kee pichhlee mahima isakee paahilee maahima se badee hogee, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai, aur is sthan men maain shaantai doonga, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Haggai2:10 dara ke doosare varsha ke nauven maheene ke chaubeesave din ko, yahova ka yah vachan haggaai bhavishyadvkta ke pas pahuncha," 
Haggai2:11 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai: yajakon se is bat kee vyavastha pooch," 
Haggai2:12 yaadi koi apane vasr ke anchal se rottee va pakaae huae bhojan va dakhmadha va tel va kisee prakar ke bhojan ko chhua, to kya vah bhojan pavitra ttharega? yajakon ne uttr diya, naheen." 
Haggai2:13 fir haggaai ne poochha, yadi koi jan manushy kee loth ke karan ashuuddh hokar aeesee kisee vastu ko chhua, to kya vah ashuuddh ttharegee? yajakon ne uttr diya, han ashuuddh ttharegee." 
Haggai2:14 fir haggaai ne kaha, yahova kee yahee vanee haai, ki meree draashtti men yah praja aur yah jaati vaaisee hee haai, aur inake sab kam bhee vaaise haain aur jo kuchh ve vahan chaddhate haai, vah bhee ashuuddh haai" 
Haggai2:15 ab socha-avichar karo ki aj se pahile arthata jab yahova ke maandair men patthr par patthr rakha hee naheen gaya tha," 
Haggai2:16 un dinon men jab koi ann ke bees napuon kee asha se jata, tab das hee pata tha, aur jab koi dakhras ke kund ke pas is asha se jata ki pachas bartan bhr nikale, tab bees hee nikalate the." 
Haggai2:17 maain ne tumharee saree khetee ko loo aur garooi aur olon se mara, taubhee tum meree or n fire, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Haggai2:18 ab socha-avichar karo, ki aj se pahile arthata jis din yahova ke mandair kee nev dalee gai, us din se lekar nauven maheene ke isee chaubeesaven din tak kya dasha thee? isaka socha-vichar karo." 
Haggai2:19 kya ab tak beech khtte men haai? ab tak dakhlata aur anjeer aur anar aur jalapai ke vraksha naheen fale, parantu aj ke din se maain tum ko ashaeesh deta rahoonga.." 
Haggai2:20 usee maheene ke chaubeesaven din ko doosaree bar yahova ka yah vachan haggaai ke pas pahuncha, yahooda ke adhaipaati jaroobbabel se yon kaha:" 
Haggai2:21 maain akash aur prathvee donon ko kampaunga," 
Haggai2:22 aur maain rajya-rajy kee gaee ko ulatt doonga maain anyajatiyon ke rajya-rajy ka bal tooonga, aur rathon ko chaddhvaaiyon samet ulatt doonga aur ghaedon samet savar aek doosare kee talavar se girenge." 
Haggai2:23 senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai, us din, he shaalateeael ke putra mere das jaroobbabel, maain tujhe lekar angoottee ke saman rakoonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai kyonki maain ne tujhee ko chun liya haai, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Zechariah1:1 dara ke rajy ke doosare varsha ke attven maheene men jakaryah bhavishyadvkta ke pas jo berekyah ka putra aur io ka pota tha, yahova ka yah vachan pahuncha:" 
Zechariah1:2 yahova tum logon ke purakhaon se bahut hee krodhait hua tha. 
Zechariah1:3 isaliye too in logon se kah, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai: tum meree or firo, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai, tab maain tumharee or firoonga, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Zechariah1:4 apane purakhaon ke saman n bano, un se to agale bhavishyadvkta yah pukar pukarakar kahate the ki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, apane bure margon se, aur apane bure kamon se firo parantu unhon ne n to suna, aur n meree or dhyan diya, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Zechariah1:5 tumhare purakha kahan rahe? aur bhvishyadvkta kya sada jeeavit rahate haain? 
Zechariah1:6 parantu mere vachan aur meree agyaaaen jin ko maain ne apane das naabiyon ko diya tha, kya ve tumhare purakhaon par pooree n hui? tab unhon ne man firaya aur kaha, senaon ke yahova ne hamare chalachalan aur kamon ke anusar ham se jaaisa vyavahar karane ko kaha tha, vaaisa hee us ne ham ko badala diya haai.." 
Zechariah1:7 dara ke doosare varsha ke shabat nam gyarahaven maheene ke chaubeesaven din ko jakaryah nabee ke pas jo berekyah ka putra aur io ka pota tha, yahova ka vachan yon pahuncha:" 
Zechariah1:8 maain ne rat ko svapn men kya dekha ki aek puroosh lal ghaede par chaddha hua un menhadiyon ke beech khda haai jo neeche sthan men haai, aur usake peechhe lal aur surang aur shvet ghaede bhee khde haain." 
Zechariah1:9 tab maain ne kaha, he mere prabhu ye kaun haain? tab jo doot mujh se baten karata tha, us ne mujh se kaha, maain tujhe bataunga ki ye kaun haain." 
Zechariah1:10 fir jo puroosh menhadiyon ke beech khda tha, us ne kaha, yah ve haain jin ko yahova ne prathvee par saair arthata dhoomane ke liye bheja haai." 
Zechariah1:11 tab unhon ne yahova ke us doot se jo menhadiyon ke beech khda tha, kaha, ham ne prathvee par saair kiya haai, aur kya dekha ki saree prathvee men shaantai aur chaain haai." 
Zechariah1:12 tab yahova ke doot ne kaha, he senaon ke yahova, too jo yarooshalem aur yahooda ke nagaron par sattr varsha se krodhait haai, so too un par kab tak daya n karega?" 
Zechariah1:13 aur yahova ne uttr men us doot se jo mujh se baten karata tha, achchhee achchhee aur shaaantai kee baten kaheen." 
Zechariah1:14 tab jo doot mujh se baten karata tha, us ne mujh se kaha, too pukarakar kah ki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, mujhe yarooshalem aur siyyon ke liye badee jalan hui haai." 
Zechariah1:15 aur jo jaatiyan sukh se rahatee haai, un se maain krodhait hoon kyonki maain ne to thoda se krodha kiya tha, parantu unhon ne vipaati ko baddha diya." 
Zechariah1:16 is karan yahova yon kahata haai, ab maain daya karake yarooshalem ko lautt aya hoon mera bhvan us men banega, aur yarooshalem par napane kee doree dalee jaaegee, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Zechariah1:17 fir yah bhee pukarakar kah ki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, mere nagar fir uttm vastuon se bhr jaaenge, aur yahova fir siyyon ko shaaantai dega aur yarooshalem ko fir apana ttharaaega.." 
Zechariah1:18 fir maain ne jo ankhen uttai, to kya dekha ki char seeng haain." 
Zechariah1:19 tab jo doot mujh se baten karata tha, us se maain ne poochha, ye kya haain? us ne mujh se kaha, ye ve hee seeng haai, jinhon ne yahooda aur israael aur yarooshalem ko titara-abitar kiya haai." 
Zechariah1:20 fir yahova ne mujhe char lohar dikhaae. 
Zechariah1:21 tab maain ne poochha, ye kya karane ko aae haain? us ne kaha, ye ve hee seeng haai, jinhon ne yahooda ko aeesa titara-abitar kiya ki koi sir n utta saka parantu ye log unhen bhgane ke liye aur un jaatiyon ke seengon ko katt dalane ke liye aae haain jinhon ne yahooda ke desh ko titara-abitar karane ke liye unake virooddh apane apane seeng uttaae the.." 
Zechariah2:1 fir maain ne ankhen uttain to kya dekha, ki hath men napane kee doree liae huae aek puroosh haai." 
Zechariah2:2 tab maain ne us se poochha, too kahan jata haai? us ne mujh se kaha, yarooshalem ko napane jata hoon ki dekoon usakee chaudai kitanee, aur lambai kitanee haai." 
Zechariah2:3 tab maain ne kya dekha, ki jo doot mujh se baten karata tha vah chala gaya, aur doosara doot us se milane ke liye akar," 
Zechariah2:4 us se kahata haai, daudkar us javan se kah, yarooshalem manushyon aur gharaailoo pashuuon kee bahutayat ke mare shaharapanah ke bahar bahar bhee basegee." 
Zechariah2:5 aur yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki maain ap usake charon or ag kee se shaharapanah ttharoonga, aur usake beech men tejomay hokar dikhai doonga.." 
Zechariah2:6 yahova kee yah vanee haai, dekho, suno uttr ke desh men se bhag jao, kyonki maain ne tum ko akash kee charon vayuon ke saman titar bitar kiya haai." 
Zechariah2:7 he babulavalee jaati ke sang rahanevalee, siyyon ko bachakar nikal bhaga!" 
Zechariah2:8 kyonaki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, us tel ke pragatt hone ke bad us ne mujhe un jatiyon ke pas bheja haai jo tumhen lootttee thee, kyonki jo tum ko choota haai, vah meree ankh kee putalee hee ko choota haai." 
Zechariah2:9 dekho, maain apana hath un par uttaunga, tab ve unheen se lootte jaaenge jo unake das huae the. tab tum janoge ki senaon ke yahova ne mujhe bheja haai." 
Zechariah2:10 he siyyon, unche svar se ga aur anand kar, kyonaki dek, maain akar tere beech men nivas karoonga, yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Zechariah2:11 us samay bahut see jaatiyan yahova se mil jaengee, aur meree praja ho jaengee aur maain tere beech men bas karoonga," 
Zechariah2:12 aur too janegee ki senaon ke yahova ne mujhe tere pas bhej diya haai. aur yahova yahooda ko paavitra desh men apana bhag kar lega, aur yarooshalem ko fir apana ttharaaega.." 
Zechariah2:13 he sab praanaiyon! yahova ke samhane chupake raho kyonki vah jagakar apane pavitra nivasasthan se nikala haai.. 
Zechariah3:1 fir us ne yahoshoo mahayajak ko yahova ke doot ke samhane khda hua mujhe dikhaya, aur shautan usakee daahinee or usaka virodha karane ko khda tha." 
Zechariah3:2 tab yahova ne shautan se kaha, he shautan yahova tujh ko ghaudke! yahova jo yarooshalem ko apana leta haai, vahee tujhe ghaudke! kya yah ag se nikalee hui lukattee see naheen haai?" 
Zechariah3:3 us samay yahoshoo to doot ke samhane maaila vasr paahine huae khda tha. 
Zechariah3:4 tab doot ne un se jo samhane khde the kaha, isake ye maaile vasr utaro. fir us ne us se kaha, dek, maain ne tera adharma door kiya haai, aur maain tujhe sundar vasr paahina deta hoon." 
Zechariah3:5 tab maain ne kaha, isake sir par aek shuuddh pagadee rakhee jaae. aur unhon ne usake sir par yajak ke yogy shuuddh pagadee rakhee, aur usako vasr pahinaae us samay yahova ka doot pas khda raha.." 
Zechariah3:6 tab yahova ke doot ne yahoshoo ko chitakar kaha," 
Zechariah3:7 senaon ka yahova tujh se yon kahata haai: yadi too mere magorn par chale, aur jo kuchh maain ne tujhe saunp diya haai usakee raksha kare, to too mere bhvan ka nyayee, aur mere anganon ka rakshak hoga aur maain tujh ko inake beech men ane jane doonga jo pas khde haain." 
Zechariah3:8 he yaheashoo mahayajak, too sun le, aur tere bhaibandha jo tere samhane khde haain ve bhee sune, kyonki ve manushy shuubh shakun haain: suno, maain apane das shaakh ko pragatt karoonga." 
Zechariah3:9 us patthr ko dekh jise maain ne yahoshoo ke age rakha haai, us ek hee patthr ke upar sat ankhen banee haai, senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, dekh maain us patthr par khod deta hoo, aur is desh ke adharma ko ek hee din men door kar doonga." 
Zechariah3:10 usee din tum apane apane bhaibandhauon ko dakhlata aur anjeer ke vraksha ke neeche ane ke liye bulaoge, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Zechariah4:1 fir jo doot mujh se baten karata tha, us ne akar mujhe aeesa jagaya jaaisa koi neend se jagaya jaae." 
Zechariah4:2 aur us ne mujh se poochha, tujhe kya dekh padta haai? maain ne kaha, aek deevatt haai, jo sampoorn sone kee haai, aur usaka kattora usakee chottee par haai, aur us par usake sat deepak haai jin ke upar battee ke liye sat sat naaliyan haain." 
Zechariah4:3 aur deevatt ke pas jalapai ke do vraksha haai, aek us kattore kee dahinee or, aur doosara usakee bain ora." 
Zechariah4:4 tab maain ne us doot se jo mujh se baten karata tha, poochha, he mere prabhu, ye kya haain?" 
Zechariah4:5 jo doot mujh se baten karata tha, us ne mujh ko uttr diya, kya too naheen janata ki ye kya haain? maain ne kaha, he mere prabhu maain naheen janata." 
Zechariah4:6 tab us ne mujhe uttr dekar kaha, jaroobbabel ke liye yahova ka yah vachan haai: n to bal se, aur n shaaktai se, parantu mere atma ke dara hoga, mujh senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Zechariah4:7 he bade pahad, too kya haai? jaroobbabel ke samhane too maaidan ho jaaega aur vah chottee ka patthr yah pukarate huae aaega, us par anugrah ho, anugraha!" 
Zechariah4:8 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Zechariah4:9 jaroobbabel ne apane hathon se is bhvan kee nev dalee haai, aur vahee apane hathon se usako taaiyar bhee karega. tab too janega ki senaon ke yahova ne mujhe tumhare pas bheja haai." 
Zechariah4:10 kyonaki kis ne chhottee baton ke din tuchchh jana haai? yahova apanee in saton ankhon se saree prathvee par draashtti karake sahul ko jaroobbabel ke hath men dekhega, aur anandait hoga." 
Zechariah4:11 tab maain ne us se fir poochha, ye do jalapai ke vraksha kya haain jo deevatt kee daahinee-bai or haain?" 
Zechariah4:12 fir maain ne doosaree bar us se poochha, jalapai kee donon daliyen kya haain jo sone kee donon naaliyon ke dara apane men se sonahala tel undelatee haain?" 
Zechariah4:13 us ne mujh se kaha, kya too naheen janata ki ye kya haain? maain ne kaha, he mere prabhu maain naheen janata." 
Zechariah4:14 tab us ne kaha, inaka arth taje tel se bhre huae ve do puroosh haain jo saree prathvee ke parameshvar ke pas hajir rahate haain.." 
Zechariah5:1 maain ne fir ankhen uttain to kya dekha, ki aek likha hua patra ud raha haai." 
Zechariah5:2 doot ne mujh se poochha, tujhe kya dekh padta haai? maain ne kaha, mujhe aek likha hua patra udta hua dekh padta haai, jis kee lambai bees hath aur chaudai das hath kee haai." 
Zechariah5:3 tab us ne mujh se kaha, yah vah shaap haai jo is sare desh par padnevala haai kyonki jo koi choree karata haai, vah usakee aek or likhe huae ke anusar maail kee nain nikal diya jaaega aur jo koi shapath khata haai, vah usakee doosaree or likhe huae ke anusar maail kee nain nikal diya jaaega." 
Zechariah5:4 senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai, maain usako aeesa chalaunga ki vah chor ke ghar men aur mere nam kee joottee shapath khanevale ke ghar men ghausakar ttharega, aur usako lakadee aur patthron samet nash kar dega.." 
Zechariah5:5 tab jo doot mujh se baten karata tha, us ne bahar jakar mujh se kaha, ankhen uttakar dekh ki vah kya vastu nikalee ja rahee haain?" 
Zechariah5:6 maain ne poochha, vah kya haai? us ne kaha? vah vastu jo nikalee ja rahee haai vah aek aepa ka nap haai. aur us ne fir kaha, sare desh men logon ka yahee roop haai." 
Zechariah5:7 fir maain ne kya dekha ki kikkar bhr shaeesho ka aek battkhra uttaya ja raha haai, aur aek sree haai jo aepa ke beech men baaittee haai." 
Zechariah5:8 aur doot ne kaha, isaka arth dushttta haai. aur us ne us sree ko aepa ke beech men daba diya, aur shaeesho ke us battkhre ko lekar us se aepa ka munh ddhanp diya." 
Zechariah5:9 tab maain ne ankhen uttai, to kya dekha ki do striayen chalee jatee haain jin ke pankh pavan men faaile huae haai, aur unake pankh lagalag ke se haai, aur ve aepa ko akash aur prathvee ke beech men udaae liae ja rahee haain." 
Zechariah5:10 tab maain ne us doot se jo mujh se baten karata tha, poochha, ki ve aepa ko kahan liae jatee haain?" 
Zechariah5:11 us ne kaha, shainar desh men liae jatee haain ki vahan usake liye ek bhvan banaen aur jab vah taaiyar kiya jaa, tab vah epa vahan apane hee paae par khda kiya jaega.." 
Zechariah6:1 maain ne fir ankhen uttai, aur kya dekha ki do pahadon ke beech se char rath chale ate haain aur ve pahad peetal ke haain." 
Zechariah6:2 paahile rath men lal ghaede aur doore rath men kale," 
Zechariah6:3 teesare rath men shvet aur chauthe rath men chitakabare aur badamee ghaede haain. 
Zechariah6:4 tab maain ne us doot se jo mujh se baten karata tha, poochha, he mere prabhu, ye kya haain?" 
Zechariah6:5 doot ne mujh se kaha, ye akash ke charon vayu haain jo saree prathvee ke prabhu ke pas upaasthiat rahate haai, parantu ab nikal aae haain." 
Zechariah6:6 jis rath men kale ghaede haai, vah uttr desh kee or jata haai, aur shvet ghaede unake peechhe peechhe chale jate haai, aur chitakabare ghaede daakkhian desh kee or jate haain." 
Zechariah6:7 aur badamee ghaedon ne nikalakar chaha ki jakar prathvee par faera karen. so doot ne kaha, jakar prathvee par faera karo. tab ve prathvee par faera karane lage." 
Zechariah6:8 tab us ne mujh se pukarakar kaha, dek, ve jo uttr ke desh kee or jate haai, unhon ne vahan mere praan ko ttnda kiya haain.." 
Zechariah6:9 fir yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha: 
Zechariah6:10 bandhauai ke logon men se, heldaai, tobiyyah aur yadayah se kuchh le aur usee din too sapanyah ke putra yoshaiyah ke ghar men ja jis se ve babul se akar utare haain." 
Zechariah6:11 unake hath se sona chandee le, aur mukutt banakar unhen yahosadak ke putra yahoshoo mahayajak ke sir par rakh" 
Zechariah6:12 aur us se yah kah, senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, us puroosh ko dekh jis ka nam shaakh haai, vah apane hee sthan se ugakar yahova ke maandair ko banaaega." 
Zechariah6:13 vahee yahova ke mandair ko banaaega, aur mahima paaega, aur apane sinhasan par virajaman hokar prabhuta karega. aur usake sinhasan ke pas aek yajak bhee rahega, aur donon ke beech mel kee sammaati hogee." 
Zechariah6:14 aur ve mukutt helem, tobiyyah, yadayah, aur sapanyah ke putra hen ko mile, aur ve yahova ke mandair men smaran ke liye bane rahen.." 
Zechariah6:15 fir door door ke log a akar yahova ke maandair banane men sahayata karenge, aur tum janoge ki senaon ke yahova ne mujhe tumhare pas bheja haai. aur yadi tum man lagakar apane parameshvar yahova kee agyaaon ka palan karo to yah bat pooree hogee.." 
Zechariah7:1 fir dara raja ke chauthe varsha men kisalev nam nauven maheene ke chauthe din ko, yahova ka vachan jakaryah ke pas pahuncha." 
Zechariah7:2 betelavasiyon ne shareser aur regemmelek ko isaliye bheja tha ki yahova se binatee kare," 
Zechariah7:3 aur senaon ke yahova ke bhvan ke yajakon se aur bhvishyadvktaon se bhee yah poochhe, kya hamen upavas karake rona chaahiye jaaise ki kitane vasharen se ham panchaven maheene men karate aae haain?" 
Zechariah7:4 tab senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha 
Zechariah7:5 sab sadhaaran logon se aur yajakon se kah, ki jab tum in sattr vasharen ke beech panchaven aur sataven maheenon men upavas aur vilap karate the, tab kya tum sachamuch mere hee liye upavas karate the?" 
Zechariah7:6 aur jab tum khate-peete ho, to kya tum apane hee liye naheen khate, aur kya tum apane hee liye naheen peete ho?" 
Zechariah7:7 kya yah vahee vachan naheen haai, jo yahova agale bhvishyadvktaon ke dara us samay pukarakar kahata raha jab yarooshalem apane charon or ke nagaron samet chaain se basa hua tha, aur dakkhian desh aur neeche ka desh bhee basa hua tha?" 
Zechariah7:8 fir yahova ka yah vachan jakaryah ke pas pahuncha, senaon ke yahova ne yon kaha haai," 
Zechariah7:9 khrai se nyay chukana, aur aek doosare ke sath krapa aur daya se kam karana," 
Zechariah7:10 n to vidhava par andhor karata, n anathon par, n paradeshaee par, aur n deen jan para aur n apane apane man men aek doosare kee haani kee kalpana karana." 
Zechariah7:11 parantu unhon ne chitt lagana n chaha, aur hatt kiya, aur apane kanon ko moond liya taaki sun n saken." 
Zechariah7:12 varan unhon ne apane day ko isaliye bajra sa bana liya, ki ve us vyavastha aur us vachanon ko n man saken jinhen senaon ke yahova ne apane atma ke dara agale bhavishyadvktaon se kahala bheja tha. is karan senaon ke yahova kee or se un par bada krodha bhdka." 
Zechariah7:13 aur senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan hua, ki jaaise mere pukarane par unhon ne naheen suna, vaaise hee usake pukarane par maain bhee n sunoonga" 
Zechariah7:14 varan maain unhen un sab jaatiyon ke beech jinhen ve naheen janate, andhaee ke dara titara-abitar kar doonga, aur unaka desh unake peechhe aeesa ujad pada rahega ki us men kisee ka ana jana n hoga isee praakar se unhon ne manohar desh ko ujad kar diya.." 
Zechariah8:1 fir senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Zechariah8:2 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai: siyyon ke liye mujhe badee jalan hui varan bahut hee jalajalahatt mujh men utpann hui haai. 
Zechariah8:3 yahova yon kahata haai, maain siyyon men lautt aya hoo, aur yaroosholam ke beech men vas kiae rahoonga, aur yarooshalem kee sachchai ka nagar kahalaaega, aur senaon ke yahova ka parvat, pavitra parvat kahalaaega." 
Zechariah8:4 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, yarooshalem ke chaukon men fir booddhe aur booddhiyan bahut ayu kee hone ke kara, apane apane hath men lattee liae huae baaitta karengee." 
Zechariah8:5 aur nagar men chauk khelanevale ladkon aur ladkiyon se bhre rahenge. 
Zechariah8:6 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, chahe un dinon men yah bat in bache huon kee draashtti men anokhee tthare, parantu kya meree draashtti men bhee yah anokhee ttharegee, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai?" 
Zechariah8:7 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, dekho, maain apanee praja ka uddhar karake use poorab se aur paachchhim se le aunga" 
Zechariah8:8 aur maain unhen le akar yarooshalem ke beech men basaunga aur ve meree praja ttharenge aur maain unaka parameshvar ttharoonga, yah to sachchai aur dharma ke sath hoga.." 
Zechariah8:9 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, tum in dinon men ye vachan un bhvishyadvktaon ke mukh se sunate ho jo senaon ke yahova ke bhvan kee nev dalane ke samay arthata mandair ke banane ke samay men the." 
Zechariah8:10 un dinon ke paahile, n to manushy kee majadooree milatee thee aur n pashu ka bhada, varan satanevalon ke karan n to anevale ko chaain milata tha aur n janevale ko kyonki maain sab manushyon se ek doosare par chaddhai karata tha." 
Zechariah8:11 parantu ab maain is praja ke bache huon se aeesa bartav n karoonga jaaisa ki agale dinon men karata tha, senaon ke yahova kee yahee vanee haai." 
Zechariah8:12 kyonaki ab shaaantai ke samay kee upaj arthata dakhlata fala karengee, prathvee apanee upaj upajaya karegee, aur akash se os gira karegee kyonaki maain apanee is praja ke bache huon ko in sab ka adhaikaree kar doonga." 
Zechariah8:13 aur he yahooda ke gharane, aur israael ke gharane, jis prakar tum anyajatiyon ke beech shaap ke karan the usee prakar maain tumhara uddhar karoonga, aur tum ashaeesh ke karan hoge. isaaliye tum mat dro, aur n tumhare hath ddheele padne paaen.." 
Zechariah8:14 kyonaki senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, jis prakar jab tumhare purakha mujhe ris dilate the, tab maain ne unakee haani karane ke liye ttan liya tha aur fir n pachhtaya," 
Zechariah8:15 usee prakar maain ne in dinon men yarooshalem kee aur yahooda ke gharane kee bhlai karane ko ttana haai isaliye tum mat dro. 
Zechariah8:16 jo jo kam tumhen karana chaahiye, ve ye haain: aek doosare ke sath saty bola karana, apanee kachahariyon men sachchai ka aur melaamilap kee neeati ka nyay karana," 
Zechariah8:17 aur apane apane man men aek doosare kee hani kee kalpana n karana, aur joottee shapath se praeeti n rakhna, kyonaki in sab kamon se maain dharana karata hoo, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Zechariah8:18 fir senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan mere pas pahuncha," 
Zechariah8:19 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai: chauthe, panchave, sataven aur dasaven maheene men jo jo upavas ke din hote haai, ve yahooda ke gharane ke liye harsha aur anand aur utsav ke parvon ke din ho jaaegen isaaliye ab tum sachchai aur melaamilap se praeeti rakho.." 
Zechariah8:20 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, aeesa samay anevala haai ki desh desh ke log aur bahut nagaron ke rahanevale aaenge." 
Zechariah8:21 aur aek nagar ke rahanevale doosare nagar ke rahanevalon ke pas jakar kahenge, yahova se binatee karane aur senaon ke yahova ko ddoonddhne ke liye chalo maain bhee chaloonga." 
Zechariah8:22 bahut se deshaen ke varan samarthee jaatiyon ke log yarooshalem men senaon ke yahova ko ddoonddhne aur yahova se binatee karane ke liye aaenge. 
Zechariah8:23 senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai: us dinon men bhanti bhanati kee bhasha bolanevalee sab jaatiyon men se das manushy, aek yahoodee puroosh ke vasr kee chhor ko yah kahakar pakad lenge, ki, ham tumhare sang chalenge, kyonaki ham ne suna haai ki parameshvar tumhare sath haai.." 
Zechariah9:1 hadraak desh ke vishay men yahova ka kaha hua bharee vachan jo daamishk par bhee padega. kyonki yahova kee drashtti manushy jati kee, aur israael ke sab gotraen kee or lagee haai" 
Zechariah9:2 hamat kee or jo damishk ke nikatt haai, aur sor aur seedon kee or, ye to bahut hee buaddhmaiana haain." 
Zechariah9:3 sor ne apane liye aek gaddh banaya, aur dhooli ke kinakon kee nain chandee, aur sadkon kee keech ke saman chokha sona battor rakha haai." 
Zechariah9:4 dekho, parameshvar usako auron ke aadhaikar men kar dega, aur usake ghamand ko todkar samudra men dal dega aur vah nagar ag ka kaur ho jaaega.." 
Zechariah9:5 yah dekhkar ashakalon drega ajja ko dukh hoga, aur aekron bhee drega, kyonki usakee asha toottegee aur ajja men fir raja n rahega aur ashkalon fir basee n rahegee." 
Zechariah9:6 aur ashdod men anajane log basenge isee prakar maain palishtaiyon ke garva ko tooonga. 
Zechariah9:7 maain usake munh men se aher ka lohoo aur ghainaunee vastuen nikal doonga, tab un men se jo bacha rahega, vah hamare parameshvar ka jan hoga, aur yahooda men aadhaipaati sa hoga aur aekron ke log yaboosiyon ke saman banenge." 
Zechariah9:8 tab maain us sena ke karan jo pas se hokar jaaegee aur fir lautt aaegee, apane bhvan ke as pas chhavanee kiae rahoonga, aur koi satanevala fir unake pas se hokar n jaaega, kyonaki maain ye baten ab bhee dekhta hoon.." 
Zechariah9:9 he siyyon bahut hee magan ho. he yarooshalem jayajayakar kara! kyonki tera raja tere pas aaega vah dharmee aur uddhar paya hua haai, vah deen haai, aur gadahe par varan gadahee ke bachche par chaddha hua aaega." 
Zechariah9:10 maain aepraaim ke rath aur yarooshalem ke ghaede nash karoonga aur yuddh ke dhanush tod dale jaaenge, aur vah anyajaatiyon se shaantai kee baten kahega vah samudra se samudra tak aur mahanad se prathvee ke door door ke deshaen tak prabhuta karega.." 
Zechariah9:11 aur too bhee sun, kyonki meree vacha ke lohoo ke kara, maain ne tere bandaiyon ko bina jal ke gadhe men se ubar liya haai." 
Zechariah9:12 he asha dhare huae bandaiyon! gaddh kee or firo maain aj hee batata hoon ki maain tum ko badale men doona sukh doonga. 
Zechariah9:13 kyonaki maain ne dhanush kee nain yahooda ko chaddhakar us par teer kee nain aepraaim ko lagaya haai. maain siyyon ke nivaasiyon ko yoonan ke nivaasiyon ke virooddh ubharoonga, aur unhen veer kee talavar sa kar doonga." 
Zechariah9:14 tab yahova unake upar dikhai dega, aur usaka teer bijalee kee nain choottega aur parameshvar yahova naraasinga foonkakar dakkhian desh kee see andhaee men hoke chalega." 
Zechariah9:15 senaon ka yahova ddhal se unhen bachaaega, aur ve apane shatrauon ka nash karenge, aur unake gofan ke patthron par panv dharenge aur ve peekar aeesa kolahal karenge jaaisa log dakhmadha peekar karate haain aur ve kattore kee nain va vedee ke kone kee nain bhre jaaegen.." 
Zechariah9:16 us samay unaka parameshvar yahova unako apanee prajaroopee bhed-bakaariyan janakar unaka uddhar karega aur ve mukuttmaanai ttharake, usakee boomi se bahut unche par chamakate rahenge." 
Zechariah9:17 usaka kya hee kushal, aur kya hee shaebha usakee hogee! usake javan log ann khakar, aur kumariyan naya dakhmadha peekar shttpushtt ho jaengee.." 
Zechariah10:1 barasat ke ant men yahova se vashara mango, yahova se jo bijalee chamakata haai, aur vah unako vashara dega aur har aek ke khet men haariyalee upajaaega." 
Zechariah10:2 kyonaki grahadevata anarth bat kahate aur bhavee kahanevale jootta darshan dekhte aur jootte svapan sunate, aur vyarth shaaantai dete haain. is karan log bhed-bakaariyon kee nain bhttk gaae aur charavahe n hone ke karan durdasha men pade haain.." 
Zechariah10:3 mera krodha charavahon par bhdka haai, aur maain un bakaron ko dand doonga kyonaki senaon ka yahova apane jhund arthata yahooda ke gharane ka hal dekhne ka aaega, aur ladai men unako apana shttpushtt ghaeda sa banaaega." 
Zechariah10:4 usee men se kone ka patthr, usee men se koonttee, usee men se yuddh ka dhanusha, usee men se sab pradhaan pragatt honge." 
Zechariah10:5 aur ve aeese veeron ke saman honge jo ladai men apane baairiyon ko sadkon ke keech kee nain raundate hon ve ladenge, kyonki yahova unake sang rahega, is karan ve veerata se ladenge aur savaron kee asha toottegee.." 
Zechariah10:6 maain yahooda ke gharane ko parakramee karoonga, aur yoosufa ke gharane ka uddhar karoonga. aur mujhe un par daya ai haai, is karan maain unhen lautta lakar unheen ke desh men basaunga, aur ve aeese honge, manon maain ne unako man se naheen utara maain unaka parameshvar yahova hoo, isaaliye unakee sun loonga." 
Zechariah10:7 aepraaimee log veer ke saman honge, aur unaka man aeesa anaandait hoga jaaise dakhmadha se hota haai. yah dekhkar unake ladkebalen anand karenge aur unaka man yahova ke karan magan hoga.." 
Zechariah10:8 maain seenttee bajakar unako ikattha karoonga, kyonaki maain unaka chhudanevala hoo, aur ve aeese baddhenge jaaise pahale baddhe the." 
Zechariah10:9 yadhypi maain unhen jaati-jati ke logon ke beech chhtairaunga taubhee ve door door deshaen men mujhe smaran karenge, aur apane balakon samet jeevit lautt aaenge." 
Zechariah10:10 maain unahen misr desh se lautta launga, aur ashshoor se ikattha karoonga, aur gilad aur labanon ke deshaen men le akar itana baddhaunga ki vahan unakee samai n hogee." 
Zechariah10:11 vah us kashttdai samudra men se hokar usakee laharen dabata hua jaaega aur neel nadee ka sab gaahira jal sookh jaaega. aur ashshoor ka ghamand toda jaaega aur misr ka rajadand jata rahega. 
Zechariah10:12 maain unhen yahova dara parakramee karoonga, aur ve usake nam se chalen firenge, yahova kee yahee vanee haai.." 
Zechariah11:1 he labanon, ag ko rasta de ki vah akar tere devadaron ko bhsm kare!" 
Zechariah11:2 he sanaubaro, hay, hay, karo! kyonaki devadar gir gaya haai aur bade se bade vraksha nash ho gaae haain! he basha ke banj vrakshae, hay, hay, karo! kyonaki agamy van katta gaya haai!" 
Zechariah11:3 charavahon ke hahakar ka shabd ho raha haai, kyonaki unaka vibhv nash ho gaya haai! javan sinhon ka garajana sunai deta haai, kyonaki yaradan ke teer ka ghana van nash kiya gaya haai!" 
Zechariah11:4 mere parameshvar yahova ne yah agyaa dee: ghaat hanevalee bhed-bakaariyon ka charavaha ho ja. 
Zechariah11:5 unake mol lenevale unhen ghaat karane par bhee apane ko doshaee naheen janate, aur unake bechanevale kahate haai, yahova dhany haai, ham dhanee ho gaae haain aur unake charavahe un par kuchh daya naheen karate." 
Zechariah11:6 yahova kee yah vanee haai, maain is desh ke rahanevalon par fir daya n karoonga. dekho, maain manushyon ko aek doosare ke hath me, aur unake raja ke hath men pakadva doonga aur ve is desh ko nash karenge, aur maain usake rahanevalon ko unake vash se n chhudaunga.." 
Zechariah11:7 so maain ghaat honevalee bhed-bakaariyon ko aur vishosh karake un men se jo deen theen unako charane laga. aur maain ne do lattyaian leen aek ka nam maain ne anugrah rakha, aur doosaree ka nam aekata. inako liye huae maain un bhed-bakaariyon ko charane laga." 
Zechariah11:8 aur maain ne unake teenon charavahon ko aek maheene men nash kar diya, parantu maain unake karan adhaeer tha, aur ve mujhe se gharana karatee theen." 
Zechariah11:9 tab maain ne un se kaha, maain tum ko n charaunga. tum men se jo mare vah mare, aur jo nash ho vah nash ho, aur jo bachee rahen ve aek doosare ka mans khaaen." 
Zechariah11:10 aur maain ne apanee vah lattee tod dalee, jisaka nam anugrah tha, ki jo vacha maain ne sab anyajaatiyon ke sath bandhaee thee use tooon." 
Zechariah11:11 vah usee din todee gai, aur is se deen bhed-bakaariyan jo mujhe takatee thee, unhon ne jan liya ki yah yahova ka vachan haai." 
Zechariah11:12 tab maain ne un se kaha, yaadi tum ko achchha lage to meree majadooree do, aur naheen to mat do. tab unhon ne meree majadooree men chandee ke tees ttukade taul diae." 
Zechariah11:13 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, inhen kumhar ke age faenk de, yah kya hee bharee dam haai jo unhon ne mera ttharaya haai? tab maain ne chandee ke un tees ttukadon ko lekar yahova ke ghar men kumhar ke age faenk diya." 
Zechariah11:14 tab maain ne apanee doosaree lattee jis ka nam aekata tha, isaaliye tod dalee ki maain us bhaichare ke nate ko tod daloon jo yahooda aur israael ke beech men haai.." 
Zechariah11:15 tab yahova ne mujh se kaha, ab too mooddh charavahe ke haathaiyar le le." 
Zechariah11:16 kyonaki maain is desh men aek aeesa charavaha ttharaunga, jo khoi hui ko n ddoonddhega, n titara-abitar ko ikatthee karenga, n ghaayalon ko changa karega, n jo bhlee changee haain unaka palana-poshan karega, varan mottyaien ka mans khaaega aur unake khuron ko faad dalega." 
Zechariah11:17 hay us nikamme charavahe par jo bhed-bakaariyon ko chhod jata haai! usakee banh, aur dahinee ankh donon par talavar lagegee, tab usakee banh sookh jaaegee aur usakee dahinee ankh foott jaaegee.." 
Zechariah12:1 israael ke vishay men yahova ka kaha hua bharee vachana: yahova ko akash ka tananevala, prathvee kee nev dalanevala aur manushy kee atma ka rachanevala haai, usakee yah vanee haai," 
Zechariah12:2 dekho, maain yarooshalem ko charon or kee sab jaatiyon ke liye ladkhda dene ke mad ka kattora tthara doonga aur jab yarooshalem ghor liya jaaega tab yahooda kee dasha bhee aeesee hee hogee." 
Zechariah12:3 aur us samay prathvee kee saree jaatiyan yarooshalem ke virooddh ikatthee hongee, tab maain usako itana bharee patthr banaunga, ki jo usako uttaaenge ve bahut hee ghaayal honge." 
Zechariah12:4 yahova kee yah vanee haai, us samay maain har aek ghaede ka ghabara doonga, aur usake savar ko dhaayal karoonga. parantu maain yahooda ke gharane par krapadrashtti rakoonga, jab maain anyajatiyon ke sab ghaedon ko andha kar daloonga." 
Zechariah12:5 tab yahooda ke adhaipaati sochenge ki yarooshalem ke nivasee apane parameshvar, senaon ke yahova kee sahayata se mere sahayak banenge.." 
Zechariah12:6 us samay maain yahooda ke adhaipaatiyon ko aeesa kar doonga, jaaisee lakadee ke ddher men ag bhree angettee va poole men jalatee hui mashaal hotee haai, arthata ve daahine banae charon or ke sab logon ko bhsm kar dalenge aur yarooshalem jahan ab basee haai, vaheen basee rahegee, yarooshalem men.." 
Zechariah12:7 aur he yahova paahile yahooda ke tambuon ka uddhar karega, kaheen aeesa n ho ki daud ka gharana aur yarooshalem ke nivasee apane apane vibhv ke karan yahooda ke virooddh baddhai maren." 
Zechariah12:8 us samay yahova yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ko mano ddhal se bacha lega, aur us sakay un men se jo ttokar khanevala ho vah daud ke saman hoga aur daud ka gharana parameshvar ke saman hoga, arthata yahova ke us doot ke saman jo unake age age chalata tha." 
Zechariah12:9 aur us samay maain un sab jaatiyon ko nash karane ka yatn karoonga jo yarooshalem par chaddhai karengee.. 
Zechariah12:10 aur maain daud ke gharane aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon par apana anugrah karanevalee aur praarthna sikhanevalee atma undeloonga, tab ve mujhe takenge arthata jise unhon ne bedha haai, aur usake liye aeese roaenge jaaise aekalaute putra ke liye rote-peettte haai, aur aeesa bharee shaek karenge, jaaisa pahilautte ke liye karate haain." 
Zechariah12:11 us samay yarooshalem men itana rona-peettna hoga jaaisa maagion kee tarai men hadadirmmon men hua tha. 
Zechariah12:12 sare desh men vilap hoga, har aek parivar men alag alaga arthata daud ke gharane ka paarivar alag, aur unakee striayan alaga natan ke gharane ka paarivar alag, aur unakee striayan alaga" 
Zechariah12:13 levee ke gharane ka parivar alag aur unakee striayan alaga shaimiyon ka paarivar alaga aur unakee striayan alaga 
Zechariah12:14 aur jitane parivar rah gaae hon har aek paarivar alag aur unakee striayan bhee alag alaga 
Zechariah13:1 usee samay daud ke gharane aur yarooshalem ke nivaasiyon ke liye pap aur maalinata dhaene ke nimitt ek bahata hua sota hoga.. 
Zechariah13:2 aur senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, ki us samay maain is desh me se moorto ke nam mitta daloonga, aur ve fir smaran men n rahengee aur maain bhavishyadvktaon aur ashuuddh atma ko is desh men se nikal doonga." 
Zechariah13:3 aur yaadi koi fir bhvishyadaanee kare, to usake mata-pita, jin se vah utpann hua, us se kahenge, too jeevit n bachega, kyonaki too ne yahova ke nam se joott kaha haai so jab vah bhavishyadanee kare, tab usake mata-apita jin se vah utpann hua usako bedha dalenge." 
Zechariah13:4 us samay har ek bhvishyadvkta bhavishyavanee karate huae apane apane darshan se lajjait honge, aur dhaekha dene ke liye kambal ka vasr n paahinenge," 
Zechariah13:5 varantu vah kahega, maain bhavishyadvkta nahee, kisan hoon kyonaki ladkapan hee se maain auron ka das hoon." 
Zechariah13:6 tab us se yah poochha jaaega, teree chhatee par ye ghaav kaaise hua, tab vah kahega, ye ve hee haain jo mere praemiyon ke ghar men mujhe lage haain.." 
Zechariah13:7 senaon ke yahova kee yah vanee haai, he talavar, mere ttharaae huae charavahe ke virooddh arthata jo puroosh mera svajati haai, usake virooddh chala. too us charavahe ko kat, tab bhed-bakaariyan titara-abitar ho jaaengee aur bachchon par maain apane hath baddhaunga." 
Zechariah13:8 yahova kee yah bhee vanee haai, ki is desh ke sare nivaasiyon kee do tihai mar dalee jaaegaee aur bachee hui tihai us men banee rahegee." 
Zechariah13:9 us tihai ko maain ag men dalakar aeesa nirmal karoonga, jaaisa roopa nirmal kiya jata haai, aur aeesa jachoonga jaaisa sona jancha jata haai. ve mujh se praarthna kiya karenge, aur maain unakee sunoonga. maain unake vishay men kahoonga, ye meree praja haai, aur ve mere vishay men kahenge, yahova hamara parameshvar haai.." 
Zechariah14:1 suno, yahova ka aek aeesa din aneval haai jis men tera dhan loottkar tere beech men bantt liya jaaega." 
Zechariah14:2 kyonaki maain sab jaatiyon ko yarooshalem se ladne ke liye ikattha karoonga, aur vah nagar le liya nagara. aur ghar lootte jaaenge aur striayan bhrashtt kee jaaengee nagar ke adho log bandhauvai men jaaenge, parantu praja ke shosh log nagar hee men rahane paaenge." 
Zechariah14:3 tab yahova nikalakar un jaatiyon se aeesa ladega jaaisa vah sangraam ke din men lada tha. 
Zechariah14:4 aur us samay vah jalapai ke parvat par panv dharega, jo poorab or yarooshalem ke samhane haai tab jalapai ka parvat poorab se lekar paachchhim tak beechobeech se fattkar bahut bada khdd ho jaaega tab adha parvat uttr kee or aur adha dakkhian kee or hatt jaaega." 
Zechariah14:5 tab tum mere banaae huae us khdd asel tak pahunchega, varan tum aeese bhagoge jaaise us bhuidaul ke dr se bhage the jo yahooda ke raja ujjaiyah ke dinon men hua tha. tab mera parameshvar yahova aaega, aur sab paavitra log usake sath honge.." 
Zechariah14:6 us samay kuchh ujiyala n rahega, kyonaki jyotigan simatt jaenge." 
Zechariah14:7 aur lagatar aek hee din hoga jise yahova hee janata haai, n to din hoga, aur n rat hogee, parantu sanjh ke samay ujiyala hoga.." 
Zechariah14:8 us samay yarooshalem se bahata hua jal foott nikalega usakee ek shaakha poorab ke tal aur doosaree pachchhim ke samudra kee or bahegee, aur dhoop ke dinon men aur jade ke dinon men bhee barabar bahatee rahengee.." 
Zechariah14:9 tab yahova saree prathvee ka raja hoga aur us samay aek hee yahova aur usaka nam bhee aek hee mana jaaega.. 
Zechariah14:10 geba se lekar yarooshalem kee dakkhian or ke rimmon tak sab boomi araba ke saman ho jaaegee. parantu vah unchee hokar binyameen ke faattk se lekar paahile faattk ke sthan tak, aur konevale faattk tak, aur hananel ke gummatt se lekar raja ke dakhrasakundon tak apane sthan men basegee." 
Zechariah14:11 aur log us men basenge kyonki fir satyanash ka shaap n hoga aur yarooshalem bekhttke basee rahegee. 
Zechariah14:12 aur jitanee jatiyon ne yarooshalem se yuddh kiya haai un sabhon ko yahova aeesee mar se marega, ki khde khde unaka mans sad jaaega, aur unakee ankhen apane golakon men sad jaaengee, aur unakee jeebh unake munh men sad jaaegee." 
Zechariah14:13 aur us samay yahova kee or se un men badee ghabarahatt paaittegee, aur ve aek doosare par apane apane hath uttaaenge." 
Zechariah14:14 yahooda bhee yarooshalem men ladega, aur sona, chandee, vasr adi charon or kee sab jaatiyon kee dhan sampaati us men battoree jaaegee." 
Zechariah14:15 aur ghaede, khchchar, untt aur gadahe varan jitane pashu unakee chhavaniyon men honge ve bhee aeesee hee beemaree se mare jaaenge.." 
Zechariah14:16 tab jine log yarooshalem par chaddhnevalee sab jaatiyon men se bache rahenge, ve praati varsha raja ko arthata senaon ke yahova ko dandvata karane, aur jhopaadiyon ka parva manane ke liye yarooshalem ko jaya karenge." 
Zechariah14:17 aur prathvee ke kulon men se jo log yarooshalem men raja, arthata senaon ke yahova ko dandvat karane ke liye n jaaenge, unake yahan vashara n hogee." 
Zechariah14:18 aur yaadi misr ka kul vahan n aa, to kya un par vah maree n padegee jis se yahova un jatiyon ko marega jo jhopadiyon ka parva manane ke liye n jaaenge?" 
Zechariah14:19 yah misr ka aur un sab jatiyon ka pap ttharega, jo jhopaadiyon ka parva manane ke liye n jaaenge." 
Zechariah14:20 us samay ghaedon kee ghanttyaien par bhee yah likha rahega, yahova ke liye paavitra. aur yahova ke bhvan ki hanadiyan un kattoron ke tuly pavitra ttharengee, jo vedee ke samhane rahate haain." 
Zechariah14:21 varan yarooshalem men aur yahooda desh men sab handiyan senaon ke yahova ke liye paavitra ttharengee, aur sab melabaali karanevale a akar un handyaien men mans sijhaya karenge. aur sab senaon ke yahova ke bhvan men fir koi vyoparee n paya jaaega.." 
Malachi1:1 malakee ke dara israael ke vishay men kaha hua yahova ka bharee vachana.. 
Malachi1:2 yahova yah kahata haai, maain ne tum se praem kiya haai, parantu tum poochhte ho, too ne kis bat men ham se praem kiya haai? yahova kee yah vanee haai, kya aesav yakoob ka bhai n tha?" 
Malachi1:3 taubhee maain ne yakoob se praem kiya parantu aesav ko aapiry janakar usake pahadon ko ujad dala, aur usakee bapautee ko jangal ke geedadon ka kar diya haai." 
Malachi1:4 aedom kahata haai, hamara desh ujad gaya haai, parantu ham khndharon ko firakar basaaenge senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai, yadi ve banaae bhee, parantu maain ddha doonga unaka nam dushtt jati padega, aur ve aeese log kahalaaenge ji par yahova sadaaiv krodhait rahe." 
Malachi1:5 tumharee ankhe ise dekhengee, aur tum kahoge, yahova ka pratap israael ke sivane kee paralee or bhee baddhta jaae.." 
Malachi1:6 putra pita ka, aur das svamee ka adar karata haai. yaadi maain pita hoo, to mera adar manana kahan haai? aur yadi maain svamee hoo, to mera bhy manana kahan? senaon ka yahova, tum yajakon se bhee jo mere nam ka apaman karate ho yahee bat poochhta haai. parantu tum poochhte ho, ham ne kis bat men tere nam ka apaman kiya haai? tum meree vedee par ashuuddh bhojan chaddhate ho." 
Malachi1:7 taubhee tum poochhte ho ki ham kis bat men tujhe ashuuddh ttharate haain? is bat men bhee, ki tum kahate ho, yahova kee mej tuchchh haai." 
Malachi1:8 jab tum andho pashu ko bali karane ke liye sameep le ate ho to kya yah bura naheen? aur jab tum langade va rogee pashu ko le ate ho, to kya yah bura naheen? apane hakim ke pas aeesee bhentt le ao kya vah tum se prasann hoga va tum par anugrah karega? senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Malachi1:9 aur ab maain tum se kahata hoo, ishvar se praarthna karo ki vah ham logon par anugrah kare. yah tumhare hath se hua haai tab kaya tum samajhte ho ki parameshvar tum men se kisee ka paksha karega? senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Malachi1:10 bhla hota ki tum men se koi maandair ke kivadon ko band karata ki tum meree vedee par vyarth ag jalane n pate! senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan haai, maain tum se kadapi prasann naheen hoo, aur n tumhare hath se bhentt grahan karoonga." 
Malachi1:11 kyonaki udayachal se lekar astachal tak anyajatiyon men mera nam mahan haai, aur har kaheen mere nam par dhoop aur shuuddh bhentt chaddhai jatee haai kyonaki anyajaatiyon men mera nam mahan haai, senaon ka yahee vachan haai." 
Malachi1:12 parantu tum log usako yah kahakar apaavitra ttharate ho ki yahova kee mej ashuuddh haai, aur jo bhojanavastu us par se milatee haai vah bhee tuchchh haai." 
Malachi1:13 fir tum yah bhee kahate ho, ki yah kaaisa bada upadrav haai! senaon ke yahova ka yah vachan haai. tum ne us bhojanavastu ke prati nak bhaun sikodee, aur atyachar se praapt kiae huae aur langade aur rogee pashu kee bhentt le ate ho! kya maain aeesee bhentt tumhare hath se grahan karoon? yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Malachi1:14 jis chhlee ke jhund men narapashu ho parantu vah mannat manakar parameshvar ko barja hua pashu chaddhaa, vah shaaapit haai maain to maharaja hoo, aur mera nam anyajatiyon men bhyayogy haai, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Malachi2:1 aur ab he yajako, yah agyaa tumhare liye haai." 
Malachi2:2 yaadi tum ise n suno, aur man lagakar mere nam ka adar n karo, to senaon ka yahova yon kahata haai ki maain tum ko shaap doonga, aur jo vastuaen meree ashaeesh se tumhen mileen haai, un par mera shaap padega, varan tum jo man naheen lagate ho is karan mera shaap un par pad chuka haai." 
Malachi2:3 dekho, maain tumhare karan beej ko jhdikoonga, aur tumhare pavorn ke yagyapashuuon ka mal faailaunga, aur usake sang tum bhee uttakar faenk diae jaoge." 
Malachi2:4 tak tum janoge ki maain ne tum ko yah agyaa isaaliye dilai haai ki levee ke sath meree bandhaee hui vacha banee rahe senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai. 
Malachi2:5 meree jo vacha usake sath bandhaee thee vah jeevan aur shaaantai kee thee, or maain ne yah isaliye usako diya ki vah bhy manata rahe aur us ne mera bhy man bhee liya aur mere nam se atyant bhy khata tha." 
Malachi2:6 usako meree sachchee vyavastha kantt thee, aur usake munh se kuttlai bat n nikalatee thee. vah shaantai aur seedhaai se mere sang sang chalata tha, aur bahuton ko adharma se lautta le aya tha." 
Malachi2:7 kyonaki yajak ko chaahiye ki vah apane antton se gyaan kee raksha kare, aur log usake munh se vyavastha poochhe, kyonki vah senaon ke yahova ka doot haai." 
Malachi2:8 parantu tum log dharma ke marga se hee hatt gaae tum bahuton ke liye vyavastha ke vishay men ttokar ka karan huae tum ne levee kee vacha ko tod diya haai, senaon ke yahova k yahee vachan haai." 
Malachi2:9 isaliye maain ne bhee tum ko sab logon ke samhane tuchchh aur neecha kar diya haai, kyonki tum mere magor par naheen chalate, varan vyavastha dene men munh dekha vichar karate hau.." 
Malachi2:10 kya ham sabhon ka aek hee pita naheen? kya aek hee parameshvar ne ham ko utpann naheen kiya? ham kyon aek doosare ka vishvasaghaat karake apen poorvajon kee vacha ko tod dete haain? 
Malachi2:11 yahooda ne vishvasaghaat kiya haai, aur israael men aur yarooshalem men gharaanait kam kiya gaya haai kyonaki yahooda ne birane devata kee kanya se vivah karake yahova ke paavitra sthan ko jo usaka piry haai, apaavitra kiya haai." 
Malachi2:12 jo puroosh aeesa kam kare, usake tambuon men se yakoob ka parameshvar usake ghar ke rakshak aur senaon ke yahova kee bhentt chaddhanevale ko yahooda se katt dalega!" 
Malachi2:13 fir tum ne yah doosara kam kiya haai ki tum ne yahova kee vedee ko ronevalon aur ahen bhranevalon ke ansuon se bhaigo diya haai, yahan tak ki vah tumharee bhentt kee or drashtti tak naheen karata, aur n prasann hokar usako tumhare hath se grahan karata haai. tum poochhte ho, aeesa kyon?" 
Malachi2:14 isaliye, kyonaki yahova tere aur teree us javanee kee sanaginee aur byahee hui sree ke beech sakshaee hua tha jis ka too ne vishvasaghaat kiya haai." 
Malachi2:15 kya us ne aek hee ko naheen banaya jab ki aur atmaaen usake pas theen? or aek hee ko kyon banaya? isaaliye ki vah parameshvar ke yogy santan chahata haai. isaaliye tum apanee atma ke vishay men chaukas raho, aur tum men se koi apaneee javanee kee sree se vishvasaghaat n kare." 
Malachi2:16 kyonaki israael ka parameshvar yahova yah kahata haai, ki maain sree-tyag se gharana karata hoo, aur us se bhee jo apane vasr ko upadrav se ddhanpata haai. isaliye tum apanee atma ke vishay men chaukas raho aur vishvasaghaat mat karo, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Malachi2:17 tum logon ne apanee baton se yahova ko ukata diya haai. taubhee poochhte ho, ki ham ne kis bate men use ukata diya? is me, ki tum kahate ho ki jo koi bura karata haai, vah yahova kee draashtti men achchha lagata haai, aur vah aeese logon se prasann rahata haai, aur yah, ki nyayee parameshvar kahan haai?" 
Malachi3:1 dekho, maain apane doot ko bhejata hoo, aur vah marga ko mere age sudhaarega, aur prabhu, jise tum ddoonddhte ho, vah achanak apane maandair men a jaaega han vacha ka vah doot, jise tum chahate ho, suno, vah ata haai, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Malachi3:2 parantu usake ane ke din kee kaun sah sakega? aur jab vah dikhai de, tab kaun khda rah sakega? kyonki vah sonar kee ag aur dhaebee ke sabun ke saman haai." 
Malachi3:3 vah roope ka tanevala aur shuuddh karanevala banega, aur leviyon ko shuuddh karega aur unako sone roope kee nain nirmal karega, tab ve yahova kee bhentt dharma se chaddhaaenge." 
Malachi3:4 tab yahooda aur yarooshalem kee bhentt yahova ko aeesee bhaaegee, jaaisee paahile dinon men aur praacheenakal men bhavatee thee.." 
Malachi3:5 tab maain nyay karane ko tumhare nikatt aunga aur ttonho, aur vyaabhaichaariyo, aur joottee kiriya khanevalon ke viroodd, aur jo majadoor kee majadooree ko dabate, aur vidhava aur anathon par andhor karate, aur paradeshaee ka nyay bigadte, aur mera bhy naheen manate, un sabhon ke virooddh maain turant sakshaee doonga, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Malachi3:6 kyonaki maain yahova badalata naheen isee kara, he yakoob kee santan tum nash naheen hue." 
Malachi3:7 apane purakhaon ke dinon se tum log meree vidhaiyon se hattte aae ho, or unaka palan naheen karate. tum meree or firo, tab maain bhee tumharee or firoonga, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai parantu tum poochhte ho, ham kis bat men firen?" 
Malachi3:8 kya manushy parameshvar ko dhaekha de sakata haai? dekho, tum mujh ko dhaekha dete ho, aur taubhee poochhte ho ki ham ne kis bat men tujhe lootta haai? dashamansh aur uttane kee bhentton men." 
Malachi3:9 tum par bharee shaap pada haai, kyonki tum mujhe loottte ho varan saree jati aeesa karatee haai." 
Malachi3:10 sare dashamansh bhndar men le ao ki mere bhvan men bhojanavastu rahe aur senaon ka yahova yah kahata haai, ki aeesa karake mujhe parakho ki maain akash ke jhrokhe tumhare liye kholakar tumhare upar aparampar ashaeesh kee vashara karata hoon ki naheen." 
Malachi3:11 maain tumhare liye nash karanevale ko aeesa ghaudkoonga ki vah tumharee boomi kee upaj nash n karega, aur tumharee dakhlataon ke fal kachche n girenge, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Malachi3:12 tab saree jatiyan tum ko dhany kahengee, kyonaki tumhara desh manohar desh hoga, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Malachi3:13 yahova yah kahata haai, tum ne mere virooddh ddhttiai kee baten kahee haain. parantu tum poochhte ho, ham ne tere virooddh men kya kaha haai?" 
Malachi3:14 tum ne kaha haai ki parameshvar kee seva karanee vyarth haai. ham ne jo usake bataae huae kamon ko poora kiya aur senaon ke yahova ke dr ke mare shaek ka paahirava pahine huae chale haai, is se kya labh hua?" 
Malachi3:15 ab se ham aabhaimanee logon ko dhany kahate haain kyonki duracharee to safal ban gaae haai, varan ve parameshvar kee pareeksha karane par bhee bach gaae haain.." 
Malachi3:16 tab yahova ka bhy mananevalon ne apas men baten kee, aur yahova dhyan dhar kar unakee sunata tha aur jo yahova ka bhy manate aur usake nam ka samman karate the, unake smaran ke nimitt usake samhane aek pustak likhee jatee thee." 
Malachi3:17 senaon ka yahova yah kahata haai, ki jo din maain ne ttharaya haai, us din ve log mere varan mere nij bhag ttharenge, aur maai un se aeesee komalata karoonga jaaisee koi apane seva karanevale putra se kare." 
Malachi3:18 tab tum firakar dharmee aur dushtt ka bhed, arthata jo parameshvar kee seva karata haai, aur jo usakee seva naheen karata, un donon ko bhed pahichan sakoge.." 
Malachi4:1 kyonaki dekho, vah dhadhakate bhtthe ka sa din ata haai, jab sab abhaimanee aur sab duracharee log anaj kee koonttee ban jaaenge aur us anevale din men ve aeese bhsm ho jaaenge ki unaka pata tak n rahega, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai." 
Malachi4:2 parantu tumhare liye jo mere nam ka bhy manate ho, dharma ka soorya uday hoga, aur usakee kiranon ke dara tum change ho jaoge aur tum nikalakar pale huae bachhdon kee nai koodoge aur faandoge." 
Malachi4:3 tab tum dushtton ko latad daloge, arthatamere us ttharaae huae din men ve tumhare panvon ke neeche kee rakh ban jaaenge, senaon ke yahova ka yahee vachan haai.." 
Malachi4:4 mere das moosa kee vyavastha arthata jo jo vidhai aur niyam maain ne sare israaeliyon ke liye usako horeb men diae the, unako smaran rakho.." 
Malachi4:5 dekho, yahova ke us bade aur bhyanak din ke ane se paahile, maain tumhare pas aeliyyah nabee ko bhejoonga." 
Malachi4:6 aur vah mata pita ke man ko unake putraen kee or, aur putraen ke man ko unake mata-pita kee or faerega aeesa n ho ki maain akar prathvee ko satyanash karoon.."
